Genesis1:1 Dituku dia kumpala Mvidi Mukulu kufuka diulu ne buloba. 
Genesis1:2 Pa buloba pavua tshianana kapayi tshintu, anu midima miaba yonsu. Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua unyunguluka pa mayi." 
Genesis1:3 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Butoke buenzeke!” Butoke kuenzekabu. 
Genesis1:4 Mvidi Mukulu kumona ne butoke budi buimpe, kupandukaye butoke ne midima." 
Genesis1:5 Kuinyikaye butoke ne: “Mmunya,” midima ne: “Mbutuku.”" 
Genesis1:6 Dituku dibidi Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Tshibuashibuashi tshienzeke munkatshi mua mayi, bua kupandulula mayi adi muinshi ne adi mulu!”" 
Genesis1:7 Mvidi Mukulu kufuka tshibuashibuashi bua kupandulula mayi adi muinshi ne adi mulu. Kuenzekabi nanku. 
Genesis1:8 Kuinyikaye tshibuashibuashi ne: “Ndiulu”. 
Genesis1:9 Dituku disatu Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Mayi onsu adi muinshi mua tshibuashibuashi adisange muaba umue, buloba bume bumueneke.” Kuenzekabi nanku." 
Genesis1:10 Mvidi Mukulu kuinyika muaba mume ne: “Mbuloba,” mayi avua madisange ne: “Mmayi manene.” Mvidi Mukulu kumona ne bionsu bidi bimpe." 
Genesis1:11 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Bikunyibua bitoloke pa buloba, bisosa bidi biela nzeba ne mitshi idi ikuama bimuma bia mishindu yonsu.”" 
Genesis1:12 Pa buloba kutoloka bisosa bidi biela nzeba ne mitshi idi ikuama bimuma bia mishindu yonsu. Kuenzekabi nanku. Mvidi Mukulu kumona ne bionsu bidi bimpe. 
Genesis1:13  
Genesis1:14 Dituku dinayi Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Mulu muikale bimunyi bua kuleja dishilangana dia munya ne butuku. Bimunyi abi bikale bimanyinu bia matuku, bidimu ne bikondu bia bibilu," 
Genesis1:15 bikale kabidi bitokesha pa buloba bujima.” Kuenzabi nanku. 
Genesis1:16 Mvidi Mukulu kufuka bimunyi binene bibidi: diba bua kutokesha mu munya, ngondu bua kukenkesha butuku. Kufukaye mitotu kabidi." 
Genesis1:17 Mvidi Mukulu kubiteka mu tshibuashibuashi bua bitokeshe pa buloba," 
Genesis1:18 diba ditokesha mu munya, ngondu ukenkesha butuku." 
Genesis1:19 Kumonaye ne: bionsu bidi bimpe. 
Genesis1:20 Dituku ditanu Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Mu mayi muikale minyinyi mishilangane, kabidi nyunyi ibuke mulu mu tshibuashibuashi!”" 
Genesis1:21 Mvidi Mukulu kufuka minyinyi minene ne mikese idi yenda mu mayi ya mishindu ne mishindu, ne nyunyi yonsu idi ibuka mulu ya mishindu mishilangane. Kumonaye ne bionsu bidi bimpe." 
Genesis1:22 Mvidi Mukulu kubiela lupemba, wamba ne:" 
Genesis1:23 “Nuluangane, nuwuje mayi manene, nyunyi ivulangane pa buloba bujima.”" 
Genesis1:24 Dituku disambombu Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Pa buloba pikale nyama ya mishindu yonsu: bilandadi, nyama ya ditu ne bimuna.” Kuenzekabi nanku." 
Genesis1:25 Mvidi Mukulu kufuka nyama ya pa buloba ya mishindu yonsu, bimuna ne bilandadi bia mishindu mishilangane. Kumonaye ne bionsu bidi bimpe." 
Genesis1:26 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Tufuke muntu mufuanangane netu, bua ikale mfumu wa minyinyi ya mu mayi, nyunyi ya mulu, bimuna, bilandadi ne bintu bionsu bidi pa buloba.”" 
Genesis1:27 Mvidi Mukulu kufuka bantu, bafuane Mvidi Mukulu mene. Kubafukaye mulume ne mukaji." 
Genesis1:28 Kubelaye lupemba, wamba ne: “Tantayi, nulelangane, nuvulangane buloba bujima. Nubukokeshe, nuikale bamfumu ba minyinyi ya mu mayi, nyunyi ya mulu, bimuna, bilandadi ne bionsu bidi pa buloba.”" 
Genesis1:29 Mvidi Mukulu kubambila ne: “Mbanupeshi midioku yonsu ya pa buloba idi ne ntete, ne mitshi yonsu idi ikuama bimuma, bikale biakudia bienu." 
Genesis1:30 Kadi nyama yonsu, nyunyi ya mulu ne bilandadi, mbayipeshi bidimenena, bikale biakudia biayi.” Kuenzekabi nanku." 
Genesis1:31 Mvidi Mukulu kukenketa bintu bionsu bivuaye mufuke, kumonaye ne: bidi bimpe bitambe." 
Genesis2:1 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mujikije diulu, buloba ne bintu bionsu bidipu." 
Genesis2:2 Mvidi Mukulu mumane kujikija mudimu uvuaye muenze, kuikishaye dituku dia muanda muteketa." 
Genesis2:3 Dituku dia muanda muteketa kushala diende dia tshijila, bualu ndituku divuaye muikishe kunyima kua midimu yende ya Mufuki." 
Genesis2:4 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mujikije mudimu wa kufuka diulu ne buloba nanku. Dituku divua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mufuke diulu ne buloba," 
Genesis2:5 mitshi ne bisosa kabivua bianji kutoloka to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kavua muanji kulokesha mvula, kabidi muntu kavuapu bua kudima buloba." 
Genesis2:6 Mayi avua apatuka munda mua buloba ke avua abupesha tshitalela. 
Genesis2:7 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuangata dima, kufuka nadi mulume, kumuela mueyelu wa muoyi mu mimpempe ya diulu, mulume kushala tshifukibua tshidi tshienda ne muoyi." 
Genesis2:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuenza lupangu mu ditunga dia Edene luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kutekamu muntu uvuaye mufuke awu." 
Genesis2:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kumenesha mitshi ya mishindu yonsu pa buloba, mitshi milenga kumona ne mesu, mimpe kudia mukana. Munkatshi mua lupangu muvua mutshi wa muoyi ne mutshi wa kujingulula malu mimpe ne mabi." 
Genesis2:10 Musulu wa mayi kupatuka mu Edene bua kufila tshitalela mu lupangu. Musulu awu uvua mupanduluke misapa inayi. 
Genesis2:11 Dina dia musapa wa kumpala didi Pishona; wowu udi munyingulule ditunga dijima dia Avila. Muaba awu mudi mpawungi," 
Genesis2:12 mpawungi muimpe mutambe, kamonya ka dipembu ka mbdeliyume ne mabue a mushinga mukole a onikse kabidi." 
Genesis2:13 Dina dia musapa muibidi didi Ngishone; wowu udi munyungulule ditunga dia Kushe. 
Genesis2:14 Musapa muisatu ke Tigre; wowu udi upita ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga tshia Ashure. Musapa muinayi ke Perate. 
Genesis2:15 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuteka muntu mu lupangu lua Edene bua kudimamu ne kulama bintu bionsu bivuamu. 
Genesis2:16 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuelela muntu mukenji ne: “Udi mua kudia bimuma bia mitshi yonsu idi mu lupangu. 
Genesis2:17 Kadi kuena mua kudia bimuma bia mutshi wa kujingulula malu mempe ne malu mabi. Dituku divuadia bimuma bia mutshi awu, tshiebe ndufu.”" 
Genesis2:18 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Ki mbimpe bua mulume ikale nkayende nansha. Ndi musue kumuenzela mukuende wa bu yeye udi mua kumuambuluisha.” 
Genesis2:19 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuangata dima, kuenza nadi nyama yonsu ya pa buloba ne nyunyi yonsu ya mulu. Kuyifilaye kudi muntu bua amone mudi muntu uyinyika mena. Nyama yonsu uvua witaba dina divua muntu umuinyika." 
Genesis2:20 Muntu kuinyika nyama yonsu ne nyunyi yonsu ya mulu mena. Kadi ku luende luseke, kavua mupete mukuende wa bu yeye uvua mua kumuambuluisha." 
Genesis2:21 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuladika muntu mulume tulu tukole. Kulamunaye lubala lumue mu lubadi luende, kupingajapu munyinyi." 
Genesis2:22 Maweja-Nangila kuangata lubala luvuaye mulamune alu, kuenza nalu mukaji, kumupesha mulume." 
Genesis2:23 Mulume umona mukaji, kuelaye diyi dikole wamba ne: “Mpindiewu mbapetshi wa ku meme, munyinyi wa ku munyinyi wanyi, mufuba wa ku mifuba yanyi. Nebamubikile ne: ‘Mmukaji’, bualu mmufumine kudi mulume. ”" 
Genesis2:24 Ke padi mulume ushiya tatuende ne mamuende, ulamata mukajende, bua bonsu babidi bikale anu muntu umue." 
Genesis2:25 Bonsu babidi mulume ne mukaji bavua butaka, kadi kabayi bafua bundu." 
Genesis3:1 Nyoka uvua mudimuke mupite nyama yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mufuke. Nyoka kukonka mukaji ne: — Mbulelela menemene Mvidi Mukulu mmunukandike ne: kanudi bimuma bia mitshi yonsu idi mu lupangu anyi? 
Genesis3:2 Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Tudi mua kudia bimuma bia mitshi yonsu idi mu lupangu. 
Genesis3:3 Kadi bua bimuma bia mutshi udi munkatshi mua lupangu, Mvidi Mukulu mmutukandike ne: kanudi, kanulengi bua kanuvu kufua." 
Genesis3:4 Nyoka kubenga wamba ne: — To, kanuena nufua nansha." 
Genesis3:5 Mvidi Mukulu mmumanye ne: dituku dinuadia bimuma abi, mesu enu neatabale, mifuanangane nende, nujingulule malu mimpe ne mabi." 
Genesis3:6 Mukaji umona ne: mutshi uvua muimpe kumona, bimuma biawu bimpe bua kudia, bifuana kupa muntu lungenyi, kupolaye tshimuma, kudia. Tshikuabu kupeshaye bayende, awu pende kudia." 
Genesis3:7 Pashishe mesu abu bonsu babidi kutabala. Kujingululabu ne: tudi butaka. Kukuatakajabu mabeji a mutshi wa tshinyi bua kuvuala bu bilamba. 
Genesis3:8 Dilolu kumvuabu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wendakana mu lupangu, mulume ne mukaji kubutama munkatshi mua mitshi ivua mu lupangu." 
Genesis3:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kubikila mulume, kumukonka ne: — Udi penyi?" 
Genesis3:10 Mulume kuandamuna ne: — Pangumvu mikuma yebe mu lupangu, buowa kungenza, meme kubutama, bualu ndi butaka." 
Genesis3:11 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kumukonka kabidi ne: — Wakujinguluidi ne udi butaka nnganyi? Udi mumane kudia tshimuma tshia mutshi umvua mukukandike anyi? 
Genesis3:12 Mulume kuandamuna ne: — Anu mukaji uuvua mumpeshe ke udi muntuadile tshimuma, meme panyi kutshidia." 
Genesis3:13 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuebeja mukaji ne: — Tshiwenzedi nanku ntshinyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Nyoka mmundinge, meme panyi kudia tshimuma." 
Genesis3:14 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu umvua nanku, kuambilaye nyoka ne: — Wewe newenji nenku, ndi nkutshipa. Ku nyama yonsu anu wewe newikale ukoka difu panshi, kabidi neudie buloba matuku onsu audi ne muoyi." 
Genesis3:15 Nenteke lukuna pankatshi pebe ne mukaji, pankatshi pa ndelanganyi yebe ne yende. Kabidi muana wa ku ndelanganyi ya mukaji neaboze mutu webe, wewe pebe neumusume ku tshikankanya." 
Genesis3:16 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuambila mukaji ne: — Pawimita difu nenkuvudijile makenga. Neulele bana anu mu dikenga. Kabidi, newikale utuma mwoyi webe anu kudi bayebe, yeye neikale mfumuebe." 
Genesis3:17 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuambila mulume ne: — Bua pawitabi diyi dia mukajebe, wewe kudia tshimuma tshimvua mukukandike, ndi ntshipa buloba bua tshilema tshiuvua muenze. Tshiakudia tshiebe neutshipete anu pawenza mudimu mukole matuku onsu audi ne muoyi pa buloba." 
Genesis3:18 Buloba nebukumenene meba ne mingonga. Neudie bisekiseki bia mu lupangu. 
Genesis3:19 Neupete tshiakudia tshiebe anu ku tshisululu tshia mu mpala muebe, too ne pawapingana mu buloba bundi mukufuke nabu. Udi lupuishi, newandamuke kabidi lupuishi." 
Genesis3:20 Mulume kuinyika mukajende dina ne: Eva. Mmumue ne: “Mua-bana”, bualu yeye udi mamu wa bonsu badi ne muoyi." 
Genesis3:21 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuenzela mulume ne mukajende bilamba bia biseba bia nyama, kubavuadika." 
Genesis3:22 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: “Monayi, muntu wenji bu umue wa ku tuetu, watufuanyi ku dijingulula dia malu mimpe ne mabi. Mbimpe kumukandika bua kuolodi tshianza tshiende ku mutshi wa muoyi. Yeye mupole tshimuma, mutshidie neashale ne muoyi kashidi. ”" 
Genesis3:23 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuipata muntu mu lupangu lua Edene bua aye kudima buloba, bualu buloba ke buvuaye mumufuke nabu." 
Genesis3:24 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mumane kuipata muntu mu lupangu lua Edene, kutekaye Bakerubine mu lupangu amu ne muela utema kapia. Bavua bimane ku tshibuelelu tshia lupangu luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bakandika bua muntu kafiki muaba uvua njila wa ku mutshi wa muoyi." 
Genesis4:1 Adame kubuelela mukajende Eva mu nzubu. Awu kuimita difu, kulelaye Kayine. Eva kusanka bikole wamba ne: “Ndi mufuke muana wa balume ku bukole bua Maweja-Nangila. ”" 
Genesis4:2 Pashishe kulelaye kabidi Ebele muakunyi wa Kayine. Ebele uvua mulami wa mikoku, Kayine uvua tshidime." 
Genesis4:3 Matuku a kunowa akumbana, Kayine kulambula Maweja-Nangila biakudia bia mu madimi ende." 
Genesis4:4 Ebele pende kumulambula banabute ba mikoku mimpe ya mafuta. Maweja-Nangila kuanyisha milambu ya Ebele," 
Genesis4:5 kubenga ya Kayine. Nanku, Kayine kupeta tshiji tshikole, kufika munda." 
Genesis4:6 Maweja-Nangila kumukonka ne: — Tshiji ntshia tshinyi? Udi mufike munda bua tshinyi? 
Genesis4:7 Bu wewe muenze bimpe, uvua ne bua kuikala ne disanka. Kadi paudi kuyi wenza bimpe, bubi budi bukuimanyine ku tshibi; kadi ukebe mua kubutshimuna." 
Genesis4:8 Kayine umvua nanku, kuambila muanabu Ebele ne: — Tuye kuendakana. Bafika mu budimi, Kayine kukuata muanabu Ebele kumushipa." 
Genesis4:9 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Kayine ne: — Muanenu Ebele udi penyi? Kayine kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena mumanye. Meme ndi mulami wa muanetu anyi? 
Genesis4:10 Maweja-Nangila kuebeja ne: — Udi muenze nanku bua tshinyi? Muadi wa mashi a muanenu wafiki kundi ufumina pa buloba. 
Genesis4:11 Mpindiewu udi ne mulawu pa buloba buvua bumatshile mashi a muanenu uuvua mushipe. 
Genesis4:12 Wewe newikale udima, kadi buloba kubuyi butoloka bintu bia nsongu. Newikale muendakanyi pa buloba, kuyi ne muaba wa kusomba." 
Genesis4:13 Kayine kuambila Maweja-Nangila ne: — Dinyoka diudi mumpe ndipite bukole. 
Genesis4:14 Lelu udi ungipata pa buloba. Ndi nya kusomba mutantshi mule nebe. Nenshale muendakanyi. Muntu yonsu ungasangila nende neanshipe. 
Genesis4:15 Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: — Muntu kena ukushipa to. Muntu wakenzela bibi, nebamusombuele misangu muanda mutekete. Maweja-Nangila kuteka tshimanyinu pambidi pa Kayine bua muntu yonsu wasangila nende kamuenzedi bibi to." 
Genesis4:16 Kayine kumuka muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila, kuya kusomba mu ditunga dia Node luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Edene." 
Genesis4:17 Kayine kubuelela mukajende mu nzubu. Awu kuimita difu, kulela muana, dina diende Enoke. Kayine kuasa tshimenga, kutshinyika dina dia muanende Enoke." 
Genesis4:18 Enoke kulela Irade. Irade kulela Meyuyayele. Meyuyayele kulela Metushayele. Metushayele kulela Lemeke. 
Genesis4:19 Lemeke kusela bakaji babidi: dina dia mukalenga muadi divua Ada, dia mutu wa lubanza divua Sila." 
Genesis4:20 Ada kulela Yabale. Yabale ke nkambua wa badi basomba mu nzubu ya ntenta bikale ne bimuna. 
Genesis4:21 Dina dia muanabu ne Yabale divua Yubale. Uvua nkambua wa bimbi ba bisanji ne bedi ba nshiba. 
Genesis4:22 Sila, mukaji muibidi wa Lemeke, uvua mulele Tubale-Kayine. Yeye ke uvua nsenda wa biamu bishilangane bikunze ne bifike. Tubale-Kayine uvua ne muanabu wa bakaji, dina diende Naama." 
Genesis4:23 Lemeke kuambila bakaji bende ne: “Ada ne Sila, telejayi diyi dianyi. Bakaji banyi, umvuayi tshindi nnuambila: Eyowa ndi nshipa muntu padiye untapa mputa. Ndi nshipa muana padiye untuuta." 
Genesis4:24 Eyowa, Kayine nebamusombuele misangu muanda mutekete. Kadi Lemeke nebamusombuele misangu makumi muanda mutekete.”" 
Genesis4:25 Adame ne Eva kulela muana we balume mukuabu. Eva kumuinyika dina dia Shete, wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wakumpesha muana mukuabu pa muaba wa Ebele uvua Kayine mushipe." 
Genesis4:26 Shete kulela muana wa balume, kumuinyika dina dia Enoshe. Tshikondu atshi ke tshivua bantu batuadija kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, batela dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis5:1 Ke mena a bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Adame: Dituku divua Mvidi Mukulu mufuke bantu, wakabafuka bamufuane yeye Mvi-di Mukulu." 
Genesis5:2 Kubafukaye mulume ne mukaji. Kubelaye lupemba, kubinyika dina dia bantu." 
Genesis5:3 Adame mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu, kulelaye muana wa balume mufuanangane nende. Kumuinyikaye dina dia Shete." 
Genesis5:4 Adame mumane kulela Shete, kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis5:5 Bidimu bia Adame pa buloba bidi nkama tshitema ne makumi asatu. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:6 Shete mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama ne bitanu, kulelaye Enoshe." 
Genesis5:7 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne muanda mutekete. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:8 Bidimu bia Shete bidi nkama tshitema dikumi ne bibidi. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:9 Enoshe mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi tshitema, kulelaye Kenaane." 
Genesis5:10 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu dikumi ne bitanu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:11 Bidimu bia Enoshe bidi nkama tshitema ne bitanu. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:12 Kenaane mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, kulelaye Malaleyele." 
Genesis5:13 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi anayi. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:14 Bidimu bia Kenaane bidi nkama tshitema ne dikumi. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:15 Malaleyele mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asambombu ne bitanu, kulelaye Yerede." 
Genesis5:16 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi asatu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:17 Bidimu bia Malaleyele bidi nkama muanda mukulu makumi tshitema ne bitanu. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:18 Yerede mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama makumi asambombu ne bibidi, kulelaye Enoke." 
Genesis5:19 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mukulu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:20 Bidimu bia Yerede bidi nkama tshitema makumi asambombu ne bibidi. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:21 Enoke mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asambombu ne bitanu, kulelaye Metushela." 
Genesis5:22 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama isatu, witaba Mvidi Mukulu, udisanga nende mu malu onsu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis5:23 Bidimu bia Enoke bidi nkama isatu makumi asambombu ne bitanu. 
Genesis5:24 Yeye mumane kudisanga ne Mvidi Mukulu nanku, Mvidi Mukulu kumuambula, kuya nende, Enoke kayi umueneka kabidi pa buloba to." 
Genesis5:25 Metushela mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mutekete, kulelaye Lemeke." 
Genesis5:26 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama muanda mutekete makumi muanda mukulu ne bibidi. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:27 Bidimu bia Metushela bidi nkama tshitema makumi asambombu ne tshitema. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:28 Lemeke mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama makumi muanda mukulu ne bibidi, kulelaye muana wa balume." 
Genesis5:29 Kumuinyikaye ne Nowa, wamba ne: — Muana ewu neatusambe ku mudimu mukole wetu wa bianza utudi tukuata, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mutshipe buloba." 
Genesis5:30 Lemeke kushala kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama itanu makumi tshitema ne bitanu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis5:31 Bidimu bia Lemeke bidi nkama muanda mutekete makumi muanda mutekete ne muanda mutekete. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis5:32 Nowa mumane kukumbaja bidimu nkama itanu, kulelaye Sheme, Kame ne Yefete." 
Genesis6:1 Pavua bantu batuadija kuvulangana pa buloba, kulelabu bana ba bakaji." 
Genesis6:2 Kadi, badi basombele mulu, kumonabu bana ba bakaji ba bantu babalengelela. Kusungulabu munkatshi muabu bakaji bavuabu basue kusela." 
Genesis6:3 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: “Bua buenzayi bua muntu pa buloba, ndi nkepesha bidimu biende, bishale anu lukama ne makumi abidi, bualu muntu udi anu wa mubidi. Tshiena musue bua Mueyelu wa muoyi undi mumupesha ushale kashidi munda muende.”" 
Genesis6:4 Tshikondu atshi bantu bale ba kafiondu bavua pa buloba. — Bavua bashale kabidi pa buloba pashishe —. Bavua bana ba badi basombele mulu bavuabu balele ne bana ba bakaji ba bantu bavuabu basela. Bantu ba kafiondu aba bavua bilobu bia kalanda musenga ku kale. 
Genesis6:5 Maweja-Nangila kumona ne buenzayi bua bantu budi buenda buvulangane pa buloba, meji adibu bela matuku onsu adi anu mabi." 
Genesis6:6 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kunyingalala bua muntu uvuaye mufuke, muteke pa buloba." 
Genesis6:7 Kubungamaye wamba ne: “Nembutule muntu undi mufuke pa buloba. Nembutule kabidi nyama yonsu minene ne mikese too ne nyunyi yonsu idi ibuka mulu, bualu ndi ne kanyinganyinga bua pandi mubifuke.”" 
Genesis6:8 Kadi Nowa uvua muena diakalenga kudi Maweja-Nangila. 
Genesis6:9 Ndelanganyi ya Nowa idi nunku: Nowa nkayende munkatshi mua bantu ba tshikondu atshi, uvua muntu muakane, witaba Mvidi Mukulu, udisanga nende mu malu onsu." 
Genesis6:10 Nowa uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: Sheme, Kame ne Yefete." 
Genesis6:11 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumone buenzayi bua bantu pa buloba bujima. 
Genesis6:12 Miaba yonsu iwaye utangila uvua umona amu muvua bantu banyanguke ne buenzayi. 
Genesis6:13 Nanku kuambilaye Nowa ne: “Tshikondu tshia kubutula bionsu bidi ne muoyi pa buloba tshiakumbanyi! Bualu buenzayi budi pa buloba bujima, mbufume anu kudi bantu. Nanku ndi musue kubabutula pa buloba." 
Genesis6:14 Kadi wewe usonge buatu bua mutshi wa budimbu, ubukosolole tuzubu munda. Ubulabe budimbu munda ne panyima." 
Genesis6:15 Buatu abu buikale bule bua metre lukama makumi atanu, butshiama bua metre makumi atanu, butumbuke bua metre dikumi ne atanu." 
Genesis6:16 Buatu buikale ne musonga, kadi pankatshi pa musonga ne bimana pikale ntanta wa santimetre makumi atanu. Buatu abu buikale ne mushiku ku luseka. Buikale ne nzubu isatu milungakaja ya tshilalakulu: wa panshi, wa pankatshi ne wa kulu." 
Genesis6:17 Meme nenguwuje buloba ne mayi a tshipupu, bua kubutula bionsu bidi ne muoyi pa buloba. Tshintu tshionsu tshidi ne muoyi pa buloba netshifue." 
Genesis6:18 Kadi nentue nebe ndondu. Mu buatu amu, ubuele ne mukajebe, bana bebe ba balume ne bakaji babu." 
Genesis6:19 Ubuejemu kabidi nyama ya mishindu ne mishindu, mulume umue ne mukaji umue bua ishale ne muoyi." 
Genesis6:20 Nanku mulume ne mukaji ku nyunyi yonsu, ku bimuna bionsu, ku nyama yonsu minene ne mikese ibuele nebe mu buatu, bua ipande ku lufu." 
Genesis6:21 Usangishe biakudia bia mishindu yonsu, ubitekele mu buatu bua numone mua kudia wewe ne bena diebe, kabidi ne nyama.”" 
Genesis6:22 Nowa kuitaba, kuenza bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile." 
Genesis7:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Nowa ne: “Buela mu buatu ne diku diebe dionsu, bualu anu wewe ke muntu muakane munkatshi mua bantu ba tshikondu etshi." 
Genesis7:2 Ubuele ne nyama milume muanda mutekete ne mikaji muanda mutekete idi kayiyi ne mikiya. Kadi bua nyama idi ne mikiya ubuele anu ne mulume umue ne mukaji umue. 
Genesis7:3 Ubuele kabidi ne nyunyi milume muanda mutekete ne nyunyi mikaji muanda mutekete, bua diminu dia nyunyi dishale kashidi pa buloba." 
Genesis7:4 Bualu papita matuku muanda mutekete, nendokeshe mvula pa buloba matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku. Nembutule bintu bionsu bidi ne muoyi, bindi mufuke pa buloba.”" 
Genesis7:5 Nowa kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. 
Genesis7:6 Musangu uvua mayi a tshipupu uwuja buloba, Nowa uvua ne bidimu nkama isambombu." 
Genesis7:7 Nowa kubuela mu buatu ne mukajende, bana bende ba balume ne bakaji babu, bua kudipandisha ku mayi a tshipupu." 
Genesis7:8 Nyama idi ne mikiya ne idi kayiyi ne mikiya, nyunyi, kabidi ne nyama idi ilandala," 
Genesis7:9 kubuela mu buatu ne Nowa, mulume ne mukaji, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile." 
Genesis7:10 Matuku muanda mutekete mamane kupita, mayi a tshipupu kuwuja buloba." 
Genesis7:11 Matuku dikumi ne muanda mutekete a ngondu muibidi, Nowa mumane kukumbaja bidimu nkama isambombu, mayi onsu avua muinshi mua buloba kupatukawu ne bukole miaba mishilangane, bibi bionsu bia mulu ku-nzulukabi." 
Genesis7:12 Mvula kuloka pa buloba matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku. 
Genesis7:13 Anu dituku adi, Nowa kubuela mu buatu ne mukajende ne bana bende: Sheme, Kame ne Yefete, ne bakaji babu basatu." 
Genesis7:14 Kubuelabu kabidi ne nyama ya muitu ya mishindu yonsu, bimuna bia mishindu yonsu binene ne bikese, nyunyi ne bishi." 
Genesis7:15 Nyama kubuela mu buatu pamue ne Nowa, mulume umue ne mukaji umue ku nyama yonsu." 
Genesis7:16 Nowa mumane kubuela, ne mulume umue kabidi ne mukaji umue wa ku nyama yonsu, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, Maweja-Nangila kuinjila tshibi tshia buatu." 
Genesis7:17 Mayi kuwuja buloba mu matuku makumi anayi. Mayi kuvulangana, kubandisha buatu kulu. Kushalabu bulelema pa mayi." 
Genesis7:18 Mayi kupita bungi pa buloba, buatu pabu buvua amu bushale bulelema pa mayi." 
Genesis7:19 Mayi mamane kuvulangana pa buloba, kubuikilawu mikuna yonsu nansha ne ivua mitumbuke." 
Genesis7:20 Mayi kubanda, kupita mikuna mile bule bua metre muanda mutekete." 
Genesis7:21 Nanku bionsu bivua ne muoyi pa buloba kufuabi: nyunyi, bimuna, nyama ya muitu, bilandadi ne bantu kabidi." 
Genesis7:22 Nyama ne bantu bionsu bivua ne muoyi kufua pa buloba bujima. 
Genesis7:23 Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mubutule bionsu bivua ne muoyi pa buloba, kutuadija ku bantu ne ku bimuna, ku nyama minene ne mikese, ne ku nyunyi idi ibuka mulu. Bionsu kubutukabi. Anu Nowa ne bantu bavuaye nabu mu buatu kushala ne muoyi." 
Genesis7:24 Mayi kushala matengabela pa buloba matuku lukama ne makumi atanu. 
Genesis8:1 Mvidi Mukulu kuvuluka Nowa ne nyama yonsu minene ne mikese ivuaye nayi mu buatu. Mvidi Mukulu kutuma tshipepela pa buloba, mayi kutuadija kukepela." 
Genesis8:2 Miaba yonsu ivua mayi apatukila muinshi mua buloba ne mulu kudikangayi, mela kukama." 
Genesis8:3 Mayi avua anu enda akepela pa buloba too matuku lukama ne makumi atanu. 
Genesis8:4 Nanku mu matuku dikumi ne muanda mutekete a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, buatu kuimana pa mukuna wa Ararate." 
Genesis8:5 Mayi avua apueka anu kupueka. Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa dikumi, nsongu ya mikuna kumueneka." 
Genesis8:6 Matuku makumi anayi mamane kupita, Nowa kunzulula dididishi dia buatu buvuaye muenze." 
Genesis8:7 Kutumaye nyunyi wa tshikololu, kunyungulukatshi too ne pamuenekela buloba bume." 
Genesis8:8 Kutumaye kabidi nyunyi wa nkudimba bua kujadika dipueka dia mayi pa buloba. 
Genesis8:9 Nyunyi wa nkudimba mumane kuya, kena mupeta muaba wa kuikila, bualu mayi atshivua pa buloba. Nanku nyunyi kupingana. Nowa kuolola tshianza kumukuata, kumubueja mu buatu." 
Genesis8:10 Kupita matuku muanda mutekete, Nowa kutuma nyunyi wa nkudimba tshiakabidi." 
Genesis8:11 Ku dilolu, nyunyi kupingana ne katamba ka mutshi wa olive kabishi kasuma ku muinu. Nanku Nowa kujadika ne: mayi akepedi pa buloba." 
Genesis8:12 Kupita matuku muanda mutekete kabidi, Nowa kutuma nyunyi wa nkudimba musangu muisatu, nkudimba kuya kashidi." 
Genesis8:13 Dituku dia kumpala dia tshidimu tshipiatshipia tshivua Nowa mukumbaje bidimu nkama isambombu ne tshimue, mayi onsu kukama pa buloba. Nowa kutula musonga wa buatu, kuinangila panshi, kumona ne buloba buonsu budi bume." 
Genesis8:14 Dituku dia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete dia ngondu muibidi, buloba kuuma kashidi." 
Genesis8:15 Ke Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Nowa ne: 
Genesis8:16 “Patuka mu buatu, ne mukajebe ne bana bebe ba balume ne bakaji babu." 
Genesis8:17 Upatuke kabidi ne nyama yonsu iuvua nayi, nyunyi, bimuna ne nyama minene ne mikese, bua ivulangane imuangalaka pa buloba bujima.”" 
Genesis8:18 Nowa kupatuka mu buatu ne mukajende, ne bana bende ba balume ne bakaji babu." 
Genesis8:19 Pashishe nyama yonsu minene ne mikese, bilandadi ne nyunyi yonsu, kupatukabi mu buatu ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu." 
Genesis8:20 Nowa kuashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu. Kuangataye nyama umue ne nyunyi umue wa ku tshisumbu tshionsu tshia nyama idi kayiyi ne mikiya, kuyilambula Maweja-Nangila pa tshilambuilu bu milambu ya kuosha." 
Genesis8:21 Mulambu kununkilawu Maweja-Nangila mupuya muimpe. Kununganaye wamba ne: “Nansha bantu bikale anu ne meji mabi biangatshile ku buana buabu, kadi tshiena ntshipa buloba kabidi bua buenzayi bua muntu. Tshiena mua kubutula bionsu bidi ne muoyi musangu muibidi bu mumvua muenze emu." 
Genesis8:22 Matuku onsu atshidi bantu pa buloba, tshikondu tshia kukuna ne tshia kunowa, tshia mashika ne tshia luya, tshia mvula ne tshia mushipu, tshia munya ne tshia midima kabiena bijika kabidi to.”" 
Genesis9:1 Mvidi Mukulu kuela Nowa ne bana bende lupemba wamba ne: “Tantayi, nuvu-langane buloba bujima." 
Genesis9:2 Nyama yonsu ya pa buloba ne nyunyi idi ibuka mulu, ne minyinyi ya mu mayi neyinutshine bikole ikuatshika buowa. Bionsu abi mbintu bienu bindi munupe." 
Genesis9:3 Nanku, bu mumvua munupe bisekiseki bua nuenu kudia, ke mundi munupe kabidi nyama yonsu ikale biakudia bienu." 
Genesis9:4 Kadi kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama muikale ne mashi. Bualu muoyi wa tshintu udi mu mash atshi. 
Genesis9:5 Bu mudi muoyi wa tshintu muikale mu mashi, ndi nnukandika bua kanushipi muntu nenu, tshianana meme nennushipeshe panyi. Pashishe nyama kayena mua kushipa muntu to, tshianana meme nenyishipeshe kabidi." 
Genesis9:6 Udi upumuna mashi a muntu, nebapumune ende kudi muntu, bualu mbafuke muntu mufuanangane ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Genesis9:7 Nuenu tantayi, nuvulangane, numuangalake pa buloba bujima. ”" 
Genesis9:8 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Nowa ne bana bende ne: 
Genesis9:9 “Ndi ntua nenu ndondu, kabidi ne ndelanganyi yenu." 
Genesis9:10 Ndi ntua kabidi ndondu ne bionsu binuvua bapatuke nabi mu buatu: nyunyi, bimuna ne nyama ya muitu, kabidi ne bivuavua kuenda ne muoyi pa buloba pashishe." 
Genesis9:11 Ndondu undi ntua nenu biangatshile ku lelu udi nunku: tshiena nguwuja kabidi buloba ne mayi a tshipupu bua kubutula bionsu bidi ne muoyi, kunyangakaja bidi pa buloba." 
Genesis9:12 Tshimanyinu tshia ndondu wetu ewu nenu, kabidi ne bionsu bidi pa buloba tshidi nunku:" 
Genesis9:13 Ndi nteka muanzankongolu mulu mu mavuba bua wikale tshimanyinu tshidi tshivuluija ndondu udi pankatshi panyi ne bantu, kabidi ne bionsu bidi ne muoyi pa buloba." 
Genesis9:14 Pafinda mvula kulu, pambamona muanza-nkongolu," 
Genesis9:15 nemvuluke ndondu awu. Mayi a tshipupu kakubutula kabidi bantu ne bidi ne muoyi pa buloba to. 
Genesis9:16 Nemmone muanza-nkongolu mvuluka ndondu undi mutue ne bionsu bidi ne muoyi pa buloba. 
Genesis9:17 Muanza-nkongolu udi tshimanyinu tshidi tshivuluija ndondu wa kashidi undi mutue ne bantu ne bionsu bidi ne muoyi pa buloba.” 
Genesis9:18 Bana ba balume ba Nowa bapatukila mu buatu bavua: Sheme, Kame ne Yefete. Kame udi tatuende wa Kenaane." 
Genesis9:19 Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba mbafume anu kudi bana aba basatu ba Nowa. 
Genesis9:20 Nowa ke tshidime wa kumpala uvua mukuna mitshi ya maluvu. 
Genesis9:21 Nowa uvua munue maluvu mukuatshike. Kulalaye mu nzubu muende butaka. 
Genesis9:22 Kame, tatuende wa Kenaane, kumona butaka bua tatuende Nowa, kupatuka bua kuambila bana babu babidi bavua pa mbelu." 
Genesis9:23 Nanku Sheme ne Yefete kuangata tshilamba tshia Nowa, kutshibuikila pa makaya abu. Bonsu babidi kuya natshi tshianyima, kubuikila tatuabu uvua butaka. Bavua batangila luseke lukuabu bua kabamonyi butaka bua tatuabu." 
Genesis9:24 Maluvu mamane kumutenduka, Nowa kumvua tshivua muanende wa mukala mumuenzele atshi." 
Genesis9:25 Kumuelaye mulawu wamba ne: “Kenaane ikale muena diakabi! Ikale mupika wa bana babu.” 
Genesis9:26 Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Bantu batumbishe Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Sheme! Kenaane ashale mupika wa Sheme!" 
Genesis9:27 Mvidi Mukulu asankishe Yefete, ndelanganyi ya Yefete isombe mu nzubu ya ntenta ya bena Sheme; Kenaane ikale mupika wa Yefete!”" 
Genesis9:28 Mayi a tshipupu mamane kukama, Nowa kushala ne muoyi bidimu nkama isatu ne makumi atanu." 
Genesis9:29 Bidimu bia Nowa bidi nkama tshitema ne makumi atanu. Pashishe kufuaye. 
Genesis10:1 Bana ba balume ba Nowa: Sheme, Kame ne Yefete ke badi bavudija ndelanganyi, mayi a tshipupu mamane kukama." 
Genesis10:2 Bana ba balume ba Yefete badi: Ngomere, Magoge, Madayi, Yavane, Tubale, Mesheke ne Tirase." 
Genesis10:3 Ngomere kulela bana ba balume aba: Ashekenaze, Rifate ne Togarma." 
Genesis10:4 Yavane kulela bana ba balume aba: Elisha, Tarshishe, Kitime ne Rodanime." 
Genesis10:5 Bisamba bionsu bidi bitangalaka mu bidila nansha ku mielelu ya mayi manene mbifume ku ndelanganyi ya bana aba. Ke muvua ndelanganyi ya Yefete nanku. Muntu yonsu uvua musombe mu ditunga diabu, mu tshisamba tshiabu, wakula muakulu wa ditunga diabu." 
Genesis10:6 Bana ba balume ba Kame badi: Kushe, Misrayime, Pute ne Kenaane." 
Genesis10:7 Kushe kulela bankambua ba bena Seba, Avila, Sabta, Ragma ne Sabteka. Ragma kulela bankambua ba bena Saba ne bena Dedane." 
Genesis10:8 Kushe kulela kabidi Nimrode, tshilobu tshia kumpala tshivua tshidia bumfumu mu matunga a bende." 
Genesis10:9 Uvua kabidi tshilembi tshia bushuwa, muikale ne bukole bua kudi Maweja-Nangila. Biakashala bu makumbu ne: “Maweja-Nangila akuambuluishe bua wikale tshilembi bu Nimrode.”" 
Genesis10:10 Bimenga binene bia kumpala bivua ku bumfumu buende bivua: Bahele, Ereke, Akade ne Kalne mu ditunga dia Babilone." 
Genesis10:11 Kumukaye mu ditunga adi, kuyaye mu Ashure. Kuasaye tshimenga tshia Ninive, tshia Reyobote-Ire, ne tshia Kela." 
Genesis10:12 Pankatshi pa Ninive ne tshimenga tshinene tshia Kela kuasaye kabidi Resene. 
Genesis10:13 Misrayime kulela bisamba ebi: bena Lude, bena Aneme, bena Lehabe, bena Naftu," 
Genesis10:14 bena Patrose, bena Kaslu ne bena Kaftore. Bobu ke bankambua ba bena Peleshete." 
Genesis10:15 Kenaane kulela bana ba balume babidi: Sidone muanabute, ne muakunyende Ete." 
Genesis10:16 Kulelaye kabidi bankambua ba bena Yebusa, bena Amore, bena Ngirgashi," 
Genesis10:17 bena Ivi, bena Arki, bena Sini," 
Genesis10:18 bena Arvadi, bena Semari ne bena Amati. Pashishe meku a bena Kenaane kutangalakawu." 
Genesis10:19 Mukalu wa bena Kenaane uvua mutuadije ku Sidone too ne ku Ngerare pa buipi ne Ngaza. Mmutuadije kabidi ku Sodome ne Ngomore, too ne ku Adma ne Seboyime pabuipi ne Lesha." 
Genesis10:20 Ke muvua ndelanganyi ya bana ba Kame nanku. Muntu yonsu uvua musombe mu ditunga diabu, mu tshisamba tshiabu, wakula muakulu wa ditunga diabu." 
Genesis10:21 Sheme, mukulu wa Yefete, kulela bana. Udi nkambua wa bena Ebere bonsu." 
Genesis10:22 Bana ba balume ba Sheme badi: Elame, Ashure, Arpakshade, Lude ne Arame." 
Genesis10:23 Arame kulela bana ba balume aba: Use, Ule, Ngetere ne Masha." 
Genesis10:24 Arpakshade kulela Shela, Shela kulela Ebere." 
Genesis10:25 Ebere kulela bana ba balume babidi: muanabute dina diende Pelega, bualu mu matuku ende ke muvua ditapulukangana dituadija munkatshi mua bantu. Dina dia muana muibidi divua Yoktana." 
Genesis10:26 Yoktana kulela bankambua ba bena Almodade, bena Shelefe, bena Asharmavete, Yera," 
Genesis10:27 Adorame, Uzale, Dikla," 
Genesis10:28 Obale, Abimayele, Saba," 
Genesis10:29 Ofire, Avila ne Yobabe." 
Genesis10:30 Bavua basombe ku mikalu ya Mesha too ne ku Sefera, ne ku mikuna mile ya kudi diba dipatukila." 
Genesis10:31 Ke muvua ndelanganyi ya Sheme nanku. Muntu yonsu uvua musombe mu ditunga diabu, mu tshisamba tshiabu, wakula muakulu wa ditunga diabu." 
Genesis10:32 Ebi ke bisamba bionsu bidi bitumbisha Nowa biamba ne: Udi nkambua wetu, bilondeshile ku meku abu ne ku bisamba biabu. Bisamba bionsu bivua bimuangalaka pa buloba, mayi a tshipupu mamane kukama, mbifume anu kudi Nowa." 
Genesis11:1 Mu tshikondu atshi bantu bonsu ba pa buloba bavua bakula anu muakulu umuepele. 
Genesis11:2 Kadi bumuke ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kusanganabu mpata munene mu ditunga dia Babilone. Kuasabu muaba awu." 
Genesis11:3 Kuambilanganabu ne: “Tuenzayi tushole, tuoshe!” Bavua basa nzubu ne tushole, bibake pamue ne kabudimbu." 
Genesis11:4 Kuambilanganabu kabidi ne: “Tuasayi tshimenga tshikale ne kaleya katumbuke mulu bua tupete lumu lunene. Nanku katuakumuangalaka pa buloba bujima to.” 
Genesis11:5 Maweja-Nangila kupueka bua kubandila tshimenga ne kaleya bivua bantu abu base. 
Genesis11:6 Ke Maweja-Nangila kukema, wamba ne: “Bu mudi bantu aba bikale tshisamba tshimue, bakula muakulu umuepele, ke padibu batuadije kudienzela malu. Bidi bimueka ne: kakuena tshidi mua kubakolela kabidi." 
Genesis11:7 Nanku tuyayi kubondakaja muakulu wabu, bua bapange mua kumyuangana munkatshi muabu.”" 
Genesis11:8 Maweja-Nangila kubamuangalaja pa buloba bujima. Kulekelabu diasa dia tshimenga. 
Genesis11:9 Badi babikila tshimenga atshi ne: Babele, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubondakajilamu miakulu ya bisamba bionsu. Kabidi uvua mumuangalajilamu bantu pa buloba bujima." 
Genesis11:10 Ndelanganyi ya Sheme idi nunku: mayi a tshipupu mamane kukama, kupita bidimu bibidi, Sheme kukumbaja bidimu lukama, kulela Arpakshade." 
Genesis11:11 Sheme mumane kulela Arpakshade, kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama itanu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis11:12 Arpakshade mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu, kulelaye Shela." 
Genesis11:13 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama inayi ne bisatu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:14 Shela mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu, kulelaye Ebere." 
Genesis11:15 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama inayi ne bisatu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:16 Ebere mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu ne binayi, kulelaye Pelega." 
Genesis11:17 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama inayi ne makumi asatu. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:18 Pelega mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu, kulelaye Reyu." 
Genesis11:19 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama ibidi ne tshitema. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:20 Reyu mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi, kulelaye Seruga." 
Genesis11:21 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama ibidi ne muanda mutekete. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:22 Seruga mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi asatu, kulelaye Nahore." 
Genesis11:23 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu nkama ibidi. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:24 Nahore mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema, kulelaye Tera." 
Genesis11:25 Kushalaye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu lukama dikumi ne tshitema. Kulelaye balume ne bakaji. 
Genesis11:26 Tera mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, kulelaye Abrame, Nahore ne Arane." 
Genesis11:27 Ndelanganyi ya Tera, tatuende wa Abrame, wa Nahore ne wa Arane idi nunku: Arane kulela Lote." 
Genesis11:28 Kadi, patshivua Tera ne muoyi, Arane kutuila mu Ure wa bena Babilone, ditunga dia bankambua babu." 
Genesis11:29 Abrame ne Nahore kusela bakaji: dina dia mukaji wa Abrame divua Sarayi, dia mukaji wa Nahore divua Milka. Milka ne Iska bavua bana ba Arane." 
Genesis11:30 Kadi Sarayi uvua nkumba. 
Genesis11:31 Tera kuangata muanende Abrame, Lote muana wa muanende Arane ne Sarayi mukaji wa Abrame. Kumuangalaye nabu mu ditunga dia Ure wa bena Babilone, kuya kuasa mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Kusombabu mu tshimenga tshia Arane." 
Genesis11:32 Tera kushala ne muoyi bidimu nkama ibidi ne bitanu, kufuila mu Arane." 
Genesis12:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Abrame ne: — Umuke mu ditunga dienu, mu diku dienu ne ku nzubu kua batatuebe. Uye mu ditunga dindi nkuleja." 
Genesis12:2 Nenkuele lupemba, wikale tatu wa tshisamba tshinene tshia bantu. Dina diebe nedikale ne lumu lunene. Kabidi bantu bakuabu nebapete diakalenga kuudi." 
Genesis12:3 Bonsu badi bakuela lupemba, nembele. Kadi bonsu badi bakutshipa, nembatshipe. Nengele bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba lupemba bualu buebe." 
Genesis12:4 Abrame mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu, kumukaye mu Arane muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Genesis12:5 Kuyaye ne mukajende Sarayi, ne Lote muana wa muanabu, kabidi ne bapika bavuaye musumbe mu Arane ne bintu bionsu. Kuyabu mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Bobu bamane kufika mu ditunga dia Kenaane," 
Genesis12:6 kupitshilabu mu ditunga adi too ne ku mutshi wa tshijila uvua mu Moreya pabuipi ne musoku wa Shekeme. — Bena Kenaane batshivua mu ditunga adi. — 
Genesis12:7 Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela kabidi Abrame, umuambila ne: “Ditunga edi nendipeshe ndelanganyi yebe. ” Abrame kuashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu muaba mene uvua Maweja-Nangila mumumuenekele." 
Genesis12:8 Abrame umbuka aku, kuyaye ku mikuna ivua ku dia balume dia tshimenga tshia Betele. Kuasaye mitanda yende pankatshi pa Betele ne Ayi. Betele uvua ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, Ayi ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Muaba awu kuenzaye tshilambuilu tshikuabu, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu, utela dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis12:9 Pashishe kuyaye wenda utula mu bitupa bishilangane too ne kuinshi kua ditunga dia Kenaane. 
Genesis12:10 Tshiyole tshia nzala kupatuka mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Ke muvua Abrame uya mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bua kuanji kusombamu." 
Genesis12:11 Pawaye ubuela mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, Abrame kuambila mukajende Sarayi ne: — Wewe udi ne mpala muimpe." 
Genesis12:12 Pikala bena Ejipitu bakumona, nebatshinke ne udi mukajanyi. Nebanshipe bua kukuangata wewe." 
Genesis12:13 Ndi nkusengelela ne: ubambile ne: Abrame mmuanetu. Nanku kabakunshipa to. Nempete diakalenga bualu buebe. 
Genesis12:14 Nanku Abrame ufika mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bena ditunga kumona Sarayi ne mpala muimpe mutambe." 
Genesis12:15 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumuanyishila bulenga bua mukaji awu. Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumubanjija. 
Genesis12:16 Pashishe mukalenga kupesha Abrame bintu bia bungi mu dina dia Sarayi: mikoku, mbuji, ngombe, tumelu, nyama ya mpunde milume ne mikaji, bapika balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis12:17 Kadi, bu muvua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mubanjije Sarayi, mukaji wa Abrame, Maweja-Nangila kutumina mukalenga awu ne bonsu ba mu nzubu muende tshipupu tshikole tshia masama." 
Genesis12:18 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikidisha Abrame, kumukonka ne: — Tshiudi mungenzele ntshinyi? Bua tshinyi kuena mungambile ne: Sarayi mmukajebe?" 
Genesis12:19 Wakundinga ne: Sarayi mmuanetu wa bakaji bua meme kumuangata bu mukajanyi bua tshinyi? Mpindiewu angata mukajebe, umuke nende." 
Genesis12:20 Pashishe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kutuma diyi bua bantu bende bumushe Abrame mu ditunga pamue ne mukajende ne bionsu bivuaye nabi. 
Genesis13:1 Abrame kumuka mu Ejipitu, kupingana kabidi mu ditunga dia Kenaane mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi. Uvua ne mukajende Sarayi ne Lote muana wa muanabu ne bintu biende bionsu." 
Genesis13:2 Abrame uvua mubanji. Uvua ne mikoku, mbuji, ngombe, biamu bia mpawungi, ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole kabidi." 
Genesis13:3 Abrame kumuka mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi mu ditunga dia Kenaane, wenda wikisha too ne ku Betele, too ne ku muaba uvuaye mumane kuikisha matuku makese kale, pankatshi pa Betele ne Ayi," 
Genesis13:4 muaba uvuaye muase tshilambuilu. Kutendelelaye Mvidi Mukulu, utela dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis13:5 Lote uvuabu nende, uvua pende ne mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe. Uvua kabidi ne bena diku diende ne bena mudimu bende." 
Genesis13:6 Bua bungi bua bimuna bivuabu nabi, mpata awu kavua mukumbane bua Abrame ne Lote kusomba kaba kamue to." 
Genesis13:7 Ke matandu kujuka pankatshi pa balami ba bimuna bia Abrame ne balami ba bia Lote. (Tshikondu atshi, bena Kenaane ne bena Perizi batshivua mu ditunga adi.)" 
Genesis13:8 Abrame kuambila Lote ne: — Katuena mua kutandangana nebe to. Bena mudimu bebe ne banyi kabena mua kutandangana to, bualu tudi bantu bamue." 
Genesis13:9 Buloba mbunene, tuabulukangane. Sungula luseke luudi musue. Paudi uya ku mutu kua ditunga, meme nenye kuinshi kuadi. Paudi uya kuinshi kua ditunga, meme nenye ku mutu kuadi." 
Genesis13:10 Lote ukenzakana, kumona muvua mpata ya Yardene mimpe mitambe, bualu ivua ne mayi. Maweja-Nangila kavua muanji kubutula Sodome ne Ngomore to. Nanku mpata ayi too ne ku Soware ivua bu lupangu lua Paradizu, mifuanangane ne tshibanda tshia Nile." 
Genesis13:11 Lote kusungula mpata ayi, kuya luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Kupandulukabu ne Abrame." 
Genesis13:12 Abrame kushala mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Lote kuya kuasa mitanda yende mu bimenga bia mu mpata wa Yardene, wendakana ne bimuna biende too ne ku Sodome." 
Genesis13:13 Kadi bena Sodome bavua bena buenzayi, babenga meyi a Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis13:14 Lote mumane kushiyangana ne Abrame, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Abrame ne: — Kenzakana, tangila ku mutu kua ditunga ne kuinshi kuadi, kudi diba dipatukila ne kudidi dibuelela." 
Genesis13:15 Buloba ebu buonsu nenkupeshabu kashidi ne ndelanganyi yebe. 
Genesis13:16 Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe bungi budi muntu kayi mua kuyibala. Bu mudi muntu kayi mua kubala lusenga ludi pa buloba, ke mudibu kabayi mua kubala ndelanganyi yebe." 
Genesis13:17 Juka, endakana mu ditunga, uditangile mu bule ne mu butshiama buadi, bualu nenkupadi." 
Genesis13:18 Abrame kuasa mitanda yende muinshi mua mitshi ya tshijila ya Mambre pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ebrone. Muaba awu kuashilaye Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu. 
Genesis14:1 Mu tshikondu atshi, bakalenga banayi, Amrafele, mukalenga wabena Babilone, Ariyoke, mukalenga wa bena Elazare, Kedorlayomere, mukalenga wa bena Elame, ne Tidale, mukalenga wa bena Ngoyime," 
Genesis14:2 kuluishabu bakalenga bakuabu batanu: ke Bera, mukalenga wa bena Sodome, Birsha, mukalenga wa bena Ngomore, Shinabe, mukalenga wa bena Adma, Shemebere, mukalenga wa bena Siboyime ne mukalenga wa bena Bela (badibu babikila ne bena Soware)." 
Genesis14:3 Bakalenga batanu aba kudisangisha mu tshibandabanda tshia Sidime (mmumue ne muaba udi lelu Mayi manene a luepu). Kumvuanganabu bua kuluangana mvita. 
Genesis14:4 Bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, bavua anu ku bukokeshi bua Kedorlayomere too ne pakatombokabu mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshisatu." 
Genesis14:5 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshinayi, Kedorlayomere ne bakalenga bavuaye mudie nabu bulunda, kuluisha bena Refayime mu Ashetarote-Kamayime, bena Zuzime mu Ame, ne bena Emi mu mpata ya Kiriyatayime, kupitabu bakalenga bonsu abu bukole." 
Genesis14:6 Kuluishabu kabidi bena Ori bavua ku mukuna wa Seyire, kubipata too ne ku Ele-Parane pabuipi ne tshipela." 
Genesis14:7 Pashishe kupinganabu kabidi ne mvita mu Ene-Mishepate (mmumue ne Kadeshe). Kunyangabu ditunga dijima ne bintu bionsu bia bena Amaleke too ne bia bena Amore bavua basombe mu Ashashone-Tamare. 
Genesis14:8 Nanku, bakalenga ba bena Sodome ne ba bena Ngomore, ba bena Adma, ba bena Seboyime ne ba bena Bela (badibu babikila kabidi ne bena Soware), kudilongolola bua kuluangana mvita mu tshibandabanda tshia Sidime." 
Genesis14:9 Bavua baluisha Kedorlayomere, mukalenga wa bena Elame, Tidale, mukalenga wa bena Ngoyime, Amrafele, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, ne Ariyoke, mukalenga wa bena Elazare. Bakalenga aba bavua baluishangane banayi kua batanu." 
Genesis14:10 Mu tshibandabanda tshia Sidime, bavua bumbulemu bina bia bungi bia kabudimbu. Nanku bakalenga babidi, wa Sodome ne wa Ngomore, kudishinda mu bina abi pavuabu banyema mvita. Basatu bavua bashale kunyema batangila ku mukuna." 
Genesis14:11 Bilobu binayi bivua bitshimuna, kupawulabi bintu bionsu bia bena Sodome ne bena Ngomore, too ne biakudia biabu, kunyemabu nabi." 
Genesis14:12 Bu muvua Lote, muana wa muanabu ne Abrame, musombe mu Sodome, kumukuatabu pende ne bintu biende bionsu." 
Genesis14:13 Muntu uvua munyeme mu mvita ayi, kuya kumanyisha Abrame, muena Ebrewu lumu alu. Abrame uvua muase pabuipi ne mitshi ya tshijila ya Mambre, muena Amore. Mambre ne bana babu Eshekole ne Anere bavua batue ndondu ne Abrame." 
Genesis14:14 Abrame umvua ne: mbakuate Lote, muana wa muanetu, kubikilaye biende bilobu nkama isatu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bia mu diku diende. Kuipatshilabu bakalenga banayi abu too ne ku Dane." 
Genesis14:15 Bafika ku Dane, Abrame kuabanya bantu bende mu bisumbu. Kuluanganabu ne baluishi babu butuku, kubapita bukole. Kubipatabu too ne ku Oba, luseke lua ku mutu kua Damase." 
Genesis14:16 Abrame kunyenga bintu bionsu bivuabu banyema nabi. Kunyengaye kabidi ne Lote, muana wa muanabu ne bintu biende bionsu, pamue ne bakaji ne bena diende bonsu ba wabu bakuate." 
Genesis14:17 Mukalenga wa bena Sodome kuya mu tshibandabanda tshia Shawe (mmumue ne tshia Mukalenga), bua kuakidila Abrame pawaye upingana ku mvita, mumane kutshimuna Kedorlayomere ne bamfumu bonsu bavuaye nabu." 
Genesis14:18 Nanku Melkisedeke uvua mukalenga wa bena Saleme, muikale kabidi mutuangaji wa bantu ne Mvidi Mukulu muena kulu. Kutuadilaye Abrame mampa ne maluvu." 
Genesis14:19 Kumuelaye lupemba, wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu muena kulu, mufuki wa diulu ne buloba atumbe. Akuele wewe Abrame lupemba." 
Genesis14:20 Mvidi Mukulu muena kulu uvua mukuambuluishe bua wewe kutshimuna baluishi bebe atumbe! Abrame kulambula Melkisedeke tshia dikumi tshia bintu biende bionsu bivuaye munyenge mu mvita. 
Genesis14:21 Mukalenga wa bena Sodome kuambila Abrame ne: — Mpingajila meme bantu banyi, wewe ushale ne bintu." 
Genesis14:22 Abrame kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nditshipa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muena kulu, mufuki wa diulu ne buloba ne:" 
Genesis14:23 Tshiena mua kulenga kantu ka ku bianza biebe, nansha buanda, nansha nshinga wa bisabata, bualu udi mua kuamba ne: “Meme ke udi munemeshe Abrame.”" 
Genesis14:24 Meme tshiena ngangata tshintu nansha tshimue pa kumusha biakudia bivua bantu banyi badie. Kabidi bantu bonsu batuvua nabu mu mvita bangambuluisha abu: Anere, Eshekole ne Mambre, bobu nkayabu nebadiangatshile tshiabu tshitupa tshia bintu." 
Genesis15:1 Malu onsu mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela Abrame, umuambila ne: — Abrame, kutshinyi to! Ndi nebe, nenkulame ku njiwu yonsu, kabidi difutu diebe nedikale dinene." 
Genesis15:2 Abrame kumukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, neumfute tshinyi? Meme tshiena mulele muana." 
Genesis15:3 Bianyi bionsu nebabipiane anu kudi Eliyezere, muena Damase, udi wenza mudimu mu nzubu muanyi." 
Genesis15:4 Maweja-Nangila kukolesha Abrame ku muoyi, umuambila ne: — Bintu biebe kabena babipiana kudi muena mudimu webe to. Nebishale anu kudi muana wa munda muebe." 
Genesis15:5 Maweja-Nangila kupatuka ne Abrame mu ntenta wende, umuambila ne: — Tangila mulu ne udi mua kubala mitotu idimu. Ke muikale bungi bua ndelanganyi yebe." 
Genesis15:6 Abrame kuitaba bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kujadika ne: Abrame mmuntu muakane. 
Genesis15:7 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuambila Abrame ne: — Meme Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mukupatule mu Ure wa bena Babilone, bua kukupesha ditunga edi, dishale diebe." 
Genesis15:8 Abrame kumukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nemmanye ne: ditunga edi nedishale dianyi mushindu kaayi?" 
Genesis15:9 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Ntuadile muana wa ngombe, mbuji ne mukoku wa tshimpanga bia bidimu bisatu. Pashishe ntuadile kamanda-nkutshi ne nkudimba." 
Genesis15:10 Abrame kumutuadila nyama yonsu ayi, kuyipanda nseke, kuteka luseke ne luseke bitangilangane. Kadi kena mupande nyunyi to." 
Genesis15:11 Pashishe, nyunyi ya mikanku kupueka bua kuzokola minyinyi ya nyama ayi, kadi Abrame kuyipata." 
Genesis15:12 Ku dilolu Abrame kulala tulu tukole. Bowa ne luzakalu kumuenzabi bikole. 
Genesis15:13 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Abrame ne: — Umanye bimpe ne: ndelanganyi yebe neyisombe mu ditunga dia bende. Nebayikengeshe, ishale ku bupika bidimu nkama inayi." 
Genesis15:14 Kadi, meme nennyoke tshisamba tshikale tshiyikuata ku bupika atshi. Ndelanganyi yebe neyipatuke mu bupika ne biuma bia bungi." 
Genesis15:15 Wewe neukole ukulakaja, ufua ne disanka ne ditalala, ulonda bankambua bebe." 
Genesis15:16 Amu tunkanunuina tuebe tua tshikondu tshinayi netupingane mu ditunga edi kashidi. Bualu nengipate bena Amore anu pambamona ne bubi buabu budi bukengela dinyoka. 
Genesis15:17 Butuku bumane kuila, midima kuenzeka. Tshikutu tshia kapia ne ndimi yaku kupitabi pankatshi pa bitupa bia nyama bivua Abrame mupande abi." 
Genesis15:18 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kutua ndondu ne Abrame muaba awu, kumulaya ne: — Matunga aa nengapeshe ndelanganyi yebe, biangatshile ku musulu wa Ejipitu ne ku musulu munene wa Perate." 
Genesis15:19 Ke ditunga dia bena Keni, dia bena Kenizi, dia bena Kadmoni," 
Genesis15:20 dia bena Iti, dia bena Perizi, dia bena Refayime," 
Genesis15:21 dia bena Amore, dia bena Kenaane, dia bena Ngirgashi ne dia bena Yebusa." 
Genesis16:1 Sarayi, mukaji wa Abrame, kavua mulele muana to. Kadi uvua ne mupika wende, nsongakaji wa bena Ejipitu, dina diende Agare." 
Genesis16:2 Sarayi kuambila Abrame ne: — Udi mumone ne Maweja-Nangila kena mumpeshe bana. Nanku angata mupika wanyi ewu, ikale mukajebe. Misangu mikuabu udi mua kundelela muana wa balume. Abrame kuitaba bivua Sarayi mumulombe." 
Genesis16:3 Abrame mumane kusomba mu ditunga dia Kenaane bidimu dikumi, Sarayi kumupesha Agare bua ikale mukajende." 
Genesis16:4 Abrame kumubuelela mu nzubu. Agare kuimita difu. Pavua Agare mujadike ne: ndi ne difu, kutekelaye Sarayi kapeja." 
Genesis16:5 Ke Sarayi kuambila Abrame ne: — Badi bampenda bipendu bionsu ebi bualu buebe. Meme kukupesha mupika wanyi bua ikale muena kuebe. Kadi katshia wimita difu, kena unnemeka kabidi to. Maweja-Nangila nkayende akose tshilumbu tshidi pankatshi petu nebe." 
Genesis16:6 Abrame kuandamuna Sarayi ne: — Angata mupika webe, wenze nende muudi musue. Sarayi kukengesha Agare bikole too ne padinyemenaye kuya mu tshipela." 
Genesis16:7 Agare ufika mu tshipela, pabuipi ne mpokolu wa mayi uvua mu njila wa ku Shure, kusambakenaye ne mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis16:8 Awu kumukonka ne: — Agare, mupika wa Sarayi, udi ufuma penyi? Uyaya kuepi? Agare kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nnyema Sarayi, mfumuanyi wa mudimu." 
Genesis16:9 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumubela wamba ne: — Pingana anu kudi Sarayi, mfumuebe wa mudimu. Witabe bionsu bidiye ukuambila." 
Genesis16:10 Maweja-Nangila neavudije ndelanganyi yebe bungi budi muntu kayi mua kubala. 
Genesis16:11 Mpindiewu udi ne difu. Neulele muana wa balume. Umuinyike Ismayele. Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmumane kumvua muadi wa dikenga diebe. 
Genesis16:12 Muanebe awu neikale bu nyama wa mpunde wa muitu! Nealuishe muntu yonsu. Muntu yonsu kabidi neamuluishe. Kakusomba pamue ne bana babu to. Neasombe amu pa nkayende. 
Genesis16:13 Agare kudikonka ne: “Ndi mumone Udi mummone anyi?” Kuinyikaye Maweja-Nangila uvua umuakuisha dina ne: “Wewe udi Ele-Royi, mmumue ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mummone.”" 
Genesis16:14 Ke padibu babikila tshina tshia mayi tshidi pankatshi pa Kadeshe ne Berede ne: Lahayi-Royi, mmumue ne: tshina tshia Udi ne muoyi uvua mummone." 
Genesis16:15 Agare kulela muana wa balume. Abrame kumuinyika Ismayele. 
Genesis16:16 Tshidimu tshivua Agare mulela muana, Abrame uvua ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bisambombu." 
Genesis17:1 Abrame mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi tshitema ne tshitema, Maweja-Nangila kumumuenekela, umuambila ne: — Ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Witabe diyi dianyi, wikale muntu muakane." 
Genesis17:2 Ndi ntua nebe ndondu. Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe. 
Genesis17:3 Abrame kudiela mutu panshi. Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: 
Genesis17:4 — Ndondu undi ntua nebe udi nunku: Newikale nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi. 
Genesis17:5 Dina diebe kadiakuikala kabidi Abrame to. Nedikale Abrahame, bualu nenkuvuije nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi." 
Genesis17:6 Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe. Ku ndelanganyi aku nekupatuke bisamba bia bungi, nekupatuke kabidi bakalenga banene." 
Genesis17:7 Ndi ntua ndondu ewu nebe kashidi, kabidi ne ndelanganyi yebe yonsu. Meme nennulame mu bikondu bionsu. Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu webe kabidi ne wa ndelanganyi yebe yonsu." 
Genesis17:8 Ditunga edi dijima dia Kenaane diudi upitshila mpindiewu bu muenyi, nenkupeshadi kashidi. Nedishale bupianyi buebe ne bua ndelanganyi yebe. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Genesis17:9 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Abrahame kabidi ne: — Wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe yonsu nulame ndondu ewu. 
Genesis17:10 Ke mikenji yanyi inudi ne bua kulama: Bantu balume bonsu ba ku ndelanganyi yebe, nubateke panshi." 
Genesis17:11 Etshi ke tshimanyinu tshia kashidi tshia pambidi penu, tshidi tshijadika ndondu udi pankatshi panyi nenu." 
Genesis17:12 Bana benu ba balume bamane kukumbaja matuku muanda mukulu, badi ne bua kubateka panshi, nansha bapika badibu balelela muebe, nansha bapika benyi baudi musumbe, badi kabayi ba mu diku diebe." 
Genesis17:13 Nanku mupika udibu balelela ku nzubu kuebe, nansha udibu basumba, babateke bonsu panshi, bua ndondu wanyi amueneke kashidi mu mubidi wenu." 
Genesis17:14 Kadi muntu mulume udibu kabayi bateke panshi, nebamuipate munkatshi mua bantu banyi, bualu kena munemeka ndondu wanyi to." 
Genesis17:15 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Abrahame ne: — Kubikidi kabidi mukajebe ne Sarayi to. Umubikile ne: Sara. 
Genesis17:16 Ndi mmuela lupemba. Neakulelele muana wa balume. Neikale mamuende wa bisamba bia bungi. Bakalenga ba bisamba bishilangane nebapatukile ku ndelanganyi yende. 
Genesis17:17 Abrahame kudiela mutu panshi, useka wamba ne: “Muntu mukulumpe wa bidimu lukama, udi mua kulela muana bishi? Kabidi Sara udi ne bidimu makumi tshitema, neapete muana mushindu kaayi?”" 
Genesis17:18 Abrahame kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Ismayele wanyi ewu udi anu mukumbane. Ashale ne muoyi. Umukumbajile biudi mulaye. 
Genesis17:19 Mvidi Mukulu kumuandamuna ne: — Nansha! Mukajebe Sara nealele muana wa balume. Neumuinyike ne Izake. Meme nentue nende ndondu wa kashidi kabidi ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu. 
Genesis17:20 Kadi ndi ngitaba biudi ulomba bua Ismayele. Ndi mmuela lupemba, neatante, avulangane, nealele bakalenga dikumi ne babidi, neikale nkambua wa tshisamba tshinene." 
Genesis17:21 Kadi nentue ndondu ne Izake, muana walelabu kudi mukajebe Sara tshidimu tshidi kumpala etshi." 
Genesis17:22 Mvidi Mukulu ujikija kuakula ne Abrahame, kulayanganabu." 
Genesis17:23 Anu dituku adi, Abrahame kuteka muanende Ismayele panshi, kabidi ne bana ba balume bonsu bavua mu diku diende, too ne bapika bavuabu balele mu nzubu muende, ne bonsu bavuaye musumbe, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile." 
Genesis17:24 Abrahame mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi tshitema ne tshitema, kumutekabu pende panshi." 
Genesis17:25 Tshikondu atshi, Ismayele uvua ne bidimu dikumi ne bisatu." 
Genesis17:26 Abrahame ne muanende wa balume Ismayele kubatekabu panshi dituku dimue. 
Genesis17:27 Kutekabu bantu balume bonsu panshi, ne bapika bavuabu balelela mu nzubu muende, ne bavuaye musumbe ku matunga makuabu." 
Genesis18:1 Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela Abrahame ku mitshi ya tshijila ya ku Mambre. Abrahame uvua musombe mu mushiku wa mbelu wa kazubu kende ka ntenta diba dia munda munya. 
Genesis18:2 Abrahame ukenzakana, kumona bantu balume basatu bimane pabuipi nende. Kujukaye lubilu bua kubakidila. Kuinyikaye mutu panshi." 
Genesis18:3 Abrahame kuambila umue wa kudibu ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, pangikala mukutokele ku muoyi, kupitshi kumbelu kuanyi to." 
Genesis18:4 Banupeshe mayi, nowe ku makasa, nuikishe kuinshi kua mutshi ewu." 
Genesis18:5 Nennutuadile kantu ka nuenu kudia. Nudie nupete bukole, numone mua kutungunuka ne luendu luenu. Bualu nudi bafike ku mbelu kua muntu wenu. Kuitababu ne: — Mbimpe, enza muwambi amu." 
Genesis18:6 Abrahame kuya lukasa ku ntenta kuvua Sara, umuambila ne: — Kolesha, angata bukula buimpe, usope mikata isatu." 
Genesis18:7 Kunyemenaye kabidi ku tshikumbi tshia ngombe, kusungulaye muana wa ngombe muimpe wa manyi. Kumufila kudi muena mudimu bua amulambe lukasa." 
Genesis18:8 Pashishe, kuangataye manteka, mabela ne munyinyi uvua-bu balamba awu, kubapesha. Pavuabu badia, Abrahame uvua muimane kulu pabuipi nabu, muinshi mua mutshi." 
Genesis18:9 Bantu kukonka Abrahame ne: — Mukajebe Sara udi penyi? Abrahame ne: — Udi mu ntenta muamua. 
Genesis18:10 Umue wa kudibu kulaya Abrahame ne: — Tshidimu tshialonda, ngondu wa momumue nempingane kuebe eku. Diba adi mukajebe Sara neikale mumane kulela muana wa balume. Sara uvua musombe mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta, panyima pa bayende. Uvua muteleje bivuabu bamba abi." 
Genesis18:11 Abrahame ne Sara bakavua bakole bakulakaje, Sara mumane kupita diba dia buledi, katshiyi umona tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Genesis18:12 Sara kudisekela, wamba ne: “Bukole bunkadi ebu, tshiena kabidi ne milowu ya balume bua kulela muana to. Bayanyi ukadi muntu mukulumpe.”" 
Genesis18:13 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Abrahame ne: — Mukajebe Sara udi useka tshinyi? Bua tshinyi udi wamba ne: “Bukole bunkadi ebu tshiena mua kulela kabidi to!” 
Genesis18:14 Kakuena tshidi mua kukolela Maweja-Nangila to. Tshidimu tshiavua, ngondu wa momumue, nempingane apa. Diba adi mukajebe Sara neikale mumane kulela muana wa balume." 
Genesis18:15 Sara kumvuaye buowa, kuyila wamba ne: — Tshiena museke to. Maweja-Nangila kumujadikila ne: — Bulelela uvua useka." 
Genesis18:16 Bantu abu kujuka batangile ku Sodome. Abrahame kuya kubashindikija. 
Genesis18:17 Maweja-Nangila kuamba mundamunda muende ne: — Tshiena mua kusokoka Abrahame bualu bundi nya kuenza to," 
Genesis18:18 bualu ndelanganyi yende neikale tshisamba tshinene ne tshia bukole. Nengele bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba lupemba mu dina diende. 
Genesis18:19 Ndi mumusungule bua alongeshe bana bende ne ndelanganyi yende mikenji yanyi, bua babikumbaje bikale bantu bakane. Bobu bakumbaje bionsu ebi, meme Maweja-Nangila nengenzele Abrahame bionsu bindi mumulaye." 
Genesis18:20 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuambila Abrahame ne: — Bantu mbafunde bena Sodome ne Ngomore kundi, bualu buenzayi buabu mbupite." 
Genesis18:21 Ndi musue kuya kudimuena bua kujadika ne batshidi batungunuka ne buenzavi buabu bu mundi mumvue emu. 
Genesis18:22 Benyi babidi kutungunuka ne luendu kuya ku Sodome. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kushala muaba uvua Abrahame. 
Genesis18:23 Abrahame kusemena kudiye, umukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila, neubutule muntu muakane pamue ne muena tshibawu anyi?" 
Genesis18:24 Wewe musangane bantu bakane makumi atanu mu musoku awu, udi mua kufuilaku musoku mujima luse, bua kupandisha bantu aba makumi atanu, anyi udi ubutula musoku mujima?" 
Genesis18:25 Wewe kuena mua kuenza nanku, kuena mua kushipa muntu muakane pamue ne muena tshibawu. Abu bualu buyile kule. Bonsu babidi nebamueneke anu bu bena tshibawu. Wewe mukoshi wa nsambu munene wa buloba bujima, kuena mua kukosa nsambu bibi to." 
Genesis18:26 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane makumi atanu mu Sodome, nemfuile musoku mujima luse bualu buabu." 
Genesis18:27 Abrahame kuamba kabidi ne: — Ndi nkolesha muoyi bua kuakula ne Maweja-Nangila wanyi, nansha bu mundi muikale muntu tshianana, tshintu tshia lupitapita." 
Genesis18:28 Kadi bu wewe mua kupeta bantu bakane anu makumi anayi ne batanu, batanu bakuabu kabayiku, neubutule tshimenga tshijima bua batanu abu anyi? Mvidi Mukulu kuandamuna ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane makumi anayi ne batanu, tshiakubutula tshimenga to." 
Genesis18:29 Abrahame kumukonka kabidi ne: — Misangu mikuabu udi mua kusangana bantu bakane anu makumi anayi, newenze tshinyi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane makumi anayi, nemfuile bantu luse bualu buabu." 
Genesis18:30 Abrahame kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila kabikutondi, ntshidi anu ntungunuka. Misangu mikuabu neusangane bantu bakane anu makumi asatu, newenze tshinyi? Maweja-Nangila ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane makumi asatu, tshiakubutula tshimenga." 
Genesis18:31 Abrahame kumukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse bua pandi ngakula nebe. Wewe musangane bantu bakane anu makumi abidi, newenze tshinyi? Maweja-Nangila ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane makumi abidi, tshiakubutula tshimenga." 
Genesis18:32 Abrahame ne: — Ndi ngakula musangu wa ndekelu, kufiki munda. Kadi wewe musangane bantu bakane anu dikumi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Meme musangane bantu bakane anu dikumi, tshiakubutula tshimenga to." 
Genesis18:33 Bajikija kuakula, Maweja-Nangila kumuka, Abrahame kupingana kuende." 
Genesis19:1 Batumibue babidi kufikamu Sodome dilolu. Kusanganabu Lote musombe ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga. Lote ubamona, kujukaye bua kubakidila. Kuinyikaye mutu panshi, wamba ne:" 
Genesis19:2 — Bakalenga banyi, bu nuenu basue, kanupitshi to. Tuyayi ku mbelu. Nowa mayi ku makasa, nulale. Patshiabu dinda nenutungunuke ne luendu luenu. Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Tudi tulala anu pambelu muaba utudi ewu." 
Genesis19:3 Kadi Lote kubasengelela bikole. Nanku bobu kuanyisha bua kuya ku nzubu kuende. Lote kubalambila biakudia, kuboshila mikata, kudiabu." 
Genesis19:4 Bantu kabayi banji kulala, bantu balume bonsu ba mu musoku, bakulumpe ne bansongalume kunyungulula nzubu wa Lote." 
Genesis19:5 Bavua bela mbila bamukonka ne: — Bantu balume bavua bafika kuebe dilolu edi badi penyi? Bapatula bualu tudi basue bikale bakaji betu. 
Genesis19:6 Lote kupatuka mu nzubu, kuinjila tshiibi," 
Genesis19:7 kubambila ne: — Bana betu, ndi nnusengelela ne: kanuenzedi bantu aba bibi nanku to." 
Genesis19:8 Angatayi nansha nsongakaji yanyi ibidi eyi. Kayena mianji kumanyangana ne balume to. Nenyipatule pambelu, nuenze nayi bu munudi basue. Kadi bantu balume aba mbenyi banyi, bandi ne bua kulama bimpe. Kanubenzedi bibi to." 
Genesis19:9 Kadi bena ditunga kukanyina Lote, bamba ne: — Umuke apa. Wewe kabidi udi anu muenyi mu ditunga dietu. Muukadi ututumina diyi mbishi? Umanye ne: netukuenzele bibi bipite bia bantu aba. Kusakilabu Lote bikole, kusemenabu pabuipi ne nzubu bua kutula tshiibi." 
Genesis19:10 Kadi batumibue babidi kukoka Lote, kumubueja mu nzubu, kukanga tshiibi." 
Genesis19:11 Pashishe kufofomijabu mesu a bonsu bavua ku tshiibi, bansongalume ne bantu bakole, bua bapange kumona tshiibi." 
Genesis19:12 Batumibue babidi abu kuambila Lote ne: — Pawikala ne bena diku diebe bakuabu muaba ewu, nansha ne baku bebe, bana bebe ba balume ne ba bakaji, umuke nabu mu tshimenga etshi." 
Genesis19:13 Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmumane kumvua lumu lua buenzayi bua bena tshimenga etshi, mututume bua kutshibutula." 
Genesis19:14 Lote kuya kuambila baku bende, bavua babangile bana bende ba bakaji, ne: — Jukayi lukasa, numuke mu tshimenga etshi, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmusue kutshibutula. Kadi baku bende kuela meji ne: udi wamba bilele." 
Genesis19:15 Pa kabundubundu batumibue abu kusamina Lote, bamba ne: — Jukayi lukasa, angata mukajebe ne bana bebe ba bakaji babidi. Tuyayi bua kanuvu kubutuka pamue ne tshimenga etshi." 
Genesis19:16 Kadi Lote uvua anu ujingakana. Bantu abu kumukuata ku tshianza, kukuata kabidi ne mukajende, ne bana bende ba bakaji babidi kubapatula mu tshimenga. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua musue kusungidila Lote." 
Genesis19:17 Bobu bamane kupatuka mu ditunga, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu kuambila Lote ne: — Nyema, kolesha bua kudipandisha. Kutangidi panyima, kuimanyi pa muaba. Uye kusokoma ku mukuna bua kuvu kubutuka." 
Genesis19:18 Lote kumusengelela ne: — Mukalenga, kabienzeki nanku to!" 
Genesis19:19 Ukadi mumane kumfuila luse, nangananga paudi mumpatule mu tshimenga etshi bua kumpandisha. Kadi meme tshiena mua kufika ku mukuna, diakabi adi kadiyi dianji kunkuata, bualu kuaka nkupite bule. Ndi mua kufuila mu njila." 
Genesis19:20 Kadi anyisha bua meme kunyemena mu kasoku kaudi umona pabuipi apa, bualu nkakese. Nanku nempande pamue ne bena kasoku aka." 
Genesis19:21 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuitaba ne: — Mbimpe, ndi nganyisha kabidi biudi wamba. Tshiena mbutula kasoku aka to." 
Genesis19:22 Kadi nyema, kolesha ubutame mu kasoku aka. Tshiena mua kuenza bualu, wewe kuyi muanji kufikamu. (Ke padibu binyika kasoku aka ne: Soware. )" 
Genesis19:23 Butshia, Lote kufika mu Soware." 
Genesis19:24 Diba adi Maweja-Nangila kulokesha mu Sodome ne Ngomore mvula wa kapia kakole ka mfundanga, kela ndimi." 
Genesis19:25 Mvula awu kubutula bimenga bionsu bibidi, kushipa bantu, kunyanga ditunga ne madimi mene kashidi." 
Genesis19:26 Mukaji wa Lote kutangila panyima. Kuandamukaye lupingu lua luepu. 
Genesis19:27 Butshia pa kabundubundu Abrahame kuya muaba uvuabu bimane ne Maweja-Nangila. 
Genesis19:28 Utangila ditunga dijima dia Sodome ne Ngomore, kumonaye muinshi ubanda mulu bu wa tshikutu tshia kapia." 
Genesis19:29 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu ubutula Sodome ne Ngomore, uvua anu muvuluke Abrahame. Ke nuwuaye mupandishe Lote." 
Genesis19:30 Lote uvua ne buowa bua kushala mu Soware. Ke nuwuaye mumuke ne bana bende ba bakaji babidi bua kuya kusokoma nabu mu lubuebue pa mikuna. 
Genesis19:31 Dimue dituku, muanende wa bakaji muanabute, kuambila muakunyi ne: — Tatu ukadi mununu. Mu ditunga dijima edi kamuena muntu udi mua kutusela, tuetu kubuela mu dibaka mudi bantu bonsu benza." 
Genesis19:32 Nanku tunuishe tatu wetu maluvu. Pakuatshikaye, tuangatangane nende bua tumulelele bana." 
Genesis19:33 Butuku abu kumushabu tatuabu maluvu. Muanabute kusomba nende. Tatuabu kavua mumanye bionsu bivua bienzeka abi to. 
Genesis19:34 Butshia muanabute kuambila muakunyende ne: — Ngaladi ne tatu butuku ebu. Tumunuishe kabidi maluvu lelu. Pakuatshikaye, umanyangane pebe nende bua tumulelele bana." 
Genesis19:35 Butuku abu kumushabu tatuabu maluvu tshiakabidi. Muana muakunyi kulala nende. Kadi tatuabu kavua mumanye bionsu bivua bienzeka abi to. 
Genesis19:36 Bana ba bakaji babidi ba Lote kuimita mafu a kudi tatuabu. 
Genesis19:37 Muanabute kulela muana wa balume, kumuinyika dina ne: Mowabe. Yeye ke nkambua wa bena Mowabe batudi nabu lelu." 
Genesis19:38 Muana muakunyi pende kulela muana wa balume, kumuinyika dina ne: Bene-Ammi. Yeye ke nkambua wa bena Amone batudi nabu lelu." 
Genesis20:1 Abrahame umbuka ku Mambre, kuyaye kuasa kuinshi, mu ditunga dia Kenaane, pankatshi pa Kadeshe ne Shure. Umuke aku, kuyaye kusomba mu Ngerare." 
Genesis20:2 Kadi bu muvua Abrahame muambile bantu ne: Sara mmuanetu wa bakaji Abimeleke, mukalenga wa bena Ngerare, kuangata Sara bua ikale mukajende." 
Genesis20:3 Butuku abu, Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela Abimeleke mu tshilota, kumutandisha ne: — Wewe udi mudikebele lufu bua mukaji wa bende uudi munyenge ku bukole." 
Genesis20:4 Kadi, bu muvua Abimeleke kayi muanji kumubuelela mu nzubu, kuambaye ne: — Akia! Maweja-Nangila, tshisamba tshianyi ne meme katuena ne bualu to. Udi mua kutubutula anu patupu nanku anyi?" 
Genesis20:5 Abrahame wangambidi ne: “Sara mmuanetu wa bakaji.” Kabidi Sara wanjadikidi ne: “Abrahame ntutu”. Ke pamvua musue kuenza bualu ebu, kondu kanyi ka munda kakayi kantuuta, nansha kampisha mene." 
Genesis20:6 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila kabidi Abimeleke mu tshilota atshi ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: udi muenze nanku kuyi mumanye bualu. Ke pandi mukukandike ne kulengi ewu mukaji, nansha ne tshianza mene; tshianana, udi untombokela." 
Genesis20:7 Pingaja mukaji ewu kudi bayende. Umanye ne: bayende mmuambi. Neakuakuile bua kufu to. Kadi wewe mubenge kupingaja mukaji, neufue, kabidi bantu bonsu baudi nabu nebafue." 
Genesis20:8 Abimeleke kubika patshiatshia, kubikila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende. Kubamanyishaye bionsu bivua bimuenzekele abi. Balombodi kuzakala bikole." 
Genesis20:9 Abimeleke kubikidisha Abrahame, umukonka ne: — Tshiwatuenzedi nenku ntshinyi? Mbualu bubi kaayi bundi mukuenzele bua wewe kutubueja ne bena ditunga dianyi mu tshilumbu bunene nunku! Udi mutuenzele bualu budi muntu kayi mua kuenzela mukuabu to." 
Genesis20:10 Uvua muele meji kaayi pa kungenzela nunku? 
Genesis20:11 Abrahame kuandamuna ne: — Mvua muele meji ne: bantu ba kuneku kabena batshina Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku nebanshipe bua kuangata mukajanyi. 
Genesis20:12 Bulelela, Sara mmuanetu wa bakaji. Mmuanetu wa tatu. Kena wa mamu to. Ke pamvua mumusele nanku." 
Genesis20:13 Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kungumusha mu nzubu mua baledi banyi, meme kuambila mukajanyi Sara ne: “Miaba yonsu itudi tupitshila nebe, ambila bantu ne: Abrahame udi muanetu wa balume, bua kabanshipi bualu buebe.”" 
Genesis20:14 Abimeleke kupingajila Abrahame mukajende. Kumutentekelapu ne bapika balume ne bakaji, mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe." 
Genesis20:15 Abimeleke kuambila Abrahame ne: — Ditunga dianyi ndikulekele, wase muaba uudi musue." 
Genesis20:16 Pashishe Abimeleke kuambila Sara ne: — Nempeshe tutuebe nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshinunu, bua bantu bonsu baudi nabu bajadike ne: wewe kuena muenze tshilema to. Nanku nebakunemeke." 
Genesis20:17 Kadi Abrahame kulomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua apandishe Abimeleke, apandishe kabidi mukajende ne bakaji bende bapika, bua bamone mua kulela bana tshiakabidi." 
Genesis20:18 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukandike lulelu lua mukaji wa Abimeleke ne lua bakaji bakuabu ba mu diku dia Abimeleke, bualu bua tshilumbu tshia Sara, mukaji wa Abrahame." 
Genesis21:1 Maweja-Nangila kusankisha Sara, kumukumbaja bionsu bivuaye mumulaye." 
Genesis21:2 Sara kuimita, kulelela Abrahame muana wa ku bukunda, mu tshikondu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mujadike." 
Genesis21:3 Abrahame kuinyika muana, uvua Sara mumulelele ne: Izake." 
Genesis21:4 Matuku muanda mukulu akumbana, Abrahame kuteka Izake panshi bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile." 
Genesis21:5 Tshikondu tshivuabu balele Izake, Abrahame uvua mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama." 
Genesis21:6 Sara kusanka wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu mmunsekeshe. Nanku bonsu bumvue batela Izake nebaseke pamue nanyi. 
Genesis21:7 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Muntu kaayi uvua mua kuambila Abrahame ne: Dimue dituku Sara neamushe bana mabele? Mpindiewu ngaleledi Abrahame muana wa ku bukunda buende. 
Genesis21:8 Muana awu kukola, kulekela diamua mabele. Abrahame kulongolola masanka dituku adi." 
Genesis21:9 Dituku dikuabu, Ismayele, muana wa Abrahame uvuaye mulele ne Agare muena Ejipitu, uvua unaya ne Izake. Sara umona nanku," 
Genesis21:10 kuambilaye Abrahame ne: — Ipata mukaji mupika ewu ne muanende, bualu muana wa mukaji ewu kena mua kufuilakana bintu bia bupianyi ne muananyi Izake to." 
Genesis21:11 Miaku eyi kutonda Abrahame bikole, bualu Ismayele uvua kabidi anu muanende." 
Genesis21:12 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Abrahame ne: — Kufiki munda bua muana ewu ne bua mukajebe mupika to. Itaba bionsu bidi Sara mukuambile. Uvuluke ne: ndelanganyi yebe yonsu imvua mukulaye neyifumine anu kudi Izake. 
Genesis21:13 Kadi bua muana uudi mulele ne mukaji mupika ewu, nealele pende bana ba bungi. Neikale tshisamba tshinene, bualu udi muanebe." 
Genesis21:14 Abrahame, kujuka dinda dionsu, kupesha Agare diampa ne kabulubulu tente ne mayi. Kumusuikaye muana panyima, umuambe ne: Ndaku. Agare uvua wenda ulalakana mu tshipela tshia Bersheba." 
Genesis21:15 Kadi mayi avuabu nawu mu kabulubulu kujika. Agare kushiya muana muinshi mua mutshi. 
Genesis21:16 Kuyaye kusomba pa nkayende mutantshi muipi udibu mua kuela muketa ufika. Uvua wamba ne: “Tshiena musue kumona mudi muananyi ufua to”. Agare kusomba ku mpenga, udila muadi." 
Genesis21:17 Mvidi Mukulu kumvua muadi wa muana. Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuela diyi difumine mu diulu, kuebeja Agare ne: — Tshidi tshikutonda nanku ntshinyi? Kutshinyi to. Mvidi Mukulu umvu muadi wa muana." 
Genesis21:18 Juka, ubishe muana, umukuate bikole ku tshianza. Ndelanganyi yende neyenze tshisamba tshinene." 
Genesis21:19 Mvidi Mukulu kutabeja mesu a Agare. Kumonaye tshiina tshia mayi muaba awu. Kusunaye mayi kabulubulu tente, kunuisha muana." 
Genesis21:20 Mvidi Mukulu kulama muana awu bimpe. Kukolaye, kushalaye tshilembi tshia buta bua mbale tshia kalanda musenga. Kusombaye mu tshipela tshia Parane." 
Genesis21:21 Mamuende kumuselesha mukaji wa bena Ejipitu. 
Genesis21:22 Matuku awu, Abimeleke ne Pikole, mulombodi wa bena mvita bende, kufika kudi Abrahame, bamuambila ne: — Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuambuluisha mu bionsu biudi wenza." 
Genesis21:23 Nanku, uditshipe mpindiewu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu ne: tshiakuenzela Abimeleke, bana bende ne ndelanganyi yende bibi to. Kadi ungenzele meme, ne bena ditunga dianyi diudi usomba, bimpe mumvua mukuenzele." 
Genesis21:24 Abrahame kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ndi nditshipa nanku." 
Genesis21:25 Kadi, Abrahame kuela Abimeleke lusanzu bua tshiina tshia mayi tshivua bena mudimu bende bakandamana natshi." 
Genesis21:26 Abimeleke kukema wamba ne: — Tshiena mumanye udi muenze nanku to! Kuvua mungambile bualu ebu kuonsu eku! Nkadi mbumanya anu lelu. 
Genesis21:27 Abrahame kupesha Abimeleke mikoku, mbuji ne ngomba. Bonsu babidi kutua ndondu." 
Genesis21:28 Kadi, Abrahame kuteka bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete pa nkayabu." 
Genesis21:29 Abimeleke kumukonka ne: — Wenji nanku bua tshinyi? 
Genesis21:30 Abrahame kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkupa bana ba mikoku aba muanda mutekete bua bakuvuluije ne: uvua mumbule tshiina tshia mayi etshi ngAbrahame! 
Genesis21:31 Nanku kuinyikabu muaba awu ne: Bersheba, bualu bonsu babidi bavua batuilapu ndondu ne mutshipu." 
Genesis21:32 Bobu bamane kutua ndondu nanku, Abimeleke ne Pikole, mulombodi wa bena mvita bende, kupingana mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete." 
Genesis21:33 Abrahame kuya mu Bersheba, kukunamu mutshi wa kampanga-nzevu. Ke muvuaye utendelela Mvidi Mukulu wa kashidi, utela dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis21:34 Abrahame kushala mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete matuku mulongulongu. 
Genesis22:1 Izake mumane kukola, Mvidi Mukulu kuteta Abrahame. Kumubikilaye ne: — Abrahame. Yeye kuitaba ne: — Ke meme ewu." 
Genesis22:2 Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Angata muanebe umuepele Izake uudi mupite kunanga awu, uye nende mu ditunga dia Moriya pa mukuna umbakuleja, umungoshile pa tshilambuilu." 
Genesis22:3 Butshia Abrahame kujuka ne dinda dionsu, kuangata muanende Izake, bena mudimu bende babidi, mpunde wende ne nkunyi. Kuyaye muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile bua kulambula mulambu." 
Genesis22:4 Bamane kuenda matuku asatu, Abrahame ukenzakana kumona mukuna awu umueneka pa bule." 
Genesis22:5 Abrahame kuambila bena mudimu bende babidi ne: — Nuenu nushale apa ne nyama wa mpunde ewu. Meme ne muananyi tuyaya kulu kuaka bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe netupingane apa. 
Genesis22:6 Abrahame kuambika muanende Izake tshisumbu tshia nkunyi, kukuata kela, kuambula mbabula ne makala a kapia. Pavuabu benda pamue," 
Genesis22:7 Izake kukonka Abrahame ne: — Tatu! Awu ne: — Muananyi. Izake ne: — Tudi ne nkunyi ne kapia, kadi muana wa mukoku wa kulambula udi penyi?" 
Genesis22:8 Abrahame kuandamuna muanende ne: — Muananyi, Mvidi Mukulu nkayende neatupe muana wa mukoku. Bonsu babidi kutungunuka ne luendu." 
Genesis22:9 Bafika muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, Abrahame kuenza tshilambuilu, kutekapu nkunyi. Pashishe kusuikaye muanende Izake, kumuteka pa tshilambuilu pamutu pa nkunyi." 
Genesis22:10 Kuambulaye kela bua kumukosa mutu. 
Genesis22:11 Kadi kumvuaye diyi dia mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu difumina mu diulu dimubikila ne: — Abrahame, Abrahame! Yeye kuitaba ne: — Ke meme ewu." 
Genesis22:12 Maweja-Nangila kumukandika ne: — Kulengi muana, kumuenzedi bibi. Mpindiewu ngajadiki ne: udi untshina meme Mvidi Mukulu, bualu kuena mumpale muanebe umuepele umvua mukupeshe." 
Genesis22:13 Abrahame ukenzakana, kumonaye mukoku wa tshimpanga, nsengu yatshi mipatame mu mutshi. Kuangataye mukoku wa tshimpanga awu, kulambula Mvidi Mukulu pa muaba wa muanende Izake." 
Genesis22:14 Nanku Abrahame kuinyika muaba awu ne: “Mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila udi utupesha!” Mukuna awu batshidi baubikila too ne mpindiewu ne: “Pa mukuna ewu Maweja-Nangila neatupeshe. ” 
Genesis22:15 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kubikila Abrahame tshiakabidi," 
Genesis22:16 umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi ujadika ne: Bu muudi muenze nanku kuyi mumpale muanebe umuepele, bu mundi meme Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nditshipa ne:" 
Genesis22:17 Nenkuele lupemba; nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe bungi bua mitotu ya mulu, nansha bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Ndelanganyi yebe neyinyenge misoku ya bena lukuna bayi." 
Genesis22:18 Bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebipetele diakalenga ku ndelanganyi yebe, bualu witabi mikenji yanyi." 
Genesis22:19 Pashishe Abrahame kupingana kuvua bena mudimu bende bashale, kuya nabu bonsu mu Bersheba mu ditunga divuaye usomba." 
Genesis22:20 Malu awu mamane kupita, kuambilabu Abrahame ne: “Bana ba balume badi Milka, mukaji wa muanenu Nahore, mulele badi muanda mukulu:" 
Genesis22:21 muanabute udi Use, pashishe Buze, Kemuyele, tatuende wa Arame," 
Genesis22:22 Keshede, Azo, Pildashe, Idlafe ne Betuyele," 
Genesis22:23 tatuende wa Rebeka.” Ke bana muanda mukulu bavua Milka mulelele Nahore, muanabu ne Abrahame." 
Genesis22:24 Reyuma mukaji mukuabu wa Nahore, uvua mulele bana ba balume aba banayi: Teba, Ngahame, Tahashe ne Maaka." 
Genesis23:1 Sara mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete," 
Genesis23:2 kufuaye mu Kiriyate-Arba, momumue ne Ebrone, mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Abrahame kuenza madilu a mukajende, kumudila." 
Genesis23:3 Patshivua tshitalu tshia Sara katshiyi tshianji kujika, Abrahame kuya kudi ndelanganyi ya Ete, kubambila ne:" 
Genesis23:4 — Meme ndi muenyi munkatshi muenu. Numpeshe muaba, muenu munu, wa kujika muena kuanyi." 
Genesis23:5 Bena Ete kuandamuna ne: 
Genesis23:6 — Mukalenga, Mvidi Mukulu mmukuele lupemba, suaku ututeleje. Ujike mukajebe mu lukita luakane lua ku nkita yetu. Muntu wa kutudi nansha umue kena mua kukupala lukita luende bua ujike muena kuebe to." 
Genesis23:7 Abrahame kujuka, kuinyika mutu panshi, wambila ndelanganyi ya Ete bavua base mu buloba abu," 
Genesis23:8 ne: — Panuikala basue bua meme kujika muena kuanyi apa, ndombelayi kudi Efrone, muana wa Sohare." 
Genesis23:9 Ampeshe lubuebue luende ludi ku mpenga kua budimi buende. Alunsumbishe ku mushinga walu, nuenu batangile, bua lushale muaba wanyi." 
Genesis23:10 Efrone, muena Iti, uvua musombe munkatshi mua bana babu amu. Kuandamunaye Abrahame ne bena Iti bavua basombe ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga bonsu bateleja ne:" 
Genesis23:11 — Ndi nkusengelela ne: tshiena nkusumbisha budimi ne lubuebue to. Ndi nkupeshabi, bana betu bonsu batangile, bua ujikemu muena kuebe." 
Genesis23:12 Abrahame kuinama panshi kumpala kua bonsu bavua muaba awu," 
Genesis23:13 wambila Efrone, bua bonsu bumvue, ne: — Ndi nkusengelela ne: unteleje! Ndi mfila mushinga wa budimi, uwangate, bua njike muena kuanyi." 
Genesis23:14 Efrone kuandamuna Abrahame ne: 
Genesis23:15 — Ndi nkusengelela ne: unteleje: muaba ewu udi mua kuikala wa mushinga wa nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nkama inayi. Kadi mine ayi idi mua kutuenzela wewe ne meme tshinyi? Nanku, jika muena kuebe."
