Genesis23:16 Abrahame kuitaba bivua Efrone muakule, kumubadilaye nkanu bungi buvuaye utela, bana babu bumvue. Nanku kumupeshaye nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nkama inayi, bilondeshile mishinga ya basumbishi ba bintu." 
Genesis23:17 Anu dituku adi, lubuebue lua Makpela luvua mu budimi bua Efrone, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Mambre, kushala mu dina dia Abrahame, kabidi ne mitshi yonsu ivua mikuna mu budimi amu." 
Genesis23:18 Bena Iti kujadikilabu bantu bonsu bavua ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga ne: muaba udi Abrahame musumbe washadi mu dina diende. 
Genesis23:19 Pashishe, Abrahame kujika muena kuende mu lubuebue alu luvua mu budimi bua Makpela pabuipi ne Mambre, udibu babikila ne: Ebrone, mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Genesis23:20 Budimi abu ne lubuebue luvuamu, Abrahame kubiangata kashidi, bena Iti bonsu bamone. Kushalabi muaba wa kujika bena diende bonsu." 
Genesis24:1 Abrahame kukola kukulakaja. Maweja-Nangila uvua anu mumuele lupemba mu malu onsu. 
Genesis24:2 Dituku dikuabu Abrahame kuambila muena mudimu mukulumpe wa ku bena mudimu bende ne: — Kuata muinshi mua tshibelu tshianyi," 
Genesis24:3 uditshipe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa diulu ne buloba, bualu kuena mua kukebela muananyi Izake mukaji wa mu ditunga dia Kenaane mundi muase emu to." 
Genesis24:4 Kadi uditshipe kundi, uye kukebela muananyi Izake mukaji anu kuetu kundela mu ditunga dietu, mu diku dietu." 
Genesis24:5 Muena mudimu awu kukonka Abrahame ne: — Kadi pikala mukaji awu mubenge bua kumuka mu ditunga diabu bua kusomba kuneku, ndi mua kuya ne muanebe Izake bua aye kusomba kuenu, muaba udi mukaji awu anyi?" 
Genesis24:6 Abrahame kuandamuna ne: — Wamanya, kuena mua kuya ne muananyi kuetu to." 
Genesis24:7 Bualu pavua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa diulu, mumpatule mu ditunga dietu ne mu diku dia baledi banyi, uvua mundaye bua kupesha ndelanganyi yanyi ditunga edi. Nanku, anu yeye neatume mutumibue wende kumpala kuebe, bua akuleje nsongakaji uudi mua kuselela muananyi Izake." 
Genesis24:8 Pikala nsongakaji awu ubenga mua kumuka mu ditunga diabu, diditshipa diebe kadiena dikuenzela bualu to. Kadi, nansha bia munyi, kuena mua kuya ne muananyi kuaka to." 
Genesis24:9 Muena mudimu kukuata muinshi mua tshibelu tshia mfumuende Abrahame, uditshipa bua kukumbaja bionsu bivua mfumuende mumutume bua kuenza." 
Genesis24:10 Muena mudimu awu kuangata tumelu dikumi tua mfumuende ne bionsu bivuaye mumone ne mbilenga. Bavua benda batangile mu tshimenga muvua Nahore musombe mu tshitupa tshia ku mutu kua misulu mu ditunga dia Mezopotamiya. 
Genesis24:11 Muena mudimu awu kufika pabuipi ne tshiina tshivua ku mpenga kua tshimenga dilolu, diba didi bakaji baya bua kusuna mayi. Kufuishaye tumelu binu panshi." 
Genesis24:12 Kutuadijaye kulomba Mvidi Mukulu wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa mfumuanyi Abrahame, lelu ndi nkusengelela ne: ungendeshe diakalenga, ukumbaje biuvua mulaye mfumuanyi Abrahame." 
Genesis24:13 Mpindiewu ndi muimane ku mpokolu wa mayi. Bana ba bakaji ba bantu badi mu tshimenga nebafike bua kusuna mayi. 
Genesis24:14 Nsongakaji ungambila ne: “Bu wewe musue tula mulondu panshi, umpeshe mayi a kunua,” pikalaye mua kuitaba bua kumpesha mayi a kunua, ne kunuisha tumelu tuanyi, nemmanye ne nsongakaji awu ke uudi musunguile muntu webe Izake. Kabidi nenjadike ne: malu onsu auvua mulaye mfumuanyi Abrahame akumbanyi." 
Genesis24:15 Muena mudimu kayi muanji kujikija ditendelela, Rebeka, muana wa Betuyele, kufika, muambuile mulondu wa mayi pa makaya. Betuyele uvua muana wa Nahore, muanabu ne Abrahame. Mamuende wa Betuyele uvua Milka." 
Genesis24:16 Rebeka uvua nsongakaji muimpe, wengelela. Kavua muanji kumanyangana ne balume. Upueka ku tshiina, kusunaye mayi mulondu tente. Mu dipingana diende," 
Genesis24:17 muena mudimu wa Abrahame kuya lubilu kumpala kuende, umulomba ne: — Bu wewe musue, mpeshaku mayi a kunua." 
Genesis24:18 Nsongakaji kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, nuaku. Kumuinyikilaye lukasa mulondu mu diboku. Muena mudimu kunua." 
Genesis24:19 Ujikija kunua, nsongakaji kumuambila kabidi ne: — Ndi nya kusuna makuabu bua kunuisha tumelu tuebe tuonsu." 
Genesis24:20 Nsongakaji kupongolola lukasa mayi avua mashale mu mulondu mu luuvu. Kuyaye lubilu kusuna mayi makuabu, kuanuisha tumelu tuonsu." 
Genesis24:21 Muena mudimu uvua anu mupuwe umukenketa, udiebeja ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmungendeshe diakalenga anyi?”" 
Genesis24:22 Nsongakaji mumane kunuisha tumelu tuonsu mayi, muena mudimu kumupa kakanu ka mpawungi kikale ne bujitu bu bua gramme isambombu. Kumupa kabidi bikanu bibidi bia ku maboku, tshikanu tshionsu tshivua ne bujitu bupite pa gramme lukama." 
Genesis24:23 Pashishe kukonkaye nsongakaji ne: — Ungambile: udi muana wa nganyi? Tudi mua kupeta muaba wa kulala ku mbelu kuenu ne batudi nabu anyi? 
Genesis24:24 Nsongakaji kumuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi muana wa Betuyele, kabidi muikulu wa Nahore ne Milka." 
Genesis24:25 Nsongakaji kumuambila kabidi ne: — Kumbelu kuetu kudi muaba wa nuenu kulala, kudi kabidi bisosa bivule bia kuladika nyama ne bia kuyidisha." 
Genesis24:26 Muena mudimu kuela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, mutue binu panshi," 
Genesis24:27 wamba ne: — Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa mfumuanyi Abrahame, tuasakidila, bualu wakumbaji bionsu bivuaye mulaye mfumuanyi Abrahame. Maweja-Nangila mmungendeshe diakalenga mu njila mujima, mumfikishe anu mu diku dia mfumu wanyi Abrahame." 
Genesis24:28 Nsongakaji uya lubilu kumbelu kuabu, kulondelaye mamuende malu awu onsu." 
Genesis24:29 Kadi Rebeka uvua ne muanabu wa balume, dina diende Labane. Labane kuya lukasa bua kusambakena ne muntu uvua ku tshiina tshia mayi." 
Genesis24:30 Uvua mumone kakanu ne bikanu bivua ku maboku a muanabu wa bakaji, mumvue kabidi nuwuaye ulonda bivua muena mudimu awu mumuambile. Nanku kusanganaye muntu awu ne tumelu tuende ku tshiina tshia mayi." 
Genesis24:31 Labane kuambila muena mudimu wa Abrahame ne: — Luaku, tuye pambelu, lekela kuimana apa. Ndi mumane kukulongoluela muaba wa kulala ne wa kuladika tumelu tuebe. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kukuendesha diakalenga." 
Genesis24:32 Kuyabu ne muena mudimu wa Abrahame pambelu. Bafika, kutululabu bintu bionsu bivua tumelu tuambule. Kutulabu kabidi bisosa ne mashinda bua kutudisha. Kutuadilabu muena mudimu, ne bantu bavuaye nabu, mayi a kuowa ku makasa." 
Genesis24:33 Kumupeshabu kabidi ne biakudia. Kadi kuandamunaye ne: — Kumpala kua meme kudia, nganji kunuambila bualu bundi muende nabu. Labane kumuandamuna ne: — Ambaku, tudi bakupa matshi." 
Genesis24:34 Yeye kubambila ne: — Meme ndi muena mudimu wa Abrahame. 
Genesis24:35 Mfumuanyi Abrahame mmupete diakalenga. Maweja-Nangila mmumunemeshe ne bintu bia bungi: ke mikoku, ngombe, mbuji, tumelu, mpunde, biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, biamu bia mpawungi, ne bapika balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis24:36 Sara, mukaji wa mfumuanyi Abrahame, mmumulelele muana wa balume wa ku bukunda. Bubanji buonsu bua mfumuanyi Abrahame budi anu mu dina dia muanende awu." 
Genesis24:37 Mfumuanyi Abrahame uvua mungambile bua meme kuditshipa, yeye muteleje, bua tshikebedi muanende Izake mukaji wa mu ditunga dia Kenaane, muaba udi mfumuanyi musombe." 
Genesis24:38 Ke padi mfumuanyi muntume bua kuselela Izake mukaji anu wa mu tshisamba tshia mfumuanyi, ne wa mu diku diabu mene." 
Genesis24:39 Ngunwua nanku, meme kumukonka ne: “Kadi pikala nsongakaji awu mubenge bua tuetu kuya nende, ndi mua kuenza tshinyi?”" 
Genesis24:40 Mfumuanyi Abrahame kungandamuna ne: “Maweja-Nangila undi mvuluka matuku onsu, neakuendeshe diakalenga. Mutumibue wende neakulombole. Neakuleje nsongakaji wa mu tshisamba tshietu, mu diku dia tatu wanyi, uudi mua kuselela muananyi." 
Genesis24:41 Kadi pikala bena dianyi babenga, diditshipa diebe kadiena dikuenzela bualu to, bualu diba adi kadiena dikukuata kabidi to.”" 
Genesis24:42 Lelu mfika ku tshiina tshia mayi, meme kutendelela ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa mfumuanyi Abrahame, ndi nkusengelela ne: ungendeshe diakalenga mu luendu elu." 
Genesis24:43 Mpindiewu ndi muimane ku mpokolu wa mayi. Muana wa bakaji yonsu wafika bua kusuna mayi, pangamulomba ne: ‘Umpeshe mayi a kunua’," 
Genesis24:44 pikalaye muitabe bua kumpesha mayi a meme kunua, ne bua kunuisha tumelu tuanyi, nemmanye ne: yeye ke udi Maweja-Nangila musunguile Izake.”" 
Genesis24:45 Tshiyi muanji kujikija ditendelela dianyi, Rebeka kufika muambuile mulondu wa mayi pa makaya, uya ku mpokolu. Yeye mumane kusuna mayi, meme kumulomba ne: “Bu wewe musue, mpeshaku mayi a kunua.”" 
Genesis24:46 Nsongakaji kumusha mulondu lukasa pa makaya, ungamba ne: “Nuaku. Pawajikija, nennuishe tumelu tuebe kabidi.” Nanku meme kunua mayi. Kunuishaye ne tumelu tuanyi." 
Genesis24:47 Pashishe meme kumukonka ne: “Wewe udi muana wa nganyi?” Yeye kungandamuna ne: “Ndi muana wa Betuyele, ne kabidi muikulu wa Nahore ne Milka.” Ngunwua nanku, meme kumupesha bikanu bia ku maboku, kumuela ne kakanu ku diulu." 
Genesis24:48 Meme kutua binu panshi bua kuela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa mfumuanyi Abrahame, tuasakidila. Bualu uvua mungendeshe diakalenga, tshiyi mupete njiwu. Mmumfikishe ne mu diku dia mfumuanyi. Nanku ndi mua kuya ne nsongakaji ewu kudi muana wa mfumuanyi." 
Genesis24:49 Mpindiewu panuikala bitabe bua kukumbaja dijinga dia mfumuanyi, nansha panuikala babenge, nungambile patoke bua mmone tshindi mua kuenza." 
Genesis24:50 Labane ne Betuyele kumuandamuna ne: — Bualu ebu mbulongolola kudi Maweja-Nangila nkayende. Tuetu katuena ne diyi dia kuamba. 
Genesis24:51 Ke Rebeka awu mukutangile. Ndayi nende bua ikale mukaji wa Izake, muana wa mfumuebe, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila mulongolole." 
Genesis24:52 Muena mudimu wa Abrahame umvua nanku, kutuaye binu panshi, utendelela Maweja-Nangila, umuela tuasakidila." 
Genesis24:53 Pashishe kukangulaye bibuta biende, kupatulaye bilengejelu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bia mpawungi, kabidi ne bilamba. Kubipeshaye Rebeka. Kufilaye bintu bia mushinga mukole kudi Labane, ne kudi mamuende wa Rebeka." 
Genesis24:54 Pashishe muena mudimu wa Abrahame ne bonsu bavuaye muende nabu, kudiabu, kunuabu, kulalabu. Butshia dinda kubalayaye ne: “Nkadi mpingana kudi mfumuanyi.”" 
Genesis24:55 Mamuende wa Rebeka, ne muanabu ne Rebeka, kuandamunabu ne: — Nsongakaji anji ashale kabidi matuku dikumi. Nenushishe kuya nende." 
Genesis24:56 Muena mudimu wa Abrahame kubandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmumane kungendesha diakalenga. Kanuena mua kumpitshishila diba to. Mpeshayi mukaji, mpingane kua mfumuanyi." 
Genesis24:57 Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Nanku tubikile nsongakaji, atuambile tshidi ku muoyi wende." 
Genesis24:58 Nsongakaji ufika, kumukonkabu ne: — Udi musue kuya ne udi mukuvuile ewu anyi? Yeye kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, tuyaya amu nende." 
Genesis24:59 Baledi ba Rebeka kuanyisha bua Rebeka ne ndeji wende, uvua mumukoleshe, baye ne muena mudimu wa Abrahame, kabidi ne bonsu bavuaye muende nabu." 
Genesis24:60 Baledi ba Rebeka kumuela lupemba, bamba ne: “Wewe muanetu wa bakaji, Ulele balume, ulele bakaji ba bungi. Ndelanganyi yebe inyenge bimenga bia bena lukuna bayi!”" 
Genesis24:61 Pashishe Rebeka ne bena mudimu bende kubanda pa tumelu. Kuyabu pamue ne muena mudimu wa Abrahame. 
Genesis24:62 Izake uvua musombe mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga dia Kenaane. Uvua mumane kumuka ku tshiina tshia mayi tshia Lahayi-Royi. 
Genesis24:63 Dimue dituku dilolu uvua muye kuendakana mu mpata. Ukenzakana, kumonaye tumelu tuye kudiye." 
Genesis24:64 Rebeka kumona Izake, kutuluka pa kamelu." 
Genesis24:65 Kukonkaye muena mudimu wa Abrahame ne: — Muntu udi mutuvuile mu mpata bua kutuakidila nnganyi? Muena mudimu kuandamuna ne: — Ke Izake mfumuanyi. Rebeka kudibuikila tshilamba ku mesu. 
Genesis24:66 Muena mudimu wa Abrahame kulondela Izake bionsu bivuaye muenze mu luendu. 
Genesis24:67 Izake kuangata Rebeka, kuya nende ku ntenta wa mamuende Sara. Rebeka kushala muena kuende. Izake kumunanga bikole. Dibungama divuaye nadi bua lufu lua mamuende Sara kujikadi." 
Genesis25:1 Abrahame kusela mukaji mukuabu, dina diende Ketura." 
Genesis25:2 Mukaji awu kumulelela bana basambombu: Zimrane, Yokshane, Medane, Madiyane, Ishebake ne Shuwa." 
Genesis25:3 Yokshane ke tatuende wa Saba ne wa Dedane. Ndelanganyi ya Dedane ivua nunku: Bena Ashure, bena Letushe, ne bena Leyume." 
Genesis25:4 Madiyane uvua mulele bana ba balume batanu: Efa, Efere, Anoke, Abida ne Elda. Bana aba ke ndelanganyi yonsu ya Ketura." 
Genesis25:5 Abrahame kupesha Izake bia bumpianyi bionsu bivuaye nabi. 
Genesis25:6 Patshivuaye ne muoyi, kupeshaye bana bavuaye mulele ne bakaji bakuabu, biabu bintu bia bumpianyi. Kadi kubumushaye mu ditunga divua Izake. Kubatumaye mu ditunga dia ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Genesis25:7 Abrahame mumane kukulakaja, mukumbaje bidimu lukama makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu," 
Genesis25:8 kutuilaye mu diakalenga, kulonda bankambua bende." 
Genesis25:9 Bana bende Izake ne Ismayele kumujika mu lubuebue lua Makpela luvua pabuipi ne Mambre, mu budimi bua Efrone, muana wa Sohare, muena Iti." 
Genesis25:10 Ke budimi buvua Abrahame musumbe kudi bena Iti. Ke mu wabu bamujike pabuipi ne muena kuende Sara. 
Genesis25:11 Abrahame mumane kufua, Izake kuya kusomba pabuipi ne tshiina tshia mayi tshia Lahayi-Royi. Mvidi Mukulu kumuela lupemba mu malu onsu." 
Genesis25:12 Eyi ke ndelanganyi ya Ismayele, muana wa Abrahame, uvuaye mulele ne Agare, muena Ejipitu, uvua ukuatshila Sara mudimu." 
Genesis25:13 Muanabute uvua Nebayote, balonda kudi Kedare, bamutua mu nyima kudi Adbeyele ne Mibsame," 
Genesis25:14 Mishema, Duma, Masa," 
Genesis25:15 Adade, Tema, Yeture, Nafishe, uvua mushile Kedma dibela." 
Genesis25:16 Ke muvua mena a bana ba balume dikumi ne babidi ba Ismayele nanku. Bobu aba ke bankambua ba bisamba. Bantu binyikile misoku ne miaba ya kusomba mu mitanda mena abu. 
Genesis25:17 Ismayele mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete, kulondaye bankambua bende mu lufu." 
Genesis25:18 Ndelanganyi ya Ismayele ivua miase pankatshi pa Avila ne Shure. Shure udi pabuipi ne Ejipitu, mu njila wa ku Ashure. Ndelanganyi ayi kayivua misombe muaba umue ne ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Abrahame to." 
Genesis25:19 Malu a Izake, muana wa Abrahame, adi nunku:" 
Genesis25:20 Izake mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi anayi, kuselaye Rebeka, muana wa Betuyele, muena Arame, mufumine ku tshitupa tshia Mezopotamiya tshia ku mutu kua misulu. Rebeka uvua ne muanabu wa balume, dina diende Labane." 
Genesis25:21 Kadi bu muvua Rebeka muikale nkumba, Izake kutendelela Maweja-Nangila bua mukajende awu alele muana. Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba adi. Rebeka kuimita difu dia bana ba mapasa." 
Genesis25:22 Bana abu bavua baluangana bikole munda mua mamuabu. Rebeka kudiebeja ne: — Malu a mushindu ewu adi angenzekela, meme ne difu, bua tshinyi? Pashishe kuyaye kuebeja Maweja-Nangila." 
Genesis25:23 Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: Bisamba bia bantu bibidi bidi munda muebe, neulele bisamba bibidi bishilangane. Kadi tshisamba tshimue netshipite tshikuabu ku bukole. Muanabute neikale mupika wa muakunyende." 
Genesis25:24 Diba dia kulela dikumbana, kamuvua kabidi mpata to. Rebeka kulela bana ba mapasa babidi ba balume." 
Genesis25:25 Mbuyi uvua mukunze, muikale ne boya pambidi, buenza bu tshinkutu. Kumuinyikabu ne: Esawu." 
Genesis25:26 Kadi Kabanga kulua, mukuate muanabu Esawu ku tshikankanya. Kumuinyikabu ne: Yakobe. Diba divuabu balele bana abu, Izake uvua ne bidimu makumi asambombu." 
Genesis25:27 Bana ba mapasa abu kukola. Esawu uvua tshilembi wa kalanda-musenga, musue kukeba nyama mu tshisuku. Kadi Yakobe uvua muntu wa lutulu, musue kulama ku mbelu." 
Genesis25:28 Izake uvua mutambe kunanga Esawu, bualu uvua munange bikole munyinyi wa nyama ya mu tshisuku. Kadi Rebeka uvua mupite kunemenena anu kudi Yakobe." 
Genesis25:29 Dituku dikuabu, Esawu ufuma ku dipata nyama mu tshisuku, mupungile ne nzala, kusanganaye Yakobe mulamba nsupu wa nkunde." 
Genesis25:30 Esawu kumulomba ne: — Mpeshaku nsupu wa nkunde mukunze uudi mulamba, ndia, bualu mukana mmungume. (Ke padibu babikila Esawu ne: Edome, mmomumue ne: mukunzubile.)" 
Genesis25:31 Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Bua meme kukupesha nsupu wa nkunde ewu, bangabanga unsumbishe bumuanabute buebe." 
Genesis25:32 Esawu kuandamuna ne: — Bumuanabute kabuena bungambuluisha kabidi to. Nzala idi mua kunshipa. 
Genesis25:33 Yakobe kuandamuna Esawu ne: — Nanku anji kuditshipa ne: Ndi mpesha Yakobe bumuanabute buanyi. Esawu kuditshipa, kusumbisha bumuanabute buende kudi muakunyende." 
Genesis25:34 Pashishe Yakobe kupesha mukuluende mampa ne nsupu ya nkunde. Esawu kudia, kunua, kutungunuka ne luendu. Ke muvua Esawu kayi muangate bumuanabute buende abu ne mushinga nansha." 
Genesis26:1 Tshiyole tshikuabu tshia nzala kupatuka mu ditunga, tshishilangane ne tshia kumpala tshia mu tshikondu tshia Abrahame. Izake kuya mu Ngerare kua Abimeleke, mukalenga wa bena Peleshete." 
Genesis26:2 Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela Izake, umukandika ne: — Dikasa diebe kadidiatshi mu Ejipitu to. Kadi usombe anu mu ditunga edi dindi nkuleja." 
Genesis26:3 Pawasomba mu ditunga edi, meme nengikale nebe, nkuela lupemba. Ditunga dijima edi nedishale diebe ne dia ndelanganyi yebe. Ke mundi nkumbaja bionsu bimvua mulaye tatuebe Abrahame." 
Genesis26:4 Meme nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe bu mitotu ya kulu. Nempeshe ndelanganyi yebe ditunga dionsu edi. Kabidi mu dina dia ndelanganyi yebe, nengele bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba lupemba." 
Genesis26:5 Bualu Abrahame uvua muitabe diyi dianyi, mukumbaje miaku ne mikenji bimvua mumuambile." 
Genesis26:6 Izake kusomba mu Ngerare. 
Genesis26:7 Bena ditunga kumona ne Rebeka uvua ne mpala muimpe. Kukonkabu Izake bua kujadika ne: Rebeka udi ku dibaka anyi mmudisombele. Bu muvua Izake utshina ne: bena ditunga badi mua kunshipa, kubadingaye ne: mmuanetu wa bakaji." 
Genesis26:8 Izake mumane kushala mu ditunga adi matuku a bungi, dituku dikuabu Abimeleke, mukalenga wa bena Peleshete, uvua mutangile pa dididishi. Kumonaye Izake banaya ne mukajende Rebeka." 
Genesis26:9 Abimeleke kubikidisha Izake, kumukonka ne: — Wewe mumanye bimpe ne: Rebeka mmukajanyi, uvua unshima ne: mmuanetu wa bakaji, bua tshinyi? Izake kuandamuna mukalenga Abimeleke ne: — Mvua ntshina ne: meme muambe ne: Rebeka mmukajanyi, badi mua kunshipa." 
Genesis26:10 Abimeleke kuandamuna Izake ne: — Tshiudi mutuenzele nunku ntshinyi? Kadi bu muntu wa mu ditunga dietu emu muangate mukajebe, uvua mua kutubueja mu tshilumbu tshikole." 
Genesis26:11 Mukalenga Abimeleke kuelela bantu bende mukenji ne: — Muntu mukengeshe Izake nansha mukajende, neapete dinyoka dia lufu." 
Genesis26:12 Tshidimu atshi, Izake kukuna biakudia mu ditunga adi. Maweja-Nangila kumusankisha. Izake kupeta bintu bipite bungi. Pa tshintu tshimue tshivuaye mukune, kupetaye lukama." 
Genesis26:13 Izake kushala mubanji," 
Genesis26:14 kumuna bimuna, ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji. Uvua kabidi ne bena mudimu ba bungi. Bua bungi bua bintu biende, bena Peleshete kumvuila Izake lubabu." 
Genesis26:15 Kujibikilabu ne buloba biina bia mayi bionsu, bivua bena mudimu ba tatuende Abrahame bumbule, patshivua Abrahame ne muoyi." 
Genesis26:16 Ke Abimeleke kuipata Izake wamba ne: — Umuke mu ditunga dietu, bualu udi mutupite makanda." 
Genesis26:17 Izake kuya kusomba mu tshibandabanda tshia Ngerare. 
Genesis26:18 Izake kumbulula kabidi biina bia mayi, bivua tatuende Abrahame mumbule, patshivuaye ne muoyi, bivuabu bajibikile kudi bena Peleshete kunyima kua lufu luende. Izake kubinyika mena abi a kale, avua Abrahame mubinyike." 
Genesis26:19 Dimue dituku, bena mudimu ba Izake kumbula tshiina mu tshibandabanda. Kupetabu mayi a mpokolu." 
Genesis26:20 Balami ba mikoku ba mu Ngerare, kubunda balami ba mikoku ba Izake, bamba ne: — Mpokolu wa mayi ewu nguetu. Izake kuinyika mpokolu ewu dina ne: “Matandu” (Esheke), bualu bavua bamukeba matandu." 
Genesis26:21 Bena mudimu ba Izake kumbula tshiina tshikuabu. Matandu kujuka kabidi bua tshiina atshi. Izake kutshinyika dina ne: “Lukuna” (Sitna). 
Genesis26:22 Kumukaye muaba awu. Kumbulaye tshiina tshia mayi tshisatu muaba mukuabu. Kadi kabena batandangana kabidi bua tshiina atshi to. Izake kutshinyika dina ne: “Ditanta” (Rehobote). Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila wanyishi bua tutante, tuwlangane mu ditunga emu.”" 
Genesis26:23 Izake kumuka kabidi muaba awu, kuya ku Bersheba." 
Genesis26:24 Butuku abu Maweja-Nangila kumumuenekela, umuambila ne: — Kutshinyi! Ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tatuebe Abrahame. Ndi nebe. Nenkuele lupemba. Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe, bualu mvua munange muntu wanyi Abrahame." 
Genesis26:25 Izake kuenza tshilambuilu, kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, utela dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kuibakaye ntenta yende. Bena mudimu bende kumbula tshiina tshia mayi tshikuabu." 
Genesis26:26 Abimeleke kuangata mulunda wende Ahuzate ne Pikole, mulombodi wa bena mvita bende. Kumukabu mu Ngerare bua kuya kumonangana ne Izake." 
Genesis26:27 Izake kubakonka ne: — Nuenu nuvua bambenge, bangipate mu ditunga dienu. Nudi bandonde kabidi muaba ewu bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis26:28 Abimeleke ne bavuaye nabu kuandamuna ne: — Tudi tukulonda bualu tudi bajadika ne: Maweja-Nangila udi nebe. Ke patuedi meji ne: mbimpe tumvuangane nebe, tutue ndondu." 
Genesis26:29 Tudi tukusengelela ne: uditshipe bua kutuenzedi bibi nansha. Tuetu kabidi katuvua bakukengeshe to. Tuvua bakuenzele bimpe. Wewe kumuka mu ditunga dietu ne ditalala. Mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila mmukututshishe dikasa dimpe. 
Genesis26:30 Izake kubalongoluela biakudia. Kudiabu, kunuabu." 
Genesis26:31 Butshia dinda, kuditshipabu ku muntu ku muntu. Izake kulayangana nabu, kakuyi kadiwu." 
Genesis26:32 Anu dituku adi, bena mudimu ba Izake kumuambila ne: — Tudi bumbula tshiina tshipiatshipia, tuapetshi mayi." 
Genesis26:33 Izake kuinyika tshiina atshi dina ne: “Mutshipu.” Ke padibu babikila tshimenga atshi too ne ku lelu ne: Bersheba. Mmumue ne: tshina tshidi muaba utudi baditshipila. 
Genesis26:34 Esawu mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi anayi, kuselaye bakaji babidi: Yehudite, muana wa Beri, muena Iti, ne Basmate, muana wa Elone, muena Iti kabidi." 
Genesis26:35 Bakaji aba kukengesha Izake ne Rebeka bikole. 
Genesis27:1 Izake mumane kukola mukalakaje, mesu ende kaavua amona kabidi bimpe to. Kubikilaye Esawu muanende muanabute ne: — Muananyi! Esawu kuitaba ne: — Ke meme ewu, tatu!" 
Genesis27:2 Izake kumuambila ne: — Udi mumone ne: nkadi mununu, nkadi mikolu ku tshiina. Tshiena mumanye dituku dia lufu luanyi." 
Genesis27:3 Angata bintu biebe bia bulembi, buta ne miketa. Uye mu dikeba, unshipele nyama." 
Genesis27:4 Undambile nyama mushindu undi munange. Umpeshe bua meme kudia. Pashishe nenkuele lupemba, tshiyi muanji kukushiya." 
Genesis27:5 Rebeka uvua muteleje muvua Izake uyukila ne muanende Esawu amu. Esawu mumane kuya mu tshisuku bua kukebela tatuende nyama," 
Genesis27:6 Rebeka kuambila muanende Yakobe ne: — Ngumvu tatuebe wambila Esawu ne: 
Genesis27:7 “Uye mu dikeba, unshipele nyama. Undambile mushindu undi munange. Umpeshe bua meme kudia. Pashishe nenkuele lupemba kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, tshiyi muanji kunushiya.”" 
Genesis27:8 Nanku muananyi, teleja tshindi nkuambila, utshienze." 
Genesis27:9 Ntuadile mbuji ibidi mimpe ya nkungulu, bua ndambile tatuebe munyinyi mushindu udiye musue." 
Genesis27:10 Umupeshe munyinyi awu. Padiaye, neakuele lupemba, kayi muanji kutushiya." 
Genesis27:11 Yakobe kuandamuna mamuende Rebeka ne: — Esawu udi ne miosa ya bungi pambidi. Kadi meme tshiena nayi to. 
Genesis27:12 Misangu mikuabu tatu udi mua kumbabata pambidi, kunsangana ne: ndi muena dishima. Udi mua kungela mulawu pa mutu pa kungela lupemba." 
Genesis27:13 Mamuende Rebeka kumuandamuna ne: — Muananyi, mulawu awu unkuate meme. Wewe enza anu tshindi mukuambile. Ntuadile mbuji ibidi mimpe ya nkungulu." 
Genesis27:14 Yakobe kutuadila mamuende mbuji ayi. Rebeka kulambila Izake tshiakudia tshimpe tshivuaye musue. 
Genesis27:15 Rebeka kuangata kabidi bilamba bia Esawu muanabute bivua mu nzubu, kubivuadika Yakobe, muana muakunyi." 
Genesis27:16 Kumusuikaye kabidi biseba bia nkungulu ya mbuji abi pa maboku ne pa dikoshi. 
Genesis27:17 Pashishe Rebeka kupesha Yakobe mampa ne munyinyi uvuaye mulambe. 
Genesis27:18 Yakobe ufika ne biakudia abi kudi tatuende Izake, kumuamba ne: — Tatu. Awu pende kuitaba ne: — Eyowa! Kadi wewe udi nganyi? Udimanyishe!" 
Genesis27:19 Yakobe kuandamuna tatuende ne: — Ndi muanebe muanabute. Mbakumbaji tshiuvua mundombe. Ndi nkusengelela ne: juka, sombela apa. Udie munyinyi undi mukulambile. Ungele lupemba." 
Genesis27:20 Izake kumukonka ne: — Muananyi, wapetshi bimvua mukulombe anu lukasa lukasa nanku mushindu kayi? Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe uvua muntutshishe dikasa dimpe mu njila." 
Genesis27:21 Izake kumukonka ne: — Udi Esawu muanabute wanyi menemene anyi? Ndi nkusengelela ne: usemene apa, nkubabate." 
Genesis27:22 Yakobe kusemena kudi tatuende Izake. Awu kubabata muanende, wamba ne: — Diyi ndimvuika bu dia Yakobe. Kadi bianza mbia Esawu." 
Genesis27:23 Izake kavua mua kujingulula kabidi Yakobe bimpe to, bualu maboku ende avua ne miosa bu a Esawu. Kadi Izake kayi muanji kuela Yakobe lupemba," 
Genesis27:24 kumukonkaye tshiakabidi ne: — Wewe udi Esawu muanabute wanyi menemene anyi? Yakobe kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mmeme." 
Genesis27:25 Nanku Izake kuambila Yakobe ne: — Mpesha biakudia, ndia, nkuela lupemba. Yakobe kumupesha biakudia, kudiaye. Kumupesha kabidi ne maluvu kunuaye." 
Genesis27:26 Ke Izake kuambila Yakobe ne: — Muananyi, semena apa, ungupukile!" 
Genesis27:27 Yakobe kupukila tatuende Izake. Izake, umvua mupuya wa bilamba bia muanende, kumuelaye lupemba, wamba ne “Mupuya wa muananyi wa balume, mmufuanangane ne mupuya wa budimi budi Maweja-Nangila mujingile diakalenga." 
Genesis27:28 Mvidi Mukulu akulokeshile dibungi dia mu diulu, akupeshe biakudia bia bungi mu madimi. Akupeshe ntete ya kuenza bukula ne maluvu bivule." 
Genesis27:29 Bisamba bia bantu bikukuatshile mudimu. Bantu bonsu bakukukuile. Wikale mfumu wa bana benu, bana benu ba mamuebe bakukukuile. Muntu udi ukuela lupemba, nebamuele lupemba. Muntu udi ukukebela diakabi, neikale muena diakabi.”" 
Genesis27:30 Izake wela Yakobe lupemba kujika. Anu Yakobe ulayangana ne tatuende, mukuluende Esawu ufika ufumina mu tshisuku ku dikebela tatuende nyama." 
Genesis27:31 Esawu kulambila tatuende biakudia, kumutuadila, wamba ne: — Tatu, ndi nkusengelela ne: juka, somba, udie munyinyi undi mukulambile, bua ungele lupemba." 
Genesis27:32 Izake kumuebeja ne: — Udi nganyi? Wadimanyisha! Esawu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi Esawu, muanebe muanabute." 
Genesis27:33 Izake mukana kumukuata kapia, kukonkaye ne: — Uvua muntuadile munyinyi wa nyama wa mu bulembi, wewe kuyi muanji kufika nnganyi? Ndi mumane kudia bivuaye mundambile. Mbamuedi lupemba. Neashale nalu kashidi." 
Genesis27:34 Esawu umvua bivua tatuende wakula abi, kudilaye muadi mukole ne kanyinganyinga, wamba ne: — Tatu, ungele panyi lupemba." 
Genesis27:35 Izake kuambila Esawu ne: — Muakunyebe Yakobe mmufike kundi ne budimu bua bungi. Mbamujingidi diakalenga divua diebe wewe. 
Genesis27:36 Esawu kuandamuna ne: — Dina dia Yakobe ndimukumbane: “Bualu mmundimukile be,” mmundinge misangu ibidi. Musangu wa kumpala uvua mundinge. Kuangataye ku bukole bumuanabute buanyi. Lelu wandingi kabidi, wanyengi lupemba luwabu ne bua kungela meme. Kadi Esawu kukonka tatuende ne: — Kuena mua kungela panyi lupemba nansha lukese anyi?" 
Genesis27:37 Izake kuandamuna Esawu ne: — Yakobe mmumane kushala mfumuebe. Bana benu bonsu nebikale bapika bende. Kabidi nkadi mumane kumupesha ntete ya kuenza bukula ne ya maluvu. Tshiena ne tshindi mua kukuenzela kabidi mpindiewu, muananyi." 
Genesis27:38 Esawu ukonka amu kukonka tatuende ne: — Udi mua kuela amu muntu umue lupemba anyi? Tatu wanyi, ungele ne meme panyi! Esawu uvua udila amu kudila." 
Genesis27:39 Nanku Izake kumuambila ne: “Wewe kuakusomba mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, nansha mu buloba budi dibungi dipite kubolesha." 
Genesis27:40 Neupete biakudia, amu wewe muluangana mvita, newikale mupika wa muakunyebe Yakobe. Kadi neudipikule amu nkayebe. Neutshibule mutshi wa mujuwu, uvuaye mukuambuishe ku bukole, neuwumushe pa nshingu. ”" 
Genesis27:41 Esawu kufika munda bikole bua lupemba luvua Yakobe mumunyenge. Kuambaye ne: “Tatu mumane kufua, tuetu batangalaje madilu ende, nenshipe muakunyanyi Yakobe.”" 
Genesis27:42 Rebeka mumane kumvua meji avua Esawu nawu, kubikilaye Yakobe, umuambila ne: — Udimuke, mukuluebe Esawu mmukuelele meji a kukushipa bua kujikija tshiji tshiende." 
Genesis27:43 Nanku mpindiewu muananyi, itaba tshindi nkuambila. Umuke munu, uye kusomba mu Arane kua muanetu Labane." 
Genesis27:44 Ushaleku too ne pajika tshiji tshia mukuluebe Esawu. 
Genesis27:45 Pikala Esawu katshiyi uvuluka kabidi biuvua mumuenzele, nenkutumine muntu bua upingane muetu munu. Tshiena musue kunujimija bonsu babidi dituku dimue to." 
Genesis27:46 Ke Rebeka kuambila Izake ne: — Panu mpantonde, bualu bua bakaji ba bena Iti, badi muananyi Esawu musele. Kadi bu Yakobe mua kusela kabidi mukaji wa bena Iti, ndi mua kufua." 
Genesis28:1 Izake kubikila Yakobe, kulayangana nende, umuambila ne: — Kuena mua kusela mukaji wa bena Kenaane to." 
Genesis28:2 Uye ku tshitupa tshia ku mutu kua misulu tshia Mezopotamiya, kumbelu kua kakuebe Betuyele, muledi wa mamuebe. Usele mukaji wa mu ditunga adi, muana wa mansebebe Labane." 
Genesis28:3 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu akuele lupemba mu dibaka diebe. Ulele bana ba bungi, ushale nkambua wa bisamba bivule." 
Genesis28:4 Mvidi Mukulu akuele wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe lupemba, muvuaye muele Abrahame, bua ditunga diudi usomba bu muenyi edi, didi Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe Abrahame, dishale diebe." 
Genesis28:5 Izake kutuma Yakobe ku tshitupa tshia ku mutu kua misulu tshia Mezopotamiya, kua Labane, muana wa Betuyele, muena Arame. Labane uvua muanabu ne Rebeka, mamuende wa Yakobe ne Esawu." 
Genesis28:6 Esawu kumona ne: Izake mmulayangane ne Yakobe, mumutume ku Mezopotamiya bua kusela mukaji, mumukandike bua kasedi mukaji wa bena Kenaane." 
Genesis28:7 Kumonaye kabidi ne: Yakobe mmuitabe diyi dia tatuende ne mamuende, muye ku Mezopotamiya." 
Genesis28:8 Nanku kujadikaye ne: Tatu kena musue bana ba bakaji ba bena Kenaane to. 
Genesis28:9 Ke muvuaye musue kusela Mahalata muana wa Ismayele. Ismayele uvua muana wa Abrahame. Mahalata uvua muanabu ne Nebayote. 
Genesis28:10 Yakobe kumuka ku Bersheba, kuya ku Arane." 
Genesis28:11 Butuku buila, kuangataye dibue divua muaba awu, kudisangika ku mutu bua kulala tulu." 
Genesis28:12 Pawaye mulale, kulotaye tshilota. Kumonaye tshibandilu tshitue mulu tshitue panshi. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bavua babanda bapueka ku tshibandilu atshi." 
Genesis28:13 Kumonaye kabidi Maweja-Nangila muimane kumpala kuende, umuambila ne: — Yakobe, ndi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa kakuebe Abrahame, kabidi Mvidi Mukulu wa Izake. Ndi nkulaya ne: “Nenkupeshe, wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe, buloba buudi mulale ebu. ”" 
Genesis28:14 Ndelanganyi yebe neyivulangane bu lusenga lua pa buloba. Neyimuangalake nseke yonsu inayi ya buloba. Nengele bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba lupemba mu dina diebe ne dia ndelanganyi yebe. 
Genesis28:15 Ndi nebe. Nenkulame muaba onsu uudi uya. Nenkupingaje kabidi mu ditunga edi. Nenkumbaje malu onsu andi mukulaye. Tshiena nkulekela to. 
Genesis28:16 Yakobe utabuluka ku tulu, kukemaye wamba ne: — Bulelela, tshiena mumanye to! Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi muaba ewu!" 
Genesis28:17 Bowa kumuenza. Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Mbimpe kunemeka muaba ewu, bualu ke mudi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne tshibuelelu tshia mu diulu." 
Genesis28:18 Yakobe kubika dinda dionsu, kuimanyika dibue divuaye musangike ku mutu adi, kudifita manyi ku lusongu, bua dikale dia tshijila." 
Genesis28:19 Yakobe kuinyika muaba awu ne: Betele, mmumue ne: Nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. (Muaba awu bavua baubikila ku kale ne: Luze.)" 
Genesis28:20 Yakobe kulaya Maweja-Nangila ne: — Wewe muikale nanyi, mundame bimpe mu luendu luanyi, mumpeshe biakudia ne bia kuvuala," 
Genesis28:21 mumpingaje bimpe kumbelu kuetu, nanku wewe Maweja-Nangila newikale Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Genesis28:22 Dibue dindi muimanyike edi ndia tshijila. Nedikale nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nenkupingajile tshia dikumi tshimue tshia bintu bionsu biudi mumpeshe. 
Genesis29:1 Yakobe kutungunuka ne luendu, kuya ku ditunga dia kudi diba dipatukila." 
Genesis29:2 Mu luendu alu, dituku dikuabu kumonaye tshiina tshia mayi mu mpata, tshibuikila dibue dia bujitu. Mayi awu ke avuabu banuisha mikoku. Bisumbu bia mikoku ne bia mbuji bisatu bivua muaba awu, bikishe." 
Genesis29:3 Bua kunuisha bimuna mayi, balami ba mikoku bavua bumusha dibue adi, basangisha bimuna bionsu muaba umue, babinuisha mayi. Pashishe bavua babuikila dibue adi kabidi ku tshiina." 
Genesis29:4 Yakobe kukonka balami ba mikoku abu ne: — Bana betu, nudi bafume penyi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Tudi bafume ku Arane." 
Genesis29:5 Yakobe kubakonka kabidi ne: — Nudi mua kumanya Labane, muana wa Nahore anyi? Bobu kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, tudi bamumanye." 
Genesis29:6 Yakobe kubakonka kabidi ne: — Labane udi bimpe anyi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Ee, udi bimpe. Pashishe kuambilabu Yakobe ne: — Tangila udi uvua ne bimuna wawa, ke muanende wa bakaji Rakele." 
Genesis29:7 Yakobe kubambila kabidi ne: — Diba ditshidiku! Dia kusangisha bimuna muaba umue kadiena dianji kukumbana. Nuishayi bimuna mayi. Nuye kubidisha kabidi mu mpata. 
Genesis29:8 Balami ba mikoku kuandamuna ne: — Katuena mua kunuisha bimuna mayi mpindiewu to, anu patuabisangisha bionsu muaba umue. Diba adi nebumushe dibue didi dibuikila ku tshiina tshia mayi bua kubinuisha." 
Genesis29:9 Patshivua Yakobe uyukila ne balami ba mikoku, Rakele kufika ne bimuna bia tatuende Labane, bualu uvua mulami wabi." 
Genesis29:10 Yakobe umona Rakele, muana wa mansebende Labane, ufika ne bimuna, kumushaye dibue divua dibuikila ku tshiina tshia mayi, kunuisha bimuna mayi." 
Genesis29:11 Pashishe Yakobe kupukila Rakele ne disanka, udila muadi, umuambila ne:" 
Genesis29:12 “Ndi mulele webe. Ndi muana wa Rebeka, muanabu ne tatuebe.” Rakele kunyema lubilu bua kuambila tatuende Labane." 
Genesis29:13 Labane mumane kumvua lumu lua difika dia Yakobe, muana wa muanabu wa bakaji, kuyaye lubilu bua kumuakidila. Kumupukilaye, kuya nende ku mbelu. Yakobe kulondela mansebende Labane bionsu bivua bimuenzekele abi." 
Genesis29:14 Labane kuambila Yakobe ne: — Wewe udi mulele wanyi, tudi mufu umue. Yakobe kusomba ku mbelu aku ngondu mujima." 
Genesis29:15 Dimue dituku Labane kuambila Yakobe ne: — Udi mulele wanyi. Kadi kuena mua kungenzela mudimu, kuyi upeta difutu nansha. Ungambile tshiudi musue bua meme kukufuta?" 
Genesis29:16 Labane uvua ne bana ba bakaji babidi. Muanabute uvua Leya, muakunyi uvua Rakele." 
Genesis29:17 Leya uvua ne mesu bulengu, kadi Rakele uvua ne mpala muimpe, wengelela." 
Genesis29:18 Yakobe uvua munange Rakele. Kuambilaye mansebende Labane ne: — Ndi musue kukuenzela mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete, bua meme kusela Rakele muanebe wa mukala." 
Genesis29:19 Labane kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Kabena mua kusela Rakele kudi mulume mukuabu to. Umusele amu wewe. Tusombe nebe muaba umue. 
Genesis29:20 Yakobe kuenzela Labane mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete bua kusela Rakele. Yakobe uvua ubala bidimu abi anu bu matuku makese, bualu uvua mupite kunanga Rakele." 
Genesis29:21 Pashishe Yakobe kuambila Labane ne: — Matuku auvua mungambile bua kuangata mukajanyi akumbanyi, munseleshaku!" 
Genesis29:22 Labane kubikidisha bantu bonsu ba muaba awu, kubalongoluela didia dia tshibilu tshia dibaka." 
Genesis29:23 Butuku Labane kufila muanende wa bakaji Leya kudi Yakobe. Yakobe kumubuelela mu nzubu. 
Genesis29:24 Labane kufila kabidi mupika wende Zilpa kudi muanende wa bakaji Leya, bua amuenzele mudimu." 
Genesis29:25 Butshia dinda, Yakobe umona Leya, kukemaye bikole! Kukonkaye mansebende Labane ne: — Udi mungenzele nanku bua tshinyi? Mvua mukuenzele mudimu bua kusela Rakele. Kadi wandingi bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis29:26 Labane kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Katuena ne tshibidilu tshia kuselesha muana wa mukala, kabayi banji kusela mukulu wa bantu." 
Genesis29:27 Nanku anji kushala ne Leya lumingu lujima kaba kamue, nenkupeshe kabidi Rakele, paudi ungenzela kabidi mudimu bidimu bikuabu muanda mutekete." 
Genesis29:28 Yakobe kuitaba, kushala ne Leya kaba kamue lumingu lujima. Pashishe mansebende Labane kumupesha kabidi Rakele, bua ikale mukajende." 
Genesis29:29 Labane kufila Bila mupika wende kudi muanende wa bakaji Rakele, bua amuenzele mudimu." 
Genesis29:30 Yakobe kubuelela Rakele, mu nzubu, kumunanga kupita Leya. Nanku kukuatshilaye kabidi Labane mudimu bidimu muanda mutekete bikuabu." 
Genesis29:31 Maweja-Nangila umona ne: Yakobe mmupite kunanga Rakele, kupeshaye Leya lulelu. Kadi Rakele uvua mushale nkumba." 
Genesis29:32 Leya kuimita difu, kulela muana wa balume. Kuinyikaye muana awu ne: Rubene. Kuambaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua mumone dikenga dianyi Mpindiewu bayanyi neanange." 
Genesis29:33 Leya kuimita difu dikuabu, kulela muana wa balume. Kuinyikaye muana awu dina ne: Shimeyone. Kuambaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmumpeshe kabidi muana ewu, bualu mmumanye ne: bayanyi mmumbenge." 
Genesis29:34 Leya kuimita difu dikuabu, kulela muana wa balume, kuinyika muana awu dina ne: Levi. Kuambaye ne: — Mpindiewu bayanyi neandamate, bualu mbamuleledi bana ba balume basatu." 
Genesis29:35 Leya kuimita difu dikuabu, kulela muana wa balume. Kuinyika muana awu dina dia Yuda. Kuambaye ne: — Mpindiewu nentumbishe Maweja-Nangila. Lulelu lua Leya kukoseka." 
Genesis30:1 Lakele umona ne: tshiena mulele, kumfuila mukenende mukawu. Kuambilaye bayende Yakobe ne: — Undeleshe panyi, bualu ndi mua kufua!" 
Genesis30:2 Yakobe kufikila Rakele munda, umuambila ne: — Meme tshiena Mvidi Mukulu udi mukukandike ne: kuledi to!" 
Genesis30:3 Rakele kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Angata nansha Bila, mupika wanyi ewu, ashale mukajebe, bua alele bana, bikale banyi." 
Genesis30:4 Rakele kufila Bila mupika wende kudi Yakobe, yeye kumuangata." 
Genesis30:5 Bila kuimita difu, kulelela Yakobe muana wa balume." 
Genesis30:6 Rakele kuamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu mmumbingishe. Wateleji dilomba dianyi, wampeshi muana wa balume. Rakele kuinyika muana awu dina ne: Dane." 
Genesis30:7 Bila kuimita difu, kulelela Yakobe muana wa balume mukuabu." 
Genesis30:8 Rakele kuamba ne: — Ndi muluangane mvita mikole ne mukuluanyi wa bakaji. Kadi mbamupitshi bukole. Rakele kuinyika muana awu dina ne: Naftali. 
Genesis30:9 Leya umona ne lulelu luakoseki, kufilaye mupika wende Zilpa kudi Yakobe, bua ashale mukajende." 
Genesis30:10 Zilpa kulelela Yakobe muana wa balume. 
Genesis30:11 Leya kuamba ne: — Ndi ne dikasa dimpe be! Kuinyikaye muana awu dina ne Ngade. 
Genesis30:12 Zilpa mupika wa Leya kulelela Yakobe muana mukuabu wa balume. 
Genesis30:13 Leya kuamba ne: — Ndi muena diakalenga, bualu bakaji nanyi nebambikile ne: mmuena diakalenga. Kuinyikaye muana awu dina ne: Ashere." 
Genesis30:14 Dimue dituku tshikondu tshia kunowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, Rubene kuya mu madimi bua kukebela mamuende Leya bimuma bia mutshi wa dinanga. Kumutuadilaye bimuma abi. Ke Rakele kulomba Leya ne: — Bu wewe musue, mpeshaku bimue bimuma bia mutshi wa dinanga, bidi muanebe mukutuadile." 
Genesis30:15 Leya kuandamuna Rakele ne: — Wewe ukadi muangate bayanyi! Udi musue kuangata kabidi bimuma bia mutshi wa dinanga, bidi muananyi muntuadile bua tshinyi? Rakele kuandamuna ne: — Paudi umpesha bimuma abi, Yakobe neikale nebe butuku bua lelu." 
Genesis30:16 Dilolu Yakobe ufuma ku budimi, Leya kuya kumuakidila, umuambila ne: — Lelu udi umbuelela mu nzubu, bualu nkadi mumane kufuta Rakele bimuma bia mutshi wa dinanga, bivua muananyi muntuadile, bua tuikale nebe butuku ebu. Yakobe kubuelela Leya mu nzubu butuku abu." 
Genesis30:17 Mvidi Mukulu kumvua dilomba dia Leya. Kuimitaye difu, kulela muana wa balume muitanu." 
Genesis30:18 Leya kuamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wamfutshi, bualu mvua mufile mupika wanyi kudi bayanyi, bua ikale mukajende. Leya kuinyika muana awu dina ne: Isakare." 
Genesis30:19 Leya kuimita difu dikuabu, kulela muana muisambombu wa balume." 
Genesis30:20 Leya kuamba ne: — Mpindiewu Mvidi Mukulu mmunsankishe bikole. Bayanyi neannemeke, bualu ndi mumulelele bana ba balume basambombu. Kuinyikaye muana awu dina ne Zebulone." 
Genesis30:21 Pashishe Leya kulela muana wa bakaji, diende Dina." 
Genesis30:22 Mvidi Mukulu kusamba Rakele. Kumvuaye dilomba diende, kumupeshaye buledi bua bana." 
Genesis30:23 Rakele kuimita difu, kulela muana wa balume. Kuambaye ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wangumushi bundu ku mesu." 
Genesis30:24 Kuinyikaye muana awu ne: Yozefe. Kuambaye ne: “Maweja-Nangila ampe kabidi mukuabu muana wa balume. ” 
Genesis30:25 Rakele mumane kulela Yozefe, Yakobe kuambila Labane ne: — Itaba bua mpingane kuetu, mu ditunga dietu." 
Genesis30:26 Ndi nkulomba bua umpeshe bakaji banyi ne bana banyi, bua mpingane nabu kuetu, bualu udi mumanye mundi mumane kukuenzela mudimu bidimu bia bungi bua kubasela." 
Genesis30:27 Labane kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Bu wewe musue, nteleja. Mbandeje munda muanyi ne: Maweja-Nangila mmungele lupemba amu bualu buebe." 
Genesis30:28 Nanku ungambile anu difutu dindi mua kukufuta, nenkufute." 
Genesis30:29 Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Udi mumanye mudimu undi mukuenzele. Ndi mukuvudijile bimuna bimvua mulame. 
Genesis30:30 Pamfikile muaba ewu mvua mukusangane ne bintu bikese. Kadi lelu udi ne bintu bia bungi. Maweja-Nangila mmukusankishe katshia mfika kuebe, bua mudimu onsu undi mukuenzele. Mpindiewu, ndi musue kuenzela bena diku dianyi mudimu." 
Genesis30:31 Labane kumukonka ne: — Udi musue nkufute tshinyi? Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Kuena ne bua kumfuta. Ndi musue kulama ne kudisha bimuna biebe bu mumvua ngenza. Kadi witabe amu tshindi nkulomba etshi. 
Genesis30:32 Lelu nengendakane munkatshi mua bimuna biebe bionsu. Nensungule bana ba mikoku bonsu badi ne matoba, nansha mipolu pambidi, nansha badi ne mubidi mufike, ne bana ba mbuji bonsu badi ne matoba nansha mipolu pambidi, bua bikale difutu dianyi." 
Genesis30:33 Pashishe neujadike ne: ndi muntu muakane, anu pawafika bua kutangila bimuna bingikala muangate bua difutu dianyi. Wewe musangane mbuji udi kayi ne matoba anyi udi kayi ne mipolu pambidi, nansha mukoku udi kauyi mufike, nengikale muivi." 
Genesis30:34 Labane kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Ndi muitabe bionsu biudi muambe ebi. 
Genesis30:35 Anu dituku adi, Labane kuumusha mbuji ya mpumbu yonsu ivua ne mipolu nansha ivua ne matoba pambidi. Kumbushaye kabidi mbuji ya mashina yonsu ivua ne matoba manene ne makese. Pashishe kumushaye mikoku yonsu ivua ne boya bufike. Kupeshaye bana bende bimuna bionsu abi." 
Genesis30:36 Bana ba Labane kumuka nabi muaba uvua Yakobe, kuenda nabi matuku asatu. Kadi Yakobe uvua anu udisha bimuna bia Labane bivua bishale." 
Genesis30:37 Yakobe kukosa matamba mabishi a mitshi mishilangane (ya peupliye, ya amandiye ne ya platane). Kuvulaye bizubu bia matamba awu bibakabibaka." 
Genesis30:38 Kutekaye matamba avuaye muvule bizubu bibakabibaka mu luuvu luvua bimuna binuina mayi. Pavua bimuna binua mayi awu, bimpanga bivua bikuata mashina." 
Genesis30:39 Kadi bu muvua bimpanga bikuata mashina kumpala kua matamba a mitshi, avuaye muvule bizubu bibakabibaka awu, bimuna bionsu bivua bilela bana bikala ne mipolu ne matoba manene ne makese pambidi." 
Genesis30:40 Yakobe uvua umusha mikoku yonsu, uyiteka pa nkayayi. Pashishe uvua uteka mikoku ayi mitangilangane ne ya Labane ivua ne mipolu ne ivua ne boya bufike. Ke muvua Yakobe mupete bimuna bia bungi nanku. Bimuna biende kabivua bibalakana mu bimuna bia Labane to." 
Genesis30:41 Pavua Yakobe umona bimuna bia mashina ne bia bimpanga bivua ne mubidi muimpe bikuatangane, uvua uteka matamba a mutshi avuaye muvule bizubu awu mu luuvu luvua bimuna binuina mayi, bua bimuna bikale bikuatangana kumpala kua matamba a mitshi awu." 
Genesis30:42 Kadi pavuaye umona bimuna bia mashina ne bia bimpanga binyane bikuatangane, Yakobe ka-vua uteka matamba a mitshi awu to. Nanku bimuna binyane bivua bishale bia Labane, bia mubidi muimpe bivua bia Yakobe." 
Genesis30:43 Yakobe kupeta bubanji bua bungi. Uvua ne bapika balume ne bakaji, bimuna bipite bungi, tumelu ne mpunde kabidi." 
Genesis31:1 Yakobe kumvua bana ba Labane bamujana, bamba ne: “Yakobe mmunyenge bubanji buonsu bua tatu. Bintu bionsu bidiye nabi mbifumine anu ku bubanji buonsu bua tatu budiye munyenge.”" 
Genesis31:2 Yakobe kumona kabidi mpala wa Labane mubinduluke, katshiyi bu mu wabu nende diambedi." 
Genesis31:3 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yakobe ne: — Pingana kuenu, mu diku dia baledi bebe. Meme nengikale nebe." 
Genesis31:4 Yakobe kubikidisha Leya ne Rakele mu budimi muvuaye ne bimuna biende. 
Genesis31:5 Kubambilaye ne; — Ndi mumone ne mpala wa tatuenu mmubinduluke. Katshiena bu mutuvua nende diambedi to. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua wanyi uvua nanyi. 
Genesis31:6 Nudi bamanye mundi mukuatshile tatuenu mudimu ne bukole buanyi buonsu. 
Genesis31:7 Tatuenu kunshima, kushintula difutu dianyi misangu dikumi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kavua musue bua tatuenu ankengeshe to." 
Genesis31:8 Pavua tatuenu ungambila ne: “Bimuna bidi ne matoba nebikale difutu diebe,” bimuna bikaji bionsu bivua bilela bana ne matoba pambidi. Pawaye ungambila ne: “Bimuna bidi ne mipolu nebikale difutu diebe,” bimuna bikaji bionsu bivua bilela bana ne mipolu pambidi." 
Genesis31:9 Nanku anu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ngudi munnyengele bimuna kudi tatuenu. 
Genesis31:10 Bualu pavua bimuna bia bimpanga ne bia mashina bikuatangane, mvua ndota tshilota, mmona mbuji nansha mikoku ya bimpanga, bivua bikuata mashina, bikale anu ne matoba, ne mipolu pambidi." 
Genesis31:11 Mu tshilota atshi Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumbikila ne: “Yakobe!” Meme kuitaba ne: “Ke meme ewu.” 
Genesis31:12 Mutumibue awu kungambila ne: “Tangila: mikoku nansha mbuji yonsu ya mpumbu idi ne mipolu ne idi ne matoba idi ikuata mashina. Ndi muenze nanku, bualu ndi mumone malu onsu adi Labane mukuenzele." 
Genesis31:13 Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukumuenekele ku Betele, pauvua mufite manyi pa mutu pa dibue diu-vua muimanyike bua dikale muaba wa tshijila. Muaba awu uvua mudifile kabidi kundi, mundaye bualu bunene. Juka, umuka apa, upingane mu ditunga dienu.”" 
Genesis31:14 Rakele ne Leya kuambila Yakobe ne: — Tuetu katuena kabidi batekemene bintu bia bumpianyi mu nzubu mua tatu to. 
Genesis31:15 Tatu mmutuangate bu bantu benyi, bualu mmutusumbishe, mudie ne biuma bietu." 
Genesis31:16 Nanku bubanji buonsu budi Mvidi Mukulu munyenge tatu, mukupeshe wewe, mbuetu tuetu ne bua bana betu batudi balele. Enza malu onsu adi Mvidi Mukulu mukuambile." 
Genesis31:17 Yakobe kujuka, kubandisha bakaji bende ne bana pa nyama ya tumelu." 
Genesis31:18 Kuangataye bimuna biende ne bintu biende bionsu bivuaye mupete mu tshitupa tshia Mezopotamiya tshia ku mutu kua misulu. Kupinganaye mu ditunga dia Kenaane, muaba uvua tatuende Izake musombe." 
Genesis31:19 Kadi pavua Labane muye kukosa miosa ya mikoku yende, Rakele kuiba mpingu ileja mvidie ivua bena diku dia tatuende Labane batendelela." 
Genesis31:20 Yakobe kunyema mu musokoku, Labane, muena Arame, kayi mumanye to." 
Genesis31:21 Uvua munyeme ne bintu bionsu bivuaye mupete. Kusabukaye lukasa musulu wa Perate. Pashishe kuyaye ku mikuna ya Ngilaade. 
Genesis31:22 Matuku asatu mamane kupita, muntu kampande kumanyisha Labane ne: “Yakobe mmunyeme.”" 
Genesis31:23 Labane kubikila bena diende. Kulondakajabu Yakobe mu njila matuku muanda mutekete. Kumusanganabu ku mikuna ya Ngilaade. 
Genesis31:24 Butuku abu Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela Labane muena Arame mu tshilota, umukandika ne: — Udimuke, kukengeshi Yakobe ku bualu nansha bumue." 
Genesis31:25 Labane kusangana Yakobe mumane kuasa ntenta yende mu mikuna ya Ngilaade. Labane ne bena diende kuasa kabidi yabu mitanda ku mikuna aku. 
Genesis31:26 Labane kukonka Yakobe ne: — Tshiudi mungenzele nunku ntshinyi? Udi mundinge bualu kayi? Bua tshinyi udi munyeme ne bana banyi ba bakaji bu bapika banyenga mu mvita? 
Genesis31:27 Bua tshinyi udi munshime, munyeme mu musokoku, katuyi balayangane nebe. Bu wewe mudianze kungambila, mvua nkushindikija ne misambu ya disanka, tuimbe bisanji ne ngoma." 
Genesis31:28 Kuvua nansha musue bua meme kulayangana ne bana banyi ba bakaji, kabidi ne bikulu banyi? Udi muenze anu bu muntu mutatakane." 
Genesis31:29 Meme ndi mua kukuenzela bibi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu wa tatuebe Izake mmunkandike butuku bua lelu ne: “Udimuke, kukengeshi Yakobe ku bualu nansha bumue.”" 
Genesis31:30 Nanku uvua musue kupingana kuenu bua kumonangana ne baledi bebe. Mbimpe! Kadi udi muibe mpingu ya mvidie indi ntendelela bua tshinyi? 
Genesis31:31 Yakobe kuandamuna Labane ne: — Ndi mukunyeme, bualu mvua ntshina ne: udi mua kunnyenga bana bebe ba bakaji ku bukole." 
Genesis31:32 Kadi wewe musangane muntu ne mpingu ya mvidie yebe, muntu awu neafue. Ukebe bimpe mu bintu bianyi bionsu, bena diku diebe bonsu batangile. Wewe musangane bintu biebe bikuabu, ubiangate, uye nabi. Yakobe uvua wamba nanku, bualu kavua mumanye ne: Rakele muibe mpingu ya mvidie ivua bena diku dia tatuende batendelela." 
Genesis31:33 Labane kukalula ntenta ya Yakobe ne ya Leya ne ya bakaji bapika babidi. Kadi kena mupete tshintu to. Kupatukaye mu ntenta wa Leya, kubuela mu ntenta wa Rakele." 
Genesis31:34 Rakele uvua muangate mpingu ayi, muyisokoke muinshi mua biseba bivua bitenteka pa kamelu, musombapu. Labane kukala mu nzubu muonsu. Kena mupete mpingu mu ntenta wa Rakele to." 
Genesis31:35 Rakele kuambila tatuende Labane ne: — Tatu, umfuile luse, tshiena ne mushindu wa kuimana kulu kumpala kuebe, bualu ndi ku tshijila tshia bakaji. Labane kukebulula mpingu bikole. Kadi kena muyipete to." 
Genesis31:36 Yakobe kufika munda, kutandisha Labane wamba ne: — Tshivua mukuenzele bualu bubi, nansha mubunde tshilumbu bua wewe kundondakaja mushindu ewu to." 
Genesis31:37 Udi musasule ntenta yanyi, kuyi musangane tshintu tshiebe nansha tshimue to. Wewe musangane tshintu tshiebe mu bintu bianyi, mbimpe! Utshiteke patoke bua bantu bebe ne banyi bakose tshilumbu atshi." 
Genesis31:38 Ndi mukukuatshile mudimu bidimu makumi abidi. Mbuji yebe nansha mikoku yebe kabivua bitula mafu to. Tshivua mudie bimpanga bia ku bimuna biebe. 
Genesis31:39 Tshimuna tshiebe tshionsu tshivuabu bashipe kudi nyama ya lonji, tshivua nkutuadilatshi to. Mvua mukufute tshikuabu. Tshimuna tshiebe tshivuabu bibe butuku nansha munda munya, uvua utshimfutshisha." 
Genesis31:40 Mvua nkenga bikole, munya ungosha matuku onsu. Butuku mashika avua ambuela ku muoyi, tshitabela tshingenza." 
Genesis31:41 Tudi nebe kukadi bidimu makumi abidi. Ndi mukuenzele mudimu bidimu dikumi ne binayi, bua kusela bana bebe ba bakaji babidi, pashishe bidimu bisambombu bikuabu bua kupeta bimuna. Kadi wakashintulula difutu dianyi misangu dikumi." 
Genesis31:42 Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua wanyi Abrahame, ne Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukuatshishe tatu wanyi Izake bowa, kayi mungambuluishe, uvua mua kumpingaja kuetu bianza bitupu. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumone mumvua mudipuekeshe, mumone kabidi mudimu mukole undi mukuenzele. Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu mumbingishe butuku buudi wamba abu." 
Genesis31:43 Labane kuambila Yakobe ne: — Bakaji bebe ne bana badibu balele mbanyi meme. Bimuna bionsu biudi mumone ebi ne bintu bionsu biudi nabi mbianyi meme. Kadi bu mundi tshiyi mua kuambuluisha kabidi bana banyi ne bikulu banyi biangatshile ku lelu," 
Genesis31:44 nanku tuetu nebe tutue ndondu. Muntu ajadike bitudi tuenza ebi. 
Genesis31:45 Nanku Yakobe kuimanyika dibue bu tshivulukilu tshia ndondu wabu. 
Genesis31:46 Pashishe Yakobe kuambila bena mudimu bende ne: “Unguijayi mushiki wa mabue muaba awu.” Kuenzabu nanku. Kutekabu biakudia pa mushiki wa mabue awu. Kudiabu bonsu pinapu. 
Genesis31:47 Labane kuinyika muaba awu ne: Yegare Sahaduta. Kadi Yakobe kuwinyika ne: Ngalede. 
Genesis31:48 Labane kuamba ne: — Biangatshile ku lelu, mushiki wa mabue ewu udi ujadika ndondu udi pankatshi petu nebe. Ke padibu babikila muaba awu ne: Ngalede. Mmumue ne: mushiki wa mujadiki." 
Genesis31:49 Labane kuambila kabidi Yakobe ne: — Maweja-Nangila atutentekele patuikala bamane kushiyangana nebe. (Ke kuinyikabu muaba awu dina ne: Mispa, mmomumue ne: kaleya ka mutentekedi.)" 
Genesis31:50 Wewe mutatshishe bana banyi ba bakaji, musele bakaji bakuabu, wamanya ne: udi mujadike mutudi benzelangane nebe, ki muntu to, anu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende." 
Genesis31:51 Pashishe Labane kuambila Yakobe ne: — Mona mushiki wa mabue undi ngunguija pankatshi petu, ne dibue edi dindi muimanyike." 
Genesis31:52 Mushiki wa mabue ne dibue edi bidi bijadika ne: Meme ne wewe katuena mua kusambuka mabue aa ne meji a kuenzelangana bibi to. 
Genesis31:53 Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame ne wa Nahore akose nsambu yetu nebe. Pashishe Yakobe kuditshipa mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukuatshisha tatuende Izake bowa. 
Genesis31:54 Yakobe kulambula Mvidi Mukulu mulambu ku mukuna aku, kubikila bana babu bua kudiabu kaba kamue. Pashishe kulalabu ku mukuna aku." 
Genesis32:1 Butshia Labane ubika ne dinda dionsu, kulayanganaye ne bana bende pamue ne bikulu bende bonsu. Kubajingila dikasa dimpe. Kupinganaye kuende." 
Genesis32:2 Yakobe kutungunuka ne luendu, kusambakenaye ne batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Genesis32:3 Yakobe ubamona, kuelaye diyi dikole wamba ne: — Muaba ewu mmitanda ya Mvidi Mukulu. Kuinyikaye muaba awu ne: Mahanayime." 
Genesis32:4 Ke Yakobe kudianjila kutuma bantu bende ne mukenji, bua kumonangana ne mukuluende Esawu, uvua mu mpata ya Edome mu ditunga dia Seyire." 
Genesis32:5 Yakobe kuelela bantu bavuaye mutume abu mukenji ne: — Numanyishe Esawu ne: “Muena mudimu webe Yakobe udi ukuambila ne: meme mvua kua Labane matuku onsu awu. Mpindiewu ndi musue kupingana. 
Genesis32:6 Ndi ne ngombe, mpunde, mikoku, mbuji ne bapika balume ne bakaji. Ndi ntuma bantu banyi ne mukenji kuudi wewe mukuluanyi, mukalenga wanyi, bua ungakidile bimpe.”" 
Genesis32:7 Bantu bavua Yakobe mutume ne mukenji bua kumonangana ne Esawu, kupinganabu, bambila Yakobe ne: — Tuamonanganyi ne mukuluebe Esawu. Udi ulonda ne bantu nkama inayi bua kusambakena nebe." 
Genesis32:8 Yakobe kupampakana bikole, bowa kumuenzabu. Kutekaye bantu bavuaye nabu, mikoku, mbuji, ngombe ne tumelu mu bisumbu bibidi bibidi." 
Genesis32:9 Kuelaye meji ne: “Pikala Esawu mua kubunda tshisumbu tshimue mvita, tshikuabu netshimunyeme.”" 
Genesis32:10 Yakobe kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa kaku wanyi Abrahame, ne wa tatu wanyi Izake, unteleje! Uvua mungambile ne: “Upingane kuenu mu ditunga dienu. Meme nenkulame, neupete dikasa dimpe.”" 
Genesis32:11 Maweja-Nangila, tshiena mukumbanyine dikasa dimpe diwudi muntutshishe meme, muena mudimu webe, kuyi upungila. Bualu mvua musabuke musulu wa Yardene ewu anu ne dikombu. Kadi mpindiewu nkadi ne bintu bisumbu bibidi ebi." 
Genesis32:12 Nanku ndi nkutendakena ne: unsungidile kudi mukuluanyi Esawu. Ndi ne bowa, bualu udi mua kumbutula ne bakaji ne bana." 
Genesis32:13 Wewe uvua mundaye ne: “Nenkulame, neupete dikasa dimpe. Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene, ludi muntu kayi mua kubala. ”" 
Genesis32:14 Yakobe kulala muaba awu. Kusungulaye bimuna biende bikuabu bua kupesha mukuluende Esawu: 
Genesis32:15 ke mashina a mbuji nkama ibidi ne mpumbu makumi abidi; mikoku ya mashina nkama ibidi ne ya bimpanga makumi abidi; 
Genesis32:16 tumelu tukaji makumi asatu, ne bana batu batshidi bamua mabele; ngombe mikaji makumi anayi, ne ngombe milume dikumi; mpunde mikaji makumi abidi, ne mpunde milume dikumi." 
Genesis32:17 Yakobe kuabanyina bena mudimu bende bimuna abi. Muena mudimu yonsu uvua ne tshiende tshisumbu. Kubambilaye ne: — Dianjilayi kumpala. Nuikale bashilangane mutantshi ku tshisumbu ne ku tshisumbu. 
Genesis32:18 Pashishe kuambilaye muena mudimu uvua ne tshisumbu tshia kumpala ne: — Wewe musambakene ne mukuluanyi Esawu, yeye mukuebeje ne: “Udi muena mudimu wa nganyi? Udi uya penyi? Bimuna bionsu ebi mbia nganyi?”" 
Genesis32:19 Umuandamune ne: “Mbia muena mudimu webe Yakobe. Bintu ebi ke mulambu udiye ukutumina wewe, mfumuende Esawu. Yakobe muine udi utulonda panyima apa.”" 
Genesis32:20 Balami ba tshisumbu tshibidi, ba tshisatu ne bonsu bavua balonda panyima, Yakobe uvua mubambile anu meyi a mushindu umue, usakidila kabidi ne: — Panuasambakena ne mukuluanyi Esawu," 
Genesis32:21 numuambile ne: “Muena mudimu webe Yakobe udi ulonda panyima apa.” Yakobe uvua udiabakena ne: “Bintu bindi mutume ebi, mbua kutuyisha tshiji tshia mukuluanyi Esawu. Nanku patuikala mua kumonangana nende, misangu mikuabu udi mua kungakidila ne disanka.”" 
Genesis32:22 Yakobe mumane kutumina Esawu milambu, kushalaye mulale muaba awu butuku abu." 
Genesis32:23 Butuku abu, Yakobe ubika, kuangataye bakaji bende babidi, ne bana bende dikumi ne umue. Kubasabulaye musulu wa Yaboke ku dilobu." 
Genesis32:24 Kusabulaye ne bintu bionsu bivuaye nabi. 
Genesis32:25 Yakobe kushala nkayende dishiya. Muntu kampande kuluangana nende mvita too ne muatshi butuku. 
Genesis32:26 Muluishi awu umo na ne: Yakobe mmumpite bukole, kutuutaye Yakobe ku tshikundukundu, kutshikoyobola." 
Genesis32:27 Pashishe muntu kampande awu kuambila Yakobe ne: — Ndekela nya, bualu butuku mbumane kutshia. Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Bua meme kukulekela amu wewe mungele lupemba." 
Genesis32:28 Yeye awu kukonka Yakobe ne: — Dina diebe nnganyi? Yakobe kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi Yakobe. 
Genesis32:29 Yeye awu kuambila Yakobe ne: — Kabakukubikila kabidi ne: Yakobe to. Nebakubikile ne: Izrayele. Bualu udi muluangane mvita ne Mvidi Mukulu, muluangane kabidi ne bantu, wewe kubatshimuna." 
Genesis32:30 Yakobe kumuebeja ne: — Kadi wewe mene, dina diebe nnganyi? Kampande awu kumuandamuna ne: — Udi musue kumanya dina dianyi bua tshinyi? Pashishe kuelaye Yakobe lupemba." 
Genesis32:31 Yakobe kuamba ne: — Ndi nginyika muaba ewu dina ne: Penuyele, mpala wa Mvidi Mukulu, bualu ndi mumonangane ne Mvidi Mukulu mpala ne mpala, meme kushala ne muoyi." 
Genesis32:32 Diba dipatuka, Yakobe kumuka ku dilobu dia Penuyele, wenda utebuka, bualu tshikundukundu tshivua tshikoyoboke." 
Genesis32:33 Ke padi bena Izrayele kabayi badia munyinyi wa mu tshikundukundu tshia nyama too ne ku lelu, bualu bavua bakoyobole Yakobe tshikundukundu." 
Genesis33:1 Yakobe ukenzakana, kumona Esawu umutantshila, muikale ne bantu nkama inayi. Yakobe kuteka Leya ne bana bende pa nkayabu, Rakele ne muanende Yozefe pa nkayabu, bakaji bende babidi bapika pa nkayabu ne bana babu." 
Genesis33:2 Yakobe kuimanyika bakaji bende bapika abu ne bana bavuabu balele kumpala kua mulongu. Kulondabu kudi Leya ne bana bende, pashishe kudi Rakele ne muanende Yozefe." 
Genesis33:3 Yakobe kupita kumpala kuabu bonsu, kudiela panshi misangu muanda mutekete, usemena kudi mukuluende Esawu." 
Genesis33:4 Ke Esawu kunyema lubilu kumupukila. Bonsu babidi kudila muadi. 
Genesis33:5 Esawu ubanduluka, kumona bakaji ne bana. Kukonka Yakobe ne: — Baudi muende nabu mbanganyi? Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Mbana bandi mupete ku luse lua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Genesis33:6 Bakaji bapika ba Yakobe kufika muaba awu ne bana, kudiela panshi." 
Genesis33:7 Leya ne bana bende kufika, kudielabu panshi. Pashishe Yozefe ne Rakele kudiela panshi." 
Genesis33:8 Esawu kukonka Yakobe ne: — Bimuna bionsu bindi musambakene nabi, tshiudi musue kuenza nabi ntshinyi? Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mukutuminabi bua umfuile luse." 
Genesis33:9 Esawu kuambila Yakobe ne: — Muakunyanyi, ndi ne bintu bikumbane. Shala ne biebe ebi." 
Genesis33:10 Yakobe kutendakena Esawu ne: — Bu wewe musue, umfuile luse. Angata mulambu undi mukutuadile ewu, bua kujadika muudi mumane kumfuila luse. Kabidi pandi nkutangila, ndi bu mumone Mvidi Mukulu wanyi bua luse lunene luudi mumfuile." 
Genesis33:11 Ndi nkusengelela ne: angata mulambu undi mukutuadile ewu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu wanyi mmumpe bintu bia bungi. Yakobe kunanukila bikole. Esawu kuitaba." 
Genesis33:12 Esawu kuambila Yakobe ne: — Jukayi tuye. Netuende nebe. 
Genesis33:13 Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Udi mumanye ne: ndi ne bana bapuekele. Mikoku ne ngombe kabidi bidi ne bana batshidi bamua mabele. Kabiena mua kuenda lukasa lukasa to. Patupu, mu luendu lukole, nansha lua dituku dimue, bidi mua kufua bionsu." 
Genesis33:14 Nanku ndi nkutendakena ne: Udianjile kumpala. Meme ndi nkulonda bitekete bitekete, bilondeshile luendu lua bana ne lua bimuna bindi nabi, too ne patuapetangana mu ditunga dia Seyire." 
Genesis33:15 Esawu kuandamuna Yakobe ne: — Nanku ndi nkushila bantu banyi bakuabu. Yakobe kubenga ne: — Kabena ne tshidibu bangenzela to. Muudi mumane kumfuila luse mbikumbane. 
Genesis33:16 Esawu kuya ku Seyire. 
Genesis33:17 Kadi Yakobe kuya ku Sukote. Kuasayemu nzubu, kuibakilamu kabidi bimuna bikumbi. Ke padibu babikila muaba awu ne: Sukote, mbuena kuamba ne: bikumbi." 
Genesis33:18 Yakobe ufumina ku tshitupa tshia Mezopotamiya tshia ku mutu kua misulu, kufikaye anu bimpe mu ditunga dia Kenaane mu tshimenga tshia Shekeme. Kuasaye mitanda pabuipi ne tshimenga atshi." 
Genesis33:19 Yakobe kusumba muaba uvuaye muase ntenta wende, kudi bana ba Amore, muashi wa tshimenga atshi, ku mushinga wa nkanu lukama ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Genesis33:20 Kuasaye tshilambuilu muaba awu, kutshinyika ne: Ele, mmomumue ne Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
Genesis34:1 Dituku dikuabu Diina, muana wa bakaji uvua Yakobe mulele ne Leya, uvua muye kumonangana ne bakaji nende ba mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Genesis34:2 Shekeme, muana wa Amore, mfumu wa bena Iti umona Diina, kumubuelelaye mu nzubu ku bukole." 
Genesis34:3 Kadi Shekeme kunanga Diina bikole, kumuambila malu onsu avua munda muende, bua atekeshe muoyi wende." 
Genesis34:4 Shekeme kuambila tatuende Amore ne: — Ungambuluishe bua mmone mua kusela nsongakaji ewu. 
Genesis34:5 Yakobe mumane kumvua ne: Shekeme mmubuelele Diina mu nzubu ku bukole, kushalaye mupuwe, muindile dipingana dia bana bende bavua badisha bimuna mu mpata." 
Genesis34:6 Amore, tatuende wa Shekeme, kuya kuyukila ne Yakobe." 
Genesis34:7 Bana ba Yakobe balume mu mpata, kubambilabu bionsu bivua bienzeka abi. Bavua bumvue bibi, bafike kabidi munda bikole, bualu Shekeme uvua muenze bualu bubi bua dikamakama, mubuelele muana wa bende wa Yakobe mu nzubu ku bukole. Tshilema tshia mushindu ewu katshiena ne bua kuenzeka mu Izrayele to." 
Genesis34:8 Kadi Amore kuambila Yakobe ne bana bende ne: — Bu mudi muananyi Shekeme munange muanenu wa bakaji ne muoyi mujima, anyishayi amusele." 
Genesis34:9 Tumvuangane, tuikale tuselelangana. Tuetu tusele bana benu, nuenu nusele betu." 
Genesis34:10 Nenuase pabuipi netu. Ditunga edi nedikale dienu kabidi. Asayi muaba onsu unudi basue, nuende mushinga, nusumbe miaba ya nuenu kusomba kashidi." 
Genesis34:11 Shekeme kuambila tatuende muenu, ne ba bukonde buende, ne: — Numfuile luse, nundombe tshionsu tshinudi basue." 
Genesis34:12 Nundombe biuma bungi buonsu bunudi basue, ne bintu bikuabu bidi mua kunusankisha. Nemfile bionsu bua ngangate anu nsongakaji ewu, ikale mukajanyi." 
Genesis34:13 Kadi bu muvua Shekeme mubuelele Diina mu nzubu ku bukole, bana ba Yakobe kuandamuna Shekeme ne tatuende Amore, ne budimu ne:" 
Genesis34:14 — Katuena mua kuitaba bua muntu udibu kabayi bateke panshi asele muanetu wa bakaji, bualu bidi bituenza bundu." 
Genesis34:15 Kadi panuikala basue kusela muanetu wa bakaji, bateke balume bonsu ba muenu panshi. Nuikale bu mutudi emu." 
Genesis34:16 Nanku netumvuangane tuselelangane, tusombe nenu mu ditunga emu, tushale bantu bamue." 
Genesis34:17 Kadi panuabenga mutudi tuamba, tuetu netuangate muanetu wa bakaji, tuye nende." 
Genesis34:18 Amore ne muanende Shekeme kuitaba ne: “Munuambi amu mmomu.” 
Genesis34:19 Nanku bu muvua Shekeme munange Diina ne muoyi wende mujima, kuyaye lukasa bua kukumbaja bivua baku bende bambe. Bavua bamumvuile kabidi bikole kudi bena diku diabu." 
Genesis34:20 Amore ne muanende Shekeme kuya ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga, muaba wa tshisombelu, kubikila bena ditunga, babambila ne:" 
Genesis34:21 — Benyi betu aba badi ne muoyi muimpe. Tusombe nabu mu ditunga dietu, bualu ndialabale. Bende mushinga. Tuselelangane kabidi nabu." 
Genesis34:22 Bantu benyi aba nebanyishe bua kuasa mu ditunga dietu, kabidi bua kushala netu bantu bamue, kadi anu padibu bateka bantu balume bonsu panshi bu mudibu bobu." 
Genesis34:23 Tuetu benze nanku, nebasombe mu ditunga dietu. Nanku bimuna ne bintu bionsu bidibu nabi nebishale bietu." 
Genesis34:24 Bena ditunga bonsu bavua muaba awu kuitaba bivua Amore ne muanende Shekeme bambe. Kutekabu bantu balume bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi panshi. 
Genesis34:25 Kadi kupita matuku asatu, patshivua balume bonsu basama mputa ya butengu, Shimeyone ne muanabu Levi, bakulu ba Diina, kuangata muela wa mvita, kubuela mu tshimenga, kakuyi udi ubenzela bualu, kushipamu bantu balume bonsu." 
Genesis34:26 Kushipabu kabidi ne Amore ne muanende Shekeme, kuangata muanabu wa bakaji Dina uvua kudi Shekeme, kuya nende!" 
Genesis34:27 Bana bakuabu ba Yakobe, kupawulabu bintu bionsu bivua pa bitalu nansha mu tshimenga! Bualu nsongalume wa mu tshimenga atshi uvua mubafuishe bundu, mubuelele muanabu wa bakaji mu nzubu ku bukole." 
Genesis34:28 Kunyengabu mikoku, mbuji, ngombe, mpunde. Mu tshikosu kuangatabu bionsu bivua mu tshimenga ne mu mpata." 
Genesis34:29 Kuyabu ne biuma bionsu abi. Kukuatabu kabidi bakaji ne bana bonsu, kuya nabu. Bavua baye kabidi ne bionsu bivuabu basangane mu nzubu ya tshimenga." 
Genesis34:30 Ke Yakobe kuambila bana bende Shimeyone ne Levi ne: — Nuangenzedi bibi, nuamfuishi bundu kudi bena Kenaane ne kudi bena Perizi. Tuetu tudi bakese, bobu badi ba bungi. Badi mua kudisanga, kumbutala ne bianyi bionsu bindi nabi." 
Genesis34:31 Bana babidi aba kuandamuna tatuabu ne: — Mulumiana ewu kavua mua kuangata muanetu wa bakaji ku bukole, bu mukaji mudisombele to." 
Genesis35:1 Dituku dikuabu Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Yakobe ne: — Juka, uye kuasa ku Betele. Ungashileku tshilambuilu, bualu ke muaba umvua mukumuenekele pauvua unyema muanenu Esawu." 
Genesis35:2 Yakobe kuambila bena diku diende ne bantu bende ne: — Dilongololayi. Umushayi mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu idi munkatshi muenu. Dikobololayi, nuvuale bilamba bikuabu." 
Genesis35:3 Dilongololayi, tuyayi ku Betele. Nengashileku Mvidi Mukulu tshilambuilu, bualu uvua mungambuluishe pamvua mu dikenga dikole. Uvua mundame miaba yonsu imvua nya." 
Genesis35:4 Nanku bantu bonsu kumupesha mpingu yonsu ivua ileja mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu ivuabu nayi, kumupesha kabidi ne tukanu tua ku matshi tavuabu natu. Yakobe kubijika bionsu muinshi mua mutshi wa lusanga udi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Shekeme." 
Genesis35:5 Yakobe ne bonsu bavuaye nabu, kumukabu muaba awu. Mvidi Mukulu kukuatshisha bantu bonsu ba mu bimenga bivua nabu mutumba bowa bukole. Kupangabu mua kulondakaja Yakobe ne bana bende." 
Genesis35:6 Ke Yakobe ne bena diende bonsu kufika mu Luze, udibu babikila mpindiewu ne Betele, mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Genesis35:7 Yakobe kuashilamu Mvidi Mukulu tshilambuilu. Kutshinyika dina ne: Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Betele, bualu muaba awu ke uvua Mvidi Mukulu mumumuenekele diba divuaye unyema muanabu Esawu." 
Genesis35:8 Anu dituku adi Debora, ndeji wa Rebeka, kufua. Kumujikabu muinshi mua mutshi wa lusanga udi pabuipi ne Betele. Batshidi babikila lusanga alu ne: “Lusanga lua muadi.”" 
Genesis35:9 Yakobe ufuma ku Mezopotamiya, Mvidi Mukulu kumumuenekela tshiakabidi, kumuela lupemba." 
Genesis35:10 Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Kabena bakubikila kabidi ne: Yakobe to. Mpindiewu nebakubikile ne: Izrayele. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kumuinyika ne: Izrayele. 
Genesis35:11 Kumuambila ne: — Ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Utante, uvulangane, wikale nkambua wa bisamba bia bungi, bakalenga nebafume ku ndelanganyi yebe." 
Genesis35:12 Wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe, ndi nnupesha ditunga dimvua mulaye Abrahame ne Izake. Nenku nendipeshe kabidi ndelanganyi yebe." 
Genesis35:13 Mvidi Mukulu kumuka muaba uvuaye uyukidila ne Yakobe. 
Genesis35:14 Yakobe kuimanyika dibue muaba awu, kuela manyi ne maluvu a mulambu pa dibue adi bua kudijidila." 
Genesis35:15 Yakobe kuinyika muaba awu ne: Betele, mmomumue ne: Nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu (muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu muyukile nende )." 
Genesis35:16 Yakobe ne bena diende kumuangala ku Betele. Kabayi banji kufika ku Efrata, Rakele kulela muana. Kadi kulela aku kuvua kukole!" 
Genesis35:17 Nanku pavua Rakele ulela muana ukenga bikole, muleleshi kumuambila ne: — Kutshinyi to. Muana ngua balume kabidi." 
Genesis35:18 Rakele ulela, kushala ukengakana ne lufu. Pa kukulaye muoyi, kuinyikaye muana awu ne: Benoni, mmumue ne: Makenga. Kadi Yakobe, tatuende kumuinyika ne: Binyamine, mmumue ne: Diboku dia bukole." 
Genesis35:19 Rakele ufua, kumujikabu ku muelelu wa njila udi muye ku Efrata, muaba udibu binyika mpindiewu ne: Betleyeme." 
Genesis35:20 Yakobe kuimanyika dibue pa lukita luende alu. Dibue adi too ne lelu, batshidi badibikila ne: “Dibue dia pa lukita lua Rakele.”" 
Genesis35:21 Yakobe kumuangala muaba awu, kuya kuasa mitanda yende dishiya dia Migdale-Edere." 
Genesis35:22 Pavua Yakobe musombe muaba awu, Rubene kubuelela Bila, mukaji mupika wa tatuende, mu nzubu. Yakobe kumanya bualu abu, kunyingalala bikole. Bana ba balume bonsu ba Yakobe bavua dikumi ne babidi." 
Genesis35:23 Leya uvua ne bana ba balume basambombu: Rubene, ke muanabute, bamulonda kudi Shimeyone, Levi, Yuda, Isakare ne Zebulone." 
Genesis35:24 Rakele uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: ke Yozefe ne Binyamine. 
Genesis35:25 Bila mukaji mupika wa Rakele uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: ke Dane ne Naftali. 
Genesis35:26 Zilpa mukaji mupika wa Leya uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: ke Ngade ne Ashere. Bana bonsu aba ba balume ke bavua Yakobe mulele mu Mezopotamiya. 
Genesis35:27 Yakobe kuya kudi tatuende Izake mu Mambre pabuipi ne Kiriyate-Arba, muaba udibu babikila lelu ne: Ebrone. Ke muaba uvua Abrahame ne Izake basombe kale." 
Genesis35:28 Izake uvua ne bidimu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu," 
Genesis35:29 kufuaye, mumane kulala panu nuboboke. Kulondaye bankambua bende. Kumujikabu kudi bana bende Esawu ne Yakobe." 
Genesis36:1 Ke mena a ndelanganyi ya Esawu, udibu babikila kabidi ne Edome:" 
Genesis36:2 Esawu uvua musele bakaji basatu ba bena Kenaane: Ada, muana wa Elone, muena Iti; Oholibama, muana wa Ana (Ana awu uvua muana wa Sibeyone, muena Ivi );" 
Genesis36:3 Basmate, muana wa Ismayele. Yeye uvua ne muanabu Nebayote." 
Genesis36:4 Ada uvua mulelele Esawu muana anu umue: Elifaze. Basmate uvua mulele kabidi muana anu umue: diende Reyuwele. 
Genesis36:5 Kadi Oholibama uvua mulele bana basatu: Yewusha, Yalame ne Kora. Ke bana bonsu balume ba Esawu, bavuaye mulele mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Genesis36:6 Esawu kumuangala ne bakaji bende, bana bende ba balume ne ba bakaji, bena diende bakuabu bonsu, kabidi ne bimuna biende, nyama yende ivua yambula majitu, bintu bionsu bivuaye mupete mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Kuyaye kuasa bashilangane mutantshi mule ne muanabu Yakobe mu ditunga dikuabu." 
Genesis36:7 Bualu bonsu babidi bavua ne bintu bipite bungi. Nanku kabavua mua kusomba muaba umue to. Ditunga dia Kenaane divua dikese. Kadivua dikumbane mua kudisha bimuna biabu bonsu babidi to. 
Genesis36:8 Ke muvua Esawu, udibu babikila kabidi ne: Edome, muye kuasa ku mukuna wa Seyire." 
Genesis36:9 Ke mena a ndelanganyi ya Esawu, nkambua wa bena Edome, bavua base ku mukuna wa Seyire:" 
Genesis36:10 Ada, mukaji wa Esawu, uvua mulele muana anu umue wa balume, dina diende: Elifaze. Basmate uvua mulele Reyuwele." 
Genesis36:11 Elifaze kulela bana ba balume batanu: Temane, Omare, Sefo, Ngatame ne Kenaze." 
Genesis36:12 Kadi Timna, mukaji mukuabu uvua Elifaze mubanjije, uvua mulele muana wa balume anu umue: Amaleke. Ke bikulu ba Esawu bavuabu balele kudi Elifaze, muana wa mukajende Ada." 
Genesis36:13 Basmate, mukaji wa Esawu, uvua mulele kabidi muana wa balume anu umue Reyuwele. Reyuwele uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: ke Nahate, Zera, Shama ne Miza. Ke bikulu ba Esawu, bavuabu balele kudi Reyuwele, muana wa Basmate." 
Genesis36:14 Oholibama, mukaji mukuabu wa Esawu, uvua muana wa Ana. Uvua kabidi muikulu wa Sibeyone. Oholibama uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Yewusha, Yalame ne Kora." 
Genesis36:15 Bamfumu badi bafuma ku ndelanganyi ya Esawu badi nunku: Elifaze, muanabute, udi nkambua wa bamfumu basambombu: Temane, Omare, Sefo, Kenaze," 
Genesis36:16 Ngatame ne Amaleke. Bana aba ke ndelanganyi ya Elifaze, muanabute wa Esawu, uvuaye mulele ne mukajende Ada. Bobu bavua basombe mu Edome." 
Genesis36:17 Reyuwele, muanende mukuabu wa kua mukajende Basmate, udi nkambua wa bamfumu bakuabu bavua basombe mu Edome: ke Nahate, Zera, Shama ne Miza." 
Genesis36:18 Ku bana bavua Esawu mulele ne mukajende Oholibama, muana wa Ana, nkupatuke bamfumu basatu: ke Yewusha, Yalame ne Kora." 
Genesis36:19 Ke bamfumu ba bena Edome, ndelanganyi ya Esawu." 
Genesis36:20 Bantu ba kumpala ba mu ditunga dia Edome bavua ndelanganyi ya Seyire, muena Ori. Bamfumu ba bena Ori: ke Lotane, Shobale, Sibeyone, Ana," 
Genesis36:21 Dishone, Eshere ne Dishane." 
Genesis36:22 Lotane uvua mulele Ori ne Emame. Lotane uvua ne muanabu wa bakaji, Timna." 
Genesis36:23 Bana ba Shobale ke Akane, Manahate, Ebale, Shefo ne Oname." 
Genesis36:24 Bana ba Sibeyone: ke Aya ne Ana. Ana ewu ke uvua musangane mpokolu wa mayi mu tshipela, pawaye udisha mpunde ya tatuende Sibeyone." 
Genesis36:25 Ana uvua ne bana babidi: Dishone ne wa bakaji Oholibama. Dishone uvua mulele Emdane," 
Genesis36:26 Eshebane, Itrane ne Kerane." 
Genesis36:27 Eshere uvua mulele Bilehane, Zavane ne Akane." 
Genesis36:28 Dishane uvua mulele Use ne Arane. 
Genesis36:29 Ke bamfumu ba bena Ori: Lotane, Shobale, Sibeyone, Ana," 
Genesis36:30 Dishone, Eshere ne Dishane. Bavua basombe mu ditunga dia Seyire." 
Genesis36:31 Bena Izrayele kabayi banji kupeta bakalenga, bena Edome bakavua ne bakalenga, balondangane nunku mu bukalenga:" 
Genesis36:32 Bela, muana wa Beyore, wa mu tshimenga tshia Dinaba." 
Genesis36:33 Yobabe, muana wa Zera, wa mu tshimenga tshia Bosra." 
Genesis36:34 Ushame, wa mu ditunga dia bena Temane," 
Genesis36:35 Adade, muana wa Bedade, wa mu tshimenga tshia Avite. Ke yeye uvua mutshimune bena Madiyane mu mpata ya Mowabe." 
Genesis36:36 Samla, wa mu tshimenga tshia Masreka." 
Genesis36:37 Shawule, wa mu tshimenga tshia Rehobote, ku muelelu wa mayi." 
Genesis36:38 Baale-Anane, muana wa Akbore." 
Genesis36:39 Adare, wa mu tshimenga tshia Pawu. Uvua musele Metabeyele, muana wa Matrede, kabidi ne muikulu wa Mezahade." 
Genesis36:40 Bisamba bia bena Edome, bilondeshile muaba udi tshisamba tshionsu tshisombe, bilondeshile kabidi dina dia nkambua watshi, ke Timna, Aka, Yetete," 
Genesis36:41 Oholibama, Ela, Pinone," 
Genesis36:42 Kenaze, Temane, Mibsare" 
Genesis36:43 Magdiyele, Irame. Bisamba bionsu abi bidi biasa mu ditunga dia Edome, tshisamba tshionsu pa muaba watshi. Esawu ke nkambua wa bena Edome bonsu." 
Genesis37:1 Yakobe uvua muye kusomba mu ditunga dia Kenaane, muaba uvua tatuende Izake musombe ku kale." 
Genesis37:2 Malu a bana ba Yakobe adi nunku: Yozefe ukumbaja bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete, kuyaye kudisha bimuna bia tatuende, pamue ne bakulu bende, kabidi ne bana ba Bila ne ba Zilpa, bakaji bapika ba tatuende. Kadi Yozefe uvua wambila tatuende malu mabi onsu a bana babu." 
Genesis37:3 Ku bana bende bonsu, Yakobe uvua mupite kunanga Yozefe, bualu mmuana uvuaye mulele ku bukunda. Nanku uvua mumuteleshile tshinkutu tshia mushinga mukole." 
Genesis37:4 Bana babu bamone muvua tatuabu mutambe kunanga Yozefe, kujilabu muanabu, kabayi mua kuyukila nende kakuyi matandu." 
Genesis37:5 Dituku dikuabu, Yozefe uvua mulote tshilota, kutshiawila bana babu. Bumvue tshilota atshi, kupitabu kumukina." 
Genesis37:6 Yozefe kubambila ne: — Telejayi tshilota tshindi mulote. 
Genesis37:7 Tuvua baye bonsu kunowa bia mu madimi. Tuvua tusuika bisumbu bia bikunyibua bivua ne ntete ya kuenza bukula. Diakamue tshisumbu tshianyi kubanduluka kuimana. Bisumbu bienu bionsu kutshiela munkatshi, bitshikukuila." 
Genesis37:8 Bakulu bende kumukonka ne: — Udi musue kushala mukalenga wetu, ututumina diyi anyi? Ke kupitabu kumufikila munda bikole bua tshilota atshi ne bua bivuaye wamba abi." 
Genesis37:9 Yozefe kulota tshilota tshikuabu, kutshiawila bana babu, ubambila ne: — Mvua mulote: diba, ngondu ne mitotu dikumi ne umue bilua kunkukuila." 
Genesis37:10 Yozefe kuawila kabidi tatuende tshilota atshi. Awu kumutandisha, wamba ne: — Atshi ntshilota kayi? Udi musue ne: meme, mamuebe ne bana benu bonsu tukutuile binu anyi?" 
Genesis37:11 Bana babu ne Yozefe kumunwuila lubabu. Kadi tatuende uvua anu uvuluka misangu mivule bilota abi. 
Genesis37:12 Bana babu ne Yozefe bavua baye kudisha bimuna bia tatuabu pabuipi ne Shekeme. 
Genesis37:13 Yakobe kuambila Yozefe ne: — Ndi musue kukutuma ku Shekeme, kudi bana benu badisha bimuna. Yozefe kuitaba ne: — Eyowa. Untume." 
Genesis37:14 Tatuende kumuambila ne: — Uye kumona bana benu ne bimuna: ne badi ne bukole bua mubidi. Pashishe upingane bua kungambila. Ke muvua tatuende umutuma ku luendu lule lua kumuka mu tshibandabanda tshia Ebrone, kuya mu Shekeme." 
Genesis37:15 Yozefe ufika mu mpata, kupambukaye mu njila. Muntu kampande kumukonka ne: — Udi ukeba tshinyi?" 
Genesis37:16 Yozefe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi nkeba bana betu. Udi mua kundeja muaba udibu badishila bimuna anyi? 
Genesis37:17 Muntu awu kuambila Yozefe ne: — Kabatshiena apa to. Mvua mumvue muvuabu bambilangana bua kuya luseke lua Dotane. Yozefe kulonda bana babu, kubasangana ku Dotane." 
Genesis37:18 Bana babu ne Yozefe kumumuena utshidi ku bule, kayi muanji kufika padibu nansha. Kumuelelebu tshifufu tshibi bua kumushipesha." 
Genesis37:19 Kuambilanganabu ne: — Muena ndota wafiki," 
Genesis37:20 tumushipe, tuimanshe tshitalu tshiende mu tshiina. Nefushime ne: mbamudie kudi nyama wa lonji. Nanku netumone tshidi bilota biende bimuenzela." 
Genesis37:21 Rubene umvua nanku, kukebaye muyilaye mua kupandisha Yozefe. Kuambilaye bana babu ne: — Katumushipi to." 
Genesis37:22 Katuedi mashi panshi to. Tumuelayi mu tshiina tshidi mu tshipela emu. Kadi katumushipi nansha. Rubene uvua wamba bionsu ebi, bualu uvua musue kupandisha Yozefe bua kumufikisha ne muoyi kudi tatuende." 
Genesis37:23 Yozefe ufika muaba uvua bana babu, kumukuatabu, kumukopolabu tshinkutu tshiende tshimpe." 
Genesis37:24 Kumuelabu mu tshiina tshivua katshiyi ne mayi. 
Genesis37:25 Pashishe kusombabu bua kudia. Bakenzakana, kumonabu tshisumbu tshia bena Ismayele, bafuma ku ditunga dia Ngilaade baya ku Ejipitu. Tumelu tuabu tuvua tuambule manananshi a mupuya muimpe a mishindu mishilangane." 
Genesis37:26 Yuda kukonka bana babu ne: — Tuetu bashipe muanetu ewu, basokoke bualu ebu, netupete tshinyi?" 
Genesis37:27 Katumushipi nansha, bualu mmuanetu. Tudi bantu bamue. Kadi tumusumbishe kudi bena Ismayele aba. Bana babu kuitaba." 
Genesis37:28 Pamonubu bangenda mushinga ba bena Madiyane bapita, kupatulabu Yozefe mu tshiina, kumusumbishabu kudi bena Ismayele ku nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi abidi. Bena Ismayele kuya nende mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis37:29 Rubene uya kutangila mu tshiina, kena musangane Yozefe to. Kupampakanaye bikole, kupanda bilamba biende." 
Genesis37:30 Kuyaye kudi bana babu, ubambila ne: — Yozefe kena mu tshiina to. Kadi meme nengenze tshinyi mpindiewu?" 
Genesis37:31 Bana babu ne Yozefe kutua tshinkutu tshia Yozefe mu mashi a mbuji wa mpumbu uvuabu bakose muminu. 
Genesis37:32 Kutshitumabu kudi tatuabu ne mukenji, bamba ne: “Kenketa tshilamba tshitudi bangule etshi. Ntshifuanangane ne tshinkutu tshia muanebe Yozefe anyi?”" 
Genesis37:33 Tatuende umona tshilamba atshi, kujadika ne: — Bushuwa, ntshilamba tshia muananyi Yozefe. Nyama wa lonji mmumudie, mumusunsule." 
Genesis37:34 Yakobe kudipanda bilamba, kuvuala bilamba bikayabale, kuenza madilu a muanende matuku mavule." 
Genesis37:35 Bana bende ba balume ne bakaji kufika bua kumusamba. Yakobe kubenga, wamba ne: “Ndi ndila amu Yozefe too ne mungafua.” Ke muvua Yakobe mutungunuke ne madilu a muanende Yozefe nanku." 
Genesis37:36 Bena Madiyane kusumbisha Yozefe mu Ejipitu kudi Potifare, muntu uvuabu batekemena bikole kudi Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Uvua kabidi mulombodi wa bena mvita bende." 
Genesis38:1 Mu tshikondu atshi, Yuda kushiyangana ne bana babu, bua kuya kusomba kua Ira, mu tshimenga tshia Adulame." 
Genesis38:2 Kuinaku Yuda kusela muana wa bakaji wa Shuwa, muena Kenaane." 
Genesis38:3 Nsongakaji awu kuimita difu, kulela muana wa balume. Yuda kumuinyika dina dia Ere."
