Genesis38:4 Mukaji wa Yuda kuimita kabidi difu, kulela muana wa balume muibidi. Yuda kumuinyika dina ne: Onane." 
Genesis38:5 Pashishe mukaji awu kuimita kabidi difu, kulela muana muisatu wa balume, kumuinyika dina dia Shela. Kadi musangu awu Yuda kavua kumbelu to. Uvua muye ku Kezibe." 
Genesis38:6 Yuda kuselela muanende muanabute Ere mukaji. Dina dia mukaji awu divua Tamare. 
Genesis38:7 Ere, muanabute wa Yuda, kavua ukumbaja bivua Maweja-Nangila musue nansha. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kumushipesha." 
Genesis38:8 Yuda kuambila muanende mukuabu Onane ne: — Upiane mukaji wa mukuluebe bua umulelele bana. 
Genesis38:9 Kadi misangu yonsu ivua Onane ubuelela mukaji awu mu nzubu, uvua wela mayi a balume panshi. Bualu kavua musue kulela ne mamu awu nansha. Uvua mumanye ne: bana badibu mua kupeta ne mukaji awu, nebikale anu ba mukuluende." 
Genesis38:10 Bivuaye wenza kabivua bisankisha Maweja-Nangila. Kumushipeshaye ne yeye kabidi. 
Genesis38:11 Ke Yuda kuambila Tamare, mukaji wa muanende Ere, ne: — Uye kusomba kuenu kua tatuebe, too ne pakola muananyi wa balume Shela bua akupiane. Tamare kuya kuabu. Yuda uvua mumushe Tamare, bua muanende wa balume Shela kavu kufua muvua bakulu bende bafue." 
Genesis38:12 Matuku a bungi mamane kupita, mukaji wa Yuda, muana wa Shuwa, kufila. Yuda mumane kutangalaja madilu, kuyaye ku Timna ne mulunda wende Ira wa mu tshimenga tshia Adulame. Bavua baye kutangila bena mudimu bavua bakosa miosa ya mikoku yende." 
Genesis38:13 Ke kumanyishabu Tamare difika dia tatuende muenu Yuda mu Timna bua bakose miosa ya mikoku yende. 
Genesis38:14 Tamare kuvula bilamba bia lufuila, kusuika tshitambala mu mpala, kuya kusomba ku tshibuelelu tshia Enayime ku njila udi muye ku Timna. Tamare uvua mumanye ne: bayende tshina Shela, uvuaye muindile, ukavua mumane kukola. Kadi kabavua basue bua Shela amupiane to." 
Genesis38:15 Yuda umona Tamare, kuela meji ne: mmukaji mudisombele, bualu uvua musuike tshitambala mu mpala." 
Genesis38:16 Yuda kutantshila kudi Tamare ku muelelu wa njila, umuambila ne: — Ndi musue tuye nebe. Yuda uvua umuambisha, bualu kavua mumanye ne: mmukaji wa muanende Ere to. Tamare kuandamuna ne: — Kadi neungonde tshinyi?" 
Genesis38:17 Yuda kumuandamuna ne: — Nenkonde lukungulu lua mbuji lua ku bimuna bianyi. Tamare kuanyisha, umulomba ne: — Kadi wanji kungeyeka tshintu bua nshale mutekemene." 
Genesis38:18 Yuda kumukonka ne: — Udi musue nkueyeka tshinyi? Tamare kumuambila ne: — Ungeyeke tshitampi tshiebe tshia mu nshingu, ne nshinga uudi mutshiela. Ungeyeke kabidi dikombu diebe. Yuda kumupesha bintu abi. Kumubuelelaye mu nzubu. Tamare kuimita difu." 
Genesis38:19 Tamare upingana kuabu, kuvulaye tshitambala. Kuvualaye tshiakabidi bilamba biende bia lufuila abi." 
Genesis38:20 Yuda kutuma mulunda wende Ira wa mu Adulame ne mbuji wa lukungulu bua kupikula bintu biende bivuaye mueyeke mukaji awu. Kadi Ira kena musangane mukaji awu kabidi to. 
Genesis38:21 Kuebejaye bena mu Enayime ne: — Mukaji mudisombele uvua pa buipi apa ku muelelu wa njila eku, udi penyi? Kumuandamunabu ne: — Muetu munu kamuena mukaji mudisombele to." 
Genesis38:22 Ira kupingana kudi Yuda, umuambila ne: — Tshiena musangane mukaji awu to. Kabidi bena musoku badi bajadika ne: katshia muabu kamuvua mukaji mudisombele to." 
Genesis38:23 Yuda kuamba ne: — Mvua mutumine mukaji ewu mbuji umvua mumulaye. Mbikumbane. Patupu, bantu nebatuseke. Paudi mumukebe kuyi mumusangane, nanku alame bintu bidiye nabi abi." 
Genesis38:24 Kupita anu ngondu isatu muntu kampande kuambila Yuda ne: — Tamare, mukaji wa muanebe, ukadi mudisombele. Kabidi udi mumane kuimita ne difu. Yuda kutuma diyi ne: — Bamupatule pa mbelu, bamoshe mu kapia, abutuke." 
Genesis38:25 Patshi wabu bapatula Tamare pa mbelu, kutuminaye tatuende muenu mukenji ne: — Joja bintu abi: tshitampi, nshinga ne dikombu mbia muena difu dindi muimite. Ukebe muntu awu!" 
Genesis38:26 Yuda umona bintu abi, kubimanyaye. Kuambaye ne: — Mukaji ewu mmunemeke mikenji, mmuenze bimpe, mumpite ne meme mene. Bushuwa uvua ne bua kuikala mukaji wa muananyi Shela. Nanku ndi muenze bibi padi muananyi kayi mumupiane. Kashidi Yuda kena mubuelele kabidi Tamare mu nzubu to." 
Genesis38:27 Dituku divua Tamare ulela, bantu kumona ne: nealele bana ba mapasa." 
Genesis38:28 Muana kupatula diboku, muleleshi kudikuata, kusuikaku kakaba kakunze, wamba ne: — Ewu ke Mbuyi." 
Genesis38:29 Mbuyi upingaja diboku, Kanku kupatuka. Muleleshi kukatshila bikole, wamba ne: — Mmudibambe mushindu kayi? Yuda kumuinyika dina ne: Perese, mmumue ne: Tshidibamba." 
Genesis38:30 Pashishe Tamare kulela Mbuyi uvua ne kakaba kakunze ku diboku. Yuda kumuinyika ne: Zera. 
Genesis39:1 Bena Ismayele kufika ne Yozefe mu Ejipitu kumusumbisha kudi muena Ejipitu diende Potifare. Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu uvua mutekemene bikole Potifare ewu. Potifare uvua kabidi mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mu bukalenga. 
Genesis39:2 Maweja-Nangila uvua ne Yozefe, umututshisha diakalenga. Yozefe kusomba ku nzubu kua mfumuende, muena Ejipitu." 
Genesis39:3 Potifare kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila mmulame Yozefe, mmumututshishe diakalenga mu bionsu bivuaye wenza." 
Genesis39:4 Nanku Potifare kunanga Yozefe bikole. Kumupeshaye mudimu wa kulombola bantu ne bintu bionsu bia mu nzubu muende. 
Genesis39:5 Amu bualu bua Yozefe, Maweja-Nangila kututshisha muena Ejipitu diakalenga. Diakalenga edi kumueneka mu bintu biende bionsu, ne mu nzubu wende ne mu madimi ende." 
Genesis39:6 Potifare uvua ne mudimu amu wa kudia. Uvua ulombola bintu biende bionsu uvua amu Yozefe. Yozefe uvua nsongalume wa mpala muimpe mutambe, mumanye mua kusomba ne bantu." 
Genesis39:7 Mukaji wa Potifare umona mushindu uvua Yozefe, kumualakanaye bua kulala nende." 
Genesis39:8 Yozefe kubenga kashidi, umuambila ne: — Mfumuanyi mmunteke mulombodi wa bintu biende bionsu. Udi munnange." 
Genesis39:9 Mu nzubu emu katshiena utangila tshintu nansha tshimue. Tudi nende ne bumfumu bua mushindu umue ku bintu bionsu, pa kukumusha wewe, bualu udi mukajende. Nanku tshiena mua kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu bibi, kubunda tshibawu bunene nunku!" 
Genesis39:10 Mukaji awu uvua utatshisha amu kutatshisha Yozefe matuku onsu, umusengelela bua ashale bayende. Kadi Yozefe uvua ubenga amu kubenga kashidi." 
Genesis39:11 Dituku dikuabu Yozefe uvua ubuela mu nzubu bua kuenza mudimu wende. Kamuvua muena mudimu mukuabu to. 
Genesis39:12 Mukaji wa Potifare kumukuata mu muntumpu, umuambila ne: — Ndi musue, ungangate. Kadi Yozefe kunyema lubilu, kupatuka pa mbelu, kumushiya ne muntumpu mu bianza." 
Genesis39:13 Mukaji umona Yozefe upatuka pa mbelu, umushiya ne muntumpu mu bianza," 
Genesis39:14 kubikilaye bena mudimu bende bonsu, wela mbila, ubambila ne: — Luayi, numone muena Ebrewu, udi bayanyi muteke mu nzubu emu bua kuenza mudimu, udi musue kumpotela. Mmufike mu nzubu emu, munkuate bua ngikale mukajende. Kadi ngamueledi mbila." 
Genesis39:15 Diba diumvuye ngela mbila nnubikila, wapatuku lubilu, kushiya ne muntumpu wende panshi, muaba undi ewu." 
Genesis39:16 Mukaji kulama muntumpu wa Yozefe too ne pafiki bayende. 
Genesis39:17 Kulondelaye bayende bualu abu, umuambila ne: “Mupika muena Ebrewu ewu, uudi muteke mu nzubu muetu, mmumpotele, mundenge pambidi, bua ngikale mukajende." 
Genesis39:18 Kadi pangabikidi bantu ngela mbila, kunyemaye, ushiya muntumpu wende panshi muaba umvua.”" 
Genesis39:19 Potifare umvua muvua muena kuende umulondela bionsu bivua Yozefe muenze abi, kufikaye munda bikole bitambe." 
Genesis39:20 Kukuatshishaye Yozefe, kumuelesha mu nzubu wa lukanu, muaba uvua bena lukanu bakuabu ba mukalenga. Yozefe kubuela mu nzubu wa lukanu wa ditunga." 
Genesis39:21 Maweja-Nangila uvua mulame Yozefe bimpe, uvua mumutokele ku muoyi nansha muaba awu. Uvua umututshisha dikasa dimpe kudi mulombodi ba balami ba bena lukanu." 
Genesis39:22 Mulombodi awu kuteka Yozefe mutangidi wa bena lukanu bakuabu bonsu. Amu yeye ke uvua uludika midimu yonsu ivua bena lukanu benza. 
Genesis39:23 Mulombodi wa balami ba bena lukanu awu katshivua ulondolola bionsu bivua kudi Yozefe to, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua ne Yozefe, umutatshisha diakalenga mu bionsu bivuaye wenza." 
Genesis40:1 Malu onsu mamane kujika, dituku dikuabu bantu babidi bavua ne muanzu mu bukalenga bua Ejipitu, kuenzela mukalenga tshilema tshinene. Umue uvua mutangidi wa bantu bavua balongolola maluvu a mukalenga, mukuabu mutangidi wa bantu bavua balambila mukalenga biakudia." 
Genesis40:2 Mukalenga kubafikila munda bikole. 
Genesis40:3 Kubeleshaye mu nzubu wa lukanu, kua Potifare, mu nzubu muvuabu balamine Yozefe." 
Genesis40:4 Mulombodi wa bena lukanu, kupesha Yozefe bantu babidi abu bua kubalama. Bavua bashala mu lukanu mataku makumbane." 
Genesis40:5 Bena lukanu babidi abu, kulota bilota bishilangane dituku dimue." 
Genesis40:6 Butshia dinda, Yozefe ufika bua kubatangila, kubasangana babungame." 
Genesis40:7 Yozefe kubakonka ne: — Lelu nudi babungame nenku bua tshinyi? 
Genesis40:8 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Tudi balote bilota, kadi tudi bapange muaba ewu muntu udi mua kutujinguluilabi. Yozefe kubambila ne: — Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mumanye mua kujingulula bilota. Kadi ndondelayi munudi balote." 
Genesis40:9 Mutangidi wa bantu bavua balongolola maluvu a mukalenga, kuawila Yozefe tshilota tshiende, umuambila ne: — Ndi mulote: mmone mutshi wa maluvu a mvinyo kumpala kuanyi," 
Genesis40:10 muikale ne matamba asatu. Matamba awu kusampila, kuela bilongu, kukuama tumuma tumane kuboba." 
Genesis40:11 Mvua kabidi ne dikopu dia mukalenga ku bianza. Mvua mpola tumuma atu, nkamina mayi mu dikopu adi bua kudipesha mukalenga." 
Genesis40:12 Yozefe kumuambila ne: — Dijingulula dia tshilota tshiebe didi nunku: matamba asatu adi aleja matuku asatu. 
Genesis40:13 Papita matuku asatu, mukalenga neakufuile luse, neakuenzele bimpe bipite. Neampingaje ku mudimu webe. Neumupe maluvu bu muuvua wenza kale." 
Genesis40:14 Pawapingana ku mudimu webe, umvuluke, ungakuile kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bua ampatule mu nzubu wa lukanu emu." 
Genesis40:15 Mbangumushishe ku bukole kuetu ku bena Ebrewu. Mbamfikishe kunu, bangela mu nzubu wa lukanu, tshiyi ne bualu bundi muenze." 
Genesis40:16 Mutangidi wa balambi ba biakudia bia mukalenga umvua ne: Yozefe mmujingulule tshilota atshi bimpe bitambe, kuambilaye Yozefe ne: — Meme kabidi mvua mulote tshianyi tshilota. Mu tshilota tshianyi, mvua muambule mu mutu bisaka bisatu bia mampa." 
Genesis40:17 Mu tshisaka tshivua pa mutu pa bionsu, muvua mikata tente ivua mukalenga munange. Kadi nyunyi ya mulu kulua kuzokola mikata ayi mu tshisaka pavuatshi pa mutu wanyi." 
Genesis40:18 Yozefe kumuambila ne: — Dijingulula dia tshilota tshiebe didi nunku: bisaka bisatu bidi bileja matuku asatu. 
Genesis40:19 Papita matuku asatu, mukalenga neabandishe mutu webe, akulembeleje ku mutshi mule. Nyunyi neyizokole munyinyi webe." 
Genesis40:20 Matuku asatu akumbana, mukalenga kuenza tshibilu tshia diledibua diende. Kulambishilaye balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bonsu biakudia. Mukalenga kubandisha bena lukanu babidi abu milongu, bantu bonsu aba batangile: ke mutangidi wa balongolodi ba maluvu a mukalenga, ne mutangidi wa balambi ba biakudia bia mukalenga." 
Genesis40:21 Mukalenga kupingaja mutangidi wa balongolodi ba maluvu ku mudimu wende, bua amupe tshiakabidi dikopu mu bianza." 
Genesis40:22 Kadi kuowaye mutangidi wa balambi ba biakudia bia mukalenga. Bionsu kuenzeka amu muvua Yozefe muambe. 
Genesis40:23 Kadi mutangidi wa balongolodi ba maluvu a mukalenga, uvua mupue Yozefe muoyi kashidi." 
Genesis41:1 Kupita bidimu bibidi, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kulota tshilota: uvua ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile." 
Genesis41:2 Kumonaye ngombe muanda mutekete ya mubidi muimpe, ipatuka ku musulu wa Nile, yenda idia bisosa ku muelelu wa mayi." 
Genesis41:3 Kumonaye kabidi ngombe mikuabu muanda mutekete minyane ipatuka mu musulu awu, imana muaba uvua ngombe ya mubidi muimpe." 
Genesis41:4 Ngombe muanda mutekete ivua minyane, kudia ngombe muanda mutekete ivua ne mubidi muimpe. Diakamue mukalenga kutabuluka ku tulu." 
Genesis41:5 Uteka kabidi mutu panshi, kulota tshilota tshibidi. Kumonaye miepu ya mponda muanda mutekete mimpe, minene, mikale ku lukolakola lumue." 
Genesis41:6 Kumonaye kabidi miepu mikuabu ya mponda muanda mutekete mishawuke, mifubisha kudi lupepela lua mu tshipela." 
Genesis41:7 Miepu ya mponda muanda mutekete ivua mifubisha kudi lupepela ayi, kuminayi miepu ya mponda muanda mutekete ivua ne mubidi muimpe. Ke mukalenga kutabuluka ku tulu, kujadika ne: ndi mulote bilota." 
Genesis41:8 Butshia dinda, mukalenga kupampakana bikole bua bilota abi. Kubikidisha benji ba majimbu bonsu ne bena meji ba mu ditunga diende, ubawila bilota abi. Kadi kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua mua kumujinguluila bilota abi to." 
Genesis41:9 Diba adi mutangidi wa balongolodi ba maluvu a mukalenga kuambila mukalenga ne: — Mukalenga, lelu ndi ntonda bubi bumvua muenze." 
Genesis41:10 Dituku dikuabu uvua mutuele meme ne mutangidi wa balambi ba biakudia biebe mu nzubu wa lukanu, bualu uvua mutufikile munda. Tuvua mu nzubu wa lukanu kua mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mu bukalenga." 
Genesis41:11 Tuetu babidi tuvua balote bilota bishilangane butuku bumue. 
Genesis41:12 Nsongalume mukuabu mupika, muena Ebrewu, uvua netu mu nzubu wa lukanu amu, wenzela mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mu bukalenga mudimu. Tuetu kumuawila ndota yetu. Yeye kujinguluila muntu yonsu ndota yende." 
Genesis41:13 Nanku malu onsu kukumbana menemene muvuaye mutuambile. Meme kupingana muaba wanyi wa mudimu. Utuvua nende kumowabu. 
Genesis41:14 Mukalenga kubikidisha Yozefe. Kumupatulabu lukasa mu nzubu wa lukanu. Yozefe kubeya miedi, kushintulula bilamba, kuya kudileja kudi mukalenga." 
Genesis41:15 Mukalenga kuambila Yozefe ne: — Ndi mulote ndota. Kakuena muntu udi mua kuyinjinguluila. Kadi ndi mumvue ne: wewe udi mumanye mua kujingulula ndota. 
Genesis41:16 Yozefe kuandamuna ne: — Meme tshiena mua kuenza nanku to. Amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mua kujingulula ndota yebe biakane. 
Genesis41:17 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuawila Yozefe ndota, wamba ne: — Ndi mulote nunku: mvua muimane ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile." 
Genesis41:18 Meme kumona ngombe muanda mutekete ya mubidi muimpe, ipatuka mu musulu wa Nile, yenda idia bisosa ku muelelu wa mayi." 
Genesis41:19 Meme kumona kabidi ngombe mikuabu muanda mutekete minyane bikole, ipatuka kabidi mu mayi. — Tshiena muanji kumona ngombe mibi ya mushindu ewu mu ditunga dia Ejipitu to. —" 
Genesis41:20 Ngombe ivua minyane bikole ayi, kumina ngombe muanda mutekete ivua ne mubidi muimpe." 
Genesis41:21 Kadi ngombe ivua minyane bikole mimane kudia ngombe muanda mutekete ya mubidi muimpe ayi, ivua mishale anu bu idi kayiyi midie tshintu. Mubidi wayi kauvua mushintuluke to. Diakamue meme kutabuluka ku tulu." 
Genesis41:22 Mpingana kabidi ku tulu, meme kumona miepu ya mponda muanda mutekete mimpe, minene, mikale ku lukolakola lumue." 
Genesis41:23 Meme kumona kabidi miepu ya mponda mikuabu muanda mutekete mishawuke, mifubidile ne lupepela lua mu tshipela." 
Genesis41:24 Miepu ivua mifubidile ayi, kuminayi miepu muanda mutekete ivua ne mubidi muimpe. Nkadi mumane kuawila bena majimbu ndota ayi. Kabena banjinguluila to." 
Genesis41:25 Yozefe kuambila mukalenga ne: — Bilota biebe bibidi bidi bileja bualu bumue. Mvidi Mukulu udi ukumanyisha malu adiye musue kuenza. 
Genesis41:26 Ngombe ya mubidi muimpe muanda mutekete ne miepu ya mponda mimpe muanda mutekete bidi bileja bidimu muanda mutekete. Nanku bilota biebe bibidi bidi amu bu tshilota tshimue. 
Genesis41:27 Ngombe mikuabu minyane muanda mutekete ne miepu ya mponda muanda mutekete ivua mifubishe kudi lupepela, bidi bileja kabidi bidimu muanda mutekete, kadi mbia tshiyole tshia nzala." 
Genesis41:28 Mukalenga, ndi mumane kukuambila ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mukuleje malu adiye musue kuenza." 
Genesis41:29 Bidimu muanda mutekete bidi kumpala eku, mu Ejipitu monsu nemuikale biakudia bia bungi." 
Genesis41:30 Kadi bidimu bikuabu muanda mutekete bidi bilonda, biakudia bionsu nebijike. Bantu kabakuvuluka kabidi ne: tuvua ne biakudia bivule mu Ejipitu to. Tshiyole tshikole tshia nzala atshi netshibutule ditunga." 
Genesis41:31 Bua bukole bua tshiyole atshi, mu Ejipitu bantu kabakumanya kabidi ne: kuikala ne biakudia bivule nkuikala munyi." 
Genesis41:32 Paudi mulote ndota ayi mishindu ibidi ya momumue, umanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kujadika bualu ebu, kabidi neabukumbaje lukasa." 
Genesis41:33 Mukalenga, mpindiewu mbimpe ukebe muntu udi ne lungenyi ne meji, umupe muanzu wa kutangila bena Ejipitu bonsu." 
Genesis41:34 Patshidi bantu ne biakudia bia bungi mu bidimu ebi muanda mutekete, usungule balombodi ba bantu bua basangishe tshia bitanu tshimue tshia biakudia bidi bena Ejipitu bonsu banowa." 
Genesis41:35 Basangishe biakudia ebi mu bidimu ebi muanda mutekete bidi kumpala. Bunguije ntete ya kuenza bukula mu mayeba mu bimenga, bayilamemu, wewe wikale ubatangila." 
Genesis41:36 Biakudia abi nebiambuluishe bantu badi mu Ejipitu mu bidimu muanda mutekete bia tshiyole. Nzala kayakubutula bantu to. 
Genesis41:37 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, kuitaba bionsu bivua Yozefe mubambile." 
Genesis41:38 Mukalenga kuambila balombodi ne: — Muntu ewu udi muwule ne Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Katuena mua kupeta muntu mukuabu udi mupite Yozefe to. 
Genesis41:39 Pashishe mukalenga kuambila Yozefe ne: — Bu mudi Mvidi Mukulu mukuleje bintu abi, kakuena muntu mukuabu udi mua kukupua ku lungenyi ne meji to." 
Genesis41:40 Wewe ne wikale mulombodi munene wa mu bukalenga buanyi. Bantu banyi bonsu nebitabe mikenji yebe. Meme nenkupite amu ku bumfumu buanyi. 
Genesis41:41 Ndi nkupesha mpindiewu bumfumu bua ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. 
Genesis41:42 Ke mukalenga kukopola kakanu kende ka bukalenga, kukela Yozefe ku munu. Ku-muvuadikaye ne tshilamba tshinefuke tshia ndanda. Kumuelaye bilengejilu bia mpawungi mu nshingu." 
Genesis41:43 Kumubandishaye mu ditempu divuabu babande amu kudi tshindonda tshiende. Bantu bavua banyema badianjidila kumpala kuende, bela mbila, bamba ne: “Mushilayi njila, apite”. Ke muvua Yozefe mupete bumfumu bua ditunga dijima dia bena Ejipitu nanku." 
Genesis41:44 Mukalenga kuambila kabidi Yozefe ne: — Meme ndi nshala mukalenga wa ditunga. Kadi muntu nansha umue kena mua kubulula mukana mu ditunga emu, kayi ne dianyisha diebe." 
Genesis41:45 Kuinyikaye Yozefe dina dia bena Ejipitu dia Safnate-Paneya. Kumuseleshaye ne mukaji, dina diende Asnate, muana wa mutuangaji Potifera wa mu tshimenga tshia One. Kutuadija mu tshikondu atshi, Yozefe uvua mua kuendakana mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:46 Pa wabu bamufite kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu apu, Yozefe uvua ne bidimu makumi asatu. Ke Yozefe kulayangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kutuadija kuendakana, utangila midimu mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:47 Bidimu muanda mutekete bilondangane, ditunga dia Ejipitu divua ne biakudia bipite bungi." 
Genesis41:48 Yozefe kuambuisha biakudia bionsu bivua mu misoku ya ku mpenga, kubisangisha muaba umue, mu mayeba avua mu bimenga bia Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:49 Yozefe uvua musangishe ntete ya kuenza bukula mipite bungi, bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi, ludi muntu kayi mua kubala to." 
Genesis41:50 Tshiyole tshia nzala katshiyi tshianji kuenzeka, Yozefe kulela bana ba balume babidi ne mukajende Asnate, muana wa Potifera, mutuangaji wa mu tshimenga tshia One." 
Genesis41:51 Yozefe kuinyika muanende muanabute ne: Menashe, wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmumpe tshipua muoyi bua makenga anyi, ne bua dishiyangana dianyi ne bena kuetu. ”" 
Genesis41:52 Kuinyikaye muana muibidi ne: Efrayime, wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmumpe lulelu mu ditunga edi, dimvua musombe mu dikenga dinene.”" 
Genesis41:53 Bidimu muanda mutekete bia biakudia bia bungi kupita. 
Genesis41:54 Bidimu bikuabu muanda mutekete bia tshiyole tshia nzala kutuadija bu muvua Yozefe mumane kuamba. Tshiyole kufika mu matunga makuabu onsu. Kadi biakudia bivua mu Ejipitu. 
Genesis41:55 Diba diabuedi tshiyole tshia nzala mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bena Ejipitu kulomba biakudia kudi mukalenga wabu. Yeye kubatuma kudi Yozefe, ubandamuna bonsu ne: “Lombayi kudi Yozefe. Nuenze bidiye unuambila. ”" 
Genesis41:56 Tshiyole tshia nzala atshi kutampakana mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. Nanku Yozefe kunzulula nzubu ya mayeba, bua bantu basumbe biakudia. Kadi tshiyole tshivua tshienda tshipite bukole mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis41:57 Bu muvua tshiyole atshi tshikole, tshibutula buloba bujima, bantu ba matunga onsu kufika kudi Yozefe mu Ejipitu bua kusumba biakudia." 
Genesis42:1 Yakobe umvua ne: biakudia bidi mu Ejipitu, kuambilaye bana bende ba balume ne: — Nukadi basombe tshianana, kanuyi ne tshinudi nuenza." 
Genesis42:2 Ndi mumvue bamba ne: mu Ejipitu mudi ntete ya kuenza bukula. Ndayi nutusumbile ntete ayi bua tumone mua kushala ne muoyi. Katuena basue kufua to. 
Genesis42:3 Bakulu ba Yozefe dikumi, kuya mu Ejipitu bua kusumba biakudia. —" 
Genesis42:4 Kadi Yakobe kavua musue bua baye mu Ejipitu ne Binyamine, muakunyi wa Yozefe wa mamuende to. Uvua utshina ne: Binyamine kapetshi diakabi mu njila. —" 
Genesis42:5 Bana ba Yakobe kufika mu Ejipitu pamue ne bantu bakuabu, bua kusumba ntete ya kuenza bukula, bualu tshiyole tshia nzala tshivua mu ditunga dijima dia Kenaane." 
Genesis42:6 Bafika mu Ejipitu, kudielabu mpala panshi kumpala kua Yozefe, bualu yeye ke uvua utangila ditunga adi dijima, usumbisha bantu benyi bonsu biakudia." 
Genesis42:7 Yozefe umona bana babu, kubamanya. Kadi kavua mudimanyishe kudibu nansha. Kubakanyinaye, ubebeja ne: — Nudi nufuma penyi? Kuandamunabu ne: — Tudi bumukile mu Kenaane. Tudi basue kusumba biakudia munemu." 
Genesis42:8 Yozefe uvua mumanye bana babu. Kadi bobu kabatshiwa bamumanye nansha. 
Genesis42:9 Yozefe kuvuluka bilota bivuaye mulotele bana babu. Kubambilaye ne: — Nuenu nudi batentekedi. Nudi bafike munemu bua kumanya miaba ya kubuelela ne mvita mu ditunga edi. 
Genesis42:10 Ke bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Kabiena nanku to, Mukalenga. Tuetu tudi bafike munemu anu bua kusumba biakudia." 
Genesis42:11 Tuetu katuena batentekedi to. Tudi bantu ba nsongu. Tudi bonsu bana ba tatu umue. 
Genesis42:12 Yozefe kubambila kabidi ne: — Nudi nushima! Nudi batentekedi. Nudi nukeba miaba ya kubuelela ne mvita mu ditunga edi. 
Genesis42:13 Bobu bavua bamuambila amu kumuambila ne: — Kabiena nanku nansha kakese. Tuetu tudi tufuma mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Tuvua bana dikumi ne babidi ba tatu umue. Muakunyetu wa mukala mmushale kudi tatu. Kadi muakunyetu mukuabu ukadi mumane kufua. 
Genesis42:14 Yozefe kubambila ne: — Ndi ngamba bulelela ne: nudi batentekedi. 
Genesis42:15 Kadi ndi musue kunuteta. Ndi nditshipa ne: bu mudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne muoyi, kanuena mua kumuka mu ditunga edi, muanenu muana wa mukala awu kayi mufike to." 
Genesis42:16 Nanku tumayi muntu umue wa kunudi, aye kumukeba. Kadi nuenu badi bashale, nubuele mu nzubu wa lukanu. Ke mundi mua kujadika ne: binudi bambe mbia bushuwa. Padibi kabiyi nanku, ndi njadika ne mutshipu ne: bu mudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne muoyi, nudi batentekedi." 
Genesis42:17 Yozefe kubelesha bonsu mu lukanu matuku asatu. 
Genesis42:18 Dituku disatu, Yozefe kubambila ne: — Meme ndi nnemeka Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku bua nuenu kuikala ne muoyi, nuitabe tshindi nnuambila." 
Genesis42:19 Panuikala bantu ba nsongu, nuanyishe bua muntu umue wa kunudi ashale mu lukanu emu. Kadi bakuabu bonsu baye ne ntete ya kuenza bukula ku Kenaane, bua kuyipesha bena meku enu badi bafua nzala." 
Genesis42:20 Pashishe nuenu bafike ne muakunyenu udi mushale awu, nenjadike ne: nudi nuamba bulelela. Nanku kanuakufua to. Bana babu kuanyisha muvuaye wamba amu." 
Genesis42:21 Kuambilanganabu ne: — Ee, mbatunyoke mpindiewu, bualu tuvua bakengeshe muakunyetu Yozefe. Yeye kututendakena ulomba luse, tuetu kubenga kumufuila luse. Ke mutudi lelu mu dikenga amu dia momumue." 
Genesis42:22 Rubene kubavuluija ne: — Mvua munuambile ne: kanuenzedi muana ewu bibi to. Nuenu kubenga kunteleja. Mpindiewu bakadi batusombuela, bua lufu luende." 
Genesis42:23 Kabavua bamanye ne: Yozefe udi umvua bitudi tuamba to, bualu Yozefe uvua ne muntu uvua wandamuna mu muakulu wabu bivuaye uyukila nabu." 
Genesis42:24 Yozefe kubashiya mutantshi bua kuya kudila. Yozefe upingana, kubambilaye ne: “Ndi ndama Shimeyone.” Kumusuikishaye nkanu, bobu batangile." 
Genesis42:25 Yozefe kubuwujila bibombi biabu tente ne ntete ya kuenza bukula. Kupingajilaye kabidi muntu yonsu makuta ende mu tshibombi tshiende. Kutumaye kabidi diyi bua babape bia kudiabu mu njila. Kuenzekabi nanku. 
Genesis42:26 Bana babu ne Yozefe kuambuisha tumelu tuabu bibombi bia ntete ya kuenza bukula abi, kupingana ku Kenaane." 
Genesis42:27 Bimane mu njila diba dia kulala, umue wa kudibu usulula tshibombi tshiende bua kupesha mpunde wende biakudia, kumona makuta ende mateka ku mibangubangu ya tshibombi." 
Genesis42:28 Kubikilaye bana babu, wamba ne: — Tangilayi: mbampingajile makuta anyi. Ngowu aa mu tshibombi tshianyi. Bana babu kupampakana, kumvua bowa. Kukonkanganabu ne: “Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mutuenzele nunku ntshinyi?”" 
Genesis42:29 Bafika ku Kenaane kuvua tatuabu Yakobe, kumulondelabu muvua luendu luabu lujima. Bavua bamba ne:" 
Genesis42:30 — Mulombodi wa ditunga dia Ejipitu uvua ututandisha bikole, utuamba ne: nudi batentekedi." 
Genesis42:31 Tuetu kumuandamuna ne: “Tuetu katuena batentekedi. Tudi bantu ba nsongu. 
Genesis42:32 Tudi basombe mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Tuvua bana dikumi ne babidi ba tatu umue. Muakunyetu wa mukala mmushale kudi tatu. Kadi mukuabu ukadi mumane kufua!” 
Genesis42:33 Mulombodi awu uvua musue kujadika mutudi bantu badi bamba malu malelela. Kutuambilaye ne: “Bua meme kujadika ne: nudi nuamba malu malelela, ndi nkuata muanenu umue lukole. Bakuabu bonsu baye ne ntete ya kuenza bukula ku Kenaane bua kupesha bena meku enu, bualu badi bafua nzala." 
Genesis42:34 Kadi nupingane ne muakunyenu wa mukala udi mushale, bua meme kujadika ne: kanuena batentekedi, kadi bantu ba nsongu. Pashishe, nendekele muanenu Shimeyone undi mukuate lukole. Nanku nenumone mua kuendakana mu ditunga emu bua kusumba bintu bienu.”" 
Genesis42:35 Kutuadijabu kusukumuna biakudia bivua mu bibombi. Muntu yonsu kusangana mu tshibombi tshiende makuta ende. Bowa kubenza pavuabu bamona makuta awu. Bowa kukuata ne tatuabu Yakobe. 
Genesis42:36 Tatuabu Yakobe kubambila ne: — Nuambutuidi bana banyi babidi: Yozefe kufua, Shimeyone kenaku! Mpindiewu nudi basue kuya kabidi ne Binyamine. Anu meme nkayanyi makenga bungi nunku!" 
Genesis42:37 Rubene kuambila tatuende ne: — Mpesha Binyamine. Pangikala tshiyi mupingane nende, neushipe bana banyi ba balume babidi." 
Genesis42:38 Yakobe kubenga, wamba ne: — Kanuena nuya ne Binyamine wanyi to. Muanabu ukadi mufue. Yeye ke undi mushale nende. Bu yeye mupete dikasa dibi, panudi nuya nende apu, nenunshipeshe meme mukulumpe bua kanyinganyinga ka lufu luende." 
Genesis43:1 Tshiyole tshia nzala kupita bukole mu Kenaane. 
Genesis43:2 Ntete ya kuenza bukula, ivua bana ba Yakobe basumbe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, kujika yonsu. Ke Yakobe kuambila bana bende ne: — Pinganayi kabidi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu bua kutusumbila biakudia bikuabu." 
Genesis43:3 Yuda kuandamuna tatuende ne: — Mulombodi wa ditunga dia Ejipitu uvua mutudimuja, wamba ne: panuikala kanuyi bafike ne muakunyenu wa mukala awu, kanufiki kabidi kundi to." 
Genesis43:4 Nanku bua tuetu kuya kusumba biakudia, anu tuetu baye ne Binyamine." 
Genesis43:5 Kadi wewe mubenge, katuena tuya mu Ejipitu to. Bualu mulombodi uvua mutuambile ne: “Panuikala kanuyi ne muakunyenu wa mukala awu, kanufiki kabidi kundi to.”" 
Genesis43:6 Yakobe kubakonka ne: — Munuvua bamuambile ne: tudi ne muakunyetu wa mukala mbishi? Nudi bangenzele bibi be. 
Genesis43:7 Bana kumuandamuna ne: — Mulombodi awu uvua mutuele amu kutuela nkonku ya bungi, utuebeja ne: “Tatuenu utshidi ne muoyi anyi? Nudi ne muanenu mukuabu wa balume anyi?” Tuvua amu bamuandamune ku nkonku yende yonsu. Katuvua batshinke ne: neatuambile ne: nufike ne muanenu." 
Genesis43:8 Yuda kuambila kabidi tatuende ne: — Tatu, anyisha tuye ne Binyamine. Patudi tuya, ke patudi mua kupanda, nansha wewe, nansha tuetu, nansha kabidi bana betu. Katuena basue kufua to." 
Genesis43:9 Ndi njadika ne: meme nkayanyi nemmulame. Umunkonke amu meme. Pandi tshiyi nkupingajilaye, nengikale muena tshibawu kashidi kumpala kuebe." 
Genesis43:10 Bu tuetu katuyi banengakane bikole, tuvua mua kuikala bamane kuya bapingane ne biakudia misangu ibidi." 
Genesis43:11 Yakobe kuambila bana bende ne: — Padibi nanku, angatayi bintu bia mushinga mukole bia mu ditunga dietu: kamonya, buitshi, ndundu, manananshi, ne bimuma bia amande. Nubiele mu bibombi bienu bua kutuadila muena Ejipitu awu." 
Genesis43:12 Pashishe, nuangate makuta a kusumba biakudia ne makuta avuabu banupingajile mu bibombi bienu awu, bualu badi mua kuikala batupakane." 
Genesis43:13 Nuangate kabidi ne muakunyenu Binyamine, nuye nende kudi muntu awu." 
Genesis43:14 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu akaje muoyi wa muntu awu, bua anufuile luse, nupingane ne Binyamine, kabidi ne Shimeyone bonsu babidi kuneku. Kadi meme nkadi mumane kufuisha muananyi. Nenshale bu muntu uvua kayi mulele anyi?" 
Genesis43:15 Bana ba Yakobe kuangata bintu abi, ne makuta a kusumba biakudia, kabidi ne avuabu babapingajile awu. Kuangatabu kabidi ne muakunyabu Binyamine. Kuyabu ne bintu bionsu abi kudi Yozefe mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis43:16 Yozefe umona bana babu bafike ne Binyamine, kuambilaye muena mudimu wende ne: — Uye ne benyi banyi kuanyi. Ushipe nyama, ulambe biakudia. Munda munya netudie nabu." 
Genesis43:17 Muena mudimu kuya ne benyi abu ku nzubu, bu muvua Yozefe muambe." 
Genesis43:18 Benyi abu kubuela mu nzubu wa Yozefe anu ne bowa, bela meji ne: “Tudi bafike muaba ewu bua makuta avuabu bele mu bibombi bietu pa diba dituafiki musangu wa kumpala. Mbatubueje munu bua kutukuata ne kutukengesha. Nebatunyenge mpunde yetu, batukuate mu bupika.”" 
Genesis43:19 Nanku kusemenabu kudi muena mudimu wa Yozefe uvua mu mushiku wa mbelu, bamuambila ne:" 
Genesis43:20 — Mukalenga, utufuile luse, tuetu aba tuvua bafike munemu musangu wa kumpala bua kusumba biakudia." 
Genesis43:21 Pashishe patudi tupingana kuetu, mu njila, butuku buila, tuetu kulala. Patudi tunzulula bibombi bietu, muntu yonsu wa kutudi udi usangana amu makuta ende, avuaye mutule bua kusumba biakudia, ku mibangubangu ya tshibombi tshiende. Kadi makuta awu tudi nawu muaba ewu mpindiewu." 
Genesis43:22 Tudi kabidi ne makuta makuabu a kusumba biakudia. Kadi katuena bamanye uvua mutupingajile makuta mu bibombi to! 
Genesis43:23 Muena mudimu awu kubakolesha ku muoyi, wamba ne: — Kanupampakanyi to! Nuikale ne ditalala! Nuvua bampeshe makuta enu, ndi nawu! Kadi Mvidi Mukulu wenu, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, ke udi mulongolole makuta mu bibombi bienu. Muena mudimu kupatula kabidi Shimeyone mu lukanu." 
Genesis43:24 Kubuejaye bana babu bonsu ne Yozefe mu nzubu muende. Kubapeshaye mayi a kuowa ku makasa. Kufilaye kabidi ne bisosa bia kudisha mpunde yabu. 
Genesis43:25 Bana ba Yakobe bamona nanku, kudianjilabu kulongolola bintu bivuabu batuadile Yozefe. Bualu bavua bumvue ne: neafike mu munya bua kudia netu." 
Genesis43:26 Yozefe ufika ku nzubu kuende, kudielabu panshi kumpala kuende, kumulambula bintu biabu." 
Genesis43:27 Yozefe kubakonka ne: — Nudi ne bukole bua mubidi anyi? Tatuenu unuvua bangambile ne: utshidi ne muoyi, udi bimpe anyi? Utshidipu anyi?" 
Genesis43:28 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Tatu, muntu webe, udi anu bimpe. Udi ne muoyi. Kudielabu panshi tshiakabidi." 
Genesis43:29 Yozefe ubanduluka, kumona Binyamine, muakunyende wa mamuende, uvuaye mushile dibele. Kuebejaye ne: — Ewu ke Binyamine, muakunyenu wa mukala, unuvua bangambile anyi? Kuambilaye Binyamine ne: — Muananyi, Mvidi Mukulu akuele lupemba!" 
Genesis43:30 Yozefe kubuela lukasa mu nzubu wa kulala udila. Bualu uvua ne tshintekateka bua muakunyende uvuaye mumone. 
Genesis43:31 Yozefe ujikija kudila, kuowaye mayi ku mesu, kupatuka mu nzubu, kudikankamika, kulomba biakudia." 
Genesis43:32 Kadi Yozefe uvua udiila ku ende mesa pa nkayende, bana babu ku makuabu mesa. Bena Ejipitu bavua Yozefe mubikile, kudia kabidi pa nkayabu. Bualu malongesha abu a pa malu a Mvidi Mukulu avua makandike bena Ejipitu bua kudiila pamue ne bena Ebrewu." 
Genesis43:33 Bana ba Yakobe bavua basombe batangilangane ne Yozefe. Kadi bavua bakema bikole bua mushindu uvuabu babasombeshe balondangane ku bidimu, biangatshile ku muanabute too ne ku muanamukala. Bavua batangilangana, bakatshila." 
Genesis43:34 Yozefe kufikisha kabidi ku mesa kuvua bana babu biakudia bivua ku ende. Kadi bivuaye mufikishe kudi Binyamine bivua bipite bia bana babu misangu itanu. Bonsu kunua maluvu, kukuatshika." 
Genesis44:1 Yozefe kuambila mulombodi wa bena mudimu bende ne: — Uwujila bantu aba biakudia bibombi tente, bujitu budi muntu yonsu mua kuambula. Upingaje kabidi ku mibangubangu ya tshibombi makuta avua muntu yonsu mutule." 
Genesis44:2 Mu tshibombi tshia muanamukala, kuena upingajamu amu makuta avuaye mutule to. Udi welamu kabidi dikopu dianyi dia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Mulombodi awu kuenza muvua Yozefe muambe." 
Genesis44:3 Butshia dinda, bana ba Yakobe kuangata mpunde yabu, kupingana kuabu." 
Genesis44:4 Amu bumuka mu tshimenga, kabayi banji kuenda mutantshi mule, Yozefe kuambila mulombodi wa bena mudimu bende ne: — Londakaja bantu abu lukasa, ubapete, ubakonke ne: “Tuetu banuenzele bimpe, nuenu nudi nutuenzela bibi bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis44:5 Bua tshinyi nudi bibe dikopu dia mfumuanyi didiye unuina, ujanduila kabidi ne malu atshi wavua. Nudi benze bibi!”" 
Genesis44:6 Mulombodi wa bena mudimu kupeta bana babu ne Yozefe, kubambila bionsu abi." 
Genesis44:7 Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wetu, udi mua kutusonguela nunku munyi? Tuetu kashidi katuena mua kuenza bualu bua nanku to." 
Genesis44:8 Patumuku kuetu ku Kenaane, tuvua bafike ne makuta avua mu bibombi, atuvua basangane matenteka pa biakudia. Kadi tudi mua kuiba tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha mpawungi bidi mu nzubu mua mukalenga webe bua tshinyi?" 
Genesis44:9 Nanku yonsu wa kutudi, uvua-sangana muikale ne dikopu adi, asangane kufua anyie? Afue! Kabidi tuetu bonsu netushale bapika benu." 
Genesis44:10 Mulombodi wa bena mudimu wa Yozefe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumvue munuambi amu, mbimpe. Kadi amu muntu wa kunudi utudi tusangana ne dikopu adi, neashale mupika wanyi. Bakuabu nebaye kudibu basue." 
Genesis44:11 Kutululabu bibombi biabu panshi lukasa. Muntu yonsu uvua usulula tshibombi tshiende. 
Genesis44:12 Mulombodi wa bena mudimu wa Yozefe kukalula mu bibombi bionsu, bituadije ku tshia muanabute too ne ku tshia muanamukala. Ke kusanganabu dikopu adi mu tshia Binyamine." 
Genesis44:13 Bana babu ne Binyamine kumvua bowa, kudipanda bilamba. Yonsu wa kudibu kupingaja bibombi panyima pa mpunde. Kupinganabu mu tshimenga." 
Genesis44:14 Yuda ne bana babu kufika ku mbelu kua Yozefe, kumusangana amu, muaba awu. Kudielabu panshi kumpala kuende." 
Genesis44:15 Yozefe kubakonka ne: — Nuvua benze nanku bua tshinyi? Kanuena bamanye ne muntu bu mundi emu udi ne bumfumu bua kujandula malu onsu anyi? 
Genesis44:16 Yuda kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wetu, tshitudi mua kuamba ntshinyi bua kukujadikila mutudi babinge. Mvidi Mukulu mmuleje patoke bubi buetu. Udi ne dikopu mu tshibombi tshiende ne tuetu bonsu tudi tushala bapika bebe." 
Genesis44:17 Yozefe kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena mua kuenza nanku to. Ndi nkuata amu muntu uvua ne dikopu awu, neashale mupika. Kadi nuenu bonsu pinganayi ne ditalala kudi tatuenu." 
Genesis44:18 Yuda kusemena pabuipi ne Yozefe, kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, ndi musue kukuambila bualu. Kumfikidi munda to. Wewe udi mulongu umue ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Genesis44:19 Uvua mutukonke musangu wa kumpala ne: “Nudi ne tatuenu, nansha muanenu wa balume mukuabu anyi?”" 
Genesis44:20 Tuetu kuandamuna ne: “Tatu udipu. Ukadi mukulumpe. Tudi kabidi ne muakunyetu wa mukala, uvua tatu mulele ku bukulakaja buende. Mukuluende, uvuaye mulonde, ukadi mufue. Muana awu mmushale amu nkayende wa ku bana ba mukaji uvua tatu mupite kunanga. Ke mudi tatu mumunange ne yeye mene bikole.”" 
Genesis44:21 Uvua mutulombe bua tufike ne muanetu awu bua wewe kumumona. 
Genesis44:22 Nanku tuetu kukuambila ne: Muana awu kena mua kushiyangana ne tatuende to. Yeye mumuke, tatuende udi mua kufua ne kanyinganyinga." 
Genesis44:23 Wewe kutuandamuna ne: Panuikala kanuyi bafike ne muakunyenu awu, kanufiki kabidi kunu to." 
Genesis44:24 Ke tuetu kupingana kuetu, kulondela tatu, muntu webe, malu onsu auvua muambe." 
Genesis44:25 Pavua tatu utupingaja kuneku mbua kusumba biakudia," 
Genesis44:26 tuetu kubenga, tumuambila ne: “Mulombodi wa bena Ejipitu kena mua kutusumbisha biakudia, patudi katuyi baye ne muakunyetu ewu.”" 
Genesis44:27 Tatu kutuandamuna ne: “Muena kuanyi Rakele, uvua mundelele bana ba balume amu babidi." 
Genesis44:28 Umue ukadi mujimine. Misangu mikuabu mbamudie kudi nyama, bualu katshia waya, tshiena mumumone to." 
Genesis44:29 Nuenu nudi basue kabidi kuya ne muana udi mushale ewu. Yeye mupete diakabi, ndi mua kufua ne kanyinganyinga, bualu nkadi muntu mukulumpe.”" 
Genesis44:30 Pashishe Yuda kuambila kabidi Yozefe ne: — Tshiena mua kupingana kudi tatu, tshiyi ne nsongalume ewu to. Muoyi wa tatu udi anu kudi muana ewu." 
Genesis44:31 Nanku udi mua kufua padiye kayi umona muanende. Kabidi netuikale bena tshibawu padi tatu ufua ku bukunda, muikale ne kanyinganyinga." 
Genesis44:32 Bualu bukuabu: meme ke udi tatu mueyekele tshilumbu tshia muanende ewu. Mvua mujadikile tatu ne: “Meme tshiyi mupingane ne muana ewu, nenshale muena tshilumbu kashidi kuudi.”" 
Genesis44:33 Nanku ndi nkusengelela ne: unkuate meme lukole, nshale mupika webe. Ulekele muana, apingane ne bana babu kuetu." 
Genesis44:34 Meme tshiyi ne muana ewu, tshiena mua kupingana kudi tatu to. Tshiena mua kukengesha tatu bikole nanku to." 
Genesis45:1 Yozefe kupanga mua kukolesha muoyi kumpala kua bantu bende. Ke kupatuishaye bantu bonsu pa mbelu, kushala anu nkayende ne bana babu. Kudimanyishaye kudibu." 
Genesis45:2 Yozefe kudila bikole. Muadi wende kumvuika kudi bena Ejipitu bonsu. Bavua bumvue bualu ebu ne mu nzubu wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. 
Genesis45:3 Yozefe kuambila bana babu ne: — Meme ndi Yozefe wenu! Kadi bushuwa tatu wanyi utshidi ne muoyi anyi? Bana babu kuzakala bikole. Kupangabu mua kuandamuna. 
Genesis45:4 Yozefe kubambila ne: — Semenayi pabuipi nanyi. Basemena, kudimanyishaye, wamba ne: — Meme ndi muanenu Yozefe, unuvua bapane bua baye nanyi mu Ejipitu." 
Genesis45:5 Kadi kanutshinyi, kanupampakanyi bua panuvua bampane. Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua muntume kumpala kuenu, bua mmone mua kunupandisha." 
Genesis45:6 Mpindiewu tudi mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia tshiyole. Kumpala eku kutshidi bidimu bikuabu bitanu, bidi bantu kabayi mua kudima nansha kunowa." 
Genesis45:7 Mvidi Mukulu ke udi muntume kumpala kuenu mu ditunga edi bua meme kunulamina biakudia, bua kunupandisha nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu mushindu ewu wa dikema." 
Genesis45:8 Nuenu kanuena bantume munemu to. Anu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi munteke bu diboku dia bukole dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bua meme kutangila bintu bionsu bia mu nzubu muende ne kushala mulombodi wa ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis45:9 Nanku pinganayi lukasa bua kuangata tatu wanyi. Numuambile ne: “Yozefe webe udi wamba ne: Tatu afike kuneku lukasa, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunteke mulombodi wa ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis45:10 Tatu neasombe pabuipi nanyi mu ditunga dia Ngoshene, pamue ne bana bende, bikulu bende, too ne bimuna biende: mikoku, mbuji, ngombe ne bionsu bidiye nabi." 
Genesis45:11 Kuneku meme nemmudishe bimpe, kayi mua kukenga tshintu, yeye ne bena diende bonsu, kabidi ne bimuna biende. Bualu bidimu bikuabu bia tshiyole bitshidi bishale bitanu.”" 
Genesis45:12 Kubambila kabidi ne: — Nuenu bonsu, kadi nangananga wewe Binyamine, nudi bamone ne: Udi wakula nenu ke meme!" 
Genesis45:13 Nanku nuye kumanyisha tatu muanzu undi nawu mu Ejipitu. Numulondele bionsu binudi bamone munemu. Pashishe nupingane ne tatu kuneku lukasa. 
Genesis45:14 Yozefe ne Binyamine kupukilangana, kuasa miadi." 
Genesis45:15 Yozefe kupukila bana babu bonsu, udila amu kudila. Amu diba adi bobu kukimina kuyukila nende." 
Genesis45:16 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumvua lumu lua difika dia bana babu ne Yozefe. Kusankaye pamue ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende. 
Genesis45:17 Kuambilaye Yozefe ne: — Ambila bana benu, bambuishe nyama yabu bujitu lubilu, bapingane mu ditunga dia Kenaane," 
Genesis45:18 bua bangate tatuabu ne diku diende dijima, bafike nende apa. Nembasunguile muaba muimpe udi ne biakudia bia bungi, mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Genesis45:19 Wewe wambile bana benu, bua bangate matempu a munu mu Ejipitu, baye nawu bua kuambuilamu bakaji babu ne bana, kabidi ne tatuabu." 
Genesis45:20 Kabena mua kunyingalala bua bintu biabu bidibu bashiya mu Kenaane to. Bualu bintu bionsu bimpe bidi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu nebikale bienu. 
Genesis45:21 Bana ba Yakobe kuenza bionsu abi. Yozefe kubapesha matempu, bu muvua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muambe, ne bintu bia kudia mu njila." 
Genesis45:22 Kupeshaye muanabu yonsu tshilamba tshimpe. Kadi kupeshaye Binyamine bilamba bitanu, ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nkama isatu." 
Genesis45:23 Pashishe kutuminaye tatuende nyama ya mpunde milume dikumi, miambule bintu bimpe bia mu Ejipitu. Kumutuminaye kabidi nyama ya mpunde mikaji dikumi, miambule ntete ya kuenza bukula, mampa, ne biakudia bikuabu bia tatuende kudia mu njila." 
Genesis45:24 Yozefe kubela bana babu ne: “Kanutandianga-nyi mu njila to.” Kulayanganabu nende, kuya." 
Genesis45:25 Bana babu ne Yozefe kumuka mu Ejipitu, kupingana mu ditunga dia Kenaane, muaba uvua tatuabu Yakobe." 
Genesis45:26 Kuambilabu tatuabu ne: — Muanebe Yozefe utshidi ne muoyi! Yeye ke udi ulombola ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. Yakobe uvua mupuwe kayi wenza bualu! Kavua muitabe bivuabu bamuambile to. 
Genesis45:27 Bana bende kumulondela kabidi bionsu bivua Yozefe mubambile. Yakobe umona matempu avua muanende Yozefe mumutumine, kutukijaye muoyi wa munda." 
Genesis45:28 Kukemaye kabidi, wamba ne: — Mbikumbane! Yozefe wanyi meme utshidi ne muoyi! Ndi musue kumonangana nende, pantshidi ne muoyi apa." 
Genesis46:1 Yakobe kubanga luendu ne bena diende bonsu, kabidi ne bintu bionsu. Bafika ku Bersheba, kuambulaye Mvidi Mukulu wa tatuende Izake milambu." 
Genesis46:2 Butuku abu Mvidi Mukulu kumumuenekela, umuleja malu. Kumubikilaye ne: — Yakobe, Yakobe! Yeye kuitaba ne: — Ke meme ewu." 
Genesis46:3 Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tatuebe Izake. Kutshinyi bua kuya ku Ejipitu to. Nemvudije ndelanganyi yebe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. 
Genesis46:4 Meme nenye nebe mu Ejipitu. Nempatule ndelanganyi yebe mu ditunga adi. Paudi ufua, Yozefe neakujike." 
Genesis46:5 Yakobe kumuka ku Bersheba. Bana bende kumuteka pamue ne bakaji babu ne bana mu matempu avuabu babatumine kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua luendu luabu. 
Genesis46:6 Yakobe kuya mu Ejipitu ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu. Uvua kabidi ne bintu bionsu bivuabu bapete mu ditunga dia Kenaane. 
Genesis46:7 Ke muvua Yakobe muye mu Ejipitu ne bintu biende bionsu, kabidi ne bana bende, ne bikulu bende balume ne bakaji." 
Genesis46:8 Bana ba Yakobe, bavuaye mufike nabu mu Ejipitu, ne bikulu bende, bavua nunku: Rubene, muanende muanabute," 
Genesis46:9 uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: Anoke, Palu, Esrone ne Karmi." 
Genesis46:10 Shimeyone uvua mulele bana ba balume basambombu: Yemuyele, Yamine, Ohade, Yakine, Sohare ne Shawule, muana wa balume uvuaye mulele ne mukaji muena Kenaane." 
Genesis46:11 Levi uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Ngershone, Kehate ne Merari." 
Genesis46:12 Yuda uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Shela, Perese ne Zera. Kadi bana bakuabu ba balume ba Yuda, Ere ne Onane, bakavua bafuile mu Kenaane. Perese uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Esrone ne Amule." 
Genesis46:13 Isakare uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: Tola, Puwa, Yashube ne Shimrone." 
Genesis46:14 Zebulone uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Serede, Elone ne Yaleyele." 
Genesis46:15 Aba ke bana bonsu ba balume bavua Leya mulele ne Yakobe mu Mezopotamiya. Uvua mulele kabidi muana wa bakaji, Diina. Bana bonsu ba Yakobe ne Leya, pamue ne bana bavuabu balele ne bikulu babu, bavua makumi asatu ne basatu." 
Genesis46:16 Ngade uvua mulele bana ba balume muanda mutekete: Sifiyone, Agi, Shuni, Esbone, Eri, Arodi ne Areli." 
Genesis46:17 Ashere uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi ne wa bakaji umue: Imna, Isheva, Isheyi, Beriya ne muanabu wa bakaji Sera. Beriya uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Ebere ne Malkiyele." 
Genesis46:18 Bana aba bonsu dikumi ne basambombu ke ndelanganyi ivua Yakobe mulele ne Zilpa, mukaji mupika uvua Labane mupeshe muanende wa bakaji Leya." 
Genesis46:19 Rakele, mukaji wa Yakobe, uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Yozefe ne Binyamine." 
Genesis46:20 Pavua Yozefe mu Ejipitu, mukajende Asnate, muana wa Potifera, mutuangaji wa mu tshimenga tshia One, uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Menashe ne Efrayime." 
Genesis46:21 Binyamine uvua mulele bana ba balume dikumi: Bela, Bekere, Ashebele, Ngera, Namane, Ehi, Roshe, Upime, Mupime ne Arde." 
Genesis46:22 Bana aba bonsu dikumi ne banayi ke ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, ivuaye mulele ne Rakele." 
Genesis46:23 Dane uvua mulele muana wa balume anu umue, diende Ushime." 
Genesis46:24 Naftali uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: Yasiyele, Nguni, Yesere ne Shileme." 
Genesis46:25 Bana aba bonsu muanda mutekete ke ndelanganyi ivua Yakobe mulele ne Bila, mukaji mupika uvua Labane mupeshe muanende wa bakaji Rakele." 
Genesis46:26 Ndelanganyi yonsu ya Yakobe, iwaye mufike nayi mu Ejipitu, ivua bantu makumi asambombu ne basambombu, katuyi tubale bakaji ba bana ba Yakobe." 
Genesis46:27 Yozefe uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi mu Ejipitu. Nanku ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ivua misombe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu kukumbana bantu makumi muanda mutekete. 
Genesis46:28 Yakobe kutuma Yuda kumpala bua ambile Yozefe ne: tumonangane nebe mu Ngoshene. Pafiki Yakobe ne bena diende mu Ngoshene," 
Genesis46:29 Yozefe kuangata ditempu diende, kuya mu Ngoshene bua kumonangana ne tatuende. Bamonangana, Yozefe kupukila tatuende, kudila musangu mule, mumuele mu tshitupa." 
Genesis46:30 Yakobe kuambila Yozefe ne: — Mpindiewu ngakumonu. Ngajadiki ne: utshidi ne muoyi. Nanku diba dianyi dia lufu diakumbanyi. 
Genesis46:31 Yozefe kuambila bana babu ne bantu bonsu bavua nabu tatuende ne: — Ndi nya kumanyisha mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: tatu ne bena diku dietu bonsu bavua bashale mu Kenaane mbafike munemu. 
Genesis46:32 Nemmumanyishe kabidi ne: mudimu wenu ngwa kumuna bimuna. Nudi bafike ne bimuna bienu ne bintu bienu bionsu. 
Genesis46:33 Panubikila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kunukonka mudimu unudi bamanye," 
Genesis46:34 numuambile ne: tuetu katshia bandela, mudimu wetu udi anu wa kumuna bimuna bu muvua bankambua betu benza. Nanku mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu neitabe bua nusombe mu Ngoshene. Yozefe uvua muambe nanku, bualu bena Ejipitu badi bapepeja bamunyi ba bimuna." 
Genesis47:1 Pashishe Yozefe kuya kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Tatu ne bana betu mbafike ne bimuna biabu, kabidi ne bintu biabu bionsu. Mbafumine ku ditunga dia Kenaane. Mpindiewu mbasombe mu ditunga dia Ngoshene." 
Genesis47:2 Yozefe kuya ne bana babu batanu kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. 
Genesis47:3 Mukalenga kubakonka ne: — Nudi bamanye mudimu kayi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, tuetu tudi bamunyi ba bimuna bu muvua bankambua betu." 
Genesis47:4 Tudi bafike bua kusomba munemu, bualu ku Kenaane kudi tshiyole tshikole, tshiumisha too ne bisosa bia kudisha bimuna bietu. Nanku, anyisha bua tusombele mu Ngoshene." 
Genesis47:5 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuambila Yozefe ne: — Tatuebe ne bana benu mbamane kufika. 
Genesis47:6 Ditunga dia Ejipitu dijima edi ndiebe. Sungula muaba muimpe wa mu ditunga bua basemu. Badi mua kusomba nansha mu Ngoshene. Kadi paudi mumanye ne: munkatshi muabu mudi bantu ba meji, ubateke bikale balama bimuna bianyi." 
Genesis47:7 Yozefe kuya kuleja kabidi tatuende Yakobe kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Yakobe kuela mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muoyi ne kanemu. 
Genesis47:8 Mukalenga kukonka Yakobe ne: — Udi ne bidimu bungi munyi? 
Genesis47:9 Yakobe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muendakane eku ne eku bu muenyi, ne ntatu ne makenga, bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu. Kadi bidimu ebi mbikese, bualu kabiena bungi bua bidimu bia bankambua banyi bavua pabu bendakanyi to." 
Genesis47:10 Yakobe mumane kulayangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kumukaye mu nzubu wa bukalenga." 
Genesis47:11 Yakobe ne bana bende kusomba mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, muaba muimpe uvua Yozefe mubasunguile bua wikale wabu. Bavua basombe pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ramsese, bu muvua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muambe." 
Genesis47:12 Yozefe uvua wambuluisha tatuende, bana babu ne bonsu ba mu diku diabu ne biakudia bilondeshile bungi bua bantu." 
Genesis47:13 Mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ne dia Kenaane muvua tshiyole tshikole. Biakudia kabiyi bimueneka, bantu bonsu bavua bakeba kufua nzala." 
Genesis47:14 Yozefe kusumbisha bena Ejipitu ne bena Kenaane biakudia, wela makuta onsu mu mushete wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Genesis47:15 Bena Ejipitu ne bena Kenaane bamane kujikija makuta onsu ku biakudia, bena Ejipitu kuya kudidila Yozefe, bamba ne: — Enza muebe muonsu mua kuenza bua utupeshe biakudia. Katuena ne makuta kabidi to. Nanku tudi mua kufua ne nzala, wewe mumone. Mbimpe anyi?" 
Genesis47:16 Yozefe kubandamuna ne: — Bu munudi kanuyi ne makuta, tushintakajayi bimuna bienu ne biakudia." 
Genesis47:17 Bena Ejipitu kutuadila Yozefe bimuna biabu: tubalu, mikoku, mbuji, ngombe ne mpunde. Yozefe kushintakaja bimuna abi ne biakudia. Kubapeshaye biakudia bikumbane bua kudia tshidimu tshijima." 
Genesis47:18 Tshidimu atshi tshijike, bena Ejipitu kupingana kabidi kudi Yozefe, bamuambila ne: — Mfumu, kufua bundu nkufua nzala. Makuta atuvua nawu ne bimuna bietu, ukadi mumane kubiangata. Tudi bashale amu ne madimi etu, kabidi ne mibidi yetu." 
Genesis47:19 Katuena mua kufua ne nzala, wewe muikaleku to. Tuetu bafue, mu ditunga kamuakushala kabidi babidime to. Nanku, utusumbe, usumbe kabidi ne madimi etu. Utupe biakudia, tushale bapika ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Utupe ne maminu a kukuna, bua katufu ne nzala, kadi madimi etu mavue kushala tshipela." 
Genesis47:20 Bua bukole bua tshiyole tshia nzala, bena Ejipitu kusumbisha madimi abu onsu kudi Yozefe. Ditunga dijima kushala dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Genesis47:21 Yozefe kubueja bantu mu bupika mu ditunga dijima. 
Genesis47:22 Kadi Yozefe kavua musumbe madimi a batuangaji to. Bualu bavua babadisha kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Kabidi meyi ne mikandu bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bivua bikandika bua kabasumbishi madimi abu. 
Genesis47:23 Yozefe kuambila bena ditunga ne: — Mpindiewu nuenu bonsu nudi bajadike mundi mumane kunusumba, musumbe kabidi ne madimi enu. Nudi bashale bapika ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Nanku, angatayi maminu, nuye kukuna mu madimi." 
Genesis47:24 Kadi, diba dia kunowa, nufile tshia bitanu tshimue tshia bintu abi kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Biakudia bidi bishale mbienu. Nubilame bua maminu. Bikuabu nudie ne bena meku enu bonsu." 
Genesis47:25 Bena Ejipitu kuandamuna Yozefe ne: — Wewe udi mumane kutupandisha. Tukadi bapika ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bualu udi mumane kutufuila luse." 
Genesis47:26 Yozefe kuela mukenji ne: tshia bitanu tshimue tshia biakudia, ntshia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Mukenji ewu utshidiku too ne lelu. Anu madimi a batuangaji kaavua mu dina dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu to." 
Genesis47:27 Bena Izrayele kusomba mu Ejipitu, kuasa mu ditunga dia Ngoshene. Kuvulanganabu bikole, kusumba mpangu." 
Genesis47:28 Yakobe ukumbaja bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete mu Ejipitu, bidimu biende bionsu kuenza lukama makumi anayi ne muanda mutekete." 
Genesis47:29 Yakobe umvua ne: diba dia lufu diakumbanyi, kubikilaye muanende Yozefe, umuambila ne: — Pawikala munnange, kunjiki mu Ejipitu nansha. Kuata muinshi mua tshibelu tshianyi, uditshipe bua kundeja muudi munnange ne mundamate." 
Genesis47:30 Meme mumane kulonda bankambua banyi, angata tshitalu tshianyi, uye kutshijika anu muaba udibu bajike bankambua banyi. Yozefe kuitaba ne: — Eyowa! Nengenze bionsu biudi wamba ebi." 
Genesis47:31 Yakobe kumuambila ne: — Uditshipe bua meme kujadika ne: newenze. Yozefe kuditshipa. Nanku, Yakobe kuela Yozefe tuasakidila, kuinama panshi ku mutu kua bulalu." 
Genesis48:1 Malu onsu aa mamane kujika, kumanyishabu Yozefe bua disama dia tatuende. Yozefe kuangata bana bende ba balume babidi: Efrayime ne Menashe, kuya nabu." 
Genesis48:2 Yakobe upeta lumu lua difika diabu, kudikankamikaye, kusomba pa bulalu." 
Genesis48:3 Kuambilaye Yozefe ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu uvua mummuenekele ku Kenaane mu musoku wa Luze, mungele lupemba." 
Genesis48:4 Uvua mundaye ne: “Neulele bana ba bungi. Ndelanganyi yebe neivulangane, yenza bisamba bivule. Ditunga edi nedishale dienu kashidi. ”" 
Genesis48:5 Yakobe kuamba kabidi ne: — Mpindiewu, ndi ngangata Efrayime ne Menashe, bana bebe baudi mulele, meme tshiyi muanji kufika mu Ejipitu, bua bikale bana banyi meme, amu bu Rubene ne Shimeyone." 
Genesis48:6 Kadi, bana bakuabu baudi mulele, balondangane ne babidi aba, nebikale bebe wewe. Nebapete bintu bia bumpianyi anu mu buloba bua Efrayime ne Menashe." 
Genesis48:7 Bualu pamvua ngumukila ku Mezopotamiya, mamuebe Rakele kufuila mu njila, muaba umvua mu ditunga dia Kenaane, tshiyi muanji kufika mu musoku wa Efrata. Meme kumujika muine amu ku mpenga kua njila (Efrata ke musoku udibu babikila mpindiewu ne: Betleyeme )." 
Genesis48:8 Diakamue Yakobe kumona bana ba balume babidi bavua nabu Yozefe, kumukonka ne: — Bana aba mbanganyi?" 
Genesis48:9 Yozefe kumuambila ne: — Bana aba mbanyi, badi Mvidi Mukulu mumpeshe munu mu Ejipitu. Yakobe kuambila Yozefe ne: — Basemeja apa, mbele lupemba." 
Genesis48:10 Yakobe katshivua umona bimpe to, bualu ukavua muntu mukole. Yozefe kumusemejila bana pabuipi. Yakobe kubupukila," 
Genesis48:11 wambila Yozefe ne: — Tshiena mumanye ne: nenkumone kabidi to. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmungambuluishe. Ngakumonyi wewe, kumona kabidi ne bana bebe." 
Genesis48:12 Yozefe kumbusha bana pambidi pa tatuende, kuinyikaye mutu panshi." 
Genesis48:13 Yozefe kuimanyika bana: Efrayime ku tshianza tshia bakaji tshia Yakobe, Menashe ku tshia balume. Kubasemejaye tshiakabidi kudi Yakobe, kakuabu." 
Genesis48:14 Kadi, Yakobe kupindakaja bianza, kuteka tshianza tshia balume pa mutu pa Efrayime, muana wa mukala, tshia bakaji pa mutu pa Menashe muanabute." 
Genesis48:15 Ke kuelaye Yozefe lupemba, wamba ne: Ndi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu, uvua bankambua banyi, Abrahame ne Izake, bitabe, Ndi ntendelela Mvidi Mukulu, udi mundame too ne ku mpindiewu." 
Genesis48:16 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mungepule ku malu mabi onsu, neele bana banyi aba lupemba. Dina dianyi ne dia bankambua banyi, Abrahame ne Izake, disanguke ku bukole bua bana ba balume aba! Bana aba bikale ne ndelanganyi ya bungi, buwuje ditunga edi!" 
Genesis48:17 Yozefe umona tatuende muteke tshianza tshia balume pa mutu pa Efrayime, kavua ne disanka to. Kumushaye tshianza tshia tatuende pa mutu pa Efrayime, bua kutshiteka pa mutu pa Menashe muanabute." 
Genesis48:18 Yozefe kuambila tatuende ne: — Tatu, lekela kuenza nanku. Teka tshianza tshia balume amu pa mutu pa Menashe muanabute." 
Genesis48:19 Tatuende kubenga, wamba ne: — Muananyi, ndi mumanye tshindi ngenza. Ndelanganyi ya Menashe neyikale tshisamba tshinene. Kadi ndelanganyi ya muakunyende Efrayime neyipite bungi, yenza bisamba bivule." 
Genesis48:20 Dituku adi Yakobe kuela bana abu lupemba, wamba ne: — Bua kujingila bantu diakalenga, bena Izrayele nebatele mena enu, bamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu anusankishe bu muvuaye musankishe Efrayime ne Menashe! ” Ke muvua Yakobe muteke Efrayime kumpala kua Menashe nanku." 
Genesis48:21 Pashishe Yakobe kulaya Yozefe, umuambila ne: — Nkadi mikolu ku tshiina. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neanulame, anupingaje mu ditunga dia bankambua benu." 
Genesis48:22 Kadi tshitupa tshia buloba bua Shekeme, bumvua munyenge bena Amore ku muela wanyi wa mvita ne ku buta buanyi bua miketa, tshiena mbupesha bana benu to, ndi nkupeshabu anu wewe." 
Genesis49:1 Yakobe kubikila bana bende bonsu, ubambila ne: — Semenayi pabuipi, unumanyishe malu adi mua kunuenzekela matuku adi kumpala aa." 
Genesis49:2 Semenayi pabuipi! Nuteleje tshindi nnuambila nuenu, bana banyi meme Yakobe. Ntelejayi, meme Izrayele tatuenu." 
Genesis49:3 Wewe Rubene, udi muananyi, muanabute, udi mashi anyi a kumpala. Udi muana undi mulele, pantshivua ne dikanda dionsu. Lumu luebe ne bukole buebe, nebipite bia bana benu bonsu." 
Genesis49:4 Kadi wewe udi bu mukulu muindila, kulua kuditapa nsesu. Kuena muanabute kabidi to. Bualu kuvua munnemeke to. Uvua mubuelele mukajanyi mukuabu mu nzubu." 
Genesis49:5 Shimeyone ne Levi, mbana balondangane. Bavua bumvuangane bua kujula tshimvundu." 
Genesis49:6 Tshiena musue kubuela mu bifufu bidibu bela. Tshiena musue kubuelakana nabu to. Bualu bavua bashipe bantu bua tshiji. Bavua bakose bibelu bia ngombe milume bua kudisankisha patupu. 
Genesis49:7 Ndi mbenga tshiji tshiabu tshikole, ndi mpidia lonji luabu kaluyi luse! Ndi ntangalaja ndelanganyi yabu, munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Ndi nyimuangalaja mu ditunga dijima." 
Genesis49:8 Yuda, bana benu nebakutumbishe, Neufyekele bena lukuna bebe mu nshingu. Bana benu, nansha ba tatu mene, nebakukukuile." 
Genesis49:9 Yuda, muananyi, udi bu muana wa ntambue. Udi ushipa nyama, upingana muaba uvuaye mulale. Ntambue udi utua tshiadi panshi, ulala. Kakuena udi mua kumujula ku bukole." 
Genesis49:10 Nsesu wa bukalenga neashale mu diku dia Yuda. Dikombu dia bumfumu nedishale kudi ndelanganyi yende, too ne pafika muena bukalenga, udi bantu bonsu ne bua kutumikila." 
Genesis49:11 Mionji ya maluvu a mvinyo neikale miaba yonsu, nansha muntu usuikaku nyama wa mpunde ki mbualu to. Neasukule bilamba biende ne maluvu, nansha tshinkutu tshiende mu mashi a tumuma tua mvinyo." 
Genesis49:12 Maluvu a mvinyo neakunjije mesu a Yuda. Mabele neatokeshe menu ende. 
Genesis49:13 Zebulone nease ku muelelu wa mayi manene, muaba udi majuwa a mayi imanyina. Ditunga diende nedikale dialabale toone ku Sidone." 
Genesis49:14 Isakare udi bu nyama wa bukole bua bungi, mulale tshisaka ku luseke, tshisaka ku lukuabu." 
Genesis49:15 Isakare mmumone ne: muaba undi ndala mmuimpe, ditunga dindi nsomba ndilenga. Udi wambula majitu pa makaya, wenza mudimu bu mupika." 
Genesis49:16 Dane neikale mfumu wa tshisamba tshiende, netshikale bu bisamba bikuabu bia Izrayele." 
Genesis49:17 Dane udi bu nyoka udi mu njila, bu nyoka wa ntoke ku mpenga kua njila: nyoka udi usuma kabalu mu lutambiku lua tshibelu. Udi mubandapu udishinda, ubunguluka." 
Genesis49:18 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mutekemene lupandu kuudi." 
Genesis49:19 Ngade, udi bivi baluisha, udi utua nkanana, ubalondakaja." 
Genesis49:20 Madimi a Ashere adi ne bia kunowa bivule, biakudia bimpe bidibu mua kudia kudi mukalenga." 
Genesis49:21 Naftali udi nyama wa ntole, wendakana miaba yonsu, ulela bana bimpe batambe." 
Genesis49:22 Yozefe udi bu mutshi udi udiunda bimpe, utoloka ku mpokolu wa mayi. Matamba awu adi alepa, apita bimana bia nzubu." 
Genesis49:23 Baluishi badi bamukengesha bikole, bamuela miketa, bamutatshisha." 
Genesis49:24 Kadi Yozefe udi ukuata buta bikole. Maboku ende ne bianza kabiena bipungila. Udi umukolesha ke Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe, muena bukole buonsu, Mulami wa bena Izrayele, dibue didibu beyemina." 
Genesis49:25 Mvidi Mukulu wa tatuebe udi ukuambuluisha. Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu udi ukuela lupemba. Neakupeteshe bintu bimpe padi mvula uloka. Akupeteshe mayi adi apatuka munda mua buloba. Ulele bana ba bungi, bimuna biebe bivulangane." 
Genesis49:26 Tatuebe udi ukuela lupemba, lupite ne luvua baledi banyi bangele meme. Neupete bintu bimpe, bidi pa mikuna ya kale. Lupemba lua kudi tatuende lupueke mu mutu mua Yozefe, bualu Yozefe udi mfumu wa bana babu." 
Genesis49:27 Binyamine udi bu nyama wa lonji. Mu dinda udi umina nyama. Dilolu udi wabanya bidiye mupete! 
Genesis49:28 Bana bonsu aba, ke badi benza bisama dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele. Tatuabu uvua muele muana yonsu lupemba ne miaku ayi. Yakobe kulayangana ne muana yonsu wende mushindu." 
Genesis49:29 Yakobe kuambila bana bende ne: — Nkadi nkeba kulonda bankambua banyi. Nunjike anu mu lubuebue ludi mu budimi bua Efrone, muena Iti, mu nkita ya bankambua banyi." 
Genesis49:30 Lubuebue alu ludi mu ditunga dia Kenaane, mu buloba bua Makpela, pabuipi ne Mambre. Ke muaba uvua Abrahame musumbe kudi Efrone, muena Iti, bua muaba wa kujika bafue awu wikale wende." 
Genesis49:31 Ke muaba uvuabu bajike Abrahame ne mukajende Sara, bajike kabidi Izake ne mukajende Rebeka. Meme kujikamu kabidi Leya." 
Genesis49:32 Budimi ne lubuebue bidi muaba awu, mbatusumbishabi kudi bena Iti." 
Genesis49:33 Amu Yakobe mumane kulayangana ne bana bende, kudiololaye pa bulalu, kufuaye, kulonda bankambua bende." 
Genesis50:1 Yozefe kupukila tshitalu tshia tatuende, kudila, binsonji bimatshila tatuende mu mpala." 
Genesis50:2 Pashishe kuambilaye baminganga bende bua bumishe tshitalu atshi bua katshibodi to. 
Genesis50:3 Baminganga abu kulongolola tshitalu matuku makumi anayi ne mafuta a manananshi. Bena Ejipitu kuenza madilu a Yakobe matuku makumi muanda mutekete. 
Genesis50:4 Batangalaja amu madilu a Yakobe, Yozefe kuambila balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Ejipitu ne: — Ndi nnusengelela ne: Panudi bannange, nundombele kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, akumbaje dijinga dianyi edi:" 
Genesis50:5 “Tatu wanyi kayi muanji kukula muoyi, uvua munshila diyi bua meme kuditshipa bua kumujika amu mu ditunga dia Kenaane mu lukita luvuaye mumane kudilongolola.” Nanku ndi ndomba bua kuya kumujika. Pashishe nempingane." 
Genesis50:6 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuitaba ne: “Mbimpe, uye kujika tatuebe bu muvuaye mushiye diyi.”" 
Genesis50:7 Yozefe kuya kujika tatuende. Bavua bamushindikija kudi balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Ejipitu, bakulu ba mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu," 
Genesis50:8 bena diku dia Yozefe bonsu, bana babu ne Yozefe, ne bena diku bakuabu ba tatuende. Nanku mu Ngoshene muvua mushale amu bana batekete ne bimuna." 
Genesis50:9 Mu njila amu, bavua kabidi ne musumba wa bantu babande pa tubalu ne matempu." 
Genesis50:10 Bafika mu Ngorene-Atade, dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, kujukulabu miadi mikole. Yozefe kuenza madilu a tatuende matuku muanda mutekete. Tshibilu tshivua tshinene." 
Genesis50:11 Bena ditunga dia Kenaane bamona madilu mu Ngorene-Atade, kukemabu bamba ne: — Aa mmadilu manene a bena Ejipitu! Ke padibu babikila muaba awu ne: Abele-Misrayime, mmumue ne: muaba wa madilu a bena Ejipitu." 
Genesis50:12 Bana ba Yakobe kuenza bionsu amu muvua tatuabu mubashila diyi. 
Genesis50:13 Kuyabu ne tshitalu tshiende mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Kutshijikabu mu lubuebue luwa mu budimi bua Makpela, muaba uvua Abrahame musumbe kudi Efrone muena Iti, bua wikale wende wa kujika bafue. (Lubuebue alu luvua pabuipi ne Mambre.)" 
Genesis50:14 Yozefe mumane kujika tatuende, kupinganaye mu Ejipitu ne bana babu, kabidi ne bonsu bavuaye muende nabu bua kuya kujika tatuende." 
Genesis50:15 Bana babu ne Yozefe bamona ne: tatu wafu, bavua bapampakana, bamba ne: “Misangu mikuabu Yozefe udi mua kutusombuela ku malu mabi onsu atuvua bamuenzele.”" 
Genesis50:16 Nanku kutumabu bantu kudi Yozefe, bamuvuluija meyi a ndekelu avua tatuabu mubambile ne:" 
Genesis50:17 “Nuambile Yozefe mu dina dianyi ne: ufuile bana benu luse ku malu mabi onsu adibu bakuenzele.” Ke pavuabu bamulomba ne: “Utufuileku luse, bualu tudi tutendelela Mvidi Mukulu umue wa tatuebe Yakobe.” Yozefe umvua miaku ayi, kuasaye muadi." 
Genesis50:18 Bana babu ne Yozefe kuya kudiela panshi ku makasa ende, bamuambila ne: — Tudi bapika bebe." 
Genesis50:19 Kadi Yozefe kubakolesha ku muoyi, wamba ne: — Kanutshinyi to. Meme tshiena Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Genesis50:20 Nuenu nuvua ne meji a kungenzela bibi. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kukudimuna bibi abi bua bikale bimpe. Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kupandisha bantu ba bungi, bu munudi numona lelu." 
Genesis50:21 Nanku kanutshinyi to. Meme nennuambuluishe ne meku enu onsu. Yozefe kukolesha bana babu ku muoyi ne miaku eyi ya mushinga mukole. 
Genesis50:22 Yozefe uvua mushale mu Ejipitu ne bena diku dia tatuende bonsu. Bidimu bia Yozefe bionsu bivua lukama ne dikumi. 
Genesis50:23 Yozefe kumona bana ba Efrayime, kumona kabidi ndelanganyi yabu. Yozefe kuangata bana ba muikuluende Makire, muana wa Menashe, bu bende." 
Genesis50:24 Yozefe kulayangana ne bana abu, ubambila ne: — Meme nkadi mikolu ku tshiina. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neanuambuluishe. Neanunuishe mu ditunga edi, anufikishe mu ditunga divuaye mulaye Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe." 
Genesis50:25 Yozefe kutshipisha bana babu, ubambila ne: “Pikala Mvidi Mukulu munumushe mu ditunga edi, numuangale ne mifuba yanyi.”" 
Genesis50:26 Yozefe kufua, mumane kukumbaja bidimu lukama ne dikumi. Kuluishabu tshitalu tshiende ne mafuta a manananshi bua katshibodi. Kutshitekabu mu mushete wa mabue mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus1:1 Bana ba balume ba Izrayele bavuaye mufike nabu mu Ejipitu, muana yonsu ne bena diku diende, badi nunku:" 
Exodus1:2 Rubene, Shimeyone, Levi, Yuda," 
Exodus1:3 Isakare, Zebulone, Binyamine," 
Exodus1:4 Dane, Naftali, Ngade ne Ashere." 
Exodus1:5 Ndelanganyi ya Yakobe yonsu ivua bantu makumi muanda mutekete. Amu Yozefe uvua mumane kudianjila mu Ejipitu. 
Exodus1:6 Kadi Yozefe ne bana babu bonsu bavua Yakobe mubuele nabu mu Ejipitu kufuabu. 
Exodus1:7 Pashishe ndelanganyi ya bena Izrayele kutanta, kuvulangana kupita bungi mu Ejipitu. Kushalabu bantu ba bukole." 
Exodus1:8 Mukalenga mupiamupia, uvua kayi mumanye Yozefe, kudia bukalenga mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus1:9 Mukalenga kuambila bantu bende ne: — Bena Izrayele aba mbapite bungi, kabidi mbantu ba bukole." 
Exodus1:10 Nanku, tukebayi mushindu wa kubapumbisha bua kabavudianganyi to. Tshianana pafika bena mvita, badi mua kudisanga ne bena lukuna betu bua kutuluisha, pashishe kumuka mu ditunga." 
Exodus1:11 Bena Ejipitu kusungula bamfumu ba mudimu bavua ne bua kuenzeja bena Izrayele mudimu mukole bua kubatekesha. Bena Izrayele kuashila Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu tshimenga tshia Pitome ne tshia Ramsese bua balaminemu bintu biende. 
Exodus1:12 Kadi pa wabu bakengesha bena Izrayele nanku, bavua amu bavulangana mu ditunga dijima. Bena Ejipitu bamona nanku, kutshinabu bena Izrayele bikole." 
Exodus1:13 Kubenzejabu mudimu wa bupika ne tshikisu tshipite bukole. 
Exodus1:14 Bena Izrayele kusopa buloba kuenza madiotu, kudimina bena Ejipitu madimi. Mu tshikosu, bena Ejipitu kubenzeja midimu ya mishindu yonsu ne tshikisu." 
Exodus1:15 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuambila Shifra ne Puwa, baleleshi ba bena Ebrewu ne:" 
Exodus1:16 — Panudi nulelesha bakaji ba bena Ebrewu, nutangile bimpe mushindu udi muana. Pikalaye wa balume numushipe, pikalaye wa bakaji numulekele ne muoyi." 
Exodus1:17 Kadi baleleshi bavua batshina Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku kubengabu diyi dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Kulekelabu bana ba balume ne muoyi. 
Exodus1:18 Ke mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubabikila, ubakonka ne: — Nudi benze nenku bualu kayi? Nudi balekela bana ba balume ne muoyi bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus1:19 Baleleshi kuandamuna ne: — Bakaji ba bena Ebrewu badi ne bukole bua bungi, bapite ba bena Ejipitu. Badi badilelela nkayabu, katuyi banji kufika." 
Exodus1:20 Nanku bena Izrayele kuvulangana, kushala bantu bakole. Mvidi Mukulu kusankisha baleleshi abu," 
Exodus1:21 kubapesha bana ba bungi, bualu bavua bamutshina." 
Exodus1:22 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kuambila bantu bende bonsu ne: — Muana wa balume yonsu udi bena Izrayele balele, numuele mu musulu wa Nile. Nulekele anu bana ba bakaji ne muoyi." 
Exodus2:1 Muntu wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Levi, kusela mukaji wa mu tshisamba tshiabu tshia bena Levi." 
Exodus2:2 Mukaji awu kuimita difu, kulela muana wa balume. Uvua mumone muvua muana ne mubidi muimpe. Kumusokokaye ngondu isatu." 
Exodus2:3 Mukaji umona ne tshiena ne mushindu wa kusokoka muana kabidi musangu mule, kumutekaye mu tshisaka tshiluka ne ntupu, tshilaba budimbu. Kutshisokokaye mu malenga avua ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile." 
Exodus2:4 Yayende wa muana awu, uvua muimanyine pa bule, bua kumona tshivua ne bua kuenzekela muana." 
Exodus2:5 Ke muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kupueka bua kuowa mayi. Bena mudimu bende bakaji bavua bendakana ku muelelu wa mayi aku. Diakamue muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga kumona tshisaka mu malenga, kubikila nsongakaji muena mudimu wende, bua kumuambuilaye tshisaka atshi mu mayi." 
Exodus2:6 Muana wa mukalenga ubulula tshisaka, kumonaye muana wa balume udila. Luse kumuenza. Kuambaye ne: — Muana ewu ngua bena Ebrewu!" 
Exodus2:7 Yayende wa muana kukonka muana wa mukalenga ne: — Udi musue nkubikidile mukaji wa bena Ebrewu udi mua kukuamushila muana ewu dibela anyi? 
Exodus2:8 Muana wa mukalenga kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ndaku. Nsongakaji kuya kubikila mamuende mene wa muana." 
Exodus2:9 Muana wa mukalenga kuambila mamu awu ne: — Angata muana ewu, umunkoleshile. Meme nenkufute. Mukaji kuangata muana bua kumuamusha." 
Exodus2:10 Muana mumane kukola, mamuende kumupingaja kudi muana wa mukalenga. Awu kumuangata bu muanende, kumuinyika dina ne: — Diende mMoshe, bualu ndi mumupatule mu mayi." 
Exodus2:11 Moshe mumane kukola, kuyaye bua kumonangana ne bana babu. Kusanganaye bakengesha bana babu ne midimu mipite bukole. Diakamue kumonaye muena Ejipitu utuuta muanabu wa bena Ebrewu." 
Exodus2:12 Moshe kuimana, kukenzakana nseke yonsu. Kena mumone muntu mukuabu to. Nanku kushipaye muena Ejipitu, kumujibikila mu lusenga." 
Exodus2:13 Butshia dinda, Moshe kumona kabidi bena Ebrewu baluangana. Kukonkaye uvua muenze bibi ne: — Udi utuuta mukuebe nanku bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus2:14 Awu kuandamuna Moshe ne: — Nganyi udi mukuteke bua kutubela ne kutulumbuluisha? Udi musue kunshipa bu muuvua mushipe muena Ejipitu anyi? Moshe kumvua buowa, kudiambila ne: “Bualu ebu bakadi babumanye!”" 
Exodus2:15 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu umvua bualu abu, kukebaye mua kushipa Moshe. Kadi Moshe kunyema, kuya mu ditunga dia Madiyane. Kuikishaye pabuipi ne tshiina tshia mayi." 
Exodus2:16 Mu Madiyane muvua mutuangaji Yetro ne bana bende ba bakaji muanda mutekete. Dituku adi bana ba bakaji abu kupueka bua kusuna mayi a kuela mu luvu bua kunuisha bimuna bia tatuabu. 
Exodus2:17 Kadi balami ba mikoku kufika, kuipata bana ba bakaji abu. Kadi Moshe kuakuila bansongakaji aba, kubasunyina mayi, kunuisha bimuna biabu." 
Exodus2:18 Bansongakaji kupingana pambelu. Tatuabu Yetro kubakonka ne: — Lelu munudi bapingane lukasa nanku mmunyi? 
Exodus2:19 Bobu kuandamuna tatuabu ne: — Muena Ejipitu mukuabu mmutusungidile kudi balami ba mikoku, kabidi mmutusunyine mayi, munuishe bimuna bietu." 
Exodus2:20 Yetro kuebeja bana bende ba bakaji ne: — Kadi muntu awu wepi? Nuamushiyi bua tshinyi? Mubikilayi bua tudie nende. 
Exodus2:21 Moshe kuitaba bua kusomba kua muntu awu. Yetro kuselesha muanende wa bakaji Sefora kudi Moshe. 
Exodus2:22 Sefora kulela muana wa balume. Moshe kuamba ne: — Dina diende didi Ngershone, bualu ndi muena tshimuangi, musombe mu ditunga dia bende." 
Exodus2:23 Kupita matuku a bungi, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kufua. Bena Izrayele ba-tshivua badila muadi, bela mbila, bua dikenga divuabu nadi. Kadi miadi yabu ya mu bupika buabu kufika kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus2:24 Mvidi Mukulu kumvua mikemu yabu, kuvuluka ndondu uvuaye mutue ne Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe." 
Exodus2:25 Kumonaye bena Izrayele, kujadikaye dikenga divuabu nadi." 
Exodus3:1 Moshe uvua udisha bimuna bia tatuende muenu Yetro, mutuangaji wa mu Madiyane. Dituku dikuabu kupitshilaye mu tshipela too ne ku Orebe, mukuna wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus3:2 Muaba awu, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela Moshe mu ndimi ya kapia munkatshi mua tshipuka. Moshe kumona muvua tshipuka tshitema kapia katshiyi tshipia tshibutuka." 
Exodus3:3 Umona nanku, kuambaye ne: “Ndi musue kubenda kusemena pabuipi bua kujadika bualu ebu bua dikema: kadilu katema, tshipuka katshiyi tshipia tshibutuka!”" 
Exodus3:4 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumone muvua Moshe usemena pabuipi bua kujadika bualu abu. Kubikilaye Moshe munkatshi mua tshipuka ne: — Moshe! Moshe! Awu kuitaba ne: — Ke meme awu. 
Exodus3:5 Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — Kusemenyi pabuipi to. Kopola bisabata biebe, bualu udi muimane muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus3:6 Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bebe: wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe. Moshe kubuikila mpala, bualu uvua utshina bua kutangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus3:7 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Ndi mumone dikenga dia bantu banyi badi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Ndi mumvue miadi yabu. Badi babakengesha bikole ne tshikisu. Ndi mumone mudi bena Izrayele banyingalala. 
Exodus3:8 Ndi mufike bua kubasungidila kudi bena Ejipitu, kubumusha mu ditunga edi, kubabueja mu ditunga dialabale didi ne mabela ne buitshi bipite bungi. Ke ditunga didibu basombe mpindiewu kudi bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa." 
Exodus3:9 Ndi mumvue miadi ya bantu banyi. Kabidi ndi mumone mudibu babakengesha kudi bena Ejipitu. 
Exodus3:10 Nanku ndi nkutuma kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bua uye kupatula bantu banyi bena Izrayele badi mukalenga awu mukuate ku bupika." 
Exodus3:11 Moshe kuandamuna Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Meme tshiena ne mushindu wa kuya kumonangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kupatula bena Izrayele to. 
Exodus3:12 Mvidi Mukulu kumuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi nebe. Ndi nkupa tshimanyinu tshidi tshileja ne: Meme ke udi mukutume. Wewe mumane kupatula bena Izrayele mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, nenuntendelele pa mukuna wa Sinayi ewu." 
Exodus3:13 Moshe kuamba ne: — Mbimpe. Kadi pangaya kuambila bena Izrayele ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu mmuntume kunudi,” pangebejabu ne: dina diende nnganyi nembandamune tshinyi?" 
Exodus3:14 Mvidi Mukulu kumuambila ne: — “Meme ndi Mundi.” Ubambile ne: “Ndi Mundi mmuntume kunudi. ” 
Exodus3:15 Pashishe kuambilaye Moshe ne: — Newambile bena Izrayele ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe mmuntume kunudi.” Edi ke dina dianyi dia kashidi dia nuenu ne ndelanganyi yonsu kumbikila." 
Exodus3:16 Ndaku, ubikile bakulu ba bena Izrayele bonsu, ubambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe mmummuenekele. Mmungambile ne: Ndi mumone mudibu banukengesha kudi bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus3:17 Ndi musue kunusungidila mu dikenga edi, kunumusha mu ditunga edi, kunubueja mu ditunga dia bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, ditunga didi ne mabela ne buitshi bipite bungi. ”" 
Exodus3:18 Bena Izrayele nebitabe malu audi ubambila. Pashishe wangate bakulu ba bena Izrayele, uye nabu kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu, Mvidi Mukulu wetu mmutumuenekele. Nanku tudi tukusengelela se: wanyishe bua tuye mu tshipela, tuenze luendu lua matuku asatu bua kumulambula milambu.”" 
Exodus3:19 Ndi mumanye ne: mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kakuitaba bua nuye, anu meme mumuenzeje ku bukole." 
Exodus3:20 Nanku neukengeshe bena Ejipitu ne makenga a mishindu yonsu. Pamona mukalenga wabu nanku, neanulekele." 
Exodus3:21 Meme nensake bena Ejipitu bua banunemeke nuenu bena Izrayele. Nanku panumuka mu Ejipitu, kanuakuikala bianza bitupu to." 
Exodus3:22 Pa nuenu kumuka, nenupawule bena Ejipitu. Mukaji yonsu wa bena Izrayele, nealombe kudi mukaji wa bena Ejipitu udi ku nzubu kuende, nansha kudi muena mutumba nende, bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha bia mpawungi. Neamulombe kabidi bilamba bia kuvuala. Bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji nebambule bintu abi." 
Exodus4:1 Moshe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bena Izrayele kabakuitaba, kabakukumbaja bionsu bindi mbambila to. Nebangele mpata, bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena mukumuenekele to!”" 
Exodus4:2 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Moshe ne: — Tshiudi natshi ku bianza atshi ntshinyi? Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi ne dikombu. 
Exodus4:3 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Ela dikombu adi panshi! Moshe udiela panshi, dikombu kuandamuka nyoka. Moshe kunyema nyoka awu." 
Exodus4:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Olola tshianza, ukuate nyoka awu ku mukila. Moshe kumukuata ku mukila, kumonaye ukadi ne dikombu mu bianza." 
Exodus4:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Enza tshishima etshi bua bena Izrayele bitabe, bajadike ne: meme Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu, wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe, ndi mukumuenekele." 
Exodus4:6 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe kabidi ne: — Teka tshianza pa tshiadi tshiebe. Moshe kuteka tshianza pa tshiadi. Kadi pavuaye utshiumusha, tshivua tshitokesha bu busu bua ndanda kudi disama dia nsudi." 
Exodus4:7 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Pingaja tshianza tshiebe pa tshiadi. Moshe utshipingaja, utshiumusha kabidi. Tshianza kushala muatshi mua kale katshiyi ne disama dia nsudi to." 
Exodus4:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Pikala bena Izrayele kabayi bakuitaba bua tshishima tshia kumpala, nebakuitabe bua tshishima tshibidi etshi." 
Exodus4:9 Kadi pikala bena Izrayele kabayi bakuitaba bua bishima bibidi ebi, utunte mayi a mu musulu wa Nile, witshikije panshi. Mayi awu neandamuke mashi." 
Exodus4:10 Moshe kubenga, wambila Maweja-Nangila ne: — Maweja-Nangila, tshiena mua kuya to. Katshia bandela too ne mpindiewu patudi nebe apa, tshiena mumanye mua kuakula bimpe to. Ndi ntata bikole bua kuamba bualu." 
Exodus4:11 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Lekela kuamba nanku. Udi mufuke muntu ne mukana mua kuakula nnganyi? Nanku muntu udi mua kuakula bimpe nansha kushala kamama, kumvua nansha kuikala ne mapapa, kumona nansha kayi umona ku bukole bua nganyi? Ki nku bukole buanyi meme Maweja-Nangila anyi?" 
Exodus4:12 Nanku, kuajiki! Ndaku. Nenkuambuluishe bua wakule bimpe. Nenkumanyishe malu a wewe kubambila." 
Exodus4:13 Moshe kubenga, wamba ne: — Ndi nkusengelela ne: utume muntu mukuabu." 
Exodus4:14 Ke Maweja-Nangila kufikila Moshe munda, umuambila ne: — Muanenu Arone, muena Levi, udi mumanye mua kuakula bimpe. Nyeye wawa mu njila bua kumonangana nebe. Pakumonaye neasanke." 
Exodus4:15 Neumumvuije tshidiye mua kuamba. Nennuambuluishe wewe ne muanenu Arone bua nuakule bimpe. Nennumanyishe tshinudi mua kuenza. 
Exodus4:16 Arone neakule ne bantu, ubambila malu auvua ne bua kuamba wewe. Wewe newikale bu Mvidi Mukulu, udi umumanyisha tshidiye mua kuamba, yeye neikale muambi webe." 
Exodus4:17 Ukuate kabidi dikombu edi mu tshianza, wenze nadi bishima." 
Exodus4:18 Moshe kuya kudi tatuende muenu Yetro, kumuambila ne: — Ndi ne bua kuya kumonangana ne bana betu badi bashala mu Ejipitu bua kujadika ne: batshidi ne muoyi. Tatuende muenu kuitaba ne: — Waya bimpe." 
Exodus4:19 Anu mu Madiyane amu, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Eyowa, pingana mu Ejipitu, bualu bantu bonsu bavua bakuelela meji mabi mbamane kufua." 
Exodus4:20 Moshe kuangata dikombu divua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile bua kuya nadi. Kupinganaye mu Ejipitu. Uvua muambule mukajende ne bana bende pa nyama wa mpunde. 
Exodus4:21 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: — Ndi nkupesha bukole bua kuenza bishima. Pawafika kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, wenze bishima bionsu bindi mukuleje. Kadi meme nemmupeshe muoyi wa tshitunu. Kakuanyisha bua bena Izrayele bumuke to." 
Exodus4:22 Wewe umanyishe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Izrayele udi muananyi wa balume muanabute. 
Exodus4:23 Nanku ndi nkutumina diyi ne: umulekele, aye kuntendelela. Kadi paudi ubenga bua kumulekela, ndi nshipa muanebe wa balume muanabute. ”" 
Exodus4:24 Pavua Moshe mu njila, ulala mu nzubu wa tshilala benyi, kusambakenaye ne Maweja-Nangila uvua ukeba kumushipa." 
Exodus4:25 Nanku Sefora, mukaji wa Moshe, kuangata dibue ditue, kuteka nadi muanende wa balume panshi. Pashishe kuangata dikoba divuaye mukose muana adi, kudilaba Moshe pa mbidi wamba ne: “Udi bayanyi wa mashi.”" 
Exodus4:26 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kumuka muaba uvua Moshe, Sefora uvua muambe ne: “Bayanyi wa mu mashi” bua dimuteka panshi." 
Exodus4:27 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Arone ne: — Uye kumonangana ne muanenu Moshe mu tshipela. Arone kuya, usangana Moshe ku mukuna wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumupukilaye."
