Exodus4:28 Moshe kuambila Arone bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Kumumanyishaye kabidi bishima bivuaye mumuleje bua kuenza. 
Exodus4:29 Nanku Moshe ne Arone kuya mu Ejipitu, kusangisha bakulu bonsu ba bena Izrayele." 
Exodus4:30 Arone kubambuluila bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Moshe kubaleja bishima. 
Exodus4:31 Bantu bamona nanku, kuitababu. Kujadikabu ne: Maweja-Nangila wamonyi makenga etu, watusambi. Kutuabu binu panshi bua kumutendelela." 
Exodus5:1 Malu onsu aa mamane kupita, Moshe ne Arone kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Ulekele bantu banyi, baye kuenza tshibilu mu tshipela bua kuntendelela.”" 
Exodus5:2 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila nnganyi? Meme tshiena mumanye Maweja-Nangila bua meme kuitaba diyi diende. Tshiena ndekela bena Izrayele baye to! 
Exodus5:3 Moshe ne Arone kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu mmutumuenekele. Tudi tukulomba ne: wanyishe bua tuye mu tshipela, tuende luendu lua matuku asatu bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu milambu. Bualu patudi katuyi tuenza nanku, udi mua kututumina disama dia tshiambu tshikole, nansha kutushipa ku muele wa mvita." 
Exodus5:4 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuandamuna ne: — Wewe Moshe ne Arone, lekelayi kupumbisha bantu bua kuenzabu mudimu. Pinganayi ku midimu yenu." 
Exodus5:5 Bena Izrayele mbapite bungi. Munudi nubapumbisha mua kuenzabu midimu yabu mbishi? 
Exodus5:6 Anu dituku adi, Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kukandika bena Ejipitu ne bena Izrayele, bavua ne kulombola mudimu wa bantu ne:" 
Exodus5:7 — Kanuena mua kukebela kabidi bena Izrayele bisosa bia kuenza nabi madiotu, bu munuvua nubapesha kuonsu eku to. Batukebele bisosa bobu nkayabu." 
Exodus5:8 Kadi kanukepeshi mudimu wabu. Benze madiotu anu bungi bua tshibidilu, bualu mbena lulengu. Ke padibu bandomba bua kuya kulambula Mvidi Mukulu wabu milambu." 
Exodus5:9 Nubenzeje mudimu mukole, bua bapange mua kuteleja meyi a bena dishima." 
Exodus5:10 Nanku bena Ejipitu ne bena Izrayele bavua ne bua kulombola mudimu wa bantu, kupatukabu ku nzubu wa bukalenga, kuambilabu bena Izrayele ne: — Ke bidi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu wamba ebi ne: Tshiena nnupesha kabidi bisosa to." 
Exodus5:11 Nudikebele bisosa nkayenu kuonsu kunudi basue. Nuenze madiotu anu bungi bua tshibidilu. Kabakepeshi mudimu wenu to. 
Exodus5:12 Bena Izrayele kumuangalaka mu Ejipitu, benda badikebela bisosa." 
Exodus5:13 Batangidi ba mudimu awu, kubambika bena Izrayele bua benze madiotu anu bungi bua tshibidilu, muvuabu benza matuku onsu pavuabu babapesha bisosa." 
Exodus5:14 Bena mudimu ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kutuuta bena Izrayele bavua benzeja bantu mudimu, babambila ne: “Bua tshinyi kanuena benze madiotu bungi bua tshibidilu bu munuvua nuenza matuku onsu?”" 
Exodus5:15 Bena Izrayele bavua benzeja bantu mudimu kuyabu kudidila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bamba ne: — Mukalenga, tuetu tudi bena mudimu bebe. Udi unkengesha nunku bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus5:16 Bantu bebe mbenze tshilema. Badi batukuma, batuamba bua kuenza madiotu. Kadi kabena batupa bisosa bia kuenza nabi mudimu wa madiotu to." 
Exodus5:17 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubandamuna ne: — Nuenu, nudi bena lulengu ba kalandamusenga. Ke panudi nundomba bua kuya kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu." 
Exodus5:18 Nanku pinganayi ku midimu yenu. Kabena banupesha bisosa to. Nuenze madiotu anu bungi bua tshibidilu. 
Exodus5:19 Nanku bena Izrayele bavua ne mudimu wa kutangila bantu, pakumvuabu ne: “Nuenze madiotu anu bungi bua tshibidilu, bu munuvua nuenza matuku onsu patuvua tunupa bisosa, kupangabu tshia kuenza.”" 
Exodus5:20 Bashiyangane ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kumonanganabu ne Moshe ne Arone bavua babindile." 
Exodus5:21 Kuambilabu Moshe ne Arone ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmumone bionsu ebi. Neanunyoke, bualu tuetu katuena kabidi ne mushinga kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne kudi bantu bende. Nudi batukebele dikenga ne lulu." 
Exodus5:22 Moshe kupingana kudi Maweja-Nangila, umuebeja ne: — Maweja-Nangila wanyi, udi mukengeshe bantu aba bua tshinyi? Wakututuma kudibu bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus5:23 Katshia mfika kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kumuambila malu mu dina diebe, udi amu ukengesha bena Izrayele bikole. Wewe udi anu mupuwe, kuyi ubasungila!" 
Exodus6:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Neudimuene nkayebe mundi ngenzeja mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ku bukole bua kulekelaye bena Izrayele baye. Nemmuenzeje kabidi ku bukole bua abipate mu ditunga diende. 
Exodus6:2 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Moshe kabidi ne: — Meme ndi “Maweja-Nangila.” 
Exodus6:3 Meme ke Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu uvua mumuenekele Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Kadi tshivua mubambile dina dianyi dia Maweja-Nangila to." 
Exodus6:4 Mvua mutue nabu ndondu, mubalaye mua kubapesha ditunga dia Kenaane divuabu basombe bu bantu benyi." 
Exodus6:5 Mpindiewu ndi mumvue miadi ya bena Izrayele badibu bakuate mu bupika kudi bena Ejipitu. Ke pandi muvuluke ndondu umvua mutue nabu. 
Exodus6:6 Nanku ambila bena Izrayele mu dina dianyi ne: “Ndi Maweja-Nangila! Nennumushe ku midimu mikole inudi nuenzela bena Ejipitu. Nennupatule ku bupika budibu banukuate. Nengenzeje bena Ejipitu ku bukole, mbanyoke bikole bua kunusungidila." 
Exodus6:7 Nenuikale bantu banyi, nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nenujadike ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Ndi munumushe ku midimu mikole inuvua nuenzela bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus6:8 Nennufile mu ditunga dimvua mulaye Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Ditunga adi nedishale bupianyi buenu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika bualu ebu.”" 
Exodus6:9 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele malu awu. Kadi kabavua bamuitaba to, bualu bavua ne kanyinganyinga bua dikenga divuabu nadi mu bupika." 
Exodus6:10 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe kabidi ne: 
Exodus6:11 — Ambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, alekele bena Izrayele bumuke mu ditunga diende." 
Exodus6:12 Moshe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bu mudi bena Izrayele kabayi bateleja bindi mubambile, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kabidi kakuitaba to, bualu ndi ngakula ne lutatu." 
Exodus6:13 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: “Nunganyishe bena Izrayele ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu malu onsu aa bua bena Izrayele bamone mua kumuka mu Ejipitu.” 
Exodus6:14 Ke mena a bisamba bia bena Izrayele: Rubene, muanabute wa Yakobe, uvua ne bana balume banayi: Anoke, Palu, Esrone ne Karmi. Ke bankambua ba meku a bena Rubene." 
Exodus6:15 Shimeyone uvua ne bana ba balume basambombu: Yemuyele, Yamine, Ohade, Yakine, Sohare ne Shawule uvuaye mulele ne mukaji wa bena Kenaane. Ke bankambua ba meku a bena Shimeyone awu." 
Exodus6:16 Levi uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Ngershone, Kehate ne Merari. Levi wakushala ne muoyi bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete." 
Exodus6:17 Ngershone uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Libni ne Shimeyi. Bana aba ke bankambua ba meku adi ne dina diabu. 
Exodus6:18 Kehate uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: Amrame, Ishare, Ebrone ne Uziyele. Kehate wakashala ne muoyi bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu ne bisatu." 
Exodus6:19 Merari uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: Mali ne Mushi. Ke muvua bankambua ba bena Levi ne ndelanganyi yabu nanku. 
Exodus6:20 Amrame uvua musele tatuende mukaji Yokebede. Mukaji ewu kulela Moshe ne Arone. Amrame wakashala ne muoyi bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete. 
Exodus6:21 Ishare uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Kora, Nefege ne Zikri." 
Exodus6:22 Uziyele uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Mishayele, Elishafane ne Sitri." 
Exodus6:23 Arone uvua musele Elisheba muana wa Aminadabe. Elisheba awu uvua muanabu ne Nashone. Elisheba kulela bana ba balume banayi: Nadabe, Abiku, Elazare ne Itamare." 
Exodus6:24 Kora uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Asire, Elkana ne Abiyashafe. Ke bankambua ba meku a bena Kora." 
Exodus6:25 Elazare, muana wa Arone, uvua musele muana wa Putiyele. Mukaji awu kulela Pinhase. Ke mudi bankambua ba meku a tshisamba tshia bena Levi nanku." 
Exodus6:26 Arone ne Moshe ke bavua Maweja-Nangila muambile ne: “Nupatule bena Izrayele bonsu balondangane bimpe mu bisamba biabu mu Ejipitu.” 
Exodus6:27 Anu bobu aba ke bavua bambile mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua anyishe bena Izrayele bumuke bonsu mu ditunga diende. 
Exodus6:28 Pavua Maweja-Nangila uyukila ne Moshe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu," 
Exodus6:29 uvua mumuambile ne: — Ndi Maweja-Nangila, ambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bionsu bindi mukuambile." 
Exodus6:30 Kadi Moshe kumuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mua kumvua tshindi ngamba to, bualu ndi ngakula ne lutatu." 
Exodus7:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Wewe newikale bu Mvidi Mukulu ku mesu kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Muanenu Arone neakuenzele mudimu wa buambi. 
Exodus7:2 Newambile Arone malu onsu andi mukuambile, bua aye kumanyisha mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bua anyishe bena Izrayele bumuke mu ditunga diende." 
Exodus7:3 Kadi meme nempeshe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muoyi wa tshitunu. Nengenze malu a dikema mavule mu ditunga diende. 
Exodus7:4 Kadi kakuitaba to. Nanku nemmuenzeje malu ku bukole. Nemmunyoke, bua mmone mua kupatula tshisamba tshianyi tshia bena Izrayele balondangane bimpe mu bisamba biabu mu ditunga diende." 
Exodus7:5 Bena Ejipitu nebajadike ne: Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, bualu nembenzeje ku bukole bua balekele bena Izrayele baye." 
Exodus7:6 Moshe ne Arone kukumbaja bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mubambile. 
Exodus7:7 Pavua Moshe ne Arone baya kuyukila ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, Moshe uvua ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu, Arone ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bisatu." 
Exodus7:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Exodus7:9 — Pikala mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ujinga bua numuenzele bishima, wewe Moshe wambile Arone ne: ela dikombu diebe panshi. Nanku nediandamuke nyoka, mukalenga awu mumone." 
Exodus7:10 Moshe ne Arone kuya kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Arone kuela dikombu panshi, mukalenga ne bantu batangile. Dikombu kuandamuka nyoka." 
Exodus7:11 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila bena meji ne benji ba bilengulengu ne majimbu ba mu Ejipitu. Kuenzabu pabu tshishima atshi. 
Exodus7:12 Muntu yonsu kuela dikombu diende panshi. Kuandamukadi nyoka. Kadi dikombu dia Arone kumina makombu abu onsu. 
Exodus7:13 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu uvua anu ne tshitunu. Kubengaye diyi dia Moshe ne dia Arone, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Exodus7:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu udi ne tshitunu. Kena musue kulekela bena Izrayele bumuke ku bupika to. 
Exodus7:15 Angata dikombu diebe divua diandamuka nyoka adi, uye nadi dinda dionsu ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile, diba didi mukalenga upuekelamu. Uye kuimana kumpala kuende." 
Exodus7:16 Umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu, mmuntume kuudi bua wanyishe bena Izrayele baye mu tshipela bua kuntendelela. Kadi katshia nkumanyisha bualu ebu too ne mpindiewu kuena musue kuitaba." 
Exodus7:17 Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mpindiewu neujadike bukole buanyi! Ndi ntuuta dikombu edi pa musulu wa Nile, bua mayi onsu andamuke mashi." 
Exodus7:18 Minyinyi yonsu ya mu mayi neifue. Mayi neanunke mupuya mubi. Bena Ejipitu kabakunua kabidi mayi awu to.” 
Exodus7:19 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ambila Arone ne: angata dikombu diebe, olola tshianza ku mutu kua mayi onsu a mu Ejipitu, adi mu misulu, adi mu tusulu tukese ne adi mu majiba. Mayi onsu andamuke mashi. Mashi neikale mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu too ne mu nguvu ne mu mabungu." 
Exodus7:20 Moshe ne Arone kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Arone kutuuta dikombu pa musulu wa Nile. Mayi onsu kuandamuka mashi, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bantu bende bamone." 
Exodus7:21 Minyinyi ya mu mayi yonsu kulua. Mayi a mu musulu wa Nile kununka mupuya mubi, bena Ejipitu kabayi mua kunua mayi awu kabidi to. Mashi avua mu ditunga dionsu dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus7:22 Benji ba bilengulengu kuenza pabu tshishima atshi ku majimbu abu. Nanku mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu uvua anu ne tshitunu. Kubengaye diyi dia Moshe ne Arone bu mu-vua Maweja-Nangila mudianjile kuamba. 
Exodus7:23 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubela nyima, upingana kuende. Kulengululaye bualu abu." 
Exodus7:24 Bu muvua bena Ejipitu bonsu kabayi mua kunua mayi a mu musulu wa Nile, kumbulabu biina ku muelelu wa musulu awu bua kupeta mayi a kunua." 
Exodus7:25 Maweja-Nangila mumane kunyanga musulu wa Nile, matuku muanda mutekete kupita nanku." 
Exodus7:26 Ke Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Anyishe bena Izrayele baye kutendelela. 
Exodus7:27 Wewe mubenge, neanyoke ditunga diebe, neatume ndimba miaba yonsu." 
Exodus7:28 Mu musulu wa Nile nemuikale ndimba mipite bungi. Neyibuele mu nzubu muebe, nansha mu nzubu webe wa bulalu too ne pa bulalu buebe. Neyibuele kabidi mu nzubu ya bena mudimu bebe ne ya bantu bebe bonsu. Ndimba neikale ne mu miaba idibu balambila, too ne mu binu bia kutuila." 
Exodus7:29 Neyikubande pambidi kabidi ne pambidi pa bena mudimu bebe ne pa bantu bebe bonsu.” 
Exodus8:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ambila Arone ne: olola diboku, atangije dikombu pa mayi adi mu musulu, mu tusulu tukese ne mu majiba, bua ndimba ipatukemu ibuele mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus8:2 Arone kuolola diboku ku mutu kua mayi onsu mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Ndimba kupatuka kubuela mu ditunga dionsu dia Ejipitu. 
Exodus8:3 Kadi benji ba bilengulengu ba bena Ejipitu kuenza tshishima atshi, ne majimbu abu. Ndimba kubuela mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu ne ku mudimu wabu." 
Exodus8:4 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila Moshe ne Arone. Kubambilaye ne: — Nundombele kudi Maweja-Nangila: umushe ndimba eyi, idi itutatshisha meme ne bantu banyi. Nanku nenganyishe bena Izrayele baye kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu." 
Exodus8:5 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Unjadikile dituku diudi musue, nkulombele bua Mvidi Mukulu abutule ndimba idi ikutatshisha wewe ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe, kabidi ne bantu bebe, bua ishale anu mu musulu wa Nile." 
Exodus8:6 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumuambila ne: — Undombele malaba. Moshe kumuambila ne: — Nebikuenzekele muudi ulomba anu bua ujadike ne: kakuena utudi mua kufuanyikija ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. 
Exodus8:7 Ndimba neyipatuke mu nzubu muebe, mua balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe ne mua bantu bebe bonsu. Neyishale anu mu musulu wa Nile." 
Exodus8:8 Moshe ne Arone kushiyangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Moshe kutendelela Maweja-Nangila bua umushe ndimba iwaye mutumine mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. 
Exodus8:9 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba bivua Moshe umulomba. Ndimba yonsu ivua mu nzubu, mu mbanza ne mu madimi kufuayi." 
Exodus8:10 Kukungujabu ndimba ayi mishiki ne mishiki. Ditunga dijima kununkadi mupuya mubi. 
Exodus8:11 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu umona ne ndimba yajiki, tshitunu kumuenzatshi. Kena muitabe diyi dia Moshe ne Arone bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mudianjile kuamba." 
Exodus8:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ambila Arone ne: tuuta dikombu panshi bua lupuishi luandamuke tumue mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. 
Exodus8:13 Moshe ne Arone kuenza bionsu abi. Arone kutuuta dikombu panshi. Lupuishi kuandamuka tumue mu ditunga dionsu dia Ejipitu. Tumue atu tuvua tusuma bantu ne nyama. 
Exodus8:14 Benji ba bilengulengu ba bena Ejipitu kuidikija mua kuipata tumue atu, ku majimbu abu. Kadi kupangilabu. Tumue tuvua tusuma amu kusuma bantu ne nyama." 
Exodus8:15 Benji ba bilengulengu bamone nanku, kuambilabu mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Ebi bidi bienzeka ku bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu uvua anu ne tshitunu. Kubengaye diyi dia Moshe ne Arone bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mudianjile kuamba." 
Exodus8:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Malaba dinda, padi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu upatuka bua kuya ku musulu wa Nile, uye kumuambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuntume bua ulekele bantu bende, baye kumutendelela." 
Exodus8:17 Kadi pawabenga neakunyoke, akutumine njiji. Neyikale pambidi pebe wewe, pa balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe ne pa bantu bebe bonsu. Njiji neikale mu ditunga dionsu dia Ejipitu: mu nzubu yonsu ne panshi ponsu." 
Exodus8:18 Kabidi bua wewe kujadika ne: ndi mulame bantu banyi nansha mu ditunga diebe mene, tshiakutuma njiji mu Ngoshene to, bualu mmuaba udibu basombe." 
Exodus8:19 Dikenga dindi nkuatshisha bantu bebe kadiakukuata banyi meme. Nengenze tshishima etshi malaba.” 
Exodus8:20 Maweja-Nangila kuenza tshishima atshi, kutuma njiji mipite bungi. Njiji ayi kunyanga ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. Ivua mu nzubu mua mukalenga, mu nzubu mua balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, ne mu nzubu ya bantu bonsu." 
Exodus8:21 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila Moshe ne Arone. Kubambilaye ne: — Lambulayi Mvidi Mukulu wenu milambu anu mu ditunga emu! 
Exodus8:22 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Kabiena mua kuenzeka to. Bualu nyama itudi tulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bena Ejipitu badi bayinemeka. Pamonabu tulambula nyama ayi, nebatuase mabue batushipa." 
Exodus8:23 Tuyaya mu tshipela, tuenze luendu lua matuku asatu bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu milambu idiye musue." 
Exodus8:24 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuandamuna ne: — Nuambi bimpe, ndi nnutekela, nuye kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu milambu mu tshipela. Nuatendelelaku bualu buanyi. Kadi kanuyi mutantshi mule to." 
Exodus8:25 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Pandi ngumuka muaba ewu, nensengelele Maweja-Nangila bua malaba njiji yumuke ku nzubu kuebe, kua balomboodi ba mu bukalenga buebe ne ku nzubu ya bantu bebe bonsu. Kadi, wewe pebe ulekele kutulembakaja. Kutukandiki tshiakabidi bua bena Izrayele kabayi kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu." 
Exodus8:26 Moshe kumuka kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kuya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. 
Exodus8:27 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba bivua Moshe ulomba. Njiji yonsu kumuka kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kua balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne kua bantu bende bonsu." 
Exodus8:28 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuenza kabidi tshitunu. Kena muanyishe bua bena Izrayele bumuke to. 
Exodus9:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Uye kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu, udi wamba ne: Lekela bantu banyi baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus9:2 Wewe mubenge bua kubatekela, wewe mubakandike amu kubakandika," 
Exodus9:3 nenkunyoke bikole, mbutule bimuna biebe bionsu ne disama dikole dia tshiambu. Mpunde, tubalu, tumelu, ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji, bionsu nebibutuke." 
Exodus9:4 Kadi nensunguluje bimuna bia bena Izrayele ne bia bena Ejipitu. Tshimuna tshia bena Izrayele katshiakufua nansha tshimue.” 
Exodus9:5 Maweja-Nangila kujadikila Moshe kabidi ne: — Nengenze tshishima etshi mu Ejipitu malaba. 
Exodus9:6 Butshia dinda, Maweja-Nangila kuenza muvuaye muambe. Bimuna bia bena Ejipitu kufua bionsu. Kadi tshimuna tshia bena Izrayele katshiena tshifua nansha tshimue." 
Exodus9:7 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kukonka bantu bende bua kujadika tshivua tshienzeke. Kumuambilabu ne: bimuna bia bena Izrayele kabiena bifua nansha tshimue. Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mutekete bena Izrayele to. Uvua anu ne tshitunu. 
Exodus9:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: — Nuboye butu bua muiku mu bianza. Moshe neele butu abu mulu, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mutangile." 
Exodus9:9 Butu abu nebuandamuke lupuishi mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu. Lupuishi alu, neluenzeje maputa apatuka tufina pambidi pa bantu ne pa nyama." 
Exodus9:10 Moshe ne Arone kuboya butu bua muiku, kuya nabu kumpala kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Moshe kuela butu abu mulu. Kuenzabu maputa apatuka tufina pambidi pa bantu ne pa nyama." 
Exodus9:11 Bena majimbu ba bena Ejipitu kupanga mushindu wa kumonangana ne Moshe, bualu bavua ne maputa bu bena Ejipitu bonsu." 
Exodus9:12 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubenga diyi dia Moshe ne Arone, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumupeshe muoyi wa tshitunu nuwuaye mudianjile kuambila Moshe." 
Exodus9:13 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Malaba dinda, uye kumonangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu udi wamba ne: ‘Lekela bantu banyi baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus9:14 Mpindiewu ndi mujadike bua kukutumina makenga a mishindu yonsu, wewe ne balombodi ba bukalenga kabidi ne bantu bebe bonsu, bua ujadike ne: pa buloba bujima kakuena mukuabu, amu meme!" 
Exodus9:15 Bu meme mukutumine wewe ne bantu bebe disama dikole dia tshiambu, bonsu nuvua mua kuikala bamane kubutuka." 
Exodus9:16 Kadi ndi mukushiye ne muoyi, bua ujadike bukole buanyi, kabidi bua lumu luanyi lumanyike pa buloba bujima." 
Exodus9:17 Kadi utshidi anu uditambisha, ubenga mua kutekela bantu banyi." 
Exodus9:18 Nanku, malaba pa diba edi, nendokeshe mvula mukole wa mabue, udi kayi muanji kuloka mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu too ne mpindiewu.’" 
Exodus9:19 Nanku tuma diyi lukasa bua bantu bumushe bimuna biabu ne bintu biabu bionsu bidi mu mpata, bualu bantu ne bintu bikale mu mpata nebifue ku mabue a mvula.”" 
Exodus9:20 Balombodi bakuabu ba mu bukalenga kuangata bualu abu ne mushinga, kubueja bapika babu ne bimuna biabu bionsu mu nzubu." 
Exodus9:21 Kadi balombodi bakuabu kabavua bangata miaku ya Maweja-Nangila ne mushinga. Bavua bashiya bena mudimu babu ne bimuna biabu mu mpata. 
Exodus9:22 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Olola diboku mulu bua mvula mukole wa mabue aloke, alokele bena ditunga dia Ejipitu, bimuna biabu ne bintu bionsu bidi mu madimi." 
Exodus9:23 Moshe kuela dikombu mulu. Maweja-Nangila kulokesha mvula mukole wa makubakuba ne wa mabue. 
Exodus9:24 Mvula mukole wa mabue ne makubakuba wa nanku katshia kavua muanji kuloka mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. 
Exodus9:25 Mabue a mvula awu kushipa bantu ne bimuna bia mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Kunyangakajaye kabidi bikunyibua bivua mu madimi ne mitshi yonsu. 
Exodus9:26 Kadi kavua muloke mu Ngoshene to, bualu mmuaba uvua bena Izrayele basombe." 
Exodus9:27 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikidisha Moshe ne Arone, kubambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmuenze amu bimpe, kena ne bualu to. Meme ne bantu banyi tudi benze bibi." 
Exodus9:28 Numulombe: alekele kulokesha mvula wa makubakuba ne mabue, bualu mbimane kuntonda. Nennulekele, nuye. Tshiena nnulama kabidi to." 
Exodus9:29 Moshe kumuandamuna ne: — Pangumuka mu musoku emu, nengele bianza mulu kudi Maweja-Nangila bua mvula wa makubakuba ne mabue akamuke. Nanku neujadike ne: buloba buonsu mbua Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus9:30 Kadi ndi mumanye ne: wewe ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe, kanuena banji kutshina Maweja-Nangila to." 
Exodus9:31 Bikunyibua bikuabu bivua pa madimi kunyanguka bualu bikavua bimane kupatula miepu, biela ne bilongu." 
Exodus9:32 Kadi bikunyibua bikuabu kabivua binyanguke, bualu kabivua bianji kutoloka to." 
Exodus9:33 Moshe kumuka kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kupatuka mu musoku. Kuelaye bianza mulu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Mvula kukamuka, makubakuba ne mabue a mvula kujika." 
Exodus9:34 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu umona ne: mvula wakamuki, kabidi makubakuba ne mabue a mvula biajiki, kutungunukaye amu ne tshilema tshiende. Yeye ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende kuenza kabidi amu tshitunu." 
Exodus9:35 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mulekele bena Izrayele to, bualu uvua ne tshitunu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mudianjile kuambila Moshe." 
Exodus10:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Uye kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Meme ke udi mumupe muoyi wa tshitunu, yeye ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bua mmone mua kuenza bishima bionsu ebi mu ditunga diende." 
Exodus10:2 Nanku wewe Moshe neumone mua kumanyisha muanebe wa balume ne muikuluebe mundi mulembakaje bena Ejipitu, muenze bishima bionsu ebi mu ditunga diabu. Ke munudi mua kujadika ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus10:3 Moshe ne Arone kuya kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Ebrewu, udi wamba ne: “Mbimpe udipuekeshe kumpala kuanyi. Ulekele bantu banyi bena Izrayele baye kuntendelela." 
Exodus10:4 Kadi pawikala ubenga anu kubenga bua kulekela bantu banyi, malaba ndi ntuma mpasu mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus10:5 Mpasu ayi neyikile panshi, ipafikishe fitutuu. Neyidie bintu bionsu bivua bishale pa madimi, bivua mabue a mvula kaayi nenyange, too ne mitshi yonsu idi imena mu madimi enu." 
Exodus10:6 Mpasu neyuwule mu nzubu muebe tente, mu nzubu ya balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe too ne mu nzubu ya bena Ejipitu bakuabu bonsu. Kabidi bankambua benu kabavua banji kumona tshipupu tshia mushindu ewu to.” Moshe kupatuka, kushiyangana ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus10:7 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga kukonka mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Muntu ewu neanyange ditunga dietu too ne ku diba kayi? Lekela bena Izrayele, baye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bualu ditunga dia Ejipitu didi mua kubutuka!" 
Exodus10:8 Bena Ejipitu kupingaja Moshe ne Arone kudi mukalenga wabu. Awu kubambila ne: — Nuye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kadi badi ne bua kuya menemene mbanganyi? 
Exodus10:9 Moshe kumuandamuna ne: — Tuyaya bonsu pamue: bansonga betu ne bantu bakulakaje, bana betu ba balume ne ba bakaji ne bimuna bietu bionsu, mikoku, ngombe ne mbuji. Bualu tuyaya kuenza tshibilu bua Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus10:10 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuandamuna ne nsenda ne: — Maweja-Nangila ikale nenu! Tshiena mua kuitaba bua nuye ne bakaji ne bana to, bualu nudi nuleja patoke munudi ne meji makuabu mabi munda muenu." 
Exodus10:11 Kabiena mua kuenzeka to. Nuenu bantu balume bu munudi nujinga kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, nuye nkayenu. Kuipatabu Moshe ne Arone muaba uvua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus10:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Olola diboku, mpasu ipatuke mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu, idie bintu bionsu bidi mu madimi, bivua mabue a mvula kaayi manyange." 
Exodus10:13 Moshe kuolola dikombu mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Dituku adi too ne butuku, Maweja-Nangila kutuma lupepele lufumina kudi diba dipatukila. Butshia dinda, lupepele alu kupaluisha mpasu." 
Exodus10:14 Mpasu ayi ivua mipite bungi mu ditunga dijima dia Ejipitu, ikila miaba yonsu. Katshia mpasu kayivua mianji kumueneka bungi abu. Kabidi mikuabu kayena mua kumueneka kabidi bungi abu to." 
Exodus10:15 Ivua mikile panshi, mipafikishe fitutuu. Ivua idia bintu bionsu bivua mabue a mvula kaayi manyange too ne bimuma bionsu bivua ku mitshi. Ka-kuvua kushala tshintu tshibishi nansha tshimue ku mitshi yonsu ya mu ditunga dia Ejipitu nansha pa madimi." 
Exodus10:16 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila Moshe ne Arone lukasa wamba ne: — Ndi muenzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu bibi ne nuenu kabidi! 
Exodus10:17 Mpindiewu ndi nnulomba ne: Numbuikidile bubi buanyi. Nundombele kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu angumushile dinyoka edi dia lufu. 
Exodus10:18 Moshe kumuka kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. 
Exodus10:19 Maweja-Nangila kutuma lupepele lukole lufumina kudi diba dibuelela. Lupepele alu kuipata mpasu yonsu, kuyituma mu Mayi manene makunze. Mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ka-muvua mushale kabidi mpasu nansha umue to." 
Exodus10:20 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mulekele bena Izrayele to, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumupeshe muoyi wa tshitunu." 
Exodus10:21 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Olola tshianza mulu, midima yenzeke mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, midima mikole mipite idi bantu bafuane kukuata mu bianza!" 
Exodus10:22 Moshe kolola tshianza mulu, midima mikole kuenzeka mu ditunga dia Ejipitu matuku asatu." 
Exodus10:23 Matuku asatu awu, bena Ejipitu kabavua ne mushindu wa kuendakana, bualu kabavua mua kumona bantu nabu to. Kadi muaba uvua bena Izrayele basombele uvua butoke." 
Exodus10:24 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila Moshe kumuambila ne: — Nuenu bantu balume, bakaji benu ne bana, nuye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, kadi bimuna bienu, mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe, bishale munemu." 
Exodus10:25 Moshe kumukonka ne: — Wewe neutupe bimuna bitudi mua kuya kuosha bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu anyi? 
Exodus10:26 Tuetu katuena mua kushiya tshimuna tshietu nansha tshimue. Tuyaya nabi bionsu, bualu tuyaya kutendelela nabi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kabidi netumanye bimuna bidiye musue bua tuetu kumulambula amu patuafika kutudi tuya." 
Exodus10:27 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mulekele bena Izrayele to, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumupeshe muoyi wa tshitunu." 
Exodus10:28 Mukalenga awu kuipata Moshe wamba ne: — Umuka! Kuena mua kufika kabidi apa to. Dituku diwafika kabidi apa, udi ufua!" 
Exodus10:29 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Anu muwambi amu. Tshiena mua kumonangana nebe kabidi to. 
Exodus11:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ndi ntumina mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bantu bende dinyoka dia ndekelu. Nanku neanulekele, anuipate mene kashidi mu ditunga diende." 
Exodus11:2 Wambile bena Izrayele bonsu ne: Bangabanga ne kumuka mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, nuenu bonsu balume ne bakaji, nulombe kudi bena mutumba nenu, bintu bienza ne mpawungi nansha ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Exodus11:3 Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha bena Izrayele. Kupetabu diakalenga kudi bena Ejipitu. Kabidi Moshe uvua ne lumu lunene mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Bavua bamunemeke bikole kudi balombodi ba mu bukalenga ne kudi bena Ejipitu bakuabu bonsu. 
Exodus11:4 Moshe kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mundankulu, nempitshile mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus11:5 Nenshipe muanabute yonsu wa bena Ejipitu biangatshile kudi muanabute wa mukalenga, uvua mua kupiana bumfumu bua ditunga too ne kudi muanabute wa mukaji mupika udi upelesha bukula. Nenshipe kabidi bamuanabute ba bimuna." 
Exodus11:6 Mu ditunga dia Ejipitu nemuikale madilu adibu kabayi banji kudila musangu mukuabu ne adibu kabayi mua kudila kabidi to. 
Exodus11:7 Kadi bena Izrayele bonsu too ne bimuna biabu, nansha mbua mene kena mua kubabuikila to. Nanku nenumanye ne: Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, ndi nsunguluja bena Ejipitu ne bena Izrayele.”" 
Exodus11:8 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe bonsu nebantuile binu, balengelela ne: “Umbukayi mene ne bantu bonsu baudi nabu!” Diba adi nenshishe kuya. Moshe kumuka ne tshiji tshikole kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus11:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: — Pikala mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kayi ukuteleja, bidi amu bua mmone mua kuenza bishima bia bungi mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus11:10 Moshe ne Arone bakavua bamane kuenza bishima bia bungi, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mutangile. Kadi mukalenga ewu kena mulekele bena Izrayele to, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumupeshe muoyi wa tshitunu." 
Exodus12:1 Pavua Moshe ne Arone mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, Maweja-Nangila kubambila ne:" 
Exodus12:2 “Ngondu ewu ikale wenu wa ntuadijilu wa tshidimu. 
Exodus12:3 Nuambile bena Izrayele bonsu ne: Dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu ewu, nusungule muana wa mukoku nansha muana wa mbuji ku diku dionsu nansha ku nzubu yonsu." 
Exodus12:4 Pikala bena mu diku bakese kabayi mua kudia munyinyi awu kujikija, badisange ne bena mutumba bilondeshile bungi bua bantu. Kadi nusungule muana wa mukoku nansha muana wa mbuji udi mukumbane bua muntu yonsu kupetaye munyinyi wonsu udiye mua kudia." 
Exodus12:5 Muana wa mukoku nansha muana wa mbuji awu ikale wa tshidimu tshimue, kayi ne tshilema pambidi, kabidi anu mulume wa nyama." 
Exodus12:6 Nulame tshimuna atshi too ne ku dituku dia dikumi ne dinayi dia ngondu ewu. Pashishe bena Izrayele bonsu nebashipe nyama wabu awu dilolu. 
Exodus12:7 Ku nzubu yonsu kudibu badie munyinyi awu, nebalabe mashi ku dibaya didi kulu kua tshiibi ne ku mabaya adi ku nseke yatshi." 
Exodus12:8 Butuku abu nebakange munyinyi awu. Nebaudie ne mampa adi kaayi mela buanga, kabidi ne biseki bia buanji." 
Exodus12:9 Kadi bitupa bionsu bia nyama awu, nansha mutu, bibelu ne bia munda mene, kanuena mua kubidia bibishi nansha bilamba to, anu biosha muiku." 
Exodus12:10 Kabidi munyinyi awu nudie ujike dituku dimue. Pikalawu mushale dinda nuwoshe. 
Exodus12:11 Nudie munyinyi awu mushindu ewu: nusuike mukaba mu tshimonu, dikombu ku bianza, bisabata ku makasa. Nudie anu lukasa lukasa, bualu ntshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus12:12 “Butuku abu, meme Maweja-Nangila nempitshile mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Nenshipe bamuanabute bonsu ba bantu ne ba nyama. Kabidi nembutule mvidie idi bena Ejipitu batendelela." 
Exodus12:13 Mashi adi ku muelelu wa biibi bia nzubu inudi nusomba awu, neikale tshimanyinu tshidi mua kunupandisha. Pambamona mashi awu, nempite mu njila tshiyi imubutula to. Nanku nembutule anu bena Ejipitu." 
Exodus12:14 “Nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu nuikale nuvuluka dituku edi. Nungenzele meme Maweja-Nangila tshibilu. Mukenji ewu ushale kashidi.” 
Exodus12:15 Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: “Matuku malondangane muanda mutekete, nudie anu mampa kaayi mela buanga. Dituku dia kumpala, numushe manga a mampa onsu adi mu nzubu yenu. Biangatshile ku dituku dia kumpala too ne ku dituku dia muanda mutekete, muntu yonsu udi udia mampa mela buanga, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Exodus12:16 Dituku dia kumpala ne dituku dia muanda mutekete, ikale matuku a kuenza masangisha a tshijila. Matuku awu kanuenji midimu mikuabu to, anu ya kulamba biakudia." 
Exodus12:17 “Misangu yonsu mwuluke tshibilu tshia kudia mampa kaayi mela buanga. Bualu tshidi tshinuvuluija dituku dimvua mupatule bantu benu mu Ejipitu. Mukenji ewu nuulame kashidi ku ndelanganyi ne ku ndelanganyi yenu yonsu. 
Exodus12:18 Nanku matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala dilolu, too ne ku matuku makumi abidi ne dimue dilolu, nudie anu mampa kaayi mela buanga." 
Exodus12:19 Matuku muanda mutekete malondangane awu, kanulami buanga bua mampa mu nzubu yenu to. Muntu yonsu udi udia mampa mela buanga, nansha yeye muenyi anyi muena ditunga, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Exodus12:20 Nunku kanuena mua kudia bintu biela buanga bua mampa to. Miaba yonsu inudi basombe, nudie anu mampa kaayi mela buanga. ”" 
Exodus12:21 Moshe kubikila bakulu bonsu ba bena Izrayele kubambila ne: — Muntu yonsu asungule muana wa mukoku nansha muana wa mbuji bua meku enu. Numushipe bua kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. 
Exodus12:22 Nuangate mabeji a mutshi wa isope. Nuatue mu mashi adi mu dilongu. Nulabe mashi awu ku dibaya didi kulu kua tshiibi ne ku mabaya adi ku nseke yatshi. Kabidi nushale anu ku nzubu yenu too ne muatshia butuku. Muntu kapatuki to. 
Exodus12:23 Papita Maweja-Nangila bua kushipa bena Ejipitu, neamone mashi adi kulu kua tshiibi ne ku mabaya adi ku nseke yatshi. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kakuitaba bua mushipianganyi udiye mutume abuele mu nzubu yenu bua kunushipa to." 
Exodus12:24 Nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu nuikale nuenza bualu ebu kashidi. 
Exodus12:25 Panuafika mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila munulaye, nuikale nuenza tshibilu etshi." 
Exodus12:26 Pikala bana benu banukonka ne: nudi nuenza tshibilu etshi bua tshinyi? 
Exodus12:27 Nubandamune ne: “Mmulambu wa tshivulukilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Pavua bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, Maweja-Nangila uvua mushipe bena Ejipitu. Kadi uvua mupitshile patupu ku nzubu ya bana betu, kayi muimane bua kubashipa. Uvua mutufuile luse ne bena meku etu bonsu.” Ke bena Izrayele kudiela panshi bua kukuila Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus12:28 Kuyabu kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe ne Arone. 
Exodus12:29 Mundankulu, Maweja-Nangila kushipa bamuanabute bonsu ba mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, biangatshile ku muanabute wa mukalenga wa ditunga, too ne ku muanabute wa muntu tshianana uvua mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kushipaye kabidi ne bamuanabute ba bimuna." 
Exodus12:30 Butuku abu mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne bena Ejipitu bakuabu babike ku tulu, kudilabu miadi bikole. Bualu muanabute wa ku nzubu kua muntu yonsu uvua mufue." 
Exodus12:31 Anu butuku abu mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kubikila Moshe ne Arone kubambila ne: — Umukayi ne bena Izrayele mu ditunga dianyi, nuye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila bu munuvua bandombe." 
Exodus12:32 Angatayi bimuna bienu, nuye nabi. Kadi nundombele kudi Mvidi Mukulu wenu, angele lupemba." 
Exodus12:33 Bena Ejipitu kuipata bena Izrayele mu ditunga diabu bamba ne: “Umukayi lukasa, bualu tudi mua kubutuka.”" 
Exodus12:34 Ke muvua bena Izrayele ne bua kuambula bukula bua mampa buvuabu bamane kusopa, buanga kabuyi buanji kubandisha ditapi. Kuambulabu kabidi ne tushete tuvuabu boshile mampa. Kubisuikabu mu bilamba, kubiambula pa makaya." 
Exodus12:35 Bena Izrayele kulomba bena Ejipitu bilamba ne bintu bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nansha ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bu muvua Moshe mumane kubambila. 
Exodus12:36 Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha bena Izrayele. Kubanemekabu kudi bena Ejipitu, kupetabu bintu bivuabu balomba bena Ejipitu. Ke muvua bena Izrayele bapawule bintu bionsu bivua bena Ejipitu nabi." 
Exodus12:37 Pashishe bena Izrayele kumuka mu Ramsese bua kuya ku Sukote. Bavua bantu balume binunu nkama isambombu, katuyi babale bakaji, bana ne bantu bakulakaje." 
Exodus12:38 Bantu bakuabu musumba munene, ba bisamba bishilangane, bavua ne bena Izrayele mu njila amu, kabidi ne bimuna bipite bungi: mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe." 
Exodus12:39 Nanku bena Izrayele kuenza mikata ne ditapi dia bukula buvuabu basopa kabuyi buanji kubanda, buvuabu bumuka nabu mu Ejipitu. Kabavua ne diba dia kulamba biakudia, nansha dia kuangata bintu bia luendu. Bualu bena Ejipitu bavua benda babipatshila." 
Exodus12:40 Bena Izrayele bavuabashale mu Ejipitu bidimu nkama inayi ne makumi asatu. 
Exodus12:41 Bidimu abi nkama inayi ne makumi asatu bikumbana, dituku dia tshivulukilu, bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele kupatuka mu Ejipitu balondangane bimpe mu milongu." 
Exodus12:42 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mutshishe butuku abu bua kupatula bantu bende mu Ejipitu, ke mudi bena Izrayele pabu, ku ndelanganyi ne ndelanganyi, mua kutshisha dituku adi bua kuvuluka dipatuka diabu mu Ejipitu, bualu ndituku dia tshijila." 
Exodus12:43 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: — Mikenji ya tshibilu tshia Dipita dianyi idi nunku: “Muntu muenyi kena mua kudia biakudia bia Dipita dianyi to. 
Exodus12:44 “Mupika yonsu unudi basumbe, numuteke panshi bua amone mua kubidia." 
Exodus12:45 “Muena mudimu unudi nufuta, nansha muenyi udi usomba ku mbelu kuenu, kabena mua kudia biakudia abi to." 
Exodus12:46 “Nubidile anu mu nzubu, kanupatuki ne munyinyi pa mbelu. “Kanuzaji mifuba ya nyama." 
Exodus12:47 “Bena Izrayele bonsu bikale benza tshibilu etshi. 
Exodus12:48 “Pikala muenyi udi kumbelu kuebe musue kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dianyi, nuteke bantu balume bonsu, ne bana mene, ba mu diku diabu panshi, bua bikale bu bena Izrayele. “Kadi, muntu udi kayi muteke panshi, kena mua kudia biakudia abi to.”" 
Exodus12:49 “Mikenji eyi idi bua bantu bonsu, benyi ne bena ditunga.”" 
Exodus12:50 Bena Izrayele bonsu kuenza bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe ne Arone. 
Exodus12:51 Anu dituku adi. Maweja-Nangila kupatula bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, balondangane mu bisamba biabu." 
Exodus13:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus13:2 — Muanabute yonsu wa balume wa bena Izrayele, udi mukaji ulela, nansha wa tshimuna, umujidile, ashale wanyi." 
Exodus13:3 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nuvuluke dituku edi. Kanudi mampa adibu bela buanga to. Bualu ke dituku divua Maweja-Nangila muleje bukole buende, munupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:4 Nuvua bapatuke lelu, mu ngondu ewu wa Abibe." 
Exodus13:5 Panuafika mu ditunga dia bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua benu, ditunga didi ne biakudia bipite bungi, nuikale nuenza tshibilu etshi, ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, mu ngondu wa Abibe." 
Exodus13:6 Matuku malondangane muanda mutekete, nudie anu mampa adi kaayi mela buanga. Dituku dia muanda mutekete, nuenzele Maweja-Nangila tshibilu bua kumutendelela." 
Exodus13:7 Matuku muanda mutekete awu, nudie anu mampa adi kaayi mela buanga. Kanulami kabidi mampa mela buanga, nansha buanga bua mampa mene, mu ditunga dienu dijima." 
Exodus13:8 Pa kuenza tshibilu etshi, mmianyishe bana benu ba balume ne: Tudi tuenza nunku, bua kuvuluka muvua Maweja-Nangila mutupatule mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:9 Tshibilu etshi netshikale bu tshimanyinu ku diboku nansha pa mpala yenu, bua kunuvuluija dipatuka dienu mu Ejipitu. Nanku, netshinuvuluije munudi ne bua kumanyisha bantu mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, uvua munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:10 Tshibilu etshi, nutshienze ku tshidimu tshionsu, dituku diatshi." 
Exodus13:11 Moshe kuamba kabidi ne: — Pikala Maweja-Nangila munufikishe mu ditunga dia bena Kenaane, divuaye munulaye nuenu ne bankambua benu," 
Exodus13:12 nujidile muanabute yonsu wa muntu nansha wa tshimuna, bua ashale wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus13:13 Kadi muanabute wa balume wa nyama wa mpunde, numupikule ku muana wa mukoku. Panuikala kanuyi mua kumupikula, numushipe nukoyobole nshingu. Nupikule kabidi muanabute yonsu wa balume wa muntu." 
Exodus13:14 Dituku dikuabu pikala bana benu banukonka tshinudi nuenzela nanku, nubambile ne: “Tudi tuvuluka bukole bua Maweja-Nangila, uvua mutupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:15 Bu muvua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ubenga mua kutulekela, Maweja-Nangila uvua mushipe bamuanabute bonsu ba mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, ba bantu ne ba bimuna. Ke patudi tushipela Maweja-Nangila bamuanabute ba bimuna. Kadi tudi tupikula bamuanabute ba balume ba bantu.”" 
Exodus13:16 Nanku, milambu eyi neinuvuluije bualu ebu, bu mudi tshimanyinu ku diboku nansha pa mpala. Neinuvuluije muvua Maweja-Nangila munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ku bukole buende." 
Exodus13:17 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mumane kulekela bena Izrayele, Mvidi Mukulu kena mubaleje njila wa tshikosu wa mu ditunga dia Peleshete to. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumanye ne: pikale mvita mijuke, nebatshine, bapingane kabidi mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus13:18 Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu kunyungulula bena Izrayele. Kulondabu njila wa mu tshipela bua kuya luseke ludi Mayi manene makunze. Bena Izrayele kupatuka mu Ejipitu, balondangane mu bisamba biabu." 
Exodus13:19 Moshe kuambula mifuba ya Yozefe. Bualu Yozefe uvua mutshipeshe bana babu, mubalombe ne: “Pikala Mvidi Mukulu munupikule, nujule mifuba yanyi muaba ewu, nuye nayi. ”" 
Exodus13:20 Bena Izrayele bumuke ku Sukote, kuasabu mitanda yabu mu Etame ku muelelu wa tshipela." 
Exodus13:21 Mu munya, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mu divuba kumpala kua bena Izrayele bua kubaleja njila. Kadi butuku uvua mu tshimunyi tshia kapia bua kutokeshila bena Izrayele njila. Ke muvuabu mua kuenda butuku ne munya." 
Exodus13:22 Nanku, divuba divua kumpala kua bena Izrayele mu munya, ne tshimunyi tshia kapia tshivua kumpala kuabu butuku. Kabivua biumuka kumpala kuabu to. Bivua anu Ubalombola diba dionsu." 
Exodus14:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus14:2 — Manyisha bena Izrayele bapingane, base mitanda yabu kumpala kua Pi-Hahirote, pankatshi pa Migdole ne mayi manene, pabuipi ne Baale-Sefone." 
Exodus14:3 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu neele meji ne: bena Izrayele mbapambuke mu njila, bajimine mu tshipela." 
Exodus14:4 Pashishe, meme Maweja-Nangila nempeshe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muoyi wa tshitunu, bua anulonde. Nanku, nendeje butumbi buanyi, nembabutule, yeye mukalenga ne biluilu biende bionsu. Bena Ejipitu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. Bena Izrayele kuenza bionsu bivuabu babambile abi." 
Exodus14:5 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bena mu bukalenga buende kumvua ne: bena Izrayele mbamane kunyema. Nanku kuambabu ne: “Tudi benze bibi. Katuvua mua kuanyisha bua bapika betu bena Izrayele bumuke to.” 
Exodus14:6 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kulongolola ditempu diende dia mvita lukasa, kubalondakaja ne tshiluilu tshiende." 
Exodus14:7 Kuangataye matempu onsu a mu Ejipitu, kadi nangananga matempu mimpe nkama isambombu. Ditempu dionsu divua ne muendeshi ne bena mvita kabidi." 
Exodus14:8 Maweja-Nangila kupesha mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu muoyi wa tshitunu. Awu kulonda bena Izrayele, bualu bena Izrayele bavua bapatuke mu Ejipitu bu bantu bakadi mua kudienzela malu." 
Exodus14:9 Bena Ejipitu kuangata matempu abu a mvita, tubalu ne bena mvita, kulonda bena Izrayele. Kubasanganabu basombe ku muelelu wa mayi manene makunze, pabuipi ne Pi-Hahirote, batangilangane ne Baale-Sefone." 
Exodus14:10 Bena Izrayele bamone muvua bena Ejipitu babalonda ne mvita, kabidi muvua mukalenga wabu ufika, kutshinabu bikole. Kuelabu Maweja-Nangila mbila mikole bua abambuluishe." 
Exodus14:11 Kukonkabu Moshe ne: — Uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu bua tuetu kuluila mu tshipela bua tshinyi? Mu Ejipitu kamuvua nkita anyi? Tshiuvua mutupatuile mu Ejipitu ntshinyi? 
Exodus14:12 Tuvua bamane kukuambila ne: “Utulekele, tuikale bapika ba bena Ejipitu. Bualu mbimpe kuenzela bena Ejipitu mudimu pa mutu pa kufuila mu tshipela!”" 
Exodus14:13 Moshe kuandamuna bena Izrayele ne: — Nukoleshe muoyi. Kanutshinyi to! Nenumone mudi Maweja-Nangila unupandisha lelu. Bena Ejipitu banudi bamona aba, katshia kanuakubamona kabidi to." 
Exodus14:14 Lekelayi kupampakana, bualu Maweja-Nangila nealuangane mvita eyi pa mutu penu." 
Exodus14:15 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Lekela kungela mbila bua imuambuluishe. Ambila amu bantu ne: nutungunuke ne luendu. 
Exodus14:16 Kadi, wewe olola dikombu diebe pa mayi, apanduluke. Bena Izrayele basabuke ku makasa kuma." 
Exodus14:17 Nempeshe bena Ejipitu muoyi mukole wa tshitunu bua banulonde. Pashishe meme nendeje butumbi buanyi. Nembutule mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne tshiluilu tshiende tshijima, matempu ne badi babanda pa tubalu." 
Exodus14:18 Pambaleja butumbi buanyi nanku, bena Ejipitu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus14:19 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuya kuimana kunyima kua mitanda ya bena Izrayele. Divuba kabidi, divua kumpala kuabu, kupingana kunyima kuabu." 
Exodus14:20 Nanku divuba divua dimane pankatshi pa mitanda ya bena Izrayele ne mitanda ya bena Ejipitu, ditokeshila bena Izrayele, difila midima kudi bena Ejipitu. Nanku butuku bujima baluishi kabavua mua kupetangana." 
Exodus14:21 Butuku abu, Moshe kuolola tshianza pa mayi manene. Butuku bujima Maweja-Nangila kutuma tshipepela tshikole, tshifumina luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Tshipepela atshi kupandulula mayi manene, buloba buma kumueneka." 
Exodus14:22 Mayi awu, kupanduluka bu tshimana ku dia balume, tshikuabu ku dia bakaji. Bena Izrayele kusabuka ku makasa kume." 
Exodus14:23 Bena Ejipitu kubalondakaja ne tubalu tua mukalenga wabu, matempu, ne bavua babanda pa tubalu. Kulondabu bena Izrayele too ne mu mayi manene." 
Exodus14:24 Patshiatshia, Maweja-Nangila, uvua mu divuba ne mu tshimunyi tshia kapia, kumona tshiluilu tshia mvita tshia bena Ejipitu. Kutshiompakajaye tshiluilu atshi." 
Exodus14:25 Kunyangaye nkata ya matempu abu a mvita. Kupangabu mua kutungunuka ne luendu. Ke bena Ejipitu kuela mbila ne: — Tunyemayi bena Izrayele, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ubaluila mvita bua kututshimuna." 
Exodus14:26 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Olola tshianza pa mayi manene, bua mayi apingane, abutule bena Ejipitu ne tshiluilu tshiabu." 
Exodus14:27 Moshe kuolola tshianza pa mayi. Patshiatshia mayi kupingana muawu mua kale. Bena Ejipitu kunyema. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubabutula bonsu munkatshi mua mayi. 
Exodus14:28 Mayi awu kubutula matempu ne bavua babanda pa tubalu bia tshiluilu tshijima tshia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, tshivuabu balonda natshi bena Izrayele mu mayi. Muntu nansha umue wa bena Ejipitu kena mupande to." 
Exodus14:29 Kadi bena Izrayele bavua bapita munkatshi mua mayi manene ku makasa kume, mayi mimane bu tshimana ku dia balume, tshikuabu ku dia bakaji." 
Exodus14:30 Dituku adi ke divua Maweja-Nangila musungidile bena Izrayele ku bianza bia bena Ejipitu. Bena Izrayele kumona bitalu bia bena Ejipitu ku muelelu wa mayi. 
Exodus14:31 Kujadikabu ne: Maweja-Nangila mmubasungidile mu bianza bia bena Ejipitu ku bukole buende. Bantu bonsu kutshina Maweja-Nangila, kumutekemena. Kutekemena kabidi kudi muntu wende Moshe." 
Exodus15:1 Pashishe, Moshe ne bena Izrayele kuimbila Maweja-Nangila musambu, bamba ne: Nengimbile Maweja-Nangila musambu: mmuleje bukole budiye nabu! Mmubutule mu mayi tubalu ne bavua babandapu." 
Exodus15:2 Maweja-Nangila udi bukole buanyi. Anu yeye ke Musungidi wanyi. Udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Ndi tumutumbisha. Udi Mvidi Mukulu wa tatu wanyi. Ndi mmanyisha bantu bunene buende. 
Exodus15:3 Maweja-Nangila udi tshilobu tshia mvita. Dina diende mMaweja-Nangila. 
Exodus15:4 Udi mubutule mu mayi manene, matempu ne biluilu bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Kubutulaye bilobu bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bajimine mu Mayi manene makunze." 
Exodus15:5 Mayi kubabuikila. Kudinabu too ne panshi pa mayi, bu mudi dibue dia bujitu." 
Exodus15:6 Maweja-Nangila, tshianza tshiebe tshia balume tshidi ne bukole, tshidi tshibutula baluishi bebe." 
Exodus15:7 Bukole buebe mbupite. Budi butshimuna badi bakubenga. Tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshibosha, bu mudi kapia kosha bisosa." 
Exodus15:8 Ku bukole bua tshiji tshiebe, mayi kudisanga muaba umue. Mavuala onsu kukuatakana bu tshimana, mayi menza dibue munkatshi mua mayi manene." 
Exodus15:9 Bena lukuna betu kuamba ne: “Netubalonde, tubapete. Nebabanyangane bintu biabu, netubidie tuukute. Netutule muele wa mvita, tubabunde bonsu.”" 
Exodus15:10 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila, wewe kutuma lupepele. Mayi manene kubuikila bena Ejipitu. Kudinabu too ne panshi pa mayi, bu tshiamu tshia bujitu." 
Exodus15:11 Maweja-Nangila, ku mvidie idibu batendelela, udi ukufuana nnganyi? Kakuena udi wa tshijila, amu wewe! Kakuena mukuabu udi mua kuenza malu a kukema! Kakuena mukuabu utudi ne bua kutshina. Kakuena mukuabu utudi tutumbisha." 
Exodus15:12 Wewe kuolola diboku diebe dia bukole, buloba kumina baluishi betu!" 
Exodus15:13 Wewe kupikula bantu bebe! Wewe kubananga, kubalombola ne bukole! Wewe kubafikisha mu ditunga dia tshijila!" 
Exodus15:14 Bantu kumvua lumu alu, kuzakala! Bena Peleshete kukuatshika bowa." 
Exodus15:15 Bamfumu ba bena Edome kutshina! Bilobu bia bena Mowabe kuzakala! Bena Kenaane kupanga tshia kuenza. 
Exodus15:16 Bowa ne dipampakana kubakuata bonsu. Baluishi kumona bukole buebe. Kuimanabu bu mabue, kabayi banyunga. Bantu baudi musungule, mubenze bebe, kupita talalaa, kamuyi bualu." 
Exodus15:17 Maweja-Nangila, wewe kubafikisha, kubasombesha, pa mukuna uudi mudisunguile, pa muaba uudi musue kusomba, mu nzubu wa tshijila uudi mudiashile." 
Exodus15:18 Maweja-Nangila, udi mfumu wa kashidi ne kashidi tshiendelele!" 
Exodus15:19 Pavua tubalu tua mvita, matempu ne badi babandapu bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu bibuele mu mayi manene, Maweja-Nangila kubibuikila ne mayi. Kadi bena Izrayele kusabuka mayi ku makasa kume." 
Exodus15:20 Diba adi muambi mukaji Miriyame, muanabu ne Arone, kuangata ngoma wende mukese. Bamamu bonsu ba bena Izrayele kumulonda, kuimba ngoma, kuja ne maja." 
Exodus15:21 Miriyame kuambila bena Izrayele ne: Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu: mmuleje bukole budiye nabu, mmubutule tubalu ne bavua babandapu!" 
Exodus15:22 Moshe kumuka ne bena Izrayele ku Mayi manene makunze, kuya mu tshipela tshia Shure. Kuendabu mu tshipela matuku asatu, kabayi bapeta mayi a kunua." 
Exodus15:23 Kufikabu ku Mara. Kabavua mua kunua mayi avua muaba awu, bualu avua ne bululu. Ke pavuabu babikila muaba awu ne: Mara (mmumue ne: a bululu)." 
Exodus15:24 Bena Izrayele kunungana, bakonka Moshe ne: “Netunue tshinyi?”" 
Exodus15:25 Moshe kusengelela Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila kumuleja tshitupa tshia mutshi. Moshe kutshiela mu mayi. Bululu mu mayi kujika. Ke muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe bena Izrayele meyi ne mikenji biende, mubatete kabidi." 
Exodus15:26 Maweja-Nangila kubambila ne: “Nuenu bateleje diyi dianyi meme, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bakumbaje bilenga bindi nnuambila, batumikile mikenji yanyi, tshiakunutumina dikenga nansha dimue, bu mumvua mutumine bena Ejipitu. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, udi unondapa.”" 
Exodus15:27 Pashishe, bena Izrayele kufika ku Elime. Muaba awu, uvua mpokolu ya mayi dikumi ne ibidi ne mabue a ngaji makumi muanda mutekete. Kuasabu pabuipi ne mayi awu." 
Exodus16:1 Bena Izrayele kumuka bonsu mu Elime. Mu matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu muibidi, kunyima kua dipatuka diabu mu Ejipitu, kufikabu mu tshipela tshia Sine, tshidi pankatshi pa Elime ne mukuna wa Sinayi." 
Exodus16:2 Mu tshipela amu, bena Izrayele kujana Moshe ne Arone," 
Exodus16:3 bamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua mua kutubutuila nansha mu Ejipitu, mutuvua tudia minyinyi ngesu tente ne mampa tuukuta, basombele panshi. Kadi nudi batufikisha mu tshipela emu bua kutubutula ne nzala!" 
Exodus16:4 Maweja Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ndi musue kukutumina biakudia bia mu diulu. Dituku dionsu, bena Izrayele nebaboye biakudia bikumbane, kadi anu bua dituku adi. Ke mundi nnuteta, bua meme kujadika ne: bena Izrayele nebitabe mikenji yanyi anyi?" 
Exodus16:5 Muladilu wa Dituku dia Dikisha, pikala bena Izrayele balamba biakudia bivuabu baboya bua kudia dituku dimue, nebituntumuke bienze bia matuku abidi." 
Exodus16:6 Moshe ne Arone kuambila bena Izrayele bonsu ne: — Dilolu edi, nenujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus16:7 Kadi dinda nenumone butumbi buende, bualu mmumane kumvua munudi numujana. Tuetu katuena bakumbane nansha bua nutujane." 
Exodus16:8 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Maweja-Nangila dilolu edi neanupeshe munyinyi, dinda neanupeshe mampa, nudie nuukute, bualu mmumvue bijanu bienu. Yeye ke unudi nujana. Kanuena nutujana tuetu to. Tuetu tudi tshinyi?" 
Exodus16:9 Moshe kuambila Arone ne: — Bikila bena Izrayele bonsu, basemene kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu mmumane kumvua bijanu biabu." 
Exodus16:10 Patshivua Arone wambila bena Izrayele malu awu, bena Izrayele batangila ku tshipela, kumonabu butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila mu divuba." 
Exodus16:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus16:12 — Ndi mumane kumvua bijanu bia bena Izrayele. Kadi ubambile ne: “Dilolu edi, nenudie munyinyi: dinda nenudie mampa nuukute, bua nujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu!”" 
Exodus16:13 Dilolu adi, nyunyi ya tulumbu kuikila muaba uvua bena Izrayele batudile. Butshia dinda, lume kutalaja miaba yonsu ivua pabuipi ne mitanda yabu." 
Exodus16:14 Miaba yonsu ayi kushalamu bintu bikese bikuatakane bu mudi mabue a mvula. 
Exodus16:15 Kadi, bu muvua bena Izrayele kabayi bamanye bintu abi, kukonkanganabu ne: — Etshi ntshinyi? Moshe kubambila ne: — Bintu ebi mmampa adi Maweja-Nangila munutumine bua nuenu kudia." 
Exodus16:16 Maweja-Nangila mmuambe bua nuenu kuboya biakudia bikumbane bua muntu yonsu kudia kuukuta. “Nanku muntu yonsu aboye anu litre inayi ku muntu ku muntu, bilondeshile bungi bua bena diende.”" 
Exodus16:17 Bena Izrayele kuambula biakudia abi. Bamue kuambula bia bungi, bakuabu kuambula bikese." 
Exodus16:18 Kupimabu biakudia bionsu abi. Muntu uvua muambule bia bungi, kavua nabi bipite, uvua muambule bikese, uvua anu nabi bikumbane. Muntu yonsu uvua nabi bungi buvuaye nabu dikenga." 
Exodus16:19 Moshe kubambila kabidi ne: — Biakudia ebi, nubidie bijika anu dituku dimue." 
Exodus16:20 Bena Izrayele bakuabu kubenga diyi dia Moshe, kushiya biakudia bikuabu bua kudia dinda. Kadi biakudia abi kubola bionsu, kunyanguka ne bikusu. Moshe kubafikila munda." 
Exodus16:21 Biangatshile ku dituku adi, bena Izrayele kuboya dinda dionsu biakudia bikumbane, bua muntu yonsu kudia kuukuta. Kadi pavua munya ukola, biakudia bivua bishale panshi bivua bienguluka." 
Exodus16:22 Muladilu wa Dituku dia Dikisha, muena Izrayele yonsu uvua wambula litre ya biakudia muanda mukulu pa mutu pa inayi iwaye wambula ku dituku. Bamfumu ba bena Izrayele kuya kumanyisha Moshe bualu abu." 
Exodus16:23 Moshe kubandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmumane kuamba ne: malaba ndituku dia kuikisha, dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila. Nanku nulambe biakudia munudi basue. Pikalabi bishale, nubilame bua kudia malaba." 
Exodus16:24 Bena Izrayele kulama biakudia abi too ne dinda, bu muvua Moshe mubambile. Kadi biakudia kabivua binyanguke bibuele bikusu to." 
Exodus16:25 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nudie biakudia ebi lelu. Kanuakupeta bikuabu pa mbelu to. Bualu lelu ndituku dia Dikisha dia Maweja-Nangila. 
Exodus16:26 Nenuikale nupeta biakudia matuku asambombu malondangane. Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete kanuakubipeta to, bualu ndituku dia kuikisha." 
Exodus16:27 Dituku dia muanda mutekete bena Izrayele bakuabu kumuka mu mitanda bua kukeba biakudia. Kadi kabena babisangana to. 
Exodus16:28 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Moshe ne: — Bena Izrayele nebabenge kuitaba meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi too ne ku diba kaayi? 
Exodus16:29 Nuvuluke ne: ndi munupeshe dituku dia muanda mutekete bua dikale dia dikisha. Ke pandi munupeshe muladilu wa dituku adi, biakudia bikumbane bua nuenu kudia matuku abidi. Nanku, lekelayi kuendakana dituku dia muanda mutekete. Muntu yonsu asombe ku mbelu kuende." 
Exodus16:30 Nanku bantu bonsu kuikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete. 
Exodus16:31 Bena Izrayele kuinyika biakudia abi ne: mmana. Bivua bitoke bifuanangane ne ntete ya koriandre. Kabidi bivua bisheme bu mikata mienza ne buitshi. 
Exodus16:32 Moshe kubamanyisha kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nulame mana makuabu bua kualeja ndelanganyi yenu, imona biakudia bivua Maweja-Nangila unudisha mu tshipela mu dipatuka dienu mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus16:33 Moshe kuambila Arone ne: — Angata litre ya mana inayi, wela mu dibungu. Uteke dibungu adi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua kulamina ndelanganyi yenu." 
Exodus16:34 Arone kuteka dibungu adi kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu, bua kudilama bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus16:35 Bena Izrayele kudia mana awu bidimu makumi anayi, too ne ku difika diabu mu ditunga divua bantu base, nanku too ne papitabu ku mikalu ya ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Exodus16:36 (Mana avua muntu yonsu upeta, avua bu litre inayi. Mmumue ne: tshia dikumi tshimue tshia tshipimu tshia tshibidilu.)" 
Exodus17:1 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mubambile, bena Izrayele kumuka bonsu pamue mu tshipela tshia Sine, benda bimana mu njila bua kuya mu Refidime. Kuasabu mitanda. Kadi muaba awu kauvua mayi a kunua to." 
Exodus17:2 Kutandishabu Moshe, bambe ne: — Tupeshayi mayi a kunua! Moshe kubakonka ne: — Nudi nuntandisha bua tshinyi? Nudi nuteta Maweja-Nangila bualu kaayi?" 
Exodus17:3 Kadi bu muvua bantu bonsu bapungila ne nyota, bavua anu banungana, bamba ne: — Udi mutupatule mu Ejipitu bua tuetu kufua nyota ne bana betu ne bimuna bietu bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus17:4 Moshe kuebeja Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bantu aba badi bakeba kungasa mabue bua kunshipa, mbenzele tshinyi?" 
Exodus17:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Pita kumpala kua bantu ne bamue bakulu ba bena Izrayele. Angata dikombu diuvua mupandulule nadi musulu wa Nile adi. 
Exodus17:6 Meme nengimane kumpala kuenu pa lubuebue ludi pa mukuna wa Sinayi. Utuute dikombu pa lubuebue, mayi apatuke bua bena Izrayele banue. Moshe kutuuta dikombu pa lubuebue, bakulu ba bena Izrayele bonsu batangile." 
Exodus17:7 Bantu kuinyika muaba awu dina ne: Massa (mmumue ne: Diteta) ne Meriba (mmumue ne: Matandu), bualu bena Izrayele bavua batandisha Moshe. Kabidi bavua bateta Maweja-Nangila, badikonka ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi munkatshi muetu anyi kenamu?”" 
Exodus17:8 Bena Amaleke kufika mu Refidime bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. 
Exodus17:9 Moshe kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Sungula bantu ba bukole. Nuye kuluangana ne bena Amaleke. Kadi meme malaba nengimane pa katongobela ka mukuna, mukuate dikombu dia Mvidi Mukulu mu bianza." 
Exodus17:10 Yoshuwa kuya kuluangana ne bena Amaleke, bu muvua Moshe mumuambile. Moshe, Arone ne Ure kubanda pa katongobela ka mukuna." 
Exodus17:11 Pavua Moshe wela tshianza mulu, bena Izrayele bavua bapita bena Amaleke bukole. Pavuaye upuekesha tshianza, bena Amaleke bavua batshimuna bena Izrayele." 
Exodus17:12 Bu muvua maboku a Moshe ashikila, Arone ne Ure kuteka dibue bua Moshe kusomba. Pashishe Arone ne Ure kumukuata ku maboku, ewu eku, mukuabu eku, babandishe maboku too ne ku dilolu." 
Exodus17:13 Ke muvua Yoshuwa mushipe bena Amaleke bonsu, mubabutule nanku." 
Exodus17:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Funda bualu ebu mu mukanda, bua bantu babuvuluke. Umanyishe Yoshuwa ne: meme nembutule bena Amaleke bonsu. Muntu nansha umue kakubavuluka kabidi to." 
Exodus17:15 Ke Moshe kuashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu, kutshinyika dina ne: “Maweja-Nangila ke dibendela dianyi.”" 
Exodus17:16 Moshe kuamba ne: — Bu mudi bena Amaleke babunda nkuasa wa butumbi wa Maweja-Nangila, Maweja-Nangila neabaluishe matuku onsu." 
Exodus18:1 Yetro, mutuangaji wa mu Madiyane, tatuende muenu wa Moshe, kumvua-ye lumu lua bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muenzele Moshe ne bena Izrayele pawaye mubapatule mu Ejipitu." 
Exodus18:2 Nanku Yetro kuangata Sefora, mukaji wa Moshe, uvua Moshe mutume kuabu." 
Exodus18:3 Kuangataye kabidi bana ba balume babidi ba Sefora: ke Ngershone uvua Moshe muinyike nanku, bualu uvua muambe ne: “Ndi muenyi mu ditunga dia bende.”" 
Exodus18:4 Muana muibidi ke Eliyezere, mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua banyi mmuntabalele lelu, mumpandishe ku lufu lua kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. ”" 
Exodus18:5 Nanku Yetro, tatuende muenu wa Moshe, ne mukaji wa Moshe, pamue ne bana ba Moshe babidi abu, kufika mu tshipela ku mukuna wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba uvua Moshe mutudile." 
Exodus18:6 Yetro kutumina Moshe muntu ne mukenji ne: “Ndi tatuebe muenu. Ndi ne mukajebe ne bana bebe kabidi.” 
Exodus18:7 Moshe kuya kuakidila tatuende muenu, kutua binu panshi kumupukila. Kuelanganabu muoyi bakoleshangana. Pashishe Moshe kubabueja mu ntenta." 
Exodus18:8 Moshe kulondela tatuende muenu muvua Maweja-Nangila mukengeshe bena Ejipitu ne mukalenga wabu mu tshimuangi tshia bena Izrayele. Kumulondelaye kabidi muvua Maweja-Nangila mubapandishe mu makenga onsu avuabu nawu mu njila. 
Exodus18:9 Yetro kusanka bikole bua bilenga bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muenzele bena Izrayele bua kubapatula mu bupika bua bena Ejipitu. 
Exodus18:10 Kuambaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila atumbe, bualu uvua mukuambuluishe, mukupatule mu tshinyangu tshia bena Ejipitu ne tshia mukalenga wabu." 
Exodus18:11 Mpindiewu ndi njadika ne: Maweja-Nangila mmupite mvidie yonsu idi bantu batendelela. Mmudileje nanku diba divua bena Ejipitu bakengeshe bena Izrayele bikole. 
Exodus18:12 Pashishe Yetro, tatuende muenu wa Moshe, kuoshila Maweja-Nangila nyama ya milambu. Kumulambulaye kabidi milambu ya ditua ndondu. Arone ne bakulu bonsu ba bena Izrayele, pamue ne Yetro, kudia biakudia bia tshijila abi." 
Exodus18:13 Butshia dinda, Moshe kusomba bua kumvua bilumbu bia bantu. Bantu bavua amu bimane kumpala kuende too ne ku dilolu." 
Exodus18:14 Tatuende muenu umona bionsu bivua Moshe wenzela bantu, kukonkaye Moshe ne: — Udi wenza mudimu anu nkayebe bua tshinyi? Udi muimanyike bantu ku dinda too ne ku dilolu bua tshinyi?" 
Exodus18:15 Moshe kumuandamuna ne: — Bantu aba mbafike kundi bua kuebeja mudi Mvidi Mukulu mua kukosa bilumbu biabu. 
Exodus18:16 Padibu ne tshilumbu, badi bafika kundi. Ndi njikija matandu abu. Pashishe ndi mbamanyisha meyi ne mikandu bia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus18:17 Tatuende muenu wa Moshe kumuambila ne: — Mushindu uudi wenza mudimu kawena mukumbane to. 
Exodus18:18 Wewe ne bantu bonsu badi bimane aba nenupungile. Bualu mudimu ewu udi mupite bukole. Kuena mua kuwenza amu nkayebe to. 
Exodus18:19 Mbimpe witabe tshindi nkuambila. Mvidi Mukulu akuambuluishe. Wewe ushale anu Muakuidi wa bantu kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Wikale ufikishe bilumbu bia bantu kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Exodus18:20 Ulongeshe bantu meyi ne mikenji bia Mvidi Mukulu, bua babilame, bakumbaje bidiye musue." 
Exodus18:21 Pashishe, usungule bantu ba nsongu badi batshina Mvidi Mukulu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Bantu badi bamba malu malelela, babenga mabuejila ubateke bakulu badi ku mutu kua bantu tshinunu, lukama, makumi atanu too ne kua bantu dikumi." 
Exodus18:22 Bakulu abu, nebalumbuluishe bantu matuku onsu bua kukuambuluisha. Nebakutuadile wewe anu bilumbu binene. Kadi bobu nebajikije tulumbu tukese. Nanku, mudimu webe neukepele." 
Exodus18:23 Wewe muenze mundi nkuambila amu, — Mvidi Mukulu mukutume kabidi bua kuenza nanku — kuena upungila to. Kabidi bantu bonsu nebapingane ku nzubu yabu anu bimpe, bumvuangane." 
Exodus18:24 Moshe kuitaba bionsu bivua tatuende muenu mumuambile. Kubikumbajaye. 
Exodus18:25 Kusungulaye bantu bashindame munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Kubatekaye bakulu badi ku mutu kua bantu tshinunu, lukama, makumi atanu too ne ku kua bantu dikumi." 
Exodus18:26 Bakulu abu, bavua balumbuluisha bilumbu bikese matuku onsu. Kadi bilumbu binene bavua baye nabi kudi Moshe." 
Exodus18:27 Moshe kulayangana ne tatuende muenu. Awu kupingana kuende. 
Exodus19:1 Bena Izrayele kumuka mu Refidime. Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muisatu kunyima kua dipatuka mu Ejipitu, kufikabu mu tshipela tshia Sinayi. Kuenzabu mitanda mu tshipela amu, pabuipi ne mukuna awu." 
Exodus19:2  
Exodus19:3 Moshe kubanda ku mukuna bua kumonangana ne Mvidi Mukulu. Maweja-Nangila muikale ku lusongu lua mukuna kubikila Moshe, umuambila ne: — Ndaku, wambile bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, ne:" 
Exodus19:4 “Nudi badimuene mundi muenzele bena Ejipitu. Meme kunuambula mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi wambula bana bende pa mapuapua, kunufikisha kundi meme." 
Exodus19:5 Mpindiewu, nuenu bitabe tshindi nnuambila, balame ndondu wanyi, nenuikale tshisamba tshianyi tshindi musungule munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu bidi pa buloba. Bualu buloba bujima mbuanyi meme." 
Exodus19:6 Kadi tshisamba tshienu netshikale tshia batuangaji, bantu bajidila, badi bangenzela mudimu.” Wambile bena Izrayele bonsu malu andi nkuambila aa." 
Exodus19:7 Moshe kutuluka ku mukuna, kupingana mu mitanda, kubikidisha bakulu ba bena Izrayele, kubambila bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus19:8 Bantu bonsu kuitaba ne: — Netuenze bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila muambe. Moshe kufikisha bivua bantu bandamune kudi Maweja-Nangila. 
Exodus19:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ndi mpueka musokome mu divuba bua kuyukila nebe, bua, padi bantu bumvue mutudi tuyukila nebe, bakuitabe. Moshe kufikisha bivua bantu bandamune kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus19:10 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Pingana kudi bantu, ubambile ne: “Lelu ne malaba numushe mikiya, nusukule kabidi bilamba bienu.”" 
Exodus19:11 Bangindile, bualu dituku disatu meme nempueke ku mukuna wa Sinayi, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile." 
Exodus19:12 Kadi, ubaleje muaba udibu mua kuimanyina kuinshi kua mukuna. Ubakandike bua kababandi ku mukuna, kabaulengi nansha. Bualu muntu musemene pabuipi ne mukuna nebamushipe." 
Exodus19:13 Muntu nansha nyama wasemena pabuipi ne mukuna, bua kumushipa, kabamulengi pambidi to, bamuase mabue nansha mikete. Amu pelabu mpungi, bamue bantu nebasemene ku mukuna." 
Exodus19:14 Moshe kutuluka ku mukuna. Kuambilaye bena Izrayele malu onsu awu. Kusululabu bilamba biabu, kumushabu mikiya." 
Exodus19:15 Moshe kubambila kabidi ne: — Munkatshi mua matuku asatu, kanubueledi bakaji mu nzubu to." 
Exodus19:16 Nanku, dituku disatu dinda, makubakuba ne miele ya mvula kumvuika ku mukuna. Pashishe divuba dinene kumueneka ku mukuna. Bantu bonsu bavua mu mitanda, bumvue kabidi muadi mukole wa mpungi, kuzakala bikole." 
Exodus19:17 Moshe kumuka ne bantu mu mitanda kusemena ku mukuna bua kumonangana ne Mvidi Mukulu. Kuimanyinabu pa bule kuinshi kua mukuna. 
Exodus19:18 Mukuna wa Sinayi uvua mufikisha kudi muinshi, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mupueke pa mukuna munkatshi mua muinshi wa kapia. Muinshi uvua ubanda bu tshikutu tshia kapia. Mukuna mujima kunyunga bikole." 
Exodus19:19 Miadi ya mpungi kuumvuika bikole ku mukuna. Moshe uvua uyukila ne Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu umuandamuna ne diyi bu dia dikubakuba dia mvula." 
Exodus19:20 Maweja-Nangila kutuluka ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Sinayi, kubikila Moshe. Awu pende kuitaba, kubanda pa mukuna." 
Exodus19:21 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Tuluka, ubele bantu ne: kabasemenyi pabuipi ne mukuna bua kummona. Bualu bobu benze nanku, bavule ba kudibu nebafue." 
Exodus19:22 Batuangaji badi mua kufika pabuipi nanyi, kadi bumushe mikiya. Tshianana ndi mua kubashipa." 
Exodus19:23 Moshe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bantu kabena mua kusemena pabuipi ne mukuna wa Sinayi to. Bualu wewe uvua mubadimuje bua bimanyine anu pa bule kuinshi kua mukuna. 
Exodus19:24 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Tuluka, uye kukeba muanenu Arone mu mitanda. Nubande nende. Kadi batuangaji ne bantu bonsu kababandi ku mukuna kundi to. Tshianana ndi mua kubashipa." 
Exodus19:25 Moshe kutuluka, kuya kuvua bantu, kubalondelaye bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile abi." 
Exodus20:1 Mvidi Mukulu kuakula, wamba ne:" 
Exodus20:2 — Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu webe, uvua mukupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, muvuabu bakukuate ku bupika." 
Exodus20:3 “Kutendeledi mvidie mikuabu to, anu meme." 
Exodus20:4 “Kusongi mpingu ya mvidie. Kuenji tshimfuanyi tshia tshintu nansha tshimue, nansha tshidi mulu mu mavuba, nansha tshidi panshi pa buloba, nansha tshidi mu mayi adi muinshi mua buloba." 
Exodus20:5 Kukukuidi mpingu ya nanku. Kuyitendeledi, bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Ndi musue kuikala Mvidi Mukulu webe, meme nkayanyi. Nennyoke bantu bonsu badi bankina too ne ku ndelanganyi yabu ya musangu muisatu nansha muinayi." 
Exodus20:6 Kadi bantu badi bannange, batumikile mikenji yanyi, nembanange, mbenzele bimpe too ne ku ndelanganyi tshinunu." 
Exodus20:7 “Kutedi dina dianyi meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, tshitelatela, bualu meme nengangate muntu yonsu udi kayi unemeka dina dianyi bu muena tshibawu." 
Exodus20:8 “Uwluke dituku dia Dikisha, udinemeke, bualu ndia tshijila." 
Exodus20:9 Wenze midimu yebe yonsu matuku asambombu. 
Exodus20:10 Dituku dia muanda mutekete ndia Dikisha, dia kunnemeka anu meme Maweja-Nangila. Kuenji mudimu dituku adi, nansha wewe, nansha bana bebe ba balume nansha ba bakaji, too ne bapika ne benyi badi basombe mu ditunga dienu. Kabidi bimuna bienu kabienji mudimu to." 
Exodus20:11 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mufuke diulu, mayi manene ne bionsu bidimu, anu mu matuku asambombu. Meme kuikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete, kudijidila, bua dikale dituku dia Dikisha." 
Exodus20:12 “Nemeka tatuebe ne mamuebe, nanku neulale bidimu bia bungi pa buloba bundi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe mukupeshe." 
Exodus20:13 “Kushipi muntu. 
Exodus20:14 “Kuendi tshiendenda. 
Exodus20:15 “Kuibi. 
Exodus20:16 “Kushiminyinyi mukuenu bualu. 
Exodus20:17 “Kualakanyi tshintu nansha tshimue tshia mukuenu: nansha nzubu wende, mukajende, mupika wende, ngombe wende, mpunde wende. ”" 
Exodus20:18 Bantu bonsu bumvue makubakuba ne miadi ya mpungi, bamone kabidi miela ya mvula ne muinshi ufuima ku mukuna, kutshinabu, kuzakalabu, kuimanyinabu pa bule." 
Exodus20:19 Bavua bambila Moshe ne: — Wewe nkayebe utuambile malu onsu, netuteleje. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kakudi netu nansha. Patupu netufue." 
Exodus20:20 Moshe kubandamuna ne: — Kanutshinyi to. Mvidi Mukulu mmufike bua kunuteta, bua numutshine, nulekele buenzayi." 
Exodus20:21 Bantu bonsu bavua bimanyine pa bule. Anu Moshe nkayende ke uvua musemene pabuipi ne divuba difike, muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus20:22 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe kabidi bua kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nuadimuenyi nkayenu mundi nyukila nenu, meme muikale mulu." 
Exodus20:23 Kanuenji mpingu ya mvidie, mifula ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole nansha ne mpawungi. Kanuenji mvidie inudi nutendelela pamue nanyi!" 
Exodus20:24 Kadi nungenzele tshilambuilu tshibaka ne buloba. Pa mutu patshi nundambuilepu milambu ya kuosha ne ya ditua ndondu, nusungula munkatshi mua ngombe, mbuji ne mikoku yenu. Miaba yonsu indi mumuambile bua nuenu kuntendelela, nengikale munkatshi muenu bua kunuela lupemba." 
Exodus20:25 Nanku, panuasua kungashila tshilambuilu tshia mabue, mabue awu ikale anu majima. Kanuena mua kuasonga ne biamu to. Bualu panudi nualenga ne biamu bienu bia bantu, kaena andengelela kabidi to." 
Exodus20:26 Pashishe, tshilambuilu katshikadi ne bibandilu to, bualu butaka bua udi ubanda bua kundambula milambu budi mua kumueneka." 
Exodus21:1 — Mikenji mikuabu iudi mua kuambila bena Izrayele idi nunku: 
Exodus21:2 “Nuenu basumbe muena Ebrewu, anuenzele mudimu wa mupika anu bidimu bisambombu. Kadi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, numulekele tshianana, kayi unufuta to." 
Exodus21:3 Panuikala bamusumbe nkayende, numutekela kabidi anu nkayende. Kadi panuikala bamusumbe ne mukajende, nubalekele bonsu babidi." 
Exodus21:4 Panuikala baselela mupika mukaji, mukaji awu munulelele bana ba balume nansha ba bakaji, nulekele mupika awu anu nkayende. Mukaji ne bana bishale bia mfumu uvua mumusumbe awu." 
Exodus21:5 Pikala muntu awu wamba ne: ndi munange mfumuanyi, ndi musue kushala ku bupika bua kusombela mukajanyi ne bana banyi," 
Exodus21:6 nanku mfumuende nealombe Mvidi Mukulu bua ajadike bualu ebu. Nebimanyike muntu awu ku tshiibi nansha ku tshipanda tshia ku nzubu kuende. Nebamutubule ditshi muaba awu, bua ashale mupika too ne ku lulu luende." 
Exodus21:7 “Muntu musumbishe muanende wa bakaji ku bupika, kabena batekela mukaji awu bu mudibu batekela muntu mulume to." 
Exodus21:8 Pikala mukaji awu kayi ulengelela kabidi mfumuende uvua mumusumbe bua ikale mukajende, nanku nebamupikule kudi tatuende. Kadi mfumuende uvua mumusumbe kena mua kumupana kudi muntu udi kayi muena Izrayele to, bualu ke kuenzela mupika awu bibi." 
Exodus21:9 Pikala muntu musumbile muanende wa balume mupika bua ikale mukajende, alame mupika mukaji awu bilondeshile mikenji ya kulama bana ba bakaji." 
Exodus21:10 Nansha mfumu awu musela mukaji mukuabu, kena mua kupepeja mukaji wa kumpala awu, nansha ku biakudia, nansha ku bilamba ne ku dimubuelela dia mu nzubu." 
Exodus21:11 Nanku, pikala mulume awu kayi muenzele mukaji wa kumpala malu awu asatu, mukaji udi mua kumuka, kayi ufuta to." 
Exodus21:12 “Muntu udi ushipa mukuabu ku mituutu, nebamushipe pende ku mituutu." 
Exodus21:13 Pikala muntu mushipe mukuabu mu mpukapuka, kayi ne muoyi wa kumuenzela bibi, mushipianganyi neabutame muaba unganuleja." 
Exodus21:14 Pikala muntu mutekete mukuende tshiji, mumushipe ku bukole ne budimu, nansha yeye ku tshilambuilu tshianyi, numukuate numushipe." 
Exodus21:15 “Muntu udi utuuta tatuende nansha mamuende, numushipe." 
Exodus21:16 “Muntu udi wiba muntu, numushipe, nansha basangane muntu awu ku nzubu kua muivi, nansha yeye mumane kumupana." 
Exodus21:17 “Muntu udi wela tatuende nansha mamuende milawu, numushipe." 
Exodus21:18 “Pikala bantu babidi batandangane, umue utuuta mukuabu bikole ne bisusu, nansha mumuase dibue, pikala uvuabu batuuta mushale mu bulalu usama, kayi mufue," 
Exodus21:19 nansha mushale utebuka ne mutshi, wendakana pambelu, mututshianganyi awu neafute amu tshibawu, bua matuku avua mubedi mushale mu bulalu ne bua kumondapisha too ne pumvuaye bimpe." 
Exodus21:20 “Muntu mutuute mupika wende mulume nansha mukaji ne mutshi, mumushipe musangu umue, numunyoke." 
Exodus21:21 Kadi pikala mupika awu mufue kunyima kua dituku dimue nansha kua matuku abidi, nebalekele mututshianganyi, bualu mbintu biende." 
Exodus21:22 “Pikala bantu balume batandangane, mukuabu kusakila mukaji muikale ne difu, mukaji kutula difu adi, kayi mushale usama, uvua mumusakile neafute tshibawu tshionsu tshikala bayende wa mukaji mulombe kudi balumbuluishi." 
Exodus21:23 Kadi pikala mukaji mupete njiwu, mbimpe kusombuela. Mushipi wa muntu, bamushipe." 
Exodus21:24 Mushipianganyi wa disu, bamushipe diende. Mupodianganyi wa dinu, bamupole diende. Mukoshanganyi wa tshianza, bamukose tshiende. Mukoshanganyi wa dikasa, bamukose diende." 
Exodus21:25 Moshanganyi wa kapia, bamoshe kende. Mutapianganyi wa mputa, bamutape pende. Mututshianganyi, bamufute pende." 
Exodus21:26 “Pikala muntu mutuute mupika wende mulume nansha mukaji mumushipe disu, amumushe ku bupika bua kufuta disu diende adi." 
Exodus21:27 Pikala muntu mupole dinu dia mupika wende mulume nansha mukaji, amumushe ku bupika bua kufuta dinu diende adi." 
Exodus21:28 “Pikala ngombe mulume mushipe muntu mulume nansha muntu mukaji ku nsengu yende, ngombe awu bamuase mabue, bamushipe. Kadi kabena mua kudia munyinyi wende to. Nanku muena ngombe awu kena yeye ne bualu to." 
Exodus21:29 Kadi pikala ngombe ne tshibidilu tshia kutua bantu nsengu, bamanyisha mfumuende, kayi utangila bu bualu, kayi umulama, nanku ngombe awu yeye mushipe muntu mulume nansha mukaji, bamuase mabue, bamushipe. Pashishe bashipe kabidi muena ngombe awu." 
Exodus21:30 Kadi pikalabu balombe muena ngombe tshibawu bua adipikule pa mutu pa kufuaye, nanku neafile bintu bionsu bidibu bamulombe." 
Exodus21:31 Pikala ngombe mutue nsongalume nansha nsongakaji nsengu mumushipe, muena ngombe neapete dinyoka dia momumue." 
Exodus21:32 Pikala ngombe mulume mutuute mupika mulume nansha mukaji ku nsengu, nebafute mfumu wa mupika awu nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi asatu. Kadi ngombe nebamushipe ku mabue." 
Exodus21:33 “Pikala ngombe nansha mpunde wa bende mufuile mu tshiina tshia mayi tshishale buashi, nansha tshiumbula katshiyi tshibuikila," 
Exodus21:34 muena tshiina neafute tshibawu. Kadi nyama udi mufue neashale mu dina dia muena tshiina. 
Exodus21:35 “Pikala ngombe milume ibidi mituangane, umue mushipe mukuabu, mbasumbishe ngombe uvua mushale ne muoyi. Bena ngombe nebabanyangane makuta ne munyinyi wa ngombe uvua mufue." 
Exodus21:36 Kadi pikala ngombe ne tshibidilu tshia kusangana nsengu, bamanyisha mfumuende, kayi musue kumulama, neapingaje ngombe wa muoyi, angate ngombe uvua mufue awu." 
Exodus21:37 “Pikala muntu muibe ngombe, mukoku nansha mbuji, yeye mushipe tshimuna atshi, nansha mutshisumbishe, neafute ngombe itanu bua ngombe umue awu, ne mikoku nansha mbuji inayi bua mukoku nansha mbuji umue awu." 
Exodus22:1 “Pikalabu bakuate muivi mu nzubu butuku, bamushipe, mumushipi kena ne tshilumbu to." 
Exodus22:2 Kadi pikalabu bakuate muivi mu munya, mumushipi udi ne tshilumbu. Pikala muivi katshiyi ne bintu bivuaye muibe abi, nebamupane, ashale mupika bua buivi buende." 
Exodus22:3 “Kadi bobu bamusangane ne bimuna bivuaye muibe abi bitshikale ne muoyi: ngombe, mpunde, mukoku nansha mbuji, bua tshimuna tshimue neafute bimuna bibidi." 
Exodus22:4 “Pikala muntu mulekela bimuna biende binyange budimi bua bende, nansha mionji yende ya mvinyo, muena bimuna neapingajile muena budimi bimuma bilenga bia mu madimi ende." 
Exodus22:5 “Pikala muntu osha budimi buende, kapia aku kalambuke, kosha bikunyibua bia mu madimi a bende bitshidi ku miepu, nansha bidibu bamane kunowa babiteka mu bisumbu mu madimi, muntu uvua mutemeshe kapia neafute muena budimi." 
Exodus22:6 “Pikala muntu mutekesha makuta ende nansha bintu bikuabu bia mushinga ku nzubu kua muntu mukuabu, bintu abi bijimine, bobu bakuate muivi, bua tshintu tshimue neafute bintu bibidi." 
Exodus22:7 Kadi pikalabu kabayi bakuate muivi, muena nzubu awu neaye kuditshipa kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua kujadika mudiye kayi muangate bintu abi." 
Exodus22:8 Pikala bantu batandangane bua bintu bijimine: ngombe, mpunde, mikoku, mbuji, bilamba nansha bintu bikuabu, nebaye kuditshipa bonsu babidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Wikale Mvidi Mukulu muambe ne: ke udi muibe awu, bua tshintu tshimue neafute bintu bibidi." 
Exodus22:9 “Pikala muntu mutekeshe mpunde, ngombe, mukoku nansha tshimuna tshikuabu ku nzubu kua mukuende bua kumulamima, tshimuna atshi tshifue, tshitapike mputa nansha tshibe kabayi bajadike udi muibe," 
Exodus22:10 mulami awu neaditshipe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua kujadika mudiye kayi muangate bintu abi. Nanku muena bintu bidi bijimine, neitabe dijadika dia Maweja-Nangila adi. Kabakumufuta to." 
Exodus22:11 Kadi pikalabu bamuibe bimuna abi ku nzubu kuende, mulami neafute muena bintu." 
Exodus22:12 Pikala tshimuna tshikuata kudi nyama wa lonji, muena lubanza nealeje munyinyi wikala mushale bua kujadika. Nanku kakufuta to." 
Exodus22:13 “Pikala muntu musombe tshimuna tshia mukuende, tshimuna atshi tshitapike mputa, nansha tshifue, muenatshi kayipu, uvua musombe neafute." 
Exodus22:14 Kadi pikala muena tshimuna mudimuene bionsu bivua bienzeka abi, kabena mua kumufuta to. Anu mushinga uvuabu bafile bua kusomba tshimuna awu neujikije bualu." 
Exodus22:15 “Pikala muntu mutombole nsongakaji udibu kabayi banji kusela, afile biuma bua kusela mukaji awu." 
Exodus22:16 Kadi pikala tatuende wa mukaji ubenga mulume awu, mulume neafute biuma bionsu bidibu bafidila nsongakaji utshidi kamama." 
Exodus22:17 “Mukaji muena mupongu, numushipe." 
Exodus22:18 “Muntu yonsu udi ulala ne nyama, numushipe." 
Exodus22:19 “Muntu yonsu udi utendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu, uyilambula milambu, kayi ulambula amu Maweja-Nangila, numushipe."
