Exodus22:20 “Kanutatshishi muenyi, kanumukengeshi. Bualu nuenu nuvua benyi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus22:21 Kanukengeshi bakaji bakamba nansha bana ba nshiya. 
Exodus22:22 Bualu bobu badile, bambikile, nembateleje." 
Exodus22:23 Nemfike munda, nnushipe ne muela. Nanku bakaji benu nebashale bakamba, bana benu nebashale bana ba nshiya." 
Exodus22:24 “Pikala muntu mupela wa mu tshisamba tshianyi ukenga, wewe mumusombeshe makuta, kumulombi tshia kasombela to." 
Exodus22:25 “Tshilamba tshidi mukuebe udibuikila, wewe mutshikuate lukola, umupingajilatshi anu dituku dimue." 
Exodus22:26 Bualu ke tshiende tshidiye natshi bua kudibuikila. Kadi pawakandamana natshi, yeye neadibuikile tshinyi? Nanku, yeye mudile, mumbikile, nemmuteleje, bualu meme ndi muena luse." 
Exodus22:27 “Kanumpendi meme Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuedi mulombodi wa tshisamba tshienu tshia bena Izrayele milawu. 
Exodus22:28 “Panudi nupola bintu bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu, nubindambule lukasa, nansha bimuma bia maluvu. “Nundambule kabidi muanenu wa balume muanabute." 
Exodus22:29 “Nundambule muanabute wa ngombe yenu, mikoku yenu, mbuji yenu. Muana wa balume wa bimuna abi, neashale kudi mamuende anu matuku muanda mutekete. Dituku dia muanda mukulu numundambule." 
Exodus22:30 “Nuenu nenuikale bantu banyi ba tshijila, kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama wa tshisuku uvua nyama ya lonji mishipe. Munyinyi awu nuwelele mbwa." 
Exodus23:1 “Kanuikadi ne biakulakula, kanubuelakanyi ne bena buenzayi bua kubajadikila bualu bua dishima." 
Exodus23:2 Kanulondi bibidilu bia bena buenzayi, nansha bobu ba bungi. Kanuitabi meyi a bantu badi bajadika bualu bua dishima, nansha bobu ba bungi." 
Exodus23:3 Kanubingishi mupele mu dikosa dia tshilumbu, padiye kayi wamba bulelela." 
Exodus23:4 “Nuenu bamone ngombe nansha mpunde wa muena lukuna nenu mujimine, numupingaje kudi mfumuende." 
Exodus23:5 Nuenu basangane mpunde wa muena lukuna nenu mudishinde ne bujitu, kanupitshi to. Numujule pamue ne muena lukuna, nuakaje bujitu." 
Exodus23:6 “Kanupishi muntu nansha yeye muena dikenga ku dikosa dia tshilumbu kumpala kua bandumbulula padiye wamba bulelela. 
Exodus23:7 Kanuteleji muena biakulakula. Kanushipi udi kayi ne bualu nansha muntu muakane, bualu meme nempishe bena buenzayi bua nanku." 
Exodus23:8 Kanuangatshi tshintu tshia mabuejila, bualu tshintu tshia nanku tshidi tshipangisha mulumbuluishi mua kuambaye bulelela. Bualu neabingishe muntu uvua mupile." 
Exodus23:9 “Kanukengeshi muenyi, bualu nudi bamanye dikenga diende, bu munuvua penu benyi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Exodus23:10 “Bidimu bilondangane bisambombu, nukune biakudia, nubinowe kabidi." 
Exodus23:11 Kadi, tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, kanudimi to. Bidi bishale pa madimi nebabiangate kudi bapele banudi nabu, bikuabu nebabidie kudi nyama ya mu mpata. Nuenze nanku kabidi bua mitshi yenu inudi nukuna ya maluvu ne ya tumuma tua olive." 
Exodus23:12 “Nuenze midimu yenu matuku asambombu. Kadi nuikishe dituku dia muanda mutekete, bua bapika benu ne benyi benu badi banukuatshila mudimu bamone mua kuikisha, kabidi bua nyama yenu ya mpunde ne ya ngombe imone mua kuikisha payi." 
Exodus23:13 “Nulame malu andi meme Maweja-Nangila munuambile aa. Kanutendeledi mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu. Kanuyitedi mukana muenu. 
Exodus23:14 “Nuikale nungenzela bibilu bisatu ku tshidimu tshionsu. 
Exodus23:15 Tshibilu tshia kumpala tshikale tshia mampa adi kaayi mela buanga. Nutshienze mu ngondu wa Abibe matuku malondangane muanda mutekete. Nudie mampa awu, anu mushindu umvua munuambile. Bualu ngondu awu ke unuvua bapatuke mu Ejipitu. Kanufiki kundi kanuyi ne milambu to." 
Exodus23:16 “Tshibilu tshibidi tshikala tshia kunowa bintu bia kumpala bia mu madimi enu. “Tshibilu tshisatu nuikala nutshienza ku ndekelu kua tshidimu, pajika dinowa dia bintu bia mu madimi enu." 
Exodus23:17 Nanku bantu balume bonsu nebikale bamueneka kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila misangu isatu ku tshidimu mu bibilu abi. 
Exodus23:18 “Kanuena mua kundambula milambu ya mashi a nyama pamue ne mampa adi mela buanga. Kabidi, mu bibilu abi, kanushiyi mafuta a nyama inudi nundambula bua kulalawu ne mu dinda to." 
Exodus23:19 “Bintu bia kumpala binudi nunowa mu madimi enu, nufike nabi mu nzubu wanyi, bualu ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. “Panudi nulamba munyinyi wa muana wa mbuji, kanuedimu mabele a mamuende to." 
Exodus23:20 “Mutumibue wanyi neafike kunudi bua kunulama mu njila ne kunufikisha ku muaba undi munulongoluela. 
Exodus23:21 Kadi, nudimuke! Pafika mutumibue wanyi, nuitabe bionsu bidiye unuambila. Kanumufikishi munda, kanumutombokedi. Bualu kena mua kunufuila luse ku bubi buonsu bunudi nuenza. Bionsu bidiye wenza, udi ubienza mu dina dianyi." 
Exodus23:22 Kadi, nuenu bitabe diyi diende, bakumbaje bionsu bindi ngamba, meme Maweja-Nangila nenduishe bantu bonsu badi banuelela meji mabi." 
Exodus23:23 “Kabidi mutumibue wanyi awu, neende kumpala kuenu bua kunufikisha mu ditunga dia bena Amore, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Kenaane, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa. Nembutule bena bisamba ebi bionsu." 
Exodus23:24 Nanku, kanuena mua kunemeka mvidie idibu batendelela. Kanuena mua kuyikukuila nansha kulonda bibidilu bia bisamba abi. Kadi, nuzaze mpingu ya mvidie ayi. Nushimbule makunji abu a mabue." 
Exodus23:25 Nuntendelele anu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nanku nennuele lupemba, nenupete bia kudia ne mayi a kunua. Nennumbushile masama adi mua kunutatshisha." 
Exodus23:26 Mu ditunga dienu kamuakuikala bakaji batula mafu. Meme Maweja-Nangila nennushiye ne muoyi pa buloba matuku a bungi. 
Exodus23:27 “Kadi bonsu badi basue kunuluisha, meme nembakuatshishe bowa, banutshine, bapange mua kunuluisha, banunyeme." 
Exodus23:28 Nentume tshipupu tshia tuishi bua kunyemesha bena Ivi, bena Kenaane ne bena Iti kanuyi banji kufika." 
Exodus23:29 Kadi tshiakuipata bantu bonsu anu tshidimu tshimue to. Bualu nyama ya mu mpata idi mua kuvulangana, ditunga didi mua kunyanguka." 
Exodus23:30 Nembipate ku kakese ku kakese too ne panuavulangana bua nuenu kupiana ditunga. 
Exodus23:31 Nanku, ditunga dienu nedikale dialabale, dituadijile ku Mayi manene makunze too ne ku mayi a bena Peleshete. Nedikale dituadijile kabidi ku tshipela tshia Sinayi too ne ku musulu wa Perate. Meme nennupeshe bukole bua kuipata bena matunga onsu aa." 
Exodus23:32 Kanumvuanganyi ne bena matunga abu. Kanutendeledi mvidie idibu batendelela. 
Exodus23:33 Kanusombi nabu ditunga dimue, bualu badi mua kunulongesha bua nuenu kuntombokela, kutendelela mvidie yabu.”" 
Exodus24:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Bikila Arone, Nadabe, Abihu ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele makumi muanda mutekete. Ubande ku mukuna kundi eku bua kutendelela. Kadi, batuile binu pa bule." 
Exodus24:2 Anu wewe nkayebe usemena pabuipi nanyi. Bena Izrayele bonsu kabena mua kubanda ku mukuna eku to. 
Exodus24:3 Moshe kupueka bua kumanyisha bantu meyi ne mikenji bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Bantu bonsu kuitaba ne: — Netuenze bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila muambe. 
Exodus24:4 Moshe kufunda meyi onsu a Maweja-Nangila mu mukanda. Kujukaye dinda dionsu, kuasaye tshilambuilu kuinshi kua mukuna. Kujulaye kabidi makunji a mabue manene dikumi ne abidi. Tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele tshivua ne dikunji diatshi." 
Exodus24:5 Pashishe, Moshe kutuma nsongalume ya bena Izrayele, bua kuoshila Maweja-Nangila nyama mijima, ne bua kumulambula ngombe milume, bua mulambu wa ditua ndondu." 
Exodus24:6 Moshe kuangata mashi a nyama ayi kuela mu dilongu. Makuabu kuamiaminaye ku tshilambuilu. 
Exodus24:7 Pashishe, kubalaye ne diyi dikole mukanda wa meyi a ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue ne bantu. Bantu bonsu kuitaba ne: — Netuenze bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
Exodus24:8 Moshe kuangata kabidi mashi avua mashale mu dilongu, kuamiamina bena Izrayele pambidi, wamba ne: — Mashi aa, adi ajadika ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue nenu pavuaye nnumanyisha meyi ende." 
Exodus24:9 Pashishe, Moshe, Arone, Nadabe, Abihu ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele makumi muanda mutekete kubanda ku mukuna." 
Exodus24:10 Kumonabu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, muimane pa mabue matoke a mushinga mukole, engelela. Mabue awu avua mafuanangane ne mubidi wa tshibuashibuashi." 
Exodus24:11 Bakulu ba bena Izrayele bamane kumona Mvidi Mukulu nanku, kudiabu, kunuabu pamue. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena muenzele bakulu ba bena Izrayele abu bibi to." 
Exodus24:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Banda ku mukuna kundi eku usombaku. Nenkupeshe mabue adi ne mikenji indi mufunde bua uyilongeshe bantu. 
Exodus24:13 Moshe kujuka ne Yoshuwa uvua umuambuluisha, kuambilaye bakulu ne:" 
Exodus24:14 “Nushale batuindile muaba ewu too ne pawapingana. Padi muntu ne bualu, aye kudi Arone ne Ure, banudi nushala nabu.”" 
Exodus24:15 Moshe kubanda ku mukuna. Mukuna awu uvua mubuikile kudi divuba. 
Exodus24:16 Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila buvua ku mukuna wa Sinayi. Kumuenekabu ku mesu a bena Izrayele bu kapia kakole ku lusongu lua mukuna. Divuba kushala dibuikila mukuna awu matuku asambombu. Dituku dia muanda mutekete, Maweja-Nangila kubikila Moshe mu divuba." 
Exodus24:17  
Exodus24:18 Moshe kubuela munda mua divuba, kubanda kabidi pa mukuna, kushalaku matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku." 
Exodus25:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus25:2 — Ambila bena Izrayele bikale bandambula milambu, bayifila amu kudi bantu ba muoyi muimpe." 
Exodus25:3 Milambu ayi ikale ya mushindu ewu: ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne ya tshiamu tshikunze," 
Exodus25:4 bilamba bifikuluke, bikunzubile, bikunze kunzuu, bilamba bia ndanda ne bia boya bua mbuji," 
Exodus25:5 biseba bia mikoku ya bimpanga bilaba kakula, biseba bia nyama ya nkonga wa mu mayi, mutshi wa ndunga ne" 
Exodus25:6 mafuta a kuela mu muendu, manananshi a kusambakaja ne mafuta a kulaba, manananshi makuabu a kuosha," 
Exodus25:7 mabue a mushinga mukole a kuteka mu tshilamba tshia efode tshidi mutuangaji munene uvuala, ne tshilamba tshidiye uteka pa tshiadi." 
Exodus25:8 Nanku, bena Izrayele bandongoluele muaba wa tshijila, bua ngikale munkatshi muabu." 
Exodus25:9 Nzubu awu, ne bintu bia kutekamu, bikale anu mushindu undi nkuleja." 
Exodus25:10 “Bena Izrayele bangenzele mushete wa mitshi ya ndunga, bule buawu buikale bua metre umue ne santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu, butshiama buawu buikale santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu, butumbuke buawu buikale kabidi santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus25:11 Kadi, ulamike tshiamu tshia mpawungi munda mua mushete, panyima pawu ne ku mibangu." 
Exodus25:12 Pashishe, wenza nkanu inayi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ya kulamika ku matumba anayi a mushete, ibidi ku luseke, ibidi ku luseke lukuabu." 
Exodus25:13 Ukose kabidi mitshi ya ndunga ibidi, uyilamike tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku nseke yonsu." 
Exodus25:14 Ubueje mitshi ayi mu nkanu idi ku nseke yonsu ibidi bua kuambuilaku mushete. 
Exodus25:15 Mitshi eyi ishale mu nkanu ya mushete kashidi. 
Exodus25:16 Mu mushete amu utekemu mabue, adi ne mikenji ingakupesha, idi ijadika ndondu." 
Exodus25:17 “Pashishe, wenze tshibuikidiji tshia mushete tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bule buatshi buikale metre umue ne santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu. Butshiama buikale bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus25:18 Kadi, pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete apu, ku nseke ibidi ya mu bule buawu, wenzapu mpingu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ileja Bakerubine." 
Exodus25:19 Bimfuanyi bia Bakerubine bibidi abi, bikale bilamakane ne tshibuikidiji tshia mushete, etshi ku ndekelu, tshikuabu ku ndekelu." 
Exodus25:20 Bimfuanyi abi, bikale bitangilangane, binangile pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete, biolola mapuapua mulu bua kubuikila mushete awu." 
Exodus25:21 Mu mushete awu, utekemu mabue andi nkupesha adi ajadika ndondu. Pashishe, ubuikile tshibuikidiji ku mushete aku." 
Exodus25:22 Netumonangane nebe anu pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete awu. Pankatshi pa Bakerubine abu, ke pandi nkupela mikenji idi itangila bena Izrayele." 
Exodus25:23 “Pashishe, wenze mesa a mutshi wa ndunga. Bule buawu buikale bua metre umue. Butshiama buawu buikale bua santimetre makumi atanu, ne butumbuke buawu buikale bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus25:24 Mesa awu, ulamikaku tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku nseke ne ku mibangu yawu kabidi." 
Exodus25:25 Wenzaku mabaya malamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Butshiama buawu buikale santimetre muanda mukulu. Mabaya adi manyunguluila mesa awu, ikale malamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus25:26 Wenza nkanu inayi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Uyilamike mu matumba anayi pa buipi ne mikolu yonsu inayi ya mesa. 
Exodus25:27 Usuike nkanu ayi ku mabaya bua kubuejamu mitshi ya kuambuila mesa. 
Exodus25:28 Usonge kabidi mitshi ya ndunga ibidi, uyilamike tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku nseke. Wela mitshi ayi mu nkanu bua kuambula nayi mesa." 
Exodus25:29 Wenza bintu ebi ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi: malongu masalame, makopu, ngesu ne mabungu a kulambuila maluvu." 
Exodus25:30 Mampa a tshijila anudi nundambula, ashale anu pa mesa apu kashidi." 
Exodus25:31 “Wenza kabidi tshitekelu tshia muendu anu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi. Tshikale tshikuatakane: mikolu, matamba, makopu, tulongu tukese, mapu a bilongu bienza anu tshintu tshimue." 
Exodus25:32 Tshitekelu tshia muendu atshi, tshikale ne matamba asambombu. Asatu ku luseke, asatu ku luseke lukuabu." 
Exodus25:33 Ku ditamba dionsu kuikale makopu asatu mafuanangane ne bilongu bia mutshi wa amande, kabidi ne bilongu ne mapu a bilongu biawu." 
Exodus25:34 Ku tshitekelu tshia muendu aku, wenzaku kabidi makopu anayi mafuanangane ne bilongu bia mutshi wa amande, kabidi ne bilongu ne mapu a bilongu biawu." 
Exodus25:35 Matamba asambombu adi malamakaja abidi abidi ku tshitekelu, mikale ne dipu muinshi muawu." 
Exodus25:36 Kadi, matamba onsu ne mapu, bikale anu bilamakane, kabidi bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi." 
Exodus25:37 Wenze miendu muanda mutekete. Uyiteke ku tshitekelu bua itokeshe muaba awu. 
Exodus25:38 Nanku, nkala ne tulongu tukese bikale anu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi." 
Exodus25:39 Bua kuenza tshitekelu tshia muendu ne bintu bionsu bidiku, ubienza ne kilo makumi asatu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi." 
Exodus25:40 Wewe Moshe, wenzeje bintu bionsu abi anu mushindu umvua mukuambile ku mukuna eku." 
Exodus26:1 “Ungenzele muaba wa tshijila, mulongolola ne bilamba dikumi bia ndanda. Kadi, bilamba abi bikale bifikuluke, bikunzubile ne bikunze kunzuu. Ku bilamba abi, uzolaku Bakerubine bikale ne mapuapua." 
Exodus26:2 Tshilamba tshionsu, tshikale ne metre dikumi ne anayi mu bule ne metre abidi mu butshiama. Bilamba bionsu bikale anu bule bumue." 
Exodus26:3 Nanku, ulamakaja bilamba bitanu bitanu." 
Exodus26:4 Kadi, ku mibangu ya tshisumbu tshia bilamba tshionsu, usuikaku makopa ne mukaba mufikuluke." 
Exodus26:5 Makopa awu, ikale makumi atanu ku tshilamba ku ndekelu kua tshisumbu tshionsu tshia bilamba bitanu, ikale kabidi makanangane." 
Exodus26:6 Wenze nkanu makumi atanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kusuikakaja bisumbu abi bibidi, bienza ntenta umue." 
Exodus26:7 “Wenze ntenta mukuabu ne bilamba dikumi ne tshimue, bia boya bua mbuji, bua kubuikila pa mutu pa muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:8 Tshilamba tshionsu tshikale ne metre dikumi ne atanu mu bule, ne metre abidi mu butshiama." 
Exodus26:9 Ulamakaje bangabanga bilamba bitanu. Pashishe ulamakaje bilamba bisambombu. Tshilamba tshisambombu netshikale tshilembeleja mu mushiku wa mbelu. 
Exodus26:10 Usuike makopa makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilamba tshia ndekelu tshia luseke lumue. Usuike makopa makuabu makumi atanu ku mibangu ya luseke lukuabu. 
Exodus26:11 Wenze nkanu ya tshiamu tshikunze makumi atanu ya kuela mu makopa awu, bua ntenta amueneke bu tshintu tshimue." 
Exodus26:12 Kadi mu butshiama bua bilamba abi, tshisongu tshidi tshipite bule tshikale tshilembeleja panyima pa muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:13 Mu bule bua bilamba abi, tshilamba tshidi tshipite bule, utshibuikile tshitupa ku luseke, tshitupa ku luseke lua muaba wa tshijila. Nanku muaba wa tshijila newikale mubuikila bimpe." 
Exodus26:14 Bua kulama ntenta muibidi bidi bimpe, utentakaje ntenta mukuabu wa biseba bia mikoku ya bimpanga, bilaba kakula, ne mukuabu wa biseba bia nyama wa nkonga wa mu mayi." 
Exodus26:15 “Pashishe, upande mabaya a mutshi wa ndunga a kuimanyika nawu muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:16 Dibaya dionsu dikale bule bua metre itanu ne butshiama bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu. Mabaya awu, ikale ne mpoku bua kulamakaja abidi abidi." 
Exodus26:17  
Exodus26:18 Wenze mabaya makumi abidi, a kuteka muaba wa tshijila luseke lua kuinshi." 
Exodus26:19 Mabaya awu, ikale ne bitaku makumi anayi bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu dikale ne bitaku bibidi ne mpoku ibidi bikumbanangane." 
Exodus26:20 Wenze mabaya makuabu makumi abidi, a kuteka muaba wa tshijila luseke lua ku mutu." 
Exodus26:21 Mabaya awu, ikale ne bitaku makumi anayi bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu dikale ne bitaku bibidi." 
Exodus26:22 Wenze kabidi mabaya asambombu, a kuteka muaba wa tshijila luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Exodus26:23 Wenze mabaya abidi a mushindu mukuabu, ku matumba a kumfundu." 
Exodus26:24 Mabaya abidi awu, ikale malamakaja kulu ne lukanu, mapanduluke kuinshi. Ikale anu mushindu umue bua kuenza matumba a muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:25 Panyima pa muaba wa tshijila, pikala nanku mabaya muanda mukulu menza ne bitaku dikumi ne bisambombu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu dikale ne bitaku bibidi." 
Exodus26:26 “Wenze mitshi itanu ya ndunga, bua kulamakaja nayi mabaya ku luseke lua muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus26:27 Mitshi ya ndunga mikuabu itanu, uyiteke milamakaje ne mabaya adi ku luseke lukuabu lua muaba wa tshijila. Mikuabu itanu, uyilamakaje ne mabaya adi panyima pa muaba wa tshijila luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Exodus26:28 Kadi, mutshi udi pankatshi pa muaba wa tshijila, wikale mule mutue eku ne eku." 
Exodus26:29 Pashishe, ku mabaya onsu ne mitshi, ulamikaku tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Wenze nkanu ya mpawungi ya kubueja mitshi." 
Exodus26:30 Uvuluke mua kuasa nzubu ewu anu mushindu umvua mukuleje ku mukuna eku. 
Exodus26:31 “Batedi benze tshilamba tshinene tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu. Tshikale tshitela ne buanda bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Kabidi, tshikale tshizola bimfuanyi bia Bakerubine." 
Exodus26:32 Tshilamba atshi tshikale tshipopela ne misonsu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ku makunji anayi a mitshi ya ndunga, mabuikila ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Makunji anayi awu, ikale mateka mu bitaku binayi bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Exodus26:33 Ulembeleje tshilamba ku nkanu. “Usokoke mushete udi ne meyi ne mikenji panyima pa tshilamba atshi. Tshilamba atshi netshikale tshilembeleja bua kunuleja muaba wa tshijila ne muaba wa tshijila menemene. 
Exodus26:34 Uteke mushete wa Maweja-Nangila awu pa nkayawu muaba wa tshijila menemene. Pashishe, ubuikile tshibuikidiji." 
Exodus26:35 Uteke mesa muaba wa tshijila luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga. Uteke tshitekelu tshia muendu tshitangilangane ne mesa luseke lua kuinshi kua ditunga. 
Exodus26:36 “Tshilamba tshia kulembeleja mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta, tshikale tshitela bimpe ne buanda bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu." 
Exodus26:37 Wenze kabidi makunji atanu a mutshi wa ndunga, malamike tshiamu tshia mapwungi. Ku makunji aku kuikale tshilamba tshipopela ne misonsu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Wenze bitaku bitanu bia tshiamu tshikunze bua makunji awu." 
Exodus27:1 “Pashishe, wenze tshilambuilu tshia mabaya a mitshi ya ndunga tshia kuoshila milambu. Tshikale ne metre abidi ne tshitupa nseke yatshi yonsu. Butumbuke buatshi buikale metre umue ne tshitupa." 
Exodus27:2 Mu matumba onsu anayi a tshilambuilu, ulamikamu nsengu ya mabaya milamakane ne tshilambuilu. Kabidi, tshilambuilu tshijima tshikale tshilamike tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus27:3 Wenze bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu mu tshilambuilu ne tshiamu tshikunze: tshintu tshia kuboya natshi butu, bikasu, malongu, nkala bua kuambula munyinyi, wenze kabidi ne mbabula." 
Exodus27:4 Uluke kabidi kakanu ka tshiamu tshikunze mu matumba onsu anayi. 
Exodus27:5 Kakanu aku, ukateke pankatshi pa tshilambuilu luseke lua kuinshi." 
Exodus27:6 Wenze mabaya abidi a mitshi ya ndunga a kubueja ku tshilambuilu. Ulamike tshiamu tshikunze ku mabaya aku. 
Exodus27:7 Ubueje mitshi ayi ku nkanu idi ku tshilambuilu nseke yonsu ibidi, bua kuambuilaku tshilambuilu." 
Exodus27:8 Tshilambuilu atshi, tshikale tshienza ne mabaya, kadi ushiye munda muatshi mutupu bu mumvua mukuambile ku mukuna eku." 
Exodus27:9 “Muaba wa tshijila wikale munyungulule ne lupangu. Lupangu alu, luikale lua bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda. Kuinshi kua lupangu, mu bule muikale metre makumi atanu a bilamba." 
Exodus27:10 Bilamba abi bikale bilamakaja ne nkanu ne milonda ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Bikale bilembeleja ku makunji makumi abidi a tshiamu tshikunze. Makunji awu, ikale ne bitaku makumi abidi bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus27:11 Luseke lua ku mutu kua lupangu, bilamba bikale bule bumue bisuika mushindu umue." 
Exodus27:12 Kadi, luseke ludi diba dibuelela, mu butshiama bua lupangu, bilamba bikale metre makumi abidi ne itanu, bisuika ku makunji dikumi." 
Exodus27:13 Pashishe, mu mushiku wa mbelu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, lupangu luikale kabidi ne metre makumi abidi ne itanu a bilamba mu butshiama." 
Exodus27:14 Mu mushiku wa mbelu, ku luseke ne ku luseke kuikale bilamba mutantshi wa metre muanda mutekete ne tshitupa." 
Exodus27:15 Kuikale makunji asatu ne bitaku bisatu. 
Exodus27:16 Mu mushiku wa mbelu wa lupangu, muikale tshilamba tshia bule bua metre dikumi, tshitela ne buanda bua ndanda ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Ukudike tshilamba atshi, ku makunji anayi adi pa bitaku binayi." 
Exodus27:17 Milonda ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ayi, neyilamakaje makunji onsu adi nunyungulule lupangu. Nkanu ya bijengu neikale kabidi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Kadi, bitaku nebikale bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus27:18 Nanku, lupangu luikale ne metre makumi atanu mu bule ne metre makumi abidi ne itanu mu butshiama. Butumbuke buikale metre ibidi ne tshitupa ya bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda. Bitaku bia makunji bikale bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus27:19 Bintu bionsu bidi ku muaba wa tshijila, ne bidibu benza nabi muaba awu, too ne ku milonda ya bitupa idi ku ntenta wa muaba wa tshijila ne ku lupangu, bikale anu bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus27:20 “Ubikile bena Izrayele, bakutuadile mafuta mapiamapia a kuela mu muendu, bua wikale utema matuku onsu dilolu." 
Exodus27:21 Mu ntenta wa kusambakena amu, Arone ne bana bende ba balume, batekemu tshitekelu tshia muendu. Tshitekelu tshia muendu atshi, tshikale kumpala kua tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja bua kujika muaba udi mushete wa ndondu. Miendu ayi, ikale itema butuku ne munya muaba undi meme Maweja-Nangila. Bena Izrayele ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu, balame mukenji ewu kashidi." 
Exodus28:1 “Wambile mukuluebe Arone ne bana bende ba balume: Nadabe, Abihu, Elazare ne Itamare, ubumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bua bangenzele mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Exodus28:2 Kadi, uteleshile muanenu Arone bilamba bia tshijila bia lumu ne butumbi bia mudimu wende." 
Exodus28:3 Bilamba abi, babitele anu kudi bantu bandi meme Maweja-Nangila mupeshe tshipedi tshia butedi. Arone ikale uvuala bilamba abi, padibu bamujidila ne padiye ungenzela mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Exodus28:4 Bilamba abi bikale bia mushindu ewu: tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, tshia efode, tshia muntumpu, tshia muinshi tshilengeja ne buanda bua mishindu mishilangane, tshifulu ne mukaba. Muanenu Arone ne bana bende ba balume nebavuale bilamba abi padibu benza mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Exodus28:5 Batele bilamba abi ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama, bufikuluke, bukunzubile, bukunze kunzuu, ne buanda bua ndanda ne bua mubidi wa mpawungi." 
Exodus28:6 “Nanku, tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene, tshikale tshitela kudi batedi ba kalanda-musenga. Tshikale tshitela ne buanda bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Tshilamba atshi, tshikale tshitela bimpe ne buanda bua mpawungi." 
Exodus28:7 Kadi, tshikale tshitela ne mampinda abidi ku nseke bua kutshivuala bimpe." 
Exodus28:8 Tukaba tudi mutuangaji munene uvuala natu tshilamba tshia efode, tuikale tua tshilamba atshi, tutela ne buanda bua mushindu umue." 
Exodus28:9 Wangate mabue a komaline abidi, ufundepu mena a bana ba Izrayele dikumi ne abidi." 
Exodus28:10 Pa dibue dimue ufundepu mena a bana basambombu, pa dibue dikuabu mena a bana basambombu, bilondeshile ku diledibua dia muana yonsu." 
Exodus28:11 Mena a bana awu, ikale mafunda pa mabue abidi, kudi muntu udi ne tshipedi, bu mudi tshitampi. Ikale mabueja mu masosu abidi engelela bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus28:12 Mabue abidi awu, wateka pa mampinda abidi adi pa tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene. Ikale tshimanyinu tshia mena a bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele. Nanku, padi Arone wimane kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, mena awu ikale amueneka pa makaya ende, bua meme Maweja-Nangila ngikale nnuvuluka amu kunuvuluka." 
Exodus28:13 Wenza masosu engelela bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi," 
Exodus28:14 uluke kabidi tukaba tukese tubidi tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene tupindakaja bu mionji. Ututenteke mu masosu amu. 
Exodus28:15 “Uteleshe tshilamba tshia kuvuala pa tshiadi, tshia pa dilumbulula. Tshilamba atshi, tshikale tshitela ne buanda bua ndanda, busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Tshikale tshitela bu tshilamba tshia efode ne buanda buengelela bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus28:16 Tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi atshi, tshikale tshibombi tshimue tshia santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu nseke yonsu." 
Exodus28:17 Pa tshilamba atshi, pikale milongu ya mabue a mushinga mukole inayi: mulongu wa kumpala wikale ne mabue a rubise, topaze ne emerode." 
Exodus28:18 Mulongu muibidi wikale ne mabue a grenate, safire ne dia mbongu." 
Exodus28:19 Mulongu muisatu wikale ne mabue a yasinte, agate ne ametiste." 
Exodus28:20 Mulongu muinayi wikale ne mabue a krisolite, komaline ne yaspe. Dibue dionsu dikale dibueja mu disosu dia tshiamu tshia mpawungi didi ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi." 
Exodus28:21 Mabue awu, ikale dikumi ne abidi, bungi bua bana ba Yakobe. Dina dia muana yonsu dikale difunda pa dibue bu mudi tshitampi. Mabue awu, neikale tshimanyinu tshia bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele." 
Exodus28:22 “Ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, kuikale tukanu tukese tubidi tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, tupindakaja bu mionji." 
Exodus28:23 Kuikale kabidi nkanu ibidi ya bijengu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ya kusuika ku mutu kua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi." 
Exodus28:24 Pashishe, usuike kakanu kakese ka majita ku nkanu ya bijengu yonsu idi ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi." 
Exodus28:25 Kadi, nsongu ibidi ya tukanu tukese atu, uyiteke ku masosu abidi a tshiamu tshia mpawungi, adi ku mampinda a tshilamba tshia efode. Tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi tshikale kumpala." 
Exodus28:26 Wenze kabidi nkanu ibidi ya bijengu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, uyiteke kuinshi kua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, bituangane ne tshilamba tshia efode." 
Exodus28:27 Wenza nkanu mikuabu ibidi ya bijengu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, uyiteke kuinshi kua mampinda adi kumpala kua tshilamba tshia efode. Nkanu ayi, ikale pa mutu pa tshilamba tshia efode bilamakaja ne tukaba." 
Exodus28:28 Usuikakaje nkanu ya bijengu idi ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, ne idi ku tshilamba tshia efode ne muonji mufikuluke. Nanku, tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi netshikale pa mutu pa tshilamba tshia efode bilamakaja ne tukaba bua kabitukakanyi pa tshiadi." 
Exodus28:29 “Pikala Arone ubuela mu muaba wa tshijila, ikale uvuala tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi tshia dilumbulula, tshidi ne mena a bisamba bia bena Izrayele, bua meme Maweja-Nangila ngikale nnuvuluka amu kunuvuluka." 
Exodus28:30 Wewe Moshe, ubueje Urime ne Tumime mu tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, tshia kuvuala pa kulumbulula. Arone ikale uvuala bintu abi misangu yonsu padiye wimana kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila, bua kumanya tshindi musue kuenzela bena Izrayele." 
Exodus28:31 “Muntumpu wa Arone wikale onsu mujima wa tshilamba tshikunzubile. 
Exodus28:32 Muntumpu awu wikale ne nshingu. Ku nshingu aku, kuikale tukaba tutela bikole bu mudibu batela muntumpu wa mvita." 
Exodus28:33 Ku muntumpu aku, kuikale kabidi bintu bia mishindu mishilangane bifuanangane ne tumuma tua grenade. Kadi ubitele ne buanda bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Pashishe, kuinshi kua muntumpu aku," 
Exodus28:34 ulembelejeku ndibu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi pankatshi pa tumuma tua grenade. 
Exodus28:35 Arone neavuale muntumpu awu diba didiye wenza mudimu wende wa butuangaji. Pikalaye wenza mudimu kumpala kuanyi nansha upatuka mu muaba wa tshijila bantu bonsu nebumvue muadi wa ndibu ayi. Nanku Arone kakufua to. 
Exodus28:36 “Pashishe, wenze tshitata tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshifuanangane ne tshilongu. Ufundepu bu tshitampi ne: ‘Wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus28:37 Tshitata atshi, utshisuike kumpala kua tshifulu ne mukaba mukunzubile." 
Exodus28:38 Padi Arone wasa tshifulu atshi, pandi ntshimona, nengikale mfuila bena Izrayele luse nansha bobu batupakana padibu bantuadila milambu." 
Exodus28:39 “Nebatelele kabidi Arone: tshilamba tshia muinshi tshia miosa ya nyama, tshifulu tshia buanda bua ndanda ne mukaba mulengeja." 
Exodus28:40 “Utelele bana ba balume ba Arone mintumpu, bifulu ne mikaba bia lumu ne butumbi." 
Exodus28:41 “Bilamba abi, wewe Moshe ubivuadike muanenu Arone ne bana bende ba balume, ubalabe mafuta, ubambike midimu yabu. Ke muudi mua kubabanjija nanku bua bashale benza midimu ya butuangaji." 
Exodus28:42 Ubatelele kabidi tuputula tua muinshi tua buanda bua ndanda, tumukila mu tshimonu too ne mu binu bua butaka buabu kabumueneki." 
Exodus28:43 Bilamba abi, Arone ne bana bende ba balume babivuale anu padibu babuele mu ntenta wa kusambakena, nansha padibu baye pabuipi ne tshilambuilu tshidi muaba wa tshijila bua mudimu wa butuangaji, nanku butaka buabu kabuakumueneka, kabuena bubakebela lufu to. Arone alame mukenji ewu kashidi ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu." 
Exodus29:1 “Ujidile Arone ne bana bende ba balume ku mudimu wa butuangaji nenku: “Usungule muana wa mukoku mulume umue ne bimpanga bibidi kabiyi kalema pambidi. 
Exodus29:2 Wangate bukula bua ntete, wenze mampa adi kaayi mela buanga ne mikata mikanga ne mafuta, kayiyi miela buanga. Wangate kabidi tukata tubidi tupepele tukanga ne mafuta, kadi katuyi tuela buanga." 
Exodus29:3 Ubiteke mu tshisaka tshimue, ubindambule meme Maweja-Nangila pamue ne ngombe mulume ne mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi." 
Exodus29:4 “Uye ne Arone ne bana bende ba balume ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena, uboweshe mayi." 
Exodus29:5 Pashishe, ujadike Arone bilamba biende bia tshijila: muntumpu, tshilamba tshia muinshi, tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene ne tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi. Pashishe, usuikakaje tukaba tudi ku tshilamba tshia efode." 
Exodus29:6 Wase Arone tshifulu ku mutu. Kadi, ku tshifulu aku, kuikale tshitata tshia tshijila." 
Exodus29:7 Umuele mafuta a tshijila pa mutu bua kumujidila. 
Exodus29:8 Ubikile bana ba balume ba Arone, ubavuadike mintumpu yabu." 
Exodus29:9 Ubasuike mikaba, ubase kabidi ne bifulu ku mutu. Ke muudi ne bua kubajiidila nanku, bua Arone ne ndelanganyi yende bashale batuangaji kashidi. “Bua Arone ne bana bende kutuadija mudimu wa butuangaji, wenze nenku:" 
Exodus29:10 “Uye ne ngombe mulume, kumpala kua mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Arone ne bana bende ba balume bamutenteke bianza pa mutu." 
Exodus29:11 Pashishe, ushipe ngombe awu kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila, pabuipi ne mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus29:12 Utue munu mu mashi a ngombe awu, ulabe mu matumba onsu a tshilambuilu. Mashi adi ashala, witshikije panshi kuinshi kua tshilambuilu." 
Exodus29:13 Wangate mafuta onsu adi ku mala, tuonyi ne mafuta atu, ne lutandatanda lua ku mutshima, ubioshe pa tshilambuilu." 
Exodus29:14 Ewu ke mulambu wa kukobolola nawu batuangaji. Kadi, tshiseba tshia ngombe awu, munyinyi ne mala bidi bishale, uye kubiosha anu mutantshi mule ne mitanda." 
Exodus29:15 “Wangate kabidi mukoku wa tshimpanga, Arone ne bana bende ba balume J batentekapu bianza," 
Exodus29:16 wewe uukose mutu, usashile mashi ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Exodus29:17 Usaye mukoku wa tshimpanga awu, usukule bia munda ne mikonu. Ubiteke pa tshilambuilu pa mutu pa munyinyi ne mutu." 
Exodus29:18 Woshe bintu bionsu abi, bua bikale mulambu wa kuosha wa dipembu dimpe udi unsankisha meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus29:19 “Wangate mukoku wa tshimpanga muibidi, Arone ne bana bende ba balume batenteka bianza pa mutu pawu kabidi." 
Exodus29:20 Wewe Moshe, ukose mukoku wa tshimpanga awu mutu, wangate mashi, ulabe Arone ne bana bende ba balume ku lusongu lua ditshi dia lua balume dia mutu yonsu, ku tshiala tshia tshianza tshia balume ne ku muana nkasa munene wa dikasa dia balume dia muntu yonsu. Kadi, mashi adi mashale, witshikije ku nseke yonsu inayi ya tshilambuilu." 
Exodus29:21 Pashishe, wangate mashi makese adi pa tshilambuilu, ne mafuta a tshijila, umiamine Arone ne ku bilamba biende. Umiamine kabidi ne bana bende ba balume ne ku bilamba biabu bionsu, nebikale bia tshijila." 
Exodus29:22 Mulambu wa mukoku muibidi ewu ke mbangilu wa mudimu wa butuangaji. Pashishe, ku munyinyi wa mukoku wa tshimpanga awu, umushe bintu bia mafuta: mukila, mafuta, lutandatanda lua ku mutshima, tshibelu tshia luseke lua balume, tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta adi malamataku ne adi malamata ku mala." 
Exodus29:23 Kadi ku mampa adi mu tshisaka kumpala kua tshilambuilu, kaayi mela buanga, upeshe Arone ne bana bende ba balume dibulunge dimue, mukata umue mukanga ne mafuta ne kakata kamue kakese kapepele." 
Exodus29:24 Ubiteke bana bende mu bianza, babiele mulu, babinyukule bua kundambula meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus29:25 Pashishe, wangate kabidi bintu abi, ubiteke pa tshilambuilu pa mutu pa mulambu wa kuosha, bua bikale mulambu wa dipembu udi unnunkila meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus29:26 Tshiadi tshia mukoku wa tshimpanga muibidi awu, wewe Moshe utshiele mulu, utshinyukule kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila, kadi utshiangate tshishale tshiebe." 
Exodus29:27 “Pashishe, wambile bena Izrayele ne: tshiadi tshia mukoku wa tshimpanga ne tshibelu tshiudi muele mulu munyukule mbia tshijila." 
Exodus29:28 Nanku, padi bena Izrayele bandambula mulambu wa ditua ndondu, Arone ne ndelanganyi yende nebikale bangata tshiadi ne tshibelu." 
Exodus29:29 “Pikala Arone mumane kufua, bilamba biende bia tshijila nebabiangate anu kudi ndelanganyi yende. Kadi, nebavuale bilamba abi, anu dituku dia kubajidila ne dia kutuadija mudimu." 
Exodus29:30 Muana wa Arone wasungulabu bua kuenza mudimu wa butuangaji munene pa muaba wa tatuende, neavuale bilamba bia tshijila abi, matuku malondangane muanda mutekete, diba dionsu didiye ubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena bua kuenza mudimu." 
Exodus29:31 “Munyinyi wa mukoku wa tshimpanga tshibidi wakubanjija nawu batuangaji, uulambila pa muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus29:32 Munyinyi awu ne mampa bidi mu tshisaka, Arone ne bana bende ba balume nebabidile mu mushiku wa mbelu a ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus29:33 Batuangaji nkayabu ke badi mua kudia bintu abi, bualu bivua bibajidila nabi, kabidi bibabanjija nabi bua kubakobolola. Nanku, muntu mukuabu kena mua kudia biakudia abi to, bualu mbia tshijila." 
Exodus29:34 Pikala mampa awu ne munyinyi bishale too ne ku dinda, kanuena mua kubidia kabidi to, nubioshe, bualu mbintu bia tshijila." 
Exodus29:35 “Wewe Moshe, wenzele Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bionsu bindi mukuambile ebi. Ubajidile matuku muanda mutekete." 
Exodus29:36 “Dituku dionsu, wikale wosha ngombe mulume bua kukobolola bantu. Wewe ujidila tshilambuilu, utshimiamina manyi." 
Exodus29:37 Ujidile tshilambuilu matuku muanda mutekete bua kujimija mibi yonsu idiku. Ku tshilambuilu mmuaba wa tshijila menemene, muntu yonsu watshilenga, nansha tshintu tshilengaku nebipete dinyoka." 
Exodus29:38 “Milambu ya kuosha pa tshilambuilu matuku onsu ikale ya mushindu ewu: 
Exodus29:39 woshe bana ba mikoku babidi ba tshidimu tshimue, umue dinda, mukuabu dilolu." 
Exodus29:40 Kadi, muana wa mukoku uudi udianjila kulambula dinda, ulambule pamue ne bintu ebi: kilo isatu ya bukula busambakaja ne litre umue ne tshitupa wa mafuta a olive, welemu kabidi maluvu a mvinyo litre umue ne tshitupa." 
Exodus29:41 Kadi muana wa mukoku uudi ulambula dilolu, umulambule kabidi pamue ne bukula, mafuta ne maluvu bu muuvua muenze dinda. Bualu mmulambu wa dipembu dimpe wa kungoshila meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus29:42 Nuikale nundambula mulambu wa mushindu ewu kashidi ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu. Bandambule anu mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena muaba utuikala tumonangana nebe. 
Exodus29:43 “Nanku, nembuikile muaba ewu ne butumbi buanyi. Bualu ke muaba undi mmonangana ne bena Izrayele." 
Exodus29:44 Nenjidile kabidi ntenta wa kusambakena ne muaba wa tshilambuilu. Bu mundi njidila Arone ne bana bende ba balume bua bangenzele mudimu wa butuangaji. 
Exodus29:45 Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele musombe munkatshi muabu. 
Exodus29:46 Bena Izrayele nebajadike ne meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi mubapatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu bua meme kusomba munkatshi muabu. “Ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. 
Exodus30:1 “Nebase tshilambuilu ne mitshi ya ndunga, bua kundambuilapu manananshi." 
Exodus30:2 Tshilambuilu atshi, tshikale ne santimetre makumi atanu nseke yonsu, butumbuke buatshi buikale bua metre umue. Tshilambuilu ne nsengu idi ku matumba anayi, bikale bionsu bilamakane." 
Exodus30:3 Pashishe, ulamike tshiamu tshia mpawungi pa mutu pa tshilambuilu, ku nseke yatshi yonsu inayi, ne ku nsengu. Ku mibangu ya tshilambuilu atshi, unyungululaku mukaba wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus30:4 Kuinshi kua mukaba awu, wenzeku nkanu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ku luseke ne ku luseke. Ku nkanu aku, ubuejeku mitshi bua kuambula tshilambuilu." 
Exodus30:5 Wenze mabaya a mitshi ya ndunga abidi, walamike tshiamu tshia mpawungi nseke yonsu." 
Exodus30:6 Tshilambuilu atshi, utshiteke kumpala kua tshilamba tshidi tshijike mushete wa ndondu. Tshikale tshitangilangane ne mushete wa ndondu awu, muaba utuikala tumuenangana nebe." 
Exodus30:7 Pashishe, Arone ikale ungoshilamu manananshi dinda dionsu padiye usukula miendu idi ku tshilambuilu." 
Exodus30:8 Kadi dilolu, ikale ungoshila manananshi padiye uye kutemesha muendu. Kabakulekela dingoshila manananshi kashidi." 
Exodus30:9 Kabidi pa tshilambuilu apu, kuena mua kundambulapu mulambu wa manananshi adi kaayi a tshijila to, nansha mulambu wa kuosha, nansha wa bintu bia mu madimi nansha wa maluvu a mvinyo." 
Exodus30:10 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, Arone ikale utshikobolola, umiamine mashi a nyama ku nsengu inayi idi ku tshilambuilu, bua kukobolola bantu. Mukenji ewu, bikale bawenzulula ku tshidimu tshionsu kudi ndelanganyi yenu yonsu. Tshilambuilu etshi netshikale tshijidila, tshikale muaba wa tshijila menemene.”" 
Exodus30:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe kabidi ne: 
Exodus30:12 — Pawikala ubadika bena Izrayele, muntu yonsu afile tshintu tshia kudipandisha natshi ku ntatu ne makenga bidi mua kumukuata, diba dia kubadika bantu." 
Exodus30:13 Muntu yonsu udibu babadika, alambule tshia bibidi tshimue tshia sikle bu mudibu benza muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus30:14 Muntu yonsu udi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne pa mutu, neafile mulambu awu kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus30:15 Mulambu udi bantu bafile bua kudipandisha awu, babanji ne bapele bafile amu bungi bua mushindu umue." 
Exodus30:16 Nanku, wangate makuta adi bena Izrayele bafila bua kudipandisha awu, ulongolole nawu bintu bia mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila nemvuluke bena Izrayele, mbalame." 
Exodus30:17 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: 
Exodus30:18 — Wenze dilongu dia tshiamu tshikunze. Uteke dilongu adi pa tshitaku tshiadi tshia tshiamu tshikunze pankatshi pa tshilambuilu ne ntenta wa kusambakena. Pashishe, welamu mayi." 
Exodus30:19 Arone ne bana bende bikale bowa mayi awu ku bianza ne ku makasa," 
Exodus30:20 bangabanga ne kubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena, nansha bangabanga ne kundambula milambu. Nanku kabakufua to." 
Exodus30:21 Badi ne bua kuowa mayi awu ku bianza ne ku makasa bua kabatu to. Balame mukenji ewu kashidi too ne ndelanganyi yabu. 
Exodus30:22 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: 
Exodus30:23 — Angata manananshi a mupuya mukole: a mire kilo itanu, a sinamome kilo ibidi ne tshitupa, a kanele kilo ibidi ne tshitupa ne" 
Exodus30:24 a kase kilo itanu — bilondeshile tshipimu tshidibu bangata bua muaba wa tshijila, — kuikale kabidi litre isambombu ya mafuta a olive." 
Exodus30:25 Basambakaje manananshi ne mafuta bua kujidila nawu bantu ne bintu. 
Exodus30:26 Mafuta awu, ujidila nawu ntenta wa kusambakena, mushete wa ndondu," 
Exodus30:27 mesa a kulambuila mampa ne bintu bionsu bidiku, tshitekelu tshia muendu ne bintu bionsu bidiku, tshilambuilu tshia manananshi," 
Exodus30:28 tshilambuilu ne bintu bionsu bidiku, dilongu dinene ne tshitaku tshiadi." 
Exodus30:29 Pawajidila bintu abi, nebikale bia tshijila menemene. Nanku, muntu yonsu nansha tshintu tshionsu tshidi tshilenga bintu abi, netshipete dinyoka." 
Exodus30:30 Ulabe Arone ne bana bende ba balume mafuta aa, bua kubajidila, bua bangenzele mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Exodus30:31 “Wambile bena Izrayele ne: ‘Mafuta a tshijila aa, nga kujidila nawu bantu badi benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu." 
Exodus30:32 Kadi, muntu kena mua kulaba mafuta awu pambidi to. Kabidi muntu kena mua kuenza mafuta a mushindu ewu to. Bualu mmafuta a tshijila anudi mua kunemeka." 
Exodus30:33 Muntu yonsu udi wenza mafuta a mushindu ewu, bua kulaba bantu badi kabayi batuangaji, numumushe munkatshi mua bantu banyi.’ ”" 
Exodus30:34 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: — Angata mitshi ya dipembu dikole: mutshi wa budimbu, bizubu bia mutshi wa budimbu, mutshi wa ndundu ne mutshi wa kamonya. Bintu abi ubiangate anu bungi bua momumue." 
Exodus30:35 Ubisangishe kaba kamue, welemu luepu bua kubilengeja bikale bia tshijila." 
Exodus30:36 Pashishe, ubitue, wenze musenga wa kuteka kumpala kua mushete wa Maweja-Nangila, udi mu ntenta wa kusambakena, muaba ungikala mukuambile bua tuetu kumuenangana. Numanye ne: musenga awu ntshintu tshienu tshia tshijila." 
Exodus30:37 Kanuena mua kuenza manananshi a mushindu ewu bua midimu idi kayiyi ya tshijila. Kadi, manananshi a mushindu ewu, nuikale nuenza nawu anu mudimu wanyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus30:38 Pikala muntu mudienzele manananshi a mushindu ewu, numumushe munkatshi mua bantu banyi." 
Exodus31:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: 
Exodus31:2 — Ndi muangate Beshalele ku mudimu. Yeye ewu, mmuana wa Uri, muikulu wa Ure wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Exodus31:3 Mueyelu wanyi udi munda muende, bua ikale muntu wa lungenyi ne meji, mumanye mua kuenza midimu mishilangane." 
Exodus31:4 Mmumanye mua kulongolola midimu, kuenza bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne bia tshiamu tshikunze," 
Exodus31:5 kusonga mabue a mushinga mukole a kuteka mu masosu, kusonga ne mitshi ya kuenza nayi mudimu. Nanku, yeye mmumanye mua kuenza midimu yonsu." 
Exodus31:6 Ndi muangate kabidi Okoliyabe, muana wa Akisamaka wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane, bua ikale umuambuluisha. Ndi mupeshe bantu bakuabu tshipedi tshia kuenza midimu ya bianza. Nanku, bonsu pamue nebenze bionsu bimvua mukuambile bua wewe kuenza:" 
Exodus31:7 ntenta wa kusambakena, mushete wa ndondu, tshibuikidiji tshia mushete ne bintu bionsu bidi mu ntenta," 
Exodus31:8 mesa a kulambuila mampa ne bintu bionsu bidiku, tshitaku tshia muendu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi, ne bintu bionsu bidiku, tshilambuilu tshia musenga wa manananshi," 
Exodus31:9 tshilambuilu ne bintu bionsu bidipu, dilongu dinene ne tshitaku tshiadi," 
Exodus31:10 bilamba bia kuenza nabi mudimu muaba wa tshijila, bilamba bia Arone ne bia bana bende ba balume bia kuenzabu nabi mudimu wa butuangaji," 
Exodus31:11 mafuta a kujidila nawu bantu ne bintu, benze kabidi manananshi a mu muaba wa tshijila. Midimu yonsu eyi, bayenze anu mushindu umvua meme Maweja-Nangila mukuambile." 
Exodus31:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus31:13 Ambila bena Izrayele mikenji eyi ne: — Dituku dia Dikisha dishale tshivulukilu pankatshi petu nenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, bua nuenu kumanya ne: Meme, Maweja-Nangila ke udi munusungule." 
Exodus31:14 Nunemeke dituku dia Dikisha, bualu ndienu dia tshijila. Muntu yonsu udi wenza mudimu dituku adi, ne bamumushe munkatshi mua tshisamba tshianyi, bamushipe." 
Exodus31:15 Nuenze mudimu mu matuku asambombu, kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete nuikishe, bualu ndituku dia tshijila dia kunnemeka meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Muntu yonsu udi wenza mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, nebamushipe." 
Exodus31:16 Nanku, bena Izrayele ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu, bavuluke dituku dia Dikisha, bualu ke diumvuangana dietu nabu dia kashidi." 
Exodus31:17 Dituku edi nedikale tshimanyinu tshia diumvuangana didi pankatshi panyi ne bena Izrayele. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mufuke diulu ne buloba mu matuku asambombu, meme kuikisha dituku dia muanda mutekete." 
Exodus31:18 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila mumane kujikija diyuki ne Moshe ku mukuna wa Sinayi, kupeshaye Moshe mabue abidi ne mikenji ivuaye mudifundile nkayende." 
Exodus32:1 Bena Izrayele bamona ne: Moshe wapitshi kujingakana ku mukuna, kuambilabu Arone ne: — Utuenzele mvidie, afilele kumpala kuetu. Bualu muntu ewu Moshe, uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu, katuena bamanye tshidi tshimuenzekela to." 
Exodus32:2 Arone kubambila ne: — Umushayi tukanu tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi tudi ku matshi a bakaji benu, ne a bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji, nutuntuadile." 
Exodus32:3 Bena Izrayele kukopolabu tukanu tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi tuvua ku matshi abu, kututuadila Arone." 
Exodus32:4 Pashishe, Arone kuangata tukanu atu, kutuengululaye muiku, kututuaye mu tshinu, kuenzaye lupingu lua kana ka ngombe, ka tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bena Izrayele kuamba ne: — Ke mvidie wetu uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu ewu!" 
Exodus32:5 Arone umvua nanku, kuasaye tshilambuilu kumpala kua lupingu lua kana ka ngombe, kuelaye diyi wamba ne: — Malaba netusanke mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus32:6 Bena Izrayele kujuka mu dinda dionsu, kufilabu milambu ya kuosha ne ya ditua ndondu. Pashishe, kudiabu, kunuabu, kutuadijabu kunaya." 
Exodus32:7 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Tuluka lukasa, bualu bantu bauvua mupatule mu Ejipitu mbenze bualu bubi bupite." 
Exodus32:8 Kabena bitabe tshimvua mubambile. Mbenze lupingu lua kana ka ngombe lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Badi balutuila binu, badiambula milambu, bamba ne: “Ke mvidie wetu uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu ewu.”" 
Exodus32:9 Meme Maweja-Nangila mbajadiki ne: bena Izrayele bonsu mbantu ba tshitunu. 
Exodus32:10 Nanku ndi ne tshiji, wewe Moshe undekele, mbutule tshisamba etshi, bualu bantu aba badi ne tshitunu. Pashishe wewe neutante, wikale tshisamba tshinene." 
Exodus32:11 Moshe umvua nanku, kutendakenaye Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, wamba ne: — Bantu aba mbantu bebe, wewe ke uvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu ku bukole buebe. Lekela kubafikila munda nanku," 
Exodus32:12 bena Ejipitu mbafuane kuamba ne: Uvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu ne lonji, bua kubashipa, kubabutula pa mikuna. Nanku, ndi nkusengelela bua utuyishe tshiji tshiebe, kubabutudi to." 
Exodus32:13 Uvuluke meyi ebe ne mitshipu biuvua mulaye bantu bebe Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe bua kuvudija ndelanganyi yabu, bu mitotu ya mulu, kabidi bua kupianabu ditunga edi dionsu kashidi." 
Exodus32:14 Maweja-Nangila kufuila bena Izrayele luse, kena mubenzele bionsu bivuaye mubakanyine to." 
Exodus32:15 Pashishe, Moshe kutuluka ku mukuna, muikale ne mabue abidi a mikenji mu bianza, mafunda emu ne emu." 
Exodus32:16 Mabue awu ne mikenji ivua mifundapu, bivua bienza amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende." 
Exodus32:17 Nanku, Yoshuwa kumvua mutoyi wa bantu, kuambilaye Moshe ne: — Ndi ngunwua mutoyi mukole wa bantu, baluangana mvita mu mitanda!" 
Exodus32:18 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Ki mmutoyi wa bantu batshimune mvita nansha babatshimune to, ndi ngumvua bantu bimba misambu ya bibilu." 
Exodus32:19 Moshe ufika pabuipi ne muaba uvua bantu, kumonaye lupingu lua kana ka ngombe ka tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bantu balujila maja. Nanku, kufikaye munda bikole, kuimanshaye mabue avuaye nawu ku bianza kuinshi kua mukuna, mabue awu kukosekawu." 
Exodus32:20 Moshe kubakula lupingu lua kana ka ngombe alu, kuluosha, kuvingutukalu. Kuelaye butu abu mu mayi, kumushaye bena Izrayele mayi awu." 
Exodus32:21 Pashishe, Moshe kukonka Arone ne: — Bena Izrayele mbakuenzela bualu bubi kaayi, paudi mubenzele tshilema bunene nenku?" 
Exodus32:22 Arone kuandamuna ne: — Mfumuanyi kumfikidi munda, bualu wewe nkayebe udi mumanye buenzayi bua bantu aba." 
Exodus32:23 Bobu nkayabu bavua bandomba ne: “Utuenzele mvidie, afilele kumpala kuetu. Bualu muntu ewu Moshe uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu, katuena bamanye tshidi tshimuenzekela to!”" 
Exodus32:24 Meme panyi kubalomba ne: badi ne tukanu tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku matshi, batuntuadile. Bafika natu, meme kutuela mu kapia, nkaadi mmona amu kana ka ngombe kapatukamu." 
Exodus32:25 Moshe kujadika ne Arone uvua mulekele bantu nkayabu, benza mudibu basue, bua babaseke kudi baluishi babu." 
Exodus32:26 Nanku, Moshe kuimana ku tshibuelelu tshia mitanda, kuelaye diyi ne: — Badi bananga Maweja-Nangila, basemene muaba undi ewu! Bena Levi bonsu kusemena kudi Moshe." 
Exodus32:27 Moshe kubambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele mmutume diyi ne: “Muntu yonsu ambule muele wende wa mvita, endakane ku nzubu ya bantu, bua kushipa udiye usangana: ne mmuanabu wa balume, ne mmulunda wende nansha muena mutumba nende.”" 
Exodus32:28 Bena Levi kuitababu bionsu bivua Moshe mubambile abi, kushipabu bena Izrayele bu binunu bisatu dituku adi." 
Exodus32:29 Moshe kuambila bena Levi ne: — Biangatshile ku lelu, nudi badijidile bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, bualu nudi bitabe diyi diende, bashipe balele benu bu muvuaye munuambile. Nenku, Maweja-Nangila yeye muine neanuendeshe dikasa dimpe." 
Exodus32:30 Butshia dinda, Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nudi benza tshilema tshipite bunene. Kadi ndi mbanda kabidi kudi Maweja-Nangila ku mukuna bua kumulomba, misangu mikuabu ne udi mua kungitaba bua kunufuilaku luse, ku tshilema tshienu etshi." 
Exodus32:31 Ke Moshe kubanda ku mukuna, kuambilaye Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bantu aba mbenze tshilema tshipite bunene, mbadienzele mvidie wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus32:32 Ndi nkusengelela bua ubafuile luse, bua tshilema etshi. Kadi pawabenga, ukupule dina dianyi mu mukanda wa muoyi, uudi mufunde mena a bantu bebe." 
Exodus32:33 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Anu badi benza tshilema abu ke bandi nkupula mena abu mu mukanda wa muoyi. 
Exodus32:34 Wewe ndaku, ufikishe bantu muaba umvua mukuambile, mutumibue wanyi neakulombole. Kadi diba dingafika, ndi ne bua kubanyoka bikole bua tshilema tshidibu benza etshi." 
Exodus32:35 Maweja-Nangila kukengesha bena Izrayele, bualu bavua bambila Arone bua kubenzela lupingu lua kana ka ngombe." 
Exodus33:1 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Umukayi muaba ewu ne bena Izrayele bonsu, bauvua mupatule mu Ejipitu. Ndayi kusomba mu ditunga dimvua mulaye Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Mvua mumane kutshipa bua kubapesha ditunga adi ne ndelanganyi yabu." 
Exodus33:2 Nanku, nentume mutumibue wanyi bua kunulama. Nennuipatshile bena Kenaane, bena Amore, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa." 
Exodus33:3 Nuye mu ditunga edi didi ne biakudia bia bungi. Kadi meme tshiakuya nenu to, bualu nudi ne tshitunu, ndi mua kunubutula mu njila." 
Exodus33:4 Bena Izrayele bumvua miaku eyi mikole ya matandu, kudilabu bikole. Kuvualabu bilamba bia dibungama." 
Exodus33:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Bu mudibu ne tshitunu, meme muende nabu mutantshi mukese, ndi mua kubabutula bonsu. Kadi badikengeshe, bumushe bilenga bionsu bidibu nabi, bavuale anu bilamba bia dibungama, nanku nemmone tshindi mua kubenzela.”" 
Exodus33:6 Ke muakadikengesha bena Izrayele nanku, kumushabu bilenga bionsu bivuabu bavuale, bituadije ku mukuna wa Sinayi." 
Exodus33:7 Bamane kuasa mitanda, Moshe kumusha nzubu wa ntenta wa tshijila uvua munkatshi mua bantu, kumuasaye ku luseke, mutantshi mule ne muaba uvua bantu basombele. Kumuinyikaye dina ne: “Ntenta wa kusambakena”. Bavua basue kumonangana ne Maweja-Nangila, bavua bumuka mu mitanda yabu, baye mu ntenta ewu bua kuyukila ne Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus33:8 Misangu yonsu ivua Moshe uya ku ntenta, bena Izrayele bavua bajuka, muntu yonsu wimana mu mushiku wa mbelu wa mutanda wende, mutangile mudi Moshe ubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus33:9 Nanku, pavua Moshe ubuela mu ntenta amu, divuba divua dibuikila mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta. Maweja-Nangila uvua wakula mu divuba amu uyukila ne Moshe." 
Exodus33:10 Bantu bonsu bavua batua binu panshi mu mishiku yabu ya mbelu, pavuabu bamona divuba adi ku tshibuelelu tshia ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus33:11 Maweja-Nangila uvua wakula ne Moshe bitangilangane bu muntu wakula ne mulunda wende. Kadi pavua Moshe upingana muaba uvua bantu bonsu basombe, Yoshuwa muana wa Nune, uvua umuambuluisha, uvua mushale anu mu ntenta." 
Exodus33:12 Moshe kuambila Maweja-Nangila ne: — Maweja-Nangila unteleje. Wewe udi muntume bua meme kulombola bena Izrayele, kadi kuena mumpeshe muntu mukuabu udi mua kungambuluisha to. Wewe udi munsungule, mungendeshe diakalenga bu muuvua mumane kuamba." 
Exodus33:13 Nanku, bu muudi mungendeshe diakalenga, ungambile bionsu biudi wela meji, bua meme nkumanye nkujadike, ngikale muena diakalenga kashidi. Uvuluke ne: bena Izrayele mbantu bebe." 
Exodus33:14 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Moshe ne: — Meme nkayanyi nenkulombole; neutshimune. 
Exodus33:15 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Pawikala kuyi uya netu, ki mbimpe tumuke muaba ewu to." 
Exodus33:16 Kabidi mmunyi mudi bantu mua kumanya ne: meme ne bena Izrayele tudi bapete diakalenga kuudi, paudi kuyi munkatshi muetu? Bua tuetu kushilangana ne bisamba bikuabu, anu wewe muikale munkatshi muetu." 
Exodus33:17 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Nenkumbaje bionsu biudi mungambile ebi, bualu ndi mumanye dina diebe, kabidi udi unsankisha." 
Exodus33:18 Moshe kusengelela Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: — Ndejaku butumbi buebe. 
Exodus33:19 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Moshe ne: — Nenkuleje buakane buanyi, nenkuambile kabidi dina dianyi dia “Maweja-Nangila”. Muntu undi musue kunanga, ndi mmunanga, kabidi muntu undi musue kufuila luse, ndi mmufuila luse." 
Exodus33:20 Maweja-Nangila kumujadikila ne: — Kuena mua kumona mpala wanyi to, bualu muntu kena mua kumona mpala wanyi, kushala kabidi ne muoyi to." 
Exodus33:21 Maweja-Nangila kuleja Moshe lubuebue, kumuambila ne: — Imana pa lubuebue apa too ne pa umbakuleja butumbi buanyi." 
Exodus33:22 Nenkubuikile ne tshianza tshianyi mu lubuebue too ne pangapita. 
Exodus33:23 Pangumusha tshianza tshianyi, neumone nyima wanyi, bualu muntu kena mua kumona mpala wanyi to." 
Exodus34:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Usonge mabue makuabu a mikenji, mafuanangane ne a kumpala auvua 1 munyange. Meme nemfundululepu meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi." 
Exodus34:2 Udilongolole, malaba dinda, ubande ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Sinayi, ungindileku." 
Exodus34:3 Kadi, wikala anu nkayebe. Muntu mukuabu kena mua kupitshila ku mukuna aku. Nansha nyama kena mua kupitshilaku. Kabidi mukoku, mbuji, ngombe kayena mua kupitshilaku bua kudia to." 
Exodus34:4 Moshe kusonga mabue a mikenji abidi mafuanangane ne a kumpala. Dinda dionsu, kubandaye ku mukuna wa Sinayi ne mabue awu makuate ku bianza bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus34:5 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kupueka mu divuba dia kapia, kuimanaye pamue ne Moshe, kudisamunaye nkayende dina diende dia “Maweja-Nangila”." 
Exodus34:6 Pashishe, kupitaye kumpala kua Moshe wamba kabidi ne: “Ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa luse ne dinanga, ndi ne lutulu luvule, ndi nkumbaja bionsu bindi ndaya bantu, tshiena mfika munda lukasa." 
Exodus34:7 Ndi mfuila bantu luse too ne ku ndelanganyi tshinunu, mbajimijila bubi buabu, buntomboji ne ditupakana diabu. Kadi, tshiena mbingisha muntu udi mupile. Ndi nnyoka bana ba ndelanganyi misatu nansha minayi bua buenzayi bua baledi babu. ”" 
Exodus34:8 Moshe kutua binu panshi lukasa, kuinyikaye mutu" 
Exodus34:9 wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila wanyi, ndi mujadike ne bena Izrayele mbantu ba tshitunu, kadi bu muudi munnange, ndi nkusengelela bua wikale munkatshi muetu. Utufuileku luse ku bionsu bitudi bakuenzele, bualu tudi bantu bebe." 
Exodus34:10 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ndi ntua nebe ndondu, nengenze malu a kukema munkatshi muenu, adi kaayi manji kuenzeka mu tshisamba tshikuabu pa buloba bujima. Bua bena Izrayele bonsu banudi nabu bajadike mudimu muimpe undi mubenzele pamue nebe." 
Exodus34:11 “Wewe Moshe, ukumbaje malu onsu andi mukuambile lelu aa. Meme nenkuipatshile bena Amore, bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa." 
Exodus34:12 Kadi, kuena mua kutua ndondu ne bantu ba ditunga dinuasomba to. Bualu nudi mua kulonda buenzayi buabu, nuenu kupeta diakabi." 
Exodus34:13 Nanku, nupule bilambuilu biabu, nupule makunji abu adibu batendelela." 
Exodus34:14 Nuenu kanuena mua kukukuila mvidie wa tshisamba tshikuabu to. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ne mukawu. Bushuwa, ndi Mvidi Mukulu wenu nkayanyi." 
Exodus34:15 Kanuena mua kutua ndondu ne bena ditunga dinudi nusomba to. Bualu palambabu biakudia biabu bia kuelela mvidie yabu, nebanubikile bua kudia nabu." 
Exodus34:16 Bana benu ba balume kabena mua kusela nsongakaji ya mu ditunga adi to. Bualu badi mua kulonda bibidilu bibi bia nsongakaji idi inemeka mvidie ya ditunga diabu. 
Exodus34:17 “Kanuenji mvidie ya tshiamu bua kuyitendelela. 
Exodus34:18 “Mu ngondu wa Abibe unuvua bapatuke mu Ejipitu, nuikale nuenza tshibilu tshia dipatuka dienu. Matuku malondangane muanda mutekete, nudie mampa kaayi mela buanga, bu mumvua mumane kunuambila." 
Exodus34:19 “Bamuanabute mbanyi meme. Nanku, muanabute mulume wa ngombe, wa mukoku nansha wa mbuji, numundambule meme." 
Exodus34:20 Nupikule muanabute mulume wa mpunde ku mukoku. Panuabenga kupikula muanabute awu, numutshibule nshingu. Kadi, nupikule bamuanabute benu balume. “Kanufiki mu nzubu wanyi bianza bitupu to." 
Exodus34:21 “Nuenze mudimu anu matuku asambombu. Nuikishe dituku dia muanda mutekete, nansha mu tshikondu tshia kudima, nansha tshia kunowa biakudia." 
Exodus34:22 “Nuenze tshibilu tshia kunowa bintu bia mu madimi, panudi nunowa biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu. Nuenze kabidi tshibilu ku ndekelu wa tshidimu, panudi nunowa biakudia bikuabu bia mu madimi enu." 
Exodus34:23 “Bantu balume bonsu ba mu ditunga dienu, bikale badisangisha kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, misangu isatu ku tshidimu tshionsu bua kuntendelela." 
Exodus34:24 Pangipata bisamba bikuabu bionsu binudi nabi pabuipi, nendiundishe mikalu ya ditunga dienu, bua panudi numuka bua kumonanganna nanyi misangu eyi isatu, bantu bakuabu kabena mua kuikala ne lukuka lua ditunga dienu to." 
Exodus34:25 “Kanuena mua kundambula mulambu wa mashi a nyama pamue ne mampa adi mela buanga. Kabidi munyinyi wa nyama wa dituku dia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, nuudie ujike dituku adi." 
Exodus34:26 Bintu bia tshianyi binudi nunowa mu madimi enu, nubilambule mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kadi, panudi nulamba munyinyi wa muana wa mukoku nansha wa muana wa mbuji, kanuedimu mabele a mamuende to. ”" 
Exodus34:27 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ufunde bionsu bindi mukuambile ebi, bualu ke bidi bijadika ndondu undi mutue nebe ne bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Exodus34:28 Moshe kushala muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku, kayi udia, kayi unua, ufunda anu mikenji dikumi ivua ijadika ndondu wa diulu vuangana diabu." 
Exodus34:29 Moshe kutuluka ku mukuna wa Sinayi ne mabue abidi a ndondu makuate ku bianza. Kadi kavua mumanye ne: pavuaye utuluka apu, mpala wende uvua ukenka, bualu uvua muyukile ne Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus34:30 Diba divua Arone ne bena Izrayele bamone muvua mpala wa Moshe ukenka bikole, kutshinabu bua kufika muaba uvuaye." 
Exodus34:31 Moshe kubikila Arone ne balombodi ba bena Izrayele bonsu. Kusemenabu kudiye. Kubambilaye malu. 
Exodus34:32 Ke bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu kushisha kusemena kudi Moshe. Kubamanyishaye mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila mumupeshe ku mukuna wa Sinayi. 
Exodus34:33 Moshe ujikija kuakula, kudisuikaye tshilamba pa mpala." 
Exodus34:34 Nenku misangu yonsu ivua Moshe ubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena bua kuyukila ne Maweja-Nangila, uvua usulula tshilamba tshivua pa mpala atshi too ne papinganaye kudi bena Izrayele bua kubambila bivuabu bayukile ne Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus34:35 Kadi pavua bena Izrayele balengame batangile mpala wa Moshe bu muvuaye ukenka, Moshe uvua ubuikila tshilamba pa mpala too ne papinganaye kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus35:1 Moshe kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu, kubambila ne: — Telejayi mikenji idi Maweja-Nangila mutume bua nuenu kukumbaja:" 
Exodus35:2 “Nuenze mudimu matuku asambombu. Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete ndia Dikisha, bualu ndituku dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila. Muntu yonsu udi wenza mudimu dituku adi nebamushipe." 
Exodus35:3 Kabidi kanuena mua kutemesha nansha kapia mu nzubu wenu nansha umue dituku adi to.” 
Exodus35:4 Moshe uvua utungunuka ne dimanyisha bena Izrayele mikenji ya kudi Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Exodus35:5 — Muntu yonsu afile mulambu bu mudiye musue. Milambu inudi mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila ikale ya mishindu mishilangane: ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne ya tshiamu tshikunze," 
Exodus35:6 bilamba bia boya bua nyama bifikuluke, bikunzubile, ne bikunze kunzuu; bilamba bia ndanda, ne bia boya bua mbuji;" 
Exodus35:7 biseba bia mikoku ya bimpanga bilaba kakula, ne biseba bia nyama ya nkonga; mitshi ya ndunga;" 
Exodus35:8 mafuta a kuela mu muendu, manananshi a kusambakaja ne mafuta a kulaba, ne manananshi a mupuya mukole a kuosha;" 
Exodus35:9 mabue a onikse, ne mabue makuabu a mushinga mukole a kuteka mu tshilamba tshia mutuangaji munene tshia efode ne mu tshilamba tshiende tshia pa tshiadi." 
Exodus35:10 Nanku bantu ba kunudi benji ba midimu ya bianza, bafike bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu uvuaye muambe." 
Exodus35:11 Benze nzubu wa tshijila ne ntenta, tshilamba tshia kubuikila pa mutu pa ntenta, nkanu, mabaya, mitshi, makunji ne bitaku." 
Exodus35:12 Benze mushete wa ndondu ne mitshi ya kuelaku, ne tshibuikidiji tshiawu. Benze tshilamba tshidi tshijika mushete awu." 
Exodus35:13 Benze mesa ne mitshi ya kuelaku, kabidi ne bintu bionsu bidi pa mesa too ne mampa a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu." 
Exodus35:14 Benze tshitekelu tshia muendu ne bintu bionsu bidiku: miendu, ne mafuta a kutemesha nawu." 
Exodus35:15 Benze tshilambuilu tshia manananshi, ne mitshi ya kuelaku; mafuta a kuela pa mutu, ne manananshi a kuosha; tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa tshijila;" 
Exodus35:16 tshilambuilu tshia milambu ne tukanu tua tshiamu tshikunze, mitshi ya kuelaku, ne bintu bionsu bivua ku tshilambuilu; dilongu dinene ne tshitaku tshiadi." 
Exodus35:17 Benze bilamba bia ku lupangu, ne makunji alu, ne bitaku biawu; tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa lupangu;" 
Exodus35:18 milonda ya bitupa ya mu nzubu wa tshijila, ne ya ku lupangu, too ne mionji ya kuelaku." 
Exodus35:19 Benze bilamba bia lumu bia kuenza nabi mudimu muaba wa tshijila; bilamba bia tshijila bia mutuangaji munene Arone, ne bia bana bende ba balume." 
Exodus35:20 Bena Izrayele kushiyangana ne Moshe. 
Exodus35:21 Bantu ba muoyi muimpe kufila milambu yabu kudi Maweja-Nangila bua kuasa ntenta wa kusambakena, bua midimu ya kutendelela, ne bua kutela bilamba bia tshijila." 
Exodus35:22 Bantu bonsu ba muoyi muimpe balume ne bakaji, kufila bilengejilu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi bia mishindu mishilangane: tukanu tua pa bilamba, tua ku matshi, tua ku minu ne tua mu nshingu. Kadi muntu yonsu uvua wela bintu abi mulu, ubinyukule bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus35:23 Bantu bakuabu kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu mikuabu: bilamba bia miosa ya nyama bifikuluke, bikunzubile, bikunze kunzuu, bia ndanda muine ne bia miosa ya mbuji, biseba bia mikoku ya tshimpanga bilaba kakula, ne bikuabu bia nyama ya nkonga ya mu mayi." 
Exodus35:24 Bantu bakuabu kulambula Maweja-Nangila biamu: bitoke bia mushinga mukole ne bikunze. Badipu kulambula mitshi ya ndunga ivuabu mua kuenza nayi mudimu awu. 
Exodus35:25 Bakaji bonsu bavua bamanye mua kutela ku bianza, kulambulabu bilamba bitela bimpe bia mishindu mishilangane: bia ndanda, bia miosa ya nyama bifikuluke, bikunzubile, nansha bikunze kunzuu." 
Exodus35:26 Bakaji bakuabu batalame kulambulabu bilamba bia boya bua mbuji. 
Exodus35:27 Bamfumu ba meku kulambula mabue a mushinga mukole a onikse ne mabue makuabu a kuteka mu tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene, ne mu tshilamba tshiende tshia pa tshiadi." 
Exodus35:28 Kulambulabu kabidi bintu bia mupuya mukole, mafuta a kuela mu miendu, a kuela mu mutu, ne a kusambakaja ne manananshi a kuosha." 
Exodus35:29 Bena Izrayele bonsu balume ne bakaji ba muoyi muimpe, kulambulabu bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu uvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus35:30 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmusungule Beshalele, muana wa Uri, udi kabidi muikulu wa Ure, wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Exodus35:31 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi nende, bua ikale muntu wa lungenyi ne meji, mumanye mua kuenza midimu ya bianza mishilangane:" 
Exodus35:32 mmumanye mua kulongolola midimu, kusonga bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bia tshiamu tshikunze;" 
Exodus35:33 kusonga mabue a mushinga mukole, kuteka mu masosu; kusonga kabidi ne mitshi ya kuenza nayi midimu. Mu tshikosu, mmumanye mua kuenza midimu yonsu." 
Exodus35:34 Maweja-Nangila mmumupeshe kabidi yeye ne Okoliyabe, muana wa Akisamaka, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane, lungenyi lua kulongesha bakuabu midimu ayi." 
Exodus35:35 Mmubapeshe bipedi bia kusonga mabue a mushinga mukole, kuzola bilamba bia miosa ya nyama, bifikuluke, bikunzubile, bikunze kunzuu, ne bia ndanda. Bobu aba ke bamanyi ba kalanda-musenga ba midimu yonsu ya bianza." 
Exodus36:1 Beshalele ne Okoliyabe ne bantu bakuabu bavua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe tshipedi tshia kuenza midimu ya muaba wa tshijila, nebenze bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bu muvua dijinga dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Exodus36:2 Moshe kubikila Beshalele, Okoliyabe ne bantu bakuabu bavua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe tshipedi tshia kuenza midimu ayi kuyikumbaja." 
Exodus36:3 Kusangishabu bintu bionsu bivua bena Izrayele bafile kudi Moshe bua midimu ya mu muaba wa tshijila. Bena mudimu bonsu bamane kusangisha bintu bikumbane, bena Izrayele bavua anu bafika ne dinda dionsu bua kufila bintu bikuabu bu muvuabu basue." 
Exodus36:4 Nanku bena meji bavua benza midimu mishilangane muaba wa tshijila, kuanjibu kulekela midimu, kuyabu" 
Exodus36:5 kuambila Moshe ne: “Bantu mbafile bintu bipitshidile bungi butudi nabu dijinga bua kujikija midimu yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila mutufundile bua kuenza.” 
Exodus36:6 Nanku diakamue Moshe kutuma diyi bua kukandika bantu bonsu balume ne bakaji, bua kabafidi kabidi bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu to. Nanku bantu kulekela kufila," 
Exodus36:7 bualu bintu bivuabu bafile bivua bikumbane bua kujikija mudimu, bipite ne kupita kuine." 
Exodus36:8 Bena mudimu bavua bapite bakuabu ku lungenyi kutuadija kuasa nzubu wa tshijila. Kuangatabu bilamba dikumi bia buanda bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Ku bilamba abi, bavua bazolaku Bakerubine." 
Exodus36:9 Bilamba bionsu bivua ne metre dikumi ne inayi mu bule, metre ibidi mu butshiama." 
Exodus36:10 Bilamba abi, bivua bilamakaja bitanu luseke bitanu luseke lukuabu." 
Exodus36:11 Kuenzabu makopa ku tshilamba tshia ndekelu tshia tshisumbu tshia kumpala tshia bilamba. Kuenzabu makopa makuabu ku mibangu ya tshilamba tshia kumpala tshia tshisumbu tshibidi. 
Exodus36:12 Makopa awu, avua makumi atanu ku ndekelu kua tshisumbu tshionsu tshia bilamba. Avua kabidi makanangane." 
Exodus36:13 Pashishe kuenzabu nkanu makumi atanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bua kulamakaja bilamba abi bionsu, bua ntenta awu amueneke muenza bu wa tshilamba tshimue." 
Exodus36:14 Kutelabu bilamba bikuabu dikumi ne tshimue bia boya bua mbuji, bia kuenza nabi ntenta muibidi, bua kubuikila bimpe nzubu wa tshijila." 
Exodus36:15 Bilamba bionsu bivua anu momumue: mu bule metre dikumi ne atanu, mu butshiama metre abidi." 
Exodus36:16 Kulamakajabu bilamba abi, eku bitanu eku bisambombu." 
Exodus36:17 Kuenzabu makopa makumi atanu ku mibangu ya tshilamba tshia ndekelu tshia ku bilamba bitanu. Kuenzabu makopa makuabu makumi atanu, ku mibangu ya tshilamba tshia kumpala tshia tshisumbu tshibidi." 
Exodus36:18 Pashishe kuenzabu nkanu makumi atanu ya tshiamu tshikunze, bua kulamakaja bilamba abi, bua ntenta awu amueneke bu muenza ne tshilamba tshimue." 
Exodus36:19 Nanku bua kulama ntenta muibidi bimpe, kutentakajabu ntenta ibidi: ewu wa tshiseba tshia mukoku wa tshimpanga tshimane kulaba kakula, mukuabu wa tshiseba tshia nyama wa nkonga." 
Exodus36:20 Kupandabu mabaya a mitshi ya ndunga, kuimanyikabu nawu nzubu wa tshijila." 
Exodus36:21 Kadi dibaya dionsu divua ne metre atanu mu bule, ne santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu mu butshiama." 
Exodus36:22 Dibaya dionsu divua ne mpoku ibidi mitangilangane. 
Exodus36:23 Kuenzabu mabaya makumi abidi bua ku luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu wa tshijila. 
Exodus36:24 Mabaya avua ne bitaku makumi anayi bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu divua ne bitaku bibidi, biakanangane ne mpoku ibidi." 
Exodus36:25 Kuenzabu kabidi mabaya makumi abidi bua ku luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu wa tshijila. 
Exodus36:26 Mabaya aa avua kabidi ne bitaku makumi anayi bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu divua ne bitaku bibidi. 
Exodus36:27 Kuenzabu kabidi mabaya asambombu bua ku luseke lua kudi diba dibuelela lua nzubu wa tshijila. 
Exodus36:28 Pashishe kuenzabu mabaya makuabu abidi a pa buawu bua mu matumba adi ku mfundu kua nzubu wa tshijila. 
Exodus36:29 Mabaya abidi awu, avua mapanduluke kuinshi, masuikakaja ku mutu ne lukanu. Mabaya onsu abidi, bavua baenza mushindu umue bua kuenzawu matumba." 
Exodus36:30 Nanku ku mfundu kua nzubu wa tshijila kuvua mabaya muanda mukulu, menza ne bitaku dikumi ne bisambombu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Dibaya dionsu divua ne bitaku bibidi." 
Exodus36:31 Kuenzabu kabidi mitshi ya ndunga dikumi ne itanu, ya kutshiamakaja pa mabaya avua ku nzubu wa tshijila." 
Exodus36:32 Kutshiamakajabu mitshi itanu ku luseke lua balume, itanu ku luseke lua bakaji, ne mikuabu itanu ku mfundu kua nzubu wa tshijila luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Exodus36:33 Kadi mutshi uvua pankatshi pa mitshi mikuabu uvua mutshiamakane mutue eku ne eku mu nzubu mujima wa tshijila. 
Exodus36:34 Pashishe kulamikabu tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku mabaya onsu, ne ku mitshi yonsu. Kuenzabu nkanu ya bijengu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kubuejamu mitshi ayi." 
Exodus36:35 Kutelabu tshilamba tshia mushiku wa mbelu ne buanda bukole bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Ku tshilamba atshi bavua bazola Bakerubine." 
Exodus36:36 Kuenzabu makunji anayi a mitshi ya ndunga. Kulamikabu tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku makunji aku. Kulembelejabu tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu ku makunji aku ne misonsu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kuenzabu kabidi bitaku bia makunji binayi, bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Exodus36:37 Nanku batedi kutela tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa tshijila ne buanda bukole bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu." 
Exodus36:38 Pashishe kuenzabu makunji atanu bua kusuikabu tshilamba atshi. Kuasabu misonsu bua kulembelejaku tshilamba atshi. Kuenzabu mutu wa dikunji dionsu ne milonda ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne bitaku bitanu bia tshiamu tshikunze. 
Exodus37:1 Beshalele kuenza mushete wa ndondu wa mitshi ya ndunga. Mushete awu uvua ne bule bua metre umue ne santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu, butshiama bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu, butumbuke bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu kabidi." 
Exodus37:2 Kulamikaye tshiamu tshia mpawungi munda mua mushete awu, panyima pawu ne ku mibangu." 
Exodus37:3 Kuenzaye nkanu inayi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kusuika ku mikolu inayi ya mushete awu, ibidi ku luseke ibidi ku lukuabu." 
Exodus37:4 Kusongaye mabaya abidi a mitshi ya ndunga, kualamikaye tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku nseke yonsu." 
Exodus37:5 Kubuejaye mitshi ayi ku nkanu ivua ku luseke lua mushete bua kuwambuilaku. 
Exodus37:6 Kuenzaye kabidi tshibuikidiji tshia mushete awu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Tshibuikidiji atshi, tshivua ne bule bua metre umue ne santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu, ne butshiama bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus37:7 Pa tshibuikidiji apu, uvua muenzepu Bakerubine babidi ba tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bavua ku ndekelu kua tshibuikidiji atshi nseke yonsu ibidi." 
Exodus37:8 Bakerubine abu bavua balamakane ne tshibuikidiji, ewu ku ditengu mukuabu ku ditengu." 
Exodus37:9 Bakerubine abu bavua batangilangane, binangila pa tshibuikidiji, bolola mapuapua mulu, bua kubuikila tshibuikidiji tshia mushete atshi." 
Exodus37:10 Beshalele kuenzaye kabidi mesa a mutshi wa ndunga. Mesa awu avua ne bule bua metre umue, butshiama bua santimetre makumi atanu, butumbuke bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
Exodus37:11 Mesa avua malamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi mubidi mujima too ne ku mibangu. 
Exodus37:12 Ku nseke yonsu inayi ya mesa awu, kuvua mabaya malamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi avua ne santimetre muanda mukulu mu butshiama." 
Exodus37:13 Kuenzaye nkanu inayi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kulamikaye nkanu ayi ku matumba onsu anayi a mikolu inayi ya mesa. 
Exodus37:14 Nkanu ayi, ivua misuika ku mabaya. Mu nkanu ayi bavua babueja mitshi bua kuambula mesa." 
Exodus37:15 Beshalele kuenza kabidi mitshi ya ndunga ibidi. Kuyilamikaye tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kuambuilaku mesa. 
Exodus37:16 Kuenzaye bintu bia kuteka pa mesa: malongu masalame, makopu, malongu mondoke, ne milangi ya kulambula milambu ya maluvu. Bintu bionsu abi bivua anu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene." 
Exodus37:17 Beshalele kuenza kabidi tshitekelu tshia miendu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Tshitekelu tshia muendu atshi tshivua tshilamakane ne matamba atshi, tulongu tukese, mapu ne bilongu." 
Exodus37:18 Tshivua ne matamba asambombu, asatu ku luseke, asatu ku luseke lukuabu." 
Exodus37:19 Ku ditamba dionsu kuvua tulongu tukese tusatu, tuikale ne mapu ne bilongu bu mudi mutshi wa amande." 
Exodus37:20 Ku tshitekelu tshia muendu aku kuenzaye kabidi tulongu tukese tunayi, tuikale ne mapu ne bilongu bu mudi mutshi wa amande." 
Exodus37:21 Matamba asambombu adi malamakaja abidi abidi ku tshitekelu, mikale ne dipu muinshi muawu." 
Exodus37:22 Kadi matamba onsu ne mapu, bivua anu bilamakane, kabidi bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi." 
Exodus37:23 Kuenzaye kabidi miendu muanda mutekete. Kuenzaye bintu bia kukuata nabi mudimu ku miendu: nkala ne bintu bia kuela butu. Bionsu bivua anu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. 
Exodus37:24 Bintu bionsu bivua ku tshitekelu tshia muendu, bivua bienza ne kilo makumi asatu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene." 
Exodus37:25 Pashishe Beshalele kuenza tshilambuilu tshia mutshi wa ndunga, bua kuoshilapu milambu ya manananshi a tshijila. Tshilambuilu atshi, tshivua ne santimetre makumi atanu mu nseke yatshi yonsu. Butumbuke buvua ne metre umue. Kadi mu matumba onsu, muvua nsengu milamakane ne tshilambuilu atshi." 
Exodus37:26 Tshilambuilu tshionsu, tshivua tshilamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi too ne ku nsengu ivua ku matamba anayi. Kabidi tshivua tshinyungulula ne mukaba wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus37:27 Kuenzaye nkanu ya bijengu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ya kusuika ku luseke ne ku luseke, muinshi mua mukaba uvua ku tshilambuilu. Nkanu ayi ivua ya kubueja mutshi bua kuambula tshilambuilu." 
Exodus37:28 Kuenzaye mitshi yandunga ibidi, kuyilamikaye tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus37:29 Pashishe muenji wa manananshi kuenza mafuta a tshijila a kujidila nawu bantu ne bintu. Kuenzaye kabidi ne manananshi a tshijila a kuosha pa tshilambuilu. 
Exodus38:1 Bua kulambula milambu, kuenzabu tshilambuilu tshia mitshi ya ndunga. Tshilambuilu atshi tshivua ne metre abidi ne desimetre itanu nseke yatshi yonsu. Butumbuke buvua metre umue ne desimetre itanu." 
Exodus38:2 Kadi matumba onsu anayi avua majuke kulu bu nsengu, milamakane pamue ne tshilambuilu. Kabidi tshilambuilu tshijima tshivua tshilamika tshiamu tshikunze." 
Exodus38:3 Kuenzabu kabidi bintu bia mu tshilambuilu amu ne tshiamu tshikunze: bia kuboya natshi butu, bikasu, malongu a kumiamina nawu, mbabula ne nkala bua kusabula munyinyi." 
Exodus38:4 Kulukabu kakanu ka tshiamu tshikunze kafuanangane ne munyingu. Kutekabu kakanu aku pankatshi pa tshilambuilu luseke lua kuinshi. 
Exodus38:5 Kuenzabu nkanu inayi ya bijengu ya kuteka mu matumba anayi a munyingu wa tshiamu tshikunze awu, bua kuelamu mabaya." 
Exodus38:6 Kuenzabu kabidi mabaya abidi a mutshi wa ndunga. Kualamikabu tshiamu tshikunze. 
Exodus38:7 Kubuejabu mabaya awu mu nkanu ya bijengu ivua ku luseke lua tshilambuilu, bua kutshiambuilaku. Kadi tshilambuilu tshia mabaya etshi, katshi vua ne tshintu munda to." 
Exodus38:8 Bavua benza dilongu dinene. Dilongu adi ne tshitaku tshiadi, bivua anu bia tshiamu tshikunze, tshivua tshifuma ku mienu ya tshiamu tshikunze ya kudi bakaji bavua benza mudimu ku tshibuelelu tshia ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Exodus38:9 Kuenzabu lupangu luvua lunyungulula nzubu wa tshijila. Bavua babienza ne bilamba bia buanda bukole bua ndanda. Luseke lua kuinshi, luvua ne metre makumi atanu." 
Exodus38:10 Bilamba abi bavua babilembeleja ne nkanu ne milonda ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ku makunji makumi abidi a tshiamu tshikunze. Makunji awu avua ne bitaku makumi abidi bia tshiamu tshikunze. 
Exodus38:11 Luseke lua ku mutu, lupangu luvua anu bule bumue. Bavua balembeleja bilamba amu mushindu awu." 
Exodus38:12 Kadi mu butshiama luseke ludi diba dibuelela, lupangu luvua ne metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu bule. Bavua balembeleja bilamba ku makunji dikumi, mikale ne bitaku dikumi." 
Exodus38:13 Pashishe mu mushiku wa mbelu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, lupangu luvua kabidi ne metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu butshiama." 
Exodus38:14 Mu mushiku wa mbelu ku luseke ne ku luseke kuvua bilamba mutantshi wa metre muanda mutekete ne tshitupa. 
Exodus38:15 Kuvua kabidi makunji asatu, ne bitaku bisatu." 
Exodus38:16 Bilamba bionsu bivua binyungulula lupangu, bivua bia buanda bukole bua ndanda." 
Exodus38:17 Bitaku bia makunji awu, bivua bia tshiamu tshikunze. Nkanu ne milonda bivua bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Mitu ya makunji, ivua milamika tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Makunji onsu avua masuikakaja ne milonda ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Exodus38:18 Tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa lupangu, tshivua tshitela bimpe kudi batedi ne buanda bukole bua ndanda busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu. Tshilamba atshi, tshi vua ne metre dikumi mu bule, ne metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butumbuke, amu bu bilamba bia lupangu." 
Exodus38:19 Bavua batshisuika ku makunji anayi. Makunji awu avua ne bitaku binayi bia tshiamu tshikunze. Nkanu, mitu ya makunji ne milonda, bivua bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Exodus38:20 Milonda ya bitupa yonsu, ivua ku nzubu wa tshijila ne ku lupangu, ivua ya tshiamu tshikunze."
