Exodus38:21 Pashishe Moshe kutumina bena Izrayele diyi, bua babale bintu bionsu bivuabu benza nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa tshijila. Muaba awu, ke uvuabu bateka mushete wa ndondu uvua ne mabue a mikenji. Itamare, muana wa mutuangaji Arone, ke uvua ulombola bena Levi bavua babala bintu ebi." 
Exodus38:22 Beshalele, muana wa Uri, uvua kabidi muikulu wa Ure, wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, kuenza mudimu wonsu uvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus38:23 Bavua bamuambuluisha kudi Okoliyabe, muana wa Akisamaka, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane, uvua mumanye midimu mishilangane: ya kusonga mabue, ya kuzola, ya kulengeja bilamba bia miosa ya nyama bifikuluke, bikunzubile, bikunze kunzuu, kabidi ya kutela bilamba bia ndanda." 
Exodus38:24 Biamu bia mpawungi bionsu bivua bena Izrayele balambule bua kuasa muaba wa tshijila, bivua kilo 877 ne grame 300, bilondeshile tshipimu tshivuabu natshi muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus38:25 Biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole bivua bena Izrayele bavuabu babadike balambule, bivua kilo 3.017 ne grame 750, bilondeshile tshipimu tshivuabu natshi muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus38:26 Nanku bantu balume bonsu 603.550 bavuabu babadike, bikale ne bidimu bituadijile ku makumi abidi too ne pa mutu, bavua balambule grame itanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ku muntu ku muntu." 
Exodus38:27 Bavua bengulule kilo 3.000 ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bua kuenza bitaku lukama bia makunji a ku muaba wa tshijila, ne bia ku tshilamba tshivua tshilembeleja pankatshi pa muaba wa tshijila ne muaba wa tshijila menemene. Tshitaku tshionsu tshivua ne kilo 30." 
Exodus38:28 Kadi kilo 17 ne grame 750 ivua mishale, kuenzabu nayi nkanu ya ku makunji, mitu ya makunji ne milonda ya kulamakaja nayi makunji awu." 
Exodus38:29 Biamu bikunze bivua bena Izrayele balambule bivua kilo 2.124. 
Exodus38:30 Biamu abi bavua benza nabi bitaku bia makunji a mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Kuenzabu nabi kabidi tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, kakanu katshi ka munyingu ne bintu bionsu bia ku tshilambuilu." 
Exodus38:31 Bavua benza nabi kabidi bitaku bia makunji a ku lupangu ne a ku tshibuelelu tshia lupangu, kabidi ne milonda ya bitupa ya ku nzubu wa tshijila ne ya ku lupangu." 
Exodus39:1 Batedi ba bilamba kutela bilamba bia lumu bia kuenza nabi mudimu muaba wa tshijila. Kutelelabu kabidi Arone bilamba bia kuenza nabi mudimu wa butuangaji, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:2 Kadi tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene, tshivua tshitela ne buanda bukole bua ndanda, busambakaja ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile, bukunze kunzuu, kabidi ne buanda buenza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus39:3 Kuengululabu tshiamu tshia mpawungi, kuenzabu natshi bitata. Kukosololabu bitata abi mu bitupa bikese bua kupeta buanda. Batedi kubusambakaja ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu, kabidi ne bua ndanda." 
Exodus39:4 Mutuangaji uvua muvuale efode ne mampinda abidi masuika ku ndekelu kua tshilamba atshi. 
Exodus39:5 Kutelabu kabidi tukaba tua kusuika tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene. Tukaba atu tuvua tutela ne buanda bua mushindu umue, tulamakane ne tshilamba atshi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:6 Kusongabu mabue abidi a onikse, a kubueja mu masosu a tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kufundabu pa mabue apu mena a bana ba Yakobe bu tshitampi." 
Exodus39:7 Pashishe, kutekabu mabue awu pa mutu pa mampinda abidi avua ku tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene, bua Maweja-Nangila ikale uvuluka bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele, bu muvuaye muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:8 Batedi ba bilamba, kutela tshilamba tshia kuvuala pa tshiadi. Tshilamba etshi, bavua batshitela ne buanda bukole bua ndanda, busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu, kabidi ne buanda bua tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bu muvua efode." 
Exodus39:9 Tshilamba atshi tshivua tshibombu tshia santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu nseke yonsu. 
Exodus39:10 Pa tshilamba atshi, bavua bateka milongu ya mabue a mushinga mukole inayi: mulongu wa kumpala uvua ne dibue dia rubise, dia topaze ne dia emerode." 
Exodus39:11 Mulongu muibidi uvua ne dibue dia grenate, dia safire ne dia mbongu." 
Exodus39:12 Mulongu muisatu uvua ne dibue dia yasinte, dia agate ne dia ametiste." 
Exodus39:13 Mulongu muinayi uvua ne dibue dia krisolite, dia onikse ne dia yaspe. Kubuejabu dibue dionsu mu disosu dia tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Exodus39:14 Mabue awu, avua dikumi ne abidi, bungi bua bisamba bia bena Izrayele. Dina dia tshisamba tshionsu bavua badifunda pa dibue bu tshitampi." 
Exodus39:15 Bua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, kuenzabu tukanu tubidi tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, tuluka bu mionji." 
Exodus39:16 Kuenzabu masosu abidi a tshiamu tshia mpawungi, kabidi nkanu ya bijengu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kusuikabu nkanu ayi ku mutu kua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi ku luseke ne ku luseke." 
Exodus39:17 Kusuikabu kakanu konsu ku lukanu lua tshijengu lua ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi. 
Exodus39:18 Kusuikakajabu nsongu yayi ibidi, ku masosu abidi a tshiamu tshia mpawungi avua ku mampinda a tshilamba tshia efode. Nanku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi tshivua pa mutu pa tshia efode." 
Exodus39:19 Kuenzabu nkanu mikuabu ya bijengu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kuyisuikabu kuinshi kua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi ku luseke ne ku luseke, bituangane ne tshilamba tshia efode tshia mutuangaji munene." 
Exodus39:20 Kuenzabu nkanu mikuabu ya bijengu ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kuyisuikabu kuinshi kua mampinda a tshilamba tshia efode pa mutu pawu. Nanku bavua bateka nkanu ya bijengu ayi pa mutu pa tukaba tuvua tulamakaja ku tshilamba tshia efode. 
Exodus39:21 Kusuikakajabu nkanu ya bijengu ivua ku tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, ne ivua ku tshilamba tshia efode ne monji mufikuluke. Tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi kushalatshi pa mutu pa tukaba tuvua ku tshilamba tshia efode, bua tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi katshilamuku ku tshia efode, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:22 Muntumpu uvua Arone muvuale bavua bautela amu ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke. 
Exodus39:23 Kadi muntumpu awu uvua ne nshingu mutela bikole, bua kapandiki to." 
Exodus39:24 Kuinshi kuonsu kua muntumpu awu, bavua bazola bimuma bia grenade ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu, kabidi ne buanda bukole bua ndanda." 
Exodus39:25 Kuinshi kuonsu aku, kuvua kulembeleja kabidi ndibu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, pankatshi pa bimuma bia grenade." 
Exodus39:26 Nanku misangu yonsu kuinshi kua muntumpu kuvua tshimuma tshia grenade ne ludibu bishintulukangana, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:27 Kutelelabu kabidi Arone ne bana bende ba balume bilamba bia muinshi bia ndanda," 
Exodus39:28 bifulu, mikaba ya kusuika ku bifulu, ne tuputula tua muinshi. Bionsu bivua anu bia buanda." 
Exodus39:29 Kubatekabu kabidi mikaba milengeja ne buanda bukole bua ndanda, busambakaja ne bua miosa ya nyama bufikuluke, bukunzubile ne bukunze kunzuu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:30 Pashishe kuenzabu tshitata tshia tshijila tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, tshifuanangane ne tshilongu. Kufundabu pa tshitata atshi ne: “Wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila,” amu bu bitua tshitampi." 
Exodus39:31 Kusuikabu tshitata atshi kumutu kua tshifulu ne mukaba mukunzubile kulu kuatshi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus39:32 Bena mudimu kujikija mudimu onsu wa ntenta wa kusambakena ne wa nzubu wa tshijila. Bavua benza midimu ayi menemene anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. 
Exodus39:33 Bena Izrayele kuleja Moshe bintu bionsu bivuabu benza bua nzubu wa tshijila: — ntenta wa kusambakena ne bintu bionsu bivuaku: nkanu, mabaya, mitshi, makunji ne bitaku biawu;" 
Exodus39:34 — bilamba bia kubuikila pa mutu pa ntenta bia biseba bia mikoku ya bimpanga bilaba kakula, bia biseba bia nyama wa nkonga wa mu mayi, kabidi ne tshilamba tshia kulembeleja pankatshi pa muaba wa tshijila ne muaba wa tshijila menemene;" 
Exodus39:35 — mushete wa ndondu udi ne mabue a mikenji, pamue ne mitshi yawu, ne tshibuikidiji tshiawu;" 
Exodus39:36 — mesa a tshijila ne bintu bionsu bivuaku, too ne mampa malambula Mvidi Mukulu;" 
Exodus39:37 — tshitekelu tshia miendu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, miendu yonsu, ne bintu bikuabu bivuaku, too ne mafuta a kutemesha nawu miendu;" 
Exodus39:38 — tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mafuta a kulaba nawu, manananshi a kuosha; — tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta;" 
Exodus39:39 — tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, munyingu watshi wa tshiamu tshikunze, mitshi yatshi ne bintu bionsu bivuaku; — dilongu dinene dia kuowa mayi, ne tshitaku tshiadi;" 
Exodus39:40 — bilamba bia ku lupangu, makunji abi ne bitaku biawu, kabidi ne tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa mbelu wa lupangu, mionji ne milonda ya bitupa yatshi; — bintu bionsu bivuabu ne bua kuenza nabi mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena, kabidi ne mu nzubu wa tshijila;" 
Exodus39:41 — bilamba bia lumu bia kuvuala diba dia mudimu wa mu muaba wa tshijila; — bilamba bia tshijila bivua Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne bua kuvuala bua kuenza mudimu wa butuangaji. 
Exodus39:42 Bena Izrayele bavua benza midimu ayi anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. 
Exodus39:43 Moshe kubandila mudimu uvua bena Izrayele benza. Kumonaye ne bavua bawenze anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Nanku, kubelaye lupemba." 
Exodus40:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Exodus40:2 — Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa kumpala, wimanyike ntenta wa kusambakena, ne nzubu wa tshijila." 
Exodus40:3 Batekemu mushete wa ndondu, baujika ne tshilamba tshilembeleja, bua kabaumonu kudi bantu to." 
Exodus40:4 Mu ntenta amu, utekemu mesa a tshijila, mikale ne mampa a kundambula meme Mvidi Mukulu. Utekemu kabidi tshitekelu tshia miendu. Utemeshe miendu ayi." 
Exodus40:5 Bateke tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kuosha manananshi. Utshiteke kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu. Ulembeleje tshilamba mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa tshijila. 
Exodus40:6 Uteke tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha kumpala kua mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Exodus40:7 Pankatshi pa ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshilambuilu bateke dilongu dinene dia kuowa mayi, dikale ne mayi tente." 
Exodus40:8 Pashishe usuike bilamba bia kunyungulula nabi lupangu, ulembeleje tshilamba ku tshibuelelu tshia lupangu." 
Exodus40:9 “Wangate mafuta, ulabe ku ntenta wa kusambakena, ne ku bionsu bidiku bua kubadila. Mpindiewu neashale muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus40:10 Ulabe kabidi mafuta awu ku tshilambuilu tshia milambu, ne ku bionsu bidiku. Utshijidile, bua tshishale tshia tshijila." 
Exodus40:11 Ulabe mafuta awu kabidi ku dilongu dinene ne ku tshitaku tshiadi bua kubindila. 
Exodus40:12 Pashishe, Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bimane mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena, bua uboweshe mayi a tshijila." 
Exodus40:13 Uvuadike Arone bilamba biende bia tshijila. Umulabe mafuta, umujidile bua angenzele mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Exodus40:14 Pashishe, ubikile kabidi bana ba Arone ba balume, ubavuadike mintumpu yabu." 
Exodus40:15 Bana ba Arone abu, ubalabe mafuta mushindu uuvua mulabe tatuabu, ubajidile bua bangenzele mudimu wa butuangaji. Mafuta awu, ke adi ajadika ne: badi batuangaji kashidi, bobu ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu.”" 
Exodus40:16 Moshe kuitaba diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, kukumbaja bionsu bivuaye mumuambile:" 
Exodus40:17 Bena Izrayele bamane kupatuka mu Ejipitu tshidimu tshijima, tshidimu tshibidi, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa kumpala, Moshe kuimanyika muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus40:18 Kuimanyikaye makunji mu bitaku biawu. Kutekaye kabidi mabaya ne mitshi. 
Exodus40:19 Kuvungululaye ntenta pa mutu pa muaba wa tshijila. Pashishe, kubuikilaye mukuabu pa mutu pende, bua kumulama bimpe, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus40:20 Moshe kuteka mabue a mikenji dikumi mu mushete wa ndondu. Kubuejaye mitshi ku mushete, kumubuikilaye tshibuikidiji." 
Exodus40:21 Moshe kuteka mushete awu muaba wa tshijila. Kulembeleja tshilamba pankatshi pa muaba wa tshijila ne muaba wa tshijila menemene, bua kujika mushete, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus40:22 Kutekaye mesa a tshijila mu ntenta luseke lua ku mutu, kumpala kua tshilamba tshivua tshilembeleja." 
Exodus40:23 Moshe kuteka mampa a kulambula pa mesa apu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus40:24 Kutekaye tshitekelu tshia miendu mu ntenta amu, luseke lua kuinshi, bitangilangane ne mesa." 
Exodus40:25 Pashishe Moshe kutemesha miendu ayi muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus40:26 Kutekaye tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi mu ntenta amu. Tshilambuilu atshi tshivua kumpala kua tshilamba tshilembeleja. 
Exodus40:27 Moshe kuosha manananshi a tshijila pa tshilambuilu apu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Exodus40:28 Kulembelejaye tshilamba mu mushiku wa mbelu wa muaba wa tshijila. 
Exodus40:29 Kutekaye tshilambuilu pabuipi ne mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta, bua kulambuilapu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bintu bia mu madimi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mmuambile." 
Exodus40:30 Moshe kuteka dilongu dinene, ne mayi tente, pankatshi pa ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshilambuilu." 
Exodus40:31 Mayi awu, ke avuabu bowa ku bianza ne ku makasa kudi Moshe, kudi Arone ne kudi bana bende ba balume." 
Exodus40:32 Misangu yonsu ivuabu babuele mu ntenta wa kusambakena, nansha bafike pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, bavua bowa mayi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Exodus40:33 Pashishe Moshe kuasa lupangu luvua lunyungulula ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshilambuilu. Kulembelejaye tshilamba mu mushiku wa mbelu wa lupangu alu. Mudimu uvua Moshe muenze kujikawu. 
Exodus40:34 Diba adi divuba divua dibuikila ntenta wa kusambakena. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kuwulabu muaba wa tshijila. 
Exodus40:35 Moshe kavua kabidi ne mushindu wa kubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena to. 
Exodus40:36 Bena Izrayele, bavua babanga luendu amu pavua divuba diumuka pa mutu pa muaba wa tshijila." 
Exodus40:37 Kadi, pavuadi kadiyi diumuka muaba wa tshijila, bena Izrayele kabavua baye to. Bavua anu bindile too ne dituku didi divuba dijuka." 
Exodus40:38 Nanku, mu munya, Maweja-Nangila uvua umuenekela bena Izrayele mu divuba divua dibuikila muaba wa tshijila. Butuku, uvua ubamuenekela mu kapia kavua kakenka muaba awu. Ke muvua luendu lujima lua bena Izrayele nanku." 
Leviticus1:1 Pavua Maweja-Nangila mu ntenta wa kusambakena, kubikilaye Moshe, kumuambila bua" 
Leviticus1:2 amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa nyama, asungule ngombe, mukoku nansha mbuji." 
Leviticus1:3 “Padiye ulambula ngombe bu mulambu wa kuosha, ngombe awu ikale anu mulume, kayi bulema. Aye nende mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena bua kulomba luse kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus1:4 Ateke tshianza pa mutu pa ngombe awu, bua Maweja-Nangila anyishe mulambu, afuile muntu awu luse." 
Leviticus1:5 Akose ngombe awu muminu kumpala kua ntenta. Batuangaji, bana ba Arone, baye ne mashi a ngombe awu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Baamiamine ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu tshidi ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta." 
Leviticus1:6 Muntu asaye ngombe awu, akosolole munyinyi." 
Leviticus1:7 Batuangaji bateke nkunyi pa tshilambuilu, batemeshe kapia." 
Leviticus1:8 Batekepu mabulu a munyinyi, mutu ne mafuta a nyama." 
Leviticus1:9 Kadi, bia munda bionsu, ne bikonu bia ngombe, babisukule mu mayi. Pashishe mutuangaji abioshe pamue ne munyinyi onsu udi pa tshilambuilu, bua dipembu dimpe dia mulambu wa kuosha disankishe Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus1:10 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula mbuji nansha mukoku bu mulambu wa kuosha, asungule anu mukoku wa tshimpanga, nansha mbuji wa mpumbu udi kayi bulema." 
Leviticus1:11 Amukose muminu kumpala kua ntenta, luseke lua ku mutu kua tshilambuilu. Batuangaji bamiamine mashi awu ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus1:12 Pashishe, muena Izrayele awu umushe mutu ne mafuta, akosolole munyinyi. Mutuangaji ateke bintu bionsu abi pa nkunyi ya kapia idi pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus1:13 Bia munda ne bikonu babisukule mu mayi. Mutuangaji abiele mulu, abinyukule, abioshile bionsu Maweja-Nangila pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa kuosha, udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus1:14 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila nyunyi bu mulambu wa kuosha, asungule kamanda-nkutshi nansha nkudimba." 
Leviticus1:15 Mutuangaji aye ne nyunyi awu kumpala kua tshilambuilu. Amukose mutu, awoshe pa tshilambuilu. Pashishe, ele mashi ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus1:16 Umushe dibodi dia nyunyi ne bintu bionsu bidimu. Abimanshe muaba udibu bimansha butu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus1:17 Mutuangaji apande nyunyi awu mu tshiadi amutanyinyike. Oshe munyinyi onsu pa nkunyi ya kapia idi pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:1 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi, angate bukula, elepu mafuta, atentekepu ne musenga wa kamonya." 
Leviticus2:2 Aye nabi kudi batuangaji, bana ba Arone. Mutuangaji ambule dianza dia bukula budi ne mafuta, ambule kabidi musenga wa kamonya onsu. Abioshe bionsu pa tshilambuilu. Bualu bidi mulambu wa tshivulukilu, udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:3 Bukula bua mulambu budi bushale babuangate anu kudi Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bualu ntshitupa tshia tshijila menemene, tshia ku mulambu uvuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:4 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa bintu biosha muiku, wikale amu wa mikata misopakaja ne mafuta, nansha wa tuampa tukese tulaba mafuta, kabiyi biela buanga bua mampa to." 
Leviticus2:5 “Kadi padiye ulambula mulambu wa diampa dikanga pa dilata, diampa adi dikale dienza ne bukula busopakaja ne mafuta, kabuyi buela buanga bua mampa to." 
Leviticus2:6 Diampa adi badikose mu bitupa, bela kabidi mafuta pa bitupa abi, bualu mmulambu wa bintu bia mu budimi." 
Leviticus2:7 “Kadi pikala mulambu awu wa bintu bilamba mu luesu, udi ne bua kuikala bukula busambakaja ne mafuta." 
Leviticus2:8 “Baye nawu muaba wa tshijila, baufile kudi mutuangaji bua yeye aye nawu ku tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus2:9 Ambule dianza dia bukula, aboshe pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa tshivulukilu wa kuosha udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:10 Bukula bua ku mulambu budi bushale, babuangate anu kudi Arone ne bana bende ba balume. Bualu ntshitupa tshia tshijila menemene, bualu ntshia ku mulambu uvuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:11 “Kadi, kanuena mua kuela buanga bua mampa mu mulambu nansha umue unudi nulambula Maweja-Nangila to. Panudi nulongolola mulambu wa kuoshila Maweja-Nangila, kashidi kenu kanuena mua kuelamu buitshi, nansha buanga bua mampa to." 
Leviticus2:12 Kadi panudi nulambula Maweja-Nangila bintu bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu, nudi mua kuelamu buanga bua mampa ne buitshi, kanuyi nubiosha pa tshilambuilu, bu munudi nuenza ne mulambu udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus2:13 “Nudi mua kuela luepu mu milambu yonsu ya bintu bia pa madimi. Bualu luepu ntshimanyinu tshia ndondu udi pankatshi penu ne Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku nuikale nuela luepu mu milambu yonsu. 
Leviticus2:14 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila bintu bia tshianyi bia mu budimi buende, abikange, abitue mu tshinu, bangabanga ne kubilambula." 
Leviticus2:15 Elemu mafuta, atekepu ne musenga wa kamonya, bualu mmulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi." 
Leviticus2:16 Mutuangaji ambule dianza dia bukula budi ne mafuta, ambule kabidi musenga wa kamonya onsu, abioshe pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa tshivulukilu udi moshile Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus3:1 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula ngombe bu mulambu wa bobumue, ngombe awu ikale mulume nansha mukaji, kayi bulema. Aye nende muaba wa tshijila," 
Leviticus3:2 ateke tshianza pa mutu pa ngombe awu, amukosele muminu mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Batuangaji, bana ba Arone, bamiamine mashi a ngombe awu ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus3:3 Pashishe, batuangaji balambule Maweja-Nangila bintu ebi: mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda," 
Leviticus3:4 tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamataku, mafuta adi malamate ku mulemba, lutandatanda ludi ku mutshima ludibu balamuna pamue ne tuonyi." 
Leviticus3:5 Batuangaji boshe munyinyi onsu ewu pa tshilambuilu, pamue ne mulambu wa kuosha, bualu udi mulambu wa dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus3:6 “Kadi padi muena Izrayele ulambula Maweja-Nangila mbuji nansha mukoku bu mulambu wa bobumue, tshimuna atshi tshikale tshilume nansha tshikaji, katshiyi bulema." 
Leviticus3:7 Padiye ulambula mukoku, aye nawu muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus3:8 Ateke tshianza pa mutu pa mukoku awu. Aukose muminu kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena. Batuangaji bamiamine mashi a mukoku awu ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus3:9 Pashishe, mutuangaji ele bintu ebi mulu, abinyukule bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila: ke mukila mujima mulamuina ku makunku, mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda," 
Leviticus3:10 tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamate ku mulemba, ne lutandatanda ludi ku mutshima, ludibu balamuna pamue ne tuonyi." 
Leviticus3:11 Mutuangaji oshe bintu bionsu abi pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu udibu boshila Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus3:12 “Padi muena Izrayele ulambula mbuji, aye nende muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus3:13 Ateke tshianza pa mutu wa mbuji awu, amukosele muminu kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena. Batuangaji bamiamine mashi a mbuji awu ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus3:14 Pashishe mutuangaji ele bintu bionsu ebi mulu, abinyukule bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila: ke mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda," 
Leviticus3:15 tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamateku, mafuta adi malamate ku mulemba, ne lutandatanda ludi ku mutshima, ludibu balamuna pamue ne tuonyi." 
Leviticus3:16 Mutuangaji oshe bintu bionsu abi pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa dipembu dimpe moshila Maweja-Nangila. “Mafuta onsu ikale a Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus3:17 Nanku nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, miaba yonsu inudi nusomba, kashidi ne kashidi kanudi mashi nansha mafuta to. Nulame mukenji ewu kashidi.”" 
Leviticus4:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus4:2 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: “Padi muntu muenze bualu bubi mu mpukapuka, kayi mulonde mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, numukobolole nunku:" 
Leviticus4:3 “Padi mutuangaji munene muenze bualu bubi, budi butampakena bena Izrayele bonsu, udi ne bua kudikobolola. Alambule Maweja-Nangila ngombe mulume, udi kayi ne bulema, bua Maweja-Nangila amufuile luse." 
Leviticus4:4 Aye ne ngombe awu muaba wa tshijila, mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Amuteke tshianza pa mutu, amukosele muminu muaba awu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus4:5 Angata mashi makese a ngombe awu, abuele nawu mu ntenta." 
Leviticus4:6 Atue munu mu mashi awu, amiamine mashi misangu muanda mutekete ku luseke ludi lumueneka lua tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja muaba wa tshijila udi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus4:7 Alabe kabidi mashi awu ku matumba adi matalame ku tshilambuilu tshia kuoshila manananshi, tshidi muaba wa tshijila. Pashishe mashi onsu adi ashala, mutuangaji ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha tshidi ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta." 
Leviticus4:8 Mutuangaji alamune mafuta onsu a ngombe awu: bu mudi mafuta adi malamate ku bia munda," 
Leviticus4:9 tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamateku, mafuta adi malamate ku mulemba, ne lutandatanda ludi ku mutshima, ludibu balamuna pamue ne tuonyi." 
Leviticus4:10 — Munyinyi wa mafuta onsu awu, ke udi mutuangaji umusha kabidi padiye ulambula milambu ya bobumue. — Mutuangaji munene oshe munyinyi onsu ewu pa tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha." 
Leviticus4:11 Pashishe bintu bionsu bia ngombe bidi bishale, bu tshiseba, munyinyi, mutu, bikonu, bia munda ne bunyawu bonsu budimu," 
Leviticus4:12 mutuangaji umuke nabi ku mitanda, aye kubioshila pa nkunyi ya kapia, muaba musunguluke udibu bimansha butu bua ku tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus4:13 “Padi bena Izrayele bonsu benza bualu bubi mu mpukapuka, budi bubengangana ne mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, badi amu bena tshibawu, nansha bobu kabayi bamanye tshilema tshidibu benza." 
Leviticus4:14 Diakamue padibu bamanye bualu bubi buvuabu benza abu, badi ne bua kudikobolola, balambula Maweja-Nangila ngombe mulume, bua Maweja-Nangila abafuile luse. Badi baya nende kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus4:15 Balombodi ba bena Izrayele bateke bianza pa mutu wa ngombe awu. Mulombodi umue amukosele muminu pa muaba awu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. 
Leviticus4:16 Mutuangaji munene angate mashi makese, abuele nawu mu ntenta." 
Leviticus4:17 Atue munu mu mashi awu, aamiamine misangu muanda mutekete ku luseke ludi lumueneka lua tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja muaba wa tshijila udi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus4:18 Alabe kabidi mashi awu ku matumba adi matalame ku tshilambuilu tshia kuoshila manananshi tshidi muaba wa tshijila. Pashishe mashi onsu adi mashale, mutuangaji ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha, tshidi ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta." 
Leviticus4:19 Kadi mutuangaji umushe mafuta onsu a ngombe awu, awoshe pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus4:20 Alambule Maweja-Nangila mulambu awu, anu mushindu uvuaye ulambula ngombe mulume bua kudikobolola. Nanku mutuangaji akobolole bena Izrayele anu mushindu ewu, bua Mvidi Mukulu abafuile luse." 
Leviticus4:21 Pashishe bintu bionsu bidi bishale, mutuangaji umuke nabi mu mitanda, aye kubiosha bu mudibu bosha bintu bidi bishale bia ngombe mulume, padibu bakobolola mutuangaji munene. Mulambu ewu mbua kukobolola nawu bena Izrayele, bua Mvidi Mukulu abafuile luse." 
Leviticus4:22 “Padi mfumu wa bena Izrayele muenze bualu bubi mu mpukapuka budi bubengangana ne mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, udi muena tshibawu." 
Leviticus4:23 Padiye umanya bualu bubi buvuaye muenze abu, adikobolole, alambule Maweja-Nangila mbuji wa mpumbu udi kayi bulema." 
Leviticus4:24 Ateke tshianza pa mutu wa mbuji awu, amukosele muminu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, muaba udibu bashipela nyama ya milambu ya kuosha. Mulambu awu mbua kukobolola mfumu wa bena Izrayele bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus4:25 Mutuangaji atue munu mu mashi awu, aalabe ku matumba matalame adi ku tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha. Pashishe mashi adi mashale, ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu atshi." 
Leviticus4:26 Munyinyi wa mafuta onsu udi mushale, mutuangaji awoshe pa tshilambuilu, bu mudibu benza bua mulambu wa bobumue. Nanku mutuangaji akobolole mfumu wa bena Izrayele anu mushindu ewu bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus4:27 “Kadi padi muena musoku muenze bualu bubi mu mpukapuka, budi bubengangana ne mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, udi amu muena tshibawu." 
Leviticus4:28 Padiye umanya bualu bubi buvuaye muenze, udi ne bua kudikobolola. Alambule Maweja-Nangila mbuji wa dishina, kayi ne bulema." 
Leviticus4:29 Ateke tshianza pa mutu pa mbuji awu, amukosele muminu muaba udibu bashipela nyama ya milambu ya kuosha." 
Leviticus4:30 Mutuangaji atue munu mu mashi a mbuji awu, aalabe ku matumba matalame adi ku tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha. Pashishe mashi adi mashale, mutuangaji ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu atshi." 
Leviticus4:31 Bumushe munyinyi wa mafuta onsu, bu mudibu benza bua mulambu wa bobumue. Mutuangaji awoshe pa tshilambuilu, bualu mmulambu wa dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila. Mutuangaji akobolole muena Izrayele awu anu mushindu ewu bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus4:32 “Padi muena tshibawu awu musue kulambula Maweja-Nangila mukoku, asungule amu mukoku mukaji udi kauyi ne bulema, bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus4:33 Ateke tshianza pa mutu wa mukoku awu, aukosele muminu pa muaba udibu bashipela nyama ya milambu ya kuosha." 
Leviticus4:34 Mutuangaji atue munu mu mashi awu, aalabe ku matumba matalame adi ku tshilambuilu tshia milambu ya kuosha. Pashishe mashi onsu adi mashale, mutuangaji ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu atshi." 
Leviticus4:35 Bumushe munyinyi wa mafuta onsu, bu mudibu benza bua mukoku wa mulambu wa bobumue. Mutuangaji awoshe pa tshilambuilu pamue ne milambu mikuabu idibu boshila Maweja-Nangila. Mutuangaji akobolole muena tshibawu awu mushindu ewu bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus5:1 “Padibu babikila muntu kampande kudi balumbuluishi bua kujadika bualu budiye mumvue nansha mumone ne mesu, kadi yeye ubenga bua kujadika bualu abu, mmuena tshibawu." 
Leviticus5:2 “Tuteke tshilejilu tshikuabu: Padi muntu ulenga tshintu kampande tshidi ne mikiya kayi mumanye, bu mudi nyama wa tshisuku mufue, tshimuna nansha tshilandadi tshifue, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu, udi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus5:3 “Mufuanyikije kabidi: padi muntu ulengangana ne mukuabu kayi mumanye, ne udi mulengangane nende ewu udi ne mikiya idi yambulukilangana, udi mulengangane awu, padiye umanya bubi buende, diakamue udi muena tshibawu." 
Leviticus5:4 “Bidi momumue padi muntu kayi muele meji bimpe, uditshipa bua kujadika bualu, nansha bua kuambuluisha muntu kampande, nansha bua kumukengesha, muntu udi uditshipa awu, padiye umanya bubi buende, udi muena tshibawu." 
Leviticus5:5 “Muntu yonsu udi wenza tshilema tshia ku bitudi batela ebi, mmuena tshibawu, atonde bubi buende budiye muenze." 
Leviticus5:6 Kadi bua Mvidi Mukulu kumufuila luse ku bubi buvuaye muenze, udi ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila dishina dia mukoku nansha dishina dia mbuji. Bidi mulambu wa kudikobolola. Ke mudi mutuangaji mua kukobolola muena tshibawu amu mushindu ewu." 
Leviticus5:7 “Padi muntu kampande kayi ne mushindu wa kupeta dishina dia mbuji nansha dia mukoku bu mulambu wa kudikobolola, udi mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila tumandankutshi tubidi nansha nkudimba ibidi. Nyunyi umue ikale mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu. Mukuabu ikale mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus5:8 Muntu awu afile nyunyi ayi kudi mutuangaji bua ayele mulu, ayinyukule, ayilambule Maweja-Nangila. Bangabanga mutuangaji alambule nyunyi wa mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu. Anyongobole nyunyi awu nshingu, kayi umukosa mutu." 
Leviticus5:9 Itshikije mashi makese ku nseke ya tshilambuilu. Mashi onsu adi mashale, ayitshikije kuinshi kua tshilambuilu. Mulambu ewu mbua kukobolola muntu awu." 
Leviticus5:10 Pashishe mutuangaji alambule nyunyi mukuabu bu mulambu wa kuosha, bilondeshile mudi mikenji ya milambu. Nunku akobolole muena tshibawu anu mushindu ewu bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus5:11 “Kadi padi muntu kayi ne mushindu wa kupeta tumandankutshi tubidi nansha nkudimba ibidi, alambule Maweja-Nangila kilo inayi ya bukula. Kadi pa bukula abu, kena mua kuelamu mafuta, nansha kutekapu musenga wa kamonya to. Bualu mmulambu wa kudikobolola nawu." 
Leviticus5:12 Apeshe mutuangaji bukula abu, bua yeye ambule dianza dia bukula abu bu mulambu wa tshivulukilu, oshe bukula abu pamue ne milambu mikuabu idibu boshila Maweja-Nangila. Bualu mmulambu wa kudikobolola nawu." 
Leviticus5:13 Mutuangaji akobolole muena tshibawu awu anu mushindu ewu, bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse. “Mutuangaji enze bionsu ebi anu muvuaye wenza bua mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi.”" 
Leviticus5:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus5:15 “Padi muntu kampande muenze bualu bubi mu mpukapuka, mupue muoyi bua kulambula milambu ya tshijila idibu balambula Maweja-Nangila, muntu awu, bua kudikobolola udi ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila mukoku wa tshimpanga kauyi ne bulema. Ke mulambu wa dinua tshibalu. Mukoku awu wikale wa mushinga mukumbane wa nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke, bilondeshile tshipimu tshia nkanu tshidibu natshi muaba wa tshijila, bualu mulambu ewu ngua dinua tshibalu." 
Leviticus5:16 Muntu awu afile kabidi milambu iwaye kayi mufile. Asakidile kabidi ne tshia bitanu tshimue tshia mushinga wa bintu abi. Apeshe mutuangaji bintu bionsu abi. Mutuangaji alambule nyama wa tshibawu awu, akobolole muena tshibawu bilondeshile mudi mikenji, bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse." 
Leviticus5:17 “Padi muntu kampande muenze bualu bubi budi bubengangana nansha ne mukenji umue wa Maweja-Nangila, nansha muenze kayi mumanye, muntu awu udi muena tshibawu." 
Leviticus5:18 Udi ne bua kuya ne mukoku wa tshimpanga kudi mutuangaji. Mukoku awu wikale kauyi ne bulema, kabidi mukumbane mushinga wa mulambu wa dinua tshibalu. Mutuangaji akobolole muena tshibawu awu anu mushindu ewu, bua Maweja-Nangila amufuile luse bua bubi buvuaye muenze kayi mumanye." 
Leviticus5:19 Ewu ke mulambu wa dinua tshibalu bua muntu yonsu udi mubunde tshibawu kudi Maweja-Nangila.’’ 
Leviticus5:20 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus5:21 “Padi muntu kampande munyangakaje mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, muenzele mukuende bibi: Tutele tshilejilu: padi muntu uvila bua tshintu tshivuabu batekesha kudiye, tshintu tshivuaye musombe, tshintu tshivuaye muibe, tshintu tshivuaye munyenge ku bukole," 
Leviticus5:22 nansha bua tshintu tshijimine tshivuaye muangule, uvila ne: tshiena mutshimone to; nansha kabidi padi muntu uditshipa mitshipu ya dishima bua kupeta tshintu ne budimu," 
Leviticus5:23 muntu awu mmuena tshibawu, bualu mmuenze bualu bubi. Apingaje tshintu tshivuaye muibe, munyenge, muangule, nansha tshi wabu batekesha kudiye," 
Leviticus5:24 nansha tshintu tshivuaye muditshipe mitshipu ya dishima bua kutshipeta ne budimu. Muntu awu apingaje tshintu atshi amu bu mu watshi, asakidile kabidi ne tshia bitanu tshimue tshia mushinga wa tshintu atshi. Diakamue padiye umanya bubi buende, apingaje tshintu atshi kudi muenatshi, ne bionsu bidiye ne bua kusakidila abi." 
Leviticus5:25 Pashishe aye ne mukoku wa tshimpanga kudi mutuangaji. Mukoku awu wikale kauyi ne bulema, wikale mukumbane mushinga wa mulambu wa dinua tshibalu udibu balambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus5:26 Mutuangaji akobolole muena tshibawu anu mushindu ewu bua Mvidi Mukulu amufuile luse bua tshibawu tshivuaye muenze atshi.” 
Leviticus6:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus6:2 — Ambila Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne: “Nungoshile milambu mushindu ewu: “Mulambu wa kuosha awu ushale pa tshilambuilu butuku bujima, kapia katema amu kutema kakayi kajima." 
Leviticus6:3 Pashishe mutuangaji avuale muntumpu muenza ne buanda bua ndanda. Avuale kabidi kaputula ka tshilamba kenza ne buanda bua ndanda. Aboye butu budi pa tshilambuilu, anji kubuteka panshi ku luseke lua tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus6:4 Pashishe avule bilamba abi, avuale bikuabu. Umbuke ne butu abu mu mitanda, aye nabu muaba musunguluke kauyi mikiya bua kubimansha." 
Leviticus6:5 Kadi kapia kadi pa tshilambuilu kadi ne bua kutema anu kutema. Ku dituku dionsu, mutuangaji ikale uteka nkunyi pa tshilambuilu dinda, utekepu ne milambu ya kuosha bangabanga ne kuoshilapu munyinyi wa mafuta wa milambu ya bobumue." 
Leviticus6:6 Nanku kapia kikale katema anu kutema pa tshilambuilu kashidi, kakayi kajima." 
Leviticus6:7 “Bua kulambula mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi, nuenze nunku: “Anu bana ba Arone ba balume ke badi mua kuela bintu abi mulu, kumpala kua tshilambuilu, kubinyukula bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus6:8 Nanku mutuangaji ambule dianza dia bukula budibu basambakaje ne mafuta, ambule kabidi musenga wa kamonya onsu, abioshe bionsu pa tshilambuilu, bualu bintu ebi mmulambu wa tshivulukilu udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus6:9 Bukula bua mulambu budi bushale, babuangate anu kudi Arone ne bana bende ba balume. Kadi badie mulambu awu kabayi bela buanga bua mampa. Baudile mu lubanza lua ntenta wa kusambakena, bualu ke muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus6:10 Mulambu awu kabena mua kuulamba, kuela buanga bua mampa to. Bualu udi tshitupa tshidi Maweja-Nangila mubapeshe tshia ku bintu bionsu bidibu bamulambula. Tshitupa atshi tshidi tshia tshijila, bu mudi tshitupa tshia ku mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu, nansha wa dinua tshibalu." 
Leviticus6:11 Nanku anu bantu balume ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, ke badi mua kudia bukula bua mulambu abu. Bualu mbukula bua mulambu wa Maweja-Nangila budiye mupeshe ndelanganyi ya Arone kashidi. Kadi muntu yonsu mukuabu walenga tshitupa tshia mulambu ewu, nebamunyoke.”" 
Leviticus6:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus6:13 “Bobu bamane kujidila Arone ne bana bende ba balume, badi ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila kilo isatu ya bukula ku dituku dionsu, mmomumue ne: balambule tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bukula dinda, tshikuabu dilolu." 
Leviticus6:14 Bukula abu, buikale busambakaja ne mafuta, bukanga pa dilata bua kuenza mukata. Pashishe bangabanga ne kulambula Maweja-Nangila mukata awu, wikale mukosolola bitupa, bualu mmulambu wa dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus6:15 “Nanku muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, udibu bajidila bua ikale mutuangaji munene, neikale ulambula mulambu ewu anu mushindu ewu. Bualu mmulambu udibu boshila Maweja-Nangila onsu kashidi, ushile." 
Leviticus6:16 Ku mulambu onsu wa bia mu madimi udi mutuangaji ulambula Maweja-Nangila, kena mua kudia kantu nansha kamue to.”" 
Leviticus6:17 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe," 
Leviticus6:18 bua amanyishe Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne: “Mikenji idi itangila mulambu wa dikobolola dia bantu, idi nunku: “Bakosele tshimuna atshi muminu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, anu muaba udibu bashipela nyama ya milambu ya kuosha. Bualu mulambu ewu ngwa tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus6:19 Mutuangaji udi ulambula mulambu awu, audile amu muaba wa tshijila mu lubanza lua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus6:20 Bualu munyinyi wa mulambu wa nanku udi wa tshijila menemene. Tshionsu tshidi tshilenga munyinyi wa mulambu awu netshinyanguke. Padi mashi a nyama awu masampukile ku tshilamba, tshilamba atshi batshisukuile anu muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus6:21 Padibu balambile munyinyi awu mu luesu lua dibumba, kujika, babishipe. Kadi padibu bakambila mu luesu lua tshiamu tshikunze, balukone, balusukule ne mayi a bungi." 
Leviticus6:22 Nanku anu bantu balume ba mu meku a batuangaji, ke badi mua kudia munyinyi awu, bualu udi mulambu wa tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus6:23 Kadi misangu yonsu idibu babuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena ne mashi a nyama wa mulambu bua kukobolola nawu bantu muaba wa tshijila, kabena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama awu. Bawoshe mu kapia." 
Leviticus7:1 “Mulambu wa dinua tshibalu badi baulambula mushindu ewu: “Ke mulambu wa tshijila menemene. 
Leviticus7:2 Badi ne bua kukosa nyama muminu, muaba udibu bashipela nyama ya milambu ya kuosha. Pashishe bamiamine mashi ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus7:3 Kadi balambule Maweja-Nangila munyinyi onsu wa mafuta: mukila, mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda," 
Leviticus7:4 tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamateku, mafuta adi malamate ku lutandatanda ludi ku mutshima, ludibu balamuna pamue ne tuonyi." 
Leviticus7:5 Mutuangaji oshe bionsu ebi pa tshilambuilu. Bualu bidi mulambu wa dinua tshibalu, udibu boshila Maweja-Nangila, ushile." 
Leviticus7:6 Nanku anu bantu balume ba mu meku a batuangaji ke badi mua kudia munyinyi wa mulambu awu. Kadi baudile muaba wa tshijila, bualu udi wa tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus7:7 Mikenji ya mulambu wa dinua tshibalu ne ya mulambu wa kukobolola bantu, idi anu mushindu umue. Nanku amu mutuangaji udi ukobolola muntu ke udi wangata munyinyi awu." 
Leviticus7:8 “Padi muntu ufila nyama wa mulambu wa kuosha, tshiseba tshia nyama awu, tshishale amu tshia mutuangaji uvua mulambule mulambu awu." 
Leviticus7:9 Padi mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi bioshe muiku, bilambe mu luesu, nansha bikange pa dilata, bintu ebi nebishale bia mutuangaji uvua mulambule mulambu awu." 
Leviticus7:10 Kadi padi milambu ya bintu bibishi kabiyi bilambe pa kapia, nansha ya bintu bisambakaja ne mafuta nansha ya bikuabu, babiabanyangana bungi bua momumue kudi bana ba Arone ba balume." 
Leviticus7:11 “Mushindu wa kulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa bobumue: 
Leviticus7:12 “Padi muntu ulambula Maweja-Nangila nyama wa mulambu, wimba ne musangu bua kumutumbisha, asakidile kabidi milambu eyi: mulambu wa mikata mikanga kayiyi miela buanga bua mampa, wa tuampa tukese tulaba mafuta, katuyi tuela buanga bua mampa, ne wa mikata mienza ne bukula busambakaja ne mafuta." 
Leviticus7:13 Pashishe ambule kabidi diampa diela buanga, didibu balambula pamue ne mulambu wa kutumbisha nawu Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus7:14 Mutuangaji angate tshintu tshimue tshia ku mulambu ne ku mulambu bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila. Nunku bintu bionsu ebi nebishale bia mutuangaji uvua mumiamine mashi ku tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus7:15 Kadi bua munyinyi wa nyama wa mulambu wa bobumue, baudie ujika onsu anu dituku dimue, kauladi to." 
Leviticus7:16 “Padibu balambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa bobumue, bua mapiku nansha bua budisuile, munyinyi awu baudie dituku adi. Padiwu ushala, baudie baujikija patshiabu." 
Leviticus7:17 Kadi padiu ushala kabidi too ne ku dituku disatu, bawoshe mu kapia." 
Leviticus7:18 Padi muntu kampande udia munyinyi wa ku mulambu awu dituku disatu, Maweja-Nangila kena mua kuanyisha to. Mulambu wende kawena ne mushinga, bualu munyinyi kautshiena muimpe kabidi bua kuenza nawu midimu ya tshijila. Yonsu udi udia munyinyi awu, mmuena tshibawu. Mmudikebele tshilumbu." 
Leviticus7:19 Padi munyinyi awu ulenga ku tshintu tshidi ne mikiya, kabaudi to, bawoshe mu kapia. “Nanku anu muntu udi kayi ne mikiya ke udi mua kudia munyinyi wa mulambu ewu." 
Leviticus7:20 Muntu yonsu udi mudipile nkayende mikiya, padiye udia munyinyi wa mulambu wa bobumue, udibu balambula Maweja-Nangila, nebamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus7:21 Kabidi muntu yonsu udi ulenga mukuabu udi ne mikiya, ulenga tshimuna tshidi ne mikiya, nansha nyama wa tshisuku udi ne mikiya, neapete dinyoka dia mushindu umue ne muntu udi mudie munyinyi wa mulambu wa bobumue uvuabu balambule Maweja-Nangila muikale ne mikiya.”" 
Leviticus7:22 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus7:23 manyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wa mafuta a nyama, nansha a ngombe, a mukoku, nansha a mbuji." 
Leviticus7:24 Munyinyi onsu wa mafuta, wa nyama mudifuile, nansha mushipa kudi nyama mukuabu wa lonji, kabena mua kuudia to, kadi badi mua kukuata nawu midimu mikuabu." 
Leviticus7:25 Padi muntu udia mafuta a nyama udibu balambula bu mulambu wa kuoshila Maweja-Nangila, muntu awu bamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus7:26 Nanku muaba onsu unudi basomba kanuena mua kudia kabidi mashi a nyunyi, nansha a nyama too ne kashidi." 
Leviticus7:27 Padi muntu udia mashi, bamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. ”" 
Leviticus7:28 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: imanyisha kabidi bena Izrayele ne: 
Leviticus7:29 Padi muntu ulambula Maweja-Nangila nyama wa mulambu wa bobumue, neapeshe Maweja-Nangila bidi bimutangila." 
Leviticus7:30 Neambule yeye mene bionsu bidibu ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila: ke munyinyi wa mafuta, ne tshiadi tshia nyama awu. Bele tshiadi tshia nyama atshi mulu, batshinyukule bua kutshilambula." 
Leviticus7:31 Mutuangaji oshe munyinyi wa mafuta onsu pa tshilambuilu. Kadi tshiadi atshi tshikale tshia Arone ne bana bende ba balume. 
Leviticus7:32 Nudi ne bua kumusha kabidi tshibelu tshia luseke lua balume lua nyama wa mulambu, kutshipesha mutuangaji." 
Leviticus7:33 Tshibelu tshia nyama atshi, ntshia mutuangaji udi ulambula mashi ne mafuta pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus7:34 Maweja-Nangila udi unutumina diyi bua nuenu bena Izrayele, kumusha tshiadi ne tshibelu bia nyama inudi nulambula bu mulambu wa bobumue. Nupeshe mutuangaji Arone ne ndelanganyi yende bintu abi, bualu ke bintu binudi ne bua kubapesha matuku onsu too ne kashidi.”" 
Leviticus7:35 Bintu abi, bidibu bumusha ku milambu idibu balambula Maweja-Nangila, nebikale bia Arone ne bana bende, biangatshile dituku didibu babajidile ku mudimu wa butuangaji bua kukuatshila Maweja-Nangila mudimu." 
Leviticus7:36 Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi unutumina diyi nuenu bena Izrayele, bua nupeshe Arone ne bana bende bintu ebi dituku didibu babajidila. Nulame mukenji ewu kashidi." 
Leviticus7:37 Eyi ke mikenji idi itangila milambu ya kuosha, milambu ya bintu bia mu madimi, milambu ya kukobolola nayi bantu, milambu ya dinua tshibalu, milambu ya dibanjija ne milambu ya bobumue." 
Leviticus7:38 Maweja-Nangila mmupeshe Moshe mikenji eyi, mu tshipela ku mukuna wa Sinayi, dituku divuaye mutumine bena Izrayele diyi, bua bikale bamulambula milambu." 
Leviticus8:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus8:2 — Ubikidishe Arone ne bana bende ba balume ku mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Ulombeshe bilamba biabu bia tshijila, ne mafuta a kubalaba. Batuale kabidi ngombe mulume wa kubakobolola nende, mikoku ibidi ya bimpanga, ne tshisaka tshia mampa kaayi mela buanga." 
Leviticus8:3 Pashishe ukunguje bantu bonsu ba bena Izrayele muaba ewu. 
Leviticus8:4 Moshe kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Bantu bonsu kutuilangana ku mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Leviticus8:5 Moshe kubambila ne: “Mpindiewu ndi ne bua kuenza tshivua Maweja-Nangila muambe.” 
Leviticus8:6 Moshe kubikila Arone ne bana bende ba balume, kubowesha mayi bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Leviticus8:7 Kuvuadikaye Arone muntumpu, kumusuika mukaba, kumuvuadika muntumpu mulamika tshilamba tshia efode kutshisuikila panyima ne tukaba tuatshi." 
Leviticus8:8 Kumuladika tshilamba tshia pa tshiadi, kubuejamu Urime ne Tumime." 
Leviticus8:9 Kumuasaye tshifulu ku mutu. Kumpala kua tshifulu, kuvua kulamika tshitata tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshifuane tshilongu, bilondeshile mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus8:10 Ke Moshe kuangata mafuta a tshijila, kualaba ku ntenta wa kusambakena ne ku bintu bionsu bivuamu." 
Leviticus8:11 Kumiaminaye kabidi mafuta awu misangu muanda mutekete ku tshilambuilu, ne ku bintu bivuaku, ku dilongu dinene dia koweshila bantu mayi, ne ku tshitaku tshiadi." 
Leviticus8:12 Kuelaye Arone mafuta a tshijila mu mutu bua kumujidila. 
Leviticus8:13 Pashishe Moshe kubikila bana ba Arone ba balume, kubavuadika mintumpu, kubasuika mikaba, kubasa bifulu ku mitu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Leviticus8:14 Pashishe kutualabu ngombe mulume bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Arone ne bana bende ba balume kutenteka bianza pa mutu pa ngombe awu. 
Leviticus8:15 Moshe kukosa ngombe awu muminu, kutua munu mu mashi, kualaba ku matumba matalame avua ku tshilambuilu bua kumbusha mikiya. Pashishe kuitshikijaye mashi avua mashale kuinshi kua tshilambuilu. Ke muvua Moshe mujidile tshilambuilu bua tshikale muaba wa kulambuila milambu ya kukobolola nayi bantu." 
Leviticus8:16 Ke Moshe kulamuna mafuta onsu avua ku bia munda, lutandatanda lua ku mutshima, tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu avua malamateku, kubioshila Maweja-Nangila pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus8:17 Kadi munyinyi wa ngombe awu uvua mushale, tshiseba, bia munda ne bunyawu, Moshe kumuka nabi mu mitanda, kuya kubiosha amu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Leviticus8:18 Pashishe kutualabu kabidi mukoku wa tshimpanga wa mulambu wa kuosha. Arone ne bana bende ba balume kutentekabu bianza pa mutu wa tshimpanga atshi. 
Leviticus8:19 Moshe kukosa tshimpanga atshi muminu, kumiamina mashi atshi ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus8:20 Moshe kusaya tshimpanga atshi, kutshikosolola mabulu mabulu, kuosha pamue ne mutu, kabidi ne munyinyi wa mafuta." 
Leviticus8:21 Kusukulaye bia munda ne bikonu mu mayi. Kubishaye ne munyinyi wa nyama uvua mushale pa tshilambuilu. Bualu mmulambu wa kuosha, udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus8:22 Pashishe kumutuadilabu tshimpanga tshikuabu bua kujidila batuangaji. Arone ne bana bende kutenteka bianza pa mutu wa tshimpanga atshi. 
Leviticus8:23 Moshe kukosa tshimpanga atshi muminu, kulaba Arone mashi atshi ku lusongu lua ditshi, ku tshiala ne ku muana nkasa munene bia ku luseke luende lua dia balume." 
Leviticus8:24 Pashishe kubikilaye kabidi bana bonsu ba balume ba Arone, kubalaba mashi ku nsongu yabu ya matshi, ku biala ne ku minu minene ya bana ba nkasa bia ku luseke luabu lua dia balume. Ke kumiaminaye kabidi mashi avua mashale ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus8:25 Pashishe Moshe kuangata mukila wa tshimpanga atshi, mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda, lutandatanda lua ku mutshima, tuonyi tubidi ne mafuta onsu adi malamateku, kabidi ne tshibelu tshia luseke lua dia balume." 
Leviticus8:26 Mu tshisaka tshivua kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, tshikale ne mampa kaayi mela buanga, Moshe kuangata diampa dimue kadiyi diela buanga, mukata muenza ne mafuta, kabidi ne kakata kakese. Kubitekaye pa mafuta ne pa tshibelu tshia luseke lua dia balume dia tshimpanga." 
Leviticus8:27 Moshe kupesha Arone ne bana bende ba balume bintu bionsu abi ku bianza bua babiele mulu, babinyukule kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus8:28 Pashishe kuangataye kabidi bintu abi ku bianza bia Arone ne bia bana bende ba balume, kubitentekajaye pa mutu pa milambu ya kuosha ivua pa tshilambuilu, kubioshila Maweja-Nangila. Ke muvuabu benza mudimu wa kubueja batuangaji mu mudimu nanku. Mulambu awu uvua ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus8:29 Moshe kuangata tshiadi tshia tshimpanga atshi, kutshiela mulu, kutshinyukula. Pashishe kutshiangataye, anu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Leviticus8:30 Moshe kusambakaja mafuta a tshijila mu mashi avua ku tshilambuilu. Kuamiaminaye Arone, ne ku bilamba biende. Pashishe kuamiaminaye kabidi bana bende ba balume, ne ku bilamba biabu. Ke Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne bilamba biabu kushala bia tshijila." 
Leviticus8:31 Moshe kuambila Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne: — Nulambile munyinyi wa tshimpanga tshibidi atshi mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Nuudile nuenu nkayenu anu muaba awu, pamue ne mampa a tshijila. Ke mumvua munuambile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila ne: bintu ebi nebabidie amu kudi Arone ne bana bende ba balume." 
Leviticus8:32 Kadi munyinyi ne mampa bidi bishale, nubioshe mu kapia." 
Leviticus8:33 Nushale mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena too ne pakumbana matuku muanda mutekete a tshijila tshienu. 
Leviticus8:34 Nanku bitudi benza lelu ebi, ke bivua Maweja-Nangila mutume diyi bua tuenze bua kunukobolola." 
Leviticus8:35 Nushale anu mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena matuku muanda mutekete a munya ne a butuku, bua kuenza mudimu munufundile kudi Maweja-Nangila, bua kanufu. Ke mikenji ivua Mvidi Mukulu mungambile." 
Leviticus8:36 Arone ne bana bende ba balume, kukumbaja mikenji yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila mubatumine kudi Moshe." 
Leviticus9:1 Dituku divua dilonda matuku muanda mutekete avuabu bajidile Arone ne bana bende ba balume, Moshe kubabikila pamue ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus9:2 Kuambilaye Arone ne: — Angata muana wa ngombe mulume udi kayi ne bulema, umulambule Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Wangate kabidi mukoku wa tshimpanga udi kauyi ne bulema, uulambule Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa kuosha. Wimane nabi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus9:3 Pashishe wambile bena Izrayele, bafile pabu mbuji wa mpumbu kudi Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Bafile kabidi muana wa ngombe mulume, kabidi ne muana wa mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue, kayi ne bulema, bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus9:4 Bangate kabidi ngombe mulume, mukoku wa tshimpanga bua mulambu wa bobumue. Nenusakidile ku nyama mulambu wa bukula busampakaja ne mafuta. Bualu Maweja-Nangila neanumuenekele lelu." 
Leviticus9:5 Nanku bionsu bivua Moshe muambe, kubifidilabu mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Pashishe bena Izrayele bonsu kuya kuimana muaba awu bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus9:6 Moshe kubambila ne: — Panudi nukumbaja bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila munuambile bua kuenza, yeye neadileje kunudi ne butumbi buende." 
Leviticus9:7 Pashishe kuambilaye Arone ne: — Semena ku tshilambuilu, ulambule mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu, ne mulambu wa kuosha. Wenze bionsu bidi bikengela bua wewe kudikobolola, kukobolola ne bena Izrayele bonsu. Pashishe ulambule milambu ya bena Izrayele. Wenze kabidi ne bionsu bidi bikengela bua kukobolola bantu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
Leviticus9:8 Arone kusemena pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, kukosa muana wa ngombe muminu bua kudikobolola." 
Leviticus9:9 Nanku, bana bende ba balume kumuambuilabu mashi. Arone kutua munu wende mu mashi awu, kualaba ku matumba matalame avua ku tshilambuilu. Pashishe kuitshikijaye mashi avua mashale kuinshi kua tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus9:10 Kuoshilaye Maweja-Nangila mafuta onsu, ne tuonyi tubidi, ne lutandatanda lua ku mutshima, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Leviticus9:11 Kadi munyinyi ne tshiseba, Arone kumuka nabi ku mitanda, kuya kubiosha." 
Leviticus9:12 Pashishe Arone kukosa nyama wende wa tshimpanga wa mulambu wa kuosha awu muminu. Bana bende ba balume kumuambuila mashi. Arone kumiamina mashi awu ku nseke yonsu ya tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus9:13 Kumupeshabu kabidi mutu wa nyama awu, ne munyinyi mumane kukosolola mabulu, bua kubioshila Maweja-Nangila pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus9:14 Kusukulaye kabidi bia munda ne bikonu, kubitenteka pa milambu mikuabu ya kuosha ivua pa tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus9:15 Pashishe Arone kuleja Maweja-Nangila milambu ivua bantu bafile. Kuangataye mbuji wa mpumbu wa mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu, kumukosa muminu. Pashishe kumulambulaye Maweja-Nangila, amu bu muvuaye mulambule ngombe wende." 
Leviticus9:16 Kuambulaye nyama ya milambu ya kuosha ibidi ayi anu bilondeshile mikenji. 
Leviticus9:17 Pashishe kulejaye Maweja-Nangila milambu ya bintu bia mu madimi. Kuambulaye dianza dia bukula, kuboshila Mvidi Mukulu pa tshilambuilu. Nanku, dinda dionsu bavua basakidila bintu abi ku mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus9:18 Arone kukosa muminu wa ngombe, ne wa mukoku wa tshimpanga, bivua bantu bafile bua mulambu wa bobumue. Pashishe bana bende ba balume kumuambuila mashi a nyama ayi. Arone kuamiamina ku nseke inayi ya tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus9:19 Kumupeshabu munyinyi wa mafuta a ngombe, kabidi ne mukila, mafuta onsu adi malamate ku bia munda, tuonyi ne lutandatanda lua ku mutshima bia mukoku wa tshimpanga." 
Leviticus9:20 Nanku Arone kutentekaja munyinyi wa mafuta awu pa biadi bia nyama ibidi ayi. Ke kuoshaye mafuta awu pa tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus9:21 Pashishe Arone kuambula biadi bia nyama ne tshibelu tshia ku dia balume dia nyama, kubiela mulu, ubinyukula kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Leviticus9:22 Arone ujikija kulambula milambu ya kukobolola bantu, milambu ya kuosha, milambu ya bobumue, kuelaye bianza mulu, wela bena Izrayele lupemba. Pashishe kumukaye ku tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus9:23 Nanku Moshe ne Arone kubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Bobu bamane kupatukamu, kuelabu bantu lupemba. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kudileja kudi bena Izrayele ne butumbi buende." 
Leviticus9:24 Diakamue kapia kufuma kudi Maweja-Nangila, kutema, kuosha milambu ya kuosha yonsu, ne mafuta a ku milambu mikuabu bivua pa tshilambuilu. Bantu bonsu bamone nanku, kuelabu tunkunduluila. Pashishe kudielabu mpala panshi." 
Leviticus10:1 Nadabe ne Abiku bavua bana ba balume ba Arone. Yonsu wa kudibu kuangata tshiamu tshiende tshia musenga wa kamonya, kuelamu makala a kapia, kabidi ne manananshi bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila. Kadi kapia kakavua ka tshijila, kakavua mushindu uvua Maweja-Nangila mubambile to." 
Leviticus10:2 Diakamue kapia kufuma kudi Maweja-Nangila, kubosha, kubashidisha muaba awu." 
Leviticus10:3 Nanku Moshe kuambila Arone ne: — Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kukudimuka, pawaye wamba ne: “Bonsu badi bangenzela mudimu, badi ne bua kunnemeka, bualu ndi wa tshijila. Bantumbishe, bantu bonsu batangile.” Arone kushala mupuwa." 
Leviticus10:4 Moshe kubikila Mishayele ne Elishafane, bana ba balume ba Uziyele mansebende wa Arone. Kubambilaye ne: — Umbushayi bitalu bia bana benu muaba wa tshijila, numuke nabi mu mitanda bua kubijika." 
Leviticus10:5 Ke kusemenabu pabuipi, kuambula bitalu abi, bivuadike mintumpu. Kumukabu nabi mu mitanda, bilondeshile diyi dia Moshe." 
Leviticus10:6 Moshe kubikila Elazare ne Itamare, bana ba balume ba Arone, pamue ne Arone mene. Kubambilaye ne: — Kanuteki madilu to. Longololayi nsuki yenu bimpe. Kanupandi bilamba bienu, bu bantu badi mu madilu, bualu nudi mua kufua, kabidi Maweja-Nangila udi mua kufikila bantu bonsu munda. Kadi bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu bateke madilu bua bantu bavua Maweja-Nangila mushidishe ne kapia." 
Leviticus10:7 Nanku nuenu kanumuku mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena bua kanufu, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmunulabe mafuta a tshijila. Ke Arone ne bana bende kuitaba bionsu bivua Moshe ubambila." 
Leviticus10:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Arone ne: 
Leviticus10:9 — Wewe ne bana bebe, kanuena mua kunua maluvu a mvinyo, nansha a kapia, panudi nubuela mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bualu nudi mua kufua. Mukenji ewu ushale kashidi kunudi ne kudi ndelanganyi yenu." 
Leviticus10:10 Kanunu kabidi maluvu makole, panudi nusunguluja bintu bidi bia tshijila, ne bidi kabiyi bia tshijila, bidi ne mikiya, ne bidi kabiyi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus10:11 Kanuena mua kunua kabidi maluvu makole, panudi nulongesha bena Izrayele mikenji eyi idi Maweja-Nangila mubatumine kudi Moshe." 
Leviticus10:12 Pashishe Moshe kuambila Arone ne bana bende ba balume babidi, Elazare ne Itamare, bavua bashale ne muoyi ne: — Angatayi bukula budi bushale bua ku mulambu uvuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila. Nuenze nabu mampa kaayi mela buanga. Kadi nuadile pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, bualu adi biakudia bia tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus10:13 Kabidi nudi mua kuadila amu muaba wa tshijila. Tshitupa tshia milambu ivuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila etshi, ntshienu nuenu batuangaji, bu mu-vua Maweja-Nangila mungambile." 
Leviticus10:14 Kadi wewe ne bana bebe bonsu ba balume, nuangate tshiadi ne tshibelu bia nyama ya milambu ya bobumue, binuvua bela mulu, banyukula kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, nubidile muaba musunguluke, bualu ntshitupa tshia mulambu tshidi tshiebe ne tshia bana bebe ba balume. Nudi mua kubidia pamue ne bana bebe ba bakaji." 
Leviticus10:15 Nanku, misangu yonsu idibu bosha mafuta pa tshilambuilu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, nebafile kabidi tshibelu ne tshiadi, babiela mulu, babinyukule Pashishe wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe, nubiangate, nubidie, bualu mbintu bivua Maweja-Nangila munupe kashidi, bu muvuaye mumane kuamba." 
Leviticus10:16 Moshe uvua musue kumanya tshivuabu benza ne mbuji wa mpumbu wa mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Kumuambilabu ne: “Mbuji wa mpumbu awu, mbamane kumuosha pa tshilambuilu kudi Elazare ne Itamare, bana ba Arone bavua bashale ne muoyi.” Ke kubafikilaye munda. Kubakonkaye ne:" 
Leviticus10:17 — Munyinyi ewu wa mulambu udi Maweja-Nangila munupe, kanuena baudile muaba kampande wa tshijila bua tshinyi? Kanuena bamanye ne: ngwa tshijila menemene anyi? Maweja-Nangila mmunupeshe nyama ewu bua nukobolole bena Izrayele ku malu mabi adibu benza." 
Leviticus10:18 Bu munuvua kanuyi baya ne mashi a nyama ewu munda mua ntenta wa kusambakena, nuvua mua kudila munyinyi ewu muaba wa tshijila, bu mumvua munuambile." 
Leviticus10:19 Arone kukonka Moshe ne: — Lelu bena Izrayele bavua balambula Mvidi Mukulu mulambu wa kudikobolola, pamue ne mulambu wa kuosha. Kadi udi mumanye bivua bingenzekela. Nanku bu meme mudie munyinyi wa mulambu wa kukobolola dituku edi, Maweja-Nangila uvua mua kusanka anyi?" 
Leviticus10:20 Moshe umvua miaku eyi, kuitabaye." 
Leviticus11:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone 
Leviticus11:2 bua bamanyisha bena Izrayele mikenji eyi: “Ku nyama yonsu ya panu, nudie amu nyama eyi:" 
Leviticus11:3 Nudi mua kudia nyama idi ne mikonu mipanduluke, mikale ibiola bintu mukana, ibidia tshiakabidi." 
Leviticus11:4 Kadi kanuena mua kudia nyama idi amu idiululula, nansha idi amu ne bikonu bipanduluka, bu mudi: — kamelu kadi kadia kadiululula, kadi kakena ne bikonu bipanduluke to;" 
Leviticus11:5 — kanyama ka damane, kadi kadia kadiulula, kakayi ne bikonu bipanduluke;" 
Leviticus11:6 — kalulu ka mpata, kadi kadiululula, kadi kakena ne bikonu;" 
Leviticus11:7 — ngulube, bualu udi ne mikonu mipanduluke, kadi kena upingaja bintu mukana, ubidiululula." 
Leviticus11:8 Nanku kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wayi, nansha kuyilenga padiyi mifue. Numanye ne: idi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus11:9 “Ku nyama yonsu idi mu mayi, mu majiba, mu mayi manene ne mu misulu, nudi mua kudia minyinyi idi ne misalala ne mamba." 
Leviticus11:10 Kadi minyinyi yonsu ya mu mayi idi kayiyi ne misalala nansha ne mamba, kanuyidi to, nansha tusha tudi tuvuandulula mayi, nansha tunyinyi tukuabu tua mu mayi." 
Leviticus11:11 Numanye ne: minyinyi ayi idi ne mikiya. Kanuena mua kuyidia, nansha kuyilenga padiyi mifue." 
Leviticus11:12 Nanku, minyinyi yonsu ya mu mayi idi kayiyi ne misalala nansha ne mamba, kanuena mua kuyidia to." 
Leviticus11:13 “Kanuena mua kudia nyunyi eyi to: tshiminyi, mukanku, kabemba ka mvulu," 
Leviticus11:14 ntuba, nansha nyunyi idi mifuane mukanku," 
Leviticus11:15 tshikololu," 
Leviticus11:16 kasonga nyunyi, mfiondu, mukuekue, nansha nyunyi idi mifuane kabemba," 
Leviticus11:17 tshipungulu, tshiowa, kakutukutu," 
Leviticus11:18 mukute, kakololu, nkumbikumbi," 
Leviticus11:19 kalama ngomba, kasongu mule, miena kasuba, nansha mudima." 
Leviticus11:20 “Kanuena mua kudia bishi bidi ne masala, bikale kabidi ne mapangu anayi." 
Leviticus11:21 Kadi ku bintu bionsu bidi ne masala, bikale kabidi ne mapangu anayi, nudi mua kudia anu bidi ne mikolu, bitupika." 
Leviticus11:22 Ke mpasu yonsu, nsua, bintunta ne mintuntu." 
Leviticus11:23 Nanku kanuena mua kudia bishi bikuabu bionsu bidi ne masala, kabidi ne mapangu anayi. Numanye ne: bidi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus11:24 “Nyama mikuabu idi ipetesha muntu mikiya too ne ku dilolu, padiye uyilenga, yoyi mimane kufua." 
Leviticus11:25 Padi muntu wambula nyama ayi mimane kufua, nansha yeye musukule bilamba biende, utshidi amu ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus11:26 Nyama idi ne mikiya idi nunku: — nyama idi kayiyi ne mikonu mipanduluke, kayiyi ipingaja bintu mukana, ibidia kabidi. Padi muntu ulenga nyama eyi, udi upia mikiya;" 
Leviticus11:27 — nyama yonsu idi yenda pa munda mua diikasa. Padiyi mifue, muntu muyilenge, udi upia mikiya." 
Leviticus11:28 Muntu yonsu udi uyambula, padiyi mifue, nansha yeye musukule bilamba biende, utshidi anu ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus11:29 “Ku tunyama tukese tudi tuenda panshi, numanye ne: tudi ne mikiya tudi nunku: tshibulebule, mpuku, misodi ya mishindu yonsu," 
Leviticus11:30 dibula mutshi, dimemba, tshimpulumunzu, lomba ne lungonyonyi." 
Leviticus11:31 Nanku, numanye ne: tunyama etu tuonsu tudi ne mikiya. Padi tunyama etu tufua, muntu utulenga, neapie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus11:32 Kadi padi kanyama kamue ka ku tunyama etu kapona, kafuila mu tshintu bu mudi: luvu, tshilamba, tshiseba nansha tshibombi, badi ne bua kusukula tshintu atshi. Kadi, tshidi ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu, pashishe mikiya idi ijika." 
Leviticus11:33 Padi kanyama kamue ka ku tunyama etu kapona mu luesu lua dibumba, bintu bionsu bidi mu luesu bidi bipia mikiya. Luesu alu badi ne bua kulushipa." 
Leviticus11:34 Padi mayi avua mu luesu alu masampukila ku tshintu tshidibu mua kudia nansha kunua, tshintu atshi tshidi ne mikiya, nansha tshiotshi mu luesu lua mushindu kayi." 
Leviticus11:35 Padi kanyama kafue kaponena pa tshintu kampande, bu mu ditshiwa, tshintu atshi netshipie mikiya. Mbimpe kutshinyangakaja, bualu ntshipie mikiya." 
Leviticus11:36 Padi kanyama kamue kafue, kaponena mu mpokolu nansha mu tshiina tshia mayi, mayi awu kaena ne bualu to, adi mimpe. Kadi muntu udi upatula kanyama kafue aku mu mayi, neapie mikiya." 
Leviticus11:37 Padi kanyama kafue kaponena pa ntete ya kukuna, ntete ayi kayena ne bualu to, idi anu mimpe." 
Leviticus11:38 Kadi, padi kanyama aka kafue, kaponena mu ntete mimane kubombeka mu mayi bua kuyidia, ntete ayi idi ipia mikiya." 
Leviticus11:39 “Padi nyama wa ku inudi nudia mudifuile, muntu mulenge nyama awu neapie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus11:40 Muntu udi udia munyinyi wa nyama awu, nansha yeye musukule bilamba biende, udi amu upia mikiya too ne ku dilolu. Muntu udi wambula nyama awu mufue, nansha yeye musukule bilamba biende, utshidi ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus11:41 “Nanku tunyama tuonsu tukese tudi tuenda panshi, kanuena mua kudia munyinyi watu to." 
Leviticus11:42 Bintu bidi bilandala, nansha bidi bienda ne mikolu inayi, nansha ne ya bungi, kanuena mua kubidia to." 
Leviticus11:43 Nudimuke, kanulengi bintu ebi, bualu nudi mua kupia mikiya. Kanudinyangi." 
Leviticus11:44 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuikale bantu ba tshijila, bualu meme ndi wa tshijila. Kanudinyangi nuenu ne bintu ebi bibi, bidi bilandala panshi, bualu nudi mua kupia mikiya." 
Leviticus11:45 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, udi munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bua ngikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuenu nuikale bantu ba tshijila, bu mundi meme wa tshijila. ”" 
Leviticus11:46 Mikenji eyi idi itangila nyama, nyunyi, minyinyi ya mu mayi ne bionsu bidi bienda pa buloba." 
Leviticus11:47 Mikenji eyi idi bua nuenu kumanya bintu bidi ne mikiya ne bidi kabiyi ne mikiya. Kadi mbua numanye binudi mua kudia ne binudi kanuyi mua kudia. 
Leviticus12:1 Maweja-Nangila kumanyisha Moshe 
Leviticus12:2 bua ambile bena Izrayele mikenji eyi ne: “Padi mukaji ulela muana wa balume, mukaji awu udi upia mikiya matuku muanda mutekete, anu bu muvuaye muyipie mu matuku ende a tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Leviticus12:3 Padi matuku muanda mukulu akumbana, bateke muana awu panshi." 
Leviticus12:4 Pashishe padi mamuende wa muana awu kayi muanji kudilongolola ku buvyele budiye nabu, kena mua kulenga tshintu tshia tshijila, kena mua kubuela muaba wa tshijila, too ne padi matuku makumi asatu ne asatu akumbana." 
Leviticus12:5 “Padi mukaji ulela muana wa bakaji, neashale ne mikiya mbingu ibidi, anu bu muyilaye mupie mikiya matuku ende a tshijila tshia bakaji. Kadi ashale kabidi nanku bua kudilongolola mu buvyele buende, too ne padi matuku makumi asambombu ne asambombu akumbana." 
Leviticus12:6 “Nanku padi matuku a kudilongolola ku buvyele akumbana, bua muana wa balume, nansha bua wa bakaji uvuaye mulele, mukaji awu aye kudi mutuangaji, imanyine ku mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Amupeshe muana wa mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue bua aulambule Maweja-Nangila, bu mulambu wa kuosha. Neamupeshe kabidi nkudimba nansha kamanda-nkutshi bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu." 
Leviticus12:7 Mutuangaji nealeje Maweja-Nangila milambu eyi, bua kulongolola muvyele awu ne kujikija buvyele buende. Amu kutuadija pa diba adi, mukaji awu kena kabidi ne mikiya ya buvyele to.” Ke munudi mua kuenzela mukaji yonsu padiye ulela muana wa balume, nansha wa bakaji." 
Leviticus12:8 “Kadi padi mukaji awu kayi mua kupeta muana wa mukoku, udi mua kufila nkudimba ibidi, nansha tumanda-nkutshi tubidi. Nyunyi umue ikale bu mulambu wa kuosha, mukuabu ikale bu mulambu wa kumukobolola nawu. Nanku padi mutuangaji ulambula bintu abi kudi Maweja-Nangila, buvyele bua mukaji buajiki.”" 
Leviticus13:1 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Leviticus13:2 “Padi muntu ne tshiuja pambidi, nansha muaba muwule, nansha muikale ne dikeji ditoke, dimueneka bu disama dia nsudi, baye ne muntu awu kudi mutuangaji Arone, nansha kudi umue wa ku ndelanganyi yende." 
Leviticus13:3 Mutuangaji neakenkete muaba udi disama. Pikale boya bua muaba awu butokoloke, kabidi muaba awu mondoke, mutuangaji neajadike ne: muntu awu udi ne disama dia nsudi. Neambe ne: muntu ewu udi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus13:4 Kadi padi muntu awu ne dikeji ditoke pambidi, mputa kayi mondoke, kabidi boya kabuyi butokoloke, mutuangaji neumushe muntu awu munkatshi mua bantu. Amuteke pa nkayende matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:5 Nanku dituku dia muanda mutekete, mutuangaji neakenkete muntu awu kabidi. Padiye umona ne: disama didi amu muvuadi, kadiena ditampakane mubidi mujima, neateke kabidi muntu awu pa nkayende matuku muanda mutekete makuabu." 
Leviticus13:6 Pashishe, dituku dia muanda mutekete, mutuangaji neakonkonone muntu awu tshiakabidi. Padiye usangana dikeji dienda dikepela, kadiyi ditampakane pambidi, mutuangaji neajadike ne: muntu awu uvua amu ne tshiuja. Mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu awu kena ne mikiya to. Nanku muntu awu neasukule amu bilamba biende bua kikadi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus13:7 Padi mutuangaji mumane kuteta muntu, mumusangane ne: kena ne mikiya, kadi pashishe dikeji didi dituadija kutampakana pambidi, muntu awu neapingane tshiakabidi kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus13:8 Mutuangaji neamukenkete tshiakabidi. Padiye umona ne: dikeji didi dienda ditampakana pa dikoba, neambe ne: muntu ewu udi ne mikiya, bualu tshidiye natshi ndisama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:9 “Muntu yonsu udi ne disama difuanangane ne dia nsudi, nebamufile kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus13:10 Mutuangaji neamukenkete. Padiye ne tshiuja, kabidi padi boya bua muaba awu butokoloke, mputa upatuka tufina," 
Leviticus13:11 mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu udi ne mikiya, bualu neikale ne disama diende adi misangu ne misangu. Nanku kabena ne bua kumuteka pa nkayende to. Bualu mbimueneke patoke ne: udi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus13:12 Kadi padi mutuangaji umona ne: muntu ewu udi ne mpusu mubidi mujima, ku mutu too ne ku makasa," 
Leviticus13:13 neamukenkete menemene. Padiye umona mpusu mitampakane mubidi mujima, neambe ne: muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya, bualu mubidi wende mujima mmuandamuke mutoke." 
Leviticus13:14 Kadi dituku didi mputa umueneka, upatuka tufina, muntu awu neikale ne mikiya." 
Leviticus13:15 Mutuangaji udi ukenketa miaba idi mputa. Padiye umona ipatuka tufina, neambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya. Bualu mputa udi upatuka tufina mushindu ewu, udi ne mikiya, uleja disama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:16 Padi mputa awu utokoloka tshiakabidi, muntu neaye kudileja kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus13:17 Mutuangaji neamukenkete. Padiye umona ne: mputa mmutokoloke tshiakabidi, neambe ne: mputa wa mushindu ewu kena ne mikiya to. Nanku muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya nansha." 
Leviticus13:18 “Padi muntu mushale ne tshibangu tshia tshiuja pambidi," 
Leviticus13:19 padi tshibangu tshiuwula tshiakabidi, nansha dikeji ditokoloke dimueneka mu tshibangu atshi, muntu awu aye kudileja kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus13:20 Padi mutuangaji umona ne: tshibangu ntshiondoke, kabidi boya bua muaba awu mbutokoloke, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya. Bualu udi ne disama dia nsudi, dimuenekela mu tshibangu tshia tshiwuja." 
Leviticus13:21 Pamona mutuangaji ne: boya bua muaba awu kabuena butokoloke, kabidi tshibangu katshiena tshiondoke, tshibangu atshi tshidi anu tshimpe, neateke muntu awu pa nkayende matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:22 Pashishe pikale dikeji ditampakane pambidi ponsu, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya, bualu udi ne disama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:23 Kadi padi dikeji kadiyi ditampakana pambidi ponsu, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu awu kena mupie mikiya to. Udi amu ne tshibangu tshia tshiuwuja." 
Leviticus13:24 “Kadi padi muntu ne mputa wa kapia pambidi, tshibangu tshia mputa awu tshikale tshitokoloke, nansha tshikunzubile," 
Leviticus13:25 mutuangaji neakenkete muaba udi disama. Padi tshibangu atshi tshiondoke, boya bua muaba awu butokoloke, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya, bualu disama dia nsudi ndimuenekela mu tshibangu tshia mputa wa kapia." 
Leviticus13:26 Kadi padi mutuangaji umona ne: mu tshibangu kamuena boya butokoloke, kabidi katshiena tshiondoke, tshidi anu tshimpe, neateke muntu ewu pa nkayende matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:27 Padi dituku dia muanda mutekete dikumbana, mutuangaji mumone ne: muntu awu udi ne disama mubidi mujima, ambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya, bualu udi ne disama dia nsudi." 
Leviticus13:28 Kadi padi dikeji adi dikale anu muadi muvuadi, kadiyi ditampakane pambidi ponsu, mutuangaji ambe ne: muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya to. Udi amu ne tshibangu tshia mputa wa kapia." 
Leviticus13:29 “Padi muntu mulume nansha mukaji muikale ne bilundu ku mutu, nansha ne mputa ku tshibanga," 
Leviticus13:30 mutuangaji amukenkete. Padi mputa awu mondoke, kabidi boya bua muaba awu bukunzubile, buenda butuka, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu mmupie mikiya, bualu udi ne disama dia nsudi ku mutu nansha ku tshibanga." 
Leviticus13:31 Kadi padi mutuangaji umona ne: mputa awu kena mondoke, kabidi muaba awu kawena boya bukunze, nenku mutuangaji anji kuteka muntu awu pa nkayende matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:32 Padi mutuangaji ukenketa tshiakabidi muntu awu dituku dia muanda mutekete, usangana disama kadiyi ditampakane muntu mubidi mujima, kayi ne boya butokoloke, nansha mputa mondoke," 
Leviticus13:33 muntu awu neakungule mu mutu, ashiye miaba idi mputa ya bilundu. Pashishe, mutuangaji amuteke pa nkayende matuku makuabu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:34 Padi matuku awu muanda mutekete ajika, mutuangaji neakenkete muntu awu tshiakabidi. Padiye usangana mputa ya bilundu kayiyi mitampakane mutu mujima, kayiyi miondoke, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya to. Nanku muntu uvua ne disama, neasukule anu bilamba biende bua kikadi ne mikiya to." 
Leviticus13:35 Kadi padi mutuangaji mumane kuamba ne: muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya, pashishe mputa ya bilundu imueneka kabidi mu mutu," 
Leviticus13:36 mutuangaji neakenkete musangu muibidi. Padi mputa mitampakane mutu mujima, mutuangaji kena ne bua kutangila boya to. Bualu biamueneki patoke ne: muntu awu mmupie mikiya." 
Leviticus13:37 Kadi padi mputa ya bilundu kayiyi mitampakane, kabidi boya bukunze butoloke muaba awu, mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu ewu kena mupie mikiya to, bualu disama diende ndimane kujika." 
Leviticus13:38 “Padi muntu mulume nansha mukaji muikale ne makeji matokoloke pambidi," 
Leviticus13:39 mutuangaji neamukenkete. Padiye usangana makeji mikale ne mubidi muimpe, disama adi kadiena dikole to. Nanku muntu awu kena mupie mikiya to." 
Leviticus13:40 “Padi muntu ne dibala mutu mujima, kena mupie mikiya to." 
Leviticus13:41 Padi nsuki ya pa lubombu ituka, upeta dibala muaba awu, kena mupie mikiya to." 
Leviticus13:42 Kadi padi mu dibala dia ku dikoshi nansha mu lubombu mumuenekela dikeji dikunzubile, atshi ndisama dia nsudi didi dituadija." 
Leviticus13:43 Mutuangaji amukenkete. Padiye umona mputa mu dibala mukunzubile, mufuanangane ne wa disama dia nsudi," 
Leviticus13:44 mutuangaji neambe ne: muntu awu mmupie mikiya, bualu disama dia nsudi ndimukuate ku mutu." 
Leviticus13:45 “Muntu yonsu udi ne disama dia nsudi, udi ne bua kuvuala bilamba bipandike. Kena mua kuasa tshifulu ku mutu to. Abuikile kuinshi kua mpala. Ele amu mbila ne: ‘Ndi mupie mikiya! Ndi mupie mikiya!’" 
Leviticus13:46 Matuku onsu adi muntu awu ne disama, udi mupie amu mikiya. Nanku udi ne bua kumuka mu mitanda, kuya kusomba pa nkayende." 
Leviticus13:47 “Padi butu bukuata ku bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama, nansha ku bia ndanda," 
Leviticus13:48 nansha ku bilamba bia pambidi bienza ne miosa ya nyama, nansha ne ndanda, nansha ku bilamba bia biseba, nansha ku bintu bienza ne biseba," 
Leviticus13:49 padi makeji awu amueneka makunzubile, nansha a mayi a matamba, mutuangaji neakenkete butu abu." 
Leviticus13:50 Mutuangaji mumane kukenketa tshintu tshidi ne makeji, neatshiteke pa nkayatshi matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus13:51 Padi dituku dia muanda mutekete dikumbana, mutuangaji udi ukenketa dikeji tshiakabidi. Padidi ditampakane ku tshintu tshijima, udi ujadika ne: tshintu atshi ntshipie mikiya, bualu utshikuate butu budi kabuyi mua kumusha." 
Leviticus13:52 Nanku, mutuangaji udi osha tshilamba atshi, nansha tshiotshi tshilamba tshia mushindu kaayi, nansha tshiotshi tshia pambidi, nansha tshiotshi tshienza ne miosa ya nyama, nansha tshienza ne ndanda, nansha tshiotshi tshia biseba. Bu mudi butu kabuyi mua kumusha, boshe tshintu atshi." 
Leviticus13:53 Kadi padi mutuangaji utshikenketa, umona ne: dikeji adi kadiena ditampakane tshintu tshijima," 
Leviticus13:54 udi utuma diyi bua basukule tshintu atshi. Batshiteke kabidi pa nkayatshi matuku muanda mutekete makuabu. 
Leviticus13:55 Pashishe, mutuangaji neatshikenkete kabidi. Padiye umona ne: dikeji adi ndishale anu mushindu umue, nansha kadiyi ditampakane, udi wamba ne: tshintu etshi ntshipie mikiya. Mutuangaji neatshioshe, nansha butu bukuate luseke lumue." 
Leviticus13:56 Kadi padibu basukule tshintu atshi, dikeji dishale dimueneka kakese, mutuangaji neakose anu muaba udi dikeji awu." 
Leviticus13:57 Pashishe padi butu bukuate ku tshintu atshi, dikeji dimueneka tshiakabidi, neboshe tshintu atshi." 
Leviticus13:58 “Padibu basukula tshintu atshi, dikeji dijika, batshisukulule musangu muibidi, bua tshishale katshiyi ne mikiya.”" 
Leviticus13:59 Ke mikenji idi itangila bintu bikuate butu, nansha biobi bienza ne miosa ya nyama, nansha bienza ne ndanda, nansha bilamba bikuabu bia pambidi, nansha bienza ne biseba. Mikenji eyi idi yambuluisha bua kujadika ne bintu ebi mbipie mikiya, nansha kabiena biyipia." 
Leviticus14:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus14:2 “Bua nuenu kukobolola muntu uvua ne nsudi, nuye nende kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus14:3 Mutuangaji umuke ne muntu awu mu mitanda, aye kujadika mushindu udi disama. Padi disama diende dijika," 
Leviticus14:4 mutuangaji neatume diyi bua batuale nyunyi ibidi ya muoyi idi kayiyi ne mikiya, mitshi ya sedre, bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama bilaba kakula, ne mabeji a mutshi wa isope." 
Leviticus14:5 Mutuangaji atume diyi bua bakosele muminu wa nyunyi umue pa luesu lua dibumba, luikale ne mayi a mu mpokolu." 
Leviticus14:6 Pashishe neangate mitshi ya sedre, bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama bilaba kakula, mabeji a mutshi wa isope pamue ne nyunyi uvua mushale ne muoyi. Abitue mu mashi adi mu luesu a nyunyi uvuabu bakose muminu." 
Leviticus14:7 Pashishe amiamine mashi awu pambidi pa muena nsudi misangu muanda mutekete bua kumukobolola, wamba ne: ‘Muntu ewu kena ne mikiya.’ Nenku mutuangaji alekele nyunyi uvua mushale ne muoyi, aye mu tshisuku." 
Leviticus14:8 Muena nsudi uvuabu bakobolola awu, asukule bilamba biende, akungule nsuki ne boya buonsu, wowe mayi adi umusha mikiya. Pashishe apingane mu mitanda. Kadi ashale matuku muanda mutekete kayi ubuela mu ntenta wende." 
Leviticus14:9 Dituku dia muanda mutekete, muena nsudi awu asukule bilamba biende, akungule nsuki, miedi, makiki ne boya buonsu budi pambidi pende. Pashishe wowe mayi. Nanku kena kabidi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus14:10 “Dituku dia muanda mukulu, muena nsudi awu, afile bana ba mikoku babidi badi kabayi ne bulema, ne lukungulu lua mukoku lua tshidimu tshimue kaluyi bulema. Afile kabidi kilo tshitema ya bukula bua mulambu busambakaja ne mafuta, ne tshitupa tshia litre tshia makuabu mafuta." 
Leviticus14:11 Mutuangaji imanyike muena nsudi awu ne bintu biende bionsu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus14:12 Pashishe mutuangaji udi wangata muana wa mukoku umue, bu mulambu wa dinua tshibalu, ne tshitupa tshia litre tshia makuabu mafuta, abiele mulu, abinyukule." 
Leviticus14:13 Akosele muana wa mukoku awu muminu anu muaba wa tshijila, udibu bakosela nyama miminu ya milambu ya kuosha ne ya kukobolola nayi bantu. Nanku, bintu bia mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu ne bia mulambu wa dinua tshibalu, nebabiangate kudi mutuangaji, bualu mbintu bia tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus14:14 Mutuangaji neangate mashi a nyama wa milambu, aalabe muntu udi udikobolola awu ku lusongu lua ditshi, ku tshiala ne ku muana nkasa munene bia luseke lua dia balume." 
Leviticus14:15 Mutuangaji neangate kabidi mafuta, aele mu tshianza tshiende tshia luseke lua dia bakaji." 
Leviticus14:16 Pashishe atue munu wende wa tshianza tshia balume, udi ulonda tshiala, mu mafuta adi mu tshianza tshiende tshia bakaji, amiamine mafuta awu ne munu misangu muanda mutekete kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus14:17 Nanku mafuta adi mashale mu tshianza awu, mutuangaji neaalabe muntu udi udikobolola miaba iwaye mulabe mashi a mukoku wa mulambu wa dinua tshibalu: ku lusongu lua ditshi, ku tshiala, ne ku muana nkasa munene bia luseke luende lua dia balume." 
Leviticus14:18 Kadi mafuta makuabu adi mashale mu tshianza, mutuangaji neaele muntu awu mu mutu bua kumukobolola, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus14:19 Mutuangaji neambule mulambu wa kukobolola nawu muntu awu. Pashishe neamuenzele bionsu bidi bikengela bua muntu kikadi ne mikiya. Nanku neakose muminu wa nyama wa mulambu wa kuosha.
