Leviticus14:20 Neamoshile mujima pa tshilambuilu pamue ne bukula. Musangu wa ndekelu neajikije bionsu bidi bikengela bua muntu ashale kayi ne mikiya. 
Leviticus14:21 “Padi disama dia nsudi dikuata mupela, mupange bintu bionsu ebi, alambule anu muana wa mukoku umue bu mulambu wa dinua tshibalu, udibu balambula Maweja-Nangila bua kudikobolola. Alambule kabidi kilo isatu ya bukula busambakaja ne mafuta, kabidi ne mafuta tshitupa tshia litre." 
Leviticus14:22 Angata kabidi nkudimba ibidi nansha tumanda-nkutshi tubidi. Nyunyi umue ikale bua mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu, mukuabu bua mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus14:23 Dituku dia muanda mukulu, muntu udi udikobolola awu, neafile bintu ebi kudi mutuangaji kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus14:24 Pashishe mutuangaji neangate muana wa mukoku ne mafuta. Neabiele mulu, abinyukule kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus14:25 Mutuangaji akose muana wa mukoku muminu, angate mashi, aalabe ku lusongu lua ditshi lua muntu awu, ku tshiala ne ku muana nkasa munene bia ku luseke lua dia balume dia muntu, udi udikobolola awu." 
Leviticus14:26 Mutuangaji ele mafuta mu tshianza tshiende tshia bakaji," 
Leviticus14:27 pashishe atue munu wende watshianza tshia balume, udi mulonde tshiala mu mafuta adi mu tshianza tshia bakaji, amiamine mafuta awu ne munu wende misangu muanda mutekete kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus14:28 Nanku mafuta adi mashale mu tshianza awu, mutuangaji aalabe kabidi makese muntu, udi udikobolola awu, miaba ivuaye mulabe mashi a nyama wa mulambu, ku lusongu lua ditshi, ku tshiala ne ku muana nkasa munene bia luseke luende lua dia balume." 
Leviticus14:29 Kadi mafuta makuabu adi mashale mu tshianza, mutuangaji aele mu mutu wa muntu udi udikobolola, bua ajikije mikiya yonsu, amuenzele bionsu bidi bikengela bua muntu ashale kayi ne mikiya kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus14:30 Mutuangaji angate nyunyi umue wa ku idi muntu mufile, kamanda-nkutshi nansha nkudimba," 
Leviticus14:31 alambule nyunyi umue bu mulambu wa kudikobolola, mukuabu bu mulambu wa kuosha. Mutuangaji alambule mulambu awu pamue ne mulambu wa bukula. Ajikije mikiya yonsu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua muntu ashale kayi ne mikiya.”" 
Leviticus14:32 Mikenji eyi idi itangila muntu yonsu udi ne disama dia nsudi, kadi kayi ne mushindu wa kupeta bintu bia tshibidilu bia kudikobolola nabi." 
Leviticus14:33 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Leviticus14:34 “Panuikala bafike mu ditunga dia Kenaane dindi munupeshe, pandi mmuenesha butu mu nzubu wa muntu mu ditunga adi dipiadipia," 
Leviticus14:35 muena nzubu awu aye kuambila mutuangaji ne: ndi mumone ditoba dia butu mu nzubu muanyi. 
Leviticus14:36 Mutuangaji kayi muanji kubuela mu nzubu amu bua kutangila mudiye mukuate butu, neatume diyi bua bapatule bintu bionsu bivua mu nzubu. Padiye muenza nanku, bintu bionsu bivua mu nzubu nebishale kabiyi bipie mikiya to. Pashishe mutuangaji neabuele mu nzubu bua kukenketa mushindu udi ditoba." 
Leviticus14:37 Padi ditoba didi ku tshimana dikale dikunze nansha difike, kabidi diumbule tshimana," 
Leviticus14:38 mutuangaji apatuke, injile, akange ku nzubu aku matuku muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus14:39 Padi dituku dia muanda mutekete dikumbana, mutuangaji apingane kabidi bua kukenketa mushindu udi ditoba. Padi ditoba adi ditampakane ku tshimana," 
Leviticus14:40 mutuangaji atume diyi, balamune mabue adi makuate butu awu. Baye kuimansha ku mpenga kua tshimenga muaba wa bintu bibi." 
Leviticus14:41 Pashishe neatume diyi bua bakone ku bimana bionsu bia munda mua nzubu, baye kuimansha bionsu bidibu bakone abi ku mpenga kua tshimenga, muaba wa bintu bibi." 
Leviticus14:42 Nenku, nebapingaje mabue makuabu, basunguile tshiakabidi miaba ivua mabue ayi." 
Leviticus14:43 “Kadi padibu bamane kulamuna mabue a nzubu awu ne matoba avuaku, bakone bimana babishinguila, kadi nzubu awu mukuate kabidi butu," 
Leviticus14:44 mutuangaji neaye kukenketa kabidi mushindu udi ditoba. Padi ditaba adi dimueneka menemene, nunku neajadike ne nzubu udi mupie mikiya, bualu kakuena mushindu wa kumusha butu abu to." 
Leviticus14:45 Nebupule nzubu awu, bumushe bintu bionsu bivua bimuibaka nabi: mabue, mabaya ne bionsu bivua bishinguila nabi. Nebimanshe bintu abi ku mpenga kua tshimenga muaba wa bintu bibi." 
Leviticus14:46 “Muntu yonsu udi ubuela mu nzubu awu matuku avuabu bamuinjile, bamukange, neapie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus14:47 Muntu yonsu udi ulala mu nzubu awu, nansha udilamu biakudia, udi ne bua kusukula bilamba biende." 
Leviticus14:48 “Padibu bamane kushinguila nzubu awu, mutuangaji usangana butu kabuyi bumueneka tshiakabidi, neambe ne: nzubu ewu kena mupie mikiya to, bualu butu mbujike buonsu." 
Leviticus14:49 “Bua kujikija mikiya ya mu nzubu awu, mutuangaji angate nyunyi ibidi, mitshi ya sedre, bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama bilaba kakula, ne mabeji a mutshi wa isope." 
Leviticus14:50 Akosele muminu wa nyunyi umue pa luesu lua dibumba, luikale ne mayi a mpokolu." 
Leviticus14:51 Pashishe mutuangaji neangate nyunyi udi mushale ne muoyi, mitshi ya sedre, bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama bilaba kakula, ne mabeji a mutshi wa isope. Neabitue mu mashi a nyunyi uvuaye mukose muminu, ne mu mayi a mpokolu adi mu luesu. Neamiamine mashi awu ne mayi mu nzubu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus14:52 Bua kujikija mikiya ya nzubu awu, mutuangaji neangate nanku mashi a nyunyi, mayi a mpokolu, nyunyi uvua mushale ne muoyi, mitshi ya sedre, bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama bilaba kakula, ne mabeji a mutshi wa isope." 
Leviticus14:53 Nenku mutuangaji neapatuke mu tshimenga ne nyunyi uvua mushale ne muoyi, amulekele, abuke, aye mu tshisuku. Ke mushindu udiye ujikija mikiya ku nzubu nanku.”" 
Leviticus14:54 Mikenji eyi idi itangila disama dia nsudi dia mishindu yonsu: kababa," 
Leviticus14:55 biwuja, muaba muwule, dikeji ditoke pambidi pa muntu," 
Leviticus14:56 butu budi bukuate pa bilamba, nansha ku nzubu." 
Leviticus14:57 Mikenji eyi idi ijadika mudibu mua kusunguluja bantu nansha bintu bidi ne mikiya, ne bidi kabiyi nayi." 
Leviticus15:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone bua 
Leviticus15:2 bamanyishe bena Izrayele ne: “Padi muntu mulume mupete disama ku butaka buende, tufina tupatukamu, muntu awu mmupie mikiya." 
Leviticus15:3 Nanku padi tufina atu tupatuka, nansha tupatakaja mubidi wende awu, tufina atu tudi ne mikiya, tudi lukuatshisha kabidi muntu mikiya." 
Leviticus15:4 Muaba onsu udi muntu awu usomba, nansha bulalu budiye ulala, bidi anu bipia mikiya." 
Leviticus15:5 Kabidi muntu yonsu udi ulenga bulalu abu, asukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:6 Muntu yonsu udi usomba pa tshintu tshivua muena disama musombe, neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:7 Muntu yonsu udi ulenga muena disama adi, neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:8 Padi mate a muena disama amatshila muntu udi kayi ne mikiya, muntu awu asukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:9 Padi muena disama edi musombe pa tshiseba tshia kabalu, tshiseba etshi netshikale tshipie mikiya." 
Leviticus15:10 Muntu yonsu udi ulenga tshintu tshivua muena disama edi musombe, neapie mikiya too ne ku dilolu. Kabidi muntu yonsu udi wambula tshintu tshivua muena disama edi musombe, neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:11 Padi muena disama edi kayi muanji kuowa mayi ku bianza, ulenga muntu mukuabu, udiye mulenge awu wowe mayi, asukule bilamba biende. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:12 Kadi luesu lua dibumba luvua muena disama adi mulenge, nebaluzaze. Luvu luvuaye mulenge, nebalukone ne mayi mavule." 
Leviticus15:13 “Diba didi tufina, tuvua tupatuka, tupisha muntu awu mikiya, tujika, muntu awu udi ne bua kushala muindile matuku muanda mutekete bua mikiya yende kujika payi. Nanku asukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi a mpokolu bua mikiya kujikayi." 
Leviticus15:14 Padi dituku dia muanda mukulu dikumbana, udi wangata nkudimba ibidi, nansha tumanda-nkutshi tubidi, ubipeshila mutuangaji mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus15:15 Pashishe mutuangaji udi ulambula nyunyi umue bua mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu, ne nyunyi mukuabu bua mulambu wa kuosha. Ke mudi mutuangaji ujikija mikiya ya muntu nanku kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bua muntu kashadi ne mikiya ya dipatuka dia tufina." 
Leviticus15:16 “Padi muntu upatula biana, udi ne bua kuowa mayi mubidi mujima. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:17 Nenku bilamba bionsu, nansha biseba, bivua biana bimatshila, neabisukule ne mayi. Kadi nebikale bipie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:18 “Padi mulume mubuelele mukaji mu nzubu, bonsu babidi nebowe mayi mubidi mujima. Kadi nebikale bapie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:19 “Padi mukaji ku tshijila tshia bakaji, mashi apatuka mu mubidi wende, udi ushala mupie mikiya matuku muanda mutekete. Muntu yonsu udi umulenga, udi upia mikiya, ushala nayi too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:20 Nanku muaba onsu uvua mukaji awu musombe, nansha bulalu buvuaye mulale pawaye ku tshijila tshia bakaji, bidi bipia mikiya." 
Leviticus15:21 Muntu yonsu udi ulenga bulalu buvua mukaji awu mulale," 
Leviticus15:22 nansha tshintu tshionsu tshivua mukaji awu musombe, asukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:23 Muntu yonsu udi ulenga tshintu tshivua pa bulalu bua mukaji awu, nansha tshivua pa muaba uvuaye musombe, neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:24 Padi muntu ubuelela mukaji awu mu nzubu, mu matuku atshidiye ku tshijila tshia bakaji, muntu awu udi upia mikiya ivua nayi mukaji awu. Kabidi udi uyipia matuku muanda mutekete, uyipisha ne bulalu buonsu budiye ulala." 
Leviticus15:25 “Padi mukaji umona tshijila tshia bakaji matuku mavule, katshiyi pa diba diatshi, nansha padiye ushala ku tshijila upitshisha matuku ende a tshibidilu, matuku awu onsu udi anu ne mikiya, bu muvuaye nayi mu matuku ende a tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Leviticus15:26 Pashishe bulalu budi mukaji awu ulala, nansha muaba onsu udiye usomba, nebikale ne mikiya, anu bu mudibi nayi padiye ku tshijila mu matuku ende a tshibidilu." 
Leviticus15:27 Muntu udi ulenga bulalu abu, nansha muaba uvuaye usomba, udi ne bua kusukula bilamba biende, kuowa mayi. Kadi mmupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Leviticus15:28 “Diba didi tshijila atshi tshijika, mukaji indile matuku muanda mutekete, bua mikiya ijike." 
Leviticus15:29 Kadi dituku dia muanda mukulu, mukaji awu angate nkudimba ibidi nansha tumanda-nkutshi tubidi, abipeshile mutuangaji mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus15:30 Mutuangaji alambule nyunyi umue bua mulambu wa kukobolola nawu muntu, nyunyi mukuabu bua mulambu wa kuosha. Pashishe neajikije mikiya ya mukaji awu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bua kumukobolola ku mikiya ya tshijila tshiende tshia bakaji." 
Leviticus15:31 “Nuambile bena Izrayele bonsu badi bapia mikiya ne: ‘Kanusemenyi pabuipi ne muaba wa tshijila.’ Bualu padibu bapia mikiya, badi mua kunyanga ntenta undi musombe munkatshi muabu, kupeta njiwu ya lulu.”" 
Leviticus15:32 Mikenji eyi idi itangila muntu mulume udi ne disama dia tufina, nansha udi ne biana bipatuka mu butaka, bimupisha mikiya." 
Leviticus15:33 Idi itangila kabidi mukaji udi umona tshijila tshia bakaji, nansha mulume udi ubuelela mukaji mu nzubu patshidiye mu matuku ende a tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Leviticus16:1 Bana babidi ba Arone bamane kufua pavuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa manananshi avua kaayi a tshijila, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne:" 
Leviticus16:2 “Ambila muanenu Arone kabuedi tshibuelabuela muaba wa tshijila menemene, panyima pa tshilamba tshidi tshijika mushete wa tshijila ne tshibuikidiji tshiawu to. Bualu yeye mubuele nanku, udi mua kufua musangu undi lumuenekela mu muinshi, udi pa mutu pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete." 
Leviticus16:3 “Nenku bua kubuelaye muaba awu, ikale ne ngombe mulume bua mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne mukoku wa tshimpanga bua mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus16:4 Arone udi ne bua kuvuala muntumpu muenza ne buanda bua ndanda, kaputula ka muinshi ka buanda bua ndanda. Neasuike kabidi mukaba wa buanda bua ndanda, uvuala ne tshifulu tshienza ne buanda bua ndanda. Kadi, mudi bilamba ebi bia tshijila, udi ne bua kubivuala amu yeye muanji kuowa mayi." 
Leviticus16:5 Bena Izrayele nebamupe mbuji ibidi ya mpumbu ya mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue bua mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus16:6 “Arone nealambule ngombe mulume bua kudikobolola, pashishe neakobolole kabidi bena diku diende." 
Leviticus16:7 Pashishe neangate mbuji ibidi ya mpumbu, ayimanyike kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Leviticus16:8 Ku mbuji ibidi ya mpumbu ayi, Arone neatshinke bua kumanya mbuji udi wa Maweja-Nangila, ne mbuji udi wa Azazele." 
Leviticus16:9 Padiye ujadika ne mbuji ewu ngua Maweja-Nangila, udi umulambula bua mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu." 
Leviticus16:10 Kadi mbuji udiye umona ne ngua Azazele, neajikije nende mibi. Amuimanyike ne muoyi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bangabanga ne kumuipata bua kuyaye kudi Azazele mu tshipela." 
Leviticus16:11 “Arone neafike ne ngombe mulume udiye udikobolola nende. Neenze bionsu bidi bikengela bua kudikobolola, kukobolola ne bena diku diende. Pashishe neakose ngombe awu muminu." 
Leviticus16:12 Neambule makala a kapia adi pa tshilambuilu tshia muaba wa tshijila, ela mu mbabula. Neambule manza abidi a musenga wa manananshi. Neaye ne bionsu ebi panyima pa tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja muaba wa tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus16:13 Muaba awu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, neele musenga wa manananshi mu mbabula. Muinshi wa manananshi awu, neubuikile mushete wa ndondu ne tshibuikidiji tshiawu. Nanku Arone kakufua to." 
Leviticus16:14 Arone atue munu mu mashi a ngombe mulume awu, aamiamine pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete wa ndondu luseke ludi diba dipatukila luatshi. Atue kabidi munu, amiamine mashi kumpala kua mushete awu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus16:15 Pashishe neakose muminu wa mbuji wa mpumbu bua mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Angata mashi a mbuji awu, aye nawu muaba wa tshijila menemene, panyima pa tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja. Aamiamine pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete ne kumpala kua mushete, bu nuwuaye muenze ne mashi a ngombe mulume." 
Leviticus16:16 Padi Arone ufika muaba wa tshijila menemene, udi wenza bionsu bidi bikengela bua kujikija mikiya ivua muaba awu, bua buntomboji ne bubi bua bena Izrayele. Pashishe muaba udi mushale wa ntenta wa kusambakena, Arone neenze anu mushindu umue, bualu ntenta mmuase munkatshi mua bantu badi bapia mikiya." 
Leviticus16:17 Padi Arone ubuela muaba wa tshijila menemene, bua kulambula milambu ya kujikija nayi mikiya ya muaba wa tshijila, muntu mukuabu nansha umue kikadi mu ntenta wa kusambakena too ne padi Arone upatuka. Padi Arone mumane kuenza bionsu bidi bikengela bua kudikobolola ne kukobolola bena diku diende pamue ne bena Izrayele bonsu," 
Leviticus16:18 neapatuke mu ntenta, asemena ku tshilambuilu tshidi kumpala kua ntenta. Neenze bionsu bidi bikengela bua kujikija mikiya idi ku tshilambuilu. Pashishe neangate mashi makese a ngombe mulume ne a mbuji wa mpumbu, aamiamine ku matumba adi matalame adi ku tshilambuilu." 
Leviticus16:19 Neatue munu mu mashi awu, aamiamine ku tshilambuilu atshi misangu muanda mutekete, bua kujikija mikiya ivuaku, bua bubi bua bena Izrayele ne bua kutshijidila tshiakabidi." 
Leviticus16:20 “Diba didi Arone ujikija kujidila muaba wa tshijila menemene, ne muaba udi mushale wa ntenta wa kusambakena ne tshilambuilu, neangate mbuji wa mpumbu uvua mushale ne muoyi." 
Leviticus16:21 Atenteke bianza biende bibidi pa mutu pa mbuji awu, utonda pambidi pende mibi yonsu, buntomboji ne buenzayi bua bena Izrayele. Udi ubiumpuila mbuji awu. Pashishe badi basungula muntu udi ne bua kuipata mbuji awu, kumutuma mu tshipela." 
Leviticus16:22 Mbuji awu neaye ne bibawu bionsu bia bantu mu tshipela. “Diakamue padibu bipata mbuji awu uya mu tshipela," 
Leviticus16:23 Arone neabuele mu ntenta wa kusambakena, avula bilamba bia ndanda bivuaye muvuale, pawaye muaba wa tshijila menemene, abishiye anu mu ntenta amu." 
Leviticus16:24 Arone aye muaba kampande wa tshijila, wowe mayi pambidi, avuale bilamba bikuabu. Pashishe apatuke, alambule Maweja-Nangila milambu ibidi ya kuosha, buende yeye ne bua bena Izrayele. Pashishe neadikobolole, akobolole ne bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Leviticus16:25 Pashishe neoshile mafuta a nyama ya milambu ya kudikobolola nayi pa tshilambuilu. 
Leviticus16:26 “Nenku muntu uvua muye kushiya mbuji wa mpumbu wa Azazele mu tshipela, bangabanga ne kupingana mu mitanda, anji kusukula bilamba, wowe mayi." 
Leviticus16:27 Ngombe mulume ne mbuji bivuabu balambula bua kudikobolola, biena mashi avuabu bangate bua kujikija mikiya ya miaba ya tshijila, nebapatuke nabi mu mitanda bua kuosha tshiseba, munyinyi ne bia munda." 
Leviticus16:28 Muntu uvua muye kuosha bintu abi, neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi pambidi bua kupingana mu mitanda." 
Leviticus16:29 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, umvuayi mukenji unudi ne bua kulama kashidi: matuku dikumi a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, nuenu, bana benu ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu, nujile biakudia. Kanuena kabidi mua kukuata mudimu." 
Leviticus16:30 Bualu dituku edi, ke didibu banukobolola, bajikija mikiya yenu. Nanku mpindiewu kanuena kabidi ne bubi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila to." 
Leviticus16:31 Dituku edi ndia dikisha menemene, dinudi nujila biakudia. Nulame mukenji ewu kashidi." 
Leviticus16:32 “Mu matuku avuavua, mutuangaji udibu balaba mafuta, bamujidila bua kupingana tatuende ku mudimu wa mutuangaji munene, ke udi mua kunukobolola, kujikija mikiya yenu. Neavuale bilamba bia tshijila bienza ne ndanda," 
Leviticus16:33 bua alambule mulambu wa kujikija mikiya muaba wa tshijila menemene, ntenta wa kusambakena, ne tshilambuilu. Pashishe, neenze bionsu bidi bikengela bua kukobolola batuangaji ne bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Leviticus16:34 “Mukenji ewu, nuulame kashidi bua kukobolola bena Izrayele musangu umue ku tshidimu tshionsu bua mibi yabu yonsu ijike. Arone kukumbaja mudimu onsu uvua Maweja-Nangila mumufundile kudi Moshe." 
Leviticus17:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus17:2 ambila Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne bena Izrayele bonsu ne: 
Leviticus17:3 “Padi muena Izrayele musue kushipa ngombe, mukoku, mbuji mu mitanda nansha ku mpenga kuayi," 
Leviticus17:4 udi ne bua kufika ne nyama ayi ku mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena bua ayilambule Maweja-Nangila kumpala kua nzubu wende wa tshijila. Yeye kayi muenze nanku, mmuena tshibawu. Nenku nebamuipate mu bena Izrayele, bua mashi adiye mumatshishe panshi, kayi mulonde mikenji." 
Leviticus17:5 Nenku bilondeshile mudi mukenji awu, bena Izrayele kabatshiena mua kushipela nyama ku misoku. Kadi bayifile ne muoyi kudi mutuangaji mu mushiku wa ntenta, bua ayilambule Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa bobumue." 
Leviticus17:6 Mutuangaji amiamine mashi a nyama awu pa tshilambuilu tshidi kumpala kua ntenta. Pashishe, oshile munyinyi wa mafuta onsu pa tshilambuilu, bua wikale mulambu udi ne dipembu dimpe didi disankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus17:7 Nenku bena Izrayele nebalekele kulambula milambu yabu kudi mvidie ya dishima, idibu benzele mpingu mifuanangane ne mbuji ya mpumbu. Badi batendelela mvidie eyi mushindu mubi udi ukuatshisha bundu. Bena Izrayele balame mukenji ewu kashidi too ne ku ndelanganyi yabu yonsu." 
Leviticus17:8 “Diba didi muena Izrayele, nansha muenyi udi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, musue kufila mulambu wa kuosha nansha mulambu mukuabu," 
Leviticus17:9 udi ne bua kulambuila nyama awu ku mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Yeye kayi muenze nanku, nebamuipate mu bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus17:10 “Padi muena Izrayele nansha muenyi udi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, udia mashi a mushindu onsu, nanku Maweja-Nangila neamunyoke, amuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus17:11 Bualu muoyi wa tshintu udi mu mashi. Maweja-Nangila uvua munuambile bua kulambula mashi pa tshilambuilu bua amone mua kunufuila luse. Nanku mashi adi ambuluisha bua kujimija bubi, bualu adi apetesha muoyi." 
Leviticus17:12 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila mukandike bena Izrayele ne benyi badi basombe munkatshi muabu bua kabadi mashi to. 
Leviticus17:13 “Padi muena Izrayele, nansha muenyi udi musombe munkatshi muabu, ukuata nyama nansha nyunyi mu bulembi, wa ku idi bantu mua kudia, neele mashi ende panshi, aajibikile ne buloba." 
Leviticus17:14 Nenku, padi tshintu ne muoyi, muoyi udi mu mashi. Ke pavua Maweja-Nangila mukandike bena Izrayele bua kabadi mashi, bualu muoyi wa tshintu tshionsu udi mu mashi. Muntu udi udia mashi nebamuipate mu bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus17:15 “Padi muena Izrayele, nansha muenyi udi munkatshi muabu, udia munyinyi wa nyama mudifuile nansha mushipa kudi nyama mukuabu wa mu mpata, muntu awu neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi pambidi. Kadi neikale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu. Pashishe mikiya yende neyijike." 
Leviticus17:16 Kadi padiye kayi usukula bilamba biende, kayi wowa mayi pambidi, neapete tshibawu.”" 
Leviticus18:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe bua 
Leviticus18:2 amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: “Ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu! 
Leviticus18:3 Kanulondi bibidilu bia bena ditunga dia Ejipitu dinuvua basombe, nansha bia bena ditunga dia Kenaane dindi nnupesha. Kanulondi dikasa dia bantu aba to." 
Leviticus18:4 Kadi nulame meyi ne mikenji yanyi, bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus18:5 “Nulame mikenji yanyi ne meyi anyi. Muntu udi ubikumbaja, nebimupeteshe muoyi. Bualu ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus18:6 “Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba ne: muntu wa kunudi nansha umue, kena mua kubuelela mukaji wa mulela wende mu nzubu." 
Leviticus18:7 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mamuebe mu nzubu to, kufuisha tatuebe bundu. Udi ufuisha ne mamuebe bundu, bualu udi muledi webe." 
Leviticus18:8 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji mukuabu wa tatuebe mu nzubu to, bualu udi ufuisha tatuebe bundu." 
Leviticus18:9 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela muanenu wa bakaji wa tatuebe nansha wa mamuebe mu nzubu to, nansha bobu kabayi bamukoleshila mu diku dienu." 
Leviticus18:10 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela muikuluebe wa muanebe wa balume nansha wa muanebe wa bakaji mu nzubu to, bualu udi udiluisha amu bundu nkayebe." 
Leviticus18:11 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela muana wa bakaji wa mukaji wa tatuebe mu nzubu to, bualu mmuana wa tatuebe, kabidi mmuanenu." 
Leviticus18:12 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela tatuebe mukaji mu nzubu to, bualu mmuanabu ne tatuebe." 
Leviticus18:13 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mamuebe mukuabu mu nzubu to, bualu udi muanabu ne mamuebe." 
Leviticus18:14 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji wa tatuebe mukuabu mu nzubu to, kufuisha tatuebe mukuabu bundu, bualu ke mukajende." 
Leviticus18:15 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji wa muanebe mu nzubu to, bualu mmukaji wa muanebe." 
Leviticus18:16 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji wa muanenu mu nzubu to, bualu udi umuluisha bundu." 
Leviticus18:17 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji mu nzubu, kubuelela kabidi muanende wa bakaji, nansha muikuluende, muana wa bakaji wa muanende wa balume nansha wa muanende wa bakaji. Bia nanku mbuenzavi, bualu badi bantu bamue." 
Leviticus18:18 “Kuena ne bua kusela bukonde buebe, patshidi mukajebe ne muoyi to. Bia nanku nebikebeshe mikawu mu lubanza." 
Leviticus18:19 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji mu nzubu, patshidiye ku tshijila tshia bakaji to, bualu utshidi mupie mikiya." 
Leviticus18:20 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mukaji wa bana benu mu nzubu to, bualu udi upia mikiya." 
Leviticus18:21 “Kuena ne bua kulambula bana bebe kudi mvidie wa Moleke to, bualu udi upepeja dina dianyi. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus18:22 “Kuena ne bua kubuelela mulume nebe mu nzubu, bu mudibu babuelela mukaji to. Nngenzelu mubi udibu bakandika kashidi." 
Leviticus18:23 “Kuena ne bua kulala ne nyama to, bualu neupie mikiya. Kabidi muntu mukaji kena mua kulala ne nyama to. Muntu muenze nanku, udi unyanga mikenji." 
Leviticus18:24 “Kanuena ne bua kupia mikiya ku ngenzelu ya nanku to. Bualu bisamba bindi ngipata kumpala kuenu ebi, mbipie mikiya anu ku ngenzelu ya bundu ya mushindu ewu." 
Leviticus18:25 Nenku ditunga kabidi divua dimane kupia mikiya. Ke mumvua mudinyoke. Dikadi dibenga benadi. 
Leviticus18:26 “Kadi nuenu bena Izrayele too ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu, nulonde mikenji yanyi ne meyi anyi bindi nnupesha. Kanuenji malu mabi aa to." 
Leviticus18:27 Bualu bantu bavua badianjila kusomba mu ditunga edi, bavua benza buenzayi ebu, ditunga kupia mikiya." 
Leviticus18:28 Nenku nuenu bena Izrayele, kanuena mua kupisha kabidi ditunga mikiya nansha. Bualu ditunga didi mua kunubenga, bu muvuadi dibenga bantu bavua badianjila kuasamu." 
Leviticus18:29 Nanku bantu bonsu badi benza malu mabi a nenku, nebabipate mu bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus18:30 “Nenku Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, ndi ngamba ne: ‘Nutumikile mikenji yanyi, anu bu mundi munupayi. Kanuenji malu mabi, avuabu benza kudi bantu bavua badianjile kuasa mu ditunga edi. Nudilame bua kanupi mikiya.’ ”" 
Leviticus19:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus19:2 bua amanyishe bisamba bia bena Izrayele bionsu ne: “Nudi ne bua kuikala bantu ba tshijila, bualu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ndi wa tshijila." 
Leviticus19:3 “Muntu yonsu wa kunudi anemeke tatuende ne mamuende, kabidi anemeke dituku dia Dikisha. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:4 “Kanuena mua kutendelela mvidie ya dishima to. Kanuena mua kuengulula biamu bua kufula mpingu, kuyitendelela. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:5 “Panudi nundambula mulambu wa bobumue, nulonde mudi mikenji yawu bua meme kuwanyisha." 
Leviticus19:6 Nudi mua kudia munyinyi wa mulambu awu, dituku dinudi nulambula, ne didi dilonda. Kadi padiwu mushale too ne ku dituku disatu, nuwoshe mu kapia." 
Leviticus19:7 Pikala muntu muudie kabidi dituku disatu, tshiena mua kumuambuluisha to. Bualu munyinyi mmumane kunyanguka, kabayi mua kukuata kabidi nawu mudimu wa tshijila to." 
Leviticus19:8 Muntu udi muudie mmuena tshibawu, bualu mmunyange mulambu wanyi wa tshijila. Nebamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus19:9 “Panudi nunowa biakudia, kanuena mua kukosa too ne miepu idi kumpenga kua budimi to. Kabidi kanuena mua kupingana mu budimi bua kupumbulula binuvua bapue muoyi to." 
Leviticus19:10 Kanuena mua kupingana mu madimi enu bua kupumbulula tumuma tua mvinyo tunuvua bapue muoyi, nansha tuvua tumata panshi. Nubilekele bapela ne benyi. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:11 “Kanuibi. Nulekele dishima ne kudingila bena kuenu malu, bua kubakengesha." 
Leviticus19:12 Kanutshipi mutshipu wa dishima, nutela dina dianyi, to. Bualu nudi mua kupetula dina dianyi meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:13 “Kanukengeshi mukuenu. Kanuibi tshintu tshiende. Difutu dia muena mudimu webe dikale anu pa diba diadi, kuyi ulala nadi dituku nansha dimue." 
Leviticus19:14 Kanupendi muena mapapa. Kanuteki tshintu kumpala kua mpofu, bua adishinde panshi. Mu bionsu binudi nuenza, nuleje munudi nuntshina. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:15 “Kanulumbuluishi ne kansungansunga. Kanubingishi mupela nansha muena biuma, padiye mupile. Kadi nukose nsambu ya bana benu anu pa yoyi." 
Leviticus19:16 Kanujanyi bena diku dienu to. Kanufundi mukuenu ku tshilumbu tshidibu mua kumufundila tshibawu tshia lufu to. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Leviticus19:17 “Kanulaminyi muanenu lukuna. Kanutshinyi mua kubela muntu patoke bua tshilema tshiende, bua kanuikadi bonsu bena tshibawu." 
Leviticus19:18 Kanudisombuedi ne bana benu, kanujilanganyi nabu. Muntu yonsu wa kunudi anange muanabu, bu mudiye mudinange. Bualu Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus19:19 “Nulame kabidi mikenji eyi: Kanuteki mu bimuna bienu nyama ya mishindu ibidi mishilangane bua kulelanganayi. Kanumiaminyi mu madimi enu maminu a mishindu ibidi mishilangane. Kanuvuadi bilamba bitela ne manda a mishindu ibidi mishilangane. 
Leviticus19:20 “Padibu babuelelela mukaji mupika, udibu bamane kubangila, kadi kabayi banji kumupikula nansha kumulekela, mu nzubu kudi muntu mukuabu, muntu awu udi ne bua kufuta tshibawu. Nanku kabena ne bua kushipa mulume nansha mukaji to, bualu mukaji utshivua mupika." 
Leviticus19:21 Muntu awu neimanyikile mukoku wa tshimpanga mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena, bua kuulambula bu mulambu wa dinua tshibalu." 
Leviticus19:22 Mutuangaji neakobolole muena tshibawu awu kumpala kuanyi, bua meme kumufuila luse, kumujimijila bubi buende." 
Leviticus19:23 “Musangu unuikala bamane kufika mu ditunga dia Kenaane, nuenu bamane kukuna mitshi ya bimuma ya mishindu yonsu, nenutangile bimuma bu bintu bidi ne mikiya. Kanuena mua kubidia to, anu papita bidimu imukuata to, bisatu." 
Leviticus19:24 Nenku, bimuma bionsu biakuamayi tshidimu tshinayi, nubindambule mu tshibilu tshia dintumbisha." 
Leviticus19:25 Kadi biangatshile mu tshidimu tshitanu, nudi mua kutuadija kudia bimuma. Nuenu benze nanku, biakudia bienu nebivulangane. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:26 “Kanudidi munyinyi wa nyama pa muaba muine unuvua bamushipe, bamupatuile mashi to. Kanuenji majimbu, kanubuki to." 
Leviticus19:27 Kanubeyi nsuki yenu biketu, kanukungudi muedi wenu ku nseke to." 
Leviticus19:28 Panudi mu madilu, kanuditapi mputa pambidi. Kanuditapi nsalu pambidi to. Bualu meme Ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus19:29 “Kanufuishi nsongakaji yenu bundu, panudi nubasaka ku dienda buendenda mu nzubu ya ditendelela mvidie. Buenzayi bua nanku kabutampakanyi ditunga dijima nansha." 
Leviticus19:30 Nuikishe dituku dia Dikisha, nunemeke muaba wanyi wa tshijila. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus19:31 “Kanubuelakanyi ne bantu badi babuka bua kumvua tshidi bakishi bamba. Nuenu benze nanku, nenupie mikiya. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:32 “Panudi numona muntu mukulumpe, nujuke kulu ne kanemu. Nuleje munudi nunnemeka. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:33 “Kanukengeshi muntu muenyi udi muase mu ditunga dienu. 
Leviticus19:34 Kadi, nusombe nende bu muena ditunga. Numunange, munudi nudinanga. Nuvuluke ne: nuvua benyi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus19:35 “Kanuteki tshipimu tshia dishima mu bipimu bia bule, bia bujitu ne bia buwudi." 
Leviticus19:36 Kadi nuikale ne bipimu bia bushuwa bua buwudi, bujitu ne bule. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu." 
Leviticus19:37 “Nulame meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimpe. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Leviticus20:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus20:2 umanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Padi muena Izrayele, nansha muenyi udi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, ulambula mvidie wa Moleke muanende, bena ditunga bamuase mabue, bamushipe." 
Leviticus20:3 Kabidi meme Maweja-Nangila nennyoke muntu awu. Nemmuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bualu mmulambule mvidie wa Moleke muanende. Mulambu wa mushindu awu, udi upisha muaba wanyi wa tshijila mikiya, upepeja dina dianyi dia tshijila." 
Leviticus20:4 Padi bena ditunga balengulula buenzayi bua muntu awu, batshina mua kumushipa," 
Leviticus20:5 meme nkayanyi nemmunyoke ne bena diku diende. Nembipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, yeye ne bonsu badiye utendelela nabu mvidie wa Moleke." 
Leviticus20:6 “Padi muntu ubukisha lubuku lua mishindu yonsu, bua kumvua mudi bakishi bamba, udi mufuanangane ne muntu udi utendelela mvidie. Nanku nemmunyoke, mmuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus20:7 “Nuikale bantu ba tshijila. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. 
Leviticus20:8 “Nulame mikenji yanyi bimpe. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, uvua munusungule bua nuikale tshisamba tshia tshijila." 
Leviticus20:9 “Muntu yonsu udi utshipa tatuende nansha mamuende, badi ne bua kumushipa. Yeye nkayende ke udi mudikebele lufu, bualu udi utshipa baledi bende." 
Leviticus20:10 “Muntu yonsu udi ubuelela mukaji wa bende mu nzubu, babashipe bonsu babidi, muena tshibawu kabidi ne mukaji awu." 
Leviticus20:11 “Muntu udi ubuelela mukaji wa tatuende mu nzubu, udi ufuisha tatuende bundu. Nanku bashipe mulume ne mukaji awu. Bualu mbena tshibawu, bavua badikebela lufu." 
Leviticus20:12 “Padi muntu ubuelela mukaji wa muanende mu nzubu, mmupie tshibindi. Bashipe mulume ne mukaji awu. Bualu mbena tshibawu bavua badikebela lufu." 
Leviticus20:13 “Padi muntu mulume ulala ne mulume nende, bu mudibu balala ne mukaji, bonsu babidi mbenze bualu bupite bubi, budi kabuyi busankisha Mvidi Mukulu. Babashipe bonsu babidi. Bualu bobu nkayabu mbadikebele lufu." 
Leviticus20:14 “Padi mulume ubanjija mukaji pamue ne mamuende wa mukaji, mmuena tshibawu. Mulume awu ne bakaji bonsu babidi nebaboshe ne muoyi mu kapia. Nanku malu mabi a mushindu ewu kaakutungunuka munkatshi muenu to." 
Leviticus20:15 “Padi mulume ulala ne nyama, bamushipe, bashipe kabidi ne nyama awu." 
Leviticus20:16 “Padi mukaji ulala ne nyama, bamushipe. Bashipe kabidi ne nyama awu, bualu bonsu babidi mbadikebele lulu." 
Leviticus20:17 “Padi muntu usela, kabidi ubuelela muanabu wa bakaji wa tatuende nansha wa mamuende mu nzubu, babanyoke, bantu bonsu batangile, bualu mbenze bualu bua bundu. Mulume mmuangate muanabu wa bakaji wa tatu nansha wa mamu. Nanku mmuena tshibawu." 
Leviticus20:18 “Padi muntu ubuelela mukaji mu nzubu, kadi mukaji muikale ku tshijila tshia bakaji, bonsu babidi babipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Bualu bavua bumvuangana bonsu babidi bua kubenga kunemeka mikenji ya tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Leviticus20:19 “Kuena mua kubuelela mamuebe mukuabu nansha tatuebe mukaji mu nzubu to. Muntu udi ulala ne mulela wende, bonsu babidi mbena tshibawu." 
Leviticus20:20 “Padi muntu ubuelela mukaji wa mansebende, nansha wa tatuende mukuabu mu nzubu, kena munemeke mansebende nansha tatuende mukuabu to. Nanku bonsu babidi, mulume ne mukaji, nebalue bunkumba, bualu mbena tshibawu." 
Leviticus20:21 “Padi muntu ubanjija mukaji wa muanabu, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu, bualu mmufuishe muanabu bundu. Bonsu babidi nebafue bunkumba.”" 
Leviticus20:22 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: “Nulame meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimpe, nuyilonde. Nanku ditunga dindi nnupa bua kusomba, kadiakunubipilato." 
Leviticus20:23 Kanulondi bibidilu bia bena ditunga bandi ngipata aba to. Bantu aba, ndi mubabenge, bualu bavua benza bibi bipite." 
Leviticus20:24 Ke pandi nnulaya ne: Nenupete buloba buabu ebu, ditunga didi mabele ne buitshi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnupeshadi.’ Bualu ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi munusungule munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu." 
Leviticus20:25 Nanku, nunemeke mikenji idi itangila nyama idi ne mikiya ne idi kayiyi nayi, nyunyi idi ne mikiya ne idi kayiyi nayi. Kanudipishi mikiya panudi nulenga nyama, nyunyi nansha bilandadi bidi ne mikiya. Ndi munupe mikenji eyi bua nujadike bintu bidi ne mikiya." 
Leviticus20:26 “Nuikale bantu ba tshijila, badi bajidila mua kungenzela mudimu, bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi wa tshijila. Ndi munusungule munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, bua nuikale bantu banyi meme." 
Leviticus20:27 “Padi muntu mulume nansha mukaji, bikale ne tshibidilu tshia kubukila bantu bakuabu, bua kumvua mudi bakishi bamba, bantu aba babase mabue, babashipe. Bualu mbadikebele lufu nkayabu.”" 
Leviticus21:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe bua amanyishe batuangaji, bana ba Arone, mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Mutuangaji kena ne bua kusemena pabuipi ne tshitalu tshia muntu wa mu diku diabu to. Yeye muenze nanku udi upia mikiya." 
Leviticus21:2 Kadi padi tshitalu atshi tshikale tshia tatuende, nansha mamuende, nansha muanabu wa balume, nansha tshia muanende wa balume nansha wa bakaji, mikiya ayi kayena" 
Leviticus21:3 Padiye ulenga tshitalu tshia muanabu wa bakaji, udi kayi muanji kuya ku dibaka, kena upia mikiya to. Bualu nsongakaji awu utshidi mu diku dia mutuangaji, kena muanji kubuela mu diku dikuabu to." 
Leviticus21:4 Mutuangaji munkathi mua bana babu udi ne bumfumu. Nanku, kena mua kuikala ne mikiya. Bualu yeye ne mikiya, kabena mua kumunemeka to." 
Leviticus21:5 “Padi batuangaji mu madilu, kabena mua kubeya biketu mu nsuki, kabena mua kukungula miedi ku nseke, nansha kuditapisha nsalu pambidi." 
Leviticus21:6 Batuangaji badi ne bua kungenzela mudimu. Kabena ne bua kufuisha dina dianyi bundu. Badi ne bua kundambula meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu milambu. Ke mundi musue ne: bikale bantu ba tshijila matuku onsu. 
Leviticus21:7 “Mutuangaji kena ne bua kubanjija mukaji mudisombele, nansha uvuabu bamane kubanjija, nansha uvua ku dibaka dikuabu, bualu mutuangaji mmuntu wa tshijila, udi ungenzela mudimu." 
Leviticus21:8 Nuenu bena Izrayele, numanye ne: batuangaji mbantu ba tshijila. Nubanemeke, bualu bobu ke badi bafikisha milambu yenu kundi meme, Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Muntu kena mua kunyanga tshijila tshiabu to. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila. Mvua musungule bena Izrayele bua bikale bantu ba tshijila." 
Leviticus21:9 “Padi muana wa bakaji wa mutuangaji mushale ndumba, udi ufuisha tatuende bundu. Nenku badi ne bua kuosha muana awu ne muoyi mu kapia." 
Leviticus21:10 “Mutuangaji munene udi ku mutu kua batuangaji. Bavua bamujidile, bamuele mafuta a tshijila, dituku divuabu bamubanjije mu muanzu wende. Nenku udi mua kuvuala bilamba bia tshijila. Kadi kena mua kuikala ne nsuki mivuanduluke ku mutu, nansha kupanda bilamba biende." 
Leviticus21:11 Kabidi, kena mua kusemena pabuipi ne muntu mulue, nansha yeye tatuende nansha mamuende, bua kavu kupia mikiya." 
Leviticus21:12 Padi mutuangaji awu mumane kujidila ne mafuta, bua kungenzela mudimu, kena mua kumuka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. Bualu udi mua kunyanga muaba wanyi wa tshijila. Bualu meme Ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus21:13 “Mutuangaji munene awu, asele mukaji amu udi kayi muanji kumanyangana ne mulume." 
Leviticus21:14 Kena mua kusela mukaji mukamba, nansha mukaji udi bayende mubenge, nansha ndumba. Kadi asele amu nsongakaji wa mu diku diabu, utshidi mushikankunde," 
Leviticus21:15 bua ndelanganyi ya bantu badi kabayi batuangaji, kayimonyi mua kuvua kubuela mu diku dia batuangaji. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, udi mumujidile bua kungenzela mudimu.”" 
Leviticus21:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus21:17 — Manyisha Arone mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Mu ndelanganyi yenu idi ilonda, muntu ne bulema pambidi, kanuena mua kumuanyisha bua asemene ku tshilambuilu, andambule milambu yanyi to." 
Leviticus21:18 Bualu muntu mulema kena mua kunkuatshila mudimu to, nansha yeye muikale mpofu, muntu udi utebuka, muikale ne diulu tshibatabata, nansha ne tshidimba tshile ne tshipi," 
Leviticus21:19 nansha muntu uvua mutshibuke mukolu nansha diboku," 
Leviticus21:20 nansha muntu ne katonta nyima, nansha muntu mushawuke, nansha muntu ne lusonga mu disu, nansha muntu ne lubika, nansha muntu mutungu." 
Leviticus21:21 Nenku muntu nansha umue wa ku ndelanganyi yebe udi ne bulema pambidi, kena ne bua kusemena ku tshilambuilu, kundambula milambu to. Bualu udi ne bulema, kena mua kuenza midimu ya tshibidilu ya batuangaji to." 
Leviticus21:22 Kadi muntu awu, udi mua kudia biakudia bidibu bandambula, nansha biobi bia tshijila menemene, nansha bia tshijila." 
Leviticus21:23 Kadi bualu bua bulema buende, kena mua kusemena pabuipi ne tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja muaba wa tshijila, nansha kutantshila pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, bualu udi mua kunyanga muaba wanyi wa tshijila. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila udi ujidila batuangaji.”" 
Leviticus21:24 Moshe kufikisha mikenji ayi yonsu kudi Arone, kudi bana bende ba balume, ne kudi bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Leviticus22:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus22:2 “Manyisha Arone ne bana bende ba balume bua kabapepeji dina dianyi dia tshijila to. Nanku banemeke milambu ya tshijila idi bena Izrayele bandambula meme, Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus22:3 Ubambile ne: “Padi muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yenu ya batuangaji idi ilonda, mupie mikiya, usemena pabuipi ne milambu ya tshijila idi bena Izrayele bandambula, numushe muntu awu ku mudimu wanyi. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus22:4 Padi mutuangaji muikale ne disama dia nsudi, nansha muikale ne tufina tupatuka mu mubidi, nansha muikale mulenga muntu udi mupie mikiya bua tshitalu tshivuaye mulenga, nansha mutuangaji mene muele mayi a balume panshi, kena mua kudia bintu bia mulambu wa tshijila udi bena Izrayele bandambula to. Bua kubidiaye, amu muanji kujikija mikiya." 
Leviticus22:5 Padi mutuangaji ulenga tshilandadi tshidi ne mikiya, nansha ulenga muntu udi ne mikiya, nansha yoyi ya mushindu kaayi, udi upia mikiya." 
Leviticus22:6 Nenku neashale mupie mikiya too ne ku dilolu. Bua kudia milambu ya tshijila, amu padiye owa mayi mubidi mujima." 
Leviticus22:7 Padi diba dibuela, mikiya yende yajiki. Nenku, udi mua kudia kabidi bintu bia milambu ya tshijila, bualu mbiakudia bia batuangaji." 
Leviticus22:8 Padi mutuangaji udia munyinyi wa nyama mudifuile, nansha mushipa kudi nyama mukuabu, udi upia mikiya. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus22:9 “Batuangaji bakumbaje muabu muonsu bindi mubambile. Tshianana nebikale bena tshibawu, amu bua biakudia. Nebafue, bualu kabena balonda mikenji idi itangila bintu bia tshijila. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, udi ujidila batuangaji bua bankuatshile mudimu." 
Leviticus22:10 “Muntu udi kayi mutuangaji, nansha yeye muena mudimu wa mutuangaji, nansha muenyi wende, kena mua kudia biakudia bia tshijila ebi to." 
Leviticus22:11 Kadi, padi mutuangaji musumbe mupika, nansha bobu balele mupika mu diku diende, mupika awu udi mua kudia biakudia bia tshijila." 
Leviticus22:12 Padibu basela muana wa bakaji wa mutuangaji kudi mulume udi kayi mutuangaji muana wa bakaji awu kena mua kudia bintu bidibu bumusha ku milambu ya tshijila to. 
Leviticus22:13 Kadi padi muana wa bakaji wa mutuangaji ushala mukamba, nansha dibaka diende difue kayi mulela, padiye upingana kabidi kumbelu kua tatuende, udi mua kudia biakudia bia tshijila. Pa kumusha bualu ebu, muntu udi kayi mutuangaji kena mua kubidia to." 
Leviticus22:14 “Padi muntu udia biakudia bia tshijila kayi mumanye, udi ne bua kufuta mutuangaji bintu bikuabu bungi bua bintu bivuaye mudie. Kabidi neasakidile tshia bitanu tshimue tshia bintu abi." 
Leviticus22:15 “Batuangaji kabena ne bua kunyanga biakudia bia tshijila bidi bena Izrayele bumusha ku milambu idibu balambula Maweja-Nangila. 
Leviticus22:16 Padi batuangaji badia bintu bia tshijila bia milambu, kabayi babikumbanyine, badi badibueja mu tshibawu. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila udi ujidila milambu.”" 
Leviticus22:17 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus22:18 bua amanyishe Arone ne bana bende ba balume ne bena Izrayele bonsu mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Padi muntu wa munkatshi muenu, nansha muenyi nansha muena Izrayele, musue kundambula mulambu wa kuosha, bua bualu buvuaye mulaye, nansha bua bualu buvuaye mudisuile," 
Leviticus22:19 padiye musue kupeta diakalenga kundi, andambule anu ngombe mulume, nansha mukoku wa tshimpanga, nansha mbuji wa mpumbu, kadi amu nyama udi kayi bulema." 
Leviticus22:20 Kadi panudi nundambula tshimuna ne bulema pambidi, tshiena ngitaba mulambu wenu awu to." 
Leviticus22:21 Panudi nundambula mulambu wa bobumue, bua kukumbaja bualu bunuvua balaye, nansha bunuvua badisuile, nengitabe mulambu wa bimuna binene ne bikese. Kadi anu bidi kabiyi ne bulema." 
Leviticus22:22 Pa tshilambuilu tshianyi kanuena mua kundambula mulambu wa kuosha wa tshimuna tshifue mesu, nansha tshitebuke, nansha tshikoseke tshidimba, nansha tshikale ne disama pambidi." 
Leviticus22:23 Kadi tshimuna tshionsu, tshinene nansha tshikese, tshidi tshitebuke, nansha tshidi ne tshidimba tshishawuke, udi mua kutshindambula amu bua mulambu wa budisuile. Kadi kuena mua kutshilambula bu mulambu wa mapiku to." 
Leviticus22:24 Kanuena mua kundambula tshimuna tshia mupaku: tshikale ne mipesa mibozeka, misunsuka, mitula, nansha mikosa. Kabidi nuenu bamane kufika mu ditunga dienu, nulekele tshibidilu tshia kupakula bimuna." 
Leviticus22:25 Muenyi kena mua kunupesha tshimuna tshia mupaku, bua nuenu kutshindambula meme Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Tshiena mua kuitaba mulambu awu to, bualu tshimuna tshia mupaku ntshifuanangane ne tshidi ne bulema. Nanku tshiena mua kuanyisha milambu yenu ya mushindu ewu to.”" 
Leviticus22:26 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe kabidi ne: 
Leviticus22:27 “Padi ngombe, mukoku nansha mbuji ulela, muana awu ashale kudi mamuende lumingu lujima. Kadi biangatshile ku dituku dia muanda mukulu, ndi nganyisha bua bamundambule bua mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus22:28 Kadi kanuena mua kukosa ngombe, nansha mbuji, nansha mukoku, muminu dituku dimue ne muanende bua kundambula to." 
Leviticus22:29 “Panudi nundambula milambu, nuenda nuimba misambu, nuntumbisha, nuenze bionsu bilondeshile mikenji yanyi, bua nuenu kupeta diakalenga." 
Leviticus22:30 Nenku nudie munyinyi wa mulambu awu, ujike anu dituku dimue, kauladi to. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus22:31 “Nulame mikenji yanyi bimpe, nuyikumbaje. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus22:32 Nuenu bena Izrayele, kanupepeji dina dianyi dia tshijla to. Ndi musue bua numanye ne: ndi wa tshijila. Ndi Maweja-Nangila, uvua munusungule bua nuikale bantu ba tshijila." 
Leviticus22:33 Ke pamvua munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bua meme kuikala Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Leviticus23:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe bua 
Leviticus23:2 amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Panudi nungenzela tshibilu, nuikale muaba umue bua kuntendelela, bilondeshile dilondangana dia matuku a bibilu, dindi mumane kujadika." 
Leviticus23:3 “Nuenze mudimu matuku asambombu, kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete dikale dituku dia Dikisha, dia tshijila. Nuikishe, nudisangishe bua kuntumbisha meme Maweja-Nangila, miaba yonsu inudi basombe. Kanuena ne bua kukuata mudimu dituku adi to." 
Leviticus23:4 “Matuku makuabu a bibilu anudi mua kudisangisha mua kuntumbisha adi nenku: 
Leviticus23:5 “Dilolu dia matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala, nuikale nungenzela ku tshidimu tshionsu tshibilu tshia Dipita dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus23:6 “Dituku dia dikumi ne ditanu dia ngondu awu, nuikale nungenzela tshibilu tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga. Nudie mampa awu matuku muanda mutekete malondangane." 
Leviticus23:7 Dituku dia kumpala dia ku matuku awu muanda mutekete, kanuenji mudimu wenu wa tshibidilu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela." 
Leviticus23:8 Ku dituku dionsu dia ku matuku awu muanda mutekete, nuikale nundambula mulambu wa kuosha. Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete, kanuenji midimu yenu ya buatshiabuatshia to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela.”" 
Leviticus23:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus23:10 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Panudi bamane kufika mu ditunga dindi munupe, nuye kudi mutuangaji ne biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu binudi nunowa." 
Leviticus23:11 Mutuangaji neabiele mulu, abinyukule kumpala kuanyi, dituku didi dilonda dia Dikisha, bua nupete diakalenga kundi." 
Leviticus23:12 Anu dituku adi, nenundambule kabidi mulambu wa kuosha wa muana wa mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue, udi kauyi ne bulema." 
Leviticus23:13 Mulambu awu, nuulambule pamue ne mulambu wa kuosha wa bukula bua kilo isambombu, bunuvua basambakaje ne mafuta. Nenganyishe dipembu dia mupuya wa mulambu awu. Nundambule milambu ayi pamue ne litre wa maluvu umue ne tshitupa." 
Leviticus23:14 Nenku biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu binudi nunowa abi: nansha mampa, nansha midioku mibishi, nansha miosha, kanuena mua kubidia, kanuyi banji kubindambula. Nulame mikenji eyi kashidi miaba yonsu inudi nusomba." 
Leviticus23:15 “Nubadike mbingu muanda mutekete milondangane, bituadije dituku didi dilonda dia Dikisha, dinudi bandambula biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu." 
Leviticus23:16 Nanku nubadike matuku makumi atanu too ne ku dituku didi dilonda dituku dia Dikisha dia musangu wa muanda mutekete. Dituku adi, nudi ne bua kundambula mulambu mukuabu wa biakudia binudi banowa mu madimi enu." 
Leviticus23:17 Nenuntuadile mampa abidi a ku nzubu yenu bua kundambula. Diampa dionsu nedikale diosha ne bukula bua kilo isatu, buela buanga. Mulambu awu, newikale wa biakudia bia tshianyi bia ntete." 
Leviticus23:18 Ku mulambu wa mampa abidi awu, nusakidileku kabidi ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete bakadi bakumbaje tshidimu tshimue, badi kabayi ne bulema, ne mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi ne ngombe mulume umue. Nundambule bintu abi bua mulambu wa kuosha, pamue ne mulambu wa bukula ne wa maluvu. Nenku meme nenganyishe dipembu dia mupuya wa milambu ayi." 
Leviticus23:19 “Nenundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu wa kudikobolola nende. Kadi bua mulambu wa bobumue, nenundambule bana ba mikoku babidi, bakadi ne tshidimu tshijima." 
Leviticus23:20 Mutuangaji neandambule nyama ayi, pamue ne bana ba mikoku babidi, pamue kabidi ne mampa. Neabiele mulu abinyukule. Nenku milambu ayi ishale ya mutuangaji, bualu idi ya tshijila." 
Leviticus23:21 Dituku mene adi, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela. Nulame mikenji eyi kashidi, miaba yonsu inudi nusomba." 
Leviticus23:22 “Musangu unudi nunowa biakudia, kanuena mua kunowa too ne bidi ku mpenga kua budimi to. Kabidi kanuena mua kupingana bua kupumbulula biakudia binuvua bapue muoyi to. Nubilekele, bishale bua kuambuluisha bapela ne benyi. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. ”" 
Leviticus23:23 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus23:24 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, ndituku dia tshivulukilu ne dia dikisha. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela." 
Leviticus23:25 Kanuenji midimu yonsu ya tshibidilu dituku adi to. Kadi, nundambule mulambu wa kuosha. ”" 
Leviticus23:26 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus23:27 “Dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, ndituku dinene dia kukobolola bantu. Dituku adi, nudisangishe, nuntendelele. Nujile biakudia, nundambule mulambu wa kuosha." 
Leviticus23:28 Kanuenji mudimu nansha mukese dituku adi. Bualu ndituku dia kukobolola bantu, kumpala kuanyi meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus23:29 Muntu yonsu udi kayi ujila biakudia dituku adi, nebamumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus23:30 Kabidi muntu yonsu udi wenza mudimu dituku adi, meme nkayanyi nemmushipe, mmumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus23:31 Nulame mikenji eyi kashidi miaba yonsu inudi basombe. 
Leviticus23:32 Dituku adi, nenuikishe, anu bu munudi nuenza dituku dia Dikisha. Nujile kabidi biakudia. Nunemeke mukenji ewu wa dikisha, bituadije ku dilolu dia matuku tshitema a ngondu, too ne dilolu dia matuku dikumi a ngondu. ”" 
Leviticus23:33 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus23:34 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Biangatshile ku matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, nenungenzele tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa lumingu lujima, bua kunnemeka." 
Leviticus23:35 Dituku dia kumpala, kanuenji mudimu wenu wa tshibidilu to. Nudisange bua kuntendelela." 
Leviticus23:36 Lumingu alu lujima nundambule milambu ya kuosha ku dituku dionsu. Kadi dituku dia muanda mukulu, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisange kabidi bua kunnemeka, anu bu munuvua badisange dituku dia kumpala. Nundambule kabidi milambu ya kuosha." 
Leviticus23:37 “Mu bibilu bionsu ebi, nudisange bua kuntendelela ne bua kundambula milambu mishilangane: ya kuosha, ya bia mu madimi, ya bobumue, ne ya maluvu. Nuyilambule bilondeshile meyi ne mikandu bia tshibilu tshionsu." 
Leviticus23:38 Milambu ayi, nuyilambule pamue ne inudi nundambula matuku a Dikisha. Nuyisangishe kabidi ne milambu yenu ya mapiku ne ya budisuile." 
Leviticus23:39 “Nanku panuikala bamane kunowa biakudia, matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, nungenzele tshibilu tshia lumingu lujima. Nuikishe dituku dia kumpala, ne dia muanda mukulu dia tshibilu etshi." 
Leviticus23:40 Lumingu alu lujima, kutuadija ku dituku dia kumpala, nupole bimuma, nukose matamba a mitshi, nutape malala ne ntupu. Nuende ngendu ya mazengu lumingu lujima kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus23:41 Mu ngondu wa muanda mutekete wa tshidimu tshionsu, nenungenzele tshibilu etshi lumingu lujima. Nenku nulame mukenji ewu kashidi." 
Leviticus23:42 Nuenu bena Izrayele bonsu, lumingu alu lujima, nuikale anu basomba mu tuzubu tua bisasa," 
Leviticus23:43 bua ndelanganyi yenu ijadike ne mvua munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, kabidi mvua munuladike mu tuzubu tua bisasa. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. ”" 
Leviticus23:44 Ke muvua Moshe mumanyishe bena Izrayele bibilu bishilangane bivuabu ne bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila nabi. 
Leviticus24:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus24:2 “Utumine bena Izrayele diyi bakutuadile mafuta mimpe a tumuma tua olive, bua kutemesha nawu miendu dilolu dionsu." 
Leviticus24:3 Arone ateke kapia aku mu ntenta wa kusambakena, kumpala kua tshilamba tshidi tshijika mushete wa ndondu. Kapia aku, nekashale katema butuku bujima, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bena Izrayele ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu nebalame mukenji ewu kashidi." 
Leviticus24:4 Arone neateke miendu pa tshitekelu tshienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi, bua kapia kikale katema kumpala kuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila butuku bujima." 
Leviticus24:5 “Wangate bukula, wenze mikata dikumi ne ibidi, mukata onsu wikale ne bujitu bua kilo isambombu." 
Leviticus24:6 Uyiteke pa mesa menza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi, adi kumpala kuanyi meme, Maweja-Nangila. Mikata ayi, ikale miteka mu milongu ibidi. Mulongu onsu wikale ne mikata isambombu." 
Leviticus24:7 Wele musenga wa kamonya muimpe pa mulongu onsu. Pashishe oshe musenga wa kamonya awu bua kuulambula Maweja-Nangila pa mutu pa mampa, bu tshivulukilu." 
Leviticus24:8 “Tshibidilu etshi netshishale mu bena Izrayele bua bikale bangoshila mikata ya nanku dituku dionsu dia Dikisha. 
Leviticus24:9 Arone ne bana bende ba balume nebangate mikata ayi, bua kuyidila pa muaba kampande wa tshijila. Kadi mikata ayi idi amu ya Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bualu idi ya tshijila menemene, ivuabu bamane kundambula meme, Maweja-Nangila. Mikata ayi idi yabu bua kashidi. ”" 
Leviticus24:10 Mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele, muvua nsongalume wa bena Ejipitu, muikale muipu wa bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus24:11 Dina dia mamuende divua Shelomite, muana wa Dibri, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane. Nsongalume awu kuluangana ne muena Izrayele mukuabu. Kutuadijaye kupenda Mvidi Mukulu, usendeka dina diende. Diakamue bena Izrayele kumufunda kudi Moshe." 
Leviticus24:12 Kumukuatabu bua Mvidi Mukulu nkayende akose tshilumbu tshiende. 
Leviticus24:13 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Leviticus24:14 — Ipatayi muntu awu mu mitanda. Bantu bonsu bavua bumvua nuwuaye ungela nsenda, nebatenteke bianza biabu pa mutu pende. Pashishe bena Izrayele bonsu bamuase mabue, bamushipe." 
Leviticus24:15 Nenku wambila bena Izrayele mikenji eyi ne: “Padi muntu usendeka Mvidi Mukulu wende, udi udikebela tshilumbu." 
Leviticus24:16 Muntu yonsu udi usendeka dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bamushipe. Bena Izrayele bonsu bamuase mabue, bamushipe, nansha yeye muenyi, nansha yeye muena Izrayele, bualu mmuse-ndeke Mvidi Mukulu." 
Leviticus24:17 “Padi muntu ushipa mukuende, bamushipe pende." 
Leviticus24:18 Padi muntu ushipa tshimuna tshia mukuende, amupingajile tshimuna tshikuabu tshia muoyi." 
Leviticus24:19 “Padi muntu utapa mukuende mputa, bamutape pende mputa wa momumue." 
Leviticus24:20 Muntu mutshibulangane, bamutshibule pende. Muntu mushipangane disu, bamushipe diende. Muntu mupolangane dinu, bamupole diende. Nebamuenzele bibi, bivuaye muenzele muntu mukuabu." 
Leviticus24:21 “Muntu udi ushipa tshimuna tshia bende, apingaje tshimuna tshikuabu. Muntu udi ushipa mukuende, bamushipe pende." 
Leviticus24:22 “Mikenji eyi idi bua bantu bonsu, nansha benyi, nansha bena Izrayele. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. ”" 
Leviticus24:23 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele mikenji eyi ya Maweja-Nangila. Bena Izrayele kumuka mu mitanda ne muntu uvua usendeka Mvidi Mukulu awu. Kumuasabu mabue, kumushipa, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Leviticus25:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ku mukuna wa Sinayi," 
Leviticus25:2 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Diba dinudi nubuela mu ditunga dindi munupeshe, nulekele kudima bikondu bikuabu mu dina dianyi, bua buloba buikishe." 
Leviticus25:3 Munkatshi mua bidimu bisambombu, nukune biakudia, nusole mionji yenu ya mvinyo, nunowe binuvua bakune." 
Leviticus25:4 Kadi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, ntshijidile mu dina dianyi. Kanukunyi biakudia, kanusolu mionji yenu ya mvinyo," 
Leviticus25:5 kanunowi bidimenene bia tshidimu tshishale, nansha tumuma tua mvinyo tua ku mionji inuvua kanuyi basole. Bualu tshidimu atshi ntshianyi tshia tshijila tshia kuikishisha buloba." 
Leviticus25:6 Nenku nuenu ne bapika benu balume ne bakaji, kabidi bena mudimu ne benyi banudi nabu, nudie anu bidimenene bia tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete atshi." 
Leviticus25:7 Bidimenene abi, nebabidie kabidi kudi bimuna bienu, ne kudi nyama ya tshisuku idi mu ditunga dienu." 
Leviticus25:8 “Nuindile bikondu muanda mutekete. Tshikondu tshionsu tshikale ne bidimu muanda mutekete. Mmumue ne: bidimu bionsu nebikale makumi anayi ne tshitema. 
Leviticus25:9 Pashishe dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, dituku dinene dia kukobolola bantu, nenuele mpungi ya disanka miaba yonsu mu ditunga." 
Leviticus25:10 Panudi nuela mpungi nanku, nenumanyishe bantu ne: tshidimu tshia makumi atanu etshi ntshia tshijila, tshia kupikula bena ditunga bonsu. Tshidimu atshi, nebatshinyike ne: ntshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka. Tshidimu atshi muntu yonsu nebamupingajile maloba ende. Uvua mupika, bupika buende bujike, apingane kuabu." 
Leviticus25:11 Nenku padi bidimu bikumbana makumi atanu, nuikale nuenza tshibilu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene. Kanukunyi biakudia, kanunowi biakudia bidi bidimenene bia tshidimu tshishale, kanupodi tumuma tua mvinyo tua ku mionji inuvua kanuyi basole." 
Leviticus25:12 Kadi nunemeke tshidimu tshia makumi atanu, tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene adi, bualu ntshia tshijila. Nenku nudie anu bintu bidi bidimenene mu madimi enu." 
Leviticus25:13 “Tshikondu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, nebapingajile muntu yonsu maloba ende." 
Leviticus25:14 Paudi usumba, nansha usumbisha budimi kudi mukuenu, kumuenzedi bibi to." 
Leviticus25:15 Paudi usumba budimi, nansha ubusumbisha, mushinga wabu ulondeshile bungi bua bidimu bidi nabi budimi abu, bituadije ku tshidimu tshia ndekelu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, ne bua bungi bua bidimu bia kunowa bitshidi bishale bua tuetu kufika ku ‘Mufikilu’ mukuabu." 
Leviticus25:16 Mushinga wa budimi udi mua kuikala wa bungi, padi budimi butshidi ne bidimu bia kunowa bia bungi. Mushinga wa budimi udi mua kukepela, padi budimi bushale ne bidimu bikese bia kunowa. Nenku babupane bilondeshile bungi bua misangu ya dinowa." 
Leviticus25:17 Kanuenzedianganyi bibi to, nunnemeke meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus25:18 Nulame meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimpe, nuyikumbaje. Nenku nenusombe mu ditunga dienu talalaa." 
Leviticus25:19 Buloba nebuike biakudia bivule. Nenudie nukute, nenusombe ku matshi talalaa." 
Leviticus25:20 “Kadi bumue nenukonkangane ne: ‘Bu mutudi katuyi badime, katuyi banowe mu tshidimu tshionsu tshia muanda mutekete, netupete biakudia bikumbane anyi?’" 
Leviticus25:21 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: mu tshidimu tshisambombu, nennuvudijile biakudia bia bungi, bikumbane bua bidimu bisatu." 
Leviticus25:22 Nenku tshidimu tshia muanda mukulu, nenukune biakudia kabidi. Kadi nenuikale nudia anu biakudia bivua bishale bia tshidimu tshisambombu atshi. Nenuikale ne biakudia bikumbane bidi binufikisha too ne ku dinowa dia biakudia bia mu tshidimu tshia tshitema." 
Leviticus25:23 “Kanuena mua kusumbisha buloba bua kashidi to, bualu buloba mbuanyi meme Maweja-Nangila. Nuenu nudi anu bena tshimuangi, benyi badi basombe mu ditunga dianyi meme." 
Leviticus25:24 Nenku mu ditunga dionsu dindi nnupesha, nenuelele mikenji idi mua kuambuluisha muntu bua apikule madimi ende." 
Leviticus25:25 “Padi muanenu musue kusumbisha budimi buende, bua dikenga didi dimukuata, anu muena diku ke udi ne mushindu wa kupikula budimi abu." 
Leviticus25:26 Padi muntu awu kayi ne muena diku diabu, udi mua kubupikula, akebe yeye mene mushindu wa kudipikuilabu nkayende." 
Leviticus25:27 Nenku neapingajile uvua musumbe budimi abu makuta, bilondeshile bungi bua bidimu bidi bishale too ne ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ mukuabu wa disanka dinene. Padiye upingaja makuta, udi wangata budimi buende." 
Leviticus25:28 Padi muena budimi kayi ne mushindu wa kubupikula, nebushale kudi uvua mubusumbe too ne ku ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene. Padi tshidimu atshi tshikumbana, uvua musumbishe budimi buende abu neabuangate." 
Leviticus25:29 “Padi muntu upana nzubu wa mu tshimenga tshikolesha ne bimana, kapitshishi tshidimu tshijima bua kumupikula to." 
Leviticus25:30 Padiye kayi umupikula tshidimu atshi, nzubu awu neashale kashidi kudi uvua mumusumbe, kabidi ne kudi ndelanganyi yende. Nenku nzubu awu kabena mua kumupingaja, nansha bobu bafikile mu tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene to." 
Leviticus25:31 Kadi nzubu idi miasa mu misoku idi kayiyi ne bimana bikolesha, badi mua kuyipanyisha mushindu udibu bapanyisha maloba. Badi mua kupikula nzubu wa mushindu ewu tshidimu tshionsu tshidibu basue. Kadi tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, badi ne bua kupingaja nzubu awu anu kudi muenaye." 
Leviticus25:32 “Kadi bena Levi, badi mua kupikula nzubu yabu idi miasa mu bimenga biabu bia bena Levi diba dionsu didibu basue." 
Leviticus25:33 Nansha bobu basumbe nzubu awu kudi muena Levi mukuabu, mu tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, badi ne bua kuangata nzubu awu kudi muntu uvua mumusumbishe. Bualu nzubu ayi ke tshintu tshimue tshidi bena Levi natshi mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus25:34 Kadi madimi onsu a bena Levi adi ku mpenga kua bimenga biabu, kabena mua kuapanyisha to, bualu mmamane kushala kashidi anu mu dina dia bena Levi." 
Leviticus25:35 “Padi muanenu, nansha muenyi udi mu ditunga dienu, muikale mu dikenga, kayi ne mushindu wa kukumbaja bionsu bivuaye munulaye, numuambuluishe bua asombe nenu bimpe." 
Leviticus25:36 Kanumutatshishi bua kulomba tshia kasombela to. Nuntshine meme Maweja-Nangila. Numuambuluishe bua asombe nenu bimpe. 
Leviticus25:37 Nuenu bamusombeshe makuta, kanuena mua kulomba tshia kasombela to. Nuenu bamupe biakudia, kanumulombi bua anupingajile, usakidila ne nsakidilu to." 
Leviticus25:38 Meme ke uvua munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, munufikishe mu ditunga dia Kenaane, bua ngikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus25:39 “Padi muanenu mu dikenga, yeye mudieyeka kunudi bua kunuenzela mudimu, kanumuenzeji mudimu bu mupika to." 
Leviticus25:40 Kadi enze mudimu, apete difutu, bu mudi muena mudimu, nansha bu mudi muenyi udi ku nzubu kuenu, upeta. Anukuatshile mudimu too ne ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene." 
Leviticus25:41 Tshidimu atshi, numulekele, aye ne bana bende kuabu. Numupingajile kabidi madimi ende." 
Leviticus25:42 Nenku kabena mua kupana bena Izrayele, bu mudibu bapana bapika to. Bualu mbantu banyi, bamvua mupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Leviticus25:43 Kanuena mua kubakengesha to. Nuleje ne: nudi nuntshina meme Mvidi Mukulu wenu. 
Leviticus25:44 “Panudi basue kupeta bapika balume nansha bakaji, nuye kubakeba anu mu bisamba bikuabu bidi pabuipi nenu." 
Leviticus25:45 Bapika abu, nudi mua kubasumba kabidi ku bana ba bantu benyi badi basomba mu ditunga dienu, nansha mu balela ba benyi abu, badibu balelela mu ditunga dienu. Bantu bonsu aba badi mua kushala bantu benu." 
Leviticus25:46 Benyi abu, nebashale bupianyi bua bana benu. Nebabangate bua bashale bapika babu kashidi. Kadi muntu nansha umue wa kunudi, kena mua kukengesha muanabu muena Izrayele to." 
Leviticus25:47 “Padi muena Izrayele mu dikenga, yeye mudieyeka kudi muenyi udi mupetele biuma mu ditunga dienu, nansha kudi muntu mukuabu wa mu diku dia benyi," 
Leviticus25:48 badi mua kumupikula kudi muena Izrayele umue wa ku bana babu ba tatuende. 
Leviticus25:49 Padiye kayi ne muanabu wa tatuende udi mua kumupikula, nebamupikule kudi tatuende mukuabu, nansha kudi muana wa tatuende mukuabu, nansha kudi muanabu wa mu diku. Nansha yeye muine udi mua kudipikula padiye ne mushindu." 
Leviticus25:50 Kadi padiye musue kudipikula, pamue ne muntu uvua mumusumbe, babale bungi bua bidimu bidi bipite, katshia bamusumbe too ne ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene. Nebapuekeshe mushinga wa kudipikula bilondeshile bungi bua bidimu bidiye mulale mu bupika. Nebatshinke difutu dia mudimu uvuaye mukuate bilondeshile difutu didi muena mudimu upeta ku dituku ku dituku." 
Leviticus25:51 Padi bidimu bitshidi bia bungi bua kufika ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, neapingaje tshitupa tshinene tshia makuta a mushinga uvuabu bamusumbe nawu." 
Leviticus25:52 Kadi padi bidimu bishala bikese bua kufika ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, muena Izrayele awu neapingaje makuta mashadile, bilondeshile bungi bua bidimu bidi bishale abi." 
Leviticus25:53 Kadi padi muntu awu musue kushala mu nzubu mua uvua mumusumbe, ikale bu muena mudimu udibu bafuta ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. Kadi nutangile bimpe bua mfumuende kamukengeshi to." 
Leviticus25:54 Padi muena Izrayele awu kayi mua kudipikula, nansha kabayi mua kumupikula yeye ne bana bende, nebabapatule mu bupika tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene." 
Leviticus25:55 “Eyowa, bena Izrayele mbantu banyi, bamvua mupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bua meme kuikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Leviticus26:1 “Kanuena mua kuenza mpingu ileja mvidie ya dishima. Kanuena mua kuimanyika mpingu ayi, nansha kujidila mabue. Kanuena mua kuteka mabue mu ditunga dienu, kuazola bua kuatendelela to. Bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Leviticus26:2 “Nuikishe dituku dia Dikisha. Nunemeke muaba wanyi wa tshijila. Bualu ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Leviticus26:3 “Panudi nuitaba meyi anyi, nutumikila mikenji yanyi, nuyilonda," 
Leviticus26:4 nendokeshe mvula pa diba diende, bua nupete biakudia bia bungi mu madimi enu, kabidi bua mitshi ikuame bimuma." 
Leviticus26:5 Nanku dishipula dia ntete mu ditunga dienu, neditungunuke too ne ku matuku a dinowa dia tumuma tua mvinyo. Dinowa dia tumuma tua mvinyo neditungunuke too ne ku matuku a dikuna. Nenuikale ne biakudia bia bungi. Kabidi nenusombe ku matshi talala." 
Leviticus26:6 Nembueje ditalala mu ditunga dienu, nenulale tulu mu nzubu, batalaja mioyi. Nembutule nyama ya lonji idimu. Baluishi kabakunubunda kabidi to." 
Leviticus26:7 Nenutshimune baluishi benu, nenubashipe bonsu." 
Leviticus26:8 Bena Izrayele batanu nebatshimune baluishi lukama. Bena Izrayele lukama, nebatshimune baluishi binunu dikumi, babashipe bonsu." 
Leviticus26:9 Nennutabalele bua nutante, nulele bana ba bungi. Nendame ndondu ituvua batua nenu." 
Leviticus26:10 Nenunowe biakudia bia bungi. Nenuhidie matuku mavule. Bua kupeta muaba wa kulama bipiabipia, anu nuenu banji kumusha bia kale." 
Leviticus26:11 Nzubu wanyi wa tshijila neikale munkatshi muenu. Tshiena mua kunubenga to. 
Leviticus26:12 Nengendakane nenu. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nuenu nenuikale bantu disanka dinene, nenku mushinga wabu kawena mua kushintuluka to banyi." 
Leviticus26:13 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule ku bupika mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Meme kukosa nkanu ya bupika buenu, bua numone mua kuenda ntunku." 
Leviticus26:14 “Panudi nubenga kuitaba meyi anyi, nubenga kulonda mikenji yanyi," 
Leviticus26:15 panudi nubenga kunemeka ndondu wanyi, nubenga mikenji yanyi ne meyi andi munutumine," 
Leviticus26:16 nenku nennunyoke mushindu ewu: “Nennukuatshishe bowa, nunyane, nupete disama dia mubidi luya. Makenga aa neanupangishe mua kumona bimpe. Nenushale ne muoyi matuku makese. Nenukune biakudia mu madimi enu, kadi nebabidie amu kudi baluishi benu." 
Leviticus26:17 Nennukengeshe. Baluishi benu nebanutshimune, banutshimbakaje. Nenudinyemene, kakuyi muntu unuipata." 
Leviticus26:18 “Padi bionsu ebi binuenzekela kanuyi nungitaba, nanku nemvudije makenga enu awu misangu muanda mutekete, bua malu mabi anudi benza." 
Leviticus26:19 Bua kujikija ditambisha ne tshitunu tshinudi natshi, tshiena unulokeshila mvula to. Biakudia kabiena bitoloka to. Diulu nedikole bu tshiamu, buloba nebuume bu tshiamu tshikunze." 
Leviticus26:20 Nenuditatshishe bua kudima, kadi biakudia kabiakutoloka, mitshi kayakukuama bimuma." 
Leviticus26:21 “Panudi anu numbenga kanuyi nungitaba, meme nemvudije kabidi makenga enu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus26:22 Nentume nyama ya tshisuku, ishipe bana benu, ibutule bimuna bienu. Nenubutuke, mu njila yenu mushale anu mutupu." 
Leviticus26:23 “Panudi nuntombokela anu kuntombokela, manyoka aa kaayi anufikisha ku didilengeja," 
Leviticus26:24 meme panyi nennubenge. Nemvudije tshiakabidi dinyoka dienu misangu muanda mutekete. 
Leviticus26:25 Nennutumine bena mvita bua baluishe ditunga dienu. Nennunyoke bua ndondu wanyi unudi nunyanga. Nansha nuenu baye kusokoma mu bimenga, nennutumine disama dia kishi. Baluishi benu nebanutshimbakaje." 
Leviticus26:26 Nenkepeshe biakudia, bakaji dikumi nebasangile ditshiwa dimue bua kuoshilamu mampa, bapeta muaba mukumbane. Nebanuabanyine tupese tua mampa tukese tukese, nudia kanuyi nukuta to." 
Leviticus26:27 “Kadi padi makenga onsu aa kaayi anutekesha, nuenu nubenga amu kubenga mua kungitaba," 
Leviticus26:28 meme nennufikile munda, nnuluisha. Nemvudije dikenga dienu tshiakabidi misangu muanda mutekete." 
Leviticus26:29 Nenudie munyinyi wa bana benu banudi balela. 
Leviticus26:30 Pandi nnufikila munda, nennyangakaje miaba inudi nulambuila mvidie yenu milambu. Nengupule bilambuilu bienu bia manananshi. Nententakaje bitalu bienu pa mpingu yenu imvua mutshibule." 
Leviticus26:31 Nembutule bimenga bienu, ne miaba yenu ya tshijila, bienza bipela. Dipembu dia bintu binudi nungoshila kadiakunsankisha kabidi to." 
Leviticus26:32 Nennyangakaje ditunga dienu bikole. Nansha baluishi benu bine bapinganamu, nebakeme be." 
Leviticus26:33 Nennuluishe, nnutangalaje mu matunga makuabu. Ditunga dienu nedishale tshipela, bimenga bienu bionsu nebibutuke." 
Leviticus26:34 “Nenku bidimu bionsu binudi mu bupika mu ditunga dia baluishi benu, ditunga dienu dinuvua bashiye nedipete dikisha, bilondeshile bungi bua bikondu binuvua kanuyi bikishisha buloba." 
Leviticus26:35 Eyowa, buloba nebuikishe bua bukumbaje bungi bua bikondu bimuma kanuyi babuikishishe, diba dinuvua basombamu." 
Leviticus26:36 “Kadi bena Izrayele bikale bashale ne muoyi mu ditunga dia baluishi babu, nembakuatshishe bowa bua bungi. Nebanyeme too ne mutoyi wa dibeji dia mutshi dinyungisha kudi lupepela, bu mudi muntu unyema mvita. Nebende badishinda, kakuyi muntu udi ubipata." 
Leviticus26:37 Nebadinyemene benda basakilangane, bu badi banyema mvita, kadi kakuyi muntu Udi ubipata. Nebapange bukole bua kuluangana mvita." 
Leviticus26:38 Ku ndekelu nebafuile mu tshimuangi. Matunga menyi a baluishi babu awu neababutule. 
Leviticus26:39 Bena Izrayele bakese bikale bashale ne muoyi mu matunga a baluishi babu, nebabutuke bua mibi yabu ne ya bankambua babu." 
Leviticus26:40 “Kadi badi bashala ne muoyi abu, nebashishe kujadika muvuabu bangenzele bibi bitambe, ne mudibu, bobu ne bankambua babu, bantombokela." 
Leviticus26:41 Nebajadike ne: meme ke uvua mubanyoke, mubafile kudi baluishi babu. Nanku nebatonde bubi buabu, nebitabe manyoka onsu andi mubatumine." 
Leviticus26:42 Pashishe, nenkuluke ndondu wanyi, umvua mutue ne bankambua babu aba: Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Nemvuluke kabidi malu onsu amvua mubalaye bua ditunga diabu." 
Leviticus26:43 Kadi bena Izrayele bamane kumuangala mu ditunga, miaba ivuabu badime ayi neyipete dikisha. Mu tshikondu tshidi maloba awu mu dikisha, bena Izrayele nebapete dinyoka, bualu mbabenge meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi." 
Leviticus26:44 Kadi matuku adibu mu tshimuangi awu, tshiena mbalekela amu kashidi to, tshiena mbabutula. Kabidi, tshiena nnyangakaja ndondu wanyi to, bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi MuKulu wabu." 
Leviticus26:45 Nemvuluke ndondu umvua mutue ne bankambua babu, pamvua mubapatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, bisamba bionsu bitangile, bua meme kubapandisha ne kuikala Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Leviticus26:46 Nanku ebi ke mikenji ne meyi ne malongesha, bivua Maweja-Nangila mumanyishe Moshe pa mukuna wa Sinayi bua ambile bena Izrayele." 
Leviticus27:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Leviticus27:2 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji idi ilonda eyi ne: “Padi muntu mulaye Maweja-Nangila bua kumulambula muntu, udi mua kukumbaja dilaya diende pa kufuta bungi kampande bua nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, pa mutu pa muntu awu:" 
Leviticus27:3 bilondeshile mishinga eyi: “Bua muntu mulume wa bidimu makumi abidi too ne ku makumi asambombu, nebafute Maweja-Nangila nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi atanu, bilondeshile tshipimu tshia nkanu tshia muaba wa tshijila." 
Leviticus27:4 Bua mukaji nebafute Maweja-Nangila nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi asatu. 
Leviticus27:5 “Bua muana wa balume, wa bidimu bitanu too ne ku makumi abidi, nebafute Maweja-Nangila nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi abidi. Bua muana wa bakaji, nebafute nkanu dikumi." 
Leviticus27:6 “Bua muana wa balume wa ngondu umue too ne ku bidimu bitanu, nebafute Maweja-Nangila nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole itanu. Bua muana wa bakaji, nebafute nkanu isatu." 
Leviticus27:7 “Padi muntu mumane kupita pa bidimu makumi asambombu, nebafute Maweja-Nangila nkanu dikumi ne itanu bua muntu mulume. Bua muntu mukaji badi ne bua kufila nkanu dikumi." 
Leviticus27:8 “Padi muntu ukenga, kayi mupete mushinga uvuabu balomba, udi ne bua kufila muntu, uvuaye mutela ne: ngua dilaya awu, kudi mutuangaji. Nenku mutuangaji neatshinke mushinga udi mukengi ewu mua kufuta, bilondeshile dimona diende dia makuta." 
Leviticus27:9 “Padi muntu mulaye bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila tshimuna tshia mapiku tshidibu mua kumulambula, tshimuna atshi ntshia tshijila." 
Leviticus27:10 Kabena mua kutshishintakaja ne tshimuna tshikuabu, nansha tshikale tshimpe tshipite, nansha tshikale tshishadile ku buimpe. Kadi muntu yeye mutshishintakaje, bimuna ebi bionsu bibidi, badi ne bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus27:11 “Padi tshimuna atshi ne mikiya, katshiyi tshikumbana mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila, muenatshi atshifile kudi mutuangaji." 
Leviticus27:12 Mutuangaji neafue mushinga wa tshimuna atshi, utangila buimpe nansha bubi bua tshimuna. Nebumvuangane amu ku mushinga udiye wamba awu." 
Leviticus27:13 Padi muenatshi musue kutshipikula, asakidile tshia bitanu tshimue tshia mushinga uvua mutuangaji mulombe." 
Leviticus27:14 “Padi muntu musue kulambula Maweja-Nangila nzubu, mutuangaji neafue mushinga wa nzubu awu. Neamanye tshidi tshikolesha mushinga wa nzubu awu, nansha tshidi tshiutekeshisha. Nenku nebitabe mushinga udiye mutue." 
Leviticus27:15 Padi muena nzubu musue kumupikula, asakidile tshia bitanu tshimue ku mushinga uvua mutuangaji mulombe." 
Leviticus27:16 “Padi muntu musue kulambula Maweja-Nangila budimi bumue bua ku madimi ende, mushinga wabu udi ulondeshila bungi bua bintu bidibu mua kukunamu. Padi budimi bukumbakana bua kukuna ntete ya orje kilo nkama isatu, mushinga wabu newikale wa nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi atanu." 
Leviticus27:17 Padibu balambula Maweja-Nangila budimi abu, ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa" 
Leviticus27:18 Padibu balambula Maweja-Nangila budimi tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene tshimane kupita, mutuangaji neapuekeshe mushinga, bilondeshile bungi bua bidimu bitshidi bishale bua kufika ku tshidimu tshipiatshipia tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene." 
Leviticus27:19 “Padi muena budimi musue kubupikula, udi ne bua kusakidila tshia bitanu tshimue ku mushinga uvua mutuangaji mulombe. Pashishe neangate budimi buende." 
Leviticus27:20 “Kadi padiye kayi muanji kupikula budimi buende, udi mua kubupana kudi muntu mukuabu. Diba adi katshiena mua kudipikuilabu to." 
Leviticus27:21 Nenku mu tshikondu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, budimi abu budi amu bupingana kudi Maweja-Nangila. Nebushale mu dina dia batuangaji, bu budimi buvuabu balambule Maweja-Nangila bua kashidi." 
Leviticus27:22 “Padi muntu ulambula Maweja-Nangila budimi buvuaye musumbe, kabuyi bupeta ku bupianyi," 
Leviticus27:23 mutuangaji neatshinke mushinga wa budimi abu, bilondeshile bungi bua bidimu bitshidi bishale bua kufika ku tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene. Muena budimi abu afute mushinga awu anu dituku adi, bua baulambule Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus27:24 Kadi mu tshidimu tshia ‘Mufikilu’ wa disanka dinene, budimi nebabuangate anu kudi mfumuabu wa kumpala uvua mubupiane awu." 
Leviticus27:25 “Nanku nebatshinke mushinga wa bionsu abi, bilondeshile nkanu idi muaba wa tshijila. Lukanu kumue ludi ne bujitu bua grame dikumi." 
Leviticus27:26 “Muntu nansha umue kena ne bumfumu bua kulambula mu dina diende yeye nkayende, muanabute wa ngombe, lukungulu lua mbuji, nansha muana wa mukoku to. Bualu nyama yonsu idi mikale banabute, ikadi ya Maweja-Nangila." 
Leviticus27:27 Padi muanabute wa tshimuna atshi muikale wa nyama udi ne mikiya, muenatshi udi mua kutshipikula. Kadi asakidile tshia bitanu tshimue ku mushinga udi mutuangaji mulombe. Padi muenatshi kayi mua kutshipikula, mutuangaji udi mua kutshipana kudi muntu mukuabu ku mushinga onsu udiye utshinka." 
Leviticus27:28 “Nanku bua bintu bionsu bidi muntu ulambula Maweja-Nangila bua kashidi, kabena mua kubipana nansha kubipikula to, bu mudi muntu, nyama nansha budimi bupiana. Bintu bidibu balambula mushindu ewu, mbia Maweja-Nangila nkayende, mbia tshijila menemene." 
Leviticus27:29 Nansha muntu mumane kujidila kashidi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila nanku, kabena mua kumupikula to. Nansha bua kumushipa, basangane kumushipa anye? Bamushipe." 
Leviticus27:30 “Nenku bena Izrayele badi ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila tshia dikumi tshimue tshia biakudia bia mu madimi, kabidi ne tshia bimuma bia ku mitshi. Bualu mbintu biende." 
Leviticus27:31 Padi muntu musue kupikula tshikuabu tshia ku bidibu balambula Maweja-Nangila, muntu awu udi ne bua kusakidila tshia bitanu tshimue ku mushinga udi mutuangaji mulombe." 
Leviticus27:32 Padi muntu ne ngombe, mikoku nansha mbuji, udi ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila tshimuna tshimue pa bimuna dikumi." 
Leviticus27:33 Muena bimuna abi, kena mua kusunguluja bimuna bidi bimpe ne bidi bibi. Kabidi kena mua kubishintakaja to. Yeye mubishintakaje, bionsu bibidi nebishale bia tshijila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kena mua kubipikula to. ”" 
Leviticus27:34 Nenku ke mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila mumanyishe Moshe pa mukuna wa Sinayi, bua ambile bena Izrayele." 
Numbers1:1 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muibidi wa tshidimu tshivua tshilonda tshidimu tshia dipatuka diabu mu Ejipitu, Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne Moshe mu tshipela tshia Sinayi, mu ntenta wa kusambakena, umuambila ne:" 
Numbers1:2 — Wewe ne Arone, nubadike bena Izrayele bonsu. Nufunde mena a bantu balume bonsu ku muntu ku muntu, bilondeshile meku abu ne bisamba biabu." 
Numbers1:3 Nubadike, nufunde mena a bantu balume bonsu badi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne pa mutu, bikale ne bukole bua kuenza mudimu mu bisumbu bishilangane bia tshiluilu tshia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers1:4 Nuangate mfumu wa diku ku tshisamba tshionsu bua anuambuluishe. 
Numbers1:5 Ke mena a bamfumu abu badi ne bua kunuambuluisha: mu tshisamba tshia Rubene: Elishure, muana wa Shedeyure;" 
Numbers1:6 mu tshia Shimeyone: Shelumiyele, muana wa Surishadayi;" 
Numbers1:7 mu tshia Yuda: Nashone, muana wa Aminadabe;" 
Numbers1:8 mu tshia Isakare: Netaneyele, muana wa Shuware;" 
Numbers1:9 mu tshia Zebulone: Eliyabe, muana wa Elone;"
