Numbers1:10 mu tshia Efrayime, muana wa Yozefe: Elishama, muana wa Amikude; mu tshia Menashe, muana wa Yozefe: Ngameliyele, muana wa Pedashure;" 
Numbers1:11 mu tshia Binyamine: Abidane, muana wa Ngideyoni;" 
Numbers1:12 mu tshia Dane: Akiyezere, muana wa Amishadayi;" 
Numbers1:13 mu tshia Ashere: Pagiyele, muana wa Okrane;" 
Numbers1:14 mu tshia Ngade: Eliyasafe, muana wa Deyuwele;" 
Numbers1:15 mu tshia Naftali: Akira, muana wa Eyinane." 
Numbers1:16 Ke mena a bamfumu ba meku bavuabu basungule balombodi ba bena mvita ba mu bena Izrayele. 
Numbers1:17 Moshe ne Arone kuangata bantu bavuabu basungule abu bua bikale babambuluishi babu. 
Numbers1:18 Nanku, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muibidi, Moshe ne Arone kusangisha bantu bonsu. Kufundabu ku muntu ku muntu, bilondeshile meku ne bisamba biabu, bantu balume bonsu bavua ne bidimu makumi abidi ne pa mutu." 
Numbers1:19 Dibadika dia bantu adi divua dienzeka mu tshipela tshia Sinayi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Numbers2:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers2:2 — Bena Izrayele bonsu base mitanda yabu muaba udi tshisumbu tshiabu tshia bena mvita, pa buipi ne dibendela dia tshisamba tshiabu. Mitanda yabu neyinyungulukile ntenta wa kusambakena, kadi mikale mutantshi ne ntenta awu." 
Numbers2:3 “Bantu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Yuda, nebase mitanda ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu luseke ludi diba dipatukila, muaba udi dibendela diabu. Bantu badibu babadike bua benze mudimu mu bisumbu bia tshiluilu, nebabalombole kudi mfumu wa tshisamba tshiabu: Mfumu wa bena Yuda: ke Nashone, muana wa Aminadabe, ne bantu bende 74.600; Mfumu wa bena Isakare: ke Netaneyele, muana wa Shuware, ne bantu bende 54.400; Mfumu wa bena Zebulone: ke Eliyabe, muana wa Elone, ne bantu bende 57.400." 
Numbers2:4  
Numbers2:5  
Numbers2:6  
Numbers2:7  
Numbers2:8  
Numbers2:9 Bantu bonsu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Yuda badi 186.400. Bonsu abu, bisumbu bisatu, ke badi ne bua kubanga luendu, benza tshiluilu tshia kumpala." 
Numbers2:10 “Bantu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Rubene, nebase mitanda yabu ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu, luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu wa tshijila, muaba udi dibendela diabu. Bantu badibu babadike bua benze mudimu mu bisumbu bia tshiluilu, nebabalombole kudi mfumu wa tshisamba tshiabu: Mfumu wa bena Rubene: ke Elishure, muana wa Shedeyure, ne bantu bende 46.500; Mfumu wa bena Shimeyone: ke Shelumiyele, muana wa Surishadayi, ne bantu bende 59.300; Mfumu wa bena Ngade: ke Eliyasafe, muana wa Deyuwele ne bantu bende 45.650." 
Numbers2:11  
Numbers2:12  
Numbers2:13  
Numbers2:14  
Numbers2:15  
Numbers2:16 Bantu bonsu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Rubene badi: 151.450. Bonsu abu, bisumbu bisatu, ke badi ne bua kumuka pashishe, benza tshiluilu tshibidi." 
Numbers2:17 “Pashishe bena Levi nebumuke, bambule ntenta wa kusambakena. Nebende pankatshi pa biluilu binayi, bibidi kumpala, bibidi kunyima kuabu. Nebalondangane muntu yonsu mu mulongu wende, ku tshisumbu ne ku tshisumbu, bilondeshile muaba uvuabu base mitanda yabu, balonda dibendela dia tshisamba tshiabu." 
Numbers2:18 “Bantu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Efrayime nebase mitanda yabu ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu, luseke ludi diba dibuelela, muaba udi dibendela diabu. Bantu badibu babadike bua benze mudimu mu bisumbu bia tshiluilu, nebabalombole kudi mfumu wa tshisamba tshiabu: Mfumu wa bena Efrayime: ke Elishama, muana wa Amikude, ne bantu bende 40.500; Mfumu wa bena Menashe: ke Ngameliyele, muana wa Pedashure, ne bantu bende 32.200; Mfumu wa bena Binyamine: ke Abidane, muana wa Ngideyoni, ne bantu bende 35.400." 
Numbers2:19  
Numbers2:20  
Numbers2:21  
Numbers2:22  
Numbers2:23  
Numbers2:24 Bantu bonsu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Efrayime badi 108.100. Nanku bonsu abu, bisumbu bisatu, nebatuadije luendu pashishe, benza tshiluilu tshisatu." 
Numbers2:25 “Bantu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Dane nebase mitanda yabu ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu wa tshijila, muaba udi dibendela diabu. Bantu badibu babadike bua benze mudimu mu bisumbu bia tshiluilu, nebabalombole kudi mfumu wa tshisamba tshiabu: Mfumu wa bena Dane: ke Akiyezere, muana wa Amishadayi, ne bantu bende 62.700; Mfumu wa bena Ashere: ke Pagiyele, muana wa Okrane, ne bantu bende 41.500; Mfumu wa bena Naftali: ke Akira, muana wa Eyinane ne bantu bende 53.400." 
Numbers2:26  
Numbers2:27  
Numbers2:28  
Numbers2:29  
Numbers2:30  
Numbers2:31 Bantu bonsu badi ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Dane badi 157.600. “Nanku bantu aba, bisumbu bisatu, nebatuadije luendu, benza tshiluilu tshinayi, tshia ndekelu.”" 
Numbers2:32 Bena Izrayele bonsu basanga bavuabu babadike ku tshisamba ne ku tshisumbu badi 603.550. 
Numbers2:33 Kadi bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe, kabavua babadike bena Levi pamue ne bena Izrayele bakuabu nansha." 
Numbers2:34 Nanku bena Izrayele kukumbaja bimpe bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Ke muvuabu base mitanda yabu ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu, muaba uvua dibendela diabu. Ke muvuabu bumuke kabidi balondangane bimpe ku diku ne ku diku, ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba." 
Numbers3:1 Tshikondu tshivua Maweja-Nangila muyukile ne Moshe pa mukuna wa Sinayi, Arone ne Moshe bakavua ne bana." 
Numbers3:2 Arone uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Nadabe, muanabute, Abiku, Elazare ne Itamare." 
Numbers3:3 Bana aba ke bavuabu balaba manyi, babajidile bua benze mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Numbers3:4 Kadi Nadabe ne Abiku kufuila mu tshipela tshia Sinayi kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila, kabayi banji kulela bana. Bualu bavua balambule Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa manananshi, avua kaayi a tshijila. Nanku anu bana babidi ba Arone, Elazare ne Itamare, ke bavua bashale bua kuenza mudimu wa butuangaji pamue ne tatuabu." 
Numbers3:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers3:6 — Bikila tshisamba tshia bena Levi. Ubateke ku bumfumu bua mutuangaji Arone, bamuambuluishe." 
Numbers3:7 Bena Levi nebenze mudimu kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bua kuambuluisha Arone ne bena Izrayele bonsu. Nebenze midimu yonsu idi itangila nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:8 Nebalame bintu bionsu bia mu ntenta awu. Nebenze midimu yonsu idi itangila nzubu wa tshijila bua kuambuluisha bena Izrayele. 
Numbers3:9 Nanku neupeshe Arone ne bana bende bena Levi, bua babambuluishe muabu muonsu mu dina dia bena Izrayele bakuabu, balame nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:10 Neupeshe Arone ne bana bende nkayabu mudimu wa butuangaji. Muntu mukuabu muenze mudimu awu kayi mutuangaji, nebamushipe." 
Numbers3:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers3:12 — Ndi musungule bena Levi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu, bua bangenzele mudimu. Ndi mbangata bua bikale banyi, pa muaba wa bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele." 
Numbers3:13 Bualu dituku di-mvua mufuishe bamuanabute ba bena Ejipitu, mvua mushiye bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele too ne ba bimuna biabu ne muoyi bua bikale bianyi. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers3:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe mu tshipela tshia Sinayi ne: 
Numbers3:15 — Ubadike bantu balume bonsu ba bena Levi. Ufunde mena abu, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue ne pa mutu too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, bilondeshile meku abu ne bisamba biabu." 
Numbers3:16 Moshe kubabadika muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. 
Numbers3:17 Levi uvua ne bana balume basatu: Ngershone, Kekate ne Merari." 
Numbers3:18 Ngershone uvua ne bana balume babidi: Libni ne Shimeyi. Badi bankambua ba bisamba bibidi. 
Numbers3:19 Kekate uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Amrame, Ishare, Ebrone ne Uziyele. Badi bankambua ba bisamba binayi." 
Numbers3:20 Merari uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: Mali ne Mushi. Badi bankambua ba bisamba bibidi. Nanku mbinyike meku a bena Levi bilondeshile mena a bana bonsu aba. 
Numbers3:21 Ngershone ke nkambua wa bena Ngershone badi batapuluka meku abidi, dia bena Libni ne dia bena Shimeyi." 
Numbers3:22 Bantu balume bonsu ba tshisamba etshi, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, bavua 7.500." 
Numbers3:23 Bena Ngershone bavua base mitanda yabu kunyima kua nzubu wa tshijila, luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Numbers3:24 Mfumu wa tshisamba eshi uvua Eliyasafe, muana wa Layele." 
Numbers3:25 Bena Ngershone ke bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bintu bia ntenta wa kusambakena ebi: ntenta wa munda, ntenta muibidi, ne ntenta wa kubuikila ku ntenta ibidi ayi, kabidi ne tshilamba tshivua tshilembeleja ku mushiku wa ntenta." 
Numbers3:26 Bavua balama kabidi bilamba bia ku lupangu, ne tshilamba tshia ku tshibuelelu tshia lupangu luvua lunyungulula nzubu wa tshijila ne tshilambuilu. Bavua balama kabidi mionji yonsu ya kuasa nayi ntenta." 
Numbers3:27 Kekate ke nkambua wa bena Kekate, badi batapulukangana meku anayi: dia bena Amrame, dia bena Ishare, dia bena Ebrone ne dia bena Uziyele." 
Numbers3:28 Bantu balume ba tshisamba etshi, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, bavua 8.600. Bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bintu bia tshijila bivua munda mua ntenta." 
Numbers3:29 Bena tshisamba etshi tshia Kekate, bavua base mitanda yabu, luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:30 Mfumu wa tshisamba etshi uvua Elishafane, muana wa Uziyele." 
Numbers3:31 Bena tshisamba etshi bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bimpe mushete wa ndondu, mesa a tshijila, tshitekelu tshia miendu, bilambuilu, malongu adibu benza nawu mudimu muaba wa tshijila, kabidi ne tshilamba tshidibu balembeleja munda mua nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:32 Elazare, muana wa balume wa mutuangaji Arone, ke uvua mfumu mukulu wa bena Levi bonsu. Uvua utangila bantu bavua benza mudimu muaba wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:33 Merari ke nkambua wa bena Merari, badi batapuluka meku abidi, dia bena Mali ne dia bena Mushi." 
Numbers3:34 Bantu balume bonsu ba tshisamba etshi, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, bavua 6.200." 
Numbers3:35 Bena tshisamba tshia Merari bavua base luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu wa tshijila. Mfumu wabu uvua Suriyele, muana wa Abikayile." 
Numbers3:36 Bena Merari ke bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bintu bivuabu benza nabi nzubu wa tshijila: mabaya, makunji ne bitaku biawu, ne bintu bikuabu bionsu." 
Numbers3:37 Bavua balama kabidi makunji a lupangu ne bitaku biawu, milonda ne mionji. Nanku bena Merari bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bimpe bintu bionsu ebi." 
Numbers3:38 Moshe ne Arone ne bana bende bavua base mitanda yabu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua muaba wa tshijila, kumpala kua tshibuelelu tshia muaba awu. Bavua benza mudimu muaba wa tshijila mu dina dia bena Izrayele bonsu. Muntu yonsu uvua musue kuenza mudimu muaba awu, kayi mutuangaji, bavua ne bua kumushipa." 
Numbers3:39 Bungi bua bantu balume bonsu ba bena Levi, bavua Moshe ne Arone babadike, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, kabidi bilondeshile ku meku abu, bavua 22.000." 
Numbers3:40 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ubadike bamuanabute bonsu ba balume ba bena Izrayele, bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, ufunde mena abu." 
Numbers3:41 Pashishe, ujidile bena Levi bua bikale banyi meme Maweja-Nangila, pa muaba wa bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Bimuna kabidi bia bena Levi nebikale bianyi, pa muaba wa bamuanabute bonsu ba bimuna bia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers3:42 Moshe kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Kubadikaye bamuanabute ba balume ba bena Izrayele bonsu. 
Numbers3:43 Bonsu pamue bituadije ku bana batekete ba ngondu umue too ne ku bantu bakulumpe, bavua 22.273." 
Numbers3:44 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers3:45 — Ujidile bena Levi bua bikale banyi meme Maweja-Nangila, pa muaba wa bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Bimuna bia bena Levi kabidi nebikale bianyi meme, pa muaba wa bamuanabute ba bimuna bia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers3:46 Kadi bua kupikula bamuanabute ba bena Izrayele 273, badi bapite ba bena Levi ku bungi;" 
Numbers3:47 pa muntu yonsu, bafute nkanu itanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole — nkanu ya mu muaba wa tshijila, ya grame dikumi ku lukanu lumue —." 
Numbers3:48 Nufile nkanu eyi kudi Arone ne bana bende, bua kupikula bungi bua bamuanabute ba bena Izrayele budi bupite bungi bua ba bena Levi." 
Numbers3:49 Ke Moshe kusangisha nkanu ya kupikula nayi bungi bua bena Izrayele buvua bupite bungi bua bena Levi. 
Numbers3:50 Uvua musangishe kudi bamuanabute ba bena Izrayele nkanu 1.365, bu mudi nkanu ya mu muaba wa tshijila." 
Numbers3:51 Kuyipeshaye Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
Numbers4:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers4:2 — Nubadike bena Levi ba bena Kekate ku meku ne ku bisamba biabu. 
Numbers4:3 Nufunde mena a bantu balume bonsu, badi ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi asatu too ne ku makumi atanu. Badi ne bua kuenza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers4:4 Badi ne mudimu wa kulama bimpe bintu bia tshijila menemene. 
Numbers4:5 Padi bena Izrayele bamuangala, Arone ne bana bende ba balume nebumushe tshilamba tshidi tshilembeleja kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila, batshibuikila pa mushete wa ndondu." 
Numbers4:6 Nebabuikile kabidi mushete ne tshiseba tshia nyama wa nkonga. Nebateke kabidi pa mutu pa bionsu ebi tshilamba tshifikuluke tshienza ne miosa ya nyama. Pashishe nebabueje milonda ku mushete bua kuwambuilaku. 
Numbers4:7 Nebadije tshilamba tshikuabu tshifikuluke tshienza ne miosa ya nyama pa mesa a mampa a tshijila. Nebatekepu malongu masalama, makopu, malongu mondoke ne tukopu tua kulambuila maluvu. Nebatekepu kabidi mampa a tshijila anudi ne bua kundambuilapu kashidi." 
Numbers4:8 Nebabuikile bionsu ebi ne tshilamba tshikunze tshienza ne miosa ya nyama. Nebateke kabidi pa mutu pa bionsu tshiseba tshia nyama wa nkonga. Pashishe nebabueje milonda ku mesa aku bua kuwambuilaku. 
Numbers4:9 Nebabuikile tshilamba tshifikuluke ku tshitekelu tshia miendu, ku miendu yatshi, ku lukuatu, ku mbabula ne ku tulangi tua mafuta." 
Numbers4:10 Pashishe nebabuikile tshiseba tshikole tshia nyama wa nkonga pa bintu bionsu ebi, babiteka pa mabaya a kubiambula nawu." 
Numbers4:11 Ku tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nebabuikileku tshilamba tshifikuluke. Nebateke tshiseba tshikole tshia nyama wa nkonga pa mutu pa bionsu. Pashishe nebabueje milonda ku tshilambuilu aku bua kutshiambuilaku." 
Numbers4:12 Nebabuikile tshilamba tshifikuluke pa bintu bionsu bidibu benza nabi mudimu muaba wa tshijila. Nebateke kabidi tshiseba tshikole tshia nyama wa nkonga pa mutu pa bionsu ebi. Nebateke bionsu pa mabaya a kubiambula nawu. 
Numbers4:13 Nebumushe butu bonsu budi mu tshilambuilu bua kuadijamu tshilamba tshikunze. 
Numbers4:14 Nebatekemu bintu bionsu bivuabu benza nabi mudimu bua kulambula milambu: mbabula, nsomu wa kuambula nende munyinyi, bikasu ne mabungu a kuela mayi a kumiamina. Nebabuikile tshiseba tshikole tshia nyama wa nkonga ku bionsu ebi. Nebabueje milonda ku tshilambuilu bua kutshiambuilaku." 
Numbers4:15 Diba dia luendu, anu Arone ne bana bende ba balume bamane kubuikila bintu bia tshijila, ke bena Kekate kushisha kuambula bintu bia tshijila abi bua kuya nabi. Nanku, bena Kekate kabena ne bua kulenga bintu bia tshijila abi ne bianza to, bualu badi mua kufua. Nanku mudimu wa bena Kekate mu ntenta wa kusambakena ngwa kuambula bintu bia tshijila." 
Numbers4:16 Kadi, Elazare, muana wa balume wa mutuangaji Arone, neikale ne mudimu wa kulama nzubu wa tshijila ne bintu bionsu bia tshijila bidimu. Yeye kabidi ke udi utangila mafuta a kuela mu miendu, musenga wa kamonya wa kuosha, bintu bia mu madimi bidibu bandambula matuku onsu, kabidi ne mafuta a tshijila." 
Numbers4:17 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers4:18 — Nulame bena Kekate bimpe bua bashale ne muoyi munkatshi mua bena Levi bakuabu. 
Numbers4:19 Nanku, wewe Arone ne bana bebe ba balume, nufile muntu yonsu wa bena Kekate muaba udiye ne bua kuenza mudimu. Numuleje tshidiye ne bua kuenza, kabidi ne tshintu tshidiye mua kuambula. Bualu bobu balenga tshintu tshia tshijila menemene, nebafue." 
Numbers4:20 Nanku bena Kekate kabamonyi tshintu tshia tshijila nansha katupa ka diba to. Bobu batshimone nanku, nebafue." 
Numbers4:21 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers4:22 “Ubadike kabidi bena Levi ba bena Ngershone ku meku ne ku bisamba. 
Numbers4:23 Ufunde mena a bantu balume bonsu badi ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi asatu too ne ku makumi atanu. Nebenze mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers4:24 Nanku bena Ngershone nebenze midimu eyi: 
Numbers4:25 kuambula tshilamba tshia kubuikila nzubu wa tshijila, biseba bia mikoku ya bimpanga ne bia nyama wa nkonga bia kubuikila pa mutu pa bionsu, tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa ntenta." 
Numbers4:26 Badi bambula kabidi ne bilamba bia ku lupangu, ne tshilamba tshia mu mushiku wa lupangu. Ke bilamba bidi bileja mikalu ya lupangu ludi lunyungulula muaba wa tshijila ne tshilambuilu. Nebambule kabidi mionji ya ku lupangu ne biamu bikuabu bionsu bia kuenzabu nabi mudimu ku lupangu." 
Numbers4:27 Nanku Arone ne bana bende balombole bena Ngershone ku midimu eyi. Nebabaleje midimu idibu mua kuenza ne bintu bidibu mua kuambula. 
Numbers4:28 Ke midimu idi bena Ngershone ne bua kuenza mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Itamare, muana wa mutuangaji Arone, neikale ubalombola.”" 
Numbers4:29 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: “Ubadike kabidi bena Levi ba bena Merari ku meku ne ku bisamba biabu. 
Numbers4:30 Ufunde mena a bantu balume bonsu badi ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi asatu too ne ku makumi atanu. Badi ne bua kuenza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers4:31 Bena Merari nebenze midimu eyi: kuambula mabaya onsu a nzubu wa tshijila, makunji ne bitaku biawu;" 
Numbers4:32 kuambula makunji a ku lupangu ne bitaku biawu, milonda ne mionji ne bintu bionsu bidibu nabi mudimu. Batuangaji nebaleje muntu yonsu tshintu tshidiye mua kuambula." 
Numbers4:33 Ke midimu idi bena Merari ne bua kuenza mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Itamare, muana wa mutuangaji Arone, neikale ubalombola.”" 
Numbers4:34 Nanku, Moshe ne Arone ne balombodi ba bena Izrayele, kubadika bantu ba bisamba bisatu bia bena Levi: tshisamba tshia Ngershone, tshia Kekate ne tshia Merari, bilondeshile meku abu ne bisamba biabu. Kufundabu mena a bantu balume bonsu bavua ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi asatu too ne ku makumi atanu, bavua ne bua kuenza midimu mishilangane ya mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Bantu bonsu bavuabu babadike, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe, bavua bungi nunku: bena Kekate bavua 2.750; bena Ngershone bavua 2.630; bena Merari bavua 3.200; bena Levi bonsu bavua 8.580." 
Numbers4:35 Dibadika dia bantu edi, divua dienzeka bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Nanku, kulejabu muena Levi yonsu mudimu uvuaye ne bua kuenza ne tshintu tshivuaye mua kuambula, amu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
Numbers5:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: 
Numbers5:2 — Bantu bonsu badi ne masama a nsudi, masama a tufina tupatuka mu mubidi, nansha bavua balenga bitalu, nubumushe mu mitanda yenu, bualu badi ne mikiya." 
Numbers5:3 Nuipate bantu aba bonsu, balume ne bakaji, bua kabatampakaji mikiya mu mitanda yenu. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi munkatshi muabu." 
Numbers5:4 Nanku bena Izrayele kumusha bantu bonsu abu mu mitanda yabu. Kukumbajabu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. 
Numbers5:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers5:6 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: — Muntu yonsu, mulume nansha mukaji, udi wenzela mukuende bibi, neikale ne tshilumbu tshinene kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers5:7 Udi ne bua kutonda bubi buende, kupingaja tshintu atshi kudi muenatshi, kusakidila kabidi tshia bitanu tshimue tshia mushinga wa tshintu atshi." 
Numbers5:8 Pikala mukuende, uvuaye ne bua kupingajila tshintu tshiende, mumane kufua, kakuyi muena diku mukuabu udibu mua ku-pesha bintu abi, nebabipingajile Maweja-Nangila. Mmumue ne: nebabipeshe mutuangaji. Muena tshibawu awu neasakidile kabidi pa bintu abi, mukoku wa tshimpanga, bua mutuangaji amukobolole, amulombele luse kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers5:9 Bintu bionsu bidibu bumusha ku mulambu wa tshijila udi bena Izrayele balambula, bidi bintu bia mutuangaji." 
Numbers5:10 Tshintu tshionsu tshidi muntu ulambula Maweja-Nangila, nebatshipeshe mutuangaji. Nanku tshidi muntu upesha mutuangaji, mutuangaji udi mua kutshilama." 
Numbers5:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers5:12 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: — Tuambe ne: Mukaji wa bende mmuende tshiendenda. 
Numbers5:13 Mmudinyange, musombe ne mulume mukuabu mu musokoku. Kadi bayende kena mumujikidile ne mulume. Kena nansha ne muntu udi mua kumujadikila bualu, nansha udi mubumone." 
Numbers5:14 Padi mulume ubanda mukajende, nansha yeye mudinyange bushuwa, nansha kayi muende," 
Numbers5:15 neafikishe mukajende kudi mutuangaji. Neafile kabidi mulambu wa kilo isatu ya bukula bua orje. Kadi kena mua kuelamu mafuta nansha kutekamu musenga wa kamonya to, bualu mmulambu wa bualu budibu babanda nabu mukaji, kabayi bajadike." 
Numbers5:16 Mutuangaji awu neabuele ne mukaji awu muaba wa tshijila bua kumuteka kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. 
Numbers5:17 Mutuangaji neangate mayi a tshijila mu dibungu. Neasambakaje ne buloba buboya panshi muaba wa tshijila. 
Numbers5:18 Mutuangaji neumushe tshitambala tshia ku mutu wa mukaji awu, neamupeshe mu bianza mulambu wa bualu buvuabu ba-mubande nabu, kabayi bajadike. Mutuangaji neambule mayi a bululu awu, a kutshipa nawu muntu." 
Numbers5:19 Mutuangaji neatshipishe mukaji, umuambila ne: ‘Pikala mulume mukuabu kayi mukubuelele mu nzubu, wewe kuyi mudinyange, kuyi mudinge bayebe, mayi audi unua aa kakukuenzela bualu to." 
Numbers5:20 Kadi pikala mulume mukuabu mukubuelele mu nzubu, wewe mudinyange, mudinge bayebe," 
Numbers5:21 Maweja-Nangila akunyoke, ushale nkumba, upeta difu dia munana, bua ushale tshilejilu kudi bantu bonsu, bua batshipangane, batela dina diebe." 
Numbers5:22 Diba adi mayi aa a kutshipa nawu muntu, akutue munda, akuwuje difu, ushale nkumba.’ Mukaji awu neandamune ne: ‘Amene! Bienzeke nanku!’" 
Numbers5:23 “Pashishe mutuangaji neafunde meyi a mitshipu aa mu mukanda, atue mukanda awu mu mayi a bululu aa, bua miaku ayi ishale mu mayi aa." 
Numbers5:24 Bangabanga ne kunuisha mukaji mayi a bululu awu, bua amutue munda," 
Numbers5:25 mutuangaji neangate mulambu wa bualu budibu babanda nabu mukaji, udi mukaji awu nawu mu bianza biende, neawele mulu, aunyukule kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Pashishe neaye nawu ku tshilambuilu." 
Numbers5:26 Nanku mutuangaji ambule dianza dia bukula bua tshivulukilu, aboshe pa tshilambuilu. Pashishe neanuishe mukaji awu mayi a bululu awu." 
Numbers5:27 Mukaji munue mayi, bidi ne bua kuenzeka mbiobi ebi: yeye mudinyange bushuwa, mudinge bayende, nanku mayi a bululu neamutue munda, amuwuje difu, ashale nkumba. Nanku neikale tshilejilu tshidi bantu batshipangane natshi, batela dina diende." 
Numbers5:28 Kadi pikalaye kayi mumanye bualu, kayi mudinyange, mayi a bululu aa kaena amuenzela bualu to. Nealele bana." 
Numbers5:29 “Mukenji ewu udi bua mukaji yonsu udibu babanda bua tshiendenda, nansha yeye muenze bualu bubi, mudinyange, mudinge bayende," 
Numbers5:30 nansha yeye kayi muenze bualu, bamubanda patupu. Bayende neamuimanyike kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua mutuangaji amuenzele malu aa onsu." 
Numbers5:31 Nanku, bayende kena ne bualu to. Amu mukaji neapete dinyoka, pikalaye muenze bibi.”" 
Numbers6:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe," 
Numbers6:2 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: — Pikala mulume nansha mukaji ulaya bua kudijidila bu muena nazire, bua kungenzela meme Maweja-Nangila mudimu," 
Numbers6:3 muntu awu kena mua kunua mvinyo nansha maluvu makole to. Kena mua kunua maluvu a buanji, kena mua kunua mayi a tumuma tua mvinyo, kena mua kudia tumuma tua mvinyo tubishi, nansha tume." 
Numbers6:4 Matuku atshidiye mudijidile awu, kena mua kudia tshintu tshipika ne tumuma tua mvinyo, nansha ntete yatu nansha bikamfu biatu." 
Numbers6:5 Kabidi kena mua kubeya nsuki ne miedi, too ne pakumbana matuku onsu avuaye mulaye bua kudijidila. Neikale wa tshijila, nsuki ne miedi bilepa naka!" 
Numbers6:6 Matuku onsu adiye mudijidile, kena mua kusemena pabuipi ne tshitalu," 
Numbers6:7 nansha tshia tatuende, tshia mamuende, tshia muanabu wa balume nansha wa bakaji, bualu udi mua kupeta mikiya. Nsuki yende idi ijadika mudiye mudifile bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu." 
Numbers6:8 “Matuku onsu awu, muntu awu ikale anu mudijidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers6:9 Pikala muntu mufue lufu lua tshikosu pabuipi nende, matuku ende a tshijila mmanyanguke, bualu udi ne mikiya bua tshitalu atshi. Papita matuku muanda mutekete kena kabidi ne mikiya to. Diba adi neakungule nsuki." 
Numbers6:10 Dituku dia muanda mukulu neaye ne tumandankutshi tubidi nansha ne nkudimba ibidi kudi mutuangaji, mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers6:11 Mutuangaji nealambule nyunyi umue bua mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu, nyunyi mukuabu bua mulambu wa kuosha. Neakobolole muntu awu bua kumusha mikiya, bualu uvua musemene pabuipi ne tshitalu. Dituku adi, mutuangaji neamuambile ne: udi mua kudijidila tshiakabidi." 
Numbers6:12 Muntu awu, neatuadije kabidi kudijidila. Nealambule muana wa mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue bua mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu. Matuku onsu avuaye mumane kudijidila awu, kabena baabale kabidi to, bualu mmamane kunyanguka." 
Numbers6:13 “Ke mikenji idi itangila muena nazire. Muntu yonsu udi mumane kukumbaja matuku avuaye mudijidile, nebaye nende mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers6:14 Afile bimuna bisatu, kabiyi ne tshilema pambidi, bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila: muana wa mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue bua mulambu wa kuosha, lukungulu lua mukoku lua tshidimu tshimue bua mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga wa mulambu wa bobumue." 
Numbers6:15 Afile kabidi mikata, kayiyi miela buanga bua mampa, kadi milamba mu mafuta, tshisaka tente. Ikale kabidi ne tuampa tukese katuyi tuela buanga, tulaba mafuta, kabidi ne bukula ne mvinyo, bia kulambula musangu umue ne milanbu mikuabu." 
Numbers6:16 Nanku, mutuangaji neafile milambu yonsu eyi kudi Maweja-Nangila. Pashishe, udi ulambula mulambu wa kuosha ne wa kumukobolola nawu." 
Numbers6:17 Nealambule kabidi ne mukoku wa tshimpanga bua mulambu wa bobumue, pamue ne tshisaka tshia mikata kayiyi miela buanga bua mampa. Pashishe nealambule bukula ne mvinyo." 
Numbers6:18 Diba mene adi, muena nazire neakunguile nsuki mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Nsuki yende ayi, neayele mu kapia, muaba udibu bosha mulambu wa bobumue." 
Numbers6:19 Muntu awu mumane kukungula nsuki, mutuangaji neamupeshe diboku dia mukoku wa tshimpanga dimane kulamba, kabidi ne mukata mulamba kabayi bela buanga wa mu tshisaka, kabidi ne kampa. Pashishe neabiteke bionsu mu bianza bia muntu awu." 
Numbers6:20 Pashishe mutuangaji neele bintu abi mulu, neabinyukule bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila. Nanku bintu abi nebishale bia mutuangaji. Neangate kabidi tshiadi ne tshibelu bia nyama bu mudi tshibidilu. Pashishe muntu awu udi mua kutuadija kunua maluvu." 
Numbers6:21 “Ke mikenji idi itangila muena nazire. Ke bintu bidiye ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila. Pikalaye mua kusakidila milambu mikuabu udi mua kuenza. Kadi alambule nangananga bivuaye mumane kulaya bua kudijidila bu muena nazire. ” 
Numbers6:22 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers6:23 — Umanyishe Arone ne bana bende meyi adibu mua kuamba bua kuela bena Izrayele lupemba. Nebambe ne: 
Numbers6:24 “Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba, anulame." 
Numbers6:25 Maweja-Nangila anuleje mpala wa mimuemue, anufuile luse." 
Numbers6:26 Maweja-Nangila anuakidile bimpe, anupe bupole!”" 
Numbers6:27 Padi batuangaji batela dina dianyi nanku, bua kuela bena Izrayele lupemba, meme nkayanyi nembele lupemba." 
Numbers7:1 Moshe mumane kuasa nzubu wa tshijila mujikije, kujidilaye nzubu awu kabidi ne bintu bionsu bivua mu nzubu pa kubilaba manyi. Kujidilaye kabidi tshilambuilu ne bintu bionsu bivuaku, kubilabaye manyi." 
Numbers7:2 Diba adi bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele bavua balombola dibadika dia bantu, kufika ne milambu yabu." 
Numbers7:3 Kuimanyikabu milambu yabu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila: Matempu asambombu mabuikila tshilamba, ne ngombe dikumi ne ibidi. Ditempu dionsu divua mulambu bua bamfumu babidi, ngombe yonsu uvua mulambu bua mfumu umue. Bamfumu kufika ne milambu ayi kumpala kua nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers7:4 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers7:5 — Wangate milambu yabu. Matempu ne ngombe ebi, nebakuate nabi mudimu bua ntenta wa kusambakena. Ubifile kudi bena Levi bilondeshile midimu idibu nayi." 
Numbers7:6 Nanku, Moshe kuangata matempu ne ngombe, kubiabanyina bena Levi." 
Numbers7:7 Kupeshaye bena Ngershone matempu abidi ne ngombe inayi, bua bibambuluishe mu mudimu udibu nawu." 
Numbers7:8 Kupeshaye kabidi bena Merari, matempu anayi ne ngomba muanda mukulu, bua mudimu udibu benza ku bulombodi bua Itamare, muana wa Arone." 
Numbers7:9 Kadi kena mupeshe bena Kekate tshintu to. Bualu bobu bavua ne bua kulama bimpe bintu bia tshijila, kubiambula pa makaya." 
Numbers7:10 Dituku dia kujidila tshilambuilu, kutshilaba manyi, bamfumu ba bena Izrayele kufika kabidi ne milambu, kuya nayi kumpala kua tshilambuilu." 
Numbers7:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Bamfumu kabena mua kufika bonsu musangu umue to. Dituku dionsu mfumu umue afile milambu yende bua kujidila tshilambuilu. 
Numbers8:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe," 
Numbers8:2 bua ambile Arone ne: — Paudi utemesha miendu muanda mutekete, uyiteke bimpe bua itokeshe kumpala kua tshitekelu tshia miendu." 
Numbers8:3 Arone kukumbaja bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Kutekaye miendu ayi bimpe bua kutokeshayi kumpala kua tshitekelu tshia miendu. 
Numbers8:4 Tshitekelu tshia miendu tshivua tshifula ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi, biangatshile ku dikasa diatshi too ne ku tshilongu tshiatshi tshia ndekelu. Bavua batshienze bilondeshile tshilejilu tshivua Maweja-Nangila muleje Moshe." 
Numbers8:5 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers8:6 “Umbusha bena Levi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bua kumusha mikiya idi pambidi pabu." 
Numbers8:7 Newenze nunku: ubamiamine mayi bua kubakobolola nawu. Pashishe bakungule boya bonsu mubidi mujima, basukule bilamba biabu. Nanku kabakuikala kabidi ne mikiya to." 
Numbers8:8 Pashishe bena Levi nebafile ngombe mulume pamue ne mulambu wa bukula, busambakaja ne mafuta. Kadi wewe newangate ngombe mulume mukuabu bua mulambu wa kubakobolola nawu." 
Numbers8:9 Usangishe bena Izrayele bonsu, wimanyike bena Levi kumpala kuanyi, pabuipi ne ntenta wa kusambakena. Bena Izrayele nebabatenteke bianza." 
Numbers8:10  
Numbers8:11 Nanku, Arone neajidile bena Levi, abandambule meme Maweja-Nangila pa muaba wa bena Izrayele bonsu, bua bangenzele mudimu." 
Numbers8:12 Bena Levi nebatenteke bianza pa mutu pa ngombe ibidi bua kuyindambula meme Maweja-Nangila, umue bua mulambu wa kubakobolola nawu, mukuabu bua mulambu wa kuosha." 
Numbers8:13 Pashishe, wimanyike bena Levi kumpala kua Arone ne bana bende ba balume, bua kubanjidila, bua bikale banyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers8:14 Ke muudi ne bua kumusha bena Levi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bakuabu. Tshisamba tshia bena Levi netshikale tshianyi meme. 
Numbers8:15 Kutuadija dituku adi, bena Levi badi mua kuenza mudimu wabu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. “Nanku Moshe umushe mikiya pambidi pa bena Levi bua kubajidila, bikale banyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers8:16 Bualu ndi mubasungule pa muaba wa bena Izrayele bakuabu. Ndi mubangate pa muaba wa bamuanabute ba bena Izrayele. 
Numbers8:17 Bualu, bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele too ne ku ba bimuna biabu mbanyi meme Maweja-Nangila. Bituadije dituku dimvua mubutule bamuanabute ba bena Ejipitu, ndi muangate bamuanabute ba bena Izrayele bua bikale banyi ba tshijila." 
Numbers8:18 Kadi ndi musungule bena Levi, bua bapingane pa muaba wa bamuanabute bonsu ba bena Izrayele." 
Numbers8:19 Ndi mubapeshe Arone ne bana bende ba balume bua babambuluishe mu dina dia bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu. Nebenze mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena pa muaba wa bena Izrayele bonsu, bua kukobolola bena Izrayele. Nanku tshiakuikala kabidi ne tshilumbu tshia kunyoka bena Izrayele badi basemena pabuipi ne muaba wa tshijila to.”" 
Numbers8:20 Moshe ne Arone pamue ne bena Izrayele bonsu, kukumbaja bimpe bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu muambe bua kuenzela bena Levi." 
Numbers8:21 Bena Levi kudilongolola, kumusha mikiya yabu, kusukula bilamba biabu. Pashishe, Arone kubajidila bua bikale bantu ba Maweja-Nangila. Kubakobololaye bua kumusha mikiya." 
Numbers8:22 Nanku Moshe kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile bua kuenzela bena Levi. Ke bena Levi kutuadija mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Arone ne bana bende ba balume ke bavua babalombola. 
Numbers8:23 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Moshe ne: 
Numbers8:24 — Padi bena Levi bakumbaja bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu, ubateke bua bangenzele mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers8:25 Kadi pakumbajabu bidimu makumi atanu, mudimu wabu udi ujika." 
Numbers8:26 Kadi nebashale bua kuambuluisha bana babu batshidi ku mudimu. Ke mudi bena Levi mua kungenzela mudimu nanku. 
Numbers9:1 Mu ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu tshivua tshilonda tshidimu tshivua bena Izrayele bapatuka mu Ejipitu Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe mu tshipela tshia Sinayi ne: 
Numbers9:2 — Bena Izrayele nebenze tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila amu matuku mabafundile. 
Numbers9:3 Nanku, mu matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala ewu, dilolu menemene, nenungenzele tshibilu etshi, bilondeshile mikenji yatshi ne bibidilu biatshi." 
Numbers9:4 Moshe kumanyisha bena Izrayele meyi awu. 
Numbers9:5 Nanku, matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala, dilolu menemene, bena Izrayele kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila mu tshipela tshia Sinayi, bilondeshile muvua mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
Numbers9:6 Kadi bantu bakuabu bavua ne mikiya dituku adi bua bitalu bivuabu balenge. Nanku kabavua mua kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila to. Kuyabu kuebeja Moshe ne Arone. 
Numbers9:7 Kuambilabu Moshe ne: — Tuetu tudi ne mikiya, bualu tudi balenge bitalu. Kadi katuena mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu mudi bena Izrayele netu bonsu benza bua tshinyi? Bualu mudi dituku difundile tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila anyi?" 
Numbers9:8 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Indilayi, Maweja-Nangila angambile tshinudi mua kuenza." 
Numbers9:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers9:10 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Bituadije ku lelu, too ne ku ndelanganyi yenu yonsu, pikala bena Izrayele ne mikiya bua tshitalu tshivuabu balenge, nansha bikale ku luendu dituku didibu bangenzela tshibilu tshia Dipita dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila," 
Numbers9:11 nebenze amu tshibilu atshi, kadi mu matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu muibidi dilolu. Nebadie munyinyi wa muana wa mukoku, ne mampa adi kaayi mela buanga, ne biseki bia bululu." 
Numbers9:12 Munyinyi awu, nebaujikije dituku anu dimue. Kabena mua kuboza mufuba wa mukoku to. Nebalonde amu mikenji ya tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers9:13 Kadi pikala muntu kayi muye ku luendu, nansha kayi ne mikiya bua tshitalu tshivuaye mulenge, ulengulula tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila dituku dimufundile ku bukole, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu. Numumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bualu kavua musue kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu pa diba diayi." 
Numbers9:14 Pikala benyi badi munkatshi muenu basue kungenzela tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, batshienze mudi mikenji ne bibidilu biatshi. Bualu mikenji idi anu mushindu umue bua benyi ne bena ditunga.”" 
Numbers9:15 Dituku divuabu base nzubu wa tshijila, divuba divua dibuikila ntenta uvua ne mushete wa ndondu. Butuku, divuba adi divua dikenka bu kapia too ne muatshiabu." 
Numbers9:16 Matuku onsu bivua amu nanku: divuba dibuikila nzubu, dikenka bu kapia butuku." 
Numbers9:17 Misangu yonsu ivua divuba adi diumuka pa mutu pa ntenta, bena Izrayele bavua bajula mitanda, bua kuyasa muaba uvuadi dimana." 
Numbers9:18 Nanku, bena Izrayele bavua bajula mitanda, bayasa muaba mukuabu, pavua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kabavua baya kuasa mitanda muaba mukuabu, pavua divuba dishale kuimana pa nzubu wa tshijila." 
Numbers9:19 Nanku pavua divuba dishale dibuikila muaba wa tshijila matuku a bungi, bena Izrayele kabavua bumuka muaba awu to. Bavua anu bindila diyi dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers9:20 Pavua divuba adi dishala dibuikila muaba wa tshijila matuku makese, bena Izrayele bavua bashale muaba awu matuku makese. Nanku bavua bajula mitanda, bayasa tshiakabidi amu ku diyi dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers9:21 Matuku makuabu divuba divua dishale muaba umue amu butuku bumue, nansha dituku dimue ne butuku bumue. Kadi pavuadi dibanda kulu, bena Izrayele kubanga luendu musangu umue." 
Numbers9:22 Pavua divuba adi dishale muaba wa tshijila matuku abidi, ngondu mujima, nansha matuku mapite bungi, bena Izrayele bavua anu basombe, bindile bua divuba dibande." 
Numbers9:23 Nanku, bua bena Izrayele kuasa mitanda, nansha kumuka muaba uvuabu basombe, anu ku diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Bavua bamuenzela mudimu anu bilondeshile mikenji ivuaye muambile Moshe." 
Numbers10:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers10:2 — Wenzeje mpungi ibidi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bua kubikila nayi bantu, nansha bua kubamanyisha diba didi tshiluilu tshionsu mua kubanga luendu." 
Numbers10:3 Pelabu mpungi ayi ibidi musangu umue, bantu bonsu basemene pabuipi nebe mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers10:4 Pelabu amu mpungi umue, bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele nkayabu nebasemene pabuipi nebe." 
Numbers10:5 Pelabu mpungi ne bibingu musangu umue, ntshimanyinu tshia kutuadija luendu. Musangu wa kumpala udibu bela mpungi nanku, bena Izrayele badi basombe luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ntenta wa kusambakena nebatuadije luendu." 
Numbers10:6 Musangu muibidi udibu bela mpungi ne bibingu, bena Izrayele badi basombe luseke lua kuinshi kua ntenta wa kusambakena, nebatuadije luendu." 
Numbers10:7 Kadi, bua kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu muaba umue, bele amu mpungi kukuyi bibingu." 
Numbers10:8 “Badi mua kuela mpungi anu kudi batuangaji, bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone. Ke mikenji inudi ne bua kulama nuenu, ne ndelanganyi yenu kashidi." 
Numbers10:9 “Panudi nuya ku mvita mu ditunga dienu bua kuluisha bena lukuna benu, nuele mpungi ne bibingu bia mvita musangu umue. Nanku, Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nennuvuluke. Nennusungidile mu bianza bia baluishi benu." 
Numbers10:10 Panudi nuenza tshibilu dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu yonsu, nansha tshibilu tshia mushindu mukuabu, nenuele mpungi diba didibu bandambula milambu ya kuosha, nansha milambu ya bobumue. Nanku, nennuvuluke. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu.”" 
Numbers10:11 Matuku makumi abidi a ngondu muibidi wa tshidimu tshivua tshilonda tshidimu tshivua bena Izrayele bapatuke mu Ejipitu, divuba kubanda mulu ku ntenta wa kusambakena, uvua ne mushete wa ndondu." 
Numbers10:12 Bena Izrayele kubanga luendu, kumuka ku tshipela tshia Sinayi. Divuba kuimana, kutuluka mu tshipela tshia Parane." 
Numbers10:13 Ke musangu wa kumpala uvua bena Izrayele bamuangala mushindu uvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. 
Numbers10:14 Tshiluilu tshivua ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Yuda kupita kumpala, bena mvita bambule dibendela diabu. Nashone, muana wa Aminadabe, ke uvua ulombola bena Yuda." 
Numbers10:15 Bena tshisamba tshia Isakare kulonda, babalombola kudi Netaneyele, muana wa Shuware." 
Numbers10:16 Pashishe kulondabu kudi bena tshisamba tshia Zebulone, babalombola kudi Eliyabe, muana wa Elone." 
Numbers10:17 Kutulabu ntenta wa kusambakena, kumuambulabu kudi bena diku dia Ngershone ne dia Merari. Kubangabu luendu." 
Numbers10:18 Pashishe tshiluilu tshivua ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Rubene kubanga luendu, bena mvita bambula dibendela diabu. Elishure, muana wa Shedeyure, ke uvua ulombola bena Rubene." 
Numbers10:19 Bena tshisamba tshia Shimeyone kulonda, babalombola kudi Shelumiyele, muana wa Surishadayi." 
Numbers10:20 Bena tshisamba tshia Ngade kulonda, babalombola kudi Eliyasafe, muana wa Deyuwele." 
Numbers10:21 Bena tshisamba tshia Levi ba ku ndelanganyi ya Kekate bavua bambule bintu bia tshijila menemene. Kulondabu ne bintu abi. Bualu bena Levi bakuabu bavua ne bua kuasa nzubu wa tshijila, bena Kehate kabayi banji kufika." 
Numbers10:22 Pashishe tshiluilu tshivua ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Efrayime kubanga luendu, bena mvita bambula dibendela diabu. Elishama, muana wa Amikude, ke uvua ulombola bena Efrayime." 
Numbers10:23 Bena tshisamba tshia Menashe kulonda, babalombola kudi Ngameliyele, muana wa Pedashure." 
Numbers10:24 Bena tshisamba tshia Binyamine kulonda, babalombola kudi Abidane, muana wa Ngideyoni." 
Numbers10:25 Tshiluilu tshivua ku diyi dia tshisamba tshia Dane kulonda muaba wa ndekelu, bena mvita bambula dibendela diabu. Akiyezere, muana wa Amishadayi, ke uvua ulombola bena Dane." 
Numbers10:26 Bena tshisamba tshia Ashere kulonda, babalombola kudi Pagiyele, muana wa Okrane." 
Numbers10:27 Bena tshisamba tshia Naftali kulonda, babalombola kudi Akira, muana wa Eyinane." 
Numbers10:28 Ke muvua biluilu bia bena Izrayele bilondangane nanku mu luendu luabu. 
Numbers10:29 Moshe kuambila bukonde buende, Obabe, muana wa Reyuwele, muena Madiyane, ne: — Tuetu tudi tuya mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila mutulaye. Nanku mbimpe tuye nebe. Tshintu tshionsu tshikale Maweja-Nangila mutupeshe, neupete pebe." 
Numbers10:30 Obabe kubenga, wamba ne: — Tshiena mua kuya nenu to. Ndi mpingana kuetu kudi baledi banyi." 
Numbers10:31 Moshe kumusengelela ne: — Kutulekedi nansha! Wewe udi mumanye miaba ya mu tshipela itudi mua kuasa mitanda. Neutuludike. 
Numbers10:32 Wewe muye netu, netukusankishe ne bintu bituikala bapete kudi Maweja-Nangila, bu muvuaye mutulaye." 
Numbers10:33 Bena Izrayele kumuangala ku mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila, kuenda matuku asatu. Mushete wa ndondu uvua mubadianjidile bua kubaleja muaba uvuabu mua kuasa mitanda yabu bimpe." 
Numbers10:34 Divuba dia Maweja-Nangila divua dienda kulu kua bena Izrayele mu munya, pavuabu babanga luendu." 
Numbers10:35 Pavua bantu bajuka ne mushete wa ndondu, Moshe uvua wela diyi dikole, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, juka, bua bena lukuna bebe bamuangalake, baluishi bebe banyeme! ”" 
Numbers10:36 Pavua bena Izrayele bafike ne mushete wa ndondu muaba wa kuasa mitanda, Moshe uvua wela kabidi diyi dikole, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, pinganaku, usombe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bantu bebe bapite bungi.”" 
Numbers11:1 Dituku dikuabu bena Izrayele bavua bajana Maweja-Nangila bikole. Maweja-Nangila umvua nanku, kufikaye munda. Kapia ka Maweja-Nangila kutema munkatshi muabu, kuosha tshitupa tshia mitanda." 
Numbers11:2 Bena Izrayele kudidila Moshe. Kubalombelaye kudi Maweja-Nangila. Kapia kujima. 
Numbers11:3 Kuinyikabu muaba awu dina ne: Tabera, mmumue ne: kapia, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muoshe mitanda yabu muaba awu." 
Numbers11:4 Dituku dikuabu bantu benyi ba mishindu yonsu bavua basombe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele kukuatshika lukuka lua munyinyi. Bena Izrayele mene kutuadija kudiabakena, bebejangana ne: “Udi mua kutupesha munyinyi wa tuetu kudia nnganyi?" 
Numbers11:5 Mu Ejipitu tuvua tusanka! Tuvua ne biakudia bipite bungi: mishipa katuyi tusumba, bisekiseki bivule, mawoji, bimuma bia melone, matungulu a mishindu mishilangane ne ndungu." 
Numbers11:6 Mpindiewu tudi tuenda tubutuka, katuyi ne biakudia bionsu ebi! Anu mana kututonda diba dionsu!”" 
Numbers11:7 Mana avua mushindu wa ntete ya koriyandre, mitoke too, mafuanangane ne budimbu bua mutshi wa mbdeliyume." 
Numbers11:8 Butuku mana avua amata mu mitanda ne lumuma musangu umue. Dinda, bena Izrayele bavua baye kuangula, baapela pankatshi pa mabue abidi, nansha baatua mu tshinu. Pashishe bavua baalamba mu ngesu, nansha baenza mikata. Avua ne muenya bu wa mikata milamba ne mafuta." 
Numbers11:9  
Numbers11:10 Moshe kumvua muvua bena Izrayele badila muadi, basombela ku diku ku diku mu mishiku ya ntenta yabu. Maweja-Nangila kufika munda bikole. Bualu ebu kutonda Moshe." 
Numbers11:11 Moshe kuebeja Maweja-Nangila ne: — Udi unkengesha nenku, kuyi umfuila luse bua tshinyi? Udi umpesha bantu bungi nenku, bua meme kubalombola bualu kaayi?" 
Numbers11:12 Meme tshiena muimite, tshiena mulele bantu bonsu aba to! Muudi ungambila bua meme kubambula bu mudi ndeji wambula muana pambidi, bua kubafikisha mu ditunga diuvua mulaye bankambua babu, mbishi?" 
Numbers11:13 Munyinyi wa kudia, udi bena Izrayele bonsu aba bandomba, badila ne muadi, meme ndi mua kuupeta kuepi?" 
Numbers11:14 Meme nkayanyi tshiena mua kujikija makenga a bena Izrayele bonsu aba to. Bujitu buabu budi bumpite! 
Numbers11:15 Paudi musue kunkengesha nanku, mbimpe unshipe. Ke muudi mua kumfuila luse, tshiyi mmona kabidi dikenga dindi nadi edi to!" 
Numbers11:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Unsunguile bakulu ba bena Izrayele makumi muanda mutekete, bantu baudi mujadike ne: mbakulu ba bushuwa, balombodi ba bena Izrayele. Ufike nabu ku ntenta wa kusambakena. Wimane nabu kumpala kuanyi." 
Numbers11:17 Meme nempueke muaba awu bua kuyukila nebe. Bukole bua Mueyelu wanyi buudi nabu, nembuabanyine kabidi bakulu abu tshitupa. Nanku kuakuikala nkayebe ne mudimu wa kulama bantu. Bakulu abu nebakuambuluishe." 
Numbers11:18 Ambila kabidi bena Izrayele ne: “Nudilongolole bua dituku dia maloba, numushe mikiya! Nebanutumine munyinyi, bualu Maweja-Nangila mumvue miadi yenu ne: Udi mua kutupesha munyinyi nnganyi? Mu Ejipitu, tuvua bimpe bitambe! Nanku, Maweja-Nangila neanupeshe munyinyi wa nuenu kudia." 
Numbers11:19 Munyinyi awu kawakuikala wa dituku dimue, matuku abidi, asatu, dikumi, nansha makumi abidi to." 
Numbers11:20 Nenuudie ngondu mujima. Neunutonde, unupatukila mu diulu. Ke muanunyokabu, bualu nuvua nudiabakena, nujinga Ejipitu, nulengulula Maweja-Nangila udi munkatshi muenu.”" 
Numbers11:21 Moshe kukema, wamba ne: — Akia! Bena Izrayele badi muaba ewu mbapite pa binunu nkama isambombu. Muudi mua kuamba ne: nembapeshe munyinyi, mbadisha ngondu mujima mbishi?" 
Numbers11:22 Tuetu bashipe mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe yonsu itudi nayi, nansha tuetu baloba mishipa yonsu ya mu mayi manene, kabiena mua kukumbana bantu aba to!" 
Numbers11:23 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Moshe ne: — Meme ndi ne bukole bua kukumbaja bionsu abi. Wewe nkayebe neudimuene amu mpindiewu mundi mbikumbaja. 
Numbers11:24 Moshe kumuka ku ntenta, kuya kuambila bantu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Pashishe kubikilaye bakulu ba bena Izrayele makumi muanda mutekete, kubimanyika ku ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers11:25 Maweja-Nangila kupueka mu divuba bua kuyukila ne Moshe. Kuabanyinaye bakulu ba bena Izrayele abu, tshitupa tshia bukole bua Mueyelu wende, buvuaye mupeshe Moshe. Bakulu bamane kupeta Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kutuadijabu kuakula bu bambi. Kadi kabivua bitungunuka to." 
Numbers11:26 Ku bantu makumi muanda mutekete abu, bantu babidi, Eldade ne Medade, bavua bashale ku mitanda. Kabavua baye ku ntenta wa kusambakena to. Kadi kupetabu pabu Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kubangabu kuakula bu bambi munkatshi mua mitanda." 
Numbers11:27 Nsongalume mukuabu kuyaye lubilu kudi Moshe, umuambila ne: — Eldade ne Medade bavua bashale ku mitanda, badi bakula bu bambi!" 
Numbers11:28 Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, uvua wambuluisha Moshe bituadije ku buana, kuelaye diyi ne: — Mfumuanyi Moshe, ubakandike, kabenji nanku!" 
Numbers11:29 Moshe kuandamuna ne: — Lekela kungumvuila mukawu! Meme ndi njinga ne: Maweja-Nangila apeshe bena Izrayele bonsu Mueyelu wende bua bikale bonsu bambi! 
Numbers11:30 Pashishe Moshe ne bakulu makumi muanda mutekete ba bena Izrayele, kupingana ku mitanda." 
Numbers11:31 Maweja-Nangila kujula lupepela lufumina ku mayi manene. Kufikalu ne nyunyi ya tulumbu ku mitanda aku. Nyunyi ayi ivua mikilangane panshi minyungulule mitanda, mutantshi wa luendu lua dituku dijima, mienza mushiki bu metre mujima." 
Numbers11:32 Bena Izrayele kubanga kuangula nyunyi dituku adi, butuku bujima, too dituku dibiidi dijima. Uvua uyangula mikese, uvua nayi kilos binunu! Bavua bayiteka panshi nseke yonsu ku mpenga kua mitanda bua kuyanyika." 
Numbers11:33 Kadi, bena Izrayele kabayi banji kujikija kudia, munyinyi awu mutshikale mukana, Maweja-Nangila kubafikila munda. Kubatuminaye tshipupu tshikole." 
Numbers11:34 Kuinyikabu muaba awu ne: Kibrote-Taawa, mmumue ne: nkita ya bena lukuka. Bualu ke muaba uvuabu bajiike bena Izrayele bavua ne lukuka lua munyinyi." 
Numbers11:35 Bena Izrayele kumbuka ku Kibrote-Taawa, kuya kuasa mitanda yabu ku Asherote." 
Numbers12:1 Moshe uvua musele mukaji muena Kushe. Arone ne Miriyame kumujana bua mukaji awu. 
Numbers12:2 Bavua bamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmuyukile amu ne Moshe nkayende anyi? Kena uyukila kabidi netu anyi? Maweja-Nangila kumvua tshijanu atshi. 
Numbers12:3 Kadi Moshe uvua muntu wa muoyi mupuekele, mupite bantu bonsu ba pa buloba ku lutulu." 
Numbers12:4 Maweja-Nangila kubikila Moshe, Arone ne Miriyame, ubambila ne: — Ndayi bonsu basatu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Kuyabu bonsu basatu." 
Numbers12:5 Maweja-Nangila kupueka mu divuba, kuimana mu mushiku wa ntenta. Kubikilaye Arone ne Miriyame muaba awu. Bonsu babidi kusemena pabuipi." 
Numbers12:6 Maweja-Nangila kubambila ne: — Nuteleje bimpe tshindi nnuambila. Pikala muntu wa kunudi muambi, meme Maweja-Nangila nendimanyishe kudiye, mmuleje malu mu lungenyi, nansha mu tshilota." 
Numbers12:7 Kadi, bua muntu wanyi Moshe kabiena nanku to. Bualu yeye ke udi ulombola bimpe bantu banyi bonsu bena Izrayele." 
Numbers12:8 Ndi ngakula nende mudi bantu bayukidilangana, mmuambile malu onsu patoke, ndileja kudiye. Yeye udi umona tshimfuanyi tshianyi. Kadi nuvua nukimina kujana muntu wanyi Moshe bua tshinyi?" 
Numbers12:9 Maweja-Nangila kumuka muaba awu ne tshiji. 
Numbers12:10 Divuba kumuka ku musonga wa ntenta. Miriyame kupeta disama dia nsudi, mitoke too bu mudi busu bua ndanda. Arone umutangila, kujadikaye ne: Miriyame udi ne disama dia nsudi." 
Numbers12:11 Arone kusengelela Moshe, wamba ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, tudi bena tshibawu. Kadi ndi nkusengelela ne: Kutunyoki bua bubi butudi benze." 
Numbers12:12 Mubidi wa Miriyame kawena mua kunyanguka, ufiondoka makoba bu wa muana mufuile munda!" 
Numbers12:13 Moshe kulomba Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, anyisha ondapa disama edi!" 
Numbers12:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Bu tatuende mumutuile mate mu mesu, kavua mua kufua bundu lumingu lujima anyi? Nanku numupatule mu mitanda bua lumingu lujima kabidi. Pashishe, neapingane kabidi munkatshi muenu." 
Numbers12:15 Kupatulabu Miriyame mu mitanda lumingu lujima. Bena Izrayele bonsu bavua bamuindile bangabanga ne kutuadija luendu. 
Numbers12:16 Pashishe kumukabu mu Asherote bua kuya kuasa mitanda mu tshipela tshia Parane. 
Numbers13:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers13:2 — Usungule mukulu umue ku tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele. Utume bakulu aba bua batentekele ditunga dia bena Kenaane, dindi mpesha bena Izrayele." 
Numbers13:3 Moshe kuitaba diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Kusungulaye bantu bavua bonsu bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, bua bumuke mu tshipela tshia Parane, baye mu Kenaane." 
Numbers13:4 Mena a bamfumu abu adi nunku: Shamuwa, muana wa Zakure, wa mu tshisamba tshia Rubene." 
Numbers13:5 Shafate, muana wa Ori, wa mu tshisamba tshia Shimeyone." 
Numbers13:6 Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Numbers13:7 Igale, muana wa Yozefe, wa mu tshisamba tshia Isakare." 
Numbers13:8 Osheya, muana wa Nune, wa mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime." 
Numbers13:9 Palti, muana wa Rafu, wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine." 
Numbers13:10 Ngadiyele, muana wa Sodi, wa mu tshisamba tshia Zebulone." 
Numbers13:11 Ngadi, muana wa Sushi, wa mu tshisamba tshia Menashe, muana wa Yozefe." 
Numbers13:12 Amiyele, muana wa Ngemali, wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane." 
Numbers13:13 Seture, muana wa Mikayele, wa mu tshisamba tshia Ashere." 
Numbers13:14 Nabi, muana wa Wofsi, wa mu tshisamba tshia Naftali." 
Numbers13:15 Nguwele, muana wa Maki, wa mu tshisamba tshia Ngade." 
Numbers13:16 Bantu aba, ke bavua Moshe mutume bua kutentekela ditunga dia Kenaane. Nanku, Moshe kuinyika Osheya, muana wa Nune, dina dia Yoshuwa." 
Numbers13:17 Bangabanga ne Moshe kutuma batentekedi aba, kubambilaye ne: — Nubuele mu ditunga dia Kenaane amu ku luseke lua kuinshi kua ditunga. Pashishe nuye too ne ku muaba udi mikuna." 
Numbers13:18 Nujadike mudi ditunga adi. Nutangile mudi bena ditunga: badi ba bungi anyi mbakese? Badi ne bukole anyi mbafuba? 
Numbers13:19 Nujadike mushindu udi ditunga: didi dimpe anyi ndibi? Mbakoleshe bimenga ne bimana anyi, peshi mudi mitanda patupu?" 
Numbers13:20 Nubuele mu ditunga adi ne dikima. Nujadike ne: buloba ne budi ne bufuke, anyi budi buatuka? Mitshi ya bimuma idi itolokamu anyi? Nupingane kunu ne bimuma bia mu ditunga adi. Tshikondu atshi ke tshivua tumuma tua mvinyo tutuadija kukuama." 
Numbers13:21 Nanku, batentekedi abu kumuka mu tshipela tshia Tsine, kuya kutentekela ditunga dia Kenaane, too ne ku Rekobe, pabuipi ne Lebo-Amate." 
Numbers13:22 Kubuelabu mu ditunga luseke lua kuinshi. Kufikabu pabuipi ne Ebrone, muaba uvuabu base kudi bena Akimane, bena Sheshayi ne bena Talmayi. Bonsu aba ndelanganyi ya Anake, muntu wa mpolondu. (Bavua base tshimenga tshia Ebrone, bidimu muanda mutekete bangabanga ne kuasa tshimenga tshia Tanise mu Ejipitu.)" 
Numbers13:23 Kupuekabu mu tshibanda tshia Eshekole. Kukosabu ditamba dia mutshi wa mvinyo dikale ne tumuma. Kupolabu kabidi bimuma bia grenade ne bia mfiku. Kubisuikabu kaba kamue. Bantu babidi kuambula bionsu abi ku mukolu. 
Numbers13:24 Kuinyikabu muaba awu dina ne: tshibanda tshia Eshekole, bualu bena Izrayele bavua bapolamu tumuma tua mvinyo." 
Numbers13:25 Matuku makumi anayi mamane kupita, batentekedi kujikija mudimu wabu. Kupinganabu" 
Numbers13:26 ku Kadeshe, mu tshipela tshia Parane, muaba uvua Moshe, Arone ne bena Izrayele bonsu. Kubalondelabu bionsu bivuabu bamone mu Kenaane. Kubalejabu kabidi bimuma bia mu ditunga adi." 
Numbers13:27 Kuambilabu Moshe ne: — Tuafiki mu ditunga diuvua mututume. Didi ne biakudia bia bungi, mabele ne buitshi. Bimuma bia mu ditunga adi mbiebi." 
Numbers13:28 Kadi bantu badimu mbilobu bia mvita. Bimenga biabu bidi bialabale. Bavua babikoleshe ne bimana bile. Tuasanganyimu bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Anake, muntu wa mpolondu." 
Numbers13:29 Bena Amaleke mbase kuinshi kua ditunga. Bena Iti, bena Yebusa ne bena Amore mbase pa mikuna. Bena Kenaane mbase ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, ne wa musulu wa Yardene." 
Numbers13:30 Batentekedi bakuabu kudiwula Moshe. Kadi Kalebe kubapuwisha, wamba ne: — Tuyayi mu ditunga adi! Netutshimune bantu bonsu abu. Netubanyenge ditunga." 
Numbers13:31 Kadi batentekedi bavua baye ne Kalebe mu luendu alu kubenga, bamba ne: — Katuena mua kuluangana ne bantu aba to. Mbatupite bukole!" 
Numbers13:32 Nanku batentekedi abu kubipisha ditunga dia Kenaane, bamba ne: — Mu Kenaane bantu benyi kabena mua kusombamu to. Nebafue amu kufua. Kabidi bantu bonsu badimu mbantu bale!" 
Numbers13:33 Tuvua bamonemu ne bantu ba mpolondu, ndelanganyi ya Anake. Ku mesu kuabu tuetu tuvua badimone anu bu tunkenene. Bobu kabidi bavua mua kutumona nanku." 
Numbers14:1 Bena Izrayele bonsu kutshisha butuku ne mbila ya miadi," 
Numbers14:2 badiwula Moshe ne Arone, bamba ne: — Bivua bimpe tuetu kufuila mu Ejipitu, nansha mu tshipela emu!" 
Numbers14:3 Maweja-Nangila mmusue kutubueja mu ditunga dia Kenaane bua kutubutula mu mvita anyi? Bakaji betu ne bana nebashale bapika. Mbimpe tupingane mu Ejipitu! 
Numbers14:4 Kuambilanganabu ne: — Tusungulayi mfumu mukuabu, tupingane mu Ejipitu!" 
Numbers14:5 Moshe ne Arone kudiela panshi kumpala kua bena Izrayele bonsu. 
Numbers14:6 Kadi batentekedi babidi, Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ne Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, kubungama, kudipanda bilamba." 
Numbers14:7 Kuambilabu bena Izrayele bonsu ne: — Ditunga dituvua baye kutentekela didi dimpe ditambe. 
Numbers14:8 Didi ne biakudia bia bungi, mabele ne buitshi bidimu. Pikala Maweja-Nangila mututabalele, neatubueje mu ditunga adi bua tuetu kudikuata." 
Numbers14:9 Kadi, lekelayi kutombokela Maweja-Nangila. Kanutshinyi bena ditunga adi to. Netubabutule! Mvidie yabu ivuabu batekemene kayena kabidi ne bukole bua kubalama to! Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi netu. Nanku kanubatshinyi to." 
Numbers14:10 Bena Izrayele bonsu kukeba mua kubasa mabue, kubashipa. Kadi diakamue butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela bena Izrayele kulu kua ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers14:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ndi muenzele bantu aba bishima bia bungi bua kubaleja bukole buanyi. Kadi nebambenge too ne ku diba kaayi? Nebabenge kashidi bua kungitaba anyi? 
Numbers14:12 Nanku nembatumine disama dia tshiambu, mbabutula. Pashishe nengenze nebe tshisamba tshikuabu, tshidi tshipite bena Izrayele ku bungi ne ku bukole." 
Numbers14:13 Moshe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Bena Ejipitu mbamanye muudi mupatule bena Izrayele mu ditunga diabu ku bukole buebe. 
Numbers14:14 Bena Ejipitu mbamane kulondela bena Kenaane malu aa. Nanku bena Kenaane mbamane kumvua muudi wewe Maweja-Nangila wenda ne tshisamba tshiebe tshia bena Izrayele, umonangana nabu mpala ne mpala. Badi bamanye muudi ubalama, bualu mu munya udi wenda kumpala kuabu mu divuba, butuku mu tshimunyi tshia kapia." 
Numbers14:15 Kadi mpindiewu wewe mubutule bena Izrayele bonsu musangu umue, bisamba bikuabu bivua bimane kumvua lumu lua bukole buebe, nebiambe ne:" 
Numbers14:16 “Maweja-Nangila wapangi mua kufikisha bena Izrayele mu ditunga divuaye mubalaye. Ke padiye mubashipele mu tshipela.” 
Numbers14:17 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela ne: leja bukole buebe. Bualu uvua mutuambile ne:" 
Numbers14:18 “Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. Ndi ne luse lua bungi. Tshiena mfika munda lukasa. Ndi mfuila bantu luse bua mibi yabu, ne bua ditomboka diabu. Kadi tshiena mbingisha muntu udi mupile. Ndi nnyoka muana wa ku ndelanganyi misatu nansha minayi bua mibi ya baledi bende. ”" 
Numbers14:19 Nanku, ndi nkusengelela ne: fuila bena Izrayele luse bu muuvua mubenzele pavuabu bapatuke mu Ejipitu." 
Numbers14:20 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mbafuila luse bu muudi ulomba. 
Numbers14:21 Kadi ndi nditshipa ne: bu mundi ne muoyi, kabidi bu mudi buloba bujima buwule ne butumbi buanyi," 
Numbers14:22 muntu nansha umue wa ku ndelanganyi eyi kakubuela mu Kenaane to. Bualu bantu aba mbamane kumona butumbi buanyi, ne malu a dikema andi mubenzele mu Ejipitu ne mu tshipela. Kadi nansha bobu bamone nanku, kabavua bangitaba to. Bavua bantete misangu ne misangu!" 
Numbers14:23 Nanku, muntu wa kudibu nansha umue uvua muntombokele kena mua kufika mu ditunga dia Kenaane, dimvua mulaye bankambua babu to." 
Numbers14:24 Kadi, muntu wanyi Kalebe, uvua uleja muoyi muimpe. Yeye utshidi wanyi meme. Nemmufikishe mu ditunga edi divuaye muye kutentekela. Kabidi ndelanganyi yende neisombemu." 
Numbers14:25 (Bena Amaleke ne bena Kenaane ke badi basomba mpindiewu mu bibandabanda bia ditunga adi.) Nanku, nuenu bonsu, malaba nenupingane kunudi bafume. Nenupingane mu tshipela, batangile ku Mayi manene makunze." 
Numbers14:26 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers14:27 — Bantu babi aba nebangele mpata kashidi anyi? Ndi mumvue mudibu banjane. 
Numbers14:28 Kadi ndayi, nubambile ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ne muoyi. Nennunyoke bilondeshile bijanu bienu abi." 
Numbers14:29 Nuenu bonsu badi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne pa mutu, bavua banubadike, banufunde mena enu. Kadi, nenufuile bonsu mu tshipela emu, bualu nudi nunjana." 
Numbers14:30 Ndi nditshipa ne: kanuakufika mu ditunga dia Kenaane, dimvua munulaye to! Amu Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, ne Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, nebabuelemu." 
Numbers14:31 Kadi bana benu batekete banuvua nuelela meji ne: nebashale bapika, nembafikishe mu ditunga dia Kenaane, dinudi nubenga. Bobu nebadimanye." 
Numbers14:32 Nanku, nuenu nenufuile bonsu amu mu tshipela emu." 
Numbers14:33 Kadi bana benu nebashale mu tshipela emu bidimu makumi anayi, badisha amu bimuna biabu. Nebashale pabu mu dikenga bua dintombokela dienu, too ne panuabutuka bonsu, nuenu baledi babu." 
Numbers14:34 Nuvua batentekele ditunga adi matuku makumi anayi. Nenku, bua bubi buenu, ndi nnunyoke bidimu makumi anayi. Mmumue ne: dituku dimue nedienze tshidimu tshijima tshia tshibawu. Nenujadike ne: ki mbimpe kuntombokela meme Maweja-Nangila to." 
Numbers14:35 Ke tshimvua meme Maweja-Nangila ne bua kunuambila. Ndi nnujadikila ne: nennukengeshe too ne panuabutukila bonsu mu tshipela emu, bualu nudi bantu babi badi bantombokela.”" 
Numbers14:36 Bantu bavua Moshe mutume bua kutentekela ditunga dia Kenaane, kadi bavua bendeshila ditunga edi lumu lubi mu dipingana diabu, bua bena Izrayele bonsu batombokele Moshe," 
Numbers14:37 kufuabu bonsu. Maweja-Nangila kubabutula, bualu bavua bapepeje ditunga adi." 
Numbers14:38 Nanku, ku batentekedi bonsu bavua Moshe mutume, anu Yoshuwa ne Kalebe ke bavua bashale ne muoyi." 
Numbers14:39 Moshe kumanyisha bena Izrayele malu onsu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Bobu kudila miadi bikole. 
Numbers14:40 Butshia dinda, kuyabu ku mukuna, bambilangane ne: — Tudi bamane kuenza bibi! Kadi mpindiewu tudi basue kuya muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila mutuleje." 
Numbers14:41 Moshe kubebeja ne: — Tshinudi nuenza ntshinyi? Nudi nutupa ku diyi dia Maweja-Nangila! Nanku kanuakuikala ne diakalenga to! 
Numbers14:42 Maweja-Nangila kena nenu to! Nanku kanuyi to! Baluishi benu nebanubutule! 
Numbers14:43 Bena Amaleke ne bena Kenaane badi kunuyaya aku. Nebanubutule bonsu mu mvita. Maweja-Nangila kakuikala nenu to, bualu nudi bamubenge." 
Numbers14:44 Kadi, bena Izrayele bavua basue kuya ku mukuna ku bukole. Moshe kushala ku mitanda, pamue ne mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers14:45 Bena Amaleke ne bena Kenaane kupueka ku mukuna uvuabu basombe. Kuluanganabu ne bena Izrayele, kubatshimuna, kubipata too ne ku Orma." 
Numbers15:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe 
Numbers15:2 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Panuafika mu ditunga dindi musue kunupa bua nuenu kusomba," 
Numbers15:3 nungoshile nyama mijima bua kundambula. Nundambule kabidi milambu ya bobumue. Nuenze nanku bua kukumbaja malaya, nansha anu ku budisuile buenu, nansha kabidi bua bibilu. Milambu ayi, ikale ya ngombe, mbuji nansha mikoku. Nenganyishe mupuya muimpe wayi." 
Numbers15:4 Muntu yonsu udi undambula nyama, neasakidile kabidi ne mulambu wa bintu bia pa madimi: kilo isatu ya bukula, budibu basambakaje ne litre umue ne tshitupa wa mafuta." 
Numbers15:5 Kadi ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, wa mulambu wa kuosha nansha wa bobumue, asakidile kabidi litre umue ne tshitupa wa maluvu a mvinyo." 
Numbers15:6 Pikala mulambu wa mukoku wa tshimpanga, asakidile kilo isambombu ya bukula budibu basambakaja ne mafuta litre ibidi." 
Numbers15:7 Neasakidile kabidi maluvu a mvinyo litre ibidi. Nanku nenganyishe mupuya muimpe wabi. 
Numbers15:8 Pikala muntu musue kundambula ngombe bua mulambu wa kuosha nansha wa bobumue, nansha bua kukumbaja malaya, nansha bua mulambu wa tshibidilu," 
Numbers15:9 ku nyama yonsu awu, asakidile kilo tshitema ya bukula, budibu basambakaja ne mafuta litre isatu." 
Numbers15:10 Asakidile kabidi maluvu a mvinyo litre isatu. Nanku nenganyishe mupuya muimpe wabi. 
Numbers15:11 “Bena Izrayele balonde anu mikenji eyi, bua kundambula ngombe, mukoku wa tshimpanga, muana wa mukoku, nansha muana wa mbuji." 
Numbers15:12 Nansha muntu musue kundambula bimuna bia bungi, ku tshimuna tshionsu asakidile anu milambu mikuabu ituatedi eyi." 
Numbers15:13 Pikala bena Izrayele basue kundambula milambu ya mupuya muimpe idi insankisha, balonde bonsu anu mikenji eyi." 
Numbers15:14 Benyi badi basombe munkatshi muenu matuku makese, nansha benyi bamane kusombamu bidimu bia bungi, balelangane, bapete bikulu mu ditunga dienu, padibu basue kundambula milambu ya mupuya muimpe, balonde bonsu anu mikenji eyi." 
Numbers15:15 Nanku, bantu bonsu basanga ntete, nansha nuenu, nansha benyi badi munkatshi muenu, nulonde anu mikenji eyi, ku ndelanganyi ne ku ndelanganyi. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena ne kansungansunga to." 
Numbers15:16 Mikenji yanyi idi mushindu umue bua bantu bonsu, buenu nuenu bena Izrayele, ne bua benyi badi munkatshi muenu. ”" 
Numbers15:17 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe," 
Numbers15:18 bua kumanyishaye bena Izrayele ne: “Panuafika mu ditunga munganubueja," 
Numbers15:19 nuenu balambe mampa ne bukula bua mu ditunga, nundambule meme tshitupa tshia mampa aa." 
Numbers15:20 Nusope tshitapitapi, nuenze mikata, bua kuyindambula bu mudibu bandambula ntete inudi nushipula, panudi bamane kunowa." 
Numbers15:21 Nanku, nenundambule mukata wa kumpala unudi nulamba. Mukenji ewu ushale kabidi kashidi kudi ndelanganyi yenu yonsu." 
Numbers15:22 “Nuenu bena Izrayele ne ndelanganyi yenu, panuikala batupakane, batupe ku umue wa ku mikenji yanyi imvua munumanyishe mukana mua Moshe ku kale too ne ku mpindiewu," 
Numbers15:23  
Numbers15:24 pikala bantu batupakane nanku mu mpukapuka kabayi bamanye, nebangoshile bonsu pamue ngombe mulume bua mulambu wa kuosha. Nenganyishe mupuya muimpe wawu. Pashishe, nebasakidile kabidi milambu ya tshibidilu ya bukula ne ya maluvu a mvinyo. Nebasakidile kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu bua mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu." 
Numbers15:25 Nanku, mutuangaji neakobolole bena Izrayele bonsu basange ntete bu pa tshibidilu. Ke Maweja-Nangila kubafuila luse. Bualu bavua batupakane mu mpukapuka, bafila kabidi mulambu wa kuosha ne wa kubakobolola nawu." 
Numbers15:26 Nanku, nebafuile bonsu luse, nansha bena Izrayele, nansha benyi badi basombe munkatshi muabu, bualu bonsu nuvua babuelakane mu bualu ebu." 
Numbers15:27 “Kadi, pikala muntu amu umue mutupakane mu mpukapuka, neandambule muana wa mbuji wa tshidimu tshimue bua kudikobolola." 
Numbers15:28 Mutuangaji neakobolole muntu awu bua bamufuile luse. 
Numbers15:29 Nanku, muntu yonsu, muena Izrayele nansha muenyi, udi utupakana mu mpukapuka, nebamukobolole anu mushindu umue ewu." 
Numbers15:30 “Kadi muena Izrayele nansha muenyi, udi wenza bualu bubi ku bukole, udi upenda Maweja-Nangila. Nebamumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Numbers15:31 Neikale muena tshibawu, bualu mmubenge miaku yanyi, munyangakaje mikenji yanyi.”" 
Numbers15:32 Matuku avua bena Izrayele mu tshipela, kusanganabu muntu wangula nkunyi dituku dia Dikisha." 
Numbers15:33 Kumufikishabu kudi Moshe ne Arone muaba uvua bena Izrayele bonsu basangile. 
Numbers15:34 Kumulamabu bimpe, bindile mua kumanya dinyoka dia kumupesha." 
Numbers15:35 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Muntu awu tshiende ndufu! Bena Izrayele bonsu bumuke ne muena tshibawu awu muaba udi mitanda, bamuase mabue, bamushipe." 
Numbers15:36 Bena Izrayele kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila mubambile. Kumukabu ne muntu awu muaba uvua mitanda, kumuasabu mabue, kufuaye." 
Numbers15:37 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe 
Numbers15:38 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele ne: “Nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, nutele malenda ku mielelu ya bilamba bienu ne buanda bufikuluke." 
Numbers15:39 Nanku, nuvuale bilamba bitela ne malenda. Panuikala numona malenda awu, nenuvuluke mikenji yanyi bua kuyikumbaja. Kabidi kanuakutendelela mvidie, bua kulonda majinga enu mabi ne lukuka luenu." 
Numbers15:40 Nanku, nenukumbaje mikenji yanyi yonsu bua kuleja munudi bantu banyi." 
Numbers15:41 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Ndi munupatule mu Ejipitu bua ngikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Eyowa, ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu.”" 
Numbers16:1 Muena Levi mukuabu, diende Kora, muana wa Ishare, wa mu diku dia bena Kekate, uvua muambile bena Rubene basatu, Datane ne Abirame, bana ba Eliyabe, ne One, muana wa Pelete," 
Numbers16:2 meji mabi a kutombokela Moshe. Bena Izrayele bakuabu, nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, bamfumu ba meku ne bakulu, basombele babuela mu bisangilu, kuditua ku tshiabu." 
Numbers16:3 Bantu aba bonsu, kutombokela Moshe ne Arone, kubambila ne: — Nudi nukolesha malu! Tuetu bena Izrayele bonsu tudi bantu ba tshijila. Maweja-Nangila udi munkathi muetu bonsu. Munudi nuditemba, nuditeka kumpala kua bantu bakuabu ba Maweja-Nangila mbishi?" 
Numbers16:4 Moshe umvua nanku, kudielaye mpala panshi." 
Numbers16:5 Kuambilaye Kora ne bonsu bavuaye nabu ne: — Malaba dinda, Maweja-Nangila nkayende neatumanyishe muntu udi wa tshijila, udi mua kusemena pabuipi nende. Nanku, neanyishe bua muntu udiye musungule asemene pabuipi nende." 
Numbers16:6 Wewe Kora ne bonsu banudi nabu, nuangate mbabula." 
Numbers16:7 Malaba nuele makala a kapia ne musenga wa kamonya mu mbabula amu. Nuyiteke kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Nenku yeye nkayende neasungule muntu wende wa tshijila. Nuenu bena Levi ke badi bakolesha malu! 
Numbers16:8 Pashishe Moshe kuambila kabidi Kora ne: — Nuenu bena Levi telejayi! 
Numbers16:9 Padi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele munusungule munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bakuabu bua nuenu kusemena pabuipi nende, kuenza mudimu muaba wa tshijila, kuyukila nende mu dina dia bena Izrayele bonsu, ki mbualu bunene budiye munuenzele anyi?" 
Numbers16:10 Wewe Kora ne bana benu bena Levi, Maweja-Nangila mmunusungule bua nusemene pabuipi nende. Munudi nudilombela kabidi muanzu wa butuangaji mbishi?" 
Numbers16:11 Nanku, wewe ne bantu bebe, nudi nutombokela Maweja-Nangila. Unudi nujana ki ngArone nansha!" 
Numbers16:12 Pashishe, Moshe kubikidisha Datane ne Abirame, bana ba Eliyabe. Kadi bobu kumuandamuna ne: — Tuabengi!" 
Numbers16:13 Udi mumane kutupatula mu Ejipitu muvua biakudia bia bungi, mabele ne buitshi, bua kutufuishila mu tshipela emu! Mpindiewu ukadi uditeka kabidi mfumuetu!" 
Numbers16:14 Bushuwa, kuena mutufikishe mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi to. Katuena bapiane madimi a mvinyo, nansha madimi makuabu to. Udi wela meji ne: tudi bampofu anyi? Katuena basue kufika to!" 
Numbers16:15 Moshe kufika munda bikole bua diandamuna diabu adi. Kuambilaye Maweja-Nangila ne: — Kuitabi milambu yabu to. Katshia meme tshiena mubenzele bibi. Tshiena mubanyenge tshintu, nansha mpunde mene." 
Numbers16:16 Moshe kuambila Kora ne: — Wewe Kora ne bonsu baudi nabu, nufike kudi Maweja-Nangila malaba. Arone pende neikale koku!" 
Numbers16:17 Muntu yonsu wa ku bantu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu banudi nabu, ikale ne mbabula, elemu musenga wa kamonya, afike nende kudi Maweja-Nangila. Wewe mene ne Arone, nenuenze kabidi nanku." 
Numbers16:18 Kora ne bonsu bavuaye nabu kuitababu. Muntu yonsu kuambula mbabula, kuelamu makala a kapia ne musenga wa kamonya. Kuyabu bonsu kuimana mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Moshe ne Arone kuya kuimana kabidi muaba awu." 
Numbers16:19 Kora kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu muaba uvua Moshe ne Arone bimane, pabuipi ne mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Diba adi, bena Izrayele bonsu kumona butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers16:20 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers16:21 — Umukayi muaba udi bantu aba, bualu ndi musue kubabutula bonsu amu mpindiewu." 
Numbers16:22 Moshe ne Arone kudiela mpala panshi, bamba ne: — Kia! Mvidi Mukulu, wewe ke udi mufuke bintu bionsu, mubipeshe muoyi. Kuena mua kufikila bantu bonsu munda bua tshilema tshia muntu umue." 
Numbers16:23 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: 
Numbers16:24 — Nanku, umushe bantu bonsu muaba udi Kora, Datane ne Abirame basombe." 
Numbers16:25 Moshe ujuka, kusemenaye pabuipi ne Datane, Abirame, kabidi ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele." 
Numbers16:26 Kuambilaye bantu bonsu ne: — Umukayi ku ntenta ya bena buenzavi aba. Kanulengi tshintu tshiabu nansha tshimue to. Tshianana nudi mua kufua kabidi bua mibi yabu yonsu. 
Numbers16:27 Bena Izrayele kumuka muaba uvua Kora, Datane ne Abirame basombe. Datane ne Abirame bavua bapatuke mu ntenta yabu, bimane pambelu ne bakaji babu, bana babu ne bena meku abu bonsu." 
Numbers16:28 Moshe kuamba ne: — Nenujadike mundi tshiyi ndienzela malu nkayanyi to, kabidi mudi Maweja-Nangila nkayende muntume bua kukumbaja bionsu ebi." 
Numbers16:29 Pikala bantu aba bafue lufu lua patupu mudi bantu bonsu bafue, nanku nenujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila kena muntume to." 
Numbers16:30 Kadi, pikala Maweja-Nangila mubenzele bualu budi kabuyi buanji kuenzeka, pikala buloba bumine, bujibikile bantu abu ne bena meku abu, ne bintu biabu, baye mu kandondu ka bafue, batshikale ne muoyi, nanku nenujadike ne: mbasendeke Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers16:31 Anu Moshe ulekela diakula, buloba kupandikila muaba uvua Datane ne Abirame bimane." 
Numbers16:32 Buloba kubajibikila bonsu ne bena meku abu, ne bantu bonsu bavua nabu Kora, ne bintu biabu." 
Numbers16:33 Bantu kukuluka ne muoyi mu kandondu ka bafue, pamue ne bintu biabu bionsu. Buloba kubajibikila bonsu. Kujiminabu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Numbers16:34 Bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu bavua pabuipi nabu, bumvue mbila ya miadi yabu, kunyemabu ne bowa, bamba ne: “Buloba budi mua kutujibikila petu.”" 
Numbers16:35 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kutuma kapia. Kubutulaku bantu bonsu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, batshikale ne muoyi. Ke bavua balambula musenga wa kamonya." 
Numbers17:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers17:2 — Ambila mutuangaji Elazare, muana wa Arone, ne: upatule mbabula idi mu kapia, utangalaje makala aye kule! Mbabula eyi nya tshijila." 
Numbers17:3 Mbabula ayi, ivua ya bena tshibawu bamane kufua bua buenzavi buabu. Nanku bu mudibu bamane kundambula meme Maweja-Nangila mbabula ayi, nuyifule nuenze nayi bitata bia kubuikila ku tshilambuilu. Bitata abi nebishale tshivulukilu kudi bena Izrayele." 
Numbers17:4 Mutuangaji Elazare kuangata mbabula ya tshiamu tshikunze ya bantu bavua Maweja-Nangila muoshe ne muoyi. Kuenzabu nayi bitata bia kubuikila ku tshilambuilu. 
Numbers17:5 Bitata abi bivua bivuluija bena Izrayele ne: muntu udi kayi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, kena mua kuoshila Maweja-Nangila musenga wa kamonya to. Maweja-Nangila ukavua mumane kuambila Moshe bua kumanyisha Arone ne: “Pikala muntu mukuabu muoshile Maweja-Nangila musenga wa kamonya, neapete dinyoka bu dia Kora ne bonsu bavuaye nabu.”" 
Numbers17:6 Butshia dinda, bena Izrayele bonsu kujana Moshe ne Arone, bamba ne: — Nudi bafuishe bantu ba Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers17:7 Bena Izrayele kudikunguja muaba uvua Moshe ne Arone. Kadi pavuabu batangile ku ntenta wa kusambakena, kumonabu muvua divuba dileja butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila dibuikila ntenta." 
Numbers17:8 Moshe ne Arone kuya kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena. 
Numbers17:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers17:10 — Umukayi muaba udi bantu aba bimane. Ndi musue kubabutula bonsu amu mpindiewu. Moshe ne Arone kudiela mpala panshi. 
Numbers17:11 Moshe kuambila Arone ne: — Ambula mbabula webe, welamu makala a ku tshilambuilu. Pashishe, wela musenga wa kamonya pa makala apu. Uye lukasa kudi bena Izrayele bua kubakobolola. Bualu bu mudi Maweja-Nangila mufike munda, kabutu nkamane kutuadija." 
Numbers17:12 Arone kuenza bivua Moshe mumuambile. Kuyaye kudi bantu, kuvua kabutu kamane kubanga. Kuoshaye musenga wa kamonya bua kubakobolola." 
Numbers17:13 Kuimanaye pankatshi pa bantu bavua bamane kufua, ne batshivua ne muoyi. Nanku muntu kena mufue kabidi to." 
Numbers17:14 Bantu bonsu bavua bafue mu tshipupu etshi bavua 14.700, katuyi babale Kora ne bantu bavuaye nabu badianjile kufua." 
Numbers17:15 Kabutu kamane kujika, Arone kupingana mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena muvua Moshe." 
Numbers17:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers17:17 — Ela mukenji bua mulombodi wa tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele akupe dikombu. Nanku neusangishe makombu dikumi ne abidi. Ku dikombu dionsu neufundeku dina dia tshisamba tshiabu. 
Numbers17:18 Kadi ku dikombu dia bena Levi ufundeku dina dia Arone. Nanku mfumu wa tshisamba tshionsu neikale ne dikombu diende. 
Numbers17:19 Uteke makombu aa mu ntenta wa kusambakena, kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu, muaba undi ndileja kunudi." 
Numbers17:20 Nanku dikombu dia muntu undi musungule nedisase. Bijanu bidi bena Izrayele bakujana nabi nebijike. Tshiakubiumvua kabidi to. 
Numbers17:21 Moshe kumanyisha bena Izrayele bionsu abi. Balombodi ba bisamba abi bionsu kumupesha makombu dikumi ne abidi. Dia Arone divua munkatshi mua makombu dikumi ne abidi aa. 
Numbers17:22 Moshe kuateka onsu mu ntenta wa kusambakena, muaba udi Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers17:23 Butshia dinda, Moshe uya mu ntenta wa kusambakena, kusangana dikombu dia Arone, muena diku dia Levi, dimane kusasa, diele bilongu, dikuame ne bimuma bimane kuboba." 
Numbers17:24 Moshe kupatula makombu onsu avua mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Kuyaye kualeja bena Izrayele. Bantu bonsu bavua ne bua kuamona. Mulombodi yonsu kuangata dikombu diende. 
Numbers17:25 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Pingaja dikombu dia Arone muaba udi mushete wa ndondu. Badilamemu bua divuluije bena Izrayele buenzavi buabu. Ke muudi mua kujikija bijanu bidibu banjana nabi. Nanku kabena mua kufua kabidi to. 
Numbers17:26 Moshe kukumbaja bimpe bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. 
Numbers17:27 Bena Izrayele kuambila Moshe ne: — Mona, tudi tujimina, tudi tubutuka bonsu." 
Numbers17:28 Muntu yonsu udi usemena ku nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, udi ufua. Neutulekele tufua bonsu, tubutuka nanku anyi?" 
Numbers18:1 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Arone ne: — Ntelejayi wewe, ndelanganyi yebe ne bana benu bena Levi: bilema bidi bantu benza muaba wa tshijila, nebinutangile nuenu bonsu biangatshile ku lelu. Kadi bilema binudi nuenza mu mudimu wenu wa butuangaji nebitangile anu wewe Arone ne ndelanganyi yebe." 
Numbers18:2 Newanyishe kabidi bua bana benu bena Levi, bena tshisamba tshia tatuebe, basemene nebe ku nzubu wa tshijila. Kadi amu wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe nenubuele muaba udi mushete wa ndondu. Kadi bana benu bena Levi nebanulamate, banuambuluisha." 
Numbers18:3 Bana benu bena Levi abu nebanuambuluishe bua midimu yonsu ya mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Kadi kabena mua kusemena pa buipi ne tshilambuilu, nansha ne muaba udi bintu bia tshijila to. Nanku nansha wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe, nansha bobu bena Levi, kanuakufua to." 
Numbers18:4 Anu bana benu bena Levi nkayabu ke badi mua kunuambuluisha ku midimu yonsu ya mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Muntu mukuabu kena mua kufika pabuipi nenu to. 
Numbers18:5 Nuenu nenuenze mudimu muaba wa tshijila, ne ku tshilambuilu. Nanku tshiakufikila kabidi bena Izrayele bonsu munda to." 
Numbers18:6 Munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bakuabu, ndi musungule bana benu bena Levi. Badi bantu banyi. Kadi ndi munupeshebu bua benze midimu idi itangila ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:7 Kadi wewe Arone ne ndelanganyi yebe, nuenze mudimu wa butuangaji ku tshilambuilu, ne muaba wa tshijila menemene, udi kunyima kua tshilamba tshidi tshilembelela. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi munupeshe mudimu wa butuangaji ewu. Kadi pikala muntu mukuabu usemena pabuipi nanyi, neafue." 
Numbers18:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Arone ne: — Ndi mukupeshe mudimu wa kutangila milambu yonsu ya tshijila idi bena Izrayele bandambula. Milambu eyi ishale yebe wewe ne ya ndelanganyi yebe kashidi. 
Numbers18:9 Ku milambu ya tshijila, bamane kuosha bitupa bidi bianyi, wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe, nenuangate milambu ya bia mu madimi bionsu bidibu bandambula, nyama ya kukobolola nayi bantu, ne nyama ya milambu ya dinua tshibalu." 
Numbers18:10 Nuyidie muaba wa tshijila. Kadi mu meku enu amu bantu balume, bana nansha bakulumpe, badi mua kuyidia, bualu idi ya tshijila." 
Numbers18:11 Pashishe nuangate kabidi tshitupa tshia bintu bidi bena Izrayele bela mulu bua kundambula. Bintu abi nebishale biebe ne bia ndelanganyi yebe kashidi. Nebabidie amu kudi bena diku diebe, balume ne bakaji, badi kabayi ne mikiya." 
Numbers18:12 Ndi nnupesha kabidi biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi, bidi bena Izrayele bandambula: mafuta, maluvu a mvinyo, ne ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
Numbers18:13 Bintu bionsu bidi bena Izrayele bandambula bia mu ditunga diabu mbiebe wewe ne bia bena diku diebe bonsu badi kabayi ne mikiya. 
Numbers18:14 Tshintu tshionsu tshidi bena Izrayele bafila kundi bua kashidi ntshiebe wewe kabidi. 
Numbers18:15 Bamuanabute bonsu badibu bandambula, ba bantu ne ba nyama mbebe wewe. Kadi nebapikule muanabute wa balume wa muntu, nebapikule kabidi muanabute wa nyama udi ne mikiya." 
Numbers18:16 Muana wa balume yonsu mumane kukumbaja ngondu umue, nebamupikule ku nkanu itanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bu mudi mushinga wa mu muaba wa tshijila, mudi lukanu lumue ne bujitu bua grame dikumi." 
Numbers18:17 Kadi muanabute wa ngombe, wa mukoku, nansha wa mbuji, kubena mua kumupikula to, bualu nnyama ya tshijila. Nenuele mashi ayi ku tshilambuilu. Nenungoshile kabidi mafuta a nyama ayi bua nganyishe dipembu diawu dimpe."
