Numbers18:18 Pashishe munyinyi wa nyama ayi, newikale wenu anu bu munudi nuangata tshiadi ne tshibelu tshia luseke lua balume bia nyama ya milambu ya bobumue." 
Numbers18:19 “Nanku milambu yonsu ya tshijila idi bena Izrayele bandambula, ndi nkupeshayi kashidi. Nebikale bintu biebe wewe, ne bia bana bebe ba balume ne ba bakaji, bilondeshile ndondu utuvua batue nebe, kabidi ne ndelanganyi yebe yonsu.”" 
Numbers18:20 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Arone ne: — Mu ditunga dindi mpesha bena Izrayele, kuakupetamu tshiebe tshitupa tshia buloba, nansha buebe bupianyi to. Meme ke bupianyi buebe ne bubanji buebe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Numbers18:21 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Bena Levi badi bangenzela mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena, difutu diabu ke tshia dikumi tshimue tshia bintu bionsu bidi bantu bapeta mu Izrayele." 
Numbers18:22 Bena Izrayele bakuabu kabena mua kufika kabidi muaba wa tshijila to. Tshianana, badi mua kubunda tshibawu tshia lufu." 
Numbers18:23 Bena Levi nkayabu ke badi mua kuenza mudimu mu ntenta wa kusambakena. Bilema bionsu bidibu benzamu, nebibakuate amu bobu. Nulame mukenji ewu kashidi. Bena Levi kabena ne tshiabu tshitupa tshia buloba, bu mudi bisamba bikuabu bia bena Izrayele natshi to." 
Numbers18:24 Kadi nebapete tshia dikumi tshia bintu bidi bena Izrayele ne bua kundambula. Ke pandi ngamba ne: kabakuikala ne tshiabu tshitupa tshia buloba, bu mudi bisamba bikuabu bia bena Izrayele natshi." 
Numbers18:25 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe 
Numbers18:26 bua amanyishe kabidi bena Levi ne: — Pikala bena Izrayele bafike ne tshia dikumi tshindi munupeshe atshi, nuenu nkayenu numushe kabidi tshia dikumi ku tshia dikumi atshi bua kutshindambula." 
Numbers18:27 Mulambu awu udi mushindu umue ne mulambu wa ntete ya kuenza bulula, nansha wa maluvu mapiamapia a mvinyo, udi bana benu bandambula." 
Numbers18:28 Ke munudi nuenu kabidi mua kundambula tshintu ku tshia dikumi tshinudi nupeta kudi bana benu bena Izrayele. Nuangate anu tshia dikumi, nutshifile kudi mutuangaji Arone bua kutshindambula." 
Numbers18:29 Ku bintu bionsu binudi nupeta, nundambule meme, Maweja-Nangila, tshitupa tshijima. Nutshisungule ku bintu bimpe binudi nupeta, bua kundambula." 
Numbers18:30 Nuenu bamane kumusha binudi ne bua kundambula, nuangate penu bidi bishale, bu mudi bena Izrayele bonsu bangate bintu bidi bishale ku ntete ya bukula, ku maluvu a mvinyo, ne ku mafuta." 
Numbers18:31 Nudi mua kudia bintu ebi miaba yonsu. Nudi mua kubidia ne bena meku enu bonsu, bualu ndifutu dia ku mudimu unudi nungenzela mu ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Numbers18:32 Nuenu bamane kundambula bidi bimpe ku bintu bionsu abi, kanuena nuenza tshilema panudi nuangata bidi bishala. Nanku kanuakunyanga milambu ya tshijila ya bena Izrayele to. Kanuakubunda tshibawu tshia lufu nansha." 
Numbers19:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe ne Arone ne: 
Numbers19:2 — Nuambile bena Izrayele ne: nututuadile ngombe mukunze, udi kayi ne bulema, kabidi udibu kabayi banji kuenza nende mudimu." 
Numbers19:3 Numufile kudi mutuangaji Elazare, bua umuke nende mu mitanda, bamukose muminu, yeye mutangile." 
Numbers19:4 Elazare neatue munu mu mashi a ngombe awu, aamiamine mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta wa kusambakena misangu muanda mutekete." 
Numbers19:5 Pashishe boshe ngombe awu mujima, yeye mutangile. Boshe munyinyi, tshiseba, mashi ne bunyawu." 
Numbers19:6 Mutuangaji neangate nkunyi ya mutshi wa sedre, ditamba dia mutshi wa isope, ne buanda bua boya bukunze, abiele muiku, muaba udibu boshile ngombe awu." 
Numbers19:7 Pashishe mutuangaji neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi, apingane mu mitanda. Kadi neashale ne mikiya dituku adi dijima too ne ku dilolu." 
Numbers19:8 Muntu uvua moshe ngombe awu, neasukule kabidi bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Kadi neashale ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Numbers19:9 Muntu, udi kayi ne mikiya, neangate butu bua ngombe mukunze awu, abumushe mu mitanda, abuteke muaba udi kauyi ne mikiya. Bena Izrayele nebabulame bimpe, bua bikale benza nabu mayi a tshijila a kumiamina bantu. (Ebi bidi bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu.)" 
Numbers19:10 Muntu udi wangata butu bua ngombe mukunze awu, neasukule kabidi bilamba biende. Kadi udi ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu. Bena Izrayele ne benyi badi munkatshi muabu, bakumbaje mikenji eyi kashidi." 
Numbers19:11 “Padi muntu mulenge tshitalu, udi ushala ne mikiya lumingu lujima." 
Numbers19:12 Kadi bua mikiya ayi kujika, amu yeye mudimiamine mayi a tshijila dituku disatu ne dia muanda mutekete, bua kudikobolola. Pikalaye mulengulule bua kudimiamina mayi a tshijila dituku disatu ne dia muanda mutekete, neashale amu ne mikiya." 
Numbers19:13 Muntu yonsu udi ulenga tshitalu kayi musue kudikobolola, udi unyanga nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Nebamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Bu muvuabu kabayi bamumiamine mayi a tshijila, udi amu ne mikiya." 
Numbers19:14 “Mikenji mikuabu inudi ne bua kukumbaja idi nunku: padi muntu mufuile mu ntenta, bantu bonsu bavua nende mu ntenta, ne bonsu badi babuelamu, badi bashale ne mikiya lumingu lujima." 
Numbers19:15 Pikala luesu mu ntenta amu, ludibu kabayi babuikila bimpe ne tshibuikidiji, bintu bionsu bidi mu luesu amu, nebikale ne mikiya." 
Numbers19:16 Pikala muntu mu mpata, mulenge tshitalu tshia muntu uvuabu bashipe, nansha tshia muntu mudifuile, neikale ne mikiya lumingu lujima, amu bu mudi muntu mulenge mifuba ya muntu, nansha mulenge pa lukita." 
Numbers19:17 Nanku bua kumusha mikiya pambidi pa muntu awu, bangate butu bua ngombe uvuabu balambule bua kukobolola nende bantu. Nebele butu abu mu luesu, belamu ne mayi a mpokolu." 
Numbers19:18 Pashishe muntu, udi kayi ne mikiya, neangate ditamba dia mutshi wa isope, aditue mu mayi adi mu luesu. Neamiamine mayi aa ku ntenta kuvua muntu awu mufuile, ne ku bintu bionsu bidimu, too ne ku bantu bavuamu. Amiamine kabidi muntu uvua mulenge tshitalu, mifuba ya muntu, nansha mulenge pa lukita." 
Numbers19:19 Mayi a tshijila awu, badi baamiamina muntu udi ne mikiya dituku disatu ne dia muanda mutekete. Bamane kumiamina mayi a dituku dia muanda mutekete, muntu awu neasukule bilamba biende, wowe mayi. Nanku mikiya yende neijike ku dilolu." 
Numbers19:20 “Kadi pikala muntu udi ne mikiya kayi musue kuyumusha, nebamuipate munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bualu udi unyanga muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila. Bu mudibu kabayi bamumiamina mayi a tshijila a kumukobolola nawu, udi ushala ne mikiya." 
Numbers19:21 “Bena Izrayele nebakumbaje mikenji eyi kashidi. Muntu yonsu udi umiaminangana mayi a kukobolola awu, neasukule bilamba biende. Muntu mulenge mayi awu, neikale kabidi ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu." 
Numbers19:22 Tshidi muntu udi ne mikiya ulenga tshidi tshipia mikiya. Muntu mulenge muntu udi ne mikiya, udi ushala pende ne mikiya too ne ku dilolu.”" 
Numbers20:1 Mu ngondu wa kumpala, bena Izrayele bonsu kufika mu tshipela tshia Tsine, kusomba mu Kadeshe. Miriyame kufuila muaba awu. Kumujikabu muine amu." 
Numbers20:2 Muaba awu kamuvua mayi a kunua to. Bena Izrayele kutombokela Moshe ne Arone. 
Numbers20:3 Kutandishabu Moshe, bamba ne: — Bivua bimpe bua Maweja-Nangila kutubutula musangu umue ne bana betu." 
Numbers20:4 Kadi tuetu, tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila, nuatufikishi mu tshipela emu bua tshinyi? Amu bua tuetu kufuilamu ne bimuna bietu anyi?" 
Numbers20:5 Nuvua batumushe mu Ejipitu bua tshinyi? Amu bua kutufikisha muaba ewu wa dikenga! Muaba ewu katuena mua kudima, kawena mitshi ya mfiku, nansha ya mvinyo, nansha ya grenade. Tuapangi ne mayi mene a kunua!" 
Numbers20:6 Moshe ne Arone kumuka muaba awu, kuya kudiela mpala panshi mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kubamuenekela." 
Numbers20:7 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers20:8 — Angata dikombu diebe. Pashishe, wewe ne Arone, nubikile bena Izrayele bonsu. Nutumine lubuebue alu diyi, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile. Nanku nelupatule mayi. Ke muudi mua kupatula mayi mu lubuebue, bua kunuisha bantu bonsu ne bimuna biabu." 
Numbers20:9 Moshe kuangata dikombu diende, divua mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, bu muvuabu bamuambile." 
Numbers20:10 Yeye ne Arone kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu muaba uvua lubuebue awu. Kubambilabu ne: — Nuenu nudi ne mutu mukole! Netuikale ne mushindu wa kunupatuila mayi mu lubuebue emu anyi? 
Numbers20:11 Moshe kutuuta dikombu pa lubuebue misangu ibidi. Mayi kupatuka mapite bungi. Bena Izrayele kunua, ne bimuma biabu kabidi." 
Numbers20:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne Arone ne: — Kanuena bitabe mumvua munuambile. Kanuvua basue bua ndeje bena Izrayele tshijila tshianyi. Nanku kanuakufikisha bena Izrayele mu ditunga dingabapesha to. 
Numbers20:13 Kuinyikabu mayi a lubuebue alu ne: mayi a Meriba — mayi a matandu, — bualu bena Izrayele bavua batandangane ne Maweja-Nangila. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubalejamu mudiye wa tshijila." 
Numbers20:14 Patshivua Moshe mu Kadeshe, kutuminaye mukalenga wa bena Edome bantu, bamuambila ne: — Tuetu bana benu bena Izrayele, tudi bakenge bikole. Wewe mene udi mumanye!" 
Numbers20:15 Bankambua betu kale bavua baye mu Ejipitu. Tuetu kushalamu matuku a bungi. Kadi bena Ejipitu kutukengesha bikole, ne tuetu ne bankambua betu." 
Numbers20:16 Pashishe tuetu kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Kututelejaye, kututuminaye mutumibue wende bua kutupatula mu Ejipitu. Mpindiewu tudi mu Kadeshe, tshimenga tshidi ku mikalu ya ditunga diebe." 
Numbers20:17 Nanku anyisha bua tupitshile muebe amu. Katuena tupitshila mu madimi enu, nansha a mvinyo. Katuena tunua mayi a mu ditunga dienu. Netupite buludi ne njila munene, katuyi tuapuka, too ne patuapita ditunga diebe dijima." 
Numbers20:18 Mukalenga wa bena Edome kuandamuna ne: — Kanuena mua kupitshila mu ditunga dianyi to. Nuenu basue kuenza nanku, nennuluishe!" 
Numbers20:19 Bena Izrayele kunanukila bikole, bamba ne: — Nutulekele, tupite ne njila! Tuetu ne bimuna bietu, patuikala ne dikenga ne mayi a kunua, netuasumbe. Tudi tukulomba amu ne: wanyishe bua tupitshile mu ditunga diebe." 
Numbers20:20 Mukalenga wa bena Edome kubenga, wamba ne: — Kanuena mua kupita to! Pashishe kutumaye bena mvita ba bungi ne tshiluilu tshikole bua kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Numbers20:21 Bena Edome kukandika bena Izrayele, kubajikila njila. Nanku bena Izrayele kukeba njila mukuabu." 
Numbers20:22 Bena Izrayele bonsu kumuka ku Kadeshe, kuya ku mukuna wa Ore." 
Numbers20:23 Pavuabu ku mukuna aku, ku mikalu ya bena Edome, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne:" 
Numbers20:24 — Arone kakufika mu ditunga dingapesha bena Izrayele nansha. Neafuile muaba ewu, bualu nuvua bantombokele ku mayi a Meriba." 
Numbers20:25 Nanku uye ne Arone, kabidi ne muanende Elazare, ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Ore." 
Numbers20:26 Uvule Arone bilamba biende bia mudimu wa butuangaji. Ubivuadike Elazare. Nanku Arone neafuile muaba awu. 
Numbers20:27 Moshe kukumbaja bivua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Moshe ne Arone ne Elazare kuya bonsu basatu ku mukuna wa Ore, bena Izrayele batangile." 
Numbers20:28 Moshe kuvula Arone bilamba, kubivuadika Elazare. Arone kufuila ku lusongu lua mukuna aku. Pashishe Moshe ne Elazare kupueka ku mukuna." 
Numbers20:29 Bena Izrayele bonsu bumvua bua lufu lua Arone, kutekabu bonsu madilu ende matuku makumi asatu." 
Numbers21:1 Mukalenga wa Arade, muena Kenaane, uvua muase mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga adi. Kumvuaye lumu lua ne: bena Izrayele badi balonda njila wa ku Atarime. Nanku kubaluishaye, kukuata ne bamue bantu." 
Numbers21:2 Ke bena Izrayele kuditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila, bamulaya ne: — Tuetu batshimune bantu aba, netubutule kabidi bimenga biabi bionsu." 
Numbers21:3 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba bivua bena Izrayele bamulaye, kufila bena Kenaane mu bianza biabu. Kushipabu bena Kenaane bonsu, kubutula ne bimenga biabu. Kuinyikabu muaba awu dina ne: Orma, mmomumue ne: nkabutu." 
Numbers21:4 Bena Izrayele kumuka ku mukuna wa Ore. Kuyilabu njila wa Mayi manene makunze. Kunyungulukabu ditunga dia Edome. Kadi luendu kubatonda, kabayi kabidi mua kulama lutulu to." 
Numbers21:5 Kujanabu Mvidi Mukulu ne Moshe, bamba ne: — Nuvua batumushe mu Ejipitu bua tshinyi? Bua tuetu kufuila nzala mu tshipela! Apa katuena ne mampa, katuena ne mayi a kunua! Tudi tudia anu mana bua dikenga. Kadi akadi matutonde." 
Numbers21:6 Diba adi Maweja-Nangila kubatumina nyoka ya lulengu. Kusumayi bena Izrayele. Bavule kufua. 
Numbers21:7 Bavua bashale, kunyemenabu kudi Moshe, bamuambila ne: — Tudi bena tshibawu, bualu tuvua bakujane wewe, bajane kabidi ne Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, usengelele Maweja-Nangila. Atumushile nyoka eyi! Moshe kulombela bena Izrayele kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers21:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Wenze nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze. Umulembeleje kulu. Nanku muntu yonsu udibu basuma kudi nyoka wa lulengu, padiye utangila nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze, kena ufua to." 
Numbers21:9 Moshe kuenza nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze, kumulembelejaye kulu. Nanku muntu yonsu uvuabu basuma kudi nyoka, uvua utangila nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze, uvua ushala ne muoyi." 
Numbers21:10 Bena Izrayele kumuka muaba awu, kufika ku Obote." 
Numbers21:11 Bumuka ku Obote, kufika ku Iye-Abarime, mu tshipela tshivua luseke luvua diba dipatukila lua Mowabe." 
Numbers21:12 Bumuka muaba awu, kufikabu mu tshibandabanda tshia Zerede." 
Numbers21:13 Bumuka mu tshibandabanda amu, kusabukabu musulu wa Amone, udi ufumina ku bena Amore, upitshila mu tshipela, pashishe uleja mikalu pankatshi pa bena Mowabe ne bena Amore." 
Numbers21:14 Ke padibu bafunde mu Mukanda wa mvita wa Maweja-Nangila ne: “…Vahebe mu Sufa, ne misapa yende, Amone" 
Numbers21:15 ne misapa yende, udi luseke lua Are, uleja mikalu ya ditunga dia bena Mowabe…”" 
Numbers21:16 Bena Izrayele bumuke muaba awu, kufika muaba uvuabu babikila ne: Tshiina tshia mayi. Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ubikile bena Izrayele bonsu, bua mbapeshe mayi a kunua." 
Numbers21:17 Diba adi bena Izrayele kuimba musambu, bamba ne: “Mayi apatuke mu tshiina, tuelele nkashi!" 
Numbers21:18 Ke tshiina tshivua bamfumu bumbule, baneme bimbe, ne mulangala wabu wa bumfumu, ne dikombu dia bukalenga!” Bena Izrayele bumuke mu tshipela, mbafike ku Matana, mbaye" 
Numbers21:19 ku Mahaliyele, pashishe ku Bamote," 
Numbers21:20 mbafike ne ku tshibandabanda tshidi tshipitshila mu ditunga dia bena Mowabe, luseke lua ku nsongu ya mukuna wa Pisga, udi mutangilangane ne tshipela." 
Numbers21:21 Bena Izrayele kutuma bantu bua bambile Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, ne:" 
Numbers21:22 — Anyisha tupitshile mu ditunga diebe. Katuena tunyanga madimi enu, nansha mvinyo to. Katuena tunua mayi a mu ditunga dienu to. Netulonde amu njila munene buludi, katuyi tuapuka, too ne patuapita ditunga diebe." 
Numbers21:23 Kadi Sihone kubenga bua bena Izrayele kupitshila mu ditunga diende. Kusangishaye bena mvita bende, kuya nabu too ne ku Yahase mu tshipela, bua kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Numbers21:24 Kadi bena Izrayele kutshimuna Sihone ne tshiluilu tshiende. Kumunyengabu ditunga diende dijima, bituadije ku musulu wa Amone kuinshi, too ne ku musulu wa Yaboke ku mutu, too ne ku mikalu mikolesha ya bena Amone, luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Numbers21:25 Kunyengabu kabidi bimenga bionsu bia bena Amore, nansha tshia Eshebone, ne misoku yonsu ya ku mutumba. Kuasabumu!" 
Numbers21:26 Eshebone ke tshimenga tshinene tshia Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore. Bualu Sihone uvua muluangane mvita kale ne mukalenga mukuabu wa bena Mowabe, mumunyenge ditunga dijima too ne ku musulu wa Amone." 
Numbers21:27 Nanku bedi ba kasala, bavua bela bimbe, bamba ne: “Ibakayi kabidi tshimenga tshia Eshebone, tumone! Asululayi tshimenga tshia mukalenga Sihone!" 
Numbers21:28 Tshimenga tshia Eshebone ntshikuate kapia. Ndimi ya kapia mmibande mu tshimenga tshia Sihone. Kapia kabutulu Are mu ditunga dia Mowabe, kabutulu bakalenga bavua ku mikuna ya ku musulu wa Amone." 
Numbers21:29 Nuenu bena Mowabe, diakabi kaayi! Nudi nutendelela Kemoshe! Nuabutuki! Balume bavua bapanduke, kabidi ne bakaji, bonsu mbabakuate, mbabafile kudi Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore." 
Numbers21:30 Kadi tuakuasa bena Amore mikete! Tuakubutula Eshebone! Tuakunyangakaja ditunga dijima too ne ku Dibone, too ne ku Nofa, ne ku Medeba mene.”" 
Numbers21:31 Ke muvua bena Izrayele bafike mu ditunga dia bena Amore nanku. 
Numbers21:32 Moshe kutuma bantu bua kutentekela tshimenga tshia Yazere. Bena Izrayele kuipata bena Amore, kubanyenga tshimenga atshi, kabidi ne misoku yonsu ivua mutumba natshi." 
Numbers21:33 Pashishe bena Izrayele kubenda, kuyila njila wa ku Bashane. Kadi Oge, mukalenga wa mu Bashane, ne bena mvita bende, kuya kuluisha bena Izrayele mu Edreyi." 
Numbers21:34 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Kutshinyi mukalenga ewu to. Nenkuambuluishe bua umutshimune, umunyenge ditunga edi dijima. Umuenzele muuvua muenzele Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, uvua musombe mu tshimenga tshia Eshebone." 
Numbers21:35 Bena Izrayele kutshimuna Oge, bana bende, ne tshiluilu tshiende, kushipa bonsu, kubanyenga ditunga." 
Numbers22:1 Bena Izrayele kuya kuasa mitanda yabu mu mpata ya Mowabe, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Yardene, luseke luawu lua kudi diba dipatukila, muaba uvua mutangilangane ne Yeriko." 
Numbers22:2 Balake, muana wa Sipore, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe mu tshikondu atshi, kumvua bionsu bivua bena Izrayele benzele bena Amore." 
Numbers22:3 Nanku Balake ne bantu bende kutshina bikole, bualu bavua bumvue ne: bena Izrayele mbafike muaba ewu bapite bungi." 
Numbers22:4 Ke bena Mowabe kuambila bakulu ba bena Madiyane ne: — Bantu aba bungi nenku badi mua kutuvinga, bu mudi ngombe idia bisosa bionsu." 
Numbers22:5 Ke mukalenga Balake kutuma bantu kudi Balaame, muana wa Beyore, uvua musombe ku Petore pabuipi ne musulu wa Perate, mu ditunga dia bena Amavi. Uvua umulomba ne: “Mudi bantu ba bungi bafike munemu, bafume ku Ejipitu. Badi batangalaka pa buloba bujima, base mitanda yabu pabuipi nanyi." 
Numbers22:6 Ndi nkusengelela ne: ufike kuneku, ubatshipe. Bualu mbatupite bukole! Wewe mubatshipe, misangu mikuabu ndi mua kubatshimuna, kubipata mu ditunga. Meme ndi mujadike ne: wewe muele muntu lupemba, nansha mumutshipe, bidi bienzeka anu muudi muambe.”" 
Numbers22:7 Bakulu ba bena Mowabe ne ba bena Madiyane bavuabu batume, kuangata bintu bia kufuta nabi muambi. Kuyabu kumonangana ne Balaame, bamuambila mikenji ya kudi mukalenga Balake." 
Numbers22:8 Balaame kubambila ne: — Lalayi munemu. Patshiabu dinda, nennuandamune malu onsu adi Maweja-Nangila mummanyishe. Bakulu ba bena Mowabe abu kulala kua Balaame." 
Numbers22:9 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kukonka Balaame ne: — Bantu baudi muladike kuebe mbanganyi? 
Numbers22:10 Balaame kuandamuna ne: — Bantu aba mbafume kudi Balake, muana wa Sipore, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe. Balake udi umbikila, ungambila ne:" 
Numbers22:11 “Ndi nkusengelela ne: ufike kuneku, utshipe bantu badi bumuke ku Ejipitu, batangalake pa buloba bujima. Wewe mubatshipe, misangu mikuabu ndi mua kubatshimuna, kubipata mu ditunga.”" 
Numbers22:12 Mvidi Mukulu kubenga, wambila Balaame ne: — Kuyi nabu to! Kuena mua kutshipa bantu aba, bualu ndi mumane kubela lupemba." 
Numbers22:13 Butshia dinda, Balaame kuambila bantu, bavua Balake mutume, ne: — Pinganayi kuenu, Maweja-Nangila kena musue bua meme kuya nenu to." 
Numbers22:14 Bakulu ba bena Mowabe abu, kupingana kudi Balake, bamuambila ne: “Balaame wabengi.”" 
Numbers22:15 Balake kutuma bamfumu bakuabu ba bungi, ba lumu lupite lua ba kumpala." 
Numbers22:16 Kuyabu kuambila Balaame ne: “Balake udi wamba ne: Meme Balake, muana wa Sipore, ndi nkubikila kuneku. Ndi nkusengelela ne: kubengi to." 
Numbers22:17 Ufike kuneku, utshipe bantu aba. Nenkusankishe ne tshintu tshionsu tshiwalomba.”" 
Numbers22:18 Balaame kubenga wamba ne: — Balake nansha yeye muntumine tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshionsu, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshionsu, tshidiye natshi mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga, tshiena mua kubenga diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ku kalu nansha kamue to." 
Numbers22:19 Kadi nuenu kabidi anji lalayi munemu, bua ngumvue tshidi Maweja-Nangila ungambila." 
Numbers22:20 Butuku, Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Balaame ne: — Bu mudi bantu aba bakubikila, mbimpe uye nabu. Kadi wenze anu tshindi meme nkuambila." 
Numbers22:21 Butshia dinda, Balaame kuela tshiseba pa mpunde mukaji wende, kuya ne bamfumu ba bena Mowabe." 
Numbers22:22 Mvidi Mukulu kufikila Balaame munda bua luendu alu. Mutumibue wende kuya kujika Balaame mu njila. Balaame uvua mubande pa nyama wa mpunde. Bena mudimu babidi bavua nende. 
Numbers22:23 Mpunde kumona mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu muimane munkatshi mu njila, mukuate muele ku bianza. Mpunde kulekela mu njila, kuyila mu budimi. Balaame kumutuuta bua kumupingaja mu njila." 
Numbers22:24 Mutumibue kuimana kabidi mutantshi mu njila mu madimi a mvinyo pankatshi pa bimana bibidi. 
Numbers22:25 Mpunde kumona mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila, kudituuta ku tshimana. Dikasa dia Balaame kutapika. Nanku Balaame kutuuta mpunde tshiakabidi." 
Numbers22:26 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kupita kabidi kumpala, kuimana muaba uvua mufimpakane bikole eku ne eku. Kamuvua mushindu wa kupita nansha ku dia balume nansha ku dia bakaji." 
Numbers22:27 Mpunde umona kabidi mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila, kulalaye panshi ne mfumuende panyima. Balaame kufika munda bikole, kutuuta mpunde ne dikombu." 
Numbers22:28 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kuakuisha mpunde, webeja Balaame ne: — Tshimvua muenze bua wewe kuntuuta misangu isatu ntshinyi?" 
Numbers22:29 Balaame kuandamuna ne: — Bualu udi untatshisha. Bu meme ne muele, mvua mua kukushipa!" 
Numbers22:30 Mpunde kuambila Balaame ne: — Meme ndi mpunde webe. Ndi ngendakana nebe matuku onsu! Kadi nkadi mukuenzele nenku musangu mukuabu anyi? Balaame kuamba ne: — To! 
Numbers22:31 Diba adi Maweja-Nangila kubulula mesu a Balaame, bua amone mutumibue uvua muimane munkatsshi mua njila, ne muele mukuate mu tshianza. Diakamue Balaame kudiela mpala panshi." 
Numbers22:32 Mutumibue kuebeja Balaame ne: — Uvua mutuute mpunde webe misangu isatu bua tshinyi? Meme ke udi mujike njila, bualu ndi mumanye ne: luendu luebe elu ludi mua kukufikishisha ku kabutu." 
Numbers22:33 Mpunde uvua mummone. Kumukaye misangu isatu kundi. Bu yeye kayi muenze nanku, mvua mua kukushipa wewe, kumushiya yeye ne muoyi." 
Numbers22:34 Balaame kuandamuna mutumibue ne: — Ndi muenze tshilema. Tshivua mumanye ne: wewe ke uvua muimane mu njila kumpala kuanyi. Kadi bu mudi luendu alu kaluyi lukusankisha, ndi mua kupingana kuanyi." 
Numbers22:35 Mutumibue kubenga, wamba ne: — Kupinganyi to! Uye anu ne bantu aba. Kadi wambe amu bindi nkuleja. Ke Balaame kuya ne bantu bavua Balake mutume." 
Numbers22:36 Balake umvua ne: Balaame ukadi pabuipi, kuyaye kumuakidila mu tshimenga tshia Mowabe tshivua ku mikalu menemene ya ditunga adi, ku musulu wa Amone." 
Numbers22:37 Balake kukonka Balaame ne: — Meme kukubikila musangu wa kumpala. Uvua mubenge kufika bua tshinyi? Uvua wela meji ne: tshiena mua kukusankisha anyi? 
Numbers22:38 Balaame kuandamuna ne: — Mbafiki! Kadi tshiena ne tshia kuamba to! Nenkuambile amu bualu budi Mvidi Mukulu ummanyisha. 
Numbers22:39 Balaame ne Balake kuya ku Kiriyate-Ushote. 
Numbers22:40 Balake kushipa ngombe ne mikoku, kuyilambula. Kutuminaye Balaame ne bavuaye nabu munyinyi wa milambu ayi." 
Numbers22:41 Butshia dinda, Balake kuya ne Balaame ku Bamote-Baale, bualu muaba awu uvua mua kudimuena tshitupa tshia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers23:1 Balaame kuambila Balake ne: “Ungashile muaba ewu bilambuilu muanda mutekete, untuadile kabidi ngombe milume muanda mutekete, ne mikoku ya bimpanga muanda mutekete.”" 
Numbers23:2 Balake kuenza bionsu abi. Pashishe bonsu babidi kulambula Maweja-Nangila ngombe mulume umue, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, pa tshilambuilu tshionsu." 
Numbers23:3 Balaame kuambila Balake ne: — Shala muimane pabuipi ne milambu yebe eyi. Meme ndi nya ku luseke. Misangu mikuabu Maweja-Nangila udi mua kummuenekela. Nenkuambile bionsu bikalaye mummanyishe. Balaame kuya muaba uvua kauyi bantu. 
Numbers23:4 Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela Balaame muaba awu. Awu kuambila Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi muenzeje bilambuilu muanda mutekete. Ngalambulu ngombe mulume umue, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, pa tshilambuilu tshionsu." 
Numbers23:5 Maweja-Nangila kumanyisha Balaame malu a kuambila Balake, kumupingaja kabidi kudiye." 
Numbers23:6 Balaame kupingana muaba uvua Balake mumuindile, pamue ne bamfumu ba bena Mowabe, pabuipi ne milambu yende." 
Numbers23:7 Balaame kuamba ne: “Balake, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, mmumbikile, ku mikuna ya Arame ya ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila: ‘Balaame, ufike bua kukanyina, kutshipa mene bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe!’" 
Numbers23:8 Kadi bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu kayi mutshipe, mundi meme mua kubatshipa mbishi? Bantu badi Maweja-Nangila kayi mukanyine, mundi mua kubakanyina meme mmunyi?" 
Numbers23:9 Ndi nsomba pa mbuebue, ntangila bantu aba. Ndi pa mikuna, mpuekesha mesu, mbakenketa. Bena Izrayele mbantu ba pa buabu, mbashilangane ne ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Numbers23:10 Kakuena udi mua kubala bungi bua bena Izrayele, kakuena udi mua kubadika ndelanganyi ya Yakobe! Ndi njinga kufua mudi bantu bakane aba bafua. Ndi musue kuikala nabu muaba umue.”" 
Numbers23:11 Balake kuandamuna Balaame ne: — Tshiudi ungenzela ntshinyi? Ndi mukubikile bua kutshipa baluishi banyi. Kadi wewe udi ubeela amu kubeela lupemba! 
Numbers23:12 Balaame kuandamuna ne: — Mudimu wanyi udi amu wa kuamba tshidi Maweja-Nangila ummanyisha. Ki mmomumue anyi? 
Numbers23:13 Balake kumuambila kabidi ne: — Tuye nebe muaba mukuabu uudi mua kumona bena Izrayele bonsu. Neubatshipe muaba awu. Bualu muaba ewu uvua mumone amu tshitupa tshia bantu aba. 
Numbers23:14 Balake kuya ne Balaame ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Pisga muaba wa kutentekela. Kuenzaye kabidi bilambuilu muanda mutekete muaba awu. Kulambulaye ngombe mulume umue, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, pa tshilambuilu tshionsu." 
Numbers23:15 Balaame kuambila Balake ne: — Shala muimane ku milambu yebe eyi. Ndi nya ku luseke bua kuindila bidi Maweja-Nangila musue kungambila. 
Numbers23:16 Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne Balaame, kumumanyisha malu a kuambila Balake, kumupingaja kudiye." 
Numbers23:17 Balaame kupingana muaba uvua Balake mumuindile amu kumuindila pabuipi ne milambu yende, pamue ne bamfumu ba bena Mowabe. Balake kumuebeja tshivua Maweja-Nangila mumumanyishe." 
Numbers23:18 Ke Balaame kuela kasala, wimba ne: “Balake, muana wa Sipore, juka, unteleje bimpe!" 
Numbers23:19 Mvidi Mukulu kena muntu, kena ushima! Kena muana wa Adame, kena ushintulula meji ende. Udi wenza amu mudiye wamba. Udi ukumbaja bionsu bidiye ulaya." 
Numbers23:20 Uvua mungambile bua meme kuela bena Izrayele lupemba. Maweja kubela lupemba. Tshiena mua kuenza muanyi munga. 
Numbers23:21 Maweja-Nangila kena mumone bubi, kena mumone buenzavi kudi bena Izrayele. Udi Mvidi Mukulu wabu, musombe munkatshi muabu. Badi bamutumbisha bualu udi mukalenga wabu." 
Numbers23:22 Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mubapatule mu Ejipitu, mubapatule ne bukole bu bua nyama wa mbowa." 
Numbers23:23 Majimbu ne mbuku, kabiena biambuluisha bena Izrayele. Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue kuenza, bena Izrayele badi babimanye pa diba." 
Numbers23:24 Bena Izrayele badi bu mudi nyama wa ntambue, udi ushipa nyama, udia munyinyi. Udi usunsula nyama, unua mashi ende. Kushishaye kulala, kuikisha.”" 
Numbers23:25 Balake kukandika Balaame ne: — Ne wabengi kubatshipa, kadi kubeedi lupemba nansha!" 
Numbers23:26 Balaame kumuandamuna ne: — Kadi mvua mudianjile kukuambilane: mudimu wanyi udi amu wa kumanyisha bantu tshidi Maweja-Nangila ungambila! 
Numbers23:27 Balake kuambila Balaame ne: — Ndi nya nebe kabidi muaba mukuabu. Misangu mikuabu, Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kuitaba, bua utshipe bena Izrayele muaba awu mu dina dianyi." 
Numbers23:28 Kuyabu kulu kua mukuna wa Peyore, muaba udibu mua kumona tshipela." 
Numbers23:29 Balaame kuambila Balake ne: “Asa bilambuilu muanda mutekete muaba ewu, untuadile ngombe milume muanda mutekete, ne mikoku ya bimpanga muanda mutekete.”" 
Numbers23:30 Balake kuenza bionsu abi. Pashishe kulambulaye ngombe mulume umue, ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue pa tshilambuilu tshionsu." 
Numbers24:1 Balaame kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila mmusue kuela bena Izrayele lupemba. Nanku kena muye kumukonka kabidi, bu muvuaye wenza kumpala to. Kutangilaye musangu umue mu tshipela." 
Numbers24:2 Ukenzakana, kumonaye bena Izrayele basomba mu mitanda yabu, ku tshisamba ku tshisamba. Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumutulukila." 
Numbers24:3 Kuelaye kasala, wimba ne: “Meme, ndi Balaame muana wa Beyore, umvuayi tshindi ngamba. Ndi mmona malu masokome, telejayi diyi dianyi!" 
Numbers24:4 Meme ndi ngumvua tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba. Ndi mmona bidi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu uleja. Yeye udi ummuenekela pandi mmukukuila. 
Numbers24:5 Nuenu bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, ntenta yenu inudi nusomba idi mimpe mitambe." 
Numbers24:6 Nzubu yenu idi itangalaka bu mayi, bu mpangu mimpe ku mielelu ya misulu. Idi mifuanangane ne mitshi ya ndunga ne ya nsanga, ivua Maweja-Nangila mukune ku muelelu wa musulu." 
Numbers24:7 Mayi adi muwule mu mpokolu, apueka mavule mu madimi. Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele udi mupite Agage. Bukalenga buende budi ne bukole." 
Numbers24:8 Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, mubapatule ne bukole bua bungi bu bua nyama wa mbowa. Nebabutule baluishi babu. Nebazaze mifuba yabu, babase mikete mipite bungi." 
Numbers24:9 Bena Izrayele kuzonzama, kulala panshi bu nyama ya ntambue. Udi mua kubajula ku bukole nnganyi? Izrayele, udi ukuela lupemba, bamuele pende! Udi ukutshipa, bamutshipe biende!" 
Numbers24:10 Balake kufikila Balaame munda bikole. Kumukanyinaye, wamba ne: — Meme mvua mukubikile bua kutshipa baluishi banyi. Kadi udi mubeele lupemba misangu isatu milondangane!" 
Numbers24:11 Mpindiewu umbuka, upingane kuebe! Mvua mukulaye bua kukusankisha bikole! Kadi Maweja-Nangila wakunyengi bintu biebe!" 
Numbers24:12 Balaame kuandamuna Balake ne: — Mvua mumane kuandamuna bantu bauvua muntumine ne: 
Numbers24:13 “Balake, nansha yeye mumpeshe tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne mpawungi, bionsu bidi mu nzubu muende mua bukalenga, tshiena mua kubenga diyi dia Maweja-Nangila wanyi to. Ndi ne bua kuamba amu tshidiye ummanyisha!”" 
Numbers24:14 Nanku, mpindiewu ndi mpingana kuetu. Kadi semena apa, nkumanyishe muakengeshabu bana benu kudi bena Izrayele matuku adi kumpala!" 
Numbers24:15 Balaame kuela kasala, wimba ne: “Meme ndi Balaame, muana wa Beyore, umvuayi tshindi ngamba. Meme ndi mmona bimpe malu masokome." 
Numbers24:16 Umvuayi diyi dianyi. Meme ndi ngumvua tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba. Ndi mmona bidi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu uleja. Yeye udi ummuenekela pandi mmukukuila. 
Numbers24:17 “Ndi mmona malu adi ne bua kuenzeka. Kadi, kaena enzeka mpindiewu to. Ndi njadika ne: kudi bualu, kadi kabuena pabuipi to: Mutotu neupatuke mu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. Mukalenga nealedibue mu tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Neatuute bena Mowabe dikombu ku mbanga. Bantu badi bendakanyi mu ditunga neababoze mutu." 
Numbers24:18 Yeye neakuate ditunga dia Seyire, ditunga dia baluishi bende bena Edome. Bena Izrayele nebabatshimune." 
Numbers24:19 Muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, neatshimune baluishi bende. Neashidishe bantu bavua bashale ne muoyi mu bimenga biabu.” Balaame udi umanyisha ne: baluishi nebabutuke" 
Numbers24:20 Balaame umona bena Amaleke, kubambilaye ne: “Nuenu bena Amaleke, nuvua tshisamba tshipite bikuabu. Kadi nenubutuke bonsu amu mpindiewu.”" 
Numbers24:21 Balaame kumona kabidi bena Kenaane. Kubambilaye ne: “Nuenu bena Kenaane nudi basombe talalaa mu ditunga dienu, amu mudi nyunyi musombe mu disua dibakila mu lubuebue." 
Numbers24:22 Kadi neboshe nzubu yenu. Bena Ashure nebanukuate mu bupika.” 
Numbers24:23 Balaame kuamba kabidi ne: “Akia! Udi mua kushala ne muoyi, padi Maweja-Nangila umuluisha nnganyi?" 
Numbers24:24 Majuwa adi afumina ku Kitime. Badi babuela mu ditunga nebakengeshe bena Ashure, kabidi ne ndelanganyi ya Ebere. Kadi nansha bobu badi babuela nebabutuke.”" 
Numbers24:25 Balaame mumane kuamba nanku, kupinganaye kuabu. Balake kuya luseke lukuabu." 
Numbers25:1 Bena Izrayele kusomba mu Shitime. Muaba awu kutuadijabu kuenda buendenda ne bakaji ba bena Mowabe. 
Numbers25:2 Bakaji abu kuibidija bena Izrayele bua kulambuila mvidie ya mu ditunga diabu. Bena Izrayele kudia nabu minyinyi milambuila mvidie, kukukuila ne mvidie yabu mene." 
Numbers25:3 Kumvuanganabu nangananga bua kutendelela mvidie wa Baale, uvua ku mukuna wa Peyore. Maweja-Nangila kubafikila munda bikole." 
Numbers25:4 Kuambilaye Moshe ne: — Owe kumpala kuanyi bamfumu ba bena Izrayele bonsu, batangile diba, bua kujikija tshiiji tshianyi. Bualu mvua munufikile munda." 
Numbers25:5 Moshe kuambila bamfumu ba bena Izrayele ne: — Mfumu yonsu ashipe bantu bende badi batendelela mvidie wa Baale, udi ku mukuna wa Peyore!" 
Numbers25:6 Pavua Moshe ne bena Izrayele bonsu basangile, basengelela Mvidi Mukulu ku mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena, kumonabu muena Izrayele mukuabu ufika mu ntenta wa bana babu, ne mukaji wa bena Madiyane." 
Numbers25:7 Mutuangaji Pinhase, muana wa Elazare, muikale kabidi muikulu wa Arone, kujuka munkatshi mua bena Izrayele ne difuma ku bianza." 
Numbers25:8 Kulondakajaye muena Izrayele awu, ne mukaji uvuaye nende wa bena Madiyane, mu ntenta, kubashipa bonsu babidi, kubasompola ne difuma. Nanku tshipupu tshivua tshikuate bena Izrayele kujikatshi." 
Numbers25:9 Bena Izrayele bakavua bafue ku tshipupu atshi binunu makumi abidi ne binayi. 
Numbers25:10 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers25:11 — Tshiiji tshianyi tshiajiki. Mutuangaji Pinhase, muana wa Elazare, muikale kabidi muikulu wa Arone, mmumane kunyoka bena Izrayele ne tshiiji, mumvua mua kuenza meme. Tshianana, mvua mua kubabutula, bualu meme nkayanyi ndi Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Numbers25:12 Mpindiewu, ambila Pinhase ne: ndi ntua nende ndondu, udi umupetesha bupole." 
Numbers25:13 Ndondu awu udi bualu buende ne bua ndelanganyi yende, udi ubenza batuangaji bua kashidi. Pinhase wandeji mudiye mundamate, meme Mvidi Mukulu wende, muende muonsu. Ke pandi mufuile bena Izrayele bonsu luse mu dina diende." 
Numbers25:14 Muena Izrayele uvuabu bashipe pamue ne mukaji wa bena Madiyane awu, uvua Zimri, muana wa Salu, umue wa ku bakulu ba diku dia bena Shimeyone." 
Numbers25:15 Kadi mukaji wa bena Madiyane awu, uvua Kozbi, muana wa Sure. Tatuende uvua mfumu wa meku mashilangane a bena Madiyane." 
Numbers25:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers25:17 — Ndaku, uluishe bena Madiyane, ubabutule bonsu." 
Numbers25:18 Bavua banuenzela bibi ne muoyi wa lukinu, mu tshilumbu tshia ku Peyore ne mu tshia Kozbi, muana wa mfumu wa bena Madiyane, ufuile mu tshipupu tshivua tshienzeka bua ditendelela dia mvidie wa ku Peyore." 
Numbers25:19 Tshipupu atshi tshimane kupita," 
Numbers26:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe ne mutuangaji Elazare, muana wa Arone, ubambila ne:" 
Numbers26:2 — Nubadike bantu balume bonsu ba bena Izrayele ku meku abu. Nubale bonsu badi ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi abidi, badi mua kuenza mudimu wa bena mvita." 
Numbers26:3 Moshe ne Elazare kuya kudi bena Izrayele mu mpata ya Mowabe, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Yardene, dishiya dia Yeriko. Kubambilabu ne:" 
Numbers26:4 Maweja-Nangila mmututume bua kubadika bena Izrayele bonsu bakadi bakumbaja bidimu makumi abidi ne bisambuke. Bisamba bia bena Izrayele bivua bimuangale mu Ejipitu bivua nenku: 
Numbers26:5 Tshisamba tshia Rubene, muanabute wa Yakobe, tshivua ne meku aa, avua afumina ku bana bende: diku dia bena Anoke, ndelanganyi ya Anoke; diku dia bena Palu, ndelanganyi ya Palu;" 
Numbers26:6 dia bena Esrone, ndelanganyi ya Esrone; dia bena Karmi, ndelanganyi ya Karmi." 
Numbers26:7 Meku onsu a bena Rubene aa avua ne bantu balume 43.730. 
Numbers26:8 Eliyabe, muana wa Palu," 
Numbers26:9 uvua ne bana balume basatu: Nemuyele, Datane, ne Abirame. Datane ne Abirame, ke bakulu bavua batombokela Moshe ne Arone mu tshisangilu, pamue ne bena Kora, pavuabu babenga Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers26:10 Dituku adi, buloba kupandika, kubajibikila pamue ne Kora. Dituku adi bena Kora bonsu kubutuka. Kapia kuosha bantu bakuabu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu. Bualu abu kushala tshivulukilu kudi bena Izrayele." 
Numbers26:11 Kadi bana ba Kora kabavua bafue musangu awu to. 
Numbers26:12 Tshisamba tshia Shimeyone tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Nemuyele, ndelanganyi ya Nemuyele; dia bena Yamine, ndelanganyi ya Yamine; dia bena Yakine, ndelanganyi ya Yakine;" 
Numbers26:13 dia bena Zera, ndelanganyi ya Zera; ne dia bena Shawule, ndelanganyi ya Shawule." 
Numbers26:14 Meku onsu a bena Shimeyone aa avua ne bantu balume 22.200. 
Numbers26:15 Tshisamba tshia Ngade tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Sefone, ndelanganyi ya Sefone; dia bena Agi, ndelanganyi ya Agi; dia bena Shuni, ndelanganyi ya Shuni," 
Numbers26:16 dia bena Ozni, ndelanganyi ya Ozni; die bena Eri, ndelanganyi ya Eri;" 
Numbers26:17 dia bena Arode, ndelanganyi ya Arode; ne dia bena Areli, ndelanganyi ya Areli." 
Numbers26:18 Meku onsu a bena Ngade aa avua ne bantu balume 40.500. 
Numbers26:19 Tshisamba tshia Yuda tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Shela, ndelanganyi ya Shela; dia bena Perese, ndelanganyi ya Perese; dia bena Zera, ndelanganyi ya Zera. Kadi, bena Perese bavua basangisha kabidi diku dia bena Esrone, ndelanganyi ya Esrone; ne dia bena Amule, ndelanganyi ya Amule. Bana bakuabu ba Yuda babidi, Ere ne Onane, bavua bafuile mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Numbers26:20  
Numbers26:21  
Numbers26:22 Meku onsu a bena Yuda aa avua ne bantu balume 76.500. 
Numbers26:23 Tshisamba thia Isakare tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Tola, ndelanganyi ya Tola; dia bena Puwa, ndelanganyi ya Puwa;" 
Numbers26:24 dia bena Yashube, ndelanganyi ya Yashube; dia bena Shimrone, ndelanganyi ya Shimrone." 
Numbers26:25 Meku onsu a bena Isakare aa avua ne bantu balume 64.300. 
Numbers26:26 Tshisamba tshia Zebulone tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Serede, ndelanganyi ya Serede; dia bena Elone, ndelanganyi ya Elone; dia bena Yaleyele, ndelanganyi ya Yaleyele." 
Numbers26:27 Meku onsu a bena Zebulone aa avua ne bantu balume 60.500. 
Numbers26:28 Tshisamba tshia Menashe ne tshia Efrayime, ke ndelanganyi yonsu ya Yozefe." 
Numbers26:29 Kadi, tshisamba tshia Menashe tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Makire, ndelanganyi ya Makire; ne dia bena Ngilaade, ndelanganyi ya Ngilaade, muana wa Makire." 
Numbers26:30 Bena Ngilaade bavua basangile kabidi ne meku aa: diku dia bena Iyezere, ndelanganyi ya bena Iyezere; dia bena Eleke, ndelanganyi ya Eleke;" 
Numbers26:31 dia bena Asriyele, ndelanganyi ya Asriyele; dia bena Shekeme, ndelanganyi ya Shekeme;" 
Numbers26:32 dia bena Shemida, ndelanganyi ya Shemida; ne dia bena Efere, ndelanganyi ya Efere." 
Numbers26:33 Selofade, muana wa Efere, kavua mulele muana wa balume to. Uvua amu ne bana ba bakaji batanu: Mala, Nowa, Ogla, Milka ne Tirsa." 
Numbers26:34 Meku onsu a bena Menashe aa avua ne bantu balume 52.700. 
Numbers26:35 Tshisamba tshia Efrayime tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Shutela, ndelanganyi ya Shutela; dia bena Bekere, ndelanganyi ya Bekere; dia bena Takane, ndelanganyi ya Takane." 
Numbers26:36 Bena Erane ke ndelanganyi ya Erane, muana wa Shutela." 
Numbers26:37 Meku onsu a bena Efrayime avua ne bantu balume 32.500. Meku a bisamba ebi bibidi: tshia Menashe ne tshia Efrayime, ke ndelanganyi ya Yozefe." 
Numbers26:38 Tshisamba tshia Binyamine tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Bela, ndelanganyi ya Bela; dia bena Ashebele, ndelanganyi ya Ashebele; dia bena Akirame, ndelanganyi ya Akirame;" 
Numbers26:39 dia bena Shufame, ndelanganyi ya Shufame; ne dia bena Ufame, ndelanganyi ya Ufame." 
Numbers26:40 Bena diku dia Bela bavua basangisha kabidi meku aa: diku dia bena Arde, ndelanganyi ya Arde; ne dia bena Naamane, ndelanganyi ya Naamane." 
Numbers26:41 Meku onsu a bena Binyamine aa avua ne bantu balume 45.600. 
Numbers26:42 Tshisamba tshia Dane tshivua anu ne diku dimue dia bena Shuhame, ndelanganyi ya Shuhame." 
Numbers26:43 Diku edi divua ne bantu balume 64.400. 
Numbers26:44 Tshisamba tshia Ashere tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Yimna, ndelanganyi ya Yimna; dia bena Ishevi, ndelanganyi ya Ishevi; dia bena Beriya, ndelanganyi ya Beriya." 
Numbers26:45 Bena Beriya bavua basangisha kabidi meku aa: diku dia bena Ebere, ndelanganyi ya Ebere; ne dia bena Malkiyele, ndelanganyi ya Malkiyele." 
Numbers26:46 Ashere uvua kabidi ne muana wa bakaji, dina diende Sera." 
Numbers26:47 Meku onsu a bena Ashere aa avua ne bantu balume 53.400. 
Numbers26:48 Tshisamba tshia bena Naftali tshivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Yashiyele, ndelanganyi ya Yashiyele; dia bena Nguni, ndelanganyi ya Nguni;" 
Numbers26:49 dia bena Yeshere, ndelanganyi ya Yeshere; dia bena Shileme, ndelanganyi ya Shileme." 
Numbers26:50 Meku onsu a bena Naftali aa avua ne bantu balume 45.400. 
Numbers26:51 Bena Izrayele bonsu bavuabu babadike bavua bantu balume 601.730. 
Numbers26:52 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers26:53 — Upeshe tshisamba tshionsu muaba wa kuasa, bilondeshile bungi bua bantu." 
Numbers26:54 Bantu nebapete muaba wa kuasa, bilondeshile bungi buabu. Tshisamba tshinene netshipete muaba munene, tshikese muaba mukese." 
Numbers26:55 Kadi, nansha biobi bikale nanku, utshinke bua kujadika muaba udi tshisamba tshionsu mua kupeta." 
Numbers26:56 Neutshinke amu kutshinka bua kumanya muaba udi tshisamba tshinene nansha tshikese mua kupeta. 
Numbers26:57 Bisamba bia bena Levi bivuabu babadike, bivua ne meku aa: diku dia bena Ngershone, ndelanganyi ya Ngershone; dia bena Kekate, ndelanganyi ya Kekate; dia bena Merari, ndelanganyi ya Merari." 
Numbers26:58 Meku aa avua kabidi ne biota ebi: tshiota tshia bena Libni, tshia bena Ebrone, tshia bena Mali, tshia bena Mushi ne tshia bena Kora. Kekate ke uvua tatuende wa Amrame." 
Numbers26:59 Amrame uvua musele Yokebede, muana wa Levi, mulelela mu Ejipitu. Mukaji ewu uvua mulelele Amrame bana basatu: Arone, Moshe ne Miriyame." 
Numbers26:60 Arone uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Nadabe, Abiku, Elazare ne Itamare." 
Numbers26:61 Kadi Nadabe ne Abiku bafuile, bualu bavua balambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa musenga wa kamonya kauyi wa tshijila to." 
Numbers26:62 Bantu balume bonsu, too ne bana ba ngondu umue ne pa mutu, bavua 23.000. Bena Levi aba, kabavua bababadike pamue ne bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu to, bualu kabavua ne bua kupeta muaba wabu wa kuasa mu ditunga to." 
Numbers26:63 Bena Izrayele bonsu aba, ke bavua Moshe ne mutuangaji Elazare babadike mu mpata ya Mowabe ivua ku muelelu wa musulu wa Yardene, mitangilangane ne Yeriko." 
Numbers26:64 Ku bena Izrayele bonsu, bavua Moshe ne Arone babadike mu tshipela tshia Sinayi, kakuvua kushala muntu ne muoyi to." 
Numbers26:65 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kubamanyisha ne: nenuluile bonsu mu tshipela. Amu Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, ne Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ke bavua bashale ne muoyi." 
Numbers27:1 Selofade uvua ne bana ba bakaji batanu: Mala, Nowa, Ogla, Milka ne Tirsa. Bana abu bavua ba mu diku dia Menashe, muana wa Yozefe. Menashe kulela Makire. Makire kulela Ngilaade. Ngilaade kulela Efere. Efere kulela Selofade." 
Numbers27:2 Bakaji abu batanu kuya mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Kulomba Moshe, mutuangaji Elazare, bakulu ne bena Izrayele bonsu ne:" 
Numbers27:3 — Tatuetu ufuile mu tshipela bua bubi buende. Kadi kavua ku tshisumbu tshia Kora ne bantu bende, bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila to. Kavua mulele muana wa balume to." 
Numbers27:4 Dina diende didi ne bua kujimina mu diku dietu, bua padiye kayi mulele muana wa balume anyi? Nanku utupeshe petu tshietu tshitupa tshia buloba, mushindu umue ne bana babu ne tatu ba balume!" 
Numbers27:5 Moshe kuya kuambila Maweja-Nangila bionsu abi. 
Numbers27:6 Awu kumuandamuna ne: 
Numbers27:7 — Bana ba Selofade badi bamba bualu bulelela. Nanku ubape buloba bua bupianyi mushindu umue ne bana babu ne tatuabu ba balume. Ubapeshe buloba buvua tatuabu ne bua kupeta. 
Numbers27:8 Pashishe wambile bena Izrayele bonsu ne: Padi muntu ufua kayi mushiye muana wa balume, bapiane bintu biende kudi muanende wa bakaji." 
Numbers27:9 Pikalaye kayi ne muana wa bakaji, bapiane bintu biende kudi bana babu ba balume." 
Numbers27:10 Pikalaye kayi ne bana babu ba balume, bapiane bintu biende kudi ba tatuende mukuabu." 
Numbers27:11 Pikalaye kayi ne batatuende mukuabu, bapiane bintu biende kudi muntu yonsu wa mu diku diabu. Bena Izrayele bakumbaje bionsu bindi mukuambile ebi." 
Numbers27:12 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Banda ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Abarime, ubandile ditunga dindi mpesha bena Izrayele." 
Numbers27:13 Pawabandila ditunga adi, neufue, mufuile mukuluebe Arone, ulonda bankambua bebe." 
Numbers27:14 Bualu nuenu nuvua babenge diyi dianyi mu tshipela tshia Tsine, pavua bena Izrayele bantombokela. Mvua mukutume bua kupatula mayi mu lubuebue, pavuabu baalomba, bua bonsu bamone mundi wa tshijila. Kadi nuenu kubenga. Mayi aa ke mayi a Meriba, mmumue ne mayi a matandu, a mu Kadeshe, mu tshipela tshia Tsine." 
Numbers27:15 Moshe kuambila Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Numbers27:16 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wewe ke udi mufuke bintu bionsu ebi, ubipesha muoyi. Nanku usunguile bena Izrayele mfumu mukuabu," 
Numbers27:17 udi mua kubalombola miaba yonsu, bua bantu bebe kabikadi bu mikoku idi kayiyi ne muyilami." 
Numbers27:18 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Moshe ne: — Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, mmukumbane, bualu udi ne Mueyelu wanyi munda muende. Umubikidishe, umutenteke bianza." 
Numbers27:19 Umuleje kudi mutuangaji Elazare, ne kudi bena Izrayele bonsu, bua bajadike ne: yeye ke udi upingana pa muaba webe." 
Numbers27:20 Nanku, umunyukuile bukole buebe, bua bena Izrayele bonsu bamuitabe." 
Numbers27:21 Kadi Yoshuwa aye kuebeja mutuangaji Elazare bidiye ne bua kuenza. Mutuangaji akuate mudimu ne Urime, bua amanye tshindi musue, amanyishe Yoshuwa. Nanku Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele bonsu nebakumbaje bionsu bidi mutuangaji Elazare ubambila." 
Numbers27:22 Moshe kubikila Yoshuwa, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile, kumuimanyika kumpala kua mutuangaji Elazare ne bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Numbers27:23 Kutentekaye Yoshuwa bianza, bua ikale mupinganyi wende, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Numbers28:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers28:2 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Nulambule Maweja-Nangila milambu yenu pa diba, milambu ya kuosha bua dipembu diayi dimusankishe." 
Numbers28:3 “Dituku dionsu nungoshile bana ba mikoku babidi ba tshidimu tshimue, kabayi ne bulema pambidi. Matuku onsu nenundambule milambu ya kuosha ayi mu bujima buayi." 
Numbers28:4 Nungoshile mukoku umue dinda, mukuabu dilolu." 
Numbers28:5 Nundambule kabidi kilo ya bukula isatu, busambakaja ne mafuta litre umue ne tshitupa." 
Numbers28:6 Matuku onsu, nundambule mulambu wa kuosha mushindu umue ne mulambu unuvua bangoshile ku mukuna wa Sinayi, bua dipembu diawu dinsankishe." 
Numbers28:7 Dinda nulambule muana wa mukoku muaba wa tshijila, pamue ne litre wa mvinyo umue ne tshitupa." 
Numbers28:8 Muana wa mukoku udi mushale, uundambule dilolu, padi diba dibuela, pamue ne bintu binuvua basakidile dinda. Nanku dipembu dia mulambu wa kuosha awu nedinsankishe." 
Numbers28:9 “Dituku dia Dikisha, nundambule bana ba mikoku babidi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshimue, kabayi bulema pambidi to. Nusakidile kabidi kilo isambombu ya bukula, busambakaja ne mafuta, kabidi ne maluvu a mvinyo." 
Numbers28:10 Nanku dituku dia Dikisha dionsu nundambule mulambu wa kuosha ewu, pamue ne mulambu wa nyama ne wa mvinyo wa ku dituku ku dituku." 
Numbers28:11 “Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu yonsu, nungoshile meme Maweja-Nangila ngombe milume ibidi, mukoku wa tshimpanga, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima. Bimuna bionsu abi, kabikadi ne bulema pambidi to." 
Numbers28:12 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nenusakidile mulambu wa bukula, busambakaja ne mafuta: ku ngombe yonsu, nenusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers28:13 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu. Nanku dipembu dia milambu ya kuosha eyi, nedisankishe Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers28:14 Ku mulambu wa ngombe yonsu, nenusakidile mulambu wa maluvu a mvinyo litre isatu, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, mvinyo litre ibidi, ku wa muana wa mukoku, mvinyo litre umue ne tshitupa. Ke milambu inudi ne bua kundambula mu ntuadijila wa ngondu yonsu." 
Numbers28:15 Nuenu bamane kundambula mulambu wa kuosha wa ku dituku dionsu, ne wa maluvu a mvinyo, nenundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu." 
Numbers28:16 “Matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu tshionsu, nuenze tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila bua kumutumbisha." 
Numbers28:17 Matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu awu, nutuadije tshibilu tshia matuku muanda mutekete, anudi nudia mampa adi kaayi mela buanga." 
Numbers28:18 Dituku dia kumpala dia tshibilu atshi, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers28:19 Nungoshile ngombe milume ibidi, mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, nyama ayi ishile. Bimuna bionsu abi, kabikadi ne bulema pambidi to." 
Numbers28:20 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nusakidile bukula busambakaja ne mafuta: ku ngombe yonsu, nusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers28:21 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu." 
Numbers28:22 Pashishe nundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola, bua mibi yenu ijimine." 
Numbers28:23 Ke milambu inudi nusakidila ku milambu ya kuosha inudi nundambula dituku dionsu. 
Numbers28:24 Panudi nuenza tshibilu tshia matuku muanda mutekete, dituku dionsu nungoshile nyama, pamue ne mulambu wa ku dituku ku dituku, ne mulambu wa mvinyo. Dipembu diayi nedinsankishe." 
Numbers28:25 Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete kabidi, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela." 
Numbers28:26 “Dituku dia tshibilu tshia kunowa Biatshianyi, panudi nundambula meme Maweja-Nangila biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi enu, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela." 
Numbers28:27 Nundambule ngombe milume ibidi, mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima. Nanku nuoshe nyama ayi, ishile, bua dipembu diayi dinsankishe." 
Numbers28:28 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nusakidile bukula busambakaja ne mafuta: ku ngombe yonsu, nusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers28:29 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu." 
Numbers28:30 Nusakidile kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu." 
Numbers28:31 Nuenu bamane kundambula milambu ya kuosha ya ku dituku dionsu ne ya bia mu madimi enu, nenusakidile milambu yonsu eyi ya nyama, idi kayiyi ne bulema pambidi, pamue ne milambu ya maluvu a mvinyo, inudi ne bua kusakidila kabidi." 
Numbers29:1 “Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, kanuenji mudimu to. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila, bualu ndituku dia kuntumbisha." 
Numbers29:2 Dituku adi, nungoshile ngombe mulume umue, mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima. Bimuma ebi bionsu, kabikadi ne bulema to. Dipembu dimpe diabi nedinsankishe." 
Numbers29:3 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nusakidile bukula busambakaja ne mafuta. Ku ngombe mulume, nusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers29:4 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu." 
Numbers29:5 Pashishe, nundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu." 
Numbers29:6 Nuenu bamane kungoshila milambu ya dituku dionsu, ne ya dituku dia kumpala kua ngondu, pamue ne milambu ya tshibidilu ya bukula ne ya maluvu a mvinyo, nenundambule kabidi milambu yonsu eyi, bua dipembu dimpe dia milambu ya kuosha eyi dinsankishe." 
Numbers29:7 “Matuku dikumi a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, kanuenji mudimu, nujile biakudia. Nudisangishe bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers29:8 Dituku adi, nungoshile ngombe mulume umue, mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, bishile. Bimuna bionsu abi kabikadi ne bulema pambidi to. Dipembu diabi nedinsankishe." 
Numbers29:9 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nusakidile bukula busambakaja ne mafuta. Ku ngombe mulume, nusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers29:10 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu." 
Numbers29:11 Pashishe, nundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu. Milambu yonsu eyi, nuyilambule pamue ne mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu wa dituku adi, kabidi ne mulambu wa kuosha wa ku dituku dionsu, kabidi ne mulambu wa bukula ne wa maluvu a mvinyo. Bualu ke dituku dinene dia kukobolola bantu." 
Numbers29:12 “Matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, kanuenji mudimu to. Nungenzele tshibilu matuku muanda mutekete, nudisangishe bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers29:13 Dituku dia kumpala dia tshibilu atshi, nungoshile ngombe milume dikumi ne isatu, mikoku ya tshimpanga ibidi, ne bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, bishile. Bimuma bionsu ebi kabikadi ne bulema pambidi to. Dipembu diayi nedinsankishe." 
Numbers29:14 Ku tshimuna tshionsu, nusakidile bukula busambaja ne mafuta. Ku ngombe mulume yonsu, nusakidile bukula kilo tshitema, ku mukoku wa tshimpanga, bukula kilo isambombu," 
Numbers29:15 ku muana wa mukoku yonsu, bukula kilo isatu." 
Numbers29:16 Pashishe, nundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu. Milambu yonsu eyi, nuyilambule pamue ne mulambu wa ku dituku dionsu, ne milambu ya bukula, ne ya maluvu a mvinyo." 
Numbers29:17 “Biangatshile ku dituku dibidi too ne dia muanda mutekete, nundambule dituku dionsu bimuna bidi kabiyi ne bulema pambidi, pamue ne milambu mikuabu. Nusakidile milambu eyi ku mulambu wa kuosha wa ku dituku dionsu: Dituku dibidi: nundambule ngombe dikumi ne ibidi, mikoku ya tshimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijimu, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue. Dituku disatu: nundambule ngombe milume dikumi ne umue, mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue. Dituku dinayi: nundambule ngombe milume dikumi, mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue. Dituku ditanu: nundambule ngombe milume tshitema, mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue. Dituku disambombu: nundambule ngombe milume muanda mukulu, mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue. Dituku dia muanda mutekete: nundambule ngombe milume muanda mutekete, mikoku ya bimpanga ibidi, bana ba mikoku dikumi ne banayi, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, kabidi ne mbuji wa mpumbu umue." 
Numbers29:18 “Kadi dituku dia muanda mukulu, dia tshibilu, ndituku dia kudisangisha musangu wa ndekelu. Dituku adi kanuenji mudimu." 
Numbers29:19 Nundambule ngombe mulume umue, mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, ne bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, badi bamane kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, bishile. Bimuna bionsu ebi kabikadi ne bulema pambidi to. Dipembu dimpe dia nyama eyi nedinsankishe." 
Numbers29:20 Ku tshimuna tshionsu nenusakidile mulambu wa bukula, ne wa maluvu a mvinyo bu tshibidilu." 
Numbers29:21 Pashishe nundambule kabidi mbuji wa mpumbu, bua mulambu wa kunukobolola nawu. Milambu eyi, nuyilambule pamue ne mulambu wa kuosha wa ku dituku dionsu, kabidi ne mulambu wa bukula, ne maluvu a mvinyo wa ku dituku ku dituku." 
Numbers29:22 “Ke milambu inudi mua kundambula meme Maweja-Nangila matuku a bibilu. Nenuyisakidile ku milambu ya kuosha, ku milambu ya bukula, ne ya maluvu a mvinyo, ku milambu ya bobumue, inudi nulambula ku budisuile buenu, nansha bua bualu bunuvua balaye.”" 
Numbers30:1 Moshe kumanyisha bena Izrayele bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. 
Numbers30:2 Pashishe Moshe kumanyisha bamfumu ba meku a bena Izrayele mikenji mikuabu ya kudi Maweja-Nangila ya ne: 
Numbers30:3 “Pikala muntu mulaye bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu, nansha mutshipe bua kujila tshintu, udi ne bua kukumbaja bimpe bionsu bidiye mulaye abi." 
Numbers30:4 “Kadi pikala nsongakaji utshidi ku nzubu kua tatuende, mulaye Maweja-Nangila bualu, nansha muditshipe," 
Numbers30:5 tatuende mumvue bualu ebu, kayi wamba bualu, nsongakaji ewu udi ne bua kukumbaja bivuaye muambe." 
Numbers30:6 Kadi pikala tatuende mubenge bualu ebu dituku didibu bamumanyishabu, nsongakaji kena ne bua kukumbaja bivuaye muambe. Maweja-Nangila neafuile nsongakaji awu luse, bualu tatuende kavua musue bua abikumbaje to." 
Numbers30:7 “Pikala nsongakaji mumane kulaya, nansha muditshipe, kayi muele meji bimpe, kadi pashishe kumuselabu," 
Numbers30:8 bayende mupuwe diba didibu bamumanyisha bualu ebu, nsongakaji udi ne bua kukumbaja bionsu bivuaye mulaye abi." 
Numbers30:9 Kadi pikala bayende mubenge bionsu abi dituku mene didiye umanya bualu, udi ushipa bivua mukajende mulaye. Maweja-Nangila neafuile mukaji luse, padiye kayi ubikumbaja." 
Numbers30:10 “Pikala mukaji mukamba, nansha uvuabu babenga ku dibaka, musue kulaya bualu, udi ne bua kukumbaja bionsu bidiye mulaye abi." 
Numbers30:11 “Kadi pikala mukaji musela mulaye, nansha muditshipe," 
Numbers30:12 bayende kayi mubenge dituku didiye ubumanya, mukaji udi ne bua kukumbaja bionsu bidiye mulaye." 
Numbers30:13 Kadi pikala bayende mubibenge dituku adi, dilaya dia mukaji awu kadiena ne bualu kabidi to. Maweja-Nangila neamufuile luse, bualu bayende mmushipe dilaya diende adi." 
Numbers30:14 Nanku dilaya dionsu didi mukaji musela ulaya, nansha padiye uditshipa bua kujila tshintu, bayende udi mua kujadika, nansha kushipa dilaya diende, nansha mutshipu wende." 
Numbers30:15 Kadi dituku didi mulume mumanye bualu, mushale anu mupuwe, kayi wambila mukajende bualu, udi wanyisha bivuaye mulaye." 
Numbers30:16 Kadi pikala mulume mubibenge matuku mamane kupita, mukaji kayi ukumbaja bivuaye mulaye, tshilumbu netshikuate amu bayende." 
Numbers30:17 “Mikenji eyi ke ivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe, bua mukaji musela, nansha bua nsongakaji utshidi kumbelu kua tatuende, padiye musue kulaya bualu.”" 
Numbers31:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers31:2 — Uye kunyoka bena Madiyane bua kusombuela bena Izrayele badibu benzele bibi. Pashishe neushiye buloba. 
Numbers31:3 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Bantu bakuabu ba kunudi bambule bia mvita bua kuluisha bena Madiyane, bua bapete dinyoka didi Maweja-Nangila mubafundile." 
Numbers31:4 Nanku nusungule bena mvita tshinunu ku tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele. 
Numbers31:5 Kusungulabu bena mvita tshinunu ku tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele. Bonsu basanga bavua 12.000. 
Numbers31:6 Moshe kubatuma bonsu mu mvita, babalombola kudi mutuangaji Pinhase, muana wa Elazare. Pinhase uvua muambule bintu bia tshijila, kabidi ne mpungi bua kumanyisha bantu diba dia kutuadija mvita." 
Numbers31:7 Kuluishabu bena Madiyane, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Kushipabu bantu balume bonsu." 
Numbers31:8 Kushipabu kabidi Balaame, muana wa Beyore, pamue ne bamfumu batanu ba bena Madiyane: Evi, Rekeme, Sure, Ure ne Reba." 
Numbers31:9 Kukuatabu bakaji ne bana ba bena Madiyane mu bupika. Kunyengabu nyama yabu ivua yambula majitu, bimuna biabu ne bintu biabu bionsu." 
Numbers31:10 Bena Izrayele kuosha bimenga bia bena Madiyane bionsu, ne mitanda yabu yonsu." 
Numbers31:11 Pashishe kumukabu ne bantu, ne bimuna kabidi, ne bintu bionsu bivuabu banyenga mu mvita." 
Numbers31:12 Kufikabu ne bintu abi kudi Moshe, kudi mutuangaji Elazare, ne kudi bena Izrayele bonsu, bavua basomba mu mitanda yabu mu mpata ya Mowabe, pabuipi ne musulu wa Yardene, dishiya dia Yeriko." 
Numbers31:13 Moshe, Elazare ne bamfumu bakuabu ba bena Izrayele, kupatuka mu mitanda bua kuakidila bena mvita abu." 
Numbers31:14 Moshe kufikila balombodi bonsu ba bena mvita, bavua baya kuluangana ne bena Madiyane munda, nansha ba bena mvita tshinunu, nansha ba bena mvita lukama." 
Numbers31:15 Kubambilaye ne: — Kanuvua bashipe bantu bakaji to! 
Numbers31:16 Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: bakaji ba bena Madiyane aba ke bavua bitabe meji a Balaame, bafikishe bena Izrayele ku ditombokela Maweja-Nangila, bua kutendelela anu mvidie wa ku Peyore. Ke pavua tshipupu tshibutule bantu ba Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers31:17 Nanku mpindiewu nushipe bana ba balume bonsu, kabidi ne bakaji bonsu bakadi bamane kumanyangana ne balume." 
Numbers31:18 Kadi nsongakaji idi kayiyi mianji kumanyangana ne balume, kanuyishipi to. Ishale bualu buenu." 
Numbers31:19 Kadi nuenu bonsu bavua bashipe muntu, nansha balenge tshitalu, nushale anu pambelu pa mitanda matuku muanda mutekete. Numushe mikiya yenu dituku disatu ne dia muanda mutekete. Bantu bakaji banuvua bakuate mu bupika benze pabu nanku." 
Numbers31:20 Numushe kabidi mikiya idi pa bilamba bienu, ne pa bintu bionsu binudi nabi, bidi bienza ne biseba, ne boya bua mbuji, nansha ne mabaya a mitshi." 
Numbers31:21 Pashishe mutuangaji Elazare kuambila bantu bonsu bavua baye ku mvita mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe ne: 
Numbers31:22 — Biamu bionsu bidi kabiyi binyanguke mu kapia, bu mudi bintu bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia kabanda, tshiamu tshifike, tshiamu tshia mayowa, nansha tshiamu tshikuabu, ubiele mu kapia, pashishe ubitue mu mayi bua kumusha mikiya. Kadi biamu bionsu bidi binyanguke mu kapia, ubitue anu mu mayi bua kumusha mikiya." 
Numbers31:23  
Numbers31:24 Dituku dia muanda mutekete, nusukule bilamba bua kumusha mikiya yenu. Pashishe nenupingane mu mitanda, kanuyi kabidi ne mikiya." 
Numbers31:25 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers31:26 — Wewe, Elazare ne bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, nubadike bantu ne bimuna bionsu binudi banyenga mu mvita." 
Numbers31:27 Wabanya bintu abi mu bitupa bibidi bia mushindu umue: etshi bangate kudi bena mvita bavua mu mvita, tshikuabu bangate kudi bena Izrayele bavua kabayi mu mvita." 
Numbers31:28 Ku bintu bidibu bangate kudi bena mvita bavua mu mvita, pa bantu nkama itanu, nungumushile muntu umue, pa nyama nkama itanu, nungumushile nyama umue: ngombe umue, mpunde umue, mukoku umue ne mbuji umue." 
Numbers31:29 Bintu bionsu binudi nungumushila abi, ubipeshe mutuangaji Elazare." 
Numbers31:30 Kadi ku bintu bionsu bidibu bangate kudi bena Izrayele bakuabu, pa bantu makumi atanu nungumushile muntu umue, ne pa nyama makumi atanu nungumushile nyama umue: ngombe umue, mpunde umue, mukoku umue ne tshimuna tshikuabu tshionsu anu tshimue. Bena Levi badi benza mudimu wa kulama nzubu wanyi wa tshijila bangate bintu abi." 
Numbers31:31 Moshe ne mutuangaji Elazare kukumbaja bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambe. 
Numbers31:32 Bintu bionsu bivuabu banyenga mu mvita bidi nunku: mikoku ne mbuji 675.000 
Numbers31:33 ngombe 72.000," 
Numbers31:34 mpunde 61.000," 
Numbers31:35 ne nsongakaji ivua kayiyi mianji kumanya balume 32.000. 
Numbers31:36 Bintu bionsu bivuabu babanyina bena mvita bavua mu mvita bivua nunku: mikoku ne mbuji 337.500. 
Numbers31:37 Ku yoyi ayi bavua bumushile Maweja-Nangila 675. 
Numbers31:38 Ku ngombe 36.000, kumushilabu Maweja-Nangila 72," 
Numbers31:39 ku mpunde 30.500, kumushilabu Maweja-Nangila 61," 
Numbers31:40 ku bantu 16.000 kumushilabu Maweja-Nangila 32. 
Numbers31:41 Moshe kupesha mutuangaji Elazare bintu bionsu bivua bia Maweja-Nangila, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Numbers31:42 Bintu bivuabu babanyina bena Izrayele bakuabu, bivua anu mushindu umue ne bivuabu babanyine bena mvita." 
Numbers31:43 Muvua mikoku ne mbuji 337.500," 
Numbers31:44 ngombe 36.000," 
Numbers31:45 mpunde 30.500," 
Numbers31:46 ne bantu 16.000. 
Numbers31:47 Nanku ku bantu ne bintu bionsu bivuabu babanyine bena Izrayele, Moshe kumusha muntu umue ku bantu makumi atanu, ne nyama umue ku nyama makumi atanu. Kupeshaye bena Levi bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bintu abi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Numbers31:48 Bamfumu ba bena mvita bavua balombola bisumbu bia bantu tshinunu nansha lukama, kudisangisha kudi Moshe," 
Numbers31:49 kumuambila ne: — Tuabadiki bena mvita batuvua nabu mu mvita: muntu nansha umue kena mufue to. 
Numbers31:50 Ke patudi tulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu, bua atulame ne muoyi. Muntu yonsu wa kutudi nealambule biende bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi bidiye mupete: tukanu tua majita, nkanu ya ku maboku, tukanu tua ku minu, tukanu tua ku matshi, ne mabue a mu nshingu." 
Numbers31:51 Moshe ne mutuangaji Elazare, kuangata bintu bionsu bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bivua bantu bafile." 
Numbers31:52 Bintu bionsu bivuabu bafile kudi balombodi ba bena mvita bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila, bivua ne bujitu bua kilo 170." 
Numbers31:53 Kadi bena mvita bavua kabayi ne mianzu, bavua balame bintu bionsu bivuabu bapete mu mvita." 
Numbers31:54 Moshe ne Elazare kuteka bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bivuabu bafile kudi balombodi ba bena mvita abi, mu ntenta wa kusambakena, bua Maweja-Nangila ikale uvuluka bena Izrayele." 
Numbers32:1 Ndelanganyi ya Rubene ne ya Ngade ivua ne bimuna bipite bungi. Kumonabu ditunga dia Yazere ne dia Ngilaade abalengelela bua kumunyinabu bimuna. 
Numbers32:2 Kuyabu kudi Moshe, kudi mutuangaji Elazare, ne kudi bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, kubambilabu ne:" 
Numbers32:3 — Bimenga ebi, Atarote, Dibone, Yazere, Nimra, Eshebone, Elale, Sebame, Nebo ne Beyone," 
Numbers32:4 mbia mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, didibu bapete ku diambuluisha dia Maweja-Nangila. Ditunga edi ndimpe bua tuetu kumunyinamu bimuna bietu." 
Numbers32:5 Kusengelelabu kabidi Moshe ne: — Anyisha, utupeshe miaba eyi, tuabanyangane. Katuena basue kusabuka dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene to." 
Numbers32:6 Moshe kubenga, wamba ne: — Kanuena mua kushala apa to. Bana benu kabena mua kuya ku mvita nkayabu to." 
Numbers32:7 Nudi basue kupumbisha bena Izrayele bua kufikabu mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila mubapeshe anyi? 
Numbers32:8 Bankambua benu bavua benza kabidi tshilema etshi kale ku Kadeshe-Barneya, pamvua mubatume bua kutentekela ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Numbers32:9 Pafikibu mu tshibandabanda tshia Eshekole, kutentekelabu ditunga. Kadi mu dipingana diabu, kupumbishabu bena Izrayele mua kufika mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila mumane kubapa." 
Numbers32:10 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kubafikila munda, wamba ne:" 
Numbers32:11 “Bantu bonsu bavua bapatuka mu Ejipitu, badi ne bidimu makumi abidi ne pa mutu, kabena mua kufika mu ditunga dimvua mulaye Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe to, bualu mbantombokele." 
Numbers32:12 Amu Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, wa mu diku dia Kenaze, ne Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ke badi mua kufika mu ditunga adi, bualu kabena bantombokela to.”" 
Numbers32:13 Nanku Maweja-Nangila mmufikile bena Izrayele bonsu munda, mubaladike mu tshipela bidimu makumi anayi, bua bantu bonsu bavua bamutombokela abu babutuke." 
Numbers32:14 Kadi mpindiewu, nuenu bena buenzavi, nudi basue kulonda amu meji mabi a bankambua benu, bua Maweja-Nangila afikile kabidi bena Izrayele munda." 
Numbers32:15 Nuenu bena Rubene ne bena Ngade, panudi nutombokela Maweja-Nangila, yeye neashiye bena Izrayele bonsu mu tshipela, babutukilamu ku tshilema tshienu." 
Numbers32:16 Bena Rubene ne bena Ngade kuambila Moshe ne: — Kabiena muudi wamba amu to. Tudi basue kuasa apa bikumbi bua bimuna bietu, ne bimenga bua bana betu batudi balele." 
Numbers32:17 Pashishe tuetu netuangate bia mvita, tupite kumpala kua bena Izrayele bonsu, bua kubafikisha pa wabu muaba. Diba adi, bana batuvua balele nebashale mu bimenga bibaka bimpe, kabayi mua kutshina njiwu ya kudi bena ditunga edi." 
Numbers32:18 Amu patuafikisha bena Izrayele mu Kenaane, bobu bamane kupeta bonsu muaba wa kuasa, netupingane kuetu." 
Numbers32:19 Katuena basue kuabanyangana nabu buloba budi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene to, bu tuetu mua kupeta buloba dia munemu dia musulu, luseke luawu ludi diba dipatukila." 
Numbers32:20 Moshe kubambila ne: — Mbimpe, angatayi bia mvita, nuye kuluangana mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, munudi bamane kulaya." 
Numbers32:21 Bantu balume bonsu bambule bia mvita, basabuke dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, bashalemu too ne diba didi Maweja-Nangila unyenga baluishi betu ditunga diabu." 
Numbers32:22 Pashishe ditunga adi dimane kuitaba Maweja-Nangila, nenupingane kuenu, kanuyi ne tshilumbu kudi Maweja-Nangila, nansha kudi bena Izrayele. Nenku Maweja-Nangila neanupe ditunga didi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene edi kashidi." 
Numbers32:23 Kadi numanye ne: Nuenu kanuyi bakumbaje bionsu ebi, nenuikale bena tshibawu. Maweja-Nangila neanunyoke." 
Numbers32:24 Ashilayi bakaji benu ne bana benu bimenga, enzayi bikumbi bia bimuna bienu. Kadi nukumbaje bionsu binuvua balaye Maweja-Nangila." 
Numbers32:25 Bena Rubene ne bena Ngade kuitaba, bambila Moshe ne: — Netukumbaje bionsu biudi utuambila ebi." 
Numbers32:26 Nanku bana betu, bakaji betu ne bimuna bietu, nebishale munu mu Ngilaade." 
Numbers32:27 Kadi tuetu, netuambule bia mvita, tuye mu mvita. Maweja-Nangila neatuambuluishe, bu muudi utuambila emu." 
Numbers32:28 Moshe kufikisha majinga a bena Rubene ne bena Ngade kudi mutuangaji Elazare, kudi Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ne kudi bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers32:29 Kubambilaye ne: — Pikala bena Rubene ne bena Ngade, basabuke nenu musulu wa Yardene bua kuluangana mvita, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila muambe, banuambuluishe bua nukuate ditunga dia Kenaane, nanku nubapeshe ditunga dia Ngilaade, dikale diabu." 
Numbers32:30 Kadi pikalabu kabayi bakumbaje bionsu ebi, nenusombe nabu amu mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Numbers32:31 Bena Rubene ne bena Ngade kuitaba kabidi ne: — Netukumbaje bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila muambe. 
Numbers32:32 Netuambule bia mvita bua kuluangana ne bena Kenaane, badi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene. Pashishe tuetu netu-pingane dia munemu bua kupeta bupianyi buetu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu ewu wa Yardene." 
Numbers32:33 Moshe kupesha bena Ngade, bena Rubene, ne tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, muana wa Yozefe, ditunga dia Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, kabidi ne ditunga dia Oge, mukalenga wa bena Bashane. Kubapeshaye bimenga bionsu, kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Numbers32:34 Ndelanganyi ya Ngade kuasulula bimenga abi: Dibone, Atarote, Aroyere," 
Numbers32:35 Atrote-Shofane, Yazere, Yogbaha," 
Numbers32:36 Bete-Nimra ne Bete-Arane. Kulongololabu bimenga ebi bimpe, kubikolesha ne bimana. Kuenzabu kabidi mpangu ne bikumbi bia kumunyina bimuna." 
Numbers32:37 Ndelanganyi ya Rubene kuasulula bimenga ebi: Eshebone, Elale, Kiriyatayime," 
Numbers32:38 Nebo, Baale-Meyone, bivuabu bamane kukudimuna dina. Pashishe kuasabu kabidi Sibma. Bimenga bikuabu bivuabu base, kubinyikabu mena mapiamapia." 
Numbers32:39 Ndelanganyi ya Makire, muana wa Menashe, kutshimuna bena Amore, kubanyenga ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
Numbers32:40 Ke Moshe kubapesha ditunga edi bua basemu. 
Numbers32:41 Ndelanganyi ya Yayire, muana mukuabu wa Menashe, kunyenga misoku mikuabu ya bena Amore, kuyinyikabu ne: “Misoku ya Yayire.”" 
Numbers32:42 Pashishe Noba kunyenga tshimenga tshia bena Kenate, ne misoku yonsu ivua pabuipi natshi. Kuinyikaye tshimenga etshi dina diende dia Noba." 
Numbers33:1 Bena Izrayele bamane kupatuka mu Ejipitu, kulondabu Moshe ne Arone, benda bikisha miaba mishilangane." 
Numbers33:2 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile Moshe bua kufundaye miaba yonsu ivuabu ne bua kuikisha mu luendu luabu. Miaba ayi idi nunku: 
Numbers33:3 Mu matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa kumpala, bena Izrayele bamane kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila musangu wa kumpala, kumukabu mu Ramsese, muvuabu basue, bena Ejipitu babatangile." 
Numbers33:4 Ke bena Ejipitu kushisha kujika bitalu bia bamuanabute babu, bavua Maweja-Nangila mushipe bonsu. Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila muleje bukole buende kudi mvidie ya bena Ejipitu nanku." 
Numbers33:5 Bena Izrayele bumuka mu Ramsese, kuyabu ku Sukote." 
Numbers33:6 Bumuka mu Sukote, kufikabu ku Etame, ku muelelu wa tshipela." 
Numbers33:7 Bumuka mu Etame, kupinganabu ku Pi-Ahirote, mutangilangane ne Baale-Sefone. Kuasabu mitanda yabu kuinshi kua Migdole." 
Numbers33:8 Bumuka mu Pi-Ahirote, kusabukabu mayi manene, kufikabu mu tshipela. Kuendabu matuku asatu mu tshipela atshi tshia Etame, kufikabu ku Mara." 
Numbers33:9 Bumuka mu Mara, kuyabu kuasa ku Elima. Muaba awu uvua mpokolu ya mayi dikumi ne ibidi, ne mabue a ngaji makumi muanda mutekete." 
Numbers33:10 Bumuka mu Elima, kuyabu kuasa pabuipi ne Mayi manene makunze." 
Numbers33:11 Bumuka ku Mayi manene makunze, kuyabu mu tshipela tshia Sine." 
Numbers33:12 Bumuka mu tshipela tshia Sine, kuyabu ku Dofka." 
Numbers33:13 Bumuka ku Dofka, kuyabu ku Alushe." 
Numbers33:14 Bumuka mu Alushe, kuyabu ku Refidime, muaba uvuabu kabayi mua kupeta mayi a kunua to." 
Numbers33:15 Bumuka mu Refidime, kuyabu mu tshipela tshia Sinayi." 
Numbers33:16 Bumuka mu tshipela, kuyabu ku Kibrote-Taawa." 
Numbers33:17 Bumuka mu Kibrote-Taawa, kuyabu ku Asherote." 
Numbers33:18 Bumuka mu Asherote, kuyabu ku Ritma." 
Numbers33:19 Bumuka mu Ritma, kuyabu ku Rimone-Perese." 
Numbers33:20 Bumuka mu Rimone-Perese, kuyabu ku Libna." 
Numbers33:21 Bumuka mu Libna, kuyabu ku Risha." 
Numbers33:22 Bumuka mu Risha, kuyabu ku Kehelata." 
Numbers33:23 Bumuka mu Kehelata, kuyabu ku mukuna wa Shefere." 
Numbers33:24 Bumuka ku mukuna wa Shefere, kuyabu ku Arada." 
Numbers33:25 Bumuka ku Arada, kuyabu ku Makelote." 
Numbers33:26 Bumuka ku Makelote, kuyabu ku Tahate." 
Numbers33:27 Bumuka mu Tahate, kuyabu ku Tera." 
Numbers33:28 Bumuka mu Tera, kuyabu ku Mitka." 
Numbers33:29 Bumuka mu Mitka, kuyabu ku Ashemona." 
Numbers33:30 Bumuka ku Ashemona, kuyabu ku Mosherote." 
Numbers33:31 Bumuka ku Mosherote, kuyabu ku Bene-Yakane." 
Numbers33:32 Bumuka ku Bene-Yakane, kuyabu ku Ore-Ngidngade." 
Numbers33:33 Bumuka mu Ore-Ngidngade, kuyabu ku Yotbata." 
Numbers33:34 Bumuka mu Yotbata, kuyabu ku Abrona." 
Numbers33:35 Bumuka mu Abrona, kuyabu ku Eshiyone-Ngebere." 
Numbers33:36 Bumuka mu Eshiyone-Ngebere, kuyabu ku Kadeshe mu tshipela tshia Tsine." 
Numbers33:37 Bumuka mu Kadeshe, kuyabu ku mukuna wa Ore, pabuipi ne mikalu ya bena Edome." 
Numbers33:38 Mutuangaji Arone kubanda ku mukuna wa Ore, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kufuilayemu dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muitanu, bena Izrayele bamane kukumbaja bidimu makumi anayi katshia bumuka mu Ejipitu." 
Numbers33:39 Arone uvua ne bidimu lukamu makumi abidi ne bisatu, pafuilaye ku mukuna wa Ore." 
Numbers33:40 Tshikondu atshi, Arade, mukalenga wa bena Kenaane, uvua musombe mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga, kumvuaye lumu lua difika dia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers33:41 Bena Izrayele bumuka ku mukuna wa Ore, kuyabu ku Salmona." 
Numbers33:42 Bumuka mu Salmona, kuyabu ku Punone." 
Numbers33:43 Bumuka mu Punone, kuyabu ku Obote." 
Numbers33:44 Bumuka mu Obote, kuyabu ku Ye-Abarime, ku mikalu ya bena Mowabe." 
Numbers33:45 Bumuka mu Ye-Abarime, kuyabu ku Dibone-Ngade." 
Numbers33:46 Bumuka mu Dibone-Ngade, kuyabu ku Almone-Diblatayime." 
Numbers33:47 Bumuka mu Almone-Diblatayime, kuyabu ku mikuna ya Abarime, ivua mitangilangane ne mukuna wa Nebo." 
Numbers33:48 Bumuka mu mikuna ya Abarime, kuyabu mu mpata ya Mowabe, pabuipi ne musulu wa Yardene, mitangilangane ne Yeriko." 
Numbers33:49 Kuasabu mitanda yabu mu mpata ya Mowabe, pabuipi ne musulu wa Yardene, pankatshi pa Bete-Yeshimote ne Abele-Shitime." 
Numbers33:50 Mu mpata ya Mowabe, pabuipi ne musulu wa Yardene, mitangilangane ne Yeriko, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe" 
Numbers33:51 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: — Panuikala bamane kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, bafike mu ditunga dia Kenaane," 
Numbers33:52 nuipate bena ditunga adi bonsu. Nunyange mpingu yonsu, idi ileja mvidie yabu, nansha bayisonge mu mabue, nansha bayifule ne tshiamu. Nunyangakaje kabidi miaba yabu yonsu idibu batendelela." 
Numbers33:53 Nukuate ditunga diabu, nusombemu. Ditunga nedishale dienu, bualu ndi mumane kunupeshadi." 
Numbers33:54 Bua nuenu kuabanyangana ditunga edi, nutshinke muaba udibu mua kuasa kudi bisamba bienu ne meku enu. Diku dionsu, nedipete muaba, bilondeshile bungi ba bantu badimu. Bantu banyishe muaba udibu babapesha, bilondeshile munuikala batshinke." 
Numbers33:55 Panudi kanuyi bipate bena ditunga bonsu, badi bashale nebanukengeshe bikole, bu mudi misona itua mu disu, nansha bu mudi dieba ditua mu nyima. Pashishe nebanukengeshe mu ditunga dinudi nuya kusomba." 
Numbers33:56 Diba adi, meme Maweja-Nangila nennukengeshe nuenu bena Izrayele, bu mumvua musue kukengesha bena Kenaane." 
Numbers34:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers34:2 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: — Panuafika mu ditunga dia Kenaane, dindi mumane kunupesha, mikalu yadi idi mushindu ewu:" 
Numbers34:3 “Kuinshi kua ditunga, mukalu wenu newikale tshipela tshia Tsine, ne ditunga dia bena Edome. Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila mukalu wenu neubange kuinshi menemene kua Mayi manene a luepu." 
Numbers34:4 Mukalu awu udi upitshila kuinshi kua mukuna wa Akrabime, too ne mu tshipela tshia Tsine, bua kufika kuinshi kua Kadeshe-Barneya, pashishe upitshila ku Ashare-Adare ne ku Ashimone." 
Numbers34:5 Pashishe mukalu wenu neubende mu Ashimone, bua kufika ku musulu wa mu Ejipitu, ushiki la ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Numbers34:6 “Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, mukalu wenu newikale Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Numbers34:7 “Ku mutu kua ditunga dia Kenaane, mukalu wa ditunga dienu newikale pankatshi pa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, ne mukuna wa Ore." 
Numbers34:8 Mukalu awu udi umuka ku mukuna wa Ore, upitshila ku Lebo-Amate ne ku Sedade." 
Numbers34:9 Pashishe mukalu awu udi upitshila ku Zifrone, ushikidila mu Ashare-Enane. Ke mukalu wenu wa ku mutu wa ditunga." 
Numbers34:10 “Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, mukalu wa ditunga dienu wikale utuadija ku Ashare-Enane, uya ku Shefame." 
Numbers34:11 Mukalu ewu neutungunuke too ne ku Ribla, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Ayine. Pashishe mukalu awu neuye kumpala ufika ku bibandabanda bidi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua dijiba dia Ngenesarete," 
Numbers34:12 too ne ku musulu wa Yardene, bua kushikidila ku Mayi manene a luepu. “Ke muikala mikalu ya ditunga dienu nanku.”" 
Numbers34:13 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele mikenji eyi. Pashishe kubambilaye kabidi ne: — Ditunga edi ke didi Maweja-Nangila muambe bua tutshinke, tuabanyine bisamba tshitema bia bena Izrayele, ne tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe." 
Numbers34:14 Bualu bena diku dia Rubene ne dia Ngade, ne tshia bibidi tshimue tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, bakadi bamane kupeta wabu muaba." 
Numbers34:15 Bisamba ebi bibidi ne tshitupa, nebisombe dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, luseke luawu ludi diba dipatukila, batangilangane ne Yeriko." 
Numbers34:16 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: 
Numbers34:17 — Mutuangaji Elazare ne Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, nebabanyine bantu ditunga edi." 
Numbers34:18 Kadi bua kubapepejila mudimu ewu, ubapeshe mfumu umue ku tshisamba tshionsu," 
Numbers34:19 bilondangane mushindu ewu: Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda;" 
Numbers34:20 Yemuyele, muana wa Amikude, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Shimeyone;" 
Numbers34:21 Elidade, muana wa Kislone, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine;" 
Numbers34:22 Buki, muana wa Yogli, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Dane;" 
Numbers34:23 Aniyele, muana wa Efode, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, muana wa Yozefe;" 
Numbers34:24 Kemuyele, muana wa Shiftane, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Efrayime, muana wa Yozefe;" 
Numbers34:25 Elishafane, muana wa Pamake, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Zebulone;" 
Numbers34:26 Paltiyele, muana wa Azane, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Isakare;" 
Numbers34:27 Ahihude, muana wa Shelomi, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Ashere;" 
Numbers34:28 Pedahele, muana wa Amikude, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Naftali." 
Numbers34:29 Bantu aba, ke bavua Maweja-Nangila musungule bua kuabanyinabu bena Izrayele ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Numbers35:1 Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne Moshe mu mpata ya Mowabe, mitangilangane ne Yeriko, ivua pabuipi ne Yardene. Kumuambilaye ne:" 
Numbers35:2 — Wambile bena Izrayele, basungule mu buloba buabu bimenga, ne miaba ya kudishila bimuna biabu, babipeshe bena Levi."
