Numbers35:3 Bimenga abi bishale bia bena Levi, bua basemu. Bapete kabidi pabuipi nabi mpata ya kudishila bimuna biabu, ne nyama mikuabu idibu mua kupeta." 
Numbers35:4 Mpata ya kudishila bimuna ayi, ikale bunene bua metre nkama itanu kumukila ku bimana bia bimenga biabu, ku nseke yonsu inayi, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, luseke lua kuinshi kua ditunga, luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ne luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga. Nanku muaba wabu newikale wa metre tshinunu ku nseke yonsu, tshimenga tshikale pankatshi." 
Numbers35:5  
Numbers35:6 Upeshe bena Levi bimenga bisambombu bia kunyemenabu. Muaba awu, ke udibu mua kunyemena kudi muntu yonsu udi ushipangana mu mpukapuka, kayi mumanye. Usakidile kabidi bimenga bikuabu makumi anayi ne bibidi." 
Numbers35:7 Bimenga abi bionsu bisanga nebikale makumi anayi ne muanda mukulu, kabidi ne mpata idi pabuipi nabi ya kudishila bimuna." 
Numbers35:8 Tshisamba tshionsu, netshipeshe bena Levi bungi bua bimenga, bilondeshile bunene bua buloba buatshi. Pikala bantu ba bungi, nebafile bimenga bia bungi. Pikalabu bakese, nebafile bimenga bikese." 
Numbers35:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe 
Numbers35:10 bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: — Panuikala bamane kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, bafike mu ditunga dia Kenaane," 
Numbers35:11 nusungule bimenga bikuabu bidi muntu mua kunyemena, pikalaye mushipangane mu mpukapuka." 
Numbers35:12 Mushipianganyi neanyemene mu tshimenga atshi, bua kabamusombuedi, too ne pamulumbuluishabu kudi bena Izrayele." 
Numbers35:13 Nanku bimenga bia kunyemena nebikale bisambombu: 
Numbers35:14 bisatu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, bisatu bikuabu mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Numbers35:15 Muntu yonsu, muena Izrayele nansha muenyi, udi musombe mu bena Izrayele, udi mushipe muntu mu mpukapuka, udi mua kunyemena mu tshimenga tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bisambombu." 
Numbers35:16 “Pikalabu bashipe muntu ne tshiamu, nansha ne dibue nansha ne mutshi bidi mua kushipa muntu, mushipianganyi awu mmuena tshibawu. Nebamushipe pende." 
Numbers35:17  
Numbers35:18  
Numbers35:19 Nanku muntu udibu bateka bua kumusombuela, papetaye mushipianganyi awu, amushipe pende." 
Numbers35:20 Pikala mushipianganyi musakile muntu ne muoyi wa lukinu, mumuase tshintu ne muoyi mubi," 
Numbers35:21 nansha mumushipe ku mituutu, mushipianganyi awu mmuena tshibawu. Pamupetabu kudi musombuedianganyi, neamushipe pende." 
Numbers35:22 “Kadi pikala muntu musakile mukuabu, mumuase tshintu mu mpukapuka, kayi ne muoyi mubi, mumushipe," 
Numbers35:23 nansha pikalaye mumushipe ne dibue mu mpukapuka, kayi musue kumuenzela bibi, kayi ne lukinu," 
Numbers35:24 bena Izrayele nebakose tshilumbu etshi bimpe, bilondeshile mikenji idi itangila muntu udi ushipangana mu mpukapuka, ne musombuedianganyi wende." 
Numbers35:25 Bena Izrayele nebasungidile muntu udi mushipangane mu mpukapuka awu. Nebamusokoke mu tshimenga tshia kunyemena, bua musombuedianganyi kamushipi to. “Mushipianganyi awu, neashale mu tshimenga atshi, too ne pafua mutuangaji munene uvuabu bajidile ne manyi a tshijila." 
Numbers35:26 Kadi pikala mushipianganyi awu mupatuke mu thimenga tshia kunyemena," 
Numbers35:27 musombuedianganyi mumupete, udi mua kumushipa. Kakuena tshilumbu to." 
Numbers35:28 Nanku muntu yonsu udi ushipangana mu mpukapuka, asombe anu mu tshimenga tshia kunyemena, too ne pafua mutuangaji munene. Pashishe mutuangaji mumane kufua, neapingane kuabu." 
Numbers35:29 “Nulame mikenji eyi kashidi, miaba yonsu inudi nusomba." 
Numbers35:30 “Bua kufundila mushipianganyi tshibawu tshia lufu, anu pikalabu bajadike tshilumbu atshi kudi bantu ba bungi, kadi ki nkudi muntu umue to." 
Numbers35:31 Kanuangatshi makuta bua kubingisha mushipianganyi, muena tshibawu tshia lufu. Udi anu ne bua kufua." 
Numbers35:32 Kanuangatshi makuta bua kunyemesha mushipianganyi mu tshimenga tshia kunyemena, kumupingaja pashishe kuabu, mutuangaji munene kayi muanji kufua to!" 
Numbers35:33 “Kanunyangakaji ditunga dinudi basombe to. Numanye ne: mushipianganyi udi unyanga ditunga. Nanku padibu bashipa muntu mu ditunga, bua kumusha mikiya idi mikuate ditunga, amu bobu bashipe mushipianganyi awu." 
Numbers35:34 Nudimuke. Kanuena mua kupisha ditunga dinudi nusomba mikiya to, bualu meme muine nensombe munkatshi muenu. Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nsomba munkatshi muenu.”" 
Numbers36:1 Bamfumu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Yozefe ba mu diku dia Ngilaade, muana wa Makire, uvua kabidi muikulu wa Menashe, kuya kudi Moshe ne bamfumu bakuabu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele." 
Numbers36:2 Kubambilabu ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile Moshe bua atshinke ditunga dia Kenaane, adiabanyine bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele. Uvua mumuambile kabidi bua buloba bua muanetu Selofade, babupiane kudi bana bende ba bakaji." 
Numbers36:3 Pikala muntu mulume wa tshisamba tshikuabu musele bana abu, nebumushe tshitupa tshia buloba buetu bua kubusangisha ne buloba bua tshisamba tshiabu tshipiatshipia. Nanku muaba uvuabu batshinke bua kutupesha neukepele." 
Numbers36:4 Kabidi tshidimu tshia disanka dinene, tshitupa tshia buloba buetu atshi, netshiumuke kutudi kashidi, tshishale tshia tshisamba tshiabu tshipiatshipia." 
Numbers36:5 Moshe kumanyisha bena Izrayele bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile ne: — Ndelanganyi ya Yozefe idi yamba bualu bulelela. 
Numbers36:6 Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Badi mua kusela bana ba bakaji ba Selofade kudi muntu yonsu. Kadi mulume awu ikale anu wa mu diku dia batatuabu. 
Numbers36:7 Maloba a bena Izrayele, kabena mua kuangata lelu kudi bena tshisamba kampande, maloba kudi bena tshisamba tshikuabu nansha. Muena Izrayele yonsu neasombe amu mu tshitupa tshia buloba tshia tshisamba tshiabu." 
Numbers36:8 Nanku pikala mukaji ne wende muaba wa bupianyi mu tshisamba tshiabu, nebamusele anu kudi mulume wa mu tshisamba tshia batatuende atshi. Tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele netshilame buloba buvuabu bapete kudi bankambua babu." 
Numbers36:9 Maloba a bena Izrayele kabena mua kuangata tshiangatangata to. Tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele netshilame buloba buabu bimpe. 
Numbers36:10 Bana ba bakaji ba Selofade kuitaba diyi dia Maweja-Nangila divuaye muambile Moshe. 
Numbers36:11 Kuselabu Mala, Tirsa, Ogla, Milka ne Nowa kudi bana ba batatuabu bakuabu," 
Numbers36:12 nanku kudi bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Menashe, muana wa Yozefe. Ke muvua maloba avuabu bapiane ashale mu tshisamba tshia tatuabu." 
Numbers36:13 Mikenji eyi, ke ivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele, bavua mu mpata ya Mowabe, dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, mitangilangane ne Yeriko." 
Deuteronomy1:1 Mukanda ewu udi utuambila malu avua Moshe muyukile ne bena Izrayele bonsu, patshivuabu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, mu tshipela tshidi pabuipi ne Sufe. Ku luseke lumue lua tshipela etshi kuvua tshimenga tshia Parane, ku luseke lukuabu kuvua bimenga ebi: Tofele, Labane, Asherote ne Di-Zahabe." 
Deuteronomy1:2 (Kumukila ku mukuna wa Sinayi bua kufika ku Kadeshe-Barneya, muntu udi mua kuenda matuku dikumi ne dimue, pikalaye mulonde njila wa ku mikuna ya Seyire. )" 
Deuteronomy1:3 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa dikumi ne umue, bena Izrayele bamane kukumbaja bidimu makumi anayi katshia bapatuke mu Ejipitu, Moshe kubamanyisha bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mutume diyi bua kuenzabu." 
Deuteronomy1:4 Malu aa avua menzeke, Moshe mumane kutshimuna Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, uvua muase ku Eshebone. Uvua mumane kutshimuna kabidi mu tshimenga tshia Edreyi, Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, uvua muase ku Ashetarote." 
Deuteronomy1:5 Nanku mu ditunga dia Mowabe, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, Moshe kutuadija kulongesha bena Izrayele mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, ubambila ne:" 
Deuteronomy1:6 — Patuvua ku mukuna wa Sinayi. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu uvua mutuambile ne: “Nudi bashale ku mukuna eku matuku mapite bungi. 
Deuteronomy1:7 Mpindiewu bangayi luendu tshiakabidi. Nuye luseke ludi ne mikuna, muaba udibu base kudi bena Amore. Nuye kabidi mu buloba budi mutumba ne bena Amore, budibu base kudi bena Kenaane: ke ku mpata ya Yardene, ku mikuna, mu mpata ya luseke lua Mayi manene, mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga, ne ku luseke lua muelelu wa Mayi manene. Nutungunuke ne luendu too ne ku mikuna ya Lebanone, ne ku musulu munene wa Perate." 
Deuteronomy1:8 Ditunga edi dijima ke dimvua mulaye bankambua benu Abrahame, Izake, Yakobe, ne ndelanganyi yabu. Ndi nnupeshadi. Nuye kudikuata.”" 
Deuteronomy1:9 Moshe kuambila kabidi bena Izrayele ne: Tshikondu etshi, mvua mumane kunumanyisha ne: “Meme nkayanyi tshitshiena mua kuambula bujitu bua kunulombola to." 
Deuteronomy1:10 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmunuvudije. Mpindiewu nudi bungi bu mitotu ya mulu. 
Deuteronomy1:11 Ndi njinga bua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, anuvudije kabidi, nuvulangane misangu tshinunu. Anuele lupemba, bu muvuaye munulaye." 
Deuteronomy1:12 Kadi numanye bimpe ne: meme nkayanyi tshiena mua kuambula bujitu bua kunulumbuluisha mu bilumbu bienu, ne mu matandu adi munkatshi muenu to." 
Deuteronomy1:13 Nanku mu tshisamba tshionsu, nusungule bantu bashindame, ba meji, ba lumu luimpe, bua mbateke, bikale banulombola.”" 
Deuteronomy1:14 Nuenu kungandamuna ne: lungenyi alu ludi luimpe. 
Deuteronomy1:15 Nanku bua kunulombola, mvua mubikidishe bantu bashindame, ba lumu luimpe, bavua bamane kuikala ne midimu mikuabu mu bisamba bienu. Meme kuteka bua bikale bamfumu, banulombola mu bisumbu bia bantu tshinunu, lukama nansha makumi atanu, too ne ku bia bantu dikumi. Meme kuteka bena Izrayele bakuabu ku mudimu wa kuludika bantu ku tshisamba tshienu tshionsu." 
Deuteronomy1:16 Pashishe meme kuambila balumbuluishi bua bakose bilumbu bia bantu mushindu ewu: “Nuteleje bilumbu bia bana benu bimpe. Padi tshilumbu pankatshi pa muena Izrayele ne muanabu, nansha ne muenyi udi munkatshi muenu, nutshikose anu pa tshiotshi." 
Deuteronomy1:17 Nukose tshilumbu anu muditshi. Nuteleje muntu yonsu, mubanji ne mupele, kakuyi kansungansunga. Kanutshinyi muntu pa kukosa tshilumbu, bualu nudi nulumbuluisha mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu. Pikala tshilumbu tshinupita, nufike natshi kundi bua meme kutshiumvua!”" 
Deuteronomy1:18 Tshikondu atshi, mvua munuambile bionsu binudi ne bua kuenza." 
Deuteronomy1:19 Tuetu kumuka ku mukuna wa Sinayi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu netu muambe. Tuetu kupitshila mu tshipela tshipite bunene, tshikuatshishe bowa, tshinudi bamanye, tshidi mu njila wa ku mikuna ya bena Amore. Tuetu bamane kufika mu Kadeshe-Barneya," 
Deuteronomy1:20 meme kunuambila ne: “Tuafiki pabuipi ne mikuna ya bena Amore, idibu batupa kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Deuteronomy1:21 Tangilayi: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmunupe ditunga dinudi bamone edi. Nanku koleshayi muoyi, kanutshinyi. Yayi, nukuate ditunga edi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, mumane kuamba.”" 
Deuteronomy1:22 Pashishe nuenu bonsu kundomba ne: “Tutume bantu baye kutentekela ditunga, bua batuleje njila wa kupitshila, ne mushindu udi bimenga bituyaya.”" 
Deuteronomy1:23 Malu anuvua bangambile avua a meji. Meme kuitaba, kusungula bantu dikumi ne babidi ba munkatshi muenu, umue ku tshisamba tshionsu." 
Deuteronomy1:24 Bantu abu kupitshila luseke lua ku mikuna, kufika mu tshibandabanda tshia Eshekole, kutshitentekela." 
Deuteronomy1:25 Kututuadilabu bimuma bivuabu bapole mu ditunga adi, bajadikila ne: “Ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila wetu mutupeshe, didi dimpe ditambe!”" 
Deuteronomy1:26 Kadi nuenu nuvua babenga diyi dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu bua kuya mu ditunga adi. 
Deuteronomy1:27 Nuvua basombe mu ntenta yenu, numutombokela, nuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmutupatule mu Ejipitu bua lukinu. Mmusue kutufila kudi bena Amore bua batushipe!" 
Deuteronomy1:28 Mu ditunga dia Kenaane, tuyaya kuenza tshinyi? Katuena ne dikima dia kuyamu to, bualu bana betu bavua bajadikila ne: bena ditunga adi mbatupite bukole ne bule. Bimenga biabu bidi binene. Bimana bia bimenga mbitumbuke mulu. Kabidi bavua basanganamu ndelanganyi ya Anake, muntu wa mpolondu! ”" 
Deuteronomy1:29 Ke meme kunuambila ne: “Koleshayi muoyi, kanubatshinyi, kanupampakanyi." 
Deuteronomy1:30 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi wenda kumpala kuenu. Neanutshimuine mvita eyi. Nudi bamanye nuwuaye muenze mu Ejipitu," 
Deuteronomy1:31 ne mu tshipela. Nuenu nkayenu nudi bajadike muvua Maweja-Nangila munuambule, bu mudi muntu wambula muanende mu njila, too ne munudi bafike muaba ewu!”" 
Deuteronomy1:32 Kadi tshikondu atshi, kanuvua batekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu to." 
Deuteronomy1:33 Kadi Yeye ke uvua munudianjidile mu njila, bua kunukebela muaba wa kuasa mitanda. Nanku butuku uvua nenu mu tshikutu tshia kapia tshivua tshinutokeshila njila, mu munya uvua nenu mu divuba." 
Deuteronomy1:34 Maweja-Nangila umvua bijanu bienu, kufikaye munda. Kuditshipaye, wamba ne:" 
Deuteronomy1:35 “Muntu nansha umue wa ku ndelanganyi eyi mibi, kena mua kufika mu ditunga dimpe, dimvua mulaye bankambua benu to." 
Deuteronomy1:36 Anu Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, neafike mu ditunga edi, divuaye muye kutentekela. Ndi mumupeshedi, yeye ne ndelanganyi yende, bualu yeye uvua muitabe diyi dianyi, mundamate ne muoyi mujima.”" 
Deuteronomy1:37 Bua bubi buenu ebu, Maweja-Nangila mmumfikile kabidi ne meme munda, unkandika ne: “Nansha wewe mene Moshe kuena ufika mu ditunga dia Kenaane to." 
Deuteronomy1:38 Anu Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, muena mudimu webe, ke wafikamu. Umukankamike, bualu yeye ke wafikisha bena Izrayele mu ditunga edi.”" 
Deuteronomy1:39 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kunuambila bonsu ne: “Bana benu banuvua nuelela meji ne: nebabakuate bonsu mu mvita, anu bobu aba, badi kabayi banji kusunguluja lelu bualu ne mbuimpe, ne mbubi, ke bavuavua kubuela mu ditunga edi ne Yoshuwa. Nembapeshadi bua badikuate." 
Deuteronomy1:40 Kadi nuenu bonsu, pinganayi mu tshipela, nupitshile mu njila wa ku Mayi manene makunze.”" 
Deuteronomy1:41 Nuenu kungandamuna ne: “Tuvua batombokele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kadi mpindiewu, tudi basue kuya kuluangana mvita, bu nuwuaye mututume.” Muntu yonsu wa kunudi kuangata bia mvita, bualu nuvua bele meji ne: mbitekete bua kukuata mikuna eyi." 
Deuteronomy1:42 Diba adi, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Ubakandike, kabayi ku mvita, bualu tshiena munkatshi muabu to. Baluishi nebabatshimune.”" 
Deuteronomy1:43 Meme kunuambila bionsu abi. Kadi nuenu kubenga, ditambisha kunuenza. Nuenu kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, kuya anu ku mikuna ayi." 
Deuteronomy1:44 Bena Amore, bavua base ku mikuna ya Seyire aku, kutuluka bua kunuluisha. Kunutshimunabu, kunujingilabu bu mbulubulu, kunulonda too ne ku Orma." 
Deuteronomy1:45 Nuenu kupingana mu mitanda kudi Maweja-Nangila, kumudidila. Kadi kena mubumvue, nansha munuteleje to." 
Deuteronomy1:46 Ke munudi bashale mu Kadeshe-Barneya matuku mapite bungi nanku. 
Deuteronomy2:1 Pashishe tuetu kualuka, kupingana mu tshipela, batangile ku Mayi manene makunze, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. Tuetu kushala ku mikuna ya Seyire matuku mapite bungi." 
Deuteronomy2:2 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Deuteronomy2:3 “Pitshilayi luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga, bualu nudi bashale mu mikuna eyi matuku mapite bungi.”" 
Deuteronomy2:4 Maweja-Nangila kuntuma bua kunumanyisha ne: “Nupitshile ku mikuna ya Seyire, muaba udibu basombe kudi bana benu, ndelanganyi ya Esawu. Nebanutshine. Kadi nuikale badimuke." 
Deuteronomy2:5 Kanubabundi to. Tshiakunupesha kantu ka mu ditunga diabu to, nansha katupa ka buloba kakese. Bualu ndi mumane kupesha ndelanganyi ya Esawu mikuna ya Seyire." 
Deuteronomy2:6 Nanku biakudia bionsu, too ne mayi a kunua, nuikale anu misumba.”" 
Deuteronomy2:7 — Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmunuendeshe diakalenga mu bionsu binuvua nuenza. Uvua nenu, munulame bimpe mu luendu mu tshipela tshinene atshi, bidimu makumi anayi, kanuyi nukengela tshintu." 
Deuteronomy2:8 Nanku tuvua babenge kupitshila ku mikuna ya Seyire, muaba uvuabu basombe kudi bana betu, ndelanganyi ya Esawu. Tuvua babenge kabidi kupitshila mu njila wa kuinshi wa mu tshibanda, ne mu misoku ya Elate, ne Eshiyone-Ngebere. Tuetu kubenda, bua kupitshila mu tshipela tshia Mowabe." 
Deuteronomy2:9 Maweja-Nangila kunkandika ne: “Kanubundi bena Mowabe, kanuluanganyi nabu to. Tshiakunupesha kantu nansha kamue ka mu ditunga edi to. Bualu ditunga edi dia Are, ndi mumane kudipesha ndelanganyi ya Lote. ”" 
Deuteronomy2:10 (Bena Emi ke bavua badianjila kuasa mu ditunga dia Are. Bavua bantu ba bukole. Bavua ba bungi, kabidi banene bale, bu ndelanganyi ya Anake." 
Deuteronomy2:11 Bantu bakuabu badi babikila bena Emi ne: mbena Refayime, bu mudibu babikila kabidi bena Anake. Kadi bena Mowabe badi bababikila anu ne: mbena Emi." 
Deuteronomy2:12 Bena Ori ke bavua badianjila kuasa mu ditunga dia Seyire. Kadi ndelanganyi ya Esawu kubashipa, kubanyenga ditunga adi, kusombamu. Ke mushindu uvua bena Izrayele benza bua kukuata ditunga, divua Maweja-Nangila mubapeshe.)" 
Deuteronomy2:13 Pashishe tuetu kusabuka musulu wa Zerede wa muenji mukole, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mutuambile." 
Deuteronomy2:14 Kadi bua kumuka ku Kadeshe-Barneya, kufika ku musulu ewu, tuvua banenge mu njila bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu. Tshikondu atshi, bantu bonsu bathivua ne bukole bua kuluangana mvita papatukilabu mu Ejipitu, bakafua bamane kubutuka, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuditshipa." 
Deuteronomy2:15 Nanku anu Maweja-Nangila nkayende kubanyoka, kubabutula bonsu nkong." 
Deuteronomy2:16 Bonsu abu bamane kufua," 
Deuteronomy2:17 Maweja-Nangila kushisha kungambila meme Moshe ne: 
Deuteronomy2:18 “Mpindiewu nupitshile ku mikalu ya ditunga dia Mowabe, nukosoluele mu ditunga dia Are." 
Deuteronomy2:19 Nenufike pabuipi ne ditunga dia bena Amone. Kadi kanubedi diyi, kanubabundi to, bualu bobu kabidi nndelanganyi ya Lote. Tshiakunupesha kantu nansha kamue ka mu ditunga diabu. Ndi mumane kubapesha ditunga edi. ”" 
Deuteronomy2:20 (Bantu bavua bamba ne: muaba ewu ngua bena Refayime, bualu bobu ke bavua basemu bangabanga. Kadi bena Amone bavua babikila bena Refayime ne: mbena Zamzumi." 
Deuteronomy2:21 Bena Refayime bavua bantu ba bukole. Bavua ba bungi, kabidi banene bale, bu muvua ndelanganyi ya Anake. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubabutula bonsu, pakafika bena Amone. Nanku bena Amone kukuata ditunga adi, kuasamu." 
Deuteronomy2:22 Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila muenzele kabidi ndelanganyi ya Esawu, ivua misombe mu Seyire nanku. Uvua mubutule bena Ori bonsu kumpala kuabu. Nanku ndelanganyi ya Esawu kukuata ditunga adi, kuasamu. Batshidimu too ne ku lelu." 
Deuteronomy2:23 Kadi bena Avi, bavua basombe mu misoku ya mu ditunga dia Ngaza, bavua bababutula kudi baluishi bafumine ku Kaftore. Baluishi aba kuasa mu ditunga adi.)" 
Deuteronomy2:24 Ke Maweja-Nangila kutuambila ne: “Mpindiewu bangayi luendu. Sabukayi musulu wa Amone. Nennupe Sihone, muena Amore, mukalenga wa mu Eshebone, ne ditunga diende. Mubundayi, nukuate ditunga diende!" 
Deuteronomy2:25 Kutuadija lelu, nenkuatshishe bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba bowa. Bobu bumvue lumu luenu, nebazakale, banutshina.”" 
Deuteronomy2:26 Patuvua mu tshipela tshia Kedemote, mvua mutume bantu bua kusengelela Sihone, mukalenga wa mu Eshebone, ne:" 
Deuteronomy2:27 “Tudi basue kupitshilaku mu ditunga diebe. Netupite anu ne njila, katuyi tuapuka nansha ku dia balume nansha ku dia bakaji." 
Deuteronomy2:28 Utulekele tupite. Patuikala dijinga ne biakudia, nansha ne mayi a kunua, netusumbe." 
Deuteronomy2:29 Ndelanganyi ya Esawu, idi misombe mu mikuna ya Seyire, ne bena Mowabe, badi basombe mu Are, mbamane kuitaba bua tupitshile muabu. Pashishe netusabuke musulu wa Yardene, bua tufike mu ditunga, didibu batupe kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu.”" 
Deuteronomy2:30 Kadi mukalenga Sihone ewu kubenga bua tuetu kupitshila mu ditunga diende. Maweja-Nangila kumupesha muoyi wa tshitunu, bua numone mua kumunyenga ditunga dinudi mpindiewu." 
Deuteronomy2:31 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Bituadije ku lelu, ndi mumane kufila mukalenga Sihone ne bantu bende mu bianza bienu. Kuatayi ditunga diende, nuasemu!”" 
Deuteronomy2:32 Nanku Sihone ne tshikulu tshiende, kutubunda pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Yahase." 
Deuteronomy2:33 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu kutuambuluisha. Tuetu kutshimuna Sihone, bana bende ba balume, ne tshiluilu tshiende tshionsu." 
Deuteronomy2:34 Tuetu kushisha kunyenga bimenga biende bionsu, kubibutuilamu, kushipa balume, bakaji ne bana. Katuena bashiye muntu ne muoyi to." 
Deuteronomy2:35 Tuetu kukuata bimuna, ne bintu bionsu bituvua basangane mu bimenga abi." 
Deuteronomy2:36 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, uvua mutuambuluishe bua kukuata bimenga bionsu bivua pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Aroyere, tshidi pabuipi ne musulu wa Amone, ne tshimenga tshikuabu tshidi mu tshibandabanda tshine atshi, too ne ku ditunga dia Ngilaade. Tshimenga nansha tshimue tshia mu bimenga ebi, katshivua ne bukole bua kutuluisha." 
Deuteronomy2:37 Nanku katuena bafike mu ditunga dia bena Amone, ne mu misoku yonsu idi ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yaboke, ne mu bimenga bionsu bidi pa mikuna, ne miaba ivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu munkandike bua katufikimu." 
Deuteronomy3:1 Pashishe tuetu kubenda bua kupitshila mu ditunga dia Bashane. Kadi Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, ne tshiluilu tshiende tshionsu, kutubunda pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Edreyi." 
Deuteronomy3:2 Ke Maweja-Nangila kungambila meme Moshe ne: “Kutshinyi mukalenga uvuavua awu to! Nkadi mumane kumufila mu bianza biebe, yeye ne bantu bende bonsu, kabidi ne ditunga diende dijima. Neumuenze muuvua muenze Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, uvua muase mu Eshebone.”" 
Deuteronomy3:3 Nanku Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kutuambuluisha. Tuetu kutshimuna mukalenga Oge, ne bantu bende bonsu. Tuetu kubashipa, katuyi bashiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi." 
Deuteronomy3:4 Pashishe tuetu kukuata bimenga biende bionsu. Tshimenga nansha tshimue katshivua ne bukole bua kutuluisha. Bimenga abi, bivua makumi asambombu, bivua mu buloba bua Argobe, mu ditunga dia Bashane, muaba uvua mukalenga Oge ne bumfumu." 
Deuteronomy3:5 Bimenga abi bavua babikolesha ne bimana, babiela mu mpangu mikanga ne bibi bia biamu. Kadi kuvua misoku mikuabu mivule kayiyi miela mpangu to." 
Deuteronomy3:6 Tuetu kubutula misoku eyi ne bantu bonsu ba wamu, balume, bakaji ne bana, anu bu mutuvua benze mu ditunga dia Sihone, mukalenga wa Eshebone." 
Deuteronomy3:7 Kadi tuetu kupawula bimuna ne bintu bionsu bituvua basangane mu bimenga abi. 
Deuteronomy3:8 Ke mutuvua bakuate tshikondu atshi matunga a bakalenga babidi ba bena Amore, bavua base luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, pankatshi pa musulu wa Amone wa muenji mukole, ne mukuna wa Ermone." 
Deuteronomy3:9 (Mukuna ewu wa Ermone, bena Sidone badi baubikila ne: Sifiyone. Kadi bena Amore badi baubikila ne: Senire.)" 
Deuteronomy3:10 Ke mutuvua bakuate bimenga bionsu bivua pa mikuna, buloba bua Ngilaade ne bua Bashane, too ne ku Salka ne Edreyi, bimenga bia mu bukalenga bua Oge, mu ditunga dia Bashane." 
Deuteronomy3:11 (Ku ndelanganyi ya bena Refayime bonsu, Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, ke wa ndekelu udi mushale ne muoyi. Lukita luende bavua baluenze mu dibue. Batshidi mua kulumona mu Raba, tshimenga tshinene tshia bena Amone. Ludi ne bule bua metre anayi ne tshitupa, butshiama bua metre abidi.)" 
Deuteronomy3:12 Ke mutuvua bakuate ditunga didi ku mutu kua tshimenga tshia Aroyere, tshidi pabuipi ne musulu wa Amone. Meme Moshe, mvua mupeshe ndelanganyi ya Rubene ne ya Ngade tshitupa tshia ditunga dia mikuna dia Ngilaade, ne bimenga bionsu bivuamu." 
Deuteronomy3:13 Tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, tshidi tshisomba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, ndi mutshipeshe tshitupa tshivua tshishale tshia buloba bua Ngilaade, ne ditunga dijima dia Bashane, mmumue ne: muaba uvuabu kudi mukalenga Oge kale. (Buloba bua Argobe, ne bua Bashane, badi babubikila kabidi ne: ditunga dia Refayime." 
Deuteronomy3:14 Ndelanganyi ya Yayire, muana wa Menashe, ivua mikuate ditunga dia Argobe, divua mu Bashane, too ne ku mikalu ya bena Ngeshure ne bena Maaka. Misoku ya ditunga adi batshidi bayibikila ne: mmisoku ya Yayire.)" 
Deuteronomy3:15 Ndelanganyi ya Makire, muana wa Menashe, ndi muyipeshe ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
Deuteronomy3:16 Kadi ndelanganyi ya Rubene ne ya Ngade, ndi muyipeshe ditunga dia pankatshi pa ditunga dia Ngilaade ne musulu wa Amone. Musulu wa Amone ke mukalu wa kuinshi wa ditunga adi. Musulu wa Yaboke udi wenza mukalu wadi ne ditunga dia bena Amone." 
Deuteronomy3:17 Mikalu idi luseke ludi diba dibuelela, idi ilonda tshibandabanda tshia Yardene, biangatshile ku dijiba dia Ngenesarete too ne ku Mayi manene a luepu, too ne ku mukuna wa Pisga, luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Deuteronomy3:18 Diba adi, mvua muambile bisamba bionsu ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmumane kunupesha ditunga edi. Nanku bonsu banudi nabu, bambule bia mvita, bapite kumpala kua bana benu bena Izrayele bakuabu, bua kusabuka musulu wa Yardene." 
Deuteronomy3:19 Ndi mumanye ne: nudi ne bakaji ne bana, kabidi ne bimuna bipite bungi. Bionsu ebi bishale anu mu bimenga ebi bindi mumane kunupesha." 
Deuteronomy3:20 Nanku nuambuluishe bena Izrayele bakuabu, too ne pikala Maweja-Nangila mubafikishe mu ditunga didiye ubapesha didi dishiya, luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Yardene, bua kupetabu dikisha bu munudi bapete nuenu. Pashishe muntu yonsu wa kunudi neapingane kuende mu ditunga dindi mumupeshe. ”" 
Deuteronomy3:21 Meme kuambila Yoshuwa ne: “Wewe nkayebe uvua mudimuene muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mutshimune bakalenga babidi ba bena Amore. Ke muatshimunaye kabidi bakalenga bonsu banudi nusangana dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene. 
Deuteronomy3:22 Nanku, kanubatshinyi to, bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanuluile mvita ayi.”" 
Deuteronomy3:23 Pashishe mvua musengelele Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Deuteronomy3:24 “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mudianjile kundeja butumbi ne bukole buebe. Kakuena mvidie, pa buloba nansha mu diulu, udi ne bukole bua kuenza malu a dikema, bu muudi wenza wewe." 
Deuteronomy3:25 Anyisha, nsabuke musulu wa Yardene, bua meme kumonaku ditunga dimpe dialabale dia mikuna, didi dishiya dia musulu, kabidi ne mikuna ya Lebanone.”" 
Deuteronomy3:26 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kena muitabe dilomba dianyi to. Uvua mumfikile munda bikole bualu buenu, unkandika ne: “Kuajiki! Kundombi bualu ebu kabidi to!" 
Deuteronomy3:27 Banda ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Pisga, ukenzakane nseke yonsu: ku mutu kua ditunga, kuinshi kuadi, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne ludidi dibuelela. Kadi ujadike, umanye ne: kuena usabuka musulu wa Yardene to." 
Deuteronomy3:28 Ulongeshe Yoshuwa malu onsu. Umukoleshe ku muoyi, ashindike muoyi wa munda. Bualu yeye nealombole bena Izrayele, bua kusabukabu musulu wa Yardene, too ne muafikabu mu ditunga diudi umona edi.”" 
Deuteronomy3:29 Nanku tuetu kushala mu tshibandabanda etshi, batangilangane ne tshimenga tshia Bete-Peyore." 
Deuteronomy4:1 Moshe kuambila kabidi bena Izrayele ne: Nuenu bitabe meyi ne mikenji bindi munulongeshe, nenuikale ne muoyi. Kabidi nenukuate ditunga dia Kenaane, didibu banupesha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy4:2 Kanusakididi bualu bukuabu ku mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, indi munulongeshe. Kanumushi bualu nansha bumue. Nuyikumbaje yonsu, bungi buayi." 
Deuteronomy4:3 Nuvua badimuene nkayenu, muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mubutule bantu, bavua batendelela mvidie Baale-Peyore." 
Deuteronomy4:4 Kadi nuenu bavua balamate Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nutshidi bonsu ne muoyi too ne lelu." 
Deuteronomy4:5 Panuafika mu ditunga dia Kenaane dinukuata, nukumbaje meyi ne mikenji bimvua munulongeshe, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi mungambile." 
Deuteronomy4:6 Nuenu bakumbaje mikenji eyi bimpe, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu pamanyabu mikenji eyi, nebajadike ne: nuenu nudi bantu ba lungenyi ne meji. Nebakeme, bamba ne: “Bena tshisamba tshinene etshi badi ne bantu ba lungenyi ne meji.”" 
Deuteronomy4:7 Bualu ku bisamba bionsu, nansha bidi ne bantu bapite bungi, kakuena tshisamba tshidi ne mvidie pabuipi natshi, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu pabuipi netu, misangu yonsu itudi Kunubikila, tumulomba diambuluisha." 
Deuteronomy4:8 Ku bisamba bionsu, nansha bidi ne bantu bapite bungi, kakuena tshisamba tshidi ne mikenji mimpe, bu idi mu mukanda wa mikenji undi nnuleja lelu ewu." 
Deuteronomy4:9 Nanku nuenu bena Izrayele, dimukayi. Nudi bamanye bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila muenze. Kanuena mua kubipua muoyi musangu nansha umue to. Nubivuluke, nubilondele bana benu ne bikulu benu." 
Deuteronomy4:10 Vulukayi dituku dinuvua ku mukuna wa Sinayi, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Yeye uvua mungambile ne: “Sangisha bena Izrayele bonsu. Ndi musue kubamanyisha mikenji yanyi, bua bayilonde, bannemeke patshidibu ne muoyi. Nebayilongeshe kabidi ndelanganyi yabu.”" 
Deuteronomy4:11 Nuenu kusemena kuinshi kua mukuna. Ke kuvua ndimi ya kapia ilakuka, iya mulu, yenza mavuba a muinshi mufike." 
Deuteronomy4:12 Nuenu kumvua diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, wakula nenu munkatshi mua kapia, kadi kanuyi numumona to." 
Deuteronomy4:13 Kunumanyishaye ndondu wenu nende. Uvua munuambile bua nunemeke ndondu, nukumbaje mikenji dikumi ivuaye mufunde pa mabue abidi." 
Deuteronomy4:14 Musangu awu, Maweja-Nangila kungambila, bua meme kunulongesha meyi ne mikenji yonsu bua nuenu kubikumbaja, panuakuata ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Deuteronomy4:15 Kadi, nutambe kuvuluka bualu ebu: Dituku divua Maweja-Nangila wakula nenu ku mukuna wa Sinayi, munkatshi mua kapia, kanuvua bamumone to." 
Deuteronomy4:16 Nanku kanuenji bibi to. Kanusongi mpingu, kanuzodi bimfuanyi bileja mvidie, nansha bayileja bu bantu balume nansha bakaji," 
Deuteronomy4:17 bu nyama, nyunyi," 
Deuteronomy4:18 bilandadi, nansha minyinyi ya mu mayi." 
Deuteronomy4:19 Kanutangidi mulu bua kutendelela diba, ngondu, mitotu, nansha bintu bionsu bidi mu tshibuashibuashi. Kanubienzedi mudimu, kanubikukuidi. Maweja-Nangila mmuitabe anu bua bisamba bikuabu bitendelele bintu abi." 
Deuteronomy4:20 Kadi nuenu bena Izrayele, Maweja-Nangila mmunukebe, munupatule kabidi mu Ejipitu, munuvua munkatshi mua dikenga dikole, bua nuikale tshisamba tshiende yeye, bu munudi lelu." 
Deuteronomy4:21 Kadi Maweja-Nangila mmumfikile meme Moshe munda bualu buenu, muditshipe wamba ne: “Kuena mua kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, kufika mu ditunga edi dimpe, dindi mupeshe bena Izrayele to.”" 
Deuteronomy4:22 Nanku meme nemfuile mu ditunga ditudi edi. Tshiakusabuka musulu wa Yardene to. Anu nuenu nenusabuke musulu ewu, bua kukuata ditunga dimpe, didi dishiya dia musulu ewu." 
Deuteronomy4:23 Nudimuke, kanupu ndondu muoyi, uvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mutue nenu. Kanusongi mpingu. Kanuenji tshimfuanyi tshia tshintu nansha tshimue tshidiye munukandike." 
Deuteronomy4:24 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi wosha, ubutula bu kapia. Yeye nkayende mmusue kuikala Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy4:25 Nuenu bamane kushala matuku a bungi mu ditunga edi, didi Maweja-Nangila munulaye, nuenu bamane kulela bana, bapete ne bikulu, kanuenji bibi to. Kanusongi mpingu, kanuzodi bimfuanyi, bia tshintu nansha tshimue. Kanuenji malu mabi makuabu, adi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ubenga, amufikisha munda." 
Deuteronomy4:26 Ndi nnujadikila lelu, diulu ne buloba biumvue, ne: Nuenu basonge mpingu, nebanuipate lukasa mu ditunga dia Kenaane dinuakuata, didi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene. Nenubutukemu." 
Deuteronomy4:27 Maweja-Nangila neanutangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu. Kadi mu matunga ikalaye munutume awu, nenuikale anu bakese." 
Deuteronomy4:28 Mu matunga awu, nenuikale nutendelela mvidie ya mabue, nansha ya mitshi misonga kudi bantu, idi kayiyi imona, kayiyi yumvua, kayiyi idia, nansha inunkila." 
Deuteronomy4:29 Diba adi, mu matunga aa, nenukebe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kadi bua nuenu kumupeta, anu nuenu bamukebe ne muoyi mujima ne bukole buenu buonsu." 
Deuteronomy4:30 Pikala malu onsu andi mmuambile manuenzekele, nuenu babuele mu dikenga, nenupingane kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bua kumutumikila." 
Deuteronomy4:31 Nanku bumudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ununanga, kakunulekela, kakunubutula to. Neavuluke ndondu uvuaye mutue ne bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy4:32 Mpindiewu nudikonke bua malu onsu avua menzeke kale, kabayi banji kunulela, katshia Mvidi Mukulu wafuka bantu pa buloba. Nuele meji ku bionsu bivua bienzeka pa buloba bujima. Malu makole a mushindu ewu akavua menzeke anyi? Bantu bakavua bumvua lumu lua malu a nunku anyi?" 
Deuteronomy4:33 Ku bisamba bikuabu bionsu, kudi tshisamba tshidi ne mvidie, wakula natshi munkatshi mua kapia, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila wakula nenu, nuenu kushala ne muoyi anyi?" 
Deuteronomy4:34 Kudi mvidie ukadi mupatule tshisamba tshia bantu bende mu bupika, muleje bumfumu buende, ne bukole buende, bu munuvua nuenu badimuene anyi? Kudi mvidie uvua mukengeshe bantu, mutshimune mvita, muenze bishima ne malu a kukema, muenze kabidi ne malu adi akuatshisha bantu bowa, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuenzele mu Ejipitu anyi?" 
Deuteronomy4:35 Nuenu nudi bena diakalenga, bualu nuakumona bionsu ebi, bua nujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke Mvidi Mukulu, kakuena mvidie mukuabu, amu Yeye." 
Deuteronomy4:36 Nuenu nuakumvua diyi diende mu diulu, unulongesha bua kumutumikila. Pa buloba, wakanuleja tshimunyi tshia kapia, wakula nenu mu kapia aku." 
Deuteronomy4:37 Maweja-Nangila uvua wenza bionsu ebi, bualu uvua unanga bankambua benu. Kabidi uvua munusungule nuenu ndelanganyi yabu. Kunupatulaye mu Ejipitu ku bukole buende." 
Deuteronomy4:38 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila neanutshimuine bisamba bionsu binudi nabi mutumba, bidi binupita ku bukole ne ku bungi. Yeye neanufikishe mu ditunga adi bua dishale bumpianyi buenu." 
Deuteronomy4:39 Kutuadijila lelu, nuele meji, nujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila udi anu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende mu diulu ne pa buloba. Kakuena mvidie mukuabu to, amu yeye." 
Deuteronomy4:40 Nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, nukumbaje meyi ne mikenji bia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bindi munumanyishe lelu. Nanku nenuikale bena diakalenga. Nenushale ne muoyi matuku mavule mu ditunga didiye munupe kashidi." 
Deuteronomy4:41 Diba adi, Moshe kusungula bimenga bisatu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene." 
Deuteronomy4:42 Nanku muntu yonsu udi ushipa muntu mukuabu mu mpukapuka, kayi nende ne muoyi mubi, neanyemene mu tshimenga tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bua kudipandisha." 
Deuteronomy4:43 Ke mena a bimenga ebi: Beshere mu mpata ya mu tshipela bua bena Rubene; Ramote mu ditunga dia Ngilaade bua bena Ngade; Ngolane mu ditunga dia Bashane bua bena Menashe. 
Deuteronomy4:44 Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu. 
Deuteronomy4:45 Kumanyishaye bena Izrayele, bamane kumuka mu Ejipitu, bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila musue: meyi ne mikandu, kabidi ne mikenji." 
Deuteronomy4:46 Bakalua bafika luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, mu tshibandabanda tshidi tshitangilangana ne tshimenga tshia Bete-Peyore, mu ditunga dia mukalenga Sihone wa bena Amore, wa mu Eshebone, uvuabu batshimune kudi Moshe ne bena Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy4:47 Bena Izrayele bavua bakuate ditunga dia mukalenga awu, bakuate kabidi ditunga dia mukalenga Oge wa mu Bashane. (Bakalenga aba babidi ba bena Amore, ke bavua ne bumfumu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene.)" 
Deuteronomy4:48 Ke bena Izrayele kuya kuasa ku ditunga dijima adi, kutuadijila ku tshimenga tshia Aroyere, tshidi ku muelelu wa musulu wa Amone, too ne ku mukuna wa Ermone, udibu babikila kabidi ne: Siyone," 
Deuteronomy4:49 ditunga dijima dia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, too ne ku Mayi manene a luepu, kuinshi kua mukuna wa Pisga." 
Deuteronomy5:1 Moshe kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu, kubambila ne: — Bena Izrayele, telejayi meyi ne mikenji, bindi nnuambila lelu. Nubilonge, nubikumbaje." 
Deuteronomy5:2 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, uvua mutue netu ndondu mu mukuna wa Sinayi." 
Deuteronomy5:3 Ndondu awu, kavua mutue anu ne bakakuetu to. Uvua mumutue kabidi ne tuetu bonsu, batshidi ne muoyi lelu aba." 
Deuteronomy5:4 Nanku Maweja-Nangila uvua wakula, mutangilangane nenu, ku mukuna, munkatshi mua kapia." 
Deuteronomy5:5 Musangu awu, meme Moshe mvua muimane pankatshi penu ne Maweja-Nangila, bua kunumanyisha bionsu bivuaye wamba. Kanuvua basue kubanda ku mukuna to, bualu nuvua nutshina kapia aku. Ke Maweja-Nangila kunuambila ne:" 
Deuteronomy5:6 “Ndi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi munupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy5:7 “Nuntendelele anu meme, kanutendeledi mvidie mikuabu to." 
Deuteronomy5:8 “Kanusongi lupingu, kanuzodi tshimfuanyi tshidi tshileja tshintu tshidi mu diulu, pa buloba, nansha mu mayi adi muinshi mua buloba." 
Deuteronomy5:9 Kanukukuidi mpingu ya nanku, kanuyitendeledi. Meme nkayanyi ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nanku muntu yonsu udi umbenga, ndi mmunyoka too ne ku ndelanganyi yende ya musangu muisatu nansha muinayi." 
Deuteronomy5:10 Kadi bantu badi bannanga meme, bitaba meyi anyi, ndi mbafuila luse too ne ku ndelanganyi tshinunu." 
Deuteronomy5:11 “Kanutedi dina dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu tshitelatela, bualu meme nennyoke muntu yonsu udi kayi unemeka dina dianyi." 
Deuteronomy5:12 “Nuvuluke Dituku dia Dikisha, nudinemeke, bualu ndia tshijila, bu mumvua munuambile." 
Deuteronomy5:13 Nuenze midimu yonsu amu matuku asambombu, nuyijikije." 
Deuteronomy5:14 Dituku dia muanda mutekete ndia Dikisha, dia kunnemeka anu meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nanku, nuenu bena Izrayele, bana benu, ngombe yenu, mpunde yenu, bimuna bienu bikuabu, nansha benyi badi ku mbelu yenu, kanuenji mudimu dituku adi. Too ne bena mudimu benu, balume ne bakaji, badi ne bua kuikisha, bu munudi nuikisha nuenu." 
Deuteronomy5:15 Nuenu bena Izrayele mwuluke ne: nuvua ku bupika mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kunupatula ku bukole buanyi. Ke pandi nnukandika, bua kanuenji midimu dituku dia Dikisha." 
Deuteronomy5:16 “Muntu yonsu wa kunudi anemeke tatuende ne mamuende, mundi munuambile. Nanku nenuikale bena diakalenga mu ditunga, dindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupeshe bua nushalemu ne muoyi matuku a bungi." 
Deuteronomy5:17 “Kanushipi muntu. 
Deuteronomy5:18 “Nubenge tshiendenda. 
Deuteronomy5:19 “Kanuibi. 
Deuteronomy5:20 “Kanushiminyinyi mukuenu bualu. 
Deuteronomy5:21 “Kanualakanyi tshintu tshia mukuenu: nansha mukajende, nzubu wende, ngombe wende, madimi ende, mupika wende mulume nansha mukaji, mpunde wende, nansha tshintu tshionsu tshia mu lubanza luende.”" 
Deuteronomy5:22 Mikenji eyi, ke ivua Maweja-Nangila muakule ne diyi dikole, wambila bena Izrayele ku mukuna wa Sinayi. Uvua ubamanyishayi munkatshi mua kapia ne divuba dia muinshi. Uvua muyifunde pa mabue abidi, avuaye mumpeshe meme Moshe, kayi musakidileku mikenji mikuabu to." 
Deuteronomy5:23 Nuenu bumvue diyi adi mu midima ivua ku mukuna utema kapia, bamfumu ne balombodi ba bisamba bienu bia bena Izrayele, kufika kundi," 
Deuteronomy5:24 bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mmumane kutuleja butumbi ne bukole buende. Lelu tuakumumvua wakula munkatshi mua kapia. Nanku tuetu tudi bajadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kuakula ne bantu, kabayi bafua to." 
Deuteronomy5:25 Kadi katukebi njiwu ya lufu. Bualu kapia aka ka tshinyangu kadi mua kutubutula. Tudi bajadike ne: tuetu bumvue kabidi diyi edi, tudi tufua." 
Deuteronomy5:26 Kakuena muntu ukadi mumvue Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi wakula munkatshi mua kapia, bu mutudi tuetu bena Izrayele bumvue, kushalaye ne muoyi." 
Deuteronomy5:27 Nanku wewe Moshe, usemene kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, uteleje bionsu bidiye ukuambila, utumanyishabi. Tuetu netubiteleje, tubikumbaje kabidi. ”" 
Deuteronomy5:28 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba majinga enu, kungambila ne: “Dilomba dia bena Izrayele didi dimpe." 
Deuteronomy5:29 Kadi bobu balame kashidi muoyi wa kunnemeka, ne wa kukumbaja mikenji yanyi, nebikale bena diakalenga, pamue ne ndelanganyi yabu." 
Deuteronomy5:30 Ubambile bapingane ku nzubu yabu ya ntenta. 
Deuteronomy5:31 Kadi wewe Moshe ushale pabuipi nanyi, bua nkuambile meyi ne mikenji bionsu bia kumanyisha bena Izrayele, bua babikumbaje mu ditunga dindi mbapesha.”" 
Deuteronomy5:32 Moshe kuambila kabidi bena Izrayele ne: Nanku nukumbaje bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuambile, anu mudibi amu." 
Deuteronomy5:33 Nuitabe bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila wenu munuambile, bua nuikale bena diakalenga, nushale ne muoyi matuku a bungi mu ditunga didiye unupesha." 
Deuteronomy6:1 Telejayi meyi ne mikenji, bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mungambile bua kunulongesha, bua nubikumbaje mu ditunga dinukadi pa kubuela bua kudikuata mpindiewu." 
Deuteronomy6:2 Nanku nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, nenunemeke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, panutshidi ne muoyi. Nenutumikile meyi ne mikenji biende bimvua munumanyishe. Nenushale ne muoyi matuku a bungi panu." 
Deuteronomy6:3 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nulame mikenji eyi bimpe, nuyikumbaje. Neyinupeteshe diakalenga. Nenutante mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu munulaye." 
Deuteronomy6:4 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, telejayi: Maweja-Nangila, Maweja-Nangila nkayende, ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kakuena mukuabu to." 
Deuteronomy6:5 Nunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, ne muoyi wenu mujima, ne mutshima wenu onsu, ne bukole buenu buonsu." 
Deuteronomy6:6 Mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu indi nnuambila lelu eyi, nushale bayilame kashidi mu mioyi yenu." 
Deuteronomy6:7 Nuyilongeshe bana benu, nuyitele panudi basomba mu nzubu yenu, nansha bendakana mu misesu, panudi nulala, nansha nubika." 
Deuteronomy6:8 Bua nuenu kuvuluka mikenji eyi kashidi, nuyisuike ku maboku enu ne mu mpala yenu." 
Deuteronomy6:9 Nuyifunde kabidi ne ku biibi bia bimenga bienu, ne ku mishiku ya mbelu ya nzubu yenu. ”" 
Deuteronomy6:10 Panuafika mu ditunga, didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu unupesha, nuwuaye mulaye bankambua benu, Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe, nenusangane bimenga bimpe, binene, binuvua kanuyi bibake to." 
Deuteronomy6:11 Nenusangane kabidi nzubu miuwule tente ne bintu bia bubanji binuvua kanuyi bunguije, biina bia mayi binuvua kanuyi bumbule, mitshi ya mvinyo ne ya olive inuvua kanuyi bakune. Nenuikale ne biakudia bipite bungi." 
Deuteronomy6:12 Diba adi, mwuluke Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu mumwuamu bupika. Kanuena mua kumupua muoyi to." 
Deuteronomy6:13 Numunemeke, numutendelele amu yeye nkayende. Nutshipe amu mu dina diende." 
Deuteronomy6:14 Kadi kanukukuidi mvidie mikuabu, mvidie ya bisamba binudi nabi mutumba." 
Deuteronomy6:15 Bualu Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi munkatshi muenu. Mmusue kuikala amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende. Kanumufikishi munda to, bualu udi mua kunubutula, kunumusha panu." 
Deuteronomy6:16 Kanutetshi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bu munuvua bamuenzele ku Masa." 
Deuteronomy6:17 Nuitabe ku meyi, nukumbaje mikenji yende, bivuaye munuambile." 
Deuteronomy6:18 Nusankishe Maweja-Nangila, nuenze bidi bimulengelela. Nanku nenuikale bena diakalenga, nenukuate ditunga dimpe, divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy6:19 Nenuipatemu baluishi benu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Deuteronomy6:20 Dituku dikuabu, padi bana benu banukonka ne: “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mmunuelele meyi ne mikenji ebi bua tshinyi?”" 
Deuteronomy6:21 Nenubandamune ne: “Tuvua ku bupika kua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila kutupatula mu ditunga adi ku bukole buende. 
Deuteronomy6:22 Tuvua badimuene bishima binene ne bia dikema, bivua Maweja-Nangila mukengeshe nabi mukalenga awu, diku diende ne bantu bende bonsu." 
Deuteronomy6:23 Kutupatulaye mu Ejipitu bua kutufikisha mu ditunga edi, divuaye musue kutupa, bu nuwuaye mulaye bankambua betu." 
Deuteronomy6:24 Ke Maweja-Nangila kutuambila bua tukumbaje meyi ne mikenji biende bionsu. Patudi tumunemeka, netuikale bena diakalenga diba dionsu, netushale ne muoyi, bu mutudi nawu mpindiewu." 
Deuteronomy6:25 Eyowa, patuikala bakumbaje bimpe mikenji yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila mutuambile, netuenze anu bidiye musue. ”" 
Deuteronomy7:1 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanufikishe mu ditunga dinudi ne bua kukuata. Neanuipatshile bisamba ebi muanda mutekete: bena Iti, bena Ngirgashi, bena Amore, bena Kenaane, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, bidi binupita bungi ne bukole." 
Deuteronomy7:2 Neabafile kunudi, bua mbatshimune bonsu, nubabutule. Kanuena mua kutua nabu ndondu, kanuena mua kubafuila luse." 
Deuteronomy7:3 Kanusedianganyi nabu. Kanuseleshi bana benu ba bakaji kudi bana babu ba balume. Bana benu ba balume kabasedi bana babu ba bakaji. 
Deuteronomy7:4 Bualu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu aba, badi mua kutombola ndelanganyi yenu, bua nubenge Maweja-Nangila, nutendelele mvidie mikuabu. Diba adi, Maweja-Nangila neanufuile munda, anubutule musangu umue." 
Deuteronomy7:5 Nanku nunyangakaje bilambuilu biabu, nupule tshibumba tshia mabue tshidibu benze, nupule makunji a kutendelela mvidie adibu base, nuoshe kabidi ne mpingu yabu." 
Deuteronomy7:6 Nuenu bena Izrayele nudi tshisamba tshijidila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuenu ke badi Maweja-Nangila musungule, bua nuikale tshisamba tshiende tshisunguluke munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu bionsu bia pa buloba." 
Deuteronomy7:7 Maweja-Nangila mmununange, munusungule, ki mbua ne: nudi nupita bisamba bionsu ku bungi to. Nudi bakese, bashadile kudi bisamba bikuabu." 
Deuteronomy7:8 Kadi Maweja-Nangila mmununange. Mmunukumbajile bionsu bivuaye mulaye bankambua benu. Ke padiye munupatule ku bupika, mununyenge ku bianza bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu anu ku bukole buende." 
Deuteronomy7:9 Nuenu bena Izrayele, numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nkayende ke Mvidi Mukulu wa bushiwa. Yeye udi ulama ndondu wende too ne ku ndelanganyi tshinunu. Udi unanga amu kunanga bantu bonsu badi bamunanga, bamutumikila." 
Deuteronomy7:10 Kadi badi bamubenga, udi ubanyoka lukasa, ubabutula." 
Deuteronomy7:11 Nanku, meyi ne mikenji bindi nnuambila lelu, nubilame bimpe, nubikumbaje." 
Deuteronomy7:12 Nuenu bateleje mikenji eyi, bayikumbaje, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nealame ndondu uvuaye mutue ne bankambua benu, bua nuenu kuikala bena diakalenga." 
Deuteronomy7:13 Nanku panuafika mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila munupe, divuaye mulaye bankambua benu, bu mudiye mununange, Yeye neanusankishe. Nenulele bana ba bungi. Nenuikale ne bintu bipite bungi: ntete ya kuenza bukula, mvinyo, mafuta, ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji." 
Deuteronomy7:14 Maweja-Nangila neanuambuluishe, nupangane, nupite bisamba bionsu ku bubanji. Nanku muntu yonsu wa kunudi, mulume nansha mukaji, kakuikala nkumba, too ne ku bimuna bienu." 
Deuteronomy7:15 Maweja-Nangila neanuepule ku masama onsu, ne ku bipupu bikole bionsu, bivua bikuata bena Ejipitu, munudi bamanye. Bipupu abi, nebikuate anu bantu badi banukina." 
Deuteronomy7:16 Nanku nenubutule bantu bonsu bikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupeshe. Kanubafuidi luse to. Kanutendeledi mvidie yabu, bualu mbuteyi budi mua kunufikisha ku lulu." 
Deuteronomy7:17 Misangu mikuabu nudi nuela meji ne: “Bisamba abi mbitupite bukole! Katuena ne mushindu wa kubinyenga bidibu nabi to!” 
Deuteronomy7:18 Kanubitshinyi! Nuvuluke muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu muenze ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, ne bantu bende bonsu." 
Deuteronomy7:19 Nuvua badimuene muvua Maweja-Nangila mukengeshe bena Ejipitu, nuwuaye muenze malu a kukema, muleje bukole buende bua kunupatula mu ditunga adi. Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neakengeshe bisamba bionsu binudi nutshina ebi anu mushindu awu." 
Deuteronomy7:20 Nanku bantu bonsu nebikale banunyema, baye kusokoma. Maweja-Nangila neabatumine mangulungu bua kubabutula." 
Deuteronomy7:21 Kanutshinyi bisamba ebi to. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi nenu. Kakuena muntu udi mua kuambangana nende to. 
Deuteronomy7:22 Panuasemena pabuipi, yeye neipate bantu aba ku kakese ku kakese. Bualu nuenu babutule bonsu musangu umue, nyama ya tshisuku neyivulangane bua kunuluisha." 
Deuteronomy7:23 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanuambuluishe bua nutekeshe bisamba ebi. Nebikale ne bowa bunene, babutuke." 
Deuteronomy7:24 Maweja-Nangila neafile bakalenga babu kunudi. Nenubabutule bonsu, kabayi babavuluke kabidi pa buloba. Muntu nansha umue kakunutuila nkanana. Nebabutuke bonsu." 
Deuteronomy7:25 Nuoshe mpingu ya mvidie yabu yonsu. Kanualakanyi biamu bia mpawungi ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole bidibu balamike ku mpingu aku to. Kamuangatshi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ukina bintu ebi. Bidi mua kunukebela diakabi. 
Deuteronomy7:26 Kanuteki lupingu nansha lumue luleja mvidie wa mushindu ewu mu nzubu yenu. Nuenu benze nanku, nebanubutule musangu umue ne mpingu ayi. Mpingu ya mushindu ewu idi ne bua kubutuka yonsu. Nuyibenge, nuyimanshe." 
Deuteronomy8:1 Nuenu batumikile mikenji indi nnuambila lelu eyi, neyinuambuluishe bua kusomba bimpe. Nemwulangane. Nenukuate ditunga, divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy8:2 Nuvuluke luendu lule luvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu munuendeshe mu tshipela bidimu makumi anayi. Uvua munukengeshe bua kunuteta, bua ajadike meji adi munda muenu, ne mushindu unudi basue kukumbaja mikenji yende." 
Deuteronomy8:3 Yeye mumane kunukengesha ne nzala, kumupeshaye mana, biakudia binuvua kanuyi banji kumanya, nansha nuenu nansha bankambua benu. Bionsu ebi, anu bua kunulongesha ne: muntu kena ne muoyi anu bua biakudia nkayabi to, kadi bua meyi onsu adi apatuka mukana mua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Deuteronomy8:4 Bidimu ebi makumi anayi, bilamba bienu kabiena bisunsuke, makasa enu kaena muwule to." 
Deuteronomy8:5 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mmusue kunulongesha, bu mudi tatu ulongesha muanende." 
Deuteronomy8:6 Nutumikile mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numunemeke, nuenze mudiye musue." 
Deuteronomy8:7 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanufikishe mu ditunga dimpe, didi ne tshitalela tshia mayi a misulu ne a mpokolu mivule, adi apatuka mu tshibandabanda, nansha mu mukuna." 
Deuteronomy8:8 Mu ditunga adi, mudi biakudia bia bungi: ntete mishilangane ya kuenza bukula, mitshi ya mfiku, maluvu a mvinyo, mitshi ya grenade, mafuta a olive ne buitshi." 
Deuteronomy8:9 Nanku nenuikale ne mampa mapite bungi. Kanuakukengelamu tshintu to. Badi bumbulamu tshiamu tshifike mu mbuebue, tshiamu tshia kabanda mu mikuna." 
Deuteronomy8:10 Nenudie nukute. Nenuele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu tuasakidila, bua padiye munufikishe mu ditunga edi dimpe." 
Deuteronomy8:11 Nuvuluke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nukumbaje meyi ne mikenji biende, bindi nnuambila lelu ebi." 
Deuteronomy8:12 Nanku panuikala ne biakudia bia bungi, nusomba mu nzubu mimpe," 
Deuteronomy8:13 nupeta bintu bia bungi: ngombe, mikoku, mbuji, biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, ne bia mpawungi, ne bintu bikuabu bia mishindu yonsu," 
Deuteronomy8:14 kanuditambishi to. Nuvuluke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy8:15 Kunupitshishaye mu tshipela tshinene tshidi tshikuata bowa, tshiena ne nyoka ya lulengu, ne tuminyiminyi, kamuyi mayi. Kunupatuilaye mayi mu lubuebue luvua lupite bukole." 
Deuteronomy8:16 Amu mu tshipela amu, Maweja-Nangila kunupa mana, biakudia bivua bankambua benu kabayi banji kumanya. Uvua munukengeshe, kadi amu bua kunuteta, kabidi bua kunulongoluela diakalenga matuku adi kumpala." 
Deuteronomy8:17 Kadi kanuedi meji ne: nudi badipetele diakalenga ku bukole buenu nkayenu to. 
Deuteronomy8:18 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ke udi unuambuluisha, bua nupete diakalenga. Udi wenza nanku, bualu too ne lelu utshidi ulama ndondu wende, uvua-ye mutue ne bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy8:19 Nanku ndi nnuvuluija lelu ne: panudi nutendelela mvidie mikuabu, nuyenzela mudimu, kanuyi nuvuluka Maweja-Nangila, nenubutuke bonsu." 
Deuteronomy8:20 Eyowa, panudi kanuyi nutumikila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanubutule mushindu wabutulaye bisamba bidi pabuipi nenu." 
Deuteronomy9:1 Nuenu bena Izrayele, telejayi. Lelu nenusabuke musulu wa Yardene. Nenuipate bisamba bionsu bidi binupita ku bukole ne ku bungi. Nenukuate bimenga biabu bidi ne bimana bitumbuke mulu." 
Deuteronomy9:2 Nenutshimune bena Anake, bantu bale ba bukole, badi bantu bakuabu batshina, bamba ne: “Kakuena udi mua kukandamana kudi ndelanganyi ya Anake!" 
Deuteronomy9:3 Lelu nenujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi wenda kumpala kuenu. Yeye udi bu kapia kadi kabutula bintu bionsu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila neabipate. Nenubatshimune lukasa, mubabutule bonsu, mbanyenge bintu biabu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mulaye." 
Deuteronomy9:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mumane kuipata bantu aba, kumpala kuenu, kanuditambishi ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmutupe ditunga edi, bualu tudi bantu ba nsongu.” Kadi numanyene: Maweja-Nangila mmuipate bantu aba kumpala kuenu, bualu mbena buenzayi." 
Deuteronomy9:5 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kena unupa ditunga edi bua buakane buenu to. Neipate bantu aba, bualu mbena buenzayi. Udi musue kabidi kukumbaja bionsu bivuaye mulaye bankambua benu, Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy9:6 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanupe ditunga edi dimpe, kadi ki mbua buakane buenu to. Bualu nudi tshisamba tshia bantu badi bamutombokela!" 
Deuteronomy9:7 Nuvuluke ne: mu tshipela nuvua bafikishe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munda. Kanupu bualu ebu muoyi diba nansha dimue! Katshia numuka mu Ejipitu too ne munudi bafike muaba ewu, nutshidi amu numutombokela." 
Deuteronomy9:8 Ku mukuna wa Sinayi nangananga, Maweja-Nangila uvua musue kunubutula bonsu, bualu nuvua bamufikishe munda bikole." 
Deuteronomy9:9 Meme Moshe mvua mubande ku mukuna bua kuangata mabue, avua ne mikenji ya ndondu wenu ne Maweja-Nangila. Meme kulalaku matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku, tshiyi mua kudia nansha kunua." 
Deuteronomy9:10 Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila kumpesha mabue abidi, avuaye mufunde nkayende mikenji yonsu. Ke mikenji iwaye munumanyishe munkatshi mua kapia, panuvua kuinshi kua mukuna." 
Deuteronomy9:11 Nanku matuku makumi anayi a munya ne butuku mamane kukumbana, Maweja-Nangila kumpesha mikenji ya ndondu," 
Deuteronomy9:12 kungambilaye ne: “Tuluka lukasa. Bantu bauvua mupatule mu Ejipitu mbenze bualu bupite bubi. Kabena bitabe ku bionsu bimvua mubambile. Mbadienzele lupingu lua tshiamu tshiengulula.” 
Deuteronomy9:13 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: “Ndi mujadike ne: bantu aba mbantombokele. 
Deuteronomy9:14 Kunkandiki to. Ndekela, mbanyoke. Ndi musue kubabutula, kabayi mua kubatela kabidi pa buloba. Pashishe nenkuambuluishe bua ulele bana ba bungi, benze tshisamba tshinene, tshidi tshipita bena Izrayele ku bukole ne ku bungi!”" 
Deuteronomy9:15 Meme kutuluka ku mukuna, uvua umueneka mukuate kapia. Mvua muambule ku bianza mabue avua ne mikenji ya ndondu." 
Deuteronomy9:16 Meme kujadika ne: nuvua batombokele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu bushiwa. Nuvua badienzele lupingu lua kana ka ngombe ka tshiamu. Kanuvua bitabe bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila munuambile to. 
Deuteronomy9:17 Ke pamvua muimanshe mabue abidi amvua nawu ku bianza, muatshibule, nuenu batangile." 
Deuteronomy9:18 Pashishe meme kudiela panshi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Meme kushala muaba awu matuku makuabu makumi anayi a munya ne butuku, tshiyi mua kudia nansha kunua. Mvua muenze bionsu abi, anu bua bubi bu-nuvua benze. Nuenu kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, kumufikisha munda." 
Deuteronomy9:19 Mvua ntshina, nzakela tshiji tshikole tshivua Maweja-Nangila natshi. Ukavua musue kunubutula. Kadi kuitabaye kabidi dilomba dianyi musangu ewu." 
Deuteronomy9:20 Maweja-Nangila uvua mupite kufikila Arone munda, musue kumushipa. Kadi dituku adi, meme kumulombela ne yeye kabidi." 
Deuteronomy9:21 Meme kuangata lupingu lua kana ka ngombe ka tshiamu, lunuvua badienzele bua bubi buenu. Meme kulosha mu kapia. Bivua kabiyi bipie, meme kubizaza, kushalabi butu. Meme kuimansha butu abu mu musulu uvua upueka mu mukuna." 
Deuteronomy9:22 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nuvua bafikishe kabidi Maweja-Nangila munda ku Tabera, ku Masa ne ku Kibrote-Taawa," 
Deuteronomy9:23 Kabidi ku Kadeshe-Barneya pavua Maweja-Nangila munutume bua kukuata ditunga divuaye munulaye, kanuvua batekemene kudiye to. Kanuvua bangate bionsu bivuaye munuambile ne mushinga." 
Deuteronomy9:24 Katshia tumanyangana nenu, nudi amu nutombokela Maweja-Nangila." 
Deuteronomy9:25 Pavua Maweja-Nangila musue kunubutula, meme kudiela panshi kumpala kuende, kushala nanku matuku makumi anayi a munya ne a butuku." 
Deuteronomy9:26 Meme kulomba Maweja-Nangila ne: “Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila, kubutudi bantu badi bebe, baudi mupikule, mupatule mu Ejipitu ku bukole ne ku bumfumu buebe." 
Deuteronomy9:27 Uvuluke bantu bebe: Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Kuedi meji ku bubi bua bena Izrayele, padibu bakutombokela, babenga diyi diebe." 
Deuteronomy9:28 Bualu bena Ejipitu badi mua kuamba ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila wapangi mua kufikisha bantu bende mu ditunga divuaye mubalaye. Kena mubanange. Uvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu anu bua bafuile mu tshipela!’ 
Deuteronomy9:29 Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele aba mbantu bebe, baudi mudisunguile, bauvua mupikule, mupatule mu Ejipitu ku bukole ne ku makanda ebe mapite.”" 
Deuteronomy10:1 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Usonge mabue abidi, mafuanangane ne a kumpala. Wenze kabidi mushete wa mabaya. Ubande ku mukuna kundi eku." 
Deuteronomy10:2 Nemfundulule pa mabue apu mikenji ya mushindu umue ne ivua pa mabue auvua munyange. Uteke mabue awu mu mushete.” 
Deuteronomy10:3 Meme kuenza mushete wa mabaya a ndunga, kusonga mabue abidi mafuanangane ne a kumpala. Meme kubanda nabi ku mukuna." 
Deuteronomy10:4 Maweja-Nangila kufundulula mikenji dikumi pa mabue mapiamapia, bu muvuaye mufunde pa mabue a kumpala. Mikenji eyi, ke ivuaye munumanyishe munkatshi mua kapia, dituku dinuvua basangile kuinshi kua mukuna. Pashishe kumpeshaye mabue awu." 
Deuteronomy10:5 Meme kutuluka kabidi ku mukuna, kuteka mabue awu mu mushete umvua muenze, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. Kutuadija musangu awu, mabue adi amu mu mushete amu." 
Deuteronomy10:6 (Bena Izrayele kumuka ku mpokolu ya mayi a Bene-Yakane, kuya ku Moshera. Muaba awu ke uvua Arone mufuile. Kumujikabu. Muanende Elazare kumupingana ku mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Deuteronomy10:7 Bena Izrayele kumuka muaba awu, kuyabu ku Ngudengoda. Bumuka aku, kuyabu ku Yotbata, muaba udi misulu mishilangane." 
Deuteronomy10:8 Tshikondu atshi Maweja-Nangila kupesha bena Levi midimu mishilangane eyi: kuambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, kuela bantu lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Midimu eyi, ke itshidibu benza too ne mpindiewu." 
Deuteronomy10:9 Ke pavua bena Levi kabayi bapeta wabu muaba wa bumpianyi bu bisamba bikuabu. Tshiabu tshidibu natshi, mbua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mudimu, bu muvuaye mumane kubambila.)" 
Deuteronomy10:10 Meme kushala ku mukuna matuku makumi anayi a munya ne butuku, bu musangu mukuabu. Musangu ewu kabidi, Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba dianyi. Kena munubutule to." 
Deuteronomy10:11 Kungambilaye kabidi ne: “Bangayi luendu! Wikale wenda kumpala kua bantu. Baye kukuata ditunga dimvua muditshipe bua kupesha bankambua babu!” 
Deuteronomy10:12 Bena Izrayele, tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu utekemena kunudi ntshinyi? Mbua numunemeke, numutumikile, mununange, numuenzele mudimu ne muoyi wenu mujima, kabidi ne bukole buenu buonsu." 
Deuteronomy10:13 Maweja-Nangila udi ujinga bua nukumbaje meyi ne mikenji biende, bindi nnuambila lelu ebi, bua nuikale bena diakalenga." 
Deuteronomy10:14 Diulu dijima, buloba ne bionsu bidipu, mbintu bia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy10:15 Kale Maweja-Nangila uvua umvuangana amu ne bankambua benu, mubanange anu bobu. Kadi mpindiewu, mmunusungule nuenu, ndelanganyi yabu, munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu, munudi bamone emu." 
Deuteronomy10:16 Nudifile muenu muonsu kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanumutombokedi kabidi to. 
Deuteronomy10:17 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila udi mfumu wa mvidie yonsu, ne mukalenga wa bakalenga. Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu munene ne wa bukole bonsu, udi bantu bonsu batshina. Kena ne kansungansunga to. Kena witaba mabuejilu to." 
Deuteronomy10:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wakuila bakaji bakamba ne bana ba nshiya. Udi unanga bantu benyi badi munkatshi muenu, ubapesha bilamba ne biakudia." 
Deuteronomy10:19 Nanku nuenu bena Izrayele, nunange bantu benyi badi munkatshi muenu. Bualu nuvua penu benyi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy10:20 Nunemeke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numulamate amu yeye. Nuntendelele, nuditshipe anu mu dina diende." 
Deuteronomy10:21 Numutumbishe, bualu yeye nkayende ke Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Udi munuenzele malu manene a kukema, adi akuatshisha bowa, anudi bamone." 
Deuteronomy10:22 Pafikile bankambua benu mu Ejipitu, kabavua bapite ku makumi muanda mutekete to. Kadi mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmunuvudije bu mitotu ya mulu." 
Deuteronomy11:1 Nunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numuenzele mudimu, nukumbaje meyi ne mikenji yende." 
Deuteronomy11:2 Mpindiewu, ndi nnuambila nuenu mikenji eyi. Tshiena ngambila bana benu to. Bualu bobu kabena bamona, kabena bamanya bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila munuenzele bua kunuleja bukole buende. Anu nuenu ke badi bamanya butumbi ne bukole buende." 
Deuteronomy11:3 Nudi bamanye bishima bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muenze. Mmunyoke mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bantu bende bonsu," 
Deuteronomy11:4 pavuabu banuipata ne biluilu biabu, tubalu ne matempu. Nudi bamanye muvuaye mubabutule kashidi mu Mayi manene makunze." 
Deuteronomy11:5 Panuvua mu tshipela, Maweja-Nangila ke uvua munulame bua kunufikisha muaba ewu." 
Deuteronomy11:6 Pashishe uvua mushipe kabidi Datane ne Abirame, bana ba Eliyabe, ba mu tshisamba tshia Rubene. Buloba kupuka, kubajibikila ne meku abu, ne ntenta yabu, ne bantu bonsu bavua baditue ku tshiabu, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile." 
Deuteronomy11:7 Nanku nuenu nudi bajadike malu manene adi Maweja-Nangila munuenzele. 
Deuteronomy11:8 Nukumbaje mikenji yonsu indi nnuambila lelu eyi. Neyinuambuluishe bua nukuate ditunga dinuabuela. 
Deuteronomy11:9 Nanku nenulale matuku a bungi mu ditunga adi, didi ne biakudia bia bungi, divua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuditshipa bua kupesha bankambua benu, ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu." 
Deuteronomy11:10 Ditunga dinudi nukuata mpindiewu, kadiena bu ditunga dia Ejipitu dinudi bumuke to. Bualu mu Ejipitu, panuvua nukuna ntete, nuvua numbula mikidi bua kufikishisha mayi mu budimi amu, bu mudibu benza mu lupangu lua biseki." 
Deuteronomy11:11 Kadi ditunga dinudi nukuata mpindiewu didi ne bibandabanda ne mikuna. Buloba budi bupeta tshitalela ku mayi a mvula. 
Deuteronomy11:12 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, ke udi ulama buloba abu, ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu too ne ku ndekelu watshi." 
Deuteronomy11:13 Nuenu bakumbaje bimpe mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, indi nnuambila lelu eyi, nuenu bamunange, bamuenzele mudimu ne muoyi wenu mujima ne bukole buenu buonsu," 
Deuteronomy11:14 nealokeshe mvula anu pa diba diende, bua nupete biakudia bimpe, ntete ya bungi ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, ne mafuta." 
Deuteronomy11:15 Maweja-Nangila neameneshe kabidi bisosa bia nuenu kudisha bimuna bienu. Nanku nenudie nukute. 
Deuteronomy11:16 Nanku dimukayi, kanupambuki, kanushiyi njila mululame. Kanutendeledi mvidie mikuabu to." 
Deuteronomy11:17 Nuenu kanuyi bakumbaje mikenji yende, Maweja-Nangila neanufuile munda. Kakunulokeshila kabidi mvula. Kanuakupeta biakudia pa madimi enu to. Nenubutuke mu ditunga edi dimpe, didiye unupesha." 
Deuteronomy11:18 Mikenji eyi indi munupeshe, nuyilame mu mioyi yenu ne mu mitshima yenu. Nuyisuike kabidi ku maboku enu, ne pa mpala yenu, bua kanuyipu muoyi to." 
Deuteronomy11:19 Nulongeshe bana benu mikenji eyi, nuyitele diba dionsu, panudi nusomba ku nzubu yenu, nansha panudi nuendakana mu njila, panudi nulala nansha panudi nubika." 
Deuteronomy11:20 Pashishe nuyifunde ku mishiku ya mbelu ya nzubu yenu, ne ku biibi bia bimenga bienu." 
Deuteronomy11:21 Nuenu bakumbaje mikenji eyi, matuku onsu atshidi diulu kulu ne buloba panshi, nenushale ne muoyi, nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy11:22 Eyowa, nukumbaje mikenji yonsu indi nnuambila. Nunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuitabe bionsu bidiye unuambila, numulamate." 
Deuteronomy11:23 Nanku panuafika pabuipi ne ditunga adi bua kudikuata, Yeye neanuipatshile baluishi benu, badi banupita ku bungi ne ku bukole." 
Deuteronomy11:24 Ditunga dijima ndienu. Mikalu yadi idi mushindu ewu: kutuadija ku tshipela tshidi kuinshi mu ditunga, too ne ku mikuna ya Lebanone, idi ku mutu mu ditunga; ku musulu munene wa Perate luseke lua kudi diba dipatukila, too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, luseke lua kudi diba dibuelela." 
Deuteronomy11:25 Muntu nansha umue kakukandamana to. Bantu bonsu nebanutshine, bakuatshike bowa miaba yonsu inudi nupitshila, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila munulaye." 
Deuteronomy11:26 Telejayi! Ndi njinga se: lelu nusungule tshinudi basue: diakalenga nansha diakabi! 
Deuteronomy11:27 Panuikala nukumbaja mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, indi nnumanyisha lelu, nenuikale bena diakalenga." 
Deuteronomy11:28 Kadi panuikala kanuyi nukumbaja mikenji eyi, kanuyi nuitaba bindi nnuambila, nutendelela mvidie inudi kanuyi banji kumanya, nenuikale bena diakabi." 
Deuteronomy11:29 Pikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munufikishe mu ditunga dinuakuata, nenujingile bantu diakalenga ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Ngarizime. Nenubajingile diakabi ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Ebale." 
Deuteronomy11:30 (Mikuna eyi idi dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, dishiya dia njila udi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu, mu ditunga dia bena Kenaane badi basomba mu tshibandabanda tshia Yardene. Mikuna eyi idi pabuipi ne mitshi ya nsanga ya tshijila ya mu Moreya, idi mitangilangane ne Ngilgale. )" 
Deuteronomy11:31 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nukadi pa kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, bua kubuela mu ditunga edi, didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu unupa. Nenudikuate bua kusombamu." 
Deuteronomy11:32 Diba adi, mwuluke bua kukumbaja meyi ne mikenji yende, bindi nnumanyisha lelu ebi." 
Deuteronomy12:1 Meyi ne mikenji binudi ne bua kukumbaja matuku onsu mu ditunga, didi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, munupe bua kusomba kashidi, bidi nunku:" 
Deuteronomy12:2 Nunyangakaje miaba ya tshijila yonsu, idibu base pa nsongu ya mikuna minene ne mikese, munkathi mua mitshi ya dileji, muaba udibu batendelela mvidie kudi bisamba binuanyenga matunga abi." 
Deuteronomy12:3 Nunyangakaje bilambuilu biabu. Nupule mabue adibu bimanyike. Nuoshe makunji a tshijila. Nushimbule mpingu ya mvidie yabu. Nukuate mudimu bua bantu kabavuluki kabidi nansha mena mene a mvidie ayi miaba yonsu ivuabu bayitendelela. 
Deuteronomy12:4 Panudi nutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kanulondi bibidilu bia bisamba abi to." 
Deuteronomy12:5 Mu buloba bua bisamba bienu, Maweja-Nangila neasungule muaba anu umue, muaba udiye musue kusomba bua numonangane nende, numutendelelemu." 
Deuteronomy12:6 Muaba awu, ke unudi mua kulambuila bintu bionsu binudi nabi: milambu ya kuosha, ya bobumue, tshia dikumi tshia bintu bia mu madimi, milambu ya budisuile, milambu ya mapiku, too ne ya banabute ba bimuna bienu: ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji." 
Deuteronomy12:7 Mu nzubu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, ke munudi mua kudila biakudia bia tshijila, pamue ne bena meku enu bonsu. Nuenu nenusanke bua bilenga bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, munupe mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy12:8 Nanku kanuena mua kutendelela kabidi Maweja-Nangila munudi nuenza mpindiewu to, muntu yonsu utendelela wende mushindu." 
Deuteronomy12:9 Nuenu kanuena banji kufika mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila ne bua kunupa, bua nusombemu talala." 
Deuteronomy12:10 Kadi nenusabuke musulu wa Yardene, bua kusomba mu ditunga adi ne ditalala. Yeye neanulame bimpe. Baluishi benu bonsu, bena mutumba, kabakunuenzela bualu." 
Deuteronomy12:11 Diba adi, muaba wikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musungule bua kusomba, nenumutuadile milambu eyi mishilangane, imvua munuambile: ya kuosha, ya bobumue, ya tshia dikumi tshia bintu bia mu madimi, ya budisuile, ne ya mapiku, inuvua bamulaye." 
Deuteronomy12:12 Muaba wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu awu, nenusanke bonsu, nuenu, bana benu ne bena mudimu benu. Kabidi bena Levi, badi basa mu bimenga bienu, kabayi ne wabu muaba wa kuasa munkatshi muenu, nebasanke pabu." 
Deuteronomy12:13 Nuenu bena Izrayele, dimukayi: kanuena mua kulambula milambu yenu miaba yonsu ya tshijila inudi numona to." 
Deuteronomy12:14 Milambu ayi, nuyilambuile anu muaba wa tshijila wikale Maweja-Nangila musungule mu buloba bua tshisamba tshimue tshia ku bisamba bienu. Muaba awu, ke unudi mua kukumbajila bionsu bindi nnuambila." 
Deuteronomy12:15 Bimuna bionsu bikale Maweja-Nangila munupe mu ditunga dinuasomba, muntu yonsu udi ne mikiya nansha udi kayi nayi, udi mua kubishipa, kudia munyinyi wabi bu mudiye musue, ne muaba udiye musue, anu bu munutu nudia munyinyi wa kabuluku, nansha wa ngulungu." 
Deuteronomy12:16 Kadi kanuena mua kudia mashi a nyama to. Nualekele, apueke panshi bu mayi." 
Deuteronomy12:17 Milambu yonsu inudi nulambula Maweja-Nangila: ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, ya maluvu, ya mafuta, ya bamuanabute ba bimuna bienu, ngombe, mikoku, mbuji, milambu ya budisuile ne ya mapiku, kanuena mua kudila bintu bia ku milambu ayi mu nzubu yenu to." 
Deuteronomy12:18 Bintu bia tshijila abi, nuenu, bana benu, bena mudimu benu, ne bena Levi, badi mu bimenga bienu, nenubidile amu muaba wa tshijila, wikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musungule. Nanku muaba awu nenuikale ne disanka dia bungi, bua bionsu binuikala bakumbaje." 
Deuteronomy12:19 Numanye ne: matuku onsu anudi mu ditunga dienu, kanuena mua kulengulula bena Levi to." 
Deuteronomy12:20 Pikala Maweja-Nangila wenu mudiundishe ditunga dienu bu muvuaye mulaye, nenuikale nudia munyinyi munudi basue." 
Deuteronomy12:21 Panuikala kanuyi pabuipi ne muaba wikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musungule bua yeye kusomba, nudi mua kushipa bimuna bidiye munupe: ngombe, mikoku, mbuji, kudia munyinyi miaba yonsu inudi basombe. Kadi mwuluke anu mikenji indi mumane kunuambila." 
Deuteronomy12:22 Nanku muntu yonsu udi ne mikiya, nansha udi kayi nayi, udi mua kudia munyinyi awu, mudiye musue, bu munudi nudia munyinyi wa kabuluku, nansha wa ngulungu." 
Deuteronomy12:23 Kadi numanye ne: Kanuena mua kudia mashi a nyama to. Bualu mu mashi ke mudi muoyi. Nanku kanuena mua kudia munyinyi, kudia kabidi ne muoyi to." 
Deuteronomy12:24 Kadi nulekele mashi, amate panshi bu mayi." 
Deuteronomy12:25 Nuenu benze nanku, nenuikale bena diakalenga, nuenu pamue ne ndelanganyi yenu, bualu binudi nuenza nebilengelele Maweja-Nangila." 
Deuteronomy12:26 Kadi nyama ya tshijila, nansha ya mulambu wa mapiku, nuyilambuile anu muaba wikale Maweja-Nangila musungule." 
Deuteronomy12:27 Pikala mulambu awu wa kuosha, nulambule munyinyi ne mashi pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kadi pikalawu wa bobumue, nuele mashi pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, pashishe nudie munyinyi." 
Deuteronomy12:28 Nuenu bena Izrayele nuteleje bionsu bindi nnuambila, nubikumbaje. Nanku, misangu yonsu nenuikale bena diakalenga, nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu. Bualu nenuenze bidi bimpe, bisankisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy12:29 Panuafika mu ditunga, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neabutule bisamba bionsu bidi mu ditunga adi. Nanku nenubinyenge ditunga adi bua nusombemu." 
Deuteronomy12:30 Pikala Maweja-Nangila mumane kubutula bantu abu, kanulondi bibidilu biabu to. Kanutendeledi mvidie yabu. Kanuidikiji mushindu uvuabu bayitendelela." 
Deuteronomy12:31 Nanku panudi nutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kanuenji muvua bena ditunga benza to. Bualu mu ditendelela diabu, bavua benza bivua Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Bavua balambula mvidie yabu too ne bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji!" 
Deuteronomy13:1 Nukumbaje mikenji yonsu indi munuambile eyi. Kanusakididi bualu, kanumbushi bualu." 
Deuteronomy13:2 Dituku dikuabu, pikala muambi nansha muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu uleja malu munumuenekela, nnumanyisha tshishima," 
Deuteronomy13:3 tshishima atshi tshienzeka bu muvuaye munuambile, muntu awu unuambila bua kutendelela mvidie inudi kanuyi bamanye, kuyenzela mudimu," 
Deuteronomy13:4 kanumuitabi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi unuteta bua kujadika ne: nudi bamunange ne bukole buenu buonsu, kabidi ne muoyi wenu mujima anyi?" 
Deuteronomy13:5 Nutendelele amu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Numunemeke, nutumikile mikenji yende, numulamate, numuenzele mudimu." 
Deuteronomy13:6 Muambi yonsu, nansha muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu uleja malu, padiye unumusha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu, numushipe. Bualu uvua musue kunumusha mu njila uvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuambile bua kulonda. Nanku numushe bubi buonsu munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy13:7 Dituku dikuabu pikala muntu wa kunudi, bamubikila mu musokoku kudi muanabu wa balume, kudi muanabu wa bakaji, kudi mukajende mene, nansha kudi mulunda wende udiye mupite kunanga, bua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu, inuvua kanuyi bamanye, nansha nuenu nansha bankambua benu, kanuena mua kumuitaba to." 
Deuteronomy13:8 Mvidie eyi ke idibu batendelela kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bidi pabuipi nenu, nansha bidi kule, pa buloba bujima." 
Deuteronomy13:9 Kanuena mua kuitaba bionsu ebi, nansha kuteleja mene bidibu banuambila to. Muntu udi utendelela mvidie eyi, mmuena tshibawu. Kanuena mua kumufuila luse, kanuena mua kumuakuila." 
Deuteronomy13:10 Muntu yonsu udi unuambila bua kutendelela mvidie, bamushipe. Muntu uvuaye wambila bua kutendelela mvidie, ke udi udianjila kumuasa dibue. Bantu bakuabu, kushisha kumuambuluisha bua kumushipa." 
Deuteronomy13:11 Muena tshibawu awu, bamushipe anu ne mabue. Bualu uvua musue kumusha muntu mukuabu kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatula ku bupika mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy13:12 Nanku pikala bena Izrayele bonsu bumvua bualu ebu, nebatshine. Kabakuenza kabidi malu mabi a nanku to." 
Deuteronomy13:13 Dituku dikuabu, nudi mua kumvua ne: mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga, bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua kusomba," 
Deuteronomy13:14 mudi bantu babi badi bambila bena Izrayele bua kutendelela mvidie inudi kanuyi bamanye mpindiewu. 
Deuteronomy13:15 Diba adi, nuebejangane, nulondakajangane bimpe bua kujadika ne: bualu ebu mbulelela anyi? Nuenu bajadika menemene ne: mbenze nanku," 
Deuteronomy13:16 nushipe bantu bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi ne bimuna biabu. Pashishe nubutule tshimenga atshi tshijima, kabidi ne bionsu bidimu." 
Deuteronomy13:17 Nukungule bubanji buonsu bua mu tshimenga atshi muaba umue, muaba udi bantu bambilangane malu. Nubioshe musangu umue ne tshimenga atshi, bua bikale bu mulambu wa kuoshila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Tshimenga atshi nutshiupule bua kashidi, kabayi mua kutshiasulula kabidi to." 
Deuteronomy13:18 Kanuena mua kuangata tshintu nansha tshimue tshia bidibu ne bua kuosha, bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu amone mua kutuyisha tshiji tshiende. Diba adi, neanufuile luse. Nenuvulangane, bu muvuaye mulaye bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy13:19 Panuikala numuitaba, nukumbaja meyi ne mikenji bindi nnuambila lelu ebi, nuenza bidi bimulengelela, nenupete diakalenga kudiye, nupangane." 
Deuteronomy14:1 Nuenu bena Izrayele, panudi mu madilu, kanuena mua kuditapa nsalu, nansha kukungula pa lubombu to. Bualu nudi bana ba Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy14:2 Nudi tshisamba tshia tshijila tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuenu ke badiye musungule munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu bidi pa buloba, bua nuikale tshisamba tshiende menemene." 
Deuteronomy14:3 Nyama idi ne mikiya idi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wayi to." 
Deuteronomy14:4 Kadi nudi mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama eyi: ngombe, mukoku, mbuji," 
Deuteronomy14:5 ngulungu, kabuluku, ntole, mukoku wa mu tshisuku," 
Deuteronomy14:6 nyama mikuabu yonsu idi ne mikonu mipanduluke, mikale ipingaja bintu mukana, ibidia kabidi." 
Deuteronomy14:7 Kadi nyama yonsu idi ne mikonu mipanduluke, kayiyi ipingaja bintu mukana, ibidia kabidi, nansha idi ipingaja bintu mu mukana ibidia kabidi, kadi kayiyi ne mikonu mipanduluke, kanuena mua kuyidia to. Nanku nyama eyi idi ne mikiya: kamelu, nsenji ne damane. Bualu idi ipingaja bintu mukana, ibidia kabidi, kadi kayena ne mikonu mipanduluke to." 
Deuteronomy14:8 Udi ne mikiya kabidi ke ngulube, bualu udi ne mikonu mipanduluke, kadi kena upingaja bintu mukana, ibidia kabidi. Nanku kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama eyi. Kanuena mua kuyilenga, padiyi mifue." 
Deuteronomy14:9 Ku nyama yonsu ya mu mayi, nudi mua kudia amu idi ne mamba ne misalala." 
Deuteronomy14:10 Kadi nyama yonsu ya mu mayi idi kayiyi ne mamba ne misalala, idi ne mikiya. Kanuena mua kuyidia to." 
Deuteronomy14:11 Nyunyi yonsu idi kayiyi ne mikiya, nudi mua kuyidia." 
Deuteronomy14:12 Kadi kanuena mua kudia nyunyi eyi: nyunyi ya biminyi, tubemba tua mvulu, nyunyi idi idia minyinyi ya mu mayi," 
Deuteronomy14:13 ntuba (mifuane mukanku), mikanku, nyunyi mishilangane mifuane tubemba," 
Deuteronomy14:14 bikololu," 
Deuteronomy14:15 kasonga nyunyi, nyunyi idi yendakana butuku mifuanangane ne kakutukutu, nyunyi ya pa mayi idi idia malandi, nkumbikumbi," 
Deuteronomy14:16 bipungulu, tshishenene," 
Deuteronomy14:17 nyunyi idi mifuanangane ne tshikololu, nkumbikumbi, kalamangombe, tshiowa," 
Deuteronomy14:18 nyunyi ya mikolu mile idi yenda ku muelelu wa mayi, nyunyi idi ne tshisuba ne nyunyi ya midima." 
Deuteronomy14:19 Bishi bionsu bidi ne masala, kanuena mua kubidia to, bualu bidi ne mikiya." 
Deuteronomy14:20 Kadi nudi mua kudia bishi, bidi kabiyi ne mikiya." 
Deuteronomy14:21 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi tshisamba tshisunguluke tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nanku kanuena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyama midifuile to. Nudi mua kuupesha benyi badi munkatshi muenu, nansha kusumbisha benyi bakuabu. Kanuena mua kulamba munyinyi wa muana wa mbuji, mu mabele a mamuende to." 
Deuteronomy14:22 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, nusunguile Maweja-Nangila tshia dikumi tshia bia mu madimi enu." 
Deuteronomy14:23 Pashishe nuye mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, muaba wikalaye musungule bua nuenu kumonangana nende, ne bua kulambulamu tshia dikumi tshia bintu ebi: ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, mafuta, bamuanabute ba ngombe, ba mikoku ne ba mbuji. Ke munudi mua kulomba, munudi mua kunemeka kashidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy14:24 Nanku pikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupesha biakudia bia bungi mu madimi enu, misangu mikuabu kanuena mua kuambula tshia dikumi bua kutshinkisha muaba wikalaye musungule bua kusomba, bualu njila neikale mupite bule." 
Deuteronomy14:25 Pikalabi nanku, nudi mua kusumbisha tshia dikumi tshia biakudia ebi, kuya kulambula makuta muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy14:26 Muaba awu, nenusumbe bintu bionsu binudi basue: ngombe, mikoku, mbuji, maluvu a mvinyo, nansha maluvu makole, bua nuenu kudia, kunua, kusanka ne bena meku enu bonsu." 
Deuteronomy14:27 Mu masanka awu, mwuluke bena Levi banudi nabu mu bimenga bienu, bualu kabena ne wabu muaba wa bumpianyi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy14:28 Nanku ku bidimu bisatu bisatu, numushe tshia dikumi tshia bia mu madimi enu bia tshidimu atshi, nutshiteke mu bimenga bienu." 
Deuteronomy14:29 Biakudia abi, nebiambuluishe bena Levi, badi kabayi ne muaba wa bumpianyi munkatshi muenu. Nebiambuluishe benyi, bana ba nshiya ne bakaji bakamba banudi nabu. Nebapete bintu bia kudiabu kuukuta. Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanuele lupemba mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy15:1 Padi bidimu muanda mutekete bikumbana, nuikale nulekelangane mabanza onsu anudi nawu." 
Deuteronomy15:2 Mabanza awu nulekelangane mushindu ewu: padi tshidimu tshikumbana tshia kulekelangana mabanza mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu bavua basombesha bana babu makuta, kabena mua kunana makuta awu to. Kabidi muntu kena mua kutatshisha muanabu bua kufutaye dibanza adi to."
