Deuteronomy15:3 Panudi nusombesha muenyi makuta, udi mua kunupingajila. Kadi muanenu kena ne bua kunupingajilawu to." 
Deuteronomy15:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanuambuluishe, bua nupete bintu bia bungi mu ditunga didiye munupe. Nanku munkatshi muenu kamuakuikala bapele to," 
Deuteronomy15:5 panuikala bitabe meyi ende, bakumbaje mikenji yende yonsu indi nnuambila lelu eyi." 
Deuteronomy15:6 Pikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu numusankishe ne bintu, bu nuwuaye mulaye, kanuakusomba makuta kudi muntu to. Kadi nuenu nenusombeshe bantu benyi ba bungi makuta. Kabidi nenuikale bamfumu ba bisamba bia bungi, kanuyi penu ku bumfumu bua tshisamba nansha tshimue." 
Deuteronomy15:7 Pikala muntu mupele munkatshi mua bana benu, mu tshimenga tshia ditunga dianupesha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, unusomba tshintu, kanumuiminyi to." 
Deuteronomy15:8 Numusombeshe ne muoyi muimpe tshionsu tshidiye ukengela. 
Deuteronomy15:9 Nudimuke. Kanuikadi ne meji mabi a ne: tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia kulekelangana mabanza tshidi pabuipi. Kanutatshishi muanenu mupele bua bualu abu. Kanumupadi tshintu tshidiye ulomba. Bualu yeye mudidile Maweja-Nangila, nenuikale bena tshibawu." 
Deuteronomy15:10 Nanku nuikale ne muoyi muimpe, nusombeshe mupele tshintu tshidiye ulomba. Nuenu benze nanku, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu neanusankishe mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy15:11 Mu ditunga dienu nemuikale bapele misangu yonsu. Ke pandi nnuambila ne: nuikale ne muoyi muimpe. Nuvuluke bana benu bapele, ne bena dikenga badi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy15:12 Pikala muanenu muena Ebrewu, mulume nansha mukaji, musue kudisumbisha bu mupika kuudi, akukuatshile mudimu anu bidimu bisambombu. Kadi tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, neumulekele, aye." 
Deuteronomy15:13 Kumulekedi uya, kayi ne tshintu." 
Deuteronomy15:14 Umupeshe bintu binuikala bapeta kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu: mikoku, mbuji, ntete ya kuenza bukula. Umupeshe kabidi ne maluvu a mvinyo." 
Deuteronomy15:15 Nuvuluke ne: nuvua bapika mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kunupatula. Ke pandi nnupesha mukenji ewu mpindiewu. 
Deuteronomy15:16 Pikala mupika mulume anyi mukaji mununange nuenu ne bena diku dienu, ubenga mua kumuka, bualu udi musombe bimpe," 
Deuteronomy15:17 munuimanyike ku tshiibi tshia nzubu. Nuangate mulonda, numutubule ditshi, bua ashale mupika wenu too ne ku lufu luende." 
Deuteronomy15:18 Kanuikadi ne kanyinganyinga bua kupesha mupika budikadidi to. Bualu bidimu bisambombu bidiye munuenzele mudimu, mmunupeteshe bintu bia bungi, bipite misangu ibidi binuvua mua kupeta kudi muena mudimu unudi nufuta. Nanku mupika apete anu budikadidi, bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu anusankishe mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy15:19 Bamuanabute balume bonsu, ba ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji yenu, nubajidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Muanabute mulume wa ngombe, kanuena mua kumuenzeja mudimu to. Kabidi kuena mua kukosa miosa ya muanabute wa mukoku." 
Deuteronomy15:20 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, nudie munyinyi wa bimuna ebi ne meku enu, muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mu nzubu wikalaye musungule." 
Deuteronomy15:21 Pikala tshimuna tshimue tshia ku bimuna ebi tshitebuke, tshifua disu, nansha ne bulema bukuabu pambidi, kanuena mua kutshilambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu to." 
Deuteronomy15:22 Munyinyi awu, nudi mua kuudila ku nzubu yenu pamue ne bantu bonsu, badi ne mikiya nansha badi kabayi nayi, anu bu munudi nudia munyinyi wa kabuluku nansha wa ngulungu." 
Deuteronomy15:23 Kadi misangu yonsu, kanudi mashi a tshimuna to. Nualekele, apueke panshi bu mayi." 
Deuteronomy16:1 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nuvuluke mua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu tshibilu tshia Dipita diende, mu ngondu wa Abibe wa tshidimu tshionsu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmunupatule mu Ejipitu anu mu ngondu awu butuku." 
Deuteronomy16:2 Nanku nyama ya mu bikumbi inudi mua kulambula mu tshibilu etshi nyoyi eyi: ngombe, mikoku ne mbuji. Kadi nuyilambule anu muaba wikalaye musungule bua nuenu kumonangana nende." 
Deuteronomy16:3 Matuku malondangane muanda mutekete mu didia dia tshibilu, kanuena mua kudia mampa mela buanga. Panudi nudia mampa kaayi mela buanga nanku, nenuvuluke dituku dinuvua bapatuke ne lubilu mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy16:4 Matuku awu onsu muanda mutekete, kanuena mua kulama buanga bua mampa mu ditunga dienu dijima. Munyinyi wa nyama unu-vua balambula Maweja-Nangila dilolu dia dituku dia kumpala, nuudie, ujika anu dituku adi." 
Deuteronomy16:5 Kanuena mua kuenzela tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mu bimenga bionsu bikalaye munupa bua kusomba to." 
Deuteronomy16:6 Kadi nudi mua kulambula milambu eyi, anu mu tshimenga tshikala Maweja-Nangila musungule bua nuenu kumonangana nende. Nuyilambule dilolu diba dimane kubuela, bualu ke diba dinuvua bapatuke mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy16:7 Nulambe munyinyi awu, nuudile muaba wikala Maweja-Nangila musungule. Mu dinda, nupingane ku nzubu yenu." 
Deuteronomy16:8 Nuenu bena Izrayele, matuku malondangane asambombu kanuena mua kudia mampa mela buanga. Dituku dia muanda mutekete, nudisangishe bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuena mua kuenza mudimu dituku adi to." 
Deuteronomy16:9 Kutuadija dituku dinuvua nubanga kunowa biakudia bienu, nubadike mbingu milondangane muanda mutekete." 
Deuteronomy16:10 Pashishe nuenze tshibilu tshia Dinowa dia biakudia, bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nufile milambu ya ku budisuile, bilondeshile bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila munuenzele." 
Deuteronomy16:11 Nuye ku nzubu wikale Maweja-Nangila musungule bua nuenu kumonangana nende. Muaba wa tshijila awu, nuenu bena Izrayele, nusanke ne bana benu, bena midimu benu, bena Levi, benyi banudi nabu, bana ba nshiya, ne bakaji bakamba badi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy16:12 Nuvuluke ne: nuvua bapika mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Nanku nukumbaje mikenji eyi yonsu. 
Deuteronomy16:13 Nuenu bamane kushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula, bamane kukama kabidi tumuma tua mvinyo, bajikije, nuenze tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa matuku muanda mutekete malondangane." 
Deuteronomy16:14 Nanku nuenu bena Izrayele bonsu, bana benu, bena mudimu benu, bena Levi, benyi banudi nabu, bana ba nshiya, ne bakaji bakamba badi munkatshi muenu, nusanke bua tshibilu etshi." 
Deuteronomy16:15 Nuenze tshibilu etshi matuku muanda mutekete, bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nutshienzele anu muaba wikalaye musungule. Nusanke bikole, bualu Maweja-Nangila neanuvudijile biakudia bia bungi mu madimi enu. Neanusankishe kabidi mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy16:16 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, bantu balume bonsu badi munkatshi muenu, nebadileje kudi Maweja-Nangila misangu isatu, muaba wikalaye musungule, bua tshibilu tshia mampa adi kaayi mela buanga, bua tshibilu tshia Dinowa biakudia, ne bua tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa. Kadi muntu kafiki mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wenu kayi ne tshintu tshia kumulambula to." 
Deuteronomy16:17 Muntu yonsu neafike ne mulambu, bilondeshile mudimu udiye wenza, ne mushindu wikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mumuambuluishe." 
Deuteronomy16:18 Mu bimenga bionsu bikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua kusomba, nusungule balumbuluishi ne bulombodi, badi mua kulumbuluisha bantu bonsu ba mu bisamba bienu, kakuyi kansungansunga." 
Deuteronomy16:19 Kanunyangi tshilumbu tshia muntu. Kanubingishi muena tshibawu. Kanuangatshi tshintu tshia mabuejila. Bualu tshintu tshia nanku, tshidi tshiumbusha mulumbuluishi, nansha yeye muntu wa meji, ku ba muanda, tshimutuma ku ba wetu, bua kunyangaye bilumbu bia bantu." 
Deuteronomy16:20 Nuenze muenu muonsu bua kulumbuluisha bantu bimpe. Nanku nenukuate ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe, nushalemu ne muoyi." 
Deuteronomy16:21 Kanuena mua kuasa dikunji, nansha kukuna mutshi, bua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu, pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, tshinudi benzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu to." 
Deuteronomy16:22 Kanuena mua kuimanyika dibue dia kutendelela mvidie muaba awu to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila kena musue bintu bia mushindu awu to. 
Deuteronomy17:1 Tshimuna tshionsu tshidi ne bulema pambidi: ngombe, mukoku, nansha mbuji, kanuena mua kutshilambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu to. Bualu mulambu awu kawena umulengelela to, udi umubipila." 
Deuteronomy17:2 Misangu mikuabu, mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mua kunupa bua nuenu kusomba, muntu mulume nansha mukaji udi mua kuenza bibi, kunyangakaja ndondu." 
Deuteronomy17:3 Tshilejilu: muntu udi utendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu, nansha diba, ngondu, nansha bintu bivule bidi mu tshibuashibuashi. — Maweja-Nangila katshia ki mmunuambile bua kuenza nanku! —" 
Deuteronomy17:4 Panuikala bumvue ne: muena Izrayele udi utendelela mvidie nanku, nukebulule bua kujadika ne: mmuenze nanku bulelela anyi? Pikala bualu ebu bubi, budi kabuyi buengelela Maweja-Nangila, buenzeke munkatshi muenu bulelela," 
Deuteronomy17:5 muena tshibawu awu, nansha yeye mulume nansha yeye mukaji, nuye nende ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga. Numuase mabue, numushipe." 
Deuteronomy17:6 Kanuena mua kushipa muena tshibawu awu kanuyi banji kujadika tshilumbu kudi bantu babidi nansha basatu. Muntu umue kena mua kujadika bualu to. 
Deuteronomy17:7 Bajadiki ba bualu abu ke badi badianjila kumuasa mabue. Pashishe bantu bakuabu nebabambuluishe bua kumushipa. Ke munudi ne bua kumusha bubi munkatshi muenu. 
Deuteronomy17:8 Pikala balumbuluishi ba muaba unudi basombe, bapangile tshilumbu tshia bantu, bavua bashipangane, batutangane, batapangane mputa, nansha benze tshilema tshikuabu kampande, nuye ne tshilumbu atshi muaba wikala Maweja-Nangila musungule." 
Deuteronomy17:9 Nuebeje batuangaji ba bena Levi ne balumbuluishi, badi balumbuluisha dituku adi. Nebanuambile munudi mua kukosa tshilumbu atshi." 
Deuteronomy17:10 Nuitabe bionsu bidibu banuambila kudi batuangaji ne balumbuluishi, badi muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, nubikumbaje." 
Deuteronomy17:11 Kanuenji munudi basue to. Nukumbaje bionsu bidibu banuambila. 
Deuteronomy17:12 Pikala muntu musue kuditambisha, kayi ulonda tshidi balumbuluishi ne batuangaji, badi benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bamba, muntu awu numushipe, bua kujikija buenzayi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy17:13 Nanku bena Izrayele kabakuditambisha kabidi nanku to. Nebatshine, padibu bumvue bionsu bidi bienzeka ebi." 
Deuteronomy17:14 Panuafika mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua kusomba, misangu mikuabu nenuikale ne dijinga dia kupeta mukalenga, bua nuikale mudi bisamba bikuabu binudi nabi mutumba." 
Deuteronomy17:15 Mukalenga awu, kikadi muenyi, muntu wa tshisamba tshikuabu to. Ikale anu muena Izrayele. Nanku nubanjije mu bukalenga amu muntu udi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nkayende musungule." 
Deuteronomy17:16 Mukalenga awu, kikadi ne tubalu tua bungi. Kena mua kutuma bantu mu Ejipitu bua kutusumba to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua munukandike bua kupingana mu ditunga edi." 
Deuteronomy17:17 Mukalenga awu kena mua kusela bakaji ba bungi. Bualu bakaji abu, badi mua kumufikisha ku ditombokela Maweja-Nangila. Kabidi kikadi ne biuma bia bungi to." 
Deuteronomy17:18 Mukalenga mumane kusomba mu nkuasa wa bukalenga, bamutentuile mukanda wa mikenji ewu, udibu balame kudi batuangaji ba bena Levi." 
Deuteronomy17:19 Nanku mukalenga alame mukanda awu pabuipi nende, bua ikale uubala matuku onsu atshidiye ne muoyi, bua anemeke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, akumbaje mikenji yonsu idibu bafunda mu mukanda awu." 
Deuteronomy17:20 Bionsu ebi nebimuambuluishe bua kaditambishi, bu mupite bantu bonsu ba mu tshisamba tshiende, kabidi bua kalenguludi mikenji, kadi ayikumbaje yonsu too ne mikese mene. Nanku mukalenga awu ne ndelanganyi yende, nebashale mu bukalenga matuku a bungi, balombola bena Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy18:1 Tshisamba tshijima tshia bena Levi nansha batuangaji badi munkatshi muabu, kabena bapeta buloba bua bumpianyi, munkatshi mua bena Izrayele to. Nebapete biakudia anu ku milambu, ne ku bintu bikuabu bidi bantu balambula Maweja-Nangila." 
Deuteronomy18:2 Kabena ne bumpianyi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi bumpianyi buabu, bu muvuaye mumane kubambila." 
Deuteronomy18:3 Nanku padi bena Izrayele balambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya bobumue ya ngombe, mikoku nansha mbuji, batuangaji nebapete diboku, mbanga ne tshifu." 
Deuteronomy18:4 Nubapeshe kabidi biakudia bia tshianyi bia pa madimi enu: ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, ne mafuta. Nubapeshe kabidi ne miosa inudi nukosa ya mikoku ya kumpala." 
Deuteronomy18:5 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mmusungule bena Levi kashidi munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu bionsu, bua bamuenzele mudimu wa butuangaji." 
Deuteronomy18:6 Pikala muena Levi umuka mu tshimenga tshia bena Izrayele mudiye musombe, bua kuya muaba wikala Maweja-Nangila musungule," 
Deuteronomy18:7 neenzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende mudimu muaba awu, anu bu mudibu benza kudi bena Levi bakuabu badi benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Deuteronomy18:8 Muena Levi awu, neapete biakudia bungi budi bena Levi bakuabu bapeta. Udi mua kulama kabidi bintu bidi bena diku diabu bamutumina, padibu basumbisha bivuaye nabi." 
Deuteronomy18:9 Panuafika mu ditunga dikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe, kanulondi buenzayi bua bena ditunga adi." 
Deuteronomy18:10 Muntu nansha umue wa kunudi, kena mua kuosha muanende wa balume nansha wa bakaji bua kumulambula. Kabidi muntu kena mua kuenza majimbu, kutempa, nansha kulowa bantu," 
Deuteronomy18:11 nansha kubuka, nansha kuyukila ne bakishi bua kumvua tshidibu bamba." 
Deuteronomy18:12 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi udiula bikole bantu badi benza buenzayi bua mushindu ewu. Bua bualu ebu, Maweja-Nangila neabanyenge ditunga diabu panuafikamu." 
Deuteronomy18:13 Nanku nuenu bena Izrayele, nukumbaje amu bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musue." 
Deuteronomy18:14 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi unukandika bua kanulondi buenzayi bua bena ditunga dinuakuata. Bualu bobu abu badi bitaba badi benza malu a majimbu, babuka mbuku." 
Deuteronomy18:15 Maweja-Nangila neanutumine muambi mukuabu, bu meme Moshe. Neamusungule amu munkatshi mua bana benu. Nenuteleje bidiye wamba." 
Deuteronomy18:16 Muambi ke muntu unuvua balombe Maweja-Nangila ku mukuna wa Sinayi, panuvua bamba ne: “Muntu mukuabu ikale wakula netu. Katutshiena basue kumvua diyi dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, nansha kumona kapia kadi kakenka aka, bualu kadi mua kutubutula! ”" 
Deuteronomy18:17 Ke Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Bena Izrayele badi bamba bimpe. 
Deuteronomy18:18 Nanku nembatumine muambi wa munkathi mua bana babu, bu muudi wewe Moshe. Nengikale mmuambila malu, yeye umanyisha bena Izrayele bionsu bingikala mumumanyishe." 
Deuteronomy18:19 Muntu yonsu udi ubenga kuitaba malu adi muambi awu umuambila mu dina dianyi, meme Maweja-Nangila nkayanyi nemmunyoke." 
Deuteronomy18:20 Kadi pikala muambi wakula ne dikamakama mu dina dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila, wamba malu andi tshiyi mumuambile, nansha pikalaye wamba malu mu dina dia mvidie mikuabu, muambi awu neafue.”" 
Deuteronomy18:21 Misangu mikuabu nudi mua kudikonka ne: Mmushindu kayi utudi mua kumanya ne: bualu ebu kabuena bufuma kudi Maweja-Nangila? 
Deuteronomy18:22 Nanku padi muambi unuambila bualu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, kabuyi buenzeka muvuaye muambe amu, numanye ne: ki mbua kudi Maweja-Nangila to. Muambi uvua udiambila bualu abu nkayende. Kanutshinyi, kanuteleji muambi wa nanku to." 
Deuteronomy19:1 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neashipe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bua kunupa ditunga diabu. Nenubanyenge bimenga biabu, nusomba mu nzubu yabu." 
Deuteronomy19:2 Ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila munupe adi, nudikosolole mu bitupa bisatu. Mu tshitupa tshionsu muikale tshimenga tshia kunyemena." 
Deuteronomy19:3 Nanku padi muntu ushipangana, anyemene mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bisatu bua kusokoma." 
Deuteronomy19:4 Amu muntu uvua mushipe muntu mukuabu mu mpukapuka, kayi nende ne lukinu, neanyemene mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bisatu bua kudipandisha." 
Deuteronomy19:5 Tuangate tshilejilu tshia bantu babidi badi baya muitu bua kupula mutshi. Padi mukuabu ukosa mutshi, tshisuyi tshidi mua kukuka, kushipa uvuabu nende. Nanku muntu uvua mushipangane mu mpukapuka awu, udi mua kunyemena mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bisatu bua kudipandisha." 
Deuteronomy19:6 Musombuedi, bu mudiye ne tshiji, udi mua kulondakaja mushipianganyi. Padi njila mupite bule, musombuedi udi mua kupeta mushipianganyi, kumushipa. Kadi ki mbimpe kushipa mushipianganyi uvua mushipe muntu amu mu mpukapuka, kayi nende ne lukinu." 
Deuteronomy19:7 Ke pandi nnuambila bua nusungule bimenga bisatu bia kunyemena. 
Deuteronomy19:8 Panuikala banange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, panuenza anu mudiye musue, panuakumbaja mikenji yonsu indi nnuambila eyi, yeye neadiundishe ditunga dienu. Neanupe ditunga dijima divuaye mulaye bankambua benu." 
Deuteronomy19:9 Diba adi, nenusakidile bimenga bikuabu bisatu bia kunyemena ku bienu bisatu bia kale." 
Deuteronomy19:10 Mushindu ewu mu ditunga dinuapeta kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu adi, kabakushipamu muntu uvua mushipe muntu nende mu mpukapuka. Nuenu bamushipe, nenuikale ne tshilumbu bua lufu lua muntu ewu." 
Deuteronomy19:11 Kadi pikala muntu mukine muanabu, kubutamaye mua kumukuata, kumushipa, pashishe kunyemenaye mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi bisatu," 
Deuteronomy19:12 bakulu ba mu tshimenga tshiende, nebafume bantu bua kumukuata, kumufikisha kudi musombuedi bua amushipe." 
Deuteronomy19:13 Bua nuenu kusomba biakane mu ditunga dienu, ne kujikija buenzayi bua kushipa muntu udi kayi ne bualu, kanuena mua kufuila muena tshibawu luse to, numushipe!" 
Deuteronomy19:14 Panuafika mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe, nuenu bamane kupeta miaba ya kusomba, mikalu ne bena mutumba nenu bavua badianjile kuasa muaba awu, ishale anu mushindu unuvua bayisangane, kanuyi nudiundisha buloba bunuvua bapete." 
Deuteronomy19:15 Padi muntu mushipangane, munyangakaje mikenji, nansha muenze buenzayi bukuabu, muntu umue kena mua kujadika tshilumbu atshi to, anu bantu babidi nansha basatu." 
Deuteronomy19:16 Pikala muntu ujadikila mukuabu tshilumbu tshia dishima," 
Deuteronomy19:17 bantu aba babidi nebaye natshi kudi batuangaji, ne kudi balumbuluishi badi balumbuluisha bilumbu dituku adi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Deuteronomy19:18 Balumbuluishi nebalondeshilule tshilumbu atshi bimpe. Pikalabu bajadike ne: mujadiki wa tshilumbu uvua mushiminyine mukuabu malu," 
Deuteronomy19:19 nebamunyoke amu mushindu uvuaye musue ne banyoke muanabu awu, bua kujikija buenzayi bua nanku munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy19:20 Pikala bantu bakuabu bumvue mudibu bamunyoke nanku, nebatshine. Kabakushi-minyinangana kabidi malu to." 
Deuteronomy19:21 Muena tshibawu yonsu, kanumufuidi luse to. Mumusombuele pende: padiye mushipangane, numushipe pende. Padiye mushipe muntu disu, numushipe diende. Padiye mupole muntu dinu, numupole diende. Padiye mukose muntu tshianza nansha dikasa, numukose pende." 
Deuteronomy20:1 Nuenu baye kuluangana mvita ne bantu badi ne tubalu, kabidi ne matempu a mvita, nansha ne baluishi bapite bena mvita benu ku bungi, kanubatshinyi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu, udi munkathi muenu." 
Deuteronomy20:2 Panudi nudilongolola bua kuluangana, mutuangaji imane kumpala kua bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, ele lusanzu ne:" 
Deuteronomy20:3 “Nuenu bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, numanye ne: lelu nudi nuluangana ne bena lukuna benu. Panuafika muaba udibu, nukoleshe muoyi. Kanubatshinyi, kanupampakanyi, kanuzakadi to." 
Deuteronomy20:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi nenu. Neanuluile mvita ayi, bua nuenu kubatshimuna!”" 
Deuteronomy20:5 Pashishe balombodi ba bena mvita, nebambile bena mvita ne: “Pikala muntu wa munkatshi muenu muase nzubu, kayi muanji kusombamu, apingane kuende. Bualu badi mua kumushipa mu mvita, muntu mukuabu kuvua kuangata nzubu awu." 
Deuteronomy20:6 Pikala muntu wa munkatshi muenu mukune mitshi ya mvinyo, kayi muanji kupolaku bimuma bia tshianyi, apingane kuende. Bualu udi mua kufua mu mvita, muntu mukuabu kuvua kupola bimuma abi." 
Deuteronomy20:7 Pikala muntu wa munkatshi muenu mubangile mukaji, kayi muanji kumubuelela mu nzubu, apingane kuende. Bualu udi mua kufua mu mvita, muntu mukuabu kuangata mukaji awu.”" 
Deuteronomy20:8 Pashishe balombodi ba bena mvita nebambe kabidi ne: “Pikala muntu kayi ne muoyi mukole, utshina, mbimpe apingane kuende. Bualu udi mua kupumbisha bakuabu mua kuluangana.”" 
Deuteronomy20:9 Pajikija balombodi ba bena mvita abu mayuki awu, nebasungule muntu ku tshisumbu tshionsu bua kulombolaye bakuabu." 
Deuteronomy20:10 Bua kuluisha tshimenga kampande, nudianjile kulomba bena tshimenga atshi bua kubuelamu tshianana, kakuyi mvita to." 
Deuteronomy20:11 Pikala bena tshimenga atshi bitabe, banunzuluile biibi bia tshimenga, nebanukuatshile mudimu. Nenubenzeje midimu ku bukole." 
Deuteronomy20:12 Kadi pikalabu basue mvita, babenge bua nuenu kubuela mu tshimenga tshiabu, nuele tshimenga munkatshi ne tshiluilu." 
Deuteronomy20:13 Padi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu unuambuluisha bua nutshikuate, nushipemu bantu balume bonsu." 
Deuteronomy20:14 Kadi, bakaji, bana, bimuna, ne bintu bionsu bidi mu tshimenga atshi, nubiangate, nuenza nabi munudi basue. Bualu bintu bia baluishi benu mbintu bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupeshe." 
Deuteronomy20:15 Ke munudi mua kuenzela bimenga bionsu bidi kule, kabiyi mu ditunga dinuasomba." 
Deuteronomy20:16 Kadi mu bimenga bia mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua nudikuate, nenushipemu bantu bonsu, kanuyi nushiya nansha umue ne muoyi." 
Deuteronomy20:17 Bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Kenaane, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, nenubashipe bonsu, muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu muambe." 
Deuteronomy20:18 Bualu bantu aba, badi mua kunulongesha buenzayi, budibu benza bua kusankisha mvidie yabu. Nuenu balonde buenzayi ebu, nudi nuenzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu bibi." 
Deuteronomy20:19 Nuenu bele tshimenga munkatshi matuku a bungi, kanuyi ne mushindu wa kutshikuata, kanupudi mitshi ya bimuma to. Bualu mitshi eyi, kayena bu bantu banudi nuluisha to. Nanku nudi mua kudia bimuma biayi. Kadi kanukosu mitshi to." 
Deuteronomy20:20 Kadi mitshi idi kayiyi ikuama bimuma bia kudia, nudi mua kuyishimbula, kuenza nayi miaba ya kuimanyina, bua numone mua kukuata tshimenga atshi bimpe." 
Deuteronomy21:1 Panuafika mu ditunga dikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua kusomba, nuenu basangane tshitalu tshia muntu mu tshisuku, kanuyi bamanye uvua mumushipe," 
Deuteronomy21:2 bakulu ne balumbuluishi nebapime mutantshi uvua muntu mufuile, ne ku bimenga bidi pabuipi," 
Deuteronomy21:3 bua kujadika tshimenga tshidi pabuipi ne tshitalu tshia muntu awu. Bakulu ba mu tshimenga atshi, nebangate muana mukaji wa ngombe, udi kayi muanji kuambula bujitu." 
Deuteronomy21:4 Nebaye nende pabuipi ne musulu udi ne mayi apueka amu kupueka, ku mielelu yawu kudibu kabayi banji kudima, nansha kukuna biakudia. Pafikabu ne muana wa ngombe muaba awu, nebamunyongoboje nshingu." 
Deuteronomy21:5 Pashishe bena Levi, badi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musungule bua kumuenzela mudimu, ne bua kuela bantu lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nebasemene pabuipi. Bualu bobu ke badi mua kujikija bilumbu bionsu: bia matandu, bia mvita, nansha bia bantu batapangane." 
Deuteronomy21:6 Nanku bakulu bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi, bavua bafika ku tshitalu tshia muntu awu, nebowele bianza pambidi pa muana wa ngombe uvuabu banyongoboje nshingu awu," 
Deuteronomy21:7 bela lusanzu ne: “Katuena bashipe muntu ewu, kabidi katuena bamanye mudiye mufue." 
Deuteronomy21:8 Nanku wewe Maweja-Nangila, utufuile tuetu bena Izrayele luse. Udi mumane kutupikula. Kututangidi tuetu bu badi ne tshilumbu tshia lufu lua muntu ewu to.” Diba adi, Mvidi Mukulu neabafuile luse." 
Deuteronomy21:9 Nuenu benze nanku, nudi nusankisha Maweja-Nangila. Kanuakuikala bena tshibawu bua lufu lua mushindu ewu to." 
Deuteronomy21:10 Panuikala nuluangana mvita, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuambuluishe bua kukuata baluishi benu mu lukanu," 
Deuteronomy21:11 muntu wa kunudi udi mua kumona mukaji muimpe, udiye musue kusela, munkatshi mua bena lukanu abu." 
Deuteronomy21:12 Nanku aye nende kuende. Mukaji akungule nsuki ya ku mutu, adikose nzadi." 
Deuteronomy21:13 Umushe bilamba bia lukanu, avuale bikuabu, asombe ku nzubu kua muntu awu, enze madilu a tatuende ne a mamuende ngondu mujima. Pashishe mulume neamubuelele mu nzubu, bua ashale mukajende." 
Deuteronomy21:14 Kadi pikala mulume, matuku mamane kupita, umona ne: mukaji katshiena kabidi unsankisha, nansha undengelela, udi mua kumulekela, bua aye kudiye musue. Kena mua kumusumbisha, nansha kumulama bu mupika, bualu uvua mukajende." 
Deuteronomy21:15 Pikala muntu musele bakaji babidi, kayi mubanange bonsu mushindu wa momumue, bakaji abu balele bana ba balume, kadi muanabute muikale wa mukaji uvuaye kayi mupite kunanga," 
Deuteronomy21:16 bua kuabanyina bana abu bintu bia bumpianyi, tatu awu apeshe muanabute bumpianyi buende bua muanabute. Kena mua kubupesha muana wa mukaji udiye mupite kunanga to." 
Deuteronomy21:17 Nanku bua kuleja ne muana wa mukaji udiye kayi mupite kunanga ke muanabute, amupeshe bintu misangu ibidi, bualu mmuanende wa kumpala udi ne bua kuangata bumpianyi bua bumuanabute." 
Deuteronomy21:18 Pikala muana upepeja baledi bende, kayi ubumvuila, nansha bobu bamunyoke," 
Deuteronomy21:19 baledi bamukuate, baye nende ku tshilumbuluilu kudi bakulu ba mu tshimenga." 
Deuteronomy21:20 Pafikabu nende, nebambile bakulu abu ne: “Muanetu ewu mmututombokele. Udi utupepeja, kena utumvuila to. Mmusue amu kuenza malu mabi ne kunua maluvu.”" 
Deuteronomy21:21 Diba adi, bantu bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi, nebamuase mabue, bamushipa. Pumvua bena Izrayele binudi bamuenzela, nebatshine. Kabakuenza kabidi buenzayi ebu to. Ke munudi mua kujikija buenzayi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele nanku." 
Deuteronomy21:22 Pikala muntu muenze bualu bubi, nuenu bamufundile tshibawu tshia lufu, bashipe muntu awu, balembeleje tshitalu tshiende ku mutshi," 
Deuteronomy21:23 tshitalu atshi katshiladi kulu butuku to. Nutshijike amu dituku adi. Bualu tshitalu tshishale mushindu awu, tshidi mua kukebela bena ditunga dinyoka kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku nudimuke, ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua kukuata, kanudinyangakaji ne mikiya to." 
Deuteronomy22:1 Nuenu basangane tshimuna tshia muanenu tshijimine: ngombe, mukoku nansha mbuji, kanutshilekedi tshipita to. Nutshipingaje kudi muenatshi." 
Deuteronomy22:2 Pikala muena tshimuna atshi kule, nansha panuikala kanuyi bamumanye, nulame amu tshimuna atshi ku nzubu kuenu, too ne pafika muenatshi bua kutshiangata. Diba adi, numupeshetshi." 
Deuteronomy22:3 Nuenu basangane kabidi mpunde wa muanenu, tshivualu tshiende, nansha tshintu tshikuabu tshimujimine, kanuena mua kulengulula tshintu atshi to. Nutshiangate, numupeshetshi." 
Deuteronomy22:4 Nuenu basangane muanenu utata ne ngombe, nansha mpunde wende, mudishinde mutshibukile panshi mu njila, kanumulekedi utata nkayende. Numuambuluishe bua kujula nyama awu panshi." 
Deuteronomy22:5 Mukaji kena mua kuvuala bilamba bia mulume. Mulume kena mua kuvuala bilamba bia mukaji. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kena musue bantu badi benza malu a mushindu ewu to. 
Deuteronomy22:6 Nuenu bapite mu njila, basangane disua dia nyunyi kulu kua mutshi nansha panshi, pikala nyunyi awu muladile, nansha mumane kutoya, kanumukuatshi musangu umue ne bana bende to." 
Deuteronomy22:7 Nulekele nyunyi awu aye. Nuambule amu bana bende. Nanku nenuikale bena diakalenga, nushale ne muoyi panu matuku a bungi." 
Deuteronomy22:8 Panudi nuasa nzubu mupiamupia, nuenze bimana binyungulule musaka wa nzubu awu. Bualu bu muntu mukuluke ku musaka mufue, nenupete tshilumbu." 
Deuteronomy22:9 Kanukunyi bintu bia mushindu mukuabu mu budimi bua mitshi ya maluvu a mvinyo. Bualu nuenu benze nanku, bintu bionsu binudi nunowa mu budimi abu, tumuma tua mvinyo ne bikunyibua bikuabu, nebishale bia tshijila bia Maweja-Nangila." 
Deuteronomy22:10 Kanusuikakaji mpunde ne ngombe ku ditempu dimue bua kudima to. 
Deuteronomy22:11 Kanuvuadi bilamba bibidi bilamakaja: etshi tshia miosa ya nyama, tshikuabu tshia buanda bua ndanda." 
Deuteronomy22:12 Nuteleshe malenda ku ntengu inayi ya bilamba binudi nuvuala. 
Deuteronomy22:13 Pikala muntu mumane kusela mukaji, umubuelela mu nzubu, pashishe umubenga, kumushiminyina ne:" 
Deuteronomy22:14 Ngasedi mukaji ewu, kadi mbamusanganyi mumane kumanyangana ne balume”," 
Deuteronomy22:15 baledi ba mukaji awu nebaleje bakulu ba mu tshimenga tshimanyinu tshidi tshijadika muvua muanabu wa bakaji kayi mumanyangane ne mulume. 
Deuteronomy22:16 Tatuende wa mukaji neambile bakulu abu ne: “Nsongalume ewu uvua musele muananyi wa bakaji. Kadi katshiena mumunange to. 
Deuteronomy22:17 Udi umushiminyina, ungambila ne: mmumane kumanyangana ne balume. Tshimanyinu tshidi tshijadika ne: kavua mumanyangane ne balume ntshietshi.” Baledi ba mukaji, nebaleje bakulu ba mu tshimenga tshilamba tshia bulalu, tshidi ne makeji a mashi a dituku dia kumpala, divua mulume mubuelele mukaji awu mu nzubu." 
Deuteronomy22:18 Pikala tshilamba atshi ne mashi, bakulu ba mu tshimenga nebakuate mulume awu, bamunyoke." 
Deuteronomy22:19 Pashishe mulume neafute tatuende wa mukaji awu tshibawu tshia nkanu lukama ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Bualu uvua munyange lumu lua nsongakaji wa bena Izrayele. Neashale anu ne mukajende kashidi too ne muafuaye. Matuku ende onsu a panu kena mua kumubenga to. 
Deuteronomy22:20 Kadi pikala mulume wamba bulelela, baledi ba mukaji kabayi ne tshimanyinu," 
Deuteronomy22:21 bakulu ba mu tshimenga nebimanyike mukaji ewu mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa tatuende. Bantu balume ba mu tshimenga nebamuase mabue, bamushipe. Bualu mmuenze bualu bua dikamakama, patshivuaye ku nzubu kua baledi bende. Ke munudi mua kujikija buenzayi bua mushindu ewu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele nanku." 
Deuteronomy22:22 Pikalabu bakuate muntu mubuelele mukaji wa bende mu nzubu, babajikile, babashipe bonsu babidi. Ke munudi mua kujikija buenzayi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele nanku." 
Deuteronomy22:23 Mu tshimenga tshienu, pikalamu nsongakaji mumane kubangila, bamubuelele mu nzubu kudi mulume mukuabu," 
Deuteronomy22:24 nubimanyike bonsu babidi ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga, nubase mabue, nubashipe. Bualu mbenze bualu ebu mu tshimenga, kadi nsongakaji kena muele mbila, kena mubikile bantu. Nsongalume pende mmukuate nsongakaji, mumane kubangila awu, ku bukole, mumubuelele mu nzubu. Ke munudi mua kujikija buenzayi munkatshi muenu nanku." 
Deuteronomy22:25 Kadi pikala mulume wenza bualu bua mushindu ewu, mukuate ku bukole mu tshisuku mukaji mumane kubangila, nushipe anu mulume nkayende." 
Deuteronomy22:26 Nulekele nsongakaji ne muoyi. Bualu kena muenze tshilema tshidi tshikumbanyine dinyoka dia lufu. (Bidi bifuanangana ne muntu udi muntu mukuabu ubunda kakuyi bualu, ushipa.)" 
Deuteronomy22:27 Bualu mu thisuku amu, nansha nsongakaji muele mbila, muntu kavua mua kumueneka bua kumusungidila to." 
Deuteronomy22:28 Kadi pikalabu bajikile mulume, ne nsongakaji udi kayi mubangile, mulume umukuata ku bukole," 
Deuteronomy22:29 mulume neafute tatuende wa nsongakaji tshibawu tshia nkanu makumi atanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Pashishe neangate mukaji kashidi, too ne muafuaye, kayi mua kumubenga musangu nansha umue to. Bualu uvua mumubuelele mu nzubu ku bukole." 
Deuteronomy23:1 Muntu kena mua kubuelela mukaji kampande wa tatuende mu nzubu to. Udi ufuisha tatuende bundu. 
Deuteronomy23:2 Muntu mulume mubozeke mipese, nansha mukoseke mubidi wa bantu balume, kena mua kubuela muaba udi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila basangile." 
Deuteronomy23:3 Muana yonsu mulela kudi mukaji udibu kabayi mua kulela nende, kena mua kubuela muaba udi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila basangile, too ne ku ndelanganyi yende ya musangu wa dikumi." 
Deuteronomy23:4 Bena Amone ne bena Mowabe kabena mua kubuela muaba udi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila basangile, nansha ndelanganyi yabu ya musangu wa dikumi." 
Deuteronomy23:5 Bualu panupatukila mu Ejipitu, bantu aba bavua banupale biakudia ne mayi a kunua mu luendu luenu. Kabidi bavua bafuta Balaame bua kunutshipaye. Balaame ewu, ke muana wa Beyore, uvua mu musoku wa Petore, mu Mezopotamiya." 
Deuteronomy23:6 Kadi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kavua musue kuteleja Balaame nansha. Nanku bu mudiye mununange, mitshipu ya Balaame kuandamukayi diakalenga dienu kashidi tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy23:7 Nanku kanuena mua kumvuangana ne bena Amone ne bena Mowabe kashidi tshiendelele. Kanuena mua kubakebela diakalenga too ne kashidi. 
Deuteronomy23:8 Kanupepeji bena Edome, bualu mbana benu. Kanupepeji kabidi bena Ejipitu, bualu nuvua basombe mu ditunga diabu." 
Deuteronomy23:9 Ndelanganyi ya bena Edome ne ya bena Ejipitu, biangatshile ku ya musangu muisatu, idi misombe mu ditunga dienu, ke idi mua kubuela muaba udi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila basangile." 
Deuteronomy23:10 Panuikala mu mitanda, nuluangana ne baluishi benu, nuepele bionsu bidi mua kunukebela mikiya." 
Deuteronomy23:11 Tshilejilu, pikala muena mvita wa munkatshi muenu mutatakane butuku, muele biana panshi, neapatuke mu mitanda dituku dijima." 
Deuteronomy23:12 Pashishe owe mayi, apingane mu mitanda anu dilolu, pakadi diba dibuela." 
Deuteronomy23:13 Nulongolole muaba wa kusesukila mutantshi mule ne mitanda yenu. 
Deuteronomy23:14 Muena mvita yonsu ikale ne tshikasu, bua padiye usesuka, ambule buloba, ajibikile bunyawu." 
Deuteronomy23:15 Muaba udi mitanda yenu wikale wa tshijila. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi wendakanamu, bua kunulama, kunuambuluisha bua nutshimune baluishi benu. Nanku, Yeye musangane tshintu tshibi munkatshi muenu neanushiye nkayenu." 
Deuteronomy23:16 Pikala mupika munyeme mfumuende, musokome mu ditunga dienu, kanumupingaji kua mfumuende to." 
Deuteronomy23:17 Adisunguile muaba udiye musue munkatshi muenu. Asombe mu tshimenga tshidiye ujinga. Kanumutatshishi to. 
Deuteronomy23:18 Muena Izrayele yonsu, mulume nansha mukaji, kena mua kuenda tshiendenda mu nzubu ya mvidie ya bena ditunga." 
Deuteronomy23:19 Balume ne bakaji badi benda buendenda bua nanku, kabena mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu bintu bia mapiku bipeta ku buendenda bua nanku. Bualu Maweja-Nangila kena wanyisha malu adi bantu aba benza." 
Deuteronomy23:20 Nuenu basombeshe muanenu makuta, biakudia nansha tshintu tshikuabu, kanuena mua kumulomba tshia kasombela to." 
Deuteronomy23:21 Kadi nudi mua kulomba bintu bia kasombela, anu kudi muenyi udi munkatshi muenu. Kanulombi kudi muanenu. Nukumbaje mikenji eyi mu ditunga dinuakuata, bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu anuele lupemba mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy23:22 Nuenu balaye Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu tshintu tshia mapiku, numulambule tshintu atshi lukasa. Bualu yeye munulombetshi ku bukole, nenuikale bena tshibawu." 
Deuteronomy23:23 Nuenu kanuyi balaye Maweja-Nangila tshintu tshia mapiku, kakuena bualu to." 
Deuteronomy23:24 Kadi nuenu bamane kumulaya tshintu, mmulambule amu tshintu tshinuvua bamulaye atshi ku budisuile buenu." 
Deuteronomy23:25 Nuenu bapitshile mu budimi bua bende budi ne mitshi ya mvinyo, nudi mua kudia tumuma bu munudi basue. Kadi kanuena mua kutupola bua kuela mu tshisaka, kuya natu pambelu to." 
Deuteronomy23:26 Nuenu bapitshile mu budimi bua bende budi ne ntete ya kuenza bukula, nudi mua kuangata biakudia bikese. Kadi kanukoshi miepu ne muele to." 
Deuteronomy24:1 Pikala muntu musele mukaji, mukaji awu katshiyi umulengelela, mulume umudiwula bua bualu kampande, amufundile mukanda wa dishipa nawu dibaka, amupewu, amuipate." 
Deuteronomy24:2 Kadi pikala mulume mukuabu musele mukaji awu," 
Deuteronomy24:3 mulume awu mumubenge kabidi, mumufundile mukanda mukuabu bua kushipa dibaka, mumupeshewu, mumuipate, nansha pikala mulume muibidi awu mufue," 
Deuteronomy24:4 mulume wa kumpala kena mua kuangata kabidi mukaji awu to. Bualu mukaji awu kudi mulume ewu udi ne mikiya. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kena musue bua mulume awu amuangate tshiakabidi. Kanuena mua kunyanga ditunga didiye munupe, ne buenzayi bua mushindu ewu." 
Deuteronomy24:5 Patshidi muntu uselelaku mukaji, kena mua kuya ku mvita. Kabena mua kumuenzeja mudimu mukuabu wa ditunga. Ashale anu ku nzubu kuende tshidimu tshijima bua kusankisha mukajende." 
Deuteronomy24:6 Dibue didi muntu upela nadi biakudia, nansha mpelu wa dibue adi, kanuena mua kubikuata lukole to. Bualu nudi numupangisha mushindu wa kupetaye biakudia." 
Deuteronomy24:7 Pikala muena Izrayele mukuate muanabu, mumulame bu mupika, nansha mumupane, mbimpe kushipa mukuatshianganyi awu. Ke munudi mua kujikija buenzayi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele nanku." 
Deuteronomy24:8 Nudimuke bua disama dia nsudi kadinukuatshi. Nukumbaje bionsu bindi mumane kuambila batuangaji ba bena Levi bua kunumanyisha. 
Deuteronomy24:9 Nuvuluke muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mumeneshe Miriyame disama dia nsudi, panuvua nufuma ku Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy24:10 Nuenu basombeshe muanenu tshintu, kanubuedi mu nzubu muende bua kudiangatshila tshintu tshia tshieya to." 
Deuteronomy24:11 Nuimanyine amu pambelu, bua muanenu awu anutuadile tshintu tshia tshieya nkayende." 
Deuteronomy24:12 Kadi pikala unudi basombeshe awu mupele, yeye munueyeke tshinkutu tshiende, numupingajiletshi dituku dionsu, butuku kabuyi buanji kuila." 
Deuteronomy24:13 Bualu ke tshidiye udibuikila butuku. Nanku mupele awu, neanuele tuasakidila. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neajadike munudi nuenzelangana bimpe." 
Deuteronomy24:14 Pikala muena mudimu mupela nansha muena dikenga, nansha yeye muanenu nansha muenyi udi musombe mu tshimenga tshia mu ditunga dienu, kanumutatshishi to." 
Deuteronomy24:15 Nufute difutu diende matuku onsu, diba kadiyi dianji kubuela to. Bualu mmupete, kabidi mmutekemene amu ku difutu adi. Nuenu kanuyi bamufute, yeye mudidile Maweja-Nangila, nenuikale bena tshibawu." 
Deuteronomy24:16 Kanuena mua kushipa batedi bua buenzayi bua bana babu. Kanuena mua kushipa bana bua buenzayi bua batedi babu. Nudi mua kushipa muntu anu bua buenzayi buende yeye nkayende. 
Deuteronomy24:17 Kanunyangi tshilumbu tshia muenyi nansha tshia muana nshiya, kanumukengeshi. Tshilamba tshia mukaji mukamba kanutshikuatshi lukole to." 
Deuteronomy24:18 Nuvuluke munu vua bapika mu Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kunupatulamu. Ke pandi nnuambila ne: nukumbaje mikenji eyi. 
Deuteronomy24:19 Panudi nunowa biakudia, kanuena mua kuangulula binuvua bapue muoyi to. Bishale bua bakaji bakamba, bana ba nshiya, ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, neanuele lupemba mu midimu yenu yonsu." 
Deuteronomy24:20 Panudi nupola tumuma tua olive, kanupinganyi tshiakabidi mu madimi enu bua kuangulula tumuma tunuvua bapue muoyi. Kadi tushale bua bakaji bakamba, bana ba nshiya, ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy24:21 Panudi nupola tumuma tua mvinyo, kanupinganyi mu madimi enu, bua kuangulula tunuvua bapue muoyi to. Kadi tushale bua bakaji bakamba, bana ba nshiya, ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy24:22 Nuvuluke munuvua bapika mu Ejipitu. Ke pandi nnuambila ne: nukumbaje mikenji eyi. 
Deuteronomy25:1 Pikala bena Izrayele babidi batandangana, nebaye kudi balumbuluishi bua kujadika udi mupite ne udi mubinge." 
Deuteronomy25:2 Pikala muntu udi mupite mupete dinyoka dia kumutuuta mikaba bungi kampande, mulumbuluishi neamuladike panshi, bamututshishe mikaba ayi bungi bukumbanyine tshitema tshivuaye muenze, mulumbuluishi muikale koku." 
Deuteronomy25:3 Kadi kanuena mua kutuuta mikaba kupitshisha pa makumi anayi to. Bualu nuenu bapitshishe nenufuishe muanenu bundu ku mesu kua bantu. 
Deuteronomy25:4 Ngombe udi wenza mudimu wa kudiata miepu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, kanuena mua kumuela nkata ku mbanga to." 
Deuteronomy25:5 Pikala bana ba balume babidi ba muntu umue basombe muaba umue, umue mufue kayi mushiye muana wa balume, mukaji wa mufue awu, kabena mua kumupiana kudi muntu mukuabu to, amu kudi bayende tshina." 
Deuteronomy25:6 Muana wa balume wa kumpala walela mukaji awu, nebamutangile bu muana wa mufue awu, bua kusangula dina dia mufue mu Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy25:7 Kadi pikala bayende tshina wa mukaji kayi musue kumupiana, mukaji neaye kudi bakulu ba mu tshimenga. Abambile ne: “Bayanyi tshina udi ubenga mua kumpiana. Kena musue kupesha muanabu muana bua kusangukaye.”" 
Deuteronomy25:8 Nenku bakulu ba mu tshimenga atshi nebabikile mulume awu, bua abajadikile mudiye ubenga kupiana mukaji wa mufue." 
Deuteronomy25:9 Nanku mukaji neasemene kudi mulume awu, bakulu bonsu batangile, amukopole tshisabata, amufuile mate mu mesu, wamba ne: “Muntu yonsu udi ubenga bua kusangula diku dia muanabu, nebamuenzele anu mushindu ewu.”" 
Deuteronomy25:10 Biangatshile dituku adi, nebabikile diku dia muntu awu ne: “Diku edi ndia muntu uvuabu bakopole tshisabata.”" 
Deuteronomy25:11 Pikala bantu balume babidi baluangana, mukaji wa mukuabu kufika bua kusungidila bayende, pikala mukaji mukuate muntu udi uluisha bayende awu ku butaka," 
Deuteronomy25:12 nukose mukaji awu tshianza, kanumufuidi luse to." 
Deuteronomy25:13 Mu mabuki enu, kamuikadi bipimu bia bujitu bia mishindu ibidi: ebi ne bujitu bua bushiwa, bikuabu bia dishima bipepela." 
Deuteronomy25:14 Kabidi mu nzubu yenu, kamuikadi bipimu bia bule mishindu ibidi: ebi bia bule bua bushiwa, bikuabu bia dishima bipi." 
Deuteronomy25:15 Nuikale anu ne bipimu bia bujitu biakane, ne bia bule bikumbane, bua nushale ne muoyi matuku mavule mu ditunga diavua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kunupa." 
Deuteronomy25:16 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi unyoka bantu badi badinga mushindu ewu. 
Deuteronomy25:17 Nuvuluke muvua bena Amaleke banukengesha mu njila, panuvua mifuma ku Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy25:18 Kabena batshina Mvidi Mukulu to. Ke muvuabu banualamina mu njila, nuenu bamane kupungila bikole. Kutondabu bantu bonsu bavua bashadile panyima, kubashipa." 
Deuteronomy25:19 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanufikishe mu ditunga didiye munupe. Neanupandishe ku baluishi bonsu badi nenu mutumba. Diba adi, nenubutule bena Amaleke, kabayi mua kubavuluka kabidi pa buloba to. Kanuena mua kupua bualu ebu muoyi to!" 
Deuteronomy26:1 Nenufike mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe bua nudikuate. Nuenu bamane kuasamu," 
Deuteronomy26:2 muntu yonsu wa kunudi angate tshitupa tshia biakudia bia tshianyi, bidiye mudime mu ditunga adi. Abiele mu tshisaka, atshiteke muaba wikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu musungule bua kumonangana nenu." 
Deuteronomy26:3 Pashishe muntu awu aye kudi mutuangaji, udi wenza mudimu musangu awu, amuambile ne: “Lelu ndi mfila bintu ebi, bua kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, wamfikishi mu ditunga divuaye mulaye bankambua betu.”" 
Deuteronomy26:4 Mutuangaji neangate tshisaka tshia biakudia atshi, atshiteke kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy26:5 Pashishe muntu udi ufila bintu abi, neambe kabidi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila ne: “Nkambua wanyi uvua muena Arame, kayi ne muaba wa kusomba. Kadi uyile kusomba ku Ejipitu ne tshisumbu tshikese tshia bantu bavuaye nabu. Bantu abu kuvulangana, kuenza tshisamba tshinene tshia bantu, tshia bukole kabidi." 
Deuteronomy26:6 Kadi bena Ejipitu kutukengesha, kutuenzeja midimu mikole ya bupika." 
Deuteronomy26:7 Tuetu kudidila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu bua atuambuluishe. Kumvuaye miadi yetu. Kumonaye bionsu bivuabu batuenzele, muvuabu batutatshisha, batutuuta, batukengesha." 
Deuteronomy26:8 Maweja-Nangila kuenza bishima bishilangane bivua bikuatshisha bantu bowa. Kutupatulaye mu Ejipitu ku bukole. 
Deuteronomy26:9 Nanku watufikishi muaba ewu bua kutupa ditunga edi, didi ne biakudia bipite bungi." 
Deuteronomy26:10 Ke pandi ndambula Maweja-Nangila biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu ditunga didiye mumpe.” Pashishe muntu awu neateke tshisaka tshia biakudia atshi panshi kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, adiele panshi bua kukukuila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy26:11 Pashishe nuenu bena Izrayele, nusanke ne meku enu onsu bua bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuenzele. Kadi nusanke pamue ne bena Levi, ne benyi badi mu ditunga dienu." 
Deuteronomy26:12 Padi bidimu bisatu bikumbana, nenuikale ne “tshidimu tshia bia dikumi.” Nufile tshia dikumi, mmumue ne: tshintu tshimue tshia ku bintu dikumi binudi banowe. Biakudia abi, nebabiangate kudi bena Levi, bana ba nshiya, bakaji bakamba, ne benyi badi munkatshi muenu. Nanku nebikale ne biakudia bia bungi, kabayi bakenga munkatshi muenu." 
Deuteronomy26:13 Pashishe nenuambile Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ne: “Maweja-Nangila wanyi, ndi mukumbaje mikenji yebe yonsu. Tshia dikumi tshia biakudia bionsu bimvua nabi, ndi mupeshe bena Levi, bana banshiya, bakaji bakamba, ne benyi badi munkatshi muetu. Ku nzubu kuanyi, tshiena mushale ne tshintu tshiebe nansha tshimue. Tshiena mupue muoyi biuvua mutuambile pa bualu ebu." 
Deuteronomy26:14 Pamvua mu madilu, tshiena mudie tshia dikumi atshi. Pamvua ne mikiya, tshiena mutshilenge, nansha mutshilambule bua muntu mufue. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi muteleje mikenji yebe, muyikumbaje yonsu." 
Deuteronomy26:15 Mu diulu, muaba webe wa tshijila, muudi musombe, wambuluishe tshisamba tshiebe tshia Izrayele, badi mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, diudi mutupe bu muuvua mulaye bankambua betu.”" 
Deuteronomy26:16 Lelu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi unuambila, bua nukumbaje meyi ende ne mikenji yende. Nubitumikile ne muoyi mujima, ne bukole buenu buonsu." 
Deuteronomy26:17 Lelu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi unulaya ne: nuenu benze mudiye musue, bakumbaje meyi ende ne mikenji yende, Yeye neikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy26:18 Nuenu kabidi nuvua bamulaye bua kuikala tshisamba tshiende, tshia bantu badiye mupite kunanga, badi bakumbaja meyi ende ne mikenji yende." 
Deuteronomy26:19 Eyowa, ku bisamba bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mufuke, mmusue bua nuenu nuikale babapite ku lumu, ku butumbi ne ku buneme. Mmusue bua nuikale bantu bende, badi bamuenzela mudimu bu muvuaye mumane kunuambila." 
Deuteronomy27:1 Moshe, pamue ne bakulu ba ditunga, kuya kudi bena Izrayele, kubambila ne: — Nukumbaje mikenji yonsu indi nnumanyisha lelu." 
Deuteronomy27:2 Dituku dinuasabuka musulu wa Yardene, bua kubuela mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe, nuimanyike mabue manene, nualabe lupemba." 
Deuteronomy27:3 Nanku panuafika mu ditunga adi didi ne biakudia bia bungi, divua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mulaye bankambua benu, nufunde mikenji yonsu indi unumanyishe eyi ku mabue awu, anu dituku adi." 
Deuteronomy27:4 Eyowa, nuenu bamane kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, nuimanyike mabue andi nnuambila aa pa mukuna wa Ebale. Nualabe lupemba." 
Deuteronomy27:5 Pashishe nuashile Maweja-Nangila wenu tshilambuilu pa mukuna apu ne mabue majima kaayi masonga ne tshiamu to. 
Deuteronomy27:6 Bua kuibaka tshilambuilu atshi, mabue ikale anu kaayi masonga to. Pa tshilambuilu apu, nulambuilepu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha." 
Deuteronomy27:7 Numulambule kabidi milambu ya bobumue, nuyidile muaba awu ne disanka kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy27:8 Mikenji ayi, nuyifunde yonsu bimpe ku mabue anuvua bimanyike bua bayibale kakuyi lutatu." 
Deuteronomy27:9 Pashishe Moshe, pamue ne batuangaji ba bena Levi, kuya kudi bantu, kubambila ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele, lekelayi mutoyi, telejayi. Biangatshile lelu, nuashadi tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy27:10 Numutumikile, nukumbaje meyi ende ne mikenji yende, bindi nnumanyisha lelu ebi." 
Deuteronomy27:11 Anu dituku adi, Moshe kuambila bena Izrayele ne:" 
Deuteronomy27:12 — Panuasabuka musulu wa Yardene: bena tshisamba tshia Shimeyone, tshia Levi, tshia Yuda, tshia Isakare, tshia Yozefe, ne tshia Binyamine, bimanyine pa mukuna wa Ngarizime, bua kuela bena Izrayele lupemba." 
Deuteronomy27:13 Kadi bena tshisamba tshia Rubene, tshia Ngade, tshia Ashere, tshia Zebulone, tshia Dane, ne tshia Naftali, bimanyine pa mukuna wa Ebale, bua kutshipa bantu." 
Deuteronomy27:14 Nanku bena Levi, nebamanyishe bena Izrayele bonsu ne diyi dikole, mitshipu eyi ne:" 
Deuteronomy27:15 “Muntu yonsu udi wenza lupingu lua mvidie, nansha lua dibue, lua mutshi, nansha lua tshiamu, kutendelela mu musokoku, mmuena diakabi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kena musue bintu bia mushindu ewu, bienza kudi bantu. Muntu ewu asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bena Izrayele nebandamune bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:16 “Muntu yonsu udi kayi unemeka tatuende ne mamuende, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bantu bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:17 “Muntu yonsu udi udiundisha lupangu luende, utentamuna mikalu ne muena mutumba, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:18 “Muntu yonsu udi uleja mpofu njila mubi, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:19 “Muntu yonsu udi unyangakaja tshilumbu tshia muana nshiya, tshia mukaji mukamba, nansha tshia muenyi udi munkatshi muenu, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:20 “Muntu yonsu udi ubuelela mukaji kampande wa tatuende mu nzubu, ufuisha tatuende bundu, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:21 “Muntu yonsu udi ulala ne nyama, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:22 “Muntu yonsu udi ubuelela muanabu wa bakaji wa tatuende, nansha wa mamuende, mu nzubu, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:23 “Muntu yonsu udi ubuelela mamuenende mu nzubu, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:24 “Muntu yonsu udi ushipangana mu musokoku, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:25 “Muntu yonsu udi wangata makuta a mabuejila bua kushipa muntu udi kayi ne bualu, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy27:26 “Muntu yonsu udi kayi witaba meyi ne mikenji bia Mvidi Mukulu, kayi ubikumbaja, asangane muena tshibawu kuenza anyi?” Bonsu ne: “Enze!”" 
Deuteronomy28:1 Nuenu bitabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bakumbaje bimpe mikenji yende yonsu indi nnumanyisha lelu eyi, nenuikale bena diakalenga bapite bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba." 
Deuteronomy28:2 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neanusankishe mushindu ewu: 
Deuteronomy28:3 Bantu badi mu tshimenga, nansha badi mu misoku, Maweja-Nangila neabele lupemba." 
Deuteronomy28:4 Maweja-Nangila neanupe bana ba bungi, biakudia bipite bungi pa madimi enu; neavudije ngombe yenu, mikoku ne mbuji." 
Deuteronomy28:5 Maweja-Nangila neanupe bimuma, ne ntete bisaka tente." 
Deuteronomy28:6 Maweja-Nangila neanuele lupemba diba dionsu ne miaba yonsu. 
Deuteronomy28:7 Maweja-Nangila neanuambuluishe bua nutshimune baluishi benu. Pikalabu bavuile njila umue, nebanyeme bapingena mu njila muanda mutekete mishilangane." 
Deuteronomy28:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nealame biakudia bionsu binudi bateke mu mayeba enu. Neanuendeshe diakalenga ku midimu yenu yonsu. Nanku neanusankishe bulelela, mu ditunga didiye munupe." 
Deuteronomy28:9 Nuenu bakumbaje mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, benze mudiye musue, nenuikale tshisamba tshia bantu bende, bu muvuaye mumane kunulaya." 
Deuteronomy28:10 Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bionsu nebamone munudi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, badi bamuenzela mudimu. Nanku nebanutshine." 
Deuteronomy28:11 Panuafika mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua benu bua kunupesha, nenulele bana ba bungi. Bimuna bienu nebivulangane. Kabidi nenuikale ne biakudia bipite bungi." 
Deuteronomy28:12 Bena Izrayele, Maweja-Nangila neanunzuluile tshibuashibuashi, muaba udiye mulame mayi a mvula. Neanulokeshile mvula anu pa diba diende, bua midimu yenu yonsu itante. Nanku kanuakusomba makuta kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu to. Amu bobu nebikale banusomba." 
Deuteronomy28:13 Nanku, nuenu bakumbaje mikenji yonsu ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, indi nnumanyisha lelu eyi, nenuikale bena diakalenga bapite bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba. Kanuakushadila kudibu to. Nenuikale nubatumina diyi." 
Deuteronomy28:14 Kanuena mua kubenga nansha kakese mikenji imvua munuambile bua kuya kutendelela mvidie mikuabu. 
Deuteronomy28:15 Kadi panuikala kanuyi nuitaba, kanuyi nutumikila meyi ne mikenji bia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bindi nnumanyisha lelu ebi, neanunyoke mushindu ewu:" 
Deuteronomy28:16 Bantu badi mu tshimenga, ne badi mu misoku, Maweja-Nangila neabendeshe diakabi." 
Deuteronomy28:17 Maweja-Nangila kakunupa bimuma, ne ntete bisaka tente to. Nebishale anu munda mutupu." 
Deuteronomy28:18 Maweja-Nangila kakunupa bana ba bungi. Kanuakuikala ne biakudia bia bungi. Ngombe yenu, mikoku ne mbuji kabiakuvulangana to." 
Deuteronomy28:19 Maweja-Nangila neanuendeshe diakabi diba dionsu ne miaba yonsu. 
Deuteronomy28:20 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila neanuendeshe diakabi mu bionsu binudi nuenza: nenuikale ne makenga, ntatu ne bowa, too ne panuabutuka bonsu lukasa, bualu nudi benze malu mabi, babenge Maweja-Nangila." 
Deuteronomy28:21 Nanku, mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila munupe bua kusomba, neanutumine tshipupu tshia disama dia tshiambu bua kunubutula." 
Deuteronomy28:22 Nenunyane, nupeta mubidi luya ne biuja. Biakudia bienu nebiume ne munanga; nansha nebibole. Neanukengeshe nenku too ne panuabutuka bonsu." 
Deuteronomy28:23 Diulu nedikale dikole bu tshiamu tshikunze pa mitu yenu. Buloba nebuikale bushile bu tshiamu ku makasa enu. 
Deuteronomy28:24 Maweja-Nangila kakunulokeshila mvula mu madimi enu to. Kadi neanutumine anu butu ne lupuishi, too ne panuabutuka bonsu." 
Deuteronomy28:25 Maweja-Nangila neambuluishe baluishi benu bua banutshimune. Panuikala bayile njila umue bua kubaluisha, nenubanyeme, nupingane mu njila muanda mutekete mishilangane. Bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba nebatshine, pamonabu bionsu bidi binuenzekela." 
Deuteronomy28:26 Bitalu bienu, nebabidie kudi nyama ya mibuabua ne nyunyi ya mikanku, muntu kayi mua kuyipata to." 
Deuteronomy28:27 Maweja-Nangila neanutumine masama mashilangane nuwuaye muenzele bena Ejipitu: mulaka, maputa, mpusu, ne tshikupi tshidi katshiyi mua kujika to." 
Deuteronomy28:28 Neanutumine kabidi disama dia mukupa, dia bumfofu ne dia lungenyi lunyanguke." 
Deuteronomy28:29 Nenuendakane munda munya, nubabata bintu bu mpofu. Midimu yenu kayakutungunuka to. Bantu nebanukengeshe bikole, nebanyenge bintu bionsu binudi nabi, muntu nansha umue kayi mua kunuakuila." 
Deuteronomy28:30 Pikala muena Izrayele mubangile mukaji, nebabuelele mukaji awu mu nzubu kudi muntu mukuabu. Muntu muase nzubu, kakulalamu to. Yeye mukune mitshi ya mvinyo, kakupola tumuma tuende tua tshianyi nansha musangu umue." 
Deuteronomy28:31 Nebashipe ngombe yenu, nuenu batangile. Kanuakuyidia munyinyi wayi to. Nebibe mpunde yenu, nuenu batangile, kanuyi mua kuyipeta kabidi. Baluishi nebakuate mikoku yenu, kakuyi muntu udi mua kunuambuluisha." 
Deuteronomy28:32 Nebakuate bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji mu bupika kudi bantu benyi, nuenu batangile. Nenuikale bindile batangila ku njila, kadi bana benu abu kabayi bapingana kabidi to." 
Deuteronomy28:33 Tshisamba tshia bantu banudi kanuyi bamanye, netshinukengeshe, tshinunyenge biakudia bionsu binudi banowe." 
Deuteronomy28:34 Panuamona malu onsu aa, nenuikale bu bantu badi ne disama dia mukupa." 
Deuteronomy28:35 Maweja-Nangila neanutumine disama dikole dia biuja. Nebinuenze mu makasa, mu binu, ku bibelu, mu mutu too ne mubidi mujima, kakuyi mushindu wa kudiondapa." 
Deuteronomy28:36 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila neanukuatshishe mu bupika ne mukalenga unuikala nende. Neanufikishe mu ditunga divua bankambua benu kabayi bamanye, nansha nuenu kabidi. Mu ditunga adi nentendelele mvidie idi anu mpingu ya mitshi misonga, nansha ya mabue." 
Deuteronomy28:37 Bena mu matunga ikale Maweja-Nangila munutume, nebakuatshike bonsu bowa, bua bionsu bidi binuenzekela. Nebishale bu nsumuinu, bantu bonsu banuseka." 
Deuteronomy28:38 Nenukune maminu a bungi mu madimi enu. Kadi nenunowe biakudia bikese, bualu nebabidie kudi mpasu." 
Deuteronomy28:39 Nenukune mitshi ya mvinyo, nuyilame bimpe. Kadi kanuakunua maluvu ayi, kanuakupola nansha tumuma. Bualu nebatudie kudi meshi." 
Deuteronomy28:40 Mu ditunga dienu nemuikale mitshi ya olive ya bungi. Kadi kanuakupetaku mafuta a kulaba pambidi to. Bualu tumuma atu netupoke, katuyi tuanji kuboba." 
Deuteronomy28:41 Nenulele bana ba balume ne ba bakaji. Kadi kanuakuikala nabu to, bualu nebaye mu bupika." 
Deuteronomy28:42 Mitshi yonsu ne biakudia bionsu bia mu madimi enu, nebabidie anu kudi mpasu ya mukumbi." 
Deuteronomy28:43 Bantu benyi badi munkatshi muenu nebikale ne bukole bua bungi. Kadi bukole buenu nebukepele. 
Deuteronomy28:44 Bantu abu, nebanusombeshe makuta, nuenu kanutshiyi ne tshia kubasombesha to. Nebikale bamfumu benu, nuenu nubenzela mudimu." 
Deuteronomy28:45 Makenga onsu neanukuate, nukenga bikole too ne panuabutuka bonsu, bualu nuvua babenge kuitaba ne kukumbaja meyi ne mikenji bia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy28:46 Makenga onsu aa neanuenzekele bua kunubela, nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu." 
Deuteronomy28:47 Panuapeta bintu bia bungi, kadi kanuyi nuenzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, mudimu ne disanka, ne muoyi wenu mujima," 
Deuteronomy28:48 Maweja-Nangila neanutumine baluishi, banukuate ku bupika. Nenukenge ne nzala ne nyota, nupanga ne tshilamba tshia kuvuala. Maweja-Nangila neanuambuishe mukoolu wa tshiamu tshia bujitu pa makaya, too ne panuabutuka bonsu." 
Deuteronomy28:49 Maweja-Nangila neanutumine baluishi, bafume kule ku ndekelu wa buloba, banudi kanuyi bamanye muakulu wabu. Maweja-Nangila neele bantu abu munkatshi muenu, bu mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi wikila pa biakudia biende." 
Deuteronomy28:50 Nebikale ne tshikisu, kabayi banemeka bantu bakulakaje, kabayi bafuila bana batekete luse." 
Deuteronomy28:51 Nebanyenge bimuna bionsu, ne biakudia bionsu binuvua banowe: ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, mafuta, too ne bana ba ngombe, ba mikoku ne ba mbuji. Nenufue, nubutuke bonsu ne nzala." 
Deuteronomy28:52 Baluishi abu, nebanutshintshimike mu bimenga bionsu, bidi mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe. Nebanuluishe too ne pupuka bimana bile bia bimenga bienu, miaba inudi nuela meji ne: tudi basokome bimpe." 
Deuteronomy28:53 Matuku adibu banutshintshimika awu, nebanukengeshe bikole. Nenudie munyinyi wa bana ba balume ne ba bakaji banudi balele, bikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupe." 
Deuteronomy28:54 Diba adi, muntu wa kunudi udi ne muoyi muimpe, wa kanemu, newoshe muanabu, nansha bana badiye mushale nabu, nansha mukajende, disu dia lonji." 
Deuteronomy28:55 Bualu neatshine bua umue wa kudibu kavu kumubakula munyinyi wa bana bende abu. Bualu ke tshiakudia tshiende tshimuepele tshidiye mushale natshi. Kena ne mushindu wa kupeta tshikuabu, matuku adibu bamutshintshimike kudi baluishi bua kunukengesha mu bimenga bienu." 
Deuteronomy28:56 Diba adi, mukaji wa muoyi muimpe, wa kanemu, neenze mushindu wa momumue. Uvua mubanji, kavua musue kuenda nansha ku makasa. Kadi mpindiewu newoshe bayende ne bana badiye mushale nabu ba balume ne ba bakaji, disu dia lonji." 
Deuteronomy28:57 Newoshe muanende mutekete utshidiye ulelelaku, nansha nkishabende mene, disu dia lonji. Bualu matuku adibu bamutshintshimike awu, mukaji awu kena ne tshintu tshikuabu tshia kudia to. Neakebe mua kudia munyinyi wa bana bende abu mu musokoku, matuku adibu banukengesha mu bimenga bienu." 
Deuteronomy28:58 Nuenu bena Izrayele, nukumbaje mikenji yonsu ya Mvidi Mukulu, idibu bafunde mu mukanda ewu. Nunemeke udibu binyike dina edi dia butumbi dia “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu.”" 
Deuteronomy28:59 Nuenu kanuyi bakumbaje mikenji eyi, Maweja-Nangila neanukengeshe bikole, nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu. Nenupete mputa ya lubangu ne masama makole mavule adibu kabayi mua kuondapa." 
Deuteronomy28:60 Maweja-Nangila neanukengeshe ne makenga makole onsu, anuvua batshine, avuaye mukengeshe nawu bena Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy28:61 Neanutumine masama ne mputa bia mishindu yonsu, nansha bidibu kabayi bafunde mu mukanda ewu, too ne panuabutuka bonsu." 
Deuteronomy28:62 Nanku nansha nuenu bamane kusangana bu mitotu ya mulu, anu bantu bakese nebashale ne muoyi. Bualu nuvua babenge Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy28:63 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila musanke bua kunuenzela bimpe, nuenu kusangana, ke muasankaye kabidi bua kununyoka, kunufikila munda, kunubutula. Neanumushe mu ditunga divuaye munupe bua kusomba." 
Deuteronomy28:64 Pashishe neanumuangalaje miaba yonsu, munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende bidi pa buloba bujima. Neatendelele mpingu ya mvidie ya mabue, ne ya mitshi misonga, inudi kanuyi banji kumanya ku bankambua benu too ne mpindiewu." 
Deuteronomy28:65 Munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende abi, kanuakuikala ne dikisha to. Kanuakuikala ne muaba wa kusomba to. Nanku Maweja-Nangila neanukengeshe bikole. Nenuikale ne kanyinganyinga mu mioyi yenu. Mesu enu kaakumona bimpe to. Nenuikale ne bowa, nuteketa mu maboku." 
Deuteronomy28:66 Nenuikale ne mioyi kulukulu, nutshina amu lufu. Butuku ne munya nenuikale anu nuzakala." 
Deuteronomy28:67 Panuamona bionsu ebi, nenuikale ne bowa, dinda nenujinge bua butuku buila lukasa, butuku nujinga bua butshia lukasa." 
Deuteronomy28:68 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila neanuambule mu maatu, anupingaje kabidi mu Ejipitu, ditunga dimvua munuambile ne: kanuena mua kumufika kabidi. Muine amu, nuenu bonsu balume ne bakaji nenukebe kua kudisumbisha bu bapika kudi baluishi benu. Kadi muntu nansha umue kakunusumba to!" 
Deuteronomy28:69 Umvuayi muvua Moshe mutue ndondu ne bena Izrayele mu ditunga dia Mowabe, mu dina ne ku diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. (Ndondu ewu mmusakidila ku ndondu wa ku mukuna wa Sinayi.)" 
Deuteronomy29:1 Moshe kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu, kubambila ne: — Panuvua mu Ejipitu, nuvua badimuene muvua Maweja-Nangila mukengeshe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, ne bantu bonsu." 
Deuteronomy29:2 Nuvua badimuene bipupu bikole bivuaye mubakengeshe nabi, ne bishima bia dikema bivuaye muenze." 
Deuteronomy29:3 Kadi too ne mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila kena muanji kunupesha lungenyi lua kujingulula bionsu bivua bienzeka ebi to. Bualu mesu enu kaena manji kumona mene, matshi enu kaena manji kumvua." 
Deuteronomy29:4 Maweja-Nangila uvua munulombole mu tshipela bidimu makumi anayi, bilamba bienu, nansha bisabata bienu, kabiyi bisunsuke to." 
Deuteronomy29:5 Kabidi kanuvua nukengela mampa a kudia, nansha maluvu a kunua. Maweja-Nangila kunupesha bionsu, mbua nuenu kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Deuteronomy29:6 Patuafiki muaba ewu, Sihone, mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Eshebone, ne Oge, mukalenga wa ditunga dia Bashane, kutubundabu. Kadi tuetu kubatshimuna," 
Deuteronomy29:7 kubanyenga matunga abu. Tuetu kuabanyina bena Rubene, bena Ngade, ne tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe." 
Deuteronomy29:8 Nanku nuvuluke ndondu wenu ne Maweja-Nangila, nukumbaje bidi ndondu awu unulomba, bua nuikale bena diakalenga mu bionsu binudi nuenza." 
Deuteronomy29:9 Nuenu bena Izrayele, lelu nudi bimane bonsu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, pamue ne bamfumu ba midimu mishilangane, bakulu ba ditunga," 
Deuteronomy29:10 bana benu, bakaji benu, ne benyi badi basombe munkatshi muenu mu mitanda, badi bamunguila nkunyi, banusunyina mayi." 
Deuteronomy29:11 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi utua nenu ndondu ewu mpindiewu. Udi unulomba bua nuditshipe ne: netukumbaje ndondu ewu." 
Deuteronomy29:12 Nanku nuenu bena Izrayele, nenuikale tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Yeye neikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bu muvuaye mumane kunulaya, muditshipe kabidi kudi bankambua benu, Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy29:13 Ndondu unudi batue ne Mvidi Mukulu, ke undi nnuambila bua nuitabe patoke ne: netukumbaje. Ndondu ewu, kena anu buenu nuenu, badi bimane muaba ewu lelu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila to." 
Deuteronomy29:14 Kadi udi bua bantu bonsu, ne bua badi muaba ewu lelu, ne bua ndelanganyi yenu yonsu, nansha bua badibu kabayi banji kulela." 
Deuteronomy29:15 Nudi bamanye mushindu utuvua mu Ejipitu, ne mushindu utuvua bapitshile mu matunga a bisamba bionsu bivua mu njila." 
Deuteronomy29:16 Nuenu kunudimuena bintu bibi bia tshianana bivua bantu batendelela: mpingu ya mvidie ya mabue, ya mitshi misonga, ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Deuteronomy29:17 Nanku muntu nansha umue wa kunudi, ne mulume ne mukaji, tshisamba nansha tshimue, diku nansha dimue, kanuena mua kubenga Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu bua kutendelela mvidie ya bisamba ebi to. Bualu muntu udi wenza nanku, udi bu mutshi wa lulengu munkatshi mua bantu." 
Deuteronomy29:18 Muntu yonsu wa kunudi udi ubenga bindi nnuambila ebi, wela meji ne: “Nansha meme muenze malu mabi, kakuena tshidi mua kungenze-kela,” wambila kabidi bantu bakuabu bua kutendelela mvidie," 
Deuteronomy29:19 muntu awu, Maweja-Nangila kakumufuila luse to. Kakuanyisha nansha kakese muntu udi umutombokela. Neamufuile munda bikole. Neamunyoke ne manyoka onsu mashilangane, adibu bafunde mu mukanda ewu. Kabakuvuluka nansha dina diende kabidi pa buloba to." 
Deuteronomy29:20 Maweja-Nangila neamupeteshe diakabi, amumushe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bilondeshile manyoka adibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya ndondu ewu." 
Deuteronomy29:21 Ndelanganyi yenu, ne bantu benyi badi munkatshi muenu bafume ku matunga a kule, pamonabu mushindu udi Maweja-Nangila munukengeshe ne bipupu, nebambe ne:" 
Deuteronomy29:22 “Ditunga dijima edi ndimane kunyanguka ku kapia, kabidi ne luepu. Kakuena mushindu wa kumiaminamu nansha wa kukunamu biakudia. Nansha bisosa mene kabiena bitolokamu. Bualu ditunga edi ndifuanangane ne bimenga bia Sodome ne Ngomore, Adma ne Seboyime, bivua Maweja-Nangila mubutule pawaye ne tshiji tshikole. ”" 
Deuteronomy29:23 Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bionsu, pamonabu bualu ebu, nebakeme, bebejangana ne: “Maweja-Nangila uvua ne tshiji tshikole nanku bua tshinyi? Uvua mukengeshe bena ditunga edi mushindu ewu bualu kaayi?”" 
Deuteronomy29:24 Pashishe nebandamune ne: “Dikenga edi ndibakuate bualu bena ditunga edi kabena bakumbaje ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu, mutue nabu pawaye mubapatule mu Ejipitu." 
Deuteronomy29:25 Bena ditunga bavua batendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu bivuabu kabayi bamanye, ivua Maweja-Nangila mubakandike, bua kabayenzedi mudimu." 
Deuteronomy29:26 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila mufike munda bikole, mubanyoke ne manyoka mashilangane, adibu bafunde mu mukanda ewu." 
Deuteronomy29:27 Ke padiye mubipate ne tshiji mu ditunga diabu, mubatume mu ditunga dia bende, didibu basombe too ne mpindiewu.”" 
Deuteronomy29:28 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu nkayende mmumanye malu masokome. Kadi tuetu ne ndelanganyi yetu, tudi bamanye anu malu adi Maweja-Nangila mutumanyishe bua kashidi, mmomumue ne: tudi bamanye mikenji yende itudi ne bua kukumbaja tshiendelele." 
Deuteronomy30:1 Malu onsu andi munufundile, diakalenga nansha diakabi, neakumbane. Pikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu munutangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu benyi, nenushishe kudikonka pa malu aa." 
Deuteronomy30:2 Nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu, nenupingane kabidi kudi Maweja-Nangila, bua kukumbaja meyi ende ne mikenji yende, bindi nnumanyisha lelu ebi. Nenubitumikile ne muoyi mujima, ne bukole buenu bonsu." 
Deuteronomy30:3 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neandamune malu enu. Neamuenzele bimpe, neanumushe mu matunga onsu avuaye munutangalaje. Neanupingaje mu ditunga dienu." 
Deuteronomy30:4 Nansha nuenu bikale diba adi mu bupika ku ndekelu kua buloba, neanukebeku. Neanusangishe," 
Deuteronomy30:5 bua kunupingaja mu ditunga dia bankambua benu. Nenusombemu. Maweja-Nangila neanuenzele bimpe bipite bivuaye muenzele bankambua benu. Nenubapite ku bungi. 
Deuteronomy30:6 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nkayende nealengeje mioyi yenu, ne ya ndelanganyi yenu, bua numunange ne muoyi mujima, ne bukole buenu buonsu, bua nuenu kushala ne muoyi." 
Deuteronomy30:7 Nanku makenga onsu amvua munumanyishe, Maweja-Nangila neaatumine anu baluishi benu ne bantu badi banukina." 
Deuteronomy30:8 Kadi nuenu nenumutumikile tshiakabidi, nukumbaje mikenji yende yonsu indi nnumanyisha lelu eyi mu dina diende." 
Deuteronomy30:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu neatungunuke midimu yenu; ne anupe bana bavule. Nyama yenu neivulangane, biakudia bitshiompoka. Bualu bivua Maweja-Nangila muenzele bankambua benu, neanuenzelebi nuenu." 
Deuteronomy30:10 Bionsu ebi nebinuenzekele panudi nuitaba Maweja-Nangila, nukumbaja mikenji yende, idi mu mukanda ewu, nupingana kudiye muenu muonsu, kabidi ne muoyi mujima." 
Deuteronomy30:11 Mikenji indi nnumanyisha lelu eyi, kayena minupite lungenyi, kayena kule." 
Deuteronomy30:12 Kayena mu diulu, bua nuambe ne: “Muntu wabanda mu diulu, bua kutuangatshilayi bua tuetu kuyimanya, kuyikumbaja nnganyi?”" 
Deuteronomy30:13 Mikenji eyi kayena dishiya dia Mayi manene, bua nuenu kuamba ne: “Muntu wasabuka mayi bua kutuangatshilayi bua tuetu kuyimanya, kuyikumbaja nnganyi?”" 
Deuteronomy30:14 Kayena kule nansha kakese. Mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu idi pabuipi nenu, idi mukana muenu, ne munda muenu. Nudi mua kuyikumbaja." 
Deuteronomy30:15 Bena Izrayele, tangilayi: lelu ndi nteka kumpala kuenu, luseke elu muoyi ne diakalenga, luseke lualua lufu ne diakabi." 
Deuteronomy30:16 Nudimuke, nukumbaje mikenji indi nnuambila lelu eyi: nunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nulonde njila idiye unuleja, nutumikile meyi ende ne mikenji yende. Nanku nenushale ne muoyi; nenuvulangane. Maweja-Nangila neanuenzele bimpe mu ditunga dinuakuata." 
Deuteronomy30:17 Kadi panuabenga kutumikila Maweja-Nangila, panuikala basue kutendelela mvidie, kuyenzela mudimu," 
Deuteronomy30:18 nenubutuke bonsu. Ndi ndianza kunuambila lelu ne: nuenu benze nanku, panuafika dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, kanuakushala ne muoyi matuku a bungi mu ditunga dinuakuata adi to." 
Deuteronomy30:19 Nanku ndi nnujadikila lelu kumpala kua diulu ne buloba ne: nusungule tshinudi basue: ndi nteka muoyi ne diakalenga luseke, lufu ne diakabi lukuabu. Mbimpe nusungule muoyi, bua nushale bena diakalenga, nuenu ne ndelanganyi yenu." 
Deuteronomy30:20 Nangayi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numutumikile, numuitabe ne muoyi umue. Nanku nenushale ne muoyi bidimu bia bungi mu ditunga di-vuaye mulaye bankambua benu, Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy31:1 Moshe kuambila kabidi bena Izrayele bonsu ne: 
Deuteronomy31:2 — Mpindiewu mbakumbaji bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi. Tshiena ne bukole bua kunulombola kabidi to. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kungambila ne: tshiakufika dishiya dia Yardene to. 
Deuteronomy31:3 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu nkayende, neende kumpala kuenu. Neabutule bonsu badi base dishiya dia Yardene, bua nukuate ditunga adi. Yoshuwa neikale mfumuenu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Deuteronomy31:4 Maweja-Nangila neabutule bena ditunga adi, bu muvuaye mubutule Sihone ne Oge, bakalenga ba bena Amore, ne matunga abu." 
Deuteronomy31:5 Neafile bena ditunga adi mu bianza bienu. Nenubenzele bionsu bindi mumane kunuambila. 
Deuteronomy31:6 Koleshayi muoyi, kankamanayi, kanutshinyi bena ditunga adi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi munkatshi muenu. Kakunulekela to." 
Deuteronomy31:7 Pashishe Moshe kubikila Yoshuwa, kumuambila, bena Izrayele bonsu bateleja, ne: — Kankamana! Kolesha muoyi. Wewe neufikishe bena Izrayele bonsu mu ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bankambua babu. Wewe neubabanyine miaba ya kuasa." 
Deuteronomy31:8 Maweja-Nangila neende kumpala kuebe, neikale nebe, kayi ukulekela. Nanku kutshinyi, kuzakadi to, kutekeshi mu maboku." 
Deuteronomy31:9 Moshe kufunda mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, kuyipesha batuangaji, ndelanganyi ya bena Levi, bavua ne mudimu wa kuambula mushete uvua ne mikenji ya ndondu. Kuyipeshaye kabidi bakulu ba bena Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy31:10 Moshe kubambila ne: — Padi bidimu muanda mutekete bikumbane, nuafiki ku tshikondu tshia kulekelangana mabanza, ne tshia kuenza tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa." 
Deuteronomy31:11 Nusangishe bena Izrayele bonsu muaba umue, balume, bakaji, bana, ne bantu benyi badi munkatshi muenu. Nubabadile mikenji eyi kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila, muaba wikalaye musungule." 
Deuteronomy31:12 Padibu bababadile mikenji nanku, bantu nebanemeke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Nebakumbaje mikenji yende." 
Deuteronomy31:13 Nanku bana bonsu badi kabayi banji kumanya mikenji eyi, nebayumvue, nebamanye mua kunemeka Maweja-Nangila, matuku onsu anuikala dishiya dia Yardene, mu ditunga dinuakuata." 
Deuteronomy31:14 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Ukadi pa kufua. Bikila Yoshuwa. Nufike nende kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bua mmumanyishe mikenji yanyi. Moshe ne Yoshuwa kuya ku ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Deuteronomy31:15 Maweja-Nangila kubamuenekela mu divuba dia muinshi, divua mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
Deuteronomy31:16 Maweja-Nangila kudianjila kumanyisha Moshe ne: — Ukadi pa kufua. Kunyima kua lufu luebe bena Izrayele nebatendelele mvidie idibu batendelela kudi bantu benyi badi mu ditunga dinuabuela. Bena Izrayele nebambenge. Nebanyangakaje ndondu umvua mutue nabu. 
Deuteronomy31:17 Nanku nembafikile munda, mbalekela, bua babakengeshe bikole kudi bisamba bikuabu. Nebajadike mudi makenga aa abenzekela, bualu meme Mvidi Mukulu tshiena kabidi munkatshi muabu." 
Deuteronomy31:18 Dituku adi, nembalekele bulelela, bualu mbenze malu mabi, batendelela mvidie." 
Deuteronomy31:19 Mpindiewu wewe Moshe, ndi nkulongesha musambu, uufunde, ulongeshe bena Izrayele, baumanye, bua padibu bawimba, bajadike ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu ndi munkatshi muabu. Malu adi mu musambu awu neanusonguele." 
Deuteronomy31:20 Nanku meme nemfikishe bena Izrayele mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, dimvua mulaye bankambua babu, bua badie batshionkomoka. Nebikalemu ne disanka. Kadi nebampeje, nebatendelele mvidie ya bantu benyi. Nebanyangakaje ndondu umvua mutue nabu." 
Deuteronomy31:21 Bena Izrayele nebapete ntatu ne makenga makole. Kadi meyi a musambu ewu neanusonguele. Bualu ndelanganyi yonsu ya bena Izrayele neikale imba anu musambu ewu. Meme ndi mumanye meji adi bena Izrayele nawu mpindiewu, tshiyi muanji kubafikisha mu ditunga dimvua mubalaye." 
Deuteronomy31:22 Dituku adi Moshe kufunda musambu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuambile, bua kulongeshaye bena Izrayele." 
Deuteronomy31:23 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kukolesha Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ku muoyi, umuambila ne: “Kutshinyi, kuzakadi. Wewe neufikishe bena Izrayele mu ditunga dia Kenaane dimvua mubalaye. Meme nengikale nebe.”" 
Deuteronomy31:24 Moshe kufunda mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila yonsu mu mukanda. Ujikija kufunda," 
Deuteronomy31:25 kuambilaye bena Levi bavua ne mudimu wa kuambula mushete wa Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Deuteronomy31:26 — Angatayi mukanda ewu wa mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, nuuteke pabuipi ne mushete wa ndondu. Mukanda ewu, newikale ujadikila bena Izrayele ne: nansha bobu babenge Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, kadi yeye udi anu munkatshi muabu." 
Deuteronomy31:27 Meme Moshe ndi mumanye ne: bena Izrayele badi ne tshitunu, badi bonsu bantomboji. Mpindiewu pantshidi ne muoyi munkatshi muabu, bakabenga Maweja-Nangila. Kadi pambafua, nebamubenge bikole." 
Deuteronomy31:28 Mpindiewu wewe Yoshuwa, bikila bakulu ba ditunga ne balombodi ba bisamba bienu. Basemene pabuipi nanyi, bua meme Moshe nebalongeshe musambu ewu ne diyi dikole kumpala kua diulu ne buloba, bua kujadika ne: nansha bobu babenge Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, kadi yeye udi munkatshi muabu." 
Deuteronomy31:29 Ndi mumanye ne: pambafua, bena Izrayele nebenze bibi, nebabenge bionsu bimvua mubambile. Nanku nebikale bena diakabi, bualu bavua benza muabu muonsu bua kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, kumufikisha munda." 
Deuteronomy31:30 Pashishe Moshe, kulongesha bena Izrayele bonsu musambu ewu ne:" 
Deuteronomy32:1 Diulu, teleja tshindi ngamba, buloba, umvua miaku yanyi." 
Deuteronomy32:2 Bindi ndongesha bitampakane miaba yonsu, bu mudi mvula usankisha madimi. Mibelu yanyi imuangalake, mudi lumuma lutangalaka ku bisosa." 
Deuteronomy32:3 Ndi ntumbisha dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Bena Izrayele, samunayi Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Deuteronomy32:4 Maweja-Nangila udi ne bukole bu lubuebue. Bionsu bidiye wenza, bidi bimpe. Bidiye wamba, bidi bilelela. Bidiye ulaya, udi ubikumbaja. Udi wenza amu malu mimpe." 
Deuteronomy32:5 Kadi nuenu, bena Izrayele, nudi bantu babi, bapale. Nudi babenge Maweja-Nangila, batufuisha bundu. Kanutshiena bana bende kabidi to." 
Deuteronomy32:6 Nudi bantu ba tshianana, kanuyi lungenyi! Munudi nuenzela Maweja-Nangila nanku mbishi? Kena Tatuenu, kena mufuki wenu anyi? Kena munusungule, bua nuikale bantu bende anyi?" 
Deuteronomy32:7 Vulukayi matuku a kale. Elayi meji ku bidimu bimane kupita. Ebejayi baledi benu, nebanuambile bivua bienzeka. Konkayi bakulumpe, nebanulondele malu a kale." 
Deuteronomy32:8 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, mmuabanyine bantu matunga. Udi mushindike mikalu ya bisamba, muteke tshisamba tshionsu ku bumfumu bua muena mu diulu." 
Deuteronomy32:9 Udi mudisunguile bena Izrayele, muenze ndelanganyi ya Yakobe bantu bende." 
Deuteronomy32:10 Maweja-Nangila kusangana bena Izrayele mu tshipela, munkatshi mua miadi ya mibuabua. Kubakubaye, kubalongeshaye, kubalamaye bu mudi muntu ulama disu." 
Deuteronomy32:11 Maweja-Nangila udi ukuba bena Izrayele, mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi upapala pa mutu pa disua diende, wibidija bana bende bua kubuka mulu, nansha wolola mapuapua muinshi mua bana bua kabamatshi panshi." 
Deuteronomy32:12 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila nkayende mmulombodi wa bena Izrayele, kakuyi mvidie mukuabu nansha umue umuambuluisha." 
Deuteronomy32:13 Maweja-Nangila mmubapeshe ditunga dia mikuna, mubadishe ne biakudia bia mu madimi, mubapatule buitshi mu lubuebue. Mmumeneshe mitshi ya olive mu buloba bua mabue." 
Deuteronomy32:14 Ngombe ne mikoku kubapesha mabele. Bana ba mikoku, bimpanga bia mafuta ne mbuji ya mpumbu, kubapetesha munyinyi. Kudiabu bukula buimpe butambe, banua ne maluvu a mvinyo, makunze bu mashi." 
Deuteronomy32:15 Yeshurune mumane kudia mukute, mumane kudiunda, kusenena, kulengulula Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumufuke, kupetula mulami wende ne mupandishi." 
Deuteronomy32:16 Bena Izrayele bavua bafikisha Maweja-Nangila munda, benza malu mabi, batendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu." 
Deuteronomy32:17 Kulambulabu bifukibua, kabiyi nansha mvidie, milambu. Mvidie mipiamipia ayi, kabavua bayimanye. Bankambua kabavua bayinemeka." 
Deuteronomy32:18 “Eyowa, bena Izrayele, nudi balengulula Maweja-Nangila, mulami wenu uvua munupeteshe muoyi. Yeye ke udi munufikishe ku bantu.”" 
Deuteronomy32:19 Maweja-Nangila umona muvua bana bende bamuseka, uvua ne kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Deuteronomy32:20 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: “Tshiena mua kutekemena kudi bena Izrayele to. Kabena ne kanemu nansha kakese to. Tshiena musue kubalama kabidi to. Nemmone bidi mua kubenzekela. 
Deuteronomy32:21 Bena Izrayele mbamfikishe munda, bajule tshiiji tshianyi, bualu neatendelele mvidie ya dishima. Nanku meme nembasongakaje ne tshisamba tshia bantu, tshidi katshiyi tshisamba mene. Nenjule tshiiji tshiabu, ne bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi." 
Deuteronomy32:22 Eyowa, Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ne tshiiji tshikole, tshidi tshifika too ne mu kandondu ka bafue. Tshidi tshiosha, bu mudi kapia kosha biakudia, kabibutula, tshidi tshiosha too ne tshitaku tshia mikuna." 
Deuteronomy32:23 Ndi musue kubavudijila makenga. Ndi musue kubasa mikete yanyi yonsu. 
Deuteronomy32:24 Nzala mimane kutekesha bena Izrayele, mubidi luya ne disama dia tshiambu bimane kubakuata, nembatumine nyama ya lonji, kabidi ne nyoka ya lulengu." 
Deuteronomy32:25 Nebabashipe ne muele mu misesu. Nebafue ne bowa mu nzubu yabu. Lufu nelubakuate bonsu, bansongalume ne bansongakaji, bakulumpe ne bana.”" 
Deuteronomy32:26 “Mvua musue kubutula bena Izrayele bonsu, kabayi mua kubatela kabidi pa buloba."
