Deuteronomy32:27 Kadi bena lukuna babu bavua mua kunseka, kuela meji ne: tuetu ke bavua bababutule, Maweja-Nangila kena ne tshidiye wenza." 
Deuteronomy32:28 Bena Izrayele ntshisamba tshidi katshiyi ne meji, mbantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi." 
Deuteronomy32:29 Bobu bele meji kakese, bavua mua kutshinka kudi buenzayi buabu mua kubafikisha." 
Deuteronomy32:30 Pandi meme Maweja-Nangila, lubuebue ludi bukole buabu, mbafila mu bianza bia baluishi babu, muluishi umue neatshimune bena Izrayele tshinunu, baluishi babidi nebanyemeshe bena Izrayele binunu dikumi." 
Deuteronomy32:31 Kadi baluishi ba bena Izrayele mene mbamanye ne: mvidie yabu idi ibalama kayena ne bukole, bu bua Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele to." 
Deuteronomy32:32 Baluishi abu, badi amu bu bena Sodome ne bena Ngomore. Mbafuanangane ne mutshi wa mvinyo, udi ukuama tumuma tua bululu ne tua lulengu." 
Deuteronomy32:33 Maluyu abu a mvinyo, adi bu lulengu lua nyoka." 
Deuteronomy32:34 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, teleja tshindi ndongolola mu musokoku, bua kukengesha baluishi benu." 
Deuteronomy32:35 Dituku dia kabutu, nembasombuele, bua bapete difutu dia buenzayi buabu. Dituku dia kubutula baluishi ba bena Izrayele, dikadi pabuipi, bukole buabu nebujimine.”" 
Deuteronomy32:36 Padi bena Izrayele kabatshiyi ne bukole, kabayi ne muntu udi mua kubambuluisha. Maweja-Nangila neabafuile luse. Neabambuluishe, akosa nsambu yabu pa yoyi." 
Deuteronomy32:37 Maweja-Nangila neebeje bena Izrayele ne: “Mvidie yenu inuvua batekemene idi penyi? 
Deuteronomy32:38 Nuvua bayilambule nyama, bayilambule maluvu a kunua. Nanku ileje bukole buayi, inupandishe, inulame ne muoyi!" 
Deuteronomy32:39 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, nujadike lelu ne: meme Maweja-Nangila nkayanyi, ndi nnusungidila. Kakuena mvidie mukuabu to, anu meme. Meme ndi mfuisha bantu, mbalama ne muoyi. Ndi mbatapa mputa, mbondapa kabidi. Udi mua kunyenga muntu mu tshianza tshianyi udiku anyi?" 
Deuteronomy32:40 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nditshipa, ngela tshianza mulu, ngamba ne: ‘Ndi ne muoyi kashidi ne kashidi." 
Deuteronomy32:41 Ndi nnona muele wanyi wa mvita, ndi ndumbuluisha bantu, mbanyoka. Ndi musue kusombuela baluishi banyi, kufuta bonsu badi bankina." 
Deuteronomy32:42 Mikete yanyi neitampakane mashi, muele wanyi neukose munyinyi. Baluishi banyi bonsu nebabutuke, nembakuate; nebatapike mputa.’ ”" 
Deuteronomy32:43 Bisamba bionsu bitumbishe bantu ba Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila neasombuele bua lufu lua bantu bende. Neanyoke baluishi ba bena Izrayele bonsu. Neafuile ditunga dia bena Izrayele luse, neasambe benadi." 
Deuteronomy32:44 Moshe ne Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, kuimana kumpala kua bena Izrayele, kubabadila miaku yonsu ya musambu ewu ne diyi dikole." 
Deuteronomy32:45 Moshe mumane kumanyisha bena Izrayele malu onsu avua Maweja-Nangila muambe," 
Deuteronomy32:46 kubabelaye ne: — Mikenji yonsu indi nnuambila lelu eyi, nuyikumbaje. Nuyilongeshe ndelanganyi yenu, bua ikumbaje tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Deuteronomy32:47 Mikenji eyi kayena anu meyi patupu, kadi idi inupetesha muoyi. Nuenu bayikumbaje, nenushale ne muoyi matuku a bungi mu ditunga dinuyaya kubuela dishiya dia Yardene." 
Deuteronomy32:48 Anu dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne:" 
Deuteronomy32:49 — Uye pa mukuna wa Abarime, mu ditunga dia Mowabe, pabuipi ne Yeriko. Ubande ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Nebo. Ubandile ditunga dia Kenaane, dindi mpesha bena Izrayele bua dishale diabu." 
Deuteronomy32:50 Pashishe neufuile pa mukuna apu, bua ulonde bankambua bebe. Ke muvua muanenu Arone mufuile pa mukuna wa Ore, mulonde bankambua bende." 
Deuteronomy32:51 Wewe ne Arone, nuvua bangenzele bibi bitambe, bena Izrayele bonsu bamone, mu Kadeshe mu tshipela tshia Tsine, bua tshilumbu tshia mayi a ku Meriba. Nuvua ne mpata, kanuvua banyishe bua meme kuleja ne: ndi wa tshijila." 
Deuteronomy32:52 Nanku, ditunga dia Kenaane dindi mpesha bena Izrayele, wewe Moshe neudimuene anu pa bule. Kadi kuena ubuelamu to." 
Deuteronomy33:1 Moshe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu kayi muanji kufua, kuelaye bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia Izrayele lupemba, wamba ne:" 
Deuteronomy33:2 Maweja-Nangila mmufume ku mukuna wa Sinayi, mmujuke mu ditunga dia Seyire, bu diba, mmubande pa mukuna wa Parane, bua kuleja bantu butumbi buende. Batumibue binunu badi benda nende. Mmufike kudi bena diende, mukuate ku bianza mikenji idi ikenka bu kapia." 
Deuteronomy33:3 Maweja-Nangila mmunange bisamba bia bena Izrayele. Udi ukuba bonsu badi bamuitaba, bimane ku makasa ende bua kumvua mibelu yende." 
Deuteronomy33:4 Mikenji idi Moshe mutupe, ke tshiuma tshia ndelanganyi ya Yakobe." 
Deuteronomy33:5 Pavua bamfumu ba bena Izrayele badisangishe, pamue ne bisamba biabu bionsu, kumanyabu ne: Maweja-Nangila ke mukalenga wa bena Yeshurune." 
Deuteronomy33:6 Moshe kubela lupemba wamba ne: “Tshisamba tshia bena Rubene tshishale ne muoyi! Nansha tshiotshi ne bantu bakese, katshijiminyi kashidi tshiendelele.”" 
Deuteronomy33:7 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya bena Yuda lupemba, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, bena Yuda badi bakubikila, ubateleje! Ubambuluishe, bua bumvuangane ne bana babu! Bavua badiluila mvita ne bukitu. Ubakuatshishe, batshimune baluishi babu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:8 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya bena Levi lupemba, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, udi mupeshe batuangaji, ndelanganyi ya Levi, Urime ne Tumime, bintu bia tshijila, bualu badi bakuitaba muabu muonsu. Uvua mubatete ku Masa, mubabingishe ku mayi a Meriba." 
Deuteronomy33:9 Bena levi mbakunange wewe Maweja-Nangila, bipite mudibu bananga baledi babu, bena meku abu, nansha bana babu badibu balele. Ke muvuabu bakumbaje mikenji yebe, banemeke nanku ndondu webe." 
Deuteronomy33:10 Bena Levi badi balongesha bena Izrayele mikenji yebe. Badi balambula pa tshilambuilu tshiebe milambu ya manananshi, ne ya kuosha." 
Deuteronomy33:11 Maweja-Nangila, upeshe bena Levi bukole, ubele lupemba mu midimu yabu yonsu. Babutule baluishi babu bonsu nkong, bapanga bukole kashidi.”" 
Deuteronomy33:12 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Binyamine lupemba, wamba ne: “Binyamine ntshisamba tshidi Maweja-Nangila mupite kunanga. Badi basomba talala pabuipi ne Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Maweja-Nangila udi ubalama matuku onsu, usomba munkatshi muabu. ”" 
Deuteronomy33:13 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Yozefe lupemba, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuele ditunga dia Yozefe lupemba. Buloba buabu budi bupeta tshitalela tshia mu diulu, bupeta kabidi mayi adi afuma muinshi mua buloba." 
Deuteronomy33:14 Munya udi umenesha biakudia pa madimi abu. Badi banowa bipiabipia ku ngondu ku ngondu. 
Deuteronomy33:15 Ditunga diabu didi ne mikuna minene ne mikese, idi ipatula biakudia, ku kale ne ku lelu." 
Deuteronomy33:16 Bubanji buonsu bua mu ditunga dimpe edi, diakalenga dia Mvidi Mukulu udi mu tshipuka, bipueke pa tshisamba tshia Yozefe, udi Mvidi Mukulu musungule mfumu wa bana babu." 
Deuteronomy33:17 Yozefe apete lumu! Udi mukole bu ngombe mulume, udi ne nsengu ibidi bu ya nyama wa mbowa, ya kutshimuna nayi bisamba bikuabu, kubipata too ne ku ndekelu wa buloba. Lusengu lumue ke bantu binunu ne binunu ba bena Efrayime, lukuabu ke bantu nkama ne nkama ba bena Menashe.”" 
Deuteronomy33:18 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Zebulone ne Isakare lupemba, wamba ne: “Bena Zebulone, bangenda-mushinga, basanke mu ngendu yabu! Bena Isakare, basombe talala mu ntenta yabu!" 
Deuteronomy33:19 Nubikile bena mutumba nenu pa mukuna wa tshijila, bua kulambulamu milambu bu mudi mikenji yamba. Bubanji buenu mbufume mu Mayi manene, ne mu biuma bisokome mu lusenga. ”" 
Deuteronomy33:20 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Ngade lupemba, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Ke Yeye udi mupeshe bena Ngade ditunga dinene! Bena Ngade mbalale bu nyama wa ntambue, ukeba mua kukuata nyama, kumudia mujima, ne maboku ne mutu!" 
Deuteronomy33:21 Ngade mmudisunguile mu ditunga, maloba mimpe makumbanyine bukalenga. Udi mudisangishe ne bamfumu ba bisamba, bua kukumbaja bidi Maweja-Nangila musue, bua kukuatshila bena Izrayele bakuabu mudimu mu dina diende. ”" 
Deuteronomy33:22 Moshe kuela Dane lupemba, wamba ne: “Dane udi utupika bu muana wa ntambue, ufuma ku mikuna ya mu Bashane. ”" 
Deuteronomy33:23 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Naftali lupemba, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuele Naftali lupemba, mumusankishe ne bintu bivule. Ditunga diende nedialabale, diye kuinshi muditunga, diye kabidi luseke ludi diba dibuelela!”" 
Deuteronomy33:24 Moshe kuela ndelanganyi ya Ashere lupemba, wamba ne: “Bena Ashere mbena diakalenga munkatshi mua bana ba Yakobe. Bana babu bonsu nebabanange. Mitshi yabu neyipatule mafuta a bungi. Neboweshe makasa abu mu mafuta." 
Deuteronomy33:25 Tshiibi tshia mu tshimenga tshia bena Ashere, nebatshikange ne milonda ya tshiamu tshikunze. Bena Ashere badi basombamu bimpe, ne bukole matuku onsu atshidibu ne muoyi panu.”" 
Deuteronomy33:26 Pashishe Moshe kuamba ne: “Nuenu bena Yeshurune, numanye ne: kakuena mvidie udi ufuana Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Udi upitshila mu diulu, upueka, wenda pa mavuba, anu bua kuvua kunuambuluisha." 
Deuteronomy33:27 Matuku onsu Maweja-Nangila udi unulama, udi ne bukole bunene pa buloba bujima, uvua nabu kale, udi nabu lelu. Udi unuipatshila baluishi benu, nuenu batangile, unuamba bua kubabutula." 
Deuteronomy33:28 “Bena Izrayele badi basomba talala. Ndelanganyi ya Yakobe mmisombe bimpe, mu ditunga didi ne ntete ya kuenza bukula, kabidi ne mitshi ya maluvu a mvinyo. Bualu badi bapeta tshitalela tshifuma mu diulu." 
Deuteronomy33:29 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi bena diakalenga, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmunupandishe amu nuenu nkayenu! Maweja-Nangila udi ngabu wenu, unulama. Udi muele wa mvita, unuambuluisha bua kutshimuna. Baluishi benu nebanulombe luse, nenudiate ditambisha diabu mu makasa.”" 
Deuteronomy34:1 Moshe kumuka mu mpata ya Mowabe, kubanda pa mukuna wa Nebo, ku lusongu lua Pisga, ludi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yeriko. Maweja-Nangila kumuleja ditunga dia Kenaane dijima, kutuadijila ku ditunga dia Ngilaade too ne dia Dane," 
Deuteronomy34:2 maloba a bena Naftali, bena Efrayime, bena Menashe, bena Yuda, too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga," 
Deuteronomy34:3 buloba bua kuinshi mu ditunga, ne tshibandabanda tshia Yardene, ditunga dia Yeriko (tshimenga tshia mabue a ngaji) ne ku Soware." 
Deuteronomy34:4 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Moshe ne: — Tangila ditunga dimvua mulaye Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe, mubambile ne: “Nempeshe ndelanganyi yenu ditunga edi.” Ndi nkulejiladi anu pa bule, kadi kuena ufikamu to." 
Deuteronomy34:5 Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, kufuila mu ditunga dia Mowabe, anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Deuteronomy34:6 Mvidi Mukulu nkayende kumujika, mu tshibandabanda tshia mu Mowabe, tshidi tshitangilangana ne musoku wa Bete-Peyore. Too ne lelu kakuena muntu udi mujadike muaba udibu bamujike." 
Deuteronomy34:7 Moshe ufuile muikale ne bidimu lukama ne makumi abidi. Kadi, utshivua anu ne bukole bua bungi, kayi muanji kukulakaja to. Mesu ende atshivua anu amona bimpe." 
Deuteronomy34:8 Bena Izrayele kuteka madilu ende matuku makumi asatu mu mpata ya Mowabe. 
Deuteronomy34:9 Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, uvua muntu wa meji a bungi. Bualu Moshe uvua mumane kumujidila, mumutenteke bianza. Biangatshile diba adi, bena Izrayele bonsu kutuadija kuitaba bionsu bivua Yoshuwa ubambila. Kukumbajabu mikenji yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila mubatumine kudi Moshe." 
Deuteronomy34:10 Mu bena Izrayele, katshia kamuvua muambi mukuabu bu Moshe to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua wakula nende mpala ne mpala batangilangane." 
Deuteronomy34:11 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumutume mu Ejipitu, bua kuenza bishima kumpala kua mukalenga wa ditunga adi, balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, ne bantu bende bonsu." 
Deuteronomy34:12 Moshe uvua muenze malu a dikema ne bukole bua bungi, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile." 
Joshua1:1 Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, mumane kufua, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, uvua wambuluisha Moshe ne:" 
Joshua1:2 — Moshe, muntu wanyi, mmumane kufua. Mpindiewu, wewe udi ne bua kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, pamue ne bena Izrayele bonsu, bua ubafikishe mu ditunga dindi mubapeshe." 
Joshua1:3 Ndi nnupesha miaba yonsu inudi nupitshila, bu mumvua mumane kulaya Moshe." 
Joshua1:4 Ditunga dienu nedialabale, biangatshile ku tshipela, kuinshi mu ditunga, too ne ku mikuna ya Lebanone ku mutu mu ditunga, biangatshile ku musulu munene wa Perate, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, dipitshila mu ditunga dia bena Iti, too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga adi luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Joshua1:5 Matuku onsu autshidi panu ne muoyi aa, muntu kena mua kukupita bukole to. Meme nengikale nebe, bu mumvua ne Moshe. Kashidi tshiendelele tshiena nkulekela. Nenkuambuluishe misangu yonsu." 
Joshua1:6 Kolesha muoyi, kutekeshi mu maboku to. Bualu wewe neulombole bena Izrayele, bua kukuatabu ditunga dimvua mulaye bankambua babu." 
Joshua1:7 Wewe kolesha muoyi, kutshinyi to. Kumbaja bimpe mikenji yanyi yonsu ivua Moshe muntu wanyi mukuambile. Kulenguludi mukenji nansha umue. Nanku wewe muyikumbaje yonsu, neupete dikasa dimpe mu bionsu biudi wenza." 
Joshua1:8 Nanku ubalulule amu kubalulula malongesha adi mu mukanda wa mikenji. Udikonke, udiele meji bua malu awu, butuku ne munya, bua ukumbaje bionsu bidibu bafunda mu mukanda awu. Nanku, bionsu biudi muele meji a kuenza nebikumbane. Neupete dikasa dimpe." 
Joshua1:9 Ndi mumane kukuambila ne: kolesha muoyi, kutshinyi, kuzakadi, kutekeshi mu maboku. Bualu meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, nengikale nebe konsu kuudi uya." 
Joshua1:10 Yoshuwa kutumina balombodi ba bena Izrayele diyi," 
Joshua1:11 bua bendakane mu mitanda, bambile bantu bua bakumbaje mikenji itudi tutela eyi: “Nuenu bena Izrayele, nulongolole biakudia. Bualu papita matuku asatu, nenusabuke Yardene bua kuya kukuata ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munupeshe bua kusomba.”" 
Joshua1:12 Ke Yoshuwa kuyukila ne bantu balume ba bena Rubene, ba bena Ngade ne ba tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, ubambila ne:" 
Joshua1:13 — Nuvuluke miaku ivua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, munumanyishe musangu uvuaye wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmuanyishe bua nuenu kuasa mu ditunga didiye munupeshe, didi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene.”" 
Joshua1:14 Nanku bakaji benu, bana benu, bimuna bienu, nebishale dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, muaba udi Moshe munufikishe. Kadi nuenu, bantu balume badi ne makanda a kuluangana mvita, nuambule bia mvita, nupite kumpala kua bana benu, bua kusabuka Yardene. Nubambuluishe," 
Joshua1:15 too ne padi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu muanyishe bua bana benu bakuate ditunga, didiye mubapeshe bu muvuaye munuambuluishe nuenu bua nupete ditunga. Pashishe nenupingane bua kuasa mu ditunga divua Moshe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, munuabanyine luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua1:16 Bena bisamba ebi kuandamuna Yoshuwa ne: — Netukumbaje bionsu biudi mutuambile. Netuye muaba onsu uudi ututuma. 
Joshua1:17 Netutumikile diyi diebe menemene, bu mutuvua tutumikila dia Moshe. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe neikale nebe bulelela, bu muvuaye ne Moshe." 
Joshua1:18 Muntu yonsu udi ukutombokela, ubenga mua kutumikila biudi wamba, nebamushipe. Kadi wewe kolesha muoyi. Kutekeshi mu maboku to!" 
Joshua2:1 Diba divua Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, mu mitanda ya mu Shitime, kutumaye bantu babidi mu musokoku bua baye kutentekela mudi ditunga ne tshimenga bia Yeriko. Batentekedi babidi abu, bamane kufika mu Yeriko, kulalabu kua mukaji muena tshiendenda, dina diende Rakabe." 
Joshua2:2 Mukalenga wa bena Yeriko, kumvua muvua bena Izrayele babidi bafike mu tshimenga butuku, bua kutentekela mudi ditunga." 
Joshua2:3 Nanku kutuminaye Rakabe diyi, umuambila ne: — Rakabe, patula bantu balume badi bafike kuebe bua kutentekela ditunga, utupeshebu." 
Joshua2:4 Rakabe kumuka ne bantu babidi abu, kubasokoka. Pashishe kuandamunaye ne: — Bantu balume bavua bafike kuanyi bulelela. Kadi tshivua mumanye kuvuabu bafume to." 
Joshua2:5 Mbamane kumuka kuanyi, ku mesu ku-kavua kufika, diba divuabu bakeba kukanga biibi bia tshimenga. Tshiena mumanye muaba udibu baye to. Nuenu bambuluja, nudi mua kubapeta mu njila." 
Joshua2:6 Kadi Rakabe uvua mumane kubandisha bantu abu mu nzubu wende wa kulu ku musaka. Uvua mubasokoke mu mitshi iwaye muteke kulu aku. 
Joshua2:7 Bantu bavua mukalenga mutume kulondakaja batentekedi mu njila. Amu bobu bapatuke mu tshimenga, kukangabu tshiakabidi tshiibi tshia tshimenga. Nanku, kuipatshilabu batentekedi, balonda njila udi muye ku tshisabu tshia musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua2:8 Ke Rakabe kubanda ku musaka wa nzubu wende, bantu babidi abu kabayi banji kulala to." 
Joshua2:9 Kubambilaye ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila mmumane kunupa ditunga dietu edi. Nudi nutukuatshisha bowa bukole. Bantu bonsu badi anu banutshina. 
Joshua2:10 Tuvua bapete lumu ne: diba dinuvua numuka mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, Maweja-Nangila uvuamumishe Mayi manene makunze bua nuenu kusabuka. Kabidi tuvua bumvue ne: nuvua bashipe Sihone ne Oge, bakalenga ba matunga abidi a bena Amore, banyangakaje kabidi bintu biabu. Bakalenga abu, bavuabase luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua2:11 Tuetu bamane kumvua lumu lua bionsu abi, tuvua tupampakana bikole, kakuyi udi mumvue bukole bua kunubunda kabidi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi Mvidi Mukulu muena kulu ne muena buloba." 
Joshua2:12 Kadi mpindiewu, nuditshipe bualu buanyi kudi Maweja-Nangila ne: nenufuile bena diku dianyi luse, bu mundi munuenzele bimpe. Numpeshe tshintu tshidi mua kunjadikila patoke binudi nuamba." 
Joshua2:13 Nundaye bua kupandisha baledi banyi, bana betu ba balume ne ba bakaji, too ne bena meku etu bonsu. Kanuanyishi bua batushipe to." 
Joshua2:14 Batentekedi abu kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi baditshipa kuudi. Tuetu katuyi bakumbaje bitudi tukulaya, Maweja-Nangila atushipe, kadi amu wewe kuyi muambile muntu tshitudi bavuile munemu. Nanku, padi Maweja-Nangila utupa ditunga edi, netukumbaje tshitudi bakulaye. Netukufuile luse." 
Joshua2:15 Nzubu wa Rakabe uvua mutuangane ne tshimana tshia tshimenga. Nanku kupatulaye bantu babidi abu ku madidishi, ubapuekeshila ku muonji." 
Joshua2:16 Kubambilaye ne: — Ndayi kusokoma mu mikuna, bua bantu badi banukeba abu kabanukuatshi to. Nushale ku mikuna aku matuku asatu, too ne papingana badi banukeba abu. Pashishe nenutungunuke ne luendu luenu." 
Joshua2:17 Bantu balume abu kumuambila ne: — Tuetu netukumbaje mitshipu iuvua mututshipishe. 
Joshua2:18 Kadi wewe enza nunku: patudi tukuata ditunga edi, usuike muonji mukunze ewu ku dididishi, muaba uudi mututuluile ewu. Nanku nudisange bonsu mu nzubu muebe, ne baledi bebe, bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji, ne bena diku dienu bonsu." 
Joshua2:19 Padi muntu upatuka mu nzubu muebe, udi udikebela lufu. Tuetu netuikale babinge. Kadi padibu babunda muntu udi mubuele mu nzubu muebe, tshilumbu tshia muntu awu tshidi pambidi petu." 
Joshua2:20 Kadi wewe mumanyishe bantu mutudi bafike munemu, bionsu biudi mutuambe tuetu baditshipe ebi mbifue." 
Joshua2:21 Rakabe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muanyishe munudi nuamba amu. Pashishe kulayanganabu. Bantu babidi abu bamane kuya, Rakabe kusuika muonji mukunze ku dididishi dia ku nzubu kuende." 
Joshua2:22 Batentekedi abu, kuya kusokoma ku mikuna matuku asatu, too ne padibu bapingana mu Yeriko kudi bantu bavua babalondakaja mu njila, kabayi babamona." 
Joshua2:23 Pashishe batentekedi babidi abu, kumuka mu mikuna, muaba uvuabu basokome. Kusabukabu Yardene, kufika muaba uvua Yoshuwa. Kumulondelabu bionsu bivua bibenzekela." 
Joshua2:24 Kujadikilabu Yoshuwa ne: — Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila mmumane kutupa ditunga edi dijima. Bena ditunga mbamane kuteketa mu maboku. Kabena mua kutufuila nkanana to." 
Joshua3:1 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kumuka mu Shitime ne dinda dionsu. Kupuekelabu ku muelelu wa Yardene. Kuasabu mitanda yabu muaba awu, bindile mua kusabuka." 
Joshua3:2 Kupita matuku asatu, balombodi ba bena Izrayele kuendakana mu mitanda," 
Joshua3:3 bambila bantu ne: — Panudi numona batuangaji ba bena Levi bambule mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numuangale bonsu muaba awu, nubatue mu nyima." 
Joshua3:4 Ke munudi mua kumanya njila wa kulonda. Katshia kanuvua banji kupitshila muaba ewu to. Kadi kanusemenyi pabuipi ne mushete wa ndondu to. Nuikale bashilangane nawu misangu yonsu, mutantshi wa kilometre bu umue." 
Joshua3:5 Yoshuwa kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nujikije mikiya inudi nayi, bualu malaba Maweja-Nangila neenze bishima munkatshi muenu." 
Joshua3:6 Butshia, Yoshuwa kuambila batuangaji bua bambule mushete wa ndondu, bapita kumpala kua bena Izrayele. Batuangaji kuenza nanku." 
Joshua3:7 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Biangatshile ku lelu, ndi njadika bumfumu buebe ku mesu kua bena Izrayele bonsu. Nebamanye ne: ndi nebe, bu mumvua ne Moshe." 
Joshua3:8 Kadi wewe ambila batuangaji badi bambula mushete wa ndondu ne: padibu bafika ku muelelu wa Yardene, babuele mu mayi, bimane." 
Joshua3:9 Ke Yoshuwa kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Semenayi apa, nuteleje mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu wamba." 
Joshua3:10 Nenujadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi udi munkatshi muenu. Yeye neipate bantu badi kumpala kuenu: bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Ivi, bena Perizi, bena Ngirgashi, bena Amore ne bena Yebusa." 
Joshua3:11 Nanku mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, Mukalenga wa buloba bujima, neusabuke Yardene kumpala kuenu." 
Joshua3:12 Nusungule bantu balume dikumi ne babidi, bilondeshile bungi bua bisamba bienu. Ku tshisamba tshionsu kuikala muntu umue." 
Joshua3:13 Padi batuangaji badi bambula mushete wa tshijila, babuela mu Yardene, diakamue mayi awu neakosoloke. Mayi a ku mutu neimane dibula." 
Joshua3:14 Bena Izrayele kumuangata mu mitanda, bua kusabuka musulu wa Yardene. Batuangaji bavua bambula mushete wa ndondu, bavua benda kumpala kuabu." 
Joshua3:15 Tshikondu atshi tshivua tshia kunowa biakudia. Ke tshivua musulu wa Yardene uwula bikole, mayi apita pa bibungubungu. Nanku anu batuangaji batue makasa mu mayi," 
Joshua3:16 ke musulu kukosoloka. Mayi kuimana dibula kule ku mutu wa musulu mu tshimenga tshia Adame, tshidi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Sartane. Mayi avua apueka kuinshi, aya kubuela mu Mayi manene a luepu, kujiminawu onsu butubutuu. Bena Izrayele kusabuka, balulamangane ne tshimenga tshia Yeriko." 
Joshua3:17 Batuangaji bavua bambula mushete wa tshijila, kuimana balulame mu lusenga lume, munkatshi mua musulu wa Yardene, too ne mudi bonsu basabuka bafika dia muamua ku makasa kume." 
Joshua4:1 Bena Izrayele bonsu bamane kusabuka Yardene, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne:" 
Joshua4:2 — Sungula bantu balume dikumi ne babidi, bilondeshile bungi bua bisamba bienu. Ku tshisamba tshionsu kuikala muntu umue." 
Joshua4:3 Ubambile baye kukeba mabue dikumi ne abidi mu musulu wa Yardene, anu muaba uvua batuangaji bimane awu. Badi ne bua kutuala mabue awu, nuenu kuateka muaba unuaya kulala." 
Joshua4:4 Yoshuwa kubikila bena Izrayele dikumi ne babidi bavuaye musungule," 
Joshua4:5 ubambila ne: — Pitayi kumpala kua mushete wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nubuele munkatshi mua musulu wa Yardene. Muntu yonsu wa kunudi ambule dibue dia muaba awu, aditeke pa makaya ende. Nanku tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele netshikale ne diatshi dibue." 
Joshua4:6 Mabue aa neanu-vuluije bionsu bivua binuenzekela muaba ewu. Nanku mu matuku adi kumpala, padi bana benu banukonka ne: Mabue aa avua a tshinyi," 
Joshua4:7 nubambile ne: “Pavua batuangaji basabuka musulu wa Yardene, bambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, mayi akimana. Eyowa, bobu basabuka Yardene ne mushete wa ndondu, mayi avua mimane. Nenku mabue aa adi ne bua kuvuluija bena Izrayele kashidi tshishima etshi.”" 
Joshua4:8 Bantu bavua Yoshuwa musungule, kukumbajabu bionsu abi. Kuambulabu mabue dikumi ne abidi munkatshi mua musulu wa Yardene. Dibue dimue ku tshisamba, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila nkayende muambile Yoshuwa. Kuyabu kuteka mabue awu muaba uvuabu ne bua kulala." 
Joshua4:9 Ke Yoshuwa kuimanyika kabidi mabue dikumi ne abidi, munkatshi mua musulu wa Yardene, muaba uvua batuangaji bavua bambula mushete wa ndondu bimane. Mabue awu, atshidipu too ne mpindiewu." 
Joshua4:10 Batuangaji, bavua bambule mushete wa ndondu, kuimanabu munkatshi mua Yardene too ne padi bena Izrayele bakumbaja bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mubambile kudi Yoshuwa. Ke muvua Yoshuwa mukumbaje bionsu bivua Moshe mumuambile nanku. Bena Izrayele kusabuka musulu lukasa." 
Joshua4:11 Nanku bantu bonsu bamane kufika dishiya dia musulu, batuangaji kusabuka, kupita kabidi kumpala kua bena Izrayele bonsu, bambule mushete wa tshijila." 
Joshua4:12 Bena Rubene, bena Ngade, tshitupa tshia bena Menashe, kusabuka ne bia mvita mu bianza, kumpala kua bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu, amu muvua Moshe mubambile." 
Joshua4:13 Bantu bu binunu makumi anayi, bambule bia mvita, kusabuka musulu wa Yardene, Maweja-Nangila mutangile, balonde njila wa ku mpata ya Yeriko." 
Joshua4:14 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kujadika bumfumu bua Yoshuwa ku mesu kua bena Izrayele bonsu. Matuku onsu avua Yoshuwa mulale panu, bena Izrayele bavua bamunemeka bu muvuabu banemeka Moshe." 
Joshua4:15 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: 
Joshua4:16 — Ambila batuangaji badi bambula mushete udi ne mabue a ndondu, bapatuke mu musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua4:17 Yoshuwa kutuma diyi bua bumuke mu mayi. 
Joshua4:18 Batuangaji kuitaba. Amu bobu bamane kumuka mu mayi, bafike ku muelelu, musulu kupingana muawu mua kale, kuwula tente too ne ku bibungubungu." 
Joshua4:19 Bena Izrayele bavua basabuka musulu wa Yardene mu matuku dikumi a ngondu wa kumpala. Pashishe bakasa mitanda yabu ku Ngilgale, ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yeriko." 
Joshua4:20 Yoshuwa kuimanyika mu Ngilgale mabue dikumi ne abidi, avuabu bambule mu musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua4:21 Pashishe kuambilaye bena Izrayele ne: — Matuku adi kumpala, bana benu banukonke bua mabue aa," 
Joshua4:22 nubumvuije muvua bena Izrayele basabuka musulu wa Yardene ku makasa kume. 
Joshua4:23 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu uvua mumishe mayi a musulu wa Yardene bua nusabuke, bu nuwuaye mumishe bualu buenu Mayi manene makunze." 
Joshua4:24 Maweja-Nangila uvua muenze nanku, bua bantu bonsu ba pa buloba bamanye bukole buende. Kabidi bua nutumikile Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu kashidi." 
Joshua5:1 Bakalenga bonsu ba bena Amore, bavua base luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene, ne bakalenga ba bena Kenaane bavua base ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, kumvuabu lumu ne: Maweja-Nangila mmumishe mayi a musulu wa Yardene, bua bena Izrayele basabuke. Nanku bobu kupampakana bikole, kutshinabu bena Izrayele, kabayi kabidi ne dikima dia kubaluisha to." 
Joshua5:2 Anu tshikondu atshi, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Usonge tuele tua ntewula, bua uteke ndelanganyi mipiamipia ya bena Izrayele eyi panshi." 
Joshua5:3 Yoshuwa kusonga tuele tua ntewula, kuteka bena Izrayele panshi. Bionsu ebi bivua bienzekela muaba udibu babikila ne kakuna ka kutekela bantu panshi." 
Joshua5:4 Tshikondu tshivua bena Izrayele bapatuke mu Ejipitu, bantu balume bavua bamane kupeta bidimu bikumbane bia kuluangana mvita, bavua bamane kubateka panshi. Kadi bantu abu bonsu, bavua bafuila mu tshipela." 
Joshua5:5 Nanku bana ba balume bonsu ba-vuabu balelela mu tshipela kudi bena Izrayele, kabawa babateke panshi to. Ke pavua Yoshuwa ne bua kubateka panshi." 
Joshua5:6 Bena Izrayele bavua bapitshila mu tshipela bidimu makumi anayi. Ku ndekelu kua tshikondu atshi, bantu balume bavua ne bidimu bikumbane bua kuluangana mvita, mu tshikondu tshikavuabu bamane kumuangata mu Ejipitu, bakavua bamane kufua, bualu bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuditshipa ne: bantu aba kabakufika mu ditunga dia biakudia bia bungi dimvua mulaye bankambua babu ne: nendipeshe bana benu." 
Joshua5:7 Nenku Maweja-Nangila kubueja bana abu mu ditunga pa mutu pa baledi babu. Bana abuke bavua Yoshuwa mutekeshe panshi. 
Joshua5:8 Yoshuwa mumane kubatekesha bonsu panshi, bavua bashale amu mu mitanda too ne diba diumi mputa yabu." 
Joshua5:9 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Lelu ndi munumushe bundu, bunuvua bapatuke nabu mu Ejipitu. Ke padibu babikila muaba awu too ne mpindiewu ne: Ngilgale." 
Joshua5:10 Bena Izrayele kuasa mitanda mu Ngilgale. Matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu, dilolu, mu mpata udi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Yeriko, kuenzabu tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua5:11 Butshia kudiabu mampa kaayi mela buanga, kudiabu kabidi ntete mikanga. Bavua balamba bionsu ne biakudia bia mu ditunga." 
Joshua5:12 Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele kabavua bapeta kabidi mana to. Amu tshidimu atshi, kutuadijabu kudia biakudia bivua bimena mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Joshua5:13 Dituku dikuabu, Yoshuwa uvua pabuipi ne Yeriko. Diakamue kumonaye muntu muimane kumpala kuende. Muntu awu uvua ne muele mupatula mu tshibubu, mukuata ku tshianza. Yoshuwa kutantshila kudiye, umuebeja ne: — Udi ku luseke luetu anyi, udi ku lua baluishi betu?" 
Joshua5:14 Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Ntshidi mfika amu mpindiewu. Tshiena wa ku luseke luenu, nansha wa ku lua baluishi benu to. Ndi mfumu wa tshikulu tshia Maweja-Nangila. Nanku Yoshuwa kudiela mpala panshi, umuambila ne: — Meme ndi muena mudimu webe. Tshiudi untumina diyi bua meme kuenza ntshinyi?" 
Joshua5:15 Mfumu wa tshikulu tshia Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: — Kopola bisabata biebe ku makasa, bualu udi muimane muaba wa tshijila. Ke Yoshuwa kuitaba." 
Joshua6:1 Biibi bionsu bia ku tshimenga tshia Yeriko bivua binjila, bikanga bikole bua bena Izrayele kababuedi to. Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kubuela nansha kupatuka." 
Joshua6:2 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Tangila mundi nkupesha tshimenga tshia Yeriko, mukalenga watshi ne bena mvita bende." 
Joshua6:3 Wewe ne bena mvita bonsu baudi nabu, nenuende nunyungulule tshimenga. Nutshinyungulule musangu umue ku dituku. Nuenze nanku matuku asambombu." 
Joshua6:4 Batuangaji muanda mutekete nebadianjidile kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila. Mutuangaji yonsu neikale ne mpungi. Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete, nenunyungulule tshimenga misangu muanda mutekete. Batuangaji nebikale benda bela mpungi." 
Joshua6:5 Nanku diba didi mpungi udila amu kudila, bena Izrayele nebele bibingu bikole bia mvita. Diba adi bimana bia tshimenga nebiupuke. Nebabuele mu tshimenga, muntu yonsu uya anu buludi mutangile kumpala kuende." 
Joshua6:6 Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, kubikila batuangaji, ubambila ne: — Ambulayi mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila pa makaya. Bantu muanda mutekete ba kunudi badianjile kupita kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu, benda bela mpungi." 
Joshua6:7 Pashishe Yoshuwa kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Jukayi, ndayi nunyungulule tshimenga. Bamue bena mvita bende kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua6:8 Bionsu bivua bienzeka amu muvua Yoshuwa muambe. Batuangaji muanda mutekete bavua benda bela mpungi yabu kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila. 
Joshua6:9 Bena mvita tshisumbu bavua benda kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila, bakuabu bavua benda baulonda. Pavuabu batungunuka, mpungi ivua idila amu kudila kayiyi ipuwa." 
Joshua6:10 Kadi Yoshuwa uvua muambile bena Izrayele bua banji kupuwa amu kupuwa too ne pawaye ubambila bua kuela bibingu bia mvita. 
Joshua6:11 Yoshuwa kuambila bambudi ba mushete wa tshijila bua lunyunguluka tshimenga musangu umue. Pashishe bavua bapingane mu mitanda bua kulala. 
Joshua6:12 Yoshuwa kujuka ne dinda dionsu. Batuangaji kuambula kabidi mushete wa tshijila pa makaya. 
Joshua6:13 Batuangaji muanda mutekete bavua ne mpungi, kupita kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu. Kutuadijabu kabidi luendu, benda bela mpungi. Bamue bena mvita bavua kumpala kua batuangaji abu muanda mutekete, bakuabu bavua panyima, benda balonda mushete wa ndondu. Pavuabu benda, mpungi ivua idila amu kudila." 
Joshua6:14 Dituku adi dibidi, kunyungulukabu kabidi tshimenga musangu anu umue. Pashishe, kupinganabu mu mitanda. Kuenzabu nanku matuku asambombu." 
Joshua6:15 Kadi dituku dia muanda mutekete, kujukabu butuku bumane kutshia. Kunyungulukabu tshimenga misangu muanda mutekete anu mushindu uvuabu benza awu. Anu dituku adi, ke divuabu banyunguluka tshimenga misangu muanda mutekete." 
Joshua6:16 Kadi musangu wa muanda mutekete, pavua batuangaji bela mpungi, Yoshuwa kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Elayi bibingu bia mvita! Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmumane kunupa tshimenga etshi." 
Joshua6:17 Tshimenga etshi netshibutuke ne bionsu bidimu, bualu mbintu bia kulambula Maweja-Nangila. Nulekele amu Rakabe, mukaji muena tshiendenda, ne muoyi, yeye ne bantu bonsu badi mu nzubu muende. Bualu uvua musokoke batentekedi betu batuvua batume." 
Joshua6:18 Kadi nudimuke! Kanuangatshi tshintu nansha tshimue tshia mu tshimenga etshi. Bualu nudi mua kudikebela diakabi. Bena Izrayele bonsu badi mu mitanda badi mua kubutuka. 
Joshua6:19 Biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole bionsu, bia mpawungi, bikunze, ne bikuabu bionsu, nebabijidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, babiele mu diyeba diende." 
Joshua6:20 Batuangaji kuela mpungi. Bena Izrayele bumvue mpungi ayi, kuelabu bibingu bikole bia mvita. Bimana bia tshimenga kupukabi panshi mbuu. Diakamue bena Izrayele kubanda ku tshimenga. Muntu yonsu kuya buludi ne muaba uvuaye mululamangane nawu. Kukuatabu tshimenga." 
Joshua6:21 Kushipabu bantu ba mu tshimenga atshi: balume, bakaji, bantu bakole ne bana batekete. Kushipabu too ne ngombe, mikoku ne mpunde." 
Joshua6:22 Yoshuwa kuambila bantu babidi bavua batentekela tshimenga tshia Yeriko ne: — Ndayi kua Rakabe, mukaji muena tshiendenda. Numupatule mu nzubu amu ne bena diende bonsu, ne bapika, bu munuvua bamane kuditshipa kudiye." 
Joshua6:23 Batentekedi kuya ku nzubu wa Rakabe. Kumupatulabu ne baledi bende, bana babu ba balume, ba bakaji, ne bena diku diabu bonsu. Kubalamabu muaba musunguluke uvua kauyi mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele to." 
Joshua6:24 Pashishe bena Izrayele kuosha tshimenga tshia Yeriko ne bionsu bivuamu. Kabawa bosha biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, biamu bia mpawungi, biamu bikunze, nansha bikuabu. Bavua babiteka muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, bua bishale biende." 
Joshua6:25 Yoshuwa uvua mulame Rakabe, mukaji muena tshiendenda, ne bonsu bavuaye nabu, ne muoyi. Bualu mukaji awu, uvua musokoke bantu bavua baye kutentekela tshimenga tshia Yeriko. Nanku Rakabe kusomba munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi itshidi isombamu too ne mpindiewu." 
Joshua6:26 Tshikondu atshi, Yoshuwa kuyukila ne bena Izrayele, ubadimuja bua tshimenga tshia Yeriko, wamba ne: “Muntu wibaka kabidi tshimenga tshia Yeriko, bamutshipe kudi Maweja-Nangila. Padiye umbula mikidi ya tshimenga etshi, muanende muanabute asangane kufua anyee? Afue! Padiye wela biibi ku tshimenga etshi, muanende muana mukala asangane kufua anyee? Afue! ”" 
Joshua6:27 Maweja-Nangila uvua ne Yoshuwa. Lumu lua Yoshuwa luvua lutangalaka ditunga dijima. 
Joshua7:1 Bena Izrayele bavua benza bualu bubi butambe, bualu bavua bangata bintu bivua Maweja-Nangila mukandike. Nenku muntu wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, dina diende Akane, muana wa Karmi, (Karmi uvua muana wa Zabdi, kabidi muikulu wa Zera) uvua mudiangatshile ku bukole bimue bintu. Nenku Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda." 
Joshua7:2 Pavua Yoshuwa mu Yeriko, uvua mutume bantu bua kutentekela tshimenga tshia Ayi. Ayi uvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga tshia Betele, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Bete-Avene. Bobu bamane kutentekela tshimenga," 
Joshua7:3 kupinganabu kudi Yoshuwa, bamuambila ne: — Kuena mua kutuma bena mvita bonsu bua kuya kuluisha bena Ayi to. Bena mvita binunu bibidi nansha bisatu mbakumbane. Kutatshishi bena mvita betu bonsu to. Bena tshimenga tshia Ayi kabena bavule to." 
Joshua7:4 Bena mvita bu binunu bisatu, kuyabu bua kuluisha bena Ayi. Kadi bena Izrayele kupanga bukole, kunyema bena Ayi." 
Joshua7:5 Bena Ayi kushipa bena Izrayele bu makumi asatu ne basambombu. Kulondakajabu bakuabu biangatshile ku tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga tshia Ayi too ne ku musoku wa Shebarime. Kupuekabu benda bipata bena Izrayele. Ke bena Izrayele kupampakana bikole, kuteketa mu maboku." 
Joshua7:6 Yoshuwa ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele, kudipanda bilamba. Kudielabu malaba mu mitu, badiela mpala panshi kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila too ne ku dilolu." 
Joshua7:7 Pashishe Yoshuwa kukema bikole, wamba ne: — Akia! Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila, uvua mutusabuishe musulu wa Yardene bua tshinyi? Uvua mutusabuishe bua kutufila kudi bena Amore bua batushipe anyi? Uvua mua kutulekela dishiya dia Yardene." 
Joshua7:8 Maweja-Nangila wanyi, tshindi mua kuamba ntshinyi? Mpindiewu bena Izrayele mbanyeme baluishi babu!" 
Joshua7:9 Bena Kenaane ne bantu bakuabu ba mu ditunga nebumvue lumu elu. Nebadisange bua kutuluisha. Nebatubutule. Kadi mudibu mua kujadika mpindiewu muudi ne bukole mbishi? 
Joshua7:10 Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Yoshuwa ne: — Banduluka! Muudi mudiele mpala panshi mmunyi? 
Joshua7:11 Bena Izrayele bavua benza bibi. Kabena bakumbaje bimvua mubambile. Mbangate bintu bimvua mubakandike bua kabangatshi. Mbibe bintu abi, babisokoke mu bintu biabu." 
Joshua7:12 Ke padi bena Izrayele kabayi mua kupita kabidi baluishi babu bukole to. Nebanyeme babutuke bonsu. Meme tshiakuikala kabidi munkatshi muenu to, amu nuenu bamane kubutula bintu bionsu, bi-mvua munukandike, binuvua bangata." 
Joshua7:13 Mpindiewu, ndaku, ambila bena Izrayele badilongolole bua tumonangane nabu. Kadi badikobolole, bumushe mikiya, bafike malaba tumonangane. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadikila bena Izrayele ne: “Nudi bangate bintu bimvua munukandike ne: kanuangatshi. Kanuena mua kupita baluishi benu bukole panudi kanuyi bumushe bintu abi to." 
Joshua7:14 Malaba dinda, nuenu bena Izrayele, ku tshisamba ku tshisamba, nufike kundi meme Maweja-Nangila. Kadi tshisamba tshingikala muleje atshi, netshidileje ku diku ku diku. Diku dingikala muleje adi nedifike ku tshiota ku tshiota. Nenku tshiota tshingikala muleje atshi, bantu balume ba mu tshiota atshi nebafike ku muntu ku muntu." 
Joshua7:15 Nenku nendeje munkatshi mua bantu abu muntu udi muangate bintu bimvua mukandike bua kuangata. Neboshe muntu awu mu kapia, ne bionsu bidiye nabi. Bualu kuvua mukumbaje bimvua munuambile. Mmuenze bualu bubi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele budibu kabayi mua kuenza to.”" 
Joshua7:16 Butshia dinda dionsu, Yoshuwa kubikila bena Izrayele ku tshisamba ku tshisamba. Kutshinkabu, kupeta tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Joshua7:17 Kubikilaye kabidi bena tshisamba tshia Yuda ku diku ku diku. Kutshinkabu, kupeta diku dia Zera. Kubikilaye bena diku adi ku tshiota ku tshiota. Kutshinkabu, kupeta tshiota tshia Zabdi." 
Joshua7:18 Kubikilaye bantu balume ba mu tshiota atshi ku muntu ku muntu. Kutshinkabu, kupeta Akane, muana wa Karmi, muikulu wa Zabdi, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Zera wa ku tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Joshua7:19 Yoshuwa kumuambila ne: — Mulunda wanyi, umanye bukole bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Ungambile bushiwa. Unjadikile tshiuvua muenze, kushimi to." 
Joshua7:20 Akane kumuambila ne: — Ndi ngitaba ne: uvua muenzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu bibi mmeme. Bubi bumvua muenze budi mushindu ewu: 
Joshua7:21 mu bintu bituvua bapeta mu mvita, mvua mumone tshinkutu tshimpe tshia bena Mezopotamiya, nkanu nkama ibidi ya biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshikale ne bujitu bua nkanu makumi atanu. Lukuka lukole kungenza. Mvua mubiangate. Meme kubijikila mu ntenta wanyi, munudi mua kubipeta. Mvua muteke tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole muinshi." 
Joshua7:22 Ke Yoshuwa kutuma bantu mu ntenta wa Akane. Bobu kuya lukasa, kusangana bintu abi bijikila mu ntenta. Tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshivua muinshi." 
Joshua7:23 Bobu kujula bintu abi, kuya nabi kuvua Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele. Kubitekabu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua7:24 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele bonsu kukuata Akane, kuangata tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshinkutu ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kuangatabu kabidi bana ba balume ne ba bakaji ba Akane, ngombe yende, mpunde, mikoku, mbuji, ntenta ne bikuabu bionsu biwaye nabi. Kuyabu nabi bionsu mu tshibandabanda tshia Akore." 
Joshua7:25 Yoshuwa kuambila Akane ne: “Udi mutukebele diakabi. Nanku mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila neakupeteshe pebe diakabi. ” Bena Izrayele kumuasa mabue, kumushipa. Kuasabu kabidi ne bena mu diku dia Akane bonsu mabue, kubashipa. Kuoshabu bintu biabu bionsu." 
Joshua7:26 Pashishe kuimanyikabu mushiki wa mabue pambidi pa Akane. Mabue awu atshidipu too ne mpindiewu. Ke padibu babikila muaba awu ne lelu ne: tshibandabanda tshia Akore. Bionsu abi bimane kuenzeka, tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila kutuya." 
Joshua8:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Kutshinyi, kuzakadi. Angata bena mvita bebe bonsu. Nuye kuluisha bena tshimenga tshia Ayi. Meme ndi nkupesha mukalenga wa bena Ayi, bantu bende, tshimenga tshiende, ne ditunga diende dijima." 
Joshua8:2 Nenuenzele tshimenga atshi ne mukalenga watshi, anu bu munuvua benzele tshimenga tshia Yeriko ne mukalenga watshi. Kadi wewe ne bena mvita bebe bonsu, nenuangate bintu bionsu binuasangana mu tshimenga atshi too ne bimuna, bishale bintu bienu. Utume bantu panyima pa tshimenga baye kujikidila baluishi padibu kabayi banji kudilongolola." 
Joshua8:3 Yoshuwa kudilongolola bua kuya kuluishi bena Ayi pamue ne bena mvita bende bonsu. Kusungulaye bantu binunu makumi asatu, batshivua ne bukole bua kuluangana mvita. Kubatumaye butuku," 
Joshua8:4 ubambila ne: — Ndayi kusokoma pa nyima pa tshimenga tshia Ayi, mutantshi muipi. Nuikale badikumbaje bua kuluangana." 
Joshua8:5 Meme ndi ngenda nsemena mu tshimenga tshia Ayi ne bena mvita bandi nabu. Padi bena mvita bapatuka bua kutuluisha, nelubanyeme bu mutuvua benze musangu wa kumpala." 
Joshua8:6 Bobu nebatulondakaje. Netubafikishe mutantshi mule ne tshimenga. Nebele meji ne: tudi tubanyeme bu mutuvua banyeme musangu mukuabu. 
Joshua8:7 Diba adi, nuenu nenujuke miaba inudi basokome. Nenukuate tshimenga, bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi munupatshi." 
Joshua8:8 Amu nuenu bamane kukuata tshimenga, nutshioshe bilondeshile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Nukumbaje menemene bindi nnuambila ebi." 
Joshua8:9 Yoshuwa kutuma bena mvita ku Ayi, ku muaba uvuabu basungule bua kubundila bena mu tshimenga. Bobu kuimana pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Betele ne tshia Ayi, luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua tshimenga tshia Ayi. Yoshuwa uvua mulale mu mitanda muaba uvua bena mvita bakuabu bashale." 
Joshua8:10 Butshia dinda, pa kabundubundu, Yoshuwa kuya kukenketa bena mvita bende. Pashishe kuyaye nabu pamue ne bakulu ba meku a bena Izrayele bua kuluisha bena Ayi." 
Joshua8:11 Yoshuwa ne bena mvita bonsu kutungunuka balulamangane ne tshimenga. Kuimanyinabu ku luseke lua ku mutu kua tshimenga. Pankatshi pabu ne tshimenga atshi pavua tshibandabanda. 
Joshua8:12 Yoshuwa kusungula bantu balume bavua ne bukole bua kuluangana mvita bu binunu bitanu. Uvua mubambile bua basokome pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Betele ne tshia Ayi, luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua tshimenga." 
Joshua8:13 Bena mvita bakuabu kuasa mitanda ku mutu kua tshimenga. Kadi bamue bena mvita bavua anu basokome luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua tshimenga. Butuku abu, Yoshuwa uvua mulale mu tshibandabanda." 
Joshua8:14 Butshia dinda, mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia Ayi, umona bena Izrayele, kupatukaye mu tshimenga ne bena mvita bende bonsu, bua kuluisha bena Izrayele, anu muaba uvuabu baluishilangana musangu mukuabu, luseke lua ku tshibandabanda tshia ku musulu wa Yardene. Mukalenga kuvua mumanye ne: bena mvita ba bena Izrayele mbamane kutualamina panyima pa tshimenga to." 
Joshua8:15 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kushima bu badi kabayi ne bukole, kunyema mu mpata batangile mu tshipela." 
Joshua8:16 Balombodi ba tshimenga tshia Ayi kuela mukenji bua bena mvita bonsu balondakaje bena Izrayele. Bobu kubalondakaja, kumuka kushiya tshimenga mutantshi mule." 
Joshua8:17 Mu Ayi kushala kamuyi muntu mulume nansha umue. Bantu bonsu bavua balondakaja anu bena Izrayele, bashiye mu tshimenga kamuyi baluanganyi ba mvita." 
Joshua8:18 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Sempela ne difuma diebe mutangile luseke lua tshimenga tshia Ayi, bualu ndi nkupesha tshimenga etshi, bua utshikuate. Yoshuwa kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
Joshua8:19 Anu Yoshuwa olola tshianza mutangije mu tshimenga tshia Ayi, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua basokome, kupatuka lukasa, kunyema kubuela mu tshimenga, kutshikuata, kutshiosha diakamue." 
Joshua8:20 Bena mvita ba mu tshimenga tshia Ayi, batangile panyima, bavua bamona muinshi ujukila mu tshimenga tshiabu. Kumonabu ne: katuena mua kupingana kabidi muetu mu tshimenga. Bualu bena Izrayele bavua banyemena batangile ku tshipela, bavua bapingana kudi bena Ayi bua kubaluisha." 
Joshua8:21 Bualu Yoshuwa ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu, bamone ne: bena mvita babu bavua basokome panyima pa tshimenga tshia Ayi, mbamane kutshikuata, batshiosha, kukudimukilabu bena Ayi bua kubaluisha." 
Joshua8:22 Bena Izrayele bavua bamane kukuata tshimenga, kupatukabu pabu mu tshimenga bua kuluisha bena Ayi. Nenku bena Izrayele bavua babajikidila nseke yonsu, babalamina. Muntu nansha umue kuvua mua kunyema to. Kabidi kakuvua muntu uvua mua kushala ne muoyi." 
Joshua8:23 Kadi bavua bakuate ne muoyi anu mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Ayi, bamufite kudi Yoshuwa." 
Joshua8:24 Bena Izrayele bavua bashipa baluishi babu munkatshi mua mpata, muaba uvua baluishi abu babalondakaja. Bobu bamane kubutula bena Ayi bonsu, kakuyi kushala muntu nansha umue, kupinganabu kabidi mu tshimenga tshia Ayi. Kubutulabu bantu bonsu bavua bashale ne muoyi." 
Joshua8:25 Dituku adi, bantu ba mu tshimenga tshia Ayi bonsu, balume ne bakaji, bavua bena Izrayele bashipe bavua binunu dikumi ne bibidi." 
Joshua8:26 Yoshuwa uvua usempela ne difuma ditangije mu tshimenga tshia Ayi too ne pabutudibu bantu bonsu. 
Joshua8:27 Bilondeshile muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila Yoshuwa, bena Izrayele kuangata anu bintu ne bimuna bivuabu basangana mu tshimenga." 
Joshua8:28 Yoshuwa kuosha tshimenga atshi. Kushalatshi kashidi amu mushiki wa mabue, tshipela, too ne lelu." 
Joshua8:29 Pashishe kuelabu mukalenga wa Ayi kulu kua mutshi, kumowabu. Tshitalu tshiende kushala ku mutshi aku too ne ku dilolu. Pambi diba kubuela, Yoshuwa kutuma diyi bua batutete tshitalu atshi. Bavua batshimansha pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia tshimenga tshia Ayi. Pashishe kungujilabu mushiki wa mabue pa tshitalu atshi. Mabue awu atshidipu too ne ku lelu." 
Joshua8:30 Yoshuwa kuashila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele tshilambuilu pa mukuna wa Ebale. 
Joshua8:31 Uvua muase tshilambuilu atshi, anu mushindu uvua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, muambile bena Izrayele. Mushindu uvuabu base tshilambuilu bavua bamane kuufunda mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe. Bavua bafunda ne: Tshilambuilu tshikale tshiasa ne mabue kaayi masonga ne tshiamu to. Nenku bavua balambuila Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue pa tshilambuilu atshi." 
Joshua8:32 Yoshuwa kutentula pa mabue awa muaba awu, mikenji ivua Moshe mufunde, bena Izrayele batangile." 
Joshua8:33 Bena Izrayele ne bakulu babu, balombodi babu, bakoshi babu ba nsambu, ne benyi bavua munkatshi muabu, bavua bimane ku luseke ne ku luseke lua mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, balulamangane ne batuangaji ba bena Levi bavua bambula mushete wa ndondu awu. Bamue bavua bimane bela nyima ku mukuna wa Ngarizime, bakuabu bela nyima ku mukuna wa Ebale. Moshe ku kale uvua mumane kuamba bua bikale bimane mushindu ewu padibu basue kuela bena Izrayele lupemba." 
Joshua8:34 Yoshuwa kubala miaku yonsu ivuabu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji. Uvua ubala kabidi miaku ya dibela nayi lupemba ne ya dibatshipa nayi. 
Joshua8:35 Yoshuwa kubadila bena Izrayele mikenji yonsu ya Moshe anu mushindu uvuaye muyifunde mu mukanda. Diba divuaye ubabadila, bena Izrayele bonsu bavuaku, kabidi ne bakaji, bana, ne benyi bavua munkatshi muabu, bavua amu bateleje." 
Joshua9:1 Bakalenga bonsu bavua base luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Yardene, bavua bumvue muvua bena Izrayele banyangakaje tshimenga tshia Ayi: ke bakalenga bonsu bavua ku mikuna, mu mpata, ne ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, too ne ku Lebanone. Nanku bakalenga ba bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Kenaane, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa," 
Joshua9:2 kudisangisha bua kuluisha Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele. 
Joshua9:3 Kadi bena Ngibone bavua bena Ivi, kumvuabu muvua Yoshuwa munyangakaje tshimenga tshia Yeriko ne tshia Ayi." 
Joshua9:4 Nanku kumvuanganabu bua kushima bena Izrayele. Kuangatabu bintu bia kudia mu njila. Kuambuishabu nyama yabu ya mpunde, bibombi bia kale bimane kusunsuka, ne milondu ya kale ya biseba, ivua ne mvinyo, mipandike kabidi mitelakaje." 
Joshua9:5 Kuvualabu mikusu, kuela bisabata bisunsuke bitelulula, kuangata mampa mamane kunyanguka, kabidi masunsuke." 
Joshua9:6 Pashishe kuyabu mu mitanda ya Ngilgale, muaba uvua Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele basombe. Kubambilabu ne: — Tuetu aba tudi bafume mu ditunga dia kule, tudi tunulomba bua kutua nenu ndondu." 
Joshua9:7 Bena Izrayele kubandamuna ne: — Misangu mikuabu nudi bena mutumba. Nanku katuena mua kutua nenu ndondu to. 
Joshua9:8 Bena Ngibone kujadikila Yoshuwa ne: — Tudi bamane kudilongolola bua kuikala nansha bapika bebe. Kadi Yoshuwa kubebeja ne: — Nuenu nudi banganyi? Nudi mifuma penyi? 
Joshua9:9 Kuandamunabu ne: — Tuetu tudi bapika bebe. Tudi bafume mutantshi mule. Bualu tudi bamane kumvua lumu lua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Tudi bamanye malu a dikema avuaye muenze mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. 
Joshua9:10 Kabidi tudi bamanye muvuaye mukengeshe bakalenga babidi ba bena Amore bavua dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene. Bakalenga aba ke: Sihone, mukalenga wa Eshebone, ne Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, uvua musombe mu Ashetarote." 
Joshua9:11 Bakulu betu ba meku, ne bana betu bakuabu bonsu, bavua batuambila bua kuangata bintu bia kudia mu njila ne kufika muaba ewu bua tumonangane nenu. Mbatutume bua tuikale bapika benu. Nanku tudi Umulomba bua tutue nenu ndondu." 
Joshua9:12 Monayi mukadi mampa aa. Musangu utuvua baangate ku nzubu yetu bua kulua nawu kunu, atshivua amu ne luya. Kadi tangila mpindiewu, adi mume, kabidi masunsuke." 
Joshua9:13 Musangu utuvua bangate milondu eyi ya biseba bia nyama, bayuwuje ne maluvu itshivua amu mipiamipia. Kadi monayi lelu yonsu mmimane kupandika. Bilamba bietu ne bisabata bietu bidi bisunsuke bikole, amu bua luendu lua mutantshi mule lutuvua bende." 
Joshua9:14 Bena Izrayele kulengulula bua kukonka Maweja-Nangila tshilumbu tshia bantu aba. Kudiabu ne bintu bivuabu nabi. 
Joshua9:15 Yoshuwa kutua nabu ndondu mu ditalala, ubajadikila ne: katuena tunushipa to. Ke balombodi ba bena Izrayele kuditshipa, bajadike ndondu awu." 
Joshua9:16 Bobu bamane kutua nabu ndondu, matuku asatu apita, bena Izrayele kumvua muvua bantu abu bena mutumba nabu menemene." 
Joshua9:17 Nanku bena Izrayele kuenza luendu lua matuku asatu, too ne mu bimenga bia bantu abu: ke tshimenga tshia Ngibone, tshia Kefira, tshia Beyerote ne tshia Kiriyate-Yeyarime." 
Joshua9:18 Kadi bena Izrayele kabawa babashipa, bualu balombodi ba bena Izrayele bavua bamane kutua nabu ndondu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele bonsu kutuadija kujana balombodi babu." 
Joshua9:19 Kadi balombodi kubandamuna ne: — Katuena mua kushipa bantu aba to, bualu tudi bamane kuditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
Joshua9:20 Tudi tubalekela ne muoyi, bualu tudi bamane kuditshipa. Tuetu katuyi benze nanku, Mvidi Mukulu neatufikile munda. Kadi umvuayi tshitudi basue kuenza:" 
Joshua9:21 tudi tubashiya ne muoyi. Kadi tudi tubapesha mudimu wa kutukosela nkunyi, ne wa kutusunyina mayi. Ke muvua balombodi bakosa tshilumbu atshi nanku." 
Joshua9:22 Ke Yoshuwa kubikila bena Ngibone, kubakonka ne: — Nuenu nudi bena mutumba netu. Kadi nudi batushime ne: tudi bafume mutantshi mule bua tshinyi?" 
Joshua9:23 Mpindiewu nudi bena diakabi: nenushale bonsu bapika kashidi. Nenukose nkunyi, nusuna ne mayi bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Joshua9:24 Bena Ngibone kuandamuna ne: — Teleja tshitudi benzela bionsu ebi. Tuetu tuvua bamane kumvua muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe muambile Moshe, muntu wende, bua kunupa ditunga edi dijima. Uvua mumane kunuambila bua nuenu kubutula bena ditunga edi ku kakese ku kakese, panudi nuenda nusemena. Nanku tuvua banutshine bikole. Tuvua bakeba kudipandisha ku lufu." 
Joshua9:25 Mpindiewu tudi bantu benu. Nuenze netu munudi basue. 
Joshua9:26 Ke Yoshuwa kubenzela malu aa: kukandika bena Izrayele bua kabashipi bena Ngibone; 
Joshua9:27 kupesha bena Ngibone mudimu wa kukosa nkunyi, kusunyina bena Izrayele mayi, ne kusuna mayi bua tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, muaba wikale Maweja-Nangila usungula. Nanku ndelanganyi ya bena Ngibone itshidi ikuata midimu eyi too ne ku lelu." 
Joshua10:1 Mukalenga Adoni-Sedeke wa mu Yerushalayime, kumvuaye muvua Yoshuwa mukuate tshimenga tshia Ayi, mutshinyangakaje tshionsu, mushipe ne mukalenga watshi, anu muvuaye munyangakaje tshimenga tshia Yeriko, mushipe kabidi ne mukalenga watshi. Uvua mumane kumvua kabidi ne: bena Ngibone mbamane kutua ndondu wa ditalala ne bena Izrayele, basombe munkatshi muabu." 
Joshua10:2 Ke muvua bena Yerushalayime bakuatshike bowa bua bungi. Bualu tshimenga tshia Ngibone tshivua tshipite tshia bena Ayi ku bunene, tshivua ne bunene bua mushindu umue ne bua bimenga bia bakalenga. Tshivua kabidi amu ne bena mvita ba bukitu." 
Joshua10:3 Nanku mukalenga Adoni-Sedeke kubikidisha bakalenga aba: Okame, mukalenga wa mu Ebrone; Pirame, mukalenga wa mu Yarmute; Yafiya, mukalenga wa mu Lakishe; ne Debire, mukalenga wa mu Eglone. Kubambilaye ne:" 
Joshua10:4 — Ndi munubikidishe bua nungambuluishe. Tuluishe bena tshimenga tshia Ngibone, bualu bena tshimenga atshi mbatue ndondu ne Yoshuwa, kabidi ne bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Joshua10:5 Nanku bakalenga batanu ba bena Amore, ba mu Yerushalayime, Ebrone, Yarmute, Lakishe ne Eglone, kudisangisha ne bena mvita babu bonsu bua kuya kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ngibone, kutshikuata." 
Joshua10:6 Kadi bena Ngibone kutuma bantu bua bambile Yoshuwa uvua mu mitanda ya mu Ngilgale ne: — Kubengi bua kutuambuluisha tuetu bapika bebe to. Luaku lukasa. Utuambuluishe, utusungidile. Bualu bakalenga bonsu ba bena Amore badi ku mikuna, mbumvuangane bua kutuluisha!" 
Joshua10:7 Diakamue Yoshuwa kumuka mu Ngilgale ne bena mvita bonsu, nangananga ne baluanganyi ba kalanda musenga." 
Joshua10:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Kubatshinyi to. Ndi mbafila kuudi. Muntu nansha umue kakukupita bukole to. 
Joshua10:9 Yoshuwa ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu bamane kuenda butuku bujima biangatshile ku Ngilgale, kubundulabu bena Amore tshimpitshimpi, bena Amore kabayi banji kudilongolola." 
Joshua10:10 Maweja-Nangila kunyemesha bena Amore kumpala kua bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele kushipela bena Amore bikole, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ngibone. Bavua benda balondakaja bena Amore mu njila wa kubanda ku Bete-Orone, babipata too ne ku Azeka ne Makeda." 
Joshua10:11 Pavua bena Amore banyema bena Izrayele, bapuekela luseke lukuabu lua mukuna wa Bete-Orone, Maweja-Nangila kubatokeshila mvula mukole wa mabue. Mvula awu kukuatshila bena Amore too ne mudibu bafika ku Azeka. Bantu balume bavua bafue ku mabue a mvula awu bavua ba bungi, bapite bavua bena Izrayele bashipe ku miele mu mvita." 
Joshua10:12 Dituku divua Maweja-Nangila muambuluishe bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bua kutshimuna bena Amore, Yoshuwa uvua utendelela Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele bonsu bateleje. Uvua ulomba, wamba ne: — Diba dimanakane mulu, mu tshimenga tshia Ngibone! Ngondu imanakane mulu mu tshibandabanda tshia Ayalone!" 
Joshua10:13 Diba kuimana, ngondu kushala kaba kamue, too ne padi bena Izrayele batshimuna bena lukuna babu. Bionsu ebi bivua bienzeka anu bu mudibu bafunda mu Mukanda wa Muntu wa nsongu ne: dituku dijima adi, diba divua dimana kadiyi mua kupueka bua kubuela." 
Joshua10:14 Katshia ne katshia, bualu bua mushindu ewu kabuvua buanji kuenzeka to; kabidi kabuakuenzeka matuku adi kumpala. Maweja-Nangila kukumbaja tshivua muntu mumulombe. Nanku yeye nkayende uvua uluila bena Izrayele mvita." 
Joshua10:15 Pashishe Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele bonsu kupingana mu mitanda yabu ya mu Ngilgale. 
Joshua10:16 Bakalenga abu batanu ba bena Amore kunyema, kuya kusokoma mu lubinga lua Makeda." 
Joshua10:17 Kubasanganabu basokome mu lubinga amu. Kumanyishabu Yoshuwa. 
Joshua10:18 Yeye kuambila bena mvita bende ne: — Nujibikile mabue manene ku mushiku wa lubinga alu, bantu bakulame." 
Joshua10:19 Kadi kanunengakanyi muaba awu to. Londakajayi baluishi benu. Bajikilayi njila, bua kabafiki mu bimenga biabu to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmumane kubafila mu bianza bienu." 
Joshua10:20 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kutshimuna bena Amore menemene, kubabutula bonsu. Amu bantu bakese bavua banyema mvita ke bavua bapande, bapingana mu bimenga biabu, bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana." 
Joshua10:21 Ke bena Izrayele bonsu kupingana amu katakata muaba uvua Yoshuwa, mu mitanda ivuabu base pabuipi ne Makeda. Mu ditunga adi, muntu nansha umue kuvua ne dikima dia kujana bena Izrayele kabidi to." 
Joshua10:22 Pashishe Yoshuwa kutuma diyi bua bumushe mabue a wabu bajibika ku mushiku wa lubinga, bapatule bakalenga batanu ba bena Amore, baye nabu kudiye." 
Joshua10:23 Bena Izrayele kukumbaja bionsu abi. Kumutuadilabu mukalenga wa mu Yerushalayime, wa mu Ebrone, wa mu Yarmute, wa mu Lakishe, ne wa mu Eglone." 
Joshua10:24 Bafike amu ne bakalenga abu kudiye, Yoshuwa kubikidisha bena Izrayele, kuambila balombodi ba bena mvita bavua nende mu mvita bua basemene pabuipi, ne: — Semenayi apa. Diatayi bakalenga aba mu nshingu. Balombodi ba bena mvita kuenza nanku." 
Joshua10:25 Yoshuwa kubambila ne: — Kanutshinyi, kanuzakadi! Nuikale ne bukitu, kabidi ne muoyi mukole. Maweja-Nangila neenzele baluishi benu bonsu banudi nuluangana nabu amu nanku." 
Joshua10:26 Pashishe Yoshuwa kushipa bakalenga abu. Kubowelaye ku mitshi itanu. Bitalu biabu kushala bilembelela kulu too ne ku dilolu. 
Joshua10:27 Ku dilolu Yoshuwa kutuma diyi bua batulule bitalu abi. Kubitululabu, kubimansha mu lubinga muaba uvua bakalenga abu basokome. Kujibikilabu mabue manene ku lubinga alu. Mabue awu atshidiku too ne ku lelu." 
Joshua10:28 Amu dituku adi, Yoshuwa kukuata tshimenga tshia Makeda, kushipa mukalenga watshi, ne bantu bonsu bavuamu. Kawa mushiye muntu ne muoyi to. Uvua muenzele mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia mu Makeda biwaye muenzele mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko." 
Joshua10:29 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Makeda, kuya kuluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Libna." 
Joshua10:30 Maweja-Nangila kufila kabidi tshimenga atshi ne mukalenga watshi mu bianza biabu. Kushipabu bantu bonsu, kakuyi wa kushala ne muoyi. Bavua benzela mukalenga wa mu tshimenga atshi, muvuabu benzela mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko." 
Joshua10:31 Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Libna, kuya ku tshimenga tshia Lakishe. Kudilongololabu ku mvita, kuluishabu bena tshimenga atshi." 
Joshua10:32 Dituku dibidi divuabu baluangana mvita, Maweja-Nangila kupesha bena Izrayele tshimenga tshia Lakishe. Bobu kushipa bena tshimenga bonsu, kakuyi muntu wa kushala ne muoyi, anu bu muvuabu babutule bena tshimenga tshia Libna." 
Joshua10:33 Orame, mukalenga wa mu Ngezere, kufika bua kuambuluisha bena Lakishe. Kadi Yoshuwa kumutshimuna yeye ne bena mvita bende bonsu. Kubashipabu, kakuyi muntu wa kushala ne muoyi." 
Joshua10:34 Yoshuwa kumuka kabidi ne bena Izrayele mu Lakishe, kuya ku tshimenga tshia Eglone. Kudilongololabu ku mvita, kuluisha bena tshimenga atshi." 
Joshua10:35 Kukuatabu tshimenga atshi anu dituku adi. Kubutulabu bantu bonsu bavuamu, bu muvuabu benze ku Lakishe." 
Joshua10:36 Yoshuwa kutungunuka ne bena Izrayele, kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Eglone, kubanda too ne ku tshimenga tshia Ebrone. Kuluishabu bena tshimenga atshi." 
Joshua10:37 Kukuatabu tshimenga. Kushipabu mukalenga watshi ne bantu bende bonsu. Kunyengabu kabidi ne bimenga bionsu bivua pabuipi, kushipa bantu bonsu ba mu bimenga abi. Yoshuwa kubutula tshimenga tshia Ebrone tshijima, muvuaye mubutule tshimenga tshia Eglone. Uvua mushipeshe bantu bonsu, kakuyi wa kushala ne muoyi." 
Joshua10:38 Pashishe Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kubenda bua kuya mu tshimenga tshia Debire. Kuluishabu bena tshimenga atshi. 
Joshua10:39 Kukuatabu tshimenga atshi ne mukalenga uvuamu. Kukuatabu kabidi ne bimenga bionsu bivua natshi pabuipi. Kushipabu bantu bonsu bavuamu, kabayi bashiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. Yoshuwa kuenzela tshimenga tshia Debire ne mukalenga uvuamu, muvuaye muenzele tshimenga tshia Ebrone ne tshia Libna, ne bakalenga bavuamu." 
Joshua10:40 Yoshuwa kukuata ditunga dijima. Kutshimunaye bakalenga bavua ku mikuna, bavua mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi mu ditunga, bavua mu mpata nansha ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Kawa mushiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. Yoshuwa kubutula bantu bonsu, muvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muambe." 
Joshua10:41 Yoshuwa kukuata ditunga biangatshile ku Kadeshe-Barneya ne ku Ngaza kuinshi mu ditunga, too ne ku ditunga dia Ngoshene ne tshimenga tshia Ngibone ku mutu." 
Joshua10:42 Kukuataye matunga aa. Kutshimunaye bakalenga abu anu musangu umue. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele nkayende ke uvua uluila bena Izrayele mvita. 
Joshua10:43 Pashishe Yoshuwa ne bena mvita bonsu bavuaye nabu, kupingana mu mitanda yabu ivua mu Ngilgale." 
Joshua11:1 Tshikondu tshivua mukalenga Yabine wa mu Ashore mumane kumvua muvua Yoshuwa mutshimune mu mvita, kubikidishaye Yobabe, mukalenga wa mu Madone, kabidi mukalenga wa mu Shimrone, ne mukalenga wa mu Akeshafe." 
Joshua11:2 Uvua mubikidishe kabidi bakalenga bavua ku mikuna ku mutu wa ditunga, ne bavua mu tshibandabanda tshia Yardene kuinshi kua dijiba dia Ngenesarete, ne bavua mu mpata ne ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Dore luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Joshua11:3 Mukalenga Yabine kumvuangana kabidi ne bena Kenaane, bavua basombe ku musulu wa Yardene, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne luseke ludi diba dibuelela luawu. Kumvuanganaye kabidi ne bena Amore, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Yebusa bavua ku mikuna, ne bena Iti bavua basombe kuinshi, ku mukuna wa Ermone mu ditunga dia Mispa." 
Joshua11:4 Bakalenga bonsu aba kubanga luendu, ne bena mvita kabayi kubala, bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Bavua ne nyama ya tubalu ya bungi, ne matempu a mvita mavule." 
Joshua11:5 Kudisangishabu bonsu muaba umue. Kuyabu ku mpokolu ya mu Merome, badilongolole bua kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Joshua11:6 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Kubatshinyi to. Malaba pa diba ditudi edi, nemfile bantu aba bonsu mu bianza bia bena Izrayele, bamane kutapika mputa ya lufu. Neukose nyama yabu ya tubalu mifimgu ya mikonu. Newoshe matempu abu a mvita." 
Joshua11:7 Yoshuwa ne bena mvita bende kubunda baluishi babu tshimpitshimpi ku mpokolu ya Merome, baluishi abu kabayi banji kudilongolola to." 
Joshua11:8 Maweja-Nangila kufila baluishi aba mu bianza bia bena Izrayele. Bobu kubalondakaja too ne mu thimenga tshinene tshia Sidone tshidi ku mutu, ne ku Misrefote-Mayime, ne mu tshibandabanda tshia Mispa luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Bena Izrayele kubutula baluishi bonsu. Kabawa bashiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi." 
Joshua11:9 Yoshuwa uvua muenze amu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Kukosaye mifungu ya ku mikonu ya nyama ya tubalu, kuosha kabidi matempu abu a mvita." 
Joshua11:10 Musangu uvua Yoshuwa ufumina ku mvita eyi, uvua ukuata tshimenga tshia Ashore. Tshimenga atshi tshivua tshimenga tshinene tshia kale tshia makalenga a ku mutu mu ditunga. Yoshuwa kushipa mukalenga wa tshimenga atshi." 
Joshua11:11 Kushipeshaye kabidi ne bantu bonsu bavuamu. Kabawa bashiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. Kuoshabu tshimenga. 
Joshua11:12 Yoshuwa kutshimuna mu mvita bakalenga bonsu bavua badisangisha abu. Kukuataye kabidi bimenga biabu. Kushipaye bakalenga abu ne bantu bonsu, amu bu muvua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
Joshua11:13 Kadi bena Izrayele kabawa bosha bimenga bivua ku mikuna to, pa kumusha tshimenga tshia Ashore tshivua Yoshuwa moshe." 
Joshua11:14 Bena Izrayele kuangata bimuna ne bintu bivuabu basangana mu bimenga abi. Kadi bavua babutula bantu bonsu. Kabawa bashiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. 
Joshua11:15 Moshe uvua muambile Yoshuwa mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile bua kuenza. Nenku, Yoshuwa uvua uyilonda yonsu." 
Joshua11:16 Yoshuwa kukuata ditunga dijima: mikuna, tshitupa tshia kuinshi, ditunga dia Ngoshene, mpata, tshibandabanda tshia Yardene, mikuna ne mpata bia ku mutu mu ditunga." 
Joshua11:17 Yoshuwa kutshimuna, kushipa bakalenga ba matunga awa pankatshi pa mukuna kauyi ne mitshi, pabuipi ne Seyire, kuinshi mu ditunga, ne Baale-Ngade mu tshibandabanda tshia Lebanone, ku tshitaku tshia mukuna wa Ermone, ku mutu mu ditunga." 
Joshua11:18 Yoshuwa uvua muluangane mvita ne bantu abu matuku mulongulongu. 
Joshua11:19 Amu bena Ivi bavua basombe mu tshimenga tshia Ngibone, bavua batue ndondu ne bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele bavua bakuata bimenga bikuabu bionsu anu ku mvita." 
Joshua11:20 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua usonsola bena ditunga adi bua bapete muoyi wa mvita, baluisha bena Izrayele. Ke muvua bena Izrayele ne bua kushipa bena ditunga adi, kabayi babafuila luse to, kubabutula bonsu butubutu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila nkayende muambile Moshe." 
Joshua11:21 Mu tshikondu atshi, Yoshuwa kuluisha bena Anake, bavua ku mikuna mu Ebrone, mu Debire, mu Anabe, ne ku mikuna yonsu ya ditunga dia Yuda ne dia Izrayele. Yoshuwa kubabutula, kunyangakaja bimenga biabu." 
Joshua11:22 Mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, kamuvua mushale muena Anake nansha umue to. Bavua bashadile anu mu tshimenga tshia Ngaza, tshia Ngate ne tshia Asdode." 
Joshua11:23 Yoshuwa kukuata ditunga dijima mu mvita, muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. Yoshuwa kuabanyina bena Izrayele ditunga adi, bilondeshile bisamba biabu. Ke bena Izrayele kuanji kuikisha bua dipungi dia mvita." 
Joshua12:1 Bena Izrayele bavua bamane kutshimuna bakalenga babidi bavua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene. Bobu kukuata matunga a bakalenga abu, awa malabale, biangatshile ku musulu wa Amone too ne ku mukuna wa Ermone. Matunga aa awa mu tshitupa tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua12:2 Mukalenga wa kumpala uvua Sihone, muena Amore, uvua musombele mu tshimenga tshia Eshebone. Uvua ulombola bantu bavua basomba mu tshitupa tshia tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Amone, biangatshile ku Aroyere, ulombola kabidi bavua basombe mu tshitupa tshia Ngilaade too ne ku musulu wa Yaboke, udi wenza mukalu wa ditunga dia bena Amone." 
Joshua12:3 Sihone uvua kabidi ulombola bantu bavua mu tshibandabanda mu tshitupa tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, biangatshile ku dijiba dia Ngenesarete, luseke lua ku mutu, too ne ku Mayi manene a luepu, pabuipi ne Bete-Yeshimote, ne ku mukuna wa Pisga, kuinshi menemene mu ditunga." 
Joshua12:4 Mukalenga mukuabu uvua Oge. Udi umue wa ku bantu ba ndekelu ba bena Refayime. Uvua ulombola bantu bavua mu Bashane. Uvua usombela mu Ashetarote nansha mu Edreyi. 
Joshua12:5 Bumfumu buende buvua butuadija ku mukuna wa Ermone, buya ku Salka, ku ditunga dijima dia Bashane, too ne ku mikalu ya bena Ngeshure ne ya bena Makati, ne ku tshitupa tshia ditunga dia Ngilaade, too ne ku ditunga dia mukalenga Sihone wa mu Eshebone." 
Joshua12:6 Moshe ne bena Izrayele bavua batshimuna bakalenga aba babidi mu mvita. Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, uvua mumane kufila matunga abu kudi bena Rubene, bena Ngade, ne kudi tshitupa tshia bena Menashe." 
Joshua12:7 Pashishe Yoshuwa ne bena Izrayele kutshimuna bakalenga bavua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Yardene. Matunga abu avua malabale, biangatshile ku Baale-Ngade udi mu tshibandabanda tshia mu Lebanone luseke lua ku mutu, too ne ku mukuna udi kauyi mitshi, udi pabuipi ne Seyire luseke lua kuinshi. Yoshuwa uvua muabanyine bena Izrayele matunga awu, bilondeshile bisamba biabu." 
Joshua12:8 Uvua mubapeshe mikuna, mpata, tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene, buloba bua ku muelelu wa Mayi manene, tshipela ne buloba budi kuinshi mu ditunga. Bantu bavua basombela mu ditunga adi bavua: bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Kenaane, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa." 
Joshua12:9 Bakalenga bavuabu batshimuna mu mvita bavua ba mu bimenga bitudi tutela ebi: Yeriko, Ayi, pabuipi ne Betele," 
Joshua12:10 Yerushalayime, Ebrone," 
Joshua12:11 Yarmute, Lakishe," 
Joshua12:12 Eglone, Ngezere," 
Joshua12:13 Debire, Ngedere," 
Joshua12:14 Orma, Arade," 
Joshua12:15 Libna, Adulame," 
Joshua12:16 Makeda, Betele," 
Joshua12:17 Tapuwa, Efere," 
Joshua12:18 Afeke, Sarone," 
Joshua12:19 Madone, Ashore," 
Joshua12:20 Shimrone-Merone, Akeshafe," 
Joshua12:21 Tanake, Megido," 
Joshua12:22 Kedeshe, Yokneyame wa mu Karmele," 
Joshua12:23 Dore udi ku muelelu wa mayi manene, Ngoyime wa mu Ngalileya," 
Joshua12:24 ne Tirsa. Bakalenga bonsu aba bavua makumi asatu ne umue. 
Joshua13:1 Yoshuwa mumane kukola mukulakaje, Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Monaku muukadi mumane kukulakaja, kadi kutshidi kushala kabidi matunga manene a kukuata," 
Joshua13:2 bu mudi matunga a bena Peleshete, ne a bena Ngeshure," 
Joshua13:3 mmumue ne: ditunga didibu batangila bu dia bena Kenaane, biangatshile ku musulu wa Shikore, ku mikalu ne Ejipitu, too ne ku ditunga dia Ekrone ku mutu wa ditunga. Ke mudi bakalenga batanu ba bena Peleshete. Bimenga biabu binene bia bukalenga: ke Ngaza, Asdode, Askalone, Ngate ne Ekrone. Mudi kabidi ditunga dia bena Avi," 
Joshua13:4 didi kuinshi. Nenukuate kabidi ditunga dia bena Kenaane, biangatshile ku Ara, buloba bua bena Sidone, too ne ku Afeke ku mikalu ya bena Amore." 
Joshua13:5 Nenukuate kabidi ditunga dia Ngebale, dia Lebanone didi luseke ludi diba dipatukila dia Baale-Ngade, kuinshi kua mukuna wa Ermone, too ne ku Lebo-Amate." 
Joshua13:6 Nenukuate kabidi ditunga dia mikuna didi pankatshi pa Lebanone ne Misrefote-Mayime. Bena ditunga adi bonsu badi amu bena Sidone. Padi bena Izrayele basemena ku kakese ku kakese, Meme Maweja-Nangila nembumushile ku bukole bena matunga aa bonsu. Pashishe wewe Yoshuwa, newabanyine bena Izrayele ditunga mu bitupa bishilangane. Neubitshinke anu bu mumvua mukuambile." 
Joshua13:7 Nanku matunga awu udi ne bua kuabanyina bisamba tshitema bia bena Izrayele, ne tshia bibidi tshimue tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, bidi kabiyi bianji kupeta muaba wa kuasa." 
Joshua13:8 Bisamba bia bena Rubene ne bena Ngade, ne tshia bibidi tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, bivua bimane kupeta maloba awa ku musulu wa Yardene, luseke luawu ludi diba dipatukila. Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, uvua mumane kubabanyina maloba awu." 
Joshua13:9 Mikalu ya maloba awu ivua nunku: kuinshi kua ditunga kuvua tshimenga tshia Aroyere tshivua ku musulu wa Amone, ne tshimenga tshidibu base munkatshi mua tshibandabanda tshia musulu awu. Muvua kabidi mikuna ya ku Medeba too ne ku Dibone," 
Joshua13:10 bimenga bia mukalenga Sihone, muena Amore, wa mu Eshebone, uvua ne bumfumu bua ditunga dijima adi too ne ku mikalu ne bena Amone." 
Joshua13:11 Muvua kabidi ditunga dia Ngilaade, dia Ngeshure ne dia Maaka, mukuna wa Ermone, ne ditunga dijima dia Bashane too ne ku Salka." 
Joshua13:12 Muvua kabidi ditunga dia Oge, umue wa ku bakalenga ba ndekelu ba bena Refayime, uvua mukalenga mu Ashetarote ne mu Edreyi mu buloba bua Bashane. Moshe kutshimuna bisamba bia mu matunga aa, kubinyenga maloba abi." 
Joshua13:13 Kadi bena Izrayele kabavua bipata bena Ngeshure ne bena Maaka to. Nenku bantu abu batshidi basomba munkatshi mua bena Izrayele too ne mpindiewu. 
Joshua13:14 Bena tshisamba tshia Levi nkayabu kabawa bapeta maloba to. Bualu ndelanganyi ya bena Levi idi mua kupeta anu bintu ku milambu idi bantu boshila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila nkayende mumane kubalaya." 
Joshua13:15 Buloba buvua Moshe muabanyine tshisamba tshia bena Rubene, bilondeshile meku abu, buvua ne mikalu eyi:" 
Joshua13:16 kuinshi mu ditunga kuvua tshimenga tshia Aroyere tshidi ku muelelu wa musulu wa Amone, ne tshimenga tshivua mu tshibandabanda tshia musulu awu. Mu buloba abu muvua mikuna ya pabuipi ne Medeba." 
Joshua13:17 Muvua kabidi tshimenga tshia Eshebone, ne bimenga bionsu bidi bilonda ebi: Dibone, Bamote-Baale, Bete-Baale-Meyone," 
Joshua13:18 Yakase, Kedemote, Mefate," 
Joshua13:19 Kiriyatayime, Sibma, Serete-Shakare pa kakuna kadi katangilangana ne tshibandabanda," 
Joshua13:20 Bete-Peyore, mukuna wa Pisga ne Bete-Yeshimote." 
Joshua13:21 Muvua kabidi bimenga bia pa mikuna, ne bukalenga bujima bua Sihone, muena Amore, uvua mukalenga mu Eshebone. Moshe uvua mumane kutshimuna Sihone ne bamfumu bende bonsu ba bena Madiyane bavua mu ditunga amu: ke Evi, Rekeme, Sure, Ure ne Reba." 
Joshua13:22 Tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele bavua bashipa kabidi Balaame, muana wa Beyore, muena lubuku." 
Joshua13:23 Mukalu wa ditunga dia bena Rubene, ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, uvua musulu wa Yardene. Bimenga bionsu ebi ne miaba itudi bamane kutela eyi, ke buloba buvuabu babanyina bena tshisamba tshia Rubene, bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua13:24 Buloba buvua Moshe muabanyine bena tshisamba tshia Ngade bilondeshile meku abu," 
Joshua13:25 buvua ne bimenga ebi: Yazere, bimenga bionsu bia mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, tshitupa tshia ditunga dia bena Amone too ne ku Aroyere, pabuipi ne Raba." 
Joshua13:26 Buloba ebu buvua bualabale, biangatshile ku Eshebone too ne ku Ramate-Mispa ne ku Betonime, ku Makanayime too ne ku ditunga dia Lo-Dabare." 
Joshua13:27 Mu tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene muvua kabidi Bete-Arame, Bete-Nimra, Sukote ne Safone, misoku ya mu bukalenga bua Sihone, uvua mukalenga mu Eshebone. Buloba ebu buvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene. Musulu wa Yardene awu uvua wenza mukalu too ne ku dijiba dia Ngenesarete didi ku mutu wa ditunga." 
Joshua13:28 Bimenga bionsu ebi ne miaba itudi batela eyi, bivua buloba buvuabu babanyine bena tshisamba tshia Ngade, bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua13:29 Buloba buvua Moshe muabanyine bena tshia bibidi tshimue tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, bilondeshile meku abu, buvua ne mikalu nenku:" 
Joshua13:30 kuinshi mu ditunga kuvua Makanayime. Mu buloba ebu muvua ditunga dijima dia Bashane, ditunga dijima dia Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, ne misoku makumi asambombu ya Yayire ivua mu ditunga dia Bashane." 
Joshua13:31 Muvua kabidi tshitupa tshia ditunga dia Ngilaade, ne bimenga bia Ashetarote ne Edreyi, bimenga binene bia kale bia Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane. Buloba buonsu ebu bavua babuabanyine tshia bibidi tshia meku a ndelanganyi ya Makire, muana wa Menashe." 
Joshua13:32 Tshikondu tshivua Moshe mu mpata ya Mowabe, uvua muabanye miaba yonsu ivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yeriko, ne lua musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua13:33 Kadi Moshe kuvua mupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Levi buloba to. Uvua ubambila muvua tshiabu tshidibu mua kupeta amu mudimu udibu benzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. 
Joshua14:1 Ke maloba a mu ditunga dia Kenaane avuabu babanyina bena Izrayele kudi mutuangaji Elazare, kudi Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ne kudi bamfumu ba bisamba bishilangane bia bena Izrayele." 
Joshua14:2 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe, bavua batshinka bua kumanya maloba avuabu mua kupesha bisamba bia bena Izrayele tshitema, ne tshia bibidi tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, bivua kabiyi bianji kupeta maloba." 
Joshua14:3 Moshe uvua mumane kuabanyina bisamba bibidi, ne tshia bibidi tshikuabu tshia bena Menashe maloba onsu awa luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene. Kadi kuvua mupeshe ndelanganyi ya Levi buloba to." 
Joshua14:4 Bualu ndelanganyi ya Levi kayivua ne bua kupeta buloba nansha bukese to. Ku ndelanganyi ya Yozefe kuvua bisamba bibidi ebi: tshia Menashe ne tshia Efrayime. Kadi bena Levi bavua bapeta anu bimenga bia kuasamu, ne maloba a kumpenga kua bimenga ebi bua kudishamu bimuna, ne kutekamu bintu biabu bikuabu." 
Joshua14:5 Nanku bena Izrayele bavua babanyangana ditunga dia Kenaane anu mushindu uvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe. 
Joshua14:6 Dituku dikuabu, bena tshisamba tshia Yuda kumonangana ne Yoshuwa ku Ngilgale. Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, wa mu diku dia Kenaze, kuambila Yoshuwa ne: — Uvuluke muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe, muntu wende, bualu buebe ne buanyi ku Kadeshe-Barneya." 
Joshua14:7 Mvua ne bidimu makumi anayi tshikondu tshivua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, muntume bua ngumuke ku Kadeshe-Barneya, nya kutentekela ditunga edi. Pamvua mupingane kudiye, mvua mumuambile malu anu muvuawu." 
Joshua14:8 Kadi bantu batuvua baye nabu, bavua batekesha bena Izrayele mu maboku. Amu meme mvua muleje patoke mundi muitabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi muanyi muonsu." 
Joshua14:9 Dituku adi, Moshe uvua mundaye ne mutshipu bua kumpesha ditunga dimvua muye kutentekela, bua dishale dianyi kashidi, kabidi ne dia ndelanganyi yanyi, bualu mvua muitabe Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua14:10 Mpindiewu kukadi bidimu makumi anayi ne bitanu, bidi Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila Moshe mukenji ewu, tshikondu tshivua bena Izrayele bapitshila mu tshipela. Biangatshile mu tshikondu atshi, Maweja-Nangila utshidi mundame ne muoyi, amu muvuaye mulaye. Mona, nkadi ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu ne bitanu." 
Joshua14:11 Kabidi ntshidi anu ne bukole bu mumvua nabu musangu uvua Moshe muntume bua kutentekela ditunga. Ntshidi amu ne bukole buonsu bumvua nabu tshikondu atshi, nansha bua kuluangana mvita, nansha bua kuenza midimu mikuabu." 
Joshua14:12 Mpindiewu umpeshe panyi buloba bua mikuna buvua Maweja-Nangila mundaye ku kale. Mvua mukuambile diba adi ne: ndelanganyi ya Anake idi luseke alu. Mmiase bimenga binene, bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Kadi bu Maweja-Nangila mungambuluishe, nembipate muvua Maweja-Nangila nkayende mumane kuamba." 
Joshua14:13 Yoshuwa kuela Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, lupemba, kumupesha tshimenga tshia Ebrone." 
Joshua14:14 Too ne lelu, tshimenga etshi tshidi anu tshia ndelanganyi ya Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, wa mu diku dia Kenaze. Bualu uvua muleje muende muonsu mudiye muitabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
Joshua14:15 Tshimenga tshia Ebrone bavua batshinyika kale ne: Arba. Arba uvua muntu wa kale wa bena Anake, uvuabu batue makumbu bikole. Pashishe bena Izrayele kuanji kuikisha, bualu bavua bapungile bikole bua mvita ivuabu baluangana." 
Joshua15:1 Buloba buvuabu batshinka bua kupesha bena Yuda, bilondeshile meku abu, buvua butuadija kuinshi mu ditunga, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ku mukalu ne bena Edome. Tshipela tshia Tsine tshivua tshitupa tshia kuinshi menemene tshia buloba abu." 
Joshua15:2 Mukalu wabu wa kuinshi uvua utuadija kuinshi kua Mayi manene a luepu. 
Joshua15:3 Uvua upitshila kuinshi kua mukuna wa tuminyiminyi, ne kua tshipela tshia Tsine. Kuinshi kua Kadeshe-Barneya, mukalu awu uvua upitshila ku Esrone, ubandila ku Adare. Pashishe uvua ubenda bua kuya ku luseke lua Karka." 
Joshua15:4 Mukalu awu uvua uyila ku Asmone, ufika ku musulu wa Ejipitu bua kuya kudiela mu Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Ke muvua mukalu wa buloba bua bena Yuda luseke lua kuinshi." 
Joshua15:5 Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, mukalu uvua utuadija ku Mayi manene a luepu, utungunuka too ne ku muaba udi musulu wa Yardene udielela mu Mayi manene a luepu. Muaba awu ke uvua mukalu wa ku mutu utuadijila." 
Joshua15:6 Mukalu awu uvua ubandila mu Bete-Ogla, upitshila ku mutu kua Bete-Araba, utungunuka ne ku dibue didibu binyika ne: Bokane. Dina edi divua dia muana wa balume mukuabu wa Rubene." 
Joshua15:7 Mukalu awu uvua upitshila ku tshibandabanda tshia Akore, ubandila kabidi ku Debire, pashishe ubendela ku mutu wa ditunga, uya ku Ngilgale, mutangilangane ne mukuna wa Adumime, udi kuinshi kua lubuwa. Pashishe uvua upitshila pabuipi ne mpokolu ya mayi ya mu Ene-Shemeshe, ushikidila ku Ene-Rogele." 
Joshua15:8 Pashishe mukalu awu uvua ubandila ku tshibandabanda tshia Inome, tshidi kuinshi kua kakuna ka bena Yebusa, muaba udibu base tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Pashishe uvua upitshila ku lusongu lua mukuna ludi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua tshibandabanda tshia Inome, ne luseke lua ku mutu menemene lua tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime."
