Joshua15:9 Muaba awu mukalu uvua ubenda ku mpokolu ya Neftowa, ufika ne ku bimenga bidibu base pabuipi ne mukuna wa Efrone, pashishe utungunuka ku tshimenga tshia Baala, tshidibu binyika kabidi ne: Kiriyate-Yeyarime." 
Joshua15:10 Mukalu awu uvua ubenda luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Baala, utangila ku mukuna wa Seyire, upitshila ku mutu kua mukuna wa Metu, udibu binyika kabidi ne: mukuna wa Keshalone, upuekela tshiakabidi ku Bete-Shemeshe, upitshila ku Timna." 
Joshua15:11 Uvua utungunuka, uya ku luseke lua kumutu lua tshimenga tshia Ebrone, ubenda mutangile ku Shikarone, utungunuka, upitshila ku mukuna wa Baala, uya ku Yabne, pashishe utua makasa ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, wimana." 
Joshua15:12 Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga ke awa enza mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dibuelela. Ke muvua mikalu ya buloba bua bena Yuda bilondeshile muvua meku abu nanku. 
Joshua15:13 Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, uvua mupete tshitupa tshia buloba bua bena Yuda, anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila Yoshuwa. Bavua bamupesha tshimenga tshi Kiriyate-Arba, tshidibu binyika Arba, nkambua wa bena Anake. Kadi lelu badi binyika tshimenga tshia Arba dina dikuabu dia Ebrone." 
Joshua15:14 Kalebe wakipata meku asatu abena Anake awa mu tshimenga atshi: ke bena Sheshayi, bena Akimane ne bena Talmayi." 
Joshua15:15 Ke kumukaye mu Ebrone, bua kuya kuluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Debire, tshivuabu binyika tshikondu atshi Kiriyate-Sefere." 
Joshua15:16 Kalebe uvua mulaye ne: muntu yonsu udi ukuata tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Sefere, ndi mmuselesha Aksa, muananyi wa bakaji." 
Joshua15:17 Otniyele, muana wa Kenaze, uvua muana wa muanabu ne Kalebe, kukuata tshimenga atshi. Kalebe kumupesha muanende Aksa bua ikale mukajende." 
Joshua15:18 Aksa ufika pabuipi ne Otniyele, kumupeshaye meji bua alombe budimi kudi tatuende Kalebe. Pashishe Aksa kutuluka pa mpunde wende, tatuende Kalebe kumuebeja ne: — Udi musue tshinyi?" 
Joshua15:19 Aksa kuandamuna ne: — Ungenzele tshindi nkulomba etshi: umpeshe mpokolu ya mayi, bualu buloba bua kuinshi mu ditunga buudi mumpeshe kabuena ne mayi to, mbuume. Kalebe kumupesha mpokolu ya mayi ivua ku mutu, ne ivua kuinshi mu buloba buabu." 
Joshua15:20 Ke buloba buvuabu babanyine bena tshisamba tshia Yuda, bilondyshile meku abu." 
Joshua15:21 Bimenga bivuabu base mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi mu buloba bua bena Yuda, pabuipi ne Edome, ku mikalu, bivua nunku: Kabseyele, Edere, Yagure," 
Joshua15:22 Kina, Dimona, Adeyada," 
Joshua15:23 Kedeshe, Ashore, Itnane," 
Joshua15:24 Zife, Teleme, Beyalote," 
Joshua15:25 Ashore-Adata, Keriyote, Esrone uvuabu binyika kabidi Ashore," 
Joshua15:26 Amame, Shema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Ashare-Ngada, Eshemone, Bete-Pelete," 
Joshua15:28 Ashare-Shuwale, Bersheba ne misoku ivua mutumba," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iyime, Esheme," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolade, Keshile, Orma," 
Joshua15:31 Siklaje, Madmana, Sanesana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebayote, Shilime ne Ene-Rimone. Bimenga ebi bionsu bivua makumi abidi ne tshitema, tusakidile kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:33 Bimenga bivuabu base mu mpata bivua nenku: Eshetayole, Sora, Ashena," 
Joshua15:34 Zanowa, Ene-Nganime, Tapuwa, Ename," 
Joshua15:35 Yarmute, Adulame, Soko, Azeka," 
Joshua15:36 Sharayime, Aditayime, Ngedera ne Ngederotayime. Bimenga ebi bionsu bivua dikumi ne binayi; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:37 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Senane, Adasha, Migdale-Ngade," 
Joshua15:38 Dilane, Mispa, Yokteyele," 
Joshua15:39 Lakishe, Boskate, Eglone," 
Joshua15:40 Kabone, Lakemase, Kitlishe," 
Joshua15:41 Ngederote, Bete-Dagone, Naama ne Makeda. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua dikumi ne bisambombu; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:42 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Libna, Etere, Ashane," 
Joshua15:43 Ifta, Ashena, Neshibe," 
Joshua15:44 Keyila, Akzibe ne Maresha. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua tshitema; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:45 Kuvua kabidi tshimenga tshia Ekrone, tshisangisha pamue ne miaba ne misoku ivua natshi mutumba." 
Joshua15:46 Kuvua kabidi bimenga bionsu ne misoku, bivuabu base pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Asdode, pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Ekrone ne Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Joshua15:47 Kuvua kabidi tshimenga tshia Asdode ne tshia Ngaza, ne miaba ne misoku ivua pabuipi ne bimenga abi, bifika too ne ku musulu wa Ejipitu, ne ku muelelu wa Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Joshua15:48 Bimenga bivuabu base ku mikuna bivua nenku: Shamire, Yatire, Soko," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Kiriyate-Sana uvuabu binyika kabidi Debire," 
Joshua15:50 Anabe, Eshtemowa, Anime," 
Joshua15:51 Ngoshene, Olone ne Ngilo. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua dikumi ne tshimue; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:52 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Arabe, Ruma, Eshane," 
Joshua15:53 Yanume, Bete-Tapuwa, Afeka," 
Joshua15:54 Umeta, Kiriyate-Arba uvuabu binyika kabidi Ebrone, ne Siyore. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua tshitema; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:55 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Mayone, Karmele, Zife, Yuta," 
Joshua15:56 Yizreyele, Yokdeyame, Zanowa," 
Joshua15:57 Kayine, Ngibeya ne Timna. Bimenga ebi bionsu bivua dikumi; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:58 Pashishe muvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Alule, Bete-Sure, Ngedore," 
Joshua15:59 Maraate, Bete-Anote ne Eltekone. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua bisambombu; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:60 Kuvua kabidi tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Baale, tshivuabu binyika kabidi Kiriyate-Yeyarime, ne tshimenga tshia Raba. Bimenga ebi bivua bibidi; muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:61 Bimenga bivuabu base mu tshipela bivua nenku: Bete-Araba, Midine, Sekaka," 
Joshua15:62 Nibeshane, tshimenga tshia luepu, ne Ene-Ngedi. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua bisambombu; muvua kabidi ne misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua15:63 Ndelanganyi ya Yuda kayiwa mua kuipata bena Yebusa bavua base mu Yerushalayime. Nanku too ne ku lelu bena Yebusa badi basomba mu Yerushalayime muaba umue ne bena Yuda. 
Joshua16:1 Buloba buvuabu batshinka bua kupesha ndelanganyi ya Yozefe, buvua ne mukalu wabu nenku: kuinshi uvua utuadijila ku musulu wa Yardene, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Yeriko, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua mpokolu uvua ufikisha mayi mu tshimenga. Biangatshile mu Yeriko, mukalu awu uvua upitshila mu tshipela, ufika ne ku mikuna ya Betele." 
Joshua16:2 Muaba awu, mukalu uvua utungunuka too ne ku Luze, upitshila mu Atarote, muaba udi bena Arki." 
Joshua16:3 Pashishe udi upueka ku bena Yafleti luseke ludi diba dibuelela. Mukalu mumane kupitshila ku Bete-Orone wa kuinshi ne ku Ngezere, udi ushikidila ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Joshua16:4 Nanku ndelanganyi ya Yozefe, mmumue ne: bena tshisamba tshia Menashe, ne tshia Efrayime, bavua babanyangana buloba abu." 
Joshua16:5 Bena tshisamba tshia Efrayime bavua bapeta buloba bilondeshile meku abu. Mukalu wa buloba abu uvua utuadija ku Atrote-Adare kuinshi mu ditunga luseke ludi diba dipatukila, uya too ne ku Bete-Orone wa ku mutu." 
Joshua16:6 Biangatshile muaba awu, mukalu uvua ufika too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Ku mutu mu ditunga, mukalu uvua upitshila pabuipi ne Mikmetate. Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Mikmetate, mukalu awu uvua utungunuka too ne ku Tanate-Silo, ukupitshila, uya ku Yanowa." 
Joshua16:7 Pashishe uvua upueka ku Atarote ne ku Nara, ufika ku Yeriko, ushikidila ku musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua16:8 Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Mikmetate, mukalu uvua umuka ku Tapuwa, ufika ne ku musulu wa Kana, ufika ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Ke muvua buloba buvuabu babanyina bena Efrayime bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua16:9 Ku buloba bua bena Efrayime abu, bavua basakidilaku kabidi bimenga, ne misoku ivua nabi mutumba, bia mu buloba bua bena Menashe." 
Joshua16:10 Bena Efrayime kabavua bipata bena Kenaane bavua mu Ngezere to. Bobu aba batshidi basomba too ne lelu munkatshi mua bena Efrayime. Kadi bena Efrayime bavua benzeja bena Kenaane aba midimu mishilangane. 
Joshua17:1 Ndelanganyi ya Menashe, muanabute wa Yozefe, kupetayi wayi muaba. Bakavua bamane kupesha ndelanganyi ya Makire, muanabute wa Menashe, tshilobu tshia mvita, muikale kabidi tatuende wa Ngilaade, tshitupa tshia buloba: ke ditunga dia Ngilaade ne dia Bashane, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua17:2 Bavua babanyina meku makuabu a bena Menashe biabu bitupa bia maloba. Meku awu awa nenku: diku dia Abiyezere, dia Eleke, dia Asriyele, dia Shekeme, dia Efere ne dia Shemida. Bonsu aba bavua ndelanganyi ya Menashe, muana wa Yozefe." 
Joshua17:3 Selofade uvua muana wa Efere, kabidi muikulu wa Ngilaade. Ngilaade uvua muana wa Makire, ne muikulu wa Menashe. Kadi Selofade kuvua mulele bana ba balume to. Uvua mulele anu ba bakaji. Mena a bana aba ke Mala, Nowa, Ogla, Milka ne Tirsa." 
Joshua17:4 Bana ba bakaji abu kuya kudi mutuangaji Elazare, kudi Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ne kudi balombodi ba bena Izrayele, babambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua muelele Moshe mukenji bua atuabanyine maloba, bu mudibu babanyine bantu balume ba tshisamba tshietu. Nanku, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba, kubabanyinabu maloba, anu bu muvuabu babanyine bantu balume ba tshisamba tshiabu." 
Joshua17:5 Tshisamba tshia Menashe kupeta bitupa bia maloba dikumi, katuyi tubala buloba bua Ngilaade ne bua Bashane, awa luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua17:6 Kabena bapesha amu bantu balume ba mu tshisamba tshia Menashe nkayabu maloba to. Bavua baapesha kabidi bantu bakaji ba mu tshisamba etshi. (Buloba bua Ngilaade buvua bua ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Menashe.) 
Joshua17:7 Buloba bua Menashe buvua butuadijila ku Ashere, buya too ne ku Mikmetate, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Shekeme. Kumukila ku Mikmetate, mukalu uvua upuekela kuinshi muditunga, uya too ne ku muaba uvua bena Ene-Tapuwa." 
Joshua17:8 Buloba ebu buvua bua bena Menashe. Kadi bavua bapesha bena Efrayime tshimenga tshia Tapuwa tshivua ku mukalu. 
Joshua17:9 Pashishe mukalu kuya too ne ku muelelu wa kuinshi wa musulu wa Kana. Kadi bimenga bionsu bivua kuinshi kua musulu awu, nansha biobi mu buloba bua bena Menashe, kushalabi bia bena Efrayime. Mukalu uvua umbukila muaba awu, upitshila ku mutu kua musulu awu, bangabanga ne kushikidilawu ku Mayi menene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Joshua17:10 Nanku tshisamba tshia bena Efrayime tshivua tshipeta buloba kuinshi mu ditunga, tshia bena Menashe tshipeta ku mutu mu ditunga. Mayi manene a pankatshi awa enza mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dibuelela. Tshisamba tshia bena Ashere tshivua luseke lua ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, luseke ludi diba dibuelela luatshi. Tshisamba tshia bena Isakare tshivua kabidi ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, kadi luseke ludi diba dipatukila luatshi." 
Joshua17:11 Kadi mu buloba bua bena Isakare ne bua bena Ashere, bena Menashe kupeta misoku ya Bete-Sheyane, Ibleyame, ne miaba ivua nayi mutumba. Kupetatshi kabidi Dore, Ene-Dore, Tanake, Megido, ne bantu bonsu bavua basombamu, too ne miaba ivua mutumba, mmumue ne buloba bujima bua Dore." 
Joshua17:12 Kadi bena Menashe kabawa mua kuipata bantu ba mu bimenga bionsu ebi. Nanku bena Kenaane batshidi basomba amu kusombamu too me mpindiewu. 
Joshua17:13 Nansha muvua bena Izrayele bamane kupeta bukole bua bungi, kadi kabavua mua kuipata bantu ba mu bimenga bionsu ebi. Kadi bena Izrayele bavua benzeja bantu aba midimu mishilangane." 
Joshua17:14 Ndelanganyi ya Yozefe kukonka Yoshuwa ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmumane kutuela lupemba bua tuvulangane. Kadi udi utuabanyina tshitupa tshia ditunga amu tshimue bua tshinyi? 
Joshua17:15 Yoshuwa kuandamuna ne: — Bu munudi ba bungi, mikuna ya Efrayime kayiyi minukumbane, nudi mua kuya kusola ne kudima mu metu a bena Perizi ne bena Refayime." 
Joshua17:16 Ndelanganyi ya Yozefe kubenga, bamba ne: — Bushuwa, mikuna kayena mikumbane to. Kadi bena Kenaane badi basa mu mpata, nansha bena Bete-Sheyane, ne bena misoku idi nabu mutumba, nansha badi basomba mu tshibandabanda tshia Yizreyele, badi bonsu ne matempu a mvita a biamu." 
Joshua17:17 Ke Yoshuwa kuambila ndelanganyi ya Yozefe, bena mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime, ne bena mu tshisamba tshia Menashe tshivua useke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Yardene ne: — Nudi bavule, nudi kabidi ne bukole bua bungi. Nanku kanuena mua kushala amu ne tshitupa tshimue mu ditunga to." 
Joshua17:18 Nuangate mikuna yonsu idi ne metu. Nusole, nudime metu awu, nuase miaba yonsu ayi. Nanku nenupete mushindu wa mua kuipata bena Kenaane, nansha bobu bikale ne matempu a mvita a biamu, bikale kabidi ne bukole." 
Joshua18:1 Bena Izrayele bamane kukuata ditunga, kudisangishabu bonsu mu Silo. Kuasabu ntenta wa kusambakena muaba awu." 
Joshua18:2 Kadi kuvua kushala kabidi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bisamba muanda mutekete bivua kabiyi bianji kupeta abi maloba." 
Joshua18:3 Nanku Yoshuwa kukonka bena Izrayele ne: — Nenuye kukuata ditunga divua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu munupe diba kaayi? Tshinudi bindile ntshinyi? 
Joshua18:4 Sungulayi bantu balume basatu ku tshisamba tshionsu. Nembatume bua bendakane ditunga dijima, bamone mushindu udidi. Bantu aba nebajadike bimpe mushindu udi tshitupa tshia buloba tshidi bisamba biabu mua kupeta. Pashishe, nebapingane bua kungambila bionsu bikalabu bamone." 
Joshua18:5 Bantu abu nebabanye buloba mu bitupa muanda mutekete. Ndelanganyi ya Yuda neyishale mu tshiayi tshitupa tshia buloba tshidi kuinshi mu ditunga. Ndelanganyi ya Yozefe kabidi neyishale mu tshiayi tshitupa tshidi ku mutu mu ditunga. 
Joshua18:6 Kadi nujadike bimpe mushindu udi bitupa bikuabu muana mutekete bia buloba abu. Nupingane bua kungambila bionsu binuikala bamone. Kadi muaba udi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu ke undi meme mua kutshinkila bua kumanya tshitupa tshia buloba tshidibu mua kuangata kudi tshionsu tshia ku bisamba bienu. 
Joshua18:7 Ndelanganyi ya Levi kayena mua kupeta tshiayi tshitupa tshia buloba to. Bualu tshiabu tshintu tshidi amu mudimu wa batuangaji udibu benzela Maweja-Nangila. Kadi tshisamba tshia Ngade, tshia Rubene, ne tshia bibidi tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, mbimane kupeta biabu bitupa bia buloba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene. Moshe nkayende, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, ke uvua mubapeshe miaba yabu." 
Joshua18:8 Bantu bavuabu basungula bua kuya kutentekela ditunga kudilongolola bua kuya. Bangabanga ne kumukabu, Yoshuwa kubambila ne: — Nuye, nuendakane ditunga dijima. Nujadike bimpe menemene mushindu udidi. Nupingane bua kungambila bionsu binuikala bamone. Nanku amu munemu mu Silo, muaba udi Maweja-Nangila, meme nentshinke bua kumanya bitupa bia buloba bishilangane binudi mua kupeta." 
Joshua18:9 Bantu abu kuendakana ditunga dijima. Kufundabu bionsu bivuabu bamone mu bitupa bia buloba abi muanda mutekete. Kufundabu kabidi mena a bimenga bionsu bivuamu. Pashishe kupinganabu muaba uvua Yoshuwa mu mitanda ya mu Silo. 
Joshua18:10 Muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila, Yoshuwa kutshinka bua kumanya mushindu uvuabu mua kuabanyina bena Izrayele bitupa bia buloba abi. Yoshuwa kupesha tshisamba tshionsu tshiatshi tshitupa tshia buloba mu ditunga adi." 
Joshua18:11 Buloba bua kumpala buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine, bilondeshile meku abu. Buloba ebu buvua pankatshi pa buloba bua bena Yuda ne buloba bua ndelanganyi ya Yozefe." 
Joshua18:12 Mukalu wabu ku mutu wa ditunga uvua utuadijila ku musulu wa Yardene, ubandila luseke lua ku mutu kua tshimenga tshia Yeriko, utungunukila ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, upitshila mu mikuna, ufika too ne ku tshipela tshia Bete-Avene." 
Joshua18:13 Umuka muaba awu, mukalu uvua mutangile ku Luze, upitshila luseke lua kuinshi kua tshimenga tshia Luze, tshidibu binyika kabidi Betele. Pashishe uvua upitshila ku mukuna uvua kuinshi kua Bete-Orone wa kuinshi, upuekela ku Atrote-Adare." 
Joshua18:14 Luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua ku mukuna awu, mukalu uvua ubendela luseke lua kuinshi, ushikidila ku Kiriyate-Baale, udibu binyika kabidi Kiriyate-Yeyarime, udi wa tshisamba tshia bena Yuda. Ke mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Joshua18:15 Mukalu wa kuinshi uvua utuadijila ku Kiriyate-Yeyarime, uya luseke lua ku Ngasine, ushikidila ku mpokolu ya mayi ku Neftowa." 
Joshua18:16 Umuka muaba awu, udi upueka kuinshi kua mukuna udi utangila tshibandabanda tshia Inome, tshidi ku mutu kua tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime. Pashishe mukalu awu uvua ulonda tshibandabanda tshia Inome, upueka kuinshi kua kakuna ka bena Yebusa, utungunuka upueka amu kupueka too ne ku Ene-Rogele." 
Joshua18:17 Pashishe uvua ubenda, ulonda luseke lua ku mutu, utangila ku Ene-Shemeshe, uya ku Ngelilote, mutangilangane ne mukuna wa Adumime. Umuka muaba awu, udi upuekela luseke ludi dibue didibu binyika Bokane, dina dia muana wa balume wa Rubene." 
Joshua18:18 Pashishe mukalu awu udi ulonda tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene, upitshila ku mutu kua mukuna udi utangila tshibandabanda atshi." 
Joshua18:19 Udi utungunuka luseke lua ku mutu kua Bete-Ogla, ushikidila ku mutu menemene kua Mayi manene a luepu, muaba udi musulu wa Yardene udielamu. Ke mukalu wa kuinshi mu ditunga." 
Joshua18:20 Musulu wa Yardene uvua wenza mukalu wa ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Ke mushindu uvua mikalu ya buloba buvua Yoshuwa muabanyine tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine, bilondeshile mudi meku abu." 
Joshua18:21 Bimenga bia meku a bena Binyamine bivua: Yeriko, Bete-Ogla, Emeke-Keshise," 
Joshua18:22 Bete-Araba, Semarayime, Betele," 
Joshua18:23 Avime, Para, Ofra," 
Joshua18:24 Kefare-Amona, Ofni ne Ngeba. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua dikumi ne bibidi, tusangishe ne misoku ivua mutumba." 
Joshua18:25 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Ngibone, Rama, Beyerote," 
Joshua18:26 Mispa, Kefira, Mosha," 
Joshua18:27 Rekeme, Irpeyele, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Sela, Elefe, tshimenga tshia bena Yebusa, mmumue ne: Yerushalayime, Ngibeya ne Kiriyate. Bimenga bionsu bivua dikumi ne binayi, tusangishe ne misoku ivua mutumba. Ke buloba bua bena Binyamine bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:1 Buloba buibidi buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Shimeyone, bilondeshile muvua meku abu. Buloba ebu bavua babunyungulukila kudi buloba bua tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Joshua19:2 Mu buloba abu muvua bimenga ebi: Bersheba, Sheba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Ashare-Shuwale, Baala, Esheme," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolade, Betule, Orma," 
Joshua19:5 Siklaje, Bete-Markabote, Ashare-Susa," 
Joshua19:6 Bete-Lebayote ne Sharuyene. Bimenga bionsu bivua dikumi ne bisatu. Muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba. 
Joshua19:7 Kuvua kabidi bimenga ebi: Ayine, Rimone, Etere ne Ashane. Bimenga ebi bivua binayi. Muvua kabidi misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
Joshua19:8 Ku bimenga ebi bavua bakusakidila misoku yonsu ivua nabi pabuipi, too ne ku Balate-Bere ne Ramote-Negebe. Bimenga bionsu ebi bivua bienza buloba bua bena Shimeyone, bilondeshile mudi meku abu." 
Joshua19:9 Bavua bangata buloba bua bena Shimeyone ku buloba bua bena Yuda. Bualu ndelanganyi ya Yuda ivua mipete buloba bupite bunene. Ke pavua tshisamba tshia bena Shimeyone munkatshi mua buloba buvuabu babanyine bena Yuda. 
Joshua19:10 Buloba buisatu buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubuabanyine tshisamba tshia bena Zebulone, bilondeshile muvua meku abu. Buloba buabu abu buvua mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga too ne ku Saride." 
Joshua19:11 Kumukila ku Saride, mukalu wabu uvua ubandila ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, utungunuka ne ku Marala. Pashishe uvua ulunguluka ufika kabidi ku Dabeshete, ne ku musulu udi ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yokneyame." 
Joshua19:12 Ku luseke lukuabu lua Saride, mukalu uvua uyila ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, upitshila mu buloba bua Kislote-Tabore, usambukila ku Dabrate, ubanda ufika ku Yafiya." 
Joshua19:13 Pashishe uvua utungunuka, Dinemenene ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, uya too ne ku Ngate-Efere ne ku Ete-Kashine, ufika ku Rimone, ubenda ku Neya." 
Joshua19:14 Ku mutu wa ditunga, mukalu uvua unyunguluka Anatone, ushikidila mu tshibandabanda tshia Ifta-Ele." 
Joshua19:15 Mu buloba ebu muvua bimenga dikumi ne bibidi, kabidi ne misoku ivua pabuipi ne bimenga abi. Bimenga bisunguluke bivua: Katate, Nakalale, Shimrone, Idala ne Betleyeme." 
Joshua19:16 Misoku yonsu eyi bavua bayabanyine tshisamba tshia bena Zebulone, bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua19:17 Buloba buinayi buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Isakare, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:18 Mu buloba abu muvua bimenga ebi: Yizreyele, Keshulote, Shuneme," 
Joshua19:19 Afarayime, Kiyone, Anakarate," 
Joshua19:20 Rabite, Kishiyone, Ebese," 
Joshua19:21 Remete, Ene-Nganime, Ene-Ada ne Bete-Pashese." 
Joshua19:22 Mukalu wabu uvua ufika ku Tabore, Shashayime, Bete-Shemeshe, ushikidila ku musulu wa Yardene. Mu buloba ebu muvua bimenga dikumi ne bisambombu, muvua kabidi misoku ivua pabuipi ne bimenga ebi." 
Joshua19:23 Bionsu ebi bivua mu buloba buvua bena Isakare bapeta, bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua19:24 Buloba buitanu buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Ashere, bilondeshile meku abu." 
Joshua19:25 Mu buloba abu muvua bimenga ebi: Elkate, Ali, Betene, Akeshafe," 
Joshua19:26 Alameleke, Amade ne Mishale. Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, mukalu uvua ufika ku mukuna wa Karmele, ulonda musulu wa Shikore-Libnate." 
Joshua19:27 Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, mukalu uvua ubandila ku Bete-Dagone, ufika mu buloba bua bena Zebulone ne mu tshibandabanda tshia Ifta-Ele. Pashishe uvua uyila ku luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga, ufika ku Bete-Emeke ne ku Neyiyele. Uvua utungunukila amu ku luseke alu, upitshila ku Kabule," 
Joshua19:28 Abdone, Rekobe, Amone ne ku Kana, bua kushikidila pabuipi ne tshimenga tshinene tshia Sidone." 
Joshua19:29 Pashishe uvua ubendela muaba awu, utangila ku Rama ne ku tshidila tshia Tire, tshidibu bakolesha ne bimana, uya ku Osha, upitshila ku Makalabe, Akzibe," 
Joshua19:30 Uma, Afeke, Rekobe, bua kushikidila ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Mu buloba ebu muvua bimenga makumi abidi ne bibidi. Muvua kabidi ne misoku ivua nabi pabuipi." 
Joshua19:31 Bionsu ebi bivua mu buloba buvua bena Ashere bapeta, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:32 Buloba basambombu buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Naftali, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:33 Mukalu wabu uvua utuadijila kuinshi ku Elefe ne ku mutshi wa lusanga wa ku Sananime. Uvua upitshila ku Adami-Nekebe ne Yabneyele, ufika ku Lakume, ushikidila ku musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua19:34 Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, mukalu uvua ubenda uya ku Aznote-Tabore, ufika ku Ukoke, uyila kuinshi kua buloba bua bena Zebulone, pashishe luseke ludi diba dibuelela uvua ulonda buloba bua bena Ashere. Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, mukalu uvua anu musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua19:35 Bimenga bivua ne bimana bikolesha bivua: Sidime, Sere, Amate, Rakate, Kinerete," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Rama, Ashore," 
Joshua19:37 Kedeshe, Edreyi, Ene-Ashore," 
Joshua19:38 Irane, Migdale-Ele, Oreme, Bete-Anate ne Bete-Shemeshe. Bimenga bionsu pamue bivua dikumi ne tshitema. Kuvua kabidi misoku ivua mutumba ne bimenga abi." 
Joshua19:39 Bionsu ebi bivua mu buloba buvua bena tshisamba tshia Naftali bapete, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:40 Buloba bua muanda mutekete buvua Yoshuwa mutshinke, uvua mubupeshe bena tshisamba tshia Dane, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:41 Mu buloba abu muvua bimenga ebi: Sora, Eshetayole, Ire-Shemeshe," 
Joshua19:42 Shalabine, Ayalone, Itla," 
Joshua19:43 Elone, Timna, Ekrone," 
Joshua19:44 Elteke, Ngibetone, Batate," 
Joshua19:45 Yekude, Bene-Berake, Ngate-Rimone," 
Joshua19:46 musulu wa Yarkone, Rakone, ne buloba budi bunyungulula Yafa." 
Joshua19:47 Tshikondu tshiyuabu bipata bena tshisamba tshia Dane mu buloba buabu, kuyabu kuluisha bena Lesheme. Kukuatabu tshimenga atshi, kushipa benatshi. Pashishe kuasabu mu tshimenga atshi tshijima. Nanku kukudimunabu dina dia tshimenga tshia Lesheme, kutshinyika nkambua wabu Dane." 
Joshua19:48 Bimenga bionsu ebi, ne misoku ivua pamue ne bimenga ebi, bivua mu buloba buvuabu babanyine bena Dane, bilondeshile muvua meku abu." 
Joshua19:49 Bena Izrayele bamane kujikija diabanyangana dia ditunga, bavua bapesha pende Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, tshitupa tshia buloba." 
Joshua19:50 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba, kupeshabu Yoshuwa tshimenga tshia Timnate-Sera tshivuaye mulombe. Tshimenga atshi tshivua mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Yoshuwa kuasulula tshimenga atshi, kusombamu." 
Joshua19:51 Mutuangaji Elazare, Yoshuwa muana wa Nune, ne bamfumu ba meku a bisamba bia bena Izrayele, kutshinka bua kuabanya maloba onsu aa. Bavua babanyanganawu pavuabu mu Silo, muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila, mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Ke muvuabu bajikija mudimu wa diabanyangana ditunga nanku." 
Joshua20:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yoshuwa 
Joshua20:2 bua amanyishe bena Izrayele mikenji eyi ne: — Nusungule bimenga bia kunyemena, bimvua mumane kumanyisha Moshe bua nusungule." 
Joshua20:3 Padi muntu wa munkatshi muenu, ushipa muntu mukuabu mu mpukapuka, kayi mumushipe ku bukole, udi mua kunyemena mu tshimenga tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi, bua musombuedi kamushipi to." 
Joshua20:4 Padi muntu uvua mushipangane awu mumane kufika mu tshimenga tshia kunyemena, udi wimanyina ku tshibuelelu, muaba udibu balumbuluishila bantu bonsu. Udi umvuija bakulu badi muaba awu, mushindu uvua njiwu mienzeke. Pashishe bakulu badi bamuanyisha bua abuele mu tshimenga, bamuleja muaba udiye mua kusomba." 
Joshua20:5 Padi musombuedianganyi ulondakaja uvua mushipangane awu, too ne mu tshimenga tshia kunyemena, bena mu tshimenga kabena mua kufila muntu awu kudi musombuedi to. Bualu uvua mushipangane awu uvua mushipe muntu mu mpukapuka; kabivua bua lukinu to." 
Joshua20:6 Nanku muntu uvua mushipangane awu, neashale mu tshimenga atshi too ne padibu bamulumbuluisha kudi bena Izrayele, kabidi too ne padi mutuangaji uvua wenza mudimu mu tshikondu atshi ufua. Pashishe uvua mushipangane awu udi upingana kuende, mu tshimenga tshivuaye munyeme." 
Joshua20:7 Bena Izrayele kusungula bimenga bia kunyemena: ke Kedeshe udi mu Ngalileya luseke lua mikuna ya Naftali; Shekeme luseke lua mikuna ya Efrayime; ne Kiriyate-Arba uvuabu binyika kabidi Ebrone, luseke lua mikuna ya Yuda." 
Joshua20:8 Luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga tshia Yeriko, dishiya dia musulu wa Yardene, bavua basungula tshimenga tshia Beshere tshidi mu mpata ya mu tshipeta ya mu buloba bua bena Rubene; tshimenga kabidi tshia Ramote tshidi mu Ngilaade, buloba budibu bapeshe bena Ngade; ne tshimenga tshia Ngolane mu Bashane, buloba budibu bapeshe bena Menashe." 
Joshua20:9 Bimenga ebi bavua babisungula bua bena Izrayele ne benyi badi munkatshi muabu banyemenemu. Nanku pavua muntu ushipangana mu mpukapuka, udi mushipangane awu uvua unyema mumusombuedi anu mushindu ewu. Nanku kabawa mua kushipa muntu awu, kabayi banji kumulumbuluisha kudi bena Izrayele to." 
Joshua21:1 Bamfumu ba meku a bena Levi, kuya kudi mutuangaji Elazare, kudi Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, ne kudi bamfumu ba meku makuabu a bisamba bia bena Izrayele," 
Joshua21:2 mu Silo, mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Kubambilabu ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kutumina Moshe diyi, bua nutupe bimenga bitudi mua kusomba, ne mpata idi pabuipi nabi, itudi mua kudishila bimuna bietu." 
Joshua21:3 Nanku bena Izrayele kusungula mu maloba abu bimenga, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna, bua kubipesha bena Levi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
Joshua21:4 Kutshinkabu bilondeshile muvua meku a bena Levi. Kusungulabu kumpala ndelanganyi ya Kekate. Ku ndelanganyi ya Kekate kutshinkabu ndelanganyi ya mutuangaji Arone, kubapeshabu bimenga dikumi ne bisatu, bivua mu buloba bua Yuda, bua Shimeyone ne bua Binyamine." 
Joshua21:5 Ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Kekate kupeta bimenga dikumi, bivua mu buloba bua bena Efrayime, bua bena Dane ne bua tshitupa tshia bena Menashe tshivua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Yardene." 
Joshua21:6 Meku a ndelanganyi ya Ngershone kupeta bimenga dikumi ne bisatu, bivua mu buloba bua bena Isakare, bua bena Ashere, bua bena Naftali, ne bua tshitupa tshia bena Menashe tshivua mu Bashane." 
Joshua21:7 Meku a ndelanganyi ya Merari kupeta bimenga dikumi ne bibidi, bivua mu buloba bua bena Rubene, bua bena Ngade, ne bua bena Zebulone." 
Joshua21:8 Bena Izrayele kutshinka mushindu udibu mua kuabanyina ndelanganyi ya Levi bimenga bionsu ebi, ne miaba ya kudishila bimuna. Ke muvua bena Izrayele bakumbaje bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila Moshe." 
Joshua21:9 Mena a bimenga bia bena Yuda ne bia bena Shimeyone bivuabu babanyine 
Joshua21:10 ndelanganyi ya Arone ya mu diku dia Kekate, muana wa Levi, adi nenku: ndelanganyi ya Arone mene ke ivuabu batshinkike bua bapete bimenga kumpala." 
Joshua21:11 Bavua babapeshe tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Arba, tshidibu binyika kabidi Arba, dina dia nkambua wa bena Anake. Badi binyika tshimenga atshi mpindiewu Ebrone. Bavua batshiasa luseke lua mikuna mu buloba bua Yuda. Kupeshabu ndelanganyi ya Arone tshimenga etshi, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna ivua pabuipi." 
Joshua21:12 Kadi madimi ne misoku bivua bena tshimenga atshi batangila, bavua bamane kubiabanyina Kalebe, muana wa Yefune." 
Joshua21:13 Pamue ne tshimenga tshia Ebrone, tshivua tshimue tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena, ndelanganyi ya mutuangaji Arone kupeta kabidi bimenga ebi: Libna," 
Joshua21:14 Yatire, Eshtemowa," 
Joshua21:15 Olone, Debire," 
Joshua21:16 Ashane, Yuta, Bete-Shemeshe. Bimenga bionsu bivua tshitema, kabidi ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Bionsu ebi bivua mu buloba bua bena Yuda ne bua bena Shimeyone." 
Joshua21:17 Mu buloba bua bena Binyamine, bavua bapeta bimenga ebi: Ngibone, Ngeba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatote ne Alemete. Bimenga bionsu bivua binayi, kusangisha kabidi ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
Joshua21:19 Nanku bimenga bionsu bisanga bivuabu bapete kudi batuangaji ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, bivua dikumi ne bisatu, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
Joshua21:20 Meku makuabu a ndelanganyi ya Kekate kupetawu bimenga bivuabu batshinke, bivua mu buloba bua bena Efrayime." 
Joshua21:21 Ke tshimenga tshia Shekeme, tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena, tshivua luseke lua mikuna; tshimenga tshia Ngezere," 
Joshua21:22 tshia Kibsayime, ne tshia Bete-Orone. Bimenga bionsu bivua binayi, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna ivua pabuipi nabi." 
Joshua21:23 Mu buloba bua bena Dane, bavua bapeta kabidi bimenga binayi, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Elteke, tshia Ngibetone," 
Joshua21:24 tshia Ayalone, ne tshia Ngate-Rimone." 
Joshua21:25 Mu tshitupa tshia buloba bua bena Menashe tshivua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene, bavua bapeta bimenga bibidi: Tanake ne Ibleyame, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
Joshua21:26 Bimenga bionsu bisanga bivua ndelanganyi ya Kekate ayi mipete bivua dikumi, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
Joshua21:27 Meku a bena Levi a bena Ngershone bavua bapeta bimenga bibidi, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Bimenga abi bivua mu buloba bua bena Menashe bavua basomba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene. Ke tshimenga tshia Ngolane tshidi mu Bashane, tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena; ne Beshetera." 
Joshua21:28 Mu buloba bua bena Isakare, kupetabu bimenga binayi, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Kishiyone, tshia Dabrate," 
Joshua21:29 tshia Yarmute, ne tshia Ene-Nganime." 
Joshua21:30 Mu buloba bua Ashere, kupetabu kabidi bimenga binayi, ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Mishale, tshia Abdone," 
Joshua21:31 tshia Elkate, ne tshia Rekobe." 
Joshua21:32 Mu buloba bua bena Naftali kupetabu bimenga bisatu, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Kedeshe tshidi mu Ngalileya, tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena; tshimenga tshia Amote-Adore, ne tshia Kartane." 
Joshua21:33 Bimenga bionsu bisanga bivua bena meku a Ngershone bapete bivua dikumi ne bisatu, kusangishaku ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
Joshua21:34 Meku makuabu a bena levi, a ku ndelangayi ya Merari, kupeta bimenga binayi, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Bimenga abi bivua mu buloba bua bena Zebulone. Ke tshimenga tshia Yokneyame, tshia Karta," 
Joshua21:35 tshia Dimna, ne tshia Nakalale." 
Joshua21:36 Mu buloba bua bena Rubene, buvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene, budi butangilangana ne tshimenga tshia Yeriko, kupetabu kabidi bimenga binayi, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Beshere, tshidi luseke lua mu tshipela, tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena; tshia Yakase;" 
Joshua21:37 tshia Kedemote, ne tshia Mefate." 
Joshua21:38 Mu buloba bua bena Ngade, kupetabu kabidi bimenga binayi, kusangisha ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. Ke tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu Ngilaade, tshia ku bimenga bia kunyemena; tshia Makanayime;" 
Joshua21:39 tshia Eshebone, ne tshia Yazere." 
Joshua21:40 Bimenga bivuabu batshinke, bapesha bena meku a Levi ba ku ndelanganyi ya Merari, bivua dikumi ne bibidi." 
Joshua21:41 Nanku bimenga bionsu bisanga, bivuabu bumushe ku maloba a bena Izrayele bakuabu, bua kubipesha ndelanganyi ya Levi, bivua makumi anayi ne muanda mukulu." 
Joshua21:42 Tshimenga tshionsu tshivuabu bababanyine tshivua ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna. 
Joshua21:43 Maweja-Nangila kupesha bena Izrayele ditunga adi dionsu dijima divuaye mumane kulaya bankambua babu. Kukuatabu ditunga adi, kuasamu." 
Joshua21:44 Maweja-Nangila kubapesha ditalala ku mikalu yabu yonsu, bu muvuaye mumane kulaya bankambua babu. Bobu kutshimuna baluishi babu bonsu ku bukole bua Maweja-Nangila. Kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua mua kupita bena Izrayele ku bukole to." 
Joshua21:45 Nenku malu onsu awa Maweja-Nangila mulaye bena Izrayele, kukumbana. Kakuvua bualu nansha bumue buvua kabuyi buenzeka." 
Joshua22:1 Pashishe Yoshuwa kubikila bantu balume ba mu tshisamba tshia Rubene, tshia Ngade, ne ba mu tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe bavua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua22:2 Kubambilaye ne: — Nudi bakumbaje bionsu bivua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, muambe. Nudi benze amu mumvua meme kabidi munuambile." 
Joshua22:3 Matuku onsu aa too ne lelu, kanuena balekele bana benu bena Izrayele to. Ke munudi batumikile meyi a Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Joshua22:4 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmumane kuitaba bua bana benu basombe mu buloba buabu, bu muvuaye mumane kubalaya. Nanku nuenu nudi mua kupingana kuenu. Nuye kusomba muaba uvua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, munuabanyine, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua22:5 Kadi nukumbaje bimpe mikenji yonsu ivua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, munuambile ne: nunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nuenze bionsu bidiye musue, nukumbaje mikenji yende. Nuitabe amu Maweja-Nangila, numuenzele mudimu ne muoyi mujima, ne bukole buenu buonsu." 
Joshua22:6 Pashishe Yoshuwa kubela lupemba, kulayangana nabu, bua bapingane kuabu." 
Joshua22:7 Kubambilaye ne: — Pinganayi kuenu, ne bintu bionsu binudi bapete: bimuna, nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, biamu bia mpawungi, biamu bikunze, bifike, ne bilamba bipite bungi. Nanku nuabanyangane bintu bionsu, binudi banyenga baluishi betu ebi, ne bena bisamba bienu bakuabu. Bena tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe," 
Joshua22:8 Moshe ukavua mumane kubapesha buloba bua Bashane, budi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene. Kadi tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe, Yoshuwa kubabanyina maloba awa luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene, anu bu muvuaye muabanyine bisamba bikuabu." 
Joshua22:9 Ke ndelanganyi ya Rubene, ya Ngade, ne ya mu tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia bena Menashe tshivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, kupingana kuabu. Kushiyabu bena Izrayele bakuabu mu Silo, mu ditunga dia Kenaane. Kupinganabu mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, divuabu bababanyine, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila Moshe." 
Joshua22:10 Patshi wabu mu ditunga dia Kenaane, bafika ku muelelu wa Yardene, kuasabu tshilambuilu pabuipi ne musulu awu. Tshivua tshinene, tshikemesha bantu bonsu." 
Joshua22:11 Bantu kuya kumanyisha bena Izrayele bakuabu ne: — Telejayi: bena Rubene, bena Ngade, ne bena Menashe badi basombe luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, mbase tshilambuilu ku muelelu wa musulu, kadi luseke luetu, mu ditunga dia Kenaane!" 
Joshua22:12 Bena Izrayele bumvue nanku, kudisangishabu bonsu ku Silo, bua kuya kuluisha bisamba bia bena Izrayele bivua ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua22:13 Bena Izrayele kutuma Pinase, muana wa mutuangaji Elazare, mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua kuyukila ne bena Rubene, bena Ngade, ne bena Menashe ba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Joshua22:14 Kuyabu kumufila kudi balombodi ba bena Izrayele dikumi, mulombodi umue ku tshisamba tshionsu. Balombodi bonsu abu bavua bamfumu ba biota mu bisamba bia bena Izrayele." 
Joshua22:15 Kuyabu mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, muaba uvua bisamba bia bena Izrayele bivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene. Kuyukilabu nabu," 
Joshua22:16 mu dina dia bena Izrayele bonsu, babakonka ne: — Nudi benzele Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele tshilema tshinene nenku bua tshinyi? Mpindiewu, nudi balekele kutumikila Maweja-Nangila bua tshinyi? Panudi base tshilambuilu etshi mu dina dienu, nudi batombokele Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua22:17 Ku Peyore, tuvua benze bibi, tuetu kupeta dinyoka dia buenzayi buetu. Maweja-Nangila kukengesha bena Izrayele bonsu ne tshipupu tshikole! Dikenga kadiena dianji kunutonda anyi?" 
Joshua22:18 Monayi mpindiewu, nudi nubenga Maweja-Nangila! Panudi nutombokela Maweja-Nangila lelu, maloba neafikile bena Izrayele bonsu munda!" 
Joshua22:19 Panudi bamone ne: Maweja-Nangila kena mua kusomba mu buloba buenu, nanku pinganayi mu ditunga dia Maweja-Nangila. Ke mudi muaba wende wa tshijila. Nuangate maloba munkatshi muetu. Kadi nangananga lekelayi kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, kututombokela ne tuetu, panudi nudiashila tshienu tshilambuilu, nubenga tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Joshua22:20 Pavua Akane, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Zera, muenze tshilema tshinene, muangate bintu bikandika, Maweja-Nangila uvua mufikile bena Izrayele bonsu munda, mubakengeshe. Nuenu nudi bamanye bualu ebu! Kabidi, Akane kena mufue nkayende bua bubi buende to." 
Joshua22:21 Bena tshisamba tshia Rubene, tshia Ngade, ne bena Menashe ba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, kuandamuna bamfumu ba meku a bisamba bikuabu bia bena Izrayele ne:" 
Joshua22:22 — Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Eyowa, anu Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Maweja-Nangila mmumanye tshitudi bashile tshilambuilu etshi. Bena Izrayele bonsu kabidi nebamanye bualu ebu. Patuikala batombokele Maweja-Nangila, bamuenzele tshilema bunene nanku, atushipe lukasa!" 
Joshua22:23 Patuikala babenge Maweja-Nangila, base tshilambuilu etshi mu dina dietu, bua kulambuilapu milambu ya kuosha, ya bintu bia mu madimi, nansha ya bobumue, anu Maweja-Nangila nkayende atunyoke!" 
Joshua22:24 Kadi katuvua ne meji awu to. Tshilambuilu etshi, katuvua batshiase tshianana to. Tudi batshiase, bualu tuvua ne bowa, tuela meji ne: matuku adi kumpala, ndelanganyi yenu neyikonke yetu ne: “Tshidi tshileja ne: nudi numvuangana ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ntshinyi?" 
Joshua22:25 Bualu Maweja-Nangila nkayende mmumane kuteka Yardene bu mukalu pankatshi petu nenu. Nanku nuenu bena Rubene ne bena Ngade, kanuena ne tshinudi mua kuamba kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila to.” Diba adi ndelanganyi yenu idi mua kukandika yetu bua kayitendeledi Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua22:26 Ke patudi bashile tshilambuilu etshi muaba ewu. Kadi katuena batshiase bua kulambuilapu milambu ya kuosha, nansha ya mushindu mukuabu to." 
Joshua22:27 Tudi tujinga bua tshilambuilu etshi tshikale tshimanyinu tshietu nenu ne ndelanganyi yalonda, tshijadike ne: tuetu tudi mua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, tudi mua kulambula milambu ya kuosha, ya bobumue, nansha ya mushindu mukuabu. Nanku ndelanganyi yenu kayena mua kujadikila yetu ne: kanuena ne tshinudi mua kuamba kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua22:28 Tuvua bele meji ne: matuku adi kumpala, pikalabu mua kutuambila, nansha kuambila ndelanganyi yetu ne: kanuena ne tshinudi mua kuamba, nebandamune ne: “Monayi mudi bankambua betu base tshilambuilu etshi, anu mushindu umue ne tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila. Kadi kabavua batshiase bua kulambuilapu milambu ya kuosha, nansha milambu mikuabu. Bavua batshiase bua tshikale tshimanyinu pankatshi petu nenu.”" 
Joshua22:29 Nanku, katuena basue kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, nansha kumubenga. Katuena base tshilambuilu etshi bua kulambuilapu milambu ya kuosha, ya bintu bia mu madimi, nansha milambu mikuabu. Katuena basue kulambula milambu muaba mukuabu, kadi amu pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tshidi kumpala kua muaba wende wa tshijila." 
Joshua22:30 Mutuangaji Pinase, balombodi ba bena Izrayele, ne bamfumu ba meku a bena Izrayele, bavua ne disanka bua bionsu bivuabu babambile kudi bena Rubene, bena Ngade, ne kudi bena Menashe." 
Joshua22:31 Pinase, muana wa mutuangaji Elazare, kubambila ne: — Mpindiewu tudi bamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila udi nenu, bualu kanuena bamuenzele tshilema tshinene tshituvua tutshina. Nanku kanuena bakebele bena Izrayele dinyoka kudi Maweja-Nangila to." 
Joshua22:32 Pashishe Pinase, muana wa mutuangaji Elazare, ne balombodi ba bena Izrayele, kushiyanganabu ne bena Rubene, ne bena Ngade. Kumukabu mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua kupingana mu dia Kenaane. Kuambilabu bena Izrayele bakuabu malu onsu awu." 
Joshua22:33 Malu awu kusankisha bena Izrayele. Kuelabu Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Kulekelabu meji avuabu nawu a kuya kuluisha bena Rubene, ne bena Ngade, bua kunyangakaja buloba buabu." 
Joshua22:34 Pashishe bena Rubene ne bena Ngade kuamba ne: — Tshilambuilu etshi tshidi tshitujadikila tuetu bonsu ne: Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu! Nanku kutshinyikabu dina ne: “Mujadiki.” 
Joshua23:1 Matuku a bungi awa apita, pavua Maweja-Nangila mumane kupesha bena Izrayele ditalala, mubasungidile kudi baluishi babu bavua nabu mutumba. Yoshuwa ukavua mumane kukola mukulakaje." 
Joshua23:2 Nanku kubikidishaye bena Izrayele bonsu, too ne bakulu babu, bamfumu babu, balumbuluishi babu, ne balombodi ba bena mvita babu. Kubambilaye ne: — Meme ndi mumane kukulakaja mupue." 
Joshua23:3 Nuvua badimuene bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu muenzele bisamba bivua mu ditunga edi, bualu buenu. Maweja-Nangila uvua ku luseke luenu, unuluila mvita." 
Joshua23:4 Monayi mpindiewu, ndi mumane kuabanyina bisamba bienu maloba andi mutshinke. Maloba aa awa a bisamba bindi mumane kutshimuna, nansha a bisamba bitshidi bishala bua tuetu kubitshimuna. Bisamba ebi bidi pankatshi pa Yardene luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne Mayi manene a pankatshi luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Joshua23:5 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, Yeye nkayende neipate bisamba ebi kumpala kuenu. Neabinyemeshe, panuasemena pabuipi. Nenukuate ditunga diabu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kulaya." 
Joshua23:6 Kadi mpindiewu, koleshayi muoyi bua kutumikila ne kukumbaja bionsu bidibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe, anu mudibi amu." 
Joshua23:7 Kanubuelakanyi ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, batshidi bashale munkatshi muenu. Kanukebi diambuluisha kudi mvidie yabu. Kanutedi dina dia mvidie ayi, panudi nutshipa. Kanuinami kumpala kuayi bua kuyitendelela." 
Joshua23:8 Nuitabe amu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bu munudi numuitaba too ne ku mpindiewu." 
Joshua23:9 Maweja-Nangila mmumane kunuipatshila bisamba bivua kumpala kuenu, bisamba binene, bivua kabidi ne bantu ba bukole. Nanku too ne mpindiewu, kakuena muntu nansha umue uvua mua kunupita bukole to." 
Joshua23:10 Muntu umue wa kunudi, udi mua kutshimuna baluishi tshinunu, bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi ku luseke luenu, unuluila mvita, bu muvuaye mumane kulaya." 
Joshua23:11 Nanku nudimuke, nunange amu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Joshua23:12 Nuenu babenge Maweja-Nangila, bumvuangane ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu batshidi bashale munkatshi muenu, nuenu basele bana babu ba bakaji, babuelakane nabu, bobu babuelakane nenu," 
Joshua23:13 mimanye ne: Maweja-Nangila neanulekele. Kakutungunuka ne dipata baluishi badi kumpala kuenu to. Baluishi abu, nebikale kunudi bu buteyi ne dijimba. Nebanukengeshe bu mudi mfimbu mutuute panyima, nansha bu mudi meba matue mu mesu. Ku nshikidilu nenubutuke bonsu mu ditunga edi dimpe, didi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mumane kunupa." 
Joshua23:14 Meme nkadi pa kufua. Kadi mpindiewu, munda muenu ne mu meji enu, numanye ne: kakuena bualu nansha bumue buvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu munulaye, budiye kayi mukumbaje. Bionsu bivuaye munulaye, mmumane kubikumbaja." 
Joshua23:15 Nenku mushindu udi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mukumbaje bionsu bivuaye munulaye, ke muakumbajaye kabidi bionsu bidiye muambe bua kununyoka. Udi mua kunubutula mu ditunga dimpe divuaye munupe." 
Joshua23:16 Nuenu banyange ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila mutume diyi bua kunemeka, nuenu biname kumpala kua mvidie ya bantu benyi bua kuyitendelela, Maweja-Nangila neanufuile munda, anujimije lukasa mu ditunga edi dimpe, didiye mumane kunupa." 
Joshua24:1 Yoshuwa kukunguja bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele ku Shekeme. Kubikidishaye bakulu, bamfumu, balumbuluishi, ne balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Izrayele. Kufikabu bonsu muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Joshua24:2 Yoshuwa kubambila bonsu ne: — Telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, wamba: “Ku kale, bankambua benu bavua base dishiya dia musulu munene wa Perate, batendelelamu mvidie ya bantu benyi. Bankambua benu abu bavua bena diku dia Tera, tatuende wa Abrahame, ne wa Nakore." 
Joshua24:3 Nanku meme kumusha nkambua wenu Abrahame mu ditunga adi divua dishiya dia Perate. Meme kumuendesha mu ditunga dia Kenaane dijima. Meme kuvudija ndelanganyi yende, kumupa Izake." 
Joshua24:4 Izake pende, meme kumupa Yakobe ne Esawu. Meme kupesha Esawu mikuna ya Seyire, bua asombeku. Kadi Yakobe ne bana bende, kuyabu mu Ejipitu." 
Joshua24:5 Bidimu bia bungi bimane kupita, meme kutuma Moshe ne Arone. Meme kukengesha bena Ejipitu ne bipupu bia mishindu yonsu, bangabanga ne meme kupatula tshisamba tshienu tshia bena Izrayele tshivua mu ditunga adi." 
Joshua24:6 Bankambua bamane kupatuka mu Ejipitu, kufikabu ku Mayi manene makunze. Kadi bena Ejipitu kulondakaja bankambua benu ne matempu a mvita, ne nyama ya tubalu, too ne ku Mayi manene makunze." 
Joshua24:7 Bankambua benu kumbikila bua meme kubambuluisha. Meme kuteka divuba dia muinshi pankatshi pa tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele, ne tshia bena Ejipitu. Pashishe meme kubutula bena Ejipitu bonsu, mayi manene kubabuikilawu. Nuenu nudi bamanye mumvua mukengeshe bena Ejipitu! Malu onsu awu mamane kujika, tshisamba tshienu tshia bena Izrayele kushala mu tshipela matuku mapite bungi." 
Joshua24:8 Pashishe meme kunuendesha mu ditunga dia bena Amore, divua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene. Bena Amore kunuluisha, kadi meme kubafila mu bianza bienu. Nuenu kukuata ditunga diabu, bualu meme mvua mubabutule panuvua nusemena pabuipi." 
Joshua24:9 Balake, muana wa Sipore, uvua mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, kunuluisha kabidi. Uvua mubikidishe Balaame, muana wa Beyore, bua kunutshipaye." 
Joshua24:10 Kadi meme kubenga kuteleja Balaame. Nanku Balaame kunuela lupemba. Ke meme kunusungidila mu bianza bia Balake. 
Joshua24:11 Nuenu kusabuka Yardene, kufika mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko. Bena mu Yeriko kunuluisha. Bavua banuluisha kabidi kudi bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Ngirgashi, bena Ivi, ne bena Yebusa. Meme kubafila bonsu mu bianza bienu." 
Joshua24:12 Meme kutuma mangulunge kumpala kuenu. Kunyemeshawu bakalenga babidi ba bena Amore. Nanku miele yenu ya mvita, nansha mata enu a mikete, kabiena ne tshidibi bienza to." 
Joshua24:13 Ndi munupe ditunga dinudi kanuyi batatshile bua kudima, ne bimenga binudi kanuyi base. Nudi basanganemu mionji ya mvinyo, ne mitshi ya olive, binudi kanuyi bakune. Nukadi nudia amu bimuma abi.”" 
Joshua24:14 Yoshuwa kuamba kabidi ne: — Mpindiewu nuenu bena Izrayele, numanye bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila. Numuenzele mudimu ne muoyi mujima, numutumikile. Numushe mvidie ivua bankambua benu batendelela, patshivuabu dishiya dia musulu wa Perate, nansha patshi wabu mu Ejipitu. Nanku, enzelayi Maweja-Nangila mudimu." 
Joshua24:15 Panuikala nubenga bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, lelu nusungule mvidie inudi basue kutendelela. Tshilejilu: mvidie ivua bankambua benu batendelela, patshivuabu dishiya dia musulu wa Perate, nansha mvidie ya bena Amore, idi mu ditunga dinudi basombe edi. Kadi meme ne bena diku dianyi, netuenzele Maweja-Nangila mudimu." 
Joshua24:16 Bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Katuena mua kubenga Maweja-Nangila bua kuenzela mvidie mikuabu mudimu! 
Joshua24:17 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, ke uvua mutupatule mu bupika mu Ejipitu, ne batatuetu. Kabidi tuvua bamone bishima bionsu bivuaye muenze diba adi. Amu Yeye ke uvua mutalame mu njila, munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu, miaba yonsu ituvua tupitshila." 
Joshua24:18 Maweja-Nangila ke uvua muipate bisamba bionsu bivua kumpala kuetu, nangananga bena Amore bavua mu ditunga ditudi edi. Nanku tuetu netuenzele amu Maweja-Nangila mudimu. Bualu Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Joshua24:19 Ke Yoshuwa kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Kanuena ne mushindu wa kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu to. Bualu udi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. Mmusue bua ikale nkayende Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kakunufuila luse bua dimutombokela dienu ne buenzayi buenu. 
Joshua24:20 Nuenu babenge Maweja-Nangila, nuenu batendelele mvidie ya bantu benyi, Maweja-Nangila neanuluishe. Neanukengeshe, anubutule, nansha yeye mumane kunuenzela malu mimpe a bungi." 
Joshua24:21 Bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Kabiena mua kuenzeka to! Tuetu netuenzele amu Maweja-Nangila mudimu. 
Joshua24:22 Yoshuwa kubambila ne: — Nuenu nkayenu nudi badijadikile bualu ebu. Nuenu nkayenu nudi basungule bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu. Bena Izrayele kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, tudi badijadikile bualu ebu nkayetu." 
Joshua24:23 Ke Yoshuwa kubambila ne: — Nanku umbushayi mvidie ya bantu benyi idi munkatshi muenu. Nuitabe amu Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ne muoyi mujima." 
Joshua24:24 Bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, tudi basue kuenzela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu mudimu, kutumikila diyi diende." 
Joshua24:25 Dituku adi, Yoshuwa kutua ndondu ne bena Izrayele ku Shekeme. Kubajadikilaye meyi ne mikenji bia nsombelu muimpe." 
Joshua24:26 Kufundaye meyi ne mikenji abi mu mukanda wa mikenji wa Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe kuangataye dibue dinene, kudimanyikaye muinshi mua mutshi wa lusanga, muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Joshua24:27 Pashishe kuambilaye bena Izrayele ne: — Monayi dibue edi: neditujadikile bualu ebu, bualu nditeleje malu onsu adi Maweja-Nangila mutuambile. Eyowa, dibue edi nedikale tshimanyinu tshidi tshinutuisha, tshinukandika bua kanulekedi Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Joshua24:28 Ke Yoshuwa kumuangalaja bantu. Muntu yonsu kupingana mu buende buloba. 
Joshua24:29 Malu onsu mamane kujika, Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, kufua, muikale ne bidimu lukama ne dikumi." 
Joshua24:30 Kumujikabu mu Timnate-Sera, muaba uvuabu bamupeshe, luseke lua mikuna ya Efrayime, ku mutu kua mukuna wa Ngashe." 
Joshua24:31 Bena Izrayele bavua benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, matuku onsu avua Yoshuwa mutshikale ne muoyi. Yoshuwa mumane kufua, bena Izrayele bavua amu benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, matuku onsu avua bakulu bavua bamone malu onsu awa Maweja-Nangila muenzele bena Izrayele bashale munkatshi muabu." 
Joshua24:32 Nanku mifuba ya Yozefe ivua bena Izrayele bumuke nayi mu Ejipitu, kuyijikabu mu Shekeme, mu buloba buvua Yakobe musumbe ku nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole lukama. Uvua mubusumbe kudi ndelanganyi ya Amore uvua muase tshimenga tshia Shekeme. Buloba abu kushala mu dina dia ndelanganyi ya Yozefe." 
Joshua24:33 Elazare, muana wa Arone, kufua kabidi. Kumujikabu pa mukuna uvuabu bapeshe muanende wa balume Pinase luseke lua mikuna ya Efrayime." 
Judges1:1 Yoshuwa mumane kufua, bena Izrayele kuebeja Maweja-Nangila bua kumanya tshisamba tshiabu tshivua mua kudianjila kuluisha bena Kenaane." 
Judges1:2 Maweja-Nangila kubandamuna ne: — Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, ke badi mua kudianjila kuluisha bena Kenaane, bualu ndi mbapesha ditunga adi." 
Judges1:3 Ke bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda kuambila ndelanganyi ya Shimeyone, muanabu ne Yuda, ne: — Nuye netu bua tukuate buloba buvuabu bamane kutuabanyina. Tuyayi bonsu kuluisha bena Kenaane. Pashishe netuye nenu bua tukuate buenu buloba. Nanku bena tshisamba tshia Shimeyone kudisangisha ne bena tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Judges1:4 Kuyabu kuluisha bena Kenaane. Maweja-Nangila kubambuluisha, bua batshimune bena Kenaane ne bena Perizi. Kushipabu bantu balume binunu dikumi mu Bezeke." 
Judges1:5 Mu tshimenga etshi tshia Bezeke, kusanganabu mukalenga Adoni-Bezeke. Kumuluishabu, kutshimunabu bena Kenaane ne bena Perizi." 
Judges1:6 Mukalenga Adoni-Bezeke kunyema. Kumulondakajabu kudi bena Izrayele. Kumukuatabu, kumukosabu biala ne bana ba nkasa banene." 
Judges1:7 Ke mukalenga Adoni-Bezeke kuela mbila ne: — Akia! Bakalenga makumi muanda mutekete, bavuabu bakose biala ne bana ba nkasa banene, bavua bangula, muinshi mua mesa anyi, biakudia bivua bimata panshi! Bushiwa, Maweja-Nangila wansombuedi ku bibi bionsu bimvua muenze. Kuyabu ne mukalenga Adoni-Bezeke ku Yerushalayime. Kuyaye kufuilaku." 
Judges1:8 Bena Yuda kuluisha tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, kutshikuata. Kushipabu bantu, kuosha ne tshimenga." 
Judges1:9 Pashishe kuyabu kuluisha bena Kenaane bonsu, ne bavua mu mikuna, ne bavua mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia ditunga, ne bavua mu mpata." 
Judges1:10 Kubangabu mvita ne bena Kenaane bavua base mu tshimenga tshia Ebrone, tshiyuabu binyika tshikondu atshi Kiriyate-Arba. Mu tshimenga atshi ke muvuabu batshimuine bena diku dia Sheshayi, dia Akimane, ne dia Talmayi." 
Judges1:11 Bena Yuda bumuka muaba awu, kuyabu kuluisha bena Debire, tshimenga tshivuabu binyika tshikondu atshi Kiriyate-Sefere." 
Judges1:12 Kalebe kulaya ne: muntu yonsu wakuata tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Sefere, nemmupeshe muananyi wa bakaji Aksa, ikale mukajende." 
Judges1:13 Otniyele, muana wa Kenaze (Kenaze uvua muakunyi wa Kalebe), kukuata tshimenga atshi. Kalebe kumupesha muanende Aksa, bua ikale mukajende." 
Judges1:14 Aksa ufika kudi Otniyele, kumupeshaye meji a kulomba budimi kudi tatuende muenu Kalebe. Pashishe Aksa kutuluka pa mpunde. Tatuende Kalebe kumuebeja tshintu tshivuaye musue." 
Judges1:15 Aksa kuandamuna ne: — Unsankishe, umpeshe mpokolu ya mayi, bualu buloba bua kuinshi mu ditunga buudi mumpeshe, kabuena ne mayi to. Kalebe kumupesha mpokolu ya mayi yonsu, ne ivua kuinshi, ne ivua ku mutu." 
Judges1:16 Bena Kayine, ndelanganyi ya tatuende muenu wa Moshe, kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko, tshiyuabu binyika tshia Mabue a ngaji. Kuyabu pamue ne bena Yuda. Kuasabu mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia buloba bua bena Yuda, kuinshi kua tshimenga tshia Arade. Kusombabu munkatshi mua bena Amaleke." 
Judges1:17 Bena Yuda, ne ndelanganyi ya Shimeyone wa ba Yuda, kuyabu kuluisha bena Kenaane bavua base mu Sefate, kubatshimunabu. Kunyangakajabu tshimenga etshi tshijima tshia Sefate, tshivuabu binyika, biangatshile ku diba adi, Orma, mmumue ne: Kabutu." 
Judges1:18 Bena Yuda kukuata kabidi bimenga ebi: Ngaza, Askalone, Ebrone, ne misoku ivua nabi pabuipi." 
Judges1:19 Maweja-Nangila nkayende uvua muambuluishe bena Yuda. Ke pavuabu bakuata miaba ya pa mikuna. Kadi kupangilabu mua kuipata bantu bavua base mu mpata, bualu bobu aba bavua ne matempu a mvita a biamu." 
Judges1:20 Kupeshabu Kalebe tshimenga tshia Ebrone, bu muvua Moshe mumane kuamba. Nanku Kalebe kukuata tshimenga atshi, kuipata meku asatu a bena Anake avuamu." 
Judges1:21 Ndelanganyi ya Binyamine kupangila mua kuipata bena Yebusa bavua basomba mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Nanku bena Yebusa ne bena Binyamine badi basomba pamue mu Yerushalayime too ne ku mpindiewu. 
Judges1:22 Ndelanganyi ya Efrayime ne ya Menashe, bana ba Yozefe, kuya kuluisha bena tshimenga tshia Betele, Maweja-Nangila kubambuluisha." 
Judges1:23 Kutumabu bantu bangabanga bua kutentekela tshimenga atshi, tshivuabu binyika Luze tshikondu atshi." 
Judges1:24 Bantu bakuabu batume, kumonabu muntu upatuka mu tshimenga atshi. Kumulombabu ne: — Utuleje muaba wa kubuelela mu tshimenga etshi. Nanku netukuenzele bimpe." 
Judges1:25 Muntu awu kubaleja muaba wa kubuelelabu. Ke muvua ndelanganyi ya Efrayime ne ya Menashe mibuele mu tshimenga atshi, mitshibutule kabidi. Kadi ki mbashipe muntu awu, nansha bena diku diende." 
Judges1:26 Muntu awu kuya kuasa mu ditunga dia bena Iti. Kuasaye tshimenga mu ditunga adi. Kutshinyikaye ne: Luze. Dina edi ditshidiku too ne mpindiewu. 
Judges1:27 Bena Menashe kupangila mua kuipata bena bimenga ebi: Bete-Sheyane, Tanake, Dore, Ibleyame, Megido, nansha bantu bonsu bavua basomba mu misoku ivua mutumba ne bimenga abi. Nanku bena Kenaane batshivua anu basomba mu buloba ebu." 
Judges1:28 Nansha diba divua bena Izrayele bamane kupeta buloba bua bungi, kupangilabu mua kuipata bena mu bimenga ebi. Kadi bena Izrayele bavua babenzeja midimu mishilangane." 
Judges1:29 Bena Efrayime kupangila mua kuipata bena Kenaane bavua base mu Ngezere. Ke muvua bena Kenaane aba basomba munkatshi mua bena Efrayime nanku. 
Judges1:30 Bena Zebulone kupangila mua kuipata bena Kenaane bavua base mu Kitrone ne mu Makalale. Ke mutshivua bena Kenaane basomba miaba eyi. Kadi bena Zebulone bavua babenzeja midimu mishilangane. 
Judges1:31 Bena Ashere kupangila mua kuipata bena bimenga ebi: Ako, Sidone, Alabe, Akzibe, Elba, Afike ne Rekobe." 
Judges1:32 Ke pavua bena Ashere ne bua kuasa munkatshi mua bena Kenaane ba mu ditunga. 
Judges1:33 Bena Naftali kupangila mua kuipata bena Kenaane bavua base mu Bete-Shemeshe ne Bete-Anate. Ke pavua bena Naftali ne bua kuasa munkatshi mua bena Kenaane ba mu ditunga. Kadi bena Naftali bavua anu babenzeja midimu mishilangane. 
Judges1:34 Bena Amore kuipata ndelanganyi ya Dane, kuyisemeja luseke lua mikuna. Bena Amore kabavua basue bua bena Dane bapueke mu mpata to." 
Judges1:35 Nanku bena Amore batshivua amu basomba mu Are-Erese, mu Ayalone, ne mu Shaalbime. Kadi bidimu bimane kupita, ndelanganyi ya Efrayime ne ya Menashe kutshimuna bena Amore, kubenzeja midimu mishilangane." 
Judges1:36 Mukalu wa kuinshi mu ditunga dia bena Amore, uvua ulonda buloba bua bena Edome, umukila, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ku mukuna wa Tuminyiminyi." 
Judges2:1 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumuka ku Ngilgale, kuya ku Bokime. Kuambilaye bena Izrayele ne: — Mvua munupatule mu Ejipitu, munufikishe mu ditunga edi, dimvua mulaye bankambua benu, muditshipe. Mvua muambe ne: kashidi tshiena mua kunyanga ndondu wanyi undi mutue nenu to." 
Judges2:2 Kadi mvua munukandike bua kanutu ndondu ne bena ditunga edi, munulombe kabidi bua nuupule bilambuilu biabu. Kadi kanuena bangitabe to. Nuvua benze nanku bua tshinyi?" 
Judges2:3 Nanku ndi nnujadikila ne: tshiena ngipata bena ditunga edi kumpala kuenu to. Bena ditunga edi nebanuteye mu buteyi, nudishindamu, nutendelela mvidie yabu." 
Judges2:4 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila mumane kuambila bena Izrayele malu aa, bena Izrayele kutuadija kudila bonsu." 
Judges2:5 Kuinyikabu muaba awu dina ne: Bokime, mmumue ne: “Badidi ba Miadi.” Pashishe bena Izrayele kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu muaba awu." 
Judges2:6 Yoshuwa mumane kutangalaja bantu bonsu, bena Izrayele kuya bonsu mu buloba buvuabu bababanyine. Ke muvua bena Izrayele bakuata ditunga nanku." 
Judges2:7 Bena Izrayele bavua benzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, matuku onsu atshivua Yoshuwa ne muoyi, ne panyima pa lufu luende kabidi, matuku onsu avua bakulu, bavua bamone malu a dikema onsu avua Maweja-Nangila muenzele bena Izrayele, batshikale ne muoyi." 
Judges2:8 Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, kufua muikale ne bidimu lukama ne dikumi." 
Judges2:9 Kumujikabu mu Timnate-Erese, muaba uvuabu bamupeshe, luseke lua mikuna ya Efrayime, ku mutu kua mukuna wa Ngashe." 
Judges2:10 Pashishe bantu bonsu ba tshikondu tshia Yoshuwa kufua. Ndelanganyi yonsu ivua ilonda, kayivua mimanye Maweja-Nangila bimpe, kabidi kayivua mimanye bionsu bivuaye muenzele bena Izrayele." 
Judges2:11 Bena Izrayele kuenza malu avua Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Kutuadijabu kutendelela mvidie Baale. 
Judges2:12 Kubengabu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu, uvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu. Kutendelelabu mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua basomba munkatshi muabu. Kudielabu panshi kumpala kua mvidie ayi. Ke muvuabu bafikishe Maweja-Nangila munda." 
Judges2:13 Ke bena Izrayele kubenga Maweja-Nangila, bua kuya kutendelela mvidie Baale ne Astarte." 
Judges2:14 Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda. Kavua ubambuluisha kabidi to. Ke muvua bena buenzayi biba bintu bia bena Izrayele bionsu. Maweja-Nangila kufila bena Izrayele mu bianza bia baluishi bavua nabu mutumba. Bena Izrayele kabavua ne mushindu wa kutuila baluishi babu nkanana to. 
Judges2:15 Misangu yonsu ivua bena Izrayele baya mu mvita, Maweja-Nangila kubapangisha bukole, bu muvuaye mumane kuamba, kabidi muditshipe. Bena Izrayele, dikenga kubapita bunene." 
Judges2:16 Diba adi, Maweja-Nangila kusungula Balombodi, bua kulombolabu bena Izrayele. Nanku balombodi abu kusungidila bena Izrayele mu bianza bia bena tshinyangu." 
Judges2:17 Kadi bena Izrayele kabavua batumikila balombodi abu to. Bavua amu batendelela mvidie ya bantu benyi, bayifuila mpala panshi. Bena Izrayele bavua bumuka lukasa mu njila uvua bankambua babu balonda. Bankambua bavua batumikila mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, kadi bena Izrayele kabavua bidikija bankambua babu to." 
Judges2:18 Misangu yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila utumina bena Izrayele mulombodi, Maweja-Nangila nkayende uvua ku luseke lua mulombodi awu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila ke uvua usungidila bena Izrayele mu bianza bia baluishi, matuku onsu avua mulombodi awu ne muoyi. Maweja-Nangila uvua ufuila bena Izrayele luse, pavua-bu badila, banyingalala bua mushindu uvuabu babakengesha kudi baluishi babu." 
Judges2:19 Kadi pavua mulombodi awu ufua, bena Izrayele bavua babenga tshiakabidi Maweja-Nangila, bipite too ne pa bankambua babu. Bavua anu batendelela mvidie ya bantu benyi, badiela panshi kumpala kuayi bua kuyitendelela. Kabavua balekela buenzayi buabu, nansha tshitunu tshiyuabu natshi." 
Judges2:20 Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda, kuamba ne: — Bantu ba mu tshisamba etshi, mbanyangakaje ndondu umvua muambile bankambua babu bua kumunemeka. Kabena bantumikila to." 
Judges2:21 Meme tshitshiena mua kubipatshila muntu nansha umue wa mu bisamba bivua Yoshuwa mushiye pakafuaye. 
Judges2:22 Nengangate bisamba ebi, bua meme kujadika nabi ne: bena Izrayele mbasue kuntumikila, muvua bankambua babu benza, anyi mbabenge mua kuenza tshindi musue." 
Judges2:23 Nanku bisamba bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila kayi mufile mu bianza bia Yoshuwa, kushalabi mu ditunga adi. Maweja-Nangila kena mubipate lukasa to." 
Judges3:1 Maweja-Nangila kushiya bisamba ebi mu ditunga amu, bua kuteta nabi bena Izrayele bavua kabayi baluangana mvita pamue ne bakuabu, bua kukuata ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Judges3:2 Uvua musue bua ndelanganyi mipiamipia ya bena Izrayele, nangananga ivua kayiyi mianji kuluangana mvita, ilonge mua kuluangana." 
Judges3:3 Bantu bavua Maweja-Nangila mushiye mu ditunga, ke bena makalenga atanu a bena Peleshete, bena Kenaane bonsu, bena Sidone, ne bena Ivi bavua base mu mikuna ya Lebanone, biangatshile ku mukuna wa Baale-Ermone, too ne ku Lebo-Amate." 
Judges3:4 Maweja-Nangila uvua mushiye bisamba ebi, bua kujadika nabi ne: bena Izrayele nebakumbaje mikenji, inwua mupeshe Moshe bua kumanyishaye bankambua babu anyi?" 
Judges3:5 Ke pavua bena Izrayele base munkatshi mua bena Kenaane, bene Iti, bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Ivi, ne bena Yebusa." 
Judges3:6 Bena Izrayele kusela bakaji ba mu bisamba ebi, kubaselesha bana babu ba bakaji, kutendelela ne mvidie yabu." 
Judges3:7 Bena Izrayele kuenza malu mabi avua Mvidi Mukulu wabu mubenge. Kupuabu Maweja-Nangila muoyi. Kutendelelabu mvidie Baale ne Ashera. 
Judges3:8 Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda. Kubafilaye mu bianza bia Kushane-Rishatayime, mukalenga wa Mezopotamiya. Bena Izrayele kushala ku bumfumu buende bidimu muanda mukulu." 
Judges3:9 Bena Izrayele kudila, kubikila Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe. Maweja-Nangila kubatumina Otniyele, muana wa Kenaze (Kenaze mmuakunyi wa Kalebe), bua abasungidile." 
Judges3:10 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Otniyele. Kushalaye mulombodi wa bena Izrayele. Kuyaye kuluangana mvita. Maweja-Nangila kumupesha bukole bua kutshimunaye mukalenga Kushane-Rishatayime. 
Judges3:11 Ditunga dijima kupeta ditalala bidimu makumi anayi. Pashishe Otniyele, muana wa Kenaze, kufua." 
Judges3:12 Bena Izrayele kuenza kabidi malu mabi avua Maweja-Nangila mubenga. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kubatumina Eglone, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, bua abaluishe." 
Judges3:13 Mukalenga Eglone kumyuangana ne bena Amone, kabidi ne bena Amaleke. Kuluishabu bena Izrayele, kukuata tshimenga tshia Yeriko." 
Judges3:14 Bena Izrayele kushala ku bumfumu bua mukalenga Eglone bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu. 
Judges3:15 Ke bena Izrayele kudila, kubikila Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe. Maweja-Nangila kubatumina musungidi. Ke Ekude, muana wa Ngera, wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine, uvua ne luboku. Bena Izrayele kutuma Ekude kudi Eglone, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, bua afile milambu yabu kudiye." 
Judges3:16 Kadi Ekude kuenzeja muele wa mvita wa nkanza, wa bule bua santimetre makumi atanu. Kuusokokaye muinshi mua bilamba biende, ku tshibelu tshiende tshia lua balume." 
Judges3:17 Pashishe Ekude kuya bua kulambula mukalenga Eglone bintu abi. Mukalenga Eglone uvua muntu wa mubidi munene. 
Judges3:18 Ekude mumane kufila bintu abi, kumukaye ne bantu bavua bambula bintu." 
Judges3:19 Ufika pabuipi ne Ngilgale muaba uvua mpingu ya mabue ya kutendelela mvidie, kupinganaye kudi mukalenga Eglone. Kumuambilaye ne: — Mukalenga, ndi ne bualu bua mu musokoku bua kukuambila! Nanku mukalenga kutuma diyi bua bena mudimu bende bapatuke. Bantu bonsu kupatuka." 
Judges3:20 Mukalenga Eglone uvua musombe mu nzubu wende wa tshilala kulu, muaba mutalale. Ekude kusemena pabuipi, kumuamba ne: — Bualu bundi ne bua kukuambila mbua kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Mukalenga Eglone kujuka mu nkuasa." 
Judges3:21 Ekude kupatula ne tshianza tshia luboku muele uvuaye muase ku mikaba ku tshibelu tshia lua balume. Kutuaye mukalenga Eglone muele awu mu difu. 
Judges3:22 Muele kubuela onsu ne tshilabi. Mafuta kujibikila muele, bualu Ekude kavua mupatule muele to." 
Judges3:23 Ekude mumane kuinjila biibi bia ku nzubu, mukange ne nsapi, kupatukaye ku mfundu." 
Judges3:24 Yeye mumane kuya, bena mudimu kubuela. Kumonabu ne: biibi mbikange. Kuelabu meji ne: mukalenga udi mua kuikala ku nkumba." 
Judges3:25 Kushalabu bindile; kubatondabi. Kadi mukalenga kavua munzulule biibi bia ku nzubu to. Ke bena mudimu kuangata nsapi, kudikanguila ku nzubu nkayabu. Kusanganabu mukalenga wabu mutandabale panshi, mulue!" 
Judges3:26 Patshi wa bena mudimu bajingakana apu, Ekude mmumane kunyema. Kupitaye muaba uvua mpingu ya mabue, kuyaye kusokoma ku Seyira." 
Judges3:27 Mumane kufika muaba awu, kuelaye mpungi bua kubikila bena Izrayele ba mu buloba bua mikuna bua bena Efrayime. Pashishe kupitaye kumpala kuabu bua kupueka nabu ku mukuna, ubambila ne:" 
Judges3:28 — Ndondayi panyima, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmumane kufila baluishi benu bena Mowabe mu bianza bienu. Bena Izrayele kulonda Ekude mu nyima, kunyenga bena Mowabe bisabu bia ku Yardene. Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kusabuka kabidi to." 
Judges3:29 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele kushipa bena Mowabe bu binunu dikumi, bonsu bantu ba mukitshi, ba muoyi mukole. Kakuvua kushala muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to." 
Judges3:30 Kutuadija tshikondu atshi, bena Mowabe kushala ku bumfumu bua bena Izrayele. Ditunga kupeta ditalala bidimu makumi muanda mukulu." 
Judges3:31 Mulombodi uvua ulonda Ekude, ke Shamgare, muana wa Anate. Kushipaye bena Peleshete nkama isambombu anu ne mutshi wa kusaka nawu ngombe, bua kusungidila bena Izrayele." 
Judges4:1 Ekude mumane kufua, bena Izrayele kuenza kabidi malu mabi awa Maweja-Nangila mubenge." 
Judges4:2 Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza bia Yabine, mukalenga wa bena Kenaane, uvua musombele mu tshimenga tshia Ashore. Dina dia mfumu wa tshiluilu tshia Yabine divua Sisra, uvua musombele mu Aroshete-Ngoyime." 
Judges4:3 Yabine uvua ne matempu a mvita a biamu nkama tshitema. Uvua mukengeshe bena Izrayele bikole bidimu makumi abidi. Nanku bena Izrayele kubikila Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe. 
Judges4:4 Tshikondu atshi Debora, mukaji wa Lapidote, uvua muambi wa bena Izrayele, ukosa nsambu ya bantu." 
Judges4:5 Uvua usomba muinshi mua dibue dia ngaji. Ke muvuabu binyika dibue adi ne: ndibue dia ngaji dia Debora. Divua pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Rama ne tshia Betele, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Ke muaba uvua bena Izrayele baye kudi Debora, bua abalumbuluishe." 
Judges4:6 Dituku dikuabu, Debora kubikidisha Barake, muana wa Abinoyame, uvua usomba mu Kadeshe mu buloba bua Naftali. Debora kuambila Barake ne: — Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ukuambila bua kuenza: “Uye kusungula bantu balume binunu dikumi ku tshisamba tshia Naftali, ne tshia Zebulone. Uye nabu pa mukuna wa. Tabore." 
Judges4:7 Nensonsole Sisra, mfumu wa tshiluilu tshia Yabine, bua kuyaye ku musulu wa Kishone. Muaba awu neakuluishe ne matempu a mvita, kabidi ne bena mvita bende mene. Kadi nemmufile mu bianza biebe.”" 
Judges4:8 Barake kuandamuna Debora ne: — Mbimpe tuye nebe. Wewe mubenge, meme tshiena nya to." 
Judges4:9 Debora kuitaba ne: — Netuye nebe. Kadi kuakuikala ne lumu mu mvita eyi to, bualu Maweja-Nangila neafile Sisra mu bianza bia muntu mukaji. Debora ne Barake kuya ku Kadeshe." 
Judges4:10 Barake kusangisha bena Naftali ne bena Zebulone. Bantu balume binunu dikumi kuitaba bua kulonda Barake. Debora muine kuya nabu. 
Judges4:11 Ebere, muena Kayine, uvua usomba pabuipi ne Kadeshe. Uvua muase ntenta wende ku luseke lua mutshi wa lusanga uvua mu Sananime. Uvua mumane kumuka munkatshi mua bena Kayine bakuabu, ndelanganyi ya Obabe, bukonde bua Moshe." 
Judges4:12 Sisra kumvua lumu ne: Barake, muana wa Abinoyame, udi ku mukuna wa Tabore." 
Judges4:13 Kusangishaye matempu ende a mvita a biamu nkama tshitema, ne bantu bende bonsu ku Aroshete-Ngoyime. Kumukabu muaba awu, bua kuya ku musulu wa Kishone." 
Judges4:14 Ke Debora kuambila Barake ne: — Juka! Lelu Maweja-Nangila neafile Sisra mu bianza biebe. Maweja-Nangila nkayende udi wenda kumpala kuebe! Barake kutuluka ku mukuna wa Tabore. Bantu bende binunu dikumi kumulonda. 
Judges4:15 Barake kutuadija mvita. Maweja-Nangila kunyemesha kumpala kuende Sisra, ne matempu ende a mvita, ne bena mvita bende bonsu. Sisra kushiya ditempu diende dia mvita, kunyema lubilu ku makasa." 
Judges4:16 Barake kulondakaja matempu a mvita ne baluishi bende too ne ku Aroshete-Ngoyime. Kushipaye bena mvita ba Sisra bonsu. Kakuvua kushala muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. 
Judges4:17 Sisra kunyema lubilu ku makasa too ne ku ntenta wa Yayele, mukaji wa Ebere, muena Kayine. Bualu bena diku dia Ebere bavua bumvuangana ne mukalenga Yabine wa Ashore." 
Judges4:18 Yayele kupatuka bua kuakidila Sisra, umuambila ne: — Mfumuanyi, buelaku. Buela mu ntenta wanyi. Kutshinyi to! Sisra kubuela mu ntenta wa Yayele. Yayele kumusokoka mu mbulankete." 
Judges4:19 Sisra kulomba Yayele ne: — Bu wewe musue, mpeshaku mayi a kunua, bualu ndi ne nyota. Yayele kubulula mulondu wa biseba uvua ne mabele, kumupeshaye tshiakunua. Kumubuikilaye mbulankete kabidi." 
Judges4:20 Ke Sisra kumuambila ne: — Wimane mu mushiku wa mbelu wa ntenta. Pikala muntu mufike bua kukukonka ne: “Muntu udi mu ntenta emu anyi,” umuandamune ne: “Muntu kenamu to.”" 
Judges4:21 Bu muvua Sisra mupungile bikole, kulalaye tulu tukole. Yayele kuambula ngindu ne mulonda wa tshitupa musongoloke uvua ku ntenta. Kusemenaye bitekete pabuipi ne Sisra, kumupopelaye mulonda awu ku mutu. Mulonda kumutubula mutu, kuya too ne mu buloba. Sisra kufua." 
Judges4:22 Diba adi Barake, uvua wenda ulondakaja Sisra, kufika. Yayele kupatuka bua kusambakena nende, umuambila ne: — Vuila apa, nkuleje muntu uudi ukeba. Barake kubuela mu ntenta, kusangana Sisra mutandabale panshi mufue, mutu mutubula kudi mulonda musongoloke wa ku ntenta." 
Judges4:23 Dituku adi Mvidi Mukulu kuanyisha bua bena Izrayele batshimune Yabine, mukalenga wa bena Kenaane." 
Judges4:24 Bena Izrayele kuluisha mukalenga Yabine bikole. Ku ndekelu kumushipabu. 
Judges5:1 Dituku adi, Debora ne Barake muana wa Abinoyame, kuimbabu musambu ewu" 
Judges5:2 Mu Izrayele, muntu yonsu mmusulule nsuki yende. Bena Izrayele mbadifile ku mvita: Nuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila!" 
Judges5:3 Nuenu bakalenga, nuenu balombodi, telejayi bimpe! Ndi musue kuimba musambu, ntumbisha Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Judges5:4 Maweja-Nangila kumuka mu ditunga dia Edome, kupueka ku mikuna ya Seyire. Buloba kuzakala, mavuba kuenguluka mayi, mvula wa mudimbi kuloka." 
Judges5:5 Mikuna minene kuzakala kumpala kuebe wewe, Maweja-Nangila wa ku mukuna wa Sinayi, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Judges5:6 Tshikondu tshia Shamgare, muana wa Anate, tshikondu tshia Yayele, misumba ya bena luendu kunyema ditunga, bena luendu kulonda njila ya ku mpenga." 
Judges5:7 Kakuvua bantu bavua ne bumfumu to. Kakuvua balombodi mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, too ne pangakamueneka meme Debora, meme mamu wa bena Izrayele." 
Judges5:8 Bantu bavua basungula mvidie mipiamipia. Katupa kiipi, mvita kutuadija. Kadi bivua bikole bua kupeta ngabu wa mvita, nansha difuma, bua bena Izrayele binunu makumi anayi." 
Judges5:9 Mwoyi wanyi udi kudi balombodi ba bena Izrayele, kudi bantu badi badifila nkayabu ku mvita. Elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila!" 
Judges5:10 Nuenu badi babanda pa mpunde, pa mpunde mikaji ya mubidi mutoke, nuenu badi basomba pa biata, nuenu badi bendakana mu njila, buambayi penu tumone." 
Judges5:11 Pabuipi ne miaba ivua bimuna binuina mayi, bonsu bavua babanya mayi, bavua batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bua bilenga bidiye muenzele bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, tshikondu tshi wa bena Izrayele badilongolola ku mvita, bimane ku biibi bia tshimenga." 
Judges5:12 Debora, jukaku panshi, utuambuluishe. Katamuka, utume musambu wa mvita. Barake, muana wa Abinoyame, juka, kuata bantu mu lukanu, utulejebu!" 
Judges5:13 Bivua bashala ne muoyi, kutua ku tshia bamfumu. Tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila ntshidisange kudiye, bu bilobu." 
Judges5:14 Bivua batshimuna bena Amaleke, mbafumine ku Efrayime. Bena Binyamine kubalonda. Kubuelakanabu ne bena mvita ba bena Efrayime. Diku dia Makire kufila bamfumu. Tshisamba tshia Zebulone kufila balombodi." 
Judges5:15 Bamfumu ba Isakare kudisangisha ne Debora. Isakare uvua pa diyi dia Barake, kumulonda panyima lukasa mu mpata. Kadi bena meku a Rubene, kuelangana mpata kashidi." 
Judges5:16 Bua tshinyi nudi bashale pabuipi ne mpangu, bua kuteleja mudi balami babikila bimuna biabu? Eyowa, bena meku a Rubene kuelangana mpata kashidi." 
Judges5:17 Bisamba bivua mu Ngilaade, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, ki mbiumuke to. Bena Dane kushala ku matu abu. Bena Ashere kusomba ku muelelu wa mayi, pabuipi ne bisabu biabu." 
Judges5:18 Kadi bena Zebulone, ne bena Naftali, ki mbatshine njiwu ya lufu, mbanyishe mua kufuila mu mvita." 
Judges5:19 Bakalenga baluishi, bakalenga ba bena Kenaane, kutuadija kuluisha Tanake, pabuipi ne mpokolu ya mu Megido. Kadi, kabena bapeta tshintu, nansha nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole." 
Judges5:20 Mu diulu, mitotu kutuambuluisha mu mvita. Pa wayi ilonda njila wayi, ivua iluisha Sisra." 
Judges5:21 Musulu udi upueka bidimu ne bidimu, musulu wa Kishone, kubutula baluishi. Tuyayi mu mvita ne dikima!" 
Judges5:22 Nyama ya tubalu kupita, yenda itupika, idiatakaja buloba ne bikonu biayi." 
Judges5:23 Nutshipe tshimenga tshia Meroze, ke mudi mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila wamba. Nutshipe tshimenga atshi, nutshipe ne benatshi, bualu kabena bambuluisha Maweja-Nangila to, kabena baluangana mvita pamue ne bilobu biende to." 
Judges5:24 Yayele, mukaji wa Ebere, muena Kayine, bamuele lupemba munkatshi mua bakaji bonsu. Eyowa, bele Yayele lupemba, munkatshi mua bakaji bonsu badi basomba mu ntenta." 
Judges5:25 Sisra kulomba Yayele mayi a kunua, Yayele kumupesha mabele, mabele mimpe a mafuta mu dikopu dia mushinga mukole." 
Judges5:26 Pashishe, Yayele kubakula mulonda mu tshianza, kukuata ngindu wa muena ditanda mu tshikuabu. Yayele kutuuta Sisra, kumupanda lubombu, kumutubuluja mutu ne mulonda." 
Judges5:27 Sisra kudishinda kumpala kua Yayele, kushalaye mutandabale panshi ku makasa ende. Sisra kudishinda, kupona panshi, kufua kashidi." 
Judges5:28 Mamuende wa Sisra kutangidila pa dididishi, kudilaye, mutangidile pa tukanu: “Tshidi tshimanyika ditempu diende dia mvita ntshinyi? Mudiye ujingakana, kayi ufika lukasa, mmunyi?”" 
Judges5:29 Mamuende wa Sisra kuambulula, kayi upungila, bivua bakaji nende ba meji bamuambile ne:" 
Judges5:30 “Bena mvita mbapawule bintu bulelela, bakadi babanyangana bivuabu bapete: muena mvita yonsu mmupete nsongakaji, mulengele, umue nansha babidi mene. Sisra mmupete bilamba bilaba kakula, bizola mekala. Eyowa, mmupete tshilamba tshilengeja ne buanda bua mekala a mishindu ibidi, tshia kuela mu nshingu mua muntu udi utshimuna.”" 
Judges5:31 Maweja-Nangila, baluishi bebe bonsu, bafue muvua Sisra mushiye panu. Kadi balunda bebe bikale bu diba, patshididi dipatuka ne bukenka, ne nsese yadi yonsu! Ke muvua ditunga dianji kushala mu ditalala bidimu makumi anayi nanku." 
Judges6:1 Bena Izrayele kuenza kabidi malu mabi avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza bia bena Madiyane bidimu muanda mutekete. 
Judges6:2 Bena Madiyane kukengesha bena Izrayele bikole. Bua kunyema bena Madiyane, bena Izrayele kuya kusokoma mu milundu, mu njila ya mu mbuebue, ne mu miaba mikuabu ya mu mikuna mipulumuke." 
Judges6:3 Misangu yonsu ivua bena Izrayele bamane kukuna biakudia mu madimi, bavua bababunda mvita kudi bena Madiyane, bena Amaleke, ne kudi bantu balalakanyi bavua bafuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Judges6:4 Bantu aba, bavua basa mitanda yabu mu madimi a bena Izrayele, bua kunyangakaja biakudia mu madimi, too ne mu madimi awa pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ngaza. Kabavua bashila bena Izrayele tshintu tshia kudia. Kabavua babashila nansha mukoku, nansha ngombe, nansha mpunde." 
Judges6:5 Bantu aba, bavua benda ku muaba ne ku muaba, bafika ne bimuna biabu, kabidi ne ntenta yabu. Bivua benda mabumbu mabumbu bu mpasu. Nansha bobu, nansha tubalu tuabu, bivua bipite bungi, kakuyi udi mua kubibala. Kubutulabu ditunga, kudinyangakaja." 
Judges6:6 Bena Madiyane kukengesha bena Izrayele bikole. Bena Izrayele kubikila Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe. 
Judges6:7 Bena Izrayele bamane kulomba Maweja-Nangila, bua abasungidile kudi bena Madiyane," 
Judges6:8 Maweja-Nangila kubatumina muambi. Awu kubambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Mvua munupatule mu ditunga dia Ejipitu munuvua mu bupika. 
Judges6:9 Meme kunusungidila kudi bena Ejipitu, ne kudi bantu bonsu bavua banukengesha. Meme kuipata baluishi benu, panuvua nuenda nubuela mu ditunga ku kakese ku kakese. Pashishe meme kunupa ditunga diabu." 
Judges6:10 Meme kunuvuluija ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuena mua kutendelela mvidie ya bena Amore, bena ditunga dinudi basombe. Kadi kanuena bitabe diyi dianyi to!”" 
Judges6:11 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kufika mu musoku wa Ofra. Kusombaye muinshi mua mutshi wa lusanga mu budimi bua Yowashe, muntu wa mu diku dia Abiyezere. Ngideyone, muana wa Yowashe, uvua ushipuila miepu ya ntete mu tshikaminu tshia maluvu a mvinyo, bua bena Madiyane kabamumonu to." 
Judges6:12 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumumuenekela, kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi nebe, tshilobu tshia mvita!" 
Judges6:13 Ngideyone kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, umfuile luse! Maweja-Nangila wikala netu, mutudi tupeta makenga onsu aa mbishi? Bishima bionsu bivua baledi betu batuambila bidi penyi? Bivua batulondela ne: Maweja-Nangila uvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kutulekela bulelela. Mmumane kutufila mu bianza bia bena Madiyane."
