Judges6:14 Maweja-Nangila ukudimuka kudi Ngideyone, kumuambila ne: — Uye ne bukole buudi nabu ebu, usungidile bena Izrayele mu bianza bia bena Madiyane. Meme ndi nkutuma." 
Judges6:15 Ngideyone kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela ne: meme ndi mua kusungidila bena Izrayele mushindu kaayi? Ku meku onsu a mu tshisamba tshietu tshia Menashe, diku dianyi ndia bantu badi kabayi ne bukole nansha bukese. Kabidi meme ndi muana wa mukala mu nzubu muetu." 
Judges6:16 Ke Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Nengikale nebe. Nanku neushipe bena Madiyane, bu bikale amu muntu umue." 
Judges6:17 Ngideyone kuamba ne: — Pawikala munnange, umpeshe tshimanyinu tshidi tshijadika ne: ke wewe Maweja-Nangila udi wakula nanyi." 
Judges6:18 Kuena mua kumuka muaba ewu, amu meme mumane kupingana ne mulambu undi musue kukulambula. Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Ndi amu muaba ewu, too ne pawapingana." 
Judges6:19 Ngideyone kuya, kulamba muana mbuji, ne mampa kaayi mela buanga, menza ne bukula kilo makumi asatu. Kutekaye munyinyi mu tshisaka, kuelaye nsupu mu luesu. Kuyaye nabi muinshi mua mutshi wa lusanga, kubipeshaye mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Judges6:20 Mutumibue kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Uye kuteka munyinyi ne mampa pa lubuebue elu. Pashishe wela nsupu pa bintu abi. Ngideyone kukumbaja bionsu abi. 
Judges6:21 Pashishe mutumibue kuolola tshianza tshivua ne dikombu, kutuaye lusongu lua dikombu pa munyinyi ne mampa. Kapia kulakuka mu lubuebue, kuosha munyinyi ne mampa. Pashishe mutumibue awu kujimina." 
Judges6:22 Ngideyone kujadika ne: muntu awu uvua mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila. Nanku kuelaye diyi ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi muena diakabi! Bualu ndi mumone mutumibue webe mpala ne mpala!" 
Judges6:23 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Wikale ne ditalala, kutshinyi, kuena ufua to!" 
Judges6:24 Ngideyone kuenzela Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu muaba awu, kutshinyikaye ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi ufila ditalala.” Mpindiewu tshilambuilu atshi tshitshidi mu Ofra, musoku wa mu diku dia Abiyezere." 
Judges6:25 Butuku abu, Maweja-Nangila kutumina Ngideyone diyi, umuambila ne: — Angata ngombe mulume wa tatuebe, ngombe muibidi, udi ne bidimu muanda mutekete. Upule tshilambuilu tshia mvidie Baale tshidi natshi tatuebe. Upule kabidi dikunji dia kutendelela mvidie didi diasa ku luseke lua tshilambuilu." 
Judges6:26 Ku lusongu lua mukuna ewu, washilaku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe tshilambuilu tshienza bimpe. Wangata ngombe mulume, umulambule bu mulambu wa kuosha. Kadi kapia kaudi osha naku mulambu awu, kikale ka nkunyi ya ku dikunji dia kutendelela mvidie diuvua muupule." 
Judges6:27 Ngideyone kusungula bena mudimu bende dikumi, bua kuenzabu bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kadi kuenzaye bionsu abi amu butuku, bualu uvua utshina kubienza mu munya, bualu bua bena diku diabu, ne bua bena musoku wabu." 
Judges6:28 Mu dinda, bena musoku bamane kubika, kumonabu ne: tshilambuilu tshia mvidie Baale, ne dikunji dia kutendelela divua ku luseke, bavua babiupula. Bavua bamona kabidi muvuabu balambula, bosha ngombe mulume mujima pa tshilambuilu tshikuabu tshiasa tshipiatshipia." 
Judges6:29 Bantu kukonkanangana ne: — Udi muenze nanku nnganyi? Bantu kuebejangana, kukeba, kujadika ne: Ngideyone, muana wa Yowashe, ke udi muenze nanku." 
Judges6:30 Ke kuambilabu Yowashe ne: — Ufike ne muanebe apa, bua tumushipe, bualu mmupule tshilambuilu tshia Baale, ne dikunji dia kutendelela divua diasa ku luseke." 
Judges6:31 Yowashe kukonka bantu bonsu bavua bakungila ne: — Tshienu ntshia kusungidila Baale anyi, ntshia kumuluila mvita anyi? Muntu yonsu udi musue kusungidila Baale, nebamushipe malaba dinda. Pikala Baale Mvidi Mukulu, neudisungidile nkayende, bualu tshilambuilu tshivuabu bupule ntshiende!" 
Judges6:32 Kutuadija tshikondu atshi, kuinyikabu Ngideyone dina dikuabu ne: Yerubaale — mmumue ne: Baale adisungidile nkayende — bu muvua Yowashe muambe ne: “Baale nkayende adisungidile, bualu tshilambuilu tshidibu bupule ntshiende!”" 
Judges6:33 Bena Madiyane, bena Amaleke, ne bantu balalakanyi bavua bafuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kudisangisha, kusabuka Yardene. Kuasabu mitanda yabu mu mpata wa Yizreyele." 
Judges6:34 Kadi Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Ngideyone. Awu kuela mpungi bua kubikila bantu ba mu diku dia Abiyezere bua bamulonde. 
Judges6:35 Ngideyone kutuma bantu mu buloba bua Menashe buonsu. Kubikilaye bantu ba mu tshisamba atshi tshia Menashe bua kumulondabu. Kutumaye kabidi bantu bua kubikila bena bisamba ebi: tshia Ashere, tshia Zebulone ne tshia Naftali. Bantu bonsu abu kudisangisha ne Ngideyone." 
Judges6:36 Ngideyone kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Uvua mumane kuamba ne: udi munsungule meme Ngideyone bua kusungidila bena Izrayele. 
Judges6:37 Nanku ndi musue kuadija tshiseba tshia mukoku panshi, muaba udibu bashipuila ntete. Butuku ebu, pikala lumume lukuate anu ku tshiseba, buloba budi muaba awu bushale buume, ne njadike ne: udi munsungule bua meme kusungidila bena Izrayele, muuvua mumane kuamba." 
Judges6:38 Kuenzekabi nanku. Butshia dinda, Ngideyone kuya kukama tshiseba. Kupatulaye lumume lupite bungi, lukumbane mua kuwuja dikopu tente." 
Judges6:39 Ngideyone kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Kumfikidi munda to. Ndi musue kukulomba kabidi tshintu musangu wa ndekelu. Ndi musue kumona kabidi tshimanyinu anu ne tshiseba. Mpindiewu, tshiseba nkayatshi tshikale tshiume, lumume luikale pa buloba buonsu budi muaba awu!" 
Judges6:40 Butuku abu, Mvidi Mukulu kukumbaja bionsu bivua Ngideyone mulombe: tshiseba nkayatshi kushala tshiume, kadi buloba buonsu buvua muaba awu buvua bubolesha kudi lumume." 
Judges7:1 Butshia dinda, Ngideyone, uvuabu binyika kabidi ne: Yerubaale, kutuadija luendu ne bena mvita bende. Kuyabu kuasa mitanda pabuipi ne mpokolu wa mayi wa Arode. Mitanda ya bena Madiyane ivua ku mutu kakese, mu mpata, ku luseke lua mukuna wa More." 
Judges7:2 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Bena mvita bebe mbapite bungi. Tshiena mua kubambuluisha bua batshimune bena Madiyane. Bualu bena Izrayele badi mua kuditambisha ne: tudi batshimune ku bukole buetu. Nanku bena Izrayele badi mua kudiangatshila butumbi budi buanyi. 
Judges7:3 Uye kuambila bena mvita bebe ne: “Bena mvita bonsu badi ne bowa, bazakala, bumuke ku mukuna wa Ngilaade, bapingane kuabu.” Bena mvita binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi kupingana. Bena mvita kushala binunu dikumi." 
Judges7:4 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Bena mvita batshidi anu ba bungi. Pueka nabu ku muelelu wa musulu, bua meme kukusungulujilabu. Nenkuambile bena mvita badi ne bua kuya nebe, ne badi ne bua kushala." 
Judges7:5 Ngideyone kupueka ne bena mvita bende ku muelelu wa musulu. Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Bantu bonsu bikale balaka mayi ne ludimi bu mbua, ubateke bashilangane ne badi batua binu bua kunua mayi." 
Judges7:6 Bantu nkama isatu kunua mayi ne tshianza, balaka. Kadi bakuabu bonsu kutua binu panshi bua kunua mayi." 
Judges7:7 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Uye ne bantu aba nkama isatu badi balaka mayi. Kadi bantu bakuabu bonsu bapingane kuabu. 
Judges7:8 Ngideyone kushala anu ne bantu nkama isatu. Kupingajaye bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu kuabu. Kadi kushalabu ne biakudia, kabidi ne mpungi, bia bavua bumuke. Mitanda ya bena Madiyane ivua mu mpata, kuinshi menemene mu tshibanda." 
Judges7:9 Butuku abu, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Juka, uye kubunda bena Madiyane badi mu mitanda yabu. Bualu meme ndi nkupeshabu." 
Judges7:10 Kadi pawikala ne bowa, nudianjile kuya kumona mitanda, pamue ne Pura udi ubambuluisha awu." 
Judges7:11 Neunwue bionsu bidibu bamba. Pashishe, newikale ne dikima dia kubaluisha. Ngideyone ne Pura kupueka too ne ku mpenga kua mitanda." 
Judges7:12 Bena Madiyane, bena Amaleke, ne bantu balalakanyi bavua bafuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bavua bapasalala mu mpata bungi bu mpasu. Bivua ne tumelu tupite bungi, bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Judges7:13 Ngideyone ufika, kusangana muntu wawila mulunda wende tshilota ne: — Ndi mulote tshilota, meme kumona diampa, dienza ne bukula bua orje, dibulunga mu mitanda yetu. Kudikumadi ku ntenta. Ntenta awu kupuka, mutue mutu panshi." 
Judges7:14 Mulunda wende kumuandamuna ne: — Tshilota etshi katshiena tshileja bualu bukuabu to, tshidi tshileja anu muele wa mvita wa Ngideyone, muena Izrayele, muana wa Yowashe. Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kujadika bua kutufila mu bianza biende ne mitanda yetu yonsu." 
Judges7:15 Ngideyone umvua amu tshilota atshi, ne dijingulula diatshi, kuinyikaye mutu panshi bua kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Pashishe kupinganaye mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele, wela mbila ne: — Jukayi, Maweja-Nangila mmumane kunupa mitanda ya bena Madiyane!" 
Judges7:16 Ngideyone kutapulula bena mvita nkama isatu ayi mu bisumbu bisatu. Kupeshaye muntu yonsu mpungi, mulondu wa munda mutupu, ne tshimunyi tshia kuteka munda mua mulondu amu." 
Judges7:17 Pashishe kubambilaye ne: — Nuikale bantangile anu meme. Nuenze bionsu bindi ngenza, pangikala mufike ku mpenga kua mitanda yabu." 
Judges7:18 Patuela mpungi, meme ne bantu bonsu bandi nabu, nenuele bienu mpungi nseke yonsu ya mitanda. Nenuele kabidi mbila ne: “Anu Maweja-Nangila, anu Ngideyone!”" 
Judges7:19 Pabuipi ne munda nkulu, Ngideyone ne bena mvita lukama bavuaye nabu, kufika ku mpenga kua mitanda. Baluishi bavua bamane kushintulula batentekedi. Ngideyone ne bavuaye nabu kuela mpungi, kushipa milondu ivuabu bambule." 
Judges7:20 Bisumbu bikuabu bibidi kuenza nanku kabidi. Bonsu kukuata bimunyi mu tshianza tshia bakaji, mpungi mu tshianza tshia balume, bela mbila ne: — Tuluishayi bantu aba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, ne dia Ngideyone!" 
Judges7:21 Kuimanabu nseke yonsu ya mitanda. Muntu yonsu uvua pa muaba wende. Kadi mu mitanda bantu bonsu bavua banyema, bela mbila, batshina." 
Judges7:22 Pavua bena mvita abu nkama isatu bela mpungi, Maweja-Nangila uvua usaka bena Madiyane bua bashipangane nkayabu mu mitanda yonsu. Ku nshikidilu, bena Madiyane bavua bashala, kunyema too ne ku Bete-Shita luseke lua ku Sereda, nansha too ne ku tshimenga tshia Abele-Mekola, pabuipi ne Tabate." 
Judges7:23 Kubikilabu bena Izrayele ba mu tshisamba tshia Naftali, tshia Ashere, ne tshia Menashe bonsu, bua balondakaje bena Madiyane." 
Judges7:24 Ngideyone kutuma bantu bua kuela diyi luseke lua mikuna ya Efrayime ne: — Puekayi bonsu, nujikile bena Madiyane njila. Nukuate maloba onsu adi ku musulu wa Yardene, too ne ku Bete-Bara. Nanku kubikilabu bena Efrayime bua bapueke, bakuate maloba adi ku Yardene too ne ku Bete-Bara." 
Judges7:25 Kukuatabu bamfumu babidi ba bena Madiyane, Orebe ne Zebe. Kushipelabu Orebe pa lubuebue lua Orebe. Kushipelabu Zebe ku tshikaminu tshia Zebe. Pashishe kutungunukabu, balondakaja bena Madiyane. Ngideyone uvua mushale dishiya dia Yardene. Kumutuadilabu mutu wa Orebe ne wa Zebe." 
Judges8:1 Bena Efrayime kukonka Ngideyone ne: — Udi mutuenze nenku bua tshinyi? Pauvua uya kuluisha bena Madiyane, kuena mutubikile petu bua tukuambuluishe bua tshinyi? Kutandishabu Ngideyone bikole." 
Judges8:2 Kadi Ngideyone kubakonka ne: — Bualu bundi muenze mbupite bunudi nuenu benze anyi? Nuenu bena Efrayime, diambuluisha dienu, nansha diodi dia katupa, didi ne mushinga, ndipite ditshimuna dia bena diku dianyi, dia bena Abiyezere." 
Judges8:3 Nuenu ke bavua Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe mu bianza bakalenga ba bena Madiyane, Orebe ne Zebe. Meme tshiena muanji kuenza bualu bua mushindu ewu to. Diandamuna dia Ngideyone edi kutuyisha tshiji tshia bena Efrayime." 
Judges8:4 Ngideyone ne bena mvita bende nkama isatu, kufika ku Yardene, kusabuka. Bavua bapungile. Kadi kutungunukabu ne dilondakaja baluishi babu." 
Judges8:5 Kufikabu mu tshimenga tshia Sukote. Ngideyone kuambila bena tshimenga ne: — Nuabanyine bantu bandi muende nabu aba tukata tua mampa, bualu badi ne dipungi. Ndi ndondakaja bakalenga ba bena Madiyane Zeba ne Salmuna." 
Judges8:6 Bamfumu ba tshimenga kumuandamuna ne: — Tudi ne bua kupesha bena mvita bebe biakudia bua tshinyi? Udi mumane kukuata Zeba ne Salmuna anyi? 
Judges8:7 Ngideyone kubenga, wamba ne: — Pikala Maweja-Nangila mufile Zeba ne Salmuna mu bianza bianyi, nempande makoba enu ne meba, kabidi ne mingonga, bia mu tshipela." 
Judges8:8 Ngideyone kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Sukote. Kuyaye ku Penuyele. Kulombaye kabidi bena tshimenga atshi biakudia. Bena tshimenga kuandamuna anu mushindu uvuabu bandamuna kudi bena Sukote awu. 
Judges8:9 Ngideyone kubambila ne: — Meme mumane kutshimuna, mu dipingana dianyi, nengupule kaleya ka tshimenga tshienu etshi." 
Judges8:10 Zeba ne Salmuna bavua ku Karkore ne bena mvita babu, bavua bashale anu binunu dikumi ne bitanu. Ke bena mvita bavua bashale ba ku bantu balalakanyi bavua bafuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Bualu bena mvita bakuabu binunu lukama ne makumi abidi, bavua bamane kubashipa mu mvita." 
Judges8:11 Ngideyone kulonda njila uvua bantu balalakanyi balonda luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ku Noba ne ku Yogboka. Kuluishaye baluishi bende bavua bashala mu mitanda yabu, bela meji ne: tudi muaba mukole." 
Judges8:12 Bakalenga babidi ba bena Madiyane, Zeba ne Salmuna, kunyema. Kadi Ngideyone kubalondakaja, kubakuata, kupampakaja bena mvita babu bonsu." 
Judges8:13 Pavua Ngideyone ufuma ku mvita, uvua mulonde njila wa ku mukuna wa Erese." 
Judges8:14 Kukuataye nsongalume wa mu Sukote, kumukonkaye mena a bamfumu bavua mu tshimenga. Muana awu kumufundila mena a bamfumu ne a bakulu bavuamu. Bonsu basanga bavua makumi muanda mutekete ne muanda mutekete." 
Judges8:15 Pashishe Ngideyone kuya kudi bena tshimenga tshia Sukote, ubambila ne: — Nuvuluke mushindu unuvua bampende, nunkonka ne: “Bena mvita bebe, nansha bobu bapungile, tudi mua kubapesha biakudia bua tshinyi? Kabidi Zeba ne Salmuna, ukadi mumane kubakuata anyi?” Nanku ndi munutuadile Zeba ne Salmuna." 
Judges8:16 Ngideyone kuangata meba ne mingonga bia mu tshipela, kukengesha nabi bakulu ba mu tshimenga tshia Sukote." 
Judges8:17 Kupulaye kabidi kaleya ka mu tshimenga tshia Penuyele. Kushipaye bena mu tshimenga atshi. 
Judges8:18 Pashishe Ngideyone kukonka Zeba ne Salmuna ne: — Bantu banuvua bashipe ku Tabore, bavua mushindu kaayi? Kumuandamunabu ne: — Bantu abu bavua bafuanangane nebe. Muntu yonsu wa kudibu uvua mufuanangane ne muana wa mukalenga!" 
Judges8:19 Ngideyone kuela mbila ne: — Bivua bana betu, bana ba mamu mundedi. Nanku ndi nditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, bu nuenu kanuyi bashipe bana betu aba, meme kabidi tshivua mua kunushipa to!" 
Judges8:20 Ngideyone kutumina muanabute wende Yetere diyi ne: — Ndaku, ushipe bakalenga aba! Kadi nsongalume awu kavua ne dikima dia kubatapa muele to. Bu mutshivuaye muana mukese, uvua ne bowa." 
Judges8:21 Ke Zeba ne Salmuna kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Utushipe wewe muine. Bualu muntu mukole ke udi mua kukumbaja bualu ebu! Nanku Ngideyone kushipa bakalenga abu babidi. Kuangataye bilengejilu bivua mu nshingu mua tumelu tuabu. 
Judges8:22 Malu awu mamane kupita, bena Izrayele kuambila Ngideyone ne: — Wikale mukalenga wetu. Pashishe muanebe ne muikuluebe nebapingane pa muaba webe. Bualu udi mutusungidile kudi bena Madiyane." 
Judges8:23 Ngideyone kuandamuna ne: — Meme tshiena mua kuikala mukalenga wenu to, nansha muananyi kabidi. Anu Maweja-Nangila neikale mukalenga wenu." 
Judges8:24 Ngideyone kuamba kabidi ne: — Kadi ndi musue kunulomba tshintu: muntu yonsu wa kunudi ampeshe kakanu ka ku bintu bivuaye muangate mu mvita. Bena Madiyane bavua bavuala tukanu tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bu muvua bantu bonsu ba mu tshipela batuvuala." 
Judges8:25 Nanku bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Netukupeshetu ne disanka. Bena Izrayele kuadija tshilamba panshi. Muntu yonsu kuelapu kakanu ka ku bintu biende bivuaye muangate mu mvita. 
Judges8:26 Tukanu tuonsu tua mpawungi tuvua Ngideyone mulombe, tuvua ne bujitu bua kilo bu makumi abidi. Ngideyone kupeta kabidi bilengejilu bikuabu, tukanu tua ku matshi, bilamba bimpe bikunze, bivua bakalenga ba bena Madiyane bavuale, ne nkanu ya mu nshingu, ivuabu balengeja nayi tumelu tuabu." 
Judges8:27 Ngideyone kuenza lupingu ne biamu bia mpawungi abi. Kulutekaye mu musoku wabu wa Ofra. Bena Izrayele kuya kuntendelela. Nanku lupingu alu kuenza buteyi kudi Ngideyone ne kudi bena diku diende. 
Judges8:28 Kutuadija tshikondu atshi, bena Madiyane bavua anu ku bumfumu bua bena Izrayele kashidi. Kabatshivua kabidi ne bukole to. Ditunga kupeta ditalala bidimu makumi anayi, matuku onsu avua Ngideyone ne muoyi." 
Judges8:29 Yerubaale, udibu binyika kabidi Ngideyone, muana wa Yowashe, kupingana ku nzubu kuende." 
Judges8:30 Uvua ne bana ba balume makumi muanda mutekete, bualu uvua ne bakaji ba bungi." 
Judges8:31 Mukajende mukuabu uvuaye mubanjije ku Shekeme, uvua mulele muana wa balume. Ngideyone kumuinyika ne: Abimeleke." 
Judges8:32 Ngideyone mumane kukulakaja bimpe, kufuaye. Kumujikabu mu lukita lua tatuende Yowashe, mu Ofra, musoku wa bena diku dia Abiyezere." 
Judges8:33 Ngideyone mumane kufua, bena Izrayele kupingana ku ditendelela dia mvidie Baale. Kutendelelabu mvidie Baale-Berite." 
Judges8:34 Kupuabu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu muoyi, nansha Yeye mubasungidile kudi baluishi babu bonsu bavua nabu mutumba." 
Judges8:35 Kabavua bavuluke kabidi bena diku dia Ngideyone, uvuabu binyika kabidi Yerubaale, nansha malu mimpe a bungi avuaye muenze bua kubapetesha diakalenga." 
Judges9:1 Abimeleke, muana wa Yerubaale (mmumue ne: Ngideyone ), kuya ku Shekeme, bua kuyukila ne bamansebende, kabidi ne bena nzubu wa mamuende bonsu. Kubambilaye ne:" 
Judges9:2 — Nuye kukonka balombodi ba mu tshimenga ne: nudi basue kuikala ku bumfumu bua bana ba Yerubaale bonsu makumi muanda mutekete, anyi ku bumfumu bua muana umue? Nuvuluke kabidi ne: meme ndi mulela wenu." 
Judges9:3 Bamansebende ba Abimeleke kuya kuambila balombodi ba mu Shekeme malu onsu awu. Balombodi abu kujadika bua kuditua ku tshia Abimeleke, bualu uvua mansebabu." 
Judges9:4 Kumupeshabu nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi muanda mutekete ya mu nzubu wa mvidie wabu Baale-Berite. Abimeleke kuangata nkanu ayi, kufuta bantu bapote, ba tshianana, bua bamulonde." 
Judges9:5 Abimeleke kuya mu nzubu wa tatuende ku Ofra. Muaba awu kushipaye bana babu makumi muanda mutekete, bana ba Yerubaale. Kubashipelaye anu pa lubuebue lumue. Amu Yotame, muana mukala, ke uvua mupande, bualu uvua musokome." 
Judges9:6 Balombodi bavua ku Shekeme, ne bantu bonsu bavua ku Bete-Milo, kudisangisha. Kuyabu ku mutshi wa lusanga wa mu Shekeme, pabuipi ne dibue divuabu bimanyika. Kutekabu Abimeleke ku bukalenga." 
Judges9:7 Kuambilabu Yotame bionsu abi. Kubandaye ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Ngarizime, kuelaye diyi dikole muende muonsu ne: — Bena Shekeme, nunteleje, panuikala basue bua Mvidi Mukulu anuteleje!" 
Judges9:8 “Dituku dikuabu, mitshi kumyuangana bua kudisunguila mukalenga. Kuambilayi mutshi wa olive ne: ‘Wikale mukalenga wetu!’" 
Judges9:9 Kadi mutshi wa olive kuandamuna ne: ‘Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi mua kulekela kupatula mafuta adibu banyisha kudi mvidie ne kudi bantu, bua meme kuikala nditemba, nnyungakana ku mutu kua mitshi mikuabu anyi?’" 
Judges9:10 Mitshi kuambila mutshi wa mfiku ne: ‘Wikale mukalenga wetu!’ 
Judges9:11 Kadi mutshi wa mfiku kuandamuna ne: ‘Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi mua kulekela kukuama bimuma bimpe bisheme, bua meme kuikala nditemba, nnyungakana ku mutu kua mitshi mikuabu anyi?’" 
Judges9:12 Pashishe mitshi kuambila mutshi wa mvinyone: ‘Wikale mukalenga wetu!’ 
Judges9:13 Kadi mutshi wa mvinyo kuandamuna ne: ‘Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi mua kulekela kupatula maluvu adi asankisha mvidie ne bantu, bua meme kuikala nditemba, nnyungakana ku mutu kua mitshi mikuabu anyi?’" 
Judges9:14 Ku ndekelu, mitshi kumvuangana, kuambila mutshi wa meba ne: ‘Wewe wikale mukalenga wetu!’" 
Judges9:15 Mutshi wa meba kuandamuna ne: ‘Panuikala basue kunsungula bu mukalenga wenu bulelela, imanayi muinshi mua dileji dianyi emu! Nuenu kanuyi benze nanku, kapia nekalakuke ku meba anyi. Nekoshe too ne mitshi ya sedre ya mu Lebanone! ’ ”" 
Judges9:16 Yotame kukonka bena Shekeme ne: — Panuvua bateke Abimeleke bua ikale mukalenga, nuvua benze bimpe anyi? Nuvua benzele Yerubaale ne nzubu wende bimpe anyi? Nuvua bavuluke bionsu bivua Yerubaale munuenzele anyi?" 
Judges9:17 Tatu wanyi uvua munuluile mvita. Uvua mubuele mu njiwu ya lufu anu bua kunusungidila kudi bena Madiyane. 
Judges9:18 Kadi lelu, nudi nubenga bena nzubu wende. Nudi bashipe bana bende ba balume makumi muanda mutekete pa lubuebue lumue. Nudi bateke Abimeleke bua ikale mukalenga wa Shekeme, bualu mmuanenu. Kadi Abimeleke mmuana uvua tatu mulele ne mukaji mupika." 
Judges9:19 Lelu panuikala benzele Yerubaale ne bena nzubu wende bualu ebu ne muoyi muimpe, Abimeleke anusankishe, nuenu kabidi numusankishe." 
Judges9:20 Kadi kanuyi benze nanku, kapia nekapatuke kudi Abimeleke bua kuosha bena Shekeme ne bena Bete-Milo. Kapia nekapatukile kabidi kudi bena Shekeme ne bena Bete-Milo bua kuosha Abimeleke." 
Judges9:21 Ke Yotame kunyema, kuya kusokoma ku Beyera, bualu uvua utshina muanabu Abimeleke." 
Judges9:22 Abimeleke uvua mushale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bidimu bisatu. 
Judges9:23 Pashishe Mvidi Mukulu kutuma tshimvundu pankatshi pa mukalenga Abimeleke ne bena Shekeme, kabatshiyi bumvuangana kabidi to. Bena Shekeme kutombokela Abimeleke." 
Judges9:24 Ke muvua bena Shekeme bonsu ne Abimeleke ne bua kufuta tshibawu tshia bubi buabu. Abimeleke uvua mupete dinyoka edi, bualu mmushipe bana babu ba balume makumi muanda mutekete, bana ba Yerubaale. Bena Shekeme bavua bapete dinyoka edi, bualu mbakoleshe Abimeleke mu maboku bua kushipaye bana babu." 
Judges9:25 Nanku bua kuenzela Abimeleke bibi, bena Shekeme kumutekela batentekedi ku mikuna yonsu ivua pabuipi ne tshimenga. Bantu abu bavua balamina bena luendu, biba mabuki abu. Bantu bakuabu bavua bambila Abimeleke bionsu abi." 
Judges9:26 Dituku dikuabu, Ngaale, muana wa Ebede, kufika mu Shekeme, ne bana babu ba balume. Nanku bena Shekeme kutuadija kutekemena amu muntu awu." 
Judges9:27 Kuyabu ku mionji yabu ya tumuma tua mvinyo. Kupolabu tumuma, kutukama. Kulongololabu tshibilu. Kuyabu mu nzubu wa mvidie wabu. Kuenzabu didia dinene dia disanka. Kushipabu Abimeleke." 
Judges9:28 Ngaale kubakonka ne: — Tuetu mu Shekeme, tudi bantu ba mushindu kaayi? Tudi baditeke ku bumfumu bua Abimeleke bua tshinyi? Abimeleke mene nnganyi? Udi anu muana wa Yerubaale! Mmuteke Zebule mulombodi wa tshimenga. Kadi nuenu bena Shekeme, nuitabe anu Amore uvua muase tshimenga tshia Shekeme! Katuena ne bualu butudi banangile Abimeleke to." 
Judges9:29 Nuenu bansungule meme Ngaale mfumu wa bena Shekeme, mvua mua kumusha Abimeleke mu bukalenga. Pashishe Ngaale kuela lubila ne: — Abimeleke, longolola bena mvita bebe bimpe, unduishe!" 
Judges9:30 Zebule, mulombodi wa tshimenga tshia Shekeme, umvua meyi avua Ngaale muambe, kufikaye munda." 
Judges9:31 Kutumaye bantu mu musokoku bua bambile Abimeleke ne: — Ngaale, muana wa Ebede, ne bana babu ba balume batshidi bafikilaku mu Shekeme, mbakujudile tshimvundu, batombuesha bena tshimenga." 
Judges9:32 Nanku butuku ebu, wewe ne bena mvita bebe, nuye kusokoma mu mpata." 
Judges9:33 Patshiabu dinda, diba dipatuka, uye kuluisha bena tshimenga. Pikala Ngaale ne bantu badiye nabu bapatuke bua kukuluisha, neubenzele muudi musue." 
Judges9:34 Nanku butuku, Abimeleke ne bena mvita bende bonsu, kuya kusokoma pabuipi ne Shekeme. Kutapulukabu mu bisumbu binayi." 
Judges9:35 Diba divua Ngaale upatuka mu tshimenga bua kuimana pabuipi ne tshiibi, Abimeleke ne bena mvita bende kujuka muaba uvuabu basokome." 
Judges9:36 Ngaale ubamona, kuambilaye Zebule ne: — Tangila bena mvita badi bapueka ku mukuna. Zebule kuandamuna ne: — To, ki mbantu nansha! Udi mumone mundidimbi wa mukuna bu bantu!" 
Judges9:37 Ngaale kumuambila kabidi ne: — Tangila! Mbantu menemene, badi bapueka pa kakuna ka pankatshi. Bantu bakuabu badi balonda njila wa ku mutshi wa lusanga lua benalubuku." 
Judges9:38 Ke Zebule kuamba ne: — Malu onsu auvua wamba avua a dishima. Uvua wamba ne: “Abimeleke nnganyi mene bua tuetu kuikala ku bumfumu buende!” Mpindiewu Abimeleke udi ufika ne bantu bauvua upetula. Nanku uye kuluisha Abimeleke! 
Judges9:39 Ngaale kupatuka mu tshimenga, bena Shekeme bamulonda. Kuluishabu Abimeleke." 
Judges9:40 Abimeleke kunyemesha Ngaale, kumulondakaja. Bantu ba bungi bavua Ngaale nabu, bavua batapika mputa ya lufu, kabayi banji kufika ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga." 
Judges9:41 Ke Abimeleke kuya kusomba ku Aruma. Kadi Zebule kuipata Ngaale ne bana babu ba balume mu Shekeme. Kubakandikaye bua kabapinganyi kabidi mu tshimenga to. 
Judges9:42 Dituku divua dilonda, bena Shekeme kudilongolola bua kuya mu madimi. Bantu bakuabu kumanyisha Abimeleke bualu ebu." 
Judges9:43 Nanku Abimeleke kutapulula bena mvita bende mu bisumbu bisatu. Kushalabu mu tshisuku, balamine. Abimeleke umona bena Shekeme bapatuka mu tshimenga, kuyaye lukasa bua kubaluisha." 
Judges9:44 Abimeleke ne tshisumbu tshia bena mvita bavuaye nabu, kuya lukasa bua kuimana ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga. Bisumbu bikuabu bibidi bia bena mvita bende kuluisha bantu bavua mu madimi, kubashipa." 
Judges9:45 Abimeleke kuluangana mvita dituku adi dijima. Kukuataye tshimenga, kushipa benatshi bonsu, kutshinyangakaja. Kumiaminaye luepu mu tshimenga atshi." 
Judges9:46 Bena Migdale-Shekeme bumvue lumu alu, kudisangishabu bonsu mu tshibambalu tshivua muinshi mu nzubu wa Baale-Berite." 
Judges9:47 Kumanyishabu Abimeleke muaba uvua bantu abu banyemena. 
Judges9:48 Abimeleke kuya ku mukuna wa Salmone, ne bena mvita bende bonsu. Kuambulaye tshisuyi, kukosaye ditamba dia mutshi, kuditeka pa dikaya. Kutumaye diyi bua bena mvita bende benze kabidi amu nanku." 
Judges9:49 Muntu yonsu wa kudibu kukosa ditamba dia mutshi, kulonda Abimeleke panyima. Kunguijabu matamba a mitshi awu pa mishiku ya tshibambalu tshivua muinshi mu nzubu wa Baale-Berite. Kuoshabu nzubu awu ne bantu bonsu bavuamu. Ke muvua bena Migdale-Shekeme bonsu bafua nanku, balume ne bakaji, bu bantu tshinunu." 
Judges9:50 Abimeleke kumuka muaba awu, kuya ku Tebese. Kusanganaye ne bena tshimenga atshi, kutshikuata." 
Judges9:51 Kadi munkatshi mua tshimenga atshi, muvua tshibumba tshibaka bimpe. Bantu bonsu, balume, bakaji ne balombodi, bavua banyemenamu, binjila tshiibi, babanda anu ku mutu kua tshibumba atshi." 
Judges9:52 Abimeleke kuluisha tshibumba atshi, kusemena ku tshiibi tshia ku tshibuelelu bua kuosha nzubu." 
Judges9:53 Kadi mukaji kuela dibue dinene. Kutuutadi Abimeleke ku mutu. Kumupandadi kabalubalu ka mutu. 
Judges9:54 Diakamue Abimeleke kubikila muana wa balume uvua muambule bia mvita biende. Kumuambilaye ne: — Angata muele webe, unshipe, bua bantu kabambi ne: muntu mukaji mmushipe Abimeleke. Muana wa balume awu kutua Abimeleke muele, kuabulukangana. Abimeleke kufua." 
Judges9:55 Bena Izrayele bamone ne: Abimeleke mmumane kulua, kupinganabu muntu yonsu kuende." 
Judges9:56 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu mufute Abimeleke, bua bubi buvuaye muenzele tatuende, mushipe bana babu ba balume makumi muanda mutekete." 
Judges9:57 Mvidi Mukulu uvua munyoke kabidi bena Shekeme, bua lonji lukole luwabu nalu. Manyoka onsu avua Yotame, muana wa Yerubaale, muambile bena Shekeme, kukumbanawu." 
Judges10:1 Abimeleke mumane kufua, Tola, muana wa Puwa, kabidi ne muikulu wa Dodo, kusungidila bena Izrayele. Tola uvua muena tshisamba tshia Isakare, kadi uvua musombe mu Shamire, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime." 
Judges10:2 Kulombolaye bena Izrayele bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu. Pashishe kufuaye. Kumujikabu mu Shamire. 
Judges10:3 Yayire, muena Ngilaade, kupingana muaba wa Tola. Kushalaye mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
Judges10:4 Uvua ne bana ba balume makumi asatu. Bana abu bavua babanda pa nyama ya mpunde makumi asatu. Bavua ne misoku makumi asatu mu buloba bua Ngilaade. Too ne mpindiewu, badi binyika miaba eyi ne: mmisoku ya Yayire." 
Judges10:5 Yayire kufua. Kumujikabu mu Kamone. 
Judges10:6 Bena Izrayele kuenza kabidi malu mabi adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Kutendelelabu mvidie mulume Baale, ne mvidie mukaji Astarte, kabidi ne mvidie ya bena Arame, ya bena Sidone, ya bena Mowabe, ya bena Amone ne ya bena Peleshete. Kulekelabu Maweja-Nangila, kabayi bamutendelela kabidi to." 
Judges10:7 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda. Kubafilaye mu bianza bia bena Peleshete ne bena Amone. 
Judges10:8 Kutuadija tshikondu atshi too ne bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bena bisamba ebi kukengesha, kutatshisha kabidi bena Izrayele bavua basombele mu Ngilaade, buloba bua bena Amone buvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Judges10:9 Bena Amone kusabuka mene Yardene, bua kuluisha bena tshisamba tshia Yuda, tshia Binyamine, ne tshia Efrayime. Nanku bena Izrayele kubuela mu dikenga dikole." 
Judges10:10 Kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe, bamuambila ne: — Tudi bakuenzele bibi. Bualu tudi bakulekele wewe Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bua kutendelela mvidie Baale." 
Judges10:11 Maweja-Nangila kubakonka ne: — Pa wabu banukengesha kudi bena Ejipitu, bena Amore, bena Amone, bena Peleshete," 
Judges10:12 bena Sidone, bena Amaleke ne bena Mayone, nuvua bambikile bua meme kunuambuluisha. Tshiena munumushe mu bianza biabu anyi?" 
Judges10:13 Kadi nuenu kumbenga, kutendelela anu mvidie mikuabu. Nanku tshiena musue kunusungidila kabidi to." 
Judges10:14 Nubikile anu mvidie inuvua basungule bua inuambuluishe. Anu mvidie ayi ke idi mua kunusungidila panudi mu dikenga. 
Judges10:15 Ke bena Izrayele kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila, tudi bamane kuenza bibi. Utuenzele muudi musue. Kadi utusungidile kabidi lelu." 
Judges10:16 Ke bena Izrayele kumusha mvidie ya bantu benyi ivuabu batendelela. Kutendelelabu tshiakabidi Maweja-Nangila. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kavua kabidi ne disanka bua kumona dikenga dia bena Izrayele to. 
Judges10:17 Bena Amone kudisangisha bonsu. Kuasabu mitanda mu buloba bua Ngilaade. Bena Izrayele bavua base yabu mitanda mu Mispa. 
Judges10:18 Pashishe bisamba bivua biase mu Ngilaade, ne bamfumu babu, kukonkanganabu ne: — Udi mua kutuadija mvita ne bena Amone nnganyi? Muntu watuadija mvita ne bena Amone, neikale mulombodi wa bonsu badi basomba mu buloba bua Ngilaade." 
Judges11:1 Yefete, tshilobu tshia mvita, uvua muana wa mukaji mudisombele. Dina dia tatuende divua Ngilaade." 
Judges11:2 Mukaji wa Ngilaade wa ku nzubu, uvua mumulelele pende bana ba balume. Bana abu bamane kukola, kuipatabu Yefete, bamuamba ne: — Wewe kuena mua kupiana bintu bia tatu to, bualu udi muana wa mukaji mukuabu." 
Judges11:3 Nanku Yefete kunyema bana babu, kuya kule. Kuasaye mu buloba bua Tobe. Bantu bena buenzayi kudisangisha ne Yefete, kumulonda mu bionsu bivuaye wenza." 
Judges11:4 Matuku mamane kupita, bena Amone kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Judges11:5 Nanku bu muvuabu batuadija kuluangana, bakulu ba mu Ngilaade kuya kukeba Yefete mu buloba bua Tobe." 
Judges11:6 Kuambilabu Yefete ne: — Luaku, wikale mulombodi wa bena mvita betu, bua tumone mua kuluangana ne bena Amone." 
Judges11:7 Kadi Yefete kubakonka ne: — Nuenu ke bavua bangipata mu nzubu mua tatu wanyi. Nanku kanuena baluishi banyi anyi? Nudi numbikila mpindiewu panudi mu dikenga bua tshinyi? 
Judges11:8 Bakulu kumuambila kabidi ne: — Bushiwa, tudi bapingane kuudi mpindiewu, bua tudisange nebe bua kuluisha bena Amone. Kabidi bua wikale mulombodi wetu, ne wa bena Ngilaade bonsu." 
Judges11:9 Yefete kubambila ne: — Patuikala baye nenu bua kuluisha bena Amone, kabidi pikala Maweja-Nangila mubafile mu bianza bianyi, nengikale mulombodi wenu bushuwa!" 
Judges11:10 Bakulu ba mu Ngilaade kuambila Yefete ne: — Maweja-Nangila ikale mujadiki wa dilaya ditudi tulaya dia kukumbaja tshiudi musue. 
Judges11:11 Ke Yefete kuya ne bakulu ba mu Ngilaade abu. Bena Izrayele kumuteka mulombodi wa bena mvita. Nanku Yefete kujadika diumvuangana diabu ne bakulu abu ku Mispa, muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila." 
Judges11:12 Yefete kutuma bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Amone, bua kumukonka ne: — Paudi uluisha bena ditunga dianyi, tudi tufuila nebe tshinyi?" 
Judges11:13 Mukalenga wa bena Amone kuandamuna Yefete ne: — Nudi bamanye tshitudi tufuila nebe. Bualu pavua bena Izrayele bapatuka mu Ejipitu, bavua bakuata ditunga dianyi, biangatshile ku tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Amone, too ne ku musulu wa Yaboke, ne ku tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene. Utupingajile maloba aa mpindiewu ne disanka." 
Judges11:14 Yefete kutuma kabidi bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Amone," 
Judges11:15 bua bamuambile ne: — Bena Izrayele kabena bakuata buloba bua bena Mowabe, nansha bua bena Amone to." 
Judges11:16 Bualu pavua bena Izrayele bapatuka mu Ejipitu, kupitshilabu mu tshipela too ne ku Mayi manene makunze. Pashishe kufikabu ku Kadeshe." 
Judges11:17 Pavua bena Izrayele mu Kadeshe amu, kutumabu bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Edome, bua kumulomba dianyisha dia kupitshila mu buloba buende. Kadi mukalenga awu kubenga. Bena Izrayele kulomba anu mushindu umue kudi mukalenga wa bena Mowabe. Awu kubenga kabidi. Nanku bena Izrayele kushala anu mu Kadeshe." 
Judges11:18 Pashishe kutuadijabu luendu mu tshipela. Kunyungulukabu buloba bua bena Edome, ne bua bena Mowabe. Kufikabu ku buloba budi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua buloba bua Mowabe. Kuasabu mitanda yabu dishiya dia musulu wa Amone. Kabena babuela mu buloba bua bena Mowabe to, bualu musulu wa Amone ke udi mukalu. Nanku kabena bausabuka to." 
Judges11:19 Pavua bena Izrayele muaba awu, kutumabu bantu kudi mukalenga Sihone, muena Amore, uvua mukalenga mu Eshebone. Kumulombabu dianyisha dia kupitshila mu buloba buende, bua bamone mua kuya mu ditunga diabu divuabu ne bua kupeta." 
Judges11:20 Kadi Sihone kubenga. Kusangishaye bena mvita bende bonsu. Kudilongololabu ku Yakase bua kuluangana mvita. Kuluishabu bena Izrayele. 
Judges11:21 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kufila Sihone ne bena mvita bende mu bianza bia bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele kutshimuna Sihone. Kukuatabu buloba buonsu buvuabu basomba kudi bena Amore," 
Judges11:22 biangatshile ku tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Amone too ne ku musulu wa Yaboke, biangatshile kabidi ku tshipela tshidi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ditunga too ne ku Yardene." 
Judges11:23 Nanku anu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ke uvua muanyishe bua tuetu, bantu bende, tukuate buloba bua bena Amore. Kadi wewe udi musue kutunyengabu anyi?" 
Judges11:24 Kuena ne buebe buloba buvua mvidie webe Kemoshe mukupe anyi? Nanku tuetu kabidi, tudi ne buetu buloba, buvua Maweja-Nangila muanyishe bua tuetu kubukuata." 
Judges11:25 Udi wela meji ne: udi ne makanda mupite Balake, muana wa Sipore, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe anyi? Balake mene kavua mubunde bena Izrayele, nansha mubaluishe to." 
Judges11:26 Bidimu nkama isatu, bena Izrayele bavua anu base mu bimenga bia Eshebone ne Aroyere, kabidi mu misoku ivua nabi mutumba, ne mu bimenga bionsu bivua ku muelelu wa musulu wa Amone. Bidimu bionsu ebi, kuvua mubanyenge buloba ebu bua tshinyi?" 
Judges11:27 Meme tshiena mukuenzele bibi to. Wewe ke udi mungenzele bibi, bualu udi unduisha. Anu Maweja-Nangila, mulumbuluishi wa bantu, akose lelu tshilumbu tshidi pankatshi pa bena Izrayele ne bena Amone!" 
Judges11:28 Kadi bionsu bivua Yefete muambe, mukalenga wa bena Amone kena mubiangate ne mushinga to." 
Judges11:29 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Yefete. Kuendakanaye mu buloba bua Ngilaade ne bua Menashe. Kupitshilaye ku Mispa mu Ngilaade, bua kufika mu buloba bua bena Amone." 
Judges11:30 Yefete kuditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Wewe mufile bena Amone mu bianza bianyi," 
Judges11:31 meme muye kutshimuna bena Amone, mupingane amu bimpe, muntu wadianjila kupatuka mu nzubu muanyi bua kungakidila, nenkupe muntu awu. Nenkulambuleye bu mulambu wa kuosha." 
Judges11:32 Nanku Yefete kusambuka mukalu, bua kuya kuluisha bena Amone. Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza biende." 
Judges11:33 Yefete kubatshimuna anu musangu umue. Kukuataye misoku makumi abidi ivua pankatshi pa Aroyere, Minite ne Abele-Keramine. Ke bena Amone kushala ku bumfumu bua bena Izrayele." 
Judges11:34 Pavua Yefete upingana kuende ku Mispa, muanende wa bakaji kupatuka bua kumuakidila. Uvua wenda wimba makasa, uja ne maja. Yefete uvua anu ne muana umue wa bakaji awu. Kavua mulele bakuabu to." 
Judges11:35 Yefete umona amu muanende awu, kudipandaye bilamba bua kuleja kanyinganyinga, udila wamba ne: — Akia! Muananyi wa bakaji, wakumbueja mu dikenga! Anu wewe wakunkebela kanyinganyinga bua tshinyi? Mvua mumane kuditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila. Ndi anu ne bua kukumbaja mitshipu yanyi." 
Judges11:36 Muana wa bakaji kuandamuna ne: — Pawikala mumane kuditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila, ungenzele anu muuvua mulaye Maweja-Nangila. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mukuambuluishe bua wewe kusombuela baluishi bebe bena Amone." 
Judges11:37 Kadi undekele ngondu ibidi. Nenye ku mikuna ne bansongakaji nanyi, bua meme kudidilaku bua pandi mfua, tshiyi muanji kuya ku dibaka." 
Judges11:38 Yefete kuitaba bua nsongakaji aye bua ngondu ibidi. Nsongakaji kuya ku mikuna ne bansongakaji nende. Kudidilayeku, bua pawaye ufua, kayi muanji kuya ku dibaka." 
Judges11:39 Ngondu ibidi mimane kukumbana, nsongakaji kupingana kudi tatuende. Tatuende kumuenzela bu muvuaye mulaye. Nsongakaji kufua, kayi muanji kumanya balume to. Kutuadija tshikondu atshi, tshilele etshi kushala kudi bena Izrayele:" 
Judges11:40 ku tshidimu tshionsu, bansongakaji ba bena Izrayele badi baya kudila matuku anayi, bajinga muana wa bakaji wa Yefete, muena mu Ngilaade." 
Judges12:1 Bena Efrayime kudisangisha, kusabuka musulu wa Yardene. Kuyabu ku Safone. Kukonkabu Yefete ne: — Udi muye kuluisha bena Amone, kuyi mutubikile bua kukuambuluisha bua tshinyi? Tudi tuosha nzubu webe, tukoshilamu!" 
Judges12:2 Yefete kubandamuna ne: — Bena tshisamba tshianyi ne meme muine, tuvua ne mvita mikole ne bena Amone. Meme kunubikila, kadi kanuena bansungidile mu bianza biabu to." 
Judges12:3 Meme kumona ne; kanuena bafike bua kungambuluisha. Nanku ke meme kudifila ne muoyi mujima, musue nansha kufua bua kutshimuna bena Amone. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza bianyi. Nanku nudi bafike bua kunduisha penu bua tshinyi?" 
Judges12:4 Ke Yefete kubikidisha bena Ngilaade bonsu. Kuluishaye bena Efrayime, kubatshimuna. Bena Efrayime ke bavua bamba ne: “Nuenu bena Ngilaade, nudi anu bena Efrayime bavua banyema kuetu. Nudi bumuke mu tshisamba tshietu tshia bena Efrayime, bua kubuela mu tshia bena Menashe!”" 
Judges12:5 Ke bena Ngilaade kukuata malobu a Yardene, bua bena Efrayime kabapetshi mushindu wa kupita. Misangu yonsu, pavua muntu uvua munyeme ufika bua kupita, bavua bamukonka ne: — Udi muena Efrayime anyi? Pavua muntu awu ubenga ne: “Tshiena muena Efrayime to”," 
Judges12:6 bavua bamuenzeja ku bukole bua ashindumune muaku wa “Shibolete”. Kadi muntu awu uvua wamba yeye ne: “Sibolete ”. Bualu kavua mumanye mua kushindumuna muaku awu bimpe to. Nanku bavua bamukuata, bamushipela pabuipi ne malobu a Yardene. Tshikondu atshi, kushipabu bena Efrayime binunu makumi anayi ne bibidi." 
Judges12:7 Yefete, muena Ngilaade, uvuamushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu bisambombu. Pashishe kuluaye. Kumujikabu mu Ngilaade mu tshimenga tshiabu tshimulela." 
Judges12:8 Yefete mumane kufua, Ibsane, muena Betleyeme, kushala mulombodi wa bena Izrayele." 
Judges12:9 Uvua ne bana ba balume makumi asatu, kabidi ne ba bakaji makumi asatu. Uvua museleshe bana bende ba bakaji kudi bantu bavua kabayi ba tshisamba tshiabu to. Uvua muselele kabidi bana bende ba balume bakaji anu ba mu bisamba bikuabu. Ibsane uvua mushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu muanda mutekete." 
Judges12:10 Pashishe kufuaye. Kumujikabu mu Betleyeme. 
Judges12:11 Ibsane mumane kufua, Elone, muena tshisamba tshia Zebulone, kushala mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu dikumi." 
Judges12:12 Pashishe kufuaye. Kumujikabu mu Ayalone, mu buloba bua Zebulone." 
Judges12:13 Elone mumane kufua, Abdone, muana wa Ilele, muena Piratone, kushala mulombodi wa bena Izrayele." 
Judges12:14 Uvua mulele bana ba balume makumi anayi. Uvua ne bikulu makumi asatu. Bana abu ne bikulu abu, bavua babanda pa nyama ya mpunde makumi muanda mutekete. Abdone uvua mushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu muanda mukulu." 
Judges12:15 Pashishe kufuaye. Kumujikabu mu Piratone, mu buloba bua Efrayime, ku mukuna wa muena Amaleke." 
Judges13:1 Bena Izrayele kuenza kabidi malu mabi avua Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza bia bena Peleshete bidimu makumi anayi. 
Judges13:2 Mu tshimenga tshia Sora, muvua muntu uvuabu binyika ne: Manowa. Uvua wa mu tshisamba tshia Dane. Mukajende kavua mulele muana nansha umue to." 
Judges13:3 Dituku dikuabu, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kumuenekela mukaji awu, umuambila ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: kuena mulele, udi nkumba. Kadi newimite difu, neulele muana wa balume." 
Judges13:4 Bituadije mpindiewu, udilame bimpe. Kunu maluvu a mvinyo, nansha ma-luvu makole makuabu. Kudi tshintu tshidi ne mikiya." 
Judges13:5 Bualu newimite difu, neulele muana wa balume. Nsongalume ewu, kabena mua kumukosa nsuki to. Bualu yeye kayi muanji kuledibua, mmumane kujidila kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye ke watuadija kusungila bena Izrayele mu bianza bia bena Peleshete." 
Judges13:6 Mukaji uya kuende, kuambilaye bayende ne: — Muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu mmummuenekele. Uvua bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, bualu uvua mukuate bowa bua kumutangila. Tshiena mumukonke muaba udiye ufuma. Kena mungambile dina diende to." 
Judges13:7 Uvua mungambile ne: newimite difu, neulele muana wa balume. Mmumane kunkandika maluvu a mvinyo, maluvu makole makuabu, nansha biakudia bidi ne mikiya. Bualu nsongalume awu, kayi muanji kuledibua too ne muafuaye, neikale muntu mujidila kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Judges13:8 Manowa kulomba Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela, ututumine kabidi muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu uuvua mumane kututumina, bua atulongeshe mushindu utudi mua kukolesha muana waledibua awu." 
Judges13:9 Mvidi Mukulu kuitaba dilomba dia Manowa. Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela kabidi mukaji mu budimi. Bayende wa mukaji kavuapu to. 
Judges13:10 Mukaji kuya lubilu bua kuambila bayende ne: — Teleja, muntu uvua mummuenekele dituku dikuabu awu, mmumuenekele kabidi lelu!" 
Judges13:11 Manowa kuya ne mukajende lukasa. Usemena pamue ne muntu awu, kumukonkaye ne: — Wewe ke uvua muyukile ne muena kuanyi anyi? Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mmeme." 
Judges13:12 Manowa kumuambila kabidi ne: — Pikala malu onsu audi wamba awu makumbane, mmikenji kaayi itudi mua kulonda bua kukolesha muana awu? Netumuenzele tshinyi?" 
Judges13:13 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuambila Manowa ne: — Mukajebe ajile bionsu bindi mumuambile: 
Judges13:14 kena mua kulabula bintu bidi bifuma ku mutshi wa mvinyo. Kena mua kunua maluvu makole, nansha a mvinyo mene. Kena mua kudia tshintu tshidi ne mikiya. Mukajebe akumbaje bionsu bindi muambe abi bimpe." 
Judges13:15 Manowa kuambila mutumibue ne: — Bu wewe musue, unsombeshe katupa. Netukulambile muana mbuji." 
Judges13:16 Mutumibue kuandamuna ne: — Nansha meme musombe, tshiakudia biakudia binuampesha to. Kadi, pawikala musue, ulongolole mulambu wa kuosha, uulambule Maweja-Nangila. Manowa kavua muanji kumvua ne: mmutumibue menemene wa Maweja-Nangila to." 
Judges13:17 Nanku kumuambilaye ne: — Utuambile dina diebe bua tuetu kukunemeka, padi bionsu biudi utuambila bikumbana." 
Judges13:18 Mutumibue kubenga, umukonka ne: — Udi musue kumanya dina dianyi bua tshinyi? Dina dianyi didi dia dikema." 
Judges13:19 Manowa kushipa muana mbuji, kulongolola mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi. Kuutekaye pa lubuebue bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila udi wenza malu adi a dikema. Pavua Manowa ne mukajende batangile" 
Judges13:20 ndimi ya kapia, muinshi mua mulambu uvua ubanda ku tshilambuilu, uya mulu. Manowa ne mukajende kumona mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila ubanda munkatshi mua muinshi. Pashishe Manowa ne mukajende kudiela mpala panshi." 
Judges13:21 Manowa kujadika ne: muntu ewu uvua mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila. Kadi mutumibue kena mubamuenekele musangu mukuabu to. Kuyaye kashidi. 
Judges13:22 Manowa kuambila mukajende ne: — Bulelela netufue, bualu tudi bamone Mvidi Mukulu." 
Judges13:23 Mukajende kumuandamuna ne: — Bu Maweja-Nangila musue kutushipa, kavua mua kuanyisha mulambu wetu wa kuosha, ne wa bintu bia mu madimi. Kavua mua kutuleja bionsu bitudi bamone ebi. Kavua mua kutuambila mikenji yonsu itudi bumvue eyi." 
Judges13:24 Ke mukaji wa Manowa kulela muana wa balume, kumuinyika Shimeshone. Nsongalume kukola, Maweja-Nangila kumuela lupemba." 
Judges13:25 Muana awu, uvua mu mitanda ya Dane, pankatshi pa Sora ne Eshetayole, tshikondu tshivua Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila mutuadije kumuenzeja malu a dikema musangu wa kumpala." 
Judges14:1 Dituku dikuabu, Shimeshone kuya mu Timna. Kumonayemu nsongakaji wa bena Peleshete." 
Judges14:2 Shimeshone upingana kuabu, kuambilaye baledi bende ne: — Ku Timna ndi mumone nsongakaji wa bena Peleshete. Ndi musue nunselele mukaji ewu." 
Judges14:3 Baledi ba Shimeshone kubenga, bamba ne: — Udi muye kusungula nsongakaji amu wa bena Peleshete badibu kabayi bateke panshi bua tshinyi? Kuena mumone nsongakaji mu diku dienu, nansha mu tshisamba tshienu anyi? Kadi Shimeshone kuambila tatuende ne: — Ndi musue unselele amu nsongakaji awu. Bualu ndi mumunange." 
Judges14:4 Baledi ba Shimeshone kabavua bamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila mene ke uvua mupeshe muanabu wa balume dijinga adi, bua apete mushindu wa kuluisha bena Peleshete. Bualu tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele bavua ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete." 
Judges14:5 Shimeshone ne baledi bende kuya ku Timna. Bafike ku madimi a mitshi ya mvinyo avua pabuipi ne Timna, muana wa nyama wa ntambue kutupika, udila, uya kudi Shimeshone." 
Judges14:6 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Shimeshone. Awu uvua anu bianza bitupu. Kadi kupandaye muana wa ntambue awu bipese, amu bu udi upanda kana ka mbuji. Kadi Shimeshone kena muambile baledi bende bionsu bivuaye muenze abi to." 
Judges14:7 Kutungunukaye ne luendu. Kuyaye kuyukila ne nsongakaji wa bena Peleshete. Nsongakaji awu uvua umulengelela bikole. 
Judges14:8 Matuku mamane kupita, Shimeshone kupingana kabidi ku Timna bua kusela nsongakaji awu. Pavua Shimeshone mu njila, kusesukaye bua kumona tshitalu tshia nyama wa ntambue uvuaye mushipe. Kusanganaye mbulubulu mienza buitshi munda mua mifuba ya nyama awu." 
Judges14:9 Shimeshone kupatula buitshi, kuteka mu bianza, wenda udia mu njila. Pashishe, kufikaye muaba uvua tatuende ne mamuende. Kubapeshaye buitshi abu bua kudiabu. Kadi kena mubambile ne: buitshi ebu, ndi mubupatule munda mua nyama wa ntambue undi mushipe awu to." 
Judges14:10 Tatuende wa Shimeshone kuya ku ba nsongakaji awu. Shimeshone kulongoluela bantu ba muaba awu didia dia dibaka, bu mudi bansongalume bonsu benza." 
Judges14:11 Bena Peleshete bamone Shimeshone, kusungulabu bansongalume makumi asatu bua kushindikija Shimeshone." 
Judges14:12 Shimeshone kubambila ne: — Ndi musue kunuelela muanu. Panuikala baumanye, bangandamuna, matuku muanda mutekete a tshibilu tshia dibaka kaayi manji kupita, nennupeshe miteelu mimpe makumi asatu, ne bilamba bikuabu bia tshibilu makumi asatu." 
Judges14:13 Kadi nuenu kanuyi bandamune bimpe, nenumpeshe meme miteelu mimpe makumi asatu, ne bilamba bia tshibilu makumi asatu. Bansongalume abu kuandamuna Shimeshone ne: — Elaku muanu webe, tudi tukuteleja." 
Judges14:14 Shimeshone kubelela muanu ne: — Biakudia mbifume kudi udi ubidia. Tshintu tshisheme ntshifume kudi udi ne bukole. Mmumue ne tshinyi? Matuku asatu mamane kupita, bansongalume abu kabavua banji kupeta diandamuna to." 
Judges14:15 Dituku dia muanda mutekete, kuambilabu mukaji wa Shimeshone ne: — Enzeja bayebe, atujinguluile muanu. Kayi mutujinguluile muanu, tudi tukosha wewe ne bena nzubu webe bonsu. Nuvua batubikile bua kutunyenga bintu bietu bionsu anyi?" 
Judges14:16 Mukaji wa Shimeshone kuya kudidila bayende, umusengelela ne: — Bulelela kuena munnange to. Udi munnyoke! Bualu udi muelele bana betu muanu, kuyi muanji kunjinguluila meme. Shimeshone kuandamuna ne: — Muanu ewu tshiena muujinguluile nansha tatu nansha mamu badi bandela to. Kadi ndi mua kukujinguluila muanu bua tshinyi?" 
Judges14:17 Mukaji wa Shimeshone uvua anu umutatshisha ne muadi matuku onsu muanda mutekete a tshibilu tshia dibaka. Dituku dia ndekelu, Shimeshone kumujinguluila muanu, bualu bikavua bimutonda. Ke mukaji kuambila bana babu dimujinguluila adi." 
Judges14:18 Dituku dia muanda mutekete, diba kadiyi dianji kubuela, bena tshimenga kuya kuambila Shimeshone ne: — Ntshintu kaayi tshidi tshisheme tshipite buitshi? Ntshintu kaayi tshidi ne bukole tshipite nyama wa ntambue? Shimeshone kuandamuna ne: — Bu nuenu kanuyi badime ne nyama wanyi wa ngombe mukaji utshidi mutekete, kanuvua mua kupeta diandamuna to." 
Judges14:19 Pashishe, Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Shimeshone. Kuyaye ku Askalone. Kushipaye bantu balume makumi asatu. Kuangataye bilamba biabu, kubipesha bansongalume bavua bandamuna muanu. Ke Shimeshone kupingana kudi tatuende ne tshiji tshikole." 
Judges14:20 Kumunyengabu mukajende; kumupeshabu nsongalume mukuabu uvua mushindikije Shimeshone mu dibaka. 
Judges15:1 Matuku mamane kupita, tshikondu tshia kunowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, Shimeshone kuya kumonangana ne mukajende. Uvua mumutuadile lukungulu lua mbuji. Shimeshone kulomba bua kubuela mu nzubu mua mukajende. Kadi tatuende muenu kubenga." 
Judges15:2 Tatuende muenu kumuambila ne: — Mvua muele meji ne: kuena munange kabidi mukajebe to. Ndi mumane kumufila kudi nsongalume uvua mukushindikije mu dibaka. Kadi, muakunyende udi muimpe, mutambe yayende. Kabiena nanku anyi? Udi mua kumuangata pa muaba wa yayende." 
Judges15:3 Shimeshone kuamba ne: — Mpindiewu, muntu kena mua kumbela to. Ndi musue kuenzela bena Peleshete bibi." 
Judges15:4 Shimeshone kuya, kukuata nyama ya mibuabua nkama isatu. Kuenzaye bimunyi bia kapia. Kusuikakajaye mikila ya nyama ya mibuabua ibidi ibidi. Kusuikaye tshimunyi tshia kapia ku dijita divua pankatshi pa mikila ibidi iwaye mulamakaje." 
Judges15:5 Kutemeshaye kapia ku bimunyi aku. Kulekelaye nyama ayi mu madimi a bena Peleshete a ntete ya kuenza bukula. Nanku kuoshaye ntete ivua ku bikolakola misuika mu bisumbu, nansha itshivua mu madimi. Kuoshaye kabidi ne mitshi ya olive." 
Judges15:6 Bena Peleshete kukonkangana bua muntu uvua muenze bualu ebu. Kubambilabu ne: — Udi muenze ke Shimeshone! Mmuenze nunku, bualu tatuende muenu udi musombele mu Timna, mmumunyenge mukajende, mumufile kudi nsongalume mukuabu uvua mushindikije Shimeshone mu dibaka. Ke bena Peleshete kuya kuosha mukaji wa Shimeshone, kuosha kabidi ne tatuende ne muoyi." 
Judges15:7 Shimeshone kubambila ne: — Bu munudi nuenza malu a mushindu ewu, tshiakusomba ne ditalala to, anu meme mumane kumusombuela." 
Judges15:8 Shimeshone kubaluisha, kubatshimuna diakamue. Pashishe kuyaye kusombela munda mua lubuebue lua Etame." 
Judges15:9 Bena Peleshete kuya mu buloba bua Yuda. Kudilongololabu ne bena mvita bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Leki. 
Judges15:10 Bena Yuda kukonka bena Peleshete ne: — Nudi balue kutuluisha bua tshinyi? Bena Peleshete kuandamuna ne: — Tudi bafike bua tuetu kukuata Shimeshone, kumuenzela bionsu bidiye mutuenzele." 
Judges15:11 Ke bantu balume ba bena Yuda binunu bisatu, kuya mu lubuebue lua Etame. Kuambilabu Shimeshone ne: — Udi mumanye ne: tuetu tudi ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete. Kuena mumone ne: udi utuenzela bibi anyi? Shimeshone kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mubenzele bu mudibu bangenzele." 
Judges15:12 Bantu abu kuandamuna Shimeshone ne: — Tudi bafike muaba ewu bua kukusuika mionji, kukufila kudi bena Peleshete. Shimeshone kubambila ne: — Nuditshipe bua kanunshipi nuenu to." 
Judges15:13 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Tuetu katuena ne dijinga dia kukushipa to. Tudi basue anu kukusuika mionji, kukufila kudi bena Peleshete. Kusuikabu Shimeshone mionji ibidi mipiamipia. Kumukabu nende mu lubuebue." 
Judges15:14 Bafike ku Leki, bena Peleshete kuya kubakidila, bela bibingu bia ditshimuna. Ke Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Shimeshone. Mionji ivuabu bamusuike ku maboku ne ku bianza, kukosekayi diakamue, anu bu buanda bua ndanda buosha mu kapia." 
Judges15:15 Shimeshone kumona lubanga lua nyama wa mpunde, mumane kushipa kupita matuku makese. Kuambulaye lubanga alu. Kushipaye nalu bantu tshinunu." 
Judges15:16 Pashishe kuelaye diyi, wamba ne: — Ndi mushipe bantu tshinunu, anu ne lubanga lua mpunde. Ndi munguje bitalu mishiki, anu ne lubanga lua mpunde." 
Judges15:17 Pashishe, Shimeshone kuimansha lubanga alu kule. Ke padibu binyika muaba awu ne: “Ramate-Leki,” mmumue ne: “Mukuna wa lubanga lua nyama.”" 
Judges15:18 Diakamue Shimeshone kumvua nyota mikole. Kubikilaye Maweja-Nangila bua amuambuluishe, wamba ne: — Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, wewe ke udi mungambuluishe bua kutshimuna mvita mikole eyi. Kadi mpindiewu, ndi mfua ne nyota, anu bua kunkuatabu kudi bantu abu, badibu kabayi bateke panshi." 
Judges15:19 Maweja-Nangila kuenza tshina mu lubuebue londoke luvua ku Leki, mayi kupatuka. Shimeshone kunua mayi awu, kupeta bukole kabidi. Bivua binyika mpokolu awu ne: “Mpokolu wa Kora.” Mmumue ne: mpokolu wa udi ubikila. Mpokolu awu utshidiku too ne ku mpindiewu." 
Judges15:20 Shimeshone uvua mushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu makumi abidi, mu tshikondu tshivua bena Peleshete ne bumfumu." 
Judges16:1 Dituku dikuabu, Shimeshone kuya ku Ngaza. Kusanganayemu mukaji mudisombele. Kumubuelelaye mu nzubu." 
Judges16:2 Bena tshimenga atshi kumanya muvua Shimeshone mu nzubu mua mukaji awu. Nanku kunyungululabu nzubu. Kumualaminabu butuku bujima ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga. Kadi kabena bamuenzele bualu butuku abu to. Bivua bela meji ne: netumushipe amu dinda. 
Judges16:3 Kadi Shimeshone kulala amu meba makese a ku mubuelu. Mundankulu, kubikaye. Kutulaye bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga. Kutulaye kabidi ne makunji abidi awa makuate tshibi, ne dibaya dia kupayika nadi tshiibi. Kuambulaye bintu abi bionsu pa makaya. Kuyaye kubiteka ku lusongu lua mukuna uvua mutangilangane ne tshimenga tshia Ebrone." 
Judges16:4 Pashishe Shimeshone kunanga bikole mukaji mukuabu, uvuabu binyika ne: Dalila. Mukaji awu uvua musombele mu tshibandabanda tshia Soreke." 
Judges16:5 Nanku bakalenga batanu ba bena Peleshete kuya kuambila Dalila ne: — Enzeja Shimeshone, akuambile kudi bukole buende bufuma, ne mushindu udibu mua kujika. Nanku netumusuike mionji, bua tumukokeshe. Pashishe muntu yonsu wa kutudi neakupe nkanu mitoke ya tshiamu tshia mushinga mukole tshinunu ne lukama." 
Judges16:6 Ke Dalila kuambila Shimeshone ne: — Ndi nkusengelela, ungambile kudi bukole buebe bufuma. Kabidi badi mua kukusuika ne tshinyi bua kukukokesha?" 
Judges16:7 Shimeshone kuandamuna ne: — Bobu bansuike ne mionji mipiamipia muanda mutekete ya milemu, ivua kayiyi mianji kuuma, tshiakuikala ne bukole to. Nengikale bu bantu bonsu." 
Judges16:8 Bakalenga ba bena Peleshete kutuadila Dalila mionji muanda mutekete mipiamipia ya milemu, ivua kayiyi mianji kuuma. Dalila kuangata mionji ayi, kusuika Shimeshone." 
Judges16:9 Dalila uvua musokoke bantu mu nzubu muende. Diakamue kuelaye diyi, wamba ne: — Shimeshone, bena Peleshete badi apa bua kukuluisha! Shimeshone kutula mionji ayi, amu bu mikale mionji miosha mu kapia. Nanku bena Peleshete kabavua bamanye muaba uvua bukole bua Shimeshone to." 
Judges16:10 Dalila kuambila Shimeshone ne: — Wewe udi unseka, bualu udi ungambila malu a dishima. Mpindiewu ndongesha mushindu udibu mua kukusuika." 
Judges16:11 Shimeshone kumuambila ne: — Bobu bansuike ne mionji mipiamipia, idi kayiyi mianji kuenza mudimu mukuabu, tshiakuikala kabidi ne bukole to. Nengikale bu bantu bonsu." 
Judges16:12 Dalila kukeba mionji mipiamipia, kusuika nayi Shimeshone, kuela diyi ne: — Shimeshone, bena Peleshete badi apa bua kukuluisha! Bantu bavua basokome kabidi mu nzubu wa Dalila. Kadi Shimeshone kutulakaja mionji ivuabu bamusuike ku maboku, anu bu udi utulakaja buanda." 
Judges16:13 Dalila kuambila Shimeshone ne: — Wewe utshidi anu unseka, bualu udi ungambila malu a dishima. Mpindiewu, ungambile bualu bua bushuwa. Undeje mushindu udibu mua kukusuika. Shimeshone kumuambila ne: — Wewe musuike nsuki yanyi mu bisumbu muanda mutekete, muyibueje mu tshiamu tshia kukuma natshi bilamba, muyimanyike bimpe ne mulonda wa ku tshiamu atshi, tshiakuikala ne bukole to. Nengikale bu bantu bonsu." 
Judges16:14 Dalila kuladika Shimeshone, kumusuika nsuki mu bisumbu muanda mutekete. Kuyibuejaye mu tshiamu tshia kukuma natshi bilamba. Kuyimanyikaye bimpe ne mulonda wa ku tshiamu atshi. Pashishe Dalila kuela diyi ne: — Shimeshone, bena Peleshete badi apa bua kukuluisha! Shimeshone utabuluka, kutulakajaye mulonda, tshiamu tshia kukuma natshi bilamba, ne lukanu luatshi." 
Judges16:15 Ke Dalila kuambila Shimeshone ne: — Kuena munnange to, bualu kuena ungambila malu malelela. Mona, wewe udi munseke misangu isatu, ubenga mua kungambila kudi bukole buebe bufuma." 
Judges16:16 Dalila kutatshisha Shimeshone matuku onsu, wambulula anu malu a mushindu umue. Shimeshone kupungila bikole bua malu aa, ukeba kufua. Kavua kabidi ne dikisha to." 
Judges16:17 Nanku kujinguluilaye Dalila bualu abu, umuambila ne: — Nsuki yanyi kabena banji kuyikosa to, bualu meme ndi mujidila kudi Mvidi Mukulu diambedi, tshiyi muanji kuledibua. Bobu bankose nsuki yanyi, tshiakuikala ne bukole to. Nengikale bu bantu bonsu." 
Judges16:18 Dalila kumvua ne: Shimeshone mmungambile bualu bua bushuwa. Nanku kuambilaye bakalenga ba bena Peleshete ne: — Mpindiewu, nufike, bualu Shimeshone mmungambile bualu bua bushuwa. Bakalenga abu kufika ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ivuabu balaye Dalila." 
Judges16:19 Dalila kuladika Shimeshone pa binu biende. Kubikilaye muntu bua akose Shimeshone bisumbu biende bia nsuki muanda mutekete. Nanku Dalila kutuadija kukepeshabukole bua Shimeshone. Bukole buende bua dikema kujimina. 
Judges16:20 Ke Dalila kuela diyi, wamba ne: — Shimeshone, bena Peleshete badi apa bua kukuluisha! Shimeshone utabuluka, kuelaye meji ne: nengikale ne bukole, nendipandishe bu mumvua ngenza. Bualu kavua mumanye muvua Maweja-Nangila kayi mua kumuambuluisha kabidi to." 
Judges16:21 Nanku bena Peleshete kumukuata, kumutonkona mesu. Kuyabu nende mu tshimenga tshia Sora. Kumusuikabu ne nkanu mikunze, kumuela mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kumuenzejabu muaba awu mudimu wa kushipula ntete." 
Judges16:22 Kadi nsuki yende uvuabu bakose, ivua yenda itoloka." 
Judges16:23 Dituku dikuabu, bakalenga ba bena Peleshete kudisangisha bua kuenza tshibilu tshia ditshimuna diabu. Kulambulabu mvidie wabu Dagone mulambu munene, bimba misambu, bamba ne: — Mvidie wetu watupeshi Shimeshone, muluishi wa bena Peleshete." 
Judges16:24 Bena Peleshete bamone mvidie wabu, kumutumbishabu, bamba ne: — Mvidie wetu watupeshi Shimeshone, muluishi wa bena Peleshete, mukengeshi wa tshisamba tshietu, udi mubutule bantu bapite bungi." 
Judges16:25 Bu muvua bena Peleshete ne disanka dia bungi, kutumabu diyi bua bafike ne Shimeshone bua kubasekeshaye. Kupatulabu Shimeshone mu nzubu wa lukanu. Bantu bamumone, kusekabu bikole. Bamane kumuimanyika pankatshi pa makunji a ku nzubu wa mvidie wabu," 
Judges16:26 Shimeshone kuambila nsongalume uvua umuendesha, mumukuate ku tshianza, ne: — Uye nanyi ku makunji adi mimanyike nzubu wa mvidie, bua nkuateku. Ngikale mueyemene ku makunji aku." 
Judges16:27 Kadi mu nzubu amu muvua bantu balume ne bakaji bapite bungi. Bakalenga batanu ba bena Peleshete bavuamu. Bantu bu binunu bisatu bavua bimane pa miaba ya kulu mu nzubu, batangila Shimeshone, bua kumuseka." 
Judges16:28 Shimeshone kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, umvuluke! Umpeshe bukole buanyi bua kale anu musangu ewu. Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, mpete mushindu wa kusombuela bena Peleshete, bonsu pamue, bua mesu anyi adibu bashipe." 
Judges16:29 Shimeshone kubabata ku makunji abidi awa munkatshi mua nzubu wa mvidie, awa mimanyike nzubu. Kukuataye tshianza tshia balume ku dikunji, tshia bakaji ku dikuabu." 
Judges16:30 Kuelaye diyi, wamba ne: — Mfuafua pamue ne bena Peleshete! Kuditshintaye ne bukole buonsu. Nzubu wa mvidie kupukila bakalenga bonsu ba bena Peleshete, ne bantu bonsu bavua mu nzubu amu. Bantu bavua bafue pamue ne Shimeshone bavua ba bungi, bapite bavuaye mushipe pavuaye ne muoyi." 
Judges16:31 Bana babu ne Shimeshone, ne bena mu nzubu muabu bonsu, kufika bua kukeba tshitalu tshiende. Kutshiangulabu, kuya kumujika mu lukita lua tatuende Manowa, luvua pankatshi pa Sora ne Eshetayole. Shimeshone uvua mushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bidimu makumi abidi." 
Judges17:1 Mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime, muvua muntu mulume, dina diende Mika." 
Judges17:2 Dituku dikuabu Mika kuambila mamuende ne: — Uvuluke ne: bavua bakuibe nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshinunu ne lukama. Wewe kutshipa muivi awu, meme muteleje. Kadi meme ndi ne nkanu ayi. Meme ke uvua muyangate. Mamuende kumuambila ne: — Muananyi, Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba." 
Judges17:3 Mika kupingajila mamuende nkanu ayi tshinunu ne lukama. Mamuende kumuambila ne: — Ndi mumane kujadika bua kujidila nkanu eyi, ishale mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bua mutshipu kaukukuatshi wewe muananyi. Nkanu eyi neyikuambuluishe bua kuenza lupingu lua tshiamu tshienguluke. Nanku ndi nkupesha nkanu eyi mpindiewu." 
Judges17:4 Kadi Mika kupingajila tshiakabidi mamuende nkanu eyi. Mamuende umusha nkanu nkama ibidi, kupeshaye nsenda wa biamu. Awu kuenza lupingu lua tshiamu tshienguluke. Kutekabu lupingu alu mu nzubu wa Mika." 
Judges17:5 Kadi muntu ewu Mika uvua ne muaba wa kutendelela ku nzubu kuende. Kuenzejaye lupingu lukuabu, kabidi ne bintu bia kubuka nabi. Pashishe kubanjijaye muanende mukuabu wa balume, bua amuenzele mudimu wa batuangaji." 
Judges17:6 Tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele kabavua ne mukalenga to. Nanku muntu yonsu uvua udienzela malu muvuaye musue." 
Judges17:7 Nsongalume mukuabu wa bena Levi uvua musombe bu muntu muenyi mu Betleyeme, musoku wa mu tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Judges17:8 Kumukaye mu Betleyeme bua kuya kukeba muaba mukuabu wa kusomba bu muenyi. Pawaye mu njila, kufikaye ku nzubu kua Mika, mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime." 
Judges17:9 Mika kumukonka ne: — Udi ufuma penyi? Nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muena Levi wa mu Betleyeme mu tshisamba tshia Yuda. Ndi ngenda nkeba muaba wa kusomba bu muntu muenyi. 
Judges17:10 Mika kumuambila ne: — Usombe kuanyi, wikale tatu ne mutuangaji mu nzubu muanyi. Ku tshidimu tshionsu, nenkufute nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole dikumi. Neupete kabidi bilamba ne biakudia. Muena Levi kubuela mu nzubu," 
Judges17:11 kuitaba bua kusomba kua Mika. Mika kumulama bimpe anu bu muanende. 
Judges17:12 Mika kubanjija nsongalume awu, bua amuenzele mudimu wa butuangaji. Kumuladikaye ku nzubu kuende." 
Judges17:13 Mika kuamba ne: “Ndi mujadike mpindiewu ne: Maweja-Nangila neangenzele bimpe, bualu ndi ne muena Levi muikale mutuangaji wanyi.”" 
Judges18:1 Tshikondu atshi bena Izrayele kabavua ne mukalenga to. Tshisamba tshia bena Dane tshivua tshikeba muaba wa kuasa. Bualu ku bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, bena Dane kabavua banji kupeta muaba wa kuasa to." 
Judges18:2 Nanku bena Dane kusungula munkatshi muabu bantu balume batanu bavua ne dikima. Bantu abu bavua bumukila mu bimenga bia Sora ne Eshetayole, bua kuya kutentekela ditunga bimpe. Bantu balume abu kufika mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Kuimanabu pabuipi ne kua Mika." 
Judges18:3 Pavuabu muaba awu, kumvuabu nsongalume wa bena Levi wakula. Kumanyabu tshiakuidi tshiende. Kuyabu kukonka nsongalume awu ne: — Udi mukubikile muaba ewu nnganyi? Udi wenza tshinyi? Tshiudi musombele muaba ewu ntshinyi?" 
Judges18:4 Nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Mika uvua musue kundama. Udi umfuta bua ngikale mutuangaji wende. 
Judges18:5 Kumuandamunabu ne: — Nanku, ebeja Mvidi Mukulu. Tudi basue kumanya ne: luendu luetu elu nebikale luimpe anyi?" 
Judges18:6 Mutuangaji kubambila ne: — Kanutshinyi to! Maweja-Nangila udi nenu mu luendu elu. 
Judges18:7 Bantu batanu abu kutungunuka ne luendu, too ne ku Layishe. Kusanganabumu bantu bonsu basomba ne ditalala, anu bu bena Sidone. Kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua mubenge mfumu wa buloba abu to. Bena Layishe bavua mutantshi mule ne bena Sidone. Kabavua ku diyi dia muntu mukuabu to." 
Judges18:8 Bantu ba bena Dane bavuabu batume abu, kupinganabu ku Sora ne ku Eshetayole. Bana babu kubakonka mushindu uvua luendu." 
Judges18:9 Kuandamunabu ne: — Jukayi, tuye kuluisha bena Layishe. Tudi bamone ne: buloba buabu budi buimpe butambe. Kanushadi basombe amu tshianana to. Jukayi lukasa, nuye kukuata buloba ebu!" 
Judges18:10 Panuafikamu, nenusangane bantu abu kabayi badimuke to. Mbase mu buloba bualabale. Mvidi Mukulu neafile buloba abu mu bianza bienu. Kabidi bintu bilenga bionsu bia panshi pa buloba bidi mu buloba abu." 
Judges18:11 Nanku bena mvita nkama isambombu ba bena Dane, bavua ne bia mvita mu bianza, kumuka mu Sora ne mu Eshetayole." 
Judges18:12 Kuyabu kuasa mitanda yabu luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Kiriyate-Yeyarime, mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Ke padibu binyika muaba awu too ne mpindiewu ne: Makane-Dane, mmumue ne: mitanda ya Dane." 
Judges18:13 Bena mvita abu kumuka muaba awu, kuya mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Kufikabu pabuipi ne nzubu wa Mika." 
Judges18:14 Bena mvita batanu bavwa bamane kutentekela buloba bua Layishe, kuambilabu balunda babu ne: — Numanye ne: ku nzubu eyi, kudi nzubu mukuabu muikale ne lupingu, ne bintu bia kubuka nabi. Mudi kabidi lupingu lukuabu lua tshiamu tshienguluke. Nuenu nkayenu nujadike tshinudi ne bua kuenza." 
Judges18:15 Ke bantu batanu abu kuya ku nzubu wa Mika. Kubuelabu mu nzubu muvua nsongalume wa bena Levi, kumuelabu muoyi." 
Judges18:16 Diba adi bena Dane nkama isambombu, bavua ne bia mvita mu bianza, bavua bimane mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu awu." 
Judges18:17 Bantu batanu bavua bamane kutentekela ditunga abu bamane kubuela mu nzubu, kuambulabu mpingu yonsu ivuamu, kabidi ne bintu bia kubuka nabi, ne lupingu lua tshiamu tshienguluke. Mutuangaji uvua muimane mu mushiku wa mbelu pamue ne bena mvita nkama isambombu." 
Judges18:18 Mutuangaji umona bantu babuela mu nzubu wa Mika, bambula mpingu ne bintu bia kubuka nabi, kubakonkaye ne: — Tshinudi nuenza mu nzubu emu ntshinyi?" 
Judges18:19 Bena mvita kumuandamuna ne: — Puwa, buikila mukana! Uye netu, bua wikale mutuangaji mu tshisamba tshietu. Udi musue kuikala mutuangaji wa muntu umue, anyi wa tshisamba tshijima tshia bena Izrayele?" 
Judges18:20 Mutuangaji kusanka bikole bua meji awu. Kuambulaye mpingu, ne bintu bia kubuka nabi, kudisangaye ne bena mvita." 
Judges18:21 Bena Dane kutungunuka ne luendu, bamane kupitshisha bana, bimuna ne mabuki kumpala kuabu." 
Judges18:22 Bena mvita bakavua mutantshi mule ne nzubu wa Mika, ke Mika ne bena mutumba nende, kudisangisha bua kubalondakaja." 
Judges18:23 Kuelabu bena Dane bibingu. Bena Dane kukudimuka kudi Mika, kumukonka ne: — Tshidi tshikutonda ntshinyi? Udi utulonda ne bantu bungi nenku bua tshinyi?" 
Judges18:24 Mika kuandamuna ne: — Nudi bangate mvidie yanyi imvua mudienzele. Kabidi nudi bakuate mutuangaji wanyi. Tshiena mushale ne tshintu to. Kadi nudi nunkonka tshidi tshintonda bishi? 
Judges18:25 Bena mvita kuandamuna ne: — Buikila mukana! Bana betu bakuabu badi mua kufika munda, kukuluisha. Nanku neudikebele lufu, wewe ne bena nzubu webe!" 
Judges18:26 Ke bena mvita kutungunuka ne luendu. Mika umona ne: bena mvita abu badi ne bukole bua bungi, kupinganaye ku nzubu kuende!" 
Judges18:27 Bena Dane kuangata bintu bivua Mika mudienzele. Kuyabu kabidi ne mutuangaji wa Mika uvua umuenzela mudimu. Bena Dane kuya kuluisha bena Layishe. Kushipabu bantu bavua mu tshimenga atshi, kabayi ne bualu, basomba mu ditalala. Bena Dane kuosha tshimenga atshi." 
Judges18:28 Tshimenga tshia Layishe tshivua mu tshibandabanda tshia Bete-Rekobe, mutantshi mule ne Sidone. Bena Layishe kabavua ku bumfumu bua muntu mukuabu to. Ke pavua muntu nansha umue kayi ufika bua kubambuluisha. Bena Dane kuasulula tshimenga atshi, kusombamu." 
Judges18:29 Kushintululabu dina dia Layishe, divuabu binyika tshimenga atshi kale. Kutshinyikabu ne: Dane, dina dia nkambua wabu, muana wa Yakobe." 
Judges18:30 Bena Dane kuimanyika lupingu lua Mika bua kuntendelela. Yonatane, muana wa Ngershome (Ngershome uvua muana wa Moshe), kushala mutuangaji wa tshisamba tshia bena Dane. Ndelanganyi ya Yonatane ivua anu mu mudimu ewu wa butuangaji too ne pavua bantu baye mu bupika." 
Judges18:31 Bena Dane bavua anu batendelela lupingu lua Mika matuku onsu awa muaba wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Silo. 
Judges19:1 Tshikondu tshivua bena Izrayele kabayi banji kupeta mukalenga, muena Levi mukuabu uvua musombele ku luseke, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Muena Levi awu, uvua mubanjije mukaji mukuabu wa mu Beteleyeme, mu Yuda." 
Judges19:2 Mukaji awu kutanda ne bayende, kunyema, kupingana ku Betleyeme kuvua tatuende. Kushalaye ku Betleyeme ngondu inayi." 
Judges19:3 Bayende kumulonda, musue kumusengelela bua apingane kumbelu. Uvua muye ku ba mukajende ne muena mudimu wende, kabidi ne nyama ya mpunde ibidi. Nsongakaji kubueja bayende mu nzubu mua tatuende. Tatuende wa mukaji umona muku wende, kumuakidila ne disanka." 
Judges19:4 Kumulamaye ku nzubu kuende matuku asatu. Muena Levi awu ne muena mudimu wende kudia, kunua, kulala ku nzubu aku." 
Judges19:5 Dituku dinayi, kujukabu diba dimpe. Muena Levi mumane kudilongolola bua kupingana kuende, tatuende muenu kumuambila ne: — Wanji kudia, bua upete bukole, pashishe nenuye." 
Judges19:6 Nanku bantu babidi abu kusomba ku mesa, kudia, kunua. Tatuende muenu wa muena Levi kumuambila ne: — Anji kuindila kabidi kakese. Witabe bua kulala muaba ewu lelu." 
Judges19:7 Muena Levi uvua musue kuya. Kadi tatuende muenu kumusengelela bikole. Muena Levi kuitaba, kulala kabidi kua tatuende muenu." 
Judges19:8 Dituku ditanu muena Levi kubika diba dimpe bua kupingana kuende. Tatuende muenu kumuambila ne: — Anji kudia; nenuye dilolu. Nanku kudiabu bonsu pamue. 
Judges19:9 Kadi pavua muena Levi musue kupingana, ne mukajende, ne muena mudimu wende, tatuende muenu kumuambila ne: — Teleja, diba ndimane kupita, butuku mbumane kuila. Nulale, nuikishe kabidi kakese. Maloba nenujuke ne dinda bua kupingana kuebe." 
Judges19:10 Kadi muena Levi kena muitabe bua kulala kabidi to. Kumataye mu njila ne mukajende, ne nyama ya mpunde ibidi, mimane kusuika biseba bua kusomba. Kufikabu ku Yebusa, mmumue ne ku Yerushalayime." 
Judges19:11 Muena Levi ne bavuaye nabu, kufika pabuipi ne tshimenga, kukavua dilolu. Muena mudimu wende kumuambila ne: — Tuyayi ku tshimenga tshia bena Yebusa bua kulalamu." 
Judges19:12 Mfumuende, muena Levi, kubenga, wamba ne: — Nansha kakese, katuena mua kuya mu tshimenga tshia bantu benyi, mudi kamuyi bena Izrayele to. Tutungunuke ne luendu too ne ku Ngibeya." 
Judges19:13 Muena levi kuamba kabidi ne: — Tukoleshe luendu, tufike ku Ngibeya, nansha ku Rama, bua tulale mu tshimue tshia ku bimenga ebi." 
Judges19:14 Nanku kutungunukabu ne luendu. Bafike pabuipi ne Ngibeya, mu buloba bua Binyamine, diba kubuela." 
Judges19:15 Kuyabu mu Ngibeya bua kulala. Kubuelabu mu tshimenga, kusombabu muaba udi bantu basombele. Kadi muntu kena mubakidile, muye nabu kuende bua kulalabu to." 
Judges19:16 Dilolu adi, mukulumpe mukuabu uvua ufuma ku budimi, kufikaye muaba awu. Uvua wa ku buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Kadi uvua musombele mu Ngibeya, tshimenga tshia bena Binyamine." 
Judges19:17 Mukulumpe awu kumona muntu muenyi musombe muaba awu. Kukonkaye muenyi awu ne: — Udi ufuma penyi? Uyaya kunyi? 
Judges19:18 Muena Levi kuandamuna ne: — Tudi tufuma ku Betleyeme, mu ditunga dia Yuda. Mpindiewu tudi tupingana kuetu, musoku udi ku luseke, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Ke muaba undi musombele. Ndi nya kuanyi, mfumina ku Betleyeme. Kadi muntu kena mumbikile bua kuya kulala kuende to." 
Judges19:19 Tuetu tudi ne bisosa ne miji bua kudisha nyama yetu ya mpunde. Tudi kabidi ne mampa ne maluvu a mvinyo buanyi meme, bua mukajanyi, ne bua muena mudimu wanyi. Katuena tukengela biakudia to." 
Judges19:20 Mukulumpe awu kuandamuna muena Levi ne: — Udi mufike mu nzubu muenu. Meme nenkuambuluishe ne tshintu tshionsu tshiudi kuyi natshi. Kuena mua kulala muaba ewu to! 
Judges19:21 Kuyaye nabu kuende. Kupeshaye nyama ya mpunde biakudia. Benyi abu kuowa mayi ku makasa, kudia, kunua." 
Judges19:22 Kadi pavua benyi abu badia, basanka mu nzubu, bena buenzayi ba mu Ngibeya kunyungulula nzubu awu, kukokola ku tshiibi. Kuambilabu mukulumpe muena nzubu ne: — Patula muntu mulume uudi muakidile kuebe eku. Tudi basue ikale mukajetu." 
Judges19:23 Mukulumpe awu kupatuka, kuambila bena buenzayi abu ne: — Bana betu, ndi nnusengelela, kanuenji bualu bubi bua mushindu ewu to. Kanuenji bualu ebu to. Bualu muntu ewu mmuenyi wanyi." 
Judges19:24 Telejayi, ndi ne muananyi, nsongakaji udi kayi muanji kumanya balume. Kabidi muena Levi ewu, udi ne mukajende mukuabu. Ndi musue kunupa bakaji abu, nuenze nabu munudi basue. Kadi kanuenzedi muena Levi ewu bualu bubi to." 
Judges19:25 Bena buenzavi abu kabavua basue kuteleja bionsu abi to. Nanku muena Levi kubapatuila mukajende pa mbelu. Kumukuatabu ku bukole. Kushalabu nende butuku bujima. Kumulekelabu anu pa kabundubundu. 
Judges19:26 Patshiatshia, mukaji awu kuya kudishinda mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa mukulumpe awu, muaba uvua bayende mulale. Mukaji kushala muaba awu too ne mutshile butuku." 
Judges19:27 Mu dinda, bayende wa mukaji unzulula tshiibi tshia ku nzubu, kupatukaye bua kutungunuka ne luendu. Kusanganaye mukajende panshi mu mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu, bianza biolola mu mushiku wa mbelu." 
Judges19:28 Muena Levi kuambila mukajende ne: — Juka, tuye! Kadi mukaji kena muandamune to. Ke muena Levi kuambula tshitalu tshia mukajende pa nyama wa mpunde, kuya kuende." 
Judges19:29 Muena Levi ufika kuende, kuangataye muele, kukosololaye tshitalu tshia muena kuende mabulu dikumi ne abidi. Kutuminaye tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele, dibulu ku tshisamba, dibulu ku tshisamba." 
Judges19:30 Bonsu bavua bamone bualu ebu, kukemabu, bamba ne: — Katshia bena Izrayele bapatuke mu Ejipitu, katuena banji kumona benza bualu bua mushindu ewu to. Mbimpe tulondeshe bualu ebu, tukonkangane, tukebe tshitudi mua kuenza." 
Judges20:1 Bena Izrayele bonsu kumvuangana ne muoyi umue, kudisangisha ku Mispa, muaba udi Maweja-Nangila. Bivua bafume ku nseke yonsu, biangatshile ku Dane, ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne ku Bersheba, kuinshi mu ditunga. Bakuabu bavua bafume kabidi ku ditunga dia Ngilaade, didi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
Judges20:2 Bamfumu bonsu, ne bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, bavua mu tshisangilu etshi tshia bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu. Kuvua bena mvita bavua benda ku makasa, bamanye bimpe mua kuluangana ne miele, binunu nkama inayi." 
Judges20:3 Bena Binyamine kumvua lumu ne: bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele mbidisange ku Mispa. Bena Izrayele kukonka muena Levi awu ne: — Utuambile mushindu udi bualu ebu bubi buenzeka. 
Judges20:4 Muena Levi, bayende wa mukaji uvuabu bashipe, kuandamuna ne: — Meme ne mukajanyi mukuabu, tuvua bafike mu Ngibeya, mu buloba bua bena Binyamine bua kulala." 
Judges20:5 Bena Ngibeya kufika butuku bua kungenzela bibi. Kunyungululabu nzubu umvua awu. Bivua basue kunshipa. Kadi kuangatabu mukajanyi, kushala nende too pakafuaye." 
Judges20:6 Pashishe meme kuambula tshitalu tshia muena kuanyi, kutshikosa mu mabulu andi mutumine tshisamba ne tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Bualu bantu aba mbenze bualu bubi budi bufuisha tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele bundu." 
Judges20:7 Nanku mpindiewu, bu mudi bena Izrayele bonsu bamane kutuilangana, nuebejangane bualu ebu, nukebe tshinudi mua kuenza." 
Judges20:8 Bantu bonsu bamane kumvuangana, kuimanabu kulu, bamba ne: — Muntu nansha umue wa munkatshi muetu, kena mua kupingana kuende, mu mitanda yende, nansha ku nzubu kuende." 
Judges20:9 Tshitudi basue kuenzela bena Ngibeya tshidi nunku: netutshinke," 
Judges20:10 netusungule muntu umue ku bantu dikumi ba mu tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele, bua bikale ne mudimu wa kuambula biakudia bia bena mvita badi baya kuluisha bena Ngibeya, bua kubanyoka bua bualu ebu bubi budibu benze mu Izrayele." 
Judges20:11 Ke bena Izrayele bonsu kumvuangana, kudisangisha ne muoyi umue bua kuluisha bena Ngibeya." 
Judges20:12 Bisamba bia bena Izrayele kutuma bantu mu buloba bua bena Binyamine bua kubakonka ne: — Mbishi muvuabu benze bualu ebu bubi bua bundu mu ditunga dienu? 
Judges20:13 Nanku mpindiewu, nutupe bena tshibawu abu, bena buenzayi ba bena Ngibeya abu. Netubashipe bua kujikija bubi ebu munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Kadi bena Binyamine kabavua basue kuteleja bana babu bena Izrayele to." 
Judges20:14 Bena Binyamine ba miaba mishilangane, kudisangisha ku Ngibeya bua kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Judges20:15 Dituku adi, kubikilabu bantu binunu makumi abidi ne bisambombu, bafume ku misoku yabu yonsu bua kubabueja mu mudimu wa bena mvita. Bena Ngibeya kusangisha kabidi bantu babu bena mvita nkama muanda mutekete, bavua bamanye mvita bikole." 
Judges20:16 Mu tshiluilu atshi muvua bena mvita nkama muanda mutekete, bavua bamanye mvita bikole, bikale ne luboku. Muntu yonsu wa ku bantu aba, yeye muele lusoka ne ndundu, uludikila nansha ku lusuki, kavua mua kulupanga to." 
Judges20:17 Kadi bisamba bikuabu bia bena Izrayele bivua Nsangisha bena mvita binunu nkama inayi, bavuabu bamane kulongesha mua kuluangana mvita." 
Judges20:18 Bena Izrayele kuya ku Betele, kuebeja Mvidi Mukulu bua kumanya tshisamba tshia ku bisamba biabu tshivua mua kudianjila kuya kuluisha bena Binyamine. Maweja-Nangila kuleja tshisamba tshia Yuda." 
Judges20:19 Butshia dinda, bena Izrayele kuya kuasa mitanda pabuipi ne Ngibeya." 
Judges20:20 Pashishe kusemenabu bua kuluisha bena Binyamine. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita, balulamangane ne Ngibeya." 
Judges20:21 Dituku adi bena Binyamine kupatuka mu tshimenga, kushipa bena Izrayele binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
Judges20:22 Bena Izrayele kuya kudila kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila too ne ku dilolu. Kumuebejabu ne: tudi mua kuya kuluangana kabidi ne bana betu bena Binyamine anyi? 
Judges20:23 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba bua baye kuluangana. Nanku bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kupeta bukole. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita, anu muaba uvuabu bimanyine dituku dikuabu." 
Judges20:24 Dituku dibidi kuluishabu kabidi bena Binyamine. 
Judges20:25 Dituku dibidi dia mvita adi, bena Binyamine kupatuka tshiakabidi mu Ngibeya, kushipa bena mvita ba bena Izrayele binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, anu bantu bavua bamanye bimpe mua kuluangana." 
Judges20:26 Ke bena Izrayele bonsu kuya ku Betele. Bantu kusomba muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila, bua kudila. Dituku adi kujilabu biakudia too ne ku dilolu. Kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bobumue." 
Judges20:27 Tshikondu atshi, mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua ku Betele." 
Judges20:28 Pinase, muana wa balume wa Elazare (Elazare uvua muana wa Arone), ke uvua mulame mushete awu. Bena Izrayele kuebeja Maweja-Nangila bua kumanya ne: tudi mua kuya kuluisha kabidi bana betu bena Binyamine, anyi katuena mua kuya. Maweja-Nangila kubambila ne: — Nuye kubaluisha. Malaba nembafile mu bianza bienu." 
Judges20:29 Bena Izrayele kusokoka bena mvita babu, banyungulule tshimenga tshia Ngibeya." 
Judges20:30 Pashishe kuyabu kuluisha bena Binyamine musangu muisatu, anu bu muvuabu babaluisha kabidi. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita, balulamangane ne tshimenga tshia Ngibeya." 
Judges20:31 Bena Binyamine kupatuka bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Kadi bena Izrayele kuenza bu badi banyema bena Ngibeya. Nanku bena Ngibeya kutuadija kushipa bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, bu muvuabu babashipa misangu mikuabu. Bena Ngibeya kushipa bena Izrayele makumi asatu. Bivua babashipela mu mpata, mu njila wa ku Betele, ne wa ku Ngibeya." 
Judges20:32 Bena Ngibeya bavua bela meji ne: tuatshimunyi bena Izrayele, bu mutuvua babatshimune kumpala. Kadi bena Izrayele bavua bamane kumvuangana bua kunyema bena Binyamine, bua bena Binyamine babalonde mu njila ivua mu mpata, mutantshi mule ne Ngibeya." 
Judges20:33 Pashishe bena mvita bakuabu ba bena Izrayele, kupatuka miaba ivuabu basokome. Kudisangishabu ku Baale-Tamare. Bena mvita bakuabu ba bena Izrayele bavua basokome pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ngibeya, kupatuka diakamue ku luseke lua ku mpata wa Ngeba."
