Judges20:34 Nanku bena mvita binunu dikumi, bavua bamanye mvita bikole, ba mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, kufika balulamangane ne tshimenga tshia Ngibeya. Kuluanganabu mvita mikole. Kadi bena Binyamine kabavua bamanye ne: netukenge bikole!" 
Judges20:35 Maweja-Nangila kunyemesha bena Binyamine kumpala kua bena Izrayele. Dituku adi bena Izrayele kushipa bena mvita ba bena Binyamine binunu makumi abidi ne bitanu ne lukama. 
Judges20:36 Bena Binyamine kujadika ne: mbatubunde. Bena Izrayele bavua benda banyema bena Binyamine, bualu bavua batekemena anu bena mvita babu bavua basokome, banyungulule tshimenga tshia Ngibeya." 
Judges20:37 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua basokome abu, kusemena lukasa mu Ngibeya, kubuelamu ne mvita, kushipa bena tshimenga atshi." 
Judges20:38 Nanku, bavua bamane kumvuangana ne bena Izrayele bakuabu, babapesha tshimanyinu tshia ne: padi muinshi ubanda mulu mu Ngibeya, tudi bamane kutshikuata." 
Judges20:39 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, kuenza bu badi banyema mvita. Bena Binyamine kushipa bena Izrayele bu makumi asatu, bela meji ne: netubatshimune, bu mutuvua babatshimune kumpala." 
Judges20:40 Kadi diba adi, muinshi wa tshimanyinu kumueneka mu Ngibeya. Bena Binyamine batangile panyima, kumona muinshi ne ndimi ya kapia mulu mu tshimenga tshiabu tshijima." 
Judges20:41 Bena Izrayele kukudimukila bena Binyamine bua kubaluisha. Bena Binyamine kukuatshika bowa, bualu bavua bamone ne: tudi mu dikenga dikole!" 
Judges20:42 Kunyemabu bena Izrayele, kuyabu luseke lua ku tshipela. Kadi kubaluishabu nseke yonsu, luseke kudi tshiluilu tshinene tshia bena Izrayele, kabidi luseke kudi bena mvita bakuabu bavua batumina ku Ngibeya. Bena Izrayele kushipa bena Binyamine." 
Judges20:43 Bena Izrayele kuela bena Binyamine munkatshi. Kubalondakajabu, benda babashipela mu njila, kabayi mua kubashila muaba, too ne ku muaba mukuabu uvua luseke lua kudi diba dipatukila lua Ngibeya." 
Judges20:44 Nanku, bena mvita ba bena Binyamine kufua binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bikale bonsu bantu ba bukitu." 
Judges20:45 Bena Binyamine bakuabu, kunyemena luseke lua ku tshipela, kuvua lubuebue lua Rimone. Kadi bantu ba munkatshi muabu binunu bitanu kubashipelabu mu njila. Pashishe kulondakajabu bavua bashale too ne ku Ngidome. Kushipabu kabidi bantu bakuabu binunu bibidi." 
Judges20:46 Dituku adi, bena mvita ba bena Binyamine bavuabu bashipe bavua binunu makumi abidi ne bitanu, bonsu bantu bavua ne bukitu." 
Judges20:47 Kadi bena mvita ba bena Binyamine nkama isambombu, bavuabanyemena luseke luaku tshipela, kabavua bafue to. Kufikabu ku lubuebue lua Rimone. Kushalabu muaba awu ngondu inayi." 
Judges20:48 Bena Izrayele kutuadija kuluisha bena Binyamine bavua bashale. Kubashipabu, bapitshile ku tshimenga ne ku tshimenga. Kushipabu bantu balume bonsu, too ne bimuna. Pashishe kuoshabu miaba yonsu ya buloba abu." 
Judges21:1 Pavua bena Izrayele badisangisha ku Mispa, bavua baditshipa bua muntu nansha umue wa kudibu, kaseleshi muanende wa bakaji kudi muntu wa bena Binyamine to." 
Judges21:2 Kadi mpindiewu, bena Izrayele kuya ku Betele. Kusombabu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila too ne ku dilolu. Kunyingalalabu, badila bikole," 
Judges21:3 bakonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, tudi tukenga nanku bua tshinyi? Mpindiewu, tshisamba tshikuabu tshia bena Izrayele tshidi tshibutuka kashidi bua tshinyi?" 
Judges21:4 Butshia dinda, bena Izrayele kuasa tshilambuilu muaba awu. Kulambulabu milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bobumue." 
Judges21:5 Pashishe bena Izrayele kukonkangana ne: — Ku bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, kudi tshisamba tshidi katshiyi tshifike mu tshisangilu tshituvua natshi mu Mispa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila anyi? Bualu bena Izrayele bavua bamane kuditshipa bua kushipa muntu yonsu uvua kayi mufike ku Mispa." 
Judges21:6 Luseke lukuabu bavua bumvue luse bua dikenga dia bana babu bena Binyamine. Kuambabu ne: — Lelu tshisamba tshikuabu tshia bena Izrayele tshidi tshifuana kubutuka. 
Judges21:7 Kadi bua bena Binyamine, badi bashale ne muoyi aba, kupeta bakaji, netuenze tshinyi? Bualu tuvua bamane kuditshipa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua katuseleshi bana betu ba bakaji kudi bena Binyamine to." 
Judges21:8 Bena Izrayele kuebejangana bua kumanya bantu ba munkatshi mua bisamba bia bena Izrayele, bavua kabayi bafike ku Mispa bua kudileja kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Kusanganabu ne: kakuvua muntu nansha umue wa mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe mu Ngilaade. uvua mufike mu mitanda, muaba uvua tshisangilu atshi." 
Judges21:9 Bualu pavuabu babadike bantu bavua mu tshisangilu, muntu wa mu Yabeshe nansha umue kena muitabe to." 
Judges21:10 Bantu bavua mu tshisangilu kutuma bantu binunu dikumi ne bibidi bavua ne bukitu ku Yabeshe, babambila ne: — Nuye kushipa bena Yabeshe mu Ngilaade. Nushipe too ne bakaji ne bana." 
Judges21:11 Nushipe bantu balume bonsu ba mu tshimenga, ne bakaji badi bamane kumanya balume. Ke tshinudi mua kuenza." 
Judges21:12 Munkatshi mua bena Yabeshe, kusanganabu bana ba bakaji nkama inayi, bavua kabayi banji kumanya balume. Kuyabu nabu mu mitanda ya mu Silo, mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
Judges21:13 Pashishe bantu bavua mu tshisangilu, kutumabu bantu bua kuambila bena Binyamine, bavua basokome mu lubuebue lua Rimone, ne: tumwanganayi, tutue ndondu." 
Judges21:14 Ke bena Binyamine kupingana diakamue kuabu. Kubapeshabu bakaji bavuabu kabayi bashipe mu Yabeshe. Kadi bakaji abu, kabavua bungi bukumbane bua bantu bonsu to." 
Judges21:15 Bena Izrayele kumvua luse bua bena Binyamine, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubutule tshimue tshia ku bisamba bia bena Izrayele." 
Judges21:16 Balombodi ba tshisangilu kuamba ne: — Kakutshiena bakaji mu tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine to. Kadi bena Binyamine badi kabayi bafhe mu mvita, bua kupetabu bakaji netuenze tshinyi?" 
Judges21:17 Mbimpe bua bena Binyamine badi kabayi bafue mu mvita, balelangane, bua tshisamba atshi tshia bena Izrayele katshibutuku kashidi to." 
Judges21:18 Kadi katuena mua kuitaba bua bena Binyamine basele bana betu ba bakaji to. Bualu tuvua bamane kuditshipa ne: muena Izrayele yonsu udi uselesha muanende wa bakaji kudi muena Binyamine, neikale ne diakabi." 
Judges21:19 Bena Izrayele kuvuluka ne: tshibilu tshia Maweja-Nangila tshia ku tshidimu tshionsu ku Silo, tshidi pabuipi. Silo ntshimenga tshivua ku mutu kua Betele, kuinshi kua Lebona, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua njila udi mumuke ku Betele muye ku Shekeme." 
Judges21:20 Bena Izrayele kupesha bena Binyamine meji ne: — Nuye kusokoma mu madimi a mionji ya mvinyo. 
Judges21:21 Nushale batentekela. Pikala nsongakaji ya mu Silo nupatuke bua kuja maja, nuenu nupatuke mu madimi a mionji ya mvi-nyo. Muntu yonsu wa kunudi neakuate nsongakaji, aye nende mu buloba bua Binyamine bua nsongakaji awu ashale mukajende." 
Judges21:22 Pikala batatuabu nansha bana babu ba balume batudidila, netubambile ne: “Tudi tunusengelela bua nufuileku bena Binyamine luse. Bualu mu mvita ya mu Yabeshe, katuena bakuatshile muntu yonsu wa kudibu mukaji to. Kadi bu munudi kanuyi babapesha bana benu ba bakaji, nanku kanuena banyange mitshipu yenu to.”" 
Judges21:23 Bena Binyamine kuitaba lungenyi alu. Kukuatabu nsongakaji bungi bubakumbanyine munkatshi mua bana ba bakaji bavua baja maja ku Silo, kuyabu nabu. Kupinganabu mu tshitupa tshiabu tshia buloba. Kuasululabu bimenga biabu, kusombabu." 
Judges21:24 Bena Izrayele bakuabu bavua mu tshisangilu, kutangalaka. Muntu yonsu kuya mu tshisamba tshiabu, ne mu diku diabu; kuya kusomba mu tshiende tshitupa tshia buloba." 
Judges21:25 Tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele kabavua ne mukalenga to. Muntu yonsu uvua wenza anu mudiye musue." 
Ruth1:1 Matuku avua balombodi balombola ditunga dia Izrayele, tshiyole tshia nzala tshivua tshibuela mu ditunga. Ke muntu wa mu musoku wa Betleyeme, mu ditunga dia Yuda, kuangata mukajende ne bana bende ba balume babidi, bua kuanjibu kuya kusomba mu ditunga dia Mowabe." 
Ruth1:2 Muntu awu uvua Elimeleke, mukajende uvua Nowemi. Bana bende ba balume babidi, bawa Malone ne Kiliyone. Bawa bena mu tshisamba tshia Efrata. Bobu bamane kuasa mu ditunga dia Mowabe," 
Ruth1:3 Elimeleke kufua. Nowemi kushala nkayende, ne bana bende ba balume babidi." 
Ruth1:4 Bana abu kusela bakaji ba bena Mowabe: Orpa ne Rute. Bobu bamane kushala muaba awu bidimu bitue ku dikumi," 
Ruth1:5 Malone ne Kiliyone kufua kabidi. Nowemi kudishadila, kayi mulume kayi bana." 
Ruth1:6 Patshivuabu mu Mowabe, Nowemi kumvua ne: Maweja-Nangila mmutuadije kutabalela bena tshisamba tshiabu, mubavudijile biakudia mu madimi. Nanku, kudilongololaye bua kumuka mu buloba bua Mowabe ne bakaji ba bana bende, kupingana mu buloba bua Yuda." 
Ruth1:7 Bobu kubanga luendu pamue, kadi mu njila," 
Ruth1:8 Nowemi kuambila bakaji ba bana bende ne: — Pinganayi mpindiewu, yonsu aye kudi mamuende. Maweja-Nangila anuvuluke, bu munuvua bamvuluke meme ne babayenu bafuile." 
Ruth1:9 Anuambuluishe, banusele tshiakabidi bua nupete muaba muimpe wa kusomba. Ke Nowemi kulayangana nabu. Kadi bobu kudila miadi," 
Ruth1:10 bamuambila ne: — Nansha! Tudi tupingana nebe kuenu. 
Ruth1:11 Nowemi kubandamuna ne: — Bakaji ba bana banyi, mbimpe nupingane kuenu. Nudi basue kuya nanyi bua tshinyi? Tshiena ne mushindu undi mua kulela kabidi bana ba balume badi mua kumusela." 
Ruth1:12 Pinganayi kuenu! Kanuyi nanyi. Nkadi mukulakaje, udibu kabayi mua kusela kabidi. Nansha meme mupetangane ne mulume butuku ebu, kulela nende bana ba balume," 
Ruth1:13 nuenu nudi mua kuindila too ne pakolabu anyi? Bana banyi, kanuena mua kubenga bua kunuselabu kudi balume bakuabu. Maweja-Nangila mmupite kunkengesha meme. Tshiena musue bua dikenga dianyi adi dinukuate nuenu penu to." 
Ruth1:14 Nowemi wamba nanku, bakaji ba bana bende kudila bikole bipite. Kadi Orpa kulayangana ne mamuenende, kupingana kuabu. Rute kawa musue kulekelangana ne mamuenende to." 
Ruth1:15 Nowemi kuambila Rute ne: — Mona mukenebe nyewu wapinganyi kuabu, mu tshisamba tshiabu, ne kudi mvidie wabu. Mbimpe upingane pebe, uye kuenu." 
Ruth1:16 Kadi, Rute kuandamuna mamuenende ne: — Lekela kutupingaja. Ndi musue kuya nebe. Bualu kuwaya nkungaya; kuwasomba nkungasomba; bana benu mbana betu kabidi; Mvidi Mukulu webe neikale Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Ruth1:17 Kuwafuila nenkufute panyi, nkuanjikabu kabidi. Meme tshiyi muenze nanku, kayanda kanyi, Maweja-Nangila angangate." 
Ruth1:18 Nowemi umona ne: Rute mmukoleshe bua kuya nende, kupuwaye. Ki mmuakule kabidi to." 
Ruth1:19 Bubidi buabu pamue kupingana ku Betleyeme. Pafikibu mu musoku wabu, bakaji bonsu kukukila, babakatshila, bamba ne: “Bushiwa ewu nNowemi anyi?”" 
Ruth1:20 Kadi Nowemi kubandamuna ne: — Kanumbikidi kabidi ne Nowemi (mmuena diakalenga), kadi numbikile ne: Mara (Kabungama), bualu Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mmunkengeshe bikole." 
Ruth1:21 Musangu umvua mumbuke munemu, mvua ne bintu bia bungi. Kadi mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila kumpingaja bianza bitupu. Bua tshinyi nutshidi numbikila ne: Nowemi, padi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu mumane kumbenga, munkebele diakabi." 
Ruth1:22 Ke umvua Nowemi ne Rute, muena Mowabe, mukaji wa muanende, bafike mu Betleyeme, bafumine ku Mowabe. Bivua ku ntuadijilu wa tshikondu tshiyuabu banowa ntete ya orje ya kuenza bukula." 
Ruth2:1 Nowemi uvua ne bayende tshina mu diku dia ba bayende Elimeleke, dina diende Bowaze. Uvua muntu muneme ne mubanji kabidi." 
Ruth2:2 Dituku dikuabu, Rute kuambila Nowemi ne: — Ndi nkulomba bua kuya kupumbulula biakudia, bidi banowi benda bashiya mu budimi. Nempete muntu udi mua kumfuila luse. Nowemi kumuandamuna ne: — Ndaku, mukaji wa muananyi." 
Ruth2:3 Ke Rute kuya ku budimi, wenda upumbulula biakudia bivua banowi bashiya mu budimi. Diakalenga, budimi abu buvua bua Bowaze, wa mu diku dia ba Elimeleke." 
Ruth2:4 Mutantshi unenga, Bowaze kufika, ufumine ku Betleyeme. Kuelaye banowi muoyi ne: — Maweja-Nangila ikale nenu! Bobu pabu kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba." 
Ruth2:5 Pashishe, Bowaze kukonka mfumu wa banowi ne: — Mukaji ewu ngua penyi?" 
Ruth2:6 Awu kuandamuna ne: — Mukaji ewu mmuena Mowabe. Mbumuke ne Nowemi ku Mowabe, mbapingane kuneku." 
Ruth2:7 Uvua mundombe bua kupumbulula biakudia bidi banowi bashiya mu budimi. Mmukuate mudimu muaba ewu ku dinda too ne ku mpindiewu. Nyeye ewu utshibuelelaku bua kuikisha kakese. 
Ruth2:8 Bowaze umvua nanku, kuambilaye Rute ne: — Teleja, nkuambile. Kuena mua kumuka mu budimi ebu kuya kupumbulula biakudia mu budimi bukuabu to. Shala pamue ne bakaji bena mudimu banyi." 
Ruth2:9 Mesu ebe atangile anu budimi budibu banowa. Wenda ubalonda anu munyima. Ndi mukandike bena mudimu bua kabakutatshishi. Padi nyota ikusuma, uye kunua mayi adi bena mudimu basuna mu mabungu." 
Ruth2:10 Rute kuinyika mutu panshi, ukema, umukonka ne: — Mmunyi muudi mungangate ne musangelu, bu muntu mumane kummanya kuonsu eku, panyi muikale muntu muenyi?" 
Ruth2:11 Bowaze kuandamuna ne: — Bakadi bamane kundondela, bangumvuije malu onsu auvua muenzele mamuenebe panyima pa lufu lua bayebe. Ndi mumanye muudi mushiye baledi bebe ne ditunga dienu dikulela. Wewe kuya kudi bantu bamua kuyi muanji kumanya." 
Ruth2:12 Maweja-Nangila akuvudijile disanka pa bionsu biudi muenze. Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, akuele lupemba, bualu udi muvue kusokoma kudiye." 
Ruth2:13 Pashishe, Rute kuamba ne: — Mukalenga, ndi nkuela tuasakidila, bua paudi munsambe, munkoleshe ku muoyi, meme tshiyi nansha bu umue wa ku bakaji bena mudimu bebe." 
Ruth2:14 Diba dia kudia dikumbana, Bowaze kubikila Rute, wamba ne: — Luaku, tudie, angata tshipese tshia diampa, utue mu maluvu malule. Rute kusomba ku luseke lua bena mudimu bua kudia. Bowaze kumupesha tshimuku. Kudiaye, kuukuta, kuteka tshivua tshishale." 
Ruth2:15 Yeye mumane kupingana bua kupumbulula kabidi, Bowaze kuambila bena mudimu bende ne: — Mukaji ewu apumbulule bintu bionsu bia mu budimi, too ne munkatshi mua bisumbu bia miepu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula. Muntu kamukandiki to." 
Ruth2:16 Nuangate kabidi miepu mikuabu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, nuyimatshishe panshi, bua ayambule. Nanku kanumutatshishi to." 
Ruth2:17 Nanku, Rute kupumbulula mu budimi bua Bowaze too ne ku dilolu. Pashishe kushipulaye bivuaye mupumbulule abi, kubipepula, kuwuja tshibombu tshinene tshia ntete tente." 
Ruth2:18 Rute kusangisha bionsu abi, kuyaye nabi pambelu. Kulejaye mamuenende bivuaye mupumbulule. Kumupeshaye ne biakudia bivuaye mumutuadile; ke bivuaye mumulamine pavuaye mumane kudia kuukuta." 
Ruth2:19 Nowemi kumukonka ne: — Uvua muenze mudimu lelu penyi? Uvua mupumbulule bionsu ebi mu budimi bua nganyi? Mvidi Mukulu ele muntu uvua mukuakidile biakane ewu lupemba! Rute kulondela mamuenende bionsu biwabu bamuenzele, wamba ne: — Bintu ebi ndi mubipumbulule mu budimi bua Bowaze." 
Ruth2:20 Nowemi umvua nanku, kuambila Rute ne: — Maweja-Nangila mukumbaji wa malaya ende amusankishe. Mmuwluke bonsu bafuile, ne batshidi ne muoyi. Bowaze mbayebe tshina menemene, udi ne bua kutuambuluisha bilondeshile mikenji." 
Ruth2:21 Ke Rute kumuambila kabidi ne: — Bowaze uwa mungambile ne: wikale wenza mudimu ne bena mudimu banyi, too ne pajika dinowa dia bintu bianyi bionsu." 
Ruth2:22 Nowemi kuambila Rute ne: — Mbimpe bitambe, mukaji wa muananyi, wikale wenza mudimu ne bena mudimu bende, bua kabavu kukutatshisha kudi muntu mukuabu mu budimi." 
Ruth2:23 Nanku, Rute kulamata bena mudimu ba Bowaze, too ne pajikila dinowa dia ntete ya mishindu yonsu. Kadi uwa anu usomba kumbelu kua mamuenende." 
Ruth3:1 Dituku dikuabu, Nowemi kuambila Rute ne: — Mukaji wa muananyi, mbimpe nkukebele mulume udi mua kukupiana, bua upete pebe muaba muimpe wa kusomba." 
Ruth3:2 Udi mumanye ne: Bowaze, muena budimi buuvua upumbulula biakudia pamue ne bena mudimu bende, udi wa mu tshiota tshia ba bayebe. Butuku ebu udi ushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula pa tshishipelu." 
Ruth3:3 Nanku, owa mayi, laba mafuta ne manananshi, uvuale bilambabiebe bimpe, uye muaba udibu bashipuila ntete. Kadi dimuka bua Bowaze kakumonyi, kayi muanji kujikija kudia ne kunua." 
Ruth3:4 Padiye uya kulala, utentekele muaba udiye ulala, pashishe usemene pabuipi, ubulule tshilamba tshiende, ulale ku mikolu yende. Pashishe yeye neakuambile tshiudi ne bua kuenza." 
Ruth3:5 Rute kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, nengenze bionsu biudi mungambile ebi." 
Ruth3:6 Kuyaye muaba awu bua kukumbaja bionsu bivua mamuenende mumuambile. 
Ruth3:7 Bowaze mujikije kudia ne kunua, uvua ne disanka. Pashishe kuyaye kulala pabuipi ne ntete. Rute kuya muaba awu wenda utobela. Kumushaye tshilamba tshitua Bowaze mulale natshi, kulalaye ku mikolu yende." 
Ruth3:8 Pashishe munkatshi mua butuku, Bowaze utabuluka ku tulu, kumonaye mukaji mulale ku makasa ende." 
Ruth3:9 Bowaze kukonka ne: — Udi apa nnganyi? Rute kuandamuna ne: — Mmeme, Rute. Ndi nkusengelela bua umpiane, bualu udi bayanyi tshina." 
Ruth3:10 Bowaze umvua nanku, kuambilaye Rute ne: — Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba, bualu waleji dilamata diebe dipite ne pa diuvua muenze kumpala kua mamuenebe. Bualu kuena muye kudi bansongalume babanji, nansha bapele, bua bakupiane." 
Ruth3:11 Bua mpindiewu, kutshinyi to. Nenkuenzele bionsu biwangambila abi, bualu bantu bonsu badi bamanye ne: wewe udi mukaji wa kanemu." 
Ruth3:12 Bulelela, meme ndi mua kukupiana. Kadi kudi bayebe tshina menemene udi nenu pabuipi, mumpite meme." 
Ruth3:13 Nanku, anji lala tulu. Patshiabu ne dinda, pikalaye muitabe bua kukupiana, mbimpe. Kadi padiye ubenga, meme ndi nkujadikila kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi ne: nenkukumbajile malu onsu awu." 
Ruth3:14 Rute kulala muaba awu. Kadi kujukaye patshiatshia, butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia. Bualu Bowaze kavua musue bua muntu nansha umue amanye ne: Rute uvua mulue muaba awu." 
Ruth3:15 Bowaze kuambila Rute ne: — Adija tshilamba tshiebe panshi, nkuelele ntete. Kumuelelaye ntete mipite pa kilo dikumi ne itanu. Kumuambikaye bujitu. Pashishe Rute kupingana mu tshimenga." 
Ruth3:16 Kuyaye kua mamuenende, Nowemi kumuebeja ne: — Mukaji wa muananyi, kuuvua muye kudi malu kaayi? Rute kumulondela bionsu bivua Bowaze mumuenzele," 
Ruth3:17 kabidi ne muvua Bowaze mumuambile ne: — Kupinganyi kua mamuenebe bianza bitupu; angata kilo dikumi ne itanu ya ntete, umutuadile." 
Ruth3:18 Pashishe, Nowemi kumuambila ne: — Mukaji wa muananyi, somba talala, tumone muapitabi, bualu Bowaze kakupeta dikisha, padiye kayi mujikije bualu ebu lelu mene!" 
Ruth4:1 Bowaze kuya ku tshibuelelu tshia musoku, muaba udi bantu basombela bua kuyukidilangana. Kumonaye muanabu uvuaye muambe ne: ke udi mua kupiana Rute, upita mu njila. Bowaze kumuimanyika, kumubikila muaba uvuaye awu, wamba ne: — Muanetu, sombela apa. Awu kusomba." 
Ruth4:2 Ke Bowaze kubikila bantu dikumi ba ku bakulu ba musoku, kubalomba bua kusombabu. Bobu kusomba muaba awu." 
Ruth4:3 Pashishe Bowaze kuambila muanabu awu ne: — Nowemi mmumane kupingana kunu, utumina ku ditunga dia Mowabe, udi usumbisha budimi bua muanetu Elimeleke abu." 
Ruth4:4 Ke pandi mukubikile bua kukumanyisha ne: udi mua kusumba budimi kumpala kua bena ditunga ne kua bakulumpe bonsu badi basombe aba. Kadi pawikala mubenge, ungandamune, bua mmanye tshindi mua kuenza, bualu amu wewe ke udi malu aa onsu atangila, meme ewu ndi mvua panyima pebe. Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi musue kusumba budimi." 
Ruth4:5 Ke Bowaze kumuambila ne: — Paudi usumba budimi bua mufue kudi Nowemi, udi upiana kabidi ne Rute, mukaji wa mufue, bua kulelela mufue bana, ne bua budimi bushale mu dina dia bana abu." 
Ruth4:6 Muanabu umvua nanku, kubengaye wamba ne: — Tshiena mua kusumba budimi abu, ne kupiana mukaji wa mufue to, bualu nemvue kupanga mua kuabanya bia bumpianyi munkatshi mua bana banyi ne ba mufue. Wewe jikija malu onsu pa mutu panyi meme." 
Ruth4:7 Ku kale, bena Izrayele, pavuabu bashintakajangana bintu, nansha pavuabu basumbishangana, muntu wa kumpala udi usumbisha tshintu, uvua ukopola tshisabata tshiende, upesha mukuabu bua kujadika diumvuangana diabu." 
Ruth4:8 Nanku, muanabu mumane kuambila Bowaze, bua asumbe budimi abu, kukopolaye tshisabata tshiende, kutshipeshaye Bowaze." 
Ruth4:9 Pashishe Bowaze kuambila bakulu, bavuaye mubikile, ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu ne: — Lelu, nuajadiki mundi nsumba bintu bionsu bia Elimeleke, ne bia bana bende ba balume aba: Malone ne Kiliyone, kudi Nowemi." 
Ruth4:10 Ndi mpiana kabidi Rute, muena Mowabe, uvua mukaji wa Malone, udi ushala mukajanyi. Nanku bintu nebishale mu dina dia mufue. Nanku dina diende kadiakujimina. Nebashale baditela mu bisombelu ne mu diabu ditunga." 
Ruth4:11 Bantu bonsu bavuaye mubikile muaba awu, ne bakulu, kuambabu ne: — Eyowa, tuajadiki. Maweja-Nangila ele mukaji awu lupemba, bu muvuaye muluele Rakele ne Leya. Bubidi buabu bawa batantshisha tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Wewe pebe, usanguke mu Efrata, dina diebe ditumbe mu Betleyeme." 
Ruth4:12 Maweja-Nangila akuvudijile bana ne mukaji ewu; diku diebe ditante bu dia Perese, uvua Yuda mulele ne Tamare." 
Ruth4:13 Nanku Bowaze kupiana Rute. Maweja-Nangila kuela Rute lupemba, kuimitaye, kulela muana wa balume." 
Ruth4:14 Ke bakaji bonsu kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, bambila Nowemi ne: — Maweja-Nangila wakupeshi muikuluebe udi mua kukuvuluka. Dina diende ditumbe mu Izrayele! Bu mudiye mukusangule, neakuame bimpe mu bukulakaja buebe." 
Ruth4:15 Mukaji wa muanebe udi mukunange, mukupeshe muana. Nanku mmupite ne bana ba balume muanda mutekete." 
Ruth4:16 Nowemi kukongoloja muana bimpe, kushala ndeji wende." 
Ruth4:17 Bakaji bena mutumba kutendakena muana, bamba ne: “Baleledi Nowemi muana!” Kumuinyikabu dina ne: Obede. Yeye ke tatuende wa Ishayi. Ishayi ntatuende wa Davide." 
Ruth4:18 Mena a bankambua ba Davide, biangatshile kudi Perese, mmalondangane nenku: Perese uvua tatuende wa Esrone." 
Ruth4:19 Esrone uvua tatuende wa Rame, Rame kulela Aminadabe," 
Ruth4:20 Aminadabe kulela Nashone, Nashone kupeta Salma," 
Ruth4:21 Salma kulela Bowaze. Yeye ewu kulela Obede," 
Ruth4:22 Obede kulela Ishayi, Ishayi kulela Davide." 
1Samuel1:1 Mu tshimenga tshia Rama, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime, muvua muntu mukuabu wa bena Efrayime, wa mu diku dia Sufa. Dina diende ngElkana. Uvua muana wa Yerowame, Yerowame mmuana wa Eliku, Eliku mmuana wa Toku, Toku mmuana wa Sufa." 
1Samuel1:2 Elkana uvua ne bakaji babidi: Ane uvua mukalenga muadi, Penina mutu wa lubanza. Penina uvua ne bana. Kadi Ane kavua mulele to." 
1Samuel1:3 Tshidimu tshionsu, Elkana uvua umuka mu tshimenga tshia Rama, uya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa ku Silo bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ne kumulambula milambu. Ofni ne Pinhase, bana ba balume babidi ba mutuangaji Eli, ke bavua batuangaji ba Maweja-Nangila mu Silo." 
1Samuel1:4 Misangu yonsu ivua Elkana ulambula mulambu wende, uvua upesha mukajende Penina dibulu dia munyinyi dia nyama uvuaye mulambula awu. Uvua upesha kabidi muana yonsu wa Penina dibulu dia munyinyi." 
1Samuel1:5 Kadi uvua upesha Ane dibulu dia munyinyi dinene, dipite dia Penina misangu ibidi, bualu Elkana uvua munange Ane bikole, nansha muvua Maweja-Nangila kayi mumupe bana." 
1Samuel1:6 Bu muvua Ane kayi mulele muana, Penina mukaji muibidi wa Elkana, uvua wenza muende muonsu bua kukengesha mukenende, umufuisha bundu." 
1Samuel1:7 Nanku ku tshidimu tshionsu, pavua Elkana ne bakaji bende baya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Maweja-Nangila, Penina uvua anu uluisha mukenende Ane bundu. Tshidimu tshikuabu, pavua Ane udila, ubenga mua kudia," 
1Samuel1:8 bayende kumukonka ne: — Ane udi udila bua tshinyi? Udi unyingalala nunku bua tshinyi? Meme patudi nebe, tshiena mupite bana ba balume dikumi anyi?" 
1Samuel1:9 Bajikija kudia, Ane kuya mu mushiku wa muaba wa tshijila ku Silo. Mutuangaji Eli uvua musombe pa nkuasa mu mushiku wa nzubu." 
1Samuel1:10 Ane uvua mubungame bikole. Pavuaye udila, uvua ulomba Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, tangila mundi mu dikenga!" 
1Samuel1:11 Kumpu muoyi, umfuile luse! Umpesheku muana wa balume. Ndi nditshipa bua kumufila ku mudimu webe kashidi. Kabena mua kumubeya too ne kashidi. ”" 
1Samuel1:12 Ane uvua utendelela musangu mule. Mutuangaji Eli uvua anu mumubambishe," 
1Samuel1:13 mumone amu muvua mishiku ya Ane inyunga, kadi kavua mumvue tshintu. Bualu Ane uvua ulomba Mvidi Mukulu munda munda. Mutuangaji Eli kuela meji ne: mukaji awu mmukuatshike maluvu!" 
1Samuel1:14 Nanku kukonkaye Ane ne: — Maluvu neakutenduke diba kaayi? Patuka uye kulala muaba mukuabu bua maluvu akutenduke. 
1Samuel1:15 Ane kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena mukuatshika maluvu to. Ndi mukaji muena dikenga. Tshiena munue maluvu to. Ndi mufike muaba ewu bua kukuatshila Maweja-Nangila dikenga dianyi. 
1Samuel1:16 Nanku kummonyi bu mukaji udi kayi ne mushinga. Ndi ndomba Mvidi Mukulu musangu mule, bualu ndi ne kanyinganyinga kakole ne dibungama kabidi." 
1Samuel1:17 Eli kuambila Ane ne: — Waya bimpe. Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele akupe tshiudi umulomba. 
1Samuel1:18 Ane kuandamuna Eli ne: — Ne wewe pebe umvuluke! Ke Ane kuya, kudia, kayi uleja kabidi mpala wa dibungama." 
1Samuel1:19 Butshia dinda, Elkana ne bena nzubu wende bonsu kuya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Pashishe kupinganabu kuabu mu Rama. Elkana kubuelela mukajende Ane mu nzubu. Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba dia Ane." 
1Samuel1:20 Ke Ane kuimita difu, kulela muana wa balume. Ane kuamba ne: — Muana ewu ndi mmuinyika ne: Samuwele, bu alu ndi mumulomba kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel1:21 Pashishe Elkana kuya kabidi ku Silo ne bena nzubu wende bonsu bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa ku tshidimu, ne mulambu wa mapiku avuaye muela." 
1Samuel1:22 Kadi musangu awu, Ane kavua muye ne bayende to. Uvua muambila bayende ne: “Ndi muindila bua muana alekele kuamua dibela. Pashishe nenye nende ku Silo, nemmulambule Maweja-Nangila, ashaleku mu nzubu wende kashidi.”" 
1Samuel1:23 Elkana kuandamuna ne: “Mbimpe muudi mumane kulongolola amu. Nanku ushale ne muana too ne palekelaye dibela. Maweja-Nangila nkayende akumbaje bualu buvuaye mumane kulaya.” Nanku Ane kushala mu Rama bua kuamusha muanende. 
1Samuel1:24 Ane mumane kutekesha muana dibela, nansha mutshivuaye mutekete, Ane kuya nende mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila ku Silo. Ane ne bayende Elkana, kuangata ngombe mulume wa bidimu bisatu, mufuku wa bukula ne mulondu wa biseba muwule ne maluvu." 
1Samuel1:25 Kulambulabu ngombe awu. Pashishe kuyabu ne muana kudi mutuangaji Eli. 
1Samuel1:26 Ane kukonka mutuangaji Eli ne: — Utshidi muvuluke mukaji uvua muimane muaba ewu dituku dikuabu, pabuipi nebe bua kulomba Maweja-Nangila anyi? Amu bu muudi ne muoyi bulelela, ndi nkujadikila ne: mukaji awu mmeme." 
1Samuel1:27 Muana umvua ndomba mu ditendelela nyeye ewu. Maweja-Nangila wamumpeshi. 
1Samuel1:28 Nanku meme panyi ndi musue kumufila kudi Maweja-Nangila kashidi. Neashale anu muena mudimu wende. Ke bena diku diende bonsu kukukuila Maweja-Nangila. 
1Samuel2:1 Ane kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: Maweja-Nangila mmunsankisha bikole. Ndi ne disanka bua bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila mungenzela, tuambilambila, tuafua bundu. Ndi ne musangelu, Mvidi Mukulu mmungambuluishe." 
1Samuel2:2 Anu Maweja-Nangila ke udi wa tshijila, kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu Yeye. Mvidi Mukulu wetu nkayende udi lubuebue." 
1Samuel2:3 Kanuakudi meyi a bungi bua kuditambisha, kanuakudi kabidi nansha a kapeja. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu, mmumanye bionsu, ulumbuluisha bantu bua bionsu bidibu benza." 
1Samuel2:4 Bena mvita ba bukole bamone mudi mata abu atshibuka. Kadi bavua kabayi bukole kupetabu dikanda. 
1Samuel2:5 Bavua badia bukuta, badi bakeba mudimu bua kupeta biakudia. Kadi bavua ne nzala, kabena ne bua kukuata mudimu kabidi to. Mukaji wa nkumba udi ulela, bana muanda mutekete, kadi mukaji uvua ne bana ba bungi, udi ushala nkumba." 
1Samuel2:6 Maweja-Nangila udi ushipa, ufululula kabidi. Udi ufikisha muntu muaba wa bafue, anyi umumushamu." 
1Samuel2:7 Maweja-Nangila udi uvuija muntu mupela nansha mubanji. Udi umupuekesha milongu, nansha umubandisha." 
1Samuel2:8 Udi ujula mupela uvua mudishinde panshi. Umushe ku diala muena dikenga udibu bimansha, bua kumusombesha miaba ya lumu, pamue ne bantu banene. Buloba bujima budi bua Maweja-Nangila. Yeye ke udi mubuimanyike pa makunji abu." 
1Samuel2:9 Maweja-Nangila udi mulame bantu badi bamunemeka. Kadi badi bamubenga nebafue mu midima. Bualu muntu kena mua kutshimuna ku bukole buende nkayende to. 
1Samuel2:10 Maweja-Nangila udi udidisha, makubakuba mu diulu, bua kubutula baluishi bende. Udi mulumbuluishi munene wa buloba bujima. Udi ukolesha mukalenga wa bantu bende mu maboku, udiundisha bukalenga bua udiye musungule." 
1Samuel2:11 Ke Elkana kupingana kuende ku Rama. Kadi Samuwele muana kushala ku Silo bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu. Bavua bamulombola kudi mutuangaji Eli. 
1Samuel2:12 Bana ba balume ba mutuangaji Eli bavua bantu babi. Kabavua batshina Maweja-Nangila to. 
1Samuel2:13 Bushuwa, bana abu bavua batuangaji, kadi bavua bakengesha bantu mushindu ewu: pavua muntu ulambula nyama, anu bateka munyinyi pa kapia, muntu uvua wambuluisha mutuangaji uvua wambula nsomu wa menu asatu, usemena ku tshilambuilu," 
1Samuel2:14 utua mu tshintu tshivua ne munyinyi (mu dilongu nansha mu luesu lunene). Munyinyi onsu uvuaye wambula ku nsomu awu, uvua utuadila mutuangaji. Ke muvua bana ba balume ba mutuangaji Eli bakengesha bena Izrayele bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa ku Silo nanku." 
1Samuel2:15 Misangu mikuabu kabayi banji kuosha mafuta a nyama wa mulambu, muntu uvua wambuluisha mutuangaji uvua uya kudi muntu uvua ulambula mulambu, umuambila ne: “Umpeshe munyinyi wa kuoshila mutuangaji. Bualu kena musue umupesha munyinyi mulamba to, anu munyinyi mubishi.”" 
1Samuel2:16 Pikala muntu awu muandamune ne: “Banji kuosha mafuta. Pashishe newangate munyinyi uudi musue,” muntu uvua wambuluisha mutuangaji uvua wamba ne: “Tshiena musue to. Mpesha anu mpindiewu. Tshianana ndi ndiangatshila ku bukole.”" 
1Samuel2:17 Nanku bana ba balume ba mutuangaji Eli bavua bapepeja Maweja-Nangila bikole, bualu kabavua banemeka milambu ivuabu bamulambula." 
1Samuel2:18 Kadi Samuwele muana, uvua ukumbaja mudimu wende bimpe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, uvuala tshilamba tshia buanda bua ndanda." 
1Samuel2:19 Tshidimu tshionsu, Ane, mamuende wa Samuwele, uvua utelela Samuwele tshinkutu tshikese, umutuadilatshi pavuabu baye ne bayende ku Silo bua kulambula mulambu wa ku tshidimu." 
1Samuel2:20 Mutuangaji Eli mumane kuela Elkana ne mukajende Ane lupemba, kuambilaye Elkana ne: — Maweja-Nangila akuambuluishe, ulele bana bakuabu ne mukaji ewu, bua bapingane pa muaba wa muana udiye mulambule Maweja-Nangila. Ke Elkana ne mukajende, kupingana kuabu ku Rama." 
1Samuel2:21 Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha Ane. Kulelaye bana ba balume bakuabu basatu ne ba bakaji babidi. Kadi Samuwele muana uvua wenda ukola kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. 
1Samuel2:22 Mutuangaji Eli uvua mumane kukola mukulakaje. Bavua bamuambila muvua bana bende benzela bena Izrayele bibi, kabidi muvuabu babuelela bakaji mu nzubu. Bakaji abu ke bavua benza mudimu mu mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena." 
1Samuel2:23 Mutuangaji Eli kukonka bana bende ne: — Bualu bundi mumvue ebu budi munyi? Bantu bonsu badi banujana bua buenzayi buenu. Nudi nuenza nanku bua tshinyi? 
1Samuel2:24 Bana banyi, lekelayi kuenza nanku! Tshijanu tshienu tshindi mumvue mukana mua bantu ba Maweja-Nangila tshidi tshibi tshitambe." 
1Samuel2:25 Pikala muntu muenzele muntu mukuabu bibi, Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kulumbulula tshilumbu atshi. Kadi pikala muntu muenzele Maweja-Nangila bibi, udi mua kulumbulula tshilumbu nnganyi? Kadi bana ba mutuangaji Eli, kabawa bangata mibelu ya tatuabu ne mushinga to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kujadika bua bafue." 
1Samuel2:26 Kadi Samuwele muana, uvua ukola anu bimpe, bamuanyisha bikole kudi Maweja-Nangila ne kudi bantu." 
1Samuel2:27 Muambi mukuabu kuya kudi mutuangaji Eli, kumuambila ne: — Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Patshivua bankambua bebe mu Ejipitu ku bupika bua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, udi mumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mudimanyisha kudibu." 
1Samuel2:28 Munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, meme kusungula Arone nkambua webe, bua ikale mutuangaji wanyi, wenza mudimu wa kulambula milambu pa tshilambuilu tshianyi, kuosha mulambu wa manananshi ne kungebeja malu. Yeye ne ndelanganyi yende mvua mubapesha tshitupa tshia milambu idi bena Izrayele balambula." 
1Samuel2:29 Kadi kanuena nunemeka milambu ya nyama ne ya bintu bia mu madimi, imvua mutuma diyi bua kulambula muaba wa tshijila bua tshinyi? Munyinyi muimpe wa mafuta, udi bantu banyi bena Izrayele bandambula, nudi nuangata bua nuenu kudia, kudiunda bua tshinyi? Wewe Eli, udi unemeka bana bebe ba balume, kuyi unnemeka meme kumpala, bipite bua tshinyi." 
1Samuel2:30 Bu muudi wenza nanku, teleja tshindi nkuambila, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele: Mvua mulaya bena nzubu webe ne bena diku diebe, bua bikale batuangaji banyi kashidi. Kadi mpindiewu, ndi nkujadikila ne: kabitshiena nanku to. Meme ndi nnemeka amu bantu badi bannemeka meme. Kadi bantu badi bampepeja, meme nembapepeje." 
1Samuel2:31 Nkadi pa kumusha bantu bonsu badi bamane kukola, bakulakaje, ba mu nzubu muebe ne ba mu diku diebe, bua kabasanganyimu kabidi muntu mukulakaje to." 
1Samuel2:32 Nanku neumone muntu, udi ufuilakana nebe, wenza mudimu mu nzubu wanyi. Bena Izrayele nebikale ne disanka. Kadi mu nzubu muebe kamuakuikala kabidi muntu mukulakaje kashidi to." 
1Samuel2:33 Kadi meme mushiye muntu umue wa ku ndelanganyi yebe bua asombe ku mpenga kua tshilambuilu tshianyi, neakukengeshe, akubungamije. Kadi bantu bakuabu bonsu ba mu diku diebe nebafue, kabayi banji kukulakaja." 
1Samuel2:34 “Bua wewe kujadika bionsu bindi nkuambila ebi, neumone malu enzekela Ofni ne Pinhase, bana bebe ba balume babidi. Nebafue bonsu babidi dituku dimue." 
1Samuel2:35 Pashishe meme nendisunguile mutuangaji udi mua kuenza ne muoyi umue tshindi musue. Nemmupeshe ndelanganyi idi mua kuenza mudimu wa butuangaji kashidi kumpala kua mukalenga ungikala musungule. 
1Samuel2:36 Nanku, muntu wa mu nzubu muebe wikale mushale ne muoyi, neaye kutua binu kumpala kua mutuangaji bua kupeta lukanu lutoke lumue lua mushinga mukole, nansha kapesa ka diampa. Neambile mutuangaji awu ne: ‘Bu wewe musue, mpeshaku mudimu muaba udi batuangaji ewu, bua mpeteku biakudia’.”" 
1Samuel3:1 Kadi, Samuwele muana uvua wenzele Mvidi Mukulu mudimu, bamulombola kudi mutuangaji Eli. Tshikondu atshi, bua Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne muntu, nansha kumumuenekela, bivua bualu bukole." 
1Samuel3:2 Mutuangaji Eli mumane kukulakaja, katshiyi umona kabidi bimpe, dituku dikuabu butuku, uvua mu lala muaba wende wa tshibidilu." 
1Samuel3:3 Samuwele kabidi uvua mulala, mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, pabuipi ne mushete wa ndondu. Butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia, muendu wa muaba wa tshijila utshivua utema." 
1Samuel3:4 Maweja-Nangila kubikila Samuwele. Samuwele kuitaba ne: “Eyowa, mfumuanyi.”" 
1Samuel3:5 Pashishe kuyaye lubilu kudi Eli, umuambila ne: — Ke meme uuvua ubikila ewu! Eli kumuambila ne: — Pingana, uye kulala. Tshiena mukubikila to. Samuwele kuya kulala." 
1Samuel3:6 Musangu muibidi, Maweja-Nangila kubikila Samuwele ne: “Samuwele!” Muana kujuka, kuya kudi Eli, kumuambila ne: — Ke meme uuvua ubikila ewu! Eli umuambila ne: — Muananyi, tshiena mukubikila to! Pingana, uye kulala." 
1Samuel3:7 Samuwele kavua muanji kumanya Maweja-Nangila bimpe to, bualu Maweja-Nangila kavua muanji kuyukila nende to." 
1Samuel3:8 Musangu muisatu, Maweja-Nangila kubikila muana: “Samuwele!” Samuwele kujuka kuya kudi Eli, umuambila ne: — Ke meme uuvua ubikila ewu! Musangu ewu, Eli kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila ke udi ubikila muana ewu." 
1Samuel3:9 Nanku Eli kuambila Samuwele ne: — Pingana, uye kulala. Pikalabu bakubikila kabidi, witabe ne: “Maweja-Nangila ngambilaku. Meme muntu webe ndi nkuteleja!” Samuwele kupingana, kuya kulala muaba wende." 
1Samuel3:10 Maweja-Nangila kufika, kuimana kabidi muaba awu bu misangu mikuabu. Kubikilaye ne: “Samuwele, Samuwele”! Muana kuitaba ne: — Ke meme muntu webe ewu ndi muteleja, ngambilaku." 
1Samuel3:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: — Nenkengeshe bena Izrayele bikole. Dikenga adi nedikemeshe bikole bantu badi badiumvua. 
1Samuel3:12 Dituku adi, nenkumbaje bionsu bimvua mumane kuamba bua kuenzela Eli ne bena nzubu wende. Nebapete makenga onsu amvua mumane kubambila. Tshiena ndekela to." 
1Samuel3:13 Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mumane kuambila Eli ne: Nennyoke bena nzubu webe kashidi. Bualu bana bebe ba balume bavua benza bibi, kabayi bannemeka. Kadi, Eli uvua mumanye buenzayi bua bana bende, kayi ubabela to." 
1Samuel3:14 Nanku, ndi mumane kuditshipa bua bena nzubu wa Eli ne: nansha bobu bandambula nyama miosha, nansha bintu bia mu madimi, tshiena mua kupua bubi buabu muoyi to." 
1Samuel3:15 Samuwele kushala mulala too ne mu dinda. Pashishe kuyaye kunzulula biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi uvua utshina bua kulondela Eli bionsu bivuaye mumvue kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Samuel3:16 Ke Eli kumubikila, wamba ne: — Muananyi Samuwele! Samuwele kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mfumuanyi." 
1Samuel3:17 Eli kumukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila wakuambidi tshinyi? Kunsokoki bualu nansha bumue to. Wewe munsokoke bualu nansha bumue budi Mvidi Mukulu mukuambile, nemmulombe bua akunyoke bikole bitambe." 
1Samuel3:18 Nanku Samuwele kena musokoke bualu nansha bumue. Eli kuamba ne: — Yeye udi Maweja-Nangila! Enze mudiye musue. 
1Samuel3:19 Samuwele kukola, Maweja-Nangila uvua amu nende. Bualu buonsu buvua Samuwele wamba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, Maweja-Nangila uvua amu ubukumbaja." 
1Samuel3:20 Nanku mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, biangatshile ku Dane too ne ku Bersheba, bantu bonsu bavua bajadika ne: Samuwele mmuambi wa bushiwa wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel3:21 Maweja-Nangila uvua udimuenesha ku Silo. Bualu ke muaba uvuaye mumuenekela Samuwele bua kumumanyisha meyi ende. 
1Samuel4:1 Ke muvua Samuwele mufikishe meyi a Maweja-Nangila kudi bena Izrayele bonsu nanku. Dituku dikuabu, bena Izrayele kuya kuluangana ne bena Peleshete. Kuasabu mitanda yabu muaba uvuabu babikila ne: Dibue-dia-diambuluisha. Bena Peleshete kuasa yabu mitanda mu Afeke." 
1Samuel4:2 Bena Peleshete kuela mualu wa mvita bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Mvita kupita bukole. Bena Peleshete kubutula bena Izrayele, kushipa bantu bu binunu binayi mu mvita ayi." 
1Samuel4:3 Bena Izrayele bavua bashale ne muoyi bapingana mu mitanda, bakulu ba bena Izrayele kukonkangana ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmulekela bena Peleshete batushipa lelu bua tshinyi? Tuyayi ku Silo, bua tukebe mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila. Pikala Maweja-Nangila munkathi muetu, Yeye neatusungidile kudi baluishi betu." 
1Samuel4:4 Bena Izrayele kutuma bantu ku Silo, bua kuangata mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa biluilu bia bena Izrayele, udi usomba pa mutu pa bakerubine. Ofni ne Pinhase, bana ba balume babidi ba mutuangaji Eli, ke bavua benda pabuipi ne mushete wa ndondu." 
1Samuel4:5 Amu bafike ne mushete wa ndondu mu mitanda, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kuela bibingu bikole, buloba kuzakala." 
1Samuel4:6 Bena Peleshete bumvua bibingu abi, kukonkanganabu ne: — Bibingu bikole bidi mu mitanda ya bena Ebrewu mbia tshinyi? Bena Peleshete kujadika ne: mushete wa Maweja-Nangila wafiki mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel4:7 Ke kumvuabu bowa, kuambilanganabu ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wafiki mumitanda ya bena Izrayele. Kuonsu eku, kavuamu to. Mpindiewu tudi bena diakabi!" 
1Samuel4:8 Eyowa tudi bena diakabi! Nganyi udi mua kutusungidila kudi Mvidi Mukulu ewu wa bukole, uvua mukengeshe bena Ejipitu ne bipupu bia mishindu ne mishindu mu tshipela?" 
1Samuel4:9 Bena Peleshete, jukayi, koleshayi muoyi, tudi bantu balume. Tuetu batekeshe mu maboku, netushale bapika ba bena Ebrewu, bu muvuabu bapika betu. Koleshayi muoyi, tuba-luishayi”!" 
1Samuel4:10 Bena Peleshete kuluangana ne bena Izrayele. Bena Peleshete kupita bena Izrayele bukole. Bena Izrayele kunyema kupingana kuabu. Bavua bashipe bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bapite bungi, binunu makumi asatu." 
1Samuel4:11 Bena Peleshete kunyenga mushete wa tshijila. Ofni ne Pinhase, bana ba balume babidi ba mutuangaji Eli, kufua." 
1Samuel4:12 Anu dituku adi, muntu mukuabu wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine uvua mupanduke mu mvita, kuyaye lubilu too ne ku Silo. Kadi bua kuleja kanyinganyinga, uvua mupande bilamba biende, mudiela buloba mu mutu." 
1Samuel4:13 Mutuangaji Eli uvua ku mpenga kua njila, musombe mu nkuasa wende. Uvua muindile, upampakana bikole bua mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu. Muntu uvua munyema mu mvita awu ubuela mu tshimenga, kuambilaye bantu bonsu bivua bienzeka mu mvita. Nanku bantu bonsu kudila muadi bikole." 
1Samuel4:14 Mutuangaji Eli umvua miadi ayi, kukonkaye bua kumanya tshivua bantu badidila. Muntu awu kuya lubilu, kumuambila tshi wabu badidila." 
1Samuel4:15 Musangu awu, mutuangaji Eli uvua ne bidimu makumi tshitema ne muanda mukulu, ukavua mpofu menemene." 
1Samuel4:16 Muntu uvua munyema mu mvita, kuambila mutuangaji Eli ne: — Ndi mfika amu mpindiewu, ngumukila ku mvita. Ndi munyeme anu lelu ewu. Mutuangaji Eli kumukonka ne: — Muananyi, mvita ivua mushindu kaayi?" 
1Samuel4:17 Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Bena Izrayele mbanyeme bena Peleshete. Mbashipe bena mvita ba Izrayele bapite bungi. Mbashipe bana bebe babidi ba balume, Ofni ne Pinhase. Kabidi mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu mbaunyenga kudi bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel4:18 Muntu uvua wakula awu utela amu mushete wa tshijila, ke mutuangaji Eli uvua musombe mu nkuasa, kudishinda tshiadi mulu ku tshiibi tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kutshibuka nshingu, kufuaye. Bualu uvua ne bujitu bua bungi, mumane kukulakaja. Mutuangaji Eli uvua mulombola bena Izrayele bidimu makumi anayi." 
1Samuel4:19 Mukaji wa muanende Pinhase uvua ne difu, pabuipi ne kulela. Mukaji awu umvua ne: bena Peleshete mbanyenge mushete wa tshijila, kabidi tatuende muenu ne bayende Pinhase mbafue, munda mukavua mumusama bua kulela, nanku uzonzama, kulelaye." 
1Samuel4:20 Kadi bu nuwuaye ukengakana bua kukula muoyi, bakaji bavua bimane pabuipi nende kumuambilabu ne: — Kutshinyi to. Udi mulela muana wa balume. Kadi kena mubandamune to. Bualu kavua mubateleja to." 
1Samuel4:21 Pashishe mukaji awu kuamba ne: — Bu mudi butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu bumuke munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, ndi nginyika muana ewu dina ne: Ikabode. Dina edi mbua kuleja ne: “Butumbi ka-butshienaku.” Dina edi divu bua kuvuluka mushete wa tshijila uvuabu banyenge, ne kuvuluka lufu lua tatuende muenu, ne lua bayende Pinhase." 
1Samuel4:22 Mukaji awu kujadika ne: butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kabutshiena munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bualu baluishi mbanyenge mushete wa ndondu." 
1Samuel5:1 Bena Peleshete bamane kunyenga mushete wa Mvidi Mukulu, kumukabu nawu muaba uvuabu babikila ne: Dibue-dia-diambuluisha, bua kuya nawu mu tshimenga tshia Asdode." 
1Samuel5:2 Kutekabu mushete awu mu nzubu wa mvidie wabu Dagone, ku luseke lua lupingu lua Dagone." 
1Samuel5:3 Butshia dinda, bena mu tshimenga tshia Asdode babika, kusanganabu lupingu lua Dagone ludishinda panshi kumpala kua mushete wa Maweja-Nangila. Kujulabu lupingu, kuapingaja muaba uvualu." 
1Samuel5:4 Butshia kabidi, kusanganabu lupingu alu ludishinda kabidi panshi, kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila. Kadi luvua lushala amu tshitumpampa, mutu walu ne bianza bivua bituka, bimata panshi mu mushiku wa nzubu." 
1Samuel5:5 — Ke padi batuangaji bonsu ba mvidie wa Dagone, ne bantu badi babuele mu nzubu wa mvidie ewu udi ku Asdode, kabayi badiata mu mushiku wa nzubu awu too ne lelu." 
1Samuel5:6 Maweja-Nangila kukengesha bena mu tshimenga tshia Asdode bikole bipite, bua kubaleja bukole buende. Bobu ne bena mutumba babu, kubakuatshishaye bowa, kubatua disama dia mulaka." 
1Samuel5:7 Bantu bamona bionsu abi, kuambabu ne: — Katuena basue bua mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ushale muetu munemu to. Mvidi Mukulu watuleji tuetu ne mvidie wetu Dagone mudiye ne bukole." 
1Samuel5:8 Bena Asdode, kubikidisha bamfumu batanu ba bena Peleshete, kubakonka ne: — Mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele tuenze nawu tshinyi? Bamfumu kuandamuna ne: — Wambulayi, nuye nawu mu tshimenga tshia Ngate. Nanku kuyabu ne mushete awu mu tshimenga tshia Ngate." 
1Samuel5:9 Kadi, amu mushete ufika mu Ngate, Maweja-Nangila kuleja bena mu tshimenga atshi bukole buende. Kupapukabu bikole. Bena tshimenga atshi bonsu, bantu bakole ne bana batekete, kupetabu disama dia mulaka." 
1Samuel5:10 Nanku kuyabu ne mushete mu tshimenga tshia Ekrone. Kadi mushete ufika mu tshimenga tshia Ekrone, bena mu tshimenga baumone, kuelabu bibingu bikole, bamba ne: — Mbafike ne mushete wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele muetu munemu bua kutubutula bonsu!" 
1Samuel5:11 Pashishe, bobu kabidi kubikidisha bamfumu ba bena Peleshete, kubambila ne: — Pingajayi mushete wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele anu mu ditunga diawu, tshianana nebibutuke bonsu. Bantu kupapukabu bikole mu tshimenga atshi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubaleje kabidi bukole buende." 
1Samuel5:12 Bantu bavua kabayi bafue, kupetabu disama dia mulaka. Muadi wa dikenga diabu kufika ne mu diulu." 
1Samuel6:1 Mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila kushala mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete ngondu muanda mutekete. 
1Samuel6:2 Pashishe bena ditunga adi kukonka batuangaji babu ne bena mbuku ne: — Mushete wa Maweja-Nangila, tuenze nawu tshinyi? Nutuleje mushindu utudi mua kuupingaja mu ditunga diawu." 
1Samuel6:3 Batuangaji ne bena Mbuku kuandamuna ne: — Panuikala basue kupingaja mushete wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kanuena mua kuupingaja tshianana to. Mbimpe nulambuleku Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele mulambu wa didia tshibalu. Nanku masama enu neajike. Kabidi nenujadike tshivua Maweja-Nangila ewu unukengeshila anu kunukengesha, kayi ulekela kunuleja bukole buende." 
1Samuel6:4 Bena Peleshete kukonka ne: — Kadi mulambu wa didia tshibalu utudi mua kulambula ngua mushindu kaayi? Batuangaji ne bena mbuku kuandamuna ne: — Bilondeshile bungi bua bamfumu ba bena Peleshete, nulambule Maweja-Nangila bintu bitanu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bileja disama dia mulaka, kabidi ne mpuku itanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bualu tshipupu tshidi tshinukuata nuenu ne bamfumu benu, tshidi anu tshimue, kabidi tshia mushindu umue." 
1Samuel6:5 Nanku nuenze bintu bidi bileja disama dia mulaka. Nuenze kabidi mpingu ya mpuku idi inyangakaja ditunga dienu. Nutumbishe Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Misangu mikuabu nealekele kunukengesha nuenu, mvidie yenu ne ditunga dienu dijima." 
1Samuel6:6 Kanuenji tshitunu bu muvuabu benza kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bantu bende. Nuvuluke muvua Mvidi Mukulu ewu mukengeshe bena Ejipitu, too ne muavubu kuanyisha bua bena Izrayele bapatuke ku bupika." 
1Samuel6:7 Nanku mpindiewu, enzayi ditempu dipiadipia. Nuangate nyama ya ngombe ibidi itshidi yamusha bana mabela, kabayi banji kuenza nayi mudimu. Nuyisuike ku ditempu. Kadi nupingaje bana bayi mu tshikumbi." 
1Samuel6:8 Nuangate mushete, nuuteke pa ditempu apu. Bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi binudi nulambula Mvidi Mukulu bua mulambu wa didia tshibalu, nubiteke mu kashete, kanudi nuteka ku luseke lua mushete wa Maweja-Nangila. Pashishe nulekele ngombe ayi, idiyile nkayayi ne ditempu." 
1Samuel6:9 Nanku nenumone: pikala ngombe milonde njila udi muye mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, luseke lua ku Bete-Shemeshe, nenujadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ke udi munutumina makenga onsu aa. Kadi pikala ngombe kayiyi milonda njila ewu, netujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele kena mututumina makenga aa to, kadi tudi bapeta makenga aa mu mpukapuka." 
1Samuel6:10 Bena Peleshete kuenza bionsu bivuabu babambile. Kuangatabu ngombe ibidi itshivua yamusha bana, kuyisuikabu ku ditempu, kadi kuinjidilabu bana bayi mu tshikumbi." 
1Samuel6:11 Kutekabu mushete wa tshijila pa ditempu, ne kashete kavua ne mpuku ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne bintu bidi bileja disama dia mulaka." 
1Samuel6:12 Ngombe kuya buludi, ilonda njila wa ku Bete-Shemeshe, yenda idila, kayiyi yepuka ku dia balume nansha ku dia bakaji. Bamfumu ba bena Peleshete bavua benda balonda ditempu panyima too ne ku mukalu wa Bete-Shemeshe." 
1Samuel6:13 Bena tshimenga bavua mu budimi, banowa ntete ya kuenza bukula. Kumonabu mushete wa tshijila kule, kusankabu bikole." 
1Samuel6:14 Ditempu difika mu budimi bua Yoshuwa, muena mu Bete-Shemeshe, kuimanadi mu budimi amu, pabuipi ne dibue dinene. Bena tshimenga kukosolola mabaya a ditempu adi bitupa, bua kuenza nkunyi. Pashishe, kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila ngombe ayi bu mulambu wa kuosha." 
1Samuel6:15 Bena Levi bavua bamana kumbusha mushete wa Maweja-Nangila uvua pa ditempu, ne kashete kavua ne bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bavua babiteka pa dibue dinene. Pashishe, bena mu tshimenga tshia Bete-Shemeshe, kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue anu dituku adi." 
1Samuel6:16 Bamfumu batanu ba bena Peleshete, bamane kumona bionsu abi, kupinganabu mu tshimenga tshia Ekrone, anu dituku adi kabidi." 
1Samuel6:17 Bintu bivua bileja disama dia mulaka, bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bivua bena Peleshete balambula Maweja-Nangila, bua mulambu wa didia tshibalu bivua bungi nenku: bena tshimenga tshia Asdode bavua bafila tshintu tshimue, bena Ngaza tshimue, bena Askalone tshintu tshimue, bena Ngate tshintu tshimue ne bena Ekrone tshintu tshimue." 
1Samuel6:18 Kadi, mpuku ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivua bungi bupite, bilondeshile bungi bua bimenga bidi ku bumfumu bua bamfumu batanu ba bena Peleshete. — Nanku dibue dinene divu mu budimi bua Yoshuwa, muena mu Bete-Shemeshe, muaba uvuabu bateka mushete wa Maweja-Nangila, ditshidipu too ne mpindiewu, bua bantu bikale bavuluka bualu ebu." 
1Samuel6:19 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kunyoka bena tshimenga tshia Bete-Shemeshe, bualu bavua batangila mushete wa tshijila. Kushipaye bantu balume makumi muanda mutekete munkatshi muabu. Nanku bantu bavua bashala, kuenzabu madilu, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubanyoka bikole." 
1Samuel6:20 Pashishe bantu abu kuamba ne: — Muntu nansha umue kena mua kuimana kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ewu wa tshijila. Kadi mmuaba kaayi utudi mua kuya kushiya mushete wende wa ndondu, mutantshi mule ne ditunga dietu?" 
1Samuel6:21 Kutumabu bantu ku Kiriyate-Yeyarime bua kuambila bena tshimenga atshi ne: — Bena Peleshete mbapingaje mushete wa Maweja-Nangila. Nanku nufike bua kuwangata, kuya nawu kuenu." 
1Samuel7:1 Bena Kiriyate-Yeyarime kuya kuangata mushete awu. Kuyabu nawu mu nzubu wa Abinadabe uvua muasa pa kakuna. Pashishe, kujidilabu Elazare, muana wa Abinadabe, bua kuikalaye ulama mushete wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel7:2 Mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila mumane kufika ku Kiriyate-Yeyarime, uvua mushalemu bidimu makumi abidi. Bena Izrayele bavua bajinga mua kusemena pabuipi ne Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel7:3 Nanku Samuwele kubambila ne: — Panuikala basue kupingana kudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi wenu mujima, nulekele kutendelela mvidie ya Astarte ne mvidie mikuabu yonsu ya bantu benyi. Nuitabe anu Maweja-Nangila muenu muonsu, numuenzele mudimu amu yeye nkayende. Nanku neanupandishe ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel7:4 Bena Izrayele kuimansha mpingu ya mvidie Baale ne Astarte ivuabu nayi, kutendelelabu amu Maweja-Nangila nkayende." 
1Samuel7:5 Ke Samuwele kubela diyi, ubambila ne: — Bantu bonsu badisangishe ku Mispa. Muaba awu, nendombe kudi Maweja-Nangila bualu buenu." 
1Samuel7:6 Bena Izrayele kudisangisha ku Mispa. Kusunabu mayi, kuitshikijabu panshi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Kujilabu biakudia dituku adi. Pashishe kutondabu mibi yabu, bamba ne: tuvua batombokela Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, anu ku Mispa aku, Samuwele kutuadija kulombola bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel7:7 Bena Peleshete kumvua lumu ne: bena Izrayele mbadisangisha ku Mispa. Nanku, bamfumu batanu ba bena Peleshete kudilongolola bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele bumvua nanku, kukuatshikabu bowa." 
1Samuel7:8 Kuambilabu Samuwele ne: — Kutulekedi to! Wikale utulombola kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bua kutusungidilaye ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel7:9 Samuwele kuangata muana wa mukoku, kuulambula Maweja-Nangila, kuoshaye mujima. Pashishe kulombaye Maweja-Nangila bua afuile bena Izrayele luse. Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba adi." 
1Samuel7:10 Nanku, patshivua Samuwele ulambula mulambu, bena Peleshete bavua bamane kusemena pabuipi, bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kudidisha makubakuba makole. Bena mvita ba bena Peleshete kupapuka bikole ne bowa, bena Izrayele kutshimuna bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel7:11 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kumuka ku Mispa, kulondakaja bena Peleshete too ne kuinshi kua Bete-Kare, kubashipabu bonsu." 
1Samuel7:12 Samuwele kuela diyi, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila ke udi mutuambuluisha too ne mpindiewu.” Samuwele kuambula dibue, kudimanyika pankatshi pa Mispa ne Shene. Kuinyikaye dibue adi dina ne: “Dibue-dia-diambuluisha.”" 
1Samuel7:13 Bena Peleshete bavua ne bundu, buamushindu uvuabu babatshimuna awu. Maweja-Nangila kubaleja bukole buende matuku onsu avua Samuwele ne muoyi. Nanku bena Peleshete kabena babuela kabidi mu buloba bua bena Izrayele to." 
1Samuel7:14 Miaba yonsu ya buloba abu, pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Ekrone ne tshia Ngate, ivua bena Peleshete bamane kunyenga bena Izrayele, kuyipingajilabu anu bena Izrayele. Nanku buloba abu, kumukabu ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete. Nansha pankatshi pa bena Izrayele ne bena Amore pavua anu ditalala." 
1Samuel7:15 Samuwele uvua mushale mulombodi wa bena Izrayele too ne muakafuaye. 
1Samuel7:16 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, uvua upitshila ku Betele, ku Ngilgale ne ku Mispa, bua kulumbuluisha bantu mu bimenga ebi bisatu." 
1Samuel7:17 Pashishe, Samuwele uvua upingana kuende ku Rama, muaba uvuaye ulumbuluisha bena Izrayele. Muaba awu, uvua muashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu." 
1Samuel8:1 Samuwele mumane kukulakaja, kutekaye bana bende ba balume mu bumfumu, bua kulombolabu bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel8:2 Muanende muanabute uvua Yowele, muana muibidi uvua Abiya. Bana aba, bavua basombela mu Bersheba bua kulumbuluisha bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel8:3 Kadi bana abu, kabawa balonda tshilejilu tshia tatuabu Samuwele to. Bavua ne lukuka lua biuma, bangata mabuejila, bakose bilumbu bia bantu bibi." 
1Samuel8:4 Bua buenzayi abu, bakulu ba bena Izrayele kudisangisha, kuya kudi Samuwele ku Rama," 
1Samuel8:5 bamuambila ne: — Wewe Samuwele udi mumane kukulakaja, kadi bana bebe ba balume kabena balonda tshilejilu tshiebe to. Nanku, utupeshe mukalenga udi mua kushala mfumuetu, anu bu mudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu ne muntu udi ubalombola kashidi." 
1Samuel8:6 Samuwele kubungama bikole, bua pavua bantu bamulomba mukalenga. Ke kukonkaye Maweja-Nangila bualu ebu." 
1Samuel8:7 Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: — Uteleje bena Izrayele, ubenzele bionsu bidibu balomba. Bualu udibu babenga ki ngwewe to, mmeme! Kabatshiena basue bua meme kuikala mukalenga wabu to." 
1Samuel8:8 Bualu biangatshile dituku dindi mubapatula mu Ejipitu too ne mpindiewu, badi anu bambenga meme, batendelela mvidie mikuabu. Bionsu bivuabu bangenzele abi, ke bidibu bakuenzela wewe mpindiewu." 
1Samuel8:9 Nanku itaba bionsu bidibu bakulomba. Kadi ubabela, ubambile patoke, ubaleje malu onsu abenzelabu kudi mukalenga udi ushala mfumuabu." 
1Samuel8:10 Samuwele kufikisha meyi a Maweja-Nangila kudi bavua bamulomba mukalenga, ubambila ne:" 
1Samuel8:11 — Numanye ne: mukalenga washala mfumuenu neanukengeshe mushindu ewu: Munkatshi mua bana benu ba balume, neasungule bena mvita badi mua kuendesha matempu ende a mvita, badi mua kubanda pa nyama yende ya tubalu, nansha badi mua kunyema kumpala kua ditempu diende." 
1Samuel8:12 Bana benu bakuabu nebikale balombola bena mvita tshinunu, balombola bena mvita makumi atanu. Mfumu awu, neangate bana benu nansha bakuabu bua kumudiminabu madimi, bua kunowa biakudia, nansha bua kumuenzela biamu bia kuluangana nabi, ne bintu bia kuteka mu matempu ende." 
1Samuel8:13 Neangate bana benu ba bakaji bua kumuenzejabu manananshi, kumulambila biakudia, kumoshila mampa." 
1Samuel8:14 Neanunyenge madimi mimpe, mionji mimpe ya mvinyo, ne mitshi ya olive mimpe inudi nukuna. Bionsu ebi, neabipeshe balombodi ba bena mvita bende." 
1Samuel8:15 Ku biakudia bionsu bia mu madimi enu, ne ku maluvu enu a mvinyo, neanunyenge tshia dikumi. Neatshipeshe bena mudimu bende ne balombodi ba bena mvita bende." 
1Samuel8:16 Neanunyenge bena mudimu benu balume ne bakaji, bansongalume benu badi ne bukole bua bungi bua kumukuatshila mudimu. Neanunyenge ne nyama yenu ya mpunde bua kumuenzelayi mudimu." 
1Samuel8:17 Ku mikoku yenu ne ku mbuji yenu dikumi, neangate tshimuna tshimue. Mu tshikosu, nenuikale bapika bende." 
1Samuel8:18 Pashishe nenudidile Maweja-Nangila bua mukalenga unuikala badisunguile awu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kakunuteleja to. 
1Samuel8:19 Bena Izrayele kabawa bitaba bionsu bivua Samuwele ubambila abi to. Kumuandamunabu ne: — Nansha wewe muambe nanku, tudi basue anu mukalenga," 
1Samuel8:20 bua tuikale bu mudi bena bisamba bikuabu bionsu. Tudi basue mukalenga bua ikale ukosa nsambu yetu, wenda kumpala kua bena mvita betu, utuluila mvita." 
1Samuel8:21 Samuwele mumane kumvua bionsu bivua bena Izrayele bamba, kuyaye kuambila Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel8:22 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Kumbaja dijinga diabu, ubapeshe mukalenga. Ke Samuwele kuambila bena Izrayele bua muntu yonsu apingane ku nzubu kuende." 
1Samuel9:1 Tshikondu atshi, mu ditunga dia Binyamine, muvua muntu mukuabu wa mu ditunga adi, muikale mubanji, dina diende Kishe. Uvua muana wa Abiyele, ne muikulu wa Serore. Serore pende uvua muana wa Bekorate, ne muikulu wa Afiya." 
1Samuel9:2 Kishe uvua ne muana wa balume, dina diende Shawule. Shawule uvua nsongalume muimpe mutambe. Mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele dijima, kamuvua muntu mukuabu mufuanangane ne Shawule ku buimpe to. Kabidi uvua mupite bantu bonsu ku bule." 
1Samuel9:3 Dituku dikuabu, nyama ya mpunde ya tatuende Kishe ivua mijimine. Kishe kutuma muanende Shawule bua baye ne muena mudimu bua kukeba nyama ayi." 
1Samuel9:4 Shawule ne muena mudimu awu, kudianjilabu kupitshila mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Pashishe kupitshilabu mu buloba bua Shalisha. Kadi kabena bamona nyama ayi to. Kupitshilabu mu buloba bua Shalime, kabayi bayimona. Kuyabu mu buloba bua Binyamine, kadi kabena bayimona to." 
1Samuel9:5 Kadi bafika mu buloba bua Sufa, Shawule kuambila muena mudimu ne: — Tupingane ku nzubu. Patupu tatu wanyi, kakupampakana kabidi bua nyama ya mpunde to. Neatuadije kunyingalala bualu buetu." 
1Samuel9:6 Muena mudimu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumanye bimpe ne: mu tshimenga tshidi kumpala kuetu, mudi muambi, muntu udi ne lumu lunene. Bionsu bidiye umanyisha bantu, bidi bienzeka anu mudiye muambe amu. Nanku tuye kudiye mpindiewu. Misangu mikuabu udi mua kutuleja luseke lutudi mua kuya kukebela nyama ayi." 
1Samuel9:7 Shawule kukonka muena mudimu ne: — Patuafika kudi muambi awu, netumupeshe tshinyi? Katuena kabidi ne mampa mu mifuku yetu to. Katuena nansha ne tshintu tshia disanka tshia kumulambula. Tudi tshianana." 
1Samuel9:8 Muena mudimu kuandamuna ne: — Ndi ne lukanu lumue lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Netumupeshelu bua atuleje njila utudi mua kuyila. 
1Samuel9:9 Shawule kuitaba ne: — Mbimpe, tuyaku. Nanku kuyabu mu tshimenga, muaba uvua muambi. Patshi wabu mu njila, kusambakenabu ne bansongakaji bafuma mu tshimenga, baya kusuna mayi. Kukonkabu bansongakaji abu ne: — Mumonyi wa malu udi muenu munemu anyi? (Ku kale, mu bena Izrayele, pavua muntu uya kuebeja Mvidi Mukulu malu, bavua bamba ne: “Tuyaye kudi mumonyi wa malu.” Nanku muntu udibu babikila mpindiewu ne: “Muambi,” bavua bamubikila kale ne: “Mmumonyi wa malu.”)" 
1Samuel9:10  
1Samuel9:11  
1Samuel9:12 Bansongakaji kubandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ukadi mumane kufika. Mmufike mu tshimenga tshietu anu lelu, bualu ke dituku didi bantu balambula mulambu muaba wa tshijila. Koleshayi." 
1Samuel9:13 Nanku nenumupete anu panudi nubuela mu tshimenga, kayi muanji kubanda muaba wa tshijila bua kudia biakudia bia mulambu. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kudianza kudi a, mumonyi wa malu kayi muanji kufika. Yeye ke udi ne bua kuela milambu lupemba. Pashishe bantu bavuabu babikila nebadie. Buelayi mu tshimenga lukasa, nenumusangane anu mpindiewu." 
1Samuel9:14 Shawule ne muena mudimu wende kutungunuka ne luendu. Pavuabu babuela mu tshimenga, Samuwele uvua upatukamu bua kuya muaba wa tshijila. Nanku kusambakenaye nabu." 
1Samuel9:15 Kadi muladilu wa dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kumanyisha Samuwele muvuabu ne bua kupetangana ne Shawule. Mmumuambile ne:" 
1Samuel9:16 “Malaba anu pa diba ditudi edi, nenkutumine muntu wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine. Wewe neumujidile bua ikale mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Neabumushe ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete. Bualu bantu banyi bena Izrayele, mbambikila bua meme kubambuluisha, kabidi ndi mumone dikenga diabu.”" 
1Samuel9:17 Nanku anu Samuwele umona Shawule mutshikale kule, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: “Tangila muntu umvua mukuambile. Yeye neikale mukalenga wa bantu banyi.”" 
1Samuel9:18 Shawule usemena pabuipi ne Samuwele ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga, kukonkaye Samuwele ne: — Bu wewe musue, ndeja ku nzubu kua mumonyi wa malu." 
1Samuel9:19 Samuwele kuandamuna ne: — Meme ke mumonyi wa malu. Pita kumpala kuanyi eku, tuye nebe muaba wa tshijila. Lelu netudie nebe. Malaba dinda, pangikale mumane kukuandamuna ku makonka ebe onsu, nenkulekele uye." 
1Samuel9:20 Kadi bua nyama ya mpunde idi mijimine kukadi matuku asatu, kuditatshishi to. Mbamane kuyimona. Kadi mpindiewu, mbimpe umanye muntu udi bena Izrayele bonsu batekemena. Bena Izrayele mbakutekemena anu wewe, batekemena kabidi ne bena nzubu wa tatuebe." 
1Samuel9:21 Shawule kuandamna ne: — Kuambi nanku, bualu meme ndi muena Binyamine. Ndi muntu wa mu kasamba kakese ka bena Izrayele. Kabidi mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine emu, diku dianyi ke didi ne bantu bapite bukese. Kadi mmunyi muudi mua kungambila bualu bua nanku?" 
1Samuel9:22 Kadi Samuwele kuya ne Shawule ne muena mudimu wa Shawule mu nzubu wa tshidiilu. Kubasombeshaye muaba wa bantu ba lumu. Mu nzubu, muvua anu bantu bu makumi asatu bavuabu babikila." 
1Samuel9:23 Pashishe Samuwele kuambila mulambi wende bua amutuadile dibulu dia munyinyi divuaye mumupe bua kuteka ku luseke. 
1Samuel9:24 Mulambi kuya kuangata tshibelu tshia nyama ne mukila, kubiteka kumpala kua Samuwele. Samuwele kuambila Shawule ne: — Ke munyinyi uvuabu bakutekela ewu, udie ne bantu bonsu bandi mubikila aba. Dituku adi, Shawule ne Samuwele kudia muaba umue." 
1Samuel9:25 Pashishe kumukabu muaba wa tshijila, kupueka mu tshimenga. Samuwele kuyukila ne Shawule ku musaka wa nzubu." 
1Samuel9:26 Butshia dinda dionsu, Shawule ne muena mudimu wende kubika. Panshi patoke, Samuwele kubikila Shawule uvua ku musaka wa nzubu, umuambila ne: — Tuyayi, meme ndi musue kukushindikija mu njila. Nanku Samuwele kuya kushindikija Shawule." 
1Samuel9:27 Bafike ku ndekelu kua mikalu ya tshimenga, Samuwele kuambila Shawule ne: — Ambila muena mudimu webe adianjila kumpala. Muena mudimu mumane kuya mutantshi, Samuwele kuamba ne: — Wewe Shawule, mpindiewu, imana muaba ewu. Ndi musue kukumanyisha tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba." 
1Samuel10:1 Ke Samuwele kuambula kalangi ka mafuta kavuaye naku. Kuelaye Shawule mafuta awu pa mutu. Pashishe kumupukilaye, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke udi mukujidila bua wikale mukalenga wa tshisamba tshiende." 
1Samuel10:2 Mpindiewu netushiyangane nebe. Kadi pawafika ku Selsa, mu buloba bua bena Binyamine, neusambakene ne bantu balume babidi, pabuipi ne lukita lua Rakele. Nebakuambile ne: “Nyama ya mpunde iuvua ukeba, mbamane kuyimona. Tatuebe katshiena ukeba nyama to, ukadi ukukeba amu wewe. Udi ukeba mushindu wa kukumona wewe muanende wa balume.”" 
1Samuel10:3 Pawatungunuka ne luendu, neufike pabuipi ne mutshi wa lusanga wa ku Tabore. Muaba awu, neusambakene ne bantu balume basatu badi baya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Betele. Muntu umue neikale muambule bana ba mbuji basatu, muibidi neikale muambule tukata tua mampa lupepele tusatu, muisatu neikale muambule mulondu wa biseba muikale ne maluvu." 
1Samuel10:4 Bantu abu nebakukonke muudi muladile. Nebakulambule mampa abidi. Wangata mampa awu. 
1Samuel10:5 Pashishe neuye ku Ngibeya-Elohime, muaba udi bamfumu ba bena Peleshete. Pawafika pabuipi ne tshimenga, neusambakene ne tshisumbu tshia bambi, bapueka ku muaba wa tshijila. Kumpala kuabu nekuikale bantu badi bimba lunzenze, bimba ngoma, bela nshiba, bimba ne lunkombe. Bambi abu, nebikale baja maja, bela mbila." 
1Samuel10:6 Pashishe Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila neukutulukile. Nentuadije kuja maja, kuela mbila bu bambi abu. Newikale mushintuluke." 
1Samuel10:7 Pikala bionsu ebi bienzeka, wewe neujadike bulelela ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi nanyi. Nanku, biangatshile tshikondu atshi, wikale wenza bionsu biudi mumone ne: mbikumbane." 
1Samuel10:8 Pashishe udianjila kupueka ku Ngilgale kumpala kuanyi. Meme nenshishe kukulonda, bua kulambula milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue. Ungindile ku Ngilgale matuku muanda mutekete. Pangafika nenkuambile tshiudi mua kuenza." 
1Samuel10:9 Anu Shawule umuka muaba uvua Samuwele, Mvidi Mukulu kushintulula Shawule bikole, katshiyi bu muvuaye amu to. Bionsu bivua Samuwele muambila Shawule, kukumbanabi anu dituku adi." 
1Samuel10:10 Nanku Shawule ne muena mudimu wende, bafike ku Ngibeya, kusambakenabu ne tshisumbu tshia bambi. Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kutulukila Shawule, kudisangishaye ne bambi abu. Kutuadijaye kuja maja, wela mbila." 
1Samuel10:11 Bantu bonsu bavua bamane kumanya Shawule kuonsu eku, bamumona uja maja, wela mbila munkatshi mua bambi, kukonkanganabu ne: “Tshidi tshienzekela muana wa Kishe ntshinyi? Kadi Shawule pende ukadi muambi anyi? ”" 
1Samuel10:12 Muntu mukuabu wa ku bantu abu, kukonka kabidi ne: “Bambi bakuabu aba, mfumuabu nnganyi? ” Ke kudi kufuma lusumuinu lua ne: “Kadi Shawule pende ukadi muambi anyi?”" 
1Samuel10:13 Shawule utukija, kuyaye muaba wa tshijila." 
1Samuel10:14 Mansebende kumukonka ne: — Wewe ne muena mudimu webe nuvua baye penyi? Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Tuvua baye kukeba nyama ya mpunde. Kadi katuena bayimone to. Ke tuetu kuya kuebeja Samuwele. 
1Samuel10:15 Mansebende wa Shawule kumukonka kabidi ne: — Ngambile tshidi Samuwele munuambile. 
1Samuel10:16 Shawule kumuambila ne: — Wakutumanyisha ne: nyama yenu ya mpunde mmimane kumueneka. Kadi Shawule kena muambile mansebende malu avua Samuwele mumuambile bua bukalenga to. 
1Samuel10:17 Samuwele kubikidisha bena Izrayele ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Mispa. 
1Samuel10:18 Kubambilaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, udi wamba ne: “Nuenu bena Izrayele, uvua munupatule ku bupika mu Ejipitu, mmeme! Uvua munumushe ku bumfumu bua bena Ejipitu ne bua bakalenga ba bisamba bikuabu, bivua binukengesha, mmeme!”" 
1Samuel10:19 Kadi mpindiewu, nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi babenga Mvidi Mukulu uvua munupandishe matuku a dikenga ne a kanyinganyinga. Nuenu kumulomba ne: “Tupeshe mukalenga. ” Nanku fikayi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, balondangane mu bisamba bienu ne mu meku enu." 
1Samuel10:20 Samuwele kubikidisha bena Izrayele ku tshisamba ku tshisamba bua kutshinka, bua bapete mukalenga. Maweja-Nangila kuleja tshisamba tshia Binyamine." 
1Samuel10:21 Samuwele kubikidisha bena Binyamine ku diku ku diku, Maweja-Nangila kuleja diku dia Matri. Nanku mu diku dia Matri, kulejaye Shawule muana wa Kishe. Kukebabu Shawule, kadi kabena bamumone to." 
1Samuel10:22 Kukonkabu kabidi Maweja-Nangila ne: — Muntu ewu mmufike muaba ewu anyi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Nuye kutangila munkatshi mua mabuki, ke muaba udiye musokome." 
1Samuel10:23 Kuyabu lubilu, kupinganabu ne Shawule. Kuimanaye munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Uvua mupite bantu bonsu ku bule bua mutu mujima!" 
1Samuel10:24 Samuwele kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Tangilayi! Monayi muntu udi Maweja-Nangila musungule. Kakuenamuntu mukuabu udi mufuanangane nende, munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bonsu. Ke bantu bonsu kuela bibingu ne mbila, bambila Shawule ne: “Mukalenga ukuata ku mundundu”!" 
1Samuel10:25 Ke Samuwele kubadila bantu bidi bantu ne bua kuenzela mukalenga, ne bidi mukalenga ne bua kuenzela bantu. Kufundaye bionsu abi mu mukanda, kuutekaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe kutangalajaye bena Izrayele, kupinganabu kuabu." 
1Samuel10:26 Shawule kabidi kupingana kuende ku Ngibeya. Uvua ne tshisumbu tshia bantu bena mvita bavua Mvidi Mukulu mujule bua kuikalabu ne Shawule. 
1Samuel10:27 Kadi kuvua kabidi bantu bena buenzayi, bavua bamba ne: “Muntu ewu udi mua kutusungidila mushindu kaayi?” Nanku bantu abu bavua bapepeja Shawule. Kabawa balambula milambu. Kadi Shawule kulengulula bionsu abi." 
1Samuel11:1 Nakashe, mukalenga wa bena Amone, kuluisha tshimenga tshia Yabeshe tshivua mu Ngilaade. Bena Yabeshe kuambila Nakashe ne: — Utue netu ndondu. Tudi basue kushala bantu bebe." 
1Samuel11:2 Mukalenga Nakashe kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi musue kutua nenu ndondu, kadi anu panuikala bitabe bua meme kushipa disu dia luseke lua balume dia muntu yonsu wa kunudi, bua meme kufuisha bena Izrayele bonsu bundu." 
1Samuel11:3 Bakulu ba Yabeshe kuandamuna ne: — Anji kutupa matuku muanda mutekete. Tudi basue kutuma bantu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele dijima. Patuikala katuyi bapete muntu udi mua kutuambuluisha, netudifile kuudi." 
1Samuel11:4 Bantu kuya ku Ngibeya, tshimenga tshia ba Shawule. Kuambilabu bantu bionsu bivuabu bakula kudi mukalenga Nakashe. Bena Ngibeya bonsu kudila muadi bikole." 
1Samuel11:5 Shawule utshivua ufumina ku madimi ne ngombe yende. Kukonkaye tshivua bantu bonsu badidila. Kumuambilabu bionsu bivua bena Yabeshe bamba. 
1Samuel11:6 Shawule umvua nanku, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumutulukila, kupetaye tshiji tshikole." 
1Samuel11:7 Kusayaye ngombe ibidi ayi. Pashishe kutumaye bantu ne munyinyi wa ngombe awu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele dijima, ubadimuja ne: — Mushindu utudi benza ngombe eyi, ke muenzelebu ngombe ya muntu yonsu udi ubenga mua kuya ku mvita ne Shawule ne Samuwele. Bena Izrayele bonsu kutshina, kudisangisha lukasa, benza anu bu muntu umue." 
1Samuel11:8 Shawule kuya ku Bezeke, kutentekela bantu bonsu. Bantu ba bisamba bia ku mutu wa ditunga bavua binunu nkama isatu, ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, bavua binunu makumi asatu." 
1Samuel11:9 Kadi bantu bavua bafuma ku Yabeshe, kubapingajabu ku tshimenga atshi bua kuambila bana babu ne: “Malaba munda munya, netunusungidile.” Bantu bavuabu batume, kuyabu kuambila bena mu Yabeshe lumu alu. Nanku bena Yabeshe kusanka bikole." 
1Samuel11:10 Kuambilabu bena Amone ne: — Malaba netufike kunudi bua nutuenzele muonsu munudi basue. 
1Samuel11:11 Butshia dinda, Shawule kutapulula bena mvita bende mu bisumbu bisatu. Kubuelabu munkatshi mua mitanda ya baluishi babu, butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia. Kushipabu bena Amone too ne munda munya. Bena Amone bavua bashala ne muoyi kutangalaka bonsu. Muntu yonsu uvua ukeba anu mua kudipandisha, kabayi nansha mua kunyema babidi babidi to." 
1Samuel11:12 Pashishe bena Izrayele kukonka Samuwele ne: — Bantu bavua babenga bua Shawule kikadi mukalenga wetu, badi penyi? Batupeshabu, tubashipe!" 
1Samuel11:13 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Kabena mua kushipa muntu nansha umue dituku dia mushindu ewu to. Bualu lelu ndituku didi Maweja-Nangila mupeshe bena Izrayele bukole bua kutshimuna. 
1Samuel11:14 Ke Samuwele kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Tuyayi ku Ngilgale bua kubanjija Shawule mu bukalenga. 
1Samuel11:15 Bena Izrayele bonsu kuya ku Ngilgale. Bafike mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubandabu tshiakabidi Shawule mu bukalenga. Pashishe kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya bobumue. Nanku Shawule ne bena Izrayele bonsu, kusanka bikole." 
1Samuel12:1 Samuwele kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Eyowa, mbanupeshi tshinuvua bandombe. Mbanupi mukalenga." 
1Samuel12:2 Mpindiewu yeye neandombole. Meme ndi mumane kukola mukalakaje. — Bana banyi ba balume mbamane kukola, munudi amu. — Meme ndi munulombola biangatshile ku buana buanyi too ne mpindiewu." 
1Samuel12:3 Ke pandi muimana kumpala kuenu, muaba udi Maweja-Nangila ne mukalenga udiye musungule. Pangikala munuenzele bualu bubi, numfunde kudibu patoke too. Ndi muibe ngombe wa muntu anyi? Ndi muibe mpunde wa muntu anyi? Ndi mukengeshe muntu anyi? Ndi muenzele muntu bibi anyi? Ndi muangataku tshintu tshia mabuejila kudi muntu bua tshitangidi buenzayi budiye wenza anyi? Pangikala muangate tshintu tshia muntu, angambile, mmupingajilatshi." 
1Samuel12:4 Bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Kuena mutukengeshe, kuena mutuenzele bibi. Katshia kuena muangate tshintu tshia mabuejila to." 
1Samuel12:5 Samuwele kuamba ne: — Nanku Maweja-Nangila ne mukalenga Shawule bajadike bualu ebu lelu. Nuenu bena Izrayele kanuena batela bualu bubi nansha bumue bundi meme Samuwele munuenzela. Bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Muwambi amu, mmomu." 
1Samuel12:6 Samuwele kubambila kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila ke mujadiki wa bualu ebu. Yeye ke uvua musungula Moshe ne Arone bua kupatula bankambua benu mu Ejipitu. 
1Samuel12:7 Nanku mpindiewu, imanayi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Meme ndi musue kunufunda kudiye. Diambedi, ndi musue kunuvuluija malu mimpe onsu adi Maweja-Nangila munuenzele nuenu ne bankambua benu." 
1Samuel12:8 Yakobe ne bena diende bonsu bamane kuya mu Ejipitu, bankambua benu kukenga bikole. Kubikilabu Maweja bua abambuluishe. Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe ne Arone bua kupatula bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, ne bua kubafila mu ditunga ditudi edi." 
1Samuel12:9 Kadi bankambua benu bakupua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu muoyi. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kuitaba bua baluishe bena Izrayele, babatshimune kudi Sisra, mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Ashore, kudi bena Peleshete ne kudi mukalenga wa bena Mowabe." 
1Samuel12:10 Bankambua benu kubikila kabidi Maweja-Nangila, bua kubambuluisha, bamuambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila, tudi benze bibi, bualu tuvua bakubenga, bua kutendelela mvidie Baale ne Astarte. Kadi mpindiewu, utusungidileku kudi baluishi betu, netukuenzele mudimu.”" 
1Samuel12:11 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kutuma Ngideyone, Bedane, Yefete, kuntumaye ne meme Samuwele bua kunusungidila, kudi baluishi benu, bavua nenu mutumba. Ke munuvua basombe mu ditunga ne ditalala." 
1Samuel12:12 Kadi panuamonyi Nakashe, mukalenga wa bena Amone, mufike bua kunuluisha, nuenu kungambila ne: “Tudi basue kuikala ne mukalenga!” Mbimueneka ne: Maweja-Nangila kavua mukalenga wenu to." 
1Samuel12:13 Eyowa, nudi ne mukalenga unuvua basungula. Mukalenga unuvua balombe, Maweja-Nangila, wanupeshiye." 
1Samuel12:14 Mpindiewu, nenuikale bena diakalenga anu panuikala banemeka Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, numuenzela mudimu, numutumikila kanuyi numutombokela, nukumbaja mikenji yende, nuenu ne mukalenga wenu, numulonda." 
1Samuel12:15 Kadi panuikala kanuyi bamutumikila, bamutombokela, kanuyi bakumbaja mikenji yende, Maweja-Nangila neanuleje bukole buende, bu muvuaye muleje bankambua benu kale." 
1Samuel12:16 Mpindiewu dilongololayi, nutangile tshishima tshinene tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue kuenza, nuenu bamone." 
1Samuel12:17 Tudi mu tshikondu tshia kunowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, ki mmomu anyi? Ndi musue kulomba Maweja-Nangila, adidishe makubakuba, alokeshe mvula. Nanku nenujadike ne: nudi benzela Maweja-Nangila tshilema tshipite bunene, panudi balomba bua kuikala ne mukalenga." 
1Samuel12:18 Samuwele kulomba Maweja-Nangila. Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kudidisha makubakuba, kulokesha mwla. Bena Izrayele bonsu kutshipa Maweja-Nangila ne Samuwele bikole." 
1Samuel12:19 Kuambilabu Samuwele ne: — Usengelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu bualu buetu, bua katufu to. Bualu ku malu mabi onsu atudi benza, tudi basakidila kabidi bualu bubi bukuabu bua dilomba dia mukalenga." 
1Samuel12:20 Samuwele kuandamuna ne: — Kanutshinyi to. Bulelela, nudi bamane kuenza tshilema etshi tshinene. Kadi kanumuki kabidi kudi Maweja-Nangila to. Numuenzele anu mudimu ne muoyi mujima." 
1Samuel12:21 Kanukebi bua kuenzela mvidie ya tshianana mudimu. Bualu kayena ne bukole bua kunuambuluisha, nansha bua kusungila muntu. Idi amu mvidie ya dishima." 
1Samuel12:22 Maweja-Nangila kakunulekela to. Bualu yeye nkayende ke uvua munusungule bua nuikale tshisamba tshia bantu bende. Maweja-Nangila neavuluke lumu luende lunene. 
1Samuel12:23 Meme Samuwele, tshiena musue kuenzela Maweja-Nangila bibi to. Misangu yonsu nengikale ndomba Maweja-Nangila bualu buenu. Ndi anu nnuleja njila muimpe, mululame." 
1Samuel12:24 Kadi nuenu, nuitabe bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila, numuenzele mudimu muenu muonsu, kabidi ne muoyi mujima. Nuvuluke bishima binene bionsu bidiye munuenzele." 
1Samuel12:25 Kadi, panuikala benza bibi, nenubutuke bonsu ne mukalenga wenu." 
1Samuel13:1  
1Samuel13:2 Shawule kusungula bena mvita binunu bisatu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Bena mvita binunu bibidi kushala nende ku Mikmase, ne mu buloba bua mikuna bua Betele. Bena mvita bakuabu tshinunu, kuasa mu buloba bua Binyamine, mu tshimenga tshia Ngibeya, pamue ne Yonatane, muana wa Shawule. Shawule kupingaja bena Izrayele bakuabu ku nzubu yabu." 
1Samuel13:3 Dituku dikuabu, Yonatane kushipa mfumu mukuabu wa bena Peleshete uvua musombele mu Ngeba. Bena Peleshete kumvua lumu lua bualu abu. Shawule kuelesha mpungi mu ditunga dijima, bualu uvua wela meji ne: “Mbimpe bua bena Ebrewu bamanye bualu ebu.”" 
1Samuel13:4 Bena Izrayele bumvua ne: Shawule ke udi mushipe mfumu wa bena Peleshete, kabidi ne: Bena Peleshete mbafikile bena Izrayele munda. Ke bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele kudisangisha kudi Shawule mu Ngilgale." 
1Samuel13:5 Bena Peleshete kusangila bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Bavua ne matempu a mvita binunu makumi asatu, bantu bavua babanda pa tubalu binunu bisambombu, bena mvita bungi bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Nanku kuasabu mitanda ku Mikmase, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Bete-Avene." 
1Samuel13:6 Bena Izrayele bamone baluishi bamane kubafinakaja, kuyabu kusokoma ku mikuna mu biina, mu mikela, mu mbuebue, mu nyongolu ne mu milundu." 
1Samuel13:7 Bantu bakuabu kusabuka musulu wa Yardene bua kusokoma mu buloba bua Ngade ne bua Ngilaade. Diba adi, Shawule utshivua anu mu Ngilgale. Bena mvita bonsu bavuaye nabu bavua bazakala bua bowa." 
1Samuel13:8 Shawule ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu bavua bindila, matuku muanda mutekete, difika dia Samuwele bu muvuaye mubalaye. Kadi Samuwele kavua mufike ku Ngilgale to. Nanku bena mvita kutuadija kumuka kudi Shawule, kutangalakabu." 
1Samuel13:9 Ke Shawule kutuma diyi bua balongolole nyama ya mulambu wa kuosha ne ya milambu ya bobumue. Shawule kulambula mulambu wa kuosha yeye nkayende. 
1Samuel13:10 Ujikija kulambula, Samuwele kufika. Shawule kuya kuakidila Samuwele, umuela muoyi." 
1Samuel13:11 Samuwele kumuebeja ne: — Tshiudi wenza muaba ewu ntshinyi? Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muenze nanku, bualu bena mvita bavua batuadija kunshiya, batangalaka. Wewe kuena mufike bu muuvua muambe to. Kabidi ndi mumanye ne: bena Peleshete mbadisangishe ku Mikmase." 
1Samuel13:12 Mvua muele meji ne: Bena Peleshete nebafike mu Ngilgale bua kutuluisha, katuyi banji kulambula mulambu bua Maweja-Nangila atuambuluishe. Ke pandi mulambule mulambu wa kuosha meme nkayanyi." 
1Samuel13:13 Samuwele kuandamuna ne: — Udi muenze bualu bubi budibu benza kudi muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi to! Kuena munemeke bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe mukuambile to. Bu wewe muenze bionsu bivuaye mukuambile, nanku Maweja-Nangila uvua mua kuitaba bua diku diebe dishale diku dia bukalenga bua bena Izrayele kashidi." 
1Samuel13:14 Kadi mpindiewu, kuakushala mu bukalenga matuku a bungi to. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kusungula muntu mukuabu udiye musue bua kuikala mukalenga wa bantu bende bena Izrayele. Bualu wewe kuena mutumikile meyi a Maweja-Nangila to." 
1Samuel13:15 Samuwele kumuka mu Ngilgale, kuya luseke lukuabu. Bena mvita bavua bashale, kuyabu ne Shawule. Kumukabu ku Ngilgale kuyabu ku Ngibeya wa bena Binyamine, muaba uvua bena mvita bende bakuabu. Shawule kutentekela bena mvita bonsu, batshivuaye mushale nabu. Bavua bu nkama isambombu." 
1Samuel13:16 Shawule kuasa mu Ngibeya wa bena Binyamine, ne muanende wa balume Yonatane, ne bena mvita bavuaye mushale nabu. Bena Peleshete bavua base mitanda yabu mu Mikmase." 
1Samuel13:17 Dituku dikuabu, bantu ba bena Peleshete bavua bamanye mvita bikole, kupatuka mu mitanda, kutapulukabu mu bisumbu bisatu. Tshisumbu tshia kumpala kulonda njila wa Ofra, mu buloba bua Shuwale." 
1Samuel13:18 Tshisumbu tshibidi kulonda njila wa ku Bete-Orone. Tshisumbu tshisatu kulonda njila udi ku mukalu udi ulonda tshibandabanda tshia Seboyime, luseke lua ku tshipela."
