1Samuel13:19 Tshikondu atshi, mu buloba bua bena Izrayele bonsu, kamuvua nsenda wa biamu nansha umue to. Bualu bena Peleshete kabavua basue bua bena Izrayele benza miela nansha mafuma." 
1Samuel13:20 Muena Izrayele yonsu, uvua uya kudi nsenda wa bena Peleshete bua kunona tshikasu tshia ku ditempu, kasuyi, bikasu bikuabu, nansha nkasu ya kumbula nayi buloba." 
1Samuel13:21 Nanku, bua kunona tshikasu tshia ku ditempu, lukasu, tshiamu tshia kukunguja natshi bisosa, kasuyi, tshiamu tshia kusaka natshi bimuna, nansha bua kuasa tshiamu mu tshilabi, bavua ne bua kufuta bia bisatu bibidi bia lukanu lutoke lua mushinga mukole." 
1Samuel13:22 Dituku dia kuluangana mvita, bena mvita ba Shawule ne ba Yonatane kabawa ne miela nansha ne mafuma to. Anu mukalenga Shawule ne muanende Yonatane ke bavua nabi." 
1Samuel13:23 Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita ba bena Peleshete kuya kuela mualu wa mvita mu njila wa ku Mikmase. 
1Samuel14:1 Dituku dikuabu, Yonatane, muana wa Shawule, kuambila nsongalume uvua umuambuila bia mvita biende ne: — Luaku, tuye too ne kudi tshisumbu tshia mvita tshia bena Peleshete tshidi dishiya kuaka, batangilangane netu. Kadi Yonatane kavua mumanyishe tatuende bualu ebu to." 
1Samuel14:2 Tatuende uvua pabuipi ne Ngibeya, musombe muinshi mua mutshi wa grenadier mu Migrone. Uvua ne bena mvita bu nkama isambombu." 
1Samuel14:3 Mutuangaji uvua muimane muaba awu, ne bintu bia tshijila bivua bibambuluisha mua kuebeja Mvidi Mukulu malu. Mutuangaji awu, dina diende Akiya, muana wa Akitube. Akitube uvua muanabu ne Ikabode (Ikabode uvua muana wa Pinhase, kabidi muikulu wa Eli. Eli ke uvua mutuangaji wa Maweja-Nangila ku Silo.) Ku bena mvita bonsu, muntu nansha umue kavua mumanye ne: Yonatane mmuye kuluisha bena Peleshete to." 
1Samuel14:4 Bua kufika muaba uvua bena mvita ba bena Peleshete, Yonatane kupitshila pankatshi pa mbuebue ibidi ivua miondoke. Mbuebue ayi, bavua bayibikila, elu ne: Bosese, lukuabu ne: Sene." 
1Samuel14:5 Lubuebue lua kumpala luvua ku mutu, lutangilangane ne Mikmase. Luibidi luvua kuinshi, lutangilangane ne Ngeba." 
1Samuel14:6 Yonatane kuambila nsongalume wende ne: — Luaku tuye too ne ku tshisumbu tshia bena mvita ba bena Peleshete, badibu kabayi bateke panshi. Misangu mikuabu Maweja-Nangila udi mua kutuambuluisha. Bualu kakuena tshidi mua kupumbisha Maweja-Nangila bua atupeteshe ditshimuna, nansha tuetu ba bungi nansha tuetu bakese." 
1Samuel14:7 Muena mudimu kuandamuna ne: — Enza muonsu muudi musue. Tuyaku, meme ndi nkulonda anu bu mudi mundidimbi webe nkulonda." 
1Samuel14:8 Ke Yonatane kuambila nsongalume kabidi ne: — Tuyaya kudi bantu aba. Tudileja kudibu. 
1Samuel14:9 Pikalabu batuambila ne: “Imanayi too ne mutuafika kunudi” netushale bimane anu muaba awu. Katuakuya kudibu to. 
1Samuel14:10 Kadi pikalabu batubikila ne: “Bandilayi kuneku,” netuye kudibu. Nenku, ke tshimanyinu tshidi tshitujadikila ne: Maweja-Nangila mmubafile mu bianza bietu." 
1Samuel14:11 Bonsu babidi, kuya kudileja kudi bena Peleshete. Bobu abu kuambilangana ne: “Akia! Monayi bena Ebrewu bapatuke mu biina muvuabu basokome.”" 
1Samuel14:12 Nanku kubikilabu Yonatane ne nsongalume wende, bela mbila ne: — Bandilayi kuneku! Tudi basue kunuambila bualu. Ke Yonatane kuambila nsongalume ne: — Tubande, undonde panyima. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kubafila mu bianza bia bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel14:13 Yonatane kubanda, wenda ukalaba ne bianza ne makasa, nsongalume wende wenda umulonda. Ke Yonatane kutapa bena Peleshete, nsongalume wende ubashipa, ubalunguluja." 
1Samuel14:14 Ku mvita eyi ya kumpala, Yonatane ne muena mudimu wende bavua bashipa bena Peleshete makumi abidi, babashipela muaba mufinakane." 
1Samuel14:15 Bena Peleshete bavua bashala mu mitanda, ne bena mutumba nabu bonsu, kutshinabu bena Izrayele bikole. Bena mvita bonsu ba bena Peleshete, ne bavuabu bateke bua kutentekela ditunga, ne bavua bamanye mvita bikole, kutshina bikole, buloba mene kuzakala. Ke bena Peleshete bonsu kupapuka, bikale ne bowa bunene." 
1Samuel14:16 Batentekedi ba Shawule bavua ku Ngibeya, tshimenga tshia bena Binyamine, kumona bena Peleshete bavule banyemakane nseke yonsu." 
1Samuel14:17 Shawule kutumina bena mvita bende diyi ne: — Balanganayi, nungambile muntu udi kayi munkatshi muenu. Kusanganabu ne: Yonatane ne nsongalume wende kabavuaku to." 
1Samuel14:18 Nanku Shawule kuambila mutuangaji Akiya ne: — Ambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, ufike nawu apa. (Dituku adi mushete wa ndondu uvua mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele)." 
1Samuel14:19 Patshivua Shawule bayukila ne mutuangaji Akiya, tshimvundu tshivua tshienda tshivula mu mitanda ya bena Peleshete. Nanku Shawule kuambila mutuangaji Akiya ne: — Kutatshi bua kuebeja Maweja-Nangila to." 
1Samuel14:20 Shawule kusangisha bena mvita bende, kuyabu mu mvita. Kadi, kusanganabu baluishi babu baluangana nkayabu mu tshimvundu tshinene." 
1Samuel14:21 Nanku, bena Ebrewu bakuabu bavua babuele kale ku bumfumu bua bena Peleshete, kudisangisha ne bena Izrayele luseke luvua Shawule ne Yonatane." 
1Samuel14:22 Bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu, bavua basokome mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime, kumvuabu lumu ne: bena Peleshete mbanyema bena Izrayele. Ke kutuadijabu kulondakaja bena Peleshete, benda babaluisha." 
1Samuel14:23 Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila muambuluishe bena Izrayele bua kutshimuna bena Peleshete dituku adi nanku. Mvita kutungunuka too ne dishiya dia Bete-Avene. 
1Samuel14:24 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele kukenga bikole bua mutshipu uvua Shawule mubatshipishe ne: “Pikala muntu mudie biakudia, katuyi banji kufika ku dilolu, tshiyi muanji kusombuela baluishi banyi, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu. ” Nanku, muntu nansha umue kavua mudie tshintu to." 
1Samuel14:25 Bena Izrayele bonsu kufika mu ditu, muvua buitshi miaba yonsu too ne panshi." 
1Samuel14:26 Pavua bena mvita babuele mu ditu, kumonabu buitshi bumata panshi. Kadi muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kena mubuambule bua kudia to. Bonsu bavua batshina bua mutshipu." 
1Samuel14:27 Kadi Yonatane kavua mumanye ne: tatuende Shawule mmuenzeje bantu bua kuditshipabu to. Nanku, Yonatane kuolola dikombu divuaye nadi, kutua lusongu lua dikombu mu buitshi, kuelaye buitshi mukana. Ke muisu kubutama, dipungi kujika." 
1Samuel14:28 Muena mvita mukuabu kuambila Yonatane ne: — Tatuebe Shawule uvua mutuenzeje bua tuetu kuditshipa, mutukanyine ne: “Pikala muntu mudie biakudia lelu, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu!” Ke padi bantu bonsu bapungila bua nzala!" 
1Samuel14:29 Yonatane kuamba ne: — Tatu mmukengeshishe ditunga edi! Mona katshia ngadia buitshi bukese, ndi mupete bukole." 
1Samuel14:30 Bu bena mvita bonsu badie lelu bintu bivuabu banyenga baluishi babu, tuvua mua kuikala batshimune bena Peleshete bikole bipite." 
1Samuel14:31 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele kuipata, balondakaja bena Peleshete biangatshile ku Mikmase too ne ku Ayalone. Bavua bapungila bikole." 
1Samuel14:32 Nanku kufuilakanabu bintu bivuabu bapawule: mikoku, ngombe ne bana ba ngombe. Kushipelabu nyama ayi anu muaba awu. Kudiabu munyinyi awu, mutshikale ne mashi." 
1Samuel14:33 Kuambilabu Shawule ne: bena Izrayele mbenzele Maweja-Nangila bibi, bualu mbadie munyinyi, mutshikale ne mashi. Shawule kuela mbila ne: — Mbenze bualu bubi butambe! Bungulujayi lukasa dibue dinene, nufike nadi muaba undi ewu." 
1Samuel14:34 Pashishe, nuye kudi bantu, nubambile bafike muaba undi ewu. Muntu yonsu ikale ne wende ngombe, nansha mukoku. Bashipele nyama yabu ayi muaba ewu, pashishe nebayidie. Nanku kabakuenzela Maweja-Nangila bibi, padibu badia munyinyi, mutshikale ne mashi. Dilolu adi, muntu yonsu kufika ne nyama wende, kumushipelaye muaba awu." 
1Samuel14:35 Shawule kuashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu. Ke tshilambuilu tshia kumpala tshivuaye pende mumuashile. 
1Samuel14:36 Ke Shawule kutumina bena Izrayele diyi ne: — Tuyayi butuku ebu, tulondakaje bena Peleshete. Mubanyenge bintu biabu, too ne muatshia butuku. Katushiyi muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to. Bena mvita kuandamuna ne: — Enza muudi musue. Kadi mutuangaji Akiya kuamba ne: — Bangabanga, tuebeje Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Samuel14:37 Nanku Shawule kukonka Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Ndi mua kulondakaja bena Peleshete anyi? Wewe Maweja-Nangila neufile bena Peleshete mu bianza bietu anyi? Mvidi Mukulu kena mumuandamune dituku adi to. 
1Samuel14:38 Nanku, Shawule kubikidisha bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele, ubambila ne: — Konkanganayi bimpe, bua tumanye bubi butudi benza lelu." 
1Samuel14:39 Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila, Musungidi wa bena Izrayele ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: muntu udi muenze bibi neafue, nansha yeye muananyi wa balume Yonatane. Munkatshi mua bena mvita bonsu, muntu nansha umue kena muandamune to." 
1Samuel14:40 Shawule kuamba kabidi ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele imanayi ku luseke, meme ne muananyi wa balume Yonatane netuimane luseke lukuabu. Bena mvita kuandamuna ne: — Enza muonsu muudi musue." 
1Samuel14:41 Shawule kulomba Maweja-Nangila ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kuena mungandamune lelu bua tshinyi? Maweja-Nangila, ungandamune ku bintu bia tshijila ebi: pikala Yonatane muenze bibi nansha meme, ungandamune ku Urime. Kadi pikala bena mvita benze bibi, ungandamune ku Tumime. Kujadikabu ne bubi budi luseke lua Yonatane ne tatuende. Bena mvita kabena ne bualu to." 
1Samuel14:42 Shawule kutuma diyi ne: — Batshinke kabidi pankatshi panyi ne Yonatane bua kumanya udi muenze bibi. Kujadikabu ne: Yonatane ke uvua muenze bibi. 
1Samuel14:43 Ke Shawule kuambila Yonatane ne: — Unsokoluele bualu buudi muenze. Yonatane kuandamuna ne: — Mvua muangate buitshi bukese ku lusongu lua dikombu dianyi, meme kudia. Mpindiewu ndi amu mua kufua." 
1Samuel14:44 Shawule kuamba ne: — Yonatane wewe kuyi mufue, Mvidi Mukulu annyoke ne dinyoka dikole!" 
1Samuel14:45 Kadi bena mvita kuambila Shawule ne: — Yonatane udi mupeteshe bena Izrayele ditshimuna mu mvita eyi minene, neafue bua tshinyi? Kabiena mua kuenzeka to. Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, katuena tuitabe nansha bua lusuki lua Yonatane lumate panshi to. Bualu bionsu bidiye muenze lelu ebi, mmuenze ne diambuluisha dia Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku, bena mvita kusungidila Yonatane bua kafu to." 
1Samuel14:46 Shawule kulekela kulondakaja bena Peleshete. Ke bena Peleshete kupingana kuabu. 
1Samuel14:47 Anu Shawule upeta bukalenga mu bena Izrayele, kuluishaye baluishi bende bavua ku nseke yonsu: bena Mowabe, bena Amone, bena Edome, bena mu bukalenge bua Soba, ne bena Peleshete. Miaba yonsu ayi, Shawule uvua anu utshimuna." 
1Samuel14:48 Dituku dikuabu, Shawule kuleja dikima diende. Kutshimunaye bena Amaleke. Ke muvuaye musungidile bena Izrayele mu bianza bia bantu bavua bibe bintu mu ditunga diabu." 
1Samuel14:49 Shawule uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: Yonatane, Ishevi ne Malkishuwa. Uvua kabidi ne bana ba bakaji babidi: wa kumpala uvua Merabe, muakunyi uvua Mikale." 
1Samuel14:50 Mukaji wa Shawule uvua Akinowame, muana wa Akimase. Mfumu uvua ulombola bena mvita ba Shawule, uvua Abnere, muana wa Nere, uvua tatuende mukuabu wa Shawule." 
1Samuel14:51 Bualu Kishe tatuende wa Shawule, ne Nere tatuende wa Abnere, bavua bana ba balume ba Abiyele." 
1Samuel14:52 Matuku onsu avua Shawule mushale mu bukalenga, uvua muluishe bena Peleshete bikole. Nanku misangu yonsu ivua Shawule upeta muntu wa dikima nansha wa mukitshi, uvua umuangata bua kuikalaye muena mvita wende." 
1Samuel15:1 Samuwele kuambila Shawule ne: — Ku kale, Maweja-Nangila uvua muntume bua kukujidila, bua ushale mukalenga wa bantu bende bena Izrayele. Nanku, teleja tshindi musue kukuambila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel15:2 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa tshiluilu tshia bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Ndi muvuluke bionsu bivua bena Amaleke benzela bena Izrayele, pavuabu bapatuke mu bupika mu Ejipitu. Bena Amaleke bavua bajikila bena Izrayele njila." 
1Samuel15:3 Nanku mpindiewu, wewe Shawule, uye kubaluisha, ubabutule ne bintu bionsu bidibu nabi. Kubafuidi luse to. Ushipe bantu ne nyama bionsu: balume, bakaji, bana batoke, ngombe, mikoku, nyama ya tumelu ne ya mpunde.”" 
1Samuel15:4 Shawule kubikidisha bena mvita bende ku Teleme, kutuadijaye kubakenketa ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu. Bena mvita bavua benda ku makasa bavua binunu nkama ibidi. Tusakidile kabidi bantu bakuabu ba bena Yuda binunu dikumi." 
1Samuel15:5 Shawule kuya ne bena mvita abu pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia bena Amaleke. Kualaminaye bena Amaleke mu mikidi ya mayi a mvula, ukeba kubaluisha kabayi banji kudilongolola." 
1Samuel15:6 Ke Shawule kuambila bena Kayine ne: “Umukayi munkatshi mua bena Amaleke, nuye mutantshi mule. Tshiena musue kunukengesha, bu mundi mbakengesha bobu to. Bualu nuenu nuvua bafuile bena Izrayele luse, pavuabu bapatuke mu Ejipitu.” Nanku bena Kayine kumuka muaba uvua bena Amaleke." 
1Samuel15:7 Ke Shawule kutshimuna bena Amaleke, kubipata biangatshile ku Avila too ne ku Shure, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ku Ejipitu." 
1Samuel15:8 Shawule kushipa bantu bonsu, kushiya amu mukalenga wabu Agage. Kumuelaye mu lukanu." 
1Samuel15:9 Shawule ne bena mvita bende bavua bashiye Agage ne muoyi, bashiya kabidi nyama mimpe yonsu ivuabu basungule ku bimuna: ngombe, mikoku, nyama ivua ne mafuta, ne bana ba mikoku. Bavua bashipa amu nyama mibi ivua kayiyi ne diambuluisha to." 
1Samuel15:10 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: 
1Samuel15:11 — Ndi ne kanyinganyinga bua Shawule undi musungule bua kuikalaye mukalenga. Shawule mmumbenge. Kena utumikila mikenji yanyi to. Bualu abu kutonda Samuwele bikole. Kutendelelaye Maweja-Nangila butuku bujima. 
1Samuel15:12 Butshia dinda, Samuwele kuya kumonangana ne Shawule. Kumuambilabu ne: “Shawule mmuye ku Karmele, bua kuimanyika dibue dia kuikala bamuvulukila. Pashishe neatungunuke ne luendu too ne ku Ngilgale. ”" 
1Samuel15:13 Samuwele ufika pabuipi ne Shawule. Shawule kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba! Ndi mukumbaje bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. 
1Samuel15:14 Samuwele kukonka Shawule ne: — Miadi ya mikoku ne ya ngombe indi ngunwua idi ifuma penyi? 
1Samuel15:15 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Bena mvita mbasungule nyama mimpe ya bena Amaleke, bafike nayi muaba ewu, bua kuyilambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Kadi bintu bikuabu bionsu tudi babishipe." 
1Samuel15:16 Samuwele kumukosa ku diyi ne: — Puwa. Ndi musue kukuambila bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila mummanyishe butuku bua lelu. Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Ambaku. 
1Samuel15:17 Samuwele kumuambila ne: — Ku kale uvua mudimone muntu tshianana. Mpindiewu udi mukalenga wa bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele. Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke uvua mukujidile bua wikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. 
1Samuel15:18 Kadi, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumane kukuambila tshiudi ne bua kuenza. Uvua mukutume bua wewe kushipa bena Amaleke, bena buenzayi, bua wewe kuluangana nabu mvita, too ne pabutukabu bonsu bua buenzayi buabu." 
1Samuel15:19 Kuena mutumikile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila bua tshinyi? Udi muangate bintu bia bena Amaleke bua kufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda bua tshinyi? 
1Samuel15:20 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Meme ndi mutumikile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Ndi muenze bionsu bivuaye mungambile. Ndi mushipe bena Amaleke bonsu. Ndi mushiye anu mukalenga wabu Agage, undi mufike nende muaba ewu." 
1Samuel15:21 Kadi pikala bena mvita banyi basungule nyama ivua mimpe mitambe munkatshi mua mikuabu ivuabu bashipe, bavua basungula nyama ayi anu bua kuyilambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe munemu mu Ngilgale." 
1Samuel15:22 Samuwele kukonka Shawule ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi usanka bua milambu ya bungi idibu bamulambula, anyi udi usanka bua mikenji yende idibu batumikila? Milambu kayena imusankisha to. Bualu, kutumikila Maweja-Nangila, kuenza tshidiye muambe, nkupite milambu ya nyama, nansha yoyi ne mafuta a bungi." 
1Samuel15:23 Kadi kubenga kutumikila, nkuenza bualu bubi amu bu mudi kubuka lubuku. Kubenga kuitaba Maweja-Nangila, nkuenza bualu bubi anu bu mudi kutendelela mvidie. Nanku, bu muudi mubenge mua kutumikila mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, wakubengi. Kuakuikala kabidi mukalenga wa bantu bende bena Izrayele to." 
1Samuel15:24 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muenze bibi. Tshiena mutumikile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, tshiena muteleje mibelu yebe wewe. Kadi mvua ne bowa, ntshina bena mvita. Ke pandi muenze bionsu bivua bena mvita bajinga." 
1Samuel15:25 Mpindiewu ndi nkutendakena, umfuile luse bua bubi ebu. Tupingane nebe ku Ngilgale bua meme kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel15:26 Samuwele kuandamuna ne: — Nansha! Tshiena mua kuya nebe to. Bualu udi mubenge kutumikila mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Nanku Maweja-Nangila mmumane kukubenga. Kuakuikala kabidi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele to. 
1Samuel15:27 Samuwele kukudimuka bua kumuka. Kadi Shawule kumukuata kuinshi kua tshinkutu tshivuaye muvuale. Tshinkutu kupandika. 
1Samuel15:28 Ke Shawule kushala ne tshipesa ku bianza. Samuwele kuambila Shawule ne: — Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila upanda bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, ukunyengabu lelu, bua kubupesha muntu mukuabu wa nsongu mukupite wewe." 
1Samuel15:29 Maweja-Nangila udi butumbi bua bena Izrayele. Nanku, kena mua kushima, kena mudi muntu udi lelu wamba bualu mushindu, maloba wamba mukuabu." 
1Samuel15:30 Shawule kumuambila ne: — Ndi mumane kuenza bibi. Kadi ndi nkutendakena ne: unnemekeku kumpala kua bakulu, ne kua bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu. Tupingane nebe bua meme kuya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe." 
1Samuel15:31 Samuwele kuya nende. Shawule kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. 
1Samuel15:32 Ke Samuwele kutuma diyi bua bafike ne Agage, mukalenga wa bena Amaleke. Agage kufika ne disanka bualu uvua wela meji ne: “Ndi mumane kupanda ku lufu.”" 
1Samuel15:33 Kadi Samuwele kuambila Agage ne: “Muela webe wa mvita uvua mushipe bana, bamamu bashale bianza bitupu. Nanku, mamuebe neashale kayi ne muana.” Samuwele kushipa Agage, kumusaya kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila mu Ngilgale." 
1Samuel15:34 Samuwele kupingana ku Rama. Shawule kuya kuende ku Ngibeya. 
1Samuel15:35 Biangatshile diba adi, matuku onsu avua Samuwele ne muoyi, kena mumonangane kabidi ne Shawule to. Samuwele uvua ne kanyinganyinga kakole bualu bua Shawule. Maweja-Nangila uvua unyingalala bua pavuaye musungule Shawule mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Samuel16:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: — Neushale anu ne tshiji musangu mule bua Shawule, pandi meme mumane kumubenga, bua kashadi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele anyi? Angata mafuta, uye nawu. Ndi nkutuma kua Ishayi ku Betleyeme. Bualu ndi musungule mukalenga undi musue, munkatshi mua bana bende ba balume." 
1Samuel16:2 Samuwele kukonka ne: — Nengenze munyi? Pangikala mufike ku Betleyeme, Shawule neamanye bualu ebu. Neanshipe. Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: — Angata muana wa ngombe. Pawafika, newambe ne: ndi mufika bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu." 
1Samuel16:3 Ubikidishe Ishayi ku mulambu awu. Meme Maweja-Nangila nenkuleje tshiudi mua kuenza. Muntu ungikala mukuleje awu, neumujidile mukalenga, bua kungenzelaye mudimu. Amuwele kuitaba, kuya ku Betleyeme. Bakulu ba mu tshimenga bamumona, kupampakanabu bikole. Kuyabu kumuakidila, bamukonka ne: — Udi mufike munemu bua kutuambilaku bualu bua disanka anyi?" 
1Samuel16:4  
1Samuel16:5 Samuwele kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi mufike bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila mulambu. Nanku, nujikije mikiya yonsu inudi nayi, bua tuye nenu. Samuwele kubikidisha kabidi ne Ishayi ne bana bende ba balume, bua bajikije mikiya yabu, badisanga nende ku mulambu." 
1Samuel16:6 Ishayi ne bana bende bamane kufika, Samuwele kumona Eliyabe. Kudiambilaye munda ne: “Bulelela, ke udi Maweja-Nangila musungule ewu.”" 
1Samuel16:7 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: “Kutangidi buimpe bua mpala, nansha bule bua muntu. Meme tshiena mumusungule to. Meme tshiena ntangila, mudi bantu batangila to. Bantu badi batangila amu mpala, ne mushindu udi muntu. Kadi meme ndi ntangila too ne munda mua muntu.”" 
1Samuel16:8 Ke Ishayi kubikidisha Abinadabe, ku-mupitshisha kumpala kua Samuwele, Samuwele kuamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila kena musungule nansha ewu to." 
1Samuel16:9 Ishayi kupitshisha Shama. Kadi Samuwele kuamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila kena musungule nansha ewu to. 
1Samuel16:10 Ishayi kupitshisha bana bende ba balume muanda mutekete kumpala kua Samuwele, Samuwele kumuambila ne: — Ku bana aba, Maweja-Nangila kena musungule muana nansha umue." 
1Samuel16:11 Ke Samuwele kukonka Ishayi ne: — Bana bebe bonsu badi muaba ewu anyi? Ishayi kuandamuna ne: — To! Nkushale anu Davide, muana a mukala, udi ulama mikoku. Samuwele kutuma diyi ne: — Muntu aye kukeba muana awu. Katuena mua kutuadija kudia bia ku mulambu, muana awu kayi muanji kufika." 
1Samuel16:12 Ke Ishayi kubikidisha muana awu. Nsongalume awu uvua ne mubidi mukunze, ne mpala muimpe mutambe, mesu abalakana. Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Samuwele ne: “Ke muana undi musungule ewu. Umujidile bua kuikalaye mukalenga.”" 
1Samuel16:13 Samuwele kuambula mafuta, kuela Davide pa mutu bua kumujidila, bana babu batangile. Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Davide, kushalawu nende biangatshile dituku adi too ne kashidi. Pashishe Samuwele kupingana ku Rama." 
1Samuel16:14 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kumuka kudi Shawule. Maweja-Nangila kutumina Shawule mukishi mubi bua kumukengeshawu. 
1Samuel16:15 Bena mudimu ba Shawule kumuambila ne: — Tudi bamone ne: mukishi mubi udibu bakutumina kudi Maweja-Nangila, udi ukukengesha." 
1Samuel16:16 Nanku, tuma diyi, tuye kukukebela muntu udi mumanye mua kuimba lunkombe. Pikala mukishi mubi mukutulukile, muena lunkombe neakuimbile bua umvue bimpe." 
1Samuel16:17 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi muanyishe. Nkebelayi muntu udi mumanye mua kuimba lunkombe bimpe. Nufike nende kundi." 
1Samuel16:18 Muena mudimu mukuabu kuamba ne: — Ndi mumanye muntu, muana wa Ishayi, muena mu Betleyeme. Udi mumanye mua kuimba lunkombe bimpe. Udi kabidi muntu wa mushinga mukole, mumanye mvita, mumanye mua kuakula ne meji. Udi ne mpala muimpe mutambe. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila udi nende." 
1Samuel16:19 Shawule kutuma bantu bua bambile Ishayi ne: “Ntumina muanebe wa balume Davide, udi ulama mikoku.”" 
1Samuel16:20 Ishayi kuangata nyama wa mpunde, kutekapu mampa, mulondu wa biseba muela maluvu a mvinyo tente, ne muana mbuji. Kupeshaye Davide bintu abi bua kutuadilaye Shawule." 
1Samuel16:21 Anu Davide ufika kua Shawule, kutuadijaye kumuenzela mudimu. Shawule kunanga Davide bikole. Kumupaye mudimu wa kumuambuila bia mvita biende." 
1Samuel16:22 Ke Shawule kutumina Ishayi diyi ne: “Ndi musue bua Davide ashale anu ku mudimu wanyi, bualu ndi mumuanyishe bikole.”" 
1Samuel16:23 Biangatshile musangu awu, pavua mukishi mubi, mutuma kudi Maweja-Nangila, utulukila Shawule, Davide uvua wambula lunkombe, umuimbila. Nanku Shawule uvua umvua bimpe, upeta dikisha, mukishi mubi umuka." 
1Samuel17:1 Bena Peleshete kusangisha bena mvita bua kuya kuluangana. Kudisangishabu mu tshimenga tshia Soko mu Yuda. Kuasabu mitanda yabu mu Efese-Damime, pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Soko ne tshia Azeka." 
1Samuel17:2 Shawule ne bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kudisangisha, kuasa mitanda mu tshibandabanda tshia Ela. Pashishe, kuelabu mualu wa mvita, batangilangane ne bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:3 Nanku bena Peleshete ne bena Izrayele bavua bimane pa mikuna ibidi mitangilangane, tshibandabanda pankatshi." 
1Samuel17:4 Muena mvita mukuabu wa bena Peleshete kupatuka mu mulongu bua kufuna bulobu. Uvua wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngate, dina diende Ngoliyate. Uvua bule bu bua metre isatu." 
1Samuel17:5 Uvua muase tshifulu tshia tshiamu tshikunze ku mutu, muele bitata bia tshiamu tshikunze ku mikolu. Uvua muvuale kazaku ka tshiamu, kikale ne bujitu bua kilo makumi asambombu. Kuelaye difuma dia tshiamu tshikunze ku mukaba uvuaye muela ku diapa." 
1Samuel17:6  
1Samuel17:7 Uvua kabidi ne musongolu wa mutshi, uvua bunene bu bua mutshi wa kukuma nawu madiba, muikale ne lusongu lua tshiamu, lua bujitu bua kilo muanda mutekete ne pa mutu. Muena mudimu wa Ngoliyate uvua wenda kumpala kuende, mumuambuila ngabu." 
1Samuel17:8 Ngoliyate kuimana, kuela mbila kudi bena mvita ba bena Izrayele ne: — Nudi bela mualu wa mvita bua tshinyi? Meme Ngoliyate ndi muena Peleshete. Nuenu nudi bapika ba Shawule. Sungulayi muntu umue munkatshi muenu, afike apa bua tuluangane nende." 
1Samuel17:9 Pikala muntu awu mutshimune, munshipe, tuetu bena Peleshete netushale bapika benu. Kadi pangikala mumutshimune, mumushipe, nuenu bena Izrayele nenushale bapika betu." 
1Samuel17:10 Lelu ndi mbunda bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, ndi musue kumona bukole buabu. Ntuminayi muntu bua tuluangane nende." 
1Samuel17:11 Shawule ne bena mvita bende bonsu, bumvue miaku ya muena Peleshete ayi, kukuatshikabu bowa bunene." 
1Samuel17:12 Davide uvua muana wa Ishayi wa mu diku dia Efrata, musombele mu tshimenga tshia Betleyeme mu Yuda. Ishayi uvua ne bana ba balume muanda mukulu. Tshikondu atshi tshivua Shawule mukalenga, Ishayi uvua mumane kukola mukulakaje." 
1Samuel17:13 Bana basatu ba kumpala ba balume ba Ishayi: Eliyabe, Abinadabe ne Shama, bavua munkatshi mua bena mvita. Bavua baye ne Shawule mu mvita bua kuluangana. Kadi Davide muana a mukala," 
1Samuel17:14  
1Samuel17:15 uvua uya kuenzela Shawule mudimu, kadi uvua upingana misangu mivule ku Betleyeme bua kulama mikoku ya tatuende." 
1Samuel17:16 Matuku makumi anayi majima, Ngoliyate, muena Peleshete, uvua anu wimana kumpala kua bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, dinda ne dilolu." 
1Samuel17:17 Dituku dikuabu, Ishayi kuambila muanende Davide ne: — Angata tshibombi tshia ntete mikanga etshi ne mampa dikumi aa, uye nabi lukasa mu mitanda, muaba udi bana benu." 
1Samuel17:18 Angata kabidi fromaje dikumi eyi, bua kupesha mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita. Neutangile bana benu, ne badi bimpe. Neuntuadile tshintu tshidi tshinjadikila ne: kakuena bualu to." 
1Samuel17:19 Neusangane bana benu mu tshibandabanda tshia Ela, muaba udi Shawule ne bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bonsu baluisha bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel17:20 Butshia dinda, Davide kushiya mikoku yende kudi mulami mukuabu. Kuangataye bintu bivuaye ne bua kuya nabi. Kuyaye muvua tatuende Ishayi mumutumina diyi. Kufikaye mu mitanda diba divu bena mvita bela mualu wa mvita, bela mbila bua kuya ku mvita." 
1Samuel17:21 Nanku bena Izrayele ne bena Peleshete kuela mualu wa mvita, batangilangane." 
1Samuel17:22 Davide kushiya bintu bivuaye nabi kudi muntu uvua ulama bintu bionsu. Kuyaye lukasa muaba uvua bena mvita. Kusanganaye bana babu, kubelaye muoyi." 
1Samuel17:23 Kadi patshivua Davide uyukila ne bana babu, Ngoliyate muena Peleshete wa mu Ngate, kupita kumpala kua bena mvita babu, ufuna, ukana, bu muvuaye wenzenza misangu yonsu. Davide kumvua bionsu abi." 
1Samuel17:24 Bena Izrayele bonsu bamone Ngoliyate, kupingana panyima, bualu bavua bamutshina bikole." 
1Samuel17:25 Kuambilanganabu ne: “Udi mumone muntu ewu! Udi wenza bionsu ebi amu bua kutubunda. Kadi muntu wikale mumutshimune, mumushipe, mukalenga neamunemeshe ne bubanji bua bungi. Neamupe muanende wa bakaji, bua kuikalaye mukajende. Kabidi mu bena Izrayele, mu bena diku dia muntu awu, kabakuikala ne tshilumbu tshia kulambula tshitadi to.”" 
1Samuel17:26 Davide kukonka bena mvita bavua pabuipi nende ne: — Muntu wikale mushipe muena Peleshete ewu bua kusombuela bipendu bidiye upenda bena Izrayele, nebamufute tshinyi? Muena Peleshete ewu, udibu kabayi bateka panshi, upenda bena mvita ba Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi nnganyi mene?" 
1Samuel17:27 Kuandamunabu Davide, bamuambuluila bintu bionsu bivua mukalenga mulaye muntu wikale mutshimuna Ngoliyate." 
1Samuel17:28 Kadi, Eliyabe muanabute, mukulu wa Davide, kumvua muvua Davide wakula ne bena mvita, kufikaye munda, ukonka Davide ne: — Udi mufike kuneku bua tshinyi? Mikoku yebe ayi udi mushile nganyi mu thipela? Ndi mukumanye bimpe. Udi kana ka tshianana, kena lutambishi. Uvua mufike kuneku amu bua kumona mvita!" 
1Samuel17:29 Davide kumukonka ne: — Tshibi tshindi muenze ntshinyi? Tshiena mua kuela lukonku anyi? 
1Samuel17:30 Davide ukoma mukuluende nyima, kutuadija kuyukila ne muena mvita mukuabu. Kutungunukaye ne diebeja malu, wela anu dikonka adi. Muena mvita yonsu uvua anu umuandamuna mushindu umue." 
1Samuel17:31 Bantu bonsu bumvue Davide wakula, kujadikabu ne: bualu ebu mbumutonde bikole. Kuambilabu Shawule. Shawule kubikidisha Davide." 
1Samuel17:32 Ke Davide kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, muntu nansha umue kena mua kutshina muena Peleshete ewu to. Meme nenye bua kuluangana nende." 
1Samuel17:33 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Nansha, kuena mua kuluangana nende to. Utshidi muana mukese. Ngoliyate mmuluanangane mvita kutuadija ku buana buende." 
1Samuel17:34 Davide kuambila kabidi Shawule ne: — Mukalenga pandi ndama mikoku ya tatu, padi nyama wa ntambue nansha wa nkashama, ufikabuakukuatamukoku," 
1Samuel17:35 ndi ndondakaja nyama awu, mmutuuta, mmunyenga mukoku mukana. Padi nyama awu unduisha, ndi mmukuata mu nshingu, mmushipa." 
1Samuel17:36 Ke mumvua nshipa nyama ya ntambue ne ya nkashama nanku. Ke mungenzela muena Peleshete ewu, udibu kabayi bateke panshi. Bualu udi upenda bena mvita ba Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi." 
1Samuel17:37 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumpandishe ku nzadi ya nyama ya ntambue, ne ya nkashama, neampandishe kabidi ku bianza bia muena Peleshete ewu. Shawule kumuambila ne: — Ndaku, Maweja-Nangila ikale nebe." 
1Samuel17:38 Shawule kusombesha Davide bilamba biende bia mvita: kumuashishaye tshifulu tshiende tshia tshiamu tshikunze ku mutu, kumueleshaye kazaku kende ka tshiamu." 
1Samuel17:39 Davide kuasa kabidi muela wa Shawule ku mikaba, mutenteka pa kazaku ka tshiamu. Pashishe kuidikijaye mua kuenda ne bintu abi, kupanga. Bualu kabawa bamulongesha mua kuenda nabi to. Ke Davide kuamba ne: tshiena mua kuenda ne bintu ebi, bualu tshiena muibidile nabi. Nanku kubikopolaye." 
1Samuel17:40 Ke Davide kuambula dikombu diende. Kuyaye ku muelelu wa musulu bua kuangula nsoka itanu, mifmunuke. Kuyelaye mu nsapu wende wa mulami wa mikoku. Pashishe, kuambulaye ndundu wende munene wa kuela nende nsoka, kuyaye kuvua Ngoliyate." 
1Samuel17:41 Ngoliyate ne muntu uvua kumpala kuende mumuambuile ngabu, bavua benda basemena pabuipi ne Davide." 
1Samuel17:42 Ngoliyate utangila Davide, kumupepejaye, bualu Davide utshivua muana mukese, muikale ne mubidi mukunze, ne mpala muimpe mutambe." 
1Samuel17:43 Ngoliyate kuela Davide diyi ne: — Paudi ulua kundi bua kunduisha ne dikombu, udi wela meji ne: meme ndi mbua anyi? Mvidie yonsu ya bena Peleshete ikutshipe!" 
1Samuel17:44 Semena apa, nkushipe, tshitalu tshiebe ntshidishe nyunyi ne nyama ya mu tshisuku." 
1Samuel17:45 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Wewe udi ulua kundi ne muela, musongolu ne difuma. Kadi meme ndi nkuluisha mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa biluilu bia bena Izrayele, uudi upenda." 
1Samuel17:46 Lelu ewu, Maweja-Nangila neakufile mu bianza bianyi. Nenkushipe, nkukosa mutu. Lelu ewu, nendishe nyunyi ne nyama ya mu tshisuku bitalu bia bena Peleshete. Nanku bisamba bionsu nebijadike ne: bena Izrayele badi ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Samuel17:47 Bena Izrayele bonsu nebajadike ne: Maweja-Nangila bua kutshimunaye, kena ukengela muela, nansha musongolu to. Udi mfumu wa mvita eyi. Neanufile nuenu bena Peleshete mu bianza bietu." 
1Samuel17:48 Ngoliyate kusemena kudi Davide, awu kunyema lubilu bua kusambakena ne Ngoliyate." 
1Samuel17:49 Kuambulaye lusoka mu nsapu wende, kuluteka mu ndundu. Kuluasaye Ngoliyate mu mpala, kubuelalu. Ngoliyate kudishinda, mutue mpala panshi." 
1Samuel17:50 Nanku Davide kutshimuna Ngoliyate, kumushipa anu ne ndundu wa nyunyi ne lusoka, kayi ne muela." 
1Samuel17:51 Davide kuya lubilu muaba uvua Ngoliyate, kupatula muela wa Ngoliyate uvua mu tshibubu. Kumukosa mutu. Ke bena Peleshete bamone ne: Davide washipi tshilobu tshietu, kunyemabu lubilu." 
1Samuel17:52 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele ne ba bena Yuda kuela mbila ya mvita, kulondakaja bena Peleshete too ne mu mushiku wa tshimenga tshia Ngate, ne tshia Ekrone. Bitalu bia bena Peleshete bivua bitangalake panshi mu njila wa ku Sharayime, too ne ku tshimenga tshia Ngate ne tshia Ekrone." 
1Samuel17:53 Bena Izrayele kulekela kulondakaja bena Peleshete. Kupinganabu bua kupawula bintu bivua mu mitanda ya bena Peleshete. 
1Samuel17:54 Davide kuambula mutu wa Ngoliyate, kuya nawu ku Yerushalayime. Kadi bia mvita bivua nabi Ngoliyate, muntu wa mpolondu, Davide kubiteka mu ntenta wende." 
1Samuel17:55 Shawule umona ne: Davide wayi kuluangana ne Ngoliyate, kukonkaye Abnere, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita bende, ne: — Abnere, nsongalume ewu mmuana wa nganyi? Abnere kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, tshiena mumanye to." 
1Samuel17:56 Ke mukalenga kuela diyi, wambila Abnere ne: — Enza muebe muonsu, umanye tatuende." 
1Samuel17:57 Nanku, Davide mumane kushipa Ngoliyate, upingana mu mitanda, Abnere kuya kumukeba. Kuyaye nende kudi Shawule. (Davide utshivua anu ne mutu wa Ngoliyate muena Peleshete mu tshianza)." 
1Samuel17:58 Shawule kumukonka ne: — Muananyi, wewe udi muana wa nganyi? Davide kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muana wa muntu webe Ishayi, wa mu Betleyeme." 
1Samuel18:1 Davide ujikija kuyukila ne Shawule, Yonatane, muana wa Shawule, kutuadija kunanga nsongalume awu bikole. Kumunangaye bu mudi muntu udinanga mene." 
1Samuel18:2 Dituku adi, Shawule kulama Davide, kena mumulekela bua kupinganaye kudi tatuende to." 
1Samuel18:3 Kadi bu muvua Yonatane munanga Davide bikole, kutuabu ndondu wa bulunda kashidi." 
1Samuel18:4 Yonatane kuvula tshinkutu tshivuaye muvuale, kutshipesha Davide. Kumupeshaye kabidi bilamba biende bia mvita, muela wa mvita, buta bua miketa, ne mukaba uvuaye muvuale." 
1Samuel18:5 Misangu yonsu, ivua Shawule utuma Davide mu mvita, Davide uvua amu utshimuna. Ke muvua Shawule mumuteke mfumu, mulombodi wa bena mvita bende. Bena mvita bonsu, ne balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga Shawule kusanka bikole bua bualu ebu." 
1Samuel18:6 Pavua bena mvita bafuma ku mvita, Davide mumane kushipa Ngoliyate muena Peleshete, ke bakaji ba mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Izrayele kufika bua kuakidila mukalenga Shawule. Bavua bimba misambu, baja maja, balonda dikasa dia ngoma ne bisanji, bela mbila ya disanka." 
1Samuel18:7 Bavua batuma misambu, bapunguluja, bela mbila ne disanka ne: “Shawule mmushipe baluishi tshinunu. Davide mmushipe binunu makumi ne makumi. ”" 
1Samuel18:8 Shawule uvua ne tshiji tshikole, mufike munda bua musambu awu. Uvua udiambila munda ne: “Badi batumbisha Davide ne: mmushipe bantu binunu makumi ne makumi, meme bantumbisha anu bua tshinunu." 
1Samuel18:9 Tshidi tshishale mpindiewu, mbua kupabu Davide bukalenga ebu!” Biangatshile diba adi, Shawule uvua utangila Davide ne muoyi mubi." 
1Samuel18:10 Butshia dinda, mukishi mubi mutuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu kutulukila Shawule. Kuendakanaye mu nzubu muende bu muntu mupale. Davide uvua umuimbila lunkombe, bu muvuaye wenza misangu yonsu. Shawule uvua mukuate difuma diende mu tshianza." 
1Samuel18:11 Diakamue Shawule kufuna ne difuma, udiambila ne: “Ndi mbambila Davide ku tshimana eku.” Shawule kuela difuma misangu ibidi, Davide kupanduka." 
1Samuel18:12 Shawule kutshina Davide. Bualu uvua mujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila mmumane kumbenga, musungule amu Davide." 
1Samuel18:13 Ke Shawule kumusha Davide pabuipi nende. Kumutekaye mfumu wa tshisumbu tshia bena mvita bende. Biangatshile diba adi, Davide uvua anu mu mvita, ulombola bena mvita." 
1Samuel18:14 Nanku, Davide uvua ne diakalenga mu midimu yonsu iwaye wenza, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua umuambuluisha." 
1Samuel18:15 Pavua Shawule umvua ne: Davide udi ne diakalenga mu midimu yonsu iwaye wenza, uvua utshina Davide bikole." 
1Samuel18:16 Kadi bena Izrayele bonsu ne bena Yuda bavua banange Davide bikole. Bualu Davide uvua ubalombola bimpe mu mvita. 
1Samuel18:17 Shawule kudiambila munda ne: “Meme tshiena musue kushipa Davide to. Bena Peleshete nebamushipe.” Nanku, Shawule kuambila Davide ne: — Merabe, muananyi wa bakaji muanabute, nyeye ewu. Pawikala mungenzela mudimu ne dikima, pawikala muluangana mvita mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkupesha muananyi ewu bua ikale mukajebe." 
1Samuel18:18 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, meme ndi muntu tshianana. Bena diku dia tatu, ne bena nzubu wetu, badi anu bantu tshianana. Kadi, meme nengikale muku wa mukalenga mushindu kaayi?" 
1Samuel18:19 Kadi, tshikondu tshivuabu ne bua kufila Merabe kudi Davide bua ikale mukajende, Shawule kufila muanende awu kudi Adriyele, wa mu Abele-Mekola." 
1Samuel18:20 Kadi, Mikale, muana wa bakaji mukuabu wa Shawule, kunanga Davide bikole. Kuambilabu Shawule bualu ebu, kusankaye bikole." 
1Samuel18:21 Uvua udiambila munda ne: “Ndi musue kufila Mikale kudi Davide bua ikale mukajende. Nanku, Mikale neikale bu buteyi kudi Davide, bua kumushipabu kudi bena Peleshete.” (Nanku misangu ibidi, Shawule uvua anu wambila Davide bua ikale muku wende.)" 
1Samuel18:22 Shawule kuambila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: — Nuyukile ne Davide mu musokoku. Numuambile ne: Mukalenga Shawule udi ukuanyisha bikole. Tuetu balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende tudi bakunange bikole. Nanku, itabe mpindiewu bua wikale muku wa mukalenga Shawule." 
1Samuel18:23 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Shawule kuambila Davide bionsu abi. Kubakonkaye ne: — Bua meme muntu mupele, tshiyi ne tshindi natshi, kushala muku wa mukalenga, nuenu nudi bamone ne: mbualu bukese anyi?" 
1Samuel18:24 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga kuya kuambila mukalenga bivua Davide muambe. 
1Samuel18:25 Ke Shawule kubatuma ne: — Ambilayi Davide ne: “Mukalenga Shawule kena ukulomba lupetu lua tshibidilu bua dibaka edi to. Kadi, udi ukulomba anu makoba lukama a misosu ya bena Peleshete, bua kusombuelaye baluishi bende. ” Shawule uvua wela meji ne: ke mudibu mua kushipa Davide kudi bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel18:26 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga kuambila Davide bionsu abi. Davide kuitaba bivuabu bamulomba bua kuikalaye muku wa mukalenga. Matuku avua mukalenga Shawule mumukosela kaayi manji kukumbana," 
1Samuel18:27 Davide ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu kuya mu mvita, kushipa bena Peleshete nkama ibidi. Davide kuangata makoba a misosu yabu, kuya nawu kua Shawule bua baabale bungi buawu, bua kushalaye muku wende. Ke Shawule kupesha Davide muanende wa bakaji Mikale, bua ikale mukajende." 
1Samuel18:28 Shawule mumane kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila udi ne Davide bulelela, kabidi Mikale muananyi wa bakaji, mmunange Davide bikole," 
1Samuel18:29 kumutshinaye bikole bipite, kushalaye nende lukuna kashidi." 
1Samuel18:30 Tshikondu atshi, bamfumu ba bena Peleshete kuya mu mvita bua kuluangana ne bena Izrayele. Kadi mu mvita yonsu, Davide uvua upete anu tshipeta tshimpe, tshipite tshia balombodi ba bena mvita ba Shawule bakuabu bonsu. Ke muvuaye mupete lumu lunene kudi bantu." 
1Samuel19:1 Shawule kumanyisha muanende Yonatane, ne balombodi bonsu ba bukalenga buende meji avuaye muele bua kushipa Davide. Kadi bu muvua Yonatane munange Davide bikole," 
1Samuel19:2 kumuambilaye ne: — Tatu wanyi Shawule, udi ukeba kukushipa. Nanku, maloba dinda, wikale mudimuke bikole. Uye kusokoma muaba muimpe, usomba anu muaba awu." 
1Samuel19:3 Nempatuke ne tatu bua kuya nende ku budimi, muaba uwikala musokome awu. Nenyukile ne tatu bualu buebe. Pangikala mumvue mudiye wamba, nenkumanyishe." 
1Samuel19:4 Yonatane mumane kutumbisha Davide kudi tatuende Shawule bua malu mimpe a Davide, kumuambilaye kabidi ne: — Wewe mukalenga, kuena mua kuenzela muntu webe Davide bibi to. Bualu Davide kena muanji kukuenzela bibi to. Bionsu bidiye wenza bidi anu bua kukuambuluisha wewe." 
1Samuel19:5 Uvua mua kufua mu mvita iwaye uluangana ne Ngoliyate muena Peleshete. Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha bena Izrayele, kutshimunabu bena Peleshete bikole. Wewe uvua mumone bionsu abi, wewe kusanka bikole. Kadi mpindiewu, udi musue kupia tshibawu, kumatshisha mashi a muntu udi kayi ne bualu panshi bua tshinyi? Udi ukeba kushipa Davide kayi ne tshidiye muenze bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel19:6 Shawule kumvua mibelu ya Yonatane. Kuambaye ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: kabena mua kushipa Davide to." 
1Samuel19:7 Ke Yonatane kuya kukeba Davide. Kumuambilaye bionsu bivuabu bayukila abi, kuyaye ne Davide kudi Shawule. Davide kutuadija kabidi mudimu pabuipi ne Shawule, bu muvuaye wenza pa tshibidilu." 
1Samuel19:8 Mvita kutuadija kabidi. Davide kuya kuluangana ne bena Peleshete, kubatshimunaye. Kunyemabu Davide." 
1Samuel19:9 Dituku dikuabu, mukishi mubi mutuma kudi Maweja-Nangila, kutulukila Shawule, pawaye mu nzubu muende ne difuma mu tshianza. Pavua Davide wimbila Shawule lunkombe," 
1Samuel19:10 mutantshi mukese, Shawule kuela Davide difuma, bua kumubambakaja ku tshimana. Kadi, difuma kupanga Davide, kukuata mu tshimana. Davide kunyema muikala amu katakata. Butuku abu," 
1Samuel19:11 Shawule kutuma bantu bua balame nzubu wa Davide, bua kumushipa dinda. Kadi, Mikale, mukaji wa Davide, kuambila Davide ne: — Wewe kuyi munyeme butuku ebu, malaba badi bakushipa." 
1Samuel19:12 Ke Mikale kupatula Davide pa dididishi. Kunyemaye bua kushala ne muoyi. 
1Samuel19:13 Pashishe Mikale kuambula lupingu lua mvidie wabu wa mu nzubu, kululadika pa bulalu bua Davide. Kuangataye tshilamba tshia boya bua mbuji tshidi tshijika tumue, kutshilembelejaye ku mutu wa bulalu. Kubuikilaye lupingu mbulankete." 
1Samuel19:14 Bantu bavua Shawule mutume, bamane kufika bua kukuata Davide, Mikale kubambila ne: — Davide udi usama." 
1Samuel19:15 Shawule kutuma bantu abu musangu muibidi ne: — Pinganayi, nuye kudimuena Davide nkayenu. Nufike nende, nansha yeye mu bulalu, bua mmushipe!" 
1Samuel19:16 Bantu bavua mukalenga Shawule mutume kupingana kua Davide. Kubuelabu mu nzubu, kusanganabu amu lupingu lua mvidie pa bulalu ne tshilamba tshidi tshijika tumue tshilembeleja ku mutu wa bulalu." 
1Samuel19:17 Shawule kukonka Mikale ne: — Udi munshime nenku bua tshinyi? Udi mulekele muluishi wanyi unyema bua tshinyi? Mikale kuandamuna ne: — Bualu Davide uvua mungambile ne: “Undekele, nnyeme! Tshianana ndi nkushipa!”" 
1Samuel19:18 Ke muvua Davide munyema. Kuyaye kudi Samuwele ku Rama. Kumuambilaye bionsu bivua Shawule mumuenzele abi. Pashishe kuyabu kusomba bonsu babidi ku Nayote. 
1Samuel19:19 Kuambilabu Shawule ne: Davide udi ku Nayote pabuipi ne Rama. 
1Samuel19:20 Shawule kutuma kabidi bantu bua kukuata Davide. Bantu abu bamone tshisumbu tshia bambi ne mfumuabu Samuwele, bikale baja maja, bela mbila, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kubatulukila. Kutuadijabu kuja maja, kuela mbila." 
1Samuel19:21 Anu Shawule umvua lumu alu, kutuma bantu bakuabu bua kukuata Davide. Kadi bantu abu bafike, kutuadijabu amu kuja maja, bela mbila. Nanku, Shawule kutuma tshisumbu tshia bantu tshisatu. Bantu abu, kuenza amu mushindu umue." 
1Samuel19:22 Pashishe Shawule nkayende kudiyila ku Rama. Mumane kufika ku tshiina tshia mayi tshinene tshia Seku, kukonkaye ne: — Samuwele ne Davide badi penyi? Kumuandamunabu ne: — Badi ku Nayote pabuipi ne Rama." 
1Samuel19:23 Shawule kuya ku Nayote. Patshivuaye mu njila, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumutulukila. Kutuadijaye kuja maja, wela mbila too ne pafikilaye ku Nayote." 
1Samuel19:24 Shawule kuvula bilamba bu muvua bambi bakuabu benza. Kujaye maja, wela mbila, muaba uvua Samuwele. Pashishe kufuaye tshipuka, muikale butaka. Kushalaye nanku munya mujima too ne butuku. Ke padi bantu bashala belangana lusumuinu ne: “Kadi Shawule kabidi ukadi muambi anyi? ”" 
1Samuel20:1 Davide kumuka ku Nayote pabuipi ne Rama, kuya kudi Yonatane, muana wa Shawule, umukonka ne: — Mbualu bubi kaayi bundi muenze? Ntshilema kaayi tshindi muenzele tatuebe? Shawule udi ukeba kunshipa." 
1Samuel20:2 Yonatane kuandamuna ne: — Nansha kakese. Kuena mua kulua to. Tatu kena muanji kuenza bualu nansha bumue, kayi muanji kubungambila. Kadi, uvua munsokoke bualu buudi wamba abu bua tshinyi? Kabiena mua kuenzeka to." 
1Samuel20:3 Davide kuambila Yonatane ne: — Ndi nditshipa, nkujadikila ne: tatuebe udi unkebela lufu! Kadi, tatuebe mmumanye ne: meme Davide ndi mulunda webe. Ke padiye wamba ne: Ki mbimpe bua Yonatane amanye bualu ebu to. Bualu neanyingalale bikole. Nanku, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne bu muudi wewe Yonatane ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: nkushala anu katupa kakese bua tatuebe kunshipa." 
1Samuel20:4 Ke Yonatane kukonka Davide ne: — Udi musue nkuenzele tshinyi? 
1Samuel20:5 Davide kumuandamuna ne: — Malaba ne kuikala tshibilu tshia dibala dia ngondu mupiamupia. Meme mvua ne bua kuikala ku didia dia tshibilu atshi didi mukalenga mulongolola. Kadi, anyisha bua meme kumuka malaba, ne dituku didi dilonda. Nennye kusokoma mu tshisuku too ne ku dilolu dia dituku dibidi adi." 
1Samuel20:6 Padi tatuebe umona ne: meme tshienapu to, neumuambile ne: Davide mmundombe dianyisha bua kuya lukasa ku Betleyeme mu tshimenga tshiabu tshimulela, bua kudisangisha ne bena diku diabu bonsu, ku mulambu wa ku tshidimu tshionsu." 
1Samuel20:7 Pikala tatuebe Shawule muitabe, umanye ne: kakuena bualu. Tshiena mfua to. Kadi, pikalaye mufike munda, neumanye ne: tatuebe mmumane kujadika bua kunshipa." 
1Samuel20:8 Nanku, wewe undeje muudi munnange. Bualu tudi batue nebe ndondu wa bulunda mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Pangikala muenze bualu bubi bua mushindu kaayi, unshipe wewe nkayebe pa mutu pa kumfila kudi tatuebe Shawule." 
1Samuel20:9 Yonatane kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena mua kukufila kudi tatu nansha kakese! Kadi ndi nditshipa ne: pangikala mumvue ne: tatu mmumane kujadika bua kukuenzela bibi, neukumanyishe." 
1Samuel20:10 Davide kumukonka ne: — Pikala tatuebe mubandamune bibi, mukukanyine, neutume nganyi bua kungambilaye?" 
1Samuel20:11 Yonatane kumuambila ne: — Luaku, tupatuke pambelu. Nanku, kuyabu bonsu mu mpata." 
1Samuel20:12 Yonatane kuambila Davide kabidi ne: — Mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi nkulaya ne: malaba nansha dituku didi dilonda, anu pa diba ditudi nebe edi, nenkonke tatu bua meme kumanya meji adi munda muende. Pikala tatu kayi ne bualu, meme tshiena nkumanyisha bualu to." 
1Samuel20:13 Kadi, pikalaye musue kukuenzela bibi, pangikala tshiyi mukumanyishe, Maweja-Nangila annyoke ne dinyoka dikole. Diba adi nenganyishe bua wewe kuya. Neuye bimpe kabayi bakuatshisha to. Ndi njinga ne: Maweja-Nangila ikale nebe muvuaye ne tatu wanyi Shawule." 
1Samuel20:14 Kunyima kua matuku, pangikala anu ne muoyi, wewe Davide ungenzele bimpe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila bua nshale ne muoyi." 
1Samuel20:15 Tshikondu tshidi Maweja-Nangila ubutula baluishi bebe pa buloba, ku umue ku umue, wafuilaku kabidi ndelanganyi yanyi luse." 
1Samuel20:16 Ke Yonatane kutua ndondu wa bulunda ne Davide, kabidi ne bena nzubu wa Davide, ubambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila nkayende asombuele bena lukuna ba Davide. ”" 
1Samuel20:17 Yonatane kuambila kabidi Davide bua aditshipe bua kujadika mudiye munange Yonatane. Bualu Yonatane uvua munange Davide ne muoyi mujima. 
1Samuel20:18 Yonatane kuamba kabidi ne: — Malaba, nebamone ne wewe Davide kuena mu tshibilu tshia dibala dia ngondu mupiamupia to. Bualu ku mesa, nkuasa webe neashale munda mutupu." 
1Samuel20:19 Dituku didi dilonda upueka too ne ku muaba uuvua musokome dituku dikuabu. Wimane pabuipi ne dibue dia Ezele. 
1Samuel20:20 Meme Yonatane, nengele miketa isatu luseke alu, bu udi ukeba kuasa tshintu." 
1Samuel20:21 Pashishe nentume muana muena mudimu wanyi, bua kukeba miketa ayi. Pangambila muena mudimu ne: “Tangila, miketa kayena kule to, pingana uyangule,” neujadike ne: kakuena bualu to. Diba adi udi mua kupingana bualu kakuena njiwu to. Ndi nkujadikila bualu ebu, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel20:22 Kadi, pangambila muena mudimu ne: “Miketa idi kule kupita,” wewe ulunguluke, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmusue bua wewe kuya." 
1Samuel20:23 Nanku ndondu wa bulunda utudi batue nebe, anu Maweja-Nangila nkayende atuambuluishe bua tuetu kumukumbaja kashidi." 
1Samuel20:24 Davide kuya kusokoma mu madimi. Dituku dia tshibilu tshia dibala dia ngondu mupiamupia, dilolu, mukalenga Shawule kusomba ku mesa bua kudia." 
1Samuel20:25 Bu pa tshibidilu, uvua musombe mu nkuasa uvuabu bamulongoluela pabuipi ne tshimana. Abnere, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita, kusomba ku luseke lua Shawule. Yonatane kusomba mutangilangane ne Shawule. Kadi, nkuasa wa Davide uvua mutupu." 
1Samuel20:26 Dituku adi, Shawule kena muebeje bualu to. Uvua wela meji ne: Davide kena mufike, bualu udi mua kuikala ne mikiya ya mu mpukapuka." 
1Samuel20:27 Kadi, dituku dibidi dia tshibilu, Shawule umona kabidi mu nkuasa wa Davide mutupu, kamuyi muntu, kukonkaye Yonatane ne: — Davide kena mufike ku didia dia tshibilu makelela ne lelu bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel20:28 Yonatane kuandamuna ne: — Davide uvua mundombe bikole bua kuyaye ku Betleyeme, ungambila ne:" 
1Samuel20:29 “Yonatane, ndi nkulomba bua meme kuya ku Betleyeme. Tudi ne mulambu ne bena nzubu wetu. Mukuluanyi mmutumine diyi bua ngikale muaba awu. Pangikala mulunda webe, wanyisha bua meme kuya ku Betleyeme bua kumonangana ne bana betu.” Ke padi Davide kayi mufike ku biakudia bia tshibilu biudi mulongolole mu nzubu muebe." 
1Samuel20:30 Shawule kufikila Yonatane munda bikole, umupenda ne: — Kana kalela kudi mbua! Ndi mumanye ne: udi musungule Davide, muana ewu wa Ishayi, bua kuikalaye mulunda webe. Kadi umanye ne: wewe ne mamuebe, bundu nebunukuate." 
1Samuel20:31 Kadi, teleja bimpe. Patshidi mulumiana ewu, muana wa Ishayi ne muoyi, umanye ne: kuena mua kujadika ne newikale mukalenga to. Nanku utume diyi, bakuate Davide, bafike nende apa, bualu udi ne bua kufua." 
1Samuel20:32 Yonatane kukonka ne: — Udi ne bua kufua bua tshinyi? Tshidiye muenze tshibi ntshinyi? 
1Samuel20:33 Shawule kuela difuma bua kuasa Yonatane. Nanku, Yonatane kumanya ne: tatuende Shawule mmupangidike bulelela bua kushipa Davide." 
1Samuel20:34 Kujukaye ku mesa ne tshiji tshikole, kushiyaye bivuaye udia. Dituku adi dibidi dia tshibilu, Yonatane kena mudie tshintu nansha tshimue to. Bualu uvua ne dipampakana bua Davide uvuabu bapenda bikole kudi Shawule." 
1Samuel20:35 Butshia dinda, Yonatane kuya dinda mu tshisuku, muaba uvuabu bambilangane ne Davide. Bavua ne muana muena mudimu wende." 
1Samuel20:36 Yonatane kuambila muena mudimu wende ne: — Nyema, uye kumpala, bua wangula miketa indi ngela eyi. Muena mudimu kuya. Yonatane kuela muketa bikole bua kupitawu muena mudimu." 
1Samuel20:37 Patshivua muena mudimu uya muaba uvua muketa mumate, Yonatane kumuambila ne: — Mukete utshidi kumpala kuebe mutantshi mule." 
1Samuel20:38 Nyema kolesha, kuimanyi to. Muena mudimu kuangula muketa. Kupinganaye nawu kudi mfumuende Yonatane." 
1Samuel20:39 Kadi kavua mumvue bualu to. Anu Yonatane ne Davide ke bavua bumvue. 
1Samuel20:40 Yonatane kupeshaye muena mudimu buta buende ne miketa. Pashishe, kumutuminaye diyi bua aye nabi mu tshimenga." 
1Samuel20:41 Muena mudimu mumane kuya, Davide kupatuka muaba uvuaye musokome, kuinshi kua dibue. Kutuaye mpala panshi misangu isatu kumpala kua Yonatane. Pashishe, kupukilanganabu, badila muadi bikole." 
1Samuel20:42 Ke Yonatane kuambila Davide ne: — Uye bimpe. Kadi uvuluke ndondu wa bulunda utudi batue nebe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, tuamba ne: “Anu Maweja-Nangila nkayende atuambuluishe bua tukumbaje ndondu ewu nebe kashidi, too ne ku ndelanganyi yetu.”" 
1Samuel21:1 Pashishe Davide kutungunuka ne luendu. Yonatane kupingana mu tshimenga. 
1Samuel21:2 Davide kuya ku Nobe, kumutuangaji Akimeleke. Akimeleke kuya kumuakidila ne bowa, umukonka ne: — Davide, muudi mufike apa anu nkayebe, kuyi ne muntu mukuabu, mbishi?" 
1Samuel21:3 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga Shawule mmuntume, kadi mmungambile ne: “Kuambidi muntu nansha umue bualu bundi nkutumina.” Nanku, bantu batudi nabu, ndi mumane kubambila bua tuetu kusambakena muaba mukuabu." 
1Samuel21:4 Kadi, mpindiewu, udiku ne tshintu tshia kudia anyi? Umpesheku mampa atanu, nansha tshiakudia tshikuabu tshiudi natshi." 
1Samuel21:5 Mutuangaji Akimeleke kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena ne mampa makuabu muaba ewu to, anu adibu bamane kujidila. Kadindi mua kukupa mampa aa anu pikala bantu baudi nabu kabayi babuelele bakaji mu nzubu matuku aa to." 
1Samuel21:6 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Bulelela, misangu yonsu patudi mu luendu lua mushindu ewu, badi anu batukandika bua kubuelela bakaji mu nzubu. Kadi pandi nya mu mvita, bia mvita bidibu nabi kudi bantu batudi nabu, bidi anu bijidila. Nansha luendu elu kaluyi lua tshijila, kadi lelu, luendu elu ludi anu lua tshijila, bualu bia kuluangana nabi mvita mbia tshijila." 
1Samuel21:7 Ke mutuangaji Akimeleke kupesha Davide mampa avuabu bamane kujidila, bualu kavua ne mampa makuabu to. Mampa awu bavua bamane kualambula Maweja-Nangila, pashishe baumushe mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kupingaja mampa makuabu mapiamapia." 
1Samuel21:8 Dituku adi, muena mudimu wa Shawule uvua mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, bua kukumbaja dilaya divuaye nadi. Muntu awu uvua muena Edome, dina diende Doweje. Uvua ne bukole bupite balami bakuabu ba mikoku ba mukalenga Shawule." 
1Samuel21:9 Davide kukonka mutuangaji Akimeleke ne: — Muaba ewu, kuenaku ne difuma nansha muela anyi? Bu muvua mukalenga Shawule muntume lukasa lukasa, tshivua ne mushindu wa kuangata muela wanyi, nansha tshintu tshikuabu tshia mvita to." 
1Samuel21:10 Mutuangaji Akimeleke kuandamuna ne: — Muela udi muaba ewu udi anu wa Ngoliyate, muena Peleshete uuvua mutshimune mu tshibandabanda tshia Ela. Muela awu udi panyima pa bilamba bia tshijila bia mutuangaji, mubuikila mu tshinkutu. Pawikala nawu dijinga uwangate. Ke tshintu tshia mvita tshimuepele tshitudi natshi. Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mpeshayi muela awu, bualu tshiena mua kupeta tshintu tshikuabu tshia mvita tshipite muela awu to." 
1Samuel21:11 Anu dituku adi, Davide kutungunuka ne luendu, unyema Shawule. Kuyaye ku nzubu kua Akishe, mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngate." 
1Samuel21:12 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Akishe kuambila mukalenga wabu ne: — Muntu wawa kena Davide mukalenga wa mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele anyi? Bakaji bavua bamuimbila misambu, bamujila maja bamba ne: “Shawule uvua mushipe baluishi tshinunu, kadi Davide mmushipe baluishi binunu makumi ne makumi! ”" 
1Samuel21:13 Miaku ayi kutonda Davide bikole, kutshinaye mukalenga Akishe." 
1Samuel21:14 Davide kuenza anu kumpala kua bena Peleshete bu muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi. Kuendakanaye munkatshi muabu amu bu muntu mupale, wenda ufunda miaku ku biibi bia ku tshimenga, mate apueka ku miedi." 
1Samuel21:15 Mukalenga Akishe kuambila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: — Nudi bamone ne: muntu ewu mmupale! Kadi nudi bamufite kundi bua thinyi? 
1Samuel21:16 Meme tshiena ne bapale bakumbane bua nuenu kumpesha kabidi ewu bua kuntatshishaye ne bupale buende anyi? Mupale ewu kafiki ku nzubu kuanyi to! 
1Samuel22:1 Ke Davide kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Ngate, kunyemenaye mu lubuebue lua Adulame. Bana babu ne Davide, ne bena diende bonsu, kumvuabu ne: Davide udi mu lubuebue alu. Kuyabu kudisangisha nende." 
1Samuel22:2 Bantu bakuabu bu nkama inayi, bavua ne bilumbu, nansha bavua ne mabanza, nansha bavua babenga bulongolodi bua ditunga, kudisangisha muaba uvua Davide. Davide kushala mfumuabu." 
1Samuel22:3 Davide kumuka mu lubuebue lua Adulame, kuya ku Mispa mu Mowabe. Kuambila mukalenga wa bena Mowabe ne: — Anyisha bua tatu wanyi ne mamu wanyi balue kuasa munemu, too ne pangamanya tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue kungenzela." 
1Samuel22:4 Davide kuya ne baledi bende mu lubanza lua mukalenga wa bena Mowabe. Kushalabu mu lubanza amu matuku onsu avua Davide munyemena mu lubuebue. 
1Samuel22:5 Dituku dikuabu, muambi Ngade kuambila Davide ne: — Kushadi kabidi ku lubuebue elu luudi munyemena to. Pingana mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Nanku, Davide kumuka kuya mu ditu dia Erete." 
1Samuel22:6 Shawule kumvua lumu ne: bakumona Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu. Dituku adi, mukalenga Shawule uvua usomba ku Ngibeya, muinshi mua mutshi wa kampanga nzevu uvuabu bakuna pa kakuna. Uvua ne difuma mu tshianza. Bena mudimu bende bonsu bavua bimana pabuipi nende." 
1Samuel22:7 Ke Shawule kubambila ne: — Nuenu bena Binyamine, telejayi! Muana ewu wa Ishayi, neanupeshe bonsu bintu bindi meme Shawule munupe anyi? Neanupeshe madimi ne mionji ya maluvu a mvinyo anyi? Davide neanuteke balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mvita bende anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
1Samuel22:8 Kadi, nuenu bonsu nudi bangelela meji mabi bua tshinyi? Muntu nansha umue kena mummanyisheku ne: muananyi Yonatane mmutue ndondu wa bulunda ne Davide. Muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kena mummanyishe mudi muananyi Yonatane usonsola Davide bua antekele buteyi, bu mudiye muenze lelu!" 
1Samuel22:9 Doweje, muena Edome, uvua munkatshi mua bena mudimu ba Shawule, kumuambilaye ne: — Dituku dikuabu, mvua mumone muana wa Ishayi, ufika ku Nobe kudi mutuangaji Akimeleke, muana wa Akitube." 
1Samuel22:10 Mutuangaji Akimeleke kukonka Maweja-Nangila bua kumanya tshivua Davide ne bua kuenza. Pashishe kupeshaye Davide biakudia, kumupesha kabidi ne muela wa Ngoliyate, muena Peleshete." 
1Samuel22:11 Mukalenga Shawule kutuma bantu ku Nobe bua kukeba mutuangaji Akimeleke ne bena nzubu wende bonsu, bavua benza mudimu wa butuangaji. Kufikabu bonsu bua kudileja kudi mukalenga." 
1Samuel22:12 Shawule kuambila Akimeleke ne: — Wewe, muana wa Akitube, teleja. Mutuangaji Akimeleke, kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga." 
1Samuel22:13 Mukalenga Shawule kumukonka ne: — Wewe ne muana wa Ishayi, nudi bangelela meji mabi bua tshinyi? Wewe uvua mupeshe muana wa Ishayi biakudia, mumupeshe kabidi ne muela. Pashishe uvua mukonke Mvidi Mukulu bua Davide kuntombokela, kunteya bu mudiye muenze lelu!" 
1Samuel22:14 Akimeleke kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, munkatshi mua bena mudimu bebe, mudiku muntu mukuabu udi mukulamate bu mudi Davide anyi? Davide udi muku webe, kabidi udi mfumu wa bena mvita badi bakulama. Bantu bonsu badi mu nzubu muebe, badi bamutumbisha bikole." 
1Samuel22:15 Dituku adi, dindi mukonke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu bualu bua Davide, ki mmusangu wa kumpala to. Kadi meme tshiena mukuelele meji mabi to! Wewe, lekela kumbanda meme ne bena mu nzubu muanyi. Bualu meme tshivua mumanye bualu ebu to." 
1Samuel22:16 Mukalenga Shawule kuambila mutuangaji Akimeleke ne: — Wewe ne bena mu nzubu webe nenufue bonsu. 
1Samuel22:17 Ke mukalenga kuambila bena mvita bende bavua bamulame, bimane eku ne eku, ne: Shipayi batuangaji ba Maweja-Nangila aba tumone, bualu bavua bambuluisha Davide. Bavua bamanya ne: Davide mmunyeme. Kadi kabena bammanyisha to. Kadi, ku bena mvita ba Shawule bavua bamulame, muntu nansha umue kavua musue kulenga batuangaji ba Maweja-Nangila bua kubashipa." 
1Samuel22:18 Ke, mukalenga Shawule kuambila Doweje, muena Edome, ne: — Wewe, shipa batuangaji aba. Doweje kusemena, kudishipela yeye batuangaji. Dituku adi, Doweje uvua mushipe bantu balume makumi muanda mukulu ne batanu, bavua ne tshibidilu tshia kuvuala bilamba bia tshijila." 
1Samuel22:19 Kadi mu tshimenga tshia Nobe tshia batuangaji abu, Shawule kushipesha kabidi bantu bakuabu bonsu: balume, bakaji, bana ne bana ba pambidi, too ne bimuna: ngombe, mpunde, mikoku ne mbuji." 
1Samuel22:20 Anu muntu umue Abiyatare, muana wa mutuangaji Akimeleke, kabidi muikulu wa Akitube, kupandukaye. Kunyemaye, kuya kudi Davide." 
1Samuel22:21 Abiyatare kuambila Davide ne: Shawule mmushipe batuangaji ba Maweja-Nangila. 
1Samuel22:22 Davide kumuambila ne: — Dituku adi, mvua mumone Doweje, muena Edome, muikale ku Nobe. Mvua anu mumanye ne: Doweje neambile Shawule malu onsu. Nanku, meme Davide ndi ne tshilumbu tshia lufu lua bena nzubu wenu bonsu." 
1Samuel22:23 Kadi mpindiewu, usombe anu muaba undi ewu. Kutshinyi to. Anu muluishi wanyi Shawule, udi ukeba kunshipa, ke udi ukeba kukushipa wewe kabidi. Patudi nebe, kakuena tshidi mua kukuenzekela to." 
1Samuel23:1 Dituku dikuabu, kuambilabu Davide ne: Bena Peleshete badi baluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, bibamu ntete ya kuenza bukula idi bantu bashala nayi." 
1Samuel23:2 Ke Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi ne bua kuluisha bena Peleshete aba anyi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ubaluishe! Nanku neusungidile bena Keyila." 
1Samuel23:3 Bantu bavua Davide nabu, kumuambila ne: — Tangila, munemu mu bena Yuda, tudi bamane kuikala ne bowa! Kadi, tuetu baya mu tshimenga tshia Keyila bua kuluisha bena Peleshete, nebikale bibi bitambe." 
1Samuel23:4 Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila tshiakabidi, Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Juka, uye mu tshimenga tshia Keyila! Nemfile bena Peleshete mu bianza biebe." 
1Samuel23:5 Nanku, Davide ne bavuaye nabu, kuyabu mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, kuluisha bena Peleshete. Kubatshimunabu, kushipabu bantu ba bungi ba kudibu. Kunyengabu bimuna biabu. Ke muvua Davide musungidile bena mu tshimenga tshia Keyila nanku." 
1Samuel23:6 Tshikondu tshivua Abiyatare, muana wa mutuangaji Akimeleke, munyemena kudi Davide mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, uvua mufike ne bintu bia tshijila bidi biambuluisha bua kukonka Maweja-Nangila malu." 
1Samuel23:7 Shawule kumvua lumu ne: Davide mmumane kubuela mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, kuambaye ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wafidi Davide mu bianza bianyi, bualu Davide padiye mubuele mu tshimenga tshidi ne biibi bikole, mmubuele mu buteyi." 
1Samuel23:8 Shawule kubikidisha bena mvita bende bonsu bua kuya kuluisha Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu mu Keyila. 
1Samuel23:9 Davide kumvua lumu ne: Shawule mmumuelele tshifufu tshibi. Nanku, kutumaye diyi bua mutuangaji Abiyatare afike ne bintu bia tshijila bua kukonkabu Mvidi Mukulu bualu abu." 
1Samuel23:10 Pashishe Davide kukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ndi mumvue lumu ne: Shawule udi udilongolola bua kufika munemu mu Keyila, bua kubutula tshimenga etshi bualu buanyi meme." 
1Samuel23:11 Kadi, pikala Shawule mufike bua kuluisha tshimenga, bu mundi mumvue lumu emu, bena tshimenga tshia Keyila nebanufile mu bianza bia Shawule anyi? Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ndi nkusengelela ne: ungandamuneku. Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Shawule neafike." 
1Samuel23:12 Davide kukonka kabidi ne: — Meme ne bantu bandi nabu, bena tshimenga tshia Keyila nebatufile kudi Shawule anyi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, nebanufile kudi Shawule." 
1Samuel23:13 Ke Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu bu nkama isambombu, kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, kuya benda balalakana mu njila. Shawule kumvua lumu ne: Davide katshiena mu tshimenga tshia Keyila to, mmumane kunyema. Nanku kulekelaye mvita." 
1Samuel23:14 Davide kuya mu tshipela tshia Zife, kusomba mu mbuebue ivua ku mikuna. Dituku dionsu, Shawule uvua anu ukeba Davide. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kavua musue kufila Davide mu bianza bia Shawule to." 
1Samuel23:15 Davide umona ne: Shawule udi wenda unkeba ne mvita bua kunshipa, kusombaye ku Orsha mu tshipela tshia Zife." 
1Samuel23:16 Dituku dikuabu, Yonatane, muana wa Shawule kufika muaba uvua Davide ku Orsha. Kukoleshaye Davide ku muoyi bua ikale mutekemena anu kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Samuel23:17 Kuambilaye Davide ne: — Kuena mua kutshina to. Tatu wanyi Shawule kena mua kukupeta to. Wewe newikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Meme nengikale anu tshindonda tshiebe. Tatu mmumanye bionsu ebi. 
1Samuel23:18 Yonatane ne Davide kutua ndondu wa bulunda mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Ke Yonatane kupingana kuende, Davide kushalaye ku Orsha." 
1Samuel23:19 Bena mu Zife kuya ku Ngibeya kuvua Shawule, bamuambila ne: — Kuena mumanye ne: Davide mmusokome mu buloba buetu mu mbuebue idi ku mikuna ya Akila, pabuipi ne Orsha, kuinshi kua tshipela anyi?" 
1Samuel23:20 Nanku, mukalenga, pawikala musue kumukuata, ufike. Tuetu netumukuate, tumufile mu bianza biebe." 
1Samuel23:21 Shawule kubambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba, bua luse lunudi bamfuile." 
1Samuel23:22 Mpindiewu, pinganayi, nuye kulondesha bualu ebu. Nujadike muaba menemene udi Davide musokome, numanye muntu uvua mumumone mu muaba awu. Bualu mbamane kungambila ne: Davide mmudimuke bikole." 
1Samuel23:23 Nujadike miaba yonsu idiye mua kunyemena. Pashishe, nupingane kundi, nuenu bamane kujadika bionsu ebi bimpe. Nanku netuye nenu. Pikalaye mu ditunga adi, nemmukuate, nansha bu meme ne bua kumukeba miaba yonsu mu buloba bua bena Yuda." 
1Samuel23:24 Bena mu Zife kumuka kudi Shawule, kupingana kuabu. Matuku awu, Davide uvua mu tshibandabanda mu tshitupa tshia kuinshi tshia tshipela tshia Mayone," 
1Samuel23:25 Shawule ne bena mvita bende kuya kukeba Davide. Kuambilabu Davide bualu abu. Kuyaye kusomba mu lubuebue lunene luvua mu tshipela tshia Mayone. Shawule umanya ne: Davide udi muaba awu, kutuadijaye kumulondakaja mu buloba abu." 
1Samuel23:26 Shawule ne bena mvita bende bavua benda basemena luseke lua mukuna. Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu bavua benda babanda luseke lukuabu. Bualu bavua banyema bua kudipandisha kudi Shawule ne kudi bena mvita bende. Shawule uvua musue kubeela munkatshi bua kubakuata. 
1Samuel23:27 Kadi muntu kufika muaba awu, kuambila Shawule ne: — Luaku lukasa, bena Peleshete badi baluisha bena ditunga!" 
1Samuel23:28 Diakamue Shawule kulekela kulondakaja Davide. Kupinganaye bua kuluisha bena Peleshete. Ke padibu babikila muaba awu ne: “Lubuebue lua Dishiyangana.” 
1Samuel24:1 Davide kumuka mu buloba abu, kuyaye kusomba pabuipi ne Engedi, muaba mukole." 
1Samuel24:2 Shawule upingana ku mvita kuvuaye muye kuluisha bena Peleshete, kumvuaye lumu ne: Davide udi mu tshipela tshia Engedi." 
1Samuel24:3 Kusungulaye bantu binunu bisatu, munkatshi mua bena mvita ba bena Izrayele. Kuyaye nabu, wenda ukeba Davide ne bantu bende, bavua basokome pabuipi ne lubuebue lua mbuji wa mpumbu." 
1Samuel24:4 Shawule upitshila muaba uvua bikumbi bia mikoku pabuipi ne njila, kumonaye lubuebue, kubuelaye mu lubuebue alu bua kusesuka. Kadi, Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, bavua basokome munda mua lubuebue alu ku luseke." 
1Samuel24:5 Bantu bavua nabu Davide kumuambila bitekete ku ditshi ne: — Ke dituku divua Maweja-Nangila mukulaye, mukuambile ne: “Dituku dikuabu, nemfile muena lukuna webe mu bianza biebe bua umuenzele muudi musue.” Ke Davide kusemena mu musokoku, kukosaye tshipesa tshia muntumpu wa Shawule." 
1Samuel24:6 Kadi Davide mumane kukosa tshipesa atshi, kuzakalaye bikole." 
1Samuel24:7 Kuambilaye bantu bavuaye nabu ne: — Maweja-Nangila angambuluishe bua tshishipi mfumuanyi Shawule, bu munudi nujinga amu! Bualu Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke uvua musungule Shawule bua kuikalaye mukalenga." 
1Samuel24:8 Ke muvua Davide ubela bantu bende bua kabaluishi Shawule to. Shawule kupatuka mu lubuebue, kutungunuka ne luendu." 
1Samuel24:9 Pashishe Davide kupatuka mu lubuebue, ulonda Shawule. Kumuelaye diyi ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, mukalenga Shawule! Shawule ukenzakana, utangila panyima. Davide kutua mpala panshi ne kanemu," 
1Samuel24:10 wela Shawule lusanzu ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, bua tshinyi udi witaba malu adi bantu bakuambila ne: meme Davide ndi nkukeba mua kukuenzela bibi?" 
1Samuel24:11 Lelu ewu, ujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila uvua mukufile mu bianza bianyi mu lubuebue emu. Bakungambila bua meme kukushipa. Kadi meme kukufuila luse. Tshivua musue kukushipa to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mukusungule bua wikale mukalenga." 
1Samuel24:12 Tangila, mukalenga wanyi, tangila tshindi mukuate ku bianza etshi. Ndi ne tshipesa tshia muntumpu webe! Ndi mukose anu tshipesa tshia muntumpu webe, kadi tshiena mukushipe to, bua kujadika ne: tshiena ne dijinga dia kukuenzela bibi, nansha kukutombokela. Udi mumone ne: meme Davide tshiena mukuenzele bubi nansha bumue. Anu wewe udi wenda ungipata bua kunshipa." 
1Samuel24:13 Maweja-Nangila nkayende akose tshilumbu tshidi pankatshi petu nebe. Amu yeye akunyoke bua malu mabi audi mungenzele. Kadi, meme tshiena mua kukusombuela to." 
1Samuel24:14 Wewe udi mumanye lusumuinu lua bankambua, ludi luamba ne: “Anu bantu babi ke badi benza bibi.” Nanku meme tshiena mua kukuenzela bibi to." 
1Samuel24:15 Mukalenga Shawule, uudi wenda ukeba nenku nnganyi? Udi wenda unkeba anu meme Davide. Kadi, meme ndi anu bu mbua mumane kufua, nansha bu tshipu!" 
1Samuel24:16 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila neatulumbuluishe nebe. Yeye antangile, angakuile. Neakose tshilumbu tshianyi. Neansungidile mu bianza biebe." 
1Samuel24:17 Davide ujikija kuakula, Shawule kumukonka ne: — Mulunda wanyi Davide, udi wakula nanku ngwewe menemene anyi? Shawule kudila muadi bikole." 
1Samuel24:18 Pashishe kuambaye ne: — Wewe Davide udi mubinge, meme ndi mupile. Wewe Davide udi mungenzele bimpe. Meme ndi mukuenzele bibi." 
1Samuel24:19 Lelu, wandeji ne: kuena nanyi ne bualu. Maweja-Nangila uvua mmufile mu bianza biebe, kadi kuena munshipe to." 
1Samuel24:20 Padi muntu ukuata muluishi wende, udi mua kumulekela anu katakata anyi? Kabiena mua kuenzeka to. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila akufute bua malu audi mungenzele lelu aa." 
1Samuel24:21 Ndi mumanye ne: dituku dikuabu, wewe newikale mukalenga. Kabidi, pawikala mukalenga, bukalenga bua bena Izrayele nebushindame." 
1Samuel24:22 Nanku utshipe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bua pangikala mumane kufua, ushale kulama ndelanganyi yanyi bimpe, bua dina dianyi ne dia bena diku dianyi kadijiminyi kashidi to." 
1Samuel24:23 Davide kuditshipa. Pashishe, Shawule kupingana kuende. Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu kupingana ku mukuna, muaba uvuabu basokome." 
1Samuel25:1 Tshikondu atshi, Samuwele kufua. Kumujikabu kuende mu tshimenga tshia Rama. Bena Izrayele bonsu kudisangisha bua kuenza madilu ende. Pashishe, Davide kuya mu tshipela tshia Parane." 
1Samuel25:2 Mu musoku wa Mayone muvua muntu mubanji. Uvua ne mikoku binunu bisatu ne mbuji tshinunu. Uvua kabidi ne mpangu yende ku musoku wa Karmele. Muntu ewu, uvua muye ku Karmele bua kukosa miosa ya bimuna biende." 
1Samuel25:3 Dina dia muntu awu Nabate. Mukajende uvua Abiyayile. Mukaji ewu uvua ne mpala muimpe, kabidi muikale ne lungenyi. Kadi, bayende Nabale uvua ne malu makole, muikale ne lonji. Nabale uvua wa mu diku dia Kalebe." 
1Samuel25:4 Pavua Davide mu tshipela, kumvuaye lumu ne: Nabale udi ukosa miosa ya bimuna biende." 
1Samuel25:5 Davide kutuma bantu bende dikumi, kudi Nabale, ubambile ne: — Nuye ku Karmele, kua Nabale, numungelele muoyi." 
1Samuel25:6 Numuambile ne: “Tshidimu etshi tshikulengelele! 
1Samuel25:7 Davide mumane kumvua lumu ne: bantu badi bakosa miosa ya bimuna badi ku nzubu kuebe. Kadi matuku onsu atudi ne balami ba mikoku yebe ku Karmele, katuena babenzele bibi to. Kabena bajimije tshintu nansha tshimue." 
1Samuel25:8 Udi mua kubakonka, Nebakujadikile. Davide udi nkusengelela bua utuakidile bimpe matuku a tshibilu aa, bualu tudi benyi bebe. Nanku, tuetu ne muena mudimu webe Davide, ubipeshe tshintu tshionsu tshiudi natshi.”" 
1Samuel25:9 Bantu bavua nabu Davide kuya kuambila Nabale bionsu bivua Davide mubambile abi. Pashishe, kushalabu bindile." 
1Samuel25:10 Kadi Nabale kubakonka ne: — Davide wa Ishayi nnganyi? Matuku aa, bapika ba bungi badi batombokela bamfumu babu, babanyema." 
1Samuel25:11 Meme ndi mua kuangata diampa dianyi, mayi anyi a kunua, ne munyinyi undi mulongoluele bantu badi bakosa miosa ya mikoku yanyi, bua kupesha bantu bandi tshiyi mumanye nansha muaba udibu bafume!" 
1Samuel25:12 Bantu bavua nabu Davide, kupingana kudi Davide, kumuambila bionsu bivua Nabale muambe." 
1Samuel25:13 Davide kutuma diyi, wamba ne: — Muntu yonsu ambula muela wa mvita! Nanku muntu yonsu kuasa muela wende wamvitaku mikaba. Davide kuambula wende muela wa mvita. Bena mvita bu nkama inayi kuya ne Davide. Bantu bakuabu nkama ibidi, kushala balame mabuki." 
1Samuel25:14 Muntu wa ku bena mudimu ba Nabale, kuya kuambila Abiyayile, mukaji wa mfumuende wa mudimu, ne: — Davide uvua mutume bantu bafumine mu tshipela bua kuela mfumuetu Nabale muoyi. Kadi, mfumuetu Nabale kena mubakidile bimpe to." 
1Samuel25:15 Kadi bantu aba, bavua bantu bimpe batambe. Kabawa batuenzela bualu bubi nansha bumue. Kabidi matuku onsu atuvua tuendakana nabu mu mpata, katuena bajimije tshintu nansha tshimue." 
1Samuel25:16 Bantu aba, bavua batulame butuku ne munya, batuela munkatshi bu mudi tshimana. Matuku onsu atuvua tulama mikoku mu buloba muvuabu, bavua batulame bimpe." 
1Samuel25:17 Nanku mpindiewu, ela meji bimpe, ukebe tshitudi mua kuenza. Bualu dikenga nedikuate mfumu Nabale ne bena nzubu wende, kamuyi mpata to. Nabale mmuntu wa malu makole. Kena musue bua muntu mukuabu kumuambilaye bualu to." 
1Samuel25:18 Abiyayile kuya lubilu, kuangata mampa nkama ibidi, milondu ibidi ya biseba, ne maluvu a mvinyo tente, mikoku itanu mimane kulamba, bipimu bitanu bia ntete ya bukula mikanga, bisangi bia tumuma tume tua mvinyo lukama, ne mikata nkama ibidi mienza ne bimuma bia mutshi wa mfiku. Abiyayile kuteka bintu bionsu abi pa nyama ya mpunde." 
1Samuel25:19 Pashishe kutuminaye bena mudimu bende diyi ne: — Pitayi kumpala, meme ndi nnulonda. Abiyayile kavua muambile bayende Nabale to." 
1Samuel25:20 Mumane kusomba pa mpunde wende, uvua wenda upueka mujiminangane ne mukuna. Diba adi, Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, bavua benda basemena anu luseke luvua Abiyayile uluila. Diakamue, Abiyayile kusambakena nabu." 
1Samuel25:21 Davide utshivua udiambila munda munda ne: “Ke tshipeta tshindi mupeta pamvua mulame bintu bia muntu ewu bimpe, mu tshipela, bua kajimiji tshintu nansha tshimue. Muntu ewu wampingajidi bubi ku malu mimpe amvua mumuenzele!" 
1Samuel25:22 Nanku, patuamba kufika malaba dinda, Mvidi Mukulu annyoke ne dinyoka dikole, pangikala tshiyi mubutule bena diku dia Nabale bonsu.”" 
1Samuel25:23 Anu Abiyayile umona Davide, kutulakaye lukasa pa nyama wende wa mpunde. Kutuaye mpala panshi," 
1Samuel25:24 ku makasa a Davide, umuambila ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, udi muenze bibi mmeme! Dipanga didi anu kundi meme! Kadi, itaba bua meme kuyukila nebe. Utelejaku tshindi nkuambila." 
1Samuel25:25 Kunangidi malu a Nabale to, bualu mmuntu mutshimbakane. Nabale mmumue ne: muntu mutshimbakane. Nanku, dina edi ndimukumbanyine, bualu kena ne lungenyi to. Kadi, mukalenga wanyi Davide, meme Abiyayile tshivua mumone bantu bebe bauvua mututumine to." 
1Samuel25:26 Mpindiewu bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne bu muudi wewe ne muoyi, Maweja-Nangila nkayende akukandike bua kushipianganyi, bua kudisombuedi wewe mukalenga to. Kadi baluishi bebe, ne bonsu badi bakuenzele bibi, babanyoke mudibu ne bua kunyoka Nabale." 
1Samuel25:27 Angata bintu bia disanka bindi mukutuadile, ubiabanyine bansongalume baudi nabu." 
1Samuel25:28 Bu wewe musue, umfuileku luse. Bualu meme Abiyayile ndi nkujadikila ne: Maweja-Nangila neafile bukalenga mu nzubu muebe kashidi. Bualu wewe udi uluangana mvita mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kabidi kabena mua kukubanda ne bualu bubi nansha bumue, matuku onsu audi ne muoyi." 
1Samuel25:29 Mukalenga Davide, pikala muntu wenda ukukeba bua kukushipa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe neakulame anu pabuipi nende. Maweja-Nangila neipate baluishi bebe, neabasake kule, anu bu mudibu bela lusoka mu ndundu." 
1Samuel25:30 Pikala Maweja-Nangila mukumbaje malu mimpe onsu adiye mukulaye, pikalaye mukuteke mukalenga wa bena Izrayele," 
1Samuel25:31 ki mbimpe wikale uvuluka, unyingalala bua muntu mukuabu uuvua mushipe kakuyi bualu, bua kudisombuela. Nanku mukalenga, pikala Maweja-Nangila akusankishe, wamvulukaku!" 
1Samuel25:32 Davide kuandamuna Abiyayile ne: — Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele tuasakidila. Yeye ke udi mukutume bua meme kusambakena nebe mpindiewu. 
1Samuel25:33 Ndi nkuela kabidi wewe tuasakidila. Bua lungenyi luebe luimpe, udi unkandika bua tshishipi muntu, kabidi tshidisombuedi to." 
1Samuel25:34 Bulelela, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ne muoyi, yeye ke udi munkandike bua tshienji bibi to. Nanku, ndi nkujadikila ne: bu wewe kuyi mufike lukasa bua kusambakena nanyi, malaba dinda mvua mbutula bantu bonsu ba mu diku dia Nabale." 
1Samuel25:35 Davide kuangata bintu bivua Abiyayile mumutuadile. Pashishe, kuambilaye Abiyayile ne: — Upingane kuebe ne disanka, bualu ngumvu dilomba diebe. Ndi muditabe ne disanka." 
1Samuel25:36 Abiyayile upingana ku nzubu, kusanganaye Nabale wenzeja tshibilu. Tshivua tshibilu tshinene bu tshia mukalenga. Nabale uvua ne disanka dia bungi, mumane kukuatshika maluvu bikole. Nanku Abiyayile kena mumuambile bualu nansha bumue too ne muakatshiabu." 
1Samuel25:37 Abiyayile uvua muindile bua maluvu atenduke Nabale, pashishe amuambile malu onsu awu dinda. Nabale umvua malu awu, kumutondawu bikole. Kushalaye katshiyi ne bukole." 
1Samuel25:38 Matuku dikumi mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kusangisha Nabale tshiakabidi, kufuaye." 
1Samuel25:39 Davide umvua lumu lua lufu lua Nabale, kuambaye ne: — Ndi nsakidila Maweja-Nangila, udi munsungidile kudi Nabale uvua umpenda. Ndi mmuela kabidi tuasakidila, bualu mmunkandike bua meme kuenza bibi, bua tshipingajidi Nabale bubi buende. Ke Davide kutuma bantu kudi Abiyayile, bua kumuambila ne: Davide mmusue bua wikale mukajende." 
1Samuel25:40 Bantu abu bafike kudi Abiyayile ku Karmele, kumuambilabu ne: — Davide mmututume, bua kukuangata bua wikale mukajende." 
1Samuel25:41 Abiyayile kuinama kumpala kuabu, mutue mpala panshi, ubambila ne: — Nengikale mupika wa mukalenga Davide. Ndi muitabe bua kuikala ngowesha bena mudimu bende mayi ku makasa." 
1Samuel25:42 Abiyayile kujuka lukasa, kubanda pa nyama wende wa mpunde, kuya ne bena mudimu bende bakaji batanu. Kulondaye bantu bavua Davide mutume. Abiyayile kushala mukaji wa Davide." 
1Samuel25:43 Bangabanga Davide uvua mumane kusela Akinowame, muena Yizreyele. Nanku, Akinowame ne Abiyayile bonsu babidi kushala bakaji ba Davide." 
1Samuel25:44 Mukaji wa kumpala wa Davide uvua Mikale, muana wa Shawule. Kadi tatuende Shawule uvua mumane kumuselesha, kudi Palti, muana wa Layishe, muena Ngalime." 
1Samuel26:1 Bena mu Zife, kuya ku Ngibeya kuvua Shawule, kumuambila ne: — Kuena mumanye ne: Davide mmusokome ku mikuna ya Akila pabuipi ne tshipela anyi?" 
1Samuel26:2 Ke Shawule kuya mu tshipela tshia Zife bua kukeba Davide. Uvua ne bena mvita ba bena Izrayele binunu bisatu, bavua bamanye mvita bikole." 
1Samuel26:3 Shawule kuasa mitanda yende, ku mikuna ya Akila, ku mpenga kua njila. Davide mu tshipela kumvua lumu lua ne: Shawule mmufike bua kukukeba." 
1Samuel26:4 Kutumaye bantu bua kujadika bualu abu. Kumujadikilabu ne: Shawule mmumane kufika. 
1Samuel26:5 Davide kuya muaba uvua mitanda ya Shawule, bua kujadika muaba menemene uvua Shawule balale ne Abnere, muana wa Nere, mfumu wa bena mvita bende. Shawule uvua mulale munkatshi mua mitanda. Bena mvita bende bonsu bavua bamuele munkatshi." 
1Samuel26:6 Davide kubikila Akimeleke, muena Iti, ne Abishayi. (Abishayi ne Yowabe bavua bana ba Seruya, yayende wa Davide). Davide kubakonka ne: — Nnganyi wa kunudi utudi mua kuya nende too ne ku mitanda ya Shawule? Abishayi kuitaba ne: — Netuye nebe." 
1Samuel26:7 Munkatshi mua butuku, Davide ne Abishayi kuya mu mitanda, muaba uvua bena mvita ba Shawule. Shawule uvua mulale tulu, munkatshi mua mitanda. Difuma diende divu diasa panshi ku mutu wende. Abnere ne bena mvita, bavua balale, bela Shawule munkatshi." 
1Samuel26:8 Abishayi kuambila Davide ne: — Butuku ebu, Mvidi Mukulu mmufile Shawule, muluishi webe mu bianza biebe. Itaba, meme nenye kumutua difuma diende, dipatuka ditua ne mu buloba. Ndi mmutua difuma anu musangu umue. Tshiakumutua musangu muibidi to." 
1Samuel26:9 Davide kubenga ne: — Nansha, kumushipi to. Udi wela meji ne: muntu udi mushipe muntu udi Maweja-Nangila musungule, kena mua kupeta dinyoka anyi?" 
1Samuel26:10 Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: Maweja-Nangila nkayende neajikije bualu buende. Shawule udi mua kufua bu mudi bantu bonsu bafue anyi udi mua kufua mu mvita." 
1Samuel26:11 Kadi Maweja-Nangila neankandike bua tshishipi mukalenga uvuaye mudisunguile. Nanku, tuambule amu difuma diende didi ku mutu, pabuipi nende, tuambule kabidi ne mulondu wende wa mayi, tuye nabi." 
1Samuel26:12 Davide kuambula difuma ne mulondu wa mayi, bivua ku mutu kua Shawule. Kuyabu nabi. Muntu nansha umue kena mubike to. Muntu nansha umue kavua mumone, nansha mumanye, bionsu bivua bienzeka abi. Bantu bavua balale amu tulu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubaladike tulu tukole." 
1Samuel26:13 Davide kuya luseke lukuabu lua tshibandabanda. Kuimanaye pa mukuna, mutantshi mule ne mitanda ya Shawule." 
1Samuel26:14 Davide kuela diyi luseke luvua bena mvita ba Shawule, ubikila Abnere, muana wa Nere, ne: — Akia! Abnere, ngitaba! Abnere kukonka ne: — Udi ne dikamakama nanku, unyangila mukalenga tulu nnganyi?" 
1Samuel26:15 Davide kukonka Abnere ne: — Abnere, wewe kuena muntu mulume anyi? Mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, kamuena muena mvita mukuabu udi ne dikima mukupite wewe to! Kadi, kuena mulame mukalenga webe Shawule bimpe bua tshinyi? Muntu mukuabu uvua mufike bua kumushipa." 
1Samuel26:16 Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, paudi ulengulula mudimu webe, kuena wenza bimpe to! Nuenu bena mvita bende bonsu, mbimpe banushipe, bualu kanuena balame mukalenga wenu Shawule bimpe to!
