Shawule mmukalenga musungula kudi Maweja-Nangila! Kadi, tangila ku mutu kua mukalenga: difuma diende ne mulondu wende wa mayi bidi penyi?" 
1Samuel26:17 Shawule kumanya diyi dia Davide, kukonkaye ne: — Muananyi Davide, diyi dindi mumvue edi, ndiebe wewe anyi? Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, ndianyi meme." 
1Samuel26:18 Davide kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, udi wenda unkeba bua tshinyi? Ndi mukuenzele tshinyi? Mbualu bubi kaayi bundi mukuenzele." 
1Samuel26:19 Pikala Maweja-Nangila musue bua wewe kungenzela bibi, nanku Maweja-Nangila itaba mulambu bua kujikija tshiji tshiende. Kadi, pikalabu bakuenzeja bionsu ebi kudi bantu, Maweja-Nangila abatshipe. Bualu lelu badi bangipata, bua tshisombi mu ditunga didi Maweja-Nangila mupeshe bantu bende, bidi bu mudi muntu ungamba ne: “Uye kutendelela mvidie mikuabu. ”" 
1Samuel26:20 Kadi meme tshiena musue kufuila muaba mukuabu to, anu muaba udi Maweja-Nangila. Mukalenga Shawule, meme ndi kantu tshianana, bu mudi tshipu, kadi udi unduisha bua tshinyi? Udi wenda ungipata, bu mudi muntu wipata nkuadi mu mikuna bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel26:21 Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muenze bibi! Muananyi Davide, pingana, tshiena nkuenzela bibi kabidi to. Bualu butuku ebu, udi munnemeke, kuena munshipe to. Meme ndi anu bu muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi. Ndi mutupakane bikole." 
1Samuel26:22 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, difuma diebe ndiodi edi. Muntu umue wa ku bena mudimu bebe, alue kukuangatshiladi." 
1Samuel26:23 Maweja-Nangila enzela muntu yonsu wa kutudi, bilondeshile buakane buende, ne mushindu udiye mulamate Maweja-Nangila. Lelu, Maweja-Nangila uvua mukufile mu bianza bianyi. Kadi tshiena musue kukushipa to. Bualu wewe udi mukalenga musungula kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
1Samuel26:24 Bu mundi muangate muoyi webe ne mushinga, Maweja-Nangila angate kabidi muoyi wanyi ne mushinga, ansungidile mu makenga onsu." 
1Samuel26:25 Ke Shawule kuambila Davide ne: — Muananyi Davide, Maweja-Nangila akuela lupemba. Newenze malu manene. Bulelela newikale muena diakalenga. Shawule kupingana kuende. Davide kupingana pende kuvua bantu bende." 
1Samuel27:1 Davide kuela meji, udiambila ne: “Dituku dikuabu, Shawule ewu neanshipe. Tshiena ne tshikuabu tshindi mua kuenza mpindiewu to. Mbimpe nnyemene mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete. Nanku Shawule nealekele kunkeba mu buloba bujima bua bena Izrayele. Ke mundi mua kumunye-mena.”" 
1Samuel27:2 Davide kuya ne bantu bavuaye nabu nkama isambombu. Kufikaye kua Akishe, muana wa Mayoke. Akishe uvua mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Ngate." 
1Samuel27:3 Kusombabu bonsu mu Ngate, pabuipi ne Akishe. Muntu yonsu wa bantu bavua nabu Davide uvua ne bena nzubu wende. Davide uvua ne bakaji bende babidi, Akinowame wa Yizreyele, ne Abigayile, muena Karmele, mukaji mukamba uvua Nabale mushiye." 
1Samuel27:4 Shawule umvua lumune: Davide mmunyemene ku Ngate, kulekelaye kumukeba." 
1Samuel27:5 Dituku dikuabu, Davide kuebeja Akishe ne: — Mukalenga, pawikala mumone bindi ngenza ne bidi bindengelela, anyisha bua meme kusomba mu musoku mukuabu wa ku misoku idi mu mpata. Bualu ki mbimpe bua meme kusomba nebe pamue mu tshimenga tshia bukalenga to." 
1Samuel27:6 Anu dituku adi, mukalenga Akishe kupesha Davide tshimenga tshia Siklaje. Ke padi tshimenga etshi tshishale mu buloba bua bukalenga bua Yuda too ne mpindiewu." 
1Samuel27:7 Davide uvua mushale mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete tshidimu tshimue ne ngondu inayi. 
1Samuel27:8 Patshi wa Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu mu Siklaje, kuluishabu bisamba ebi: bena Ngeshure, bena Ngirzi nansha bena Amaleke, mmumue ne bantu bonsu bavua basombe muaba awu kuonsu eku, mu buloba bua luseke lua ku Shure, too ne ku mukalu wa ditunga dia Ejipitu." 
1Samuel27:9 Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kubutula matunga a baluishi abu. Kabawa bashiyamu muntu mulume nansha mukaji, ne muoyi to. Kuangatabu mikoku, ngombe, nyama ya mpunde, nyama ya tumelu, ne bilamba. Kupinganabu ne bintu abi kudi mukalenga Akishe." 
1Samuel27:10 Pavua mukalenga Akishe ukonka Davide ne: “Lelu udi muluangane ne banganyi?” Davide uvua wandamuna ne: “Ndi muluangane ne bena Yuda badi mu buloba budi kuinshi mu ditunga,” anyi “Ndi muluangane ne bena Yerameli badi mu buloba budi kuinshi mu ditunga,” anyi “Ndi muluangane ne bena Kayine badi mu buloba budi kuinshi mu ditunga.”" 
1Samuel27:11 Davide kena mushiye muntu mulume nansha mukaji ne muoyi, bua kuya nende mu Ngate to. Uvua utshina ne: muntu ewu, udi mua kuya kunjana, wambila bantu ne: “Monayi tshidi Davide wenza.” Matuku onsu avua Davide mushale mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete, uvua wenza anu mushindu awu." 
1Samuel27:12 Ke muvua mukalenga Akishe witaba Davide bikole. Bualu uvua wela meji ne: “Bu mudi bena Izrayele babenga Davide. Yeye neangenzele mudimu kashidi.” 
1Samuel28:1 Tshikondu atshi, bena Peleshete kusangisha bena mvita babu bonsu mu tshisumbu tshimue, bua kuya kuluisha bena Izrayele. Mukalenga Akishe kuambila Davide ne: — Wewe ne bantu baudi nabu netuye nenu ku mvita eyi." 
1Samuel28:2 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga wewe nkayebe neudimuene tshindi ngenza. Mukalenga Akishe kuandamuna ne: — Mbimpe bitambe! Nanku ndi nkuteka pabuipi nanyi. Wikale undama meme kashidi." 
1Samuel28:3 Samuwele mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu tshimenga tshiabu tshia Rama. Bena Izrayele bonsu kumuenzela madilu. Kadi Shawule mu bukalenga buende uvua mumane kukandika bilelu bia kubuka, ne bia kukonka bakishi malu." 
1Samuel28:4 Dituku dikuabu, bena Peleshete kusangisha bena mvita babu. Kuasabu mitanda yabu pabuipi ne Shuneme. Shawule kubikidisha bena mvita ba bena Izrayele. Kuasabu mitanda yabu pabuipi ne mukuna wa Ngilbowa." 
1Samuel28:5 Shawule umona amu mitanda ya bena Peleshete, kumvuaye bowa bikole. Kutuadijaye kuzakala." 
1Samuel28:6 Shawule kukonka Maweja-Nangila tshia kuenza. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kena mumuandamune nansha mu tshilota, nansha ku Urime ne Tumime, nansha kudi muambi." 
1Samuel28:7 Ke Shawule kutumina balombodi ba bena mvita bende diyi ne: — Nunkebele mukaji udi mumanye mua kukonka bakishi malu, bua meme kuya kubuka kudiye. Kumuandamunabu ne: — Mukaji muena lubuku udi ku Endore." 
1Samuel28:8 Shawule kuvualaye bilamba bia patupu bua kabamumanyi to. Kuyaye ku Endore ne bantu babidi. Kufikaye ku nzubu kua mukaji awu butuku, umuambila ne: — Ndi musue, ukonkeku mukishi bualu buanyi. Umbikidileku mukishi undi nkuambila." 
1Samuel28:9 Mukaji muena lubuku kuandamuna ne: — Udi mumanye bimpe ne: bantu bonsu bavua babuka, bakonka bakishi malu, mukalenga Shawule mmumane kubabutula mu ditunga diende. Wewe udi mufike kundi ne budimu bua kunshipesha anyi?" 
1Samuel28:10 Shawule kumuambila ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: kabena bakushipa bua bualu ebu to." 
1Samuel28:11 Mukaji kukonka Shawule ne: — Udi musue nkubikidile mukishi wa nganyi? Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Umbikidile mukishi wa Samuwele. 
1Samuel28:12 Mukaji umona mukishi wa Samuwele, kuelaye diyi dikole, ukonka Shawule ne: — Wewe udi Shawule! Kadi uvua unshima bua tshinyi?" 
1Samuel28:13 Mukalenga Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Kutshinyi to. Ungambile amu tshiudi mumone. Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumone tshintu bu mukishi, upatuka munda mua buloba." 
1Samuel28:14 Mukalenga Shawule kukonka ne: — Mukishi awu udi mushindu kaayi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumone muntu mukole mukulakaje, muvuale muntumpu. Shawule kumvua ne: mukishi awu ngua Samuwele menemene. Kutuaye mpala panshi ne kanemu." 
1Samuel28:15 Mukishi wa Samuwele kukonka Shawule ne: — Meme mumane kuikisha, udi mumbishe bua tshinyi? Udi umbikila bua tshinyi? Shawule kuandamuna ne: — Bualu ndi nkenga bikole. Bena Peleshete mbafike bua kunduisha. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kumbenga. Kena ungandamuna nansha kudi bambi, nansha mu tshilota. Ke pandi mukubikile bua wewe ungambile tshindi mua kuenza." 
1Samuel28:16 Mukishi wa Samuwele kukonka Shawule ne: — Udi unkonka meme tshia kuenza bua tshinyi? Udi mumone ne: Maweja-Nangila mmumane kukubenga mmushale muluishi webe. 
1Samuel28:17 Maweja-Nangila mmukumbaje bionsu bimvua muambe mu dina diende. Maweja-Nangila mmukunyenge bukalenga buebe bua kubupesha Davide. 
1Samuel28:18 Bualu wewe kuvua mutumikile meyi a Maweja-Nangila. Kuvua mubutule bena Amaleke bonsu to. Ke padi Maweja-Nangila ukukengesha lelu mushindu ewu. 
1Samuel28:19 Maweja-Nangila neakufile ne bantu bebe bonsu mu bianza bia bena Peleshete. Malaba, wewe ne bana bebe netuikale nenu mu kandondu ka bafue emu. Bena mvita bebe bonsu nebikale mu bianza bia bena Peleshete." 
1Samuel28:20 Shawule umvua amu meyi a mukishi wa Samuwele awu, kudishindaye panshi ne bowa bua bungi. Katshivua kabidi ne bukole to, bualu kavua mudie dituku adi dijima too ne butuku." 
1Samuel28:21 Mukaji muena lubuku kusemena pabuipi ne Shawule, kumona ne Shawule, uvua ne bowa bua bungi. Nanku mukaji kuambila Shawule ne: — Mukalenga Shawule, meme ndi muitabe diyi diebe. Ndi mubuele mu njiwu ya lufu bua kukumbaja tshiuvua mundombe." 
1Samuel28:22 Mpindiewu, wewe unteleje. Ndi nkupesha biakudia, udie, bua wewe kupeta bukole bukumbane bua kupingana kuebe." 
1Samuel28:23 Shawule kubenga mua kudia biakudia nansha bikese. Kadi bantu bavuaye nabu ne mukaji muena lubuku, kumusengelela bikole. Nanku kuitabaye. Kujukaye panshi, kusomba pa bulalu." 
1Samuel28:24 Mukaji muena lubuku kushipa lukasa kana ka ngombe ka mafuta. Kusopaye bukula, kulamba tukata tua mampa." 
1Samuel28:25 Mukaji muena lubuku kupesha Shawule ne bavuaye nabu biakudia abi. Bobu bamane kudia, kupinganabu amu butuku abu." 
1Samuel29:1 Bena Peleshete kusangisha bena mvita babu bonsu ku Afeke. Bena Izrayele bavua basa mitanda yabu ku mpokolu wa mayi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Yizreyele. 
1Samuel29:2 Bamfumu ba bena Peleshete kuenda, balombola bisumbu bia bena mvita. Davide ne bantu bende bavuaye nabu, ne mukalenga Akishe, bavua balonda panyima." 
1Samuel29:3 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Peleshete kukonkabu ne: — Bena Ebrewu aba mbanganyi? Mukalenga Akishe kuandamuna ne: — Kanuena bamanye Davide uvua muena mudimu wa Shawule, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Mpindiewu tudi nende, kukadi bidimu bu bibidi. Biangatshile dituku diakumukaye kudi mfumuende Shawule too ne mpindiewu, tshiena muanji kumubanda ne bualu bubi nansha bumue." 
1Samuel29:4 Balombodi ba mvita ba bena Peleshete, kufiikila mukalenga Akishe munda, bamuambila ne: — Umushe muntu ewu, apingane mu tshimenga tshiudi mumupe bua kusomba. Kena mua kuikala netu mu mvita to. Udi mua kutukudimukila, munkatshi mua mvita bua kutuluisha. Bualu bua kumunangabu tshiakabidi kudi Shawule mfumuende wa kale, Davide kena mua kufila bena mvita betu mu bianza bia Shawule anyi?" 
1Samuel29:5 Katupu muoyi ne: Davide ewu, ke uvua bakaji, bajiila maja, bimbila misambu, bamba ne: “Shawule uvua mushipe bantu binunu tshinunu, kadi Davide mmushipe bantu binunu makumi ne makumi. ”" 
1Samuel29:6 Nanku mukalenga Akishe, kubikila Davide umuambila ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi mukunange bikole. Mvua mumone ne: udi ukumbana bua tuetu kuya nebe mu mvita. Bualu biangatshile dituku diuvua mufike kuanyi too ne mpindiewu, tshiena muanji kumona wewe muenze bualu bubi to. Kadi, bamfumu bakuabu ba bena Peleshete kabena bakunange to." 
1Samuel29:7 Nanku, pingana kuebe ne ditalala, bua bamfumu aba kabafiiki munda to." 
1Samuel29:8 Davide kukonka mukalenga Akishe ne: — Mukalenga Akishe, ndi muenze tshinyi? Biangatshile dituku dimvua mutuadije kukuenzela mudimu too ne mpindiewu, udi mua kumbanda ne bualu kaayi, budi bumpumbisha mua meme kuya kuluangana ne baluishi bebe?" 
1Samuel29:9 Mukalenga Akishe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: kuena ne bualu to. Wewe udi munsankishe. Ndi mukumone amu bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Peleshete bangambidi ne: “Davide kena mua kuikala netu ku mvita to!” 
1Samuel29:10 Nanku, ujuke malaba dinda, ne bantu baudi nabu. Nujuke malaba panshi pamane kutoka, nupingane." 
1Samuel29:11 Butshia dinda, Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kujuka bua kupingana mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete. Kadi bena Peleshete kuya ku tshimenga tshia Yizreyele." 
1Samuel30:1 Matuku mamane kupita abidi, Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu kufika mu tshimenga tshia Siklaje. Kadi bena Amaleke bavua bamane kuluisha bantu bavua basombe mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, ne bena mu tshimenga tshia Siklaje. Bena Amaleke bavua bosha tshimenga tshia Siklaje, batshinyangakaje." 
1Samuel30:2 Bavua bakuate bakaji ne bantu bonsu bavua mu tshimenga, bakulumpe ne bana, bababueje mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kabavua bashipe muntu nansha umue to. Kadi bavua babakuata, baye nabu." 
1Samuel30:3 Nanku Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, bamane kufika mu Siklaje, kusanganabu tshimenga tshimane kuosha. Bakaji babu balela, ne bana babu: ba balume ne ba bakaji, baluishi bamane kuya nabu." 
1Samuel30:4 Davide ne bena mvita bende kudila bikole too, kupungila." 
1Samuel30:5 Bena Amaleke bavua bakuate bakaji babidi ba Davide: Akinowame, muena mu Yizreyele, ne Abigayile, muena mu Karmele, mukaji mukamba uvua Nabale mushiye." 
1Samuel30:6 Davide uvua ne kanyinganyinga kakole. Bualu bantu bavuaye nabu bavua basue kumuasa mabue bua kumushipa. Muntu yonsu uvua unyingalala, wela meji kudi bana bende ba balume ne ba bakaji. Kadi ku diambuluisha dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, Davide kupeta bukole." 
1Samuel30:7 Davide kuambila mutuangaji Abiyatare, muana wa Akimeleke, ne: — Mpesha Urime ne Tumime, bintu bia tshijila, bua nkonke Maweja-Nangila. Abiyatare kumupesha bintu abi." 
1Samuel30:8 Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila ne: — Meme mulondakaje bivi aba, nembapete anyi? Maweja-Nangila kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, balondakaja, neubapete. Neusungidile bantu badibu bakuata." 
1Samuel30:9 Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu nkama isambombu, kulondakaja bivi abu. Bamane kufika ku musulu wa Beshore," 
1Samuel30:10 bantu nkama ibidi ba ku bantu bavuaye nabu, kupungila bikole. Kushalabu muaba awu, kabayi ne mushindu wa kusabuka musulu. Davide kutungunuka ne luendu ne bantu nkama inayi, bavua bashala." 
1Samuel30:11 Bena mvita ba Davide kusangana nsongalume mukuabu wa bena Ejipitu, mu mpata. Kumukuatabu, kuyabu nende kudi Davide. Kumupeshabu diampa ne mayi a kunua." 
1Samuel30:12 Pashishe kumupeshabu mukata muenze ne bimuma bia mfiku. Kumupeshabu kabidi ne bisangi bibidi bia tumuma tua mvinyo tumane kuuma. Nsongalume wa bena Ejipitu, mumane kudia bintu abi, kupetaye bukole. Bualu kavua mudie tshintu nansha munue mayi, matuku asatu a munya ne a butuku." 
1Samuel30:13 Davide kukonka nsongalume awu ne: — Udi muena nganyi? Udi ufuma penyi? Nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muena Ejipitu, ndi mupika wa bena Amaleke. Mfumuanyi mmunshiye, kudi matuku asatu, bualu mvua nsama." 
1Samuel30:14 Bangabanga tuvua baluishe bantu badi basombe kuinshi mu ditunga, mu buloba bua bena Kereti, bua bena Yuda ne bua bena Kalebe. Pashishe tuetu kuosha tshimenga tshia Siklaje." 
1Samuel30:15 Davide kumukonka ne: — Udi mua kumfikisha muaba udi bivi abu anyi? Muntu awu kuandamuna ne: — Nenkufikishe kudibu paudi ujadika, uditshipa kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu muudi kuyi musue kunshipesha, kuyi nansha musue kumfila kudi mfumu wanyi." 
1Samuel30:16 Nsongalume wa bena Ejipitu kufikisha Davide muaba uvua bena Amaleke. Kusanganabu bena Amaleke batangalakangana mu buloba bujima, badia, banua, benza tshibilu ne bintu bipite bungi, bivuabu bapawule mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete, ne mu ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
1Samuel30:17 Dituku divu dilonda, Davide kubaluisha dinda too ne dilolu. Muntu nansha umue kena munyeme to. Anu bansongalume nkama inayi bavua babanda pa nyama ya tumelu, ke bavua banyema." 
1Samuel30:18 Davide kuangata bintu bionsu bivua bena Amaleke bapawule. Kusungidilaye too ne bakaji bende babidi. 
1Samuel30:19 Davide uvua musungidile bantu bonsu, bakulumpe ne bana, ba balume ne ba bakaji. Bintu biabu bionsu bivua anu katakata. Bionsu bivua baluishi bapawule, Davide kubipeta." 
1Samuel30:20 Davide kupawula kabidi mikoku ne ngombe ya bena Amaleke. Bantu bavua basaka bimuna abi, bavua bamba ne: “Monayi bintu bidi Davide mupawule mu mvita”!" 
1Samuel30:21 Davide kupingana muaba uvua bantu bende nkama ibidi bashale, bapungile bikole, pabuipi ne musulu wa Beshore. Bantu abu, kuya kusambakena ne Davide, ne bantu bavuaye nabu. Davide ne bena mvita bende kusemena pabuipi, kubeela muoyi." 
1Samuel30:22 Kadi bena mvita bavua baye ne Davide ku mvita, kabawa ne lungenyi to, bualu bavua ne lukinu. Nanku, kuambilabu Davide ne: — Bu muvua bantu aba kabayi baye netu mu mvita, kabena mua kubapa bintu bitudi banyenga mu mvita to. Muntu yonsu angate anu mukajende ne bana bende, aye nabu." 
1Samuel30:23 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Bana betu, kanuenji nanku to. Bintu ebi mbitupesha kudi Maweja-Nangila. Yeye ke uvua mutalame, mufile mu bianza bietu, bivi aba bavua baluisha tshimenga tshia Siklaje." 
1Samuel30:24 Muntu nansha umue kena mua kuitaba tshinudi nuamba to. Mbimpe tuabanyangane binta mushindu ewu: “Muntu yonsu apete tshintu tshia mu mvita. Muntu uvua muye mu mvita, ne muntu uvua mushale mulame mitanda, babanyangane bintu mushindu amu umue.”" 
1Samuel30:25 Biangatshile dituku adi, Davide kujadika mikenji eyi. Kushalayi mikenji ivuabena Izrayele bonsu ne bua kukumbaja too ne mpindiewu." 
1Samuel30:26 Davide upingana mu tshimenga tshia Siklaje, kutuminaye balunda bende, ne bakulu ba bena Yuda, bintu bia mu mvita. Kubambilaye ne: “Angatayi bintu bia disanka abi, mbitudi banyenga baluishi ba Maweja-Nangila.”" 
1Samuel30:27 Kubituminaye kabidi bakulu bavua ku Betele, bavua ku Ramote, kuinshi mu ditunga, ne bavua ku Yatire," 
1Samuel30:28 ku Aroyere, ku Sifmote, ku Eshtemowa," 
1Samuel30:29 ku Rakate, mu bimenga bia bena Yerameli, ne bia bena Kayine," 
1Samuel30:30 bavua ku Orma, ku Borashane, ku Atake," 
1Samuel30:31 ku Ebrone, ne bavua mu misoku yonsu ivua Davide mupitshile ne bantu ba-vuaye nabu." 
1Samuel31:1 Bena Peleshete kuluisha bena Izrayele pa mukuna wa Ngilbowa. Kushipabu bena Izrayele ba bungi, bakuabu kunyema." 
1Samuel31:2 Bena Peleshete kuluisha Shawule ne bantu bende bikole, kushipa Yonatane, Abinadabe ne Malkishuwa, bana ba mukalenga Shawule." 
1Samuel31:3 Nanku, mvita kutshintshimika mukalenga Shawule. Bantu bavua ne mata ne miketa kumonabu Shawule. Ke Shawule kupampakana bikole." 
1Samuel31:4 Kuambilaye muntu uvua mumuambuile bia lulu ne: — Angata muela webe, unshipe. Bualu tshiena musue bua banshipe, banseke kudi bena Peleshete aba, bantu bavuabu kabayi bateke panshi. Kadi, muntu uvua muambuile Shawule bia lulu, kubenga, bualu uvua ne bowa bua bungi. Ke Shawule kuasa muela wende panshi, kudiela pa muela apu." 
1Samuel31:5 Muntu uvua muambuile Shawule bia lufu umona ne: mfumuende wafu, kuasaye wende muela panshi, kudiela pa muela apu, kufua pende." 
1Samuel31:6 Ke muvua Shawule mufue dituku dimue ne bana bende basatu, ne muntu uvua mumuambuile bia lufu, ne bena mvita bende bonsu nanku." 
1Samuel31:7 Bena Izrayele bavua base luseke lukuabu lua tshibandabanda, ne bavua dishiya dia Yardene, kumvuabu lumu ne: bena mvita ba bena Izrayele mbanyeme bena Peleshete, kabidi ne: Shawule ne bana bende mbafue mu mvita amu. Nanku bena Izrayele kunyema, kushiya bimenga biabu. Bena Peleshete kuasa mu bimenga abi." 
1Samuel31:8 Butshia dinda, bena Peleshete kuya bua kuangula bintu bia bantu bavua bafue. Kusanganabu tshitalu tshia Shawule ne bia bana bende basatu pa mukuna wa Ngilbowa." 
1Samuel31:9 Kukosabu tshitalu tshia Shawule mutu. Kuangatabu bia mvita biende bionsu. Kuendakanabu nabi mu ditunga diabu dia bena Peleshete bua kutangalaja lumu lua disanka elu mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu, ne munkatshi mua bantu bonsu." 
1Samuel31:10 Pashishe bia mvita bia Shawule abi, kubitekabu mu nzubu wa mvidie wabu Astarte. Kusuikabu tshitalu tshiende ku tshimana tshia ku Bete-Sheyane." 
1Samuel31:11 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe mu Ngilaade, kumvuabu lumu lua bionsu bivua bena Peleshete benzele Shawule." 
1Samuel31:12 Bantu ba mu Yabeshe bavua ne dikima, kuenda butuku bujima too ne ku Bete-Sheyane. Kumushabu tshitumpampa tshia tshitalu tshia Shawule, ne bitalu bia bana bende ku tshimana. Pashishe kuyabu kuosha bitalu abi ku tshimenga tshia Yabeshe." 
1Samuel31:13 Kusangishabu mifuba ya bantu abu, kuyijika muinshi mua mutshi wa kampanga nzevu, uvua mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe. Nanku, bena mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe, kujilabu biakudia matuku muanda mutekete." 
2Samuel1:1 Davide mumane kutshimuna bena Amaleke, kuyaye kusombela mu tshimenga tshia Siklaje. Diba adi, Shawule ukavua mumane kufua. Davide kushala mu tshimenga atshi matuku abidi." 
2Samuel1:2 Dituku disatu, nsongalume kufika, ufumina mu mitanda ya Shawule. Uvua ne bilamba bipandike, ne maloba mu mutu, bua kuleja madilu. Anu nsongalume ufika pabuipi ne Davide, kudielaye mpala panshi." 
2Samuel1:3 Davide kumukonka ne: — Udi ufuma penyi? Kuandamunaye ne: — Ndi munyeme mu mitanda ya bena Izrayele. 
2Samuel1:4 Davide kumuambila ne: — Ndondela bivua bienzeka. Nsongalume kumuambila ne: — Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele mbanyeme mvita. Mbashipe bena mvita ba bungi. Mbashipe too ne mukalenga Shawule ne muanende Yonatane. 
2Samuel1:5 Davide kumukonka kabidi ne: — Muudi mumanye ne: Shawule ne Yonatane mbafue mmunyi? 
2Samuel1:6 Nsongalume kumuambila ne: — Meme mvua mufike ku mukuna wa Ngilbowa mu mpukapuka. Meme kumona Shawule mudishinde pa difuma diende. Bavua bamubambakaja bikole kudi baluishi bende, bavua ne matempu a mvita, ne kudi bavua babanda pa nyama ya tubalu." 
2Samuel1:7 Shawule ukenzakana, kummonaye, kumbikila. Meme kuitaba ne: “Eyowa, mukalenga.”" 
2Samuel1:8 Kunkonkaye ne: “Wewe udi muena nganyi?” Meme kumuambila ne: ndi muena Amaleke. 
2Samuel1:9 Ke Shawule kungamba bua meme kumushipa. Bualu nansha yeye ne lungenyi luende lujima, uvua ukengakana bikole." 
2Samuel1:10 Nanku meme kusemena pabuipi, kumushipa. Bualu mvua mumone ne: baluishi mbamane kumutshimuna, kakushala ne muoyi to. Pashishe meme kuangata tshifulu tshiende tshia bukalenga tshivua ku mutu, ne lukanu luvua ku diboku. Ndi mukutuadilebi muaba ewu." 
2Samuel1:11 Davide ne bantu bonsu bavua pabuipi nende, kudipandabu bilamba." 
2Samuel1:12 Kudilabu muadi too ne ku dilolu, bajila biakudia. Ke mushindu uvuabu benza madilu a Shawule, a Yonatane, ne a bena Izrayele bonsu, bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, bavua bafue mu mvita dituku adi." 
2Samuel1:13 Ke Davide kukonka nsongalume uvua mumuambile bualu abu ne: — Wewe udi muena nganyi? Nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muana wa muena Amaleke, udi musombela mu ditunga edi." 
2Samuel1:14 Davide kuela lubila ne: — Muudi kuyi mutshine bua kushipa mukalenga uvua Maweja-Nangila musungule mbishi? 
2Samuel1:15 Davide kubikila muntu wa ku bena mudimu bende, kumutumina diyi ne: — Semena apa, ushipe nsongalume ewu! Muena mudimu wa Davide kushipa muena Amaleke awu." 
2Samuel1:16 Davide kuela muena Amaleke awu lusanzu ne: — Wewe nkayebe udi mudikebele lufu. Udi mumane kudienzela bibi, bualu udi ujadika ne: “Meme ke udi mushipe mukalenga uvua Maweja-Nangila musungule.”" 
2Samuel1:17 Ke Davide kusaka musambu wa lufu lua Shawule ne Yonatane. 
2Samuel1:18 Kutumaye diyi bua balongeshe bena Yuda musambu awu. Badi binyika musambu awu ne: “Kasala ka madilu ka buta bua mikete.” Bavua baufunde mu Mukanda wa muntu wa Nsongu, mushindu ewu:" 
2Samuel1:19 Izrayele, bilobu biebe bia mvita mbifue munyi? Benu ba lumu mbafuile pa mikuna bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel1:20 Kanumanyishi bena Ngate lumu elu lubi, kanulutangalaji mu misesu ya Askalone. Bakaji ba bena Peleshete kabasanki nanku! Nsongakaji ya bantu benyi, kayedi mbila ya disanka!" 
2Samuel1:21 Ku mikuna ya Ngilbowa, lumuma nansha mvula kabiloki! Mu bibandabanda biayi, kamuikadi biakudia mu madimi! Bualu ke muaba uvuabu bimanshe ngabu ya bena mvita ngabu wa Shawule udibu kabayi mua kufita kabidi manyi." 
2Samuel1:22 Nansha baluishi babu bakeba mua kubashipa, nansha bena lukuna babu ne bukole, buta bua miketa bua Yonatane kabuvua butshina, muela wa Shawule uvua ukumbaja mudimu wawu kashidi." 
2Samuel1:23 Matuku abu onsu Shawule ne Yonatane bavua banangangana bikole. Dia lufu luabu, kabena bashiyangana. Bavua banyema lubilu, bapite biminyi. Bukitu buabu buvua bupite bua ntambue." 
2Samuel1:24 Bakaji ba mu ditunga dia Izrayele, dilayi Shawule! Uvua unuvuadika bilamba bimpe, bia mushinga mukole, ulengeja bilamba bienu ne bintu bia mpawungi." 
2Samuel1:25 Bilobu bia mvita mbifue mu mvita bua tshinyi? Yonatane mmufuile pa mikuna munyi? 
2Samuel1:26 Mwoyi wanyi udi unyingalala bualu buebe, Yonatane wanyi, muanetu mulunda wanyi wa pa muoyi. Dinanga diuvua munnange nadi, divua dinsankisha mudi dinanga dia bakaji kadiyi mua kunsankisha." 
2Samuel1:27 Bilobu bia mvita mbifue bua tshinyi? Ba kalanda musenga mbabutuke munyi? 
2Samuel2:1 Bionsu ebi bimane kupita, Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi mua kuya kusomba mu tshimenga tshikuabu tshia ku bimenga bia Yuda anyi? Maweja-Nangila ne: — Eyowa. Davide kumukonka kabidi ne: — Ndi mua kuya mu tshimenga kaayi? Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Udi mua kuya mu Ebrone." 
2Samuel2:2 Davide kuya mu tshimenga atshi, ne bakaji bende babidi, Akinowame, muena Yizreyele, ne Abigayile, muena Karmele, mukaji mukamba uvua Nabale mushiye." 
2Samuel2:3 Davide uvua muye kabidi ne bantu bavuaye nabu ne bena nzubu yabu. Kusombelabu mu misoku ivua mutumba ne Ebrone. 
2Samuel2:4 Ke bena Yuda kufika mu Ebrone bua kujidila Davide bua ikala mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Bantu bamane kuambila Davide ne: Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe mu Ngilaade mbajike Shawule," 
2Samuel2:5 kutumaye bantu bua bambila bena mu Yabeshe ne: “Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba, bualu nudi bajike mfumuenu Shawule, baleje munuvua bamunange." 
2Samuel2:6 Maweja-Nangila anuenzele bimpe, anunange. Meme nennuenzele kabidi bimpe, munuvua benza nanku." 
2Samuel2:7 Mpindiewu, nuikale ne dikima, nudileje bantu ba bukitu. Mfumuenu Shawule mmumane kufua. Meme Davide ke udi bena Yuda bajidile bua nshale mukalenga wenu.”" 
2Samuel2:8 Abnere, muana wa Nere, mfumu munene mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Shawule, uvua munyeme ne Ishebaale, muana wa Shawule, ku Makanayime." 
2Samuel2:9 Muaba awu, Abnere uvua mujadike Ishebaale mu bukalenga, bua ikale mukalenga wa buloba bua Ngilaade, bua Ashere, bua Yizreyele, bua Efrayime ne bua Binyamine, nanku bua maloba onsu a bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel2:10 Tshikondu atshi, Ishebaale uvua ne bidimu makumi anayi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi. Anu bena Yuda nkayabu ke bavua banyishe bukalenga bua Davide." 
2Samuel2:11 Davide kushala mukalenga wa bena Yuda mu Ebrone, bidimu muanda mutekete ne tshitupa." 
2Samuel2:12 Abnere, muana wa Nere, ne bena mvita bavua balame Ishebaale, muana wa Shawule, kumuka ku Makanayime, kuya luseke lua ku tshimenga tshia Ngibone." 
2Samuel2:13 Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, ne bena mvita bavua balame Davide, kutuadijabu kabidi luendu. Bisumbu ebi bibidi bia bena mvita, kusambakena pabuipi ne dijiba dia Ngibone. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita, aba ku luseke, bakuabu ku luseke lua dijiba adi." 
2Samuel2:14 Abnere kuambila Yowabe ne: — Ndi musue bua bansongalume bena mvita batudi nabu, baluangane babidi babidi, kumpala kuetu, bua tumanye udi mupite mukuabu ku bukole. Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi musue." 
2Samuel2:15 Bena mvita kusemena. Kusungulabu bena mvita ba mukalenga Ishebaale dikumi ne babidi ba mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine, ne bena mvita ba mukalenga Davide dikumi ne babidi." 
2Samuel2:16 Muena mvita yonsu kuela muluishi wende kankose ku nshingu, kumutua muela mu lubadi, kudishindabu pamue bonsu, kufua. Badi babikila muaba wa mu Ngibone awu ne “Budimi bua Mbuebue. ”" 
2Samuel2:17 Dituku adi, kuluanganabu mvita mikole. Bena mvita ba mukalenga Davide kutshimuna Abnere ne bende bavuaye nabu." 
2Samuel2:18 Bana ba Seruya basatu bavua mu mvita amu, Yowabe, Abishayi ne Ashayele. Ashayele uvua mupepele, unyema lubilu bu nyama wa kabuluku." 
2Samuel2:19 Kulondakajaye Abnere buludi, kayi ulonda muntu mukuabu to." 
2Samuel2:20 Abnere ukudimuka, kumukonka ne: — Ngwewe Ashayele anyi? Ashayele kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mmeme." 
2Samuel2:21 Abnere kumuambila ne: — Londa muntu mukuabu ku dia balume, nansha ku dia bakaji. Kolesha ukuate nsongalume wa ku bena mvita, umunyenga bia mvita bidiye nabi. Kadi Ashayele kavua musue to. Uvua anu ulondakaja Abnere." 
2Samuel2:22 Abnere kumuambila kabidi ne: — Ashayele, lekela kundonda! Udi musue bua meme kukushipa bua tshinyi? Diba adi, nentshine muanenu Yowabe, tshiyi mua kumutangila kabidi mu mpala to." 
2Samuel2:23 Kadi Ashayele kavua mulonde muntu mukuabu to, uvua ulonda anu Abnere. Ke Abnere kutua Ashayele lusongu lua difuma mu difu, kupatukalu pa nyima. Ashayele kudishinda, kufuila muaba awu. Pavua bena mvita bonsu bafike muaba uvua tshitalu tshia Ashayele, bavua anu bimana." 
2Samuel2:24 Kadi Yowabe ne Abishayi, kulondakaja Abnere. Diba divua dibuela, pafikibu ku Ngibeya-Ama, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ku Ngiya, mu njila wa mu tshipela tshia Ngibone." 
2Samuel2:25 Bena mvita ba bena Binyamine, kudisangisha pabuipi ne Abnere. Kuimanabu mu milongu pa mutu pa kakuna." 
2Samuel2:26 Abnere kukonka Yowabe ne: — Netuikale anu tushipangana katuyi tulekela anyi? Umanye ne: ku nshikidilu, bualu ebu nebutushile kanyinganyinga. Tudi bena muntu. Udi muindile tshinyi bua wewe kutuma diyi bua bena muntu balekele kuluishangana?" 
2Samuel2:27 Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikala ne: bu wewe kuyi mulombe bua bantu balekele kuluishangana, butuku ebu bujima bantu banyi bavua anu ne bua kunulondakaja." 
2Samuel2:28 Yowabe kuelesha mpungi. Bena mvita bende kulekela kulondakaja bena Izrayele. Nanku mvita kujika. 
2Samuel2:29 Butuku abu bujima, Abnere ne bena mvita bende kuenda mu tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene, pashishe kusabukabu musulu. Kupitshilabu mu Bitrone, kufikabu ku Makanayime." 
2Samuel2:30 Yowabe mumane kulekela kulondakaja Abnere, kusangishaye bena mvita bende. Anu Ashayele ne bena mvita dikumi ne tshitema ba ku bantu bavua balame mukalenga Davide, ke bavua bafue." 
2Samuel2:31 Kadi bena mvita ba mukalenga Davide, bavua bashipe bena Binyamine nkama isatu ne makumi asambombu, ne bena mvita bakuabu ba Abnere." 
2Samuel2:32 Kuambulabu tshitalu tshia Ashayele, kutshijikabu mu lukita lua tatuende ku Betleyeme. Pashishe Yowabe ne bena mvita bende, kuenda butuku bujima, ufika ku Ebrone, butuku bumane kutshia." 
2Samuel3:1 Matuku mavule, muvua mvita pankatshi pa bena mvita ba Davide ne ba Shawule. Kadi bukalenga bua Davide buvua buenda budiunda, bua ndelanganyi ya Shawule buenda buteketa bushepeketa." 
2Samuel3:2 Davide uvua mulele bana ba balume ba bungi mu Ebrone: Muanabute udi Amnone, muana wa Akinowame, muena Yizreyele." 
2Samuel3:3 Muana muibidi udi Kilabe, muana wa Abigayile, muena mu Karmele, mukaji mukamba uvua Nabale mushiye. Muana muisatu udi Absalome, muana wa Maaka, muana wa Talmayi, mukalenga wa bena Ngeshure." 
2Samuel3:4 Muana muinayi udi Adoniya, muana wa Angite. Muana muitanu udi Shefatya, muana wa Abitale." 
2Samuel3:5 Muana muisambombu udi Itreyame, muana wa Egla. Egla uvua kabidi mukaji wa mukalenga Davide. Aba ke bana ba balume ba mukalenga Davide, bavuaye mulele mu Ebrone." 
2Samuel3:6 Patshivua bena mvita ba Davide ne ba Shawule baluangana, Abnere uvua bukole bua bena mvita ba Shawule." 
2Samuel3:7 Shawule uvua ne mukaji mukuabu, dina diende Rispa, muana wa Aya. Dituku dikuabu, Ishebaale kukonka Abnere bua mukaji awu ne: — Uvua mubuelele mukaji wa tatuanyi Shawule mu nzubu bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel3:8 Abnere umvua nanku, kupeta tshiji tshikole. Kukonkaye Ishebaale ne: — Meme ndi mbua mutomboke udi uditua ku tshia bena Yuda anyi? Too ne mpindiewu, ndi muleje mundi ngitaba diku dia tatuebe Shawule, bana babu ne balunda bende. Ndi muenze muanyi muonsu bua Davide kakukuatshi to. Kadi lelu, udi untandisha bua pandi mubuelele mukaji ewu mu nzubu!" 
2Samuel3:9 Maweja-Nangila annyoke bikole, pangikala tshiyi ngenzela Davide bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumulaye." 
2Samuel3:10 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuditshipa bua kumusha bukalenga mu nzubu mua Shawule, kubupesha Davide, bua bukalenga bua Davide budiunde mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, ku mutu wadi too ne kuinshi, mudiye nabu mu ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
2Samuel3:11 Ishebaale uvua uzakala bikole ne bowa, kayi ne mushindu wa kuandamuna Abnere muaku nansha umue to." 
2Samuel3:12 Ke Abnere kutuma bantu kudi Davide bua kumukonka ne: “Ditunga edi ndia nganyi? Tutue nebe ndondu. Nenkuambuluishe bua bena Izrayele bonsu bumvuangane nebe.” 
2Samuel3:13 Davide kuitaba ne: “Eyowa, ndi muanyishe bua kutua nebe ndondu. Kadi ndi nkulomba anu tshintu tshimue: bua meme kumonangana nebe, ufike ne mukajanyi Mikale, muana wa Shawule. Anu wewe mufike nende, nanku netuyukile nebe.”" 
2Samuel3:14 Ke Davide kutuma bantu kudi Ishebaale, muana wa Shawule, bua kumuambila ne: “Umpingajile mukajanyi Mikale, umvua musele ku makoba lukama a misosu ya bena Peleshete.”" 
2Samuel3:15 Nanku Ishebaale kubikidisha Mikale uvua kua bayende Palti yele, muana wa Layishe." 
2Samuel3:16 Paltiyele kuya ne Mikale, wenda udila Mikale too ne ku Bakurime. Bafike ku Bakurime, Abnere kutuma diyi bua Paltiyele apingane kuende. Awu kupingana." 
2Samuel3:17 Abnere kuyukila ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele, kubambila ne: — Kukadi bidimu bia bungi binudi nujinga amu kujinga bua Davide kuikalaye mukalenga wenu." 
2Samuel3:18 Mpindiewu, tshikondu tshiakumbanyi tshia kuenza bualu abu! Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuamba bua Davide ne: “Anu muntu wanyi Davide ke wasungidila bantu banyi bena Izrayele, mu bianza bia bena Peleshete ne mu bianza bia baluishi babu bakuabu bonsu.”" 
2Samuel3:19 Abnere kuyukila kabidi ne bena Binyamine. Pashishe kuyaye ku Ebrone bua ajadikile Davide, tshivua bena Binyamine ne bena Izrayele bakuabu, bitabe ne muoyi umue bua kuenza." 
2Samuel3:20 Abnere kufika kua Davide mu Ebrone ne bantu makumi abidi. Davide kubalambishila biakudia bia disanka. 
2Samuel3:21 Abnere kuambila Davide ne: — Mukalenga, ndi musue kupingana bua kuyukila ne bena Izrayele bonsu bua bashale ku luseke luebe. Nebatue nebe ndondu. Nanku neushale mukalenga wa ditunga dijima bu muudi ujinga. Davide kulayangana bimpe ne Abnere. Awu kumuka, kabayi bamutatshishe kudi muntu." 
2Samuel3:22 Mutantshi mukese, Yowabe kufika ne bena mvita bavua balame Davide. Yowabe uvua ufuma ku mvita, mumane kupawula bintu bipite bungi. Abnere katshivua kabidi kua Davide mu Ebrone to. Bualu mukalenga Davide ukavua mumane kulayangana nende anu bimpe, bua aye, bantu kabayi bamutatshisha." 
2Samuel3:23 Amu Yowabe ufika ne bena mvita bonsu bavuaye nabu, muntu mukuabu kumuambila ne: Abnere muana wa Nere, uvua mufike muaba ewu bua kumonangana ne mukalenga Davide. Kadi mukalega Davide kumulaya anu bimpe." 
2Samuel3:24 Ke Yowabe kuya kudi mukalenga Davide, umukonka ne: — Udi muenze nenku bua tshinyi? Abnere mumane kufika, wewe kumulekela kuyaye!" 
2Samuel3:25 Wewe udi mumanye Abnere bimpe! Padiye mufike kuudi mbua kukushima, bua kutentekela njila iudi wendela, kabidi bua kumanya bionsu biudi wenza." 
2Samuel3:26 Yowabe umuka kua mukalenga Davide, kutumaye bantu bua bakuate Abnere. Kumukuatabu ku tshiina tshia mayi tshia Sira, Davide kayi mumanye to. Kupinganabu nende mu Ebrone." 
2Samuel3:27 Bamane kufika ne Abnere ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga, Yowabe kubuela nende mu tshimenga, kuya nende pa nkayende, bu udi musue kumuambila bualu bua musokoku. Muaba awu, Yowabe kutua Abnere muela mu difu. Kumushipaye bua kusombuela lufu lua muanabu Ashayele." 
2Samuel3:28 Amu Davide upeta lumu lua bionsu bivua bienzeka abi, kuambaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye ne: meme ne bena mu bukalenga buanyi, tudi babinge kashidi bua lufu lua Abnere, muana wa Nere." 
2Samuel3:29 Amu Yowabe ne bena mu nzubu wende bonsu, ke bena tshibawu. Ku ndelanganyi yende mu bikondu bionsu, muntu neapete disama dia tufina tupatuka mu mubidi, nansha nsudi, ikale wenda ne dikombu, afue ku muela wa mvita, apanga biakudia!" 
2Samuel3:30 Ke muvua Yowabe ne muanabu Abishayi bashipe Abnere, bualu Abnere uvua mushipe muanabu Ashayele mu mvita ya mu Ngibone." 
2Samuel3:31 Davide kutumina Yowabe ne bantu bende bonsu diyi ne: — Pandayi bilamba bienu, vualayi bilamba bikayabala, nuikale ne madilu a Abnere. Bantu bonsu bavua balonda tshitalu tshia Abnere, ne mukalenga Davide kabidi." 
2Samuel3:32 Kujikabu Abnere mu Ebrone. Mukalenga Davide kudila muadi mukole ku lukita lua Abnere. Bantu bonsu kudila. 
2Samuel3:33 Ke mukalenga Davide kuela kasala ka muadi, utumbisha Abnere, wamba ne: Abnere wanyi ee! Udi mufue lufu lua muntu mutshimbakane bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel3:34 Bianza biebe kabavua babisuika mionji, makasa ebe kabavua baela mu tshikunyi. Udi mufue bu muntu mutapa kudi bantu babi, bashipianganyi! Bantu bonsu bavua ku lukita aku, bavua amu badila." 
2Samuel3:35 Butuku kabuyi buanji kuila, bantu kusemena kudi mukalenga Davide bua kumupesha biakudia. Kadi mukalenga Davide kuditshipa, wamba ne: — Meme mudie tshipese tshia diampa, nansha tshintu tshikuabu, butuku kabuyi buanji kuila, Maweja-Nangila annyoke ne dinyoka dikole!" 
2Samuel3:36 Bantu bonsu kumanya bualu abu, kusanka. Misangu yonsu bantu bavua banyisha bivua Davide wenza." 
2Samuel3:37 Nanku dituku adi, bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele bonsu kujadika ne: mukalenga Davide kavua mutume diyi bua bashipe Abnere, muana wa Nere, to." 
2Samuel3:38 Mukalenga Davide kuambila kabidi Balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: — Mfumu, mfumu munene wa bena Izrayele mmufue lelu. Nudi bela meji bimpe ku bualu ebu anyi?" 
2Samuel3:39 Bulelela, meme Davide ndi mukalenga. Kadi lelu ndi ngunwua butekete bua bungi. Bana aba ba Seruya, mbana babi, badi bampite bukole. Nanku Maweja-Nangila nkayende anyoke bantu badi benza bualu ebu." 
2Samuel4:1 Ishebaale, muana wa Shawule, kupeta lumu lua lufu lua Abnere ku Ebrone. Kumvuaye bowa. Bena Izrayele bonsu kuzakala bikole." 
2Samuel4:2 Ishebaale uvua ne bantu bende babidi, bikale balombodi ba bena mvita. Mena abu avua: Baana ne Rekabe. Bavua bana ba Rimone, muena Binyamine, wa mu musoku wa Beyerote, (Musoku wa Beyerote uvua mubuele mu buloba bua Binyamine," 
2Samuel4:3 biangatshile tshikondu tshivua bantu, bavua basombe kale mu musoku ewu banyemene mu musoku wa Ngitayime, muaba utshidi ndelanganyi yabu too ne mpindiewu.)" 
2Samuel4:4 Yonatane, muana wa Shawule, uvua mushiye kabidi muana wa balume, dina diende Mefibaale Muana awu uvua mutshibuke mikolu yonsu ibidi. Pavua lumu lua lufu lua Shawule ne Yonatane lufume mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele, Mefibaale uvua ne bidimu bitanu. Nanku, ndeji wa muana ewu, kumuela ku lubesa bua kunyema nende. Kadi pavuaye unyema, muana kufinuka kudishinda, kutshibuka." 
2Samuel4:5 Baana ne Rekabe, bana ba Rimone, muena mu musoku wa Beyerote, kuya kua Ishebaale. Kufikabu kumbelu munda munya. Kusanganabu Ishebaale mulale bua kuikisha." 
2Samuel4:6 Kubuelabu mu nzubu, bu badi bamutuadila ntete ya kuenza bukula. Kusanganabu Ishebaale mu nzubu wende wa bulalu, mulale. Kumutuabu muela mu difu. Baana ne muanabu Rekabe, bamane kushipa Ishebaale kumukosa mutu kunyema nawu." 
2Samuel4:7 Kuendabu butuku bujima, balonda njila wa mu tshibandabanda tshia Yardene." 
2Samuel4:8 Kufikabu ne mutu wa Ishebaale kudi mukalenga Davide ku Ebrone, bamuambila ne: — Mukalenga, tangila mutu wa Ishebaale, muana wa muluishi webe Shawule, uvua ukeba mua kukushipa. Lelu Maweja-Nangila mmusombuele Shawule ne ndelanganyi yende bualu buebe." 
2Samuel4:9 Davide kuela mbila ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, udi unsungidila ku makenga onsu," 
2Samuel4:10 ndi nditshipa ne: muntu uvua mungambile bua lufu lua Shawule, uvua wela meji ne: mmungambile bualu bua disanka. Kadi mvua mumukuatshishe bua kumushipesha ku Siklaje. Kupetaye dinyoka dia bualu buvuaye muambe." 
2Samuel4:11 Kadi nuenu bantu bena buenzayi, badi bashipa muntu kayi ne bualu, muikale mu nzubu wende, mulale pa bulalu buende, meme ndi mua kunuenzela tshinyi? Ndi nnunyoka bua dishipangana dienu. Ndi nnumusha pa buloba kashidi." 
2Samuel4:12 Davide kutuma diyi kudi bansongalume bende bena mvita. Kushipabu Rekabe ne Baana. Pashishe kubakosabu bianza ne makasa. Kubilembelejabu pabuipi ne tshiina tshia mayi tshia mu Ebrone. Kadi mutu wa Ishebaale, kuujikabu mu lukita lua Abnere mu Ebrone." 
2Samuel5:1 Bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, kuya kudi Davide mu Ebrone bamuambila ne: — Tudi nebe bena muntu, bena diku dimue." 
2Samuel5:2 Kale patshivua Shawule mukalenga wetu, ukavua ulombola bena Izrayele mu mvita yabu. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kukuambila ne: “Wewe Davide newikale, mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele, newikale mfumuabu.”" 
2Samuel5:3 Nanku bakulu bonsu ba bena Izrayele kufika, kuya kudi mukalenga Davide mu Ebrone. Davide kutua nabu ndondu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Kujidilabu Davide bua ikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel5:4 Tshikondu tshivua Davide mubuele mu bukalenga, uvua ne bidimu makumi asatu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi anayi." 
2Samuel5:5 Mu Ebrone, uvua mushale mukalenga wa bena Yuda bidimu muanda mutekete ne tshitupa. Mu Yerushalayime, uvua mushale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu ne wa bena Yuda, bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu." 
2Samuel5:6 Mukalenga Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kuya kuluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Ke bena Yebusa bavua base mu tshimenga atshi, kuambila Davide ne: — Kuakubuela mu tshimenga tshietu to. Bualu nansha bampofu ne bantu badi batebuke badi anu mua kupeta bukole bukumbane bua kukuipata. Bavua bafuna mushindu ewu bua kujadika ne: Davide kena mua kukuata tshimenga to." 
2Samuel5:7 Kadi Davide kukuata mukuna wa Siyone uvuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Ke pavuabu binyika mukuna wa Siyone awu ne: Tshimenga tshia Davide. 
2Samuel5:8 Dituku adi, Davide kuamba ne: “Pikala muntu musue, kutshimuna bena Yebusa, abuele mu mukidi wa mayi, udi muinshi mua buloba, bua kufika muaba udibu. Kuntelela bampofu ne batebuki nkunseka menemene.” Ke padi bantu bamba ne: “Mpofu ne bantu badi batebuka, kabena mua kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. ”" 
2Samuel5:9 Davide kuya kusomba muaba uvuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Kuinyikaye muaba awu ne: “Tshimenga tshia Davide” Pashishe Davide kuibakaye bimana bikuabu, pankatshi pa nzubu wende, ne tshibumba tshia Milo." 
2Samuel5:10 Nanku bukole bua Davide buvua buenda buvulangane, bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele uvua nende." 
2Samuel5:11 Irame, mukalenga wa Tire, kutuma bantu kudi Davide, ne mitshi ya sedre kabidi ne bena mabaya ne basongi ba mabue, bua bashile Davide nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Samuel5:12 Ke Davide kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila nkayende mmumpe bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, mmuele bukalenga buanyi lupemba, bualu bua bantu bende, bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel5:13 Mukalenga Davide mumane kumuangata mu Ebrone, muye mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, kuselaye bakaji bakuabu, bana ba bakalenga ne bana ba bantu bakuabu. Bakaji abu, kulela bana ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
2Samuel5:14 Mena a bana ba balume bavua Davide mulele mu Yerushalayime adi nunku: Shamuwa, Shobabe, Natane, Shelomu," 
2Samuel5:15 Ibare, Elishuwa, Nefeje, Yafiya," 
2Samuel5:16 Elishame, Eliyada ne Elifelete." 
2Samuel5:17 Bena Peleshete kupeta lumu ne: mbamane kujidila Davide bua kuikalaye mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu. Nanku kuyabu bonsu kuluisha Davide bua kumukuata. Davide upeta lumu alu, kuyaye muaba uvuabu bibaka ne bimana bikole." 
2Samuel5:18 Bena Peleshete kufika mu tshibandabanda tshia mu Refayime. 
2Samuel5:19 Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi mua kuya kuluisha bena Peleshete anyi? Maweja-Nangila neubafile mu bianza bianyi anyi? Maweja-Nangila kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, uye kubaluisha! Nembafile mu bianza biebe bulelela." 
2Samuel5:20 Nanku Davide kuya ku Bale-Perashime, kutshimuna bena Peleshete muaba awu, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmupandulule baluishi banyi kumpala kuanyi, anu bu mudi musulu upanda nkita. Ke padibu binyika muaba awu ne: Bale-Perashime, mmumue ne: “Mfumu udi upanda nkita.”" 
2Samuel5:21 Pavua bena Peleshete banyema, bavua bashiya mpingu yabu muaba awu. Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu kuyambula." 
2Samuel5:22 Bena Peleshete kuya kabidi kuluisha Davide. Kubuelabu mu tshibandabanda tshia Refayime. 
2Samuel5:23 Dayide kukonka kabidi Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Kuena mua kubaluisha muaba ewu to! Kadi ubapingane pa nyima. Usemene pabuipi nabu ku mpenga kua ditu dia mitshi ya mikokuliye. 
2Samuel5:24 Kadi paumvua mikuma ku nsongu ya mitshi, ujuke lukasa, utuadije kubaluisha. Diba adi, meme Maweja-Nangila nempite kumpala kuebe bua kutshimuna bena mvita ba bena Peleshete." 
2Samuel5:25 Davide kuenza amu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Ke pavuaye mutshimune bena Peleshete, kubalondakaja biangatshile ku Ngeba too ne ku tshibuelelu tshia musoku wa Ngezere." 
2Samuel6:1 Davide kusangisha bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele, bavua bamanye mvita bikole. Bavua binunu makumi asatu." 
2Samuel6:2 Kuyaye nabu ku Baala, mu Yuda, bua kuangata mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mushete awu udi ne dina dia Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, udi usomba pa mutu pa bakerubine." 
2Samuel6:3 Mushete awu uvua pa kakuna, mu nzubu mua Abinadabe. Kuutekabu mu ditempu ditshivua dipiadipia, kuyabu nawu. Uza ne Akiyo, bana ba balume ba Abinadabe, bavua baludika ditempu adi," 
2Samuel6:4 divua ne musheta. Akiyo ke uvua wenda kumpala. 
2Samuel6:5 Davide ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua basanka kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bimba biombelu bia mishindu mishilangane, bienza ne mabaya a mitshi ya pin, bu bisanji, nzenze, ngoma, makasa, ne biamu bia kututakaja." 
2Samuel6:6 Bafika pabuipi ne tshishipuilu tshia ku Nakone ngombe ivua ikeba kudishinda ne mushete wa tshijila. Uza kukuata mushete bua kaukuluki. 
2Samuel6:7 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kufikila Uza munda bikole. Kumushipaye, anu muaba awu, bua bualu buvuaye muenze, kayi muanji kuela meji. Uza kufuila muaba awu, pabuipi ne mushete wa tshijila." 
2Samuel6:8 Davide umona ne: Maweja-Nangila mmushipe Uza, kufikaye munda. Kuinyikaye muaba awu dina ne: Perese-Uza. Dina edi ditshidiku too ne mpindiewu." 
2Samuel6:9 Dituku adi, Davide kutshina Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Tshiena mua kuya ku nzubu kuanyi ne mushete wa Maweja-Nangila to!" 
2Samuel6:10 Nanku, Davide kubenga bua kuyabu ne mushete awu ku nzubu kuende mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kutekeshaye mushete awu mu nzubu mua Obede-Edome, muena Ngate." 
2Samuel6:11 Mushete kushala mu nzubu amu ngondu isatu. Maweja-Nangila kuela Obede-Edome ne bena diende bonsu lupemba. 
2Samuel6:12 Kuambilabu Davide ne: Maweja-Nangila mmuela Obede-Edome lupemba mu bionsu bidiye wenza, bualu bua mushete wa tshijila. Nanku Davide ne tshisumbu tshia bantu tshivuaye natshi, kuya kua Obede-Edome bua kuangata mushete, kuya nawu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide ne luendu lua disanka." 
2Samuel6:13 Bantu bavua bambula mushete bamane kuenda mutantshi wa makasa asambombu, Davide kulambula ngombe mulume ne muana wa ngombe wa manyi." 
2Samuel6:14 Pashishe Davide kutuadija kuja maja ne bukole buende buonsu bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Uvua muvuale anu tshilamba tshia ndanda tshia batuangaji. 
2Samuel6:15 Davide ne bena Izrayele, kufika ne mushete wa Maweja-Nangila mu Yerushalayime, benda bela mbila ya disanka ne mpungi." 
2Samuel6:16 Musangu uvua mushete mufike mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, Mikale, muana wa Shawule, uvua mutangile pa dididishi. Kumonaye mukalenga Davide uja maja, unyunguluka kumpala kua mushete. Ke Mikale kudiula mukalenga Davide bikole." 
2Samuel6:17 Kuyabu kuteka mushete muaba uvuabu bamane kulongolola, mu ntenta uvua Davide muashile mushete awu. Ke Davide kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue." 
2Samuel6:18 Davide mumane kujikija kulambula milambu, kuelaye bantu bonsu lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel6:19 Pashishe Davide kuabanyina bena Izrayele bonsu, balume ne bakaji, biakudia. Muntu yonsu kupeta diampa dipepela, mukata muenza ne bimuma bia date, mukuabu muenza ne tumuma tua mvinyo tumane kuuma. Ke muntu yonsu kupingana ku nzubu kuende." 
2Samuel6:20 Davide kupingana ku nzubu kuende bua kuela bena diende muoyi. Kadi Mikale, muana wa Shawule, kupatuka bua kusambakena nende. Kumuambilaye ne: — Lelu, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kavua kabidi ne lumu to. Uvua uja maja bu muntu mutshimbakane, bakaji bapika ba bena mudimu bende bamutangile!" 
2Samuel6:21 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Mvua ngenza bionsu abi, anu bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, uvua munsungule bua meme kuikala mukalenga wa bantu bende bena Izrayele. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubenge tatuebe Shawule ne bena nzubu wende bonsu. Nanku meme Davide, nensanke anu kusanka bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila." 
2Samuel6:22 Neudipuekeshe, ndifuisha bundu bikole, kadi nansha bakaji bena mudimu baudi wamba aba, nebannemeke, bampetesha lumu." 
2Samuel6:23 Mikale, muana wa Shawule, kavua mulele muana too ne ku lufu luende!" 
2Samuel7:1 Mukalenga Davide kuya kusomba mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Maweja-Nangila kumulama bimpe kudi baluishi bonsu, bavua banyungulula bukalenga buende." 
2Samuel7:2 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga Davide kuambila muambi Natane ne: — Meme Davide ndi musombe mu nzubu muasa ne mitshi ya sedre, kadi mushete wa Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila udi anu mu ntenta wa bilamba. Udi wela meji kaayi?" 
2Samuel7:3 Muambi Natane kuandamuna ne: — Ukadi mumane kuela meji pa bualu ebu. Mbimpe ukumbaje biudi musue kuenza. Maweja-Nangila neakuambuluishe. 
2Samuel7:4 Kadi butuku abu, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Natane ne:" 
2Samuel7:5 — Ndaku kudi Davide, muntu wanyi. Umuambile ne: teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Wewe Davide kuena mua kungashila nzubu undi mua kusomba to.”" 
2Samuel7:6 Bualu biangatshile dituku dimvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu too ne mpindiewu, katshia tshiena muanji kusomba mu nzubu to. Kadi, mvua anu musombe mu ntenta, muaba wa tshijila, ngendakana ne bena Izrayele mu njila. Matuku awu onsu, mvua muteke balombodi bashilangane bua baludike bantu banyi bena Izrayele bimpe. Kadi tshivua mujane mulombodi nansha umue ne: kena mungashile nzubu wa mitshi ya sedre bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel7:7  
2Samuel7:8 “Wambile Davide kabidi ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Pauvua mulami wa mikoku, meme kukumusha ku mudimu awu, bua wewe kuikala mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel7:9 Meme kukuambuluisha mu midimu yebe yonsu. Meme kubutula baluishi bebe bonsu bavua kumpala kuebe. Nenkupeteshe lumu lunene. Newikale mumanyike bu mudi bakalenga banene bonsu badi bamanyike bikole pa buloba. 
2Samuel7:10 Nensunguile bantu banyi bena Izrayele muaba undi musue bua kusombabu, kabayi batshina kabidi bualu nansha bumue to. Tshisamba tshikuabu katshiena mua kubakengesha kabidi, bu muvuabu babakengesha bangabanga," 
2Samuel7:11 tshikondu tshimvua muteke balombodi bua baludike bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Wewe Davide, nenkusungile ku baluishi bebe bonsu. Nanku ndi nkumanyisha ne: meme Maweja-Nangila nenkushile nzubu." 
2Samuel7:12 Pakumbana diba dia lufu luebe, nensungule umue wa ku bana bebe menemene, bua kukupinganaye mu bukalenga. Nemmuambuluishe bua kushindamaye mu bukalenga." 
2Samuel7:13 Muanebe awu, neangibakile nzubu. Nemmujadike mu bukalenga kashidi." 
2Samuel7:14 Nengikale tatuende, yeye neikale muananyi. Pikalaye muenza bibi, nemmunyoke bu mudi tatu unyoka muanende." 
2Samuel7:15 Kadi tshiena mua kumubenga, bu mumvua mulekele Shawule bua wewe kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Samuel7:16 Misangu yonsu, muana wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neakupingane mu bukalenga, bualu bukalenga nebushale mu nzubu muebe kashidi.’ ”" 
2Samuel7:17 Muambi Natane, kuambila Davide bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuleje." 
2Samuel7:18 Ke mukalenga Davide kuya mu ntenta wa tshijila, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, umulomba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi mumanye ne: meme ne bena nzubu wanyi, katuvua bakanyine kupeta bionsu biudi mutuenzele ebi to." 
2Samuel7:19 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, udi mumone ne: bionsu biudi mutuenzele kabiena bianji kukumbana. Nanku, utshidi anu ulaya bena nzubu wanyi, bua kubenzela bimpe. Kabidi udi ummanyisha bionsu ebi, meme muntu patupu." 
2Samuel7:20 Maweja-Nangila, tshiena kabidi ne tshindi mua kuamba. Bualu wewe, udi mummanye meme muntu webe." 
2Samuel7:21 Bu muuvua mumane kulaya, kabidi bu muudi munnange, wewe kukumbaja bionsu biuvua muambe. Wewe kubingambila!" 
2Samuel7:22 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe udi muena bukole buonsu! Kakuena mukuabu udi bu wewe. Ke mutudi bumvue bantu bonsu bamba nanku." 
2Samuel7:23 Kakuena tshisamba tshikuabu pa buloba tshidi tshifuanangane ne tshia bena Izrayele. Wewe Maweja-Nangila uvua mufike bua kupikula amu bena Izrayele ku bupika bua bena Ejipitu, ne mu bianza bia mvidie yabu, bua bikale tshisamba tshiebe wewe. Nanku udi mupeteshe bena Izrayele lumu, bualu udi mubenzele malu a dikema, nansha adi akuatshisha bowa mu ditunga diebe." 
2Samuel7:24 Wewe kuangata bena Izrayele, bua bashale tshisamba tshiebe kashidi. Maweja-Nangila wewe kushala Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel7:25 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ukumbaje biuvua muambe. Bionsu biuvua mumane kundaya meme Davide ne ndelanganyi yanyi, ubikumbaje kashidi." 
2Samuel7:26 Nanku newikale ne lumu kashidi. Bantu nebambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ke Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu!” Ujadike ndelanganyi yanyi mu bukalenga." 
2Samuel7:27 Bualu wewe Maweja-Nangila, muena bukole buonsu, ne Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ke udi mummanyishe meji ebe, a kumpesha ndelanganyi idi mua kumpingana mu bukalenga. Ke pandi mupete dikima dia kukulomba mushindu ewu." 
2Samuel7:28 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu. Bionsu biudi wamba bidi bikumbana! Mpindiewu udi undaya diakalenga edi!" 
2Samuel7:29 Nanku, ela bena diku dianyi lupemba, bua ndelanganyi yanyi ishale mu bukalenga kashidi kumpala kuebe. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bu muuvua mumane kulaya, ela bena nzubu wanyi lupemba kashidi!" 
2Samuel8:1 Pashishe Davide kutshimuna bena Peleshete. Kushalabu ne bundu, kabatshiyi ne bumfumu mu buloba abu." 
2Samuel8:2 Davide kutshimuna kabidi bena Mowabe. Kubaladikaye panshi. Ku bantu basatu, uvua ushipa babidi ba kudibu, ushiya amu muntu umue ne muoyi. Biangatshile musangu awu, bena Mowabe, kushala ku bumfumu bua Davide. Kubalambuishaye bitadi." 
2Samuel8:3 Pavua Adadezere, muana wa Rekobe, mukalenga wa Soba, mu ditunga dia bena Siriya, mu luendu, ukeba mua kukuata tshiakabidi buloba bua ku musulu wa Perate, Davide kumutshimuna." 
2Samuel8:4 Kukuataye bantu tshinunu ne nkama muanda mutekete mu lukanu, bavua babanda pa nyama ya tubalu, ne bantu bavua benda ku makasa binunu makumi abidi. Davide kusungula nyama ya tubalu mikumbane bua matempu ende lukama. Kadi nyama ya tubalu yonsu ivua mishale, kuyikosaye mijilu ya ku bikonu." 
2Samuel8:5 Pashishe bena Siriya ba mu Damase, kufika bua kuambuluisha Adadezere mu mvita. Kadi Davide kubatshimunaye kabidi. Kushipaye bantu ba kudibu binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
2Samuel8:6 Davide kuteka balombodi ba bukalenga buende mu Siriya. Bena Siriya kushala ku bumfumu bua Davide. Kubalambuishaye bitadi. Ke mushindu uvua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe Davide bukole bua kutshimuna mvita yonsu nanku. 
2Samuel8:7 Davide kunyenga ngabu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivuabu nayi kudi bena mvita bavua balame Adadezere, kuyaye nabi mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel8:8 Kuangataye kabidi tshiamu tshikunze tshipite bungi, tshivua mu Beta ne mu Berotayi, bimenga bibidi bivua mu bukalenga bua Adadezere." 
2Samuel8:9 Towu, mukalenga wa Amate kumvua ne: Davide mmutshimune bena mvita bonsu ba Adadezere." 
2Samuel8:10 Kutumaye muanende Yorame kudi mukalenga Davide bua kumuela muoyi ne tuasakidila, bualu uvua mutshimune Adadezere. Bualu Adadezere uvua muluishi wa Towu. Yorame kutuadila Davide bintu bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kabidi ne tshiamu tshikunze." 
2Samuel8:11 Mukalenga Davide kujidila bintu abi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bu nuwuaye mujidila tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshia mpawungi, bivuabu bamutumine kudi bantu ba bisamba bivuaye mumane kukuata:" 
2Samuel8:12 (Bena Siriya, bena Mowabe, bena Amone, bena Peleshete ne bena Amaleke). Ke nuwuaye mujidila kabidi bintu bionsu bivuaye munyenga Adadezere." 
2Samuel8:13 Ke muvua Davide mupete lumu nanku. Davide mumane kutshimuna bena Siriya, kupinganaye. Kuyaye kutshimuna kabidi bena Edome bavua mu tshibandabanda tshia luepu, kushipa bantu binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
2Samuel8:14 Davide kuteka balombodi ba bukalenga buende mu Edome. Bena Edome kushala ku bumfumu bua Davide. Ke mushindu uvua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe Davide bukole bua kutshimuna mvita yonsu nanku. 
2Samuel8:15 Davide kudia bukalenga mu Izrayele mujima. Uvua ubalumbuluisha amu bimpe, kayi ne kansungansunga." 
2Samuel8:16 Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, uvua mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Davide. Yosafate, muana wa Akilude, uvua umanyisha bantu malu a mu bukalenga." 
2Samuel8:17 Sadoke, muana wa Akitube, pamue ne Akimeleke, muana wa Abiyatare, ke bavua batuangaji. Seraya uvua mufundi." 
2Samuel8:18 Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, uvua mulombodi wa bena Kireti, ne bena Peleti, bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga Davide. Bana ba Davide bavua batuangaji kabidi." 
2Samuel9:1 Dituku dikuabu, Davide kukonka ne: — Mu nzubu mua Shawule, kamuena muntu nansha umue udi mushale ne muoyi anyi? Ndi musue kumuenzela bimpe mu dina dia Yonatane." 
2Samuel9:2 Mu nzubu mua Shawule muvua muena mudimu mukuabu, dina diende Siba. Kuyabu nende kudi mukalenga Davide. Davide kumukonka ne: — Wewe ke Siba anyi? Siba kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga, mmeme." 
2Samuel9:3 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mu nzubu mua Shawule, kamuena mushalaku muntu nansha umue bua meme kumuenzela bimpe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila anyi? Siba kuandamuna ne: — Muana wa Yonatane mmushale, kadi mmutshibuke mikolu." 
2Samuel9:4 Mukalenga Davide kumuebeja ne: — Muana awu udi penyi? Siba kuandamuna ne: — Udi ku Lodabare, ku nzubu kua Makire, muana wa Amiyele." 
2Samuel9:5 Davide kutuma muntu ku Lodabare, bua kukeba muana awu." 
2Samuel9:6 Mefibaale, muana wa Yonatane, muikale muikulu wa Shawule, mumane kufika kua Davide, kudielaye mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide. Davide kumukonka ne: — Wewe ke Mefibaale anyi? Mefibaale kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga, mmeme." 
2Samuel9:7 Davide kumuambila ne: — Kutshinyi to. Ndi nkuenzela bimpe mu dina dia tatuebe Yonatane. Ndi kupingajila maloba onsu avua a kakuebe Shawule. Newikale udia nanyi ku mesa matuku onsu. 
2Samuel9:8 Mefibaale, kuinyika mutu, wamba ne: — Mukalenga, udi utata bua kungenzela bionsu abi bua tshinyi? Meme, ndi bu mbua mumane kufua." 
2Samuel9:9 Ke mukalenga Davide kubikidishaye Siba, muena mudimu wa Shawule, umuambila ne: — Bintu bionsu bivua bia Shawule mfumuebe, ne bia bena nzubu wende, ndi mbipesha muikuluende Mefibaale." 
2Samuel9:10 Wewe Siba, bana bebe ne bena mudimu bebe, nudimine Mefibaale madimi, bua kupetaye biakudia. Kadi netuikale tudia ne Mefibaale ku mesa anyi matuku onsu. Siba uvua ne bana ba balume dikumi ne batanu. Uvua ne bena mudimu makumi abidi." 
2Samuel9:11 Kuambilaye Davide ne: — Mukalenga, nenkumbaje bionsu biudi mungambile. Kadi misangu yonsu Mefibaale neikale ne tshibidilu tshia kudia nanyi ku mesa, bualu mmuana wa ku ndelanganyi ya Shawule." 
2Samuel9:12 Mefibaale uvua ne muana wa balume, dina diende Mika. Bantu bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa Siba bavua anu bakuatshila Mefibaale mudimu." 
2Samuel9:13 Bu muvua Mefibaale mutshibuke mikolu yonsu ibidi, kusombelaye mu Yerushalayime, bua amone mua kudia ne mukalenga Davide ku mesa matuku onsu." 
2Samuel10:1 Matuku mamane kupita, mukalenga wa bena Amone kufua, muanende Anune kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Samuel10:2 Davide kuamba ne: “Ndi musue kuenzela Anune, muana wa Nakashe bimpe, bu muvue tatuende mungenzele.” Nanku, Davide kutuma balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende kudi Anune, bua kumusamba bua lufu lua tatuende. Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Davide bamane kufika mu ditunga dia bena Amone," 
2Samuel10:3 balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Amone kuambila mfumuabu Anune ne: — Udi wela meji ne: Davide mmutume balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende anu bua kukusamba bua lufu lua tatuebe anyi? Mmubatume bua kutentekela tshimenga etshi, bua kutshikuatabu dituku dikuabu." 
2Samuel10:4 Nanku Anune kutuma diyi, bua bakuate balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Davide. Kubakuatabu, kubabeya miedi luseke lumue. Kubakosabu bilamba bivuabu bavuala, kushalabi bishikidila pa mataku. Kubalekelabu bua bapingane kuabu." 
2Samuel10:5 Kumanyishabu Davide bionsu abi. Kutumaye bantu bua baye kuakidila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, bualu bavua ne bundu bua bungi. Mukalenga Davide kubatumina diyi ne: “Nusombele amu mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko too ne pikala miedi yenu mimena kabidi. Pashishe nenufike muaba ewu.”" 
2Samuel10:6 Bena Amone kumona ne: Davide ukadi muluishi wetu. Nanku kufutabu bena mvita binunu makumi abidi ba bena Siriya, ba mu Beterekobe ne mu Soba, bena mvita tshinunu ba mukalenga wa Maaka, ne bena mvita binunu dikumi ne bibidi ba mu Tobe." 
2Samuel10:7 Davide upeta lumu lua bena mvita bavua badisangisha abu, kutumaye Yowabe, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita bende, ne bena mvita bonsu bavua bamanye mvita bikole." 
2Samuel10:8 Bena Amone kuya kuela mualu wa mvita pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia tshimenga tshiabu tshinene. Bena Siriya ba mu Soba, ne ba mu Beterekobe, ne bena mvita ba mu Tobe, ne ba mu Maaka, bavua bela mualu wa mvita luseke lukuabu mu mpata." 
2Samuel10:9 Yowabe kumona ne: baluishi bende badi bitupa bibidi: aba kumpala kuende, bakuabu panyima. Nanku kusungulaye bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua bamanye mvita bikole. Kubatekaye batangilangane ne bena Siriya." 
2Samuel10:10 Bena mvita bende bavua bashala, kubapeshaye muanabu Abishayi, kubatekaye batangilangane ne bena Amone." 
2Samuel10:11 Yowabe kuambila muanabu Abishayi ne: — Pikala bena Siriya bampite bukole, wewe neungambuluishe. Kadi pikala bena Amone bakupite bukole, meme nenkuambuluishe." 
2Samuel10:12 Nanku kolesha muoyi, tuluangane mvita eyi ne dikima, bua tusungidile bana betu bena Izrayele, ne bimenga bia Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Maweja-Nangila enza mudiye musue." 
2Samuel10:13 Yowabe ne bena mvita bende kusemena bua kuluisha bena Siriya. Bena Siriya kunyema Yowabe. 
2Samuel10:14 Bena Amone bamone bena Siriya banyema, kunyemabu Abishayi, kupinganabu mu tshimenga tshiabu. Ke Yowabe kutekesha mvita ivuabu baluisha bena Amone, kupinganabu mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel10:15 Bena Siriya kujadika ne: bena Izrayele mbatupite bukole. Nanku kusangishabu bena mvita babu bonsu. 
2Samuel10:16 Adadezere kutuma bantu, ubikila bena Siriya bonsu bavua base dishiya dia musulu wa Perate. Bena Siriya abu, kufika ku Elame. Shobake, mfumu wa bena mvita ba Adadezere, ke uvua ubalombola." 
2Samuel10:17 Davide kupeta lumu lua bena mvita abu. Kusangishaye bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Kusabukabu Yardene, kuyabu ku Elame. Bena Siriya kuela mualu wa mvita, batangilangane ne Davide. Bena Siriya kutuadija mvita," 
2Samuel10:18 kadi bena Izrayele kubatshimuna. Bena Siriya kunyema. Davide ne bena mvita bende, kushipa nyama ya tubalu ivua ikoka matempu a mvita, ne bena mvita bavua pa matempu abu, nkama muanda mutekete, ne bantu binunu makumi anayi, bavua babanda pa nyama ya tubalu. Kutapabu kabidi ne Shobake, mfumu wa bena mvita mputa. Kutuilaye muaba awu." 
2Samuel10:19 Nanku bakalenga bonsu bavua ku bumfumu bua Adadezere bamone ne: bena Izrayele mbatupite bukole, kutuabu nabu ndondu, kushalabu ku bumfumu bua bena Izrayele. Bena Siriya kutshina bua kuambuluisha kabidi bena Amone." 
2Samuel11:1 Ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu bakalenga bavua ne tshibidilu tshia kuya mu mvita. Nanku mukalenga Davide, uvua mutume pende Yowabe, mfumu wa bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, ne balombodi babu, bua baye kuluisha bena Amone. Bena Izrayele kunyangakaja ditunga dia bena Amone, kuluisha bena tshimenga tshia Raba. Davide uvua mushale mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel11:2 Dituku dikuabu dilolu, Davide mumane kuikisha, kujukaye bua kuololoka, wendakana ku musaka wa nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Kumonaye mukaji wowa mayi. Mukaji awu uvua muimpe mutambe." 
2Samuel11:3 Davide kukonka bantu bua mukaji awu. Kumuambilabu ne: “Mukaji ewu ke Batsheba, muana wa Eliyame, mmukaji wa Uriya, muena Iti.”" 
2Samuel11:4 Davide kutuma bantu bua babikile mukaji awu. Mukaji mumane kufika, Davide kumubuelela mu nzubu! Pashishe, mukaji kupingana ku nzubu kuende. Kadi mukaji awu, utshivua umukilaku ku dijikija mikiya ya tshijila tshia bakaji." 
2Samuel11:5 Batsheba kuimita difu, kumanyisha Davide ne: — Ndi mumvue ne: ndi mumane kuimita." 
2Samuel11:6 Ke Davide kutuma diyi lukasa kudi Yowabe, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita ne: — Untumine Uriya, muena Iti. Yowabe kumutumina Uriya." 
2Samuel11:7 Uriya mumane kufika, Davide kumukonka bua Yowabe, bua bena mvita bonsu, ne bua mushindu uvua mvita mienzeke." 
2Samuel11:8 Pashishe Davide kuambila Uriya ne: — Uye ku nzubu kuebe bua kuikisha kakese. Uriya kumuka ku nzubu kua mukalenga. Davide kumutuminaye bintu bia disanka. 
2Samuel11:9 Kadi, Uriya kena muye ku nzubu kuende nansha. Kuyaye kulala pabuipi ne ku tshibuelelu tshia ku nzubu wa mukalenga, muaba uvua bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga Davide balala." 
2Samuel11:10 Kumanyishabu Davide bua muaba uvua Uriya mulale. Davide kukonka Uriya ne: — Wewe udi mushale ku luendu matuku a bungi, kuena muye ku nzubu kuebe bua kuikisha bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel11:11 Uriya kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila udi anu mu ntenta, ne bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele, ne ba bena Yuda kabidi badi balala amu mu ntenta. Yowabe mfumu wa bena mvita, ne balombodi bebe bonsu ba bena mvita, mbase mitanda anu mu mpata. Kadi matuku a mushindu ewu, meme ndi mua kuya ku nzubu kuanyi bua kudia, kunua, ne kubuelela mukajanyi mu nzubu anyi? Ndi nditshipa ne: kashidi tshiena mua kuenza bualu bua mushindu ewu nansha kakese!" 
2Samuel11:12 Mukalenga Davide kuitaba ne: — Eyowa mbimpe. Nanku ushale anu muaba ewu lelu, malaba nenkulekele bua wewe kupingana. Nanku, Uriya kulala kabidi mu Yerushalayime dituku adi kutshiabu." 
2Samuel11:13 Davide kumubikidisha bua kudiabu ne kunuabu nende ku mesa. Davide kumuelela maluvu mapite bungi. Uriya kukuatshika. Kadi dilolu Uriya kulala anu muaba uvua bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga Davide. Kena muye kulala ku nzubu kuende to. 
2Samuel11:14 Butshia dinda, Davide kufunda mukanda, kupesha Uriya bua aye nawu kudi Yowabe mulombodi wa bena mvita." 
2Samuel11:15 Mu mukanda awu, Davide uvua mufunde ne: “Uteke Uriya anu mulongu wa kumpala, muaba udi mvita mikole. Pashishe numuke, numushiye nkayende bua bamuase kudi baluishi, bamushipe.”" 
2Samuel11:16 Pavua Yowabe mutuadije kuluisha bena Raba, kutekaye Uriya muaba uvuaye mumone baulame kudi baluishi ba bukitu." 
2Samuel11:17 Bantu bavua balame tshimenga atshi kupatukabu, bua kuluisha Yowabe ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu. Kushipabu bena mvita bakuabu ba Davide, ne balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita. Kushipabu kabidi ne Uriya." 
2Samuel11:18 Nanku, Yowabe kutuma muntu bua kumanyisha Davide bionsu bivua bienzeka mu mvita." 
2Samuel11:19 Yowabe uvua muambile muntu awu ne: — Pawikala mumane kumanyisha mukalenga Davide bionsu bivua bienzeka mu mvita," 
2Samuel11:20 misangu mikuabu mukalenga udi mua kufika munda, ukukonka ne: “Nuvua basemena anu pabuipi ne tshimenga bua kuluangana bua tshinyi? Kanuvua bamanye ne: bantu badi kulu ku bimana badi bela miketa ne mabue anyi?" 
2Samuel11:21 Uvua mushipe Abimeleke, muana wa Yerubaale, ku Tebese nnganyi? Uvua anu muntu mukaji! Mukaji awu uvua mubande kulu pa tshimana tshia tshimenga. Kuasaye Abimeleke dibue dia mpelu. Abimeleke kufila! Kadi nuenu, nuvua basemena pabuipi ne bimana bua tshinyi? Pikala mukalenga Davide mukukonke nanku, umuambile ne: ‘Mulombodi wa bena mvita, Uriya muena Iti, mmufue kabidi.’ ”" 
2Samuel11:22 Muntu uvua Yowabe mutume, kuyaye kuambila mukalenga Davide bionsu bivua bienzeka mu mvita." 
2Samuel11:23 Kuambilaye mukalenga Davide ne: — Bantu bavua balame tshimenga bavua batupite bukole. Bavua bapatuka mu tshimenga bua kutuluisha mu mpata. Tuetu kubipata too ne ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga. 
2Samuel11:24 Kadi bantu bavua kulu ku bimana, ne mata ne miketa, kutuasa miketa. Nanku balombodi ba bena mvita bebe bakuabu mbalue, ne Uriya, muena Iti, mmufue kabidi." 
2Samuel11:25 Mukalenga Davide kuambila muntu awu ne: — Pingana ku mvita, ukoleshe Yowabe ku muoyi, umuambile ne: “Bualu ebu kabukutondi to. Bualu mu mvita bantu badi anu bafua nseke yonsu ibidi. Nanku uluishe tshimenga atshi bikole, ntshibutule.”" 
2Samuel11:26 Batsheba upeta lumu lua lufu lua bayende Uriya, kutekaye madilu." 
2Samuel11:27 Kadi batangalaja madilu, Davide kubikidisha Batsheba ku nzubu kuende, kumusela. Mukaji kulela muana wa balume." 
2Samuel12:1 Bualu buvua Davide muenze, buvua bufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kutuma muambi Natane kudi Davide. Muambi Natane kufika ku nzubu kua Davide, umuambila ne: — Mu tshimenga tshikuabu, muvua bantu babidi, ewu mubanji, mukuabu mupela." 
2Samuel12:2 Mubanji uvua ne bimuna bia bungi, ngombe ne mikoku." 
2Samuel12:3 Mupela uvua anu ne kana ka mukoku kamue, kavuaye musumbe. Uvua ukadishe, koku kenda kakola ku nzubu kua mupela awu pamue ne bana bende. Kana ka mukoku aku, kavua kadia ne mupela awu diampa dimue, kanua nende kabidi mabela dikopu dimue, kalala anu pabuipi ne mupela awu. Uvua mukengeleke anu bu muanende wa bakaji." 
2Samuel12:4 Dituku dikuabu, muntu muenyi kufika ku nzubu kua muntu mubanji. Mubanji kena muangate tshimuna tshia ku bimuna biende bua kushipela muenyi awu to. Kuangataye anu kana ka mukoku ka mupela, bua kukalambila muenyi wende awu." 
2Samuel12:5 Davide kufikila mubanji awu munda bikole. Kuambilaye muambi Natane ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, anteleje! Muntu udi muenze nanku, udi ne bua kufua!" 
2Samuel12:6 Bu mudi muntu awu muenze bualu abu, kayi ne luse, neapingaje mikoku inayi bua mukoku umue uvuaye muibe awu." 
2Samuel12:7 Muambi Natane kuandamuna ne: — Muntu udi muenze bualu abu, ngwewe mene Davide! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Mvua mukujidile bua wewe kuikala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Mvua mukusungidile kudi Shawule uvua ukuluisha." 
2Samuel12:8 Mvua mufile bena nzubu wa mfumuebe Shawule mu bianza biebe. Mvua mukupeshe bakaji ba mfumuebe Shawule. Meme kuteka bena Izrayele bonsu ne bena Yuda ku bumfumu buebe wewe. Bionsu abi kabivua bikumbana anyi? Meme ndi mua kukuenzela malu makuabu a bungi. 
2Samuel12:9 Kadi wewe, kuena munemeke mikenji yanyi bua tshinyi? Udi muenze bindi mbenga bua tshinyi? Udi mushipe Uriya, muena Iti, ku muela. Eyowa, udi muenze muebe muonsu, bua bena Amone bashipe Uriya. Pashishe wewe kuangata mukajende, kumusela." 
2Samuel12:10 Nanku biangatshile mpindiewu, kashidi dishipangana kadiena dijika mu nzubu muebe to. Bualu paudi musele mukaji wa Uriya, udi mundembakaje meme." 
2Samuel12:11 Teleja bimpe tshindi nkuambila: Meme nensake bana ba mu nzubu muebe bua kukukengeshabu. Nengangate bakaji bebe, mbafile kudi muanenu bua kubabuelelaye mu nzubu mu munya, wewe mutangile." 
2Samuel12:12 Wewe uvua muenze bualu ebu mu musokoku. Kadi meme nembuenzeje mu munya, bantu bebe bena Izrayele batangile.”" 
2Samuel12:13 Davide kuandamuna muambi Natane ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: ndi muenze bibi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Muambi Natane kumuambila ne: — Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi ukufuila luse. Kuena ufua to." 
2Samuel12:14 Kadi bua paudi muenze bualu ebu, baluishi ba Maweja-Nangila bapetshi mushindu wa kudiwula Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, muanebe udibu balele mpindiewu, neafue." 
2Samuel12:15 Ke muambi Natane kupingana kuende. Maweja-Nangila Itusamisha muana uvua Batsheba mulele ne Davide. Batsheba uvua mukaji mukamba, uvua Uriya mushiya." 
2Samuel12:16 Davide kusengelela Maweja-Nangila bua muana awu, kujila biakudia. Pavuaye mubuele mu nzubu muende, kulalaye panshi butuku bujima." 
2Samuel12:17 Bena mudimu bende bakulumpe kumutendakena bua ajuke panshi. Kubengaye. Kabidi kubengaye bua kudia nabu kantu nansha kamue. 
2Samuel12:18 Lumingu lujima lumane kujika, muana kufua. Bena mudimu kutshina bua kumanyisha Davide bua lufu lua muana. Bavua bambilangana ne: “Patshi wa muana ne muoyi, mukalenga kavua witaba bionsu bituvua tumuambila to. Kadi mpindiewu, katuena mua kumuambila ne: muana mmumane kufua to, bualu udi mua kudienzela bibi!”" 
2Samuel12:19 Davide kumona muvua bantu bambilangane malu munkatshi muabu. Kumvuaye ne: kudi bualu. Nanku kubakonkaye ne: — Muananyi mmumane kufua anyi? Bena mudimu kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mmumane kufua." 
2Samuel12:20 Ke Davide kujuka panshi, kuowa mayi, kulaba manananshi, kuvuala bilamba bimpe. Kuyaye muaba wa tshijila bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Upingana ku nzubu kuende, kulombaye biakudia, kudiaye." 
2Samuel12:21 Bena mudimu bende kumukonka ne: — Mukalenga, udi wenza nanku bua tshinyi? Patshivua muanebe ne muoyi, uvua mujile biakudia, udila. Kadi mpindiewu, padi muana mufue, udi ujuka, udia biakudia!" 
2Samuel12:22 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, patshivua muana ne muoyi, mvua mujile biakudia, ndila muadi, ndikonka ne: “Udi mumanye meji a Maweja-Nangila nnganyi? Misangu mikuabu udi mua kumfuila luse, kufululula muana, ashale ne muoyi.”" 
2Samuel12:23 Kadi mpindiewu, muana mmumane kufua, nenjile kabidi biakudia bua tshinyi? Kashidi meme tshiena mua kubisha muana ku lufu to! Meme nennye muaba udi muana, kadi muana kena upingana kundi meme to." 
2Samuel12:24 Davide kuya kusamba mukajende Batsheba, kumubuelela mu nzubu. Batsheba kulela muana wa balume, kumuinyika ne: Shelomu. Maweja-Nangila kunanga muana awu." 
2Samuel12:25 Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Natane bua amanyishe Davide bualu ebu. Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila munange muana ewu, muambi Natane kumuinyika dina dikuabu ne: Yedidiya, mmumue ne: “Muana udi Maweja-Nangila munange.”" 
2Samuel12:26 Tshikondu atshi, Yowabe mfumu wa bena mvita, kuluisha Raba, tshimenga tshinene tshia bena Amone. Kukuataye tshitupa tshinene tshia tshimenga, muaba uvua mukalenga musombe." 
2Samuel12:27 Yowabe kutuma bantu bua kuambila Davide ne: “Ndi muluishe tshimenga tshia Raba. Ndi mumane kukuata muaba udi tshiina tshia mayi. 
2Samuel12:28 Nanku, mpindiewu usangishe bena mvita badi bashala, ufike nabu bua wewe nkayebe udikuatshila tshimenga etshi. Meme tshiena musue kutshikuata to, bua bantu kabantumbishi amu meme.”" 
2Samuel12:29 Davide kusangisha bena mvita bavua bashala, kuya nabu bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Raba, kutshikuata." 
2Samuel12:30 Davide kuangata tshifulu tshia bukalenga tshivua ku mutu kua Milkome, mvidie wa bena Amore. Tshifulu atshi ntshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshivua ne bujitu bua kilo makumi asatu ne pa mutu. Dibue ditoke dia mushinga mukole divua ku tshifulu aku. Kutekabu tshifulu atshi pa mutu wa Davide. Mu tshimenga atshi, bavua bapawula kabidi bintu bipite bungi." 
2Samuel12:31 Davide kukuatshisha bena tshimenga kuya nabu, kubenzeja midimu mikole, ya kupanda mabaya, kusonga mabue, kupula mitshi muitu, nansha ya kuenza tushola. Nanku bena bimenga bikuabu bionsu bia bena Amone, Davide uvua ubenzeja midimu anu mushindu ewu. Pashishe Davide kupingana mu Yerushalayime ne bena mvita bende bonsu." 
2Samuel13:1 Malu makuabu avua menzeka pashishe. Absalome, muana wa Davide, uvua ne muanabu wa bakaji muimpe mutambe, dina diende Tamare. Amnone, muana mukuabu wa Davide, kunanga Tamare bikole." 
2Samuel13:2 Nanku, Amnone kutuadija kusama, bualu kavua ne dikisha bua Tamare, muana mukuabu wa tatuende uvuaye ujinga. Amnone kavua ne mushindu wa kubuelela Tamare mu nzubu, bualu Tamare kavua muanji kumanya balume." 
2Samuel13:3 Kadi Amnone uvua ne mulunda wende mudimuke bikole, Yonadabe, muana wa Shama. Shama uvua muanabu ne Davide." 
2Samuel13:4 Yonadabe kukonka Amnone ne: — Muana wa mukalenga, udi uleja mpala mubi ku dituku dionsu nunku bua tshinyi? Kuena mua kungambilaku tshidi tshikutonda anyi? Amnone kuandamuna ne: — Bualu ndi munange Tamare, muakunyi wa Absalome, muanetu wa tatu." 
2Samuel13:5 Yonadabe kumupesha meji ne: Nanku, ulala pa bulalu bu muntu udi usama. Pikala mukalenga Davide mufike bua kukusamba, umuambile ne: “Itaba bua muanetu wa bakaji Tamare, afike bua kundambila biakudia. Neandambile biakudia abi, meme mutangile. Yeye nkayende neampeshe biakudia abi, bua meme kudia.”" 
2Samuel13:6 Nanku, Amnone kulala bu muntu udi usama. Mukalenga Davide kufika bua kumusamba. Amnone kumuambila ne: — Itaba bua muanetu wa bakaji Tamare, afike kumpala kuanyi bua kundambila mikata ibidi. Ayimpeshe yeye nkayende, bua meme kudia." 
2Samuel13:7 Nanku Davide kutuma muntu bua kuambila Tamare ku nzubu kuvuaye ne: — Ndaku ku nzubu kua muanenu Amnone, umulambile biakudia." 
2Samuel13:8 Tamare kuya kua Amnone, kumusangana mu bulalu. Kusopaye bukula, kukanga mikata, muanabu Amnone mutangile." 
2Samuel13:9 Pashishe Tamare kuteka mikata ayi mu dilongu, kupesha muanabu. Kadi Amnone kubenga mua kudia. Kutumaye diyi bua bantu bonsu bapatuke. Bantu bonsu kupatuka." 
2Samuel13:10 Amnone kuambila Tamare ne: — Luaku, umpeshe mikata mu bulalu emu. Ke muaba undi musue bua wewe nkayebe uyimpeshile bua meme kudia. Tamare kuambula mikata iwaye muenze, kuyaye nayi too ne ku bulalu bua Amnone." 
2Samuel13:11 Pavua Tamare umupesha mikata ayi bua kudia, Amnone kukuata Tamare, umuambila ne: — Tamare wetu, luaku tulale nebe." 
2Samuel13:12 Tamare kubenga ne: — Nansha, Amnone wetu! Kuena mua kunkuata ku bukole to! Bena Izrayele kabena benza malu a mushindu ewu to. Kuenji bibi nanku to!" 
2Samuel13:13 Wewe muenze nanku, meme nengendela njila kaayi? Wewe kabidi kuakuikala ne mushinga munkatshi mua bena Izrayele to. Nanku, anji kuambila mukalenga Davide bualu ebu. Kena mua kubenga bua wewe kunsela to." 
2Samuel13:14 Amnone kubenga bionsu abi, kutekesha Tamare, kulala nende ku bukole." 
2Samuel13:15 Pashishe kutuadijaye kukina Tamare bikole. Lukinu luende kupita dinanga divuaye munange Tamare kumpala. Nanku, kuipataye Tamare, umuambila ne: — Umbuka apa!" 
2Samuel13:16 Tamare kuandamuna ne: — Nansha! Paudi ungipata nenku, udi wenza kabidi bibi bipite biudi mumane kuenza! Kadi Amnone kubenga kabidi bionsu abi." 
2Samuel13:17 Kubikilaye nsongalume muena mudimu wende, umuambila ne: — Ipata nsongakaji ewu mu nzubu muanyi. Papatukaye ukange tshiibi bikole." 
2Samuel13:18 Muena mudimu kuipata Tamare, kukanga tshiibi. Tamare uvua muvuale muntumpu muimpe mutambe, bu mudi bana ba bakalenga bavuala padibu kabayi banji kubuela mu dibaka." 
2Samuel13:19 Nanku kudielaye butu mu mutu, kupanda muntumpu wende muimpe. Kubuikilaye bianza kuisu, kuyaye, wenda udila bikole." 
2Samuel13:20 Mukuluende Absalome kumukonka ne: — Muakunyanyi wa bakaji! Amnone mmukubuelele mu nzubu ku bukole anyi? Lekela mutoyi, bualu ebu kabukutondi to. Amnone mmuanenu! Biangatshile diba adi, Tamare kusomba ku nzubu kua mukuluende Absalome ne kanyinganyinga, bu mukaji udibu babenga ku dibaka." 
2Samuel13:21 Mukalenga Davide kupeta lumu lua bionsu bivua bienzeka abi. Kufikaye munda bikole. Kadi kena mutandishe Amnone to, bualu uvua muanende muanabute, kabidi uvua mumunange bikole." 
2Samuel13:22 Bu muvua Amnone mubuelele muakunyende Tamare mu nzubu ku bukole, Absalome kumujila, kumukina bikole bipite." 
2Samuel13:23 Bidimu bibidi bimane kupita, dituku dikuabu, Absalome uvua ne bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoku ku nzubu kuende ku musoku wa Baale-Ashore, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Efrayime. Kubikidishaye bana ba mukalenga Davide bonsu." 
2Samuel13:24 Kuyaye kuambila Davide ne: — Mukalenga, ndi ne bakoshi ba miosa ya mikoku ku nzubu kuanyi. Wewe ufike mu tshibilu etshi, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga bebe bonsu." 
2Samuel13:25 Mukalenga Davide kubenga ne: — Nansha muananyi! Tuetu bafike bonsu ku tshibilu atshi, udi mua kutata bikole. Absalome kusengelela mukalenga Davide bikole. Kadi, mukalenga Davide kubenga mua kuya. Kumuelaye anu lupemba." 
2Samuel13:26 Absalome kuambila kabidi mukalenga Davide ne: — Bu muudi ubenga bua kuya, nanku itaba bua tuye nansha ne muanetu Amnone. Mukalenga Davide kukonkaye ne: — Udi musue kuya ne Amnone bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel13:27 Absalome kusengelela kabidi mukalenga Davide bikole. Nanku mukalenga Davide kuitaba bua Amnone aye. Kuitabaye kabidi bua bana bende bakuabu baye ne Absalome. 
2Samuel13:28 Ke Absalome kutumina bena mudimu bende diyi ne: — Nutangile Amnone bikole. Pikalaye mumane kukuatshika maluvu, meme nennuambile ne: “Tapayi Amnone!” Nanku nenumutute, numushipe. Kanutshinyi to, meme ke udi munutume. Nuikale ne dikima, nuleje bukitu buenu!"
