2Samuel13:29 Bena mudimu kukumbaja bionsu bivua Absalome muambe. Kushipabu Amnone. Bana bakuabu ba mukalenga Davide kujuka ku mesa diakamue, kubanda muntu yonsu pa nyama wende wa mpunde, kunyema." 
2Samuel13:30 Patshivua bana abu mu njila, mukalenga Davide kupeta lumu ne: “Absalome mmushipe bana bebe ba balume bonsu. Kakuena kushala muana nansha umue to.”" 
2Samuel13:31 Nanku, mukalenga Davide kupanda bilamba biende, kulala panshi mu buloba. Balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bonsu, kupanda bilamba biabu, kuimana pabuipi ne Davide." 
2Samuel13:32 Kadi, Yonadabe, muana wa Shama (Shama ke uvua tatuende wa Davide), kuambila Davide ne: — Mukalenga, kuedi meji ne: mbashipe bana bebe ba balume bonsu to. Mbashipe amu Amnone nkayende. Absalome uvua mumane kulaya bua kuenza bualu ebu, biangatshile dituku divua Amnone mubuelele muanabu Tamare mu nzubu ku bukole." 
2Samuel13:33 Nanku kuedi meji ne: bana bebe mbalue bonsu to. Mbashipe anu Amnone nkayende. 
2Samuel13:34 Kabidi Absalome mmunyeme. Nsongalume uvua wenza mudimu wa kutentekela, kumonaye bantu musumba balonda njila wa ku Oronayime. Kuyaye kuambila mukalenga Davide ne: — Ndi mumone bantu balua kuneku, bapueka pa mukuna balonda njila wa ku Oronayime." 
2Samuel13:35 Yonadabe kuambila kabidi Davide ne: — Mukalenga, bana bebe bafiki! Bionsu mbienzeke anu bu mumvua mukuambile." 
2Samuel13:36 Anu Yonadabe ujikija kuakula, bana ba mukalenga Davide kufika. Kudilabu miadi bikole. Mukalenga Davide muine, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bonsu, kudila bikole." 
2Samuel13:37 Absalome mumane kunyema, kuya ku nzubu kua Talmayi, muana wa Amikude, uvua mukalenga wa mu ditunga dia Ngeshure." 
2Samuel13:38 Kushalaye ku nzubu aku bidimu bisatu. Mataku onsu awu, mukalenga Davide uvua amu unyingalala bua lufu lua muanende Amnone." 
2Samuel13:39 Kanyinganyinga kavua mukalenga Davide naku, bua lufu lua Amnone kamane kujika, tshiji tshivuaye mutekele Absalome kujika patshi." 
2Samuel14:1 Yowabe, muana wa Seruya kumona ne: mukalenga Davide ukadi ujinga muanende Absalome." 
2Samuel14:2 Nanku kubikidishaye mukaji mutalame uvua ku Tekowa, umuambila ne: — Wenze bu muntu udi mu madilu. Uwale bilamba bia madilu. Kulabi manananshi to. Wikale bu mudi mukaji mushale mu madilu matuku a bungi." 
2Samuel14:3 Pashishe uye kudi mukalenga Davide, umumanyisha malu onsu andi nkuambila. Yowabe kuambila mukaji bionsu bivuaye mua kumanyisha mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel14:4 Mukaji kuya kudi mukalenga Davide, kudiela mpala panshi kumpala kuende, umuambila ne: — Mukalenga, ungambuluishe." 
2Samuel14:5 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka ne: — Tshiudi ujinga ntshinyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Akia! Mukalenga, meme ndi mukaji mukamba. Bayanyi mmumane kufua." 
2Samuel14:6 Mvua mushale ne bana ba balume babidi. Bana abu, mbaye kuluangana mvita ku budimi. Umue kushipa mukuabu, bualu kakuvua muntu bua kubasunga to." 
2Samuel14:7 Pashishe bena diku bonsu mbansangidile, bangamba ne: “Tupeshe mushipianganyi. Tumushipe bua kusombuela muanabu udiye mushipe. — Nanku nembutule kabidi mupianyi wa bintu udi mushale ne muoyi”. Bena diku mbasue kuenza nanku bua kushipa muana ewu wa ndekelu umvua mushala mutekemena. Kabidi mbasue bua dina dia bayanyi dijimine pa buloba." 
2Samuel14:8 Mukalenga Davide kuandamuna ne: — Pingana ku nzubu kuebe. Nenjikije tshilumbu tshiebe. 
2Samuel14:9 Mukaji kuandamuna kabidi ne: — Nansha wewe muenze munyi, tshilema netshikale anu kundi meme ne bena nzubu wanyi. Kakuena muntu udi ne dikima dia kukulumbuluisha wewe, ne bukalenga buebe to." 
2Samuel14:10 Mukalenga Davide kumujadikila ne: — Pikala muntu mukuele mpata, ufike nende kundi meme! Nanku muntu kena mua kukutatshisha kabidi to!" 
2Samuel14:11 Mukaji kuandamuna kabidi ne: — Mukalenga uditshipe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe bua muntu udi ne bua kusombuela bua lufu lua muananyi, kankengeshi bibi bipite, kashipi muananyi undi mushale nende. Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: nansha lusuki lua muanebe lua ku mutu kaluakumata panshi to." 
2Samuel14:12 Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, ndi musue kukuambilaku bualu bukuabu. Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Ambaku." 
2Samuel14:13 Mukaji kumuambila ne: — Wewe udi ukengesha bantu ba Maweja-Nangila nunku bua tshinyi? Wewe mumane kuditshipa bu muudi uditshipa mpindiewu emu, udi udipisha nkayebe, bualu kuena ubikidisha Absalome uuvua muipate." 
2Samuel14:14 Tuetu bonsu tudi ne bua kufua. Diba adi tudi anu bu mayi adibu bitshikija panshi, kabayi mua kuaboya kabidi to. Kadi mpindiewu, Mvidi Mukulu kena musue kuenzela Absalome nanku to. Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kulongolola bua Absalome uvuabu bipate apingane pabuipi nende." 
2Samuel14:15 Mukalenga, ndi nkuambila bionsu ebi, bualu ndi ntshina bana betu. Ke meme kuamba ne: “Ndi musue kuyukila ne mukalenga Davide. Misangu mikuabu udi mua kuitaba tshindi mmulomba." 
2Samuel14:16 Udi mua kunsungidila mu bianza bia muntu udi ukeba mua kunshipa, kushipa kabidi ne muananyi, kutumusha munkatshi mua tshisamba tshia bantu badi Mvidi Mukulu musungule. ”" 
2Samuel14:17 Nanku, mukalenga, meme mvua ngela meji ne: “Diandamuna dia mukalenga neditusambe, bualu mukalenga, wewe udi bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi mumanye mua kusunguluja bualu buimpe ne bubi.” Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ikale nebe!" 
2Samuel14:18 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Ndi musue kukukonka bualu. Ungandamune, kunsokoki to. Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga, konkaku!" 
2Samuel14:19 Mukalenga kumukonka ne: — Kanuena balongolola bionsu ebi pamue ne Yowabe anyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Bulelela, mukalenga wanyi, kabena mua kukusokoka bualu to. Bu muudi ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: mbua bushuwa! Muntu webe Yowabe ke udi mungambile bionsu bindi muakule ebi." 
2Samuel14:20 Yowabe mmusue nenku bua kulongolola tshilumbu. Kadi mukalenga wewe udi mumanye bionsu bidi bienzeka pa buloba, bualu udi ne meji matue bu a mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Samuel14:21 Mukalenga Davide kuya kuyukila ne Yowabe, umuambila ne: — Ndi mumane kuitaba bua kuenza tshiudi mulomba. Uye kukeba nsongalume Absalome, ufike nende muaba ewu." 
2Samuel14:22 Yowabe kudiela mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide. Kumuelaye tuasakidila, wamba ne: — Mukalenga, mpindiewu ndi mujadika ne: udi munnange bushuwa. Bualu udi muitabe bua kuenza tshimvua mukulombe." 
2Samuel14:23 Yowabe kujuka, kuya ku Ngeshure. Kupinganaye ne Absalome ku Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel14:24 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Absalome aye amu ku nzubu kuende! Kafiki muaba undi to! Nanku Absalome kuya ku nzubu kuende. Kena mumonangane ne mukalenga Davide to. 
2Samuel14:25 Mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, kamuvua muntu mukuabu uvua ukemesha bantu bonsu bua buimpe buende, bu Absalome to. Absalome uvua muimpe biangatshile ku dikasa too ne ku mutu. Kavua ne tshilema nansha tshimue pambidi." 
2Samuel14:26 Absalome uvua udikosa nsuki ku ndekelu kua tshidimu tshionsu. Bualu nsuki yende ivua ne bujitu bua bungi. Pavua Absalome upima nsuki ayi, ivua ne bujitu bua kilo ibidi, bilondeshile bipimu bivua nabi mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel14:27 Absalome uvua ne bana ba balume basatu, ne muana wa bakaji umue. Dina dia muana wa bakaji awu divua Tamare. Tamare uvua muimpe mutambe." 
2Samuel14:28 Absalome kushala mu Yerushalayime bidimu bibidi. Mukalenga Davide kubenga bua Absalome kafiki ku nzubu kuende. 
2Samuel14:29 Dituku dikuabu, Absalome kubikidisha Yowabe bua kumutuma kudi mukalenga Davide. Kadi Yowabe kubenga mua kufika ku nzubu kua Absalome. Absalome kumutumina muntu musangu muibidi. Yowabe kubenga kabidi." 
2Samuel14:30 Pashishe Absalome kuambila bena mudimu bende ne: — Nudi bamone budimi bua Yowabe bua ntete ya kuenza bukula, budi pabuipi ne buanyi? Nuye kubosha! Bena mudimu kuenza tshivua Absalome muambe." 
2Samuel14:31 Yowabe kuya ku nzubu kua Absalome lukasa, umukonka ne: — Bena mudimu bebe, mboshe budimi buanyi bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel14:32 Absalome kuandamuna ne: — Bualu mvua mukubikile, wewe kubenga. Meme mvua musue kukutuma kudi mukalenga Davide bua wewe kumuambila ne: “Ndi mumuke ku Ngeshure bua tshinyi? Bivua bimpe bua meme kusomba amu ku Ngeshure!” Mpindiewu, ndi musue kufika ku nzubu kua mukalenga. Pangikala muenze bibi, mukalenga anshipe!" 
2Samuel14:33 Yowabe kuya kumanyisha mukalenga Davide bionsu bivua Absalome muambe. Mukalenga Davide kubikidisha Absalome. Absalome kuya lubilu, kudiela mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga. Ke mukalenga Davide kumupukila." 
2Samuel15:1 Pashishe, Absalome kusumba ditempu, ne nyama ya tubalu, kusangisha kabidi bena mvita makumi atanu bavua banyema lubilu kumpala kua ditempu diende." 
2Samuel15:2 Butshia dinda, Absalome kuimana kumpenga kua njila ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga. Misangu yonsu pavua muntu upita bua kuya ne tshilumbu tshiende kudi mukalenga Davide bua atshikose, Absalome uvua umukonka ne: — Udi ufuma penyi? Muntu uvua wandamuna ne: — Muana wa mukalenga, ndi mfuma mu tshisamba kampande tshia bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel15:3 Nanku Absalome uvua umuandamuna ne: — Mbimpe, tshilumbu tshiebe ntshimpe kabidi, udi mubinge. Kadi kakuena muntu udi mukalenga Davide musungule bua kumvuaye tshilumbu tshiebe." 
2Samuel15:4 Absalome uvua umuambila kabidi ne: — Eyowa, bu meme ndumbuluisha bilumbu mu ditunga edi, bantu bonsu badi batandangana, ne badi ne bilumbu bia kulumbulula, bavua mua kufika nabi kundi. Meme mvua mua kubikosa bimpe." 
2Samuel15:5 Pavua muntu awu usemena pabuipi bua kudiela mpala panshi kumpala kua Absalome, Absalome uvua umujula, umupukila." 
2Samuel15:6 Ke muvua Absalome wenzela bantu bonsu bavua baye ne bilumbu biabu kudi mukalenga Davide. Nanku, Absalome uvua utekesha bena Izrayele ku kakese ku kakese bua kumunangabu." 
2Samuel15:7 Bidimu binayi bimane kukumbana, dituku dikuabu, Absalome kulomba mukalenga Davide ne: — Ndi musue kuya mu tshimenga tshia Ebrone, bua kukumbaja bualu bumvua mulaye Maweja-Nangila." 
2Samuel15:8 Pantshivua mu Ngeshure mu Siriya, mvua mulaye Maweja-Nangila ne: Pawikala mmupingaje mu Yerushalayime, nenkulambule milambu ku Ebrone." 
2Samuel15:9 Mukalenga Davide kulayangana nende ne: — Waya bimpe. Ke Absalome kuya ku Ebrone. 
2Samuel15:10 Pavuaye mu tshimenga atshi, kutumaye bantu bende mu musokoku mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Izrayele. Bantu abu, bavua baye bua kuambila bena Izrayele ne: “Panuikala bumvua miadi ya mpungi, nuele mbila ne: Absalome ke udi mushale mukalenga mu Ebrone.”" 
2Samuel15:11 Bantu nkama ibidi ba mu Yerushalayime, bavua Absalome mubikidishe, bavua bafike nende. Kadi bavua baye ne Absalome nanku kabayi bamanya bualu, kabayi nende mu tshipangu tshia kutombokela mukalenga." 
2Samuel15:12 Pavua Absalome ulambula milambu, kubikidishaye Akitofele, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide, uvua musombela mu tshimenga tshia Ngilo. Nanku, bantu bavua ku luseke lua Absalome bavua benda basangana. Buntomboji buabu buvua buenda bukole." 
2Samuel15:13 Musangu awu, kuambilabu Davide ne: “Bena Izrayele mbasungule Absalome.”" 
2Samuel15:14 Nanku, mukalenga Davide kuambila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bonsu bavuaye nabu mu Yerushalayime ne: — Jukayi, tunyeme, bualu Absalome neakebe mua kutushipa. Kena mua kutulekela ne muoyi to. Tuyayi lubilu, bualu neafike lukasa bua kutuluisha. Neatukengeshe bikole, kabidi neabutule bena mu tshimenga bonsu." 
2Samuel15:15 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, tuetu tudi tuitaba bua kuenza tshionsu tshiudi musue." 
2Samuel15:16 Nanku, mukalenga Davide, bena nzubu wende, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, kumuka ku nzubu wa bukalenga ku makasa. Mukalenga Davide uvua mushiye anu bakaji bende bakuabu dikumi bua kulamabu nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Samuel15:17 Mukalenga Davide ne bonsu bavuaye nabu kupatuka mu tshimenga, kuimana pabuipi ne nzubu wa ndekelu wa mu tshimenga." 
2Samuel15:18 Bena mudimu ba mukalenga Davide bonsu, kutuadija kuenda kumpala kua mukalenga: bena Kereti ne bena Peleti, bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga; pashishe bena mvita nkama isambombu ba bena Ngate bavua ku luseke lua mukalenga Davide. Bonsu kuendabu kumpala kua mukalenga Davide bua abamone." 
2Samuel15:19 Mukalenga Davide kukonka Kayi, mfumu wa bena mvita ba bena Ngate, ne: — Wewe udi musue kuya netu bua tshinyi? Pingana mu tshimenga, ushale ne mukalenga mupiamupia. Bualu wewe udi muntu muenyi, musombe mu ditunga dia bende." 
2Samuel15:20 Wewe udi mufike kundi anu matuku makese aa. Lelu tukadi mua kuya nebe, meme tshiyi mumanye muaba undi nya anyi? Nansha kakese, pingana mu tshimenga. Uye ne bena kuenu. Maweja-Nangila akuambuluishe, akuenzele bimpe." 
2Samuel15:21 Kadi Itayi kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne bu muudi wewe kabidi ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: Tuyaya nebe muaba uudi uya. Pavuafua netufue nebe: pawikala ne muoyi, nengikale ne muoyi kabidi." 
2Samuel15:22 Mukalenga Davide kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa mbimpe. Pita kumpala tuye. Nanku, Kayi kupita ne bena mvita bende ne bena nzubu yabu." 
2Samuel15:23 Bena mvita bavua anu benda kumpala kua mukalenga Davide. Bena ditunga kudila miadi bikole, kuela mbila. Mukalenga Davide ne bantu bende, kusabuka musulu wa Sedrone, balonda njila wa ku tshipela." 
2Samuel15:24 Mutuangaji Sadoke uvua ku bantu abu, ne bena Levi bambula mushete wa ndondu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bena levi kutula mushete panshi. Mutuangaji Abiyatare kulambula milambu, too ne pakasabuka bantu bonsu bavua bafuma mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel15:25 Pashishe mukalenga Davide kuambila mutuangaji Sadoke ne: — Upingaje mushete wa tshijila mu Yerushalayime. Pikala Maweja-Nangila musue kungenzela bimpe, neampingaje kabidi mu Yerushalayime bua meme kumona kabidi mushete ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Samuel15:26 Pikalaye kayi musue, bidi amu bimpe. Angenzele bu mudiye musue." 
2Samuel15:27 Mukalenga Davide kuambila kabidi mutuangaji Sadoke ne: — Tangila, upingane mu tshimenga anu bimpe. Uye ne muanebe wa balume Akimase. Uye kabidi ne mutuangaji Abiyatare ne muanende wa balume Yonatane." 
2Samuel15:28 Kadi meme, ndi nshala muindile mu tshipela tshidi pabuipi ne dilobu dia Yardene, too ne pangikala mupeta lumu ne: nudi bafike bimpe." 
2Samuel15:29 Nanku batuangaji Sadoke ne Abiyatare kupingana ne mushete wa tshijila mu Yerushalayime, kusombamu." 
2Samuel15:30 Mukalenga Davide kubanda mukuna wa olive, wenda udila. Uvua mudibuikila tshilamba ku mesu, wenda ku makasa kutupu. Bantu bonsu bavuaye nabu, bavua anu badibuikila bilamba ku mesu, benda badila." 
2Samuel15:31 Kuambilabu Davide ne: Akitofele udi munkatshi mua bantu badi ku luseke lua Absalome, bakeba mua kuangata bukalenga. Ke Davide kuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila ndi nkusengelela ne: ngenyi yonsu idi Akitofele ufila, ikale ya budingidingi, kayiyi mimpe to”" 
2Samuel15:32 Anu mukalenga Davide ufika ku lusongu lua mukuna, muaba udibu batendelela Mvidi Mukulu, kumonaye mufidi wende wa ngenyi Ushayi, muena Arki, ulua bua kusambakena nende. Uvua ne muntumpu mupandike, muikale kabidi ne buloba ku mutu." 
2Samuel15:33 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Kuena mua kuya nanyi to. Udi mua kunnemena bujitu. 
2Samuel15:34 Pingana anu mu tshimenga, wambile Absalome ne: “Mukalenga, ndi musue kuikala muena mudimu webe. Bangabanga mvua muena mudimu wa tatuebe Davide. Kadi mpindiewu ndi musue kukuenzela mudimu!” Wewe muenze nanku, neungambuluishe bua kubenga ngenyi idi Akitofele ufila." 
2Samuel15:35 Kabidi neumwangane ne batuangaji Sadoke ne Abiyatare. Newikale ubamanyisha malu onsu audi umvua mu nzubu wa mukalenga. 
2Samuel15:36 Akimase, muana wa Sadoke, ne Yonatane, muana wa Abiyatare, bonsu babidi badi ne batatuabu mu tshimenga amu. Neubatume bua kungambilabu malu onsu awikala mumvue." 
2Samuel15:37 Ushayi, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide, kupingana mu Yerushalayime. Diba adi Absalome utshivua utshifikilamu." 
2Samuel16:1 Mukalenga Davide mumane kupita ku lusongu lua mukuna, kusambakenaye ne Siba, muena mudimu wa Mefibaale. Siba uvua ne nyama ya mpunde ibidi misuike biseba panyima bia kusomba. Nyama eyi ivua miambula mampa nkama ibidi, bisangi lukama bia tumuma tua mvinyo tumane kuuma, bimuma lukama bikuabu, ne mulondu wa biseba muela maluvu a mvinyo." 
2Samuel16:2 Mukalenga Davide kukonka Siba ne: — Bintu ebi mbia tshinyi? Siba kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, nyama ya mpunde neyambuluishe bena mudimu bebe bua bikale babandapu. Mampa ne bimuma, nebiambuluishe bena mvita bebe. Maluvu neambuluishe bantu bikale bapungile mu tshipela." 
2Samuel16:3 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mefibaale, muikulu wa mfumuebe Shawule udi penyi? Siba kuandamuna ne: — Mmushale mu Yerushalayime. Bualu mmutekemene ne: mpindiewu bena Izrayele badi bamupingajila bukalenga bua kakuende Shawule." 
2Samuel16:4 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Nanku ndi nkupesha bintu bionsu bivua bia Mefibaale. Siba kutua mpala panshi, wamba ne: — Mukalenga, tuasakidila! Udi mungenzele bimpe." 
2Samuel16:5 Mukalenga Davide ufika pabuipi ne Bakurime, kusambakena ne muntu mukuabu, ufuma mu musoku. Dina dia muntu awu divua Shimeyi, muana wa Ngera. Uvua wa mu tshisamba tshimue ne Shawule. Shimeyi kutuadija kutshipa mukalenga Davide," 
2Samuel16:6 umuasa mabue, wasa kabidi ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Davide, kayi utshina bantu, nansha bena mvita bavua benda ku dia balume ne ku dia bakaji dia mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel16:7 Shimeyi uvua upenda mukalenga Davide ne: — Umuka, umuka, muntu mutshimbakane, mushipianganyi!" 
2Samuel16:8 Maweja-Nangila ke udi ukunyoka bua bena nzubu wa Shawule bonsu baudi mushipe. Udi muibe bukalenga bua Shawule. Ke padi Maweja-Nangila mukunyengabu, mubupesha muanebe Absalome. Mpindiewu, wewe udi mu dikenga, bualu udi mushipianganyi!" 
2Samuel16:9 Abishayi, muana wa Seruya kuambila Davide ne: — Mukalenga, Shimeyi ewu udi bu mbua mumane kufua. Kena mua kukupenda musangu mule nenku to. Itabe, nye kumukosa mutu." 
2Samuel16:10 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka ne: — Wewe Abishayi ne muanenu Yowabe, nudi nubuelakana mu bualu ebu bua tshinyi? Pikala muntu ewu umpenda, misangu mikuabu Maweja-Nangila ke udi mumutume bua kumpendaye. Nanku muntu kena mua kumutandisha to." 
2Samuel16:11 Mukalenga Davide kuambila kabidi balombodi bonsu ba mu bukalenga buende ne Abishayi ne: Pikala muananyi, muananyi menemene undi mulela, ukeba mua kunshipa, kanukemi bua padi Shimeyi, muena Binyamine, umpenda. Mulekelayi, ampende! Misangu mikuabu, Maweja-Nangila ke udi mumutume bua kumpendaye." 
2Samuel16:12 Misangu mikuabu Maweja-Nangila ke udi mua kumona dikenga dianyi, akudimune bipendu ebi bienza disanka." 
2Samuel16:13 Patshivua mukalenga Davide ne bantu bende baya mu njila, Shimeyi uvua wenda mutangilangane nabu, ku luseke lukuabu lua mukuna. Uvua anu ubapenda, ubasa mabue, ubeela maloba." 
2Samuel16:14 Ke mukalenga Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kufika ku muelelu wa Yardene. Kuikishabu muaba awu, bualu bavua bapungile bikole." 
2Samuel16:15 Absalome uvua mufike mu Yerushalayime ne tshisumbu tshia bena Izrayele. Akitofele uvua ku bantu abu. 
2Samuel16:16 Ushayi, muena Arki, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide, ufika pabuipi ne Absalome, kuambaye ne: — Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu! Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu!" 
2Samuel16:17 Absalome kumukonka ne: — Ke muebe muonsu muudi unanga mulunda webe Davide nanku! Kuena muye nende bua tshinyi? 
2Samuel16:18 Ushayi kuandamuna ne: — Tshivua mua kuya nende to, bualu ndi muena mudimu wa muntu udibu basungule kudi Maweja-Nangila, ne kudi bena Izrayele bonsu bua kuikalaye mukalenga. Nanku, ndi musue kuenda nebe." 
2Samuel16:19 Tshiena mua kuenza mudimu ne muntu patupu to. Wewe kuena muana wa mulunda wanyi Davide anyi? Nanku bu mumvua muena mudimu wa tatuebe Davide too ne ku mpindiewu, ke mundi musue kuikala kabidi muena mudimu webe wewe." 
2Samuel16:20 Ke Absalome kuambila Akitofele ne: — Konkanganayi! Tshitudi mua kuenza mpindiewu ntshinyi? 
2Samuel16:21 Akitofele kuandamuna lukasa ne: — Bakaji bonsu badi tatuebe Davide mushiye bua kulamabu nzubu wa bukalenga, ubabuelele mu nzubu, bua ushale muena lukuna wa tatuebe Davide. Pikala bena Izrayele bonsu bumvua bualu ebu, bantu badi batue ku tshiebe nebikale ne dikima." 
2Samuel16:22 Nanku, kuashilabu Absalome ntenta ku musaka wa nzubu wa bukalenga. Absalome kubuelela bakaji ba tatuende mu ntenta amu, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile." 
2Samuel16:23 Tshikondu atshi, mubelu onsu uvua Akitofele ubela muntu, bavua bauteleja amu bu diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu mene. Nansha Davide nansha Absalome bavua bateleja ngenyi ayi, bayikumbaja." 
2Samuel17:1 Matuku makese mamane kupita, Akitofele kuambila Absalome ne: — Itaba bua nsungule bena mvita binunu dikumi ne bibidi bua meme kulondakaja Davide butuku ebu." 
2Samuel17:2 Nemmukuate, pikalaye yeye mumane kupungila, mmuteketa mu maboku. Nemmukuatshishe bowa. Nanku bantu bonsu badiye nabu nebanyeme. Diba adi nenshipe anu Davide nkayende." 
2Samuel17:3 Pashishe nempingane ne bena Izrayele bende bonsu kuudi. Muntu udi ukuatshisha mumane kufua, bena Izrayele bonsu nebapingane kuudi, kabidi nebasombe anu bimpe." 
2Samuel17:4 Lungenyi alu kusankisha Absalome ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele bonsu. 
2Samuel17:5 Kadi Absalome kutuma diyi ne: — Babikile kabidi Ushayi, muena Arki, bua tumvue tshidiye wamba." 
2Samuel17:6 Ushayi mumane kufika, Absalome kumuambila bionsu bivua Akitofele muambe. Pashishe Absalome kukonka Ushayi ne: — Tuenze bionsu bidi Akitofele mutuambile abi, anyi udi utupesha lungenyi lukuabu?" 
2Samuel17:7 Ushayi kuandamuna Absalome ne: — Musangu ewu, lungenyi ludi Akitofele mufila kaluena luimpe to." 
2Samuel17:8 Wewe udi mumanye tatuebe Davide bimpe ne bantu badiye nabu: bonsu mbena mvita ba bukitu. Badi ne lonji bu nyama ya nkashama, padi mamuende mujimine mu tshisuku. Kabidi tatuebe mmuena mvita, kena mua kulala muaba umue ne bena mvita bakuabu to." 
2Samuel17:9 Bulelela, mpindiewu udi mua kuikala musokome mu lubuebue, nansha muaba mukuabu. Pikalabu badianjila kushipa bantu bakuabu ba munkatshi muetu, lumu neluye ne: Mbatshimune bena mvita ba Absalome." 
2Samuel17:10 Diba adi bena mvita bonsu, too ne badi ne bukitu ne muoyi mukole bu nyama wa ntambue, nebatekete mu maboku. Bualu bena Izrayele bonsu mbamanye ne: tatuebe Davide udi muena mvita wa bukitu, kabidi bantu bonsu badiye nabu mbilobu." 
2Samuel17:11 Lungenyi luanyi ludi nunku: Ubikidishe bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele, biangatshile ku Dane too ne ku Bersheba, bikale bungi bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Pashishe, wewe nkayebe uye nabu mu mvita amu." 
2Samuel17:12 Netupete Davide muaba onsu wikalaye musokome. Netumunguile bu mudi lumuma lumata pa buloba. Tatuebe ne bantu bonsu badiye nabu, netubabutule bonsu." 
2Samuel17:13 Pikalabu banyemene mu thimenga kampande, bena mvita betu bonsu nebaye ne mionji, netukoke tshimenga atshi bua kutshiela mu musulu udi pabuipi too ne padi mu tshimemga atshi kamuyi mushala nansha lusoka." 
2Samuel17:14 Absalome ne bena Izrayele kuamba ne: — Lungenyi lua Ushayi nduimpe lupite lua Akitofele! Maweja-Nangila ke uvua muenze bua babenge lungenyi lua Akitofele luvua luimpe. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua musue kukengesha Absalome. 
2Samuel17:15 Ushayi kumanyisha batuangaji: Sadoke ne Abiyatare lungenyi luvua Akitofele muambile Absalome ne bakulu ba bena Izrayele, kubamanyisha kabidi ne lungenyi luvuaye mufile yeye nkayende." 
2Samuel17:16 Ke Ushayi kubambila kabidi ne: — Nanku mpindiewu, tumayi diyi lukasa kudi Davide. Numuambile bua kaladi butuku mu mpata udi ku Yardene to. Asabuke musulu lukasa, bua kabamushipi ne bantu bonsu badiye nabu." 
2Samuel17:17 Yonatane, muana wa Abiyatare, ne Akimase, muana wa Sadoke, bavua basombela pabuipi ne mpokolu wa Enrojele. Ke batuangaji abu kubatumina mukaji muena mudimu bua kubamanyisha malu avuabu mua kuya kuambila mukalenga Davide. Bualu Yonatane ne Akimase kabawa mua kubuela mu Yerushalayime to, bua kabamanyi kudi bantu." 
2Samuel17:18 Kadi nsongalume mukuabu, uvua mumane kubamona, kuyaye kuambila Absalome. Nanku Yonatane ne Akimase kunyema lubilu, kufika ku nzubu kua muntu mukuabu mu musoku wa Bakurime. Mu lubanza lua muntu awu, muvua tshiina tshia mayi. Kusokomabu mu tshiina atshi." 
2Samuel17:19 Mukaji wa muena nzubu awu, kubuikila tshilamba ku mushiku wa tshiina atshi. Kuadijaye ntete pa tshilamba apu mushindu udi muntu kayi mua kumona tshiina to." 
2Samuel17:20 Bantu bavua Absalome mutume kufika ku nzubu kua mukaji awu, kumukonka ne: — Akimase ne Yonatane badi penyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Bakadi bamane kupitshila ku tshiina tshia mayi. Bantu bavua Absalome mutume, kukeba Yonatane ne Akimase, kupanga. Kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel17:21 Bobu bamane kuya, Akimase ne Yonatane kupatukabu mu tshiina, kuya kudimuja mukalenga Davide, bamuambile bionsu bivua Akitofele muambe. Pashishe kumuambilabu ne: — Jukayi lukasa, nusabuke Yardene." 
2Samuel17:22 Nanku, Davide kujuka lukasa ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kusabuka Yardene. Butshia dinda, bantu bonsu bavua bamane kusabuka, kakuyi muntu mushale nansha umue." 
2Samuel17:23 Akitofele umona ne: kabena bitabe lungenyi luende, kusuikaye biseba bia kusomba pa nyama wende wa mpunde, kupinganaye mu tshimenga tshia Ngilo, nuwuaye musombela. Kulayaye bena nzubu wende, pashishe kudiowaye. Kumujikabu mu lukita lua tatuende." 
2Samuel17:24 Davide kufika ku Makanayime, patshivua Absalome usabuka Yardene ne bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bonsu." 
2Samuel17:25 Absalome uvua mumane kusungula Amasha bua kuikalaye mfumu wa bena mvita, mupingana muaba wa Yowabe. Amasha uvua muana wa Yetere, muena Izrayele. Yetere uvua musele Abigale, muana wa Nakashe, kabidi muanabu wa Seruya, mamuende wa Yowabe." 
2Samuel17:26 Absalome ne bena Izrayele kuasa mitanda yabu mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. 
2Samuel17:27 Davide mumane kufika ku Makanayime, kupetangana ne Shobi, muana wa Nakashe wa mu Raba, tshimenga tshinene tshia bena Amone. Kumonanganaye kabidi ne Makire, muana wa Amiyele, wa mu tshimenga tshia Lodabare, kabidi ne Barzilayi, wa mu musoku wa Rogelime mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
2Samuel17:28 Bantu aba bavua batuadile Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu: malalu, bilamba bienza ne boya bua nyama, malongu ne biakudia, ntete ya kuenza bukula, ntete ya orje, bukula mene, ntete mikanga, nkunde ya mishindu mishilangane, buitshi, manteka, fromaje muenza ne mabela a ngombe, makuabu muenze ne a mikoku. Bualu bantu abu bavua bambilangane ne: “Bantu aba bavua bapitshile mu tshipela, badi mua kuikala bapungila, bafue ne nzala ne nyota.”" 
2Samuel17:29  
2Samuel18:1 Mukalenga Davide kubandila bena mvita bende bavuaye nabu. Kusungulaye balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese bia bena mvita. 
2Samuel18:2 Kupeshaye mansebende Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, tshia bisatu tshimue tshia bena mvita. Kupeshaye Abishayi muanabu ne Yowabe tshia bisatu tshimue kabidi. Kupeshaye Itayi wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngate tshia bisatu tshikuabu. Kumanyishaye bena mvita ne: netuye nenu mu mvita." 
2Samuel18:3 Kadi bena mvita kubenga, bamba ne: — Nansha, kuena mua kuya netu to. Bualu pikala baluishi batutshimuna, tuetu banyema, baluishi kabena batukeba tuetu to. Nansha baluishi bashipe tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bena mvita betu, kabena bamona bu bualu to. Badi bakukeba anu wewe. Bualu wewe nkayebe udi mupite bena mvita betu binunu dikumi. Nanku tudi basue bua ushale mu tshimenga, bua wikale utuambuluisha, ututumina bitudi tukengela." 
2Samuel18:4 Mukalenga Davide kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe nengenze tshinudi nujinga. Nanku, mukalenga Davide kuimana pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia tshimenga. Bena mvita kupatuka mu bisumbu binene ne bikese." 
2Samuel18:5 Mukalenga Davide kuambila kabidi Yowabe, Abishayi ne Itayi, ne: — Ndi nnusengelela, kanuenzedi muananyi Absalome bibi to. Bena mvita bonsu bavua bumvue pavua Davide welela balombodi mukenji awu." 
2Samuel18:6 Bena mvita ba Davide kuluisha bena mvita ba Absalome. Mvitaayi, ivua yenzekela mu ditu dia Efrayime." 
2Samuel18:7 Bena mvita ba Davide kutshimuna bena mvita ba Absalome. Dituku adi, mbashipe bantu bapite bungi bu binunu makumi abidi." 
2Samuel18:8 Mvita ivua mitangalaka mu ditu dijima. Bantu bavua badifuile nkayabu muitu, bavua ba bungi, bapite bavuabu bashipe mu mvita." 
2Samuel18:9 Ke Absalome, mubande pa nyama wende wa mpunde, kusambakena ne bena mvita ba Davide. Nyama wa mpunde wa Absalome kupitshilaye muinshi mua mutshi munene, uvua ne matamba mapindakane. Mutu wa Absalome kubuela mu matamba a mutshi awu. Nyama wa mpunde kutungunuka ne luendu, Absalome kushala mukalame, mulembelele makasa kaayi atue panshi." 
2Samuel18:10 Muena mvita wa Davide kumumona, kuya kuambila Yowabe ne: — Ndi mumone Absalome mukalame mu matamba a mutshi." 
2Samuel18:11 Yowabe kumukonka ne: — Udi mumumone! Kadi kuena mumutuute, mumushipele muaba awu bua tshinyi? Mvua mua kukupesha nkanu ya mushinga mukole dikumi, ne mukaba!" 
2Samuel18:12 Muena mvita awu, kuandamuna Yowabe ne: — Nansha wewe mumpeshe nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole tshinunu, tshiena mua kuenzela muana wa mukalenga bibi to. Tuetu bonsu tuvua bumvua mukalenga Davide ukuambila wewe, Abishayi ne kayi ne: “Ndi nnusengelela, kanuenzedi muananyi Absalome bibi to.”" 
2Samuel18:13 Bu meme mushipe Absalome, muenze bu muntu uvua kayi mumvue tshivua Davide muambe, mukalenga Davide uvua anu mua kunjingulula mashimi anyi. — Bualu yeye mmumanye bionsu. — Bu meme mubenge diyi dia mukalenga, wewe kuvua mua kungakuila to." 
2Samuel18:14 Yowabe kuamba ne: — Tshiena mua kuelangana nebe mpata. Ndi njimija diba dianyi. Yowabe kuambula misongolu mitue isatu, kuya kuyasa Absalome mu tshiadi pa muoyi. Bualu katshia Absalome ukalama mu matamba a mutshi, kavua muanji kufua to, utshivua ne muoyi." 
2Samuel18:15 Bansongalume dikumi bena mvita, bavua bambula bia mvita bia Yowabe, inyunguluka Absalome, kumushipa kashidi." 
2Samuel18:16 Ke Yowabe kuelesha mpungi bua bantu balekele mvita. Bena mvita ba Davide kulekela kulondakaja bena mvita ba Absalome. 
2Samuel18:17 Kuambulabu tshitalu tshia Absalome, kutshimansha mu tshiina tshinene tshiwa mu ditu amu. Pashishe kunguijabu mushiki munene wa mabue pa tshitalu atshi. Diba adi, bena mvita ba Absalome kunyema, muntu yonsu kuya ku nzubu kuende." 
2Samuel18:18 Patshi wa Absalome ne muoyi, uvua muimanyike dibue mu tshibandabanda tshia Mukalenga, bualu uvua wamba ne: “Tshiena ne muana wa balume udi mua kusangula dina dianyi.” Nanku, kuinyikaye dibue adi dina diende. Too ne mpindiewu, batshidi babikila dibue adi ne: “Tshivulukilu tshia Absalome ” Davide udi upeta lumu lua lufu lua Absalome" 
2Samuel18:19 Akimase, muana wa Sadoke, kuambila Yowabe ne: — Itabe nye lubilu bua kuambila mukalenga Davide, mushindu udi Maweja-Nangila mu-mulumbuluila, mu bianza bia baluishi bende." 
2Samuel18:20 Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Nansha, kuena mua kuamba bualu ebu lelu to. Mbibi. Neuye kuamba dituku dikuabu. Kadi lelu kuenji nanku to, bualu udi mufue mmuana wa mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel18:21 Nanku, Yowabe kutumina mupika wa bena Kushe diyi ne: — Wewe uye kuambila mukalenga Davide bionsu biudi mumone mu mvita. Mupika kutua mpala panshi kumpala kua Yowabe, kuya lubilu." 
2Samuel18:22 Kadi Akimase kulomba Yowabe bikole, umuambila ne: — Tshiasua kungenzekela tshingenzekele. Ndi musue kulonda muena Kushe lubilu. Yowabe kumukonka ne: — Mulunda wanyi, udi musue kuya bua tshinyi? Kuena mua kupeta difutu ku lumu lua mushindu ewu to." 
2Samuel18:23 Akimase kuandamuna ne: — Kakuena bualu to. Ndi musue anu kuya. Yowabe kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ndaku. Akimase kuya lubilu, kulonda njila wa mu mpata wa Yardene, kupita muena Kushe." 
2Samuel18:24 Diba adi, Davide uvua musombe muaba uvua pankatshi pa tshiibi tshia pa mbelu ne tshia munda mua tshimenga. Mutentekedi kubanda pa mutu pa tshibumba tshivua pa mutu pa tshimana tshia tshimenga. Pavuaye pa mutu pa tshimana ukenzakana, diakamue kumonaye muntu umue ulua lubilu." 
2Samuel18:25 Kuambilaye mukalenga Davide. Mukalenga Davide, kuamba ne: — Pikalaye nkayende, udi ne bualu bua disanka. Muntu uvuabu batume kusemena pabuipi." 
2Samuel18:26 Mutentekedi kumona kabidi muntu mukuabu ulua lubilu. Kuelaye diyi kudi muntu uvua ku tshiibi ne: — Muntu mukuabu kabidi udi ulua nkayende lubilu. Mukalenga Davide kuandamuna ne: — Muntu awu, udi anu ne bualu bua disanka." 
2Samuel18:27 Mutentekedi kuamba kabidi ne: — Muntu udi kumpala, mushindu udiye unyema, udi bu Akimase, muana wa Sadoke. Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Mmuana wa mushinga mukole. Bulelela, udi ne bualu bua disanka." 
2Samuel18:28 Akimase, kayi muanji kufika, kuelaye mukalenga Davide diyi ne: — Malu onsu adi bimpe! Kudielaye mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide, wamba ne: — Mukalenga, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu atumbe, bualu yeye ke udi mufile mu bianza biebe baluishi bebe bavua bakutombokela." 
2Samuel18:29 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka ne: — Absalome muana udi bimpe anyi? Akimase kuandamuna ne: — Pavua Yowabe mututume, meme ne muena mudimu webe mukuabu, mvua mumvue mutoyi mukole bu bantu bunguile kaba kamue, bela mbila. Kadi tshiena mumanye tshidi tshienzeka to." 
2Samuel18:30 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Mbimpe! Imana ku luseke. Kadi wikale pabuipi nanyi. Akimase kuya kuimana ku luseke lua mukalenga Davide, kushala muindile." 
2Samuel18:31 Mutantshi mukese, muena Kushe kufika. Kuambilaye mukalenga Davide ne: — Mukalenga, ndi ne bualu bua disanka bua kukuambila. Maweja-Nangila ke udi mukose tshilumbu tshiebe lelu, bualu mmukusungile mu bianza bia baluishi bebe." 
2Samuel18:32 Mukalenga Davide kumukonka ne: — Absalome muana udi bimpe anyi? Muena Kushe kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga tudi tujinga ne bionsu bidi bienzekela nsongalume ewu, bienzekele baluishi bebe ne bantu bonsu badi bakutombokela!" 
2Samuel19:1 Ke mukalenga Davide kubungama bikole. Kuyaye mu nzubu uvua pa mutu pa tshiibi tshia tshimenga, bua kudila. Uvua wenda wamba ne: — Eyi, Absalome wanyi, Absalome wanyi, muananyi, muananyi eyi, Absalome wanyi! Meme ke uvua mua kufua. Wewe kushala. Absalome wanyi, muananyi!" 
2Samuel19:2 Kumanyishabu Yowabe bua muadi wa mukalenga Davide, ne muvuaye udila, upuekesha binsonji bivule bua lufu lua Absalome." 
2Samuel19:3 Dituku adi, bena mvita kabena benza tshibilu tshia ditshimuna diabu to. Bavua amu ne dibungama dikole. Bena mvita kumvua ne: mukalenga Davide udi unyingalala bikole bua lufu lua muanende Absalome," 
2Samuel19:4 kupinganabu mu tshimenga mu musokoku ne bundu, bu mudi bena mvita benza padibu banyema mvita." 
2Samuel19:5 Kadi, mukalenga Davide uvua anu mubuikile tshilamba ku mesu, udila anu kudila, wamba ne: — Eyi, Absalome wanyi, eyi muananyi Absalome, muananyi, eyi muananyi." 
2Samuel19:6 Yowabe kuya kudi mukalenga Davide mu nzubu muende, umuambila ne: — Paudi udila nenku lelu, udi ufuisha bena mvita bebe bundu. Bobu ke badi basungidila wewe, bana bebe ba balume, bana bebe ba bakaji, ne bakaji bebe bonsu." 
2Samuel19:7 Bualu wewe udi munange bantu badi bakukina, kabidi udi ukina bantu badi bakunanga. Bionsu ebi bidi bileja ne: bamfumu ba bena mvita bebe ne bantu bonsu badi bakuitaba muabu muonsu, bakuenzela mudimu, kabena ne mushinga kuudi wewe to. Eyowa, ndi mumone ne: bu tuetu bonsu bafue, Absalome mushale ne muoyi, wewe uvua mua kusanka bikole." 
2Samuel19:8 Juka mpindiewu, udikoleshe. Uye kusamba bena mvita bebe bua kupetabu bukole. Wewe kuyi muye kudibu, ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila ne: muena mvita nansha umue kena mua kukuenzela mudimu kabidi dituku nansha dimue to. Nanku, wewe neupete dikenga dikole, dipite makenga onsu audi mumane kukenga, biangatshile ku buana buebe." 
2Samuel19:9 Ke mukalenga Davide kuya kusomba pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga. Kumanyishabu bena mvita bonsu bualu abu. Kufikabu bonsu muaba uvua mukalenga Davide. Bena mvita ba Absalome bavua bamane kunyema. Muntu yonsu wa kudibu uvua muye ku nzubu kuende. 
2Samuel19:10 Mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, bantu kutuadija kukonkangana, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Davide ke uvua mutusungidile mu bianza bia baluishi betu, nangananga mu bianza bia bena Peleshete. Kadi uvua munyeme mu ditunga emu anu bua Absalome." 
2Samuel19:11 Absalome ke utuvua badisunguile nkayetu bua kuikalaye mukalenga. Mpindiewu mmumane kufua mu mvita. Kadi bua kulomba mukalenga Davide, apingane mu Yerushalayime, tshitudi bindile ntshinyi?”" 
2Samuel19:12 Ke mukalenga Davide kabidi kutumina batuangaji Sadoke ne Abiyatare diyi, ubambila ne: — Nuye kudi bakulu ba bena Yuda, nubakonke ne: “Nuenu nutshidi bashadile panyima, kanuyi nukeba mushindu wa kupingaja mukalenga ku nzubu kuende bua tshinyi? Mukalenga mene mmumane kumanya meji adi bena Izrayele bakuabu nawu." 
2Samuel19:13 Nuenu nudi bana babu ne mukalenga Davide menemene. Nanku, kanuikadi ba ndekelu bua kumupingaja to.”" 
2Samuel19:14 Pashishe, nuye kungambidila Amasha ne: “Kuena mulele wanyi anyi? Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu annyoke ne dinyoka dikole, pangikala tshiyi mukupingaje muaba wa Yowabe kashidi, bua wewe kuikala mulombodi wa bena mvita banyi!”" 
2Samuel19:15 Meyi a mukalenga Davide kusaka bena Yuda, bua bumvuangane bonsu. Ke kutuminabu mukalenga Davide diyi, bamuambila ne: “Pingana mu Yerushalayime, ne bantu bebe bonsu.”" 
2Samuel19:16 Nanku, mukalenga Davide kupingana, kupueka too ne ku muelelu wa Yardene. Bena Yuda kufika ku Ngilgale, bua ku sambakena ne mukalenga Davide, ne kumuambuluisha bua kusabukaye Yardene." 
2Samuel19:17 Shimeyi muana wa Ngera, muena Binyamine wa mu musoku wa Bakurime, uvua muye ne bena Yuda bua kupueka nabu, kuya kudileja kudi mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel19:18 Shimeyi uvua muye ne bena Binyamine tshinunu. Uvua muye kabidi ne Siba, muena mudimu wa mu nzubu mua Shawule, ne bana bende ba balume dikumi ne batanu, ne bena mudimu bende makumi abidi. Bantu aba bonsu kunyemena ku Yardene, bua kusambakena ne mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel19:19 Pavua buatu buvua ne bena nzubu wa mukalenga Davide busabuka Yardene, bantu bavua ne Shimeyi bavua babambuluisha, benza bionsu bivua mukalenga Davide wamba. Mukalenga mumane kusabuka musulu, Shimeyi kudiela mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga," 
2Samuel19:20 umuambila ne: — Mukalenga, kunsombuedi bua bubi buanyi! Kuvuluki bibi bionsu bimvua mukuenzele, dituku diuvua umuka mu Yerushalayime. Kuntekedi lukuna to." 
2Samuel19:21 Ndi mumanye bimpe ne: ndi muenze bibi. Kadi, mukalenga, lelu umone mundi mupueke bua kusambakena nebe, bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu ba ku mutu wa ditunga kabayi banji kufika." 
2Samuel19:22 Kadi Abishayi, muana wa Seruya, kukonka mukalenga Davide ne: — Bualu budi Shimeyi wamba ebu, ke budi butukandika bua katumushipi anyi? Kena mutshipe mukalenga uvua Maweja-Nangila musungule anyi?" 
2Samuel19:23 Mukalenga Davide kukonka Abishayi ne muanabu Yowabe ne: — Nuenu, bana ba Seruya, nudi nubuelakana mu malu aa bua tshinyi? Mpindiewu nudi nubenga tshindi musue bua tshinyi? Tshiena musue bua bashipe muntu wa bena Izrayele dituku dia lelu, dindi mujadike meme nkayanyi ne: ndi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bulelela!" 
2Samuel19:24 Mukalenga Davide kuambila Shimeyi ne: — Ndi nditshipa ne: kabena mua kukushipa to. 
2Samuel19:25 Mefibaale, muikulu wa Shawule, uvua muye kabidi bua kusambakena ne mukalenga Davide. Kadi biangatshile dituku divua mukalenga Davide mumuke too ne dituku divuaye mupingane mu Yerushalayime ne bukole bua mubidi, Mefibaale kavua mukose miedi, kavua mowa mayi ku makasa, nansha musukule bilamba biende." 
2Samuel19:26 Mefibaale ufika kumpala kua mukalenga Davide, mukalenga Davide kumukonka ne: — Mefibaale, uvua mushale kuyi muye nanyi bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:27 Mefibaale kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, muena mudimu wanyi ke uvua munshime! Meme mvua muambe ne: “Bu mundi tshiyi ngenda bimpe, ndi musue kusuika biseba bia kusomba pa nyama wanyi wa mpunde, mbande pa nyama, bua tuye ne mukalenga Davide.”" 
2Samuel19:28 Kadi malu onsu adi muena mudimu wanyi mukuambile, mmunshiminyine. Nanku, mukalenga, wewe udi bu mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi mua kuenza muudi musue." 
2Samuel19:29 Bantu bonsu bavua bashale mu nzubu mua kaku wanyi Shawule, wewe uvua amu mua kubashipa bonsu. Kadi mukalenga kuena muenze nanku to! Wewe kungakidila bua ngikale ndia nebe ku mesa. Nanku, tshiena ne tshikuabu tshindi mua kukulomba kabidi to." 
2Samuel19:30 Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa mbimpe. Biudi mumane kuamba abi mbikumbane. Ndi njadika ne: Siba ne wewe Mefibaale nenuabanyangane maloba a Shawule. 
2Samuel19:31 Mefibaale kuandamuna ne: — Siba nkayende udi mua kuangata bionsu abi. Mukalenga tshidi ne bualu menemene, mbua upingane ku nzubu kuebe anu katakata." 
2Samuel19:32 Barzilayi, wa mu musoku wa Rogelime, mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, uvua mupueke kabidi ku Yardene. Yeye ke uvua musabuke musulu awu ne mukalenga Davide, bua kushiya mukalenga dishiya." 
2Samuel19:33 Barzilayi uvua muntu mukulumpe wa bidimu makumi muanda mukulu. Bu nuwuaye mubanji munene, uvua mua kupesha mukalenga Davide biakudia pawaye ku Makanayime." 
2Samuel19:34 Mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Barzilayi, ndi nya nebe mu Yerushalayime. Meme ne nkulame bimpe, nkudisha." 
2Samuel19:35 Barzilayi kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, nkunshadile matuku bungi munyi bua meme kuikala ne muoyi? Matuku anyi mmashale makese matambe. Tshiena mua kuya nebe ku Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel19:36 Mpindiewu ndi ne bidimu makumi muanda mukulu. Tshiena mumanye kabidi mua kusunguluja bimpe ne bibi. Tshiena mua kumvua busheme bua bintu bindi ndia, nansha bindi nnua. Tshiena mua kusunguluja meyi a bantu balume nansha bakaji badi bimba misambu. Nanku ndi mua kuya nebe anu bua kukutatshisha bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:37 Mbikumbane bua meme kusabuka nebe musulu wa Yardene. Kadi meme tshiena nansha mukumbanyine disanka edi! 
2Samuel19:38 Nanku itaba, mpingane mu tshimenga tshietu. Nemfuilemu pabuipi ne lukita lua tatu wanyi ne lua mamu wanyi. Kadi, mukalenga, muananyi wa balume Kimhame, nyeye ewu. Uye nende, umuenzele muonsu muudi musue." 
2Samuel19:39 Mukalenga Davide kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe. Nenye ne Kimhame. Netumuenzele tshionsu tshiudi ujinga. Tshintu tshiwikala mundombe, nenkupeshatshi." 
2Samuel19:40 Bantu bonsu kusabuka Yardene, uvua mukalenga Davide mumane kusabuka kumpala. Mukalenga Davide kupukila Barzilayi, kumuela lupemba. Pashishe, Barzilayi kupingana ku nzubu kuende." 
2Samuel19:41 Mukalenga Davide kuya ne Kimhame ku Ngilaade. Bena Yuda bonsu, ne tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bena Izrayele bavua ku mutu mu ditunga, kuyabu ne mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel19:42 Bena ku mutu, mu ditunga kusemena kudi mukalenga Davide, kumukonka ne: — Wewe udi ne bena mvita bebe bonsu, kadi amu bana betu bena Yuda nkayabu mbakusabule wewe ne bena nzubu webe bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel19:43 Bena Yuda kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga Davide mmulele wetu menemene! Kabiyi bu bienu to. Kadi nudi nufika munda bua bualu ebu bua tshinyi? Mukalenga Davide ke udi utudisha anyi? Tshidiye mutupeshe ntshinyi? 
2Samuel19:44 Diakamue bena Izrayele kuandamuna bena Yuda ne: — Mu bukalenga ebu, tuetu tudi banupite misangu dikumi. Eyowa, nansha bua mukalenga Davide, tuetu tudi mua kuenza mutudi basue kunupita nuenu. Kadi, nudi nutupepeja bua tshinyi? Kabidi tuetu ke bavua badianjila kuela meji a kupingaja mukalenga Davide mu tshimenga. Kadi, bena Yuda bavua batanda bikole, bapite bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel20:1 Mu Ngilgale, muvua muntu mukuabu mutshimbakane, muena Binyamine, dina diende Sheba, muana wa Bikri. Sheba uvua wela mpungi, wamba ne: — Davide katuena nende bualu to, katuena basue kulonda muana wa Ishayi to! Bena Izrayele, pinganayi ku nzubu yenu!" 
2Samuel20:2 Nanku bena Izrayele kumuka kudi Davide, kuya kudi Sheba. Anu bena Yuda nkayabu kushala kudi mukalenga wabu bua kumuka nende ku Yardene, kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel20:3 Anu mukalenga Davide ufika ku nzubu wende wa bukalenga, kubikidishaye bakaji bende bakuabu dikumi, bavuaye mushiye bua kulama nzubu awu. Kubatekaye mu nzubu umue, kulamabu nzubu awu bikole kudi bena mvita. Davide uvua ubadisha bimpe, kadi katshivua ubabuelela mu nzubu to. Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, kutekaye bakaji abu pa nkayabu too ne ku lufu luabu. Kushalabu bu bakaji bakamba, bayabu mutshikale ne muoyi." 
2Samuel20:4 Pashishe mukalenga Davide kuambila Amasha ne: — Bikidisha bena mvita ba bena Yuda! Ndi nkupesha matuku asatu, bua ufike nabu apa." 
2Samuel20:5 Amasha kuya kuenza tshivua mukalenga muambe. Kadi kupitshishaye matuku awa mukalenga Davide mumuambile. 
2Samuel20:6 Nanku, mukalenga Davide kuambila Abishayi ne: — Mpindiewu, Sheba udi ne lonji lua kutuenzela bibi mupite Absalome. Nanku uye ne bena mvita badi bandame meme. Ulondakaje nabu muntu ewu Sheba, kayi muanji kuya kusokoma mu bimenga bidi ne bimana bikole, bua kutunyemaye." 
2Samuel20:7 Nanku bena mvita bavua Yowabe ulombola, ne bena Kereti ne bena Peleti, bavua balama mukalenga Davide, mmumue ne: bena mvita bonsu bavua bamanye mvita bikole, kuyabu ne Abishayi mu mvita, kumukabu mu Yerushalayime, benda balondakaja Sheba." 
2Samuel20:8 Bobu bamane kufika pabuipi ne dibue dinene dia mu Ngibone, Amasha kubapeta. Yowabe uvua muvuale bia mvita. Uvua ne mukaba wa nkonka. Ku mukaba aku, uvua muaseku muela muikale mu tshibubu. Pavua Yowabe wenda usemena, muela kupatuka, kumata panshi." 
2Samuel20:9 Yowabe kuebeja Amasha ne: — Muanetu udi munyi? Kukuataye Amasha ku muedi ne tshianza tshia balume bua kumupukila. 
2Samuel20:10 Amasha kavua mudimuke bua muela uvua Yowabe muangule, mukuate ku tshianza tshia bakaji. Yowabe kutua Amasha muela mu difu. Mala a Amasha kupatuka, kupongoloka panshi, kufuaye. Yowabe kavua ne bua kumutua muela tshiakabidi to. Pashishe, Yowabe ne muanabu Abishayi kutungunuka, kulondakaja Sheba." 
2Samuel20:11 Muena mvita mukuabu wa Yowabe kushala muaba uvua tshitalu tshia Amasha, wela mbila ne: “Nuenu bonsu, balunda ba Yowabe ne bantu badi ku luseke lua Davide, nulonde Yowabe!”" 
2Samuel20:12 Kadi Amasha uvua anu panshi munkatshi mua njila, mudibonde mu mashi. Muena mvita mukuabu kumona ne: bantu bonsu bavua anu bimane muaba uvua tshitalu awu. Nanku, kumushaye tshitalu tshia Amasha mu njila, kuya natshi mu budimi buvua pabuipi." 
2Samuel20:13 Kutshibuikilaye tshinkutu. Yeye mumane kumusha tshitalu, bena mvita bavua anu bapita buludi, balonda Yowabe bua kulondakaja Sheba." 
2Samuel20:14 Yowabe kupitshila mu bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele. Kufikaye mu tshimenga tshia Abele-Bete-Maka. Bena Beri bonsu kudisangisha kudi Yowabe. 
2Samuel20:15 Yowabe ne bena mvita bende kutshintshimikila Sheba uvua mu tshimenga atshi tshia Abele-Bete-Maka. Kuimanyikabu mushiki wa buloba, bule bumue ne tshimana tshia kumpala tshia tshimenga. Pashishe kumbulabu kabidi kuinshi kua bimana abi bua kubishimbula." 
2Samuel20:16 Mukaji mutalame uvua mu tshimenga amu, kuelaye lubila ne: — Telejayi, telejayi! Ambilayi Yowabe asemene muaba ewu. Ndi ne bualu bua kumuambila." 
2Samuel20:17 Yowabe kusemena. Mukaji kumukonka ne: — Wewe udi Yowabe menemene anyi? Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mmeme. Mukaji kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, teleja bualu bundi musue kukuambila. Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Ndi muteleje." 
2Samuel20:18 Mukaji kumuambila ne: — Bakulumpe bambila ne: “Kebeji wakapambuka. Mbimpe konka lungenyi ku Abele-Bete-Maka. Nanku bualu nebujike!” 
2Samuel20:19 Tshimenga tshietu, ntshimenga tshia ku bimenga bidi ne ditalala ne bidi bitaba meyi a bukalenga. Kadi wewe udi musue kunyanga etshi tshimue tshia ku bimenga binene bia bena Izrayele! Udi musue kunyanga tshintu tshidi tshia Maweja-Nangila bua tshinyi?" 
2Samuel20:20 Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Kabiena mua kuenzeka to! Meme tshiena ne dijinga dia kunyanga bintu, nansha kunyanga tshimenga to." 
2Samuel20:21 Tshiena ne dijinga dia kuenza nanku to. Kadi ndi nkeba anu muntu mukuabu wa mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime, Sheba, muana wa Bikri, udi mutombokele mukalenga Davide. Mpeshayi anu Sheba nkayende. Nanku nengumuke muaba ewu. Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe. Tudi tukuimanshila mutu wa Sheba pa mutu pa tshimana munudi amu." 
2Samuel20:22 Mukaji kuya kudi bana babu, kubabela bimpe. Nanku kukosabu mutu wa Sheba, kuwimanshilabu Yowabe. Yowabe kuelesha mpungi. Diakamue bena mvita bonsu kumukabu. Kupinganabu kuabu. Yowabe kupingana kudi mukalenga Davide mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel20:23 Yowabe uvua mfumu wa bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, uvua ulombola bena Kreti ne bena Peleti, bavua balame mukalenga Davide." 
2Samuel20:24 Adorame uvua mfumu mulombodi wa midimu mishilangane. Yosafate, muana wa Akilude, uvua mumanyishi wa malu a mukalenga." 
2Samuel20:25 Sheva uvua mufundi, Sadoke ne Abiyatare bavua batuangaji." 
2Samuel20:26 Ira, muana wa ku ndelanganyi ya Yayire, uvua kabidi mutuangaji, wenzela mukalenga Davide mudimu." 
2Samuel21:1 Tshikondu tshivua Davide mu bukalenga, tshiyole tshia nzala kushala mu ditunga bidimu bisatu bilondangane. Mukalenga Davide kukonka Maweja-Nangila bua tshiyole atshi. Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: — Nudi mu tshiyole, bualu Shawule ne bantu bende mbena tshibawu: bavua bashipe bena Ngibone." 
2Samuel21:2 Mukalenga Davide kubikidisha bena Ngibone bua kuyukila nabu. Bena Ngibone kabawa bena Izrayele to. Bavua bena Amone bavua bashala ne muoyi, bualu bena Izrayele bavua babalaya ne: katuena mua kunushipa to. Kadi pavua Shawule ukeba kusankisha bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda, uvua ukeba kubutula bena Ngibone." 
2Samuel21:3 Mukalenga Davide kukonka bena Ngibone ne: — Bua meme kudia nenu tshibalu, nuenu kuela bena Izrayele lupemba bua makenga onsu awa manuenzekele, nnuenzele tshinyi?" 
2Samuel21:4 Bena Ngibone kuandamuna ne: — Bualu budi pankatshi petu ne Shawule ne bena nzubu wende, kabuena mua kujika ne nkanu ya mushinga mukole, anyi ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha bua kushipa muena Izrayele umue to. Mukalenga Davide kubakonka kabidi ne: — Nanku ngambilayi tshinudi nujinga, nnupeshatshi." 
2Samuel21:5 Bena Ngibone kumuambila ne: — Shawule uvua musue kutujikija bonsu, kutubutula. Kavua musue bua muntu wa kutudi nansha umue ashale mu buloba bua bena Izrayele to." 
2Samuel21:6 Nanku batupeshe bantu balume muanda mutekete ba ku ndelanganyi ya Shawule. Netubowe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila ku Ngibeya, mu tshimenga tshivuabu basombe kudi Shawule, mukalenga uvua Maweja-Nangila musungule. Mukalenga Davide kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ndi nnupesha." 
2Samuel21:7 Mukalenga Davide kufuila Mefibaale, muana wa Yonatane, muikulu wa Shawule luse, bualu uvua mumane kutua ndondu wa bulunda ne Yonatane mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Samuel21:8 Kadi kubikidishaye Armoni ne Mefiboshete, bana ba balume babidi bavua Rispa, muana wa Aya, mulele ne bayende Shawule. Kubikidishaye kabidi bana ba balume batanu bavua Mikale, muana wa Shawule, mulele ne bayende Adriyele, muana wa Barzilayi wa mu Abele-Mekola." 
2Samuel21:9 Mukalenga Davide kufila bana abu kudi bena Ngibone. Bena Ngibone kuya ne bana abu pa kakuna, kubowa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bana abu kufua bonsu muanda mutekete musangu umue. Bavua babashipe mu matuku a kumpala menemene avuabu batuadija kunowa ntete ya orje." 
2Samuel21:10 Rispa, mukaji mukamba uvua Shawule mushiye, kuangata tshilamba tshikayabale tshivuaye muvuale, kutshibuikila pa lubuebue. Kusombaye muaba awu, biangatshile ku ntuadijilu kua dinowa too ne ku tshikondu tshiwa mvula mutuadije kutokela bitalu bia bana abu. Mu munya, mukaji awu uvua wipata nyunyi bua kayikidi pa bitalu abi. Butuku uvua wipata nyama ya tshisuku bua kayifiki muaba awu." 
2Samuel21:11 Kumanyishabu mukalenga Davide bionsu bivua mukaji awu wenza. 
2Samuel21:12 Nanku, mukalenga kuya kunyenga mifuba ya Shawule, ya muanende Yonatane ivua mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe, mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Bualu pavua bena Peleshete batshimuna Shawule ku Ngilbowa, bavua balembeleje tshitalu tshia Shawule ne tshia Yonatane ku Bete-Sheyane muaba udi bantu batuilangane. Muaba awu, ke uvua bena tshimenga tshia Yabeshe baye kuiba bitalu abi." 
2Samuel21:13 Davide kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe ne mifuba ya Shawule ne ya Yonatane. Pashishe, kungujabu kabidi mifuba ya bana muanda mutekete bavuabu bowa." 
2Samuel21:14 Kuyabu kuyijika muaba umue ne mifuba ya Shawule ne ya Yonatane, mu lukita lua Kishe, tatuende wa Shawule, luvua ku Sela mu buloba bua bena Binyamine. Bantu bamane kuenza bonsu bivua mukalenga Davide muambe, Mvidi Mukulu kukumbaja bionsu bivua bena ditunga balombe." 
2Samuel21:15 Mvita kujuka kabidi pankatshi pa bena Peleshete ne bena Izrayele. Davide ne bena mvita bende kupueka bua kuluisha bena Peleshete. Diakamue mukalenga Davide kupungila. 
2Samuel21:16 Ishebi-Benobe, muntu wa mpolondu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arafa, uvua musue kushipa Davide. Uvua muvuale bia mvita bipiabipia. Lusongu lua difuma diende luvua lua tshiamu tshikunze, luvua ne bujitu bua kilo isatu ne pa mutu." 
2Samuel21:17 Kadi Abishayi, muana wa Seruya, kusungidila mukalenga Davide, kushipa muena Peleshete awu. Ke bena mvita kuambila mukalenga Davide ne: kuena mua kuya netu kabidi mu mvita to. Bualu wewe udi bu muendu wa bena Izrayele udi kauyi mua kujima." 
2Samuel21:18 Matuku mamane kupita, bena Izrayele kuluisha bena Peleshete tshiakabidi ku Ngobe, Mu mvita ayi, Sibekayi, wa mu Usha, kushipa Safe, muntu mukuabu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arafa." 
2Samuel21:19 Mu mvita mikuabu ivuabu baluisha bena Peleshete, ku Ngobe kabidi, Elanane, muana wa Yari, wa mu musoku wa Betleyeme, kushipa Ngoliyate, wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngate. Mutshi wa musongolu uvua nawu Ngoliyate uvua munene bu wa kukuma nawu madiba." 
2Samuel21:20 Kuluanganabu kabidi ku Ngate. Muluishi mukuabu uvua muaba awu, muikale ne minu isambombu ku tshianza tshionsu, kabidi ne bana ba nkasa basambombu ku dikasa dionsu. Bionsu bivua bienza makumi abidi ne binayi. Muntu uvua kabidi wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arafa. Uvua munange mvita bikole." 
2Samuel21:21 Kupendaye bena Izrayele. Nanku Yonatane muana wa Shama, tatuende wa Davide, kumushipa." 
2Samuel21:22 Nanku bena mvita aba banayi ba bena Peleshete, ndelanganyi ya Arafa, muena Ngate, kubashipabu kudi Davide ne bena mvita bende. Davide mumane kutshimuna mvita kuelaye Mvidi" 
2Samuel22:1 Mukalenga Davide kuimbilaye Maweja-Nangila musambu ewu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumusungidile kudi baluishi bende bonsu, nangananga kudi Shawule." 
2Samuel22:2 Maweja-Nangila udi lubuebue luanyi, muaba undi nyemena, undi nsomba bimpe." 
2Samuel22:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi udi lubuebue luanyi, muaba undi musokome tshiyi mua kupeta njiwu. Udi ngabu udi mundame, muaba mukole undi nyemena bua kupanda. Ndi nkeba mua kusokoma pabuipi nende, bua ansungidile ku malu makole onsu." 
2Samuel22:4 Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Meme kumubikila bua angambuluishe, diakamue udi unsungidila mu bianza bia baluishi banyi." 
2Samuel22:5 Mavuala a lufu avua ampitshila pa mutu, avua ankuatshisha bowa, bu musulu udi ukeba kumbutala." 
2Samuel22:6 Lufu luvua lunsuika ne mionji yalu, bu muntu udibu bela mu lukanu. Nkavua ndishinda mu buteyi bua lufu." 
2Samuel22:7 Mu dikenga dianyi, meme kubikila Maweja-Nangila. Mvua ngela mbila kudi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Mu nzubu muende, kumvuaye diyi dianyi, kumvuaye muadi wanyi." 
2Samuel22:8 Ke buloba kuzakala. Bitaku bia diulu kunyunga. Diulu ne buloba kutenkakana, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua ne tshiji." 
2Samuel22:9 Muinshi kupatuka mu mimpempe yende. Kapia kavua kapataka mukana muende, kakeba kubutula binta, kela tuntolentole, kakenka." 
2Samuel22:10 Maweja-Nangila kuinyika diulu, kutuluka panshi, divuba difike muinshi mua makasa ende." 
2Samuel22:11 Kubandaye pa kerubine, kubuka mulu. Kudilejaye pa mapuapua a lupepele." 
2Samuel22:12 Kudibuikilaye midima, musokome mu mavuba makuatakane, mu mavuba muwule tente ne mayi." 
2Samuel22:13 Kumpala kuende tshimunyi tshia kapia katoke too, Mu tshimunyi mupatuka tuntolentole tua kapia." 
2Samuel22:14 Mu diulu, Maweja-Nangila kudidisha makubakuba. Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu kuela diyi diende." 
2Samuel22:15 Kupenyaye nseke yonsu. Kuelaye miketa ku miaba yonsu. 
2Samuel22:16 Pavua Maweja-Nangila utanda, pavuaye ne tshiji tshikole, muinshi mua mayi kumueneka, bitaku bia buloba kudileja patoke." 
2Samuel22:17 Diba adi, mu diulu mudiye, kololaye tshianza, kunkuata. Kumpatalaye mu njiwu mumvua mudine ne kasuki." 
2Samuel22:18 Kunsungidilaye mu bianza bia baluishi banyi bavua ne bukole, bia bena lukuna banyi, bavua bampite dikanda." 
2Samuel22:19 Dituku dia tshiyole kunduishabu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kungambuluisha. 
2Samuel22:20 Maweja-Nangila kunsungidila, kumpikula. Udi munnange, ke padiye munsungidile." 
2Samuel22:21 Maweja-Nangila udi ungenzela nunku bualu ndi mmuitaba muanyi muonsu. Udi unsankisha, bualu ndi ngenza bimpe matuku onsu." 
2Samuel22:22 Ndi nkumbaja mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Tshiena ngenzela Mvidi Mukulu wanyi bibi to. 
2Samuel22:23 Eyowa, ndi nkumbaja mikenji idiye mutufundile. Tshiena mbenga tshidiye ulomba to." 
2Samuel22:24 Ndi musue bua kamonyi mua kubandisha. Ndi mudilame bua tshienji bibi. 
2Samuel22:25 Ke Maweja-Nangila kunsankisha, bualu ndi mmuitaba muanyi muonsu, ndi ngenza anu mudiye musue." 
2Samuel22:26 Maweja-Nangila udi unanga udi umunanga. Udi kayi ne bualu, Maweja-Nangila kena umupisha." 
2Samuel22:27 Udi udileja patoke kudi muntu wa muoyi munonoke. Kadi udi useka wa muoyi mubi. 
2Samuel22:28 Udi wambuluisha tshisamba tshidibu bafuisha bundu, upepeja badi baditambisha." 
2Samuel22:29 Maweja-Nangila, udi muendu wanyi, Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila, udi ushintulula midima yanyi, uyenza butoke." 
2Samuel22:30 Patudi nebe ndi ntupika, mbanda pa bimana. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, paudi ungambuluisha, ndi mua kutupika bimana bikole." 
2Samuel22:31 Bidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza bidi amu bimpe! Meji adiye ufila ke atudi mua kulonda. Udi bu ngabu, udi ulama badi banyemena kudiye." 
2Samuel22:32 Mvidi Mukulu udi anu umue, ke Maweja-Nangila. Lubuebue luetu ludi anu lumue, ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu!" 
2Samuel22:33 Yeye ke mulami wanyi wa bukole, Mpanda njila wanyi." 
2Samuel22:34 Udi upepeja makasa anyi, nnyema bu kabuluku, ngimana pa mikuna mitumbuke." 
2Samuel22:35 Udi undongesha mua kuluangana mvita, ungambuluisha mua kunana buta, nansha bobu bukole butambe." 
2Samuel22:36 Maweja-Nangila, udi bu ngabu udi mundame, munsungidile. Udi witaba pandi ndila, umpe bukole buebe." 
2Samuel22:37 Paudi ungambuluisha, ndi nnyema lubilu, tshiyi mua kudishinda." 
2Samuel22:38 Ndi ndondakaja bena lukuna banyi, mbabutula. Tshiena mpingana panyima, tshiyi muanji kubashipesha bonsu." 
2Samuel22:39 Ndi mbashipa, mbasaya. Kabena bajuka kabidi to. Badi anu panshi, mbadiata mu makasa." 
2Samuel22:40 Udi umpesha bukole bua kuluangana, utekesha baluishi banyi, bakadi ku makasa anyi!" 
2Samuel22:41 Udi unyemesha baluishi kumpala kuanyi. Ndi mua kubenzela mundi musue. 
2Samuel22:42 Nansha bobu bakenzakane udi mua kubambuluisha, badi batangila bapanga. Badi basengelela Maweja-Nangila, kadi kena wandamuna." 
2Samuel22:43 Ndi mbavingutula, mbashiya bu lupuishi. Ndi mbadiata bu bitotshi bia mu misesu." 
2Samuel22:44 Udi mumpikule kudi bantu banyi, badi bantombokela. Udi mundame, nshala mukalenga wa bisamba. Bantu bandi tshiyi mumanye, badi bangenzela mudimu." 
2Samuel22:45 Bantu benyi badi badionga kundi. Pandi ngamba bualu badi bantumikila. 
2Samuel22:46 Kabatshiena bantuila nkanana. Badi bapatuka miaba idibu basokome, bazakala." 
2Samuel22:47 Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Wewe lubuebue luanyi, tuasakidila! Bantu batumbishe lumu lua Mvidi Mukulu, Lubuebue luanyi ne musungidi wanyi." 
2Samuel22:48 Mvidi Mukulu udi usombuela baluishi banyi, untekeshila bisamba bia bantu." 
2Samuel22:49 Maweja-Nangila, udi umpikula kudi baluishi banyi, ungambuluisha bua ntshimune badi bankeba mvita, umpandisha mu bianza bia bena buenzayi." 
2Samuel22:50 Nanku ndi nkutumbisha munkatshi mua bisamba, nkusamuna ne misambu yanyi." 
2Samuel22:51 Maweja-Nangila udi wenza malu manene, bua kuambuluisha mukalenga uvuaye musungule. Muntu uvuaye mujidile udi umufuila luse kashidi, ke Davide, ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu." 
2Samuel23:1 Ke meyi a Davide a ndekelu aa: Telejayi meyi a Davide, muana wa Ishayi, meyi a muntu uvua Mvidi Mukulu muteke muaba wa butumbi, uvua Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe musungule bua kuikalaye mukalenga, uvua bena Izrayele bimbila misambu, basamba." 
2Samuel23:2 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ungakuisha, uteka diyi diende pa ludimi luanyi." 
2Samuel23:3 Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele kuakula, mulami wa bena Izrayele kungambila ne: “Mukalenga udi ulombola bantu bimpe, uludika bantu, ukumbaja bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue," 
2Samuel23:4 udi bu diba didi dipatuka, dikenka mu dinda, kamuyi mavuba. Mvula mumane kukamuka, munya mutema, bintu kutoloka pa buloba.”" 
2Samuel23:5 Ke malu adi Mvidi Mukulu muenzele bena nzubu wanyi. Uvua mutue nanyi ndondu wa kashidi, mujadike ndondu awu ne mikenji idi bantu kabayi mua kubenga. Bionsu bidi binsankisha, udi ubikumbaja." 
2Samuel23:6 Kadi bonsu badi bapepeja Mvidi Mukulu, badi bu matamba a mitshi ya meba adibu bimansha, kabayi mua kuambula mu tshianza patupu." 
2Samuel23:7 Udi musue kualenga, udi utuika ndami wa tshiamu, nansha musongolu wa mutshi, wosha bionsu muaba awu." 
2Samuel23:8 Mena a bena mvita ba Davide bavua ne bukitu avua nenku: Ishebale, muena Akmoni, mfumu wa tshisumbu tshia bilobu bisatu. Bavua bamubikila kabidi ne: Adino, muena Esni. Yeye ke uvua mushipe bantu nkama muanda mukulu musangu umue." 
2Samuel23:9 Kumulondabu kudi Elazare, muana wa Dodo, ne muikulu wa Akowa. Elazare uvua a bena mvita basatu bavua ne mukalenga Davide, pavuaye ufunyina bena Peleshete, bavua badisanga bua kuluangana mvita. Bena Izrayele bamane kunyema," 
2Samuel23:10 Elazare kujuka, kushipa bena Peleshete too ne pavua tshianza tshiende tshishikile, tshibengela amu ku tshilabi tshia muela. Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha bena Izrayele, kutshimunabu. Bena mvita bavua bapingana muaba uvua Elazare, anu bua kupawula bintu bia bantu bafue mu mvita." 
2Samuel23:11 Pashishe kudi Shama, muana wa Age, wa mu Arare. Pavua bena Peleshete badisangisha ku Leki, muaba uvua budimi bua nkunde, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kunyema bena Peleshete." 
2Samuel23:12 Kadi, Shama kuimana munkatshi mua budimi, kuipata bena Peleshete bavua mu budimi amu, kubatshimuna. Ke muwa Maweja-Nangila muambuluishe bena Izrayele, bua batshimune." 
2Samuel23:13 Dituku dikuabu, tshikondu tshia kunowa, bantu basatu ba mu “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu” kufika kudi Davide mu lubuebue lua Adulame, bualu bena mvita ba bena Peleshete bavua base mitanda mu tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime." 
2Samuel23:14 Davide uvua pa mukuna uvuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Bena mvita ba bena Peleshete bavua bamane kukuata tshimenga tshia Betleyeme. 
2Samuel23:15 Ke Davide kumvuaye nyota, kulomba ne: — Udi mua kumpesha mayi a kunua adi mu tshiina tshia mayi tshidi ku tshiibi tshia mu Betleyeme nnganyi?" 
2Samuel23:16 Nanku bena mvita basatu, kupita munkatshi mua mitanda ya bena Peleshete. Kusunabu mayi, mu tshiina atshi. Kuyabu nawu kudi mukalenga Davide. Kadi mukalenga Davide kubenga mua kunua mayi awu, kuitshikija panshi bua kualambula Maweja-Nangila," 
2Samuel23:17 wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, meme tshiena mua kunua mayi aa to! Bualu meme munue, ndi anu bu udi unua mashi a bantu bavua baye kusuna mayi, babuele mu njiwu ya lufu! Nanku Davide kena munue mayi awu to. Ke muvua bena mvita basatu abu baleje bukitu buabu." 
2Samuel23:18 Abishayi, muanabu ne Yowabe, ne mansebende wa Davide, uvua mfumu wa “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu.” Dituku dikuabu, kushipaye ne musongolu baluishi nkama isatu. Kupetaye lumu lunene mu “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu.”" 
2Samuel23:19 Uvua mumanyike bikole munkatshi muabu. Kushalaye mene mfumu wa bena tshisumbu atshi. Kadi kavua mupite “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita basatu to.” 
2Samuel23:20 Benaya, muena Kabseyele, muana wa Yoyada, ne muikulu wa muena mvita wa bukitu, uvua muenze malu manene a bungi. Benaya uvua mushipe ba Ariyele babidi ba bena Mowabe. Dituku dikuabu tshikondu tshia mvula wa neje, Benaya kupueka mu tshiina tshia mayi bua kushipa nyama wa ntambue." 
2Samuel23:21 Benaya kabidi uvua mushipe muena Ejipitu, muntu wa mukitshi, uvua ne musongolu. Benaya kumuluisha ne dikombu, kumunyenga musongolu wende ku bianza, kumushipa nawu." 
2Samuel23:22 Ke malu awa Benaya muenze. Kupetaye lumu lunene mu tshisumbu tshia bena mvita makumi asatu. 
2Samuel23:23 Benaya uvua mumanyike bikole munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bena mvita makumi asatu. Kadi, kavua mupite “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita basatu to.” Mukalenga Davide kumuteka mulombodi wa bena mvita bavua bamulame." 
2Samuel23:24 Mu “tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu” muvua kabidi Ashayele, muanabu ne Yowabe; Elanane, muana wa Dodo, wa mu musoku wa Betleyeme;" 
2Samuel23:25 Shama ne Elika, ba mu musoku wa Arode; 1" 
2Samuel23:26 Elese wa mu tshimenga tshia Pelete; Ira, muana wa Ikeshe, wa mu tshimenga tshia Tekowa;" 
2Samuel23:27 Abiyezere, wa mu tshimenga tshia Anatote, Mebunayi, wa mu tshimenga tshia Usha;" 
2Samuel23:28 Salmone, muena Alkowa, Marayi wa mu musoku wa Netofa;" 
2Samuel23:29 Elebe, muana wa Baana, wa mu Netofa; Itayi, muana wa Ribayi, wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngibeya mu buloba bua bena Binyamine;" 
2Samuel23:30 Benaya, wa mu tshimenga tshia Piratone; Idayi wa ku misulu ya mu Ngashe;" 
2Samuel23:31 Abiyalbone wa mu tshimenga tshia Betaraba; Azmavete, wa mu musoku wa Bakurime," 
2Samuel23:32 Eliyaba, wa mu tshimenga tshia Shalbone, umue wa ku bana ba balume ba Yashene. Yonatane," 
2Samuel23:33 Shama, ba mu Arare. Akiyame, muana wa Sharare, wa mu Arare;" 
2Samuel23:34 Elifelete, muana wa Akasbayi ne muikulu wa muntu wa Maaka; Eliyame, muana wa Akitofele, wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngilo;" 
2Samuel23:35 Esrayi, wa mu Karmele, Parayi, wa mu musoku wa Arabe;" 
2Samuel23:36 Igale, muana wa Natane, wa mu Soba; Bani, muena tshisamba tshia Ngade;" 
2Samuel23:37 Seleke, muena Amone, Narayi, wa mu Beyerote, uvua wambula bia mvita bia Yowabe, mansebende wa Davide;" 
2Samuel23:38 Ira ne Ngarebe bonsu babidi ba mu diku dia Yetere," 
2Samuel23:39 Uriya, muena Iti. Bonsu basanga bavua makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete." 
2Samuel24:1 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila kufikila kabidi bena Izrayele munda. Kuenzejaye Davide bualu buvua ne bua kukebela bantu makenga, bualu Davide uvua mupete meji a kubadika bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda." 
2Samuel24:2 Mukalenga Davide kuambila Yowabe, mfumu wa bena mvita bende bavua bamulame, ne: — Endakana mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, kuinshi kua ditunga too ne ku mutu, bua babadike bantu. Ndi musue kumanya bungi bua bantu." 
2Samuel24:3 Yowabe kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Mukalenga, meme ndi musue bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe avudije bena Izrayele misangu lukama. Ndi musue bua wikale ne muoyi, umone bionsu ebi. Kadi udi musue kuenza bualu bua mushindu ewu bua thinyi?" 
2Samuel24:4 Kadi bu muvua mukalenga Davide musuminyine bualu abu, Yowabe ne bamfumu balombodi ba bena mvita kuenza anu tshivua mukalenga muambe. Kumukabu ku nzubu kua mukalenga bua kuya kubadika bena Izrayele." 
2Samuel24:5 Basabuka Yardene, kutuadijabu ne tshimenga tshia Aroyere, ne tshimenga tshivua muinshi mu tshibandabanda. Kutungunukabu bapitshila mu bena Ngade bua kuya ku Yazere." 
2Samuel24:6 Kubuelabu mu buloba bua Ngilaade, baya mu ditunga dia bena Iti, mu Kadeshe, mu Daneyane, mu misoku ivua nabu mutumba, bua kufika ku Sidone." 
2Samuel24:7 Kutungunukabu mu tshimenga tshia Tigre tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, ne mu bimenga bionsu bivua bia bena Ivi, ne bena Kenaane, bua kufika ku Bersheba kuinshi mu ditunga, mu buloba bua bena Yuda." 
2Samuel24:8 Bobu bamane kuendakana ditunga dijima mu ngondu tshitema ne matuku makumi abidi, kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime." 
2Samuel24:9 Yowabe kuambila mukalenga Davide bungi bua bantu bonsu bavuabu babadike. Bena Izrayele bavua ne bena mvita 800.000 batshivua ne bukole bua kuluangana. Bena Yuda bavua ne bena mvita 500.000. 
2Samuel24:10 Diakamue Davide kudiunwua ne: ndi muenze bibi pandi mubadike bantu ba bena Izrayele. Kuambilaye Maweja-Nangila ne: — Pandi mubadike bena Izrayele, ndi muenze bibi bitambe. Ndi ntonda ne: ndi muenze bualu ebu amu bu muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi! Maweja-Nangila umfuileku luse bua bubi buanyi." 
2Samuel24:11 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Ngade, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide, ne: — Uye kudi Davide, umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi nkufundila manyoka asatu. Usungule diudi musue.” Butshia dinda, Davide ubika," 
2Samuel24:12  
2Samuel24:13 muambi Ngade kuya ku nzubu kua Davide, umuambila bionsu bivua Mvidi mukulu muambe. Pashishe muambi kukonka Davide ne: — Usungule dinyoka diudi musue. Udi musue ditunga diebe dishale ne tshiyole tshia nzala bidimu muanda mutekete anyi? Udi musue kunyema baluishi, bobu benda amu bakulondakaja, ngondu isatu, anyi? Udi musue tshipupu tshia disama tshikengesha bena ditunga diebe, matuku asatu? Ela meji bimpe, ungandamune tshindi mua kuya kuambila udi muntume." 
2Samuel24:14 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Ndi munkatshi mua dikenga dikole…Kadi, ndi musue kushala anu mu bianza bia Maweja-Nangila pa mutu pa kuikala mu bianza bia bantu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ne luse." 
2Samuel24:15 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kutumina bena Izrayele tshipupu tshia disama biangatshile dinda adi too matuku asatu. Mu ditunga adi dijima, bantu bavua bafue binunu makumi muanda mutekete." 
2Samuel24:16 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuolola tshianza mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime bua kutumamu tshipupu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubenga. Kuambilaye mutumibue uvua ubutula bantu ne: — Kuajiki, puekesha tshianza! Diba adi, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila uvua pabuipi ne muaba uvua Aravna, muena Yebusa, ushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
2Samuel24:17 Davide mumane kumona mutumibue uvua ubutula bena Izrayele, kuambilaye Maweja-Nangila ne: — Meme ndi muena tshibawu. Meme ndi muenze bibi. Kadi bantu aba kabena benza bualu bubi to. Nanku mbimpe unyoke meme, ne bena nzubu wanyi." 
2Samuel24:18 Anu dituku adi, muambi Ngade kuya kudi Davide, umuambila ne: — Uye muaba udi Aravna ushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula, washilapu Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu." 
2Samuel24:19 Davide kuya muaba awu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumutumine diyi kudi muambi Ngade." 
2Samuel24:20 Pavua Aravna kulu aku, kumonaye mukalenga Davide ulua kudiye ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, kusemenaye kudibu, kutua mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide," 
2Samuel24:21 umukonka ne: — Mukalenga udi mufike ku nzubu kuanyi bua tshinyi? Davide kuandamuna ne: — Ndi musue kusumba muaba ewu. Ndi musue kuashilapu Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu bua kujikija tshipupu tshia disama didi dikengesha bena Izrayele. 
2Samuel24:22 Aravna kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, angata bintu bionsu biudi musue, ulambule Mvidi Mukulu mulambu. Angata yanyi ngombe ya mulambu, nyoyi eyi. Wangate kabidi matempu ne bintu bia kushipula nabi bua wewe kutemesha nabi kapia." 
2Samuel24:23 Ndi nkupesha bintu bionsu ebi. Nanku mukalenga, ndi mutekemene ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe neakufuile luse, neanyishe mulambu webe." 
2Samuel24:24 Kadi mukalenga Davide kumuambila ne: — Kumpeshi tshianana to. Ndi musue kubisumba. Ndi nkufuta. Tshiena musue kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi milambu idibu bampesha tshianana to! Davide kumufuta nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole makumi atanu bua kusumba muaba wa tshishipuidi tshia ntete ya kuenza bukula, ne ngombe." 
2Samuel24:25 Davide kuasa tshilambuilu muaba awu. Kulambulaye Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kufuila bena ditunga luse. Tshipupu tshia disama tshivua tshibakengesha kujikatshi." 
1Kings1:1 Mukalenga Davide ukavua mumane kukola mukulakaje. Pavuabu bamubuikila bilamba, katshivua umvua luya pambidi to." 
1Kings1:2 Nanku bena mudimu bende kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, netuye kukukebela nsongakaji udi mua kukuenzela mudimu, kabidi udi mua kukulama. Nealale pamue nebe, bua wewe kumvua luya." 
1Kings1:3 Bena mudimu kukeba mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, nsongakaji muimpe." 
1Kings1:4 Kupetabu nsongakaji muimpe mutambe wa mu musoku wa Shuneme, dina diende Abishayi. Bena mudimu kuya nende kudi mukalenga Davide. Nsongakaji kutuadija kuenzela mukalenga Davide mudimu, umulama. Kadi mukalenga Davide kavua usangila nende to." 
1Kings1:5 Tshikondu atshi Adoniya, muana uvua Davide mulele ne mukajende Agite, uvua nsongalume muimpe mutambe. Adoniya kuakula bu mupinganyi wa mukalenga, wamba ne: “Meme nengikale mukalenga!” Bualu katshia Absalome wafua, Adoniya uvua mushale muanabute wa Davide. Uvua mumane kusumba matempu a mvita ne tubalu. Uvua kabidi ne bena mvita makumi atanu, bavua banyema lubilu kumpala kua matempu ende a mvita." 
1Kings1:6 Kadi tatuende Davide kavua umutandisha bua bionsu abi to. Kawa nansha ukonka Adoniya tshivuaye wenzela bionsu abi to. 
1Kings1:7 Adoniya kutuadija kumyuangana ne Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, mfumu wa bena mvita. Kumvuanganaye kabidi ne mutuangaji Abiyatare. Bonsu babidi kuditua ku tshiende." 
1Kings1:8 Kadi mutuangaji Sadoke, ne Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, nansha muambi Natane, ne Shimeyi, Reyi, kabidi ne bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga Davide, kabavua baditua ku tshia Adoniya to." 
1Kings1:9 Dituku dikuabu, Adoniya kulongolola tshibilu tshinene ku “Dibue-dia-busenu,” divua pabuipi ne mpokolu wa Enrojele. Muaba awu, kulambulabu mikoku, ngombe milume, ne nyama mikuabu ya manyi. Adoniya uvua mubikidishe bana babu, bana ba mukalenga Davide, ku tshibilu atshi. Uvua mubikidishe kabidi bantu babanji bonsu ba mu buloba bua bena Yuda, bavua benzela mukalenga Davide mudimu." 
1Kings1:10 Kadi kavua mubikile muambi Natane, nansha Benaya, nansha muanabu Shelomu ne bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga Davide." 
1Kings1:11 Nanku, muambi Natane kuya kudi Batsheba, mamuende wa Shelomu umuambila ne: — Bushuwa ukadi mumane kumvua ne: Adoniya, muana wa Agite, mmuditeke mu bukalenga. Kadi mukalenga Davide kena mumanye bualu ebu." 
1Kings1:12 Nanku, ndi musue kukupa lungenyi. Wewe muenze tshindi nkuambila, neushale ne muoyi, ne muanebe Shelomu neashale ne muoyi." 
1Kings1:13 Uye kudi mukalenga Davide, umuambile ne: “Mukalenga, uvua mumane kundaya ne: muananyi Shelomu neakupingane mu bukalenga. Neasombe mu nkuasa webe wa bumfumu. Kadi, Adoniya ukadi mukalenga bua tshinyi?”" 
1Kings1:14 Muambi Natane kuambila Batsheba kabidi ne: — Pawikala mumane kuambila mukalenga bionsu abi, meme kabidi nemfike bua kumujadikila bionsu biwikala mumuambila." 
1Kings1:15 Ke Batsheba kuya kua Davide, uvua anu mu nzubu muende, bualu uvua mumane kukulakaja bikole. Abishayi, muena Shuneme, uvua mu nzubu amu, umuenzela mudimu, umuambuluisha." 
1Kings1:16 Batsheba kutua binu, kuinyika mpala panshi bikole menemene kumpala kua mukalenga Davide. Mukalenga kumukonka ne: — Tshiudi ujinga ntshinyi?" 
1Kings1:17 Batsheba kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, uvua mundaya kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ne: muananyi Shelomu neakupingane mu bukalenga. Neasombe mu nkuasa webe wa bumfumu." 
1Kings1:18 Kadi mpindiewu, ndi mumvue ne: Adoniya mmumane kuikala mukalenga, wewe kuyi mumanye." 
1Kings1:19 Kabidi, Adoniya mmulongolole tshibilu tshinene. Mu tshibilu atshi, mmulambule ngombe milume, nyama mikuabu ya manyi, ne mikoku ya bungi. Uvua mubikilemu bana bebe ba balume bonsu, mutuangaji Abiyatare, ne Yowabe, mfumu wa bena mvita. Kadi kavua mubikile muanebe Shelomu to." 
1Kings1:20 Mukalenga wanyi, mpindiewu bena Izrayele bonsu mbindile ne muoyi mujima bua wewe kubambila patoke dina dia muntu udi ukupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings1:21 Wewe kuyi muenze nanku, pawikala mumane kufua, meme Batsheba ne muananyi Shelomu nebatukengeshe bu bena tshibawu." 
1Kings1:22 Anu Batsheba ujikija kuakula ne mukalenga Davide, muambi Natane kufika ku nzubu wa bukalenga." 
1Kings1:23 Kumanyishabu mukalenga difika dia Natane. Ke Natane kubuela, kuinyika mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide." 
1Kings1:24 Natane kuambila mukalenga Davide ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, wewe ke udi muambe bua Adoniya kukupingana mu bukalenga, kusomba mu nkuasa webe wa bumfumu anyi?" 
1Kings1:25 Bualu lelu, Adoniya mmupueke ku “Dibue-dia-busenu,” mmulongolole tshibilu tshinene. Mu tshibilu atshi, mmulambule ngombe ya bungi, nyama mikuabu ya manyi, ne mikoku. Uvua mubikilemu bana bebe ba balume. Uvua mubikile kabidi bamfumu balombodi ba bena mvita, ne mutuangaji Abiyatare. Bantu bonsu aba, badi badia, banuane Adoniya diba ditudi edi, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Adoniya akuate ku mundundu!”" 
1Kings1:26 Kadi kena mubikile mutuangaji Sadoke, nansha Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, nansha muanebe Shelomu, nansha meme mene Natane." 
1Kings1:27 Nanku mukalenga wanyi, wewe mumane kusungula muntu udi mua kukupingana, kadi kuena mutumanyishe tuetu bena mudimu bebe badi bakuitaba ne muoyi umue bua tshinyi?" 
1Kings1:28 Ke mukalenga Davide kutuma diyi ne: — Numbikidile Batsheba! Padi Batsheba upingana tshiakabidi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide," 
1Kings1:29 mukalenga kumuambila uditshipa ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, uvua mungambuluishe misangu yonsu imvua munkatshi mua makenga makole," 
1Kings1:30 ndi nditshipa ne: ndi nkumbaja lelu mene bionsu bimvua mumane kukulaya kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Mvua mukulaye ne: “Muanebe Shelomu neampingane mu bukalenga, neasombe mu nkuasa wanyi wa bumfumu.”" 
1Kings1:31 Ke Batsheba kutua binu, kuinyika mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Davide, wamba ne: — Mukalenga wanyi Davide akuate ku mundundu kashidi!" 
1Kings1:32 Ke Davide kubikidisha mutuangaji Sadoke, muambi Natane, ne Benaya, muana wa Yoyada. Bobu bamane kufika kumpala kua mukalenga Davide," 
1Kings1:33 kubatuminaye diyi ne: — Nubikile bena mvita bonsu batshidi bangitaba. Nubandishe muananyi Shelomu pa nyama wa mpunde wa bukalenga. Nuye nende ku mpokolu wa ku Ngikone. 
1Kings1:34 Muaba awu, mutuangaji Sadoke, ne muambi Natane, nebamuele mafuta pa mutu bua kumujidila, bua ashale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Pashishe, nuele mpungi, nuele mbila, nuamba ne: “Mukalenga Shelomu akuate ku mundundu.”" 
1Kings1:35 Pashishe nubande, nupingane ku tshimenga, nulonde Shelomu. Shelomu alue kusomba mu nkuasa wanyi wa bukalenga bua kumpinganamu. Bualu Shelomu ke undi musungule bua kuikala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda." 
1Kings1:36 Benaya kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe mukalenga wanyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe udi muakuile mukana muebe." 
1Kings1:37 Alame Shelomu bu nuwuaye mukulame wewe. Atumbishe bukalenga bua Shelomu, buikale ne lumu bupite buebe wewe Davide!" 
1Kings1:38 Mutuangaji Sadoke, muambi Natane, Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, bena Kreti ne bena Peleti bavua balame mukalenga Davide, kuya kudi Shelomu. Kumubandishabu pa nyama wa mpunde wa mukalenga Davide wa bukalenga, kuya nende ku mpokolu wa ku Ngikone." 
1Kings1:39 Mutuangaji Sadoke uvua muangate lusengu, luvua mu ntenta wa Maweja-Nangila, luikala ne mafuta a tshijila tente. Kuelaye mafuta awu pa mutu pa Shelomu, bua kumujidila mu bukalenga. Pashishe, kuelabu mpungi. Bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu kuela mbila ne: “Mukalenga Shelomu akuate ku mundundu!”" 
1Kings1:40 Nanku bantu bonsu kupingana mu tshimenga, benda balonda Shelomu panyima. Bantu bavua benda, bela nshiba bua kuleja ne: bavua ne disanka dinene. Bibingu biabu bivua bikeba kunyungisha buloba." 
1Kings1:41 Adoniya, ne bantu bonsu bavuaye mubikile, bamane kujikija kudia, kumvuabu mitoyi. Yowabe mumane kumvua muadi wa mpungi, kukonkaye ne: — Awu mutoyi mukole udi mu tshimenga ngua tshinyi?" 
1Kings1:42 Anu Yowabe ukonka nanku, Yonatane, muana wa mutuangaji Abiyatare, kufika. Adoniya kuambila Yonatane ne: — Buelaku, bualu udi muntu wa bushuwa, kabidi udi mufike ne malu a disanka." 
1Kings1:43 Yonatane kuandamuna ne: — Eyi nansha! Ndi mufike bua kunumanyisha ne: mukalenga Davide mmumane kusungula Shelomu bua amupingane mu bukalenga. 
1Kings1:44 Davide mmutume diyi kudi mutuangaji Sadoke, kudi muambi Natane, kudi Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, ne kudi bena Kreti ne bena Peleti badi bamulame, bua baye ne Shelomu. Bantu abu, bavua babandishe Shelomu pa nyama wa mpunde wa bukalenga." 
1Kings1:45 Pashishe, mutuangaji Sadoke, ne muambi Natane, kujidila Shelomu mu bukalenga pabuipi ne mpokolu wa Ngikone. Bantu bonsu mbumuke muaba awu, benda babanda mu tshimenga ne disanka. Bena mu tshimenga bonsu badi batua tshianga. Ke bibingu bionsu binudi bumvue abi." 
1Kings1:46 Shelomu mmumane kusomba mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. 
1Kings1:47 Balombodi ba bukalenga, mbafike kudi mukalenga Davide, bamuela tuasakidila bamuamba ne: “Tudi tujinga bua Mvidi Mukulu webe atumbishe bikole Shelomu. Ikale ne lumu lupite luebe wewe Davide. Mvidi Mukulu atumbishe kabidi bukalenga bua Shelomu buikale ne lumu, bupite buebe wewe Davide.” Nanku, pavua mukalenga Davide mu bulalu buende, kuinyikaye mutu panshi bikole,"
