1Kings1:48 utendelela wamba ne: “Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele tuasakidila. Yeye ke udi mumpeshe lelu muntu udi mua kumpingana mu bukalenga. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila ke udi mungambuluishe bua meme kumona bionsu ebi.” 
1Kings1:49 Bantu bavua Adoniya mubikile ku-mvua bowa bua meyi onsu awu. Kujukabu kutangalaka, muntu yonsu kuya luende luseke." 
1Kings1:50 Adoniya kuzakala bikole, utshina Shelomu. Kunyemenaye pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, kukuataye ku nsengu yatshi." 
1Kings1:51 Muntu mukuabu kuya kumanyisha Shelomu ne: — Adoniya udi ukutshina bikole. Mmunyeme muye pabuipi ne tshilambuilu. Padiye muaba awu, udi wamba ne: “Bua meme kumuka muaba ewu, anu pikala mukalenga Shelomu munjadikile, mundaye ne: tshiena nkushipa to.”" 
1Kings1:52 Shelomu kuandamuna ne: — Pikala Adoniya wenza malu mimpe, tshiena mua kumuenzela bibi to. Kadi pikalaye ne meji mabi, neafue!" 
1Kings1:53 Mukalenga Shelomu kutuma muntu bua kukeba Adoniya, uvua pabuipi ne tshilambuilu. Kumukabu nende muaba awu, kuyaye kutua mpala panshi kumpala kua mukalenga Shelomu. Ke mukalenga Shelomu kumuambila ne: — Udi mua kupingana ku nzubu kuebe!" 
1Kings2:1 Mukalenga Davide umvua ne: nkadi pa kufua, kubelaye muanende Shelomu, umuambila ne:" 
1Kings2:2 — Meme nkadi pa kufua. Nanku ukoleshe muoyi, wenze malu bu muntu mukulumpe." 
1Kings2:3 Witabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Matuku onsu wenze amu tshidiye musue. Utumikile meyi ende ne mikenji yende. Ukumbaje bionsu bidiye wamba, ne bidiye ulongesha. Ukumbaje bionsu bidibu bafunde mu mikenji ya Moshe. Nanku, newikale muena diakalenga mu bionsu biudi wenza." 
1Kings2:4 Maweja-Nangila neakumbaje bionsu bivuaye mumane kundaya, mungambile ne: “Pikala ndelanganyi yebe mingitabe, mienze mundi musue, nendamate mu bulelela, kabidi ne muoyi mujima, nansha wewe mumane kufua, misangu yonsu muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neashale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele.”" 
1Kings2:5 “Pashishe, uvuluke malu mabi onsu avua Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, mungenzele. Uvua mushipe Abnere, muana wa Nere, mushipe kabidi Amasha, muana wa Yetere, bamfumu babidi balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Izrayele. Bu muvua Yowabe mushipe bantu aba mu tshikondu tshia ditalala, kabiyi mu matuku a mvita, udi muena tshibawu menemene. Udi ne mashi a bantu aba pambidi, bualu mmushipe dilaya diabu dia bena mvita." 
1Kings2:6 Nanku udimuke. Kuanyishi bua Yowabe akulakaje mu ditalala to. Umushipe. 
1Kings2:7 Uvuluke bana ba Barzilayi, wa mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Bavua bangambuluisha dituku dimvua nnyema muanenu Absalome. Ubalame bimpe, bikale badia ku mesa ebe matuku onsu." 
1Kings2:8 Uvuluke Shimeyi, muana wa Ngera, wa mu musoku wa Bakurime, udi mu buloba bua bena Binyamine. Uvua muntshipe bikole bitambe, dituku dimvua nnyema bua kuya ku Makanayime. Kadi, pamvua mpingana mu Yerushalayime, kupuekaye ku Yardene bua kungakidila. Nanku, mvua mumulaye kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila ne: tshiakukushipesha nansha." 
1Kings2:9 Kadi, mpindiewu wewe udi ne lungenyi, kuedi meji ne: Shimeyi kena ne bualu to. Udi mumanye tshiudi mua kumuenzela. Nansha mudiye mumane kukulakaja, uvuluke bua kumushipabu.”" 
1Kings2:10 Mukalenga Davide kufua. Kumujiikabu mu tshimenga tshiende, mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings2:11 Davide uvua mushale mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu makumi anayi, mmumue ne: bidimu muanda mutekete ku Ebrone, bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings2:12 Muanende Shelomu kumupingana mu bukalenga biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bumfumu bua Shelomu kushindama." 
1Kings2:13 Dituku dikuabu, Adoniya, muana uvua Davide mulele ne mukajende Agite, kuya kudi Batsheba, mamuende wa Shelomu. Batsheba kukonka Adoniya ne: — Udi mufike ne muoyi wa kungenzela bimpe anyi? Adoniya kuitaba ne: — Eyowa." 
1Kings2:14 Kadi ndi ne bualu bua kukuambila. Batsheba kumuambila ne: — Ambaku. 
1Kings2:15 Adoniya kumuambila ne: — Udi mumanye ne: meme mvua ne bua kuangata bukalenga ebu. Kabidi bena Izrayele bonsu bavua batekemena bua meme kuikala mukalenga. Kadi bualu kuenzeka mushindu mukuabu. Muanetu Shelomu kushala mu bukalenga pa muaba wanyi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua musue bua bienzeke nanku. 
1Kings2:16 Mpindiewu, ndi nkulomba anu tshintu tshimue, kubengi to. Batsheba kuandamuna ne: — Amba." 
1Kings2:17 Adoniya kumuambila kabidi ne: — Ndi nkusengelela ne: undombelaku kudi mukalenga Shelomu, Ampeshe Abishayi, muena Shuneme, bua ikale mukajanyi. Bulelela, wewe mundombele nanku, kena mua kubenga diyi diebe to." 
1Kings2:18 Batsheba kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe! Nenye kuyukila ne mukalenga Shelomu bualu buebe." 
1Kings2:19 Ke Batsheba kuya kudi mukalenga Shelomu bua kumuambila bualu bua Adoniya. Mukalenga Shelomu kujuka mu nkuasa wa bukalenga, kusemena kudi mamuende Batsheba, kuinyika mutu bikole. Pashishe kusombaye tshiakabidi mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Shelomu kulombesha nkuasa wa bukalenga mukuabu. Kumutekabu ku dia balume diende. Mamuende Batsheba kusomba mu nkuasa amu." 
1Kings2:20 Batsheba kuambila Shelomu ne: — Ndi nkulomba tshintu tshikese, kubengi to. Mukalenga Shelomu kumuambila ne: — Mamu wanyi, lombaku, tshiena mua kubenga to." 
1Kings2:21 Batsheba kumuambila ne: — Mbimpe. Nanku kabena mua kufila Abishayi, muena Shuneme, kudi muanenu Adoniya bua ikale mukajende anyi?" 
1Kings2:22 Shelomu kukonka mamuende ne: — Akia! Ke wewe udi ukimina kulombela Adoniya bua angate Abishayi, muena Shuneme! Nanku, umulombele kabidi ne bukalenga, bualu mmukuluanyi! Eyowa, umulombele bukalenga. Bantu badi baditua ku tshiende, mutuangaji Abiyatare ne Yowabe, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita, nebasanke bikole!" 
1Kings2:23 Ke Shelomu kuditshipa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila neannyoke ne dinyoka dikole, pangikala tshiyi mushipeshe Adoniya, bua dikamakama didiye nadi dia kulomba bualu bua mushindu ewu!" 
1Kings2:24 Maweja-Nangila uvua munjadike mu nkuasa wa bukalenga wa tatu wanyi Davide, mmundaye bukalenga meme ne ndelanganyi yanyi. Bu mudiye ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: Adoniya udi ufua anu lelu!" 
1Kings2:25 Nanku Shelomu kutuma Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, bua kushipa Adoniya. Ke muvua Adoniya mufue nanku." 
1Kings2:26 Pashishe, mukalenga Shelomu kuambila mutuangaji Abiyatare ne: — Umuka munemu, uye ku Anatote, muaba udi madimi ebe, bualu udi mukumbanyine lufu. Kadi tshiena nkushipesha lelu to, bualu patshivua tatu wanyi Davide ne muoyi, uvua muambule mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi uvua muambuluishe tatu wanyi mu makenga onsu avuaye nawu." 
1Kings2:27 Nanku Shelomu kukandika Abiyatare midimu ya butuangaji ivuaye wenzela Maweja-Nangila. Ke muvua bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba ku Silo, muaba wa tshijila, bua kunyoka bena nzubu wa mutuangaji munene Eli, bikumbana." 
1Kings2:28 Yowabe mumane kumvua bionsu bivua bienzekela Adoniya ne Abiyatare, kunyemaye. Kuyaye kusokoma mu ntenta wa Maweja-Nangila, pabuipi ne tshilambuilu. Bangabanga, Yowabe kavua muditue ku tshia Absalome nansha. Kadi mpindiewu kumvuanganaye ne Adoniya." 
1Kings2:29 Muntu mukuabu kufika kudi mukalenga Shelomu, umuambila ne: — Yowabe mmunyeme. Udi mu ntenta wa Maweja-Nangila, mmusokomene pabuipi ne tshilambuilu. Nanku Shelomu kutuma Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, mu ntenta amu, umuambila ne: — Uye kushipa Yowabe!" 
1Kings2:30 Benaya ufika mu ntenta, kuambilaye Yowabe ne: — Mukalenga Shelomu udi wamba ne: umuka muaba ewu. Yowabe kubenga ne: — Tshiena ngumuka to. Ndi musue kufuila amu muaba ewu. Benaya kuya ku nzubu kua mukalenga Shelomu, kumuambila bionsu bivua Yowabe muambe." 
1Kings2:31 Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Mbimpe bitambe! Umushipele muaba awu, bu mudiye muambe amu. Pashishe umujike. Nanku bena nzubu wa tatu wanyi Davide ne meme, katuakuikala kabidi ne tshilumbu, bua kusombuela bantu babidi bavua Yowabe mushipe kabayi bualu." 
1Kings2:32 Bualu Abnere, muana wa Nere, mfumu wa bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, ne Amasha, muana wa Yetere, mfumu wa bena mvita ba bena Yuda, bavua bantu ba nsongu bapite Yowabe. Kadi Yowabe uvua mubashipe, tatu wanyi Davide kayi mumanye. Nanku Maweja-Nangila nkayende neasombuele Yowabe bua bantu aba bavuaye mushipe!" 
1Kings2:33 Eyowa, Yowabe ne ndelanganyi yende nebashale bena tshibawu kashidi bua bualu ebu. Kadi mukalenga Davide ne ndelanganyi yende, bena nzubu wende bonsu badi bamupingana mu bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila neabape disanka dia kashidi." 
1Kings2:34 Nanku Benaya kupingana kudi Yowabe, kumushipa. Kumujiikabu mu budimi buende munkatshi mua mpata." 
1Kings2:35 Mukalenga Shelomu kupingaja Benaya muaba wa Yowabe, bua ikale mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita. Kupingajaye kabidi Sadoke, muaba wa Abiyatare bua ikale mutuangaji muaba wa tshijila." 
1Kings2:36 Shelomu kubikidisha Shimeyi, umuambila ne: — Asa nzubu webe mu Yerushalayime. Ndi musue bua usombe amu ku nzubu aku. Ndi nkukandika bua kupatuki mu tshimenga to." 
1Kings2:37 Ndi nkujadikila patoke ne: wewe mupatuke mu tshimenga, musabuke musulu wa Sedrone, neufue dituku adi. Nanku wewe mupatuke, udi mudikebele lufu nkayebe." 
1Kings2:38 Shimeyi kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga wanyi, mbimpe bitambe! Nengenze bionsu biudi muambe. Shimeyi kusomba mu Yerushalayime matuku a bungi." 
1Kings2:39 Kadi bidimu bimane kupita bu bisatu, bapika ba Shimeyi kunyema, kuya ku nzubu kua Akishe, muana wa Maka, uvua mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Ngate. Shimeyi mumane kumvua lumu ne: bapika banyi badi ku nzubu kua Akishe," 
1Kings2:40 kusuikaye biseba pa nyama wende wa mpunde, kuya ku Ngate, bua kulomba bapika bende kudi mukalenga Akishe. Kupinganaye nabu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings2:41 Kumanyishabu mukalenga Shelomu ne: Shimeyi uvua muye ku Ngate, kadi ukadi mupingane mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings2:42 Ke mukalenga Shelomu kubikidisha Shimeyi, umuambila ne: — Mvua mukutshipishe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila bua kupatuki mu Yerushalayime to. Mvua mukuambile ne: wewe mupatuke mu tshimenga bua kuya muaba mukuabu, neufue. Uvua mungandamune ne: Mbimpe bitambe! Ndi mumvua!" 
1Kings2:43 Kadi kuena munemeke mitshipu iuvua muditshipe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bua tshinyi? Udi mubenge tshimvua mukuambile bua tshinyi?" 
1Kings2:44 Udi muvuluke malu mabi onsu auvua muenzele tatu wanyi Davide anyi? Udi anu mumanye bionsu abi. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila neakusombuele nkayende bua buenzayi buebe." 
1Kings2:45 Kadi Maweja-Nangila neangele lupemba. Neajadike bukalenga mu nzubu wa Davide kashidi. 
1Kings2:46 Ke mukalenga Shelomu kutuma diyi, Benaya muana wa Yoyada kupatuka ne Shimeyi mu nzubu wa bukalenga, kumushipa. Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bukalenga bua Shelomu kushindama bikole." 
1Kings3:1 Mukalenga Shelomu kusela muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Nanku, Shelomu ne mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kutua ndondu bua mukaji uvua Shelomu musele awu. Shelomu kuya ne mukajende awu mu Yerushalayime mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Uvua muindile bua bajikije nzubu wende wa bukalenga, nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ne bimana bidi binyungulula Yerushalayime." 
1Kings3:2 Tshikondu atshi, bantu bavua balambuila milambu miaba ya tshijila ivua mu ditunga amu. Bualu kabavua banji kuasa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila to." 
1Kings3:3 Shelomu kuleja nuwuaye munange Maweja-Nangila, kukumbajaye bionsu bivua tatuende Davide mumuambile. Nansha Shelomu mene, uvua ulambuila milambu ya nyama, ne ya manananshi, miaba ya tshijila mikuabu ayi." 
1Kings3:4 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga Shelomu kuya ku Ngibone bua kulambula milambu, bualu Ngibone uvua muaba wa tshjila mupita kumanyika ku yonsu. Shelomu uvua mumane kulambula milambu ya kuosha mipite bungi, nkama ne nkama pa tshilambuilu tshivua muaba awu." 
1Kings3:5 Patshivua Shelomu ku Ngibone, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kumumuenekela butuku mu tshilota, umukonka ne: — Udi musue nkupeshe tshinyi? Lomba tshintu tshiudi musue bua meme kukupa!" 
1Kings3:6 Shelomu kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila uvua muenzele tatu wanyi Davide, muntu webe malu mimpe a bungi, bualu Davide uvua mukuitabe muende muonsu, mukuenzele mudimu ne muoyi umue. Udi muenzele Davide bimpe, nansha kunyima kua lufu luende, bualu udi mumupe muana wa balume, udi mua kumupingana mu bukalenga. Ke mudibi bimueneka lelu." 
1Kings3:7 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe ke udi mumpe bukalenga bua kupingana tatu wanyi Davide. Kadi, meme ntshidi amu nsongalume. Tshiena mumanye mua kulombola bantu to." 
1Kings3:8 Mpindiewu nkaadi mulombodi wa bena Izrayele bauvua musungule. Bena Izrayele mbapite bungi, kabayi mua kubala to." 
1Kings3:9 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila, anyisha umpeshe lungenyi lukumbane bua meme kulombola bantu bebe, ne bua kumanya malu mimpe andi mua kubenzela, ne mabi andi ne bua kulekela. Kuyi muenze nanku, kakuena muntu udi mua kulombola bantu bebe bungi nunku to." 
1Kings3:10 Dilomba dia Shelomu adi kusankisha Maweja-Nangila. 
1Kings3:11 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna mukalenga Shelomu ne: — Kuena mulombe bua wewe kuikala ne muoyi matuku a bungi. Kuena mulombe bua wewe kuikala mubanji, nansha bua baluishi bebe bafue bonsu. Kadi udi ulomba anu lungenyi, bua wewe kulombola bantu banyi bimpe, kabidi ne meji." 
1Kings3:12 Nanku, bilondeshile tshiudi mulombe, ndi nkupa lungenyi ne meji. Newikale ne lungenyi lua bungi, lupite lua bantu bonsu bavua kumpala kuebe nansha bakulonda panyima." 
1Kings3:13 Ndi musue kukupa kabidi bubanji ne butumbi, biudi kuyi mulombe to. Matuku onsu autshidi ne muoyi, newikale ne butumbi, mupite bakalenga bonsu." 
1Kings3:14 Wewe muenze malu andi musue, mutumikile meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi, bu muvua tatuebe wenza, neushale ne muoyi matuku a bungi." 
1Kings3:15 Shelomu ubika ku tulu, kumanyaye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmuyukile nanyi mu tshilota. Kupinganaye ku Yerushalayime, kuimanaye kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, kumpala kua mushete wa ndondu. Shelomu kulambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bobumue. Pashishe kulambishilaye balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bonsu biakudia bia disanka." 
1Kings3:16 Dituku dikuabu, bakaji bena tshiendenda babidi kuya kuimana kumpala kua mukalenga Shelomu." 
1Kings3:17 Mukaji wa kumpala kuambila Shelomu ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, ndi nkusengelela, unteleje. Meme ne mukaji ewu, tudi mu nzubu umue. Patuvua nende mu nzubu amu, meme kulela muana wa balume." 
1Kings3:18 Kupita matuku abidi, kulelaye wende muana wa balume. Tudi anu babidi mu nzubu amu. Kamuena muntu mukuabu nansha." 
1Kings3:19 Kadi butuku bua lelu, muana wa mukaji ewu wafu, bualu mamuende uvua mumueyemina." 
1Kings3:20 Nanku, mukaji ewu kujuka munkatshi mua butuku, meme mulale. Kuambulaye muananyi uvua mulale ku luseke luanyi, kuyaye kumuladika mu bulalu buende. Pashishe muanende uvua mufue, kumuladikaye ku luseke luanyi." 
1Kings3:21 Mu dinda emu, pandi njuka bua kuamusha muananyi, ndi nsangana muana mufue. Meme kukenketa muana bikole, kumona ne: ki mmuananyi to…" 
1Kings3:22 Kadi mukaji mukuabu awu kubenga, wamba ne: — Udi ushima! Muananyi udi ne muoyi, muanebe ke udi mufue! Kadi mukaji wa kumpala kuamba ne: — Nansha! Muana udi mufue ngwebe: wanyi ke udi ne muoyi! Ke muvua bakaji abu batandangana kumpala kua Shelomu nanku." 
1Kings3:23 Mukalenga Shelomu kubambila ne: — Bu mudi ewu wamba ne: “Muana udi ne muoyi ke wanyi, udi mufue ngwebe!” Mukuabu ubenga ne: “Nansha, muana udi mufue ngwebe, wanyi udi ne muoyi!”" 
1Kings3:24 Nanku, telejayi tshindi ngamba: “Mpeshayi muele.” Anu bafika ne muela," 
1Kings3:25 mukalenga Shelomu kuamba ne: — Nukose muana udi ne muoyi bitupa bibidi, nupeshe mukaji yonsu tshiende tshitupa." 
1Kings3:26 Kadi mamu muena muana uvua ne muoyi, bu muvuaye munange muanende bikole, kuambaye ne: — Mukalenga wanyi, ndi nkusengelela, kushipi muana. Mupesha nansha mukaji ewu! Kadi mukaji mukuabu kuamba ne: — To! Nukose muana bitupa bibidi, bua tumubule bonsu babidi." 
1Kings3:27 Nanku, mukalenga Shelomu kuamba ne: — Kanushipi muana to. Numufile kudi mukaji wa kumpala, bualu yeye ke mamuende!" 
1Kings3:28 Bena Izrayele bonsu kumvua muvua mukalenga Shelomu mukose nsambu ayi. Kunemekabu mukalenga Shelomu bikole. Bualu bavua bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mumupe meji a kulumbuluisha nawu bantu. 
1Kings4:1 Shelomu uvua mukalenga wa bisamba bia bena Izrayele. 
1Kings4:2 Mena a bamfumu balombodi ba midimu ya mukalenga Shelomu adi nunku: Azariya, muana wa mutuangaji Sadoke;" 
1Kings4:3 Elikorefe ne Akiya, bana ba Shisha, bafundi; Yosafate, muana wa Akilude, ke uvua mukalenga utuma ne mikenji;" 
1Kings4:4 Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, uvua mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita. Sadoke ne Abiyatare, batuangaji." 
1Kings4:5 Azariya, muana wa Natane, uvua mfumu wa balombodi ba mu bukalenga; Zabude, muana wa Natane, uvua mutuangaji, kabidi mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Shelomu." 
1Kings4:6 Akishare, uvua mfumu wa bena mudimu ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga; Adonirame, muana wa Abda, uvua mulombodi wa midimu ya kulongolola ditunga." 
1Kings4:7 Mukalenga Shelomu uvua kabidi ne balombodi dikumi ne babidi, bavua basombe miaba mishilangane mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, bua bikale batuma biakudia bia mukalenga, ne bia bantu bonsu bavuaye nabu ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Nanku, mfumu mulombodi yonsu, uvua utuma biakudia ngondu mujima ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
1Kings4:8 Mena a bamfumu balombodi abu adi nunku: muana wa Ure, uvua mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime;" 
1Kings4:9 Muana wa Dekere, uvua mu buloba bua Makase, Shalbime, Beteshemeshe ne Elone-Betanane;" 
1Kings4:10 muana wa Eshede, uvua mu tshimenga tshia Arubote, ulombola buloba bua Soko, ne ditunga dijima dia Efere;" 
1Kings4:11 muana wa Abinadabe, uvua ulombola buloba bujima bua tukuna tua Dore (uvua musele Tafate, muana wa mukalenga Shelomu);" 
1Kings4:12 Baana, muana wa Akilude, uvua ulombola buloba bua bimenga bia Tanake ne Megido, ne buloba bujima bua Betesheyane (Buloba bua Betesheyane budi bufika ku Sartane, kuinshi kua Yizreyele. Buloba ebu mbualabale ku Betesheyane too ne ku Abele-Mekola, too ne dishiya dia Yokneyame)." 
1Kings4:13 Muana wa Ngebere, ku Ramote, mu Ngilaade, uvua ulombola buloba bua misoku ya Yayire, muana wa Menashe, mu Ngilaade, ne buloba bua Argobe mu mpata ya Bashane. Buloba ebu bujima, buvua ne bimenga makumi asambombu, bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana, kabidi ne biibi bivuabu bakanga ne mulonda wa tshiamu tshikunze." 
1Kings4:14 Akinadabe, muana wa Ido, uvua ulombola buloba bua Makanayime." 
1Kings4:15 Akimase, uvua ulombola buloba bua bena Naftali (Yeye kabidi uvua musele muana wa mukalenga Shelomu, diende Basmate)." 
1Kings4:16 Baana, muana wa Ushayi, uvua ulombola buloba bua bena Ashera, ne bua Beyalote." 
1Kings4:17 Yosafate, muana wa Paruwa, uvua ulombola buloba bua bena Isakare." 
1Kings4:18 Shimeyi, muana wa Ela, uvua ulombola buloba bua bena Binyamine." 
1Kings4:19 Ngebere, muana wa Uri, uvua ulombola ditunga dia Ngilaade, ditunga dia Sihone, mukalenga wa bena Amone, ne dia Oje, mukalenga wa Bashane. Ku bamfumu balombodi ba mu bukalenga aba dikumi ne babidi, bavua basakidilaku kabidi mfumu mukuabu, bua kulombolaye ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
1Kings4:20 Bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda bavua bungi bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene, ludi muntu kayi mua kubala. Kadi bavua ne biakudia ne bia kunua bia bungi, basomba anu ne disanka." 
1Kings5:1 Bualu mukalenga Shelomu uvua ukokesha makalenga makese onsu, biangatshile ku musulu munene wa Perate ne ku ditunga dia bena Peleshete, too ne ku mukalu wa ditunga dia bena Ejipitu mene. Bakalenga bonsu bavua mu matunga aa bavua amu ku bumfumu bua mukalenga Shelomu. Bavua bamulambula milambu, bamuenzela mudimu matuku onsu avuaye ne muoyi." 
1Kings5:2 Dituku dionsu, biakudia bivua mukalenga Shelomu ukengela ne bantu bende bivua nenku: kilo binunu tshitema bia bukula kabuyi busengulula, kilo binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu ya bukula busengulula bimpe," 
1Kings5:3 ngombe dikumi minene ya manyi, ivuabu badisha pa mbelu, ne ngombe makumi abidi miangata mu mpata, ne mikoku lukama, katuyi tubala nyama mikuabu bu mudi: nyama ya ngulungu, ya tubuluku, ntole, ne nyunyi minene ya manyi ivuabu badisha pa mbelu." 
1Kings5:4 Nanku, mukalenga Shelomu uvua ukokesha buloba bujima, bua kuinshi kua musulu wa Perate, luseke ludi diba dibuelela, biangatshile ku musoku wa Tifsa ne ku tshimenga tshia Ngaza. Bakalenga bonsu bavua mu buloba ebu, bavua anu ku bumfumu bua Shelomu. Ke muvua Shelomu musombe talala ne bena mutumba nende bonsu nanku." 
1Kings5:5 Bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele, bavua ne ditalala, biangatshile ku Dane too ne ku Bersheba, Matuku onsu avua Shelomu ne muoyi, muntu yonsu uvua ukuna mionji yende ya mvinyo ne mitshi ya mfiku anu mu ditalala." 
1Kings5:6 Mukalenga Shelomu uvua kabidi ne nyama ya tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi, kabidi ne bikumbi bikumbane bua kutekamu nyama ya tubalu binunu makumi anayi ivua ikoka matempu ende a mvita." 
1Kings5:7 Bamfumu dikumi ne babidi, balombodi ba maloba, bavua mukalenga Shelomu musungule, bavua bafile biakudia bikumbane bua mukalenga Shelomu ne bantu bonsu ba-vuaye ubikila. Mfumu yonsu wa kudibu, uvua ufila biakudia ngondu mujima ku tshidimu tshionsu. Uvua utangila bikole bua biakudia bionsu bikaleku." 
1Kings5:8 Kadi, bua ntete ya oije, ne bisosa bia kudisha nyama ya tubalu, ne nyama ivua ikoka matempu, balombodi bavua babifila pavua mukalenga Shelomu ubilomba, muaba uvua mukalenga." 
1Kings5:9 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mupeshe Shelomu meji mapite ne lungenyi lupite bungi. Malu avua Shelomu mumanye avua a bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene. 
1Kings5:10 Shelomu uvua ne meji a bungi, mupite bena meji bonsu ba bena Arabe ne ba bena Ejipitu." 
1Kings5:11 Uvua mupite bonsu ku meji, mupite Etane, muena Ezraki, mupite kabidi Emane, Kalkole ne Darda, bana ba Makole. Lumu lua meji a Shelomu luvua lutangalaka kudi bantu bonsu bavuaye nabu mutumba." 
1Kings5:11 Uvua mupite bonsu ku meji, mupite Etane, muena Ezraki, mupite kabidi Emane, Kalkole ne Darda, bana ba Makole. Lumu lua meji a Shelomu luvua lutangalaka kudi bantu bonsu bavuaye nabu mutumba." 
1Kings5:12 Uvua muele nsumuinu binunu bisatu, musake misambu ya meji tshinunu ne pa mutu." 
1Kings5:13 Uvua ulongesha bua mitshi ya mishindu yonsu, biangatshile ku mutshi munene wa Sedre uvua mu Lebanone, too ne ditamba dia mutshi wa Isope didi disasa ku tshimana. Uvua mumanye nyama, nyunyi, bilandadi, minyinyi ya mu mayi." 
1Kings5:14 Bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu, bavua balua bua kumvua muvua Shelomu wakula ne meji. Bantu abu, bavua babatume kudi bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba, bavua bamane kumvua lumu lua meji a Shelomu." 
1Kings5:15 Irame, mukalenga wa mu tshimenga tshia Tire, kuonsu eku uvua amu mulunda wa Davide. Kumvuaye lumu ne: mbamane kujidila Shelomu mu bukalenga, bua kupingana tatuende Davide. Nanku, kutumaye bantu kudi Shelomu bua kumujingila diakalenga." 
1Kings5:16 Shelomu ku luende luseke, kumutumina bantu bua kumuambila ne:" 
1Kings5:17 “Udi mumanye ne: tatu wanyi Davide kena muashile Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende nzubu wa tshijila to. Bualu baluishi bende bavua bamuluishe nseke yonsu, kabayi balekela to. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kumuambuluisha bua atshimune baluishi abu." 
1Kings5:18 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mmumpe ditalala ku mikalu yanyi yonsu. Tshiena ne muluishi, tshiena ntshina dikenga." 
1Kings5:19 Nenku, ndi musue kuasa nzubu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile tatu wanyi Davide ne: ‘Anu muanebe, ungikala musungule bua kukupingana mu bukalenga, ke wangashila nzubu bua bikale bantendelelamu." 
1Kings5:20 Nanku, ndi nkusengelela ne: mpindiewu utume diyi kudi bena mudimu bebe, baye ku mukuna wa Lebanone bua kukosa mitshi ya sedre indi nayi dijinga. Bualu, udi mumanye bimpe ne: kuetu kuneku kakuena muntu udi mumanye mua kukosa mitshi munupite nuenu bena Fenisiya to. Bena mudimu banyi abambuluishe bena mudimu bebe. Pashishe, nenkufute difutu dionsu diwikala mundombe bua bena mudimu bebe.”" 
1Kings5:21 Mukalenga Irame mumane kupeta mukenji wa Shelomu, kusankaye bikole, wamba ne: “Lelu ndi ngela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Bualu mmupeshe Davide muana wa meji a bungi, bua kulombolaye tshisamba tshinene tshia bena Izrayele!”" 
1Kings5:22 Nanku, Irame kuandamuna Shelomu ne: “Ngapetshi dilomba diudi muntumine. Ndi muitabe bua kukutumina mitshi ya sedre ne ya pin iudi ujinga." 
1Kings5:23 Bena mudimu banyi nebambule bitupa bia mitshi ku mikuna ya Lebanone too ne ku mayi manene. Nebayisuike mu bisumbu bua kuyipuekesha pa mayi manene too ne muaba uwikala mundeje. Muaba awu, nebasulule mitshi. Bena mudimu bebe nebalue kuambula bitupa bia mitshi abi. Bua difutu, newikale umpesha biakudia bindi nkengela, bua kudisha bantu banyi badi mu nzubu wa bukalenga.”" 
1Kings5:24 Nanku, Irame kupesha mukalenga Shelomu mitshi yonsu ya sedre ne ya pin ivuaye ujinga." 
1Kings5:25 Mukalenga Shelomu ku luende luseke, uvua umupesha ku tshidimu tshionsu: ntete ya kuenza bukula kilo binunu tshinunu bisambombu, ne mafuta mimpe matambe a olive litre binunu muanda mukulu, bua biakudia bia bena mu nzubu wa bukalenga wa Irame." 
1Kings5:26 Maweja-Nangila uvua mupeshe Shelomu meji bu muvuaye mumulaye. Nanku, Shelomu kumyuangana ne Irame, kutuabu nende ndondu." 
1Kings5:27 Mukalenga Shelomu kutuma bantu ku midimu mishilangane. Bena Izrayele bavua benza midimu ayi bavua binunu makumi asatu. 
1Kings5:28 Ku ngondu yonsu, bavua batuma bantu ba munkatshi muabu binunu dikumi ku mukuna wa Lebanone. Bavua balombola bantu abu kudi Adonirame, mfumu mulombodi wa midimu ayi. Bantu abu bavua benza mudimu ngondu mujima. Pashishe bantu abu bavua bapingana kuabu ngondu ibidi." 
1Kings5:29 Bantu bavua bambula bintu bavua binunu makumi muanda mutekete. Bavua basongela Shelomu mabue ku mukuna, bavua binunu makumi muanda mukulu." 
1Kings5:30 Balombodi ba midimu binunu bisatu ne nkama isatu, bavua ku diyi dia balombodi ba mu maloba a mukalenga Shelomu. Bantu aba bavua batangila midimu yonsu ivua bena mudimu bapite bungi abu benza." 
1Kings5:31 Nanku, bu muvua mukalenga Shelomu mutume diyi, bena mudimu kujulabu mabue mimpe manene, kuasongabu bua kuibaka tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings5:32 Bena mudimu ba Shelomu ne ba Irame kujikijabu disonga dia mabue. Bavua babambuluisha kudi basongi ba mabue bapiluke ba mu tshimenga tshia Biblose. Ke muvuabu balongolole mabaya ne mabue makumbane bua kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Kings6:1 Bena Izrayele bamane kupatuka mu Ejipitu kupita bidimu nkama inayi ne makumi muanda mukulu, mukalenga Shelomu kutuadija kuasa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mukalenga Shelomu mumane kushala mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu binayi, midimu ya kuasa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kutuadija mu ngondu wa Zive, mmumue ne: ngondu muibidi wa tshidimu." 
1Kings6:2 Nzubu uvua Shelomu washila Maweja-Nangila uvua ne metre makumi asatu mu bule, metre dikumi mu butshiama, ne metre dikumi ne atanu mu butumbuke." 
1Kings6:3 Lutanda lua ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, luvua metre dikumi mu butshiama, anu bunene bumue ne bunene bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Luvua kabidi ne bule bua metre itanu." 
1Kings6:4 Mu bimana bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muvua madidishi a mabue, mashiya masosu masosu!" 
1Kings6:5 Kuasabu nzubu mikuabu isatu mitentakaja, milamakaja ku bimana bia pa mbelu bia ku tshibambalu tshinene, ne bia ku tshibambalu tshia ndekelu." 
1Kings6:6 Nzubu uvua kuinshi kua mikuabu uvua metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butshiama. Nzubu muibidi wa pankatshi uvua metre asatu, ne nzubu muisatu wa kulu uvua ne metre asatu ne tshitupa mu butshiama. Bualu tshimana tshia pa mbelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, katshivua ne mupimbu wa momumue mu butumbuke buonsu to. Tshivua tshienda tshikepela ku tshitupa ku tshitupa, bua musaka wa nzubu kawubuedi mu bimana bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings6:7 Bua kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua bamuibaka amu ne mabue majima, mushindu uvuabu baambule muaba udibu bumbula mabue. Nanku, matuku onsu avuabu bibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muntu kavua umvua mukuma wa ngindu, wa tshisuyi, nansha wa tshiamu tshikuabu." 
1Kings6:8 Mu nzubu uvua kuinshi kua mikuabu bavua babuelela ku tshiibi tshivua ku luseke lua kuinshi lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, babanda pa tshibandila tshia tshijengu, bua kuya mu nzubu wa pankatshi, ne bua kuya mu nzubu wa pa mutu." 
1Kings6:9 Bua kujikija diasa dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuenzabu tshisasa ne mabaya manene ne makese a mutshi wa sedre." 
1Kings6:10 Kadi nzubu yonsu wa ku nzubu mitentakaja ivuabu balamika ku bimana bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua ne metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butumbuke. Kutekabu mabaya manene a mutshi wa sedre pa tshimana tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings6:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Shelomu ne: 
1Kings6:12 — Bu muudi ungibakila nzubu ewu, wewe mukumbaje mikenji yanyi, mukumbaje miaku imvua mukuambile, mutumikile meyi anyi onsu, nenku nenkumbaje dilaya dimvua mulaye tatuebe Davide bualu buebe." 
1Kings6:13 Meme nensombe mu nzubu ewu munkatshi mua bantu banyi bena Izrayele kashidi. Tshiena mua kubalekela to. 
1Kings6:14 Bena mudimu bamane kujikija dibaka dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bu muvua Shelomu mubambile," 
1Kings6:15 kulamikabu mabaya a mutshi wa sedre ku bimana bia munda mua nzubu kuinshi too ne kulu. Kulamikabu dibaya dia mutshi wa pin panshi pa nzubu. 
1Kings6:16 Mutantshi wa metre dikumi ne tshimana tshia ku ndekelu kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua batekapu mikamba minene ya mutshi wa sedre, miasa panshi, mitue ku tshisasa tshia nzubu. Nanku, kupetabu muaba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kuteka mushete wa ndondu. Bavua babikila muaba awu ne: muaba wa tshijila menemene." 
1Kings6:17 Tshitupa tshikuabu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshivua tshishale, mmumue ne: tshibambalu tshinene tshivua kumpala kua tshibambalu tshivua ne mushete wa ndondu, tshivua ne metre makumi abidi mu bule." 
1Kings6:18 Mabaya a munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu avua malengaja, mazola bimuma bia mutshi wa kolokinte, ne bilongu bimane kutayika. Ku bimana bionsu, kuvua kulamika mabaya a mutshi wa sedre. Nanku, dibue dia ku tshimana nansha dimue kadivua dimueneka to." 
1Kings6:19 Kulongololabu tshibambalu tshivua ku ndekelu, bua kutekamu mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila. Tshibambalu atshi tshiena tshipite bikuabu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings6:20 Tshibambalu etshi, tshivua ne metre dikumi mu butshiama, ne metre dikumi mu butumbuke ne mu bule. Bavua batshilamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bu muvuabu balamika munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muonsu. Kumpala kua mushiku wa mbelu wa tshibambalu etshi, bavua bololaku lukanu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bavua batekaku tshilambuilu tshienza ne mitshi ya sedre, milamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
1Kings6:21  
1Kings6:22 Nanku, nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mujima uvua mulamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi, too ne ku tshilambuilu tshivua pabuipi ne mushiku wa tshibambalu tshivua ne mushete wa ndondu." 
1Kings6:23 Pashishe, kusongabu mutshi wa olive wa ditu, kuenzabu mpingu ibidi ya bakerubine bua kuteka mu tshibambalu tshivua ne mushete wa ndondu. Kerubine yonsu uvua metre atanu mu bule. Kerubine wa kumpala, uvua ne mapuapua, mikale metre abidi ne tshitupa mu bule. Nanku, mapuapua ende onsu avua ne metre atanu mu bule. Kerubine muibidi, uvua kabidi ne metre atanu. Uvua anu bunene bumue, mufuanangane ne Kerubine wa kumpala." 
1Kings6:24  
1Kings6:25  
1Kings6:26  
1Kings6:27 Kutekabu bakerubine munkatshi mua tshibambalu tshiena ne mushete wa ndondu. Bakerubine abu bavua bolola mapuapua. Dipuapua dia Kerubine wa kumpala divua dilenga ku tshimana tshimue tshia tshibambalu atshi. Dipuapua dia Kerubine muibidi divua dilenga ku tshimana tshikuabu. Kadi mapuapua makuabu abidi avua malengangane munkatshi mua tshibambalu. 
1Kings6:28 Bakerubine bonsu babidi bavua babalamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi. 
1Kings6:29 Ku mabaya onsu a ku bimana bionsu bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu bibambalu bionsu bibidi, bavua bazola bakerubine, malala a mabue, ne bilongu bimane kutayika." 
1Kings6:30 Kabidi bavua balamika tshiamu tshia mapwungi too ne ku mabaya avua panshi pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu bibambalu bionsu bibidi. 
1Kings6:31 Bua kuinjila ku tshibambalu tshivua ne mushete wa ndondu, kuenzabu tshiibi tshia mutshi wa olive wa ditu, tshia kunzulula nseke ibidi. Kadi mabaya avua ku tshiibi avua tshia bitanu tshimue tshia tshiibi mu butshiama." 
1Kings6:32 Ku bitupa bionsu bibidi bia tshiibi, bavua basongaku bakerubine, malala a mabue, ne bilongu bimane kutayika. Kubilamikabu tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
1Kings6:33 Kuenzabu kabidi tshiibi tshia kuinjila ku tshibambalu tshinene. Kadi mabaya a mutshi wa olive wa ditu avua ku tshiibi, avua tshia binayi tshimue tshia tshiibi mu butshiama." 
1Kings6:34 Bitupa bionsu bibidi bia tshiibi bivua bienza ne mutshi wa pin. Bavua balengeja tshitupa tshionsu tshia tshiibi ne nkanu ibidi mizola. 
1Kings6:35 Bavua basongamu kabidi bakerubine, malala a mabue, ne bilongu bimane kutayika. Kabidi bavua balamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku bintu bivuabu basonge ku biibi abi." 
1Kings6:36 Pashishe, lupangu lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua banyungulule ne tshimana tshibaka ne mabue masonge avuabu batentakaja milongu isatu. Mulongu muinayi uvua wa mitshi minene ya sedre." 
1Kings6:37 Nanku, mu ngondu wa Zive, Shelomu mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu binayi, kuenzabu tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings6:38 Pashishe mu ngondu wa Bule, mmumue ne: ngondu wa muanda mukulu, Shelomu mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue, kujikijabu diasa dia nzubu mujima, anu mushindu uvuabu balongolola bua kuasa. Nanku, nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu awu, bavua bamuasa mu bidimu muanda mutekete." 
1Kings7:1 Kusakilabu kabidi mukalenga Shelomu nzubu wa bukalenga. Bavua bibake bidimu dikumi ne bisatu bua kujikijabu nzubu yonsu ivua yenza nzubu ya bukalenga. 
1Kings7:2 Kuibakabu nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Ditu dia Lebanone.” Nzubu awu, uvua ne metre makumi atanu mu bule, metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu butshiama, ne metre dikumi ne atanu mu butumbuke. Dina dia nzubu ewu ndifumina ku milongu inayi ya makunji menza ne mitshi ya sedre. Pa makunji apu, ke pavuabu bateke mabaya manene a tshisasa, a mitshi ya sedre kabidi." 
1Kings7:3 Tshisasa tshienza ne mitshi ya sedre kabidi, tshivua tshilamakaja ku mabaya manene makumi anayi ne atanu avua matshiamakaja — Kuvua milongu isatu ya mabaya dikumi ne atanu, — avuabu bateka pa makunji." 
1Kings7:4 Ku luseke luonsu lua nzubu, kuvua milongu isatu ya madidishi, mashiya masosu masosu. Madidishi onsu avua matangilangane mu milongu isatu mishilangane." 
1Kings7:5 Biibi bionsu ne mabaya abi bivua bia matumba anayi, bitangilangane kabidi miaba isatu." 
1Kings7:6 Pashishe kuibakabu “Tshibambalu tshia Makunji,” tshivua ne metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu bule, ne metre dikumi ne atanu mu butshiama. Tshibambalu atshi, tshivua tshienza lutanda, luenza ne makunji a nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Nzubu wa ditu dia Lebanone.”" 
1Kings7:7 Kuibakabu kabidi “Tshibambalu tshia kuteka Nkuasa wa bukalenga.” Bavua batshibikila kabidi ne: “Tshibambalu tshia kulumbuluila bilumbu,” bualu Shelomu uvua ulumbuluisha bilumbu mu tshibambalu atshi. Tshivua tshilamika mabaya a mutshi wa sedre panshi too ne kulu." 
1Kings7:8 Shelomu uvua musombele mu nzubu uvua mu lupangu lukuabu. Nzubu awu, uvua mutantshi mukese ne nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Nzubu wa ditu dia Lebanone.” Kadi nzubu uvua Shelomu musombele awu, bavua bamuibaka mushindu umue ne nzubu wa ditu dia Lebanone. Nzubu wa ndekelu ke nzubu uvuabu bibakila muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, uvua Shelomu musele. Bavua bamuibaka mushindu umue ne lutanda lua nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Ditu dia Lebanone.”" 
1Kings7:9 Nzubu yonsu eyi, bavua bayibake ne mabue avuabu basungule bimpe. Bavua basonga mabue awu, baakosa nseke yonsu ibidi ivua imueneka ne tshiamu tshia menu menu, luseke luvua lutangila munda mua nzubu, ne luseke luvua lutangila pa mbelu. Kuibakabu nzubu ne mabue a nanku, biangatshile kuinshi kua nzubu too ne ku mpenga kua musaka. Kuibakabu nawu kabidi bimana bia lupangu lunene." 
1Kings7:10 Bua kuibaka kuinshi kua nzubu ayi nkayaku, bavua bangata mabue mimpe manene, mikale metre anayi nansha atanu mu bule." 
1Kings7:11 Pa tshitaku atshi, kutekabu mabue avuabu bamane kusonga, ne mabaya manene a mutshi wa sedre." 
1Kings7:12 Lupangu lunene luvua lunyunguluka, luvua lua tshimana, tshikale ne milongu ya mabue masongu mitentakaja isatu. Luvua kabidi ne mulongu mukuabu wa mabaya manene a mutshi wa sedre, anu bu muvuabu benza mu lupangu luvua munda mua nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ne ku lutanda lua nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings7:13 Mu tshimenga tshia Tire muvua nsenda wa biamu bikunze, dina diende Irame. Uvua mumanye mudimu awu bikole. Irame uvua muena Tire, bualu tatuende uvua wa mu tshimenga atshi. Kadi mamuende wa Irame, uvua mukaji mukamba wa mu tshisamba tshia Naftali. Irame uvua muntu mutalame, wa lungenyi lua bungi. Uvua mumanye bikole mudimu wa kutula biamu bikunze. Ke pavua mukalenga Shelomu mubikidishe Irame uvua ku Tire bua kuenzaye biamu bionsu bivua mukalenga Shelomu ujinga." 
1Kings7:14  
1Kings7:15 Irame kuenza makunji abidi a tshiamu tshikunze. Avua ne metre tshitema mu butumbuke, nyinguluilu muikala metre asambombu." 
1Kings7:16 Kuenzaye kabidi mitu ya makunji ibidi ya kuteka ku nsongu ya makunji. Mitu ya makunji ayi, ivua ya tshiamu tshikunze. Mutu wa dikunji dionsu uvua ne metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butumbuke." 
1Kings7:17 Kuenzaye kabidi bilengejilu bikuabu bia tshiamu tshikunze bifuanangane ne makondu, kabidi ne tukanu, tuikale ne majita ku ndekelu, bua kulengeja mitu ya makunji. Bilengejilu abi, bivua muanda mutekete ku mutu wa dikunji dionsu." 
1Kings7:18 Kuenzaye kabidi tshilengejilu tshikuabu tshifuanangane ne bimuma bia mutshi wa ngrenade. Muvua milongu ibidi ya bilengejilu pa bukondu buonsu buvua bubuikila ku mitu ya makunji. 
1Kings7:19 Ku dikunji dionsu, kuvua mutu wa dikunji muibidi, muikale metre abidi mu butumbuke, mufuanangane ne tshilongu tshia kapapa-nkole." 
1Kings7:20 Pa mutu wa mitu ya makunji, bavua badiundisha tshitupa tshikuabu. Nanku tshitupa atshi tshivua pa mutu pa bukondu, ne pa bimuma bia ngrenade nkama ibidi, biteka mu milongu, binyunguluke mutu wa dikunji dionsu." 
1Kings7:21 Kuasabu makunji abidi aa kumpala kua lutanda lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Dikunji divua ku dia balume, bavua badibikila ne: Yakine, mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ufila bukole”. Dikunji divua ku dia bakaji bavua badibikila ne Bowaze, mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole”." 
1Kings7:22 Ke muvua Irame mujikije kuibaka makunji nanku. 
1Kings7:23 Diba adi, Irame kuenza dilongu dinene dia tshiamu tshikunze. Divua ne metre atanu mu bunene, metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butumbuke, ne nyunguluilu uvua ne metre dikumi ne atanu." 
1Kings7:24 Muinshi mua mibangu ya dilongu adi, ku nseke yonsu, kuvua bilengejilu bia bimuma bia mutshi wa kolokinte. Ku metre umue kuvua bilengejilu abi makumi abidi, biteka mu milongu ibidi. Bilengejilu abi, bavua babifula ne tshiamu tshikunze anu musangu umue ne dilongu." 
1Kings7:25 Dilongu divua diteka pa ngombe milume ya tshiamu tshikunze dikumi ne ibidi. Ngombe isatu ivua mienza mitangila ku mutu, isatu mitangila luseke ludi diba dibuelela, isatu mitangila kuinshi, ne mikuabu isatu mitangila luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Kadi, ngombe ayi yonsu ivua miela nyima ku dilongu, miongu yayi mikale muinshi mua dilongu." 
1Kings7:26 Mupimbu wa dilongu adi uvua wa santimetre muanda mukulu. Bavua balengeje mibangu ya dilongu ne bintu bifuanangane ne mabeji a tshilongu tshia kapapa-nkole. Dilongu adi, divua dikumbana bua kuelamu mayi litre bu binunu makumi muanda mukulu." 
1Kings7:27 Pashishe Irame kuenza matempu dikumi a tshiamu tshikunze. Ditempu dionsu divua ne metre abidi mu bule, metre abidi mu butshiama, ne metre umue ne tshitupa mu butumbuke." 
1Kings7:28 Bavua benza matempu awu mushindu ewu: bavua balamakaja bitata bia tshiamu tshikunze ku milonda ivuabu batshiamakaja. 
1Kings7:29 Bavua balengeja bitata ne milonda ne bimfuanyi bia nyama ya ntambue, ya ngombe milume, ne bia bakerubine. Kadi, muinshi mua nyama ya ntambue ne ya ngombe milume, bavua bafula, balembelejamu mukaba ne nkanu." 
1Kings7:30 Ditempu dionsu, divua ne nkata inayi ya tshiamu tshikunze, milamakaja ne milonda minene ya tshiamu tshikunze. Milonda minene ayi, bavua bayibueja mu makasa mu matumba. Ku ditumba dionsu kuvua dikasa. Bavua batule makasa anayi aa anu malamakana ne milonda ya ditempu. Makasa kaavua apita mukaba wa nkanu ivua ne bilongu to." 
1Kings7:31 Tshitupa tshia pa mutu wa ditempu, tshivua ne tshitaku, tshikala tshijengu, tshikala kabidi ne disosu munda. Tshitaku atshi, tshivua ne butumbuke bua santimetre makumi atanu, tshikumbane mua kutekamu dilongu dinene. Disosu dia tshitaku atshi, divua bunene bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu. Nanku, tshitupa tshia kulu tshia tshitaku, tshivua tshipite milonda ivua mitshiamakane tshi vua anu bule bua mushindu umue ku nseke yatshi yonsu inayi. Nanku katshivua tshijengu to. Tshivua ne bilengejilu bienza bilamakane pa bitata bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
1Kings7:32 Nanku, nkata inayi ayi, bavua bayiteka kuinshi kua milonda ya ditempu. Mulonda munene uvua mukuate nkata, mutue eku ne eku muinshi mua ditempu. Nkata ayi, ivua bule bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu." 
1Kings7:33 Ivua mienza anu mushindu umue ne nkata ya matempu makuabu. Mulonda munene, nkata, nsambu, ne biamu bidibu bela nsambu ayi, bionsu bivua anu bia tshiamu tshikunze." 
1Kings7:34 Makasa ayi avua ku matumba anayi, bavua baenza malamakane ne ditempu." 
1Kings7:35 Tshitapa tshia kulu tshia ditempu dionsu, bavua batshilengeje ne mukaba muikale bunene bua santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu, munyunguluke disosu dijima. Ku tshitupa etshi tshia kulu tshia ditempu, kuvua bikuatshidi ne bitata bia tshiamu tshikunze, bienza bilamakana ne ditempu." 
1Kings7:36 Bavua basonge kabidi ku bikuatshidi ne ku bitata abi: bakerubine, nyama ya ntambue, ne malala a mabue. Bavua balembelejaku kabidi mukaba wa nkanu mikale ne bilongu." 
1Kings7:37 Matempu onsu dikumi, bavua baenza anu mushindu umue: mu bule, mu butshiama, ne mu butumbuke. Bitupa bionsu bia ditempu bavua babifuta anu pamue, bienza anu tshintu tshimue." 
1Kings7:38 Irame kuenza kabidi malongu manene dikumi a tshiamu tshikunze, a kuteka pa matempu dikumi. Dilongu dionsu divua butumbuke bua metre abidi, dikumbane mua kuelamu mayi litre bu tshinunu ne nkama isambombu." 
1Kings7:39 Matempu atanu avua ne malongu manene, kuatekabu ku dia balume dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Matempu makuabu atanu, kuatekabu ku dia bakaji. Dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, kuditekabu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pabuipi ne ditumba divua ditangila kuinshi." 
1Kings7:40 Irame mumane kuenza malongu, bikasu, ne makopu a kumiamina nawu, ne bintu bionsu bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bivua Shelomu mumuambile bua kuenza, kujikabi. Irame uvua muenze bintu ebi:" 
1Kings7:41 makunji abidi; mitu ya makunji ibidi mifuanangane ne makopu a kuteka ku mutu kua makunji; bilengejilu bibidi bifuanangane ne makondu bia kubuikila, ku nsongu ya mitu ya makunji ivua mifuanangana ne makopu;" 
1Kings7:42 bimuma bia mutshi wa ngrenade nkama inayi, bilembeleja ku makondu onsu abidi, biteka mu milongu ibidi ku bukondu buonsu buvua bubuikila mitu ya makunji." 
1Kings7:43 Matempu dikumi; malongu manene dikumi a kuteka pa matempu; 
1Kings7:44 dilongu dikuabu dia tshijengu dipite bunene, ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi ivua miambula dilongu dia tshijengu dinene adi;" 
1Kings7:45 ngesu ya kuela butu, bikasu, ne makopu a kumiamina nawu. Bintu bionsu bivua Irame muenze bua nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila bu muvua Shelomu muambe, bivua anu bia tshiamu tshikunze menemene, bilengeja bimpe." 
1Kings7:46 Bavua bengulula biamu ebi munda mua buloba mu tshibandabanda tshia Yardene, pankatshi pa musoku wa Sukote ne wa Sartane," 
1Kings7:47 Pashishe, Shelomu kuteka bintu ebi bionsu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Kadi bivua bipite bungi. Nanku ka-bavua nansha bakeba mua kumanya bujitu bua tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu benza natshi bintu bionsu ebi to." 
1Kings7:48 Shelomu kuenzeja kabidi bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bia kuteka mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila: tshilambuilu tshia manananshi tahia tshiamu; mesa a tshiamu tshia mpawungi a kutekela mampa a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu;" 
1Kings7:49 bitekelu bia miendu dikumi bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi bivuabu bateka kumpala kua tshibambalu tshia muaba wa tshijila menemene, bitanu ku dia balume, bitanu ku dia bakaji; bilongu, miendu, ne lukuata luvua ku bitekelu bia miendu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi;" 
1Kings7:50 malongu, binta bia kusukula nabi miendu, makopu a kumiamina nawu, makopu makuabu ne mbabula, bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene; biamu bia biibi bia ku tshibambalu tshivuabu babikila ne: muaba wa tshijila menemene, ne bia ku biibi bia tshibambalu tshinene, bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
1Kings7:51 Mukalenga Shelomu mumane kujikija midimu yonsu ya dibaka nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, kuangataye binta bionsu bivua tatuende Davide mujidile Maweja-Nangila: biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bintu bia mishindu yonsu, kubitekaye mu tshibambalu tshia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshivuabu batekela bintu bionsu bia mushinga mukole." 
1Kings8:1 Diba adi, mukalenga Shelomu kubikila bakulu ba bena Izrayele bonsu, bamfumu bavua ku mutu kua bisamba, ne bavua ku mutu kua meku a kale onsu. Kufikabu mu Yerushalayime, muaba uvua mukalenga Shelomu, bua kuambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila uvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, tshivuabu kabidi babikila ne: Siyone, ne bua kuya kuuteka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings8:2 Ke bena Izrayele bonsu kudisangisha kabidi muaba uvua mukalenga Shelomu, bua kuenza tshibi lu tshia ngondu wa Etanime, mmumue ne: ngondu wa muanda mutekete." 
1Kings8:3 Bakulu ba bena Izrayele bamane kufika, batuangaji kuambula mushete wa ndondu." 
1Kings8:4 Batuangaji ke bavua bambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, kadi bena Levi bavua babambuluisha bua kuambula ntenta wa kusambakena, ne bintu bia tshijila bionsu bivua mu ntenta amu." 
1Kings8:5 Mukalenga Shelomu ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua badisangisha kumpala kua mushete. Kulambulabu milambu ya bungi: mikoku ne ngombe. Kabavua mua kubala bungi buayi to. 
1Kings8:6 Pashishe batuangaji kubueja mushete muaba uvuabu balongolola, mu tshibambalu tshivuabu babikila ne: muaba wa tshijila menemene, muinshi mua mapuapua a bakerubine." 
1Kings8:7 Bualu mapuapua a bakerubine avua muolola pa mutu pa muaba uvuabu bamane kulongolola bua kuteka mushete. Nanku, mapuapua avua mabuikila mushete, ne milonda ivuabu bawambuila nayi." 
1Kings8:8 Milonda ayi ivua mile. Nsongu yayi ivua imueneka kudi muntu uvua mu tshibambalu tshinene tshivua kumpala kua tshibambalu tshivua mushete wa ndondu. Kadi, kayivua imueneka kudi muntu uvua pambelu. Milonda ayi itshidi muaba awu too ne mpindiewu." 
1Kings8:9 Mu mushete amu, muvua anu mabue abidi avua ne mikenji. Moshe ke uvua muteke mabue awu mu mushete. Uvua muapete ku mukuna wa Sinayi pavua Maweja-Nangila utua ndondu ne bena Izrayele, mumane kubapatula mu Ejipitu." 
1Kings8:10 Pavua batuangaji bapatuka mu muaba wa tshijila, divuba divua diuwula mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings8:11 Batuangaji kabawa ne mushindu wa kuenza mudimu to, bualu bua divuba adi, butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila ke buvua buwule mu nzubu." 
1Kings8:12 Ke Shelomu kuela lubila ne: “Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuamba ne: ndi nsomba mu midima. 
1Kings8:13 Kadi, ndi mukuibakile nzubu muimpe, muaba uudi mua kusomba kashidi!”" 
1Kings8:14 Bena Izrayele bonsu bamane kudisangisha, kuimanabu kulu. Mukalenga Shelomu kubatangila, kubela muoyi." 
1Kings8:15 Pashishe, kuambaye ne: — Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele tuasakidila! Yeye nkayende ke udi mukumbaje bionsu bivuaye mulaye tatu wanyi Davide. Uvua mumuambile ne:" 
1Kings8:16 “Biangatshile dituku dimvua mupatule bantu banyi bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, katshia tshivua musungule tshimenga nansha tshimue munkatshi mua bimenga bia bena Izrayele bua kungibakilamu nzubu undi mua kusomba to. Kadi ndi mukusungule wewe Davide, bua wikale mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele. ”" 
1Kings8:17 Bushuwa, tatu wanyi Davide uvua muele meji a kuibakila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele nzubu wa tshibilu." 
1Kings8:18 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila uvua mumuambile ne: “Udi muele meji mempe bua kungibakila nzubu." 
1Kings8:19 Kadi, wewe kuena ungibakila nzubu to, anu muanebe wa balume. Eyowa, anu muanebe menemene neangibakile nzubu ewu. ”" 
1Kings8:20 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila ke udi mukumbaje bionsu bivuaye mulaye. Meme ndi mupingane tatu wanyi Davide mu bukalenga. Ndi musombe mu nkuasa wa bukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Ndi muibake nzubu ewu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings8:21 Mu nzubu emu, ndi mulongololemu muaba wa kuteka mushete, udi ne mabue a ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue ne bankambua betu, tshikondu tshivuaye mubapatule mu Ejipitu." 
1Kings8:22 Pashishe, Shelomu kuimana kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, muele bianza mulu, bena Izrayele bonsu batangila. Uvua utendelela Maweja-Nangila," 
1Kings8:23 wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu bu wewe, nansha mu diulu nansha pa buloba. Wewe udi ukumbaja ndondu uuvua mutue ne bena mudimu bebe. Wewe udi anu mubanange ne muoyi umue, padibu bakuitaba ne muoyi wabu mujima." 
1Kings8:24 Udi muenzele tatu wanyi muntu webe Davide bionsu biuvua mumulaye. Eyowa, lelu wakumbaji bionsu biuvua mumuambile." 
1Kings8:25 Nanku, mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ukumbaje kabidi malaya makuabu, auvua mulaye tatu wanyi Davide, muntu webe. Uvua mumuambile ne: “Pikala ndelanganyi yebe mingitabe ne muoyi umue bu muuvua wewe muenze, ndi nkujadikila ne: muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neakupingane misangu yonsu mu bukalenga, bua kushala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele! ”" 
1Kings8:26 Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu wabena Izrayele, ndi nkusengelela ne: ukumbaje lelu ewu, biuvua mulaye tatu wanyi Davide, muntu webe!" 
1Kings8:27 “Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi mua kusomba pa buloba anyi? Diulu, nansha diodi dialabale, kadiena mua kumukumbana to! Mudiye mua kusomba mu kazubu kandi muibake aka mbishi?" 
1Kings8:28 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, tangila kundi. Nteleja mundi nkusengelela. Eyowa, teleja mundi nkubikila lelu muanyi muomsu." 
1Kings8:29 Tabala! Tangila nzubu ewu butuku ne munya ne muoyi wa kalolu. Bualu udi mumane kuamba ne: ‘Ke muaba unudi mua kumonangana nanyi. Teleja mundi nkutendelela muaba ewu. 
1Kings8:30 Teleja mundi nkubikila, ne mudi bantu bebe bena Izrayele bakubikila, batangila ku nzubu eku. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu muudi musombe, ututeleje, utujimijile mibi yetu." 
1Kings8:31 “Padibu bafunde muntu ne mmuenzeje mukuende bibi, basue bua aditshipe, bafike nende mu nzubu webe ewu, bua kuditshipaye kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshiebe." 
1Kings8:32 Nanku Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu wikale muteleje. Ukose tshilumbu tshia bantu bebe, bua muena tshibawu apete dinyoka, kabidi bua udi mubinge amueneke ne kena ne bualu to." 
1Kings8:33 “Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, badi mua kubatshimuna kudi baluishi babu. Padi bena Izrayele bakulomba bua wewe kubafuila luse, bakutumbisha, bakutendelela, bakutendakena mu nzubu emu," 
1Kings8:34 wewe Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Ubajimijile mibi yabu. Ubapingaje mu maloba auvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu, bualu bena Izrayele mbantu bebe." 
1Kings8:35 “Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, udi mua kukandika bua mvula kaloki to. Nanku, padi bena Izrayele batangila ku nzubu eku, bua kukutendelela ne kukutumbisha, padibu badipuekesha, balekela kukutombokela," 
1Kings8:36 wewe Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Ubajimijile mibi yabu, bualu bena Izrayele mbantu bebe, kabidi mbena mudimu bebe. Ubalongeshe mua kukutumikila bimpe. Pashishe, ulokeshe mvula pa buloba buebe ebu, bualu uvua mumane kubupesha bena Izrayele." 
1Kings8:37 “Padi tshiyole tshia nzala tshibuela mu ditunga, nansha tshipupu tshia disama dia tshiambu, nansha padi munanga mumishe ntete ya kuenza bukula, nansha mvula muboleshe bia pa madimi, nansha mpasu ya mukumbi, nansha ya mushindu mukuabu, mibuele mu ditunga mipite bungi, nansha baluishi bakengesha bena Izrayele, nansha mu bimenga biabu bidibu bakolesha ne bimana, padi tshipupu nansha disama dia tshiambu bibuele mu ditunga, nansha biobi bia mushindu kaayi," 
1Kings8:38 padi bantu bebe, bena Izrayele, badiunwue ne: tudi benza bibi, banyingalala, padibu bakutendakena, batangila ku nzubu eku, bela bianza mulu bua kukutendelela," 
1Kings8:39 wewe Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu muudi usomba, wikale muteleje. Ubafuile luse. Wenzele muntu yonsu bilondeshile malu adiye wenza. Bualu udi mumanye muoyi wende. Bushuwa, wewe nkayebe udi mumanye muoyi wa muntu yonsu." 
1Kings8:40 Wewe muenzele bena Izrayele nanku, nebakunemeke kashidi, matuku onsu adibu ne muoyi pa buloba ebu buuvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu." 
1Kings8:41 “Padi bantu batumbisha dina diebe dia butumbi, bamanyishangana bukole buudi wenza nabu bishima, bantu benyi nebumvue lumu alu. Nanku, muntu muenyi yonsu udi kayi wa mu tshisamba tshia bantu bebe bena Izrayele, padiye ufuma kule, ufika mu nzubu emu bua kukutendelela," 
1Kings8:42  
1Kings8:43 wewe Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu muudi usomba, wikale muteleje. Umupeshe tshintu tshidiye ukulomba. Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebakumanye, nebalonge mua kukunemeka, bu mudi bantu bebe bena Izrayele bakunemeka. Kabidi nebajadike ne: nzubu ewu undi muibake, nguebe wewe bulelela." 
1Kings8:44 “Paudi utuma bena Izrayele mu mvita bua kuluisha baluishi babu, padibu bakudimuke batangila tshimenga etshi tshia Yerushalayime, tshiuvua mumane kusungula, batangila ku nzubu ewu undi mukuibakile, padibu bakutendelela wewe Maweja-Nangila," 
1Kings8:45 mu diulu muudi usomba, wikale mubateleje. Umvue mudibu bakulomba, bakusengelela. Nanku, ubambuluishe." 
1Kings8:46 “Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi kayi mua kuenza bibi. Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, misangu mikuabu udi mua kubafikila munda, kubafila mu bianza bia baluishi babu, bua baye nabu mu bupika mu ditunga dia pabuipi, nansha dia kule." 
1Kings8:47 Nanku, mu ditunga dikale bena Izrayele baye mu bupika amu, padibu badiela meji, badikonka, batuadija kukutendelela, bamba ne: ‘Tuvua bakutombokela Maweja-Nangila, benza bibi. Tudi bena tshibawu!’" 
1Kings8:48 Padi bena Izrayele bakulomba ne muoyi mujima bua wewe kubafuila luse mu ditunga dia baluishi babu mudibu babakuata ku bupika, padibu bakudimuka batangila ku ditunga diuvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu, kabidi batangila ku tshimenga etshi tshia Yerushalayime tshiuvua musungule, ne ku nzubu ewu undi mukuibakile, padibu bakutendelela," 
1Kings8:49 nanku, wewe Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu muudi usomba, wikale muteleje. Umvua mudibu bakulomba, bakusengelela. Nanku, ubambuluishe." 
1Kings8:50 Ubafuile luse bua malu mabi onsu adibu bakuenzela, ne mudibu bakutombokela. Witabe bua baluishi babu babenzele bimpe." 
1Kings8:51 Bualu bena Izrayele mbantu bebe, biangatshile tshikondu tshiuvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu, muaba wa dikenga dikole." 
1Kings8:52 “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wikale mutabale, bua umvue mudi bantu bebebena Izrayele ne meme, tukutendelela, misangu yonsu itudi tukubikila." 
1Kings8:53 Bualu wewe ke uvua mutusungule munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu, bua tuikale bantu bebe, bu muuvua mumane kuambila Moshe, muntu webe, tshikondu tshiuvua mupatule bankambua betu mu bupika mu Ejipitu.”" 
1Kings8:54 Pavua Shelomu ulomba, utendakena Maweja-Nangila, uvua anu mutue binu kumpala kua tshilambuilu, muele bianza mulu. Mamane kujikija kutendelela, kujukaye," 
1Kings8:55 kuimana kulu, kuela bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu lupemba, wamba ne diyi dikole ne:" 
1Kings8:56 — Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila. Yeye ke udi mufile ditalala kudi bantu bende bena Izrayele, bu muvuaye mubalaye. Maweja-Nangila ke udi muenze bionsu ebi bua kujikija bivuaye mulaye mukana mua muntu wende Moshe." 
1Kings8:57 Mpindiewu, ndi ndomba Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bua ikale netu bu nuwuaye ne bankambua betu. Maweja-Nangila, kutulekedi to. Ikale anu utuambuluisha." 
1Kings8:58 Maweja-Nangila atupeshe muoyi muimpe bua tudifile anu kudiye, tuenze malu adiye musue, tukumbaje meyi ende, mikenji yende, ne miaku yende ivuaye muambile bankambua betu." 
1Kings8:59 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, avuluke butuku ne munya bionsu bindi mumulombe ebi. Nanku, atuambuluishe matuku onsu. Bualu nuenu ne meme tudi bantu bende." 
1Kings8:60 Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba, nebamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu, kakuena mukuabu to." 
1Kings8:61 Nanku, nuenu bena Izrayele, nenunange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu ne muoyi wenu mujima. Nenutumikile meyi ne mikenji biende bu munudi benza lelu." 
1Kings8:62 Mukalenga Shelomu ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu, kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila milambu." 
1Kings8:63 Bua kubanjija nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, Shelomu kulambula milambu ya bobumue: ngombe binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi, mikoku ne mbuji binunu lukama ne makumi abidi." 
1Kings8:64 Dituku adi, mukalenga Shelomu kujidila tshitupa tshijima tshia pankatshi tshia lubanza luvua kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze tshivua pabuipi ne mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tshivua tshikese tshitambe. Katshivua tshikumbane mua kulambuilapu milambu yonsu to. Nanku, Shelomu kulambuila milambu ya kuosha, ya bintu bia mu madimi, ne manyi a nyama ya milambu ya bobumue anu mu lubanza amu." 
1Kings8:65 Anu tshikondu atshi, Shelomu ne bena Izrayele bonsu, bavua muaba awu bapite bungi, kuenzabu tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa. Bena Izrayele abu, bavua bafumine mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, biangatshile ku Lebo-Amate ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne ku musulu wa Ejipitu udi kuinshi mu ditunga. Nanku, munkatshi mua matuku muanda mutekete, bena Izrayele kuenza tshibilu atshi muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings8:66 Dituku dia muanda mukulu, mukalenga Shelomu kutangalaja bena Izrayele. Kupinganabu ku nzubu yabu. Bena Izrayele bonsu kuya kulayangana ne mukalenga Shelomu bamuela tuasakidila. Pashishe, kupinganabu kuabu ne disanka, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muenzele muntu wende Davide bimpe, kabidi ne bantu bende bena Izrayele." 
1Kings9:1 Mukalenga Shelomu mumane kujikija nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila ne nzubu wende wa bukalenga, kabidi ne nzubu yonsu ivuaye musue kuibaka," 
1Kings9:2 Maweja-Nangila kumumuenekela tshiakabidi, anu muvuaye mumumuenekele ku musoku wa Ngibone." 
1Kings9:3 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Shelomu ne: — Ndi mumvue kulomba kuebe, ne mushindu uudi untendakena. Nanku, ndi njidila nzubu ewu uudi muibake. Ndi muitabe bua kusombamu kashidi, bua meme kuikala munkatshi muenu. Nengikale mulame nzubu ewu. Netumuenzele bimpe misangu yonsu." 
1Kings9:4 Kadi wewe Shelomu, wewe mungitabe, muvua tatuebe Davide mungitabe ne muoyi umue mululame, wewe mukumbaje bionsu bindi nkuambila, mutumikile meyi ne mikenji yanyi bimvua mukupeshe," 
1Kings9:5 umanye ne: nenjadike bukalenga buebe kashidi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Ke mumvua mulaye tatuebe Davide, mumuambile misangu yonsu ne: muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neakupingane mu bukalenga, bua kushalaye mfumu wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings9:6 Kadi wewe Shelomu ne bantu bebe bena Izrayele, ne ndelanganyi yenu, panuikala nuenu bantombokela, kanuyi bakumbaje meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimvua munuambile, nuenu nutendelela mvidie mikuabu, nuenu bayituile binu bua kuyikukuila," 
1Kings9:7 nennuipate mu buloba bumvua munupe. Nengumuke mu nzubu ewu, undi mujidile bua nuenu kuntendelelamu. Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu nebanuseke miaba yonsu, banuele bibingu." 
1Kings9:8 Padi bantu bapitshila pabuipi ne nzubu munene ewu mumane kunyanguka, nebakeme, bapampakana ne bowa. Nebakonke ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunyangakaje ditunga edi ne nzubu ewu nunku bua tshinyi? ”" 
1Kings9:9 Nebabandamune ne: “Bualu bena Izrayele mbatombokele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, uvua mupatule bankambua babu mu Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila udi ubakengesha nunku, bualu bavua batendelela mvidie mikuabu.”" 
1Kings9:10 Irame, mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Tire, uvua mupeshe Shelomu mitshi ya sedre yonsu, mitshi ya pin, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshivuaye ukengela bua nzubu uvuaye wibaka. Bidimu makumi abidi bimane kukumbana, Shelomu kujikija nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila ne nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Pashishe kupeshaye Irame bimenga makumi abidi bivua mu buloba bua Ngalileya." 
1Kings9:11  
1Kings9:12 Nanku, Irame kumuka ku Tire, bua kuya kumona bimenga abi. Kadi kabivua bimusankisha to." 
1Kings9:13 Kukemaye, wamba ne: “Muanetu Shelomu, bimenga biudi mumpeshe bidi bibi bitambe, kabiena ne mushinga to!” Ke padibu babikila bimenga abi too ne lelu ne: “Ditunga dia Kabule. ”" 
1Kings9:14 Eku Irame uvua mutumine mukalenga Shelomu kilo binunu bisatu ne nkama itanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. 
1Kings9:15 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenzeja midimu ya kuibaka nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, nzubu wende wa bukalenga, mushiki wa buloba uvuabu bela muaba awu, uvuabu babikila ne: Milo, bimana bivua binyungulule Yerushalayime, ne bimenga bia: Ashore, Megido ne Ngezere." 
1Kings9:16 (Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kuluisha bena Ngezere, kukuata tshimenga atshi, kutshiosha, kushipa bena Kenaane bavua basemu. Pashishe kutshipeshaye muanende wa bakaji bua kumusankisha, dituku divuabu bangata dibaka ne Shelomu." 
1Kings9:17 Ke pavua Shelomu muibakulule tshimenga tshia Ngezere). Shelomu uvua muibakulule kabidi bimenga ebi: Beterone wa kuinshi," 
1Kings9:18 Baalate ne Tamare wa mu tshipela tshia mu ditunga. 
1Kings9:19 Uvua muibakulule ne bimenga bionsu bivuaye muteke biakudia biende, matempu ende a mvita, ne nyama yende ya tubalu. Shelomu kuibaka bintu bionsu bivuaye musue kuibaka nansha mu Yerushalayime, nansha pa mukuna wa Lebanone, nansha mu ditunga dijima divua ku bumfumu buende. Mukalenga Shelomu uvua muenzeje midimu ayi mushindu ewu:" 
1Kings9:20 bantu ba bisamba bia bende batshivua bashale mu ditunga amu, ke bena Amore, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, mmumue ne: bantu bavua kabayi bena Izrayele to." 
1Kings9:21 Bisamba ebi bivua bishala mu ditunga, bualu bena Izrayele bavua benza muabu muonsu bua kubabutula bapange. Nanku, bobu ke bavua Shelomu wenzeja midimu. Batshidi bapika ba bena Izrayele too ne mpindiewu." 
1Kings9:22 Kadi Shelomu kavua wenzeja bena Izrayele midimu ayi to. Uvua mubangate amu ku mudimu wa bena mvita, wa balombodi ba bena mvita, bikale ne mianzu mishilangane, wa bendeshi ba matempu a mvita, nansha wa babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu." 
1Kings9:23 Bamfumu ba maloba, kusungula bantu nkama itanu ne makumi atanu bua bikale batangila bantu bonsu bapite bungi bavua benzela Shelomu midimu." 
1Kings9:24 Muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mumane kumuka mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, bua kuya kusomba mu nzubu wa bukalenga uvuabu bamuibakila, Shelomu kuelesha mushiki wa buloba muabu babikila ne Milo." 
1Kings9:25 Mukalenga Shelomu, mua ulambula milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue misangu isatu ku tshidimu tshionsu. Uvua osha milambu ayi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila patshilambuilu tshivuaye muashile Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bavua benzelamu mudimu uvuabu bamuibakila." 
1Kings9:26 Mukalenga Shelomu kusongesha matu manene ku Eshiyone-Ngebere, pabuipi ne Elate, muaba uvua bantu basabukila Mayi manene makunze mu ditunga dia Edome." 
1Kings9:27 Mukalenga Irame uvua mutumine Shelomu bantu ba bena Fenisiya bavua bamanye mua kuita matu bikole, bua kuambuluishabu biitshi ba matu ba Shelomu." 
1Kings9:28 Biitshi ba matu abu bonsu, kuya bonsu pamue mu ditunga dia Ofire. Bavua batuadile mukalenga Shelomu tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo binunu dikumi ne bibidi ne pa mutu." 
1Kings10:1 Mukalenga mukaji wa mu ditunga dia Saba, kumvuaye lumu lua Shelomu. Kuyaye bua kumonangana nende, kumukonka malu makole bua kujadika muvua lungenyi luende." 
1Kings10:2 Mukalenga mukaji awu, kufika mu Yerushalayime ne musumba munene wa bantu bavuaye nabu. Uvua kabidi ne nyama ya tumelu miambule manananshi, tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo mivule, ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Kufikaye kudi Shelomu. Kumuelaye makonka onsu avuaye mumane kulongolola." 
1Kings10:3 Mukalenga Shelomu kuandamuna ku makonka awu onsu. Kawa mushiye dikonka nansha dimue, kayi mudiandamune." 
1Kings10:4 Mukalenga mukaji wa mu Saba kujadika muvua Shelomu muakule ne lungenyi, kukema bikole bua mushindu uvua nzubu wa bukalenga uvua Shelomu mudibakile," 
1Kings10:5 bua biakudia bivuabu bateka ku mesa, bua balombodi ba bukalenga bua Shelomu, bavua basombe ku mesa balondangane bimpe, bua bilamba bivuabu bavuale kudi bena mudimu bavua babanya biakudia ne bia kunua. Mukalenga mukaji umona milambu ivua Shelomu ulambula mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, kukemaye bikole bua bintu bionsu abi, kupangaye ne mua kuakula." 
1Kings10:6 Pashishe kuambilaye mukalenga Shelomu ne: — Pamvua mu ditunga dianyi, mvua mumvue lumu luebe ne lua meji audi nawu. Pamvua tshiyi muanji kufika kuneku bua meme kudijadikila nkayanyi bivuabu bangambila, mvua anu ne mpata. Kadi bionsu bivuabu bangambila, bivua anu bia bushuwa. Kadi bavua bangambila anu malu makese. Meji ebe ne bubanji buebe mbipite lumu luebe lumvua mumvue." 
1Kings10:7  
1Kings10:8 Bena mudimu bebe ne bantu badi mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga mbena diakalenga! Bualu udi nabu matuku onsu. Badi bumvue meji ebe ne lungenyi luudi nalu. 
1Kings10:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe atumbe. Uvua mukusungule bua wikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele! Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmunange bena Izrayele kashidi. Ke padiye mukuteke mukalenga wabu bua kubaludika mu njila wa malu mimpe. 
1Kings10:10 Pashishe mukalenga mukaji wa Saba, kupesha mukalenga Shelomu tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo binunu bisatu ne nkama itanu. Kumupeshaye kabidi manananshi a bungi, ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Biangatshile ku dituku adi, kabena banji kufika ne manananshi bungi ebu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele to." 
1Kings10:11 Matu a mukalenga Irame avua maye ku Ofire, avua matuadile mukalenga Shelomu tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mitshi ya santale mipite bungi, ne mabue a mushinga mukole." 
1Kings10:12 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenza lutanda ne makunji a kueyemena ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne ku nzubu wende wa bukalenga, ne mitshi ya santale. Kuenzaye nayi kabidi bisanji ne nzenze, bua bantu bavua bimba misambu. Too ne mpindiewu, kabena banji kufika kabidi ne mitshi ya santale bungi ebu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele to." 
1Kings10:13 Mukalenga Shelomu kupesha mukalenga mukaji wa ku Saba, bintu bionsu bivuaye ukengela ne bivuaye ulomba. Kumupeshaye kabidi ne muoyi muimpe bintu bia kumusankisha nabi bivua mukalenga mukaji awu kayi mulombe to. Pashishe mukalenga mukaji ne bena mudimu bende bavuaye nabu, kupingana mu ditunga diabu." 
1Kings10:14 Ku tshidimu tshimue, tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshi wa mukalenga Shelomu mupete mu Yerushalayime tshivua kilo binunu makumi abidi." 
1Kings10:15 Tusakidile milambu ivuabu bapeta ku bintu bia ku matunga makuabu bivua bangenda mushinga babueje mu ditunga, ku bungenda mushinga bukuabu, ne ku bitadi bivuabu balambula kudi bakalenga ba bisamba bikuabu, nansha bivuabu bapeta kudi balongolodi ba maloba a mu ditunga." 
1Kings10:16 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenzeja ngabu minene nkama ibidi milamakaja ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. — Ngabu yonsu, uvua ukengela tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo isambombu. —" 
1Kings10:17 Uvua muenzeje kabidi ngabu mikese nkama isatu, milamakaje ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. — Ngabu yonsu uvua ukengela tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo umue ne tshitupa. — Shelomu kuteka ngabu yonsu ayi mu nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Ditu dia Lebanone.”" 
1Kings10:18 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenzeja nkuasa munene wa bukalenga mulengeja ne mibanga, mulamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
1Kings10:19 Bavua bateka nkuasa wa bukalenga awu pa tshibandilu tshivua ne bidiatshilu bisambombu. Uvua ne tshia kueyemina panyima tshienza dintonya. Nkuasa uvua kabidi ne maboku eku ne eku. Bavua bateke mpingu ya nyama ya ntambue, ewu ku luseke, mukuabu ku luseke lua nkuasa." 
1Kings10:20 Mpingu mikuabu ya nyama ya ntambue dikumi ne ibidi ivua ku bidiatshilu bia tshibandilu atshi: nyama isambombu ku dia balume, mikuabu isambombu ku dia bakaji. Kabavua banji kuenza nkuasa wa bukalenga wa mushindu ewu mu ditunga dikuabu to." 
1Kings10:21 Makopu a mukalenga Shelomu awu, avua anu a tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kabidi bintu bionsu bia kudila bivua mu nzubu uvuabu babikila ne: “Ditu dia Lebanone,” bivua anu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene. Kabavua benza bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole to. Bualu mu tshikondu tshia Shelomu, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole katshivua ne lumu." 
1Kings10:22 Mukalenga Shelomu uvua ne matu avuaye utuma mitantshi mile, musangu umue ne matu a mukalenga Irame. Pavua bidimu bisatu bipite, matu awu avua apingana mambule tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mibanga, nyama ya nkima, ne nyunyi ya mu matunga makuabu." 
1Kings10:23 Nanku, mukalenga Shelomu uvua mupite bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba, ku bubanji ne ku lungenyi." 
1Kings10:24 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumupe lungenyi lua bungi. Bantu bavua bafuma nseke yonsu, bua kuebeja Shelomu malu." 
1Kings10:25 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, bantu bonsu aba bavua bakadila Shelomu bintu bia kumusankisha nabi: bintu bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bilamba, bintu bia kuluangana nabi mvita, manananshi, nyama ya tubalu nansha ya mpunde." 
1Kings10:26 Shelomu kusangisha matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu. Uvua ne matempu a mvita tshinunu ne nkama inayi, ne nyama ya tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi. Kulamaye tshitupa tshia nyama ya tubalu ayi mu Yerushalayime. Nyama mikuabu kuyabanyabu mu bimenga bivua ne bikumbi Alongolola bua kuyiteka." 
1Kings10:27 Mu tshikondu tshia mukalenga Shelomu, mu Yerushalayime muvua nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole bungi bu nsoka. Muvua kabidi mitshi ya sedre ya bungi bu bua mitshi ya sikomore idi itoloka mu Mpata." 
1Kings10:28 Nyama ya tubalu ya Shelomu ivua ifumina ku Ejipitu ne ku Silisiya, miaba ivuabu baya kuyisumbila mukalenga Shelomu kudi bangenda mushinga." 
1Kings10:29 Ditempu dia mvita dimue dia mu Ejipitu, divua ne mushinga wa nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole nkama isambombu. Nyama wa kabalu umue, uvua ne mushinga wa nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole lukama ne makumi atanu. Bangenda mushinga aba, bavua basumbila kabidi bakalenga ba bena Iti ne ba bena Siriya bintu abi." 
1Kings11:1 Mukalenga Shelomu mumane kusela muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kuselaye kabidi bakaji ba bungi ba bisamba bikuabu: ba bena Mowabe, bena Amone, bena Edome, bena Sidone ne bena Iti." 
1Kings11:2 Kadi Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuambila bena Izrayele bua bisamba ebi ne: “Kanusedi bantu ba bisamba ebi to. Kanuitabi bua bantu ba bisamba ebi basele bana benu. Bualu badi mua kunuibidija bua nuenu kutendelela mvidie yabu. ” Kadi, Shelomu kuangata bakaji ba bisamba bikuabu abu, bualu uvua mubanange bikole." 
1Kings11:3 Uvua musele bakaji nkama muanda mutekete, bana ba bakalenga, ne bakaji bakuabu nkama isatu. Bakaji bonsu aba, bavua benzeja Shelomu muvuabu basue." 
1Kings11:4 Shelomu mumane kukola mukulakaje, bakaji aba kumuibidija mua kutendelelaye mvidie mikuabu. Shelomu katshivua munange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende ne muoyi mujima, bu muvua tatuende Davide mumunange to." 
1Kings11:5 Shelomu kutendelela Astarte, mvidie mukaji wa bena Sidone, ne Milkome, mvidie mubi wa bena Amone." 
1Kings11:6 Shelomu kufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda, bualu kavua umutumikila muende muonsu, bu muvua tatuende Davide wenza to." 
1Kings11:7 Tshikondu atshi, Shelomu kulongoluela Kemoshe, mvidie mubi wa bena Mowabe, muaba wa tshijila pa mukuna uvua mutangilangane ne Yerushalayime. Kulongololaye kabidi Milkome, mvidie mubi wa bena Amone, muaba wa tshijila." 
1Kings11:8 Kulongolaye kabidi miaba ya tshijila bua mvidie ya bakaji bende bonsu ba bisamba bikuabu, bua bakaji bende balambule mvidie ayi milambu ya manananshi, nansha ya nyama." 
1Kings11:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, uvua mumane kumuenekela Shelomu misangu ibidi, mumukandike ne: kuena mua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu to. Kadi, Shelomu kavua mutumikile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila to. Uvua mubenge Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kufikila Shelomu munda," 
1Kings11:10  
1Kings11:11 umuambila ne: — Bu muudi muenze nanku, kuyi munemeke ndondu utuvua batue nebe, nansha mikenji imvua mukuambile, ndi nkunyenga bukalenga, mbupesha muntu webe mukuabu." 
1Kings11:12 Kadi bualu bua tatuebe Davide, tshiena nkunyenga bukalenga pautshidi ne muoyi to. Nennyenge bukalenga kudi muanebe." 
1Kings11:13 Kadi, tshiena mmunyenge bukalenga buonsu to. Nemmushile tshisamba tshimue, anu bualu bua muntu wanyi Davide, ne bualu bua Yerushalayime tshimenga tshimvua musungule." 
1Kings11:14 Maweja-Nangila kutumina Shelomu muluishi, muena Edome. Dina diende divua Adade, muana wa ku ndelanganyi ya mu nzubu wa bukalenga bua bena Edome." 
1Kings11:15 Tshikondu tshivua Davide uluisha bena Edome, Yowabe, mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Davide, uvua muye ku Edome ne bena mvita, bua kujiika bitalu bia bena mvita ba bena Izrayele. Yowabe kushipesha nsongalume yonsu ya bena Edome, ne bantu balume bonsu." 
1Kings11:16 Yowabe ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu, kushala mu Edome ngondu isambombu, bua kushipa nsongalume, ne bantu balume bonsu." 
1Kings11:17 Tshikondu atshi, Adade utshivua anu nsongalume. Kunyemaye, kuya mu Ejipitu ne bena Edome bakuabu bavua bena mudimu ba tatuende." 
1Kings11:18 Kumukabu mu buloba bua bena Madiyane, kupitshilabu mu tshipela tshia Parane. Kuangatabu bantu bavua mu tshipela tshia Parane, kuya nabu mu Ejipitu kudi mukalenga wa ditunga. Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kupesha Adade nzubu ne maloba. Kumulayaye bua kumudisha." 
1Kings11:19 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kunanga nsongalume awu Adade bikole. Kumuseleshaye bukonde buende, muanabu ne Tapenese, mukajende mukalenga muadi." 
1Kings11:20 Nsongakaji awu, muanabu ne Tapenese, kulela muana wa balume ne bayende Adade. Dina dia muana awu Ngenubate. Tapenese kukoleshila muana awu anu mu nzubu mua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, munkatshi mua bana ba mukalenga." 
1Kings11:21 Patshivua Adade mu Ejipitu, kumvuaye lumu ne: Davide ne Yowabe, mfumu wa bena mvita bende, mbamane kufua. Adade kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: — Witabe, mpingane mu ditunga dianyi!" 
1Kings11:22 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kumukonka ne: — Tshiudi ujinga tshindi tshiyi mua kukupa ntshinyi? Udi musue kupingana mu ditunga diebe bua tshinyi? Awu kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena nkengela tshintu to. Kadi, anji kuitaba bua meme kuya!" 
1Kings11:23 Mvidi Mukulu kutumina Shelomu muluishi mukuabu. Dina diende divua Rezone, muana wa Eliyada. Rezone uvua munyeme kua mfumuende Adadezere, mukalenga wa Soba." 
1Kings11:24 Tshikondu tshivua Davide mushipe bena mvita ba Adadezere. Rezone uvua musangishe bena mvita, ubalombola. Kuyaye nabu, kusomba ku Damase, kuangataye bukalenga muaba awu." 
1Kings11:25 Nanku, Rezone uvua muluishi wa bena Izrayele matuku onsu avua Shelomu mushale mu bukalenga. Rezone uvua ukengesha Shelomu, anu muvua Adade uluisha bena Izrayele. Matuku onsu avua Rezone muikale mukalenga wa bena Siriya, kavua munange bena Izrayele to." 
1Kings11:26 Yerobowame kabidi uvua mutombokele mukalenga Shelomu mushindu ewu: Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua muena Efrayime wa mu musoku wa Sereda. Mamuende uvua mukaji mukamba, dina diende Seruya. Yerobowame uvua muena mudimu wa Shelomu. Kadi kumutombokelaye. Tshikondu tshivua Shelomu muwuje ne buloba muaba wa Milo, ulongoluesha miaba ivua mitubuke ku bimana bivua binyungulule Tshimenga tshia Davide," 
1Kings11:27  
1Kings11:28 Yerobowame uvua nsongalume wa mushinga mukole. Shelomu uvua mumone muvua Yerobowame wenza mudimu wende bimpe. Nanku kumusungulaye bua ikale utangila bena mudimu ba bena Efrayime ne bena Menashe. 
1Kings11:29 Dituku dikuabu, Yerobowame uvua umukila mu Yerushalayime. Mu njila, kusambakenaye ne muambi Akiya wa ku tshimenga tshia Silo. Bavua anu nkayabu babidi mu tshisuku. Muambi Akiya uvua mudiele tshinkutu tshipiatshipia pa makaya." 
1Kings11:30 Muambi Akiya kupanda tshinkutu atshi bipese dikumi ne bibidi. 
1Kings11:31 Pashishe kuambilaye Yerobowame ne: — Angata bipese bia tshinkutu etshi dikumi! Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi ukuambila ne: “Ne-nnyenge Shelomu bukalenga. Nenkupe wewe bisamba dikumi. 
1Kings11:32 Shelomu neashale anu ne tshisamba tshimue, bualu bua muntu wanyi Davide, ne bua Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshimuepela tshimvua mumane kusungula mu buloba bua bena Izrayele." 
1Kings11:33 Nengenze nanku, bualu bena Izrayele mbambenge. Badi batendelela Astarte, mvidie mukaji wa bena Sidone, Kemoshe mvidie wa bena Mowabe, ne Milkome, mvidie wa bena Amone. Kabena balonda njila umvua mubaleje to. Kabena bangenzela bimpe. Kabena batumikila meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimvua mubambile. Kabena babikumbaja bu muvuabu babikumbaja kudi Davide, tatuende wa Shelomu." 
1Kings11:34 Nanku, tshiena nnyenga Shelomu bukalenga bujima to. Nemmulame bu mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele matuku onsu atshidiye ne muoyi, anu bua muntu wanyi Davide umvua musungule, uvua utumikila ku meyi anyi ne ku mikenji yanyi." 
1Kings11:35 Nanku, nennyenge bukalenga anu kudi muana wa Shelomu. Nenkupeshe wewe Yerobowame bisamba dikumi." 
1Kings11:36 Kadi, nenshile muana wa Shelomu tshisamba tshimue, bua muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide ikale mu bukalenga kashidi, kumpala kuanyi mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshimvua mumane kusungula, bua bantu kuntendelelamu muaba wanyi wa tshijila." 
1Kings11:37 “Kadi, Yerobowame, ndi nkupa bukalenga buudi ujinga. Newikale mukalenga wa bisamba dikumi bia bena Izrayele." 
1Kings11:38 Wewe muteleje bionsu bingikala nkuambila, wewe mulonde njila ungikala nkuleja, wewe mungenzele bimpe, wewe mutumikile meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bingakupesha, bu muvua muntu wanyi Davide utumikila, nengikale nebe kashidi. Ndi nkulaya ne: ndelanganyi yebe neishale mu bukalenga kashidi anu bu mudi ndelanganyi ya Davide ishala mu bukalenga. Meme nenkupe bisamba bia bena Izrayele dikumi," 
1Kings11:39 bua meme kufuisha ndelanganyi ya Davide bundu. Kadi, tshiena mfuisha ndelanganyi ya Davide bundu kashidi to.”" 
1Kings11:40 Ke Shelomu kukeba muvuaye mua kushipa Yerobowame. Kadi Yerobowame kunyema kuya mu Ejipitu. Kuyaye kudi Shishake, mukalenga wa ditunga adi. Kushalaye mu Ejipitu too ne pakafua Shelomu." 
1Kings11:41 Malu makuabu a Shelomu bavua baafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi Shelomu muenze. Mu mukanda awu, badi bakula bua malu onsu adi Shelomu muenze, balejamu kabidi meji onsu avuaye nawu." 
1Kings11:42 Shelomu uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi anayi, ulombola bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele." 
1Kings11:43 Shelomu mumane kufua, kumujikabu pabuipi ne muaba uvuabu bajika tatuende, mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Robowame kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings12:1 Robowame kuya ku Shekeme, bualu ke muaba uvua bisamba bionsu bia ku mutu bifike bua kumubanjija mu bukalenga." 
1Kings12:2 Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua anu mu Ejipitu, muaba uvuaye munyeme mukalenga Shelomu. Yerobowame kumvua lumu lua tshisangilu tshia ku Shekeme, kadi uvua musue kushala muindile ku Ejipitu." 
1Kings12:3 Kumutuminabu bantu bua kumubikila. Yerobowame kufika ku Shekeme, pamue ne bantu bonsu ba bisamba bia ku mutu bavua badisangisha, kuambilabu Robowame ne:" 
1Kings12:4 — Tatuebe Shelomu uvua unkengesha bu bapika. Kadi mpinndiewu, wewe utukepeshile kakese dikenga edi, didi ditutonda bu mudi mutshi wa kuambula nawu bujitu utonda pa makaya, netukuenzele mudimu." 
1Kings12:5 Robowame kuandamuna ne: — Ndekelayi nganji kuela meji. Papita matuku asatu, nupingane kabidi bua kumonangana nanyi. Bantu bonsu kutangalaka." 
1Kings12:6 Mukalenga Robowame kuya kuebeja lungenyi kudi bakulu bavua tatuende Shelomu wenza nabu mudimu, patshivuaye ne muoyi. Robowame kubakonka ne: — Nudi numpesha lungenyi kaayi bua meme kuandamuna bantu aba?" 
1Kings12:7 Bakulu kuandamuna ne: — Wewe mubaleje muudi musue kuenzela bantu bebe mudimu, kuikala muntu wa bantu, wewe mubandamune meyi mimpe, nebikale bena mudimu bebe kashidi." 
1Kings12:8 Kadi, mukalenga Robowame kubenga lungenyi lua bakulu alu. Kuebejaye lungenyi kudi bansongalume, bena mulongu nende, bavuaye mukole nabu."
