1Kings12:9 Kubakonkaye ne: — Bena Izrayele badi bajinga bua meme kubakepeshila dikenga divuabu babakengesha kudi tatu wanyi Shelomu, bualu ndimane kubatonda bu mudi mutshi wa kuambula nawu bujitu utonda. Kadi nuenu nudi numpesha lungenyi kaayi bua meme kubandamuna?" 
1Kings12:10 Bansongalume, bena mulongu nende kumuandamuna ne: — Bantu abu badi banyingalala, bualu tatuebe Shelomu uvua ubakengesha bu bapika. Kabidi badi bakulomba bua wewe kubakepeshila dikenga adi. Nanku, ubandamune mushindu ewu: “Munu wanyi wa kantengenene mmunene mupite diboku dia tatu wanyi." 
1Kings12:11 Tatu wanyi mmunuambuishe bujitu ku mutshi wa kuambula nawu bujitu. Kadi meme, nensakidila bujitu bukuabu ku mutshi aku. Tatu wanyi uvua unukengesha, unutuuta mikaba bitekete. Kadi meme nennukengeshe, nnutuute mikaba misuika tukanu.”" 
1Kings12:12 Matuku asatu akumbana, Yerobowame ne bena Izrayele bonsu kuya kudi Robowame, bu nuwuaye mubalaye." 
1Kings12:13 Mukalenga Robowame mumane kubenga lungenyi luwabu bamupesha kudi bakulu, kuandamunaye bena Izrayele ne lonji," 
1Kings12:14 bilondeshile lungenyi luvuabu bamupesha kudi bansongalume, bena mulongu nende. Robowame kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Tatu wanyi uvua munuambuishe bujitu ku mutshi wa kuambula nawu bujitu. Kadi meme, nensakidila bujitu bukuabu ku mutshi aku. Tatu wanyi uvua unukengesha, unutuuta mikaba, kadi meme, nennukengeshe, nnutuute mikaba misuika misonsu." 
1Kings12:15 Nanku, mukalenga Robowame kavua muitabe dilomba dia bena Izrayele to. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua muenzeje bionsu abi, bua kukumbaja bualu buvuaye mumane kuambila muambi Akiya ku Silo bua kumanyishaye Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate." 
1Kings12:16 Bena Izrayele ba ku mutu, bamane kumvua ne: mukalenga Robowame kena muitabe dilomba diabu, kuandamunabu ne: — Davide katuena nende bualu, katuena basue kulonda muana wa Ishayi to! Bena Izrayele, tupinganayi ku nzubu yetu; wewe muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide, shala ne bukalenga buebe mpindiewu! Ke bena Izrayele kumuka muaba awu." 
1Kings12:17 Robowame kushala anu mukalenga wa bantu bavua mu buloba bua bena Yuda. 
1Kings12:18 Pashishe kutumaye Adorame kudi bena Izrayele ba ku mutu mu ditunga: Adorame uvua mulombodi wa midimu ya kulongolola ditunga. Kadi, bena Izrayele kuasa Adorame mabue, kumushipa. Nanku, Robowame kubandaye pa ditempu diende dia mvita, kunyema kuya mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings12:19 Ke muvua bisamba bia bena Izrayele bia ku mutu bibenga bumfumu bua bena nzubu wa Davide nanku. Bisamba ebi bitshidi anu bibubenga too ne mpindiewu. 
1Kings12:20 Bena Izrayele bonsu ba ku mutu, bamane kumvua lumu lua dipingana dia Yerobowame, kudisangisha nkayabu. Kubikidishabu Yerobowame mu tshisangilu atshi, kumusungula bua ikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Nanku, anu tshisamba tshia Yuda nkayatshi kushala kuitaba nzubu wa Davide." 
1Kings12:21 Anu Robowame upingana mu Yerushalayime, kusangishaye bena mvita binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu bavua bamanye mvita bikole, ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda ne tshia bena Binyamine. Uvua musue kuya kuluisha bena Izrayele bavua ku mutu mu ditunga, bua yeye muana wa Shelomu, ashale mukalenga wabu ku bukole." 
1Kings12:22 Kadi, Mvidi Mukulu kuyukila ne muambi Shemaya, umuambila ne:" 
1Kings12:23 — Uye kudi Robowame, muana wa Shelomu, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne kudi bena Yuda ne bena Binyamine bonsu, ubambile ne:" 
1Kings12:24 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Kanuyi kuluisha bana benu bena Izrayele nansha. Muntu yonsu wa kunudi apingane ku nzubu kuende. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mukumbaje bionsu bidi bienzeka ebi.” Robowame ne bena Yuda bumvue diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, kuitababu. Kupinganabu ku nzubu yabu." 
1Kings12:25 Yerobowame kukoleshisha tshimenga tshia Shekeme ne bimana, mu buloba bua mikuna bua Efrayime. Kusombaye mu tshimenga atshi. Pashishe, kumukaye mu Shekeme, bua kuya kukolesha kabidi tshimenga tshia Penuyele ne bimana." 
1Kings12:26 Yerobowame kudikonka, wamba ne: “Mushindu udi bulongolodi bua ditunga mpindiewu, bantu ba mu bukalenga buanyi badi mua kupingana kudi bena nzubu wa Davide." 
1Kings12:27 Bualu padibu baya mu Yerushalayime bua kulambula milambu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, mioyi yabu idi mua kupingana kudi mukalenga wabu wa kale Robowame, wa bena Yuda. Nanku nebanshipe, bua bashale ku bumfumu bua Robowame.”" 
1Kings12:28 Mukalenga Yerobowame kuela meji, ukeba tshia kuenza. Pashishe kuenzaye tuana tua ngombe tubidi tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kuambilaye bena Izrayele ne: — Nuvua nuya mu Yerushalayime misangu yonsu. Kadi mpindiewu kanuyi kabidi mu Yerushalayime to. Tangilayi Mvidi Mukulu wenu uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu udi muaba ewu." 
1Kings12:29 Yerobowame kuteka lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku Betele, lukuabu ku Dane." 
1Kings12:30 Nanku, Yerobowame kufikisha bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Bantu ba bungi kuya kushindikija lupingu luibidi too ne ku Dane." 
1Kings12:31 Yerobowame kuibaka nzubu ya tshijila pabuipi ne miaba mitumbuke kuabu batendelela mvidie kale. Kusungulaye bantu ba munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bua kuikalabu batuangaji. Bantu abu, kabavua ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Levi to." 
1Kings12:32 Yerobowame kujadika bua bikale benza tshibilu mu matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa muanda mukulu. Tshibilu atshi, tshivua mushindu umue ne tshivuabu benza mu buloba bua bena Yuda. Kabidi Yerobowame nkayende uvua ulambula milambu pa tshilambuilu. Ke tshivua Yerobowame wenza mu Betele. Uvua ulambuila mpingu ya tuana tua ngombe tuvuaye wenza milambu ayi. Batuangaji bakuabu bavuaye musungule bua kuenzabu mudimu miaba ya tshijila, uvua mubateke ne mu Betele amu." 
1Kings12:33 Mu matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa muanda mukulu, Yerobowame yeye nkayende uvua musungule dituku dia kuenza tshibilu ne bena Izrayele mu Betele. Munkatshi mua tshibilu, Yerobowame nkayende uvua ulambula milambu pa tshilambuilu tshivuaye muenze atshi." 
1Kings13:1 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kutuma muambi ufuma mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, uya ku Betele. Muambi awu ufika, kusanganaye Yerobowame osha mulambu pa tshilambuilu." 
1Kings13:2 Nanku, muambi kuela diyi divua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile, ubenga tshilambuilu atshi, wamba ne: — Tshilambuilu! Tshilambuilu! Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba! Nebalele muana wa balume mu nzubu wa Davide. Nebamuinyike ne: Yosiyase. Nanku, Yosiyase nealambule batuangaji badi bakuata mudimu miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, pambidi pebe wewe tshilambuilu, muaba uvuabu boshila milambu. Tshilambuilu, pambidi pebe, neboshilepu too ne mifuba ya bantu!" 
1Kings13:3 Muambi kuamba kabidi ne: — Tshilambuilu etshi netshiupuke, butu bua mafuta budipu nebumate panshi. Nanku, nenujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila ke uvua muakule." 
1Kings13:4 Mukalenga Yerobowame umvua bionsu bivua muambi wamba, muvuaye ubenga tshilambuilu atshi tshivua mu Betele, kuololaye diboku pa mutu pa tshilambuilu, wela diyi ne: — Kuatayi muntu ewu! Kadi, diboku diende kushala ditandabala, diuminyine, kayi ne mushindu wa kuditunya kabidi to." 
1Kings13:5 Anu musangu awu, tshilambuilu kupuka, butu bua mafuta buvua pa mutu patshi, kumata panshi, bilondeshile meyi avua muambi muambe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings13:6 Pashishe mukalenga Yerobowame kuambila muambi ne: — Ndi nkusengelela ne: utendakene Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe bua amfuileku luse, ampingajile diboku dianyi edi muadi mua kale. Muambi kulomba Maweja-Nangila, diboku dia mukalenga Yerobowame kupingana muadi mua kale." 
1Kings13:7 Pashishe, mukalenga Yerobowame kuambila muambi awu ne: — Tuye nebe ku nzubu kuanyi bua kudia. Pashishe, nenkupe tshintu tshia kukusankisha natshi." 
1Kings13:8 Kadi muambi kuandamuna mukalenga Yerobowame ne: — Nansha wewe mumpeshe tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bubanji buebe, tshiena mua kuya ku nzubu kuebe to. Muaba ewu, tshiena mua kudia kapese ka diampa, nansha kunua kamata ka mayi to." 
1Kings13:9 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua munkandike ne: “Kuena mua kudia, kuena mua kunua. Kabidi bua wewe kupinqana ku nzubu kuebe, uyile mu njila mukuabu. Kupinganyi mu njila uuvua muyile bua kufika ku Betele to.”" 
1Kings13:10 Nanku, muambi kupingena mu njila mukuabu, kulekela uvuaye muvuile." 
1Kings13:11 Kadi, mu Betele muvua muambi mukuabu mukulakaje. Bana ba muambi awu, kumuambila bionsu bivuabu benza mu Betele kudi muambi uvua mufume mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, kabidi bionsu bivua muambi awu muambile mukalenga Yerobowame." 
1Kings13:12 Tatuabu, kubakonka ne: — Muambi awu mmuyile njila kaayi? Bana bende kuya, kumona njila uvua muambi awu muyile." 
1Kings13:13 Pashishe tatuabu kubambila ne: — Ntekelayi biseba pa nyama wanyi wa mpunde! Bana bende kusuika biseba pa nyama wa mpunde, tatuabu kubanda pa nyama." 
1Kings13:14 Kulondaye njila uvua muambi mukuabu muyile. Kupetaye muambi awu, bualu uvua muikishe muinshi mua mutshi munene. Kumukonkaye ne: — Wewe ke muambi uvua mufume ku ditunga dia bena Yuda anyi? Muambi kuitaba ne: — Eyowa! Mmeme." 
1Kings13:15 Muambi wa kumpala kumuambila ne: — Tuye kuanyi bua kudia biakudia. 
1Kings13:16 Awu kubenga, wamba ne: — Tshiena mua kupingana nebe mu njila ewu kabidi to. Mu tshimenga atshi, tshiena mua kudia, tshiena mua kunua nebe." 
1Kings13:17 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua munkandike ne: “Pawafika, kuena mua kudia, kuena mua kunua. Kabidi, bua wewe kupingana ku nzubu kuebe, uyile njila mukuabu. Kupinganyi mu njila uuvua muyile to!”" 
1Kings13:18 Kadi, muambi mukulumpe kusuminyina bikole, wamba ne: — Meme kabidi ndi muambi bu wewe. Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua muakule nanyi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Uvua muntume bua tupingane nebe ku nzubu kuanyi bua wewe kudia ne kunua. Bulelela, uvua ushima bionsu ebi." 
1Kings13:19 Nanku, muambi uvua mufume ku ditunga dia bena Yuda, kupingana ku nzubu kuende bua kudia ne kunua." 
1Kings13:20 Kadi, pavua bambi abu bonsu babidi ku mesa, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi mukulumpe wa mu Betele," 
1Kings13:21 bua kumanyishaye muambi, uvua mufumine mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe udi mutombokele Maweja-Nangila, kuena munemeke diyi dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe divuaye mukuambile." 
1Kings13:22 Udi mupingane muaba ewu bua kudia ne kunua. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila uvua mukukandike ne: kuena mua kudia, kuena mua kunua. Bumuudi muenze nanku, neufue. Tshitalu tshiebe kabena mua kutshijika mu lukita lua bankambua bebe to.”" 
1Kings13:23 Bambi babidi abu bamane kujikija kudia ne kunua, muambi mukulumpe kusuika biseba pa nyama wa mpunde wa muambi wa ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
1Kings13:24 Awu kuya. Pavuaye mu njila, kusambakenaye ne nyama wa ntambue. Nyama awu kumushipa. Tshitalu tshia muambi kushala panshi mu njila. Kadi, nyama wa mpunde, ne nyama wa ntambue, kushala mimane, ewu ku luseke lua tshitalu, mukuabu ku luseke." 
1Kings13:25 Bantu bavua bapita, kumona tshitalu mu njila, ne nyama wa ntambue muimane ku luseke. Kuyabu kuamba bualu ebu mu tshimenga tshia Betele, muaba uvua muambi mukulumpe musombe." 
1Kings13:26 Muambi mukulumpe awu ke uvua mupingaje mu Betele muambi wa ku ditunga dia bena Yuda ukavua mu njila. Nanku, muambi mukulumpe awu umvua lumu lua lufu luende, kuambaye ne: — Tshitalu atshi, ntshia muambi wa ku ditunga dia bena Yuda. Yeye uvua mutombokele Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila mmutumine muambi nyama wa ntambue awu, bua kumuluishaye, kumushipa, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kumulaya." 
1Kings13:27 Ke muambi mukulumpe kuambila bana bende ba balume ne: — Nunsuikile biseba pa nyama wanyi wa mpunde. Bana bende kumusuikila biseba pa nyama wa mpunde. 
1Kings13:28 Muambi mukulumpe kuya. Kusanganaye tshitalu mu njila, ne nyama wa ntambue, ne nyama wa mpunde mimane, ewu ku luseke lua tshitalu, mukuabu ku luseke. Kadi, nyama wa ntambue kavua mudie tshitalu atshi to, kavua muluishe nyama wa mpunde to." 
1Kings13:29 Nanku, muambi mukulumpe kuambula tshitalu tshia muambi mukuabu atshi, kutshiteka pa nyama wa mpunde, kuya natshi mu Betele bua kutshijika, ne kuenza madilu." 
1Kings13:30 Kujiikaye tshitalu tshia muambi nende atshi mu lukita luende yeye. Bantu bonsu kudila muambi awu, bamba ne: “Eyi, muambi wetu mmufue!”" 
1Kings13:31 Bobu bamane kujiika tshitalu, muambi mukulumpe kuambila bana bende ne: — Meme mufue, nunjiike anu mu lukita lutudi bajiike muambi elu. Nuladike tshitalu tshianyi ku luseke lua tshiende." 
1Kings13:32 Bualu muambi ewu uvua muambe malu malelela mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Uvua mubenge tshilambuilu tshia mu Betele. Uvua mubenge kabidi nzubu yonsu ya kutendelela, idibu base mu bimenga bia Samariya. Nanku, bionsu bivua-ye muambe abi nebienzeke bulelela." 
1Kings13:33 Kadi, nansha bobu badimuja mukalenga Yerobowame, kavua mulekele buenzayi to. Uvua anu usungula bantu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bavua kabayi bena Levi, bua bikale batuangaji miaba ivuabu batendelela mvidie. Muntu yonsu uvua ujinga bua kuikala mutuangaji, bavua anu bamujidila. Nanku uvua ushala mutuangaji mu miaba ivuabu batendelela mvidie." 
1Kings13:34 Buenzayi bua Yerobowame abu kutampakana kudi bena nzubu wende bonsu. Ke pavua bena nzubu wa Yerobowame bafue, babutuke bonsu pa buloba." 
1Kings14:1 Tshikondu atshi, Abiya, muana wa Yerobowame, kutuadija kusama." 
1Kings14:2 Ke Yerobowame kuambila mukajende ne: — Udisokoke, uvuale bilamba bia mukaji mukuabu, bua bantu kabamanyi ne: udi mukajanyi to. Pashishe uya ku Silo, kudi muambi Akiya. Bualu muambi Akiya uvua mungambile ne: wewe Yerobowame neushale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings14:3 Umutuadile mampa dikumi, mikata, ne buitshi mu mulondu. Uye nabi kudiye. Yeye neakuambile patoke tshienzekela muanetu wa balume udi usama ewu." 
1Kings14:4 Mukaji wa Yerobowame, kuenza bionsu abi. Kuyaye ku Silo. Kufikaye ku nzubu kua muambi Akiya. Muambi Akiya uvua mumane kukola mukulakaje, katshiyi umona kabidi to." 
1Kings14:5 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kumumanyisha ne: — Mukaji wa Yerobowame neafike. Neikale mudileje bu mukaji mukuabu. Pafikaye, neakukonke bua muanende wa balume udi usama. Nanku, umuambile bionsu bindi mukuambile." 
1Kings14:6 Anu muambi Akiya umvua mikuma mu tshiibi tshiende, kuelaye diyi ne: — Muena kua Yerobowame, buelaku! Kadi, udi mudisokoke, udileja bu mukaji mukuabu bua tshinyi? Nansha wewe muenze nanku, ndi nkuambila bualu bua dibungama." 
1Kings14:7 Pingana kudi Yerobowame, umuambile ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Wewe udi bu bena Izrayele bonsu. Kadi meme kukusungula munkatshi mua bena Izrayele bua kuikala mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
1Kings14:8 Meme kunyenga bukalenga kudi bena nzubu wa Davide, bua kukupabu wewe. Kadi, wewe kuena muenze muvua muntu wanyi Davide wenza to. Davide uvua utumikila meyi anyi. Uvua ungenzela mudimu ne muoyi mujima, kayi umfikisha munda to." 
1Kings14:9 Wewe udi muenze bibi, mupite bonsu bavua bakudianjidile mu bukalenga. Udi mumfikishe munda, bualu udi musonge mpingu ya mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu. Ke paudi mumbenge meme Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings14:10 Nanku, nennyoke bena nzubu webe. Nembutule bena diku diebe bonsu: bana ne bantu bakulumpe. Nembutule bena nzubu bebe bonsu, anu bu mudibu bimansha bintu ku dyala ne lukombu." 
1Kings14:11 Pikala muntu wa mu nzubu muebe mufuile mu tshimenga, nebadie tshitalu tshiende kudi mbua. Pikalaye mufuile mu tshisuku, nebatshizokole kudi nyunyi ya mikanku.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
1Kings14:12 Muambi Akiya kumuambila kabidi ne: — Nanku, wewe muena kua Yerobowame, pingana ku nzubu kuebe. Kadi, anu pawafika mu tshimenga, diba adi, muanebe neashishe kufua." 
1Kings14:13 Bena Izrayele bonsu nebamujiike, nebenze madilu ende. Ku ndelanganyi yonsu ya Yerobowame, anu muana awu nkayende nebamujiike mu lukita. Bualu mu nzubu wa Yerobowame muonsu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, mmusanganemu anu muana awu umusankisha." 
1Kings14:14 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila, neasungule mukalenga mupiamupia wa bena Izrayele. Mukalenga awu, neabutule bena diku dia Yerobowame. (Ndi ngamba ne: bualu ebu nebuenzeke anu lelu! )" 
1Kings14:15 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila neanyoke bena Izrayele. Nebazakale bu bisosa bidi ku muelelu wa mayi. Maweja-Nangila neumushe bena Izrayele mu buloba ebu buimpe buvuaye mumane kupesha bankambua babu. Neabatangalaje dishiya dia musulu wa Perate wa bena Babilone. Bena Izrayele nebakenge nenku, bualu bavua benza makunji a kutendelela mvidie bua kufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda." 
1Kings14:16 Maweja-Nangila nealekele bena Izrayele, bualu Yerobowame mmuenze bibi, kabidi mmufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
1Kings14:17 Muena kua Yerobowame kupingana mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa. Ufika anu ku nzubu kuende, muana kufua." 
1Kings14:18 Kumujiikabu. Bena Izrayele bonsu kuenza madilu a muana awu, bu muvua Akiya muambe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings14:19 Malu makuabu a Yerobowame adi mafunda mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda awu, mbafundemu mvita idi Yerobowame muluangane, ne mushindu uvuaye muenze mudimu wa bukalenga." 
1Kings14:20 Yerobowame mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi, kufuaye. Muanende wa balume Nadabe kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings14:21 Robowame, muana uvua Shelomu mulele ne mukaji Naama wa bena Amone, uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, muikala ne bidimu makumi anayi ne tshimue. Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete. Tshimenga atshi, ke tshivua Maweja-Nangila musungule mu buloba bujima bua kudilejamu kudi bantu bende." 
1Kings14:22 Bena Yuda kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Maweja-Nangila uvua ne tshiji, bualu bavua benza malu mapite bubi ku avuabu benza kudi bankambua babu." 
1Kings14:23 Bena Yuda kabidi bavua bibake miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, bibake bibumba bia mabue, bibake kabidi makunji a kutendelela mvidie ku nsongu ya mikuna yonsu, ne muinshi mua mitshi ivua ne dileji dia bungi." 
1Kings14:24 Kabidi, balume ne bakaji ba mu ditunga adi dia bena Yuda bavua benda tshiendenda mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu. Mu tshikosu, bena Yuda bavua benza malu mabi onsu, avuabu benza kudi bena bisamba bivua Maweja-Nangila muipate, bua bashile bena Izrayele muaba." 
1Kings14:25 Mu tshidimu tshitanu tshivua Robowame mu bukalenga, mukalenga Shishake wa bena Ejipitu kufika bua kuluisha bena mu Yerushalayime." 
1Kings14:26 Kupawulabu bintu bimpe bionsu bivua mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ne bivua mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kuangataye bintu abi bionsu, nangananga ngabu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivua Shelomu muenze." 
1Kings14:27 Pashishe, mukalenga Robowame kuenzeja ngabu mikuabu ya tshiamu tshikunze ya kupingaja pa kuabu bangata ayi. Ngabu ayi, Robowame kuyipesha bamfumu ba bena mvita, bavua balame biibi bia nzubu wa bukalenga." 
1Kings14:28 Nanku, misangu yonsu ivua mukalenga Robowame ubuela mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, bena mvita bavua balame ku biibi abi, bavua bambula ngabu ayi, pashishe, bayipingaja anu muaba uvuabu basombe bua kulama biibi." 
1Kings14:29 Malu makuabu a Robowame mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. 
1Kings14:30 Robowame uvua uluangana mvita ne Yerobowame misangu yonsu. 
1Kings14:31 Robowame mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diende, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Mamuende wa Robowame uvua muena Amone, dina diende Naama. Abiyame, muana wa balume wa Robowame, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings15:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshivua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, mu bukalenga bua Izrayele, Abiyame kupeta bukalenga mu Yuda." 
1Kings15:2 Kushalaye mukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu bisatu. Dina dia mamuende divua Maaka, muana wa Abishalome." 
1Kings15:3 Abiyame kuenza kabidi buenzayi anu bu bua tatuende Robowame. Kavua muenze malu mimpe, avua nkambua wende Davide muenze to. Kawa munange Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende ne muoyi mujima to." 
1Kings15:4 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende uvua anu mumupeshe muana wa balume, uvua mua kumupingana mu bukalenga, bua bena nzubu wa Davide, kabumuki bonsu mu bukalenga to, kabidi bua Yerushalayime ashale tshimenga tshia bukalenga. Maweja-Nangila uvua wenzela nanku, anu bualu bua Davide," 
1Kings15:5 uvua muenze malu mimpe avua asankisha Maweja-Nangila. Davide kavua mubenge kutumikila ku diyi dia Maweja-Nangila nansha dimue to. Bubi bua Davide buvua anu buvuaye muenzele Uriye, muena Iti." 
1Kings15:6 Robowame uvua uluangana mvita matuku onsu ne Yerobowame. 
1Kings15:7 Bavua bafunde malu makuabu a Abiyame mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Abiyame kabidi uvua uluangana ne Yerobowame. 
1Kings15:8 Yeye mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Asa, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings15:9 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi tshivua Yerobowame mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, Asa kupeta bukalenga mu bena Yuda." 
1Kings15:10 Nanku, Asa kushala mukalenga mu Yerushalayime, bidimu makumi anayi ne tshimue. Kakuende wa Asa uvua Maaka, muana wa Abishalome." 
1Kings15:11 Asa kuenza malu mimpe avua asankisha Maweja-Nangila, muvua kakuende Davide muenze." 
1Kings15:12 Kuipataye mu ditunga balume ne bakaji bavua benda tshiendenda mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu. Kumushaye mpingu yonsu ya kutendelela mvidie ivua bankambua bende benza. 
1Kings15:13 Asa kukandikaye bantu bua kababikidi kakuende Maaka ne: “Mukalenga muadi,” bualu Maaka uvua mupete meji mabi a kuenza lupingu lua mvidie mukaji Ashera. Asa kutuma diyi bua banyangakaje lupingu alu, baloshile ku muelelu wa musulu wa Sedrone." 
1Kings15:14 Bushuwa, Asa uvua munange Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi wende mujima, kadi kavua munyangakaje miaba ivua bantu batendelela mvidie to." 
1Kings15:15 Uvua ubueja mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila milambu ivuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila kudi tatuende Abiyame, ne ivuaye mulambule yeye mene. Milambu ayi ivua ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne ya bintu bikuabu bishilangane." 
1Kings15:16 Asa uvua uluangana mvita matuku onsu ne Basha, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings15:17 Dituku dikuabu, Basha kuya kuluisha ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kutuadija kuibaka bimana bikole mu musoku wa Rama, bua Asa ne bena Yuda kabendakanyi luseke alu mudibu basue." 
1Kings15:18 Diba adi, Asa kupesha balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mapwungi, bivua bishala ne mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Uvua mutume, balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ku Damase ne bintu abi, bua baye kupesha mukalenga wa bena Siriya, Benadade, muana wa Tabrimone, kabidi muikulu wa Eziyone. Uvua mubatume kabidi bua bambila Benadade ne:" 
1Kings15:19 “Tutue nebe ndondu bu muvua batatuetu batue. Ke pandi nkutumina tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi bua kukusankisha. Nanku, uye kushipa ndondu uuvua mutue ne Basha, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua Basha umushe bena mvita bende badi mu buloba buanyi.”" 
1Kings15:20 Benadade kuitaba dilomba dia Asa. Kutumaye bamfumu balombodi ba bena mvita bende bua kuluisha bimenga bia bena Izrayele. Bena mvita abu kukuata bimenga ebi: Yone, Dane, Abele-Bete-Maaka, buloba bua Kinerete, ne buloba bua Naftali buvua bushala." 
1Kings15:21 Basha umvua lumu alu, kulekelaye mudimu wa kuibaka bimana bikole mu musoku wa Rama. Kupinganaye mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa." 
1Kings15:22 Mukalenga Asa kubikidisha bena Yuda bonsu, kakuyi kushala muntu. Bena Yuda kuambula mabue onsu ne mabaya manene, bivua Basha munguje bua kuibaka nabi bimana bia musoku wa Rama. Kuibakabu nabi bimana bia musoku wa Ngeba wa Binyamine ne bia musoku wa Mispa, bu muvua mukalenga Asa muambe." 
1Kings15:23 Bavua bafunda malu makuabu a Asa mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Mu mukanda awu, mbafundemu malu onsu avua Asa muenze, baleja ne dikima divuaye nadi, kabidi ne bimenga bivuaye muibake ne bimana bikole. Asa mumane kukulakaja, kuwulaye makasa." 
1Kings15:24 Yeye mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diende, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Yosafate kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings15:25 Mu tshidimu tshibidi tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Nadabe, muana wa Yerobowame, kudia bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi." 
1Kings15:26 Uvua muenze bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua muenze malu anu bu tatuende, uvua ufikisha bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Nadabe uvua muenze malu mabi onsu avua tatuende muenze." 
1Kings15:27 Ke Basha, muana wa Akiya, muena tshisamba tshia Isakare, kuelela Nadabe tshifufu tshibi. Bena Peleshete bavua bamane kukuata tshimenga tshia Ngibetone. Dibadivua Nadabe ne bena mvita baluisha tshimenga atshi, Basha kushipa mukalenga Nadabe." 
1Kings15:28 Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka mu tshidimu tshisatu tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Basha kuangata bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. 
1Kings15:29 Anu ubuela mu bukalenga, kushipeshaye bena nzubu wa Yerobowame bonsu. Kawa mushiye muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Yerobowame nansha umue ne muoyi. Kubabutulaye bonsu bu muvua muambi Akiya, uvua ku Silo, muambile bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings15:30 Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka bualu Yerobowame uvua muenze bibi, mufikishe kabidi bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Bualu ebu buvua bufikisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, munda bikole." 
1Kings15:31 Malu makuabu a Nadabe, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza." 
1Kings15:32 Asa uvua uluangana mvita matuku onsu ne Basha, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings15:33 Nanku, mu tshidimu tshisatu tshivua Asa mu bukalenga mu Yuda, Basha, muana wa Akiya, kubuelaye mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. Basha kushala mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa bidimu makumi abidi ne binayi." 
1Kings15:34 Kadi, kuenzaye malu mabi avua Maweja-Nangila kayi musue to. Kuenzaye malu mabi bu muvua Yerobowame muenze, mufikishe ne bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Uvua muenze malu mabi avua Yerobowame muenze." 
1Kings16:1 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Yehu, muana wa Anani, bua kumanyishaye Basha ne:" 
1Kings16:2 — Wewe Basha uvua muntu tshianana. Meme kukusungula munkatshi mua bantu banyi bena Izrayele bua wewe kushala mukalenga wabu. Kadi, udi muenze malu mabi bu muvuabu benza kudi Yerobowame. Udi mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Nanku, bena Izrayele mbamfikishe munda bua bubi buabu." 
1Kings16:3 Ke pandi musue kunubutula ne bena nzubu webe bonsu. Nennubutule bu mumvua mubutule bena nzubu wa Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate." 
1Kings16:4 Pikala muntu wa mu nzubu muebe mufuile mu tshimenga, nebadie tshitalu tshiende kudi mbua. Kadi yeye mufuile mu tshisuku, nebazokole tshitalu tshiende kudi nyunyi ya mikanku." 
1Kings16:5 Malu makuabu a Basha, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Mu mukanda emu, mbafundemu malu onsu avua Basha muenze, baleja kabidi ne bukitu buvuaye nabu." 
1Kings16:6 Basha mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa. Muanende wa balume Ela kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings16:7 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile muambi Yehu, muana wa Anani, bua amanyishe Basha ne bena nzubu malu aa, anu bua buenzayi buabu. Basha ne bena nzubu wende bavua benza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, bualu bavua benza malu mabi anu bu muvua Yerobowame ne bena nzubu wende benza. Uvua mushipeshe kabidi ndelanganyi ya Yerobowame yonsu." 
1Kings16:8 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne tshisambombu tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Ela, muana wa Basha, kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. Ela kushala mukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa bidimu bibidi." 
1Kings16:9 Zimri, mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Ela, uvua ulombola tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bena mvita bavua ne matempu a mvita, kuelelaye Ela tshifufu tshibi. Pavua mukalenga Ela mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa, unua maluvu, kukuatshikaye mu nzubu mua Arsa, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga," 
1Kings16:10 Zimri kubuela mu nzubu amu, kumushipa. Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Zimri kuangata bukalenga." 
1Kings16:11 Amu ubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, kushipaye bena nzubu wa Basha bonsu. Kena mushiye nansha muntu umue ne muoyi to. Uvua mushipe bana ne bantu bakulumpe bonsu ba mu nzubu wa Basha, ne bantu bonsu bavua batue ku tshia Basha." 
1Kings16:12 Nanku, Zimri uvua mubutule bena nzubu wa Basha bonsu, bu muvua muambi Yehu muambile bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings16:13 Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka, bualu Basha ne muanende Ela bavua benza bibi. Bavua bafikisha kabidi bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, uvua mufike munda bua mvidie ivuabu batendelela." 
1Kings16:14 Malu makuabu a Ela, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza." 
1Kings16:15 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Zimri kuangata bukalenga mu Izrayele. Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa matuku muanda mutekete. Diba adi, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, bavua baluisha bena Ngibetone, tshimenga tshivua bena Peleshete bakuate." 
1Kings16:16 Bena mvita kumvua lumu ne: Zimri mmuelele mukalenga Ela tshifufu tshibi, mmumane kumushipa. Diakamue bena mvita bonsu bavua mu mitanda kumvuangana muaba awu, kusungula Omri, mulombodi wa bena mvita, bua kushalaye mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings16:17 Nanku, Omri ne bena mvita bavuaye nabu, kumuka mu tshimenga tshia Ngibetone, kuya kuluisha tshimenga tshia Tirsa." 
1Kings16:18 Zimri umona ne: mbamane kukuata tshimenga tshia Tirsa, kunyemenaye mu tshibambalu tshikuabu tshia nzubu wa bukalenga. Kutuaye kapia ku tshibambalu atshi, kufuaye mu kapia." 
1Kings16:19 Bionsu ebi, bivua bienzeka bualu Zimri uvua muenze bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua muenze buenzayi, anu bu muvua Yerobowame muenze, mufikishe kabidi bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
1Kings16:20 Malu makuabu a Zimri, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda amu, badi balonda kabidi tshifufu tshibi tshivua Zimri muele." 
1Kings16:21 Zimri mumane kufua, bena Izrayele kukosoloka bitupa bibidi: aba basue kusungula Tibni, muana wa Nginate, bua kuikalaye mukalenga, bakuabu basue kusungula Omri." 
1Kings16:22 Kadi bantu bavua ku luseke lua Omri kutshimuna bantu bavua ku luseke lua Tibni, muana wa Nginate. Tibni kufua. Omri kushala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings16:23 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshimue tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Omri kuangata bukalenga mu Izrayele bua bidimu dikumi ne bibidi. Bangabanga uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa, bidimu bisambombu." 
1Kings16:24 Pashishe, kuyaye kusumba mukuna wa Samariya kudi Semere. Uvua muusumbe ku nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole binunu bisambombu. Omri kuasa tshimenga pa mukuna awu. Kuinyikaye tshimenga atshi dina dia Samariya, bilondeshile dina dia Semere, uvua muena mukuna awu." 
1Kings16:25 Kadi, Omri kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua muenze bibi mupite bakalenga bonsu bavua bamudianjidile mu bukalenga." 
1Kings16:26 Uvua muenze buenzavi anu bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, uvua mufike munda bua mvidie ivuabu batendelela." 
1Kings16:27 Malu makuabu a Omri, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda amu, mbafundemu malu onsu adi Omri muenze, baleja kabidi ne bukitu buvuaye nabu." 
1Kings16:28 Omri mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu tshimenga tshia Samariya. Muanende wa balume Akabe kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings16:29 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Akabe, muana wa Omri, kupiana bukalenga mu Izrayele. Akabe kushala mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Samariya, bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
1Kings16:30 Kadi, uvua wenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua muenze bibi mupite bakalenga bonsu bavua bamudianjidile mu bukalenga." 
1Kings16:31 Kawa muenze anu malu mabi bu avua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate muenze to. Uvua musele kabidi Yezabele, muana wa Etbale, mukalenga wa bena Sidone. Uvua uyakukukuila kabidi mvidie Baale, umutendelela." 
1Kings16:32 Kuibakilaye mvidie Baale nzubu wa ditendelela mu tshimenga tshia Samariya amu. Kuasaye tshilambuilu mu nzubu amu bua kulambuilamu Baale milambu. 
1Kings16:33 Kuasaye momu kabidi dikunji bua kutendelela Astarte, mvidie mukaji. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kufika munda bua bionsu bivua Akabe muenze abi. Nanku, Akabe uvua muenze bibi mupite bakalenga bonsu bavua bamudianjidile mu bukalenga." 
1Kings16:34 Tshikondu atshi, muntu mukuabu wa mu tshimenga tshia Betele, diende Iyele, kuibakulula tshimenga tshia Yeriko. Kadi bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Yoshuwa, muana wa Nune, kukumbanabi: pavuabu benza tshitaku tshia tshimenga tshia Yeriko, Abirame, muana wa balume, muanabute wa Iyele kufua; pavuabu bela biibi bia tshimenga atshi, Segube, muanende wa balume muana mukala kufua." 
1Kings17:1 Muambi Eliya uvua mu musoku wa Tishebe, mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Kuambilaye mukalenga Akabe ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele undi ngenzela mudimu, ndi ngamba ne: “Bidimu bidi kumpala ebi, lumuma kaluena mua kumata kabidi, mvula kena mua kuloka, amu meme mumulombe. ”" 
1Kings17:2 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi ne:" 
1Kings17:3 — Umuka muaba ewu, uye luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Uye kusomba pabuipi ne musulu wa Kerite, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene." 
1Kings17:4 Muaba awu, newikale unua mayi a musulu. Nentume kabidi nyunyi ya bikololu bua kukutuadila biakudia." 
1Kings17:5 Eliya kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kuyaye kusomba pabuipi ne musulu wa Kerite. 
1Kings17:6 Nyunyi ya bikololu ivua imutuadila mampa ne munyinyi matuku onsu dinda ne dilolu. Uvua unua anu mayi a musulu awu. 
1Kings17:7 Matuku makuabu mamane kupita, musulu kuuma, bualu mwla katshivua uloka mu ditunga adi to." 
1Kings17:8 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Eliya ne: 
1Kings17:9 — Juka, uye kusomba mu tshimenga tshia Sarepta, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Sidone. Meme ndi mumane kutuma diyi bua mukaji mukamba wa mu tshimenga atshi, kukupeshaye biakudia." 
1Kings17:10 Eliya kuya mu Sarepta. Yeye mumane kufika ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga, kumonaye mukaji mukamba wangula nkunyi. Eliya kumubikila, umuambila ne: — Umpeshe mayi makese a kunua bu wewe musue." 
1Kings17:11 Mukaji kuya bua kumuangatshila mayi. Kadi, muambi Eliya kumubikila kabidi, umuambila ne: — Untuadileku ne tshipese tshia diampa." 
1Kings17:12 Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: tshiena ne diampa to. Ndi mushale anu ne dianza dia bukula mu mulondu, ne mafuta makese mu kasu. Ndi mufike muaba ewu bua kuangula tukunyi, bua kuya kulamba biakudia bidi bishala abi, bua meme kudia ne muananyi wa balume. Patuadia biakudia abi netufue, bualu katuena ne bikuabu to." 
1Kings17:13 Muambi Eliya kumuambila ne: — Kutshinyi to. Uye kuenza bu muudi wamba amu. Kadi, bangabanga ungenzele meme diampa dikese, umpeshe. Pashishe, wenza diampa diebe wewe ne dia muanebe." 
1Kings17:14 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Bukula kabuena bujika mu mulondu, mafuta kaena ajika mu kasu,” too ne padi Maweja-Nangila ulokesha mvula pa buloba." 
1Kings17:15 Mukaji kuya kuenza muvua muambi Eliya mumuambile. Kupetabu biakudia bikumbane bua kudiabu matuku a bungi kudi mukaji awu, muanende wa balume, ne muambi Eliya." 
1Kings17:16 Bukula kabuvua bujika mu mulondu, mafuta kaavua majika mu kasu to, anu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile muambi Eliya." 
1Kings17:17 Matuku makuabu mamane kupita, muana wa mukaji mukamba uvua muakidile muambi Eliya ku nzubu kuende awu, kutuadija kusama. Disama kukola, muana kufua." 
1Kings17:18 Mamuende wa muana kukonka muambi Eliya ne: — Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi mungenzele nenku bua tshinyi? Udi mufike muaba ewu bua wewe kuvuluija Maweja-Nangila buenzayi bundi muenze, bua Maweja-Nangila kushipa muananyi anyi?" 
1Kings17:19 Muambi kumulomba ne: — Mpeshaku muanebe awu! Mukaji uvua muambule muanende awu. Muambi Eliya kumuangata. Kubandaye nende mu nzubu wa tshilala kulu, mu tshibambalu tshivuaye yeye muambi Eliya ulala. Kuladikaye muana pa bulalu abu." 
1Kings17:20 Pashishe, muambi Eliya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mukaji mukamba ewu, uvua mungakidile ku nzubu kuende. Kadi, udi ufuisha muanende wa balume, bua kumukengesha nenku bua tshinyi?" 
1Kings17:21 Ke muambi Eliya kudiolola pambidi pa muana misangu isatu, utendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nkusengelela ne: ubishe muana ewu ku lufu." 
1Kings17:22 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba dia muambi Eliya. Kubishaye muana awu ku lufu. Muana kutuadija kupuyakana. 
1Kings17:23 Muambi Eliya kuambula muana. Kutulukaye nende panshi. Kumupingajaye kudi mamuende, umuambila ne: — Tangila muanebe, udi ne muoyi!" 
1Kings17:24 Mukaji kumuambila ne: — Mpindiewu ndi njadika ne: wewe udi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne: udi wakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila bulelela." 
1Kings18:1 Matuku a bungi mamane kupita, munkatshi mua tshidimu tshisatu tshia munanga, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Eliya ne: — Uye kudi mukalenga Akabe, umuambila ne: Meme Maweja-Nangila nendokeshe mvula pa buloba buvua bumisha kudi munanga." 
1Kings18:2 Muambi Eliya kuya kumonangana ne mukalenga Akabe. Mu tshimenga tshia Samariya tshiyole tshia nzala tshivua tshipite bukole. 
1Kings18:3 Akabe uvua mubikile Obadya, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga. Obadya uvua muitabe Maweja-Nangila muende muonsu." 
1Kings18:4 Pavua mukalenga mukaji Yezabele mushipeshe bambi ba Maweja-Nangila, Obadya uvua mupandishe bambi lukama, mubasokoke mu mbuebue: emu makumi atanu, emu makumi atanu. Mu mbuebue amu, Obadya uvua ubabadila biakudia ne mayi a kunua." 
1Kings18:5 Mukalenga Akabe kuambila Obadya ne: — Ufike, tuye mu ditunga dijima, bendakane ku mpokolu ya mayi yonsu ne ku misulu yonsu, ne tudi mua kupeta bisosa bia kudisha nyama ya tubalu ne mpunde. Nanku, katuakuikala ne tshilumbu tshia kushipa nyama yetu to." 
1Kings18:6 Kusanganabu maloba a mu ditunga adi, avua yonsu wa kudibu ne bua kuya kukeba bisosa bia nyama. Akabe kuya luseke lumue, Obadya ku luseke lukuabu." 
1Kings18:7 Obadya ufika mu njila, diakamue kusambakenaye ne muambi Eliya. Obadya kumanya muambi Eliya. Kuinyikaye mutu panshi bikole kumpala kua muambi Eliya, umukonka ne: — Ewu mmukalenga wanyi Eliya anyi?" 
1Kings18:8 Muambi Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa mmeme. Uye kuambila mfumuebe Akabe ne: “Muambi Eliya wafiki.” 
1Kings18:9 Obadya kukonka muambi Eliya ne: — Paudi umfila mu bianza bia Akabe, ndi mukuenzele bualu bubi kaayi? Udi untuma bua meme kufua!" 
1Kings18:10 Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: mfumuanyi Akabe mmutume bantu mu bisamba bionsu ne mu makalenga onsu bua kukukebabu. Pavua bamfumu ba matunga bamba ne: “Muambi Eliya kena kuetu to,” bavua ne bua kuditshipa bua kujadika ne: kabena bakumona to." 
1Kings18:11 Mpindiewu udi untuma bua meme kuya kumanyisha mfumuanyi Akabe ne: “Muambi wafiki!” 
1Kings18:12 Kadi, patuikala bashiyangana nebe, Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila neuye nebe muaba mukuabu undi tshiyi mumanye. Pangikala mumane kuambila Akabe ne: muambi Eliya wafiki, pikalabu kabayi bakumona, nebanshipe! Meme Obadya ndi ngitaba Maweja-Nangila muanyi muonsu, biangatshile ku buana buanyi." 
1Kings18:13 Mukalenga wanyi Eliya, kabena bakuambila tshimvua muenze pavua mukalenga mukaji Yezabele ushipesha bambi ba Maweja-Nangila anyi? Kabena bakuambila mumvua musokoke bambi lukama mu mbuebue: emu makumi atanu, emu makumi atanu, mbapesha biakudia ne mayi a kunua anyi?" 
1Kings18:14 Mpindiewu, udi untuma bua meme kuya kumanyisha mfumuanyi Akabe ne: “Muambi Eliya wafiki!” Yeye neanshipe." 
1Kings18:15 Muambi Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, undi nkuatshila mudimu, ndi nkujadikila ne: lelu netumonangane ne Akabe." 
1Kings18:16 Nanku, Obadya kuya kuambila Akabe bionsu abi. Akabe kuya bua kusambakena ne muambi Eliya." 
1Kings18:17 Anu Akabe umona muambi Eliya, kumuambilaye ne: — Wewe ke udi ukengesha bena Izrayele!" 
1Kings18:18 Muambi Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Meme tshiena nkengesha bena Izrayele to, kadi anu wewe ne bena diku diebe. Bualu nudi babenga kutumikila mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Nudi nutendelela mvidie Baale." 
1Kings18:19 Kadi, mpindiewu, utume bantu, basangishe bena Izrayele bonsu, bafike muaba undi ewu ku mukuna wa Karmele. Ubikidishe bambi ba mvidie Baale nkama inayi ne makumi atanu, ne bambi ba mvidie mukaji Ashera nkama inayi, badi mukalenga mukaji Yezabele udisha." 
1Kings18:20 Akabe kubikidisha bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, ne bambi bonsu, ku mukuna wa Karmele. Bantu bonsu bamane kubilangana," 
1Kings18:21 Eliya kusemena kumpala kua bena Izrayele bonsu, ubakonka ne: — Nenulekele kutendelela bakalenga babidi, dikasa mu mayi, dikuabu ku mukuna, diba kaayi? Padi Maweja-Nangila muikale Mvidi Mukulu bulelela, nutendelele Maweja-Nangila! Kadi, padi Baale muikale Mvidi Mukulu bulelela, nutendelele Baale! Muntu nansha umue kena muandamune to." 
1Kings18:22 Ke Eliya kubambila kabidi ne: — Meme ndi mushale muambi wa Maweja-Nangila anu nkayanyi. Kadi, bambi ba Baale badi nkama inayi ne makumi atanu." 
1Kings18:23 Batupeshe ngombe milume ibidi. Bambi ba Baale nebasungule ngombe umue, bamusaye, bamuteke pa nkunyi bua kumulambula. Kadi, kabatemeshi kapia to. Meme nensaye ngombe mukuabu, mmuteke pa nkunyi. Tshiena ntemesha kapia to." 
1Kings18:24 Bambi ba Baale nebalombe mvidie wabu, meme nendombe Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu witaba ku malomba, watemesha kapia, asangane Mvidi Mukulu mulelela kuenza anyi? Bantu bonsu ne: — Enzee." 
1Kings18:25 Ke muambi Eliya kuambila bambi ba Baale ne: — Bu munudi ba bungi, nudianjile kusungula ngombe, numusaye. Pashishe, nulombe mvidie wenu. Kadi kanutemeshi kapia to." 
1Kings18:26 Bambi ba Baale, kuangata ngombe uvuabu babapesha. Kulongololabu mulambu. Pashishe, kulombabu kapia kudi Baale biangatshile ku dinda too ne munda munya, bamba ne: “Mvidie Baale wetu utuitabe!” Bavua baja maja, banyunguluke tshilambuilu tshivuabu bibake. Kadi, mvidie Baale kena mubandamune diyi nansha dimue to." 
1Kings18:27 Munda munya, muambi Eliya kutuadija kubaseka, wamba ne: — Nukoleshe diyi! Bualu yeye mvidie, udi mua kuikala ne mudimu wa bungi. Udi mua kuikala muye kusesuka. Udi mua kuikala muye ku luendu. Misangu mikuabu udi mua kuikala mulale. Mbimpe kumubisha." 
1Kings18:28 Bambi ba Baale kuela mbila bikole bipite, bilondeshile tshilele tshiabu, kuditapabu miela ne mafuma. Mashi kupatuka pambidi pabu." 
1Kings18:29 Diba dia munda munya dimane kupita, kubikilabu kabidi mvidie Baale bikole, bamutendakena too ne ku dilolu diba didibu balambula. Kadi, mvidie Baale kena mubandamune diyi nansha dimue: kena mubambile bualu, kena mubaleje nansha tshimanyinu to." 
1Kings18:30 Ke muambi Eliya kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu bua basemene pabuipi nende. Bena Izrayele bamane kusemena, muambi Eliya kutuadija kulongolola tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila tshivua tshinyanguke." 
1Kings18:31 Kuangataye mabue dikumi ne abidi, bilondeshile bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. (Yakobe ewu ke uvua Maweja-Nangila muambile ne: “Kutuadija mpindiewu, nebakubikile ne: Izrayele. ”)" 
1Kings18:32 Nanku, muambi Eliya kuibakulula tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila ne mabue awu. Kuimbaye mukidi munyungulule tshilambuilu tshionsu. Mukidi awu uvua mukumbane mua kuelamu mayi litre makumi asatu." 
1Kings18:33 Muambi Eliya kulongolola nkunyi, kuyiteka pa tshilambuilu. Kusayaye ngombe, kuteka munyinyi pa nkunyi apu." 
1Kings18:34 Pashishe, kutumaye diyi, wambila bantu bavua muaba awu, ne: — Elayi mayi mu milondu inayi tente. Nuele mayi awu pa mulambu ne pa nkunyi. Kuenzabu nanku. Muambi Eliya kubambila kabidi ne: — Enzayi nanku musangu muibidi. Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Enzayi kabidi musangu muisatu. Kuenzabu nanku." 
1Kings18:35 Mayi kuwula mukidi tente, kupuekawu anyunguluka tshilambuilu." 
1Kings18:36 Dilolu, diba dia kulambula Maweja-Nangila dikumbane, muambi Eliya kusemena pabuipi ne tshilambuilu, kuamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe, lelu uleje bantu ne: udi Mvidi Mukulu wabena Izrayele, bajadike kabidi ne: meme ndi muntu webe, bionsu bindi ngenza ebi, ndi mbienza anu ku diyi diebe." 
1Kings18:37 Maweja-Nangila, ungitabe. Ungitabe, bua bantu bamanye ne: wewe Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu mulelela. Nanku, bena Izrayele nebakuitabe kabidi, bu muvuabu bakuitabe kale." 
1Kings18:38 Maweja-Nangila kutuma kapia, kuoshaku mulambu, nkunyi, mabue ne buloba. Kukamishaku mayi onsu avua mu mikidi." 
1Kings18:39 Bena Izrayele bamone nanku, kutuabu mpala panshi bonsu. Pashishe, kutuadijabu kuela mbila ne: “Anu Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu mulelela. Anu Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu mulelela!”" 
1Kings18:40 Muambi Eliya kubambila ne: — Kuatayi bambi ba Baale. Muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kanyemi to. Kukuatabu bambi ba Baale bonsu. Muambi Eliya kupueka nabu ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kishone, kubakosaye mitu." 
1Kings18:41 Ke muambi Eliya kuambila Akabe ne: — Uye, udie, unue, bualu ndi mumvue mvula ukungula." 
1Kings18:42 Akabe kuya, kudia, kunua. Muambi Eliya kuya ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Karmele. Kuinamayemu panshi bikole, mutue mpala pankatshi pa binu biende." 
1Kings18:43 Pashishe, kuambilaye muena mudimu wende ne: — Uye kutangila luseke lua ku mayi manene. Muena mudimu kuya kutangila. Upingana, kuambilaye muambi Eliya ne: — Kakuena tshintu to. Muambi Eliya, kumutuma misangu muanda mutekete bua kutangila." 
1Kings18:44 Kadi, musangu wa muanda mutekete, muena mudimu kumuambila ne: — Divuba dikese didi dibanda pa mayi manene, kadiena dipite tshianza ku bunene to. Ke muambi Eliya kuambila muena mudimu ne: — Uye kuambila Akabe, asuike nyama yende ya tubalu ku matempu apueke, mvula kayi muanji kumupumbisha." 
1Kings18:45 Tshitupa tshikese, diulu kufika ne mavuba avua alua ne lupepela. Mvula mukole kutuadija kuloka. Ke mukalenga Akabe pa ditempu diende dia mvita, kupingana mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele." 
1Kings18:46 Muambi kusuika mukaba wende mu tshimonu bua kuya. Maweja-Nangila kumupa bukole bua bungi. Kunyemaye lubilu kumpala kua ditempu dia Akabe too ne pafikibu mu Yizreyele. 
1Kings19:1 Mukalenga Akabe kuambila mukajende Yezabele bionsu bivua muambi Eliya muenze, ne muvuaye mushipe bambi ba Baale buonsu." 
1Kings19:2 Ke Yezabele kutuma muntu bua kumanyisha muambi Eliya ne: “Malaba pa diba ditudi edi, meme tshiyi mukushipe, bu muudi mushipe bambi ba Baale, mvidie innyoke ne dinyoka dikole!”" 
1Kings19:3 Muambi Eliya kumvua bowa, kunyema ne muena mudimu wende bua kushala ne muoyi. Kuyaye ku Bersheba mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kushiyaye muena mudimu wende mu ditunga adi." 
1Kings19:4 Pashishe, kuendaye mu tshipela dituku dijima. Kuyaye kusomba muinshi mua mutshi wa ngenete, ujinga mua kufua, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, mpindiewu biantondi! Unshipe, bualu meme tshiena mupite bankambua banyi to." 
1Kings19:5 Ke muambi Eliya kulala tulu panshi, muinshi mua mutshi wa ngenete awu. Kadi, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kufika, kumubisha, umuambila ne: — Juka, udie!" 
1Kings19:6 Muambi Eliya kumona diampa pabuipi nende, dimana kuosha pa mabue. Kumonaye kabidi ne mulondu wa mayi. Mumane kujikija kudia ne kunua, kulalaye tulu tshiakabidi." 
1Kings19:7 Kadi, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kumubisha musangu muibidi, umuambila ne: — Juka, udie! Bualu uyaya luendu lule lutambe." 
1Kings19:8 Ke muambi Eliya kujuka bua kudia ne kunua. Biakudia abi kumupa bukole. Kuendaye matuku makumi anayi, munya ne butuku, too ne ku Sinayi, mukuna wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Kings19:9 Eliya mumane kufika ku mukuna wa Sinayi, kubuelaye mu lubuebue, kulalamu. Ke Maweja-Nangila kumukonka ne: — Eliya, muaba ewu udi wenza tshinyi?" 
1Kings19:10 Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, ndi mukunange bikole. Nanku tshitshiena musue kumona bionsu bidi bena Izrayele benza to. Bualu bena Izrayele mbanyangakaje ndondu webe, mbupule bilambuilu biebe, mbashipe bambi bebe. Ndi mushale anu meme nkayanyi. Kadi badi bakeba kunshipa ne meme!" 
1Kings19:11 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Eliya ne: — Patuka mu lubuebue, wimane pa mukuna kumpala kuanyi. Ndi musue kupita. Diakamue, tshipepela tshinene kutuuta bikole. Kupandatshi mikuna ne mbuebue kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kavua mu tshipepela atshi to. Tshipepela tshimane kujika, buloba kuzakala. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kavua mu buloba buvua buzakala abu to." 
1Kings19:12 Buloba bumane kuzakala, kapia kumueneka. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kavua mu kapia aku to. Kapia kamane kujika, tshiona tshia lupepela luteketa kumwikatshi." 
1Kings19:13 Anu muambi Eliya umvua tshiona atshi, kudibuikilaye tshinkutu tshiende. Kupatukaye mu lubuebue, kuimana mu mbelu. Kumvuaye kabidi diyi dimukonka ne: — Eliya, muaba ewu udi wenza tshinyi?" 
1Kings19:14 Kuandamunaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, ndi mukunange bikole. Kadi tshiena musue kumona bionsu bidi bena Izrayele benza to. Bualu bena Izrayele mbanyangakaje ndondu webe, mbupule bilambuilu biebe, mbashipe bambi bebe. Ndi mushale anu meme nkayanyi. Kadi, badi bakeba kunshipa ne meme." 
1Kings19:15 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Pingana anu mu njila ewu, upitshile mu tshipela, uye ku Damase. Paudi ufika ku Damase, ujidile Azayele mu dina dianyi, bua ikale mukalenga wa bena Siriya." 
1Kings19:16 Pashishe, uye ujidile Yehu, muana wa Nimshi, bua ikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Ujidile kabidi Elisha, muana wa Shafate, wa mu musoku wa Abele-Mekola bua akupingane mu mudimu wa buambi." 
1Kings19:17 Bantu bikale bapanduka mu mvita ya Azayele, Yehu neabashipe. Bantu bikale bapanduka mu mvita ya Yehu, Elisha neabashipe." 
1Kings19:18 Kadi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, nenshiye bantu bakuabu binunu muanda mutekete ne muoyi, mmumue ne: bonsu badikabayi banji kukukuila mvidie Baale, kabayi banji kutua mpingu ayi mishiku." 
1Kings19:19 Eliya kumuka muaba awu, kusangana Elisha, muana wa Shafate udima budimi ne ngombe makumi abidi ne inayi misuikakaja ibidi ibidi. Elisha mene uvua udima ne tshisumbu tshia dikumi ne tshibidi. Pavua muambi Eliya upitshila pabuipi ne Elisha, kutekaye Elisha tshinkutu pambidi." 
1Kings19:20 Ke Elisha kushiya ngombe ivuaye nayi, kuya lubilu kudi muambi Eliya, umuambila ne: — Ndi nkulomba ne: nye kulayangana ne tatu wanyi ne mamu wanyi, pashishe nenkulonde. Muambi Eliya kuambila Elisha ne: — Udi mua kupingana ku mudimu webe. Ndi mukuebeje bualu anyi?" 
1Kings19:21 Elisha kupingana ku budimi buende. Muaba awu, kuangataye ngombe yende ibidi, ivuaye ukuata nayi mudimu, kuyilambulaye. Kuangataye ditempu, kukuatshisha nadi kapia bua kulamba munyinyi. Bantu bavua muaba awu, kubapeshaye munyinyi awu, kudiabu. Pashishe, Elisha kulonda Eliya, kushala muena mudimu wende." 
1Kings20:1 Benadade, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, kusangishaye bena mvita bende bonsu, ne ba bakalenga makumi asatu ne babidi bavua bumvuangana nende. Kusangishaye kabidi ne nyama ya tubalu ne matempu a mvita bua kuya kuluisha tshimenga tshia Samariya, ukeba kutshikuata." 
1Kings20:2 Benadade kutuma bantu mu tshimenga atshi, bua kuambila Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, ne:" 
1Kings20:3 “Mukalenga Benadade udi wamba ne: ‘Tupeshe biamu biebe bitoke bia mushinga mukole, mpawungi, bakaji bebe ne bana bebe badi bimpe ku bonsu.’ ”" 
1Kings20:4 Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: “Mukalenga, ndi muitabe bionsu biudi wamba! Ndi ndifila meme mu bianza biebe ne bionsu bindi nabi.”" 
1Kings20:5 Kadi bantu kuya kudi mukalenga Akabe musangu muibidi, bamuambila meyi makuabu, avua Benadade mumutumine, ne: “Mwa mukutumine diyi, bua wewe kumpesha biamu biebe bitoke bia mushinga mukole, mpawungi, bakaji bebe ne bana bebe." 
1Kings20:6 Nanku, umanye ne: malaba pa diba ditudi edi, nentume bena mudimu banyi ku nzubu kuebe. Nebibakulule mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga, ne mu nzubu ya balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe. Nebangate bintu bionsu bia mushinga mukole biudi nabi, baya nabi.”" 
1Kings20:7 Ke Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kubikila bakulu bonsu ba mu ditunga, ubambila ne: — Nudi badimuene patoke too ne: Benadade mmusue kutuenzela bibi. Bualu uvua untumina bantu bua kundomba bakaji banyi ne bana banyi ne biamu bianyi bitoke bia mushinga mukole, ne mpawungi. Kadi tshivua mubenge mua kumutumina to." 
1Kings20:8 Bakulu bonsu, ne bena Izrayele bonsu, kuambila Akabe ne: — Kuteleji Benadade to. Kuitabi tshidiye wamba to." 
1Kings20:9 Nanku, Akabe kuandamuna bantu bavua Benadade mutume ne: — Nuambile mukalenga Benadade ne: “Mwa muitabe bua kukutumina bintu bionsu biuvua mulombe musangu wa kumpala. Kadi, muudi unyenga bionsu, ungenzeja ku bukole mpindiewu, tshiena mua kuitaba to. ” Bantu bavua mukalena Benadade utuma, kuya kumuambila bionsu abi." 
1Kings20:10 Ke mukalenga Benadade kutumina mukalenga Akabe diyi musangu muisatu, umuambila ne: “Meme mushiye mu Samariya lupuishi lukumbane ludibu mua kuambula kudi bantu bandi nabu, mvidie yonsu innyoke ne dinyoka dikole.”" 
1Kings20:11 Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuandamuna ne: — Nuwluije Benadade lusumuinu ludibu bela ne: “Patshidi muntu uya mu mvita, kena mua kuditambisha bu mumane kutshimuna.”" 
1Kings20:12 Pavua Benadade ne bakalenga bakuabu banua maluw mu ntenta, kupetaye diandamuna dia kudi mukalenga Akabe. Diakamue kutuma diyi bua bamfumu balombodi ba bena mvita badilongolole ku mvita. Balombodi kudilongolola." 
1Kings20:13 Ke muambi kampande kuya kudi Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Udi mumone musumba munene wa bena mvita! Ndi mbafila mu bianza biebe anu lelu, bua wewe kumanya ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
1Kings20:14 Mukalenga Akabe kukonka ne: — Wafikisha bena mvita aba mu bianza bianyi nnganyi? Muambi kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bansongalume badibu bangata ku mudimu wa bena mvita kudi balombodi ba maloba a mu ditunga, nebatshimune bena mvita aba.” Akabe kukonka kabidi ne: — Udi mua kutuadija mvita nnganyi? Muambi kuandamuna ne: — Wewe ke udi utuadija mvita." 
1Kings20:15 Akabe kubandila bansongalume nkama ibidi makumi asatu ne babidi, bavuabu bangate ku mudimu wa mvita kudi balombodi ba maloba a mu ditunga. Pashishe, kubandilaye kabidi bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele binunu muanda mutekete." 
1Kings20:16 Kutuadijabu mvita munda munya. Kadi, Benadade ne bakalenga makumi asatu ne babidi, balunda bende, bavua anu bakuatshike maluvu mu ntenta." 
1Kings20:17 Bansongalume kupita kumpala, kutuadija mvita. Benadade kutuma bantu bua bamone muvua bualu. Kupinganabu kudi Benadade, bamuambila ne: bantu mbafume ku tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
1Kings20:18 Benadade kuandamuna ne: — Padi bantu aba bafike bua kulomba ditalala, nubakuate ne muoyi. Kadi, pikalabu bafike bua kuluangana mvita, nubakuate anu ne muoyi!" 
1Kings20:19 Kadi, bansongalume ne bena mvita bavua babalonda, bavua bamane kumuka mu tshimenga." 
1Kings20:20 Muena mvita yonsu wa kudibu, kushipa muluishi uvuabu baluangana nende. Ke bena Siriya kunyema. Bena Izrayele kutuadija kubalondakaja. Benadade kunyema, mubande pa nyama wa kabalu, pamue ne bantu bakuabu bavua babande pa nyama ya tubalu." 
1Kings20:21 Ke muvua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele muluishe Benadade. Uvua mubutule nyama ya tubalu yonsu, munyangakaje matempu a mvita onsu, mushipe bena mvita ba bena Siriya bapite bungi." 
1Kings20:22 Ke muambi kuya kudi Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, umuambila ne: — Kolesha muoyi, wela meji bimpe ku tshiudi mua kuenza. Bualu, tshidimu tshidi kumpala etshi, anu tshikondu tshitudi etshi, mukalenga wa bena Siriya neafike kabidi bua kukuluisha." 
1Kings20:23 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Siriya, kuambilabu mukalenga wabu ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi Mvidi Mukulu wa ku mikuna, ke padi bena Izrayele batupite bukole. Kadi, tuye kuluangana nabu mu mpata, netubapite bukole bulelela." 
1Kings20:24 Mpindiewu enza nunku: Umushe bakalenga bonsu, ne balunda bebe, ku bumfumu. Upingaje balombodi ba maloba mu muaba wabu." 
1Kings20:25 Wewe, wangata bena mvita bungi bua bavua bafue. Wangate kabidi nyama ya tubalu ne matempu a mvita, anu bungi bumue ne bia kumpala. Pashishe, tuye kuluisha bena mvita ba bena Izrayele mu mpata, netubapite bukole bulelela. Benadade kuitaba lungenyi alu." 
1Kings20:26 Nanku, tshidimu tshikuabu, anu tshikondu tshivuabu baluangana kabidi atshi, Benadade kubandila bena mvita ba bena Siriya. Pashishe, kuyaye nabu mu tshimenga tshia Afeke bua kuluisha bena Izrayele." 
1Kings20:27 Mukalenga Akabe kabidi kubandila bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, kubapesha biakudia. Kuyabu bua kusambakena ne baluishi babu. Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kuasa mitanda mu bisumbu bibidi bitangilangane ne bena Siriya. Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua bamueneka anu bu bisumbu bikese bia mbuji bibidi. Kadi, bena Siriya bavua bapite bungi, batuangane ditunga dijima." 
1Kings20:28 Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu kuya kabidi kudi Akabe, mukalenga wabena Izrayele, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bu mudi bena Siriya bamba ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi anu Mvidi Mukulu wa ku mikuna, tshiena wa mu mpata, ndi mfila bena mvita babu bonsu mu bianza biebe, bua wewe kumanya ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
1Kings20:29 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele ne ba bena Siriya kusomba bindila matuku muanda mutekete mu mitanda, batangilangane. Dituku dia muanda mutekete, kutuadijabu kuluangana. Bena Izrayele kutshimuna bena Siriya. Dituku dimue adi, kushipabu bena mvita ba bena Siriya binunu lukama, bavua benda ku makasa." 
1Kings20:30 Bantu bavua bashale binunu makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, kunyema, kuya mu tshimenga tshia Afeke. Kadi, bimana bia tshimenga atshi kubupukila. Benadade kabidi uvua mua kunyema mu tshimenga atshi, musokome mu tshibambalu tshikuabu tshia munda mua nzubu menemene." 
1Kings20:31 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Benadade, kumuambila ne: — Teleja, tudi bumvue ne: bakalenga ba bena Izrayele badi ne luse lua bungi. Nanku, tudi basue kuvuala bilamba bikayabale, kudisuika mionji mu nshingu, bua tuye kumonangana ne Akabe, mukalenga wabena Izrayele. Misangu mikuabu kena mua kukushipa to." 
1Kings20:32 Kuvualabu bilamba bikayabale, kusuika mionji mu nshingu. Kuyabu ku nzubu kua Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bamuambila ne: — Mupika webe Benadade, udi nkusengelela bua kumushipi. Akabe kuandamuna ne: — Benadade utshidi ne muoyi anyi? Kakuena bualu to. Benadade mmuanetu!" 
1Kings20:33 Bantu bavua Benadade mutume, kumona ne: mbatuandamune bimpe. Kuitababu lubilu, bamba ne: — Eyowa, Benadade mmuanenu bushuwa! Akabe kubambila ne: — Pinganayi, nuye kumukeba. Benadade kupatuka muaba uvuaye musokome, kuya kudi Akabe. Akabe kumubandisha mu ditempu diende dia mvita." 
1Kings20:34 Benadade kuambila Akabe ne: — Nenkupingajile bimenga bivua tatu wanyi munyenge tatuebe. Nanku bintu bia mu ditunga diebe, neuye kubisumbisha mu tshimenga tshia Damase, bu muvua tatu wanyi uya kusumbisha bintu bia mu ditunga dietu mu Samariya. Akabe kumuambila ne: — Meme ndi musue kutua nebe ndondu. Pashishe, nenkulekele bua wewe kuya muebe muudi musue. Akabe mumane kutua ndondu ne Benadade, kumulekelaye." 
1Kings20:35 Tshikondu atshi, Maweja-Nangila kutumina muntu wa mu tshisumbu tshia bambi diyi, bua kuambilaye muntu mukuabu wa mu tshisumbu atshi ne: “Ntuuta!” Kadi muntu awu kubenga kumutuuta." 
1Kings20:36 Pashishe, muntu wa kumpala kuamba ne: — Bu muudi ubenga bua kutumikila diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, anu wewe umuka muaba undi ewu, nyama wa ntambue neakushipe. Nanku muntu awu uya mu njila, kusambakenaye ne nyama wa ntambue. Nyama awu kumushipa." 
1Kings20:37 Muntu wa kumpala awu, kuyaye kudi muntu mukuabu, umuambila ne: — Ntuuta! Muntu awu kumutuuta, kumutapa mputa." 
1Kings20:38 Nanku, muambi awu, kudisokoka, kuvuala bilamba bia muntu mukuabu, kuasaye tshifulu tshibuikila mu mpala. Kuyaye kuimana ku mpenga kua njila, muaba uvua mukalenga Akabe upitshila." 
1Kings20:39 Pavua mukalenga Akabe upita, muambi kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, mvua munkatshi mua mvita. Muntu mukuabu kumuka ku milongu ya bena mvita, kumpesha muena lukanu, ungambila ne: “Undamine muntu ewu! Yeye munyeme, wewe neuye mu bupika pa muaba wende, anyi neumpeshe nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole binunu bisatu.”" 
1Kings20:40 Kadi, pamvua ngenza mudimu, ntua eku ne eku, muena lukanu kunyema! Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuandamuna ne: — Wewe nkayebe udi mumane kudipisha." 
1Kings20:41 Diakamue, muntu awu kumusha tshifulu tshivuaye muase, tshivua tshibuikila mu mpala. Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kumanya ne: muntu ewu ngua ku tshisumbu tshia bambi." 
1Kings20:42 Muambi kuambila mukalenga Akabe ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bu muudi munyemeshe muntu umvua mumane kufundila lufu, wewe neufue pa muaba wende. Kabidi bantu bebe bena Izrayele nebafue pa muaba wa bantu bende.”" 
1Kings20:43 Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kupingana kuende ne kanyinganyinga ne tshiji, mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
1Kings21:1 Malu awu mamane kujika, bualu bukuabu kuenzeka mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele, muvua muntu mukuabu dina diende Nabote. Uvua ne budimi bua mvinyo mu tshimenga atshi, pabuipi ne nzubu kampande wa bukalenga wa Akabe, mukalenga wa Samariya." 
1Kings21:2 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga Akabe kuambila Nabote ne: — Umpe budimi buebe bua mvinyo ebu, bua meme kuenzamu budimi bua biseki. Bualu budimi ebu budi pabuipi ne nzubu wanyi wa bukalenga. Nenkupe budimi bukuabu bua mvinyo buimpe bupite buebe ebu. Anyi ndi mua kukusumba budimi ebu, pawikala musue." 
1Kings21:3 Kadi, Nabote kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila kena mua kuanyisha bua meme kukupa budimi bua mvinyo bundi mupiane kudi bankambua banyi to." 
1Kings21:4 Mukalenga Akabe kupingana ku nzubu kuende, mubungame, mufike munda bua diandamuna dia Nabote adi. Akabe kulala pa bulalu, mutangile ku tshimana, kayi mua kudia kantu nansha kamue." 
1Kings21:5 Mukajende Yezabele ubuela, kumusangana mulale, kumukonka ne: — Udi mubinduluke nenku bua tshinyi? Kuena musue kudia biakudia munyi?" 
1Kings21:6 Mukalenga Akabe kuandamuna ne: — Mvua mumonangane ne Nabote, muena mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele. Meme kumulomba ne: “Umpe budimi buebe bua mvinyo. Ndi musue kubusumba. Anyi pawikala musue, tudi mua kushintakaja, meme kukupa budimi bukuabu.” Kadi, Nabote mmungandamune ne: “Tshiena mua kukupa budimi buanyi bua mvinyo to.”" 
1Kings21:7 Yezabele kuandamuna ne: — Bulelela! Kuena muvuluke ne: wewe udi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele anyi? Juka! Udie biakudia, usanke! Meme Yezabele ndi nkupesha budimi bua mvinyo bua Nabote wa Yizreyele." 
1Kings21:8 Yezabele kufunda mikanda mu dina dia mukalenga Akabe. Kutumaye mikanda ayi, mitue tshitampi tshia bukalenga, kudi bakulu ne balombodi ba tshimenga tshia Yizreyele, muaba uvua Nabote musombe." 
1Kings21:9 Mu mikanda ayi, Yezabele uvua mufunde ne: ‘Mubikidishe bantu bonsu, nubafundile dituku dia kujilabu biakudia. Nuambile Nabote bua alombole tshisangilu atshi." 
1Kings21:10 Muaba udi Nabote muimanyine awu, nushikikepu bantu babidi bena dikamakama, bikale balulamangane ne Nabote. Bantu abu, nebamushiminyine ne: Nabote udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu, usendeka ne mukalenga Akabe. Pashishe, nupatuke nende mu tshimenga, numuase mabue, numushipe. ”" 
1Kings21:11 Bakulu ne balombodi ba tshimenga tshia Nabote, kuenza bionsu bivua Yezabele mufunde mu mikanda yende." 
1Kings21:12 Kubikidishabu bantu, kubafundila dituku dia kujila biakudia. Kuambilabu Nabote bua alombole tshisangilu atshi." 
1Kings21:13 Bantu babidi kusomba, balulamangane ne Nabote. Bantu abu, kumushiminyina malu kumpala kua bantu bonsu, bamba ne: — Nabote udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu, usendeka ne mukalenga Akabe kabidi! Diakamue, kupatukabu ne Nabote mu tshimenga, kumuasa mabue, kumushipa." 
1Kings21:14 Ke balombodi ba tshimenga kutuma bantu kudi Yezabele bua kumumanyisha ne: mbamane kuasa Nabote mabue, bamushipa." 
1Kings21:15 Yezabele umvua bualu abu, kuyaye kuambila mukalenga Akabe ne: — Uye kuangata budimi bua mvinyo, buvua Nabote, muena mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele, ubenga mua kukusumbisha. Bualu mmumane kufua." 
1Kings21:16 Mukalenga Akabe umvua nanku, kuyaye kuangata budimi bua mvinyo bua Nabote." 
1Kings21:17 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Eliya wa ku Tishebe ne:" 
1Kings21:18 — Uye kudi Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, udi musombe mu Samariya. Neumusangane mu budimi bua mvinyo bua Nabote, bualu mmuye bua kuangata budimi abu." 
1Kings21:19 Uye, umuambile ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Udi mushipe muntu. Mpindiewu udi mufike bua kuangata bintu biende!” Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Muaba udi mbua milake mashi a Nabote, neyilakilepu ne mashi ebe kabidi.”" 
1Kings21:20 Eliya kuya kuambila Akabe bionsu abi. Akabe kumuambila ne: — Wewe muluishi wanyi, wapinganyi kabidi kundi! Eliya kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, ngapinganyi kabidi kuudi, bualu wewe udi usanka bua kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga." 
1Kings21:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nenkutumine makenga makole. Nenkubutule wewe ne bantu bonsu ba mu diku diebe, bakulumpe ne bana batekete." 
1Kings21:22 Nembutule bena nzubu webe, bu mumvua mubutule bena nzubu wa Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, ne bena nzubu wa Basha, muana wa Akiya. Bualu wewe Akabe udi mumfikishe munda bikole. Kabidi udi mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi.”" 
1Kings21:23 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi bua Yezabele ne: “Mbua neyidile Yezabele pabuipi ne bimana bia Yizreyele. ”" 
1Kings21:24 Mukalenga Akabe, muena nzubu wa mu diku diebe udi ufuila mu tshimenga, nebamudie kudi mbua. Udi ufuila mu tshisuku, nebamuzokole kudi nyunyi ya mikanku." 
1Kings21:25 Bulelela, katshia kabena banji kumona muntu usanka bua kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, bu mudi mukalenga Akabe usanka bua kuenza nanku. Kadi badi bamuenzeja bionsu ebi kudi mukajende Yezabele." 
1Kings21:26 Mukalenga Akabe udi mutambe kuenza bibi, nangananga padiye utendelela mvidie bu muvua bena Amore batendelela. Bena Amore ke bavua Maweja-Nangila muipate mu ditunga bua kushilabu bena Izrayele muaba." 
1Kings21:27 Mukalenga Akabe umvua malu onsu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile mukana mua muambi, kunyingalalaye bikole. Kupandaye bilamba biende. Kuvualaye anu tshilamba tshikayabale nkayatshi pambidi. Kujilaye biakudia. Uvua anu ne tshilamba atshi tshikayabale too ne pa kulala. Uvua wenda anu bitekete." 
1Kings21:28 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Eliya, muena Tishebe ne:" 
1Kings21:29 — Udi mumone mudi Akabe mudipuekeshe kumpala kuanyi. Bu mudiye mudipuekeshe nanku, tshiena nkengesha bena diku diende patshidiye mu bukalenga to. Nembakengeshe anu pabuela muanende mu bukalenga." 
1Kings22:1 Bidimu bibidi bimane kupita, bena Siriya ne bena Izrayele kabayi baluangana mvita." 
1Kings22:2 Mu tshidimu tshisatu, Yosafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kufika bua kumonangana ne Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Kings22:3 Kadi, Akabe uvua mumane kuambila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: “Nudi bamanye bimpe ne: tshimenga tshia Ramote, tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, ntshietu. Tudi tutshina bua kuya kukuata tshiakabidi tshimenga tshietu etshi, kudi mukalenga wa bena Siriya bua tshinyi?”" 
1Kings22:4 Nanku, Akabe kukonka mukalenga Yosafate ne: — Udi mua kuya kumfila mu mvita bua tuetu kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote, tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade anyi? Mukalenga Yosafate kuandamuna ne: — Wewe ne meme tudi bantu bamue. Bantu bebe, mbanyi meme. Bantu banyi, mbebe wewe. Nyama yanyi ya tubalu nyebe wewe." 
1Kings22:5 Mukalenga Yosafate kumuambila kabidi ne: — Kadi, bangabanga, ukonke Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings22:6 Nanku, Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kubikidisha bambi bende bonsu bu nkama inayi, ubakonka ne: — Ndi mua kuya kuluangana, bua meme kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, anyi tshiena mua kuya? Bambi kuandamuna ne: — Udi mua kuya. Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
1Kings22:7 Kadi, mukalenga Yosafate kumukonka ne: — Munemu, kamuena muambi mukuabu wa Maweja-Nangila utudi mua kuebeja anyi?" 
1Kings22:8 Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuandamuna ne: — Muambi mukuabu umue udi munemu. Dina diende Mika, muana wa Imla. Kadi tshiena mumunange to. Bualu misangu yonsu udi ummanyisha amu malu mabi. Katshia, kena muanji kungambilaku bualu buimpe to. Mukalenga Yosafate kukema ne: — Kuangatshi muambi bibi nanku to!" 
1Kings22:9 Ke, Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kubikila muntu uvua ulombola bena mudimu ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kumutumaye lukasa bua kuya kukeba Mika, muana wa Imla." 
1Kings22:10 Pavua bambi babambila malu, Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, ne Yosafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, bavua basombe mu nkuasa yabu ya bukalenga. Bavua bavuala bilamba bia bukalenga, basombe pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
1Kings22:11 Muntu mukuabu, Sedekiya, muana wa Kenaane, uvua muenze nsengu ya tshiamu, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nsengu eyi, ke tshimanyinu tshidi tshileja bukole bundi mua kubutula nabu bena mvita ba bena Siriya.”" 
1Kings22:12 Bambi bakuabu bonsu kujadika meyi awu, bamba ne: — Mukalenga, uye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Neutshimune. Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
1Kings22:13 Muntu uvua muye kukeba Mika, kuambilaye Mika ne: — Teleja, bambi bonsu mbambile mukalenga Akabe anu meyi a mushindu umue ne: neutshimune. Wewe kabidi umuambile anu meyi a mushindu umue ne bambi bakuabu. Umuambile ne: neutshimune." 
1Kings22:14 Kadi, muambi Mika kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, nemmuambile anu tshidi Maweja-Nangila ungambila." 
1Kings22:15 Mika ufika kudi mukalenga Akabe, awu kumukonka ne: — Mika, tudi mua kuya kuluangana, bua tuetu kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, anyi katuena mua kuya? Muambi kuandamuna ne: — Udi mua kuya. Neutshimune, Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
1Kings22:16 Kadi, mukalenga Akabe kumukonka kabidi ne: — Ndi mua kukusengelela misangu bungi munyi bua wewe kungambila anu bualu bulelela, paudi wakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila?" 
1Kings22:17 Ke muambi Mika kumuambila ne: — Ndi mumone bena Izrayele. Bonsu mbamuangalake mu mikuna. Bu mudi tshisumbu tshia mikoku katshiyi ne mulami. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena Izrayele kabatshiena ne mfumu to. Muntu yonsu apingane ku nzubu kuende talala.” 
1Kings22:18 Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuambila Yosafate ne: — Mvua mumane kukuambila! Mika udi ungambila anu malu mabi misangu yonsu. Katshia kena muanji kungambila bualu buimpe to!" 
1Kings22:19 Mika kuamba kabidi ne: — Teleja anu tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Ndi mumone Maweja-Nangila musombe mu nkuasa wende wa bukalenga, bena mudimu bende bonsu ba mu diulu, bimana, aba ku dia balume diende, bakuabu ku dia bakaji." 
1Kings22:20 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kukonka ne: “Udi mua kuya kushima Akabe bua kuyaye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, kumushipelabu mu tshimenga atshi nnganyi?” Kufilabu meji mushilangane." 
1Kings22:21 Nanku, mutumibue uvua ulombola bambi, kusemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, umuambila ne: “Meme nenye kumushima!” Maweja-Nangila kukonka ne: “Neuye kumushima mushindu kaayi?”" 
1Kings22:22 Mutumibue kuandamuna ne: “Nengenzeje bambi bonsu, bua bambile mukalenga Akabe malu a dishima.” Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna ne: “Ke mushindu muimpe mutambe wa kumushima. Uye kuenza nanku!”" 
1Kings22:23 Eyowa, mpindiewu bionsu ebi mbimane kuenzeka. Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mutume mutumibue bua kushimaye bambi bebe bonsu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kujadika bua kukukengesha." 
1Kings22:24 Diakamue, Sedekiya, muana wa Kenaane, kusemena kudi muambi Mika, kumutapa dipi ku ditama, wamba ne: — Mmunyi muudi mua kujadika ne: mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila mmupatuke munda muanyi bua kubuela munda muebe, kukuakuisha anu wewe?" 
1Kings22:25 Muambi Mika kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa! Wewe neujadike bionsu ebi, dituku diwikala musokome mu tshibambalu tshia munda mua nzubu webe." 
1Kings22:26 Pashishe, Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kutuma diyi kudi muena mudimu wende ne: — Ukuate muambi Mika, umufile kudi mulombodi wa tshimenga tshia Amone ne kudi Yowashe, muana wa mukalenga." 
1Kings22:27 Ubambile ne: bele muntu awu mu nzubu wa lukanu mu dina dianyi. Bamupeshe kapese ka diampa ne mayi makese a kunua, too ne pangapingana katakata ku mvita eyi." 
1Kings22:28 Mika kuandamuna ne: — Wewe mupingane katakata, nanku Maweja-Nangila kena muambe bualu mukana muanyi to." 
1Kings22:29 Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, ne Yosafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kuya kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshivua mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
1Kings22:30 Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuambila Yosafate ne: — Ndi musue kudisokoka, kuvuala bilamba bia muntu mukuabu, bua meme kuya mu mvita. Kadi wewe Yosafate uvuale bilamba bia bukalenga. Nenku, Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kudisokoka bu muntu mukuabu, bua kuya mu mvita." 
1Kings22:31 Kadi, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, uvua mumane kutuma diyi kudi bamfumu makumi asatu ne babidi, bavua ne matempu ende a mvita, bua kuluisha anu Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kabayi baluisha bena mvita bakuabu, nansha balombodi ba bena mvita." 
1Kings22:32 Nanku, bamfumu bavua ne matempu a mvita bamona Yosafate, kuambilanganabu ne: bulelela ke Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ewu. Kutuadijabu kumuluisha. Kadi, Yosafate kuela mbila ya mvita." 
1Kings22:33 Ke bamfumu bavua ne matempu a mvita, kujadika ne: ki ngʼAkabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele to. Nanku, kulekelabu kumulondakaja." 
1Kings22:34 Muena mvita mukuabu wa bena Siriya kuela muketa mu mpukapuka. Muketa awu, kuasa Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Kubuelawu mu mubidi wende, ku kazaku kende ka mvita. Mukalenga Akabe kuambila muntu uvua wendesha ditempu diende dia mvita ne: — Pingana panyima! Umuka nanyi munkatshi mua bena mvita, bualu tshiena mumvue bimpe to." 
1Kings22:35 Dituku adi, mvita ivua mikole mitambe. Nanku, Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua ne bua kushala muaba awu, bamuimanyike mu ditempu diende dia mvita, mululamangane ne bena mvita ba bena Siriya. Ke Akabe kufua dilolu. Mashi avua apatuka mu mputa wende awu, avua apuekela mu ditempu dia mvita." 
1Kings22:36 Diba dimane kubuela, kuelabu mbila mu mitanda ne: — Muntu yonsu apingane mu tshimenga tshiende, aye ku nzubu kuende," 
1Kings22:37 bualu mukalenga Akabe mmufue! Kuyabu kujiika tshitalu tshia mukalenga Akabe, mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
1Kings22:38 Kadi pavuabu basukula ditempu dia Akabe mu dijiba dia mayi dia mu Samariya, mbua kulaka mashi a mukalenga Akabe. Kabidi bakaji bena tshiendenda bavua bowa mayi muaba awu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
1Kings22:39 Malu makuabu a Akabe, mbaafunde mumukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mbafundemu kabidi bionsu bivuaye muenze: nzubu muimpe wa bukalenga uvuaye muase mulengeje ne mibanga, ne bimenga bionsu bivuaye muibake." 
1Kings22:40 Mukalenga Akabe mumane kufua, muanende Akaziya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings22:41 Yosafate, muana wa Asa, uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, mu tshidimu tshinayi tshivua Akabe mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele." 
1Kings22:42 Yosafate uvua ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu pa kubuelaye mu bukalenga. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Dina dia mamuende divua Azuba, muana wa Shili." 
1Kings22:43 Yosafate kuenza malu mimpe, mulonde tshilejilu tshia tatuende Asa, ku bionsu bivuaye wenza. Uvua muenze malu mimpe avua asankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
1Kings22:44 Kadi, Yosafate kavua mukandike miaba ya tshijila ivua bantu baya kutendelela mvidie. Bantu bavua anu baya miaba ayi, bua kulambula milambu ya nyama, ne ya manananshi." 
1Kings22:45 Yosafate bavua basombe ne mukalenga wa bena Izrayele anu bimpe mu ditalala. 
1Kings22:46 Malu makuabu a Yosafate, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Mbafundemu kabidi bukitu buvua nabu Yosafate, mvita yonsu ivuaye muluangane," 
1Kings22:47 ne mushindu uvuaye muipate balume ne bakaji bonsu bavua benda tshiendenda mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu bua kuyitendelela. Bavua bashala benza nanku nansha tshikondu tshia tatuende Asa. 
1Kings22:48 Kadi, tshikondu atshi, mu ditunga dia Edome kamuvua mukalenga to. Muvua anu mulombodi uvua mukalenga wa bena Yuda mutekemu." 
1Kings22:49 Mukalenga Yosafate uvua muenzeje matu manene ku Eshiyone-Ngebere bua kuya kukeba biamu bia mpawungi mu ditunga dia Ofire. Kadi, kena mupete tshipeta tshimpe to. Bualu matu avua majame ku Eshiyone-Ngebere." 
1Kings22:50 Ke Akaziya, muana wa Akabe, kuanyisha kabidi bua bitshi ba matu ba mu ditunga diende baye kushindikija bitshi ba matu ba Yosafate. Kadi, mukalenga Yosafate kubenga." 
1Kings22:51 Yosafate mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, mu lukita lua bankambua babu. Muanende wa balume Yorame kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Kings22:52 Akaziya, muana wa Akabe, uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, mu tshimenga tshia Samariya, mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mutekete tshivua Yosafate mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Akaziya kushala mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu bibidi." 
1Kings22:53 Kuenzaye tshidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Kuenzaye buenzayi anu muvua tatuende Akabe ne mamuende Yezabele benza. Kabidi muvua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate muenze, mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
1Kings22:54 Akaziya uvua mutue mpala panshi kumpala kua Baale bua kumutendelela. Ke muvuaye mufikishe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele munda, bu muvuabu benza kudi tatuende Akabe." 
2Kings1:1 Mukalenga Akabe mumane kufua, bena Mowabe kutombokela bena Izrayele." 
2Kings1:2 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga Akaziya uvua mu tshibambalu tshia nzubu wende wa bukalenga wa tshilalakulu, uvua mu tshimenga tshia Samariya, kukulukaye pa dididishi, kudishinda, kutapikaye bikole. Bualu bua njiwu ayi, mukalenga Akaziya kutuma bantu mu tshimenga tshia Ekrone, bua kukonkamu mvidie Baale Zebube ne: nengumvue bimpe anyi?" 
2Kings1:3 Kadi, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuya kuambila muambi Eliya, muena Tishebe, ne: — Juka uye kusambakena ne bantu badi mukalenga Akaziya wa mu Samariya mutume, ubakonke ne: “Mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele kamuena Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Nudi nuya kukonka anu mvidie Baale Zebube, udi mu Ekrone bua tshinyi?”" 
2Kings1:4 Pashishe ubambile kabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wambila Akaziya, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne: ‘Kuena ujuka kabidi mu bulalu buudi mulale emu to, neufue!’ ” Muambi Eliya kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile." 
2Kings1:5 Diakamue, bantu abu kupingana kudi mukalenga Akaziya. Mukalenga Akaziya kubakonka ne: — Nudi bapingane bua tshinyi?" 
2Kings1:6 Kuandamunabu ne: — Tudi basambakene ne muntu mukuabu, mutupingaje bua tuetu kukuambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mu ditunga dia Izrayele, kamuena Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Udi utuma bantu bua kukonka anu mvidie Baale Zebube udi mu Ekrone bua tshinyi? Bu muudi muenze nanku, kuena ujuka mu bulalu buudi mulale ebu to! Neufue!”" 
2Kings1:7 Mukalenga Akaziya kubakonka ne: — Muntu unuvua basambakena nende, uvua unuambila bionsu ebi, uvua mushindu kaayi?" 
2Kings1:8 Kuandamunabu ne: — Uvua muvuale tshilamba tshia miosa ya nyama wa kamelu, musuike mukaba mu tshimonu! Mukalenga Akaziya kuela diyi ne: — Muntu awu mmuambi Eliya, muena Tishebe!" 
2Kings1:9 Mukalenga Akaziya kutuma mulombodi, ne bena mvita makumi atanu, bua kukuata muambi Eliya. Bena mvita abu, kubanda ku lusongu lua mukuna uvua muambi Eliya musombe. Mulombodi wa bena mvita kuambila Eliya ne: — Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, tuluka! Ke mudi mukalenga Akaziya mutume diyi!" 
2Kings1:10 Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Bu mundi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ndomba bua kapia kafume mu diulu kanubutule: wewe ne bantu makumi atanu banudi nabu! Diakamue, kapia kufuma mu diulu, kubutula mulombodi wa bena mvita, ne bantu makumi atanu bavuaye nabu." 
2Kings1:11 Mukalenga Akaziya kutuma kabidi mulombodi wa bena mvita mukuabu, ne bena mvita makumi atanu, kudi Eliya. Mulombodi wa bena mvita kuambila Eliya ne: — Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, tuluka! Ke mudi mukalenga Akaziya mutume diyi!" 
2Kings1:12 Eliya kuandamuna ne: — Bu mundi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ndomba bua kapia kafume mu diulu kanubutule: wewe ne bantu makumi atanu banudi nabu! Diakamue, Mvidi Mukulu kupuekesha kapia. Kubutulaku mulombodi wa bena mvita ne bantu makumi atanu bavuaye nabu."
