2Kings1:13 Musangu muisatu, mukalenga Akaziya kutuma kabidi mulombodi mukuabu ne bena mvita makumi atanu. Kubandabu pa mukuna. Anu bamone Eliya, mulombodi wa bena mvita kutuaye binu panshi, utendakena Eliya, wamba ne: — Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, kunshipi, kabidi kushipi bantu aba makumi atanu bandi nabu!" 
2Kings1:14 Ndi mumanye ne: kapia kavua kafuma mu diulu ke kavua kabutula balombodi ba bena mvita babidi ba kumpala, ne bantu bavuabu nabu. Nanku, ndi nkusengelela, kunshipi to!" 
2Kings1:15 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuambila Eliya ne: — Tuluka, uye nende, kutshinyi to. Muambi Eliya kutuluka, kuya ne mulombodi wa bena mvita kudi mukalenga Akaziya." 
2Kings1:16 Eliya kuambila mukalenga Akaziya ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bu muudi mutume bantu kudi mvidie Baale Zebube, udi mu tshimenga tshia Ekrone bua kumukonka malu, mmumue ne: ku mesu ebe, mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele kamuena Mvidi Mukulu udibu mua kukonka malu. Nanku, kuena ujuka mu bulalu muudi mulale emu to, neufue!”" 
2Kings1:17 Mukalenga Akaziya kufua, anu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile muambi Eliya. Mukalenga Akaziya kavua ne muana wa balume to. Nanku, muanabu Yorame kumupingana mu bukalenga, mu tshidimu tshibidi tshivua Yorame, muana wa Yosafate, mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
2Kings1:18 Malu makuabu a Akaziya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. 
2Kings2:1 Matuku a bungi mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kuambula muambi Eliya mulu mu tshipepela tshia mvunde. Bivua bienzeka mushindu ewu: Eliya ne Elisha kumuka mu Ngilgale, benda pamue mu njila." 
2Kings2:2 Tshitupa tshikese, Eliya kuambila Elisha ne: — Ushale muaba ewu. Maweja-Nangila mmuntume ku Betele. Kadi Elisha kumuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne muudi wewe ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: tshiena nkushiya to! Nanku, kuyabu bonsu babidi ku Betele." 
2Kings2:3 Bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi bavua basombe ku Betele, bavua bebeja Elisha ne: — Udi mumanye ne: lelu Maweja-Nangila neambule mfumuebe Eliya mulu anyi? Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi mumanye bualu ebu, kadi puwayi!" 
2Kings2:4 Eliya kuambila kabidi Elisha ne: — Shala muaba ewu, Maweja-Nangila mmuntume ku Yeriko. Kadi Elisha kumuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne muudi wewe nawu, ndi nditshipa ne tshiakukushiya to. Nanku, kuyabu bonsu babidi ku Yeriko." 
2Kings2:5 Bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi bavua basombe ku Yeriko, kusemena kudi Elisha bamukonka ne: — Udi mumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila neambule mfumuebe Eliya mulu anyi? Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi mumanye bualu ebu, kadi puwayi!" 
2Kings2:6 Eliya kuambila kabidi Elisha ne: — Ushale muaba ewu. Maweja-Nangila mmuntume ku muelelu wa Yardene. Kadi Elisha kumuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne bu muudi wewe ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: tshiena nkushiya to! Nanku, kuyabu bonsu babidi!" 
2Kings2:7 Bambi bu makumi atanu bavua anu benda babalonda. Kadi bambi abu bavua bimanyine pa bule. Kabavua bafike muaba uvua Eliya ne Elisha bimane ku muelelu wa Yardene to. 
2Kings2:8 Eliya kukopola tshinkutu tshiende tshivuaye natshi, kutshibunya, kutshituila pa mayi. Mayi kupanduluka eku ne eku. Nanku, bonsu babidi kusabuka ku makasa kume." 
2Kings2:9 Bobu bamane kusabuka, Eliya kuambila Elisha ne: — Undombe tshiudi musue, bua meme kukuenzela, bangabanga ne Maweja-Nangila kungambula, bua tuetu kushiyangana nebe. Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Ndi musue kupiana mueyelu webe wa buambi misangu ibidi bukole buawu. Eliya kumuandamuna ne:" 
2Kings2:10 — Udi mulombe tshintu tshikole bua kutshipeta. Kadi, wewe mummone padi Maweja-Nangila ungambula bua tuetu kushiyangana, neupete tshiudi mulombe. Kadi, pawikala kuyi mummone, kuakupeta tshiudi mulombe to." 
2Kings2:11 Patshivuabu benda bayukila, kumonabu ditempu diela ndimi ya kapia. Nyama ya tubalu ivua ikoka ditempu adi, ivua yela kabidi ndimi ya kapia. Nanku, ditempu adi ne nyama ya tubalu, kupita pankatshi pa Eliya ne Elisha bua kubapandulula. Diakamue, tshipepela tshia mvunde kuambula Eliya mulu." 
2Kings2:12 Elisha umona nanku, kuelaye lubila ne: — Tatu wanyi! Tatu wanyi! Wewe udi mupite matempu a mvita onsu ne babandi ba pa tubalu bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Pavua Elisha kayi mumone kabidi Eliya, kupandaye bilamba biende bipese bibidi." 
2Kings2:13 Pashishe, kuangulaye tshinkutu tshivua Eliya mumatshishe panshi. Kupinganaye ku muelelu wa Yardene, kuimana." 
2Kings2:14 Kuambulaye tshinkutu atshi, kutuuta pa mayi a musulu, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Eliya, udi penyi? Eyowa, udi penyi? Kutuutaye tshinkutu pa mayi a musulu. Mayi kupanduluka eku ne eku. Elisha kusabuka." 
2Kings2:15 Bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi bavua mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko bavua batangila pa bule, bamone bionsu bivua Elisha wenza. Kuambilanganabu ne: “Mueyelu wa muambi udi ulombola Elisha.” Kuyabu kusambakena ne Elisha. Kumutuilabu mpala panshi," 
2Kings2:16 bamuambila ne: Tangila, tudi ne bantu makumi atanu badi ne bukitu. Tudi basue kubatuma bua baye kukeba mfumuebe Eliya. Bualu Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila uvua muambule Eliya, udi mua kuikala mumuimanshe pa mikuna, nansha mu tshibandabanda. Kadi, Elisha kubakandika bua kabatumi bantu abu to." 
2Kings2:17 Kadi, bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi abu, kusuminyina Elisha bikole. Nanku, kuitabaye. Kutumabu bantu abu makumi atanu. Kukebabu Eliya matuku asatu. Kabena bamumona to." 
2Kings2:18 Bobu bamane kupingana kudi Elisha mu Yeriko, kubambilaye ne: — Meme mvua mumane kunukandika bua kanuyi to!" 
2Kings2:19 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko kuambila Elisha ne: — Mukalenga wetu, udi mumone ne: tshimenga tshietu ntshiasa pa muaba muimpe. Kadi, mayi adi mabi kena mimpe to. Adi atudisha bantu ne nyama mafu mu ditunga." 
2Kings2:20 Elisha kubambila ne: — Elayi luepu mu dilonga dipiadipia, numpeshe. Kumupeshabu." 
2Kings2:21 Elisha kuya ku mpokolu, kuela luepu mu mayi awu, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, udi wamba ne: “Ndi mulengeje mayi aa. Kaena mua kushipa bantu kabidi, nansha kutudisha mafu to.”" 
2Kings2:22 Nanku mayi kulengela. Atshidi mimpe too ne mpindiewu anu bu muvua Elisha muambe. 
2Kings2:23 Elisha kumuka mu Yeriko, kuya mu Betele. Pawaye mu njila, bana ba balume bavua bafume mu tshimenga, kumuseka, bela mbila ne: — Muena dibala, banda! Muena dibala, banda!" 
2Kings2:24 Elisha ukenzakana, kubamona. Kubatshipaye mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Ke nyama ya lonji ibidi kupatuka mu ditu, kushipa bana ba balume makumi anayi ne babidi, kubasunsula." 
2Kings2:25 Pashishe, Elisha kuya ku mukuna wa Karmele. Umuka ku mukuna wa Karmele, kupinganaye mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings3:1 Yorame, muana wa Akabe, uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua Izrayele mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu, tshivua Yosafate mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Yorame kushala mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Samariya bidimu dikumi ne bibidi." 
2Kings3:2 Uvua muenze malu mabi avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi, anu bu muvua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, muenze. Uvua anu wenza malu mabi onsu avua Yerobowame muenze. Kadi, Yorame kavua wenza bibi bipite, bu mumve tatuende ne mamuende benza to. Bualu uvua munyangakaje dikunji dia kutendelela mvidie Baale di wa tatuende Akabe muashile mvidie awu." 
2Kings3:3  
2Kings3:4 Mesha, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, uvua mumunyi wa mikoku. Ku tshidimu tshionsu, uvua ne bua kulambula mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bana ba mikoku binunu lukama, ne mikoku binunu lukama kabiyi bikosa miosa to." 
2Kings3:5 Kadi, mukalenga Akabe mumane kufua, Mesha kutombokela Yorame uvua mupingane Akabe mu bukalenga." 
2Kings3:6 Nanku, Yorame kumuka mu Samariya, bua kubandila bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bonsu." 
2Kings3:7 Pashishe, kutumaye bantu bua kuambila Yesafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne: “Mukalenga wa bena Mowabe mmuntombokele. Tudi mua kuya nebe bua kuluisha ditunga diende anyi?” Yosafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kuandamuna ne: “Ndi muanyishe. Wewe ne meme tudi bantu bamue. Bantu bebe mbanyi meme. Bantu banyi mbebe wewe. Nyama yebe ya tubalu nyanyi meme. Nyama yanyi ya tubalu nyebe wewe.”" 
2Kings3:8 Kadi, Yosafate kukonka Yorame ne: “Netuyile njila kaayi?” Yorame kuandamuna ne: “Netuyile mu tshipela tshia Edome. ”" 
2Kings3:9 Bakalenga aba, wa bena Izrayele, wa bena Yuda, ne wa bena Edome kutuadija luendu. Bobu bamane kuenda matuku muanda mutekete, kabena bapeta kabidi mayi bua bena mvita kunuabu, nansha bua kunuisha nyama ivuabu nayi to." 
2Kings3:10 Nanku, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kuela lubila ne: — Diakabi! Maweja-Nangila ke udi mututume tuetu bonsu bakalenga basatu muaba ewu, bua kutufikisha mu bianza bia bena Mowabe!" 
2Kings3:11 Kadi, Yosafate kukonka ne: — Muaba ewu, kakuena muambi udi mua kutuebejila malu kudi Maweja-Nangila anyi? Mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kuandamuna ne: — Tudi ne Elisha, muana wa Shafate. Yeye uvua wambuluisha muambi Eliya bikole." 
2Kings3:12 Yosafate kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe! Muntu awu, neatumanyishe tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue kutuambila. Diakamue, bakalenga aba, wa bena Izrayele, wa bena Yuda ne wa bena Edome, kuya kumonangana ne Elisha." 
2Kings3:13 Muambi Elisha kukonka mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne: — Udi mulue kumatshisha bua tshinyi? Udi mua kuya kuebeja malu kudi bambi ba tatuebe, nansha bambi ba mamuebe! Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kubenga ne: — Nansha! Tuetu bakalenga basatu, Maweja-Nangila ke udi mututume muaba ewu, bua kutufila mu bianza bia bena Mowabe." 
2Kings3:14 Elisha kubambila kabidi ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, undi ngenzela mudimu ne muoyi, ndi nnuandamuna anu, bualu ndi nnemeka Yosafate mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Bu meme tshiyi nnemeka Yosafate, tshivua mua kukuteleja, nansha kukutangila mene to." 
2Kings3:15 Mpindiewu, nufike kundi ne muimbi wa tshisanji. Muimbi wa tshisanji utuadija kuimba, bukole bua Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Elisha." 
2Kings3:16 Elisha kutuadija kuakula, wamba ne: — Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: “Imbayi biina bia bungi mu musulu udi muume," 
2Kings3:17 bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika ne: Tshibandabanda etshi netshiwule mayi tente. Kanuakumvua lupepela to. Kanuakumona mvula to. Kadi, nenupete mayi a kunua, nuenu, bimuna bienu, ne nyama mikuabu inudi nayi.”" 
2Kings3:18 Kadi, bualu ebu mbualu bukese kudi Maweja-Nangila. Yeye neafile kabidi ditunga dia bena Mowabe mu bianza bienu." 
2Kings3:19 Nenubutule bimenga bimpe bionsu bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Nenupule mitshi ya bimuma yonsu. Nenujibikile mpokolu ya mayi yonsu. Kabidi nenunyangakaje madimi onsu adibu badime, nenuimanshemu mabue." 
2Kings3:20 Butshia dinda, diba dia kulambula milambu, kumonabu mayi afumina mu ditunga dia Edome, kuwujawu buloba." 
2Kings3:21 Bena Mowabe kupeta lumu lua difika dia bakalenga basatu bua kubaluisha. Nanku, kusangishabu bantu bonsu batshivua ne bukole bua kuambula bia mvita. Kubatekabu ku mikalu ya ditunga." 
2Kings3:22 Mu dinda, bena mvita ba bena Mowabe babike ku tulu, kumonabu nkenke ya diba imueneka mu mayi. Mayi awu, avua amueneka pa bule bu mashi." 
2Kings3:23 Nanku bena Mowabe kuela mbila ne: — Eyi, mmashi! Bulelela, bakalenga abu ne bena mvita badibu nabu, ke bavua basangane, bashipangane nkayabu. Bena Mowabe jukayi, tuye kupawula!" 
2Kings3:24 Kadi, bena Mowabe bamane kufika pabuipi ne mitanda ya bena Izrayele, ke bena Izrayele kujuka, kubaluisha. Nanku, bena Mowabe kunyema. Bena Izrayele kubalondakaja, kubuela mu buloba bua bena Mowabe. Kubutulabu bena Mowabe bapite bungi." 
2Kings3:25 Kunyangakajabu bimenga. Yonsu wa kudibu kuimansha dibue mu madimi avua bena Mowabe badime, too ne pavua mabue mapite bungi mu madimi onsu. Kujibikilabu mpokolu yonsu, kupulabu mitshi ya bimuma yonsu. Anu tshimenga tshia Kirerese ke tshivua tshishale kabayi batshinyanga to. Kadi, bena mvita bavua ne ndundu ya kuela nayi nsoka, kunyungululabu tshimenga atshi, kutshiluisha." 
2Kings3:26 Mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, kumona ne: mvita ayi mmipite bukole. Nanku kusangishaye bena mvita bende nkama muanda mutekete bavua ne miela. Kuidikijabu mua kupanda njila bua kufikabu kudi mukalenga wa bena Edome. Kadi kakuvua mushindu to." 
2Kings3:27 Ke mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, kubikidisha muanende wa balume muanabute, uvua mua kumupingana mu bukalenga. Kumulambulaye pa tshimana tshia tshimenga atshi bu mulambu wa kuosha. Bena Izrayele bamone nanku, kutshinabu bikole. Kumukabu muaba awu, kupingana kuabu." 
2Kings4:1 Mukaji mukuabu uvua mufuishe bayende. Bayende awu uvua wa mu tshisumbu tshia bambi. Mukaji awu kuya kudi Elisha, umusengelela bua kumuambuluisha, wamba ne: — Elisha, udi mumanye ne: bayanyi mmumane kufua. Kadi, muntu uvua mutusombeshe makuta, mmufike bua kuangata bana banyi babidi, bua bashale bapika bende." 
2Kings4:2 Elisha kumukonka ne: — Tshindi mua kukuenzela ntshinyi? Ungambile tshiudi natshi ku nzubu kuebe? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Tshiena ne tshintu to. Ndi mushale anu ne tufuta tukese mu kasu, tundi ndilaba pambidi." 
2Kings4:3 Elisha kumuambila kabidi ne: — Uye kudi bena mutumba nebe, usombe biasu bikuabu bia mafuta bia munda mutupu. Kadi, usombe bia bungi." 
2Kings4:4 Pashishe, uye ku nzubu kuebe ne bana bebe. Ukange tshiibi bimpe. Wela mafuta mu biasu abi bionsu. Ubiteke ku luseke padibi biuwula." 
2Kings4:5 Nanku, mukaji kuya. Ufika ku nzubu kuende, kudinjidilaye mu nzubu ne bana bende. Bana kutuadija kumupesha biasu, yeye welamu mafuta tente." 
2Kings4:6 Biasu bimane kuwula, kulombaye muanende mukuabu ne: — Mpeshayi tshiasu tshikuabu tshia munda mutupu. Kadi, biasu bionsu bivua bimane kuwula. Muana kumuambila ne: — Biasu bikuabu kabienaku to. Nanku, mafuta kukama." 
2Kings4:7 Mukaji kuya kuambila muambi Elisha bionsu abi. Muambi Elisha kumuandamuna ne: — Uye kusumbisha mafuta awu, ufute dibanza. Kadi makuta adi ashale neakuambuluishe ne bana bebe." 
2Kings4:8 Dituku dikuabu, Elisha uvua upitshila mu musoku wa Shuneme. Mu musoku awu, muvua mukaji mubanji. Mukaji awu, kusengelela Elisha bua alue kudia biakudia kuende. Nanku, biangatshile dituku adi, pavua Elisha upitshila mu buloba abu, uvua anu uya kudia biakudia kua mukaji awu." 
2Kings4:9 Mukaji kuambila bayende ne: — Ndi mujadike ne: muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu, udi ufika ku nzubu kuetu misangu yonsu, mmuntu wa tshijila." 
2Kings4:10 Tudi mua kuibaka tshibambalu tshikese kulu kua nzubu, tutekemu bulalu, mesa, nkuasa ne muendu. Neikale ulala mu tshibambalu atshi, padiye upitshila kuetu." 
2Kings4:11 Ke pavua muambi Elisha mufike ku nzubu kua bantu abu dituku dikuabu. Kubandaye kulu mu tshibambalu tshiende bua kulalamu. 
2Kings4:12 Ke muambi Elisha kutuma muena mudimu wende Ngeyazi bua kubikila muena nzubu awu. Mukaji awu kufika ku tshibambalu aku," 
2Kings4:13 Elisha kuela Ngeyazi diyi, bua ambile mukaji awu ne: — Udi muditatshishe bikole bualu buetu. Tshitudi mua kukuenzela ntshinyi? Udi musue tukuakuile kudi mukalenga, nansha kudi mfumu wa bena mvita anyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Nansha kakese, tuasakidilayi. Meme ndi munkatshi mua bena tshisamba tshietu. Tshiena nkengela tshintu to." 
2Kings4:14 Elisha kukonka Ngeyazi ne: — Tumuenzele tshinyi? Ngeyazi kuandamuna ne: — Kena ne muana wa balume to. Kabidi bayende ukadi mumane kukulakaja. 
2Kings4:15 Elisha kuambila Ngeyazi ne: — Bikila mukaji awu tshiakabidi. Ngeyazi kumubikila. Anu mukaji utua makasa ku tshiibi," 
2Kings4:16 Elisha kumuambila ne: — Tshidimu tshidi kumpala etshi, anu tshikondu etshi, neukongoloje muana wa balume mu maboku. Kadi, mukaji kuela diyi ne: — Kundingi to! Wewe udi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, lekela kungambila bualu bua dishima!" 
2Kings4:17 Mukaji awu, kuimita difu. Tshidimu tshikuabu, anu tshikondu tshia mumue atshi, kulelaye muana wa balume muvua muambi Elisha mumuambile." 
2Kings4:18 Muana awu kukola. Dituku dikuabu, kuyaye kumonangana ne tatuende uvua wenza mudimu mu madimi ne banowi ba bintu." 
2Kings4:19 Diakamue muana kudila, wamba ne: — Eyi tatu! Mutu wanyi! Mutu udi usama! Tatuende kuambila muena mudimu ne: — Muambula, umufile lukasa kudi mamuende." 
2Kings4:20 Muena mudimu kuya ne muana kudi mamuende. Mamuende kumuambula pambidi. Kadi munda munya, muana kufila." 
2Kings4:21 Ke mamuende wa muana kubanda ne muana mu tshibambalu tshivua Elisha ulala. Kumuladika pa bulalu bua Elisha, kuinjila ku mbelu. Mukaji kuya mu madimi," 
2Kings4:22 kubikila bayende, umuambila ne: — Ntumina muena mudimu ne nyama wa mpunde. Ndi nya lukasa kudi muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nempingane." 
2Kings4:23 Bayende kumukonka ne: — Udi uya kudi muambi lelu bua tshinyi? Ki ndituku dia tshibilu tshia ngondu mupiamupia, nansha dituku dia Dikisha mene! Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Kupampakanyi to!" 
2Kings4:24 Kusuikaye biseba bia kusomba pa nyama wa mpunde. Kuambilaye muena mudimu ne: — Tuyeku lubilu ne nyama wa mpunde, umusake too ne muaba undi nkuambila bua kuimana." 
2Kings4:25 Mukaji kuya, ulonda njila wa ku mukuna wa Karmele bua kumonangana ne muambi Elisha. Muambi Elisha umona mukaji utshidi pa bule, kuambila muena mudimu wende Ngeyazi ne: — Tangila, ke mukaji utu ungakidila ku Shuneme wawa." 
2Kings4:26 Nyema lukasa, umukonke ne: “Wewe, bayebe ne bana, nudi bimpe anyi?” Mukaji kuandamuna Ngeyazi, muena mudimu wa muambi, ne: — Tudi bimpe!" 
2Kings4:27 Kadi, mukaji ufika pabuipi ne muambi Elisha ku mukuna wa Karmele, kudiela panshi, kumukuata ku makasa. Ngeyazi uvua musue kumusakila. Kadi Elisha kumukandika ne: — Mulekela! Udi ne dibungama. Tshiena mumanye kudidi difuma, bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena mungambile." 
2Kings4:28 Mutantshi mukese, mukaji kuela diyi ne: — Meme mvua mukulombe muana wa balume anyi? Nansha! Meme mvua mukuambile ne: “Kuena mua kundaya bualu bua dishima!”" 
2Kings4:29 Elisha kukonka Ngeyazi ne: — Udi mumane kudilongolola bua kuya anyi? Angata dikombu dianyi dia buambi, uye ku Shuneme. Wewe musangile ne muntu mu njila, kuimanyi bua kumuela muoyi to. Padi muntu musue kukuela muoyi, kujimiji diba bua kuyukila nende to. Pawafika, uteke dikombu dianyi pa mpala pa muana." 
2Kings4:30 Kadi mamuende wa muana kuambila muambi Elisha ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ne wewe kabidi muikale ne muoyi, tshiena mua kupingana nkayanyi, katuyi nebe! Nanku Elisha kuya ne mukaji awu." 
2Kings4:31 Kadi Ngeyazi uvua mumane kufika kumpala kuabu. Kutekaye dikombu dia muambi Elisha pa mpala pa muana. Kadi kena mumone bualu. Muana kena muakule, kena munyungakane. Ngeyazi kupingana kudi muambi Elisha, umuambila ne: — Muana kena mutabale to." 
2Kings4:32 Elisha ufika ku nzubu, kusanganaye tshitalu tshia muana tshiladike anu pa bulalu." 
2Kings4:33 Elisha kubuela mu nzubu, kuinjila tshiibi. Kutuadijaye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings4:34 Pashishe, kulalaye pambidi pa muana, mutue mishiku ku yende, mesu matue ku a muana, bianza biende bitue ku bia muana. Pavua muambi mulale pambidi pa muana, mubidi wa muana kumvua luya." 
2Kings4:35 Elisha kujuka, kuenda mu nzubu awu, utua eku ne eku. Pashishe kulalaye kabidi pambidi pa muana. Muana kuela nyashi misangu muanda mutekete, kutabalaye." 
2Kings4:36 Diakamue, Elisha kubikila Ngeyazi kumuambila ne: — Ndaku, ubikile mamuende wa muana. Ngeyazi kutuluka bua kukeba mamuende wa muana. Awu ufika, Elisha kumuambila ne: — Luaku, wangata muanebe." 
2Kings4:37 Mamu usemena, kudiela mpala panshi ku makasa a muambi Elisha. Pashishe, kuambulaye muanende, kuya." 
2Kings4:38 Tshikondu tshivua tshiyole tshia nzala mu ditunga, Elisha kupingana mu tshimenga tshia Ngilgale. Kubikidishaye tshisumbu tshia bambi. Kuambilaye muena mudimu wende ne: — Teka luesu lunene pa kapia, utulambile nsupu." 
2Kings4:39 Ke, muambi wa tshisumbu tshia bambi abu, kuya mu mpata bua kukeba biseki. Kusanganaye tshilowalowa tshilambile ku mutshi. Kupolaye bimuma biatshi bia kolokente, kudisuika mu tshilamba tshivuaye natshi. Upingana pambelu, kubikosololaye, kubiela mu luesu. Kadi muntu nansha umue kavua mumanye ne: mbimuma bia mushindu kaayi to." 
2Kings4:40 Pavuabu bapesha bantu nsupu awu, bavua bamulabula. Diakamue kuelabu mbila bamba ne: — Muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu, lufu ludi mu nsupu emu! Bualu muntu nansha umue kavua mua kumunua to." 
2Kings4:41 Ke muambi kulombesha bukula, kubuela mu nsupu, kuambila muena mudimu wende ne: — Pesha bantu aba nsupu ewu, banue! Nanku bintu bivua mu luesu bikavua bimpe, bikumbane mua kubidia." 
2Kings4:42 Tshikondu atshi, muntu mukuabu uvua utumina ku Baale-Shalisha. Uvua mutuadile muambi mampa a orje makumi abidi, menza ne bukula bupiabupia. Uvua kabidi ne tshibombi tshia ntete iwaye munowe anu matuku awu. Elisha kuambila muena mudimu wende bua kuabanyina bantu bonsu biakudia abi." 
2Kings4:43 Kadi muena mudimu kumukonka ne: — Biakudia ebi, ndi mua kudisha nabi bantu lukama munyi? Muambi Elisha kumuambila kabidi ne: — Abanyine bantu bonsu biakudia ebi, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Muntu yonsu neapete biakudia bikumbane, bikuabu nebishale.”" 
2Kings4:44 Muena mudimu kuabanyina bantu bonsu mampa. Muntu yonsu kudia. Mampa makuabu kushala, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
2Kings5:1 Mukalenga wa bena Siriya, uvua ne mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita bende, dina diende Namane. Mukalenga wa bena Siriya uvua usanka bua bionsu bivua Namane wenza. Kabidi uvua wenzela Namane bimpe, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mupeshe Namane bukole, bua bena Siriya bamone mua kutshimuna baluishi babu. Nanku, Namane ewu, uvua tshilobu tshia mvita tshia kalanda-musenga, kadi uvua ne disama dia nsudi." 
2Kings5:2 Kadi, pavua bena Siriya baye bua kubuela mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, kunyenga bintu, kukuatabu nsongakaji wa mu ditunga adi bua kuikalaye mupika. Nsongakaji awu kushala wenzela mukaji wa Namane mudimu." 
2Kings5:3 Dituku dikuabu, nsongakaji awu kuambila mfumuende wa mudimu, mukaji wa Namane, ne: — Bulelela, bu mfumuanyi Namane muye kudi muambi udi mu tshimenga tshia Samariya, muambi awu udi mua kujikija disama diende dia nsudi lukasa." 
2Kings5:4 Nanku Namane kuya kuambila mukalenga wa bena Siriya bionsu bivuabu bambe kudi nsongakaji wa bena Izrayele abi. 
2Kings5:5 Mukalenga wa bena Siriya kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, mbimpe! Ndi nkupa mukanda, uye kumonangana ne mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, umupe mukanda awu. Nanku Namane kuya kudi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne bintu ebi: tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo bu nkama isatu, tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo makumi asambombu, ne bilamba dikumi bia kuvuala dituku dia tshibilu." 
2Kings5:6 Namane kupesha mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mukanda uvuabu bamutumine kudi mukalenga wa bena Siriya, umuambila ne: “Ndi nkutumina Namane, mulombodi wa bena mvita banyi, ne mukanda ewu, bua umondape disama diende dia nsudi.”" 
2Kings5:7 Anu mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ubala mukanda awu, kudipandaye bilamba, wela mbila ne: — Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kufululula bantu, nansha kubashipa anyi? Mukalenga wa bena Siriya, udi untumina muntu bua meme kumondapa disama dia nsudi! Monayi mudi mukalenga ewu umbunda!" 
2Kings5:8 Muambi Elisha umvua ne: mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mmudipande bilamba, kumutuminaye muntu bua kumukonka ne: — Udi upampakana, udipanda bilamba bua tshinyi? Muntu awu afike ku nzubu kuanyi, bua ujaddike ne: mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele mudi muambi bulelela." 
2Kings5:9 Nanku Namane kuya ne ditempu dia mvita ne nyama ya tubalu, kuimana mu tshiibi tshia ku nzubu wa muambi Elisha." 
2Kings5:10 Muambi Elisha kutuma muntu bua kumuambila ne: — Uye kudiina mu mayi a Yardene misangu muanda mutekete. Disama diebe nedijike. Kuakuikala kabidi ne mikiya to. 
2Kings5:11 Namane kumuka, mufike munda, wamba ne: — Mvua ngela meji ne: muambi Elisha neapatuke mu nzubu bua kuimana kumpala kuanyi, kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, kundenga muaba udi disama dia nsudi bua kudijikija." 
2Kings5:12 Abana ne Parpare, misulu ya mu Damase, kayena mipite misulu ya mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele anyi? Meme mowe mayi mu misulu yetu ayi, disama dianyi kadiena mua kujika anyi? Nanku Namane kupingana, mufike munda." 
2Kings5:13 Kadi bena mudimu ba Namane, kusemena pabuipi nende, bamukonka ne: — Mfumu, bu muambi Elisha mukuambile bua kuenza bualu bunene, kuvua mua kubuenza anyi? Kadi, udi ubenga bua kuenza tshidiye mukuambile, bua kuowa anu mayi, disama diebe kujikadi, bua tshinyi?" 
2Kings5:14 Namane kuya ku Yardene, kudiina mu mayi misangu muanda mutekete, bu muvua muambi Elisha mumuambile. Nanku disama diende kujikadi. Dikoba diende kushala bu dia muana mutekete." 
2Kings5:15 Diakamue, Namane ne bonsu bavuaye nabu kupingana ku nzubu kua muambi Elisha. Namane kuimana kumpala kua muambi, kumuambila ne: — Mpindiewu ndi mumanye ne: pa buloba bujima kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu to, anu wa bena Izrayele. Nanku ndi nkusengelela: wangate mulambu undi nkupesha ewu." 
2Kings5:16 Kadi muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila undi nkuatshila mudimu ne muoyi, ndi nkujadikila ne: tshiena ngangata tshintu nansha tshimue. Namane uvua anu umusengelela, kadi muambi Elisha kubenga." 
2Kings5:17 Namane kumuambila kabidi ne: — Bu muudi ubenga bionsu bindi mukutuadile, anyisha ngambule buloba bua mu ditunga diebe, bukumbane mua kuambulabu kudi nyama ibidi ya mpunde. Bualu tshitshiena musue kulambula mvidie mikuabu milambu ya diosha nansha ya bobumue to, anu Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Kings5:18 Kadi ndi ndianza kulomba Maweja-Nangila bua amfuile luse, bualu padi mfumuanyi, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, ubuela mu nzubu wa mvidie wende Rimone bua kutendelela, ndi ne bua kuinama panshi musangu umue nende, bualu utu unshindamena pa dikaya. Nanku Maweja-Nangila amfuile luse pandi ngenza mushindu awu." 
2Kings5:19 Elisha kumuambila ne: — Waya amu bimpe. Kakuena bualu. Namane kuya. Namane kayi muanji kuya mutantshi mule," 
2Kings5:20 Ngeyazi, muena mudimu wa muambi Elisha kuela meji ne: “Mfumuanyi Elisha mmubenge bintu bionsu bivuabu bamulambula kudi Namane, muena Siriya. Nanku, bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, ndi ndonda Namane bua kupeta bintu bikuabu bidiye nabi!”" 
2Kings5:21 Ke Ngeyazi kulonda Namane. Namane umona Ngeyazi umulonda lubilu, kutulukaye mu ditempu, kuya lukasa bua kusambakena ne Ngeyazi, umukonka ne: — Mmalu kaayi?" 
2Kings5:22 Ngeyazi kuandamuna ne: — Malu mimpe. Mfumuanyi Elisha mmuntume anu bua kukuambila ne: bantu babidi ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi, mbafike ku nzubu kuende, bafumine mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Elisha udi ukulomba bua ufumine bambi abu biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole kilo makumi asatu, kabidi ne bilamba bibidi bia kuvuala dituku dia tshibilu." 
2Kings5:23 Namane kumuambila ne: — Anyisha bua kuangata biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole kilo makumi asambombu. Namane kusengelela Ngeyazi bua kuangata bintu abi. Namane kuela tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole atshi mu bibombi bibidi, kusuika bibombi abi. Kulongololaye kabidi bilamba bibidi bimpe bia kuvuala. Kupeshaye bena mudimu bende babidi bintu bionsu abi bua baye kushindikija Ngeyazi." 
2Kings5:24 Bobu bamane kufika muaba uvuabu babikila ne: Ofele. Ngeyazi kuangata bibombi abi ne bilamba abi, kubiteka mu nzubu muende. Pashishe, kupingaja bena mudimu abu kudi mfumuabu Namane." 
2Kings5:25 Ngeyazi kupingana muaba uvua mfumuende Elisha. Elisha kumukonka ne: — Ngeyazi, udi ufuma penyi? Ngeyazi kuandamuna ne: — Mfumuanyi, tshivua muye ku muaba to." 
2Kings5:26 Muambi Elisha kumukonka kabidi ne: — Kuena mumanye ne: mu lungenyi luanyi mvua mumone muntu utuluka mu ditempu lukasa bua kusambakena nebe anyi? Tshikondu katshiena tshikumbane bua wewe kuangata bilamba bimpe, ne nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole bua kusumba nayi mitshi ya olive, madimi a mvinyo, bimuna binene ne bikese, nansha bena mudimu balume ne bakaji." 
2Kings5:27 Bualu, disama dia nsudi divua nadi Namane nedikuambulukile, wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe kashidi! Ngeyazi umuka muaba uvua muambi Elisha, mubidi wende uvua mutoke too bu busu bua ndanda ne disama dia nsudi." 
2Kings6:1 Dituku dikuabu, bantu ba mu tshisumbu tshia bambi, kuambila mfumuabu Elisha ne: — Tangila nzubu utudi badisangisha nebe ewu, kena mutukumbane to. Udi mupite bukese." 
2Kings6:2 Anyisha, tuye ku muelelu wa Yardene, bua muntu yonsu wa kutudi atape mutshi munene, bua tuetu kuasa nzubu mupiamupia wa tshisangilu muaba ewu. Muambi Elisha kubandamuna ne: — Ndayi." 
2Kings6:3 Kadi muambi mukuabu wa ku bambi abu, kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, mbimpe tuye nebe! Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi nya nenu." 
2Kings6:4 Nanku, kuyaye nabu ku muelelu wa Yardene. Kutapabu mitshi muaba awu." 
2Kings6:5 Kadi, pavua muntu mukuabu wa kudibu utapa mutshi, tshisuyi tshiende kukukatshi mu mulabi, kumata mu mayi. Muntu awu kuela diyi ne: — Mfumuanyi, ndiakabi kaayi edi! Tshisuyi tshivua tshia bende tshisomba!" 
2Kings6:6 Muambi Elisha kumukonka ne: — Tshisuyi ntshimate muaba kaayi? Muntu awu kumuleja muaba uvua tshisuyi tshimatshile. Ke muambi Elisha kukosa tshitupa tshia mutshi, kutshiela muaba uvua tshisuyi tshimatshile awu. Diakamue tshisuyi kulelematshi." 
2Kings6:7 Muambi Elisha kuambila muntu awu ne: — Angata tshisuyi tshiebe. Muntu awu kuolola amu tshianza, kuambula tshisuyi tshiende." 
2Kings6:8 Tshikondu tshivua mukalenga wa bena Siriya uluisha bena Izrayele, kuyukilaye ne balombodi ba bena mvita bende. Kubambilaye muaba uvuaye musue bua bena mvita bende kuasa mitanda yabu." 
2Kings6:9 Kadi muambi Elisha kutuma bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bua kumuambila ne: — Nudimuke! Kanuena mua kupitshila muaba kampande awu to, bualu bena mvita ba bena Siriya badiku." 
2Kings6:10 Nanku mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua mua kutuma bena mvita bua batentekele muaba awu. Misangu yonsu ivua bena mvita ba bena Siriya badilongolola bua kuluisha bena Izrayele, muambi Elisha uvua anu umanyisha mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Nanku mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua anu mudimuke." 
2Kings6:11 Bu muvua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mudianjile kumanya tshifufu tshionsu tshia mukalenga wa bena Siriya, bualu ebu kutonda mukalenga wa bena Siriya bikole bitambe. Nanku mukalenga wa bena Siriya kubikidisha balombodi ba bena mvita bende, ubakonka ne: — Munkatshi muetu mudi muntu udi uya kuambila bena Izrayele malu. Kanuena basue kungambila dina dia muntu awu bua tshinyi?" 
2Kings6:12 Mulombodi mukuabu wa bena mvita kumuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, munkatshi muetu kamuena muntu udi uya kuamba malu to! Kadi muambi Elisha udi mu Izrayele, udi umanyisha mukalenga wende wa bena Izrayele malu onsu, too ne audi wakula mu tshibambalu tshiebe tshia bulalu." 
2Kings6:13 Ke mukalenga wa bena Siriya kutuma diyi ne: — Ndayi, numone muaba udi muambi Elisha musombe, bua ntume bantu baye kumukuata. Bobu bamane kumuambila ne: — Muambi Elisha udi ku Dotane." 
2Kings6:14 Mukalenga wa bena Siriya kutuma bena mvita ba bukitu ku Dotane. Bena mvita abu, bavua baye ne matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu. Kufikabu mu tshimenga atshi butuku, kutshinyungulula." 
2Kings6:15 Butshia dinda, muena mudimu wa muambi Elisha ubika bua kupatuka mu tshimenga, kumonaye bena mvita, nyama ya tubalu ne matempu a mvita, binyungulula tshimenga. Muena mudimu kuela diyi ne: — Eyi, mfumuanyi! Netuenze tshinyi?" 
2Kings6:16 Muambi Elisha kumuandamuna ne: — Kutshinyi to! Batudi nabu tuetu mbapite badibu nabu ku bungi. 
2Kings6:17 Muambi Elisha kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, tabaja mesu a muena mudimu ewu bua kumonaye. Maweja-Nangila kutabaja mesu a muena mudimu wa muambi Elisha. Muena mudimu kumona muambi Elisha, bamuela munkatshi kudi mikuna, pa mikuna apu pikala nyama ya tubalu ya bungi, ne matempu a mvita atema kapia." 
2Kings6:18 Kadi, bena mvita ba bena Siriya kusemena pabuipi ne muambi Elisha. Muambi Elisha kutendelela kabidi Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, ufofamije mesu a bena mvita aba. Ke Maweja-Nangila kufofamija mesu abu, bu muvua muambi Elisha mulombe." 
2Kings6:19 Pashishe, muambi Elisha kuambila bena mvita abu ne: — Nudi bapambuke njila. Kabena banutuma mu tshimenga etshi to. Nundonde, bua mufikishe kudi muntu unudi nukeba. Kadi muambi Elisha kuya nabu mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings6:20 Bafike mu tshimenga atshi, muambi Elisha kutendelela kabidi Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, mpindiewu tabaja kabidi mesu a bena mvita aba bua bamone. Maweja-Nangila mumane kutabaja mesu abu, kumonabu bakadi mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings6:21 Anu mukalenga wa bena Izrayele umona bena mvita abu bonsu, kukonkaye muambi Elisha ne: — Tatu wanyi, mbimpe kubashipa anyi?" 
2Kings6:22 Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Nansha, kuena mua kubashipa to. Bantu badi bantu bebe bakuata mu mvita, utu ubashipesha anyi? Nanku bantu aba, ubapeshe biakudia ne bia kunua. Pashishe, ubalekele, bapingane kudi mukalenga wabu." 
2Kings6:23 Nanku, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kubalambishila biakudia bia bungi. Bobu bamane kujikija kudia ne kunua, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kubalekela. Kupinganabu kudi mukalenga wabu wa bena Siriya. Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bena mvita ba bena Siriya, kabavua bafika kabidi mu buloba bua bena Izrayele to." 
2Kings6:24 Mu tshikondu tshikuabu, Benadade, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, kusangisha bena mvita bende bonsu bua kuya kuluisha tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings6:25 Mu tshimenga atshi, muvua tshiyole tshia nzala tshikole tshitambe. Bualu bena mvita abu, bavua balama tshimenga atshi bikole. Nanku bena tshimenga kusumbishangana mutu wa nyama wa mpunde, ku nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole muanda mukulu, ne kilo umue wa nkunde ku nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole itanu." 
2Kings6:26 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua wenda pa tshimana tshia tshimenga. Mukaji mukuabu kumuela diyi ne: — Mfumuanyi, ungambuluishe!" 
2Kings6:27 Kadi mukalenga kumuandamuna ne: — Pikala Maweja-Nangila kayi ubambuluisha, meme nenkuambuluishe ne tshinyi? Bualu kakuena kushala ntete ya kuenza bukula nansha maluvu." 
2Kings6:28 Kadi mukalenga kumukonka kabidi ne: — Tshiudi ujinga ntshinyi? Mukaji kuandamuna ne: — Udi mumone mukaji ewu anyi? Dituku dikuabu uvua mungambile ne: tudie muanebe wa balume lelu, patshiabu netudie wanyi." 
2Kings6:29 Nanku tuetu bamane kulamba muananyi wa balume, badie, butshia dinda, meme kumuambila bua afike ne muanende wa balume bua tuetu kudia. Kadi kumusokokaye." 
2Kings6:30 Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele umvua anu mukaji umulondela bualu abu, kudipanda bilamba. Mukalenga utshivua pa tshimana tshia tshimenga. Nanku bantu bonsu ba mu tshimenga atshi kumonabu ne: mukalenga udi muvuale anu tshilamba tshia munda tshikayabale nkayatshi, tshimulamate pambidi." 
2Kings6:31 Mukalenga kuela diyi ne: — Dilolu edi, pangikala tshiyi mukose mutu wa Elisha, muana wa Shafate, Mvidi Mukulu annyoke ne dinyoka dikole." 
2Kings6:32 Diba adi, muambi Elisha uvua wenza tshisangilu ku nzubu kuende ne bakulu ba mu tshimenga. Nanku mukalenga Yorame wa bena Izrayele kutuma muntu kudi Elisha. Kadi muntu awu kayi muanji kufika, Elisha kuambila bakulu abu ne: — Monayi bualu bua dikema! Mukalenga Yorame, mushipianganyi ewu, udi utuma muntu bua kunkosa mutu. Nudimuke, muntu awu yeye mufike, nuinjile tshiibi bua kabuedi to. Tukadi tunwua mene mukalenga Yorame pende ulonda muntu awu panyima." 
2Kings6:33 Patshivua Muambi Elisha wakula, ke mukalenga kufika, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila ke udi unkengesha nunku! Kadi tshia nsongu tshindi mua kutekemena kabidi kudiye ntshinyi?" 
2Kings7:1 Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Telejayi bonsu! Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Malaba pa diba ditudi edi, mu tshisalu tshia mu Samariya, bantu nebasumbishangane kilo ya bukula dikumi ne ibidi, nansha kilo ya ntete ya oije makumi abidi ne inayi, anu ku lukanu lumue lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole.”" 
2Kings7:2 Kadi muntu uvua wenda ne mukalenga, kubenga, wamba ne: — Nansha Maweja-Nangila mutunzuluile biibi biamu diulu bua kututumina ntete, bualu buudi wamba abu budi mua kuenzeka anyi? Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, wewe neumone bualu ebu. Kadi kuakudi a bintu ebi to." 
2Kings7:3 Bena nsudi banayi bavua pambelu ku tshiibi tshinene tshia tshimenga, kuambilanganabu ne: — Tudi basombe muaba ewu bindila lufu bua tshinyi?" 
2Kings7:4 Tuetu baye mu tshimenga tudi mua kufua, bualu kamuena biakudia kabidi to. Kabidi nansha tuetu bashale muaba ewu tudi anu mua kufua! Nanku, tuyayi mu mitanda ya bena Siriya, tuye kudilambula kudibu. Padibu batulekela ne muoyi bidi bimpe. Kadi padibu basue kutushipa, netufue!" 
2Kings7:5 Nanku dilolu, bena nsudi abu kuya mu mitanda ya bena Siriya. Bobu kufika ku tshibuelelu tshia mu mitanda, kabena basangana muntu to." 
2Kings7:6 Bena Siriya bavua mu mitanda, Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane ibatshinyisha ne mutoyi mukole wa bena mvita, bikale ne nyama ya tubalu ne matempu a mvita. Ke bena Siriya kuambilangana ne: “Yorame, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, mmumane kufuta bakalenga ba bena Iti ne ba bena Ejipitu bua batume bena mvita babu bua kutuluisha.”" 
2Kings7:7 Nanku, butuku, bena Siriya kunyema bua kudisungidila, kushiya mitanda yabu ne bintu biabu bionsu, ntenta, nyama ya tubalu ne mpunde." 
2Kings7:8 Ke bena nsudi banayi abu kufika ku tshibuelelu tshia mitanda ya bena Siriya, kubuela mu ntenta, kudia, kunua bintu bionsu bivuabu basangana. Pashishe, kuangatabu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne bilamba, kuyabu kubisokoka muaba mukuabu. Pashishe kubuelabu mu ntenta mukuabu, kuangata kabidi bintu bishilangane bivuamu, kuya kubisokoka." 
2Kings7:9 Kadi bena nsudi banayi abu kuambilangana ne: — Bitudi tuenza ebi kabiena bimpe to. Lelu tudi bapeta bualu bua disanka. Katuena mua kushala bapuwa to. Tuetu bindile too ne patshia butuku bua kuamba bualu ebu, bulelela Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kutunyoka. Nanku, tuyayi kuambila badi mu nzubu wa mukalenga bualu ebu." 
2Kings7:10 Nanku, kupinganabu mu tshimenga, kubikila batentekedi bavua balame tshiibi tshinene, babambila ne: — Tuvua baye mu mitanda ya bena Siriya, katuena basanganamu muntu to. Kabidi katuena bumvue nansha diyi dia muntu. Tudi basangana anu nyama ya tubalu ne ya mpunde misuike. Tudi basangana kabidi ne ntenta ivuabu balekele." 
2Kings7:11 Diakamue, batentekedi kubikila muntu, kumumanyisha bualu abu, bua aye kuambila bantu bavua mu nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Kings7:12 Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kubika mundankulu, kuambila balombodi ba bukalenga buende ne: — Ndi musue kunumvuija meji mabi adi bena Siriya babielela! Bena Siriya mbamanye ne: tudi ne nzala. Nanku mbumuke mu mitanda yabu, baye kusokoma mu tshisuku. Badi bela meji ne: tuetu bena Izrayele netupatuke mu Samariya. Diba adi, bobu nebabakuate ne muoyi, nebabuele mu tshimenga tshietu." 
2Kings7:13 Mulombodi mukuabu wa mu bukalenga, kupesha mukalenga Yorame meji, umuambila ne: — Tuangate nyama yetu ya tubalu itanu itshidi ne muoyi, (nyama ayi ikadi pa kufua, bu mudi bantu ba mu tshimenga). Tutume bantu bakuabu baye ne nyama ayi bua tumone tshidi mua kuenzeka." 
2Kings7:14 Nanku, mukalenga Yorame kusuika nyama ya tubalu ku matempu a mvita abidi. Kutumaye bena mvita bende nawu bua kukeba bena mvita ba bena Siriya, kabidi bua kujadika bivua mua kuenzeka." 
2Kings7:15 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, kulondakaja bena mvita ba bena Siriya too ne ku musulu wa Yardene. Mu njila muonsu amu, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kusangana bilamba bia bungi ne bintu bikuabu bivua bena Siriya benda bimansha, bua kumona mua kunyema lukasa. Nanku bantu bavuabu batume, kupingana bua kumanyisha mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bionsu abi." 
2Kings7:16 Diakamue bena Samariya kuya kupawula bintu mu mitanda ivua bena Siriya balekela. Nanku bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba, bantu kusumbishangana kilo ya bukula dikumi ne ibidi, nansha kilo ya orje makumi abidi ne inayi, anu ku lukanu lumue lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
2Kings7:17 Mukalenga Yorame kutuma muntu uvuaye wenda nende miaba yonsu, bua aye kumona bivua bienzeka mu tshisalu, ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga. Kadi bantu bavua bunguile muaba awu, kudiata muntu awu, kufuaye bu muvua muambi Elisha muambe pavua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mufike bua kumonangana nende." 
2Kings7:18 Muambi Elisha uvua mumane kuambila mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne: “Malaba pa diba ditudi edi, mu tshisalu tshia mu Samariya, bantu nebasumbishangane kilo ya bukula dikumi ne ibidi, nansha kilo ya ntete ya oije makumi abidi ne inayi, anu ku lukanu lumue lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole.”" 
2Kings7:19 Muntu uvua wenda miaba yonsu ne mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua mubenge, wamba ne: “Nansha Maweja-Nangila mutunzuluile biibi bia mu diulu bua kututumina ntete, bualu buudi wamba ebu budi mua kuenzeka anyi?” Nanku, muambi Elisha uvua mumuandamune ne: “Eyowa, wewe neumone bualu ebu. Kadi kuakudia bintu abi to.”" 
2Kings7:20 Bionsu abi kuenzeka: bantu bavua bunguila ku tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga, kudiatakaja muntu uvua wenda miaba yonsu ne mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, muntu awu kufua." 
2Kings8:1 Dituku dikuabu, muambi Elisha kuambila mukaji, muena muana uvuaye mubishe ku lufu, ne: — Umuka munemu ne bena nzubu webe, nuye kusomba muaba unudi basue. Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmusue kutuma tshiyole tshia nzala mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele. Tshiyole atshi, tshikadi tshituadija anu mpindiewu. Netshinenge bidimu muanda mutekete." 
2Kings8:2 Mukaji awu kukumbaja bionsu bivua muambi mumuambile. Diakamue kuyaye ne bena nzubu wende mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete, kusombamu bidimu muanda mutekete." 
2Kings8:3 Bidimu muanda mutekete bimane kukumbana, mukaji kumuka ne bena nzubu wende mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete. Ufika mu ditunga diabu, kuyaye kudi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bua kulomba lupangu luende ne nzubu wende." 
2Kings8:4 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele uvua uyukila ne Ngeyazi, muena mudimu wa muambi Elisha. Uvua umukonka bishima bionsu bivua muambi Elisha muenze." 
2Kings8:5 Ngeyazi uvua umulondela muvua muambi Elisha mubishe muana ku lulu. Amu diba adi, mamuende wa muana awu kufika bua kulomba lupangu luende ne nzubu wende kudi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Nanku Ngeyazi kukema, wamba ne: — Mukalenga, mona, ke mukaji ewu muena muana uvua muambi Elisha mubishe ku lufu." 
2Kings8:6 Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kukonka mukaji. Mukaji kumulondela bualu bujima. Diakamue, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kuambila muntu mukuabu wa ku bantu bende, uvuaye wenda nende miaba yonsu, bua atangile tshilumbu tshia mukaji awu. Mukalenga kuamba ne: — Ndi musue bua bamupingajile bintu biende bionsu. Kabidi bamufute bua bintu bionsu bivuabu banowa mu budimi buende, katshia umuka mu ditunga dietu too ne mpindiewu." 
2Kings8:7 Tshikondu tshikuabu, muambi Elisha kuya mu tshimenga tshia Damase. Benadade, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, uvua usama. Benadade umvua ne: muambi Elisha mmufike mu tshimenga," 
2Kings8:8 kuambilaye Azayele ne: — Angata tshintu tshia disanka, uye kupesha muambi Elisha. Pashishe umuambile bua akonke Maweja-Nangila bua disama dindi nadi edi ne didi mua kujika." 
2Kings8:9 Azayele kuya kumonangana ne muambi Elisha. Uvua mutuadile muambi bintu bimpe bia disanka bia mu Damase, biambula kudi nyama ya tumelu makumi anayi. Azayele ufika kudi muambi Elisha, kumuambila ne: — Muena mudimu webe Benadade, mukalenga wa bena Siriya ke udi muntume ewu. Uvua mungambile bua kukukonka bua disama diende ne didi mua kujika?" 
2Kings8:10 Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Uye kumuambila ne: bulelela, disama diende nedijike. Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi mumane kundeja ne: neafue bulelela." 
2Kings8:11 Diakamue, muambi Elisha kulengama, mpala wende kubinduluka. Kutuadijaye kudila." 
2Kings8:12 Azayele kumukonka ne: — Muambi udi udila bua tshinyi? Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Ndi ndila bualu nkadi mumanye ne: neukengeshe bena Izrayele bikole. Newoshe bimenga biabu bidi bibaka ne bimana bikole. Neukose nsongalume yonsu muminu, uzaza bana bakese, upanda mafu a bakaji badi bimite." 
2Kings8:13 Azayele kumukonka ne: — Meme tshiena mukalenga, kadi ndi mua kuenza bionsu ebi mushindu kaayi? Muambi Elisha kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi undeja ne: wewe newikale mukalenga wa bena Siriya." 
2Kings8:14 Azayele kumuka kudi muambi Elisha, kupingana kudi mfumuende Benadade, kumukonka ne: — Muambi wakuambidi tshinyi? Azayele kuandamuna ne: — Wanjadikidi ne: disama diebe nedijike kamuyi mpata." 
2Kings8:15 Kadi butshia dinda, Azayele kuangata tshilamba tshia pa bulalu, kutshitua mu mayi, kutshibuikila Benadade pa mpala bua kumuenzatshi tshipuidiji. Nanku, mukalenga Benadade kufua. Azayele kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings8:16 Mu tshidimu tshitanu tshivua Yorame, muana wa Akabe mu bukalenga mu bena Izrayele, Yorame, muana wa Yosafate, kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
2Kings8:17 Yorame, muana wa Yosafate, uvua ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu muanda mukulu." 
2Kings8:18 Kadi, kuenzaye anu buenzayi bu muvua bakalenga bonsu ba bena Izrayele benza, — kabidi anu bu muvua bena nzubu wa Akabe benza, bualu Yorame uvua musele muana wa Akabe. — Nanku, Yorame kuenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga." 
2Kings8:19 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kavua musue kubutula bukalenga bua Yuda to. Bualu uvua mulaye muntu wende Davide ne: ndelanganyi yende neishale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime kashidi. 
2Kings8:20 Pavua Yorame mu bukalenga, bena Edome kutombokela bena Yuda. Kudisunguilabu wabu mukalenga." 
2Kings8:21 Nanku, Yorame kuya ku Sayire ne matempu ende a mvita onsu. Kadi mundankulu mua butuku, mukalenga Yorame ne balombodi ba matempu ende a mvita, kudipandila njila munkatshi mua bena Edome bavua babanyungulula, kusambuka. Bena mvita ba bena Yuda kunyema, kuya kuabu." 
2Kings8:22 Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bena Edome kabavua kabidi ku bumfumu bua bena Yuda to. Bena tshimenga tshia Libna kutomboka kabidi anu tshikondu atshi." 
2Kings8:23 Malu makuabu a Yorame, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings8:24 Yorame mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Akaziya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings8:25 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshibidi tshivua Yorame, muana wa balume wa Akabe, mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, Akaziya, muana wa Yorame, kudia bukalenga mu Yuda." 
2Kings8:26 Akaziya uvua ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi. Uvua mushale tshidimu tshijima mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Dina dia mamuende divua Ataliya. Ataliya uvua wa mu diku dia Omri, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
2Kings8:27 Akaziya uvua muenze buenzayi anu bu muvua bena diku dia Akabe benza. Uvua wenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, anu muvuabu benza kudi baku bende bena diku dia Akabe." 
2Kings8:28 Yorame, muana wa Akabe, ne Akaziya mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kuya mu tshimenga tshia Ramote, mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua kuluisha Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya. Mu mvita, bena Siriya kutapa mukalenga Yorame mputa." 
2Kings8:29 Mukalenga Akaziya kuya mu tshimenga atshi tshia Yizreyele bua kusamba Yorame, bualu uvua usama bikole." 
2Kings9:1 Dituku dikuabu, muambi Elisha kubikila nsongalume wa mu tshisumbu tshia bambi, kumuambila ne: — Udilongolole, ndi nkutuma ku luendu. Angata kalondu ka mafuta a tshijila aka. Uye mu tshimenga tshia Ramote mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
2Kings9:2 Pawafika, umonangane ne muikulu wa Nimshi, dina diende Yehu, muana wa Yosafate. Umubikile, umuke nende munkatshi mua bana babu, uye nende mu tshibambalu tshikuabu." 
2Kings9:3 Wangate kalondu ka mafuta, umuele mafuta pa mutu, umuambile ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi nkujidila bua wikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele!” Pashishe, kujingakanyi to. Unzulule tshiibi, upatuke lubilu." 
2Kings9:4 Nanku, muambi nsongalume awu kuya mu tshimenga tshia Ramote mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
2Kings9:5 Yeye mumane kufika, kusangana bamfumu ba bena mvita ba bena Izrayele mu tshisangilu. Muambi nsongalume kuamba ne: — Mfumu ndi ne bualu bua kukuambila! Yehu kumukonka ne: — Kutudi eku udi musue kuyukila ne nganyi? Muambi nsongalume kuandamuna ne: — Mfumu, anu wewe." 
2Kings9:6 Yehu kujuka, kuya nende ku nzubu. Muambi nsongalume kumuela mafuta pa mutu, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Ndi nkujidila bua wikale mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
2Kings9:7 Wewe neushipe ndelanganyi ya Akabe, mfumuebe wa kale. Ndi ngenza nanku bua kusombuela bua bena mudimu banyi bonsu, bambi ne bantu bakuabu, bavua Yezabele mushipeshe." 
2Kings9:8 Bulelela, bena nzubu wa Akabe bonsu nebafue. Nembutule bena diku dia Akabe bonsu: bantu bakole ne bana batekete." 
2Kings9:9 Angenzele bena nzubu wa Akabe anu bu mumvua muenzele bena nzubu wa Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, ne bena nzubu wa Basha, muana wa Akiya." 
2Kings9:10 Kadi tshitalu tshia Yezabele kabakutshijika to. Mbua neitshidile mu budimi bua Yizreyele. ” Muambi nsongalume wamba nanku, kunzulula tshiibi. Kapatuka lubilu." 
2Kings9:11 Ke Yehu kupatuka, kupingana muaba uvua balombodi bakuabu ba mukalenga. Balombodi abu kumukonka ne: — Malu kaayi? Muntu mutomboke ewu uvua mulue kukuambila tshinyi? Yehu kuandamuna ne: — To, ki mmuambe bualu to! Nudi bamanye malu adibu bamba kudi bambi ba mushindu ewu." 
2Kings9:12 Balombodi kuandamuna Yehu ne: — Udi ushima. Mbimpe utuambile bionsu bidiye mukuambila. Nanku Yehu kubambila ne: — Bulelela, muambi ewu mmungambile malu, kadi nangananga mmungambile ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi nkujidila bua wikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele.”" 
2Kings9:13 Diakamue, balombodi bonsu abu, kuangata bilamba biabu, kubiadija pa mutu pa tshibandilu bua Yehu kuimanapu, bena misambu kuela mpungi. Bantu bonsu kuela mbila, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Yehu, akuate ku mundundu.”" 
2Kings9:14 Tshikondu atshi, bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele bavua balame tshimenga tshia Ramote tshivua mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, kabuedimu to. Kadi, pavua mukalenga Yorame uluisha Azayele, bena Siriya kumutapa mputa. Nanku, mukalenga Yorame kuya kudiondapisha mputa ayi, mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele. Kushalaye mu bulalu muaba awu. Kadi muikulu wa Nimshi, dina diende Yehu, muana wa Yosafate, kuelela Yorame tshifufu. Yehu kuambila bena mvita bakuabu ne: — Panuikala ku luseke luanyi, nudimuke. Muntu kena mua kumuka mu tshimenga bua kuya kuambila bena mu Yizreyele bidi bienzeka muaba ewu to." 
2Kings9:15  
2Kings9:16 Pashishe, Yehu kubanda pa ditempu diende dia mvita, kuya mu Yizreyele muaba uvua Yorame, mu bulalu bua kudiondapisha. Akaziya mukalenga wa bena Yuda kabidi uvua muye mu tshimenga atshi bua kusamba Yorame." 
2Kings9:17 Mutentekedi uvua muimane pa tshibumba tshia mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele, kumonaye tshisumbu tshia bena mvita bavua ne Yehu. Kuambilaye mukalenga Yorame ne: — Ndi mumone tshisumbu tshia bena mvita bafika. Mukalenga Yorame kumuambila ne: — Utume muntu mubande pa nyama wa kabalu, aye kusambakena nabu bua kubakonka ne: Nudi bavuile tshinyi?" 
2Kings9:18 Mubandi wa pa nyama wa kabalu kuya kusambakena ne bantu abu, kubambila ne: — Mukalenga Yorame udi ukonka ne: Nudi bavuile tshinyi? Yehu kuandamuna ne:. — Udi musue kubuelakana mu bualu ebu bua tshinyi? Buela mu tshisumbu tshietu. Ke mutentekedi kuambila mukalenga Yorame ne: — Muntu uudi mutume, mmumane kufika kudi bantu abu. Kadi kena upingana kuneku to." 
2Kings9:19 Mukalenga Yorame kutuma muntu muibidi, mubandi wa pa nyama wa kabalu. Muntu awu ufika kudibu, kubambilaye ne: — Mukalenga Yorame udi ukonka ne: Nudi bavuile tshinyi? Yehu kumukonka ne: — Udi musue kubuelakana mu bualu ebu bua tshinyi? Buela mu tshisumbu tshietu." 
2Kings9:20 Mutentekedi kuambila mukalenga Yorame ne: — Muntu muibidi uudi mutume, mmumane kufika kudi bantu abu. Kadi kena upingana kuneku to. Kadi ndi mumone ne: udi uvua awu ke Yehu muikulu wa Nimshi. Ndi mumumanye bualu udi wendesha ditempu bu muntu mupale." 
2Kings9:21 Mukalenga Yorame kutuma diyi bua basuike nyama ya tubalu ku ditempu diende. Pashishe kubandaye mu ditempu. Akaziya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kubandaye kabidi mu diende ditempu. Kuyabu kusambakena ne Yehu. Kumusanganabu pabuipi ne budimi buvua bua Nabote, muena Yizreyele." 
2Kings9:22 Anu Yorame usambakena ne Yehu, kumukonkaye ne: — Yehu, malu kaayi? Yehu kuandamuna ne: — Udi unkonka nanku bua tshinyi? Udi mumanye bimpe ne: mamuebe Yezabele utshidi utendelela mvidie ya dishima, kabidi utshidi wenza majimbu…" 
2Kings9:23 Ke Yorame kukudimuka, kunyemaye wenda wela Akaziya diyi ne: — Akaziya, udimuke! Mbatuelele tshifufu!" 
2Kings9:24 Yehu kuambula buta buende bua miketa, kuasa Yorame muketa pankatshi pa makaya, kubuelawu ne ku muoyi wa munda, kusompoka. Yorame kudishadila mu ditempu diende, kufua." 
2Kings9:25 Ke Yehu kuambila Bidkare, muambuluishe wende wa mu mvita ne: — Ambula tshitalu tshia Yorame, utshimanshe mu budimi bua Nabote, muena Yizreyele. Bualu dituku dituvua nende babidi, tuya ne mukalenga Akabe ne bantu bakuabu benda bendesha matempu, uvuluke muvua Maweja-Nangila mulaye mukalenga Akabe, tatuende wa Yorame ne:" 
2Kings9:26 “Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mumone bionsu biuvua muenze makelela. Wewe uvua mutume bantu bua bashipe Nabote ne bana bende ba balume. Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nditshipa bua kukusombuela anu mu budimi ebu.” Nanku, wewe Bidkare, ambula tshitalu tshia Yorame, utshimanshe mu budimi ebu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
2Kings9:27 Akaziya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, umona bionsu abi, kunyemaye kuya luseke lua ku Bete-Gane. Kadi, Yehu kumulondakaja. Kutuminaye bantu bende diyi bua bashipe kabidi Akaziya. Nanku, kuasabu Akaziya patshivuaye wendesha ditempu diende mu njila wa ku musoku wa Ngure, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ibleyame. Kadi, Akaziya kunyema, kuya kufuila mu tshimenga tshia Megido." 
2Kings9:28 Bena mudimu ba Akaziya kuambula tshitalu tshiende mu ditempu diende kuya natshi mu Yerushalayime. Kutshijiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide." 
2Kings9:29 Akaziya uvua mudie bukalenga bua bena Yuda, mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshivua Yorame, muana wa Akabe, mu bukalenga." 
2Kings9:30 Yezabele kumvuaye lumu lua bionsu bivua bienzeka abi. Kudilabaye bilabu pa makiki, kudilengejaye bimpe. Yehu ufika mu Yizreyele, Yezabele kuimana ku dididishi, mutangile Yehu." 
2Kings9:31 Anu Yehu ubuela ku tshiibi tshia mu tshimenga, Yezabele kumukonka ne: — Yehu, malu kaayi? Wewe udi muntu tshianana, mufuanangane ne Zimri, uvua mushipe mukalenga wende." 
2Kings9:32 Yehu ubanduluka, utangila ku dididishi, kuelaye diyi ne: — Kunudi aku, udi musue kutua ku tshianyi nnganyi? Bantu babidi anyi basatu ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga kuinangila pa dididishi." 
2Kings9:33 Yehu kubela diyi ne: — Sakilayi mukaji awu panshi! Kusakilabu Yezabele pa dididishi. Kudishindaye panshi. Mashi ende kutampakana ku bimana ne ku nyama ya tubalu. Yehu kudiatakaja tshitalu atshi ne ditempu. 
2Kings9:34 Yehu kubuela mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kumupeshabu biakudia, kudiaye, kunuaye. Pashishe kuambilaye bantu bavuaye nabu ne: — Jiikayi tshitalu tshia mukaji muena tshibawu ewu, bualu uvua anu muana wa mukalenga." 
2Kings9:35 Kupatukabu bua kuya kujiika tshitalu tshia Yezabele. Kadi, kusanganabu anu kabalubalu ka mutu, bianza ne makasa." 
2Kings9:36 Kupinganabu bua kumanyisha Yehu. Yehu kukema, wamba ne: — Eyowa, ke diyi dia Maweja-Nangila divua muambi Eliya, muena Tishebe, muambe ne: “Mbua neidie tshitalu tshia Yezabele mu budimi bua Yizreyele." 
2Kings9:37 Minyinyi ya Yezabele ikale mishale, nebayimiamine mu budimi ebu bu bufuke buela panshi. Nanku, muntu kakumanya kabidi ne ewu ke Yezabele to!”" 
2Kings10:1 Ndelanganyi ya Akabe makumi muanda mutekete, ivua isomba mu Samariya. Yehu kutumina balombodi ba bena mvita ba mu tshimenga atshi, bakulu batshi, ne bantu bavua balongesha ndelanganyi ya Akabe mikanda, ubafundila ne:" 
2Kings10:2 “Nuenu badi ne bana ba mu diku dia bukalenga. Nudi ne matempu a mvita, nyama ya tubalu, ne bia mvita. Nudi mu tshimenga tshidibu bibaka ne bimana bikole. Nanku, panudi nupeta mukanda ewu," 
2Kings10:3 nusungule diakamue ku ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Akabe, muntu udi ukumbana bua kuikala mukalenga. Numubanjije, asombe mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Kabidi nudilongolole bua kuluangana mvita, kusungidila diku dia bukalenga.”" 
2Kings10:4 Bantu bonsu abu kukuatshika bowa bikole. Kukonkanganabu ne: “Tuetu tudi mua kuluangana ne Yehu mushindu kaayi? Bakalenga babidi kabena bakimina kuluangana nende to.” 
2Kings10:5 Diakamue, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, mulombodi wa bena mvita ba tshimenga atshi, bakulu ne balongeshi, kutumina Yehu mukanda ne: “Tuetu tudi bena mudimu bebe. Netuenze bionsu biudi wamba. Katuena basue kusungula mukalenga mukuabu mupiamupia to. Nanku, enza muudi musue.”" 
2Kings10:6 Yehu kubafundila mukanda muibidi, ubambila ne: “Panudi ku luseke luanyi, basue kutumikila meyi anyi, nushipe ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Akabe yonsu. Nuyikose mitu. Malaba diba ditudi edi, nufike bua kumpesha mitu ayi mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele.” Ndelanganyi ayi makumi muanda mutekete ya mu diku dia bukalenga, bavua bayikolesha kudi bantu bamanyike ba mu Samariya." 
2Kings10:7 Balombodi bapeta mukanda uvua Yehu mubatumine, kutandishabu ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Akabe yonsu makumi muanda mutekete, kuyishipa. Kuelabu mitu yabu mu bibombu, kutumina Yehu mitu ayi mu Yizreyele." 
2Kings10:8 Muntu mukuabu kuya kumanyisha Yehu bua mitu ivuabu bafike nayi ayi. Yehu kutuma diyi bua bayiteke mu bisumbu bibidi pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia ku tshimenga too ne ku dinda. 
2Kings10:9 Butshia, dinda, Yehu kupatuka mu tshimenga, kuimana muaba uvua bantu bonsu. Kubambilaye ne: — Nuenu kanuena ne bualu to! Meme ke uvua muelele mukalenga Yorame tshifufu. Meme ke udi mumushipe. Kadi, bantu bonsu aba, udi mubashipe nnganyi?" 
2Kings10:10 Nujadike ne: meyi onsu avua Maweja-Nangila muambe bua bena nzubu wa Akabe, adi anu akumbana! Maweja-Nangila ke udi mukumbaje bionsu bivua muambi Eliya muambe mu dina diende." 
2Kings10:11 Ke Yehu kushipa bantu bakuabu bonsu ba mu nzubu wa Akabe bavua bashale ne muoyi mu Yizreyele. Kushipaye kabidi bantu bonsu bavua bamanyike bikole ba ku luseke lua mukalenga Akabe, bena nzubu wende ne batuangaji bende. Yehu kena mushiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi to." 
2Kings10:12 Pashishe, Yehu kuya mu Samariya. Ufika ku Bete-Ekede wa balami ba mikoku," 
2Kings10:13 kusambakenaye ne bana babu ne Akaziya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Yehu kubakonka ne: — Nuenu nudi banganyi? Bobu kuandamuna ne: — Tudi bana babu ne Akaziya. Tudi bafika muaba ewu bua kusekelela bana ba mukalenga mukaji Yezabele, ne kusamba bena diku dia bukalenga bakuabu." 
2Kings10:14 Yehu kuela diyi ne: — Bakuatayi ne muoyi! Bantu bavua Yehu nabu, kukuata bana babu ne Akaziya abu ne muoyi! Kabashipabu, kuimansha bitalu biabu mu tshiina tshivua ku Bete-Ekede. Bantu bavuabu bashipe abu, bavua makumi anayi ne babidi. Muntu nansha umue kavua mushale ne muoyi to." 
2Kings10:15 Yehu umuka muaba uvuaye awu, uye mutantshi, kusambakenaye ne Yonadabe, muana wa Rekabe, umuvuila. Yehu kumuela muoyi, umukonka ne: — Wewe udi wanyi bu mundi meme webe anyi? Yonadabe kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa. Yehu kumuambila ne: — Nanku, tuelangane muoyi ku bianza! Bobu bamane kuelangana muoyi ku bianza, Yehu kuambula Yonadabe mu ditempu diende." 
2Kings10:16 Yehu kuambila Yonadabe ne: — Tuye nebe, umone mundi ngenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu ne muoyi mujima. Nanku, Yehu kuya ne Yonadabe mu ditempu diende." 
2Kings10:17 Anu Yehu ufika mu Samariya, kushipa bena nzubu wa Akabe bonsu bavua bashale ne muoyi, kubutula nzubu ewu mujima, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambile muambi Eliya." 
2Kings10:18 Yehu kubikidisha bena mu Samariya bonsu, ubambila ne: — Mukalenga Akabe uvua utendelela mvidie Baale nankunanku. Kadi, meme Yehu, nentendelele mvidie awu mupite mukalenga Akabe." 
2Kings10:19 Nanku, bikilayi bambi ba Baale bonsu, batendeledi ne batuangaji bende, bafike kundi bonsu. Muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kashadi to. Bualu ndi musue kuenzeja tshibilu tshinene, bua kulambula Baale milambu. Bantu bonsu badi kabayi bafike, nebabashipe. Yehu uvua wamba nanku ne budimu bua kushipa bantu bavua batendelela mvidie Baale." 
2Kings10:20 Ke muvuaye utuma diyi bua babikidishe bantu mu tshibilu tshinene tshia mvidie Baale. Kubikidishabu bantu mu tshibilu atshi. 
2Kings10:21 Yehu kutuma bantu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele dijima. Bantu bonsu bavua batendelela mvidie Baale kufika. Muntu nansha umue kavua mukimine kushala to. Mu nzubu wa Baale muvua bantu tente. 
2Kings10:22 Pashishe, Yehu kutuma diyi kudi muntu uvua mulame bilamba bia kutendelela nabi mvidie, bua abiabanyine bantu bonsu. Kubabanyinabu bilamba abi. Bamane kuenza nanku," 
2Kings10:23 Yehu, ne Yonadabe, muana wa Rekabe, kubuela mu nzubu wa mvidie Baale, kuambila batendeledi ba mvidie Baale ne: — Nutangile bimpe: munkatshi muenu kamuikadi bantu badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Muikale amu bantu badi batendelela mvidie Baale." 
2Kings10:24 Yehu uvua mumane kusokoka bena mvita makumi muanda mukulu pambelu pa nzubu wa mvidie Baale. Uvua muambile bena mvita abu ne: “Ndi nnupesha bantu bonsu aba. Pikala muntu wa kunudi munyemeshe muntu nansha umue ne muoyi, neafue pa muaba wa muntu awu.” Yehu ne Yonadabe kusemena pabuipi bua kulambula milambu ya bobumue, ne ya diosha." 
2Kings10:25 Yehu mumane kulambula milambu, kutuma diyi kudi bena mvita ne bamfumu babu, ubambila ne: — Buelayi, nushipe bantu aba bonsu! Muntu nansha umue kena mua kupatuka mu nzubu emu ne muoyi to. Nanku, kushipabu bantu abu bonsu, kuimansha bitalu biabu pambelu. Pashishe, kubuelabu mu nzubu muvuabu batendelela mvidie Baale." 
2Kings10:26 Kupatulabu makunji a tshijila avua mu nzubu amu, ku wosha." 
2Kings10:27 Kuzazabu dibue divuabu bimanyike bua kutendelela mvidie Baale. Pashishe, kupulabu nzubu wa Baale awu, kuenzamu nkumba ya bantu bonsu. Nkumba ayi, itshidipu too ne mpindiewu." 
2Kings10:28 Ke muvua Yehu mukandike ditendelela dia mvidie Baale mu bukalenga bua Izrayele nanku. 
2Kings10:29 Kadi Yehu uvua anu wenza buenzayi buvua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate muenze, mufikishe bena Izrayele ku ditendelela dia bana ba ngombe ba tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bavua ku Betele ne ku Dane." 
2Kings10:30 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yehu ne: — Bushuwa, udi muenze bimpe. Udi mukumbaje bionsu bimvua mumane kuamba bua kunyoka bena nzubu wa Akabe. Nanku, bana bebe nebakupingane mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, too ne ku ndelanganyi ya musangu muinayi." 
2Kings10:31 Kadi, Yehu kavua mukumbaje mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ne muoyi mujima to. Uvua anu wenza buenzayi buvua Yerobowame muenze, mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings10:32 Tshikondu atshi, Maweja-Nangila kutuadija kukepesha buloba bua bena Izrayele. Kuanyishaye bua Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, atshimune bena Izrayele mu ditunga diabu dijima." 
2Kings10:33 Kunyengabu bena Izrayele buloba buonsu buvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, ne buvua ku mutu kua tshimenga tshia Aroyere, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Amone. Ke ditunga dia Ngilaade ne dia Bashane, muaba uvuabu basombe kudi bena Rubene, bena Ngade ne bena Menashe." 
2Kings10:34 Malu makuabu a Yehu, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda awu, mbafundemu malu onsu avuaye muenze, baleja kabidi ne bukitu buvuaye nabu." 
2Kings10:35 Yehu uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu tshimenga tshia Samariya bidimu makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu. Yeye mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Samariya. Muanende wa balume Yowakaze kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings10:36  
2Kings11:1 Ataliya, mamuende wa mukalenga Akaziya, kupeta lumu lua lufu lua muanende. Nanku, kuelaye meji a kushipa ndelanganyi yonsu ya mu diku dia bukalenga." 
2Kings11:2 Kadi, pavuabu bashipa ndelanganyi ayi, nsongakaji mukuabu, muanabu ne Akaziya, dina diende Yosheba, muana wa Yorame mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kusokoka muana wa balume wa muanabu wa balume. Dina dia muana awu, Yowashe. Nsongakaji uvua musokoke muana awu ne ndeji wende mu tshibambalu tshia kulala tshivua ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ataliya kavua mumanye ne: muana wa balume awu, mmushale ne muoyi to." 
2Kings11:3 Muana awu ne ndeji wende, bavua basombe basokome mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bidimu bisambombu. Bidimu abi, Ataliya uvua mukalenga wa ditunga." 
2Kings11:4 Mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, mutuangaji Yoyada kubikidisha balombodi ba bena Kari, ne ba bena mvita bakuabu bavua balama mukalenga. Kuyaye nabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kutuaye nabu ndondu, kuditshipabu. Pashishe, kubalejaye muana wa balume wa mukalenga Akaziya." 
2Kings11:5 Kubambilaye kabidi ne: — Monayi tshinudi ne bua kuenza: Padi bantu bakuabu ba kunudi batuadija mudimu wabu dituku dia Dikisha, tshisumbu tshia kumpala tshidi tshilama nzubu wa bukalenga," 
2Kings11:6 tshisumbu tshibidi tshilama tshiibi tshia ku Sure, ne tshisumbu tshisatu tshilama tshiibi tshidi panyima pa nzubu wa bena mvita badi balame mukalenga. Nanku, bisumbu ebi bisatu, bilama nzubu wa bukalenga bilondangane." 
2Kings11:7 Kadi, bisumbu bienu bikuabu bibidi, bidi kabiyi bienza mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, nebilame nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba udi Yowashe mukalenga muana musombe." 
2Kings11:8 Bena mvita bonsu ne bia mvita ku bianza, banyunguluke Yowashe mukalenga muana, bua kuya nende muaba onsu udiye uya. Muntu yonsu udi usemena pabuipi nenu, numushipe." 
2Kings11:9 Balombodi ba benamvita, kuenza bionsu bivua mutuangaji Yoyada mubambile. Kusangishabu bena mvita bonsu ne batuangaji bavua benza mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, ne bavua bajikije mudimu wabu dituku adi. Bonsu kufika kudi mutuangaji Yoyada." 
2Kings11:10 Yoyada kupesha balombodi ba bena mvita mafuma ne ngabu, bivua bia mukalenga Davide, bivuabu bateka mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings11:11 Bena mvita kabavua bimana mu tshitangu tshijima to, bavua bimana ne bia mvita mu bianza, ku ditumba dia kuinshi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu too ne ku ditumba dia ku mutu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Nanku bavua bimane kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne ku tshilambuilu, bamane kudilongolola bua kulama mukalenga Yowashe, nseke yonsu." 
2Kings11:12 Ke, mutuangaji Yoyada kupatula Yowashe, kumuasa tshifulu tshia bukalenga, kumupesha mukanda wa ndondu! Pashishe, kuelabu Yowashe mafuta pa mutu bua kumujidila. Diakamue, bantu bonsu kumukumina bikashi, bela mbila, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Yowashe, akuate ku mundundu!”" 
2Kings11:13 Ataliya umvua mutoyi uvua bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga ne bantu bonsu benza, kuyaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muvua bantu abu." 
2Kings11:14 Kumonaye mukalenga mupiamupia muimane kulu mudi tshibidilu, pabuipi ne dikunji dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Balombodi ba bena mvita ne bedi ba mpungi bavua bimane pabuipi ne mukalenga Yowashe. Bantu bonsu bavua anu basanka, bimbi ba biombelu bavua bela mpungi. Ke Ataliya kudipanda bilamba, wela mbila ne: — Mbangelele tshifufu! Mbangelele tshifufu!" 
2Kings11:15 Mutuangaji Yoyada kavua musue bua bashipele Ataliya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. Nanku, kuambilaye balombodi ba bena mvita, bavua balame mukalenga Yowashe ne: — Umukayi ne Ataliya mu milongu yenu. Pikala muntu muditue ku tshiende, mumulonde, numushipe." 
2Kings11:16 Kuyabu ne Ataliya ku luseke lua ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Bafika nende ku tshiibi tshia nyama ya tubalu, kumushipabu." 
2Kings11:17 Mutuangaji Yoyada, kufikisha mukalenga Yowashe pamue ne bena Izrayele bonsu ku ditua ndondu ne Maweja-Nangila. Bua ndondu awu, bena Izrayele kuitaba bua kuikala bantu ba Maweja-Nangila. Mutuangaji kufikisha kabidi mukalenga Yowashe ku ditua ndondu ne bantu bende bena Izrayele." 
2Kings11:18 Diba adi, bantu bonsu kuya mu nzubu wa Baale. Kupulabu nzubu awu, kunyangakaja bilambuilu ne mpingu ivuamu. Kushipabu Matane, mutuangaji wa Baale, kumpala kua bilambuilu. Pashishe, mutuangaji Yoyada kuteka bantu bua kulama bimpe nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings11:19 Yoyada kusangisha kabidi balombodi ba bena mvita, bena Kari, ne bena mvita bakuabu bavua balame mukalenga Yowashe, kabidi ne bantu bonsu. Kumukabu ne mukalenga Yowashe mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuya nende mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kupitshilabu ku tshiibi tshia bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga. Pavua Yowashe mumane kusomba mu nkuasa wa bukalenga," 
2Kings11:20 bantu bonsu bavua basanka bikole. Balombodi ba bena mvita bamane kushipela Ataliya ku nzubu wa bukalenga, mu tshimenga kushalamu talala." 
2Kings12:1 Yehu mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu muanda mutekete. Yowashe mutshikale ne bidimu muanda mutekete, kudiaye bukalenga bua Yuda. Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi anayi. Mamuende wa Yowashe uvua wa mu tshimenga tshia Bersheba, dina diende Sibiya." 
2Kings12:2  
2Kings12:3 Yowashe uvua wenza malu mimpe, usankisha Maweja-Nangila matuku onsu. Bualu mutuangaji Yoyada uvua mumulongeshe bimpe." 
2Kings12:4 Kadi, kavua munyangakaje miaba ya kutendelela mvidie to. Bantu bavua anu baya miaba ayi bua kulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi." 
2Kings12:5 Dituku dikuabu, Yowashe kuambila batuangaji ne: — Nusangishe makuta onsu adi bantu bafila bua milambu, nansha adibu bafila ku budisuile buabu. Nuenu batuangaji nusangishe makuta awu, nuenze nawu mudimu wa kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba onsu unudi bamona ne udi munyanguke." 
2Kings12:6  
2Kings12:7 Kadi, mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne tshisatu tshivua Yowashe mu bukalenga, batuangaji kabavua banji kulongolola tshintu nansha tshimue mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to." 
2Kings12:8 Nanku, mukalenga Yowashe, kubikidisha mutuangaji Yoyada ne batuangaji bakuabu, kubakonka ne: — Kanuena balongolueshe nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua tshinyi? Nanku mpindiewu kanulami kabidi makuta adibu basangisha to. Nuanyishe bua balongolueshe nawu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings12:9 Ke batuangaji kuitaba. Kabavua basangisha kabidi makuta kudi bantu to. Kabavua batangila kabidi midimu ya kulongoluesha nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. 
2Kings12:10 Mutuangaji Yoyada kusumba mushete, kuenza dikela pa tshibuikidiji tshia mushete awu. Kuutekaye ku luseke lua tshilambuilu, ku dia balume dia mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Makuta onsu avuabu bafika nawu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, batuangaji bavua balame ku mushiku wa nzubu awu, bavua ne mudimu wa kuela mu mushete." 
2Kings12:11 Pavua batuangaji bamone ne: makuta awu adi a bungi mu mushete, bavua babikila mufundi wa malu a mukalenga ne mfumu wa batuangaji, bua babale makuta awu, baye nawu." 
2Kings12:12 Bobu bamane kubala makuta awu, bavua baapesha balombodi ba bibaki ba nzubu ne bantu bavua batangila midimu ayi. Ke mu wabu mua kufuta bantu bavua balongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bena mudimu wa mabaya," 
2Kings12:13 bibaki, ne basongi ba mabue. Makuta awu, batangidi ba midimu ayi, bavua basumba nawu kabidi mabaya ne mabue masonge. Nanku bavua baatula anu bua midimu ya kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings12:14 Makuta avuabu bafila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu awu, kabavua baatula bua kuenzeja nawu malongu, bintu bia kusukula nabi miendu, nansha makopu a kumiamina nawu, mpungi, ne bintu bikuabu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole to." 
2Kings12:15 Bavua bafila makuta awu onsu kudi balombodi ba bibaki ba nzubu, anu bua bamone mua kulongolola miaba ivua minyanguke." 
2Kings12:16 Bantu bavua bafuta bena mudimu, bavua benza mudimu awu bimpe. Nanku kabavua babalondesha bua makuta avuabu bangata bua kufuta bena mudimu to." 
2Kings12:17 Makuta avua bantu bakuabu bafila bua mulambu wa kukobolola, kabavua baela mu mushete to. Bavua baangata kudi batuangaji." 
2Kings12:18 Tshikondu atshi, Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, kufika bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ngate. Yeye mumane kutshikuata, kudilongololaye bua kuluisha Yerushalayime." 
2Kings12:19 Diakamue, Yowashe mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kusangisha bintu bia mushinga mukole bionsu bivuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila kudi bankambua bende, bakalenga ba bena Yuda: Yosafate, Yorame, Akaziya, kabidi ne bivuaye mulambule yeye. Kusangishaye ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshionsu tshivuabu bateka mu tshibambalu tshia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu tshibambalu tshia kutekela bintu mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kutuminaye mukalenga Azayele bintu abi, bua kumusankisha. Nanku, mukalenga Azayele mmulekele kuluisha Yerushalayime." 
2Kings12:20 Malu makuabu a mukalenga Yowashe, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings12:21 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba Yowashe, kumuelela tshifufu. Balombodi babidi ba munkatshi muabu: Yozabade, muana wa Shimeyi, ne Yehozabade, muana wa Shomere, kushipabu Yowashe ku Bete-Milo. Kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Amashiya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings12:22  
2Kings13:1 Yowashe, muana wa Akaziya, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua Yuda bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu, Yowakaze, muana wa Yehu, kudia bukalenga mu Izrayele, mu Samariya. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete." 
2Kings13:2 Kadi, Yowakaze uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua muenze anu buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings13:3 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda. Kubafilaye mu bianza bia Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, ne mu bianza bia Benadade, muana wa Azayele, matuku onsu avua bantu abu mu bukalenga." 
2Kings13:4 Kadi, Yowakaze kusengelela Maweja-Nangila, Maweja-Nangila kumuitaba. Maweja-Nangila mumane kumona muvua mukalenga wa bena Siriya ukengesha bena Izrayele," 
2Kings13:5 kutuminaye bena Izrayele muntu uvua mua kubasungidila mu bianza bia bena Siriya. Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele kusomba ne ditalala, bu muvuabu basombe bangabanga." 
2Kings13:6 Kadi, bena Izrayele bavua anu benza buenzayi, bu Yerobowame ne bena nzubu wende. Bualu Yerobowame uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Nansha dikunji dia kutendelela Ashera, mvidie mukaji, divua anu dishale dimanyike mu Samariya." 
2Kings13:7 Ku ndekelu, bena mvita ba mukalenga Yowakaze bavua babande pa nyama ya tubalu, bavua bashale anu makumi atanu, matempu a mvita anu dikumi. Bena mvita bavua benda ku makasa bavua bashale anu binunu dikumi. Bualu mukalenga wa bena Siriya uvua mushipe bena mvita ba mukalenga Yowakaze bapite bungi. Uvua mubabutule bonsu, bu mudibu badiata lupuishi mu njila." 
2Kings13:8 Malu makuabu a Yowakaze, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda amu, mbafundemu malu onsu avua Yowakaze muenze, baleja kabidi ne bukitu buvuaye nabu." 
2Kings13:9 Yowakaze mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Samariya. Muanende wa balume Yowashe, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings13:10 Yowashe, muana wa Akaziya, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete, Yowashe, muana wa Yowakaze kudia bukalenga bua Izrayele, mu Samariya. Kushalayemu bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu." 
2Kings13:11 Kadi, Yowashe, muana wa Yowakaze, uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua anu wenza buenzayi buonsu bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate. Yerobowame uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings13:12 Malu makuabu a Yowashe, muana wa Yowakaze, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda amu, mbafundemu malu onsu avua Yowashe muenze, baleja ne bukitu buvuaye nabu, pavuaye uluisha Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
2Kings13:13 Yowashe mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Samariya mu lukita lua bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. Nanku, muanende wa balume Yerobowame, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings13:14 Disama dia lufu kukuata muambi Elisha. Nanku, Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuya kudi muambi Elisha, kumupukila, udila, wamba ne: — Tatu wanyi! Tatu wanyi! Wewe udi mupite matempu a mvita ne babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu bonsu ba bena Izrayele!" 
2Kings13:15 Elisha kumuambila ne: — Uye kuangata buta bua miketa ne miketa. Mukalenga Yowashe kufika ne bintu abi. 
2Kings13:16 Muambi Elisha kumuambila ne: — Unzulula dididishi luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Mukalenga Yowashe kunzulula. Muambi kumuambila kabidi ne: — Ambule buta buebe ne miketa, unane. Mukalenga Yowashe kuambula buta. Elisha kutentakaja bianza biende pa bianza bia mukalenga Yowashe. Pashishe, kutumaye diyi bua mukalenga ele muketa. Anu mukalenga Yowashe wela muketa, muambi kuela diyi, wamba ne: — Muketa awu, mbua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: Maweja-Nangila neanupe bukole bua nuenu kutshimuna bena mvita ba bena Siriya. Eyowa, neutshimune bena Siriya mu tshimenga tshia Afeke Neubabutule." 
2Kings13:17  
2Kings13:18 Pashishe, Elisha kuambila mukalenga Yowashe ne: — Ambule miketa mikuabu. Mukalenga Yowashe kuyambula. Muambi kumuambila ne: — Tuuta ne miketa ayi panshi. Mukalenga Yowashe kutuuta miketa ayi panshi misangu isatu, kulekela." 
2Kings13:19 Muambi kufika munda, wambila mukalenga ne: — Bu wewe mutuute miketa ayi panshi misangu itanu nansha isambombu, uvua mua kutshimuna bena Siriya kashidi. Kadi mpindiewu, neubatshimune anu misangu isatu." 
2Kings13:20 Elisha kufua. Kumujiikabu. Ku tshidimu tshionsu, bivi ba bena Mowabe bavua babuela mu buloba bua bena Izrayele bua kupawula bintu." 
2Kings13:21 Dituku dikuabu, bantu bavua baya kujiika tshitalu. Diakamue, kumonabu bivi abu. Kuimanshabu tshitalu tshivuabu natshi mu lukita lua Elisha, kunyemabu. Anu tshitalu atshi tshilengangane ne mifuba ya muambi Elisha, muntu mufue kufululuka, kuimana kulu." 
2Kings13:22 Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Siriya, uvua mukengeshe bena Izrayele bikole, matuku onsu avua Yowakaze mu bukalenga." 
2Kings13:23 Kadi, pashishe Maweja-Nangila kufuila bena Izrayele luse, kulekela bubi buabu, bua ndondu uvuaye mutue ne Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kena mubutule bena Izrayele to. Kavua muanji kubatuma kule mu bupika to." 
2Kings13:24 Azayele mumane kufua, muanende wa balume Benadade kumupingana mu bukalenga bua bena Siriya." 
2Kings13:25 Diakamue, Yowashe kunyenga Benadade bimenga bionsu bia bena Izrayele, bivua Azayele munyenge tatuende Yowakaze. Yowashe kutshimuna Benadade misangu isatu milondangane. Kunyengaye bimenga biende abi bionsu." 
2Kings14:1 Yowashe, muana wa Yowakaze, mumane kushala mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu bibidi, Amashiya kupingana tatuende mu bukalenga bua Yuda." 
2Kings14:2 Amashiya uvua ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema. Mamuende Yowadane uvua wa mu Yerushalayime. 
2Kings14:3 Amashiya uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue. Kadi, kavua muenze menemene muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze to. Uvua muenze anu bu tatuende Yowashe." 
2Kings14:4 Amashiya kavua munyangakaje miaba ya kutendelela mvidie to. Bantu bavua amu baya miaba ayi, bua kulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi." 
2Kings14:5 Amashiya mumane kushindika bukalenga buende, kushipaye balombodi ba bena mvita bavua bashipa tatuende Yowashe." 
2Kings14:6 Kadi, kavua mushipe bana ba bantu bavua bashipa tatuende abu to. Bualu Amashiya uvua unemeka meyi adibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe, adi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Kabena mua kushipa baledi bua bubi bua bana babu nansha bana bua bubi bua baledi babuto. Kadi, badi mua kushipa muntu anu bua bubi buende yeye. ”" 
2Kings14:7 Amashiya kabidi ke uvua mutshimune bena mvita ba bena Edome binunu dikumi, bavua mu tshibandabanda tshia luepu. Pavuabu baluangana, Amashiya kukuata tshimenga tshia Sela. Kutshinyikaye dina ne: “Yokteyele.” Tshimenga atshi, tshitshidi ne dina adi too ne mpindiewu." 
2Kings14:8 Pashishe, Amashiya kutuma bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Izrayele Yowashe, muana wa Yowakaze, ne muikulu wa Yehu. Bantu abu, kuya kuambila Yowashe ne: “Luaku tuluangane nebe.”" 
2Kings14:9 Yowashe kuelela Amashiya lusumuinu ne: “Dituku dikuabu, mutshi wa meba uvua pa mukuna wa Lebanone. Kulombawu mutshi wa sedre ne: anyishe bua muananyi wa balume asele muanebe. Kadi, nyama wa tshisuku, kupitshila pavua mutshi apu, kudiatakaja mutshi wa meba onsu. ”" 
2Kings14:10 Yowashe kumuambila kabidi ne: “Udi udisua, bualu uvua mutshimune bena Edome! Eyowa, usanke bualu udi mumane kutshimuna, kadi usombe ku nzubu kuebe! Kuena mumanye ne mvita iudi ujinga ayi, neyikukebele anu makenga anyi? Bualu nebakutshimune, wewe ne bena mvita bonsu ba bena Yuda?”" 
2Kings14:11 Kadi, Amashiya kavua muitabe bionsu bivua Yowashe mumuambile abi to. Nanku, mukalenga Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuya kuluangana ne Amashiya. Bena mvita ba Yowashe ne ba Amashiya kuluangana mu ditunga dia bena Yuda ku tshimenga tshia Bete-Shemeshe." 
2Kings14:12 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, kutshimuna bena mvita ba bena Yuda. Bena mvita ba bena Yuda bonsu kunyema, kupingana kuabu." 
2Kings14:13 Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kukuata Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda ku Bete-Shemeshe. Amashiya, muana wa Yowashe, uvua muikulu wa Akaziya.
