Yowashe kumuka ku Bete-Shemeshe, kuya mu Yerushalayime. Kupulaye metre bu nkama ibidi ya tshimana tshia tshimenga atshi, biangatshile ku tshiibi tshia Efrayime too ne ku tshiibi tshikuabu tshia Ditumba." 
2Kings14:14 Yowashe kuangata tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne bintu bia mushinga mukole bionsu bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne bivua mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Pashishe, kukuataye kabidi ne bantu lukola, kupingana nabu mu Samariya." 
2Kings14:15 Malu makuabu a mukalenga Yowashe, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda amu, mbafundemu malu onsu adi Yowashe muenze. Badi baleja kabidi bukitu buvuaye muleje ne mvita ivuaye muluangane ne Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
2Kings14:16 Yowashe mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Samariya, mu lukita lua bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. Nanku, muanende wa balume Yerobowame kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings14:17 Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, mumane kufua, Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kushala kabidi ne muoyi bidimu dikumi ne bitanu." 
2Kings14:18 Malu makuabu a Amashiya, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu bibikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings14:19 Bantu ba mu Yerushalayime, kuelela Amashiya tshifufu tshibi. Nanku, Amashiya kunyema, kuya mu musoku wa Lakishe. Kadi, kumulondabu mu musoku awu, kumushipelamu." 
2Kings14:20 Pashishe, kutekabu tshitalu tshiende mu ditempu, kupingana natshi mu Yerushalayime. Ditempu adi, bavua badikoka kudi nyama ya tubalu. Kujikabu Amashiya mu lukita lua bankambua bende, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide." 
2Kings14:21 Patshivua Azariya, muana wa Amashiya, ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu, bena Yuda kumusungula bua kupinganaye tatuende mu bukalenga." 
2Kings14:22 Nanku, tatuende mumane kufua, kupingajaye kabidi tshimenga tshia Elate ku bumfumu buende. Kutshibakululaye kabidi ne bimana bikole." 
2Kings14:23 Amashiya, muana wa Yowashe, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu dikumi ne bitanu, Yerobowame, muana wa Yowashe, kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele mu Samariya. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi anayi ne tshimue." 
2Kings14:24 Kadi, Yerobowame uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Uvua wenza buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings14:25 Yerobowame kukuata kabidi maloba onsu avua a bena Izrayele, biangatshile ku tshimenga tshia Lebo-Amate ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne ku Mayi manene a luepu, kuinshi mu ditunga, anu bu muvua muambi Yonase, muana wa Amitayi, wa mu musoku wa Ngate-Efere, muambe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Kings14:26 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumone dikenga dikole divua nadi bena bukalenga ebu. Bualu kakuvua muntu nansha umue utshivua mua kuambuluisha bena Izrayele to. 
2Kings14:27 Kadi, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila kayi musue kubutula bena Izrayele, kubatuminaye Yerobowame, muana wa Yowashe, bua kubasungidila." 
2Kings14:28 Malu makuabu a mukalenga Yerobowame, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda emu, mbafundemu kabidi malu onsu adi Yerobowame muenze, baleja kabidi ne bukitu buvuaye nabu mu mvita, ne muvuaye mupingajile bena Izrayele tshimenga tshia Damase ne tshia Amate." 
2Kings14:29 Yerobowame mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu Samariya, mu nkita ya bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. Muanende wa balume Zekarya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings15:1 Yerobowame mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua Izrayele bidimu makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, Azariya, muana wa Amashiya, kudia bukalenga bua Yuda," 
2Kings15:2 muikale ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi atanu ne bibidi mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende Yekoliya uvua wa mu Yerushalayime. 
2Kings15:3 Azariya uvua muenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua tatuende Amashiya muenza." 
2Kings15:4 Kadi, Azariya kavua munyangakaje miaba ya kutendelela mvidie to. Bantu bavua anu baya miaba ayi bua kulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi." 
2Kings15:5 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kusamisha Azariya bikole. Mukalenga kupeta disama dia nsudi. Kushalaye nadi too ne ku lulu luende. Azariya uvua ne bua kusomba anu ku luseke pa nkayende. Muanende wa balume Yotame, uvua mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga. Ke uvuabu bapesha mudimu wa kulombola ditunga." 
2Kings15:6 Malu makuabu a Azariya, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings15:7 Azariya mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Yotame kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings15:8 Azariya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu, Zekarya, muana wa Yerobowame, kudia bukalenga bua Izrayele mu Samariya, kushala mu bukalenga ngondu isambombu." 
2Kings15:9 Zekarya uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, anu bu muvua bankambua bende benza. Uvua amu wenza buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings15:10 Nanku, muntu mukuabu dina diende Shalume, muana wa Yabeshe, kuelela Zekarya tshifufu tshibi, kumushipa ku Ibleyame, kuangata bukalenga." 
2Kings15:11 Malu makuabu a Zekarya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. 
2Kings15:12 Bionsu ebi bivua bienzeka bua kukumbaja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila divuaye muambile Yehu ne: “Bana bebe too ne ku ndelanganyi ya musangu muinayi nebakupingane mu bukalenga. ” 
2Kings15:13 Azariya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi asatu ne tshitema, Shalume, muana wa Yabeshe, kudia bukalenga bua Izrayele. Kadi, kushalaye mu bukalenga ngondu anu umue mu Samariya." 
2Kings15:14 Muntu mukuabu, dina diende Menaheme, muana wa Ngadi, uvua ufumina mu tshimenga tshia Tirsa. Ubuela mu Samariya, kushipaye Shalume, kuangata bukalenga." 
2Kings15:15 Malu makuabu a Shalume mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. Mu mukanda emu, mbafundemu kabidi muvua Shalume muelele Zekarya tshifufu tshibi." 
2Kings15:16 Pashishe, Menaheme kuluisha tshimenga tshia Tapuwa, kushipa bena tshimenga atshi, kunyangakaja ditunga, biangatshile ku tshimenga tshia Tirsa too ne ku tshimenga tshia Tapuwa. Uvua uluisha tshimenga atshi, bualu kabavua bamunzuluile biibi to. Nanku, kupandaye bakaji bonsu bavua bimite mafu munda." 
2Kings15:17 Azariya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi asatu ne tshitema, Menaheme, muana wa Ngadi kudia bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi mu Samariya." 
2Kings15:18 Matuku onsu avua Menaheme ne muoyi, uvua wenza malu avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Uvua anu wenza buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings15:19 Pashishe, Pule, mukalenga wa bena Ashure kubuela mu buloba bua bena Izrayele. Ke Menaheme kumupesha tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo binunu makumi asatu, bua Pule amuambuluishe bua kushindika bukalenga buende bimpe." 
2Kings15:20 Nanku, bua Menaheme kupeta tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole atshi, uvua ulambuisha bena Izrayele tshitadi. Muntu yonsu uvua mumanyike bikole, uvua ulambula nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi atanu. Pule, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, upeta nkanu ivua bantu bafile ayi, kumuka mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, kupingana kuende." 
2Kings15:21 Malu makuabu a Menaheme, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza." 
2Kings15:22 Menaheme mumane kufua, muanende wa balume Pekahiya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings15:23 Azariya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi atanu, Pekahiya, muana wa Menaheme, kudia bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, mu Samariya. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi." 
2Kings15:24 Pekahiya uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Uvua anu wenza buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings15:25 Muntu mukuabu, dina diende Peka, muana wa Remalya, uvua wambuluisha Pekahiya mu mitanda. Kumuelelaye tshifufu tshibi. Nanku, ne bena mvita makumi atanu ba bena Ngilaade, kuyaye kuluisha Pekahiya mu tshibambalu kampanda tshia ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Peka mumane kushipa Pekahiya, kuangataye bukalenga." 
2Kings15:26 Malu makuabu a Pekahiya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza. 
2Kings15:27 Azariya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu makumi atanu ne bibidi, Peka, muana wa Remalya, kudia bukalenga bua bena Izrayele mu Samariya. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi." 
2Kings15:28 Peka uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Uvua anu wenza buenzayi bu Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua mufikishe bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi." 
2Kings15:29 Tshikondu tshivua Peka mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, Tiglate-Pilesere, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kukuata bimenga ebi: Yone, Ebele-Bete-Maaka, Yanowa, Kadeshe ne Ashore. Tiglate-Pilesere kukuata buloba bua bena Ngilaade, Ngalileya, ne ditunga dijima dia Naftali. Kuyaye ne bena ditunga mu bupika mu Ashure." 
2Kings15:30 Muntu mukuabu, dina diende Osheya, muana wa Ela, kuelela mukalenga Peka tshifufu tshibi, kumushipa, kuangata bukalenga. Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, Yotame, muana wa Azariya, uvua mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi." 
2Kings15:31 Malu makuabu a Peka, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benza." 
2Kings15:32 Peka, muana wa Remalya, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bidimu bibidi, Yotame, muana wa Azariya kudia bukalenga bua mu Yuda," 
2Kings15:33 muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yotame uvua Yerusha, muana wa Sadoke." 
2Kings15:34 Yotame uvua muenze malu avua Maweja-Nangila musue. Uvua muenze malu mimpe anu bu tatuende Azariya. 
2Kings15:35 Kadi, kavua munyangakaje miaba ya kutendelela mvidie to. Bantu bavua anu baya miaba ayi bua kulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi. Yotame ke uvua muenze tshiibi tshia ku mushiku wa kulu wa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings15:36 Malu makuabu a Yotame, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba Yuda benza." 
2Kings15:37 Tshikondu tshivua Yotame mu bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila kutuadija kutuma Reshine, mukalenga wa bena Arame, ne Peka, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua kuluisha ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
2Kings15:38 Yotame mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu, luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Akaze kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings16:1 Peka, muana wa Remalya, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua Izrayele bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete, Akaze, muana wa Yotame kudia bukalenga bua Yuda." 
2Kings16:2 Uvua anu ne bidimu makumi abidi, kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu mu Yerushalayime. Kadi Akaze kavua muenze malu avua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende musue, bu muvuabu benza kudi nkambua wende Davide to." 
2Kings16:3 Uvua mulonde amu buenzayi bua bakalenga ba Izrayele. Akaze kufika ne ku dilambula muanende wa balume bu mulambu wa kuosha, bilondeshile bilele bibi bia bisamba bivua Maweja-Nangila muipate bua kushilabi bena Izrayele ditunga." 
2Kings16:4 Akaze uvua ulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi mu miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, pa mikuna, muinshi mua mitshi ivua ne dileji dia bungi." 
2Kings16:5 Reshine, mukalenga wa bena Arame, ne Peka, mukalenga wa Izrayele, muana wa Remalya, kuyabu kuluisha Akaze. Kunyungululabu Yerushalayime. Kadi, kabena bamutshimune to." 
2Kings16:6 Tshikondu atshi, Reshine, mukalenga wa bena Arame, mumane kuipata bena Yuda bavua mu tshimenga tshia Elate, kutshipingajilaye bena Edome. Bena Edome kuasa tshiakabidi mu tshimenga atshi. Batshidimu too ne mpindiewu." 
2Kings16:7 Akaze kutuma bantu bua kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ashure, Tiglate-Pilesere ne: “Meme ndi bu mupika webe, nansha bu muanebe wa balume. Luaku, unsungidile mu bianza bia bakalenga ba bena Arame ne ba bena Izrayele badi banduisha aba.”" 
2Kings16:8 Nanku, Akaze kusangisha tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bivua mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila ne mu tshibambalu tshia kuteka bintu tshivua ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Kutuminaye mukalenga wa bena Ashure bintu abi bua kumusankisha nabi." 
2Kings16:9 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure kukumbaja bionsu bivua Akaze mulombe. Kuyaye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Damase, kutshikuata, kuya ne benatshi mu bupika ku Kire. Kadi, kushipeshaye Reshine, mukalenga wa bena Arame." 
2Kings16:10 Mukalenga Akaze kuya mu tshimenga tshia Damase, bua kumonangana ne mukalenga Tiglate-Pilesere. Akaze umona tshilambuilu tshivua ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Damase, kutuminaye mutuangaji Uriya mu Yerushalayime luidi lua tshilambuilu atshi ne mushindu uvuabu batshibake." 
2Kings16:11 Mutuangaji Uriya kuenza tshilambuilu tshipiatshipia, bilondeshile luidi luvuabu bamutumine kudi Akaze. Uriya kujikija dibaka dia tshilambuilu, Akaze kayi muanji kupingana mu Yerushalayime, ufuma ku Damase to." 
2Kings16:12 Mukalenga Akaze upingana, kumona tshilambuilu, kusemena pabuipi natshi." 
2Kings16:13 Yeye nkayende kulambulapu mulambu wa kuosha, pamue ne mulambu wa bukula ne wa maluvu a mvinyo. Kulambulayepu kabidi ne mulambu wa bobumue, kuela mashi a nyama wa mulambu awu ku tshilambuilu atshi." 
2Kings16:14 Pashishe kumushaye tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu bajidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Tshilambuilu atshi, tshivua pabuipi ne mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pankatshi pa tshilambuilu tshipiatshipia ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kutshitekaye panyima pa tshilambuilu tshipiatshipia ku mutu." 
2Kings16:15 Pashishe, mukalenga Akaze, kutumina mutuangaji Uriya diyi, umuambila ne: — Bituadija ku mpindiewu, wikale wenzela mudimu ku tshilambuilu tshinene. Dinda dionsu, wikale ulambulapu mulambu wa kuosha, dilolu dionsu mulambu wa bukula. Wikale ulambuilapu kabidi milambu ya kuosha idi bantu bafila, pamue ne milambu ya bukula ne ya maluvu a mvinyo. Wele kabidi mashi a nyama ya milambu ayi ku tshilambuilu. Kadi, bua tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, meme nkayanyi nengambe tshitudi mua kuenza natshi." 
2Kings16:16 Mutuangaji Uriya kukumbaja bionsu bivua mukalenga Akaze muambe. 
2Kings16:17 Mukalenga Akaze kukosa bitata bia tshiamu tshikunze bivua ku matempu a ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumushaye malongu manene avua ku matempu aku. Kumushayi kabidi dilongu dinene dia tshijengu divua pa ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi ya tshiamu tshikunze. Kuditekaye pa buloba bulamika mabue. 
2Kings16:18 Nanku, bua kusankisha mukalenga wa bena Ashure, mukalenga Akaze kujika “Muaba uvuabu bapitshila dituku dia Dikisha,” uvuabu base mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kujika kabidi “Mushiku wa mukalenga” uvua pambelu pa nzubu ewu." 
2Kings16:19 Malu makuabu a Akaze, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings16:20 Akaze mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu luvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Pashishe, muanende wa balume Izkiya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings17:1 Akaze mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua Yuda bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, Osheya, muana wa Ela, kudia bukalenga bua Izrayele mu Samariya. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu tshitema." 
2Kings17:2 Osheya kuenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Kadi, kavua wenza bu muvuabu benza kudi bakalenga ba Izrayele bavua bamudianjidile mu bukalenga to." 
2Kings17:3 Shalmanazere, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kufika bua kumuluisha. Osheya kudifila kudiye, kumulambula milambu ya ku tshidimu ku tshidimu." 
2Kings17:4 Pashishe, Osheya kumuelela tshifufu tshibi. Kutumaye bantu kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ku tshimenga tshia Sayize. Kavua mulambule kabidi mukalenga wa bena Ashure milambu ya ku tshidimu. Mukalenga Shalmanazere umanya bualu abu, kukuatshishaye Osheya, kumuela mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
2Kings17:5 Pashishe, Shalmanazere, kubuela mu ditunga ne mvita, kunyungulula tshimenga tshia Samariya. Bidimu bisatu bimane kupita," 
2Kings17:6 Osheya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu tshitema, mukalenga wa bena Ashure kukuata tshimenga tshia Samariya. Kuyabu ne bena Izrayele mu bupika mu Ashure, kubapesha buloba bua Ala, ne bua Ngozane, muaba udi musulu wa Abore, kabidi ne bimenga bia Madayi bua kusombamu." 
2Kings17:7 Bena Izrayele bavua babuele mu dikenga, bualu bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, uvua mubasungidile mu bianza bia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, mubapatule mu ditunga edi. Bualu bena Izrayele bavua batendelela mvidie mikuabu," 
2Kings17:8 bidikije bilele bia bisamba bikuabu bivua Maweja-Nangila muipate bua kubashila ditunga adi. Bavua balonda kabidi bilele bivuabu babueje mu ditunga kudi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. 
2Kings17:9 Bena Izrayele bavua bakula miaku mibi, babenga Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Bavua badiashila miaba ya kutendelela mvidie mu misoku yabu yonsu, nansha mu misoku mikese ivua ku mikalu, too ne mu bimenga bivuabu bibaka ne bimana bikole." 
2Kings17:10 Bavua bibaka bibumba bia mabue, ne makunji a kutendelela mvidie, ku nsongu ya mikuna, muinshi mua mitshi ivua ne dileji dia bungi." 
2Kings17:11 Bavua balambula milambu miaba yonsu ya kutendelela mvidie, bu muvua bisamba bikuabu bienza, bivua Maweja-Nangila muipate, bua kushila bena Izrayele ditunga. Bena Izrayele kuenza buenzayi, kufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda." 
2Kings17:12 Nanku, bena Izrayele kabavua banemeka diyi dia Maweja-Nangila to, bualu bavua anu batendelela mvidie iwaye mubakandike." 
2Kings17:13 Maweja-Nangila kutuma bambi bashilangane bua bahele bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda, babambila ne: — Lekelayi buenzayi. Tumikilayi meyi ne mikandu yanyi bidi mu mikenji imvua mupeshe bankambua benu, ne imvua munutumine kudi bambi, bantu banyi." 
2Kings17:14 Kadi bantu abu, kabena bitabe bivuabu babambila abi to. Bavua batomboka, anu bu muvuabu benza kudi bankambua babu, bavua babenga mua kuitaba Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
2Kings17:15 Bavua babenga mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, babenga kabidi ne ndondu uvuaye mutue ne bankambua babu, ne mibelu iwaye mubamanyishe. Bavua balamate anu mvidie ya tshianana, batua eku ne eku, bidikija muvuabu benza kudi bisamba bivuabu nabi mutumba, bivua Maweja-Nangila mubakandike bua kababidikiji to." 
2Kings17:16 Bavua balengulula meyi onsu a Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Bavua badienzela mpingu ibidi ya tuana tua ngombe tua tshiamu tshiengulula, badienzela kabidi makunji a kutendelela. Bavua batendelela bintu bionsu bidi mu tshibuashibuashi, benzela mvidie Baale mudimu." 
2Kings17:17 Bavua balambula bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji bu mulambu wa kuosha. Bavua benza majimbu a mishindu yonsu. Nanku, bavua bafikisha Maweja-Nangila munda bualu bavua benza malu adiye mubenge." 
2Kings17:18 Ke Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele munda. Kavua musue kubamona kumpala kuende to. Anu tshisamba tshimue tshia bena Yuda ke tshivua tshishala tshilamate Maweja-Nangila. 
2Kings17:19 Kadi, bena Yuda kutombokela kabidi Maweja-Nangila, kubenga meyi a Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Kulondabu bilele bivuabu babueje mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele." 
2Kings17:20 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kubenga bena Izrayele bonsu, kubafila mu bianza bia bakengeshanganyi bua kubafuisha bundu. Pashishe kubipataye, kubatuma kule." 
2Kings17:21 Pavua Maweja-Nangila mumushe buloba bua Izrayele ku bukalenga bua Davide, bena Izrayele bavua badisunguile Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, bua kuikalaye mukalenga wabu. Yerobowame ke uvua mubafikishe ku dibenga kutumikila Maweja-Nangila, mubafikishe ku dienza bibi bitambe." 
2Kings17:22 Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele bavua anu benza buenzayi, bu muvua Yerobowame muenze." 
2Kings17:23 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kavua musue kabidi bena Izrayele kumpala kuende to. Kubipataye, kubatuma ku Ashure. Ke muaba utshidibu too ne mpindiewu. Bionsu ebi bivua bienzeka bua kukumbaja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila divua bambi, bantu bende, bamba." 
2Kings17:24 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kubikidisha bantu ba mu Babilone, Kuta, Ava, Amate ne Sefawayime, bua kubapesha miaba ya kuasa mu ditunga dia Samariya. Kuasabu mu misoku ivua bena Izrayele bashiye, bualu bavua babakuata baye nabu mu bupika. Nanku, bantu aba, kuangata buloba abu, kuasamu misoku yabu." 
2Kings17:25 Pavua bantu aba batuadija kuasa mu misoku ayi, kabavua batendelela Maweja-Nangila to. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kubatumina nyama ya ntambue. Nyama ayi kushipa bantu ba bungi ba munkatshi muabu." 
2Kings17:26 Kumanyishabu mukalenga wa bena Ashure ne: bantu baudi mubikidishe bua kuasabu mu misoku ya mu ditunga dia Samariya, kabena bamanye mua kutendelela mvidie wa bena ditunga adi. Nanku, mvidie awu, mmubatumine nyama ya ntambue bua kubashipa." 
2Kings17:27 Ke mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kubikidisha mutuangaji mukuabu uvuabu baye nende mu Ashure mu bupika, bua apingane mu ditunga dia Samariya. Mutuangaji awu kusomba mu ditunga dia Samariya bua kulongesha bantu abu mudibu mua kutendelela mvidie awu." 
2Kings17:28 Ke muvua mutuangaji, uvuabu bakuate, bumuke nende, mupingane mu ditunga dia Samariya, musombe ku Betele, ulongesha bantu mua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings17:29 Kadi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu aba, bavua amu badienzela mpingu ya mvidie yabu, bayiteka miaba ya kutendelela, ivuabu bibake kudi bantu bavua base kale mu ditunga dia Samariya. Tshisamba tshionsu tshia bantu abu, tshivua anu ne lupingu lua nanku mu bimenga bionsu bivuabu basombe." 
2Kings17:30 Bantu bavua bafumine ku Babilone bavua benza lupingu lua mvidie Sukote-Benote, ba ku tshimenga tshia Kuta, bavua benza lupingu lua mvidie Nergale, ba ku tshimenga tshia Amate lupingu lua mvidie Ashima," 
2Kings17:31 ba ku tshimenga tshia bena Ava lupingu lua mvidie Nibaze ne lua mvidie Tartake, ba ku tshimenga tshia Sefarvayime bavua bosha kabidi ne bana babu bua kulambula mvidie wabu Adrameleke ne Anameleke." 
2Kings17:32 Kadi bantu bonsu aba, bavua batendelela kabidi Maweja-Nangila. Bavua basungula bantu balume bakuabu ba munkatshi muabu bua bikale batuangaji mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu, balombola ditendelela." 
2Kings17:33 Nanku, bantu abu, bavua luseke batendelela Maweja-Nangila, luseke lukuabu batendelela mvidie yabu, bilondeshile bilele bia ku matunga abu kuvuabu bafumine." 
2Kings17:34 Ndelanganyi ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu abu, itshidi ilonda bilele ebi bia kale too ne mpindiewu. Kabena batendelela Maweja-Nangila menemene to. Nanku, kabena batumikila menemene nansha mikenji ne bilele bia bankambua babu, nansha mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila muambile ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. — Yakobe awu ke uvua Maweja-Nangila muinyike dina dia Izrayele." 
2Kings17:35 Eku Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kutua ndondu ne ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, muyipeshe mikenji eyi ne: “Kanutendeledi mvidie. Kanuyituidi mpala mpanshi. Kanuyenzedi mudimu, kabidi kanuyilambudi milambu." 
2Kings17:36 Nuntendelele anu meme Maweja-Nangila nkayanyi. Meme ke uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu ku bukole buanyi, budibu kabayi mua kutuila nkanana. Nanku, nuntuile anu meme mpala panshi, kabidi nundambule milambu." 
2Kings17:37 Matuku onsu, nutumikile meyi anyi, mikandu yanyi, ne mikenji yanyi yonsu imvua munufundile nuenu nkayenu, nangananga kanuena mua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu to." 
2Kings17:38 Kanuena mua kupua muoyi bua ndondu umvua mutue nenu. Ndi ngambulula ne: kanutendeledi mvidie mikuabu to. 
2Kings17:39 Anu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ke unudi mua kutendelela. Bualu anu meme nkayanyi ke udi mua kunusungidila mu bianza bia baluishi benu bonsu. ” 
2Kings17:40 Kadi, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu abu, kubenga mua kuitaba bionsu abi. Kutungunukabu amu ne bilele biabu bia kale." 
2Kings17:41 Nanku, bavua luseke batendelela Maweja-Nangila, luseke lukuabu batendelela mpingu. Pashishe, bana babu ne ndelanganyi yabu yonsu bavua benza anu nanku too ne mpindiewu." 
2Kings18:1 Osheya, muana wa Ela, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua Izrayele bidimu bisatu, Izkiya, muana wa Akaze kudia bukalenga mu Yuda," 
2Kings18:2 muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Izkiya uvua Abi, muana wa Zekarya." 
2Kings18:3 Izkiya uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze." 
2Kings18:4 Izkiya ke uvua mukandike miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, mupule bibumba bia mabue, mupule kabidi ne makunji a kutendelela. Uvua nuukosolole nyoka wa tshiamu tshikunze, uvua Moshe muenze. Bualu too ne ku tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele batshi wa anu balambula milambu ya manananshi ku nyoka awu, uvuabu babikila ne: Nehuktane." 
2Kings18:5 Izkiya uvua mudifile kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, mupite bakalenga bonsu ba Yuda, bavua bamudianjidila mu bukalenga, ne bavua bamulonda panyima." 
2Kings18:6 Uvua muitabe anu Maweja-Nangila, kayi umulekela nansha kakese to. Uvua utumikila bimpe mikenji ivua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe Moshe." 
2Kings18:7 Maweja-Nangila uvua wambuluisha Izkiya. Izkiya uvua ne diakalenga mu bionsu bivuaye wenza. Izkiya kutombokela mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kubenga mua kushala ku bumfumu buende." 
2Kings18:8 Kabidi Izkiya kutshimuna bena Peleshete. Kubalondakajilaye too ne mu buloba bua Ngaza. Kukuataye bimenga bivua bibaka ne bimana bikole, kukuata kabidi ne misoku mikese ivua ne batentekedi." 
2Kings18:9 Izkiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu binayi, kabidi Osheya, muana wa Ela, mulale mu bukalenga bua Izrayele bidimu muanda mutekete, Shalmanazere, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kunyungulula tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings18:10 Bidimu bisatu bimane kupita, mmumue ne: Izkiya mulale mu bukalenga bidimu bisambombu, Osheya mulale mu bukalenga bidimu tshitema, kukuatabu tshimenga." 
2Kings18:11 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure kukuata bena Izrayele, kuya nabu ku Ashure, kubapeshaye miaba ya kuasa mu buloba bua Ala, bua Ngozane, ne muaba uvua musulu wa Abore, ne mu bimenga bia Madayi." 
2Kings18:12 Bionsu ebi, biakuenzeka bualu bena Izrayele kabavua batumikila diyi dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu to. Kabidi bavua bashipe ndondu wende. Bavua babenga kuteleja mikenji yende, ne kukumbaja bionsu bivua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, mubambile." 
2Kings18:13 Izkiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne binayi, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kuluisha bimenga bionsu bia Yuda bivua ne bimana bikole, kubikuata." 
2Kings18:14 Pashishe, Izkiya, mukalenga wa Yuda kutuma mukenji kudi mukalenga wa bena Ashure uvua mu tshimenga tshia Lakishe, umuambila ne: — Meme ndi muenze bibi! Lekela kunduisha muaba ewu. Ndi muitabe bua kufuta mushinga onsu uudi undomba. Mukalenga wa bena Ashure kulomba Izkiya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo binunu tshitema, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo nkama tshitema." 
2Kings18:15 Izkiya kuangata tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshionsu tshivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne tshivua mu tshibambalu tshia ku nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Kings18:16 Bua amone mua kulambula mpawungi uvua mumushe tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshivuaye mulamike kale ku biibi bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne ku mabaya avua ku nseke yatshi. Kupeshaye mukalenga wa bena Ashure bintu bionsu abi. 
2Kings18:17 Pavua mukalenga wa bena Ashure mu Lakishe, kutumaye mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita, mutangidi wa bena midimu ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga, ne mulombodi wa badi bela maluvu, mu Yerushalayime kudi mukalenga Izkiya. Bavua ne musumba munene wa bena mvita. Bobu bamane kufika mu tshimenga, kuimanabu pabuipi ne tshiina tshia mayi tshivua kulu, mu njila udi muye ku budimi bua Enrojele." 
2Kings18:18 Kulombabu bua kuyukila ne mukalenga Izkiya. Kadi, mulombodi wa mu nzubu wa bukalenga Elyakime, muana wa Ilkiya, kupatuka mu tshimenga bua kumonangana nabu. Elyakime bavua ne Shebna mufundi, kabidi ne Yowa, muana wa Ashafe, mufikishi wa malu a mu bukalenga kudi bantu." 
2Kings18:19 Mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga maluvu, kubambila ne: — Nuye kuambila Izkiya ne: mukalenga munene, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, udi ukonka ne: “Tshidi tshikuleja ne: udi mua kutshimuna ntshinyi?" 
2Kings18:20 Udi wela meji ne: paudi wakula ufuna bua mvita, udi ne bukole ne meji a mua kuluangana. Paudi mutomboke apu, udi mutekemene nganyi bua kukuambuluisha?" 
2Kings18:21 Udi mutekemene kudi bena Ejipitu anyi? Bena Ejipitu badi anu bu tshikolu tshia dibue tshimane kutshibuka, padi muntu ushindamenapu, tshidi tshimutua mu tshianza. Ke mudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu wenzela bantu bonsu badi batekemena kudiye." 
2Kings18:22 “Bulelela nenungandamune ne: tudi batekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kadi, wewe Izkiya ke uvua munyangakaje miaba yonsu ya kumutendelela, ne bilambuilu biende bionsu bivuapu. Uvua mukandike bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bua kabatendeledi muaba mukuabu to, anu kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshidi mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings18:23 “Nanku, numvuangane ne mfumuanyi, mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Meme ndi mua kunupesha nyama ya tubalu binunu bibidi, panuikala mua kupeta bantu badi mua kubandapu." 
2Kings18:24 Kadi, wewe kuena mua kunyemesha mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mfumuanyi nansha umue, nansha yeye kayi mumanye mvita to. Wewe udi mutekemene anu kudi bena Ejipitu bua kumupeshabu matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu!" 
2Kings18:25 Kabidi, mfumuanyi uvua mua kuluisha ditunga edi, kudinyangakaja, Maweja-Nangila kayi muanyishe anyi? Nansha kakese! Anu Maweja-Nangila nkayende, ke uvua mutume diyi bua mfumuanyi kudinyangakaja." 
2Kings18:26 Ke Elyakime, muana wa Ilkiya, Shebna, ne Yowa, kuambila mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure maluvu ne: — Bu wewe musue, tuyukile nebe mu muakulu wa bena Arame, bualu tudi baumanye. Lekela kuakula netu mu muakulu wa bena Ebrewu, bualu bantu bonsu badi ku bimana badi anu batuteleja." 
2Kings18:27 Kadi, mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga maluvu, kuandamuna ne: — Nudi nuela meji ne: malu adi mukalenga wanyi mutume bua kuamba, tudi mua kunuambila anu muenu ne mukalenga wenu anyi? Malu aa, tudi mua kuambila kabidi bantu bonsu badi ku bimana aba. Bualu bantu aba ne nuenu, nenudie tumvi tuenu, kabidi nenunue menyi enu anu mutantshi mukese ewu." 
2Kings18:28 Pashishe, mulombodi awu, kuimana kulu wela mbila bikole mu muakulu wa bena Ebrewu, wamba ne: — Telejayi tshidi mukalenga munene, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, wamba:" 
2Kings18:29 “Izkiya kena mua kunushima to. Kena mua kunusungidila ku bianza bianyi. 
2Kings18:30 Udi unuambila ne: mbimpe kudifila anu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Yeye neatusungidile bulelela. Kabidi yeye neakandike mukalenga wa bena Ashure bua kakuatshi tshimenga atshi! Kanuitabi bionsu abi to. 
2Kings18:31 Kanuena mua kuteleja tshidi Izkiya unuambila to. Nuteleje anu tshindi nnuambila meme mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Lekelayi kukandamana! Anyishayi nudifile kundi. Nanku, muntu yonsu wa kunudi neanue maluvu ende, neadie tumuma tuende tua mfiku, kabidi neanue mayi ende adi mu tshiina." 
2Kings18:32 Pashishe, nemfike bua kunuangata, kuya nenu mu ditunga didi bu mudi dienu edi, ditunga didi ne ntete ya kuenza bukula bua mampa mipite bungi. Didi kabidi ne mionji ya maluvu a mvinyo, mitshi ya olive ya kuenza mafuta, kabidi ne buitshi. Nanku, pa mutu pa nuenu kufua muaba ewu, nuenu baye kuaka, nenuikale ne muoyi. Kanuteleji tshidi Izkiya unuambila to. Bualu udi unushima, padiye unuambila ne: Maweja-Nangila neatusungidile." 
2Kings18:33 Mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kayivua munkandike bua meme kukuata ditunga diabu to." 
2Kings18:34 Mvidie wa tshimenga tshia Amate ne tshia Arpade, ivua mingenzele tshinyi? Nansha mvidie ya tshimenga tshia Sefarvayime, tshia Ena, ne tshia Ava? Mvidie nansha umue kavua munkandike bua meme kukuata tshimenga tshia Samariya to." 
2Kings18:35 Ku mvidie yonsu eyi, kakuena nansha umue uvua munkandike bua meme kukuata ditunga diende to. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila neankandike bua meme kukuata Yerushalayime mushindu kaayi?”" 
2Kings18:36 Bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu, bavua anu bapuwa. Kabavua bandamuna to, bualu ke muvua mukalenga Izkiya mumane kubambila." 
2Kings18:37 Pashishe, Elyakime, muana wa Ilkiya, uvua mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna mufundi, ne Yowa, muana wa Ashafe, mufikishi wa malu a mu bukalenga kudi bantu, kupanda bilamba biabu, kupingana kudi mukalenga Izkiya. Kumuambilabu bionsu bivuabu bambe kudi mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure maluvu." 
2Kings19:1 Mukalenga Izkiya umvua bionsu bivuabu bambe, kupanda bilamba biende, kuvuala bilamba bia madilu. Kuyaye mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings19:2 Diakamue, kubikilaye Elyakime, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna mufundi, ne bakulu ba batuangaji. Kubatumaye kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa. Bantu abu, bavua bavuala kabidi bilamba bia madilu." 
2Kings19:2 Diakamue, kubikilaye Elyakime, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna mufundi, ne bakulu ba batuangaji. Kubatumaye kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa. Bantu abu, bavua bavuala kabidi bilamba bia madilu." 
2Kings19:3 Kuyabu kuambila muambi Yeshaya ne: “Mukalenga Izkiya udi wamba ne: Lelu ndituku dia kutukengeshabu, kutunyoka, ne kubifuisha bundu. Bu mudibu bamba ne: muana ukadi pabuipi, kadi mamuende kena ne bukole bua kulela to." 
2Kings19:4 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure mmutume mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga maluvu, bua kupenda Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi. Eyowa, ndi njinga bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe umvue bipendu bionsu ebi, anyoke muntu uvua umupenda! Wewe, lombaku Maweja-Nangila, wakuile bantu bende badi bashala aba.”" 
2Kings19:5 Bantu bavua mukalenga Izkiya mutume, bamane kuyukila ne muambi Yeshaya," 
2Kings19:6 awu kubambila ne: — Nuye kuambila mukalenga wenu ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Uvua muteleje muvua balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure bampenda. Kadi, kutshinyi bua bionsu bivuabu bakula abi to." 
2Kings19:7 Mukalenga neapete mukenji. Diba adi meme nemmuenzeje bua apingane mu ditunga diende. Meme nemmushipeshe mu ditunga diende amu. ” 
2Kings19:8 Mulombodi wa beledi ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure maluvu, kumvua lumu ne: mfumuende mmumuke mu Lakishe bua kuya kuluisha Libna. Nanku, kuyayemu bua kumonangana ne mfumuende." 
2Kings19:9 Kuambilabu mukalenga wa bena Ashure ne: Tiraka, muena Kushe, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, mmufike bua kukuluisha. Nanku, Senakeribe kutumina Izkiya mukanda," 
2Kings19:10 mukalenga wa bena Yuda, umuambila ne: “Wewe udi mutambe kutekemena amu Mvidi Mukulu webe. Udi wela meji ne: neankandike bua meme kukuata Yerushalayime anyi? Mvidi Mukulu kakushimi to." 
2Kings19:11 Udi mumane kumanya muvua bakalenga ba bena Ashure benza matunga makuabu, baanyangakaja. Wewe udi wela meji ne: neupanduke anyi?" 
2Kings19:12 Bakalenga bavua mu bukalenga kumpala kuanyi, bavua babutula bimenga ebi: Ngozane, Arane, Reshefe, ne Telashare tshimenga tshinene tshia bena Edene. Mvidie ya mu bisamba ebi, kayena unsungidile bimenga ebi to." 
2Kings19:13 Ela meji bimpe. Bakalenga ba mu tshimenga tshia Amate, Arpade, Layire, Sefarvayime, Ena ne Ava, badi penyi?”" 
2Kings19:14 Izkiya kuangata mukanda uvuabu bamutuadila kudi bena Ashure, kuubala. Pashishe, kubuelaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuuleja Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings19:15 Nanku, kutendelelaye, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, wewe udi usomba pa mutu pa bakerubine. Wewe nkayebe ke Mvidi Mukulu mu makalenga onsu a pa buloba, wewe ke uvua mufuke diulu ne buloba." 
2Kings19:16 Maweja-Nangila, uteleje bimpe, utangile bimpe, wewe Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, vuluka bipendu bivuabu bakupenda kudi bantu badi Senakeribe mutume." 
2Kings19:17 Maweja-Nangila, bulelela, bakalenga ba bena Ashure mbabutule bisamba, banyangakaja buloba bua bisamba abi." 
2Kings19:18 Mbanyangakaje mvidie ya bena bisamba abi, bayoshe. Bualu kayivua mvidie ya bushiwa to. Ivua anu mpingu misonga kudi bantu, ya mitshi, nansha ya mabue." 
2Kings19:19 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mpindiewu, utusungidile mu bianza bia Senakeribe. Nanku, mu makalenga onsu a pa buloba, nebamanye ne: anu wewe Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
2Kings19:20 Ke muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, kutuma muntu bua kuambila Izkiya ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Ndi mumvue dilomba diebe bua Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
2Kings19:20 Ke muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, kutuma muntu bua kuambila Izkiya ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Ndi mumvue dilomba diebe bua Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
2Kings19:21 Teleja malu andi mmubengela: Tshimenga tshia Siyone tshidi tshikudiwula, tshikuela bibingu. Tshimenga tshimpe tshia Yerushalayime tshidi tshikuseka, tshikupa mutu." 
2Kings19:22 Uuvua upenda nnganyi? Uuvua ujana ne dikamakama nnganyi? Wewe mutshimbakane, uuvua utangila, kuyi ne kanemu, nnganyi? Uvua unsendeka mmeme Mvidi Mukulu, wa tshijila wa Izrayele!" 
2Kings19:23 Uvua mutume bantu bebe, bua bampende meme Maweja-Nangila! Uvua wamba ne: ‘Meme Senakeribe, ndi ne matempu a mvita mapite bungi. Ndi mubande ku nsongu ya mikuna. Ndi mubande ne pa mikuna ya Lebanone, bua kukosa mithi mimpe ya sedre, mipite mikuabu yonsu, ne mitshi ya siprese, mipite mikuabu ku bule. Nemfike ku nsongu ya mikuna idi mipite mikuabu, ne mu ditu dia Lebanone." 
2Kings19:24 Meme ndi mumbule biina bia mayi! Ndi munue mayi mu matunga a bende. Nengumishe misapa ya Nile, anu pandi ndiata makasa, mu ditunga dia Ejipitu.’" 
2Kings19:25 “Wewe, Senakeribe, udi uditambisha. Kadi teleja, nkuvuluija malu. Ku kale, meme ke udi mulongolole malu aa. Ku kalekale, mvua muele meji a tshia kuenza. Mpindiewu ndi nkumbaja bionsu abi. Meme ndi mukupeshe bukole, bua kubutula, ne kushimbula, bimenga bidi ne bimana bikole." 
2Kings19:26 Bena bimenga abi, kabavua ne bukole, mikolu yabu kuteketa bua bowa. Kumvuabu bundu. Badi bafuana bisosa bia mu mpata, midioku ya mu madimi, ne bikunyibua bidi bitoloka ku musaka wa nzubu, biuma, kabiyi bianji kukola." 
2Kings19:27 “Ndi mumanye malu ebe. Ndi mumanye paudi usomba, paudi upatuka nansha ubuela, paudi umfunyina meme." 
2Kings19:28 Wewe udi mumfunyine bushuwa. Mvua mumvue muuvua mumpende ne dikamakama. Nanku nenkutekeshe, nkuela kakanu ku diulu, ne lukanu lua tshiamu mukana. Nenkupingaje kuebe, amu mu njila uuvua mufumine." 
2Kings19:29 “Kadi wewe Izkiya, ndi nkuleja bidi ne bua kuenzeka tshidimu etshi, neudie ntete ya kuenza bukula ya bidimenena nkayabi. Tshidimu tshialonda, neudie kabidi ntete ya bidimenena. Kadi tshidimu tshisatu, nenuyikune, nenuyinowe. Nenukune mionji yenu ya mvinyo, nenunue maluvu ayi." 
2Kings19:30 Bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda badi bashale ne muoyi nebikale tshiakabidi bu mutshi udi muele miji mu buloba, matamba awu mikale ne bimuma bia bungi." 
2Kings19:31 Eyowa, mu Yerushalayime nemupatuke bantu badi bashale ne muoyi. Bantu nebimane pa mukuna wa Siyone.” Yeshaya uvua wamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila neakumbaje bualu ebu, bualu udi ununanga bikole." 
2Kings19:32 Kadi mpindiewu, bua mukalenga wa bena Ashure, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Kakubuela mu tshimenga etshi to. Kena mua kuasa tshimenga etshi miketa to. Ngabu kayena mua kumuambuluisha bua kuluisha tshimenga etshi to." 
2Kings19:33 Kena mua kuelesha tshibumba, kutshibanda bua kubuela mu tshimenga etshi nansha. Neapingane amu mu njila uvuaye mufumine. Kakubuela mu tshimenga etshi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ke udi wamba nanku." 
2Kings19:34 Nendame Yerushalayime. Nemmusungidile, bualu ndi Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi ndi nnanga kashidi, muntu wanyi, Davide!”" 
2Kings19:35 Butuku, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuya mu mitanda ya bena Ashure. Kushipayemu bantu balume binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bitanu. Butshia dinda, bantu bavua bashala ne muoyi babika ku tulu kumonabu bitalu bionsu abi." 
2Kings19:36 Nanku, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure kutula mitanda, kuya kusomba mu tshimenga tshiende tshia Ninive." 
2Kings19:37 Dituku dikuabu, pavua Senakeribe utendelela mu nzubu wa mvidie wende Nisroke, bana bende ba balume babidi: Adrameleke ne Sareshere kumushipa. Pashishe, kunyemabu kuya mu ditunga dia Ararate. Muanende mukuabu, Asharadone, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings20:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Izkiya kupeta disama dia lufu. Muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, kufika bua kumusamba, umuambila miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila muambe ne: — Diba diakumbanyi bua wewe kudilongolola, bualu mu disama edi, kuena upanda to, neufue." 
2Kings20:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Izkiya kupeta disama dia lufu. Muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, kufika bua kumusamba, umuambila miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila muambe ne: — Diba diakumbanyi bua wewe kudilongolola, bualu mu disama edi, kuena upanda to, neufue." 
2Kings20:2 Nanku, Izkiya kutangila ku tshimana tshia nzubu. Utendelela Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne:" 
2Kings20:3 — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila, uvuluke bionsu bimvua ngenza. Mvua mukuitabe ne muoyi mujima. Mvua anu ngenza malu mimpe bua kukusankisha! Pashishe, Izkiya kudila bikole." 
2Kings20:4 Yeshaya kayi muanji kufika mu lubanza lua ku nzubu wa bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila kumutumina diyi," 
2Kings20:5 bua apingane kudi Izkiya, mukalenga wa bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, amuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua webe Davide udi wamba ne: Ndi mumvue ditendelela diebe, kabidi ndi mumone binsonji biebe. Nanku ndi musue kujikija disama diebe. Papita matuku asatu, mutuadije kuya kabidi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings20:6 Nenkushiye kabidi ne muoyi bidimu dikumi ne bitanu! Wewe ne Yerushalayime, nennusungidile mu bianza bia mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Nendame tshimenga etshi, bualu meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ndi nnanga Da-vide, muntu wanyi kashidi.”" 
2Kings20:7 Yeshaya kuzaza tumuma tua mfiku, kuenza ditapi. Kudilamikabu muaba uvua tshiuja, bua kuondapa mukalenga Izkiya." 
2Kings20:8 Pashishe, Izkiya kukonka muambi ne: — Tshidi mua kunjadikila ne: Maweja-Nangila neangondape, nembuele tshiakabidi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, papita matuku asatu ntshinyi?" 
2Kings20:9 Yeshaya kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila neakuleje tshidi mua kukujadikila, neakumbaje bionsu bidiye mulaye. Udi musue mundidimbi uya kumpala anyi upingana panyima pa bidiatshilu dikumi bia tshibandilu, tshivua Akaze muase?" 
2Kings20:10 Izkiya kuandamuna ne: — Bua mundidimbi kuya kumpala pa bidiatshilu dikumi, mbualu bukese. Nanku, ndi musue bua upingane panyima." 
2Kings20:11 Muambi Yeshaya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila kupingaja mundidimbi panyima pa bidiatshilu dikumi, bia tshibandilu tshivua mukalenga Akaze muase." 
2Kings20:12 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga wa Babilone, Merodake-Baladane, muana wa Baladane, kumvua lumu lua disama dia Izkiya. Kumutuminaye bantu ne mukanda, ne bintu bia kumusankisha." 
2Kings20:13 Izkiya kuakidila bantu abu, kubaleja miaba yonsu ivuabu bateka bintu bia mushinga mukole: tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, manananshi, ne mafuta a mupuya muimpe. Kubalejaye kabidi muaba uvuaye uteka bia mvita, ne bintu bionsu bikuabu. Kavua mubasokoke tshintu nansha tshimue, mu nzubu wa bukalenga, nansha mu ditunga diende dijima." 
2Kings20:14 Pashishe, muambi Yeshaya kuya kudi mukalenga Izkiya, umukonka ne: — Bantu aba bavua bakuambila tshinyi? Kabidi mbafume penyi? Izkiya kuandamuna ne: — Mbafume kule kutambe, ku Babilone." 
2Kings20:15 Yeshaya kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga bavua bamone tshinyi? Izkiya kuandamuna ne: — Bavua bamone bintu bionsu bidimu. Tshiena mubasokoke tshintu nansha tshimue, tshia ku bintu bionsu bindi muteke." 
2Kings20:16 Ke Yeshaya kuambila Izkiya ne: — Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba: 
2Kings20:17 “Dituku dikuabu, bintu bionsu bidi mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga mpindiewu, bintu bionsu bivuabu batekamu kudi bantu bavua bakudianjidila mu bukalenga, bintu bionsu abi nebaye nabi mu Babilone. Muaba ewu, kawakushala tshintu to. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba." 
2Kings20:18 Nebakuate kabidi bantu ba ku ndelanganyi yebe, baye nabu mu Babilone, bua kubapakula bua bikale benza mudimu mu nzubu wa bukalenga, wa mukalenga wa bena Babilone. ”" 
2Kings20:19 Izkiya kuandamuna Yeshaya ne: — Tshidi Maweja-Nangila muambe tshidi bualu buimpe. Izkiya uvua udiambila munda munda ne: “Nanku pantshidi ne muoyi, netuikale basombe bimpe mu bupole!”" 
2Kings20:20 Malu makuabu a Izkiya, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Mu mukanda amu, mbalejemu bukitu buvua nabu Izkiya, ne mushindu uvuaye mumbule tshiina tshimue tshia mayi, muenza ne mukidi bua kufikisha mayi mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings20:21 Izkiya mumane kufua, muanende wa balume Menashe kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings21:1 Menashe kudia bukalenga, muikale ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi atanu ne bitanu mu Yerushalayime. Dina dia mamuende divua Efsi-Ba." 
2Kings21:2 Menashe kuenza malu avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge, kuenza ne malu mabi onsu a bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bavua Maweja-Nangila muipate bua kushilabu bena Izrayele ditunga." 
2Kings21:3 Kulongololaye ne miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ivuabu banyangakaje kudi tatuende Izkiya. Kuibakaye mvidie Baale bilambuilu. Kuenzaye dikunji dia kutendelela, bu muvuabu benza kale kudi Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Kabidi kutendelelaye bintu bia mu tshibuashibuashi." 
2Kings21:4 Kuenzaye bilambuilu bikuabu, bia bantu benyi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, wa mu Yerushalayime. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuamba bua nzubu awu ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila nensombe mu nzubu ewu.”" 
2Kings21:5 Pashishe, bintu bia mu tshibuashibuashi, Menashe kubashila bilambuilu mu mbanza ibidi ya ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings21:6 Kufikaye ne ku dilambula muanende wa balume bu mulambu wa kuosha. Kuenzaye majimbu a mishindu mishilangane, kubukaye lubuku lua muzangu. Nanku, Menashe uvua wenza anu malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, umufikisha munda." 
2Kings21:7 Uvua muenze kabidi lupingu lua mvidie mukaji, Ashera, mubiteke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile Davide ne muanende wa balume Shelomu ne: “Nzubu ewu udi mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshindi mumane kusungula ku bimenga bionsu bidi mu bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele, ke muaba undi nsomba kashidi munkatshi mua bantu." 
2Kings21:8 Pikala bena Izrayele bakumbaje meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi, bivuabu babapesha kudi muntu wanyi Moshe, nanku tshiena mbumusha mu ditunga dimvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu to, bua balalakane miaba mile.”" 
2Kings21:9 Kadi, bena Yuda kabena batumikila Maweja-Nangila to. Menashe ke uvua mubafikishe ku dienza bibi bipite bia bantu, bavua kale mu ditunga adi, bavua Maweja-Nangila muipate bua kushilabu bena Izrayele ditunga." 
2Kings21:10 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kutuma bambi, bantu bende ne:" 
2Kings21:11 “Mukalenga Menashe mmuenze malu mabi a mishindu yonsu, mmupite ne bena Amore ku buenzayi. Kabidi mmufikishe ne bena Yuda ku ditendelela mvidie." 
2Kings21:12 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: ‘Nennyoke bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bonsu bikole. Muntu yonsu umvua lumu lua dikenga diabu, neunwue bibi bitambe." 
2Kings21:13 Nembutule Yerushalayime, bu mumvua mubutule Samariya ne bena diku dia Akabe. Meme nenshiye Yerushalayime munda mutupu, anu bu mudibu basukula dilonga, pashishe, badibuikija." 
2Kings21:14 Bantu bena Izrayele bikale bashale, tshiakuikala nabu ne bualu to. Nembafile ku bumfumu bua baluishi babu. Baluishi abu, nebapawule bintu bionsu bia bena ditunga diabu." 
2Kings21:15 Nengenze bionsu ebi, bualu biangatshile dituku dindi mupatule bankambua babu mu Ejipitu too ne mpindiewu, bantu banyi badi anu banufikisha munda, benza malu andi mubenge!’ ”" 
2Kings21:16 Mukalenga Menashe uvua mushipe bantu bapite bungi, bavua kabayi ne bualu to. Tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime tshijima, tshivua ne mashi mapite bungi. Bubi ebu, badi babusangisha kabidi ku buenzayi bonsu budi Menashe muenze, bua kufikisha bena Yuda ku dienza malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge." 
2Kings21:17 Malu makuabu a Menashe, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza. Mu mukanda emu, mbafundemu malu onsu adi Menashe muenze ne mushindu uvuaye wenza buenzayi." 
2Kings21:18 Menashe mumane kufua, kumujiikabu mu lupangu luvua ku nzubu wa bukalenga, luvuabu babikila ne: “Lupangu lua Uza”. Muanende wa balume Amone kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings21:19 Amone kudia bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Amone uvua Meshulemete, muana wa Aruse, wa mu tshimenga tshia Yotba." 
2Kings21:20 Amone uvua muenze malu mabi adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, bu muvua tatuende Menashe muenze." 
2Kings21:21 Uvua muenze buenzayi anu bu tatuende Menashe. Uvua utendelela mvidie bu muvua tatuende utendelela. 
2Kings21:22 Amone kavua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue to. Uvua mubenge Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bende. 
2Kings21:23 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga Amone, kumuelela tshifufu tshibi, kumushipela mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga." 
2Kings21:24 Kadi, bena Yuda kushipa bantu bavua belele Amone tshifufu abu. Kusungulabu muanende wa balume Yoshiya bua kupinganaye tatuende Amone mu bukalenga." 
2Kings21:25 Malu makuabu a Amone, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings21:26 Kumujiikabu mu lukita luende luvua mu: “Lupangu lua Uza.” Nanku, muanende wa balume Yoshiya, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings22:1 Yoshiya kudia bukalenga muikale ne bidimu muanda mukulu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi asatu ne tshimue, mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yoshiya uvua Yedida, muana wa Adaya, wa mu tshimenga tshia Boskate." 
2Kings22:2 Yoshiya uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze. Uvua ulonda tshilejilu tshiende menemene." 
2Kings22:3 Yoshiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, dituku dikuabu, kutumaye mufundi Shafane, muana wa Ashaliya, mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Shafane uvua muikulu wa Meshulame. Yoshiya kuambila Shafane ne:" 
2Kings22:4 — Uye kumonangana ne Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene. Umuambile bua kubalaye makuta onsu avua bantu bafila bua kulongolola nawu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, avuabu basangisha kudi batuangaji bavua balama ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings22:5 Makuta awu, baapeshe balombodi ba bena mudimu badi balongoluesha nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku, bobu nebafute bantu badi benza mudimu wa mabaya, bibaki, ne bena mudimu bakuabu. Nebasumbe kabidi mitshi ne mabue masonge bimpe, bua kulongolola nawu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings22:6  
2Kings22:7 Kadi, bantu badi bafuta bena mudimu, kabena mua kubalondesha bua makuta adibu benza nawu mudimu to. Bualu badi benza mudimu wabu bimpe." 
2Kings22:8 Shafane mumane kuambila Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, bionsu abi, Ilkiya kumumanyisha bua mukanda wa mikenji uvuaye muangule mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Kupeshaye Shafane mukanda awu. Shafane mumane kuubala," 
2Kings22:9 kuyaye kuambila mukalenge Yoshiya ne: — Batuangaji mbumushe makuta onsu mu mushete udi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mbaapeshe balombodi ba bena mudimu badi balongoluesha nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
2Kings22:10 Shafane kuamba kabidi ne: — Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, mmumpeshe mukanda ewu. Shafane kubadila mukalenga Yoshiya mukanda awu." 
2Kings22:11 Anu mukalenga Yoshiya umvua malu avua mu mukanda wa mikenji, kunyingalalaye bikole. Kupandaye bilamba biende." 
2Kings22:12 Kubikidishaye Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene. Ahikame, muana wa Shafane, Akbore, muana wa Mikaya, Shafane mufundi, ne Ashaya mulombodi wa mu bukalenga, ubambila ne:" 
2Kings22:13 — Nuye kukonka Maweja-Nangila, buanyi meme ne bua bena Yuda bonsu, tumanye tshitudi mua kuenza, bua malu adibu bafunda mu mukanda udibu bangula ewu. Bualu bankambua betu kabavua bakumbaja mikenji yonsu ivuabu bafundemu to. Ke padi Maweja-Nangila mutufikile munda bikole." 
2Kings22:14 Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, Ahikame, Akbore, Shafane, ne Ashaya, kuya kudi muambi mukaji Ulda, uvua musombele mu tshitupa tshipiatshipia tshia Yerushalayime. Bayende wa Ulda uvua Shalume, muana wa Tikva, ne muikulu wa Arase. Shalume ke uvua ulama bilamba bia tshijila bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu abu, kuambila muambi mukaji Ulda malu onsu awu." 
2Kings22:15 Ke Ulda kubatuma bua baye kuambila mukalenga Yoshiya ne: 
2Kings22:16 “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: ‘Nennyoke tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ne bantu bonsu badimu, anu bu mudibu bafunde mu mukanda uvua mukalenga wa bena Yuda mubale." 
2Kings22:17 Bena mu Yerushalayime mbambenge, mbalambule milambu kudi mvidie mikuabu. Bionsu bidibu benza mbimfikishe munda. Ke pandi mufikile tshimenga etshi munda bikole. Tshiji tshianyi katshiena tshijika mpindiewu to." 
2Kings22:18 Kadi, mukalenga Yoshiya mmunutume bua kunkonka, numuambile ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ndi ngamba ne: Wewe Yoshiya uvua mumvue malu onsu adi mu mukanda awu." 
2Kings22:19 Uvua muteleje bimpe tshindi muambe bua Yerushalayime ne bantu bonsu badimu. Dikenga diabu nedikale dikole. Bantu nebikale baditshipa, batele mena a bena tshimenga atshi. Kadi wewe Yoshiya, uvua mulombe luse, uvua muvuluke bubi buebe kumpala kuanyi, uvua mupanda bilamba biebe, mudile muadi. Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkujadikila ne: ndi mumvue dilomba diebe." 
2Kings22:20 Kuakumona makenga onsu aa to. Neufue anu bimpe. Nebakujiike mu Yerushalayime.’ ” Ilkiya mutuangaji munene, ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kuyabu kuambila mukalenga Yoshiya bionsu abi." 
2Kings23:1 Diakamue, mukalenga Yoshiya kubikidisha bakulu bonsu ba mu ditunga dia Yuda, ne ba mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings23:2 Kuyabu bonsu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Bavua baye ne bantu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime ne ba mu ditunga dia Yuda: batuangaji, bambi, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu. Mukalenga Yoshiya kubabadila bonsu mukanda wa ndondu uvuabu bangula mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings23:3 Pashishe, mukalenga kuimana pabuipi ne dikunji dia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kutuaye ndondu ne Maweja-Nangila tshiakabidi. Muntu yonsu kuitaba bua kulamata Maweja-Nangila, ne kukumbaja ne muoyi mujima, meyi ende, mikenji yende, ne mikandu yende, ne kuitaba kabidi, bua kukumbaja bionsu bivua mu mukanda wa ndondu. Bantu bonsu kuitaba mua kuenza nanku." 
2Kings23:4 Pashishe, mukalenga Yoshiya kuambila Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, ne batuangaji bakuabu bavuaye nabu, ne batuangaji bavua balame ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kumushabu mu muaba wa tshijila bintu bionsu bia kutendelela nabi mvidie Baale, mvidie mukaji Ashera, ne bintu bionsu bia mu tshibuashibuashi. Kumukabu ne bintu abi mu Yerushalayime. Kuyabu kubioshila mu tshibandabanda tshia Sedrone. Pashishe, kuyabu ne butu bua bintu abi mu tshimenga tshia Betele." 
2Kings23:5 Yoshiya kuipata batuangaji bavua batendelela mvidie, bavua bakalenga ba bena Yuda basungula bua kulambula milambu miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ivua mu bimenga bia bena Yuda, ne ivua pabuipi ne Yerushalayime. Yoshiya uvua muipate batuangaji aba, bualu bavua balambula milambu kudi mvidie Baale, mvidie Diba, mvidie Ngondu, kudi mitotu, ne kudi bintu bikuabu bionsu bidi mu tshibuashibuashi." 
2Kings23:6 Yoshiya kutuma bantu bua bajule dikunji dia mvidie mukaji Ashera, divua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumukabu nadi mu Yerushalayime, bua kuya kudioshila mu tshibandabanda tshia Sedrone. Kuoshabu dikunji adi, kudibutula. Butu buadi kubutangalajabu muaba uvua nkita ya bantu bonsu." 
2Kings23:7 Yoshiya kupula nzubu ivua pabuipi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba uvua bantu bendela tshiendenda tshia kutendelela mvidie, kabidi uvua bakaji batelela bilamba bia kutendelela nabi mvidie mukaji Ashera." 
2Kings23:8 Pashishe, batuangaji bonsu bavua batendelela mvidie mu bimenga bia bena Yuda, biangatshile ku Ngeba too ne ku Bersheba, Yoshiya kubatandisha mu Yerushalayime. Kunyangakajaye miaba ya kutendelela ivua batuangaji abu balambuila milambu, kupula bilambuilu bionsu bivua pabuipi ne biibi bia Yerushalayime, nangananga tshilambuilu tshivua ku tshiibi tshia Yoshuwa, mulombodi wa tshimenga. Tshilambuilu atshi, tshivua ku dia bakaji pa kubuela." 
2Kings23:9 Kadi, batuangaji bavua batendelela mu miaba ayi ya kutendelela, kabavua babitabe bua kulambulabu milambu pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila tshivua mu Yerushalayime to. Kadi, bavua mua kudia mampa kaayi mela buanga, bu muvua batuangaji bakuabu baadia." 
2Kings23:10 Yoshiya kunyangakaja tshioshelu tshivua ku Tofete, mu tshibandabanda tshia Inome, bua bantu kabayi kuoshilapu kabidi bana babu ba balume, nansha ba bakaji bua kulambula mulambu ku mvidie Moleke." 
2Kings23:11 Kunyangakajaye mpingu ya nyama ya tubalu ivua bakalenga ba bena Yuda bajidila bua kutendelela mvidie Diba. Mpingu ya nyama ya tubalu ayi, ivua ku luseke lua mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu nzubu ivua milamakaja pabuipi ne tshibambalu tshia Netane-Meleke, mulombodi wa mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Yoshiya kuoshisha matempu a mvidie Diba." 
2Kings23:12 Kupulaye bilambuilu bionsu bivua bakalenga ba bena Yuda bibake pa mutu pa nzubu wa Akaze. Kupulaye kabidi bilambuilu bionsu bivua Menashe muibake mu mbanza ibidi ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kunyangakajaye bilambuilu abi muaba awu. Kubimanshaye mu tshibandabanda tshivua mu Sedrone. 
2Kings23:13 Yoshiya kunyangakaja miaba ya kutendelela ivua mukalenga Shelomu muibake kuinshi kua mukuna wa Olive, udi mutangilangane ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Miaba ayi, bavua batendelela Astarte, mvidie mukaji wa buenzayi wa bena Sidone, Kemoshe, mvidie muena buenzayi wa bena Mowabe, kabidi Milkome, mvidie mubi wa bena Amone." 
2Kings23:14 Yoshiya kupula mabue avuabu bimanyika, kupula makunji a kutendelela mvidie, kubuikilaye miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ayi ne mifuba ya bantu." 
2Kings23:15 Yoshiya kunyangakaja kabidi muaba wa kutendelela mvidie uvua ku Betele, uvua Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, muibake bua kufikisha bena Izrayele ku dienza bibi. Yoshiya kuosha muaba uvua bantu batendelela mvidie, kupula tshilambuilu, kuosha dikunji divua bantu batendelela. Bintu bionsu abi, kubutuka, kushala anu butu." 
2Kings23:16 Pashishe, Yoshiya ukudimuka, kumonaye nkita pa mukuna. Nanku, kutumaye bantu bua kuambula mifuba ivua mu nkita amu bua kuyoshila pa tshilambuilu, kutshinyangakaja, bu muvua muambi wa Maweja-Nangila mumane kuamba." 
2Kings23:17 Yoshiya kukonka ne: — Dibue dindi mumone pa lukita bialua, ndia tshivulukilu tshia nganyi? Bena tshimenga kumuandamuna ne: — Ntshivulukilu tshia lukita lua muambi uvua mufume mu ditunga dia Yuda, uvua muambe bionsu biudi muenze mpindiewu ku tshilambuilu etshi." 
2Kings23:18 Ke Yoshiya kutuma diyi, wamba ne: — Lekelayi lukita alu! Muntu kena mua kulenga mifuba ya muambi idi mu lukita elu to! Nanku, kulamabu mifuba ya muambi awu, anu bu muvuabu balame mifuba ya muambi uvua mufume mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Kings23:19 Bakalenga ba bena Yuda bavua bafikisha Maweja-Nangila munda, bualu bavua bibake mu bimenga bia ditunga dia Samariya, miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu. Yoshiya kunyangakaja kabidi nzubu yonsu ayi, anu bu muvuaye muenze ku Betele." 
2Kings23:20 Nanku, batuangaji bonsu bavua balambula milambu pa bilambuilu bia kutendelela mvidie, Yoshiya kubashipela pa bilambuilu abi. Kuoshaye mifuba ya bantu pa bilambuilu abi. Pashishe, Yoshiya kupingana mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings23:21 Mukalenga Yoshiya kutuma diyi, bua bantu bonsu benze tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bu muvuabu bafunde mu mukanda wa ndondu." 
2Kings23:22 Nanku, biangatshile tshikondu tshivua bena Izrayele ku bumfumu bua Balombodi too ne ku matuku onsu avua bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda bikale ne bakalenga, kabavua banji kuenza tshibilu tshia nanku tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila to." 
2Kings23:23 Nanku, kuenzelebu Maweja-Nangila tshibilu atshi mu Yerushalayime diba adi, Yoshiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
2Kings23:24 Yoshiya kuipata bantu bonsu bavua bakonka bakishi malu ba mu Yerushalayime ne mu ditunga dia Yuda, bua kukumbaja malu, adibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji, uvua Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, muangule mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kunyangakajaye mpingu ne bintu bikuabu bionsu bivua bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu batendelela." 
2Kings23:25 Mu tshikosu, Yoshiya kayi muanji kubuela mu bukalenga, kakuvua mukalenga mukuabu bu muvua Yoshiya to, uvua muitabe Maweja-Nangila muende muonsu, ne muoyi mujima, kabidi ne bukole buende bonsu, anu bu muvua mikenji ya Moshe miambe. Kabidi Yoshiya mumane kufua, kakuvua mukalenga mukuabu bu yeye to." 
2Kings23:26 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila uvua anu ufikila bukalenga bua bena Yuda munda bikole. Tshiji tshiende katshivua tshituya to. Bualu mukalenga Menashe uvua mumufikishe munda bipite." 
2Kings23:27 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: — Bu mumvua mumane kubenga kale bua kumona bantu ba mu bukalenga bua Izrayele kumpala kuanyi, ke mundi kabidi mbenga bua kumona bantu ba mu bukalenga bua Yuda kumpala kuanyi. Ndi musue kubenga Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshimvua musungule. Ndi musue kubenga kabidi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu umvua mumane kulaya bua kusombamu." 
2Kings23:28 Malu makuabu a Yoshiya, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings23:29 Patshivua Yoshiya mu bukalenga, Neko, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, uvua muye ne bena mvita bende ku musulu wa Perate bua kuambuluisha mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Mukalenga Yoshiya uvua musue kukanga njila, bua bena Ejipitu kabapitshi to. Kadi, kumushipabu ku Megido mu mvita ya kumpala." 
2Kings23:30 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba Yoshiya, kuambula tshitalu tshiende mu ditempu. Kumukabu natshi ku Megido, kuyabu mu Yerushalayime, kumujiika mu lukita luende. Pashishe, bena Yuda kusungula muanende wa balume Yowakaze. Kuinjidilabu bua apingane tatuende Yoshiya mu bukalenga." 
2Kings23:31 Yowakaze kudia bukalenga mu bena Yuda, muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga ngondu amu isatu mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yowakaze uvua Amutale, muana wa Irmeya, wa mu tshimenga tshia Libna." 
2Kings23:32 Yowakaze kuenza malu avua bankambua bende benza, avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge." 
2Kings23:33 Neko, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kukuata Yowakaze, kuyaye nende mu tshimenga tshia Ribla, mu ditunga dia Amate. Kumulamaye mu nzubu wa lukanu. Ke muvua Neko mujikije bukalenga bua Yowakaze nanku. Tshikondu atshi, Neko kuambila bena ditunga dia Yuda bua bafute tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo binunu bisatu, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo makumi asatu." 
2Kings23:34 Pashishe, Neko kusungula Eliyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, bua apingane tatuende mu bukalenga. Neko kushintulula dina dia Eliyakime, kumuinyika dina dia Yowakime. Kadi kuyaye ne Yowakaze mu Ejipitu. Yowakaze kufuila mu Ejipitu." 
2Kings23:35 Yowakime kulambuisha bena mu bukalenga buende bitadi bua kupeta makuta avua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mulombe. Pavua muntu yonsu mumane kulambula tshitadi, Yowakime uvua mua kupesha Neko tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
2Kings23:36 Yowakime kudia bukalenga, muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yowakime uvua Zebuda, muana wa Pedaya, wa mu musoku wa Ruma." 
2Kings23:37 Yowakime uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu bu muvuabu benza kudi bankambua bende." 
2Kings24:1 Pavua Yowakime mu bukalenga, Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, kubuela ne mvita mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Yowakime uvua ne bua kuitaba bumfumu buende. Kadi bidimu bisatu bimane kupita, Yowakime kutombokela mukalenga Nebukadnesare." 
2Kings24:2 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yowakime bena buenzayi ba bena Babilone, ba bena Arame, ba bena Mowabe ne ba bena Amone, bua banyangakaje buloba bua bena Yuda bu muvua bambi bambe mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Kings24:3 Maweja-Nangila uvua mutume makenga aa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, bualu kavua musue kumona kabidi bena bukalenga bua Yuda kumpala kuende to. Menashe uvua muenze bibi bitambe," 
2Kings24:4 bualu uvua mushipe bantu bapite bungi bavua kabayi ne bualu to, muele mashi mapite bungi panshi mu Yerushalayime. Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila kayi musue kufuila bena Yuda kabidi luse to." 
2Kings24:5 Malu makuabu a Yowakime, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu babikila ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Yuda benza." 
2Kings24:6 Yowakime mumane kufua, muanende wa balume Yowakine kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Kings24:7 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kavua kabidi ne dikima bua kupatuka mu ditunga diende to. Bualu mukalenga wa bena Babilone uvua mumane kukuata maloba onsu avua kale ku bumfumu bua bena Ejipitu, avua pankatshi pa mukalu uvua ku mutu kua ditunga dia bena Ejipitu, too ne ku Perate, musulu wa bena Babilone." 
2Kings24:8 Yowakine kubuela mu bukalenga, muikale ne bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga anu ngondu isatu mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yowakine uvua Nehusheta, muana wa Elnatane, wa mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings24:9 Yowakine uvua muenze malu avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu bu muvua tatuende muenze." 
2Kings24:10 Tshikondu atshi, bena mvita ba bena Babilone bavua ku diyi dia balombodi ba mukalenga Nebukadnesare, kunyungulula Yerushalayime." 
2Kings24:11 Pavuabu baluisha tshimenga atshi, Nebukadnesare kufika muaba awu." 
2Kings24:12 Ke mukalenga Yowakine kumuka mu tshimenga ne mamuende, balombodi ba bena mvita bende, bena mudimu bende bavua bamanyike bikole, kabidi ne bantu bonsu bavuaye mutekemene bikole. Yowakine kuya kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone. Kadi, mukalenga wa bena Babilone kubela mu nzubu wa lukanu. Tshikondu atshi, Nebukadnesare uvua mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu muanda mukulu." 
2Kings24:13 Nanku, Nebukadnesare kupawula bintu bia mushinga mukole bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne bivua mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kushipaye bintu bionsu bivuabu benza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bivua mukalenga Shelomu muenzeje bua kutendelela nabi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings24:14 Nebukadnesare kuya ne bena Yerushalayime, balombodi ba mu bukalenga, ne bantu bonsu bavua bamanyike bikole. Bantu bonsu bavua binunu dikumi, katuyi tubala bena midimu ya bianza, ne bansenda. Kuvua kushala mu ditunga anu bantu bapela menemene." 
2Kings24:15 Nebukadnesare kuya ne mukalenga Yowakine, ne mamuende, bakaji ba Yowakine, kabidi ne bantu bavua mukalenga Yowakine mutekemene bikole, ne bamfumu ba bena Yuda." 
2Kings24:16 Nanku, Nebukadnesare kuya mu ditunga dia bena Babilone ne bantu bonsu bavua bamanyike bikole. Bantu bonsu aba bavua binunu muanda mutekete. Kuyaye kabidi ne bena midimu ya bianza ne bansenda tshinunu. Bantu bonsu aba, bavua ne bukole bua kuenza mudimu wa bena mvita." 
2Kings24:17 Pashishe, Nebukadnesare kusungula Mataniya, mansebende wa Yowakine bua kuikalaye mukalenga. Kadi, Nebukadnesare kushintulula dina dia Mataniya, kumuinyika Sedekiya." 
2Kings24:18 Sedekiya kudia bukalenga, muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne tshimue. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Sedekiya uvua Amutale, muana wa Irmeya, wa mu tshimenga tshia Libna." 
2Kings24:19 Sedekiya kuenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu bu muvuabu benza kudi Yowakime." 
2Kings24:20 Maweja-Nangila pavuaye ne tshiji, uvua mutume makenga mu Yerushalayime ne mu bukalenga bua Yuda. Maweja-Nangila kubenga bantu bende, kubalekelaye. Sedekiya kutombokela Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone." 
2Kings25:1 Ke Nebukadnesare kufika mu Yerushalayime ne bena mvita bende bonsu. Kuasaye mitanda yende kumpala kua tshimenga. Bena Babilone kunyungulula tshimenga atshi ne mishiki ya maloba. Bualu ebu buvua buenzeka mu matuku dikumi a ngondu wa dikumi, Sedekiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu tshitema." 
2Kings25:2 Kushalabu baluisha tshimenga atshi too ne tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue, tshivua Sedekiya mu bukalenga." 
2Kings25:3 Tshiyole tshivua tshipite bukole mu tshimenga, bantu kabatshivua ne biakudia to. Mu matuku tshitema a ngondu muinayi," 
2Kings25:4 bena Babilone kupula tshitupa tshia tshimana tshia tshimenga. Butuku, bena mvita ba bena Yuda kunyema. Bena Babilone bavua anu banyungulula Yerushalayime. Kadi, bena mvita ba bena Yuda kuyila mu njila, bapitshila pa tshiibi tshivua pankatshi pa bimana bibidi bia tshimenga, pabuipi ne lupangu lua mukalenga. Diba adi, mukalenga Sedekiya uvua mulonde njila wa ku tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene." 
2Kings25:5 Kadi, bena mvita ba bena Babilone kumulondakaja, kumukuatshila mu mpata wa Yeriko. Bena mvita bende bonsu bavua bamane kunyema bamushiya." 
2Kings25:6 Bena Babilone kumukuata, kuya nende kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone uvua mu tshimenga tshia Ribla. Bena Babilone kulumbuluisha Sedekiya mu tshimenga atshi." 
2Kings25:7 Kushipabu bana ba Sedekiya ba balume, tatuabu mutangile. Pashishe, Nebukadnesare kutonkona mesu a Sedekiya onsu abidi. Kumutumaye ku Babilone musuike mionji bikole." 
2Kings25:8 Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshitema, mu matuku muanda mutekete a ngondu muitanu, Nebuzaradane kubuela mu Yerushalayime. Uvua mfumu wa bena mvita bonsu bavua balame mukalenga. Uvua mulombodi munene wa bena mvita ba mukalenga wa Babilone." 
2Kings25:9 Nebuzaradane kuosha nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, nzubu wa bukalenga, ne nzubu mikuabu ya mu tshimenga, nangananga nzubu yonsu ya bantu bamanyike bikole." 
2Kings25:10 Bena mvita ba bena Babilone, bavua ne mfumu wa bena mvita, kupulabu bimana bivua binyunguluke Yerushalayime." 
2Kings25:11 Pashishe, bantu bonsu bavua bashala mu Yerushalayime, Nebuzaradane kuya nabu ku Babilone: bonsu kudifila kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone, kabidi ne bena midimu ya bianza, batshivua bashale." 
2Kings25:12 Kadi uvua mushiye bakuabu bantu bapele, bua kukunabu mionji ya mvinyo, ne kudima madimi." 
2Kings25:13 Bena Babilone bavua bupule makunji a tshiamu tshikunze avua mu mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua banyangakaja kabidi matempu, ne dilonga dinene dia tshijengu dia tshiamu tshikunze, bivua mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuyabu ne tshiamu tshikunze tshionsu atshi ku Babilone." 
2Kings25:14 Kuangatabu kabidi bintu bia tshiamu tshikunze bionsu, bivuabu benza nabi mudimu wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu: ngesu ya kuela butu, bikasu, bintu bia kusukula nabi miendu, ne makopu." 
2Kings25:15 Nebuzaradane kuangata kabidi bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole: mbabula, ne makopu a kumiamina nawu." 
2Kings25:16 Kakuvua mushindu wa kupima bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshikunze, bivua bifuma ku bintu bivua mukalenga Shelomu muenzeje bua kuteka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bintu abi bivua: makunji abidi, dilonga dinene dia tshijengu, ne matempu." 
2Kings25:17 Tshilejilu, dikunji dionsu divua ne metre tshitema mu butumbuke. Mutu wa dikunji dionsu uvua wa tshiamu tshikunze, muikale ne metre umue ne tshitupa mu butumbuke. Kabidi kuvua bilengejilu bifuanangane ne bukondu bua tshiamu tshikunze, binyunguluke mutu wa dikunji adi. Kuvua kabidi bilengejilu bikuabu bia tshiamu tshikunze bifuanangane ne bimuma bia mutshi wa grenade. Makunji onsu abidi ne makondu avuaku bivua amu mushindu umue." 
2Kings25:18 Mfumu wa bena mvita bavua balama mukalenga wa bena Babilone, kukuatshisha Seraya, mutuangaji munene, ne Sefanya tshindonde tshiende, ne batuangaji bakuabu basatu, bavua balame ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Kings25:19 Kukuatshishaye kabidi muena mudimu mukuabu, uvua utangila bena mvita bonsu. Pashishe, kukuatshishaye mu lukanu bantu batanu bavua benza mudimu mu lubanza lua mukalenga, ne mufundi wa malu a mukalenga uvua wangata bena mvita ku mudimu, (uvua mfumu wa bena mvita), ne bantu bakuabu makumi asambombu ba bena Yuda. Bantu bonsu aba, batshivua bashala anu mu Yerushalayime." 
2Kings25:20 Nebuzaradane kuya nabu mu tshimenga tshia Ribla kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone. 
2Kings25:21 Mukalenga wa bena Babilone kubashipela mu tshimenga atshi, mu ditunga dia Amate. Ke muvuabu bumuke ne bena Yuda mu buloba buabu, nanku baye nabu mu bupika." 
2Kings25:22 Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, uvua mushiye bantu bakuabu mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kusungulaye muntu mukuabu Ngedaliya, muana wa Ahikame, muikulu wa Shafane, bua kuikalaye mulombodi wa ditunga dia bantu abu." 
2Kings25:23 Balombodi ba bena mvita ne bena mvita ba bena Yuda bavua kabayi baye ne bena Babilone, bumwa ne: mukalenga Nebukadnesare mmusungule Ngedaliya bua kuikalaye mulombodi wa ditunga, kuyabu kumonangana ne Ngedaliya ku Mispa. Balombodi bavua baye bavua Ismayele, muana wa Netaniya, Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, Seraya, muana wa Tanehumete, wa mu musoku wa Netofa, ne Yazaniya, muena Maaka." 
2Kings25:24 Ngedaliya kubambila bonsu ne: — Ndi nnulaya ne: bena Babilone kabakunuenzela bibi to. Asayi mu ditunga, nuitabe amu bumfumu bua mukalenga wa bena Babilone. Nenusanke." 
2Kings25:25 Kadi, mu ngondu wa muanda mutekete wa tshidimu atshi, Ismayele, muana wa Netaniya, muikulu wa Elishama, wa mu diku dia bukalenga, kufika ku Mispa ne bantu dikumi. Kushipabu Ngedaliya, ne bena Yuda bakuabu, ne bena Babilone bavua ku nzubu kuende." 
2Kings25:26 Pashishe, bantu bonsu ne balombodi ba bena m vita, kuyabu ku Ejipitu, bualu bavua batshina bena Babilone." 
2Kings25:27 Yowakine, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, mumane kulala mu bupika bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete, Evile-Merodake, kudia bukalenga mu Babilone. Mu matuku makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu a ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, tshidimu atshi, Evile-Merodake kufuila Yowakine luse, kumupatula mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
2Kings25:28 Kuambilaye Yowakine malu ne muoyi muimpe onso, kumutekaye mu muanzu uvua mupite wa bakalenga bakuabu bavua nende mu Babilone." 
2Kings25:29 Kukandikabu Yowakine bua kavuadi kabidi bilamba bia bena lukanu to. Nanku, Yowakine kutuadija kudia ku mesa ne mukalenga wa bena Babilone." 
2Kings25:30 Dituku dionsu too ne mudi Yowakine ufua, mukalenga wa bena Babilone uvua anu umupesha biakudia bikumbane." 
1Chronicles1:1 Adame uvua tatuende wa Shete. Shete uvua tatuende wa Enoshe. 
1Chronicles1:2 Enoshe uvua tatuende wa Kenaane. Kenaane uvua tatuende wa Malaleyele. Malaleyele kulela Yerede. 
1Chronicles1:3 Yerede uvua tatuende wa Enoke. Enoke uvua tatuende wa Metushela. Metushela uvua tatuende wa Lemeke. 
1Chronicles1:4 Lemeke uvua tatuende wa Nowa. Nowa uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Sheme, Kame ne Yefete." 
1Chronicles1:5 Bana ba balume ba Yefete badi nenku: Ngomere, Magoge, Madayi, Yavane, Tubale, Mesheke ne Tirase." 
1Chronicles1:6 Bana ba balume ba Ngomere badi nenku: Ashekenaze, Difate ne Togarma." 
1Chronicles1:7 Bana ba balume ba Yavane badi nenku: Elisha, Tarshishe, Kitime ne Rodanime." 
1Chronicles1:8 Bana ba balume ba Kame badi nenku: Kushe, Misrayime, Pute ne Kenaane." 
1Chronicles1:9 Bana ba balume ba Kushe badi: Seba, Avila, Sabta, Ragma ne Sabteka. Bana ba balume ba Ragma badi: Saba ne Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:10 Nemrode, muana mukuabu wa Kushe, ke uvua tshilobu tshia kumpala pa buloba." 
1Chronicles1:11 Misrayime uvua nkambua wa bena Lude, bena Aneme, bena Lekabe, bena Naftu," 
1Chronicles1:12 bena Patrose, bena Kaslu kabidi ne bena Kaftore, ke kudi bisamba bia bena Peleshete bifumine." 
1Chronicles1:13 Muanabute wa Kenaane uvua Sidone, balonda kudi Ete." 
1Chronicles1:14 Kenaane uvua nkambua wa bena Yebusa, bena Amore, bena Ngirgashi," 
1Chronicles1:15 bena Ivi, bena Arki, bena Sini," 
1Chronicles1:16 bena Arvadi, bena Semari ne bena Amati." 
1Chronicles1:17 Bana ba balume ba Sheme badi: Elame, Ashure, Arpaksade, Lude, Arame, Use, Ule, Ngetere ne Mesheke." 
1Chronicles1:18 Arpaksade uvua tatuende wa Shela. Shela uvua tatuende wa Ebere. 
1Chronicles1:19 Ebere uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: wa kumpala uvua Pelege, mmomumue ne: “Ditapuluka,” bualu tshikondu tshivua Pelege ne muoyi, bantu bavua batapuluka pa buloba. Dina dia muakunyende divua Yoktane." 
1Chronicles1:20 Yoktane uvua tatuende wa Almodade, Shelefe, Asharmavete, Yera," 
1Chronicles1:21 Adorame, Uzale, Dikla," 
1Chronicles1:22 Ebale, Abimayele, Saba," 
1Chronicles1:23 Ofire, Avila ne Yobabe. Bonsu aba bavua bana ba balume ba Yoktane." 
1Chronicles1:24 Sheme uvua tatuende wa Arpaksade. Arpaksade uvua tatuende wa Shela. 
1Chronicles1:25 Shela uvua tatuende wa Ebere. Ebere uvua tatuende wa Pelege. Pelege uvua tatuende wa Reyu. 
1Chronicles1:26 Reyu uvua tatuende wa Seruge. Seruge uvua tatuende wa Nakore. Nakore uvua tatuende wa Tera. 
1Chronicles1:27 Tera uvua tatuende wa Abrame. Pashishe Abrame kupeta dina dia Abrahame. 
1Chronicles1:28 Bana ba balume ba Abrahame badi: Izake ne Ishemayele. 
1Chronicles1:29 Ndelanganyi yabu ivua nenku: bana ba balume ba Ishemayele badi: muanabuteuvua Nebayote, bamulonda kudi Kedare, Abdeyele ne Mibsame," 
1Chronicles1:30 Mishema, Duma, Masha, Adade, Tema," 
1Chronicles1:31 Yeture, Nafishe ne Kedma." 
1Chronicles1:32 Abrahame uvua ne mukaji mukuabu, dina diende divua Ketura. Ketura kulela Zimrane, Yoksane, Medane, Madiyane, Ishebake ne Shuwa. Bana ba balume ba Yoksane: ke Saba ne Dedane." 
1Chronicles1:33 Bana ba balume ba Madiyane badi: Efa, Efere, Anoke, Abida ne Elda. Bonsu aba ndelanganyi ya Ketura." 
1Chronicles1:34 Abrahame uvua tatuende wa Izake. Izake kulela bana ba balume babidi: Esawu ne Izrayele. 
1Chronicles1:35 Bana ba balume ba Esawu badi nenku: Elifaze, Reyuwele, Yewushe, Yalame ne Kora." 
1Chronicles1:36 Bana ba balume ba Elifaze badi: Temane, Omare, Sefi, Ngatame, Kenaze, Timna ne Amaleke." 
1Chronicles1:37 Bana ba balume ba Reyuwele badi: Nakate, Zera, Shama ne Miza." 
1Chronicles1:38 Bana ba balume ba Seyire badi: Lotane, Shobale, Sibeyone (Sibeyone uvua tatuende wa Ana, kabidi kakuende wa Dishone), Eshere ne Dishane." 
1Chronicles1:39 Bana ba balume ba Lotane badi: Ori ne Omame, (Lotane uvua ne muanabu wa bakaji, diende dina divua Timna)." 
1Chronicles1:40 Bana ba balume ba Shobale badi: Aliyane, Manakate, Ebale, Shefi ne Oname. Bana ba balume ba Sibeyone badi nenku: Aya ne Ana." 
1Chronicles1:41 Ana uvua ne muana wa balume umue, dina diende divua Dishone. Bana ba balume ba Dishone badi: Amrame, Eshebane, Itrane ne Kerane." 
1Chronicles1:42 Eshere kulela Bilekane, Zavane ne Yakane. Dishane uvua tatuende wa Use ne Arane." 
1Chronicles1:43 Pavua bena Izrayele kabayi banji kupeta mukalenga, bena Edome bakavua ne bakalenga balondangane mu bukalenga mushindu ewu: Bela, muana wa Beyore, uvua mu tshimenga tshia Dinaba. Yeye mumane kufua, kupinganabu mu bukalenga kudi Yobabe, muana wa Zera, wa mu tshimenga tshia Bosra. Pashishe kupinganabu mu bukalenga kudi Ushame wa mu buloba bua Temane. Kumupinganabu kudi Adade, muana wa Bedade, wa mu tshimenga tshia Avite. (Adade ke uvua mutshimune bena Madiyane mu ditunga dia Mowabe). Kupinganabu kudi Samla wa mu tshimenga tshia Masreka, Shawule wa mu Rekobote-ku-muelelu-wa-Musulu, Baale-Anane muana wa Akbore, ne Adade wa mu tshimenga tshia Payi. Adade uvua musele Metabeyele, muana wa bakaji wa Matrede, kabidi ne muikulu wa Mezakabe." 
1Chronicles1:44  
1Chronicles1:45  
1Chronicles1:46  
1Chronicles1:47  
1Chronicles1:48  
1Chronicles1:49  
1Chronicles1:50  
1Chronicles1:51 Mukalenga Adade mumane kufua, bamfumu ba meku kushala balombola bena Edome. Mena abu mmalondangane nenku: Timna, Alva, Yetete," 
1Chronicles1:52 Okolibama, Ela, Pinone," 
1Chronicles1:53 Kenaze, Temane, Mibsare," 
1Chronicles1:54 Magdiyele ne Irame. Bonsu aba bavua bamfumu ba meku a bena Edome. 
1Chronicles2:1 Bana ba balume ba Yakobe (udibu babikila kabidi ne: Izrayele) badi nenku: Rubene, Shimeyone, Levi, Yuda, Isakare, Zebulone," 
1Chronicles2:2 Dane, Yozefe, Binyamine, Naftali, Ngade ne Ashere." 
1Chronicles2:3 Yuda uvua ne mukaji, muana wa Shuwa, wa bena Kenaane. Bavua balela nende bana basatu, mena a bana abu adi nenku: Ere, Onane ne Shela. Kadi Ere muanabute kufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda bua bubi buvuaye muenze. Maweja-Nangila kumushipa." 
1Chronicles2:4 Matuku mamane kupita, Yuda ne Tamare uvua mukaji wa muanende, kulelabu bana bakuabu ba balume babidi. Mena abu ngaa: Perese ne Zera. Nenku bana ba balume ba Yuda bonsu bavua batanu." 
1Chronicles2:5 Bana ba balume ba Perese badi: Esrone ne Amule. 
1Chronicles2:6 Bana ba balume ba Zera badi batanu: Zimri, Etane, Emane, Kalkole ne Dara." 
1Chronicles2:7 Karmi uvua ne muana wa balume umue: Akare. Muana ewu wakakebela bena Izrayele dikenga, bualu uvua mukalame ne bintu bivuabu bapawula mu mvita, bintu bivuabu ne bua kulambula Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles2:8 Etane uvua ne muana umue, dina diende Azariya." 
1Chronicles2:9 Bana ba balume ba Esrone badi Yerameyele, Rame ne Kalebe (uvuabu babikila kabidi ne: Kelubayi)."
