1Chronicles2:10 Rame uvua tatuende wa Aminadabe. Aminadabe uvua tatuende wa Nashone, mfumu wa tshisamba tshia bena Yuda." 
1Chronicles2:11 Nashone uvua tatuende wa Salma. Salma uvua tatuende wa Bowaze. 
1Chronicles2:12 Bowaze uvua tatuende wa Obede. Obede uvua tatuende wa Ishayi. 
1Chronicles2:13 Ishayi uvua ne bana ba balume muanda mutekete: Eliyabe, Abinadabe, Shama," 
1Chronicles2:14 Netaneyele, Radayi," 
1Chronicles2:15 Osheme ne Davide. 
1Chronicles2:16 Ishayi uvua ne bana ba bakaji babidi: Seruya ne Abigayile. Bana ba balume ba Seruya badi basatu: Abishayi, Yowabe ne Ashayele." 
1Chronicles2:17 Abigayile uvua mulele muana wa balume umue, dina diende: Amasha. Dina dia tatuende divua Yetere muena Ishemayele." 
1Chronicles2:18 Kalebe, muana wa Esrone, uvua mulele bana banayi ne mukajende Azuba: uvua mulele muana wa bakaji anu umue: Yeriyote, ne ba balume basatu: Yeshere, Shobabe ne Ardone." 
1Chronicles2:19 Azuba mumane kufua, Kalebe kusela Efrata, kulela nende muana wa balume, dina diende Ure." 
1Chronicles2:20 Ure ke tatuende wa Uri. Uri uvua tatuende wa Beshalele. 
1Chronicles2:21 Esrone ukumbaja bidimu makumi asambombu, kusela muana wa bakaji wa Makire, tatuende wa Ngilaade. Kulelaye nende muana wa balume umue: Segube." 
1Chronicles2:22 Segube ke tatuende wa Yayire. Yayire uvua ne misoku makumi abidi ne isatu ya mu buloba bua bena Ngilaade. 
1Chronicles2:23 Kadi bakalenga ba bena Ngeshure ne ba bena Arame kunyenga misoku ya Yayire, ne tshimenga tshia Kenate, pamue ne misoku ivua natshi mutumba. Misoku yonsu ivua makumi asambombu. Bavua basamu kudi ndelanganyi ya Makire, tatuende wa Ngilaade." 
1Chronicles2:24 Esrone, bayende wa Abiya, mumane kufua, Kalebe kubuelela kabidi Efrata mu nzubu. Kulelaye nende muana wa balume, dina diende Ashekure. Ashekure ke uvua muibake tshimenga tshia Tekowa." 
1Chronicles2:25 Yerameyele, muanabute wa Esrone, uvua ne bana ba balume ba bungi. Muanabute uvua Rame, pashishe Buna, Orene, Osheme ne Akiya." 
1Chronicles2:26 Yerameyele uvua ne mukaji mukuabu, dina diende Atara, mamuende wa Oname." 
1Chronicles2:27 Bana ba balume ba Rame, muanabute wa Yerameyele badi nenku: Maase, Yamine ne Ekere." 
1Chronicles2:28 Bana ba balume ba Oname badi: Shamayi ne Yada. Bana ba balume ba Shamayi badi: Nadabe ne Abishure. 
1Chronicles2:29 Abishure kusela Abikayile, kulelaye nende Abane ne Molide." 
1Chronicles2:30 Adabe uvua ne bana babidi: Selede ne Apayime. Selede kufua, kayi mulele." 
1Chronicles2:31 Apayime uvua ne muana wa balume anu umue, dina diende Isheyi. Isheyi uvua ne muana wa balume umue, dina diende Sheshane. Sheshane uvua ne muana wa balume umue, ke Alayi." 
1Chronicles2:32 Yada, muanabu ne Shamayi, uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: Yetere ne Yonatane. Yetere kufua, kayi mulele." 
1Chronicles2:33 Bana ba balume ba Yonatane badi: Pelete ne Zaza. Bana bonsu aba ke ndelanganyi ya Yerameyele. 
1Chronicles2:34 Sheshane kavua mulele bana ba balume to, anu ba bakaji. Uvua ne muena mudimu wa bena Ejipitu, dina diende Yara." 
1Chronicles2:35 Sheshane kupesha Yara muanende wa bakaji bua amusele. Mukaji awu kulela muana wa balume, dina diende Atayi." 
1Chronicles2:36 Atayi uvua tatuende wa Natane. Natane uvua tatuende wa Zabade. 
1Chronicles2:37 Zabade uvua tatuende wa Eflale. Eflale uvua tatuende wa Obede. 
1Chronicles2:38 Obede uvua tatuende wa Yeku. Yeku ntatuende wa Azariya. 
1Chronicles2:39 Azariya uvua tatuende wa Elese. Elese uvua tatuende wa Elasha. 
1Chronicles2:40 Elasha uvua tatuende wa Sismayi. Sismayi uvua tatuende wa Shalume. 
1Chronicles2:41 Shalume uvua tatuende wa Yekamiya. Yekamiya ntatuende wa Elishama. 
1Chronicles2:42 Bana ba balume ba Kalebe, muanabu ne Yerameyele badi nenku: muanabute Mesha, tatuende wa Zife, ne Maresha, tatuende wa Ebrone." 
1Chronicles2:43 Bana ba balume ba Ebrone badi: Kora, Tapuwa, Rekeme ne Shema." 
1Chronicles2:44 Shema uvua tatuende wa Rakame. Rakame uvua tatuende wa Yorkowame. Rekeme uvua tatuende wa Shamayi. 
1Chronicles2:45 Shamayi uvua tatuende wa Mawone. Mawone uvua tatuende wa Bete-Sure. 
1Chronicles2:46 Kalebe uvua ne mukaji mukuabu, dina diende Efa. Kulelaye bana aba: Arane, Mosha ne Ngazeze. Arane uvua kabidi mulele muana wa balume umue, dina diende Ngazeze." 
1Chronicles2:47 Bana ba balume ba Yadayi badi: Regeme, Yotame, Ngeshane, Pelete, Efa ne Shafe." 
1Chronicles2:48 Kalebe uvua kabidi ne mukaji mukuabu, dina diende Maaka. Kulelaye nende Shebere ne Tirana." 
1Chronicles2:49 Matuku makuabu mamane kupita, Maaka kulela bana bakuabu: Shafe tatuende wa Madmana, ne Sheva tatuende wa Makbena ne Ngibeya. Kalebe kulela kabidi muana wa bakaji, dina diende Aksa." 
1Chronicles2:50 Ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Kalebe idi nenku: Ure muanabute wa kua mukajende Efrata, uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Shobale, ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Yeyarime." 
1Chronicles2:51 Salma uvua muase tshimenga tshia Betleyeme, ne Arefe uvua muase tshimenga tshia Bete-Ngedere." 
1Chronicles2:52 Ndelanganyi ya Shobale, uvua muase tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Yeyarime, idi nenku: bena mu tshimenga tshia Aroye, tshia bibidi tshia badi basomba mu Menukote," 
1Chronicles2:53 ne meku a bena Kiriyate-Yeyarime: ke bena Itri, bena Puti, bena Shumati ne bena Misherayi bavua base mu misoku ya mu Sora ne mu Eshetayole." 
1Chronicles2:54 Ndelanganyi ya Salma idi nenku: bena mu tshimenga tshia Betleyeme, tshia Netofa, tshia Atrote-Bete-Yowabe, tshia bibidi tshia bena Manakate, bena Sora," 
1Chronicles2:55 kabidi ne meku a bena Yabese, bavua bamanye mukanda: ke bena Tirati, bena Shimati ne bena Sukati. Bantu bonsu aba mbena Kayine, ndelanganyi ya Amate, nkambua wa bena Rekabe." 
1Chronicles3:1 Bana ba balume ba Davide, bavuaye mulele mu tshimenga tshia Ebrone badi nenku: Amnone, muanabute. Mamuende uvua Akinowame, muena Yizreyele. Muana muibidi uvua Daniyele. Mamuende ngAbigayile, wa mu musoku wa Karmele." 
1Chronicles3:2 Muana muisatu uvua Abshalome. Mamuende uvua Maaka, muana wa Talmayi, mukalenga wa bena Ngeshure. Muana muinayi uvua Adoniya. Mamuende uvua Agite." 
1Chronicles3:3 Shefatya ke muana muitanu. Mamuende ke Abitale. Muana muisambombu uvua Itreyame, uvua Davide mulele ne Egla. Egla uvua kabidi mukaji wa mukalenga." 
1Chronicles3:4 Bana ba balume basambombu aba, mbabalele mu tshimenga tshia Ebrone, muvua Davide mulale mu bukalenga bidimu muanda mutekete ne tshitupa. Pashishe Davide kushala kabidi mu bukalenga bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles3:5 Davide kulela bana bakuabu mu tshimenga etshi: Batsheba muana wa Amiyele, kumulelela bana ba balume banayi: Shima, Shobabe, Natane ne Shelomu." 
1Chronicles3:6 Davide uvua mulele kabidi bana bakuabu ba balume tshitema: ke Ibare, Elishuwa, Elpelete, Noga, Nefege, Yafiya, Elishama, Eliyada ne Elifelete." 
1Chronicles3:7  
1Chronicles3:8  
1Chronicles3:9 Uvua kabidi mulele bana ba balume ne bakaji bakuabu. Uvua kabidi ne muana wa bakaji, dina diende Tamare." 
1Chronicles3:10 Ndelanganyi ya Shelomu ya bana ba munda muende ivua nenku: Robowame, Abiya, Asa, Yosafate," 
1Chronicles3:11 Yorame, Akaziya, Yowashe," 
1Chronicles3:12 Amashiya, Azariya, Yotame," 
1Chronicles3:13 Akaze, Izkiya, Menashe," 
1Chronicles3:14 Amone ne Yoshiya. 
1Chronicles3:15 Bana ba balume ba Yoshiya badi: Yowanane ke muanabute, bamulonda kudi Yoyakime, muisatu Sedekiya, ne Shalume muinayi." 
1Chronicles3:16 Bana ba balume ba Yoyakime badi Yekoniya ne Sedekiya. 
1Chronicles3:17 Bana ba balume ba Yekoniya uvuabu baye nende ku bupika mu Babilone badi nenku: Sheyaltiyele," 
1Chronicles3:18 Malkirame, Pedaya, Shenashare, Yekamiya, Oshama ne Nedabiya." 
1Chronicles3:19 Bana ba balume ba Pedaya badi: Zerubabele ne Shimeyi. Zerubabele uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi: ke Meshulame ne Ananiya, ne wa bakaji umue, dina diende Shelomite." 
1Chronicles3:20 Pashishe uvua mulele kabidi bana ba balume batanu: Ashuba, Okele, Berikiya, Ashadiya ne Yushabe-Eshede." 
1Chronicles3:21 Ndelanganyi ya Ananiya ivua nenku: Pelatiya ne Yeshaya, ne bana ba balume ba Refaya, ba Amane, ba Obadya ne ba Shekanya." 
1Chronicles3:22 Shekanya uvua mulele bana ba balume basambombu: Shemaya, Atushe, Igale, Bariya, Neyariya ne Shafate." 
1Chronicles3:23 Neyariya uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Elyokenayi, Izkiya ne Azrikame." 
1Chronicles3:24 Elyokenayi uvua mulele bana ba balume muanda mutekete: Odavya, Eliyashibe, Pelaya, Akube, Yowanane, Delaya ne Anani." 
1Chronicles4:1 Ndelanganyi ya Yuda idi nenku: Perese, Esrone, Karmi, Ure, Shobale." 
1Chronicles4:2 Reyaya, muana wa Shobale, uvua tatuende wa Yakate. Yakate uvua tatuende wa Akumayi ne Lakade. Bana ba ndekelu aba ke nkambua ya meku a bena Sora." 
1Chronicles4:3 Ure, muanabute wa Efrata, ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Betleyeme. Bana bende ba balume badi nenku: Etame, Yizreyele, Ishema ne Idbashe. Uvua kabidi ne muana wa bakaji umue: Aslelponi. Pashishe uvua kabidi ne bana babidi: Penuwele, uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ngedore, ne Egere uvua muase tshimenga tshia Usha." 
1Chronicles4:4  
1Chronicles4:5 Ashekure uvua muase tshimenga tshia Tekowa. Uvua musele bakaji babidi: Ela ne Naara. 
1Chronicles4:6 Naara uvua mulele bana ba balume banayi: Akuzame, Efere, Temni ne Akashetari." 
1Chronicles4:7 Ela uvua mulele bana basatu: Serete, Sokare ne Etnane." 
1Chronicles4:8 Kose uvua tatuende wa Anube ne wa Sobeba. Yeye ke nkambua wa bena Akarekele, muana wa Arume." 
1Chronicles4:9 Yabese uvua mumanyike bikole munkatshi mua bana babu. Mamuende uvua mumuinyike dina dia Yabese, bualu mamu uvua musame bikole pa kumulela." 
1Chronicles4:10 Yabese uvua utendelela Mvidi Mukulu wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ungele lupemba, umvudijile bindi nabi, undame. Kadi ungumbushile diakabi ne makenga!” Mvidi Mukulu kumupesha tshivuaye umulomba." 
1Chronicles4:11 Kelube, nuanabu ne Shuka, uvua tatuende wa Mekire. Mekire uvua tatuende wa Eshetone." 
1Chronicles4:12 Eshetone uvua tatuende wa Bete-Rafa, Pasheya ne Tekina. Tekina ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Nakashe. Ndelanganyi yabu ivua misombe mu tshimenga tshia Reka." 
1Chronicles4:13 Bana ba balume ba Kenaze badi: Otniyele ne Seraya. Bana ba balume ba Otniyele badi: Atate ne Meyonotayi. 
1Chronicles4:14 Meyonotayi ke tatuende wa Ofra. Seraya uvua tatuende wa Yowabe. Yowabe ke nkambua wa bena midimu ya bianza bavua basomba mu tshibandabanda tshivuabu binyike ne: ntshia bena midimu ya bianza. 
1Chronicles4:15 Kalebe, muana wa Yefune, uvua mulele bana ba balume basatu: Iru, Ela ne Naame. Ela uvua tatuende wa Kenaze." 
1Chronicles4:16 Bana ba balume ba Yakalelele badi nenku: Zife, Zifa, Tiriya ne Asharele." 
1Chronicles4:17 Bana ba balume ba Ezra badi nenku: Yetere, Merede, Efere ne Yalone. Merede uvua musele Bitya, muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Bitya uvua mulelele Merede bana basatu: Miriyame, Shamayi ne Isheba. Isheba uvua muase tshimenga tshia Eshtemowa. Merede uvua musele kabidi mukaji wa bena Yuda. Mukaji awu kumulelela bana basatu. Yerede uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ngedore. Ebere uvua muase tshimenga tshia Soko. Yekutyele uvua muase tshimenga tshia Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:17 Bana ba balume ba Ezra badi nenku: Yetere, Merede, Efere ne Yalone. Merede uvua musele Bitya, muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Bitya uvua mulelele Merede bana basatu: Miriyame, Shamayi ne Isheba. Isheba uvua muase tshimenga tshia Eshtemowa. Merede uvua musele kabidi mukaji wa bena Yuda. Mukaji awu kumulelela bana basatu. Yerede uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ngedore. Ebere uvua muase tshimenga tshia Soko. Yekutyele uvua muase tshimenga tshia Zanowa." 
1Chronicles4:18  
1Chronicles4:19 Odya uvua musele muanabu ne Nakame. Ndelanganyi yabu ivua bena Ngarmi bavua base mu tshimenga tshia Keyila, ne bena Makati bavua base mu Eshtemowa." 
1Chronicles4:20 Bana ba balume ba Shimone badi: Amnone, Rina, Bena-Anane ne Tilone. Ndelanganyi ya Isheyi ivua Zokete ne muanende wa balume." 
1Chronicles4:21 Ndelanganyi ya Shela, muana wa Yuda, ivua nenku: Ere uvua muase tshimenga tshia Leka. Lada uvua muase tshimenga tshia Maresha. Leka uvua kabidi nkambua wa bena meku a badi benza bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda: ke bavua basombe ku Bete-Ashebeya." 
1Chronicles4:22 Shela uvua kabidi nkambua wa Yokime, wa bantu bavua basombe mu Kozeba, ne wa Yowashe ne Sarafe, bavua basela bakaji ba bena Mowabe bangabanga ne kupinganabu bua kusomba ku Lekeme — malu aa nga kalekale. —" 
1Chronicles4:23 Ndelanganyi yabu ivua bafumbi ba ngesu, ivua misombe mu Netayime ne mu Ngedera bua kuenzela mukalenga midimu." 
1Chronicles4:24 Bana ba balume ba Shimeyone badi nenku: Nemuwele, Yamine, Yaribe, Zera ne Shawule." 
1Chronicles4:25 Ndelanganyi ya munda mua Shawule menemene idi nenku: Shalume, Mibsame, ne Mishema." 
1Chronicles4:26 Ndelanganyi ya Mishema idi nenku: Amuwele, Zakure ne Shimeyi." 
1Chronicles4:27 Shimeyi uvua mulele bana ba balume dikumi ne basambombu, ne ba bakaji basambombu. Kadi bamfumu ba meku makuabu kabavua ne bana ba bungi to. Ke padi meku a mu tshisamba tshia Shimeyone ne bantu bakese, kadi a tshia Yuda ne bantu ba bungi." 
1Chronicles4:28 Too ne mu tshikondu tshivua Davide mubuele mu bukalenga, ndelanganyi ya Shimeyone ivua misombe mu bimenga, ne mu misoku ivua nabi mutumba: ke Bersheba, Molada, Ashare-Shuwale, Bila, Esheme, Tolade, Betuwele, Orma, Siklaje, Bete-Markabote, Ashare-Sushime, Bete-Biri ne mu Sharayime. Bavua basomba kabidi mu bimenga bikuabu bitanu: Etame, Ayine, Rimone, Tokene ne Ashane," 
1Chronicles4:29  
1Chronicles4:30  
1Chronicles4:31  
1Chronicles4:32  
1Chronicles4:33 ne mu misoku yonsu ya pa mpenga pa bimenga ebi, too ne ku musoku wa Baalate. Ke misoku ivuabu basombe ayi. Bavua bafunda mena a meku abu mu mikanda." 
1Chronicles4:34 Mena a bamfumu ba meku a Shimeyone avua nenku: Meshobabe, Yamleke, Yosha, muana wa balume wa Amashiya, Yowele, Yeku, muana wa balume wa Yoshibiya, Yoshibiya mene uvua muana wa balume wa Seraya, kabidi muikulu wa Ashiyele, Eliyokenayi, Yakoba, Yeshokaya, Ashaya, Adiyele, Yeshimiyele, Benaya ne Ziza. Ziza awu uvua muana wa Shifeyi, kabidi muikulu wa Alone. Alone uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Yedaya, Shimri ne Shemaya. Meku abu avua mavulangane," 
1Chronicles4:35  
1Chronicles4:36  
1Chronicles4:37  
1Chronicles4:38  
1Chronicles4:39 kutangalakabu too ne ku mielelu ya tshimenga tshia Ngedore ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshibandabanda, bualu bavua bakeba muaba udi bisosa bia kudiisha bimuna biabu." 
1Chronicles4:40 Kusanganabu bisosa bia bungi bilenga mu buloba bualabale, butalale, kamuyi mutoyi. Ke muaba uvua ndelanganyi ya Kame misombe kale." 
1Chronicles4:41 Nenku mu tshikondu tshia Izkiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, bamfumu ba meku a Shimeyone batuvua batela abu, kufikabu mu ditunga. Kubangabu ntenta ne tuzubu bivua ndelanganyi ya Kame misombe. Kubutulabu bantu bonsu bavua basombamu. Kabatshiena batela ndelanganyi ayi kabidi too ne ku lelu. Pashishe ndelanganyi ya Shimeyone kusomba muaba awu, bualu muvua bisosa bilenga bia kudiisha bimuna." 
1Chronicles4:42 Bantu bakuabu ba mu tshisamba tshia Shimeyone nkama itanu, kuya mu buloba bua mikuna ya bena Edome. Bantu abu bavua babalombola kudi bana ba Isheyi banayi: Pelatiya, Neyariya, Refaya ne Uziyele." 
1Chronicles4:43 Kushipabu bena Ameleke bavua banyemenamu. Bobu kuasa muaba awu. Ndelanganyi yabu itshidimu ne ku lelu. 
1Chronicles5:1 Rubene uvua muanabute wa Yakobe. Kadi uvua mupange bia bukulu, bualu uvua mubuelele mukaji mukuabu wa tatuende mu nzubu. Ke Yozefe kupeta mianzu ya bukulu ivua ya Rubene. Yozefe uvua kabidi muana wa Yakobe. Kabatshiwa batangile Rubene bu muanabute kabidi to. Yuda uvua ne bukole bua bungi, mupite bana babu bonsu. Mfumu wa bena Izrayele neapatuke ku ndelanganyi yende, Kadi nansha bikale nanku, amu Yozefe ke wakapeta bia bu muanabute. Bana ba balume ba Rubene, muanabute wa Yakobe, badi nenku: Anoke, Palu, Esrone ne Karmi." 
1Chronicles5:2  
1Chronicles5:3  
1Chronicles5:4 Ndelanganyi ya Yowele bana ba munda muende menemene, bavua nenku: Shemaya, Ngoge, Shimeyi," 
1Chronicles5:5 Mika, Reyaya, Baale," 
1Chronicles5:6 ne Beyera. Beyera ke umue wa ku bamfumu ba bena Rubene uvuabu baye nende ku bupika kudi mukalenga Tiglate-Pilesere wa bena Ashure. 
1Chronicles5:7 Bavua bafunda mu mikanda mikuabu mena a bana ba tatuende wa Beyera, bamfumu ba bisamba nansha ba meku: wa kumpala uvua Yeyele, pashishe Zekarya," 
1Chronicles5:8 wa ndekelu uvua Bela, muana wa Azaze, muikulu wa Shema, kankanunuina ka Yowele. Bena Rubene bavua basomba mu buloba bua pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Aroyere, kuinshi mu ditunga, ne mukuna wa Nebo, kabidi ne tshimenga tshia Baale-Meyone kulu mu ditunga." 
1Chronicles5:9 Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bavua basomba too ne ku tshipela tshivua tshienza mikalu ya buloba buabu ne musulu wa Perate, musulu wa bena Babilone. Bualu bavua ne bimuna bia bungi mu ditunga adi dia Ngilaade." 
1Chronicles5:10 Mu tshikondu tshia Shawule, bena Rubene bavua baluangana ne bena Agri. Bena Rubene kubapita bukole. Pashishe kuasabu mu buloba bujima buvua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Ngilaade." 
1Chronicles5:11 Ndelanganyi ya Ngade ivua misombele ku mutu kua tshisamba tshia bena Rubene, mu mpata ya buloba bua Bashane too ne ku tshimenga tshia Salka tshivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
1Chronicles5:12 Bavua basanganamu meku aa: dia kumpala dia Yowele, dibidi dia Shafane, dikuabu dia Yanayi, dia ndekelu dia Shafate." 
1Chronicles5:13 Muvua kabidi meku makuabu muanda mutekete: dia Mikayele, dia Meshulame, dia Sheba, dia Yorayi, dia Yakane, dia Ziya ne dia Ebere." 
1Chronicles5:14 Bamfumu ba meku aa mbana ba Abikayile. Bankambua babu bavua nenku: Uri, Yarowa, Ngilaade, Mikayele, Yeshishayi, Yado ne Buze." 
1Chronicles5:15 Aki, muana wa Abdiyele, kabidi muikulu wa Nguni, ke uvua mfumu wa meku abu awu." 
1Chronicles5:16 Ndelanganyi ya Ngade ivua miase mu buloba bua Ngilaade ne bua Bashane, ne mu bimenga bivua mu maloba aa, too ne mu mpata ya Sharone, ne ku mikalu yawu." 
1Chronicles5:17 Bavua bafunda mena a bantu ba mu tshisamba atshi mu mikanda mu tshikondu tshia Yotame, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne tshia Yerobowame, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles5:18 Tshisamba tshia Rubene ne tshia Ngade, ne tshia bibidi tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, bivua mua kufila bantu binunu makumi anayi ne binayi, nkama muanda mutekete ne makumi asambombu bua bikale bena mvita ba bukitu, bavua bamanye bimpe mudimu wabu, bamanye mua kukuata ngabu, muele nansha buta, bamanye mua kuela mualu wa mvita." 
1Chronicles5:19 Kuluishabu bena Agri, kabidi ne ndelanganyi ya Yeture, ya Nafishe ne ya Nodabe." 
1Chronicles5:20 Bavua batekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu munkatshi mua mvita ayi. Kusengelelabu Mvidi Mukulu bua kupeta diambuluisha. Mvidi Mukulu kubateleja, kubambuluisha. Bobu kutshimuna bena Agri ne bonsu bavua batue ku tshiabu." 
1Chronicles5:21 Kukuatabu bimuna bia baluishi babu, tumelu binunu makumi atanu, mikoku ne mbuji binunu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, mpunde binunu bibidi, ne bena lukanu binunu lukama." 
1Chronicles5:22 Bavua bashipa kabidi baluishi ba bungi. Bionsu abi, amu bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua nabu, ubambuluisha. Kuasabu mu buloba bua bena Agri, too ne ku tshikondu tshikuabu baye nabu ku bupika." 
1Chronicles5:23 Tshia bibidi tshimue tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe tshivua tshiase mu buloba buvua butuadija ku Bashane kuinshi mu ditunga, too ne ku Baale-Ermone, Senire, ne mukuna wa Ermone, ku mutu mu ditunga. Bantu ba tshisamba etshi bavua ba bungi." 
1Chronicles5:24 Mena a bamfumu ba meku avua nenku: Efere, Isheyi, Eliyele, Azriyele, Irmeya, Odavya ne Yadiyele. Bonsu bavua bantu ba bukitu ne ba lumu." 
1Chronicles5:25 Bena mu tshisamba tshia Rubene, tshia Ngade, ne bena mu tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe bavua bapanga kutumikila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu. Kumulekelabu bua kukukuila mvidie ya bantu benyi, bavua Mvidi Mukulu mubutule diba divua bisamba ebi bifike mu ditunga. Nenku Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele kutuma Pule ne Tiglate-Pilesere, bakalenga babidi ba bena Ashure, bua babuele ne mvita mu buloba bua bisamba ebi, bakuate bena ditunga, baye nabu mu buloba bua Ala, bua Abore ne Ara ne bua pabuipi ne musulu wa Ngozane. Ke miaba idibu basomba too ne ku mpindiewu." 
1Chronicles5:26  
1Chronicles5:27 Bana ba balume ba Levi badi nenku: Ngershone, Kekate ne Merari." 
1Chronicles5:28 Bana ba balume ba Kekate badi: Amrame, Ishare, Ebrone ne Uziyele." 
1Chronicles5:29 Amrame uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: Arone ne Moshe, ne wa bakaji umue Miriyame. Bana ba balume ba Arone badi: Nadabe, Abiku, Elazare ne Itamare." 
1Chronicles5:30 Elazare uvua mulele Pinase. Pinase uvua tatuende wa Abishuwa. 
1Chronicles5:31 Abishuwa uvua tatuende wa Buki. Buki uvua mulele Uzi. 
1Chronicles5:32 Uzi uvua mulele Seraya. Seraya uvua tatuende wa Merayote. 
1Chronicles5:33 Merayote uvua tatuende wa Amariya. Amariya uvua tatuende wa Akitube. 
1Chronicles5:34 Akitube uvua tatuende wa Sadoke. Sadoke uvua tatuende wa Akimase. 
1Chronicles5:35 Akimase uvua tatuende wa Azariya. Azariya uvua tatuende wa Yowanane. 
1Chronicles5:36 Yowanane uvua tatuende wa Azariya. Azariya awu ke uvua mutuangaji mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime uvua Shelomu muashishe. 
1Chronicles5:37 Azariya uvua tatuende wa Amariya. Amariya uvua tatuende wa Akitube. 
1Chronicles5:38 Akitube uvua tatuende wa Sadoke. Sadoke uvua tatuende wa Shalume. 
1Chronicles5:39 Shalume uvua mulele Ilkiya. Ilkiya uvua mulele Azariya. 
1Chronicles5:40 Azariya uvua mulele Seraya. Seraya uvua tatuende wa Yoshadake. 
1Chronicles5:41 Tshikondu tshivua Maweja-Nangila mutume bantu ba mu Yerushalayime ne ba mu ditunga dia Yuda mu bupika, Nebukadnesare uvua mutumemu ne Yoshadake." 
1Chronicles6:1 Bana ba balume ba Levi badi nenku: Ngershone, Kekate ne Merari." 
1Chronicles6:2 Bana ba balume ba Ngershone badi nenku: Libni ne Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles6:3 Bana ba balume ba Kekate badi nenku: Amrame, Ishare, Ebrone ne Uziyele." 
1Chronicles6:4 Bana ba balume ba Merari badi Mali ne Mushi. Mena a meku a bena Levi mmafumine ku mena a bankambua babu aba. 
1Chronicles6:5 Ndelanganyi ya Ngershone ya munda muende menemene idi nenku: Libni, Yakate, Zima," 
1Chronicles6:6 Yowa, Ido, Zera ne Yeyatrayi." 
1Chronicles6:7 Ndelanganyi ya Kekate idi nenku: Aminadabe, Kora, Ashire," 
1Chronicles6:8 Elkana, Abiyashafe, Ashire," 
1Chronicles6:9 Takate, Uriyele, Oziya ne Shawule." 
1Chronicles6:10 Elkana uvua kabidi ne bana ba balume babidi: Amashiya ne Akimote. 
1Chronicles6:11 Ndelanganyi ya Akimote ivua nenku: Elkana, Sofayi, Nakate," 
1Chronicles6:12 Eliyabe, Yerowame ne Elkana." 
1Chronicles6:13 Bana ba balume ba Samuwele bavua nenku: Yowele muanabute, bamulonda kudi Abiya." 
1Chronicles6:14 Ndelanganyi ya Merari ya munda muende menemene ivua nenku: Mali, Libni, Shimeyi, Uza," 
1Chronicles6:15 Shima, Agiya ne Ashaya." 
1Chronicles6:16 Davide uvua musungule ndelanganyi ya Levi bu tungimba tua mu muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila diba divuabu bamane kutekamu mushete wa tshijila. 
1Chronicles6:17 Bangabanga ne Shelomu kayi muanji kuashila Mvidi Mukulu nzubu mu Yerushalayime, bantu aba bavua bimba misambu kumpala kua ntenta wa kusambakena, bilondeshile meyi ne mikandu bivuabu nabi." 
1Chronicles6:18 Bantu bavua benza mudimu ewu, pamue ne bena misambu ba mu meku abu, ke: Emane wa mu diku dia Kekate, uvua mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshia kumpala tshia bena misambu. Bankambua bende menemene bavua Yowele, Samuwele," 
1Chronicles6:19 Elkana, Yerowame, Eliyele, Towa," 
1Chronicles6:20 Sufe, Elkana, Makate, Amashayi," 
1Chronicles6:21 Elkana, Yowele, Azariya, Sefanya," 
1Chronicles6:22 Takate, Ashire, Abiyashafe, Kora," 
1Chronicles6:23 Ishare, Kekate, Levi ne Yakobe." 
1Chronicles6:24 Ku dia balume dia Emane kuvua Ashafe mulombodi wa tshisumbu tshibidi tshia bena misambu. Bankambua bende menemene bavua nenku: Berekiya, Shima," 
1Chronicles6:25 Mikayele, Basheya, Malkiya," 
1Chronicles6:26 Etni, Zera, Adaya," 
1Chronicles6:27 Etane, Zima, Shimeyi," 
1Chronicles6:28 Yakate, Ngershone ne Levi." 
1Chronicles6:29 Tshisumbu tshisatu tshia bena misambu ba mu diku dia Merari tshivua ku dia bakaji diabu: Etane ke uvua utshilombola. Bankambua bende bavua nenku: Kishi, Abdi, Maluke," 
1Chronicles6:30 Ashabiya, Amashiya, Ilkiya," 
1Chronicles6:31 Amsi, Bani, Shemere," 
1Chronicles6:32 Mali, Mushi, Merari ne Levi." 
1Chronicles6:33 Bantu bakuabu ba mu tshisamba tshia Levi bavua benza midimu mikuabu yonsu ivua itangila muaba wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Chronicles6:34 Kadi amu Arone ne ndelanganyi yende bavua benza mudimu wa batuangaji, wa kulambula milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi, kuyiteka pa bilambuilu biayi. Amu bobu ke bavua babuela muaba wa tshijila menemene bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila midimu yonsu. Bobu ke bavua bakobolola bena Izrayele, bilondeshile mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu ivuaye muambile Moshe, muntu wende." 
1Chronicles6:35 Ndelanganyi ya Arone ya munda muende menemene ivua nenku: Elazare, Pinase, Abishuwa," 
1Chronicles6:36 Buki, Uzi, Zeraya," 
1Chronicles6:37 Merayote, Amariya, Akitube," 
1Chronicles6:38 Sadoke ne Akimase. 
1Chronicles6:39 Tutele miaba ya mu ditunga ivua ndelanganyi ya Arone ya mu diku dia Kekate mipete bua kuasa. Ndelanganyi ya Arone ya mu diku dia Kekate ke ivua midianze kupeta buabu buloba, bilondeshile muvuabu babutshinke." 
1Chronicles6:40 Bobu kupeta tshimenga tshia Ebrone, mu ditunga dia Yuda, ne mpata ya ku mpenga kuatshi bua kudisha bimuna." 
1Chronicles6:41 Kadi madimi ne misoku bivua ku bumfumu bua tshimenga atshi, bavua bamane kubipesha Kalebe, muana wa Yefune." 
1Chronicles6:42 Ndelanganyi ya Arone ivua mipete bimenga bia kunyemena ebi: Ebrone, Libna, Yatire, Eshtemowa, Ilene, Debire, Ashane, Bete-Shemeshe. Kabidi mu buloba bua bena Binyamine, bavua bapeta Ngeba, Alemete ne Anatote. Bavua bapeta tshimenga tshionsu tshia ku bimenga ebi dikumi ne bisatu pamue ne mpata ya pabuipi natshi bua kudisha bimuna biabu." 
1Chronicles6:43  
1Chronicles6:44  
1Chronicles6:45  
1Chronicles6:46 Meku a ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Kekate kupeta bimenga dikumi, bilondeshile muvuabu babitshinke. Bimenga ebi bivua mu buloba bua bena Efrayime, bua bena Dane, ne mu buloba bua bena Menashe bavua basomba luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene." 
1Chronicles6:47 Meku a ku ndelanganyi ya Ngershone ivua mipete bimenga dikumi ne bisatu bivua mu buloba bua bena Isakare, bua bena Ashere, bua bena Naftali ne bua bena Menashe bavua basomba mu Bashane." 
1Chronicles6:48 Ndelanganyi ya Merari kupeta, bilondeshile muvuabu batshinke, bimenga dikumi ne bibidi, bivua mu buloba bua Rubene, bua Ngade ne bua Zebulone." 
1Chronicles6:49 Bena Izrayele bavua bapesha ndelanganyi ya bena Levi bimenga ebi ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna biabu. 
1Chronicles6:50 Bimenga bivua mu buloba bua bena Yuda, bua bena Shimeyone ne bua bena Binyamine, bituvua bamane kutela ebi, bavua babiabanya bilondeshile muvuabu batshinka." 
1Chronicles6:51 Meku a tshisamba tshia Kekate akapeta miaba ya kuasa mu bimenga bia kunyemena ebi: mu buloba bua bena Efrayime, bakupeta Shekeme ku mikuna, Ngezere, Yokneyame, Bete-Orone, Ayalone ne Ngate-Rimone. Mu buloba bua bena Menashe bavua basomba luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene, bavua bapeta tshimenga tshia Anere ne tshia Bileyame. Bimenga bionsu ebi, bavua babifile pamue ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna." 
1Chronicles6:52  
1Chronicles6:53  
1Chronicles6:54  
1Chronicles6:55  
1Chronicles6:56 Meku a bena Ngershone avua mapete bimenga ebi: buloba bua bena Menashe bavua basomba luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, kupetabu tshimenga tshia Ngolane mu Bashane, ne tshia Ashetarote. Mu buloba bua bena Isakare, kupetabu tshimenga tshia Kedeshe, tshia Dabrate, tshia Ramote ne tshia Aneme. Mu buloba bua bena Ashere, kupetabu tshimenga tshia Mashale, tshia Abdone, tshia Ukoke ne tshia Rekobe. Mu buloba bua bena Naftali, kupetabu tshimenga tshia Kedeshe mu Ngalileya, tshia Amone ne Kiriyatayime. Bimenga bionsu ebi, bavua babifile pamue ne mpata ya kudishila bimuna biabu." 
1Chronicles6:57  
1Chronicles6:58  
1Chronicles6:59  
1Chronicles6:60  
1Chronicles6:61  
1Chronicles6:62 Ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Levi ya mu diku dia Merari ivua mipete bimenga ebi: mu buloba bua bena Zebulone, kupetabu Rimonu ne Tabore. Mu buloba bua bena Rubene buvua ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, butangilangane ne Yeriko, kupetabu tshimenga tshia Beshere mu tshipela, kupetabu kabidi tshimenga tshia Yakase, tshia Kedemote ne tshia Mefate mu buloba bua bena Ngade. Kupetabu tshia Ramote mu buloba bua Ngilaade, Makanayime, Eshebone ne Yazere. Bimenga bionsu ebi bavua babifile pamue ne mpata ivua pabuipi nabi, ya kudishila bimuna biabu." 
1Chronicles6:63  
1Chronicles6:64  
1Chronicles6:65  
1Chronicles6:66  
1Chronicles7:1 Isakare uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Tola, Puva, Yashube ne Shimrone." 
1Chronicles7:2 Ndelanganyi ya Tola: ke Uzi, Refaya, Yeriyele, Yamayi, Ibsame ne Shemuwele. Bobu ke bamfumu ba meku adi mafumine kudi Tola. Bavua bilobu mu meku abu awu. Mu tshikondu tshia Davide, ndelanganyi ya Tola ivua bantu 22.600." 
1Chronicles7:3 Uzi uvua ne muana wa balume umue, dina diende Izrakiya. Izrakiya ne bana bende: Mikayele, Obadya, Yowele ne Ishiya bavua bonsu batanu bamfumu ba meku abu." 
1Chronicles7:4 Mu meku abu muvua bakaji ne bana ba balume ba bungi. Ke pavuabu ne bua kufila bantu 36.000 bavua bamanye mua kuluangana mvita. 
1Chronicles7:5 Bena meku makuabu a Isakare bavua bilobu, bavuabu babadike, bavua 87.000." 
1Chronicles7:6 Binyamine uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: Bela, Bekere ne Yediyayele." 
1Chronicles7:7 Ndelanganyi ya Bela ivua: Esbone, Uzi, Uziyele, Yerimote ne Iri. Bavua bilobu. Kushalabu bamfumu ba meku abu. Bantu bonsu ba meku abu, bavuabu bafunde mena abu mu mikanda, bavua 22.034." 
1Chronicles7:8 Ndelanganyi ya Bekere ivua nenku: Zemira, Yowashe, Eliyezere, Eliyokenayi, Omri, Yeremote, Abiya, Anatote ne Alemete. Ndelanganyi ya Bekere eyi" 
1Chronicles7:9 ivua bilobu, ne bamfumu ba meku abu kabidi. Bantu bonsu ba meku aa bavuabu bafunda mena mu mikanda bavua 20.200." 
1Chronicles7:10 Muana wa Yediyayele uvua Bilekane. Bilekane uvua ne bana ba balume aba: Yewushe, Binyamine, Ekude, Kenaane, Zetane, Tarshishe ne Akishakare." 
1Chronicles7:11 Ndelanganyi ya Yediyayele yonsu eyi ivua bilobu, ne bamfumu ba meku abu kabidi. Bantu balume ba meku aa, bavua bamanye mua kuluangana mvita, bavua 17.200." 
1Chronicles7:12 Ire uvua mulele Shupime ne Upime. Akere uvua mulele Ushime. 
1Chronicles7:13 Bana ba balume ba Naftali bavua nenku: Yashiyele, Nguni, Yeshere ne Shalume. Nanku mbiikulu ba Bila." 
1Chronicles7:14 Ndelanganyi ya Menashe idi nenku: Asriyele ne Makire; bavua bana ba mukajende mukuabu wa bena Arame. Makire uvua tatuende wa Ngilaade. 
1Chronicles7:15 Makire kuselesha Upime ne Shupime bakaji. Makire uvua kabidi ne muanabu wa bakaji, dina diende Maaka. Uvua kabidi ne muana wa balume muibidi, dina diende Selofade. Muana ewu uvua anu mulele bana ba bakaji." 
1Chronicles7:16 Maaka, mukaji wa Makire, uvua mulele muana wa balume mukuabu, dina diende Pereshe. Pashishe kulelaye kabidi muana mukuabu, dina diende Shereshe. Shereshe uvua tatuende wa Ulame ne Rekeme," 
1Chronicles7:17 ne Ulame uvua tatuende wa Bedane. Bantu bonsu aba ke ndelanganyi ya Ngilaade, muana wa Makire, ne muikulu wa Menashe." 
1Chronicles7:18 Amolekete, muanabu wa bakaji ne Ngilaade, uvua mulele bana basatu: Ishode, Abiyezere ne Mala." 
1Chronicles7:19 Bana ba balume ba Shemida bavua Akiyane, Shekeme, Liki ne Aniyame." 
1Chronicles7:20 Ndelanganyi ya Efrayime ya munda muende menemene ivua nenku: Shutela, Berede, Takate, Elada, Takate," 
1Chronicles7:21 Zabade ne Shutela. Bana ba balume bakuabu babidi ba Efrayime, Ezere ne Elade, bavua bakeba mua kunyenga bena Ngate bimuna biabu. Kadi bena Ngate aba kubashipa." 
1Chronicles7:22 Efrayime kushala mu madilu matuku mavule. Bena diku diende kuvua kumusamba mu madilu amu. 
1Chronicles7:23 Pashishe Efrayime kubuelela kabidi mukajende mu nzubu. Awu kulela muana wa balume. Kumuinyikaye Beriya, bualu bena nzubu wende bavua mu dikenga." 
1Chronicles7:24 Efrayime uvua kabidi ne muana wa bakaji, dina diende Shera. Yeye awu ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Bete-Orone tshia kuinshi, ne tshia Bete-Orone tshia kulu, kabidi ne tshia Uzere-Shera." 
1Chronicles7:25 Ndelanganyi ya Beriya ya munda muende menemene idi nenku: Refa, Reshefe, Tela, Takane," 
1Chronicles7:26 Ladane, Amikude, Elishama," 
1Chronicles7:27 Nune ne Yoshuwa. 
1Chronicles7:28 Mu buloba buvua bena Efrayime bapete bua kuasa, muvua kabidi tshimenga tshia Betele, ne misoku idi natshi mutumba. Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kuvua Narane, kudi diba dibuelela, kuvua Ngezere ne misoku ivua ku mutumba. Kuvua kabidi buloba buvua pankatshi pa Shekeme ne Aya, pamue ne misoku ya ku mutumba." 
1Chronicles7:29 Ndelanganyi ya Menashe ivua mipete bimenga ebi: Bete-Sheyane, Tanake, Megido ne Dore. Bavua bapeta tshimenga tshionsu, pamue ne misoku ivua natshi mutumba. Ke bimenga bivua ndelanganyi ya Yozefe muana wa Yakobe misombe." 
1Chronicles7:30 Bana ba balume ba Ashere badi nenku: Imna, Isheva, Ishevi ne Beriya. Ashere uvua ne muana wa bakaji, dina diende Sera." 
1Chronicles7:31 Bana ba balume ba Beriya bavua: Ebere ne Malkiyele. Malkiyele ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Birzayite. 
1Chronicles7:32 Ebere uvua tatuende wa Yaflete, wa Shemere ne wa Otame, kabidi ne wa muanabu wa bakaji Shuwa." 
1Chronicles7:33 Bana ba balume ba Yaflete bavua Pashake, Bimale ne Ashevate." 
1Chronicles7:34 Bana ba balume ba Shemere bavua: Aki, Roga, Uba ne Arame." 
1Chronicles7:35 Bana ba balume ba Otame, muanabu ne Shemere, bavua: Sofa, Imna, Sheleshe ne Amale." 
1Chronicles7:36 Bana ba balume ba Sofa bavua: Suwa, Amefere, Shuwale, Beri, Imra," 
1Chronicles7:37 Beshere, Ode, Shama, Shilesha, Itrane ne Beyera." 
1Chronicles7:38 Bana ba balume ba Itrane badi: Yefune, Pishepa ne Era." 
1Chronicles7:39 Bana ba balume ba Ula badi: Ara, Aniyele ne Rishiya." 
1Chronicles7:40 Bantu bonsu aba, ndelanganyi ya Ashere, bavua bamfumu ba meku ne bilobu, bavua bamanye mua kulombola bantu bimpe. Tshisamba etshi tshivua mua kufila bantu bavua mua kuluangana mvita 26.000, bilondeshile bungi bua mena a bantu avuabu bafunde mu mikanda." 
1Chronicles8:1 Binyamine uvua ne bana ba balume batanu: Bela, Ashebele, Ara," 
1Chronicles8:2 Noka ne Rafa. 
1Chronicles8:3 Bela uvua mulele bana ba balume aba: Adare, Ngera, Abikude," 
1Chronicles8:4 Abishuwa, Namane, Akowa," 
1Chronicles8:5 Ngera, Shefutane ne Urame." 
1Chronicles8:6 Bana ba balume ba Ekude, bavua bamfumu ba meku a bantu bavua basomba mu Ngeba, Kumuangalabu kuya ku Manakate. Mena abu adi nenku:" 
1Chronicles8:7 Namane, Akiya ne Ngera. Ngera ke tatuende wa Uza ne Akikude. Yeye ke uvua ulombola bena tshimuangi." 
1Chronicles8:8 Sharayime uvua muipate bakaji bende babidi: Ushime ne Baara. Pashishe mu ditunga dia Mowabe," 
1Chronicles8:9 kuangataye mukaji, dina diende Odeshe. Sharayime kulela nende bana aba: Yobabe, Sibiya, Mesha, Malkame," 
1Chronicles8:10 Yewuse, Sakiya ne Mirma. Bana bende aba ke bavua bamfumu ba meku." 
1Chronicles8:11 Bangabanga Sharayime uvua mulele bana ba balume babidi ne mukajende Ushime. Mena abu adi Abitube ne Elpale. 
1Chronicles8:12 Elpale kulela Ebere, Mishame ne Shemede. Shemede ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ono ne tshia Lode, ne misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
1Chronicles8:13 Beriya ne Shema, bavua bamfumu ba meku a bantu bavua basomba mu Ayalone, bakipata bantu bavua basomba mu Ngate." 
1Chronicles8:14 Bana ba balume ba Beriya badi: Akiyo, Shashake, Yeremote, Zebadya, Arade, Edere, Mikayele, Ishepa ne Yoka." 
1Chronicles8:15  
1Chronicles8:16  
1Chronicles8:17 Bana ba balume ba Elpale badi: Zebadya, Meshulame, Iski, Ebere, Ishemerayi, Izliya ne Yobabe." 
1Chronicles8:18  
1Chronicles8:19 Bana ba balume ba Shimeyi badi: Yakime, Zikri, Zabdi, Eliyenayi, Siletayi, Eliyele, Adaya, Beraya ne Shimrate." 
1Chronicles8:20  
1Chronicles8:21  
1Chronicles8:22 Bana ba balume ba Shashake badi: Ishepane, Ebere, Eliyele, Abdone, Zikri, Anane, Ananiya, Elame, Anetotiya, Ifdeya ne Penuwele." 
1Chronicles8:23  
1Chronicles8:24  
1Chronicles8:25  
1Chronicles8:26 Bana ba balume ba Yerowame badi: Shamesherayi, Shekarya, Ataliya, Yareshiya, Eliyane Zikri." 
1Chronicles8:27  
1Chronicles8:28 Bantu aba bavua bamfumu ba meku abu, bilondeshile ndelanganyi yabu. Bavua basombela amu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles8:29 Muntu uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ngibone, uvua musombe mu tshimenga etshi ne muena kuende Maaka," 
1Chronicles8:30 muanabute wende Abdone, ne bana bende bakuabu ba balume, Sure, Kishe, Baale, Nadabe," 
1Chronicles8:31 Ngedore, Akiyo, Zekere," 
1Chronicles8:32 ne Miklote uvua tatuende wa Shima. Bantu ba ndekelu aba mbase mu Yerushalayime pamue ne bantu bakuabu ba mu tshisamba tshiabu. 
1Chronicles8:33 Nere udi tatuende wa Kishe. Kishe uvua tatuende wa Shawule. Shawule uvua tatuende wa Yonatane, Malkishuwa, Abinadabe ne Ishebaale." 
1Chronicles8:34 Yonatane uvua tatuende wa Meribaale. Meribaale uvua tatuende wa Mika. 
1Chronicles8:35 Bana ba balume ba Mika badi nenku: Pitone, Meleke, Tareya ne Akaze." 
1Chronicles8:36 Akaze uvua tatuende wa Yowada. Yowada uvua tatuende wa Alemete, Azmavete ne Zimri. Zimri uvua tatuende wa Mosha." 
1Chronicles8:37 Mosha uvua tatuende wa Bineya. Bineya uvua tatuende wa Rafa. Rafa uvua tatuende wa Elasha. Elasha ntatuende wa Ashele. 
1Chronicles8:38 Ashele uvua ne bana ba balume basambombu: Azrikame, Bokru, Ismayele, Sheyariya, Obadya ne Anane." 
1Chronicles8:39 Ashele uvua ne muanabu wa balume dina diende Esheke. Mena a bana ba Esheke adi nenku: Ulame uvua muanabute, muibidi uvua Yewushe, muisatu Elifelete." 
1Chronicles8:40 Bana ba Ulame bavua bilobu, bamanye mua kuludikila mikete. Bakapeta bana ba balume ne biikulu ba bungi. Bonsu pamue bavua 150. Bonsu aba mbena tshisamba tshia Binyamine." 
1Chronicles9:1 Kufundabu mena a bena Izrayele bonsu mu mukanda wa Bakalenga ba Izrayele, balondangane ku diku ku diku. Bena Yuda kutombokela Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku kubakuatabu, kuya nabu ku Babilone." 
1Chronicles9:2 Kadi bena Izrayele bakuabu bavua bapingana mu bimenga biabu, bua kuya kusomba tshiakabidi mu lupangu luabu. Pashishe batuangaji, bena Levi ne bantu bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua bapingana pabu." 
1Chronicles9:3 Bantu bavua base mu Yerushalayime bavua ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, tshia Binyamine, tshia Efrayime ne tshia Menashe." 
1Chronicles9:4 Mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, uvua mupingane ke Utayi, wa mu diku dia Perese, muana wa Amikude. Amikude mmuana wa Omri, muikulu wa Imri, kankanunuina ka Bani." 
1Chronicles9:5 Ba mu diku dia Shela bavua bapingane, ke muanabute Ashaya ne bana bende ba balume." 
1Chronicles9:6 Mu diku dia Zera, uvua mupingane, ke Yeyuwele. Bena Yuda bavua base mu Yerushalayime bavua 690." 
1Chronicles9:7 Mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine, uvua mupingane uvua Salu, muana wa Meshulame, muikulu wa Odavya ne kankanunuina ka Ashenuwa." 
1Chronicles9:8 Muvua kabidi Ibneya, muana wa Yerowame; Ela muana wa Uzi ne muikulu wa Mikri; Meshulame, muana wa Shefatya, muikulu wa Rewuyele ne kankanunuina ka Ibniya." 
1Chronicles9:9 Bantu bonsu aba bavua bamfumu ba meku abu. Bena Binyamine bavua base mu Yerushalayime bavua 956. 
1Chronicles9:10 Ba mu tshisumbu tshia batuangaji bavua bapingane ke: Yedaya, Yoyaribe, Yakine," 
1Chronicles9:11 ne Azariya. Bankambua babu ba munda, bavua balondangane nenku: Ilkiya, Meshulame, Sadoke, Merayote ne Akitube, ewu ke uvua mulami wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles9:12 Muvua kabidi Adaya. Bankambua bende bavua nenku: Yerowame, Pashekure ne Malkiya. Muvua kabidi Masayi; bankambua bende bavua nenku: Adiyele, Yazera, Meshulame, Meshilemite ne Imere." 
1Chronicles9:13 Pamue ne batuangaji bakuabu, bamfumu ba meku aa bavua 1.760; bavua bonsu bilobu bivua bienza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles9:14 Mu tshisumbu tshia bena Levi, muvua Shemaya. Bankambua bende ba munda bavua nenku: Ashube, Azrikame ne Ashabiya wa mu diku dia Merari." 
1Chronicles9:15 Muvua kabidi Bakbakare, Ereshe, Ngalale ne Mataniya. Bankambua babu ke Mika, Zikri ne Ashafe." 
1Chronicles9:16 Muvua kabidi Obadya. Bankambua bende bavua nenku: Shemaya, Ngalale ne Yedutune. Muvua kabidi Berekiya, muana wa Asha, ne muikulu wa Elkana. Berekiya ewu ke uvua muase mu buloba bu wabu batangila kudi bamfumu ba tshimenga tshia Netofa." 
1Chronicles9:17 Munkatshi mua balami ba tshiibi, muvua mfumu wa mudimu awu, ke Shalume, ne bana babu: ke Akube, Talmone ne Akimane." 
1Chronicles9:18 Ndelanganyi yabu itshidi yenza mudimu wa kulama tshiibi, tshidi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu, tshidibu binyike ne: ntshia mukalenga. Bankambua babu bavua bena mudimu wa kulama biibi mu mitanda ya bena Levi." 
1Chronicles9:19 Shalume, muana wa balume wa Kora, ne muikulu wa Abiyashafe, ne kankanunuina ka Kora, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu ba mu diku dia Kora, bavua ne mudimu wa kulama mushiku wa ntenta wa kusambakena. Ke muvua bankambua babu benza kale mu mitanda ya bantu ba Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles9:20 Pinase, muana wa Elazare, ke uvua ubatangila kale mu mudimu awu, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua nende." 
1Chronicles9:21 Zekarya, muana wa Meshelemiya, uvua kabidi mulami wa tshiibi ku ntenta wa kusambakena." 
1Chronicles9:22 Bantu bonsu ba wabu basungula bua kulama biibi bavua 212. Bavua bababadikila mu misoku yabu. Davide ne muambi Samuwele ke bavua bapesha bankambua babu midimu eyi ya mushinga. 
1Chronicles9:23 Ndelanganyi yabu ivua amu ne mudimu awu wa kulama ku biibi ne kulama nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. 
1Chronicles9:24 Tshiibi tshionsu tshivua ne bantu basunguluke bavua batshilama. Biibi mene bivua binayi: tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu, tshia luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua nzubu, tshia ku mutu wa nzubu ne tshia kuinshi kua nzubu." 
1Chronicles9:25 Balami bakuabu ba biibi bavua basomba ku misoku yabu. Kadi bavua bafika misangu ne misangu bua kuenza mudimu wabu wa kulama ku biibi lumingu bijima. 
1Chronicles9:26 Balami ba biibi bavua ne bamfumu babu banayi. Bavua bena Levi, bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bibambalu ne biuma bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles9:27 Bavua balala butuku pabuipi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bavua ne bua kumulama ne kunzulula biibi biende dinda dionsu." 
1Chronicles9:28 Balami bakuabu ba biibi bavua ne mudimu wa kubala bintu bia kutendelela nabi, bivua bantu bangata, nansha bapingaja." 
1Chronicles9:29 Bakuabu bavua balama ngesu ne bintu bikuabu bia tshijila, balama kabidi bukula, maluvu, mafuta, musenga wa kamonya, ne manananshi." 
1Chronicles9:30 Kadi, mudimu wa kusambakaja manananshi uvua wa batuangaji." 
1Chronicles9:31 Matitya, muanabute wa Shalume, muena Levi wa mu tshiota tshia Kora, uvua ne mudimu wa kuenza mikata ya kulambula." 
1Chronicles9:32 Bena Levi bakuabu ba mu diku dia Kekate, bavua benza bobu mampa a tshijila a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu dituku dionsu dia Dikisha." 
1Chronicles9:33 Bamfumu ba meku a bena Levi, bavua bimbi ba misambu, bavua basomba ku nzubu yabu. Kabavua benza munga mudimu to. Bualu bavua bimba munya ne butuku." 
1Chronicles9:34 Bonsu aba mbamfumu ba meku a bena Levi, bilondeshile ndelanganyi yabu. Bavua basomba amu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles9:35 Yeyele ke uvua muase tshimenga tshia Ngibone. Uvua musombe mu tshimenga atshi ne mukajende Maaka," 
1Chronicles9:36 muanabute wende Abdone, ne bana bende bakuabu ba balume: Sure, Kishe, Baale, Nere, Nadabe," 
1Chronicles9:37 Ngedore, Akiyo, Zekarya ne Miklote." 
1Chronicles9:38 Miklote uvua tatuende wa Shimame. Bavua bumuka mu Ngibone, baya kusomba mu Yerushalayime, ne banga bantu ba mu tshiota tshiabu." 
1Chronicles9:39 Nere uvua tatuende wa Kishe. Kishe uvua tatuende wa Shawule. Shawule uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Yonatane, Malkishuwa, Abinadabe, ne Ishebaale." 
1Chronicles9:40 Yonatane uvua tatuende wa Meribaale. Meribaale uvua tatuende wa Mika. 
1Chronicles9:41 Bana ba balume ba Mika badi nenku: Pitone, Meleke ne Tareya." 
1Chronicles9:42 Akaze uvua tatuende wa Yara. Yara uvua ne bana basatu: Alemete, Azmavete ne Zimri. Zimri uvua tatuende wa Mosha." 
1Chronicles9:43 Mosha uvua tatuende wa Bineya. Bineya uvua tatuende wa Refaya. Refaya uvua tatuende wa Elasha. Elasha uvua tatuende wa Ashele. 
1Chronicles9:44 Ashele uvua ne bana ba balume basambombu, mena abu adi: Azrikame, Bokru, Ismayele, Sheyariya, Obadya ne Anane." 
1Chronicles10:1 Dinga dituku, bena Peleshete kubunda bena Izrayele pa mukuna wa Ngilbowa, Bena Izrayele kunyema, bakuabu kufua ba bungi." 
1Chronicles10:2 Bena Peleshete kulondakaja nangananga Shawule ne bana bende. Kushipabu bana ba mukalenga Shawule basatu: Yonatane, Abinadabe ne Malkishuwa." 
1Chronicles10:3 Diba adi bena mvita kutshintshimika Shawule. Pavua bedi ba mikete bamumona, kubangaye kuzakala bikole." 
1Chronicles10:4 Shawule kuambila muntu uvua mumuambuile bia mvita ne: — Angata muele webe, unshipe. Bualu tshiena musue bua banshipe kudi bena Peleshete aba to. Bantu ba tshisamba tshikuabu aba bobu banshipe, badi mua kunseka. Kadi muntu awu kubenga, bualu uvua ne bowa bua kushipa mukalenga. Ke Shawule kuasa muele wende panshi, kudielapu, kufua." 
1Chronicles10:5 Muntu uvua umuambuila bia mvita awu, umona ne mfumuende wafu, kuasaye wende muele panshi, kudielapu, kufua pende." 
1Chronicles10:6 Ke diku dia bukalenga kubutuka nanku. Shawule kufua dituku dimue ne bana bende basatu. 
1Chronicles10:7 Bena Izrayele bavua base mu tshibandabanda, bumvue lumu ne: tshiluilu tshia bena Izrayele ntshinyeme, kabidi Shawule ne bana bende mbafue mu mvita, kunyemabu pabu, kumuka mu bimenga biabu. Bena Peleshete kuvua kuasamu." 
1Chronicles10:8 Butshia dinda, bena Peleshete kuya bua kuangula bintu bia bantu bafue. Kusanganabu tshitalu tshia Shawule ne bia bana bende ba balume pa mukuna wa Ngilbowa." 
1Chronicles10:9 Kukosabu tshitalu tshia Shawule mutu, kuangata mutu wa Shawule ne bia mvita biende. Kuendakanabu nabi mu ditunga diabu dijima, bua kutangalaja lumu lua disanka elu munkatshi mua mvidie yabu ne munkatshi mua bantu babu." 
1Chronicles10:10 Pashishe kutekabu bia mvita bia Shawule abi mu nzubu mukuabu wa ku nzubu ya mvidie yabu. Kuasabu kabalubalu ka mutu wende ku tshimana tshia nzubu wa mvidie Dagone. 
1Chronicles10:11 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yabeshe mu Ngilaade, kupetabu lumu lua bionsu bivua bena Peleshete benzela Shawule." 
1Chronicles10:12 Bantu ba mu Yabeshe bavua ne dikima, kuya kuambula tshitalu tshia Shawule ne bia bana bende bua kupingana nabi mu Yabeshe. Kujikabu mifuba yabu muinshi mua mutshi wa kampanga-nzevu, wa mu Yabeshe. Kushalabu bajila biakudia matuku muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles10:13 Shawule uvua mufue bualu uvua mutombokele Maweja-Nangila. Uvua mubenge diyi diende. Uvua muye kutempa, bua mikishi imuambile malu avuaye uyikonka," 
1Chronicles10:14 pa mutu pa kukonka Maweja-Nangila. Mvidi Mukulu kumushipa, kupingaja Davide, muana wa Ishayi mu bukalenga." 
1Chronicles11:1 Bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele, kuya kudi Davide mu Ebrone. Kumuambilabi ne: — Tudi bena muntu. Tudi bena diku diebe." 
1Chronicles11:2 Kadi kale patshivua Shawule mukalenga, ukavua ulombola bena Izrayele mu mvita yabu. Kabidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe ukavua mumane kukuambila ne: “Wewe Davide newikale mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Newikale mfumuabu.”" 
1Chronicles11:3 Bakulu bonsu ba bena Izrayele kuya kudi mukalenga Davide mu tshimenga tshia Ebrone. Davide kutua nabu ndondu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bobu kumujidila bua ashale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua kukumbaja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila divua Samuwele muambe." 
1Chronicles11:4 Davide ne bena Izrayele bonsu kuya kuluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Bavua batshinyika kabidi dina dia ne: Yebusa, bualu bena Yebusa bavua basa mu buloba abu, ke bavua basomba mu tshimenga atshi." 
1Chronicles11:5 Bena Yebusa kuambila Davide ne: — Kuakubuela mu tshimenga tshietu to! Kadi Davide kukuata nzubu mukolesha ne bimana uvua pa mukuna wa Siyone. Bantu kushisha kuinyika mukuna awu ne: “Tshimenga tshia Davide.” 
1Chronicles11:6 Davide kuamba ne: “Muntu wadianza kushipa muena Yebusa, neashale mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita bonsu.” Nanku Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, kudianza kushipa muena Yebusa. Ke yeye kushala mfumu wa tshiluilu." 
1Chronicles11:7 Davide kuya kusomba mu tshimenga tshibaka ne bimana bikolesha. Ke padibu batshinyika ne: “Tshimenga tshia Davide.” 
1Chronicles11:8 Pashishe Davide kuibaka nzubu mikuabu ivua nunyungulule muaba uvuabu binyika ne Milo. Kadi, Yowabe uvua ulongolola miaba mikuabu ya mu tshimenga." 
1Chronicles11:9 Nanku bukole bua Davide buvua buende buvulangana, bualu Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele uvua nende." 
1Chronicles11:10 Davide uvua ne bena mvita ba bukitu. Bobu pamue ne bena Izrayele, kukokela Davide mukalenga wabu, muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kushalabu bamulamate matuku onsu avuaye mu bukalenga." 
1Chronicles11:11 Mena a bena mvita ba Davide bavua ne bukitu avua nenku: Ishebaale, muena Akmoni, uvua mfumu wa “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu.” Dituku dikuabu, Ishebaale uvua mushipe bantu nkama isatu mu mvita ne musongolu." 
1Chronicles11:12 Elazare, muana wa Dodo, muena Akowa, uvua wa mu “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita basatu.”" 
1Chronicles11:13 Elazare uvua pabuipi ne mukalenga Davide mu musoku wa Pase-Damime, tshikondu tshivua bena Peleshete badisanga bua kubaluisha. Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kunyemabu. Muaba awu muvua budimi bua ntete ya orje." 
1Chronicles11:14 Elazare ne bantu bavuaye nabu bavua bela mualu wa mvita munkatshi mua budimi abu. Kutangalajabu bena Peleshete, kubatshimuna. Maweja-Nangila uvua muambuluishe bena Izrayele bua batshimune, badie lumu." 
1Chronicles11:15 Dituku dikuabu, pavua bena Peleshete basa mu tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime, bantu basatu ba mu “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu” kuya kudi Davide mu lubuebue luvua pabuipi ne nyongolu wa Adulame." 
1Chronicles11:16 Davide uvua musokome mu muaba wende mukole. Kadi mulombodi wa buloba wa bena Peleshete, uvua mu musoku wa Davide wa Betleyeme." 
1Chronicles11:17 Davide kumvua nyota, kukonka bantu bende ne: — Udi mua kumpesha mayi a kunua, a mu tshiina tshia mayi tshidi ku tshiibi tshia mu Betleyeme nnganyi?" 
1Chronicles11:18 Nanku bena mvita bende basatu, kupitshila munkatshi mua mitanda ya bena Peleshete. Kusunabu mayi mu tshiina atshi. Kuyabu kupa Davide. Kadi, Davide kavua musue kunua mayi awu to. Kuitshikijaye panshi bua kualambula Maweja-Nangila," 
1Chronicles11:19 wamba ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, meme tshiena mua kunua mayi aa to! Bualu meme munue mayi aa, ndi bu muntu munue mashi a bantu bavua baye kusuna mayi aa, bualu bavua bamba kufua pa kuasuna. Nanku Davide kubenga bua kunua mayi awu. Ke muvua bena mvita basatu abu baleja bukitu buabu nanku." 
1Chronicles11:20 Abishayi, muanabu ne Yowabe, ke uvua mfumu wa “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu.” Abishayi uvua mushipe dituku dimue bantu nkama isatu ne musongolu. Nanku Abishayi kupeta lumu lunene mu “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu” atshi." 
1Chronicles11:21 Uvua mumanyike bikole munkatshi muabu, mubapite bonsu ku bukitu. Nanku, kushalaye kabidi mfumuabu. Kadi kavua mupite “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita basatu” to." 
1Chronicles11:22 Benaya wa mu tshimenga tshia Kabseyele, muana wa Yoyada, ne muikulu wa muena mvita wa bukitu, uvua muleje bukitu buende misangu ya bungi. Benaya ke uvua mushipe ba Ariyele babidi ba bena Mowabe. Dituku dikuabu, tshikondu tshivua mvula wa neje uloka, Benaya kubuela mu tshiina tshia mayi, bua kushipa nyama wa ntambue uvua mu tshiina amu." 
1Chronicles11:23 Benaya kabidi uvua mushipe muena Ejipitu, muntu mule wa kafiondu, muntu wa metre abidi ne tshitupa, uvua ne musongolu munene mufuanangane ne mubambu wa kukuma nawu madiba. Benaya uvua ne mutshi wa patupu. Kubundaye muntu awu mvita, kumunyengaye musongolu wende, kumushipa nawu." 
1Chronicles11:24 Ke malu avua Benaya muenze, mamupeteshishe lumu munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bena mvita ba bukitu makumi asatu." 
1Chronicles11:25 Benaya uvua mumanyike bikole munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu. Kadi kavua mupite “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita basatu” to. Davide kumuteka mulombodi wa bena mvita bavua ne bua kulama mukalenga. 
1Chronicles11:26 Mena a bakuabu bena mvita avua nenku: Ashayele muanabu ne Yowabe, Elanane muana wa Dodo wa mu musoku wa Betleyeme," 
1Chronicles11:27 Shamote wa mu tshimenga tshia Arore, Elese muena mu tshimenga tshia Palone," 
1Chronicles11:28 Ira muana wa Ikeshe muena mu Tekowa, Abiyezere wa mu tshimenga tshia Anatote." 
1Chronicles11:29 Sibkayi wa mu tshimenga tshia Usha, Ilayi wa mu tshimenga tshia Akowa," 
1Chronicles11:30 Marayi wa mu tshimenga tshia Netofa, Elede muana wa Baana wa mu Netofa," 
1Chronicles11:31 Itayi muana wa Ribayi wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngibeya mu buloba bua Binyamine, Benaya wa mu tshimenga tshia Piratone," 
1Chronicles11:32 Urayi wa ku misulu ya mu Ngaashe, Abiyele wa mu tshimenga tshia Bete-Araba," 
1Chronicles11:33 Azmavete wa mu tshimenga tshia Bakurime, Eliyaba wa mu tshimenga tshia Shaalbone," 
1Chronicles11:34 bana ba balume ba Asheme muena mu Ngizone, Yonatane muana wa Shage muena mu Arare," 
1Chronicles11:35 Akiyame, muana wa Sakare, muena mu Arare, Elifale muana wa Ure," 
1Chronicles11:36 Efere muena mu Mekere, Akiya muena mu Palone," 
1Chronicles11:37 Esro muena mu Karmele, Naarayi muana wa Ezbayi," 
1Chronicles11:38 Yowele muanabu ne Natane, Mibare muana wa muena Agri," 
1Chronicles11:39 Seleke muena Amone, Narayi muena mu Beyerote, muambudi wa bia mvita bia Yowabe, muana wa Seruya," 
1Chronicles11:40 Ira wa mu diku dia Yetere, Ngarebe wa mu diku diabu," 
1Chronicles11:41 Uriya muena Iti, Zabade muana wa Alayi," 
1Chronicles11:42 Adina muana wa Shiza, wa mu bamfumu ba tshisamba tshia Rubene, uvua ne bena mvita makumi asatu," 
1Chronicles11:43 Anane muana wa Maaka, Yosafate wa mu Metene," 
1Chronicles11:44 Uziya wa mu Ashetarote, Shama ne Yeyele bana ba balume ba Otame wa mu Aroyere." 
1Chronicles11:45 Yediyayele, muana wa Shimri, ne Yoka wabu wa mu Tise." 
1Chronicles11:46 Eliyele wa mu Makaya, Yeribayi ne Yoshavya bana ba balume ba Elname, Itma wa mu ditunga dia Mowabe," 
1Chronicles11:47 kabidi ne Eliyele, Obede ne Yashiyele ba mu Soba." 
1Chronicles12:1 Tshikondu tshivua Davide musokome mu Siklaje, unyema Shawule, muana wa Kishe, bantu bakuabu bavua baye kudisanga nende. Bantu abu bavua bena mvita ba bukitu, bavua banyisha mua kumuambuluisha mu mvita." 
1Chronicles12:2 Bavua ne mata a mikete ne bintu bia kuela nabi mabue. Bavua bamanye mua kuela mabue, nansha kuela mikete nansha ne tshianza tshia balume nansha ne tshianza tshia bakaji mene. Mena a bantu bavua badisanga nende ba mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine, tshisamba menemene tshia Shawule, adi nenku:" 
1Chronicles12:3 Mfumu wa tshisumbu ke Akiyezere ne muanabu Yowashe muana wa Shema wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngibeya. Muvua kabidi Yeziyele ne Pelete, bana ba Azmavete, Bereka ne Yeku bena mu Anatote," 
1Chronicles12:4 Ishemaya, muena mu Ngibone, umue wa ku bamfumu ba tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu." 
1Chronicles12:5 Irmeya, Yaziyele, Yowanane ne Yozabade wa mu Ngedera," 
1Chronicles12:6 Eluzayi, Yerimote, Beyaliya, Shemariya ne Shefatya ba mu Arufe," 
1Chronicles12:7 Elkana, Ishiya, Azarele, Yoyezere ne Yashobame, ndelanganyi ya Kora," 
1Chronicles12:8 kabidi ne Yoyela ne Zebadya bana ba Yerowame wa mu Ngedore. 
1Chronicles12:9 Bantu bakuabu kumuka mu tshisamba tshia Ngade, bua kuya mu tshipela muvua Davide munyemene. Bantu abu bavua bena mvita ba bukitu, bamanye mua kuluangana ne ngabu ne mafuma. Bavua bafuanangana ne ntambue ku lonji, banyema lubilu mu mikuna amu bu nyama wa ntole." 
1Chronicles12:10 Bantu abu bavua dikumi ne umue, mena abu adi: Ezere, Obadya, Eliyabe, Mishemana, Irmeya, Atayi, Eliyele, Yowanane, Elzabade, Irmeya ne Makbanayi." 
1Chronicles12:11  
1Chronicles12:12  
1Chronicles12:13  
1Chronicles12:14  
1Chronicles12:15 Bena Ngade bonsu aba, bavua bamfumu ba bena mvita. Uvua mushadile ku bukitu munkatshi muabu, uvua mua kutshimuna bena mvita lukama; uvua ne bukitu uvua utshimuna bena mvita tshinunu." 
1Chronicles12:16 Bobu aba ke bavua basabuke Yardene mu ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu, tshikondu tshidi mayi apasalala nseke yonsu. Kuipatabu bantu bonsu bavua base mu bibandabanda nansha bia kudi diba dipatukila nansha bia kudidi dibuelela." 
1Chronicles12:17 Tshisumbu tshia bena Binyamine ne tshia bena Yuda kuya kaba kawa Davide munyemene. 
1Chronicles12:18 Davide kuya kubakidila, ubambila ne: — Panuikala bafike kundi ne ditalala bua kungambuluisha, ndi nnuakidila ne muoyi mujima. Kadi panuikala bangelele tshifufu bua kumfila kudi baluishi banyi, nansha tshiyi muenze bualu bubi, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu amone bualu abu, anunyoke." 
1Chronicles12:19 Nanku Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kutulukila Amashayi, mulombodi wa “Tshisumbu tshia bena mvita Makumi asatu.” Kuelaye lubila, wamba ne: — Tudi nebe, tudi ku luseke luebe wewe, Davide, muana wa Ishayi! Upete diakalenga, wewe ne bonsu badi bakuambuluisha, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmumane kukuambuluisha. Ke Davide kubakidila, kubateka balombodi ba bena mvita bende." 
1Chronicles12:20 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Menashe bakafua bamane kumyuangana ne Davide, tshikondu tshivua Davide ne bena Peleshete baye kuluisha Shawule. Bushuwa, Davide ne bantu bavuaye nabu kabavua badisanga ne bena Peleshete bua kuluangana to. Bualu balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Peleshete bavua babipata, bambilangana munkatshi muabu ne: “Davide neadisange ne mfumuende wa kale Shawule, bua kutufila mu bianza biende. ”" 
1Chronicles12:21 Nanku, diba divua Davide upingana mu tshimenga tshia Siklaje, bantu ba bena Menashe, bavua badisanga kudiye: ke Adna, Yozabade, Yediyayele, Mikayele, Yozabade, Eliku ne Siltayi. Bonsu aba bavua balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Menashe." 
1Chronicles12:22 Bonsu bavua bena mvita ba bukitu, bavua bafika bua kuambuluisha bisumbu bia bena mvita bia Davide. Pashishe kushalabu bulombodi ba tshiluilu tshia Davide." 
1Chronicles12:23 Nanku, ku dituku dionsu, bena mvita bavua badisangisha ne Davide bua kuluangana mvita. Ke muvua bena mvita ba Davide benda bavu-langana amu kuelangana." 
1Chronicles12:24 Bantu bavua bamanye mua kuluangana bavua badisanga kudi Davide mu Ebrone bua kumupesha bukalenga buvua nabu Shawule bilondeshile diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, badi nenku:" 
1Chronicles12:25 Bena mvita ba mu tshisamba tshia Yuda bavua ne ngabu ne mafuma, bavua 6.800." 
1Chronicles12:26 Bena mvita ba bukitu ba mu tshisamba tshia Shimeyone bavua 7.100. 
1Chronicles12:27 Bena mu tshisamba tshia Levi bavua 4.600. 
1Chronicles12:28 Muvua kabidi Yoyada, mfumu wa diku dia Arone, ne bantu 3.700." 
1Chronicles12:29 Kuvua kabidi nsongalume mukuabu, diende Sadoke, muena mvita wa bukitu, ne bamfumu 22 ba mu tshiota tshiabu." 
1Chronicles12:30 Bena tshisamba tshia Binyamine, tshisamba mene tshia Shawule, bavua ne bantu 3.000. Ba bungi ba kudibu bavua benzela diku dia Shawule mudimu too ne ku diba adi." 
1Chronicles12:31 Bena mvita ba bukitu ba mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime bavua 20.800. Bena mvita aba bavua bamanyike bikole mu meku abu. 
1Chronicles12:32 Tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bena Menashe bavua base luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene bavua 18.000. Ke bantu ba wabu basungule bua kuya kubanjija Davide mu bukalenga. 
1Chronicles12:33 Kuvua kabidi balombodi ba mvita 200 ba mu tshisamba tshia Isakare, pamue ne bena mvita babu. Ke bantu bavua bamanye mua kujingulula diba didi bena Izrayele ne bua kuenza bualu, ne mudibu mua kubukumbaja." 
1Chronicles12:34 Bena mvita ba mu tshisamba tshia Zebulone bavua bantu 50.000. Bavua balonge mvita bikole, bikale ne bia mvita bia mishindu yonsu, bamanye mua kuela mualu wa mvita, balondangane bimpe bitambe mu milongu." 
1Chronicles12:35 Kuvua kabidi balombodi ba bena mvita 1.000 ne bena mvita babu 37.000 ba mu tshisamba tshia Naftali, bikale ne ngabu ne misongolu ya mvita." 
1Chronicles12:36 Kuvua bena mvita ba tshisamba tshia Dane 28.600 bavua bamane kudilongolola bua kuela mualu. 
1Chronicles12:37 Kuvua bena mvita ba mu tshisamba tshia Ashere 40.000 bamane kudilongolola pabu bua kuela mualu, kabidi bavuale bia mvita bia mishindu yonsu." 
1Chronicles12:38 Kuvua bantu ba mu bisamba bivua biase luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, ba bena Rubene, bena Ngade ne bena Menashe, 120.000, bikale ne bia mvita bia mishindu yonsu." 
1Chronicles12:39 Bena mvita bonsu aba bamane kudilongolola bua kuela mualu wa mvita, kufikabu mu Ebrone ne muoyi mutoke bua kubanjija Davide mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bonsu. Bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu bavua amu banyisha bua kupesha Davide bukalenga abu." 
1Chronicles12:40 Kushalabu mu Ebrone pamue ne Davide matuku asatu, badia, banua bivuabu babalambila kudi bana babu." 
1Chronicles12:41 Kabidi bantu ba mu maloba avuabu nawu mutumba, too ne bena Isakare, bena Zebulone ne bena Naftali, kubabadila biakudia bivule, biambula kudi nyama ya mpunde, ya tumelu, ya tubalu ne ya ngombe. Bavua bafika ne bukula, mikata mienza ne bimuma bia mfiku, tumuma tua mvinyo tuume, maluvu ne mafuta. Bavua bafika kabidi ne ngombe ne mikooku. Bualu ditunga dijima divua amu ne disanka." 
1Chronicles13:1 Davide kubuela mu tshipangu ne bamfumu ba bisumbu bishilangane bia bena mvita, pamue ne bakulu bakuabu." 
1Chronicles13:2 Pashishe kuambilaye bena Izrayele bonsu basangile ne: — Panuikala banyishe, kabidi pikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu muanyishe, tutumayi mukenji lukasa kudi bena kuetu badi bashala mu buloba bujima bua bena Izrayele, nangananga kudi batuangaji ne kudi bena Levi badi basomba mu bimenga ne mu misoku idibu nayi mutumba. Tubabikile, bafike kutudi." 
1Chronicles13:3 Diba adi netupingaje mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu muetu. Bualu tuvua baulengulule mu tshikondu tshia Shawule. 
1Chronicles13:4 Bantu bonsu kumona ne: lungenyi alu nduimpe. Kujadikabu bua kulukumbaja. 
1Chronicles13:5 Davide kubikidisha bena Izrayele bonsu, biangatshile ku bavua basomba kuinshi mu ditunga ku mikalu ne bena Ejipitu, too ne ba ku mutu mu ditunga, ku tshimenga tshia Lebo-Amate. Uvua mubabikile bonsu bua kuya kuangata mushete wa tshijila mu tshimenga tshia Kiriyate-Yeyarime." 
1Chronicles13:6 Davide ne bena Izrayele bonsu kuya mu tshimenga tshia Baala, mmumue ne Kiriyate-Yeyarime, mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda, bua kuangata mushete. Mushete awu uvua mujidila Mvidi Mukulu, udi usomba pa mutu pa bakerubine." 
1Chronicles13:7 Uvua mu nzubu mua Abinadabe. Kuutekabu mu ditempu dipiadipia divuabu baludika kudi Uza ne Akiyo. 
1Chronicles13:8 Davide ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua benda basanka muabu muonsu, kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bimba misambu ne biombelu bia mishindu yonsu: nzenze, ngoma, ndibu ne mpungi." 
1Chronicles13:9 Kadi bafike amu pabuipi ne tshituilu tshia Kidone, ngombe kusua kukulula mushete wa tshijila. Uza kukuata mushete bua kaukuluki nansha." 
1Chronicles13:10 Ke Maweja-Nangila kumufikila munda, kumunyoka bualu uvua mulenge mushete. Uza kufua, Maweja-Nangila mumone." 
1Chronicles13:11 Davide kunyingalala bua pavua Maweja-Nangila mushipe Uza mushindu awu. Kuinyikaye muaba awu dina dia Peresa-Uza. Dina adi didiku too ne lelu. 
1Chronicles13:12 Dituku adi Davide kutshina Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne: — Mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu kawena mua kufika kuanyi to." 
1Chronicles13:13 Davide kubenga bua kufikabu ne mushete awu kuende mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kadi kuutekeshaye mu nzubu mua Obede-Edome muena Ngate. 
1Chronicles13:14 Mushete kushala mu nzubu amu ngondu isatu. Maweja-Nangila kuela Obede-Edome lupemba ne bena nzubu wende. Kumuvudijilaye ne bintu biende. 
1Chronicles14:1 Irame, mukalenga wa Tire, kutuma bantu kudi Davide. Kumutuminaye ne mitshi ya sedre, kabidi ne basongi ba mabue ne bena mudimu wa mabaya, bua bibakile Davide nzubu wa bukalenga." 
1Chronicles14:2 Nanku Davide kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mumupe bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, kabidi ke uvua mubushindike, bualu uvua munange bantu bende bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles14:3 Davide wakasela bakaji bakuabu ku Yerushalayime. Kulelaye bana ba balume ne ba bakaji. 
1Chronicles14:4 Bana ba balume ba wabu bamulelela mu Yerushalayime badi nenku: Shamuwa, Shobabe, Natane, Shelomu," 
1Chronicles14:5 Ibare, Elishuwa, Elpelete," 
1Chronicles14:6 Noga, Nefege, Yafiya," 
1Chronicles14:7 Elishama, Beyeliyada ne Elifelete." 
1Chronicles14:8 Bena Peleshete kupeta lumu ne: mbamane kujidila Davide, bua kuikalaye mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu. Nanku bena Peleshete bonsu kuya kuluisha Davide bua kumukuata. Davide upeta lumu lua mvita alu, kuyaye bua kuluangana nabu." 
1Chronicles14:9 Bena Peleshete kufika mu tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime, kubanga kutshinyangakaja." 
1Chronicles14:10 Davide kukonka Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Ndi mua kuluisha bena Peleshete anyi? Neubafile mu bianza bianyi anyi? Mvidi Mukulu kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, uye kubaluisha. Meme nembafile mu bianza biebe." 
1Chronicles14:11 Bena Peleshete kuya too ne ku Baale-Perashime, kuvua Davide mubatshimuine. Davide kuamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila kupandulula baluishi banyi kumpala kuanyi, amu bu mudi mayi abumbula nkila. Ke padibu binyika muaba awu ne: Baale-Perashime, mmumue ne: “Mfumu udi ubumbula Nkila.”" 
1Chronicles14:12 Pavua bena Peleshete banyema, bavua bashiya mpingu ya mvidie yabu muaba awu. Davide kutuma diyi bua bayoshe." 
1Chronicles14:13 Bena Peleshete kubanga tshiakabidi kunyangakaja tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime. 
1Chronicles14:14 Davide kukonka tshiakabidi Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu kuandamuna ne: — Kuena mua kubaluisha mutangilangane nabu nansha. Londa njila mukuabu, usemene pabuipi nabu mu ditu dia mitshi ya mikokuliye." 
1Chronicles14:15 Kadi paumvua mikuma ku nsongu ya mitshi, utuadije mvita. Bualu ke diba mene dindi mpita kumpala kuebe bua kukutshimuna mvita ya bena Peleshete." 
1Chronicles14:16 Davide kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Bena Izrayele kutshimuna bena Peleshete, kubalondakaja bituadije ku Ngibone too ne ku Ngezere." 
1Chronicles14:17 Bituadije ku tshikondu atshi, lumu lua Davide kutangalaka matunga onsu. Maweja-Nangila kukolesha Davide bua bukua matunga bumutshine." 
1Chronicles15:1 Davide kuibakisha nzubu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kulongololaye muaba mukuabu, kuasayemu ntenta bua kuteka mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles15:2 Nenku kuambaye ne: — Amu bena Levi nkayabu ke badi mua kuambula mushete wa tshijila. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubasungule amu bobu bua bikale bambudi ne bakubi ba mushete awu kashidi. 
1Chronicles15:3 Davide kusangisha bena Izrayele bonsu mu Yerushalayime, bua kuangata mushete, kuuteka muaba uvuabu bakongoluele." 
1Chronicles15:4 Kusangishaye batuangaji, ndelanganyi ya Arone, kabidi ne bena Levi." 
1Chronicles15:5 Munkatshi mua bena Levi muvua mfumu Uriyele pamue ne bantu bakuabu lukama ne malumi abidi, bena mu diku dia Kekate;" 
1Chronicles15:6 kuvua mfumu Ashaya ne bantu nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi, bena mu diku dia Merari;" 
1Chronicles15:7 kuvua mfumu Yowele ne bantu bakuabu lukama ne makumi asatu, bena mu diku dia Ngershone;" 
1Chronicles15:8 kuvua mfumu Shemaya ne bantu bakuabu nkama ibidi, bena mu diku dia Elishafane;" 
1Chronicles15:9 kuvua mfumu Eliyele ne bantu bakuabu makumi muanda mukulu, bena mu diku dia Ebrone;" 
1Chronicles15:10 kuvua mfumu Aminadabe ne bantu bakuabu lukama ne dikumi ne babidi, bena mu diku dia Uziyele." 
1Chronicles15:11 Davide kubikidisha batuangaji Sadoke ne Abiyatare, ne bena Levi aba: Uriyele, Ashaya, Yowele, Shemaya, Eliyele ne Aminadabe." 
1Chronicles15:12 Kubambilaye ne: — Nuenu nudi ku mutu kua meku a bena Levi. Nudikobolole nuenu ne bena meku enu. Pashishe nuye kuangata mushete wa Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, bua kuya kuuteka muaba undi muulongoluele." 
1Chronicles15:13 Musangu wa kumpala kanuvuapu. Ke pavua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu mutunyoke ne dinyoka dia lufu. Bualu katuvua balonde bulongolodi budiye musue. 
1Chronicles15:14 Nenku batuangaji ne bena Levi kudikobolola bua kuambula mushete wa tshijila. 
1Chronicles15:15 Bena Levi kuambula mushete wa ndondu, mubueja ku mitshi. Kuutekabu pa makaya, bilondeshile diyi divua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
1Chronicles15:16 Davide kuambila balombodi ba bena Levi bua basungule mu meku abu, bena misambu, bikale ne bisanji, nzenze ne ndibu, badi mua kuimba misambu ne diyi dikole dia disanka." 
1Chronicles15:17 Nenku bena Levi kusungula Emane, muana wa Yowele, ne muanabu Ashafe, muana wa Berekiya, kabidi ne Etane, muana wa Kushaya wa mu diku dia Merari." 
1Chronicles15:18 Bobu bavua balombola, kadi bakuabu bavua babambuluisha. Ke mena a balami ba biibi: Zekarya, Bene, Yaziyele, Shemiramote, Yekiyele, Uni, Eliyabe, Benaya, Maasheya, Matitiya, Elifleku, Mikneya, Obede-Edome ne Yeyele." 
1Chronicles15:19 Bimbi ba misambu Emane, Ashafe ne Etane bavua bimba bikole ndibu ya tshiamu tshikunze." 
1Chronicles15:20 Zekarya, Aziyele, Shemiramote, Yekiyele, Uni, Eliyabe, Maasheya ne Benaya bavua bobu ne nzenze ya meyi matue." 
1Chronicles15:21 Matitiya, Elifleku, Mikneya, Obede-Edome, Yeyele ne Azaziya bavua bimba nzenze ya meyi manene bua kuneemuna diyi." 
1Chronicles15:22 Kenaniya, mulombodi wa bena Levi bambudi ba mushete wa ndondu, uvua wenda utangila bambudi ba mushete, bualu uvua mumanye mudimu awu bikole." 
1Chronicles15:23 Balami ba biibi, bavua pabuipi ne mushete, ke Berekiya ne Elkana." 
1Chronicles15:24 Obede-Edome ne Yekiya kabidi bavua benda pabuipi ne mushete. Kadi batuangaji aba: Shebanya, Yosafate, Netaneyele, Amashayi, Zekarya, Benaya ne Eliyezere ke bavua benda bela mpungi kumpala kua mushete wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles15:25 Davide, bakulu ba bena Izrayele, ne balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mvita, bavua baya ne disanka kuangata mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, kua Obede-Edome." 
1Chronicles15:26 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mulame bimpe bena Levi bavua bambula mushete. Nenku kulambulabu Mvidi Mukulu mulambu, wa ngombe milume muanda mutekete ne bimpanga muanda mutekete." 
1Chronicles15:27 Davide, bena Levi bavua bambula mushete, bena misambu, ne Kenaniya mutangidi wa bambudi ba mushete, bavua bavuala binkutu bia tshilamba tshienza ne buanda bua mitshi. Davide uvua muvuale kabidi tshilamba tshia muinshi tshia batuangaji, tshienza ne buanda bua mitshi." 
1Chronicles15:28 Bena Izrayele bonsu kufika ne mushete wa tshijila mu Yerushalayime, batua tshianga, badidisha miadi ya mpungi mishilangane, ya ndibu, ya nkombe ne ya nzenze." 
1Chronicles15:29 Diba divuabu bafika ne mushete mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, Mikale, muana wa bakaji wa Shawule, uvua mutangile pa dididishi. Kumonaye Davide uja maja a disanka. Kupepejaye Davide bikole." 
1Chronicles16:1 Bambudi kuya kuteka mushete mu ntenta uvua Davide muashile mushete awu. Pashishe Davide kulambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue. 
1Chronicles16:2 Davide mumane kulambula milambu ayi, kuelaye bena Izrayele lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles16:3 Pashishe kuabanyinaye bena Izrayele biakudia. Mulume yonsu ne mukaji bavua bapeta diampa, mukata muenza ne bimuma bia date, ne mukata muenza ne tumuma tua mvinyo tuume." 
1Chronicles16:4 Davide kusungula bena Levi bakuabu, kubateka kumpala kua mushete wa Maweja-Nangila, bua bimbe misambu mu luendu lua mazengu, batungunuke ne mudimu awu wa kutumbisha, kutendakena ne kusamuna Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles16:5 Ashafe ke uvua ulombola bantu abu, bamuambuluisha kudi Zekarya. Yaziyele, Shemiramote, Yekiyele, Matitiya, Eliyabe, Benaya, Obede-Edome ne Yeyele, bavua bimba lunkombe ne lunzenze. Ashafe uvua unyungisha ndibu." 
1Chronicles16:6 Batuangaji Benaya ne Yaziyele bavua bela amu kuela mpungi kumpala kua mushete wa tshijila. 
1Chronicles16:7 Dituku adi, ke musangu wa kumpala uvua Davide musungule Ashafe ne bantu bende bua kutumbishabu Maweja-Nangila, bamba ne:" 
1Chronicles16:8 Anyishayi Maweja-Nangila, elayi mbila, ambilayi bantu mudiye Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Manyishayi bukua bisamba bionsu bidiye muenze." 
1Chronicles16:9 Muimbilayi, numusamune ne misambu. Vuluijayi bantu bishima biende bionsu." 
1Chronicles16:10 Sankayi, nudisue, bualu tudi bantu bende. Nuditembe bualu yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. Nuenu badi batendelela Maweja-Nangila, sankayi." 
1Chronicles16:11 Kebayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi muena bukole buonsu. Nukebe matuku onsu munudi mua kusemena kudiye." 
1Chronicles16:12 Nuenu, ndelanganyi ya muntu wende Izrayele, nuenu, bana ba Yakobe, bavuaye musungule, vulukayi bishima bivuaye mukumbaje, vulukayi malu a kukema avuaye muenze, vulukayi nsambu ivuaye mukose." 
1Chronicles16:13  
1Chronicles16:14 Yeye ke Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu! Buloba bujima budi ku bumfumu buende!" 
1Chronicles16:15 Vulukayi nuwuaye mutue netu ndondu wa kashidi, muvuaye mulaye bualu budi butangila ndelanganyi yonsu." 
1Chronicles16:16 Ke dilaya divuaye mulaye Abrahame. Ke mutshipu uvuaye muditshipe kudi Izake. 
1Chronicles16:17 Ke diyi divuaye mujadikile Yakobe, Ke ndondu wa kashidi uvuaye mutue ne bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles16:18 Kumuambilaye ne: “Ndi nkupa buloba bua Kenaane. Ke ditunga dindi munupe, wewe ne ndelanganyi yebe. ”" 
1Chronicles16:19 Diba adi, bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu batshivua bakese. Batshivua bamue bena tshimuangi mu ditunga dia Kenaane." 
1Chronicles16:20 Bavua bendakana baye ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba, ku bukalenga ne ku bukuabu." 
1Chronicles16:21 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kawa musue bua muntu abakengeshe. Kubelaye bakalenga bualu buabu, wamba ne:" 
1Chronicles16:22 “Kanulengi bantu banyi, bandi mujidile. Kanuenzedi bambi ba diyi dianyi bibi! ”" 
1Chronicles16:23 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila misambu, nuenu ba mu buloba bujima. Ambilayi bantu ku dituku ku dituku ne: udi Musungidi." 
1Chronicles16:24 Manyishayi bantu bonsu butumbi buende. Manyishayi bukua bisamba malu a dikema adiye muenze. 
1Chronicles16:25 Maweja-Nangila udi munene, wa kutumbisha bipite, wa kutshina ku mutu kua mvidie yonsu." 
1Chronicles16:26 Mvidie ya bukua bisamba yonsu idi tshianana. Kadi Maweja-Nangila mmufuke diulu! 
1Chronicles16:27 Ke padiye ne butumbi ne bumfumu, muaba udiye mmuwule ne lumu, kabidi ne disanka." 
1Chronicles16:28 Bena bisamba bionsu, wayi, nukukuile Maweja-Nangila, imbayi butumbi buende, itabayi ne bumfumu buende." 
1Chronicles16:29 Luayi, samunayi Maweja-Nangila. Tualayi milambu, nuye kumpala kuende. Mutuilayi binu, nudiele panshi, padiye uleja mudiye wa tshijila." 
1Chronicles16:30 Nuenu bantu ba buloba bujima, zakalayi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bavua bashindika buloba, kabayi mua kubunyungisha." 
1Chronicles16:31 Diulu disanke! Buloba busanguluke! Ambilayi bantu bonsu ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga!” 
1Chronicles16:32 Mayi manene akungule! Bia muoyi bionsu bidimu bikungule! Mpata isangale, ne bionsu bidi bimenamu!" 
1Chronicles16:33 Bukua mitshi yonsu ya muitu, buele mbila ya disanka kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi uvua kukosa nsambu pa yoyi pa buloba." 
1Chronicles16:34 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu mmulenga, dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
1Chronicles16:35 Muelayi mbila, nuambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu Mupandishi wetu, umpandishe, umpatule mu matunga a bende, musangishe muaba umue. Nenku, netukutumbishe. Netukutumbishe tutela dina diebe dia tshijila. Netukusamune tuleja musangelu.”" 
1Chronicles16:36 Elayi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, tuasakidila, numuelayi tuasakidila lelu ne kashidi. Bantu bonsu kupunguluja ne: “Amene! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila!”" 
1Chronicles16:37 Pashishe Davide kutumina Ashafe diyi ne bena mulongu nende, bua bashale pabuipi ne mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, bakumbaje midimu yabu, kabayi bapumbisha, amu muvuabu balongolole bia kuenza ku dituku ku dituku." 
1Chronicles16:38 Kusungulaye Obede-Edome, ne bana babu makumi asambombu ne muanda mukulu, bua babambuluishe. Obede-Edome, muana wa Yedutune, ne Osha bavua ne bua kulama biibi." 
1Chronicles16:39 Davide kupesha mutuangaji Sadoke, ne batuangaji ba mu diku diende, mudimu wa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, uvua pa muaba wa tshijila wa mu Ngibone." 
1Chronicles16:40 Bavua ne bua kufila milambu ya kuosha ku tshilambuilu ku dituku dionsu, dinda ne dilolu. Bavua ne bua kukumbaja midimu yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila mubafundile mu mikenji ivua bena Izrayele bapete kudiye." 
1Chronicles16:41 Bavua ne Emane, Yedutune ne bantu bakuabu bavuabu basungule amu bua batumbishe Maweja-Nangila, bua dinanga diende dia kashidi." 
1Chronicles16:42 Emane ne Yedutune bavua ne mpungi ne ndibu ya bena misambu. Bavua kabidi ne bikuabu biamu bia kuimba nabi misambu ya tshijila. Bana ba Yedutune bavua balami ba biibi. 
1Chronicles16:43 Pashishe muntu yonsu kupingana ku nzubu kuende. Davide pende kupingana kuende, kuelaye bena diende muoyi." 
1Chronicles17:1 Mukalenga Davide kuya kusomba mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Dituku dikuabu, Davide kuambila muambi Natane ne: — Ndi musombe mu nzubu muase ne mitshi ya sedre, kadi mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila udi amu mu ntenta wa bilamba. Udi wela meji munyi?" 
1Chronicles17:2 Muambi Natane kumuandamuna ne: — Udi mumane kuela meji a kuenza bualu. Mbimpe, ukumbaje, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi nebe." 
1Chronicles17:3 Kadi bufuku abu, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Natane ne:" 
1Chronicles17:4 — Ndaku kudi Davide, muntu wanyi, umuambile ne: Teleja tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba ne: ‘Wewe Davide, kuakungashila nzubu undi mua kusomba to." 
1Chronicles17:5 Bualu biangatshile dituku dimvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu too ne ku lelu, katshia tshiena muanji kusomba mu nzubu to. Kadi mvua amu musombe mu ntenta, ngendakana mu njila." 
1Chronicles17:6 Kabidi matuku onsu amvua ngendakana ne bena Izrayele, mvua musungule balombodi ba bungi bua kuludika bantu banyi. Kadi tshivua mudiwule nansha umue wa kudibu ne: kuena mungashile nzubu wa mitshi ya sedre bua tshinyi.’" 
1Chronicles17:7 “Nanku, wambile kabidi Davide ne: Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: ‘Pautshivua wenza mudimu wa kulama mikoku mu mpata, meme kukumusha muaba awu, bua wewe kuikala mukalenga wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles17:8 Meme kukuambuluisha mu midimu yebe yonsu. Meme kubutula bena lukuna bebe bavua bakuluisha. Nenkupeteshe lumu lunene. Newikale mumanyike bu mudi bakalenga banene bonsu badi bamanyike bikole pa buloba. 
1Chronicles17:9 Nensungule bantu banyi bena Izrayele buloba bundi mbasombesha mu bupole, kabayi batshina muntu to. Tshisamba nansha tshimue tshia bantu ba muoyi mubi katshiena mua kubakengesha kabidi, mmuabu babakengesha bangabanga," 
1Chronicles17:10 tshikondu tshi-mvua muteke balombodi bua kulama bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Nemfuishe baluishi bebe bonsu bundu. Nanku, ndi nkumanyisha ne: meme Maweja-Nangila, nenkuashile nzubu." 
1Chronicles17:11 Pakumbana diba dia lufu luebe, nensungule muana umue wa ku bana bebe menemene, bua akupingane mu bukalenga. Nenshindike bikole bumfumu buende." 
1Chronicles17:12 Muana awu ke wangibakila nzubu, kabidi nenjadike ndelanganyi yende mu bukalenga kashidi." 
1Chronicles17:13 Nengikale tatuende, yeye neikale muananyi. Tshiakubenga kumuambuluisha, bu mumvua mubenge kuambuluisha mukalenga uvua mukudianjidile." 
1Chronicles17:14 Nemmuteke mukalenga kabidi mulombodi wa tshisamba tshianyi kashidi, bualu bukalenga nebushale mu nzubu muende kashidi.’ ”" 
1Chronicles17:15 Muambi Natane, kuambila Davide bionsu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje bua kumumanyisha." 
1Chronicles17:16 Pashishe mukalenga Davide kuya mu ntenta wa tshijila, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bua kumutendelela. Uvua wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi mumanye ne: nansha meme nansha bena diku dianyi, katuvua bakanyine mua kupeta bionsu biukadi mutuenzele ebi to." 
1Chronicles17:17 Kadi wewe, udi mumone ne: bionsu biudi mutuenzele kabiena bianji kukumbana. Nanku, utshidi ulaya malu adi atangila diku dianyi, ndelanganyi yanyi itshivuavua. Udi untangila bu muntu wa mushinga, pabi kabiyi nanku. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi," 
1Chronicles17:18 tshiena ne tshindi mua kuamba bua lumu luudi mumpeshe, bualu udi mummanye meme muntu webe." 
1Chronicles17:19 Bu muudi munnange, wewe kukumbaja malu onsu aa a kukema, bua kuleja bunene buebe." 
1Chronicles17:20 Maweja-Nangila, kakuena udi mukufuane, kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu wewe. Ke mutudi bumvue bantu bamba." 
1Chronicles17:21 Kakuena tshisamba tshikuabu pa buloba tshidi tshifuanangane ne tshia bena Izrayele. Wewe uvua mufike bua kupikula amu bena Izrayele ku bupika bua bena Ejipitu, bua kubenza tshisamba tshiebe wewe.
