Bena Izrayele badi bakutumbisha bua malu a dikema avua akuatshisha buowa, auvua muenze pauvua muipate bukua matunga kumpala kua tshisamba tshiebe." 
1Chronicles17:22 Wewe kuangata bena Izrayele bua bashale tshisamba tshiebe kashidi. Ke wewe kushala Mvidi Mukulu watshi. 
1Chronicles17:23 Kadi mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila, ukumbaje bionsu biuvua muambe. Bionsu biuvua mundaye, meme ne ndelanganyi yanyi, bikumbane diba dionsu." 
1Chronicles17:24 Eyowa, bionsu bikumbane. Nanku wewe newikale ne lumu kashidi. Bantu nebambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, Mvidi Mukulu udi wambuluisha bena Izrayele, ke Maweja-Nangila, mfumu wa buloba bujima.” Wewe ujadike ndelanganyi yanyi mu bukalenga." 
1Chronicles17:25 Bualu wewe Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua mumanyishe meji ebe a kumpesha ndelanganyi idi mua kumpingana mu bukalenga. Ke pandi muimane apa kumpala kuebe, nkutendelela." 
1Chronicles17:26 Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu. Akya! Mpindiewu udi mundaye diakalenga edi!" 
1Chronicles17:27 Udi mushindike bua kuela diku dianyi lupemba, bua ndelanganyi yanyi ishale mu bukalenga kashidi kumpala kuebe. Maweja-Nangila, bu muudi wewe uyela lupemba, nenku neipete dikasa dimpe kashidi." 
1Chronicles18:1 Pashishe Davide kutshimuna bena Peleshete. Kushalabu ne bundu, bualu Davide uvua mubanyenge tshimenga tshia Ngate ne misoku ivua natshi mutumba." 
1Chronicles18:2 Davide kutshimuna kabidi bena Mowabe. Kushalabu bantu bende, bamulambula bitadi." 
1Chronicles18:3 Adadezere uvua mukalenga wa bena Soba mu ditunga dia bena Arame. Uvua utangalaja bumfumu buende too ne ku tshimenga tshia Amate. Tshikondu tshivua Adadezere ukeba mua kukuata buloba buvua ku musulu wa Perate, Davide kumutshimuna." 
1Chronicles18:4 Davide kunyenga matempu tshinunu, babandi ba pa tubalu binunu muanda mutekete, ne bena mvita bavua benda ku makasa binunu makumi abidi. Davide kulama matempu ne nyama ya tubalu lukama. Kadi nyama ya tubalu yonsu ivua mishale kuyikosaye mijilu ya ku bikonu." 
1Chronicles18:5 Pashishe bena Arame ba mu Damase, kuvua kuambuluisha Adadezere mu mvita. Kadi Davide kubatshimuna kabidi, kushipa bantu ba kudibu binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi." 
1Chronicles18:6 Davide kuteka balombodi bende ba bukalenga mu Arame. Nanku bena Arame kushala ku bumfumu bua Davide, bamulambula bitadi. Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe Davide bukole bua kutshimuna mvita yonsu nanku." 
1Chronicles18:7 Davide kunyenga ngabu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivuabu nayi kudi bena mvita bavua balama Adadezere. Kuyaye nayi mu Yerushalayime. 
1Chronicles18:8 Kunyengaye kabidi biamu bikunze bia bungi, bivua mu tshimenga tshia Tibate ne tshia Kune. Bimenga ebi bivua ku bumfumu bua Adadezere. Kunyima kua bidimu, Shelomu uvua muenze ne tshiamu tshikunze atshi, dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, makunji ne bintu bionsu bia kuenza nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles18:9 Towu, mukalenga wa bena Amate, kumvaye muvua Davide mutshimune bena mvita bonsu ba Adadezere, mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Soba." 
1Chronicles18:10 Kutumaye muanende Adorame kudi Davide, bua kumuela muoyi ne kalumbandi, bualu uvua mutshimune Adadezere. Bualu Adadezere uvua muluishi wa Towu. Adorame kutuadila Davide bintu bia mishindu miwle, bienza ne mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kabidi ne tshiamu tshikunze." 
1Chronicles18:11 Mukalenga Davide kujidila bintu abi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bu muvuaye mujidile tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshia mpawungi, bivuaye muangate mu matunga makuabu: a bena Edome, a bena Mowabe, a bena Amone, a bena Peleshete ne a bena Amaleke." 
1Chronicles18:12 Abishayi, muana wa Seruya, kutshimuna bena Edome mu tshibandabanda tshia Luepu, kushipa bena mvita binunu dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles18:13 Abishayi kubatekela balombodi. Bena Edome kushala ku bumfumu buende. Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila muambuluishe Davide bua atshimune mvita yende yonsu nanku. 
1Chronicles18:14 Davide kushala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu. Uvua ulongolola malu amu bimpe, kayi ne kansungansunga." 
1Chronicles18:15 Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, uvua mfumu mulombodi wa bena mvita ba Davide. Yosafate, muana wa Akilude, uvua mufikishi wa malu a mukalenga kudi bantu." 
1Chronicles18:16 Sadoke, muana wa Akitube, ne Abimeleke, muana wa Abiyatare, bavua batuangaji. Shavesha uvua mufundi." 
1Chronicles18:17 Benaya, muana wa Yoyada, uvua mulombodi wa bena Kereti ne bena Peleti, bena mvita bavua balama mukalenga Davide. Bana ba Davide bavua ne muanzu munene mu bukalenga buende." 
1Chronicles19:1 Kupita matuku makese, mukalenga Nakashe wa bena Amone kufua. Muanende wa balume kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
1Chronicles19:2 Davide kuamba ne: “Ndi musue kuenzela Anune, muana wa Nakashe, bimpe. Bualu tatuende uvua mungenzele panyi nanku.’’ Ke Davide kutuma balombodi bakuabu ba mu bukalenga kudi Anune bua kumusamba mu madilu a tatuende. Balombodi ba mukalenga Davide bamane kufika mu ditunga dia bena Amone," 
1Chronicles19:3 balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Amone, kuambila mukalenga wabu Anune ne: — Udi wela meji ne: Davide mmutume balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende amu bua kunemeka tatuebe ne kukusamba mu madilu a tatuebe anyi? Mmubatume bua bendakane mu ditunga, baditentekela bua badikuate dituku dikuabu." 
1Chronicles19:4 Nanku, Anune kukuatshisha balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Davide abu. Kubabeyabu miedi. Kukosabu bilamba bivuabu bavuale, kushalabi bishikidila pa mataku. Kubalekelabu bua bapingane kuabu." 
1Chronicles19:5 Kumanyishabu Davide bionsu abi. Ke Davide kutuma bantu bua baye kuakidila balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende abu, bualu bavua ne bundu bua bungi. Mukalenga Davide kubatumina diyi ne: “Nusombele mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko too ne pikala miedi yenu mimene kabidi. Nanku nushishe kupingana apa.”" 
1Chronicles19:6 Mukalenga Anune ne bena Amone kumona ne: Davide ukadi muluishi wetu. Nanku kuangatabu ku mudimu bena mvita ba bena Arame ba mu buloba bua Mezopotamiya wa kulu, ba bena Maaka ne bena Soba, bikale ne matempu ne babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu. Kufutabu bantu aba tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshia bujitu bua kilo binunu makumi asatu." 
1Chronicles19:7 Ke muvuabu bapete matempu a mvita binunu makumi asatu ne bibidi. Kuangatabu ne bena mvita ba mukalenga wa bena Maaka ku mudimu. Bena mvita aba kuya kuasa mitanda pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Medeba. Ke bena Amone kabidi kupatuka mu bimenga biabu, kuela mualu wa mvita." 
1Chronicles19:8 Davide upeta lumu lua didisangisha dia bena mvita abu, kutumaye Yowabe, mfumu wa tshiluilu tshiende lukasa lukasa, ne bonsu bavua bamanye mua kuluangana bikole." 
1Chronicles19:9 Bena Amone kuya kuela mualu wa mvita pabuipi ne tshiibi tshinene tshia tshimenga tshiabu. Bakalenga ba matunga bavua ne bua kubambuluisha abu, bavua pabu bela mualu wa mvita, bashilangane nabu mutantshi mu mpata." 
1Chronicles19:10 Yowabe umona ne: baluishi bende badi bitupa bibidi, aba kumpala, banga panyima, kusungulaye bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua bamanye mvita bikole. Kubatekaye batangilangane ne bena Arame." 
1Chronicles19:11 Bena mvita bavua bashale, kubapeshaye muanabu Abishayi. Kubatekaye batangilangane ne bena Amone." 
1Chronicles19:12 Yowabe kuambila muanabu Abishayi ne: — Padi bena Arame bampite bukole, wewe neungambuluishe. Kadi padi bena Amone bakupite bukole, meme nenkuambuluishe." 
1Chronicles19:13 Nenku, kolesha muoyi, tuluangane mvita eyi ne bukitu, bua tupandishe bana betu ne bimenga bia Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila enze mudiye musue." 
1Chronicles19:14 Yowabe ne bena mvita kusemena bua kuluisha bena Arame. Bena Arame kunyema Yowabe. 
1Chronicles19:15 Bena Amone bamone bena Arame banyema, kunyemabu pabu Abishayi, muanabu ne Yowabe, kupinganabu ku tshimenga tshiabu. Ke Yowabe kupingana ku Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles19:16 Bena Arame bamona ne: bena Izrayele mbatupite bukole, kubikidishabu bana babu bonsu bavua dia muamua dia musulu wa Perate. Bavua babalombola kudi Shofake, mfumu wa tshiluilu tshia Adadezere." 
1Chronicles19:17 Davide kupeta lumu lua bualu ebu. Kusangishaye bena mvita bonsu ba bena Izrayele, kusabukabu Yardene. Kuyabu batangile kudi baluishi. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita pabuipi ne mualu wa mvita wa baluishi. Kutekaye bena mvita bende bua bele mualu, batangilangane ne bena Arame. Bena Arame kutuadija mvita." 
1Chronicles19:18 Kadi kunyemabu bena Izrayele. Davide ne bena mvita bende kushipa bantu binunu muanda mutekete, bendeshi ba matempu a mvita, ne bena mvita bavua benda ku makasa binunu makumi anayi. Kushipabu kabidi ne mulombodi wabu Shofake." 
1Chronicles19:19 Nanku, bakalenga bonsu bavua ku bumfumu bua Adadezere bamona ne: bena Izrayele mbatupite ku bukole, kumwanganabu ne Davide. Kushalabu ku bumfumu buende. Bituadije diba adi, bena Arame kabavua kabidi basue kuambuluisha bena Amone to." 
1Chronicles20:1 Ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu, — tshikondu tshitu bakalenga baya ku mvita, — Yowabe mfumu wa bena mvita, kuya ne tshiluilu tshia bena Izrayele, bua kunyanga buloba bua bena Amone, ne bua kuela tshimenga tshinene tshia Raba munkatshi. Kadi Davide uvua amu mushale mu Yerushalayime. Tshikondu atshi, Yowabe mfumu wa bena mvita, kukuata tshimenga tshia Raba, kutshibutula." 
1Chronicles20:2 Davide kuangata tshifulu tshia bukalenga tshivua ku mutu wa Milkome, mvidie wa bena Amone. Tshifulu atshi tshivua tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Tshivua ne bujitu bua kilo makumi asatu ne pa mutu. Nenku dibue dia mushinga mukole divua pa tshifulu apu, kudiasabu pa tshifulu tshia bukalenga tshia Davide. Mu tshimenga atshi bavua bapawule kabidi bintu bivule." 
1Chronicles20:3 Bena tshimenga bavua Davide mukuate muye nabu, kubebejaye midimu mikole ya kupanda mabaya, kusonga mabue ne ya kuupula mitshi. Nenku bena bimenga bikuabu bionsu bia bena Amone, Davide uvua ubenzeja midimu ya mushindu ewu. Pashishe Davide kupingana mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ne bena mvita bende bonsu." 
1Chronicles20:4 Pashishe bena Izrayele kuluisha bena Peleshete mu Ngezere. Mu mvita ayi, Sibkayi, wa mu tshimenga tshia Usha, kushipa Sipayi wa ku ndelanganyi ya bena Refayime. Bena Peleshete kufua bundu." 
1Chronicles20:5 Mu mvita mikuabu ivuabu baluisha bena Peleshete, Elanane, muana wa Yayire, kushipa Lami, muanabu ne Ngoliyate wamu tshimenga tshia Ngate. Mutshi wa musongolu uvua nawu Lami uvua munene bu mubambu wa kukuma nawu madiba." 
1Chronicles20:6 Kuluanganabu kabidi ku Ngate. Muluishi mukuabu uvua muaba awu, muntu wa kafiondu, muikale ne minu isambombu ku tshianza tshionsu ne bana ba nkasa basambombu ku dikasa dionsu. Bionsu bivua makumi abidi ne binayi. Muntu awu uvua pende wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arafa." 
1Chronicles20:7 Kupendaye bena Izrayele. Nenku Yonatane, muana wa Shama, muana wa muanabu ne Davide, kushipa muntu awu." 
1Chronicles20:8 Nanku, bena mvita aba ba bena Peleshete, ndelanganyi ya Arafa, muena Ngate, kubashipabu kudi Davide ne bena mvita bende." 
1Chronicles21:1 Dituku dikuabu, Satane kukeba mua kuenzela bena Izrayele bibi. Kufikishaye Davide ku dibadika dia bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles21:2 Mukalenga Davide kuambila Yowabe ne balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita bende ne: — Ndayi mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, kuinshi kua ditunga too ne ku mutu, nubadike bantu. Pashishe nupingane bua kummanyisha, bualu ndi musue kumanya bungi bua bantu bonsu." 
1Chronicles21:3 Yowabe kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, meme ndi musue Maweja-Nangila avudije bena Izrayele misangu nansha lukama! Lelu bonsu bakadi amu bakuenzela mudimu. Kadi tshiudi ujingila kumanya bungi buabu ntshinyi? Muudi musue kufikishisha bena Izrayele ku dibenga diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu mbishi?" 
1Chronicles21:4 Kadi bu muvua mukalenga mushidishe bualu, Yowabe kuenza amu tshivua mukalenga muambe. Yowabe kuendakana ditunga dijima dia Izrayele. Pashishe kupinganaye mu Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles21:5 Kumanyishaye Davide bungi bua bantu ne: bena Izrayele badi ne bantu 1.100.000 badi mua kuluangana mvita, bena Yuda ne bantu 470.000." 
1Chronicles21:6 Yowabe kawa mubadike tshisamba tshia bena Levi ne tshia bena Binyamine, pamue ne bisamba bikuabu to. Bualu diyi dia mukalenga kadivua dimusankisha nansha." 
1Chronicles21:7 Bivua Davide muenze bivua bibipile Mvidi Mukulu. Ke Mvidi Mukulu kunyoka bena Izrayele. 
1Chronicles21:8 Davide kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Pandi mubadike bena Izrayele, ndi muenze bibi bitambe. Ndi muenze bualu ebu, amu bu muntu udi kayi ne lungenyi! Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse." 
1Chronicles21:9 Nenku Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Ngade, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide, ne:" 
1Chronicles21:10 — Ndaku kudi Davide, umuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi nkufundila manyoka asatu, wewe usungule dindi mua kukunyoka.”" 
1Chronicles21:11 Muambi Ngade kuya kudi Davide, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Tshiudi usungula ntshinyi?" 
1Chronicles21:12 Udi musue ditunga diebe dishale mu tshiyole tshia nzala bidimu bisatu anyi? Udi musue kunyema baluishi bebe badi bakulondakaja ne muele ku bianza ngondu isatu anyi? Udi musue muele wa Mvidi Mukulu, disama dia tshiambu tshikole, dikengesha bena ditunga diebe matuku asatu anyi? Mutumibue wende neatangalaje disama edi mu ditunga diebe dijima dia Izrayele!” Ela meji bimpe, ungandamune tshindi mua kuya kuambila udi muntume." 
1Chronicles21:13 Davide kuandamuna ne: — Ndi munkatshi mua dikenga dikole… Kadi ndi musue kushala mu bianza bia Maweja-Nangila pa mutu pa kushala mu bianza bia bantu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmuena luse. 
1Chronicles21:14 Maweja-Nangila kutumina bena Izrayele tshipupu tshia disama dia tshiambu tshikole. Bena Izrayele kufua binunu makumi muanda mutekete. 
1Chronicles21:15 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kutuma mutumibue wende mu Yerushalayime bua kubutula kabidi tshimenga. Kadi Maweja-Nangila umona muvua mutumibue ubutula bantu, kubengaye bua mutumibue katungunuki. Kuambilaye mutumibue ne: — Mbimane kukumbana, puekesha tshianza! Diba adi, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila uvua pabuipi ne muaba uvua Omane, muena Yebusa, ushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
1Chronicles21:16 Davide uvua umona mutumibue, uvua ubutula bantu, muimane pankatshi pa diulu ne buloba, mutume muele wende luseke lua Yerushalayime. Davide ne bakulu ba ditunga bavua bavuale bilamba bia madilu, batue mpala panshi." 
1Chronicles21:17 Davide kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Meme ke uvua mutume diyi bua babadike bantu. Nenku meme ndi muenze bibi, ndi muenze tshilema! Bantu aba kabena benza bualu bubi to. Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, unnyoke meme ne bena diku dianyi, pa mutu pa kunyoka bantu bebe." 
1Chronicles21:18 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuambila Ngade ne: — Ambila Davide aye mu tshituilu mudi Omane ushipuila ntete ya kuenza bukula. Ashilemu Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu. 
1Chronicles21:19 Davide kuya muaba awu, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumutumine diyi kudi muambi wende Ngade." 
1Chronicles21:20 Omane uvua ushipula ntete ya bukula. Omane ukudimuka, kumona mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bana bende banayi bavua nende, bakavua baye kusokoma." 
1Chronicles21:21 Davide kuya kuvua Omane. Kadi Omane umona amu Davide, kumukaye mu tshituilu, kufika kuvua mukalenga Davide, kutua mpala panshi." 
1Chronicles21:22 Davide kumuamba ne: — Nsumbisha muaba udi tshituilu tshiebe. Ndi musue kuibakamu tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, bua kujikija tshipupu tshidi tshibuela mu bantu. Tshinsumbisha, nenkupeshe mushinga watshi mujima." 
1Chronicles21:23 Omane kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, enza muudi musue, wangate tshionsu tshiudi natshi dijinga. Ke ngombe yanyi eyi, ndi nkupeshayi bua wewe kulambula. Ke matempu aa bua wewe kupeta bia kuosha nabi, kabidi ne ntete ya bukula bua mulambu wa bia pa madimi. Ndi nkupeshabi bionsu." 
1Chronicles21:24 Kadi mukalenga Davide kubenga, wamba ne: — Kumpeshi tshintu nansha tshimue tshianana. Ndi musue kubisumba. Ndi nkufuta amu mushinga wabi mujima. Tshiena ndambula Maweja-Nangila bintu biebe, bualu tshiena mua kumulambula milambu indi tshiyi mutudile mushinga!" 
1Chronicles21:25 Davide kumufuta nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkama isambombu bua kusumba muaba awu. 
1Chronicles21:26 Davide kuashila Maweja-Nangila tshilambuilu muaba awu. Kuambulaye Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue. Pashishe kutuadijaye kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Maweja-Nangila kuteleja Davide, kumutumina kapia. Kuoshaku milambu ivua pa tshilambuilu." 
1Chronicles21:27 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kuambila mutumibue wende bua apingaje muele mu tshibubu. 
1Chronicles21:28 Davide uvua mumone ne: Maweja-Nangila uvua muteleje dilomba diende mu tshituilu tshia Omane, muena Yebusa. Nenku ukavua utungunuka amu ne dilambula milambu misangu mivule mu tshituilu amu." 
1Chronicles21:29 Mu tshikondu atshi, nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, uvua Moshe muibake mu tshipela, ne tshilambuilu tshia milambu, bivua pa muaba wa tshijila pa mukuna wa Ngibone." 
1Chronicles21:30 Kadi Davide kawa mua kuya mu mukuna emu bua kukonka Maweja-Nangila malu to, bualu muele wa mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila uvua umukuatshisha bowa." 
1Chronicles22:1 Ke pavua Davide wamba ne: “Nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi apa. Monayi tshilambuilu tshidi bena Izrayele ne bua kulambuila milambu yabu.” 
1Chronicles22:2 Davide kukungija benyi bonsu bavua base mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele. Kubapeshaye mudimu wa kusonga mabue a kuibaka nawu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
1Chronicles22:3 Davide kulongolola kabidi biamu bifike bia bungi bua kuenza nabi misumadi, biibi ne nkanu. Kusangishaye kabidi biamu bikunze bia bungi kabiyi kubala." 
1Chronicles22:4 Bena Sidone ne bena Tire kumutuadila mitshi ya sedre ya bungi. 
1Chronicles22:5 Davide uvua wamba ne: “Shelomu wanyi utshidi muana mukese, kena muanji kujingulula bimpe mudi panu. Kadi nzubu wa kuashila Maweja-Nangila udi ne bua kuikala ne lumu mu matunga onsu, bualu kabena mua kumupita nansha ne nku bunene nansha ne nku lumu. Ke mundi musue kulongolola bintu bua kuibaka nabi nzubu ewu. ” Ke muvua Davide mulongolole nanku bintu bia bungi bia kuibaka nabi, bangabanga ne lufu luende." 
1Chronicles22:6 Davide kubikidisha muanende Shelomu, kumuambila bua kuibakaye nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles22:7 Kumuambilaye ne: — Muananyi, mvua ne dijinga dia kuibakila Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nzubu wa tshijila." 
1Chronicles22:8 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kubenga, kungambila ne: “Wewe uvua mupite kuela mashi a bantu panshi mu mvita minene iudi muluangane. Bua mashi adi mapueke panshi kumpala kuanyi, ki nguewe wangashila nzubu udibu bavua kuntendelela." 
1Chronicles22:9 Kadi neulele muana wa balume. Neikale muntu udi ukeba bupole. Tshiakuanyisha bua baluishi bende badi bamunyungulukila bamutatshishe. Nebamuinyike dina dia Shelomu, — mmumue ne: ‘Bupole’. — Bualu matuku ashalaye mu bukalenga, nempeshe bena Izrayele bupole, kabayi mua kutshina tshintu." 
1Chronicles22:10 Yeye ke wangashila nzubu. Yeye neikale muananyi wa balume, meme nengikale Tatuende. Meme ne-nshindike bukalenga buende mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele. ”" 
1Chronicles22:11 Nanku, muananyi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, ikale nebe, bua umone mua kumuashila nzubu, bu muvuaye mulaye bualu buebe." 
1Chronicles22:12 Mvidi Mukulu akupeshe disunguluja dia malu ne lungenyi, padiye ukupesha bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, bua umone mua kuitaba ku mikenji yende." 
1Chronicles22:13 Paudi unemeka, witaba kabidi meyi ende ne mikandu, bivuaye mupeshe Moshe bua kuambila bena Izrayele, newikale ne diakalenga mu bionsu biwenza. Wewe, kolesha muoyi, ikala ne dikima, kutshinyi, kuzakadi." 
1Chronicles22:14 Ndi muenze muonsu mua kuenza bua kusangisha mpawungi mupite bungi, kilo binunu bitoto bisatu, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshipite pa binunu bitoto makumi asatu, kabidi ne tshiamu tshikunze ne tshifike, bungi kabuyi kubala, amu bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ndi mumane kulongolola mitshi ne mabue. Udi mua kusakidila bintu bikuabu." 
1Chronicles22:15 Newikale ne bena mudimu ba mishindu yonsu: badi bamanye mua kusonga mabue, badi bamanye kupanda mabaya, nansha bamanyi bapiluke ba midimu yonsu." 
1Chronicles22:16 Udi ne mpawungi mipite bungi, biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, biamu bikunze ne bifike. Nenku mbimpe utuadije mudimu. Maweja-Nangila neikale nebe." 
1Chronicles22:17 Pashishe Davide kuambila bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele bua kuambuluishabu muanende Shelomu. Uvua ubambila ne: 
1Chronicles22:18 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kena nenu anyi? Katshia Mvidi Mukulu wafila bena ditunga edi mu bianza bianyi, nuakapeta bupole nseke yenu yonsu. Mpindiewu badi ku bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila ne bua bantu bende." 
1Chronicles22:19 Nenku, mpindiewu enzayi muenu muonsu bua kumanya tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wenu musue. Tuadijayi kuashila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu muaba wa tshijila. Nutekemu mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila ne bintu bia tshijila bia Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles23:1 Mukalenga Davide mumane kukulakaja, kusungulaye muanende wa balume Shelomu bua ikale mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles23:2 Pashishe kubikidishaye bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele, kubikidisha kabidi batuangaji ne bena Levi bonsu." 
1Chronicles23:3 Kubalabu bantu bakulumpe ba bena Levi ku umue ku umue, bavua ne bidimu makumi asatu ne pa mutu. Bungi buabu buvua binunu makumi asatu ne muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles23:4 Davide kusungula munkatshi muabu, bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binayi, bua bikale baludika midimu idibu benza ku nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Kusungulaye kabidi bantu binunu bisambombu bua bikale balongolola malu muaba awu, bakosa nsambu." 
1Chronicles23:5 Kusungulaye kabidi bantu binunu binayi bua bikale balama biibi, binunu binayi bikuabu bua bikale batumbisha Maweja-Nangila ne biombelu bivua Davide muenzeje bua kumutumbisha nabi." 
1Chronicles23:6 Kutapululaye bena Levi mu bisumbu bishilangane, bilondeshile mu meku abu: dia Ngershone, dia Kekate ne dia Merari. Bonsu basatu bavua bana ba balume ba Levi." 
1Chronicles23:7 Bana ba balume ba Ngershone bavua: Ladane ne Shimeyi. 
1Chronicles23:8 Ladane uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: Yekiyele, muanabute, Zetame ne Yowele." 
1Chronicles23:9 Shimeyi uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: Shelomite, Aziyele ne Arane. Bobu ke bavua bamfumu ba meku avua mafumine kudi Ladane." 
1Chronicles23:10 Shimeyi uvua ne bana bakuabu banayi: Yakate, Ziza, Yewushe ne Beriya." 
1Chronicles23:11 Yakate uvua muanabute, Ziza muana muibidi. Yewushe ne Beriya kabavua balela bana ba bungi to. Ke padibu bababala bu diku dimue." 
1Chronicles23:12 Kekate uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Amrame, Ishare, Ebrone ne Uziyele." 
1Chronicles23:13 Bana ba Amrame badi: Arone ne Moshe. Arone ne ndelanganyi yende, bavua babajidila bua bikale benza mudimu kashidi muaba wa tshijila menemene. Bavua ne bua kulambula milambu ya manananshi, kuenzela Mvidi Mukulu midimu, kuela bantu lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles23:14 Moshe uvua muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bana bende bavua amu bu mudi bena tshisamba tshia Levi bonsu. 
1Chronicles23:15 Bana ba balume ba Moshe badi: Ngershone ne Eliyezere. 
1Chronicles23:16 Muana wa balume wa Ngershone ke Shebuwele muanabute. 
1Chronicles23:17 Eliyezere uvua ne muana wa balume umue: Rekabiya. Kavua ne bana bakuabu to. Kadi Rekabiya uvua ne ndelanganyi ya bungi. 
1Chronicles23:18 Ishare uvua ne muanabute, dina diende Shelomite." 
1Chronicles23:19 Bana ba balume ba Ebrone badi: Yeriya muanabute, muibidi Amariya, muisatu Yaziyele, ne muinayi Yekamame." 
1Chronicles23:20 Bana ba balume ba Uziyele bavua babidi: Mika ne Ishiya. 
1Chronicles23:21 Bana ba balume ba Merari badi: Mali ne Mushi. Mali uvua ne bana ba balume babidi: Elazare ne Kishe. 
1Chronicles23:22 Elazare kufua, kayi mulele bana ba balume. Uvua amu ne bana ba bakaji. Kuselabu bana abu kudi bana ba muanabu Kishe." 
1Chronicles23:23 Mushi uvua ne bana ba balume basatu: ke Mali, Edere ne Yeremote." 
1Chronicles23:24 Eyi ke ndelanganyi ya Levi. Bavua bamfumu ba meku abu. Bavua bafunde mena abu mu mikanda yabu, ku muntu ku muntu. Bobu bamane kukumbaja bidimu makumi abidi, bavua ne bua kuenza mudimu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles23:25 Bualu Davide uvua muambe ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele uvua mupeshe bantu bende bupole. Yeye muine udi ushala kashidi mu Yerushalayime. 
1Chronicles23:26 Nenku bena Levi kabena ne bua kuambula kabidi ntenta wa kusambakena ne bintu bionsu bia mudimu wa kutendelela to.” 
1Chronicles23:27 Ke kufundabu mena a bena Levi bavua bakumbaja bidimu makumi abidi mu mikanda, bu muvua Davide muambe." 
1Chronicles23:28 Bavua babalombola kudi ndelanganyi ya Arone mu midimu yabu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ya mu lubanza, ya mu bibambalu bidi ku nseke kua nzubu. Bavua basukula ngesu ne malongu bia tshijila, bakumbaja midimu misunguluke ya mu muaba wa tshijila." 
1Chronicles23:29 Bavua bosha mampa a tshijila a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu, balongolola bukula bua mulambu wa bia pa madimi, — benza tukata tupepele katuyi tuela buanga, ne mikata mikanga pa tshitata, nansha bintu bisheme bikuabu. — Bavua bakenketa bipimu bia buwudi, nansha bia bule." 
1Chronicles23:30 Bavua amu muaba awu dinda ne dilolu bua kutumbisha ne kusamuna Maweja-Nangila," 
1Chronicles23:31 nangananga misangu yonsu idibu bamulambula milambu ya kuosha, dituku dia Dikisha, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, nansha matuku makuabu a bibilu. Diba dionsu badi ne bua kukumbaja midimu yabu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bantu bikale bungi bukumbane buvuabu babafundile." 
1Chronicles23:32 Nebalame bimpe ntenta wa kusambakena ne muaba wa tshijila. Bana babu bakuabu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone nebashale ne mudimu wa mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. 
1Chronicles24:1 Ndelanganyi ya Arone ivua mitapulula mu bisumbu. Arone uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Nadabe, Abiku, Elazare ne itamare." 
1Chronicles24:2 Nadabe ne Abiku kufua tatuabu mutshikale ne muoyi, kabayi balela bana ba balume. Nanku Elazare ne Itamare nkayabu kushala benza mudimu wa butuangaji." 
1Chronicles24:3 Pashishe Sadoke, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Elazare, ne Akimeleke, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Itamare, kuambuluisha Davide bua kutapulula batuangaji mu bisumbu, bilondeshile midimu idibu bakuate." 
1Chronicles24:4 Kumonabu ne: bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Elazare bavua bapite ba ku ndelanganyi ya Itamare ku bungi. Nanku kutapululabu ndelanganyi ya Elazare mu bisumbu dikumi ne bisambombu, ndelanganyi ya Itamare mu bisumbu muanda mukulu, bonsu bikale ne bamfumu ku tshisumbu tshionsu." 
1Chronicles24:5 Bavua batshinka pa kutapulula tshisumbu tshionsu. Bualu munkatshi mua ndelanganyi ya Elazare ne mua Itamare muvua “balombodi bajidile” ne “balombodi ba Mvidi Mukulu. ” 
1Chronicles24:6 Shemaya, muana wa Netaneyele, wa mu diku dia Levi, ke uvua mufundi. Uvua ufunda mena abu kumpala kua mukalenga, kua bamfumu, kua mutuangaji Sadoke, ne kua Akimeleke, muana wa Abiyatare, ne kua bamfumu ba meku a bena Levi, ne a batuangaji. Bavua batshinka misangu ibidi milondangane bua diku dia Elazare, musangu umue bua diku dia Itamare." 
1Chronicles24:7 Mena a bamfumu ba bisamba avuabu bapeta pa kutshinka avua nenku: 
1Chronicles24:8 1. Yoyaribe, 2. Yedaya, 3. Arime, 4. Seyorime, 5. Malkiya, 6. Miyamine, 7. Akose, 8. Abiya, 9. Yeshuwa, 10. Shekanya, 11. Eliyashibe, 12. Yakime, 13. Upa, 14. Yeshebabe, 15. Bilga, 16. Imere, 17. Ezire, 18. Apisese, 19. Petakiya, 20. Yezekiyele, 21. Yakine, 22. Ngamule, 23. Delaya, 24. Maaziya." 
1Chronicles24:9 Bisumbu bionsu bivua bikumbaja mudimu wa mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mushindu udibu balondangane kulu eku. Bavua bakumbaja midimu yabu amu bu muvua nkambua wabu Arone mubambile mikenji iwaye mupete kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
1Chronicles24:10 Ndelanganyi mikuabu ya Levi idi nenku: Shubayele uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Amrame, Yediya wa ku ndelanganyi ya Shubayele." 
1Chronicles24:11 Ishiya muanabute wa diku diabu, uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Rekabiya." 
1Chronicles24:12 Shelomote uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Ishare, Yakate uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Shelomote." 
1Chronicles24:13 Bana ba balume ba Ebrone badi nenku: Yeriya, muanabute, muibidi Amariya, muisatu Yaziyele, ne muinayi Yekamame." 
1Chronicles24:14 Uziyele uvua ne muana wa balume, dina diende Mika. Shamire uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Mika." 
1Chronicles24:15 Zekarya uvua wa ku ndelanganyi ya Ishiya muanabute wa Mika. 
1Chronicles24:16 Bana ba balume ba Merari bavua: Mali, Mushi ne Yaziya." 
1Chronicles24:17 Ndelanganyi ya Yaziya, muana wa Merari, idi: Shokame, Zakure ne Ibri." 
1Chronicles24:18 Mali uvua ne muana wa balume, dina diende Elazare. Kadi Elazare kawa ne muana wa balume to." 
1Chronicles24:19 Kishe uvua ne muana wa balume, dina diende Yerameyele." 
1Chronicles24:20 Bana ba balume ba Mushi badi: Mali, Edere ne Yerimote. Eyi ke ndelanganyi ya levi bilondeshile meku abu." 
1Chronicles24:21 Ndelanganyi ya Levi eyi, amu bu mudi bana babu, ndelanganyi ya Arone, bavua batshinka, kumpala kua mukalenga Davide, kua Sadoke, kua Akimeleke ne kumpala kua bamfumu ba meku a batuangaji ne a bena Levi, bua kumanya dilondangana dia midimu yabu ayi. Nanku diku dia muanabute divua dipeta mudimu, mushindu wa mumue ne dia muanaʼaʼmukala." 
1Chronicles25:1 Bavua bambuluisha Davide kudi bamfumu ba bisumbu bivua bitangila mudimu wa butendeledi, bua kusungula bena mudimu wa butendeledi awu. Ke ndelanganyi ya Ashafe, ya Emane, ne ya Yedutune. Ndelanganyi eyi ivua imanyisha malu a Mvidi Mukulu, imba misambu ne lunzenze, lunkombe ne ndibu. Mena abu avua nenku:" 
1Chronicles25:2 Bana ba balume ba Ashafe: ke Zakure, Yozefe, Netaniya ne Asharela. Tatuabu ke uvua ulombola tshisumbu tshiabu, ubamanyisha malu a Mvidi Mukulu, wimba ne misambu, muvua mukalenga mubafundile." 
1Chronicles25:3 Bana ba Yedutune: ke Ngedaliya, Seri, Yeshaya, Shimeyi, Ashabiya ne Matitiya. Tatuabu ke uvua ubalombola bonsu basambombu. Uvua ubamanyisha malu a Mvidi Mukulu, wimba misambu ne lunzenze, utumbisha Maweja-Nangila, umusamuna kabidi." 
1Chronicles25:4 Bana ba Emane: ke Bukiya, Mataniya, Uziyele, Shebuwele, Yerimote, Ananiya, Anani, Eliyata, Ngidalti, Romameti-Ezere, Yoshebekasha, Maloti, Otire, Makaziyote." 
1Chronicles25:5 Bana bonsu aba bavua ba Emane. Emane uvua ne mudimu wa kuambila mukalenga bivua Mvidi Mukulu mumumanyishe, bua kutumbisha bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mupeshe Emane bana ba balume dikumi ne banayi, ne ba bakaji basatu." 
1Chronicles25:6 Bantu bonsu aba bavua bimba misambu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila ne bisanji biabu: ndibu, nkombe ne nzenze. Bavua baludika bisumbu ebi kudi batatuabu. Bavua benza mudimu wabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, babalombola kudi Ashafe, Yedutune ne Emane, bu muvua mukalenga mubafundile." 
1Chronicles25:7 Bena misambu bavua bamanye misambu bimpe abu, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu bisumbu biabu, bavuabu balongesha mua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila ne misambu, bavua nkama ibidi makumi muanda mukulu ne muanda mukulu." 
1Chronicles25:8 Bua kumanya dilondangana diabu ku mudimu, bavua batshinka, kabayi batangila dishilangana didi pankatshi pa bana ne bakulumpe, nansha pankatshi pa bakadi bamanye ne batshidi batuadija kulonga." 
1Chronicles26:1 Bisumbu bia balami ba biibi bivua nenku: Meshelemiya, muana wa Kora, muikulu wa Abiyashafe, wa mu diku dia Kora," 
1Chronicles26:2 uvua ne bana ba balume muanda mutekete. Bavua balondangane nenku: Zekarya, Yediyayele, Zebadya, Yatniyele," 
1Chronicles26:3 Elame, Yowanane ne Eliyokenayi." 
1Chronicles26:4 Bana ba balume ba Obede-Edome bavua muanda mukulu, balondangane nenku: Shemaya, Yozabade, Yowa, Sakare, Netaneyele," 
1Chronicles26:5 Amiyele, Isakare ne Pewultayi. Nenku Mvidi Mukulu uvua muele Obede-Edome lupemba bikole." 
1Chronicles26:6 Shemaya, muanabute wa Obede-Edome, uvua ne bana ba balume bavua ne mianzu misunguluke mu diku diabu, bualu bavua bantu ba mushinga." 
1Chronicles26:7 Bana ba balume ba Shemaya bavua nenku: Otni, Refayele, Obede ne Elzabade, kabidi ne bana babu bakuabu: Eliku ne Semakya. Babidi aba bavua bantu ba lumu." 
1Chronicles26:8 Ndelanganyi ya Obede-Edome, ne bana babu balela, ne bana babu bakuabu, bavua bantu makumi asambombu ne babidi. Bonsu bantu ba mushinga, kabidi benji ba mudimu." 
1Chronicles26:9 Bana ba Meshelemiya, ne bana babu, bavua dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bantu ba mushinga mukole." 
1Chronicles26:10 Osha wa mu diku dia Merari, uvua ne bana ba balume banayi: Shimri, mukulu wa diku (kawa muanabute to, kadi tatuende uvua mumupeshe muanzu awu), —" 
1Chronicles26:11 muana muibidi Ilkiya, muisatu Tebaliya, ne muinayi Zekarya. Bana ba Osha, pamue ne bana babu, bavua bantu dikumi ne basatu." 
1Chronicles26:12 Bena bisumbu bia balami ba biibi abi ne bamfumu babu, bavua benza mudimu wabu pamue mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles26:13 Bavua batshinka bua kutapululangana biibi bia kulama, bilondeshile meku abu, kabayi basungula ne aba mbakulumpe, nansha ne aba mbana." 
1Chronicles26:14 Pavuabu batshinka, kupeshabu Shelemiya tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Muanende Zekarya, muntu wa meji, mufidi wa ngenyi milenga, kumupeshabu tshiibi tshia luseke lua ku mutu." 
1Chronicles26:15 Obede-Edome ke uvua mupete bulami bua tshiibi tshia luseke lua kuinshi. Bana bende bavua balama bilaminu bia bintu. 
1Chronicles26:16 Shupime ne Osha bavua balama tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ne tshiibi tshia Shaleketa, tshidi tshitangilangane ne tshibandabanda. Balami bavua babanyangana midimu mu bisumbu mushindu ewu:" 
1Chronicles26:17 ku dituku dionsu, bena Levi basambombu bavua balama ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila; bantu banayi ku dituku, ku tshiibi tshia ku mutu; bantu banayi ku dituku, ku tshiibi tshia ku luseke lua kuinshi. Bisumbu bibidi bia bantu, babidi babidi ku tshisumbu, bavua balama bilaminu bia bintu." 
1Chronicles26:18 Kadi bua kulama tshibambalu tshivua tshilamakaja ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, luseke ludi diba dibuelela, bavua bateka bantu banayi ku njila, bantu babidi mu tshibambalu." 
1Chronicles26:19 Ke muvua bisumbu bia balami ba biibi ba mu diku dia Kora, ne dia Merari, bavuabu bangate ku mudimu nanku." 
1Chronicles26:20 Bena Levi bakuabu bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bibutshilu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bintu bia tshijila bivuabu balambula Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles26:21 Ndelanganyi ya Ladane, ya mu diku dia Ngershone, bamfumu ba meku abu, bavua: Yekiyeli," 
1Chronicles26:22 kabidi ne Zetame ne muanabu Yowele, bana ba balume ba Yekiyeli. Bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bibutshilu bia mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles26:23 Bua bena diku dia Amrame, dia Ishare, dia Ebrone ne dia Uziyele," 
1Chronicles26:24 Shebuwele wa ku ndelanganyi ya Ngershone, muana wa balume wa Moshe, uvua mulombodi, muikale ku mutu kua balami ba bibutshilu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles26:25 Ku bena diku diabu kuvua ndelanganyi ya Eliyezere, muanabu ne Ngershone: ke Rekabiya, muana wa Eliyezere, pashishe Yeshaya, Yorame, Zibri ne Shelomite." 
1Chronicles26:26 Shelomite ne bana babu, bavua batangile bintu bivuabu bajidile mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu kudi mukalenga Davide, kudi bamfumu ba meku, kudi balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese bia bena mvita, ne kudi balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita." 
1Chronicles26:27 Bantu aba bavua bajidile tshitupa tshia bintu bipawula mu mvita, bua midimu ya nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles26:28 Bintu bionsu bivua muambi Samuwele, Shawule, muana wa Kishe, Abnere, muana wa Nere, ne Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, bajidile mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, bavua babitangile kabidi kudi Shelomite ne bana babu." 
1Chronicles26:29 Kenaniya ne bana bende, ba mu diku dia Ishare, bavua balombodi ba malu a mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, bikale kabidi bandumbulula." 
1Chronicles26:30 Ashabiya ne bantu ba bukitu tshinunu ne nkama muanda mutekete, ba mu diku dia Ebrone, bavua batangila buloba bua Izrayele, buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela, lua Yardene. Bavua bakenketa malu onsu, ne avua atangila Mvidi Mukulu, ne avua atangila ditunga." 
1Chronicles26:31 Yeriya uvua mfumu wa diku dia Ebrone. Davide mumane kulala bidimu makumi anayi mu bukalenga, bavua batuadija kukeba mua kumanya dilondangana dia bankambua ba diku dia Ebrone. Bavua basangana bantu ba bukitu mu Yazere wa mu Ngilaade, bavua bena diku edi." 
1Chronicles26:32 Ke mukalenga Davide kusungula bantu binunu bibidi ne nkama muanda mutekete, ba mu diku dia Ebrone, bonsu bikale bamfumu ba meku, bua balongolole malu a Mvidi Mukulu ne a ditunga pamue ne Yeriya, mu buloba bua tshisamba tshia Rubene, bua tshia Ngade, ne bua tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe, tshivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua musulu wa Yardene." 
1Chronicles27:1 Tudi tutela mpindiewu mena a bena Izrayele bavua benza mudimu kua mukalenga Davide: bamfumu ba meku, balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese bia tshiluilu, ne baludiki ba ditunga. Bavua balongolola midimu ya bisumbu bia bena mvita, bua bikale benza mudimu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu ngondu umue. Tshisumbu tshionsu tshivua ne bantu binunu makumi abidi ne binayi." 
1Chronicles27:2 Bamfumu bavua babalombola bavua nenku: Ngondu wa kumpala: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi: Yashobame, muana wa Yabdiyele, wa mu diku dia Perese, uvua ulombola tshisangilu tshia bamfumu ba bena mvita ngondu awu. Ngondu muibiidi: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Dodayi, muena Akowa; bavua bamuambuluisha kudi mulombodi wa bena mvita Miklote. Ngondu muisatu: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Benaya, muana wa mutuangaji munene Yoyada, uvua wa mu “Tshisumbu tshia bantu Makumi asatu.” Benaya mumane kupeta muanzu wa mfumu mu “Tshisumbu tshia bantu Makumi asatu,” Amizabade, muanende, kumupingana mu bulombodi bua bena tshisumbu tshia bena mvita ba mu ngondu awu. Ngondu muinayi: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Ashayele, muanabu ne Yowabe. Muanende Zebadya wakamupingana. Ngondu muitanu: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Shamute, wa mu diku dia Izra. Ngondu muisambombu: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Ira, muana wa Ikeshe, wa mu Tekowa. Ngondu wa muanda mutekete: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Elese, wa mu Palone, wa mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime. Ngondu wa muanda mukulu: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Sibkayi wa mu Usha, wa mu diku dia Zera. Ngondu wa tshitema: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Abiyezere, wa mu Anatote, wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine. Ngondu wa dikumi: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Marayi, wa mu Netofa, wa mu diku dia Zera. Ngondu wa dikumi ne umue: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Benaya, wa mu Piratone, wa mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime. Ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi: bavua balombola bena mvita kudi Eldayi, wa mu Netofa, wa mu diku dia Otniyele." 
1Chronicles27:3 Bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele bavua nenku: Tshisamba tshia Rubene: Eliyezere, muana wa Zikri. Tshisamba tshia Shimeyone: Shefatya, muana wa Maaka." 
1Chronicles27:4 Tshisamba tshia Levi: Ashabiya, muana wa Kemuwele. Mfumu wa ndelanganyi ya Arone: Sadoke." 
1Chronicles27:5 Tshisamba tshia Yuda: Eliku, muanabu ne Davide. Tshisamba tshia Isakare: Omri, muana wa Mikayele." 
1Chronicles27:6 Tshisamba tshia Zebulone: Ishemaya, muana wa Obadya. Tshisamba tshia Naftali: Yerimote, muana wa Azriyele." 
1Chronicles27:7 Tshisamba tshia Efrayime: Osheya, muana wa Azaziya. Tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe tshidi ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Yardene: Yowele, muana wa Pedaya." 
1Chronicles27:8 Tshitupa tshia tshisamba tshia Menashe tshidi ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, tshivua tshisomba mu Ngilaade: Ido, muana wa Zekarya. Tshisamba tshia Binyamine: Yashiyele, muana wa Abnere." 
1Chronicles27:9 Tshisamba tshia Dane: Azarele, muana wa Yerowame. Ke muvua bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele nanku." 
1Chronicles27:10 Mukalenga Davide kavua mubadike bansongalume ba bena Izrayele bavua ne bidimu bishadile ku makumi abidi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mudianjile kumanyisha ne: neavudije bena Izrayele bungi bu mitotu ya kulu. 
1Chronicles27:11 Yowabe, muana wa Seruya, ukavua mutuadije kubadika bena Izrayele, kadi kavua mujikije mudimu ewu to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mufikile bena Izrayele munda bua mudimu ewu. Nenku ke padibu kabayi bafunde bungi bua bena Izrayele mu mukanda udibu babikila ne Mukanda wa malu menza kudi mukalenga Davide." 
1Chronicles27:12 Azmavete, muana wa Adiyele, uvua mutangidi wa mpetu ya bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Yonatane, muana wa Oziyase, uvua mutangidi wa bibutshilu bionsu bia mu ditunga, nansha bia mu bimenga, nansha bia mu misoku, ne bia mu bibumba muvuabu bateke batentekedi." 
1Chronicles27:13 Ezri, muana wa Kelube, uvua mutangidi wa bonsu bavua benza mudimu wa budimi mu ditunga." 
1Chronicles27:14 Shimeyi wa mu Rama, uvua mutangidi wa madimi onsu a mvinyo. Zabdi wa mu Shefame, uvua mutangidi wa bibutshilu bionsu bia maluvu a mvinyo." 
1Chronicles27:15 Baale-Anane wa Bete-Ngedere, uvua mutangidi wa madimi a mitshi ya olive ne ya sikomore, avua mu mpata. Yowashe uvua mutangidi wa miaba idibu bateka mafuta." 
1Chronicles27:16 Shitrayi, wa mu Sarone, uvua mutangidi wa ngombe ivua idia mu mpata, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Sarone. Shafate, muana wa Adlayi, uvua mutangidi wa ngombe ivua mu mpata mikuabu." 
1Chronicles27:17 Obile, muena Ishemayele, uvua utangila nyama ya tumelu. Yediya wa mu Meronote, uvua ulama nyama ya mpunde mikaji." 
1Chronicles27:18 Yazize, muena mu Agri, uvua ulama bisumbu bia mikoku ne bia mbuji. Aba bonsu ke bavua balombola balami ba bintu bia mukalenga Davide." 
1Chronicles27:19 Yonatane, mansebende wa Davide, uvua muntu wa lungenyi, mulonge malu mavule. Ke uvua mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga Davide. Yekiyele, muana wa muena Akmoni, ke uvua mulongeshi wa bana ba mukalenga Davide." 
1Chronicles27:20 Akitofele uvua kabidi mufidi wa ngenyi wa mukalenga. Ushayi, muena Arki, uvua mulunda wa mfumu, wenda nende miaba yonsu." 
1Chronicles27:21 Yoyada, muana wa Benaya, ne Abiyatare, ke bavua bapingana Akitofele mu mudimu awu. Yowabe uvua mfumu mulombodi wa tshiluilu tshia bukalenga." 
1Chronicles28:1 Mukalenga Davide kukungija bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele mu Yerushalayime: bamfumu ba bisamba, balombodi ba midimu misanga ya mu bukalenga, balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese bia bena mvita, balombodi ba balami ba madimi, mpangu ne nzubu, ne bisumbu bia nyama ya mukalenga ne ya bana bende, bantu banene ba mu lubanza lua bukalenga, bena mvita ba bukitu, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu ba mushinga." 
1Chronicles28:2 Mukalenga Davide kuimana munkatshi muabu, ubambila ne: — Nuenu bantu banyi ne balunda banyi bonsu, ntelejayi. Mvua musue kuasa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kutekamu mushete wa ndondu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu, muaba udiye udiatshila. Mvua mumane kulongolola bionsu bia kuenza nabi mudimu ewu." 
1Chronicles28:3 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kunkandika ne: “Wewe kuakungashila nzubu udi bantu ne bua kuvua kuntendelela, bualu wewe udi muluangane mvita, kabidi muele mashi a bungi panshi.”" 
1Chronicles28:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele uvua munsungule munkatshi mua bena diku dia tatu wanyi, bua meme ne ndelanganyi yanyi tushale mu bukalenga kashidi mu Izrayele. Ku kale, uvua musungule tshisamba tshia bena Yuda bua tshikale tshisamba tshia bukalenga. Pashishe mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda, wakasungula diku dia tatuanyi. Munkatshi mua bana ba balume ba tatuanyi, kunsungulaye bua nshale mukalenga wa bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele." 
1Chronicles28:5 Mpindiewu udi usungula muana wa balume mu bana banyi bavule bavuaye mumpeshe bua ampingane, adie bukalenga bua Izrayele mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles28:6 Mvidi Mukulu wakabambila ne: “Muanebe wa balume Shelomu neangashile nzubu wanyi ne lutanda luende. Yeye ke undi musungule. Neikale muananyi, ne meme nengikale tatuende." 
1Chronicles28:7 Nenshindike bukalenga buende kashidi, padiye ulama meyi anyi, bu mudiye wenza matuku aa. ”" 
1Chronicles28:8 Nenku, nuenu balunda banyi, bena Izrayele bonsu, tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila tshituilangane, kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi mututeleje nenu, nulaye bua kulonga bimpe mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, ne bua kuyilama yonsu. Nenku nenupiane ditunga dimpe dinudi mpindiewu, nenudishile ne ndelanganyi yenu kashidi." 
1Chronicles28:9 “Wewe, muananyi, Shelomu, ukebe mua kumanya bimpe Mvidi Mukulu, undi muenzele mudimu. Umutendelele ne muoyi webe mujima, kuyi wabakana, kabidi ne lungenyi luebe luonsu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi umona mu mioyi ya bantu, udi kabidi usunguluja meji adibu bela. Paudi umukeba, udi udileja kuudi. Kadi paudi umubenga, udi ukulekela kashidi." 
1Chronicles28:10 Mpindiewu, udi mumone mudi Maweja-Nangila mukusungule bua wewe kumuashila nzubu, bua ikale muaba wende wa tshijila. Nenku, kolesha muoyi, ubange amu mudimu ewu.”" 
1Chronicles28:11 Pashishe, Davide kupesha Shelomu dibeji divuabu bazola mushindu wa kuasa muaba wa tshijila, ne bibambalu bidi bilamikaku, — bibambalu bia kubutshila mpetu, bibambalu bia kulu, nansha bia munda, — ne tshibambalu tshia kuteka mushete wa ndondu." 
1Chronicles28:12 Davide kupesha kabidi Shelomu dibeji di-vuaye muzole lubanza lua ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bibambalu bivua binyungulula lubanza alu, bibambalu bivuabu ne bua kutekela bintu bia kukuata nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bikuabu bivuabu ne bua kutekela milambu ya kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles28:13 Davide kupesha Shelomu mukanda udi uleja bisumbu bia mena a batuangaji, ne bia mena a bena Levi, kabidi mukanda udi uleja midimu ya kuenza mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ne mukanda wa bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu wa butendeledi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles28:14 Davide kumuleja bujitu bua mpawungi budiye mua kuangata bua tshintu tshionsu tshia mpawungi tshidibu ne bua kufula, kumuleja kabidi bujitu bua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole budiye mua kuangata bua tshintu tshionsu tshia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshidibu ne bua kufula. Uvua mumuleje bionsu abi ne mudimu wa kuenza ne tshintu tshionsu." 
1Chronicles28:15 Ke muvuaye uleja bujitu bua bitekelu bia miendu, ne miendu mene bia mpawungi, bujitu bua bitekelu bia miendu, ne bua miendu mene bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole," 
1Chronicles28:16 bujitu bua mesa a mpawungi a kutekela mampa a tshijila, bua mesa a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole," 
1Chronicles28:17 bujitu bua nkala ya kusabula nayi munyinyi, bua malonga a kumiamina nawu, ne bua makopu a mpawungi menemene, ne a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
1Chronicles28:18 Kulejaye bujitu bua mpawungi menemene, bua tshilambuilu tshia mulambu wa manananshi. Pashishe kumupeshaye dibeji divuaye muzole bua kuleja nuwuaye mua kufula ditempu dia tshijila, ne bakerubine benza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, badi babuikila mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila ne mapuapua abu." 
1Chronicles28:19 Davide kuamba ne: — Bionsu ebi bidi mu mukanda uvua Maweja-Nangila mumpeshe. Mu mukanda ewu, Maweja-Nangila mmumvuije ku tshintu ku tshintu munudi mua kuenza mudimu ewu." 
1Chronicles28:20 Pashishe Davide kuamba kabidi ne: — Muananyi, kolesha muoyi, utantamane. Tuadija mudimu ewu. Kutshinyi, kuzakadi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi kena ukulekela to. Udi nebe, ubambuluisha too ne muwajikija mudimu ewu wa nzubu wende." 
1Chronicles28:21 Batuangaji ne bena Levi, badibu bamane kutapulula mu bisumbu bua ditendelela dia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, badi pabuipi nebe bua kukuambuluisha. Neupete kabidi diambuluisha kudi bantu ba muoyi muakane badi bamanye kukuata mudimu, badi munkatshi mua bamfumu ne mua bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu." 
1Chronicles29:1 Mukalenga Davide kuambila bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu ne: — Muananyi Shelomu udi Maweja-Nangila musungule, utshidi muana mutekete, kena muanji kujingulula bimpe mudi panu. Kadi mudimu wa kuenza mmupite bunene, bualu ki nnzubu wa bukalenga bua muntu udiye ne bua kuasa to. Kadi nnzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles29:2 Ndi muenze muanyi muonsu bua kulongolola diasa dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu: ndi mukunguje bionsu bitudi tukengela bua kuenza bintu bia mu nzubu ewu: mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshikunze, tshiamu tshifike, mabaya. Ndi ne mabue a komaline a bungi, ne mabue makuabu a kulengeja nawu, ne mabue mafike ne a mekala mashilangane, kabidi ne mabue mashilangane a mushinga mukole, ne mabue manene matoke a bungi." 
1Chronicles29:3 Kadi bua biuma bimvua meme nabi, mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ndi mbifila bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Ndi mbisakidila ku bionsu bimvua mumane kulongolola bua muaba wa tshijila ewu, undi mupite kunanga." 
1Chronicles29:4 Ndi mfila kilo binunu lukama ya mpawungi wa mu ditunga dia Ofire, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshia bujitu bua kilo binunu nkama ibidi ne makumi anayi, bua kulamika ku bimana bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
1Chronicles29:5 Kadi bua mpindiewu, wa kunudi udi mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila ku budisuile buende, mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bua bena mudimu wa bianza benze bintu bionsu bitudi tukengela, nnganyi?" 
1Chronicles29:6 Nenku, bamfumu ba meku, bamfumu ba bisamba bia bena Izrayele, balombodi ba bisumbu binene nansha bikese bia bena mvita, ne balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mudimu ba mukalenga, kulayabu ne:" 
1Chronicles29:7 tudi basue kufila bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Netufile kilo binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mutekete ya mpawungi, nkanu ya mpawungi binunu dikumi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo binunu nkama isatu, tshiamu tshikunze tshia bujitu bua kilo binunu nkama isambombu, tshiamu tshifike tshia bujitu bua kilo bitotu bisatu." 
1Chronicles29:8 Bantu bavua ne mabue a mushinga mukole bavua baafila kudi Yekiyele wa mu diku dia Ngershone, bua baateke mu tshibutshilu tshia nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
1Chronicles29:9 Bantu bonsu bavua ne disanka, bavua baye kufila bintu ebi ne muoyi wabu mujima. Mukalenga Davide uvua ne disanka dinene." 
1Chronicles29:10 Davide udi utendakena Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele bonsu basangile, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua wetu Yakobe, atumbe lelu ne kashidi!" 
1Chronicles29:11 Bualu, wewe udi muena bumfumu, muena bukole, muena lumu, muena butumbi ne muena bukalenga! Eyowa, bionsu bidi mulu, bidi pa buloba mbiebe wewe Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi mukalenga, kabidi udi mfumu wa bonsu ne wa bionsu." 
1Chronicles29:12 Bubanji ne butumbi bidi bifuma kuudi. Wewe ke udi ne bumfumu buabi bionsu. Udi ne bukole ne bumfumu, udi ne bumfumu bua kujuula ne kukolesha muntu yonsu uudi musue." 
1Chronicles29:13 Maweja-Nangila wetu, ke patudi tukutumbisha, tusamuna dina diebe dia butumbi." 
1Chronicles29:14 Meme ndi muntu wa tshianana. Bantu banyi badi bantu ba tshianana. Tuetu katuena mua kukulambula milambu eyi ku bukole buetu. Tudi bapete bionsu amu kuudi. Nenku tudi mua kukulambula amu bitudi bapete kuudi. 
1Chronicles29:15 Katuena ne diyi dia kuamba kumpala kuebe nansha. Tudi anu bu benyi ne bena luendu, bu muvua bankambua betu. Matuku atudi tusomba pa buloba adi apita bu mundidimbi, katuyi ne ditalala." 
1Chronicles29:16 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tudi bakungule bintu bivule bua kukuibakila nzubu utudi mua kuvua kukutendelela, wewe Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. Kadi bionsu ebi, ndi mumanye ne: mbifume kuudi. Bionsu ebi mbintu biebe wewe." 
1Chronicles29:17 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi mumanye ne: udi ukonkonona meji adi munda mua bantu, udi wanyisha badi ne muoyi mutoke. Mvua mukulambule biuma bianyi, lelu meme kumona bantu badi basangile apa, benza bia mumue ne disanka." 
1Chronicles29:18 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu, Abrahame, Izake ne Yakobe, anyisha bua bantu bebe balame muoyi wa mushindu ewu munda muabu matuku onsu, batume meji abu kuudi kashidi." 
1Chronicles29:19 Upeshe Shelomu muoyi mukole bua kulama meyi, mikenji ne mikandu biebe, wa kubikumbaja, ne wa kuibaka muaba webe wa tshijila unkadi mumane kulongoluela bintu ebi." 
1Chronicles29:20 Davide kuambila kabidi bantu bonsu ne: — Elayi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu tuasakidila. Bantu bonsu kuela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu. Kutuabu binu, kutua ne mpala panshi, batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, kabidi ne mukalenga Davide." 
1Chronicles29:21 Butshia dinda, kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya bobumue ne ya kuosha. Kulambulabu Mvidi Mukulu ngombe milume tshinunu, bimpanga tshinunu, ne mikoku tshinunu, pamue ne maluvu a mvinyo, bu mudi meyi a pa milambu. Milambu ya bobumue ivua bungi bukumbane bua bena Izrayele bonsu bavuapu bamone mua kudia." 
1Chronicles29:22 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele kudia, kunua kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bikale ne disanka dinene. Ewu ke musangu muibidi, udibu baleja bantu mudi Shelomu muana wa Davide, mukalenga wabu. Kumulababu manyi a bukalenga, bua akuatshile Maweja-Nangila mudimu. Amu diba adi kujidilabu Sadoke bua ikale mutuangaji munene." 
1Chronicles29:23 Shelomu kusomba mu nkuasa wa bukalenga wa Maweja-Nangila, kupingana tatuende Davide mu bukalenga. Bena Izrayele bamone ngikadilu yende milenga, bonsu kumuitaba." 
1Chronicles29:24 Balombodi bonsu ba bena mvita ne bana bakuabu ba Davide, kuitaba bukalenga bua Shelomu." 
1Chronicles29:25 Bena Izrayele kudimuena mudi bukalenga bua Shelomu budiunda. Maweja-Nangila wakamupesha butumbi buvua bupite bua bonsu bavua bamudianjidile mu nkuasa wa bukalenga mu bena Izrayele. 
1Chronicles29:26 Davide, muana wa Ishayi, uvua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu." 
1Chronicles29:27 Bukalenga buende buvua bunenga bidimu makumi anayi, bidimu muanda mutekete mu Ebrone, ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bisatu mu Yerushalayime." 
1Chronicles29:28 Davide kufua mumane kukulakaja bikole. Uvua ne biuma kabidi ne lumu lupite. Muanende Shelomu kumupingana mu bukalenga. 
1Chronicles29:29 Malu onsu a mukalenga Davide mbaafunde mu mikanda idibu babikila ne: Malu menza kudi muambi Samuwele, Malu menza kudi muambi Natane, ne Malu menza kudi muambi Ngade." 
1Chronicles29:30 Mu mikanda eyi, badi balondamu malu a bukalenga buende, a bukitu buende, ne malu onsu a mu nsombelu wende wa panu, malu a ditunga dia bena Izrayele ne a mu makalenga makuabu." 
2Chronicles1:1 Shelomu, muana wa Davide, uvua mukoleshe bukalenga buende bimpe. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu uvua umuambuluisha, bua ikale mukalenga wa lumu lunene." 
2Chronicles1:2 Shelomu kubikidisha bena Izrayele bonsu, nangananga balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese bia bena mvita, bandumbulula, bamfumu bonsu ba meku a bena Izrayele, ne bakulu bonsu." 
2Chronicles1:3 Kuyaye ne bantu abu bonsu mu Ngibone, muaba wa tshijila. Bualu ke muaba wa mu tshipela uvua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, muase ntenta wa kusambakena ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles1:4 Davide uvua mumuke ne mushete wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua mu Kiriyate-Yeyarime, muye nawu mu Yerushalayime, muuteke mu ntenta muaba uvuabu bamane kulongolola." 
2Chronicles1:5 Kadi tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu benza kudi Beshalele, muana wa Uri, muikale kabidi muikulu wa Ure, Davide uvua mutshiteke mu tshimenga tshia Ngibone kumpala kua ntenta wa Maweja-Nangila. Shelomu kufika muaba awu ne bonsu bavuaye nabu bua kukonka malu kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles1:6 Shelomu kusemena kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, kulambula milambu ya kuosha tshinunu pa tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, tshivua pabuipi ne ntenta wa kusambakena." 
2Chronicles1:7 Butuku abu, Mvidi Mukulu kumuenekela Shelomu, kumuambila ne: — Undombe tshiudi musue bua meme kukupesha." 
2Chronicles1:8 Shelomu kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila, uvua muenzele tatu wanyi Davide bimpe. Mpindiewu udi munsungule bua meme kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles1:9 Nenku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ukumbaje biuvua mulaye tatu wanyi. Udi munsungule mukalenga bua kulombola bantu bungi bu lusenga lua pa buloba." 
2Chronicles1:10 Umpeshe meji ne lungenyi, bua nkumbaje bimpe mudimu wanyi wa kulombola bantu aba. Wewe kuyi muenze nanku, kakuena udi mua kulombola bantu bebe bungi nenku." 
2Chronicles1:11 Mvidi Mukulu kuandamuna Shelomu ne: — Kuena mulombe bua wewe kuikala mubanji, nansha kuikala ne lumu. Kuena mulombe bua baluishi bebe kufuabu bonsu. Kuena mulombe bua wewe kuikala ne muoyi matuku a bungi pa buloba. Kadi udi ulomba bua kuikala ne meji ne lungenyi bua wewe kulombola bantu banyi, bandi mukupeshe bua wewe kuikala mukalenga wabu." 
2Chronicles1:12 Nanku, neupete meji ne lungenyi, kabidi nenkupe bubanji bua bungi ne butumbi. Newikale mupite bamfumu bakuabu bavua kumpala kuebe, nansha bakulonda panyima." 
2Chronicles1:13 Nanku Shelomu kumuka mu Ngibone muaba wa tshijila uvua ntenta wa kusambakena. Kupinganaye mu Yerushalayime bua kulombola bena Izrayele. 
2Chronicles1:14 Shelomu kusangisha matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu. Uvua ne matempu a mvita tshinunu ne nkama inayi, ne nyama ya tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi. Uvua mulamine nyama mikuabu ya tubalu ku Yerushalayime kuvuaye. Kadi nyama mikuabu, uvua muyabanye mu bimenga bivua ne bikumbi bilongolola bua kuyiteka." 
2Chronicles1:15 Nanku, ku bulongolodi bua mukalenga Shelomu, mu Yerushalayime muvua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi bungi bu nsoka. Muvua kabidi mitshi ya sedre ya bungi bu mitshi ya sikomore idi itoloka mu mpata ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
2Chronicles1:16 Nyama ya tubalu ya mukalenga Shelomu ivua ifumina ku Ejipitu ne ku Silisiya, muaba uvuabu baye kumusumbilayi kudi bangenda mushinga." 
2Chronicles1:17 Bangenda mushinga abu, mu Ejipitu bavua basumba ditempu dimue dia mvita, ku mushinga wa nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nkama isambombu, nyama wa kabalu umue ku mushinga wa nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole lukama ne makumi atanu. Bangenda mushinga abu, bavua basumbisha kabidi bakalenga ba bena Iti ne ba bena Arame bintu abi." 
2Chronicles1:18 Shelomu uvua mujadike bua kuasa nzubu wa tshjila wa Mvidi Mukulu muaba udibu mua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila. Uvua musue kuasa kabidi nzubu wende wa Bukalenga. 
2Chronicles2:1 Shelomu kuangata bena mudimu binunu makumi muanda mutekete bua kuambula bintu, ne bantu binunu makumi muanda mukulu bua kusonga mabue mu mikuna. Bavua babalombola kudi bantu binunu bisatu ne nkama isambombu." 
2Chronicles2:2 Shelomu kutuma bantu kudi Irame, mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Tire, umuambila ne: “Uvua mupeshe tatu wanyi Davide mitshi ya sedre bua kuasaye nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles2:3 Ungenzele panyi nanku, nkadi pa kuashila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi nzubu wende wa tshijila. Neboshilemu milambu ya manananshi. Nebatekemu mampa a tshijila matuku onsu. Nebalambulemu milambu ya kuosha dinda ne dilolu, matuku a Dikisha, dituku dionsu didi ngondu ubala, ne matuku a bibilu bia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Ke mikenji idi bena Izrayele ne bua kukumbaja kashidi." 
2Chronicles2:4 Nanku, nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu undi ngasa neikale munene, wa lumu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu wetu mmupite mvidie yonsu ku bunene." 
2Chronicles2:5 Muntu nansha umue kena mua kumuashila nzubu to, bualu diulu, nansha diodi dialabale, ndikese bualu buende. Meme tshiena mua kuamba ne: ndi ngashila Maweja-Nangila nzubu to. Kadi ndi ngasa muaba wa ditendelela, udibu mua kumulambula milambu." 
2Chronicles2:6 Nanku, untumine muntu udi mumanye bimpe mua kuenza bintu ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshikunze, kabidi ne biamu bikuabu. Muntu awu, ikale mumanye kabidi mua kutela bilamba bilaba kakula, bikunze kunzuu, bifikuluke, mumanye kabidi mua kuzola bintu mu biamu. Muntu awu, neenze mudimu pamue ne bantu banyi badi bamanye bimpe mua kuenza midimu ayi, bavua tatu wanyi Davide muangate ku mudimu. Bantu abu mbasombe mu Yerushalayime, nansha muaba mukuabu mu ditunga dia Yuda." 
2Chronicles2:7 Umpeshe kabidi mitshi ya sedre, ya pin ne ya santale, idi ifumina ku mikuna ya Lebanone. Ndi mumanye ne: bena mudimu bebe mbamanye mua kukosa mitshi ya Lebanone. Bena mudimu banyi nebaye kuambuluisha bena mudimu bebe." 
2Chronicles2:8 Nebankosele mitshi ya bungi, bualu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu undi ngasa mmupite bunene, kabidi mmupite buimpe." 
2Chronicles2:9 Bena mudimu bebe badi bankosela mitshi, nembapeshe kilo binunu bitotu bisambombu ya bukula bua mampa, kilo bitotu bisambombu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo litre binunu nkama muanda mukulu, ne mafuta litre binunu nkama muanda mukulu.”" 
2Chronicles2:10 Irame, mukalenga wa tire, kufunda mukanda, wandamuna mukalenga Shelomu ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunange bena tshisamba tshiende. Ke padiye mukuteke bua kuikala mukalenga wabu." 
2Chronicles2:11 Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, mufuki wa diulu ne buloba, tuasakidila, bualu mmupeshe Davide muana wa meji, wa tshiumvuilu ne lungenyi, muakanyine mua kuashila Maweja-Nangila nzubu, ne kudiashila wende yeye wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles2:12 Nanku, mpindiewu ndi nkutumina Urame-Abi udi mumanye midimu bikole." 
2Chronicles2:13 Tatuende wa Urame-Abi uvua muena tshimenga tshia Tire, kadi mamuende uvua muena tshisamba tshia Dane. Urame-Abi udi mumanye mua kuenza bintu ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshikunze, kabidi ne biamu bikuabu. Mmumanye kabidi kusonga mabue ne mitshi, kutela bilamba bilaba kakula, bikunze kunzuu, ne bifikuluke, nansha bilamba bienza ne ndanda. Udi mumanye kabidi mua kuzola bintu mu biamu. Udi mua kuenza mudimu onsu udibu bamupeshe. Neenze mudimu pamue ne bena mudimu bebe badi bamanye mudimu bimpe, kabidi ne ba tatuebe Davide." 
2Chronicles2:14 Nanku, wewe mukalenga Shelomu, ututumine bukula bua mampa, ntete ya bukula, mafuta ne maluvu biuvua mulaye." 
2Chronicles2:15 Netuye pa mukuna wa Lebanone bua kukosa mitshi yonsu iudi i ujinga. Nempitshile nayi mu mayi manene, misuika mu bisumbu, too ne ku Yafa, bua uyambuishe muaba awu, ifike ku Yerushalayime.”" 
2Chronicles2:16 Shelomu kusangisha benyi bonsu bavua basomba mu ditunga dia Izrayele, bilondeshile muvua tatuende Davide mubabadike. Bavua binunu lukama makumi atanu ne bisatu ne nkama isambombu." 
2Chronicles2:17 Kusungulaye bantu binunu makumi muanda mutekete bua kuambula bintu, bantu binunu makumi muanda mukulu bua kusonga mabue mu mikuna, bantu binunu bisatu ne nkama isambombu bua kulombola bonsu bavua benza midimu eyi." 
2Chronicles3:1 Shelomu kutuadija kuibaka nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila mu Yerushalayime pa mukuna wa Moriya, muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila mumuenekele tatuende Davide. Davide uvua mumane kulongolola muaba awu, uvua Ornane muena Yebusa ushipuila ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
2Chronicles3:2 Shelomu mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu binayi, kutuadijaye kuibakisha nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu ngondu muibidi." 
2Chronicles3:3 Bunene bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua Shelomu muibakishe buvua mushindu ewu: metre makumi asatu mu bule, ne metre dikumi mu butshiama." 
2Chronicles3:4 Mushiku wa mbelu wa kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua ne metre dikumi mu butshiama, bilondeshile butshiama bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, metre makumi asambombu mu butumbuke. Bavua balamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muonsu." 
2Chronicles3:5 Ku bimana bia mu tshibambalu tshinene bavua balamikaku mabaya a mutshi wa pin, malamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene. Bavua bazola pa mabaya apa malala a mabue ne nkanu ya majitamajita." 
2Chronicles3:6 Bavua balengeja kabidi tshibambalu atshi ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshivuabu benza natshi mudimu mu tshibambalu amu tshivua tshifumina ku Parvayime. 
2Chronicles3:7 Bavua balamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi ku mikamba ya ku nzubu, ku mabue a ku tshibuelelu panshi, ku bimana, ne ku biibi bia tshibambalu. Bavua bazola ne biamu ku bimana bimfuanyi bia bakerubine." 
2Chronicles3:8 Bavua bibaka tshibambalu tshikuabu tshivuabu binyika ne: “Muaba wa tshijila menemene ’”. Tshibambalu atshi, tshivua ne metre dikumi mu butshiama, bilondeshile butshiama bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne metre dikumi mu bule. Munda mua nzubu amu, bavua balamika kilo binunu makumi abidi bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
2Chronicles3:9 Misumadi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivuabu benza nayi mudimu ivua ne bujitu bua grame nkama itanu. Nansha bibambalu bia kulu bia munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bivua bilamika amu tshiamu tshia mpawungi. 
2Chronicles3:10 Pashishe bavua bafula bakerubine babidi ne tshiamu tshiengulula. Bavua babalamika tshiamu tshia mapwungi, babateka muaba wa tshijila menemene." 
2Chronicles3:11 Bakerubine abu bavua bimane kulu, ewu ku luseke, mukuabu ku luseke, mitu nutangile ku mushiku wa mbelu. Yonsu wa kudibu uvua ne mapuapua abidi molola, mikale ne metre abidi ne tshitupa. Dipuapua dimue divua dilengangana ne tshimana tshia tshibambalu, dikuabu divua dilengangana ne dia mukerubine mukuabu. Nanku, mapuapua anayi a bakerubine avua mololoke bule bua metre dikumi." 
2Chronicles3:12  
2Chronicles3:13  
2Chronicles3:14 Bavua batela kabidi tshilamba tshia buanda bua ndanda tshia kulembeleja mu mushiku wa mbelu. Tshilamba atshi tshivua mekala mashilangane: tshifikuluke, tshikunze ne tshikunzubile. Bavua bazolaku bimfuanyi bia bakerubine." 
2Chronicles3:15 Kuenzabu makunji abidi mikale ne metre dikumi ne muanda mutekete mu bule, a kuasa kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ku mutu kua dikunji dionsu, kuvua mutu wa dikunji, muikale ne metre abidi ne tshitupa mu bule." 
2Chronicles3:16 Kuenzabu nkanu ya majitamajita bua kuteka ku mutu wa dikunji. Pashishe, kuenzabu bimfuanyikijilu lukama bia bimuma bia ngrenade bua kubilembeleja ku nkanu aku." 
2Chronicles3:17 Kuasabu makunji abidi aa ku tshibuelelu tshia muaba wa tshijila, edi ku dia balume, edi ku dia bakaji dia mushiku wa mbelu. Dikunji divua ku dia balume bavua badinyika ne: “Yakine,” mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu ngudi ushindika.” Dikunji divua ku dia bakaji bavua badinyika ne: “Bowaze,” mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu ke bukole.”" 
2Chronicles4:1 Kuenzabu tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, tshikale ne metre dikumi mu bule ne mu butshiama, butumbuke buatshi buvua metre atanu." 
2Chronicles4:2 Kuenzabu dilongu dinene dia tshijengu dia tshiamu tshikunze. Divua ne metre atanu mu bunene, metre abidi ne tshitupa mu butumbuke, ne nyunguluilu wadi uvua ne metre dikumi ne atanu." 
2Chronicles4:3 Muinshi mua mibangu ya dilongu adi ku nseke yadi yonsu, kuvua bimfuanyi bileja ngombe milume. Ku metre umue kuvua bimfuanyi ebi makumi abidi, bikale mu milongu ibidi. Bimfuanyi abi ne dilongu, bavua babifula musangu umue." 
2Chronicles4:4 Dilongu adi bavua baditeka pa ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi ya tshiamu tshikunze. Ngombe isatu ivua nutangile ku mutu, isatu nutangile luseke ludi diba dibuelela, isatu nutangile kuinshi, ne mikuabu isatu nutangile luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Ngombe eyi yonsu ivua miele nyima ku dilongu dinene dia tshijengu; miongu yayi ivua muinshi mua dilongu adi." 
2Chronicles4:5 Mupimbu wa dilongu adi uvua wa santimetre muanda mukulu. Bayila balengeja mubangu wa dilongu anu bu mudibu balengeja dikopu dia tshiamu, ne bintu bifuanangane ne mabeji a kapapa-nkole. Dilongu dinene dia tshijengu adi divua dikumbane mua kuelamu mayi litre binunu lukama ne makumi abidi." 
2Chronicles4:6 Kuenzabu malongu manene dikumi a tshiamu tshikunze. Kutekabu malongu atanu ku dia balume dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, atanu ku dia bakaji, bua kuowelamu mayi. Bavua basukuilamu milambu ya kuosha, ivuabu balambula. Mayi avua mu dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, batuangaji ke bavua bawowa." 
2Chronicles4:7 Kuenzabu bitekedi bia miendu dikumi bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bilondeshile mushindu uvuabu babambile bua kubifula. Kubitekabu mu tshibambalu tshinene tshia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bitanu ku dia balume, bitanu ku dia bakaji." 
2Chronicles4:8 Kuenzabu mesa dikumi, kuatekabu kabidi mu tshibambalu tshinene, atanu ku dia balume, makuabu atanu ku dia bakaji. Kuenzabu makopu lukama a tshiamu tshia mpawungi a kumiamina nawu." 
2Chronicles4:9 Kuenzabu lupangu lua batuangaji ne lupangu lukuabu lunene luikale ne biibi. Biibi ebi bavua babilamika tshiamu tshikunze. 
2Chronicles4:10 Dilongu dinene dia tshijengu bavua baditeka luseke lua balume lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pabuipi ne ditumba divua luseke lua kuinshi lua kudi diba dipatukila." 
2Chronicles4:11 Urame mumane kuenza ngesu ya kuela butu, bikasu, ne makopu a kumiamina nawu, kujikijaye bionsu bivua Shelomu mumuambile bua kuenza bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ke:" 
2Chronicles4:12 makunji abidi, mitu ya makunji ibidi ya bijengu ya kuteka ku mutu kua makunji, bilengejilu bibidi bifuanangane ne makondu, bua kubuikila ku nsongu ya mitu ya bijengu ya makunji," 
2Chronicles4:13 bimuma bia mutshi wa ngrenade nkama inayi, bivua bilembeleja ku makondu abidi, biteka mu milongu ibidi, ku bukondu buonsu buvua bubuikila mitu ya makunji." 
2Chronicles4:14 Urame uvua muenze kabidi matempu ne malongu manene a kuteka pa matempu," 
2Chronicles4:15 dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi ivua miambule dilongu adi," 
2Chronicles4:16 ngesu ya kuela butu, bikasu ne nsomu bua kuambula munyinyi. Bintu bionsu abi Urame-Abi uvua mubienze bua nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ne tshiamu tshikunze tshiengelela, bu muvua Shelomu mumutumine diyi." 
2Chronicles4:17 Bavua bengulula biamu abi munda mua buloba mu tshibandabanda tshia Yardene, pankatshi pa musoku wa Sukote ne wa Seredata." 
2Chronicles4:18 Shelomu kuenzeja bintu bipite bungi. Kabavua nansha bakeba mua kumanya bujitu bua tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu benze natshi bintu bionsu ebi to. 
2Chronicles4:19 Shelomu kuenzeja kabidi bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi bia kuteka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ke: tshilambuilu tshia manananshi tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mesa avuabu bamane kuteka mampa mamane kulambula Mvidi Mukulu," 
2Chronicles4:20 bitekedi bia miendu, ne miendu yabi, bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi nkayatshi; miendu ivua ne bua kutema kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila menemene, bilondeshile muvuabu bamane kuamba;" 
2Chronicles4:21 bilongu, miendu ne nkuatu bivua ku bitekelu bia miendu, bia tshiamu tshimpe menemene tshia mpawungi;" 
2Chronicles4:22 bintu bia kusukula nabi miendu, makopu a kumiamina nawu ne makopu makuabu, mbabula, bionsu bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bidi bitangila muaba wa tshijila menemene, ne bidi bitangila ku tshibambalu tshinene, bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
2Chronicles5:1 Shelomu mumane kujikija midimu ya diasa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, kuangataye bintu bionsu bivua tatuende Davide mulambule Maweja-Nangila: tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bintu bikuabu bia mishindu yonsu, kubitekaye mu tshibambalu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tshivuabu bateka bintu bionsu bia mushinga mukole." 
2Chronicles5:2 Diba adi, mukalenga Shelomu kubikidisha bakulu ba bena Izrayele, bamfumu ba bisamba ne bamienampala ba meku a kale onsu. Kufikabu mu Yerushalayime bua kuambula mushete wa ndondu wa Maweja-Nangila, uvua mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, tshivuabu binyike kabidi ne: Siyone, bua kuya kuuteka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles5:3 Nanku, bena Izrayele bonsu kudisangisha kabidi bua kuenza tshibilu tshia ngondu wa muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles5:4 Bakulu ba bena Izrayele kufika bua kushindikija bena Levi bavua bambula mushete wa ndondu. 
2Chronicles5:5 Batuangaji ba bena Levi bavua bambula mushete wa tshijila, ntenta wa kusambakena, ne bintu bia tshijila bivua mu ntenta awu." 
2Chronicles5:6 Mukalenga Shelomu, ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua badisangisha nende muaba uvua mushete, kulambulabu milambu ya bungi, ya mikoku ne ya ngombe. Kabavua ne mushindu wa kubala bungi buayi to." 
2Chronicles5:7 Pashishe, batuangaji kubueja mushete muaba uvuabu bamane kulongolola, mu tshibambalu tshivuabu binyika ne: muaba wa tshijila menemene, muinshi mua mapuapua a bakerubine." 
2Chronicles5:8 Mapuapua a bakerubine avua molola pa mutu pa muaba uvuabu balongolola bua kuteka mushete. Nanku, mapuapua avua mabuikila mushete ne milonda ivuabu bawambuile nayi." 
2Chronicles5:9 Milonda ayi ivua mile. Nsongu yayi ivua imueneka amu kudi muntu uvua pankatshi pa mushete ne tshibuelelu tshia tshibambalu. Kadi, kayivua imueneka kudi muntu uvua pambelu to. Milonda ayi itshidi muaba awu too ne mpindiewu." 
2Chronicles5:10 Mu mushete amu, muvua anu mabue abidi avua ne mikenji, avua Moshe muteke mu mushete. Uvua muapete ku mukuna wa Sinayi, muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue ndondu ne bena Izrayele, pavuaye mumane kubapatula mu Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles5:11 Batuangaji kupatuka muaba wa tshijila. Batuangaji bonsu bavua badijidila, badilongolola ku mudimu wabu dituku adi, kabayi basunguluja tshisumbu tshia batuangaji." 
2Chronicles5:12 Bena Levi bavua bamanye mua kuimba misambu: Ashafe, Emane, Yedutune ne bana babu ba balume, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu meku abu, bavua bavuala bilamba bia buanda buimpe bua ndanda. Bavua ne biombelu biabu, ludibu, lunzenze ne tshisanji, bimane ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshilambuilu. Pabuipi nabu pavua batuangaji lukama ne makumi abidi, bavua bamanye mua kuela mpungi." 
2Chronicles5:13 Bonsu, bedi ba mpungi ne bimbi bakuabu, kuimbabu pamue, bua kusamuna ne kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Bavua bimba misambu, bela mpungi, ludibu ne biombelu, bamba ne: “Tumbishayi, Maweja-Nangila, bualu mmulenga. Dinanga diende ndia kashidi ”. Diba adi, divuba kuwula mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tente." 
2Chronicles5:14 Batuangaji kabavua ne mushindu wa kutungunuka ne mudimu wabu to, bualu bua divuba adi, bualu butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila buvua buwula mu nzubu wende." 
2Chronicles6:1 Ke Shelomu kuela diyi ne: “Maweja-Nangila, wewe uvua musue kusomba muaba wa midima!" 
2Chronicles6:2 Kadi, meme ndi mukuibakile nzubu muimpe ewu, muaba wa wewe kusomba kashidi!”" 
2Chronicles6:3 Bena Izrayele bonsu bamane kudisangisha, kuimanabu kulu. Mukalenga Shelomu ubatangila, kubelaye muoyi." 
2Chronicles6:4 Pashishe kuambaye ne: — Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele tuasakidila! Yeye nkayende mmukumbaje bionsu bivuaye mulaye tatu wanyi Davide. Uvua mumuambile ne: 
2Chronicles6:5 “Biangatshile ku dituku dimvua mupatule bantu banyi mu Ejipitu, tshiena musungule tshimenga nansha tshimue munkatshi mua bimenga bia bena Izrayele, bua nuenu kungibakilamu nzubu, muaba udibu mua kuntendelela. Tshiena musungule muntu nansha umue bua kuikalaye mfumu wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles6:6 Kadi mpindiewu, ndi musungule Yerushalayime bua nuenu kuntendelelamu. Meme kukusungula wewe Davide bua kulombola bantu banyi.”" 
2Chronicles6:7 Bushuwa, tatu wanyi Davide uvua muele meji a kuibakila Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele nzubu wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles6:8 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: “Udi muele meji mempe bua kungibakila nzubu." 
2Chronicles6:9 Kadi, wewe kuena mua kungibakila nzubu to, anu muanebe wa balume. Eyowa, anu muanebe wa balume neangibakile nzubu ewu. ”" 
2Chronicles6:10 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila mmukumbaje bionsu bivuaye mulaye. Meme ndi mupingane tatu wanyi Davide mu bukalenga. Ndi musombe mu nkuasa wa bukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kabidi ndi muibake nzubu ewu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles6:11 Ndi mutekemu mushete udi ne mabue a ndondu, uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue ne bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles6:12 Pashishe, Shelomu kuimana kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele bonsu batangile. Kuelaye bianza mulu bua kutendelela." 
2Chronicles6:13 Shelomu uvua muenzeje tshitaku tshia tshiamu tshikunze tshivuabu bateke munkatshi mua lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshitaku atshi tshivua ne metre abidi ne tshitupa mu bule ne mu butshiama, metre umue ne tshitupa mu butumbuke. Shelomu kubandapu, kutua binu, muaba uvua bena Izrayele bonsu mua kumumona. Kuelaye bianza mulu, utendelela Maweja-Nangila," 
2Chronicles6:14 wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mu diulu nansha pa buloba bu wewe. Udi uvuluka ndondu uuvua mutue ne bantu bebe. Udi unanga, wenzela bimpe, bonsu badi bakuitaba ne muoyi umue." 
2Chronicles6:15 Wewe udi muenzele tatu wanyi bionsu biuvua mumulaye. Eyowa, lelu udi mukumbaje bionsu biuvua mumulaye." 
2Chronicles6:16 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ukumbaje kabidi malaya makuabu, auvua mulaye tatu wanyi Davide, muntu webe. Uvua mumuambile ne: “Pikala ndelanganyi yebe mingitabe, mienze tshindi musue, bu muuvua wewe muenze, ndi nkujadikila ne: misangu yonsu, muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neakupingane mu bukalenga, bua kushala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. ”" 
2Chronicles6:17 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, mpindiewu ndi nkusengelela bua ukumbaje bualu ebu, buuvua mulaye tatu wanyi Davide, muntu webe!" 
2Chronicles6:18 “Kadi, bulelela Maweja-Nangila udi mua kusomba ne bantu pa buloba anyi? Diulu, nansha mudidi dinene, didi amu dikese bualu buende. Nansha kazubu ka Mvidi Mukulu kandi muibake aka, kadi kakese katambe." 
2Chronicles6:19 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, tangila kundi, umvua mundi nkusengelela. Eyowa, uteleje mundi nkubikila muanyi muonsu." 
2Chronicles6:20 Utabale, ulame nzubu ewu bimpe, butuku ne munya, amu ne muoyi wa kalolu. Bualu uvua mumane kuamba ne: ke muaba undi ndilejila kudi bantu. Teleja mundi nkutendelela mu nzubuemu." 
2Chronicles6:21 Teleja mundi nkusengelela, ne mudi bantu bebe bena Izrayele bakusengelela, batangile ku nzubu ewu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu muudi musombe, ututeleje, ujimije mibi yetu." 
2Chronicles6:22 “Padibu bafunda muntu ne: mmuenzele mukuende bibi, badi mua kufika nende mu nzubu webe emu, bua kuditshipaye kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshiebe, bua ajadike mudiye kayi ne bualu." 
2Chronicles6:23 Diba adi, wewe Maweja-Nangila udi mu diulu, wikale muteleje, ukose tshilumbu tshia bena mudimu bebe, bua muena tshibawu apete dinyoka, bua udi mubinge amueneke ne: kena ne bualu." 
2Chronicles6:24 “Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, badi mua kubatshimuna kudi baluishi babu. Padi bena Izrayele bakulomba bua wewe kubafuila luse, bakutumbisha, bakutendelela mu nzubu emu," 
2Chronicles6:25 wewe Maweja-Nangila udi mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Ubajimijile mibi yabu. Ubapingajile maloba auvua mumane kupesha kale bankambua babu, mubapeshe ne bobu kabidi, bualu bena Izrayele mbantu bebe." 
2Chronicles6:26 “Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, wewe mukandike bua mvula kaloki, kadi bena Izrayele batangile ku nzubu eku bua kukutendelela ne kukutumbisha, padibu badipuekesha, balekela kukutombokela," 
2Chronicles6:27 wewe Maweja-Nangila udi mu diulu wikale muteleje. Ubajimijile mibi yabu, bualu bena Izrayele mbena mudimu bebe, kabidi mbantu bebe. Ubalongeshe kabidi mua kukutumikila bimpe. Pashishe, ulokeshe mvula pa buloba buebe ebu, bualu uvua mumane kubupesha bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles6:28 “Padi tshiyole tshia nzala tshibuela mu ditunga, nansha tshipupu tshia disama dia tshiambu, padi munanga mumishe ntete ya kuenza bukula, nansha padi mvula unyanga bia pa madimi, padi mpasu ya mukumbi nansha ya mishindu mikuabu, mibuele mu ditunga mipite bungi, baluishi bakengesha bena Izrayele, babipata ne muaba mene udibu basokome mu bimenga biabu bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, tshipupu nansha disama dia tshiambu bibuela mu ditunga," 
2Chronicles6:29 padi bantu bebe bena Izrayele banyingalala, badiumvua ne: tudi benze bibi, padibu bakutendakena, batangile ku nzubu eku, bela bianza mulu bua kukutendelela," 
2Chronicles6:30 wewe Maweja-Nangila udi musombe mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Ubafuile luse, wenzele muntu yonsu bilondeshile nsombelu wende. Bualu wewe nkayebe udi mumanye meji adi mu muoyi wa muntu. Bushuwa, wewe nkayebe udi mumanye malu adi mu mioyi ya bantu." 
2Chronicles6:31 Wenzele bena Izrayele nanku, bua balame meyi ebe, bakunemeka kashidi, matuku onsu adibu ne muoyi pa buloba ebu, buuvua mumane kupesha bankambua betu." 
2Chronicles6:32 “Padi muenyi udi kayi wa mu tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele, mufume ku ditunga dia kule, mubuele mu nzubu emu bua kukutendelela, yeye mumane kumvua muudi wewe Mvidi Mukulu munene wa bukole buonsu, wenza bishima," 
2Chronicles6:33 wewe Maweja-Nangila udi musombe mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Umupeshe tshintu tshidiye ukulomba. Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebakumanye. Nebalonge mudibu mua kukunemeka, mudi bantu bebe bena Izrayele bakunemeka. Nebajadike ne: nzubu ewu undi muibake, ke muaba udibu ne bua kukutendelela." 
2Chronicles6:34 “Wewe mutume bena Izrayele mu mvita, bua kuluangana ne baluishi babu, padi bena Izrayele bakudimuke batangile Yerushalayime uuvua mumane kusungula, batangile ku nzubu ewu undi mukuibakile, bakutendelela," 
2Chronicles6:35 mu diulu muudi musombe, wikale mubateleje. Umvue mudibu bakulomba, bakusengelela. Nanku ubambuluishe."
