2Chronicles6:36 “Padi bena Izrayele bakutombokela, — bualu kakuena muntu nansha umue udi kayi mua kuenza bibi, — misangu mikuabu udi mua kubafikila munda, kubafila mu bianza bia baluishi babu bua baluishi babu abu baye nabu mu bupika mu ditunga diabu, nansha diodi dikale mutantshi mule." 
2Chronicles6:37 Kadi padi bena Izrayele, mu ditunga mudibu mu bupika, badiela meji badikonka, batuadija kukutendelela, bamba ne: ‘Tudi batombokele Maweja-Nangila. Tudi benze bibi, tudi bena tshibawu’," 
2Chronicles6:38 bobu bakulomba ne muoyi wabu mujima bua wewe kubafuila luse mu ditunga mudibu mu bupika, bobu bakudimuke batangile ku ditunga diuvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu, batangile ku Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshiuvua musungule, ne ku nzubu ewu undi mukuibakile, bobu bakutendelela," 
2Chronicles6:39 nanku, wewe Maweja-Nangila udi musombe mu diulu, wikale muteleje. Umvua mudibu bakulomba, bakusengelela. Nanku ubambuluishe. Ubafuile luse bua malu mabi onsu adibu bakuenzele." 
2Chronicles6:40 “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, tabala! Umvua mundi nkutendelela mpindiewu mu nzubu emu." 
2Chronicles6:41 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, juka, shindikija mushete wa tshijila, muaba uudi uleja bukole buebe. Ubuele muaba ewu uudi mua kuikisha. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ambuluishe batuangaji bebe, bikale bakanyine bilamba biabu bia lumu, batupeteshe lupandu, bantu badi bakuitaba, basanke, bapete diakalenga." 
2Chronicles6:42 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, kubengi mukalenga uudi mujidile, uvuluke bilenga bionsu biudi muenze, biudi muenzele muntu webe Davide. ”" 
2Chronicles7:1 Shelomu mumane kujikija ditendelela Maweja-Nangila, kapia kufuma mu diulu, kuosha milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bobumue. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kuwula mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles7:2 Batuangaji kabavua mua kubuela muaba wa tshijila, bualu muvua muwule ne butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles7:3 Bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu, kumonabu kapia kafumina mu diulu, butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila bukenka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Diakamue, kutuabu binu panshi, kuinyika mitu panshi bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, kumutumbisha bua bulenga buende ne bua dinanga diende didi kadiyi dijika." 
2Chronicles7:4 Mukalenga Shelomu ne bena Izrayele bonsu kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu. 
2Chronicles7:5 Kulambulabu ngombe binunu makumi abidi ne bibidi, mikoku ne mbuji binunu lukama ne makumi abidi, bua kubanjija nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles7:6 Batuangaji bavua anu pa miaba Kuabu benzela mudimu. Bena Levi bavua bimba biombelu bia tshijila, bivua mukalenga Davide muenzeje. Bavua batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bua dinanga diende didi kadiyi ne ndekelu, bilondeshile musambu uvua Davide mubalongeshe. Batuangaji bavua bela mpungi, batangilangane ne bena Levi aba. Bantu bonsu bavua amu bimane kulu." 
2Chronicles7:7 Pashishe, mukalenga Shelomu kujidila tshitupa tshijima tshia pankatshi tshia lubanza luvua kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bualu tshilambuilu tshia tshiamu tshikunze, tshivua Shelomu muashishe, tshivua tshikese, katshiyi tshikumbane mua kulambuilapu milambu yonsu to. Nanku mukalenga uvua ne bua kulambula milambu ya kuosha, ya bintu bia mu madimi, ne manyi a nyama ya milambu ya bobumue amu mu lubanza amu." 
2Chronicles7:8 Anu tshikondu atshi, Shelomu ne bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu bapite bungi, kuenza tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa matuku muanda mutekete. Bena Izrayele abu, bavua bafumine mu ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele, biangatshile ku Lebo-Amate ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne ku musulu wa Ejipitu udi kuinshi mu ditunga." 
2Chronicles7:9 Nanku, dituku dia muanda mukulu dia tshibilu, bena Izrayele kuenza tshisangilu tshinene. Kuenzabu tshibilu tshia dijidila dia tshilambuilu matuku muanda mutekete, pashishe tshibilu mene tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa matuku makuabu muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles7:10 Dituku dia makumi abidi ne disatu dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, mukalenga Shelomu kutangalaja bena Izrayele. Kupinganabu bonsu ku nzubu yabu ne musangelu. Bavua ne disanka, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muenzele Davide, Shelomu, ne tshisa tshiende tshia bena Izrayele bimpe bitambe." 
2Chronicles7:11 Mukalenga Shelomu mumane kujikija diasa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne wende yeye wa bukalenga, mumane kukumbaja bionsu bivuaye musue kuenza mu nzubu ibidi eyi," 
2Chronicles7:12 Maweja-Nangila kumumuenekela munkatshi mua butuku, umuambila ne: — Ndi mumvue dilomba diebe. Ndi muanyishe nzubu ewu bua bikale bandambuilamu milambu." 
2Chronicles7:13 Dituku dikuabu pangikala mukange diulu, mvula kayi uloka, nansha pangatuma mpasu bua kunyanga ditunga, nansha pangatumina bantu banyi bena Izrayele tshipupu tshia disama dia tshiambu," 
2Chronicles7:14 padi bantu banyi bena Izrayele, bandi muinyike dina dianyi, badipuekesha, bantendelela, padi bena Izrayele bankeba, balekela bibidilu biabu bibi, Meme Maweja-Nangila, mu diulu mundi, nembateleje. Nembalekele bilema biabu, nengakaje ditunga diabu." 
2Chronicles7:15 Mpindiewu ndi mbatabalela. Nenteleje ditendelela diabu dionsu didibu bantendelela mu nzubu ewu. 
2Chronicles7:16 Ndi musungule nzubu ewu, mumujidile bua meme kuikala munkatshi muenu kashidi. Nennutabalele kashidi, amu ne muoyi wa kunuenzela bimpe." 
2Chronicles7:17 Kadi, Shelomu, wewe mungitabe, bu muvua tatuebe Davide mungitabe, wewe mukumbaje bionsu bindi nkuambila, mutumikile meyi ne mikenji bianyi bimvua mukupeshe," 
2Chronicles7:18 umanye ne: nenjadike bumfumu buebe kashidi, bilondeshile ndondu umvua mutue ne tatuebe Davide, mumuambile ne: misangu yonsu muntu wa ku ndelanganyi yebe neakupingane mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles7:19 Kadi, wewe muntombokele, kuyi ukumbaja meyi ne mikenji bianyi bimvua mukupeshe, wewe mutendelele mvidie mikuabu, wewe muyituile binu bua kuyikukuila," 
2Chronicles7:20 nenkuipate mu buloba bumvua mukupe, nengumuke mu nzubu ewu undi mujidile bua nuenu kuntendelelamu. Nanku bantu ba bisamba bikuabu nebaseke bena Izrayele, bahele bibingu." 
2Chronicles7:21 Padi bantu bapitshila pabuipi ne nzubu munene wa lumu ewu mumane kunyanguka, nebakeme, bakonka ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunyangakaje ditunga edi ne nzubu ewu nenku bua tshinyi?”" 
2Chronicles7:22 Nebabandamune ne: “Bualu bena Izrayele mbatombokele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, uvua mupatule bankambua babu mu Ejipitu. Maweja-Nangila udi ubakengesha nenku, bualu badi batendelela mvidie mikuabu.”" 
2Chronicles8:1 Bidimu makumi abidi bimane kukumbana, Shelomu kujikija nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne wende wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles8:2 Diba adi, Shelomu kuibakulula kabidi bimenga bivua mukalenga Irame wa mu ditunga dia Tire mumupe. Kutumaye kabidi bena Izrayele bua kusombamu." 
2Chronicles8:3 Pashishe, Shelomu kuvua kuluisha Amate-Soba, kukuata ditunga adi." 
2Chronicles8:4 Kuibakululaye tshimenga tshia Tadmore mu tshipela. Kuibakululaye kabidi ne bimenga bivuaye muase mu buloba bua Amate bua kutekamu mayeba ende. 
2Chronicles8:5 Shelomu uvua muibakulule kabidi bimenga bia Bete-Orone wa ku mutu ne Bete-Orone wa kuinshi. Bimenga ebi bavua babibaka ne bimana bikole, kabidi ne biibi bikole bikanga ne milonda." 
2Chronicles8:6 Uvua muibakulule ne Baalate, ne bimenga bionsu bivuaye muteke mayeba, matempu ende a mvita, ne nyama yende ya tubalu. Nanku, Shelomu kuibaka bintu bionsu bi-vuaye musue kuibaka mu Yerushalayime, pa mukuna wa Lebanone, ne mu ditunga dijima divua ku bumfumu buende." 
2Chronicles8:7 Mu ditunga amu mutshivua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu: Ke bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Ivi ne bena Yebusa, mmumue ne bantu bonsu bavua kabayi bena Izrayele to." 
2Chronicles8:8 Bisamba ebi bivua bishale mu ditunga, bualu bena Izrayele kabavua babibutula to. Bantu ba bisamba ebi ke bavua Shelomu wenzeja midimu. Batshidi babenzejayi too ne mpindiewu." 
2Chronicles8:9 Kadi Shelomu kavua wenzeja bena Izrayele midimu ayi to. Uvua mubangate amu ku mudimu wa bena mvita, bikale ne mianzu mishilangane: ya balombodi, ya bendeshi ba matempu a mvita, ne ya babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu." 
2Chronicles8:10 Bamfumu ba maloba kusungula bantu nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu, bua bikale batangila bantu bonsu bavua benzela Shelomu midimu mishilangane." 
2Chronicles8:11 Shelomu kutumina mukajende, muana wa mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, diyi bua umuke mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, aye kusomba mu nzubu wa bukalenga uvuabu bamuibakile. Mukalenga Shelomu kuamba ne: “Nansha mukajanyi kena mua kusomba kabidi mu nzubu wa bukalenga wa Davide, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele to, bualu nzubu mene idibu bateke mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila idi anu ya tshijila.”" 
2Chronicles8:12 Biangatshile musangu awu, mukalenga Shelomu uvua ulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha pa tshilambuilu tshivuaye mumuashile, kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles8:13 Bilondeshile mikenji ivua Moshe mumane kujadika bua dituku dionsu dia bualu, Shelomu uvua ulambula milambu dituku dia Dikisha, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, ne mu bibilu bisatu binene bia ku tshidimu: Dituku dia Mampa kaayi mela buanga, dia Dinowa biakudia, ne dia tuzubu tua Bisasa." 
2Chronicles8:14 Shelomu uvua ukumbaja malu avua tatuende Davide muambe. Uvua uteka bisumbu bia batuangaji mu midimu yabu. Pashishe uvua uteka bena Levi bua bikale batumbisha Maweja-Nangila diba dionsu, nansha bambuluisha batuangaji mu mudimu wabu. Uvua muteke kabidi balami ba biibi. Tshiibi tshionsu tshikale ne tshisumbu tshia balami batshi. Ke muvua Davide, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muambe nanku." 
2Chronicles8:15 Midimu yonsu ya batuangaji, nansha ya bena Levi, bavua bayenza amu muvua Davide muambe, too ne ya kulama biuma bia mu ditunga." 
2Chronicles8:16 Midimu yonsu ya Shelomu ivuaye musue kuenza, kukumbanayi muvuaye muyilongolole, biangatshile ku tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu too ne midimu ya dijikija nzubu awu kulu. Nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua muimpe mutambe." 
2Chronicles8:17 Pashishe, Shelomu kuyaku Eshiyone-Ngebere ne ku Elate, muaba uvua bantu basabukila ku Mayi manene makunze mu ditunga dia Edome." 
2Chronicles8:18 Mukalenga Irame uvua mutumine Shelomu bantu ba bena Fenisiya bavua bamanye mua kuita matu bikole. Bitshi ba matu abu, pamue ne bitshi ba matu ba Shelomu, kuya mu ditunga dia Ofire. Bavua bakadila mukalenga Shelomu tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshia mu ditunga adi, tshia kilo binunu dikumi ne bisatu ne pa mutu." 
2Chronicles9:1 Mukalenga mukaji wa mu ditunga dia Saba kumvua lumu lua Shelomu. Nanku kuyaye mu Yerushalayime bua kujadika muvua lungenyi lua Shelomu, ne kumuela nkonku mikole. Mukalenga mukaji awu, kufika mu Yerushalayime ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu bende. Uvua kabidi ne nyama ya tumelu miambule manananshi, tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo mivule, ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Kufikaye kudi Shelomu, kumuela nkonku yonsu ivuaye mumane kulongolola." 
2Chronicles9:2 Shelomu kuandamuna ku nkonku yonsu ayi. Kavua mushiye nansha lumue kayi mubandamune to. 
2Chronicles9:3 Mukalenga mukaji wa ku Saba kujadika muvua Shelomu muakule ne lungenyi. Kukemaye bikole bua mushindu uvua nzubu wa bukalenga uvua Shelomu mudibakile," 
2Chronicles9:4 ne bua biakudia bivuabu bateke ku mesa, ne mushindu uvua balombodi ba mu bukalenga basombe ku mesa. Kukemaye kabidi bua bilamba bivuabu bavuale kudi bena mudimu bavua babanya biakudia ne bia kunua. Kumonaye muvua Shelomu ne bantu bavuaye nabu babuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, benda basamuna Maweja-Nangila. Mukalenga mukaji kukema bikole bua bintu bionsu abi, kupangaye ne mua kuakula." 
2Chronicles9:5 Pashishe, kuambilaye Shelomu ne: — Pamvua mu ditunga dianyi, mvua mumvue lumu luebe ne lua meji ebe audi nawu. Kadi pamvua tshiyi muanji kufika bua meme kudimuena, tshivua ngitaba bionsu bivuabu bangambila to. Kadi, bionsu abi bivua anu bia bushiwa. Kabidi bavua bangambile anu malu makese. Meji ebe mmmapite lumu luebe lumvua mumvue." 
2Chronicles9:6  
2Chronicles9:7 Bena mudimu bebe, ne bantu badi mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga, mbena diakalenga! Bualu badi nebe matuku onsu. Badi bumvua miaku yebe ya meji ne ya lungenyi." 
2Chronicles9:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe atumbe! Uvua mukusungule bua wewe kuikala mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mu dina diende! Maweja-Nangila udi wenza nanku bualu mmunange tshisamba etshi, mmusue bua tshikaleku kashidi. Mvidi Mukulu webe mmukuteke mukalenga, bua bena tshisamba etshi banemekangane, benzelangane bimpe." 
2Chronicles9:9 Pashishe, mukalenga mukaji wa ku Saba, kupesha mukalenga Shelomu tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo bu binunu bisatu ne nkama itanu. Kumupeshaye kabidi ne manananshi a bungi, ne mabue a mushinga mukole. Katshia kabavua banji kumona manananshi a nanku mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele to." 
2Chronicles9:10 Bena mudimu ba mukalenga Irame, ne ba mukalenga Shelomu, bavua baye ku Ofire, kupingana ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mitshi ya santale, ne mabue a mushinga mukole." 
2Chronicles9:11 Mabaya a santale awu, mukalenga Shelomu kualonga panshi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga, bua bantu kuendelapu. Kuenzaye kabidi nawu biombelu, bisanji ne lunzenze bua bantu bavua bimba misambu. Biangatshile musangu awu too ne mpindiewu, kabena banji kumona kabidi bualu bua nanku mu ditunga dia bena Yuda to." 
2Chronicles9:12 Nanku, mukalenga Shelomu kupesha mukalenga mukaji wa ku Saba, bintu bionsu bivuaye ukengela ne bivuaye mulombe. Mukalenga Shelomu kumupesha bintu bipite bungi, bipite bivua mukalenga mukaji awu mumutuadile. Pashishe, mukalenga mukaji, ne bena mudimu bende bavuaye nabu, kupingana mu ditunga diabu." 
2Chronicles9:13 Mu tshidimu tshimue, mukalenga Shelomu uvua mupete tshiamu tshia mpawungi mu Yerushalayime kilo binunu makumi abidi." 
2Chronicles9:14 Tudi mua kusakidila kabidi milambu ivuabu bapete ku bintu bia mu matunga makuabu, bivuabu babueje mu ditunga, ne ku bia bangenda mushinga bakuabu. Tudi mua kusakidila kabidi biamu bia mpawungi ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, bivua bakalenga ba ditunga dia Arabiya ne balombodi ba ditunga bakadila mukalenga Shelomu." 
2Chronicles9:15 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenzeja ngabu minene nkama ibidi, milamakaja ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bua ngabu yonsu bivua bikengela tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo isambombu." 
2Chronicles9:16 Uvua muenzeje kabidi ngabu mikese nkama isatu, milamakaja ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bavua benza ngabu yonsu ne kilo isatu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Shelomu kuteka ngabu yonsu ayi mu nzubu kuabu binyika ne: “Ditu dia Lebanone ”." 
2Chronicles9:17 Mukalenga Shelomu kuenzeja nkuasa munene wa bukalenga, mulengeja ne mubanga, mulamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene." 
2Chronicles9:18 Nkuasa wa bukalenga awu, uvua pa tshibandilu tshivua ne bidiatshilu bisambombu. Nkuasa uvua kabidi ne tshibandilu tshikuabu tshia kudiatshila makasa, tshivua tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshilamakaja ne nkuasa. Nkuasa awu uvua kabidi ne maboku eku ne eku. Bavua bateka bimfuanyi bibidi bia nyama ya ntambue, etshi ku luseke, tshikuabu ku lunga." 
2Chronicles9:19 Bimfuanyi bikuabu bia nyama ya ntambue dikumi ne bibidi, bavua babiteka ku bidiatshilu aku: nyama ya ntambue isambombu ku dia balume, mikuabu isambombu ku dia bakaji. Kabavua banji kuenza bintu bia bukalenga bia mushindu ewu mu ditunga dikuabu to." 
2Chronicles9:20 Makopu onsu a mukalenga Shelomu, avua anu a tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Kabidi bintu bionsu bia kudila bivua mu nzubu, uvuabu binyika ne: Ditu dia Lebanone, bivua anu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene. Kabavua benza bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole to. Bualu mu tshikondu tshia Shelomu, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, katshivua ne lumu." 
2Chronicles9:21 Mukalenga Shelomu uvua ne matu avuaye utuma mitantshi mile, avuabu bita kudi bena mudimu ba Irame. Pavua bidimu bisatu bipite, matu awu avua apingana mambule tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mibanga, nyama ya nkima, ne nyunyi ya mu matunga makuabu." 
2Chronicles9:22 Nanku, mukalenga Shelomu uvua mupite bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba, ku bubanji ne ku lungenyi." 
2Chronicles9:23 Bualu, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumupeshe lungenyi lua bungi. Nanku, bamfumu bavua bafuma nseke yonsu bua kuebeja Shelomu malu." 
2Chronicles9:24 Ku tshidimu tshionsu, bantu bonsu aba, bavua bakadila Shelomu bintu bia kumusankisha nabi: bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bilamba bia kuluangana nabi mvita, manananshi, nyama ya tubalu, nansha ya mpunde." 
2Chronicles9:25 Shelomu uvua ne bikumbi bivuaye mua kulamina nyama ya tubalu, ne matempu a mvita binunu binayi. Uvua ne nyama ya tubalu binunu dikumi ne bibidi. Uvua mulame imue nyama ya tubalu mu Yerushalayime muvuaye musombe. Nyama mikuabu, kuyabanyaye mu bimenga bivua ne bikumbi bilongolola bua kuyilama." 
2Chronicles9:26 Bamfumu bonsu bavua ku bumfumu bua mukalenga Shelomu, biangatshile ku musulu munene wa Perate, too ne ku ditunga dia bena Peleshete, kabidi too ne ku mukalu wa ditunga dia bena Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles9:27 Nanku, mu tshikondu tshia mukalenga Shelomu, mu Yerushalayime muvua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bungi bu nsoka. Muvua kabidi mitshi ya sedre ya bungi bu mitshi ya sikomore idi itoloka mu mpata ku muelelu wa Mayi manene." 
2Chronicles9:28 Nyama ya tubalu ya Shelomu, ivua ifumina ku Ejipitu ne ku matunga makuabu." 
2Chronicles9:29 Malu makuabu a Shelomu a ku ntuadijilu too ne a ku ndekelu kua bukalenga buende, mbaafunde mu mikanda idibu binyika ne: Malu adi muambi Natane muenze, Miaku ya muambi Akiya wa mu Shilo, ne Bualu buvua Maweja-Nangila muleje muambi Yedo. — Mu mukanda wa muambi Yedo, mbafundemu malu a Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. —" 
2Chronicles9:30 Shelomu uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi anayi, ulombola bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles9:31 Shelomu mumane kufua, kumujikabu pabuipi ne muaba uvuabu bajike tatuende mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Nanku muanende wa balume Robowame kumupingana ku bukalenga." 
2Chronicles10:1 Robowame kuya ku Shekeme, bualu ke muaba uvua bisamba bionsu bia bena Izrayele bia ku mutu mu ditunga, bisangile bua kumubanjija mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles10:2 Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate, uvua munyemene mu Ejipitu, mutshine mukalenga Shelomu. Yerobowame kumvua lumu lua tshisangilu tshia Shekeme. Ke kumukaye mu Ejipitu, kupingana kuabu." 
2Chronicles10:3 Nanku, kumutuminabu bantu bua kumubikila. Ke Yerobowame kudisangisha ne bisamba bia bena Izrayele bia ku mutu mu ditunga. Kuambilabu Robowame ne:" 
2Chronicles10:4 — Tatuebe uvua unkengesha bu bapika. Mpindiewu, wewe mutukepeshile dikenga edi, didi ditutonda bu mutshi wa kuambula nawu bujitu pa makaya, netukuenzele mudimu." 
2Chronicles10:5 Robowame kuandamuna ne: — Papita matuku asatu, nupingane kabidi bua kumonangana nanyi. Bantu bonsu kutangalaka." 
2Chronicles10:6 Mukalenga Robowame kukonka lungenyi kudi bakulu bavua tatuende Shelomu wenza nabu mudimu, patshivuaye ne muoyi. Robowame kubakonka ne: — Nudi numpeshaku lungenyi kaayi bua meme kuandamuna bantu aba?" 
2Chronicles10:7 Bakulu kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe mubaleje muudi munange bantu bebe, muudi muntu wa bantu, muanyishe tshidibu balombe, nebikale bena mudimu bebe kashidi." 
2Chronicles10:8 Kadi, mukalenga Robowame kubenga lungenyi lua bakulu alu. Kukonkaye lungenyi kudi bansongalume, bena mulongu nende, bavuaye wenda nabu." 
2Chronicles10:9 Kubakonkaye ne: — Bena Izrayele badi bajinga bua meme kubakepeshila dikenga divuabu babakengesha kudi tatu wanyi Shelomu. Bualu dikenga adi ndimane kubatonda bu mudi mutshi wa kuambula nawu bintu utonda. Kadi nuenu nudi numpesha lungenyi kaayi bua meme kubandamuna? 
2Chronicles10:10 Bansongalume bena mulongu nende kuandamuna ne: — Bantu aba badi banyingalala, bualu tatuebe Shelomu uvua ubakengesha bu bapika. Kabidi badi bakulomba bua wewe kubakepeshila dikenga edi. Nanku ubandamune mushindu ewu: “Munu wanyi wa kantengenene mmunene mupite diboku dia tatu wanyi." 
2Chronicles10:11 Tatu wanyi uvua munuambuishe bujitu bupite. Meme nemvudije bujitu buenu bikole bipite. Tatu wanyi uvua ununyoka ne mikaba. Kadi meme nennunyoke ne mikaba idi ne biamu ku nsongu.” 
2Chronicles10:12 Matuku asatu akumbana, Yerobowame ne bena Izrayele bonsu kuya kudi Robowame bu muvuaye mubalaye." 
2Chronicles10:13 Mukalenga Robowame mumane kubenga lungenyi luwabu bamupesha kudi bakulu, kuandamunaye bena Izrayele ne meyi atapa ku matshi," 
2Chronicles10:14 bilondeshile lungenyi luvuaye mupete kudi bansongalume, bena mulongu nende. Robowame kuambila bena Izrayele ne: — Nennuambuishe bujitu bunene bupite, nensakidile amu kusakidila bujitu pa bujitu. Tatu wanyi uvua unukumisha mikaba, kadi meme nennukumishe mikaba idi ne biamu ku nsongu." 
2Chronicles10:15 Nanku, mukalenga Robowame kavua muitabe dilomba dia bena Izrayele to. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua muenzeje bionsu abi, bua kukumbaja bualu bu-vuaye mumane kuambila muambi Akiya ku Silo, bua amanyishe Yerobowame, muana wa Nebate." 
2Chronicles10:16 Bena Izrayele ba ku mutu wa ditunga bamane kumvua ne: mukalenga Robowame kena muitabe dilomba diabu, kumuambilabu ne: — Davide katuena nende bualu to. Katuena basangisha tshintu ne muana wa Ishayi ewu to! Bena Izrayele, jukayi, tupingane kuetu, wewe, muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide, angataku bukalenga buebe! Bena Izrayele kumuka muaba awu." 
2Chronicles10:17 Robowame kushala amu mukalenga wa bantu bavua mu buloba bua bena Yuda. 
2Chronicles10:18 Pashishe, kutumaye Adorame, mulombodi wa midimu ya kulongolola ditunga, kudi bena Izrayele bavua ku mutu wa ditunga. Kadi bena Izrayele kuasa Adorame mabue, kumushipa. Nanku, Robowame kubanda lubilu mu ditempu diende dia mvita, kunyema, kuya ku Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles10:19 Ke muvua bisamba bia bena Izrayele bia ku mutu wa ditunga, bibenga bumfumu bua bena nzubu wa Davide nanku. Bisamba ebi bitshidi amu bibubenga ne mpindiewu." 
2Chronicles11:1 Robowame mumane kufika mu Yerushalayime, kusangishaye bena mvita binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu, bavua bamanye mvita bikole, ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda ne tshia bena Binyamine, bua kuya kuluisha bena Izrayele bavua ku mutu mu ditunga, bua yeye kushala mukalenga wabu." 
2Chronicles11:2 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne muambi Shemaya, umuambila ne:" 
2Chronicles11:3 — Uye kudi Robowame, muana wa Shelomu, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne kudi bena Izrayele bonsu ba bena Yuda, ne ba bena Binyamine, ubambile ne:" 
2Chronicles11:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Kanuyi kuluisha bana benu to. Muntu yonsu wa kunudi apingane kuende. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi muenze bionsu bidi bienzeka ebi.” Robowame ne bantu bende bumvua diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, kuitaba. Kabena baye kuluisha Yerobowame to." 
2Chronicles11:5 Robowame mumane kusomba mu Yerushalayime, kukoleshaye bimenga bia bungi bia bukalenga bua bena Yuda ne bimana:" 
2Chronicles11:6 ke Betleyeme, Etame, Tekowa," 
2Chronicles11:7 Bete-Sure, Soko, Adulame," 
2Chronicles11:8 Ngate, Maresha, Zife," 
2Chronicles11:9 Adorayime, Lakishe, Azeka," 
2Chronicles11:10 Sora, Ayalone ne Ebrone. Bimenga bikolesha ne bimana ebi, bivua mu buloba bua bena Yuda ne bua bena Binyamine." 
2Chronicles11:11 Robowame uvua mubinyungulule ne bimana bikole. Kutumaye balombodi mu bimenga ebi, kutekeshayemu biakudia, mafuta ne maluvu." 
2Chronicles11:12 Mu tshimenga tshionsu muvua ngabu ne mafuma. Bu muvua Robowame mukoleshe misoku ayi ne bimana, kushindikaye bumfumu buende mu tshisamba tshia Yuda ne tshia bena Binyamine." 
2Chronicles11:13 Batuangaji ne bena Levi, kumuka mu buloba bujima bua bena Izrayele, bua kuya kuitaba bumfumu bua Robowame." 
2Chronicles11:14 Bena Levi bavua bumuka muaba wabu pabuipi ne bimenga, bua kuya kusomba mu Yerushalayime, ne mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, bualu Yerobowame ne bana bende ba balume bavua babapangishe mua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu wa butuangaji." 
2Chronicles11:15 Yerobowame nkayende kusungula bantu bua kuikalabu batuangaji miaba ivuabu batendelela mvidie, bakukuila mpingu ya mbuji ya mpumbu ne ya tuana tua ngombe." 
2Chronicles11:16 Bantu ba bisamba bionsu bia ku mutu mu ditunga, bavua batendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, kuyabu mu Yerushalayime, balonda bena Levi bua kulambuilamu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu milambu." 
2Chronicles11:17 Kuitababu bumfumu bua bena Yuda, kushindikabu bukalenga bua Robowame, muana wa Shelomu. Amu bidimu bisatu, bavua batumikile bukalenga abu, muvuabu batumikile bukalenga bua Davide ne bua Shelomu." 
2Chronicles11:18 Robowame uvua musele Makalate. Tatuende wa Makalate uvua Yerimote, muana wa Davide. Mamuende wa Makalate uvua Abikayile, muana wa Eliyabe ne muikulu wa Ishayi." 
2Chronicles11:19 Makalate uvua mumulelele bana ba balume basatu: Yewushe, Shemariya ne Zakame." 
2Chronicles11:20 Pashishe, Robowame kusela Maaka, muana wa Abishalome. Kulelaye nende bana ba balume banayi: Abiya, Atayi, Ziza ne Shelomite." 
2Chronicles11:21 Ku bakaji bende bonsu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, bana ba bakalenga, Robowame uvua mupite kunanga Maaka, muana wa Abishalome. Uvua musele kabidi bakaji bakuabu makumi asambombu, bavuaye mubanjije. Uvua ne bana ba balume makumi abidi ne muanda mukulu, ne bana ba bakaji makumi asambombu." 
2Chronicles11:22 Robowame uvua muteke Abiya, muana wa Maaka, ku mutu kua bena nzubu wende bonsu, bua kuikalaye mfumu wa bana babu. Bualu Robowame uvua musue ne muana ewu ashale mukalenga." 
2Chronicles11:23 Robowame uvua mupete kabidi meji, a kutangalaja bana bende ba balume bakuabu bonsu, bua baye kulombola bimenga bia bena Yuda, bia bena Binyamine, bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana. Uvua upesha bana abu biakudia bia bungi, ubakebela kabidi bakaji bavule." 
2Chronicles12:1 Mukalenga Robowame mumane kuakaja bukalenga buende, mubushindike, kulekelaye kuitaba meyi ne mikenji bia Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu bende bonsu kuenza momumue." 
2Chronicles12:2 Robowame mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu bitanu, Shishake, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kufika bua kuluisha bena Yerushalayime. Bualu ebu buvua buenzeka, bualu bena Yuda bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles12:3 Shishake uvua ulombola bena mvita, bavua ne matempu a mvita tshinunu ne nkama ibidi, babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu binunu makumi asambombu, ne bena mvita bapite bungi ba bena Libiya, bena Suki ne bena Kushe." 
2Chronicles12:4 Kukuataye bimenga bia mu ditunga dia bena Yuda bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana, too ne ku Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles12:5 Pavua Shishake wenda usemena pabuipi ne tshimenga, muambi Shemaya kumonangana ne mukalenga Robowame, kabidi ne bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua basangile mu Yerushalayime. Kubambilaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nudi bandekele! Nanku, meme kabidi ndi nnutekela mu bianza bia Shishake.”" 
2Chronicles12:6 Mukalenga Robowame ne bamfumu ba bena Izrayele bavuaye nabu, kuitaba bubi buabu, kuambabu ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wenza anu bimpe." 
2Chronicles12:7 Maweja-Nangila umona nanku, kuambilaye muambi Shemaya ne: — Bu mudi bamfumu abu bavuluke bubi buvuabu benze, tshiena mua kubashipa to. Nembapandishe lukasa, bualu ndi mbenga mua kunyoka Yerushalayime, bua Shishake kabutudi tshimenga etshi to." 
2Chronicles12:8 Kadi nebashale ku bumfumu bua Shishake, bua bamanye ne: mbimpe kungitaba meme Maweja-Nangila, pa mutu pa kuitaba bamfumu ba pa buloba." 
2Chronicles12:9 Shishake, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kuluisha Yerushalayime, kuangata bintu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bia mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kuangataye bintu bionsu, nangananga ngabu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi ivua Shelomu muenzeje." 
2Chronicles12:10 Bua kupingaja bintu bikuabu pa muaba wa ngabu ayi, mukalenga Robowame kuenza ngabu ya tshiamu tshikunze, kuyipesha balombodi ba bena mvita bavua balama ku biibi bia ku nzubu wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles12:11 Nanku, misangu yonsu ivua mukalenga uya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, balami ba ku biibi bavua baya kuangata ngabu, pashishe bavua kuyipingaja mu nzubu wa balami ba biibi." 
2Chronicles12:12 Maweja-Nangila kavua musue kunyoka Robowame kashidi bua kutuyisha tshiji tshiende to. Bualu Robowame uvua mutonde bubi buende. Kabidi bavua basangana malu mimpe mavule mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. 
2Chronicles12:13 Mamuende wa mukalenga Robowame uvua Naama wa bena Amone. Robowame kushala mukalenga mu Yerushalayime, kushindika bukalenga buende. Uvua ne bidimu makumi anayi ne tshimue, pavuaye mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu dikumi ne muanda mutekete. Bualu ke tshimenga tshivua Maweja-Nangila musungule mu buloba bua bena Izrayele bua kusomba munkatshi mua bantu bende." 
2Chronicles12:14 Robowame uvua wenza bibi, kavua udifila ne muoyi wende mujima bua kumanya muvua disua dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles12:15 Malu a mukalenga Robowame a ku ntuadijilu too ne a ku ndekelu mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: Malu a muambi Shemaya ne a muambi Ido. Bavua bafundamu mena a ndelanganyi. Robowame uvua anu uluangana misangu yonsu ne Yerobowame. 
2Chronicles12:16 Robowame mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende Abiya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles13:1 Yerobowame mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, Abiya kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:2 Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu bisatu. Mamuende wa Abiya uvua Mikaya, muana wa Oriyele, wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngibeya. Abiya ne Yerobowame kuluangana mvita." 
2Chronicles13:3 Abiya uvua ne bantu binunu nkama inayi, bavua bamanye mvita bikole. Yerobowame uvua umuluisha ne bantu ba bukitu binunu nkama muanda mukulu bavua bamanye mvita bikole." 
2Chronicles13:4 Abiya kubanda ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Semarayime uvua mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Kuelaye mbila wamba ne: — Wewe Yerobowame, ne nuenu bena Izrayele, ntelejayi!" 
2Chronicles13:5 Kanuena bamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, uvua mupeshe Davide ne ndelanganyi yende bukalenga bua bena Izrayele kashidi anyi? Maweja-Nangila uvua mutue nabu ndondu wa kashidi." 
2Chronicles13:6 Kadi Yerobowame, muana wa Nabate, uvua wenzela Shelomu, muana wa Davide mudimu, kutombokelaye mfumuende." 
2Chronicles13:7 Bantu batshimbakane kutua ku luseke lua Yerobowame, kubenga Robowame. Kadi Robowame, muana wa Shelomu, utshivua nsongalume, kayi mupite kujingulula malu a mvi-ta. Kavua ne mushindu wa kukandamana. Ke muvuabu bamupite bukole." 
2Chronicles13:8 Mpindiewu nudi basue kubenga bukalenga budi Maweja-Nangila mupeshe ndelanganyi ya Davide. Nudi ne bena mvita ba bungi. Nudi ne tuana tua ngombe tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi tuvua Yerobowame munuenzeje bua tuikale mvidie yenu. 
2Chronicles13:9 Nudi bipate batuangaji ba bushiwa ba Maweja-Nangila, ndelanganyi ya Arone, ne bena Levi. Nudi badisunguile batuangaji bu mudibu benza kudi bena matunga makuabu. Bua muntu kupeta mudimu wa butuangaji wa mvidie eyi, idi kayiyi nansha mvidie mene, uvua ufila amu ngombe mulume umue ne mikoku ya bimpanga muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles13:10 Kadi, tuetu tudi ne wetu Mvidi Mukulu, ke Maweja-Nangila! Tuetu katuena bamubenge to. Kuetu, batuangaji badi benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, badi ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, ne bena Levi kabidi badi benza mudimu wabu mubafundile." 
2Chronicles13:11 Dinda ne dilolu badi balambula Maweja-Nangila, milambu ya kuosha ne ya manananshi. Mampa adibu balambula Maweja-Nangila, badi baateka pa mesa a tshijila. Dilolu dionsu badi batemesha miendu idi pa tshitekelu tshia miendu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Tudi tukumbaja mudimu wa Maweja-Nangila anu mudiwu. Kadi nuenu nudi babenge Mvidi Mukulu mulelela." 
2Chronicles13:12 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke udi utulombola. Batuangaji bende apa badi bakeba kuela mpungi, bua kuleja tshimanyinu tshia mvita, bua kunuluisha. Nanku, nuenu bena Izrayele, kanuluishi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, bualu kanuakutshimuna mvita to." 
2Chronicles13:13 Diba adi, Yerobowame kutuma tshisumbu tshikuabu tshia bena mvita kunyima kua bena Yuda bua kubaluisha. Nanku bena Yuda bavua ne baluishi ba bena Izrayele kumpala ne kunyima kuabu." 
2Chronicles13:14 Bena Yuda batangile panyima, kumonabu ne tudi ne bua kuluangana nseke ibidi. Kulombabu diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, pavua batuangaji bela mpungi," 
2Chronicles13:15 bena mvita ba bena Yuda bavua bela bibingu bia mvita. Diakamue, Maweja-Nangila kunyemesha Yerobowame ne bena Izrayele, Abiya ne bena Yuda batangile." 
2Chronicles13:16 Bena Izrayele kunyema, Maweja-Nangila kubafila mu bianza bia bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles13:17 Abiya ne bena mvita bende kushipa bena Izrayele bikole, kushipa bantu binunu nkama itanu bavua bamanye mvita bikole." 
2Chronicles13:18 Tshikondu atshi, bena Izrayele kukuatshika bundu. Bena Yuda kutshimuna, bualu bavua bitabe Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu." 
2Chronicles13:19 Abiya kulonda Yerobowame, kumunyenga bimenga ebi: Betele, Yeshana ne Efrone, kumunyenga kabidi ne misoku ivua nabi mutumba." 
2Chronicles13:20 Matuku avua Abiya mu bukalenga, Yerobowame kavua kabidi ne bukole bu muvuaye nabu bangabanga to. Pashishe, Mvidi Mukulu kumumusha panu." 
2Chronicles13:21 Kadi Abiya kushindika bukalenga buende. Kuselaye bakaji dikumi ne banayi. Kulelaye bana ba balume makumi abidi ne babidi, ba bakaji dikumi ne basambombu." 
2Chronicles13:22 Malu makuabu a Abiya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: Malu a muambi Ido Badi balondamu malu avuaye muenze ne avuaye muambe. 
2Chronicles13:23 Abiya mumane kufua kumujikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende Asa kumupingana mu bukalenga. Pavua Asa mu bukalenga, ditunga kushala mu ditalala bidimu dikumi." 
2Chronicles14:1 Asa kuenza malu mimpe avua asankisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende. 
2Chronicles14:2 Kunyangaye bilambuilu ne miaba ivua bena ditunga batendelela mvidie ya benyi. Kupulaye mabue avuabu bimanyike. Kutshibulaye makunji a kutendelela mvidie. 
2Chronicles14:3 Kuambilaye bena Yuda bua batendelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu, batumikile meyi ne mikenji biende." 
2Chronicles14:4 Mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda, Asa uvua munyangakaje miaba ivua bena ditunga batendelela mvidie ya benyi. Uvua munyangakaje kabidi bilambuilu bia manananshi. Nanku bukalenga buende buvua ne ditalala matuku avuaye mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles14:5 Muntu nansha umue kavua mumuluishe mvita mu bidimu abi to. Bualu Maweja-Nangila nkayende uvua mumulame ne ditalala. Matuku avua ditunga mu ditalala, Asa kukolesha bimenga bivule bia bena Yuda ne bimana." 
2Chronicles14:6 Kuambilaye bena Yuda ne: — Tukoleshayi bimenga ebi ne bimana, ne tuleya, kabidi ne biibi bitudi tukanga ne milonda ya tshiamu, matuku atshidi ditunga mu bianza bietu. Bushuwa, tuvua bitabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Ke muvuaye mutupe ditalala ku nseke yonsu ya ditunga dietu. Kuenzabu midimu bua kukolesha bimenga ebi ne bimana." 
2Chronicles14:7 Asa uvua ne bena mvita ba bena Yuda binunu nkama isatu, bavua ne ngabu minene ne mafuma. Uvua kabidi ne bena mvita ba bena Binyamine binunu nkama ibidi. Bobu bavua ne ngabu mikese, kadi bamanye mua kuela mikete. Bonsu bavua bantu ba bukitu, bamanye mua kuluangana mvita bikole." 
2Chronicles14:8 Zera wa bena Kushe kufika bua kuluisha Asa ne bantu bende. Uvua ne bena mvita binunu tshinunu, matempu a mvita nkama isatu. Kufikaye too ne ku Maresha." 
2Chronicles14:9 Asa kuya kusambakena nende. Kuelabu mualu wa mvita mu tshibandabanda tshia Sefata pabuipi ne Maresha. 
2Chronicles14:10 Asa kulomba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila kabiena mua kukukolela mua kuambuluisha bantu badi kabayi ne bukole, pa mutu pa kuambuluisha badi ne bukole. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, utuambuluishe, bualu tudi tutekemena kuudi. Mu dina diebe ke mutudi basemene apa bua kuluisha bena mvita aba. Wewe udi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, kuanyishi bua muntu akutshimmune." 
2Chronicles14:11 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kunyemesha bena Kushe, Asa ne bantu bende batangile." 
2Chronicles14:12 Asa ne bantu bende kulondakaja bena Kushe too ne ku Ngerare, kubashipa bonsu. Muntu nansha umue kavua munyeme to, bualu bena mvita babu bavua babatshimune kudi Maweja-Nangila, ne kudi bantu bende. Bena Yuda kupawula bintu bipite bungi." 
2Chronicles14:13 Pashishe, kukuatabu bimenga bionsu bivua mutumba ne buloba bua bena Ngerare, bualu bena bimenga ebi bavua bazakala kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bena Yuda kupawula bintu bionsu bivua mu bimenga ebi. Bivua bia bungi." 
2Chronicles14:14 Kuluishabu kabidi mitanda ya balami ba bimuna. Kuangatabu mikoku ya bungi ne nyama ya tumelu. Pashishe kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles15:1 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kutulukila Azariya, muana wa Odede." 
2Chronicles15:2 Kuyaye kumonangana ne Asa bua kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga Asa ne nuenu bonsu bena Yuda, ne bena Binyamine, nunteleje! Maweja-Nangila neikale nenu anu panuikala bamuitabe. Nuenu bamukebe, nenumupete. Nuenu bamubenge, yeye kabidi neanubenge." 
2Chronicles15:3 Bena Izrayele bavua basomba matuku a bungi kabayi ne Mvidi Mukulu mulelela, kabayi ne mutuangaji bua kubalongesha, kabayi ne mikenji." 
2Chronicles15:4 Kadi, mu makenga avuabu nawu, kupinganabu kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Bobu kumukeba, yeye kuanyisha bua bamusangane." 
2Chronicles15:5 Tshikondu atshi, bantu kabavua mua kuendakana mu ditunga ne ditalala to. Tshikondu atshi, bantu ba mu matunga onsu bavua anu mu mvita." 
2Chronicles15:6 Bantu ba mu tshisamba kampande bavua bashipangana ne ba mu tshisamba tshikuabu, ba mu tshimenga kampande bavua bashipangana ne ba mu tshimenga tshikuabu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mubanyoke, mubatumine bipupu bishilangane." 
2Chronicles15:7 Kadi nuenu mpindiewu, nuikale ne bukole, koleshayi muoyi, kanutekeshi mu maboku. Nebanufile bua mudimu unudi nuenza." 
2Chronicles15:8 Mukalenga Asa umvua miaku ivua muambi Azariya, muana wa Odede, muambe, kukolaye muoyi. Kumushaye mpingu yonsu ivua mu buloba bua bena Yuda ne bua bena Binyamine. Kuenzaye kabidi nanku mu bimenga bionsu bivuaye mukuate, bivua mu buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Pashishe, kulongololaye tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, tshivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles15:9 Bena Izrayele ba bungi ba mu bisamba bia Efrayime, Menashe ne Shimeyone, kulamatabu mukalenga Asa. Kusombabu mu bukalenga buende, katshia bamone ne: Mvidi Mukulu uvua nende. Mukalenga Asa kubabikidisha mu bisangilu, pamue ne bena tshisamba tshia Yuda ne tshia Binyamine bonsu." 
2Chronicles15:10 Bonsu kudisangisha mu Yerushalayime, mu ngondu muisatu wa tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshitanu, tshivua Asa mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles15:11 Dituku dia difika diabu, kulambulabu Maweja-Nangila ngombe nkama muanda mutekete ne mikoku binunu muanda mutekete. Ke bimuna bivuabu banyenga baluishi babu." 
2Chronicles15:12 Kuditshipabu kumpala kua bantu bonsu, bua kukumbaja ne muoyi wabu onsu, ne bukole buabu buonsu, tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu ujinga." 
2Chronicles15:13 Nanku, muntu yonsu, muana nansha muntu mukole, mukaji nansha mulume, uvua ubenga Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, bavua ne bua kumushipa." 
2Chronicles15:14 Bantu bonsu bavua baditshipa kudi Maweja-Nangila, kuelabu bibingu bikole, bakuma bikashi, bela ne mpungi, bimba ne nsengu." 
2Chronicles15:15 Bukalenga bua bena Yuda buvua ne disanka, bualu bantu bavua balaya nanku ne muoyi wabu mujima. Bonsu bavua bakeba Maweja-Nangila ne musangelu. Yeye kabidi uvua mudifile kudibu, mubapeshe ditalala ku mikalu yabu yonsu." 
2Chronicles15:16 Mukalenga Asa kubenga bua kabinyiki kakuende Maaka dina dia ne: “Mukalenga Muadi”. Bualu Maaka uvua ne meji mabi a kuenza lupingu lua mvidie mukaji Ashera. Mukalenga Asa kutuma diyi, bua banyangakaje lupingu alu, baluzaze, baloshile ku muelelu wa mayi a Sedrone." 
2Chronicles15:17 Kadi, mukalenga Asa, nansha yeye kayi munyangakaje miaba yonsu ivua bena Izrayele batendelela mvidie, uvua anu munange Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi wende mujima." 
2Chronicles15:18 Asa uvua uya kabidi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne milambu ya tshijila, ivuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila kudi tatuende Abiya, ne ivuaye ulambula yeye mene. Milambu eyi ivua: tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bintu bikuabu bia mishindu mishilangane." 
2Chronicles15:19 Katshia Asa ubuela mu bukalenga, bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu, mvita kayivua mienzeke kabidi to." 
2Chronicles16:1 Asa mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi asatu ne bisambombu, dituku dikuabu, Basha, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuya kuluisha ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kukoleshaye musoku wa Rama ne bimana, bua Asa ne bena Yuda kabendakanyi mudibu basue ku luseke alu." 
2Chronicles16:2 Asa kuangata tshitupa tshia bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bivua mu nzubu ya kulamina bintu bia mushinga bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bia mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Asa uvua mutume bintu abi ku Damase kudi Benadade, mukalenga wa bena Arame, bua kumuambila ne:" 
2Chronicles16:3 “Tutue nebe ndondu bu muvua batatuetu batue. Ke pandi nkutumina tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshia mpawungi, bua kukusankisha. Nanku uye kushipa ndondu uuvua mutue ne Basha mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua Basha umushe bena mvita bende badi mu buloba buanyi.”" 
2Chronicles16:4 Benadade kuitaba dilomba dia Asa. Kutumaye balombodi ba bena mvita bende, bua kuluisha bimenga bia bena Izrayele. Bena mvita abu kukuata bimenga ebi: Yone, Dane, Abele-Mayime, ne bimenga bionsu bia mu buloba bua Naftali bivuabu bateke biakudia." 
2Chronicles16:5 Basha umvua lumu alu, kulekelaye mudimu wa kukolesha musoku wa Rama ne bimana." 
2Chronicles16:6 Mukalenga Asa kubikidisha bena Yuda bonsu. Kuambulabu mabue onsu, ne mabaya manene bivua Basha munguije, bua kukolesha musoku wa Rama. Bintu abi, kukoleshabu nabi musoku wa Ngeba ne wa Mispa." 
2Chronicles16:7 Tshikondu atshi, muambi Anani kuya kudi Asa, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kumuambila ne: — Kuena mulombe diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Uvua musue kukeba diambuluisha amu kudi mukalenga wa bena Arame! Paudi muenze nanku, bena mvita ba bena Arame kabakuitaba to." 
2Chronicles16:8 Bena Kushe ne bena Libiya bavua badisangisha tshisumbu tshimue, bikale bena mvita ba bukitu. Bavua ne matempu a mvita, ne babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu bapite bungi. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila mmubafile bonsu mu bianza biebe, bualu uvuamumuitabe diba adi." 
2Chronicles16:9 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi utangila pa buloba, musue kuambuluisha badi bamunanga ne muoyi wabu mujima. Mpindiewu, udi muenze malu bu muntu mutomboke. Biangatshile ku lelu, mvita neyikukuate." 
2Chronicles16:10 Asa kufikila muambi Anani munda. Kumueleshaye mu nzubu wa lukanu, bualu miaku ya muambi Kua mimukebe tshiji tshikole be! Tshikondu atshi, Asa kutuadija kukengesha bamue bena ditunga." 
2Chronicles16:11 Malu a mukalenga Asa a ku ntuadijilu too ne a ku ndekelu kua bukalenga buende, mbaafunde mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles16:12 Asa mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi asatu ne tshitema, kutuadijaye kusama makasa bikole. Kadi kavua mulombe diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila to. Kuyaye anu kudi bamunganga bondapianganyi." 
2Chronicles16:13 Asa mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi anayi ne tshimue, kufuaye." 
2Chronicles16:14 Kumujikabu mu lukita lukuabu lua ku nkita ivuaye mumbuishe mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kujikabu tshitalu tshiende muaba uvuabu basangishe manananshi a bungi a mishindu mishilangane. Manananshi awu bavua baenza kudi bantu bavua bamanye mudimu awu bikole. Bavua bosha manananshi mavule mu dina dia mukalenga Asa. 
2Chronicles17:1 Yosafate ke uvua mupingane tatuende Asa mu bukalenga. Kushindikaye bukalenga buende bikole. 
2Chronicles17:2 Kutekaye bisumbu bia bena mvita mu bimenga bionsu bivua bena Yuda bakoleshe ne bimana. Kutekaye balombodi mu bukalenga buende, too ne mu bimenga bionsu bivua tatuende Asa munyenge bena Efrayime." 
2Chronicles17:3 Maweja-Nangila uvua nende, bualu Yosafate uvua muitabe Maweja-Nangila bu muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze ku ntuadijilu wa bukalenga buende. Kavua uya kudi mvidie Baale bua kumukonka malu to." 
2Chronicles17:4 Kadi, uvua uditatshisha bua kumanya disua dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bende, ne bua kuitaba mikenji yende. Kabavua benze nanku mu bukalenga bua ku mutu wa ditunga to." 
2Chronicles17:5 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kushindika bukalenga bua Yosafate. Bena Yuda bonsu bavua balambule Yosafate bintu bia kumusankisha nabi. Nanku uvua ne bubanji, kabidi ne lumu lua bungi." 
2Chronicles17:6 Uvua ne disanka dia kulonda tshivua Maweja-Nangila musue. Mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Yosafate uvua mukandike miaba ivua bena ditunga batendelela mvidie ya bantu benyi. Uvua mupule kabidi makunji a kutendelela nawu mvidie." 
2Chronicles17:7 Yosafate mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu bisatu, kutumaye balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende bua kuya kulongesha mu bimenga bia bena Yuda. Bantu abu bavua: Benayile, Obadya, Zekarya, Netaneyele ne Mikaya." 
2Chronicles17:8 Bavua ne bena Levi tshitema: Shemaya, Netaniya, Zebadya, Ashayele, Shemiramote, Yonatane, Adoniya, Tobiya ne Tobe-Adoniya. Bavua kabidi ne batuangaji babidi: Elishama ne Yorame." 
2Chronicles17:9 Bavua bambule mukanda udi ne mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Kuendakanabu mu tshimenga tshionsu tshia bena Yuda bua kulongesha bantu. 
2Chronicles17:10 Makalenga onsu avua ku mutumba kua ditunga dia bena Yuda, kutshinawu Maweja-Nangila. Muntu nansha umue kavua mua kuluisha Yosafate to." 
2Chronicles17:11 Bena Peleshete mene bavua batuadila Yosafate milambu ne bintu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bia kumuambuluisha nabi. Bena Arabe bavua bamutuadila mikoku ya bimpanga binunu muanda mutekete ne nkama muanda Mutekete, ne mbuji ya mpumbu amu bungi bua momumue." 
2Chronicles17:12 Bukole bua Yosafate buvua buenda budiunda amu kudiunda. Kuasaye nzubu mikolesha ne bimana pa mikuna, kabidi ne bimenga mu ditunga dia Yuda, bua kutekamu mayeba." 
2Chronicles17:13 Nanku mu bimenga bia mu bukalenga buende, muvua biakudia bia bungi. Bena mvita bende ba bukitu bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles17:14 Bena mvita aba bavua babateke mu tshimenga atshi bilondeshile meku abu. Mu tshisamba tshia Yuda, muvua balombodi ba bena mvita aba: Adna uvua ulombola bena mvita ba bukitu binunu nkama isatu;" 
2Chronicles17:15 Yowanane, uvua ulombola bena mvita binunu nkama ibidi makumi muanda mukulu;" 
2Chronicles17:16 Amashiya, muena Zikri, uvua mudibuelele nkayende ku mudimu wa Maweja-Nangila, ulombola bena mvita ba bukitu binunu nkama ibidi." 
2Chronicles17:17 Mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine muvua Eliyada, muena mvita wa bukitu. Uvua ulombola bena mvita binunu nkama ibidi, bavua ne ngabu ne mikete ya kuluangana nayi." 
2Chronicles17:18 Kuvua kabidi Yozabade, uvua ulombola bena mvita lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu, bavua bamanye mua kuluangana." 
2Chronicles17:19 Bena mvita bonsu aba ke bavua benzela mukalenga Yosafate mudimu mu Yerushalayime. Uvua kabidi ne bena mvita bakuabu bavuaye muteke mu bimenga bia bukalenga buende, bivuaye mukoleshe ne bimana." 
2Chronicles18:1 Mukalenga Yosafate uvua ne bubanji ne lumu. Uvua museleshe muanende wa balume mukaji, muana wa Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele." 
2Chronicles18:2 Bidimu bimane kupita, Yosafate kuya kudi Akabe, mu tshimenga tshia Samariya. Akabe kushipa mikoku ya bungi ne ngombe, bua kuakidila Yosafate ne bantu bavuaye nabu. Pashishe, Akabe kulomba Yosafate, bua baye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshivua mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
2Chronicles18:3 Akabe kukonka Yosafate ne: — Udi mua kumfila mu mvita bua tuetu kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade anyi? Yosafate kuandamuna ne: — Wewe ne meme tukadi bantu bamue. Bantu bebe mbanyi, banyi mbebe. Tudi tuya nebe pamue mu mvita." 
2Chronicles18:4 Kadi Yosafate kuambila Akabe ne: — Bangabanga, ukonke Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles18:5 Nanku, Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kubikidisha bambi bende nkama inayi. Kubakonkaye ne: — Tudi mua kuya kuluangana, bua kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, anyi katuena mua kuya? Bambi kuandamuna ne: — Udi mua kuya. Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles18:6 Kadi, mukalenga Yosafate kukonka Akabe ne: — Munemu kamuena muambi mukuabu nansha umue, udi mua kutukonkela Maweja-Nangila anyi?" 
2Chronicles18:7 Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuandamuna ne: — Munemu mudi anu muambi mukuabu umuepele. Dina diende mMika, muana wa Imla. Kadi tshiena mumunange to. Bualu misangu yonsu udi ummanyisha amu malu mabi. Katshia katu muanji kungambila bualu buimpe to. Yosafate kuandamuna ne: — Lekela kuamba muambi nanku." 
2Chronicles18:8 Ke Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele, kubikila muntu uvua ukuata mudimu mu lubanza lua nzubu wa bukalenga. Kumutumaye lukasa bua kuya kubikila Mika, muana wa Imla." 
2Chronicles18:9 Pavua bambi balondela bantu malu, Akabe mukalenga wa Izrayele, ne Yosafate mukalenga wa Yuda, bavua basombe mu nkuasa yabu ya bukalenga. Bavua bavuala bilamba biabu bia bukalenga, basombe mu tshialu tshivua pabuipi ne tshibuelelu tshia tshiibi tshia tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Chronicles18:10 Muntu kampande, dina diende Sedekiya, muana wa Kenaane, uvua muenze nsengu ya tshiamu. Kuambaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nsengu eyi ke tshimanyinu tshidi tshileja bukole buudi ubutula nabu bena mvita ba bena Arame.”" 
2Chronicles18:11 Bambi bakuabu bonsu kuambulula miaku ayi, bamba ne: — Mukalenga, uye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Neutshimune. Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles18:12 Muntu uvua muye kukeba Mika, kuambila Mika ne: — Teleja, bambi bonsu mbambile mukalenga Akabe meyi a mushindu umue ne: neutshimune. Wewe kabidi umuambile meyi a mushindu umue ne a bambi bakuabu. Umujadikile ne: neutshimune." 
2Chronicles18:13 Kadi muambi Mika kuandamuna ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, nemmuambile anu tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi musue." 
2Chronicles18:14 Muambi Mika ufika kudi mukalenga Akabe, mukalenga Akabe kumukonka ne: — Muambi Mika, tudi mua kuya kuluangana bua kukuata tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, anyi katuena mua kuya? Muambi Mika kumuambila ne: — Udi mua kuya. Neutshimune. Maweja-Nangila neafile tshimenga atshi mu bianza biebe." 
2Chronicles18:15 Kadi, mukalenga Akabe, kumukonka kabidi ne: — Paudi wakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela ne: ungambile anu malu malelela! Tshidi Maweja-Nangila mukuambile ntshinyi?" 
2Chronicles18:16 Ke muambi Mika kumuambila ne: — Ndi mumone bena Izrayele bonsu, bamuangalake pa mikuna, bu mudi mikoku kayiyi ne mulami. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena Izrayele kabatshiena ne bamfumu to. Muntu yonsu apingane kuende talalaa.”" 
2Chronicles18:17 Akabe mukalenga wa Izrayele kuambila Yosafate ne: — Mvua mumane kukuambila ne: muambi Mika udi ungambila anu malu mabi misangu yonsu. Katshia katu muanji kungambila bualu buimpe to! 
2Chronicles18:18 Kadimuambi Mika kuamba kabidi ne: — Teleja anu tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba. Ndi mumone Maweja-Nangila musombe mu nkuasa wende wa bukalenga. Bena mudimu bende bonsu ba mu diulu bavua bimane, aba ku dia balume diende, bakuabu ku dia bakaji." 
2Chronicles18:19 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kukonka ne: “Udi mua kuya kushima Akabe bua kuyaye kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua kumushipabu mu tshimenga atshi nnganyi?” Kufilabu meji mashilangane." 
2Chronicles18:20 Diba adi mutumibue uvua ulombola bambi, kusemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, umuambila ne: “Meme nenye kumushima.” Maweja-Nangila kukonka ne: “Neuye kumushima mushindu kaayi?”" 
2Chronicles18:21 Mutumibue kuandamuna ne: “Nensake bambi bonsu, bua bambile mukalenga Akabe malu a dishima.” Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: “Ke mushindu muimpe mutambe bua kumushima. Uye kuenza nanku!”" 
2Chronicles18:22 Eyowa, bionsu abi mbimane kuenzeka. Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mutume mutumibue bua adinge bambi bebe bonsu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi mumane kujadika bua kukubutula." 
2Chronicles18:23 Diakamue, Sedekiya, muana wa Kenaane, kusemena kudi muambi Mika, kumutapa dipi, ukonka ne: — Muudi mua kujadika ne: Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila mmumane kunshiya meme, bua kukuakuisha anu wewe mmunyi?" 
2Chronicles18:24 Muambi Mika kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, wewe mene neujadike bionsu ebi, dituku diwikala ukeba muaba musokome wa wewe kubutama mu tshibambalu tshia munda mua nzubu webe." 
2Chronicles18:25 Pashishe, Akabe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele kuambila bena mudimu bende ne: — Nukuate muambi. Numufile kudi mulombodi wa tshimenga tshia Amone, ne kudi Yowashe, muana wa mukalenga." 
2Chronicles18:26 Nubambile ne: mukalenga Akabe udi wamba bua kuela mulumiana awu mu lukanu. Bamupeshe anu kapese ka diampa ne mayi a kunua, too ne pangapingana katakata ku mvita eyi." 
2Chronicles18:27 Mika kumuandamuna ne: — Wewe mupingane katakata, nanku meme tshiena muakule mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila to. Udi ne matshi a kumvua asangane kumvua anyi?" 
2Chronicles18:28 Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele, ne Yosafate, mukalenga wa Yuda, kuyabu kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ramote tshidi mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
2Chronicles18:29 Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele, kuambila Yosafate ne: — Ndi musue kuya mu mvita mushindu udi bantu kabammanyi. Nanku nemvuale bilamba bia patupu bua ngenze bu muntu mukuabu. Kadi wewe Yosafate uvuale bilamba biebe bia bukalenga. Nanku Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele, mumane kuvuala bilamba bia patupu, kuyabu mu mvita." 
2Chronicles18:30 Kadi, mukalenga wa bena Arame uvua mukandike bamfumu balombodi ba bena mvita bende, bavua ne matempu ende a mvita, bua kabaluishi bena mvita bakuabu, nansha balombodi ba bena mvita to. Uvua ubambila ne: muluishi wenu ke Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele." 
2Chronicles18:31 Nanku, bamfumu bavua ne matempu a mvita bamone Yosafate, kuambilanganabu ne: ke Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele ewu. Kumuelabu munkatshi bua kumuluisha. Kadi, Yosafate kulomba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Awu kumuambuluisha, kuipata baluishi bende." 
2Chronicles18:32 Nanku, pavua bendeshi ba matempu bajadike ne: muntu awu ki mmukalenga wa Izrayele nansha, kulekelabu kumulondakaja." 
2Chronicles18:33 Kadi muena mvita mukuabu wa bena Arame kuela mukete mu mpukapuka. Mukete awu kuasa Akabe, mukalenga wa Izrayele, kubuela mu mubidi pankatshi pa bitata bia kazaku kende ka mvita. Mukalenga Akabe kuambila muntu uvua wendesha ditempu diende dia mvita ne: — Pingana panyima! Umuka nanyi mu mvita, tshiena mumvue bimpe to, mbantape mputa!" 
2Chronicles18:34 Dituku adi, mvita ivua mipite bukole. Nanku, Akabe mukalenga wa Izrayele uvua ne bua kushala muaba awu, muimane mu ditempu diende dia mvita, mululamangane ne bena mvita ba bena Arame, kayi mua kumuka. Pambi diba kubuela, kufuaye!" 
2Chronicles19:1 Yosafate, mukalenga wa Yuda, kupingana katakata mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles19:2 Muambi Yeku, muana wa Anani, kufika bua kumuakidila, umukonka ne: — Uvua muambuluishe muntu muenzayi bua tshinyi? Bantu badi babenga Maweja-Nangila, tuetu tudi mua kubananga anyi? Maweja-Nangila mmukufikile munda bua bualu buudi muenze ebu!" 
2Chronicles19:3 Bushuwa malu makuabu auvua muenze adi mempe. Mu ditunga diebe uvua muoshe makunji a kutendelela nawu mvidie mukaji Ashera. Uvua muitabe, mutumikile kabidi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi webe mujima." 
2Chronicles19:4 Yosafate uvua musombe mu Yerushalayime. Kadi kutuadijaye kuendakana tshiakabidi mu ditunga, biangatshile ku Bersheba too ne ku buloba bua mikuna ya Efrayime. Uvua wambila bena Izrayele, bua bapingane kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu." 
2Chronicles19:5 Kutekaye bandumbulula mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda, bivuaye mukoleshe ne bimana." 
2Chronicles19:6 Kuambilaye bandumbulula abu ne: — Nuenze mudimu wenu bimpe. Kanuena nulumbuluisha mu dina dia bantu to, kadi mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Yeye mene neikale nenu panudi nukosa nsambu." 
2Chronicles19:7 Nunemeke Maweja-Nangila. Nudimuke bua binudi nuenza. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kena musue buenzayi, kansungansunga, nansha bintu bia mabuejila." 
2Chronicles19:8 Yosafate uvua muteke kabidi mu Yerushalayime bena Levi, batuangaji ne bamfumu ba meku a bena Izrayele, bua balumbuluishe bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, bakose matandu adi munkatshi mua bena tshimenga." 
2Chronicles19:9 Yosafate uvua muambile bandumbulula ne: — Nunemeke Maweja-Nangila, bua numone mua kulumbuluisha bantu pa bualu, kanuyi nuela meji ku tshintu tshikuabu." 
2Chronicles19:10 Padi bana benu bandumbulula bafuma mu bimenga bidibu basombe, banulomba meji bua bualu bua dishipangana, nansha bua malu makuabu adi atangila meyi, mikenji ne mikandu, nubumvuije mushindu udibi. Nanku bantu abu, kabakuenzela Maweja-Nangila bibi to. Nuenze mundi munuambile emu bua kanuikadi bena tshibawu." 
2Chronicles19:11 Amariya, mutuangaji munene, neakenkete malu onsu adi atangila dinemeka dia Mvidi Mukulu. Zebadya, mulongeshi wa mu bukalenga, muana wa Ismayele, neatangile malu a bulongolodi bua ditunga. Bena Levi nebanuambuluishe mu midimu yonsu eyi. Nanku ndayi, nuenze mudimu wenu ne muoyi mukole. Maweja-Nangila neambuluishe bonsu badi benza bimpe." 
2Chronicles20:1 Pashishe, bena Mowabe ne bena Amone kudisangisha ne bena Meyuni, buakuluisha Yosafate." 
2Chronicles20:2 Bantu kufika, bua kumanyisha mukalenga Yosafate ne: — Bena mvita bapite bungi mbafike bua kukuluisha. Bena mvita aba mbafumine dishiya dia Mayi manene a luepu, ku ditunga dia bena Edome. Mpindiewu mbasombele mu Ashashone-Tamare, mmomumue ne: mu Ene-Ngedi." 
2Chronicles20:3 Yosafate kumvua bowa, ujinga kukonka Maweja-Nangila. Kuambilaye bena Yuda bonsu bua bajile biakudia." 
2Chronicles20:4 Bena Yuda ba mu bimenga bionsu bia mu ditunga, kufika mu Yerushalayime, bua kulomba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles20:5 Yosafate kuimana munkatshi mua bena Yerushalayime, ne bena Yuda bakuabu bonsu. Kutangilaye ku lubanza lupialupia lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles20:6 Kutendelelaye, wamba ne: — Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu, wewe udi musombe mu diulu. Bisamba bionsu bidi ku bumfumu buebe! Wewe udi ne bukole buonsu, kabidi ne bumfumu. Nanku, kakuena muntu udi mua kutua nkanana kumpala kuebe." 
2Chronicles20:7 Wewe Mvidi Mukulu wetu ke uvua muipate bena ditunga edi pafiki bantu bebe bena Izrayele. Buloba ebu, kuena mubupeshe ndelanganyi ya mulunda webe Abrahame kashidi anyi?" 
2Chronicles20:8 Ndelanganyi ayi kusombamu, kukuashila muaba wa tshijila bua kuntendelelamu. Pashishe kuambabu ne:" 
2Chronicles20:9 “Padi dikenga ditukuata, nansha tshipupu, mvita, disama dikole dia tshiambu, nansha tshiyole tshia nzala, netufike anu ku muaba wa tshijila eku, — kuudi wewe, bualu udi musombeku. — Nenumbikile mu dikenga dietu, bua wewe kunteleja, kutuambuluisha. ”" 
2Chronicles20:10 Nanku mpindiewu, tangila bena Amone, bena Mowabe, ne bena Edome, badi batuluisha. Pavua bankambua betu bapatuke mu Ejipitu, uvua mubakandike bua kabafiki mu buloba bua bantu aba to. Bankambua betu bayile njila mukuabu. Kabavua bababutula to." 
2Chronicles20:11 Kadi bobu badi batupingajila bibi lelu, batuipata mu buloba buuvua mutupeshe!" 
2Chronicles20:12 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kuena mua kubanyoka anyi? Katuena ne bukole bua kuluangana ne bena mvita aba bungi nenku, badi bavua kutuluisha. Tudi bapange tshia kuenza. Ke patudi batangile kuudi, tukusengelela." 
2Chronicles20:13 Bena Yuda bonsu, bakaji kabidi ne bana, bavua bimane kulu kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles20:14 Munkatshi mua tshisangilu, Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kutulukila Yaziyele, muena Levi, muana wa Zekarya, muikale kabidi muikulu wa Benaya. Benaya uvua muana wa Yeyele, ne muikulu wa Mataniya, ndelanganyi ya Ashafe." 
2Chronicles20:15 Yaziyele kuela diyi ne: — Telejayi bimpe, nuenu bonsu badi basombe mu Yerushalayime, kabidi nuenu bena Yuda, ne nangananga wewe Yosafate. Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Kanutshinyi, kanupampakanyi, bua bungi bua bena mvita aba. Mvita eyi ki nyenu to, kadi idi yanyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles20:16 Malaba nenupueke, nuye kudi baluishi benu badi banu-vuila ku luseke lua njila wa bilongu. Nenupetangane nabu ku ndekelu wa lubuwa ludi lutangilangane ne tshipela tshia Yeruwele!" 
2Chronicles20:17 Kanuakuikala ne tshilumbu tshia kubaluisha muaba awu to. Nuenu bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda, nuimane amu muaba awu, numone mundi nnupikula. Kanutshinyi, kanupampakanyi. Malaba nuye kudibu. Nengikale nenu. ”" 
2Chronicles20:18 Yosafate kudiela panshi kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila. Bena Yuda bonsu, ne bena Yerushalayime kabidi, kudiela panshi bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles20:19 Pashishe bena Levi ba mu tshiota tshia Kekate ne tshia Kora kujuka, kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele ne diyi dikole." 
2Chronicles20:20 Patshiatshia kuyabu bonsu mu tshipela tshia Tekowa. Pa kuyabu, Yosafate kubambila ne: — Bena Yerushalayime, bena Yuda, ntelejayi! Tekemenayi kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nenupete bukole. Tekemenayi kudi bambi bende. Nenutshimune mvita!" 
2Chronicles20:21 Yosafate kumyuangana ne bantu, kuteka bena misambu kumpala kua bena mvita. Bena misambu bavua bavuale bilamba bia tshijila, batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bamba ne: “Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi!”" 
2Chronicles20:22 Pavuabu batuma musambu wa kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, Maweja-Nangila kubueja tshimvundu munkatshi mua bena Amone, bena Mowabe, ne bena Edome, bavua bafike bua kuluisha bena Yuda. Nanku bena lukinu babu kuluishangana nkayabu." 
2Chronicles20:23 Bena Amone ne bena Mowabe kutuadija kuluisha bena Edome, kubashipa bonsu. Pashishe bena Amone ne bena Mowabe kushipangana nkayabu." 
2Chronicles20:24 Bena Yuda kuya muaba uvuabu mua kumona tshipela. Kukebabu muaba uvua baluishi babu. Kumonabu anu bitalu nkayabi bilale panshi. Kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua munyeme. 
2Chronicles20:25 Yosafate ne bantu bende kutuadija kupawula bintu bivua muaba uvua bitalu abi. Kusanganabu nyama ya bungi, bintu bia bubanji, bilamba, ne bintu bikuabu bia mushinga mukole. Bavua banenga matuku asatu bua kuambula bintu abi, bualu bivua bipite bungi. Kadi kabavua mua kuambula bionsu to." 
2Chronicles20:26 Dituku dinayi, kusangilabu mu tshibandabanda tshia Beraka. — Muaba awu, batshidi bawinyika dina edi too ne lelu, bualu mmuaba uvuabu belela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidilae. —" 
2Chronicles20:27 Bantu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime, ne bena Yuda bakuabu, pamue ne Yosafate uvua ubalombola, kupinganabu mu Yerushalayime ne disanka. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubasankishe, bualu uvua mubapandishe mu bianza bia baluishi babu." 
2Chronicles20:28 Kubuelabu mu Yerushalayime, benda bimba lunzenze, tshisanji ne mpungi, batangile ku nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles20:29 Bakalenga ba bisamba bikuabu bamane kumvua ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mmutshimune baluishi ba bena Izrayele, kumutshinabu." 
2Chronicles20:30 Nanku bukalenga bua Yosafate kushala mu ditalala, bualu Mvidi Mukulu wende uvua mumupeshe bupole nseke yonsu ya mu ditunga diende." 
2Chronicles20:31 Yosafate uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda muikale ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bitanu. Uvua mushale mukalenga mu Yerushalayime bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Mamuende wa Yosafate uvua Azuba, muana wa Shili." 
2Chronicles20:32 Yosafate uvua muenze malu mimpe, ulonda tshilejilu tshia tatuende Asa, usankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles20:33 Kadi kavua mukandike miaba ivua bantu baya kutendelela mvidie. Nanku bantu kabavua bitabe Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu muabu muonsu to. 
2Chronicles20:34 Malu onsu makuabu a Yosafate, mbaafunde mu: Mukanda wa Malu a Yeku, muana wa Anani. Mukanda ewu bavua baubueja mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles20:35 Kadi Yosafate, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, uvua mudisangishe kabidi ne Akaziya, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, muntu wa nsombelu mubi." 
2Chronicles20:36 Kumwanganabu bua kuenza matu manene adi mua kuya miaba mile. Bavua benzela matu awu mu tshisabu tshia Eshiyone-Ngebere. 
2Chronicles20:37 Kadi muambi Eliyezere, muana wa Dodava, wa mu tshimenga tshia Maresha, uvua muambile Yosafate ne: — Bu muudi mumvuangane ne Akiziya, Maweja-Nangila neabutule matu audi muenzeje. Bushuwa, majuwa kaakaya kule to. Kudinawu mu mayi." 
2Chronicles21:1 Yosafate mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu lukita lua bena diku diabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Yorame, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles21:2 Yorame uvua ne bana babu ba balume ba bungi. Bonsu aba bavua anu bana ba mukalenga Yosafate. Mena abu adi nenku: Azariya, Yekiyele, Zekarya, Azariyaku, Mikayele ne Shefatya." 
2Chronicles21:3 Tatuabu Yosafate uvua mubapeshe bintu bia bungi bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bia mpawungi, ne bintu bikuabu bia mushinga mukole. Uvua muteke bana bende abu bua bikale balombodi ba bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana bia amu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kadi kusungulaye Yorame bua amupingane mu bukalenga, bualu Yorame uvua muanabute." 
2Chronicles21:4 Yorame kupingana tatuende mu bukalenga, kushindika bukalenga buende. Kushipeshaye bana babu bonsu. Kushipeshaye kabidi ne balombodi bakuabu ba mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles21:5 Yorame kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu muanda mukulu mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles21:6 Uvua wenza malu mabi anu bu muvuabu benza kudi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele, nangananga kudi bena diku dia Akabe. Bualu Yorame uvua musele muana wa Akabe. Nanku, Yorame uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge." 
2Chronicles21:7 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kavua musue kubutula nzubu wa Davide to. Bualu uvua mutue ndondu ne Davide, mumulaye ne: ndelanganyi yebe neyishale kashidi mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles21:8 Mu matuku avua Yorame mu bukalenga, ke muvua bena Edome batombokela bena Yuda, badisunguile mukalenga." 
2Chronicles21:9 Yorame kuya ne balombodi bende ba bena mvita ne matempu ende a mvita onsu. Bena Edome bavua babela munkathi. Kadi munda nkulu mua butuku, mukalenga Yorame ne balombodi ba matempu a mvita, kusambukabu milongu ya bena mvita ba bena Edome, kunyema." 
2Chronicles21:10 Biangatshile musangu awu, bena Edome kushala badikadile, kabayi ku bumfumu bua bena Yuda kabidi to. Tshikondu atshi, bena tshimenga tshia Libna kutombokela kabidi bukalenga bua Yorame, kushalabu badikadile. Bualu Yorame uvua mubenge kuitaba Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bende." 
2Chronicles21:11 Yorame uvua muenze mene miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu pa mikuna ya Yuda. Nanku Yorame uvua mufikishe bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda ku dibenga Mvidi Mukulu mulelela. 
2Chronicles21:12 Dituku dikuabu, Yorame kupeta mukanda ufumina kudi muambi Eliya. Uvua mufunde ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua webe Davide, udi wamba ne: kuena mulonde tshilejilu tshia tatuebe Yosafate, nansha tshia kakuebe Asa, mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles21:13 Kadi udi mulonde tshilejilu tshia bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. Udi mufikishe bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda, ku ditendelela mvidie ya tshianana, bu muvuabu benza kudi bena diku dia Akabe. Udi mushipe kabidi bana benu ba balume bavua bakupite ku malu mimpe." 
2Chronicles21:14 Nanku Maweja-Nangila neatumine bantu bebe, bana bebe ba balume, bakaji bebe, ne bionsu biudi nabi, tshipupu." 
2Chronicles21:15 Wewe neupete masama mashilangane. Disama dikuabu dia mashi nedikunemenene ku dituku dionsu too ne muikala mala ebe apatuka munda.” 
2Chronicles21:16 Maweja-Nangila kusaka bena Peleshete ne bena Arabe bavua mutumba ne bena Kushe bua kuluisha Yorame. 
2Chronicles21:17 Bantu abu, kuluisha ditunga dia bena Yuda, kubuelamu. Kukuatabu bintu bionsu bivua mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kukuatabu bana ne bakaji ba mukalenga ku bupika. Yorame kushala anu ne Akaziya, muanende wa mukala." 
2Chronicles21:18 Malu onsu aa mamane kuenzeka, Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yorame disama dikole dia mu mala, didi kadiyi dijika." 
2Chronicles21:19 Disama divua dienda dinemenena. Bidimu bibidi bimane kupita, mala ende kupatuka panshi bua disama adi. Yorame kufua munkatshi mua dikenga dinene. Kadi bantu bende kabavua batemesha kapia bua kumunemeka, bu muvuabu benzele bankambua bende to." 
2Chronicles21:20 Yorame uvua mubuele mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi. Uvua mushale mukalenga bidimu muanda mukulu mu Yerushalayime. Yeye mumane kufua, muntu nansha umue kavua munyingalale bua lufu luende to. Bavua bamujike mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kadi kabavua bamujike mu nkita idibu bajika bakalenga to." 
2Chronicles22:1 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, kusungula Akaziya muana mukala wa Yorame, bua ikale mukalenga pa muaba wa tatuende. Bualu bana ba balume bakuabu bonsu ba Yorame, bakavua bamane kubashipa kudi tshisumbu tshia bena Arabe, bavua babuele mu mitanda ya bena mvita ba bena Yuda. Ke muvua Akaziya, muana wa Yorame, mushale mukalenga wa bena Yuda nanku," 
2Chronicles22:2 muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime tshidimu tshimue. Mamuende uvua Atalya wa mu diku dia Omri. 
2Chronicles22:3 Akaziya kabidi uvua wenza anu bibi, bu muvuabu benze kudi bena diku dia Akabe, bualu mamuende uvua umupesha meji a kumufikisha ku bubi." 
2Chronicles22:4 Akaziya uvua wenza malu avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu bu muvuabu benza kudi ndelanganyi ya Akabe. Tatuende wa Akaziya mumane kufua, bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Akabe aba, bakavua bafidi ba ngenyi ba Akaziya. Kupeshabu Akaziya meji mabi avua mua kumujimija." 
2Chronicles22:5 Bualu ndelanganyi eyiivua miambile Akaziya, bua kuyabu ne Yorame, muana wa Akabe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua kuluisha Azayele, mukalenga wa bena Arame, ku Ramote mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Munkatshi mua mvita, bena Arame kutapa Yorame mputa." 
2Chronicles22:6 Nanku Yorame kupingana mu Yizreyele bua kudiondapisha mputa ayi. Ke Akaziya kuya ku Yizreyele bua kuya kusamba Yorame uvua usama. 
2Chronicles22:7 Nenku, dikumbula dia Yorame edi, ke divua Maweja-Nangila mupetele mushindu wa kushipa Akaziya. Bualu amu Akaziya ufika, kuyaye ne Yorame bua kumonangana ne Yeku, muana wa Nimshi. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila uvua muanyishe bua bajidile Yeku mu bukalenga, bua amone mua kushipa bena diku dia Akabe." 
2Chronicles22:8 Nanku, Yeku kushipa bena diku dia Akabe, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu muambe. Uvua musangane bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne bana babu ne Akaziya, bonsu bavua benzela mukalenga mudimu. Kubashipaye." 
2Chronicles22:9 Pashishe, Yeku kukeba Akaziya, kumusangana musokome mu tshimenga tshia Samariya. Kumukuatabu, kuyabu nende kudi Yeku, kumushipabu. Kadi bavua bamujike, bualu bavua bambilangane ne: udi muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Yosafate, mukalenga uvua muenze muende muonsu bua kutumikila Maweja-Nangila. Mu diku dia Akaziya, kamuvua muntu uvua mukumbanyine mua kushala mu bukalenga to." 
2Chronicles22:10 Atalya, mamuende wa Akaziya, mumane kamvua ne: muanende wa balume mmufue, kuelaye meji a kushipa bantu balume bonsu ba ku ndelanganyi ya mu diku dia bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles22:11 Kadi pavuabu bashipa ndelanganyi ayi, Yosheba, mukaji wa mu diku dia bukalenga, kunyema mu musokoku ne Yowashe, muana wa Akaziya. Yosheba kusokoka Yowashe ne ndeji wende mu tshibambalu tshia kulala tshivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua Atalya kamushipi to. — Yosheba, mukaji wa mutuangaji Yoyada, uvua muana wa Yorame, mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Nanku uvua yayende wa Akaziya. —" 
2Chronicles22:12 Yowashe ne bavua bamulame, bavua bashale bidimu bisambombu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshikondu atshi, Atalya uvua mukalenga mu ditunga." 
2Chronicles23:1 Tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshivua Atalya mu bukalenga, mutuangaji Yoyada kuleja bukitu buende. Kutuaye ndondu ne balombodi ba bena mvita aba: Azariya, muana wa Yerowame; Ismayele, muana wa Yowanane; Azariya, muana wa Obede; Masheya, muana wa Adaya; ne Elishafate, muana wa Zikri." 
2Chronicles23:2 Bantu aba bavua bendakana miaba yonsu mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Mu bimenga bionsu, bavua babikila bena Levi ne balombodi ba meku a bena Izrayele, pashishe kupinganabu nabu bonsu mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles23:3 Bantu bonsu aba, bamane kusangila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kutuabu ndondu mu dina dia mukalenga Yowashe. Yoyada kubambila ne: — Monayi Yowashe, muana wa mukalenga! Yeye ke udi ne bua kushala mukalenga, bilondeshile muvua Maweja-Nangila mulaye bua ndelanganyi ya Davide." 
2Chronicles23:4 Nanku, enzayi mushindu ewu. Padi batuangaji ne bena Levi batuadija kuenza mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, tshisumbu tshia kumpala netshilame mishiku ya nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles23:5 Tshisumbu tshibidi netshilame nzubu wa bukalenga. Tshisumbu tshisatu netshilame tshiibi tshia ku Tshitaku tshia nzubu. Bantu bonsu nebimane mu lupangu lua ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
2Chronicles23:6 Muntu kena mua kubuela mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila to. Anu batuangaji ne bena Levi badi benza mudimu, ke badi mua kubuela, bualu mbantu bajidila. Nanku bantu bakuabu bonsu badi mua kunemeka mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila ayi." 
2Chronicles23:7 Bena Levi bakuabu nebele mukalenga munkatshi, bikale ne bia mvita mu bianza. Nebendakane nende miaba yonsu. Muntu mukuabu udi ukeba mua kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu nebamushipe." 
2Chronicles23:8 Bena Levi ne bena Yuda bonsu kuenzabu muvua mutuangaji Yoyada mubafundile. Mfumu yonsu kusangisha bantu bende, nansha bavua batuadija mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, nansha bavua baujikija dituku adi. Bualu mutuangaji Yoyada kavua muanyishe bua tshisumbu nansha tshimue tshikishe dituku adi to." 
2Chronicles23:9 Yoyada kupesha balombodi ba bena mvita mafuma ne ngabu mishilangane bivua bia mukalenga Davide, bivuabu bateke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles23:10 Kuimanyikaye bantu bonsu, ne difuma mu bianza, benza mu tshitangu, biangatshile mu ditumba dia kuinshi dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu too ne ku ditumba dia ku mutu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu. Nanku, bavua bimane kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne kua tshilambuilu, bamane kudilongolola bua kulama mukalenga Yowashe nseke yonsu." 
2Chronicles23:11 Pashishe, mutuangaji Yoyada kupatula Yowashe, kumuasa tshifulu tshia bukalenga, kumupesha mukanda wa ndondu. Ke Yoyada ne bana bende ba balume, kuela Yowashe mafuta pa mutu bua kumujidila mu bukalenga. Nanku bantu bonsu kuela mbila, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Yowashe akuate ku mundundu!”" 
2Chronicles23:12 Pavua Atalya mumvue mutoyi wa bantu bavua benda batumbisha mukalenga, kuyaye kudi bantu abu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles23:13 Kumonaye mukalenga mupiamupia, muimane kulu pabuipi ne dikunji divua ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Balombodi ba bena mvita ne bedi ba mpungi, bavua bimane pabuipi nende. Bantu bonsu bavua ne disanka. Bamue bavua bela mpungi, bakuabu bimba bisanji, balombola misambu. Nanku, Atalya kupanda bilamba biende, wela mbila ne: — Mbangelele tshifufu! Mbangelele tshifufu!" 
2Chronicles23:14 Yoyada kavua musue bua bashipele Atalya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to. Ke pawaye ubikidisha balombodi ba bena mvita, ubambila ne: — Nupatuke nende, nuenu bamulame. Muntu yeye munutonde, numushipe." 
2Chronicles23:15 Kuyabu ne Atalya luseke lua ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Bafike nende ku tshiibi tshia nyama ya Tubalu, kumushipabu." 
2Chronicles23:16 Mutuangaji Yoyada kutua ndondu, pamue ne mukalenga Yowashe, kabidi ne bena Izrayele bonsu, bua bonsu bikale tshiakabidi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles23:17 Nanku, kuyabu mu nzubu wa Baale. Kupulabu nzubu awu. Kunyangakajabu bilambuilu ne mpingu bivuamu. Kushipabu Matane, mutuangaji wa mvidie Baale, kumpala kua tshilambuilu." 
2Chronicles23:18 Pashishe, Yoyada kuteka batuangaji ba bena Levi, bua balame nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Davide uvua mubatapulule mu bisumbu bua kulambulabu milambu ya kuosha mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, bilondeshile bivuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Moshe. Uvua mubafundile bua kulambulabu milambu eyi, bikale kabidi bimba misambu ya disanka." 
2Chronicles23:19 Yoyada uvua muteke kabidi bantu bua balame biibi bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kababuedimu kudi muntu udi mupie mikiya." 
2Chronicles23:20 Yoyada kusangisha kabidi balombodi ba bena mvita, bamfumu ne balombodi ba ditunga, pamue ne bantu bonsu. Kupatukabu ne mukalenga mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuya nende mu nzubu wa bukalenga, bapitshila ku tshiibi tshia kulu. Pavuabu babanjija Yowashe mu nkuasa wa bukalenga," 
2Chronicles23:21 bantu bonsu bavua basanka. Bamane kushipa Atalya, mu tshimenga kushalamu talalaa." 
2Chronicles24:1 Yowashe ne bidimu muanda mutekete, kubuela mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi anayi. Mamuende wa Yowashe uvua Sibiya wa mu tshimenga tshia Bersheba." 
2Chronicles24:2 Yowashe uvua wenza malu adi Mvidi Mukulu musue, matuku onsu avua mutuangaji Yoyada ne muoyi." 
2Chronicles24:3 Yoyada kuselesha Yowashe bakaji babidi. Yowashe kulela nabu bana ba balume ne ba bakaji. 
2Chronicles24:4 Matuku mamane kupita, Yowashe kuela meji a kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles24:5 Kusangishaye batuangaji ne bena Levi, ubambila ne: — Nuye mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda, nusangishe makuta kudi bena Izrayele bonsu, bua numone mua kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wenu ku tshidimu ku tshidimu. Nuye lukasa, kanujingakanyi to. Kadi bena Levi kabavua benze mudimu ewu lukasa to." 
2Chronicles24:6 Nanku mukalenga Yowashe kubikila Yoyada, mutuangaji munene, kumukonka ne: — Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, pamue ne bena Izrayele bonsu, bavua bajadike mudibu mua kufila bitadi bua muaba wa tshijila, udibu bateke mushete wa ndondu. Kadi kuena mulombe kudi bena Levi, bua balambuishe bena mu Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bitadi abi bua tshinyi?" 
2Chronicles24:7 Bualu, badi ku luseke lua Atalya, muena buenzayi, bavua balekela nzubu unyanguka. Bavua bangate kabidi bintu bia tshijila bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, baye kutendelela nabi mvidie Baale." 
2Chronicles24:8 Mukalenga Yowashe kutuma diyi, bua benze mushete, bauteka pa mbelu, ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles24:9 Pashishe, kumanyishabu mu Yerushalayime ne mu bukalenga bonsu, bua muntu yonsu alambule Maweja-Nangila mulambu uvua Moshe, muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, mufundile bena Izrayele, pavuabu bapitshile mu tshipela." 
2Chronicles24:10 Bamfumu ne bena Yuda bonsu kufika ne disanka. Kuelabu makuta avuabu ne bua kufila mu mushete tente. 
2Chronicles24:11 Pavua bena Levi babala makuta mu mushete mu dina dia mukalenga, bavua basangana makuta mapite bungi. Nanku, mufundi wamalu a mukalenga, ne muena mpala wa mutuangaji munene, kuangatabu makuta awu. Pashishe kupingajabu mushete pa muaba wawu. Nanku, dituku dionsu, kuenzabu anu mushindu umue. Kupetabu makuta a bungi." 
2Chronicles24:12 Mukalenga Yowashe ne mutuangaji Yoyada kufila makuta awu kudi balombodi ba bena mudimu wa nzubu. Kuangatabu bena mudimu, basongi ba mabue, ne bena mabaya, kabidi ne bantu badi bamanye bikole mudimu wa kufula biamu bifike ne bikunze, bua kulongololabu ne kulengejabu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles24:13 Bu muvuabu bamanye mua kuenza mudimu awu, kulongololabu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu lukasa. Kushalaye mukole muimpe mutambe, anu muende mua kale." 
2Chronicles24:14 Midimu yonsu mimane kujika, balombodi ba bibaki ba nzubu kupingajila mukalenga Yowashe ne mutuangaji Yoyada makuta avua mashale. Makuta awu, kuenzejabu nawu bintu bishilangane bia kuteka mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu: bintu bia kutendelela nabi, biamu bia kulambula nabi milambu, makopu ne ngesu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Matuku onsu avua mutuangaji Yoyada ne muoyi, bavua balambula milambu ya kuosha misangu yonsu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles24:15 Mutuangaji Yoyada mumane kukulakaja bikole, kufuaye muikale ne bidimu lukama ne makumi asatu." 
2Chronicles24:16 Kumujikabu mu nkita ya bena diku dia bukalenga, mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Bualu uvua muenzele bena Izrayele malu mimpe. Uvua munemeke kabidi Mvidi Mukulu ne nzubu wende." 
2Chronicles24:17 Mutuangaji Yoyada mumane kufua, bamfumu ba bena Yuda kufika kudi mukalenga Yowashe bua kumonangana nende. Mukalenga kuteleja majinga abu." 
2Chronicles24:18 Ke muvua bena Izrayele balekela nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu, bua kuya kukukuila makunji ne mpingu bivuabu benza bua kutendelela mvidie. Bua buenzayi abu, Mvidi Mukulu kufikila bena mu Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda munda." 
2Chronicles24:19 Pashishe, Mvidi Mukulu kubatumina bambi bua bababele, bua bapingane kudiye. Kadi, muntu nansha umue kavua muteleje bambi abu to."
