2Chronicles24:20 Nanku, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kutulukila mutuangaji Zekarya, muana wa Yoyada. Zekarya kujuka kulu kumpala kua bena Yuda, kubambila ne: — Telejayi Mvidi Mukulu, udi unukonka ne: “Nudi nubenga meyi ne mikenji bianyi bua tshinyi? Kanuakuikala bena diakalenga to! Nudi bambenge. Eyowa, meme kabidi nennubenge!”" 
2Chronicles24:21 Bena Yuda kuelela mutuangaji Zekarya tshifufu tshibi. Mukalenga Yowashe kubabikila bua base Zekarya mabue mu lubanza mene lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
2Chronicles24:22 Mukalenga Yowashe kupua muoyi malu mimpe onsu avuabu bamuenzele kudi Yoyada, tatuende wa Zekarya. Kushipeshaye Zekarya. Bangabanga ne Zekarya kukula muoyi, kuelaye mbila ne: — Maweja-Nangila atangile bidi bienzeka, akunyoke!" 
2Chronicles24:23 Ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu, bena mvita ba bena Arame kufika bua kuluisha Yowashe. Kubuelabu ne mvita mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda ne mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Kushipabu bamfumu bonsu. Bintu bionsu bivuabu banyenga mu mvita, kubitumabu kudi mukalenga wabu mu Damase." 
2Chronicles24:24 Bena mvita aba kabavua ba bungi to. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kuanyisha bua batshimune bena mvita ba bena Yuda bavua bapite bungi. Bualu bena Yuda bavua babenge Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu. Ke mu wabu banyoke Yowashe nanku. 
2Chronicles24:25 Pashishe, bena Arame kumuka, kushiya Yowashe mu dikenga dinene. Nanku, balombodi ba bena mvita ba Yowashe kumuelela tshifufu tshibi, bua kumusombuela bua lufu lua muana wa mutuangaji Yoyada. Kumushipelabu mu bulalu buende. Kumujikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Kadi kabena bamujika mu nkita ya bena diku dia bukalenga to." 
2Chronicles24:26 Bantu bavua belele Yowashe tshifufu tshibi bavua: Zabade, muana wa Shimeyate, mukaji wa bena Amone, ne Yozabade, muana wa Shimrite, mukaji wa bena Mowabe." 
2Chronicles24:27 Mena a bana ba balume ba Yowashe, miaku mivule Kua bambi bakule bua kubela Yowashe, miaku idi itulondela mu wabu balongolole nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bionsu ebi mbabifunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: Diumvuija dia mukanda wa Bakalenga. Amashiya ke uvua mupingane tatuende Yowashe mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles25:1 Amashiya mumane kukumbaja bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu, kubuelaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema. Mamuende wa Amashiya uvua Yowadane wa mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles25:2 Amashiya uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, kadi kavua wenza malu aa ne disanka to." 
2Chronicles25:3 Amashiya mumane kushindika bumfumu buende, kushipeshaye balombodi ba bena mvita bavua bashipe tatuende Yowashe." 
2Chronicles25:4 Kadi kavua mushipe bana ba bantu bavua bashipe tatuende abu to. Bualu Amashiya uvua unemeka bivuabu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe. Maweja-Nangila udi wambamu ne: “Kabena mua kushipa baledi bua bubi bua bana babu, nansha bana bua bubi bua baledi babu. Badi mua kushipa muntu amu bua bubi buende yeye. ”" 
2Chronicles25:5 Amashiya kusangisha bantu ba mu bukalenga buende, bena Yuda ne bena Binyamine, kuteka balombodi ba bisumbu binene ne bikese, bilondeshile meku abu. Kubadikaye bungi bua bantu biangatshile ku bena bidimu makumi abidi too ne pa mutu. Kupetaye bantu binunu nkama isatu bavua bamanye mua kuluangana ne ngabu ne mafuma." 
2Chronicles25:6 Amashiya kuangata kabidi bena mvita ba bukitu ba bena Izrayele ku mudimu. Bena mvita abu bavua binunu lukama. Kubafilaye tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bu kilo binunu bisatu. 
2Chronicles25:7 Kadi muambi kampande kufika, umuambila ne: — Mukalenga, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kabena mua kuya nebe to, bualu Maweja-Nangila kena ne bena bukalenga bua ku mutu to." 
2Chronicles25:8 Wewe muye nabu, nansha wewe muluangane mvita muebe muonsu, Maweja-Nangila neakunyemeshe kumpala kua baluishi bebe. Bualu, anu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi mua kunuambuluisha bua nutshimune, nansha kuambuluisha badi mua kunutshimuna nuenu." 
2Chronicles25:9 Amashiya kukonka muambi ne: — Makuta amvua mupe bena mvita aa neaye penyi? Muambi kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi ne bukole bua kukupesha makuta makuabu mapite bungi. 
2Chronicles25:10 Amashiya kupingaja bena mvita, bavua bafume ku bukalenga bua ku mutu, kuabu. Bena mvita abu, kupingana kuabu ne tshiji tshikole, bafikile bena bukalenga bua Yuda munda." 
2Chronicles25:11 Amashiya kukolesha muoyi, kupita kumpala kua mulongu wa bena mvita bende, kuya mu tshibandabanda tshia Luepu. Kushipayemu bena mvita ba bena Edome binunu dikumi." 
2Chronicles25:12 Bena Yuda kukuata bena Edome bakuabu binunu dikumi, kuya nabu pa mutu pa lubuebue lule. Kubasakilabu mu lubuavu bua badishinde panshi, bafue bonsu." 
2Chronicles25:13 Nanku, bena mvita ba bena Izrayele bavua Amashiya mupingaje kuabu, mubapumbishe mua kuya nende mu mvita, kubuelabu mu bimenga bia bena Yuda, bivua pankatshi pa tshimenga tshia Samariya ne tshia Bete-Orone. Kushipabu bantu binunu bisatu ba mu bimenga ebi. Kukuatabu bintu bia bungi, kuya nabi." 
2Chronicles25:14 Pavua Amashiya ufuma ku mvita, mumane kutshimuna bena Edome, uvua muambule mpingu ya mvidie ya bena Edome. Kushalayi mvidie yende. Uvua uyitendelela, uyilambula milambu ya manananshi." 
2Chronicles25:15 Maweja-Nangila kufikila Amashiya munda. Ke kutumaye muambi kampande bua kumukonka ne: — Udi utendelela mvidieivua kayiyi ne bukole bua kukunyenga bantu bayi bua tshinyi? 
2Chronicles25:16 Kadi, mukalenga Amashiya kukabula muambi ku diyi, umukonka ne: — Ndi mukuteke mufidi wa ngenyi mu bukalenga anyi? Puwa, tshianana nebakuenzele bibi. Muambi kuanji kupuwa. Pashishe kuambaye ne: — Ndi mumanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kujadika bua kukushipesha, bualu uvua muenze bibi, mubenge mua kuteleja diyi dianyi." 
2Chronicles25:17 Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, uvua ulonda meji makuabu. Kutumaye bantu kudi Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, muana wa Yowakase, muikulu wa Yeku, bua kumuambila ne: “Fika kunu! Tuluangane nebe!”" 
2Chronicles25:18 Yowashe kuandamuna Amashiya ne: “Dituku dikuabu, mutshi wa meba uvua pa mukuna wa Lebanone. Kulombawu mutshi wa sedre ne: Anyisha bua muananyi wa balume asele muanebe. Kadi nyama wa tshisuku, kudiatakaja mutshi wa meba awu." 
2Chronicles25:19 Udi udisua bualu uvua mutshimune bena Edome! Eyowa, udi usanka uditambisha. Kadi somba amu ku nzubu kuebe! Kuena mumanye ne: mvita iudi ujinga ayi, neyikukebele anu makenga anyi? Bualu nebakutshimune wewe ne bena mvita bonsu ba bena Yuda.”" 
2Chronicles25:20 Kadi, Amashiya kavua muitabe bionsu bivua Yowashe mumuambile abi to. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue kubutula Amashiya, ne bena mvita bende, bua pavuabu banemeka mvidie ya bena Edome." 
2Chronicles25:21 Ke Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kuya mu mvita. Bena mvita bende kuluangana ne bena mvita ba Amashiya mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, mu tshimenga tshia Bete-Shemeshe." 
2Chronicles25:22 Bena mvita ba bena Izrayele kutshimuna bena mvita ba bena Yuda. Nanku bena mvita ba bena Yuda bonsu kunyema, kupingana kuabu." 
2Chronicles25:23 Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, kukuata Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ku Bete-Shemeshe. Amashiya, muana wa Yowashe, uvua muikulu wa Akaziya. Yowashe kumuka ku Bete-Shemeshe, kuyaye ne Amashiya mu Yerushalayime. Kupulaye bimana bia tshimenga atshi metre bu nkama ibidi, biangatshile ku tshiibi tshia Efrayime too ne ku tshiibi tshia Ditumba." 
2Chronicles25:24 Yowashe kuangata tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bintu bia mushinga bionsu, bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bivua Obede-Edome mulame. Kuangataye kabidi bintu bivua mu nzubu wa bukalenga, muaba uvuabu bateke bintu bia mushinga mukole. Pashishe, Yowashe kukuata kabidi ne bantu lukole, kupingana nabu mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Chronicles25:25 Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mumane kufua, Amashiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kushala kabidi ne muoyi bidimu dikumi ne bitanu." 
2Chronicles25:26 Malu onsu makuabu a ku ntuadijilu ne a ku ndekelu a mukalenga Amashiya, mbaafunde mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles25:27 Tshikondu tshivua Amashiya mutuadije kubenga Maweja-Nangila, bantu ba mu Yerushalayime kuelelabu Amashiya tshifufu tshibi. Dituku dikuabu, Amashiya kunyema, kuya mu musoku wa Lakishe. Kadi, kumulondakajabu mu musoku awu, kumushipelamu." 
2Chronicles25:28 Pashishe, kutekabu tshitalu tshiende mu ditempu dia mvita, kupingana natshi mu Yerushalayime. Ditempu adi, bavua badikoka kudi nyama ya tubalu. Kujikabu Amashiya mu nkita ya bena diku diabu." 
2Chronicles26:1 Pavua Uziya, muana wa Amashiya, ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu, bena Yuda kumusungula bua apingane tatuende mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles26:2 Nanku tatuende mumane kufua, Uziya kupingaja kabidi tshimenga tshia Elate ku bumfumu buende, kutshibakulula." 
2Chronicles26:3 Uziya kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda ne bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi atanu ne bibidi mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende Yekoliya uvua wa mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles26:4 Uziya uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua tatuende Amashiya muenze." 
2Chronicles26:5 Patshivua Zekarya, uvua mulongeshe Uziya mua kunemeka Mvidi Mukulu, ne muoyi, Uziya kuenza muende muonsu bua kumanya tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu musue. Mvidi Mukulu kumusankisha." 
2Chronicles26:6 Uziya kuya kuluisha bena Peleshete. Kunyangaye bimana bia mu tshimenga tshia Ngate, tshia Yabane, ne tshia Asdode. Pashishe, kukoleshaye bimenga ne bimana, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Asdode, ne mu buloba bukuabu bua bena Peleshete." 
2Chronicles26:7 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambuluishe Uziya, bua atshimune bena Peleshete, bena Arabe bavua basombe ku Ngure-Baale, ne bena Meyuni." 
2Chronicles26:8 Bavua balambula Uziya milambu too ne kudi bena Amone. Bumfumu bua Uziya kukolabu, lumu luende kuya miaba yonsu too ne ku mikalu ya ku Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles26:9 Uvua muibake tuleya tukole mu Yerushalayime pa mutu pa tshiibi tshia ku Ditumba, ne pa tshiibi tshia ku Tshibandabanda, too ne ku muaba uvua tshimana tshipite kumpala." 
2Chronicles26:10 Uvua muibake kabidi ne bibumba bia batentekedi mu buloba bua mu tshipela. Uvua mumbule bina bia mayi bia bungi, bualu uvua ne bimuna bivule ku muelelu wa Mayi manene, ne mu mpata. Uvua kabidi ne babidime, ne bena mudimu ba mitshi ya mvinyo pa mikuna, ne mu madimi a mvinyo, bualu uvua mupite kunanga didima." 
2Chronicles26:11 Uziya uvua ne bena mvita, bavua bamanye mua kuluangana. Bena mvita abu, bavua batapulula mu bisumbu, bilondeshile dibadika dia bantu divuabu benze kudi Yeyele mufundi, ne kudi Masheya mulombodi wa bukalenga, babaludika mu dibadika adi kudi Ananiya, umue wa ku balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga." 
2Chronicles26:12 Bena mvita ba bukitu aba bavua babalombola kudi bamfumu ba meku binunu bibidi ne nkama isambombu. 
2Chronicles26:13 Bena mvita aba, bavua binunu nkama isatu ne muanda mutekete ne nkama itanu. Bavua ne bukole bua bungi, bamane kudilongolola bua kuluangana ne baluishi ba mukalenga." 
2Chronicles26:14 Pavua mukalenga utuma bantu ku mvita, uvua ubapesha ngabu, mafuma, bifulu bia tshiamu, tuzaku tua tshiamu, ne mabue a kuela mu ndundu." 
2Chronicles26:15 Uziya uvua muenzeje mu Yerushalayime, biamu bia mvita bia mushindu mukuabu, kudi muntu uvua mupete meji a kubienza. Bavua bateke biamu abi ku tuleya ne ku matumba a bimana. Bavua mua kuela mikete ne mabue manene ne biamu abi. Bavua bambuluisha Uziya bikole kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Bumfumu buende kudiunda bikole, lumu luende kuya kule." 
2Chronicles26:16 Kadi, lumu luende luvua lumupeshe ditambisha dia bungi. Ditambisha edi kumufikisha ku kabutu. Kavua kabidi muitabe Mvidi Mukulu wende to. Dituku dikuabu, Uziya kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kulambula musenga wa kamonya pa tshilambuilu tshia manananshi." 
2Chronicles26:17 Azariya, mutuangaji munene, kubuela panyima pende mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Bavua bamushindikije kudi batuangaji makumi muanda mukulu ba Maweja-Nangila. Bonsu bawa bantu ba muoyi mukole." 
2Chronicles26:18 Kuimanabu kumpala kua mukalenga Uziya, bamuambila ne: — Mukalenga, kuena mua kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya manananshi to. Mudimu ewu ngwa batuangaji ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, badibu bamane kujidila bua mudimu ewu. Patuka muaba wa tshijila ewu, bualu udi wenza bidi Maweja-Nangila ubenga. Biudi wenza kabiena mua kukupesha lumu ku mesu kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu to." 
2Chronicles26:19 Uziya ukavua mumane kudilongolola bua kuosha musenga wa kamonya. Umvua nanku, kufikilaye batuangaji munda. Diakamue disama dia nsudi kumueneka mu mpala muende, patshivuaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pabuipi ne tshilambuilu tshia manananshi, muaba uvua batuangaji." 
2Chronicles26:20 Mutuangaji munene, ne batuangaji bakuabu bavua bamutangile. Kumonabu disama dia nsudi mu mpala muende. Kumupatulabu lukasa. Yeye nkayende kamvua ne: Maweja-Nangila mmunnyoke. Nanku kupatukaye lubilu muaba wa tshijila." 
2Chronicles26:21 Mukalenga Uziya kushala ne disama dia nsudi too ne ku lufu luende. Bualu bua disama adi, uvua musombe anu pa nkayende, kayi mua kumonangana ne bantu bakuabu, kayi kabidi ne mushindu wa kupingana mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Muanende wa balume Yotame uvua mulombodi mu nzubu wa bukalenga, ke uvuabu bapesha mudimu wa kulombola ditunga." 
2Chronicles26:22 Malu onsu makuabu a Uziya a ku ntuadijilu ne a ku ndekelu, mbaafunde kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa." 
2Chronicles26:22 Malu onsu makuabu a Uziya a ku ntuadijilu ne a ku ndekelu, mbaafunde kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa." 
2Chronicles26:23 Uziya mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu nkita ya bena diku dia bukalenga, kadi ki mu nkita ya bena diku diabu to, bualu uvua ne disama dia nsudi. Muanende wa balume Yotame kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles27:1 Yotame uvua anu ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu, pawaye mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Yotame uvua Yerusha, muana wa Sadoke." 
2Chronicles27:2 Yotame uvua muenze malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue. Uvua muenze malu mimpe anu bu tatuende Uziya, kadi kavua muenze tshilema tshia kubuela mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Kadi bena Yuda bavua bashale anu ne buenzayi buabu bua kale." 
2Chronicles27:3 Yotame ke uvua muenze tshiibi tshia kulu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mukoleshe bimana bia tshimenga miaba mishilangane mu tshitupa tshia Ofele. 
2Chronicles27:4 Uvua muase kabidi bimenga mu buloba bua mikuna ya bena Yuda. Uvua muibake kabidi nzubu mikole ne tuleya mu metu. 
2Chronicles27:5 Yotame uvua muye kuluisha mukalenga wa bena Amone, kumutshimunaye. Tshidimu atshi, bena Amone kulambula Yotame biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole kilo binunu bisatu, ntete ya kuenza bukula kilo bitoto bisatu ne kilo bitoto bisatu bia ntete ya oije. Bidimu bikuabu bibidi, kumulambulabu bintu bia mushindu umue." 
2Chronicles27:6 Nanku bukole bua Yotame buvua anu butungunuka, bualu uvua muitabe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende." 
2Chronicles27:7 Malu makuabu a Yotame, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Izrayele ne ba bena Yuda. Badi bafundamu mvita iwaye muluangane ne malu avuaye muenze." 
2Chronicles27:8 Yotame uvua mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles27:9 Yotame mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Muanende wa balume Akaze kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles28:1 Akaze uvua ne bidimu makumi abidi, pawaye mubuele mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne bisambombu mu Yerushalayime. Kavua muenze malu avua Maweja-Nangila musue, bu avua nkambua wende Davide muenze." 
2Chronicles28:2 Uvua mulonde amu buenzayi bua bakalenga ba bena Izrayele. Akaze uvua muengulule mene mpingu ya tshiamu mu kapia bua kutendelela mvidie Baale. 
2Chronicles28:3 Uvua ulambula milambu ya manananshi mu tshibandabanda tshia Inome. Uvua mulambule bana bende ba balume bu mulambu, bilondeshile bilele bibi bia bisamba bivua Maweja-Nangila muipate bua kushila bena Izrayele ditunga." 
2Chronicles28:4 Akaze uvua ulambula kabidi milambu ya nyama ne ya manananshi miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu, pa mikuna muinshi mua mitshi mibishi ya dileji." 
2Chronicles28:5 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, kufila Akaze mu bianza bia mukalenga wa bena Arame. Bena Arame kumuluisha, kukuata bantu ba bungi mu lukanu, kuya nabu mu tshimenga tshia Damase. Akaze uvua mubuele kabidi mu bianza bia Peka, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, muana wa Remaliya. Awu kumutshimuna, kumukengesha bikole." 
2Chronicles28:6 Dituku dimue, Peka kushipesha bena mvita ba bukitu ba bena Yuda binunu lukama ne makumi abidi. Bivua bienzeka nanku bualu bena Yuda abu, bavua babenga Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu." 
2Chronicles28:7 Kadi Zikri, muena mvita wa bena Efrayime, kushipa Masheya, muana wa mukalenga Azirikame, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, ne Elkana muntu uvua mukalenga wenda nende miaba yonsu." 
2Chronicles28:8 Pashishe, bena mvita ba bukalenga bua ku mutu mu ditunga, kukuata bakaji ne bana ba bena Yuda binunu nkama ibidi mu lukanu. Kuangatabu bintu bia bungi bia mu ditunga amu, kuya nabi mu tshimenga tshia Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:9 Mu Samariya amu, muvua muambi wa Maweja-Nangila, dina diende Obede. Kuyaye kuakidila bena mvita ba bena Izrayele, bavua bafike mu tshimenga amu. Kubambilaye ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, uvua mufikile bena Yuda munda. Ke padiye mubafile mu bianza bienu. Kadi nuvua bashipe bena mvita ba bena Yuda bapite bungi ne tshikisu tshipite. Tshikisu tshienu kumvuika ne mu diulu." 
2Chronicles28:10 Kabidi nudi ne dijinga dia kubueja bantu balume ne bantu bakaji aba, banudi bakuate mu Yerushalayime ne mu ditunga dia Yuda, mu bupika. Nuenu kanuena mua kupeta tshilumbu kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu anyi?" 
2Chronicles28:11 Ntelejayi, lekelayi bena lukanu ba bena Yuda, banudi bakuate, baye. Bualu, nuenu ke badi Maweja-Nangila mufikile munda mpindiewu." 
2Chronicles28:12 Nanku, bamfumu bakuabu ba bena Efrayime, kufikila kabidi bantu bavua bapingane ku mvita munda: ke Azariya, muana wa Yowanane, Berekiya, muana wa Meshilemote, Izkiya, muana wa Shalume, ne Amasha, muana wa Adlayi." 
2Chronicles28:13 Kukandikabu bena mvita abu ne: — Kanufiki ne bena lukanu abu munemu to. Nenutupeteshe tshilumbu tshinene kudi Maweja-Nangila. Tukadi bena tshibawu tshinene. Nulekele kutukebela tshibawu tshikuabu. Kanuena bamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila mmufikile bena Izrayele munda bikole anyi? 
2Chronicles28:14 Diakamue bena mvita kulekela bena lukanu. Kupingajabu ne bintu mene bivuabu banyenge, bamfumu ne bantu bonsu batangile." 
2Chronicles28:15 Bantu ba wabu bateke bua kuenza mudimu awu, kusamba bena lukanu. Kuangatabu bilamba ne bisabata bivuabu bapete mu mvita, kutapeshabu bena lukanu bavua kabayi nabi. Kubapeshabu biakudia ne mayi a kunua. Bavua bondapa mputa ya bavua batapike. Bantu bonsu bavua bapete njiwu mu mvita kabayi ne mushindu wa kuenda, bavua babambula pa nyama ya mpunde. Kuyabu ne bantu bonsu abu muaba uvua bana babu mu Yeriko, tshimenga tshia Mabue a ngaji. Pashishe, kupinganabu mu Samariya." 
2Chronicles28:16 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Akaze kubikidisha mukalenga wa bena Ashure bua amuambuluishe." 
2Chronicles28:17 Bualu, bena Edome bavua baluisha tshiakabidi bena Yuda, bakuate bantu, baye nabu mu bupika." 
2Chronicles28:18 Bena Peleshete kabidi bavua babuele ne mvita mu bimenga bivua mu mpata ya ku muelelu wa Mayi manene, ne mu buloba bua bena Yuda buvua kuinshi mu ditunga. Bavua bakuate bimenga ebi: Bete-Shemeshe, Ayalone, Ngederote, Soko, Timna, Ngimzo, ne misoku ivuabu nayi mutumba. Bena Peleshete kuasamu." 
2Chronicles28:19 Maweja-Nangila kukuatshisha bena bukalenga bua Yuda bundu, bualu mukalenga Akaze uvua mufikishe bantu ku dilengulula Maweja-Nangila. Yeye mene kavua muitabe Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles28:20 Mukalenga Tiglate-Pilesere wa bena Ashure, kufika bua kuluisha Akaze. Kumukengeshaye bikole pa mutu pa kumuambuluisha." 
2Chronicles28:21 Akaze kuangata bintu bikuabu bia bubanji bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bia mu nzubu wa bukalenga, ne bia kudi bakulu. Kubifilaye bionsu kudi mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Kadi, nansha Akaze muenze nanku, kavua mupete diambuluisha to." 
2Chronicles28:22 Nansha Akaze mu dikenga dikole nanku, uvua anu utombokela Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles28:23 Uvua ulambula mvidie ya mu Damase milambu. Mvidie ayi, keivua mimupangishe mua kutshimuna baluishi. Uvua wamba ne: “Mvidie ya bena Arame ke idi miambuluishe bakalenga ba bena Arame. Nanku, ndi musue kulambula mvidie ayi milambu bua imone mua kungambuluisha meme kabidi.” Kadi mvidie ayi, keivua mimukebele, yeye ne bantu bende, kabutu." 
2Chronicles28:24 Akaze kusangisha bintu bionsu bia tshijila bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubiboza. Kukangaye biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne milonda. Pashishe, kuenza bilambuilu mu masangu a njila onsu a mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles28:25 Mu tshimenga tshionsu tshia mu ditunga diende, uvua muenze miaba ya kulambuila mvidie ya bantu benyi milambu ya manananshi. Ke muvuaye mufikishe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bende munda nanku." 
2Chronicles28:26 Malu makuabu a Akaze onsu, biangatshile ku ntuadijilu wa bukalenga buende too ne ku ndekelu wabu, mbaafunde mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Izrayele. Badi bafundemu malu onsu avuaye muenze." 
2Chronicles28:27 Akaze mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu Yerushalayime. Kadi, kabavua bamujike mu nkita ya bena diku dia bukalenga to. Muanende wa balume Izkiya kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles29:1 Izkiya uvua ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu, pawaye mubuele mu bukalenga. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi ne tshitema mu Yerushalayime. Mamuende wa Izkiya uvua Abi, muana wa Zekarya." 
2Chronicles29:2 Izkiya uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze." 
2Chronicles29:3 Tshidimu tshia kumpala tshivua Izkiya mu bukalenga buende, ngondu wa kumpala, uvua munzulule biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi uvua mubilongolole." 
2Chronicles29:4 Uvua mubikidishe batuangaji ba bena Levi, mubasangishe pa muaba uvuabu binyike ne: muaba wa Luseke ludi Diba dipatukila." 
2Chronicles29:5 kubambilaye ne: — Ntelejayi, nuenu ndelanganyi ya Levi. Umushayi mikiya yenu mpindiewu. Pashishe numushe mikiya idi nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu nayi. Nupatule mu nzubu amu bintu bionsu bidi ne mikiya." 
2Chronicles29:6 Bankambua betu bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Bavua bamuvile, bamubenge. Kuelabu nyima ku muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila. Kubengabu kumutangila." 
2Chronicles29:7 Kukangabu biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne milonda, kulekelabu miendu idijimina nkayayi, kulengululabu mua kulambula milambu ya manananshi, ne milambu ya nyama, muaba wa tshijila wabena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles29:8 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kufikila bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda munda bikole, kubalekelaye. Nuenu bonsu nudi bamanye mudi bantu bapampakana pa kumvua batela tshilumbu atshi tshia bena Yuda, babaseka." 
2Chronicles29:9 Ke padi bana betu ba balume balue mu mvita, bakaji ne bana babuele mu bupika." 
2Chronicles29:10 Kadi meme ndi musue kutua ndondu ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, bua kutuyishaye tshiji tshiende tshikole tshivuaye mutukuatshile." 
2Chronicles29:11 Nuenu balunda banyi, kanuena mua kulengulula bualu ebu to. Bualu nuenu ke badi Maweja-Nangila musungule, bua nuimane kumpala kuenda, numutendelela, nuosha musenga wa kamonya mu dina diende." 
2Chronicles29:12 Bena Levi bavua basemena pabuipi bavua nenku: bena diku dia Kekate: ke Makate, muana wa Amashayi, ne Yowele, muana wa Azariya; bena diku dia Merari: Kishe, muana wa Abdi, ne Azariya, muana wa Yekalele; bena diku dia Ngershone: Yowa, muana wa Zima, ne Edene, muana wa Yowa;" 
2Chronicles29:13 bena diku dia Elishafane: Shimri ne Yeyiyele; bena diku dia Ashafe: Zekarya ne Mataniya; 
2Chronicles29:14 bena diku dia Emane: Yekiyele ne Shimeyi; bena diku dia Yedutune: Shemaya ne Uziyele. 
2Chronicles29:15 Bena Levi abu kusangisha bantu ba meku abu onsu. Bonsu kumusha mikiya ivuabu nayi. Pashishe, bu muvua mukalenga Izkiya mumane kubatumina diyi, bantu bonsu kuya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kumushamu mikiya, bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
2Chronicles29:16 Batuangaji kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kujikija mikiya yonsuivua munda mua nzubu amu. Bintu bionsu bivua mu tshibambalu tshinene bivua ne mikiya, batuangaji kubumusha, kubiteka mu lubanza lua ku nzubu awu. Bena Levi kuambula bintu abi, kupatuka nabi mu tshimenga, kuya kubimansha mu tshibandabanda tshia Sedrone." 
2Chronicles29:17 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, kutuadijabu kumusha bintu bia mikiya bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Dituku dia muanda mukulu, kufikabu mu lutanda lua nzubu awu bua kujikija mudimu onsu. Diumusha dia mikiya ya nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu divua dinenga kabidi matuku muanda mukulu. Nanku, dituku dia dikumi ne disambombu, mudimu wa kumusha mikiya kujika." 
2Chronicles29:18 Ke ndelanganyi ya Levi kuya kudi mukalenga Izkiya, kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga, tudi bumushe mikiya yonsuivua mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, ivua ku tshilambuilu tshia milambu, ivua ku mesa adibu bateka mampa a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu, ivua ku bintu bionsu bidi ku tshilambuilu ne ku mesa aku." 
2Chronicles29:19 Bua bintu bia tshijila, bivua mukalenga Akaze munyange ne mikiya matuku avuaye mu bukalenga, tudi babilengeje, babijidile tshiakabidi. Tudi nabi apa, kumpala kua tshilambuilu." 
2Chronicles29:20 Butshia mu dinda, mukalenga Izkiya kusangisha bakulu ba mu tshimenga, kuya nabu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles29:21 Kuangatabu ngombe milume muanda mutekete, mikoku ya bimpanga muanda mutekete, bana ba mikoku muanda mutekete, ne mbuji ya mpumbu muanda mutekete ya kulambula bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Milambu ayi bavua bayilambula: bua kulombela bena diku dia bukalenga ne bena Yuda bonsu luse, ne bua kujidila nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mukalenga Izkiya kuambila batuangaji ba ndelanganyi ya Arone, bua balambule milambu ayi pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles29:22 Kukosabu ngombe muminu. Batuangaji kukelekeja mashi, kuamiamina ku tshilambuilu. Pashishe, kukosabu mikoku ya bimpanga muminu, kumiamina mashi ayi ku tshilambuilu. Kukosabu kabidi bana ba mikoku muminu, kumiamina mashi ayi ku tshilambuilu." 
2Chronicles29:23 Bua mbuji ya mpumbu ya mulambu wa kukobolola bantu, bavua baye nayi muaba uvua mukalenga Izkiya ne bantu bakuabu bonsu. Mukalenga Izkiya ne bavuaye nabu kutenteka mbuji ayi bianza." 
2Chronicles29:24 Batuangaji kukosa mbuji ayi muminu, kumiamina mashi ayi ku tshilambuilu, bua kukobolola bantu bonsu bena Izrayele. Bualu mukalenga Izkiya uvua muele diyi ne: balambule milambu yonsu, ya kuosha ne ya kukobolola bantu, bua bena Izrayele bonsu." 
2Chronicles29:25 Ke mukalenga Izkiya kuteka bena Levi mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bena Levi abu bavua ne nzenze, ndibu ne nkombe, bu muvua mukalenga Davide muambe, muvuabu bambe kabidi kudi bambi, Ngade ne Natane, bavua benzela mukalenga mudimu. Ke diyi divua Maweja-Nangila muambile bambi bende abu, bua bamanyishe bantu bonsu." 
2Chronicles29:26 Bena Levi kuimana ne biombelu bivua Davide muenzeje. Batuangaji bavua bimane pabu ne mpungi. 
2Chronicles29:27 Izkiya kutuma diyi bua balambule milambu ya kuosha pa tshilambuilu. Pavuabu batuadija kulambula milambu, bavua bimba misambu bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bela mpungi, bimba biombelu bia Davide, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles29:28 Bantu bonsu bavua badiela panshi. Bena misambu bavua bimba, bena mpungi bela, too ne ku diba di wabu bajikije kulambula milambu." 
2Chronicles29:29 Bionsu bimane kujika, mukalenga Izkiya ne bonsu bavuaye nabu kutua binu, kutua mpala panshi." 
2Chronicles29:30 Mukalenga Izkiya ne bakulu kuambila bena Levi bua batumbishe kabidi Maweja-Nangila ne misambu ivuabu benze kudi Davide ne kudi muambi Ashafe. Bena Levi kuimba misambu ne disanka dinene, pashishe kudielabu panshi bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles29:31 Mukalenga Izkiya kuambila kabidi bantu ne: — Mpindiewu, nuenu badi ne milambu ya kulambula Maweja-Nangila, nuye nayi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kumulambula milambu ya bobumue, ne ya kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila! Bantu kuya ne nyama ya milambu ayi. Bantu ba kalolu kusakidila kabidi milambu mikuabu ya kuosha." 
2Chronicles29:32 Milambu yonsu ivuabu balambule Mvidi Mukuluivua nenku: bavua bafile ngombe milume makumi muanda mutekete, mikoku ya bimpanga lukama, ne bana ba mikoku nkama ibidi bu milambu ya kuosha." 
2Chronicles29:33 Bavua bafila kabidi ngombe nkama isambombu, mikoku ne mbuji binunu bisatu bua milambu mikuabu." 
2Chronicles29:34 Batuangaji bavua muaba awu kabavua bungi bukumbane, bua kusaya nyama yonsu ya milambu ya kuosha to. Nanku, bana babu bena Levi kubambuluisha bua kusaya nyama ayi, bindila batuangaji bakuabu batshi wa bajikija mudimu wa kumusha mikiya ivuabu nayi. Bualu bena Levi bavua bumushe mikiya lukasa, bapite batuangaji ku disuminyina." 
2Chronicles29:35 Kabidi batuangaji bamane kulambula milambu ya bungi ya kuosha, ivuabu ne bua kulambula pamue ne milambu ya maluvu a mvinyo, bavua ne bua kuoshila kabidi pa tshilambuilu minyinyiivua ne mafuta ya ku milambu ya bobumue. Ke muvuabu bapingaja ditendelela dimpe mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles29:36 Izkiya ne bantu bavuaye nabu kusanka bua pavua Maweja-Nangila mubambuluishe, bua kujikija bionsu abi lukasa." 
2Chronicles30:1 Mukalenga Izkiya kuyukila ne bakulu ba mu ditunga diende, pamue ne bena tshipangu tshia mu Yerushalayime bonsu, bua kumanya ne: mudi mushindu wa kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila mu ngondu muibidi wa tshidimu anyi? Bualu kabavua mua kuenza tshibilu atshi mu matuku a tshibidilu to, batuangaji bavua bajikije kumusha mikiya yabu kabayi bakumbane. Kabidi bena Izrayele kabavua badisangishe lukasa mu Yerushalayime to. Nanku mukalenga Izkiya ne bakulu bonsu bavua muaba awu, kuitaba lungenyi alu. Kujadikabu mua kubikila bena Izrayele bonsu: ba kuinshi mu ditunga, ne ba ku mutu, bua bafike mu Yerushalayime, bua kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Bualu anu bantu bakese batshivua benza tshibilu etshi, bilondeshile mudibu bafunde. Mukalenga Izkiya kutuma bantu mu buloba bonsu bua Izrayele ne bua Yuda, bua kuambila bantu ne: nufike mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, nuenze tshibilu, bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Izkiya uvua mufundile kabidi bisamba bia ku mutu wa ditunga mukanda wa dibabikila." 
2Chronicles30:2  
2Chronicles30:3  
2Chronicles30:4  
2Chronicles30:5  
2Chronicles30:6 Bantu bava Izkiya mutume abu, kuendakanabu mu buloba bua bena Izrayele ne bua bena Yuda. Mikanda ivuabu nayi ayi, bavua bayitua tshiala kudi mukalenga Izkiya ne bakulu ba mu ditunga diende. Bilondeshile bulongolodi bua mukalenga Izkiya, bantu abu bavua bamba ne: — Nuenu bena Izrayele bavua bapanduke ku mvita ya bena Ashure, pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame, wa Izake ne wa Yakobe. Diba adi, Yeye neapingane kunudi." 
2Chronicles30:7 Kanulondi buenzayi bua batatuenu, nansha bua bana benu bavua batombokela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubabutule bu munudi bamanye bajadike." 
2Chronicles30:8 Kanuenji buenzayi bua bankambua benu to. Itabayi Maweja-Nangila, pinganayi muaba wende wa tshijila uvuaye mujidile bua kashidi. Nushale bantu ba Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nanku bu muvuaye munufikile munda bikole, tshiji tshiende netshituye." 
2Chronicles30:9 Nuenu bapingane kudi Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu bavua bakuate bana benu, ne bena meku enu, nebabafuile luse. Nebabalekele bua bapingane mu ditunga edi. Nanku, nuenu bapingane kudiye, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kakunulekela to, bualu udi muena luse ne dinanga." 
2Chronicles30:10 Bantu bavua Izkiya mutume abu, kuendakanabu mu buloba bua Efrayime ne bua Menashe. Kupitshilabu mu bimenga bionsu. Pashishe kuyabu mu tshisamba tshia Zebulone. Kadi muaba awu bantu bavua babaseka, babalembakaja." 
2Chronicles30:11 Kadi bantu bakuabu ba mu tshisamba tshia Ashere, tshia Menashe, ne tshia Zebulone, kuvuluka muvuabu benze bibi. Nenku kuyabu mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles30:12 Mu bukalenga bua Yuda, Maweja-Nangila kuambuluisha bantu, bua bitabe bonsu ne muoyi umue mua kukumbaja bionsu bivua mukalenga Izkiya ne bakulu babambile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles30:13 Ngondu muibidi, musumba wa bantu kudisangisha mu Yerushalayime, bua kuenza tshibilu tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga. Bantu abu bavua bapite bungi." 
2Chronicles30:14 Kudianjilabu kumusha bilambuilu bivua mu tshimenga, too ne bia kulambuila manananshi. Kubimanshabu mu tshibandabanda tshia Sedrone." 
2Chronicles30:15 Dituku dia dikumi ne dinayi dia ngondu awu, kushipabu nyama ya tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Batuangaji ne bena Levi bavua bumvue bundu, bualu bavua ne mikiya. Nanku kumushabu mikiya ayi, bua bamone mua kubuela ne milambu ya kuosha mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles30:16 Bavua baye kusomba pa miaba yabu ya tshibidilu, bilondeshile muvua mikenji ivua Moshe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mubafundile. Bena Levi bavua bapesha batuangaji mashi a nyama ivua bantu balambula. Batuangaji bavua bamiamina mashi awu ku tshilambuilu." 
2Chronicles30:17 Bu muvua bantu bavule bavua basangile bikale ne mikiya, kabayi mua kulambula Mvidi Mukulu milambu, bena Levi bavua bashipa nyama pa mutu pa bantu abu." 
2Chronicles30:18 Bantu ba bungi, nangananga ba mu tshisamba tshia bena Efrayime, tshia bena Menashe, tshia bena Isakare, ne tshia bena Zebulone, kaba-vua bumushe mikiya yabu to. Kadi bavua amu badia biakudia bia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, kabayi banemeka meyi adibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji. Kadi Izkiya kulombela bantu abu kudi Maweja-Nangila, wamba ne:" 
2Chronicles30:19 “Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu, ufuile bantu aba luse, nansha bobu kabayi banji kumusha mikiya, kabayi lelu bantu ba tshijila. Kadi badi amu baditatshisha ne muoyi wabu mujima bua kumanya tshiudi musue.”" 
2Chronicles30:20 Maweja-Nangila kuitaba dilomba dia Izkiya. Kavua munyoke bantu abu to. 
2Chronicles30:21 Bena Izrayele bavua mu Yerushalayime kuenza tshibilu matuku muanda mutekete tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga. Dituku dionsu bena Levi ne batuangaji bavua batumbisha Maweja-Nangila ne biombelu bia muadi mukole. Biombelu abi bavua babilongolola anu bua kutumbisha nabi Maweja-Nangila. 
2Chronicles30:22 Izkiya kukolesha bena Levi ku muoyi, bualu bavua bakuatshila Maweja-Nangila mudimu muabu muonsu. Lumingu lujima bantu bavua badia pamue biakudia bia tshibilu, balambula milambu ya bobumue, batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu." 
2Chronicles30:23 Bantu bonsu bavua bumvuangana bua kutungunuka ne tshibilu matuku makuabu muanda mutekete. Lumingu luibidi alu bantu bavua amu ne disanka," 
2Chronicles30:24 bualu mukalenga Izkiya uvua mupeshe bantu ngombe milume tshinunu, ne mikoku binunu muanda mutekete. Bakulu ba mu bukalenga bavua bafila kabidi ngombe milume tshinunu, ne mikoku binunu dikumi. Kabidi batuangaji bavua bamane kumusha mikiya, bavua ba bungi." 
2Chronicles30:25 Bantu bonsu ba-vua ne disanka: bena Yuda, batuangaji ne bena Levi, kabidi bantu bonsu bavua bafume ku bukalenga bua ku mutu wa ditunga, nansha bavua bamane kusomba mu bena Yuda kuonsu eku, nansha bavua bafika anu bua tshibilu." 
2Chronicles30:26 Disanka dia tshibilu edi divua dipite bunene. Nangananga bena mu Yerushalayime, ke bavua basanka bikole. Bualu biangatshile mu tshikondu tshia Shelomu, muana wa Davide, mukalenga wa Izrayele, kabavua banji kuenza kabidi tshibilu tshia mushindu ewu mu tshimenga to." 
2Chronicles30:27 Ku ndekelu batuangaji ba bena Levi kuimana kulu, kulomba Mvidi Mukulu bua ele bantu lupemba. Dilomba diabu kufika mu diulu, muaba wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ke Mvidi Mukulu kudikumbaja." 
2Chronicles31:1 Tshibilu tshimane kujika, bena Izrayele bonsu bavua muaba awu, kuya mu bimenga bia bena Yuda. Kubumbulabu mabue avua bantu bimanyike, kupulabu makunji a kutendelela mvidie, kunyangabu miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, ne bilambuilu biayi. Bena Izrayele bavua benza nanku mu bukalenga buonsu bua bena Yuda, mu tshisamba tshia bena Binyamine, tshia bena Efrayime ne tshia bena Menashe. Pashishe, muena Izrayele yonsu kupingana ku nzubu kuende mu tshimenga tshiende." 
2Chronicles31:2 Izkiya uvua mulongolole tshiakabidi bisumbu bia batuangaji ne bia bena Levi. Uvua mupeshe muntu yonsu mudimu bilondeshile tshisumbu tshivuaye. Batuangaji ne bena Levi bavua ne bua kulambula milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue, bavua ne bua kulombola midimu ya kutendelela, ya kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, ne ya kumutua makumbu." 
2Chronicles31:3 Mukalenga Izkiya uvua mufile bintu biende bikuabu, bua kusumba nyama ya milambu ivuabu ne bua kuosha dinda ne dilolu, kabidi ne bua kusumba nyama mikuabu, ivuabu balambula dituku dia Dikisha, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, ne mu bibilu bikuabu, anu muvuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles31:4 Mukalenga Izkiya kutumina bena mu Yerushalayime bonsu diyi, bua bapeshe batuangaji ne bena Levi bintu bionsu bidi bibafundila, bua bamone mua kuenza mudimu wabu anu ne muoyi mujima, bilondeshile mudi mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila yamba." 
2Chronicles31:5 Bena Izrayele bonsu bumvue bualu abu, kufilabu biakudia bia bungi bia tshianyi: ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, mafuta, buitshi ne biakudia bikuabu, kabidi ne tshia dikumi tshia bintu bionsu bivuabu nabi." 
2Chronicles31:6 Bena mu bimenga bia Yuda, ne bena Izrayele ba ku mutu wa ditunga, ne bena Yuda, kufilabu kabidi tshia dikumi tshia bimuna biabu: ngombe, mikoku, kabidi ne bintu bikuabu bia kulambula Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Bavua bakunguja mishiki minene ya bintu bishilangane." 
2Chronicles31:7 Kukungujabu bintu abi, biangatshile mu ngondu muisatu too ne ku ngondu wa muanda mutekete." 
2Chronicles31:8 Izkiya ne balombodi bamone bintu bia mu madimi bivua bantu bafile, kuelabu Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, kuelabu kabidi ne bantu bende bena Izrayele kalumbandi." 
2Chronicles31:9 Mukalenga Izkiya kuebeja batuangaji ne bena Levi ne: — Bintu ebi mbifume penyi? 
2Chronicles31:10 Azariya mutuangaji munene wa mu diku dia Sadoke, kuandamuna mukalenga Izkiya ne: — Katshia bantu batuadije kufila tshitupa tshia bintu bivuabu banowa mu madimi abu, mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tuvua tudia tukuta, tushala ne biakudia bikuabu bia bungi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muele bena Izrayele lupemba. Biakudia bidibu bakunguja muaba ewu ebi, ke bidi bishale." 
2Chronicles31:11 Nanku, mukalenga Izkiya kutuma diyi bua bantu balongolole nzubu wa kuteka biakudia ebi, pabuipi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bamane kuenza nanku," 
2Chronicles31:12 bavua bateka misangu yonsu bintu abi, ne milambu mikuabu ya tshijila mu nzubu amu. Kusungulabu Konaniya, muena Levi, bua kuikalaye mulami wa bintu abi. Kusungulabu ne muanabu Shimeyi bua kumuambuluisha." 
2Chronicles31:13 Mukalenga Izkiya, kabidi ne mutuangaji munene Azariya, uvua utangila nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua bela diyi ne: Konaniya ne Shimeyi balombole bantu aba: Yeldyele, Azariya, Nakate, Ashayele, Yerimote, Yazabade, Eliyele, Ismakiya, Makate ne Benaya." 
2Chronicles31:14 Tshiibi tshia ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua batshilame kudi muena Levi mukuabu, dina diende Kora, muana wa Imna. Muena levi awu uvua ne mudimu kabidi wa kuangata milambu ya budisuileivua bantu balambula Mvidi Mukulu, ne wa kuabanya bintu bia ku milambu ya tshijila, ne bia ku milambu ya tshijila menemene." 
2Chronicles31:15 Muena Levi awu, uvua ne bantu bavuaye ulombola bua kuenza mudimu ewu mu bimenga bia batuangaji. Bantu abu bavua: Edene, Miniyamine, Yeshuwa, Shemaya, Amariya ne Shekanya. Bantu abu bavua ne mudimu wa kuabanya biakudia kudi bantu bonsu, bakulumpe ne bana, bilondeshile mudimu uvua tshisumbu tshionsu tshienza." 
2Chronicles31:16 Biakudia abi, kabavua babipesha anu bantu bavuabu bafunde mena biangatshile ku bana ba bidimu bisatu to. Kadi, bavua babipesha kabidi bantu bonsu bavua benze mudimu wa butendeledi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, matuku onsu bilondeshile bisumbu biabu." 
2Chronicles31:17 Bavua babadike batuangaji bilondeshile ku meku abu. Kadi, bena Levi bavua bababadike biangatshile ku bidimu makumi abidi, bilondeshile bisumbu biabu ne midimu ivuabu benza." 
2Chronicles31:18 Bavua babadike bantu, babale ne bonsu bavua mu meku abu: bakaji, bana ba balume ne ba bakaji, ne bantu bonsu ba mu diku diabu, bavua mua kudia misangu yonsu bintu bia ku milambu ya tshijila." 
2Chronicles31:19 Kadi bua kudisha batuangaji, ndelanganyi ya Arone, bavua basombe mu misoku pabuipi ne bimenga bia batuangaji, bavua basungula bantu mu tshimenga tshionsu bua kubapesha biakudia. Bavua ne bua kuabanyina kabidi bena Levi, bavuabu bafunde mena abu mu mukanda, tshitupa tshiabu tshia biakudia." 
2Chronicles31:20 Bionsu bivua Izkiya wenza mu bukalenga buende bujima abi, bivua bimpe, biakane, bisankisha Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles31:21 Pavua Izkiya ulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ukuata mudimu bua bantu banemeke meyi ne mikenji bia Mvidi Mukulu, uvua wenza muende muonsu bua amanye tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Uvua muenze nanku ne muoyi wende mujima. Mvidi Mukulu uvua umuambuluisha." 
2Chronicles32:1 Izkiya mumane kuleja nanku mudiye muitabe Mvidi Mukulu, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kubuela ne mvita mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kuelaye bimenga bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana munkatshi bua kubikuata." 
2Chronicles32:2 Izkiya umona ne: Senakeribe udi usemena pabuipi ne Yerushalayime bua kutuluisha," 
2Chronicles32:3 kufilaye meji kudi balombodi ba bena mvita bende bavua bamulame, bua bajibikile mpokolu ya mayi yonsu, ivua ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Kuitababu bionsu bivuaye muambe." 
2Chronicles32:4 Nanku, bantu ba bungi kudisangisha, kujibikila mpokolu ya mayi yonsu, kujibikila ne tshibuelelu tshia mukidi wa muinshi mua buloba, uvua ufila mayi mu tshimenga. Bavua bambilangana ne: “Ki mbimpe bena Ashure basangane mayi a bungi padibu bafike munemu to.”" 
2Chronicles32:5 Bu muvua Izkiya ne muoyi mukole, kulongolueshaye tshimana tshia ku tshimenga miaba yonsu ivuatshi tshinyanguke. Kulepeshaye tuleya. Pashishe, kuibakabu tshimana tshikuabu tshibidi pa mpenga pa tshimenga. Kukoleshabu bimana bivua muaba uvua mushiki wa buloba mu Tshimenga tshia Davide. Izkiya kuenzeja misongolu ne ngabu mivule." 
2Chronicles32:6 Pashishe, kusungulaye balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mvita, bua kulombola bantu bavua mu thimenga. Kusangishaye bantu bonsu pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia mu tshimenga, kubakoleshaye ku muoyi wamba ne:" 
2Chronicles32:7 — Ikalayi bantu ba bukitu, nuleje muoyi mukole. Kanutshinyi tshintu nansha tshimue. Kanuzakadi bua mukalenga wa bena Ashure, ne bisumbu bia bungi bia bena mvita bidiye nabi. Bukole butudi nabu mbupite buende." 
2Chronicles32:8 Yeye udi ne bantu badi bamuambuluisha bua kuluangana. Kadi tuetu tudi ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi utuambuluisha, utuluila mvita. Mukalenga Izkiya wamba miaku ayi, bantu bonsu ba mu tshimenga kupeta dikima." 
2Chronicles32:9 Matuku mamane kupita, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, ne bena mvita bende bonsu, kuela tshimenga tshia Lakishe munkatshi. Pavuabu mu tshimenga atshi, mukalenga Senakeribe kutuma balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita kudi mukalenga Izkiya, ne kudi bena Yuda bonsu bavua ne mukalenga awu mu Yerushalayime, bua kubambila ne:" 
2Chronicles32:10 — Mukalenga Senakeribe wa bena Ashure udi ukonka ne: “Patudi bamane kuela Yerushalayime munkatshi, nudi nushala mu Yerushalayime, nutekemena kudi nganyi?" 
2Chronicles32:11 Izkiya udi unushima padiye unujadikila ne: Maweja-Nangila wenu neanupandishe ku tshianza tshianyi. Nenufue bonsu ne nzala ne nyota. 
2Chronicles32:12 Nangananga Izkiya ewu ki nguvua munyangakaje miaba yonsu ya kutendelela mvidie ne bilambuilubionsu bivuaku anyi? Uvua mukandike bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime bua kabatendeledi, kabalambudi milambu muaba mukuabu to, anu pa tshilambuilu tshimue epele tshidimu Yerushalayime!" 
2Chronicles32:13 Meme Senakeribe ne bankambua banyi, kanuena bamanye tshitudi benzela bisamba bikuabu bia pa buloba anyi? Mvidie ya bisamba ebiivua mimpangishe mua kukuata matunga abu anyi?" 
2Chronicles32:14 Kumvidie yamatunga onsu adi bankambua banyi banyanga, mvidie nansha umue ki mmupandishe bantu bende to. Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu wenu udi mua kunupikula kundi munyi?" 
2Chronicles32:15 Nanku kanuena mua kuitaba, bua Izkiya ikale unushima, unulembakaja nenku. Kanumuitabi to! Ndi ngamba, ngambulula ne: mvi-die nansha umue wa tshisamba kampande, nansha wa ditunga kansanga, kena mupikule bantu bende ku bianza bia bankambua banyi, nansha ku bianza bianyi to. Nanku mvidie yenu kayena mua kunusungidila nansha kakese.”" 
2Chronicles32:16 Bantu bavua mukalenga wa bena Ashure mutume, bavua amu bajana Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, bajana kabidi muntu wende Izkiya." 
2Chronicles32:17 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure uvua mufunde kabidi mukanda bua kusendeka Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele. Uvua mufunde mu mukanda amu ne: “Mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bia pa buloba, kayivua mipandishe bantu bayi ku bianza bianyi to. Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izkiya kena mua kunnyenga bantu bende, nansha kakese.”" 
2Chronicles32:18 Bantu bavua Senakeribe mutume, kuelabu mbila mikole mu muakulu wa bena Ebrewu, bamanyisha bantu bavua pa bimana bia Yerushalayime malu avua mu mukanda. Bavua bakeba kukuatshisha bantu abu bowa, kubatekesha ku muoyi, bua Senakeribe amone mua kukuata Yerushalayime kamuyi lutatu." 
2Chronicles32:19 Bavua batela Mvidi Mukulu wa Yerushalayime bu badi batela mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu, ya mitshi misonga kudi bantu." 
2Chronicles32:20 Pashishe, mukalenga Izkiya ne muambi Yeshaya muana wa Amosa, kutendelelabu Maweja-Nangila, bamulomba diambuluisha." 
2Chronicles32:20 Pashishe, mukalenga Izkiya ne muambi Yeshaya muana wa Amosa, kutendelelabu Maweja-Nangila, bamulomba diambuluisha." 
2Chronicles32:21 Maweja-Nangila kutuma mutumibue wende mu mitanda ya bena Ashure, bua kushipa bena mvita bonsu ba bukitu ne balombodi bonsu ba bena mvita. Mukalenga wa bena Ashure kupingana mu ditunga diende ne bundu. Dituku dikuabu, pavua Senakeribe ubuela mu nzubu wa mvidie wende, bana bende ba balume ba munda muende menemene kumushipa." 
2Chronicles32:22 Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mupandishe Izkiya ne bena Yerushalayime ku bianza bia Senakeribe mukalenga wa bena Ashure, ne ku bianza bia baluishi babu bakuabu. Maweja-Nangila kubueja ditalala miaba mikuabu yonsu." 
2Chronicles32:23 Bantu ba bungi kutuadila Maweja-Nangila milambu mu Yerushalayime. Kutuadilabu kabidi Izkiya mukalenga wa bena Yuda bintu bia kumusankisha nabi. Biangatshile musangu awu, kunemekabu mukalenga Izkiya kudi bena matunga onsu, bavuaye nabu mutumba." 
2Chronicles32:24 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Izkiya kupeta disama dia lufu. Kutendelelaye Maweja-Nangila. Awu kumujadikila ne: kuena ufua to." 
2Chronicles32:25 Kadi, Izkiya kavua wanyisha Mvidi Mukulu bua bionsu bivuaye mumuenzele. Uvua anu uditambisha. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kumufikila munda, kufikila kabidi bena Yerushalayime, ne bena bukalenga bua Yuda munda." 
2Chronicles32:26 Kadi, Izkiya ne bantu ba mu Yerushalayime, kutonda bubi buvuabu benze. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kavua mubanyoke ne tshiji matuku avua Izkiya mu bukalenga to." 
2Chronicles32:27 Izkiya uvua ne bintu bia bungi bia bubanji. Uvua kabidi ne lumu lunene. Uvua muenze miaba ya kuteka tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshia mpawungi, mabue a mushinga mukole, mafuta masambakaja ne manananshi, ngabu, ne bintu bikuabu bia mushinga mukole." 
2Chronicles32:28 Uvua muenze kabidi miaba mikuabu ya kuteka ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo ne mafuta. Uvua muibakishe bikumbi bia bimuna biende nempangu ya kulamina nyama yende." 
2Chronicles32:29 Kuasaye kabidi bimenga. Kupetaye bimuna bipite bungi: ke mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe, bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mumupeshe bubanji bua bungi." 
2Chronicles32:30 Izkiya ke uvua mujibikile mushiku wa mpokolu wa Ngikone, bua mayi apuekele muinshi mua buloba, aye ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, afike ne munda mua Tshimenga tshia Davide. Izkiya uvua ne diakalenga mu bionsu bivuaye wenze." 
2Chronicles32:31 Kadi pavua bamfumu ba bena Babilone batume bantu bua kumanya malu a dikema avua menzeke mu ditunga diende, Mvidi Mukulu uvua musue ne: Izkiya adienzele malu. Uvua muenze nanku bua kumuteta, bua kumanya muoyi udi Izkiya nawu." 
2Chronicles32:32 Malu makuabu a Izkiya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyike ne: Malu avua muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, mumanyishe bantu. Malu awu mbaafunde kabidi mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Izrayele. Mbafundemu muvua Izkiya muitabe Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles32:32 Malu makuabu a Izkiya mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyike ne: Malu avua muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amosa, mumanyishe bantu. Malu awu mbaafunde kabidi mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Izrayele. Mbafundemu muvua Izkiya muitabe Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles32:33 Izkiya mumane kufua, kumujikabu mu tshitupa tshia kulu tshia nkita ya ndelanganyi ya Davide. Diba dia madilu ende adi, bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bakuabu bonsu bavua batumbisha lumu luende. Muanende wa balume Menashe, kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles33:1 Menashe kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu dikumi ne bibidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi atanu ne bitanu mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles33:2 Menashe uvua wenza malu avua Maweja-Nangila mubenge. Uvua muenze malu mabi onsu avua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu benza. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubipate bua bashile bena Izrayele ditunga. 
2Chronicles33:3 Menashe kulongolola kabidi miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, Kuabu banyangakaje kudi tatuende Izkiya. Uvua muibakile mvidie Baale bilambuilu. Uvua muenze makunji a kutendelela mvidie. Yeye muine uvua utendelela mabulunge a mulu." 
2Chronicles33:4 Uvua muimanyike bilambuilu bikuabu bia kutendelela mvidie ya bantu benyi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime. Eku Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kuamba bua nzubu awu ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila nensombe mu nzubu emu kashidi. ” 
2Chronicles33:5 Menashe kuasa bilambuilu mu mbanza ibidi ya ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kutendelela mabulunge a mulu." 
2Chronicles33:6 Uvua mulambule ne bana bende ba balume bu mulambu mu tshibandabanda tshia Inome. Uvua wenza majimbu a mishindu mishilangane, ubuka lubuku lua muzangu. Nanku, Menashe uvua wenza amu kuenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, umufikisha munda." 
2Chronicles33:7 Uvua muenze kabidi lupingu lukuabu, muluteke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kuntendelela. Kadi, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muambile Davide ne muanende wa balume Shelomu ne: “Nzubu ewu udi mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshindi mumane kusungula ku bimenga bionsu bia mu buloba bua bena Izrayele, ke muaba undi nsomba kashidi munkatshi mua bantu." 
2Chronicles33:8 Padi bena Izrayele bakumbaja meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi, bionsu bivuabu babapeshe kudi muntu wanyi Moshe, tshiena mbumusha kabidi mu ditunga dimvua mumane kupesha bankambua babu to. ”" 
2Chronicles33:9 Kadi Menashe ke uvua mufikishe bena Yerushalayime, ne bena Yuda ku dienza bibi bipite bia bantu bavua kale mu ditunga adi, bavua Maweja-Nangila mubutule, bua bashile bantu bende bena Izrayele ditunga." 
2Chronicles33:10 Maweja-Nangila kubela mukalenga Menashe ne bantu bende bena Izrayele. Kadi, muntu nansha umue kavua mumuteleje to." 
2Chronicles33:11 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kubatumina balombodi ba bena m vita ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Kukuatabu Menashe, kumuela nkanu ku mbanga, kumusuikabu bikole ne nkanu, kuyabu nende ku Babilone." 
2Chronicles33:12 Pavua Menashe mu dikenga dinene, kutendelelaye Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende. Kutondaye bubi buende kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua bende." 
2Chronicles33:13 Uvua umulomba bua amufuile luse. Mvidi Mukulu kuitaba dilomba diende, kumupingaja mu Yerushalayime. Maweja-Nangila kumupingaja kabidi ne mu bukalenga buende. Biangatshile tshikondu atshi, Menashe kumanya ne: anu Maweja-Nangila ke udi Mvidi Mukulu mulelela." 
2Chronicles33:14 Malu onsu mamane kupita, Menashe kuibaka tshimana tshitumbuke ku mpenga kua Tshimenga tshia Davide. Tshimana atshi tshivua tshipitshila luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua mpokolu wa Ngikone, tshilonda tshibandabanda tshia Sedrone, tshinyungulula tshitupa tshia tshimenga tshia Ofele, tshiya too ne ku tshiibi tshia Minyinyi ya mu mayi. Uvua muteke balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mvita mu bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
2Chronicles33:15 Uvua mumushe mvidie ya bantu benyi ne lupingu, bivuabu bateke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua munyangakaje bilambuilu bionsu bivuaye muase pa mukuna uvua wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu Yerushalayime. Uvua mupatule bintu abi mu tshimenga, bua kuya kubimansha." 
2Chronicles33:16 Uvua mulongolole tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, mulambule milambu ya bobumue ne ya ditumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Uvua mutumine bena Yuda diyi bua batendelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles33:17 Bulelela, bantu batshivua balambula milambu miaba mikuabu ya kutendelela ya mu ditunga amu. Kadi, bavua balambula milambu ayi anu bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
2Chronicles33:18 Malu makuabu a Menashe mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele benze. Mu mukanda amu, mbafunde miaku ivua Menashe utendelela nayi Mvidi Mukulu, ne mikenji ivua bambi bamutumine mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
2Chronicles33:19 Mu mukanda wa malu a Ozayi mbafunde kabidi ditendelela diende, ne mushindu uvua Mvidi Mukulu muitabe dilomba diende. Mbafundemu malu mabi avuaye muenze, ne muvuaye mutombokele Mvidi Mukulu. Mbafundemu kabidi miaba iwaye muase nzubu, ne makunji ne mpingu bia kutendelela mvidie ya bantu benyi, pavuaye kayi muanji kutondela Mvidi Mukulu mibi yende." 
2Chronicles33:20 Menashe mumane kufila, kumujikabu pabuipi ne nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Muanende wa balume Amone kumupingana mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles33:21 Amone kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bibidi. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles33:22 Amone uvua muenze malu mabi adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu bu muvuabu benze kudi tatuende Menashe. Uvua utendelela mpingu ya mvidieivua tatuende muenze, uyilambula milambu." 
2Chronicles33:23 Kadi kavua utondela Mvidi Mukulu bubi buende, bu muvua tatuende Menashe muenze to. Uvua muenze malu mabi mapite a tatuende Menashe." 
2Chronicles33:24 Balombodi ba mvita ba mukalenga Amone kumuelela tshifufu tshibi, kumushipelabu mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles33:25 Kadi bana babu bena Yuda kushipabu bantu bavua belela mukalenga Amone tshifufu tshibi abu. Kusungulabu muanende wa balume Yoshiya bua kupingana tatuende Amone mu bukalenga. 
2Chronicles34:1 Yoshiya kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu muanda mukulu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu makumi asatu ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles34:2 Yoshiya uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila musue, anu bu muvua nkambua wende Davide muenze. Uvua ulonda bibidilu bionsu bia nkambua wende awu, kayi usesuka to." 
2Chronicles34:3 Tshidimu tshia muanda mukulu tshia bukalenga bua Yoshiya, yeye mutshikale nsongalume, kukebaye mua kumanya tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua wende Davide musue. Pashishe bidimu binayi bimane kupita, kutuadjaye kumusha miaba ya kutendelela mvidie ya bantu benyiivua mu Yerushalayime, ne mu bukalenga bua Yuda. Kumushaye kabidi makunji ne mpingu bia kutendelela mvidie bia mishindu yonsu." 
2Chronicles34:4 Kupulabu bilambuilu bionsu bia mvidie Baale, Yoshiya mutangile. Kutshibulabu musangu umue mbabula ya kuosha manananshi ivuabu bimanyike pa bilambuilu abi. Kupulabu makunji a kutendelela mvidie, kunyangakajabu mpingu ya mishindu mishilangane. Kuoshabu bionsu abi kubutula. Butu buabi kubutangalajabu muaba uvua nkita ya bantu bavua batendelela mvidie ya tshianana ayi." 
2Chronicles34:5 Pashishe, kuoshabu mifuba ya batuangaji ba bisamba bikuabu pa bilambuilu bivuabu balambuila milambu. Ke muvua Yoshiya mumushe mikiyaivua mu Yerushalayime ne mu bukalenga bua Yuda nanku." 
2Chronicles34:6 Pashishe, kuyaye mu bimenga bia bena Menashe, bia bena Efrayime, bia bena Shimeyone ne bia bena Naftali too ne mu maloba avuabu nawu mutumba." 
2Chronicles34:7 Yoshiya kupula bilambuilu, kuzaza makunji ne mpingu bia kutendelela mvidie. Kutshibulaye ne mbabula ya kuosha manananshi mu bisamba bionsu bivua ku mutu mu ditunga. Pashishe, Yoshiya kupingana mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles34:8 Yoshiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu, dituku dikuabu uvua umusha mikiya mu ditunga ne mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Yoshiya kutuma Shafane, muana wa Ashaliya kudi Masheya, mulombodi wa tshimenga, ne kudi Yowa, muana wa Yowakaze, mufikishi wa malu a mukalenga kudi bantu, bua baye kulongolola nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende." 
2Chronicles34:9 Bantu abu kuya kudi Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene. Bavua baye ne makuta avuabu bapete kudi bena Levi bavua balame ku tshiibi tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ke makuta avuabu bafile kudi bena Menashe, bena Efrayime, ne bena bisamba bikuabu bia ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne kudi bena Yuda, kudi bena Binyamine ne bena Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles34:10 Makuta awu, kuapeshabu balombodi ba bena mudimu badi balongoluesha, bakolesha kabidi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua bafute bena mudimu wa mabaya, bibaki ne bena mudimu bakuabu, bua basumbe kabidi mabue masonga ne mitshi ya mikamba, bua kulongolola nzubu mikuabu ivua bakalenga ba bena Yuda balekela inyanguke." 
2Chronicles34:11  
2Chronicles34:12 Bena mudimu kulongolola midimu yabu yonsu anu bimpe bu muvuabu babaleja kudi bena Levi aba: Yakate ne Obadya, ba mu diku dia Merari; kabidi ne Zekarya ne Meshulame, ba mu diku dia Kekate. Bena Levi bakuabu, bavua bamanye mua kuimba bisanji," 
2Chronicles34:13 bavua bambuluisha bena mudimu bavua bambula majitu, ne bena mudimu bakuabu bonsu. Bena Levi bavua bakuate kabidi midimu mikuabu ya bafundi, ya batangidi ba malu, ya balami ba biibi." 
2Chronicles34:14 Pavuabu bumusha makuta mu mushete, avua bantu balambule bua midimu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mutuangaji Ilkiya kuangula mukanda wa mikenji ya Maweja-Nangilaivua Moshe muambile bantu." 
2Chronicles34:15 Ilkiya kuambila Shafane mufundi ne: “Ndi muangule mukanda wa mikenji mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila.” Pashishe, Ilkiya kupesha mufundi mukanda awu." 
2Chronicles34:16 Shafane kuya kupesha mukalenga Yoshiya mukanda, kumuambila ne: — Bena mudimu bebe badi benza midimu yonsu iuvua mubafundile." 
2Chronicles34:17 Batuangaji mbangate makuta onsu avua mu mushete, baapesha balombodi ba bena mudimu, baapesha kabidi bena midimu mishilangane." 
2Chronicles34:18 Shafane kuamba kabidi ne: — Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene, mmumpeshe mukanda ewu. Nanku, kubadilaye mukalenga Yoshiya mukanda awu." 
2Chronicles34:19 Anu mukalenga Yoshiya umvue malu avua mu mukanda wa mikenji, kunyingalalaye bikole. Kupandaye bilamba biende." 
2Chronicles34:20 Kubikidishaye Ilkiya, Akikame, muana wa Shafane, Abdone, muana wa Mika, Shafane mufundi, ne Ashaya umue a ku balombodi ba mu bukalenga, kubambilaye ne:" 
2Chronicles34:21 — Nuye kukonka Maweja-Nangila buanyi meme, bua bena Izrayele, ne bua bena Yuda bonsu badi bashale ne muoyi, bua tumanye tshitudi mua kuenza, bua malu onsu adibu bafunde mu mukanda udibu bangule ewu. Bualu, bankambua betu kabavua bakumbaja mikenji ivuabu bafundamu to. Ke padi Maweja-Nangila mutufikile munda bikole." 
2Chronicles34:22 Ilkiya ne bantu bakuabu bavua mukalenga Yoshiya mutume, kuya kudi muambi mukaji Ulda uvua musombe mu Yerushalayime. Bayende wa Ulda uvua Shalume, muana wa Tokekate, muikulu wa Asra. Shalume ke uvua ulama bilamba bia tshijila bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu abu, kuambila muambi mukaji Ulda malu onsu awu." 
2Chronicles34:23 Ulda kubatuma bua baye kuambila mukalenga Yoshiya ne: 
2Chronicles34:24 “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: ‘Nennyoke bikole Yerushalayime ne bantu bonsu badimu, anu bu mudibu bafunde mu mukanda udibu babale kumpala kua Yoshiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:25 Bena Yerushalayime mbambenge, mbalambule mvidie mikuabu milambu. Bionsu bidibu benze mbimfikishe munda. Ke pandi mufikile tshimenga etshi munda bikole. Tshiji tshianyi katshiena tshijika mpindiewu to." 
2Chronicles34:26 Mukalenga Yoshiya uvua munutume kundi bua kunkonka, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ndi lunuambila ne: Uvua muteleje malu onsu avua mu mukanda ewu." 
2Chronicles34:27 Uvua muteleje bimpe tshindi muambe bua Yerushalayime ne bua bantu bonsu badimu. Wewe uvua unyingalala, uvuluka bubi buebe kumpala kuanyi, upanda bilamba biebe, udila muadi. Nanku, ndi nkujadikila ne: ndi mumvue dilomba diebe." 
2Chronicles34:28 Neufue mu ditalala. Nebakujike mu lukita, kuyi mumone makenga onsu andi musue kukengesha nawu Yeryshalayime ne bantu bonsu badi basamu.’ ” Ilkiya, mutuangaji munene ne bantu bavuaye nabu, kuya kuambila mukalenga Yoshiya bionsu abi." 
2Chronicles34:29 Diakamue, mukalenga Yoshiya kubikidisha bakulu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime, ne ba mu ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles34:30 Kuyabu bonsu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua baye ne bantu ba mu Yerushalayime ne ba mu ditunga dia Yuda, batuangaji, bena Levi ne bantu bakuabu bonsu. Pashishe, mukalenga Yoshiya kubabadila bonsu mukanda wa ndondu uvuabu bangule mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
2Chronicles34:31 Uvua muimane pa muaba uvuabu bamulongoluele. Kutuaye tshiakabidi ndondu ne Maweja-Nangila. Muntu yonsu uvua ne bua kuitaba ne: ndi musue kuitaba Maweja-Nangila, kukumbaja ne muoyi wanyi mujima, ne bukole buanyi buonsu, meyi ende, mikenji yende ne mikandu yende. Ndi musue kukumbaja kabidi bionsu bidibu bafunde mu mukanda wa ndondu." 
2Chronicles34:32 Mukalenga Yoshiya kuela diyi ne: “Bena Yerushalayime ne bena Binyamine bonsu bitabe ndondu ewu.” Biangatshile musangu ewu, bena Yerushalayime kukumbaja ndondu uvuabu batue ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu." 
2Chronicles34:33 Yoshiya kujikija buenzayi buvua butampakana mu buloba bua bena Izrayele. Kuambilaye bantu bonsu, bua batendelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Nanku, patshivua mukalenga Yoshiya ne muoyi, muntu nansha umue kavua mubenge Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua babu to." 
2Chronicles35:1 Yoshiya kuenza mu Yerushalayime tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila bua kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu, kukosabu mikoku mitu bua tshibilu atshi." 
2Chronicles35:2 Yoshiya kulongolola malu bua batuangaji bakumbaje tshiakabidi midimu yabu yonsu. Kubakoleshaye kabidi ku muoyi, bua benze midimu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu anu bimpe." 
2Chronicles35:3 Bena Levi bavuabu bajidile bua benzele Maweja-Nangila mudimu ne bua balongeshe bantu, Yoshiya kubambila ne: — Nuteke mushete wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvuabu base kudi Shelomu, muana wa Davide, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele. Kanuena mua kuambula kabidi mushete ewu pa makaya enu to. Mpindiewu nuenzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ne bantu bende bena Izrayele mudimu." 
2Chronicles35:4 Nuenze midimu yenu, mishilangane muaba bilondeshile meku enu ne bisumbu bienu bia mudimu, anu mudibu bafunde kudi Davide mukalenga wa bena Izrayele ne kudi muanende Shelomu." 
2Chronicles35:5 Diku dionsu dia bena Levi nedikuate mudimu muaba wa tshijila, bua kuambuluisha bena Izrayele, bilondeshile meku abu." 
2Chronicles35:6 Nudi ne bua kulambula milambu ya Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Nanku, umbushayi mikiya yenu, nuambuluishe bana benu bena Izrayele, bua tshibilu tshienzeke anu bilondeshile mikenjiivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Moshe." 
2Chronicles35:7 Yoshiya kuangata ku bimuna biende, bana ba mikoku ne ba mbuji binunu makumi asatu, ne ngombe binunu bisatu. Kupeshabu bena Izrayele bavua muaba awu nyama ayi, bua benze tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles35:8 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua Yoshiya, kufila kabidi ku budisuile buabu, bimuna bu muvuabu basue, bua kuambuluisha bena Izrayele, batuangaji ne bena Levi. Ilkiya, Zekarya ne Yekiyele, batangidi ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kupeshabu batuangaji bimuna ebi: bana ba mikoku ne ba mbuji binunu bibidi ne nkama isambombu, ne ngombe nkama isatu, bua milambu ya Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila." 
2Chronicles35:9 Balombodi ba bena Levi: Konaniya ne bana babu Shemaya, Netaneyele, kabidi ne Ashabiya, Yeyele, Yozabade, bavua bapesha bena Levi bana ba mikoku ne ba mbuji binunu bitanu, ne ngombe nkama itanu." 
2Chronicles35:10 Tshibilu atshi bavua batshienza mushindu ewu: batuangaji bavua bimane miaba yabu ya midimu, bena Levi bimane mu bisumbu biabu bu muvua mukalenga Yoshiya muambe." 
2Chronicles35:11 Bantu kukosa mitu ya bana ba mikoku ne ya bana ba mbuji. Bavua bapesha batuangaji mashi a nyama eyi. Batuangaji bavua bamiamina mashi awu ku tshilambuilu. Bena Levi kusaya nyama ayi kumusha biseba. 
2Chronicles35:12 Kusungulabu nyama mikuabu, nangananga ngombe milume idi bena Izrayele ne bua kulambula Maweja-Nangila bu mulambu wa kuosha, bilondeshile meku abu, anu bu mudibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe." 
2Chronicles35:13 Kuoshabu mukapia munyinyi wa muana wa mukoku wa tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, bu mvua tshibidilu tshiabu. Kadi minyinyi mikuabu ya tshijila bavua bayilambila mu ngesu, mu bipanza ne mu bintu bikuabu bia kulambila. Pashishe, bavua bakadila bena Izrayele bonsu munyinyi awu lukasa." 
2Chronicles35:14 Pashishe, bena Levi bavua balongolola bintu bivua batuangaji ne bua kupeta, ne bivuabu bobu mene ne bua kudia. Bualu batuangaji, ndelanganyi ya Arone, bavua benza mudimu wa kulambula milambu ya kuosha, ne mafuta a milambu mikuabu too ne ku dilolu. Ke muvua bena Levi balambe biakudia." 
2Chronicles35:15 Bimbi ba misambu, ba ku ndelanganyi ya Ashafe, bavua bashala pa miaba yabu ya mudimu, bilondeshile diyi dia Davide ne dia Ashafe, Emane ne Yedutune, bafidi ba ngenyi ba mukalenga. Balami ba tshiibi, bavua bashala kabidi anu pa miaba yabu. Muntu nansha umue kavua ne bua kumuka pa mudimu wende, bualu bena Levi bakuabu bavua babalambila biakudia biabu." 
2Chronicles35:16 Nanku, dituku adi, bavua balongolola bionsu anu bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Bavua badia didia dia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, balambula kabidi milambu pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila, amu bilondeshile muvua mukalenga Yoshiya mulongolole amu." 
2Chronicles35:17 Bamane kujikija tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele bavua muaba awu, kuenzabu tshibilu matuku muanda mutekete tshia Mampa kaayi mela buanga." 
2Chronicles35:18 Bena Izrayele kabavua banji kuenza kabidi tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila tshia mushindu ewu, katshia biangatshile ku tshikondu tshia muambi Samuwele. Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele nansha umue kavua muanji kulongolola tshibilu tshia mushindu ewu, bu muvuabu balongolole kudi Yoshiya, bamuambuluishe kudi bena Levi, bena Yerushalayime, bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele bakuabu bavua muaba awu." 
2Chronicles35:19 Tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila atshi, bavua batshienze pavua mukalenga Yoshiya mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne muanda mukulu." 
2Chronicles35:20 Dituku dikuabu, Yoshiya mumane kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, Neko, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kuya ne bena mvita bende ku Karkemishe, ku musulu wa Perate, bua kuluangenaku mvita. Yoshiya kavua musue ne: bena Ejipitu bapitshile mu ditunga diende to." 
2Chronicles35:21 Kadi Neko kutuma bantu bua kumukonka ne: “Mukalenga wa bena Yuda, udi ubenga bua meme kupitshila mu njila ewu bua tshinyi? Tshiena mfika lelu bua kuluangana nebe to. Ndi nduangana ne muluishi mukuabu. Mvidi Mukulu mmuntumine diyi dia kuya lukasa. Mvidi Mukulu udi nanyi. Lekela kubenga diyi diende, bualu udi mua kukushipesha.”" 
2Chronicles35:22 Kadi Yoshiya uvua anu musue kuluisha Neko. Kavuamuteleje miaku ivuabu bamutumine kudi Mvidi Mukulu mene. Yoshiya kuvuala bilamba bia muntu mukuabu bua kabamumanyi. Kuyaye mu mpata wa Megido bua kuluangana mvita. 
2Chronicles35:23 Pavuabu baluangana mvita, kumuasabu mukete. Kuambilaye bena mudimu bende ne: — Ngambulayi, bualu tshiena mumvue bimpe." 
2Chronicles35:24 Bena mudimu bende kumumusha mu ditempu diende dia mvita, kumuteka mu ditempu diende dikuabu. Kuyabu nende mu Yerushalayime. Kutuilaye mu tshimenga atshi. Kumujikabu mu lukita lua bankambua bende. Bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bonsu kumudila." 
2Chronicles35:25 Muambi Yirmeya kuenza kasala ka madilu a lulu lua Yoshiya. Biangatshile musangu awu, too ne ku lelu, bimbi ba misambu, balume ne bakaji, bonsu badi bimba, batela dina dia Yoshiya mu miadi yabu. Bikadi bishale tshibidilu mu Izrayele. Badi bafunde Miaku ya Misambu eyi mu mukanda wa Miadi." 
2Chronicles35:26 Malu makuabu a mukalenga Yoshiya mbaafunde mu mukanda wa bakalenga ba bena Izrayele ne ba bena Yuda. Mbafundemu muvua mukalenga Yoshiya mukumbaje malu avuabu bafunde mu mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. 
2Chronicles35:27  
2Chronicles36:1 Mu Yerushalayime, bena Yuda kusungula Yowakaze, muana wa Yoshiya, bua apingane tatuende mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles36:2 Yowakaze kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga anu ngondu isatu mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles36:3 Neko, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kumusha Yowakaze mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Neko kututshisha bena ditunga dia Yuda tshibawu tshia biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole kilo binunu bisatu, ne tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi kilo makumi asatu." 
2Chronicles36:4 Pashishe, Neko kusungula Eliyakime, muanabu ne Yowakaze, bua kushalaye mukalenga mu Yerushalayime, ne mu ditunga dia Yuda. Nekokushintulula dina dia Eliyakime, kumuinyika Yowakime. Neko kuya ne muanabu Yowakaze mu Ejipitu." 
2Chronicles36:5 Yowakime kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne bitanu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. Yowakime uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende mubenge. 
2Chronicles36:6 Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, kubuela ne mvita mu ditunga dia Yowakime. Kuelaye Yowakime mu lukanu, kuya nende ku Babilone." 
2Chronicles36:7 Kuangataye kabidi bintu bishilangane bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuya nabi mu Babilone mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga." 
2Chronicles36:8 Malu makuabu a Yowakime mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyike ne: Malu adi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele ne ba bena Yuda benze. Badi bafundamu buenzayi buvuaye muenze, buvua bufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda, ne malu onsu avua mamuenzekele. Muanende wa balume Yowakine kupingana tatuende Yowakime mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles36:9 Yowakine kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu muanda mukulu. Kushalaye mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime anu ngondu isatu ne matuku dikumi. Uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge. 
2Chronicles36:10 Ku ntuadijilu wa tshidimu, Nebukadnesare kutuma bena mvita bua bakuate Yowakine, bamufite ku Babilone ne bintu bia mushinga mukole bia mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Nebukadnesare kusungula Sedekiya muanabu ne Yowakine, bua kushalaye mukalenga wa bena Yerushalayime ne wa bena Yuda." 
2Chronicles36:11 Sedekiya kubuela mu bukalenga muikale ne bidimu makumi abidi ne tshimue. Kushalaye mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. 
2Chronicles36:12 Uvua wenza malu adi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende mubenge. Uvua mubenge kutonda bubi buende kumpala kua muambi Yirmeya, uvua umumanyisha malu avua Maweja-Nangila muambe." 
2Chronicles36:13 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare uvua mulombe mukalenga Sedekiya bua amuitabe, aditshipe, atele dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kadi, nansha Nebukadnesare muenze nanku, Sedekiya uvua amu mumutombokele. Uvua ne tshitunu, mubenge mushidishe, kayi musue kupingana kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
2Chronicles36:14 Kabidi balombodi ba batuangaji ba bena Izrayele bonsu, bavua anu batombokela Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua balonda bibidilu bibi bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bia kutendelela mvidie. Bavua banyanga nzubu wa tshijila, uvua Maweja-Nangila mudijidile mu Yerushalayime." 
2Chronicles36:15 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua ba bena Izrayele, uvua munange bikole bantu bende bena Izrayele, munange kabidi ne nzubu wende wa tshijila. Kutumaye bantu misangu ya bungi bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele majinga ende." 
2Chronicles36:16 Kadi bena Izrayele kuseka bambi ba Mvidi Mukulu, kubalembakaja, kulengulula meyi a Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kubafikila munda, kubanyoka bikole kabayi mua kupanda to." 
2Chronicles36:17 Maweja-Nangila kutuma mukalenga wa Babilone bua kukuata ditunga. Bantu bonsu kushala ku bumfumu bua mukalenga awu. Mukalenga awu kushipa bena mvita bonsu too ne bavua muaba wa tshijila. Kavua mushiye muntu nansha umue ne muoyi! Bansongalume, bansongakaji, bantu bakole ne bakulakaje, kufuabu bonsu." 
2Chronicles36:18 Kuangataye bintu bionsu binene ne bikese bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne mu tshibutshilu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne tshia mukalenga Sedekiya ne tshia balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende. Kuyaye ne bintu bionsu abi ku Babilone." 
2Chronicles36:19 Bena Babilone kuosha nzubuvua Mvidi Mukulu. Kupulabu tshimana tshia Yerushalayime. Kuoshabu nzubu ya bukalenga. Kunyangabu bintu bionsu bia mushinga mukole biamu tshimenga. 
2Chronicles36:20 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare kuangata bantu bavua kabayi bafue mu mvita, kuya nabu muende mu Babilone. Kushalabu bapika bende ne ba ndelanganyi yende, too ne ku dibuela dia bena Persa mu bukalenga." 
2Chronicles36:21 Nanku, miaku ya Maweja-Nangila kukumbana, ivua muambi Yirmeya muambe ne: “Ditunga nedishale munda mutupu bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, too ne pajika matuku a Dikisha, avua bena Izrayele babenge kuikisha. ”" 
2Chronicles36:22 Mu tshidimu tshia kumpala tshia bukalenga bua Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, Maweja-Nangila kukumbaja miaku yende ivua muambi Yirmeya muambe. Maweja-Nangila kupesha Koreshe meji a kuela diyi mu bukalenga buende buonsu, kabidi a kufundisha miaku eyi ne:" 
2Chronicles36:23 “Koreshe, mukalengamunene wa bena Persa, udi wamba ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, mmuteke makalenga onsu a pa buloba ku bumfumu buanyi. Mmungambile bua kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime, mu ditunga dia Yuda. Bantu bonsu bena tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila, badi munkatshi muenu bapingane mu Yerushalayime. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ikale nabu, abalame!”" 
Ezra1:1 Tshidimu tshia kumpala tshia Bukalenga bua Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, Maweja-Nangila kukumbaja miaku yende ivua muambi Yirmeya muambe. Maweja-Nangila kupesha Koreshe meji a kuelesha diyi mu bukalenga buende bujima, kabidi a kufundisha miaku eyi ne:" 
Ezra1:2 “Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, udi wamba ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, mmumpeshe makalenga onsu a pa buloba. Mmungambile bua kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime, mu ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
Ezra1:3 Nanku, bantu bonsu bena tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila badi munkatshi muenu, bapingane mu Yerushalayime, mu ditunga dia Yuda, bua kuibakululamu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udibu batendelela mu Yerushalayime. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu wabu abambuluishe!" 
Ezra1:4 Miaba yonsu idi bena Izrayele basombe, bena ditunga bambuluishe bena Izrayele ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bintu bikuabu, kabidi ne bimuna. Babapeshe kabidi ne milambu ya budisuile bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime.”" 
Ezra1:5 Bamfumu ba meku a bena Yuda, ne a bena Binyamine, batuangaji, bena Levi, ne bantu bonsu bavua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe lungenyi lua kuya kuibakulula nzubu wende mu Yerushalayime, kudilongololabu bua kuya." 
Ezra1:6 Bena mutumba nabu kubambuluisha, ne bintu bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha bienza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bavua babapesha kabidi bintu bishilangane bia mushinga wa bungi, kabidi ne bimuna, katuyi tubala milambu ya budisuile ivuabu bafile bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra1:7 Koreshe, mukalenga munene, kusangisha bintu bia mushinga mukole bivua Nebukadnesare muangate mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila mu Yerushalayime, mubiteke mu nzubu wa mvidie yende." 
Ezra1:8 Bilondeshile muvuabu bambe kudi mukalenga munene, Mitredate, mutangidi wa biuma bia mukalenga, kubadika bintu abi, kubifila kudi Sheshebashare, mulombodi wa bena Yuda." 
Ezra1:9 Bintu abi bivua nenku: malongu masalame 30 a tshiamu tshia mpawungi, malongu 1.000 a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tuele 29," 
Ezra1:10 ngesu 30 ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ngesu mikuabu 410 ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bintu bikuabu 1.000." 
Ezra1:11 Bintu bisanga bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bivua 5.400. Sheshebashare kubangata bionsu, kumuka nabi mu Babilone, ne bantu bavuabu bapikule mu bupika, kuya mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra2:1 Ku bantu bavua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, muye nabu mu bupika mu Babilone, ba bungi bavua bapingana mu Yerushalayime, mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Muntu yonsu uvua mupingane anu mu tshimenga tshiabu." 
Ezra2:2 Bavua babalombola kudi Zerubabele, Yeshuwa, Nehemya, Seraya, Relaya, Mordekayi, Bilshane, Mispare, Bigvayi, Rekume ne Baana. Bungi bua bena Izrayele bavua bapingana, bilondeshile meku abu budi nenku:" 
Ezra2:3 Mu diku dia Paroshe, muvua bantu balume 2.172;" 
Ezra2:4 mu diku dia Shefatya, muvua bantu balume 372;" 
Ezra2:5 mu diku dia Ara, muvua bantu balume 775;" 
Ezra2:6 Mu diku dia Pakate-Mowabe, ndelanganyi ya Yeshuwa ne ya Yowabe, muvua bantu balume 2.812;" 
Ezra2:7 mu diku dia Elame, muvua bantu balume 1.254;" 
Ezra2:8 mu diku dia Zatu, muvua bantu balume 945;" 
Ezra2:9 mu diku dia Zakayi, muvua bantu balume 760;" 
Ezra2:10 mu diku dia Bani, muvua bantu balume 642;" 
Ezra2:11 mu diku dia Bebayi, muvua bantu balume 623;" 
Ezra2:12 mu diku dia Azgade, muvua bantu balume 1.222;" 
Ezra2:13 mu diku dia Adonikame, muvua bantu balume 666;" 
Ezra2:14 mu diku dia Bigvayi, muvua bantu balume 2.056;" 
Ezra2:15 mu diku dia Adine, muvua bantu balume 454;" 
Ezra2:16 mu diku dia Atere, ndelanganyi ya Izkiya muvua bantu balume 98;" 
Ezra2:17 mu diku dia Beshayi, muvua bantu balume 323;" 
Ezra2:18 mu diku dia Yora, muvua bantu balume 112;" 
Ezra2:19 mu diku dia Ashume, muvua bantu balume 223;" 
Ezra2:20 mu diku dia Ngibare, muvua bantu balume 95;" 
Ezra2:21 mu musoku wa Betleyeme, muvua bantu balume 123;" 
Ezra2:22 mu musoku wa Netofa, muvua bantu balume 56;" 
Ezra2:23 mu musoku wa Anatote, muvua bantu balume 128;" 
Ezra2:24 mu musoku wa Azmavete, muvua bantu balume 42;" 
Ezra2:25 mu misoku ya Kiriyate-Yeyarime, Kefira ne Beyerote, muvua bantu balume 743;" 
Ezra2:26 mu misoku ya Rama ne Ngeba, muvua bantu balume 621;" 
Ezra2:27 mu musoku wa Mikmase, muvua bantu balume 122;" 
Ezra2:28 mu misoku ya Betele ne Ayi, muvua bantu balume 223;" 
Ezra2:29 mu musoku wa Nebo, muvua bantu balume 52;" 
Ezra2:30 mu musoku wa Magbishe, muvua bantu balume 156;" 
Ezra2:31 mu diku dia Elame mukuabu, muvua bantu balume 1.254;" 
Ezra2:32 mu diku dia Arime, muvua bantu balume 320;" 
Ezra2:33 mu misoku ya Lode, Adide ne Ono, muvua bantu balume 725;" 
Ezra2:34 mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko, muvua bantu balume 345;" 
Ezra2:35 mu tshimenga tshia Sena, muvua bantu balume 3.630." 
Ezra2:36 Bisumbu bia batuangaji bivua nenku: mu diku dia Yedaya ndelanganyi ya Yeshuwa, muvua bantu balume 973;" 
Ezra2:37 mu diku dia Imere, muvua bantu balume 1.052;" 
Ezra2:38 mu diku dia Pashekure, muvua bantu balume 1.247;" 
Ezra2:39 mu diku dia Arime, muvua bantu balume 1.017." 
Ezra2:40 Tshisumbu tshia bena Levi tshivua nenku: mu diku dia Yeshuwa ne Kadmiyele, ndelanganyi ya Odavya, muvua bantu balume 74." 
Ezra2:41 Tshisumbu tshia bimbi ba misambu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tshivua nenku: mu diku dia Ashafe, muvua bantu balume 128." 
Ezra2:42 Tshisumbu tshia balami ba ku biibi, tshivua nenku: mu meku a Shalume, Atere, Talmone, Akube, Atita ne Shobayi, muvua bantu balume 139." 
Ezra2:43 Bantu bakuabu bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bavua ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sika, Ashufa, Tabawote," 
Ezra2:44 Kerose, Siyaka, Padone," 
Ezra2:45 Lebana, Agaba, Akube," 
Ezra2:46 Agabe, Shamlayi, Anane," 
Ezra2:47 Ngidele, Ngakare, Reyaya," 
Ezra2:48 Reshine, Nekoda, Ngazame,"
