Ezra2:49 Uza, Pasheya, Besayi," 
Ezra2:50 Asna, Mewunime, Nefushime," 
Ezra2:51 Bakbuke, Akufa, Arure," 
Ezra2:52 Baslute, Mekida, Arsha," 
Ezra2:53 Barkose, Sisra, Tema," 
Ezra2:54 Neshiya ne Atifa. 
Ezra2:55 Mu tshisumbu tshia ndelanganyi ya bena mudimu ba Shelomu muvua: ndelanganyi ya Sotayi, Soferete, Peruda," 
Ezra2:56 Yala, Darkone, Ngidele," 
Ezra2:57 Shefatya, Atile, Pokerete-Ashebayime ne Ami." 
Ezra2:58 Bisumbu bia bantu bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bia ndelanganyi ya bena mudimu ba Shelomu, bavua bantu balume 392." 
Ezra2:59 Bantu bavua ku bupika bafume ku Tele-Mela, Tele-Arsha, Kerube, Adane ne Imere, kabawa mua kujadika bimpe muvua meku a bankambua babu, nansha muvuabu bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya bena Izrayele to." 
Ezra2:60 Bavua bantu 652, ba ku ndelanganyi ya Delaya, Tobiya ne Nekoda." 
Ezra2:61 Batuangaji bakuabu kabidi, ndelangananyi ya Obaya, Akose ne Barzilayi, kabawa mua kujadika bimpe muvua bankambua babu to. (Barzilayi uvua ne dina edi, bualu uvua musele muana wa Barzilayi muena Ngilaade)." 
Ezra2:62 Bavua bakeba bikole mua kupeta mikanda ivua ne mena a bankambua babu, bapange. Nanku, kukandikabu batuangaji abu mua kuenza mudimu wabu wa butuangaji, bualu bavua babatangile bu bantu badi ne mikiya." 
Ezra2:63 Mulombodi wa ditunga mene, kubakandika bua kabadi bintu bia tshijila menemene, too ne pikala mutuangaji mujadike bualu ebu ku Urime ne Tumime." 
Ezra2:64 Bena Izrayele bonsu bavua bapingana bavua 42.360. 
Ezra2:65 Bavua ne bena mudimu balume ne bakaji 7.337. Bena misambu balume ne bakaji bavua 200. 
Ezra2:66 Bavua kabidi ne nyama ya tubalu 736, nyama ya mpunde milume ivua 245." 
Ezra2:67 Nyama ya tumelu ivua 435, ne ya mpunde mikuabu 6.720." 
Ezra2:68 Pavuabu bafike mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshivua ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bamfumu bakuabu ba meku kufila milambu bua bibake nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muaba wende wa kale." 
Ezra2:69 Bavua bafila bintu bivuabu nabi bua kuibaka nzubu awu; bionsu bisanga bivua nenku: nkanu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi 61.000, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo 2.500. Bavua bafila kabidi mintumpu 100 ya batuangaji." 
Ezra2:70 Batuangaji, bena Levi ne bantu bakuabu, bena misambu, balami ba ku biibi, ne bena mudimu bakuabu ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kusomba mu bimenga bivuabu babapeshe. Bena Izrayele bakuabu kuya kusomba mu bimenga biabu bia kale." 
Ezra3:1 Bena Izrayele bonsu bamane kusomba mu bimenga biabu, kumvuanganabu diyi dimue dia kusangila bonsu mu Yerushalayime, ngondu wa muanda mutekete wa tshidimu." 
Ezra3:2 Mutuangaji Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, pamue ne batuangaji bakuabu, bana babu, kabidi ne Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, ne bana babu, kutuadijabu kuibakulula tshilambuilu tshia Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, bua bamone mua kulambuilapu milambu ya kuosha, bu mudibu balombe mu mikenji ya Moshe, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra3:3 Bantu bavua bafume mu bupika, nansha muvuabu batshina bantu bavua baye kuasa mu ditunga, patshivuabu bobu mu Babilone, bavua bibake tshiakabidi tshilambuilu muaba uwatshi kale. Bavua balambuilapu Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha dinda ne dilolu." 
Ezra3:4 Pashishe, bena Izrayele kuenza tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa, bu mudibu bafunde. Bavua balambula milambu ya kuosha bungi bukumbane ku dituku dionsu." 
Ezra3:5 Bituadija tshikondu atshi, bavua balambula milambu ya ku dituku ku dituku, kabidi ne milambu mikuabu idibu bafunde bua kulambula dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu yonsu, ne matuku a bibilu bia Maweja-Nangila, kabidi ne milambu mikuabu ya budisuile idi bantu bakadila Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezra3:6 Nanku, biangatshile dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, kutuadijabu kulambula Maweja-Nangila milambu ya kuosha, kabayi banji kuibaka tshitaku tshia nzubu mupiamupia wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra3:7 Pashishe, kufutabu bena midimu bua kusonga mabue ne kupanda mabaya. Kupeshabu kabidi bena Sidone ne bena Tire biakudia, biakunua ne mafuta bua babasabuile mitshi ya sedre ya mu Lebanone pa mayi manene, bua kuyifikisha pa tshisabu tshia Yafa Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, ke uvua muanyishe bua benze bionsu ebi." 
Ezra3:8 Bobu bamane kupingana mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshivua ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tshidimu tshijima tshimane kupita, mu ngondu muibidi kutuadijabu mudimu kudi Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, bana babu batuangaji bakuabu, bena Levi, ne bonsu bavua bafume ku bupika. Kutekabu bena Levi bavua ne bidimu bituadije ku makumi abidi ne pa mutu, bua kulombola midimu ya kuibaka nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezra3:9 Bena Levi aba ke: Yeshuwa, bana bende ne bana babu, Kadmiyele, wa mu diku dia Odavya ne bana bende. Bavua balombola pamue bena mudimu bavua basa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua babambuluisha kudi bena Levi ba mu diku dia Enadade." 
Ezra3:10 Pavua bibaki bakeba kuasa tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubikilabu batuangaji bamane kuvuala bilamba biabu bia mudimu wa batuangaji, bikale ne mpungi. Kubikilabu kabidi bena Levi, ndelanganyi ya Ashafe, bavua ne ndibu. Bonsu abu kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bilondeshile mikenji ya Davide, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele." 
Ezra3:11 Bavua bimba, batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bapunguluja ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi muimpe, mmunange bena Izrayele kashidi!” Bena Izrayele kabidi bavua batumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bela mbila mikole. Bavua basanka, bualu bantu bavua bibaka tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra3:12 Batuangaji bavule, bena Levi, ne bamfumu ba meku, bonsu bantu bakole bavua bavuluka muvua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kale, kudilabu bikole, pavuabu bamone bantu bibaka tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mupiamupia. Kadi bantu bakuabu ba bungi, bavua basanka, batuta bikashi." 
Ezra3:13 Nanku, kabawa mua kusunguluja bikashi bivuabu bakuma bua disanka, ne miadi ya bakuabu bantu to. Bualu bantu bonsu bavua amu bela mbila mikole ivua yumvuika mutantshi mule." 
Ezra4:1 Bena lukuna ba bena Yuda ne ba bena Binyamine kumvua lumu ne: bantu bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika, katshia bapingane, badi bibaka nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
Ezra4:2 Kufikabu bua kumonangana ne Zerubabele, kabidi ne bamfumu ba meku, bua kubambila ne: — Tudi basue kunuambuluisha bua kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu. Bualu tudi tutendelela nenu Mvidi Mukulu umue, tumulambula milambu, katshia mukalenga wa bena Ashure, Asharadone watutuma munemu." 
Ezra4:3 Kadi, Zerubabele, Yeshuwa, ne bamfumu bakuabu ba meku a bena Izrayele, kuandamuna ne: — Ki mbimpe bua nutuambuluishe bua kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu to. Tuetu nkayetu tudi mua kumuibaka, bualu nzubu ewu neikale wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele. Ke mudibu bambe kudi mukalenga Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa." 
Ezra4:4 Bantu bavua basomba mu ditunga, kutuadija kutekesha bena Yuda mu maboku, babakuatshisha kabidi ne bowa bua balekele kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra4:5 Matuku onsu avua Koreshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa mu bukalenga, too ne matuku avua Daryaveshe mu bukalenga, bavua bapesha bafidi ba ngenyi ba mu lubanza lua mukalenga makuta, bua bafile ngenyi kudi mukalenga ya ne: bena Yuda kabatungunuki ne dibaka dia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Ezra4:6 Ku ntuadijilu wa bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe bena lukuna ba bena Yuda kutumina Ahashaveroshe mukanda, basonguela bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime." 
Ezra4:7 Bishelame, Mitredate, Tabeyele ne balunda babu, kufundila kabidi Artashasta, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa mukanda. Mukanda awu bavua baufunda ne maleta a bena Arame, kabidi mu muakulu wa bena Arame." 
Ezra4:8 Rekume, mulombodi wa ditunga, ne Shimeshayi tshindonda tshiende, kufundila kabidi mukalenga munene Artashasta mukanda bua malu adi atangila Yerushalayime. Mukanda awu uvua utuadija nunku:" 
Ezra4:9 “Meme Rekume, mulombodi wa ditunga, ne Shimeshayi tshindonda tshianyi, tudi tufunda mukanda ewu mu dina kabidi dia balombodi nanyi ba mu matunga: a mu Dine, Afarsatake, Tarpele, Afarase, Ereke, Babilone, Suze, Deka, Elame," 
Ezra4:10 ne mu dina dia bantu bakuabu bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika kudi Asnapare, muntu munene wa lumu, badi basomba mu bimenga bia mu Samariya, nansha mu buloba budi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, a.n.”" 
Ezra4:11 Mu mukanda awu bavua bafunde ne: “Artashasta, mukalenga munene, tuetu bena mudimu bebe, badi basomba luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, a.n." 
Ezra4:12 “Mukalenga, tudi tukumanyisha ne: bena Yuda badi bumuke kuebe, bafike kuetu kunu ku Yerushalayime, badi basue kuasulula tshimenga etshi tshibi tshia bantomboji. Badi benzulula tshitaku, babandisha ne bimana." 
Ezra4:13 Kadi, Mukalenga, umanye ne: padi bena tshimenga etshi batshiasulula, babandisha bimana biatshi, nebalekele kulambula bitadi, nansha biobi bia mushindu kaayi. Nanku nebakepeshe bikole bungi bua biuma bidi bibuela mu mushete wa mukalenga munene." 
Ezra4:14 Nanku, tuetu baudi muanyishe bua tuikale ku bumfumu buebe katuena basue kumona muntu ukupepeja to. Ke patudi tukulomba ne:" 
Ezra4:15 ukebulule mu mikanda yonsu ya bakalenga bavua bakudianjidila mu bukalenga. Neupete mikanda idi ijadika ne: tshimenga etshi tshivua anu tshia bantomboji, tshivua amu tshitatshisha bakalenga banene, ne balombodi ba matunga. Misangu yonsu bena tshimenga etshi badi anu batomboka. Ke pavua bakalenga banene babutula tshimenga etshi." 
Ezra4:16 Mukalenga munene, tudi nkujadikila ne: padibu basulula tshimenga etshi, babandisha bimana biatshi, kuakuikala kabidi mfumu wa buloba ebu budi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua Perate to.”" 
Ezra4:17 Artashasta, mukalenga munene, kuandamuna ne: “Wewe Rekume, mulombodi wa ditunga, ne Shimeshayi, tshindonda tshiebe, ne balombodi nebe badi mu Samariya ne mu buloba budi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, “Ndi nnuela muoyi, a.n." 
Ezra4:18 “Mukanda unuvua bantumine, bavua bawandamuna mu muakulu wetu, kuumbadilabu." 
Ezra4:19 Mvua mutume bantu bua bakebulule mu mikanda ya bukalenga. Bantu abu kusangana ne: bushuwa, kuonsu eku, bena Yerushalayime bavua anu batombokela bakalenga. Mu Yerushalayime mudi amu mitoyi ya mvita ne bifufu bia bantomboji." 
Ezra4:20 Ku kale mu tshimenga amu muvua bakalenga ba bukitu bavua balombola buloba bujima buvua ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate. Bavua balambuishamu bitadi, bafutshisha milambu mishilangane." 
Ezra4:21 Kadi mpindiewu, nuambile bena Yuda ne: balekele midimu yabu. Kabena mua kuasulula tshimenga to, amu meme mutume diyi." 
Ezra4:22 Kanuena mua kulengulula bualu ebu, bua bubi kabuvu kuvulangana, kadi bukalenga bulua kunyanguka.”" 
Ezra4:23 Rekume, tshindonda tshiende Shimeshayi, ne balombodi bakuabu, kubalabu mukanda uvua Artashasta, mukalenga munene, mubatumine awu. Nanku kuyabu lukasa mu Yerushalayime, kukandika bena Yuda ku bukole bua balekele kuasulula tshimenga." 
Ezra4:24 Bavua balekela midimu ya kuasulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime, too ne mu tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa?" 
Ezra5:1 Kadi dituku dikuabu, muambi Agayi ne muambi Zekarya, muana wa Ido, kumanyishabu bena Yuda ba mu Yerushalayime, ne ba mu ditunga dia Yuda, tshivua Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, Mvidi Mukulu wabu, mubambile." 
Ezra5:2 Nanku, Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, ne Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, kutuadijabu kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime. Bavua babakolesha ku muoyi kudi bambi ba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra5:3 Diakamue, Tatenayi, mulombodi wa buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, Shetare-Boznayi, ne balombodi nabu, kuya kuebeja bavua bibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Udi munutumine diyi dia kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne kubandisha bimana biende nnganyi?" 
Ezra5:4 Tudi basue bua nutuambile mena a bantu badi benza mudimu ewu. 
Ezra5:5 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutabalele balombodi ba bena Yuda, bua kababapumbishi mua kutungunuka ne midimu to, too ne ku diba divua bantu bavuabu batume bua kumanyisha Daryaveshe bualu ebu, bapingane ne diandamuna diende." 
Ezra5:6 Tatenayi, mulombodi wa ditunga, Shetare-Boznayi, ne balombodi nabu, bavua benza mudimu mu buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, bavua batumine Daryaveshe, mukalenga munene, mukanda." 
Ezra5:7 Mu mukanda awu, bavua bafundamu ne: “Tudi tujingila mukalenga munene Daryaveshe diakalenga mu midimu yende yonsu!" 
Ezra5:8 “Mukalenga munene, tudi tukumanyisha ne: tuvua baye mu buloba bua Yuda. Tuvua bamone muvuabu bibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu munene ne mabue masonga, ne makunji a mabaya masa ku bimana. Badi bakuata mudimu bimpe, kabidi lukasa." 
Ezra5:9 Tuvua bakonke balombodi ba midimu, bua batuambile uvua mubatumine diyi dia kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne dia kubandisha bimana." 
Ezra5:10 Tuvua babakonke kabidi bua batuambile mena abu, bua tukufundile mena a badi balombola midimu eyi." 
Ezra5:11 Bavua batuandamuna ne: ‘Tudi bena mudimu ba Mvidi Mukulu wa diulu ne buloba. Tudi tuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mukalenga munene wa bena Izrayele muibake mujikije, kukadi mpindiewu bidimu bia bungi." 
Ezra5:12 Kadi bankambua betu bavua bafikisha Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu munda. Mvidi Mukulu kubafikisha mu bianza bia Nebukadnesare, muena Kesede, mukalenga wa Babilone. Mukalenga ewu ke uvua munyange nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mukuate ne bantu, muye nabu ku bupika mu Babilone." 
Ezra5:13 Kadi, Koreshe, mukalenga munene mumane kushala mu bukalenga mu Babilone tshidimu tshimue, kutumaye diyi bua bibakulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra5:14 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare uvua muangate bintu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime, muye kubiteka mu nzubu wa mvidie wende mu Babilone. Koreshe, mukalenga munene, kuangata bintu abi mu nzubu wa mvidie mu Babilone, kubipesha Sheshebashare, uvuaye muteke mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda." 
Ezra5:15 Mukalenga Koreshe uvua muambile Sheshebashare ne: uye ne bintu ebi. Pikalabu bamane kuasulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime muaba wende wa kale, uye kubiteka mu nzubu amu." 
Ezra5:16 Nanku, Sheshebashare uvua mufike munemu mu Yerushalayime, muenze bitaku bipiabipia bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bituadija tshikondu atshi, midimu idi amu itungunuka, kadi kayena mianji kujika to.’" 
Ezra5:17 Mpindiewu, mukalenga, bu wewe musue, bakebulule mu mikanda yonsu ya bukalenga idi mu Babilone, bua bamanye ne: Koreshe, mukalenga munene, uvua mutume diyi bua bibakulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime. Pashishe utuambile meji audi muele bua kulongolola bualu ebu.”" 
Ezra6:1 Daryaveshe, mukalenga munene, kutuma diyi, bua bakebulule mu Babilone, mu bibambalu muvuabu bateke mikanda ya kale ne bintu bia mushinga mukole." 
Ezra6:2 Mu Ekbatane, tshimenga tshivuabu bakolesha ne bimana mu buloba bua Madayi, ke muvuabu basangana muvungu wa mabeji. Bavua bafundamu nenku: “Mulubu." 
Ezra6:3 “Koreshe, mukalenga munene, mumane kushala mu bukalenga tshidimu tshijima, uvua muele diyi ne: Nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime badi ne bua kumuasulula, bua ikale muaba udibu balambula milambu. Nebamuase pa bitaku bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kale. Nzubu awu neikale metre makumi asatu mu butumbuke, ne metre makumi asatu mu butshiama." 
Ezra6:4 Nebateke milongu isatu ya mabue masonga, batenteka ku mulongu onsu wa mabue mulongu wa mabaya. Bintu bionsu abi nebabifute ne makuta a mu mushete wa mu bukalenga." 
Ezra6:5 Bintu bionsu bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha ne mpawungi, bivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime, bivua mukalenga munene Nebukadnesare muteke mu Babilone, babipingaje mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu Yerushalayime. Tshintu tshionsu tshipingane anu pa muaba watshi.”" 
Ezra6:6 Ke muvua Daryaveshe mutumine Tatenayi, mulombodi wa buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, Shetare-Boznayi, ne balombodi nabu, mukanda, ubambila ne: “Kanubuelakanyi kabidi mu bualu ebu to!" 
Ezra6:7 Nuanyishe bua bena Yuda benzulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mudibu basue. Mulombodi wa bena Yuda ne bakulu babu, badi mua kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu muaba wende wa kale." 
Ezra6:8 Ndi nnuambila bua nuambuluishe bakulu ba bena Yuda bua kuenzulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nuikale nubafuta makuta onsu, pa bionsu bidibu batula bua nzubu ewu, bua mudimu uye anu kumpala. Makuta awu nga mu mushete wa bubanji bua mukalenga, anudi nupeta ku bitadi bidi bantu balambula mu buloba buenu." 
Ezra6:9 Ku dituku dionsu, nuikale nupesha batuangaji ba mu Yerushalayime bionsu bidibu bajinga, mudibu balomba, nyama ya ngombe milume, mbuji ya mikoku ya bimpanga, ne bana ba mbuji ya mikoku, bua milambu ya kuosha, ya kulambula Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu. Nubapeshe kabidi ne ntete ya kuenza bukula, luepu, mabu a mvinyo, ne mafuta." 
Ezra6:10 Nanku, nebalambule Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu milambu idiye mua kuanyisha. Nebamutendelele bua mukalenga munene ne bana bende bakuate ku mundundu." 
Ezra6:11 Padi muntu ubenga mundi muambe emu, ndi ngamba ne: nutule dikunji dia ku nzubu kuende, numoweleku. Nzubu wende ashale tshisasa." 
Ezra6:12 Mvidi Mukulu udi musombe mu Yerushalayime, bua bantu bamutendelelemu, anyoke mukalenga yonsu nansha tshisamba tshionsu tshidi tshikeba mua kunyanga nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tshibenga meyi anyi aa. Meme Daryaveshe ke udi utuma diyi awu. Batumikile diyi edi, anu mundi muambe amu!”" 
Ezra6:13 Tatenayi, mulombodi wa buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, Shetare-Boznayi, ne balombodi nabu, kuenza amu muvua Daryaveshe mukalenga munene muambe. Badi bajidila nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu" 
Ezra6:14 Malu avua muambi Agayi ne muambi Zekarya, muana wa Ido, bambe, kukolesha balombodi ba bena Yuda ku muoyi. Nanku, kutungunukabu amu bimpe ne mudimu wabu wa kuenzulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kujikijabu kuibakulula nzubu awu, bilondeshile muvua Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele muambe, ne muvuabu bafunde kudi bakalenga banene ba bena Persa, Koreshe, Daryaveshe ne Artashasta." 
Ezra6:15 Bavua bajikija kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu dituku disatu dia ngondu wa Adare, pavua Daryaveshe, mukalenga munene mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu bisambombu." 
Ezra6:16 Bena Yuda, batuangaji, bena Levi ne bantu bakuabu bavua bafume ku bupika, kubandabu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne disanka, kumujidila." 
Ezra6:17 Mu tshibilu atshi, bavua balambula nyama ya ngombe milume lukama, mbuji ya mikoku ya bimpanga nkama ibidi, bana ba mikoku nkama inayi, kabidi ne mbuji ya mpumbu dikumi ne ibidi, mbuji umue uvua mufume ku tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Yuda, bua Mvidi Mukulu afuile bena Izrayele bonsu luse." 
Ezra6:18 Kusungulabu kabidi batuangaji ne bena Levi, bua benzele Mvidi Mukulu mudimu mu Yerushalayime, ku tshisumbu ku tshisumbu, bu mudibu bafunde mu mukanda wa Moshe." 
Ezra6:19 Bantu bonsu bavua bapingane ku bupika kuenzabu tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, mu matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu tshivua tshilonda dipingana diabu." 
Ezra6:20 Batuangaji ne bena Levi kudikobolola bonsu pamue, kushalabu kabayi mikiya. Ke pavua bena Levi mua kushipa bana ba mikoku, bilondeshile meyi ne mikandu bia tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, mu dina dia bena Izrayele bonsu, kabidi ne dia bana babu batuangaji ne diabu bobu mene." 
Ezra6:21 Bena Izrayele bonsu kudia didia dia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila, ne bavua bafume ku bupika, ne bakuabu bavua babenga bibidilu bia bantu benyi bavua mu ditunga, bena mikiya. Bobu kabidi kudisanga ne bana babu bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Ezra6:22 Pashishe kuenzabu ne disanka tshibilu tshia mampa kaayi mela buanga matuku muanda mutekete malondangane. Disanka adi bavua badipeta kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu ke yeye uvua mupeshe mukalenga munene wa bena Ashure muoyi wa kalolu, wa kuenzela bena Izrayele bidibu bajinga. Ke bivua bibakolesha ku muoyi, bua batungunuka ne mudimu wa kuenzulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele." 
Ezra7:1 Pashishe, mu matuku a bukalenga bua Artashasta, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, Ezra uvua utumina ku Babilone. Ezra uvua muana wa Seraya, Seraya uvua muana wa Azarya, Azarya uvua muana wa Ilkiya," 
Ezra7:2 Ilkiya uvua muana wa Shalume, Shalume uvua muana wa Sadoke, Sadoke uvua muana wa Akitube," 
Ezra7:3 Akitube uvua muana wa Amarya, Amarya uvua muana wa Azarya, Azarya uvua muana wa Merayote," 
Ezra7:4 Merayote uvua muana wa Zeraya, Zeraye uvua muana wa Uzi, Uzi uvua muana wa Buki," 
Ezra7:5 Buki uvua muana wa Abishuwa, Abishuwa uvua muana wa Pinase, Pinase uvua muana wa Elazare, Elazare uvua muana wa kumpala wa Arone, mutuangaji munene." 
Ezra7:6 Ezra uvua mumanye mikanda, uvua mumanye bikole meyi ne mikandu bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele muambile Moshe. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende uvua mumupeteshe lumu. Ke pa wa Artashasta, mukalenga munene, mumupeshe bionsu biwaye ulomba." 
Ezra7:7 Pavua bena Izrayele, batuangaji, bena Levi, bena misambu, balami ba ku biibi, ne bena mudimu bakuabu ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bapingana mu Yerushalayime, Artashasta ukavua mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu muanda mutekete." 
Ezra7:8 Ezra, kufika nabu mu ngondu muitanu wa tshidimu atshi." 
Ezra7:9 Ezra kumuka mu Babilone dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa kumpala. Kufikaye nabu mu Yerushalayime dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muitanu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu wende uvua mumulame." 
Ezra7:10 Bualu Ezra uvua mudifile ne muoyi wende mujima bua kulonga mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, kuyikumbaja, kuyilongesha bena Izrayele, bua balonde anu meyi ne mikandu bidibu bafunde mu mikenji." 
Ezra7:11 Artashasta, mukalenga munene wa bena Persa, uvua mupeshe mutuangaji Ezra mukanda. Ezra uvua mumanye bikole meyi ne mikandu bivua Maweja-Nangila mupeshe bena Izrayele. Mukalenga munene Artashasta uvua mufunde ne:" 
Ezra7:12 “Meme Artashasta, mukalenga wa bakalenga, ndi ntumina mutuangaji Ezra mukanda. Yeye ewu udi mumanye bimpe mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, a.n." 
Ezra7:13 “Ndi ntuma diyi, bua bena Izrayele bonsu badi basomba mu bukalenga buanyi, nansha batuangaji nansha bena Levi, nansha bantu bakuabu badi bajinga kuya ku Yerushalayime, baye amu nebe." 
Ezra7:14 Meme ne bafidi ba ngenyi banyi muanda mutekete, tudi tukutuma mu Yerushalayime, ne mu buloba bua bena Yuda, bua wewe kujadika ne: bantu badi bakumbaja tshidibu bafunde mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu uudi uya nawu anyi?" 
Ezra7:15 Wangata tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bitudi tuetu nabi, meme ne bafidi banyi ba ngenyi, bitudi basue kulambula Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi usomba muaba wende wa tshijila, mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra7:16 Newangate kabidi bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, biwapeta mu buloba bua Babilone, bintu bidi bena ditunga dienu bafile ku budisuile buabu, nansha batuangaji nansha bantu bakuabu, bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wabu udi mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra7:17 Mu Yerushalayime, makuta audi upeta, usumbe nawu nyama ya ngombe milume, mbuji ya bimpanga, bana ba mikoku, ne bintu bionsu biudi ukengela bua kulambula milambu ya bintu bia mu madimi ne milambu ya maluvu a mvinyo. Bintu bionsu abi, ubilambuile pa tshilambuilu tshidi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu webe wa mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra7:18 Pashishe, wewe ne baudi wenda nabu, padi tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole bishale, nuenze nabi munudi basue. Kadi amu bilondeshile mudi Mvidi Mukulu wenu munuambile." 
Ezra7:19 Bintu bionsu bia kutendelela nabi biwabu bakupeshe, ubiteke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu webe mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra7:20 Paudi musue kufila bintu bikuabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ubisumbe ku makuta a mu mushete wa bukalenga." 
Ezra7:21 “Meme, Artashasta, mukalenga munene, ndi ngambila balami ba bibutshilu bionsu bidi mu buloba budi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate ne: bakumbaje bidi mutuangaji Ezra wamba, bualu yeye udi mumanye bimpe mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu." 
Ezra7:22 Nebamupeshe kilo binunu bisatu bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kilo binunu makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, litre binunu binayi ya maluvu a mvinyo, litre binunu binayi ya mafuta, ne luepu bungi budibu basue." 
Ezra7:23 Benze lukasa malu onsu avuabu balombe kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu bua nzubu wende, bua Mvidi Mukulu ewu kafikidi bukalenga bunene munda, kamfikidi meme, nansha ndelanganyi yanyi munda." 
Ezra7:24 Tudi tumanyisha kabidi balami ba bibutshilu ne: kabena mua kulambuisha batuangaji, bena Levi, bena misambu, balami ba ku biibi, bena midimu mikuabu ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bitadi nansha milambu mikuabu to." 
Ezra7:25 “Kadi wewe Ezra, bilondeshile mikenji mimpe ya Mvidi Mukulu iudi nayi mu mukanda, usungule balumbuluishi ne balombodi, bua bikale bakosa nsambu ya bantu badi mu buloba ebu, kabidi badi bamanye mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu webe. Badi kabayi bayimanye, neubalongesheyi." 
Ezra7:26 Pashishe, padi muntu kayi ukumbaja mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu, nansha ya mukalenga munene, bamufundile dinyoka didi dimukumbanyine, nansha dia kumushipa, nansha dia kumuipata mu ditunga, nansha dia kumunyenga bintu biende, nansha dia kumuela mu lukanu.”" 
Ezra7:27 Ezra kuamba ne: “Tuele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua betu tuasakidila. Uvua mupeshe mukalenga munene dijinga dia kunemeka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime. 
Ezra7:28 Mvidi Mukulu kungenzela bimpe kumpala kua Artashasta, mukalenga munene, kumpala kua bafidi bende ba ngenyi ne kua bantu banene bonsu ba mu bukalenga buende. Meme ndi mukole muoyi bua padi Maweja-Nangila mundame. Nanku, ndi musangishe bamfumu ba bena Izrayele bua tupingane nabu kuetu.”" 
Ezra8:1 Bilondeshile mikanda idi ne mena a bankambua, ke mena a bamfumu ba meku bandi meme Ezra mufume nabu ku Babilone, mufike nabu mu Yerushalayime mu matuku a bukalenga bua mukalenga munene Artashasta." 
Ezra8:2 Mu diku dia Pinase muvua Ngershone; mu diku dia Itamare muvua Daniyele; mu diku dia Davide muvua Atushe; 
Ezra8:3 muana wa balume umue wa Shekanya; mu diku dia Paroshe muvua Zekarya ne bantu 150 ba mu diku diabu; 
Ezra8:4 mu diku dia Pakate-Mowabe, muvua Eliyo-kenayi, muana wa Seraya, ne bantu 200;" 
Ezra8:5 mu diku dia Zatu, muvua Shekanya, muana wa Yaziyele, ne bantu 300;" 
Ezra8:6 mu diku dia Adine, muvua Ebere, muana wa Yonatane, ne bantu 50;" 
Ezra8:7 mu diku dia Elame, muvua Yeshaya, muana wa Ataliya, ne bantu 70;" 
Ezra8:8 mu diku dia Shefatya, muvua Zebadya, muana wa Mikayele, ne bantu 80;" 
Ezra8:9 mu diku dia Yowabe, muvua Obadya, muana wa Yakiyele, ne bantu 218;" 
Ezra8:10 mu diku dia Bani, muvua Shelomite, muana wa Yoshifiya, ne bantu 160;" 
Ezra8:11 mu diku dia Bebayi, muvua Zekarya, muana wa Bebayi, ne bantu 28;" 
Ezra8:12 mu diku dia Azgade, muvua Yowanane, muana wa Akatane, ne bantu 110;" 
Ezra8:13 mu diku dia Adonikame, muvua Elifelete, Yeyiyele ne Shemaya, bantu basatu ba ndekelu ba ku ndelanganyi ayi. Bavua ne bantu 60;" 
Ezra8:14 mu diku dia Bigvayi, muvua Utayi ne Zakure, bavua ne bantu 70." 
Ezra8:15 Meme kusangisha bantu bonsu aba pabuipi ne mukidi udi mupitshile pabuipi ne musoku wa Akava, Tuetu kushala muaba awu mu mitanda matuku asatu. Pamvua mutangile bimpe, meme kumona munkatshi muabu, muvua batuangaji ne bantu bakuabu, kadi kamuvua bena Levi to." 
Ezra8:16 Nanku, meme kubikila bamfumu balombodi aba bua kubapesha mudimu wa kuenza: ke Eliyezere, Ariyele, Shemaya, Elnatane, Yaribe, Elnatane, Natane, Zekarya, Meshulame ne balongeshi babidi ba mikenji: Yoyaribe ne Elnatane." 
Ezra8:17 Meme kubatuma kudi Ido, mfumu wa musoku wa Kashifiya. Meme kubumvuija tshiyuabu ne bua kuambila Ido ne bamuambuluishi bende, bavua bakuata mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, basombela mu Kashifiya, bua batupeshe bantu bavua mua kuya netu, bua kukuata mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Ezra8:18 Bu muvua Mvidi Mukulu wetu mutalame, kutapeshabu Sherebiya muntu wa lubatshi wa mu diku dia Mali, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Levi, muana wa Yakobe. Sherebiya uvua ne bana bende ba balume, ne bana babu. Bonsu pamue bavua bantu 18." 
Ezra8:19 Mu diku dia Merari muvua Ashabiya ne Yeshaya, ne bana babu ba balume, ne bikulu babu. Bonsu bavua bantu 20." 
Ezra8:20 Kufikabu kabidi ne bantu nkama ibidi ne makumi abidi, basungula ku bantu bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu aba mba ku tshisumbu tshia bantu bavua Davide ne bavuaye nabu, bapeshe bena Levi kale bua babambuluishe." 
Ezra8:21 Ku muelelu wa mukidi wa Akaya, meme kuamba bua tuetu bonsu tajile biakudia. Ke mutavua ne bua kudipuekesha, kusengelela Maweja-Nangila bua atuendeshe mu ditalala ne meku etu, kabidi ne binta bietu." 
Ezra8:22 Tshivua musue kulomba mukalenga munene, bua atupeshe bena mvita ne babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu, bua batalame mu njila, bua baluishi betu kabatatatshishi. Bualu tavua bamujadikile ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ulama bonsu badi bamuitaba. Kadi bonsu badi bamubenga, udi ubafikila munda bikole." 
Ezra8:23 Nanku, tavua bajile biakudia, balombe kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu bua atulame. Yeye kutuenzela bitavua bamulombe." 
Ezra8:24 Pashishe, meme kusungula kabidi munkatshi mua batuangaji, bantu dikumi ne babidi, kabidi ne Sherebiya, Ashabiya ne bantu dikumi ba ku tshisumbu tshiabu." 
Ezra8:25 Meme kupima tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne binta bikuabu bionsu bia mushinga mukole, bantu abu batangile. Binta abi, ke biwabu balambule kudi Artashasta, mukalenga munene, kudi bafidi bende ba ngenyi, kudi balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, ne kudi bena Izrayele bavua mu ditunga, bua tumone mua kulongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra8:26 Nanku, meme kubapesha kilo binunu makumi abidi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kilo binunu bisatu ya binta bia mushinga mukole bienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kilo binunu bisatu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi," 
Ezra8:27 malongu makumi abidi menza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mikale a mushinga wa nkanu tshinunu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne ngesu ibidi mimpe yengelela ya tshiamu tshifike ya mushinga mukole, anu bu mushinga wa ngesu ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Ezra8:28 Meme kubambila ne: — Bu mudibu bamane kunujidila bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, ke mudi kabidi binta ebi bijidile, bua bikale biende yeye. Tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mmilambu ya budisuile idi bantu balambule Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu." 
Ezra8:29 Nulame bintu ebi bimpe, nubifikishe mu Yerushalayime. Padibi bifika, nubipimine mu tshibambalu tshidi tshilamakaja ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, batuangaji, balombodi, bena Levi ne bamfumu ba meku batangile." 
Ezra8:30 Nanku, batuangaji ne bena Levi bavua bangate bintu biwabu bapime, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bintu bikuabu bua kuya nabi mu Yerushalayime, mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Ezra8:31 Mu matuku dikumi ne abidi a ngondu wa kumpala, tuetu kumuka ku mukidi wa Akava, bua kuya mu Yerushalayime. Mu luendu alu, Mvidi Mukulu wetu uvua molole tshianza tshiende, bua kutulama ku baluishi ne bena buivi, bua kabatutatshishi." 
Ezra8:32 Tufika mu Yerushalayime, tuetu kuikisha matuku asatu." 
Ezra8:33 Dituku dinayi, tuetu kupimina mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bintu bia mushinga mukole. Tuetu bamane kubipima, tuvua babipeshe mutuangaji Meremote, muana wa Uriya, ne Elazare, muana wa Pinase. Bena Levi bakuabu bavuaku: ke Yozabade, muana wa Yeshuwa, ne Nowadya, muana wa Binuwi." 
Ezra8:34 Bamane kubala bintu bionsu, bapima bujitu buabi, kufundabu mu mukanda bujitu bua bintu bionsu abi." 
Ezra8:35 Bonsu, bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika, bamane kupingana, bavua balambula Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele milambu ya kuosha mu dina dia bena Izrayele bonsu: nyama ya ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi, mbuji ya mikoku ya bimpanga makumi tshitema ne isambombu, ne bana ba mikoku makumi muanda mutekete ne muanda mutekete. Bavua balambula kabidi mbuji ya mpumbu dikumi ne ibidi bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Bavua boshila Maweja-Nangila nyama yonsu ayi." 
Ezra8:36 Pashishe kuambilabu bamienampala ba mukalenga, ne balombodi ba buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, mikenji ya kudi mukalenga munene. Ke bantu abu kupesha bena Izrayele bintu biwabu nabi bua mudimu wa ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezra9:1 Malu awu mamane kupita, bamfumu bakuabu ba bena Izrayele kufika, bangambila ne: — Nansha bantu ba patupu, nansha batuangaji ne bena Levi, kabena bashiyangane ne bena ditunga to. Badi batendelela mvidie ya tshianana, badi balonda bibidilu bibi bia bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Perizi, bena Yebusa, bena Amone, bena Mowabe, bena Ejipitu ne bena Amore." 
Ezra9:2 Bavua basele bakaji ba mu ditunga edi, baselele babu bana ba balume bakaji ba bena bisamba abi. Nanku bantu ba tshijila mbamane kubuelakana ne bena ditunga. Bamfumu ne balombodi ba bantu ke bavua ba kumpala ku dienza bualu bubi bua mushindu ewu." 
Ezra9:3 Pangumvu miaku ayi, meme kupanda tshinkutu tshianyi ne bilamba bianyi. Meme kuditula nsuki ne miedi. Meme kusomba mubungame bikole." 
Ezra9:4 Meme kushala nanku too ne diba divuabu balambule mulambu wa dilolu. Bantu bonsu bavua batshina dinyoka, divua Mvidi Mukulu mua kunyoka bena Izrayele bafume ku bupika bavua benza bualu bubi abu, kusemenabu kundi." 
Ezra9:5 Dilolu, diba dia kulambula milambu dikumbana, meme kumuka muaba umvua nsomba mubungame. Ntshivua ne tshinkutu tshianyi ne bilamba bianyi bimvua mupande. Meme kutua binu panshi, kuela bianza mulu kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi," 
Ezra9:6 kumutendelela ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi ne bundu mesu tente! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, tshiena mua kukuleja mpala wanyi. Mibi yetu idi ya bungi, mmibande too, mipite mitu yetu. Idi bu mikuna, mmiye too ne mu diulu." 
Ezra9:7 Tshikondu tshia bankambua betu too ne mpindiewu, tshisamba tshietu tshivua tshienza bibi bitambe. Ke pavuabu batukengesha, bakengesha bakalenga betu ne batuangaji betu, kudi bakalenga ba bisamba bikuabu. Bavua batuluisha, baya netu ku bupika, banyanga bintu bietu, babakuatshisha bundu, bu mudibu benza ne lelu mene ewu." 
Ezra9:8 Kadi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, matuku makese aa, udi mutuleje muudi mutunange. Uvua muanyishe bua bana betu bavua bashale ne muoyi, bapingane mu buloba buebe bua tshijila. Nanku, bua luse luebe, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mesu etu adi aleja tshiakabidi disanka. Tudi Nsanguluka kakese mu dikenga ditudi nadi." 
Ezra9:9 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tuvua bapika, kadi kuena mutulekele mu bupika to. Uvua muambuluishe bakalenga banene ba bena Persa bua batuenzele bimpe. Bavua babambuluisha bua tusanguluke, basulule nzubu webe, bakaje bivua binyanguke, tupete muaba wa kusomba mu Yerushalayime ne mu Yuda." 
Ezra9:10 “Kadi mpindiewu, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bambe tshinyi bua bidi bibenzekela ebi? Kabena bitabe meyi ebe," 
Ezra9:11 avuabu babambile kudi bambi bebe badi bakuenzela mudimu! Uvua mudianze kubambila ne: ‘Ditunga dinudi nuya kukuata bua kusomba didi ne mikiya, bualu bisamba bidi biasamu bidi ne mikiya, binyangakaja ditunga dijima ne ditendelela diabu dia mvidie ya tshianana." 
Ezra9:12 Nanku, nsongakaji yenu, kabena mua kuyisela kudi nsongalume ya banb benyi abu to. Kabidi kanuena mua kubangila bana babu ba bakaji bua kubaselabu kudi bana benu ba balume to. Kanuena mua kuvudija diakalenga ne biuma bia bantu benyi aba to. Nanku nenuikale bantu ba bukole. Nenusanke ne bintu bimpe bia mu ditunga amu. Nenubishile ndelanganyi yenu kashidi!’" 
Ezra9:13 Eyi! Mvidi Mukulu wetu, makenga onsu aa adi atukuata bua malu mabi etu, ne bua bilema bietu. Kadi kuena mutunyoke bilondeshile muvua bilema bietu. Uvua musue bua bikale ne muoyi. Ke patudi bafike munemu." 
Ezra9:14 Kadi mutudi mua kukutombokela kabidi, kusela bakaji ba bisamba bidi bitendelela mvidie ya tshianana mbishi? Ke muudi mua kubfikila munda, kutubutula bonsu, kuyi ushiya muntu!" 
Ezra9:15 Lelu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, bu muudi ne luse, udi muanyishe bua bamue ba kutudi bashale ne muoyi. Tudi bimane kumpala kuebe, tuetu bena mibi. Kadi bu wewe kuyi ne luse, muntu nansha umue kavua mua kuimana kumpala kuebe ne bubi bua mushindu ewu.”" 
Ezra10:1 Pavua Ezra mutue binu panshi, udila kumpala kua nzubu wa tshijila, utendelela Mvidi Mukulu, umulomba dilekela, bena Izrayele ba bungi, balume, bakaji ne bana, bavua pabuipi nende, badila bonsu bikole." 
Ezra10:2 Pashishe, Shekanya, muana wa Yekiyele, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Elame, kuambila Ezra ne: — Tudi benzele Mvidi Mukulu bibi, basele bakaji benyi ba mu ditunga emu. Kadi nansha nanku, bena Izrayele badi amu mua kutekemena." 
Ezra10:3 Bualu netuditshipe kudi Mvidi Mukulu ne: netubenge bakaji benyi bonsu, ne bana badibu balele. Netulonde meyi anudi nufila, wewe Ezra ne bonsu badi bakumbaja biakane mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Netukumbaje bidiye musue." 
Ezra10:4 Juka, ulongolole bimpe bualu ebu. Tudi basue kukuambuluisha, kupampakanyi to." 
Ezra10:5 Ezra kujuka, kutuma diyi bua bamfumu ba batuangaji ba bena Levi, ne bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele baditshipe, bua kukumbaja bionsu bivua Shekanya muambe. Bonsu kuditshipa." 
Ezra10:6 Pashishe, kumukaye mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuya kusomba kua Yowanane, muana wa Eliyashibe. Kadi kubengaye kudia nansha kunua. Bualu bubi buvua bana babu bena Yuda benze buvua bumutonda." 
Ezra10:7 Bavua batuma mukanda mu Yerushalayime ne mu ditunga dia Yuda, bua bantu bonsu bafume mu bupika basangile mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezra10:8 Padi matuku asatu apita, muntu yonsu udi kayi mufike, nebamunyenge bintu biende, bamuipata munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Ke muvuabu bambe kudi bamfumu ne kudi bakulu bavua babambuluisha." 
Ezra10:9 Matuku asatu mamane kupita, bena Yuda ne bena Binyamine bonsu kufika mu Yerushalayime mu matuku makumi abidi a ngondu wa tshitema. Kusangilabu bonsu mu lupangu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bonsu bavua bazakala bua bualu ebu, ne bua mvula uvua uloka bikole." 
Ezra10:10 Mutuangaji Ezra kuimana kulu, ubambila ne: — Bena Izrayele, nudi benze bibi bitambe panudi basele bakaji benyi. Ke bubi bukuabu bunudi basakidile ku bubi bua kale bua bankambua benu." 
Ezra10:11 Mpindiewu, nutonde bubi buenu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua benu, nuitabe ku diyi diende. Kanumvuanganyi kabidi ne bena bisamba ebi to. Nubenge bakaji benyi banudi basele." 
Ezra10:12 Bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu kuela mbila ne: — Udi muambe bualu bulelela! Nebenze bionsu biudi mutuambile. 
Ezra10:13 Kadi tudi ba bungi, tudi kabidi mu tshikondu tshia mvula. Katuena mua kushala pambelu to. Bualu ebu kabuena mua kujika dituku dimue, nansha matuku abidi to. Bantu bavule ba kutudi eku mbabuelakane mu tshilumbu atshi." 
Ezra10:14 Nanku tudi basue bamfumu betu bashale muaba ewu, bua kuambuluisha bantu: bena Izrayele bonsu bavua basele bakaji benyi nebaye kudi bamfumu abu matuku ikale bamfumu abu bafunde. Nebafike ne bakulu ne balumbuluishi ba mu bimenga biabu bishilangane. Netuakaje bualu ebu bimpe bua kutuyisha tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi mutufikile bonsu munda." 
Ezra10:15 Anu Yonatane, muana wa Ashayele, ne Yaziya, muana wa Tikva, pamue ne Meshulame ne Shabetayi, muena Levi, ke bavua babenge kuitaba bionsu biwabu bapangadike abi." 
Ezra10:16 Bena Izrayele bakuabu bavua bafume ku bupika, kuitaba meji awu. Mutuangaji Ezra kusungula mu diku dionsu bamfumu, kutela ne dina diabu. Bantu abu kusangila biangatshile ku dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa dikumi, bua kuakaja tshilumbu etshi tshijima." 
Ezra10:17 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa kumpala wa tshidimu tshivua tshilonda, kujikijabu mudimu wa kutangila tshilumbu tshia bantu bonsu bavua basele bakaji benyi." 
Ezra10:18 Ke mena a batuangaji bavua basele bakaji benyi: Masheya, Eliyezere, Yaribe ne Ngedaliya, ba ku ndelanganyi ya Yeshuwa ne ya bana babu, bana ba Yoshadake;" 
Ezra10:19 kuditshipabu bua kulekela bakaji babu, ne kufuta mukoku wa tshimpanga bua mulambu wa kulomba luse kudi Mvidi Mukulu;" 
Ezra10:20 Anani ne Zebadya ba ku ndelanganyi ya Imere. 
Ezra10:21 Masheya, Eliya, Shemaya, Yekiyele ne Uziya, ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arime;" 
Ezra10:22 Eliyokenayi, Masheya, Ishemayele, Metaneyele, Yorabade ne Elasha, ba ku ndelanganayi ya Pashekure." 
Ezra10:23 Ku bena Levi kuvua: Yozabade, Shimeyi, Kelaya (uvua ne dina dikuabu Kelita), Petakiya, Yekuda ne Eliyezere." 
Ezra10:24 Ku bena misambu kuvua: Eliyashibe. Ku balami ba biibi kuvua: Shalume, Teleme ne Uri." 
Ezra10:25 Ku bantu bena Izrayele bakuabu kuvua: ndelanganyi ya Paroshe: Ramiya, Iziya, Malkiya, Miyamine, Elazare, Malkiya ne Benaya;" 
Ezra10:26 ndelanganyi ya Elame: Mataniya, Zekarya, Yekiyele, Abdi, Yeremote ne Eliya;" 
Ezra10:27 ndelanganyi ya Zatu: Eliyokenayi, Eliyashibe, Mataniya, Yeremote, Zabade ne Aziza;" 
Ezra10:28 ndelanganyi ya Bebayi: Yowanane, Ananiya, Zabayi ne Atlayi;" 
Ezra10:29 ndelanganyi ya Banyi: Meshulame, Maluke, Adaya, Yashube, Sheyale ne Yeremote;" 
Ezra10:30 ndelanganyi ya Pakate-Mowabe: Adna, Kelale, Benaya, Masheya, Mataniya, Beshalele, Binuyi ne Menashe;" 
Ezra10:31 ndelanganyi ya Arime: Eliyezere, Ishiya, Malkiya, Shemaya, Shimone," 
Ezra10:32 Binyamine, Maluke ne Shemariya;" 
Ezra10:33 ndelanganyi ya Ashume: Matenayi, Matata, Zabade, Elifelete, Yeremayi, Menashe ne Shimeyi;" 
Ezra10:34 ndelanganyi ya Banyi: Madayi, Amrame, Uwele," 
Ezra10:35 Benaya, Bedya, Keluku," 
Ezra10:36 Vanya, Meremote, Eliyashibe," 
Ezra10:37 Mataniya, Matenayi, Yashayi," 
Ezra10:38 Banyi, Binuyi, Shimeyi," 
Ezra10:39 Shelemiya, Natane, Adaya," 
Ezra10:40 Maknadebayi, Shashayi, Sharayi," 
Ezra10:41 Azarele, Shelemiya, Shemariya," 
Ezra10:42 Shalume, Amarya ne Yozefe;" 
Ezra10:43 ndelanganyi ya Nebo: Yeyiyele, Matitya, Zabade, Zebina, Yadayi, Yowele ne Benaya." 
Ezra10:44 Bantu bonsu aba ke bavua basele bakaji benyi. Bamue ba ku bakaji abu, bavua bamane kulela bana mu ditunga amu." 
Nehemiah1:1 Telejayi malu adi Nehemya, muana wa Akalya, muenze. Badi bamanyisha Nehemya malu a mu Yerushalayime Artashasta mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi, mu ngondu wa Kislewu, meme Nehemya mvua musombe mu Shushane, tshimenga tshinene tshia bukalenga, tshiyuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Nehemiah1:2 Muanetu mukuabu Anani, ne bantu bavuaye nabu, bavua bumukila mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, bafika mu Shushane. Meme kubakonka malu a mu Yerushalayime, ne a bena Yuda bavua bapatuke mu bupika, bapingane muetu." 
Nehemiah1:3 Kungambilabu ne: — Bantu bavua mu bupika. mbasombe mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kadi badi mu dikenga dinene. Kabidi bantu badi babapeja bikole. Bimana bia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime mbiupuke miaba mivule. Biibi biatshi mbiosha ne kapia. 
Nehemiah1:4 Meme mumane kumvua bionsu abi, ke meme kusomba bua kudila muadi. Meme kushala ne kanyinganyinga matuku a bungi, tshiyi ndia tshintu to. Meme kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu," 
Nehemiah1:5 kumuambila ne: — Ndi nkusengelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, Mvidi Mukulu munene wa kutshina! Wewe udi ukumbaja ndondu webe ne bantu badi batumikila mikenji yebe. Kabidi bantu bonsu badi bakunanga, kuena ubalekela to." 
Nehemiah1:6 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, mpindiewu, untangile, unteleje, umvua mundi nkutendelelela, meme muntu webe. Butuku ne munya, ndi anu nkulomba bualu buetu tuetu bena Izrayele, bantu bebe. Ndi nkulomba bua wewe kutufuilaku luse, bua bibi bionsu bitudi benze. Eyowa, meme ne bankambua banyi tudi benza bibi." 
Nehemiah1:7 Tudi bakupende, bualu katuena bakumbaje meyi ebe, mikenji yebe, ne mikandu yebe, biuvua mutumanyishe kudi Moshe, muntu webe." 
Nehemiah1:8 Uvuluke meyi ebe avua Moshe mutuambile ne: “Nuenu kanuyi bangitabe ne muoyi umue, nennutangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu." 
Nehemiah1:9 Kadi, nuenu bapingane kundi, bakumbaje mikenji yanyi, nansha nuenu mu bupika ku ndekelu kua buloba, meme nennukebe, nnupingaje muaba umvua mumane kusungula bua meme kusomba. ’" 
Nehemiah1:10 Maweja-Nangila, tudi bena mudimu bebe. Tudi bantu bebe! Uvua mutusungidile ku bukole buebe, bualu wewe udi muena bukole buonsu." 
Nehemiah1:11 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela ne: utelejeku mundi nutendelela, kabidi mudibu bakutendelela kudi bantu bebe bakuabu, badi ne disanka dia kukutumbisha. Wewe, ungendeshe diakalenga mu bionsu bindi musue kuenza lelu. Ungambuluishe bua mukalenga wa bakalenga angandamune bimpe. Tshikondu atshi, meme Nehemya mvua ntangila bantu bavua balongolola maluvu a mukalenga wa bakalenga." 
Nehemiah2:1 Artashasta, mukalenga wa bakalenga, mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu makumi abidi, dituku dikuabu, mu ngondu wa Nisane, uvua musombe ku mesa. Meme Nehemya kuangata maluvu, kumuelela. Mvua anu mubungame. Katshia tshivua muanji kubungama muaba uvua mukalenga to." 
Nehemiah2:2 Nanku mukalenga wa bakalenga kunkonka ne: — Nehemya, udi mubungame bua tshinyi? Udi usama anyi? Tshidi tshikutonda ntshinyi? Meme kumvua bowa bua bungi." 
Nehemiah2:3 Ke meme kuambila mukalenga ne: — Mfumuanyi, ndi nkujingila diakalenga kashidi! Meme tshiena mua kuikala ne disanka to, bualu tshimenga tshidibu bajike bankambua banyi ntshinyangakaja, kabidi biibi biatshi mbiosha ne kapia." 
Nehemiah2:4 Mukalenga kunkonka kabidi ne: — Udi musue nkuenzele tshinyi? Diakamue meme kutendelela Maweja-Nangila wa mu diulu. 
Nehemiah2:5 Pashishe, meme kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Mfumuanyi, pawikala musue kumfuila luse, witabe bua meme kuya mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, mu tshimenga tshidibu bajike bankambua banyi, bua meme kuibakulula tshimenga atshi." 
Nehemiah2:6 Mukaji wa mukalenga wa bakalenga uvua musombe pamue ne bayende. Awu kunkonka kabidi ne: — Nehemya, neushale mu luendu matuku bungi munyi? Neupingane dituku kaayi? Meme kumuambila dituku dimvua ne bua kupingana. Nanku mukalenga wa bakalenga kuitaba bua meme kuya." 
Nehemiah2:7 Pashishe meme kumulomba kabidi ne: — Mfumuanyi, umpeshe mikanda ya meme kupesha bulombodi ba buloba budi luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate, bua banyishe bua meme kupita, kuya mu ditunga dia bena Yuda." 
Nehemiah2:8 Umpeshe mukanda mukuabu wa meme kupesha Ashafe, mulami wa metu a mukalenga, bua kumpeshaye mabaya makumbane a meme kuenza nawu biibi bianzubu wa balami ba nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuenza nawu kabidi bimana bia ku tshimenga, ne kuasa nawu nzubu wa meme kusomba. Mukalenga wa bakalenga kumpesha mikanda ayi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu wanyi uvua mungambuluishe." 
Nehemiah2:9 Meme kuya ne mikanda ayi kudi balombodi ba buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate. Meme kubapesha mikanda yakudi mukalenga wabakalenga. Mvua muye ne bamfumu ba bena mvita, ne babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu, bavua mukalenga wa bakalenga mumpe bua bandame." 
Nehemiah2:10 Pashishe, Sanebalate, muena Orone, ne Tobiya, muena Amone, uvua umuambuluisha, kumvuabu lumu lua difika dianyi. Nanku kufikabu munda bikole, bua pumvuabu ne muntu mmufike bua kuambuluisha bena Izrayele." 
Nehemiah2:11 Meme mumane kufika mu Yerushalayime, ke meme kushala muindile matuku asatu." 
Nehemiah2:12 Tshiena muambile muntu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu wanyi mungambile, bua kuenza mu tshimenga atshi. Pashishe meme kujuka butuku ne kasumbu ka bantu balume. Tshivua muye ne nyama mukuabu to, anu nyama wa mpunde umvua mbanda." 
Nehemiah2:13 Mundankulu, meme kumuka mu tshimenga, kupatukila ku tshiibi tshia ku Tshibandabanda. Meme kuya luseke lua ku mpokolu wa mayi a Mamba-muntu, ne ku tshiibi tshia ku Dyala. Meme kukenketa bimana bia tshimenga. Meme kujadika ne: bimana bivua biupuke miaba mivule, kabidi biibi bivua biosha ne kapia." 
Nehemiah2:14 Ke meme kutungunuka ne luendu luseke luvua tshiibi tshia ku Mpokolu wa mayi, ne luseke luvua dijiba dia mukalenga. Kadi nyama wa mpunde umvua mubande, kavua mupete kabidi muaba wa kupitshila to." 
Nehemiah2:15 Nanku, anu butuku abu, meme kuya ku kasulu ka mayi ka Sedrone, ngenda ntangila bimana bia tshimenga. Pashishe, meme kupingana mu tshimenga, kubuelela ku tshiibi tshia ku Tshibandabanda." 
Nehemiah2:16 Balombodi ba tshimenga kabavua bamanye muaba umvua muye, nansha malu amvua muenze. Bualu diba dimvua ngenza bionsu ebi, tshivua muanji kumanyisha bena Yuda bualu, nansha batuangaji, nansha bakulu ba ditunga, balombodi, nansha bantu mene bavua batangila midimu." 
Nehemiah2:17 Nanku, mpindiewu meme kubambila ne: — Nudi bamone dikenga ditudi nadi: tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ntshinyangakaja. Biibi biatshi mbiosha ne kapia! Tuyayi kuibakulula bimana bia Yerushalayime, bua tujikije bundu butudi nabu." 
Nehemiah2:18 Meme kubambila muvua Mvidi Mukulu wanyi mungambuluishe, kubambila kabidi bionsu bivua mukalenga wa bakalenga mungambile. Diakamue kuelabu mbila, bamba ne: — Jukayi, tuenze mudimu! Tuibakulule tshimenga! Bantu kujuka ne dikima, bua kuenza mudimu awu muimpe." 
Nehemiah2:19 Kadi, Sanebalate, muena Orone, Tobiya, muena Amone, uvua umuambuluisha, ne Ngesheme, muena Arabe, kutusekabu. Kutusendekabu, bakonka ne: — Tshinudi nuenza ntshinyi? Nudi basue kutombokela mukalenga wa bakalenga anyi?" 
Nehemiah2:20 Meme kubandamuna ne: — Anu Mvidi Mukulu wamu diulu nkayende neatuambuluishe bua tuetu kutshimuna. Tuetu, bena mudimu bende, netuenze mudimu wa kuibakulula tshimenga. Kadi nuenu kanuena ne bualu muaba ewu to. Kanuena mua kupiana bintu mu Yerushalayime, kanuena mua kudiamu bumfumu, kanuena mua kutendamu bibidilu bia bankambua betu." 
Nehemiah3:1 Mutuangaji munene Eliyashibe, kutuadija mudimu pamue ne batuangaji bakuabu. Kuibakululabu tshiibi tshia Mikoku, kutshijidilabu. Kuelabu bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu. Kuibakululabu tshimana too ne ku kaleya ka Meya. Kujidilabu tshimana atshi. Kutungunukabu ne dibaka tshimana too ne ku kaleya ka Ananeyele." 
Nehemiah3:2 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko, bavua bibakulula tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilonda tshia batuangaji, pashishe Zakure, muana wa Imri." 
Nehemiah3:3 Bena mu musoku wa Sena, kuibakululabu tshiibi tshia Minyinyi ya mu mayi. Bobu bamane kulamakaja mabaya a tshiibi, kuelabu bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu, kuasabu kabidi milonda ya kukanga nayi tshiibi." 
Nehemiah3:4 Bantu bavua benza mudimu tshitupa tshikuabu bavua Meremote, muana wa Uriya, ne muikulu wa Akose; pashishe Meshulame, muana wa Berekya, ne muikulu wa Meshezabele; pashishe Sadoke, muana wa Baana;" 
Nehemiah3:5 pashishe bena mu tshimenga tshia Tekowa. Kadi, bakulu ba mu tshimenga tshia Tekowa kubenga bua babatumine diyi kudi bantu bavua batangila mudimu awu." 
Nehemiah3:6 Yoyada, muana wa Pasheya, ne Meshulame, muana wa Beshodia, kulongololabu tshiibi tshia Yeshana. Bobu bamane kulamakaja mabaya a tshiibi, kuelabu bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu, kuasabu kabidi milonda ya kukanga nayi tshiibi." 
Nehemiah3:7 Bantu bavua benza mudimu ku tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimana bavua Melatiya, wa mu Ngibone, Yadone, wa mu musoku wa Meronote, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu Ngibone ne ba mu Mispa. Bavua babafuta kudi mulombodi wa buloba buvua luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua musulu wa Perate." 
Nehemiah3:8 Pashishe, bavua benza mudimu kudi nsenda wa biamu bia mpawungi, diende Uziyele, muana wa Araya, ne kudi Ananiya, muenji wa manananshi. Kujikijabu mudimu wabu mu Yerushalayime anu pavuabu bafike muaba uvua tshimana tshialabale." 
Nehemiah3:9 Muntu uvua wenza mudimu tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilonda, uvua Refaya, muana wa Ure. Refaya uvua mulombodi wa tshitupa tshimue tshia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah3:10 Pashishe, Yedaya, muana wa Arumafe, ke uvua utangila bantu bavua bibakulula tshimana tshivua tshilulamangane ne nzubu wende. Pashishe Atushe, muana wa Ashabneya, uvua wenza mudimu ku tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilonda." 
Nehemiah3:11 Malkiya, muana wa Arime, ne Ashube, muana wa Pakate-Mowabe, bavua benza mudimu ku tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimana tshivua ne kaleya ka Tshioshilu." 
Nehemiah3:12 Shalume, muana wa Alokesha, uvua wenza mudimu ku tshitupa tshikuabu, bamuambuluisha kudi bana bende ba bakaji. Shalume uvua mulombodi wa tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah3:13 Tshiibi tshia ku Tshibandabanda, bavua batshilongolola kudi Anune, ne bena mu tshimenga tshia Zanowa. Bobu bamane kulongolola tshiibi atshi, kuelabu bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu, kuasabu kabidi ne milonda ya kukanga nayi tshiibi. Kulongololabu kabidi tshimana, bule bua metre nkama itanu too ne ku tshiibi tshia ku Dyala." 
Nehemiah3:14 Tshiibi tshia ku Dyala, bavua batshilongolola kudi Malkiya, muana wa Rekabe. Malkiya uvua mulombodi wa buloba bua Bete-Kereme. Malkiya mumane kulongolola tshiibi atshi, kuelaye bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu, kuasaye kabidi ne milonda ya kukanga nayi tshiibi." 
Nehemiah3:15 Tshiibi tshia ku Mpokolu wa mayi bavua batshilongolola kudi Shalume, muana wa Koloze. Shalume uvua mulombodi wa buloba bua Mispa. Shalume mumane kulongolola tshiibi atshi, muenze ne mutu watshi, kuelaye bitupa bibidi bia tshiibi ku mbelu. Kuasaye milonda ya kupayika nayi tshiibi. Pashishe, kuibakululaye tshimana pabuipi ne dijiba dia Shilowa, pankatshi pa lupangu lua mukalenga, ne tshibandilu tshidi tshifumina mu Tshimenga tshia Davide." 
Nehemiah3:16 Pashishe, Nehemya, muana wa Azbuke, uvua mulombodi wa tshia bibidi tshimue tshia buloba bua Bete-Sure, uvua wenza mudimu too ne pabuipi ne lukita lua Davide, ne ku dijiba dia mayi divuabu bumbule, ne ku nzubu wa bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga." 
Nehemiah3:17 Bena Levi bavua benza mudimu tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimana, ke Rekume, muana wa Bani; Ashabiya, mulombodi wa tshia bibidi tshimue tshia buloba bua Keyila, mu dina dia bena kuabu;" 
Nehemiah3:18 Bavayi, muana wa Enadade, uvua mulombodi wa tshitupa tshikuabu tshia buloba bua Keyila;" 
Nehemiah3:19 Ezere, muana wa Yeshuwa, uvua mulombodi wa Mispa. Yeye ke uvua nuibakulule tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilulamangane ne njila uvua ubanda ku nzubu uvua ne bintu bia mvita, muaba uvua tshimana tshialabale." 
Nehemiah3:20 Muntu uvua wenza mudimu tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimana uvua Baruke, muana wa Zabayi. Uvua wenza mudimu ne disuminyina, biangatshile muaba uvua tshimana tshialabale, too ne ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Eliyashibe, mutuangaji munene." 
Nehemiah3:21 Pashishe, Meremote, muana wa Uriya, ne muikulu wa Akose, uvua wenza mudimu wa kuibakulula tshimana, biangatshile ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Eliyashibe, too ne ku ndekelu kua nzubu awu." 
Nehemiah3:22 Tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshimana, bavua batshilongolola kudi batuangaji bavua bafumine ku misoku ivua pabuipi ne Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah3:23 Binyamine ne Ashube bavua bibakulule tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilulamangane ne nzubu yabu. Kadi Azariya, muana wa Masheya, ne muikulu wa Ananya, uvua wenza mudimu pabuipi ne nzubu wende." 
Nehemiah3:24 Binuyi, muana wa Enadade, uvua wibakulula tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua pankatshi pa nzubu wa Azariya, too ne ku ditumba dia tshimana divua dipatuka." 
Nehemiah3:25 Palale, muana wa Uzayi, uvua wibakulula tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua pankatshi pa ditumba divua dipatuka, ne ku kaleya kavuabu basa kumpala kua nzubu wa bukalenga, uvua pabuipi ne lubanza lua bena mvita bavua balame mukalenga. Pashishe, Pedaya, muana wa Paroshe," 
Nehemiah3:26 ne bantu bakuabu bavua benza mudimu ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, basomba ku Ofele, bavua benza mudimu too ne ku kaleya kavua mu ditumba dia tshimana divua dipatuka, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshiibi tshia Mayi." 
Nehemiah3:27 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Tekowa bavua bibakulula tshimana, ku tshitupa tshivua tshilulamangane ne kaleya kanene kavua mu ditumba dia tshimana divua dipatuka, ne ku tshimana tshia Ofele." 
Nehemiah3:28 Biangatshile ku tshiibi tshia nyama ya Tubalu, mutuangaji yonsu uvua ulongolola tshitupa tshia tshimana tshivua tshilulamangane ne nzubu wende." 
Nehemiah3:29 Pashishe, bantu bavua bibakulula tshitupa tshikuabu bavua: Sadoke, muana wa Imere, uvua mulongolole tshitupa tshivua tshilulamangane ne nzubu wende; Shemaya, muana wa Shekanya, uvua mulami wa tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Nehemiah3:30 Bavua balongolola tshitupa tshikuabu kudi Ananiya, muana wa Shelemiya, ne kudi Anune, muana muisambombu wa Salafe. Pashishe, Meshulame, muana wa Berekya, uvua wenza mudimu mu tshitupa tshivua tshilulamangane ne muaba uvuaye usomba." 
Nehemiah3:31 Pashishe, Malkiya, nsenda wa biamu, uvua wenza mudimu too ne ku nzubu uvua bantu bonsu bavua benza mudimu ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bangenda mushinga basomba. Nzubu awu uvua mululamangane ne tshiibi tshia Mifkade. Uvua utungunuka ne mudimu too ne ku tshibambalu tshia kulu tshivua mu ditumba dia tshimana." 
Nehemiah3:32 Bansenda bakuabu ne bangenda mushinga bavua benza mudimu ku tshitupa tshia ndekelu tshia tshimana, pankatshi pa tshibambalu tshia kulu tshivua mu ditumba dia tshimana, ne tshiibi tshia Mikoku." 
Nehemiah3:33 Sanebalate umvua lumu ne: tuetu bena Yuda tudi tuibakulula bimana, kufikaye munda bikole. Pashishe kutuelaye meyi a nsenda," 
Nehemiah3:34 kumpala kua bana babu ne kua bena mvita ba mu ditunga dia Samariya, wamba ne: — Bena Yuda aba, kabena ne bukole to. Kadi mbasue kuenza tshinyi? Badi mua kujikija mudimu ewu ne kulambula Mvidi Mukulu wabu milambu anyi? Mudimu ewu wa kuibakulula bimana ne mabue avuabu bamane kosha bimanshe ku dyala, nebaujikije anu lelu anyi?" 
Nehemiah3:35 Tobiya, muena Amone, uvua pabuipi ne Sanebalate, kukemaye, wamba ne: — Bibake anu kuibaka! Padi nyama wa mukenga ubanda pa tshimana tshia mabue atshi, netshiupuke!" 
Nehemiah3:36 Diba adi meme kuela lubila, ngamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, teleja mudi bena lukuna betu batuseka! Wewe ubalengulule, bu mudibu batulengulula emu. Wewe ubafile mu bianza bia bena lukuna babu. Babakuate, baye nabu mu ditunga dia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Nehemiah3:37 Kuena mua kubajimijila mibi yabu to. Kuena mua kulekela bilema bidibu benza. Kadi badi batutangila, batupenda, bualu tudi tuibakulula bimana.”" 
Nehemiah3:38 Ke mutuvua benze mudimu wa dibakulula tshimana nanku. Tuvua bibakulule bimana, babibandishe too ne pankatshi mu nseke yabi yonsu. Bualu muntu yonsu uvua wenza mudimu ne muoyi mujima." 
Nehemiah4:1 Kadi Sanebalate, Tobiya, bena Arabe, bena Amone, ne bena Asdode, ku-mvuabu muvua dibakulula dia tshimana tshia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime diya kumpala, mutuvua tuamba kujikija mudimu wa kuibakulula miaba ivua miupuke. Nanku kufikabu munda bikole." 
Nehemiah4:2 Kudisangishabu bonsu bua kuluisha bena mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, ne kujula tshimvundu." 
Nehemiah4:3 Tuetu kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kuteka batentekedi butuku ne munya, bua kualamina baluishi abu." 
Nehemiah4:4 Kadi bena Yuda bavua bamba ne: “Bena mudimu kabena kabidi ne bukole to. Bintu bidi binyanguke mbipite bungi. Kakuena mushindu wa kuibakulula bimana kujikija to!” 
Nehemiah4:5 Baluishi betu bavua bela meji ne: tuetu katuena mua kumanya bualu, katuena mua kubamona, too ne pafikabu ne mvita munkatshi muetu, bua kutushipa ne kutulekesha mudimu." 
Nehemiah4:6 Bena Yuda bavua basombe pabuipi ne baluishi betu, kufikabu kutudi misangu bu dikumi, bua kutumanyisha ne: “Nudi ne njiwu, pinganayi kuetu. ”" 
Nehemiah4:7 Nanku, meme kulongolola miaba ya kusokoka bantu panyima pa tshimana. Meme kusokokamu bena mvita, balondangane ku biota biabu. Kabidi bavuane bia mvita: miele, mafuma, ne mata a mikete." 
Nehemiah4:8 Meme mumane kumona muaba uvua bena mvita betu basokome, meme kuambila bakulu ba ditunga, balombodi, ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu, ne: — Kanutshinyi baluishi betu to! Nudi bamanye bukole bua Maweja-Nangila utudi tutshina. Nuluangane bua kupandisha bena tshisamba tshienu, bana benu ba balume, bana benu ba bakaji, bakaji benu, ne nzubu yenu." 
Nehemiah4:9 Baluishi betu kumvua mutuvua bamane kumanya tshifufu tshiyuabu batuelele. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua mubapangishe bua batuenzele bionsu bivuabu bela meji. Tuetu bonsu kupingana ku mudimu wa dibakulula tshimana. 
Nehemiah4:10 Kadi biangatshile dituku adi, tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bantu bamvua nabu, ke bavua benza mudimu. Bantu bakuabu bavua bambula mafuma, ngabu, mata a mikete, ba-vuale ne tuzaku tua mvita. Balombodi bavua balame bena Yuda bonsu" 
Nehemiah4:11 bavua benza mudimu wa kuibakulula tshimana. Bantu bavua bambula majitu, bavua benza mudimu anu ne tshianza tshimue, bualu bavua bambula bia mvita mu tshianza tshikuabu." 
Nehemiah4:12 Muntu yonsu uvua wibaka tshimana, uvua ne muele muasa ku mikaba. Muntu mukuabu utuvua tuenda nende, uvua mumane kudilongolola bua kuela mpungi." 
Nehemiah4:13 Meme kuambila bakulu ba ditunga, balombodi, ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu, ne: — Mudimu wa kuibakulula tshimana etshi tshijima utshidi wa bungi. Tudi babanyangane mudimu, tukuata mudimu bashilangane mutantshi mule. Katuena tuenza mudimu muaba umue to." 
Nehemiah4:14 Kadi muaba onsu unudi nuenza mudimu, panudi numvua mpungi, nudisangishe bonsu, nufike muaba undi. Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu wetu atuluile mvita!" 
Nehemiah4:15 Nanku, tuvua tuenza mudimu dinda too ne dilolu. Bantu bakuabu ba munkatshi muetu bavua anu bakuata mafuma ku bianza." 
Nehemiah4:16 Tshikondu atshi, mvua ntumina mulombodi yonsu diyi, yeye ne bantu bende, bua baye kulala mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, bua bamone mua kutulama butuku, munda munya benze mudimu." 
Nehemiah4:17 Meme Nehemya, bana betu, bena mudimu banyi, ne bena mvita bavua batalame, katavua tumusha bilamba pambidi to, anu pa kuowa mayi." 
Nehemiah5:1 Dituku dikuabu, bantu balume ne bakaji bavua banyingalale bikole bua bana babu bakuabu bena Izrayele." 
Nehemiah5:2 Bantu bakuabu bavua bamba ne: “Tuetu ne bana betu ba balume ne ba bakaji tudi ba bungi. Tudi basue kupeta ntete ya kuenza bukula mikumbane, bua tuetu kudia, tuikale ne muoyi.”" 
Nehemiah5:3 Banga bavua bamba ne: “Tudi ne bua kufila madimi etu, mionji ya mvinyo, ne nzubu yetu mene, bu tshieya, bua tupete ntete ya kuenza bukula mu tshikondu tshia nzala.”" 
Nehemiah5:4 Bakuabu bavua bamba ne: “Bua kulambula mukalenga wa bakalenga tshitadi, tudi ne bua kueyeka madimi etu, mionji yetu ya mvinyo, bua kupeta makuta." 
Nehemiah5:5 Kadi tudi bantu ba tshisamba tshimue! Bana betu kabena bashilangane ne bana ba bena Yuda bakuabu to. Kadi tuetu tudi ne bua kufila bana betu mu bupika. Bana betu ba bakaji bakadi mene bamane kubuelamu. Katuena ne tshitadi mua kuenza kabidi to. Bualu madimi etu, ne mionji yetu ya mvinyo, mbamane kubiangata.”" 
Nehemiah5:6 Meme mumane kumvua muvua bamue bantu bakengesha bakuabu, meme kupeta tshiji tshia bungi." 
Nehemiah5:7 Mvua musue kutandisha bakulu ba ditunga, ne balombodi, bua kabikadi bakengesha bana babu bikole nanku to. Nanku, meme kubikidisha bantu bonsu mu tshisangilu." 
Nehemiah5:8 Meme kubambila ne: — Tuetu kuenza muetu muonsu, kupikula bana betu bena Yuda bavua badisumbisha bu bapika kudi bantu benyi. Kadi nuenu mpindiewu bena Izrayele, nukadi nupanangana nkayenu mu bupika! Bantu bonsu kupuwa." 
Nehemiah5:9 Meme kubambila ne: — Nudi benze bibi bitambe, kanuyi mua kutshinaku Mvidi Mukulu wetu! Nanku, baluishi betu, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, nebanulembakaje." 
Nehemiah5:10 Meme ne bana betu, ne bena mudimu banyi, tavua basombeshe bantu nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole, ne ntete ya kuenza bukula. Nanku, tuanyishi bua kabatapingajidi binta bietu." 
Nehemiah5:11 Nuenu kabidi lelu nupingajile bantu madimi abu, mionji ya mvinyo, mitshi yabu ya olive, ne nzubu yabu. Kanulombi tshintu tshia kasombele ku nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ku ntete ya kuenza bukula, ku maluvu a mvinyo, nansha ku mafuta, binuvua babasombeshe." 
Nehemiah5:12 Bantu bobu kuamba ne: — Tudi bitabe muudi muambe. Neapingaje bintu bituvua bangate. Katuakulomba kabidi tshia kasombele nansha. Nanku, meme kubikidisha batuangaji, kuambila bantu bavua basombeshangana bintu, bua baditshipe ne: netukumbaje bituvua balaye." 
Nehemiah5:13 Pashishe meme kunyukula luzemba lua tshilamba tshianyi, ngamba ne: — Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu mua kunyukula bonsu badi kabayi bakumbaja malaya abu. Mvidi Mukulu abipate mu nzubu yabu, abanyenge bintu biabu, bashale bianza bitupu. Bantu bonsu bavua bamba ne: — Amene! Bikale amu nanku. Bantu bonsu bavua batumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Matuku onsu bavua bakumbaja biwabu balaye." 
Nehemiah5:14 Biangatshile dituku divuabu bansungule mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda, mmumue ne munkatshi mua bidimu dikumi ne bibidi, biangatshile ku tshidimu tshia makumi abidi too ne ku tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Artashasta, meme ne balombodi banyi ba mu bukalenga, katuena balombe tshintu ku bitadi biwabu balambula mulombodi wa buloba to." 
Nehemiah5:15 Kadi bamfumu bavua balombodi kumpala kuanyi, bavua batatshisha bantu, balomba biakudia ku bukole, maluvua mvinyo, ne nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole mipite pa makumi anayi. Nansha bambuluishi ba balombodi ba buloba, bavua anu batatshisha bantu. Kadi meme kubenga kashidi bua kuenza nanku, bualu mvua ntshina Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah5:16 Meme kukuata mudimu ne bianza bianyi bua kuibakulula tshimana; bena mudimu banyi bavua benza anu nanku. Kadi katuena bakebe mua kusumba lupangu ku mushinga mutekete, bualu bua muanzu utuvua nawu." 
Nehemiah5:17 Kadi mvua ne bua kudisha bakulu ba bena Yuda lukama ne makumi atanu, kabidi ne benyi bavua bafume ku matunga adi netu mutumba." 
Nehemiah5:18 Dituku dionsu bavua bipika ngombe umue, mikoku isambombu, ne nzolu ya bungi kabidi. Matuku dikumi apita, bavua bafila misangu yonsu maluvu mapite bungi, amvua ne bua kufuta. Kadi nansha bikale nanku, tshiena mulombe tshidi mulombodi wa buloba mua kulomba. Bualu midimu ivua bantu benza ikavua bujitu bunene pambidi pabu." 
Nehemiah5:19 “Eyi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umvulukeku, bua mudimu onsu undi muenzele bantu aba.”" 
Nehemiah6:1 Sanebalate, Tobiya, Ngesheme, muena Arabe, ne baluishi betu bakuabu, kumvuabu ne: nkadi mumane kuibaka tshimana tshia Yerushalayime. Kakuena muaba munyanguke kabidi to. Tshikondu atshi, tshivua muanji kupingaja bitupa bia biibi pa muaba wabi to." 
Nehemiah6:2 Nanku, Sanebalate ne Ngesheme kumbikila mu musoku wa Kefirime, mu tshibandabanda tshia Ono. Bavua basue kungenzela bibi." 
Nehemiah6:3 Kadi meme kubandamuna ne: — Ndi ne mudimu wa bungi. Tshiena ne mushindu wa kumonangana nenu. Meme mumuke bua kumonangana nenu, mudimu kawena utungunuka to." 
Nehemiah6:4 Nanku, Sanebalate ne Ngesheme bavua bambikila misangu inayi, bua kumonangana nabu. Meme kubandamuna anu mushindu umue, mbenga mua kumonangana nabu." 
Nehemiah6:5 Musangu muitanu Sanebalate kuntumina mukanda kudi muntu uvuaye wenza nende mudimu. Kadi mukanda awu kauvua mubuikila to. 
Nehemiah6:6 Mu mukanda bavua bafunde ne: “Ngesheme wangambidi ne: bantu ba bisamba bikuabu badi bamba ne: wewe Nehemya, ne bana benu, nudi nukeba kutomboka. Ke paudi wibakulula tshimana etshi. Badi bamba kabidi ne: udi musue kushala mukalenga." 
Nehemiah6:7 Ke paudi musungule bambi, mua kuelabu diyi mu Yerushalayime, ne: Nehemya ke mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Kadi mukalenga wa bakalenga neamanye bualu ebu lukasa. Nanku, ufike tuyukile nebe.”" 
Nehemiah6:8 Meme kumuandamuna ne: “Bionsu biudi muambe kabiena bia bushiwa to, mbia dishima. Wewe nkayebe ngudi mufuanyikije malu awu!”" 
Nehemiah6:9 Bionsu abi, Sanebalate ne Ngesheme bavua babienza bua binkuatshisha bowa. Bavua bakeba mua tuetu kuteketa mu maboku, kulekela mudimu. “Eyi, Maweja-Nangila ungambuluishe mu mudimu ewu.”" 
Nehemiah6:10 Dituku dikuabu meme kuya kumonangana ne Shemaya, muana wa Delaya, ne muikulu wa Metabeyele. Bualu kavua mua kufika kundi to. Kungambilaye ne: — Tubuelele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba wa tshijila, tukange biibi bikole, bualu baluishi bebe nebafike butuku bua kukushipa." 
Nehemiah6:11 Meme kuandamuna ne: — Meme tshiena mua kunyema to! Kabidi muntu bu mundi emu, ndi mua kubuela muaba wa tshijila kushala ne muoyi anyi? Nansha kakese. Tshiena mua kubuelamu to." 
Nehemiah6:12 Meme kumona bimpe ne: kena ungambila malu a kudi Mvidi Mukulu to. Kadi Tobiya ne Sanebalate mbamupeshe makuta, bua kungambilaye malu awu." 
Nehemiah6:13 Bavua bamupe makuta bua tshinyi? Anu bua meme kuikala ne bowa, kulonda meyi abu, kupia tshibawu. Ke muvuabu mua kunyanga lumu luanyi, kumfuisha bundu." 
Nehemiah6:14 “Eyi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, vuluka bibi bivuabu bangenzela kudi Tobiya, ne kudi Sanebalate, kabidi ne kudi muambi mukaji Nowadiya, ne kudi bambi bakuabu bavua bakeba kunkuatshisha bowa.”" 
Nehemiah6:15 Tuetu bamane kuenza mudimu matuku makumi atanu ne abidi, tuetu kujikija dibaka dia tshimana dituku dia makumi abidi ne ditanu dia ngondu wa Elule." 
Nehemiah6:16 Pashishe, baluishi betu bavua basombe mu bisamba bivua mutumba netu, kumvua bualu abu, kupetabu bowa ne bundu. Kujadikabu ne: Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutuambuluishe mu mudimu ewu." 
Nehemiah6:17 Tshikondu atshi, bakulu bakuabu ba mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, bavua batuminangana mikanda ne Tobiya." 
Nehemiah6:18 Bena Yuda ba bungi kutuabu nende ndondu, bualu uvua muku wa Shekanya, muana wa Ara, muena Yuda. Muanende wa balume Yowanane uvua musele Meshulame, muana wa Berekiya." 
Nehemiah6:19 Bavua bamutumbisha, meme mutangile. Bavua bamulondele kabidi bimvua meme muambe. Tobiya muine uvua untumina mikanda bua kunkuatshisha bowa." 
Nehemiah7:1 Mudimu wa kuibaka tshimana tshia tshimenga mumane kujika, meme kuela biibi ku mushiku wa tshimenga. Balami ba biibi, bimbi ba misambu, ne bena Levi, kutuadija midimu yabu." 
Nehemiah7:2 Ku mudimu wa kulongolola tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, meme kuteka muanetu Anani, kabidi Ananiya, uvua mulombodi wa nzubu wa bena mvita. Ananiya uvua muntu muimpe, mulamatshi wa Mvidi Mukulu, mupite bantu bakuabu ba bungi." 
Nehemiah7:3 Meme kubambila ne: — Kabena mua kunzulula biibi bia tshimenga, diba kadiyi dianji kubanda. Nebabikange dilolu, bena mabaya bapayika milonda balami ba biibi kabayi banji kumuka ku mudimu. Nuteke bantu bua kulama tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Nuteke balami bakuabu pa miaba misunguluke, bakuabu pabuipi ne nzubu yabu." 
Nehemiah7:4 Tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime tshivua tshialabale. Kadi bantu bavua basamu bavua amu bakese. Bualu kabavua banji kulongolola nzubu mikuabu. 
Nehemiah7:5 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi kumpesha meji, meme kubikidisha bakulu, balombodi ba ditunga, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu tshimenga, bua kubala bungi buabu. Meme kubala mukanda uvua ne mena a bena Yuda bavua badianjile kufuma mu bupika, bapingane mu Yerushalayime. Mukanda bavua baufunde nenku:" 
Nehemiah7:6 “Bantu ba bungi bavua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, mukuate muye nabu mu bupika, mbamane kupingana mu Yerushalayime, ne mu ditunga dia Yuda. Muntu yonsu uvua upingana mu tshimenga tshiabu." 
Nehemiah7:7 Bavua babalombola kudi: Zerubabele, Yeshuwa, Nehemya, Azariya, Ramya, Nakamani, Mordekayi, Bilshane, Misperete, Bigvayi, Nekume ne Baana. Ke mena a bena Izrayele bavua bafume mu bupika, bafike mu Yerushalayime, bilondeshile mena a biota biabu:" 
Nehemiah7:8 Mu tshiota tshia Paroshe muvua bantu 2.172; 
Nehemiah7:9 mu tshiota tshia Shefatya muvua bantu 372; 
Nehemiah7:10 mu tshiota tshia Ara muvua bantu 652; 
Nehemiah7:11 mu tshiota tshia Pakate-Mowabe, ndelanganyi ya Yeshuwa ne ya Yowabe, muvua bantu 2.818;" 
Nehemiah7:12 mu tshiota tshia Elame muvua bantu 1.254; 
Nehemiah7:13 mu tshiota tshia Zatu muvua bantu 845; 
Nehemiah7:14 mu tshiota tshia Zakayi muvua bantu 760; 
Nehemiah7:15 mu tshiota tshia Binuyi muvua bantu 648; 
Nehemiah7:16 mu tshiota tshia Bebayi muvua bantu 628; 
Nehemiah7:17 mu tshiota tshia Azgade muvua bantu 2.322; 
Nehemiah7:18 mu tshiota tshia Adonikame muvua bantu 667; 
Nehemiah7:19 mu tshiota tshia Bigvayi muvua bantu 2.067; 
Nehemiah7:20 mu tshiota tshia Adine muvua bantu 655; 
Nehemiah7:21 mu tshiota tshia Atere, ndelanganyi ya Izkiya, muvua bantu 98;" 
Nehemiah7:22 mu tshiota tshia Ashume muvua bantu 328; 
Nehemiah7:23 mu tshiota tshia Beshayi muvua bantu 324; 
Nehemiah7:24 mu tshiota tshia Arife muvua bantu 112; 
Nehemiah7:25 mu musoku wa Ngibone muvua bantu 95; 
Nehemiah7:26 mu musoku wa Betleyeme ne wa Netofa muvua bantu 188; 
Nehemiah7:27 mu musoku wa Anatote muvua bantu 128; 
Nehemiah7:28 mu musoku wa Bete-Azmavete muvua bantu 42; 
Nehemiah7:29 mu misoku ya Kiriyate-Yeyarime, Kefira ne Beyerote, muvua bantu 743;" 
Nehemiah7:30 mu misoku ya Rama ne Ngeba muvua bantu 621; 
Nehemiah7:31 mu musoku wa Mikmase muvua bantu 122; 
Nehemiah7:32 mu misoku eyi Betele ne Ayi muvua bantu 123; 
Nehemiah7:33 mu musoku mukuabu wa Nebo muvua bantu 52; 
Nehemiah7:34 mu tshiota tshia Elame mukuabu, muvua bantu 1.254;" 
Nehemiah7:35 mu tshiota tshia Arime muvua bantu 320; 
Nehemiah7:36 mu tshimenga tshia Yeriko muvua bantu 345; 
Nehemiah7:37 mu misoku eyi Lode, Adide ne Ono muvua bantu 721;" 
Nehemiah7:38 mu tshimenga tshia Sena muvua bantu 3.930. 
Nehemiah7:39 Bisumbu bia batuangaji bivua nenku: mu tshiota tshia Yedaya, ndelanganyi ya Yeshuwa, muvua bantu 973;" 
Nehemiah7:40 mu tshiota tshia Imere muvua bantu 1.052; 
Nehemiah7:41 mu tshiota tshia Pashekure muvua bantu 1.247; 
Nehemiah7:42 mu tshiota tshia Arime muvua bantu 1.017. 
Nehemiah7:43 Tshisumbu tshia bena Levi tshivua nenku: mu tshiota tshia Yeshuwa ne tshia Kadmiyele, ndelanganyi ya Odeva, muvua bantu 74." 
Nehemiah7:44 Ku bimbi ba misambu ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kuvua nunku: mu tshiota tshia Ashafe muvua bantu 148. 
Nehemiah7:45 Ku balami ba biibi kuvua: mu tshiota tshia Shalume, tshia Atere, tshia Talmone, tshia Akube, tshia Atita, ne tshia Shabatayi, muvua bantu 138." 
Nehemiah7:46 Bena midimu mikuabu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sika, Ashufa, Tabayote," 
Nehemiah7:47 Kerose, Siya, Padone," 
Nehemiah7:48 Lebana, Agaba, Shalmayi;" 
Nehemiah7:49 Anane, Ngidele, Ngakare," 
Nehemiah7:50 Reyaya, Reshine, Nekoda," 
Nehemiah7:51 Ngazame, Uza, Pasheya," 
Nehemiah7:52 Besayi, Meyunime, Nefusheshime." 
Nehemiah7:53 Bakbuke, Akufa, Arure," 
Nehemiah7:54 Baslite, Mekida, Arsha," 
Nehemiah7:55 Barkose, Sisra, Tema," 
Nehemiah7:56 Neshiya ne Atifa. 
Nehemiah7:57 Mu tshisumbu tshia bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya bena mudimu ba Shelomu, muvua bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sotayi, Soferete, Perida," 
Nehemiah7:58 Yala, Darkone, Ngidele," 
Nehemiah7:59 Shefatya, Atile, Pokerete-Ashebayime, ne Amone." 
Nehemiah7:60 Bena midimu mikuabu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pamue ne bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya bena mudimu ba Shelomu, bavua bantu 392." 
Nehemiah7:61 “Bantu bavua bafume ku bupika: ku Tele-Mela, ku Tele-Arsha, ku Kerube, ku Adone, ne ku Imere, kabavua mua kujadika meku a bankambua babu to. Nanku kabavua mua kujadikila bantu ne: tudi bena Izrayele to." 
Nehemiah7:62 Bonsu bavua 642 ba mu tshiota tshia Debaya, Tobiya ne Nekoda." 
Nehemiah7:63 “Kabidi batuangaji bakuabu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Obaya, ya Akose, ne ya Barzilayi, kabavua mua kujadika meku a bankambua babu. (Barzilayi uvua ne dina edi, bualu uvua musele muana wa bakaji wa Barzilayi muena Ngilaade.)" 
Nehemiah7:64 Bavua bakeba biakane mu mikanda mena a bankambua babu bapange. Nanku, kubakandikabu mudimu wa butuangaji, bualu bavua babatangila bu bantu badi ne mikiya." 
Nehemiah7:65 Mulombodi wa buloba nkayende kubakandika bua kudia bintu bitambe tshijila, too ne pikala mutuangaji mujadike bualu ebu ku Urime ne Tumime." 
Nehemiah7:66 “Bena Izrayele bavua bafume mu bupika bapingane muabu, bavua bantu 42.360." 
Nehemiah7:67 Bavua ne bena mudimu balume ne bakaji 7.337, bena misambu balume ne bakaji 245." 
Nehemiah7:68 Bavua ne nyama ya tumelu 435, ne ya mpunde 6.720." 
Nehemiah7:69 Bamfumu bakuabu ba meku kufilabu bintu biabu bua kuibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mulombodi wa buloba kufila nkanu 1.000 ya mpawungi, makopu 50 a kumiamina nawu, ne mintumpu 530 ya batuangaji." 
Nehemiah7:70 Bamfumu ba meku bavua bafile nkanu 20.000 ya mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo 1.100." 
Nehemiah7:71 Bena Izrayele bakuabu kufilabu nkanu 20.000 ya mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole kilo 1.000, ne mintumpu 67 ya batuangaji." 
Nehemiah7:72 “Batuangaji, bena Levi, balami ba ku biibi, bena misambu, bantu bakuabu bu benji ba midimu mikuabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu, bavua baye kusomba mu bimenga biabu.” Ngondu wa muanda mutekete wa tshidimu, bena Izrayele bonsu kumuka mu bimenga bivuabu basombe." 
Nehemiah8:1 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, kusangilabu bonsu mu Yerushalayime, pa muaba udi kumpala kua tshiibi tshia Mayi. Kulombabu mutuangaji Ezra, mumanyi mupiluke wa mikenji, bua kufika kumpala kuabu ne mukanda wa mikenji, ivua Maweja-Nangila mutumine bena Izrayele kudi Moshe. Ezra kuya ne mukanda awu, muaba uvua bena Izrayele basangile, balume, bakaji, ne bana bavua batantamane." 
Nehemiah8:1 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, kusangilabu bonsu mu Yerushalayime, pa muaba udi kumpala kua tshiibi tshia Mayi. Kulombabu mutuangaji Ezra, mumanyi mupiluke wa mikenji, bua kufika kumpala kuabu ne mukanda wa mikenji, ivua Maweja-Nangila mutumine bena Izrayele kudi Moshe. Ezra kuya ne mukanda awu, muaba uvua bena Izrayele basangile, balume, bakaji, ne bana bavua batantamane." 
Nehemiah8:2  
Nehemiah8:3 Dinda too ne munda munya, Ezra uvua anu muimane kulu muaba uvua tshiibi tshia Mayi, ubadila bena Izrayele ne diyi dikole bionsu biwabu bafunda mu mukanda. Bantu bonsu bavua bateleja ne ntema bionsu bivuaye ubala abi." 
Nehemiah8:3 Dinda too ne munda munya, Ezra uvua anu muimane kulu muaba uvua tshiibi tshia Mayi, ubadila bena Izrayele ne diyi dikole bionsu biwabu bafunda mu mukanda. Bantu bonsu bavua bateleja ne ntema bionsu bivuaye ubala abi." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezra uvua muimane kulu pa mabaya avuabu balongolole anu bua bualu abu. Ku diboku diende dia bukole kuvua: Matitya, Shema, Anaya, Uriya, Ilkiya ne Masheya. Ku diboku diende dia bakaji kuvua Pedaya, Mishayele, Malkiya, Ashume, Ashebadana, Zekarya ne Meshulame." 
Nehemiah8:4 Ezra uvua muimane kulu pa mabaya avuabu balongolole anu bua bualu abu. Ku diboku diende dia bukole kuvua: Matitya, Shema, Anaya, Uriya, Ilkiya ne Masheya. Ku diboku diende dia bakaji kuvua Pedaya, Mishayele, Malkiya, Ashume, Ashebadana, Zekarya ne Meshulame." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra uvua muimane kulu pa mabaya awu, mushindu uvua bantu bonsu mua kumumona. Ubutula amu mukanda, bantu bonsu kujuka kulu." 
Nehemiah8:5 Ezra uvua muimane kulu pa mabaya awu, mushindu uvua bantu bonsu mua kumumona. Ubutula amu mukanda, bantu bonsu kujuka kulu." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra kuela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu munene, tuasakidila. Bantu bonsu kuela bianza mulu, kuitaba ne: “Amene! Amene!” Pashishe kuinyikabu mitu panshi bua kukukuila Maweja-Nangila." 
Nehemiah8:6 Ezra kuela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu munene, tuasakidila. Bantu bonsu kuela bianza mulu, kuitaba ne: “Amene! Amene!” Pashishe kuinyikabu mitu panshi bua kukukuila Maweja-Nangila." 
Nehemiah8:7 Kubandulukabu, bualu bavua batuadija kubalongesha kudi bena Levi aba: Yeshuwa, Bani, Sherebiya, Yamine, Akube, Shabetayi, Odya, Masheya, Kelita, Azariya, Yozabade, Anane ne Palaya." 
Nehemiah8:8 Bavua babala bashindumuna mukanda wa mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bumvuija mikenji, bayijingulula bua muntu yonsu umvue tshiyuabu babale." 
Nehemiah8:9 Bantu bonsu kudila muadi pa kumvua mikenji eyi. Nanku Nehemya mulombodi wa buloba abu, Ezra, mutuangaji mumanyi mupiluke wa mikenji, ne bena Levi bavua bumvuija mikenji, bavua babambila ne: — Lelu ndituku dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuena mua kubungama, nansha kudila to." 
Nehemiah8:9 Bantu bonsu kudila muadi pa kumvua mikenji eyi. Nanku Nehemya mulombodi wa buloba abu, Ezra, mutuangaji mumanyi mupiluke wa mikenji, ne bena Levi bavua bumvuija mikenji, bavua babambila ne: — Lelu ndituku dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuena mua kubungama, nansha kudila to." 
Nehemiah8:10 Ezra kubambila ne: — Pinganayi kuenu. Nudie bimpe, nunue bintu bisheme. Nuabanyangane ne badi kabayi ne tshintu, bualu lelu ndituku dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila wetu. Kanubungami, bualu disanka didi difuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu nedinupe bukole." 
Nehemiah8:10 Ezra kubambila ne: — Pinganayi kuenu. Nudie bimpe, nunue bintu bisheme. Nuabanyangane ne badi kabayi ne tshintu, bualu lelu ndituku dia tshijila dia Maweja-Nangila wetu. Kanubungami, bualu disanka didi difuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu nedinupe bukole." 
Nehemiah8:11 Nanku, bena Levi kutuyisha bantu bonsu, bamba ne: — Shalayi talalaa! Lelu ndituku dia tshijila dia Mvidi Mukulu. Kanubungami to!" 
Nehemiah8:12 Pashishe, bantu bonsu kupingana kuabu bua kudia ne bua kunua. Bavua babanyangana ne bavua kabayi ne tshia kudia, basanka bikole. Bualu bavua bumvua bimpe malu onsu avuabu babambile."
