Nehemiah8:13 Butshia, bamfumu ba meku onsu a bena Izrayele, batuangaji ne bena Levi, kudisangisha, bua Ezra, mumanyi mupiluke, abumvuije bimpe mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah8:13 Butshia, bamfumu ba meku onsu a bena Izrayele, batuangaji ne bena Levi, kudisangisha, bua Ezra, mumanyi mupiluke, abumvuije bimpe mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah8:14 Mu mukanda wa mikenji ivua Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe Moshe, bavua basangana muaba uvuabu bafunde ne: bena Izrayele balale mu tuzubu tua Bisasa padibu benza “Tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa” mu ngondu wa muanda mutekete." 
Nehemiah8:15 Bavua bamanyisha bualu bua tshibilu etshi mu bimenga bionsu too ne mu Yerushalayime. Bavua balomba bua bantu bonsu baye ku mikuna, bambule kabidi matamba a mitshi ya olive ya ku nzubu yabu, nansha ya mu tshisuku, nansha malala a mabue. Bambule kabidi matamba a mitshi mikuabu ya mabeji a bungi, bua bamone mua kuasa tuzubu tua bisasa." 
Nehemiah8:16 Nanku, bena Izrayele kuya kukeba matamba a mitshi bua kuasa tuzubu tua bisasa. Bakuabu bavua basa tuzubu atu pa misonga ya nzubu yabu, banga kutuasabu mu mpangu ya nzubu yabu, bakuabu kutuasa mu mbanza ya nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Banga kutuasabu muaba uvua tshiibi tshia Mayi, nansha muaba uvua tshiibi tshia Efrayime." 
Nehemiah8:17 Bantu bonsu bavua bafume ku bupika, kuasabu tuzubu tua bisasa, kusombamu. Matuku awu awa a disanka dinene. Bualu bena Izrayele kabawa banji kuenza kabidi tshibilu atshi, bituadije ku tshikondu tshia Yeshuwa, muana wa Nune." 
Nehemiah8:18 Dituku dionsu dia tshibilu, biangatshile dituku dia kumpala too ne dia ndekelu, bavua babala bualu mu mukanda wa mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu. Tshibilu tshivua tshinenga matuku muanda mutekete. Nanku dituku dia muanda mutekete adi divua dia tshisangilu tshinene, bu muvua mikenji mibafundile." 
Nehemiah9:1 Bena Izrayele kudisangisha mu matuku makumi abidi ne anayi a ngondu awu bua kujila biakudia. Bavua bavuale bilamba bikayapale, badilaba malaba mu mitu." 
Nehemiah9:2 Bavua balamuka kudi bantu bavua kabayi bena Izrayele, batonda mibi yabu ne ya bankambua babu kabidi." 
Nehemiah9:3 Pashishe, kuimanabu kulu meba asatu, bateleja dibala dia mukanda wa mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Pashishe kuinyikabu mpala panshi meba asatu makuabu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, bua kulomba luse." 
Nehemiah9:4 Pa tshibumba tshivuabu balongoluela bena Levi, kubandulukabu kudi Yeshuwa, Bani, Kadmiyele, Shebanya, Buni, Sherebiya, Bani ne Kenani, bela mbila mikole, balomba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Nehemiah9:5 Pashishe, bena Levi aba: Yeshuwa, Kadmiyele, Bani, Ashabneya, Sherebiya, Odya, Shebanya ne Petakiya, ba-vua bela mbila mikole ne: — Jukayi kulu! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Numutumbishe matuku onsu! “Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu batumbishe dina diebe dia lumu. Miaku itudi mua kuamba bua kukutumbisha nayi idi amu mikese." 
Nehemiah9:6 Wewe nkayebe ke udi Maweja-Nangila! Udi mufuke diulu dialabale, ne mitotu yonsu! Udi mufuki wa buloba ne bionsu bidipu, wa mayi manene ne bionsu bidi binyungamu. Udi upesha tshifukibua tshionsu muoyi. Makole onsu a mu diulu adi akukukuila." 
Nehemiah9:7 Amu wewe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke udi musungule Abrame. Wewe kumumusha mu Ure ku Babilone. Wewe kumuinyika ne: Abrahame. 
Nehemiah9:8 Wewe kujadika muvuaye mukuitabe ne muoyi umue. Nanku wewe kutua nende ndondu: kumulaya bua kumupesha ditunga dia bena Kenaane, bena Iti, bena Amore, bena Perizi, bena Yebusa ne bena Ngirgashi, bua ndelanganyi yende isombemu. Wewe kukumbaja biuvua muambe, bualu wewe udi wa diyi dimue." 
Nehemiah9:9 Wewe kutangila bankambua betu, kumona muvuabu babakengesha mu Ejipitu. Wewe kumvua muvuabu bela mbila ku muelelu wa Mayi manene makunze, bakusengelela bua ubambuluishe." 
Nehemiah9:10 Uvua muenze malu a kukema, bua kunyoka mukalenga wa mu Ejipitu, nebalombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, ne bantu bonsu ba mu ditunga diende. Bualu uvua mumanye muvua bena Ejipitu bakengesha bankambua betu. Ke muuvua mupete lumu lunene. Utshidi nalu ne lelu." 
Nehemiah9:11 Uvua nuukosolole mayi manene, bena Izrayele batangile. Bobu kusabuka ku makasa kuume. Kadi bonsu bavua babalonda, Wewe kubela mu mayi. Bobu kudinabu bu dibue diela mu mayi mondoke." 
Nehemiah9:12 Uvua mulombole bantu bebe, mu munya ne divuba dia muinshi, butuku ne dikunji dia kapia, divua ditokesha njila yabu." 
Nehemiah9:13 Wewe kupueka mu diulu, kubambila malu ku mukuna wa Sinayi. Wewe kubamanyisha mikenji milenga, kubalongesha malu malelela, kubelela meyi ne mikandu bidi bilengelela bantu." 
Nehemiah9:14 Wewe kubaleja mudi dituku dia Dikisha dikale dituku diebe wewe, dituku dia tshijila. Wewe kubamanyisha mikenji yebe mikuabu, mukana mua Moshe, muntu webe." 
Nehemiah9:15 Pavuabu ne nzala, Wewe kubapesha biakudia bia mu diulu. Pavuabu ne nyota, wewe kubapesha mayi a mu lubuebue. Wewe kubatuma bua baye kukuata ditunga, diuvua mubalaye, mutshidipe." 
Nehemiah9:16 Kadi bankambua betu bavua bantomboji. Bavua baditambisha bikole, babenga kuitaba mikenji yebe." 
Nehemiah9:17 Bavua babenga kuyitumikila. Kabavua bavuluke malu a dikema, auvua mubenzele. Kukutombokelabu. Bavua basue kupingana mu Ejipitu mu bupika. Kadi wewe, udi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubuikila bubi bua bantu, udi ne luse ne dinanga, lutulu ne muoyi mulenga. Nanku, kuena mubalengulule to." 
Nehemiah9:18 Bavua badienzele kana ka ngombe ka tshiamu tshiengulula, bakamba ne: ‘Wewe ke mvidie wetu, udi mutupatule mu Ejipitu! ’ Bushuwa, bavua bakusendeka bibi!" 
Nehemiah9:19 Kadi nansha diba adi, bu mudi dinanga diebe kadiyi ndekelu, kuena mubalekele nkayabu mu tshipela. Kuvua mumushe divuba dia muinshi, divua dibaleja njila mu munya; nansha dikunji dia kapia, divua dibaleja njila butuku." 
Nehemiah9:20 Wewe kubapesha Mueyelu webe, bua bapete meji mempe. Wewe kubapesha kabidi biakudia ne mayi, bua kutuyisha nzala ne nyota yabu." 
Nehemiah9:21 Wewe kubalama bimpe mu tshipela, bidimu makumi anayi, kabayi babula tshintu. Bilamba biabu kabivua bisunsuke, makasa abu kaavua muwule ne luendu to." 
Nehemiah9:22 Wewe, udi mubape bumfumu, bua matunga ne bua makalenga. Kuangatabu matunga avua mutumba nabu, ditunga dia Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, ne ditunga dia Sihone, mukalenga wa Eshebone." 
Nehemiah9:23 Ndelanganyi yabu ivua ya bungi, mipite mitotu ya mu diulu. Udi mubafile bua bakuate ditunga dia Kenaane, diuvua mulaye bankambua babu." 
Nehemiah9:24 Bantu bebe kubuela mu ditunga edi, kudikuata. Wewe kutekesha bena Kenaane, bua bashale ku bumfumu buabu. Bantu bebe kuenza bu mudibu basue, ne bakalenga ne bisamba bivua muaba awu." 
Nehemiah9:25 Bavua bakuate bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, bakuate madimi mimpe, nzubu miuwule tente ne biuma, bina bia mayi bimana kumbula, madimi a mionji ya mvinyo, ne mitshi ya olive, kabidi ne mitshi mikuabu ya bimuma mipite bungi. Nanku, bu muudi ne muoyi mulenga, bena Izrayele kudia kuukuta, kudiunda, kusanka bua bionsu biuvua mubapeshe." 
Nehemiah9:26 Kadi bavua ne tshishiku. Nanku bobu kukutombokela, kubenga diyi diebe, kushipa bambi bebe, bavua bababela bua bapingane kuudi. Ke muvuabu bakuenzela bibi, bakupenda misangu ne misangu." 
Nehemiah9:27 Nanku, wewe kubafila mu bianza bia baluishi babu, bavua babakengesha bikole. Kadi pavuabu mu dikenga dinene, bobu kukubikila. Wewe mu diulu, kubateleja. Bu mudi dinanga diebe kadiyi ndekelu, Wewe kutuma bilobu, bua kubasungidila kudi baluishi babu." 
Nehemiah9:28 Kadi bobu bamane kupatuka mu dikenga, ke kupinganabu ku malu mabi. Nanku, wewe kubalekela tshiakabidi mu bianza bia baluishi. Ke bobu kukubikila, wewe kubateleja mu diulu, kubasungidila misangu ne misangu, bu mudi dinanga diebe kadiyi ndekelu." 
Nehemiah9:29 Pashishe, wewe kubabela bua bapingane kuudi. Kabavua bitabe mikenji yebe. Kadi bavua buwule ne ditambisha, babenga mikenji yebe ne meyi ebe. Badi batumikila meyi ebe ke badi bapeta muoyi. Kadi bobu kukutombokela, kubenga kukuteleja." 
Nehemiah9:30 Bidimu bia bungi, wewe kubafuila luse. Bambi bebe kupeta Mueyelu webe, kubela bantu bebe, kadi nanshabu kubateleja. Ke wewe kubafila mu bianza bia bantu benyi." 
Nehemiah9:31 Kadi bu mudi dinanga diebe kadiyi ndekelu, wewe kuena mubabutule to. Kuena mubalekele, bualu udi Mvidi Mukulu wa luse ne dinanga." 
Nehemiah9:32 Wewe, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi munene, wa bukole buonsu ne wa kutshina. Udi ulama bimpe ndondu iuvua mutue netu. Vuluka dikenga divua dikuate bantu bebe, dikuate bakalenga betu, ne bamfumu betu, batuangaji betu, ne bambi betu, bankambua betu, ne tuetu mene, biangatshile tshikondu tshia bakalenga ba bena Ashure, too ne mpindiewu." 
Nehemiah9:33 Mu malu onsu adi matukuate, wewe udi wenza amu biakane. Nansha tuetu bakubenge, wewe uvua anu utukeba, utunanga." 
Nehemiah9:34 Kadi bakalenga betu, ne bamfumu betu, batuangaji betu, ne bankambua betu, kabena banemeka mikenji yebe. Bavua babenge meyi ebe, too ne mibelu iuvua ubabela nayi." 
Nehemiah9:35 Ku luse luebe, bavua ne bintu bivule mu ditunga diabu, bavua badishikamine mu makalenga abu, bavua basombe mu ditunga dimpe dialabale. Kadi kabavua basue kukuenzela mudimu, kabavua balekele malu abu mabi." 
Nehemiah9:36 Mpindiewu tudi mu bupika! Tudi bapika mu ditunga dia bankambua betu, divuabu bapete kuudi, didi ne biakudia bia bungi." 
Nehemiah9:37 Ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, kadi bidi bisankisha nangananga bakalenga, bavua batubueje mu bupika bua bubi buetu. Badi benza netu, kabidi ne biuma bietu, amu bu mudibu basue. Bushuwa, tudi mu dikenga dinene!”" 
Nehemiah10:1 Bua malu onsu avua matuenzeke, tuetu bena Izrayele, tuetu kumyuangana kushindika bualu, kubufunda mu mukanda. Bamfumu, bena Levi, ne batuangaji betu, kufunda mena abu mu mukanda awu, kutua tshitampi." 
Nehemiah10:2 Bavua bafunde mena abu mbobu aba: — Nehemya, muana wa Akalya, mulo mbodi wa ditunga. — Batuangaji bavua: Sedekiya," 
Nehemiah10:3 Seraya, Azariya, Yirmeya," 
Nehemiah10:4 Pashekure, Amanya, Malkiya," 
Nehemiah10:5 Atushe, Shebanya, Maluke," 
Nehemiah10:6 Arime, Meremote, Obadya," 
Nehemiah10:7 Daniyele, Nginetone, Baruke," 
Nehemiah10:8 Meshulame, Abiya, Miyamine," 
Nehemiah10:9 Mazya, Bilgayi ne Shemaya." 
Nehemiah10:10 Bena levi bavua: Yeshuwa, muana wa Azanya, Binuyi, wa mu tshiota tshia Enadade, Kadmiyele ne bana babu aba: Shebanya, Odya, Kelita, Pelaya, Anane, Mika, Rekobe, Ashabiya, Zakume, Sherebiya, Shebaniya, Odya, Bani ne Beninu." 
Nehemiah10:11 Bamfumu balombodi ba bantu bavua: Paroshe, Pakate-Mowabe, Elame, Zatu, Bani, Buni, Azgade, Bebayi, Adoniya, Bigvayi, Adine, Atere, Izkiya, Azure, Odya, Ashume, Beshayi, Arife, Anatote, Nebayi, Magpiyashe, Meshulame, Ezire, Meshezabele, Sadoke, Yaduwa, Pelatiya, Anane, Ananiya, Osheya, Ananiya, Ashube, Alokesha, Pila, Shobeke, Rekume, Ashabna, Masheya, Akiya, Anane, Anane, Maluke, Arime ne Baana." 
Nehemiah10:12 Nanku, bantu bonsu kudisangisha nabu ku malaya abu awu. Bantu abu bavua: batuangaji, bena Levi, balami ba biibi, bimbi ba misambu, bena midimu mishilangane ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne tuetu, bakaji betu, bana betu ba balume ne ba bakaji bakavua bakole, bakavua bumvua bivua bienzeka ebi. Tuetu bonsu katuvua babuelakane ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bashala mu ditunga, kadi tuvua batumikile mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah10:13 Nanku tuetu ne bana betu bakuabu, bakulu betu, tuetu kuditshipa bua kutumikila mikenji ivua Mvidi Mukulu muambile Moshe muntu wende, ne bua kukumbaja majinga a Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kulama mikenji yonsu, ne kulonda mibelu yende." 
Nehemiah10:14 Nanku, katuena basue kuselesha bana betu ba bakaji kudi bantu bavua bashale mu buloba buetu, patuvua mu bupika. Kabidi bana betu ba balume kabena mua kusela bakaji ba bantu aba to." 
Nehemiah10:15 Dituku dia Dikisha, nansha dia tshibilu, pikala bantu aba basue kusumbisha ntete ya kuenza bukula, nansha bintu biabu bia mu madimi, katuena tubisumba to. Pashishe, netulekele kudima tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, netulekelangane kabidi mabanza." 
Nehemiah10:16 Tuetu kumyuangana bua kufila ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, kakanu ka tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ka bujitu bua grame inayi, bua midimu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Nehemiah10:17 Tudi tuenza nanku, bua tumone mua kupeta mampa a kulambula Mvidi Mukulu, nyama ya milambu ya kuosha, bia mu madimi bia kulambula dituku dionsu, milambu ya kulambula dituku dia Dikisha, dia ngondu mupiamupia, nansha matuku makuabu a tshibilu, milambu mikuabu ya kukobolola, idi bena Izrayele balambula Mvidi Mukulu. Ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole atshi, netufute kabidi bonsu badi balongolola nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Nehemiah10:18 Nanku, tuetu batuangaji, bena Levi, bantu bakuabu, tuvua batshinke, babanyangane mu meku etu, mudimu wa kufila, munkatshi mua tshidimu, nkunyi bua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Bualu mukenji udi wamba ne: ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, nufile nkunyi mikumbane bua kuosha milambu pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Nehemiah10:19 Tshidimu tshionsu netufile kabidi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bintu bia kumpala bia mu madimi, too ne bimuma bia mitshi yetu." 
Nehemiah10:20 Netulambule kabidi banabute betu, ne banabute ba bimuna bietu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ke mudi mukenji wamba. Banabute ba nyama ya ngombe, ya mikoku, ne bana ba mbuji yetu, netubifile mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, tubipesha batuangaji badi benza mudimu mu nzubu amu." 
Nehemiah10:21 Nebipeshe kabidi batuangaji bukula buimpe, milambu ya bimuma, ya mvinyo mipiamipia ne ya mafuta. Nebiteke bionsu abi mu bibambalu bidi ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi bena Levi, nebapete tshia dikumi tshimue tshia bintu bia mu madimi etu, Bobu nkayabu nebaye kudiangatshila tshia dikumi atshi mu misoku yetu, miaba idi madimi ebi." 
Nehemiah10:22 Nanku mutuangaji wa ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, neaye ne bena Levi, bua kuangata tshia dikumi atshi. Bena Levi nebafike ne tshia dikumi atshi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu bibambalu mudibu bateka bintu bia mushinga." 
Nehemiah10:23 Bena Izrayele ne bena Levi nebaye ne milambu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, ya maluvu a mvinyo mapiamapia, ne ya mafuta, mu bibambalu abi, mudi kabidi bintu bia kuenza nabi mudimu muaba wa tshijila. Ke muaba udi kabidi batuangaji, balami ba ku biibi, ne bena misambu basombe, diba didibu bindila mudimu wa kuenza. Ke mutudi mua kuvuluka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah11:1 Bamfumu ba bantu kuyabu kusomba mu Yerushalayime. Kadi, ku bantu bakuabu bavua bashale, kusungulabu muntu umue pa dikumi, bua asombe mu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshia tshijila. Bantu bakuabu tshitema pa dikumi kuyabu kusomba mu misoku ne mu bimenga bia mu ditunga." 
Nehemiah11:2 Bena Yuda bavua basankidila bikole, bela ka lumbandi, bantu bavua badianza kuitaba ku budisuile buabu, bua kuya kusomba mu Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah11:3 Bamfumu ba buloba bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime. Kadi bena Izrayele bakuabu: batuangaji, bena Levi, bena midimu mikuabu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, too ne bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya bena mudimu ba Shelomu, bavua basombe mu misoku yabu, muntu muende, muntu muende." 
Nehemiah11:4 Kadi bamue bena tshisamba tshia Yuda, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine, bavua baye kusomba mu Yerushalayime. Bena tshisamba tshia bena Yuda bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime bavua: Ataya, wa mu tshiota tshia Perese, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Malaleyele. Ataya uvua muana wa Uziya, Uziya uvua muana wa Zekarya, Zekarya uvua muana wa Amariya, Amanya uvua muana wa Shefatya." 
Nehemiah11:5 Kuvua kabidi Masheya, muana wa Baruke, ne muikulu wa Koloze. Bankambua bende bavua: Azaya, Adaya, Yoyaribe, Zekarya, ne Shiloni." 
Nehemiah11:6 Bantu bonsu ba bukitu ba mu tshiota tshia Perese bavua baye kusomba mu Yerushalayime bavua 468. 
Nehemiah11:7 Bena tshisamba tshia Binyamine bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime bavua: Salu, muana wa Meshulame. Meshulame uvua muana wa Yowede, Yowede uvua muana wa Pedaya, Pedaya uvua muana wa Kolaya, Kolaya uvua muana wa Masheya, Masheya uvua muana wa Iti yele, Iti yele uvua muana wa Yeshaya," 
Nehemiah11:8 Muvua kabidi Ngabayi ne Salayi. Bonsu basanga bavua 928. 
Nehemiah11:9 Yowele, muana wa Zikri, uvua mulombodi wa tshisumbu atshi. Yekuda, muana wa Ashenuwa, uvua tshindonda tshia mulombodi wa tshimenga." 
Nehemiah11:10 Batuangaji bavua:, Yedaya, muana wa Yoyaribe, Yakine," 
Nehemiah11:11 Seraya, muana wa Ilkiya, Ilkiya uvua muana wa Meshulame, Meshulame uvua muana wa Sadoke, Sadoke uvua muana wa Merayote, Merayote uvua muana wa Akitube, mutuangaji munene." 
Nehemiah11:12 Muvua kabidi bantu 822 ba mu tshiota tshiabu bavua benza mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Muvua kabidi Adaya, muana wa Yerowame, Yerowame uvua muana wa Pelaliya, Pelaliya uvua muana wa Amsi, Amsi uvua muana wa Zekarya, Zekarya uvua muana wa Pashekure, Pashekure uvua muana wa Malkiya." 
Nehemiah11:13 Muvua kabidi bantu 242 bamfumu ba meku ba mu tshiota tshiabu. Muvua kabidi Amashesayi, uvua muana wa Azarele, Azarele uvua muana wa Azayi, Azayi uvua muana wa Meshilemote, Meshilemote uvua muana wa Imere." 
Nehemiah11:14 Muvua kabidi ne bena mvita 128 ba bukitu ba mu tshiota tshiende. Zabdyele, muana wa Agedolime, ke uvua ulombola bena mvita abu." 
Nehemiah11:15 Bena Levi bavua: Shemaya, muana wa Ashube, Ashube uvua muana wa Azrikame, Azrikame uvua muana wa Ashabiya, Ashabiya uvua muana wa Bunyi." 
Nehemiah11:16 Muvua kabidi Shabetayi ne Yozabade, bamfumu ba bena Levi, bavua ne midimu ya ku lupangu lua pambelu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah11:17 Muvua kabidi: Mataniya, muana wa Mika, Mika uvua muana awa Zabdi, Zabdi uvua muana wa Ashafe. Mataniya ke uvua utuma misambu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu diba dia kutendelela. Muanabu Bakbukiya ke uvua tshindonda tshiende. Abda uvua muana wa Shamuwa, Shamuwa uvua muana wa Ngalate, Ngalate uvua muana wa Yedutune." 
Nehemiah11:18 Nanku, bena Levi bavua basombe mu tshimenga tshia tshijila bavua 284." 
Nehemiah11:19 Balami ba biibi bavua 172: ke Akube, Talmone, ne bantu ba mu tshiota tshiabu." 
Nehemiah11:20 Kadi bena Izrayele bakuabu, nansha batuangaji ne bena Levi, bavua basombe mu misoku mikuabu ne mu bimenga bia mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, muntu muende muntu muende." 
Nehemiah11:21 Bena midimu mikuabu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bavua basombe mu tshitupa tshia Yerushalayime tshiyuabu binyike ne: Ofele. Bavua ku bumfumu bua Sika ne Ngishepa. 
Nehemiah11:22 Uzi uvua mulombodi wa bena Levi bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime. Uvua muana wa Bani, Bani uvua muana wa Ashabiya, Ashabiya uvua muana wa Matatiya, Matatiya uvua muana wa Mika, wa mu tshiota tshia Ashafe tshivua ne mudimu wa misambu ne biombelu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah11:23 Bena misambu bavua balonda mikenji ya mukalenga, ivua ibafundila mudimu wa kuenza ku dituku ne ku dituku." 
Nehemiah11:24 Petakiya, muana wa Meshezabele, wa mu tshiota tshia Zera, muana wa Yuda, uvua musombe mu lubanza lua mukalenga munene wa bena Persa bua kuakuila bena Izrayele." 
Nehemiah11:25 Meku makuabu a tshisamba tshia bena Yuda avua masombe mu misoku ya ku mpenga: ke mu Kiriyate-Arba, ne mu misoku idi mutumba; mu Dibone ne misoku idi mutumba; mu Yekabseyele ne misoku idi mutumba;" 
Nehemiah11:26 mu Yeshuwa, Molada, Bete-Pelete," 
Nehemiah11:27 Ashare-Shuwale, Bersheba ne misoku idi mutumba;" 
Nehemiah11:28 mu Siklaje, Mekona ne misoku idi mutumba;" 
Nehemiah11:29 mu Ene-Rimone, Sora, Yarmute," 
Nehemiah11:30 Zanowa, Adulame ne misoku idi mutumba; mu Lakishe ne misoku idi mutumba. Nanku bavua basombe pankatshi pa Bersheba, musoku uvua kuinshi mu ditunga, ne tshibanda tshia Inome tshia ku mutu mu ditunga." 
Nehemiah11:31 Pashishe, bena meku a tshisamba tshia Binyamine bavua basombe mu: Ngeba, Mikmase, Aya, Betele ne mu misoku ivua mutumba;" 
Nehemiah11:32 mu Anatote, Nobe, Ananiya," 
Nehemiah11:33 Ashore, Rama, Ngitayime," 
Nehemiah11:34 Adide, Seboyime, Nebalale," 
Nehemiah11:35 Lode, Onone, ne mu tshibanda tshia Bena midimu ya bianza." 
Nehemiah11:36 Bena Levi bakuabu kumuangata mu bena Yuda, kuya kusomba mu bena Binyamine." 
Nehemiah12:1 Ke mena a batuangaji ne a bena Levi bavua bafume mu bupika pamue ne Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, kabidi pamue ne Yeshuwa: Zeraya, Irmeya, Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:1 Ke mena a batuangaji ne a bena Levi bavua bafume mu bupika pamue ne Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, kabidi pamue ne Yeshuwa: Zeraya, Irmeya, Ezra," 
Nehemiah12:2 Amariya, Maluke, Atushe," 
Nehemiah12:3 Shekanya, Rekume, Meremote," 
Nehemiah12:4 Ido, Nginetoyi, Abiya," 
Nehemiah12:5 Miyamine, Madiya, Bilga," 
Nehemiah12:6 Shemaya, Yoyaribe, Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:7 Salu, Amoke, Ilkiya ne Yedaya. Mu tshikondu tshia Yeshuwa, bonsu aba bavua bamfumu ba meku a batuangaji nansha a bena Levi." 
Nehemiah12:8 Bena Levi bavua: Yeshuwa, Binuyi, Kadmiyele, Sherebiya, Yekuda ne Mataniya. Mataniya ne bena diku diende ke bavua batuma misambu ya kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah12:9 Bena Levi bakuabu, Bakbukiya ne Uni, bavua bimane batangilangane nabu, bapunguluja misambu." 
Nehemiah12:10 Yeshuwa uvua tatuende wa Yoyakime. Yoyakime kulela Eliyashibe, Eliyashibe kulela Yoyada," 
Nehemiah12:11 Yoyada kulela Yonatane, Yonatane kulela Yaduwa." 
Nehemiah12:12 Pavua Yoyakime muikale mutuangaji munene, bamfumu ba meku a batuangaji bavua: Meraya uvua ulombola diku dia Seraya, Ananiya uvua ulombola diku dia Irmeya," 
Nehemiah12:13 Meshulame uvua ulombola diku dia Ezra, Yowanane uvua ulombola diku dia Amariya," 
Nehemiah12:13 Meshulame uvua ulombola diku dia Ezra, Yowanane uvua ulombola diku dia Amariya," 
Nehemiah12:14 Yonatane uvua ulombola diku dia Meliku, Yozefe uvua ulombola diku dia Shebanya," 
Nehemiah12:15 Adna uvua ulombola diku dia Arime, Elkayi uvua ulombola diku dia Merayote," 
Nehemiah12:16 Zekarya uvua ulombola diku dia Ido, Meshulame uvua ulombola diku dia Nginetone," 
Nehemiah12:17 Zikri uvua ulombola diku dia Abiya,… uvua ulombola diku dia Miniyamine, Piltayi uvua ulombola diku dia Mowadiya," 
Nehemiah12:18 Shamuwa uvua ulombola diku dia Bilga, Yonatane uvua ulombola diku dia Shemaya," 
Nehemiah12:19 Matenayi uvua ulombola diku dia Yoyaribe, Uzi uvua ulombola diku dia Yedaya," 
Nehemiah12:20 Kalayi uvua ulombola diku dia Salayi, Ebere uvua ulombola diku dia Amoke," 
Nehemiah12:21 Ashabiya uvua ulombola diku dia Ilkiya, ne Netaneyele uvua ulombola diku dia Yedaya." 
Nehemiah12:22 Mu tshikondu tshivua Eliyashibe, Yoyada, Yowanane, ne Yaduwa balondangane mu mudimu wa batuangaji banene, bavua bafunde mu mukanda mena a bena Levi ne a batuangaji bavua balombodi ba meku. Bavua balekela mudimu awu mu tshikondu tshia Daryaveshe mukalenga wa bakalenga wa bena Persa." 
Nehemiah12:23 Mena a bamfumu ba meku a bena Levi bavua baafunda kabidi mu mukanda uvua ulondolola malu manene a bankambua too ne ku tshikondu tshia Yowanane, muikulu wa Eliyashibe." 
Nehemiah12:24 Bamfumu bonsu ba bena Levi: Ashabiya, Sherebiya ne Yeshuwa, muana wa Kadmiyele, bavua bimane ne bana babu mu bisumbu bibidi batangilangane, batumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, bamuele tuasakidila, bilondeshile mikenji ya Davide muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah12:25 Balami ba ku biibi, Mataniya, Bakbukiya, Obadya, Meshulame, Talmone ne Akube bavua ne mudimu wa kulama bibutshilu bivua pabuipi ne biibi bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah12:26 Bavua bakumbaja mudimu ewu mu tshikondu tshia Yoyakime, muana wa Yeshuwa, ne muikulu wa Yoshadake, ne mu tshikondu tshia Nehemya, mulombodi wa buloba, ne mu tshikondu tshia Ezra, mutuangaji mulongeshi wa mikenji." 
Nehemiah12:26 Bavua bakumbaja mudimu ewu mu tshikondu tshia Yoyakime, muana wa Yeshuwa, ne muikulu wa Yoshadake, ne mu tshikondu tshia Nehemya, mulombodi wa buloba, ne mu tshikondu tshia Ezra, mutuangaji mulongeshi wa mikenji." 
Nehemiah12:27 Bantu bamane kuibakulula tshimana tshia Yerushalayime, kubikilabu bena Levi ba mu ditunga dijima bua kuenzabu tshibilu tshia kujidila tshimana. Bavua bimba misambu ilonda muadi wa ndibu, wa nzenza ne nkombe." 
Nehemiah12:28 Bena misambu aba bavua bafume ku misoku ivuabu base pa mpenga pa Yerushalayime, ne ya pabuipi ne Netofa. Bavua bafume kabidi mu buloba bua Bete-Ngilgale, Ngeba ne Azmavete." 
Nehemiah12:29  
Nehemiah12:30 Batuangaji ne bena Levi kumusha mikiya ivuabu nayi. Kuambilabu kabidi bantu bonsu bua kumushabu mikiya. Pashishe kumushabu mikiya ya ku bimana bia tshimenga ne ya ku biibi. 
Nehemiah12:31 Meme Nehemya kulomba bamfumu ba bena Yuda bua babande pa tshimana tshia tshimenga. Meme kutapulula bena misambu mu bisumbu bibidi binene. Tshisumbu tshia kumpala tshivua tshiya ku dia balume, tshisemena pa tshimana, tshitangila ku tshiibi tshia Dyala." 
Nehemiah12:32 Oshaya ne tshia bibidi tshimue tshia bamfumu ba bena Yuda bavua benda balonda bena misambu. 
Nehemiah12:33 Bavua babalonda kabidi kudi Azariya, Ezra, Meshulame," 
Nehemiah12:33 Bavua babalonda kabidi kudi Azariya, Ezra, Meshulame," 
Nehemiah12:34 Yekuda, Binyamine, Shemaya ne Irmeya." 
Nehemiah12:35 Pashishe, bavua balonda kudi batuangaji bavua bambule mpungi. Kubalondabu kudi Zekarya, muana wa Yonatane, Yonatane uvua muana wa Shemaya, Shemaya uvua muana wa Mataniya, Mataniya uvua muana wa Mikaya, Mikaya uvua muana wa Zakure, Zakure uvua muana wa Ashafe." 
Nehemiah12:36 Zekarya uvua ne bana babu: Shemaya, Azarele, Milalayi, Ngilalayi, Mayi, Netaneyele, Yekuda ne Anani. Bavua ne biombelu bivua Davide muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu muenzeje. Nanku, Ezra mulongeshi wa mikenji, uvua mulombodi wa tshisumbu atshi." 
Nehemiah12:36 Zekarya uvua ne bana babu: Shemaya, Azarele, Milalayi, Ngilalayi, Mayi, Netaneyele, Yekuda ne Anani. Bavua ne biombelu bivua Davide muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu muenzeje. Nanku, Ezra mulongeshi wa mikenji, uvua mulombodi wa tshisumbu atshi." 
Nehemiah12:37 Bamane kufika ku tshiibi tshia Mpokolu, bavua babanda pa tshibandilu tshivua tshibafila mu Tshimenga tshia Davide, bapita kunyima kua nzubu wa mukalenga Davide, bua kufika ku tshiibi tshia Mayi, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga." 
Nehemiah12:38 Tshisumbu tshibidi tshia bena misambu tshivua tshiya ku dia bakaji. Meme Nehemya, ne bamfumu bakuabu ba bena Yuda, tuvua pa tshimana, tubalonda. Tuetu kupitshila ku kaleya ka Tshioshilu, ne muaba uvua tshimana tshialabale." 
Nehemiah12:39 Tuetu kupitshila pa mutu pa tshiibi tshia Efrayime, ne pa tshiibi tshia Yeshana, ne pa tshiibi tshia Minyinyi ya mu mayi. Tuetu bamane kupita kaleya ka Ananeyele, ne kaleya ka Meya, tuetu kupitshila ku tshiibi tshia Mikoku bua kufika ku tshiibi tshia Balami." 
Nehemiah12:40 Bisumbu bionsu bibidi bia bena misambu, meme Nehemya ne balombodi bavua benda nanyi, tuetu bonsu kuimana ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah12:41 Pashishe, batuangaji aba: Eliyakime, Masheya, Miniyamine, Mikaya, Eliyokenayi, Zekarya, ne Ananiya, bavua bela mpungi." 
Nehemiah12:42 Masheya, Shemaya, Elazare, Uzi, Yowanane, Malkiya, Elame ne Azere bavuaku kabidi. Bena misambu bavua bimba, Izkiya ubalombola." 
Nehemiah12:43 Bavua bafila nyama ya milambu ya bungi dituku adi. Bavua basanka, bualu Mvidi Mukulu uvua musankishe bantu bende bikole. Nansha bakaji ne bana ba mu Yerushalayime bavua basanka bikole, bela mbila ya disanka, ivuabu mua kumvua mutantshi mule." 
Nehemiah12:44 Tshikondu atshi, bavua basungula bantu bua kulama mayeba, miaba ivuabu bateke biakudia bia tshianyi bivua bantu balambule, ne tshia dikumi tshia bintu bia mu madimi. Nanku, bintu bia mu madimi abi, bivua bifume mu madimi avua pabuipi ne bimenga. Bavua babipesha batuangaji ne bena Levi bilondeshile mikenji. Bualu mudimu onsu uvua batuangaji ne bena Levi benza, uvua usankisha bena Yuda bonsu." 
Nehemiah12:45 Bushuwa, batuangaji ne bena Levi bavua benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu pambidi pa bantu ne bintu, bumusha mikiya. Nansha bena misambu ne balami ba ku biibi bavua benza bionsu bilondeshile muvua mikenji ya mukalenga Davide ne ya muanende Shelomu." 
Nehemiah12:46 Biangatshile ku tshikondu tshia Davide ne tshia Ashafe, muimbi wa misambu, balombodi ba bena misambu bavua bimbisha misambu ya kusamuna Mvidi Mukulu, kumutumbisha." 
Nehemiah12:47 Mu matuku a Zerubabele, nansha a Nehemya, bena Izrayele bavua bafila dituku dionsu kudi bimbi ba misambu ne kudi balami ba biibi bintu bivuabu ne bua kufila. Bavua bapesha kabidi bena Levi milambu ya tshijila. Bena Levi pabu bavua bapesha batuangaji ndelanganyi ya Arone, bintu bivuabu ne bua kupeta." 
Nehemiah13:1 Mu tshikondu atshi, bavua babadila bantu bonsu mukanda wa mikenji ya Moshe. Dituku dikuabu kubalabu muaba uvuabu bafunde ne: Bena Amone, kabidi ne bena Mowabe, kabena mua kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bantu badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Nehemiah13:2 Bualu kale bobu kabavua bakidila bena Izrayele, kabavua babapesha biakudia, nansha biakunua to. Kadi bavua bapesha Balaame mabuejila bua kutshipaye bena Izrayele. Anu Mvidi Mukulu wetu kuandamuna mitshipu ayi kuvuayi disanka." 
Nehemiah13:3 Bena Izrayele bumvua anu miaku ya mu dibala adi, kujadikabu bua kumusha munkatshi muabu, muntu yonsu uvuakayi muena Izrayele." 
Nehemiah13:4 Kadi matuku avua kumpala, bavua basungule mutuangaji Eliyashibe, bua akuate mudimu wa kutangila bibambalu bidi bilamika ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bu muvua Tobiya muanabu," 
Nehemiah13:5 mutuangaji Eliyashibe kumulongoluela muaba mu tshibambalu tshinene, tshiyuabu bateka kuonsu eku milambu ya bintu bia mu madimi, musenga wa kamonya, bintu bia kukuata nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bintu bia ku milambu bivua bia batuangaji, ne tshia dikumi tshia ntete ya kuenza bukula, tshia mvinyo mupiamupia, ne tshia mafuta, tshivua bena Levi ne balami ba ku biibi ne bua kupeta." 
Nehemiah13:6 Pavua malu awu menzeke, meme Nehemya tshivua mu Yerushalayime to. Mvua muye mu Babilone mu tshidimu tshia makumi asatu ne tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua mukalenga wa bakalenga Artashasta. Nanku, kunyima kua matuku, mukalenga kumanyisha bua meme" 
Nehemiah13:7 kupingana mu Yerushalayime. Meme kumona bubi buvua mutuangaji Eliyashibe muenze. Bualu uvua mupe Tobiya tshibambalu tshivua tshitangilangane ne mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. 
Nehemiah13:8 Tshiji kunkuata tshikole. Meme kupaluisha bintu bionsu bia Tobiya bivua mu tshibambalu atshi. 
Nehemiah13:9 Pashishe, meme kukombesha bimpe mu bibambalu abi, bua bapingajemu bintu bia kukuata nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bintu bia ku milambu, ne musenga wa kamonya." 
Nehemiah13:10 Meme kumvua kabidi ne: bena Levi kabena bapeta bintu bivua bibafundila. Nanku bakavua bapingana ku madimi abu, balekela kuenza mudimu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bena misambu pabu badi benza amu nanku." 
Nehemiah13:11 Meme kutandisha balombodi ba ditunga pa kumona banyisha bua bantu balekele mudimu wabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Pashishe, meme kubikila bena Levi ne bimbi ba misambu. Meme kubambila bua batuadijilule midimu." 
Nehemiah13:12 Nanku, bena Yuda kufika tshiakabidi ne tshia dikumi tshia ntete ya kuenza bukula, tshia mvinyo mupiamupia, ne tshia mafuta, bua batshiteke mu mayeba avuabu bamane kulongolola." 
Nehemiah13:13 Bua kulama mayeba aa, meme kusungula mutuangaji Shelemiya, Sadoke, mufundi, ne Pedaya, muana wa Levi. Bavua babambuluisha kudi Anane, muana wa Zakure, ne muikulu wa Mataniya. Bonsu abu bavua bamueneka bantu ba diyi dimue. Bavua ne mudimu wa kuabanyina bana babu bintu bia ku milambu." 
Nehemiah13:14 “Eyi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, uvuluke bionsu bindi muenze! Kupu muoyi malu onsu andi meme muenze ne muoyi umue, bua nzubu webe ne bua kulongolola ditendelela.”" 
Nehemiah13:15 Matuku awu, meme kumona mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, bakama tumuma tua mvinyo dituku dia Dikisha. Bakuabu bavua bame pa nyama ya mpunde ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, tumuma tua mvinyo, tumuma tua mfiku, ne bintu bikuabu, bua kuya nabi mu Yerushalayime. Meme kubabela, dituku divuabu bapana bintu biabu." 
Nehemiah13:16 Kabidi bena Tire bavua basombe mu Yerushalayime, bavua bafike ne minyinyi ya mu mayi, ne biakudia bikuabu, bua kubisumbisha bena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda dituku dia Dikisha." 
Nehemiah13:17 Meme kutandisha balombodi ba bena Yuda. Meme kubakonka ne: — Nudi bamanye bibi binudi nuenza anyi? Nudi nunyanga dituku dia Dikisha bua tshinyi? 
Nehemiah13:18 Bankambua benu bavua benza bibi nenku. Ke pavua Mvidi Mukulu mutukengeshe tuetu ne tshimenga tshietu. Kadi nuenu panudi nunyanga dituku dia Dikisha, nudi nukebela bena Izrayele tshiji kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Nehemiah13:19 Nanku, kutuadija ku musangu ewu, meme kutuma diyi bua binjile biibi bia Yerushalayime padi butuku buila, Dikisha kadiyi dianji kutuadija. Bavua mua kubiunzulula amu pavua Dikisha dijika. Meme kuteka bena mudimu banyi bakuabu ku biibi, bua kukandika bantu kababuedi mu tshimenga ne bintu bia kupana dituku dia Dikisha." 
Nehemiah13:20 Kadi bangenda mushinga ba bintu bishilangane bavua balala misangu mikuabu pa mbelu, pabuipi ne bimana bia Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah13:21 Meme kubatandisha, kubambila ne: — Nudi basombe ku mbelu ku bimana bia tshimenga bua tshinyi? Nuenu benza kabidi nanku, ndi nnuelesha mu lukanu. Kutuadija musangu awu, kabavua bafika kabidi dituku dia Dikisha." 
Nehemiah13:22 Nanku, meme kuambila bena Levi, bua bumushe mikiya yabu, baye kulama biibi bia tshimenga, bua bantu banemeke dituku dia Dikisha. “Eyi, umvuluke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bua bualu ebu kabidi. Wewe udi muena dinanga, umfuile luse!”" 
Nehemiah13:23 Mu tshikondu atshi kabidi, mvua mumone muvua bena Yuda basela bakaji ba bena Asdode, bena Amone nansha bena Mowabe." 
Nehemiah13:24 Bana babu bakuabu bavua bakula muakulu wa bena Asdode, bakuabu muakulu wa tshisamba tshikuabu tshia bantu benyi. Kadi kakuvua nansha muana umue uvua mumanye muakulu wa bena Yuda to." 
Nehemiah13:25 Meme kubatandisha, kubela milawu. Meme kutuuta bantu bakuabu, kubatula nsuki. Pashishe meme kubambila bua baditshipe kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua kabaseleshi kabidi bana babu kudi bantu benyi. Kabidi kabaseledi babu bana bakaji ba bantu benyi. Bobu bine kabena mua kusela bakaji ba bantu benyi." 
Nehemiah13:26 Meme kubakonka ne: — Malu aa ki ngavua mafikishe Shelomu, mukalenga wa Izrayele, ku dienza bibi anyi? Munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende bionsu, kakuvua mukalenga mukuabu bu yeye to. Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumunange, mumuteke mukalenga wa bena Izrayele bonsu. Kadi bakaji ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bamufikishe ku dienza bibi" 
Nehemiah13:27 Katuena basue kumvua kabidi munudi nuenzela Mvidi Mukulu bibi pa kusela bakaji ba bisamba bikuabu. 
Nehemiah13:28 Muana umue wa Yoyada, muikulu wa mutuangaji munene Eliyashibe, uvua musele muana wa Sanebalate, muena Orone. Ke pamvua mumuipate mu Yerushalayime." 
Nehemiah13:29 “Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, vuluka kashidi muvuabu bapepeja nanku mudimu wa batuangaji, banyanga ndondu uuvua mutue ne batuangaji kabidi ne bena Levi.”" 
Nehemiah13:30 Meme kumusha bantu benyi munkatshi mua bena Yuda. Meme kufundila batuangaji ne bena Levi meyi ne mikandu bua kulongolola mudimu wabu. 
Nehemiah13:31 Meme kulongolola kabidi mudimu wa kufila nkunyi matuku avuabu bafunde, kabidi wa kufila milambu ya bintu bia tshianyi bia mu madimi. “Eyi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umvuluke, ungenzele bimpe. ”" 
Esther1:1 Malu aa ke avua menzeke mu tshikondu tshia bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe. Yeye uvua mukalenga wa matunga lukama makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete, kutuadija ku Inde too ne ku Kushe." 
Esther1:2 Mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukalenga buende, pa mukuna wa Shushane, mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga, mukalenga Ahashaveroshe uvua mulongolole didia dinene bua bonsu bavua ne mianzu mu bukalenga buende, ne bua balombodi ba ditunga. Uvua musangishe balombodi ba tshiluilu tshia bena Persa ne tshia bena Madayi, balombodi ba mu bukalenga, ne bamfumu ba matunga." 
Esther1:3  
Esther1:4 Mukalenga uvua ubaleja bubanji buvuaye nabu ne butumbi bua bukalenga buende. Bavua benza bibilu ebi matuku mavule, ngondu isambombu mijima." 
Esther1:5 Matuku awu mamane kupita, mukalenga kulambisha kabidi didia dikuabu dinene bua bantu bonsu baneme ne bapele, bavua basomba mu tshimenga tshia Shushane. Tshibilu etshi tshivua tshienzeka lumingu lujima mu lubanza lua bukalenga." 
Esther1:6 Bavua balembeleja bilamba bia manda a ndanda bitoke, nansha bia mayi a nkunde, ku tukaba tukunze tuela ku nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Bavua bakudika nkanu ayi ku makunji a mabue engelela. Bavua bateka mu lutanda, nkuasa ya tshisaka ya mpawungi ne ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Bavua balamika panshi mu lutanda mabue mimpe makunze, matoke, a makalumakalu ne mafuke." 
Esther1:7 Bavua banuina mu makopu a mpawungi, mikale dikopu dionsu dishilangane ne dikuabu. Mukalenga uvua mufile maluvu a mvinyo mapite bungi, uvua wabanyina bantu ne muoyi wa kalolu muakanyine mukalenga." 
Esther1:8 Muntu yonsu uvua unua pa yende nyota. Ke muvua mukalenga muambile bena mudimu bende bonsu ne: “Bantu bandi mubikile, badie, banue, muntu yonsu muende mudiye musue.”" 
Esther1:9 Mukalenga mukaji Vasti uvua pende mulongoluele bakaji nende didia dinene mu lupangu lua bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe. 
Esther1:10 Dituku dia muanda mutekete dia didia dinene, mukalenga Ahashaveroshe uvua musanke bua mvinyo uvuaye munue. Kubikilaye batungu muanda mutekete, bena mudimu bende, ke Mekumane, Bista, Arbona, Bigta, Abagta, Zetare ne Karkase." 
Esther1:11 Kubatumaye bua bamubikidile mukalenga mukaji Vasti, bua afike kudiye, muvuale tshifulu tshia bukalenga. Mukalenga Ahashaveroshe uvua musue kuleja baneme bende ne bantu bakuabu bavuaye mubikile buimpe buvua nabu mukalenga mukaji. Bualu uvua ne mpala muimpe." 
Esther1:12 Batungu kufikisha mukenji awu kudi mukalenga mukaji. Kadi mukalenga mukaji kubenga mua kuya. Nenku mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kufika munda bikole. 
Esther1:13 Mukalenga kuyukila ne bamanyi ba malu, bualu uvua ne tshibidilu tshia kuakaja malu a mu bukalenga pamue ne bamanyi ba meyi ne mikandu bia ditunga." 
Esther1:14 Bafidi ba ngenyi ba mukalenga bavua pabuipi nende bavua muanda mutekete: ke Karshena, Shetare, Admata, Tarshishe, Merese, Marsena ne Memukane. Bobu aba bavua bantu bavua ne muanzu munene mu bukalenga bua bena Persa ne bena Madayi. Mukalenga uvua mubatekemene, mubape mianzu minene mu bukalenga buende." 
Esther1:15 Mukalenga Ahashave-roshe kubakonka ne: — Meme mukalenga Ahashaveroshe, mvua mutume batungu ne diyi bua kubikila mukalenga mukaji Vasti bua kuvuaye. Kadi mmubenge kuitaba. Nanku patudi tutangila meyi ne mikandu bia ditunga, badi mua kumunyoka mushindu kaayi?" 
Esther1:16 Memukane kuandamuna mukalenga Ahashaveroshe ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: — Mukalenga mukaji Vasti kena mupende amu mukalenga nkayende to. Mmupetule kabidi ne balombodi ba bukalenga ne bantu bonsu badi basomba mu matunga onsu adi ku bumfumu bua mukalenga. 
Esther1:17 Nanku, bakaji bonsu bumvue mudi mukalenga mukaji muandamune amu, kabakunemeka kabidi babayabu to. Nebikale badibingisha, bamba ne: “Mukalenga Ahashaveroshe uvua mubikidishe mukalenga mukaji Vasti, kadi kubengaye bua kuya!”" 
Esther1:18 Lelu ewu, bakaji ba balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Persa ne bua bena Madayi, nebamanye tshidi mukalenga mukaji muenze etshi. Nebakimine kuandamuna babayabu bia momumue. Nenku, kapeja ka bakaji aku nekafikishe balume munda." 
Esther1:19 Nanku, mukalenga, paudi muitabe, ela mukenji wa ditunga. Ukandike kashidi mukalenga mukaji Vasti bua kamueneki kumpala kuebe to. Ufile muanzu wende kudi mukaji mukuabu udi mukumbanyine muanzu awu. Mukenji awu uufunde ku mikenji ya bena ditunga dia bena Persa ne dia bena Madayi idibu kabayi mua kukudimuna." 
Esther1:20 Padi bantu bamanya mukenji awu mu matunga onsu a mu bukalenga buebe bualabale, mukaji yonsu neatumikile bayende, nansha yeye mupele, nansha yeye mubanji." 
Esther1:21 Mukalenga ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende kuitaba lungenyi lua Memukane. Mukalenga kukumbaja bivua Memukane muambe. 
Esther1:22 Kutumaye mu matunga onsu, mikanda ivuabu bafunde bilondeshile mfundilu ne muakulu wa bantu bavua basombamu. Mikanda ivua mijadike ne: Muntu mulume udi mfumu wa nzubuende, bena mu nzubuende nebakule anu muakulu wa bankambua ba mulume." 
Esther2:1 Matuku makese mamane kupita, tshiji tshia mukalenga tshimane kutuya, mukalenga kuela meji ku bivua Vasti muenze ne ku mukenji uvuaye muele bualu buende." 
Esther2:2 Ke bafidi ba ngenyi ba mu ditunga diende kumuambila ne: — Bakukebele nsongakaji itshidi tumama, idi imueneka ne mpala muimpe." 
Esther2:3 Nenku, lomba balombodi ba matunga onsu adi mu bukalenga buebe, bua bakutuadile nsongakaji ya mpala mulenga. Bafike nayi mu lupangu lua bakaji ba bukalenga, ludi mu tshimenga tshia Shushane. Egayi, mutungu mulami wa lupangu elu, neayilame bimpe, neayipeshe mafuta a bulenga a kulabayo pambidi." 
Esther2:4 Nsongakaji uwanyisha awu neashale mukalenga mukaji, pa mutu pa Vasti. Mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kuanyisha lungenyi alu, kulukumbaja." 
Esther2:5 Mu tshimenga tshia Shushane muvua muena Yuda, dina diende Mordekayi, muana wa Yayire, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Shimeyi ne Kishe, wa mu tshisamba tshia Binyamine." 
Esther2:6 Mordekayi uvua wa ku tshisumbu tshia bantu bavua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, muangate mu Yerushalayime pamue ne Yekoniya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, bua kuya nabu kuende." 
Esther2:7 Mordekayi uvua mukoleshe muana wa bakaji wa muanabu, dina diende Adasha, uvuabu binyika kabidi ne: Estere. Adasha uvua muana wa nshiye. Kunyima kua lufu lua baledi bende, Mordekayi kumuangata bua kukolelaye kuende. Adasha uvua ne mpala muimpe mutambe." 
Esther2:8 Bantu bamane kumvua diyi dia bukalenga, kusangishabu nsongakaji mivule mu tshimenga tshia Shushane. Munkatshi muabu muvua Estere. Kuyabu nende, pamue ne bakuabu, mu lupangu lua bukalenga. Bavua babalama kudi Egayi, mulami wa lupangu lua bakaji." 
Esther2:9 Estere uvua wenza bivua bilengelela Egayi. Ke Egayi kumuanyisha bikole. Kupeshaye Estere biakudia ne bintu bionsu bivua mua kulengeja mubidi wende. Uvua mumupeshe kabidi ne bena mudimu muanda mutekete, basunguila ku bansongakaji bena mudimu bavua mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Uvua mubateke pamue ne Estere mu nzubu uvua muimpe mupite mikuabu yonsu ya mu lupangu lua bakaji." 
Esther2:10 Estere kavua mudimanyishe ne: ndi muena Yuda to. Bualu Mordekayi uvua mumukandike. 
Esther2:11 Kadi Mordekayi uvua wendakana ku dituku ku dituku kumpala kua lupangu lua bakaji bua kumanya muvua Estere, ne bua kumanya tshidibu mua kumuenzela." 
Esther2:12 Bansongakaji bavua mu lupangu bavua ne bua kukumbaja tshidimu tshijima, benza bionsu bivuabu babafundila, bua kulengeja nabi mubidi wabu. Ngondu isambombu ya kumpala, bavua babafita mafuta a mire; minga isambombu ivua ilonda, bavua babafita mafuta a manananshi, ne bintu bikuabu bia kulengeja nabi bakaji. Pashishe, nsongakaji yonsu uvua ne tshiende tshikondu tshivuaye ne bua kubuela ku nzubu kuvua mukalenga Ahashaveroshe." 
Esther2:13 Pavua nsongakaji umuka ku lupangu lua bakaji, uya ku lupangu lua mukalenga, uvua upeta bilamba ne bilengejilu bionsu bivuaye musue kuya nabi kudi mukalenga." 
Esther2:14 Nanku, dilolu uvua umonangana ne mukalenga. Maloba dinda bavua bamupingaja mu lupangu luibidi lua bakaji, luvuabu balama kudi Shashagaze, mutungu, mulami wa bakaji bakuabu ba mukalenga. Nsongakaji kavua mua kupingana kabidi kudi mukalenga, amu pavua mukalenga musue, muleje dijinga adi, nansha umubikila mu dina diende." 
Esther2:15 Dituku dikuabu, tshikondu tshivua Estere, muana wa Abikayile, uvua Mordekayi muana wa tatuende mukuabu mukoleshe, ne bua kuya ku nzubu bua kumonangana ne mukalenga, kukumbanatshi. Uvua ulomba amu bivua Egayi, mutungu mulami wa lupangu lua bakaji ba mukalenga mumuambile bua kuangata. Estere kutokela bonsu bavua bamumona ku muoyi." 
Esther2:16 Nenku bakafua Estere munda mua lupangu kua mukalenga Ahashaveroshe mu ngondu wa dikumi, ngondu wa Tebete, wa tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete tshia bukalenga buende." 
Esther2:17 Mukalenga kunanga Estere kumpala kua bakaji bakuabu bonsu. Ku bansongakaji bonsu, amu Estere ke uvua mukalenga mupite kunanga. Kumuasaye tshifulu tshia bukalenga, kumubanda bu mukalenga mukaji pa mutu pa Vasti." 
Esther2:18 Pashishe mukalenga kulongoluela Estere didia dinene. Kubikilaye baneme ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende buonsu. Kuanyishaye bua bantu ba mu matunga avua ku bumfumu buende, kabalambudi tshitupa tshia milambu ivuabu ne bua kufuta, kuabanyinaye bantu bintu ne muoyi wa kalolu, muakanyine mukalenga." 
Esther2:19 Musangu muibidi, kusangishabu kabidi bansongakaji. Mordekayi ukavua mumane kupeta muanzu munkatshi mua bena mudimu ba mu bukalenga." 
Esther2:20 Estere pende kavua muanji kudimanyisha ne: ndi muena Yuda to. Uvua muitabe muvua Mordekayi mumukandike. Uvua utungunuka ne kuitaba diyi diende amu bu tshikondu tshivuaye kumbelu kuende. 
Esther2:21 Dituku dikuabu, pavua Mordekayi wenzela mudimu mu nzubu wa mukalenga, Bigtane ne Tereshe, bantungu babidi ba mukalenga bavua balami ba tshibuelelu tshia nzubu ya mukalenga, bavua bela tshifufu tshia kushipa mukalenga Ahashaveroshe, bualu mukalenga uvua mubafikishe munda bikole." 
Esther2:22 Kadi Mordekayi kumanya bualu abu. Kubumanyishaye mukalenga mukaji Estere, bua abufikishe kudi mukalenga." 
Esther2:23 Pavuabu bakenketa bualu abu, bavua bajadika ne: mbulelela. Ke kuowabu bantu abu. Mukalenga kufundisha bualu abu mu mukanda wa Dilondolola malu a mu bukalenga bua ditunga." 
Esther3:1 Matuku makese mamane kupita, mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kubandisha Amane, muana wa Amedata, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Agaje, muanzu wa mulombodi wa kumpala mu ditunga." 
Esther3:2 Bena mudimu bonsu ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga bavua batua binu, binyika ne mitu kumpala kua Amane, bu muvua diyi dia mukalenga. Kadi amu Mordekayi nkayende ke uvua ubenga kuenza nanku." 
Esther3:3 Bena mudimu bakuabu ba mukalenga kukonka Mordekayi tshidiye ubengela diyi dia mukalenga adi. 
Esther3:4 Mordekayi uvua ubandamuna ne: “Bualu ndi muena Yuda”. Ku dituku ku dituku bavua babela Mordekayi bua angate diyi adi ne mushinga! Kadi Mordekayi kubenga. Nenku bobu kuya kumusonguela kudi Amane, bua bamone ne: udi utungunuka ne kuenza nanku anyi?" 
Esther3:5 Amane mumane kujadika muvua Mordekayi mubengelemu bua kumutuila binu ne kuinyika mutu kumpala kuende, kufikaye munda bikole." 
Esther3:6 Bantu kumuambila kabidi ne: Mordekayi mmuena Yuda. Nanku kumonaye ne: ki mbimpe kunyoka amu Mordekayi nkayende, kadi mbimpe kubutula bena Yuda, bena tshisamba tshiabu bonsu badi basombela mu bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe." 
Esther3:7 Mu ntuadijilu wa tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshibidi tshivua Ahashaveroshe mulale mu bukalenga, ngondu wa kumpala wa Nisane, Amane kutshinkisha ne Purime, bua kumanya dituku dia ngondu divuaye ne bua kukumbaja meji avuaye muele. Ditshinka kuleja dituku dia dikumi ne dibidi dia ngondu wa Adare." 
Esther3:8 Amane kuambila mukalenga Ahashaveroshe ne: — Mukalenga, mu bukalenga buebe, mudi tshisamba tshia bantu ba mushindu mukuabu, bamuangalaka mu bitupa bionsu bia bukalenga buebe. Bibidilu biabu mbishilangane ne bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bionsu. Kabena banemeka meyi ne mikandu bia mu bukalenga to. Kadi tshiudi mulekele bantu aba basomba talalaa mu ditunga ntshinyi?" 
Esther3:9 Paudi musue, funda mukanda, ele diyi bua babutule bantu aba. Nanku meme nempeshe bena mudimu badi balongolola malu a bukalenga kilo binunu nkama isatu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bua babiteke mu tshibutshilu tshia bukalenga." 
Esther3:10 Ke mukalenga kukopola kakanu ka ku munu, kukapesha Amane muluishi wa bena Yuda, muana wa Amedata, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Agaje." 
Esther3:11 Mukalenga kumuandamuna ne: — Tshiena nkengela lupetu luebe. Kadi bantu aba, ndi nkulekelabu, wenza nabu muudi musue." 
Esther3:12 Kubikidishabu bafundi ba malu a mukalenga, matuku dikumi ne asatu a ngondu wa kumpala. Bilondeshile muvua Amane mubambile, bafundi kufunda mikanda, kuyitumina bamienampala ba mukalenga, balombodi ba mu ditunga, ne bamfumu ba bisamba bishilangane. Mikanda ayi, bavua bayifunde mu mfundilu mishilangane ne mu miakulu mishilangane ivuabu bakula mu ditunga. Kufundabu dina dia mukalenga ne: ke udi muyifunde. Kutuabu tshitampi tshia kakanu ka mukalenga Ahashaveroshe." 
Esther3:13 Pashishe kutumabu bantu bua bafile mikanda ayi mu ditunga dionsu dia mu bukalenga. Mu mikanda eyi bavua bela diyi dia kushipa ne kubutula bena Yuda bonsu, kakuyi luse nansha lukese: bansongalume, bantu bakole, bakaji ne bana. Bavua mua kupawula kabidi bintu biabu bionsu. Bavua ne bua kushipa bantu dituku anu dimue, mu ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, dituku dia dikumi ne disatu dia ngondu awu." 
Esther3:14 Mu ditunga dionsu divuabu bapete mukanda ewu, bantu bavua bautangila bu diyi disuika kudi mukalenga. Nanku bavua ne bua kuubadila bantu bonsu, bua muntu yonsu adilongolole, amone mua kukumbaja dituku adi tshidibu bambe." 
Esther3:15 Bantu bavua mukalenga mutume kuya lukasa. Pashishe kumanyishabu bantu bonsu bavua basomba pa mukuna wa Shushane bualu. Diba adi, mukalenga ne Amane kuya kunua maluvu, kadi bena mu tshimenga tshia Shushane bavua ne kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Esther4:1 Mordekayi umvua bivua bienzeka, kudipandaye bilamba, kuvuala bilamba bia madilu, kudilaba butu mu mutu. Uvua wendakana mu tshimenga, wela mbila mikole ya dikenga." 
Esther4:2 Yeye mumane kufika kumpala kua nzubu wa mukalenga, kuimanaye, bualu muntu muvuale bilamba bia madilu kawa mua kubuela mu nzubu wa mukalenga to." 
Esther4:3 Mu ditunga dia mu bukalenga dionsu divua mukenji wa mukalenga ufika, bena Yuda bonsu bavua amu ne bowa bunene. Bavua bajila biakudia, badila miadi, bakengakana. Bantu ba bungi bavua bavuala bilamba bia madilu, balala mu butu." 
Esther4:4 Bakaji ba bena mudimu bende, ne batungu bavua baya kudi mukalenga mukaji Estere bua kumanyisha muvua Mordekayi muenze amu. Estere kupeta buowa bunene. Kutuminaye Mordekayi bilamba bia kuvuala, bua avule bilamba bia madilu biwaye nabi. Kadi Mordekayi kubenga." 
Esther4:5 Nanku Estere kubikidisha Atake, mutungu uvua mukalenga mumupeshe bua kumuenzela mudimu. Estere kumutuma kudi Mordekayi, bua amumvuije mudi bualu, amumvuije kabidi tshidiye muvuadile bilamba bia madilu abi." 
Esther4:6 Atake kuya kuvua Mordekayi ku tshibuelelu tshivua kumpala kua nzubu wa mukalenga. 
Esther4:7 Mordekayi kumumanyisha malu onsu avua menzeke. Kadi uvua umuambila nangananga bua lupetu luvua Amane mulaye mukalenga, bua kuela mu tshibutshilu tshia bukalenga padibu babutula bena Yuda bonsu." 
Esther4:8 Mordekayi kumupesha kabidi mukanda uvuabu bafundile bena Shushane, muikale ne mukenji wa kubutula bena Yuda. Uvua umusengelela bua ambile Estere bionsu abi, amuleje ne mukanda. Atake uvua kabidi ne bua kutendakena Estere bua aye kudi mukalenga, bua kuakuila bena tshisamba tshiabu ne kubalombela luse." 
Esther4:9 Atake kuambila Estere bionsu bivuabu bamuandamune kudi Mordekayi. 
Esther4:10 Pashishe, Estere kutuma kabidi Atake kudi Mordekayi bua kumuandamuna ne:" 
Esther4:11 “Bantu bonsu, bena mudimu ba mukalenga, nansha badi basomba mu matunga a mu bukalenga, mbamanye bimpe ne: Muntu yonsu, mulume nansha mukaji, udi udiyila mu lubanza munda mua lupangu lua mukalenga, kabayi bamubikila kudi mukalenga, tshiende ndufu. Udi mua kushala ne muoyi amu padi mukalenga umuoluela dikombu diende dia mpawungi. Kadi meme, kukadi mpindiewu ngondu mujima, udi mukalenga kayi mumbikile pabuipi nende.”" 
Esther4:12 Mordekayi mumane kupeta diandamuna dia Estere edi," 
Esther4:13 kuambilaye kabidi Atake bua aye kuandamuna Estere ne: “Kuedi meji ne: udi mua kupanda wewe nkayebe, padibu bashipa bena Yuda, bualu udi musombele mu nzubu wa bukalenga." 
Esther4:14 Nanku paudi ubenga kutuakuila mu tshikondu tshikole etshi, bena Yuda nebapete diambuluisha ku nseke mikuabu, nebapande. Kadi wewe ne bena diku diebe, nenubutuke. Umanye kabidi ne: bumue mbua bualu ebu, ke buudi mua kuikala mupete muanzu wa mukalenga mukaji.”" 
Esther4:15 Pashishe Estere kuandamuna Mordekayi ne: 
Esther4:16 “Uye kusangisha bena Yuda bonsu badi mu Shushane. Nujile biakudia bualu buanyi, kanuyi nudia nansha nunua matuku asatu a munya ne a butuku. Netuenze kabidi nanku meme ne bena mudimu banyi. Pashishe, nansha bu mudibi bikandika kudi diyi, nenye kudi mukalenga. Nanku, bu bobu mua kunshipa nebanshipe!”" 
Esther4:17 Ke Mordekayi kupingana bua kuenza muonsu muvua Estere mumuambile. 
Esther5:1 Matuku asatu a tshijila tshiende mamane kujika, Estere kuvuala bilamba biende bimpe bia mukalenga mukaji. Kuyaye mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa mukalenga. Kuimanaye kumpala kua nzubu wa mukalenga. Mukalenga uvua mu nzubu wende, musombe mu nkuasa, mutangile ku mushiku wa tshibuelelu." 
Esther5:2 Pavuaye umona mukalenga mukaji muimane mu lubanza, kumuanyishaye, kumuoluelaye dikombu dia mpawungi di-vuaye mukuate mu tshianza. Estere kusemena, kukuata ku lusongu lua dikombu." 
Esther5:3 Mukalenga kumukonka ne: — Mukalenga mukaji, mmalu kaayi? Udi ujinga tshinyi? Nkadi mumane kudilongolola bua kukuambuluisha nansha ne tshia bibidi tshia bukalenga buanyi." 
Esther5:4 Estere kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, lelu mene ndi mukuenzele didia dinene. Ndi musue nufike mu didia edi ne Amane." 
Esther5:5 Nanku mukalenga kubikidisha diakamue Amane bua bakumbaje muvua Estere ujinga. Nanku bonsu babidi kuya mu didia divua Estere mulongolole. 
Esther5:6 Didia dijika, mukalenga kukonka Estere ne: — Tshiudi musue kundomba ntshinyi? Ndi mua kukuambuluisha nansha ne tshia bibidi tshia bukalenga buanyi." 
Esther5:7 Estere kuandamuna ne: — Tshindi njinga kukulomba ngetshi: 
Esther5:8 Mukalenga, paudi munganyishe, muanyishe dilomba dianyi, ufike kabidi muanyi maloba, bua didia dinene dindi munuenzele wewe ne Amane. Nanku, diba adi nenkuambile tshindi njinga." 
Esther5:9 Amane kupatuka ne disanka dituku adi mu nzubu mua mukalenga mukaji. Kadi ufika ku tshiibi tshia lupangu lua mukalenga, kusanganaye Mordekayi musombe, kayi ujuka, kayi umuleja kanemu nansha kakese. Amane kumufikila munda bikole." 
Esther5:10 Kadi kuanjiye kudilama, kupingana kuende. Kubikidishaye balunda bende ne muena kuende Zereshe." 
Esther5:11 Amane kuditambisha kumpala kuabu, bua bubanji buende, bua bana ba bungi bavuaye nabu, ne bua lumu luvua mukalenga mumupeshe. Bualu mukalenga uvua mumuteke mulombodi wa kumpala, mupite banene ba mu bukalenga bonsu, ne baludiki ba ditunga ku muanzu." 
Esther5:12 Amane kuamba kabidi ne: — Mukalenga mukaji Estere uvua mumbikile, amu meme nkayanyi, bua kufila mukalenga, mu didia divuaye mulambe muende lelu. Mmutubikile tshiakabidi ne mukalenga maloba." 
Esther5:13 Kadi bionsu ebi kabiena binsankisha nansha kakese, misangu yonsu indi mmona Mordekayi, muena Yuda, wenzela mudimu ku tshiibi tshia lupangu lua mukalenga." 
Esther5:14 Nenku, muena kuende Zereshe ne balunda bende bonsu, kumuambila ne: — Bantu bakongoluele mutshi wa bule bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu. Maloba dinda, lomba mukalenga bua boweleku Mordekayi. Nenku, neuye kufila mukalenga ne disanka mu didia amu. Amane kuanyisha lungenyi alu, kuenzeja tshiowelu." 
Esther6:1 Butuku abu, mukalenga kawa mumone tulu kuisu to. Kutumaye diyi bua bamutuadile mukanda udi ulondolola malu avua menzeke mu bukalenga. Bobu kumutuadilawu, kuubalabu." 
Esther6:2 Bavua babala nangananga bualu bua Mordekayi, muvuaye mujandule mukalenga tshifufu tshibi tshivuabu bamuelele kudi batungu bende babidi Bigtane ne Tereshe bua kumushipa. Bobu ke bavua ne mudimu wa kulama tshiibi tshia ku nzubu wa mukalenga." 
Esther6:3 Nenku mukalenga kubakonka ne: — Tuvua bapeshe Mordekayi tshinganyi tshia lumbandi? Tuvua bamuele tuasakidila bishi? Bena mudimu bende kuandamuna ne: — Kawa mupete kantu nansha kamue ka lumbandi to. 
Esther6:4 Mukalenga kukonka kabidi ne: — Udi mu lupangu lua bukalenga emu nnganyi? Diba adi Amane utshivua ubuelelaku mu lupangu. Uvua mufike bua kulomba mukalenga, bua kuovuabu Mordekayi ku tshiowelu tshimulongoluela." 
Esther6:5 Bena mudimu kuandamuna ne: — Amane ke udimu. Mukalenga kuamba ne: — Abuele! 
Esther6:6 Amane ubuela, mukalenga kumukonka ne: — Tshindi mua kuenzela muntu undi musue kuela menemene ka lumbandi ntshinyi? Amane uvua wela meji ne: “Udi mukalenga musue kuela ka lumbandi awu nnganyi? Udi mua kuikala amu meme!” Amane kuandamuna ne:" 
Esther6:7 — Mukalenga, paudi musue kunemeka muntu," 
Esther6:8 umuvuadike tshimue tshia ku bivualu biebe menemene, umupe nyama webe wa kabalu, umuase tshifulu tshia bukalenga ku mutu wende." 
Esther6:9 Sungula umue wa ku balombodi banene ba mu bukalenga buebe, avuadike muntu awu bilamba bia bukalenga, amubandishe pa nyama wa kabalu, aye nende mu bisalu ne mu masangu a njila, ele mbila kumpala kuende ne: “Monayi mudi mukalenga unemeka muntu udiye musue kuela ka lumbandi. ”" 
Esther6:10 Mukalenga kuambila Amane ne: — Uye lukasa, wangata bilamba ne nyama wa kabalu. Wenzele Mordekayi, muena Yuda, udi musombe ku tshiibi tshia nzubu wa bukalenga muwambi amu. Kulekedi bualu nansha bumue bua mu malu auvua muambe awu to!" 
Esther6:11 Amane kuya kuangata bivualu ne kabalu. Kujadikaye Mordekayi bilamba, kumubandisha pa kabalu, kuya nende mu bisalu ne mu masangu a njila, wenda wela mbila ne: “Monayi mudi mukalenga unemeka muntu udiye musue kuela ka lumbandi!”" 
Esther6:12 Pashishe Mordekayi kupingana ku tshiibi tshia lupangu lua bukalenga. Amane kupingana lukasa kuende, mudibuikile tshilamba ku mesu bua bundu buvuaye nabu." 
Esther6:13 Amane kulondela Zereshe muena kuende, ne balunda bende, bionsu bivua bienzeka abi. Ke balunda bende kumuambila ne: — Mordekayi udibu bakufuishe nende bundu awu mmuena Yuda. Nanku kuena mua kumupita. Neupete amu dikasa dibi." 
Esther6:14 Patshivuabu bakula, bantu bavua mukalenga mutume kufika, bambila Amane mua kuya mu didia divua Estere mulongolole." 
Esther7:1 Mukalenga ne Amane kuya kua mukalenga mukaji Estere, bua kudia didia dinene," 
Esther7:2 bua musangu muibidi. Didia dimane kujika, mukalenga kukonka tshiakabidi Estere ne: — Tshiudi musue kundomba tshinyi? Ndi mua kukupesha tshiudi musue, nansha tshia bibidi tshia bukalenga buanyi." 
Esther7:3 Mukalenga mukaji Estere kuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, paudi munganyishe, kabidi paudi munsue, ndi nkulomba bua tshisamba tshianyi ne meme katutu to. Ke tshindi nkulomba bua ungenzele atshi." 
Esther7:4 Bena tshisamba tshianyi ne meme bavua batusumbishe bua batubutule, batushipe, kamuyi luse. Bu bobu batupane, bua kushala bapika tshianana, mvua mua kupuwa, tshivua mua kukusuya bua kukuambila bualu bua nenku to." 
Esther7:5 Mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kuebeja mukalenga mukaji Estere ne: — Udi muele meji a kuenza nanku udi penyi? Nnganyi mene? 
Esther7:6 Estere kuandamuna ne: — Muluishi wetu, kabidi mushipianganyi muena tshikisu, ke Amane. Amane kuzakala bikole kumpala kua mukalenga ne kua mukalenga mukaji." 
Esther7:7 Mukalenga kufika munda bikole ne tshiji, kumuka ku mesa, kupatuka mu lupangu luende lua bukalenga. Amane umanya ne: mukalenga udi ujinga kunshipesha, kushalaye usengelela mukalenga mukaji Estere, bua amusungidile, kabamushipi." 
Esther7:8 Amane kudiela mu nkuasa wa tshisaka, muaba uvua Estere musombele. Diba adi mukalenga kufika mu nzubu wa didia, utumina mu lupangu. Kuelaye diyi ne: — Mulumiana ewu udi musue kabidi kuibidila mukajanyi pambidi ku bukole, bua kumufikisha ku bubi, mu nzubu muanyi, meme mutangile anyi? Amu mukalenga wamba miaku ayi, bena mudimu kusuika Amane tshilamba ku mesu." 
Esther7:9 Umue wa ku bena mudimu, dina diende Arbona, kuambila mukalenga Ahashaveroshe ne: — Mukalenga, Amane mene uvua mulongoluele Mordekayi, uvua mukupandishe ku tshitungu, tshiowelu bua kumuowelapu. Tshiowelu atshi tshidi kumpala kua nzubu wa Amane, tshidi ne butumbuke bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu. Mukalenga kutuma diyi ne: — Buowelepu Amane." 
Esther7:10 Bantu kuowela Amane ku tshiowelu tshivuaye mulongoluele Mordekayi. Nenku, tshiji tshia mukalenga kutuya." 
Esther8:1 Dituku adi, mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kupesha Estere mukalenga mukaji bintu bionsu bia Amane, muluishi wa bena Yuda. Mukalenga kubikidisha Mordekayi, bualu Estere uvua mumuambile ne: Mordekayi mmuana wa tatu mukuabu." 
Esther8:2 Mukalenga kukopola kakanu ka ku munu ka bukalenga kavuaye munyenge Amane, kukapesha Mordekayi. Estere kabidi kupa Mordekayi mudimu wa kulama bintu bivua bia Amane." 
Esther8:3 Estere kuyukila tshiakabidi ne mukalenga, kudiela panshi ku makasa ende, udila muadi, umusengelela bua abenge malu mabi avua Amane wa ku ndelanganyi ya Agaje musue kuenzela bena Yuda." 
Esther8:4 Mukalenga kuoluela Estere dikombu diende dia mpawungi. Estere kujuka panshi," 
Esther8:5 kuambila mukalenga ne: — Mukalenga, paudi mumone ne bindi nkulomba bidi bimpe, kabidi paudi munganyishe, munnange, ufunde mukanda wa kukandika nawu mikanda ivua Amane, muana wa Amedata, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Agaje mufunde bua kubutula bena Yuda, badi basomba mu matunga onsu a mu bukalenga buebe." 
Esther8:6 Mundi mua kumona bashipa bana betu, tshiyi ngenza bualu mbishi? Mundi mua kutangila ne mesu babutula bantu ba tshisamba tshietu mbishi?" 
Esther8:7 Pashishe, mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kuandamuna Estere pamue ne Mordekayi, muena Yuda, ne: — Monayi, mvua mutume diyi bua kuowabu Amane, bualu uvua ukeba kubutula bena Yuda; kabidi wewe Estere mvua mukupeshe bintu bionsu bia Amane." 
Esther8:8 Kadi tshiena ne mushindu wa kukandika mukenji uvuabu bela mu dina dianyi, batue ne tshitampi tshidi ne kakanu kanyi. Kadi nuenu, nudi mua kufunda mikanda, kuleja bionsu bidi binulengelela bualu bua bena Yuda. Nudi mua kufunda dina dianyi ne kutua tshitampi tshidi ne kakanu kanyi." 
Esther8:9 Kubikidishabu bafundi ba malu a mukalenga dituku adi, matuku makumi abidi ne asatu a ngondu muisatu, ngondu wa Sivane. Bilondeshile muvua Mordekayi mulongolole, bobu kufunda mikanda, kuyitumina bena Yuda, bamienampala ba mukalenga, balombodi ne baludiki ba matunga lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete a mu bukalenga, kutuadija ku Inde too ne ku ditunga dia bena Kushe. Mikanda ayi bavua bayifunda mu miakulu ne mfundilu wa bantu ba mu bisamba bishilangane bivua mu bukalenga, kabidi ne mu miakulu ne mfundilu wa bena Yuda nkayabu." 
Esther8:10 Mu mikanda ayi bavua bafunda dina dia mukalenga Ahashaveroshe, bayitue ne tshitampi ne kakanu kende ka ku munu. Kuyitumabu kudi babandi ba pa nyama ya tubalu tuvua mu bikumbi bia mu lubanza lua mukalenga." 
Esther8:11 Bavua bafundamu ne: Mukalenga mmuanyishe bua bena Yuda, badi mu bimenga bionsu bidi mu bukalenga, badisangishe bua kudilama ku njiwu. Mukalenga udi wanyisha bua mu ditunga dionsu dia bukalenga buende, ne mu tshisamba tshionsu tshidi bena Yuda basomba, bena Yuda bashipe, nansha bakose mutu wa muntu yonsu udi ubaluisha ne bia mvita mu bianza. Badi mua kushipa bakaji ne bana ba baluishi babu kabidi, ne kupawula bintu biabu." 
Esther8:12 Bionsu abi bivua ne bua kuenzeka miaba yonsu mu bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe amu dituku dimue: dia dikumi ne disatu dia ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, ngondu wa Adare." 
Esther8:13 Bavua bamanyisha bena Yuda mukanda ewu mu matunga onsu, bua bawangate bu diyi diela kudi mukalenga, kabidi bua bamone mua kudisombuela kudi bena lukuna babu dituku adi." 
Esther8:14 Nanku, mukalenga mumane kutuma diyi adi, bantu bavua ne mikanda kubanda pa nyama ya tubalu tuvua mu bikumbi bia mu lubanza lua mukalenga, kuyabu ne lukasa luonsu. Pashishe bavua babadila bantu ba mu tshimenga tshia Shushane mukanda awu." 
Esther8:15 Mordekayi kupatuka mu nzubu wa mukalenga muvuale tshilamba tshia bukalenga tshifikuluke, tshitoke, mutentakaje tshinkutu tshia buanda bukunze. Uvua muase kabidi tshifulu tshinene tshia mpawungi. Bena mu tshimenga tshia Shushane bavua bela tunkunduluila ne bibingu bia disanka." 
Esther8:16 Bena Yuda bavua ne diakalenga, basanka bua pavuabu batshimuna baluishi babu." 
Esther8:17 Ku ditunga dionsu, mu tshimenga tshionsu, ne konsu kuvua mukanda ewu ufika, bena Yuda bavue amu ne disanka. Bavua benzeja didia dinene dia tshibilu. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua babuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena Yuda, bua bowa buvuabu babakuatshisha kudi bena Yuda." 
Esther9:1 Bena lukuna ba bena Yuda, bavua batekemena kubutula bena Yuda, mu matuku dikumi ne asatu a ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, ngondu wa Adare, bilondeshile diyi divua mukalenga mutume! Kadi, kabiakenzeka nanku to. Bena Yuda kutshimuna bantu bavua babapepeja abu." 
Esther9:2 Bena Yuda kudisangisha mu bimenga bionsu biwabu basombe bia mu bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe. Kuluishabu bantu bonsu bavua babelela tshifufu tshibi tshia kubabutula. Bantu bonsu bavua babatshine, kabayi mua kubafuila nkanana" 
Esther9:3 Bambuluishi ba mukalenga, bamienampala bende, balombodi ne bena mu mbulamatadi, bavua batua ku tshia bena Yuda, bualu bavua batshina Mordekayi." 
Esther9:4 Mordekayi uvua ne muanzu munene mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Lumu luende luvua lumanyike too ne mu matunga a ku mpenga. Bumfumu buende buvua buenda bukola. 
Esther9:5 Bena Yuda bavua benzela bena lukuna babu, muonsu muvuabu basue. Bavua bashipa bantu bavule ku muele!" 
Esther9:6 Bena Yuda bavua bashipa bantu nkama itanu pa mukuna wa Shushane. Bavua bashipa kabidi ne bana ba balume dikumi ba Amane, muana wa Amedata, muluishi wa bena Yuda. Mena a bana abu avua nenku:" 
Esther9:7 Parshanedata, Dalfone, Aspata," 
Esther9:8 Porata, Adaliya, Aridata," 
Esther9:9 Parmasheta, Arishayi, Aridayi ne Vayezata." 
Esther9:10 Kadi kabawa bapawula bintu biabu to. 
Esther9:11 Amu dituku adi, bobu kumanyisha mukalenga Ahashaveroshe bungi bua bantu bavuabu bashipe pa mukuna wa Shushane." 
Esther9:12 Nanku mukalenga Ahashaveroshe kuebeja mukalenga mukaji Estere ne: — Pa mukuna wa Shushane nkayapu, bena Yuda mbashipe bantu nkama itanu, kusakidila ne bana ba balume dikumi ba Amane. Nanku badi mua kuikala bashipe bantu mu matunga makuabu mu bukalenga, bungi munyi? Kadi, paudi ujinga kundomba tshintu tshikuabu, ndi nkupeshatshi, nkumbaja majinga ebe onsu." 
Esther9:13 Estere kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Mukalenga paudi musue, anyisha bua bena Yuda badi mu Shushane, benze maloba bu mudibu benza lelu emu. Kabidi utume diyi bua bele bitalu bia bana ba Amane ku tshiowelu." 
Esther9:14 Mukalenga kuela mukenji bua kuenzabu nanku. Kuelabu mukenji mupiamupia mu Shushane, kulembelejabu bitalu bia bana ba balume ba Amane kulu." 
Esther9:15 Musangu awu bena Yuda bavua basangila kabidi mu tshimenga tshia Shushane mu matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu wa Adare. Bavua bashipa bantu nkama isatu mu tshimenga. Kadi kabavua bapawula bintu biabu to. 
Esther9:16 Nenku bena Yuda bakuabu bavua basomba mu bitupa bikuabu bia buloba, bavua badisangisha bua bena lukuna babu kababenzedi bualu bubi. Kushipabu baluishi babu binunu makumi muanda mutekete ne bitanu. Kadi, kabawa bapawula bintu biabu to." 
Esther9:17 Bionsu abi bivua bienzeka mu matuku dikumi ne asatu a ngondu wa Adare. Mu matuku dikumi ne anayi, mvita kujika, bena Yuda kuenza tshibilu tshia disanka." 
Esther9:18 Kadi bena Yuda ba mu Shushane bavua bashipa bena lukuna babu mu matuku dikumi ne asatu ne mu matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu awu. Bavua bikisha dituku dia dikumi ne ditanu. Ke divuabu benza tshibilu tshia disanka. 
Esther9:19 Ke padi bena Yuda badi basomba ku misoku ya ku mpenga basungula dituku dia dikumi ne dinayi dia ngondu wa Adare, bua kuikalabu benzenza bibilu ne batuminangana bintu bia masanka." 
Esther9:20 Mordekayi kufunda malu onsu awu. Pashishe kutuminaye bena Yuda bonsu bavua mu bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe, nansha bavua basombe kule, nansha bavua pabuipi mikanda." 
Esther9:21 Kubambilaye bua bikale benza tshibilu ku tshidimu tshionsu, dituku dia dikumi ne dinayi, ne dia dikumi ne ditanu dia ngondu wa Adare." 
Esther9:22 Bualu matuku awu, bena Yuda bavua bapete dikisha, kabatshiwa ne muluishi kabidi to. Ngondu awu, dibungama diabu divua diandamuke disanka, dikenga divua diandamuke diakalenga. Nanku bavua ne bua kuenza bibilu ne disanka, batuminangana bintu bia kusankishangana nabi, kupesha bapele bintu." 
Esther9:23 Bena Yuda bavua balonde mikenji yonsu ivua Mordekayi muele. Bavua banyisha kabidi bua tshibilu tshivuabu benza musangu wa kumpala, batshienza ku tshidimu ku tshidimu bua tshishale tshivulukilu tshia malu awa menzeke." 
Esther9:24 Mordekayi uvua ubavuluija ne: Amane, muana wa Amedata, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Agaje, uvua muena lukuna wa bena Yuda, uvua mushindike bua kubutula bena Yuda, uvua mutshinke ne purime bua kujadika dituku divuabu ne bua kuenza bualu ebu." 
Esther9:25 Kadi Estere kuya kumanyisha mukalenga bualu abu. Ke mukalenga kutuma diyi, kufunda mukanda bua bakengeshe Amane mushindu uvuaye musue kukengesha bena Yuda. Ke bantu kumowa ne bana bende ba balume." 
Esther9:26 Ke padibu binyika matuku aa ne Purime, bu mudi dina dia “pure” dileja “kaamu” kavuabu batshinka naku bualu ebu. Bena Yuda kuvuluka bionsu bivua Mordekayi mubambile mu mukanda. Kuvulukabu kabidi ne bionsu biwabu bamone, ne dikenga divuabu bapete." 
Esther9:27 Nanku bena Yuda kuanyisha diyi edi, bajadike buabu bobu ne bua ndelanganyi yabu, ne bua bonsu bavua mua kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena Yuda, balame diyi edi bimpe. Bavua ne bua kulama bimpe matuku aa abidi a tshibilu tshia ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, bilondeshile muvua Mordekayi mulongolole." 
Esther9:28 Bavua ne bua kuvuluka ku ndelanganyi yonsu matuku a bibilu bia Purime aa, mu diku dionsu dia bena Yuda, dia mu ditunga dionsu ne mu tshimenga tshionsu tshia mu bukalenga. Bena Yuda bonsu ne ndelanganyi yabu bavua ne bua kushala kashidi ne tshibidilu etshi, bavuluka malu onsu avuabu babenzele kudi bantu aba." 
Esther9:29 Mukalenga muadi Estere, muana wa Abikayile pamue ne Mordekayi, muena Yuda, bavua bafunde mukanda musangu muibidi, bajadikila bantu malu a kuenza dituku dia Purime." 
Esther9:30 Mikanda eyi, bavua bayitumina bena Yuda ba mu matunga lukama ne makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete a bukalenga bua Ahashaveroshe, bavua babajingila bupole ne ditalala." 
Esther9:31 Mu mikanda eyi bavua bambila bena Yuda bua kuenzabu tshibilu tshia Purime dituku divua Estere ne Mordekayi bajadike. Mukenji ewu uvua bualu buabu ne bua ndelanganyi yabu amu bu muvua mukenji wa kujila biakudia, ne wa kudila miadi." 
Esther9:32 Mikenji ya Estere eyi ivua ijadika bimpe, malu avuabu ne bua kuenza mu tshibilu tshia Purime, kuyifundabu mu mukanda." 
Esther10:1 Mukalenga Ahashaveroshe uvua wenzeja bantu ba mu matunga a ku muelelu wa mayi manene, ne ba mu bidila bivua ku bukalenga buende midimu mikole." 
Esther10:2 Malu adi atangila midimu minene ne ya bukitu ivua mukalenga muenze, ne malu makuabu adi aleja muvuaye mubandishe Mordekayi mu muanzu munene, mbaafunde mu mukanda udibu binyika ne: “Malu menza kudi bakalenga ba bena Madayi ne ba bena Persa. ”" 
Esther10:3 Nenku Mordekayi muena Yuda, kushala muntu wa butumbi mu bukalenga, ulonda Ahashaveroshe ku bumfumu. Bana babu bonsu bena Yuda bavua bamunange ne bamunemeke bikole. Uvua ubenzela mudimu bua diakalenga diabu, ubakuila bua kubapesha ditalala." 
Job1:1 Ku kale, mu ditunga dia Usa, muvua muntu dina diende, Yobe. Muntu ewu uvua unemeka Mvidi Mukulu, umuitaba, uvua muntu muimpe, mubenge malu mabi." 
Job1:2 Uvua tatu wa bana ba balume muanda mutekete, ne ba bakaji basatu." 
Job1:3 Uvua ne mikoku binunu muanda mutekete, nyama ya tumelu binunu bisatu, nyama ya ngombe milume ne mikaji tshinunu, ya mpunde mikaji nkama itanu. Uvua kabidi ne bena mudimu bavule. Bantu bonsu bavua basombe ku luseke lua Palestine ludi diba dipatukila, amu yeye ke uvua mubapite ku bubanji ne ku biuma." 
Job1:4 Misangu yonsu, bana bende ba balume bavua baya, lelu mua muanabu kampanda, maloba mua mukuabu. Diba adi, bavua babikila kabidi bana babu ba bakaji bua kudia kuondoloka." 
Job1:5 Pavua masanka ajika, Yobe uvua ubikidisha bana bende, ujuka patshiatshia, ulambula Mvidi Mukulu mulambu wa kosha bua kukobolola yonsu wa kudibu. Yobe uvua wela meji ne: “Bumue bana banyi mbenzele Mvidi Mukulu bibi, nansha bapenda Mvidi Mukulu mu meji abu kabayi bamanye.” Ke muvua Yobe wenza misangu yonsu nanku." 
Job1:6 Kadi dituku dikuabu, batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bavua bamanyisha Maweja-Nangila bivuabu bamona. Satane mufundianganyi uvua kabidi munkatshi muabu." 
Job1:7 Maweja-Nangila kukonka mufundianganyi ne: — Udi ufuma penyi? Mufundianganyi kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi mfumina ku diendakana pa buloba. 
Job1:8 Maweja-Nangila kumuebeja ne: — Uvua mumone muntu wanyi Yobe. Pa buloba kapena muntu nansha umue udi mufuanangane nende to. Yeye ke muntu udi unnemeka, ungitaba. Udi muntu muimpe, mubenge malu mabi." 
Job1:9 Ke mufundianganyi kuandamuna ne: — Padi Yobe mukulamate mbua patupu anyi? 
Job1:10 Wewe udi mumulame bimpe, ne diku diende ne bintu biende bionsu. Udi mumututshishe dikasa dimpe mu bintu biende bionsu. Bimuna biende mbitangidika ditunga dijima." 
Job1:11 Ndi nkujadikila ne: bu wewe mua kumunyenga bionsu bidiye nabi, neakuele mulawu bantu bonsu bumvue." 
Job1:12 Maweja-Nangila kumuandamuna ne: — Nanku, angata bionsu bidiye nabi. Kadi kumulengi yeye nansha. Ke mufundianganyi kumuka muaba uvua Maweja-Nangila." 
Job1:13 Dituku dikuabu bana ba Yobe bavua badia banua kua tatuabu. 
Job1:14 Ke muntu kufika kudi Yobe ne mukenji, umuambila ne: “Tuvua tudima ne nyama ya ngombe, nyama ya mpunde mikaji ivua idia mu mpata pabuipi netu." 
Job1:15 Kadi bena Saba kufika, kutunyenga nyama yonsu, kushipa ne bena mudimu bebe. Amu meme ke udi munyeme bua kukumanyisha bualu ebu.”" 
Job1:16 Muntu awu utshivua wakula, muena mudimu mukuabu kufika kabidi bua kumanyisha ne: “Nkuba mmushipe mikoku ne bena mudimu bebe, mmubioshe bionsu. Amu meme nkayanyi ke udi munyeme bua kukumanyisha bualu ebu.”" 
Job1:17 Utshivua amu wakula, muena mudimu mukuabu kufika bua kumanyisha ne: “Bena Kasdime bavua bisumbu bisatu, mbakuate nyama ya tumelu baye nayi, mbashipe kabidi ne bena mudimu bebe, amu meme ke udi mulue bua kukuambila.”" 
Job1:18 Patshivuaye amu wakula, muntu mukuabu kufika, umanyisha ne: “Bana bebe bavua badia banua kua tatuabu." 
Job1:19 Lupepele lukole lua mvunde lufumina mu tshipela, ndushimbule bimana binayi bia nzubu, nzubu mmubupukila, bana bebe kufua. Mu nzubu amu meme ke udi mupande bua kuvua kukuambila.”" 
Job1:20 Ke Yobe kujuka, kupanda tshinkutu tshiende, kubeya nsuki, kudishinda mutue mpala panshi." 
Job1:21 Wamba ne: Panu bavua bandele butaka, nengumuke kabidi panu amu butaka. Maweja-Nangila kumpesha bionsu, amu yeye kubiangata tshiakabidi. Ndi ntumbisha amu kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Job1:22 Yobe kavua muenze tshilema nansha tshimue mu makenga aa onsu avua mamukuate. Kabidi kavua mujane Mvidi Mukulu ku bualu nansha bumue to. 
Job2:1 Dituku dikuabu, batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bavua bamanyisha Maweja-Nangila bivuabu bamona. Mufundianganyi kufika munkatshi muabu, umanyisha kabidi biende bivuaye mumone." 
Job2:2 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kumuebeja ne: — Udi utumina penyi? Mufundianganyi kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: — Ndi mfumina ku diendakana pa buloba. 
Job2:3 Maweja-Nangila kumuebeja ne: — Uvua mumone muntu wanyi Yobe anyi? Pa buloba kapena muntu udi mufuanangane nende nansha. Yeye udi unnemeka, ungitaba. Udi muntu muimpe. Mmubenge malu mabi. Uvua munsake amu bua meme kumukengesha kapayi bualu. Kadi nansha nanku, utshidi amu undamata." 
Job2:4 Mufundianganyi kuandamuna Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Umutete mushindu mukuabu. Tshionsu tshidi muntu natshi, udi utshifila bua kudisungidila." 
Job2:5 Kadi ndi nkujadikila ne: bu wewe mua kumunyanga mubidi, neakuele mulawu bantu bonsu bumvue." 
Job2:6 Maweja-Nangila kuambila mufundianganyi ne: — Mbimpe umuenzele tshiudi musue. Kadi kumushipi to. 
Job2:7 Nanku mufundianganyi kumuka muaba uvua Mvidi Mukulu. Kutuaye Yobe disama dibi dia pa dikoba, mubidi wende mujima kunyanguka biangatshile ku dikasa too ne ku mutu." 
Job2:8 Yobe kuya kusomba mu butu, kuangula tshiyoyi tshia luesu bua kudikuanya natshi." 
Job2:9 Mukajende kumuambila ne: — Utshidi amu ulamata Maweja-Nangila muebe muuvua amu bua tshinyi? Umuele mulawu! Umutshipe. Utue! 
Job2:10 Yobe kuandamuna mukajende ne: — Udi wakula bu mukaji udi kayi ne lungenyi to. Patudi tupeta masanka mavule kudi Mvidi Mukulu, tudi tumuanyisha, mutudi mua kumubenga bua makenga adiye ututumina mbishi? Yobe kavua mujane Mvidi Mukulu nansha mu makenga makuabu aa avua mamukuate!" 
Job2:11 Balunda basatu ba Yobe kumvuabu lumu lua makenga onsu avua makuate Yobe. Kumukabu mu matunga abu, mena abu adi nenku: Elifaze, muena mu tshimenga tshia Temane, Bildade wa mu buloba bua Shuka, Sofare wa mu buloba bua Naama. Bavua bumvuangane bua kuya kukolesha Yobe ku muoyi, ne kumusamba." 
Job2:12 Pavuabu bamutangidile pa bule, kabavua mua kumumanya kabidi to. Nanku, kudilabu, kupandabu binkutu biabu, kuelabu lupuishi mulu bua lubayile mu mutu." 
Job2:13 Pashishe, kusombabu pamue ne Yobe matuku muanda mutekete, a munya ne a butuku, kabayi bayukila nende, bualu bavua bamone ne dikenga diende ndipite bunene." 
Job3:1 Pashishe bionsu abi bimane kuenzeka, Yobe kuakula, utshipa dituku divuabu bamulele," 
Job3:2 wamba ne: 
Job3:3 Akia, Mvidi Mukulu ajimije dituku divuabu bandele, ne butuku buvuabu bamba ne: “Mbimite muana wa balume!”" 
Job3:4 Dituku adi dikale dia miidima mikole. Mvidi Mukulu kadivuluki! Butoke kabuditokeshi nansha. 
Job3:5 Miidima mikole idikuate! Divuba difike didibuikile! Ngondu ajimije nsese ya diba, akuatshishe bantu bowa." 
Job3:6 Butuku abu buikale bua miidima mikole. Kabubadi munkathi mua matuku a mu tshidimu. Kabena mua kububala mu matuku a ngondu. 
Job3:7 Eyowa, butuku abu, kabena mua kuluangana to, kabena mua kuela tunkunduluila nansha!" 
Job3:8 Bena majimbu bonsu, badi bamanya mua kutshipa matuku, ne badi ne bukole bua kutabuluja nyoka wa tshidika, batshipe butuku abu." 
Job3:9 Kabumonyi mutotu wa nkesha! Padibu mua kutshia, kabuyi butshia. Kabidi kabumonyi nsese ya diba mudidi dibanda." 
Job3:10 Bualu kabuvua bukandika bua kabandedi, kabuvua bungambuluisha bua tshimonyi dikenga bunene nenku." 
Job3:11 Tshiena mudianze kufuila munda mua mamu wanyi bua tshinyi? Bu meme mudianze kufua ku tshilelelu bivua bimpe. 
Job3:12 Mvua musangane binu bibidi bia tatu bua yeye kungambula, ne mabele abidi bua meme kuamua bua tshinyi?" 
Job3:13 Bu meme mufue kuonsu aku, mvua mua kuikala mu lukita talalaa, muikishe mu bupole." 
Job3:14 Mvua mua kuikala mulale pamue ne bakalenga, balombodi banene ba ditunga, bavua bibakulula nzubu ivua mibumbule." 
Job3:15 Mvua mua kuikala mulale pamue ne bana ba bamfumu, bavua ne nzubu yabu milengeja ne mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Job3:16 Meme tshivua mua kuikalapu to. Mvua mua kuikala bu muana wa tshituka mubutame, nansha bu bana batekete badi kabayi bamone butoke." 
Job3:17 Ku bafue bena lonji kabena benza kabidi bibi to! Koku aku, bantu badi bamane kupungila, kabayi kabidi ne bukole, badi bikisha." 
Job3:18 Koku aku, nansha bena lukanu mbapete dikisha. Kabena bumvua kabidi mbila ya badi babalama." 
Job3:19 Ku bafue, bantu banene ne bakese badi amu mushindu umue. Mupika kena ne mfumuende to." 
Job3:20 Mvidi Mukulu udi utshishila bena dikenga dituku, bua tshinyi? Bena kanyinganyinga kabena bafue bua tshinyi?" 
Job3:21 Badi bindila lufu, kadi kabena balumona. Badi balujinga mudibu bajinga biuma." 
Job3:22 Bavua mua kuikala basanka bikole bu bobu mua kuya ku bafue! 
Job3:23 Ndi bu muntu udi mupange kudiye mua kuya, Mvidi Mukulu mmuntshintshimike nseke yonsu, mundamatshishe ku tshimana." 
Job3:24 Pandi mumvue mua kudia, ndi ntua amu mikemu. Mbila yanyi ya dikenga idi ipatuka mukana, bu mudi mayi apueka amu kupueka." 
Job3:25 Amu bindi ntshina, ke bidi bienzeka! Bidi binkuatshisha bowa, ke bidi bingenzekela!" 
Job3:26 Tshiena ne ditalala, nansha bupole nansha dikisha. Ndi nkenga amu kukenga." 
Job4:1 Pashishe, Elifaze muena mu tshimenga tshia Temane kuambila Yobe ne:" 
Job4:2 Bu meme mua kukuambila bualu, bidi mua kukutonda anyi? Kadi udi mua kupuwa muaba ewu nganyi?" 
Job4:3 Wewe uvua mulongeshe bantu ba bungi, mukoleshe bantu bavua bapungile mu maboku." 
Job4:4 Wewe uvua wimanyika kulu bavua bakeba kudishinda. Uvua ujula bavua bapungile ne bujitu. 
Job4:5 Lelu dikenga dikukuata, ukadi uteketa! Padibu bakulenga pambidi, ukadi uzakala!" 
Job4:6 Bu muuvua mulamate Mvidi Mukulu, udi amu mua kutekemena kudiye. Bu muuvua muleje bantu tshilejilu tshimpe, kutekeshi mu maboku, kupinganyi tshianyima nansha." 
Job4:7 Ela meji bimpe, ukadi mumone bantu bakane babutuka anyi? Bena muoyi muimpe, badi mua kujimina anyi?" 
Job4:8 Meme nkadi mumone ne: Padi muntu ukuna bubi, nansha umiamina makenga, udi unowa amu bubi ne makenga." 
Job4:9 Badi benza nanku, badi bakeba tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Tshidi tshibashipa, tshiya nabu bu mudi lupepele lua mvunde luenza." 
Job4:10 Badi bakungula bu mudi nyama ya ntambue. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubapuwisha, upola menu a nyama ya lonji eyi."
