Job4:11 Padi ntambue ipanga tshiakudia, bana bayi badi batangalaka, bafua." 
Job4:12 Musangu mukuabu mukenji kufika kundi mu musokoku, matshi anyi kumvua anu dinunganyi dikese." 
Job4:13 Bivua amu bu tshilota tshidi tshiluila bantu butuku, tshinyanga tulu tukole tuvuabu natu." 
Job4:14 Bowa buvua bunkuate bikole. Bidimba bionsu kunzakala. 
Job4:15 Lupepele lua mashika kumpitshila mu mpala, mubidi mujima kumvuayila." 
Job4:16 Meme kumona tshintu bu muntu, tshimana muaba awu, tshivua mua kutshijingulula bimpe nansha. Meme kumvua diyi ditekete diamba ne:" 
Job4:17 “Muntu wa panu, ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu, udi mua kudiamba ne: Ndi muntu muakane anyi? Muntu udi mua kubinga kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu anyi?" 
Job4:18 Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kudiwula bena mudimu bende, udi usangana bilema nansha kudi batumibue bende." 
Job4:19 Nanku, mmunyi mudiye kayi mua kudiwula bantu badi basomba pa nzubu ya pa buloba, bana bavuabu bafimba ne diima, badibu mua kudiata bu tunkenene." 
Job4:20 Biangatshile mu dinda too ne ku dilolu, bantu badi bapita bafua, kabayi nansha babamona kabidi." 
Job4:21 Badi bakosa mionji ya ntenta wabu wa pa buloba. Badi bafua kabayi bajingulula bualu.” 
Job5:1 Ela diyi tumone, neunwue muntu udi mua kukuandamuna anyi? Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kuyukila nebe nnganyi?" 
Job5:2 Muntu mutatakane udi wasa Mvidi Mukulu tshilumbu, tshiotshi tshidi tshimushipa. Muntu mutshimbakane udi umvua lubabu munda, ufua nalu." 
Job5:3 Bushuwa, meme kumona tshidingidingi tshipeta diakalenga, kadi, diakamue meme kutshipa nzubu wende ne:" 
Job5:4 “Bana bende, kabapetshi udi mua kubambuluisha. Babafundile tshibawu ku kabadi! Kakuena muntu udi mua kubasungidila." 
Job5:5 Bivuaye mupete babidie kudi bantu bakuabu. Nansha yeye muele mpangu meba, bamunyenge bia mu madimi ende, badi ne lukuka badie bia pa madimi ende bionsu.”" 
Job5:6 Diakabi didi muntu nadi kadiena difuma mu lupuishi to. Dikenga diende kadiena ditoloka mu buloba to. 
Job5:7 Kadi dikenga dionsu didi difuma munda mua muntu bu mudi tuntolentole tua kapia tupatuka mu kapia. 
Job5:8 Bu meme ne dikenga bu diebe, mvua kuya kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kumuambila muanyi mundi muonsu." 
Job5:9 Yeye ke udi wenza malu manene, adi muntu kayi mua kujingulula. Udi wenza bishima bungi kabuyi kubala." 
Job5:10 Amu yeye ke udi ulokesha mvula bua kufila tshitalela pa buloba. Udi utuma mayi makumbana pa madimi. 
Job5:11 Bantu bavuabu bapuekeshe panshi, yeye udi ubabandisha kulu. Badi mu dibungama, yeye udi ubapingajila disanka." 
Job5:12 Udi upumbisha bena budimu meji adibu bela. Midimu idibu bakuata kayena ilubuluka. 
Job5:13 Udi ukuata bena meji mu budimu buabu. Ngenyi yabu kayena ibapetesha kantu. 
Job5:14 Badi benda mu munya, kadi badi batetuka bu badi benda mu miidima. Badi bababata bu mutu bantu benza mu butuku." 
Job5:15 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi usungidila muena dikenga, udi mu bianza biabu. Udi umusha mupele mu maboku a badi bamukengesha." 
Job5:16 Nanku bapela badi mua kutekemena tshiakabidi. Kadi benji ba malu mabi kabena mua kuakula kabidi to. 
Job5:17 Nanku, dikenga didi kudi muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu unyoka! Kadi wewe Yobe, kupepeji mibelu idi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu ukubela nayi to." 
Job5:18 Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kusamisha muntu, kadi udi kabidi mua kujikija disama diende. Padiye utapa mputa, amu Yeye nkayende ke udi umondapa." 
Job5:19 Mvidi Mukulu neansungidile mu njiwu, too ne ku diba didi dikenga kadiyi mua kukukuata kabidi to." 
Job5:20 Mu tshikondu tshia tshiyole tshia nzala, Mvidi Mukulu neakuepule ku lufu. Mu mvita mikole, neakulame bua kabakushipi!" 
Job5:21 Kuena mua kutshina badi bakujana, kuakuikala ne bowa padi kabutu kakuata bantu." 
Job5:22 Nansha mu mvita, nansha mu tshikondu tshia nzala, neuseke amu kuseka. Kuena mua kuzakala, nansha wewe mumone nyama ya lonji." 
Job5:23 Neumvuangane ne mabue adi mu budimi buebe. Nyama idi ipitshilamu neidie nebe bulunda! 
Job5:24 Mu nzubu muebe nemuikale bupole, paudi ubala mikoku yebe, neuyisangane amu yonsu katakata." 
Job5:25 Neumone ndelanganyi yebe ivulangana, bu bisosa bia mu mpata." 
Job5:26 Neukulakaje bikole, neufue nebakujike, amu bu mudibu bapole ntete ya kuenza bukula padiyi ipia." 
Job5:27 Ke malu atuvua balonge bikole; adi amu nanku. Teleja bimpe, ulonge pebe." 
Job6:1 Pashishe Yobe kuamba ne: 
Job6:2 Ndi musue bapime dikenga dianyi, bateke ntatu yanyi yonsu pa tshitempelu." 
Job6:3 Nebipite lusenga lua ku mayi manene ku bujitu. Ke pandi ngakula tshiakulakula. 
Job6:4 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, mmungase miketa. Lulengu luayi ndumbuele mu lungenyi. Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu mulongolole bua kukuatshisha nabi bantu bowa, bidi binyunguluke biela mualu wa mvita." 
Job6:5 Padi bisosa lutenda, nyama ya mpunde mu mpata idi mua kudila anyi? Nyama ya ngombe idi mua kuasa muadi padiyi ne bisosa bivule anyi?" 
Job6:6 Badi mua kudia biakudia bitalala kabiyi biela luepu anyi? Badi mua kudia mulungulungu wa diyi mutoke, kauyi muipika, wewe kumvua bimpe anyi?" 
Job6:7 Tshiena mua kudia bintu nanku to. Dikenga dianyi didi tshiakudia tshidi katshiyi tshisankisha. 
Job6:8 Mvidi Mukulu kena umpesha, tshindi ndomba bua tshinyi? Ankumbajile tshindi njinga." 
Job6:9 Mbimpe Mvidi Mukulu anzaze, alekele kundama, ambutule." 
Job6:10 Diba adi nansha meme muikale ne makenga makole, nentupike nsanka, nenkoleshe muoyi, bualu tshiena mubenge mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Job6:11 Kadi tshiena ne bukole bua kumvua makenga kabidi. Nenshale ne muoyi bua tshinyi? Tshindi mua kutekemena kabidi ntshinyi? 
Job6:12 Ndi ne bukole bu bua dibue anyi? Mubidi wanyi udi wa tshiamu tshikunze anyi? 
Job6:13 Meme nkayanyi tshiena kabidi ne bukole nansha bukese. Tshiena mumone udi mua kungambuluisha. 
Job6:14 Muntu udi ukenga, mulunda wende udi ne bua kumusamba. Tshianana, kudi njiwu ya kubengaye kulamata Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Job6:15 Balunda banyi bavua bandinga bu mudi musulu mua kudinga bantu. Musulu uvua ne mayi mavule, mpindiewu ukadi mume." 
Job6:16 Ku ndekelu kua tshikondu tshia mashika, udi ne mayi a bungi mafike, bualu mayi avua afuma ku mabue a mvula, ne ku neje." 
Job6:17 Kadi padi tshikondu tshia luya tshituadija, misulu idi yuma, mayi adi akama bua bukole bua munya." 
Job6:18 Bena ngendu badi ne nyota, badi bapuka bua kukeba mayi, kadi badi babuela mu tshipela, bafuilamu." 
Job6:19 Bena ngendu ba ku Tema ne ba ku Saba, badi bakeba mayi, baatekemena ne muoyi mujima." 
Job6:20 Kadi, badi ne kanyinganyinga, bualu bavua bela meji ne: netupete musulu wa mayi. Kadi bobu bamane kufika, kusanganabu musulu mume." 
Job6:21 Nuenu kabidi, nudi nundinga, bu mudi misulu eyi idinga bantu. Panudi numona dikenga dianyi, nudi nunkuatshisha bowa." 
Job6:22 Ndi munulombe bua nuenu kunsankisha ne tshintu, nansha bua nuenu kumbuejila bintu bienu anyi," 
Job6:23 bua mpatuke mu bianza bia baluishi banyi, bua ngumuke kudi muena tshinyangu udi unkengesha anyi?" 
Job6:24 Mbimpe, nundongeshe, nundeje mumvua mutupakane. Nanku nempuwe, nennuteleje." 
Job6:25 Panudi nubela muntu pa bualu, neateleje bimpe, kadi biakulakula bienu bidi mua kuenzela muntu tshinyi?" 
Job6:26 Nudi nungasa tshilumbu bua miaku imvua muambe, kanuena numona ne nya muntu udi kayi mua kutekemena kabidi tshintu anyi?" 
Job6:27 Nudi mua kutshinka bua kupeta muana nshiya, kumushintakaja ne mulunda wenu wa pa muoyi." 
Job6:28 Bu nuenu basue, nuntangile mu mpala, nungambile, ndi mushime anyi?" 
Job6:29 Kanumpishi, tshiena ne bualu to." 
Job6:30 Miaku yanyi idi amu mimpe. Ntshidi mumanye mua kusunguluja tshidi tshimpe ne tshidi tshibi. 
Job7:1 Bantu badi ne lutatu lukole pa buloba, badi benza mudimu bu bapika." 
Job7:2 Muntu udi bu mupika mu munya mukole udi ukeba dileji, bu mudi muena mudimu mupele utekemena bua bamufute." 
Job7:3 Ngondu ya bungi idi ipita, meme ndi amu nkenga bikole. Butuku buonsu ndi amu mu lutatu." 
Job7:4 Pandi mulale, ndi amu muoyi kulukulu. Ndi ndiebeja ne: “Ndi mua kubika diba kaayi?” Butuku budi amu bunenga, ndi ndituta eku ne kuaka too ne mudi panshi patoke." 
Job7:5 Bikusu ne biuwuja bidi pambidi panyi ponsu. Mubidi wanyi udi mutapika mputa, ipatuka tufina." 
Job7:6 Matuku anyi a panu adi aya lubilu bu lua buatu bua mashinyi a mutedi wa bilamba. Adi enda ajika, tshiyi mua kutekemena tshintu." 
Job7:7 Eyi Mvidi Mukulu, umanye ne matuku anyi a panu adi amu lupepela. Diakalenga dianyi ndimane kujika kashidi." 
Job7:8 Wewe udi undama, kuena ummona kabidi to. Mesu ebe neankebe, kadi tshiakuikalapu kabidi nansha." 
Job7:9 Amu bu mudi divuba divingutuka, dijimina, ke mudi bantu bafua, baya kabayi mua kupingana panu kabidi." 
Job7:10 Muntu mumane kufua nanku, kena upingana kuende kabidi to. Nansha muaba uvuaye musombe, badi bamupua muoyi." 
Job7:11 Ke pandi tshiyi mua kupuwa kashidi to. Bu mundi ne kanyinganyinga kakole mu muoyi wanyi, ndi amu ne bua kuakula. Dibungama dianyi ndipite, ndi amu ne bua kuamba bidi bintonda." 
Job7:12 Wewe udi untekela bantentekedi bua tshinyi? Ndi mayi manene malabale nansha mushipa wa tshidika anyi? 
Job7:13 Pandi mbanda pa bulalu, ntekemena kukola mu maboku, pandi nkeba kulala bua kupua ntatu yanyi muoyi," 
Job7:14 udi ufika undubakaja ne bilota bibi. Malu audi undeja ku tulu, adi antshinyisha bikole." 
Job7:15 Eyowa, bu wewe mua kungela kankosa ku nshingu, mbimpe bitambe! Ndi musue kufua, pa mutu pa meme kunyana, kushala anu mifuba nkayayi nunku." 
Job7:16 Bionsu bia panu mbimane kuntonda. Tshiena musue kupashala. Undekele matuku anyi kaena ne bua nsongu panu. 
Job7:17 Udi wangata muntu ne mushinga bua tshinyi? Udi uteka muoyi webe kudiye bua tshinyi? 
Job7:18 Udi umukenketa dinda dionsu, udi umuteta amu kumuteta kuyi wikisha." 
Job7:19 Kuena mua kutangila luseke lukuabu, nansha katupa kakese, bua mmone mua kumina mate anyi?" 
Job7:20 Nansha meme muena tshibawu, bidi bikutonda bua tshinyi, paudi musue amu kutentekela bantu? Ndi mukuenze bujitu anyi? Udi uludika mikete yebe, bua inkuate amu meme bua tshinyi?" 
Job7:21 Kuena mua kulengulula tshilema tshianyi, kungumvuila luse bua tshinyi? Nkadi mikolu ku tshiina, mulale mu lupuishi, neunkebe, tshiakuikalapu to." 
Job8:1 Ke Bildade wa mu tshimenga tshia Shuka, kukonka Yobe ne:" 
Job8:2 Neutuambile malu a nanku too ne ku diba kaayi? Biudi wamba bidi bia tshianana. Udi utantamana amu patupu. 
Job8:3 Udi muitabe bulelela ne: Mvidi Mukulu, udi mua kubenga malu makane anyi? Wa bukole buonsu udi mua kupanga kulonda meji mimpe anyi?" 
Job8:4 Bana bebe bavua bamuenzele bibi. Ke pavuaye mubanyoke, bilondeshile malu avuabu bamuenzele." 
Job8:5 Kadi wewe paudi ukeba Mvidi Mukulu, utendelela wa bukole buonsu," 
Job8:6 mu tshikosu, kuyi ne bubi buudi muenze, Mvidi Mukulu neakuambuluishe pa lukasa, neakuangate ne mushinga." 
Job8:7 Bintu biebe bia kale biuvua nabi, nebimueneke bu bikese. Paudi ubifuanyikija ne bipiabipia biudi mua kupeta." 
Job8:8 Ukonke bankambua bavua bamane kuikala kumpala kuetu. Umanye bivua batatu batulongeshe. 
Job8:9 Tuetu mbatulele amu makelela ewu, katuena bamanye bualu nansha bumue. Matuku etu a panu adi apita bu mudi mundidimbi, adi bu dileji didi dijimina." 
Job8:10 Kadi bankambua betu kabena mua kukulongesha, kukumvuija bivuabu balonga panu anyi? Nebabuelele tusumuinu ne:" 
Job8:11 “Ntupu idi imena amu mu lunteka. Dilenga kadiena mua kumena muaba udi kauyi mayi. 
Job8:12 Padibi bipanga mayi, bidi bidianza kuma kumpala kua bisosa bikuabu bionsu, muntu kena mua kubikosa, kukuata nabi mudimu.”" 
Job8:13 Ke bidi bienzekela bantu badi bapua Mvidi Mukulu muoyi. Bantu badi bamutombokela kabena mua kutekemena tshintu. 
Job8:14 Badi bu nyunyi idi ikeba kubuka, kadi mbayikose nsala. Muaba udibu basue kunyemena, udi amu bu lutandetande." 
Job8:15 Padibu banyema ku nzubu wa nanku, bionsu bidi biupuka. Badi beyemena butantande badishinda nabu panshi." 
Job8:16 Badi bu mutshi udi ukolela mu munya mukole. Udi muoluele matamba awu mu lupangu. 
Job8:17 Udi muelele miji yawu ne mu mabue, idi ifika too ne munda mua mbuebue." 
Job8:18 Kadi bu wewe mua kutula mutshi awu muaba uvuawu, bantu kabena mua kuitaba ne: muaba ewu uvua mutshi to." 
Job8:19 Ke mudi disanka didi bantu abu babi nadi. Bantu bakuabu nebajuke, nebangate muaba wabu." 
Job8:20 Mvidi Mukulu kena mua kubenga muntu udi kayi ne bualu to. Kadi kena mua kuambuluisha muntu mubi nansha. 
Job8:21 Mvidi Mukulu neakuambuluishe bua uleje tshiakabidi mpala wa mimuemue, ne bua wele tunkunduluila." 
Job8:22 Nanku badi bakukina nebafue bundu, bantu babi nebajimine." 
Job9:1 Pashishe Yobe kuandamuna ne: 
Job9:2 Bushuwa, ndi mumanye bionsu biudi wamba. Muntu udi mua kupisha Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Kabiena mua kuenzeka to." 
Job9:3 Nuenu basue kuelangana nende mpata, wewe mumuele nkonku nansha tshinunu, kena mua kuandamuna nansha lumue." 
Job9:4 Mvidi Mukulu udi mutupite ku bukole ne ku lungenyi. Udi mua kumutonuena mesu kabayi bamunyoka, nnganyi?" 
Job9:5 Udi mua kutula mikuna, kuyiteka muaba mukuabu kayi umanyisha muntu. Yeye ne tshiji, udi uyibondakaja." 
Job9:6 Udi uzakaja buloba, unyungisha makunji adi mabuambula." 
Job9:7 Udi ukandika diba bua kadipatuki, udi ukangila mitotu mu nzubu kayiyi ikenka kabidi." 
Job9:8 Yeye nkayende ke udi ubalula diulu, udi wendakana pa mavuala a mayi manene." 
Job9:9 Udi mufuke mbua ne nyama ne muntu. Tshiminanzaji, mutotu wa nkesha, ne mutshi mutshiamakane udi umueneka kuinshi kua ditunga." 
Job9:10 Malu adiye muenze mmanene, muntu kena mua kuajingulula. Kena nansha mua kubala bishima biende bungi buabi." 
Job9:11 Yeye upitshila pabuipi nanyi, tshiena mua kumumona to. Nansha yeye mundenge kakese, tshiena mua kumvua to." 
Job9:12 Udi mua kunyenga Mvidi Mukulu tshidiye wangata nganyi? Muntu kena mua kumukimina, kumuebeja ne: “Tshiudi wenza ntshinyi?”" 
Job9:13 Padi Mvidi Mukulu mufike munda, kabena bamukandika to. Rakabe ne bena diende, nyama ya bidika ya mu mayi manene, mbiname ku makasa ende." 
Job9:14 Padibi bienza nanku, meme ndi mua kumuandamuna bishi? Tshindi meme mua kumuambila ntshinyi?" 
Job9:15 Nansha meme mubinge, tshiena mua kumuandamuna to. Ndi ndomba amu bua mukoshi wanyi wa nsambu amfuile luse!" 
Job9:16 Nansha meme mumubikile, yeye mungitabe, tshiena mua kushindika ne: uvua munteleje to." 
Job9:17 Udi unzaza amu bua bualu bukese. Udi untapa amu kuntapa mputa, kayiyi bualu," 
Job9:18 Kena musue bua meme kueyela, kuikisha katupa. Udi untatshisha, unyingalaja bikole." 
Job9:19 Udi mumpite ku bukole, ndi mua kumuluisha anyi? Kadi yeye, ndi mua kumufunda ku kabadi anyi? Kadi udi mua kumbikidisha ku kabadi nganyi?" 
Job9:20 Nansha meme mubinge, neampishe, nansha meme mulumbulule bishi ne bishi, neamfundile tshibawu, tshiyi ne bualu." 
Job9:21 Bushuwa, tshiena muenze bualu bubi to. Kadi nansha meme mufue, bidi amu bimpe. Ya panu ikadi mintonde, bionsu bidi amu mushindu umue." 
Job9:22 Ke pandi ngamba ne: kabiena ne tshilumbu to. Mvidi Mukulu udi ubutula nansha muntu udi kayi ne bualu, nansha muntu mubi." 
Job9:23 Padi tshipupu tshifika, tshishipa diakamue bantu badi kabayi ne tshilumbu, Mvidi Mukulu udi useka padiye umona mudibu bakenga." 
Job9:24 Padi ditunga mu bianza bia muena tshikisu, Mvidi Mukulu udi ufofamija mesu a bakoshi ba nsambu. Padiye kayi muenze nanku, mukuabu udi mua kuenza nanku nnganyi?" 
Job9:25 Matuku anyi adi apita lukasa, mapite muntu udi unyema lubilu, adi ajimina tshiyi muanji kusanka dituku nansha dimue." 
Job9:26 Adi apita lubilu bu buatu budi kabuyi ne bujitu, bu mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi upueka panshi bua kukuata tshintu." 
Job9:27 Meme kuamba ne: mbimpe kupua ntatu yanyi muoyi, meme kusanka, kutua mimuemue." 
Job9:28 Kadi makenga anyi adi amu ankuatshisha bowa. Bualu ndi mumanye ne: tshiena mua kubinga, ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Job9:29 Nansha biobi bishi, ndi amu muena tshibawu kumpala kuende. Kukeba kudibingisha kudiye, nkujimija diba!" 
Job9:30 Nansha meme mowa mayi ne nsabanga wa munganga. mutokesha bianza bianyi ne wa binshidimba," 
Job9:31 Mvidi Mukulu neangele musangu umue mu bitotshi. Bilamba bianyi nebikale ne bundu. 
Job9:32 Mvidi Mukulu kena muena mulongu nanyi, undi mua kuandamuna, bua tuetu kuya nende ku kabadi!" 
Job9:33 Kakuena muntu udi mua kuimana pankatshi petu, bua kutulumbuluisha bonsu babidi, kukosa nsambu yetu." 
Job9:34 Bu Mvidi Mukulu mua kungumbushila dikombu didiye unkuma, bu yeye kayi unkuatshisha kabidi bowa," 
Job9:35 mvua mua kuakula tshiyi mmutshina to. Kadi kabiena nanku to, ndi nkayanyi!" 
Job10:1 Bia panu bidi bindukisha, tshiena ndekela kutua mikemu, tshiena mua kupuwa to, bualu ndi nyingalala bikole." 
Job10:2 Nenkandike Mvidi Mukulu ne: kumfundidi tshibawu to. Kadi ummanyishe tshilumbu tshindi natshi! 
Job10:3 Paudi unkengesha nenku, udi wipatshila tshinyi? Udi upepeja tshiudi wewe mufuke bua tshinyi? Muudi useka paudi umona meji adi bantu babi bela mbishi?" 
Job10:4 Biudi wewe umona, kabiena bipite bidi bantu bamona anyi? Wewe udi ujingulula malu mushindu umue ne badi basomba pa buloba anyi?" 
Job10:5 Matuku ebe adi mabala ku minu bu etu anyi? Bidimu biebe bidi bikese bu bia bantu anyi? 
Job10:6 Kadi udi ukeba kumanya bilema bianyi bua tshinyi? Udi musue kutandula bubi buanyi bua tshinyi? 
Job10:7 Kadi udi amu mumanye ne: tshiena muena tshibawu to. Kabidi ne kakuena muntu udi mua kunnyenga mu bianza biebe. 
Job10:8 Bianza biebe bivua bimfuke, bimfumbe, mpindiewu bidi binkuata, bikeba kumbutula!" 
Job10:9 Uvuluke muuvua mumfumbe ne buloba bua diima. Ukadi ukeba kumpingaja mu lupuishi anyi? 
Job10:10 Dituku dikuabu, tatu wanyi kubuelela mamu wanyi mu nzubu, wewe kutuadija kufimba mubidi wanyi munda mua mamu wanyi, bu mudibu bakuatakaja mabele mu luesu." 
Job10:11 Ke wewe kumvuadika dikoba ne misunya! kundamakaja ne minyinyi ne mijilu. 
Job10:12 Pashishe wewe kumpesha muoyi, kunnanga kabidi. Meme kushala ne muoyi bualu uvua mundame!" 
Job10:13 Kadi mpindiewu ndi mumanye ne: Uvua ne bualu buuvua musue kunsokoka, uvua ne meji makuabu munda muebe." 
Job10:14 Uvua musue kujikidila ngenza bubi bua umone mua kunnyoka ku kalema konsu kandi naku! 
Job10:15 Nenku meme muenze bibi, ndi muena diakabi! Kadi meme muenze bimpe, kabena bangangata ne mushinga to. Ndi amu ne bua kufua bundu, kubuela mu dikenga." 
Job10:16 Kadi pandi mbanduluka, mpeta bukole, udi ungipata meme bu nyama wa ntambue, udi unzaza, wenza nansha malu a kukema, bua kunkuatshisha bowa." 
Job10:17 Udi unsongakaja ne bantu bapiabapia, badi banjadikila ne malu a dishima, bua umone mua kumvudijila tshiji tshiebe, kunduisha amu kunduisha mishindu yonsu." 
Job10:18 Uvua mumpatule munda mua mamu wanyi bua tshinyi? Diba adi mvua mua kufuilamu, muntu nansha umue kayi mua kummona." 
Job10:19 Mvua mua kupatuka munda mua mamu bua kubuela buludi mu lukita, mvua mua kufuanangana ne muntu uvua kayi mupete muoyi." 
Job10:20 Matuku anyi a panu mmashale makese. Nanku, lekela kunduisha, umuka kundi bua nsombe talalaa matuku makese andi mushale nawu." 
Job10:21 Nkadi makasa matangila mu ditunga dia bafue, dia miidima, tshiena mua kupingana panu to." 
Job10:22 Mu ditunga adi mudi amu miidima ne tshimvundu, nansha munya kabidi mmufuanangane ne butuku." 
Job11:1 Sofare, muena Naama kuambila Yobe ne:" 
Job11:2 Muntu udi mua kuandamuna ku miaku ya patupu, idi muntu awu wakula amu kuakula anyi? Muntu udi mua kubinga bua bungi bua miaku idiye wamba anyi?" 
Job11:3 Udi wela meji ne: biakulakula biebe bidi mua kutubuikidija mukana anyi? Tudi mua kuteleja miaku iudi utuseka nayi, utupepeja katuyi tuandamuna anyi?" 
Job11:4 Uvua wamba kabidi ne: “Tshiena nshima to. Mvidi Mukulu mene udi mua kujadika mundi tshiyi ne bualu!” 
Job11:5 Eyowa, ndi musue Mvidi Mukulu akuandamune, akuambile malu buludi." 
Job11:6 Bu yeye mua kukuleja mushindu udiye ukuata mudimu ne meji mu musokoku, mudimu utudi tuetu bantu katuyi mua kujingulula, nanku diba adi uvua mua kujingulula ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ulengulula bilema biebe bia bungi." 
Job11:7 Kadi wewe udi mua kumanya malu adi munda mua Mvidi Mukulu anyi? 
Job11:8 Bukole buende mbupite bua diulu, tshiudi mua kuenza ntshinyi? Budi ne bondoke bupite bua dijimba dia bafue, tshiudi mua kushikuluja ntshinyi?" 
Job11:9 Bunene buende mbualabale, bupite buloba, bupite ne mayi manene." 
Job11:10 Nanku, padi Mvidi Mukulu ufika kuebe, ukukuata bu muena tshibawu, uya nebe ku kabadi, udi mua kumutuila nkanana nnganyi?" 
Job11:11 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmumanye bikole bantu batshimbakane. Udi mumone bantu badi benza bibi, kayi ne lutatu bua kubanyoka." 
Job11:12 Kadi muntu wa tshidingidingi neapete lungenyi, anu dituku didi nyama wa mpunde wa muitu, uvua mpunde wa pambelu." 
Job11:13 Kadi wewe Yobe, olola bianza biebe kudi Mvidi Mukulu, umutendelele." 
Job11:14 Owa mayi ku bianza biebe bidi binyanguke ne bubi. Kuitabi bua malu mabi ashale kuudi. 
Job11:15 Nanku neumone mua kutangila bantu bonsu, kuyi ne bowa. Bu muudi kuyi ne tshilumbu nansha tshimue, kuena mua kuzakala to." 
Job11:16 Kuakuvuluka makenga ebe a kale to. Neikale bu mayi a musulu mamane kupueka. 
Job11:17 Newende ne disanka dikole dipite dia diba didi dikenka munda munya. Miidima neyandamuke yenze munya wa dinda. 
Job11:18 Neusombe talala, muoyi muwule ne ditekemena tente. Neumone ne bionsu bidi bienda bimpe, nanku neulale kuyi utshina tshintu." 
Job11:19 Muntu nansha umue kakunyanga dikisha diebe. Kadi bantu bonsu nebakebe mua kukulonda mu nyima. 
Job11:20 Kadi, bena malu mabi badi bakeba bantu badi mua kubambuluisha, kabena mua kubapeta to. Bobu badi mua kutekemena amu lufu." 
Job12:1 Pashishe Yobe kuamba ne: 
Job12:2 Bushuwa, amu nuenu nkayenu ke badi ne meji, nuenu bafua, meji adi afua kabidi." 
Job12:3 Kadi meme kabidi ndi ngela meji anu bu nuenu! Lungenyi lundi nalu kaluena lushadile ku luenu. Udi kayi mumanye bia nanku nnganyi? 
Job12:4 Pandi ndomba kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua angandamune, tshidi tshingenzekela ntshinyi? Nkadi bu muntu udibu balembakaja kudi balunda bende, udibu bapetula, nansha meme tshiyi ne tshilumbu, tshiyi muenze bibi." 
Job12:5 “Muena dikenga badi bamuseka bikole.” Ke meji a bantu badi kabayi ne lutulu. Muntu udi ukeba kudishinda, badi bamuela museba." 
Job12:6 Bena tshikisu badi basomba kabayi bapampakana. Badi bajula tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu badi ne ditalala. Bukole buabu ke wabu mvidie, kabena bamanye mvidie mukuabu." 
Job12:7 Kadi wanji kukonka nyama ne nyunyi, nebikulongeshe." 
Job12:8 Nanku ebeja buloba, nebukuambile malu. Mishipa idi mu mayi manene neikulongeshe malu a bungi." 
Job12:9 Munkatshi mua bifikibua bionsu ebi, tshidi katshiyi tshimanye ne: Maweja-Nangila, ke udi muenze bionsu ebi, tshidiku anyi?" 
Job12:10 Amu yeye ke udi mulame mu tshianza tshiende, muoyi wa bifukibua. Mueyelu wa bantu mmufume kudiye." 
Job12:11 Bena kale bavua bela lusumuinu ne: “Ditshi mudimu wadi ngua kujingulula malu adi bantu bamba, bu mudi tshilakalaka tshijingulula buimpe bua biakudia." 
Job12:12 Bantu bakulumpe badi bajingulula malu. Badi balala panu baboboke, ke badi ne lungenyi.”" 
Job12:13 Kadi udi ujingulula malu, udi lungenyi lutue, udi amu Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye udi kabidi ne bukole ne meji, bidiye ne bua kukumbaja." 
Job12:14 Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mupule, kabena batshibakulule kabidi. Udiye wela mu lukanu, kabena mua kumupatulamu nansha!" 
Job12:15 Padiye kayi mulokeshe mvula, bionsu bidi biuma. Padiye amu ulokesha mvula, buloba budi bunyanguke." 
Job12:16 Amu yeye ke udi ne bukole, anu yeye ke udi utshimuna. Muntu udi upambuka, ne muntu udi upambuisha mukuabu, bonsu babidi mbantu bende yeye." 
Job12:17 Mvidi Mukulu, udi wendesha ku makasa kutupu bavua balombola ditunga. Udi ujimija lungenyi lua bantu bavua balumbuluila bantu nabu." 
Job12:18 Udi usulula mukaba wa bumfumu wa bakalenga, ubasuika muonji wa bupika mu tshimonu." 
Job12:19 Nansha batuangaji babu, udi ubatuma mu bupika. Udi unyenga bantu bakane mianzu ivuabu bapete kale." 
Job12:20 Udi upuwisha bavua bamanye mua kufila lungenyi. Bantu bakulakaje, udi ubanyenga meji avuabu nawu." 
Job12:21 Bantu bavuabu banemeka, bakadi babapepeja. Bena tshikisu, udi ubanyenga bukole buabu, bashale bianza bitupu." 
Job12:22 Udi utuma butoke muaba udi miidima, uleja patoke bivua bisokome mu miidima." 
Job12:23 Udi uvudija bantu, pashishe udi ubabutula. Udi ubamuangalaja, ubapingaja kuabu." 
Job12:24 Udi utshimbisha bamfumu ba matunga, ubatambakajija mu tshipela kamuyi njila." 
Job12:25 Bakadi benda babubuta butuku kabayi bamona tshintu. Batetuka bu bakuatshika maluvu. 
Job13:1 Nanku bionsu binudi nuamba ebi, ndi mumane kubimona kale. Ndi mumane kubiumvua, mubijingulule." 
Job13:2 Bionsu binudi bamanye, ndi mubimanye kabidi. Lungenyi lundi nalu kaluena lushadile kudi luenu to." 
Job13:3 Meme ndi musue kuyukila ne Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Ndi musue kudilumbuluila kumpala kuende. 
Job13:4 Kadi nuenu bu munudi nupanga kufila meji, nudi nufuikakaja malu a dishima. Nudi bu baminganga badi kabayi mua kuondapa muntu." 
Job13:5 Nanku mbimpe kupuwa. Nanku bantu badi mua kunuangata bu bena meji. 
Job13:6 Pandi ndilumbuluila, teleja ne ntema malu andi ngamba." 
Job13:7 Nudi nuamba malu a dishima bua tshinyi? Nudi nuelangana meji ne ke bidi biambuluisha Mvidi Mukulu anyi? 
Job13:8 Nudi basue kuditua ku tshiende, nudi nujinga kumulumbuluila anyi?" 
Job13:9 Kadi bu yeye mua kunuteta, nudi mua kubinga anyi? Nudi nushima Mvidi Mukulu bu munudi nushima muntu anyi?" 
Job13:10 Nansha nuenu banshiminyina malu mu musokoku, yeye neanutandishe bulelela." 
Job13:11 Kanuena nutshina bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Kanuena nuzakala bua butumbi buende anyi? 
Job13:12 Miaku yenu idi bu butu, katuena mua kukuata nayi mudimu kabidi to. Meji anudi nufila adi bitotshi." 
Job13:13 Puwayi, ngakula meme! Bidi mua kuenzeka, nebingenzekele." 
Job13:14 Ndi mumane kudilongolola, nansha bu meme ne bua kufua." 
Job13:15 Nansha Mvidi Mukulu musue kunshipa, anshipe, tshindi mua kutekemena kabidi ntshinyi? Kadi ndi anu musue kudilumbuluila, kumpala kuende." 
Job13:16 Bia nanku bidi bimpetesha lupandu. Bualu muena mpala ibidi, kena mua kusemena kudiye." 
Job13:17 Nanku, telejayi bimpe tshindi ngamba, nuteye matshi anu bua numvue miaku yanyi." 
Job13:18 Eyowa, ndi udilongolola bua kulumbulula. Kadi ndi mumanye ne: tshiena mua kupila to." 
Job13:19 Biangatshile lelu, muntu udi mua kungasa tshilumbu anyi? Ndi mumane kudilongolola, pandi mua kupila, nempuwe, nansha bua kufua ndi musue." 
Job13:20 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umpeshe amu bintu bibidi, bua mmone mua kuimana kumpala kuebe." 
Job13:21 Anji kumusha tshianza tshiebe pambidi panyi, pashishe, lekela kunkuatshisha bowa." 
Job13:22 Nanku udi mua kuanji kuakula, meme nenkuandamune. Nansha meme nengakule, wewe ungandamune." 
Job13:23 Bilema kabidi ne bubi bindi muenze bidi bishi? Undeje mundi mukutombokele. 
Job13:24 Udi ungela nyima, ungangata bu muluishi webe bua tshinyi?" 
Job13:25 Uudi wipata nnganyi? Ndi amu dibeji didi dipepuka. Uudi amu ulondakaja nnganyi? Ndi amu tshisosa tshimane kuma. 
Job13:26 Udi ungasa bilumbu bikole be. Udi unnyoka nansha bua bilema bia ku buana. 
Job13:27 Udi muele makasa anyi mu tshikunyi. Udi ukenketa bionsu bindi ngenza. Udi utangila too ne muaba undi mudiate! 
Job13:28 Kadi ndi amu bu mutshi mumane kuuma, nansha bu tshilamba tshimana kudia kudi musuasua." 
Job14:1 Muntu udi amu bu muana mulela kudi mukaji. Udi usomba panu amu matuku mabale ku minu, mu dikenga ne mu lutatu." 
Job14:2 Muntu udi bu tshilongu tshidi tshibaluluka, tshifubidila musangu umue. Udi upita, ujimina diakamue bu mundidimbi." 
Job14:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, muntu wa nanku ke uudi musue kukenketa! Ke uudi ufunda ku tshilumbu!" 
Job14:4 Kudi muntu udi mua kupatula tshintu tshidi ne mikiya ku tshintu tshidi katshiyi ne mikiya anyi? Nansha kakese! 
Job14:5 Amu wewe ke udi mujadike bungi bua matuku, ne bungi bua ngondu bidi muntu mua kulala panu. Muntu kena mua kusakidila dituku nansha dimue." 
Job14:6 Nanku, ulekele kumutentekela, asombe talala. Ajikije mudimu wende udiye ukuata." 
Job14:7 Nansha bobu bakose mutshi, tudi amu mua kutekemena tshintu, mutshi udi mua kusasa tshiakabidi, kuela ntonga." 
Job14:8 Nansha miji mimana kukulakajila mu buloba, kabidi nansha tshikuku tshiawu tshimana kubolela panshi." 
Job14:9 Mutshi awu padiwu upuita mayi, udi mua kumena tshiakabidi, kuela matamba bu mutshi mutekete." 
Job14:10 Kadi padi muntu ufua, kuende nkujika! Neumukebele penyi?" 
Job14:11 Dituku dikuabu misulu idi mua kuma. Muaba uvua mayi manene kamuena mua kuikala kabidi mayi to. 
Job14:12 Kadi muntu udi mufue, kakubika to. Kakujuka ku tulu tuende tua ndekelu to. Neatabale amu diba didi diulu dibutuka, dijimina." 
Job14:13 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bu wewe mua kunsokoka, kundama mu dijimba dia bafue too ne muajika tshiji tshiebe! Nenshalemu too ne ku dituku diudi musue kumvuluka tshiakabidi!" 
Job14:14 Kadi muntu mumana kufua, udi mua kubika tshiakabidi anyi? Uvua amu mua kuikala ne lutulu mu matuku atshidiye ukuata mudimu panu, utekemena too ne paudi ufika, bua kunjula." 
Job14:15 Diba adi neumbikile meme, nengitabe. Neummone meme muntu uudi mufuke." 
Job14:16 Diba adi, nansha wewe unkenketa konsu kundi nya, kuakubala bungi bua bilema bianyi kabidi to." 
Job14:17 Nensokoke bilema bianyi mu tshibombu, tshidibu basuike bimpe. Neukupule ntupakanyi yanyi." 
Job14:18 Kadi tshikondu tshikuabu, mikuna neyupuke, mbuebue neitangidike." 
Job14:19 Mayi neapande mabue, mvula mukole neanyange madimi. Ke muudi wewe ujimija ditekemena didi muntu nadi." 
Job14:20 Udi wela muntu panshi, umujimija kashidi, udi umutuma ku lufu, mpala wende mumane kunyanguka." 
Job14:21 Padibu bapesha bana bende lumu, kena mumanye bualu nansha bumue. Padibu babapepeja, kena umona to." 
Job14:22 Dikenga didiye umvua, didi anu diende yeye. Udi utua mikemu amu bua dikasa dibi didiye yeye nadi." 
Job15:1 Pashishe Elifaze wa mu tshimenga tshia Temane, kuambilaye Yobe ne:" 
Job15:2 Mudi muena meji bu wewe wakula amu kuakula, wamba bualu kabuyi bumvuika mbishi? Mudiye mua kuandamuna bibi nanku mmunyi?" 
Job15:3 Bionsu biudi wamba, kabiena mua kukuambuluisha. Meji audi ufila neakulengelele ku tshinyi?" 
Job15:4 Muntu udi witaba tshiudi wamba, kena mua kutshina kabidi Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Job15:5 Bubi buebe budi bumueneka ku biudi wamba, nansha wewe ukeba kudileja bu muena meji." 
Job15:6 Tshidi tshikupisha ki mmeme to, mmiaku yebe. Bionsu biudi wamba bidi bikusonguela." 
Job15:7 Wewe udi muntu wa kumpala pa buloba anyi? Bavua bakulela mikuna kayiyi mifuka anyi? 
Job15:8 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu mu tshipangu wela meji, uvua mumuteleje anyi? Ku bantu, anu wewe nkayebe ke udi wela meji anyi?" 
Job15:9 Tshiudi mua kumanya, katuyi mua kutshijingulula ntshinyi? Tshiudi mua kujingulula, tuetu kutshipangila ntshinyi?" 
Job15:10 Munkatshi muetu, mudi bantu bavua balonge malu bikole. Badi ne bidimu bia bungi bipite bivua tatuebe nabi." 
Job15:11 Mvidi Mukulu udi ukusamba ne miaku ya mukana muetu, muudi uyilengulula mmunyi?" 
Job15:12 Muudi ufika munda musangu umue mmunyi? Muudi upodia ututangila ne tshiji mbishi? 
Job15:13 Udi ufikila Mvidi Mukulu munda, umujana bua tshinyi?" 
Job15:14 Muntu udi udiamba ne tshiena ne mikiya anyi? Udi mua kuamba ne tshiena ne bualu nnganyi? 
Job15:15 Mvidi Mukulu kena mutekemene nansha kudi batumibue bende. Diulu ditshidi anu dimueneka bu didi ne mikiya ku mesu ende. 
Job15:16 Kadi muntu udi muena buenzayi, matuku onsu udi wenza malu mabi, anu bu mudiye unua mayi ku dituku ku dituku." 
Job15:17 Unteleje, ndi ne bualu bua kukumvuija. Ndi musue kukutondela tshindi mumone." 
Job15:18 Ke tshivua bantu bavua bamanye malu bandongeshe. Ke tshivuabu bapete kudi bankambua babu. 
Job15:19 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mubape ditunga diabu nkayabu. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabavua babatumina diyi to. 
Job15:20 “Bena malu mabi badi basomba panu ne bowa, bualu dituku dia kunyoka bena tshikisu didi pabuipi." 
Job15:21 Badi bateleja anu meyi adi abakuatshisha bowa. Badi batshina muluishi, nansha diba didi bionsu mu ditalala." 
Job15:22 Kabena batekemena mua kupatuka mu miidima. Badi bela meji ne: muele mmufuane kututapa. 
Job15:23 Nyunyi ya mikanku neituzokole, katuedi mpata! Bakadi basue kutubutula." 
Job15:24 Dikenga ne lutatu bidi bibakuatshisha bowa, bu mudi tshituilu tshia mukalenga tshifika lukasa, tshiluisha musangu umue.”" 
Job15:25 Bualu bantu aba bavua batonuena Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mesu. 
Job15:26 Bantu babi aba badi banuluisha, binama, basokome muinshi mua ngabu, benda baluisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Job15:27 Badi badiunda, badi ne bukole bua mubidi." 
Job15:28 Bavua baye kusomba mu bimenga bidi binyanguke, babuele mu nzubu ivua mishale kayiyi ne bantu, ikeba kupuka." 
Job15:29 Muntu mubi, kena mua kupeta biuma kabidi, nansha yeye mubipete, kena mua kushala nabi matuku mavule to. Kena mua kuikala ne diakalenga mu ditunga." 
Job15:30 Kena mua kupatuka mu miidima nansha. Neikale bu mutshi udi kapia kosha matamba! Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu neumuipate kule. 
Job15:31 Udi utekemena ku malu mabi, kena mua kukema padibu bamufuta malu mabi." 
Job15:32 Bia nanku nebienzeke kayi muanji kukumbaja matuku ende a panu, anu bu lutonga ludi kaluyi luanji kusasa." 
Job15:33 Nansha bu mionji ya mvinyo, idi tumuma tupona panshi tutshikale tubishi, bu mudi bilongu ku mutshi wa olive bimata bipopoke panshi bionsu." 
Job15:34 Eyowa, bantu badi kabayi batshina Mvidi Mukulu kabakulela kabidi nansha. Kapia nekabutule nzubu yabu, bualu bavua bayasa ne biuma bipeta mu buivi." 
Job15:35 Badi bela meji ku malu mabi, nebatele malu mabi. Badi badinga bantu, badidinga ne bobu kabidi." 
Job16:1 Pashishe Yobe kuandamuna ne: 
Job16:2 Nkadi mumvumvue malu anudi nuamba. Nudi basue kunsamba, kadi nudi nuntonda. Nudi nungebeja ne:" 
Job16:3 “Newambe miaku ya bupale too ne ku diba kaayi? Ndikenga kayi diudi nadi bua wewe kuandamuna amu kuandamuna?” 
Job16:4 Bu nuenu bikale bu mundi emu, meme muikale munudi amu, mvua mua kuamba malu anudi nuamba nuenu. Mvua mua kunubela panyi ne nsumuinu mimpe. Mvua mua kunyukisha mutu." 
Job16:5 Mvua mua kunukolesha ku muoyi, kadi anu ne miaku. Mvua mua kunusamba, kadi anu mukana patupu." 
Job16:6 Kadi pandi ngakula, dikenga dianyi kadiena diteketa nansha. Meme mupuwe, dikenga kadiena dijika." 
Job16:7 Eyi, bulelela, Mvidi Mukulu mmumbutule, mmushipeshe bana banyi bonsu." 
Job16:8 Wewe kunduisha, nkadi munyane bikole, mubidi mmushale amu mifuba pa mifuba nkayayi. Ke padi bantu bantangile bu muena tshibawu." 
Job16:9 Wewe kunduisha, kusumakaja menu ne tshiji, wewe kundondakaja. Wewe muluishi wanyi, udi untangila ne lukinu." 
Job16:10 Bantu badi bakula amu kuakula, bantandisha, bantuta mapi, bampenda, badi badikunguja bua kunduisha." 
Job16:11 Mvidi Mukulu mmumfile kudi bansonga bena buenzayi, mmunteke mu bianza bia bantu babi kabayi ne mikenji." 
Job16:12 Mvua nsomba talalaa, kadi Mvidi Mukulu kunkuatshisha bowa, kumpia mu nshingu, kungela panshi, kuntangila bu tshintu tshia kuteta natshi ndudi yende." 
Job16:13 Mikete idi ipepuka ku nseke yanyi yonsu, udi ungasa mikete mu tonyi, kuyi ungumvuila luse, mayi a kanyonga adi atangalaka pa buloba." 
Job16:14 Udi udiela pambidi panyi bu muena mvita, udi untapa amu kuntapa mputa." 
Job16:15 Tshilamba tshia lufuila tshidi pambidi panyi diba dionsu. Ndi nsomba mu lupuishi, tshiyi kabidi ne bukole." 
Job16:16 Ndi ndila bikole, mesu akadi mankunze onsu, mmamane kuwula, tshiyi mmona bimpe." 
Job16:17 Tshivua muenze bualu bubi nansha bumue, mvua mutendelele amu bimpe, tshiyi ne mpala ibidi to." 
Job16:18 Wewe buloba, kubuikidi mashi anyi, bantu bonsu bumvua mbila indi ngela." 
Job16:19 Eyowa, mu diulu mudi muntu udi ujadika malu anyi, udi undumbuluila, mutue ku tshianyi." 
Job16:20 Kadi meme ndi mutangile amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu, balunda banyi badi banseka, ndi ne binsonji mesu tente." 
Job16:21 Akia, udi ungambuluisha akose nsambu yanyi, idi pankatshi panyi ne Mvidi Mukulu, bu mudibu bakosa nsambu pankatshi pa muntu ne mulunda wende." 
Job16:22 Eyowa, angambuluishe, bualu matuku anyi mmabale ku minu. Ndi nya mu njila udibu kabayi batua bapingana." 
Job17:1 Ndi ngeyela ne lutatu, muoyi wanyi mmushikile munda, lukita luanyi lukadi buashi." 
Job17:2 Badi banyungulukila, badi anu banseka bampenda butuku bujima, tshiyi nansha mua kulala to." 
Job17:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi udi musue kundumbuluisha, kadi wewe mene undumbuluile. Wewe kuyiku, udi mua kungambuluisha nnganyi?" 
Job17:4 Udi mumushe meji mu mutu mua balunda banyi. Kuanyishi bua bantshimune. 
Job17:5 Badi bu muntu udibu bela mu lusumuinu ne: “Kuvua muntu mubikile balunda bende bua kudia nabu biakudia, kadi bana bende balala ne nzala. ”" 
Job17:6 Meme ndi bu muntu udibu bela mate mu mpala, badi bansaka mu misambu, banseka." 
Job17:7 Bua dikenga dindi nadi, mesu anyi adi amona bilejileji, mubidi udi mpindiewu anu bu mundidimbi." 
Job17:8 Bantu ba muoyi muimpe badi bamona dikenga dianyi, badi bakatshila. Bantu badi badiamba ne: tudi bantu bimpe, badi bakema, bamona meme bu muena tshibawu." 
Job17:9 Badi bamba ne: “Bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, bananukile mu njila wabu, badi kabayi ne tshilumbu, bashale amu nanku.”" 
Job17:10 Kadi nuenu balunda banyi, semenayi pabuipi, luayi tshiena musangane muena meji nansha umue munkatshi muenu!" 
Job17:11 Matuku anyi a panu mmamane kusemena, bimvua muele meji bua kuenza, bimvua mujinge kabiakukumbana nansha." 
Job17:12 Bu meme ne bua kuitaba balunda banyi, buanyi butuku mmunya. Ndi mumanye ne: butuku mbumane kuila. Kadi nudi nuamba ne: “Butuku mbumane kutshia.”" 
Job17:13 Ndi mua kutekemena kabidi tshinyi? — Nembuele mu dijimba dia bafue, bua meme kulala mu miidima." 
Job17:14 Ndi ngambila lukita luanyi ne: “Wewe ke tatu wanyi.” Ndi ngambila bikusu ne: “Nuenu ke mamu wanyi, ne muanetu wa bakaji!”" 
Job17:15 Tshindi meme mua kutekemena kabidi ntshinyi? Kudi muntu udi mua kutshindeja anyi? 
Job17:16 Bindi mutekemene bidi biya nanyi mu dijimba dia bafue. Tudi tuya kuikisha nabi mu lupuishi. 
Job18:1 Pashishe Bildade muena Shuka kuakula wamba ne: 
Job18:2 Kadi neupuwe diba kaayi? Anji kuteleja, nanku netuyukidilangane nebe bimpe." 
Job18:3 Yobe udi musue kutuangata bu nyama anyi? Udi ututangila bu bidingidingi anyi? 
Job18:4 Yobe, tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshikusunsula amu wewe. Amu buebe wewe, bantu bonsu badi mua kumuangala mu ditunga anyi? Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kumusha mikuna, bua ikushile muaba anyi?" 
Job18:5 Kadi, anu muendu wa muntu mubi ke udi ujima! Ndimi ya kapia kende kayakukenka kabidi to." 
Job18:6 Diakalenga diende didi dijimina. Muendu wende kawena ukenka kabidi to. 
Job18:7 Uvua wenda buludi mu njila. Mpindiewu ukadi utetuka. Malu avuaye muele meji bua kuenza, ke adi amupambula." 
Job18:8 Makasa ende neamufikishe mu bukondu. Neaye mululame, abuele mu buteyi." 
Job18:9 Buteyi nebumukuate ku tshikankanya, masoka neamukuate bikole." 
Job18:10 Disoka didi dimukuata, mbadisokoke mu buloba. Buteyi mbumuindile mu njila." 
Job18:11 Nseke yonsu, bowa budi bumukuata, budi bumuipata kuonsu kudiye uya." 
Job18:12 Yeye uvua ne bukole, ukadi ufua ne nzala. Dikenga didi nseke yende yonsu." 
Job18:13 Disama mmuanabu ne lufu. Nedimukuate mubidi mujima, dimubolesha dikoba ne bidimba biende bionsu." 
Job18:14 Nebalue kumumusha mu nzubu muende muvuaye musombe talalaa, bua kumufikisha kudi mukalenga wa dijimba dia bafue." 
Job18:15 Nzubu wende neashale munda mutupu, bantu bakuabu badi mua kusombamu. Kadi nebanji kuela buanga mu lupangu luende!" 
Job18:16 Nanku, nebikale bu mutshi udi mufue kuinshi ku miji, too ne ku matamba kulu." 
Job18:17 Bantu kabakumuvuluka kabidi mu ditunga. Kabakutela dina diende muaba nansha umue. 
Job18:18 Nebamuipate mu butoke, bua abuele mu miidima. Nebamuipate mu buloba budi bantu base." 
Job18:19 Muana nansha umue kakusangula diku diende. Muntu nansha umue wa mu muaba wabu, kakushala ne muoyi." 
Job18:20 Bantu ba kudi diba dibuelela ne kudidi dipatukila, nebamanye bivua bimuenzekela, nebakeme, bazakala," 
Job18:21 bamba ne: “Ke muvuabu banyoka muntu mubi, udi kayi uvuluka Mvidi Mukulu nenku!”" 
Job19:1 Pashishe Yobe kuandamuna ne: 
Job19:2 Nenunkengeshe ne miaku yenu. Nenuntatshishe ne mayuki enu too ne ku diba kaayi? 
Job19:3 Nukadi bamane kumpenda misangu nansha dikumi. Kanuena numvua bundu, ke panudi nuntatshisha nanku anyi?" 
Job19:4 Kadi nansha meme mutupakane bulelela, tshilumbu tshidi tshinkuata anu meme!" 
Job19:5 Nudi nuditambisha, numpepeja meme. Dikenga dianyi didi dinujadikila mundi muena tshibawu." 
Job19:6 Kadi numanye ne; Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mungenzele bibi ebi, ke udi munjingile bukondu buende." 
Job19:7 Pandi ngela mbila bua bangambuluishe, muntu nansha umue kena unteleja. Ndi ndomba bua bakose nsambu yanyi pa yoyi, muntu nansha umue kena undumbuluila." 
Job19:8 Mvidi Mukulu mmujike njila bua tshipitshi. Mmuntumine miidima bua nkebe njila wanyi mpange. 
Job19:9 Mmunyange lumu luanyi, mmunyenge bubanji bumvua nabu." 
Job19:10 Udi mumbutule nseke yonsu, bu mudibu bashimbula tshimana. Mmumushe ditekemena dimvua nadi, bu mudibu batula mutshi ne miji yawu." 
Job19:11 Udi mumfikishe munda bikole, mmuntangile bu umue wa ku baluishi bende." 
Job19:12 Bashipianganyi bende bonsu badi bunguile muaba umue, bapanda njila bua kufika too ne kundi, bannyungulukila ne mitanda yabu." 
Job19:13 Mvidi Mukulu mmutangalaje bana betu kule, nansha badi bammanye, badi bantangila bu muenyi." 
Job19:14 Bana betu ne balunda banyi, mbanshiye nkayanyi, mbamane kumpua muoyi," 
Job19:15 nansha bantu bamvua muakidile muanyi. Nansha bena mudimu banyi bakaji, badi bantangila amu bu muntu muenyi, bu muntu udibu kabayi bamanye." 
Job19:16 Muena mudimu wanyi, kena mua kungitaba pandi mmubikila, nansha meme mumusengelele bishi." 
Job19:17 Mueyelu wanyi udi wendesha mukajanyi ku muoyi. Nkadi nkuatshisha bana banyi ba munda muenge. 
Job19:18 Bana batekete mene badi bampetula, banseka pandi ngakula." 
Job19:19 Balunda banyi ba pa muoyi badi bammone, bansesuka. Bonsu bamvua mupite kunanga badi bambenga." 
Job19:20 Ndi ne tshinyanu lelu, mushale amu mifuba pa mifuba nkayayi, mpala wanyi ukadi bu wa muntu mumane kufua." 
Job19:21 Nudi balunda banyi. Nanku nungumvuile luse. Tshianza tshia Mvidi Mukulu ke tshidi tshintuta nenku. 
Job19:22 Nudi badisanga nende bua kunkengesha bua tshinyi? Kanuena banji kupungila bua kuntatshisha anyi? 
Job19:23 Akia! Meme kujinga bikole bua muntu avuluke miaku yanyi, ayifunde mu mukanda." 
Job19:24 Bayifunde ne lusongu lua ntapu, bayifikishe ne tshiamu tshifike, bua imueneke bimpe pa lubuebue." 
Job19:25 Kadi ndi mumanye bimpe ne ndi ne muntu udi ungakuila, pa buloba ebu, yeye neambe muaku wa ndekelu." 
Job19:26 Nansha mubidi wanyi mujima mumane kunyanguka, meme nkayanyi nendimuene Mvidi Mukulu ne anyi abidi!" 
Job19:27 Bushuwa, meme netumumone! Nemmutangile kayi bu muenyi kundi. Muoyi mmunshikile munda ne dindila dia dituku adi." 
Job19:28 Nudi nuebejangana ne: tudi mua kumukengesha bishi? Tukebe malu a kumufundila nawu tshibawu! 
Job19:29 Kadi nutshine muele wa mvita, bualu udi mua kunutapa nuenu. Bu munudi kanuyi ne luse, nudi kabidi bena tshibawu tshia lufu. Numanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu neanulumbuluishe!" 
Job20:1 Pashishe Sofare wa mu musoku wa Naama, kuambilaye Yobe ne:" 
Job20:2 Eyi, ndi ne tshiji, meji mmanshikile. Ndi musue kukuandamuna lukasa." 
Job20:3 Biudi ulongesha bidi tshipendu. Kadi ndi mumanye tshindi ne bua kuandamuna. 
Job20:4 Wewe udi anu ne bua kumanya ne: Katshia Mvidi Mukulu wafuka muntu pa buloba," 
Job20:5 bantu babi kabatu basanka mutantshi mule to. Diakalenga diabu kadiena dinenga nansha. 
Job20:6 Nansha bu muntu mubi mua kulepa, kufika too ne mu diulu, mutu wende kulenga mavuba," 
Job20:7 neajimine anu bu mudi bunyawu buende. Bantu bavua bamumanye nebakonke ne: “Udi penyi?” 
Job20:8 Udi upepuka bu tshilota, ujimina, kabayi mua kumusangana kabidi to, bu mudi malu adi amuenekela muntu butuku." 
Job20:9 Bantu bavua bamone muntu ewu, kabena mua kumumona kabidi nansha. Nansha muaba uvuaye musombe, kabena bamumona kabidi to." 
Job20:10 Uvua mushidishe biuma biende bivuaye mupete mu buivi. Bana bende ba balume, badi ne bua kulomba tshia pa luse kudi bapele!" 
Job20:11 Uvua mudiumvue ne bukole bu nsongalume. Kadi bionsu abi nebiye nende mu lukita. 
Job20:12 Mukana muende bubi budi busheme. Ke mudiye ubusokoka muinshi mua ludimi luende. 
Job20:13 Udi ubulaminyinamu mutantshi mule kayi ubulekela, mmusue amu kubuteka." 
Job20:14 Kadi tshiakudia tshibi atshi tshimane kubuela mu tshifu tshiende tshidi tshimusamisha munda, tshienza bu lulengu lua nyoka." 
Job20:15 Udi ne bua kuluka bintu bimpe bivuaye munyenge bantu. Mvidi Mukulu udi umulukisha bivuaye mumine. 
Job20:16 Bivuaye mulake, bivua lulengu lua nyoka. Bidi bishipangana bu lulengu lua nyoka wa ntoka, musuma muntu." 
Job20:17 Mu ditunga mudi misulu ya buitshi, ya mafuta ne mabele. Kadi kayena imupuekela yeye kabidi to." 
Job20:18 Bionsu bivuaye mupete neabipingaje kayi muanji kusanka nabi. Nansha makasa mapite avuaye mupete pa kuenda mushinga, kaena amulengelela kabidi to." 
Job20:19 Bualu uvua mulengulule bapele, mubakengeshe. Pa mutu pa kubashila nzubu, uvua ubanyenga uvuabu nende." 
Job20:20 Bu mudiye kayi mua kudia kuukuta, lukuka luende ludi lukeba amu kukeba bintu bikuabu." 
Job20:21 Padiye udia, kena ushila muntu tshintu. Kadi diakalenga diende kadiena dinenga." 
Job20:22 Amu diba didiye ne biuma bia bungi, ke didi dikenga dimukuata." 
Job20:23 Patshidiye uwuja difu diende tente, ke padi Mvidi Mukulu umudisha tshiji tshiende, mpindiewu udi utshidia ukuta." 
Job20:24 Nansha yeye mua kunyema muele wa mvita wa muluishi, lusongu lua tshiamu tshikunze nelumutubule." 
Job20:25 Udi utula mukete udi mumupatuke panyima. Udi umupatula lusongu luvua lumubuela too ne ku mutshima. Diakamue bowa bua lulu budi bumukuata. 
Job20:26 Bionsu bidiye nabi bidi bibutuka. Kapia kadi muntu kayi mutemeshe, kadi kamosha kamushidisha, yeye ne bende bonsu." 
Job20:27 Diulu dileje patoke malu mabi avua muntu ewu wenza. Buloba bumufunde ku tshilumbu! 
Job20:28 Dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ufika munda, bintu bia muntu awu bionsu, nebipueke ne mayi." 
Job20:29 Ke dikenga ne dinyoka, didi Mvidi Mukulu ulongoluela bantu babi." 
Job21:1 Yobe udi wandamuna ne: 
Job21:2 Teleja amu tshindi ngamba, ke munudi mua kunsamba mene!" 
Job21:3 Nuanyishe, nuitabe mua meme kuakula munudi basue. Meme mumane kuakula, nudi anu mua kunseka." 
Job21:4 Undi meme mua kuasa tshilumbu, mmuntu wa panu anyi? Nansha kakese! Ke mundi anu mua kupanga lutulu." 
Job21:5 Nuntangile bimpe, nanku nenuzakale, nupuwe tshianza ku mishiku." 
Job21:6 Pandi ngela meji a bionsu bivua bingenzekele, mubidi wanyi mujima udi uzakala ne bowa." 
Job21:7 Mudi bantu badi bela Mvidi Mukulu nyima, bashala ne muoyi, benda bakola, bakulakaja mene mbishi?" 
Job21:8 Badi balela bana, batuala ne bikulu, batshidi bamona ne mesu abu, mudi ndelanganyi yabu yenda ikola." 
Job21:9 Mu nzubu muabu, bionsu bidi bienda amu biakane. Kabena bakuatshisha bowa. Dikenga dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu kadiena dibakuata to." 
Job21:10 Misangu yonsu idi mulume wa ngombe wimitshisha mukaji difu, awu udi ulela kana ka ngombe kayi mua kutula difu." 
Job21:11 Bana ba bantu babi aba badi banyema bu mikoku, bikulu babu badi batupika, baja maja." 
Job21:12 Badi bimba ngoma ne lunzenze basanka, bateleja bedi ba nshiba ne musangelu." 
Job21:13 Bamane kulala panu ne diakalenga, badi bafua talalaa, babuela mu dijimba dia bafue." 
Job21:14 Kadi abu bantu bavua bambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Katuena nebe ne bualu. Katuena basue kumanya tshiudi musue. 
Job21:15 Badi bakuinyika ne: wa bukole buonsu. Kadi tudi ne bua kuikala bapika bebe anyi? Patudi tukutendelela, tshitudi tupeta ntshinyi?”" 
Job21:16 Bantu aba badi bamba diakamue ne: Diakalenga ditudi nadi ndifume ku mudimu wetu tuetu. Ke mudibu balengulula Mvidi Mukulu nanku," 
Job21:17 Muendu wa bantu aba udi ujima misangu mivule anyi? Misangu bungi munyi idi dikenga dibakuata? Mvidi Mukulu udi ubanyoka ne tshiji anyi? 
Job21:18 Badi baya nabu bu mudi lupepele luambula bisosa anyi? Peshi bu mudi mvunde ujula lupuishi anyi? 
Job21:19 Kadi nuenu nudi nuamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu neanyoke bana ba bantu babi aba.” Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena unyoka batatuabu bena tshibawu bua tshinyi? Diba adi bavua mua kumanya ne badi batunyoka bua bubi buetu. 
Job21:20 Bena malu mabi ke bavua mua kubuela mu dikenga, ke bavua mua kumvua pambidi pabu tshiji tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu natshi." 
Job21:21 Bualu muntu mumane kufua, diakalenga anyi diakabi, dia bana babu kadiena dimutangila kabidi yeye to." 
Job21:22 Muntu udi mua kulongesha Mvidi Mukulu malu anyi? Mvidi Mukulu ke udi ulumbuluisha ne batumibue bende mene. 
Job21:23 Bantu bakuabu badi basomba bimpe too ne ku lufu luabu, kabena ne lutatu, nansha dikenga." 
Job21:24 Badi badiunda ne mubidi muimpe, bu wa bansonga." 
Job21:25 Kadi bakuabu badi bafua ne kanyinganyinga kakole, kabayi bapeta disanka panu nansha dimue." 
Job21:26 Kadi bonsu aba badi amu balala munda mua buloba, anu matuku makese, bikusu bikadi bibadia." 
Job21:27 Kadi ndi mumanye meji anudi nuela. Nudi nukeba kumpisha ne nkonku yenu. 
Job21:28 Bualu nudi nuebeja ne: “Nzubu wa muena biuma awu udi penyi? Nudi mua kutuleja muaba udi muena malu mabi usomba anyi?” 
Job21:29 Kadi nuenu kanuena banji kuyukila ne bantu badi bafuma ku luendu anyi? Kanuena banji kuteleja malu adibu bajadika anyi? 
Job21:30 Padi dikenga difika, kadiena dikuata muena malu mabi. Tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu katshiena tshimulenga to." 
Job21:31 Utshidi mua kubela muntu uvua wenza bubi nanku nnganyi? Udi mua kumunyoka bua bibi bivuaye muenze udiku anyi? 
Job21:32 Padi muntu awu ufua, badi batshisha pambelu mu madilu, bamujika amu bimpe mu lukita luende." 
Job21:33 Bantu bonsu badi bamushindikija. Bantu ba bungi badi basempela kumpala kua tshitalu tshiende. Nansha buloba mene budi bupepele pambidi pende. 
Job21:34 Nuenu munudi basue kunsamba ne miaku ya bupale mbishi? Bionsu binudi nuamba bidi patupu, bidi anu bua kudinga bantu." 
Job22:1 Pashishe Elifaze wa mu tshimenga tshia Temane kuambila Yobe ne: 
Job22:2 Muntu udi mua kulengelela Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu anyi? — Muntu awu udi mua kudilengeja amu yeye nkayende padiye muena meji! 
Job22:3 Kadi paudi wenza bimpe, udi wambuluisha Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu upeta ku malu mimpe audi wenza ntshinyi?" 
Job22:4 Udi wela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ukuambuluisha, ukunyoka, bualu udi umunemeka, umuitaba anyi?" 
Job22:5 Nansha kakese. Kadi udi ukunyoka bua buenzayi buebe. Ne bua bilema biudi wenza amu kuenza. 
Job22:6 Bualu uvua mulombe bintu bia tshieya kudi muanenu amu patupu. Wewe kumunyenga tshilamba tshimuepele tshivuaye natshi. 
Job22:7 Uvua muimine muntu uvua ne nyota mayi a kunua. Uvua mupala uvua ufua ne nzala biakudia. 
Job22:8 Kadi wewe kuanyisha bua bantu badi ne bukole bakuate ditunga, bua bantu badi baditambisha bambe ne: ke muetu emu." 
Job22:9 Uvua muipate bakaji bankamba bumuke bianza bitupu. Uvua mukengeshe bana ba nshiya, muibe bintu biabu." 
Job22:10 Ke paudi ne baluishi bebe nseke yonsu. Ke padi bowa bupite bunene bukukuata diakamue. 
Job22:11 Nenku kuena mumone kabidi tshintu, bualu miidima idi ikubuikila. Mayi adi apasalala adi akubutula." 
Job22:12 Udi mumanye mudi Mvidi Mukulu mu diulu muamua, mudiye mumone mitotu, nansha yoyi minangapale mulu mule." 
Job22:13 Kadi wewe udi amu webeja ne: “Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mua kumanya ntshinyi? Udi mua kukosa nsambu yetu padi mavuba amusokoka anyi? 
Job22:14 Mavuba adi amupangisha mua kamonyi bimpe. Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kena umona bualu nansha bumue, padiye wendakana mu diulu.”" 
Job22:15 Udi musue kulonda anu njila ya kale, ivua bantu babi batambakena anyi?" 
Job22:16 Bobu bakafua matuku abu kaayi manji kukumbana, amu bu tshimana tshidi mayi upula." 
Job22:17 Bantu aba bavua bamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu atushile muaba! Tusombe talalaa! Udi wa bukole buonsu, kadi tshidiye mua kutuenzela ntshinyi? ”" 
Job22:18 Kadi amu yeye ke uvua munemeshe meku abu. Tshiena mua kumvua meji adi bantu babi bela. 
Job22:19 Bantu bimpe badi basanka padibu bamona mudibu babutula bantu babi. Bantu badi kabayi ne bualu, nebaseke amu kuseka." 
Job22:20 Nebambe ne: “Baluishi betu mbabutuke! Kapia kashidishi bionsu bivuabu bashiye.” 
Job22:21 Utue ndondu ne Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku bionsu nebiende bimpe. Ke muudi mua kupeta diakalenga tshiakabidi. 
Job22:22 Padi Mvidi Mukulu ukulongesha, witaba tshidiye wamba. Lama miaku yende munda muebe." 
Job22:23 Wewe mupingane kudi wa bukole buonsu, neakufululule. Umushe malu mabi onsu, audi wenza kuebe." 
Job22:24 Imansha tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshiudi natshi. Nansha utshiele mu mayi manene munkatshi mua mabue. 
Job22:25 Amu Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, ke tshiamu tshiebe tshia mpawungi, ke tshiamu tshiebe tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Job22:26 Nanku, neumone mua kutekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, neumujoje amu yeye ne mimuemue pa mpala pebe." 
Job22:27 Paudi umutendelela, umuteleje, nanku neukumbaje malaya auvua mumulaye." 
Job22:28 Neupete dikasa dimpe mu bionsu biudi musue kuenza. Kuebe kuonsu kuudi uya, nekuikale amu diakalenga." 
Job22:29 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi unyanga midimu, idi bena ditambisha basue kuenza. Kadi udi wambuluisha bantu badi badipuekesha." 
Job22:30 Udi usungidila bantu badi kabayi ne bualu. Udi upandisha badi kabayi ne katoba ku bianza," 
Job23:1 Pashishe Yobe kuamba ne: 
Job23:2 Tshivua musue bua bantu bumvue mikemu yanyi. Kadi nansha mpindiewu, ntshidi ntua anu mikemu." 
Job23:3 Eyi, bu meme mumanye muaba udi Mvidi Mukulu, mvua mua kuya too ne kuende." 
Job23:4 Diba adi mvua mua kumuleja tshilumbu tshianyi patoke, mvua mua kudilumbuluila bua amanye tshindi ngela meji." 
Job23:5 Musangu awu mvua mua kumanya tshivuaye mua kungandamuna. Mvua mua kujingulula tshidiye musue kungambila! 
Job23:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kunduisha muende muonsu anyi? Too, mbikumbane bua anteleje ne ntema." 
Job23:7 Mvua mua kuyukidilangana nende bualu ndi muntu muakane. Yeye mukoshi wa nsambu uvua mua kumbingisha kashidi. 
Job23:8 Kadi meme muye eku nansha eku, kenaku nansha. Tshiena mua kumusangana to." 
Job23:9 Udi ukuata mudimu ku mutu kua ditunga anyi? To! Tshiena mumumoneku to. Kadi mmusokome kuinshi kua ditunga anyi? Tshiena musunguluje bualu to. 
Job23:10 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi mumanye bimpe njila undi ndonda, kuntetaye. Meme kupatuka mu kapia anu bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshitoke zezeze." 
Job23:11 Meme kulonda amu mu makasa ende. Tshivua mupambuke mu njila ivuaye undeja. 
Job23:12 Tshivua mubenge kukumbaja bivuaye muntumine diyi, meme kuenza bivuaye mujinge, bivuaye mumfundile bua kuenza." 
Job23:13 Mvidi Mukulu udi muena diyi dimue. Udi mua kuandamuna ngenzelu yende udiku anyi? Tshidiye musue, udi amu utshikumbaja." 
Job23:14 Neankumbajile bionsu bivuaye mungelele meji bua kungenzela. Bidiye musue kungenzela bidi bia bungi be. 
Job23:15 Ke padi bowa bunkuata kumpala kuende. Eyowa, pandi mpita kuela meji, ndi mpita kumutshina." 
Job23:16 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi muntekeshe mu maboku. Udi unkuatshisha bowa, bualu udi wa bukole buonsu." 
Job23:17 Tshidi tshinzakeja ki mmidima nansha, kadi amu yeye Mvidi Mukulu. Bushuwa, ndi mu miidima, ndi bu mpofu udi kayi umona bimpe." 
Job24:1 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, kena mutufundile matuku adiye ulumbuluisha bantu bua tshinyi? Diba adi, bantu badi bamulamate, badi mua kumona mudiye ukosa nsambu amu pa yoyi." 
Job24:2 Bantu badi batentemuna mikalu ya madimi abu, bua kuiba bena mutumba nabu. Bakuabu badi biba mikoku ya bende, badi bayidishila mu mpata." 
Job24:3 Bamue badi banyenga bana ba nshiya mpunde yabu, nansha badi mua kuangata ngombe wa mukaji mukamba bu tshieya." 
Job24:4 Badi basakila bakengi ku mielelu ya njila. Badi batshinyisha bapela bua banyeme, basokome." 
Job24:5 Nanku bu mudi mpunde muitu mu bipela, ke mudi bapela baya kukuata mudimu, bakeba biakudia mu tshipela, bua bamone mua kudisha bana." 
Job24:6 Badi ne bua kuangula bisosa bidi mu madimi, nansha kupumbulula tumuma tua mvinyo mu budimi bua muntu mubi." 
Job24:7 Kadi butuku, badi balala kabayi ne tshia kudibuikila. Kabena nansha ne tshilamba tshia kudibuikila bua mashika." 
Job24:8 Mvula idi iloka pa mikuna, mmibabolesha. Bu mudibu kabayi ne muaba wa kusokoma, badi balamatangana ne mbuebue." 
Job24:9 Badi banyafula muana nshiya ku dibela dia mamuende. Badi banyenga bapela tshinkutu ku bukole bu tshieya. 
Job24:10 Badi bendesha bapela butaka. Bakengi badi ne nzala, badi ne bua kuambuila babanji miepu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
Job24:11 Badi ne bua kukama mafuta mu tshiamu, nansha tumuma tua mvinyo, kabayi mua kubilabula to." 
Job24:12 Mu tshimenga, bantu badi batua mikemu, badi bapunga ne lufu, bela mbila. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena uteleja miadi ya bantu abu nansha." 
Job24:13 Bantu babi badi babenga butoke. Kabena balue kukeba njila idi Mvidi Mukulu utuleja nansha. Kabena basue kuyilonda nansha. 
Job24:14 Patshiatshia, mushipianganyi udi ujuka, uya kushipa mukengi udi kayi ne tshintu. Padi butuku buila, udi uya kuiba." 
Job24:15 Mulume muena tshiendenda udi utentekela butuku, wamba ne: “Mpindiewu nempite kabayi bammona.” Nanku udi udibuikila kabidi tshilamba ku mesu." 
Job24:16 Mu butuku, muivi udi utubula bimana bia nzubu, mu munya udi ushala musokome kuende, bualu udi utshina butoke." 
Job24:17 Bonsu aba badi batshisha ne miidima. Bualu mbibidilangane amu ne miidima ya butuku. 
Job24:18 Kadi nuenu nudi nujadika ne: “Bena malu mabi nebapueke ne mayi. Mvidi Mukulu mmutshipe madimi abu. Kabena mua kuya kukuata mudimu mu budimi bua mvinyo to. 
Job24:19 Mudi mabue a mvula enguluka padi diba dibanda, ke mudi bena tshibawu babuela mu kandondu ka bafue bajimina." 
Job24:20 Mamu uvua mubalele ukadi mubapue muoyi. Badi babadia kudi misanda. Bantu kabena babavuluka kabidi to. Badi batshibula bubi bu mudi mutshi. 
Job24:21 Bantu aba bavua bakengesha mukaji wa nkumba udi kayi mulele, bavua batatshisha mukaji mukamba." 
Job24:22 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kubutula bena tshikisu. Padiye ujuka bantu babi badi bafue. 
Job24:23 Mvidi Mukulu udi muanyishe bua bende badiunwue, basombe talalaa. Kadi udi umona bionsu bidibu benza." 
Job24:24 Bantu aba, badi ne diakalenga amu katupa kakese, pashishe badi bafua. Badi binama, bafuba bu tshilongu. Badi bu miepu idibu bakosa.”" 
Job24:25 Kadi tshindi ngamba meme ntshilelela! Udi mua kuntuisha bu muena dishima nnganyi? Udi mua kungamba ne: udi mutupakane, udiku anyi?" 
Job25:1 Pashishe Bildade wa mu buloba bua Shuka, kuambila Yobe ne:" 
Job25:2 Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bumfumu ne bukalenga budi bukuatshisha bowa. Udi ufila ditalala too ne mu diulu. 
Job25:3 Udi mua kubala bisumbu bia bena mudimu bende nnganyi? Udiye kayi upatuila diba nnganyi? 
Job25:4 Muntu udi mua kubinga kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Muntu wa pa buloba udi mua kuikala muakane kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu anyi? 
Job25:5 Pikala ngondu menemene kayi ukenka, mitotu kayiyi miakane kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu," 
Job25:6 kadi muntu udi amu kishi, udi anu musanda! Nanku udi mua kuikala ne mushinga ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu anyi?" 
Job26:1 Pashishe Yobe kuandamuna ne: 
Job26:2 Akia, bu muudi wewe mumanye mua kuambuluisha bakengi, kabidi mumanye mua kusamba mupele wa kayi bukole!" 
Job26:3 Kia, bu muudi wewe mumanye mua kubela muntu, mubule lungenyi. Kabidi udi uleja muudi mumanye malu onsu." 
Job26:4 Kadi mayuki ebe baudi wambidila mbanganyi? Uvua mukuambile bua kuakula nanku nnganyi? 
Job26:5 Bafue badi basa mu ditunga dia miidima. Badi bazakala muinshi mua mayi manene. 
Job26:6 Bualu kandondu ka bafue kadi amu patoke kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu. Tshilamba katshiena mua kubuikila dijimba ku mesu ende to. 
Job26:7 Amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mubalule tshibuashibuashi, mubalule buloba bulembelela anu tshianana." 
Job26:8 Udi mubute mvula mu mavuba, udi mualame bimpe bua kaapandiki bua bujitu." 
Job26:9 Udi ujika ngondu tshibambalu, usemeja mavuba kumpala kuende." 
Job26:10 Uvua mufunde tshitangu tshinyungulule mayi manene, tshidi mukalu pankatshi pa butoke ne miidima." 
Job26:11 Padi Mvidi Mukulu utanda, makunji adi ambula diulu adi azakala, akatshila." 
Job26:12 Bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu mbutshimune mayi manene, malabale. Amu bua lungenyi luende mmutshimune nalu kabidi mushipa wa tshidika wa mu mayi." 
Job26:13 Udi wela mupuya, utokesha tshibuashibuashi. Tshianza tshiende tshivua tshishipa nyoka wa mantonya," 
Job26:14 Ebi bidi amu midimu mikese ya Mvidi Mukulu itudi tutela, bualu ku bionsu bidiye muenze, bitudi bamanye mbikese. Udi mua kujingulula bunene buende nnganyi?" 
Job27:1 Pashishe Yobe kuamba kabidi ne: 
Job27:2 Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, udi kayi musue kukosa nsambu yanyi biakane, mu dina dia Wa bukole buonsu udi unkengesha." 
Job27:3 Matuku onsu andi ne muoyi panu, adi Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu mu diulu dianyi," 
Job27:4 mishiku yanyi kayivua miambe miaku ya dishima, ludimi luanyi kaluvua ludinga." 
Job27:5 Tshiena musue kuitaba nansha kakese ne binudi nuamba bidi bia bulelela. Kashidi too ne ku lufu luanyi, nengambe amu kuamba ne tshiena ne bualu." 
Job27:6 Ndi muenze bimpe. Tshiena mua kuyila bimvua muenze to. Tshiena mfua bundu bua dituku nansha dimue dimvua musombe panshi. 
Job27:7 To, ki mmeme nansha, kadi udi unduisha, unkina, bamunyoke bu muena tshibawu." 
Job27:8 Muntu udi kayi muitabe Mvidi Mukulu, padi Mvidi Mukulu umunyenga Mueyelu wende, udi ushala ne tshinyi?" 
Job27:9 Padi dikenga dimukuata, yeye mutendelele Mvidi Mukulu, neamuteleje anyi?" 
Job27:10 Pa mutu pa kusamuna Mvidi Mukulu amu lelu, uvua ne bua kukeba diakalenga diende kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kutendelela wa bukole buonsu matuku onsu." 
Job27:11 Ndi nnuleja mudi bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu. Tshiena nnusokoka meji adi munda muende nansha. 
Job27:12 Nuenu bonsu, nuvua bajingulule mudi Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku nudi nuamba miaku ya patupu bua tshinyi?" 
Job27:13 Umvuayi tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mulongoluele bena tshibawu, makenga adi Wa bukole buonsu ulongoluela bena tshibawu adi nenku:" 
Job27:14 Padi bana badibu balele bakola, badi babashipa mu mvita. Kabakuikala ne biakudia bikumbane." 
Job27:15 Disama dia tshiambu nedishipe badi bashale, nansha bakaji babu, kabakubenzele madilu." 
Job27:16 Nansha bobu bakunguje nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole, bungi bu lupuishi, nansha bakunguje bilamba bivule, mudibu bukunguje bitotshi," 
Job27:17 kadi amu badi balamata Mvidi Mukulu nebabivuale, muntu muakane neangate nkanu ya mushinga mukole ayi." 
Job27:18 Bantu aba mbase nzubu mitekete bu mutanda wa mabeji, bu muaba udi muntu, udi ulama budimi bua mvinyo usomba." 
Job27:19 Badi ne biuma, kadi kabakukulakaja nabi. Padibu batabuluka, kabena ne tshintu kabidi to." 
Job27:20 Bowa budi bubakuata bu mudi mayi apasalala. Butuku, lupepele lukole lua mvunde ludi lubapepula luya nabu." 
Job27:21 Lupepele ludi lufuma kudi diba dipatukila ludi lubambula, luya nabu kule, lubumusha ku bukole muaba udibu basombe." 
Job27:22 Mvidi Mukulu kena ubumvuila luse, udi ukeba kubasa mikete yende. Badi mua kuepuka mikete yende anu padibu banyema lubilu." 
Job27:23 Bantu ba muaba udibu basomba badi babamona, badi batuta bikashi, bela tunkunduluila bua dikenga edi." 
Job28:1 Bantu mbamanye muaba udibu bumbula tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, miaba idibu basukula tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Job28:2 Bantu badi bakeba tshiamu munda mua buloba, badi bapeta tshiamu tshia kabanda padibu bapanda mabue." 
Job28:3 Bakebi ba biamu badi baya ne miendu munda mua buloba, badi bakenketa mabue, bumbula too ne mu miidima." 
Job28:4 Badi bumbula njila muinshi mua buloba, miaba idi bantu kabayi base, kabayi mua kufika. Bakebi ba biamu, badi batenkakana, balembelela ku mionji." 
Job28:5 Buloba budi bumenesha biakudia, kadi muinshi muabi bionsu mudi kapia kadi mua kubutula bionsu." 
Job28:6 Badi basangana mabue a safire a mushinga mukole, mu mbuebue ya mu buloba. Mu lusenga luabu badi bapeta tubulu tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Job28:7 Nyunyi wa mukanku kena mumanye njila ya muinshi mua buloba eyi to. Nansha nyunyi idi idiangana kayena mianji kumona miaba eyi to. 
Job28:8 Nyama wa ntambue nansha nyama wa lonji, kabiena bianji kunyemena mu njila eyi to, nansha mukalenga wa bukua nyama kena muanji kupitshilamu." 
Job28:9 Amu muntu udi ukimina kupanda mabue makole, udi usengula mikuna too ne ku tshitaku tshiayi." 
Job28:10 Udi upanda njila munda mua lubuebue muaba awu. Tshionsu tshidi ne mushinga mukole udi utshimona ne mesu ende. 
Job28:11 Udi umisha too ne mpokolu ya mayi. Udi upatula biuma bivua bisokome mu buloba. 
Job28:12 Kadi meji badi mua kuasangana penyi? Lungenyi ludi lusomba muaba kaayi? 
Job28:13 Kadi bantu kabena bamanye mudibu mua kubituila mushinga. Bualu kabena mua kubisangana mu matunga a bantu. 
Job28:14 Nansha mayi manene malabale adi amba ne: “Meji kaena apa to.” Nansha dijimba dile didi diamba ne: “Meji kaena kuanyi nansha.” 
Job28:15 Kabena mua kuashintakaja ku tshiamu tshimpe tshia mpawungi. Kabena baasumba ku tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha tshiotshi bungi bishi?" 
Job28:16 Kaena mushinga umue ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshia safire, nansha ne mabue a mushinga mukole a komaline." 
Job28:17 Tshiamu tshia mpawungi nansha talatala, kabiena bifuanangane nawu ku mushinga. Kabena mua kuashintakaja ne luesu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Job28:18 Mabue makuabu a mushinga mukole: a korale anyi a kristale, kaena ne mushinga bu wa meji. Kupeta meji nkupita kukeba mabue a busanga mu mayi." 
Job28:19 Dibue dia kalabi dia bena Kushe kadiena ne mushinga bu wa meji. Kabena baafuanyikija nansha ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshimpe menemene. 
Job28:20 Kadi meji adi afuma penyi? Nzubu wa lungenyi udi penyi? 
Job28:21 Bantu kabena baamona. Nansha nyunyi ya mulu kayena yamona. 
Job28:22 Lufu nansha kandondu ka bafua bidi biamba ne: “Eyowa, tuvua bumvua amu bantu bakula bua meji.”" 
Job28:23 Amu Mvidi Mukulu mmumanye muaba udiwu afuma. Yeye nkayende ke udi mujingulule muaba udi nzubu wa meji. 
Job28:24 Bualu yeye ke udi utangila too ne ntengu ya buloba. Udi umona tshionsu tshidi muinshi mua diulu. 
Job28:25 Diba divuaye upima bujitu bua lupepele, ubujadika, ubushindika," 
Job28:26 diba divuaye ufundila mvula tshikondu tshiende ne muaba wende, uleja makubakuba njila wa kulonda," 
Job28:27 ke divuaye mumone meji, wateta. Ke divuaye ujingulula mushinga wawu, waanyisha." 
Job28:28 Pashishe uvua wambila bantu ne: “Meji nkunemeka Maweja-Nangila. Lungenyi nkumuka ku malu mabi.” 
Job29:1 Pashishe Yobe kuamba kabidi ne: 
Job29:2 Bu meme mua kuikala mupingane ku kale, mu matuku avua Mvidi Mukulu mundame," 
Job29:3 diba divua Mvidi Mukulu untemeshila muendu wende, butoke buawu bungambuluisha bua meme kupita mu miidima!" 
Job29:4 Mvua mudiumvue bu muntu mukulumpe, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mulunda wanyi, uvua ulama nzubu wanyi." 
Job29:5 Wa bukole buonsu utshivua nanyi. Bana banyi ba balume bavua bimana bangela munkatshi. 
Job29:6 Musangu awu, ngombe ne mbuji bivua bimpetesha mabela a bungi. Tshikaminu tshianyi tshivua tshipatula mafuta, bu musulu, kauyi ukama." 
Job29:7 Pamvua nya mu tshimenga mu tshipangu tshia bakulu, mvua nsomba nabu ku tshibuelelu tshia tshimenga." 
Job29:8 Pavua bansongalume bammona, bavua banshila muaba. Bakulakaje bavua bajuka kulu ne kanemu, bimana." 
Job29:9 Bakulu bavua bapuwe, bateka munu ku mishiku, bambila bantu bua bapuwe pabu kabidi." 
Job29:10 Nansha bamfumu mene bavua bapuekesha diyi, benda bapuwa." 
Job29:11 Bonsu bavua bangumvua, bavua bangela kalumbandi. Pavuabu bammona, bavua bangangata ne mushinga." 
Job29:12 Mvua muambuluishe mukengi uvua ungela mbila, nansha muana nshiya uvuabu kabayi bavuluka." 
Job29:13 Bantu bavua bapunga ne lufu, bavua banjingila diakalenga. Meme kusankisha bakaji bankamba." 
Job29:14 Meme kuvuala buakane bu tshilamba. Kanemu ka tshintu tshia bende kavua mu tshinkutu ne mu tshifulu tshianyi. 
Job29:15 Mvua bu mesu a mpofu, nansha bu makasa a mutebuki." 
Job29:16 Meme kushala tatu wa bakengi. Meme kuambuluisha benyi mu ntatu yabu yonsu. 
Job29:17 Meme kupola menu a bena buenzayi bonsu. Meme kubanyenga tshionsu tshivuabu natshi mukana. 
Job29:18 Nanku meme kudiambila ne: “Nemfuile mu nzubu muanyi, mumane kukumbaja matuku mavule panu bu a nyunyi wa Fenikse." 
Job29:19 Ndi bu mutshi udi muele miji mu mayi, tshitalela tshia butuku tshidi tshipuekela pa matamba awu." 
Job29:20 Nempete amu lumu lupialupia. Ndi ne bukole bu bua buta budibu banana.” 
Job29:21 Diba adi, bantu bavua banteleja, bindila. Bavua bapuwa bua meme kuamba tshimvua muele meji." 
Job29:22 Pamvua njikija kabavua batontolola nansha. Miaku yanyi ivua ibuela munda muabu bu mayi a mvula. 
Job29:23 Bantu bavua bangindila bu mudibu bindila mvula. Bavua bantekemena bu mudibu batekemena mvula wa kumpala. 
Job29:24 Pamvua nseka, bavua basanka bikole, mimuemue ya pa mpala panyi ivua ibakolesha ku muoyi." 
Job29:25 Mvua ntunga mulongu wabu, mbaleja njila. Mvua bu mukalenga udi ulombola bena mvita bende. Muntu uvua ne dibungama uvua mumusambe mmeme." 
Job30:1 Pashishe bansongalume badi ne bidimu bidi kabiyi bu bianyi, badi bandembakaja mpindiewu. Batatuabu kale kabavua ne mushinga nansha. Tshivua mua kuanyisha bua bambuluishe mbua yanyi ivua ilama bimuna bianyi." 
Job30:2 Batatuabu abu kabavua ne bukole nansha bukese, bavua mua kungambuluisha ku tshinyi?" 
Job30:3 Bavua ne nzala bapange tshiakudia. Ke pavuabu bakeba tshiakudia mu metu, ditunga dia miidima didi kadiyi ne bantu." 
Job30:4 Bavua baka bisosa bivua ne luepu bia mu tshipuka. Bavua badia miji ya mitshi. 
Job30:5 Bantu bonsu bavua babipata, babalondakaja ne mbila mikole bu bena buenzayi." 
Job30:6 Bavua baya basomba mu mbuwa, mu mpongu ne mu mbuebue." 
Job30:7 Bavua badisangisha muinshi mua mitshi ya meba, bela mbila bu nyama munkatshi mua bipuka." 
Job30:8 Bavua bantu batatakane kabayi nansha ne dina. Bavua babafuta mitshi, babipata mu ditunga." 
Job30:9 Kadi mpindiewu bana bavuabu balela, badi basaka misambu bua kunseka. Badi bangela mu nsumuinu." 
Job30:10 Badi bantshina, bansesuka, banjebula. Badi bangela mata mu mesu kabayi bundu." 
Job30:11 Katshia Mvidi Mukulu wantekesha mu maboku, wamfuisha bundu, badi bankengesha muabu muonsu." 
Job30:12 Bantu bavule badi bamfunda. Badi bansakila bua ndishinde. Badi banteya bua kumbutula. 
Job30:13 Bavua banjikila njila yonsu. Yonsu wa kudibu udi unkebela diakabi. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kubakandika to. 
Job30:14 Bavua bafike bua kunduisha, bu bantu badi batubula bimana bia tshimenga babuelamu." 
Job30:15 Bowa budi bunkuata nseke yonsu. Buneme buanyi mbupepuka bu buambula kudi lupepele. Diakalenga dianyi ndimane kujimina bu mudi divuba dipita. 
Job30:16 Mpindiewu nkadi nkeba kufua. Matuku onsu ndi amu mu dikenga. 
Job30:17 Butuku makenga adi ansamisha ne mifuba mene. Ndi nsama bikole tshiyi mpeta dikisha. 
Job30:18 Mvidi Mukulu mmukuate mu tshilamba tshianyi bikole, udi mumfine mu nshingu bu mudi nshingu wa tshinkutu munganye." 
Job30:19 Udi ungimansha mu bitotshi. Meme kuenza bu lupuishi nansha butu. 
Job30:20 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, meme kukubikila, kuimana kumpala kuebe, kadi kuena ungitaba, kuena nansha untangila to." 
Job30:21 Ukadi unkengesha ne tshikisu. Udi musue kundeja bukole buudi nabu. 
Job30:22 Udi musue bua lupepele lungambule luya nanyi. Tshipepele tshikole tshidi tshintambakaja eku ne eku. 
Job30:23 Ndi mumanye ne ukadi untuma ku bafue, muaba udi bonsu batshidi ne muoyi ne bua kusangila." 
Job30:24 Kadi muntu udi ukeba kubutuka, kena mua kuolola tshianza anyi? Muntu udi mu dikenga, kena ulomba bua kumuambuluisha anyi?" 
Job30:25 Tshivua mudile pamue ne bantu bavua mu dikenga anyi? Meme kubungama pa kumona lutatu ludi bapele nalu. 
Job30:26 Meme kutekemena disanka, kadi meme kupeta dikenga. Meme kuindila butoke, kadi anu miidima kuenzeka." 
Job30:27 Ndi mpampakana amu kupampakana, katshia dikenga edi dinkuate." 
Job30:28 Ndi ngenda anu mu miidima. Tshiena mmona diba. Nansha munkatshi mua bantu ndi ngela anu mbila. 
Job30:29 Ndi ngela mbila ya dibungama, bu nyama ya mibuabua. Ndi ndila muadi pa nkayanyi bu kasonganyunyi." 
Job30:30 Dikoba dianyi ndifike fitutuu. Mifuba yanyi idi ipia ne luya lukole. 
Job30:31 Lunzenze luanyi ludi luimba anu misambu ya madilu. Lushiba luanyi ludi lusaka muyenga wa badi bela anu kasala. 
Job31:1 Meme ne: tshiena mua kutangila nsongakaji, nansha kumualakana." 
Job31:2 Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi mu diulu, undongoluela ntshinyi?" 
Job31:3 Nudi nuamba ne: “Muena tshibawu udi upeta dikenga, benji ba malu mabi badi babutuka.”" 
Job31:4 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kena umona bindi ngenza anyi? Udi ubadika njila yonsu indi ngenda. 
Job31:5 Ndi muena dishima anyi? Ndi mudinge bantu anyi? 
Job31:6 Mvidi Mukulu ampime ne tshipimu tshidi tshiakane. Nanku neamanye ne tshiena ne bualu. 
Job31:7 Pikala makasa anyi masesuka mu njila ivuaye mundeje, pikala muoyi wanyi mualakane bivua mesu anyi majinga, pangikala munyange bianza bianyi ne malu mabi," 
Job31:8 nanku muntu mukuabu adie bindi mumiamine. Biakudia bitshidi pa madimi babibutule. 
Job31:9 Pangikala mualakane mukaji wa muena mutumba, mumutentekela, nansha musokome pambelu ku tshiibi tshiende," 
Job31:10 nanku mukajanyi akuatshile muntu mukuabu mudimu. Balume bonsu bamubuelele mu nzubu! 
Job31:11 Bualu diba adi ndi mubunde tshibawu tshinene, tshidi ndumbulula yonsu mua kunyoka muntu bikole." 
Job31:12 Diba adi, tshilema tshianyi tshivua mua kuikala bu kapia, kadi kanshidisha, kosha bionsu bimvua mupete." 
Job31:13 Pavua muena mudimu wanyi mulume, nansha muena mudimu mukaji ne bualu, mvua mmuteleja, mmulongoluela tshilumbu anu mu buakane." 
Job31:14 Meme tshiyi muenze nanku, Mvidi Mukulu yeye mungase tshilumbu, tshimvua mua kuenza ntshinyi? Yeye mukonkonone bualu bujima, tshimvua mua kuandamuna ntshinyi?" 
Job31:15 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi mumfuke meme munda mua mamu. Badi bangenzela mudimu, ke yeye udi mubafuke munda mua bamamuabu." 
Job31:16 Mvua mubenge kuambuluisha bapele anyi? Mvua mushiye bakaji bakamba mu dikenga anyi? 
Job31:17 Mvua mudie biakudia bianyi anu nkayanyi anyi? Mvua mupale muana nshiya bimvua nabi anyi? 
Job31:18 Nansha kakese! Biangatshile ku buana buanyi, mvua muvuluke muana nshiya, mvua mumukoleshe bu mudi tatu wenza. Mvua mukuate tshianza tshia mukaji mukamba bua kumuludika." 
Job31:19 Mvua mumone mupele kayi ne bilamba, mukengi kayi ne tshia kudibuikila." 
Job31:20 Meme kumuvuadika tshilamba tshia luya, tshienza ne miosa ya ku mikoku yanyi, yeye kungela tuasakidila." 
Job31:21 Bu meme mukanyina muana nshiya ku tshilumbuluilu, bualu bandumbulula bonsu mbalunda banyi," 
Job31:22 dikaya dianyi dituke ku mbaala, diboku dianyi ditshibuke mu lukengibua." 
Job31:23 Bualu ndi ntshina Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kunyoka. Tshiena mua kuenza bidiye ubenga to. 
Job31:24 Mvua mutekemene kudi tshiamu tshia mpawungi anyi? Mvua mutshiambile ne: “Kuudi wewe ke kundi mpeta dikisha anyi?” 
Job31:25 Tshivua muditambishe bua biuma bivule bimvua nabi nansha. Tshivua muditembe bua bintu bia bungi bimvua mupete, ku mudimu wanyi." 
Job31:26 Pamvua mmona diba dikenka muadi muonsu pamvua mmona ngondu wenda utokesha buloba," 
Job31:27 muoyi wanyi uvua mulenduke mu musokoku anyi? Mvua mubinemeke bu mvidie anyi? 
Job31:28 Bu meme muenze nanku, bandumbulula bavua mua kunnyoka, bualu diba adi mvua muyile Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Job31:29 Mvua ne disanka pavua muluishi wanyi mu dikenga, nansha pavua diakabi dimukuata anyi?" 
Job31:30 Tshivua nansha muanyishe bua kutshipa muluishi, nansha kumulombela kudi Mvidi Mukulu bua afue." 
Job31:31 Udi kayi mudie munyinyi muanyi, nnganyi? Benyi bonsu bamvua muakidile badi mua kujadika bindi ngamba." 
Job31:32 Muenyi kavua ulala pambelu musangu nansha umue. Ku mbelu kuanyi kuvua anu kunzuluila muena luendu yonsu. 
Job31:33 Mvua musokoke bilema bianyi anyi? Mvua muyile ntupakanyi yanyi anyi? Nansha bantu bavule benze nanku, kadi meme, tshivua muenze nanku to." 
Job31:34 Tshivua ne bowa bua kudileja patoke mu bantu nansha. Tshivua mutshine kapeja kabu. Tshivua mushale mupuwa ne bowa nansha. 
Job31:35 Wampetela muntu udi mua kunteleja nnganyi? Ku miaku yanyi imvua muambe, ndi mua kuela tshiala. Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu angandamune! Mukanda uvua muluishi wanyi mufunde bua kunsonguela," 
Job31:36 ndi muwambule pa makaya ne disanka, ndi muusuika ku mutu bu mukaba wa lumu." 
Job31:37 Nengambile Mvidi Mukulu malu onsu amvua muenze, nensemene kudiye mubandulule mutu bu mukalenga." 
Job31:38 Budimi buanyi budi mua kudila, mabula adi mua kuasa muadi," 
Job31:39 bualu mvua munowe tshiyi mudime anyi? Bualu tshivua mufute babidime anyi? 
Job31:40 Eyi, padibi nanku, mitshi ya meba ne bisosa bia tshianana, bimene mu madimi anyi, pa muaba wa ntete ya kuenza bukula ya mishindu mishilangane. Ke muvua miaku ya ndekelu ya Yobe nanku." 
Job32:1 Pashishe bantu aba basatu, Elifaze, Bildade ne Sofare kabavua basue kuandamuna kabidi Yobe bualu to, bualu uvua udiunwua ne tshiena ne bualu." 
Job32:2 Kadi Elihu, muana wa Barakele wa mu tshisamba tshia Buze, mu diku dia Arame, kufika munda bikole, bualu Yobe uvua udibingisha, upisha Mvidi Mukulu." 
Job32:3 Uvua kabidi mufikile bantu basatu aba munda, bualu kabavua mua kuandamuna Yobe, bafuana kupisha nanku Mvidi Mukulu." 
Job32:4 Elihu uvua mupuwe bua bakulumpe badianze kuakula, bualu yeye utshivua mushadile ku bidimu." 
Job32:5 Kadi Elihu kupeta tshiji tshikole, diba divuaye mumone bantu aba basatu kabayi kabidi ne tshidi mua kuashila Yobe." 
Job32:6 Pashishe, Elihu kuamba ne: Ntshidi amu nsongalume. Nuenu nukadi bakulumpe. Ke pamvua ntshina mua kunumvuija mumvua muele meji." 
Job32:7 Meme kuamba ne: “Bakulumpe banji kuakula. Bantu bakadi bamane kulala panu, mbamane kulongesha bantu nabu meji.”" 
Job32:8 Kadi amu Mueyelu udi ufuma kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, utulukila muntu, ke udi umupesha lungenyi." 
Job32:9 Meji adi muntu nawu kaena afuma ku bungi bua bidimu biende nansha. Muntu udi mumanye bidi bantu ne bua kuenza, ki mmuntu uvua mulale panu bikole to." 
Job32:10 Nenku ndi nnulomba ne: nunteleje, ndi musue kunumvuija mundi muele meji." 
Job32:11 Mvua munuteleje ne lutatu diba dinuvua nuakula. Meme kutekemena ne nenumvuije bionsu bimpe, nenuandamune ku nkonku yonsu, muntu kayi mua kuela kabidi mpata." 
Job32:12 Mvua munuteleje ne ntema. Kadi muntu nansha umue wa kunudi kena mupishe Yobe to. Kavua muandamune ku nkonku yende to. 
Job32:13 Kadi, kanuambi ne: “Tudi tuela meji ne: anu Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kupisha Yobe, ki ntuetu to.”" 
Job32:14 Bidi Yobe muambe, kabiena bintangila meme nansha. Binudi nuenu nuamba, kabiena bingambuluisha bua meme kuandamuna Yobe nansha." 
Job32:15 Nudi ne bowa, kanuena kabidi ne tshiakuamba. Nudi bapuwa anu vivivii." 
Job32:16 Meme kuindila. Kanutshivua nuakula kabidi to. Nuenu kushala biname, katuyi tunwua diyi nansha dimue." 
Job32:17 Nanku ke dianyi diba dia kuakula edi! Ndi musue kumvuija mundi muele meji. 
Job32:18 Ndi ne miaku ya bungi munda muanyi indi ne bua kuamba. Meji anyi mavule adi ansaka bua kuakula. 
Job32:19 Bia nanku bidi amu bitutuka munda muanyi, bu maluvu adibu bela mu milondu ya biseba mipiamipia, akeba kuyipanda." 
Job32:20 Nundekele nganji kuakula panyi bua mpete dikisha, nengandamune muntu yonsu." 
Job32:21 Bulelela, tshiakutua ku tshia muntu nansha umue. Tshiena musue kulabidila muntu wa kunudi nansha umue." 
Job32:22 Tshiena ne tshibidilu atshi to. Kabidi meme muenze nanku, Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kunnyoka lukasa." 
Job33:1 Pashishe wewe Yobe, teleja tshindi nkuambila. Teya matshi ne ntema ku miaku yanyi." 
Job33:2 Nkadi nkeba kukumvuija meji andi nawu. Nenkuambile malu onsu patoke. 
Job33:3 Nenkulongeshe anu malu malelela mudiwu. 
Job33:4 Mvidi Mukulu mmumfuke ne Mueyelu wende, mupuya wa Muena bukole buonsu ke udi mumvuije ne muoyi." 
Job33:5 Paudi ne tshia kungandamuna, ungandamune. Udilongolole tuelangane nebe mpata, unduishe tumone." 
Job33:6 Wewe ne meme kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu tudi mumue. Uvua mutufuke bonsu babidi ne diima. 
Job33:7 Kuzakadi kumpala kuanyi nansha. Kuedi meji ne: ndi musue kukuzaza to. 
Job33:8 Nanku diyi diebe ditshidi mu matshi anyi. Uvua wamba wambulula ne: 
Job33:9 “Meme tshiena ne bualu, tshiena mutombokele Mvidi Mukulu. Tshiena muenze tshilema. Ndi amu mundi emu." 
Job33:10 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ukeba kungasa amu tshilumbu, bualu udi untangila bu muluishi wende." 
Job33:11 Udi munsuike nkanu ku makasa. Udi utentekela bionsu bindi ngenza.” 
Job33:12 Kadi Yobe ndi nkuambila ne: udi mupile. Mvidi Mukulu mmunene mupite muntu, kena mua kusangana nende mpata to." 
Job33:13 Tshilumbu tshiudi mumuase ntshilumbu kaayi? Bualu kena musue kuandamuna ku nkonku yebe anyi?
