Job33:14 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi amu wakula misangu ne misangu, mishindu ne mishindu. Kadi bantu kabena bamuteleja ne ntema nansha." 
Job33:15 Udi wakula mu ndota nansha mu malu adiye uleja, patudi tulala tuikisha butuku." 
Job33:16 Diba adi udi utulongesha malu, utubela bikole kashidi." 
Job33:17 Udi musue tudilengeje, tulekele kuditambisha." 
Job33:18 Ke mudiye utusungidila ku lufu, utumusha mu njila udi ufika ku kandondu ka bafue." 
Job33:19 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubela kabidi muntu, diba didi muntu awu usama, ushala mu bulalu, luya lukole luzakaja mubidi wende mujima." 
Job33:20 Tshiakudia nansha tshimue katshiena tshimusamina muoyi. Nansha biakudia bidiye munange bikole, bikadi bimuendesha ku muoyi." 
Job33:21 Udi wenda unyana, kabayi mua kumumanya kabidi to. Badi mua kubadika mifuba yende yonsu." 
Job33:22 Ukadi mikolu ku tshiina, lufu lukadi lukeba kuya nende." 
Job33:23 Bumue, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, neikale pabuipi nende, bua kumuambuluisha. Umue wa ku batumibue binunu ne binunu, udi umumanyisha tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Job33:24 Mutumibue awu udi umvuila muntu netu luse, ulomba Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Umulekele, kabuedi mu kandondu ka bafue to. Ndi mupete bia kumubingisha nabi.”" 
Job33:25 Ke muntu kupeta tshiakabidi mubidi mukole muimpe, bu wa diba ditshivuaye nsongalume." 
Job33:26 Padiye utendelela, Mvidi Mukulu udi umuteleja bimpe. Nenku udi usemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, wela mbila ya disanka. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu, mmumupingaje muende nuwuaye kale." 
Job33:27 Udi wimba misambu, wambila bantu bonsu ne: “Mvua muenze bibi. Tshivua mukumbaje mikenji. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu ki mmunnyoke to, mmumfuile luse." 
Job33:28 Mvidi Mukulu mmumpatule mu njila wa kandondu ka bafue. Ndi ne muoyi. Ndi mmona butoke.” 
Job33:29 Ke bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenzele bantu. Udi ubabela nanku misangu ibidi nansha isatu mene. 
Job33:30 Ke mudiye ubumusha ku lufu, ubapingajila disanka, didi bantu badi benda ne muoyi nadi." 
Job33:31 Nanku, Yobe nteleja muebe muonsu. Shala talalaa nganji kuakula." 
Job33:32 Paudi musue kuandamuna, wandamune. Bu wewe mua kubinga, nensanke bikole be." 
Job33:33 Kadi paudi kuyi ne tshia kuamba, unteleje. Puwa bua nkulongeshe malu upete meji." 
Job34:1 Elihu kuamba kabidi ne: 
Job34:2 Nuenu bena meji nuteleje muyuki wanyi. Nuenu badi bamanye malu, teyayi matshi." 
Job34:3 Mudimu wa ditshi, nkujingulula malu, bu mudi tshilakalaka tshijingulula buimpe bua biakudia." 
Job34:4 Nenku, tujingululayi malu adi mimpe. Tukebe bonsu pamue muaba udi bulelela." 
Job34:5 Yobe udi wamba ne: “Tshiena ne bualu bubi bundi muenze nansha. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena muanyishe malu makane andi ngenza to. 
Job34:6 Nansha meme tshiyi ne bualu, kena ukosa nsambu yanyi pa yoyi to. Udi untapa mputa, ukeba kunshipa anu patupu.”" 
Job34:7 Yobe mmuntu wa mushindu kaayi? Udi usendeka Mvidi Mukulu, anu bu mudi muntu unua mayi." 
Job34:8 Udi udia bulunda ne bena buenzayi, wenda mu njila pamue ne bantu babi." 
Job34:9 Uvua wamba ne: “Muntu udi utekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kena upeta tshia nsongu.”" 
Job34:10 Nuenu bena meji, nunteleje. Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kuenza bibi anyi? Wa bukole buonsu udi mua kukengesha muntu anyi?" 
Job34:11 Nansha kakese! Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi upingajila bantu bivuabu benze. Udi ubafuta bilondeshile midimu ivuabu bakuate. 
Job34:12 Mvidi Mukulu kena wenza bibi musangu nansha umue. Katshia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu kena muanji kukengesha muntu. 
Job34:13 Kudi muntu udi mumupeshe bumfumu anyi? Uvua muteke buloba mu bianza biende nnganyi? Muntu nansha umue, amu Mvidi Mukulu nkayende ke udi wenza bionsu." 
Job34:14 Bu Mvidi Mukulu mudivuluke amu yeye, utunyenga mueyelu wende wa muoyi," 
Job34:15 nyama ne bantu, bionsu bivua ne bua kufua musangu umue. Muntu uvua ne bua kupingana amu lupuishi." 
Job34:16 Yobe, paudi ne lungenyi unteleje, ela meji bimpe ku tshindi ngamba." 
Job34:17 Mvidi Mukulu yeye muikale ne lukinu, uvua mua kulombola diulu ne buloba anyi? Wewe, udi mua kudiwula muena Bukole buonsu, muena malu makane anyi?" 
Job34:18 Amu yeye nkayende udi mua kuambila mukalenga ne: “Udi mutambakane!” nansha bamfumu ne: “Nudi bena tshibawu.” 
Job34:19 Amu Mvidi Mukulu kena ne kansungasunga, kena utshina bamfumu, kena unemeka mubanji kumpala kua mupele. Bualu uvua mubafuke bonsu udi amu yeye mene." 
Job34:20 Mundankulu lufu ludi mua kubakuata mu mpukapuka, kabayi bamanye. Bantu badi batomboka, bamfumu badi bafua. Mvidi Mukulu udi ushipa mukalenga wa tshikisu, kayi nansha ukuata mudimu bikole." 
Job34:21 Mvidi Mukulu udi ukenketa luendu lua bantu, bualu udi ukonkonona bionsu bidibu benza." 
Job34:22 Miidima nansha yoyi mikole bishi, kayena mua kusokoka benji ba malu mabi, bua Mvidi Mukulu kabamanyi." 
Job34:23 Mvidi Mukulu kena ne bua kubikila muntu ku tshilumbuluilu, kumulumbuluisha mutantshi mule nansha." 
Job34:24 Udi umusha bakalenga kayi nansha ulondolola malu, udi upingaja bakuabu pa miaba yabu." 
Job34:25 Bualu udi mumanye bionsu bidibu benza. Nanku udi mua kubatonkola butuku, nansha kubazaza mene." 
Job34:26 Udi ubashipa bu bena tshibawu, bantu bonsu batangile." 
Job34:27 Bualu bantu abu bavua bamubenge, balengulula mikenji yende yonsu." 
Job34:28 Bu muvuabu bakengesha bakengi ne bapeta, bobu abu bavua bela mbila kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua abambuluishe. Nanku, Mvidi Mukulu kumvua mbila ayi." 
Job34:29 Kadi padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi unyoka muntu, udi mua kumupisha nnganyi? Yeye musue kusokoma, udi mua kumumona nnganyi?" 
Job34:30 Padi Mvidi Mukulu musue bua muntu mubi wa tshikisu, ashale mukalenga wabu, tshidi bena matunga mua kuenza ntshinyi?" 
Job34:31 Muntu udi mua kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Mvua mutupakane. Tshiena musue kuenza kabidi bibi to. 
Job34:32 Undeje bilema bindi tshiyi mumone meme, meme muenze bibi, tshiena mua kuenzulula kabidi to.”" 
Job34:33 Muntu wa nanku, Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bua kumunyoka anyi? Bu muudi wewe ubipisha Mvidi Mukulu, udi anu musue bua amunyoke anyi? Udi ne bua kuandamuna ku lukonku elu, ki mmeme nansha, kadi anu wewe. Nanku utuambile meji audi nawu pa bualu ebu." 
Job34:34 Bantu ba meji, badi bitaba tshindi ngamba. Badi bateleja bamanya malu, nebanyishe miaku yanyi ya ne:" 
Job34:35 “Yobe udi wakula kayi mumanye bualu. Miaku yende nya tshianana. 
Job34:36 Nutete anu bidiye wamba, nenumone ne udi wakula anu bu bantu babi." 
Job34:37 Yeye mumane kuenza bibi, ukadi utombokela kabidi Mvidi Mukulu, munkatshi muetu ukadi ujula mpata, bualu udi uluisha amu kuluisha Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Job35:1 Elihu kuamba kabidi ne: 
Job35:2 Yobe, paudi wambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: tshiena ne bualu, udi wenza bimpe anyi?" 
Job35:3 Wewe udi umukonka ne: nansha meme tshiyi ne bualu, bidi bindengelela ku tshinyi? Meme kabidi ndi mpeta tshinyi?" 
Job35:4 Nanku, meme nenkuandamune ku lukonku elu. Nengandamune kabidi ya balunda bebe." 
Job35:5 Ujoje mavuba, utangile tshibuashibuashi, kabiena bikupite ku bule anyi?" 
Job35:6 Paudi wenza bibi udi ukengesha Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Bilema biebe bionsu bipite bungi, bidi bimuenzela tshinyi? Tshintu nansha tshimue." 
Job35:7 Paudi wenza bimpe, udi wambuluisha Mvidi Mukulu anyi? Tshidiye upeta kuudi ntshinyi?" 
Job35:8 Bimpe nansha bibi biudi wenza, bidi biambuluisha nansha bikengesha anu bantu nebe." 
Job35:9 Padi bena tshikisu babakengesha bikole, bantu badi batua mikemu. Badi bela mbila bua bantu babambuluishe." 
Job35:10 Kadi muntu nansha umue kena ukonka ne: “Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumfuke udi penyi? Yeye udi utuimbisha misambu nansha butuku. 
Job35:11 Udi utulongesha mudiye kayi ulongesha nyama. Udi utupa meji adi nyunyi kayiyi nawu. ” 
Job35:12 Badi balomba diambuluisha bua kuluisha bena ditambisha, bantu babi. Kadi kena ututeleja nansha." 
Job35:13 Nansha tuetu bela mbila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu kena utumvua, kena ututeleja ne ntema to." 
Job35:14 Wewe Yobe, udi wamba ne: tshiena mumone Mvidi Mukulu to. Kadi indila katupa, tshilumbu tshiebe tshikadi kumpala kuende." 
Job35:15 Udi wela meji, nansha yeye ne tshiji, kena mua kukunyoka, kabidi kena ulondolola bibi bidi bantu benza anyi?" 
Job35:16 Kadi biudi wewe Yobe wamba, bidi amu bia patupu, bidi bimueneka ne udi wakula amu kuakula, kuyi mumanye malu audi wamba." 
Job36:1 Elihu kuamba kabidi ne: 
Job36:2 Yobe umfuile luse nkumvuije kabidi, amue malu adi atangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Job36:3 Bantu badi kule bavua bangambila bindi ndongesha, bua mmone mua kubingisha Mvidi Mukulu Mumfuki wanyi." 
Job36:4 Bulelela miaku yanyi ki nya dishima to. Udi kumpala kuebe mmuntu muakane. 
Job36:5 Nansha Mvidi Mukulu ne bukole bupite, kena upetula muntu to. Udi Mfumu muena diyi dimue." 
Job36:6 Udi ushipa bantu babi. Udi wenzela bapela bimpe. 
Job36:7 Udi ulama badi bamulamate. Bakalenga badi mu nkuasa wa bumfumu, Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mubatekemu, bua bukalenga buabu bunenge. Kadi badi baditambisha." 
Job36:8 Ke mudibu babakuata, babasuika nkanu, babuela mu dikenga." 
Job36:9 Mvidi Mukulu udi ubaleja nanku muvuabu benze bibi, baditambisha, bamutombokela." 
Job36:10 Udi ubabela bua bumvue malu, ubambila bua balekele kuenza malu mabi." 
Job36:11 Bobu bitabe, batumikila Mvidi Mukulu, nebikale ne diakalenga, kabidi ne disanka dinene, too ne mudibu bafua." 
Job36:12 Kadi padibu babenga kumuitaba, nebapitshile amu mu njila wa ku kandondu ka bafue. Nebabutuke bualu bavua bapange meji." 
Job36:13 Bantu badi babenga Mvidi Mukulu, badi bamufikisha munda, kabena bamusengelela nansha yeye mubanyoke." 
Job36:14 Badi bafua ne buana buabu bonsu. Badi bajimina mu bubi batshikale bansongalume. 
Job36:15 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi uteleja bakengi mu dikenga didibu bumvua. Udi ubabela mu ntatu idibu nayi. 
Job36:16 Kale, Mvidi Mukulu uvua mukumushe mu dikenga, mukupeshe disanka dinene. Pa mesa ebe pavua biakudia bisheme." 
Job36:17 Kadi mpindiewu badi bakunyoke bua bubi buebe. Tshilumbu ntshikukuate. 
Job36:18 Tshiji katshikufikishi ku buntomboji. Katshikueleshi meji a kudisungidila ku biuma. 
Job36:19 Nansha biuma biebe, nansha tshiamu tshiebe tshia mpawungi, nansha bukole buudi nabu, kabiena bikumbane bua kujikija dikenga diebe." 
Job36:20 Kujingi butuku budi bujimija bisamba bia bantu. 
Job36:21 Kadi kupinganyi ku malu mabi, bualu ke avua makukebele dikenga." 
Job36:22 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu mmuena bukole buonsu. Udi ulongesha mudiye yeye ulongesha nnganyi?" 
Job36:23 Udi ne bua kumuambila tshidiye ne bua kuenza nnganyi? Udi mua kumuamba ne: “Uvua muenze bibi” nnganyi? 
Job36:24 Kadi kupu muoyi bua kumutumbisha bua bionsu bidiye muenze, mudi bantu bonsu bamutumbisha ne misambu." 
Job36:25 Bantu bonsu badi bamone bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenze, kadi badi babitangile amu pa bule." 
Job36:26 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu mmunene. Katuena mua kujingulula bunene buende. Kabena mua kubadika bidimu biende to." 
Job36:27 Udi ukoka mayi adi pa buloba afika mulu, andamuka mvula, udi uloka panshi." 
Job36:28 Mavuba adi alokesha mvula miaba yonsu idi bantu basombe. 
Job36:29 Udi mua kujingulula mudi mavuba atangalaka, mudi makubakuba adila mu diulu nnganyi?" 
Job36:30 Amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi utuma mikenyi ya mvula, panshi pa mayi manene mpashale anu pafike." 
Job36:31 Padi Mvidi Mukulu ulokesha mvula, udi ukuba bantu, ubapesha biakudia bivule." 
Job36:32 Udi wangata mikenya mu bianza biende, udi uyasa padiye musue." 
Job36:33 Mukungulu wa mvula udi utumanyisha ne mvula udiku. Nansha nyama idi imanya kabidi ne mvula ukadi pabuipi. 
Job37:1 Pandi mmona bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu, muoyi wanyi udi utuuta munda bikole, ukeba kutuka." 
Job37:2 Telejayi, telejayi, mudi diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu dikungula, mudi makubakuba apatukila mukana muende." 
Job37:3 Mvidi Mukulu udi utuma mikenya ya mvula, idi ifika ku ntengu yonsu ya buloba." 
Job37:4 Mukungulu wa mvula udi ulonda mikenya, udi utuma tshiona tshikole, diakamue Mvidi Mukulu udi upenyisha mikenya mikuabu." 
Job37:5 Tshiona tshikole tshidi tshikemesha bantu, bualu ntshishima tshidibu kabayi mua kujingulula." 
Job37:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi utumina mvula wa mabue diyi ne: “Uloke pa buloba.” Udi ulokesha mvula mukole, nansha wa tshipupu mene." 
Job37:7 Udi upumbisha bantu bua kuenza mudimu, bua bantu bonsu bakeme mudimu udiye yeye ukuata." 
Job37:8 Nansha nyama idi ibuela mu bisokomenu biayi, ishalamu misokome munda mua buloba." 
Job37:9 Mvunde mukole udi umuka kuinshi kua ditunga. Lupepele lua mashika ludi lufuma ku mutu kuadi. 
Job37:10 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wandamuna mayi, enza mabue a mashika, mayi aa adi akola bu tshiamu." 
Job37:11 Mvidi Mukulu udi uwuja mavuba ne mayi, watuma ne mikenya ya mvula munda muawu." 
Job37:12 Ke mudiye watangalaja eku ne eku, bua akumbaje bionsu bidiye musue mu matunga onsu a pa buloba." 
Job37:13 Mvidi Mukulu udi ukumbaja tshidiye musue pa buloba, nansha bua kunyoka muntu, nansha bua kumuenzela bimpe." 
Job37:14 Yobe, bionsu ebi ubiteleje ne ntema. Juka, utangile malu a dikema adi Mvidi Mukulu muenze." 
Job37:15 Udi mumanye mudi Mvidi Mukulu ulombola bionsu ebi anyi? Udi mujingulule mudi mavuba ela mikenya anyi? 
Job37:16 Udi mumanye mudi mavuba malembelele mulu anyi? Amu udi mumanye bionsu, ke udi mua kuenza tshishima tshia nanku." 
Job37:17 Wewe, padi lupepele lufuma kuinshi kua ditunga lutuuta, luya ludi lukutonda. Udi ukeba kuvula bilamba." 
Job37:18 Nanku wewe uvua mua kuambuluisha Mvidi Mukulu, diba divuaye mufuke tshibuashibuashi tshikole bu lumuenu, luenza ne tshiamu anyi?" 
Job37:19 Utumanyishe tshitudi mua kuambila Mvidi Mukulu. Katuena natshi. Mu mutu muetu mudi mutupu. 
Job37:20 Pandi nyukila, badi ne bua kumumanyisha anyi? Badi ne bua kumuambila ne: kampanda uvua muakule anyi?" 
Job37:21 Misangu mivule kulu kudi kufika, mavuba adi asokoka diba. Kadi diakamue, lupepele ludi mua kujuka kutokesha diulu." 
Job37:22 Butoke budi bukenka, bufuma ku mutu kua ditunga. Lumu lua Mvidi Mukulu ludi lutukuatshisha bowa." 
Job37:23 Mvidi Mukulu mmuena bukole buonsu. Katuena mua kusemena pabuipi nende. Udi munene. Bidiye wenza bionsu bidi bimpe. Kena ukengesha muntu. Tshidiye ne bua kutuambila ntshinyi? 
Job37:24 Ke mudi bantu ne bua kumutshina. Kadi bonsu badi baditambisha ne tudi bena meji, kena ubamona, kena nabu bualu." 
Job38:1 Munkatshi mua tshipepele tshikole, Maweja-Nangila kubikila Yobe ku mukonka ne:" 
Job38:2 Wewe udi nganyi? Muudi wela mpata pa malu andi ndongesha mbishi? Muudi wakula pa malu audi kuyi mujingulule mmunyi? 
Job38:3 Kadi bidi amu bimpe, juka, uleje muudi kalume ka mukaba, nenkuele lukonku bua ungandamune." 
Job38:4 Diba dimvua mufuke buloba uvua penyi? Neudi mumanye ngambile tumone? 
Job38:5 Uvua mujadike bule ne butshiama buabu nnganyi? Nansha uvua mubupime ne muonji andamune tumone. 
Job38:6 Makunji adi mabuimanyika mmasa pa tshinyi? Uvua muteke dibue mu ditumba diabu nnganyi? 
Job38:7 Dituku adi mitotu ya nkesha ivua imba misambu pamue. Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu bavua basanka bela tunkunduluila. 
Job38:8 Uvua mukangile mavuala a mayi manene biibi, pavuawu apatuka ne bukole mu buloba nnganyi?" 
Job38:9 Amu meme ke uvua mubuikile mayi manene ne mavuba, muajingile ne dibungi dikole." 
Job38:10 Mvua muelele nkila, mualeje mikalu, muajikile njila ne biibi bikanga ne bikuvu." 
Job38:11 Meme kuambila mayi manene ne: “Neupueke too ne apa. Kusabuki kuaka nansha. Mavuala ebe adi adiela mulu awu, neimane apa. ”" 
Job38:12 Dituku kayi, diukadi muelele diba mukenji ne patuka? Nansha kabundubundu ne juka." 
Job38:13 Ukadi mutume kabundubundu, bua kanyungishe buloba ku ntengu yabu yonsu, bua kele bantu babi bonsu panshi anyi?" 
Job38:14 Munya udi umuesha mikuna minene ne mikese, anu bu padibu batua tshitampi pa diima, nansha bu mudi mufudi ku tshilamba." 
Job38:15 Kadi bantu babi kabena bamona butoke to, bualu budi bubakandika bua kabenji kabidi bibi." 
Job38:16 Ukadi mufike ku mpokolu ya mayi manene anyi? Ukadi muende panshi pa mayi manene anyi? 
Job38:17 Bakadi bakuleja tshiibi tshia mu kandondu ka bafue, muaba udi miidima kashidi anyi?" 
Job38:18 Ukadi mumanyeku kakese bule ne butshiama bua buloba anyi? Ungandamune bualu udi mumanye malu onsu. 
Job38:19 Udi mumanye muaba udi butoke busombe anyi? Nansha kaba kadibu mua kupeta miidima anyi? 
Job38:20 Uvua mua kubishindikija mu luendu lujima, kupingana nabi muaba udibi bisomba." 
Job38:21 Wewe udi mua kumanya bionsu abi, bualu bakavua bakulela diba divuabu bafuke buloba. Bidimu biebe mbipite bungi." 
Job38:22 Ukadi mufike mu mayeba, miaba indi ndama neje ne mabue a mvula anyi?" 
Job38:23 Mvua mubilamine mu tshikondu tshia makenga, bua matuku a mvita ne a ndululu." 
Job38:24 Udi mumanye njila udi butoke bulonda, bua kufika kutudi anyi? Mudi lupepele lufuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila, lutangila pa buloba anyi?" 
Job38:25 Udi muenzele mvula mukidi mu diulu, mupandile makubakuba ne mikenya ya mvula njila nnganyi?" 
Job38:26 Uvua mulokeshe mvula mu buloba budi bantu kabayi base, mu tshipele tshidi munda mutupu nnganyi?" 
Job38:27 Udi mua kubolesha buloba mu miaba miatuke, bua kutolokesha mashinda ne kumenesha bisosa nnganyi?" 
Job38:28 Mvula udi ne tatuende anyi? Lumuma bavua balulela anyi? 
Job38:29 Mamuende wa mabue a mvula nnganyi? Udi mulele mayi a mu diulu adi makuatakane nnganyi? 
Job38:30 Padiku mashika makole, mayi adi akuatakana, akola bu dibue, badi mua kuenda pa mutu pawu." 
Job38:31 Tangila mitotu. Udi mua kusuika tshidimina nzaji, kutulakaja mbua, nyama ne muntu anyi?" 
Job38:32 Udi mua kuleja mitotu tshikondu ne tshikondu tshiayi anyi? Udi mua kuludika ditempu dinene ne dikese anyi? 
Job38:33 Udi mumanye mikenji idi diulu ditumikila anyi? Wewe udi mumanye bulongolodi bua buloba anyi? 
Job38:34 Amu wewe wela lubila lukole, mavuba alokesha mvula wa bungi, akubolesha anyi?" 
Job38:35 Padi mikenya ya mvula yumuka, wewe ke udi uyituma anyi? Idi ikuambila ne: “Tudi tukumbaja diyi diebe” anyi?" 
Job38:36 Uvua muambile nyunyi wa ibise ne musulu wa Nile newuwule nnganyi? Udi mumanyishe nzolu wa tshitala ne mvula nealoke nnganyi? 
Job38:37 Udi mua kubala mavuba nnganyi? Udi mua kuitshikija mayi adi mu nyingu ya mulu udiku anyi? 
Job38:38 Diba adi, buloba bume bua lupuishi nebukuatakane, bua kuenza mabuwa mu madimi." 
Job38:39 Udi ukebela mukaji wa nyama wa ntambue tshiakudia ngwewe anyi? Udi mua kutuyisha nzala ya bana bende," 
Job38:40 padibu basombe mu miaba yabu, balamine mu tshipuka anyi?" 
Job38:41 Udi uvuluka tshiakudia tshia tshikololu, diba didi tuana tuatshi tupange tshiakudia, tulomba diambuluisha kudi Mvidi Mukulu nnganyi?" 
Job39:1 Udi mumanye diba didi mbuji ya pa mikuna ilela anyi? Ukadi mumone padi ngulungu ulela anyi? 
Job39:2 Udi mubale bungi bua ngondu ya difu diayi anyi? Udi mumanye tshikondu tshialelaye anyi? 
Job39:3 Bakaji ba nyama badi batua panshi bua kulela, bajuka lubilu kabayi bumvua kabidi dikenga." 
Job39:4 Pashishe bana badi bakola, badiunda mu tshipela. Dinga dituku bana abu badi bashiya bamamuabu, kabayi mua kupingana kabidi to." 
Job39:5 Uvua muanyishe bua mpunde wa muitu ende kudiye musue nnganyi? Uvua musulule nkanu yende nnganyi? 
Job39:6 Meme kumuteka mu tshipela, muaba mume wa luepu. Ke wende nzubu." 
Job39:7 Udi amu unyema mutoyi wa mu tshimenga. Kena umvua diyi dia mfumuende wa mudimu. 
Job39:8 Udi wendakana pa mukuna ukeba bisosa bionsu bidi bibishi, udi ubikeba ne muende muonsu." 
Job39:9 Nyama wa mbowa wa muitu udi mua kukuenzela mudimu anyi? Udi mua kumuladika mu tshikumbi tshiebe anyi? 
Job39:10 Udi mua kumusuika bua kukudiminaye budimi buebe anyi? Udi mua kukoka lukasu luebe ludi lushipa mabuwa mu tshibanda anyi? 
Job39:11 Bu mudiye ne bukole buvule, udi mua kutekemena kudiye, bua akuenzele midimu yebe yonsu minene anyi?" 
Job39:12 Udi mua kutekemena kudiye bua apingane pa mbelu ne ntete ya kuenza bukula, bua afikishe biudi unowa mu mayeba ebe anyi?" 
Job39:13 Kasonganyunyi udi upapala bienza disanka, makuyi ende adi engelela. Masala ende adi mimpe be." 
Job39:14 Kadi udi ushiya mayi ende pa buloba, bua luya lukole lua lusenga lualadile." 
Job39:15 Kena uvuluka ne: badi mua kuadiata, nansha nyama idi mua kuaboza." 
Job39:16 Udi ushiya bana bende bu ba bende. Nansha yeye ukenga kayi ne tshipeta, kabiena bimuenza bualu." 
Job39:17 Bualu tshivua mumupe meji, nansha lungenyi lua kusunguluja nalu malu." 
Job39:18 Kadi padiye ujuka, unyema lubilu, udi upita kabalu ne udi mubandapu ku lubilu, mutantshi mule." 
Job39:19 Wewe ke udi mupeshe kabalu bukole kabidi mukase boya mu nshingu anyi? 
Job39:20 Wewe udi mukenzeje bua katupike bu mpasu anyi? Muadi waku udi ukuatshisha baluishi bowa," 
Job39:21 kadi katuuta tshikonu panshi bikole mu tshibanda, kasanka bua bukole budiku nabu. Kadi kadiela mu mvita kakayi katshina baluishi." 
Job39:22 Kakena ne bowa, kakena katshina tshintu. Nansha muele wa mvita kawena ukapingaje tshianyima." 
Job39:23 Pambidi pa nyama wa kabalu, mikete idi itutakane mu tshibubu, misongolu ne mafuma bidi bibalakane." 
Job39:24 Padiku kasungabala, kadi kanyema kakayi kimana. Padibu bela mpungi, kadi kabanga luendu musangu umue." 
Job39:25 Diba didi mpungi udila, kadi kela muadi katshidi kule. Kakadi kumvua mupuya wa mvita, ne mbila idi balombodi ba mvita ne bantu babu bela." 
Job39:26 Wewe ke uvua mupeshe nyunyi wa kabemba, meji a kuya kuinshi kua ditunga, diba didiye ne bua kuasulula masala ende anyi?" 
Job39:27 Ku diyi diebe, ke kudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi ubuka, nansha wibaka disua, pa mukuna mule anyi?" 
Job39:28 Udi wasa pa lubuebue, pa lusongu mene, muaba udibu kabayi mua kumupeta." 
Job39:29 Koku aku, udi ukeba tshiakudia, udi utshimuena pa bule." 
Job39:30 Bualu bana batshi, badi bananga kanyinyi ka mashi. Nanku tshiminyi, udi miaba yonsu, idi bitalu." 
Job40:1 Maweja-Nangila kubikila Yobe kumukonka ne: 
Job40:2 Wewe udi musue kuelangana mpata pa malu adi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mulongolole anyi? Utshidi umuasa tshilumbu anyi? Neupuwe anyi, peshi utshidi ne bua kuandamuna ku bindi ngamba." 
Job40:3 Nanku Yobe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Job40:4 Ndi muntu wa tshianana, tshindi mua kuandamuna kabidi ntshinyi? Ndi mbuikila mukana ne tshianza mpuwa." 
Job40:5 Mvua muakule, kadi tshiakuakula kabidi nansha. Mvua mukoleshe malu. Kadi tshiakutungunuka kabidi nanku to." 
Job40:6 Munkatshi mua tshipepele tshikole, Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna Yobe ne:" 
Job40:7 Neudi mulume, suika mukaba, nenkukonke bualu ungandamune." 
Job40:8 Udi ubenga mundi nkosa nsambu anyi? Udi musue kumpisha bua wewe kubinga anyi? 
Job40:9 Udi ne bukole bundi meme nabu anyi? Diyi diebe ndikole bu dianyi anyi? 
Job40:10 Pawikala muena mulongu nanyi, leja lumu luebe ne ndunene, vuala butumbi ne buneme." 
Job40:11 Leja bantu tshiji tshiebe tshinene. Tangila badi baditambisha, ubele panshi!" 
Job40:12 Ujoje bena ditambisha bonsu, ubazaze muaba udibu, uboze bena malu mabi." 
Job40:13 Ubajike bonsu pamue mu lukita, ubatume mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Job40:14 Diba adi nenkuele ka lumbandi, bualu udi muditshimuine nkayebe!" 
Job40:15 Tangila nguvu, nyama wa tshidika ewu: Ndi mumufuke bu mundi mukufuke wewe. Udi udia anu bisosa, bu nyama wa ngombe." 
Job40:16 Kadi tangila bukole budiye nabu! Katshila dikanda dia misunya ya mu difu diende. 
Job40:17 Udi utandabaja mukila wende, wenza bu mutshi wa sedre. Mijilu minene ya bibelu biende idi mikole be." 
Job40:18 Mifuba yende idi mikole bu tshiamu tshikunze. Mbadi yende idi bu milonda ya tshiamu tshia kabanda. 
Job40:19 Ku bionsu bindi muenze, anu yeye ke udi mupite mikuabu. Meme nkayanyi, ke Mufuki wende, ndi mua kumutekesha." 
Job40:20 Udi upeta biakudia biende pa mukuna, padi nyama ya lonji inayila." 
Job40:21 Kadi udi ulala muinshi mua mingonga, usokoma mu malenga a mu tshisense." 
Job40:22 Udi wikishila mu dileji dia mingonga, dia mitshi idi ku muelelu wa musulu." 
Job40:23 Nansha musulu ne muenji mukole bishi, kena upampakana to. Nansha mayi muwule apitshila ku mishiku yende, kena unyema to." 
Job40:24 Padiye mutabale, udi mua kumukuata nnganyi? Badi mua kumukuata mu buteyi, kumutubula diulu ne mutshi anyi?" 
Job40:25 Udi mua kuloba, kukuata ngandu ku ndobu nnganyi? Udi mua kusuika ludimi luende ne muonji anyi?" 
Job40:26 Udi mua kumuela muonji mu diulu, kutubula lubanga luende ne mulonda anyi?" 
Job40:27 Udi wela meji ne: udi mua kukusengelela anyi? Udi mua kukuambila miaku ya kalolu anyi? 
Job40:28 Udi mua kutua ndondu bua ashale mupika webe too ne ku lufu luende anyi? 
Job40:29 Udi mua kunaya nende bu muudi unaya ne nyunyi anyi? Udi mua kumusuika bua bana bebe ba bakaji banaye nende anyi? 
Job40:30 Balobi nansha bobu badisanga, badi mua kumusumbisha anyi? Badi mua kumukosa bitupa, kubipana anyi?" 
Job40:31 Udi mua kutubula tshiseba tshiende ne milonda anyi? Nansha mutu wende ne musongolu anyi? 
Job40:32 Idikija! Umulenge pambidi bu udi umukeba mvita! Kuakuenza musangu muibidi to! Neuvuluke mvita yebe nende too ne ku lufu luebe! 
Job41:1 Badi batekemena kumutshimuna badi badidinga. Yeye anu mukutangile udi udishinda panshi. 
Job41:2 Udi mua kumubunda nnganyi? — Kadi udi mua kumutonuena mesu udiku anyi? — 
Job41:3 Uvua mudianze kunsombesha tshiende tshintu bua meme kumupingajilatshi nnganyi? Bintu bionsu bidi panu mbianyi meme! 
Job41:4 Tshiena muanji kunulondela mudi bidimba biende, bukole buende ne buimpe bua mubidi wende." 
Job41:5 Ukadi musaye tshiseba tshiende nnganyi? Udi mubulule mbanga yende ku bukole udiku anyi? 
Job41:6 Udi munzulule biibi bia mukana muende, bidi bileja menu adi akuatshisha bowa nnganyi?" 
Job41:7 Nyima wende mujima, udi mubuikila kudi mabamba makuatakane bimpe milongu ne milongu, bu ngabu mikole nansha bu dibue." 
Job41:8 Mabamba ende adi malamakane bimpe, nansha lupepele kaluena mua kupitshila pankatshi pawu." 
Job41:9 Dibamba dionsu ndilamakane ne dikuabu. Kabena mua kutulakaja nansha dimue. 
Job41:10 Diba didiye wela nyashi, udi wela nkenke, mesu ende adi akunza bu kabundubundu ka diba." 
Job41:11 Ndimi ya kapia idi ipatuka mukana muende, tuntolentole tua kapia tudi tupona panshi." 
Job41:12 Muinshi udi upatuka mu diulu diende, bu mudi luesu lufuima pa kapia." 
Job41:13 Mupuya wa mukana muende udi ne luya lukole, ludi mua kutemesha nalu makala a kapia. Bualu ndimi ya kapia idi ipatuka mukana muende." 
Job41:14 Udi ne bukole ku nshingu kuende bupite, nanku muntu yonsu udi ubumona, udi ne bowa, uzakala." 
Job41:15 Pambidi pende padi minyengu mikole, kayiyi ibuyama nansha wewe muyishindamene." 
Job41:16 Musunya wa muoyi wende udi mukole bu dibue dia tshipelelu. 
Job41:17 Padiye ujuka, nansha bantu ba bukitu badi bumvua bowa, badi bapampakana, bapanga tshia kuenza." 
Job41:18 Nansha bantu bamutapa muele, bamuele difuma nansha musongolu, nansha bamuasa mikete, kabiena bimuenzela bualu to." 
Job41:19 Bualu muele udi ne bukole bu kasosa, tshiamu tshikunze tshidi ne bukole anu bu mutshi mubole." 
Job41:20 Kabena mua kumuipata ne miketa. Nansha mabue adibu bamuasa adi anu bu bisosa. 
Job41:21 Nyindu udi anu bu lusongu lua kasosa, padibu bamuela musongolu, udi anu useka." 
Job41:22 Mu difu diende, mudi mabamba matue masongoloke, adi ashiya tshikoka mu bisosa bu tshiamu tshia kudima natshi." 
Job41:23 Padiye ubuela mu mayi, udi wanyungisha, bu mudi mayi asaba mu luesu. Udi wavuandulula, bu mudi manananshi apia mu luesu." 
Job41:24 Mulanjilanji mutoke udi umueneka kunyima kuende mu mayi, udi wela nsensa pa mutu pa mayi, mienze bu nsuki mitoke." 
Job41:25 Kena ne udiye mufuanangane nende muinshi mua diba. Ndi mumufuke bua kikadi ne bowa. 
Job41:26 Udi upetula nyama yonsu, nansha yeye munene menemene. Amu yeye ke mukalenga wa nyama ya lonji." 
Job42:1 Nanku Yobe kuandamuna Maweja-Nangila ne: 
Job42:2 Ndi mumanye ne: kakuena tshidi mua kukukolela, udi mua kukumbaja tshionsu tshiudi musue." 
Job42:3 Wewe kungebeja ne: muudi wela mpata pa malu andi mulongolole, muudi wakula pa malu audi kuyi mujingulule mbishi? Eyowa, ndi ntonda ne: mvua muakule pa malu adi mampite, pa malu a dikema amvua tshiyi mua kumvua." 
Job42:4 Wewe kuamba ne: “Teleja ndi ngakula. Nenkuebeje malu, wewe mungandamune. ”" 
Job42:5 Mvua mukumanye amu bualu bantu bakuabu bavua bandongeshe. Kadi mpindiewu meme kukumona ne anyi abidi. 
Job42:6 Ke pandi ngunwua bundu bua bionsu bimvua muambe. Ndi nyingalala nsomba mu lupuishi ne mu butu. 
Job42:7 Maweja-Nangila mumane kuyukila ne Yobe, kuambilaye Elifaze wa mu tshimenga tshia Temane ne: — Wewe ne balunda bebe babidi, ndi munufikile munda. Bualu kanuena balongesha mu bulelela malu adi antangila, bu muvua muntu wanyi Yobe muenze." 
Job42:8 Nanku mpindiewu nuangate nyama ya ngombe milume muanda mutekete, ne mbuji ya bimpanga muanda mutekete. Nuye nabi kudi muntu wanyi Yobe. Nulambule nyama eyi bu milambu ya kuosha bua kudikobolola. Muntu wanyi Yobe neantendelele bualu buenu. Nengitabe dilomba diende. Tshiakununyoka bua bibi binuvua benze. Bualu kanuvua balongeshe malu anyi mu bulelela bu muvua muntu wanyi Yobe muenze." 
Job42:9 Nanku, Elifaze wa mu buloba bua Temane, Bildade wa mu buloba bua Shuka ne Sofare wa mu buloba bua Naama kuenzabu bivua Mvidi Mukulu mubambile. Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuitaba ditendelela dia Yobe." 
Job42:10 Yobe mumane kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu bua balunda bende abu, Maweja-Nangila kumupingajila bintu biende anu bu muvuabi kale. Kuvudijaye bintu abi misangu ibidi bu muvuabi kale." 
Job42:11 Nanku, Yobe kuakidila bana babu bonsu ba balume ne ba bakaji, ne bonsu bavua bamumanye kale, kufikabu bua kumusamba. Bavua badila ne Yobe kaba kamue, bamukolesha ku muoyi bua makenga onsu avua Maweja-Nangila mumutumine. Pashishe muntu yonsu uvua umushila lukanu lutoke lua mushinga mukole, ne kakanu ka tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Job42:12 Maweja-Nangila kuela Yobe lupemba, kupitaye ne muvuaye kale. Yobe kupeta mikoku binunu dikumi ne binayi, tumelu binunu bisambombu, ngombe milume ne mikaji tshinunu ne mpunde mikaji tshinunu." 
Job42:13 Uvua kabidi mulele bana ba balume muanda mutekete, ba bakaji basatu." 
Job42:14 Uvua muinyike muanabute mukaji ne: Yemima, muibidi ne: Keziya ne muisatu ne: Keronapuka." 
Job42:15 Mu ditunga dijima kabavua basangana bakaji balengele bu mishika nkunde ya Yobe. Tatuabu uvua mubalamine bumpianyi bua momumue ne bua bana bende ba balume. 
Job42:16 Yobe kushala kabidi ne muoyi bidimu lukama ne makumi anayi. Kumonaye bana bende, bikulu bende too ne ku ndelanganyi ya ku mulongu muinayi." 
Job42:17 Yobe kufua, mulale panu muboboke." 
Psalms1:1 Muena diakalenga ngudi ubenga meji adi bantu babi bamuambila, kayi ulonda tshidi bantu bapambuke benza, kayi usomba pamue ne bantu badi baseka Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Psalms1:2 Muena diakalenga mmuntu udi unanga mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Udi uyambululula butuku ne munya, welaku meji." 
Psalms1:3 Udi bu mutshi udi bantu bakuna ku muelelu wa mayi. Mutshi awu udi ukuama bimuma pa tshikondu tshiabi. Mabeji awu kaena mua kufubidila. Bionsu bidi muntu wa nanku wenza bidi amu ne tshipeta. 
Psalms1:4 Kadi bantu babi ki mbena diakalenga! Badi bu bisota bidi lupepele lutangalaja. 
Psalms1:5 Dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ubalumbuluisha, kabakubinga. Kabena mua kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bantu badi balamata Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms1:6 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ulombola badi bamulamata. Kadi badi kabayi bamuitaba, nebabutuke." 
Psalms2:1 Bisamba bidi bitomboka bua tshinyi? Bantu badi bela bitungu bia patupu bualu kaayi? 
Psalms2:2 Bakalenga ba pa buloba badi badilongolola ku mvita. Bamfumu badi bumvuangana bua kubenga Maweja-Nangila, kubenga ne mukalenga uvuaye musungule." 
Psalms2:3 Badi bamba ne: “Tukosayi mionji ya bupika idibu batuela. Katuena basue bua batumune kabidi!” 
Psalms2:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi ubaseka. Udi musombe mu diulu, udi mutendule." 
Psalms2:5 Pashishe udi ubakanyina ne tshiji, ubinduluka, ubakuatshisha bowa, wamba ne:" 
Psalms2:6 “Ndi mubanjije mukalenga umvua musungule bua adie bukalenga mu Siyone, pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila.”" 
Psalms2:7 — Meme mukalenga. Ndi nnumanyisha mukenji mupeta kudi Maweja-Nangila. Mmungambile ne: “Wewe ke muananyi. Biangatshile lelu, meme ndi tatuebe." 
Psalms2:8 Wewe mundombe bisamba bionsu, nenkupeshabi, bishale biebe. Bumfumu buebe nebufike ku ntengu ne ntengu ya buloba." 
Psalms2:9 Neubutekeshe ne dikombu dia tshiamu. Neubuzaze bu luesu lua dibumba. ” 
Psalms2:10 Nuenu bakalenga, lejayi munudi ne meji. Nuenu baludiki ba buloba, londayi mibelu." 
Psalms2:11 Itabayi Maweja-Nangila, numutshine. Numukukuile, numutumbishe." 
Psalms2:12 Nutumikile muanende. Kanuyi benza nanku, yeye mufike munda, nenubutuke. Bualu tshiji tshidi mua kumulunduka lukasa. Bena diakalenga mbonsu badi banyemena kudi Maweja-Nangila!" 
Psalms3:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, uvuaye musake pawaye unyema muanende Absalome." 
Psalms3:2 Maweja-Nangila, baluishi banyi badi ba bungi. Bantu badi bankina, kabena kubala." 
Psalms3:3 Bantu ba bungi badi bangamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu kena mua kumuambuluisha nansha kakese!” 
Psalms3:4 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi unjika bu ngabu. Udi umpa lumu, ndiumvua ne bukole." 
Psalms3:5 Pandi mbikila Maweja-Nangila bua kungambuluisha, udi ungumvuila ku mukuna wende wa tshijila, ungandamuna." 
Psalms3:6 Butuku ndi ndala amu bilenga, bualu udi undama too ne mundi mbika dinda." 
Psalms3:7 Nansha bantu binunu ne binunu banyungulula nseke yonsu, kabena mua kunkuatshisha bowa." 
Psalms3:8 Maweja-Nangila, juka, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, unsungidile. Wewe ke udi ututa baluishi banyi ku mbanga, upola menu a bantu babi." 
Psalms3:9 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi mua kusungidila bantu. Wele bantu bebe lupemba!" 
Psalms4:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa kuimba ne nzenze." 
Psalms4:2 Mvidi Mukulu, mumbingishi wanyi, pandi nkubikila bua kungambuluisha, ungitabe. Pavua bantu bankengesha, wewe uvua unsungidila. Anyisha, uteleje dikulomba dianyi." 
Psalms4:3 Nuenu aba nenunyange lumu luanyi too ne ku diba kaayi? Nudi nunanga kunshiminyina malu patupu. Nudi nukeba kunjana bua tshinyi? 
Psalms4:4 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila mmusungule muntu udi umulamata. Pandi mmubikila, udi unteleja." 
Psalms4:5 Mutshinayi! Kanuenji kabidi malu mabi. Nudikonkonone panudi balale. Nushale talalaa. 
Psalms4:6 Lambulayi milambu idi minufundila bua kufila. Nutekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila. 
Psalms4:7 Bantu ba bungi badi badiabakena, bamba ne: “Watumuenesha diakalenga nnganyi? Bualu Maweja-Nangila kena ututangila kabidi ne muoyi muimpe! ”" 
Psalms4:8 Kadi meme, Maweja-Nangila mmumpeshe disanka, dipite dia bantu badi banowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, nansha badi bapola tumuma tua kukama maluvu." 
Psalms4:9 Pandi nya kulala, ndi mpeta tulu musangu umue, bualu wewe nkayebe, Maweja-Nangila, udi undama mu bupole." 
Psalms5:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu, wa kuimba ne nshiba. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide." 
Psalms5:2 Maweja-Nangila, umvua bindi ngamba, teleja mikemu yanyi!" 
Psalms5:3 Mukalenga wanyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, teleja ne ntema pandi nkubikila. Wewe ke undi ndomba." 
Psalms5:4 Maweja-Nangila, dinda dionsu ndi nkuela lubila. Patshiatshia ndi mfika kuudi, nshala muindile diandamuna diebe." 
Psalms5:5 Mvidi Mukulu, wewe kuena wanyisha buenzayi. Muntu mubi kena mua kufika kuudi." 
Psalms5:6 Kuena musue kumona bena kapeja. Udi ukina bonsu badi benzela bakuabu bibi. 
Psalms5:7 Wewe udi ubutula bena dishima, ubenga badi bashipa bantu, nansha badi babadinga." 
Psalms5:8 Kadi bu muudi munnange bikole, ndi mua kubuela mu nzubu muebe, kukukukuila mu muaba webe wa tshijila." 
Psalms5:9 Maweja-Nangila, undudike bua nkumbaje tshiudi musue. Bualu baluishi badi bankengesha. Undeje njila uudi mundongoluele." 
Psalms5:10 Katuena mua kuitaba bidi baluishi banyi bamba. Badi bela meji amu bua kubutula bantu. Miaku yabu idi itukebela lufu. Badi bakula bua kudinga bantu. 
Psalms5:11 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ubanyoke, mbena tshibawu. Mateyi avuabu batuteya, abakuate bafue. Ubipate muaba uudi, bualu bubi buabu mbupite. Badi anu bakutombokela." 
Psalms5:12 Bonsu badi basokome kuudi, basanke, batue tshianga kashidi, bualu wewe udi ubalama. Bonsu badi bakunanga, bimbe basanguluke!" 
Psalms5:13 Maweja-Nangila, badi bakulamata, udi ubela lupemba. Bu muudi ubananga, udi ubajika ku ngabu." 
Psalms6:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne lunzenze lua nshinga muanda mukulu. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms6:2 Maweja-Nangila, udi mumfikile munda, kadi kunnyoki. Udi muntekele tshiji, kadi lekela kunkengesha." 
Psalms6:3 Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse, ndi mu dikenga dipite. Unkankamike, tshitshiena ne bukole." 
Psalms6:4 Muoyi udi undubakana munda. Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, neundengulule ne ku diba kaayi?" 
Psalms6:5 Maweja-Nangila, kolesha, unsungidile. Umpandishe, bualu wewe udi mulenga mupite." 
Psalms6:6 Meme mufue, tshiakukuvuluka kabidi to. Mu kandondu ka bafue wakutumbisha nnganyi?" 
Psalms6:7 Mikemu yanyi mmimpungije. Butuku bujima ndi ndila amu kudila, mbolesha bulalu buanyi ne binsonji." 
Psalms6:8 Mesu mmanguwule ne muadi. Mmanyanguke ne binsonji bualu bua baluishi banyi. 
Psalms6:9 Umbukayi kundi, nuenu benji ba bibi. Maweja-Nangila mmuteleje miadi yanyi." 
Psalms6:10 Mvidi Mukulu mumvue mitendekenu yanyi. Mmuanyishe dilomba dianyi. 
Psalms6:11 Nanku baluishi banyi bonsu, bundu ne buowa nebibakuate. Nebasemene kule, bundu mesu tente." 
Psalms7:1 Kayenga ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, kavuaye muele Maweja-Nangila pavua Kushe, muena Binyamine, mumufunde." 
Psalms7:2 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nyemena kuudi. Umpandishe, unsungile kudi bonsu badi bankengesha." 
Psalms7:3 Kuyi mumpandishe, nebansunsule bu ntambue, udi ubakula nyama, wende ukoka kakuyi udi mua kumunyenga." 
Psalms7:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bu meme muenze bidibu bamba, bu meme munyange bianza bianyi ne bubi," 
Psalms7:5 bu meme mupingaje bubi ku bubi, nansha munyenge tshintu tshia udi unkina kapayi bualu," 
Psalms7:6 nanku muluishi andondakaje, ankuate, antue miseba, andiatakaje pantshidi ne muoyi. Bualu nkadi muena tshibawu tshia lufu!" 
Psalms7:7 Maweja-Nangila, juka panshi, tshiji tshiebe tshilunduke. Imana pankatshi petu ne bena tshikisu badi bankengesha. Undumbuluile, bualu wewe udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
Psalms7:8 Sangisha bisamba bionsu pabuipi nebe. Zangama ku mutu kuabi mu nkuasa webe wa butumbi. 
Psalms7:9 Maweja-Nangila, wewe mulumbuluishi wa bisamba, kosa tshilumbu tshianyi pa tshiotshi, leja buakane buanyi patoke ku bantu." 
Psalms7:10 Jikija buenzayi bua bantu babi. Kankamika badi bakulamata. Wewe Maweja-Nangila muena buakane, ujingulule meji ne majinga bidi munda mua muntu." 
Psalms7:11 Mvidi Mukulu udi ngabu wanyi, udi upandisha bantu badi bamuitaba." 
Psalms7:12 Mvidi Mukulu udi mukoshi muakane wa nsambu. Dituku dionsu udi unyoka badi benza malu mabi. 
Psalms7:13 Padi muluishi kayi udilengeja, udi unona muele wende wa mvita. unana buta buende, uludikila." 
Psalms7:14 Udi wangata biende bia lufu, wasa mikete yende idi misuika kapia." 
Psalms7:15 Muntu udi wanyisha bubi, udi wimita diakabi, ulela dishima." 
Psalms7:16 Udi umbuila bakuabu tshiina tshile, neadishinde mu tshiina tshiende atshi." 
Psalms7:17 Bubi buvuaye mulongoluele bakuabu, nebumupingene pa mutu, tshikisu tshidiye natshi netshimuimane mu mpala." 
Psalms7:18 Nentumbishe Maweja-Nangila bua buakane budiye mungenzele. Ndi nsamuna dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu." 
Psalms8:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu, wa kuimba ne lunkombe lua Ngate. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide." 
Psalms8:2 Eyi Mfumuetu, Maweja-Nangila, butumbi buebe mbunene pa buloba bujima! Bunene buebe mbupite bua diulu." 
Psalms8:3 Miaku ya bana, nansha bana batekete menemene, idi imanyika baluishi bebe. Idi bu nkila uudi muele bua kupuwisha bena lukuna bebe." 
Psalms8:4 Pandi mmona diulu diudi muenze, ngondu ne mitotu biudi muteke amu pa miaba yabi," 
Psalms8:5 ndi ndikonka ne: Muntu nnganyi bua wewe kumuvuluka? Muntu lumuakanyine bua wewe kumumanya anyi? 
Psalms8:6 Udi mumuenze mushadile kakese ku batumibue bebe. Udi mumuase nsala wa lumu ne butumbi. 
Psalms8:7 Udi mumupeshe bumfumu bua bionsu biudi mufuke, mmuteke bionsu kuinshi kua makasa ende," 
Psalms8:8 mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe, nansha nyama ya mu tshisuku," 
Psalms8:9 nyunyi, mishipa, ne bionsu bidi bienda mu mayi manene." 
Psalms8:10 Eyi Mfumuetu, Maweja-Nangila, butumbi buebe mbunene pa buloba bujima!" 
Psalms9:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa kuimba ne meyi matue. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide." 
Psalms9:2 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkutumbisha ne muoyi wanyi mujima, mmanyisha bantu bonsu bia dikema biudi muenze." 
Psalms9:3 Ndi nsanka, nsanguluka bualu buebe, ngimbila dina diebe wewe, Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu." 
Psalms9:4 Paudi umueneka, baluishi banyi badi banyema, badishinda, bafue." 
Psalms9:5 Paudi usomba mu nkuasa webe, udi ulumbuluisha tshilumbu amu pa tshiotshi. Ke muudi mukose nsambu yanyi, mumbingishe." 
Psalms9:6 Udi utandisha bisamba bidi bikubenga, ubutula bantu badi kabayi bakulamate, ukupula mena abu kashidi tshiendelela." 
Psalms9:7 Baluishi betu mbabutuke, butubutuu. Wewe udi munyange bimenga biabu, bishale munda mutupu. Dina diabi mene ndijimine." 
Psalms9:8 Maweja-Nangila udi ne bumfumu bua kashidi. Udi musombe mu nkuasa bua kulumbuluisha bantu. 
Psalms9:9 Yeye ke udi ulombola bantu kayi ne kansungansunga, ukosa nsambu ya bukua bisamba pa yoyi." 
Psalms9:10 Kudi Maweja-Nangila ke kudi bonsu badibu bakengesha banyemena, ke kudibu basokomena diba dia dikenga." 
Psalms9:11 Maweja-Nangila, bantu badi bamanye muudi, badi bakutekemena, bualu kuena ulekela badi bafika kuudi." 
Psalms9:12 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila ne misambu. Nkuasa wende udi pa mukuna wa Siyone. Numanyishe bukua bisamba bidiye muenze. 
Psalms9:13 Udi unyoka bashipianganyi, uvuluka bavuabu bakengesha. Kena upua muoyi bena dikenga badi bamubikila." 
Psalms9:14 Maweja-Nangila ungambuluishe, tangila mudi baluishi banyi bankengesha bikole. Ungumushe ku kandondu ka bafue." 
Psalms9:15 Nenku nemmanyishe bantu badi basangile mu Siyone, mundi nkutumbisha bua bionsu biuvua mungenzele. Nengele mbila ya disanka bualu uvua mumpandishe." 
Psalms9:16 Bisamba bia bantu mbidishinde mu tshiina, tshivuabi biumbuile bisamba bikuabu. Bukondu buvuabi biele mu musokoku mbubijingile." 
Psalms9:17 Maweja-Nangila mmudileje mudiye, mmukose nsambu pa yoyi. Muntu mubi mmudikuatshishe mu bukondu buvuaye muele." 
Psalms9:18 Bantu babi bonsu badi bapua Mvidi Mukulu muoyi, bapingane mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Psalms9:19 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kakupua bena dikenga muoyi kashidi. Ditekemena dia bapele kadiena mua kujimina tshiendelele. 
Psalms9:20 Maweja-Nangila juka, muntu kalupitshi bukole! Bikila bisamba bidi bikubenga, ubilumbuluishe." 
Psalms9:21 Maweja-Nangila, ukuatshishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu abi buowa, bamanye ne: badi amu bantu." 
Psalms10:1 Maweja-Nangila, udi muimanyine kule bua tshinyi? Udi musokome patudi mu dikenga bualu kaayi?" 
Psalms10:2 Bantu babi kabayi bundu, badi bakengesha bapele. Badi babakuata mu mateyi avuabu bateya." 
Psalms10:3 Muntu mubi udi uditambisha bua buenzayi buende. Muena lubombu udi utshipa Maweja-Nangila, umuseka." 
Psalms10:4 Muntu mubi udi wela mpala mulu, wamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu kena unyoka muntu. Kenaku mene.” Ke meji onsu adi muntu mubi wela." 
Psalms10:5 Bionsu bidiye wenza bidi biya kumpala. Paudi ukosa tshilumbu tshiende, kabiena bimuenzela bualu, bualu wewe udi kulu kule!" 
Psalms10:6 Udi wamba ne: “Tshiakutenkakana, kashidi dikenga kadiakunkuata!”" 
Psalms10:7 Udi amu utshipa bantu, ubashima, ubadinga. Bidiye wamba bidi bikebela bantu dikenga ne diakabi." 
Psalms10:8 Udi musombe mualamine pabuipi ne misoku, windila bua kushipa bantu badi kabayi ne bualu. Mesu ende adi alondesha muntu udi kayi ne bukole." 
Psalms10:9 Udi ulala muaba musokome, utentekela bu ntambue, mualamine mupele bua kumukuata. Udi ukoka muena dikenga, umukuata mu bukondu." 
Psalms10:10 Udi uzonzoma, ubutamina, ukuata bantu badi kabayi ne mubaluidi." 
Psalms10:11 Muntu mubi udi wela meji ne: “Mvidi Mukulu kena bualu ne bindi ngenza. Kena musue kubimanya, kena musue kubimona!”" 
Psalms10:12 Maweja-Nangila juka, Mvidi Mukulu nyoka bantu babi! Kupu bena dikenga muoyi!" 
Psalms10:13 Mudi bantu babi bakupotela mmunyi? Mmunyi mudibu bamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu kakutunyoka? 
Psalms10:14 Kadi wewe kuena mpofu! Udi umona dikenga ne disumpakana dia bapele! Udi amu ukeba kubambuluisha! Muena dikenga mmudilekelela kuudi! Wewe ke udi wambuluisha muana nshiya. 
Psalms10:15 Butula bukole bua muena tshikisu. Umunyoke bua bubi budiye muenze, bua ajimine kashidi." 
Psalms10:16 Maweja-Nangila udi Mukalenga kashidi tshiendelele. Badi batendelela mvidie mikuabu nebajimine mu ditunga diende! 
Psalms10:17 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi umvua majinga a bantu bapuekele, ubakolesha ku muoyi. Wewe udi uteleja ne ntema bua kubambuluisha," 
Psalms10:18 miadi ya bana ba nshiya ne ya bantu badibu bakengesha. Nanku pa buloba kapakuikala kabidi muena tshikisu. 
Psalms11:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu, kabidi wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. — Ndi nsokoma kudi Maweja-Nangila. Munudi nungamba ne: “Buuka bu nyunyi mu mikuna” mmunyi?" 
Psalms11:2 — Kadi mona, bantu babi badi banana buta buabu, badi baludikila amu mikete mu miidima bua kushipa bantu badi kabayi ne bualu." 
Psalms11:3 Padi bulongolodi buonsu bunyanguka mu ditunga, tshidi muntu muakane mua kuenza kabidi ntshinyi?" 
Psalms11:4 — Maweja-Nangila udi mu nzubu wende wa tshijila. Maweja-Nangila udi ne nkuasa wende mu diulu. Udi utangila bantu miaba yonsu idibu, uteta bionsu bidibu benza." 
Psalms11:5 Udi mumanye bantu, ne badi bamulamata, ne badi bamubenga. Udi ukina muende muonsu badi bajula tshinyangu." 
Psalms11:6 Bena tshikisu neabalokeshile makala a kapia ne bikanganya. Neabanyoke ne lupepele lua mvunde. 
Psalms11:7 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi muena buakane, udi unanga bantu badi benza bimpe. Bantu badi bamulamata, nebasombe pabuipi nende." 
Psalms12:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa kuimba ne lunzenze lua nshinga muanda mukulu. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide." 
Psalms12:2 Maweja-Nangila, utuambuluishe! Tshianana, bantu bebe badi mua kujimina. Kamutshiena kabidi bantu ba nsongu." 
Psalms12:3 Bantu bonsu badi amu bashimangana. Badi batua muntu makumbu, munda muabu bikale bamujana." 
Psalms12:4 Maweja-Nangila, butula bena lubombu bonsu, puwisha badi baditemba, bamba ne:" 
Psalms12:5 “Tudi bamanye mua kuakula, bua tupete bionsu bitudi tujinga. Netuambe bionsu bitudi basue, katuyi tutshina muntu.”" 
Psalms12:6 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mpindiewu ndi mfika bua kuambuluisha bapele badibu bakengesha ne bena dikenga badi batua mikemu. Nempikule badibu badiombola. ” 
Psalms12:7 Tudi mua kutekemena bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba. Miaku yende idi milelela, idi bu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshiengulula misangu muanda mutekete." 
Psalms12:8 Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke udi ukumbaja biudi ulaya. Bantu badi bakubenga badi bendakana miaba yonsu, bubi budi buvulangana mu bantu. Kadi utuepule bua katubuelakanyi ne bantu babi aba." 
Psalms12:9  
Psalms13:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu." 
Psalms13:2 Maweja-Nangila neumpue muoyi kashidi anyi? Neubenge amu kubenga bua kuntangila anyi? 
Psalms13:3 Nentate amu kutata too ne ku diba kaayi? Dikenga nedikale mu muoyi wanyi ku dituku ku dituku anyi? Baluishi banyi nebampite bukole ne ku diba kaayi? 
Psalms13:4 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, untangile, ungandamune, umpingajile bukole. Tshianana, ndi mua kufua." 
Psalms13:5 Kuanyishi bua baluishi banyi baditambishe ne: tuamutshimunyi, nansha bua bankinyi badiela mulu ne: tudi bamutekeshe." 
Psalms13:6 Meme ndi mukutekemene bualu udi munnange, ndi nsanka, bualu neungambuluishe. Maweja-Nangila, ndi musue kukuimbila, kukuela tuasakidila bua bilenga bionsu biudi mungenzele." 
Psalms14:1 Bantu batshimbakane badi badiakuila ne: Mvidi Mukulu kenaku to. Bantu aba mbantu babi, badi benza malu mabi mapite. Nansha umue kena wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Psalms14:2 Maweja-Nangila udi mu diulu, muinangile panshi bua kukenketa bantu, kumona ne kudi umue wa meji, udi umutendelela!" 
Psalms14:3 Kadi bonsu mbapambuke, bonsu mbena buenzayi, kakuena udi wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Psalms14:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bonsu badi bakengeshangana aba, kabena bumvue bualu nansha bumue. Badi badia bantu banyi bu mampa, babenga kuntendelela.”" 
Psalms14:5 Kadi diakamue nebakuatshike bowa, bualu Maweja-Nangila neafike bua kuambuluisha bende." 
Psalms14:6 “Nuvua bapangishe bapele tshivuabu batekemene. Kadi Maweja-Nangila ke udi ubalama.” 
Psalms14:7 Wafuma ku Siyone bua kupandisha Izrayele nnganyi? Maweja-Nangila neapatule bantu bende mu bupika. Diba adi ndelanganyi ya Yakobe neisanke, bena Izrayele nebatue tshianga." 
Psalms15:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. — Maweja-Nangila, wabuela mu nzubu muebe, wasomba pa mukuna webe wa tshijila nnganyi?" 
Psalms15:2 — Ke muntu udi kayi kalema, wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, wamba amu bidi bilelela." 
Psalms15:3 Kena unyangila bakuende lumu, kena wenzela balunda bende bibi, kena upenda muena mutumba." 
Psalms15:4 Udi upepeja badi Mvidi Mukulu udiwula, unemeka badi bitaba Maweja-Nangila. Yeye mutule diyi udi udikumbaja, nansha yeye mufuane kujimija bidiye nabi." 
Psalms15:5 Udi usombeshangana makuta, kayi ulomba bia kasombela. Udi kayi ne bualu, kena umudila mabuejila. Muenji wa nanku, kakumona diakabi." 
Psalms16:1 Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, undame, ndi nyemena kuudi." 
Psalms16:2 Ndi nkuambila ne: “Wewe ke Maweja-Nangila, bilenga bionsu bindi nabi mbifume kuudi.”" 
Psalms16:3 Bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu mbena diakalenga, ndi nsankila kudibu." 
Psalms16:4 Bonsu badi bakeba bua mvidie mikuabu ibambuluishe, badi badikebela makenga. Mvidie eyi tshiena nyilambula milambu ya nyama, tshiena nansha ntela mena ayi." 
Psalms16:5 Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke undi nende, bindi nkengela ndi mbipeta kuudi. Ndi mu bianza biebe kashidi." 
Psalms16:6 Ke bidi binsankisha, ke diakalenga dindi nadi." 
Psalms16:7 Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, bualu udi undudika. Nansha butuku kondu ka munda kadi kambela." 
Psalms16:8 Ndi mvuluka Maweja-Nangila diba dionsu. Tshiena mua kuteketa, bualu udi nanyi" 
Psalms16:9 Ke pandi nsanka, nsanguluka, nsomba talalaa, tshiyi ntshina." 
Psalms16:10 Kuakunshiya mu kandondu ka bafue. Kuakuanyisha bua mbolele mu lukita. 
Psalms16:11 Udi undombola mu njila, bua mpete muoyi. Ndi nsanka bikole muaba uudi, diakalenga dianyi didi amu pabuipi nebe kashidi." 
Psalms17:1 Ditendelela dia mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, unteleje, ndi ndila muadi, ungumvue. Tshiena ne bubi bundi muenze. Ndi nkutendelela, ungitabe. Mukana muanyi kamuena dishima." 
Psalms17:2 Wewe neundumbuluishe, umbingishe, bualu udi ujingulula udi kayi ne bualu." 
Psalms17:3 Butuku udi unkenketa, unjooja, unteta, kuyi unsangana ne bualu. Bindi ngela meji ke bindi ngamba." 
Psalms17:4 Ndi nkumbaja biudi muambe. Tshiena ndonda njila wa bubi. 
Psalms17:5 Ndi ngenda amu mu njila webe, tshiena mpambukamu nansha kakese." 
Psalms17:6 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nkutendelela. Ndi mumanye muudi ungitaba. Teleja ne ntema bindi ngamba." 
Psalms17:7 Undeje muudi munnange. Badi basokomena kuudi, udi ubapatula mu bianza bia baluishi babu." 
Psalms17:8 Bu mudi muntu ulama lumonyi lua disu, undame, unsokoke mu mapuapua ebe." 
Psalms17:9 Bantu babi badi bankengesha, bena tshikisu badi bangela munkatshi." 
Psalms17:10 Badi bapapisha muoyi wabu, kabayi ne luse. Badi baditemba amu kuditemba." 
Psalms17:11 Badi bamfmakaja, banjingila, bakeba kungela panshi." 
Psalms17:12 Badi bangalamina mu tshisuku bu ntambue, bakeba kunsunsula bu nyama ya lonji." 
Psalms17:13 Maweja-Nangila, juka, ubaluishe, ubafuishe binu. Patula muela webe, unsungidile." 
Psalms17:14 Ubabutule, ubajikije mu bantu. Ubanuishe lulengu luuvua mubalamine. Bana babu banue buukute, biikulu babu balabule luvua lushale!" 
Psalms17:15 Meme nenkumone, bualu tshivua muenze bibi. Pangabika, nenkutangile, kabiyi bintonda!" 
Psalms18:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Davide muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua wambila Maweja-Nangila miaku eyi pavuaye mumane kumupatula mu bianza bia baluishi bende, nangananga bia Shawule." 
Psalms18:2 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mukunange, Wewe udi bukole buanyi." 
Psalms18:3 Maweja-Nangila udi lubuebue luanyi, muaba undi nsokomena, mpetela lupandu. Udi undama bu ngabu. Udi mukuna undi nyemena bua kupanda." 
Psalms18:4 Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Pandi mmubikila, diakamue udi unsungidila kudi baluishi banyi." 
Psalms18:5 Njiwu ya lufu ivua minjingile, ikeba kumpuekesha bu mavuala a mayi." 
Psalms18:6 Kandondu ka bafue kavua kasue kuya nanyi, buteyi buaku bukeba kumbakula." 
Psalms18:7 Dikenga kumpita, meme kubikila Maweja-Nangila, mmuela mbila bua angambuluishe. Maweja-Nangila mu nzubu kumvua diyi dianyi, muadi wanyi kufika kudiye." 
Psalms18:8 Ke buloba kuzakala, kunyungakana, bitaku bia mikuna kutenkakana, kunyukakana, bualu bua tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms18:9 Muinshi kupatuka mu diulu diende, kapia ka tshinyangu mukana muende, kela tuntolentole, kosha." 
Psalms18:10 Maweja-Nangila kunzulula diulu, kupueka pa mavuba mafiike," 
Psalms18:11 musombe pa Kerubine, nyama wa mapuapua, upapala pa nsala ya lupepele." 
Psalms18:12 Kudibuikilaye ne midima mikole, mavuba makuatakane ne mayi kumujingila." 
Psalms18:13 Mabue a mvula ne makala a kapia, avua apatuka bu butoke buvua kumpala kuende, apanda mavuba makuatakane." 
Psalms18:14 Maweja-Nangila kudidisha makubakuba mu diulu. Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu kuela diyi. 
Psalms18:15 Kuasaye miketa, utangalaja baluishi banyi, kupenyaye bu muela wa mvula, ubapapula." 
Psalms18:16 Muinshi mua mayi kumueneka, bitaku bia buloba kupatuka, pavua Maweja-Nangila ukanyina baluishi bende, ubaleja tshiji tshivuaye natshi." 
Psalms18:17 Mu diulu nuwuaye, kuololaye tshianza bua kunkuata, kumpatula mu njiwu mumvua mudine ne kasuki." 
Psalms18:18 Kumpandishaye mu bianza bia baluishi banyi ba bukole, bia bena lukuna bavua bampita makanda." 
Psalms18:19 Bavua banduisha pamvua mu dikenga, kadi Maweja-Nangila kunkolesha." 
Psalms18:20 Maweja-Nangila kumpatula mu njiwu. Bu mudiye munnange, kunsungidilaye." 
Psalms18:21 Maweja-Nangila mmungenzele bimpe, bualu tshivua muenze bibi. Mmunsankishe, bualu ku muela wanyi kakuvua mashi." 
Psalms18:22 Ndi nkumbaja mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila. Tshiena mutombokele Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. 
Psalms18:23 Ndi ndonda njila udiye undeja, tshiyi mbenga tshidiye mufunde." 
Psalms18:24 Ndi musue bionsu bivuaye mujinge, ndi mudilame ku bubi." 
Psalms18:25 Maweja-Nangila mmunsankishe, bualu ndi mumutumikile. Udi mumanye mumvua muenze amu bidiye musue." 
Psalms18:26 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi unanga badi bakunanga, usankisha bikole, badi bakutumikila." 
Psalms18:27 Badi ne muoyi mutoke, udi ubaleja muoyi muimpe, ubenga ba muoyi mubi." 
Psalms18:28 Udi usungidila badi badipuekesha, upetula badi baditambisha." 
Psalms18:29 Maweja-Nangila udi untokeshila njila, umusha miidima muaba undi ngenda." 
Psalms18:30 Patudi nebe ndi mbanda bimana, ntupika, ndiela kudi baluishi, mbatshimuna." 
Psalms18:31 Bidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza bidi biakane. Yeye muambe diyi, udi udikumbaja. Udi ulama bu ngabu bonsu badi banyemena kudiye." 
Psalms18:32 Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu Maweja-Nangila. Amu Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi mukole, mupite lubuebue." 
Psalms18:33 Udi undongoluela njila, umpesha bukole bua kuluangana." 
Psalms18:34 Udi unnyemesha lubilu bu lua ngulungu, ungimanyika pa miongu ya mikuna." 
Psalms18:35 Udi undongesha mvita, undeja mundi mua kunana buta." 
Psalms18:36 Maweja-Nangila, udi undama ne diebe dia bukole, unsungidila ne ngabu, umpesha bukole, pandi nkubikila." 
Psalms18:37 Udi mungakajile njila. Ke pandi nnyema, tshiyi nansha ntetuka." 
Psalms18:38 Ndi ndondakaja bena lukuna banyi, mbakuata, mpingana mumane kubabutula." 
Psalms18:39 Ndi mbatapa, mbasunsula, kabayi mua kujuka, nteka dikasa pambidi pabu." 
Psalms18:40 Wewe udi umpesha bukole bua kuluangana, utekesha baluishi banyi, batue binu ku makasa anyi." 
Psalms18:41 Udi unyemesha baluishi banyi. Ndi mbutula badi nanyi lukuna. 
Psalms18:42 Nansha bela mbila, muntu kena ubambuluisha. Nansha batendelela Maweja-Nangila, kena ubitaba." 
Psalms18:43 Ndi mbavingutula, mbenza lupuishi, ludi mvunde upepula, mbadiata bu bitotshi bia mu njila." 
Psalms18:44 Udi mumpandishe mu bianza bia bantu batomboke, munteke mukalenga wa bisamba. Bantu bamvua tshiyi mumanye, bakadi bantumikila." 
Psalms18:45 Badi bumvua amu muaku wanyi, bitaba. Bantu benyi badi balabidila kundi." 
Psalms18:46 Kabena bantuila nkanana. Badi bapatuka miaba ivuabu basokome, bazakala." 
Psalms18:47 Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Tuasakidila lubuebue luanyi! Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mumpandishe." 
Psalms18:48 Amu ku bukole buende, ndi ntshimuna baluishi, bitaba bumfumu buanyi." 
Psalms18:49 Maweja-Nangila, udi unsungidila kudi bena lukuna banyi. Ndi ntshimuna badi banduisha, mpatuka mu bianza bia bena tshinyangu." 
Psalms18:50 Ke pandi nkutumbisha mu bukua bisamba, nkuimbila misambu, nkusamuna." 
Psalms18:51 Maweja-Nangila mmuambuluishe bikole mukalenga, uvuaye musungule, mmunange kashidi Davide uvuaye mujidile, kabidi ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu." 
Psalms19:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu." 
Psalms19:2 Diulu didi dileja ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmunene. Bia kulu bionsu bidi bimanyisha bidiye muenze. 
Psalms19:3 Dituku dionsu didi diambila dituku dikuabu, butuku budi bumanyisha butuku bukuabu bia dikema biende." 
Psalms19:4 Kabiena biyukila, kabiena biamba bualu, katuena nansha tunwua tshintu." 
Psalms19:5 Kadi diyi diabi didi ditangalaka buloba bujima, miaku yabi yumvuika ne ku ndekelu kuabu. Mvidi Mukulu mmuashile diba nzubu mu diulu." 
Psalms19:6 Patshiatshia didi dipatukamu, bu mudi mulume upatuka kua mukajende, usanka, bu mudi tshilobu tshitua ntunku." 
Psalms19:7 Didi dibanda ku ntuadijilu wa buloba, dibuela ku ndekelu wabu, nkenke yadi itua miaba yonsu." 
Psalms19:8 Mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila kayena bubi. Idi ifila bukole, ipetesha muoyi. Mibelu ya Maweja-Nangila idi mimpe, ikebela bena lungenyi lutekete meji." 
Psalms19:9 Meyi a Maweja-Nangila adi makane, aludika muntu mu njila wa diakalenga." 
Psalms19:10 Kunemeka Maweja-Nangila nkuakane, tumunemeke kashidi. Maweja-Nangila udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, kabayi mua kumudinga." 
Psalms19:11 Mikenji yende mmipite tshiamu tshia mpawungi mushinga, idi mimpe, mipite buitshi busheme." 
Psalms19:12 Maweja-Nangila, ndi muena mudimu webe. Mikenji yebe idi imbela, kuyilonda nkupeta diakalenga." 
Psalms19:13 Bantu bonsu badi batupakana. Umfuile luse bua bilema bindi muenze mu mpukapuka. 
Psalms19:14 Ungepule ku ditambisha, bua kadivu kumpita bukole. Nanku nengikale tshiyi kalema, tshiyi muena tshibawu." 
Psalms19:15 Wanyishe miaku yanyi ne meji anyi. Ke tshindi ntekemena. Wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi lubuebue luanyi, tshilobu tshidi tshimpandisha!" 
Psalms20:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu." 
Psalms20:2 Dituku diudi mu dikenga, Maweja-Nangila anyishe dilomba diebe. Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe akulame!" 
Psalms20:3 Akuambuluishe mu nzubu muende mudiye, akukuatshishe biangatshile mu Siyone!" 
Psalms20:4 Avuluke bionsu biuvua mumulambule, itabe milambu yebe ya kuosha!" 
Psalms20:5 Akupe bionsu biudi ujinga, akumbaje biudi wipatshila!" 
Psalms20:6 Nanku netuele mbila ya disanka, bualu neutshimune ne bukole bua Muena Kulu. Netusempele ne dibendela, tutumbishe Mvidi Mukulu wetu! Maweja-Nangila akumbaje bionsu biudi umulomba." 
Psalms20:7 Mpindiewu ndi mumanye mudi Maweja-Nangila, wambuluisha mukalenga udiye mujidile, umuandamuina mu nzubu wende wa mu diulu, wenza malu a dikema bua kumusungidila." 
Psalms20:8 Bamue badi batekemena ku matempu abu a mvita, bakuabu ku nyama yabu ya tubalu, kadi tuetu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ke bukole buetu!" 
Psalms20:9 Banga badi bakuluka, badishinda; tuetu tudi bashale bimane kulu." 
Psalms20:10 Maweja-Nangila, ambuluishe mukalenga, atshimune! Tudi tukutendelela, utuitabe!" 
Psalms21:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu." 
Psalms21:2 Mukalenga udi usanka, utua tshianga, bualu wewe Maweja-Nangila uvua umuambuluisha, yeye kutshimuna!" 
Psalms21:3 Udi mukumbaje tshivuaye ujinga. Kuena mumupale tshivuaye ukulomba. 
Psalms21:4 Udi mumuele lupemba, mumuase nsala wa lumu." 
Psalms21:5 Uvua mukulombe bua kushala panu, wewe kuitaba, kumupesha matuku mulongulongu." 
Psalms21:6 Uvua umuambuluisha, yeye kupeta lumu lunene. Wewe kumuvudijila buneme ne butumbi." 
Psalms21:7 Uvua mumusankishe kashidi. Paudi pabuipi nende, udi umvua diakalenga." 
Psalms21:8 Eyowa, mukalenga mmutekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila. Kena mua kutenkakana, bualu Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu udi umuambuluisha." 
Psalms21:9 Mukalenga, neukuate baluishi bebe, tshianza tshiebe katshiakupanga badi bakukina." 
Psalms21:10 Pawamueneka ne tshiji, neuboshe mu tshikutu tshia kapia. — Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila ababutule, kapia kaboshe! —" 
Psalms21:11 Neushidishe ndelanganyi yabu pa buloba, ubutule lulelu luabu lujima." 
Psalms21:12 Padibu bakeba kukuenzela bibi, bakuelela bipangu, kabakukuenzela bualu to." 
Psalms21:13 Neubase mikete, banyeme lubilu." 
Psalms21:14 Maweja-Nangila, leja bukole buebe. Nanku netuimbe, tusamune biudi muenze!" 
Psalms22:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa kuimba ne muadi bu wa “Ngulungu wa tshienda patshiatshia.”" 
Psalms22:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wandekedi bua tshinyi? Meme kudila kukunza mesu, wewe nansha kunteleja! Udi ushala kule bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms22:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, butuku ne munya, ndi nkubikila, kadi tshiena mpeta dikisha, bualu kuena ungambuluisha!" 
Psalms22:4 Kadi wewe ke udi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, udi musombe mu nkuasa wa bumfumu! Bena Izrayele badi bakutumbisha matuku onsu!" 
Psalms22:5 Bankambua betu bavua batekemena kuudi, wewe kubasungidila." 
Psalms22:6 Bavua bakubikila, wewe kubapikula. Bavua bakutekemena, kabayi bashala ku bundu!" 
Psalms22:7 Kadi meme tshitshiena muntu! Badi bammona bu musanda. Bonsu badi bampenda, bampepeja!" 
Psalms22:8 Badi bammona, banseka, babeteka ku mishiku, bakupa mitu, bamba ne:" 
Psalms22:9 “Tekemena Maweja-Nangila, neakuambuluishe! Neakupikule, bualu udi wende wa pa muoyi!”" 
Psalms22:10 Maweja-Nangila, wewe uvua mumpatule munda mua mamu bimpe! Uvua munteke pa tshiadi tshiende, tshiyi ntshina tshintu!" 
Psalms22:11 Amu bandela, wewe kushala ndeji wanyi! Amu mmona diba, wewe ukavua Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!" 
Psalms22:12 Kushadi kule, bualu ndi mu dikenga! Kakuena udi mua kungambuluisha, amu wewe!" 
Psalms22:13 Baluishi bavule mbanjingile, bangela munkatshi, bu ngombe milume ya lonji ya mu mpata ya Bashane!" 
Psalms22:14 Idi ibutula mukana, ikeba kundia, idila bu nyama ya ntambue ya tshikisu!" 
Psalms22:15 Bukole buanyi budi bupueka, bu mudi mayi atangalaka. Mifuba idi itukakana, muoyi wanyi wenguluka munda bu manyi." 
Psalms22:16 Muminu mmungume, ludimi lulamate mu tshilakalaka. Wewe kunshiya mu lupuishi bu tshitalu!" 
Psalms22:17 Tshisumbu tshia benji ba bibi mbangele munkatshi. Mbua eyi imfinakaja, ikeba kunsuma ku bianza ne ku makasa!" 
Psalms22:18 Tshinyanu ntshinkuate. Mifuba yanyi yonsu idi imueneka patoke! Baluishi banyi badi bimana, banjooja banseka." 
Psalms22:19 Badi babanyangana bilamba bianyi, batshinka udi mua kubiangata." 
Psalms22:20 Kadi Maweja-Nangila, kushadi kule! Wewe ke bukole buanyi, luakunu lukasa, ungambuluishe!" 
Psalms22:21 Umpandishe ku lufu lua tshinyangu, undame bua mbua eyi kayinsumi!" 
Psalms22:22 Umpandisheku mukana mua ntambue, undame bua nsengu ya mbowa kayintapi! Eyowa, wewe kungambuluisha!" 
Psalms22:23 Nanku nemmanyishe bana betu biuvua muenze! Nenkutumbishe, bantu bateleja:" 
Psalms22:24 “Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, nuenu bantu bende! Munemekayi, nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe! Mutshinayi, nuenu bena Izrayele!" 
Psalms22:25 Bualu kavua mupepeje nansha mupetule bapela, kavua mubele nyima! Kadi uvua muteleje lubila luabu!”" 
Psalms22:26 Maweja-Nangila, ke pandi nkutumbisha mu tshisangilu tshinene, nkulambula milambu imvua mukulaye, bantu bebe batangile!" 
Psalms22:27 Ndi mbikila bapela, badie buukute! Bantu badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu, nebamutumbishe, balale panu, baboboke!" 
Psalms22:28 Bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba, bavuluke Maweja-Nangila, bapingane kudiye! Matunga onsu amukukuile, adiele panshi kumpala kuende." 
Psalms22:29 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga wa bantu, udi ku mutu kua bukua bisamba!" 
Psalms22:30 Banene ba pa buloba nebamukukuile! — Bonsu bavuavua kufua, badi bamutuila binu!" 
Psalms22:31 Ndelanganyi yabu neyimuenzele mudimu. Baledi nebamanyishe bana mudi Maweja-Nangila! 
Psalms22:32 Ndelanganyi yonsu neilondelangane ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuenze bia dikema, mmupandishe bantu bende.”" 
Psalms23:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, ke wanyi mundami. Nanku tshiakukenga tshintu." 
Psalms23:2 Udi umfila mu mpata ya bisosa bibishi, undadika talala pabuipi ne mayi." 
Psalms23:3 Udi ufululula bukole buanyi. Udi undudika mu njila muakane bualu udi mulami wa bena Izrayele. 
Psalms23:4 Nansha mpita mu lupongu lua miidima, tshiena mua kutshina bubi nansha bumue, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wenda nanyi, undombola, unsungidila ku njiwu, ke bidi binsankisha" 
Psalms23:5 Udi untekela mesa, baluishi banyi batangile, undaba tshilabu tshia muenyi muimpe. ungelela maluvu dikopu tente." 
Psalms23:6 Eyowa, matuku onsu antshidi ne muoyi, bulenga buebe ne luse nebikale nanyi. Maweja-Nangila, matuku anyi onsu a panu, nembuele amu mu nzubu muebe." 
Psalms24:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Bantu ne bintu bionsu mbia Maweja-Nangila, buloba ne bidipu bionsu mbiende yeye." 
Psalms24:2 Yeye ngudi mushindike buloba pa mayi manene, bua mavuala kaabunyungishi." 
Psalms24:3 — Nnganyi udi mua kubanda pa mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila? Nnganyi udi mua kubuela mu nzubu wende wa tshijila? 
Psalms24:4 — Ke bena ku muela kakuyi mashi, ba muoyi mutoke, kabayi bela meji mabi, kabayi baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima." 
Psalms24:5 Maweja-Nangila neabele lupemba. Mvidi Mukulu mupandishi wabu, neababingishe." 
Psalms24:6 Ke bantu badi bakeba Maweja-Nangila, basemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe." 
Psalms24:7 Biibi, unzulukayi, shiyayi muaba munene! Kangulayi ne biibi bia kale! Mukalenga munene ukadi ufika!" 
Psalms24:8 — Mukalenga munene ewu nnganyi? — Ke Maweja-Nangila, tshilobu tshia makanda; Maweja-Nangila, tshilobu, kanyemi baluishi!" 
Psalms24:9 Biibi unzulukayi, shiyayi muaba munene! Kangulayi ne biibi bia kale! Mukalenga munene ukadi ufika!" 
Psalms24:10 — Mukalenga munene ewu nnganyi? — Mukalenga munene ewu ke Maweja-Nangila, mfumu wa buloba ne wa bionsu bidipu!" 
Psalms25:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, ndi nsemena kuudi." 
Psalms25:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi ndifila kuudi. Kumfuishi bundu, bena lukuna banyi kabanseki!" 
Psalms25:3 Badi batekemena kuudi, kabakunyingalala. Bundu mbua badi bakubenga! Nebashale bianza bitupu!" 
Psalms25:4 Maweja-Nangila, undeje njila wa kulonda, undongeshe mua kusomba panu." 
Psalms25:5 Undongeshe, undudike bua nkulamate. Wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu udi umpandisha. Matuku onsu ndi ntekemena kuudi." 
Psalms25:6 Maweja-Nangila, vuluka ne: wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kuonsu kuaka uvua utunanga, utufuila luse." 
Psalms25:7 Nanku, kuvuluki bilema bianyi bia ku buana, nansha ntupakanyi yanyi. Kadi Maweja-Nangila, kumpu muoyi, bualu udi munnange. Ndi ntekemena luse luebe." 
Psalms25:8 Maweja-Nangila mmuena bulenga ne buakane, udi uleja bena tshibawu njila wa kulonda." 
Psalms25:9 Udi ulombola bapuekele mu njila wa buakane, ubalongesha tshidiye musue." 
Psalms25:10 Bionsu bidi Maweja-Nangila wenza, bidi bileja mudiye unanga bantu badi balama ndondu wende, bakumbaja mikenji yende." 
Psalms25:11 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu. Mibi yanyi mmipite bungi! Umfuile luse!" 
Psalms25:12 Maweja-Nangila nealeje muntu udi umunemeka, njila udiye ne bua kusungula." 
Psalms25:13 Muntu awu neikale muena diakalenga. Bana bende nebapiane buloba. 
Psalms25:14 Badi bitaba Maweja-Nangila, udi ubamanyisha malu ende masokome, ubalongesha mudi ndondu wende." 
Psalms25:15 Mesu anyi adi diba dionsu kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu amu yeye neankopole mu buteyi." 
Psalms25:16 Maweja-Nangila, untangile, umfuile luse. Ndi mu dikenga, tshiyi ne udi ungambuluisha." 
Psalms25:17 Umushe kanyinganyinga mu muoyi wanyi, umpatule mu dikenga." 
Psalms25:18 Mona mundi nkenga, ntata bikole. Umfuile luse bua bilema bianyi bionsu." 
Psalms25:19 Umanye ne: bena lukuna banyi mbapite bungi. Badi nanyi lukinu lukole. 
Psalms25:20 Undame, unsungidile. Kumfuishi bundu, bualu ndi nkutekemena." 
Psalms25:21 Ungambuluishe, bua nkumbaje tshiudi musue, tshiyi ngenzela bantu bibi." 
Psalms25:22 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, pikula Izrayele, umupandishe ku makenga ende onsu." 
Psalms26:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, umbingishe, bualu tshiena muenze bualu bubi nansha bumue. Ndi nkutekemena muanyi muonsu." 
Psalms26:2 Maweja-Nangila, unkonkonone, undumbuluishe, tangila munda muanyi majinga ne meji bindi nabi." 
Psalms26:3 Ndi mvuluka diba dionsu muudi munnange. Ndi ngenda panu, bualu udi nanyi kashidi." 
Psalms26:4 Tshiena ngendakana ne bantu babi, tshiena ngumvuangana ne bena mpala ibidi." 
Psalms26:5 Ndi mbenga benji ba bibi, tshiena musue bantu badi kabayi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms26:6 Nengowe bianza, ndeja ne: tshiena ne bualu. Maweja-Nangila, nentendelele, nyungulukile tshilambuilu tshiebe." 
Psalms26:7 Ndi nkuimbila, nkuela tuasakidila, mmanyisha bantu bia dikema biebe." 
Psalms26:8 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mumanye nzubu uudi musombe, muaba uudi utuleja lumu luebe." 
Psalms26:9 Kunshipi bu muena tshibawu, kungumushi panu bu mushipianganyi." 
Psalms26:10 Ke bantu badi benzelangana bibi, bindila amu mabuejila." 
Psalms26:11 Ndi ngenda mu njila wa buakane. Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse, umpandishe." 
Psalms26:12 Ndi ngimana pa muaba mukole, muaba udi bantu basangile nengele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms27:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila udi bukole buanyi, kabidi mumpandishi wanyi, tshiena mua kuzakela muntu to. Maweja-Nangila udi undama, tshiena ntshina muntu." 
Psalms27:2 Padi bantu babi banduisha, bakeba kunshipa, amu bobu ke badi batetuka, badishinda panshi." 
Psalms27:3 Nansha tshituilu tshijima tshingela munkatshi, tshiena ngumvua bowa. Nansha babanga mvita, ndi nsomba amu talalaa." 
Psalms27:4 Tshimue tshindi njinga menemene, ndomba kudi Maweja-Nangila, se nkusomba mu nzubu wende matuku anyi onsu, nkutumbisha bilenga bidiye mungenzele, nkumanya tshidiye musue." 
Psalms27:5 Nanku diba dia dikenga, neambueje mu nzubu muende, neanteke kaba kakole pa mukuna udiye usomba." 
Psalms27:6 Diakamue nkadi mpetula baluishi badi bangela munkatshi. Nendambule Maweja-Nangila milambu, mmuela tunkunduluila, mmuimbila misambu." 
Psalms27:7 Maweja-Nangila, pandi nkubikila, unteleje, umfuile luse, ungitabe." 
Psalms27:8 Ndi mvuluka miaku yebe ya ne: “Pingana kundi.” Ke pandi mpingana kuudi wewe, Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms27:9 Kunsokomi, kungipatshi ne tshiji. Wewe ke udi mungambuluishe misangu yonsu. Nanku lelu Wewe Mvidi Mukulu, mumpandishi, kumbengi, kundekedi." 
Psalms27:10 Nansha tatu ne mamu bandekela, wewe, Maweja-Nangila, neungakidile." 
Psalms27:11 Maweja-Nangila, undeje njila udi muakane, ungendeshe mu njila udi kayi njiwu, bualu baluishi banyi mbavule." 
Psalms27:12 Kumfidi mu bianza bia bena tshikisu, bualu bena dishima badi bamfunda, bakeba kunkuatshisha bowa." 
Psalms27:13 Meme tshiyi mujadike ne: Maweja-Nangila mmunange, mungasomba bimpe mu buloba ebu mbishi?" 
Psalms27:14 — Tekemena Maweja-Nangila, kola muoyi, kutekeshi mu maboku, eyowa, tekemena Maweja-Nangila!" 
Psalms28:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila ndi nkutendelela, wewe Lubuebue luanyi, teleja mbila yanyi. Wewe mubenge kunteleja, nkadi bu muntu udi ukeba kukula muoyi." 
Psalms28:2 Unteleje pandi nkusengelela, nkulomba bua ungambuluishe, pandi ngolola bianza ku muaba wa tshijila menemene uudi usombe." 
Psalms28:3 Kunteki kaba kamue ne bena tshikisu, badi bakengesha bakuabu, babambila miaku ya ditalala, kadi munda muabu muikale lonji." 
Psalms28:4 Ubanyoke bilondeshile malu mabi avuabu benze, ubapingajile bubi buvuabu benzele bakuabu." 
Psalms28:5 Kabena bamona bidi Maweja-Nangila wenza. Nanku Maweja-Nangila abanyoke, ababutule!" 
Psalms28:6 Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila. Pamvua mmusengelela, uvua munteleje." 
Psalms28:7 Maweja-Nangila udi undama, udi ngabu wanyi. Ndi mmutekemena muanyi muonsu. Bu nuwuaye mungambuluishe, ndi nsanka, ntshionkomoka, ndi musue kumuimbila misambu, kumutumbisha." 
Psalms28:8 Maweja-Nangila udi ulama bantu bende. Udi upandisha mukalenga uvuaye musungule, umukolesha ku muoyi." 
Psalms28:9 Maweja-Nangila, sungidila bantu bebe, ubele lupemba, wikale mulami wabu, ubakube kashidi." 
Psalms29:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Nuenu bonsu badi mu diulu, vuayi, nutumbishe Maweja-Nangila, vuayi, nusamune lumu luende, mwuluke bukole buende." 
Psalms29:2 Vuayi, nusamune lumu lua Maweja-Nangila. Padiye uleja mudiye wa tshijila, nuiname panshi kumpala kuende." 
Psalms29:3 Mvidi Mukulu wa lumu udi ukungula. Diyi dia Maweja-Nangila didi diumvuika pa mayi. Maweja-Nangila udi uleja pa mayi manene, mudiye ne bumfumu." 
Psalms29:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wela diyi ne bukole, Maweja-Nangila udi wela diyi ne butumbi." 
Psalms29:5 Diyi dia Maweja-Nangila didi ditshibula mitshi ya sedre, ditshibula ne mitshi minene ya sedre ya mu Lebanone." 
Psalms29:6 Maweja-Nangila udi ujija mikuna ya mu Lebanone, itupika bu tulume tua ngombe, ujija mukuna wa Ermone, utupika bu kana ka mbowa." 
Psalms29:7 Diyi dia Maweja-Nangila didi dipenya bu muela wa mvula. 
Psalms29:8 Diyi dia Maweja-Nangila didi dizakaja tshipela, Maweja-Nangila udi unyukisha tshipela tshia mu Kadeshe." 
Psalms29:9 Diyi dia Maweja-Nangila didi dilelesha ngulungu, dilelesha mbudi muitu. Mu nzubu mua Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu badi bela mbila ne: “Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu!”" 
Psalms29:10 Maweja-Nangila udi uleja pa mayi manene mudiye mfumu, mudi bukalenga buende bua kashidi." 
Psalms29:11 Maweja-Nangila apeshe bantu bende bukole, abele lupemba, abasombeshe mu bupole." 
Psalms30:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa kuimba dituku didibu bajidila nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms30:2 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkutumbisha, bualu uvua mumpandishe, kuvua muanyishe bua baluishi banyi banseke." 
Psalms30:3 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mvua munsengelele, wewe kumpandisha." 
Psalms30:4 Wewe kumpatula mu kandondu ka bafue. Nkavua dikasa ku tshiina, wewe Maweja-Nangila kumfululula." 
Psalms30:5 Nuenu bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, mutumbishayi ne misambu, numusamune, mwuluke mudiye wa tshijila." 
Psalms30:6 Tshiji tshiende tshidi katupa, kadi udi utuenzela bimpe matuku onsu. Dilolu tutshidi tudila muadi, dinda tukadi tuseka." 
Psalms30:7 Mvua musombe talalaa, ngela meji ne: “Kakuena bualu bubi budi mua kungenzekela." 
Psalms30:8 Bu muudi wewe Maweja-Nangila munnange, ndi nsomba mushindame bu udi pa mukuna. ” Kadi wewe kungela nyima, meme kubuela mu dikenga." 
Psalms30:9 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkusengelela, nkulomba bua ungambuluishe." 
Psalms30:10 Meme mufue, banjike, neupete tshinyi? Muntu mumane kushala lupuishi, udi mua kukusamuna, nansha kuambila bantu muudi ukumbaja malaya anyi?" 
Psalms30:11 Maweja-Nangila, teleja, umfuile luse. Maweja-Nangila, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms30:12 Uvua wandamuna kanyinganyinga kanyi, kenza tshianga tshia disanka. Uvua mumvule tshilamba tshia madilu, mumvuadike tshia tshibilu." 
Psalms30:13 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nenkutumbishe amu kukutumbisha. Nenkuele tuasakidila matuku anyi onsu." 
Psalms31:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu." 
Psalms31:2 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nsokoma kuudi. Unsungidile, kumfuishi bundu, bualu ke tshiuvua mulaye." 
Psalms31:3 Unteleje! Kolesha, umpandishe mpindiewu. Wikale lubuebue lundi nsokomena, nzubu mukole undi mua kunyemena." 
Psalms31:4 Wewe udi lubuebue lundi mua kusokomena. Undombole, undame, bualu ke tshiuvua mulaye." 
Psalms31:5 Amu wewe udi undama, ungepule ku makondu adibu banteya." 
Psalms31:6 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nteka muoyi wanyi mu bianza biebe. Neumpandishe, bualu wewe Mvidi Mukulu, udi ukumbaja biuvua mulaye." 
Psalms31:7 Ndi mbenga badi batendelela mvidie ya dishima, ndi nkutekemena amu wewe, Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms31:8 Ndi nsanka, ntshionkomoka, bualu uvua mungenzele bimpe, mumone dikenga dianyi, muvuluke dibungama dianyi." 
Psalms31:9 Kuvua muanyishe bua baluishi bankuate. Wewe kunkopola, bua ngenze mundi musue." 
Psalms31:10 Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse, ndi mu dikenga. Mesu mmanguwule ne binsonji, muoyi mmunshikile munda, mubidi mmuntekete." 
Psalms31:11 Ntatu idi ikepesha matuku anyi a panu, bidimu bienda bipita, meme ndi ntua amu mikemu. Mibi yanyi mminyange bukole buanyi. Nansha mifuba yanyi idi isheleleka." 
Psalms31:12 Baluishi banyi bonsu badi bampenda, bena mutumba mbandembakaja. Badi bammanye, bakadi bantshina, badi bammona mu njila banyema lubilu." 
Psalms31:13 Bakadi bampue muoyi bu mufue, nkadi bu tshibambalu." 
Psalms31:14 Ndi ngunwua mudi bantu bangamba bibi. Miaba yonsu idi inkuatshisha bowa. Badi bangelela tshifufu tshibi, bakeba kunshipa." 
Psalms31:15 Kadi meme ndi mueyemine amu kuudi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, ngamba ne: “Wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!”" 
Psalms31:16 Diba dionsu, ndi mu bianza biebe. Umpatule mu bianza bia baluishi badi bankengesha." 
Psalms31:17 Ungakidile bimpe, bualu ndi muntu webe. Umpandishe, bualu udi munnange." 
Psalms31:18 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkutendelela, nanku kumfuishi bundu. Bundu mbua bantu badi kabayi bakuitaba. Bapuwe, bapueke mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Psalms31:19 Bena dishima aba bashale tumama. Badi baditambisha, bapepeja bantu badi kabayi ne bualu, babafunda." 
Psalms31:20 Kadi Maweja-Nangila, bantu badi bakuitaba, udi ubenzela bimpe bitambe. Bantu bonsu badi bamona bilenga biudi upesha badi banyemena kuudi." 
Psalms31:21 Udi ubalama pabuipi nebe, ubepula ku mateyi a bantu babi. Udi ubasokoka mu nzubu muebe mutantshi ne bena buenzayi." 
Psalms31:22 Maweja-Nangila, tuasakidila, uvua mundeje muuvua munnange bikole. Meme mvua bu tshimenga tshidibu baluisha." 
Psalms31:23 Mvua ndubakana, ngamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila katshiena umvuluka kabidi!” Kadi meme kukusengelela, wewe kungitaba, kungambuluisha." 
Psalms31:24 Nuenu bonsu bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, munangayi, bualu udi ulama badi bamuitaba. Kadi udi unyoka bena ditambisha bilondeshile bubi buvuabu benze." 
Psalms31:25 Nuenu bonsu badi batekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, koleshayi muoyi, nusangale." 
Psalms32:1 Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Udi muena diakalenga, padi Mvidi Mukulu ukujimijila mibi yebe, ukufuila luse bua bilema biuvua muenze." 
Psalms32:2 Udi muena diakalenga, padi Maweja-Nangila, kayi ukutangila bu muena tshibawu, kayi usangana dishima munda muebe!" 
Psalms32:3 Pamvua tshiyi ntonda bubi buanyi, bukole buanyi buvua buenda bukepela, meme kutua mikemu butuku ne munya." 
Psalms32:4 Bualu dituku dijima, tshianza tshiebe wewe, Maweja-Nangila, tshivua tshinkengesha, tshindamina panshi. Bu mudi mutshi wa matuku a minanga, tshitshivua ne bukole." 
Psalms32:5 Kadi mpindiewu ndi mukutondele bubi buanyi, tshiena mukusokoke bilema bianyi. Mvua muambe ne: “Ndi muena tshibawu, ndi ne bua kutondela Maweja-Nangila bimvua muenze.” Ke wewe kumusha tshibawu tshia mibi yanyi." 
Psalms32:6 Ke mudi bantu bebe bonsu mua kukutendelela diba dia dikenga. Nansha babuele ne kasuki mu njiwu minene, badi amu bapanda." 
Psalms32:7 Wewe udi muaba undi mua kusokomena. Udi undama mu dikenga. Neumpandishe, nanku nengele mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms32:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Nenkulongeshe, nkuleja njila wa kulonda. Nenutangile miaba yonsu iudi uya, nkubela ne:" 
Psalms32:9 Kuikadi muntu mupote, bu nyama wa kabalu nansha wa mpunde, idibu mua kutekesha amu ne nkanu, nansha ne mikaba. Nanku kuakupeta dikasa dibi to." 
Psalms32:10 Muntu mubi udi udikebela makenga mavule. Kadi udi utekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, udi upeta diakalenga kudiye." 
Psalms32:11 Maweja-Nangila anusankishe nuenu, bantu bende. Nuenu badi bamuitaba, katshilayi, tuayi tshianga."
