Psalms33:1 Nuenu bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, mukobuelayi! Amu nuenu badi bakumbaja bidiye musue, ke badi mua kumutumbisha!" 
Psalms33:2 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila ne lunzenze, musamunayi ne tshisanji tshia nshinga dikumi!" 
Psalms33:3 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu mupiamupia, numusekelele ne bisanji, numukobuele!" 
Psalms33:4 Tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba, udi utshikumbaja. Tshidiye wenza, tshidi tshijalame." 
Psalms33:5 Maweja-Nangila udi unanga malu makane ne malelela, uwuja buloba bujima ne dinanga diende!" 
Psalms33:6 Maweja-Nangila mmufuke diulu ku muaku wende, mmufuke bia mulu bionsu ku mueyelu wa mukana muende." 
Psalms33:7 Udi usangisha mayi manene muaba umue. welela mayi manene nkila. 
Psalms33:8 Buloba bujima butshine Maweja-Nangila! Bantu bonsu bazakale kumpala kuende! 
Psalms33:9 Udi wakula, etshi tshienzeka! Utuma diyi, tshiatshia tshipatuka!" 
Psalms33:10 Maweja-Nangila udi utupakaja ngenyi ya bukua bisamba, upumbisha meji adi bantu bela." 
Psalms33:11 Kadi bulongolodi bua Maweja-Nangila mbua kashidi, meji ende adi ashala tshiendelele." 
Psalms33:12 Bantu badi Maweja-Nangila muikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bantu badiye mudisunguile mbena diakalenga!" 
Psalms33:13 Maweja-Nangila udi utangidila mu diulu, umona bonsu badi benda muinshi mua diba." 
Psalms33:14 Ku muaba wende wa bukalenga, udi ujooja bonsu badi basomba pa buloba." 
Psalms33:15 Yeye ke udi mufuke mioyi ya bantu, mumanye bionsu bidibu benza." 
Psalms33:16 Mukalenga kena upandila mu mvita bua bungi bua basalayi bende. Tshilobu kena utshimuna bua dikanda diende nansha. 
Psalms33:17 Kabalu kakena kasungidila muntu, bukole buaku kabuena buambuluisha mukabandi." 
Psalms33:18 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi ulama bantu bende, ukuba badi batekemena bulenga buende." 
Psalms33:19 Udi ubasungidila ku lufu, ubalama nansha matuku mene a tshiyole." 
Psalms33:20 Tudi tutekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi utuambuluisha, utulama bu ngabu." 
Psalms33:21 Tudi tusanka bikole bualu buende, tutekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Psalms33:22 Maweja-Nangila, kumbaja bitudi batekemena, utuleje muudi mutunange." 
Psalms34:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide muimbe pavuaye mudienze bu mupale kumpala kua Abimeleke, Abimeleke kumuipata mu lubanza luende lua bukalenga." 
Psalms34:2 Nengele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila diba dionsu, nemmusamune matuku onsu." 
Psalms34:3 Nentumbishe Maweja-Nangila bua bivuaye muenze. Badibu bakengesha nebanteleje, basanke." 
Psalms34:4 Tukobuelayi bonsu Maweja-Nangila. Tutumbishe tshiapamue lumu luende. 
Psalms34:5 Mvua ntendelela Maweja-Nangila, kungitabaye. Kumpandishaye ku bionsu bivua binkuatshisha bowa." 
Psalms34:6 Mutangilayi, nanku nenusanke. Kanuakufua bundu, kanuakunyenga mpala." 
Psalms34:7 Maweja-Nangila udi uteleja mupela udi umuela mbila, ujikija dikenga diende dionsu." 
Psalms34:8 Mutumibue udi ulama bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, ubumusha ku njiwu yonsu." 
Psalms34:9 Tetayi numvue mudi busheme bua Maweja-Nangila. Badi banyemena kudiye mbena diakalenga. 
Psalms34:10 Nuenu bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, nuitabe bumfumu buende. Badi bamutumikila, kabakukenga kantu." 
Psalms34:11 Baneme kabena pa kusokoma, bua tshiyole ne bua nzala. Kadi badi batekemena Maweja-Nangila, nebapete bionsu bidibu bakengela." 
Psalms34:12 Vuakunuayi bana banyi, nunteleje, nennulongeshe mua kunemeka Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms34:13 Padi muntu musue kusanka panu, kupeta diakalenga matuku mavule," 
Psalms34:14 alekele kujanangana, alekele kushimangana," 
Psalms34:15 epuke bubi, enze bimpe, asuminyine ne dikeba bupole mu bantu." 
Psalms34:16 Maweja-Nangila udi utangila bantu bende, uteleja padibu bamubila." 
Psalms34:17 Maweja-Nangila udi ukina benji ba bibi, ukupula mena abu pa buloba." 
Psalms34:18 Padi bantu bende bamutendelela, Maweja-Nangila udi ubateleja, ubumusha ku makenga abu." 
Psalms34:19 Udi pabuipi ne badi ne kanyinganyinga, upandisha badi kabatshiyi ne ditekemena." 
Psalms34:20 Udi munange Mvidi Mukulu udi ne makenga mavule, kadi Maweja-Nangila udi umupandisha ku onsu" 
Psalms34:21 Udi ulama mubidi wabu mujima, bua kabatshibudi mufuba wabu nansha umue." 
Psalms34:22 Muena bubi, bubi buende nebumushipe. Nebanyoke badi bakina bantu bakane." 
Psalms34:23 Maweja-Nangila udi upandisha bantu bende. Badi banyemena kudiye, kabakupeta tshibawu." 
Psalms35:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, luangana ne bankinyi banyi, uluishe badi bangenza mvita." 
Psalms35:2 Kuata ngabu ne bia mvita, unsungidile!" 
Psalms35:3 Sempela ne difuma ne muela, uluishe badi bankina. Unjadikile ne: “Nenkupandishe!”" 
Psalms35:4 Badi banjingila lufu, bundu bubakuate, bupuke lumu! Badi bela meji a kungenzela bibi, bapingane tshianyima, bapange bualu!" 
Psalms35:5 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila neabatangalaje bu bisoosa biambula kudi lupepele. 
Psalms35:6 Mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila neabalondakaje, mu njila ya miidima ne ya busenu." 
Psalms35:7 Bavua bangelela bukondu, meme tshiyi ne bualu, bangumbuila tshiina bua meme kudishindamu." 
Psalms35:8 Kabutu kabakuate kabayi bamanye. Bukondu buabu bubakuate. Badishinde mu tshiina tshivuabu bumbule! 
Psalms35:9 Kadi meme nensanke, ntshionkomoke, bualu Maweja-Nangila neansungule." 
Psalms35:10 Nengambile Maweja-Nangila muanyi muonsu ne: “Kakuena udi bu wewe. Wewe udi upandisha mupele mu bianza bia baluishi bende, usungidila muena dikenga kudi muena tshinyangu.”" 
Psalms35:11 Bantu badi banjadikila malu a dishima. Badi bandumbuluisha bua malu andi tshiyi mumanye. 
Psalms35:12 Badi bampingajila bibi pa bimpe, tshiyi ne udi ungakuila!" 
Psalms35:13 Pavua baluishi banyi basama, mvua ne kanyinganyinga, mbenga kudia, ntendelela Maweja-Nangila. — kadi dilomba dianyi kadivua dipeta tshipeta!" 
Psalms35:14 Mvua nkengakana bu padi mulunda nansha muanetu usama. Mvua munyingalale bu muntu mu madilu a mamuende mumuledi. 
Psalms35:15 Kadi mpindiewu pandi mu dikenga, baluishi banyi badi basanka, badikunguja bua kunseka. Nansha bantu benyi mene, bandi tshiyi mumanye, badi bantuuta, bangela bibingu." 
Psalms35:16 Padibu bammona ntetuka, badi banseka, bansumakajila menu." 
Psalms35:17 Maweja-Nangila, muudi mulengulule bualu ebu nenku mbishi? Unsungidile ku tshinyangu tshiabu. Umpatule mukana mua ntambue eyi, nshala ne muoyi." 
Psalms35:18 Nanku nenkuele tuasakidila muaba udi bantu bebe basangile. Nenkutumbishe, bonsu bateleje." 
Psalms35:19 Baluishi bavua banshiminyina malu, kabasanki ne: “Tuamutshimunyi!” Badi bankina kapayi bualu, kabaleji musangelu kuisu." 
Psalms35:20 Kabena ne diyi dimpe, kadi badi amu bajana, bantu badi basomba talalaa mu ditunga." 
Psalms35:21 Badi babulula mukana, banjana ne: “Eyowa, tudi bakumone, tudi bakukuate!”" 
Psalms35:22 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila uvua mudimuene bionsu bivua bienzeka. Nanku kupuwi, kundekedi nkayanyi!" 
Psalms35:23 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, juka, undumbuluile! Maweja-Nangila, tabuluka, unsungidile!" 
Psalms35:24 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, nanku umbingishe! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kabandembakaji!" 
Psalms35:25 Baluishi banyi kabangambi ne: “Eyowa, tudi bamukuate! Ke tshitudi bajinge!”" 
Psalms35:26 Badi basanka bua diakabi dianyi, bundu bubakuate, bupuke lumu! Badi baditambisha, bampepeja, bafue bundu disu tente!" 
Psalms35:27 Kadi badi bambingisha, basanke, batue tshianga, bambe amu kuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunene! Udi usankisha muntu wende, umusombesha talalaa!”" 
Psalms35:28 Meme kabidi nemmanyishe bantu muudi ne diyi dimue, nenkutumbishe matuku anyi onsu!" 
Psalms36:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wamisambu ya muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu Davide, wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu." 
Psalms36:2 Ndi muvuluke miaku idi ntomboji wakula, wamba ne: “Tutshine Mvidi Mukulu bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms36:3 Udi uditemba ne: ndi muntu muakane. Ke mudiye kayi mua kutonda bubi buvuaye muenze, nansha kububenga." 
Psalms36:4 Bionsu bidiye wamba bidi amu bia dishima ne bia didinga. Mmupange meji, mmupange muoyi muimpe." 
Psalms36:5 Butuku udi udilongolola bua kuenza bibi. Udi wenda mu njila wa bubi, kayi musue kudilengeja." 
Psalms36:6 Maweja-Nangila, bulenga buebe mbutue ne mu diulu. Biudi wamba, udi ubikumbaja ne mu mavuba." 
Psalms36:7 Lupandu luebe ndupite ne mikuna mitumbuke ku bule. Nsambu iudi ukosa mmipite buondoke bua mayi manene. Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi wambuluisha bantu, wambuluisha kabidi ne nyama." 
Psalms36:8 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe udi utunanga bikole; ke patudi tusokomena mu mapuapua ebe." 
Psalms36:9 Udi utudisha ne bilenga bia mu nzubu muebe, tuukuta, utunuisha ku misulu ya dinanga diebe." 
Psalms36:10 Kuudi ndi mpetela bukole. Wewe udi diba didi ditumuenesha muoyi. 
Psalms36:11 Unange badi bakumanya. Bantu badi bakuitaba, ubenzele bimpe." 
Psalms36:12 Dikasa dia muena ditambisha kadinzaaji. Tshianza tshia bantu babi katshimpatudi mu nzubu. 
Psalms36:13 Benji ba bibi badi bapona panshi kumpala kuebe, kabayi mua kujuka kabidi to." 
Psalms37:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Lekela kubaba bantu babi, kutekedi badi benza bibi lubabu." 
Psalms37:2 Bualu nebafube lukasa bu bisoosa, nebuume bu biseki." 
Psalms37:3 Tekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, enza bimpe, neushale mu ditunga, usombemu talalaa." 
Psalms37:4 Disanka diebe dikale amu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Nanku neakupeshe bionsu biudi umulomba. 
Psalms37:5 Udifile kudi Maweja-Nangila, utekemene kudiye, kakukufuisha bundu." 
Psalms37:6 Neakulumbuluile, akubingishe. Neutoke bu munya wa mu dinda, neukenke bu diba munda munya." 
Psalms37:7 Shala talalaa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, indila ne lutulu tshiavuaye kuenza. Kubabi badi bapeta diakalenga, badi bakumbaja meji abu mabi." 
Psalms37:8 Kufiki munda, kubinduluki, kubabi badi benza bibi, bualu bidi mua kukulamata!" 
Psalms37:9 Benji ba bibi nebabutuke. Kadi badi batekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, nebapete ditunga." 
Psalms37:10 Katupa kakese, bantu babi nebajimine. Neukebe muaba uvuabu bapitshila, kuyi upeta nansha tshifundu tshia dikasa diabu." 
Psalms37:11 Kadi bakengi nebapete ditunga. Nebasombemu ne disanka divule. 
Psalms37:12 Muntu mubi udi ukina muntu muakane, usumakaja dinu bua kumuenzela bibi." 
Psalms37:13 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi useka muntu awu, bualu mmumanye ne: dituku dia kumunyoka nedifike!" 
Psalms37:14 Bantu babi badi batula muela, banana buta, bua kutapa mupela ne muena dikenga, bua kushipa badi balonda njila mululame." 
Psalms37:15 Kadi muela wabu neubatubule muoyi, buta buabu nebutshibuke." 
Psalms37:16 Bikese bidi kudi muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mbipite mpetu mivule ya muntu udi umubenga." 
Psalms37:17 Bualu bumfumu bua muena bubi nebunyanguke, kadi bantu bende Maweja-Nangila udi ubashindika." 
Psalms37:18 Maweja-Nangila udi ukuba diba dionsu badi benza tshidiye musue. Ditunga didibu bapeta kudiye, nebashale nadi kashidi." 
Psalms37:19 Bantu abu kabakufua bundu diba dia dikenga. Mu bikondu bia nzala nebapete bonsu bidibu nabi dijinga. 
Psalms37:20 Eyowa, bantu babi nebabutuke, bakinyi ba Maweja-Nangila nebuume lukasa bu bilongu mu mpata, nebajimine, nebajimine lubilu bu muinshi wa kapia." 
Psalms37:21 Muntu mubi udi usomba tshintu, kayi utshipingaja. Kadi muntu muakane udi ne luse, wambuluisha bakuabu." 
Psalms37:22 Badi Mvidi Mukulu wela lupemba, nebapete ditunga. Badiye utshipa, nebabutuke." 
Psalms37:23 Maweja-Nangila udi wambuluisha muntu udi umusankisha. Neamuludike mu njila, amushindike." 
Psalms37:24 Muntu awu, nansha yeye udishinda, kena ushala panshi, Maweja-Nangila udi umukuata ku tshianza, umujula." 
Psalms37:25 Katshia bandela ne mundi mukulakaje emu, tshiena muanji kumona Maweja-Nangila ushiya muntu wende mu dikenga, nansha bana bende balombangana tshiakudia mu misesu." 
Psalms37:26 Matuku onsu muntu awu udi ufuila bantu luse, ubambuluisha. Bana bende badi ne muabi." 
Psalms37:27 Paudi ubenga bubi, wenza biakane, neushale kashidi mu ditunga." 
Psalms37:28 Bualu Maweja-Nangila kena ulekela bantu bende, mmusue ne: bonsu benzelangane bimpe. Benji ba bibi nebabutuke kashidi, ndelanganyi yabu neijimine." 
Psalms37:29 Kabidi bantu bakane nebapete ditunga, basombemu tshiendelelele." 
Psalms37:30 Muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi wakula miaku ya meji, umvuija bantu bidi Maweja-Nangila musue." 
Psalms37:31 Bualu udi wenda ne mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu mu muoyi wende, uyikumbaja." 
Psalms37:32 Muntu mubi udi utentekela muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ukeba kumushipesha." 
Psalms37:33 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kena ulekela muntu wende mu bianza bia muntu mubi. Yeye ku tshilumbu, Maweja-Nangila kena musue bua bamupishe to." 
Psalms37:34 Tekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, ulame lutulu, ukumbaje mikenji yende. Neakuzangike, upete ditunga. Neumone mudiye ubutula bantu babi." 
Psalms37:35 Meme kumona muena tshinyangu ukengesha bantu, wenda ukola bu mutshi wa sedre wa mu Lebanone." 
Psalms37:36 Matuku apita, meme kupitshila tshiakabidi muaba awu, tshiyi mumone muntu. Meme kumukeba, nansha kumusangana to." 
Psalms37:37 Jooja muntu udi wenza malu makane, tangila muntu wa nsongu. Neumone ne: muntu wa nenku udi ne diakalenga mu bana bende." 
Psalms37:38 Kadi badi benza bibi, nebabutuke musangu umue. Ndelanganyi yabu neijimine." 
Psalms37:39 Maweja-Nangila udi upandisha bantu bende, diba dia dikenga badi mua kusokomena kudiye." 
Psalms37:40 Udi ubambuluisha, ubalama bimpe, ubasungidila kudi bantu babi, bualu bavua banyemena kudiye." 
Psalms38:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, bua kuleja Mvidi Mukulu dikenga diende." 
Psalms38:2 Maweja-Nangila, kuena mua kumpisha, nansha wewe ne tshiji, kuena mua kunnyoka, nansha wewe mumfikile munda." 
Psalms38:3 Udi mungase mikete yebe, muntuute, munkulule panshi." 
Psalms38:4 Mubidi mmuntukakane onsu mujima, bualu udi munnyoke ne tshiji. Mifuba yanyi mmikoyoboke, bualu mvua muenze bibi." 
Psalms38:5 Bilema bianyi mbipite tshipimu, bingenza bujitu budi bumpita dikanda." 
Psalms38:6 Mputa yanyi idi mibole, inunka bibi, bualu mvua muenze malu a butatakane." 
Psalms38:7 Maboku mmantekete. Dikenga ndintonde. Butuku ne munya ndi amu ne binsonji kuisu. 
Psalms38:8 Munda munjukuke luya. Mubidi mmuntukakane onsu mujima. 
Psalms38:9 Bukole buonsu mbujimine, ngenda mukobame. Muoyi udi undubakana munda." 
Psalms38:10 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi mumanye tshindi njinga, mumvue kabidi mikemu yanyi." 
Psalms38:11 Muoyi udi ungomba munda. Bukole mbunjimine. Mesu anyi akadi bibuidibuidi. 
Psalms38:12 Pandi nkengakana nanku, balunda banyi ne bena mutumba badi bannyema, nansha bana betu bakadi batalamukile pa bule." 
Psalms38:13 Badi bankebela lufu, badi banteya mateyi. Badi banjingila diakabi, badi bangelela tshifufu tshibi, basombela amu bua kunjana." 
Psalms38:14 Kadi meme ndi njibika matshi, tshiyi nteleja. Ndi ngenza bu kamama, tshiyi ngamba bualu." 
Psalms38:15 Ndi ngenza bu muntu udi kayi umvua, ke pandi tshiyi ngandamuna." 
Psalms38:16 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mutekemene kuudi, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe nkayebe neubandamune." 
Psalms38:17 Nkavua mukulombe ne: ubakandike, kabasanki pandi mu dikenga, kabaditembi pandi ntupakana." 
Psalms38:18 Ndi ngamba kufua tshipuka. Dikenga kadiena dinshila muaba. 
Psalms38:19 Eyowa, ndi ntonda bubi buanyi, bualu budi bungenza bowa." 
Psalms38:20 Baluishi banyi batshidi ne bukole, batshidi ne dikanda. Badi bankina kapayi bualu mbapite bungi." 
Psalms38:21 Badi bampingajila bibi pa bilenga bimvua mubenzele. Badi bantandisha, bualu ndi musue kuenza bimpe." 
Psalms38:22 Maweja-Nangila, kundekedi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, lua kundi." 
Psalms38:23 Maweja-Nangila mumpandishi wanyi, kolesha, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms39:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu ne wa mu mukanda wa Yedutune. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms39:2 Mvua muambe ne: “Nendikandile bua kuakula bibi, tshiena mua kuamba bualu budi mua kumpisha. Pandi munkatshi mua bantu babi, nempuwe bu muntu musuike tshilamba ku mishiku.”" 
Psalms39:3 Nanku meme kushala bu kamama, tshiyi ngakula, meme kubenga kuamba bualu. Kadi dikenga dianyi kukola amu kukola." 
Psalms39:4 Muoyi wanyi unduluka munda, meji amvua ngela avua angosha. Ke meme kuakula ne:" 
Psalms39:5 Maweja-Nangila, nemfue diba kaayi? Nenshale kabidi ne muoyi matuku bungi munyi? Ungandamune bua mmanye matuku autshidi muntapile." 
Psalms39:6 Matuku anyi a panu adi anu bu ntanta ya tshianza. Bidimu bianyi bidi amu tshianana ku mesu ebe. Muntu nansha yeye ne muoyi, udi amu bu lupepele." 
Psalms39:7 Muntu udi utua eku, utua kuaka: bidi amu bu tshilota. Udi uditatshisha, kayi upeta tshintu. Kadi nansha yeye mupete biuma, kena mumanye wabiangata." 
Psalms39:8 Maweja-Nangila, tshindi mua kutekemena kabidi ntshinyi? Amu wewe ke udi mua kungenzela bionsu." 
Psalms39:9 Unsungidile ku bubi buanyi buonsu, kabanseki kudi bidingidingi." 
Psalms39:10 Ndi mpuwa, tshiyi mbulula mukana. Bualu wewe ke udi muenze bionsu ebi." 
Psalms39:11 Ukadi muntuute, mbikumbane. Mituutu yebe idi mipite." 
Psalms39:12 Paudi unyoka muntu bua bilema biende, udi umulengeja. Kadi udi umusha bionsu bidi muntu unanga, bu mudi tshishi tshidia tshimuma. Bushuwa, muntu udi amu bu lupepele." 
Psalms39:13 Maweja-Nangila, teleja mundi nkutendelela, teya matshi ku lubila luanyi. Pandi ndila muadi, ungambuluishe. Bu muvua bankambua banyi bonsu, ndi amu muenyi kumpala kuebe, tshiyi ne diyi dia kuamba." 
Psalms39:14 Kadi undekele, mpete dikisha, bua mmone mua kutua mimuemue, bangabanga ne meme kushiya panuapa, kujimina kashidi." 
Psalms40:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms40:2 Mvua mutekemene bikole kudi Maweja-Nangila. Kuinamaye kundi, kumvuaye lubila luanyi." 
Psalms40:3 Kumpatulaye mu dijimba dia lufu, mu bitotshi bia lunteke. Kungimanyikaye makasa madiata pa lubuebue, unkolesha mu mikolu." 
Psalms40:4 Kundongeshaye musambu mupiamupia, musambu wa dimutumbisha yeye, Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Ba bungi nebaumvue, batekemena kudiye. Nebajadike mudi Maweja-Nangila ne bumfumu." 
Psalms40:5 Muntu udi utekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, kayi ubuelakana ne benji ba bibi, nansha ne bena dishima, mmuena diakalenga." 
Psalms40:6 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, kakuena udi mukufuane. Bishima biudi mutuenzele mbivule, bilenga biudi musue kutusankisha nabi mbipite bungi. Tshiena mua kubilonda nansha kubibala." 
Psalms40:7 Milambu ya nyama nansha ya biakudia kayena ikulengelela. Milambu ya kuosha nansha ya kudikobolola, kuena uyilomba. Kadi udi munjibule matshi, bua meme kukuteleja." 
Psalms40:8 Ke pandi ngamba ne: “Ke meme ewu, mfika, bua kukumbaja tshidibu bafunda mu mukanda wa Mikenji.”" 
Psalms40:9 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi musue kukumbaja biudi ujinga. Ndi mulame mikenji yebe mu muoyi wanyi." 
Psalms40:10 Bantu bebe bamane kusangila, nembamanyishe ne: Maweja-Nangila ke udi upandishangana. Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye mundi tshiyi mua kupuwa." 
Psalms40:11 Tshiena nsokoka bantu muudi mumpandishe. Kadi ndi mbajadikila ne: Wewe ke musungidi udi ukumbaja biudi mulaye. Miaba yonsu idi bantu basangila, nebamanyishe muudi ne muoyi muimpe, kabidi ne diyi dimue." 
Psalms40:12 Maweja-Nangila kuakubenga kumfuila luse to. Bu muudi munnange, ukumbaje kabidi malaya ebe, neumpandishe misangu yonsu." 
Psalms40:13 Makenga mmankuate nseke yonsu, tshiena mua kuabala. Adi afuma ku bilema bianyi, bindi mmona bidi amu biobi. Bidi bipite nsuki yanyi bungi, ke padi muoyi wanyi munshikile munda." 
Psalms40:14 Maweja-Nangila, umpandishe. Maweja-Nangila, kolesha ungambuluishe." 
Psalms40:15 Badi basue kunshipa, bafue bundu, bapange tshia kuenza. Badi basanka bua dikenga dianyi, lumu lubupuke." 
Psalms40:16 Badi banseka, bapuwe, bundu bubakuate." 
Psalms40:17 Kadi bantu bebe bonsu basanke bikole bualu buebe. Badi bakunanga wewe, Mupandishi, bakutumbishe matuku onsu, bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunene!”" 
Psalms40:18 Meme ndi mupele ne muena dikenga, kadi Maweja-Nangila udi munnange. Udi ungambuluisha, undama, ngwewe! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, fika lukasa." 
Psalms41:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wabena misambu. Wamu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms41:2 Muntu udi uvuluka mupele ne muena dikenga mmuena diakalenga! Maweja-Nangila neamuambuluishe diba didi dikenga dimukuata. 
Psalms41:3 Maweja-Nangila neamulame ne muoyi, amuendeshe diakalenga pa buloba, kayi umulekela mu bianza bia baluishi bende." 
Psalms41:4 Padiye mu bulalu, usama bikole, Maweja-Nangila udi umukuba, umupingajila bukole." 
Psalms41:5 Bu mundi ntekemena nanku, ndi ngambila Maweja-Nangila ne: “Ndi muena tshibawu ku mesu ebe, kadi umfuile luse, umpingajile bukole ne makanda.”" 
Psalms41:6 Baluishi banyi badi bankebela diakabi, bamba ne: “Kantu aka nekafue diba kaayi, bua bakapue muoyi kashidi?”" 
Psalms41:7 Padi muluishi unkumbula, kena unsamba ne muoyi muimpe to. Udi unsekesha, kadi mundamunda ukeba kudiwula mundi muena tshibawu, upatuka amu pambelu, utuadija kunjana." 
Psalms41:8 Badi bankina, badi badikungija, bantela, banungana, banjingila lufu, bamba ne:" 
Psalms41:9 “Wawa ukadi mikolu ku tshiina! Bua kumukaye pa bulalu, amu yeye mufue!”" 
Psalms41:10 Mulunda wanyi wa pa muoyi, utuvua tudia nende, tuambilangana nende malu onsu patoke, ukadi unduisha!" 
Psalms41:11 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, umfuile luse, umpingajile bukole, bua mmone mua kudisombuela, kubanyoka." 
Psalms41:12 Pikala muluishi wanyi katshiyi udikokola pa tshiadi, nenjadike bushuwa ne: udi munnange!" 
Psalms41:13 Bu mundi tshiyi ne bualu, neutue ku tshianyi, newanyishe bua meme kushala pabuipi nebe kashidi." 
Psalms41:14 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele. Numutumibishe kashidi tshiendelele! Amene, eyo, bikale nanku!" 
Psalms42:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms42:2 Bu mudi ngulungu udila, ukeba mayi mimpe a musulu, ke mudi muoyi wanyi ukujinga wewe Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Psalms42:3 Muoyi wanyi udi ne nyota ya Mvidi Mukulu, ya Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi. Ndiba kaayi dingabuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kumueneka kumpala kuende, kumutendelela." 
Psalms42:4 Butuku ne munya tshianyi tshiakudia ke binsonji. Badi bankonka matuku onsu ne: “Mvidi Mukulu webe udi penyi?” 
Psalms42:5 Ndi mvuluka malu a kale, muoyi wanyi ungitshikila munda. Tuvua tuenda bantu tshisumbu, tuya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua tshibilu, tutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, tumuela tunkunduluila." 
Psalms42:6 Ndi mpita kubungama bua tshinyi? Muoyi wanyi udi upampakana bualu kaayi? Tekemena Mvidi Mukulu, bualu nemmutumbishe tshiakabidi. Yeye ke Mupandishi wanyi, ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!" 
Psalms42:7 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, muoyi wanyi udi ne dibungama. Ke pandi nkutendelela, nansha meme musombe mutantshi mule ne nzubu webe, mu mikuna ya Ermone, pabuipi ne Mukuna-Muipi, ku mpokolu ya musulu wa Yardene." 
Psalms42:8 Udi ungitshikijila mayi a muenji, mavuala enda avulangana, bipitshila bionsu pambidi panyi! Meme kudiina mu mayi ne kasuki!" 
Psalms42:9 Dituku dionsu Maweja-Nangila neangenzele bimpe. Butuku bujima nemmutumbishe, mmuele tuasakidila. Nentendelele Mvidi Mukulu, bualu kudiye ndi mpeta muoyi." 
Psalms42:10 Nenkonke Mvidi Mukulu, lubuebue luanyi ne: “Udi mumpue muoyi bua tshinyi? Ndi nkenga, tshiyi ne dikisha, bualu kaayi? Mudi baluishi banyi bankengesha nenku mbishi?”" 
Psalms42:11 Bipendu bia baluishi banyi bidi binsunsula, bualu dituku dionsu badi banseka, bangebeja ne: “Mvidi Mukulu webe udi penyi?”" 
Psalms42:12 Ndi mpita kubungama bua tshinyi? Muoyi wanyi udi upampakana bualu kaayi? Tekemena Mvidi Mukulu, nemmutumbishe tshiakabidi! Yeye ke Mupandishi wanyi ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!" 
Psalms43:1 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kosa nsambu yanyi amu pa yoyi, umbingishe kudi bantu badi kabayi luse. Unsungidile kudi bena dishima ne bena tshinyangu." 
Psalms43:2 Bualu wewe, Mvidi Mukulu ke mulami wanyi. Tshiudi mumbengele ntshinyi? Ndi nkenga, tshiyi ne dikisha, bualu kaayi? Mudi baluishi banyi bankengesha nenku mbishi?" 
Psalms43:3 Untokeshile njila, undudike, umfikishe ku mukuna webe wa tshijila, umbueje mu nzubu muebe." 
Psalms43:4 Mvidi Mukulu wewe udi disanka dianyi, nensemene ku tshilambuilu tshiebe, nkutumbishe ne lunzenze, bualu wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!" 
Psalms43:5 Ndi mpita kubungama bua tshinyi. Muoyi wanyi udi upampakana bualu kaayi? Tekemena Mvidi Mukulu, nemmutumbishe tshiakabidi! Yeye ke Mupandishi wanyi ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi!" 
Psalms44:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms44:2 Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tudi badiumvuile ne matshi etu, baledi betu ne bankambua bavua batuambile, malu manene auvua muenze ku kale mu tshikondu tshiabu." 
Psalms44:3 Uvua mumuangeshe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bua kupa bantu bebe muaba wa kuasa. Uvua mukengeshe bisamba abi, bua bantu bebe bavulangane, basombe bimpe." 
Psalms44:4 Bankambua betu kabavua bakuate ditunga adi, ku muele wabu wa mvita, nansha ku bukole bua diboku diabu, kadi amu ku diambuluisha diebe, ne ku bukole buebe. Uvua nabu diba dionsu, bualu uvua mubanange." 
Psalms44:5 Wewe Mvidi Mukulu ke udi Mukalenga wanyi, udi uludika bantu bebe bua batshimune." 
Psalms44:6 Ku bukole buebe, netuipate baluishi betu. Mu dina diebe netubaboze." 
Psalms44:7 Tshiena ntekemena ku buta buanyi, nansha muele wanyi kawena ungambuluisha." 
Psalms44:8 Kadi Wewe ke udi utusungidila ku baluishi betu, ufuisha badi batukina bundu." 
Psalms44:9 Maweja-Nangila, matuku onsu tudi tukupa lumu. Tudi tutumbisha dina diebe kashidi." 
Psalms44:10 Kadi mpindiewu, wewe kutubenga, kutufuisha bundu, baluishi betu kututshimuna. Kuena kabidi uya netu mu mvita." 
Psalms44:11 Ukadi utunyemesha kumpala kua bena lukuna betu. Ke baluishi betu kupawula bintu ne disanka. 
Psalms44:12 Udi utufila mu bianza biabu bu nyama ya kushipa. Bakadi batutangalaja mu matunga a bantu benyi. 
Psalms44:13 Udi usumbisha bantu bebe ku mushinga mukese, kuyi nansha upeta makasa." 
Psalms44:14 Udi utupendesha kudi bena mutumba, batulembakaja kudi batudi nabu pabuipi." 
Psalms44:15 Udi muanyishe bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, batutele mu nsumuinu, benda bakupa mitu, batuseka." 
Psalms44:16 Matuku onsu ndi mmona mudibu bampepeja. Ndi ne bundu mesu tente. 
Psalms44:17 Bualu ndi ngunwua mudi bena lukuna batubunda, batuluisha batupenda." 
Psalms44:18 Bionsu ebi bidi bituenzekela, katuyi nansha bakupua muoyi, katuyi nansha banyanga mikenji yebe." 
Psalms44:19 Katuena nansha bakubenge, katuena bapambuke mu njila webe." 
Psalms44:20 Kadi udi mutuzaze, tukadi tuenda bu mibuabua mu dikolu. Wewe kutubuikila ne miidima mikole." 
Psalms44:21 Bu tuetu bapue Mvidi Mukulu wetu muoyi, bu tuetu batendelela mvidie mikuabu," 
Psalms44:22 kuvua mua kupanga kumanya bualu ebu to. Bualu Wewe udi ujingulula malu masokome onsu a munda mua muntu. 
Psalms44:23 Matuku onsu badi bakeba kutushipa, bualu tudi bantu bebe. Badi batutangila bu bana ba mikoku ba kuya kushipa." 
Psalms44:24 Maweja-Nangila, tabuluka! Udi utulengulula bua tshinyi? Bika ku tulu, kutulekedi kashidi to!" 
Psalms44:25 Kuena musue kututangila kabidi bua tshinyi? Udi upua muoyi mudibu batukengesha, batulembakaja anyi?" 
Psalms44:26 Bavua batubonde mu lupuishi, tuetu batue difu panshi." 
Psalms44:27 Utuluile mvita, utuambuluishe, utupikule, bualu tudi bamanye muudi utunanga." 
Psalms45:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Muimba ne nzenze. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. Musambu wa dinanga. 
Psalms45:2 Muoyi wanyi udi muwule ne miaku milenga, pandi nsaka musambu ewu bua mukalenga. Ludimi luanyi ludi luwimba bilenga, amu bu mudi mufundi wa dilambu ukeba kufunda bimpe ne kasala kende." 
Psalms45:3 Bulenga bua mpala webe mbupite bua bantu bakuabu. Mishiku yebe idi yakula amu miaku ya meji. Mvidi Mukulu mmukuele lupemba kashidi. 
Psalms45:4 Tshilobu, suika mukaba, upayike muela. Ke bidi bileja butumbi ne lumu biebe." 
Psalms45:5 Nana buta, enda diakalenga, banda pa kabalu, uye ku mvita. Uluangane bua buakane, usungidile bapele. Bu muudi ne dikanda, neutshimune baluishi." 
Psalms45:6 Miketa yebe idi mitue mitambe. Neibuele mu mioyi ya baluishi bebe. Bantu nebashinde ku makasa ebe. 
Psalms45:7 Nkuasa webe udi mushindama kashidi, amu bu mudi nkuasa wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi ulombola bukalenga buebe ne buakane." 
Psalms45:8 Udi munange buakane, mubenge bubi. Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu webe, mukujidile, mukuele manyi a tshijila pa mutu, mukusungule amu wewe, mubenge bena mulongu nebe." 
Psalms45:9 Bilamba biebe bidi binunka dipembu dia manananshi mashilangane. Mu nzubu muebe mulengeja ne mibanga mudi miadi ya bisanji idi ikusankisha. 
Psalms45:10 Bana ba bakaji ba bamfumu badi bannyungulukila. Ku diebe dia balume kudi mukalenga mukaji, muvuale bilengejilu bia mpawungi muimpe." 
Psalms45:11 Muananyi wa bakaji, teleja, uvuluke bimpe mundi ngamba: Vulamina ditunga dienu ne bana benu." 
Psalms45:12 Mukalenga udi ukujinga bua mpala webe. Yeye ke mfumu webe mpindiewu, umutumikile!" 
Psalms45:13 Bena ku Tire nebakutuadile milambu. Baneme ba matunga nebakuvuile bua kupeta diakalenga. 
Psalms45:14 Muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga udi ubuela mu nzubu, mulenga mulaya, muvuale bilamba bia mushinga mukole, bilengeja ne mpawungi." 
Psalms45:15 Bamane kumuvuadika bilamba bia malenda, bia mekalamekala. Badi bamufila kudi mukalenga. Bansongakaji badi bamushindikija bua kumubanjija." 
Psalms45:16 Badi babuela mu nzubu wa mukalenga. Bantu badi bela tunkunduluila, basanka." 
Psalms45:17 Mukalenga wanyi, bana bebe ba balume nebapiane bumfumu bua bankambua bebe. Neubateke bamfumu pa buloba bujima." 
Psalms45:18 Musambu wanyi neuvuluije bantu lumu luebe, mu ndelanganyi ne ndelanganyi. Bantu bonsu nebakutumbishe kashidi tshiendelele!" 
Psalms46:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu ne wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora wa kuimba ne meyi matue. 
Psalms46:2 Mvidi Mukulu udi tshisokomenu tshietu, utupe bukole. Mu makenga etu udi utuambuluisha misangu yonsu." 
Psalms46:3 Nanku katuena tutshina, nansha buloba buzakala, nansha mikuna miupukila mu mayi manene," 
Psalms46:4 nansha mavuala akungula, asaba, adiela mulu, anyungisha mikuna." 
Psalms46:5 Musulu udi upitshila mu tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu, ufila mayi matalale, usankisha bantu. Mu tshimenga atshi ke mudi nzubu wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu." 
Psalms46:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi mu tshimenga etshi. Nanku kabena mua kutshibutula. Butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia, ukadi uvua kutshiambuluisha." 
Psalms46:7 Padi Mvidi Mukulu wakula, bisamba bidi bizakala, makalenga atutakana, buloba bunyungakana." 
Psalms46:8 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi netu. Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe udi utulama. 
Psalms46:9 Kanumonayi bidi Maweja-Nangila muenze. Tangilayi malu a dikema adiye mukumbaje pa buloba. 
Psalms46:10 Udi ujikija mvita pa buloba bujima, utshibula buta, ukosa difuma, osha ngabu mu kapia." 
Psalms46:11 Udi wamba ne: “Lekelayi mvita! Numanye ne: Meme ke Mvidi Mukulu: Ndi ku mutu kua bisamba ne kua buloba bujima!” 
Psalms46:12 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi netu. Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe udi utulama. 
Psalms47:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms47:2 Bisamba bionsu, tutayi nkashi. Nutumbishe Mvidi Mukulu ne mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms47:3 Bualu Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu, udi wa kutshina, udi mukalenga munene, ulombola buloba bujima." 
Psalms47:4 Udi muteke bisamba bionsu ku bumfumu buetu, musombeshe matunga panshi ku makasa etu." 
Psalms47:5 Udi mutusunguile ditunga edi bua dikale dietu. Tudi tuditemba nadi, tuetu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe idiye munange." 
Psalms47:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi ubanda pa mukuna wa Siyone, bantu bamuela tunkunduluila. Maweja-Nangila udi ufika, mpungi idila." 
Psalms47:7 Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, numuimbile misambu. Samunayi mukalenga wetu, numukokuele." 
Psalms47:8 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu ke mukalenga udi ulombola buloba bujima. Numutumbishe numuimbile misambu mimpe. 
Psalms47:9 Mvidi Mukulu udi uludika bisamba bionsu, musombe mu nkuasa wende wa tshijila." 
Psalms47:10 Bamfumu ba matunga badi badisanga, ku tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu wa Abrahame. Bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba badi ku bumfumu buende. Yeye udi mubapite bonsu!" 
Psalms48:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms48:2 Maweja-Nangila udi munene. Mbimpe tutumbishe Mvidi Mukulu wetu mu tshimenga tshiende, pa mukuna wende wa tshijila." 
Psalms48:3 Siyone, mukuna wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi muimpe mutumbuke! Tshimenga tshia Mukalenga munene, tshidi tshisankisha buloba bujima." 
Psalms48:4 Nansha bantu bakolesha tshimenga etshi ne bimana, amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi utshilama." 
Psalms48:5 Bakalenga bavua badisangishe, baya kuluisha mukuna wa Siyone." 
Psalms48:6 Bamona amu mukuna, kupapukabu! Bowa kubakuata, kunyemabu." 
Psalms48:7 Luzakalu kubenza, bu mudi dikenga dikuata mukaji pa kulela," 
Psalms48:8 bu mudi lupepele lua kudi diba dibanda, lutshibula majuwa manene adi aya ku Tarshishe." 
Psalms48:9 Tuvua bumvue bivua Mvidi Mukulu muenze kale. Lelu tuvua babimone mu tshimenga tshia Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. Amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi utshishindika kashidi. 
Psalms48:10 Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mu nzubu webe wa tshijila, tudi tuvuluka muuvua mutunange, mutuenzele bimpe." 
Psalms48:11 Miaba yonsu bantu badi bakutumbisha. Lumu luebe ndutangalake pa buloba bujima, bualu udi ulombola bantu ne buakane." 
Psalms48:12 Pa mukuna wa Siyone bantu basanke! Mu bimenga bia Yuda batue tshianga! 
Psalms48:13 Nyungulukayi mukuna wa Siyone! Nubale tuleya tua mu tshimenga! 
Psalms48:14 Nukatshile mudi bimana biatshi! Numone muvuabu bakoleshe imue nzubu! Nanku, nenumone mua kumanyisha ndelanganyi yalonda ne:" 
Psalms48:15 Mvidi Mukulu ewu ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu wa kashidi! Neatulombole kashidi tshiendelele! 
Psalms49:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms49:2 Bisamba bionsu telejayi! Bonsu badi basombe pa buloba, teyayi matshi!" 
Psalms49:3 Ndi nnubela bonsu, badi ne mianzu, ne badi kabayi nayi, bena kantu ku bianza, ne badi patupu." 
Psalms49:4 Ndi nnulongesha miaku ya meji, nnumanyishe malu a lungenyi." 
Psalms49:5 Mvua mualonge kudi bena meji. Mpindiewu ndi nnumvuijawu pa kuimba mu lunzenze. 
Psalms49:6 Padi makenga makole mankuate, bena mutshima bangela munkatshi, bankengesha, nempampakene tshinyi?" 
Psalms49:7 Badi batekemena amu ku mpetu yabu, baditemba bua bubanji budibu nabu." 
Psalms49:8 Kadi kakuena udi mua kupikula muoyi wa muntu mukuabu, nansha kudipikula wende yeye mene kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms49:9 Mushinga wa muoyi wa muntu mmupite. Bidiye mua kufuta kabiena mua kukumbana nansha kakese. 
Psalms49:10 Muntu udi mua kulala panu kashidi anyi? Neasokome lufu bua kamonu lukita anyi? 
Psalms49:11 Tudi tumona mudi bena meji bafua, mudi bapela ne batshimbakane bashiya buloba. Bonsu mbashile bantu bakuabu bintu biabu!" 
Psalms49:12 Nansha binyike maloba mena abu, nkita ke yabu nzubu ya kashidi, muaba udibu balala tshiendelele." 
Psalms49:13 Bualu muntu, nansha yeye ne bintu bia bungi, kena ushala kashidi pa buloba. Neabutuke amu bu nyama." 
Psalms49:14 Umvuayi bidi bienzekela bantu badi baditekemena. Monayi kuaya bonsu badi baditemba. 
Psalms49:15 Badi babasaka bu mikoku, baya nabu mu kandondu ka bafue. Lufu ke mulami wabu. Mibidi yabu idi yenda ijimina. Ku bajangi ke kudi nzubu wabu. Bantu ba muoyi muimpe nebatshimune." 
Psalms49:16 Mvidi Mukulu neansungidile; neampatule mu kandondu ka bafue. 
Psalms49:17 Kupampakanyi padi muntu unema, nansha bubanji buende bupite kuvulangana." 
Psalms49:18 Pafuaye, kena uya ne tshintu. Bubanji buende kabuena bumulonda mu lukita." 
Psalms49:19 Nansha muntu udiamba muena diakalenga patshidiye ne muoyi, udiela kalumbandi, bualu malu ende onsu adi enda amu bimpe," 
Psalms49:20 kadi neafue, neaye kumonangana ne bankambua bende, badi bashala mu miidima kashidi." 
Psalms49:21 Bualu, muntu nansha yeye ne bintu bia bungi, kena ushala kashidi pa buloba. Neabutuke amu bu nyama." 
Psalms50:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila uvua muakule, muele lubila pa buloba. Kumvuikalu kudi diba dibanda ne kudidi dibuelela." 
Psalms50:2 Mvidi Mukulu udi umueneka, bamunyungulule kudi bukenke, mu Siyone, tshimenga tshipite buimpe." 
Psalms50:3 “Mvidi Mukulu wetu afike! Alekele kupuwa!” Kapia kanene kadi kamudianjidila, lupepele lua mvunde lumuela munkatshi." 
Psalms50:4 Mvidi Mukulu udi ubikila diulu ne buloba, bua bijadike mudiye ulumbuluisha bantu bende." 
Psalms50:5 Udi wamba ne: “Nsangishilayi bena dianyi, bamvua mutue nabu ndondu, balaye mua kuntumikila, bajadike tshiovu ne milambu.”" 
Psalms50:6 Diulu didi mua kujadika ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmukumbaje bivuaye mulaye. Padiye ulumbuluisha bantu, udi wenza pa bualu.”" 
Psalms50:7 — Tshisamba tshianyi, teleja, ndi nkuambila bualu. Izrayele, meme Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu webe, ndi nkufunda ku tshilumbu." 
Psalms50:8 Tshiena nkudiwila bua milambu yebe nansha, bualu utu uyindambula matuku onsu." 
Psalms50:9 Tshiena bualu ne ngombe milume ya mu tshikumbi tshiebe, nansha mpumbu ya mu mpangu yebe." 
Psalms50:10 Bualu nyama ya ditu yonsu nyanyi meme, kabidi ne nyama ya mu mikuna binunu ne binunu." 
Psalms50:11 Ndi mumanye nyunyi yonsu ya mulu. Nyama yonsu ya mu tshisuku idi yanyi. 
Psalms50:12 Meme ne nzala, tshiena mua kukulomba tshintu, bualu buloba bujima ne bidipu mbianyi meme." 
Psalms50:13 Ntu ndia munyinyi wa ngombe anyi? Ntu nnua mashi a mpumbu anyi? 
Psalms50:14 Tshindi ntekemena kuudi, ki mbiakudia nansha, kadi amu bua untumbishe, meme Mvidi Mukulu webe, ne bua ukumbaje malaya auvua mundaye meme, Muena kulu." 
Psalms50:15 Pakukuata dikenga, umbikile nenkusungidile. Nenku neuntumbishe!" 
Psalms50:16 Kadi muntu mubi, Mvidi Mukulu udi umuebeja ne: — Muudi utela mikenji yanyi mbishi? Muudi ukimina kuakula bua tshiovu tshianyi mmunyi?" 
Psalms50:17 Kuena muanyishe mibelu yanyi. Udi ubenga bindi ngamba. 
Psalms50:18 Udi umvuangana ne muivi yonsu uudi umona, udia bulunda ne badi banyanga mbanza ya bende." 
Psalms50:19 Mukana muebe muwule tente ne bijanu, ludimi luebe lutumpilangana malu." 
Psalms50:20 Udi ufunda muanenu ku tshilumbu, unyanga lumu lua muana wa mamuebe." 
Psalms50:21 Wamonyi biudi muenze! Udi musue bua ngikale amu mupuwe anyi? Udi muele meji ne: ndi bu wewe anyi? Nansha kakese! Ndi ukutandisha, nkuleja mibi yebe yonsu patoke!" 
Psalms50:22 Nuenu nukadi bampue muoyi! Kadi telejayi bimpe bindi nnuambila. Tshianana nennusunsule bu ntambue, muntu kayi mua kunkandika!" 
Psalms50:23 Muntu udi ungela tuasakidila, ke udi untumbisha! Udi untumikila, ke undi mpandisha!" 
Psalms51:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu ne wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms51:2 Musambu ewu mmusake tshikondu tshivua muambi Natane mumonangane ne Davide, yeye mumane kubuelela Batsheba mu nzubu." 
Psalms51:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umfuile luse, ukupule bubi buanyi, bualu udi mulenga mutambe, kabidi ne muoyi mupite buimpe." 
Psalms51:4 Ungumushe bubi buonsu, untokeshe ku tshilema tshianyi." 
Psalms51:5 Ndi mumanye mundi mukutombokele. Ndi muvuluke bubi buanyi diba dionsu. 
Psalms51:6 Ndi mukuenzele bibi amu wewe nkayebe, bualu ndi muenze biudi ubenga. Paudi umpisha, udi wenza amu pa bualu. Tshiena mua kuela mpata mushindu uudi undumbuluisha." 
Psalms51:7 Eyowa, ndi muenji wa malu mabi, katshia bandela, muena tshibawu, katshia bangimita." 
Psalms51:8 Kadi wewe udi musue amu bua muntu ambe malu malelela kayi usokoka bualu. Undongeshe, bua kondu kanyi ka munda kikale katuuta pa bualu." 
Psalms51:9 Ukupule bubi buanyi, ungoweshe, ntoke zezeze. Nanku tshiakuikala kabidi muena tshibawu." 
Psalms51:10 Ungambile muudi mumfuile luse, bua ngende kabidi ne musangelu. Nansha wewe mumane kunzaza, nensanguluke." 
Psalms51:11 Kutangidi bilema bianyi, kupula bubi buanyi buonsu." 
Psalms51:12 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, fila muoyi mutoke munda muanyi. Umpeshe lungenyi lupialupia, ulushindike." 
Psalms51:13 Kungipatshi pabuipi nebe. Kumpadi Mueyelu webe wa tshijila. 
Psalms51:14 Nsanke tshiakabidi, bualu udi mumpandishe. Umpe muoyi wa kukutumikila." 
Psalms51:15 Badi bakutombokela, nembalongeshe mudibu mua kukulengelela, bua badilengeje, bitabe ku diyi diebe." 
Psalms51:16 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, Mupandishi wanyi, ungepule ku lufu. Nemmanyishe bantu ne disanka muudi munsungidile." 
Psalms51:17 Maweja-Nangila, bulula mukana muanyi, bua mmone mua kukutumbisha." 
Psalms51:18 Kuena musue nkulambule milambu. Nansha ya diosha kayena ikulengelela. 
Psalms51:19 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mulambu undi mua kukulambula, mmuoyi wanyi wa kulekela kuditambisha. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kubengi muoyi wanyi udi mupite kunyingalala bikole." 
Psalms51:20 Unange Siyone, umuenzele bimpe, wibakulule bimana bia Yerushalayime." 
Psalms51:21 Nanku newanyishe bua bakuambule milambu mimpe, nansha ya diosha mene, bu mudi mikenji yebe yamba. Nebafile ngombe milume ku tshilambuilu tshiebe." 
Psalms52:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms52:2 Mmusake diba divua Dowege, muena Edome, mumanyishe Shawule muvua Davide munyeme kua Abimeleke." 
Psalms52:3 Wewe muena tshinyangu, udi utatshisha badi balamate Mvidi Mukulu, udi uditambisha bua bubi buebe bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms52:4 Wewe udi amu ukeba kubutula bantu, udi ubadinga ne ludimi luebe, lutue bu kapaya." 
Psalms52:5 Udi munange malu mabi, mubenge mimpe. Udi musue dishima, uyila malu malelela." 
Psalms52:6 Udi musue kuakula amu miaku idi inyanga bantu. Bionsu biudi wamba bidi amu bia dishima. 
Psalms52:7 Nenku Mvidi Mukulu neakubutule kashidi, neakukuate, akuipate kuebe, neakumbushe pa buloba patudi apa," 
Psalms52:8 Bantu bakane nebamone kabutu aku. Nebakeme, baseka, bamba ne:" 
Psalms52:9 “Tangilayi mulumiana uvua muteke muoyi ku biuma, kayi utekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua udiunwua ne dikanda bualu bua bubanji buende." 
Psalms52:10 Kadi meme ndi bu mutshi wa olive udi usampila, ukola pabuipi ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ndi mutekemene kashidi Mvidi Mukulu, udi unnanga." 
Psalms52:11 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, matuku onsu, ndi nkuela tuasakidila bua bionsu biudi muenze. Muaba udi bantu bebe basangile, nenkutumbishe ne: udi mulenga." 
Psalms53:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne meyi a kanyinganyinga. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms53:2 Bantu batshimbakane badi badiakuila ne: Mvidi Mukulu kenaku to. Bantu aba mbantu babi, badi benza malu mabi mapite. Nansha umue kena wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Psalms53:3 Maweja-Nangila udi mu diulu, muinangila panshi bua kutentekela bantu: kumona ne kudi muntu wa meji, udi utendelela?" 
Psalms53:4 Kadi bonsu mbapambuke, bonsu mbena buenzayi. Kakuena udi wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue nansha umue." 
Psalms53:5 Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Bonsu badi bakengeshangana aba, kabena bumvue bualu nansha bumue. Badi badia bantu banyi bu mampa, babenga kuntendelela.”" 
Psalms53:6 Kadi bantu abu bavua kabayi batshina tshintu kumpala, nebakuatshike bowa mpindiewu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu neamuangalaje mifuba ya badi bakengesha bantu bende. Badi babalembakaja, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmubabenge." 
Psalms53:7 Wafuma ku Siyone bua kupandisha Izrayele nnganyi? Mvidi Mukulu neapatule bantu bende mu bupika. Diba adi ndelanganyi ya Yakobe neisanke, bena Izrayele nebatue tshianga." 
Psalms54:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne nzenze. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms54:2 Mmusake pavua bena Zife baya kuambila Shawule ne: Davide mmusokome muetu. 
Psalms54:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umpandishe bua bantu banemeke dina diebe. Umbingishe, bualu udi ne bukole bua kuenza nanku." 
Psalms54:4 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, teleja mundi nkutendelela, teya matshi ku bindi ngamba." 
Psalms54:5 Bantu bandi tshiyi mumanye, badi banduisha, bena tshinyangu badi basue kunshipa. Kabena batshina Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms54:6 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neangambuluishe, Maweja-Nangila neanduile mvita." 
Psalms54:7 Mvidi Mukulu, upingajile baluishi banyi malu mabi avuabu bangenzele. Ubabutule bapuwe. Uleje muudi ukumbaja malaya ebe." 
Psalms54:8 Maweja-Nangila, nentumbishe dina diebe, bualu udi mulenga, nenkulambule milambu ne muoyi wanyi mujima." 
Psalms54:9 Udi munsungidile ku makenga anyi onsu. Ndi mumone mudi bena lukuna banyi babutuka. 
Psalms55:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne nzenze. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms55:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, teleja mundi nkutendelela. Kutangidi kukuabu, pandi nkusengelela." 
Psalms55:3 Unteleje, ungitabe. Makenga mmampite, tshiyi ne dikima!" 
Psalms55:4 Baluishi banyi badi bankanyina, bankeba matandu, banjana. Badi basue kumbueja mu dikenga, bankina, bandondakaja ne tshikisu." 
Psalms55:5 Ndi nzakala amu kuzakala. Bowa bua lufu budi bunkuata. 
Psalms55:6 Ndi ntshina, ntutakaja menu, mubidi umvuayila." 
Psalms55:7 Ke meme kujinga ne: “Bu meme ne mapuapua bu nkudimba! Mvua mua kunyema mutantshi mule, bua kupeta dikisha mu tshipela." 
Psalms55:8 Mvua mua kudiela lubilu, mpete muaba wa kusokoma," 
Psalms55:9 muaba udi tshipepele ne mvunde kabiyi mua kungenzela bibi.” 
Psalms55:10 Maweja-Nangila, nyangakaja meji a baluishi banyi, bapangakane, bapanduluke. Bualu mu tshimenga ndi mmona amu tshimvundu ne mutoyi," 
Psalms55:11 bidi binyungulukila butuku ne munya pa bimana biatshi. Munda muatshi mudi amu dikenga ne dikengeshangana. 
Psalms55:12 Munda muatshi mudi amu dibutulangana. Dishima ne ditatshishangana bidi miaba yonsu. 
Psalms55:13 Udi umpenda mpindiewu, kavua muluishi wanyi to, mvua mua kumulengulula. Udi unduisha lelu, kavua nansha nanyi lukuna, mvua mua kumushila muaba." 
Psalms55:14 Kadi udi unduisha udi amu wewe, muena mulongu, mulunda wanyi wa pa muoyi, umvua mutekemene muanyi muonsu!" 
Psalms55:15 Tuvua tuyukila nebe malu onsu patoke, tusanke, tuya ne muoyi umue mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua tshibilu." 
Psalms55:16 Balunda ba nanku badi mua kufua, bapueke ne muoyi mu kandondu. Bualu bubi mbuase nzubu munda muabu." 
Psalms55:17 Meme ndi mbikila Mvidi Mukulu, bua angambuluishe. Nanku Maweja-Nangila neampandishe." 
Psalms55:18 Dinda, munda munya, ne dilolu, ndi ndiabakena, ntua mikemu. Kadi neunwue lubila luanyi." 
Psalms55:19 Neandame ne muoyi, ansungidile, ku mvita idi bantu bavule banduisha." 
Psalms55:20 Mvidi Mukulu, mukalenga wa ku tshibangidilu, anteleje, abafuishe bundu. Bualu bantu aba kabena basue kudilengeja, kabena nansha batshina Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms55:21 Mulunda mubi udi uluisha balunda bende, upula ndondu uvuaye mutue nabu." 
Psalms55:22 Miaku yende ya lubombu mmisheme bu buitshi, kadi udi welangana amu meji a kuluangana mvita. Miaku mipepele idi ipatuka mukana muende, kadi idi amu bu muele wa ntapa kubidi." 
Psalms55:23 Teka bujitu bua pa makaya ebe mu bianza bia Mvidi Mukulu. Neakukankamike, kakuanyisha bua muntu wende apungile nabu." 
Psalms55:24 Mvidi Mukulu, bantu bonsu aba, ubele mu kandondu. Bashipianganyi ne bena dishima nebalale panu amu tshia bibidi tshia matuku abu. Kadi meme, ndi nkutekemena amu wewe." 
Psalms56:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne meyi a “Nkudimba pa mitshi minene ya kule.” Kasala ka mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, musaka diba divua bena Peleshete bamukuate mu Ngate." 
Psalms56:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umfuile luse, bualu bantu badi bandondakaja. Dituku dionsu badi banduisha, bankengesha." 
Psalms56:3 Baluishi banyi badi bankeba matuku onsu. Bavule badi bangalamina bua kunkuata. 
Psalms56:4 Kadi padi bowa bunkuata, ndi ntekemena kuudi." 
Psalms56:5 Ndi ntumbisha Mvidi Mukulu bua bivuaye mulaye. Pandi mmutekemena, tshiena ntshina tshintu. Tshidi muntu mua kungenzela ntshinyi?" 
Psalms56:6 Bindi ngamba, badi babiamba muabu munga. Meji abu adi amu a kungenzela bibi." 
Psalms56:7 Badi batentekela, bangalamina, bandonda mu dikasa, batekemena mua kunshipa." 
Psalms56:8 Bantu bamane kuenza bibi nanku, mudibu mua kuenda tshianana, kabayi babanyoka mbishi? Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, baleja tshiji tshiebe, ubabutule!" 
Psalms56:9 Udi mumanye muvuabu bangipata, ngendakana miaba yonsu. Ela binsonji bianyi mu dibungu diebe. Kuena mubifunde bungi buabi mu mukanda webe anyi?" 
Psalms56:10 Dituku dindi nkubikila, baluishi banyi badi banyema. Ndi mumanye ne: wewe Mvidi Mukulu udi nanyi." 
Psalms56:11 Ndi ntumbisha Mvidi Mukulu bua bivuaye mulaye. Eyowa, ndi nsamuna Maweja-Nangila bua miaku yende." 
Psalms56:12 Pandi mmutekemena, tshiena ntshina tshintu. Tshidi muntu mua kungenzela ntshinyi?" 
Psalms56:13 Mvidi Mukulu nenkumbaje bimvua mukulaye. Nenkuele tuasakidila, nkulambula milambu." 
Psalms56:14 Bualu uvua munsungidile ku lufu, mungambuluishe bua tshiponu mu tshiina. Ke mundi mua kuenda kumpala kuebe, mu bukenke budi butokesha batshidi ne muoyi panu." 
Psalms57:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne meyi a musambu wa “Kunyangi…”. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Uvua muusake pavuaye munyeme Shawule, muye kusokoma mu lubuebue." 
Psalms57:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umfuile luse, ungambuluishe, bualu ndi mutekemene kuudi. Ndi muimane mu mapuapua ebe, too ne muapita tshipupu etshi." 
Psalms57:3 Ndi mbikila Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, bualu yeye udi mua kungenzela bionsu." 
Psalms57:4 Neantumine diambuluisha dia mulu. Neatatakaje udi undondakaja. Mvidi Mukulu udi pabuipi nanyi, bualu udi unnanga, ukumbaja malaya ende." 
Psalms57:5 Ndi munkatshi mua bantu ba lonji, badi bu nyama ya ntambue idi idia bantu. Menu abu adi masongoloke bu difuma, nansha bu muketa, ludimi luabu ndutue bu muela wa nkanza." 
Psalms57:6 Mvidi Mukulu, leja bumfumu buebe budi bupite diulu, ne butumbi buebe budi bukenka pa buloba bujima." 
Psalms57:7 Bavua banteya bukondu mu njila, bakeba kungela disoka mu nshingu. Bavua bangumbuile dijimba, kadi amu bobu ke badi badishindamu." 
Psalms57:8 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi muele meji a bungi munda muanyi, Ke pandi musue kukuimbila misambu bua kukusamuna." 
Psalms57:9 Muoyi wanyi, juka ku tulu! Lunzenze ne lunkombe luanyi, tabulukayi, bualu ndi musue kubisha diba!" 
Psalms57:10 Maweja-Nangila, ndi musue kukutumbisha mu bukua bisamba, ndi musue kukusamuna, bantu bonsu bateleje." 
Psalms57:11 Bualu dinanga diebe ndinene, ndiye ne mu diulu. Udi ukumbaja malaya ebe miaba yonsu too ne mu mavuba." 
Psalms57:12 Mvidi Mukulu, leja bumfumu buebe budi bupite diulu, ne butumbi buebe budi bukenka pa buloba bujima." 
Psalms58:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne meyi a musambu wa “Kunyangi…”. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms58:2 Bamfumu ba pa buloba, nusombele nukosa nsambu pa yoyi anyi? Panudi nulumbuluisha bantu, nutu nupisha bena tshibawu anyi?" 
Psalms58:3 Nansha kakese. Nutu nubingisha muena tshibawu munudi basue. Ke munudi nubueja tshinyangu mu ditunga dijima! 
Psalms58:4 Bantu babi mbatuadije buntomboji amu ku buana. Amu babalela, babanga kudinga bantu." 
Psalms58:5 Badi ne lulengu bu lua nyoka wa luasa. Badi ne mapapa bu a nyoka wa moma 
Psalms58:6 udi kayi uteleja muadi wa kashiba, nansha ka muimbi wa dilambu." 
Psalms58:7 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ubapole menu. Maweja-Nangila, zaza bibanga bia ntambue ayi." 
Psalms58:8 Bapueke ne mayi. Buume bu bisosa bidibu badiata. 
Psalms58:9 Bafube bu dilandi didi dienda, diume! Kabamonyi diba, bu muana wa tshituka mufuile munda!" 
Psalms58:10 Nebabakose bu ntambua dishinda, kabidi nansha mutshikale mubishi nansha mosha mvunde neabatangalaje." 
Psalms58:11 Padi Mvidi Mukulu usombuela bantu babi aba, bantu bende nebasanke, badiate mu mashi a baluishi babu." 
Psalms58:12 Nanku bantu bonsu nebajadike ne: “Eyowa, tuamonyi mudi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu bapeta difutu, mudi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu pa yoyi pa buloba.”" 
Psalms59:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne meyi a musambu wa “Kunyangi…”. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Uvua muusake pavua Shawule mutume bantu bua kumukuata muende, kumushipa." 
Psalms59:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, unsungidile kudi baluishi banyi, ungepule kudi badi bankina." 
Psalms59:3 Ungumushe mu bianza bia badi bankebela diakabi, unsungidile kudi bashipianganyi aba." 
Psalms59:4 Bena tshikisu badi bangalamina, bakeba kunshipa. Kadi meme tshiena muenze bualu bubi. Maweja-Nangila, tshiena mukutombokele." 
Psalms59:5 Badi bafike lubilu bua kunduisha, nansha meme tshiyi muenze bibi. Maweja-Nangila, tabuluka vuakunu, tangila bidibu bangenzela." 
Psalms59:6 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, juka ku tulu, unyoke bantu babi aba. Bena tshibawu aba, kubafuidi luse to." 
Psalms59:7 Badi bapingana dilolu mu tshisumbu, banyunguluka tshimenga tshijima, bela mikunda bu mbua." 
Psalms59:8 Mukana muabu mudi muwule tente ne miaku mibi. Bidibu bamba bidi bu muela wa nkanza. Badi bela meji ne: muntu nansha umue kena mua kutumvua. 
Psalms59:9 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi ubumvua, ubaseka, upepeja bonsu badi bakutombokela aba." 
Psalms59:10 Ndi ntekemena kuudi, bualu wewe udi undama. Mvidi Mukulu, Wewe udi nzubu mukole undi nsokomena." 
Psalms59:11 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi udi unnanga. Ke mudiye ungambuluisha, undeja mudi baluishi banyi babutuka bonsu." 
Psalms59:12 Kadi kubabutudi musangu umue nansha. Tshianana, bena tshisamba tshianyi badi mua kupua muoyi biudi mungenzele. Tangalaja bantu babi ku bukole buebe, ubafine! Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi ngabu wetu." 
Psalms59:13 Bionsu bidibu bamba bidi amu bibi. Ditambisha diabu nedibakuatshishe mu buteyi, bualu badi belangana milawu, bashimangana." 
Psalms59:14 Tshiji tshiebe tshibabutule, tshibajimije, kakushadi nansha muntu. Nanku pa buloba bujima bantu nebamanye ne: mu Izrayele mudi Mvidi Mukulu, Mukalenga wa bukole buonsu." 
Psalms59:15 Badi bapingana dilolu tshisumbu, banyunguluka tshimenga tshijima, bela mikunda bu mbua." 
Psalms59:16 Badi bakenguluka, bakeba biakudia. Kabayi babipeta bikumbane, badi babinduluka." 
Psalms59:17 Kadi meme ndi nkutumbisha, bualu udi ne bukole. Dinda ndi nkuimbila, bualu udi utunanga. Udi nzubu mukole undi mua kusokomena, muaba undi mua kubutama diba dia dikenga." 
Psalms59:18 Ndi nkuimbila misambu, nkutumbisha, bualu wewe udi umpesha bukole. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe udi muaba undi mua kusokomena, bualu wewe udi upita kunnanga." 
Psalms60:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa misambu. Wa kuimba ne lunzenze. Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Musambu wa kulongesha bantu. 
Psalms60:2 Bavua bausake bua kuvuluija bantu muvua Davide muluishe bena Arame ba mu Mezopotamiya ne ba mu Soba. Pavua Yowabe mupingane pambelu, ufuma ku mvita ayi, kutshimunaye bena Edome binunu dikumi ne bibidi mu tshibandabanda tshia Luepu." 
Psalms60:3 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe uvua mutunyemeshe, munyangakaje mualu wetu wa mvita. Bushuwa uvua mufike munda. Kadi mpindiewu utupingajile bukole buetu!" 
Psalms60:4 Uvua muzakeje buloba, mubueleshe mitanta. Kadi jibikila mitanta, bualu buloba budi mua kupuka." 
Psalms60:5 Uvua mumueneshe tshisamba tshiebe mabika ne mala, mutunuishe dikopu dia tshiji, tuenda tutetuka." 
Psalms60:6 Uvua mumanyishe bantu bebe bua banyeme mvita, bapanduke ku miketa ya baluishi." 
Psalms60:7 Fika lukasa, leja bukole buebe, utusungidile. Witabe bitudi tukulomba. Nanku bantu baudi unanga nebapande." 
Psalms60:8 Mu nzubu wende wa tshijila Mvidi Mukulu kuandamuna ne: “Meme ke watshimuna mvita! Nenkosolole tshimenga tshia Shekeme, ngabanyina bantu banyi tshibandabanda tshia Sukote." 
Psalms60:9 Ngilaade nditunga dianyi, Menashe mbuloba buanyi. Efrayime ntshifulu tshianyi tshia tshiamu tshia ku mutu. Yuda ke dikombu dianyi dia bumfumu." 
Psalms60:10 Ditunga dia Mowabe ke dilongu dindi ngowela mayi. Ndi ngelela tshisabata tshianyi pambidi pa ditunga dia Edome, bualu ndianyi. Bena Peleshete badi mua kutshimuna anyi?”" 
Psalms60:11 Udi mua kumfikisha mu ditunga dia Edome, bua nkuate bimenga biadi bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana nnganyi?" 
Psalms60:12 Amu wewe Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mua kuenza nanku. Kadi wewe kutubenga, kuyi musue kabidi kuenda netu mu mvita." 
Psalms60:13 Tuambuluishaku, tutshimune baluishi betu. Bantu kabena mua kutuambuluisha nansha kakese." 
Psalms60:14 Padi Mvidi Mukulu muikale netu, netutshimune, bualu yeye neadiatakaje baluishi betu." 
Psalms61:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne bisanji bia nshinga. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms61:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, teleja miadi yanyi, umvua mundi nkusengelela." 
Psalms61:3 Kunu ku ba bende, padi mioyi minshikile munda, ndi nkutendelela bua ungambuluishe, Umfikishe ku lubuebue lundi mua kusokomena, lundi tshiyi mua kudibandila." 
Psalms61:4 Wewe udi muaba undi mua kunyemena, nzubu mutumbuke udi unjika kudi baluishi." 
Psalms61:5 Anyisha, ngase mu nzubu muebe kashidi, nsokome mu mapuapua ebe." 
Psalms61:6 Mvidi Mukulu, wewe uvua mumvue bimvua mukulaye. Uvua mumpeshe muaba mu buloba bua tshijila. bu muuvua mulaye bantu badi bakunemeka." 
Psalms61:7 Vudijila mukalenga matuku, alale panu aboboke bobobo." 
Psalms61:8 Ashale mu bukalenga kashidi, akuvuluke. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bu muudi umunanga, ukumbaje biuvua mulaye, umulame, akole bobobo." 
Psalms61:9 Diba adi nenkuimbile, nkutumbishe amu kutumbisha ne bisanji ne misambu, nkumbaje matuku onsu bimvua mukulaye." 
Psalms62:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba bu Yedutune. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms62:2 Kudi Mvidi Mukulu ke kundi mpeta dikisha, kudiye ke kundi ntekemena lupandu." 
Psalms62:3 Yeye nkayende ke lubuebue luanyi, muaba mukole undi mua kusokomena. Tshiena ntshina tshintu to." 
Psalms62:4 — Bonsu pamue nenuluishe muntu nkaya too ne ku diba kaayi? Nudi nukeba kunshipa bua tshinyi? Ndi amu bu tshimana tshibendame, bu lupangu lukeba kupuka." 
Psalms62:5 Nudi amu ne meji mabi a kunyenga muanzu wanyi. Ke panudi nunshiminyina malu. Nudi betu ku mesu, mundamunda batuamba munga." 
Psalms62:6 Kudi Mvidi Mukulu ke kundi mpeta dikisha, kudiye ke kundi ntekemena." 
Psalms62:7 Yeye nkayende ke lubuebue luanyi, muaba mukole undi mua kusokomena. Tshiena ntshina tshintu to." 
Psalms62:8 Mvidi Mukulu neampandishe. Neampingajile lumu. Yeye ke lubuebue luanyi, muaba undi mua kusokomena." 
Psalms62:9 — Nuenu bonsu, bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, tekemenayi amu kudiye. Numupuile ntatu yenu. Yeye ke muaba utudi mua kunyemena." 
Psalms62:10 Bantu badi bu lupepele, bantu tshiabu ndishima. Bobu babande pa tshipimu bonsu pamue, kabena ne bujitu." 
Psalms62:11 — Kukebi buneme ku tshinyangu, kutekemenyi makasa ku buivi. Nansha bubanji buebe buvulangane, kutekiku muoyi." 
Psalms62:12 Misangu mivule nkadi mumvue diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, diamba ne: “Bukole buonsu budi amu kundi.”" 
Psalms62:13 — Kadi Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi kabidi muena dinanga, udi ufuta muntu yonsu bilondeshile malu avuaye muenze." 
Psalms63:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Mmuusake pavuaye musokome mu tshipela tshia Yuda. 
Psalms63:2 Mvidi Mukulu, wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Udi munsamine muoyi. Ndi nkujinga. Ndi ne nyota yebe, amu bu mudi buloba bume bujinga mayi." 
Psalms63:3 Mvua nkenzakana mu nzubu muebe, nkukeba, bua kumona bukole ne butumbi biudi nabi." 
Psalms63:4 Dinanga diudi munnange nadi, ndipite muoyi ku mushinga. Ke pandi nkutumbisha," 
Psalms63:5 nkuela tuasakidila matuku onsu andi ne muoyi. Nengele bianza mulu bua kukusamuna. 
Psalms63:6 Wewe udi unsankisha. Ndi bu muntu udi udia, uukuta mu didia dia tshibilu. Nenkutumbishe, nkuela mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms63:7 Nansha mu bulalu, ndi nkuvuluka. Butuku bujima ndi ngela meji kuudi." 
Psalms63:8 Udi mulue kungambuluisha. Ke pandi ngela mbila ya disanka mu mapuapua ebe. 
Psalms63:9 Ndi nkulamata muanyi muonsu. Udi unshindika ne tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole. 
Psalms63:10 Bantu badi bakeba kunshipa, babutuke diakamue, bapueke mu kandondu ka bafue!" 
Psalms63:11 Babatape ku muela wa mvita, bitalu biabu babidie kudi mibuabua!" 
Psalms63:12 Mukalenga neasanke bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu! Bonsu badi baditshipa, bajadika malu, batela dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, mbena diakalenga. Kadi bena dishima nebabapuwishe!" 
Psalms64:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms64:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, unteleje, ndi ndionga kuudi. Baluishi banyi badi bankuatshisha bowa, unsungidile." 
Psalms64:3 Bantu babi mbadisange bua kunduisha, mbangelele bifufu bibi." 
Psalms64:4 Ludimi luabu ludi lutue bu muela wa nkanza. Miaku yabu idi bu miketa idi itapa bantu, ishiya lulengu." 
Psalms64:5 Badi bayasa bantu ba nsongu mu musokoku, kabayi babadimuja, kabayi babanemeka." 
Psalms64:6 Badi basonsolangana bua kuenza bibi, bakeba mudibu mua kuteya mateyi mu musokoku, bambilangana ne: “Muntu nansha umue kakumona buteyi ebu to.”" 
Psalms64:7 Badi bela meji a kuenzelangana bibi, bamba ne: “Bitudi balongolola ebi mbiobi! Amu patudi batekela apa. Bantu ba meji ke mudibu balongolola malu ”" 
Psalms64:8 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubaludikila miketa yende, diakamue idi ibasa, ibatapa mputa." 
Psalms64:9 Mvidi Mukulu mmubapingajile miaku yabu mibi. Bantu bonsu badi babamona balale panshi nanku, badi bakupa mitu, bakatshila." 
Psalms64:10 Badi bakema, balondelangana bivua Mvidi Mukulu muenze, bumvua bimpe tshivuaye mubenzele nanku." 
Psalms64:11 Bantu ba Maweja-Nangila nebasanke, batekemena kudiye. Bantu ba nsongu nebaditembe ne: tudi bena diakalenga!" 
Psalms65:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wabena misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms65:2 Mvidi Mukulu, Wewe udi usomba mu tshimenga tshia Siyone, mbimpe tukuele tuasakidila, tukumbaje bituvua bakulaye." 
Psalms65:3 Bualu udi uteleja bantu badi bakutendelela. Ke padibu bonsu bafika kuudi," 
Psalms65:4 nansha bobu benza bibi bipite. Bubi buetu budi butunemenena bujitu. Amu wewe ke udi mua kubujimija. 
Psalms65:5 Muena diakalenga mmuntu uudi musungule bua asombe mu nzubu muebe. Netusanke, tutshionkomoka, bua bilenga bipite, bitudi tupeta muaba webe wa tshijila." 
Psalms65:6 Mvidi Mukulu mutupandishi wetu, wewe nkayebe udi ukumbaja biudi ulaya, wenzela bantu badi bakutendelela malu a dikema. Ke mudi bantu pa buloba bujima batekemena kuudi, nansha badi basomba mu bidila bidi kule." 
Psalms65:7 Udi ushindika mikuna ku bukole buebe, uleja dikanda diudi nadi." 
Psalms65:8 Udi utuyisha tshiona tshia mavuala a mayi manene, utalaja mutoyi wa bantu." 
Psalms65:9 Pa buloba bujima bantu badi bakatshila, malu a dikema audi wenza. Kudi diba dipatukila, ne kudidi dibuelela, bonsu badi bela mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms65:10 Udi uditatshisha bua buloba, ulokesha mvula. Buloba budi bufuka, bukuama bimuma. Mvidi Mukulu, wewe udi uwuja misulu ne mayi tente, ulongoluela bantu maminu, wamenesha:" 
Psalms65:11 udi utuma mayi mu mikidi, ulandakaja mabuwa a buloba, ubolesha buloba ne mvula, umenesha ntete." 
Psalms65:12 Tshidimu tshijima udi utuenzela bimpe. Ku ndekelu kuatshi tudi tumona bia pa madimi. Bintu bimpe bidi bipatuka miaba yonsu iudi diata. 
Psalms65:13 Mpata yonsu idi isanguluka, mu mikuna yonsu tudi tumvua amu mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms65:14 Bimuna bidi biendakana mu mpata, mu bibandabanda mmuwule ne biakudia. Miaba yonsu bantu badi batua tshianga, bakuimbila misambu." 
Psalms66:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, kokuelayi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms66:2 Nutumbishe dina diende dia butumbi, nudisamune ne misambu." 
Psalms66:3 Nuambile Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Biudi muenze mbia dikema! Baluishi bebe badi badiela panshi ne bowa, bualu bukole buebe mbupite!" 
Psalms66:4 Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, bakukukuile, bakuimbile misambu, bakutumbishe!”" 
Psalms66:5 Vuayi numone mudi Mvidi Mukulu muenze. Bidiye muenzele bantu bidi bikemesha. 
Psalms66:6 Uvua mupandile bantu njila mu mayi manene. Bantu kusabuka musulu ku makasa. Tusanke, tukatshile malu ende a dikema." 
Psalms66:7 Udi ushala mukalenga kashidi, ukokesha buloba. Udi ukenketa bisamba bionsu ne ende abidi: Bantomboji, kanuditambishi to!" 
Psalms66:8 Bisamba bionsu, elayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila, numutumbishe ne diyi dikole." 
Psalms66:9 Yeye ke udi utulama ne muoyi. Kavua musue bua tubutuke. 
Psalms66:10 Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi mututete, mutulengeje, mudibu bengulula tshiamu tshia mushinga mukole mu kapia." 
Psalms66:11 Udi mutusakile mu buteyi, mututeke bujitu bupite pa makaya." 
Psalms66:12 Uvua muanyishe bua baluishi betu batudiate mu mutu ne nyama ya tubalu. Tuvua ne bua kupitshila mu kapia ne mu mayi. Kadi wewe kutupatulamu bua tuikishe. 
Psalms66:13 Ndi mbuela mu nzubu webe mukutuadile milambu ya kuosha, bua kukumbaja malaya amvua mukulaye." 
Psalms66:14 Ke imvua mulaye, pamvua mu dikenga dinene." 
Psalms66:15 Ndi nkulambula nyama ya manyi ya kuosha, bimpanga, mpumbu, ne ngombe milume mene. Muinshi wayi neubande kulu ku tshilambuilu, ukusankishe." 
Psalms66:16 Nuenu bonsu, bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu, vuayi nunteleje, nennuambile bidiye mungenzele." 
Psalms66:17 Mvua mumubikile bua angambuluishe, meme kumuelelamu tuasakidila." 
Psalms66:18 Bu meme ne meji mabi munda, Mvidi Mukulu kavua mua kunteleja to." 
Psalms66:19 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmunteleje, mmuitabe ditendelela dianyi." 
Psalms66:20 Tuelayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila! Kena mubenge dimusengelela dianyi, bualu udi munnange kashidi." 
Psalms67:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne bisanji bia nshinga. 
Psalms67:2 Mvidi Mukulu wetu, utuleje muudi utunanga, utuele lupemba, ututangile ne luse." 
Psalms67:3 Nanku pa buloba bujima nebamanye muudi utulombola. Bisamba bionsu nebimanye ne: udi utupandisha. 
Psalms67:4 Mvidi Mukulu, bisamba bia bantu bikutumbishe, bisamba bionsu bikuele tuasakidila!" 
Psalms67:5 Mu matunga onsu bantu basanke, bakutumbishe, bualu udi ukosa nsambu ya bantu pa yoyi, ulombola bisamba bia bantu pa buloba bimpe." 
Psalms67:6 Mvidi Mukulu, bukua panu bukutumbishe! Bisamba bionsu bikuele tuasakidila!" 
Psalms67:7 Buloba mbumeneshe biakudia bivule, nenku Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu wetu mmutuele lupemba!" 
Psalms67:8 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu mmutuele lupemba. Bantu bonsu nansha ba ku ntengu ya buloba, bitabe bumfumu buende, bamutshine!" 
Psalms68:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambuya Davide. 
Psalms68:2 Padi Mvidi Mukulu ujuka, uya ku mvita, baluishi bende badi batangalaka, bena lukuna bende badi bamunyema lubilu." 
Psalms68:3 Udi ubatangalaja, bu mudi muinshi utangalaka, ujimina. Padiye umueneka, baluishi bende badi bateketa mu maboku, bu mudi manyi enguluka ku kapia." 
Psalms68:4 Kadi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu nebamutumbishe, Nebasanke batue tshianga!" 
Psalms68:5 Imbilayi Mvidi Mukulu misambu, nutumbishe dina diende. Nuakidile udi wendakana pa mavuba. Dina diende mMaweja-Nangila. Nutue tshianga, numusamune." 
Psalms68:6 Mvidi Mukulu udi usomba mu nzubu wende wa tshijila. Udi Tatu wa bana ba nshiya, ulumbuluila bakamba." 
Psalms68:7 Udi kayi ne babu, Mvidi Mukulu udi umupa nzubu. Badi mu lukanu udi ubapatula, bapete diakalenga, benze mudibu basue. Kadi bantomboji nebasombe mu buloba buume." 
Psalms68:8 Mvidi Mukulu, pauvua uya kumpala kua bantu bebe, mudianjidile mu tshipela," 
Psalms68:9 buloba kuzakala, mvula kuloka bikole, bionsu bikutshina wewe, Mvidi Mukulu wa Sinayi, bitshina Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Psalms68:10 Wewe kulokesha mvula wa bungi, buloba buume kutota." 
Psalms68:11 Ke muaba uvua bantu bebe baya kusomba, muaba uuvua mulongoluele bapele, bualu uvua ubananga." 
Psalms68:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba amu muaku umue. Bakaji kabayi kubala badi baya kuambila bantu ne: 
Psalms68:13 “Tuatshimunyi! Bakalenga ba baluishi betu mbanyeme lubilu! Tuetu bakaji bavua bashala ku nzubu, netuabanyangane bidi babayetu bapawula mu mvita." 
Psalms68:14 Mapuapua a nyunyi ya nkudimba avua akenka bu malamika tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, masala ayi akenka bu malamika mpawungi muimpe! — Kadi nudi nushala nuenu mu lupangu bua tshinyi? —" 
Psalms68:15 Pavua Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu wipata bakalenga, mabua a mvula kuloka pa mukuna wa Salmone. ”" 
Psalms68:16 Mukuna wa Bashane nngua tshijila, mukuna wa Bashane udi ne nsongu ya bungi." 
Psalms68:17 Kadi wewe mukuna udi ne nsongu mivule, udi ubaba mukuna udi Mvidi Mukulu musue kusomba, mukuna udi Maweja-Nangila muase, bua tshinyi?" 
Psalms68:18 Mvidi Mukulu udi ne matempu a mvita binunu ne binunu. Maweja-Nangila mmufume nawu ku mukuna wa Sinayi, uya ku muaba wende wa tshijila." 
Psalms68:19 Udi ubanda pa mukuna wa Siyone ne bena mvita bavuaye mukuate. Bantu ne bavua bamutombokela, kumulambula milambu! Maweja-Nangila nease pa mukuna wa Siyone kashidi." 
Psalms68:20 Tuelayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila ku dituku ku dituku, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi wambula bujitu buetu, utusungidila." 
Psalms68:21 Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu udi utupandisha, ke Maweja-Nangila udi ne bukole bua kutusungidila ku lufu." 
Psalms68:22 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neabose mitu mikale ne nsuki mile ya baluishi bende, neazaze tubalubalu tua mitu ya benji ba bibi." 
Psalms68:23 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambe ne: “Bantu banyi, nansha nuenu bikale kulu ku mikuna ya Bashane, nansha muinshi mua mayi manene, nennupatulemu, nnupingaje kuenu." 
Psalms68:24 Nenudiate mu mashi a baluishi benu, mbua yenu neisunsule bitalu bia bena lukuna benu.”" 
Psalms68:25 Mvidi Mukulu, tuetu kumona bantu bebe batue milongu, benda luendu lua mazengu mu nzubu webe wa tshijila. Eyi! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, Mukalenga wanyi!" 
Psalms68:26 Bena misambu bafilele kumpala, bansongakaji pankatshi, bimbe tutumbi, bena bisanji ku ndekelu." 
Psalms68:27 Nuenu bonsu, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, sangilayi mu bibilu, nutumbishe Maweja-Nangila, nuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila." 
Psalms68:28 Bena tshisamba tshia Binyamine wa mukala bafilele kumpala, pashishe bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne bilamba biabu bilengeja bimpe, bamfumu ba Zebulone ne ba Naftali ku ndekelu." 
Psalms68:29 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, leja bukole buebe. buuvua mutuenzele nabu malu a dikema!" 
Psalms68:30 Mu Yerushalayime, mu nzubu webe wa tshijila, bakalenga badi bakulambula milambu." 
Psalms68:31 Kanyina bena Ejipitu, nyama ya mu mayi eyi. Tandisha bakalenga ba matunga, balume ba ngombe aba. Bakuambule nkanu yabu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Tangalaja bisamba bidi binanga mvita." 
Psalms68:32 Bamienampala ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu nebafike. Bena Kushe nebatendelele Mvidi Mukulu, bamutuadile milambu yabu." 
Psalms68:33 Nuenu bakalenga ba pa buloba, imbilayi Mvidi Mukulu misambu, tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms68:34 Udi wendakana mu diulu, mu diulu dia kashidi, ukungula ne diyi dikole." 
Psalms68:35 Ambilayi bantu bonsu ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole, udi Mukalenga munene mu Izrayele, butumbi buende mbutue mulu, mbutue panshi!" 
Psalms68:36 Padi Mvidi Mukulu upatuka mu nzubu wende wa tshijila, bowa budi bukuata bantu. Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi upesha bantu bende bukole ne bumfumu. Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tuasakidila!" 
Psalms69:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu ne wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Wa kuimba ne nzenze. 
Psalms69:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, unsungidile! Mayi mmankuate ne mu nshingu." 
Psalms69:3 Ndi mudine mu lunteka ludi kaluyi ne muaba wa kuimana. Ndi munkatshi mua dilembua, mayi ampuekesha." 
Psalms69:4 Ndi mupungile ne diela mbila, muminu unsama. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mvua mukutangile, mutekemene kuudi, mesu kunkunza kunzuu!" 
Psalms69:5 Badi bankina kapayi bualu, mbapite nsuki ya ku mutu bungi. Badi banshiminyina malu, badi ne dikanda, bakeba kunshipa. Ndi ne bua kupingaja tshindi tshiyi muibe." 
Psalms69:6 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mumanye bupote buanyi, mutandule malu mabi onsu amvua muenze." 
Psalms69:7 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, kufuishi bantu badi batekemena kuudi bundu. Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, kuyi ungambuluisha, bantu bonsu aba nebakuangate bibi." 
Psalms69:8 Badi bampenda, bangela bibingu, bualu ndi muntu webe!" 
Psalms69:9 Nkadi muenyi munkatshi mua bena diku dietu, nansha bana ba tatu mene kabatshiena bammanye." 
Psalms69:10 Dinanga dindi nadi bua nzubu webe, didi dingosha munda bu kapia. Badi bakupenda, mbampende." 
Psalms69:11 Mvua nnyingalala, njila biakudia bobu kunseka!" 
Psalms69:12 Mvua muvuale bilamba bia madilu, bobu kunsaka mu misambu." 
Psalms69:13 Miaba idi bantu basangile badi bantela, banu ba maluvu badi banseka, bangimba mu misambu." 
Psalms69:14 Kadi meme, Maweja-Nangila, ndi amu nkutendelela. Ungambuluishe tshikondu tshiudi musungule. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bu muudi unnanga bikole, ungitabe, unsungidile." 
Psalms69:15 Umpatule mu lunteka lundi ndina, unsungidile kudi badi bankina, unsabule mu dilembua." 
Psalms69:16 Muenji kaumpuekeshi, mavuala kaanjimiji. Lukita luanyi kalushadi muinshi mua mayi." 
Psalms69:17 Maweja-Nangila, ungitabe, bualu udi munnange. Amu wewe udi mua kungambuluisha. Bu muudi ne luse luvule, untangile." 
Psalms69:18 Ndi muntu webe, kunsokomi. Ndi mu dikenga dinene, ungitabe lukasa." 
Psalms69:19 Luakunu, ungambuluishe, unsungidile kudi baluishi banyi." 
Psalms69:20 Udi mumanye mudibu bampenda, bamfuisha bundu, bampetula; udi mumone kumpala kuanyi baluishi banyi bonsu." 
Psalms69:21 Bipendu mbinsunsule muoyi, nkadi mushikile. Mvua mukebe uvua mua kumfuila luse, kadi tshiena mumupete. Mvua muindile uvua mua kunsamba, tshiena mumumone." 
Psalms69:22 Baluishi banyi bavua bakisa biakudia bianyi, bampesha maluvu a buanji, pamvua ne nyota." 
Psalms69:23 Nanku basombe ne benyi babu ku mesa, babutuke. Badie biakudia bilunga ne buanga mu bibilu biabu bia tshijila, bafue!" 
Psalms69:24 Tshibua tshibatue ku mesu, kabamonyi nganda! Ubatshibule nyima kashidi." 
Psalms69:25 Ubapumuine tshiji tshiebe, kadilu katshi kakole kaboshe." 
Psalms69:26 Nzubu yabu ibutuke, bonsu badi mu ntenta yabu babashipe." 
Psalms69:27 Bualu badi balondakaja muntu uudi mumane kunyoka, batumbula mputa ya baudi mumane kukengesha." 
Psalms69:28 Badika malu mabi abu onsu, kubafuidi luse ku kalu nansha kamue." 
Psalms69:29 Ukupule mena abu mu mukanda wa badi ne muoyi. Kubafundi pamue ne bantu bebe. 
Psalms69:30 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi mupele, kabidi mubedi, ungambuluishe, unsungidile." 
Psalms69:31 Nenkuimbile misambu, nkuela tuasakidila, ntumbishe dina diebe." 
Psalms69:32 Maweja-Nangila, ke bidi bikuenza disanka, mbipite ngombe milume ne mikaji indi nkulambula." 
Psalms69:33 Bantu bapuekele nebamone bionsu ebi, nebasanke. “Nuenu bonsu badi bakeba Mvidi Mukulu, nulale panu nuboboke." 
Psalms69:34 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi uteleja bena dikenga, kena ulengulula bantu bende badi mu lukanu." 
Psalms69:35 Diulu ne buloba, tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu. Mayi manene ne bionsu bidimu, musamunayi." 
Psalms69:36 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu neapandishe Siyone, neibakulule bimenga bia Yuda. Bantu bende nebapinganemu, basombemu tshiakabidi." 
Psalms69:37 Ndelanganyi ya bantu bende, neipiane ditunga diabu edi. Bonsu badi bananga Maweja-Nangila, nebasombemu.”" 
Psalms70:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu ne wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Bua kuleja Mvidi Mukulu dikenga dianyi. 
Psalms70:2 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, umpandishe, Maweja-Nangila, kolesha, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms70:3 Badi basue kunshipa, bafue bundu, bapange tshia kuenza. Badi basanka bua dikenga dianyi, lumu lubupuke!" 
Psalms70:4 Badi banseka, bundu bubakuate, bapuwe!" 
Psalms70:5 Kadi bantu bebe bonsu basanke bikole bualu buebe, badi bakunanga, bakutumbishe matuku onsu. Mupandishi wetu, bambe ne: “Mvidi Mukulu mmunene!”" 
Psalms70:6 Meme ndi mupele ne muena dikenga. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, fika lukasa. Udi ungambuluisha, undama, ngwewe, Maweja-Nangila, kunengi, luaku lubilu." 
Psalms71:1 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nyemena kuudi, kumfuishi bundu." 
Psalms71:2 Bu muudi ukumbaja malaya ebe, unsungidile, mupikule. Unteleje ne ntema, umpandishe." 
Psalms71:3 Wikale lubuebue, muaba mukole undi mua kusokomena. Eyowa, wewe udi lubuebue, muaba undi mua kupetela lupandu." 
Psalms71:4 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ungepule ku bianza bia bantu babi, ku tshinyangu tshia bivi ne bakengeshanganyi." 
Psalms71:5 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkutekemena, nkueyemina biangatshile ku buana buanyi." 
Psalms71:6 Katshia bandela, wewe ke tshipanda wa nshindamenu. Katshia ngamona diba, amu wewe ke uvua mundame. Ke pandi nkutumbisha diba dionsu." 
Psalms71:7 Bantu ba bungi bavua bela meji ne: Wewe uvua muntshipe. Kadi Wewe ke tshianyi tshipanda tshia kushindamena. 
Psalms71:8 Ndi nkuimbila misambu, nkutumbisha! nkusamuna matuku anyi onsu." 
Psalms71:9 Nkadi mukulumpe, kundekedi to. Tshitshiena ne bukole, kunshiyi nkayanyi." 
Psalms71:10 Baluishi banyi badi bangelela bifufu bibi, bakeba mudibu mua kunshipa, bamba ne:" 
Psalms71:11 “Mvidi Mukulu kena kabidi nende ne bualu. Tumuipate, tumukuate, kakutshiena udi mua kumunyenga mu bianza bietu.”" 
Psalms71:12 Mvidi Mukulu, kuikadi nanyi kule. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, luaku lukasa, ungambuluishe!" 
Psalms71:13 Badi bansonguela, bundu bubakuate, babutuke! Badi bankebela diakabi, ubafuishe bundu, bupuke lumu." 
Psalms71:14 Kadi meme matuku onsu ndi nkutekemena amu wewe. Nenkutumbishe misangu ne misangu. 
Psalms71:15 Dituku dijima nengambile bantu muudi ukumbaja biuvua mulaye. Nembalondele muudi utusungidila, utuenzela bilenga kabiyi kubala." 
Psalms71:16 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nemmanyishe bantu muudi ne bukole, muudi Wewe nkayebe wenza bionsu amu biakane." 
Psalms71:17 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mundongeshe biangatshile ku buana buanyi. Too ne lelu, ntshidi amu mmanyisha malu a dikema audi muenze." 
Psalms71:18 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nkadi ne nsuki mitoke, kadi kundekedi. Nanku nemmone mua kumanyisha bana banyi ne biikulu banyi, muudi ne bukole, wenza malu a dikema." 
Psalms71:19 Mvidi Mukulu, buakane buebe budi butua mulu, butua panshi. Udi muenze malu a dikema! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kakuena udi mufuanangane nebe." 
Psalms71:20 Udi mummueneshe mabika ne mala. Kadi neumfululule, ungepule ku lukita." 
Psalms71:21 Neunsambe ne lelu kabidi. Neumpingajile ne lumu luanyi luvuabu banyange. 
Psalms71:22 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nenkuimbile misambu ne lunzenze. Nenkutumbishe bualu udi muena diyi dimue. Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa Izrayele, nenkusamune ne lunkombe." 
Psalms71:23 Nenkuimbile misambu, nkuela tunkunduluila, bualu uvua mumpikule." 
Psalms71:24 Bu muudi ukumbaja malaya ebe, nenkutumbishe buatshia buila. Bonsu bavua bakeba kumbutula, bundu bubakuate, bupuke lumu." 
Psalms72:1 Wa mu mikanda ya Shelomu. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, upeshe mukalenga meji, akose nsambu pa yoyi bu muudi uyikosa. Upeshe muana wa mukalenga lungenyi, alonde dikasa diebe." 
Psalms72:2 Alombole bantu bende, kayi ne kansungasunga. Ambuluishe badibu bakengesha kapayi bualu." 
Psalms72:3 Ku bulongolodi buende, bupole bubuele mu ditunga, bubanji bupueke mu mikuna." 
Psalms72:4 Mukalenga akose nsambu ya bapele pa yoyi, ambuluishe bena dikenga, abutule badi babakengesha!" 
Psalms72:5 Alale panu aboboke bu diba ne muenji, mu ndelanganyi ne ndelanganyi ya bantu." 
Psalms72:6 Bukalenga buende bulengelele bantu, bu mudi mvula uloka mu madimi, walengeja, bu mudi mvula wa mudimbi utotesha buloba, ubufukisha." 
Psalms72:7 Matuku adiye mu bukalenga, bakose nsambu amu pa yoyi. Bupole ne diakalenga bivulangane mu ditunga, too ne muajimina ngondu kashidi!" 
Psalms72:8 Mukalenga adie bumfumu ku mayi manene too ne ku makuabu, ku musulu wa Perate too ne ku ntengu ya buloba." 
Psalms72:9 Baluishi bende nebatue binu kumpala kuende. Bena lukuna nebadiele panshi, bamukukuile." 
Psalms72:10 Bakalenga ba mu Tarshishe ne ba mu bidila bia kule, nebamutumine malambi, ba mu Saba ne ba mu Seba bamutuadile milambu." 
Psalms72:11 Bakalenga bonsu nebamukukuile, bisamba bionsu nebimuenzele mudimu." 
Psalms72:12 Neapikule muena dikenga udi umusengelela, kabidi ne mupele udi kayi ne mumuambuluishi." 
Psalms72:13 Neambuluishe udi kayi ne bukole, kabidi ne muena dikenga. Neabatatshile bua bapande." 
Psalms72:14 Neabepule ku tshinyangu ne kabutu, bualu udi ubananga, musue bua bashale ne muoyi." 
Psalms72:15 Mukalenga akole bobobu! Bantu bamulambule mpawungi wa mu Saba, batendelela, bamulombele diba dionsu, basengelela Mvidi Mukulu buatshia buila bua amuele lupemba." 
Psalms72:16 Ntete ya kuenza bukula, ivulangane mu ditunga. Biakudia bitoloke bia bungi mu mikuna, bisampile bu mu mikuna ya Lebanone, biele miepu bungi bu bisosa bia mu mpata!" 
Psalms72:17 Lumu lua mukalenga lushale kashidi, bamutumbishe too ne muajimina diba tshiendelele! Bantu belangane lupemba, bamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu akusankishe, muvuaye muenzele mukalenga! Mu matunga onsu bantu bamutue makumbu!" 
Psalms72:18 Tuele Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, tuasakidila. Amu Yeye ke udi wenza malu a dikema."
