Psalms72:19 Tuele Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila! Lumu luende ndunene! Butumbi buende bumueneke mu buloba bujima! Amene, eyo, bikale nanku!" 
Psalms72:20 Ke ndekelu wa misambu ya Davide, muana wa Ishayi." 
Psalms73:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Ndi mumanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi unanga Izrayele, nangananga bantu badi bamuitaba." 
Psalms73:2 Kadi nkavua musue kupambuka mu njila, amu katupa kakese nkavua mua kufinunuka." 
Psalms73:3 Mvua mbaba bantu badi baditambisha, bavila Mvidi Mukulu, bualu badi bapeta dikasa dimpe mu malu abu onsu." 
Psalms73:4 Bantu abu kabatu basama, badi badiunda, bengelela." 
Psalms73:5 Ntatu idi ikuata bantu, kabena nayi, bipupu bikole bidi kudi bakuabu, kabiena bibalenga." 
Psalms73:6 Badi baditemba, bu bantu bela mabue a busanga. Tshinyangu ke tshiabu tshivualu tshidi tshibakumbanyina." 
Psalms73:7 Badi ne kantu ku bianza, bapepeja bantu bakuabu, bela amu meji a kuenzelangana bibi." 
Psalms73:8 Badi baseka bantu, bakula ne tshikisu, badiela mulu, batshinyisha bakuetu." 
Psalms73:9 Badi basendeka Mvidi Mukulu udi mu diulu, bajana bantu ba pa buloba." 
Psalms73:10 Ke padi bamue bena tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu babalonda, bitaba bionsu bidi bantu babi abu bamba." 
Psalms73:11 Batu bebeja ne: “Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mumanye ntshinyi? Yeye udi mulu muamua, tuetu panshi!”" 
Psalms73:12 Ke mudi bantu badi bayila Mvidi Mukulu. Bakadi ne bintu bivule, bapeta amu bikuabu." 
Psalms73:13 Nanku, ndi muenze malu malenga amu patupu, tshiyi mpeta tshintu. Nansha ku muela wanyi kakuyi mashi, ndi mpangila bionsu." 
Psalms73:14 Matuku onsu ndi mmona amu makenga, dinda dionsu ndi mpeta amu dikasa dibi." 
Psalms73:15 Kadi meme muele meji a kuakula bu bantu babi abu, mvua mua kuyila tshisamba tshia bana bebe." 
Psalms73:16 Ke meme kukeba kujingulula bualu abu, kadi bivua amu binkolela." 
Psalms73:17 Kadi meme kubuela mu nzubu webe wa tshijila, kumanya bivua ne bua kubenzekela." 
Psalms73:18 Udi mubimanyike muaba mupulumuke bua baselemuke, badiela mu lupongu." 
Psalms73:19 Nebabutuke ku mubunyi wa disu. Lufu luabu lubi nelukuatshishe bantu bowa! 
Psalms73:20 Maweja-Nangila, wewe mujuke bua kubaluisha, nebajimine, bu mudi ndota ijimina muntu, padiye utabala." 
Psalms73:21 Pamvua ne kanyinganyinga, ngumvua bibi munda munda," 
Psalms73:22 tshivua kabidi ne lungenyi to. Mvua mutatakane bu nyama, tshiyi mua kukumvua." 
Psalms73:23 Kadi wewe uvua amu nanyi diba dionsu, munkuate ku tshianza bua tshiponu." 
Psalms73:24 Udi undombola mudi meji ebe, ku ndekelu neungakidile mu butumbi buebe." 
Psalms73:25 Mu diulu udi mua kungambuluisha nnganyi? Ki ngwewe nkayebe anyi? Panu panshi tshindi mua kujinga kabidi ntshinyi? Wewe ke undi nende. 
Psalms73:26 Nansha mubidi wanyi ne muoyi bienda bishikila, kadi wewe Mvidi Mukulu udi bukole buanyi, ushale wanyi diba dionsu." 
Psalms73:27 Bantu badi bakubenga, nebajimine, badi bakuvila, nebabutuke butubutuu." 
Psalms73:28 Kuikala nebe pabuipi ndiakalenga dianyi. Maweja-Nangila, ndi ntekemena kuudi, mmanyisha bantu bionsu biudi muenze." 
Psalms74:1 Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mutubenge kashidi bua tshinyi? Udi mutulamine tshiji bua tshinyi? Tuetu bikale mikoku ya mu tshikumbi tshiebe?" 
Psalms74:2 Uvuluke bantu bebe bauvua mudisunguile ku kale. Kupu muoyi bisamba biuvua mupikule, mubienze biebe. Kuvulaminyi mukuna wa Siyone, muaba uuvua musue kusomba." 
Psalms74:3 Ubande mu makolu: baluishi mbanyange nzubu webe mujima wa tshijila. 
Psalms74:4 Bena lukuna bebe bavua bela mbila ya disanka, mu nzubu webe, muaba mene uudi usomba. Bavua bimanyikamu mabendela abu, baleja mudibu batshimune." 
Psalms74:5 Bavua benza nzubu awu bu muaba wa kupuila mitshi, bela bisuyi mulu, bu badi bakosa mitshi muitu," 
Psalms74:6 banyanga bimana bienza ne mabaya malengeja, babipanda bonsu pamue ne ngindu, kabidi ne milonda." 
Psalms74:7 Bavua bosha nzubu webe wa tshijila, bamupula panshi, bamupisha mikiya." 
Psalms74:8 Bavua batuamba ne: “Netubabutule bonsu! Netoshe nzubu yonsu ya kutendelela idi mu ditunga diabu.” 
Psalms74:9 Kakutshiena bidi bileja ne: wewe udi munkatshi muetu. Bambi kabatshiena bamanyisha malu. Kakuena wa kutudi udi mumanye ne: ebi nebijike diba kaayi. 
Psalms74:10 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, muluishi neakusendeke kabidi matuku bungi munyi? Muena lukuna neakuseke kashidi anyi?" 
Psalms74:11 Kuena musue kutuambuluisha bua tshinyi? Muudi muele maboku panyima, mulengulule bualu ebu mbishi?" 
Psalms74:12 Kadi kuonsu eku Wewe udi Mukalenga wetu. Kale uvua muenze malu a dikema pa buloba. 
Psalms74:13 Wewe wakapandulula mayi manene ku bukole buebe, wakaboza mitu ya bidika bia mu mayi." 
Psalms74:14 Uvua muzaze kabalubalu ka tshidika tshia Leviyatane, mutshidishe kudi nyama ya mu tshipela." 
Psalms74:15 Uvua mupatule mayi mu mpokolu ne mu tusulu, mumishe misulu minene ivua kayiyi mua kukama." 
Psalms74:16 Uvua mufuke munya ne butuku, muteke diba ne ngondu pa muaba wabi." 
Psalms74:17 Uvua mushindike mikalu ya buloba, muenze tshikondu tshia luya ne tshia mashika." 
Psalms74:18 Maweja-Nangila, vuluka mudi muluishi ukufunyina, mudi bantu batatakane aba bakuseka." 
Psalms74:19 Kutupu muoyi tuetu bapele bebe, tunkudimba tuebe, kutueledi nyama ya lonji." 
Psalms74:20 Vuluka ndondu iuvua mutue netu. Bena tshinyangu badi mu ditunga dijima, too ne mu miaba ya ku mpenga." 
Psalms74:21 Badi batukengesha, batunyenga bionsu. Utusungidile, tumone mua kukutumbisha." 
Psalms74:22 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, juka, udiakajile bualu buebe. Vuluka mudi bantu batatakane aba bakupenda diba dionsu." 
Psalms74:23 Kupu muoyi mbila idi baluishi bebe bela. Mitoyi ya bena lukuna bebe idi ivulangana matuku onsu. 
Psalms75:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa kuimba bu musambu wa “Kubutuishi…” Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe." 
Psalms75:2 Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tudi tukutumbisha, tukuela tuasakidila, tumanyisha bantu bukole buudi nabu, ubalondela malu a dikema auvua muenze." 
Psalms75:3 Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Meme nkayanyi ndi njadika tshikondu tshindi ndumbuluisha bantu, nenkose nsambu yabu amu pa yoyi." 
Psalms75:4 Nansha buloba buzakala, nansha badi basepu batshina, kadi meme ndi mbushindika pa makunji abu kashidi.”" 
Psalms75:5 Ndi ngambila bena dikamakama ne: “Kanudisu kabidi to!” Ntandisha badi kabayi bangitaba ne: “Bienu biantondi! 
Psalms75:6 Diditemba dienu dijike, didiela mulu dienu ndintonde!" 
Psalms75:7 Numanye ne: lupandu luenu kaluena lufuma kudi diba dipatukila, nansha kudidi dibuelela. Kaluena lufuma ku mikuna nansha ku tshipela." 
Psalms75:8 Amu Mvidi Mukulu ke udi ulumbuluisha bantu, upuekesha umue, ubandisha mukuabu.”" 
Psalms75:9 Mu bianza bia Maweja-Nangila mudi dikopu dia maluvu, dia maluvu a buanji mamane kuzaza. Ke maluvu a tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Udi wanuisha bantu babi ba pa buloba. Badi ne bua kuanua bonsu, kuajikija too ne binyindanyinda, kushiya dikopu munda mutupu." 
Psalms75:10 Kadi meme tshiakupuwa to. Nengimbile Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe misambu, mmanyishe bantu bionsu bivuaye muenze." 
Psalms75:11 “Neatokeshe bena ditambisha bonsu, kadi bantu bende neabatantamije.”" 
Psalms76:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne bisanji bia nshinga dikumi. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. 
Psalms76:2 Mvidi Mukulu mmudimanyishe mu Yuda. Dina diende nditumbe mu Izrayele. 
Psalms76:3 Nzubu wende wa ntenta udi mu Saleme. Muaba wende wa kulala udi mu Siyone. 
Psalms76:4 Ke muaba uvuaye mutshibuile bia lufu: miketa, ngabu ne miele bia baluishi." 
Psalms76:5 Mvidi Mukulu udi wa kutshina, udi mupite ne mikuna idi ishala tshiendelele!" 
Psalms76:6 Badi banyenga bintu bia bena mvita ba bukitu, bafuile ku tulu, kabavua ne mushindu wa kudisungila." 
Psalms76:7 Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe, pauvua mukanyine nyama ya tubalu, ne badi babandapu, bapangi bukole." 
Psalms76:8 Bu muudi wa kutshina, nnganyi udi mua kuimana kumpala kuebe paudi ne tshiji?" 
Psalms76:9 Udi ukosela bilumbu mu diulu muamua, buloba budi butshina, bushala talalaa," 
Psalms76:10 paudi ujuka bua kumanyisha dipangadika diebe, dia kusungidila bantu bapuekele ba pa buloba." 
Psalms76:11 Nansha tshiji tshia bantu netshikutumbishe, ne bonsu bikale bapambuke ku tshiji tshiebe, nebakuenzele tshibilu." 
Psalms76:12 Uditshipe kudi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu webe wenze muuvua mumulaye. Nuenu bonsu badi bamunyunguluke, nufike ne milambu yenu kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa kutshina." 
Psalms76:13 Udi umusha ditambisha dia bana ba bamfumu, udi ukuatshisha bakalenga ba pa buloba bowa." 
Psalms77:1 Musambu wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa Yedutune. Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. 
Psalms77:2 Ndi ndidila Mvidi Mukulu ne diyi dikole bua dikenga dianyi. Ndi ndidila Mvidi Mukulu bua anteleje. 
Psalms77:3 Ndi nkeba Maweja-Nangila pandi mu dikenga, ndi mmuoluela bianza butuku bujima, tshiyi mpungila ndi mbenga bua muntu kansambi." 
Psalms77:4 Pandi mvuluka Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ntua mikemu, pandi ngela meji ndi nteketa mu maboku." 
Psalms77:5 Maweja-Nangila udi umpesha tshitabela, ndi ntata mpanga tshindi mua kuamba." 
Psalms77:6 Ndi mvuluka matuku mapite, ndi ngela meji a bikondu bia kale, ndi ndala ngela meji butuku bujima. Ndi nganyina, nkeba mua kujingulula." 
Psalms77:7  
Psalms77:8 Maweja-Nangila neatubenge kashidi anyi? Kena kabidi netu bualu anyi? 
Psalms77:9 Maweja-Nangila udi mutuipate kashidi anyi? Kena kabidi ne tshia kutuambila anyi? 
Psalms77:10 Mvidi Mukulu mmupue muoyi bua kutufuila luse anyi? Mmutubenge bua padiye ne tshiji anyi? 
Psalms77:11 Ndi ngamba ne: “Bualu budi buntonda budi bua Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, kena kabidi netu bualu.”" 
Psalms77:12 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mvuluka bionsu biuvua muenze. Eyowa, ndi ngela meji ku malu ebe a kukema a kale." 
Psalms77:13 Ndi nganyisha biudi muenze, ndi nganyisha malu audi muenze tshiyi mua kupua muoyi." 
Psalms77:14 Eyi! Mvidi Mukulu, njila webe udi wa tshijila, kakuena mvidie mukuabu udi munene bu wewe Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms77:15 Wewe nkayebe ke udi wenza malu a dikema, udi muleje bisamba bikuabu bumfumu buebe," 
Psalms77:16 Uvua mupikule bantu bebe ku bukole buebe, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ne ya Yozefe." 
Psalms77:17 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, padi mayi akumona, avua akuatshika bowa, avuanduluka too ne muinshi muawu." 
Psalms77:18 Mavuba akapatula muenji mukole, munkatshi mua mayi muvua mikungulu ya mvula, miketa yebe ivua ipitakana nseke yonsu." 
Psalms77:19 Munkatshi mua mikungulu ya mvula, mipenya ivua ikuatshisha bantu bowa, buloba buvua buzakala ne bowa." 
Psalms77:20 Mvidi Mukulu uvua mupande njila mu mayi manene, uvua wendela muinshi mua mayi manene muntu kavua mua kumona dikasa diebe." 
Psalms77:21 Uvua muteke Moshe ne Arone, bua bashale balami ba bantu bebe." 
Psalms78:1 Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Bantu banyi telejayi bimpe malongesha anyi, teyayi matshi ku bindi nnuambila." 
Psalms78:2 Nengele lusumuinu, bua kunuambila malu avua menzeke kale." 
Psalms78:3 Malu aa nga kutudi, atuvua bumvua bantu bamba, ne baledi betu mbatulondelawu." 
Psalms78:4 Katuena basue kuasokoka bana betu, kadi netuambile ndelanganyi yetu, mudibu mua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bukole buende ne malu a kukema adiye muenze." 
Psalms78:5 Uvua mulongeshe bantu bende, kuelelaye bena Izrayele mukenji, kuambilaye bankambua betu, bua balongeshe bana babu malu aa." 
Psalms78:6 Nenku, ndelanganyi idi ilonda, ya bana badi kabayi banji kulela neyibumanye, bua ikale iyuluija bana babu." 
Psalms78:7 Bua bana batekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi bapua muoyi bidiye mubenzele, ne bua balame meyi ende." 
Psalms78:8 Nenku, kabakulonda kabidi ngenzelu ya bankambua babu ivua mibi, ya bantu batomboke, bena mpala ibidi, kabayi balamate Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms78:9 Bantu ba mu tshisamba tshia Efrayime, bavua baluangana ne mata a miketa, bakanyema mvita mu dituku adi." 
Psalms78:10 Kabavua banemeka ndondu uvuabu batue ne Mvidi Mukulu, bavua babenga mua kulonda mikenji yende." 
Psalms78:11 Bavua bapue muoyi malu a kukema avuaye muenze, ne bishima bivuaye mubaleje." 
Psalms78:12 Uvua muenze malu a kukema ku mesu a batatuabu, mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ne mu buloba bua Sowane." 
Psalms78:13 Uvua mupande njila mu mayi manene bua kusabukabu, uvua muimanyike mayi bu tshimana." 
Psalms78:14 Mu munya uvua ubalombola mu divuba kumpala kuabu, butuku uvua ubakenkeshila tshimunyi tshia kapia." 
Psalms78:15 Kupandaye mabue mu tshipela, bua kubapesha mayi a muinshi mua buloba." 
Psalms78:16 Kupatulaye mayi mu dibue, kupuekeshaye mayi bu misulu." 
Psalms78:17 Kadi kuenzabu malu mabi mu tshipela, kutombokelabu Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu." 
Psalms78:18 Kutetabu Mvidi Mukulu, kumulomba biakudia." 
Psalms78:19 Kujanabu Mvidi Mukulu badikonka ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ne bukole bua kutupesha biakudia mu tshipela anyi? 
Psalms78:20 Bulelela, uvua mupande lubuebue, mupatule mayi, ne misulu ya mayi ipueka. Kadi udi mua kutupesha biakudia anyi kupesha bantu bonsu munyinyi anyi?”" 
Psalms78:21 Maweja-Nangila umvua amu malu awu, kufikaye munda, kukuatshila bena Izrayele tshiji, bu kapia bua kuosha bantu bende." 
Psalms78:22 Bualu bantu bende kabavua bamuitabe, kabavua bangata diambuluisha diende ne mushinga." 
Psalms78:23 Kutuminaye mavuba a kulu diyi. Kunzululaye biibi bia diulu. 
Psalms78:24 Kubalokeshilaye mana bua kudiabu, kupeshaye bantu bende diampa dia mu diulu." 
Psalms78:25 Kubatuminaye biakudia bikumbane: bantu kudiabu biakudia bia batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu. 
Psalms78:26 Pashishe Mvidi Mukulu kupatula lupepela mu diulu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kuenzeja lupepela lua kuinshi kua ditunga bua lupepe bikole." 
Psalms78:27 Kubapatuilaye munyinyi bu lupuishi, nyunyi bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Psalms78:28 Kuyiponeshaye panshi, ya bungi mu mitanda, ivua minyunguluke ntenta ya bena Izrayele." 
Psalms78:29 Maweja-Nangila kubapesha bintu bivuabu bajinga, kubidiabu bungi buvuabu basue." 
Psalms78:30 Kabayi banji kukumbaja majinga abu, anu patshivuabu ne biakudia mukana," 
Psalms78:31 tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu kubatulukila, kushipaye bansongalume ba bena Izrayele." 
Psalms78:32 Nansha mubashipe nanku, bena Izrayele kuenzabu kabidi malu mabi, kabena bitabe malu avua Mvidi Mukulu muenze a kukema nansha." 
Psalms78:33 Nenku kubajimijaye diakamue, kubashipa bonsu musangu umue." 
Psalms78:34 Bamane kupunga ne lufu, kutangilabu kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kupinganabu kudiye bakeba diambuluisha diende." 
Psalms78:35 Kuvulukabu ne Mvidi Mukulu uvua lubuebue luabu, Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu uvua musungudi wabu." 
Psalms78:36 Kadi kabavua ne bulelela. Bivuabu bamuambila bivua bia dishima. 
Psalms78:37 Kabavua bamulamate nansha, bavua bupule ndondu uvuabu batue nende." 
Psalms78:38 Kadi yeye uvua mubanange, ubafuila luse, kayi ubabutula. Kavua ulonda muvua tshiji tshiende tshimuambila. kavua ulonda meji atshi," 
Psalms78:39 uvua uvuluka ne badi amu bantu, badi bu lupepela ludi lupatuka kaluyi lupingana kabidi." 
Psalms78:40 Mmisangu bungi munyi kuabu bamutombokele mu tshipela! Mmisangu bungi munyi kuabu bamunyingalaje mu muaba awu uvua kauyi mayi! 
Psalms78:41 Kutuadijabu tshiakabidi kuteta Mvidi Mukulu. Kutombokelabu Mvidi Mukulu wa Tshijila wa Izrayele. 
Psalms78:42 Kupuabu muoyi bivuaye mubenzele, pavuaye mubapatule mu bianza bia baluishi," 
Psalms78:43 kabayi bavuluka bishima biende, bivuaye mubenzele mu Ejipitu ne malu a kukema mu ditunga dia Sowane." 
Psalms78:44 Mayi a mu majiba kuandamuka mashi, bua bena Ejipitu kabapetshi mayi a kunua." 
Psalms78:45 Njiji kua ibasuma, ibanua mashi, kubatumina ndimba kua ibatatshisha, kubutulayi bintu bionsu." 
Psalms78:46 Mikumbi kunyanga bia pa madimi. Bivuabu banowa, kubidiabu kudi mpasu." 
Psalms78:47 Kubutulaye madimi abu a mionji ya mvinyo ku mvula ya mabue, kushimbula mitshi yabu ya sikomore ku mvula wa tshipupu." 
Psalms78:48 Bimuna biabu kubutuka ku mabue a mvula, ne bisumbu biabu bia mikoku ku muele wa mvula." 
Psalms78:49 Ku ndekelu Mvidi Mukulu kutumina bena Ejipitu tshiji tshikole, kubafikila munda, kubakengesha mishindu yonsu." 
Psalms78:50 Nanshaye kukandika tshiji tshiende, kavua amu mubatumine lufu nkayalu, kadi, kubatuminaye kabidi bipupu bia mishindu yonsu:" 
Psalms78:51 mu meku a bena Ejipitu, mu ndelanganyi ya bana ba Kame, kubutulaye ba muana buta, bana bavuabu balela kumpala patshivuabu ne bukole." 
Psalms78:52 Pashishe kutumaye bantu bende, bu tshisumbu tshia mikoku tshidi tshipatuka mu tshikumbi, kuyaye ne bantu bende mu tshipela bu mudi muntu ulombola mikoku yende." 
Psalms78:53 Kubalombolaye mu ditalala kabayi ne bowa, baluishi babu mayi manene kubabuikila." 
Psalms78:54 Pashishe kubafikisha mu buloba buende bua tshijila, ku mukuna uvuaye munyenge ku bukole buende." 
Psalms78:55 Kuipataye bisamba bia bantu benyi bobu batangile, kubapeshaye buloba ebu, bu bumpianyi buabu. Kupingajaye bena Izrayele mu buloba bua bena Kanaane." 
Psalms78:56 Kadi bobu kubenga Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu, kumutombokela, kushipa mikenji yende." 
Psalms78:57 Kushalabu bantu babi, bashipianganyi, bu muvua bankambua babu, kubengabu mikenji, bu mudi nshinga ya buta mituntumuke." 
Psalms78:58 Kupendabu Maweja-Nangila, batendelela pa mikuna miaba ya bantu benyi, mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kumufikishabu munda ne disonga dia mpingu ya mvidie ya patupu." 
Psalms78:59 Mvidi Mukulu umona nanku, kufikaye munda, kuengululaye bena Izrayele." 
Psalms78:60 Kushiyaye nzubu wende wa Silo, ntenta uvuaye musombe munkatshi mua bantu." 
Psalms78:61 Bua mushete wa ndondu, tshimanyinu tshia bukole buende ne lumu luende, kuufilaye mu bianza bia baluishi bua kuyawu mu bupika." 
Psalms78:62 Bu muvuaye mufikile bantu bende munda, kubafilaye bua babashipe." 
Psalms78:63 Kapia kubutula bansongalume, kupangabu mua kuimbila nsongakaji misambu." 
Psalms78:64 Batuangaji kufua ku muele wa mvita, kakuvua kushala nansha bakaji bakamba bua kudila." 
Psalms78:65 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kutabala, bu mudi muntu mujuke ku tulu, bu mudi muena mvita wa bukitu, mutenduke maluvu." 
Psalms78:66 Maweja-Nangila kukuma baluishi bende, kubipata, kubafuisha bundu kashidi." 
Psalms78:67 Yeye kuipata ndelanganyi ya Yozefe, kubenga kusungula tshisamba tshia Efrayime," 
Psalms78:68 kadi kusungulaye tshisamba tshia Yuda, ke mukuna wa Siyone uvuaye munange." 
Psalms78:69 Yeye kuibakilapu nzubu wende wa tshijila, nzubu uvua mukole bu diulu, ne bu buloba, buvuaye muibake nabu nzubu wa kashidi." 
Psalms78:70 Maweja-Nangila uvua musungule Davide, bua kuikala muena mudimu wende. Uvua muye kumukeba mu tshikumbi tshia mikoku," 
Psalms78:71 uvua mumuangate pavuaye ulonda mikoku mu nyima, bua kuikala mulami wa bena Izrayele, bantu bende bavuaye mupite kunanga." 
Psalms78:72 Davide kuenza mudimu wende, kulombola tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila, ne muoyi mulenga kabidi ne meji." 
Psalms79:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, bantu benyi mbanyange muaba webe uudi usomba, mbashiye mikiya mu nzubu webe wa tshijila, Yerushalayime mmushale kabutu." 
Psalms79:2 Bitalu bia bena mudimu bebe mbabidie, kudi nyunyi ya mikanku, ne minyinyi ya bantu bebe bakane kudi nyama ya tshisuku." 
Psalms79:3 Bitalu bia bakulamatshi bebe bidi panshi, miaba yonsu mu Yerushalayime, kakuyi muntu udi mua kubijika." 
Psalms79:4 Tuetu aba, bena mutumba badi batupenda, badi netu pabuipi badi batulembakaja." 
Psalms79:5 Maweja-Nangila neutulaminyine tshiji atshi tshikole, ne mukawu udi wosha bu kapia musangu bule munyi?" 
Psalms79:6 Benyi aba badi kabayi bakumanye, ne makalenga adi kaayi akutendelela, ubafikile bonsu munda." 
Psalms79:7 Bualu bavua bapawule Izrayele, bavua banyangakaje muaba wende." 
Psalms79:8 Kututandishi bua bilema bia bantu bavua badianjile kumpala kuetu, kadi bua dinanga diebe, pingana kutudi. Kujingakanyi to, bualu tudi badishinde panshi menemene." 
Psalms79:9 Mvidi Mukulu musungidi wetu, luaku utuambuluishe, bualu lumu luebe mbalunyange, utupandishe, utufuile luse, bualu butumbi buebe ke budibu bapepeja." 
Psalms79:10 Bantu benyi badi batukonka ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wabu udi wenza tshinyi? ” Kadi bamanye ne: tudi basue kumona muudi usombuela, bua lufu lua bena mudimu bebe." 
Psalms79:11 Uteleje ne luse miadi ya bena lukanu. Wewe udi ne bumfumu bunene, upandishe bantu badibu bakeba kushipa." 
Psalms79:12 Maweja-Nangila, bisamba bitudi nabi mutumba bidi bikuluisha, ubipingajile misangu muanda mutekete bipendu biabu, bivuabu bakupenda." 
Psalms79:13 Kadi tuetu bantu bebe, mikoku ya mu tshikumbi tshiebe, netukuimbile misambu kashidi, tukutumbishe mu nkama ne nkama ya bidimu." 
Psalms80:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe, wa kuimba ne lunzenze." 
Psalms80:2 Eyi, mulami wa mikoku wa bena Izrayele, teleja! Wewe udi ulombola bantu bebe bu mudi muena mikoku, wewe udi ne nkuasa wa bumfumu pa mutu pa bakerubine." 
Psalms80:3 Uleje bukole buebe, ku mesu a bisamba ebi: tshia Efrayime, tshia Binyamine, ne tshia Menashe utuakidile, utupandishe." 
Psalms80:4 Mvidi Mukulu, utulongeshe, utupingaje kuudi, nanku netupande." 
Psalms80:5 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, tshiji tshiebe netshijike diba kaayi? Bilondeshile mudi bantu bebe bakutendelela?" 
Psalms80:6 Udi mukutshishe bantu bebe ne kanyinganyinga, kukuatshikabu binsonji makopu tente." 
Psalms80:7 Udi mutukebeshe matandu kudi bena mutumba, baluishi betu badi batulembakaja." 
Psalms80:8 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, utupingaje kuudi, utuakidile netupande." 
Psalms80:9 Wewe kutula mutshi wa mvinyo mu Ejipitu, wewe kuipata bisamba bia bantu bua kuukuna tshiakabidi." 
Psalms80:10 Wewe kulongoluela muaba wawu. Pashishe kuelawu miji, kutangalakawu mu ditunga," 
Psalms80:11 dileji diawu kubuikila mikuna, matamba awu kubandawu pa mitshi ya sedre." 
Psalms80:12 Kulepeshawu matamba awu too ne ku mayi manene, ntonga yawu kufika too ne ku musulu wa mayi a Perate." 
Psalms80:13 Udi mutule lupangu luawu bua tshinyi? Bonsu badi bapita mu njila badi baupopola, bapola tumuma tuawu," 
Psalms80:14 ngulube wa ditu udi uunyanga, nyama ya tshisuku idi iudia." 
Psalms80:15 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, pingana, mu diulu muudi amu, utangile panshi umone bidi bituenzekela, akuila mutshi wa mvinyo ewu." 
Psalms80:16 Ukube mutshi uuvua wewe nkayebe mukune, — ne muana ewu wa balume uudi mukoleshe. —" 
Psalms80:17 Bantu bavua bosha mutshi ewu mu kapia nebauvingutule, miaku yebe ibatape, bafue babutuke!" 
Psalms80:18 Tshianza tshiebe tshishale pa mutu pa mukalenga, udi usomba ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume, pa mutu pa muntu ewu uuvua mukoleshe." 
Psalms80:19 Nenku, katuena tumuka kuudi to, utulame ne muoyi, netukutendelele amu wewe." 
Psalms80:20 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, utupingaje kuudi, utuakidile netupande." 
Psalms81:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu, wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Musambu wa kuimba ne lunzenze lua Ngate." 
Psalms81:2 Nuelele Mvidi Mukulu mbila ya disanka, udi utulama, nukumine Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe bikashi." 
Psalms81:3 Imbayi musambu, nuimbe ne ngoma, ne lunkombe ludi ne muadi muakane ne lunzenze." 
Psalms81:4 Nuele mpungi padi ngondu ubala, padiye utokesha bikole, ne mu dituku dietu dia tshibilu." 
Psalms81:5 Bualu etshi ke mudimu wa bena Izrayele, dipangadika dia Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe," 
Psalms81:6 mukenji uvuaye muelele Yozefe, pavuaye uluisha bena Ejipitu. — Meme kumvua diyi, dindi tshiyi mumanye, dingambila ne:" 
Psalms81:7 Ndi mukumbushe bujitu buvua pa makaya ebe, bianza biebe mbilekela tshisaka tshia bujitu." 
Psalms81:8 Pauvua mu dikenga, wewe kumbikila, meme kukupandisha. Meme kukuitaba mu tshipepela tshikole. Meme kukuteta ku mayi a Meriba." 
Psalms81:9 Bantu banyi nunteleje, ndi nnudimuja! Bena Izrayele, bu nuenu banteleje!" 
Psalms81:10 Kanuena mua kuikala ne mvidie mukuabu munkatshi muenu! Kanutendeledi mvidie ya bena bisamba bikuabu. 
Psalms81:11 Bualu meme ke Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua munupatule mu Ejipitu. Bulula mukana bikole, nemmuwuje tente." 
Psalms81:12 Kadi bantu banyi, kabena bumvua diyi dianyi, bena Izrayele badi bambenga." 
Psalms81:13 Nenku, meme kubalekela mu tshitunu tshiabu, bua benze tshidibu basue." 
Psalms81:14 Bu bantu banyi, bena Izrayele banteleja, bu bobu balonda njila undi mubaleje," 
Psalms81:15 diakamue nentekeshe baluishi babu, nenkume bena lukuna babu." 
Psalms81:16 Pashishe baluishi ba Maweja-Nangila, nebalekele ditambisha diabu, bena Izrayele nebasombe talalaa too ne tshiendelele." 
Psalms81:17 Maweja-Nangila neabadishe ne ntete mimpe ya kuenza bukula, neabukutshishe ne buitshi bua muitu." 
Psalms82:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. Mvidi Mukulu udipu, muela munkatshi kudi tshipangu tshiende, munkatshi mua mvidie udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi wamba ne:" 
Psalms82:2 “Nenulumbuluishe bantu ne kansungansunga, bua kubingisha badi bapila too ne ku diba kaayi?" 
Psalms82:3 Nulumbuluile badi kabayi mubakuidi ne bana ba nshiya, nulumbuluile bapela ne bena dikenga." 
Psalms82:4 Nusungidile badi kabayi ne mubakuidi ne bena diakabi, nubapandishe mu bianza bia bantu babi." 
Psalms82:5 “Kadi kanuena numvua, kanuena bamanye tshintu nansha tshimue, nudi mu miidima, nuenda nububuta, ke padi bantu bakeba kubutuka." 
Psalms82:6 Ndi ngamba ne: nuenu bonsu nudi mvidie, nudi bena diku dia Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu." 
Psalms82:7 Kadi bu munudi bantu, nenufue, nebanupuekeshe panshi bu mudibu bapuekesha mulombodi wa mu bukalenga.”" 
Psalms82:8 Mvidi Mukulu, juka, undumbuluile kudi bakoshi ba nsambu ba pa buloba, bualu udi mfumu wa bisamba bionsu." 
Psalms83:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Asafe. 
Psalms83:2 Mvidi Mukulu, kuikishi, kupuwi to, kusombi tshianana kuyi ne tshiudi wenza." 
Psalms83:3 Mona baluishi bebe badi benza disalu, badi bakukina badi bakulundukila, bela mitu mulu." 
Psalms83:4 Badi belela bantu bebe tshitungu, badi belela bantu bebe baudi ulama tshipangu." 
Psalms83:5 Badi bambilangana ne: “Tuyayi, tubabutule, bua kabikadi ne tshisamba tshia bantu, bua kabatedi kabidi dina dia bena Izrayele tshiendelele!”" 
Psalms83:6 Badi bakonkangana meji, bumvuangana bonsu, bua kutua ndondu wa kukuenzela bibi." 
Psalms83:7 Bantu abu, mbena Edome ne bena Ishemayele, bena Mowabe, ne Agare ne bena Ngebale," 
Psalms83:8 bena Amone ne bena Amaleke, bena Peleshete ne kabidi bena ditunga dia Tire." 
Psalms83:9 Too ne bena Ashure mbadisangishe nabu, bua kuambuluisha ndelanganyi ya Lote." 
Psalms83:10 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, enzela bantu aba bu muuvua muenzele Sisra ne Yabine, ku musulu wa muenji mukole wa Kishone. Nansha bu muuvua muenzele bena Madiyane," 
Psalms83:11 bavua babashipe ku mpokolu wa Arode. Kushalabu bufuke bua buloba. 
Psalms83:12 Wenzele bana ba bamfumu babu, bu Orebe ne Zebe, ne bamfumu babu bonsu bu Zeba ne Salmuna," 
Psalms83:13 bantu aba bavua bamba ne: “Tunyenge muaba wa Mvidi Mukulu, ushale wetu.”" 
Psalms83:14 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ubenze bashale bu ntete ya mitshi, mipepula kudi lupepela." 
Psalms83:15 Bu mudi kapia kuosha ditu, bu mudi ludimi lua kapia lutemesha kapia ka mikuna minene," 
Psalms83:16 ubipate ne mvula wa tshipupu, ubatshinyishe ne mvunde." 
Psalms83:17 Ubafuishe bundu mesu tente, bua batangile kuudi wewe Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms83:18 Bundu ne bowa bibakuate tshiendelele, ditekemena diabu dijimine, bafue menemene." 
Psalms83:19 Nenku bamanye ne: Wewe udi Maweja-Nangila, udi nkayebe pa buloba bujima, Mvidi Mukulu Muena Kulu." 
Psalms84:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa mu mikanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. Wa kuimba ne lunkombe lua Ngate. 
Psalms84:2 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi munange nzubu webe bikole!" 
Psalms84:3 Muoyi udi undubakana munda, pandi ngindila bua kubuela mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mubidi wanyi mujima udi wela mbila ya disanka, kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi." 
Psalms84:4 Nansha mushamusha mmupete muaba wa kuikishila, ne kandindi nkapete disua bua kuteka bana baku, pabuipi ne bilambuilu biebe wewe Maweja-Nangila, wa bukole bonsu, mukalenga wanyi ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Psalms84:5 Diakalenga ndia badi basomba mu nzubu muebe, bakutumbisha amu kukutumbisha diba dionsu." 
Psalms84:6 Ba diakalenga mbantu badi bapeta tshisokomenu kuudi, badi ne disanka dia luendu mu muoyi wabu." 
Psalms84:7 Padibu bapitshila mu tshibandabanda tshiume, Mvidi Mukulu udi utshikudimuna, utshienza muaba mutalale wa mayi, nansha mvula mbedi udi utshibuikila ne majiba." 
Psalms84:8 Badi bapeta bukole padibu baya, bua umueneka kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu mu Siyone." 
Psalms84:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, umvua kutendelela kuanyi, Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe, unteleje." 
Psalms84:10 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, mukalenga wetu ne ngabu wetu, akidila muntu webe uudi mujidile." 
Psalms84:11 Bualu kusomba dituku dimue mu lubanza lua nzubu webe wa kutendelela, nkupite kusomba matuku tshinunu munga muaba. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kuimana kumbelu kua nzubu webe, nkupite kusomba mu ntenta ya bantu babi." 
Psalms84:12 Bualu Maweja-Nangila, udi Diba ne Ngabu. Tudi tumanyisha Mvidi Mukulu bua luse ne butumbi; Maweja-Nangila udi upesha bantu bakane masanka." 
Psalms84:13 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, muntu udi unyemena kuudi udi ne disanka!" 
Psalms85:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. 
Psalms85:2 Maweja-Nangila udi mutokele ditunga diebe munda, udi mukudimune nsombelu ya ndelanganyi ya Yakobe." 
Psalms85:3 Udi mukupule tshilema tshia bantu bebe, mubabuikidile malu mabi abu." 
Psalms85:4 Udi mulekele tshiji tshiebe, kuena musue kubafikila munda." 
Psalms85:5 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu musungidi wetu, mulengeje tshiakabidi, lekela kutufikila munda." 
Psalms85:6 Neutukuatshile tshiji matuku onsu anyi? Neufikile ndelanganyi yonsu munda anyi? 
Psalms85:7 Utupeshe muoyi tshiakabidi, bua tuetu bantu bebe tusanke bualu buebe." 
Psalms85:8 Maweja-Nangila, utuleje buimpe buebe, utuambuluishe." 
Psalms85:9 Ndi musue kuteleja tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba bua ditalala, dia bantu bende, badi bamulamate, ne badi batekemena kudiye." 
Psalms85:10 Bulelela, diambuluisha diende didi pa buipi ne badi bamutshina, butumbi buende nebushale mu ditunga dietu." 
Psalms85:11 Malu mimpe ne bulelela nebisangile, buakane ne ditalala nebiupukilangane." 
Psalms85:12 Bulelela nebufumine mu buloba, kadi buakane nebufumine mu diulu." 
Psalms85:13 Maweja-Nangila ke udi upesha bantu masanka, ne ditunga dietu nedipatule bintu biadi." 
Psalms85:14 Buakane budi buenda kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, nebumuleje njila wa kuenda." 
Psalms86:1 Ditendelela dia mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, teya ditshi diebe kundi, ungitabe, bualu ndi mupele ne muena dikenga." 
Psalms86:2 Ndi umue wa ku bantu bebe badi bakulamate, undame. Ndi muena mudimu webe, ndi ntekemena kuudi, unsungidile wewe Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Psalms86:3 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkubikila matuku anyi onsu, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms86:4 Maweja-Nangila ndi ntangila kuudi wewe, ndi nkusengelela, unsankishe." 
Psalms86:5 Maweja-Nangila wewe udi muakane, udi ne muoyi wa kufuila bantu luse, ne wa kupesha badi bakubikila bintu." 
Psalms86:6 Maweja-Nangila, teleja mundi nkutendelela, umvue pandi nkutendakena." 
Psalms86:7 Pandi mu dikenga, ndi nkubikila bualu neungitabe." 
Psalms86:8 Maweja-Nangila, kakuena mvidie umue udi bu wewe, kakuena mvidie udi mua kuenza biudi wewe wenza." 
Psalms86:9 Wakafuka bisamba bionsu, nebifike bua kukukukuila, ne kukutumbisha wewe Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms86:10 Bualu udi munene, udi wenza malu a dikema, udi amu wewe nkayebe, Mvidi Mukulu mulelela." 
Psalms86:11 Maweja-Nangila, undeje njila undi mua kulonda, ndi musue kuenda mukulamate, nsumpakana amu bua bualu bumue: kukutumikila wewe." 
Psalms86:12 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nenkutumbishe ne muoyi wanyi onsu, nenkunemeke matuku onsu." 
Psalms86:13 Buimpe buebe buudi mundeje budi bunene, udi mumpatule mu dijimba dia lufu." 
Psalms86:14 Eyi, Mvidi Mukulu, bena kapeja badi bajuka bua kunduisha, tshisumbu tshia bantu bapange malu tshidi tshikeba kunshipa. Kabena bakuangata ne mushinga to." 
Psalms86:15 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu udi ufuila bantu luse, wa lutulu, muwule tente ne buimpe, ulama malaya ebe," 
Psalms86:16 tangila kundi, ungambuluishe. Ndi muena mudimu webe, umpeshe bukole buebe, ndi muntu webe, unsungidile." 
Psalms86:17 Umpeshe tshimanyinu tshidi tshindeja ne: malu onsu neende bimpe. Bundu bukuate badi bankina, pamonabu ne wewe, Maweja-Nangila udi munsungidile ne munsambe!" 
Psalms87:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu wa bena Kora. Maweja-Nangila udi muibake Yerushalayime, pa mikuna ya tshijila." 
Psalms87:2 Udi munange tshimenga tshia Siyone, bipite dinanga dia minga miaba ya mu ditunga dia Yakobe." 
Psalms87:3 Wewe tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu udi ukutumbisha wamba ne:" 
Psalms87:4 “Ku bonsu badi bammanye: ndi ntela bena Ejipitu, bena Babilone, bena Peleshete, bena Tire ne bena Kushe, badi babalelele mu matunga aa." 
Psalms87:5 Kadi Siyone, badi bamuamba ne: ke tshimenga tshilelela tshia bantu bonsu. Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu ke udi mutshiase.”" 
Psalms87:6 Maweja-Nangila udi mufunde mena a bantu mu mukanda wa mena, udi mumanyishe muntu yonsu wa kudibu ne: “Siyone ke tshimenga tshiende tshilelela.”" 
Psalms87:7 Wewe Tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu, bimbi ba misambu ne baji ba maja bonsu tshiapamue, batumbishe lumu luebe." 
Psalms88:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya bena Kora. Wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba mu dibungama. Kasala ka musambu kela kudi Emane, muena muabu." 
Psalms88:2 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu, musungidi wanyi, mu munya ndi ndomba diambuluisha diebe, butuku ke meme kuimana kumpala kuebe." 
Psalms88:3 Anyisha, uteleje mundi nkutendelela, teleja muadi wanyi." 
Psalms88:4 Bulelela ndi ne makenga a bungi, ndi pabuipi ne lufu." 
Psalms88:5 Bantu bonsu badi bammona bu muntu mufue, bu muntu udi kayi ne bukole." 
Psalms88:6 Ndi musombe munkatshi mua bafue, bu mudi bitalu biladika mu lukita. Kuena ubavuluka kabidi, kuena ubenzela bualu nansha bumue." 
Psalms88:7 Uvua mungele mu kandondu ka bafue, mu miidima mikole ya lufu." 
Psalms88:8 Udi muntekele tshiji tshikole, udi unkengesha ne mavuala." 
Psalms88:9 Udi mungipatshile banyi balunda, ndi muenze tshintu tshibipe kudibu. Ndi muinjidile mu nzubu kudi makenga, tshiena mua kumupatuka." 
Psalms88:10 Mesu anyi mmafue bua dibungama. Maweja-Nangila, dituku dionsu, ndi nkubikila, bua ungambuluishe, ndi nkuolela bianza." 
Psalms88:11 Udi mua kuenzela bafue bualu bua kukema anyi? Bafue badi mua kujuka ku bafue bua kukutumbisha anyi? 
Psalms88:12 Badi mua kuamba malu ebe ku bafue, nansha bulelela buebe ku musoku wa bafue anyi?" 
Psalms88:13 Badi mua kumanya malu ebe a kukema mu miidima mikole anyi? Mu ditunga didi bantu bikale ne tshipua muoyi, badi mua kumanya buakane buebe anyi?" 
Psalms88:14 Maweja-Nangila meme ndi nkubikila bua ungambuluishe, ndi nkutendelela kubangila ku dinda." 
Psalms88:15 Maweja-Nangila, udi umbenga bua tshinyi? Bua tshinyi kuena musue kummona?" 
Psalms88:16 Ndi ne dikenga kubangila ku buana buanyi, ndi pabuipi ne lufu. Udi munkuatshishe bowa, ndi ne dipampakana." 
Psalms88:17 Tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshinkengesha bu kapia, mvita yebe idi imbutula." 
Psalms88:18 Matuku onsu idi injingila nseke yonsu, bu mudi mayi apasalala mu musulu." 
Psalms88:19 Udi mungipatshile banyi balunda bonsu. Amu miidima ke idi pabuipi nanyi. 
Psalms89:1 Kasala ka kudi Etane, muena muabu." 
Psalms89:2 Maweja-Nangila, nengimbe bulenga buebe matuku onsu, nemmanyishe bantu bulelela buebe mu bikondu bionsu." 
Psalms89:3 Ndi ngamba ne: Malu ebe mempe mmashindame kashidi, bulelela buebe mbujalame mu diulu." 
Psalms89:4 Wewe uvua muambe ne: “Mvua mutue ndondu, ne muntu umvua musungule, ne Davide muena mudimu wanyi, mvua mumulaye ne:" 
Psalms89:5 Nenjadike umue wa ku ndelanganyi yebe mu bukalenga tshiendelele. Nenteke bantu ba ku ndelanganyi yebe mu bumfumu buebe, mu bikondu bionsu. ”" 
Psalms89:6 Maweja-Nangila, batumibue, ba mu diulu batumbishe malu ebe a kukema, badibu nabu mu diulu batumbishe bulelela buebe!" 
Psalms89:7 Maweja-Nangila, kuena ne wa kukuidikija nende mu diulu amu, nansha ku bamvidie bonsu, kakuena mvidie udi bu wewe." 
Psalms89:8 Mvidi Mukulu, badi bakutshina mu tshipangu, tshia batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, badi bapita kukutshina kudi badi bannyungulukila." 
Psalms89:9 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi bu wewe nnganyi? Maweja-Nangila, bukole ne bulelela bidi bikunyungulukile." 
Psalms89:10 Wewe ke udi utekesha bukole bua mayi manene, ne ubatamija mavuala padiwu mafike munda." 
Psalms89:11 Wewe ke uvua musompole Rakabe nyama munene wa tshidika, uvua mumusunsule. Uvua mumuangalaje baluishi bebe, ku bukole bua tshianza tshiebe." 
Psalms89:12 Diulu ndiebe, buloba mbuebe kabidi, wewe ke udi muase buloba bujima, ne bionsu bidipu." 
Psalms89:13 Wewe ke udi mufuke ku mutu kua ditunga, ne kuinshi kuadi, mukuna wa Tabore ne wa Ermone, idi isamuna dina diebe." 
Psalms89:14 Wewe ke udi ne diboku didi ne bukole, dinkomu diebe didi ne bukole, tshianza tshia balume tshidi tshiolola." 
Psalms89:15 Buakane ne nsambu milelela, ke bidi bukalenga buebe bushindamena. Malu mimpe ne bulelela bidi bienda kumpala kuebe." 
Psalms89:16 Maweja-Nangila, badi bakukumina bikashi badi ne disanka! Badi benda ne disanka ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms89:17 Badi badianyisha bualu udi Mvidi Mukulu wabu, badi baditumbisha matuku onsu, bua muoyi webe umue." 
Psalms89:18 Wewe ke udi bukole buabu butambe bunene, udi ujula mpala yetu mulu ku diambuluisha diebe." 
Psalms89:19 Ngabu wetu, ngua Maweja-Nangila mukalenga wetu, ngua Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele." 
Psalms89:20 Dituku dikuabu uvua muleje bualu, wewe kuakula, wambila bantu bebe badi bakulamata ne: “Ndi muambuluishe muntu wa bukitu, ndi musungule nsongalume wa bantu bonsu." 
Psalms89:21 Ndi mupete Davide bua ikale muena mudimu wanyi, ndi mumujidile ne mafuta anyi a tshijila." 
Psalms89:22 Nemmukankamike ne tshianza tshianyi tshia bukole, bukole buanyi nebumukoleshe." 
Psalms89:23 Muluishi kena mua kumujikila nansha, ntomboji kena mua kumufuisha bundu." 
Psalms89:24 Nensunsule baluishi bende, yeye mutangile, nentape badi bakeba kumushipa." 
Psalms89:25 Malu anyi mimpe ne bulelela buanyi nebikale kudiye, meme ke wadiundisha bumfumu buende." 
Psalms89:26 Nemmuteke mfumu wa mayi manene, neatumine misulu ya mayi diyi." 
Psalms89:27 Neambikile ne: ‘Wewe udi Tatu wanyi, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, dibue dia lupandu luanyi.’" 
Psalms89:28 Nemmuteke muananyi muanabute, mupite bakalenga ba pa buloba ku bunene." 
Psalms89:29 Nemmuleje malu anyi mempe matuku onsu, ndi ntua nende ndondu, mmulaye ne:" 
Psalms89:30 Nenjadike ndelanganyi yende matuku onsu, bonsu bapingana mu bukalenga buende, nebashale kashidi bu mudi diulu dikale." 
Psalms89:31 “Pikala ndelanganyi yebe mibenga mikenji yanyi, kayiyi ilonda bindi nyambila," 
Psalms89:32 pikalabu banyanga mikandu yanyi, kabayi balama meyi anyi," 
Psalms89:33 diba adi nengangate mukombu, bua kunyoka bupidia buabu, nembakume mitshi bua kunyoka tshilema tshiabu." 
Psalms89:34 Kadi tshiena ndekela kubaleja luse luanyi, tshiena mpanga kulama diyi dianyi dimue." 
Psalms89:35 Tshiena ngupula ndondu wanyi nansha, tshiena nkudimuna meyi amvua mupatule mukana muanyi." 
Psalms89:36 Mvua muditshipe ne: nansha bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu, tshiena mua kushima Davide nansha kakese." 
Psalms89:37 Ndelanganyi yende neyitungunuke, nenyitabalele, bonsu bapingana mu bukalenga buende nebashindame," 
Psalms89:38 bu mudi ngondu mushindame kashidi, bu mujadiki mulelela mu diulu.”" 
Psalms89:39 Kadi wewe udi mubenge mukalenga uuvua mujidile, udi mumulekele, udi mumufikile munda." 
Psalms89:40 Udi mupule ndondu uuvua mutue ne muena mudimu webe, udi munyange tshifulu tshiende tshia bumfumu, mutshiela panshi." 
Psalms89:41 Udi mupule bimana biende bionsu bia kudilama nabi, udi mubutule bimana biende, bia kukolesha nabi musoku." 
Psalms89:42 Bantu bonsu badi bapita mu njila, badi bamunyenga bintu, udi mpindiewu tshintu tshidi bena mutumba baseka." 
Psalms89:43 Wewe kukankamika baluishi bende, kusankisha bena lukuna bende." 
Psalms89:44 Udi mutshipaje muele wende wa mvita, kuvua mumuambuluishe mu mvita to." 
Psalms89:45 Wewe kumunyenga bukole buende, kutonkola nkuasa wende wa bukalenga panshi." 
Psalms89:46 Udi mukepeshe matuku a bunsongalume buende, mumufuishe bundu mesu tente." 
Psalms89:47 Maweja-Nangila, neusokome kashidi anyi? tshiji tshiebe netshioshe bu kapia too ne diba kaayi?" 
Psalms89:48 Umvuluke, matuku anyi a panu adi makese! Badi mua kuamba ne: udi mufuke bantu bua patupu!" 
Psalms89:49 Mmuntu kaayi udi mua kushala ne muoyi kayi ufua? Nganyi udi mua kudisungidila ku lufu? 
Psalms89:50 Maweja-Nangila, malu ebe mempe a kale awu, ne malaya ebe malelela auvua mulaye Davide, mbiye penyi?" 
Psalms89:51 Maweja-Nangila, uvuluke bipendu, bidi bantu ba bungi bampenda, meme muena mudimu webe. Uvuluke mundi ngangata mu mubidi wanyi bipendu biabu." 
Psalms89:52 Maweja-Nangila, baluishi bebe badi bapenda, badi bapenda mukalenga uudi mujidile, bulelela badi bamupenda padiye upita." 
Psalms89:53 Maweja Nangila, tudi tukuela tuasakidila kashidi! Amene, eyo, bikale nanku!" 
Psalms90:1 Moshe, muntu uvua Mvidi Mukulu mutume, udi utendelela Mvidi Mukulu. Maweja-Nangila, mu bikondu bionsu, wewe ke uvua tshisokomenu tshietu." 
Psalms90:2 Diambedi mikuna kayiyi mianji kuikalaku, diambedi buloba mene kabuyi buanji kufuka, ku kale kuonsu aku, wewe ke udi Mvidi Mukulu, newikale Mvidi Mukulu matuku onsu." 
Psalms90:3 Udi upingaja bantu mu lupuishi, ubambila ne: “Pinganayi kunudi bafuma.”" 
Psalms90:4 Bidimu tshinunu bidi bipi ku mesu kuebe, bu dituku dia makelela didi dimane kupita, anyi bu meba makese a butuku." 
Psalms90:5 Udi ushipa muoyi wa muntu, upita bu tshilota tshia mu dinda, bu tshisosa tshidi tshitoloka," 
Psalms90:6 mu dinda tshiela nzeba, tshidiunda, dilolu tshifuba, tshiume." 
Psalms90:7 Bulelela, tshiji tshiebe tshidi tshitushipa, njiya yebe idi itukuatshisha bowa." 
Psalms90:8 Wewe udi muleje malu etu mabi patoke, butoke buebe budi bukenkesha malu etu masokome." 
Psalms90:9 Matuku etu a panu adi ajika, bualu adi ashikila amu patshidi muntu ukuula muoyi." 
Psalms90:10 Bantu ba dikanda badi mua kulala panu bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, anyi makumi muanda mukulu, kadi mu bungi bua bidimu abi, tudi ne ntatu ne makenga. Tudi tuya lukasa batangila ku lufu." 
Psalms90:11 Udi mumanye bukole bua tshiji tshiebe nnganyi? Nganyi watshina kapia ka dibinduluka diabe? 
Psalms90:12 Utunwuije ne matuku etu adi mabala. Nanku netupete meji. 
Psalms90:13 Maweja-Nangila neutulondakaje musangu bule munyi? Tangila kutudi, utufuile luse, tuetu bena mudimu bebe." 
Psalms90:14 Utuwuje ne malu ebe mimpe, patshidi butuku butshia, nenku netuele mbila ya disanka matuku onsu." 
Psalms90:15 Udi mutukengeshe musangu mule. Kadi mpindiewu, utupeshe masanka, mu bungi bua bidimu bituvua bakenge." 
Psalms90:16 Tumone mudimu webe, ndelanganyi yetu imone bunene buebe!" 
Psalms90:17 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, utuleje muudi umvuangana netu, ufile bipeta bimpe ku midimu yetu." 
Psalms91:1 Muntu udi usokomena kudi Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu, ubutamine kudi Wa kukole buonsu." 
Psalms91:2 Muntu awu neambile Mvidi Mukulu ne: “Wewe udi musoku mukolesha undi nsokomena, wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, undi ngeyemena.”" 
Psalms91:3 — Maweja-Nangila ke udi ukusungidila, ku mateyi adibu bakuteya, ne ku tshipupu tshia lufu." 
Psalms91:4 Neakulame, neusangane tshisokomenu kudiye, bu muana wa nzolu, usokoma mu mapuapua a mamuende. Bulelela buende budi bu ngabu udi ukulama." 
Psalms91:5 Kuena mua kutshina tshintu nansha tshimue, nansha njiwu idi ikuatshisha bantu bowa butuku, nansha muketa udibu bela mu munya," 
Psalms91:6 nansha tshipupu tshidi tshiendakana mu midima, nansha disama dia tshiambu didi dikuata bantu munda munya." 
Psalms91:7 Bulelela nansha bipupu ebi bishipa bantu tshinunu pa buipi nebe, nansha bishipa binunu dikumi ku dia balume diebe, bualu nansha bumue kabuena bukuenzekela." 
Psalms91:8 Tabala tshianana, neumone mudi Mvidi Mukulu ufuta bantu babi!" 
Psalms91:9 Bulelela, Maweja-Nangila, udi tshisokomenu tshiebe, wewe udi musungule Muena kulu bu tshisokomenu tshiebe." 
Psalms91:10 Bualu bubi nansha bumue kabuena bukukuata, dikenga nansha dimue kadiena disemena pabuipi nebe." 
Psalms91:11 Bualu Maweja-Nangila neatumine batumibue bende diyi, bua bakulame kuonsu kuudi uya." 
Psalms91:12 Nebakuambule mu bianza biabu, bua kukumi dikasa diebe ku dibue." 
Psalms91:13 Neudiate nyama wa ntambue, ne nyoka wa ntoka kabiyi bikuenzela bualu, neutue nyama wa muitu ne nyoka miseba." 
Psalms91:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bu mudiye mundamate, nemmusokoke, nemmulame, bualu mmumanye tshindi." 
Psalms91:15 Pambikilaye bua kumuambuluisha, nemmuambuluishe, mu dikenga nengikale pabuipi nende, nemmusungidile, nemmutumbishe." 
Psalms91:16 Nemmupeshe disanka, neashale ne muoyi bidimu bia bungi, nemmuleje ne: ndi musungidi wende.”" 
Psalms92:1 Musambu wa dituku dia Dikisha. 
Psalms92:2 Maweja-Nangila bidi bimpe kukutumbisha, kukuimbila misambu wewe Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu," 
Psalms92:3 kumanyisha bantu malu ebe mimpe mu dinda, ne kubamanyisha bulelela buebe butuku," 
Psalms92:4 kubamanyisha ne lunzenze ne lunkombe ne biombelu bionsu! 
Psalms92:5 Maweja-Nangila, malu audi muenze, adi manguwule munda tente ne disanka, ndi nganyisha biudi muenze." 
Psalms92:6 Maweja-Nangila malu audi muenze adi manene, meji ebe adi male." 
Psalms92:7 Muntu udi kayi ne meji, kena mumanye, mutshimbakane kena ujingulula tshintu." 
Psalms92:8 Bantu babi badi batumpuka bu bisosa, bantu badi benza bibi bonsu badi batanta, kadi kabutu ka kashidi nkabindile." 
Psalms92:9 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, udi ukokesha matuku onsu." 
Psalms92:10 Bua baluishi bebe, Maweja-Nangila, bobu nebajimine, ne bonsu badi bakengesha bakuabu, nebatangalake." 
Psalms92:11 Udi mumpeshe bukole bu bua nyama wa mbowa, udi mungele mafuta mapiamapia pa mutu." 
Psalms92:12 Ndi mumone mudibu batshimuna bena lukuna banyi, ndi mumvue muadi wa badi banduisha." 
Psalms92:13 Kadi muntu muakane udi ukola, bu dibue dia ngaji, udi ulepa bu mutshi wa sedre wa mu Lebanone." 
Psalms92:14 Udi bu mutshi mukuna mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, udi udiunda mu nzubu mua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Psalms92:15 Neukuame bimuma too ne pakulakajawu, newikale ne mayi, neushale mubishi," 
Psalms92:16 bua kujadikila bantu ne: Maweja-Nangila udi muakane. Udi ne muoyi umue, yeye ke Dibue dianyi." 
Psalms93:1 Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga, udi mudijingile butumbi bu mudibu badijingila tshilamba, udi muvuale bukole, bu mudibu bavuala mukaba. Buloba budi bushindame, kabuena mua kunyunga." 
Psalms93:2 Maweja-Nangila, nkuasa webe wa bumfumu mmujadika katshia ku kale, wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu matuku onsu." 
Psalms93:3 Kale mayi manene malabale avua ela mikunda, avua ela mikunda ya tshiji. Adi mua kuela mikunda kashidi!" 
Psalms93:4 Maweja-Nangila, mulu muudi, udi mupite tshiona tshia mavuala, ne tshia mambuanki a mayi ku bukole." 
Psalms93:5 Maweja-Nangila, mikenji yebe idi ya bushuwa, nzubu webe ikale nzubu wa tshijila tshiendelele." 
Psalms94:1 Eyi, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu, udi usombuela bantu. Mvidi Mukulu udi usombuela bantu, patuka." 
Psalms94:2 Mulumbuluishi wa bantu, juka umonangane ne bena kapeja, ubapingajile bubi buvuabu benze." 
Psalms94:3 Maweja-Nangila, bantu babi nebikale ne disanka too ne diba kaayi?" 
Psalms94:4 Bantu bonsu badi benzela bakuabu bibi, badi bakula bibi ne kapeja, baditambisha." 
Psalms94:5 Maweja-Nangila, badi bakengesha bantu bebe, banyanga bumpianyi buebe." 
Psalms94:6 Badi bashipa mukaji mukamba ne muenyi, bashipa bana ba nshiya." 
Psalms94:7 Badi bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena umona, Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe kena umanya. ”" 
Psalms94:8 Nuenu batshimbakane ba pa buloba, nuadimuka! Nuenu babule ngenyi, nenuele meji diba kaayi?" 
Psalms94:9 Maweja-Nangila ngudi muase muntu ditshi, apange yeye kumvua? Yeye ngudi mufuke disu, apange yeye kumona?" 
Psalms94:10 Yeye ngudi ubela bisamba bia bantu, apange bukole bua kubinyoka. Yeye ngudi ulongesha bantu, apange kuikala ne lungenyi?" 
Psalms94:11 Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye meji adi muntu wela, mmuamanye bimpe, adi bu lupepele." 
Psalms94:12 Maweja-Nangila, muntu uudi ubela, ne uudi ulongesha ne mikenji yebe, udi ne disanka!" 
Psalms94:13 Neikale ne ditalala dituku dia dikenga, kadi umbuile bantu babi dijimba." 
Psalms94:14 Maweja-Nangila kena ubenga bantu bende, kena ulekela bumpianyi buende." 
Psalms94:15 Muntu muakane neabinge tshiakabidi, ne bantu bonsu ba muoyi mujalame, nebamulonde." 
Psalms94:16 Udi mua kunsungidila kudi bantu babi nnganyi? Udi mua kungakuila kudi benji ba malu mabi nnganyi? 
Psalms94:17 Bu Maweja-Nangila kayi mungambuluishe, mvua kuikala mufue." 
Psalms94:18 Maweja-Nangila, misangu imvua ngamba ne: “Tshiena mua kuimana kulu”, malu ebe mimpe avua angimanyika." 
Psalms94:19 Pamvua nsumpakana bua ntatu, wewe kunsamba, kunsankisha kabidi." 
Psalms94:20 Udi mumvuangane ne bakoshi babi ba nsambu aba, badi bangata mikenji bua kukengesha bantu anyi?" 
Psalms94:21 Badi belela bantu bakane tshifufu, bapisha muntu udi kayi ne bualu." 
Psalms94:22 Kadi Maweja-Nangila ke wanyi nzubu mukolesha ne bimana, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi ke dibue dimvua nsokomena." 
Psalms94:23 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, neabapingajile malu mabi abu, neabajimije bua malu abu mabi." 
Psalms95:1 Luayi tuelele Maweja-Nangila mbila ya disanka, tuele Dibue dietu, ne Musungidi wetu tunkunduluila." 
Psalms95:2 Tuye kumpala kuende, tuimbe misambu ya kumusankidila, tumusankidile ne misambu." 
Psalms95:3 Bualu Maweja-Nangila, udi Mvidi Mukulu munene. mMukalenga munene udi upita mvidie yonsu." 
Psalms95:4 Udi mulongolole tundondu tua mu buloba, ne mikuna minene mile idi yende." 
Psalms95:5 Mayi manene kabidi ngende, bualu yeye nguvua muafuke, ne buloba yeye nguakabufuka." 
Psalms95:6 Buelayi, tuiname, tuinyike mitu, tutue binu, kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, Mutufuki wetu." 
Psalms95:7 Bualu yeye ke udi Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tudi bantu badiye ulama, tudi tshisumbu tshia mikoku tshidi tshianza tshiende tshilombola. Lelu, nudi mua kumvua tshidiye wamba anyi?" 
Psalms95:8 “Kanubengi mua kumvua, bu muakenza bankambua benu ku Meriba, diba dia bualu buvua buenzeka ku Masa mu tshipela." 
Psalms95:9 Bavua bamfunyine, bavua bantete, nansha muvuabu bamone bimvua muenze." 
Psalms95:10 Bantu ba mu tshikondu atshi kuntonda, bidimu makumi anayi, meme kuela meji ne: Bantu aba mbatomboke, kabena bamanye tshimvua ntekemena kudibu." 
Psalms95:11 Nenku ke meme kuditshipa ne tshiji ne: kabena babuela mu buloba, bumvua mubalongoluele bua kuikishabu nansha. ”" 
Psalms96:1 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila, musambu mupiamupia, nuenu bantu ba pa buloba bujima, imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu." 
Psalms96:2 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu, numusakidile bualu udi Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Numanyishe bantu ku dituku ne ku dituku ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi Musungidi." 
Psalms96:3 Nuambile bantu bonsu butumbi buende, numanyishe bukua bisamba malu a kukema adiye muenze." 
Psalms96:4 Maweja-Nangila udi munene, bidi bimpe bamutumbishe. Bamutshine kumpala kua mvidie yonsu." 
Psalms96:5 Mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu bionsu idi patupu, Maweja-Nangila ngudi mufuke diulu." 
Psalms96:6 Udi ukenkesha bunene ne buneme, nzubu wende udi ne bukole ne bukenke bua bungi." 
Psalms96:7 Nuenu bantu ba matunga onsu, luayi nunemekele Maweja-Nangila, numanyishe butumbi ne bukole buende." 
Psalms96:8 Luayi numanyishe butumbi buende, buelayi mu lubanza lua nzubu wende, numutuadile milambu." 
Psalms96:9 Nuenu bantu ba pa buloba bujima, kukuilayi Maweja-Nangila, bavuala bilamba bia tshijila, padiye uleja bunema buende bua tshijila, nuzakale kumpala kuende." 
Psalms96:10 Nuambile bantu bonsu ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga, buloba budi bushindame kabuena bunyunga, Maweja-Nangila udi ukosa nsambu ya bantu amu pa yoyi.”" 
Psalms96:11 Diulu disanka, buloba busanguluke, mayi manene ne bionsu bidimu bikungule." 
Psalms96:12 Mpata ne bionsu bidimu bisanke, mitshi yonsu ya muitu yela mbila ya disanka," 
Psalms96:13 kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi ufika, udi ufika bua kulumbuluisha bantu ba pa buloba. Udi mukoshi mulelela wa bilumbu bia bantu." 
Psalms97:1 Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga, buloba bujima busanke, bantu bonsu badi kule basanke!" 
Psalms97:2 Dituku ne miidima bidi bimunyungulukila. Buakane ne dikosa dia nsambu, ke bidi bishindika bukalenga buende." 
Psalms97:3 Kapia kadi kadianjila kumpala kuende, kadi kuosha baluishi bende, kabanyunguluka nseke yonsu." 
Psalms97:4 Miele ya mvula idi ikenkesha bantu, buloba budi buyimona, buzakala." 
Psalms97:5 Mikuna minene idi yenguluka bu manyi kumpala kua mukalenga wa buloba bujima. 
Psalms97:6 Diulu didi dimanyisha buakane buende, bantu bonsu badi bamona butumbi buende." 
Psalms97:7 Bundu bukuate bonsu badi batendelela mvidie, ne badi badianyisha bua mvidie ya tshianana. Mvidie yonsu idi itumbisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms97:8 Bena Siyone badi bumvua, basanka, bimenga bia mu Yuda bidi bisanka, bua meyi audi mushindike." 
Psalms97:9 Bualu wewe Maweja-Nangila, ke udi Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu pa buloba bujima, udi ku mutu kua mvidie." 
Psalms97:10 Nuenu badi banange Maweja-Nangila, nukine malu mabi. Maweja-Nangila udi ulama mioyi ya badi bamulamata, udi ubapandisha kudi bantu babi." 
Psalms97:11 Munya udi utema bua bantu bakane, bantu ba mioyi miakane, bobu badi ne disanka." 
Psalms97:12 Nuenu bantu bakane, nusanke bua Maweja-Nangila, numutumbishe, nuvuluke tshijila tshiende." 
Psalms98:1 Musambu Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu mupiamupia, bualu udi muenze malu a dikema, ne meji ende ne bukole bua bu Mvidi Mukulu buende." 
Psalms98:2 Maweja-Nangila mmuleje bantu ne: udi Musungidi, mmuleje buakane buende." 
Psalms98:3 Uvua muvuluke malu ende makane, ne bulelela buende kudi bena Izrayele. Bantu bonsu too ne ku ndekelu kua buloba, badi bamona Mvidi Mukulu wetu uvua mutusungidile." 
Psalms98:4 Nuenu bantu ba pa buloba bujima, elelayi Maweja-Nangila tunkunduluila, nuele mbila ya disanka, numuimbile misambu." 
Psalms98:5 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila ne lunkombe ne biombelu," 
Psalms98:6 mutumbishayi ne tshiona ne mpungi ya biamu ne ya nsengu, nuele tunkunduluila kumpala kua Mukalenga Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms98:7 Mayi manene akungule ne bionsu bidimu, buloba kabidi ne bidi bisombapu." 
Psalms98:8 Misulu ya mayi ikume bikashi, ne mikuna yonsu yele pamue mbila ya disanka," 
Psalms98:9 kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi ufika. Udi ufika bua kukosa nsambu ya badi pa buloba, neikale mukoshi wa nsambu muakane wa bantu, mulumbuluishi wa bukua bisamba, kayi kansungansunga." 
Psalms99:1 Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga, bantu badi bazakala. Nkuasa wende wa bukalenga udi pa mutu pa batumibue bende badi bashale mu diulu, buloba budi butenkakana." 
Psalms99:2 Maweja-Nangila udi munene mu Siyone, — Eyowa, udi ku mutu kua bantu bonsu." 
Psalms99:3 Bakutumbishe wewe Mvidi Mukulu munene, udi ukuatshisha bantu bonsu bowa! — Eyowa, udi wa tshijila!" 
Psalms99:4 Batumbishe bukole buebe, wewe mukalenga udi munange buakane. Wewe ke udi muelele bantu mikenji ya nsombelu muimpe, wewe ke udi mujadike buakane, ne bulongolodi mu Izrayele." 
Psalms99:5 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bua bunene buende, numukukuile ku bidiatshilu bia makasa ende. — Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila udi wa tshijila." 
Psalms99:6 Moshe ne Arone, ba munkatshi mua batuangaji bende, Samuwele wa munkatshi mua bavua babikila dina diende, bonsu aba kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila. Yeye uvua ubitaba." 
Psalms99:7 Mvidi Mukulu uvua ubambila meyi ende mu dikunji dia muinshi, bavua batumikila meyi ende ne mikenji ya nsombelu muakane bivuaye ubelela." 
Psalms99:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, uvua ubitaba, wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu uvua ubaleja lutulu, kadi uvua mubanyoke bua malu mabi abu." 
Psalms99:9 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, numukukuile pa mukuna wende wa tshijila, bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, Eyowa, udi wa tshijila." 
Psalms100:1 Musambu wa mulambu wa kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila. Nuenu bantu ba pa buloba bujima, elayi Maweja-Nangila tunkunduluila." 
Psalms100:2 Numutendelele ne disanka, nuye kumpala kuende ne mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms100:3 Numanye ne: Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye ke udi mutufuke, tudi bantu bende. Tudi bantu bende ne mikoku idiye ulama." 
Psalms100:4 Panudi nubuela mu nzubu wende wa pambelu, numuele tunkunduluila; mu nzubu wende wa munda, numutumbishe. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, numusakidile bualu udi Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Psalms100:5 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ne malu makane, dinanga diende kadiena ne ndekelu, bulelela buende budi bushala bikondu bionsu." 
Psalms101:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Nganji kuimbila malu mimpe ne buakane. Maweja-Nangila wewe ke undi musue kutumbisha. 
Psalms101:2 Ndi nnanukila bua kulonga, njila wa nsombelu muakane. Wewe neufike kundi difuku kaayi? Nengende ne muoyi muakane, munkatshi mua bantu badi bannyunguluka." 
Psalms101:3 Tshiena mua kuteka tshintu tshibi ku mesu kuanyi. Ndi mubenge nsombelu wa bantu babi, kena mua kundamata." 
Psalms101:4 Tshiena musue kumanya bualu bubi, bivi nembipatshile pa bule." 
Psalms101:5 Nempuwishe bantu badi bajana bakuabu mu musokoku. Tshiena mua kubuikidila bantu badi bapetula bakuabu, ne badi baditambisha." 
Psalms101:6 Mu ditunga nentangile muntu undi mua kutekemena, bua kusombaye nanyi muaba umue; ne muntu udi ne nsombelu muimpe, neangambuluishe mu mudimu." 
Psalms101:7 Muntu udi udinga kena usomba mu nzubu muanyi. Muntu udi ushima kena ujalama kumpala kuanyi. 
Psalms101:8 Dinda dionsu nempuwishe bantu babi bonsu ba mu ditunga, bua kumusha bantu babi bena malu mabi mu tshimenga tshia Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms102:1 Muena dikenga udi utendelela Mvidi Mukulu, umudidila muadi." 
Psalms102:2 Maweja-Nangila, teleja mundi nkutendelela, anyisha lubila luanyi." 
Psalms102:3 Kungedi nyima pandi mu dikenga. Unteleje ne ntema, dituku dindi nkubikila, ungitabe lukasa." 
Psalms102:4 Bualu matuku anyi a panu adi ajimina, bu mudi muinshi wa kapia, mifuba yanyi idi ipia bu nkunyi." 
Psalms102:5 Lungenyi luanyi ndufue, bu mudi tshisosa tshikosa, tshiena nansha mvuluka bua kudia." 
Psalms102:6 Badi bumvua mundi ntua mikemu, ndi mushale mifuba pa mifuba." 
Psalms102:7 Ndi mufuanangane ne kakuekue ka mu tshipela, ndi bu kakutukutu ka mu bibuwa bia nzubu." 
Psalms102:8 Ndi ndala tshitabela, ndi bu nyunyi wa tshiende nkaya pa musonga wa nzubu." 
Psalms102:9 Matuku onsu baluishi banyi badi bampenda, badi banseka, bantatshisha." 
Psalms102:10 Ndi ndia butu pa mutu pa kudia biakudia, bintu bionsu bindi nnua bidi bibondakana ne binsonji." 
Psalms102:11 Bualu udi ne tshiji, udi mufike munda, ke paudi mungambule, mungimanshe kule." 
Psalms102:12 Matuku anyi a panuapa adi bu mudi mundidimbi wa dilolu, ndi mfuba bu tshisosa." 
Psalms102:13 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi mukalenga wa kashidi, udi Mvidi Mukulu wa bikondu bionsu." 
Psalms102:14 Wewe neujuke, neufuile Siyone luse, bualu diba dia kumuambuluisha ndimane kukumbana. Eyowa, diba diuvua muambe ndimane kufika." 
Psalms102:15 Tuetu bantu bebe tudi banange mabue ende, tudi tumvua luse bua nzubu yende idi mishale bibuwa." 
Psalms102:16 Bisamba bionsu bia bantu benyi bitshine Maweja-Nangila, bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba bujima batshine butumbi buende." 
Psalms102:17 Padi Maweja-Nangila wibakulula Siyone, padiye umueneka mu butumbi buende," 
Psalms102:18 kena ulengulula bakengi badi bamutendelela, neateleje malomba abu." 
Psalms102:19 Bafundile ndelanganyi itshidi kumpala bualu ebu, bua bantu badi Maweja-Nangila mufukulule, bamutumbishe." 
Psalms102:20 Mu diulu mudiye, Maweja-Nangila mmuinangile, mutangile pa buloba. Ku nzubu wende wa tshijila udi utangila mesu ende panshi," 
Psalms102:21 bua kuteleja muadi wa bena lukanu, ne kusungidila badibu bakosela tshibawu tshia lufu." 
Psalms102:22 Nenku, nemmanyishe bena Siyone lumu lua Maweja-Nangila, nebamutumbishe mu Yerushalayime," 
Psalms102:23 padisangisha bantu popamue, padisangisha makalenga bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms102:24 Pantshivua mbanga luendu, kutekeshaye bukole buanyi, kukepeshaye matuku anyi a panu." 
Psalms102:25 Ke pandi ngela lubila ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe ngudi ne muoyi bidimu ne bidimu, kungangatshi pankatshinkatshi pa matuku anyi a panu.”" 
Psalms102:26 Wakafuka buloba kale, diulu didi mudimu wa bianza biebe." 
Psalms102:27 Bintu ebi bionsu nebijimine, kadi wewe udi ushala. Diulu ne buloba nebisheleleke bu mudi tshilamba tshisunsuke. Neubishintule bu mudibu bashintula bilamba." 
Psalms102:28 Kadi wewe kuena ushintuluka, matuku ebe a muoyi kaena ne nshikidilu wawu." 
Psalms102:29 Bana ba bantu bebe nebase, ndelanganyi yabu neyishindame wewe mumone." 
Psalms103:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Ndi musue kuela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, ndi musue kuela Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila ne muoyi wanyi onsu." 
Psalms103:2 Eyowa, ndi musue kuela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, tshiena ndekela kuvuluka bualu buende buimpe nansha bumue." 
Psalms103:3 Yeye ke udi umbuikidila malu mabi anyi onsu, ondapa masama anyi onsu," 
Psalms103:4 yeye ke udi unsungidila ku lufu, umbumbuila dinanga ne luse." 
Psalms103:5 Udi umpetesha diakalenga divule matuku onsu andi panu, udi umpingaja nsongalume, ndi ne bukole bu bua nyunyi wa tshiminyi udi ubuka." 
Psalms103:6 Maweja-Nangila udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, udi ulumbuluila bantu badibu bakengesha." 
Psalms103:7 Uvua muleje Moshe mapangadika ende, ne bena Izrayele malu ende a lumu." 
Psalms103:8 Maweja-Nangila udi luse ne dinanga, kena upia tshiji lukasa, udi ne luse lua bungi." 
Psalms103:9 Kena utanda misangu yonsu, kena ushala ne tshiji kashidi to." 
Psalms103:10 Kena utupesha dinyoka didi diakanangane ne mibi yetu to, kena utupesha difutu didi dikumbanangane ne malu mabi etu nansha." 
Psalms103:11 Bu mudi diulu dilunguluka pa mutu pa buloba, ke mudi malu ende mimpe, amueneka kudi bantu badi bamunemeka." 
Psalms103:12 Udi umbusha malu etu mabi, wasemeja kule netu, bu mudi luseke ludi diba dipatukila, lusemena kule ne luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Psalms103:13 Maweja-Nangila udi unanga bantu bende badi bamunemeka, bu mudi tatu unanga bana bende." 
Psalms103:14 Yeye udi mumanye tshitudi, udi uvuluka ne tudi bafuka ne lupuishi." 
Psalms103:15 Matuku a muntu a panuapa adi bu tshisosa tshia mu budimi, tshidi tshiela nzeba," 
Psalms103:16 kadi padi lupepela lua luya lutshipitshila, tshidi tshifua tshijima, katshiyi tshimanyika muaba uvuatshi." 
Psalms103:17 Kadi malu mimpe a Maweja-Nangila adi ashala bikondu bionsu kudi badi bamunemeka. Buakane buende budi bujama kudi bana ba bana babu," 
Psalms103:18 pikalabu banemeka ndondu, bavuluka mikenji yende bua kuyilonda." 
Psalms103:19 Maweja-Nangila mmujadike nkuasa wende wa bukalenga mu diulu, ukokesha bintu bionsu." 
Psalms103:20 Nuenu batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, nuenu badi benza tshidiye wamba ne bukole buonsu, ne badi bamutumikila, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms103:21 Nuenu tshikulu tshia bena mudimu bende, badi benza tshidiye musue, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms103:22 Nuenu bifukibue biende bionsu, bidi mu miaba yonsu ya bukalenga buende, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila. Ne meme kabidi ndi ngamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, tuasakidila.”" 
Psalms104:1 Ndi musue kuela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila! Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, udi mutambe bunene. Udi muvuale bukenke ne buneme," 
Psalms104:2 Udi muvuale butoke bu tshinkutu, udi muadije diulu bu ntenta." 
Psalms104:3 Udi muase nzubu webe wa mulu pa mayi, udi ubanda pa mavuba bu pa ditempu diebe, udi uya ne lupepele bu mapuapua." 
Psalms104:4 Udi utuma mpepele bu batumibue bebe, kapia ke webe muena mudimu." 
Psalms104:5 Udi mushindike buloba pa bitaku biabu, kabuena mua kutenkakana too ne kashidi." 
Psalms104:6 Uvua mububuikile ne mayi bu tshilamba, mayi kubanda ne ku nsongu ya mikuna." 
Psalms104:7 Kadi pauvua muatandishe, wowu kunyema kuyawu lubilu, ku tshiona tshia mukungulu webe." 
Psalms104:8 Kubandawu nsongu ya mikuna, kupueka mu bibandabanda, too ne ku muaba uuvua mualongoluele." 
Psalms104:9 Wewe kuelela mukalu bua kaasambuki, kaapinganyi bua kubuikila buloba." 
Psalms104:10 Udi utuma mayi a mpokolu mu misulu, apitshila muinshi mua mikuna." 
Psalms104:11 Nyama yonsu idi ilua kunua mayi, ne mpunde wa mu tshisuku udi ujikijilaku nyota yende." 
Psalms104:12 Nyunyi idi ne masua ayi pabuipi nawu, idi imba misambu mu dileji dia mabeji." 
Psalms104:13 Udi ulokesha mvula wa muebe mu diulu, udi utabalela buloba bua buikale ne mayi makumbane." 
Psalms104:14 Wewe ke udi umeneshila bimuna bisosa, umeneshila bantu biseki bidibu badima. Ke mudi buloba bubapetesha biakudia:" 
Psalms104:15 ne maluvu a mvinyo bua kubasankisha, ne mafuta bua kukenkesha mpala yabu, ne diampa bua kubapesha bukole." 
Psalms104:16 Maweja-Nangila, nansha mitshi idi mipite bunene, idi ne mayi adiyi ikengela, se mmitshi ya sedre ya mu Lebanone, iuvua mukune." 
Psalms104:17 Nyunyi idi ibakamu masua ayi, kasonga nyunyi kadi ne diaku disua mu mutshi wa siprese." 
Psalms104:18 Mikuna mile nya mbuji ya tshisuku, mabue ke tshisokomenu tshia nyama ya nsenji." 
Psalms104:19 Udi muenze ngondu bua kutapulula bidimu, diba didi dimanya tshikondu tshia kubuela." 
Psalms104:20 Udi utuma miidima, butuku buila, nyama ya muitu yendakana." 
Psalms104:21 Bana ba nyama ba ntambue badi bakeba nyama wa kukuata, badi balomba Mvidi Mukulu tshiakudia tshiayi." 
Psalms104:22 Padi diba dipatuka, badi bumbuka, baya kulala mu menayi." 
Psalms104:23 Nanku muntu udi upatuka, uya ku mudimu wende, uwenza ne ku dilolu." 
Psalms104:24 Maweja-Nangila, mudimu webe udi munene! Udi muenze bionsu ne dimanya dia kuenza bintu bia mpatshi! Buloba mbuwule ne bintu biudi mufuke." 
Psalms104:25 Mona mudi mayi manene malabale, maye muaba mule. Nyama minene ne mikese kayiyi kubadika, idi yendakanamu." 
Psalms104:26 Mazuwa adi endakanamu, mamba muntu wa mu mayi, Leviyatane, uvua mumufuke bua kunayamu nende." 
Psalms104:27 Bintu ebi bionsu bidi bitekemena kuudi, bua wewe kubipesha biakudia biabi, mu tshikondu tshiakane." 
Psalms104:28 Paudi ubipesha bidi biangata, paudi ubulula tshianza tshiebe, bidi bipeta bionsu bidibi bikengela." 
Psalms104:29 Paudi usokoka mpala webe, bidi bitshina, paudi ubinyenga mueyelu, bidi bifua, bipingana lupuishi kabidi." 
Psalms104:30 Udi ubipingajila mueyelu, ubifukulula, bionsu bidi bienza bipiabipia pa buloba." 
Psalms104:31 Maweja-Nangila, butumbi buebe bushale kashidi, usanke bua biudi muenze!" 
Psalms104:32 Paudi utangila buloba, budi buzakala, paudi utua mikuna munu, idi ifuima muinshi." 
Psalms104:33 Nenkuimbile misambu matuku onsu antshidi ne muoyi. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, nenkutumbishe pantshidiku." 
Psalms104:34 Maweja-Nangila, musambu wanyi ukulengelele, meme ndi ne disanka bua pandi nebe wewe Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Psalms104:35 Benji ba malu mabi bajimine pa buloba, bantu babi kabikadiku nansha! Maweja-Nangila, ndi musue kukuela tuasakidila. Bakutumbishe Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms105:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, kobuelayi dina diende, numanyishe bantu bakuabu malu a kukema adiye muenze." 
Psalms105:2 Numuimbile misambu, numutumbishe nayi, nuambilangane malu ende a kukema onsu." 
Psalms105:3 Nutue ntunku bua Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, nuenu badi bakeba Maweja-Nangila, nusanke." 
Psalms105:4 Tangilayi kudi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, kebayi mpala wende matuku onsu." 
Psalms105:5 Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, muntu wende, nuenu bana ba Yakobe bantu bende basungula! Nuvuluke malu a kukema adiye muenze, mwuluke bishima biende, ne meyi ende avuaye muambe mukana muende." 
Psalms105:6  
Psalms105:7 Yeye ke Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, meyi adiye wamba adi bua buloba bujima." 
Psalms105:8 Udi uvuluka ndondu wende kashidi, ne diyi divuaye muambe, bua ndelanganyi tshinunu." 
Psalms105:9 Ndondu ewu ke uvuaye mutue ne Abrahame, ke mutshipu uvuaye muditshipe ku mesu kua Izake," 
Psalms105:10 kumutekelaye Yakobe bu mukenji, ne Izrayele bu dilaya dia tshiendelele," 
Psalms105:11 pavuaye umuambila ne: “Ndi nkupesha ditunga dia Kenaane bu bumpianyi buebe ne bua ndelanganyi yebe. ” 
Psalms105:12 Bavua bungi bukese, bu mudi benyi bungi bukese mu ditunga." 
Psalms105:13 Bavua baya ku tshisamba ne ku tshisamba tshikuabu, ku bukalenga ne ku bukalenga bukuabu." 
Psalms105:14 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kavua muanyishe, bua muntu nansha umue abenzele bibi, kudimujaye bakalenga bualu buabu ne:" 
Psalms105:15 “Kanulengi bantu bandi mujidile, kanuenzedi bantu banyi bibi nansha! ”" 
Psalms105:16 Kubatuminaye tshiyole mu ditunga, biakudia kukepela." 
Psalms105:17 Kadi kutumaye muntu umue, bua kudianjidilaye kumpala kuabu, muntu awu ke Yozefe uvuabu basumbishe ku bupika." 
Psalms105:18 Kumusuikabu mionji ku makasa, kumuelabu nkanu mu nshingu," 
Psalms105:19 too ne pakakumbana miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile, umujadikila muikalaye." 
Psalms105:20 Mukalenga kutuma diyi bua kumulekelabu mu lukanu, mfumu wa bantu kumulekela." 
Psalms105:21 Kumutekaye ku mutu kua bukalenga buende, ne mfumu wa bintu biende bionsu," 
Psalms105:22 bua kulongesha balombodi ba bukalenga, nuwuaye musue, ne bua kupesha bafidi ba ngenyi bakulu lungenyi ne meji." 
Psalms105:23 Pashishe Yakobe kuya mu Ejipitu, Izrayele kusomba mu ditunga dia Kame." 
Psalms105:24 Maweja-Nangila kuvudija bantu bende, kulelabu bana ba bungi, kubapeshaye bukole bupite bua baluishi babu." 
Psalms105:25 Kukudimunaye meji a bena Ejipitu, kubangabu kukina bantu bende, kukeba mua kubadinga." 
Psalms105:26 Maweja-Nangila kutuma Moshe, muena mudimu wende, ne Arone uvuaye musungule." 
Psalms105:27 Ku bukole buende kuenzabu bishima munkatshi muabu, kuenzabu malu a kukema mu ditunga dia Kame." 
Psalms105:28 Ke Mvidi Mukulu kutumaye miidima, butuku kuila mu ditunga, kakuvua muntu uvua mubenge diyi diende nansha." 
Psalms105:29 Kuandamunaye mayi a mu misulu yabu, kuvuawu mashi, kushipaye mishipa ivuamu." 
Psalms105:30 Ditunga diabu kuwula tente ne ndimba, kubuelayi ne mu nzubu ya bakalenga babu." 
Psalms105:31 Mvidi Mukulu utuma diyi, njiji ya lulengu ne tumue kufikabi mu ditunga dijima." 
Psalms105:32 Kubatuminaye mvula wa mabue, nkuba kuosha ditunga." 
Psalms105:33 Kushidishaye mionji yabu ya mvinyo ne mitshi yabu ya mfiku, kutshibulaye mitshi ivua mu ditunga diabu." 
Psalms105:34 Mvidi Mukulu utuma diyi dikuabu, mpasu ya mikumbi kufika kayiyi kubala." 
Psalms105:35 Kudiayi mitshi yonsu ne bisosa bia mu ditunga, kudiayi biakudia bionsu bivua buloba buabu bupatule." 
Psalms105:36 Ku ndekelu, Mvidi Mukulu kushipa banabute bonsu, ba mu meku a bena Ejipitu, bana ba mbediambedi bavuabu balele, bavuabu balele patshivuabu ne bukole." 
Psalms105:37 Kupatulaye bantu bende ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, ne biamu bia mpawungi, kakuvua muntu wa ku bisamba biabu nansha umue uvua ne dikasa dibi." 
Psalms105:38 Bena Ejipitu kusanka bua dipatuka diabu, bualu bowa bukavua bumane kubakuata." 
Psalms105:39 Bua kubalama, Maweja-Nangila, kubabadila divuba dia muinshi, ne kapia bua kubatokeshila butuku." 
Psalms105:40 Kubapeshaye nkuadi pakamulombabu, kubukutshishaye ne mampa a mu diulu." 
Psalms105:41 Kunzululaye dibue, mayi kupatuka, kupuekawu mu tshipela bu musulu." 
Psalms105:42 Bualu uvua muvuluke dilaya divuaye mubalaye, divuaye mulaye muntu wende Abrahame." 
Psalms105:43 Bantu bende bavua ne disanka pavuaye mubapatule, bantu bavuaye musungule, bavua bela mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms105:44 Pashishe kubapeshaye maloba a bisamba bikuabu, kusankabu ne midimu ivua bantu bakuabu benza," 
Psalms105:45 bua kulondabu mikenji yende, ne kulonda malongesha ende. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms106:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila bualu udi ne malu makane, dinanga diende kadiena ne ndekelu." 
Psalms106:2 Udi mua kuambila bantu malu a bulobu bua Maweja-Nangila, ne kubaleja butumbi buende nnganyi?" 
Psalms106:3 Badi bakosa nsambu biakane, ne badi benza malu makane misangu yonsu badi ne disanka." 
Psalms106:4 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi upita kufuila bantu bebe luse, utuvuluke. Wewe musungidi, utusungidile." 
Psalms106:5 Nanku netumone diakalenga dia bantu baudi musungule, netumvue disanka didi nadi bantu bebe, netutue ntunku pamue ne bantu ba mu bumpianyi buebe." 
Psalms106:6 Tudi benza malu mabi avua batatu betu benze, tudi benza bibi, tudi bapila." 
Psalms106:7 Pavua batatu betu mu Ejipitu, kabavua bajingulule malu a kukema a Maweja-Nangila, kabavua bavuluke malu ende makane mapite bungi. Kumutombokelabu pabuipi ne mayi manene a Luepu." 
Psalms106:8 Kadi kubasungidilaye bua lumu luende. bua kulejaye bantu bukole buende. 
Psalms106:9 Kukanyinaye mayi manene a Luepu, kukamawu diakamue, kupitshishaye bantu bende mu dijimba dile bu mudibu benda mu tshipela." 
Psalms106:10 Kubasungidilaye kudi bavua babakina, kubanyenga mu bianza bia muluishi." 
Psalms106:11 Mayi kubuikila baluishi babu, kakuvua kupanda nansha muntu umue." 
Psalms106:12 Kuitababu tshivua Mvidi Mukulu muambe, kumutumbishabu ne misambu." 
Psalms106:13 Kupuabu malu avuaye muenze muoyi lukasa, kubenga kuindila bua enze malu avuaye mupangadike." 
Psalms106:14 Kujingabu bikole bintu bivuabu kabayi nabi, kutetabu Mvidi Mukulu mu tshipela." 
Psalms106:15 Mvidi Mukulu kubapesha munyinyi uvuabu balombe, kuudiabu too kuleuka." 
Psalms106:16 Mu mitanda muvuabu, kutekelabu Moshe ne Arone, muena mudimu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila lubabu." 
Psalms106:17 Buloba kunzuluka, kuminabu Datane, kujibikilabu bavua bumvuangana ne Abirame." 
Psalms106:18 Kapia kuoshaku bena tshisumbu tshiabu, ludimi lua kapia kuvingutula bantu babi." 
Psalms106:19 Kuenzabu kana ka ngombe ku mukuna wa Orebe, kutendelelabu tshiamu tshivuabu bengulule." 
Psalms106:20 Pa muaba wa Mvidi Mukula uvua butumbi buabu, kupingajabu lupingu lua ngombe udiadia bisosa." 
Psalms106:21 Kubengabu kuvuluka Mvidi Mukulu musungidi wabu, uvua mubenzele malu manene mu Ejipitu," 
Psalms106:22 mubenzele malu a kukema mu ditunga dia Kame, ne malu adi akuatshisha bowa ku mayi manene a Luepu." 
Psalms106:23 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: Ndi mbabutula, kadi Moshe, muntu uvuaye musungule, kuimanaye pankatshi, umukandika bua kayi kubutula bantu bonsu mu tshiji." 
Psalms106:24 Pashishe kupetulabu ditunga divuabu bajinga, kubengabu kuitaba dilaya dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Psalms106:25 Kununganabu mu ntenta yabu, kubengabu kuteleja tshivua Mvidi Mukulu wamba." 
Psalms106:26 Nenku, kuelaye tshianza mulu, kuditshipa, bua kubashipaye mu tshipela," 
Psalms106:27 bua kutangalaja ndelanganyi yabu miaba yonsu, ne kufuilayi mu bisamba bia benyi." 
Psalms106:28 Kudilamikabu kudi mvidie Baale ku Peyore, kudiabu milambu milambula bafue." 
Psalms106:29 Kufikishabu Maweja-Nangila tshiji, tshipupu kubuela munkatshi muabu." 
Psalms106:30 Kadi Pinase, kujuka, kubalumbuluila, tshipupu kujika." 
Psalms106:31 Maweja-Nangila kumuanyisha kashidi, ne bikondu bionsu bidi kumpala." 
Psalms106:32 Kukuatshishabu Maweja-Nangila tshiji ku mayi a Meriba, kukebelabu Moshe dikenga:" 
Psalms106:33 bu muvuabu bamufikisha munda, kuakulaye kayi muele meji." 
Psalms106:34 Kabavua babutule bena Kenaane, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mubambile." 
Psalms106:35 Kadi kubuelakanabu ne bantu ba bisamba bia benyi, kulongabu mua kuenza malu avuabu benza." 
Psalms106:36 Kutendelelabu mvidie yabu, kuponabu mu buteyi bua kutendelela mvidie." 
Psalms106:37 Kulambulabu mvidie ya tshianana, bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
Psalms106:38 Kumatshishabu mashi a bantu bavua kabayi ne tshilumbu panshi, — mashi a bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji, bavuabu bashipela mvidie yabu ya bena Kenaane, — dishipa dia bantu adi kunyangadi ditunga." 
Psalms106:39 Pakenzabu malu aa, kudipishabu mikiya, mbuendenda mene." 
Psalms106:40 Maweja-Nangila kukuatshila bantu bende tshiji, kukinaye ba mu bumpianyi buende." 
Psalms106:41 Kubafilaye mu bianza bia bisamba bia benyi, kubakokeshabu kudi bantu bavua babakina." 
Psalms106:42 Baluishi babu kubakengesha, kubafuisha bundu." 
Psalms106:43 Misangu ya bungi Maweja-Nangila uvua ubapandisha, kadi bobu bavua bamutombokela bua tshishiku tshiabu." 
Psalms106:44 Maweja-Nangila kumvua miadi yabu, kumonaye dikenga diabu." 
Psalms106:45 Kuvulukaye ndondu wende bu mudiye ne luse, kukudimunaye meji ende." 
Psalms106:46 Kutekaye muoyi wa luse munda mua bantu bonsu, bavua babakuate ku bupika." 
Psalms106:47 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, utusungidile, utumbushe mu bisamba bia benyi, utusangishe pamue, bua bitumbishe dina diebe dia tshijila, tutue ntunku bua butumbi buebe." 
Psalms106:48 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, tuasakidila! Nuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila misangu yonsu. Bantu bonsu bambe ne: “Amene, eyo, bikale nanku! Tutumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, Aleluya!”" 
Psalms107:1 Maweja-Nangila, tuasakidila, bualu udi ne malu mimpe, dinanga diebe kadiena ne ndekelu." 
Psalms107:2 Ke mudibu mua kuamba nanku, kudi bantu badi Maweja-Nangila mupikule, kudi bantu bavuaye musungidile mu bianza bia baluishi," 
Psalms107:3 kudi bavuaye mukunguje muaba umue, pavuabu batangalake mu matunga onsu, a kudi diba dipatukila ne dibuelela, a ku mutu ne a kuinshi kua ditunga." 
Psalms107:4 Kulalakanabu mu tshipela, mu njila ya lusenga, nanshabu kumona njila wa kuya ku musoku uvua bantu basombe." 
Psalms107:5 Kukengabu ne nzala ne nyota, kutekeshabu mu maboku." 
Psalms107:6 Nenku mu dikenga diabu, kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila yeye kubapandisha ku dikenga." 
Psalms107:7 Kubalombolaye mu njila mululame, wa kuya ku musoku udi bantu basombe." 
Psalms107:8 Basakidile Maweja-Nangila bua malu ende mimpe, bua malu ende a kukema adiye muenzele bantu." 
Psalms107:9 Bualu udi mupeshe bavua ne nyota mayi a kunua, mubumbuile bavua ne nzala bivuabu bakengela." 
Psalms107:10 Bakuabu bavua mu dikenga, babasuika nkanu, basombe mu nzubu wa lukanu wa miidima." 
Psalms107:11 Bualu bavua batombokela Mvidi Mukulu, bavua bapetule mikenji ya Muena kulu." 
Psalms107:12 Yeye kubapuekesha mu miidima mikole, kakuvua muntu uvua mua kubajula." 
Psalms107:13 Nenku mu dikenga diabu, kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila, yeye kubasungidila mu dikenga." 
Psalms107:14 Kubapatulaye mu nzubu wa lukanu wa miidima, kutshibula nkanu yabu." 
Psalms107:15 Basakidile Maweja-Nangila bua malu ende mimpe, ne bua malu ende a kukema adiye muenzele bantu." 
Psalms107:16 Bualu udi mutshibule biibi bia tshiamu tshikunze, udi mutshibule milonda ya kupayika ku biibi." 
Psalms107:17 Bantu batshimbakane badi badikebela makenga, ku nsombelu wabu mubi, ne ku malu mabi adibu benza." 
Psalms107:18 Biakudia bionsu mubafikile ku muoyi, bakavua dikasa mu lukita." 
Psalms107:19 Nenku mu dikenga diabu, kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila ne mbila mikole, yeye kubasungidila ku dikenga diabu." 
Psalms107:20 Wamba amu diyi dimue, kubondapaye, kubasungidilaye ku lufu." 
Psalms107:21 Basakidile Maweja-Nangila bua malu ende mimpe, ne bua malu ende a kukema adiye muenzele bantu!" 
Psalms107:22 Balambule Mvidi Mukulu milambu ya kuela tuasakidila, bele mbila ya disanka bambile bantu malu adiye muenze." 
Psalms107:23 Bakuabu kuendakana ne majuwa pa mayi manene, benza midimu yabu pa mayi manene." 
Psalms107:24 Kumonabu bukole bua Maweja-Nangila, ne malu a kukema adiye wenza pa mayi manene." 
Psalms107:25 Yeye kuakula, tshipepela tshikole kujuka, kujulatshi mavuala mavule pa mayi." 
Psalms107:26 Majuwa abu kubanda wu mulu, kupulumukawu mu mitubu, bavua ba lufu mu mayi manene." 
Psalms107:27 Bavua ne tshinyingu, bavua batetuka, bu mudi muntu mukuatshika maluvu. Meji abu onsu avua matutubile." 
Psalms107:28 Nenku mu dikenga diabu kubikilabu Maweja-Nangila, yeye kubasungidila ku dikenga." 
Psalms107:29 Yeye kutuyisha tshipepela, mavuala kubatama." 
Psalms107:30 Bobu kusanka, bualu mavuala avua mabatame. Maweja-Nangila kubafikisha ku dilobu divuabu basue." 
Psalms107:31 Nenku basakidile Maweja-Nangila bua malu ende mimpe, ne bua malu ende a kukema adiye muenzele bantu!" 
Psalms107:32 Bamutembe mu bisangilu biabu, bamutumbishe mu tshipangu tshia bakulu." 
Psalms107:33 Yeye ke udi ukudimuna misulu ya mayi yenza tshipela, ne miaba ya mayi ya mu tshipela yenza buloba bume," 
Psalms107:34 buloba bua bufuke buenza bua lusenga, pikala badi basombapu benza malu mabi." 
Psalms107:35 Udi ukudimuna kabidi tshipela tshienza dijiba dia mayi, ne buloba bume buenza muaba udi mayi." 
Psalms107:36 Udi usombesha badi ne nzala mu miaba eyi, basamu nzubu ya kusomba."
