Psalms107:37 Badi bakuna maminu mu madimi, bakuna mionji ya mvinyo, bapola bimuma." 
Psalms107:38 Maweja-Nangila udi ubela lupemba, udi ubavudija ba bungi, kena ukepesha bimuna biabu nansha." 
Psalms107:39 Kadi bakuabu badi benda bakepela, babakengesha kudi bupika, kudi dikenga ne lutatu." 
Psalms107:40 Maweja-Nangila udi upepeja baneme, ubalekela balalakana mu tshipela, kabayi bamona njila." 
Psalms107:41 Udi usungidila bapela ku dikenga, uvudija meku abu bungi bu mikoku." 
Psalms107:42 Bantu bakane badi bamona basanka, kadi bantu babi badi bapuwa." 
Psalms107:43 Muntu udi ne meji avuluke malu aa, ajingulule ne Maweja-Nangila udi ne malu mimpe." 
Psalms108:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms108:2 Mvidi Mukulu, ndi mushindike ne: nenkuimbile misambu, nenkutumbishe ne muoyi wanyi mujima." 
Psalms108:3 Lunzenze luanyi ne lunkombe luanyi, tabalayi, bualu nengambile kabundubundu bua kutabalaku." 
Psalms108:4 Maweja-Nangila nenkutumbishe, munkatshi mua bantu, nenkuimbile misambu kumpala kua bisamba bia bantu," 
Psalms108:5 bualu luse luebe ndunene, lupite ne diulu, bulelela buebe mbupite ne mavuba." 
Psalms108:6 Mvidi Mukulu leja bunene buebe budi bupite diulu, butumbi buebe bukenkeshe buloba bujima!" 
Psalms108:7 Unsungidile ne tshianza tshiebe tshia balume, ungitabe, bua bantu bebe baudi munange bapande!" 
Psalms108:8 Mvidi Mukulu uvua muakule mu nzubu wende wa tshijila wamba ne: “Nentshimune, nengabanye tshimenga tshia Shekeme, nempande tshibandabanda tshia Sukote mu bitupa." 
Psalms108:9 Ngilaade nguanyi, Menashe nguanyi kabidi, Efrayime ntshifulu tshianyi. Yuda ndikombu ndianyi dia bukalenga." 
Psalms108:10 Mowabe udi dilongu dindi ngowela mayi. Ndi ngela tshisabata tshianyi mu Edome. Ndi ngela lubila lua mvita kudi bena Peleshete.” 
Psalms108:11 Udi mua kumfikisha ku Edome nnganyi? Udi mua kumpesha tshimenga tshiende tshidi tshikolesha ne bimana nnganyi? 
Psalms108:12 Anu wewe, Mvidi Mukulu, kadi udi mutubenge, kutshiena ufila biluilu bietu ku mvita to." 
Psalms108:13 Utuambuluishe mu mvita yetu ne muluishi, bualu diambuluisha dia bantu didi tshianana." 
Psalms108:14 Tuetu bikale nebe wewe Mvidi Mukulu, tudi tutshimuna, bualu wewe udi udiatakaja baluishi betu panshi." 
Psalms109:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Mvidi Mukulu wewe ke undi ntumbisha, kupuwi nansha," 
Psalms109:2 bualu bantu babi, bena dishima, badi bansonguela, badi banjana." 
Psalms109:3 Meyi abu a lukinu adi antatshisha nseke yonsu, badi banduisha kapayi bualu." 
Psalms109:4 Nansha meme mubanange, badi bansonguela, kadi meme ndi ntendelela bua baluishi banyi," 
Psalms109:5 badi bangenzela malu mabi pa malu mimpe, bankina pandi meme mubanange." 
Psalms109:6 Badi bangamba ne: “Bamupishe, muntu imane ku tshianza tshiende tshia balume, bua amusonguele!" 
Psalms109:7 Palumbululaye bamupishe, ditendelela diende diandamuke bualu bubi!" 
Psalms109:8 Matuku ende a kulala panu ikale makese, muntu mukuabu angate midimu yende." 
Psalms109:9 Bana bende bashale bana ba nshiya, mukajende ashale mukamba!" 
Psalms109:10 Bana bende ba balume bikale balalakanyi, ne bena lulombu, babipate muaba udi nzubu yabu, mishale bibuwa." 
Psalms109:11 Muntu uvua mumusombeshe bintu, abiangate bionsu, benyi banyenge bintu bivuaye mupete ku mudimu wende." 
Psalms109:12 Muntu kamufuidi luse to, kafuidi nshiya yende luse to!" 
Psalms109:13 Ndelanganyi yende ifue, dina diende dijimine mu tshikondu tshidi tshilonda!" 
Psalms109:14 Bavuluije Maweja-Nangila bilema bia tatuende ne bia kakuende wa balume, kababuikidi malu mabi a mamuende nansha!" 
Psalms109:15 Maweja-Nangila avuluke malu aa matuku onsu, umbushe tshivulukilu tshia bantu abu mu ditunga." 
Psalms109:16 Bualu muntu ewu, kavua muvuluke bua kuleja bantu luse, kadi uvua ukengesha mupele, muena dikenga, muena dibungama bua kumushipa." 
Psalms109:17 Uvua utshipa bantu: mulawu umukuate! Kavua wela bantu lupemba: yeye kabidi kabamuedi lupemba! 
Psalms109:18 Ikale muntu wa mulawu, mulawu umubuele munda bu mayi, umubuele mu mifuba bu mafuta!" 
Psalms109:19 Ikale nawu bu tshilamba tshidiye udijingila, ne bu mukaba udiye uvuala matuku onsu.”" 
Psalms109:20 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wenzela bonsu badi bansonguela kudiye, ne badi banjana nanku." 
Psalms109:21 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ungenzele bimpe bua dina diebe, bualu malu ebe mimpe mmapite, unsungidile." 
Psalms109:22 Ndi mupele ne muena dikenga, muoyi wanyi mmunyingalale munda." 
Psalms109:23 Ndi nya kakese kakese, bu mudi mundidimbi uya ujimina, badi bangipata bu mudibu bumusha kishi pambidi." 
Psalms109:24 Bua kujila kua biakudia, tshiena ne bukole bua kuimana kulu, didikengesha ne nzala mbinyanyisha." 
Psalms109:25 Ndi tshintu tshidibu bapepeja, padibu bantangila, badi banseka." 
Psalms109:26 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ungambuluishe, unsungidile bua malu ebe mimpe." 
Psalms109:27 Bua bamanye ne: wewe ke udi muenze, wewe Maweja-Nangila ke udi mungenzele bualu ebu." 
Psalms109:28 Nansha bobu bantshipe, kadi wewe udi ungela lupemba. Bobu banduishe, bundu bubakuate, kadi meme muntu webe, ngikale ne disanka." 
Psalms109:29 Bua badi bansonguela, lumu luabu lupuke bu kazaku, bafue bundu bu muntu mudibuikile tshilamba!" 
Psalms109:30 Nensakidile Maweja-Nangila ne diyi dikole, nemmutumbishe munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia bantu." 
Psalms109:31 Bualu udi wakuila mupele bua kumusungidila, kudi badi bakeba kumushipa." 
Psalms110:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wambila mukalenga wanyi ne: “Somba ku dianyi dia balume, too ne pandi ngenza baluishi bebe tshidiatshilu tshia makasa ebe." 
Psalms110:2 Maweja-Nangila neafikishe bukokeshi buebe too ne kule, kubangila ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Siyone. Wewe ukokeshe baluishi badi bakunyungulukile." 
Psalms110:3 Bantu badi bamanye mvita bikole badi baya nebe bua kukufila, dituku diudi usangisha bena mvita bebe. Bansongalume bebe badi bavue kuudi pa mikuna ya tshijila, bu mudi dima dipatuka pa kubundubundu." 
Psalms110:4 Maweja-Nangila udi muditshipe, kena mua kuyila: “Wewe udi mutuangaji wa kashidi bu Melkisedeke. ”" 
Psalms110:5 Maweja-Nangila udi ku diboku diebe dia balume. Neazaze bakalenga dituku dikalaye ne tshiji," 
Psalms110:6 udi ulumbuluisha bisamba bia bantu, uwuje bibandabanda tente ne bitalu, uboza bamfumu mu ditunga dijima." 
Psalms110:7 Mukalenge neanue mayi, ku musulu udi mu njila, ke padiye mujula mutu." 
Psalms111:1 Aleluya, Maweja-Nangila ikale ne muoyi! Nensakidile Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi wanji mujima, munkatshi mua bantu bakane badi basangile." 
Psalms111:2 Malu adi Maweja-Nangila muenze adi manene, bantu badi baamone badi baanyishe." 
Psalms111:3 Malu ende adiye wenze adi ne lumu ne buneme, buakane buende budi bua kashidi." 
Psalms111:4 Ndi musue bua bantu bavuluke malu ende a kukema. Maweja-Nangila udi ne dinanga, udi ufuila bantu luse," 
Psalms111:5 udi upesha badi bamutshina biakudia, udi uvuluka ndondu wende matuku onsu." 
Psalms111:6 Udi muleje bantu bende bukole buende mu malu adiye wenza, padiye ubapesha ditunga dia bisamba." 
Psalms111:7 Malu adiye wenza ne bianza biende adi aleja bulelela buende ne mudiye ukosa nsambu pa yoyi. Mikenji yende yonsu idi ya kueyemena," 
Psalms111:8 udi muyele bua kashidi. Idi ne bulelela ne buakane. 
Psalms111:9 Uvua mutumine bantu bende lupandu, uvua mumanyishe ndondu wende bua ashale kashidi. Dina diende dia tshijila, didi dikuatshisha bantu bowa." 
Psalms111:10 Kutshina kua Maweja-Nangila ntshibangidilu tshia meji. Bantu bonsu badi balonda mikenji, badi bajingulula malu. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila mbua tshiendelele." 
Psalms112:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, aleluya! Muntu udi unemeka Maweja-Nangila, umvua disanka bua kulonda mikenji yende, udi ne disanka." 
Psalms112:2 Bana bende nebikale bilobu mu ditunga, ndelanganyi ya bantu bakane nebayele lupemba." 
Psalms112:3 Mu nzubu muende mudi lupetu ne bubanji, buakane buende mbua tshiendelele." 
Psalms112:4 Munya udi utema mu miidima bua kutokeshila bantu bakane, Maweja-Nangila udi ne dinanga, udi ufuila bantu luse." 
Psalms112:5 Muntu udi uleja bakuabu luse, ubasombesha bintu, ulongolola malu ende mu buakane, udi wenza bimpe." 
Psalms112:6 Bualu kena mua kutekankana tshiendelele, nebavuluke muntu muakane matuku onsu." 
Psalms112:7 Kena utshina ngumu mibi; udi ne muoyi mukole, udi weyemena Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms112:8 Udi ne muoyi mukole, kena ne bowa, too ne padiye umona batshimuna baluishi bende." 
Psalms112:9 Udi upesha bapele bintu tshipapa, Mvidi Mukulu udi umuanyisha matuku onsu. Bukole buende ne butumbi bidi bivulangana." 
Psalms112:10 Padi muntu mubi umona bualu ebu, udi unyingalala, usumakaja menu, ubutuka. Dijinga dia bantu babi nedijimine." 
Psalms113:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Nuenu badi benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms113:2 Bantu bele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila lelu too ne matuku onsu! 
Psalms113:3 Kudi diba dipatukila ne kudidi dibuelela, bantu bonsu batumbishe Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms113:4 Maweja-Nangila udi ku mutu kua bisamba bionsu bia bantu, butumbi buende mbupite too ne diulu." 
Psalms113:5 Udi bu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, Yeye udi wasa mulu," 
Psalms113:6 kadi, udi utangila panshi apa nnganyi? Kakuena muntu, nansha mu diulu, nansha pa buloba!" 
Psalms113:7 Udi ujula mupele uvua mudishinde panshi, udi ujula muena dikenga, uvuabu bimanshe mu dyala," 
Psalms113:8 bua kumusombesha pamue, ne bakulu ba bantu bende." 
Psalms113:9 Udi upesha mukaji udi kayi mulele nzubu, umupa disanka dia mamu wa bana. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms114:1 Diba divua bena Izrayele bapatuke mu Ejipitu, divua ndelanganyi ya Yakobe mishiye tshisamba tshia benyi," 
Psalms114:2 Yuda kushala muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, Izrayele kushala buloba buende." 
Psalms114:3 Mayi manene amona bena Izrayele, kukosolokawu. Musulu wa Yardene kupingana tshianyima." 
Psalms114:4 Mikuna minene kutupika bu mbuji ya bimpanga, mikuna mikese bu tuana tua mikoku." 
Psalms114:5 Wewe mayi manene, tshiudi unyemena ntshinyi? Wewe musulu wa Yardene, tshiudi upingena tshianyima ntshinyi?" 
Psalms114:6 Nuenu mikuna ne minene ne mikese, tshinudi nutupikila bu mbuji ya bimpanga, kabidi bu tuana tua mikoku ntshinyi?" 
Psalms114:7 Buloba bumona Maweja-Nangila ufika, kuzakala, kukuatshika bowa kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe." 
Psalms114:8 Bualu yeye udi wandamuna lubuebue luenza dijiba dia mayi, ukudimuna dibue dishala mpokolu wa mayi." 
Psalms115:1 Maweja-Nangila kabatutumbishi tuetu, kabatutumbishi to, bakutumbishe amu wewe. Bualu wewe udi utunanga, muikale kabidi muena diyi dimue." 
Psalms115:2 Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu badi bakonka ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wabu udi penyi. ” 
Psalms115:3 Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi mu diulu, udi wenza bionsu bidiye musue." 
Psalms115:4 Kadi mvidie yabu mmienza ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nansha ne mpawungi. Idi bintu bienza kudi bantu. 
Psalms115:5 Idi ne mukana, kayena yakula. Idi ne mesu, kayena imona," 
Psalms115:6 idi ne matshi, kayena iteleja, idi ne diulu, kayena yumvua mupuya," 
Psalms115:7 idi ne bianza, kayena ilenga, idi ne makasa, kayena yenda. Idi ne muminu, kayena ipatula diyi." 
Psalms115:8 Bantu badi bayifula, bikale bu yoyi! Bonsu badi bayitekemena, bayifuane!" 
Psalms115:9 — Nuenu bena Izrayele, tekemenayi kudi Maweja-Nangila. — Yeye ke udi unuambuluisha, unulama bu ngabu." 
Psalms115:10 — Nuenu batuanganji, ndelanganyi ya Arone, tekemenayi kudi Maweja-Nangila. — Yeye ke udi unuambuluisha, unulama bu ngabu." 
Psalms115:11 — Nuenu bantu bende bapiabapia, tekemenayi kudi Maweja-Nangila. — Yeye ke udi unuambuluisha, unulama bu ngabu." 
Psalms115:12 — Maweja-Nangila udi utuvuluka, musue kutuela lupemba. — Ele bena Izrayele lupemba! — Ele ndelanganyi ya Arone lupemba!" 
Psalms115:13 — Ele bantu bonsu, baneme ne bapele badi batendelela Mvidi Mukulu lupemba!" 
Psalms115:14 — Maweja-Nangila atantshishe nzubu yenu, ne ya bana benu!" 
Psalms115:15 Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba, bualu yeye ke udi mufuke diulu ne buloba!" 
Psalms115:16 Diulu ndia Maweja-Nangila, nkayende, kadi buloba mmubupeshe bantu." 
Psalms115:17 Udi mua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila nnganyi? — Bafue kabena mua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, mbaye mu muaba udibu bapuwa kashidi." 
Psalms115:18 Kadi tuetu, netuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, mpindiewu ne kashidi. Tutumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms116:1 Ndi munange Maweja-Nangila bualu udi unteleja pandi mmubikila 
Psalms116:2 Udi unteleja ne ntema. Nemmutendakene too ne ku lufu. 
Psalms116:3 Lufu kunjingila nkanu yalu, bowa bua kandondu ka bafue kunkuata, luzakalu kungenza, muoyi kunshikila." 
Psalms116:4 Ke meme kubikila Maweja-Nangila, ngamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, umpandishe ku lufu!”" 
Psalms116:5 Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi muimpe, udi ukumbaja bivuaye mulaye, Mvidi Mukulu wetu udi ufuila bantu luse." 
Psalms116:6 Maweja-Nangila udi ulama badi kabayi mua kudisungidila, mvua mu njiwu yeye kunsungidila" 
Psalms116:7 Muoyi wanji kubutama, bualu Maweja-Nangila mmungenzele bimpe." 
Psalms116:8 Bushuwa, wewe Maweja-Nangila, uvua munsungidile ku lufu, munkupule binsonji ku mesu, mungepule ku kabutu." 
Psalms116:9 Nenku, nengende kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila mu buloba bua ba muoyi." 
Psalms116:10 Mvua mutekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu, nansha pamvua ndila, ngamba ne: “Ndi mu dikenga dinene!”" 
Psalms116:11 Mvua ndubakana ngamba ne: “Kakuena muntu undi mua kutekemena! ” 
Psalms116:12 Tshindi mua kupingajila Maweja-Nangila, bua bionsu bidiye mungenzele ntshinyi?" 
Psalms116:13 Nendambule Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa mvinyo, mmuele tuasakidila, bualu mmumpandishe!" 
Psalms116:14 Nenkumbaje bimvua mulaye Maweja-Nangila, bantu bende batangila." 
Psalms116:15 Maweja-Nangila udi ubungama bikole, padi bantu badi bamulamata bafua." 
Psalms116:16 Maweja-Nangila, ndi muena mudimu webe, mulela kudi mukaji muena mudimu webe. Wewe ke uvua munsulule nkanu ya lufu." 
Psalms116:17 Nenkulambule mulambu bua kukuela tuasakidila, kabidi nentumbishe dina diebe." 
Psalms116:18 Nenkumbaje bimvua mulaye Maweja-Nangila, bantu bende bonsu batangile," 
Psalms116:19 mu lubanza lua nzubu wende wa tshijila, udi munkatshi muebe wewe, Yerushalayime. Tutumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms117:1 Bisamba bionsu, tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, muimbilayi misambu," 
Psalms117:2 bualu dinanga didiye mutunange ndipite. Udi ukumbaja malaya ende kashidi. Tutumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms118:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi mulenga, dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms118:2 Bena Izrayele, ambayi ne: dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms118:3 Ndelanganyi ya Arone, ambayi ne: dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms118:4 Nuenu badi bitaba Maweja-Nangila, ambayi ne: dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms118:5 Pamvua mu dikenga, meme kubikila Maweja-Nangila, kungitabaye, kumpandisha." 
Psalms118:6 Maweja-Nangila udi nanyi, tshiena ntshina tshintu. Bantu nebangenze tshinyi?" 
Psalms118:7 Maweja-Nangila udi nanyi, ungambuluisha, ndi mmona bundu bua baluishi banyi." 
Psalms118:8 Mbimpe kukeba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila, pamutu pa kutekemena kudi muntu!" 
Psalms118:9 Mbimpe kukeba diambuluisha kudi Maweja-Nangila, pa mutu pa kukeba diambuluisha kudi bantu banene!" 
Psalms118:10 Bantu ba bisamba bia benyi bavua banjingile nseke yonsu, meme kubipata ku diambuluisha dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms118:11 Bavua banjingile nseke yonsu, meme kubipata ku diambuluisha dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms118:12 Bavua banduisha bu tshisumbu tshia mbulubulu, kadi kujiminabu bu mudi kapia kajima ku bisosa, meme kubipata ku diambuluisha dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms118:13 Bantu bavua bansakila bua meme kudishinda, kadi Maweja-Nangila kungambuluisha." 
Psalms118:14 Maweja-Nangila ke buanyi bukole, udi ungambuluisha." 
Psalms118:15 Bitabi ba Mvidi Mukulu badi bela mbila ya disanka, mu ntenta yabu bua lupandu ludibu bapete, bamba ne: “Diboku dia Maweja-Nangila nditshimune." 
Psalms118:16 Diboku dia Maweja-Nangila didi ne bukole, diboku dia Maweja-Nangila nditshimune.”" 
Psalms118:17 Tshiena mfua to, nenshale ne muoyi, bua kulondela bantu bidi Maweja-Nangila muenze." 
Psalms118:18 Bulelela, Maweja-Nangila udi munkengeshe, kadi kena munshipe to." 
Psalms118:19 Ngunzuluilayi biibi bidi bitabi ba Maweja-Nangila babuela, bua mbuele, nye kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila!" 
Psalms118:20 Tshiibi tshia kuya kua Maweja-Nangila tshidi apa; ke padi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu babuelela. 
Psalms118:21 Maweja-Nangila, nenkutumbishe, bualu uvua mungitabe, mungambuluishe." 
Psalms118:22 Dibue divua bibaki ba nzubu bimanshe, ndishale mpindiewu mutu wa ditumba." 
Psalms118:23 Ewu mmudimu udi Maweja-Nangila muenze, udi wa dikema ku mesu kuetu." 
Psalms118:24 Dituku dia tshibilu divua Maweja-Nangila muenze ndiodi edi, nenku, tuelayi mbila ya disanka, tusanke." 
Psalms118:25 “Eyi, Maweja-Nangila, utuambuluishe, Maweja-Nangila, utukumishe dikasa dimpe!”" 
Psalms118:26 — Mvidi Mukulu, ele muntu udi ubuela mu nzubu wende lupemba! Tudi tunuela lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, mu nzubu wende wa tshijila." 
Psalms118:27 — Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu nkayende. Atutokeshe ne butoke buende! — Elayi tshijengu too ne ku tshilambuilu. 
Psalms118:28 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi musue kukutumbisha. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi musue kumanyisha bunene buebe." 
Psalms118:29 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila bualu udi mulenga, dinanga dienda ndia kashidi." 
Psalms119:1 Bantu badi ne nsombelu muakane, balonda mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila mu nsombelu wabu, badi ne disanka!" 
Psalms119:2 Bantu badi balonda mikenji yende, bamutumikila ne muoyi wabu mujima, badi ne disanka!" 
Psalms119:3 Bobu kabena benza bualu bubi nansha bumue, badi benza mudi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Psalms119:4 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, udi mumanyishe bantu mikenji yebe, bua bayilame." 
Psalms119:5 Eyi, nsombelu wanyi ikale muimpe, ndame mikenji yebe muudi musue wewe!" 
Psalms119:6 Nanku tshiakufua bundu pandi ndama meyi ebe. 
Psalms119:7 Nenkutumbishe ne muoyi umue, ndonge malu malelela audi mupangadike." 
Psalms119:8 Nengenze muudi musue, kundekedi kashidi!" 
Psalms119:9 Patshidi muntu muana, mmunyi mudiye mua kuikala ne nsombelu muimpe? — Amu padiye ulama tshiudi muambe wewe Maweja-Nangila." 
Psalms119:10 Wewe ngundi nkeba bua kuitaba ne muoyi wanji mujima, kundekedi bua nsesuke ku meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:11 Ndi ndama mikenji yebe mu muoyi wanyi, bua tshikadi mua kupila ku mesu kuebe." 
Psalms119:12 Maweja-Nangila, tuasakidila, bualu udi mundongeshe tshiudi musue." 
Psalms119:13 Mishiku yanyi idi ibala mapangadika onsu audi muambe. 
Psalms119:14 Kulonda mikenji yebe kudi kunsankisha, bu mudi muntu mupete biuma bia bungi." 
Psalms119:15 Ndi musue kuelangana meji ku mikenji yebe, ne kulonda njila uudi undeja." 
Psalms119:16 Ndi ne disanka dia kulonda mikenji yebe, tshiena mpua diyi diebe muoyi." 
Psalms119:17 Ungenzele meme muena mudimu webe bimpe, ngikale ne muoyi, ndame diyi diebe." 
Psalms119:18 Tabaja mesu anyi, mmone malu a dikema adi mu mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:19 Ndi muenyi pa buloba, kunsokoki mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:20 Muoyi wanyi mmusue kulonda mapangadika, audi muangate mu malu onsu." 
Psalms119:21 Udi ukanyina bena kapeja, udi ubela mulawu, badi bapambuka mu njila webe." 
Psalms119:22 Ungumbushile kapeja ne tuseku, bualu ndi ndama mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:23 Nansha bamfumu bangelela tshitungu tshibi, ndi muena mudimu webe, ndi ngelangana meji ku malu audi wewe musue." 
Psalms119:24 Malu audi mungambile adi ansankisha, wowu ke adi ampesha meji makane." 
Psalms119:25 Ke meme ewu panshi mu lupuishi; umfululule bu muuvua mulaye. 
Psalms119:26 Mvua mukulondele mundi nsomba, wewe kunteleja, undongeshe tshiudi musue." 
Psalms119:27 Ungumvuije tshidi mikenji yebe yamba, ngelangane meji ku malu ebe a dikema." 
Psalms119:28 Dibungama didi mua kumpuekeshisha binsonji, unkankamike bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:29 Ungumbushe mu njila wa dishima, ummanyishe mikenji yebe bua bulenga buebe." 
Psalms119:30 Ndi muanyishe bua kukulamata, ndi mulonde mapangadika ebe." 
Psalms119:31 Ndi mulame diyi diuvua mungambile, Maweja-Nangila, kumfuishi bundu." 
Psalms119:32 Ndi ndonda njila uudi ungambila, bualu udi munzulule lungenyi luanyi." 
Psalms119:33 Maweja-Nangila, undeje njila wa meme kulonda, nemmulonde too ne ku ndekelu." 
Psalms119:34 Ungunwuije mikenji yebe, nenyilonde, nenyilame ne muoyi wanyi mujima." 
Psalms119:35 Undombole mu njila wa mikenji yebe, nensanke." 
Psalms119:36 Tangija muoyi wanyi ku mikenji yebe, kuutangiji ku biuma." 
Psalms119:37 Lama mesu anyi kaatangidi bintu bia tshianana. Undombole panu bu muudi musue. 
Psalms119:38 Kumbajila muena mudimu webe, bionsu biuvua mulaye badi bakuitaba." 
Psalms119:39 Ngumbushile kapeja, kadi kankuata bowa, bualu mapangadika ebe ke adi mimpe." 
Psalms119:40 Dijinga dianyi ndia kulonda mikenji yebe, umpe muoyi bualu udi muakane." 
Psalms119:41 Maweja-Nangila, undeje buimpe buebe, unsungidile bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:42 Mpete meji a kuandamuna badi bampenda, bualu ndi mutekemene bionsu biuvua mungambile." 
Psalms119:43 Kumbushi malu malelela mukana muanyi, bualu ndi ngindila mapangadika ebe." 
Psalms119:44 Ndi musue kulama mikenji yebe kashidi, tshiyi mpungila." 
Psalms119:45 Ndi musue kusomba panu bimpe, bualu ndi nditatshisha bua kulama mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:46 Nengambile bakalenga mikenji yebe, tshiyi mfua bundu." 
Psalms119:47 Ndi munange meyi ebe, ndi ngalonda ne disanka." 
Psalms119:48 Ndi nkutendelela maboku mela mulu, ngelangana meji ku biudi musue." 
Psalms119:49 Vuluka diyi diuvua muambile muena mudimu webe, bualu ndinshiye ne ditekemena." 
Psalms119:50 Pandi mu dikenga, diyi diebe didi dinsamba, dinkolesha ku muoyi." 
Psalms119:51 Nansha bena kapeja banseka, tshiena musesuke ku mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:52 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mvuluka mapangadika ebe a kale, ngumvua dikisha mu muoyi." 
Psalms119:53 Tshiji tshidi tshinkuata pandi mmona bantu babi, babenga mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:54 Biudi musue, ke bindi meme muena tshimuangi nsaka mu misambu." 
Psalms119:55 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkuvuluka butuku, ndama mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:56 Tshindi ne bua kuenza bulelela, nkuangata mikenji yebe ne mushinga." 
Psalms119:57 Maweja-Nangila, ndi muambe ne: tshindi ne bua kuenza, nkulama mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:58 Ndi musue kukusankisha ne muoyi wanyi mujima, ungambuluishe bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:59 Ndi ndiela meji a malu amvua muenze, ndi mpingana ku mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:60 Tshiena njingakana bua kuenza tshiudi muambe. 
Psalms119:61 Bantu babi nebankuate mu buteyi, kadi tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyi." 
Psalms119:62 Ndi mbika mundankulu, nkutumbisha bua mapangadika makane audi muangate." 
Psalms119:63 Ndi mudie bulunda ne badi bakunemeka bonsu, ne badi banemeka kabidi mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:64 Maweja-Nangila, udi muuje buloba ne malu ebe mimpe, undongeshe biudi musue." 
Psalms119:65 Maweja-Nangila, udi muenzele muena mudimu webe bimpe, bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:66 Undongeshe mua kumanya ne kuanyisha meyi ebe, bualu ndi muatekemene amu wowu." 
Psalms119:67 Mvua mupambuke kabayi banji kumfuisha bundu, mpindiewu ndi ngenza tshiudi muambe." 
Psalms119:68 Maweja-Nangila, udi muimpe, wenza malu mimpe, undongeshe biudi musue." 
Psalms119:69 Bena kapeja badi bannyanga ne malu a didinga, kadi meme ndi ndama mikenji yebe ne muoyi mujima." 
Psalms119:70 Lungenyi luabu ndujibale, kadi meme ndi nsanka bua kutumikila mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:71 Bidi bimpe bantu bamfuishe bundu, bua mmanye tshiudi musue." 
Psalms119:72 Mikenji yebe idi indengelela, bipitshidile biamu bia mpawungi ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole binunu ne binunu." 
Psalms119:73 Bianza biebe mbimfumbe, mbinkoleshe, umpeshe lungenyi lua kujingulula nalu malu, mmanye mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:74 Bakulamatshi badi ne disanka pa kumona ne: ndi mutekemene biudi mua kuamba. 
Psalms119:75 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mumanye ne: mapangadika ebe adi makane, avua mamfuishe bundu pa bualu." 
Psalms119:76 Unsambe bua buimpe buebe, bu muuvua mungambile meme muena mudimu webe." 
Psalms119:77 Undeje muudi munnange, nemfululuke, bualu ndi nsanka bua kutumikila mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:78 Bena kapeja badi bankengesha kapayi bualu, bafue bundu! Meme ndi mulame mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:79 Bantu badi bakunemeka bapingane kundi, bua kumanyabu biudi wamba." 
Psalms119:80 Nengenze biudi musue ne muoyi wanyi mujima, nanku tshiakufua bundu ku mesu kuebe to." 
Psalms119:81 Ndi nditatshisha bua kupeta diambuluisha diebe, mutekemene tshiudi wamba." 
Psalms119:82 Mesu anyi adi bilejileji, bua pandi mpita kubalulula mukenji webe, ke pandi nkonka ne: “Neunsambe diba kaayi?”" 
Psalms119:83 Nkadi ne minyengu mu mpala bu mulondu muteka pa muinshi, kadi tshiena mpua biudi musue muoyi." 
Psalms119:84 Matuku audi mumpeshe bua kushala ne muoyi panu, adi bungi munyi? Neulumbuluishe bantu badi bankengesha diba kaayi?" 
Psalms119:85 Bena kapeja kabena balonda mikenji yebe, badi bangimbila dijimba." 
Psalms119:86 Meyi ebe onsu adi malelela. Bantu badi bandondakaja tshiyi ne bualu, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms119:87 Nansha mumvua mulale panshi, ngamba kufua, tshivua mulekele mikenji yebe to." 
Psalms119:88 Umpe muoyi bua buimpe buebe, bua ndame meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:89 Maweja-Nangila, diyi diebe nedikaleku matuku onsu, didi ne muaba wadi wa kashidi mu diulu." 
Psalms119:90 Bulelela buebe budi bushala bidimu nkama ne nkama. Wewe kufuka buloba kushalabu; 
Psalms119:91 bintu bionsu bidi bishala ne ku lelu bu muuvua mupangadike bualu bintu bionsu bidi bienza mudimu webe. 
Psalms119:92 Bu meme tshiyi ndonda mikenji yebe idi insankisha, dikenga divua mua kunkuata." 
Psalms119:93 Tshiakupua mikenji yebe muoyi kashidi, bualu yoyi ke iudi umfululula nayi." 
Psalms119:94 Ndi nkulonda, umpandishe, ndi nkeba mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:95 Bantu babi badi bakeba pa kunshipela, kadi ndi nteleja meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:96 Ndi mmona ne: tshintu tshionsu tshidi ne ndekelu, kadi diyi diebe kadiena ne nshikidilu wadi." 
Psalms119:97 Eyi, ndi munange diyi diebe bikole, ndi nadi mu meji anyi matuku onsu." 
Psalms119:98 Diyi diebe ke bubanji buanyi bua kashidi, didi dimpesha meji mapite a balunda banyi." 
Psalms119:99 Ndi mupete dimanya mupite ne balongeshi banyi, bualu ndi ngelangana meji ku meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:100 Ndi mupite ne bantu banunu ku lungenyi, bualu ndi ngangata mikenji yebe ne muoyi umue." 
Psalms119:101 Ndi mubenge kulonda njila wa bubi, bua kuenza tshiudi musue." 
Psalms119:102 Ndi mulonde mapangadika ebe, bualu wewe ke udi mungambilewu." 
Psalms119:103 Pandi ngumvua malongesha ebe, ndi ngamona masheme mapite buitshi." 
Psalms119:104 Lungenyi luanyi ludi lufuma ku mikenji yebe, ke pandi mbenga malu onsu a dishima." 
Psalms119:105 Diyi diebe didi bu muendu ku makasa anyi, bu butoke budi buntokeshila njila." 
Psalms119:106 Nenwuluke dilaya dimvua mukulaye, dia kukumbaja mapangadika ebe makane." 
Psalms119:107 Maweja-Nangila, bantu bavua bamfuishe bundu, undame ne muoyi bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:108 Maweja-Nangila, anyisha ditendelela dianyi bu mulambu, undongeshe tshiuvua mupangadike." 
Psalms119:109 Muoyi wanyi udi mu njiwu diba dionsu, kadi tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyi." 
Psalms119:110 Nansha bantu babi banteya, tshiena mpambuka mu mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:111 Meyi ebe ke bubanji buanyi bua mushinga mukole bua kashidi, adi asankisha muoyi wanyi." 
Psalms119:112 Ndi musuminyine bua kuenza biudi musue, ke difutu dianyi dia kashidi." 
Psalms119:113 Ndi mubenge mioyi ibidi, ndi munange mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:114 Wewe ke ngabu wanyi udi undama; ndi mutekemene diyi diwamba. 
Psalms119:115 Nuenu bena malu mabi umbukayi muaba undi, ndi musue kulonda meyi a Mvidi Mukulu wanyi." 
Psalms119:116 Ungambuluishe bu muuvua mulaye, bua ngikale ne muoyi, kufuishi ditekemena dianyi bundu." 
Psalms119:117 Ikala tshieyemenu tshianyi, mpande; nenkebe biudi musue matuku onsu." 
Psalms119:118 Udi wipata bantu badi kabayi benza muudi musue, bualu meji abu adi ne dishima." 
Psalms119:119 Udi wimansha bantu babi ba pa buloba muaba udi bunyawu, ke pandi munange meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:120 Mubidi wanyi udi uzakala bua kukunemeka, ndi ne bowa bua mapangadika ebe." 
Psalms119:121 Ndi muenze muuvua muambe, kundekedi mu bianza bia badi bankengesha." 
Psalms119:122 Unshindikile ne: malu onsu neajike bimpe; bena kapeja, kabakengeshi kabidi!" 
Psalms119:123 Mesu anyi adi amona bilejileji, bualu ndi mpita kubala mukenji webe, ke pandi nkonka ne: “Neunsambe diba kaayi?”" 
Psalms119:124 Ndi nkusengelela ne: ungenzele bu mudi bulenga buebe, undongeshe biudi musue." 
Psalms119:125 Ndi muena mudimu webe, unzulula lungenyi luanyi, mmanye meyi ebe bimpe." 
Psalms119:126 Maweja-Nangila, diba ndikumbane dia wewe kuenza, mudimu webe wa kulumbuluisha, bualu bantu mbanyange mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:127 Ndi munange meyi ebe kumpala kua bintu bionsu, kumpala kua tshiamu tshia mpawungi wa menemene." 
Psalms119:128 Mikenji yebe yonsu ndi nyimona miakane, ndi mubenge malu onsu a dishima." 
Psalms119:129 Meyi audi muambe adi a dikema, ke pandi musuminyine bua kualonda." 
Psalms119:130 Diyi diebe didi dipetesha muntu butoke padiye udimanya, didi dipetesha bantu bapuekele lungenyi." 
Psalms119:131 Ndi nganyisha ne dijinga dionsu biudi wamba, bualu ndi njinga meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:132 Untangile, ungambuluishe, bu muuvua mupangadike bua bonsu badi bakunanga." 
Psalms119:133 Mukenji webe umpeshe bukole buonsu, bualu bubi nansha bumue kabuntshimunyi." 
Psalms119:134 Umpikule ku bianza bia badi bankengesha, bua nnemeke mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:135 Ungakidile, undongeshe biudi musue." 
Psalms119:136 Ndi ndila, binsonji bipueka, pandi mmona bantu kabayi balama mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:137 Maweja-Nangila, udi muakane, mapangadika ebe adi makane." 
Psalms119:138 Paudi muambile bantu meyi ebe, udi uleja buakane buebe ne bulelela buebe bujima." 
Psalms119:139 Tshiji tshidi tshinkuata pandi mmona baluishi banyi, bapue biudi muambe muoyi." 
Psalms119:140 Muaku webe mmukumbaje mudimu wawu, ndi muunange meme muena mudimu webe." 
Psalms119:141 Meme ndi muntu mukese udibu bapepeja, kadi tshiena mupue mikenji yebe muoyi." 
Psalms119:142 Buakane buebe mbua kashidi, mikenji yebe kabena mua kuyishintulula." 
Psalms119:143 Dibungama ne dikenga bidi binkuata, kadi meyi ebe ke disanka dianyi." 
Psalms119:144 Meyi ebe adi makane kashidi, ungumvuije, nempande." 
Psalms119:145 Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkubila ne muoyi wanyi mujima, ungitabe nendonde njila yebe." 
Psalms119:146 Ndi nkubila, fika ungambuluishe, ndame meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:147 Ne dinda dionsu, ndi ndomba diambuluisha diebe, ngindila diandamuna diebe." 
Psalms119:148 Ndi ntabala butuku kabuyi buanji kutshia, bua kuela meji ku malongesha ebe." 
Psalms119:149 Maweja-Nangila, teleja lubila luanyi bua buimpe buebe, umfululula bu muuvua mupangadike." 
Psalms119:150 Bantu badi bankengesha badi basemena pabuipi nanyi, badi kule ne mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:151 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi pabuipi, bantu batekemene meyi ebe onsu." 
Psalms119:152 Meyi ebe ndi muamanye ku kale, uvua muambe bua kashidi." 
Psalms119:153 Mona dikenga dianyi, unsungidile, bualu tshiena mpua mikenji yebe muoyi." 
Psalms119:154 Undumbuluile, umpandishe, umfululula bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:155 Lupandu ludi kule bua bantu badi kabayi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi balama mikenji yende, bualu kabena bitaba biudi musue." 
Psalms119:156 Maweja-Nangila, muoyi webe mmuwule ne dinanga, umpandishe bu muuvua mupangadike." 
Psalms119:157 Ndi ne bantu badi bankengesha ne bena lukuna banyi ba bungi, kadi tshiena mutupakane ku meyi ebe." 
Psalms119:158 Muoyi udi unsama pandi mmona bantu babi, bualu kabena balama malongesha ebe." 
Psalms119:159 Maweja-Nangila, mona mundi munange mikenji yebe; umpandishe bua buimpe buebe." 
Psalms119:160 Muaku onsu uudi wamba, udi amu pa wowo, mapangadika ebe onsu adi makane, adi kabidi bua kashidi." 
Psalms119:161 Bana ba bamfumu badi bankengesha kapayi bualu, meyi ebe ke andi ntshina." 
Psalms119:162 Ndi nsanka bua mukenji webe, bu mupete biuma bia bungi bia mushinga mukole." 
Psalms119:163 Ndi mubenge dishima, ndi mudikine, kadi ndi munange mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:164 Ndi nkutumbisha ku dituku misangu muanda mutekete bua mapangadika ebe makane. 
Psalms119:165 Bantu badi bananga mikenji yebe, badi ne disanka dia bungi, kabena mua kutetuka." 
Psalms119:166 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mutekemene, umpandishe, ndi ngenza muuvua muambe." 
Psalms119:167 Ndi ndama meyi ebe ne muoyi mujima, ndi muanange bikole." 
Psalms119:168 Eyowa, ndi nnemeka mikenji yebe ne meyi ebe; udi mumone bionsu bindi ngenza." 
Psalms119:169 Maweja-Nangila, teleja muadi wanyi ne luse, umpeshe lungenyi bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:170 Lubila luanyi lufike kuudi, umpandishe bu muuvua mulaye." 
Psalms119:171 Mishiku yanyi itangalaje butumbi buebe, bualu udi undongesha biudi musue." 
Psalms119:172 Ludimi luanyi lutumbishe biudi wamba, bualu meyi ebe onsu adi makane." 
Psalms119:173 Tshianza tshiebe tshingambuluishe, bualu ndi musungule mikenji yebe." 
Psalms119:174 Maweja-Nangila, dijinga dinene ndia wewe kumpandisha, mikenji yebe ke idi insankisha." 
Psalms119:175 Ngikale panu ne muoyi bua kukutumbisha, mapangadika ebe angambuluishe!" 
Psalms119:176 Ndi mupambuke bu mukoku mujimine; fika ungambuluishe meme muena mudimu webe, bualu tshiena mpua meyi ebe muoyi." 
Psalms120:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Pavua dikenga dinkuata, meme kubila Maweja-Nangila, kungitabaye." 
Psalms120:2 “Maweja-Nangila, umpandishe ku bianza bia bantu badi bashima, baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima.”" 
Psalms120:3 Nuenu badi baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima, ndikenga kaayi dianukengesha Mvidi Mukulu?" 
Psalms120:4 Neanukengeshe ne mikete mitue ya mvita, misakisha mu kapia ka makala." 
Psalms120:5 Pandi nsomba mu ditunga dia Mesheke, ne mu nzubu ya ntenta ya bena Kedare, ndiakabi dianyi." 
Psalms120:6 Ndi mupite kusomba munkatshi mua bantu badi babenga bupole. 
Psalms120:7 Pandi ngakula bua bupole, bobu badi bakeba mvita." 
Psalms121:1 Musambu wabena ngendu. Ndi ntangila ku mikuna minene: Kudi muntu udi mua kungambuluisha anyi? 
Psalms121:2 — Maweja-Nangila udi mufuke diulu ne buloba, ke udi ungambuluisha." 
Psalms121:3 Akuepule, kututshi dikasa dibi, akulame, kayi upungila!" 
Psalms121:4 Yeye ke udi ulama Izrayele, kayi ulala, kayi upungila." 
Psalms121:5 Neakulame, neikale papuipi nebe, neikale tshisokomenu tshiebe." 
Psalms121:6 Mu munya, diba kadiena dikuosha, nansha butuku ngondu kena ukutonda." 
Psalms121:7 Maweja-Nangila nealame muoyi webe, neakuepule ku bualu bubi buonsu." 
Psalms121:8 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila neakulame, muwaya ne muwafika, ku mpindiewu ne kashidi!" 
Psalms122:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu udi mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Ndisanka kaayi, dingakumvua pavuabu bangambile ne: “Tuye mu nzubu mua Maweja-Nangila!”" 
Psalms122:2 Yerushalayime, makasa etu mmafike ku nzubu kuebe." 
Psalms122:3 Yerushalayime udi tshimenga tshiasa bimpe, tshijingila ne bimana." 
Psalms122:4 Muebe ke mudi meku a Izrayele, meku a Maweja-Nangila afika bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, bu mudi mukenji wa bena Izrayele wamba." 
Psalms122:5 Muebe kabidi ke mudi nkuasa wa bumfumu, udi muana wa Davide usomba, bua kukosa nsambu." 
Psalms122:6 Jingilayi Yerushalayime bupole ne: “Bantu bakunange wewe Yerushalayime, basombe talalaa!" 
Psalms122:7 Bupole buikale mu ditunga diebe, ne mu nzubu yebe!" 
Psalms122:8 Bua dinanga dindi, munange bana betu ne balunda banyi, ndi nkujingila bupole." 
Psalms122:9 Bua dinanga dindi munange nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nkujingila bupole.”" 
Psalms123:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Mesu anyi mmatangile kuudi, wewe Maweja-Nangila udi musombe pa kuasa wa bumfumu mu diulu." 
Psalms123:2 Bu mudi mesu a bapika, matangile tshianza tshia mfumuabu, bu mudi mesu a muena mudimu mukaji matangile tshianza tshia mamuende wa nzubu, ke mudi mesu etu matangile kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, too ne muatuambuluishaye." 
Psalms123:3 Maweja-Nangila utuambuluishe, utuambuluishe, bualu bantu badi batupepeja bikole;" 
Psalms123:4 nsenda ya bena kapeja ne kapeja ka bena ditambisha mbitutonde. 
Psalms124:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu udi mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Bu Maweja-Nangila kayi netu… — Izrayele ambulule ne: 
Psalms124:2 “Bu Maweja-Nangila kayi netu”, — pavua bantu bajuka bua kutuluisha," 
Psalms124:3 pavuabu batufikila munda, bavua mua kutumina ne muoyi." 
Psalms124:4 Diba adi mayi avua mua kutupuekesha, musulu uvua mua kutujimija." 
Psalms124:5 Diba adi mavuala a mayi, avua mua kutupitshila pa mitu." 
Psalms124:6 Tuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, bualu kena mutufile mu menu abu bua kutudiabu." 
Psalms124:7 Tuakapandukamu, bu mudi nyunyi utuka mu bukondu bua mukuatshi wa tunyunyi; bukondu kupandika, tuetu kupanduka." 
Psalms124:8 Maweja-Nangila udi mufuke diulu ne buloba, yeye nkayende ke udi utuambuluisha." 
Psalms125:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Bantu badi beyemena Maweja-Nangila, mbafuane mukuna wa Siyone, udi kauyi utenkakana tshiendelele." 
Psalms125:2 Bu mudi mikuna milame Yerushalayime, ke mudi Maweja-Nangila ulama tshisa tshiende, mpindiewu ne kashidi." 
Psalms125:3 Bumfumu bua bantu babi, kabuena mua kushindama mu buloba bua bantu bakane, tshianana bantu bakane nebabuelakane mu malu mabi." 
Psalms125:4 Maweja-Nangila, bantu baudi mumone bakane ne ba malu mimpe, ubenzele bimpe." 
Psalms125:5 Kadi bantu badi balonda njila mikonyangale, kabidi ne badi benzela bakuabu bibi, Maweja-Nangila ubabutule! Izrayele asombe talalaa!" 
Psalms126:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Pavua Maweja-Nangila mutupingajile disanka mu Siyone, tuvua bu bantu badi balota." 
Psalms126:2 Tuetu kuseka, kuela mbila ya disanka. Mu bisamba bikuabu, bantu bavua bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmubenzele malu a bungi.”" 
Psalms126:3 Bushuwa, Maweja-Nangila mmutuenzele malu a bungi, tuvua ne disanka." 
Psalms126:4 Maweja-Nangila, tupingajila disanka tshiakabidi, bu muudi ufululula misulu miume." 
Psalms126:5 Muntu udi umiamina maminu, wenda udila, neele mbila ya disanka padiye unowa." 
Psalms126:6 Muntu udi uya kukuna ntete, wenda udila, neapingane, wenda wela mbila ya disanka, muambule bisumbu biende bia ntete." 
Psalms127:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu udi mu mukanda wa misambu ya Shelomu. Padi Maweja-Nangila kayi muibake nzubu, bibaki badi batata tshianana. Yeye kayi mulame tshimenga, balami badi batshisha tshianana." 
Psalms127:2 Nansha nuenu kabidi bajuka patshiatshia, bapitshisha diba dia kulala, baditatshisha bua kupeta tshiakudia tshienu, bidi tshianana. Maweja-Nangila udi utshipesha bantu bende, badiye munange patshidibu balale." 
Psalms127:3 Bana, ke tshiuma tshilelela tshia bena nzubu, ndifutu didi Maweja-Nangila ubapesha!" 
Psalms127:4 Bana ba balume badi muntu mupete mu bunsongalume buende, badi bu mikete mu tshianza tshia tshilobu." 
Psalms127:5 Muntu udi ne mikete eyi mu tshibubu tente, udi ne disanka! Yeye ulumbulula ne baluishi bende ku tshibuelelu tshia musoku, kabena mua kumufuisha bundu." 
Psalms128:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Bantu bonsu badi bitaba Maweja-Nangila, balonda njila wende, badi ne disanka!" 
Psalms128:2 Usanke ne tshiudi mupete ku mudimu webe. Wikale ne disanka, malu ebe onsu neikale bimpe!" 
Psalms128:3 Mu nzubu muebe Mukajebe ne ikale bu muonji wa mvinyo wa diminu, bana bebe ba balume nebakunyungulukile ku mesa, bu bana ba mitshi ya olive." 
Psalms128:4 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wela muntu, udi umuitaba lupemba nanku." 
Psalms128:5 Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba, biangatshile bu nzubu wende mu Siyone! Umone disanka dia mu Yerushalayime, pautshidi ne muoyi!" 
Psalms128:6 Neumone kabidi ndelanganyi yebe! Izrayele asombe talalaa! 
Psalms129:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu… Bavua bankengesha biangatshile ku buana buanyi too ne… — Izrayele ambulule ne: 
Psalms129:2 “Bavua bankengesha biangatshile ku buana buanyi.” — Kadi ki mbantshimune. 
Psalms129:3 Kunjulabu mubundabunda panyima, bu bantu badi badima budimi." 
Psalms129:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi muakane: kukosaye mionji ivua bantu babi bansuike. 
Psalms129:5 Baluishi ba Siyone bonsu bafue bundu! Bonsu buabu bayile kule! 
Psalms129:6 Buume bu bisosa bia pa nzubu bidi bidiuminyina kabiyi bitula. 
Psalms129:7 Muntu udi ukosa bisosa ebi, kabiena bimukumbane mu tshianza; nansha udi ubisuika, kabiena mua kuwula mu diboku." 
Psalms129:8 Bapitshi ba mu njila kababambi ne: “Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba! ” Tudi tunuela lupemba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. 
Psalms130:1 Musambu wa kena ngendu. Maweja-Nangila, ndi mu dikenga dinene, ndi nkubila, ungambuluishe." 
Psalms130:2 Teleja lubila luanyi, pandi nkutendakena." 
Psalms130:3 Maweja-Nangila, wewe mutangile bilema bietu, udi mua kupanda nnganyi?" 
Psalms130:4 Wewe udi ne luse, ke padi bantu bakunemeka." 
Psalms130:5 Ndi mutekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila, ne muoyi wanyi mujima, muindile diandamuna diende." 
Psalms130:6 Ndi mutekemene Maweja-Nangila, bipite bia mulami wa musoku, udi muindile bua butuku kutshiabu; eyowa, bipite bia mulami wa musoku udi muindile bua butuku kutshiabu." 
Psalms130:7 Bena Izrayele, Tekemenayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu udi muimpe, udi mua kunusungidila mishindu yonsu." 
Psalms130:8 Yeye ke udi mua kunusungidila ku bilema bienu bionsu. 
Psalms131:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu udi mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, tshiena ne ditambisha, mesu anyi ki nga muena ditambisha. Tshiena nkeba butumbi, nansha malu adi mampite." 
Psalms131:2 Kadi ndi mutukije, mushale mupuwe, bu mudi muana mutekete musombe padi mamuende. Bu mudi muana musombe mupuwe ke mundi meme." 
Psalms131:3 Izrayele, tekemena Maweja-Nangila, mpindiewu ne tshiendelele kashidi." 
Psalms132:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Maweja-Nangila, vuluka Davide ne lutatu luonsu luvuaye mutate." 
Psalms132:2 Davide kuditshipa kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, mulaye Mvidi Mukulu Mukole wa Yakobe ne:" 
Psalms132:3 “Tshiena mbuela mu nzubu muanyi, nansha ndiolola pa bulalu bua kuikishila," 
Psalms132:4 nansha mbuita kuisu, nansha mbungila," 
Psalms132:5 pandi tshiyi mupetele Maweja-Nangila muaba, tshiyi mupetele Mvidi Mukulu Mukole wa Yakobe nzubu!”" 
Psalms132:6 Tuetu kumvua bamba ne: mushete wa tshijila udi mu musoku wa Efrata, tudi bausangane mu mpata ya Yayire." 
Psalms132:7 Tubuelayi mu nzubu mua Maweja-Nangila, tuinyike mitu ku makasa ende." 
Psalms132:8 Maweja-Nangila, uye ne mushete wa tshijila, muaba udi butumbi buebe, ufike mu muaba webe wa kuikishila." 
Psalms132:9 Batuangaji bebe bavuale buakane, bu mudibu bavuale bilamba biabu; bantu badi bakuitaba bele mbila ya disanka!" 
Psalms132:10 Kubengi mukalenga uuvua mulabe manyi, bua dinanga dia muena mudimu webe Davide." 
Psalms132:11 Maweja-Nangila uvua muditshipe kudi Davide ne mutshipu, udiye kayi mua kulekela ne: “Nensungule umue wa ku bana bebe ba balume, bua kukupinganaye mu bukalenga." 
Psalms132:12 Muanebe wa balume yeye mulame ndondu wanyi ne mikenji indi mumuelele, wende muana kabidi neasombe mu nkuasa wa bamfumu kashidi. ”" 
Psalms132:13 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua musungule Siyone, mujinge bua kuikalaye muaba wende wa kusomba." 
Psalms132:14 Kuambaye ne: “Ewu ke muaba wanyi wa kuikishila, ke muaba undi musue kusomba matuku onsu." 
Psalms132:15 Eyowa, nengenzele Siyone bimpe, mmupeshe tshiakudia, nempeshe bapele bende biakudia bionsu, bidibu nabi dijinga." 
Psalms132:16 Nempeteshe batuangaji lupandu mu Siyone, badi bitaba nebele mbila ya disanka." 
Psalms132:17 Nempatuishe mukalenga wa lumu, wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide mu Siyone. Nentekemu mukalenga undi mulabe manyi, bu mudibu bateka muendu mutemesha." 
Psalms132:18 Nemfuishe baluishi bende bundu, tshifulu tshia bukalenga netshikenke ku mutu kuende.”" 
Psalms133:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu udi mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Eyi, bidi bilenga, bidi disanka bua kusomba pamue bu bena muntu!" 
Psalms133:2 Bidi bu manyi a mushinga mukole, mela mu mutu mua muntu mubikila ku didia, apueka ne ku muedi wende. Bidi bu muedi wa mutuangaji munene, upueka ne nshingu wa tshilamba tshiende." 
Psalms133:3 Bidi bu lumuma, lupueka pa mukuna wa Ermone, pa mukuna wa Siyone. Bualu mu Siyone ke mudi Maweja-Nangila muteke disanka ne muoyi kashidi." 
Psalms134:1 Musambu wa bena ngendu. Elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, nuenu bonsu badi bamuenzela mudimu, bimana mu nzubu muende butuku." 
Psalms134:2 Ololayi bianza bienu ku muaba wa tshijila, nuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms134:3 Maweja-Nangila anuele lupemba, biangatshile ku nzubu wende mu Siyone, yeye ngudi mufuke diulu ne buloba!" 
Psalms135:1 Aleluya, Maweja-Nangila atumbe! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, mutumbishayi nuenu badi bamukukuila," 
Psalms135:2 bimana mu nzubu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, mu lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Psalms135:3 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu mmulenga; mutumbishayi mu biombelu, bualu mmulenga." 
Psalms135:4 Maweja-Nangila mmusungule Yakobe, musungule Izrayele bua ikale tshintu tshiende." 
Psalms135:5 Ndi mumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila udi munene; Mukalenga wetu mmupite mvidie yonsu. 
Psalms135:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wenza bionsu bidiye musue, nansha mu diulu nansha pa buloba, nansha mu mayi manene, nansha mu kandondu ka buloba." 
Psalms135:7 Udi ubandisha mavuba ku ntengu ya buloba, ulokesha mvula wa mipenya, utuma tshipepele tshikole." 
Psalms135:8 Yeye kabidi nguvua mubutule bamuanabute ba bantu ne ba nyama mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. 
Psalms135:9 Ku tshianza tshia batumibue bende, kuenzejaye bishima ne malu a dikema, — munda muebe wewe Ejipitu! — kukengeshaye mfumu wa bena Ejipitu ne bena mudimu bende bonsu." 
Psalms135:10 Kutapaye bisamba bia bungi kubutulaye bakalenga ba lumu; 
Psalms135:11 bobu abu ke Sikone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane ne bakalenga bonsu ba Kenaane." 
Psalms135:12 Kufilaye buloba buabu ku bumpianyi, ku bumpianyi bua tshisa tshiende tshia Izrayele." 
Psalms135:13 Maweja-Nangila, lumu luebe ndua kashidi, udi Mvidi Mukulu mu nkama ne nkama ya bidimu." 
Psalms135:14 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila udi wakuila bantu bende, udi utabalela badi bamukukuila." 
Psalms135:15 Mpingu ya bisamba bikuabu, nansha yoyi ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole nansha tshia mpawungi, mbintu bienza kudi bantu." 
Psalms135:16 Idi ne mukana, kayiyi yakula, idi ne mesu, kayiyi imona;" 
Psalms135:17 idi ne matshi, kayiyi yumvua. Kayena yakula nansha kakese!" 
Psalms135:18 Bantu badi bayenza nebayifuane! Kabidi yonsu udi mutekemena kudiyi neayifuane! 
Psalms135:19 Nuenu bena Izrayele, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila. Nuenu batuangaji ba ku ndelanganyi ya Arone, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms135:20 Nuenu bena levi, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila. Nuenu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, elayi Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Psalms135:21 Yerushalayime, ela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila wa bungi, yeye ngudi muase pa mukuna wa Siyone. Aleluya, Maweja-Nangila atue ntunku!" 
Psalms136:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu mmulenga, dinanga diende ndia kashidi" 
Psalms136:2 Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu mutambe bunene, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:3 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila mutambe bunene, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:4 Yeye nkayende mmuenze malu manene a dikema, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:5 Kuenzaye diulu ne meji, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:6 Kujadikaye buloba pa mayi manene, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:7 Kuenzaye mabulunge manene; bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:8 diba bua kuludika munya, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:9 mitotu ne ngondu bua kuludika butuku, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:10 Kushipaye banabute ba bena Ejipitu, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:11 Kupatulaye tshisa tshiende tshia Izrayele mu Ejipitu, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:12 Kulejaye bukole buende, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:13 Kukosaye mayi manene bitupa bibidi, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:14 bua kupitshishilamu tshisa tshia Izrayele, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:15 kadi kuinamu tshiluilu tshia mfumu wa bena Ejipitu, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:16 Kulombolaye tshisa tshiende mu tshipela, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:17 Kushipaye bakalenga banene, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:18 kushipaye bakalenga ba lumu, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi:" 
Psalms136:19 nSikone, mukalenga wa bena Amore, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:20 ne Oge, mukalenga wa Bashane, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:21 Kufilaye buloba buabu ku bumpianyi, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:22 uvua mufile bumpianyi kudi Izrayele muena mudimu wende, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:23 Patuvua mu dikenga kutuvulukaye, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi," 
Psalms136:24 kutusungidilaye kudi bena lukuna betu, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:25 Udi upesha bifukibua bionsu tshiakudia, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi." 
Psalms136:26 Tuelayi Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu tuasakidila, bualu dinanga diende ndia kashidi!" 
Psalms137:1 Tuvua basombe ku misulu ya mu Babilone, tuvua tudila, tutenda Siyone." 
Psalms137:2 Tuvua bakudike bisanji bietu ku mitshi ya ku muelelu wa musulu. 
Psalms137:3 Muaba awu, bantu bavua batukuata ku bupika, bavua batulomba bua tubimbile misambu; bavua batukengesha abu bavua batulomba misambu ya disanka bamba ne: “Tuimbilayi misambu, musambu umue wa Siyone!”" 
Psalms137:4 — Tuetu kudikonka ne: tudi mua kuimba, musambu wa Maweja-Nangila, mu buloba bua benyi mmunyi?" 
Psalms137:5 Yerushalayime, meme mukupue muoyi, diboku dianyi dia bukole difulame!" 
Psalms137:6 Meme tshiyi nkuvuluka, tshiyi nsanka nsanguluka bualu buebe, ludimi luanyi lulamate mu tshilakalaka!" 
Psalms137:7 Maweja-Nangila, kupangi kuvuluka malu avua bena Edome benze, dituku divuabu bakuate Yerushalayime: bavua bela mbila ne: “Butulayi tshimenga, tshibutulayi ne ku bitaku biatshi!”" 
Psalms137:8 Wewe Babilone wabutuki ewu, bantu bakupingajile bibi biudi mutuenzele, nebikale ne disanka!" 
Psalms137:9 Bantu bakuata bana bebe, babazaza ku dibue, nebikale ne disanka!" 
Psalms138:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkutumbisha ne muoyi wanyi mujima. Ku mesu kua batumibue ba mu diulu ndi nkutumbisha ne misambu," 
Psalms138:2 ndi ela panshi mu nzubu webe wa tshijila. Mvidi Mukulu wa kashidi, ndi nkutumbisha bua bulenga buebe ne bulelela buebe, bualu uvua muvuluke dilaya diebe, mutuvua katuyi batekemene." 
Psalms138:3 Pamvua mukubikile, uvua munteleje; wewe kumpetesha muoyi mukole ne dikanda." 
Psalms138:4 Maweja-Nangila, bakalenga bonsu ba pa buloba bakutumbishe, padibu bumvua biudi wamba!" 
Psalms138:5 Batumbishe midimu yebe bimba ne: “Lumu lua Maweja-Nangila ndunene. 
Psalms138:6 Maweja-Nangila udi mulu mu diulu kadi udi umona bapuekele, umanya bena ditambisha pa bule.”" 
Psalms138:7 Pandi meme nsomba mu dikenga, neundame ne muoyi nansha mudi baluishi banyi bamfikila munda, neolole tshianza tshiebe tshia bukole tshimpandishe." 
Psalms138:8 Maweja-Nangila, ungenzele malu aa. Wewe muena dinanga dia kashidi, kulekedi mpindiewu, bantu bauvua mufuke ku bianza biebe." 
Psalms139:1 Musambu wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, udi mujingulule muoyi wanyi, udi mummanye:" 
Psalms139:2 Udi mumanye pandi nsomba nansha mbika, majinga anyi udi muamanye kale." 
Psalms139:3 Udi umona pandi pambelu nansha pandi mu nzubu, udi mumanye bionsu bindi ngenza." 
Psalms139:4 Tshiyi muanji kuamba diyi mukana muanyi, wewe ukadi mumanye bionsu bindi musue kuamba." 
Psalms139:5 Udi kumpala ne kunyima kuanyi kabidi, udi muntenteke tshianza tshiebe." 
Psalms139:6 Mushindu uudi mummanye udi unkemesha, mmupite bionsu bindi mua kumvua." 
Psalms139:7 Nenkusokome muaba kaayi? Muaba kaayi undi mua kukunyema? 
Psalms139:8 Nansha meme mubande mu diulu, udimu; nansha mulale mu kandondu, udi anumu." 
Psalms139:9 Nansha meme muye kudi diba dipatukila, nansha muye kusomba kudidi dibuelela," 
Psalms139:10 nansha kuinaku, tshianza tshiebe tshidi tshinkuata, diboku diebe dia bukole kadiena dindekela." 
Psalms139:11 Meme muambe ne: “Miidima imbuikile, butuku bungidile!”" 
Psalms139:12 Miidima yandamuke butoke ku mesu ebe, butuku nebukenke bu munya; miidima nansha butoke bidi bia momumue ku mesu ebe." 
Psalms139:13 Wewe ngudi mumfuke mumfumbe munda mua mamu. 
Psalms139:14 Maweja-Nangila, tuasakidila, bualu udi muenzele mubidi wanyi, malu a dikema. Biudi muenze bidi bia dikema, ndi mubimanye." 
Psalms139:15 Mubidi wanyi kauvua musokome ku mesu ebe, pauvua umfuka mu musokoku, umfumba munda mua mamu." 
Psalms139:16 Uvua mummone ntshidi mu lukutu; mu mukanda webe, ukavua mufunde matuku onsu andi ndala panu, dimue dia kudiwu kadiyi dianji kubanga." 
Psalms139:17 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mbikole bua meme kumanya meji ebe, mmapite bungi!" 
Psalms139:18 Mua kuabala mmunyi? Adi mapite lusenga bungi. Nansha meme muabale, tshiena mfika ku dikujingulula." 
Psalms139:19 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi butula bantu babi, ipata bashipianganyi ku mesu anyi." 
Psalms139:20 Badi bakutela bua kudinga, badi batela dina diebe bua kushima." 
Psalms139:21 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mbenga bonsu badi bakubenga. Ndi nkina bonsu badi bakukina." 
Psalms139:22 Ndi mbakina bikole, mbaluishi banyi." 
Psalms139:23 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, jingulula malu adi mu muoyi wanyi, ummanye. Untete, umanye majinga anyi onsu." 
Psalms139:24 Manya ne tshiena mukukuile bamvidie ba dishima, undombole mu njila webe matuku onsu." 
Psalms140:1 Musambu wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. 
Psalms140:2 Maweja-Nangila, unsungidile kudi bantu babi, umpandishe kudi bena tshikisu." 
Psalms140:3 Meji abu adi a kuenzelangana bibi, badi bakeba ndukilu dituku dionsu." 
Psalms140:4 Badi batuishe ludimi luabu bu mudi nyoka, lulengu lua nyoka wa ntoka ludi ku mishiku yabu." 
Psalms140:5 Maweja-Nangila, undame bua tshiponyi mu bianza bia bantu babi; umpandishe kudi bena tshikisu, badi belangana meji a kunteya mukolu." 
Psalms140:6 Bena ditambisha badi banteya, badi bangela masoka ne makondu, bantekela mateyi mu njila bua kunkuata." 
Psalms140:7 Kadi meme kuambila Maweja-Nangila ne: “Wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Maweja-Nangila unteleje pandi nkutendakena. 
Psalms140:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wewe ke bukole buanyi budi bundama, wewe ke udi ulama mutu wanyi diba dia mvita." 
Psalms140:9 Maweja-Nangila, kuanyishi majinga a bantu babi, kulekedi majinga abu akumbane.” Bantu badi banduisha badi ne ditambisha dia bungi; bavua banjingila diakabi, diakabi edi dibapingene bobu meme!" 
Psalms140:10  
Psalms140:11 Makala a kapia abaponene pambidi. Mvidi Mukulu abashidishe mu kapia, kabamonyi mua kupatukamu!" 
Psalms140:12 Muntu udi utumpilangana malu kashadi ne muoyi mu ditunga. Diakabi dilonde muntu wa tshikisu, kadimulekedi." 
Psalms140:13 Maweja-Nangila, ndi mumanye ne: udi ubingisha bapele, udi ulumbuluila bena dikenga." 
Psalms140:14 Eyowa, bakane nebakutumbishe wewe Maweja-Nangila, bantu ba malu mimpe nebashale ne muoyi ku mesu ebe." 
Psalms141:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkubikila, fika lukasa ungambuluishe, umvua lubila lundi nkuela." 
Psalms141:2 Dilomba dianyi dibande kuudi, bu muinshi wa kamonya, dilomba dianyi dikale bu mulambu wa dilolu." 
Psalms141:3 Maweja-Nangila, lama mukana muanyi, kuba mishiku yanyi." 
Psalms141:4 Unkandike bua tshiyi kuamba miaku mibi, nansha kuenza bualu bubi, tshiyi kuidikija bantu badi benzela bakuabu bibi. Undame tshiyi kudia nansha tshiakudia tshidibu banange." 
Psalms141:5 Ndi nganyisha muntu wa malu mimpe antute, muntu muakane andengeje; tshiena mua kubenga, ndi munange. Kadi padi bantu babi benza malu mabi, tshiena ndekela bua kukutendelela." 
Psalms141:6 Mvua muambe ne: bena lukuna banyi nebumvue bualu ebu, patutabu bandumbulula babu ku lubuebue." 
Psalms141:7 Bu mudi mutanta upandika mu buloba, kandondu ka bafue nekunzulule mukana muaku, bua kubakula mifuba yabu ikale mitangalake." 
Psalms141:8 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mesu anyi mmatangile kuudi, ndi nyemena kuudi, ulame muoyi wanyi." 
Psalms141:9 Umpandishe ku mateyi adibu banteya, kudi bantu aba benji ba bibi." 
Psalms141:10 Bantu ba tshikisu aba bapone mu buteyi buabu, meme mpande!" 
Psalms142:1 Kasala ka mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, muimbe pavuaye utendelela musokome mu lubuebue." 
Psalms142:2 Ndi ngela mbila kudi Maweja-Nangila, ndi ntendakena Maweja-Nangila ne mbila mikole." 
Psalms142:3 Ndi mmukuatshila tshilumbu, mmuleja dikenga dianyi." 
Psalms142:4 Pandi nteketa mu maboku, wewe udi mumanye kundi nya. Bantu mbateya mu njila undi nyila." 
Psalms142:5 Tangila ku nseke yanyi, umone: kakuena muntu udi undama, tshitshiena kabidi ne muaba wa kusokomena, kakuena muntu udi utangila buanyi bualu." 
Psalms142:6 Ndi ngela lubila kuudi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, ngamba ne: wewe ke tshisokomenu tshianyi, ke tshianyi tshintu tshindi natshi, mu buloba ebu butudi basombe." 
Psalms142:7 Teleja muadi wanyi, bualu ndi mushikile. Umpandishe kudi bantu badi bankengesha, mbampite bukole." 
Psalms142:8 Umpatule mu lukanu, mmone mua kukutumbisha pamue ne bakuitabi bebe, pawikala mungenzele bimpe." 
Psalms143:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Maweja-Nangila, teleja mundi nkutendelela, umvua mundi nkutendakena. Wewe udi diyi dimue, ukumbaja biuvua mulaye." 
Psalms143:2 Ndi muena mudimu webe, kungashi tshilumbu, bualu kakuena muntu muakane ku mesu ebe." 
Psalms143:3 Muluishi wanyi udi unkengesha; udi munshinda panshi bua kundiata, udi umbueja mu miidima ya bafue, muvua bantu bamane kufua kale." 
Psalms143:4 Mu maboku mmutekete, tshiena ne bukole kabidi bua kuenza bualu." 
Psalms143:5 Ndi mvuluka matuku akadi mamane kupita, ngela meji a bionsu biudi muenze, nganyina mudimu webe." 
Psalms143:6 Ndi ngolola bianza kuudi, ndiumvua ku mesu ebe ne nyota bu buloba buume bukeba mayi." 
Psalms143:7 Maweja-Nangila, ungitabe lukasa, ndi mushikile. Kundekedi, tshianana nemfue." 
Psalms143:8 Ummanyishe bulenga buebe ne dinda dionsu, bualu ndi mutekemene kuudi; ummanyishe njila wa meme kulonda, bualu ndi mutume muoyi wanyi kuudi." 
Psalms143:9 Maweja-Nangila unsungidile kudi baluishi banyi; kuudi wewe ke kundi nyemena. 
Psalms143:10 Undongeshe mua kuenza tshiudi musue, bualu wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Mueyelu webe mulenga undudike mu njila udi kayi ne njiwu." 
Psalms143:11 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, umfululule. Wewe udi ulama malaya ebe, umpatule mu dikenga." 
Psalms143:12 Wewe muena bulenga buonsu, upuwishe baluishi banyi, ubutule bena lukuna banyi bonsu, bualu ndi muena mudimu webe." 
Psalms144:1 Musambu wa mu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide. Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila, Lubuebue luanyi tuasakidila, yeye ngudi undongesha mua kuluangana mvita." 
Psalms144:2 Yeye ke ditekemena dianyi ne tshisokomenu tshianyi, muaba wanyi mukole undi nsokomena, ne ngabu wanyi wa lupandu. Yeye ngudi untekeshila bisamba bia bantu." 
Psalms144:3 Maweja-Nangila, muntu mene nnganyi bua wewe kumutangila? Muntu mene nnganyi bua wewe kumuvuluka?" 
Psalms144:4 Muntu udi amu bu lupepela, matuku ende a panu adi bu mundidimbi udi ujimina." 
Psalms144:5 Maweja-Nangila, puekesha diulu diebe, utuluke; osha mikuna ne lusongu lua munu webe." 
Psalms144:6 Penya miaba yonsu bu miele ya mvula, tuma mikete yebe miaba yonsu." 
Psalms144:7 Oluela tshianza tshiebe mu diulu, umpandishe, unsungidile ku njiwu, ku bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu," 
Psalms144:8 badi ne dishima mukana, buupula ne bianza biabu mutshipu udibu baditshipa." 
Psalms144:9 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi musue kukuimbila musambu mupiamupia, ndi nkusamuna ne lunzenze lua nshinga dikumi:" 
Psalms144:10 “Wewe ngudi wambuluisha bakalenga, ngudi upandisha muena mudimu webe Davide.”" 
Psalms144:11 Umpandishe ku muele wa lufu unsungidile kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi ne dishima mukana, buupula ne bianza biabu mutshipu udibu baditshipa." 
Psalms144:12 Bana betu ba balume bikale bu mitshi idi ikola biakane biangatshile ku buana buayi! Bana betu ba bakaji bikale ba mpala mimpe, bu mudi makunji mazola adibu balengeja nawu nzubu ya bakalenga!" 
Psalms144:13 Mayeba etu uwule ne bintu bia mishindu yonsu! Mikoku yetu mu mpata, ivulangane misangu tshinunu, nansha misangu binunu dikumi!" 
Psalms144:14 Ngombe yetu itante! Mvita, tshimuangi ne mbila mikole mu misesu, biyile kule!" 
Psalms144:15 Tshisa tshidi ne bintu ebi, tshikale ne disanka! Tshisa tshidi tshitangila Maweja-Nangila bu Mvidi Mukulu watshi, tshikale ne disanka!" 
Psalms145:1 Musambu wamu mukanda wa misambu ya Davide, bua kutumbisha nawu Mvidi Mukulu. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, wewe udi Mukalenga, nemmanyishe bantu buneme buebe, nenkuele tuasakidila kashidi." 
Psalms145:2 Nenkuele tuasakidila matuku onsu, nkutumbishe kashidi." 
Psalms145:3 Wewe Maweja-Nangila udi munene, ne bantu bonsu nebakutumbishe, bualu buneme buebe kabuena ndekelu." 
Psalms145:4 Ndelanganyi yonsu imanyishangane biudi muenze, yambilangane bukole buebe." 
Psalms145:5 Nengambile bantu bumfumu buebe, lumu luebe ne butumbi buebe, nembalondele malu a dikema audi muenze." 
Psalms145:6 Bantu bambilangane bua bukole buebe budi bukuata bowa! Kadi meme nemmanyishe malu manene audi muenze. 
Psalms145:7 Bonsu bavuluke bulenga buebe kabuyi kuamba, batumbishe ne disanka bua paudi ukumbaja malaya ebe!" 
Psalms145:8 Maweja-Nangila udi muimpe ne luse. Kuena ufika munda lukasa. Bulenga buebe kabuena kuamba. 
Psalms145:9 Maweja-Nangila udi musue bantu bonsu, udi munange bonsu badiye mufuke." 
Psalms145:10 Maweja-Nangila, bantu bonsu bakutumbishe! Badi bakulamata bakuele tuasakidila!" 
Psalms145:11 Batumbishe bukalenga buebe! Bambilangane bukole buebe! 
Psalms145:12 Nanku nebamanyishe bukua bantu bukole buebe, ne bukalenga buebe bua lumu." 
Psalms145:13 Maweja-Nangila, bukalenga buebe mbua kashidi. Bumfumu buebe nebushale mu bidimu bionsu. Udi ukumbaja malaya ebe. Udi ne muoyi muimpe mu malu onsu audi muenze." 
Psalms145:14 Udi wimanyika bantu bonsu badi badishinda, ukankamika bonsu badi batekete." 
Psalms145:15 Bonsu mbakutangile wewe Maweja-Nangila, batekemena bua ubapeshe tshiakudia diba didibu batshikengela." 
Psalms145:16 Wewe ke udi upesha muntu yonsu tshintu, ujikija dikenga diende" 
Psalms145:17 Buakane bua Maweja-Nangila budi bumueneka, mu malu onsu adiye wenza. Bulenga buende budi budileja mu midimu yende yonsu." 
Psalms145:18 Maweja-Nangila udi pabuipi ne bantu badi bamubila, udi pabuipi ne bonsu badi bamubila ne muoyi umue." 
Psalms145:19 Udi witaba malomba a badi bamulamate, ubasungidila padiye umvua bamubila." 
Psalms145:20 Maweja-Nangila udi ukuba bonsu badi bamunanga, kadi ubutula bantu babi bonsu." 
Psalms145:21 Mukana muanyi mutumbishe Maweja-Nangila ne misambu! Bionsu bidi ne muoyi biele Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila tuasakidila bua kashidi! 
Psalms146:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Muoyi wanyi tumbisha Maweja-Nangila!" 
Psalms146:2 Nentumbishe Mvidi Mukulu wanyi matuku onsu antshidi ne muoyi, nemmuimbile misambu bidimu bionsu bindi panu." 
Psalms146:3 Kanutekemenyi baneme: bualu amu mbantu. Kabena mua kunupandisha. 
Psalms146:4 Padibu bafua, badi babajika, malu avuabu bapangadika mua kuenza adi ajimina bu bobu." 
Psalms146:5 Muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe wambuluisha, mutekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, mmuena diakalenga!" 
Psalms146:6 Tekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila matuku onsu. Yeye ke udi muenze diulu ne buloba, mayi manene ne bintu bionsu bidimu." 
Psalms146:7 Udi ulumbuluila bantu badibu bakengesha, upesha badi ne nzala tshiakudia, usulula badi mu nkanu." 
Psalms146:8 Maweja-Nangila udi utabaja mpofu, ubandulula badi biname, munange badi bamulamata." 
Psalms146:9 Maweja-Nangila udi ulama bantu badibu bipata, wambuluisha muana nshiya ne mukaji mukamba, kadi udi unyanga malu adi bantu babi bapangadika mua kuenza." 
Psalms146:10 Siyone, Maweja-Nangila mmukalenga kashidi. Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu webe bidimu ne bidimu. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms147:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Mbimpe kuimbila Mvidi Mukulu wetu misambu, bidi biakane kumutumbisha bu mudiye musue!" 
Psalms147:2 Maweja-Nangila mmuibake Yerushalayime, mmusangishe bena Izrayele bavua mu bupika." 
Psalms147:3 Udi usamba bantu badi ne dibungama mu muoyi, ubondapa padibu batapika." 
Psalms147:4 Yeye kabidi ke udi ubala mitotu bungi buayi, uyinyika yonsu mena." 
Psalms147:5 Maweja-Nangila wetu mmunene. Udi ne bukole buonsu, lungenyi luende kaluena kuamba." 
Psalms147:6 Maweja-Nangila udi ubandisha bapuekele, kadi upuekesha bantu babi too ne mu buloba." 
Psalms147:7 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila misambu numuele tuasakidila, nuimbile Mvidi Mukulu wetu lunzenze." 
Psalms147:8 Yeye ke udi ubuikila diulu ne mavuba, ulokesha mvula pa buloba, umenesha bisosa pa mikuna." 
Psalms147:9 Udi udisha nyama ne bana ba tshikololu, padibi bikeba tshiakudia." 
Psalms147:10 Dikanda dia nyama wa kabalu kena nadi bualu, nansha bukole bua muntu kabuena bumusankisha," 
Psalms147:11 udi muanyishe bantu badi bamumanya bu Mvidi Mukulu wabu, batekemena bulenga buende." 
Psalms147:12 Yerushalayime, ela Maweja-Nangila mbila ya disanka. Siyone, tumbisha Mvidi Mukulu webe," 
Psalms147:13 bualu udi mukulame, wenzela bana ba mu nzubu muebe bonsu bimpe." 
Psalms147:14 Maweja-Nangila udi ubueja bupole mu buloba buebe, ukupesha ntete ya kuenza bukula mimpe ya bungi." 
Psalms147:15 Udi utuma mikenji yende pa buloba, diyi diende difika lukasa." 
Psalms147:16 Udi ulokesha neje bu busu bua ndanda. Umuangalaja lumuma lukuatakane bu butu. 
Psalms147:17 Udi unyaka tubue tua mashika, kakuyi muntu ukolela mashika adiye utuma." 
Psalms147:18 Padiye utumina tubue tua mashika etu diyi, tudi tuenguluka, yeye mutume lupepele, mayi adi apueka." 
Psalms147:19 Udi umanyisha tshisa tshiende diyi diende, ufundila Izrayele mikenji ya muoyi." 
Psalms147:20 Kena muenzele tshisa tshikuabu nansha tshimue nanku, tshisa nansha tshimue katshiena tshimanya meyi ende. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms148:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, nuenu badi mu diulu, mutumbishayi nuenu bonsu badi mulu." 
Psalms148:2 Batumibue bonsu ba Mvidi Mukulu, bamutumbishe. Biluilu biende bionsu, mutumbishayi." 
Psalms148:3 Diba ne ngondu, numutumbishe. Mitotu yonsu idi ikenka, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:4 Tshibuashibuashi tshia mulu, nuenu kabidi mayi adi madiunguije mulu, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:5 Bintu bionsu bitumbishe Maweja-Nangila, bualu wakabitumina diyi, biobi kuenzeka." 
Psalms148:6 Kubitekaye mu miaba yabi kashidi, kubielela mikenji idi kayiyi mua kukupula." 
Psalms148:7 Nuenu bonsu badi pa buloba, nuenu mayi manene ne bidika bidimu, numutumbishe," 
Psalms148:8 nuenu kabidi kapia ne mabue a mvula, neje ne dibungi, tshipepele tshidi tshitumikila diyi diende, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:9 Nuenu mikuna minene ne mikese, mitshi ya bimuma ne mitshi yonsu ya sedre, numutumbishe," 
Psalms148:10 nyama ya mu ditu ne ya pambelu, nyunyi ya mulu ne bilandadi, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:11 Nuenu bakalenga ba pa buloba ne bantu bonsu, bana ba bamfumu ne balombodi ba buloba, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:12 Nuenu bana ba balume ne ba bakaji, bansongalume ne bakulumpe, numutumbishe." 
Psalms148:13 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, bualu yeye nkayende ke udi ne dina dia lumu. Udi ne buneme pa buloba ne mu diulu." 
Psalms148:14 Kupeshaye tshisa tshiende lumu, kutshizangika. Kutumbishaye bantu badi bamulamata, kutumbisha tshisa tshiende tshijima tshia bena Izrayele. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms149:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu mupiamupia. Bantu batumbishe Maweja-Nangila muaba udi bena diende basangile!" 
Psalms149:2 Izrayele, usanke, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi mukufuki webe. Bena Siyone nusanke, bualu udi mukalenga wenu." 
Psalms149:3 Bantu batumbishe Maweja-Nangila ne maja, bamuimbile, bamusamune ne lunkombe." 
Psalms149:4 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ne disanka bua tshisa tshiende, udi utumbisha bapuekele, ubapandisha." 
Psalms149:5 Bantu badi balamata Maweja-Nangila, basanke, batumbishe Mvidi Mukulu! Bele mbila ya disanka nansha butuku!" 
Psalms149:6 Batumbishe Mvidi Mukulu ne meyi majikuke, ne muele wa nkanza mu tshianza!" 
Psalms149:7 Basombuele bukua bisamba, banyoke bukua matunga," 
Psalms149:8 bele bakalenga babu nkanu, basuike balombodi ba mu bukalenga buabu ne nkanu." 
Psalms149:9 Babalumbuluishe mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, babakosele tshibawu pa tshiotshi. Badi balamata Maweja-Nangila bonsu bikale ne lumu. Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Psalms150:1 Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya! Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu mu nzubu wende wa tshijila. Nutumbishayi mu diulu mudi makole ende!" 
Psalms150:2 Mutumbishayi bua bishima biende, mutumbishayi bua buneme buende kabuyi ndekelu!" 
Psalms150:3 Mutumbishayi ne mpungi, mutumbishayi ne lunkombe ne tshisanji!" 
Psalms150:4 Mutumbishayi ne maja ne ngoma, mutumbishayi ne lunzenze ne nshiba!" 
Psalms150:5 Mutumbishayi ne ludibu lua muadi muimpe, mutumbishayi ne ludibu lua lumu." 
Psalms150:6 Bionsu bidi ne muoyi bitumbishe Maweja-Nangila! Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila, Aleluya!" 
Proverbs1:1 Shelomu, muana wa Davide, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, ke muena nsumuinu idi mifunda eyi." 
Proverbs1:2 Nsumuinu eyi idi ilongesha bantu mua kusomba biakane ne meji mu bantu. 
Proverbs1:3 Idi ilongesha bantu mua kupeta lungenyi, bua balonde njila wa buakane, bikale ne muoyi umue, kabayi badinga bantu bakuabu!" 
Proverbs1:4 Nsumuinu idi ileja bantu badi kabayi banji kumona malu panu njila udibu mua kulonda; idi ilongesha bansongalume malu adibu ne bua kuelangana meji. 
Proverbs1:5 Nansha bena meji batshidi amu mua kulonga malu makuabu padibu babala nsumuinu eyi. Badi ne lungenyi nebapetelemu njila wa kulonda. 
Proverbs1:6 Nebajingulule mianu ne malu masokome bia bantu badi balongesha mudi meji. 
Proverbs1:7 Muntu udi musue kupeta meji, atshine, kabidi anemeke Maweja-Nangila. Bantu badi bapepeja malongesha ne mibelu bia bena meji mbatshimbakane." 
Proverbs1:8 Muananyi, uteleje tshidi tatuebe ukulongesha. Kupetudi mibelu ya kudi mamuebe." 
Proverbs1:9 Yoyi neikupe lumu bu nsala wa kalumbandi muasa ku mutu, nansha bu mabue a busanga adibu bela mu nshingu." 
Proverbs1:10 Muananyi, padi bansongalume babi basue kukufikisha ku bubi, kuanyishi to. Kubalondi" 
Proverbs1:11 padibu bakuamba ne: “Vuaku, tuye kualamina bantu mu njila bua kubashipa, tubajikidile, tubabunde, nansha bobu kabayi batuenzele bibi." 
Proverbs1:12 Tubakuate, tubashipe patshidibu ne dikanda. Tubafikishe ku lufu; tuenze tuetu mene mudimu udi lufu nawu!" 
Proverbs1:13 Tubanyenge bionsu bidibu nabi, tuwuje yetu nzubu." 
Proverbs1:14 Luaku, tuye. Neupete tshiebe tshintu, bualu netubiteke mu tshibombu tshimue!”" 
Proverbs1:15 Muananyi, kuendakanyi ne bantu ba mushindu ewu to. Umbuka mu njila yabu." 
Proverbs1:16 Bualu badi bipatshila bua kuenza malu mabi. Badi baluijakaja bua kuela mashi a bantu panshi. 
Proverbs1:17 Nyunyi mumone tshilembi umuteya, kena upia mu disoka adi to." 
Proverbs1:18 Kadi bantu ba nanku badi baditeya nkayabu; bifufu biabu neabenzele bobu mene bibi. 
Proverbs1:19 Ke mudi bantu bivi badienzela bibi bobu nkayabu: muivi nebamunyenge muoyi wende. 
Proverbs1:20 Meji adi ela diyi mu misesu, akula bikole mu bisalu." 
Proverbs1:21 Adi ela lubila mu mansanga a njila, ambila bantu badi basangila ku biibi bia mu tshimenga ne:" 
Proverbs1:22 “Nuenu batshimbakane, nenushale amu batatakane too ne ku diba kaayi? Nuenu basekianganyi, nenunseke too ne ku diba kaayi? Nuenu bantu bapote, nenubenge kulonga malu too ne ku diba kaayi?" 
Proverbs1:23 Londayi mundi nnulongesha. Nanku mibelu yanyi neinuludike. Ne tuabanyangane nenu lungenyi lundi nalu. 
Proverbs1:24 Kadi pandi nnubikila, nudi nubenga kufika kundi. Ndi nnuoluela tshianza bua kunuambuluisha, kadi kanuena basue nansha kuntangila." 
Proverbs1:25 Nudi nubenga mibelu yanyi yonsu. Nudi nulengulula bindi nnulongesha. 
Proverbs1:26 Nanku meme kabidi nenseke panuikala mu dikenga. Nenseke pikala bowa bunukuata. 
Proverbs1:27 Bualu dituku dikuabu dikenga nedinukuate bu mvula wa tshipupu. Bowa nebunuenze bu tshipepela tshia mvunde. Lutatu ne dipampakana nebinutatshishe bikole. 
Proverbs1:28 Dituku adi nenumbikile bua meme kunuambuluisha, kadi tshiakunuandamuna to. Nenunkebe, kadi kanuakummona to." 
Proverbs1:29 Nebienzeke nanku, bualu nudi nubenga kulonga malu, kanuena basue kutshina Maweja-Nangila to." 
Proverbs1:30 Nudi nulengulula mibelu yanyi, kanuyi nuangata bindi nnuambila ne mushinga." 
Proverbs1:31 Nenupete dinyoka dinudi nudikebela. Binudi nuenza nebinukebele makenga. 
Proverbs1:32 Bualu tshibulengenyi udi ubutuka padiye ubenga meji. Kalengu ka bantu bapote kadi kabajimija. 
Proverbs1:33 Kadi muntu udi unteleja udi ushala mu bupole. Neasombe talalaa kayi utshina dikenga to.” 
Proverbs2:1 Muananyi, uvuluke bionsu bindi nulongesha, kupu muoyi bindi nkuambila bua wewe kuenza." 
Proverbs2:2 Teleja bidi meji akuambila, udibambe bua kuajingulula." 
Proverbs2:3 Ulombe diambuluisha kudi lungenyi, uteleje bidilu lukuambila diba dia dikenga." 
Proverbs2:4 Ulukebe muudi ukeba tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, muudi ukeba biuma bivuabu basokoke." 
Proverbs2:5 Enza nanku, bua ulonge muudi mua kunemeka Maweja-Nangila, kumanya bumfumu budi Mvidi Mukulu nabu." 
Proverbs2:6 Maweja-Nangila ke udi upangana meji. Dimanya ne dijingulula dia malu bidi bifuma kudiye. 
Proverbs2:7 Udi wambuluisha bantu badi babenga malu mabi. Udi bu mudi ngabu udi ulama badi benza biakane. 
Proverbs2:8 Udi wambuluisha badi benzelangana bimpe, ulama badi badifila kudiye." 
Proverbs2:9 Paudi unteleja, nenjingulule muudi mua kuikala muntu muakane, wa nsongu, muudi mua kuenza bidi bimpe." 
Proverbs2:10 Newikale ne meji munda muebe. Dimanya nedikusankishe. 
Proverbs2:11 Dijingulula dia malu nedikuepule ku ntupakanyi. Lungenyi nelukulame. 
Proverbs2:12 Nebikuepule ku dienza malu mabi, nebikumushe kudi bantu badi bashimangana," 
Proverbs2:13 ne ku badi bapambuke mu njila miakane, bendela mu njila ya miidima." 
Proverbs2:14 Badi bumvua disanka padibu benza bibi, badi basankila mu bubi." 
Proverbs2:15 Bantu aba kabena benda patoke mu njila mululame, badi balonda amu mikonyangale." 
Proverbs2:16 Kadi meji ne lungenyi nebikuepule, ku miaku ya lubombu ya mukaji udi kayi webe," 
Proverbs2:17 ya mukaji udi mutombokele bayende wa ku buana, mupule nanku ndondu uvuaye mutue ne Mvidi Mukulu." 
Proverbs2:18 Paudi uya kudi mukaji awu, udi udikebela lufu. Bualu malu adiye wenza, adi afikisha bantu ku lufu." 
Proverbs2:19 Muntu udi uyila mukaji awu, kena upingana kabidi to. Kena mua kupeta kabidi njila wa muoyi to." 
Proverbs2:20 Nenku, enda mu njila udi bantu bakane balonda. Idikija malu adi bantu bimpe benza." 
Proverbs2:21 Bualu bantu bakane ne ba diyi dimue, nebase mu ditunga edi, nebashalemu kashidi." 
Proverbs2:22 Bantu badi kabayi bitabe Mvidi Mukulu, kabayi bamulamate, nebumukemu. Nebabipate kuabu." 
Proverbs3:1 Muananyi, kupu dilongesha dianyi muoyi. Kadi uvuluke mibelu yanyi." 
Proverbs3:2 Wewe muyilame, neusombe bimpe panu; neulalepu matuku mavule; newikale ne diakalenga." 
Proverbs3:3 Wikale muena dinanga ne muena muoyi umue. Ngenzelu eyi ikale bu webe nsala wa lumu. Uyifunde mu muoyi webe. 
Proverbs3:4 Nenku, nebakunange kudi Mvidi Mukulu ne kudi bantu. Neumwangane nabu." 
Proverbs3:5 Kulondi amu lungenyi luebe wewe nkayebe. Kadi utekemene muebe muonsu kudi Maweja-Nangila. 
Proverbs3:6 Umulamate mu bionsu biudi musue kuenza. Yeye neakuleje muudi ne bua kuenza. 
Proverbs3:7 Lekela kuditangila bu muena meji. Kadi tshina Maweja-Nangila, epuka bubi." 
Proverbs3:8 Ke buanga budi buondapa mubidi webe mujima. Nebukepeshe ntatu yebe. 
Proverbs3:9 Ela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, umulambule bia ku midimu yebe, umulambule bintu bia tshianyi." 
Proverbs3:10 Nenku neuvudije mayeba tente ne ntete ya bukula. Mabungu ebe neuwule tente ne maluvu. 
Proverbs3:11 Muananyi, anyisha bua Maweja-Nangila akuludike; kupepeji mibelu yende to." 
Proverbs3:12 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi unyoka udiye unanga, amu mudi tatu unyoka muanende udiye musue." 
Proverbs3:13 Muntu udi mupete meji, muikale ne lungenyi, mmuena diakalenga." 
Proverbs3:14 Bualu muntu udi mupete meji, mmupite udi mupete tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha mpawungi." 
Proverbs3:15 Meji adi mapite busanga. Kakuena tshintu tshikuabu tshidi muntu ujinga, tshidi mua kufuanangana nawu." 
Proverbs3:16 Meji adi ambuluisha muntu bua kulala panu matuku mulongulongu. Adi amupetesha bubanji ne lumu. 
Proverbs3:17 Adi amuendesha mu njila wa diakalenga, mudiye wenda amu mu bupole." 
Proverbs3:18 Meji adi mpokolu wa muoyi ne wa diakalenga, kudi bantu badi benza mudiwu abalongesha." 
Proverbs3:19 Maweja-Nangila wakenza buloba ne meji ende. Kufikaye diulu ne lungenyi luende. 
Proverbs3:20 Mayi a panshi kutangalaka pa buloba, mavuba kulokesha mvula, amu ku dimanya diende." 
Proverbs3:21 Muananyi, tekemena lungenyi ne meji. Nebikuludike kashidi. Kubilekedi." 
Proverbs3:22 Nebikusombeshe panu mu disanka; nebikupeteshe muoyi wa bushuwa. 
Proverbs3:23 Nentungunuke bimpe ne malu ebe kabiyi bikuatshisha. Tshintu nansha tshimue katshiena mua kukuenzela bualu. 
Proverbs3:24 Dilolu neulale kuyi umvua bowa. Bufuku tulu tuebe netuikale amu talalaa. 
Proverbs3:25 Kuakutshina malu adi akuenzekela mu mpukapuka, nansha bantu babi badi bakuluisha." 
Proverbs3:26 Bualu Maweja-Nangila neakulame mu bupole, neakumushile mateyi. Unange muntu nebe" 
Proverbs3:27 Paudi ne tshintu, ambuluisha natshi muntu udi utshikengela." 
Proverbs3:28 Padi muntu ukulomba tshintu tshiudi natshi, umupe. Kumulayi bua kupinganaye maloba." 
Proverbs3:29 Kuedi meji a kuenzela muena mutumba nebe malu mabi. Udi usomba amu pabuipi nebe, mukutekemene." 
Proverbs3:30 Kutandishi ku bukole mukuenu, padiye kayi mukuenzele bualu bubi." 
Proverbs3:31 Kubabi bantu babi, kuidikiji mudibu benza." 
Proverbs3:32 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula bantu badi benza malu mabi, kadi udi umvuangana ne bantu bakane." 
Proverbs3:33 Maweja-Nangila udi utshipa nzubu ya benji ba malu mabi; kadi udi wela ya bantu bakane lupemba. 
Proverbs3:34 Maweja-Nangila udi upetula badi bamupetula; kadi udi unanga bantu bapuekele. 
Proverbs3:35 Bena meji nebapete diakalenga, batshimbakane nebikale ne bundu." 
Proverbs4:1 Bana banyi, telejayi mudi tatu unulongesha. Nuikale ne ntema bua nupete lungenyi." 
Proverbs4:2 Ndi nnulongesha malu malelela. Kanubengi bindi nnulongesha to. 
Proverbs4:3 Meme kabidi bavua bambela kudi tatu. Mamuanyi uvua munnange bikole. 
Proverbs4:4 Tatu wanyi uvua undongesha, wamba ne: “Vuluka malongesha anyi bimpe. Ukumbaje mikenji indi mukupe. Nanku neushale matuku mavule pa buloba." 
Proverbs4:5 Peta meji ne lungenyi. Kubipu muoyi to. Kulenguludi bindi nkuambila nansha. 
Proverbs4:6 Kulekedi meji, nanku neakuambuluishe. Wananga, nanku neakulame." 
Proverbs4:7 Bua kupeta meji, udibambe bikole bua kulonga mudiwu. Ufile bionsu biudi mupete bua ushale muena meji." 
Proverbs4:8 Nemeka meji, nanku neakunemeshe. Wananga, mudibu bananga mukaji, nanku neakupeteshe lumu." 
Proverbs4:9 Neakulengeje, mudi nsala wa kalumbandi ulengeja mutu wa muntu.”" 
Proverbs4:10 Muananyi, uteleje bimpe bindi nkuambila. Wewe mubiangate ne mushinga, neulale matuku mavule pa buloba." 
Proverbs4:11 Ndi nkulongesha mua kulonda njila wa meji. Ndi nkuleja muudi mua kusomba bimpe. 
Proverbs4:12 Nenku nentungunuke uya kumpala, kakuyi tshidi tshikutatshisha. Neunyeme kuyi udishinda." 
Proverbs4:13 Kuvidi bivuabu bakulongeshe. Ubivuluke: ke bidi bikupetesha muoyi. 
Proverbs4:14 Kuidikiji malu mabi adi bantu benza. Kulondi njila ya benji ba malu mabi. 
Proverbs4:15 Ubenge njila ayi, kupitshidimu. Udisunguile njila ya wewe kulonda." 
Proverbs4:16 Bantu babi kabena balala kabayi banji kuenza bibi. Kabena bamona tulu kuisu, padibu kabayi banji kulenduisha bantu bakuabu." 
Proverbs4:17 Bualu tshiabu tshiakudia mbubi. Tshiabu tshiakunua ntshikisu. 
Proverbs4:18 Njila udi bantu bakane balonda, udi bu butoke bua mu dinda, budi buenda buvulangana too ne mudi munya ukola." 
Proverbs4:19 Kadi njila idi bantu babi balonda idi miidima. Kabena bamanye muaba udibu mua kulendukila. 
Proverbs4:20 Muananyi, teleja miaku yanyi. Umvua mundi nkubela." 
Proverbs4:21 Kupu mibelu yanyi muoyi. Kadi uyilame munda mua muoyi webe.
