Proverbs4:22 Idi ipesha bonsu badi bayilame muoyi ne bukole bua mubidi. 
Proverbs4:23 Kenketa nangananga meji audi wela munda muebe, bualu wowu nealudike nsombelu webe wa panu." 
Proverbs4:24 Mukana muebe kamupatuki miaku ya dishima. Mishiku yebe kayambi miaku ya didinga. 
Proverbs4:25 Kuinami panshi. Paudi musue kuambila muntu bualu, umutangile patoke." 
Proverbs4:26 Longolola bimpe biudi ne bua kuenza. Ushishe kubikumbaja ne muoyi umue. 
Proverbs4:27 Uye amu buludi, kuyi ku dia balume nansha ku dia bakaji. Epuka malu mabi onsu." 
Proverbs5:1 Muananyi, uteleje bimpe mibelu yanyi idi ne meji ne lungenyi tente." 
Proverbs5:2 Nenku wewe mulame mibelu yanyi, newakule anu pa biudi mumanye." 
Proverbs5:3 Miaku ya mukaji muena buendenda idi bu buitshi. Mukana muende mmupite mafuta ku busenu. 
Proverbs5:4 Kadi ku ndekelu kua bionsu, mukaji ewu udi ne bululu bu bua nkonga bululu. Udi utapa mputa minene bu mudi muele wa nkanza." 
Proverbs5:5 Malu adiye wenza neakufikishe ku lufu. Njila udiye ulonda udi uya buludi ne ku bafue. 
Proverbs5:6 Pa mutu pa kulonda njila wa muoyi, udi upambuka, kayi nansha mumanye kuyayaye to." 
Proverbs5:7 Nanku, muananyi, unteleje, ulonde mibelu yanyi." 
Proverbs5:8 Umbuka kudi mukaji wa mushindu ewu. Kusemenyi nansha pamue ne mushiku wa nzubu wende to. 
Proverbs5:9 Tshianana neujimije lumu luebe luuvua nalu. Bayende, bua tshiji tshikalaye natshi, neakunyenge bionsu biudi nabi." 
Proverbs5:10 Bantu bakuabu nebadie bintu biuvua mupete ku mudimu webe. Neasankishe amu bantu bakuabu. 
Proverbs5:11 Neupunge ne lufu, utua mikemu, unyana, ushale anu mifuba pa mifuba nkayayi." 
Proverbs5:12 Newambe ne: “Eyi, mvua mubenge bivuabu bangambila. Tshivua muanyishe muvuabu bambela." 
Proverbs5:13 Tshivua muteleje diyi dia balongeshi banyi. Mvua mubenge kubateleja pavuabu bambela. 
Proverbs5:14 Kadi monayi, nkadi pa kupeta lumu lubi mushindu undi tshiyi mua kumueneka kabidi ku mesu a bantu.”" 
Proverbs5:15 Mukajebe udi bu mpokolu wa mayi matoke. Unue mayi a mpokolu ewu! 
Proverbs5:16 Mayi a mpokolu ewu, kaapuekedi mu misesu, kaatangalaki mu bisalu." 
Proverbs5:17 Mpokolu ewu ikale webe nkayebe! Kuena mua kumuabanyangana ne benyi to. 
Proverbs5:18 Usanke bua kusomba ne mukaji uuvua musungule, pautshivua nsongalume. Umusankishe." 
Proverbs5:19 Mukajebe udi ukunanga, udi mulenga bu ngulungu. Mubidi wende akusankishe matuku onsu. Usanke amu kusanka bua dinanga didiye ukunanga nadi." 
Proverbs5:20 Muananyi, mukaji wa bende udi ukusamina muoyi bua tshinyi? Bua tshinyi udi musue kubuelela mukaji wa bende mu nzubu." 
Proverbs5:21 Wamanya! Maweja-Nangila udi ujooja mudi muntu yonsu wenza. Udi umona bionsu bidi muntu wenza. 
Proverbs5:22 Bilema bidi muntu wenza bidi bu mionji idiye udisuika nayi. Bidi bu buteyi budiye udikuata nabu. 
Proverbs5:23 Muntu udi kayi udikanda mu malu, kayi udilama, udi udikebela kabutu kende. Bupale buende budi bumufikisha ku lufu." 
Proverbs6:1 Muananyi, udi mudieyeke bua dibanza dia mulunda webe anyi? Udi mulaye patoke bua kumuambuluisha anyi?" 
Proverbs6:2 Udi mulaye bua kukumbaja biuvua muambe anyi? Malaya ebe adi akukuata anyi? 
Proverbs6:3 Diba adi udi ku bumfumu bua muntu uuvua musombeshangane nende lupetu. Nanku, bua wewe kupatuka mu bualu ebu: uye kumonangana nende, umusengelele, umulombe bikole bua akupatule mu bualu ebu." 
Proverbs6:4 Kuikisha nansha kakese, kuladi to, amu wewe mumane kupatuka mu tshilumbu atshi." 
Proverbs6:5 Utuke mudi kabuluku kabafuka mu buteyi, nansha mudi nyunyi utuka ku budimbu." 
Proverbs6:6 Wewe muena lulengu, uye kumona musuasua. Ubatamine bibidilu biawu, upeteleku meji." 
Proverbs6:7 Musuasua kawena ne udi uutangila, kawena ne muuludiki, nansha ne mukalenga wa mudimu." 
Proverbs6:8 Kadi udi ukungija biakudia mu tshikondu tshia mvula. Mu tshikondu tshia dinowa udi usangisha bintu mu diyeba. 
Proverbs6:9 Kadi wewe muena lulengu neulale tulu too ne ku diba kaayi? Neubike ku tulu diba kaayi? 
Proverbs6:10 Paudi wanji kulala kakese, ubungila tshitupa, ushala mudiolole, maboku mavungila pa tshiadi," 
Proverbs6:11 bupele budi bukukuata tshimpitshimpi bu muivi. Ke padi dikenga difika kuudi bu mupawudi wa nzubu ya bende. 
Proverbs6:12 Muntu udi ne biakulakula mukana muende, mmuntu tshianana, mmuenzavi." 
Proverbs6:13 Udi upodia, ufiita makasa panshi, utapangana kazadi mu tshianza, bua amone mua kushima bakuabu." 
Proverbs6:14 Udi amu umvua nzala ya kuenzelangana bibi. Udi ulongolola malu mabi a kuenza kayi upungila. Udi ujuula matandu. 
Proverbs6:15 Nanku neabutuke diakamue, neafue kakuyi mushindu udiye mua kupanda." 
Proverbs6:16 Kudi malu asambombu adi Maweja-Nangila ubenga, adiye udiwula kashidi:" 
Proverbs6:17 mesu a ditambisha, ludimi lua muena dishima, bianza bidi bishipa bantu badi kabayi ne tshilumbu," 
Proverbs6:18 lungenyi ludibu bakeba kuenza nalu malu mabi, makasa adi aya ku dienza dia malu mabi," 
Proverbs6:19 muntu udi ujadika malu a dishima. Kadi kudi kabidi bualu bua muanda mutekete: ke muntu udi usongakaja bena muntu. 
Proverbs6:20 Muananyi, vuluka malu adi tatuebe mukuambile. Londa mibelu ya kudi mamuebe." 
Proverbs6:21 Ubivuluke matuku onsu mu muoyi webe. Ubilame bimpe, bu masanga a mushinga mukole, adibu bela mu nshingu." 
Proverbs6:22 Neakuambuluishe kuudi uya, ne kuudi ufuma. Nebikukube mu tulu. Paudi ubika ku tulu nebikuambile tshia wewe kuenza." 
Proverbs6:23 Bualu bidi baledi bakuambila bidi bu muendu. Mibelu yabu idi bu butoke. Malongesha abu adi atuludika mu njila wa muoyi. 
Proverbs6:24 Bionsu ebi nebikuepule kudi mukaji muenzayi, ne ku miaku ya lubombu ya mukaji wa bende." 
Proverbs6:25 Kualakanyi buimpe bua mukaji wa bende. Mesu adiye ukulenguila, kaakulobeshi." 
Proverbs6:26 Mukaji muena tshiendenda, badi bamufuta amu tshiakudia tshikese. Kadi bua mukaji wa bende, muntu neajimije bionsu bidiye nabi." 
Proverbs6:27 Badi mua kuambuila dikala dia kapia mu tshibombu, tshilamba tshionsu katshiyi tshipia anyi?" 
Proverbs6:28 Badi mua kuendela pa makala a kapia, makasa kaayi apia anyi?" 
Proverbs6:29 Ke mudi muntu, udi ubuelela mukaji wa bende mu nzubu, upia tshibawu." 
Proverbs6:30 Bantu kabena badiwula muivi, padiye muibe bua kutuyisha nzala idiye nayi." 
Proverbs6:31 Kadi padibu bamukuata, udi ufuta bintu bipite bungi bua biwaye muibe. Neajimije bintu biende bionsu." 
Proverbs6:32 Muntu udi wambisha mukaji, mmubule lungenyi. Udi udikebela yeye nkayende kabutu." 
Proverbs6:33 Nebamutuute, bamudiwula kabidi. Neashale ne bundu kashidi." 
Proverbs6:34 Bualu bayende wa mukaji neikale ne tshiji ne mukawu wa bungi. Dituku dikuabu neasombuele mulume awu kayi ne luse. 
Proverbs6:35 Kuakuanyisha bua bamufute tshibawu to. Kakushala ne lutulu nansha bobu bamupesha bintu bipite bungi bua kutalaja tshiji tshidiye natshi. 
Proverbs7:1 Muananyi, vuluka miaku yanyi, kupu muoyi bimvua mukuambile." 
Proverbs7:2 Enza mundi nkuambila, nanku neulale matuku mavule panu. Lama bimpe dilongesha dianyi bu muudi ulama kamonyi ka disu diebe." 
Proverbs7:3 Enda nadi miaba yonsu bu kakanu ka ku munu, udifunde mu muoyi webe." 
Proverbs7:4 Unemeke meji bikole bu muudi unemeka muanenu wa bakaji menemene. Ambila lungenyi ne: wewe udi mulunda wanyi wa pa muoyi. 
Proverbs7:5 Nebikuepule kudi mukaji muena buendenda, ne ku miaku ya lubombu ya mukaji wa bende." 
Proverbs7:6 Dituku dikuabu, mvua musombele ku dididishi dia ku nzubu kuanyi. Mvua mutangile pambelu." 
Proverbs7:7 Meme kumona munkatshi mua bansongalume badi kabayi bamanye malu, nsongalume mukuabu mubule meji bikole." 
Proverbs7:8 Uvua upitshila mu musesu pabuipi ne muaba uvua munga mukaji usomba. Kuyaye mutangile ku nzubu wa mukaji awu. 
Proverbs7:9 Bivua ku dilolu, pamue ne diba kubuela, bua kuisu kufiika." 
Proverbs7:10 Ke mukaji awu kuvua kumuakidila, muvuale bu mukaji muena buendenda, budimu munda tente." 
Proverbs7:11 Mukaji wa dikamakama ne disalu awu kavua unengakana nkayende mu nzubu to. 
Proverbs7:12 Uvua udileja miaba yonsu: mu njila, mu bisalu, wimana mu mansanga a njila, ulubakana ne malu." 
Proverbs7:13 Nanku kuimanyikaye nsongalume bua kuyukila nende. Kumuelaye mu tshitupa, umutangila ne mesu malengula, wamba ne:" 
Proverbs7:14 “Mvua mulaye Mvidi Mukulu milambu ya kumuela tuasakidila. Ndi mumulambulayi lelu. 
Proverbs7:15 Ke pandi mupatuke bua kusambakena nebe. Mvua nkukeba. Mbakupetshi. 
Proverbs7:16 Nkadi muakaje bulalu buanyi ne mbulankete ya bilamba bia makalumakalu, ne bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda bia mu Ejipitu." 
Proverbs7:17 Pa bulalu buanyi, ndi mumiaminepu manananshi a mishindu mishilangane: a mire, a alowe ne a kanele." 
Proverbs7:18 Fika, tulejangane mutudi banangangane ne mudibu butshia. Tusankishe mibidi yetu ne dinanga." 
Proverbs7:19 Bayanyi kena ku nzubu to. Mmuye ku luendu lua mutantshi mule. 
Proverbs7:20 Mmuye ne makuta a bungi. Nealukile ku nzubu kunyima kua mbingu ibidi, patua ngondu ku tshibanda.”" 
Proverbs7:21 Kumusuminyinaye bikole ne budimu buende. Kumutekeshaye ku muoyi ne miaku misheme. 
Proverbs7:22 Mpindiewu, nsongalume kumulonda bu ngombe, udibu baye nende ku tshishipelu. Mupale awu kudikebela tshibawu, kupia mu buteyi." 
Proverbs7:23 Mukete kumutua kumutubula mutshima. Udi bu nyunyi udiela mu nsumba, kayi umanya muaba udi lufu lumuindila." 
Proverbs7:24 Bana banyi, ntelejayi mpindiewu! Umvuayi mundi ngamba." 
Proverbs7:25 Kanuteki muoyi wenu kudi mukaji wa nenku; kanulekedi njila milenga. 
Proverbs7:26 Bualu mukaji wa nenku mmubutule bantu ba bungi. Nansha bavua badiamba ne: tuetu tudi ne muoyi mukole, mbapone mu mateyi ende." 
Proverbs7:27 Kuya ku nzubu kua mukaji wa nenku nkubuela muaba wa lufu, nkupueka mu lupongu ludi luyamu." 
Proverbs8:1 Kanuena bumvua anyi? Meji adi ela lubila. Lungenyi ludi luela diyi dikole. 
Proverbs8:2 Meji adi mimane ku nsongu ya mikuna idi pabuipi ne njila, ne mu mansanga a njila." 
Proverbs8:3 Miaba yonsu idi bantu bapitshila mu tshimenga, nangananga ku biibi bia tshimenga, Meji adi ela lubila ne:" 
Proverbs8:4 “Bantuee! Nuenu ke bandi mbikila. Ndi mbikila bantu bonsu. 
Proverbs8:5 Nuenu batshidi batshimbakane, longayi munudi mua kupeta meji. Nuenu bapote, ikalayi ne lungenyi." 
Proverbs8:6 Telejayi: bindi nnuambila, bidi ne mushinga. Ndi nnuleja malu onsu patoke." 
Proverbs8:7 Bushuwa, ndi ngamba malu amu malelela. Mayuki a dishima mmambipila." 
Proverbs8:8 Ndi ngamba malu anu mudiwu, tshiena nshima, tshiena ndinga bantu to." 
Proverbs8:9 Muena lungenyi udi umvua bindi ngamba. Bavua balonga malu badi babangulula bimpe. 
Proverbs8:10 Kebayi mua kumvua dilongesha dianyi, pa mutu pa kukeba tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Nusungule lungenyi bu tshintu tshipite mpawungi." 
Proverbs8:11 Bualu meme, Meji, ndi mupite mabue a busanga ku mushinga. Bintu bia mushinga mukole, kabiena ne mushinga bu wanyi meme to." 
Proverbs8:12 “Meme ndi Meji. Budimu ke bundi ngenda nabu. Ndi mumanye mua kujingulula malu. 
Proverbs8:13 Kutshina Maweja-Nangila ke kudiwula bubi. Meme ndi ndiwula ditambisha ne budiambi, ngenzelu mibi, ne miaku ya dishima." 
Proverbs8:14 Mudimu wanyi nkubela ne kudimujangana. Ndi lungenyi mene. Meme ke udi upeshangana bukole. 
Proverbs8:15 Meme ndi ngambuluisha bakalenga bua bikale mu bumfumu, ne balombodi ba ditunga bua bele mikenji mimpe." 
Proverbs8:16 Ndi ngambuluisha bamfumu bua baludike matunga, balombodi ne bandumbulula bua bakuate mudimu bimpe." 
Proverbs8:17 Ndi munange badi bannanga. Badi bankebelamu nebampete. 
Proverbs8:18 Ndi mpeteshangana bubanji, lumu, biuma bidi bishala kashidi, ne diakalenga dilelela." 
Proverbs8:19 Mapa anyi mmapite mpawungi muimpe ku mushinga. Lupetu luawu ndupite tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. 
Proverbs8:20 Badi bansangana mu njila udibu balonda kudi bantu badi bakeba Mvidi Mukulu, mu njila idi bantu benzelangana bimpe." 
Proverbs8:21 Ke muaba undi mpetesha badi bannanga bintu. Ndi nguwuje nzubu yabu ne mpetu tente. 
Proverbs8:22 Maweja-Nangila wakadianza kumfuka ku kale, kumpala kua bintu bikuabu bionsu." 
Proverbs8:23 Uvua mungenze ku tshibangidilu tshia bidimu, kayi muanji kufuka buloba." 
Proverbs8:24 Bavua bandele, kakuyi mayi manene malabale, kakuyi mpokolu idi ipatula mayi." 
Proverbs8:25 Bavua bandele, kabayi banji kuimanyika mikuna minene ne mikese." 
Proverbs8:26 Maweja-Nangila kawa nansha muanji kufuka buloba, madimi, nansha lusenga." 
Proverbs8:27 Meme nkavuaku tshikondu tshivuaye mushindamije diulu, muase tshibuashibuashi kulu kua mayi manene malabale a ku tshibangidilu." 
Proverbs8:28 Uvua muteke mavuba mulu, uvua mupatule mpokolu ya mayi adi munda mua buloba." 
Proverbs8:29 Uvua muenzele mayi manene mikalu yawu, bua kaasambuki pa buloba buume. Uvua mushindike buloba bikole panshi." 
Proverbs8:30 Tshikondu atshi, mvua pabuipi nende bua kumuambuluisha ku midimu yende ne ngenyi yanyi. Dituku dionsu pavuaye ummona, uvua ne disanka. Mvua nnaya amu ne disanka, yeye muntangile," 
Proverbs8:31 pa buloba buvuaye mufuke. Biangatshile ku tshikondu atshi, disanka dianyi didi amu dia kumonangana ne bantu." 
Proverbs8:32 “Kadi mpindiewu, bana banyi, ntelejayi. Panuikala nulonda mibelu yanyi, nenupete diakalenga." 
Proverbs8:33 Telejayi malongesha anyi, nukuate nawu mudimu, nanku nenupete meji." 
Proverbs8:34 Bantu badi banteleja, badi bimana dituku dionsu ku tshiibi tshianyi, batshishila ku nzubu kuanyi, mbena diakalenga." 
Proverbs8:35 Udi unsangana meme, mmupete muoyi, Maweja-Nangila neamuele lupemba." 
Proverbs8:36 Kadi muntu udi ungenzela malu mabi, udi udienzela bibi yeye nkayende. Udi unkina, mmunange lufu.”" 
Proverbs9:1 Meji uvua musonge makunji muanda mutekete bua kuasa nawu nzubu wende. 
Proverbs9:2 Uvua mushipeshe nyama wa tshibilu. Mmusambakaje maluvu ne mitshi ya minangu, mulongolole mesa bua kudiila." 
Proverbs9:3 Meji kutuma bakaji bena mudimu bende, bua baye mu bisalu, babikila bantu, bela diyi ne:" 
Proverbs9:4 “Nuenu batshimbakane, semenayi pabuipi.” Meji kumanyisha badi kabayi lungenyi ne:" 
Proverbs9:5 “Luakunuayi, nudie ku mesa anyi, nunue maluvu andi munuenzele." 
Proverbs9:6 Umbukayi padi batshimbakane, nenupete muoyi. Londayi njila wa lungenyi.”" 
Proverbs9:7 Paudi ubela muena ditambisha, udi ukupetula; paudi ukanyina muntu mubi, udi ukupenda." 
Proverbs9:8 Kutandishi muena ditambisha, bualu neakukine. Kadi utandi-she muena meji, yeye neakunange." 
Proverbs9:9 Tshiudi wambila muena meji, tshidi tshivudija meji ende. Tshiudi ulongesha muntu muakane, tshidi tshidiundisha dimanya diende." 
Proverbs9:10 Muntu udi musue kupeta meji, anemeke Maweja-Nangila. Kulamata Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, kudi kupetesha muntu lungenyi." 
Proverbs9:11 Meme, Meji, nemvudije matuku ebe. Neulale panu matuku mulongulongu." 
Proverbs9:12 Pawikala muena meji, wewe mene neusanke. Kadi pawikala muena ditambisha, wewe nkayebe neudipeteshe dikenga." 
Proverbs9:13 Matshimbu udi bu mukaji muena mutoyi, bu muntu mutshimbakane mupange malu." 
Proverbs9:14 Udi usomba kumpala kua nzubu wende, nansha pa nkuasa mu bisalu bia mu tshimenga." 
Proverbs9:15 Udi ubikila bantu badi bapitshila mu bisalu amu, baya kuabu kuyayabu, wamba ne:" 
Proverbs9:16 “Nuenu, batshimbakane, semenayi apa!” Udi wambila badi kabayi ne lungenyi ne:" 
Proverbs9:17 “Mayi anudi nuiba ke adi atalaja nyota! Tshiakudia tshidi muntu udia mu musokoku ke tshidi tshimpe.” 
Proverbs9:18 Kadi bantu badi balonda matshimbu kabena bamanye ne: tudi bisangila ku mesa awu ne bafue. Bantu bavua babuele nende mu nzubu, mbamane kuya muaba udi lufu." 
Proverbs10:1 Nsumuinu ya Shelomu. Muana wa balume wa meji, udi usankisha baledi bende; kadi muana mupote, udi ubungamija bena kuabu." 
Proverbs10:2 Biuma bipeta ku bubi kabiena bilubuluka kudi udi nabi, kadi muntu udi uvuluka Mvidi Mukulu mu midimu yende neashale ne muoyi." 
Proverbs10:3 Maweja-Nangila kena musue bua muntu udi umulamata afue nzala, kadi kena musue bua muntu mubi apete tshidiye ujinga." 
Proverbs10:4 Bianza bia muena lulengu bidi bibueja muntu mu bupele, kadi bianza bia mukuatshi wa mudimu bidi bipetesha lupetu." 
Proverbs10:5 Muena meji udi usangisha biakudia tshikondu tshia mvula, kadi muntu udi ulala tshikondu tshia dinowa mbimpe bantu bamupepeje." 
Proverbs10:6 Bantu badi bavuluka Mvidi Mukulu, badi badikebela diakalenga, kadi mukana mua bantu babi mudi mvita." 
Proverbs10:7 Muntu udi unemeka Mvidi Mukulu badi bamuvuluka ne disanka, kadi nansha dina mene dia bantu babi badi badipua muoyi." 
Proverbs10:8 Muntu wa meji udi wanyisha mibelu. Muntu muena biakulakula neabutuke lukasa. 
Proverbs10:9 Kusomba biakane nkusomba talalaa. Muntu mubi neatunduke. 
Proverbs10:10 Udi kayi musue kuambila bantu malu patoke mudiwu, udi ubakengesha; kadi udi ubabela bimpe, udi usombesha bantu mu ditalala." 
Proverbs10:11 Miaku ya muntu muakane idi mpokolu wa muoyi. Miaku ya muntu mubi idi ijuula mvita. 
Proverbs10:12 Lukinu ludi lujuula matandu, kadi dinanga didi dijibikila bilema." 
Proverbs10:13 Muena meji badi bamumanyina ku miaku ya lungenyi idiye wakula, kadi udi kayi wela meji badi bamutuuta!" 
Proverbs10:14 Bantu ba meji badi bakolesha misangu yonsu lungenyi luabu. Kadi miaku ya bapote neibafikishe lukasa ku kabutu. 
Proverbs10:15 Biuma bia mubanji bidi bimulama bu mudi tshimana tshikole tshilama nzubu. Kadi dikenga didi dibutula mupele. 
Proverbs10:16 Mudimu wa muntu muakane udi umupetesha muoyi. Kadi difutu dia muntu mubi didi dimufikisha ku bubi. 
Proverbs10:17 Muntu udi uvuluka malongesha udi wenda mu njila wa muoyi. Udi ubenga mibelu udi upambuka. 
Proverbs10:18 Muntu udi utekelangana lukinu mu musokoku, udi muena lubombu. Yonsu udi utumpilangana malu ku mesu a bantu, mmuntu mutshimbakane." 
Proverbs10:19 Muntu udi wakula malu mavule, udi utupakana bikole. Kadi muntu wa meji udi mumanye mua kulama ludimi luende." 
Proverbs10:20 Miaku ya muntu udi utshina Mvidi Mukulu mmipite tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Tshidi muntu mubi wela meji katshiena ne mushinga to. 
Proverbs10:21 Miaku ya muntu muakane idi iludika bantu ba bungi. Kadi bapote badi bafue bua dibenga kuela meji. 
Proverbs10:22 Kabiena kuluila. Maweja-Nangila nkayende ngubipapa bantu. 
Proverbs10:23 Bubi budibu benza budi busankisha muntu mutatakane. Meji adi muena lungenyi upeta adi amusankisha. 
Proverbs10:24 Tshidi bantu babi batshina tshidi tshibatulukila. Tshidi bantu bakane bajinga badi batshipeta. 
Proverbs10:25 Bantu babi badi bafue mu tshikondu tshia tshipupu, kadi bakane badi batshikolela kashidi." 
Proverbs10:26 Maluvu a buanji adi afila buanji ku menu, muinshi udi ukunjija mesu. Ke mudi muena lulengu ufikisha mfumuende munda." 
Proverbs10:27 Badi batshina Maweja-Nangila badi balala matuku mavule pa buloba, kadi benji ba malu mabi badi badianza kufua lukasa." 
Proverbs10:28 Tshidi bantu bakane mua kutekemena ke disanka, bantu babi kabena mua kutekemena tshintu nansha tshimue." 
Proverbs10:29 Maweja-Nangila udi tshieyemenu tshia bantu bakane, kadi udi ubutula badi benza bibi." 
Proverbs10:30 Muntu udi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu udi ushindama kashidi. Kadi babi kabakusomba mutantshi mu ditunga to. 
Proverbs10:31 Mukana mua muntu muakane mudi mupatuka meji. Kadi ludimi lua muena dishima mbimpe balukose. 
Proverbs10:32 Miaku ya muntu muakane idi ilengelela bantu, kadi miaku ya muena lonji idi ibabungamija." 
Proverbs11:1 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula bantu badi ne bitempelu bia dishima, kadi udi wanyisha badi bapima bintu mudibi." 
Proverbs11:2 Muntu udi uditambisha nebamupetule, kadi muntu wa meji udi udipuekesha." 
Proverbs11:3 Muntu wa malu mempe badi bamulombola kudi muoyi wende muakane. Kadi muntu mubi, malu ende mabi adiye munange adi amubutula." 
Proverbs11:4 Biuma kabiena bituambuluisha dituku didi Mvidi Mukulu ukosa nsambu. Amu udi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu ke udi upanduka ku lufu. 
Proverbs11:5 Buakane bua muntu udi ukeba Maweja-Nangila budi buludika nsombelu wende. Kadi muntu mubi udi ujimina bua bubi buende. 
Proverbs11:6 Buakane bua mulamatshi wa Mvidi Mukulu budi bumujikila njiwu. Kadi lukuka lua badi badingangana ludi lubafila ku kabutu. 
Proverbs11:7 Padi muntu mubi ufua, biwaye utekemena bidi bifua kabidi, nangananga biwaye utekemena kupeta ku biuma biende." 
Proverbs11:8 Muntu muakane udi upanduka ku dipampakana. Muntu mubi udi ubuelamu pa mutu pende. 
Proverbs11:9 Muntu udi uvila Mvidi Mukulu, udi ubutula bakuabu ne miaku yende. Kadi muntu udi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu, udi upandisha bakuabu ne meji ende." 
Proverbs11:10 Bena ditunga badi basanka padi bantu bakane bapeta diakalenga. Kadi badi bela mbila basanka padi bantu babi bafua. 
Proverbs11:11 Bantu bakane badi basa tshimenga batshiela lupemba. Miaku mibi ya bena lonji idi itshibutula. 
Proverbs11:12 Udi upepeja mukuende, mmubule meji. Muntu wa lungenyi udi upuwa." 
Proverbs11:13 Muena bijanu udi wela malu masokome patoke. Muntu mujalame udi ulama malu awu munda muende. 
Proverbs11:14 Tshisamba tshidi tshijimina paditshi katshiyi ne batshiludiki. Bualu lupandu ludi mukana mua bafidi ba ngenyi. 
Proverbs11:15 Muntu udi udieyeka bua kufuta mabanza a bakuabu udi udienzela bibi. Udi utshina kuenza nanku udi wepuka ku njiwu. 
Proverbs11:16 Mukaji mulenga udi upeta lumu. Muntu wa bukitu udi upeta bubanji. 
Proverbs11:17 Muena luse udi wenzela muoyi wende bimpe. Kadi muena tshikisu udi udienzela bibi nkayende. 
Proverbs11:18 Difutu didi muntu mubi wangata didi dimudinga. Kadi udi wenza bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue kakupanga difutu diende. 
Proverbs11:19 Udi mushindame bua kuenza bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, neapete muoyi. Kadi udi musungule bubi neafuilemu." 
Proverbs11:20 Maweja-Nangila udi upetula bantu bena budimu. Kadi udi wanyisha bantu ba muoyi umue. 
Proverbs11:21 Bushuwa, bantu babi nebabanyoke. Kadi bantu bakane bonsu nebashale amu katakata." 
Proverbs11:22 Mukaji mulengele kuisu kadi kayi ne lungenyi munda, udi bu kakanu ka mpawungi, kadibu bela ku diulu dia ngulube." 
Proverbs11:23 Bantu bakane badi bajinga kuenza bimpe. Bantu babi badi bakeba amu tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu. 
Proverbs11:24 Badi bapeshangana bintu ne muoyi muimpe, badi bavudija biuma biabu. Kadi badi balamina biabu ne bukonkotu, biabu abi bidi bikepela." 
Proverbs11:25 Muntu udi wenzelangana bimpe, neapete diakalenga. Udi upa mukuabu tshiakunua, kakufua nyota." 
Proverbs11:26 Bantu badi batshipa badi bakandamana ne biakudia amu buabu nkayabu. Kadi badi banyisha bantu badi babapanyishabi. 
Proverbs11:27 Mvidi Mukulu udi wanyisha muntu udi wenza bimpe. Kadi diakabi didi dikuata udi wenza malu mabi. 
Proverbs11:28 Udi utekemena kudi biuma biende neajimine bu mudi mabeji a mutshi amata panshi. Kadi bantu bimpe nebasampile bu tshifufu tshia mutshi utshidi ne mabeji mabishi. 
Proverbs11:29 Muntu udi ushiya nzubu wende tshintshiompatshiompa, lupepele neluambule bintu biende. Muntu mutatakane neashale mupika wa muena meji." 
Proverbs11:30 Bidi muntu udi utshina Mvidi Mukulu wenza, bidi bipetesha muoyi. Muntu wa meji udi usankisha bakuabu." 
Proverbs11:31 Muntu muakane neapete difutu diende pa buloba. Kadi mimanye ne: muena lonji ne muenji wa bibi, nebapete difutu dibakumbanyine." 
Proverbs12:1 Muntu udi musue kulonga malu, udi unanga badi bamubela. Kadi udi ubenga mibelu udi tshibubabuba." 
Proverbs12:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wanyisha muntu muimpe, kadi udi udiwula muntu udi upangadika bibi." 
Proverbs12:3 Muntu kena ushindama padiye wenza malu mabi. Kadi tshintu nansha tshimue katshiena tshishindisha bakane. 
Proverbs12:4 Mukaji wa bukitu udi ukebela bayende lumu. Mukaji mubi udi bu disama didi didia mifuba ya bayende. 
Proverbs12:5 Bantu badi bavuluka Mvidi Mukulu, badi belangana meji matuku onsu a kuenzelangana biakane. Kadi bantu babi kabena bela meji makuabu, amu a kudingangana." 
Proverbs12:6 Miaku ya bantu babi idi mateyi adi akebela bantu lufu. Tshidi bantu bakane bamba, tshidi tshiepula bakuabu ku lufu." 
Proverbs12:7 Padibu babutula bantu babi, biabu bionsu mbijimine. Kadi diku dia bakane nedishale kashidi." 
Proverbs12:8 Badi batumbisha muntu wa meji. Kadi badi badiwula muntu mububakane. 
Proverbs12:9 Bidi bimpe kuikala muntu udi kayi ne bintu bia bungi, kadi muikale ne muena mudimu, pa mutu pa kuditambisha kumpala kua bantu kuyi ne biakudia." 
Proverbs12:10 Muntu muakane mmumanye nansha tshidi bimuna biende bikengela. Muntu mubi udi nabi ne tshikisu. 
Proverbs12:11 Muntu udi udima budimi buende neikale ne biakudia bia bungi. Kadi muntu udi udidinga udi upanga malu. 
Proverbs12:12 Muena malu mabi udi ujinga kupeta makasa amu ku bubi. Kadi bantu bakane badi bapeta makasa a mushinga a ku disuminyina diabu. 
Proverbs12:13 Muntu mubi badi bamukuata mu buteyi amu ku miaku yende ya dishima. Kadi muntu muakane udi upanduka ku dikenga dionsu. 
Proverbs12:14 Miaku ya muntu idi mua kumupetesha diakalenga, bu mudi mudimu upetesha muntu difutu." 
Proverbs12:15 Muntu mutatakane udi udimona misangu yonsu ne: ndi ngenza bilenga. Kadi muntu wa lungenyi udi wanyisha mibelu. 
Proverbs12:16 Muntu mutshimbakane udi uleja tshiji tshiende patoke diakamue. Kadi muntu wa lungenyi udi usokoka kanyinganyinga kadiye naku. 
Proverbs12:17 Muntu udi wamba malu malelela patoke, udi wambuluisha bantu. Kadi udi ujadika malu a dishima, udi wambuluisha badi badinga bantu." 
Proverbs12:18 Muena biakulakula udi utapa mputa minene bu ya muele wa mvita. Kadi ludimi lua bantu ba meji ludi bondapa. 
Proverbs12:19 Malu malelela neashale kashidi. Kadi miaku ya dishima neishale katupa kipi. 
Proverbs12:20 Bantu badi bela meji a kuenza bibi, badi badidinga nkayabu. Kadi bantu badi babela bantu bua basombe bimpe, nebapete disanka." 
Proverbs12:21 Muntu muakane kena umona dikenga. Kadi babi badi munkatshi mua makenga. 
Proverbs12:22 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula bena dishima. Kadi udi wanyisha badi bamba malu pa wowu. 
Proverbs12:23 Muntu muena lungenyi kena uditambisha bua bidiye mumanye. Kadi batatakane badi baleja butatakane buabu patoke. 
Proverbs12:24 Mudimu udi upetesha muntu bumfumu. Kadi lulengu ludi lumufila ku bupika. 
Proverbs12:25 Ntatu idi itekesha muntu mu maboku. Muaku muimpe udi umukolesha ku muoyi. 
Proverbs12:26 Muntu muakane udi uludika mulunda wende mu njila mulenga. Bidi muntu mubi wenza bidi bipambula balunda bende. 
Proverbs12:27 Tshilembi wa lulengu kena mua kushipa nyama. Nanku mbilenga bua muntu ikale ne disuminyina divule. 
Proverbs12:28 Mu njila wa buakane mudi muoyi. Padi muntu ulonda njila ewu kena ufika ku lufu. 
Proverbs13:1 Muana wa meji udi uteleja mibelu ya tatuende. Kadi udi uditambisha kena uteleja nansha umue. 
Proverbs13:2 Muntu wa malu mempe udi upeta tshipeta tshimpe ku miaku idiye wamba. Kadi bantu ba malu mabi badi amu bakeba mvita. 
Proverbs13:3 Muntu udi ukuba ludimi luende, udi ukuba muoyi wende. Kadi udi wakula kayi wela meji, udi udijimija." 
Proverbs13:4 Muena lulengu udi ujinga tshintu kayi utshipeta. Kadi muntu wa tshisumi udi upeta tshidiye musue. 
Proverbs13:5 Muntu muakane udi ubenga dishima. Muntu mubi udi upepeja bakuabu, ubajana." 
Proverbs13:6 Muntu wa malu makane, buakane buende budi bumulama. Kadi bantu badi benza bibi, bubi buabu budi bubafila ku kabutu." 
Proverbs13:7 Bamue bantu badi badiangata bu babanji, bobu bikale bianza bitupu. Banga kabidi badi badiangata bu bapele, bobu bikale babanji." 
Proverbs13:8 Misangu mikuabu muena biuma udi ufuta makuta bua kudipandisha. Kadi mupele kena ne badi mua kumukanyina. 
Proverbs13:9 Muakane neakenke bu butoke budi buela nsese. Kadi muntu mubi udi bu muendu udi ujima. 
Proverbs13:10 Diditambisha didi dikeba matandu. Muntu udi uteleja mibelu udi ne meji. 
Proverbs13:11 Biuma bipeta mu tshipututuku bidi bijimina lukasa. Kadi bidibu bangule ku kakese ku kakese bidi bienda bivulangana. 
Proverbs13:12 Kupanga kukumbajila muntu bualu, kudi kumutekesha ku muoyi. Dijinga didibu bakumbaja didi mpokolu wa muoyi." 
Proverbs13:13 Muntu udi upetula meji adibu bamuambila neajimine. Kadi muntu udi unemeka mukandu, neapete difutu." 
Proverbs13:14 Dilongesha dia muena meji didi mpokolu wa muoyi, didi diepula muntu ku njiwu ya lufu." 
Proverbs13:15 Muntu wa lungenyi udi udinemeshisha kudi bantu. Muntu mubi udi usomba mu dikenga. 
Proverbs13:16 Muntu mudimuke udi wela meji bangabanga ne kuenzaye bualu. Kadi batshimbakane badi baleja bupote buabu patoke. 
Proverbs13:17 Muntu udibu batuma ne mukenji kayi uufikisha, udi ukengesha bantu. Muntu wa nsongu udi uufikisha, udi usamba bantu." 
Proverbs13:18 Muntu udi ubenga kuteleja badi bamukolesha, neashale mupele udibu bapetula. Kadi udi uteleja mubelu, neapete lumu." 
Proverbs13:19 Dijinga didibu bakumbaja didi disankisha muoyi. Ke padi bantu bapote babenga kulekela malu mabi. 
Proverbs13:20 Udi wenda ne bena meji, udi upeta meji. Kadi udi wenda ne bidingidingi neashale kabidi tshidingidingi." 
Proverbs13:21 Dikenga didi dilonda muenji wa bibi! Kadi diakalenga ke difutu dia bantu bakane. 
Proverbs13:22 Muntu muimpe udi ushiya bumpianyi kudi ndelanganyi yende. Kadi mpetu ya babi, bakane badi bayipeta." 
Proverbs13:23 Budimi bua mupele budi bubodiodioka ne biakudia. Kadi bamue bantu badi bajimina bua malu abu mabi. 
Proverbs13:24 Udi ubenga kukuma muanende, kena mumunange to. Muntu udi munange muanende kena welakana bua kumunyoka to." 
Proverbs13:25 Muntu muakane udi udia ukuta. Kadi muntu mubi udi ukenga ne nzala. 
Proverbs14:1 Mukaji wa meji a bungi udi ushindika diku diende. Kadi mutatakane udi udibumbula. 
Proverbs14:2 Muntu udi wenda mu njila wa buakane, udi utshina Maweja-Nangila. Kadi udi wenda mu njila mikonyangale udi umupepeja." 
Proverbs14:3 Mu miaku ya muena dipote mudi ditambisha. Miaku ya bena meji idi ibepula ku njiwu. 
Proverbs14:4 Muaba udi kauyi ngombe ya kudima nayi, mu diyeba mmutupu. Nyama ya dikanda idi ipetesha biuma bivule." 
Proverbs14:5 Muntu udi ujadika bualu ne diyi dimue, kena ushima. Muntu udi ujadika bualu ne meyi meyi, mmuena dishima." 
Proverbs14:6 Musekianganyi udi ukeba kupeta meji, kadi kena wapeta to. Muntu udi wela meji, udi umanya lukasa tshidiye ne bua kuenza." 
Proverbs14:7 Umbuka kudi bidingidingi, bualu kudibi kuena upeta miaku idi mua kukulongesha malu." 
Proverbs14:8 Muntu mudimuke udi mumanye tshidiye ne bua kuenza, bualu udi muena meji. Batshimbakane badi bapambuke bua bupale buabu." 
Proverbs14:9 Batshimbakane kabena bavuluka mua kulongolola ntupakanyi. Kadi bantu bakane badi amu benzelangana bimpe. 
Proverbs14:10 Muntu yonsu udi mudimanye nkayende kanyinganyinga ne disanka bidi mu muoyi wende. Muntu mukuabu nansha umue kena mua kubiumvua menemene to. 
Proverbs14:11 Nzubu wa bantu babi udi ne kabutu, wa bantu bakane neashindame." 
Proverbs14:12 Bumue njila udi muntu umona bu mululame, ke udi umufila ku lufu." 
Proverbs14:13 Nansha muntu udi useka udi mua kuikala mu dikenga. Nanku kunyima kua disanka kudi kushala amu dibungama. 
Proverbs14:14 Muntu muena malu mabi neapete tshibawu tshia pa bubi buende. Bidi muntu muakane upeta nebimusankishe. 
Proverbs14:15 Muena bitabataba udi witaba bionsu bidibu bamuambila. Kadi muntu mudimuke kena mua kuitaba kayi muanji kuela meji. 
Proverbs14:16 Muntu wa meji udi utshina bualu bubi, ubuepuka. Kadi mutatakane udi upututuka, kayi wela meji ku bualu nansha bumue." 
Proverbs14:17 Muntu udi ufika munda lukasa, udi wenza bualu bupote. Udi wela meji mabi, udi udikebela lukinu." 
Proverbs14:18 Budingidingi ntshiuma tshia bantu batshimbakane. Kadi lumu lua bantu badimuke ke dimanya dia malu. 
Proverbs14:19 Bantu babi nebikale ku bumfumu bua bantu bakane. Benji ba malu mabi nebimanyine ku biibi bia bantu bakane. 
Proverbs14:20 Muntu mupele badi bamubenga ne kudi muena mutumba nende. Kadi muena biuma udi ne balunda ba bungi. 
Proverbs14:21 Muntu udi upepeja mukuende udi wenza bibi. Kadi muntu udi wenzela mupele bimpe udi muena diakalenga. 
Proverbs14:22 Bantu badi bela meji a kuenza bibi badi bapambuke. Kadi bantu badi bela meji mempe, bantu nebabanange ne muoyi umue." 
Proverbs14:23 Mudimu onsu udi ne diawu difutu. Kadi lubuakabuaka ludi lukeba bupele. 
Proverbs14:24 Biuma ke nsala wa kalumbandi wa bena meji. Kadi batatakane diabu difutu mbutatakane buabu. 
Proverbs14:25 Muntu udi ujadika bualu ne diyi dimue udi mua kupandisha bantu. Kadi udi ujadika ne dishima, udi ushiminyinangana malu." 
Proverbs14:26 Kutshina Maweja-Nangila ke kusomba ku matshi talalaa, bualu yeye udi ulama bana bende." 
Proverbs14:27 Ditshina dia Maweja-Nangila didi dipetesha muoyi; didi diepula muntu ku njiwu ya lufu. 
Proverbs14:28 Lumu lua mukalenga wa ditunga ludi ku bungi bua bantu badiye nabu. Padi mukalenga kayi ne bantu, bumfumu buende kabuenaku to." 
Proverbs14:29 Muntu udi kayi ufika munda lukasa, udi ne lungenyi luvule. Kadi udi ufika munda lukasa, udi uleja bupote buende." 
Proverbs14:30 Bupole budi mu muoyi budi busanguluja mubidi. Kadi mukawu udi bu disama didi didia mifuba. 
Proverbs14:31 Muntu udi ukengesha mupele, udi upenda Mvidi Mukulu wakamufuka. Kadi udi umuambuluisha, udi unemeka wakamufuka." 
Proverbs14:32 Malu mabi adi muntu mubi wenza adi amufila ku kabutu. Kadi muntu muakane udi utekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, nansha pakadiye pa kufua." 
Proverbs14:33 Muntu udi wela lungenyi udi ne meji. Kabena mua kusangana lungenyi kudi bantu batshimbakane to. 
Proverbs14:34 Kuenza malu makane nkuyisha ditunga kumpala. Kadi malu mabi adi akuatshisha ditunga bundu. 
Proverbs14:35 Mukalenga wa ditunga udi wanyisha balombodi ba lungenyi. Kadi udi utandisha badi kabayi nalu. 
Proverbs15:1 Diandamuna dilenga didi dituyisha lonji. Kadi diyi dibi didi dilundula tshiji. 
Proverbs15:2 Miaku ya muntu wa meji idi ipetesha dijinga dia kulonga malu. Kadi mukana mua mutshimbakane mudi nnutangalaja amu malu mabi a bupote. 
Proverbs15:3 Mesu a Maweja-Nangila adi atangila miaba yonsu. Udi ujooja bimpe ne babi. 
Proverbs15:4 Miaku idi ikolesha muntu mu maboku, idi imusanguluja. Kadi miaku ya tshikisu idi inyanga muoyi wa muntu." 
Proverbs15:5 Muntu mupote udi upetula mibelu ya tatuende. Kadi udi uyitaba udi uleja mudiye muena meji. 
Proverbs15:6 Udi witaba Mvidi Mukulu udi usomba mu bubanji. Kadi mpetu mipeta ku malu mabi idi ilela dikenga. 
Proverbs15:7 Miaku ya muena meji idi itangalaja dimanya. Kadi batshimbakane badi mu mitu mutupu. 
Proverbs15:8 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula milambu ya bantu babi. Kadi udi wanyisha bikole dilomba dia bantu ba diyi dimue. 
Proverbs15:9 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula nsombelu ya bantu babi. Kadi udi unanga badi balonda njila ya buakane. 
Proverbs15:10 Badi banyoka bikole bantu badi bapambuka mu njila ya buakane. Kulengulula mibelu nkuya ku lufu. 
Proverbs15:11 Maweja-Nangila mmumanye bionsu, nansha bidi mu kandondu ka buloba. Nanku mudi muntu mua kusokoka Mvidi Mukulu malu adi munda muende mmunyi?" 
Proverbs15:12 Muena ditambisha kena musue badi bamubela. Kena ukonka bantu ba meji bualu nansha bumue. 
Proverbs15:13 Muntu udi ne disanka udi ne mpala wa mimuemue. Kadi muntu udi ne kanyinganyinga udi ne minyengu mu mpala. 
Proverbs15:14 Muntu udi wela meji udi musue kumanya malu. Kadi muntu mutatakane udi musue kulonga malu a bupale matuku onsu. 
Proverbs15:15 Matuku onsu mukengi udi usomba mu dikenga. Kadi muntu wa dikasa dimpe udi usanka matuku onsu. 
Proverbs15:16 Mbimpe kuikala mupele udi uvuluka Maweja-Nangila, pa mutu pa kuikala muena biuma, kadi muikale ne dipampakana." 
Proverbs15:17 Mbimpe kudia matamba muaba udibu bakunanga, pa mutu pa kudia munyinyi wa manyi mukupa ne lukinu mu muoyi." 
Proverbs15:18 Muntu wa lonji udi ukeba matandu, kadi muntu wa lutulu udi watuyisha." 
Proverbs15:19 Muena lulengu udi utangila njila yonsu bu ya meba. Muntu muakane udi usangana miaba yonsu njila milongolola bimpe. 
Proverbs15:20 Muana wa balume wa meji udi usankisha baledi bende. Muntu mutshimbakane udi upepeja bana babu. 
Proverbs15:21 Malu a bupote adi asankisha muntu udi kayi ne meji; kadi muntu udi wela meji, udi uya buludi mu njila wa buakane." 
Proverbs15:22 Pikala bantu kabayi bakonkangana lungenyi, mapangadika abu adi tshianana. Malu abu adi mua kukumbana, pikala bantu tshisumbu bafila ngenyi." 
Proverbs15:23 Padi muntu wandamuna nkonku biakane udi ne disanka, nangananga padiye ufila diandamuna kampanda pa tshikondu tshiadi." 
Proverbs15:24 Muntu wa lungenyi udi ulonda njila udi lunupetesha muoyi. Udi wepuka njila udi upueka mu kandondu ka buloba. 
Proverbs15:25 Maweja-Nangila udi ubumbula nzubu wa muena ditambisha, kadi udi ulama lupangu lua mukaji mukamba." 
Proverbs15:26 Maweja-Nangila udi udiombola meji mabi adi bantu bela, kadi udi wanyisha miaku ya dijingilangana nayi disanka." 
Proverbs15:27 Muntu udi ne lukuka lua biuma udi ukebela nzubu wende kabutu. Udi kayi wangata mabuejila nealale matuku mavule. 
Proverbs15:28 Muntu muakane udi wela meji bangabanga ne kuandamunaye. Kadi muntu mubi udi upututuka bua kujanangana. 
Proverbs15:29 Maweja-Nangila kena munange bantu babi. Kadi udi uteleja padi bantu bakane balomba. 
Proverbs15:30 Kutangila muntu ne musangelu kudi kumusankisha. Lumu luimpe ludiye upeta ludi lumusanguluja. 
Proverbs15:31 Muntu udi uteleja mubelu udi mua kumuambuluisha, neasombe munkatshi mua bantu ba meji." 
Proverbs15:32 Muntu udi kayi musue kulonga malu, neadikengeshe yeye nkayende. Kadi udi uteleja mibelu neasombe biakane." 
Proverbs15:33 Udi utshina Maweja-Nangila udi upeta meji. Udi udipuekesha ke udi mua kupeta lumu. 
Proverbs16:1 Muntu udi wela meji bua kuenza bualu kampanda munda muende. Kadi Maweja-Nangila ke udi mua kuamba muende mua ndekelu mudiye mumone. 
Proverbs16:2 Muntu yonsu udi wela meji ne: bionsu bindi ngenza mbilenga. Kadi Maweja-Nangila ke udi mumanye mudi muoyi wa muntu yonsu. 
Proverbs16:3 Uteke midimu yebe mu bianza bia Maweja-Nangila, nanku nenkumbaje biuvua muele meji." 
Proverbs16:4 Tshintu tshionsu tshidi Maweja-Nangila muenze, tshidi ne kipatshila katshi; nanku wakalongoluela muntu mubi dituku dia dimunyoka." 
Proverbs16:5 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula bantu badi baditambisha. Bushuwa neabanyoke kamuyi mpata. 
Proverbs16:6 Unange bantu, ulamate Maweja-Nangila, nanku neakufuile luse bua ntupakanyi yebe. Newepuke bubi paudi utshina Maweja-Nangila." 
Proverbs16:7 Padi Maweja-Nangila muanyishe nsombelu wa muntu, udi ubueja diumvuangana pankatshi pende ne baluishi bende." 
Proverbs16:8 Kupeta difutu dikese mu buakane, nkupita kuikala ne bintu bia bungi bipeta mu buenzayi." 
Proverbs16:9 Muntu udi upangadika bua kuenza bualu, kadi Maweja-Nangila ke udi ubujadika, ubukumbaja." 
Proverbs16:10 Padi mukalenga wa ditunga wakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nanku diba didiye ukosa nsambu kena utupakana." 
Proverbs16:11 Maweja-Nangila udi musue bua bipimu bikale bijalame. Udi ushindika kabidi mudibu ne bua kutempa majitu. 
Proverbs16:12 Mukalenga ki mmunange bua bantu benze bibi, bualu nkuasa wa bukalenga udi ujalama padi buakane." 
Proverbs16:13 Mukalenga udi ujinga bua bamuambile malu patoke. Udi unanga bantu badi bamba malu pa wowu. 
Proverbs16:14 Padi mukalenga ufika munda, udi mua kufikisha muntu ku lufu. Kadi muntu wa lungenyi udi umutuyisha." 
Proverbs16:15 Mimuemue pa mpala wa mukalenga idi isanguluja bantu. Muoyi wende wa kalolu udi bu mvula udi utalaja buloba. 
Proverbs16:16 Bidi bitambe buimpe kupeta meji ne lungenyi, pa mutu pa kupeta mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Proverbs16:17 Bantu bakane badi bepuka bubi, bualu muntu udi wakaja nsombelu wende udi ulama muoyi wende." 
Proverbs16:18 Udi uditambisha neabutuke. Udi udisua neapone panshi. 
Proverbs16:19 Bidi bipite buimpe kuikala muntu mupuekele udi usomba pamue ne bapele, pa mutu pa kuabanyangana bintu bivule ne bantu badi baditambisha." 
Proverbs16:20 Muntu udi uteleja bidibu bamuambila neatuute dikasa dimpe. Udi utekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila udi muena diakalenga. 
Proverbs16:21 Muntu udi ujingulula malu ne meji udi muena lungenyi. Padiye ulongesha ne miaku idi isankisha bantu, ibatua ku muoyi, nebamuitabe lukasa." 
Proverbs16:22 Badi balonda meji nebapete muoyi. Batshimbakane badi babanyoka bua bupote buabu. 
Proverbs16:23 Bantu ba meji badi basunguluja tshia kuamba. Ke mudibu baluisha bantu ne miaku yabu. 
Proverbs16:24 Miaku mimpe idi bu buitshi, budi busheme mukana, biengelela mubidi." 
Proverbs16:25 Muntu udi mua kuela meji ne: njila undi ndonda udi muimpe. Kadi njila awu udi mua kumufikisha ku lufu. 
Proverbs16:26 Nzala idi ikuatshisha muntu mudimu bikole, bualu ku mudimu ke kudiye mua kutuyishila nzala yende." 
Proverbs16:27 Muntu wa tshidingidingi udi wela meji a kuenzela bantu bibi. Ludimi luende ludi luosha bantu ne malu mabi. 
Proverbs16:28 Muntu wa malu a muinshimuinshi udi ujuula matandu. Muena lunsonga udi unyanga malunda a bantu. 
Proverbs16:29 Muntu wa tshikisu udi udinga balunda bende, ubakebela kabutu." 
Proverbs16:30 Tangila muntu udi ubuita ku mesu, usumakaja mishiku. Mmulongolole bualu bua kuenza. Ukadi mumane kubuenza mene." 
Proverbs16:31 Nsuki mitoke nnsala wa kalumbandi, bualu amu bantu bakane ke badi balala matuku mavule pa buloba." 
Proverbs16:32 Tshilobu tshia mvita ke muntu udi kayi ufika munda lukasa. Muntu udi udikolela mmupite tshilobu tshidi tshikuata tshimenga. 
Proverbs16:33 Bantu badi batshinka bidi mua kuenzeka, kadi Maweja-Nangila ke udi ushindika bualu muende mudiye musue." 
Proverbs17:1 Bidi bimpe kudia tshipese tshia diampa diume ne ditalala, pa mutu pa kubuela mu didia dia tshibilu dienzela mu nzubu wa mutoyi." 
Proverbs17:2 Muena mudimu wa meji udi mupite muana mupote ku mushinga. Neapete tshiende tshia bumpianyi ne bantu ba muntu. 
Proverbs17:3 Mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, badi babiteta mu kapia, kadi Maweja-Nangila udi uteta mushinga udi nawu muntu." 
Proverbs17:4 Muntu mubi udi uteleja ne ntema muntu udi wakula miaku mibi. Muena dishima udi uteleja muntu udi ushimangana. 
Proverbs17:5 Muntu udi useka bapele udi useka Mvidi Mukulu udi mubafuke. Muntu udi usanka padi dikenga dikuata mukuabu nebamunyoke. 
Proverbs17:6 Disanka dia bantu bakulumpe mpadibu bamone biikulu babu. Disanka dia bana mpadibu batangile baledi babu. 
Proverbs17:7 Muaku wa kanemu kawena ukumbanyina muntu mupote; kadi dishima kadiena dikumbanyina muntu udi ulombola bantu. 
Proverbs17:8 Bantu bakuabu badi bela meji ne: kubuejila muntu tshintu, neatupeteshe diakalenga, nekutututshishe dikasa dimpe mu midimu yetu yonsu." 
Proverbs17:9 Kupua tshilema muoyi nkulengeja bulunda. Kadi kutshiela misangu ne misangu kudi kushipa malanda. 
Proverbs17:10 Mubelu udibu bapesha muntu wa lungenyi udi mupite nkodi lukama mituuta muntu mupote. 
Proverbs17:11 Muntu mubi udi ukeba mua kuenzelangana bibi. Ke mudiye udikebela yeye nkayende diakabi. 
Proverbs17:12 Bidi bimpe kusambakena ne nyama wa lonji uvuabu banyenga bana bende, pa mutu pa kusambakena ne tshidingidingi tshia kalanda-musenga." 
Proverbs17:13 Muntu udi upingaja bubi pa buimpe buvuabu bamuenzele, dikenga kadiena diumuka ku nzubu kuende to." 
Proverbs17:14 Kutuadija matandu kudi bu kubumbula nkila. Puwa patshidi matandu kaayi manji kukola. 
Proverbs17:15 Mubingishi wa muena tshibawu, ne mupishi wa muntu muakane, mbantu babidi badi Maweja-Nangila udiwula mushindu wa momumue." 
Proverbs17:16 Makuta adi mua kuambuluisha muntu mutatakane ku tshinyi? Bua kusumba nawu meji anyi? Kena nansha welaku meji to! 
Proverbs17:17 Mulunda muimpe neakuambuluishe mu malu onsu. Muanetu udi pamue nanyi mu dikenga dionsu. 
Proverbs17:18 Muntu mubule lungenyi udi udieyeka bua dibanza dia munga muntu. Udi udiila mukuabu lupiku. 
Proverbs17:19 Udi musue kutandangana, mmusue kupia tshibawu. Udi udileja mudiye ne ditambisha neabutuke." 
Proverbs17:20 Muntu muena dishima kena upeta diakalenga. Udi wakula malu mabi neabuele mu dikenga. 
Proverbs17:21 Udi ulela muntu mupote udi ne kanyinganyinga. Tatu wa muntu tshidingidingi kena ne disanka. 
Proverbs17:22 Disanka didi dijikija disama dia muntu. Kadi dibungama didi dikepesha bukole bua mubidi. 
Proverbs17:23 Muntu mubi udi wanyisha mabuejila adibu bafila bua amone mua kunyanga tshilumbu. 
Proverbs17:24 Muntu muakane udi ukuata mudimu ne meji. Kadi muntu mupote udi utangila kudiye kayi mua kufika. 
Proverbs17:25 Muana mutshimbakane udi upetesha tatuende kanyinganyinga, ubungamija mamu uvua mumulele." 
Proverbs17:26 Kufundila muntu udi kayi bualu tshibawu kudi kubi. Kunyoka muntu wa nsongu kakuena kuakana. 
Proverbs17:27 Muntu mushidimuke udi ulaminyina miaku. Muntu wa lungenyi udi ukeba diba dia kuela meji. 
Proverbs17:28 Nansha muntu mupale, padiye upuwa, badi bamuangata bu muena meji. Padiye kayi wakula badi bamuangata bu muena lungenyi." 
Proverbs18:1 Muntu udi udinanga, udi udilamuna kudi bakuabu. Udi ufika munda padibu bafila meji makuabu." 
Proverbs18:2 Mupote kena musue kumvua bidibu bamuambila. Kadi udi ujinga kuleja amu bidi mu meji ende. 
Proverbs18:3 Bubi budi bukeba kadiwu; buenzayi budi bukeba bundu. 
Proverbs18:4 Miaku ya muntu idi mua kuikala miondoke bu mayi manene malabale. Idi ipetesha muntu muoyi bu mudi mpokolu ubudika mayi. 
Proverbs18:5 Kubingishi muena tshibawu, kupishi muntu muakane." 
Proverbs18:6 Miaku ya muntu mupote idi ikeba matandu. Tshidiye wamba tshidi tshikeba mvita. 
Proverbs18:7 Mupote udi udikebela lufu, miaku yende ke buteyi budi bumukuata yeye nkayende." 
Proverbs18:8 Miaku ya muena lunsonga idi bu bintu bisheme bidi bantu bafuilakana. 
Proverbs18:9 Muntu udi ulengulula mudimu wende mmuanabu ne muntu udi uunyanga. 
Proverbs18:10 Maweja-Nangila udi bu nzubu udibu bakolesha ne bimana. Muntu muakane udi unyemena kudiye, udi upanduka." 
Proverbs18:11 Kadi muena biuma udi utangila biuma biende bu tshimenga tshikolesha ne bimana, wela meji ne: ke bidi bindama." 
Proverbs18:12 Bantu badi baditambisha nebabutuke. Udi udipuekesha neapete lumu. 
Proverbs18:13 Muntu udi wandamuna lukonku kayi muanji kuteleja bimpe, udi uleja bupote buende; neafue bundu kabidi." 
Proverbs18:14 Padi muntu utekemena ne: nempande, udi upanda. Udi kayi utekemena lupandu, udi mua kufua lukasa." 
Proverbs18:15 Muntu wa lungenyi udi ujinga kumanya malu a bungi. Muntu wa meji udi ukeba kumvua miaku idi yamba bualu. 
Proverbs18:16 Kupesha muntu tshintu, kudi kukunzuluila njila wa wewe kumonangana ne bantu banene." 
Proverbs18:17 Muntu udi ulumbulula kumpala utu umueka bu mubinga. Kadi padi muena tshilumbu nende ufika, udi umupisha." 
Proverbs18:18 Padibu batshinka, baneme babidi badi ku tshilumbu, badi mua kumvuangana, kulekela matandu." 
Proverbs18:19 Muanenu uuvua upenda udi bu tshimenga tshidibu bakolesha ne bimana: mbikole bua wewe kuakula nende. Matandu a bena muntu mmakole, adi bu milonda ya kukanga nayi bimana." 
Proverbs18:20 Muntu udi uukuta ne diyi dia mukana muende. Tshidiye wamba tshidi mua kumudisha. 
Proverbs18:21 Tshiudi wamba tshidi mua kukufila ku muoyi nansha ku lufu. Nanku paudi munange kuakula, wanyisha kabidi bionsu bidi miaku yebe mua kukupetesha." 
Proverbs18:22 Muntu udi mupete mukaji, udi mupete diakalenga. Ke dipa didi Maweja-Nangila umupesha." 
Proverbs18:23 Mupele udi wakula udionga, kadi muena biuma udi wakula utanda." 
Proverbs18:24 Muntu udi ne balunda ba bungi, bobu mene badi mua kumukebela dikenga. Kadi mulunda muimpe mmupite ne muanenu." 
Proverbs19:1 Mbimpe kuikala mupele udi ulonda njila wa buakane, pa mutu pa kuikala mutatakane udi wakula ushima bantu." 
Proverbs19:2 Muaba udi kauyi dimanya, disuminyina kadiena ne bua nsongu. Kudia lukasa nkupia mukana." 
Proverbs19:3 Padi bantu badikebela makenga ku bupote buabu, badi bajana Maweja-Nangila." 
Proverbs19:4 Biuma bidi bivudijila muntu balunda. Kadi mupele mmufuane wajimija wende umuepele udiye nende. 
Proverbs19:5 Badi banyoka muntu udi ujadika malu a dishima. Udi udinga bantu mmuena tshibawu. 
Proverbs19:6 Bantu ba bungi badi balabidila muntu munene. Bonsu badi badia bulunda ne tshipapayi. 
Proverbs19:7 Mupele badi bamukina kudi bana babu. Yeye mupete bualu bunene, balunda bende badi bamubenga. Padiye ubasengelela, badi baya." 
Proverbs19:8 Kumanya mua kuela meji nkudienzela wewe nkayebe bimpe. Udi ukeba kujingulula malu neapete diakalenga. 
Proverbs19:9 Badi banyoka muntu udi ujadika malu a dishima. Udi udinga bantu neabutuke. 
Proverbs19:10 Muntu mutatakane katshia ki mmusombe mu bubanji. Mupika katshia ki mmutumine bamfumu diyi. 
Proverbs19:11 Muntu wa lungenyi nansha yeye mufike munda, udi amu ulama lutulu. Lumu luende mpadiye upua malu mabi avuabu bamuenzele muoyi." 
Proverbs19:12 Tshiji tshia mukalenga tshidi tshikuata bowa bu muadi wa nyama wa ntambue. Kadi kalolu kadiye uleja muntu, kadi bu lumuma ludi lupueka pa bisosa, lufila tshitalela." 
Proverbs19:13 Muana mutatakane udi ukengesha tatuende. Mukaji wa mutoyi udi bu mulondu mutubuke udi usukumuna mayi panshi. 
Proverbs19:14 Nzubu ne biuma mbintu bidi muntu mua kupiana kudi batatuende. Kadi mukaji wa meji badi bamupetela amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Proverbs19:15 Bufuba budi bubueja muntu mu dikenga. Udi ubika ne lulengu nealale ne nzala. 
Proverbs19:16 Muntu udi unemeka mikenji neashale ne muoyi. Udi uyipetula neafue lukasa. 
Proverbs19:17 Paudi upesha mupele tshintu, udi utshisombesha Maweja-Nangila. Yeye ke wakufuta mudimu webe wa luse." 
Proverbs19:18 Ubele muanebe pautshidi ne diba dia kumubela. Kadi tshiji katshikufikishi ku dikebela bana njiwu ya lufu. 
Proverbs19:19 Muena tshiji tshikole afute tshibawu. Wewe mubenge kumufutshisha, udi umusaka bua atungunuke." 
Proverbs19:20 Teleja mibelu, wanyisha bua bakulongeshe. Nanku neushale muntu wa lungenyi." 
Proverbs19:21 Muntu udi wela meji a bungi mu muoyi. Kadi amu bidi Mvidi Mukulu ujadika ke bidi bienzeka. 
Proverbs19:22 Bantu badi bananga muntu wa nsongu udi ne muoyi wa kalolu. Mbimpe kuikala mupele pa mutu pa kuikala muena dishima. 
Proverbs19:23 Muntu udi utshina Maweja-Nangila, neapete muoyi, neasombe mu bubanji kayi umona dikenga." 
Proverbs19:24 Muena lulengu udi wela tshianza tshiende mu dilongu. Kadi kena ne bukole bua kutshinkisha mukana. 
Proverbs19:25 Paudi utuuta muntu udi uditambisha, mupote pende neadimuke. Paudi ubela muena lungenyi, udi umvua ne: badi bandongesha malu." 
Proverbs19:26 Muana udi unyanga tatuende, nansha wipata mamuende, mmuana mubi, udi ufuishangana bundu." 
Proverbs19:27 Muananyi, wewe mulekele kuteleja badi bakubela, neupue nansha bidibu bamane kukulongesha muoyi." 
Proverbs19:28 Mujadiki wa malu a dishima udi utua ku ba wetu. Muntu mubi udi ujinga amu kuenza bibi. 
Proverbs19:29 Bena ditambisha nebabanyoke. Muntu mutatakane nebamutuute. 
Proverbs20:1 Mvinyo udi ufikisha muntu ku matandu. Maluvu makole adi asaka muntu ku mutoyi. Muntu yonsu udi ubinua ukuatshika, kena ne meji." 
Proverbs20:2 Mudibu batshina nyama wa ntambue udi ukungula, ke mudibu ne bua kutshina mukalenga udi mufike munda. Muntu udi ujula tshiji tshia mukalenga udi udikebela njiwu." 
Proverbs20:3 Muntu wa meji udi wepuka matandu. Amu bantu bapote ke badi badibuejamu. 
Proverbs20:4 Muena lulengu udi kayi udima mu tshikondu tshia mvula, kakupeta kantu mu tshikondu tshia dinowa bintu to." 
Proverbs20:5 Meji adi munda mua muntu mmasokome, bu mayi adi munda mua buloba. Amu muntu wa lungenyi ke udi mumanye mua kuapatula munda mua muntu nende." 
Proverbs20:6 Bantu ba bungi badi badisua, badiamba mudibu ne muoyi muimpe. Kadi bidi bikole menemene mua kupeta muntu wa nanku." 
Proverbs20:7 Pikala muntu usomba nsombelu muakane ne wa kalolu, bana bashiyaye panu nebikale ne diakalenga." 
Proverbs20:8 Pikala mukalenga musombe ukosa nsambu, udi utandula musangu umue muena dishima." 
Proverbs20:9 Muntu kena mua kuamba ne: “Tshiena ne tshilema nansha tshimue. Kondu ka munda muanyi kakena kangasa tshilumbu.” 
Proverbs20:10 Kupima bujitu nansha bule bua tshintu ne bipimu bia kudinga nabi bantu, nngenzelu udi Maweja-Nangila udiwula bikole." 
Proverbs20:11 Nansha muana, ku bidiye wenza, ukadi uleja muoyi udiye nawu. Mudimu udiye ukuata neuleje mudiye muakane, wa muoyi mulenga." 
Proverbs20:12 Maweja-Nangila mmufuke mesu bua kumona, matshi bua kumvua." 
Proverbs20:13 Pawanangila tulu neushale mupele. Kadi ujuke diba diakane, bua udie uukuta." 
Proverbs20:14 Musumbi udi wamba ne: “Mmushinga mukole! Mmushinga mukole.” Kadi yeye mumane kuya pa nkayende udi udiela ka lumbandi ne disanka. 
Proverbs20:15 Tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne busanga bidi bivule, kadi tshintu tshidi muntu kayi mua kusangana lukasa ke miaku ya meji." 
Proverbs20:16 Pikala muntu mudieyeke kuudi bua dibanza dia muntu uudi kuyi mumanye, ukuate tshilamba tshiende lukole, bua muntu uudi kuyi mumanye." 
Proverbs20:17 Tshiakudia tshiudi muibe tshidi tshisheme mukana. Kadi kunyima, mukana muebe mudi muwule ne nsoka tente." 
Proverbs20:18 Bidi bantu bajadika bidi bikumbana padibu bafila meji malenga. Pawikala musue kuluangana mvita, anji kudilongolola bimpe." 
Proverbs20:19 Muena bijanu udi usokolola nansha malu masokome. Nanku epuka muena tshiakulakula. 
Proverbs20:20 Padi muntu utshipa tatuende nansha mamuende, neamone matuku ende a panu akoseka bu mudi muendu ujima mu miidima." 
Proverbs20:21 Muntu udi wangula biuma lukasa ku ntuadijilu, kakulubuluka nabi ku ndekelu to." 
Proverbs20:22 Kupingaji bibi pa bibi bidibu bakuenzela. Utekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila, yeye nkayende neakuambuluishe." 
Proverbs20:23 Maweja-Nangila udi udiwula majitu adibu bapima badinga bantu. Udi ubenga tshipimu tshia dishima. 
Proverbs20:24 Maweja-Nangila ke udi ulombola muoyi wa muntu. Mudi muntu mua kumanya kudiye uya mbishi? 
Proverbs20:25 Kuamba lukasa ne: “Nendambule Mvidi Mukulu tshintu kampande,” nansha kumulaya bualu kuyi muanji kuela meji, nkudikebela njiwu." 
Proverbs20:26 Mukalenga wa meji udi utandula benji ba bibi. Udi ubanyoka kayi ubafuila luse to. 
Proverbs20:27 Kondu ka munda ke muendu udi Maweja-Nangila mupeshe muntu, bua kumuleja patoke malu adiye nawu munda muende." 
Proverbs20:28 Padi mukalenga wa muoyi muimpe wenza malu mimpe, neashale ne muoyi. Padiye ukosa nsambu pa yoyi udi ushindika bukalenga buende." 
Proverbs20:29 Dikanda dia bansonga ke buimpe buabu. Lumu lua bantu banunu ke nsuki yabu mitoke. 
Proverbs20:30 Mputa idi itusamisha ke idi ituambuluisha bua tudilengeje. Mituutu mikole ke idi yakaja meji etu. 
Proverbs21:1 Muoyi wa mukalenga udi bu musulu wa mayi udi Maweja-Nangila utuma kuonsu kudiye musue. 
Proverbs21:2 Muntu yonsu udi wela meji ne: bionsu bindi ngenza bidi bimpe. Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi ulumbuluisha muntu bilondeshile malu adiye wipatshila. 
Proverbs21:3 Muntu udi ulonda njila wa buakane, muikale kabidi ne muoyi wa kalolu, udi usankisha Maweja-Nangila, mupite muntu udi umulambula milambu." 
Proverbs21:4 Mpala wa kapeja ne muoyi wa ditambisha ke bidi bileja bubi bua muena lonji. 
Proverbs21:5 Muntu wa disuminyina, ukuata kabidi mudimu ne meji, udi upeta tshipeta. Kadi udi wenza malu mu tshipututuku, neabuele mu tshiyole tshia nzala." 
Proverbs21:6 Bantu badi bapeta biuma ne didinga mbantu bapote, badi bafika ku lufu." 
Proverbs21:7 Tshikisu tshia bantu babi tshidi tshibabutula, bualu badi babenga kulonda njila wa buakane." 
Proverbs21:8 Bena tshibawu kabena balonda njila mululame to. Kadi bantu bakane badi benda amu buludi mu njila wa buakane. 
Proverbs21:9 Mbimpe kusomba talala mu kazubu, pa mutu pa kusomba mu nzubu munene pamue ne mukaji wa mutoyi." 
Proverbs21:10 Muntu mubi udi ukeba mua kuenzela bakuabu bibi. Kena umvuila nansha mulunda wende luse. 
Proverbs21:11 Padibu banyoka muena ditambisha mupote udi upeta meji. Kadi muntu wa meji udi ulonga malu ku bionsu bidibu bamulongesha. 
Proverbs21:12 Mukalenga muakane udi umona bionsu bidi bienzeka mu nzubu mua bantu babi. Udi ubabueja lukasa mu dikenga. 
Proverbs21:13 Muntu udi ubenga kuteleja lubila lua muena dikenga, nebabenge kuteleja kabidi luende diba didiye mu dikenga." 
Proverbs21:14 Dipa dia mu musokoku didi ditalaja tshiji. Kusankisha muntu ne tshintu mu musokoku kudi kutuyisha tshiji tshikole. 
Proverbs21:15 Muntu muakane udi usanka padibu bakosa nsambu pa yoyi. Kadi ke bidi bikuatshisha muntu mubi bowa. 
Proverbs21:16 Muntu udi umbuka mu njila wa bena meji, neaye kusomba lukasa kaba kamue ne bantu bafue." 
Proverbs21:17 Udi unanga masanka a mubidi neashale mupele. Munu wa mvinyo nansha mudiavi, kena mua kupeta bubanji to." 
Proverbs21:18 Muntu mubi udi kayi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu, kayi ulama meyi ende, neabuele mu dikenga, pa mutu pa bantu bakane badi benza amu bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue." 
Proverbs21:19 Mbimpe kuasa nkaya mu tshipela, pa mutu pa kusomba mu nzubu pamue ne mukaji muena tshiji ne mutoyi." 
Proverbs21:20 Mu diyeba dia muena meji mudi biakudia bivule ne bintu bikuabu bia mushinga mukole. Kadi muntu mutatakane udi ujimija bionsu bidiye nabi. 
Proverbs21:21 Muntu wa disanka udi ulonda njila wa buakane. Neasombe matuku mavule panu. Bantu nebamunemeke, bamusankishe kabidi." 
Proverbs21:22 Muena meji udi mua kukuata tshimenga tshidi bilobu bilame. Udi mua kushimbula bimana biatshi bivua bena ditunga batekemena. 
Proverbs21:23 Muntu udi udilama ku bionsu bidiye wakula, udi udiepula ku makenga mavule." 
Proverbs21:24 Muntu udi upepeja bantu, uditambisha, kena wangata tshintu nansha tshimue ne mushinga. Malu onsu adiye wenza adi aleja mudiye uditambisha kashidi." 
Proverbs21:25 Majinga adi muena lulengu nawu adi amushipa, bualu bianza biende kabiena binanga kukuata mudimu." 
Proverbs21:26 Bantu bakuabu badi bapitshisha matuku abu mu dijinga dia bintu. Kadi muntu wa nsongu udi upeshangana bintu kayi utabala. 
Proverbs21:27 Bantu babi badi balambula milambu mibi, nangananga padibu bayilambula ne meji mabi." 
Proverbs21:28 Kabena bitabe bualu budi muena dishima ujadika to. Kadi muntu udi wamba amu biwaye mumvue, nebamuteleje." 
Proverbs21:29 Muntu mubi udi wenda ne dikima. Kadi muntu muimpe udi wenza malu ende onsu kayi upampakana. 
Proverbs21:30 Meji, lungenyi nansha dimanya bidi tshianana, paudi uluisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Proverbs21:31 Badi bavuadika nyama ya tubalu bia kuluangana nabi, bua kuya mu mvita. Kadi anu Maweja-Nangila ke udi utshimuna." 
Proverbs22:1 Mbimpe kuikala ne lumu luimpe, pa mutu pa kuikala ne biuma bia bungi. Mbimpe bantu bakuanyishe pa mutu pa wewe kupeta mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Proverbs22:2 Muneme ne mupele, mbantu bamue. Maweja-Nangila ke udi mubafuke bonsu babidi." 
Proverbs22:3 Muntu mudimuke udi umona dikenga diamba kumukuata, udiepuka. Bantu batatakane badi babuelamu musangu umue, badikengeshisha." 
Proverbs22:4 Muntu muena bupuekele udi utumikila Maweja-Nangila, neapete bubanji ne lumu; nealale matuku mavule panu." 
Proverbs22:5 Meba ne mateyi bidi mu njila wa bena buenzayi. Udi musue kulala panu udi ubiepuka. 
Proverbs22:6 Leja muana diakamue njila muimpe udiye mua kulonda. Nanku neashale kumulama too ne pa kulakajaye. 
Proverbs22:7 Mubanji udi mfumu wa mupele. Bantu badi basombangana bintu, badi bapika ba badi babasombesha." 
Proverbs22:8 Udi ukuna malu mabi udi upola dikenga; dikombu didiye utuutangana nadi neditshibuke. 
Proverbs22:9 Muntu udi wenzelangana bimpe, Mvidi Mukulu neamuele lupemba, bualu tshiende tshiakudia udi wabanyangana ne bapele." 
Proverbs22:10 Ipata muena ditambisha, matandu neakoseke, mitoyi ne bipendu nebijike." 
Proverbs22:11 Pikala muntu musue kudia bulunda ne mukalenga, ikale ne muoyi muimpe, amanye kabidi mua kuakula bimpe." 
Proverbs22:12 Maweja-Nangila udi musue bua bantu bamanye malu malelela. Ke mudiye ujandula miaku ya bantu bena dishima. 
Proverbs22:13 Muena lulengu utu wamba ne: “Nyama wa ntambue udipu. Tshiena mua kupatuka bua kabayi kundiila mu njila.” 
Proverbs22:14 Miaku ya lubombu ya bakaji bena buendenda, mbuteyi budi bukuatshisha bowa. Badi baponamu kudi muntu udi Maweja-Nangila mudiwule." 
Proverbs22:15 Bupale budi munda mua nsongalume. Nkodi idi imupandisha ku njiwu eyi. 
Proverbs22:16 Muntu udi ukengesha mupele neamututshishe ku ndekelu dikasa dimpe. Udi upa mubanji bintu, neadibueje mu bupele." 
Proverbs22:17 Teleja umvua bimpe, ndi nkumanyisha miaku mimpe ya bena meji. Uvuluke mu muoyi webe malu andi nkuambila." 
Proverbs22:18 Newikale muena diakalenga, pawikala uvuluka malu andi ngamba, walongesha kabidi bantu bakuabu." 
Proverbs22:19 Ndi musue bua utekemene kudi Maweja-Nangila. Ke pandi nkulongesha kabidi malu lelu. 
Proverbs22:20 Ndi mukufundile mibelu makumi asatu idi mua kukuelesha meji. 
Proverbs22:21 Mibelu ayi neikulongeshe malu malelela. Pikala muntu ukuebeja malu, nenku neumumanyishe amu malu malelela." 
Proverbs22:22 Kunyengi mupele bintu, bua padiye kayi ne bukole. Kupishi muntu ku tshilumbuluilu, udi kayi ne mumulumbuluidi." 
Proverbs22:23 Bualu Maweja-Nangila neabakuile; kabidi neashipe badi babanyenga bintu. 
Proverbs22:24 Kuena mua kudia bulunda ne muntu muena tshiji. Kuendi ne muntu udi ufika munda lukasa. 
Proverbs22:25 Bualu neuvue kuidikija malu abu, kuyi mua kudilengeja kabidi to." 
Proverbs22:26 Kuena mua kudieyeka bua mabanza a bende to. 
Proverbs22:27 Pawikala kuyi ne tshintu tshia kuhita, nebakunyenge bulalu buebe mene." 
Proverbs22:28 Kutentuludi mukalu wa kale uvua bankambua bebe bela bua kuleja bunene bua lupangu. 
Proverbs22:29 Wewe mumone muntu wenza mudimu wende bimpe: muntu ewu udi mua kukuatshila nansha bamfumu mene mudimu, pa mutu pa kunkuatshila bantu ba lukutukutu." 
Proverbs23:1 Pawikala udia ku mesa ne muntu muneme, umanye bimpe uudi musombe nende ku mesa." 
Proverbs23:2 Wadikandika, kudileji muudi muena budiavi." 
Proverbs23:3 Biakudia biende bisheme kabikusaminyi muoyi. Bumue badi mua kukupeshabi ne lungenyi lubi. 
Proverbs23:4 Kuipatshidi biuma. Kuteki nansha meji ebe koku. 
Proverbs23:5 Bualu biuma bidi bijimina kuyi muanji kubimona bimpe. Bidi bibuka mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi ubuka mulu, uya kule." 
Proverbs23:6 Kuena mua kudia kua muena muoyi mubi. Kuena mua kualakana biakudia bisheme bidiye ukupesha. 
Proverbs23:7 Bualu meji adiye wela munda muende kaena afuanangana ne malu adiye wenza. Udi ukuambila ne: “Diaku, nuaku.” Kadi muoyi wende kawena kuudi." 
Proverbs23:8 Biakudia bitshiya munda neubiluke. Lumbandi luudi umuela nelujimine patupu! 
Proverbs23:9 Kuambidi mutshimbakane bualu. Kena wangata miaku yebe ne mushinga to. 
Proverbs23:10 Kutentudi mikalu ya kale bua wewe kunyenga bana ba nshiya lupangu. 
Proverbs23:11 Bualu badi ne mubalumbuluidi wa bukole buonsu, ke Mvidi Mukulu. Neabasombuele kuudi." 
Proverbs23:12 Teleja bimpe badi bakulongesha. Teya matshi ku miaku ya badi bakubela. 
Proverbs23:13 Kupampakanyi bua kunyoka muanebe to. Manyoka mimpe kaena amushipa nansha. 
Proverbs23:14 Kadi adi mua kumuepula ku njiwu ya lufu. 
Proverbs23:15 Muananyi, pawikala munange meji, nengikale ne disanka dinene." 
Proverbs23:16 Nensanke pandi ngumvua muudi wamba malu ne lungenyi. 
Proverbs23:17 Kuena mua kuidikija malu adi bantu babi benza. Kadi utshine Maweja-Nangila matuku onsu. 
Proverbs23:18 Nanku neusanke matuku adi kumpala. Kuakufua bundu to. 
Proverbs23:19 Unteleje bimpe, wewe muananyi. Nanku newikale muntu wa meji. Newende buludi mu njila webe." 
Proverbs23:20 Lekela kuenda ne bantu badi bakuatshika maluvu, kabidi ne badiavi ba minyinyi." 
Proverbs23:21 Bualu badiavi ne banuavi nebabuele mu dikenga. Bafuba nebavuale bitetela. 
Proverbs23:22 Teleja tatuebe, bualu mmukulele. Kupepeji mamuebe pakadiye mukulakaje." 
Proverbs23:23 Ikala muntu udi wamba malu malelela, muedi wa meji, muntu mudimuke ne wa lungenyi. Wewe mumane kupeta ngikadilu eyi, kuyinyangi to." 
Proverbs23:24 Tatu udi mulele muntu wa kalolu ne wa meji udi ne disanka dipite bunene. 
Proverbs23:25 Usankishe tatuebe ne mamuebe nanku. Mamuebe apetele diakalenga adi kuudi. 
Proverbs23:26 Muananyi, ngitaba. Sanka bua umfuane meme." 
Proverbs23:27 Wamanya ne: mukaji muena tshiendenda ne mukaji wa bende badi bakukebela njiwu bu mudi tshiina tshile tshibulakane. 
Proverbs23:28 Badi balaminangana mu njila bu mudi bivi benza. Bakadi bamane kupambula bantu bapite bungi. 
Proverbs23:29 Udi mu dikenga, unyingalala mmuntu kaayi? Udi utandangana, udididila matuku onsu nnganyi? Udibu batuuta kapayi bualu mmuntu kaayi? Udi ne mesu kunzuu bu kapia nnganyi?" 
Proverbs23:30 Ke muntu udi unua mvinyo matuku onsu, usambakaja kabidi ne maluvu makole kayi wikisha." 
Proverbs23:31 Kunangidi mudi mvinyo mukunze wengelela mu dikopu. Neapueke bitekete bitekete pa muminu webe. 
Proverbs23:32 Kadi ku nshikidilu ne udiumvue bu muntu musuma kudi nyoka, muela lulengu mu mubidi kudi nyoka wa ntoka." 
Proverbs23:33 Mesu ebe neamone bintu bia bilengulengu. Lungenyi luebe ne miaku yebe nebitshiompakane. 
Proverbs23:34 Neudimone bu muntu udi mu mayi manene, utenkakana kulu kua mutshi wa majuwa." 
Proverbs23:35 Newambe ne: “Bavua bantapa mputa, bantuuta tshiyi mumvue, tshiyi mumanye. Pandi njuka, nendabule kabidi makuabu!”" 
Proverbs24:1 Kuikadi ne muoyi wa kuidikija bantu babi. Kujingi mua kuendakana nansha nabu. 
Proverbs24:2 Badi bajinga amu kuenza malu ne tshikisu. Badi bayukila amu bua malu mabi adibu bakeba kuenza. 
Proverbs24:3 Muntu udi wasa nzubu padiye mumanye kuenza nanku. Udi usombamu bimpe amu padiye ne lungenyi. 
Proverbs24:4 Udi uuja mayeba ne bintu bilenga bia mushinga mukole amu padiye ne dimanya. 
Proverbs24:5 Meji a muntu ke bukole buende. Dimanya diende didi divudija bumfumu buende. 
Proverbs24:6 Udilongolole bimpe paudi uya kuluangana mvita. Ulonde meji a bungi adibu bakupesha bua wewe kutshimuna mvita. 
Proverbs24:7 Muntu mupote kena mua kumvua tshidi bena meji bamba. Nanku kena ne bua kuakula padi bena meji balongolola malu a ditunga. 
Proverbs24:8 Muntu udi wela meji a kuenza bibi, udi upeta lumu bu lua muena buenzayi." 
Proverbs24:9 Meji adiye wela adi amufikisha ku bubi. Bantu kabidi kabena bananga muntu udi useka bakuabu. 
Proverbs24:10 Paudi utekesha mu maboku diba diudi mu dikenga, bukole buebe mbumane kujika!" 
Proverbs24:11 Enza muebe muonsu bua kusungidila badibu bafundila tshibawu tshia lufu, badibu baya nabu ku tshishipelu kapayi bualu." 
Proverbs24:12 Wewe muambe ne: “Tshivua mumanye,” kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmumanye muoyi uudi nawu. Yeye ke udi usunguluja tshiudi wipatshila. Udi ukumona. Udi mumanye malu onsu. Udi ulumbuluisha muntu yonsu bilondeshile bidiye wenza." 
Proverbs24:13 Udie buitshi, muananyi, bualu buitshi mbusheme mukana, kabidi budi bukolesha mubidi." 
Proverbs24:14 Kadi wavuluka ne: meji mempe neakusankishe kabidi bikole. Pawikala wenza nawu mudimu, neakulongeshe. Neusanke matuku atshidi kumpala. Biudi utekemena neubipete." 
Proverbs24:15 Kukebi kunyenga nzubu wa muntu muakane ne budimu, bu mudi muntu mubi wenza. Kumunyengi muaba udiye usomba." 
Proverbs24:16 Muntu muakane, nansha bobu bamukengesha amu kumukengesha, neajuke amu kujuka. Kadi bantu babi, muluishi neabashinde kashidi." 
Proverbs24:17 Kusanki padi muluishi webe udishinda. Kuji maja padi dikenga dimukuata. 
Proverbs24:18 Maweja-Nangila yeye mukumone wenza nanku, kakuanyisha to. Bumue kakunyoka kabidi muluishi webe awu to." 
Proverbs24:19 Kukebi kufuilakana ne bantu babi. Kujingi mua kuidikija malu a benji ba bibi. 
Proverbs24:20 Kabena ne tshidibu mua kutekemena. Diakalenga diabu didi bu muendu udi wenda ujima. 
Proverbs24:21 Muananyi, unemeke Maweja-Nangila, unemeke ne mukalenga kabidi. Kubuelakanyi ne bantu badi basue kukudimuna malu onsu." 
Proverbs24:22 Bualu bantu ba nanku badi mua kubutuka musangu umue. Kuena mumanye kabutu kadi Mvidi Mukulu nansha mukalenga mua kubatumina. 
Proverbs24:23 Bena meji badi bamba kabidi ne: Tshibawu mpolonto mpolonto, wasa kudi tshibawu kuashi kudi muanenu." 
Proverbs24:24 Padi ndumbulula ubingisha muena tshibawu ne: “Kuena ne bualu,” bantu bonsu nebamukine, bamutshipa." 
Proverbs24:25 Kadi bantu badi banyoka muena tshibawu badi bimpe. Bantu bonsu nebabele ka lumbandi. 
Proverbs24:26 Muntu udi wandamuna patoke udi uleja mudiye mulunda wa bushiwa. 
Proverbs24:27 Bangabanga ne kuasa nzubu, anji kujikija midimu yebe ya pambelu, udime madimi ebe bua unowe biakudia." 
Proverbs24:28 Kufundi muena mutumba nebe ku tubadi padiye kayi ne bualu. Udi musue kushima bibi nenku bua tshinyi? 
Proverbs24:29 Kuambi ne: “Nemmuenzele muvuaye mungenzele. Nemmupingajile lupetu luvuaye mumfutshishe!” 
Proverbs24:30 Dimue dituku, mvua mupitshile pabuipi ne budimi bua mvinyo bua muena lulengu mububakane," 
Proverbs24:31 buvua bumena buonsu meba a mingonga ne lupela. Bimana bia lupangu bivua biupuke panshi! 
Proverbs24:32 Meme kuela meji ku bionsu bimvua mumone. Ke meme kujingulula ne: 
Proverbs24:33 paudi ulala katantshi kipi, ubungila tshitupa, ushala mudiolola, maboku mavunge pa tshiadi," 
Proverbs24:34 ke padi bupele bukukuata tshimpitshimpi bu muivi, ke padi dikenga dikufikila bu muntu udi upawula nzubu ya bende." 
Proverbs25:1 Teleja nsumuinu mikuabu ya Shelomu ivuabu basangisha kudi bantu bavua bakuatshila mudimu mu lubanza lua Izkiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
Proverbs25:2 Tudi tunemeka Mvidi Mukulu bualu udi usokoka tshidiye wenza. Tudi tunemeka bakalenga padibu bumvuija bidibu benza. 
Proverbs25:3 Katuena bamanye kudi diulu diye kushikidila mulu. Katuena bamanye kudi buloba buye kushikidila muinshi. Katuena bamanye menemene meji adi mu mioyi ya bakalenga. 
Proverbs25:4 Padibu bumusha bikanganya ku tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nsenda udi upeta tshiamu tshimpe tshia kuenza natshi tshintu tshimpe tshitambe." 
Proverbs25:5 Padibu bumusha bantu benzayi mu lubanza lua mukalenga, yeye neashindike bumfumu buende pa kukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
Proverbs25:6 Kuditambishi paudi wimana kumpala kua mukalenga. Kuditeki pa muaba wa muntu munene. 
Proverbs25:7 Mbimpe bakuabu bakuambe ne: “Angata muanzu munene,” pa mutu pa kukuambabu ne: “Shila udi mukupite ku muanzu muaba. ”" 
Proverbs25:8 Wewe mumone bualu, lekela kuzukila bua kuya nabu ku tshilumbu. Pikala muntu uudi mufunde mukupishe, neuvue kuenza kabidi tshinyi?" 
Proverbs25:9 Wewe mutandangane ne muena mutumba nebe, umvuangane nende. Kadi kusokolodi malu ende masokome avua muntu mukuabu mukuambile." 
Proverbs25:10 Bualu kampanda awu yeye mukumvue, neamanye ne: kuena mua kulama bualu busokome munda. Lumu luebe nelunyanguke." 
Proverbs25:11 Muaku muimpe muambe pa bualu udi ne mushinga bu mudi tshintu tshivuabu basonga ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, batshiteka pa dilonga dia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Proverbs25:12 Mubelu udi muntu wa meji ukubela, uuteleje; udi ne mushinga mupite wa kakanu ka mpawungi ka ku munu nansha ka mu nshingu." 
Proverbs25:13 Bu mudi mayi matalala akolesha muntu tshikondu tshia luya tshidibu banowa bia pa madimi, ke mudi muntu udi ukumbaja bualu budibu bamutumine ukolesha mfumuende ku muoyi." 
Proverbs25:14 Muntu udi uditambisha bua bintu bidiye kayi upeshangana, mmufuanangane ne mavuba ne lupepele bidi kabiyi bilokesha mvula." 
Proverbs25:15 Lutulu ludi lutekesha muoyi wa mukoshi wa nsambu. Miaku ya kanemu idi ipita mikanu bukole. 
Proverbs25:16 Pawikala mupete buitshi, kutambi kubudia. Wewe mupitshishe kubudia, neuvue kubuluka." 
Proverbs25:17 Kupitshi kuyayaya ku nzubu kua muena mutumba nebe. Patupu neikale ukumona katshiyi ukusankidila kabidi. 
Proverbs25:18 Muntu udi ujadikila mukuende malu a dishima, udi umushipa, bu mudi tshikowa, muele wa mvita, nansha mukete mutue, bishipangana." 
Proverbs25:19 Kutekemena paudi mu dikenga kudi muntu udi kayi wenza tshidiye mukulaye, bidi bu kudiila ku dinu dibola nansha kuendela ku dikasa dikoyoboka." 
Proverbs25:20 Kuimbila muntu udi mu dikenga misambu, kudi amu bu kuvula muntu tshinkutu dituku dia mashika, nansha bu kuela maluvu a buanji mu mputa." 
Proverbs25:21 Padi muena lukuna nebe ne nzala, umupeshe tshiakudia. Padiye ne nyota, umupeshe tshiakunua." 
Proverbs25:22 Paudi wenza nanku, udi umushiya mu dipampakana. Bidi bu kumuteka makala a kapia pa muntu. Maweja-Nangila neakufute." 
Proverbs25:23 Lupepele lua ku mutu kua ditunga ludi lufuma ne mvula. Ke mudi biambamba bijula tshiji tshia bantu ba bungi. 
Proverbs25:24 Mbimpe kusomba mu kazubu, pa mutu pa kusomba mu nzubu muimpe pamue ne mukaji wa mutoyi." 
Proverbs25:25 Bu mudi mayi matalala atalaja muminu muume, ke mudi lumu lua disanka ludi lufumine ku ditunga dia kule lusankisha bantu." 
Proverbs25:26 Bu mudi mayi mabi avuandulula mushimi nansha mpokolu, ke mudi muntu mubi unyanga muntu muimpe udi utekemena kudiye." 
Proverbs25:27 Ki mbimpe kudia buitshi kupitshisha, nansha kukeba lumu kuela ne nseka." 
Proverbs25:28 Muntu udi kayi udikolela bua kafiki munda, udi bu tshimenga katshiyi ne bimana, tshidi baluishi mua kukuata ne lukasa luonsu." 
Proverbs26:1 Bu mudi mvula wa neje kayi mukumbanyine mu muvu wa minanga, nansha mvula wa mudimbi tshikondu tshidibu banowa bia pa madimi, ke mudi lumu kaluyi lukumbanyine muntu mupote." 
Proverbs26:2 Bu mudi mushamusha ne kandindi bipapelela mulu kabiyi bikisha, ke mudi mulawu muela muntu kapayi bualu kauyi umukuata." 
Proverbs26:3 Badi batuuta kabalu ne lukodi, mpunde ne mukaba, nyima wa muntu mupote ne mulangala." 
Proverbs26:4 Kuandamunyi muntu mutshimbakane miaku ya bupote. Tshianana nenufuanangane nende. 
Proverbs26:5 Kudimuna muntu mutshimbakane bilondeshile mudiye, bua kadiumvu bu muntu wa meji." 
Proverbs26:6 Udi utuma muntu mutshimbakane ne mukenji, udi ububakana bu muntu udi udikosa nkayende makasa, bualu udi udikebela makenga." 
Proverbs26:7 Lusumuinu luela kudi muntu mutshimbakane kaluena ne bukole, mudi mikolu ya muena tuneke kayiyi nabu." 
Proverbs26:8 Kutumbisha muntu mutshimbakane kudi bu kuteka dibue dinene mu mukaba wa kuela nawu mabue. 
Proverbs26:9 Mushindu udi muntu mukuatshike maluvu upatula dieba dimutue mu tshianza, ke mudi muntu mutshimbakane ujanguluka ne lusumuinu." 
Proverbs26:10 Mfumu udi wangata muntu mutshimbakane yonsu ku mudimu, nansha muntu yonsu udi upita mu njila, udi wenzela bantu bonsu bibi." 
Proverbs26:11 Muntu mutshimbakane udi upingana ku bupote buende, bu mudi mbua udiululula biluishi biende." 
Proverbs26:12 Wewe musangane muntu udiamba mudiye muena meji, mbimpe kutekemena kudi mutshimbakane pa muntu pa kutekemena kudiye." 
Proverbs26:13 Muena lulengu utu wamba ne: “Tshiena mpatuka to; bualu ntambue udi mu njila, nyama wa lonji udi mu musesu.”" 
Proverbs26:14 Tshiibi tshidi tshinyungulukila pa nkanu yatshi, muena lulengu udi ubungulukila mu bulalu buende." 
Proverbs26:15 Muena lulengu udi wela tshianza tshiende mu dilongu. Kadi udi upungila bua kutshituma mukana. 
Proverbs26:16 Muena lulengu udi mudimone muena meji mupite bantu muanda mutekete badi bandamuna ne lungenyi. 
Proverbs26:17 Kubuelakana mu matandu adi kaayi ebe, kudi bu kukeba kukuata ku matshi a mbua udi upita mu njila." 
Proverbs26:18 Muntu udi udinga mukuabu, pashishe umuamba ne: “Mvua ngela bilele,” udi bu muena mukupa udi ukupangana bikunyi bia kapia, mikete, nansha bintu bikuabu bia lufu." 
Proverbs26:19  
Proverbs26:20 Padi nkunyi kayiyi kuiku, kapia kadi kajima. Padi muena mukosu mumane kumbuka matandu adi ajika." 
Proverbs26:21 Makala adi alama mbabula utema, nkunyi idi itemesha kapia muiku, muena mutoyi udi ujudija matandu." 
Proverbs26:22 Miaku ya lunsonge idi bu biakudia bilenga bidi bantu bupukila bua kudia. 
Proverbs26:23 Miaku ya lubombu idi misokoke muoyi mubi, idi bu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshidi ne bikanganya, tshidibu balamika ku luesu lua diima." 
Proverbs26:24 Muena lukinu udi wakula bualu buimpe usokoka muoyi wende mubi. Munda muende udi ukeba amu kudinga bantu. 
Proverbs26:25 Nansha yeye muakule ne diyi dimpe, kumuitabi to. Bualu udi ne malu a kadiwu munda tente." 
Proverbs26:26 Udi ne budimu bua kusokoka lukinu luende. Kadi bantu bonsu nebajingulule bubi buende. 
Proverbs26:27 Udi umbuila mukuende dijimba neakulukemu. Dibue diudi ubunguluja nedikubungulukile pambidi. 
Proverbs26:28 Udi ushiminyina muntu malu, udi umukina. Muena mpala ibidi udi ufila bantu ku kabutu." 
Proverbs27:1 Kuditambishi bua malu adi mua kuenzeka malaba, bualu kuena mumanye tshidi mua kuenzeka lelu." 
Proverbs27:2 Bakuabu bakutumbishe. Kadi wewe kudianyishi nansha! 
Proverbs27:3 Dibue didi ne bujitu, lusenga ludi luneema. Kadi lukinu lua mupote ndubipite bujitu." 
Proverbs27:4 Lonji ndubi. Tshiji tshidi bu mayi a muenji mukole. Kadi udi mua kukolela lubaabu nnganyi? 
Proverbs27:5 Mulunda udi ukubela patoke, udi upita udi upuwa, ukutshina." 
Proverbs27:6 Mibelu ya kudi mulunda idi ileja mudiye ukunanga ne muoyi umue. Kadi padi muena lukuna ukutua mishiku, udi ukudinga." 
Proverbs27:7 Muntu muukute udi ubenga nansha buitshi. Muena nzala udi udia bionsu, ne bidi ne bululu mene." 
Proverbs27:8 Muntu udi wendakanangana kule ne muabu, udi bu nyunyi udi wendela kule ne disua diende." 
Proverbs27:9 Bilengejilu bia mubidi, ne manananshi bidi bisankisha muntu. Kadi mulunda mupole malu, wa meji, udi upita bionsu abi." 
Proverbs27:10 Kulekedi balunda bebe nansha ba tatuebe. Paudi mu lutatu kuyi kudi muanenu, bualu misangu mikuabu muena mutumba mmupite muanenu udi kule." 
Proverbs27:11 Muananyi ikala ne meji, nanku nensanke bikole. Pikala muntu unjana nemmone mua kumuandamuna." 
Proverbs27:12 Muntu mudimuke udi umona dikenga diamba kumukuata, udiepuka. Bantu batatakane badi babuelamu, badikengeshisha." 
Proverbs27:13 Pikala muntu mudieyeka kuudi bua dibanza dia muntu uudi kuyi mumanye, ukuate tshilamba tshiende lukola, bua muntu uudi kuyi mumanye." 
Proverbs27:14 Muntu udi wela mukuende muoyi ne lunsuya ne dinda dionsu, badi mua kutangila disekelela diende adi bu kapeja." 
Proverbs27:15 Mukaji muena mutoyi mmufuanangane ne mulondu mutubuke udi usukumuka mayi dituku dia mvula. 
Proverbs27:16 Udi musue kumukandika udi bu muntu udi musue kukuata lupepele nansha kuambuila mafuta mu tshianza. 
Proverbs27:17 Badi basaka tshiamu ne tshikuabu, ke mudi muntu ulengeja pende muntu nende." 
Proverbs27:18 Muntu udi ulama mutshi wa mfiku bimpe, neadie bimuma biawu. Muena mudimu udi ukuba mfumuende nebamutumbishe." 
Proverbs27:19 Mudi mpala wa muntu umuenekela mu mayi, ke mudi muoyi wa muntu umueneka kudi bantu bakuabu." 
Proverbs27:20 Mudi dijimba dia bafue dimina bantu, ke mudi muntu ujinga amu kujinga kabiyi bijika." 
Proverbs27:21 Bua kuteta mpawungi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, badi babiela mu kapia. Kadi bua kumanya mushinga wa muntu utangile lumu ludiye nalu." 
Proverbs27:22 Nansha bobu batue mupale ne muinshi, mudibu batue ntete mu tshinu, bupale buende kabuakumushila kaba to." 
Proverbs27:23 Umanye mudi bimuna biebe bikale. Ulame nyama yebe bimpe. 
Proverbs27:24 Bualu biuma kabiena bishala kashidi. Udi mumanye ne: nansha tshifulu tshia bumfumu katshiena tshisambuluka mu diku dimue kashidi to. 
Proverbs27:25 Kosa bisosa mu mpata. Diba didi bipiabipia bimena, kosa bidi pa mukuna bua kudisha nyama." 
Proverbs27:26 Kuma bilamba ne miosa ya mikoku yebe. Sumbisha mbuji ya mpumbu bua kusumba budimi bupiabupia. 
Proverbs27:27 Kama mabele a mbuji yebe bua wewe kunua, ne nzubu webe, kabidi ne bena mudimu bebe bakaji." 
Proverbs28:1 Muntu udi wenza bibi udi udinyemena nansha kakuyi muntu udi umuipata. Kadi muntu udi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu udi ne dikima bu kana ka ntambue. 
Proverbs28:2 Padi mu ditunga amu tshimvundu, bantu ba bungi badi bafuilakana bukalenga. Kadi padimu mfumu wa lungenyi ne dimanya, bantu bonsu badi mu ditalala." 
Proverbs28:3 Muntu wa tshikisu udi ukengesha bapele, udi ufuanangana ne mvula wa tshipupu, udi unyanga biakudia mu mpata." 
Proverbs28:4 Badi kabayi balonda mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu badi batumbisha bantu babi. Kadi badi bayilonda badi badiwula bantu abu. 
Proverbs28:5 Bantu babi kabena bajingulula njila ya buakane. Kadi badi batumikila Maweja-Nangila, badi bajingulula bionsu." 
Proverbs28:6 Mupele udi ulonda njila wa buakane, mmupite mubanji udi ulonda njila mikonyangale." 
Proverbs28:7 Muana udi ulama mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu mmuana wa lungenyi. Kadi muana udi wendakana ne balunda babi udi ufuisha tatuende bundu. 
Proverbs28:8 Pikala muntu uvudija bubanji buende bualu udi usombeshangana bintu, ulomba kasombela kapite, bubanji buende nebabupete kudi muntu wa kalolu udi uvuluka bapele." 
Proverbs28:9 Pikala muntu kayi uteleja tshidi mikenji yamba, nenku Mvidi Mukulu kakumuteleja padiye umutendelela nansha." 
Proverbs28:10 Muntu udi usaka bantu bakane bua balonde njila mibi, neapone mu mateyi ende. Kadi benji ba bimpe nebikale ne diakalenga." 
Proverbs28:11 Muena biuma udi udimona bu muena meji. Kadi mupele wa lungenyi udi umutandula. 
Proverbs28:12 Padi bantu badi batshina Mvidi Mukulu bikale ne bumfumu mu bianza, bantu bonsu badi ne disanka. Kadi padi bantu babi babuangata, bantu bonsu badi basokoma." 
Proverbs28:13 Udi usokoka bilema biende, kena utuuta dikasa dimpe. Kadi udi ubitonda, ubibenga, Mvidi Mukulu neamufute luse." 
Proverbs28:14 Muntu udi utshina kuenza bibi udi ne diakalenga. Muntu udi upapisha muoyi wende neapete dikenga.
