Proverbs28:15 Mfumu wa tshikisu udi ne bumfumu mu tshisamba tshia bantu bapete, udi bu ntambue udi ukungula, bu nkashama udi ukeba tshiakudia tshiende." 
Proverbs28:16 Mulombodi wa bantu mutshimbakane, udi ukengesha bantu bavule bikole. Kadi muntu udi ubenga kunema mu bubi, neashale matuku mavule mu bumfumu." 
Proverbs28:17 Muntu mushipe muntu nende, neaye kudiela mu dijimba. Bantu kabamupumbishi bua kuenza nanku to." 
Proverbs28:18 Muntu udi ulonda njila mululame neasombe talalaa. Kadi muena mpala ibidi, udi dikasa mu mayi dikuabu ku mukuna, neadishinde panshi." 
Proverbs28:19 Muntu udi udima neapete biakudia bia bungi. Kadi udi wipatshila amu malu a mukodi, neapete anu dikenga." 
Proverbs28:20 Muntu wa muoyi umue mmuena diakalenga. Kadi udi uzukila amu bua kupeta biuma, kakupanga dinyoka nansha." 
Proverbs28:21 Mbimpe kukosa nsambu pa yoyi. Kadi bakuabu badi bakosa nsambu bibi bua kupeta tshiakudia. 
Proverbs28:22 Muena lukuka udi ukeba kunema lukasa, kadi kena mumanye ne: udi udikebela bupete." 
Proverbs28:23 Muntu udi utandisha mukuabu biakane, ku ndekelu neapete disanka dipite dia mulabididi." 
Proverbs28:24 Udi wiba bintu bia baledi bende, wamba ne: “Ki mbualu to,” mmuanabu ne muntu yonsu udi upawulangana bintu." 
Proverbs28:25 Muena lukuka udi usonsola amu matandu. Kadi udi utekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila neatuute dikasa dimpe. 
Proverbs28:26 Muntu udi uditekemena amu yeye nkayende, mmubule lungenyi. Kadi udi wenda ukeba meji neasombe ne ditalala." 
Proverbs28:27 Muntu udi upa bapete bintu ne muoyi wa kalolu, kena upeta dikenga kuende to. Kadi udi kayi musue kutangila dikenga dia mupele, bantu bavule nebamutshipe." 
Proverbs28:28 Padi bantu babi babuela mu bukalenga, bantu bonsu badi basokoma. Kadi diba didibu babumusha, bantu bakane ba bungi badi badileja." 
Proverbs29:1 Muntu udi uteka mutu mukole padibu bamubela, dimue neabutuke kakuyi tshidi tshikandika." 
Proverbs29:2 Padi bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu bavule, bantu badi ne disanka. Kadi muntu wa tshikisu yeye muangate bumfumu, bantu bonsu badi batua mikemu." 
Proverbs29:3 Munangi wa meji udi usankisha tatuende. Kadi muyidi wa bakaji ba tshiendenda udi unyanga lupetu luende. 
Proverbs29:4 Mukalenga udi ukosa nsambu ya bantu bende biakane, udi ubatutshisha dikasa dimpe. Kadi udi ubalambuisha bitadi bipite, udi ubabutula." 
Proverbs29:5 Muntu udi ulabidila balunda bende, udi uditeya bukondu mu njila yeye nkayende." 
Proverbs29:6 Bantu babi badi bapona mu mateyi avuabu bateye. Kadi bantu badi batshina Mvidi Mukulu badi tente ne disanka. 
Proverbs29:7 Muntu udi ulamata Mvidi Mukulu udi ujingulula tshidi mupele ne bua kupeta. Kadi muntu mubi kena ne lungenyi elu to. 
Proverbs29:8 Bantu badi kabayi banemeka bantu nabu badi bajuudija tshimvundu mu tshimenga. Kadi bantu ba lungenyi badi babatamija bantu badimu. 
Proverbs29:9 Padi muntu wa meji ku tshilumbu ne muntu mutshimbakane, mutshimbakane awu mufike munda nansha museke, muntu wa meji kena upeta dikisha to." 
Proverbs29:10 Bantu badi bashipangana badi bakina bantu bakane. Kadi bantu ba muoyi muimpe badi bakeba mua kuenda ne bantu bakane. 
Proverbs29:11 Mutshimbakane udi uleja tshiji tshionsu tshidiye natshi. Kadi muntu wa meji udi udikolela, utalaja tshiji tshiende." 
Proverbs29:12 Padi mfumu witaba malu a dishima, bonsu badi kuinshi kuende nebandamuke bena dishima." 
Proverbs29:13 Mupele ne mukengeshi wa bantu badi bafuanangana ku bualu bumue: Maweja-Nangila mmubapeshe mesu bubidi buabu. 
Proverbs29:14 Mukalenga wa ditunga udi ulumbuluisha bapele ne buakane, bumfumu buende budi bushindama kashidi." 
Proverbs29:15 Manyoka ne mibelu bidi bilongesha muntu. Kadi muana udibu kabayi bambila bualu udi ufuisha mamuende bundu. 
Proverbs29:16 Padi bantu babi bavulangana, bubi kabidi budi buvulangana. Kadi dimue dituku, bantu bakane nebamone mudi babi babutuka." 
Proverbs29:17 Paudi ukolesha muanebe ne disu dikole, kakukufuisha bundu nansha. Kadi neakusankishe bikole." 
Proverbs29:18 Padi bambi kabayi bamanyisha malu a kudi Maweja-Nangila, bantu badi basomba mu bubi. Kadi muntu udi ulama mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu mmuena diakalenga." 
Proverbs29:19 Kabena babela mupika ne miaku nkayayi, bualu, nansha yeye mumvue tshidibu bamuambila, kena witaba to." 
Proverbs29:20 Wewe musangane muntu wakula kayi wela meji, mbimpe kutekemena kudi mutshimbakane pa mutu pa kutekemena kudiye." 
Proverbs29:21 Mupika uudi wengeleka biangatshile ku buana, ku ndekelu neakebe kupiana bintu biebe bionsu." 
Proverbs29:22 Muntu wa tshiji udi ujuula matandu. Udi ubinduluka lukasa lukasa udi uvudija bilema biende. 
Proverbs29:23 Muntu udi uditambisha neupuke milongu. Kadi bua kupeta lumu, bidi bimpe kuikala ne bupuekele bua muoyi." 
Proverbs29:24 Udi umvuangana ne muivi udi udienzela bibi. Udi mumanye diakabi didiye mua kupeta, kadi kena musue kuamba bualu." 
Proverbs29:25 Udi utshina bantu udi uditeya nkayende. Kadi muntu udi uditeka mu bianza bia Maweja-Nangila udi usomba talalaa. 
Proverbs29:26 Bantu ba bungi badi bakeba bua mfumuabu abanyishe. Kadi kua Maweja-Nangila muntu yonsu neapete tshidiye ne bua kupeta. 
Proverbs29:27 Bantu bakane badi bapepeja bantu ba malu mabi. Bantu babi badi bapepeja bantu bakane. 
Proverbs30:1 Telejayi muvua Agure, muana wa Yake muambe. Uvua mumanyishe Itiyele, Itiyele ne Ukale ne:" 
Proverbs30:2 “Bushuwa, ndi tshidingidingi ku bantu bonsu. Tshiena ne lungenyi nansha lukese lua bumuntu." 
Proverbs30:3 Tshivua nansha mupete meji, avua mua kunjinguluila mudi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Proverbs30:4 Udi mubande mu diulu mua Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi mutulukemu nnganyi? Udi mukuate lupepele mu bianza biende nnganyi? Udi muvungile mayi mu tshilamba tshiende nnganyi? Udi mufundile buloba mikalu nnganyi? Dina diende nnganyi? Dina dia muanende nnganyi? Paudi mudimanye, udingambile!" 
Proverbs30:5 “Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu ulaya udi ubikumbaja. Udi ngabu wa mvita, udi ulama muntu yonsu udi usokomena kudiye." 
Proverbs30:6 Kusakididi muaku nansha umue ku miaku yende. Tshianana neakutandishe, neakuleje muudi muena dishima.”" 
Proverbs30:7 “Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ndi nkulomba malu abidi. Uampeshe too ne ku lufu luanyi." 
Proverbs30:8 Ungambuluishe bua tshishimi bantu bakuabu. Kabidi tshikadi mubanji munene, tshikadi mupele menemene. Kadi umpe amu bindi nkengela panu." 
Proverbs30:9 Bualu meme ne bintu bipite bungi, ndi mua kukuvila ne: ‘Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza ntshinyi?’ Kadi meme mupele menemene, ndi mufuane kuiba, bua kupepeja nanku Mvidi Mukulu wanyi.”" 
Proverbs30:10 Kunyangidi muena mudimu lumu kudi mfumuende. Wewe mulunyange, muena mudimu awu neakuele mulawu, nanku neufute tshibawu tshia lunsonge luebe alu." 
Proverbs30:11 Kudi bantu badi batshipa batatuabu, bajana bamamuabu misangu yonsu." 
Proverbs30:12 Kudi bantu badi bela meji ne: tudi bantu bimpe. Kadi ki mbapange manyanu pambidi pabu. 
Proverbs30:13 Bantu bakuabu badi batangila bantu nabu ne kapeja, badiela mulu." 
Proverbs30:14 Kudi bantu badi ne menu bu miele ya kuluangana nayi mvita, badi ne binyanganyanga bitue bu tuele. Badi bavuambula bakengi ba mu ditunga, bumusha bapele munkatshi mua bantu bakuabu." 
Proverbs30:15 Musundu wa mu mayi udi ne bana ba bakaji babidi badi bamba ne: “Mpesha! Mpesha!” Kudi bintu bisatu bidi kabiyi bianji kudia kuukuta, kabiyi bianji kuamba ne: “Biakumbanyi.”" 
Proverbs30:16 Ke kandondu ka bafue, mukaji udi kayi ne bana, buloba buume budi bukengela mvula. Kadi kudi kabidi tshintu tshinayi: ke kapia kadi kakayi kamba ne: “Ndi muukute!”" 
Proverbs30:17 Padi muntu useka tatuende, nansha ubenga kuitaba ku diyi dia mamuende, bikololu nebimutonkole mesu, biminyi nebimudie." 
Proverbs30:18 Kudi bintu bisatu bindi tshiyi mua kumvua: mudi nyunyi ya tshiminyi ibuka mulu, mudi nyoka ulandala pa dibue, mudi majuwa enda munkatshi mua mayi manene. Kadi kudi kabidi tshinayi tshindi tshiyi ngumvua: mudi mulume usangana njila udi umufikisha kudi mukaji." 
Proverbs30:19  
Proverbs30:20 Mukaji udi kayi ulamata bayende, udi wenda tshiendenda, wowa mayi, wamba ne: “Tshiena muenze bualu bubi nansha bumue.” Udi udiumvua amu bu muntu mumane kudia, ukupula ku mishiku." 
Proverbs30:21 Kudi malu asatu adi bantu kabayi mua kuanyisha, bualu adi akemesha buloba bujima:" 
Proverbs30:22 ke mupika udi ushala mukalenga wa ditunga, mutshimbakane udi udia ondoloka," 
Proverbs30:23 mukaji wa malu makole udibu basela. Kadi kudi kabidi bualu buinayi: muena mudimu mukaji udi upingana pa muaba wa mukaji uvua mfumuende. 
Proverbs30:24 Mudi mishindu inayi ya nyama mikese, kadi mikale ne meji a bungi pa buloba:" 
Proverbs30:25 tunkenene katuena ne bukole. Kadi tudi tukungija bintu mu tshikondu tshia luya," 
Proverbs30:26 nyama ya damane kayena ne bukole. Kadi idi yumbula mena ayi mu mbuebue," 
Proverbs30:27 mpasu kayitu ne mfumu. Kadi idi yenda bimpe mu milongu," 
Proverbs30:28 misodi idibu mua kukuata ne tshianza, idi ibuela nansha mu nzubu ya bakalenga ba ditunga." 
Proverbs30:29 Kudi bintu bisatu bidi bienda madiunda, bitua ntunku pa buloba, mbiebi:" 
Proverbs30:30 nyama wa ntambue udi upita nyama yonsu ku bukitu, kayi utshina tshintu nansha tshimue," 
Proverbs30:31 nzolu wa tshitala wa nkele ne mbuji wa mpumbu. Kadi kudi kabidi tshintu tshinayi: Ke mukalenga udi wenda kumpala kua tshiluilu tshiende. 
Proverbs30:32 Wewe ne tshibidilu tshia kuditambisha, pashishe ubanga kuela meji, bituadija ku lelu lama ludimi luebe bimpe!" 
Proverbs30:33 Bualu manteka badi baapeta padibu batuuta mabele. Mashi adi apatuka mu diulu padibu batuuta tshintu ku diulu. Nenku kutuuta muntu mu tshiji nkusonsola matandu. 
Proverbs31:1 Telejayi mibelu ivua Lemuwele, mukalenga wa bena Masha, mupete kudi mamuende:" 
Proverbs31:2 “Muananyi, teleja! Wewe ke muananyi wa munda, umvua mulombe kudi Mvidi Mukulu pamvua mumutendelele." 
Proverbs31:3 Kufidi bukole buebe buonsu amu kudi bakaji. Bualu bakaji bakadi bajimija bakalenga ba bungi. 
Proverbs31:4 Lemuwele, umanye bimpe ne: bakalenga ne bamfumu badimukile maluvu makole." 
Proverbs31:5 Bualu padibu bakuatshika, badi bapua mikenji muoyi, kabayi bakosa bimpe nsambu idi bapele nayi." 
Proverbs31:6 Kadi maluvu ikale nangananga a bantu badibu baya nabu ku lufu, nansha a badi mu dikenga dikole." 
Proverbs31:7 Bualu padibu banue maluvu bakuatshike, nebapue makenga abu ne bupele buabu muoyi." 
Proverbs31:8 Kadi wewe akuila muntu udi kayi ne mushindu wa kudilumbuluila. Lumbuluila bonsu badibu badiombola. 
Proverbs31:9 Ubakuile, ukose nsambu pa yoyi. Ulumbulule bilumbu bia bapele ne bakengi. ”" 
Proverbs31:10 Mukaji wa tshitembu, mbikole bua kumupeta! Udi mupite mabue a busanga ku mushinga." 
Proverbs31:11 Muoyi wa bayende udi amu kudiye. Udi ulama bintu bidibu nabi ne bayende bimpe, ubivudija kabidi." 
Proverbs31:12 Kena umuenzela bibi nansha musangu umue. Kadi udi umusankisha matuku ende onsu. 
Proverbs31:13 Udi ukeba miosa ya mikoku ne buanda bua ndanda, ukuata nabi mudimu ne disuminyina." 
Proverbs31:14 Mmufuanangane ne majuwa adi ambula biakudia. Udi ukeba biakudia kule, ubifikisha ku mbelu." 
Proverbs31:15 Udi ujuka patshiatshia, ulambila bena mu nzubu muende tshiakudia, wabanyina bakaji bena mudimu midimu ya kuenzabu." 
Proverbs31:16 Yeye mumane kuela meji bimpe, udi usumba budimi, ukunamu mionji ya mvinyo ku makuta avuaye mupete." 
Proverbs31:17 Udi ukuata mudimu muende muonsu, kayi upungila to." 
Proverbs31:18 Udi ukenketa midimu yende yonsu, bua itungunuke amu bimpe. Udi wenza mudimu ne bufuku, mutemeshe muendu." 
Proverbs31:19 Bianza biende kabiena bikisha. Udi uluka buanda, utela bilamba." 
Proverbs31:20 Udi wambuluisha bena dikenga, upa bapele ne muoyi wa kalolu." 
Proverbs31:21 Kena utshina mashika bua bena mu nzubu muende. Muntu yonsu udi mu nzubu muende udi ne bivualu bikumbane. 
Proverbs31:22 Udi ukuma biata bia kuteka panshi, uvuala bilamba bimpe bia buanda bua ndanda bukunzubile." 
Proverbs31:23 Bayende udi mumanyike bikole mu tshimenga. Udi usomba mu bisangilu munkatshi mua bakulu ba mu tshimenga. 
Proverbs31:24 Udi ukuma bilamba, ubipana, upanyisha bangenda mushinga mikaba ya mu tshimonu." 
Proverbs31:25 Bukole ne buneme ke biende bilengejilu. Udi utua mimuemue, padiye wela meji ku matuku atshidi kumpala." 
Proverbs31:26 Udi wakula ne meji. Udi mumanye mua kubelangana ne muoyi muimpe. 
Proverbs31:27 Udi utangila bionsu bidi bipitakanangana mu nzubu muende. Kena musue kushala kayi ukuata mudimu to. 
Proverbs31:28 Bana bende badi balua kumuela ka lumbandi. Bayende udi umutua makumbu wamba ne: 
Proverbs31:29 “Bakaji ba bungi mba tshitembu! Kadi wewe udi mubapite bonsu.” 
Proverbs31:30 Bulenga bua mpala budi bushima, buimpe bua kuisu budi bujika. Amu mukaji udi witaba Maweja-Nangila ke utudi mua kutua makumbu." 
Proverbs31:31 Numuanyishe bua bionsu bidiye wenza, bena tshimenga bonsu bamutumbishe bua mudimu udiye ukuata." 
Ecclesiastes1:1 Telejayi miaku ya Muambi, muana wa Davide, uvua kabidi mukalenga mu Yerushalayime." 
Ecclesiastes1:2 Muambi udi wamba ne: malu onsu adi tshianana menemene. Malu onsu adi apita patupu. Kaena ne mushinga. 
Ecclesiastes1:3 Bantu badi batata bikole pa buloba bua kuenza mudimu. Kadi tshidibu bapeta ntshinyi? 
Ecclesiastes1:4 Bantu badi balelangana, bafua. Badibu balela bafua kabidi. Kadi buloba budi bushala kashidi amu muvuabu." 
Ecclesiastes1:5 Diba didi dipatuka, dibuela. Pashishe didi dipingana muaba udidi ne bua kupatukila kabidi." 
Ecclesiastes1:6 Lupepele ludi lututa lutua eku, lutua kuaka. Ludi lututa, lunyunguluka, pashishe lubangulula tshiakabidi." 
Ecclesiastes1:7 Mayi a misulu yonsu adi apueka, adiela mu mayi manene. Kadi mayi manene katshia kaena muwule to. Nansha nanku, mayi a misulu adi adiela amu kudiela mu mayi manene." 
Ecclesiastes1:8 Mesu kaena apungila mua kumona, matshi kaena apungila mua kumvua. Muntu kena mua kumvuija mudi bia panu bionsu bitonda." 
Ecclesiastes1:9 Bivua bienzeka nebienzeke kabidi. Bivua bantu benze nebabienze kabidi. Kakuena bualu bupiabupia pa buloba apa to. 
Ecclesiastes1:10 Padi bualu buenzeka, tudi mua kuamba ne: “Tangilayi bualu bupiabupia!” Kadi bualu bua nanku buvua bumane kuenzeka kalekale kabayi banji kutulela." 
Ecclesiastes1:11 Kadi tudi tupua muoyi bivua bienzekela bankambua betu. Nenku bitudi tuenza mpindiewu, nansha bidi ndelanganyi yetu ne bua kuenza maloba, nebabipue muoyi kabidi amu lukasa." 
Ecclesiastes1:12 Meme, Muambi, mvua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, musombele mu Yerushalayime." 
Ecclesiastes1:13 Meme kukenketa ne muoyi wanyi mujima, malu adi enza mu bantu, bua mmone mua kuajingulula. Kadi ebi bidi amu mudimu wa lutatu udi Mvidi Mukulu wenzeja bantu!" 
Ecclesiastes1:14 Meme kumona bionsu bidi bienzeka pa buloba. Bionsu ebi bidi patupu, bidi amu bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes1:15 Bualu tshidi tshinyongoboke, kabena mua kutshilulamija. Bintu bidi kabiyiku, kabena mua kutabala." 
Ecclesiastes1:16 Mvua muele meji ne: ndi mupete meji a bungi mupite bonsu bavua bandianjidila mu bukalenga mu Yerushalayime. Ndi mumanye malu a bungi, nansha amvua mulonge, nansha amvua mumvue ne anyi abidi." 
Ecclesiastes1:17 Mvua nkeba mua kujingulula mudi malu mashilangane ne butatakane, mudi lungenyi lushilangane ne bupote. Kadi meme kumona ne: bionsu bindi ngenza bidi amu bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes1:18 Muntu udi ne meji a bungi, udi upeta kabidi ntatu mipite. Muntu udi wenda ulonga malu, makenga ende adi enda avulangana." 
Ecclesiastes2:1 Meme kudiambila ne: “Tukebe masanka a mu bantu. Tumone mudi diakalenga.” Kadi bionsu ebi bidi amu patupu. 
Ecclesiastes2:2 Tuseku tudi matshimbu. Disanka kadiena ditupetesha tshintu. 
Ecclesiastes2:3 Mvua mukebe masanka pa kunua maluvu, mvua muidikije bidi bantu bapote benza. Kadi meji avua ashala ne bumfumu mu muoyi wanyi. Mvua musue kujingulula ne: bantu badi mua kupeta diakalenga mene matuku adibu basomba panu anyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:4 Meme kuenza midimu, kudiashila nzubu ya bungi, kukuna mionji ya mvinyo." 
Ecclesiastes2:5 Meme kudienzela mpangu, kukunamu mitshi ya bimuma ya mishindu yonsu." 
Ecclesiastes2:6 Mvua mumbule biina bia mayi bua mmone mua kumiamina mitshi itshidi mitekete mayi. 
Ecclesiastes2:7 Meme kusumba bapika balume ne bakaji, kusakidila ku bimvua mumane kuikala nabi. Mvua ne ngombe ne mikoku mivule, bipite bia bonsu bavua bandianjidile mu Yerushalayime." 
Ecclesiastes2:8 Meme kunguja tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne mpawungi, ne bintu bia mushinga mukole bivua bifumine kudi bakalenga ne kudi balombodi ba maloba, bavua ku bumfumu buanyi. Mvua ne bena misambu balume ne bakaji, bavua bangimbila bua kunsankisha. Mvua musele bakaji bavule, bungi budi muntu mua kujinga." 
Ecclesiastes2:9 Mvua mupete lumu lunene lupite lua bonsu bavua bandianjidile mu Yerushalayime. Kadi matuku onsu aa tshivua mujimije meji amvua nawu to. 
Ecclesiastes2:10 Bionsu bimvua njinga mvua amu mbipeta. Tshivua mupange disanka nansha dimue. Eyowa, mvua mupete bintu bivule ku midimu yonsu imvua mukuate. Midimu yonsu imvua muenze ivua amu minsankishe." 
Ecclesiastes2:11 Kadi diba adi mvua mutangile midimu yanyi yonsu ne ntatu imvua mupete pa kuyikuata. Nanku meme kumona ne: bionsu bidi patupu, bidi amu bu kuipatangana tshianana ne lupepele. Kakuena bua nsongu budi bantu bapeta panu to." 
Ecclesiastes2:12 Mvua musue kujingulula ne: muntu wa meji udi mupite muntu mupale, nansha mutshimbakane ku tshinyi? Meme kudikonka kabidi ne: muntu wampingana mu bukalenga neenze malu mashilangane ne avuabu benze kudi bavua bamudianjidile mu bukalenga anyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:13 Bushuwa ndi mumanye ne: meji mmapite bupote, mudi butoke bupite miidima." 
Ecclesiastes2:14 Bualu muntu wa meji udi mumanye kudiye uya. Kadi mupote udi wenda ububuta. Kadi ndi mumanye kabidi ne: bonsu babidi badi ne nshikidilu wa momumue. 
Ecclesiastes2:15 Pandi meme ne nshikidilu wa momumue ne wa mupote, meji andi mumupite nawu adi angambuluishe ku tshinyi? Nanku meme kumona ne: ebi bionsu bidi tshianana." 
Ecclesiastes2:16 Bionsu bidi bienzeka, badi babipua muoyi lukasa. Muntu wa meji udi ufua, anu mudi mupote ufua. Kadi bonsu babidi nebabapue muoyi. Bionsu ebi bidi bienzeka nanku bua tshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:17 Nanku bia panu bivua bintonde. Ke meme kudiwula malu onsu adi bantu benza muinshi mua diba, bualu adi a tshianana, adi bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes2:18 Mvua mudiwule mudimu ne lutatu bimvua nabi panu. Bualu bionsu bindi mupete ndi ne bua kubishila udi umpingana. 
Ecclesiastes2:19 Yeye neakuate mudimu bu muena meji, nansha bu mupote anyi? Udi mua kuandamuna lukonku alu nnganyi? Kadi neapete bintu bionsu bimvua musangishe panu ku mudimu umvua mukuate ne ku meji amvua nawu. Bionsu ebi kabiena biumvuika to!" 
Ecclesiastes2:20 Nenku meme kutuadija kunyingalala bikole bua bungi bua midimu imvua mukuate panu. 
Ecclesiastes2:21 Muntu udi ukuata mudimu ne meji, kabidi ne lungenyi, upeta tshipeta tshimpe, kadi tudi tumumona ushiya bintu biende abi kudi uvua kayi mubienzele mudimu bua kubipeta. Ebi kabiena biumvuika to, kabiena bimpe nansha." 
Ecclesiastes2:22 Nenku tshidi muntu mua kupeta ku mudimu udiye ukuata ne lutatu, muinshi mua diba ntshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes2:23 Midimu yende idi imupetesha amu dikenga ne kanyinganyinga buatshia buatshia. Nansha butuku, lungenyi luende kaluena ne dikisha to. Bushuwa, ebi bionsu kabiena biumvuika nansha!" 
Ecclesiastes2:24 Diakalenga dia bantu didi amu kudia, kunua ne kusanka ne bidibu bapeta ku mudimu wabu. Ndi mujadike ne: Mvidi Mukulu ke udi ubapesha diakalenga edi." 
Ecclesiastes2:25 Bualu muntu kena mua kudia, nansha kusanka, padi Mvidi Mukulu kayi muanyishe." 
Ecclesiastes2:26 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu udi upesha muntu udi mumutokela ku muoyi, meji, dimanya ne disanka. Kadi muntu udi umubipila udi umupesha mudimu wa kukungijila udi mumutokela ku muoyi mpetu. Kadi ebi kabidi bidi amu tshianana, bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes3:1 Bionsu bidi bienzeka pa buloba bidi ne tshikondu tshiabi. 
Ecclesiastes3:2 Kudi tshikondu tshidibu bakulela, ne tshikondu tshia kufua, tshikondu tshia kukuna biakudia ne tshikondu tshia kubipola." 
Ecclesiastes3:3 Tshikondu tshia kushipa ne tshikondu tshia kuondapa mputa, tshikondu tshia kubutula ne tshikondu tshia kuibaka." 
Ecclesiastes3:4 Kudi tshikondu tshia kudila muadi, ne tshikondu tshia kuseka, tshikondu tshia kutua mikemu, ne tshikondu tshia kuja maja." 
Ecclesiastes3:5 Kudi tshikondu tshia kuela mabue, ne tshikondu tshia kuakungija. Kudi tshikondu tshia kupukilangana, ne tshikondu tshia kubenga kupukilangana." 
Ecclesiastes3:6 Kudi tshikondu tshia kukeba, ne tshikondu tshia kujimija; tshikondu tshia kulama ne tshia kuimansha," 
Ecclesiastes3:7 tshikondu tshia kupanda bilamba, ne tshikondu tshia kubitela. Kudi tshikondu tshia kupuwa, ne tshikondu tshia kuakula." 
Ecclesiastes3:8 Kudi tshikondu tshia kunanga ne tshikondu tshia kukina; tshikondu tshia mvita ne tshia ditalala. 
Ecclesiastes3:9 Kadi tshia nsongu tshidi muntu upeta ku midimu idiye ukuata ne lutatu ntshinyi? 
Ecclesiastes3:10 Mvua mutangile midimu mikole idi Mvidi Mukulu mupeshe bantu. 
Ecclesiastes3:11 Bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenze bidi bimpe, udi ubikumbaja ne tshikondu tshiabi. Uvua mutupeshe kabidi ne dijinga dia kumanya bia kale ne bitshidi kumpala. Kadi katuena mua kujingulula bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu wenza, biangatshile ku ntuadijilu too ne ku ndekelu nansha." 
Ecclesiastes3:12 Nanku meme kumvua ne: Diakalenga didi muntu nadi didi amu kusanka, ne kusomba bimpe panu patshidiye ne muoyi." 
Ecclesiastes3:13 Pikala muntu mua kudia, kunua ne kusanka ne bia ku mudimu wende, ndipa dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ecclesiastes3:14 Mvua mujingulule ne bionsu bidi Mvidi Mukulu muenze, kabiena biandamuka to. Kakuena tshidibu mua kusakidila nansha kumusha. Mvidi Mukulu udi wenza nanku bua bantu bamunemeke." 
Ecclesiastes3:15 Bidi bienzeka mpindiewu bikavua bimane kuenzeka kale. Bionsu abi Mvidi Mukulu udi ubipingaja misangu ne misangu. Bitshidi kumpala kabidi bikadi bimane kuenzeka. 
Ecclesiastes3:16 Telejayi mundi mumone kabidi malu makuabu adi panu: bantu badi bakengeshangana muaba uvuabu mua kulongolola malu bimpe, kukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
Ecclesiastes3:17 Mvua muele meji mu muoyi wanyi ne: Mvidi Mukulu nealumbuluishe muntu muimpe bu mudiye ulumbuluisha muntu mubi, bualu tshintu tshionsu tshidi tshienzeka tshikondu tshiatshi, kabidi malu onsu atudi tuenza Mvidi Mukulu mmuamone." 
Ecclesiastes3:18 Ndi ngela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmusue kuteta bantu bua kubaleja ne: kanuena nupita nyama ku mushinga to. 
Ecclesiastes3:19 Bualu ndekelu wa muntu udi amu wa momumue ne wa nyama. Mudi muntu ne mueyelu, nyama udi nawu. Bionsu bibidi bidi ne bua kufua momumue. Muntu kena mupite nyama ku tshintu nansha tshimue to, bualu ku ndekelu bionsu bidi tshianana." 
Ecclesiastes3:20 Muntu ne nyama ku ndekelu nebiye muaba umue; nebipingane mu buloba, buvuabu babifuke nabu." 
Ecclesiastes3:21 Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi mua kujadika mudi muoyi wa muntu ubanda mu diulu, ne mudi wa nyama ujimina mu buloba." 
Ecclesiastes3:22 Nanku ndi mumone ne: kakuena bidi mua kusankisha muntu bipite bia ku disanka dia mudimu wende. Ke bionsu bidiye ne bua kuenza panu, bualu kakuena udi mua kumupingaja pa buloba bua amone bidi ne bua kuenzeka kunyima kuende." 
Ecclesiastes4:1 Meme kumona kabidi mudi bantu bakengeshangana mishindu yonsu pa buloba. Badibu bakengesha badi badila, kadi kakuena muntu nansha umue udi ubambuluisha! Badi babatatshisha ke badi ne bumfumu. Ke mudi muntu mukuabu nansha umue kayi mua kubambuluisha." 
Ecclesiastes4:2 Meme ndi ngamba ne: badi bamane kufua, badi ne diakalenga dipite dia batshidi ne muoyi." 
Ecclesiastes4:3 Kadi, muntu uvuabu kabayi balele ke udi ne dikasa dimpe dipite, bualu kena mumanye malu mabi adi bantu benzelangane panu." 
Ecclesiastes4:4 Meme kumona kabidi ne: bantu badi batata, bakuata mudimu bikole, bualu badi bumvua lubabu pa kumona bidi muena mutumba nabi. Biobi abi kabidi bidi amu patupu, bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes4:5 Bushuwa, mupote udi kayi ukuata mudimu udi udifuisha ne nzala." 
Ecclesiastes4:6 Kadi bidi bipite buimpe kuanji kuikisha pa mutu pa kukuata tshidimudimu katshiyi ne bua nsongu. 
Ecclesiastes4:7 Meme kumona kabidi bualu bukuabu panu, budi kabuyi bumvuika to:" 
Ecclesiastes4:8 ke muntu udi amu nkayende, kayi ne mumuambuluishi, kayi mulele muana wa balume, kayi nansha ne muanabu wa balume. Kadi udi ukuata mudimu kayi wikisha to. Nansha yeye udikonka ne: undi mua kushila bindi mpeta ku mudimu wanyi ebi, tshiyi nsanka nabi nnganyi? Udi ukeba amu kukeba biuma bivule. Abi bidi amu patupu, kabidi ntshidimudimu tshia tshianana." 
Ecclesiastes4:9 Nkaya ndutatu, babidi mbapite. Babidi badi bambuluishangana, badi bapeta tshipeta tshimpe ku mudimu wabu." 
Ecclesiastes4:10 Padi umue udishinda, mukuabu udi umujula. Kadi tshienda nkaya mmuena diakabi. Padiye udishinda kena ne udi mua kumujula to." 
Ecclesiastes4:11 Padi babidi baladila pamue, badi bapeteshangana luya. Nkaya kena udipetela luya nansha." 
Ecclesiastes4:12 Muntu umue kena mua kutua nkanana, amu bantu babidi, kadi nangananga basatu. Bualu badi bamba ne: Tshipia tshia nshinga isatu katshiena mua kutuka to." 
Ecclesiastes4:13 Mbimpe kuikala nsongalume mupele wa meji, pa mutu pa kuikala mukalenga wa ditunga udi mubule meji, ubenga mibelu." 
Ecclesiastes4:14 Bualu nsongalume udi mua kupatuka mu lukanu kushala mukalenga, nansha yeye muikale muntu uvua ulomba tshia pa luse mu ditunga amu, pavua mukuabu mumane kubuela mu bukalenga." 
Ecclesiastes4:15 Ndi mmona mudi bantu bonsu bafuilakana nsongalume ukadi upingana pa mutu pa mukalenga uvua mu nkuasa. 
Ecclesiastes4:16 Bantu ba bungi badi bamulonda. Kadi yeye mumane kufua bantu kabakumuela kabidi tuasakidila bua bivuaye muenze nansha. Nanku ebi bionsu kabidi, bidi amu tshianana, bidi bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes4:17 Ela meji bimpe bangabanga ne wewe kuya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uyemu bua kuteleja, pa mutu pa kulambula milambu mushindu udi bantu bapote benza kabayi bamanye ne: tudi tuenza bibi." 
Ecclesiastes5:1 Kuambi bualu, kuyi muanji kuela meji. Kulayi Mvidi Mukulu malaya ebe lukasa lukasa. Mvidi Mukulu udi mu diulu, wewe udi pa buloba. Nanku miaku iudi wamba ikale mikese." 
Ecclesiastes5:2 Bualu muntu udi upita kuakula, udi upita kuakula miaku mibi. Ke mudi muntu udi ne ntatu mivule upita kulota ndota mibi." 
Ecclesiastes5:3 Paudi ulaya Mvidi Mukulu bualu, ubukumbajilamu lukasa. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena munange bantu batshimbakane to. Nanku kumbaja tshiudi ulaya." 
Ecclesiastes5:4 Mbimpe kubenga kulaya, pa mutu pa kulaya, kuyi ukumbajilamu tshiudi ulaya." 
Ecclesiastes5:5 Lekela kuakula miaku idi ikubipisha. Wewe muambe miaku mibi, newikale ne tshilumbu tshia kuambila mutuangaji ne: “Mvua mutupakane.” Nanku Mvidi Mukulu neakufikile munda bua miaku yebe mibi ayi. Ne anyange midimu yebe." 
Ecclesiastes5:6 Miaku ya bungi kayena ikumbaja bualu, mudi bilota bivule kabiyi bileja bualu. Nanku enza anu muebe muonsu bua unemeke Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:7 Kukemi bua paudi mumone bakengesha bapele mu ditunga, kabayi bakosa nsambu yabu pa yoyi. Bualu muntu udi ne muanzu munene, kakupeta tshilumbu, bualu badi bamulame kudi munga udi ne muanzu munene mupite. Bobu babidi kabidi kabakupeta tshilumbu, bualu badi babalame kudi banga badi babapite ku muanzu." 
Ecclesiastes5:8 Bivua mua kuikala bilenga bipite, kupeta mukalenga wa ditunga udi wambuluisha batshidime." 
Ecclesiastes5:9 Muntu udi munange biuma, katshia kena muanyishe bidiye mumane kupeta to. Udi musue kunema, kakupeta bionsu bidiye ujinga to. Ebi kabidi kabiena ne bua nsongu nansha." 
Ecclesiastes5:10 Padi muntu ne biuma bivule, bantu bavule badi babidia. Biuma nebilengelele muenabi ku tshinyi? Bushuwa udi mua kubitangila ne mesu, kadi tshikuabu tshidiye upeta ntshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes5:11 Muntu udi ukuata mudimu, nansha yeye mudie bikese nansha bia bungi udi ulala amu bimpe. Kadi biuma bivule bia mubanji bidi bimunyangila tulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:12 Kudi bualu bubi bupite bundi mmona panu apa: ke mubanji udi uteka lupetu luende ku luseke, kadi ubuela amu mu dikenga." 
Ecclesiastes5:13 Udi ujimija lupetu elu mu bualu bubi. Muana udiye ulela kena mua kupiana tshintu. 
Ecclesiastes5:14 Amu muvuabu bamulele butaka kudi mamuende, ke mudiye ushiya buloba kayi ne kantu. Nansha yeye mukuate mudimu bikole, kena upeta tshintu, kena mua kuya ne kantu." 
Ecclesiastes5:15 Ndiakabi kaayi edi! Udi umuka pa buloba, amu muvuaye mufikepu! Mmuenze mudimu bua kupeta tshinyi? Amu lupepele!" 
Ecclesiastes5:16 Kabidi matuku ende onsu panu uvua usomba amu ne kanyinganyinga, ne tshiji ne makenga." 
Ecclesiastes5:17 Nanku tshindi mumanya tshidi nunku: diakalenga dia muntu ke kudia, ne kusanka ne bidiye upeta ku midimu yende matuku onsu adiye ne muoyi pa buloba. Ke mudimu udi Mvidi Mukulu utufundila panu!" 
Ecclesiastes5:18 Misangu mikuabu Mvidi Mukulu udi upesha muntu biuma, umupesha kabidi ne diba dia mua kusanka nabi. Nanku muntu ewu ela amu Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila bua padiye usanka ne bidiye mupete ku mudimu wende. Bualu bionsu abi ndipa dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ecclesiastes5:19 Bu mudi muntu ewu upeta disanka kudi Mvidi Mukulu, kena uvuluka mudi matuku ende a panu makese be!" 
Ecclesiastes6:1 Mvua mumone kabidi dinga dikenga dipite bunene pa buloba, didi muntu kayi mua kumvua." 
Ecclesiastes6:2 Tuambe ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmupeshe muntu kampanda bubanji, biuma ne lumu lunene. Muntu awu udi ne bionsu bidiye ujinga. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kena musue bua asanke nabi to. Muntu mukuabu udi ubidia. Bualu abu mbualu bubi, ndikenga dipite bunene!" 
Ecclesiastes6:3 Muntu udi mua kulela bana lukama, kulala kabidi panu bidimu bivule. Kadi bionsu ebi nebimuenzele tshinyi padiye kayi ne diakalenga matuku onsu adiye ulala panu, kabidi padi bantu kabayi mua kumujika bimpe? Ndi ngamba ne: muana wa tshibika mmumupite ku diakalenga." 
Ecclesiastes6:4 Bualu muana ewu mbamuimite patupu, mmubuele mu miidima kayi dina, kabayi bamuvuluke." 
Ecclesiastes6:5 Kavua mumone diba, kawa mumanye mudi panu, mmupete dikisha divua muntu uvua mulale panu bikole kayi nadi." 
Ecclesiastes6:6 Muana awu mmupite muntu udi mushale ne muoyi nansha bidimu binunu bibidi, kadi kayi ne diakalenga. Ku ndekelu kua bionsu, buonsu babidi nebaye muaba wa momumue." 
Ecclesiastes6:7 Muntu udi wenza mudimu nangananga bua amone mua kudia kuukuta. Kadi nzala udi amu uyipeta. 
Ecclesiastes6:8 Panu apa muntu wa meji udi mushindu umue ne muntu mutshimbakane. Padi mupele mumanye mua kusomba panu nebunulengelele ku tshinyi? 
Ecclesiastes6:9 Bidi bimpe kusanka ne biudi nabi pa muntu pa kukeba bikuabu bia mishindu yonsu, bualu abi bidi kabidi patupu bu kuipatangana ne lupepele." 
Ecclesiastes6:10 Bionsu bidi bienzeka lelu, mbamane kubijadika kale. Tudi bamanye kabidi muntu muende mudiye: kena mua kuelangana mpata ne udi mumupite makanda to." 
Ecclesiastes6:11 Patudi tuelangana mpata, miaku yetu kayena itupetesha tshintu. Tshia nsongu tshituapetaku ntshinyi?" 
Ecclesiastes6:12 Muntu udi upita lubilu panu bu mundidimbi. Udi mumanye tshia nsongu tshidi muntu mua kuenza matuku makese adiye usomba panu nnganyi? Muntu nansha umue kena mua kumumanyisha kabidi bidi ne bua kuenzeka pa buloba, yeye mumane kufua." 
Ecclesiastes7:1 Lumu luimpe ndupite manananshi a mushinga mukole. Dituku dia lufu lua muntu ndipite dituku di wabu bamulele. 
Ecclesiastes7:2 Mbimpe kubuela mu nzubu wa madilu pa mutu pa kubuela muaba udi bantu badia bondoloka. Bualu lufu nnshikidilu wa muntu yonsu. Nanku bidi bilenga bua muntu yonsu amanye, kabidi avuluke bualu ebu." 
Ecclesiastes7:3 Kudila nkupite kuseka. Muntu udi ubungama, unyenga mpala, kadi muoyi wende udi ulonga malu." 
Ecclesiastes7:4 Muntu wa meji udi uya muaba udi bantu babungama, muntu mutatakane udi uya muaba udi bantu basanka." 
Ecclesiastes7:5 Mbimpe kuteleja muntu wa meji udi ukudiwula pa mutu ka kuteleja muntu mupote udi ukutua makumbu. 
Ecclesiastes7:6 Bualu, bu mudi lukunyi tua meba tutudika muinshi mua luesu pa kapia, ke mudi tuseku tua mutshimbakane katuyi ne tshiditu tuenza." 
Ecclesiastes7:7 Padi muena meji ukengesha muntu, udi wenza amu bu muntu mupale. Mabuejila adi mua kumunyanga muoyi." 
Ecclesiastes7:8 Bidi bimpe kukosesha mutoyi, pa mutu pa kubangulula. Bidi bimpe kuikala muena lutulu, pa mutu pa kuikala muena ditambisha." 
Ecclesiastes7:9 Kufiki munda lukasa, bualu tshiji mmudimu wa bantu bapote." 
Ecclesiastes7:10 Katudikonki ne: “Bikondu bia kale mbimpe bipite bia lelu bua tshinyi?” Lukonku lua nanku ludi luleja muudi kuyi muanji kupeta meji. 
Ecclesiastes7:11 Meji adi malenga mapite bintu bia bumpianyi. Adi alengelela bantu bonsu badi basomba panu. 
Ecclesiastes7:12 Adi asombesha bantu ne ditalala bu mudi lupetu luenza. Badi nawu nebasombe matuku mavule panu. Ke patudi ne tshilumbu tshia kuamanya. 
Ecclesiastes7:13 Tutangile mudi Mvidi Mukulu muenze. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kululamija tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mukonyangaje. 
Ecclesiastes7:14 Dituku dia disanka, usanke. Dituku dia dikenga, wela meji bimpe. Mvidi Mukulu udi utuma dikenga nansha disanka bua muntu kamanyi malu atshidi kumpala kuende." 
Ecclesiastes7:15 Ntshidi amu matuku makese panu. Mvua mumone ne bionsu bidi mua kuenzeka. Muntu udi mua kufua, nansha yeye muntu udi wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Muntu mubi udi mua kushala ne muoyi, nansha yeye muena buenzayi." 
Ecclesiastes7:16 Nanku katupitshishi ne dikeba dia buakane, katupitshishi ne dikeba dia meji. Tshianana tudi mua ku-dibutula tuetu nkayetu." 
Ecclesiastes7:17 Kadi kulondi amu njila wa bubi, nansha wa bantu bapale. Tshianana udi mua kufua, diba diebe kadiyi dianji kukumbana." 
Ecclesiastes7:18 Mbimpe kulonda mibelu yonsu ibidi eyi, bualu muntu udi unemeka Mvidi Mukulu kena ne bua kukolesha malu bikole." 
Ecclesiastes7:19 Meji adi aludika bilenga udi nawu, bipite mudi balombodi dikumi mua kuludika tshimenga tshimue." 
Ecclesiastes7:20 Mulengele kabula kalema, udi ne kende kamulamata." 
Ecclesiastes7:21 Kuteleji bionsu bidi bantu bamba, bualu udi mua kumvua mudi muena mudimu webe ukujana." 
Ecclesiastes7:22 Bualu tudi bamanye ne: tuetu kabidi tudi tujana bantu bakuabu misangu mivule. 
Ecclesiastes7:23 Mvua mukenkete malu onsu. Meme kuamba ne: “Ndi musue kuikala muntu wa meji.” Kadi tshiena mukumbaje bualu ebu to. 
Ecclesiastes7:24 Malu a panu adi mapite bungi, kabidi makole! Waatandula nnganyi?" 
Ecclesiastes7:25 Nenku meme kutuadija kulonga malu, meme kukeba mua kujingulula bidi panu. Mvua musue kujingulula tshidibu babikila meji. Mvua mukebe bua bandamune ku nkonku imvua nayi pa malu onsu adi enzeka! Meme kumona ne: kuikala muntu mubi, nansha mupote, mbupale." 
Ecclesiastes7:26 Ndi mumone ne: mukaji udi uteya bantu mmupite lufu ku bululu. Dinanga diende didi bu bukondu. Maboku ende adi akusuika bu nkanu. Muntu udi wenza tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue, udi upanduka kudi mukaji ewu. Kadi muenji wa bibi nebamukuate kudi mukaji ewu." 
Ecclesiastes7:27 Muambi udi wamba ne: Ndi mutangile malu onsu adi panu bua kuajingulula. Kadi tshiena mutandula onsu to. Ku bantu tshinunu, ndi musangane muntu muimpe anu umue, kadi ku bakaji bapite bungi, tshivua musangane mukaji wa nsongu nansha umue to!" 
Ecclesiastes7:28  
Ecclesiastes7:29 Tshintu tshimue tshindi mumanye ntshietshi: Mvidi Mukulu uvua mufuke muntu muakanangane ku bionsu. Kadi muntu ewu kudibuejakaja mu malu a bungi. 
Ecclesiastes8:1 Muntu nansha umue kena muena meji wa menemene. Udi mua kumvuija bidi bienzeka nnganyi? Kadi muntu wa meji udi uleja mpala wa disanka, minyengu ijimina." 
Ecclesiastes8:2 Padi mukalenga wakula, bidi bimpe kumuitaba. Tuvua bamulaye kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu bua kumutumikila." 
Ecclesiastes8:3 Nanku katubengi bumfumu buende. Katutungunuki ne malu adiye udiwula. Bualu mukalenga udi wenza amu tshidiye musue. 
Ecclesiastes8:4 Udi mua kukumbaja bidiye wamba, nansha biobi munyi. Muntu kena mua kumukonka kenzela ka bualu budiye wenza." 
Ecclesiastes8:5 Muntu udi witaba diyi diende, kakumona bualu bubi to. Kadi muntu wa meji udi mumanye bidiye ne bua kuenza, kabidi diba didiye ne bua kubienza." 
Ecclesiastes8:6 Bualu nebalumbuluishe bantu dituku dikuabu bua malu onsu avuabu benza. Bualu bubi bua muntu mbupite bunene. 
Ecclesiastes8:7 Kadi katuena bamanye bidi ne bua kuenzeka. Wakambila muapita malu nnganyi? 
Ecclesiastes8:8 Muntu nansha umue kena ne mushindu wa kushala ne muoyi panu. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kuseja dituku dia lufu luende panyima. Ke mvita idi muntu nansha umue kayi mua kunyema. Muena tshibawu nebamunyoke kamuyi mpata. 
Ecclesiastes8:9 Mvua mukenkete bionsu bidi bienzeka pa buloba. Bantu bakese badi ne bumfumu, bakengesha bantu nabu." 
Ecclesiastes8:10 Meme kumona bantu babi bavuabu bajika. Bantu babi abu bavua bayayaya pabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku bantu bakavua bamane kupua muoyi malu awa bantu babi aba benza mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Ebi bionsu kabidi bidi amu tshianana. 
Ecclesiastes8:11 Muntu udi wenza malu mabi kabena bamunyoka mpindiewu. Ke padi bantu benza malu mabi misangu yonsu. 
Ecclesiastes8:12 Nanku muntu mubi udi mua kuenza bibi misangu lukama, kushala amu ne muoyi matuku mavule. Ndi mumanye kabidi mudibu bamba ne: “Amu bantu badi batshina Mvidi Mukulu nebapete diakalenga, bualu badi banemeka bumfumu buende." 
Ecclesiastes8:13 Kadi muntu udi wenza malu mabi, kakuikala ne diakalenga. Kakunenga panu. Neafue ne bidimu bikese bualu kena utshina Mvidi Mukulu to.?”" 
Ecclesiastes8:14 Kadi badi bamba nenku, badi bakula tshianana. Bualu misangu mivule, makenga awa ne bua kukuata bantu babi, atu akuata amu bantu bimpe. Imue misangu kabidi bantu babi badi bapeta masanka awa bantu bakane ne bua kupeta. Ndi njadika ne: ebi bionsu kabidi bidi tshianana." 
Ecclesiastes8:15 Nanku ndi ngamba ne: mbimpe bantu basanke. Bualu diakalenga dia muntu panu ke kudia, kunua ne kusanka. Ke difutu dia mudimu wende matuku onsu adi Mvidi Mukulu mumuteke pa buloba." 
Ecclesiastes8:16 Mvua muenze muanyi muonsu bua kumanya mudi muntu mua kupeta meji. Mvua njooja kabidi midimu idi bantu bakuata pa buloba. Meme kumona ne: nansha tuetu bashale ne tshitabela munya ne butuku, katuena mua kumanya mudi Mvidi Mukulu upita ne malu onsu adi amueneka pa buloba to. Nansha tuetu bakeba bapungila, katuakumanya mudi Mvidi Mukulu ukuata mudimu. Muntu wa meji udi wamba ne: meme ndi mumanye, udi udidinga." 
Ecclesiastes8:17  
Ecclesiastes9:1 Nenku, meme kuela meji ku bionsu abi. Meme kujadika ne: bantu bakane ne bena meji badi mu tshianza tshia Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ne bionsu bidibu benza. Bantu kabena nansha bamanye ne: mbabanange anyi mbabakine. Kabena mua kudianza kumanya bualu nansha bumue." 
Ecclesiastes9:2 Bidi nanku bua bantu bonsu, bua muntu muakane ne bua muntu mubi, bua muntu udi ne mikiya ne bua udi kayi nayi, bua udi utendelela Mvidi Mukulu ne udi kayi umutendelela, bua udi ulambula Mvidi Mukulu ne udi kayi umulambula milambu, bua muntu wa muoyi mukezuke ne muntu muena malu mabi, bua udi ulaya Mvidi Mukulu malaya ne udi kayi walaya." 
Ecclesiastes9:3 Bantu bonsu badi mushindu umue. Ku ndekelu badi ne tshipeta amu tshimue. Bantu badi benza bibi, badi bajinga amu malu a butshimbakane. Kadi ku ndekelu kua bionsu nebafue." 
Ecclesiastes9:4 Kadi amu muntu utshidi ne muoyi udi mua kutekemena. Nanku, mbua wa muoyi mmupite ntambue mufue." 
Ecclesiastes9:5 Bualu bantu ba muoyi mbamanye ne: netufue. Kadi bafue bobu ki mbamanye kalu nansha kamue. Bafue kabena bindila kantu, bualu bakadi babapue muoyi." 
Ecclesiastes9:6 Mbamane kujimina, dinanga diabu, nkinu yabu, ne mikawu yabu, mbijimine kabidi. Kabakubuelakana kabidi mu malu adi enzeka pa buloba to." 
Ecclesiastes9:7 Nenku udie biakudia biebe ne disanka, unue maluvu ebe ne musangelu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmumane kuanyisha biudi wenza." 
Ecclesiastes9:8 Matuku onsu uleje amu disanka, vuala bilamba bimpe, laba manananshi pa mpala." 
Ecclesiastes9:9 Sanka ne mukajebe uudi munange, mu matuku makese adi Mvidi Mukulu mukulame ne muoyi panu. Ke difutu diudi mua kupeta panu bua ntatu iudi nayi pa buloba." 
Ecclesiastes9:10 Ukuate mudimu, usanke ne bionsu biudi mua kupeta. Bualu ku bajangi kuwaya kabena benzaku mudimu, kabena belanganaku meji, kabena bamanya malu, kabena bela meji mene to." 
Ecclesiastes9:11 Ndi mumone kabidi malu a bungi pa buloba. Bena lubilu lukole kabatu bapita bantu bonsu mu diteta dia kunyema lubilu to. Badi batshimuna mu mvita kabena misangu yonsu bilobu nansha. Badi bimpe pa buloba ki mbena meji to. Badi bapeta biuma ki mbena lungenyi misangu yonsu to. Badi bapeta lumu ki mbadi bamanye malu to. Muntu yonsu udi mua kupeta dikasa dibi. 
Ecclesiastes9:12 Bualu muntu kena mumanye diba didi dikenga dimukuata to. Udi umona dikenga dimukuata mu mpukapuka, amu mudi mushipa upia ku bukondu nansha nyunyi uditua mu nsumba." 
Ecclesiastes9:13 Ndi mumone kabidi bunga bualu budi butuleja bimpe bidi meji enza panu. 
Ecclesiastes9:14 Kuvua tshimenga tshikese. Bantu bakese bavua basemu. Mukalenga munene kufika bua kutshiluisha. Uvua mutshijingile ne tshikulu tshiende bua kutshiluisha. Bena mvita bende bavua base biamu binene mua kushimbula nabi bimana bia tshimenga. 
Ecclesiastes9:15 Muntu mupele wa meji uvua usomba mu tshimenga amu. Yeye ke uvua mua kusungidila tshimenga ku meji ende. Kadi muntu nansha umue kavua uvuluka mupele awu to. 
Ecclesiastes9:16 Pa nanku, ndi njadika se: meji mmapite bukitu. Kadi bantu kabena bateleja mibelu ya muntu wa meji yeye muikale mupele. Badi bamupepeja." 
Ecclesiastes9:17 Kadi bidi bimpe kuteleja muntu wa lungenyi udi wakula ne lutulu, pa mutu pa kuteleja mfumu udi wela mbila mu tshipangu tshia bantu batshimbakane." 
Ecclesiastes9:18 Meji mmapite bia mvita. Kadi muena buenzayi umue udi mua kunyanga bilenga bidi meji atupetesha. 
Ecclesiastes10:1 Njiji mifue idi ibolesha kalangi kajima ka manananshi. Nenku butshimbakane bukese budi bunyanga meji ne lumu bidi muntu nabi. 
Ecclesiastes10:2 Muntu wa meji udi wenza malu mempe. Kadi mutshimbakane kena umvua bualu nansha bumue. 
Ecclesiastes10:3 Padi mutshimbakane uya mu njila, bantu bonsu badi bamba ne: mmupale, bualu mmubule lungenyi." 
Ecclesiastes10:4 Pikala mfumuebe mufike munda, kumbuki muaba uudi. Wewe mulame lutulu neakufuile luse bua bilema biebe biuvua muenze." 
Ecclesiastes10:5 Nenku kudi tshilema tshindi mumone pa buloba, tshidi bamfumu benza." 
Ecclesiastes10:6 Muntu mutshimbakane misangu mikuabu udi upeta muanzu munene. Kadi bena biuma badi bashala kabayi mianzu. 
Ecclesiastes10:7 Ndi mmona bapika babanda pa tubalu, kadi bamfumu benda ku makasa bu bapika." 
Ecclesiastes10:8 Muntu udi mumbule dijimba udi mua kuponamu, udi ubumbula tshimana badi mua kumusuma kudi nyoka." 
Ecclesiastes10:9 Mumbudi wa mabue udi mua kutapika. Mupandi wa nkunyi udi ne njiwu pabuipi. 
Ecclesiastes10:10 Padibu kabayi banoona tshisuyi tshidi katshiyi tshitue, amu muntu wa dikanda udi mua kuenza natshi mudimu. Nenku meji adi apetesha muntu tshipeta." 
Ecclesiastes10:11 Nansha wewe mumanye mua kutekesha nyoka, nenkuambuluishe ku tshinyi padi nyoka mumane kukusuma?" 
Ecclesiastes10:12 Padi muntu wa meji wakula, bantu badi basanka. Padi muntu mutshimbakane wakula, bantu badi badiwula." 
Ecclesiastes10:13 Udi utuadija kuamba miaku ya tshianana, ujikija ne miaku mibi." 
Ecclesiastes10:14 Muntu mupote udi wakula amu kuakula. Kadi muntu kena mumanye nansha kakese bidi ne bua kuenzeka kumpala kuetu eku. Wamuleja bienzeka panyima pende nnganyi? 
Ecclesiastes10:15 Mudimu mukese udi upungija muntu mutshimbakane. Kena nansha mumanye mudiye mua kupeta njila wa kupingana mu tshimenga. 
Ecclesiastes10:16 Ditunga didi ne mukalenga utshidi muana ne bamienampala basombele amu kudia, nditunga dia diakabi!" 
Ecclesiastes10:17 Kadi ditunga didi ne diakalenga padidi ne mukalenga wa mu diku dia bantu baneme, kabidi ne bamienampala badi basomba ku mesa amu pa diba kabayi bakuatshika maluvu, badia amu bua kukolesha mubidi." 
Ecclesiastes10:18 Muntu udi ne lulengu kayi ulongolola nzubu, nzubu udi umupukila. Udi ulengulula mua kulongolola musaka wa nzubu wende, nzubu udi umata mayi." 
Ecclesiastes10:19 Bantu baneme badi badia bua kusanka. Badi basangulaka padibu banua maluvu. Kadi amu badi ne biuma ke badi mua kupeta bionsu bidibu bakengela. 
Ecclesiastes10:20 Nenku kujanyi mukalenga nansha mundamunda muebe. Kujanyi mubanji, nansha wewe nkayebe mu nzubu webe wa bulalu. Bualu nyunyi wa kulu mmufuane mua kutangalaja miaku yebe, kubamanyisha biuvua wamba." 
Ecclesiastes11:1 Ela biudi nabi mu mayi manene. Bumue dituku dikuabu neubipete tshiakabidi. 
Ecclesiastes11:2 Teka mpetu yebe miaba mishilangane, bualu kuena mumanye diakabi didi mua kukukuata pa buloba." 
Ecclesiastes11:3 Kudi mutshi mukubikile ke kudiwu ushadila. Padi mavuba muwule ne mayi, mvula udi uloka." 
Ecclesiastes11:4 Muntu udi utshina lupepele ne mvula, kena ukuna nansha unowa bia pa madimi." 
Ecclesiastes11:5 Kuena mumanye mudi muana ukola munda mua mamuende. Nenku kuena mua kumanya mudi Mvidi Mukulu ukuata mudimu, bualu yeye ke udi wenza bionsu." 
Ecclesiastes11:6 Ke paudi mua kukuna dinda too ne dilolu kuyi wikisha. Bualu kuena mumanye kuwapetela tshintu, nansha ku mudimu wa dinda nansha wa dilolu, nansha ku yonsu ibidi." 
Ecclesiastes11:7 Butoke bua diba budi bulenga, busankisha muntu udi ubumona." 
Ecclesiastes11:8 Muntu udi ne bua kusanka bua tshidimu tshionsu tshidiye ne muoyi, nansha yeye mushale panu bidimu bi-vule. Kadi tuvulukayi se: matuku a miidima neikale a bungi. Kadi bionsu biavua kuenzeka bidi amu tshianana." 
Ecclesiastes11:9 Wewe nsonga, Sankaku mu bunsonga buebe. Ikala ne disanka pautshidi ne bukole. Bionsu biudi ujinga, bionsu bidi bikulengelela ubikumbaje. Kadi umanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu neakulumbuluishe pa bionsu biudi wenza." 
Ecclesiastes11:10 Umbusha mu muoyi webe malu onsu adi akubungamija, kabidi mu mubidi webe bionsu bidi bikusankisha. Bualu bunsonga ne bukole bidi bijimina lukasa." 
Ecclesiastes12:1 Vuluka mufuki webe mu matuku a bunsonga buebe. Umuvuluke, matuku a dikenga kaayi manji kufika. Tshikondu tshikuabu newambe ne: “Bia panu bionsu bidi bintonda.”" 
Ecclesiastes12:2 Diba adi, newikale mu miidima. Diba, ngondu ne mitotu kabiakukukenkela kabidi to. Nansha mvula mumane kujika, mavuba makuabu adi amu afiikisha tshibuashibuashi." 
Ecclesiastes12:3 Diba adi, maboku avua akuambuluisha neazakale. Mikolu iuvua wenda nayi neitekete. Menu neashale makese, kuyi mua kutshiakunya biakudia kabidi bimpe. Mesu ebe neikale bu mpofu." 
Ecclesiastes12:4 Matshi ebe kaakumvua kabidi mutoyi wa mu njila, nansha muadi wa tshiamu tshidi tshipelesha bukula, nansha muadi wa nyunyi, nansha misambu idi bantu bimba." 
Ecclesiastes12:5 Wewe neutshine mua kubanda pa kakuna. Newende utetuka, mufuane kudishinda panshi. Nsuki yebe neitoke. Neufuane mutshi udi ne bilongu bitoke. Uvua utupika bu mpasu, mpindiewu ukadi ukalaba panshi. Kuakumvua kabidi nzala, nansha wewe muele ndungu mivule mu biakudia! Dituku dikuabu nebaye kukujika ku nzubu webe wa kashidi. Badidi ba miadi ya madilu benda badila mu misesu, bualu badi bindila diba adi." 
Ecclesiastes12:6 Nshinga wa tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole udi utuka, dikopu dia mpawungi didi difua, ne dibungu dia mayi didi ditayika ku mpokolu, nkata musunsuke wa ku tshiina tshia mayi udi upona mu tshiina." 
Ecclesiastes12:7 Diba adi, mubidi wa muntu neupingane mu buloba muvuawu mufume. Mueyelu wa muoyi neupingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu uvua mumupeshawu." 
Ecclesiastes12:8 Muambi udi wamba ne: Malu onsu adi tshianana, adi patupu, kaayi atupetesha tshintu." 
Ecclesiastes12:9 Muambi uvua ulongesha bantu bivuaye mumanye, kayi upungila. Uvua mufunde nsumuinu ya bungi yeye mumane kujadika bulenga buayi." 
Ecclesiastes12:10 Muambi nansha yeye mufunde malu mudiwu, uvua muenze muende muonsu bua kupeta miaku ya kukolesha nayi bantu ku muoyi." 
Ecclesiastes12:11 Bualu miaku ya bantu ba meji idi bu misongolu idi balami baludika nayi mikoku, idi bu ndami idi isuikakaja malu adi muntu mumanye. Miaku eyi mmifume kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye udi mulami umuepele buetu bonsu." 
Ecclesiastes12:12 Muananyi, katuena ne bua kusakidila bia bungi. Mikanda itudi mua kufunda kayena ne ndekelu. Muntu udi ulonga, udi upungila bikole." 
Ecclesiastes12:13 Kadi nkomenu wa malu onsu atuvua bafunde udi nunku: Muntu yonsu udi ne bua kunemeka Mvidi Mukulu, kutumikila meyi ende." 
Ecclesiastes12:14 Bualu Mvidi Mukulu nealumbuluishe muntu yonsu pa malu ende onsu, nansha mempe nansha mabi, nansha masokome mene." 
SongOfSongs1:1 Ku misambu yonsu idi Shelomu mufunde, ewu udi muimpe mupite mikuabu. Diyuki dia badi banangangana" 
SongOfSongs1:2 Ungupukile, ungele mu tshitupa! Dinanga diebe didi dinsankisha dipite mvinyo," 
SongOfSongs1:3 dipite mafuta ebe a mupuya muimpe. Wewe udi ulobesha bakaji, bu manananshi adi anunka dipembu dimpe. Ke mudi nsongakaji yonsu ikunangila!" 
SongOfSongs1:4 Unkuate ku tshianza, tuye nebe lukasa. Mukalenga wanyi, umbueje mu tshibambalu tshiebe, tusanke bubidi buetu. Tusangale, bualu dinnanga diebe ndisheme dipite maluvu. Ke padi nsongakaji yonsu ikunanga." 
SongOfSongs1:5 Nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, meme ndi mufiike, kadi ndi muimpe, mudi nzubu ya ntenta ya bantu badi mu tshipela, mudi bilamba bilembeleja mu nzubu wa mukalenga Shelomu." 
SongOfSongs1:6 Kanukemi bua bufiike buanyi, bualu munya mmumfiikishe nenku. Bana betu ba balume mbangumvuile lukinu, mbanteke bua kubalamina madimi a mvinyo. Kadi buanyi budimi bua mvinyo, tshivua ne mushindu wa kubulama nansha." 
SongOfSongs1:7 Wewe undi munange, ungambile muaba uudi udishila mikoku yebe, uudi uyiteka bua kuikishayi munda munya, bua tshipambuku, tshikukebi muaba udi balunda bebe badishila mikoku yabu." 
SongOfSongs1:8 Wewe Ntamba bakaji, pawikala kuyi mumanye muaba udiye, tangila miaba ivua mikoku yende ipitshila, uyilonde. Shiya mbuji yebe pabuipi ne nzubu ya balami ba mikoku." 
SongOfSongs1:9 Munanga wanyi, ndi nkufuanyikija ne nyama muimpe wa kabalu mukaji, udi ukoka ditempu dia lumu dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu." 
SongOfSongs1:10 Tukanu mudi muele ku matshi ntulengeje matama ebe. Mabue a busanga mmalengeje nshingu webe. 
SongOfSongs1:11 Netukuenzele tukanu tua ku matshi tua tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tulamakaja ne tulengejilu tua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. 1" 
SongOfSongs1:12 Patshidi mukalenga wanyi ulala pabuipi nanyi pa bulalu, manananshi anyi adi atuma dipembu diawu." 
SongOfSongs1:13 Munanga wanyi udi bu kabuki ka manananshi, kateka mu mabele anyi." 
SongOfSongs1:14 Udi bu tshisumbu tshia bilongu mu madimi a mvinyo a ku mpokolu wa Ene-Ngedi. 
SongOfSongs1:15 Mulunda wanyi munanga, udi muimpe mutambe, udi mulengele be. Mesu ebe adi aleja dinanga, bu dia nyunyi wa nkudimba." 
SongOfSongs1:16 Munanga wanyi, wewe kabidi udi muimpe be, muimpe wa dikema! Bulalu buetu mbua mashinde mabishi." 
SongOfSongs1:17 Makunji a nzubu wetu ke mitshi ya sedre; mikamba ya ku tshimana, ke mitshi ya siprese." 
SongOfSongs2:1 Meme ndi tshilongu tshia patupu, tshia mu mpata wa Sarone, tshilongu tshitoke tshia mu tshibandabanda." 
SongOfSongs2:2 Eyowa, padi munanga wanyi munkatshi mua bansongakaji nende, udi bu tshilongu tshitoke munkatshi mua mingonga." 
SongOfSongs2:3 Padi munanga wanyi munkatshi mua bansongalume nende, udi bu mutshi muimpe wa bimuma munkatshi mua mitshi ya ditu. Ndi ne disanka dia kuikisha mu dileji diawu, dia kupola bimuma biawu bisheme." 
SongOfSongs2:4 Uvua mutufile mu nzubu wa bukalenga wa masanka, mumbandishile dibendele, dibendele dinyika “Dinanga.”" 
SongOfSongs2:5 “Undishe tumuma tua mvinyo, umpeshe bimuma, umpingajile bukole, bualu dinanga didi dinsamisha muoyi.”" 
SongOfSongs2:6 Udi mungele diboku diende dia bakaji ku nshingu, mungele mu tshitupa ne diende dia balume." 
SongOfSongs2:7 “Eyi! Nuenu nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, ndi nnusengelela ne: mu dina dia ngulungu idi ne bowa, kanututshinyishi nansha! Tudi tunangangana, nutushiye nkayetu! ”" 
SongOfSongs2:8 Telejayi: munanga wanyi ukadi ufika! Udi wenda utupika mu mikuna minene, usambuka lubilu mikuna mikese." 
SongOfSongs2:9 Munanga wanyi udi unyema lubilu, bu nyama wa kabuluku, nansha bu ngulungu muana. Ukadi mufike, muimane kunyima kua tshimana tshia nzubu wetu. Udi upalamina ku madidishi, ukenzakana mu masosu a tukanu." 
SongOfSongs2:10 Mpindiewu udi ungambila ne: “Musuibue wanyi, tuyayi, mulengele wanyi, kolesha, patuka!" 
SongOfSongs2:11 Tshikondu tshia mashika ntshimane kupita! Mvula mmukamuke, mmushadile kule." 
SongOfSongs2:12 Bilongu bidi biela nzeba mu ditunga! Ke tshikondu tshidi bionsu bimba misambu. Nyunyi ya tumanda nkutshi idi idila mu madimi etu miaba yonsu. 
SongOfSongs2:13 Bimuma bibishi bidi bidiunda ku mutshi wa mfiku. Mionji ya mvinyo idi yela bilongu, itangalaja dipembu diayi dimpe. Mulunda wanyi, juka lukasa! Munanga wanyi, katuye!" 
SongOfSongs2:14 Musuibue wanyi, bu nkudimba udi musoksome mu mbuebue ne mu mulundu, patuka, nkumone. Akula, nteleje diyi diebe didi dinsankisha. Leja mpala webe udi mupite buimpe!”" 
SongOfSongs2:15 “Utukuatshile nyama ya tubundi eyi, tunyama tukese etu, tudi tunyanga mionji yetu ya mvinyo, mimane kuela bilongu!”" 
SongOfSongs2:16 Munanga wanyi, udi amu wanyi meme! Meme kabidi ndi amu wende! Udi upeta biakudia biende, muaba udi bilongu bitoke bivule." 
SongOfSongs2:17 Ku dilolu padi panshi patalala, kuisu kutuadija kufiika, neupingane kundi, munanga wanyi. Unyeme lubilu bu kabuluku, nansha bu ngulungu muana, udi usomba mu mikuna mipanduluke." 
SongOfSongs3:1 Butuku pamvua mulale, meme kulota, nkeba munanga wanyi. Meme kumukeba, tshiyi mumupete." 
SongOfSongs3:2 Meme kujuka kuya mu tshimenga, kuendakana mu misesu ne mu mansanga a njila, kukeba undi munange. Meme kukenzakana miaba yonsu, nansha meme kumumona." 
SongOfSongs3:3 Meme kusambakena ne balami ba tshimenga, badi benda batentekela musoku, kubakonka ne: “Nuvua bamoneku munanga wanyi anyi?”" 
SongOfSongs3:4 Amu ndayangana nabu, meme kupeta munanga wanyi, kumukuata bikole ku tshianza, tshiyi musue kumulekela. Meme kuya nende mu nzubu, kubuela mu tshibambalu tshia munda, muaba uvua mamu wanyi mungimite." 
SongOfSongs3:5 “Eyi! Nuenu nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, ndi nnusengelela ne: mu dina dia ngulungu idi ne bowa, kanututshinyishi nansha! Tudi tunangangana, nutushiye nkayetu! ”" 
SongOfSongs3:6 Nganyi udi ufuma nenku mu tshipela, bu divuba dia muinshi, divuba didi dinunka mupuya wa kamonya, dinunka manananshi a mipuya mishilangane, afuma ku matunga a bende." 
SongOfSongs3:7 — Ke tshipoyi tshia mukalenga Shelomu. Bena mvita makumi asambombu, bilobu bia bena Izrayele, badi bamunyungulukila." 
SongOfSongs3:8 Bonsu badi ne miele ya mvita, bamanye mua kuluangana nayi. Muntu yonsu mmuase muele ku mikaba, bua kudilama butuku ku njuwu ya lufu." 
SongOfSongs3:9 Shelomu mmuenzeje tshipoyi ne mabaya mempe a mu Lebanone. 
SongOfSongs3:10 Uvua mutshiashishe mikolu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshieyeminu tshia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshisombelu tshia tshilamba tshifikuluke tshia lumu. Nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime ivua milengeje ne muoyi wa dinanga munda muonsu mua tshipoyi." 
SongOfSongs3:11 “Eyi, nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, luayi, nutangile mukalenga Shelomu! Udi muase tshifulu tshivua mamuende mumupe dituku dia tshibilu tshia dibaka, divuaye musanke mutshionkomoke.”" 
SongOfSongs4:1 Munanga wanyi, udi muimpe mutambe. Udi mulenga tshishiki! Mesu ebe adi engelela ne dinanga, bu nyunyi ya nkudimba, nansha wewe muabuikile ne tshilamba. Nsuki yebe idi ipepa pa makaya, mudi mbuji mifiike tshisumbu ipulumuka pa mukuna wa Ngilaade." 
SongOfSongs4:2 Menu ebe adi matoke, mafuane mikoku mimane kukosa boya, ifumina ku diowa mayi. Idi yenda ibidi ibidi bu bana ba mapasa, kamuena muaba udi mushale mutupu." 
SongOfSongs4:3 Mishiku yebe mimpe idi bu mukaba mukunze. Idi ikuatshisha milowu paudi wakula. Matama ebe adi makunze, bu tshipese tshia tshimuma tshia ngrenade, muinshi mua tshilamba tshiudi muabuikile." 
SongOfSongs4:4 Nshingu webe udi mule muenze tshijengu bu kaleya ka Davide, kadibu balembeleje ngabu tshinunu, ngabu ya tshijengu ya bilobu bia mvita." 
SongOfSongs4:5 Mabele ebe adi bu bana babidi ba mbuji, bana ba mapasa ba nyama wa kabuluku, badi badia mashinda muaba udi bilongu bitoke." 
SongOfSongs4:6 Ku dilolu padi panshi patalala, kuisu kutuadija kufiika, nenye kuikisha ku mukuna webe wa manananshi, ku kakuna kebe ka musenga wa kamonya." 
SongOfSongs4:7 Munanga wanyi, mubidi webe mujima udi muimpe, kauyi kalema nansha kamue." 
SongOfSongs4:8 Mubangila wanyi, tuyayi, shiya mikuna ya Lebanone. Umuke ku nsongu ya mukuna wa Amane, wa Senire ne wa Ermone, miaba idi nyama ya ntambue, ne ya nkashama isombela." 
SongOfSongs4:9 Paudi untangila musangu amu umue, muoyi ukadi untuuta bikole munda. Muanetu wa bakaji, mubangila wanyi, meme mutangile nansha kakanu kamue ka tudi tulengeja nshingu webe, tuengelela, kadi kankuata kashidi, kambueja mu nzubu wa lukanu." 
SongOfSongs4:10 Mubangila wanyi, muanetu wa bakaji, dinnanga diebe ndinkokeshe, ndinkuate bikole mudi maluvu kaayi mua kunkuata. Mafuta ebe a mupuya adi ansankisha, mapite mafuta makuabu onsu." 
SongOfSongs4:11 Mubangila wanyi, mishiku yebe idi imatshisha buitshi. Buitshi ne mabele bidi muinshi mua ludimi luebe. Mupuya wa bilamba biudi muvuale, udi bu wa mitshi yonsu misanga ya mu Lebanone." 
SongOfSongs4:12 Mubangila wanyi, muanetu wa bakaji, udi budimi buanyi bunyungulula kudi lupangu, udi mayi anyi a mpokolu mabuikila matue tshitampi." 
SongOfSongs4:13 Udi bu lupangu luimpe lua mitshi ya ngrenade, idi ikuama bimuma bisheme. Mudi bilongu ne mitshi bishilangane bidibu mua kuenza nabi manananshi a mishindu ne mishindu." 
SongOfSongs4:14 Mudi mitshi idibu benza nayi enna, narde, safrane, kalmuse, musenga wa kamonya, mire ne alowe, kabidi ne mafuta a mupuya muimpe." 
SongOfSongs4:15 Munda mua lupangu mudi mpokolu wa mayi mimpe matambe adi afuma ku mikuna ya Lebanone. 
SongOfSongs4:16 Mpepele ya ku mutu ne ya kuinshi, tabalayi, luayi lukasa, tangalajayi dipembu dionsu didi mu lupangu luanyi. Miaba yonsu inunke mupuya muimpe! Munanga wanyi, luaku, buela mu lupangu luanyi, udie bimuma bisheme bidi momu." 
SongOfSongs5:1 Muanetu wa bakaji, mubangila wanyi, ndi mbuela mu budimi buanyi, mpolamu mire wanyi, ne mitshi ya mupuya muimpe, ndilamu buitshi buanyi, nnuinamu maluvu ne mabele anyi. “Balunda banyi, nudie, nunue, dinanga dinukuate.”" 
SongOfSongs5:2 Mvua mulale, kadi muoyi wanyi uvua mushale ne tshitabela. Badi bakokola ku tshiibi! Ndi mumanye ne: munanga wanyi mmufike! “Muanetu wa bakaji, munanga wanyi, nkudimba wanyi, wanyi wa pa muoyi, ungunzuluile ku mbelu! Mutu wanyi mmuboleshe kudi lumuma, nsuki yanyi mmikuate mayi a dibungi dia butuku.”" 
SongOfSongs5:3 “Ndi mumane kuvula bilamba bianyi, tshiena mua kubivuala kabidi nansha! Ndi mumane kuowa mayi ku makasa, mmunyi mundi mua kuafikisha kabidi?”" 
SongOfSongs5:4 Diba adi, munanga wanyi, kuela tshianza ku disosu didi ku tshiibi. Muoyi uvua ungomba bikole." 
SongOfSongs5:5 Diakamue meme kujuka, kunzuluka munanga wanyi ku mbelu. Mafuta a mire avua ku bianza ne ku minu, pamvua ndenga milonda ivua ku tshiibi." 
SongOfSongs5:6 Meme kunzuluka munanga wanyi ku mbelu lubilu. Kadi ukavua mumane kuya. Kavua kabidi ku tshiibi. Mvua njinga bikole kumvua diyi diende. Meme kumuipatshila, kumukeba, kadi nansha meme kumumona. Meme kumubikila, kadi kavua mungitabe." 
SongOfSongs5:7 Meme kusambakena ne balami ba tshimenga, bavua batentekela musoku, bendakana pa bimana bia tshimenga. Bobu kuntuuta, kuntapa mputa, kunyengabu ne tshitambala tshianyi." 
SongOfSongs5:8 “Eyi, nuenu nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, ndi nnulomba, nnusengelela ne: nuenu basambakena ne munanga wanyi, nenumuambile tshinyi? Numuambile ne: Dinanga ndinsamishe muoyi!”" 
SongOfSongs5:9 “Mukaji mulengele, utuambile: munanga webe mmupite balume bakuabu ku tshinyi? Eyowa, tshidiye mupite natshi bakuabu ntshinyi, bua wewe kutusengelela bikole nenku?”" 
SongOfSongs5:10 Munanga wanyi udi muimpe mutambe bu tshiamu tshikunze. Udi wa bukole bupite. Ku bantu binunu dikumi amu umue udi mumufuane! 
SongOfSongs5:11 Mpala wende udi wengelela bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Udi ne nsuki miluka bikata bikata bu bilongu bia mutshi wa date; nsuki yende mmifiike bu masala a nyunyi wa tshikolotu. 
SongOfSongs5:12 Mesu ende adi engelela bu a nyunyi ya nkudimba idi miname mu mayi. Adi matoke bu masukula ne mabele, majalame biakane mu kashete ka bilengejilu." 
SongOfSongs5:13 Matama ende adi bu dibula dinunka bimpe, dikuna bilongu bia mupuya muimpe. Mishiku yende idi yengelela bu bilongu bikunze, mafuta a mire adi azonzaku." 
SongOfSongs5:14 Maboku ende adi bu lukanu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi, lulengeja ne mabue mafiike a mushinga mukole. Mubidi wende udi bu mubanga mupela, mulengeja ne mabue a safire." 
SongOfSongs5:15 Mikolu yende idi bu makunji a mabue matoke masonga, mashindika bikole pa bitaku bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Udi mufuane mikuna ya mu Lebanone. Udi ne bukole bu bua mutshi wa sedre." 
SongOfSongs5:16 Mukana muende mmusheme, padiye untua mishiku. Mubidi wende mujima udi unkuatshisha milowu! Nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, ke mudi munanga wanyi, ke mudi mulunda wanyi nanku." 
SongOfSongs6:1 Wewe nsongakaji mupite buimpe, munanga webe mmuye penyi? mMuyile njila kaayi? Tudi basue kumukeba pamue nebe." 
SongOfSongs6:2 Munanga wanyi mmuye mu lupangu luende, mudi mabula makuna bilongu binunka bimpe; mmuye kudishilamu bimuna, kutulamu bilongu bitoke." 
SongOfSongs6:3 Munanga wanyi udi amu wanyi meme, meme kabidi ndi amu wende. Udi udisha bimuna munkatshi mua bilongu." 
SongOfSongs6:4 Munanga wanyi udi muimpe. Udi mulengele bu tshimenga tshia Tirsa. Udi wengelela bu Yerushalayime. Udi ukemesha bu bimenga bibidi ebi. 
SongOfSongs6:5 Lekela kuntangila. Mesu ebe adi ampampakaja. Nsuki yebe idi ipepa, bu mbuji tshisumbu idi ipulumuka pa mukuna wa Ngilaade." 
SongOfSongs6:6 Menu ebe adi matoke, mafuane mbuji ya mikoku, idi ifuma ku diowa dia mayi. Idi yenda ibidi ibidi, bu bana ba mapasa. Kamuena muaba udi mushale mutupu." 
SongOfSongs6:7 Matama ebe adi makunze, bu tshipese tshia tshimuma tshia ngrenade, muinshi mua tshilamba tshiudi muabuikile." 
SongOfSongs6:8 Nansha mukalenga musele bakaji makumi asambombu, mubanjije bakuabu makumi muanda mukulu, ne bansongakaji kabayi kubala," 
SongOfSongs6:9 meme ndi mumone ne: mudi amu mukaji umue panu. Ke wewe, nkudimba wanyi, wanyi wa pa muoyi. Mamuebe uvua amu ne muana wa bakaji umue. Ke wewe uvuaye mupite kunanga ku bana bende bonsu. Padi bakaji bakuabu bakutangila, badi bakuamba muena diakalenga. Ba mukalenga mukaji, ne bakaji babanjija badi bakutua makumbu, bamba ne:" 
SongOfSongs6:10 “Ewu mmukaji kaayi, udi ukenka bu nkesha, udi mutoke bu ngondu, ubalakana bu diba, ukemesha bu mitotu? ”" 
SongOfSongs6:11 Meme kupueka mu lupangu lua mitshi ya bimuma, bua kumona ntonga idi mu tshibandabanda, kutangila mionji ya mvinyo idi isampila, kujoja bilongu bidi ku mitshi ya ngrenade." 
SongOfSongs6:12 Ndi mpampakana bikole. Ndi njinga dinanga, mudi muendeshi wa ditempu ujinga kuya mu mvita." 
SongOfSongs7:1 — Wewe muena Shulame, nyunguluka, nyunguluka, nyunguluka kabidi, wanyishe tukutangile! — Nudi nubandila muena Shulame, padiye uja maja, bua tshinyi?" 
SongOfSongs7:2 Mukalenga mukaji, makasa ebe mmimpe mu bisabata, tshimonu tshiebe tshidi bu mabue mafula kudi nsenda wa bushiwa." 
SongOfSongs7:3 Kuinshi kua difu diebe, kudi bu dikopu didi ne maluvu a muenya muimpe diba dionsu. Difu diebe didi bu miepu munkatshi mua bilongu." 
SongOfSongs7:4 Mabele ebe abidi adi bu mbuji ya nkungulu ibidi, bu bana ba mapasa ba ngulungu." 
SongOfSongs7:5 Nshingu webe mmufuane Kaleya-ka-mubanga. Mesu ebe adi bu majiba a mayi a mu Eshebone, adi ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga tshinene etshi. Diulu diebe kabidi didi dimpe bu kaleya ka mu Lebanone, kadi kalama njila wa ku Damase." 
SongOfSongs7:6 Mutu webe udi mululame, bu mukuna wa Karmele. Nsuki yebe idi mimpe be! Mmikuate mukalenga mu buteyi buayi." 
SongOfSongs7:7 Munanga wanyi, udi muimpe, udi undengelela, bikuatshisha milowu!" 
SongOfSongs7:8 Udi mufuane dibue dia ngaji ku bule, mabele ebe adi bu bishishi bia ngaji ayi." 
SongOfSongs7:9 Ke meme kuamba ne: “Ndi mbanda kulu, ntungule ngaji!” Mabele ebe adi bu bisumbu bia tumuma tua mvinyo. Mupuya webe udi ne dipembu dimpe bu dia bimuma bisheme." 
SongOfSongs7:10 Miaku idi ipatuka mukana muebe, idi inkuata mudi mvinyo muimpe ukuatangana! Eyowa, mvinyo muimpe udi upueka buludi kudi munanga wanyi, ubuela mu mishiku yetu nansha tuetu balale tulu." 
SongOfSongs7:11 Munanga wanyi udi wanyi meme; udiye ujinga udi amu meme. 
SongOfSongs7:12 Munanga wanyi, luakunu, tupatuke mu mpata, tutshishile butuku munkatshi mua bilongu bidi ne mupuya muimpe." 
SongOfSongs7:13 Netuikale mu madimi a mvinyo dinda dionsu, netumone mudi mionji mimane kusampila, miele ntonga; mudi mitshi ya ngrenade miele nzeba. Muaba awu nenkuleje mundi nkunanga." 
SongOfSongs7:14 Bimuma bia mandragore, bidi binunka mupuya muimpe. Kumbelu kuetu tudi ne bimuma bisheme bia mishindu yonsu, bia kale nansha bipiabipia. Munanga wanyi, ndi mukulaminebi." 
SongOfSongs8:1 Eyi! Kutshikadi nansha muanetu wa balume, uvua mamu muamushe. Pandi nsambakena nebe mu njila, mvua mua kukuela mu tshitupa, kukutua mishiku, muntu nansha umue kayi ungelela meji mabi." 
SongOfSongs8:2 Tuvua mua kuya nebe ne mu nzubu mua mamu wanyi. Wewe kundongesha dinanga. Meme kukulabuisha maluvu anyi mempe a muenya musheme, ne mayi anyi a bimuma bia ngrenade." 
SongOfSongs8:3 Udi mungele diboku diende dia bakaji ku nshingu, mungele mu tshitupa ne diende dia balume." 
SongOfSongs8:4 “Eyi! Nuenu nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime, ndi nnusengelela ne: kanututshinyishi nansha! Tudi tunangangana, nutushiye nkayetu. ”" 
SongOfSongs8:5 Ewu mmukaji kaayi udi utumina mu tshipela, mueyemine munanga wende? Ndi nkujula ku tulu, muinshi mua mutshi wa bimuma, muaba uvua mamuebe mukuimite, muaba uvuaye mukupatule mu bantu." 
SongOfSongs8:6 Ngikale nkayanyi mu muoyi webe; muoyi webe wikale mukanga, mutua tshitampi. Unkuate amu meme mu maboku ebe. Dinanga didi ne bukole bu bua lufu. Mukawu mmunkuate bikole, bu dijimba dia bafue. Dinanga didi dingosha bu kapia, bu kapia ka Maweja-Nangila." 
SongOfSongs8:7 Mayi manene malabale kaena mua kujima kapia ka dinanga. Misulu yonsu kayena mua kukajibakaja. Nansha muntu musue kusumba dinanga, kufuta biuma bionsu bidiye nabi, neapete amu kapeja." 
SongOfSongs8:8 Tudi ne muanetu wa bakaji, kadi utshidi muana mutekete. Kena muanji kuasa mabele to. Netumuenzele tshinyi, padi diba dia kumusela dikumbana?" 
SongOfSongs8:9 Nansha yeye bu tshimana tshikole, tshia mualu wa mvita, netuibakilepu tuleya tua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Nansha yeye bu tshiibi, netutshipayike bikole ne mabaya a mutshi wa sedre." 
SongOfSongs8:10 Meme ndi bu tshimana tshikole, mabele anyi adi bu tuleya. Kadi buende yeye, ndi diende diakalenga." 
SongOfSongs8:11 Shelomu udi ne budimi bua mvinyo, ku Baale-Amone. Kubupaye babidime, bua bafute nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole tshinunu, bua bamone mua kupola bimuma." 
SongOfSongs8:12 Wewe Shelomu, wangate nkanu tshinunu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Babidime bapete kabidi nkanu nkama ibidi. Kadi budimi buanyi meme ndi ndima amu meme nkayanyi!" 
SongOfSongs8:13 Munanga wanyi, wewe udi mu lupangu, muaba udi balunda bateleja ne ntema, bakeba kumvua diyi diebe. Kadi, ungambile amu meme ne:" 
SongOfSongs8:14 “Munanga wanyi, patuka lukasa, tunyeme bu nyama wa kabuluku, bu ngulungu muana, tuye ku mikuna idi inunka dipembu dimpe." 
Isaiah1:1 Mu tshikondu tshivua Uziya, Yotame, Akaze, ne Izkiya, bakalenga ba Yuda, Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, uvua mumanyishe bantu malu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuleje, adi atangila bukalenga bua Yuda ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah1:1 Mu tshikondu tshivua Uziya, Yotame, Akaze, ne Izkiya, bakalenga ba Yuda, Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, uvua mumanyishe bantu malu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuleje, adi atangila bukalenga bua Yuda ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah1:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Diulu, teleja, buloba, teya matshi. Meme kukolesha bana. Kadi bobu bamane kukola, kuntombokelabu." 
Isaiah1:3 Nyama wa ngombe udi mumanye mfumuende, nyama wa mpunde mmumanye udi umudisha. Kadi bena Izrayele kabena basue kummanya. Tshisamba tshianyi katshiena tshinteleja.”" 
Isaiah1:4 Eyi, nudi tshisamba tshia bena tshibawu, tshisamba tshia bena buenzayi. Nudi ndelanganyi ya bantu babi, badi benda banyanguka. Nudi babenge Maweja-Nangila, nudi badiwule Mukalenga wa tshijila wa Izrayele, nudi bamuele nyima." 
Isaiah1:5 Nudi nutungunuka ne buenzayi buenu bua tshinyi? Dinyoka divuabu banunyoke ki ndikumbane anyi? Mutu wenu onsu mmutapike mputa, muoyi wenu wa munda kawena ne bukole." 
Isaiah1:6 Biangatshile ku makasa too ne ku mutu, pambidi penu padi amu mputa, mibundabunda, ne mputa ipatuka tufina. Muntu nansha umue kena muyisukule, kena muyele mafuta, kena nansha muyisuike." 
Isaiah1:7 Ditunga dienu didi bu tshipela. Bimenga bionsu, bavua babioshe. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mbiibe bia pa madimi enu, nuenu batangile. Bu muvuabi pa kabutu ka Sodome, kanuena bashale ne tshintu nansha tshimue." 
Isaiah1:8 Yerushalayime nkayende ke udi mushale, kadi mmushale amu bu kazubu kakese mu budimi bua njilu, bu kazubu ka tshisasa mu budimi bua mvinyo, bu tshimenga tshiela munkatshi kudi baluishi batshi." 
Isaiah1:9 Kadi bu Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, kayi mupandishe kasumbu kakese ka bantu, tuvua mua kubutuka bu tshimenga tshia Sodome, tuvua mua kujimina bu tshimenga tshia Ngomore." 
Isaiah1:10 Nuenu bamfumu ba mu Yerushalayime, nudi bafuanangane ne bena tshimenga tshia Sodome. Telejayi bimpe tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba! Nuenu kabidi bantu babi, badi bafuanangane ne bena Ngomore. umvuayi mudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu unubela ne:" 
Isaiah1:11 “Milambu yenu mipite bungi ayi, tshindi ngenza nayi ntshinyi? Milambu yenu ya mikoku miosha, ne ya manyi a bana ba ngombe, idi intonda. Mashi a ngombe milume, a bana ba mikoku ne a mpumbu, kaena ansankisha." 
Isaiah1:12 Nudi nufika kundi bua kuntendelela, bushiwa. Kadi meme ndi njinga bua nudiatakaje buloba bua mu mbanza ya mu nzubu muanyi anyi?" 
Isaiah1:13 Kanuena mua kundambula kabidi milambu. Kayena indengelela to. Muinshi wa milambu yenu, ndi muubenge kashidi. Lekelayi masanka enu a ngondu mipiamipia, a matuku a Dikisha ne a bibilu binene. Tshiena muanyishe ditendelela didi ne buenzayi, dinudi nuntendelela, nuenza kabidi bubi." 
Isaiah1:14 Tshiena musue bibilu bienu bia ngondu mipiamipia. Masanka onsu anudi nulongolola, tshiena nawu bualu. Bidi bujitu bundi tshiyi mua kuambula kabidi to." 
Isaiah1:15 Panudi nuolola bianza bienu kulu bua kuntendelela, ndi mbuikila ku mesu bua tshimonyi. Nansha nuenu nuntendelela misangu ne misangu, tshiena musue kunuteleja to. Bualu bianza bienu bidi ne mashi a bantu tente." 
Isaiah1:16 Dilongololayi, nudikobolole, nubenge buenzayi, tshibumvu kabidi nansha. Kanuenji kabidi bibi to." 
Isaiah1:17 Kadi enzayi malu makane, ambuluishayi bantu bua benzelangane bimpe, nukandike badi bakengesha bantu bakuabu. Vulukayi muana nshiye, bua apete tshidiye ne bua kupeta. Akuilayi mukaji mukamba.”" 
Isaiah1:18 Maweja-Nangila udi unubikila ne: Fikayi, tumone wapila ne wabinga nnganyi? Mibi yenu, nansha yoyi mikunze bu mashi, neitoke zezeze bu ndanda. Pikalayi mikunze kunzuu, neitoke bu miosa ya mikoku." 
Isaiah1:19 Eyowa, panuikala bakumbaje mikenji yanyi, panuikala banteleje, nenudie bintu bimpe bia mu ditunga dienu." 
Isaiah1:20 Kadi panuikala bambenge, bantombokele, nenufue ku muele. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Isaiah1:21 Mmunyi muvua tshimenga tshia bantu bavua bangitaba, tshiandamuka tshia bena buendenda? Tshimenga tshivua bantu banemekangana, banemeka ne bintu bia bantu bakuabu, mpindiewu tshikadi tshimenga tshia bashipianganyi." 
Isaiah1:22 Wewe Yerushalayime, kale uvua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, lelu ukadi tshikanganya; kale uvua bu maluvu mimpe, lelu ukadi amu maluvu mela mayi." 
Isaiah1:23 Bamfumu benu bakadi bantomboji, badi bumvuangana ne bivi. Badi banyisha mabuejila, basue bonsu bua bantu babasankishe. Kabena bakuila bana ba nshiye ku kabadi! Kabena bateleja mukaji mukamba." 
Isaiah1:24 Ke padi mfumu munene, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole wa Izrayele, wamba ne: “Eyi! Nentekeshe baluishi banyi, nensombuele bena lukuna banyi." 
Isaiah1:25 Wewe Yerushalayime, newikale nanyi tshilumbu. Nenkuele mu kapia bua kulengulula, kumusha bikanganya biebe, kumusha manyanu onsu adi munda muebe." 
Isaiah1:26 Nenkupingajile bandumbulula bimpe, amu muvua bebe ba ku tshibangidilu. Bafidi bebe ba ngenyi nebafile ngenyi mimpe, amu muvuabu benza ku kale. Nenku nebakuinyike ne: ‘Tshimenga tshia buakane,’ ‘Musoku udi bantu ne muoyi umue.’ ”" 
Isaiah1:27 Tshimenga tshia Siyone netshishale ne bukole, amu padi bena Siyone banemekangana, bapingana kudi Maweja-Nangila, benzelangana bimpe." 
Isaiah1:28 Padibu batombokela Maweja-Nangila, bamubenga, benzelangana bibi, nebabutuke." 
Isaiah1:29 Eyowa, nenuikale ne bundu, bualu nuvua basue kusangila muinshi mua mitshi, bua kutendelela mvidie. Nenufue bundu, bualu nuvua basungule mpangu eyi, bua kuenzelamu malu enu mabi." 
Isaiah1:30 Nenushale bu mitshi eyi, idi mimane kupopoka mabeji. Nenuikale bu mpangu eyi, idi kayiyi kabidi ne mayi." 
Isaiah1:31 Muntu wa dikanda neashale bu tshikamfu, tshia kutemesha natshi kapia. Malu ende mimpe neikale bu kantolentole ka kapia, kadi kuosha tshikamfu atshi. Bionsu bibidi nebiteme kapia pamue, kakuyi udi mua kubijima." 
Isaiah2:1 Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, uvua umanyisha bantu malu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuleje, adi atangila bukalenga bua Yuda, ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah2:1 Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, uvua umanyisha bantu malu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuleje, adi atangila bukalenga bua Yuda, ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah2:2 Dituku dikuabu mukuna udibu base nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, neupite mikuna yonsu, neuyipite ku bule. Bisamba bionsu nebiutantshile, bibodiokamu." 
Isaiah2:3 Bantu bavule nebayemu, benda bamba ne: “Tuyayi! Tubande pa mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila. Tubuele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe. Atulongeshe tshidiye musue bua tuetu kuenza. Netulonde njila udiye utuleja.” Eyowa, dilongesha dia Maweja-Nangila didi difumina mu Siyone, muaku wende udi upatukila mu Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah2:4 Neakose nsambu ya bisamba pa yoyi, nealumbuluishe bantu bonsu. Nebandamune mafuma abu, ne miele ya mvita, bishale nkasu ne bikasu, bia kudima ne kunowa nabi. Tshisamba katshitshiena tshiluisha tshikuabu. Bantu kabatshiena balongeshangana mvita." 
Isaiah2:5 Nuenu, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, vuayi, tuende bonsu pamue, mu butoke bua Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah2:6 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, ukadi ulengulula tshisamba tshiebe, tshisamba tshia ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. Bualu bena mbuku ba kudi diba dipatukila, mbavulangane mu tshisamba tshia Yakobe. Batempi ba malu a mitotu badimu, bungi bu mu ditunga dia bena Peleshete. Bantu bebe mbunwuangane ne bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, balonda bibidilu biabu." 
Isaiah2:7 Buloba bua Yakobe mbuwule ne mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, kabidi ne mpetu mikuabu, bungi kabuyi kubala. Tubalu ne matempu a mvita, mbipite bungi mu ditunga." 
Isaiah2:8 Buloba bua Yakobe mbuwule tente ne mvidie ya dishima. Bantu badi batendelela mvidie, bakukuila bintu bidibu badienzela." 
Isaiah2:9 Ke padi bantu bonsu ne bua kuinama, kudia lupuishi. Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, kubajudi to." 
Isaiah2:10 Nuenu bantu sokomayi mu mbuebue, buelayi muinshi mua buloba. Nutshine tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila. Nealeje bukole ne butumbi buende." 
Isaiah2:11 Muena ditambisha neiname panshi. Muena kapeja, nebamupuekeshe. Dituku diadia nebamanye ne: amu Maweja-Nangila nkayende udi ne bukole." 
Isaiah2:12 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, yeye nkayende neakose bilumbu. Neapuekeshe muntu udi udiamba ne: ndi munene, nansha ne: ndi mfumu." 
Isaiah2:13 Dituku adi, neashimbule mitshi ya sedre yonsu ya mu Lebanone, idi milepa mipite mikuabu ku bule. Neakose mitshi ya nsanga ya mu Bashane." 
Isaiah2:14 Nealandakaje mikuna yonsu minene ne mikese. 
Isaiah2:15 Neashimbule tuleya tutumbuke, kabidi ne bimana bile bionsu bivuabu bakoleshe nabi bimenga." 
Isaiah2:16 Neine matu manene onsu mu mayi, kabidi ne majuwa, nansha wowu malenga bishi." 
Isaiah2:17 Muntu muena ditambisha neinyike mpala panshi, muena kapeja neadie buloba. Dituku adi, nebamanye ne: amu Maweja-Nangila nkayende udi ne bukole." 
Isaiah2:18 Mvidie yonsu ya dishima neijimine. 
Isaiah2:19 Bantu nebabuele mu mbuebue, nebabuele muinshi mua buloba. Nebatshine tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila, tshidi tshibakuata bowa. Nealeje bunene buende, ne butumbi. Neazakeje buloba bikole." 
Isaiah2:20 Dituku adi, mpingu ya tshiamu tshitoke ne tshia mpawungi, ivua bantu basonge bua kuyitendelela, nebayelele mpuku ne tupulukusu." 
Isaiah2:21 Nebabuele mu mbuebue ne mu makela ayi; nebanyeme tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila tshidi tshibakuata bowa. Nebasokome padi Maweja-Nangila ubaleja bukole buende ne butumbi, uzakakaja buloba." 
Isaiah2:22 Lekelayi kutekemena kudi muntu, bualu muoyi wa muntu udi amu mueyelu wa katupa. Muntu udi tshintu tshia mushinga anyi?" 
Isaiah3:1 Mfumu munene, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, neanyenge bena mu Yerushalayime, ne bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda, bionsu bidi mua kubambuluisha: biakudia ne biakunua bidibu nabi mu mayeba, ne bantu bonsu badi mua kubatua nyama ku mikolu." 
Isaiah3:2 Udi umbusha bisumbu bia bena mvita, bena mvita bapiluke ne bena mvita bakuabu, bandumbulula, bambi, bena mbuku, ne bakulu ba ditunga," 
Isaiah3:3 balombodi ba bena mvita, ne banene ba ditunga, bafidi ba ngenyi, bena dialu, ne bena majimbu." 
Isaiah3:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi mbapesha bansongalume, bashale bamfumu babu. Nebabaludike mudibu basue.”" 
Isaiah3:5 Netshikale tshikondu tshia buntomboji, tshia kufuila mianzu. Bansonge nebakengeshe bakulumpe, bantu babule meji nebapetule bantu ba mushinga." 
Isaiah3:6 Bantu nebakuate muanabu wa mu tshiota, nebamuambile ne: “Wikale mfumuetu, bualu utshidi ne tshinkutu. Akaja ditunga dietu didi dinyanguke.”" 
Isaiah3:7 Awu kabidi neandamune ne: “Meme tshiena ne tshintu tshia kunuenzela to. Ku nzubu kuanyi nkutupu. Kakuena nansha biakudia, nansha kazaku. Kanunteki mfumuenu to.”" 
Isaiah3:8 Yerushalayime mmubutuke, Yuda mmudishinde panshi. Bualu bidi bena Yuda bamba, ne bidibu benza, bidi amu bileja mudibu babenga Maweja-Nangila, bamutuila nkanana." 
Isaiah3:9 Bu mudibu bakosa nsambu ne kansungansunga, nebabafunde ku tshilumbu. Bu muvua bantu ba mu tshimenga tshia Sodome benza, ke mudi bena Yuda benza buenzavi, munda munya, kabayi babusokoka. Eyowa, mbena diakabi, bualu badi badilongoluela kabutu kabu!" 
Isaiah3:10 Vulukayi ne: diakalenga ndia bantu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu, bualu bidibu benze nebibapeteshe tshipeta tshimpe." 
Isaiah3:11 Bantu babi mbena diakabi. Nebabenzele muvuabu benzela bantu nabu. 
Isaiah3:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bantu badi bamfumu ba tshisamba tshianyi, badi amu bu nyunyu midianganyi. Badi bashala mu bumfumu badi amu bena lukuka. Tshisamba tshianyi, bantu badi bakulombola, badi amu bakupambula, baya nebe mu njila mubi." 
Isaiah3:13 Maweja-Nangila mmujuke bua kukosa nsambu. Udi muimane kulu bua kulumbuluisha tshisamba tshiende. 
Isaiah3:14 Udi ufunda bafidi ba ngenyi, ne bamfumu ba tshisamba tshiende, ku tshilumbu ne: “Nuenu ke badi banyanga budimi buanyi bua mvinyo. Nudi buwuje nzubu yenu, ne bintu binudi banyenga bapele!" 
Isaiah3:15 Nudi nuzaza bantu banyi, nukengesha bapele bua tshinyi? Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuebeja nanku!”" 
Isaiah3:16 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bakaji ba mu Yerushalayime badi ne ditambisha. Badi benda bela mitu mulu, bakenzakana kabayi bundu, benda balunduka badisua, badidisha nkanu yabu ya ku mikolu.”" 
Isaiah3:17 Nenku Maweja-Nangila neabakungule mu mutu, neabashiye butaka." 
Isaiah3:18 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila neumbushe bionsu bidi bibalengeja: nkanu ya ku mikolu, bilengejilu bileja diba nansha ngondu;" 
Isaiah3:19 tukanu tua ku matshi, bikupa bia ku maboku, ne bitambala bia ku mutu;" 
Isaiah3:20 bifulu, tukanu tua ku mikolu, mikaba ya bilamba miluka, tubuta tuwule ne mpingu, nansha ne manga;" 
Isaiah3:21 tukanu tua ku minu, ne tua ku diulu;" 
Isaiah3:22 bilamba bia dituku dia tshibilu, binkutu, bilamba bia kujingila mu nshingu, bibuta bia ku bianza;" 
Isaiah3:23 mintumpu, mitelu mimpe, bitambala bia mu nshingu, ne bia ku mutu."
