Isaiah3:24 Pa mutu pa kununka mupuya muimpe wa manananshi, nebanunke mupuya mubi wa bintu bibole. Pa mutu pa mukaba, nebavuale anu muonji. Pa mutu pa kulukisha nsuki bimpe, nebakungule mu mutu. Pa mutu pa bilamba bilenga, nebavuale bia madilu. Eyowa, bulenga buabu nebuandamuke bundu." 
Isaiah3:25 Yerushalayime, bantu balume bebe, nebafue ku muele. Nansha bilobu biebe mene nebanshipe mu mvita." 
Isaiah3:26 Nenku mu tshimenga tshijima, nebateke madilu, nebadile miadi, bu mudi mukaji udi mujimije bana bende, ushala musombe panshi nkayende." 
Isaiah4:1 Dituku adi, bakaji muanda mutekete nebafuilakane mulume umue, bamba ne: “Kuditatshishi bua kutudisha, nansha bua kutuvuadika. Tudi tulomba amu, bua tuikale bakaji bebe, katushadi bakaji bakamba katuyi ne bana!”" 
Isaiah4:2 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila neafukishe tshiakabidi buloba. Tshionsu tshidi tshitoloka netshikole. Bantu badi bashala ne muoyi mu Izrayele, nebasanguluke padibu bamona bionsu ebi. Nenku nebapetulule lumu ne butumbi biabu." 
Isaiah4:3 Nenku bonsu bavua bapanduke mu Yerushalayime, basombe pa mikuna mu Siyone, nebabinyike ne: “Bantu ba Tshijila ba Maweja-Nangila.” Bantu aba ke bavua Maweja-Nangila mufunde mu mukanda wende, bua kusombabu mu Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah4:4 Maweja-Nangila neatume kapepa ka buakane, ka kulengeja naku bantu. Pikala Maweja-Nangila mumane kusukula manyanu a bakaji ba mu Yerushalayime, pikalaye mumane kumbusha mashi a bantu avua Siyone mupumune muende," 
Isaiah4:5 nenku Maweja-Nangila neasombe pa mukuna wa Siyone, munkatshi mua bantu badi basangilamu. Mu munya divuba dia muinshi, butuku tshimunyi tshia kapia, nebileje bantu mudi Maweja-Nangila munkatshi muabu, ubalama. Butumbi abu nebubambuluishe," 
Isaiah4:6 mudi mabeji a mutshi afila dileji mu munya, mudi nzubu wa kupengama wambuluisha muntu diba didi mvula wa tshipupu uloka, nansha didi tshipepele tshijuuka." 
Isaiah5:1 Ndi musue kuimbila mulunda wanyi musambu, musambu wa budimi buende bua mvinyo. Mulunda wanyi uvua ne budimi bua mvinyo, pa mukuna wa buloba buimpe." 
Isaiah5:2 Kusekunaye budimi bimpe, kumushaye ne mabue. Kukunaye ne mionji mimpe. Bua kulama bimpe budimi, kuasayemu nzubu wa tshialaminu. Kuibakaye ne tshikaminu tshia tumuma. Mulunda wanyi uvua mutekemene kupeta tumuma tua mvinyo tulenga. Kadi budimi kupatula tumuma tua bululu." 
Isaiah5:3 Ke mulunda wanyi kuamba ne: “Nuenu bantu badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, ne nuenu badi basomba mu Yuda, nukose tshilumbu, tshidi pankatshi panyi ne budimi buanyi." 
Isaiah5:4 Tshingenzela kabidi budimi buanyi, tshimvua tshiyi muanji kuenza ntshinyi? Meme kutekemena tumuma tua nsongu, kadi bobu kukuama amu tua bululu!" 
Isaiah5:5 Kadi mpindiewu, ndi nnuambila tshindi musue kuenzela budimi buanyi. Nentule lupangu lua meba lumvua muaseku, nyama neidiemu. Nengupule tshimana tshia lupangu. Bantu badi bapita ne njila nebabudiatakaje." 
Isaiah5:6 Nebushale lububa: muntu nansha umue kena mua kusolela budimi abu, muntu kena mua kubuipidila kabidi Meba ne mingonga nebitolokemu. Nenkandike mavuba, bua mvula kalokedi kabidi mu budimi ebu.”" 
Isaiah5:7 Budimi bua mvinyo bua Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, ntshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Mionji mimpe ivua imusankisha, ntshisamba tshia bena Yuda. Maweja-Nangila uvua mutekemene ne: bantu bende nebenzelangane bimpe, kadi badi amu bakengeshangana. Uvua mutekemene ne: bantu bende nebenze amu bidi bimpe. Kadi miaba yonsu, badibu bakengesha, badi badila amu miadi ya kanyinganyinga. (Tun. 8-24: 10.1-4)" 
Isaiah5:8 Bantu bonsu badi basakidila nzubu ku mikuabu, balamika madimi ku makuabu, mbena diakabi. Ku kakese ku kakese nebangate miaba yonsu. Nebashale bobu nkayabu mu ditunga!" 
Isaiah5:9 Mvua mumvue Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu uditshipa, wamba ne: “Ndi nditshipa ne: nzubu yonsu eyi nebayinyangakaje. Miaba minene yonsu idi milengeja bimpe, kabakuyisomba kudi bantu." 
Isaiah5:10 Budimi bua mvinyo bua metre nkama isatu, kabuena bupatula litre makumi atanu ya maluvu to. Muntu udi umiamina kilo makumi atanu ya ntete, neanowe kilo amu dikumi.”" 
Isaiah5:11 Bantu bonsu badi bafuilakana maluvu makole dindadinda, banua too ne mudi butuku buila, bakuatshika, mbena diakabi." 
Isaiah5:12 Bisanji, lunzenze, ngoma ne nshiba, bidi bidila, padibu banua maluvu, kabayi balekela. Kadi kabena belangana meji ku bidi Maweja-Nangila wenza, kabena bavuluka mudimu udiye ukuata." 
Isaiah5:13 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Tshisamba tshianyi, nebaye natshi mu bupika, bualu katshiena tshiumvua bualu nansha bumue. Bamfumu batshi nebafue nzala, bantu batshi bonsu nebafue nyota.”" 
Isaiah5:14 Bakadi bunzulule muaba wa bafue, mbaudiundishe bikole. Bamfumu ne bena Yerushalayime nebabuelemu bonsu, batshikale munkatshi mua tshibilu, basanka." 
Isaiah5:15 Nanku bantu bonsu nebiname badia buloba. Nansha muntu muena ditambisha, neinyike mesu panshi." 
Isaiah5:16 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu nealeje bukole buende. Nealongolole bionsu amu bimpe. Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila nealeje tshijila tshiende, padiye ukosa nsambu pa yoyi." 
Isaiah5:17 Mu misesu ya mu tshimenga nemuikale tshisuku. Mikoku neidiemu bisosa, amu bu bidiyi idia mu mpata. Bana ba mbuji ba manyi, nebakebemu biakudia biayi." 
Isaiah5:18 Bantu badi badikebela dinyoka, bualu badi bakoka malu abu mabi, mudi ngombe ukoka ditempu dia bujitu. Bonsu aba mbena diakabi." 
Isaiah5:19 Bantu aba badi bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila enze lukasa tshionsu tshidiye musue kuenza. Tudi basue kutshimona. Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele enze tshionsu tshidiye muelele meji, tudi basue kutshimanya!”" 
Isaiah5:20 Bantu bonsu badi bamba bualu buimpe ne: mbubi, bamba bualu bubi ne: mbuimpe, bamba butoke ne: mmidima, bamba midima ne: mbutoke, bamba bintu bisheme ne: bidi ne bululu, bamba bidi ne bululu ne: mbisheme, mbena diakabi." 
Isaiah5:21 Bantu bonsu badi baditangila bu bena meji, ne bena lungenyi, mbena diakabi!" 
Isaiah5:22 Bantu bonsu badi bilobu amu bua kukuatshika maluvu, badi ne bukitu amu bua kusambakaja mala, mbena diakabi!" 
Isaiah5:23 Badi babingisha muena tshibawu, bualu udi ubakosa mishiku. Badi bapisha muntu udi kayi ne bualu." 
Isaiah5:24 Nenku bantu aba nebabutuke, mudi kapia kuosha bisosa, mudi ndimi ya kapia ilakuka ku bisuku. Nebabutuke bonsu mudi miji ibola, mudi bilongu biuma, bipona panshi. Bualu bavua badiwule dilongesha, dia Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, babenge diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah5:25 Nanku Maweja-Nangila mmufikile bantu bende munda. Mmubakanyine, mubatume. Mikuna imona nanku, kuzakalayi. Bitalu bia bantu kushala panshi mu misesu, bu butu bua kuimansha mu dyala. Kadi tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila katshiena tshijike to. Udi amu ukanyina bantu bende." 
Isaiah5:26 Maweja-Nangila udi wasa tshimanyinu, ubikila tshisamba tshidi kule. Udi wela monzu ku ntengu ya buloba, mudi muntu ubikila mbua. Monayi tshisamba etshi tshidi tshifuma kule, tshienda lukasa lukasa, tshiambuluja bua kufika!" 
Isaiah5:27 Munkatshi mua tshisamba atshi, kamuena muntu mupungile, kamuena udi ukoka makasa panshi, nansha udi ubungila ne tulu. Kakuena udi ulaala, nansha udi musulule mukaba, nansha udi musulule nshinga ya tshisabata." 
Isaiah5:28 Mikete yatshi idi minona bimpe, mata adi mamana kunana. Tubalu tuatshi, tudi ne bikonu bikole bu mabue. Nkata ya matempu atshi, idi inyema lubilu mifuane mvunde." 
Isaiah5:29 Bibingu bia mvita bidibu beela kudi bena tshisamba atshi, bidi bu nyama wa ntambue mukaji ukungula, bu nyama wa lonji udila ukuata nyama, uya kumuteka muaba musunguluke, kakuyi udi mua kumunyenga." 
Isaiah5:30 Dituku adi, nebabuele mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, benda beela bibingu bikole, bu biona bia mayi manene. Bantu nebatangile mu ditunga, kadi kabakumona tshintu to, amu midima mikole, ne mavuba adi abuikila butoke." 
Isaiah6:1 Mu tshidimu tshia lufu lua mukalenga Uziya, meme kumona Maweja-Nangila musombe mu nkuasa wa bukalenga mutumbuke. Nzemba ya tshinkutu tshiende miuwule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tente." 
Isaiah6:2 Baserafine bavua bimane ku mutu kuende. Serafine yonsu uvua ne mapuapua asambombu: abidi mabuikile mpala wende, abidi mabuikile mubidi wende, ne makuabu abidi a kubuka nawu." 
Isaiah6:3 Batata belangana mbila ne: “Wa tshijila, wa tshijila, wa tshijila, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu udi wa tshijila! Butumbi buende budi pa buloba buonsu. ”" 
Isaiah6:4 Meyi abu avua azakaja biibi bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi muinshi uvua muwule mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tente. 
Isaiah6:5 Ke meme kuamba ne: “Eyi! Ndi mubutuke, bualu mishiku yanyi nya muena buakulavi. Tshiena mua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Bena mu tshisamba tshietu kabidi badi ne mishiku ya bena buakulavi. Kadi ndi mudimuene nkayanyi mukalenga, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu!”" 
Isaiah6:6 Kadi umue wa ku baserafine kubuka mutangile kundi. Uvua muambule ne nkala dikala dia kapia divuaye mukuate pa tshilambuilu. 
Isaiah6:7 Kudintuaye ku mishiku, wamba ne: “Tshibawu tshiebe tshiakujika, bubi buebe buakujimina, bualu kapia kakulenga ku mishiku yebe.”" 
Isaiah6:8 Meme kumvua Maweja-Nangila unkonka ne: — Undi mua kutuma nnganyi? Waya kutuambidila mukenji wetu nnganyi? Meme kuandamuna ne: — Ke meme ewu, untume meme." 
Isaiah6:9 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Uye kuambila bantu aba ne: “Nenuteleje, kadi kanuakumvua to. Nenutangile, kadi kanuakumona to.”" 
Isaiah6:10 Upapishe muoyi wa bantu aba, upatshishe matshi abu, ufofamije mesu abu bua mesu abu kaamonyi, bua matshi abu kaumvu, kabeedi meji a kupingana kundi, tshimonyi mua kubasungidila." 
Isaiah6:11 Ke meme kukonka ne: — Maweja-Nangila, nebikale nanku too ne ku diba kaayi? Yeye kungandamuna ne: — Nebikale nanku too ne ku diba didibu banyangakaja bimenga bionsu, batangalaja bantu, nzubu yonsu ishala munda mutupu, ditunga dijima dishala tshipela." 
Isaiah6:12 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila neipate bantu mu ditunga diabu. Madimi abu neashale amu mbuba nkayayi." 
Isaiah6:13 Ku bantu dikumi, anu umue neapanduke ku tshinyangu. Yeye awu neabutuke kabidi. Neikale bu lutonga ludi lutoloka ku tshikuku tshia lusanga, nansha tshia mutshi wa terebinte. Nebaludie kudi nyama. Kadi tshikuku tshidi tshishala, netshisangule bantu badi banemeka Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah7:1 Tshikondu tshivua Akaze, muana wa Yotame, ne muikulu wa Uziya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, mukalenga Resine wa bena Arame kufika ne Peka, muana wa Remalya, uvua mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Kadi kabavua batshikuate to." 
Isaiah7:2 Bantu kumanyisha Akaze, mukalenga waku ndelanganyi ya Davide, ne bena lubanza luende ne: bena Arame mbase mitanda yabu mu buloba bua bena Efrayime. Bualu abu kutonda Akaze ne bantu bende. Kutuadijabu kunyungakana, bu mitshi ya muitu idi lupepele lunyungisha." 
Isaiah7:3 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yeshaya ne: — Angate muanebe Sheyare-Yashube, uye kumonangana ne Akaze. Udi ku ndekelu kua mukidi wa mayi adi afuma ku tshiina tshia ku mutu. Nulonde amu njila wa ku budimi bua Basukudi ba bilamba." 
Isaiah7:4 Wambile Akaze ne: “Udimuke! Kuzakadi, kutshinyi tshiji tshia Resine wa bena Arame ne tshia Peka, muana wa Remalya. Badi amu bu bishelele bia nkunyi bibidi bidi bifuima." 
Isaiah7:5 Ndi mumanye mudi bena Arame, Peka, ne bena mvita ba bena Efrayime, basue kukuluisha. Bavua bamba ne:" 
Isaiah7:6 ‘Tuyayi kuluisha bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda! Tubatshinyishe, tukuate ditunga diabu, mbapeshe muana wa Tabeyele, bua ikale mukalenga wabu. ’" 
Isaiah7:7 Kadi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: ‘Ebi kabiena mua kuenzeka to. 
Isaiah7:8 Bualu, Damase udi tshimenga tshikulu tshia bena Arame, Resine udi mukalenga amu wa bena Damase. Samariya udi tshimenga tshikulu tshia bena Efrayime, Peka udi mukalenga amu mu Samariya. Kadi nkushale amu bidimu makumi asambombu ne bitanu, bua tshisamba tshia bena Efrayime kubulukatshi.’ Panudi kanuyi nushindika muoyi wenu kudi Maweja-Nangila, kanuakuikala bantu bashindame to.”" 
Isaiah7:9  
Isaiah7:10 Maweja-Nangila kumanyisha kabidi Akaze ne: 
Isaiah7:11 — Lomba tshimanyinu kudi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu webe, nansha tshiotshi tshifuma ku kandondu ka bafue, nansha tshifuma muulu muamua." 
Isaiah7:12 Kadi Akaze kuandamuna ne: — Too, tshiena ndomba tshintu nansha. Tshiena musue kuteta Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah7:13 Nanku Yeshaya kumuamba ne: — Wewe Akaze ne bena diku diebe, ndelanganyi ya Davide, ntelejayi. Nudi nusuya bantu bikole, nudi basue kusuya kabidi ne Mvidi Mukulu wanyi anyi?" 
Isaiah7:14 Nanku Maweja-Nangila nkayende neakupeshe tshimanyinu: nsongakaji neimite difu. Nealele muana wa balume. Neamuinyike Emanuwele, mmumue ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi netu. ”" 
Isaiah7:15 Muana neanue mabele, neadie buitshi, too ne diba diamanyaye mua kusunguluja bualu buimpe ne bubi." 
Isaiah7:16 Bangabanga ne muana ewu kusunguluja bualu buimpe ne bubi, buloba bua bakalenga babidi baudi utshina, nebushale munda mutupu, kamuyi bantu." 
Isaiah7:17 Kadi Maweja-Nangila neanukengeshe, wewe ne bantu bebe, ne bena diku diebe dia bukalenga. Nenubuele mu dikenga dinudi kanuyi banji kumona, katshia bukalenga bua Izrayele babulukangana ne bukalenga bua Yuda. — Mukalenga wa bena Ashure neakumbaje bionsu ebi." 
Isaiah7:18 Dimue dituku, Maweja-Nangila neele kashiba, abikile njiji ya ku muaba udi musulu wa Nile ubuelela mu mayi manene, ne mbulubulu ya mu ditunga dia bena Ashure." 
Isaiah7:19 Bishi bionsu ebi nebifike, nebikile mu mbuwa, mu milundu ya mbuebue, mu bipuka bia meba, ne mu bijibajiba bionsu." 
Isaiah7:20 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila neanubeye nsuki, ne miosa ya pambidi ponsu, ne miedi, ne kapaya kadiye usomba, dia muamua dia musulu wa Perate. Kapaya kende aka, ke mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Isaiah7:21 Dituku adi, muntu yonsu, neamune amu ngombe umue, ne mbuji ibidi." 
Isaiah7:22 Kadi nyama ayi neimupetele mabele makumbane, bua bamone mua kunua mabele. Nanku bonsu badi bashala ne muoyi mu ditunga, nebanue mabele, badie ne buitshi." 
Isaiah7:23 Dituku adi kabidi, budimi buvua ne mionji ya mvinyo tshinunu, buvuabu mua kupana ku nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole tshinunu, nebushale amu meba ne mingonga." 
Isaiah7:24 Nanku nebabuelemu ne mata ne mikete, bua kuta nyama. Bushuwa, ditunga dijima nedikale amu meba ne mingonga." 
Isaiah7:25 Bantu kabakuya kabidi kudima ne lukasu pa mikuna. Nebatshine meba ne mingonga. Nemushale amu mpata ya kudisha ngombe ne mikoku, muaba udi ngombe ukeba biakudia, muaba udi mikoku inayila." 
Isaiah8:1 Bua kukumbaja diyi divua Maweja-Nangila mungambile, meme kuangata tshibasa tshinene tshia kufunda. Ke meme kufundapu ne maleta manene avua bantu bonsu mua kubala, miaku eyi ne: “Pawulayi lubilu, Ibayi lukasa.”" 
Isaiah8:2 Meme kuleja Uriya, mutuangaji, ne Zekarya, muana wa Yeberekya, tshibasa atshi, bua bamone bajadike bimvua mufunde." 
Isaiah8:3 Pashishe meme kubuelela muena kuanyi mu nzubu. Yeye kabidi uvua muambi wa Mvidi Mukulu mumue nanyi. Kuimitaye difu, kulelaye muana wa balume. Nenku Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Umuinyike dina diende ne: Pawulayi lubilu, Ibayi lukasa." 
Isaiah8:4 Bualu muana ewu kayi muanji kumanya mua kubikila “Tatu,” nansha “Mamu,” nebatuadile mukalenga wa bena Ashure bintu bisuabu bapawule mu Damase, ne bisuabu biibe mu Samariya." 
Isaiah8:5 Maweja-Nangila kungambila tshiakabidi ne: 
Isaiah8:6 — Tshisamba etshi tshidi tshibenga mayi a mu mukidi wa Shilo, adi apueka kaayi muenji. Tshidi tshiteketa mu maboku, pa kumona bakalenga babidi aba: Resine ne Peka." 
Isaiah8:7 Nenku nembueje mu ditunga diatshi, mayi a musulu wa Perate, mayi mapite bungi, a muenji mukole kabidi. Ke mukalenga wa Ashure, ne tshiluilu tshiende. Mayi a musulu wa Perate, neapasalale dia muamua ne dia munu." 
Isaiah8:8 Mayi a musulu awu, neabuele miaba yonsu mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Neakuate bantu too ne mu nshingu. Misapa yawu neitangalake, ibuikile ditunga diebe dijima, Emanuwele." 
Isaiah8:9 Bena bisamba bia bende, nansha nuenu batua ndondu, nenutshine amu kutshina. Nuenu bena matunga adi kule, telejayi: nansha nuenu ne bia mvita, bowa nebunukuate." 
Isaiah8:10 Elayi meji a kuenza bualu kampanda, kadi kanuakubukumbaja munudi basue. Umvuanganayi, kadi kanuena ne tshinuenza. Bualu Emanuwele udiku, mmumue ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi netu." 
Isaiah8:11 Maweja-Nangila kunkuata ku tshianza, ungambila ne: kulondi malu a tshisamba etshi. Uvua umbela ne:" 
Isaiah8:12 “Kuidikiji bantu aba, padibu bakula. Kutedi buntomboji, padibu babutela. Kuena ne bua kutshina tshidi tshibakuatshisha bowa. Kuena ne bua kuzakala nanku.”" 
Isaiah8:13 Manyayi amu ne: meme Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, ndi wa tshijila. Amu meme ke wakunemeka nkayanyi, amu meme ke unudi ne bua kuzakela." 
Isaiah8:14 Meme ndi muaba udi bantu mua kunyemena. Kadi ndi kabidi dibue, dia kukuma dikasa kudishinda. Ndi dibue didi dishinda makalenga onsu abidi, bua bena Izrayele ne bua bena Yuda. Ndi buteyi budi bukuata bena mu Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah8:15 Bantu ba bungi nebatuute dikasa ku dibue, badishinde, batshibuke nyima. Bantu ba bungi nebabakuate mu buteyi emu, kabayi mua kusulukamu to." 
Isaiah8:16 Ndi nsokoka bivua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. Ndi ndama bimpe bionsu bindi ne bua kuamba. Ndi mbiambila amu balongi banyi. 
Isaiah8:17 Ndi muindile Maweja-Nangila. Mpindiewu udi ulengulula ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. Kadi ndi amu ndama lutulu, ntekemena kudiye." 
Isaiah8:18 Meme ne bana badi Maweja-Nangila mumpeshe, tudi bimanyinu bidi bilongesha bantu mu Izrayele malu a kudi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, udi usomba mu nzubu wende pa mukuna wa Siyone." 
Isaiah8:19 Bantu bakuabu badi bamba ne: “Nukonke bakishi malu, bualu badi batumanyisha malu adi kaayi manji kuenzeka. Nukonke bena mbuku, bakuambile malu ku ditshi. Bualu tshisamba tshionsu tshidi tshikonka mvidie yatshi, tshikonka bakishi buakulongolola malu a bantu badi panu.” Padibu bakuambila nanku," 
Isaiah8:20 wandamuna ne: “Tuetu tudi bualu amu ne mikenji, kabidi ne malongesha a Maweja-Nangila.” Muntu udi kayi ulonda mukenji awu, kena utshisha bufuku to." 
Isaiah8:21 Nebapite mu ditunga baletele ne nzala. Pabapita nzala, nebapende mukalenga wabu, ne Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Bantu nebatangile kulu," 
Isaiah8:22 nebatangile panshi, kadi nebamone amu dibungama, midima ne makenga. Nebabuele mu midima idi yenza bowa." 
Isaiah8:23 Muntu mumane kubuela mu bufuku ebu, kakupatukamu nansha. Kale Maweja-Nangila uvua mudiwule buloba bua Zebulone ne Naftali. Kadi mu matuku adi kumpala, neatumbishe maloba aa, biangatshile ku njila udi ulonda mayi manene, ne ku ditunga didi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yardene, ne ku buloba bua Ngalileya, muaba udi benyi basombe." 
Isaiah9:1 Bantu badi benda mu miidima, badi bamona bukenke bukole. Badi basa mu ditunga dia mufitu, butoke budi bubakenkela." 
Isaiah9:2 Maweja-Nangila, wewe kubasankisha bikole, kuvudija musangelu wabu! Badi basanka kumpala kuebe, mudi bantu batshionkomoka matuku a kunowa, mudibu babanyangana bivuabu bapawule mu mvita, beela mbila ya disanka." 
Isaiah9:3 Bualu udi utshibula lelu mujuwu wa bupika, wa bujitu bunene butambe, mutshi udi ubashila mputa pa makaya, mulangala udi muena tshinyangu ubakuma nawu. Ke muuvua muenze kale, pauvua mutshimune bena Madiyane." 
Isaiah9:4 Bisabata bia baluishi bidi bizakaja buloba, binkutu biabu binyanguke ne mashi, nebabioshe mu kapia, babishidisha." 
Isaiah9:5 Eyowa, mbatulelele muana, mbatupeshe muana wa balume. Mvidi Mukulu mmumuteke mukalenga. Nebamuinyike ne: “Muena meji wa dikema, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole, Tatu wa kashidi, Mukalenga muana wa bupole.”" 
Isaiah9:6 Bukalenga buende nebutangalake, bena ditunga bende nebasombe mu bupole kashidi. Neashindame mu nkuasa wa lumu lua Davide, mpindiewu ne tshiendelele. Bumfumu buende nebutungunuke kashidi, bualu udi ulongolola malu bimpe, amu mudi Mvidi Mukulu ujinga. Ke bidi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu ukumbaja, bualu udi utunanga, kayi upungila." 
Isaiah9:7 Maweja-Nangila uvua mulumbuluishe ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. Kupishaye bukalenga bua Izrayele. 
Isaiah9:8 Bantu bonsu badi mu buloba bua Efrayime, ne badi basomba mu tshimenga tshia Samariya, mbamanye bualu ebu. Kadi badi amu baditambisha, bamba ne:" 
Isaiah9:9 “Nzubu ya tushole ivuabu bupule, nebibakulule ne mabue masonga! Nansha bobu bashimbule makunji a mitshi ya sikomore, ki mbualu to. Netupingaje pa mutu pawu makunji a mitshi ya sedre!”" 
Isaiah9:10 Nenku Maweja-Nangila mmujule Resine, muluishi wabu; mmusonsole baluishi babu nseke yonsu:" 
Isaiah9:11 kumpala kuabu kudi bena Arame, kunyima kuabu bena Peleshete. Bantu bonsu aba bakanyanga bena Izrayele bikole, babanyenga buloba buabu. Kadi tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila katshiena tshijika. Utshidi amu ubakanyina." 
Isaiah9:12 Ke muvua Mvidi Mukulu munyoke bantu bende nanku. Kadi bena Izrayele, nansha bobu bamone bionsu abi, kabena bapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wabu to. Kabena balonda tshidi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole bonsu musue." 
Isaiah9:13 Nenku Maweja-Nangila neanyoke bena Izrayele bonsu, bamfumu ne bantu babu, amu dituku dimue, amu mudibu bakose mutu ne mukila." 
Isaiah9:14 Bakulu ne bantu banene ke mutu, bambi badi bashima ke mukila." 
Isaiah9:15 Balombodi ba bantu aba badi babapambula. Pa mutu pa kubaludika, badi babatangalaja." 
Isaiah9:16 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila kayi mua kupandisha bansongalume babu ku mvita. Kena mua kufuila bakaji bakamba ne bana ba nshiye luse. Bualu bantu bonsu badi benza bibi, babenga diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu, bakula bu bantu badi kabayi bangata Mvidi Mukulu ne mushinga. Kadi tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila, katshiena tshijika. Utshidi amu olola tshianza bua kunyoka." 
Isaiah9:17 Eyowa, bubi budi butampakana kudi bantu bu kapia katua ku tshisuku, kalambuluka mu ditu, kajuula muishi mupite bungi bu mavuba." 
Isaiah9:18 Tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, tshidi bu kapia kadi kosha ditunga. Bantu ba mu ditunga badi bapia bu nkunyi, muntu nansha umue kena utangila muanabu to." 
Isaiah9:19 Badi bangata bintu ku dia balume, nzala yabu kayiyi ijika. Badi bangata binga ku dia bakaji, kabayi bukuta. Muntu yonsu udi ubutula mukuende." 
Isaiah9:20 Bisamba bivua bibundangana, tshia Menashe kubunda tshia Efrayime, etshi kabidi kubunda tshia Menashe. Bionsu bibidi ebi kubunda tshia Yuda. Kadi tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila katshiena tshijika. Tshianza tshiende tshitshidi tshiela mulu." 
Isaiah10:1 Nudi bena diakabi, bualu nudi nuela mikenji idi kayiyi miakane, ne meyi adi akengesha bantu banyi." 
Isaiah10:2 Nudi nubenga kuteleja bantu banyi, badi kabayi ne bukole. Nudi nubenga kupesha bapele, bidibu ne bua kupeta. Nudi nunyenga bakaji bakamba bidibu nabi, nuiba bana ba nshiye bintu biabu." 
Isaiah10:3 Kadi dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ukosa nsambu, tshipepele tshikole tshifuma kule netshinupete. Diba adi, nenuenze tshinyi? Nenuye kudi nganyi? Nenupete diambuluisha muaba kaayi? Nenuye kuteka mpetu yenu penyi?" 
Isaiah10:4 Diba adi, nudi mua kusungula amu malu abidi: kubuelakana ne bena lukanu, nansha kufua. Kadi tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila katshiena tshijika, tshianza tshiende tshitshidi tshiela mulu." 
Isaiah10:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena Ashure mbena diakabi. Mvua mubangate bua kunyoka nabu bantu banyi. Bobu ke badi bambula mutshi, undi ntalaja nawu tshiji tshianyi." 
Isaiah10:6 Meme kubatuma bua kuluisha tshisamba tshidi tshimbenga. Meme kubambila bua kubunda tshisamba tshidi tshimfikisha munda. Meme kuanyisha bua biibe, bapawule bantu aba, babadiatakaje bu bitotshi bia mu njila." 
Isaiah10:7 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ashure kena wanyisha bionsu abi nanku. Udi wela manga meji munda muende. Udi musue kunyanga ne kubutula matunga onsu adiye mua kuluisha. 
Isaiah10:8 Bualu udi wamba ne: “Balombodi ba bena mvita banyi, badi ne bukole bu bua bakalenga ba matunga!" 
Isaiah10:9 Meme kukuata tshimenga tshia Kalne, kukuata ne tshia Karkemishe. Meme kukuata tshimenga tshia Amate, kukuata tshia Arpade, kukuata Samariya, kukuata Damase." 
Isaiah10:10 Meme kutekesha makalenga avua ne mvidie mipite ya mu Yerushalayime, nansha ya mu Samariya, ku bukole." 
Isaiah10:11 Mumvua munyoke tshimenga tshia Samariya ne mvidie yatshi, ke mundi ne bukole bua kunyoka tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ne mvidie yatshi.”" 
Isaiah10:12 Pikala Maweja-Nangila mumane kujikija mudimu wende pa mukuna wa Siyone ne mu Yerushalayime, neanyoke kabidi mukalenga wa bena Ashure, bualu udi uditambisha, upepeja bantu bakuabu." 
Isaiah10:13 Udi wamba ne: “Ndi muenze bionsu amu ku bukole buanyi. Meme ndi mumanye malu, ndi muena budimu bupite. Ndi mushipe mikalu idi munkatshi mua matunga. Meme kupawula bintu bivuabu balamina mu mayeba. Meme kuipata ne bakalenga mu nkuasa yabu ya bumfumu." 
Isaiah10:14 Mvua mupete biuma bia bantu, bu mudi muntu ukuata disua dia nyunyi. Meme kusangisha bintu bionsu bidi pa buloba, bu mudi muntu usangisha makele malekela kudi nyunyi. Kakuvua muntu uvua mubuuke, nansha mukangule muinu, nansha mudile muadi.”" 
Isaiah10:15 — Tshisuyi tshidi mua kudimona tshipite mfumuatshi anyi? Nseele wa kupanda nende mabaya udi mua kudiangata ne mushinga mupite wa muenaye anyi? Dikombu kadiena dijuula muntu, kadi muntu ngudi udijuula! Tshibonge katshiena tshinyungisha muntu, muntu ngudi utshinyungisha." 
Isaiah10:16 Nenku mfumu wa bamfumu, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, neajimije bubanji budi bena Ashure nabu. Neoshe lumu luabu, ne bionsu bidibu nabi." 
Isaiah10:17 Maweja-Nangila, butoke bua bena Izrayele, neikale bu kapia, kadi kosha meba ne mingonga, kabibutula dituku dimue." 
Isaiah10:18 Neavingutule ditu dijima, ne mitshi ya bimuma yonsu. Ne bikale bu muntu munyane ne disama." 
Isaiah10:19 Mu ditu dia bena Ashure, nemushale mitshi bungi bukese, budi muana mutekete mua kubadika." 
Isaiah10:20 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele badi bashale ne muoyi, bena diku dia Yakobe badi kabayi bafue mu mvita, nebumuke kudi muntu uvua mubakume. Kadi nebanyemene kudi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele. Nebamulamate kashidi." 
Isaiah10:21 Kasumbu kadi kashala nekapingane. Bushuwa, bena Izrayele badi bashala nebapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole." 
Isaiah10:22 Wewe Izrayele, nansha muvua bantu bebe bungi bu lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene, kadi amu bakese nebapingane kudi Maweja-Nangila. Wewe neubutuke, bualu nebakunyoke muvuabu bakose tshilumbu." 
Isaiah10:23 Bushuwa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu, neakumbaje musuaye muambe. Neakubutule, bantu ba pa buloba bujima batangile." 
Isaiah10:24 Nanku umvuayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu wamba: “Bantu banyi, nuenu badi basomba mu Siyone, lekelayi kutshina bena Ashure, badi banutuuta ne mitshi, banuambuila tshibonge, muvua bena Ejipitu banuenzela bangabanga." 
Isaiah10:25 Bualu panenga tshitupa, tshiji tshimvua natshi bualu buenu netshituye. Nenkudimukile bena Ashure bua meme kubanyoka. ”" 
Isaiah10:26 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu neakengeshe bena Ashure, bu muvuaye muenzele bena Madiyane pa lubuebue lua Orebe. Neolole dikombu diende pa mayi manene, bu muvuaye munyoke bena Ejipitu." 
Isaiah10:27 Dituku adi, neakumushile bujitu budi bukunemenena pa makaya. Neakupepejile mutshi uuvua wambula nawu bintu bia bujitu pa dikaya diebe. Bena mvita ba bena Ashure badi baya mu Samariya," 
Isaiah10:28 bafika pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Ayate, bapitshila mu Migrone, bashiya mabuki abu mu Mikmase." 
Isaiah10:29 Kupitshilabu mu lupongu. Kuambilanganabu ne: “Tuasayi mitanda mu Ngeba. Badi mu Rama badi ne bowa. Badi mu Ngibeya, tshimenga tshia Shawule, badi banyema." 
Isaiah10:30 Elayi mbila, nuenu bena mu Ngalime, nuenu bena mu musoku wa Layisha, telejayi, nuenu bena mu Anatote, andamunayi. ”" 
Isaiah10:31 Bena mu Mademena badi banyema. Badi basomba mu Ngebime mbaye kusokoma. 
Isaiah10:32 Dituku dimue adi bena Ashure badi bakuata tshimenga tshia Nobe. Badi bakanyina bena mu Siyone, mukuna wa Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah10:33 Mfumu wa bamfumu, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, udi ubabunda bu mudibu bakosa matamba a mutshi ne muele mutue. Nebakose mitshi milemile; idi mitumbuke nebayupule, bayele panshi." 
Isaiah10:34 Badi basola muitu mitshi yonsu ne tshisuyi, mitshi ya sedre mile ya mu Lebanone idi panshi." 
Isaiah11:1 Lutonga ludi lupatuka ku tshikuku tshia Ishayi. Ditamba dipiadipia didi dimena ku miji yende. 
Isaiah11:2 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila udi nende kashidi. Mueyelu udi umupa meji, umuambuluisha bua asunguluje malu. Neamanye tshia kuenza, neapete bukitu bua kutshikumbaja. Mueyelu neumuludike bua amanye Maweja-Nangila, neumulongeshe bua kumunemeka." 
Isaiah11:3 Disanka diende didi dia kunemeka Maweja-Nangila. Kena ukosa nsambu anu ku bidi bimueneka kudi bantu to. Kena ukosa tshilumbu ku biambamba bia bantu. 
Isaiah11:4 Nealumbuluile bantu badibu bapetula. Neakose tshilumbu tshia bapele ba mu ditunga amu pa tshiotshi. Meji ende adi bu mutshi wa kutekesha nawu bantu ba mu ditunga. Udi ukosa nsambu, ushipesha muena tshibawu." 
Isaiah11:5 Bu mudi muntu ne mukaba musuike mu tshimonu diba dionsu, udi ne muoyi umue, wenza amu bidi bimpe kayi ulekela." 
Isaiah11:6 Nenku tshisumpa-ntambue netshisombe kaba kamue ne kana ka mukoku, nkashama wa tshimungu nealale pamue ne kana ka mbuji. Muana wa ngombe ne muana wa ntambue nebidiile kaba kamue. Nebende babisaka kudi muana mutekete." 
Isaiah11:7 Ngombe neadie bulunda ne nyama wa lonji. Bana bayi nebalale kaba kamue. Ntambue neadie mashinda mudi ngombe udia. 
Isaiah11:8 Muana wa pambidi neanayile ku buina bua nyoka. Nsongalume neele tshianza tshiende ku buina bua nyoka wa ntoka. 
Isaiah11:9 Kabakuenzelangana kabidi bibi, nansha kunyangilangana bintu pa mukuna mujima wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila. Ditunga dijima nediuwule ne dimanya dia Maweja-Nangila, amu bu mudi mayi uwuja mayi manene." 
Isaiah11:10 Muana wa ku ndelanganyi ya Ishayi neikale mulombodi wa bukua bisamba. Bukua bisamba nebuye kumulomba meji. Muaba wikalaye musombe, neukenke ne butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu." 
Isaiah11:11 Dituku adi Maweja-Nangila neenze tshiakabidi muende muonsu, bua kupikula bantu bende. Neapingaje kuabu bavua bashale ne muoyi mu ditunga dia Ashure ne dia Ejipitu, mu ditunga dia Patrose ne dia Kushe, mu Elame ne mu Babilone, mu Amate wa bena Arame, ne mu matunga a ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Isaiah11:12 Nease dibendele, bua kuvuluija bukua matunga, mudiye musue kusangisha bena Izrayele, bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika, pamue ne bena Yuda bavua bamuangalake ku ntengu ne ntengu ya buloba." 
Isaiah11:13 Nenku bena Efrayime nebalekele mukawu, udibu batekela bena Yuda. Bena Yuda kabakuluisha kabidi bena Efrayime nansha." 
Isaiah11:14 Nebaye bonsu pamue batangile luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ku mikuna ya bena Peleshete. Bonsu babidi nebaye batangile luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bua kupawula bisamba bidi mu tshipela. Nebakuate ditunga dia bena Edome ne dia bena Mowabe. Bena Amone nebikale ku bumfumu buabu." 
Isaiah11:15 Maweja-Nangila neakamishe musapa wa mayi manene a Ejipitu. Yeye neakanyine ne tshianza tshiende musulu wa Perate. Ku bukole bua Mueyelu wende, neaukosolole tusulu muanda mutekete, tudibu mua kusabuka ku makasa." 
Isaiah11:16 Bu muvua bena Izrayele bavua bapatuka mu Ejipitu, benda mu njila munene, ke mudi bantu bavua bashale ne muoyi, mu ditunga dia bena Ashure, mua kuenda kabidi mu njila munene." 
Isaiah12:1 Dituku diudi upeta lupandu, newambe ne: “Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkuela tuasakidila. Uvua mumfikile munda pa bualu. Kadi tshiji tshiebe tshiatuyi. Udi muvue kunsamba." 
Isaiah12:2 “Monayi mudi Mvidi Mukulu umpandisha. Ndi ne ditalala munda, tshiena ntshina tshintu to. Maweja-Nangila ke bukole buanyi. Ndi mmuimbila, bualu uvua munsungidile. ”" 
Isaiah12:3 Nenusune mayi a disanka, ku mpokolu ya lupandu." 
Isaiah12:4 Dituku adi nenuambe ne: “Tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila. Numanyishe bantu dina diende. Nulondele bisamba bionsu malu a dikema avuaye muenze. Nukobole ne: Dina diende ndinene! 
Isaiah12:5 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila ne bisanji, bualu mmuenze malu a dikema. Numuanyishe pa buloba bujima!”" 
Isaiah12:6 Bena Siyone, sankayi, nutshionkomoke, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunene! Wa tshijila wa Izrayele, mmuase munkatshi muenu!" 
Isaiah13:1 Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, mukenji bua amanyishe “Babilone ” ne:" 
Isaiah13:1 Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, mukenji bua amanyishe “Babilone ” ne:" 
Isaiah13:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Asayi dibendele pa mukuna, padi kapayi mitshi. Elayi kabobu ka mvita. Bikilayi bena mvita ne tshianza, bua babuelele ku biibi bia bantu badi badifila ku budisuile buabu." 
Isaiah13:3 Meme ndi ntumina, bantu badi banyi meme, meyi anyi. Ndi mubikidishe bilobu bianyi, bamiadiamvita badi bela mbila ya disanka, bua bakumbaje tshidi tshiji tshianyi tshijadika.”" 
Isaiah13:4 Umvuayi tshiona tshidi tshifumina ku mikuna, tshifuanangane ne mutoyi wa tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu. Bavua badisangishe mbafume ku makalenga mavule. Bena matunga ne matunga badi muaba umue. Bualu Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, ke udi ukenketa bantu bende bua baye ku mvita." 
Isaiah13:5 Badi batumina ku matunga a kulekule, muaba udi diulu ne buloba bituangene, bua kuya kunyanga ditunga dijima: ke Maweja-Nangila ne badiye muangate, bua kunyoka bantu ba buloba bujima." 
Isaiah13:6 Dilayi muadi, bualu dituku dia Maweja-Nangila dikadi pabuipi, didi Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu musue kubutula bantu ne bintu." 
Isaiah13:7 Ke padi bonsu bateketa mu maboku, kabayi dikanda." 
Isaiah13:8 Monayi bakadi bapanga tshia kuenza. Bowa ne dikenga mbibakuate. Badi badinyenga bu bakaji pa lulelu. Bakadi batangilangana, buminyine ne bowa, mpala yabu mikunze ne bundu." 
Isaiah13:9 Monayi dituku dia Maweja-Nangila dikadi pabuipi, dituku kadiyi tuseku, dia tshiji, dia tshinyangu ne tshikisu. Maweja-Nangila neandamune ditunga dijima, dishale amu tshipela. Bena buenzavi nebabutuke bonsu." 
Isaiah13:10 Mitotu ya mulu, ne bidimina nzaji kabiakukenka kabidi to. Diba nedibuitshidile, amu patshididi dipatuka. Ngondu kakutokesha kabidi ne nkenke yende to." 
Isaiah13:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi musue kumana bubi bua bantu, kujikija ditambisha dia bena lutambishi, kunyoka bena tshibawu, kukepesha didisua dia bena tshikisu." 
Isaiah13:12 Nenkepeshe bantu, bashale bakese, bu tshiamu tshia mpawungi muimpe, bu mpawungi wa mu Ofire. ”" 
Isaiah13:13 Diulu nedizakale, buloba nebunyungakane, dituku didi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, uleja tshiji tshiende." 
Isaiah13:14 Dituku adi, bantu nebamone, mudi muntu yonsu unyema ku tshisamba tshiabu, upingana kuabu lubilu, bu ngulungu mikuatshika bowa, bu mikoku idi kayiyi ne muyilami." 
Isaiah13:15 Nenku wa kumpala wapetabu mu njila awu, nebamuase mikete ya bungi. Muntu yonsu wakuatabu, neafue ku muele." 
Isaiah13:16 Nebazaze bana babu, bobu batangile. Nebapawule bintu biabu, nebabuelele bakaji babu mu nzubu ku bukole." 
Isaiah13:17 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nensonsole bena lukuna babu, bena Madayi, bantu ba muoyi mupape, badibu kabayi mua kubuejila, badi kabayi bangata mabuejila, nansha a biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, nansha a mpawungi." 
Isaiah13:18 Nebase bansongalume mikete. Kabena bafuila bana ba ku dibele, nansha bana batekete bakuabu, luse to.”" 
Isaiah13:19 Bukalenga bua mu Babilone, budi bupite makuabu onsu ku buimpe. Bena Babilone badi babusankidila bikole. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu neabubutule, muvuaye mubutule kale Sodome ne Ngomore." 
Isaiah13:20 Ditunga dia Babilone nedishale munda mutupu kashidi kashidi. Nansha bena ngendu, kabena basamu mitanda yabu to. Nansha badishi ba bimuna, kabena bimanamu to." 
Isaiah13:21 Kadi nyama ya mikenga neisombemu. Bipungulu nebibuele mu nzubu yabu. Nyunyi ya tufyondu neisombemu. Mbuji ya mpumbu neitupikemu. 
Isaiah13:22 Nyama ya bimungu neilale mu nzubu minene ya mu tshimenga. Nyama ya mibuabua neidile mu nzubu ya bakalenga. Tshikondu tshia kubutula Babilone tshikadi pabuipi. Bakadi bamane kubala matuku ende. 
Isaiah14:1 Bushuwa, Maweja-Nangila nealeje tshiakabidi mudiye munange ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, mudiye musungule bena Izrayele. Neapingaje bantu bende mu matunga abu. Bantu benyi nebadisange kudibu, nebapetangane ne bena tshisamba tshia Yakobe." 
Isaiah14:2 Bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu nebambuluishe bena Izrayele, nebabafile kuabu. Mu buloba bua Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele nebadiangatshile bantu aba balume ne bakaji bu bapika babu. Bantu bavua babela mu lukanu, bena Izrayele nebabele kabidi mu lukanu. Nebashale bamfumu ba bantu bavua babatumina diyi." 
Isaiah14:3 Maweja-Nangila neapatule bena Izrayele mu bupika. Bobu bamane kupitshila mu makenga ne ntatu, nebapete dikisha." 
Isaiah14:4 Diba adi nebimbe musambu wa kuseka nawu mukalenga wa bena Babilone, bambe ne: Kia! Ebi mbienzeke munyi? Mfumu wa tshikisu mmufue bishi? Kakukengesha kabidi muntu nansha umue." 
Isaiah14:5 Maweja-Nangila mmunyangakaje bumfumu bua bantu babi. Mmutshibule dikombu dia muena tshikisu. 
Isaiah14:6 Uvua utuuta bantu ne tshiji tshikole kayi ulekela. Uvua ukengesha bantu ba mu matunga avuaye mukuate, kakuyi dikisha nansha dikese." 
Isaiah14:7 Mpindiewu bantu ba mu buloba buonsu, badi ne dikisha, bela mbila ya disanka." 
Isaiah14:8 Nansha mitshi idi isanka, bua padi muena tshikisu ewu mubutuke. Mitshi ya siprese ne ya sedre ya mu Lebanone idi imuambila ne: “Katshia wafua, kakuena udi ufika, bua kutupuila panshi kabidi to.”" 
Isaiah14:9 Ku bajangi padibu bumvua, muukadi pa kufika, wewe muena tshikisu, badi badilongolola bua kukuakidila. Bualu buebe badi babisha bajangi bavua bamfumu banene panu. Bualu buebe badi bumusha, bakalenga bonsu ba matunga mu nkuasa yabu." 
Isaiah14:10 Bonsu badi bakula, bakuseka ne: “Lelu wewe mene ukadi mutekete bu tuetu, ukadi mutufuane, kuyi bukole.”" 
Isaiah14:11 Bintu biuvua udisua nabi, ne misambu iuvua muimbe mu nzenze yebe, udi nabi ku bajangi anyi? Bulalu buebe, ke bintu bibole, mbulankete webe, ke bikusu." 
Isaiah14:12 Ebi mbienzeke munyi? Wewe uvua bu mutotu udi ukenka mu dinda! Mudibu bakukulula kulu mmunyi? Wewe uvua utshimuna bukua matunga, mudibu bakuimansha panshi mbishi?" 
Isaiah14:13 Uvua uditambisha ne: “Netubande too ne mu diulu. Nembandishe nkuasa wanyi, kulu kua mitotu ya Mvidi Mukulu. Nensombe pa mukuna, padi mvidie isomba, yela tshipangu tshiayi, ku luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga." 
Isaiah14:14 Nembande pa mutu pa mavuba. Nemfuanangane ne Mvidi Mukulu, muena bukole buonsu.”" 
Isaiah14:15 Kadi mpindiewu, mbakuele mu bajangi, mu kandondu ka buloba." 
Isaiah14:16 Bonsu badi bakumona upuekamu, badi bakutangila, kabayi mua kuitaba bidi mesu abu amona. Nebebejangane ne: “Ewu, ki mmuntu uvua uzakaja buloba anyi? Ki mmuntu uvua munyange makalenga anyi?" 
Isaiah14:17 Uvua mushiye matunga munda mutupu, mubutule bimenga, mubenge kulekela bena lukanu.”" 
Isaiah14:18 Bushuwa, bakalenga bonsu ba matunga, bavua babajika ne lumu, muntu mu luende lukita." 
Isaiah14:19 Kadi wewe mbakuimanshe pambelu, mbakupale lukita bua kukujikamu. Udi mufuanangane ne muana, udibu balela mufuile munda, ukuatshisha bowa. Udi mufuanangane ne tshitalu, tshidibu badiatakaja ku makasa. Mbakubuikile bitalu bia bantu, bavuabu bashipe ku muele. Kadi bobu bavua babajika mu lukita lua mabue," 
Isaiah14:20 wewe kuena uya muaba udibu mu nkita to. Bualu udi munyange ditunga diebe, mujimije mashi a bena tshisamba tshiebe mu mvita. Kashidi kabakulela dina dia bena diku diebe, dia bashipianganyi kabidi to." 
Isaiah14:21 Bana ba balume ba mfumu awu badi ne bua kufua, bafuta tshibawu tshia tatuabu! Tshianana badi mua kujuka, kukuata tshiakabidi buloba bujima, kuasamu ne bimenga." 
Isaiah14:22 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Nennyoke Babilone. Nenjimije dina dia Babilone, bana bende, ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu pa buloba." 
Isaiah14:23 Nengenze Babilone bu mudi tshisense, muaba udibu basombe kudi nyunyi ya kasonga-mule. Nembutule bionsu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika nanku. ”" 
Isaiah14:24 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, mmuditshipe, wamba ne: “Bushuwa, tshionsu tshindi muele meji netshienzeke, tshionsu tshindi mushindike netshikumbane!" 
Isaiah14:25 Nenyangakaje bukole bua bena Ashure, mu buloba buanyi meme. Nembudiatakaje pa mikuna yanyi. Nenjikije tshinyangu, tshidibu banyanga natshi bantu banyi. Nengumushe bujitu bunene, budibu babambuishe.”" 
Isaiah14:26 Ebi ke bivua Maweja-Nangila mujadike, bua kuenza pa buloba bujima. Ke mikanu idiye ukanyina matunga onsu." 
Isaiah14:27 Padi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu muangate dipangadika, udi mua kumukandika, bua kukumbajaye tshidiye muele meji nnganyi? Padiye musue kunyoka muntu, udi mua kumbusha dinyoka adi nnganyi?" 
Isaiah14:28 Mu tshidimu tshia lufu lua mukalenga Akaze, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma muambi Yeshaya ne mukenji, wamba ne:" 
Isaiah14:29 Nuenu bonsu bena Peleshete, kanusanki bua padi bena Ashure, bavua banukengesha, kabayi kabidi ne bukole. Bualu kudi nyoka mufuile, nekupatuke munga nyoka, mupite wa kumpala ku lulengu. Diyi diende neditoye, nyoka wa kasanga-muma." 
Isaiah14:30 Bena dikenga nebikale ne biakudia, bu bana ba mikoku badi badia bimpe mu mpata. Bapele nebalale talalaa, kabayi ne lutatu. Kadi nuenu bena Peleshete, baluishi benu nebanubutule ne nzala. Nebashipe bana benu badi bashala ne muoyi." 
Isaiah14:31 Nuenu bena bimenga bidibu bakoleshe ne bimana, dilayi muadi, elayi mbila mikole. Bena Peleshete bonsu kabena mua kutekemena kabidi tshia nsongu. Baluishi badi bafuma luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga, bafuane divuba dia muinshi. Baluishi bonsu badiku, muena mvita nansha umue kena mushale to." 
Isaiah14:32 Bantu badi bena Peleshete batume, tubandamune tshinyi? Tubandamune ne: — Maweja-Nangila nkayende mmuase Siyone. Ke muaba udi bapele bende baye kusokomena." 
Isaiah15:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila bena “Mowabe.” Butuku bumue badi babutula tshimenga tshia Are tshidi mu ditunga dia Mowabe. Bantu badi bapuwa, bibatonda. Butuku bumue badi babutula tshimenga tshia Kire, tshidi mu ditunga dia Mowabe, bantu bapuwa bibatonda." 
Isaiah15:2 Bena mu Dibone badi baya muaba wabu wa tshijila bua kudila. Bena Mowabe kuela miyenga, pa mukuna wa Nebo ne mu tshimenga tshia Medeba. Badi bakungula mu mitu, babeya miedi." 
Isaiah15:3 Mu misesu ya mu bimenga, bantu badi bavuala bilamba bia madilu. Bonsu badi bela miyenga, badila pa mitu ya nzubu, ne mu bisalu." 
Isaiah15:4 Bena mu Eshebone, ne bena Elale, badi bela mbila, balomba diambuluisha. Mbila yabu idi miumvuike too ne mu Yakase. Ke padi bena mvita ba bena Mowabe, bakuatshika bowa, kabayi ne tshia kuenza." 
Isaiah15:5 Ndi ndila, nkeba badi mua kuambuluisha bena Mowabe. Bena Mowabe badibu bipata, badi banyema too ne ku Soware, ne ku Eglate-Shelishiya. Badi benda babanda ku Lukite. Bakuabu badi banyema ku njila wa ku Oronayime, bela mbila ya dikenga." 
Isaiah15:6 Mayi a ku Nimrime mmanyanguke, mitshi yonsu idi miume; mashinda mmafube. Kakuena kabidi tshisosa tshibishi." 
Isaiah15:7 Bintu bikese bivua bantu bashale nabi, badi baye nabi kule, dia muamua dia musulu wa Mitshi ya pepliye." 
Isaiah15:8 Badi bumvua mbila ya miyenga, nseke yonsu mu ditunga dia Mowabe. Miadi idi yumvuika, too ne ku Eglayime, ne ku biina bia Elime." 
Isaiah15:9 Mayi adi apitshila mu Dimone, neakunze ne mashi. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nensakidile makenga, ku adibu nawu mu Dimone. Ndi ntuma nyama wa ntambue, bua akuate mu Mowabe bantu badi bashala ne muoyi, bena ditunga badi kabayi bafue mu mvita.”" 
Isaiah16:1 “Bena Mowabe, tuminayi mukalenga wa ditunga dia Yuda mulambu wa mukoku wa tshimpanga. Numuke nawu ku Sela mu tshipela, nuye too ne ku mukuna wa Siyone. ”" 
Isaiah16:2 Bakaji ba bena Mowabe, badi bimane ku bisabu bia musulu wa Amone, amu bu mudi tunyunyi tupapalala, padibu batuipata mu disua diatu." 
Isaiah16:3 Bena Mowabe nebambe bena Yerushalayime ne: “Shindikayi diyi, nutuleje tshia kuenza. Nutulame munda munya, bu mudi butuku busokoka bintu mu miidima. Sokokayi bantu badibu bipata, kababamonyi kudi muntu." 
Isaiah16:4 Anyishayi bua bana betu, bavuabu bipata mu buloba bua Mowabe, basombe mu buloba buenu. Nubasokoke ku mesu a mushipianganyi. Diba nedifike didibu kabayi kabidi bakengesha bantu, kabayi babuela mu ditunga ne mvita, kabayi kabidi biba bintu." 
Isaiah16:5 Diba adi, bu munudi nudileja luse luenu, muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide, neasombe kashidi mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Nealumbuluishe bantu, neakose nsambu pa yoyi, nealudike bantu mu njila muimpe.”" 
Isaiah16:6 Tuvua bumvue bakula ne: bena Mowabe badi baditambisha, badisua bikole, baditemba, badiamba tshianana, baditambisha patupu." 
Isaiah16:7 Mpindiewu bena Mowabe, bakadi badila, bela miyenga ya miadi, badila mikata ya bimuma, ivuabu nayi mu musoku wa Kire-Erese. Badi badila bikole, kabayi bamona tshia kuenza." 
Isaiah16:8 Madimi a mu Eshebone adi munda mutupu! Mionji ya mvinyo ya mu Sibma idi mifubidile. Bakalenga ba matunga, bavua bakuatshika maluvu a ku mionji ayi. Mionji ayi ivua yela matamba too ne ku Yazere, ibuela too ne mu tshipela. Ntonga yayi idi ilamba, too ne dia muamua dia Mayi manene a luepu." 
Isaiah16:9 Ke pandi ndila, pamue ne bantu ba mu Yazere, bua budimi bua mvinyo bua mu Sibma budi bunyanguke. Ndi ndila bikole bualu buenu, nuenu, bena Eshebone, ne bena Elale, bua padi bena mvita bapitshila ne mvita, muaba unuvua bapole bimuma, banowe bia pa madimi." 
Isaiah16:10 Kanutshiena ne disanka, bua mitshi yenu ya bimuma to. Kanutshiena nusanka, nutshionkomoka bua madimi enu a mvinyo to. Bualu mu mabungu a maluvu mmushale mutupu, bakami ba tumuma bonsu mbumuke, misambu ya bakami ba maluvu mmikoseke." 
Isaiah16:11 Ke pandi ndidila bena Mowabe, ne kanyinganyinga, ne muadi bu wa lunzenze. Muoyi wanyi udi ujinga Kire-Erese." 
Isaiah16:12 Nansha bena Mowabe babanda pa mukuna wa tshijila, baya mu nzubu wa mvidie wabu, benda bapungila, batendelela mvidie wabu, kabakupeta tshintu to." 
Isaiah16:13 Ke tshivua Maweja-Nangila muambe kale bua bena Mowabe. 
Isaiah16:14 Lelu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Papita bidimu bisatu, amu dituku dia lelu, nebaseke bena Mowabe bonsu, ne bilobu biabu mene. Bantu babu badi bashala ne muoyi, nebikale bakese kabayi ne bukole.”" 
Isaiah17:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila “Damase ”. Nkushale amu matuku makese, Damase kakuikala kabidi tshimenga to. Bionsu bidimu nebibutuke." 
Isaiah17:2 Bena bimenga bidi bena Damase batangila nebanyeme. Nyama neipite mu bimenga ebi, kakuyi udi uyitshinyisha, nansha uyipata." 
Isaiah17:3 Bukalenga bua Efrayime kabuakuikala kabidi ne bena mvita. Bena Damase kabakuikala kabidi ne mukalenga to. Bantu badi bashala ne muoyi mu Damase, nebikale bakese, mudi bena Izrayele mene. Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, ke udi ujadika nanku awu." 
Isaiah17:4 Dituku adi, bena Izrayele, nebikale banyane, bashale amu mifuba nkayayi." 
Isaiah17:5 Nebadimone bu badi mu tshikondu tshia dinowa. Bakadi bamane kunowa ntete ya kuenza bukula. Bakadi bamane kusangisha bisumbu bia miepu. Bidi amu bu mudibu benza mu tshibandabanda tshia bena Refayime, bapele bashala bapumbulula amu miepu mikese." 
Isaiah17:6 Mu Izrayele nemushale bantu bakese, amu bu padibu bamane kupola bimuma bia olive, kushala amu tumuma tubidi nansha tusatu mu katongobela, tunayi nansha tutanu ku matamba. Ke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi ujadika nanku." 
Isaiah17:7 Dituku adi, bantu nebalonde tshiakabidi mufuki wabu. Nebatangile kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah17:8 Kabena baya kabidi ku bilambuilu bivuabu badienzele, nansha ku mvidie ivuabu basonge ne bianza biabu, nansha ku makunji a bijila, nansha ku bioshelu bia manananshi." 
Isaiah17:9 Dituku adi, bimenga bia mu Izrayele bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana nebishale munda mutupu, bu muvua bimenga bia bena Ivi ne bena Amore bishale munda mutupu kale, diba divua bena Izrayele babuele mu ditunga. Nebishale amu tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bowa." 
Isaiah17:10 Bena Izrayele nukadi bapue Mvidi Mukulu muoyi. Yeye ke uvua munusungidile! Kanuena nuvuluka Mupandishi wenu, udi bu lubuebue luenu, muaba unudi mua kusokomena. Nukadi nukuna mitshi, bua kutendelela nayi mvidie ya bantu benyi. Nudi numiamina ntete, bua kunemeka nayi mvidie ya mu matunga a bende." 
Isaiah17:11 Kadi nansha binuvua bakune bitoloke dituku adi, nansha bionsu binuvua bamiamine dinda, biele bilongu amu dituku adi, kanuena nunowa tshintu to. Dituku dia diakabi adi, nenumone amu makenga, muntu nansha umue kena mua kunuambuluisha." 
Isaiah17:12 Akia! Bisamba bungi nenku, bidi bienza mutoyi bua tshinyi? Mutoyi wabu udi bu wa tshiona tshia mayi manene. Bukua matunga budi bujuula tshimvundu, bu tshia mayi a tshibila adi apueka lubilu." 
Isaiah17:13 Tshimvundu tshia bisamba tshidi tshienda tshisemena pabuipi, tshifuana tshiona tshia mavuala a mayi manene. Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi ukanyina bisamba. Biobi bidi binyema kule, bu kasosa kapepula kudi lupepele lua pa mikuna, bu lupuishi lujuula kudi mvunde." 
Isaiah17:14 Dilolu bidi bitukuatshisha bowa bukole, kadi bangabanga ne kutshiabu, mbimane kuya! Ebi nebienzekele bantu badi batupawula bintu. Ebi nebienzekele bantu badi biba bintu bia mu ditunga dietu." 
Isaiah18:1 Diakabi ndiebe, wewe ditunga didi ne matu adi enda lubilu, ditunga dia ku misulu ya bena Kushe." 
Isaiah18:2 Ditunga edi, didi dituma mienampala, idi yenda pa musulu wa Nile, mu matu maluka ne ntupu. — Nuenu badi benda lukasa, nuenu badibu batuma, pinganayi kuenu kudi bantu bale ba kafyondu, ba mubidi wengelela. Kuenu kudi tshisamba, tshidibu bakakala miaba yonsu, kuetu kunu too ne ku nshikidilu kua buloba. Nuenu nudi tshisamba tshidi ne bukole bupite, tshidi tshibutula baluishi batshi. Nanku pinganayi kuenu ne mukenji wenu, mu ditunga dienu didi ne misulu ya bungi." 
Isaiah18:3 Kadi nuenu bonsu badi pa buloba, nuenu bonsu badi basa muaba udi bantu, tangila bimpe diba diabandishabu dibendela pa mukuna. Pelabu mpungi, nuteleje bimpe." 
Isaiah18:4 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua mungambile ne: “Ndi nsomba muaba wanyi wa tshijila ntangila bionsu bidi bienzeka. Ndi nshala amu talalaa, tshiyi nyungakana, amu bu luya ludi luimane diba dia munya mukole, nansha bu mavuba a mabungi, mu tshikondu tshia dinowa.”" 
Isaiah18:5 Nenku kumpala kua tshikondu tshia kunowa, padi mionji ya mvinyo mimane kuela bilongu, bilongu bimane kuandamuka bimuma, bimuma bimane kupia, yeye neapempe matamba ne muele, neumbushe ntonga ne mabeji." 
Isaiah18:6 Ke mudibu bimanshe bena Kushe, bashala tshiakudia tshia nyunyi ya pa mikuna, ne tshia nyama ya muitu. — Mikanku idi ibadia mu tshikondu tshia luya, nyama ya muitu mu tshikondu tshia mashika. —" 
Isaiah18:7 Ke tshikondu tshidibu batuadila Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu milambu kudi bantu aba bale ba kafyondu, badi mibidi yengelela, kudi tshisamba tshidi bantu bakakala, kunu too ne ku ndekelu kua buloba, kudi ditunga didi ne bukole bupite, didi dibutula baluishi badi, kudi ditunga didi ne misulu mivule. Milambu eyi, nebayituadile Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, muaba udiye musombele, pa mukuna wa Siyone." 
Isaiah19:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila “Ejipitu”. Maweja-Nangila ukadi ufika mu Ejipitu, muimane pa divuba didi diya lukasa. Mvidie ya tshianana ya mu Ejipitu, neizakale kumpala kuende. Bena Ejipitu nebatekete mu maboku." 
Isaiah19:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nensonsole bena Ejipitu, bua baluishangane bobu nkayabu. Muntu nealuangane ne muanabu, tshimenga netshiluishe tshikuabu, bukalenga nebuluishe bukuabu." 
Isaiah19:3 Bena Ejipitu nebapange tshia kuenza. Nennyangakaje bidibu balongolole. Nenku nebakonke mvidie yabu ya dishima, nebaye kudi babukishi ba mbuku, ne kudi bena lubuku lua muzangu.”" 
Isaiah19:4 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, Mfumu wa bamfumu udi wamba ne: “Nemfile bena Ejipitu, ku bumfumu bua mfumu wa malu makole. Nebabamune kudi mukalenga wa tshinyangu.”" 
Isaiah19:5 Mayi a mu musulu wa Nile adi enda akama, musulu neume menemene." 
Isaiah19:6 Mayi a mu misapa ya misulu adi enda anyanguka, anunka bibi. Mu misapa ya mu misulu ya mu Ejipitu, mayi neakepe, too ne muafikawu ku diuma. Mionji ya ntupu ne ya mukele neifubidile," 
Isaiah19:7 amu bu mudi bisosa bia ku muelelu wa mayi, muaba udi musulu wa Nile uya kudiela mu mayi manene. Madimi onsu, avua musulu wa Nile mufukishe, akadi munda mutupu, lupepele lumana kuambula bivuamu. Kamuena mushala kabidi tshintu to." 
Isaiah19:8 Balobi nebadile muadi, batua mikemu. Balobi ba ne ndobu, ne beedi ba makondu, badi ne tshinyongopelu tshinene." 
Isaiah19:9 Bantu badi baluka bilamba bia ndanda, badi ne tshinyongopelu tshia mumue. Bakaji badi basulakaja manda, ne balume badi baaluka, badi bonsu ne bowa bunene." 
Isaiah19:10 Bakumi ba bilamba bonsu nebatekete mu maboku. Bantu badi benza mudimu wa difutu, kabena bamona tshia kuenza." 
Isaiah19:11 Balombodi ba mu tshimenga tshia Sowane, mbantu bapale. Bafidi ba ngenyi ba mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, mbafile meji a tshianana. Kadi mmunyi mudi yonsu wa kunudi mua kuambila mukalenga wa Ejipitu ne: “Meme ndi muana wa muena meji, meme ndi lulelu lua mukalenga wa kale?”" 
Isaiah19:12 Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bena meji bebe bepi? Bakulongeshe, bakumanyishe tshidi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu mujadike bua kuenzela ditunga dia Ejipitu!" 
Isaiah19:13 Balombodi ba tshimenga tshia Sowane, bakuandamuka bidingidingi. Balombodi ba mu tshimenga tshia Memfise, mbantu batshimbakane. Amu bobu balombodi ba buloba, ke badi bapambula bena Ejipitu." 
Isaiah19:14 Maweja-Nangila mmubatshiompakaje. Ke mudibu bapambula bena ditunga, mu midimu yonsu idi bena Ejipitu benza. Mbafuanangane ne muntu mukuatshike maluvu, utetukila mu bilushi biende." 
Isaiah19:15 Mu Ejipitu kamuena muntu udi mua kukumbaja bualu buimpe. Nansha bena biuma, nansha bapele, nansha baneme, nansha bakalenga, bonsu mbapange mua kuenza bualu bua nsongu." 
Isaiah19:16 Dituku dikuabu, bena Ejipitu nebazakale bu tukajikaji. Nebikale ne bowa, padibu bamona Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, olola tshianza bua kubanyoka." 
Isaiah19:17 Nebavuluke ne luzakalu buloba bua bena Yuda. Misangu yonsu idibu batela bena Yuda, bena Ejipitu nebakuatshike bowa, padibu bela meji ku malu adi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu mua kubanyokela." 
Isaiah19:18 Dituku dikuabu, mu Ejipitu mu bimenga bitanu, bantu nebakule muakulu wa bena Ebrewu. Nebatshipe mitshipu, batela dina dia Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu. Tshikuabu tshia ku bimenga ebi, nebatshibikile ne nTshimenga tshia Diba." 
Isaiah19:19 Dituku adi, munkatshi mua ditunga dia Ejipitu, nemuikale tshilambuilu tshijidila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Ku mikalu ya ditunga nebimanyike dibue bua kunemeka Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah19:20 Ebi nebileje mudi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu usomba mu ditunga dia Ejipitu. Padibu bakengesha bena Ejipitu, bobu bela mbila kudi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu neabatumine mubapandishi, udi mua kubalumbuluila, ne kubasungidila." 
Isaiah19:21 Nenku Maweja-Nangila neadimanyishe kudi bena Ejipitu. Bobu kabidi nebamumanye, bamutendelele ne milambu ya kuosha, ne milambu ya bia pa madimi. Nebaditshipe kudiye, nebashale balama mitshipu yabu." 
Isaiah19:22 Maweja-Nangila neanyoke bena Ejipitu, bua bamone mua kudilengeja. Nebapingane kudiye. Yeye neanyishe malomba abu, neabambuluishe." 
Isaiah19:23 Dituku adi, njila neumuke ku ditunga dia Ejipitu, uya ku ditunga dia bena Ashure. Bena Ashure nebaye mu Ejipitu; bena Ejipitu nebaye mu Ashure. Bonsu pamue nebatendelele Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah19:24 Dituku adi, matunga asatu, dia bena Ejipitu, dia bena Ashure, ne dia bena Izrayele, neikale mulongu umue. Nealeje bantu ba pa buloba bujima mudi Maweja-Nangila wela bantu lupemba." 
Isaiah19:25 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu neele bantu lupemba ne miaku ya ne: “Ndi ngeela lupemba, bena Ejipitu, bantu banyi, bena Ashure bandi musonge ne bianza bianyi, ne bena Izrayele bandi musungule.”" 
Isaiah20:1 Sargone, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, uvua mutume mulombodi wa kumpala wa bena mvita bende bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Asdode tshia bena Peleshete, kutshikuata." 
Isaiah20:2 Bidimu bisatu kumpala kua dikuata dia tshimenga atshi, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, ne: “Vula bilamba bia madilu biudi nabi pambidi, ne bisabata biudi nabi ku makasa ebe.” Yeshaya kuenza nanku. Ukavua wendakana, kayi tshilamba nansha bisabata. Nanku, mu tshikondu tshivuabu bakuate tshimenga tshia Asdode, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Yeshaya bivuaye ne bua kumanyisha bantu ne:" 
Isaiah20:2 Bidimu bisatu kumpala kua dikuata dia tshimenga atshi, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, ne: “Vula bilamba bia madilu biudi nabi pambidi, ne bisabata biudi nabi ku makasa ebe.” Yeshaya kuenza nanku. Ukavua wendakana, kayi tshilamba nansha bisabata. Nanku, mu tshikondu tshivuabu bakuate tshimenga tshia Asdode, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Yeshaya bivuaye ne bua kumanyisha bantu ne:" 
Isaiah20:3 “Kudi mpindiewu bidimu bisatu bidi muntu wanyi Yeshaya wendakana butaka, kayi bilamba nansha bisabata. Ke mudiye uleja malu adi ne bua kuenzekela bena Ejipitu ne bena Kushe." 
Isaiah20:4 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure neaye kuende ne bantu, bana ne bakulumpe, badiye mukuate mu Ejipitu, ne mu ditunga dia bena Kushe. Bonsu aba nebaye kabayi ne bilamba pambidi, nansha bisabata ku makasa. Bena Ejipitu nebafue bundu, padibu batangila bantu kunyima kutupu." 
Isaiah20:5 Bonsu bavua batekemena kudi bena Kushe, batemba bena Ejipitu, nebatekete mu maboku, bafue bundu.”" 
Isaiah20:6 Dituku adi, badi basomba ku muelelu wa mayi manene, muaba utudi base, nebambe ne: “Monayi tshidi tshienzekela batuvua batekemene! Tuvua basue kunyemena kudibu, bua batupandishe ku tshinyangu tshia kudi mukalenga wa bena Ashure… Watupandisha kabidi mpindiewu nnganyi?”" 
Isaiah21:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila Babilone, “Tshipela tshidi ku musulu.” Muena lukuna udi utumina ku tshipela, ku ditunga didi dikuatshisha bantu bowa, amu mudi mvunde ukosolola tshipela tshia Negebe." 
Isaiah21:2 — Maweja-Nangila kundeja mu tshilota, bualu bua dikema, buenza bowa. Uvua wamba ne: “Bakengeshanganyi badi amu bakengeshangana, babutudianganyi badi amu babutulangana. Bena Elame, bangayi mvita! Bena Madayi, luishayi tshimenga! Tshiena musue bua bena Babilone batuishe kabidi bantu mikemu. ”" 
Isaiah21:3 Ke padi mubidi wanyi mujima musunsuke ne makenga. Dikenga ndinkuate, bu mudidi dikuata mukaji pa lulelu. Bindi ngunwua bidi bimpampakaja. Bindi mmona bidi binkuate bowa." 
Isaiah21:4 Tshiena kabidi ne dikanda. Bowa budi bungenza. Mvua muindile kapepa katalale ka ku dilolu, kadi dilolu kumfikila amu ne bowa." 
Isaiah21:5 Badi balongolola mesa bua kudia, badija biata, badia, banua… Diakamue badi bela lubila lukole ne: “Balombodi ba bena mvita, jukayi, kuatayi bia mvita, tuyayi! ”" 
Isaiah21:6 Telejayi tshivua Maweja-Nangila mungambile: “Uye, uteke mutentekedi. Yeye neambe tshionsu tshiamonaye!" 
Isaiah21:7 Padiye umona nyama ya tubalu ikoka ditempu dia mvita, umona musumba wa mpunde, nansha wa tumelu, adimuke, atangile bimpe!”" 
Isaiah21:8 Pashishe, mutentekedi neele lubila ne: “Mfumu, ndi mushale dituku dijima, pa muaba wanyi wa butentekedi. Ndi mushale butuku bujima, amu ntentekela." 
Isaiah21:9 Wamanya! Ke muntu awu ufika, mubande mu ditempu dikoka kudi tubalu. Udi wela lubila ne: ‘Mbakuate tshimenga tshia Babilone. Mbatshikuate! Mpingu ya mvidie yende mbayitonkole panshi, mmitshibuke bitupa bitupa! ’ ”" 
Isaiah21:10 Wewe tshisamba tshianyi, tshivuabu bakengeshe, bu mudibu bashipule ntete ya mu budimi, teleja bualu ebu bundi mukuambile, buvuabu bammanyishe kudi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu." 
Isaiah21:11 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila “Duma”. Muntu udi mu ditunga dia Seyire udi ungela diyi ne: “Mutentekedi, tukadi diba kaayi? Bufuku bukadi pa kutshia anyi?”" 
Isaiah21:12 Kadi mutentekedi kuandamuna ne: “Bufuku bukadi pa kutshia, kadi tutshidi amu bufuku. Panudi basue kupeta diandamuna, pinganayi musangu mukuabu.”" 
Isaiah21:13 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila ditunga dia bena Arabe. Nuenu misumba ya bantu ba mu Dedane, bufuku nuye kulala mu tshisuku." 
Isaiah21:14 Nuenu badi basomba mu Tema, angatayi mayi, nutuadile bantu ba mu Dedane badi bafue nyota. Nuye ne biakudia, kudi bantu bavua banyeme." 
Isaiah21:15 Bualu bavua banyeme muele wa mvita, banyeme muele ukavua ubashipa, banyeme buta bukavuabu bamane kunana, banyeme mvita ikavua mikole." 
Isaiah21:16 Nenku Maweja-Nangila uvua mungambile ne: “Papita tshidimu tshimue, amu tufika dituku ditudi lelu, lumu lua Kedare nelujike." 
Isaiah21:17 Mu Kedare beedi ba mikete, mbilobu menemene. Kadi, nebashale amu bakese.” Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ke udi ujadika nanku." 
Isaiah22:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila bena “Tshibandabanda, muaba udi Maweja-Nangila uleja malu. ” Yerushalayime, tshidi tshienzeka muebe nanku ntshinyi? Tshidi bantu bebe bonsu babandila ku misaka ya nzubu ntshinyi?" 
Isaiah22:2 Mitoyi bungi nanku mu tshimenga, mbila mikole nya tshinyi? Bantu mbasanke anyi? Bafue ba muebe ki mbafuile mu mvita anyi? Kabavua babashipe anyi?" 
Isaiah22:3 Balombodi ba tshituilu tshiebe bavua banyema bonsu, baluishi babu kabayi banji kubela mikete. Bantu bonsu bavua muluishi mupete, uvua ubela mu lukanu, nansha bavua banyeme kule mene." 
Isaiah22:4 Ke pandi nkuambila ne: “Kutangidi bualu buanyi to. Undekele, ndile bikole. Lekelayi kuditatshisha bua kunsamba, bua bana betu bonsu bavuabu bashipe." 
Isaiah22:5 Bualu lelu, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu, mmututshiompakaje.” Mbalutshimune, tuetu kutangalaka mu tshibandabanda, muaba udi Mvidi Mukulu uleja malu, kudila muadi mukole." 
Isaiah22:6 Bena mvita ba bena Elame bisumbu ne bisumbu, badi bambula mata ne mikete; bakuabu badi babanda mu matempu, babanda pa nyama ya tubalu. Bena mvita ba bena Kire badi balongolola ngabu yabu." 
Isaiah22:7 Wewe Yerushalayime, bena matempu ne bena tubalu, mbabuele mu bibandabanda biebe bilengela. Mbele mualu wa mvita ku tshibuelelu tshiebe." 
Isaiah22:8 Yuda kena ne udi mua kumusungidila. Dituku adi, nuvua bavuluke bia mvita bivuabu bateke mu nzubu muabu binyika ne: “Nzubu wa Muitu.”" 
Isaiah22:9 Nuvua bamone miaba yonsu ivua miupuke, mu tshimana tshivua tshinyungulukila Tshimenga tshia Davide. Nuvua basangishe mayi mu tshiina tshia mayi tshia kuinshi." 
Isaiah22:10 Nuvua babadike nzubu ya Yerushalayime. Nuenu kupulamu mikuabu, kuangata mabue bua kukolesha nawu tshimana tshia tshimenga." 
Isaiah22:11 Nuvua bumbule tshiina tshia mayi, munkatshi mua bimana bibidi, bua kukoka mayi avua mu tshiina tshia mayi tshikulukulu. Kadi kanuena bavuluke ne: Mvidi Mukulu ke udi muenze malu onsu. Uvua mualongolole ku kale. Kadi nuenu kanuvua bamone bualu ebu." 
Isaiah22:12 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu, uvua munubele bua nudile muadi, bua nunyingalale, nubeye nsuki, nuvuale bilamba bia mu madilu." 
Isaiah22:13 Kadi nuenu kusanka amu kusanka, kushipa ngombe, kukosa mikoku mitu, kudia minyinyi, kunua maluvu… Nuenu kuamba ne: “Tudiayi, tunuayi, bualu malaba netufue.”" 
Isaiah22:14 Kadi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, uvua mungambile ne: “Ndi nditshipa, tshiena ndekela tshilema etshi, amu nuenu bamane kufua.” Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu udi ujadika nanku." 
Isaiah22:15 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu, uvua mungambile ne: “Uye kudi Shebna, mulami wa bintu bia mu nzubu wa bukalenga, umuambile ne:" 
Isaiah22:16 Bumfumu buudi nabu muaba ewu mbumfumu kaayi? Bulela buudi nabu apa mbulela kaayi? Udi udiumbuila lukita, udiumbuila majambu pa mukuna, udiumbuila webe muaba wa ndekelu munda mua lubuebue bishi?" 
Isaiah22:17 Wewe udi udimona bu muntu udi ne bukole, kadi Maweja-Nangila neakuele panshi, ku tshisusu amu tshimue. Neakusuike bikole bu kabuki." 
Isaiah22:18 Neakuele kule, mu ditunga dialabale, amu bu mudibu bela ndundu wa dinaya nende. Muaba awu ke uwafuila, neufuilemu, pabuipi ne matempu ebe audi uditemba nawu, bualu udi munyange lumu lua lubanza lua mfumuebe!" 
Isaiah22:19 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nenkuipate pa mukuna webe, nenkumushe pa muaba uuvua musombe." 
Isaiah22:20 Dituku adi, nembikile muntu wanyi Eliyakime, muana wa Ilkiya." 
Isaiah22:21 Nemmuvuadike tshilamba tshiebe, nemmusuike mukaba webe wa mu nshingu, nemmupeshe bumfumu buuvua wewe nabu. Neikale bu tatu wa bantu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime, ne ba mu bukalenga bua Yuda." 
Isaiah22:22 Nenteke pa dikaya diende, nsapi wa bukalenga bua Davide. Padiye unzulula tshiibi, kakuena muntu udi utshinjila. Padiye utshinjila, kakuena muntu udi utshiunzulula." 
Isaiah22:23 Nemmushindike muaba mukole, bu mudibu basa mulonda. Bana babu bonsu nebapete lumu kudiye.”" 
Isaiah22:24 Kadi ndelanganyi ya mu diku diende yonsu, bakulu ne bana, nebatekemene amu kudiye, amu bu mudibu bakudika bintu bia mu tshikuku, ngesu ne makopu, ku mulonda umue. Bionsu ebi mbujitu kaayi!" 
Isaiah22:25 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Dimue dituku, mulonda, nansha bobu bawase muaba mukole, neutuke, neupone panshi. Bionsu bivua bikudikaku nebitshi-bukangane.” Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi ujadika nanku." 
Isaiah23:1 Badi bamanyisha malu adi atangila tshimenga tshia “Tire”. “Nuenu badi benda ne matu mu mayi manene, asayi muadi, bualu bavua babutula tshisabu tshienu, ne nzubu inuvua mua kunyemena, kuikishila. ” Amu matu afika, afuma ku tshidiila tshia Kitime, ke bobu kushisha kumanya bualu ebu." 
Isaiah23:2 “Nupuwe ne bowa bu tumama, nuenu badi basa ku muelelu wa mayi manene, nuenu bangenda mushinga ba mu Sidone, badi batuma bantu badi bapitshila" 
Isaiah23:3 mu mayi manene. ” Bena Sidone badi basumba, basumbisha, bionsu bidibu bamiamina, banowa ku muelelu wa Nile. Amu bobu bena Sidone, ke badi bangata bintu, bidibu bapana mu bisamba bionsu." 
Isaiah23:4 Nuenu bena Sidone, nudi mua kumvua bundu, ne nuenu kabidi bena tshimenga tshia Tire tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Mayi manene, adi kaayi amona matu, adi amba ne: “Ndi bu mamu uvua kayi mumvue makenga, kayi mulele bana, kayi mukele bana ba balume, kayi mukoleshe bana ba bakaji. ”" 
Isaiah23:5 Bena Ejipitu nebikale kabidi mu dikenga, padibu bapeta lumu lua bionsu bivua bienzekela tshimenga tshia Tire." 
Isaiah23:6 “Nuenu badi basa ku muelelu wa mayi manene, sabukayi mayi manene too ne ku tshimenga tshia Tarshishe. Asayi miadi." 
Isaiah23:7 Etshi ntshimenga tshienu, tshivua bantu basankidile kale anyi? Tshimenga tshienu bavua batshiase kukadi bidimu bipite bungi. Bena tshimenga tshienu, ke bavua baye kusomba, mu matunga a kule. ”" 
Isaiah23:8 Tire ke uvua wabanya makalenga. Bangenda mushinga bende ke bavua balombodi ba matunga. Bapanyishi bende ba bintu, ke bavua bantu banemeka. Kadi udi mujadike bua kubutula Tire nnganyi?" 
Isaiah23:9 Amu Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu ke udi mujadike bualu ebu, bua kujikija ditambisha, dia bantu badi badipa lumu, bua kupepeja bantu aba, badibu banemeka pa buloba." 
Isaiah23:10 “Nuenu Tire, dimayi mpindiewu madimi enu, bualu kakuena kabidi tshisabu, muaba udibu benza matu a pa mayi manene. ”" 
Isaiah23:11 Maweja-Nangila uvua mukanyine mayi manene, uvua muzakaje makalenga. Maweja-Nangila uvua mutume diyi, bua babutule bimenga bia bena Kenaane, bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Isaiah23:12 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambe ne: “Nuenu bena Sidone, kanuena mua kusanka kabidi to. Tshimenga tshienu tshidi bu nsongakaji, udibu babuelela mu nzubu ku bukole. Nansha nuenu baye, basabuke mayi manene, bafike ku tshidiila tshia Kitime, kanuakupeta dikisha nansha kakese." 
Isaiah23:13 Tangila buloba bua bena Babilone, bantu aba kabenaku kabidi to. Bena Ashure mbamane kuenzamu tuleya bua kuluisha bena Babilone. Bavua babumbulamu nzubu ya bakalenga, tshimenga tshishale dikolu." 
Isaiah23:14 Nuenu badi benda ne matu mu mayi manene, asayi muadi, bualu bavua babutule tshisabu tshienu, ne nzubu inuvua mua kunyemena, kuikishila.”" 
Isaiah23:15 Nenku, nebapue Tire muoyi bidimu makumi muanda mutekete. Ke bidimu bidibu babala bua bumfumu bua mukalenga umue. Padi bidimu ebi makumi muanda mutekete bijika, nebenzele Tire, bu mudibu bimba mukaji muena tshiendenda mu musambu ne:" 
Isaiah23:16 Wewe mukaji muena tshiendenda, udibu kabayi bavuluka kabidi, angata lunzenze luebe, wendakane mu tshimenga. Imba lunzenze luebe bimpe, imba amu kuimba misambu. Bumue bantu nebakuvuluke." 
Isaiah23:17 Padi bidimu makumi muanda mutekete bipite, Maweja-Nangila neambuluishe tshimenga tshia Tire. Netshituadije kabidi kupeta makuta ku buendenda ne makalenga mashilangane onsu a pa buloba." 
Isaiah23:18 Kadi bintu bidibu bapeta mu mushinga, nebabijidile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kabena babumba bintu ebi to. Kabena nansha babilama. Kadi bidi amu bua kudisha, kukutshisha ne kuvuadika bimpe bantu badi batendelela Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah24:1 Maweja-Nangila neanyange buloba, neabushiye tshipela. Udi uvundulula buloba, utangalaja badi basombapu." 
Isaiah24:2 Bualu bua mumue budi bukuata batuangaji ne bantu bakuabu, bukuata bamfumu ne bapika babu, bukuata bamamu ba nzubu ne bena mudimu babu, bukuata basumbishi ba bintu ne badi basumba, bukuata basombeshanganyi ba bintu ne badi basomba bintu, bukuata bangatshi ba kasombela ne bafidi ba kasombela." 
Isaiah24:3 Mu buloba nemushale mutupu bulelela. Nebabutule buloba bujima. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: 
Isaiah24:4 “Buloba budi mu madilu, budi bubutuka. Bukua bintu budi buenda bujimina, bubutuka. Diulu kabidi didi dienda dinyanguka, tshiapamue ne buloba. ”" 
Isaiah24:5 Bantu bavua banyanga buloba, bualu bavua babenga mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila, batupa ku diyi diende, bupula ndondu uvua ubasuikakaja ne Mvidi Mukulu wa kashidi." 
Isaiah24:6 Ke padi buloba bujima bupeta diakabi, bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmubuele mulawu. Bantu badi babuela mu dikenga, bualu bavua bapia tshibawu. Badi bajimina bonsu, bashale amu bungi bukese." 
Isaiah24:7 Mionji ya mvinyo idi ifubidila. Kamuena kabidi mvinyo mupiamupia. Bavua basanka kale, badi batua mikemu." 
Isaiah24:8 Muadi wa ngoma, udi upuwa. Mutoyi wa bantu badi basanka mu tshibilu, mmujike. Kabena bimba kabidi nzenze." 
Isaiah24:9 Kabena bimba kabidi misambu, padibu banua maluvu basanka to. Maluvu makole akadi umvuika ne bululu kudi badi baanua." 
Isaiah24:10 Tshimenga tshidi tshinyanguke, katshiyi ne bantu ba bungi. Bantu badi bashala, badi badipayila mu nzubu." 
Isaiah24:11 Bantu badi badidila mu misesu, bualu kabatshiena ne mvinyo. Disanka dionsu ndijike, tuseku ntujimine mu ditunga." 
Isaiah24:12 Mu tshimenga mudi mushale amu nzubu minyanguke. Tshiibi tshia tshimenga ntshitshibulukangane tshionsu. 
Isaiah24:13 Eyowa, pa buloba bujima, miaba yonsu idi bantu basomba, kakuena tshia nsongu tshidi tshishalepu to. Bidi bu mudi mitshi ya olive, bantu bamane kupola tumuma tuonsu, nansha bu mionji ya mvinyo, bantu bakebamu tumuma tua ndekelu tuvua tushale." 
Isaiah24:14 Bantu bikale bashale ne muoyi nebimbe musambu, batumbisha bunene bua Maweja-Nangila. Badi bela mbila ya disanka, bafuma ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, bamba ne:" 
Isaiah24:15 “Nuenu bena ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, tumbishayi Maweja-Nangila. Nuenu badi basomba ku mielelu ya mayi manene, kobolayi dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele.”" 
Isaiah24:16 Tudi tunwua musambu ewu, udibu bimba ne ku ndekelu kua buloba, bamba ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, atumbe!” Kadi meme kuamba ne: “Tshingenza ntshinyi? Mioyi mminshikile munda. Dikenga ndimane kunkuata.” Benzedianganyi ba bibi badi amu benzelangana bibi, badi baditua amu mu dielangana bifufu." 
Isaiah24:17 Nuenu bantu badi basomba pa buloba, bowa bukole, dijimba, ne buteyi, bidi binuindila." 
Isaiah24:18 Muntu yonsu wanyema, bua mbila idi mukuatshisha bowa, neapone mu dijimba. Kadi pikalaye mupatuke mu dijimba, buteyi nebumukuate. Mvula wa bungi nealoke mulu. Buloba nebuzakale ne kuinshi kuabu." 
Isaiah24:19 Buloba budi butayika, bupandika, butenkakana bikole." 
Isaiah24:20 Buloba nebulenduke bu muntu mukuatshike maluvu, nebutenkakane eku ne eku bu kazubu ka bisosa. Nebudishinde panshi, bualu mibi yabu mipite bujitu. Kabuena bujuuka kabidi to." 
Isaiah24:21 Dituku adi Maweja-Nangila neanyoke makole a mulu, ne bakalenga badi pa buloba." 
Isaiah24:22 Nebabasangishe bonsu pamue bu bena lukanu, babela mu dijimba. Nebabakangile mu nzubu wa lukanu. Papita matuku mavule, bonsu aba nebapitshile ku tshilumbu." 
Isaiah24:23 Pashishe ngondu neakunzubile, diba nedibuitshidile ne bundu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, neadie bumfumu mu Yerushalayime pa mukuna wa Siyone. Bakulu ba ditunga, nebamone butumbi buende." 
Isaiah25:1 Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wanyi. Ndi musue kutumbisha bunene buebe, kumanyisha bantu lumu luebe. Bualu wewe uvua muenze bia dikema. Biuvua mujadike kale, udi mubikumbaje bionsu bungi buabi." 
Isaiah25:2 Wewe uvua mudishimbuile tshimenga, tshishale dikolu, uvua mubutule tshimenga, tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, tshishale munda mutupu kamuyi bantu. Muaba uvua bena ditambisha bakoleshe ne bimana, kautshiena kabidi tshimenga to. Kabena mua kuwibakulula kabidi nansha." 
Isaiah25:3 Nanku bantu ba bukitu, nebakutumbishe. Bantu ba mu bimenga bivua bikengesha bantu ne tshikisu, nebakunemeke." 
Isaiah25:4 Bualu bapele ne bena dikenga bavua banyemena kuudi, wewe kubalama bimpe. Wewe uvua bu muaba wa kupengamena, diba didi mvula mukole uloka. Uvua bu muaba wa dileji, padi diba diosha buloba. — Bualu tshikisu tshia bena tshinyangu, tshidi bu mudi mvula wa tshipupu," 
Isaiah25:5 nansha bu munya mukole wosha buloba bume bikole. — Wewe udi upuwisha bena diditambisha, utalaja mutoyi wabu. Bu mudi divuba dibuikila diba didi dikenka bikole, wewe udi upuwishangana ne bakengeshanganyi, diba divuabu batshimuna, bela tunkunduluila." 
Isaiah25:6 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, nealongoluele bantu bonsu didia dinene, pa mukuna wa Siyone. Bantu nebadie minyinyi ya mafuta, banue maluvu masheme, — minyinyi mimpe mitekete, maluvu a mvinyo mimpe menemene, mamane kulala bidimu. —" 
Isaiah25:7 Pa mukuna ewu, Maweja-Nangila neakandike tshilamba tshia madilu, tshivua bantu bavuale. Neumushe tshilamba tshivua tshileja dibungama, tshivua bukua matunga budibuikile natshi." 
Isaiah25:8 Maweja-Nangila neajimije lufu kashidi. Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu abakupule binsonji bionsu ku mesu abu. Mu ditunga dijima, neumushe kapeja kavuabu bapepeja naku bantu bende. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila mulaye nanku. Bena Mowabe badi mu dikenga" 
Isaiah25:9 Dituku adi, bantu nebambe ne: “Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Tuvua batekemene amu kudiye, Yeye kutusungidila. Eyowa, tuvua batekemene amu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Tudi tusanka, tudi ne musangelu, bua padiye Mutusungidi wetu." 
Isaiah25:10 Tshianza tshia Maweja-Nangila, tshidi tshilama bimpe mukuna wa Siyone!” Kadi nebadiatakaje bena Mowabe. bu bisosa bidibu badiata ku makasa, mu tshiina tshia bufuke." 
Isaiah25:11 Mu tshiina amu, bena Mowabe badi bolola maboku, amu bu badi bakeba kuowela pa mayi. Kadi nansha bobu benza nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi utekesha bena Mowabe, ne lutambishi luabu." 
Isaiah25:12 Maweja-Nangila neabumbule bimana, ne nzubu mile ivua bena Mowabe bakoleshe, neabiele panshi mu lupuishi, abilandakaje." 
Isaiah26:1 Dituku adi, mu ditunga dia Yuda, bantu nebimbe musambu, bamba ne: “Tudi ne tshimenga tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Bua kutshilama bimpe, Maweja-Nangila mmutshinyungulule ne bimana, kabidi ne mushiki wa buloba." 
Isaiah26:2 Unzululayi biibi. Bantu badi ne diyi dimue, badi bakumbaja tshidibu balaye, babuele." 
Isaiah26:3 Bualu ke bantu badi bajadika malu ne muoyi umue. Wewe Maweja-Nangila udi ubalama ne bupole, bualu badi batekemena kuudi." 
Isaiah26:4 Tekayi muoyi wenu matuku onsu kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu yeye udi Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Yeye neatukube kashidi." 
Isaiah26:5 Bualu yeye uvua mutulule panshi bantu bavua basombe miaba mitumbuke. Uvua mushimbule, tshimenga tshivuabu kabayi mua kukuata. Uvua mubumbule bimana biatshi, mubilandakaje, mubiele panshi." 
Isaiah26:6 Mpindiewu bantu bapele ne badibu bapetula, badi mua kudiata muaba awu.”" 
Isaiah26:7 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi uleja bantu badi bakuitaba, njila mululame wa kulondabu. Njila uudi wewe uleja bantu, udi ubafikisha buludi muaba mene udibu bakeba." 
Isaiah26:8 Maweja-Nangila, bua tumone mua kukumbaja biudi wewe musue, tudi tutekemena amu kuudi. Kutela dina diebe, kukuela mbila, ke tshidi mutshima wa muntu yonsu ujinga." 
Isaiah26:9 Meme kabidi bufuku, ndi nkujinga. Ndi nkukeba ne muoyi wanyi mujima. Pawikala ulumbuluisha, unyoka bantu badi basomba pa buloba, nebamanye mua kusomba bimpe." 
Isaiah26:10 Kadi padibu bafuile benji ba bibi luse, kabena balonga bidibu ne bua kuenza to. Nansha mu ditunga edi mudi bantu bakutshina, badi benza amu bibi, kabayi bavuluke muudi wewe Maweja-Nangila ne bukole." 
Isaiah26:11 Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi olola tshianza bua kubanyoka, kadi kabena bamona biudi musue kuenza to. Udi ubaluisha bundu, ubanyoka, bua bamone muudi unanga bantu bebe bikole! Kapia kaudi mufundile bena lukuna bebe, kababutule bonsu bungi buabu!" 
Isaiah26:12 Maweja-Nangila, neumpeshe tshionsu tshitudi tukengela. Bualu wewe ke udi mutuenzele bionsu bituvua bakumbaje." 
Isaiah26:13 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tuvua ne bamfumu bakuabu. Kadi wewe nkayebe, ke utudi tuvuluka." 
Isaiah26:14 Bamfumu betu ba kale bakadi bamane kufua, kabena bapeta muoyi kabidi to. Badi amu bu mundidimbi, kabena bajuuka kabidi to. Bushuwa, wewe ke uvua ubanyoka, ubabutula. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kubavuluka kabidi to." 
Isaiah26:15 Maweja-Nangila, Wewe uvua mutantshishe tshisamba tshietu. Wewe kusemeja mikalu yonsu ya ditunga dietu kule. Ke muuvua mupete lumu lunene." 
Isaiah26:16 Maweja-Nangila, patuvua mu dikenga, tuvua bakujinge. Pauvua mutunyoke, tuvua bakusengelela." 
Isaiah26:17 Maweja-Nangila, tuetu kukukeba, tudila, bu mukaji udi udinyenga, udila muadi, diba dikadiye pa kulela." 
Isaiah26:18 Tuetu kabidi tuvua ne bua kulela, tuvua mu dikenga dia pa lulelu. Kadi tuetu kulela amu lupepele. Katuena basungidile bantu ba mu ditunga dietu. Buloba buvua bushale munda mutupu." 
Isaiah26:19 Tshisamba tshianyi, bafue bebe nebabike ku lufu, — nenku bitalu bia bantu banyi nebipete muoyi. — Badi balale mu buloba, nebajuuke, beela tunkunduluila. Bualu Maweja-Nangila, neakutumine lumuma ludi lupetesha muoyi. Nanku buloba nebupatule ne muoyi bafue bavua amu bu mundidimbi." 
Isaiah26:20 Bena tshisamba tshianyi, buelayi munda mua nzubu yenu, nukange biibi. Nupaye mabaya ku bitupa bionsu bibidi bia tshiibi. Anjayi kusokoma katupa kipi, too ne pajika tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah26:21 Maweja-Nangila udi upatuka mu nzubu muende, bua kunyoka badi pa buloba, bualu bua malu mabi avuabu benze. Bavua bapumune, basokoke mu buloba, mashi a bantu bavua kabayi ne bualu. Kadi buloba kabuena buabuikila kabidi to. Nebuleje patoke bantu bavuabu bashipe." 
Isaiah27:1 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila neangate muele wende, muele munene, mutue, kabidi wa bujitu, bua kunyoka ne kushipa Leviyatane, tshidika tshidi tshienza bowa, nyoka wa mantonya, kayi kukuata ne tshianza." 
Isaiah27:2 Dituku adi, nuimbe musambu, nusamune budimi buanyi bua mvinyo, budi bupatula mvinyo musheme." 
Isaiah27:3 “Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mulami wa budimi. Ndi ngelamu mayi pa diba, ndi mbulama munya ne bufuku, bua muntu nansha nyama kabunyangi." 
Isaiah27:4 Tshiena nabu kabidi tshiji to. Kadi pandi nsanganamu meba ne mingonga, nembiluishe kashidi. Nembikose, mbioshe mu kapia." 
Isaiah27:5 Ke mundi nnyoka baluishi bonsu ba budimi buanyi, padibu kabayi bankeba, kabayi batua nanyi ndondu. Eyowa, bumvuangane nanyi.”" 
Isaiah27:6 Matuku adi kumpala, bena Izrayele, bena tshisamba tshia Yakobe, nebeele miji mipiamipia. Nebeele bilongu, nebasampile, nebuwuje buloba bujima ne bimuma biabu." 
Isaiah27:7 Kadi Maweja-Nangila mmunyoke bantu bende bikole, amu muvuaye munyoke bavua babakengesha anyi? Mmushipeshe bantu bende bungi buvuaye mushipeshe bavua bashipe bende anyi?" 
Isaiah27:8 Bushuwa, mmubafundile tshibawu, tshia kuya mu tshimuangi, mu ditunga dia bende. Uvua mubumushe mu buloba buabu dituku dimue, ne lupepele lukole, luvua lufuma luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Isaiah27:9 Kadi mpindiewu, monayi, bubi bua bena Izrayele nebujimine; nebalekele bilema biabu. Nebatshibule mabue onsu a ku tshilambuilu, baazaza bu mabue a lupemba. Kabena basa kabidi makunji a kutendelela mvidie, nansha bioshelu bia manananshi." 
Isaiah27:10 Mu tshimenga tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, mudi mutupu. Tshimenga tshidi amu bu mu tshipela, kamuyi bantu. Ngombe idi idiamu, ilalamu, ibulukuta mabeji a mitshi."
