Isaiah27:11 Matamba a mitshi adi uma, atshibuka. Bakaji nebaangule bua kutemesha nawu kapia. Bulelela, bantu aba kabena bumvua bualu nansha bumue. Ke padi mubafuki wabu, kayi kabidi ubafuila luse. Uvua mubafumba kena musue kubalama ne muoyi to." 
Isaiah27:12 Kadi dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila, neanowe, ashipule miepu yende ya ntete, ya ku musulu wa Perate, too ne ya ku musulu wa mu Ejipitu. Nenku, nuenu bena Izrayele, nennusangishe muntu ne muntu." 
Isaiah27:13 Dituku adi, muadi munene wa mpungi neumvuike. Nenku bonsu bavua bajimine mu bena Ashure, nansha bavua batangalaka mu Ejipitu, nebafike. Nebatue binu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, pa mukuna wa tshijila, udi mu Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah28:1 Nuenu bena Efrayime, nuenu badi bakuathika maluvu, nudi bena diakabi. Nudi nuditambisha bua tshimenga tshienu tshia Samariya, tshidi bu tshikata tshia lumu, tshinuvua base kulu, tshitangilangane ne tshibandabanda tshidi ne madimi mimpe. Kadi tshiotshi tshidi amu bu tshifulu tshienza ne bilongu bimpe. Bilongu ebi bidi bifubidile pa mitu ya bakuatshiki ba maluvu." 
Isaiah28:2 Kadi Maweja-Nangila neatume muntu udi ne bukole, udi mufuane mvula mukole wa mabue, nansha tshipupu tshidi tshinyangakaja bionsu. Udi bu mvula wa mudimbi, wa mayi mapasalala miaba yonsu. Maweja-Nangila udi olola tshianza, utonkola tshimenga panshi musangu umue." 
Isaiah28:3 Tshikata tshia lumu tshivua bakuatshiki ba maluvu ba bena Efrayime baditambishila, nebatshidiatakaje ku makasa." 
Isaiah28:4 Bilongu bikadi bifubidila. Bivua ku tshifulu tshivua tshitangilangane ne tshibandabanda tshia madimi mimpe, nebabidiatakaje mu makasa. Tshimenga tshia Samariya netshikale bu tshimuma tshia mfiku, tshidi tshidianjila kuboba, tshikondu tshia kupola, katshiyi tshianji kukumbana. Muntu wa kumpala watshimona, udi utshipola diakamue, udia." 
Isaiah28:5 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu neikale tshikata tshia lumu, tshifulu tshilengeja ne bilongu bimpe, tshisankisha bantu badi bashala ne muoyi." 
Isaiah28:6 Neambuluishe bandumbulula, bua bakose nsambu amu pa yoyi. Neapeshe bantu bukitu bua kuipata muluishi udi ukeba kubuelela ku tshiibi tshia tshimenga." 
Isaiah28:7 Nansha batuangaji ne bambi, badi batenkakana, bakuatshika maluvu makole. Bavua banua maluvu makole mapite bungi, kabayi nansha mua kuimana kulu, lungenyi luabu lujimina. Bambi badi bamona malu, kabayi mua kuajingulula. Batuangaji badi bakosa bilumbu, batatakana, badishinda panshi." 
Isaiah28:8 Badi balukila pa mesa onsu. Bukoya buabu budi miaba yonsu. 
Isaiah28:9 Badi baseka, bakonka ne: “Yeshaya ewu, udiye musue kulongesha nnganyi? Udiye musue kumvuija bidibu bamuleja nnganyi? Tudi bana ba mu tshiadi badibu balekesha dibele amu mpindiewu anyi?" 
Isaiah28:10 Umvuayi mudiye ukukumina ne: B-A-BA, B-A-BA, B-E-BE, B-E-BE; ku dileta ku dileta, ku muaku ku muaku. ”" 
Isaiah28:11 Kadi panudi kanuyi basue kunteleja, Maweja-Nangila mpindiewu neanutumine benyi, bua banumanyishe malu, mu muakulu wabu, unudi kanuyi mua kumvua." 
Isaiah28:12 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumane kunuambila ne: “Nunteleje, bua nupete dikisha. Bantu bakadi bapungile, nuanyishe bua bikishe. Kundi meme ke kudi bupole.” Kadi kanuvua basue kunteleja nansha." 
Isaiah28:13 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila musue kunuambila amu ne: “B-A-BA, B-A-BA, B-E-BE, B-E-BE, ku dileta ku dileta, ku muaku ku muaku.” Nenku nenunyeme, nudishinda, nutshibuka nyima. Nenubuele mu nzubu wa lukanu, nupanga mua kupatukamu." 
Isaiah28:14 Nuenu basekianganyi, badi balombola bantu aba ba mu Yerushalayime, umvuayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne:" 
Isaiah28:15 “Nukadi nuamba ne: tudi batue ndondu ne lufu, tudi bumvuangane ne bajangi. Tshipupu katshiena mua kutukuata, paditshi tshipita. Bualu tudi bamone dishima bu muaba wa kunyemena, ne kudinga bantu, bu muaba wa kusokomena.”" 
Isaiah28:16 Kadi umvuayi mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wamba: “Ndi nteka dibue dia tshitaku mu Siyone, dibue dia kunuteta nadi, dibue dia mushinga dia mu ditumba, didibu kabayi mua kunyungisha. Pa dibue edi mpafunde ne: muntu yonsu udi utekemena kundi, kena unyunga to." 
Isaiah28:17 Monji wa kupima nawu, newikale buakane. Nshinga wa kululamija nende, ke kuenza malu mimpe.” Kadi mabue a mvula neumushe, dishima dienu dinudi batekemene. Mayi neabumbule, muaba unuvua banyemene." 
Isaiah28:18 Nebashipe ndondu yenu ne lufu. Diumvuangana dienu ne bajangi, kadiakuikalaku kabidi to. Pafika tshipupu, netshinuboze." 
Isaiah28:19 Dinda dionsu, tshipupu netshinukuate, nansha bufuku katshiakunushila muaba. Bantu pumvuabu batshitela, nebafue bowa bunene!" 
Isaiah28:20 Eyowa, bu muambile bakulu ne: bulaalu mbupite buipi, muntu kena mua kudiololapu. Mbulankete mmupite bukese, muntu kena mua kudijingilamu." 
Isaiah28:21 Maweja-Nangila neafike, neakuate mudimu, muvuaye muenze pa mukuna wa Perashime, muvuaye muenze mu mpata wa Ngibone. Kadi mudimu wende neukemeshe bantu." 
Isaiah28:22 Nenku mpindiewu, lekelayi bilele bienu bibi, bua kabayi kukolesha majita a mionji ya mu nshingu yenu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu muena bukole buonsu, mmungambile ne: ndi mujadike bua kubutula ditunga dijima." 
Isaiah28:23 Ntelejayi bimpe, teyayi matshi enu kundi, umvuayi bionsu bindi mua kuamba." 
Isaiah28:24 Kanuena banji kumanya ne: Tshidima udi musue kumiamina ntete, udi upitshishila diba diende dijima, amu ku dibundulula budimi, ku diela mabula, ne ku dilandakaja anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
Isaiah28:25 Kadi padiye ujikija dilandakaja buloba mu budimi, udi umiamina ntete mishilangane, ya ndungu, ya tumbumba ne ya mponda, ya kuenza bukula, ne mikuabu, ifika ne ku mielelu ya budimi." 
Isaiah28:26 Ke tshivua Maweja-Nangila wende mumuleje bua kuenza. Ke tshivuaye mumulongeshe. 
Isaiah28:27 Bua kushipula ntete udi wangata amu tshiamu, nansha mutshi udi mukumbanyine ntete ayi." 
Isaiah28:28 Ntete ya kuenza bukula, badi bayishipula ne tshiamu tshia bujitu. Kadi kabena batungunuka ne mudimu awu kashidi, kabena bazaza ntete." 
Isaiah28:29 Lungenyi lua kuenza nanku ludi lufuma kabidi kudi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu. Mvidi Mukulu udi uleja bantu nanku, mudi meji ende a kukema, mudiye mumanye malu onsu." 
Isaiah29:1 “Eyi, Ariyele, Ariyele we, tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, muaba uvua Davide muase mitanda yende, udi muena diakabi! Matuku onsu wewe kuenza amu bibilu, ku tshidimu ku tshidimu," 
Isaiah29:2 kadi nenkunyoke! Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. Neudile muadi, neubungame. Tshimenga tshijima netshikale amu bu tshilambuilu tshitampakane mashi miaba yonsu." 
Isaiah29:3 Nenunyungulule ne mitanda yanyi, nenkuele munkatshi. Nenkutshintshimike ne biamu bia mvita, kabidi ne mushiki wa buloba." 
Isaiah29:4 Neupone panshi mu buloba. Diyi diebe nediumvuike, bu didi difumina muinshi mua buloba, dipitshila mu lupuishi. Nedikale bu diyi ditekete dia mukishi, didi difuma mu kandondu ka buloba." 
Isaiah29:5 Kadi baluishi bebe ba bungi, nebikale anu bu dibungi dia lupuishi. Bena lukuna badi bakuluisha, nebikale bu bisosa bidi lupepele lupepula.” Eyowa, bualu ebu nebuenzeke lukasa, katuyi babutekemene." 
Isaiah29:6 Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu neakuambuluishe, ne makubakuba a mvula, ne bikumina, ne mvunde wa tshipupu, ne ndimi ya kapia idi ibutula bintu bionsu." 
Isaiah29:7 Bena matunga a bende, bavua bakuluisha wewe Ariyele, bavua bakubunda, bavua bakunyungulula ne mushiki wa buloba, bavua bakukengesha, nebajimine bonsu bu mudi tshilota, bu mudi bualu butudi tumona bufuku." 
Isaiah29:8 Bualu ebu nebuikale bu mudi muntu ne nzala, ulota, udia biakudia. Kadi upapuka ku tulu, kudiumvuaye amu ne nzala. Nebuikale bu muntu ne nyota, ulota unua mayi. Kadi upapuka ku tulu, mupungile, kudiumvuaye amu ne nyota yende ayi. Ke muikalabi nanku, ne bena matunga badi baluisha mukuna wa Siyone." 
Isaiah29:9 Nenukeme kanuyi mua kuamba bualu. Nenuikale bamfofu kanuyi mua kumona. Nenukuatshike, kanuyi banue maluvu. Nenutetuke, kanuyi banue tshintu." 
Isaiah29:10 Bualu Maweja-Nangila neanuladike tulu tukole. Uvua munusuike tshilamba pa mesu. — Mesu enu ke bambi benu. — Mmunubuikile tshilamba mu mitu yenu. — Mitu yenu ke badi bamona malu. — 
Isaiah29:11 Malu adi bambi banumanyisha aa, kaena umvuika to. Adi amu bu mukanda mufunda, mulamika ne budimbu bukole, bautua tshitampi. Badi baupa muntu kampanda, udi mumanye mua kubala, bamba ne: “Tubadileku mukanda ewu.” Kadi yeye kuandamuna ne: “Kamuena mushindu wa kubala, bualu mukanda mmulamika, kabidi mmutue tshitampi bikole.”" 
Isaiah29:12 Badi baupesha kabidi muntu udi kayi mumanye mua kubala ne: “Tubadileku mukanda ewu.” Kadi yeye neandamune ne: “Tshiena mumanye mua kubala mukanda to.” 
Isaiah29:13 Maweja-Nangila uvua wamba ne: “Tshisamba etshi tshidi tshinnemeka, amu ne meyi a mukana. Badi bantendelela amu ne mishiku. Kadi muoyi watshi udi kule. Ditendelela diabu didi amu meyi ne bibidilu bia bantu, bidibu balonda." 
Isaiah29:14 Kadi nengenze kabidi malu adi atshikemesha. Meji a bena meji batshi, neashikile. Lungenyi lua bena lungenyi batshi, nelujimine. ”" 
Isaiah29:15 Bantu badi benza malu mu musokoku, basokoka Maweja-Nangila meji adibu bela, benza malu abu mu miidima, mbena diakabi! Badi bela meji ne: “Watumona nnganyi? Wamanya tshitudi tuenza nnganyi?”" 
Isaiah29:16 Nudi bantu batshimbakane, panudi nuteka diima ne mudifumbi mulongu umue! Tshintu tshidibu benza kudi muntu, katshiena mua kuambila muntu ne: “Udi mungenze ki ngwewe to.” Luesu ludi mua kuambila mulufumbi ne: “Kuena mumanye mudimu wa ditumba anyi? ”" 
Isaiah29:17 Telejayi: Nkushale matuku amu makese, ditu dia Lebanone nediandamuke lupangu lua mitshi ya bimuma. Lupangu lua mitshi ya bimuma, neluandamuke ditu." 
Isaiah29:18 Dituku adi, badi ne mapapa, nebumvue bidibu babala mu mukanda. Bampofu badi bapatuka mu miidima, nebamone bimpe." 
Isaiah29:19 Maweja-Nangila neavudijile bantu bapuekele disanka. Bantu badiombola ba mu buloba, nebasanke, bualu bua Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Isaiah29:20 Bualu bena tshikisu nebajimine. Bena kapeja bonsu nebumuke. Bonsu badi bakeba mua kukengesha bakuabu nebafue. 
Isaiah29:21 Ke bonsu badi bafunda ku tshilumbu, bantu badi kabayi ne bualu. Ke badi bakeba mua kuteta bandumbulula, bua bapishe badi babinga." 
Isaiah29:22 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe ne wa ndelanganyi yende, Musungidi wa Abrahame, wamba ne: “Bituadije ku mpindiewu, bena Yakobe, kabena bafue kabidi bundu, kabakubungama kabidi to." 
Isaiah29:23 Padibu bamona, bobu ne bana babu, midimu indi muenze munkatshi muabu, nebajadike mundi. Nebamanye ne: Ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa Yakobe. Nebatshine kuenza bindi mbenga meme, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Isaiah29:24 Bantu bavua bapange lungenyi, nebatuadije kungumvua. Bavua bela amu mpata, nebanyishe bua babalongeshe.”" 
Isaiah30:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bana badi bantombokela, nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nuela meji a kudienzela malu, kanuyi numvuluka. Nudi nutua ndondu ne bantu, indi meme tshiyi musue. Ke munudi nutentakaja bubi pa bukuabu." 
Isaiah30:2 Nudi nuya ku Ejipitu, kadi kanuena nunkonka lungenyi. Nudi nukeba bua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu anuambuluishe. Nudi nukeba tshisokomenu, kadi amu mu ditunga dia Ejipitu!" 
Isaiah30:3 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kena mua kunuambuluisha to. Tshisokomenu tshinudi nukeba mu Ejipitu, netshinufuishe bundu," 
Isaiah30:4 nansha balombodi benu ba mu ditunga bamane kufika mu Sowane, nansha milopu yenu mimane kufika mu ditunga dia Anese." 
Isaiah30:5 Buonsu buabu nebabafuishe bundu, kudi bantu badi kabayi mua kuambuluisha muntu nansha umue. Kudi bena Ejipitu, nenupete amu bundu ne kadiwu. Kabakunuambuluisha nansha ku tshintu tshimue." 
Isaiah30:6 Nyama idi yambula bintu bia bungi, idi yenda ipitshila kuinshi kua ditunga. Mu buloba bua dikenga ne dibungama, mudi bintu bia bungi bidi bikuatshisha bowa, mudi nyama ya ntambue ikungula, mudi nyoka ya ntoka ne nyoka idi ibuka, nyama ya mpunde ne ya tumelu idi ipitshilamu, yambula bubanji ne bintu bia mushinga mukole. Balombodi ba mu ditunga badi baya nabi kudi bantu ba tshisamba, tshidi katshiyi mua kubambuluisha nansha kakese." 
Isaiah30:7 Balombodi badi baya nabi kudi bena Ejipitu, badi kabayi mua kuenza bualu nansha bumue. Ke pamvua muinyike Ejipitu dina ne: “Nyoka udi kayi unyungakana. ”" 
Isaiah30:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yeshaya ne: “Funda mpindiewu miaku eyi pa dibaya. Uyifunde mu mukanda, bena Yerushalayime batangile. Nanku miaku eyi neyishale kashidi, neijadike bubi bua bantu banyi tshiendelele.”" 
Isaiah30:9 Eyowa, tshisamba etshi ntshia bantu batomboke. Badi basue kuikala bana banyi, kadi badi bena dishima. Bualu badi babenga kumvua, tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila mbalongesha." 
Isaiah30:10 Badi bambila bambi ne: “Kanututatshishi ne malu adibu banuleja!” Kabena basue bua bambi babambile malu a bulelela. Badi bajinga bua babambile amu malu adi abasankisha. Badi basue bua babalaye amu diakalenga, nansha diodi dia dishima." 
Isaiah30:11 Badi bajinga bua bambi balekele kulonda njila wa buakane, bumuke mu njila muimpe. Badi bamba ne: “Katuena basue, bua nutele dina dia Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele.”" 
Isaiah30:12 Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, wamba ne: “Nudi nubenga tshindi meme ngamba. Kadi malu a budimu ne a dishima, ke anudi nuenza bua kupeta bantu badi mua kunuambuluisha." 
Isaiah30:13 Nanku bubi buenu abu nebuikale, bu mudi mutanta mu tshimana tshile. Mutanta udi wenda udiunda. Katupa kipi, tshimana tshidi tshiupuka," 
Isaiah30:14 tshibumbuka, bu mulondu uvuabu bafumbe, upandika tupese tupese, padibu baushipa! Kabena mua kupeta tshiyoyi tshidibu mua kuambula natshi dikala dia kapia mu mbabula, nansha tshidibu mua kuangata natshi mayi, nansha wowu makese matengebele panshi.”" 
Isaiah30:15 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Nenupande, amu panudi nupingana kundi, kabidi panudi nushala ne lutulu. Nenuikale ne bukole buenu, panudi nulama lutulu luenu, nutekemena kundi. Kadi nuenu kubenga amu kubenga." 
Isaiah30:16 Nudi nuandamuna ne: “Nansha kakese! Netubande pa nyama ya tubalu, tunyeme lubilu!” Bulelela, nenubande pa tubalu, nunyeme lubilu. Bualu badi banuipata! Nudi nuamba kabidi ne: “Tubalu tuetu tudi tunyema lukasa.” Eyowa, kadi badi banulondakaja, badi banyema kabidi lubilu lupita lua tubalu tuenu!" 
Isaiah30:17 Padi muluishi umue ukana bena mvita benu tshinunu, nebanyeme. Kadi padi batanu bakana, nenunyeme lubilu buonsu buenu. Tshiluilu tshienu tshionsu netshijimine. Netshishiye amu mutshi wa dibendele, muasa ku lusongu lua mukuna." 
Isaiah30:18 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi windila, utekemena matuku onsu, diba didiye mua kunufuila luse. Udi ukeba mudiye mua kunuambuluisha. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu, udi wenza bionsu amu bimpe. Bonsu badi batekemena kudi Mvidi Mukulu, mbena diakalenga." 
Isaiah30:19 Nuenu bena Siyone, badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, katshia kanuakudila kabidi to. Panuabikila Maweja-Nangila, neanuambuluishe ne muoyi wa kalolu. Yeye mumvue amu muadi wenu, neanuandamune." 
Isaiah30:20 Maweja-Nangila neanupeshe biakudia ne biakunua, bungi bupite bunuvua kanuyi nabu diba dia dikenga ne dia tshiyole. Kena musue kunusokoma kabidi to. Nenumone ne mesu enu abidi ewu udi unulongesha." 
Isaiah30:21 Panuakeba kuya, ku dia balume nansha ku dia bakaji, nenumvue miaku eyi ifumina kunyima kuenu, yamba ne: “Ke njila unudi ne bua kulonda ewu.”" 
Isaiah30:22 Nenutangile mpingu, inudi balamike tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha tshia mpawungi. Nenuyimanshe bu bintu bidi bipia mikiya. Nenuele lubila ne: “Umushayi bintu bibi ebi.”" 
Isaiah30:23 Maweja-Nangila neanulokeshile, mvula bua maminu, anudi bakuna mu buloba, atoloke bimpe. Nenku nenunowe pa madimi enu ntete mivule, kabidi mimpe. Dituku adi, bimuna bienu nebikale ne biakudia bivule mu mpata mialabale." 
Isaiah30:24 Ngombe ne mpunde, idi isekuna buloba, neipete biakudia bivule, bisosa bimpe bidi ne luepu, bidibu bapepula, balandakaja panshi, ne kakasu kadi ne minu bu ya nsomu." 
Isaiah30:25 Dituku didibu bakuata tuleya tua baluishi benu, bashipa bena lukuna benu, misulu ya mayi neipueke pa mikuna yonsu minene ne mikese." 
Isaiah30:26 Dituku dikale Maweja-Nangila muele buanga, pa mputa ya bantu bende, muondape mputa yabu ivuaye mubatape, ngondu neakenke bu diba. Bukenke bua diba nebupite bua matuku onsu, misangu muanda mutekete, bu bukenke bua lumingu lujima, bukenka dituku dimue." 
Isaiah30:27 Monayi, Maweja-Nangila nkayende udi ufika, ufumina kule. Kapia ne muinshi bidi bileja tshiji tshikole tshidiye natshi. Udi wakula ne tshiji. Miaku yende idi bu kapia kadi kosha." 
Isaiah30:28 Mueyelu wende udi ne bukole bu bua muenji wa musulu. Udi ufika bua kukengesha bantu, kubapepula, kubimansha bu bisota, kubela nkanu ku mbanga, bua kuya nabu kudibu kabayi basue." 
Isaiah30:29 Kadi nuenu bena Yerushalayime, nenuimbe misambu, munudi nuenza bufuku matuku a tshibilu. Nenusanke amu bu bantu badi bela nshiba, benda batangila ku mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila, muaba udi Mvidi Mukulu wa Bukole bua bena Izrayele usomba." 
Isaiah30:30 Maweja-Nangila neakule. Bantu nebumvue bukole bua diyi diende. Nealeje mudiye ne diboku dia bukole, dia kunyoka nadi bantu. Nealeje bantu patoke, mudi tshiji tshiende tshikole. Neabatumine kapia, kadi kosha kashidisha. Neabatumine mvula wa mudimbi, wa mabue, ne nkuba." 
Isaiah30:31 Bena Ashure nebakuatshike bowa, padibu bumvua diyi dia Maweja-Nangila, bamona mutshi udiye ubanyoka nawu." 
Isaiah30:32 Misangu yonsu idi Maweja-Nangila ubatuta, udi amu ubalongesha. Musangu onsu udiye ubakuma, udi ubajija maja, ngoma ne nzenze bidila." 
Isaiah30:33 Mbamane kulongolola tshioshelu kale. Mbalongolole muaba udibu ne bua kuoshela mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Tshioshelu etshi tshidi tshinene, kabidi tshile. Bavua belamu nkunyi ya bungi. Nanku, Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila udi utemeshamu kapia. Nkunyi eyi idi bu kapia ka mu tshingoma kadi katema." 
Isaiah31:1 Bantu badi baya mu Ejipitu bua kukeba diambuluisha, mbena diakabi! Badi batekemena ku nyama ya tubalu, ne ku matempu mavule a bena Ejipitu, ne ku babandi babu ba pa tubalu, bualu badi bilobu. Kadi kabena bakeba Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa Izrayele. Kabena bakeba lungenyi kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah31:2 Kadi Yeye mene ke udi mumanye tshia kuenza. Uvua mutumine bantu dikenga, bu muvuaye muambe. Uvua munyoke benji ba bibi bungi buabu, ne bonsu badi babambuluisha." 
Isaiah31:3 Bena Ejipitu badi amu bantu, kabena mvidie to. Nyama ya tubalu idi amu nyama, kayena mikishi idi kayiyi ne mibidi to. Padi Maweja-Nangila olola tshianza, badi bambuluisha bakuabu nebadishinde, ne badibu bambuluisha nebapone kabidi panshi. Bonsu bubidi buabu nebabutuke pamue." 
Isaiah31:4 Maweja-Nangila uvua mungambile ne: “Nyama wa ntambue, nansha mukole nansha muana, udi ukungula padi tshisumbu tshia balami ba mikoku basue kumunyenga nyama udiye mukuate. Kena ne bowa bua bibingu bidibu bamuela to. Kena ushiya nyama panshi bua mutoyi ewu to. Ke mudibi buanyi meme, Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, pambapueka pa mukuna wa Siyone, bua kunuluila bua baluishi benu kabanuenzedi bibi.”" 
Isaiah31:5 Bu mudi nyunyi ubalula mapuapua ende bua kulama tuana tuende, ke mudi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu ulama bena Yerushalayime. Udi ubapikula, ubakuba, ubasungidila." 
Isaiah31:6 Nuenu bena Izrayele, pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila, unuvua balengulule bikole." 
Isaiah31:7 Nudi bena tshibawu, bualu nudi badifudile mpingu ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha ne mpawungi. Kadi dituku dikuabu, yonsu wa kunudi neimanshe mpingu idiye nayi." 
Isaiah31:8 Muena Ashure neafue ku muele wa mvita, udi kauyi muenze kudi bantu. Muele wa mvita udi kauyi wa bantu, neumubutule. Bena Ashure nebanyeme muele wa mvita udi kauyi wa bantu. Bilobu bia mvita biabu, nebaye nabi mu bupika." 
Isaiah31:9 Bilobu nebinyeme mvita, bua bowa bukole budibu bakuatshika. Balombodi ba bena mvita nebatekete mu maboku, nebanyeme, bashiya dibendele diabu. Maweja-Nangila ke udi wamba nanku. Ke yeye udibu batendelela pa mukuna wa Siyone. Kapia kende kadi katemena ku Yerushalayime." 
Isaiah32:1 Nanku mukalenga neafike, mukalenga udi ulombola bantu bende mu buakane. Balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, nebalonde amu njila wa buakane." 
Isaiah32:2 Yonsu wa kudibu neenze amu bimpe, yonsu neikale bu muaba utudi mua kunyemena, padi lupepele ne mvula wa tshipupu bitukuata. Yonsu neikale bu musulu udi upueka mu buloba buume, bu dileji didi lubuebue lunene lufila mu ditunga dia luya lupite." 
Isaiah32:3 Bantu aba badi ne mudimu wa kutabalela makenga a bantu, kabakushala kabidi bampofu to. Bantu aba badi ne bua kumvua, nebateleje bimpe tshidi bantu bamba." 
Isaiah32:4 Bantu badi kabayi bela meji, nebatuadije kumvua malu. Bena tshikukumina nebatuadije kuakula bimpe. Bantu bonsu nebumvue tshidibu bamba." 
Isaiah32:5 Muntu mupote kabakumuangata kabidi ne mushinga to. Muntu wa tshidingidingi kabakumuteka kabidi mulongu wa bantu ba nsongu. 
Isaiah32:6 Bualu bantu bapote badi bakula, amu bua kuamba malu a bupote. Badi bela meji ku malu a bupote, adibu basue kuenza matuku adi kumpala. Badi benza malu bu bashipianganyi. Badi bakula malu adi abipila Maweja-Nangila. Muntu udi ne nzala, kabena bamupesha tshiakudia. Muntu udi ne nyota, kabena bamupesha tshikunua." 
Isaiah32:7 Bantu bapale badi bamanye mua kukengesha bantu bakuabu bikole. Badi badilongolola, bua bamone mua kupisha bapele, pa kujadika malu a dishima. Ke mudi bena dikenga kabayi mua kubinga, nansha bobu kabayi ne bualu." 
Isaiah32:8 Kadi muntu wa kalolu, udi wela meji amu a kalolu, udi ukumbaja kabidi malu a kalolu." 
Isaiah32:9 Nuenu bakaji badi kabayi basumpakena tshintu, jukayi, nunteleje. Nuenu bana ba bakaji badi benda bu badi kabayi ne lutatu, ntelejayi: ke meme awu ngakula." 
Isaiah32:10 Papita tshidimu ne matuku, nuenu, bana ba bakaji badi benda kabayi ne lutatu, nenupampakane. Bualu kabakupola kabidi tumuma tua mvinyo to, kabakunowa kabidi bintu mu madimi enu to." 
Isaiah32:11 Nuenu bakaji badi kabayi basumpakena tshintu, zakalayi, nuenu bana ba bakaji badi benda bu badi kabayi ne lutatu, nusumpakane. Vulayi bilamba bienu, vualayi bilamba bia madilu mu tshimonu." 
Isaiah32:12 Dikumayi bianza pa tshiadi, nudile miadi; jingayi budimi buenu bulenga, ne mionji yenu ya mvinyo ivua ikuama bimpe." 
Isaiah32:13 Dilayi bua buloba bua bantu banyi, budi bunyanga kudi meba ne tshisuku. Dilayi, bualu disanka ndimane kumuka mu nzubu yenu yonsu. Musangelu kawena kabidi mu tshimenga to." 
Isaiah32:14 Nzubu wa mukalenga mmushale mutupu, tshimenga, tshivua bantu tente, tshikadi tshipela. Mukuna wa Ofele, ne kaleya ka batentekedi, mbishale dikolu kashidi. Nyama ya mpunde ya ditu ikadi inayilamu, bimuna bikadi bikebelamu biakudia biabi." 
Isaiah32:15 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila, neatutumine Mueyelu wende. Nenku, madimi avua kaayi akuama bintu, neandamuke malaba mafuke a mitshi. Mitshi ya bimuma neikale bungi bu mitshi ya muitu!" 
Isaiah32:16 Miaba yonsu, mu mpata ne mu metu, bantu nebakumbaje tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Mu ditunga dijima bantu nebanangangane, nebumvuangane ne muoyi umue." 
Isaiah32:17 Buakane nebupatule bupole. Nebufile ditalala bua kashidi, bantu kabayi ne bua kutshina kabidi to." 
Isaiah32:18 Bantu ba Maweja-Nangila nebasombe talalaa, muaba udi bupole ne dikisha, muaba udibu kabayi ne lutatu nansha lukese." 
Isaiah32:19 Mabue a mvula nealoke bikole muitu, mua baluishi babu, tshimenga tshiabu netshidine mu mayi." 
Isaiah32:20 Kadi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila nebikale bena diakalenga. Nebakune biakudia biabu ne disanka, bualu mayi neikale mavule. Ngombe ne mpunde nebiendakane miaba yonsu kakuyi bualu, bua bungi bua biakudia bidi mu ditunga." 
Isaiah33:1 Wewe munyangi wa bintu bionsu, udi muena diakabi, bualu kabavua bakunyange wewe nenku to. Udi welela bakuabu tshitungu, padibu kabayi bakuelela wewe tshitungu! Pawamana kulekela kubutula bakuabu, nebakubutule ne wewe kabidi. Pawamana kutungila bakuabu tshitungu, nebakutungile ne wewe kabidi." 
Isaiah33:2 Maweja-Nangila, utunwuile luse. Tudi tukutekemena, tukuindila. Dinda dionsu, utukoleshe. Diba dia dikenga, utusungidile." 
Isaiah33:3 Paudi utonoka, bantu badi banyema mbilu. Paudi ujuuka kulu, bisamba bidi bitangalaka." 
Isaiah33:4 Diba adi, netupawule bintu, mudi mpasu imata panshi, idia bisosa. Tudi tudiela pa bia baluishi betu, mudi mikumbi ikila pa bia mu madimi." 
Isaiah33:5 Maweja-Nangila udi ne bukole, usomba mulu. Udi ukuata mudimu mu Yerushalayime, bua bantu banemekangane, basankishangane." 
Isaiah33:6 Bena tshisamba tshia Maweja-Nangila, nenusombe mu ditunga ne mimuemue. Kuikala bena meji, kumanya Mvidi Mukulu, ke biuma bidi bitufikisha ku lupandu. Kutshina Maweja-Nangila, ke buenu bubanji!" 
Isaiah33:7 Monayi: bena mu Yerushalayime, badi bapatuka mu misesu, batua mikemu. Bavua batumanyisha bupole, badi bapingana, benda badila miadi." 
Isaiah33:8 Njila idi munda mutupu. Bantu kabena bapitshilamu. Muena tshikisu mmupule ndondu, mubenge mikanda idi imujadika. Muoyi wa muntu kawena ne mushinga ku mesu ende." 
Isaiah33:9 Ditunga didi mu madilu, diume, dilakata. Mikuna ya Lebanone idi ifubidila ne bundu. Mpata wa Sarone ukadi tshipela. Mu Bashane ne pa mukuna wa Karmele, mitshi idi idinyuka, mabeji apopoka panshi." 
Isaiah33:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mpindiewu nenjuke, lelu, ndi ngenza bualu. Nendeje bukole bundi nabu." 
Isaiah33:11 Meji onsu anuvua bele munda muenu, adi a tshianana. Panudi nukeba kuakumbaja, kanuena nupeta tshintu. Mueyelu wanyi udi bu kapia kadi kaabutula." 
Isaiah33:12 Bisamba bikuabu nebabioshe, bishale amu butu. Nebabiele mu kapia, bu mudi bantu bela mu kapia mitshi ya meba buabu bakose." 
Isaiah33:13 Nuenu badi base kule, telejayi bimvua muenze. Nuenu badi basomba pabuipi, manyayi bukole buanyi!”" 
Isaiah33:14 Mu Siyone, bena tshibawu badi bakuatshika bowa; badi kabayi bitaba Maweja-Nangila badi bazakala. “Nganyi wa kutudi washala pabuipi ne kapia aka kadi kabutulangana? Wa munkatshi muetu wasomba pamue, ne tshikutu tshitema kapia kashidi, udiku anyi?”" 
Isaiah33:15 — Amu udi ulonda njila mululame, unemeka bantu, wamba malu malelela, ubenga kukengesha bantu bua kupeta biuma, ubenga badi basue kumubuejila. Kena uteleja badi bamukoka ku dishipangana. Kena utangila, wanyisha badi benza bibi." 
Isaiah33:16 Muntu awu neasombe talalaa, bu muntu musokome kulu pa mikuna, bu udi unyemena mu mbuebue mikole. Neapetemu tshiakudia, kakupanga mayi a kunua." 
Isaiah33:17 Mesu ebe neamone mukalenga, ne lumu luende luonsu. Neamone mudi ditunga dialabale." 
Isaiah33:18 Neuvuluke bowa buuvua nabu kale. Neukonke ne: “Bantu benyi bavua babala bajadika bungi bua milambu, ituvua bafile, badi penyi? Bavua bakenketa bimenga bietu, bituvua bakoleshe ne bimana, bepi?”" 
Isaiah33:19 Kanuakumona kabidi bantu aba bavua baditambisha, bavua bakula muakulu mukole, udi bantu kabayi mua kujingulula, kabayi mua kumvua." 
Isaiah33:20 Neutangile Yerushalayime, neutangile Siyone, muaba udibu benzela bibilu bietu, nanku neumone ne: Yerushalayime ukadi muaba wa dikisha ne wa bupole, bu ntenta udibu kabayi batentemuna kabidi, kabayi batula milonda, kabayi basulula mionji yende." 
Isaiah33:21 Momu amu ke mudi Maweja-Nangila, utulejila butumbi buende. Nemuikale misulu mikese, ne mialabale. Momu amu matu a mvita kaena endelamu. Matu manene kaena apitshilamu." 
Isaiah33:22 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi mulombodi wetu, udi mfumu wetu bonsu. Maweja-Nangila udi mukalenga wetu. Yeye ke Musungidi wetu." 
Isaiah33:23 Mbamane kusulula mionji ya matu a baluishi. Kayena ishindika kabidi mutshi, kabena babandisha kabidi nayi dibendele dia buatu. Dituku adi, nebabanyangane bintu bituvua banyenge mu mvita. Nansha balema mene, nebaye kupawula bintu bia baluishi." 
Isaiah33:24 Mu Yerushalayime kamuakuikala muntu, udi wamba ne: “Ndi nsama”. Bualu bantu ba mu thimenga atshi, mbamane kubafuila luse bua tshilema tshiabu." 
Isaiah34:1 Nuenu bukua bisamba, semenayi pabuipi, numvue. Ntelejayi, nuenu bantu bonsu. Buloba buteleje, buteleje ne bintu bionsu bidipu! Buloba buonsu bujadike bualu ebu, bobu ne bintu bionsu bidi bimenapu." 
Isaiah34:2 Maweja-Nangila udi mufikile bisamba bionsu bia bantu munda. Udi ne tshiji bualu buabi. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kushindika dibutuka diabi. Mmumane kuanyisha bua bifue. 
Isaiah34:3 Badibu bashipa, badi babimansha panshi, kabayi babajika to. Bitalu biabu bidi bibola, binunka bibi. Mashi abu adi apueka pa mikuna." 
Isaiah34:4 Mitotu ne mabulunge a kulu, bidi bienda bisunsuka. Badi bavunga tshibuashibuashi, bu mudibu bavunga mukanda. Bia mulu bionsu bidi bipona, bu mabeji muume a muonji wa mvinyo, nansha a mutshi wa mfiku." 
Isaiah34:5 Muele wa mvita wa Maweja-Nangila, udi umueneka mu diulu. Monayi mudiwu ushipa bantu ba bena Edome aba, badi Maweja-Nangila musue kubutula." 
Isaiah34:6 Ku muele wa mvita wa Maweja-Nangila, kudi mashi a bungi, kudi mafuta tente, bu mashi a mikoku ya bimpanga, a mbuji ya mpumbu, bu mafuta a ku tuonyi tua mbuji. Bualu mu tshimenga tshikulu tshia Bosra, Maweja-Nangila udi ulambula milambu. Mu ditunga dia bena Edome, udi ushipa nyama ya milambu." 
Isaiah34:7 Diba adi, mbowa idi ifua, pamue ne ngombe milume ya bukole. Mashi adi abuela mu buloba, mafuta a nyama adi apueka mu lusenga." 
Isaiah34:8 Bualu ke dituku didi Maweja-Nangila usombuela bantu. Ke tshidimu tshidiye ufuta baluishi ba Siyone malu mabi onsu avuabu benze. 
Isaiah34:9 Misulu ya mu bena Edome, neishale misulu ya budimbu. Buloba bua Edome nebuandamuke kapia ka mfundanga. Ditunga nedikale bu budimbu, budibu bosha mu kapia," 
Isaiah34:10 kadi katema bufuku ne munya, kabandisha amu kubandisha muinshi mulu. Ditunga nedishale dikolu, muntu kayi upitshilamu, kashidi ne kashidi." 
Isaiah34:11 Tshikololu ne nkese nebisombemu. Tshipungulu ne kanyunyu kadi kafuana tshikololu, nebienzemu masua abi. Maweja-Nangila neapime ditunga, bua kudibutula dijima, bua dishale tshipela, kamuyi bantu." 
Isaiah34:12 Kamuakuikala kabidi bakulu ba ditunga, badi mua kusungula Mukalenga. Balombodi bonsu mbamane kufua." 
Isaiah34:13 Mitshi ya meba idi imena mu nzubu ya bukalenga. Mpesa ne mingonga, bidi bitoloka mu bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Mibuabua idi inayilamu, nyunyi ya kafyondu iladilamu." 
Isaiah34:14 Nyama ya kande neisangilemu ne nyama ya tshimungu. Ke mudi mbuji ya muitu isangila. Ke mudi mukishi mubi udi wendakana butuku, upetela muaba wa kuikishila." 
Isaiah34:15 Ke mudi nyoka wenzela buina buende, budiye welela makela ende, utentekela mudiwu atoyika. Ke mudi nyunyi ya mikanku kabidi isangila mu bisumbu." 
Isaiah34:16 Paudi ukeba mu mukanda wa Maweja-Nangila, neubalemu ne: Nansha umue wa ku nyama eyi kena ushadila kunyima. Maweja-Nangila udi utuma diyi bua yonsu ikalepu. Mueyelu wende ke udi uyisangisha pamue." 
Isaiah34:17 Maweja-Nangila uvua mutshinke, tshitupa tshia ditunga, tshidi yonsu wa kudiyi mua kupeta. Uvua muangate muonji, bua kupima ditunga, kudiabanyina nyama ayi. Nedishale diayi kashidi, neisombemu tshiendelele." 
Isaiah35:1 Tshipela ne buloba bume nebileje disanka diabi. Ditunga divua ne minanga nedisangale, nedimeneshe bilongu" 
Isaiah35:2 bilenga bu kapapankole! Eyowa, ditunga dimeneshe bilongu, disangale, diele mbila ya disanka! Maweja-Nangila neadipeshe buimpe bua mikuna ya Lebanone, bulenga bua mukuna wa Karmele, ne bua mpata wa Sarone. Nenku bantu bonsu nebamone butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila, buneme bua Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Isaiah35:3 Koleshayi mu maboku bantu badi bapungile, kankamikayi binu bidi bitenkakana." 
Isaiah35:4 Ambilayi badi batekesha mu maboku ne: “Kanutshinyi, kolayi bo bo bo, Mvidi Mukulu wenu udiku! Udi ufika bua kunusombuela, bua kupingajila bena lukuna benu malu mabi avuabu banuenzele. Yeye mene udi ufika bua kunupandisha.”" 
Isaiah35:5 Diba adi, mesu a bampofu neatabale, amone bimpe, matshi a bena mapapa, neunwue biakane." 
Isaiah35:6 Diba adi, batebuki nebatupike, baja ne maja, bu ngulungu mu mpata. Tumama netuele mbila ya disanka. Bualu mu tshipela, nemupatuke mayi: Misulu neipueke mu ditunga divua ne munanga." 
Isaiah35:7 Lusenga luvua luosha, neluandamuke dijiba. Ditunga divua kadiyi ne mayi, nediandamuke mpokolu wa mayi. Miaba ivua mibuabua ilala, malenge ne nshiba nebitolokemu." 
Isaiah35:8 Koku aku, nekuikale njila. Nebamuinyike ne: “Njila wa tshijila”. Muntu mupie mikiya kakupitshilaku to. Mutendeledi wa mvidie kakuendakanamu to. Njila awu neikale mutekela bantu ba Maweja-Nangila, patuadijabu luendu luabu." 
Isaiah35:9 Mu njila amu kamuena ntambue. Nyama wa lonji nansha umue kena upitshilamu. Kabena basanganamu nyama ayi. Momu ke muendelabu amu kudi bantu, badi Maweja-Nangila mupikule." 
Isaiah35:10 Bantu badi Maweja-Nangila musungidile, nebapinganyine mu njila awu. Nebafike mu Siyone, bimbe misambu ya disanka. Disanka dia kashidi nedikale pa mpala yabu. Disanka dinene nediuwuje mioyi yabu. Makenga ne masumpakana mbimane kubashila muaba kashidi." 
Isaiah36:1 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshinayi tshivua Izkiya mu bukalenga, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kuluisha bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, kubikuata." 
Isaiah36:2 Nenku patshivua mukalenga wa bena Ashure mu Lakishe, uvua mutume mulombodi kampanda wa bena m vita bende, uvua nende miaba yonsu, mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, kudi mukalenga Izkiya. Muambuluishi wa mukalenga awu uvua ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bena mvita. Kuimanaye pabuipi ne mukidi wamayi avua apueka ku tshiina tshia m ayi tshivua ku mutu pa mukuna, mu njila wa ku budimi bua Basukudi ba bilamba." 
Isaiah36:3 Pashishe, Eliyakime, muana wa Ilkiya, ne mulombodi wa mu nzubu mua mukalenga, kupatukaye mu tshimenga bua kusambakena nende. Bavua bamushindikija kudi Shebna, mufundi wa malu a mukalenga, ne kudi Yowa, muana wa Ashafe, uvua mufikishi wa malu a mu bukalenga kudi bantu." 
Isaiah36:4 Mulombodi wa bena mvita wa bena Ashure kubambila ne: “Nuye, nuambile Izkiya mikenji ya kudi mukalenga munene wa bena Ashure ne: — Tshidi tshikuleja ne: udi mua kututshimuna ntshinyi?" 
Isaiah36:5 Udi wela meji ne: paudi wakula ufuna mvita, udi upeta meji ne bukitu bua kuluangana anyi? Paudi muntombokele apu, uudi mutekemene bua akuambuluishe nnganyi?" 
Isaiah36:6 Udi mutekemene bena Ejipitu anyi? Bena Ejipitu badi amu bu tshikolu tshimane kutshibuka. Padi muntu wenda ushindamenapu, tshidi tshimutua mu tshianza. Ke mudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu wenzela bantu bonsu badi bamutekemena." 
Isaiah36:7 Bulelela, mungandamune ne: tudi tutekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kadi wewe Izkiya ke uvua munyangakaje miaba yonsu ya kumutendelela, ne bilambuilu biende. Uvua mukandike bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime bua kabatendeledi muaba mukuabu, amu kumpala kua tshilambuilu tshidi mu Yerushalayime emu!" 
Isaiah36:8 “Nanku nudie lupiku ne mfumuanyi, mukalenga wa bena Ashure: Meme ndi mua kukupesha nyama ya tubalu binunu bibidi, kadi amu paudi mua kupeta bantu bakumbane badi mua kubandapu." 
Isaiah36:9 Kadi, wewe udi mua kunyemesha mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mfumuanyi, nansha yeye kayi mumanye mvita bimpe, bishi? Ke wewe kutekemena bena Ejipitu, bua kukupeshabu matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu!" 
Isaiah36:10 Kadi ela meji bimpe! Mfumuanyi mmufike bua kuluisha ditunga edi, kudinyangakaja, Maweja-Nangila kayi muanyishe anyi? Nansha kakese! Amu Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke uvua mutume diyi bua mfumuanyi kudinyangakajaye! ”" 
Isaiah36:11 Nenku, Eliyakime, Shebna ne Yowa kuambilabu mulombodi wa bena mvita ba bena Ashure, muambuluishi wa mukalenga wabu ne: “Bu wewe musue, tuyukile nebe mu muakulu wa bena Arame, bualu tudi baumanye. Lekela kuakula netu mu buena ebrewu, bualu bantu bonsu badi pa tshimana badi batuteleja.”" 
Isaiah36:12 Kadi, mulombodi wa bena mvita, muambuluishi wa mukalenga, kuandamuna ne: “Nudi nuela meji ne: malu adi mfumuanyi mutume bua kuamba, tudi mua kunuambila amu nuenu ne mfumuenu anyi? Malu aa, tudi mua kuambila kabidi bantu bonsu badi pa tshimana apa. Bualu bantu abu ne nuenu, nenudie amu bunyawu buenu, nenunue menyi enu anu mutantshi mukese ewu. ”" 
Isaiah36:13 Pashishe mulombodi wa bena mvita, muambuluishi wa mukalenga, kujuukaye kulu, wela mbila bikole mu muakulu wa bena Ebrewu, wamba ne: “Telejayi tshidi Mukalenga Munene, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, unuambila ne:" 
Isaiah36:14 — Kanuitabi bua Izkiya anushime! Kena mua kunusungidila to. 
Isaiah36:15 Udi unuambila ne: Mbimpe kudifila kudi Maweja-Nangila; yeye ke udi mua kutusungidila bushuwa; yeye neakandike mukalenga wa bena Ashure bua kakuatshi tshimenga etshi. Kadi kanuitabi bionsu abi to. 
Isaiah36:16 Kanuena mua kuteleja tshidi Izkiya unuambila to. Nuteleje amu tshindi meme ngamba, meme mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Lekelayi kukandamana. Anyishayi, nudifile kundi. Diba adi, muntu yonsu wa kunudi neanue maluvu ende a mvinyo, neadie tumuma tuende tua mutshi wa mfiku, neanue mayi a mu tshiina tshiende." 
Isaiah36:17 Pashishe nemfike bua kunuangata, kuya nenu mu ditunga didi bu dienu edi, ditunga didi ne ntete ya bungi ya kuenza bukula bua mampa. Didi kabidi ne maluvu a mvinyo mavule." 
Isaiah36:18 Kanuteleji tshidi Izkiya unuambila ne: anu Maweja-Nangila neanusungidile. Mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu ivua minkandike bua meme kukuata matunga abi anyi? 
Isaiah36:19 Mvidie ya bena tshimenga tshia Amate ne tshia Arpade, ivua mienze tshinyi? Nansha ya bena tshimenga tshia Sefarvayime? Muntu uvua mumpangishe mua kukuata tshimenga tshia Samariya anyi?" 
Isaiah36:20 Ku mvidie yonsu eyi, nansha umue kavua munkandike, bua meme kukuata ditunga diende. Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi mua kunkandika, bua meme kukuata Yerushalayime munyi?”" 
Isaiah36:21 Bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu kushalabu amu bapuwa, nansha wa kuandamuna diyi, bualu ke muvua mukalenga Izkiya mumane kubambila." 
Isaiah36:22 Pashishe, Eliyakime, muana wa Ilkiya, uvua mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna, mufundi, ne Yowa, muana wa Ashafe, mufikishi wa malu a mu bukalenga kudi bantu, kupandabu bilamba biabu. Pashishe kupinganabu kudi mukalenga Izkiya. Kumulondelabu bionsu bivuabu bamba kudi mulombodi wa bena mvita, muambuluishi wa mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Isaiah37:1 Mukalenga Izkiya mumane kumvua bionsu bivuabu bambe, kudipandaye bilamba biende. Kuvualaye bilamba bia madilu. Kuyaye mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah37:2 Kutumaye diakamue Eliyakime, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna, mufundi, ne bakulu ba batuangaji, kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose. Bantu abu kuvuala kabidi bilamba bia madilu." 
Isaiah37:2 Kutumaye diakamue Eliyakime, mulombodi wa nzubu wa bukalenga, Shebna, mufundi, ne bakulu ba batuangaji, kudi muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose. Bantu abu kuvuala kabidi bilamba bia madilu." 
Isaiah37:3 Kuyabu kuambila muambi Yeshaya ne: “Mukalenga Izkiya udi wamba ne: — Lelu ndituku dia kutukengeshabu, dia kutunyokabu, ne kutufuishabu bundu. Bu mudibu bamba ne: muana ukadi pabuipi, kadi mamuende kena ne bukole bua kumulela to." 
Isaiah37:4 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure, mmutume mulombodi wa bena mvita, mumuambuluishi, bua kupendabu Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi. Eyowa, ndi njinga bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe umvue bipendu bionsu ebi, anyoke muntu uvua mumupende! wewe lombaku Maweja-Nangila, akuile bantu bende badi bashala ne muoyi.”" 
Isaiah37:5 Bantu bavua mukalenga Izkiya mutume bamane kuyukila ne muambi Yeshaya," 
Isaiah37:6 awu kubambila ne: “Nuye kuambila mfumuenu ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Uvua muteleje muvua balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga wa bena Ashure bampenda. Kadi kutshinyi bionsu bivuabu bakula abi to. 
Isaiah37:7 Mukalenga neapete mukenji. Nanku meme nemmuenzeje mua kupinganaye mu ditunga diende. Nemmushipeshe kuende kudi bantu mu ditunga diende. ” 
Isaiah37:8 Mulombodi wa bena mvita, muambuluishi wa mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kumvuaye lumu lua ne: mfumuende mmumuke mu tshimenga tshia Lakishe, bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Libna. Nenku kuyaye kumonangana ne mfumuende mu tshimenga atshi." 
Isaiah37:9 Pashishe kuyabu kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ashure ne: Tiraka, muena Kushe, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, mmufike bua kukuluisha. Nanku, Senakeribe kutumina Izkiya," 
Isaiah37:10 mukalenga wa bena Yuda, muntu bua kumuambila ne: “Wewe udi mutambe kutekemena amu kudi Mvidi Mukulu webe. Udi wela meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu neankandike bua meme kukuata tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime anyi? Kadi Mvidi Mukulu kakushimi to." 
Isaiah37:11 Udi mumane kumanya muvua bakalenga ba bena Ashure benzele matunga makuabu onsu, baanyangakaje. Nanku wewe udi wela meji ne: neupanduke anyi?" 
Isaiah37:12 Bakalenga bavua mu bukalenga kumpala kuanyi, bavua babutule bimenga ebi: Ngozane, Arane, Reshefe ne Telashare, tshimenga tshikulu tshia bena Edene. Mvidie ya matunga aa kayena mipandishe bimenga ebi to." 
Isaiah37:13 Ela meji bimpe. Bakalenga ba mu tshimenga tshia Amate, tshia Arpade, tshia Layire, tshia Sefawayime, tshia Ena ne tshia Eva, badi penyi? ”" 
Isaiah37:14 Izkiya kuangata mukanda uvuabu bamutuadile kudi bena Ashure. Kuubalaye. Pashishe, kubuelaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuulejaye Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah37:15 Kutendelelaye, wamba ne:" 
Isaiah37:16 “Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, wewe udi usomba ku mutu kua bakerubine. Wewe nkayebe ke Mvidi Mukulu, mfumu wa makalenga onsu a pa buloba. Wewe ke udi mufuke diulu ne buloba." 
Isaiah37:17 Maweja-Nangila, telejaku mudi bantu ba mukalenga Senakeribe bakupenda, wewe Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi! Tangila dikenga ditudi nadi!" 
Isaiah37:18 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila, bakalenga ba bena Ashure mbabutule matunga makuabu, banyangakaje maloba." 
Isaiah37:19 Bavua boshe, banyangakaje mvidie ya matunga aa, bualu kayivua mvidie ya bushiwa to. Ivua amu mpingu ya mitshi, nansha ya mabue masonga kudi bantu." 
Isaiah37:20 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, utusungidile mpindiewu mu bianza bia Senakeribe. Nankumu makalenga onsu a pa buloba, nebamanye ne: amu wewe Maweja-Nangila nkayebe ke udi Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Isaiah37:21 Pashishe muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, kutuma muntu bua kuambila Izkiya ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Ndi mumvue muudi ulombela Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Isaiah37:21 Pashishe muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose, kutuma muntu bua kuambila Izkiya ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Ndi mumvue muudi ulombela Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Isaiah37:22 Teleja malu andi muandamune Senakeribe: Tshimenga tshia Siyone tshidi tshikudiwula, tshikupepeja. Tshimenga tshimpe tshia Yerushalayime, tshidi tshikuseka, tshikupa mutu." 
Isaiah37:23 Uuvua upenda nnganyi? Uuvua ujana ne dikamakama nnganyi? Wewe mutshimbakane, uuvua mutangile ne kapeja nnganyi? Uvua usendeka amu meme, Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele!" 
Isaiah37:24 Wewe uvua mutume bantu bebe, bua bampende meme Maweja-Nangila. “Uvua wamba ne: ‘Meme Senakeribe, ndi ne matempu a mvita mapite bungi. Ndi mubande ku nsongu ya mikuna. Ndi muye ne munkatshi mua ditunga dia Lebanone, bua kukosa mitshi ya sedre, idi mipite mikuabu yonsu ku buimpe, ne mitshi ya siprese, idi mipite mikuabu yonsu ku bule. Nemfike ku nsongu ya mikuna, ku ndekelu kuayi, ne munkatshi mua ditu." 
Isaiah37:25 Meme ndi mumbule biina bia mayi, ndi munue mayi mu matunga a bende. Nengumishe misapa ya Nile, amu pandi ndiata makasa mu ditunga dia Ejipitu.’" 
Isaiah37:26 “Kadi wewe Senakeribe, kuena mumanye bualu ebu anyi? Meme ke udi mulongolole malu aa kumpala kua bidimu! Ku kale kuaka, nkavua mujadike bua kuenza malu andi nkumbaja mpindiewu. Meme ke uvua mukupeshe bukole bua kubutula bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Isaiah37:27 Bena bimenga abi kabavua ne bukole. Bavua batshina bikole, bumvua ne bundu. Bavua bafuanangane ne bikunyibua bia mu madimi, nansha ne bisosa bia mu mpata, nansha ne mitshi idi itoloka ku misaka ya nzubu, idi lupepela lua kudi diba dipatukila luosha." 
Isaiah37:28 “Ndi mumanye malu ebe onsu, ndi mumanye paudi ujuuka, nansha paudi usomba, paudi upatuka, nansha paudi ubuela, ne paudi umfunyina meme." 
Isaiah37:29 Wewe udi umfunyina meme! Mvua mumvue pauvua umpenda ne dikamakama. Nenku nenkutekeshe, nkuele kakanu ku diulu, ne lukanu lua tshiamu mukana. Nenkupingaje kuebe, amu mu njila muuvua mufumine." 
Isaiah37:30 Kadi wewe Izkiya, ndi nkuleja malu adi ne bua kuenzeka: tshidimu etshi, nebadie bukula buenza ne ntete ya bidimenena. Tshidimu tshialonda kabidi ne benze nanku. Kadi tshidimu tshia panyima, nudi mua kumiamina ne kunowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, nudi mua kukuna mionji yenu ya mvinyo, ne kupola tumuma tuayi." 
Isaiah37:31 Bena mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda badi bashala ne muoyi, nebikale tshiakabidi bu mutshi udi muele miji mu buloba: matamba awu neikale ne bimuma bia bungi." 
Isaiah37:32 Eyowa, mu Yerushalayime nemupatuke bantu badi bashala ne muoyi; bantu abu nebimane pa mukuna wa Siyone.” Yeshaya kuamba kabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu neakumbaje bualu ebu, bualu udi mununange menemene." 
Isaiah37:33 Kadi mpindiewu, telejayi: bua mukalenga wa bena Ashure, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Kakubuela mu tshimenga etshi to. Kena mua kuasa muntu wa mu tshimenga etshi mukete to. Ngabu yende kayena mua kumuambuluisha bua kuluishaye tshimenga etshi. Kena mua kusemena pabuipi natshi to. Kena mua kuela dibula dia kuluangana mvita momu to." 
Isaiah37:34 Neapingene mu njila uvuaye mufumine. Kakubuela mu tshimenga etshi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku. 
Isaiah37:35 Nendame Yerushalayime, nemmusungidile, bualu ndi Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi ndi munange muntu wanyi Davide.”" 
Isaiah37:36 Nanku, mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila kuya mu mitanda ya bena Ashure. Kushipaye bantu binunu lukama ne makumi muanda mukulu ne bitanu. Butshia dinda, bantu bavua bashala ne muoyi babika, kumonabu bitalu bionsu abi." 
Isaiah37:37 Nanku, Senakeribe, mukalenga wa bena Ashure, kutudisha mitanda, kuya kusomba mu tshimenga tshiende tshikulu tshia Ninive." 
Isaiah37:38 Dituku dikuabu, pavua Senakeribe utendelela mu nzubu wa mvidie wende Nisroke, bana bende ba balume babidi: Adrameleke ne Sareshere kumushipabu. Pashishe kunyemabu, kuya mu ditunga dia Ararate. Muanende mukuabu Asharadone, kumupinganaye mu bukalenga." 
Isaiah38:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Izkiya kupeta disama dia lufu. Muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose kufika kudiye bua kumusamba. Kumumanyishaye miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila muambe ne: “Diba diebe ndimane kukumbana. Udilongolole, bualu kuena upanda ku disama edi. Neufue.”" 
Isaiah38:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga Izkiya kupeta disama dia lufu. Muambi Yeshaya, muana wa Amose kufika kudiye bua kumusamba. Kumumanyishaye miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila muambe ne: “Diba diebe ndimane kukumbana. Udilongolole, bualu kuena upanda ku disama edi. Neufue.”" 
Isaiah38:2 Nenku, Izkiya kukudimuka, kutangila ku tshimana tshia nzubu. Kutendelelaye Maweja-Nangila wamba ne:" 
Isaiah38:3 “Eyi! Maweja-Nangila, vulukaku bionsu bimvua ngenza. Mvua mukulamate ne muoyi mujima. Mvua amu ngenza malu mimpe avua mua kukusankisha!” Pashishe Izkiya kudilaye muadi." 
Isaiah38:4 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kutuma Yeshaya bua 
Isaiah38:5 kuambila Izkiya ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa nkambua webe Davide udi wamba ne: — Ndi mumvue ditendelela diebe. Ndi mumone binsonji biebe. Nanku, neushale kabidi ne muoyi bidimu dikumi ne bitanu." 
Isaiah38:6 Wewe ne tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, nennusungidile ku bianza bia mukalenga wa bena Ashure. Nendame tshimenga etshi kashidi. ”" 
Isaiah38:7 Yeshaya kumuambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila neakupe tshimanyinu tshidi mua kukujadikila ne: neakumbaje bionsu bidiye mulaye. 
Isaiah38:8 Mundidimbi ukadi mubuikila tshibandilu tshia Akaze tshidi pambelu mu munya. Nanku Maweja-Nangila neabandishe tshiakabidi bukenke bua diba pa bidiatshilu dikumi bia tshibandilu atshi!” Bulelela diba divua ditokesha tshiakabidi bidiatshilu dikumi bivua mundidimbi mumane kubuikila. 
Isaiah38:9 Ke musambu uvua mukalenga wa bena Yuda Izkiya muimbe, pakajika disama diende ewu:" 
Isaiah38:10 Mvua ngamba ne: ndi mfua, mulale panu amu tshia bibidi tshia matuku anyi. Ndi mbuela mu kandondu ka bafue, nkumbajamu matuku antshivua mua kulala panu." 
Isaiah38:11 Meme kuamba kabidi ne: tshiakumona kabidi Maweja-Nangila pa buloba bua ba-muoyi; tshitshiena mua kutangila mpala nansha umue wa muntu udi muase panu. 
Isaiah38:12 Mbatule nzubu undi nsomba, mudibu batula mutanda wa mulami wa mikoku, baya nawu kule kudi lupepele. Matuku anyi a panu akadi matue ku tshibungubungu, bu tshipese tshia tshilamba, tshidi mukumi ukosa buanda, uvunga. — Maweja-Nangila buatshia buila, udi mua kuvua kungangata, kumbutula. —" 
Isaiah38:13 Bufuku bujima ndi ngela mbila, mmona ne: Maweja-Nangila mmuzaze mifuba yanyi yonsu, mudi nyama wa ntambue uyiboza, uvinga. — Maweja-Nangila buatshia buila, udi mua kuvua kungangata, kumbutula. —" 
Isaiah38:14 Ndi ngela mbila mikole, bu kandindi, ntua mikemu ne kanyinganyinga, bu kamanda-nkutshi. Mesu anyi adi atangila mulu, apungila. Maweja-Nangila, ungambuluishe! Ndi nkenga, mioyi mminshikile munda." 
Isaiah38:15 Kadi tshingambila Maweja-Nangila ntshinyi? Udi muenze bionsu ebi ki nYeye anyi? Ndi ngendakana panu, mpitshisha matuku, amu ne kanyinganyinga kakole munda." 
Isaiah38:16 — Maweja-Nangila, wewe uvua mudianze kumanya, bivua ne bua kungenzekela. Kadi wewe kumfululula, kumpingajila makanda, kundama ne muoyi." 
Isaiah38:17 Eyowa, kanyinganyinga nkandamuke diakalenga. Udi munnange bushiwa, mungumushile lufu. Wewe kuangata bilema bianyi bionsu, kubiela panyima kule kutambe." 
Isaiah38:18 Mu kandondu ka bafue kabena bakutumbisha. Bitalu kabiena bikuela bikashi! Badi bapueka mu kandondu, kabatshiena bakutekemena bua ubavuluke." 
Isaiah38:19 Amu badi ne muoyi ke badi bakusamuna, mundi ngenza meme lelu. Baledi nebamanyishe bana babu, muudi ukumbaja bionsu biudi ulaya." 
Isaiah38:20 Maweja-Nangila, uvua munsungidile. Ke mutudi tukutumbisha, tukuimbila ne bisanji, matuku onsu atudi tusomba panu, mu nzubu muudi netu, Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah38:21 Pashishe Yeshaya kutuma diyi bua bafike ne ditapi dia tumuma tua mutshi wa mfiku. Kudilamikaye muaba uvua disama bua kuondapa mukalenga! 
Isaiah38:22 Nanku Izkiya kukonka muambi Yeshaya ne: “Ntshimanyinu kaayi tshidi mua kunjadikila ne: ndi mua kubuela kabidi mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila?” 
Isaiah39:1 Tshikondu atshi, mukalenga wa Babilone, Merodake-Baladane, muana wa Baladane, kumvuaye lumu lua disama dia Izkiya. Kumvuaye kabidi ne: Izkiya ukadi musanguluke. Nanku kutuminaye Izkiya bantu, bavua bamutuadila mukanda, ne bintu bia kumusankisha nabi." 
Isaiah39:2 Izkiya kusanka ya bungi. Kulejaye bantu aba nzubu uvuabu balamina bintu bia mushinga mukole: mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, manananshi, ne mafuta a mupuya muimpe. Kubalejaye kabidi nzubu wa tshilaminu tshia bintu bia mvita, ne nzubu mikuabu yonsu ivua ne bintu bikuabu bivuaye nabi. Mukalenga kavua musokoke tshintu nansha tshimue, nansha tshia mu nzubu muende, nansha tshia mu bukalenga buende mene." 
Isaiah39:3 Pashishe, muambi Yeshaya kuya kudi mukalenga Izkiya, kumukonka ne: — Bantu aba bavua bakuambile tshinyi? Kabidi mbafume penyi? Izkiya kuandamuna ne: — Mbafume kule, ku bena Babilone, bafike bua kummona." 
Isaiah39:4 Yeshaya kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga bavua bamonemu tshinyi? Izkiya kuandamuna ne: — Bavua bamonemu bintu bidimu bionsu. Tshiena mubasokoke tshintu nansha tshimue tshia ku biuma bionsu bindi muteke. 
Isaiah39:5 Nanku Yeshaya kuambila Izkiya ne: “Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu wamba: 
Isaiah39:6 Dituku dikuabu, bintu bionsu bidi mu nzubu webe wa bukalenga mpindiewu, bintu bionsu bivuabu batekemu kudi bakalenga bavua bakudianjidile, bintu bionsu ebi nebaye nabi ku Babilone. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Muaba ewu kawakushala tshintu to." 
Isaiah39:7 Nebakuate bamue bantu ba ku ndelanganyi yebe, baye nabu ku Babilone bua kubapakula, bua bikale bena mudimu mu nzubu wa bukalenga kua mukalenga wa bena Babilone. ”" 
Isaiah39:8 Izkiya kuandamuna Yeshaya ne: “Ndi nganyisha tshidi Maweja-Nangila mukuambile.” Izkiya uvua wela meji ne: nanku pantshidi ne muoyi, netuikale basombe bimpe mu bupole." 
Isaiah40:1 Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Sambayi bantu banyi! Kanujingakanyi to! 
Isaiah40:2 Nukoleshe bena Yerushalayime ku muoyi! Nubele mbila, nubambile ne: “Midimu yenu mikole yajiki! Nudi bafute tshibawu tshienu. Maweja-Nangila mmununyoke misangu ibidi dinyoka dijima dinuvua ne bua kupeta.”" 
Isaiah40:3 Ndi mumvue diyi diamba ne: “Pandilayi Maweja-Nangila njila mu tshipela. Lulamijila Mvidi Mukulu njila mu buloba ebu buatuke. 
Isaiah40:4 Bajibikile mpongu yonsu. Mikuna minene ne mikese, bayipuekeshe! Mikuna ikale bu mpata. Bidi kulu bilandakane, bienza bibanda." 
Isaiah40:5 Diba adi, butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila nebumueneke. Bantu bonsu nebamumone diakamue. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila muambe nanku. ”" 
Isaiah40:6 Diyi didi diamba ne: “Ambila bantu malu!” Meme kuebeja ne: “Mbambile tshinyi?” “Bantu bonsu badi bapita lukasa bu bisosa. Nansha bobu ne bukole, badi bashala nabu katupa, bu tshilongu tshia mu budimi." 
Isaiah40:7 Padi Maweja-Nangila wela mupuya, tshisosa tshidi tshiuma, tshilongu tshifubidila. — Bushuwa, bantu badi ne butekete bu bua bisosa." 
Isaiah40:8 Tshisosa tshidi tshiuma, tshilongu tshifubidila. Kadi muaku wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi ushala ne bukole kashidi. ”" 
Isaiah40:9 Nuenu bena Yerushalayime, bandayi pa mukuna mutumbuke. Nuenu bena Siyone, koleshayi diyi muenu muonsu. Mbanuambile lumu lua disanka, kanutshinyi mua kuluambila banga bantu. Ambilayi bena mu bimenga bia Yuda ne: “Monayi Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Isaiah40:10 Monayi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Udi ufika ne bukole, bua kulongolola bukalenga buende. Udi upingaja bena diende kuabu. Bavuaye mupikule, badi benda kumpala kuende." 
Isaiah40:11 Udi bu mulami wa mikoku, udi usaka mikoku yende. Udi utuma amu tshianza, uyikunguja kaba kamue. Udi wambula bana ba mikoku mu tshiadi tshiende, usaka bitulu bitulu mikoku idi yamusha tuana. ”" 
Isaiah40:12 Uvua mupime mayi manene mu tshianza tshiende nnganyi? Uvua muidikije diulu ne ntanta wa tshianza tshiende nnganyi? Uvua musangishe dimfuekenya dia buloba mu mbeketshi, bua kudipima nnganyi? Uvua muteke mikuna minene ne mikese pa tshipiminu nnganyi?" 
Isaiah40:13 Uvua mufundile Mvidi Mukulu tshia yeye kuenza, nnganyi? Nganyi uvua mupe Mvidi Mukulu meji?" 
Isaiah40:14 Bua kupeta meji, Mvidi Mukulu uvua muyukile ne nganyi? Uvua mumulongeshe, mumuleje mua kupita, mumumvuije njila wa kulonda nnganyi mene awu?" 
Isaiah40:15 Kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bisamba bia bantu, bidi amu bu dimata dia mayi, didi dimata mu mbeketshi, nansha bu kasoka ka lusenga, kadibu bateka pa dilongu dia tshitempelu. Bantu ba kulekule, badi amu ne bujitu bu bua lupuishi lukese." 
Isaiah40:16 Nyama yonsu ya mu Lebanone, kayena mikumbane bua kumulambula mulambu muakanyine bumfumu buende. Nkunyi yonsu ya mu metu ende, kayena mikumbane bua kuosha mulambu mumukumbanyine." 
Isaiah40:17 Bisamba bionsu bisanga pamue, kabiena ne bujitu ku mesu ende. Bidi amu kajitu ka patupu." 
Isaiah40:18 Nudi basue kuteka Mvidi Mukulu mulongu umue ne nganyi? Nenumufuanyikije ne tshinyi? 
Isaiah40:19 Ne lupingu anyi? Muena mudimu uvua mulusonge. Pashishe mufudi uvua mululamike mpawungi, kululengejaye ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Isaiah40:20 Kadi muntu mupele menemene, udi kayi mua kukumbaja mushinga wa lupingu, udi usungula mutshi, udi kauyi mudie kudi bishi. Pashishe udi ukeba muena mudimu muimpe, udi mumanye mua kusonga lupingu, ludi luimane bimpe, kaluyi lutenkakana." 
Isaiah40:21 Kanuena bamanye anyi? Kanuena bajingulule anyi? Ki mbanji kunuambila kale anyi? Kanuena banji kumvua muvuabu bafuke buloba anyi? 
Isaiah40:22 Ke Maweja-Nangila udi usomba mu nkuasa wende, kulu kule ku mutu kua buloba. Udi umona bantu pa buloba, bamueneka bu tunkenene. Udi ubalula diulu, bu tshilamba tshinene tshidibu bakudika. Udi utshibalula bu ntenta, bua bantu basombe muinshi muatshi." 
Isaiah40:23 Maweja-Nangila udi upuekesha balombodi ba matunga, bashale bantu ba patupu. Udi uleja badi ne bumfumu, mudibu bantu ba patupu." 
Isaiah40:24 Badi bu mitshi mitekete. Bavua bamiamina ntete, itshidi yelelaku miji mu buloba. Kadi padi Mvidi Mukulu uyela mupuya, idi yuma, mupuya wende udi uyishimbula, bu mudi lupepele lukole lutula tususu tua tshimuma tshibishi." 
Isaiah40:25 Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila udi ukonka ne: “Nenumfuanyikije ne nganyi? Udi mua kuikala nanyi mumue nnganyi?” 
Isaiah40:26 Tangila mu diulu muamua. Monayi mudiye mufuke mitotu, muvuaye muyipatule bungi buayi, bu tshiluilu tshia bilobu. Udi muyiteke yonsu bua imukuatshile mudimu. Bu mudiye ne bukole bupite bunene, kabidi ne bumfumu, yonsu idi yitaba diyi diende, padiye uyibikila, uyituma." 
Isaiah40:27 Wewe Izrayele, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, bua tshinyi udi wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena umona makenga adi ankuata. Mvidi Mukulu kena utangila, badi bankengesha tshianana!”" 
Isaiah40:28 Kuena mumanye anyi? Kuena mumvue bamba ne: Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshiendelele. Uvua mufuke buloba bujima. Katshia kena uteketa, kena upungila. Meji ende kabena mua kuajingulula." 
Isaiah40:29 Muntu udi mutekete, Maweja-Nangila udi umupingajila makanda. Badi bapanga bukole, udi ubuwuja tente nabu." 
Isaiah40:30 Bansongalume mene, badi bateketa, bapungila. Nansha bilobu kabidi bitu bidishinda panshi." 
Isaiah40:31 Kadi badi batekemena kudi Maweja-Nangila, badi bapeta makanda mapiamapia. Badi babuka bu nyunyi ya biminyi. Badi banyema lubilu, kabayi bapungila. Badi benda, kabayi bateketa." 
Isaiah41:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bantu badi base kule, puwayi, nunteleje. Nuenu bisamba bia bantu, koleshayi muoyi. Semenayi pabuipi! Nenushishe kuakula. Eyowa, tusemenayi, nuenu ne meme, bua kubanga tshilumbu." 
Isaiah41:2 Meme kubikila muntu luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kumutuma mu njila. Muntu awu kutshimuna baluishi bende, kuonsu kuyayaye. Udi utshimuna matunga onsu adi kumpala kuende, udiatakaja bakalenga. Muele wende wa mvita udi ubatangalaja bu lupuishi. Mikete yende idi ibipata nduu, bu bisosa bidi lupepele lutangalaja." 
Isaiah41:3 Kubalondakajaye, kupitaye munkatshi muabu, kabayi bamuenzela bualu. Makasa ende kaena nansha adiata panshi." 
Isaiah41:4 Uvua muenze bualu ebu nnganyi? Amu yeye udi mudianze kuamba bivua ne bua kuenzeka. Ke meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ndudika malu a bantu. Ndiku, padibu babanga malu, nengikaleku, padibu baajikija." 
Isaiah41:5 Bantu badi base kule, badi bamona bimvua muenze, bakuatshika bowa. Bantu ba ku nshikidilu kua buloba, badi basemena pabuipi, bazakala." 
Isaiah41:6 Badi bambuluishangana, bakoleshangane ku muoyi, bamba ne: “Tuyayi! ”" 
Isaiah41:7 Muena mudimu wa mabaya udi ukolesha mufudi wa mpawungi ku muoyi. Mufudi udi ukolesha nsenda wa biamu ku muoyi. Udi wanyisha mudimu wende, wamba ne: “Udi muenze bimpe!” Pashishe badi bashindika lupingu, balupopela ku tshitekelu ne misonsu." 
Isaiah41:8 Izrayele, muena mudimu wanyi, tshisamba tshia Yakobe tshimvua musungule, ndelanganyi ya Abrahame, mulunda wanyi, teleja." 
Isaiah41:9 Meme kukukeba too ne ku nshikidilu kua buloba. Meme kukubikila, pauvua ku matunga a kule. Meme kukuambila ne: “To, tshiena mukubenge nansha. Ndi mukusungule. Muena mudimu wanyi ke wewe.”" 
Isaiah41:10 Mpindiewu, lekela kutshina, bualu ndi nebe. Lekela kukenzakana nseke yonsu ne dipampakana, bualu meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu webe. Ndi mufike bua kukukolesha ku muoyi. Ndi mufike bua kukuambuluisha. Ndi nkulama. Udi mu tshianza tshianyi tshia bukole." 
Isaiah41:11 Eyowa, bonsu badi bakukina, nebafue bundu. Bantu nebabaseke. Baluishi bebe nebajimine, nebabutuke bonsu!" 
Isaiah41:12 Neukebe bantu bonsu, bavua bakuluisha, kuyi ubamona. Bonsu bavua baluangana nebe, nebajimine." 
Isaiah41:13 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi Mvidi Mukulu webe, ndi nkuambuluisha. Ndi nkuambila tshiakabidi ne: “Lekela kutshina. Nenkuambuluishe.”" 
Isaiah41:14 Izrayele, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, lekela kutshina. Bakuabu badi bakumona bu kantu kakese, bu kishi kadibu mua kudiata ku makasa. Kadi meme nkayanyi nenkuambuluishe. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, nenkusungidile." 
Isaiah41:15 Ndi nkuenza, bu tshiamu tshipiatshipia tshitue tshia kubundulula natshi buloba. Wewe neubundulule natshi mikuna minene, uyilandakaje. Neuboze natshi mikuna mikese, mudibu baboza bisosa." 
Isaiah41:16 Neupepule mikuna, lupepele neluye nayi! Mvunde neayitangalaje. Kadi wewe neusanke, bualu meme ndi Maweja-Nangila webe, ndi nkusankisha. Neungele tuasakidila muvule, bua bidi Wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele ukuenzela." 
Isaiah41:17 Bapele ne bakengi, badi bakeba mayi, kabayi baapeta. Nyota idi ibumisha muminu. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngitaba ku dilomba diabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bena Izrayele, tshiena mbalekela to." 
Isaiah41:18 Nempatule misulu ya mayi, pa mikuna idi kayiyi ne mitshi. Nempatule mishimi ya mayi muinshi mu bibandabanda. Tshipela netshiandamuke dijiba dia mayi. Buloba buume nebuandamuke muaba udi mayi mavule." 
Isaiah41:19 Nenkune mu tshipela mitshi ya sedre ne ndunga, mitshi ya mirte ne ya olive. Mu ditunga divua kadiyi mayi, nenkunemu mitshi ya siprese, mitshi ya pine ne mikuabu kabidi." 
Isaiah41:20 Nenku bantu bonsu nebamone, bonsu nebamanye, bonsu nebajadike, nebajingulule ne: Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, ke udi muenze malu onsu aa. Yeye ke udi wandamuna malu." 
Isaiah41:21 Maweja-Nangila, mukalenga wa Yakobe, udi wamba ne: Nuenu mvidie ya bukua matunga, fikayi, nudilumbuluile, nutuleje binuvua benze." 
Isaiah41:22 Semenayi pabuipi, tuambilayi malu anuvua bakumbaje. Nutumvuije malu akadi mamane kuenzeka, bua tuetu kuelaku meji. Tumanyishayi nansha malu adi kaayi manji kuenzeka. Nanku netumanye bidi mua kuenzeka." 
Isaiah41:23 Eyowa, tuambilayi malu avuavua kuenzeka bidimu bidi kumpala. Nanku netumanye bushiwa, munudi nuudie milelela. Enzayiku, nansha malu mimpe nansha mabi, bua tuetu kujadika munudi mvidie, tushale kunutshina." 
Isaiah41:24 Kadi nudi tuntu tua patupu. Binudi nuenza bidi bia tshianana. Badi banusungula bu mvidie yabu, ndi mbadiwula kashidi." 
Isaiah41:25 Ndi mujule muntu, ufumina luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Muntu awu udi ufika luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga. Badi batela dina diende, luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Udi udiatakaja balombodi ba maloba, mudibu badiata bitotshi, mudi mufumbi wa ngesu, udiata diima, udibeta." 
Isaiah41:26 Wakadianjila kutuambila bualu ebu, bua tuetu kubumanya nnganyi? Wakabuamba kumpala, bua tuetu kujadika ne: “Ke muntu uvua mumanye bualu,” nnganyi? Bulelela, kakuena nansha umue wa kunudi, nuenu mvidie, uvua mubumanye. Kabena banumvue bamba bualu." 
Isaiah41:27 Meme ndi wa kumpala, wakadianjila kuambila Siyone bualu. Bualu mvua mutume muntu mu Yerushalayime, bua kutuadila bantu lumu lua disanka lua ne: “Bana benu, bakadi bapingana!”" 
Isaiah41:28 Meme mvua mutangile, kadi tshiena mumone mvidie. Munkatshi mua mvidie yonsu, kamuena udi mua kufila meji, undi mua kukonka bualu, udi mua kungandamuna." 
Isaiah41:29 Bonsu buabu badi tshianana. Bidibu benza bidi patupu. Mvidie yabu idi lupepele, kayiyi ne bukole nansha bukese." 
Isaiah42:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tangila muntu wanyi. Ndi mumukoleshe. Ndi mumunange, mumusungule. Ndi mumuwuje ne Mueyelu wanyi, bua kumanyishaye bukua bisamba bilenga bindi mulongoluele bantu." 
Isaiah42:2 Yeye kena wela lubila, kena ujuula mutoyi. Diyi diende kabakudiumvua mu misesu minene." 
Isaiah42:3 Tshituuta tshitshibuke, kena utshikosa. Kapia katshifuima, kena mua kukajima. Kadi udi utuadila bantu bilenga bindi mubalongoluele." 
Isaiah42:4 Kakuteketa mu maboku, kakupungila, too ne muabuejaye malu malenga pa buloba bujima. Bantu ba ku matunga a kule, badi amu bamuindila, bua abalongeshe." 
Isaiah42:5 Maweja-Nangila udi mufuke diulu ne bionsu bidimu, udi muteke buloba, ne bionsu bidi bimuenekamu, udi mupeshe bantu muoyi, upesha bonsu badi basapu Mueyelu wende. Ke yeye udi wambila muntu uvuaye musungule ne:" 
Isaiah42:6 “Meme Maweja-Nangila, mvua mukubikile, bua ukumbaje meji andi nawu. Meme ndi nkuambuluisha. Mvua mukuenze, bua utuadile bantu bupole, ukumbaje bimvua mulaye bantu, wikale butoke munkatshi mua matunga." 
Isaiah42:7 Neutabeje bampofu. Neupatuishe bena lukanu mu nzubu wa lukanu, muaba udibu basomba, bindile mu miidima.”" 
Isaiah42:8 Ndi Maweja-Nangila, ke dina dianyi meme. Tshiena mpesha bakuabu butumbi budi bunkumbanyine. Lumu ludi lungakanyine, tshiena ndupesha mvidie to." 
Isaiah42:9 Malu amvua munumanyishe kumpala, akadi mamane kuenzeka. Ndi nnuambila malu mapiamapia mpindiewu. Ndi nnumanyishawu, kaayi manji kuenzeka." 
Isaiah42:10 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu mupiamupia. Nuenu badi benda mu mayi manene, nuenu bifukibua bidi biendamu, ne nuenu bantu badi base kulekule, numutumbishe too ne ku ndekelu kua buloba." 
Isaiah42:11 Bantu bimbile Mvidi Mukulu misambu, mu tshipela ne mu bimenga biatshi, ne mu mitanda idi bena Kedare base. Bena mu tshimenga tshia Sela, bele tunkunduluila! Bele mbila ya disanka, pa mitu ya mikuna!" 
Isaiah42:12 Bantu badi base kule, batumbishe Maweja-Nangila, bamusamune ne meyi makole!" 
Isaiah42:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wenda usemena kumpala, bu tshilobu tshia bukitu mu mvita. Udi udilongolola bua kuluangana. Udi utua tshisamu tshia mvita, utshimuna bena lukuna bende." 
Isaiah42:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi mushale mupuwe matuku mavule. Tshiena muandamune ku dilomba dia bantu banyi. Mpindiewu nengele mbila, bu mukaji udi pa lulelu, upuyakana, weyela ne dikenga." 
Isaiah42:15 Nembutule mikuna minene ne mikese, nengumishe bisosa ne mitshi bidipu. Nengumishe misulu, ishale tshipela. Majiba a mayi neakame." 
Isaiah42:16 Kadi nendudike bantu banyi, batshivua bashale bampofu, mu njila udibu katshia kabayi bayile. Nenkudimune miidima, yenze munya, bua bantu bende bimpe. Ndi ndandakaja miaba idi biina. Ke bindi musue kuenza. Nembikumbaje, tshiyi ndekela." 
Isaiah42:17 Kadi bonsu badi batekemena kudi mvidie, badi batekemena mpingu ivuabu basonge, bayibikila ne: “Nudi mvidie yetu”, bafue bundu, banyeme lubilu." 
Isaiah42:18 Nuenu bena mapapa, telejayi bimpe. Nuenu bampofu, tangilayi." 
Isaiah42:19 Nganyi udi mpofu? Amu nuenu bantu banyi! Nganyi udi ne mapapa? Amu nuenu bandi ntuma! — Eyowa, udi mpofu, bu muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu utuma, nnganyi? Udi ne mapapa, bu muntu wa Maweja-Nangila, nnganyi?" 
Isaiah42:20 Nuenu nudi bamone malu a bungi, kadi kanuena bavuluke bualu nansha bumue to. Matshi enu adi mimpe, kadi kanuena numvua bualu nansha bumue to." 
Isaiah42:21 Maweja-Nangila uvua musue kupandisha bantu bende. Ke pavuaye ubalongesha mikenji yende minene mimpe. 
Isaiah42:22 Kadi mona bantu bende, bavua babanyenge bintu, babapawule bikuabu. Bena diende bonsu bakadi bena lukanu. Bavua bahele mu nzubu wa lukanu, babatangile bu bintu binyenga mu mvita. Bavua baye nabu ku bukole, kakuyi wa kutua nkanana, kakuyi uvua mua kubulula mukana ne: “Nubapingaje kutudi.”" 
Isaiah42:23 Wa kunudi udi uteleja bualu ebu bimpe nnganyi? Bualu ebu kabuena bunulongesha anyi? Kabuena bunuleja tshia kuenza anyi? 
Isaiah42:24 — Uvua mufile bena Izrayele, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, kudi bantu bua babapawule, babanyenge bintu biabu, nnganyi? Maweja-Nangila ke uvua muenze nanku. Yeye utuvua badiombole. Izrayele kavua musue kulonda njila uvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje. Kavua muteleje diyi diende." 
Isaiah42:25 Ke pavua Maweja-Nangila muleje bantu bende bunene bua tshiji tshiende, mubakengeshe ne mvita. Mvita kuosha bena Izrayele nseke yonsu. Kadi nanshabu kujingulula tshintu. Kapia kubosha, kubashidisha, kadi nanshabu kubuelela meji." 
Isaiah43:1 Izrayele, mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila udi wakula! Yeye ke mufuki webe. Yeye uvua mukufumbe wewe, tshisamba tshia Yakobe. Udi ukuambila ne: “Kutshinyi, bualu nenkusungidile! Ndi mukubikile, mutele dina diebe! Udi muntu wanyi meme!" 
Isaiah43:2 Pawapitshila mu mayi, nengikale nebe. Pawasabuka misulu, kuena udiinamu to. Pawikala mupitshile mu kapia, kuena upiamu. Ndimi ya kapia kayena ikosha." 
Isaiah43:3 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi Mvidi Mukulu webe. Meme ndi Wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele. Ndi mukusungididi webe. “Ndi mfila Ejipitu, bu biuma bua kukupikula; mfila Kushe ne Seba, bua kubashintakaja nebe." 
Isaiah43:4 Bualu udi ne mushinga ku mesu anyi. Kakuena mukuabu, amu wewe! Meme ndi mukunange. Nenku, ndi mfila bantu bakuabu pa mutu pebe. Bisamba bikuabu nembishintakaje nebe." 
Isaiah43:5 Kutshinyi to. Meme ndi nebe. Nempingaje bana bebe mu ditunga, badi luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Nensangishe bebe bonsu, bafume kudi diba dibuelela." 
Isaiah43:6 Nengambile badi ku mutu ne: ‘Nubalekele, bapingane kuabu.’ Nengambile badi kuinshi ne: ‘Kanukandamanyi nabu to.’ Nufike ne bana banyi ba balume, badi ku mutu kuaka. Nufike ne bana banyi ba bakaji, badi ku ndekelu kua buloba." 
Isaiah43:7 Nufike ne bonsu badibu binyike dina dianyi, bonsu bandi mufuke, bonsu bandi musonge, bandi muenze, bualu bobu badi baleja butumbi buanyi.”" 
Isaiah43:8 Nufike ne bantu aba ku tshilumbu. Bualu badi ne mesu, kabayi bamona tshintu, badi ne matshi, kabayi bumvue bualu." 
Isaiah43:9 Matunga onsu adisange pamue. Bantu badikungije. Kadi wa ku mvidie yonsu udi utumanyisha malu adi ne bua kuenzeka nnganyi? Udi mua kutumvuija malu akadi mamane kuenzeka nnganyi? Nanku atuleje bantu badi mua kutujadikila ne: mvidie awu mmukumbaje bivuaye muambe. Atuleje mudiye mubinge. Bajadiki aba bamuteleje, bua batujadikile ne: mvidie awu udi wamba malu malelela." 
Isaiah43:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bajadiki ba malu anyi, ke nuenu bantu banyi. Nudi bena mudimu banyi, bandi musungule. Dijinga dianyi didi ne: numanye, nuitabe, nujingulule ne: Meme ndi nganyi. Kumpala kuanyi, kakuvua mvidie, panyima panyi, kakuakuikala mvidie mukuabu." 
Isaiah43:11 Maweja-Nangila, ke meme, ke meme nkayanyi. Meme tshiyiku, kakuena musungidi to." 
Isaiah43:12 Meme ke udi unupandisha. Meme ke uvua mumanyishe bualu ebu kumpala. Ki mmvidie wa bikuabu bisamba uvua muenze nanku nansha! Nudi bajadike ne: meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu! 
Isaiah43:13 Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu kashidi. Muntu kakungenzeja malu ku bukole. Muntu kakukudimuna bindi ngenza to. 
Isaiah43:14 Maweja-Nangila, Wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, udi muvue kunusungidila, udi wamba ne: “Bu mundi mununange, ndi ntuma muntu ku Babilone, bua anunzuluile biibi bionsu. Nenku kuaka ku Babilone, mbila ya disanka neyandamuke miadi ne miyenga." 
Isaiah43:15 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, Mufuki wa Izrayele, Mukalenga webe.”" 
Isaiah43:16 Kale, Maweja-Nangila uvua mupande njila mu mayi manene. Uvua mupande muaba wa kupitshila mu mayi muondoke." 
Isaiah43:17 Kale, uvua muendeshe matempu a mvita ne nyama ya tubalu, bena mvita ne bilobu biabu. Bena mvita aba kufua, kabayi bajuka kabidi to. Badi bajimine, bu kapia kajima mu muendu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba mpindiewu ne:" 
Isaiah43:18 “Kanuedi meji ku malu adi mamane kupita. Kanutangidi bidi bishale panyima penu. 
Isaiah43:19 Bualu nengenze bualu bupiabupia. Bualu ebu bukadi bumueneka. Kanuena nubumone anyi? Eyowa, nempande njila mu tshipela. Mu buloba buatuke abu, nempatulemu misulu." 
Isaiah43:20 Nyama ya muitu, mibuabua ne kasonga-nyunyi, neinganyishe bikole, bua pandi mupatule mayi mu tshipela, ne misulu miaba miume. Bualu ndi musue kupesha bantu, bandi musungule, mayi a kunua." 
Isaiah43:21 Nenku bantu bandi muenze, nebumvuije bakuabu malu manene andi muenze.”" 
Isaiah43:22 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe Izrayele, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, kuena muntendelele to. Meme nkavua mukutonde!" 
Isaiah43:23 Kuena mundambule meme, kuena mungoshile bana ba mikoku to. Unudi banemeke ne milambu yenu, ki mmeme to. Meme tshiena mukubueje mu bupika, bua kukuenzela malu ku bukole, bua wewe kundambula milambu. Tshiena mukutonde pa kukulomba milambu ya manananshi." 
Isaiah43:24 Uuvua musumbile mienge ya mupuya muimpe ku mushinga mukole, ki mmmeme to! Mafuta a nyama yebe ya milambu, kuena mungukutshishe meme nawu to! Apu, wewe udi mungenze meme mupika webe ne bilema biebe. Buenzayi buebe ke bualu budi buntonda!" 
Isaiah43:25 Kadi, nansha nanku, ndi nkufuila amu luse bua buntomboji buebe. Tshiena musue kuvuluka kabidi bilema biebe. Ke mundi meme nanku." 
Isaiah43:26 Tuye nebe ku kabadi bonsu babidi. Umfunde bua tshilema tshindi muenze. Umvuije tshilumbu tshijima, uleje muudi mubinge." 
Isaiah43:27 Nkambua webe wa kumpala ukavua mupile. Ke mudi kabidi balombodi ba ditunga diebe bantombokele lelu. 
Isaiah43:28 Nenku, ndi mudiombole batuangaji badi bakuata mudimu mu nzubu wanyi. Mvua mubutule tshisamba tshia Yakobe. Ndi muanyishe, bua bena lukuna abu bapende bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah44:1 Kadi mpindiewu, teleja, wewe tshisamba tshia Yakobe. Wewe Izrayele, muena mudimu wanyi, undi musungule." 
Isaiah44:2 Teleja tshindi nkuambila: Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mukufuke, ndi mukuenze munda mua mamuebe, kabayi banji kukulela. Meme ndi nkuambuluisha: Kutshinyi, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, muena mudimu wanyi, Yeshurune undi musungule." 
Isaiah44:3 Bualu nempuekeshe mayi mu ditunga didi kadiyi mayi. Nempatule tusulu mu buloba buume. Nengitshikije Mueyelu wanyi pa bana bebe. Nengele ndelanganyi yebe lupemba. 
Isaiah44:4 Ndelanganyi yebe neitoloke, idiunde, bu bisosa bidi ne mayi, bu mitshi ya pepliye, idi mimene ku mielelu ya misulu." 
Isaiah44:5 Diba adi, muntu neambe ne: ‘Ndi muntu wa Maweja-Nangila.’ Mukuabu neajinge, bua bamuinyike dina dia Yakobe. Munga neafunde pa tshianza tshiende ne: ‘Ntshia Maweja-Nangila.’ Neasanke bua kubuela mu tshisumbu tshia bena Izrayele.”" 
Isaiah44:6 Maweja-Nangila, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, udi uludika, ulama bantu bende. Yeye ke Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu. Udi ukuambila, wewe Izrayele, ne: “Meme ndi wa kumpala, ndi kabidi wa ndekelu. Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu meme." 
Isaiah44:7 Padi mvidie kampanda wela meji ne: tudi nende mumue, adileje apa, akule! Angumvuije bivuaye muenze. Uvua mumanyishe ku kale malu avua ne bua kuenzeka anyi? Udi mutuambile malu adi kaayi manji kuenzeka anyi?" 
Isaiah44:8 Nuenu bantu banyi, kanutshinyi, kanuikadi ne bowa. Nkadi mumane kunumanyisha kale, nkadi mumane kunusokoluela, malu adi ne bua kuenzeka. Ke bualu bunudi bamanye bimpe. Ke bualu bunudi mua kujadika nuenu mene. Kudi Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu anyi? Too, kakuena Dibue dikuabu. Meme tshiena mumanye nansha dimue.”" 
Isaiah44:9 Bantu bonsu badi benza mpingu, bayitendelela, mbantu tshianana. Bintu biabu bidibu banange, kabiena bibambuluisha nansha kakese. Wewe muebeje batendeledi ba mvidie, bivua mvidie yabu yenza, nebafue bundu. Bualu ki mbanji kumona, ki mbanji kumvua, bualu buvua mvidie wabu muenze." 
Isaiah44:10 Kuenza mvidie, kufuimba lupingu ludi kaluyi mua kukuambuluisha, mmudimu wa muntu mutshimbakane!" 
Isaiah44:11 Bantu bonsu badi batendelela mvidie, nebafue bundu. Badi basonga mpingu, badi amu bantu. Badisangishe bonsu pamue, badileje bonsu apa: nebakuatshike bowa, nebafue bundu, pa kumona mvidie kayi wenza bualu!" 
Isaiah44:12 Mufudi udi ukosa tshitupa tshia tshiamu. Udi utshiela mu kapia, utshifula ne ngindu. Udi ukuata mudimu muende muonsu. Kadi nzala idi imusuma, udi upanga bukole. Padiye upua muoyi bua kunua mayi, udi upungila bikole." 
Isaiah44:13 Musongi wa mpingu ya mitshi, udi uteka tshipimu pa mutshi, ufunda tshimfuanyi tshia lupingu ne lupemba. Udi utuadija mudimu ne ntapu wa mutshi, pashishe ubulunguja ne dikangu. Udi usonga lupingu luleja mpala wa muntu, mpala muimpe mutambe. Kadi badi baluteka mu nzubu, kaluyi lunyunga." 
Isaiah44:14 Badi bakosa mutshi wa sedre, basungula mutshi wa lusanga, nansha wa terebinte. Mitshi eyi ivua kale mu ditu pamue ne mikuabu. Bumue badi mua kukuna mutshi wa pine, bua mvula aumeneshe." 
Isaiah44:15 Mutshi ewu udi wambuluisha bantu, bua kutemeshabu nawu kapia. Nkunyi yawu badi bayota kapia, balamba nayi biakudia, benza nayi mvidie, udibu batuila mpala panshi. Badi benza nayi lupingu, ludibu batendelela." 
Isaiah44:16 Badi bela mu kapia tshitupa tshia mutshi awu. Badi balamba natshi munyinyi, badia buukuta. Badi batshiota mu kapia, bamba ne: “Eyi, tudi tuota kapia ketu. Ndisanka kaayi, patudi tumona kapia!”" 
Isaiah44:17 Ne tshitupa tshikuabu tshia mutshi ewu, badi basonga natshi mvidie. Badi badisongela lupingu, bimana kumpala kualu, bantendelela, bamba ne: “Udi mvidie wetu, tupandishe!”" 
Isaiah44:18 Bantu aba badi mu mitu mitupu. Kabena bajingulula tshidibu benza to. Badi ne mesu mabuikila. Kabena basue kumona bimpe. Lungenyi luabu kaluena lukeba bulelela. 
Isaiah44:19 Muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kena wela meji. Muntu nansha umue kena ne lubatshi, nansha ne lungenyi lua kuamba ne: “Mvua muoshe tshitupa tshia mutshi ewu. Mu mbabula, meme kulamba biakudia, kuosha munyinyi undi ndia ewu. Kadi ne tshitupa tshia mutshi tshidi tshishala, ndi mua kuenza mvidie udibu batendelela anyi? Akia! Nkadi nginamina tshitupa tshia mutshi!”" 
Isaiah44:20 Bivua mua kuikala bimpe, batendelele nansha butu! Muoyi wabu mmubatshimbakaje, mubadinge. Mvidie wabu kena ubasungidila to. Kadi bobu mene kabena badiamba ne: “Bushuwa tshitudi natshi mu bianza, tshidi amu mvidie wa dishima.”" 
Isaiah44:21 “Wewe Izrayele, tshisamba tshia Yakobe, vuluka bimpe ne: Udi muntu wanyi. Ndi mukufuke, bua unkuatshile mudimu. Izrayele, tshiena nkupua muoyi to." 
Isaiah44:22 Nkadi mukupule buntomboji buebe, ne bilema biebe, bu mudi divuba dipite lubilu, dijimine. Ndi mukupandishi webe. Pingana kundi.”" 
Isaiah44:23 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila udi muenze bualu. Diulu, leja disanka diebe patoke. Bidi mu kandondu ka buloba, imbayi ne meyi makole. Nuenu mitshi idi mu metu, nuenu kabidi mikuna, elayi mbila ya disanka. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi upandisha bantu bende. Udi uleja lumu luende, padiye usungidila bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah44:24 Izrayele, Maweja-Nangila udi ukupandisha, udi mukuenze munda mua mamuebe, kabayi banji kukulela, ke udi ukuambila ne: “Meme ndi mufuki wa bionsu bidipu. Meme nkayanyi ndi muteke diulu, mutenteke buloba, tshiyi ne diambuluisha dia muntu." 
Isaiah44:25 Kadi mpindiewu malu onsu, adi bena mbuku bamba, ndi ngakudimuna a patupu. Bonsu badi bamanyisha malu atshidi kumpala, ndi mbapangisha malu abu. Ndi mbenga meji a bena meji, ndi ndeja mudi meji abu a bantu batshimbakane." 
Isaiah44:26 Kadi ndi nkumbaja, bivua bantu banyi bamba. Ndi nkumbaja malu avua bantu, bamvua mutume, bamane kumanyisha. Ndi njadika ne: ‘Bantu nebasombe tshiakabidi mu Yerushalayime. Nengasulule bimana bia tshimenga.’ Ndi ngamba kabidi ne: ‘Nebasulule bimenga bia bena Yuda.’" 
Isaiah44:27 Udi utumina mayi manene diyi ne: ‘Kamayi’, udi umisha mayi, udi amu meme." 
Isaiah44:28 Ndi ngambila Koreshe ne: ‘Wewe ke mulami wa mikoku undi musungule. Wewe neukumbaje malu onsu, andi meme musue. Neutume diyi, bua bibakulule Yerushalayime, basulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu.’ ”" 
Isaiah45:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila Koreshe, muntu udiye mujidile ne: “Ndi mutue ku tshiebe, bua utekeshe matunga onsu, unyenge bakalenga mamfumu abu, bakunzuluile biibi, ubuele mu bimenga bionsu." 
Isaiah45:2 Meme ndi ngenda kumpala kuebe, bua kumusha bionsu bidi mua kukujingakaja, kutshibula biibi bia tshiamu tshikunze, kuzaza milonda ya kupayika nayi biibi." 
Isaiah45:3 Ndi nkupesha lupetu, ne biuma bivuabu basokoke. Nenku neumanye mundi Maweja-Nangila. Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ndi nkuangata bu muena mudimu wanyi." 
Isaiah45:4 Bu mundi munange bantu banyi bena Izrayele, bena mudimu banyi bandi musungule, ndi nkuangata bu muena mudimu wanyi. Nenku meme ndi nkupesha lumu, nansha wewe kuyi mummanye." 
Isaiah45:5 Maweja-Nangila ke meme, kakuena mukuabu to. Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu meme. Kuena mummanye to. Kadi ndi nkuangata ku mudimu." 
Isaiah45:6 Bantu ba ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne ba ku luseke ludidi dibuelela, nebamanye ne: Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, amu Meme Maweja-Nangila. Kakuena mukuabu to." 
Isaiah45:7 Ndi ngenza munya, mfuka miidima kabidi. Ndi mpetesha diakalenga, mfila ne dikenga. Eyowa, ke Meme Maweja-Nangila, udi wenza malu onsu aa." 
Isaiah45:8 Diulu, lokesha lumuma! Bu mudi mvula upueka mu mavuba, lupandu lufume mulu, lupueka pa buloba. Buloba bunzuluke, buleje lupandu, bupatule malu mimpe. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mfuka bionsu abi.”" 
Isaiah45:9 Muntu udi ukimina kuelangana mpata ne udi mumufuke, mmuena diakabi. Udi amu luesu lua patupu, lufuanangane ne mikuabu yonsu. Diima didi mua kukonka, udi udifumba ne: “Tshiudi wenza ntshinyi?” Luesu ludi mua kuambila mufumbi ne: “Kuena mumanye mudimu webe, anyi?”"
