Isaiah45:10 Muena diakabi mmuntu udi ukimina kuebeja tatuende ne: “Udi mumfikishe ku bantu nenku bua tshinyi?” Muena diakabi mmuntu udi ukonka mamuende ne: “Tshiudi mundelele ntshinyi?” 
Isaiah45:11 Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, udi muenze muntu, udi unukonka mpindiewu ne: “Nuenu nudi mua kungela nkonku, pa malu adi atangila bana banyi anyi? Nuenu nudi mua kumfundila tshindi ne bua kuenza anyi?" 
Isaiah45:12 Meme ndi muenze buloba, mufuke ne bantu badi basombapu. Meme ndi mubalule diulu. Ndi ntumina mabulunge a kulu ne mitotu diyi." 
Isaiah45:13 Meme Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu ndi ngamba ne: Meme kabidi ndi mutume Koreshe, muntu unudi bamanye, bua anusungidile. Nendandakaje njila yonsu kumpala kuende. Yeye ke wibakulula tshimenga tshianyi tshia Yerushalayime. Neanyishe bua bantu banyi bavuabu bakuate, bapingane kuabu! Kena ulomba nansha dikuta, nansha mabuejila!”" 
Isaiah45:14 Izrayele, Maweja-Nangila udi ukuambila ne: tshionsu tshidi bena Ejipitu bapeta ku mudimu wabu, makasa adi bena Kushe, nansha bantu bale ba kafiondu ba mu Seba bapeta, bionsu ebi nebipitshile muebe, nebikale bintu biebe. Bantu aba nebakulonde, bamane kubasuika ne nkanu. Nebadiele panshi kumpala kuebe, bakutondela ne: “Mvidi Mukulu udi amu kuebe. Kena munga muaba to.”" 
Isaiah45:15 Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, udi upandisha bantu, wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu udi udisokoka bulelela!" 
Isaiah45:16 Kadi mona benji ba mpingu: nebafue bundu, nebende bonsu biname mpala panshi, bu bantu bavuabu badinga." 
Isaiah45:17 Kadi bena Izrayele mbapete lupandu lua kashidi kudi Maweja-Nangila. Kabena bafue kabidi bundu. Kabena mua kubapepeja kudi muntu nansha umue. 
Isaiah45:18 Maweja-Nangila uvua mufuke diulu, ke Mvidi Mukulu uvua muenze buloba, mubusonge, mubushindike. Kadi kena mubutuke munda mutupu, mmubuenze bua bantu basepu. Mpindiewu udi wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila ke Meme! Kakuena mvidie mukuabu." 
Isaiah45:19 Meme tshiena muakule mu musokoku. Muaku wanyi kawena ufuma mu miidima. Tshiena mutumine ndelanganyi ya Yakobe diyi, bua inkebele muaba udi mutupu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba malu amu patoke. Malu onsu andi mmanyisha mmalelela. Ndi ngakumbaja.”" 
Isaiah45:20 Nuenu bena matunga makuabu, bavuabu kabayi bashipe, semenayi, nudisangishe, nusemene popamue. Bonsu bavua bafike ne mpingu yabu ya mitshi, nansha badi batendelela mvidie udi kayi mua kubasungidila, kabena ne lungenyi to." 
Isaiah45:21 Buelayi mu bipangu, nukebe tshinudi mua kuamba bua kudibingisha! Kadi uvua munumanyishe ku kale bidi bienzeka lelu nnganyi? Uvua mubisokolole bangabanga ne kuenzekabi nnganyi? Ki mmeme Maweja-Nangila anyi? Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu to, amu meme. Mvidi Mukulu wa diyi dimue, Mvidi Mukulu udi usungidilangana, kenaku, amu meme." 
Isaiah45:22 Nuenu badi basombe ku ndekelu kua buloba, fikayi kundi meme. Nennusungidile. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu ke meme! Kakuena mukuabu to." 
Isaiah45:23 Bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu bulelela, ndi nditshipa ne: nenkumbaje malaya anyi. Ndi ndaya ne muoyi umue ne: bantu bonsu nebatue binu kumpala kuanyi. Nebaditshipe bua kundamata kashidi." 
Isaiah45:24 Nebambe ne: “Amu kudi Maweja-Nangila nkayende, ke kutudi tupeta bukole, ke kutudi mua kutshimuna.” Bonsu bavua banduishe, nebafike kundi ne bundu." 
Isaiah45:25 Kadi nengambuluishe ndelanganyi yonsu ya Izrayele, bua bapete tshidibu ne bua kupeta. Nanku nebantumbishe." 
Isaiah46:1 Mvidie Bele kena kabidi ne bukole to. Mvidie Nebo udi mufuane kudishinda. Nanku mpingu yabu badi bayiteka panyima pa nyama idi yambula majitu. Badi bayambula bu mudibu bambula majitu. Idi ne bujitu bunene, panyima pa nyama eyi ikadi mipungile." 
Isaiah46:2 Mvidie idi iteketa, mifuane kudishinda panshi. Kayena mua kusungidila mpingu yayi. Badi baya ne mvidie mene ayi mu bupika." 
Isaiah46:3 Nuenu bena Izrayele, ntelejayi, nuenu bena Yakobe badi bashala ne muoyi, nuenu bandi mulame katshia banulela, katshia nuamona diba." 
Isaiah46:4 Nengikale amu nnulama nenku too ne munuakulakaja. Nennulame bo bo bo, too ne munuatoka nsuki. Meme ke uvua munuambule kale, ntshidi amu nnuambula ne ku lelu. Eyowa, nuenu ke bandi mulame. Nennusungidile." 
Isaiah46:5 Nenumfuanyikije ne nganyi? Nenungidikije ne nganyi? Nenumfuanyikije ne nganyi, bua tuetu kufuanangana nende?" 
Isaiah46:6 Bantu badi batula mpetu yabu yonsu. Badi bapima nkanu mitoke ya mushinga mukole, ne biamu bia mpawungi. Badi bangata nsenda wa mpawungi ku mudimu, bua abafudile mvidie, udibu batendelela, udibu bakukuila." 
Isaiah46:7 Pashishe badi bambula mvidie wabu pa makaya abu, baya kumuteka pa muaba wende. Mvidie udi ushalapu, kayi unyunga. Nansha bobu bamubikila, kakuandamuna to. Kena usungidila muntu udi mu dikenga. Lupandu kaluena kule to" 
Isaiah46:8 Nuenu bantomboji, nuvuluke bimvua muenze kale. Nuelangane meji bimpe, nudilengeje." 
Isaiah46:9 Nuvuluke malu enu a kale. Meme ke Mvidi Mukulu, kakuena mukuabu. Kakuena Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu udi bu meme." 
Isaiah46:10 Ku tshibangidilu tshia bionsu, ndi mudianze kuamba tshindi ngipatshila. Ndi mudianze kuamba amu ku kale, bivua kabiyi bianji kuenzeka. Ndi ngamba ne: Tshindi ngela meji, ndi ntshikumbaja. Tshionsu tshindi musue, ndi ntshienza." 
Isaiah46:11 Ndi mbikila nyunyi mudianganyi, ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Ke muntu wakumbaja bionsu bindi mujadike. Ndi mmubikila ku ditunga dia kule. Mundi ngamba amu, ke muenzekabi! Mumvua mujadike, ke muvuabi bikumbana." 
Isaiah46:12 Nuenu bantu badi bateketa mu maboku, nuenu badi bela meji ne: malu andi mulaye atshidi kule, ntelejayi." 
Isaiah46:13 Malu aa kaena kabidi nenu kule to. Akadi pa kukumbana amu mpindiewu! Lupandu kaluena lunengakana. Meme mene ndi mfika nalu mu Siyone. Eyowa, ndi ntuadila bena Izrayele tshitupa tshia butumbi buanyi." 
Isaiah47:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Wewe Babilone, tuluka mu nkuasa webe wa lumu. Somba mu lupuishi. Eyowa, somba panshi pa buloba, bualu kutshiena mukalenga mukaji to. Udi mujimije mianzu yebe, kabatshiena bakuinyika ne: “Babilone, mukaji mulengele”, “Babilone, nsongakaji muimpe”." 
Isaiah47:2 Angata mabue abidi a kupela nawu, upele bukula. Umbushe tshilamba tshidi tshikubuikila mpala. Ubandishe muntumpu uudi muele, uleje bantu mikolu yebe, bua umone mua kusabuka musulu." 
Isaiah47:3 Lekela kumvua bundu. Leja bantu, bamone biudi musokoke. Meme nendisombuele, muntu nansha umue kayi unkandika." 
Isaiah47:4 Ndi Musungidi wa bantu banyi. Dina dianyi mMaweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu, wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah47:5 Wewe Babilone, somba talalaa, puwa. Sokoma mu miidima, bualu udi mujimije muanzu webe wa “Mukalenga mukaji wa makalenga mangi.”" 
Isaiah47:6 Mvua mufikile bantu banyi munda. Nenku meme kubadiwula. Meme kubafila mu bianza biebe. Kadi kuvua ne luse nansha lukese. Bakulakaje mene, uvua mubakengeshe bikole." 
Isaiah47:7 Uvua uditangila wewe bu mukalenga mukaji, uvua ne bua kudia bumfumu kashidi mu bantu. Kadi kuvua muele meji bimpe, ku malu avua enzeka diba adi. Kuvua nansha muele meji, ku bivua ne bua kuenzeka to." 
Isaiah47:8 Nenku teleja mpindiewu, wewe mulunda wa masanka, udi musombe talalaa kuyi ne bualu. Wewe udi udiambila munda ne: “Meme tshiena ne undi mfuanangana nende! Tshiakuikala mukaji mukamba to. Tshiakufuisha bana banyi to.”" 
Isaiah47:9 Kadi makenga aa abidi, neakukuate amu dituku dimue. Neufuishe bana bebe ne bayebe amu diatshimue. Bionsu ebi nebikuenzekele, nansha baloji ne bena majimbu benza tshinyi ne ntshinyi, bua kukusungidila." 
Isaiah47:10 Uvua mutekemene lupandu, amu bua bibi biuvua wenza. Uvua wamba ne: “Muntu kena ummona”. Kadi budiambi buebe bua ne: Ndi mumanye, ndi ne lungenyi lutue, ke budi bukutshimbakaja! Ukadi wamba ne: “Meme tshiena ne undi tufuanangana nende!”" 
Isaiah47:11 Nenku, makenga neakukuate, audi kuyi mua kuepuka. Kabutu nekapone pambidi pebe, kaudi kuyi mua kunyema. Mvula wa tshipupu neakutokele diakamue, uudi kuyi muelele meji." 
Isaiah47:12 Wewe tungunuka ne mbuku yebe, enza anu malu ebe onsu a majimbu. Ke biuvua mulonge bikole, pautshivua muana. Bumue nebikuambuluishe! Bumue nebipate baluishi bebe!" 
Isaiah47:13 Udi upungila patupu, kuyi upeta tshintu, ukonka badi bamanye malu a mitotu. Bantu aba badi bakosolola diulu mu bitupa, bajoja mabulunge, bamanyisha ku ngondu ku ngondu bidi mua kukukuata, bamueneke, badileje tumone, bavue kukusungidila!" 
Isaiah47:14 Kapia nekaboshe bu bisosa. Ndimi ya kapia neibabutule. Kakakuikala kapia ka makala makese, kadibu mua kuosha diampa, nansha tshiota tshia nkunyi mikese, idibu mua kuota to!" 
Isaiah47:15 Ke muenzelabu bena mbuku bebe, bauvua wangata ne mushinga, bauvua ukonka matuku onsu bituadijile ku buana buebe. Nebaye bonsu, muntu yonsu mu wende njila, bakushiya. Muntu nansha umue kena ushala bua kukusungidila." 
Isaiah48:1 Nuenu tshisamba tshia Yakobe, telejayi. Nudi nudisua, bua panudi ne dina dia Izrayele, bua panudi ndelanganyi ya Yuda. Nudi nutshipa, nutela dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nutela Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele. Kadi kanuena nuditshipilamu, kanuena ne muoyi wa kukumbaja tshinudi nulaya ne mutshipu." 
Isaiah48:2 Nuenu nudi nudisua, bua padibu banuinyika ne: “Bena tshimenga tshijidila.” Nudi nuditemba nuamba ne: tudi tunemenena kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, udibu binyika ne: “Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu.” Kadi telejayi bualu ebu:" 
Isaiah48:3 Mvua munumanyishe kale malu avua ne bua kuenzeka. Mvua munulayewu, mvua munumanyishewu. Pashishe musangu umue meme kuakumbaja!" 
Isaiah48:4 Kadi ndi mukumanye, muudi muena tshitunu, muudi tshisamba tshidi tshitomboka, tshisamba tshia mutu mukole bu tshiamu." 
Isaiah48:5 Meme kudianza kukuambila malu aa onsu, kaayi manji kukukuata. Meme kukulejawu, kaayi manji kumueneka. Nanku kuambi ne: “Lupingu luanyi ke ludi luenza bualu ebu. Mvidie wanyi wa mutshi, nansha wa tshiamu tshikunze, ke udi ukumbaja bualu ebu.”" 
Isaiah48:6 Nuenu nuvua bumvue tshimvua mudianze kuamba. Nudi bajadike mpindiewu ne: bionsu bivua amu bikumbane mumvua muambe. Kabiena nanku anyi? Ndi nshima anyi? Kadi bituadije ku lelu, ndi nnumanyisha malu mapiamapia, amvua mulame munda, audi kuyi muelele meji." 
Isaiah48:7 Ebu ki mbualu bua kale to. Malu aa neamueneke amu mpindiewu. Kuvua mumvue lumu luawu kumpala kua dituku dia lelu, bua kuambi ne: tukadi bamane kumanya bualu ebu." 
Isaiah48:8 Bushuwa kanuvua bateleje, kanuvua basue kumanya, kanuvua bateye matshi bua kumvua. Ndi munumanye ne: nudi bena lunsonge, biangatshile ku buana buenu. Bonsu badi bamanye munudi “bantomboji”." 
Isaiah48:9 Kadi bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu, tshiena mua kulonda tshiji tshianyi. Ndi musue bua bantu banemeke dina dianyi. Ke mundi nnufuila luse. Tshiena musue kunubutula." 
Isaiah48:10 Mvua mukutete. Tshiena mukutete mu kapia, bu mudibu bateta tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Kadi mvua mukupitshishe mu makenga." 
Isaiah48:11 Pandi muenze nanku, bidi amu bua lumu luanyi, eyowa, amu bua lumu luanyi. Bualu tshiena musue bua bapepeje dina dianyi. Tshiena musue bua bantu bakuabu bangate lumu ludi luanyi meme." 
Isaiah48:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tshisamba tshia Yakobe, teleja, wewe Izrayele undi mubikile, teya matshi. Ndi wa momumue matuku onsu, ndi wa kumpala, ne kabidi wa ndekelu." 
Isaiah48:13 Ndi mushindike buloba ne bianza bianyi meme. Ndi mbalula ne diulu. Pandi mbikila diulu ne buloba, diakamue bidi bimueneka kundi." 
Isaiah48:14 Bena Izrayele, kungilayi muaba umue, telejayi bonsu buenu: Ndi ne mulunda wanyi, neakumbaje meji andi muelele Babilone. Neakuate mudimu, bua bena Babilone bumvue mundi ne bukole. Kadi wa munkatshi muenu, uvua munumanyishe bualu ebu nnganyi? Kakuena nansha umue." 
Isaiah48:15 Kadi meme nkavua mubuambe. Meme nkayanyi, mvua mubikile muntu ewu. Meme kumufikisha kunu. Nanku tshionsu tshidiye mutuadije, neatshikumbaje." 
Isaiah48:16 Semenayi pabuipi nanyi, bua nuteleje bualu ebu: mvua ngamba malu onsu patoke, bituadijile ku tshibangidilu. Kabidi katshia malu aa abanga, udi wakumbaja ke meme. (Kadi mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke udi untuma, umpesha Mueyelu wende )." 
Isaiah48:17 Wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, Maweja-Nangila, uvua muangate bualu buenu ne manza abidi. Ke yeye udi ukuambila ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi Mvidi Mukulu webe. Meme ndi nkulongesha, malu adi ne bua kukulengelela. Meme ndi nya nebe mu njila uudi ne bua kulonda." 
Isaiah48:18 Eyi! bu wewe munteleje bimpe, bu wewe mukumbaje tshimvua mukutumine diyi! Nanku musulu wa diakalenga uvua mua kukupuekela. Lupandu luvua mua kufika kuudi, bungi bu mavuala a mayi manene!" 
Isaiah48:19 Ndelanganyi yebe ivua mua kuvulangana, bu tutete tua lusenga ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Meme tshivua mua kuyibenga. Dina diayi kadivua mua kujimina kumpala kuanyi.”" 
Isaiah48:20 Patukayi mu Babilone. Nyemayi lubilu lukole. Nuele mbila ya disanka, numanyishe bualu ebu, too ne ku nshikidilu kua buloba. Buambayi, bumanyishayi, nuambe ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuangate bualu bua Izrayele, muntu wende, ne manza abidi.”" 
Isaiah48:21 Udi mufile bena diende mu tshipela. Nyota kayena ibasuma. Bua kubanuisha, udi upatula mayi mu lubuebue. Udi upanda lubuebue, mayi kupatuka." 
Isaiah48:22 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: diakalenga edi, kadiena bua bantu badi kabayi bitaba, kabayi balama mikenji." 
Isaiah49:1 Nuenu bantu badi basomba kule, ntelejayi meme. Bisamba bia mu matunga a kule, teyayi matshi enu kundi. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumbikile meme, mamu kayi muanji kundela. Meme mutshikale munda mua mamu, ukavua munsungule bu muena mudimu wende." 
Isaiah49:2 Uvua muteke mukana muanyi muaku, uvua ufuanangana ne muele mutue. Udi undama, umbuikila ne tshianza tshiende. Udi mungenze mukete mutue, udiye usokoka mu tshibubu tshiende." 
Isaiah49:3 Kungambilaye ne: “Wewe Izrayele udi muena mudimu wanyi, undi muangate, bua kuleja lumu luanyi.”" 
Isaiah49:4 Kadi meme, mvua ngela meji ne: mvua mukuate mudimu wanyi tshianana, mvua mudibambe muanyi muonsu, kakuyi tshipeta nansha tshimue. Kadi Maweja-Nangila neapeshe bindi ne bua kupeta. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi neansankishe." 
Isaiah49:5 Mpindiewu, Maweja-Nangila udi ungambila nuwuaye mumfumbe, pantshivua munda mua mamuanyi, bua ngikale muena mudimu wende. Udi musue bua mpingaje ndelanganyi ya Yakobe kudiye, bua mmusangishile tshisamba tshia Izrayele. Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye bulenga bua mudimu wanyi. Amu Mvidi Mukulu udi umpesha bukole." 
Isaiah49:6 Yeye kungambila ne: “Kabiena bikumbana bua wikale muena mudimu wanyi anu bua kujula tshisamba tshia Yakobe, ne bua kupingaja kundi bena Izrayele badi bashale ne muoyi. Kadi ndi mukuteke kabidi butoke bua bukua bisamba, bua umone mua kupandisha bantu too ne ku ntengu ya buloba. ”" 
Isaiah49:7 Maweja-Nangila, wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele, udi mudiangatshile mu bianza tshilumbu tshia tshisamba tshiende. Mpindiewu, wewe udibu bapepeja, udibu badiombola, udi mupika wa bakalenga ba tshikisu, Maweja-Nangila udi ukuambila ne: “Pamona bakalenga muudi mupatuke mu bupika, nebajuke mu nkuasa yabu. Balombodi ba matunga pamonabu, nebadiele panshi bua kukunemekela.” Nebaleje mudibu banemeka Maweja-Nangila, wa tshijila wa Izrayele. Bualu yeye uvua mukusungule, udi ukumbaja kabidi bivuaye mulaye." 
Isaiah49:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Padi tshikondu tshia lupandu tshifika, nengandamune ku dindomba diebe. Pafika dituku dia kukupandisha, nenkuambuluishe. Mvua mukuteke, mukulame, bua ukumbaje bimvua mulaye bantu banyi. Ndi nnupingaja mu ditunga dienu, bua nusombe tshiakabidi miaba yonsu mu buloba bua tshijila, buvuabu banyangakaje lelu." 
Isaiah49:9 Ndi ngambila bena lukanu, bantu badi basomba mu miidima ne: ‘Patukayi, numone butoke.’ Nanku nebikale bu mikoku, idi idia bisosa ku muelelu wa njila, idi ipeta tshiakudia tshiayi pa mikuna yonsu." 
Isaiah49:10 Kabakufua kabidi nzala nansha nyota to. Nansha tshipepele tshia mu tshipela, nansha munya mukole kabiakubakuata to. Bualu Meme udi ubaludika, ndi mbananga. Nembanuishe mayi matalale a mu mpokolu." 
Isaiah49:11 Nengandamune mikuna mitumbuke, ishale njila ya kupitshila ku makasa. Nendongolole njila." 
Isaiah49:12 Tangilayi, mbobu aba bakadi bafika. Badi pa mayi manene, batumina kule. Bamue mbafumine ku mutu kua matunga, banga kudi diba dibuelela, bakuabu ku Ejipitu kuinshi kua ditunga.”" 
Isaiah49:13 Diulu, lejaku disanka diebe! Buloba, Sankaku! Mikuna minene, imbayi misambu ne meyi makole. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi usamba bantu bende. Bantu bende badi bakenga, udi ubafuila luse." 
Isaiah49:14 Yerushalayime uvua wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmundekele, Mfumuanyi mmumpue muoyi.”" 
Isaiah49:15 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wandamuna ne: Mukaji udi mua kupua muana udiye wamusha mabele muoyi anyi? Udi mua kubenga kunanga muana uvuaye muambule mu difu diende anyi? Bushuwa, misangu mikuabu udi mua kumupua muoyi, kadi meme tshiena nkupua muoyi to." 
Isaiah49:16 Bualu ndi mufunde dina diebe, Yerushalayime, mu bianza bianyi. Ndi mvuluka bimana biebe matuku onsu." 
Isaiah49:17 Bantu badi bafika bua bakuibakuluie, badi bendesha lukasa bua kufika. Diba adi bavua babumbula bimana biebe, bavua bakunyanga, badi basemena kule." 
Isaiah49:18 Banduluka, tangila ku nseke yebe, umone: bana bebe badi badisanga pamue bonsu, bakadi bafika kuudi. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: bu mundi Meme Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: Neusanke bua bantu bebe, amu bu mudi nsongakaji, udi ubuela mu dibaka, usanka bua mabue a mushinga mukole, ne mukaba muimpe udiye uvuala." 
Isaiah49:19 Bushuwa bavua banyanga ditunga diebe, badishiya kamuyi bantu. Kadi mpindiewu kadiakuikala bunene bukumbana, bua bungi bua bantu badi bavua kusombamu. Diba adi bavua bakubutula, nebende basemena kule." 
Isaiah49:20 Uvua udimona bu uvua kuyi ne bana. Kadi neunwue bana bebe bamba ne: “Meme tshiena ne muaba to. Semenaku kakese, bua mmone mua kusomba.”" 
Isaiah49:21 Nenku neudikonke ne: “Udi mumpe bana bonsu aba nnganyi? Nkavua mushale patupu, tshiyi mmona bana banyi. Tshivua mutekemene kupeta bakuabu. Bavua bangipata, bantuma kua bende. Kadi aba, uvua ubakolesha nnganyi? Mvua mushale nkayanyi. Kadi aba mbafume penyi?”" 
Isaiah49:22 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Meme nemmanyishe bakalenga ba matunga, tshidibu ne bua kuenza. Nanku nebapingaje bana bebe ba balume, bambula mu maboku abu. Nebapingaje bana bebe ba bakaji, bambula pa makaya abu." 
Isaiah49:23 Bana bebe nebabadishe kudi bakalenga bakaji ba mu matunga. Nebabakoleshe kudi bakalenga ba matunga. Nebatue mpala panshi kumpala kuebe. Nebakunemeke, balaka lupuishi lua ku makasa ebe. Nenku neumanye, mundi Maweja-Nangila, mudi bonsu badi batekemena kundi kabayi bafue bundu musangu nansha umue." 
Isaiah49:24 Nebanyenge tshilobu tshia mvita, tshintu tshivuaye mupawule mu mvita anyi? Nebanyenge mukalenga wa tshikisu, muena lukanu uvuaye mukuate anyi?" 
Isaiah49:25 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Eyowa, nennyenge tshilobu tshia mvita, muntu uvuaye muele mu lukanu. Nendiapule mukalenga wa tshikisu tshintu tshivuaye mupawule mu mvita! Yerushalayime, meme nkayanyi, nenduangane ne bena lukuna bebe, bua kupandisha bana bebe." 
Isaiah49:26 Nengenzele ku bukole bua badi bakukengesha, bashipangane nkayabu. Nebanue, bakuatshike mashi abu, mudibu bakuatshika maluvu a mvinyo mupiamupia. Nenku bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: Ke meme Maweja-Nangila, mupandishi webe. Ndi mudiangatshile tshilumbu tshiebe ne manza abidi. Meme Mvidi Mukulu tshilobu tshia Yakobe." 
Isaiah50:1 Maweja-Nangila udi unuebeja ne: Nudi nuamba ne: ndi mubenge Yerushalayime, mamuenu, kadi mukanda udi ujadika mundi munubenge wepi? Meme munusumbishe, munutume ku bupika, bua meme kufuta mabanza, kadi ndi munutume kudi nganyi? Eyowa, bavua banusumbishe bua malu enu mabi, bavua babenge mamuenu bua buntomboji buende, bua buntomboji buenu." 
Isaiah50:2 Pamvua mufike bua kunusungidila, tshivua musangane muntu bua tshinyi? Pamvua mubabikile, kabavua bangandamune bua tshinyi? Maboku anyi mmatambe buipi anyi? Tshiena ne mushindu wa kunuambuluisha anyi? Ndi mupange dikanda bua kunusungidila anyi? Kadi vulukayi ne: meme muakule amu muaku umue, ndi ngumisha mayi manene, ndi ngandamuna misulu yenza tshipela. Nenku, mishipa neipange mayi, neifue nyota, neituadije kubola." 
Isaiah50:3 Ndi mua kuvuadika kabidi diulu mavuba mafike, amu bu mudibu bavuadika muntu bilamba bia madilu." 
Isaiah50:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu uvua mundongeshe tshindi ne bua kuamba. Ke yeye udi ummanyisha miaku, indi mua kuambuluisha nayi muntu ukadi mupungile. Dinda dionsu, Maweja-Nangila udi umbisha, mpeta kudiye dijinga dikole dia kumuteleja, bu mudi balongi bajinga kuteleja mulongeshi wabu." 
Isaiah50:5 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila udi undongesha mundi mua kuteleja. Tshiena mumutombokele to. Tshiena musunuke nansha." 
Isaiah50:6 Ndi ntuma nyima wanyi kudi bantu badi bantuuta. Ndi ndeja mbanga yanyi kudi bantu badi bantula muedi. Tshiena mbuikila mpala wanyi, padibu bantuila mate, bampenda." 
Isaiah50:7 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu neangambuluishe. Ke mudibu kabayi mua kuntshimuna. Mpala wanyi udi mukole bu dibue. Ndi mumanye mudibu kabayi mua kumpita bukole. 
Isaiah50:8 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi nanyi. Yeye ke udi mumbingishe. Muntu udi ukimina kumbanda tshilumbu nnganyi? Afike, tuye nende kudi ndumbulula! Amfunde, adileje patoke, meme mumumone!" 
Isaiah50:9 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi umbingisha. Udi mua kungamba ne: udi muena tshibawu nnganyi? Bena lukuna banyi nebasunsuke bonsu, mudi tshilamba tshisunsuka, padibu batshidia kudi musuasua." 
Isaiah50:10 Padi muntu wa kunudi muitabe bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila, ateleje muena mudimu wende. Padi muntu wa kunudi wenda mu miidima, kayi umona butoke, adifile kudi Maweja-Nangila, atekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu wende." 
Isaiah50:11 Kadi nuenu bonsu badi batemesha kapia, badi benda ne kapia kasuika ku mikete mu bianza, ndimi ya kapia kenu neinukuate. Mikete inuvua batemeshe neinoshe. Ke bidi Maweja-Nangila musue kunuenzela. Nenukenge bikole, nufuilamu." 
Isaiah51:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuenu badi bakeba lupandu, nuenu badi balukeba kundi, ntelejayi. Tangilayi mudibu banusonge ne dibue dia mu lubuebue lukole. Vulukayi mudibu banupatule muaba udibu bapandila mabue mimpe." 
Isaiah51:2 Vulukayi Abrahame tatuenu, ne Sara uvua munulele. Abrahame kavua ne muana, pamvua mumubikile. Kadi meme kumuela lupemba, ndelanganyi yende kuvulangana pa buloba." 
Isaiah51:3 Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu usamba Siyone lelu. Udi musue kufuila badi basomba mu makolu ende luse. Buloba ebu bukavua bu tshipela. Maweja-Nangila neabuenze budimi buimpe. Buloba buatuke ebu, neabuandamune lupangu lua Edene. Koku aku bantu nebele mbila mikole ya disanka. Nebimbe misambu, bakokola bisanji, bela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila." 
Isaiah51:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuenu bantu banyi, ntelejayi bimpe. Nuenu bena ditunga dianyi, teyayi matshi enu kundi. Meme ke udi umanyisha bantu meyi. Meyi ne mikandu bindi ngela, nebitokeshile bantu ba pa buloba njila." 
Isaiah51:5 Nkadi pabuipi, nkadi pa kunupandisha. Nkadi pa kutshimuna baluishi benu. Bantu badi basomba mu matunga a kule, nembaleje njila mululame. Badi basomba mu bidiila bidi kule kuaka, nebatekemene kundi bua meme kubasungidila." 
Isaiah51:6 Tangila mulu, mu diulu! Tangila panshi, pa buloba! Diulu nedijimine bu muinshi. Buloba nebusunsuke bu tshilamba. Bantu nebafue bu njiji. Kadi lupandu lundi ntuadila bantu, nelushale kashidi tshiendelele. Bumfumu buanyi kabuakuikala ne ndekelu." 
Isaiah51:7 “Ntelejayi, nuenu badi bamanye tshindi musue. Nuenu bantu banyi badi bangata meyi anyi ne mushinga, kanutshinyi bantu badi banupenda. Kanutu bundu bua padi bantu banuseka." 
Isaiah51:8 Bualu nebasunsuke, bu tshilamba tshidibu badia kudi musuasua. Kadi lupandu lundi mfika nalu, nelushale matuku onsu. Bumfumu buanyi nebutungunuke ku ndelanganyi ne ku ndelanganyi ya bantu.”" 
Isaiah51:9 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, tabalaku. Juka lukasa, kunengakanyi. Leja bukole buebe tshiakabidi. Ubuleje bu muuvua muenze kale mu bikondu bipite. Uvua mushipe, musaye Rakabe, nyama wa tshikisu wa mu mayi manene, ki ngwewe anyi?" 
Isaiah51:10 Uvua mumishe mayi manene, bu mayi a lubuwa, ki ngwewe anyi? Uvua mupande njila munkatshi mua mayi manene, bua bantu bauvua musungidile bapitshilemu, ki ngwewe anyi?" 
Isaiah51:11 Maweja-Nangila neapikule bantu bende. Bantu abu nebapingane mu Yerushalayime. Nebabuelemu, benda bela bibingu bia disanka. Disanka didi kadiyi dijika nedikenkeshe mpala yabu. Musangelu ne diakalenga ne biuwule mu muoyi wabu tente. Ntatu ne makenga nebijike." 
Isaiah51:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Udi unusamba ke meme! Amu meme nkayanyi! Bantu banyi, munudi nutshina muntu mmunyi? Muntu yonsu udi unenga katupa kipi bu bisosa, ufua." 
Isaiah51:13 Udi upua Maweja-Nangila muoyi anyi? Ke yeye uvua mukufuke. Uvua mubalule diulu, mushindike buloba. Matuku onsu wewe udi uzakala, utshina muena tshinyangu, wela meji ne: neambutule amu mpindiewu. Kadi tshidiye mua kukuenzela ntshinyi?" 
Isaiah51:14 Nkushale amu matuku makese, bena lukanu nebabapatule mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kabakufuila mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kabakupanga kabidi tshiakudia." 
Isaiah51:15 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi Mvidi Mukulu webe. Ndi mvundula mayi manene, mavuala awu adila muadi bikole! Dina dianyi meme ke Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu." 
Isaiah51:16 Ndi mbalula tshiakabidi diulu, ndi nshindika kabidi buloba. Nengambile bena mu Yerushalayime ne: “Nuenu nudi bantu banyi. Ndi nnupesha mikenji yanyi. Nennusokoke mu tshianza tshianyi.”" 
Isaiah51:17 Wewe Yerushalayime, kankamana. Kankamana, juka panshi. Maweja-Nangila uvua mukupeshe dikopu diuwule tente ne tshiji tshiende. Wewe kudinua kumana! Tshinyingunyingu kukuenza!" 
Isaiah51:18 Ku bana ba balume bonsu bauvua mulele, kakuena nansha umue udi ukulombola. Ku bana bonsu bauvua mukoleshe, kakuena nansha umue uuvua mua kueyemena." 
Isaiah51:19 Makenga avua makukuate, amu abidi abidi: kabutu ne tshinyangu, mvita ne tshiyole tshia nzala. Kadi wa kukudila nnganyi? Wa kukukolesha ku muoyi nnganyi?" 
Isaiah51:20 Bana bebe badi basomba panshi mu masangu onsu a njila, kabayi banyunga, kabayi ne bukole. Bavua bu ngulungu ivuabu bakuate mu bukondu. Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mubanyoke bikole, bua tshiji tshivuaye natshi." 
Isaiah51:21 Kadi nuenu, bena Yerushalayime badi mu dikenga, badi benda batetuka bu bantu bavua bakuatshika maluvu, telejayi tshindi ngamba." 
Isaiah51:22 Maweja-Nangila, Mfumu webe, Mvidi Mukulu webe, udi usungidila bantu bende, ubambila ne: “Ndi ngangata dikopu dia tshiji tshianyi, dinuvua banue dinuenza tshinyingunyingu. Kanuakunuinamu kabidi to." 
Isaiah51:23 Nendinuishe bavua banukengeshe, bavua banuamba ne: ‘Lalayi panshi, tunudiate.’ Nuvua ne bua kufila nyima yenu, kudi bantu aba bavua bendelapu, bu badi bapitshila mu njila.”" 
Isaiah52:1 Wewe Yerushalayime, jukaku, kankamana, fululuka lukasa. Wewe Siyone, tshimenga tshia tshijila, vuala bilamba biebe bilengele. Bualu benyi ne bantu babi, kabena babuela kabidi muebe to." 
Isaiah52:2 Lupuishi ndukulamate pambidi. Kadi wewe Yerushalayime, ditutula lupuishi elu. Juka kulu, uye kusomba pa nkuasa webe wa bukalenga. Wewe Siyone, uvua muena lukanu, disulula mionji idi mikunjingila mu nshingu." 
Isaiah52:3 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba bantu bende ne: “Bavua banufile mu bupika tshianana, kabayi nansha banusumbe. Nanku nebanupikule tshianana, kabayi bafila nansha dikuta.”" 
Isaiah52:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba kabidi ne: “Kale, bantu banyi bavua badiyile ku Ejipitu, kabayi babenzeja malu ku bukole to. Kadi bena Ashure bavua babakengesha baya nabu ku bukole." 
Isaiah52:5 Mpindiewu tshinudi numona ntshinyi? Bena Babilone kabidi, bavua baye ne bantu banyi mu bupika tshianana, kabayi bafute kantu. Bantu aba badi bakengesha bantu banyi, badi baditambisha, basendeka amu kusendeka dina dianyi." 
Isaiah52:6 Ke mundi mfika. Bantu banyi nebamanye ne: meme ndi nganyi! Nebamanye ne: meme ndi mbambila malu malelela!” 
Isaiah52:7 Ndisanka kaayi patudi tumona muntu wenda pa mikuna, ututuadila lumu lua disanka! Udi utuadila bantu lumu lua bupole, lua diakalenga ne lua lupandu. Udi ukuambila wewe Yerushalayime ne: “Mvidi Mukulu webe udi mukalenga.”" 
Isaiah52:8 Teleja bantu bebe, bauvua muteke ku butentekedi. Bonsu badi bela mbila pamue, basanka, bualu mbadimuene ne mesu abu, mudi Maweja-Nangila upingana mu Siyone." 
Isaiah52:9 Nuenu makolu a mu Yerushalayime, elayi mbila ya disanka, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wambuluisha bantu bende, usamba bena Izrayele." 
Isaiah52:10 Maweja-Nangila nealeje bukole buende, bua kukumbaja mudimu wende wa tshijila, bena mu matunga onsu bamona. Too ne ku ndekelu wa buloba, nebamone lupandu, ludi Mvidi Mukulu wetu ututuadila." 
Isaiah52:11 Nuenu badi bambula malongu, ngesu ne makopu, bua kutendelela nabi Maweja-Nangila, umukayi, umukayi lukasa. Patukayi mu Babilone. Kanulengi tshintu tshibi. Patukayi kanuyi nupia mikiya." 
Isaiah52:12 Musangu ewu, kanuena ne bua kupatuka mu tshiputuku to. Kanuena ne bua kunyema ne bowa, bualu Maweja-Nangila ke udi wenda kumpala kuenu. Yeye Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, neanulame kabidi luanyima." 
Isaiah52:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Muena mudimu wanyi, neapete tshipeta tshimpe mu mudimu wende, neapete lumu lunene." 
Isaiah52:14 Bantu bavule bavua bamumone, bavua bakuatshika bowa, bua mpala wende uvua munyanguke. Kavua mufuanangane kabidi ne mpala wa muntu to." 
Isaiah52:15 Kadi mpindiewu, bantu ba bungi ba mu matunga a bende, nebakeme bualu buende. Bakalenga nebakatshile, kabayi bamanye tshia kuamba. Bualu nebamone malu adi kaayi umvuangana ne avuabu babalondele. Nebumvue malu avuabu kabayi banji kumvua. ”" 
Isaiah53:1 Wa kutudi uvua mua kuitaba bualu, budibu batuambila mpindiewu, nnganyi? Wa kutudi uvua mua kuela meji a ne: Maweja-Nangila nealeje bukole buende nanku, nnganyi?" 
Isaiah53:2 Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua musue, bua muena mudimu wende ende ukola bitekete bitekete, bu mutshi wa tshitende, bu mutshi udi wela miji mu buloba buume. Kavua ne buneme, nansha bulenga, buvua mua bantu kumutangidila. Kavua ne tshintu nansha tshimue, tshivua mua kusaka bantu bua bamutangile." 
Isaiah53:3 Bavua bamudiombola kudi bantu. Bavua bamubenga, bualu mmuntu mudine mu makenga. Tuvua bamupetule. Katuvua bamuangate ne mushinga to. Uvua bu muntu uvuabu kabayi mua kutangila." 
Isaiah53:4 Kadi yeye ke uvua muangate pambidi pende makenga avua ne bua kutukuata tuetu. Uvua musame pamutu petu. Kadi tuetu tuvua bele meji ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmumunyoke, mmumutape mputa, mmumukengeshe." 
Isaiah53:5 Kadi bavua bamutape mputa, amu bua mibi yetu. Bavua bamukengeshe, amu bua buenzayi buetu. Bavua bamunyoke yeye, bandekele tuetu babinga. Bavua bamutuute bikole, kutulekela tuetu, kabayi nansha batulenga pambidi." 
Isaiah53:6 Tuvua bapambuke eku ne eku, miaba yonsu, bu mikoku idibu batangalaja, muntu yonsu ulonda wende njila, muntu wende njila. Dinyoka divuabu mua kutunyoka tuetu, bua bilema bietu bonsu, ke divuabu bamunyoke nadi." 
Isaiah53:7 Bavua bamukengesha, yeye kudipuekesha. Kavua ukandamana. Kavua wamba bualu. Uvua bu muana wa mukoku udibu baya nawu ku tshishipelu. Uvua bu mukoku mu bianza bia badi baukulula boya, kauyi udila." 
Isaiah53:8 Bavua bamukuata, bamulumbuluisha, baya nende bua kumushipa. Kadi uvua mua kumuakuila nnganyi? Bavua bamumbusha mu buloba bua ba muoyi, bamushipa, amu bua mibi ya bantu bende." 
Isaiah53:9 Bavua bamujike pamue ne bashipianganyi. Bavua bamuele mu lukita pamue ne babanji, nansha yeye kayi muenze bualu bubi nansha bumue, kayi mupatule miaku ya dishima mukana muende." 
Isaiah53:10 Kadi Maweja-Nangila uvua muanyishe muena mudimu wende uvuabu bakengeshe. Bu nuwuaye mufile muoyi wende pa mutu pa bantu bakuabu, muena mudimu awu neapete muoyi tshiakabidi, neikale ne ndelanganyi mivule, neashale matuku mavule pa buloba. Yeye ke wakumbaja meji adi Maweja-Nangila nawu." 
Isaiah53:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Muena mudimu wanyi, mmumane kukenga bikole. Nanku neasanke tshiakabidi. Neamone muapetaye tshipeta ku makenga ende. Bantu nebamone mudi muena mudimu ukumbaja bionsu bindi meme musue. Yeye nkayende ke muntu udi kayi muena tshibawu. Neafuile bantu luse, bualu yeye udi muambule bilema biabu." 
Isaiah53:12 Ke pandi mumuteke, mu mulongu wa bantu banene. Neabanye bintu bia mu mvita pamue ne bilobu. Uvua mudifile, mudipuekeshe, too ne ku lufu, mmuditeke mu mulongu wa benzayi. Kadi uvua muambule pa makaya ende, bilema bia bantu bakuabu bonsu. Uvua muakuile bena tshibawu, bua babafuile luse.”" 
Isaiah54:1 Wewe Yerushalayime, ukavua bu mukaji uvua kayi ne bana. Ela mbila mikole ya disanka. Wewe uvua kuyi ulela kabidi bana ba balume, Sankaku amu kusanka. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe mukaji mudiombola, udi ne bana ba bungi mpindiewu, bapite ba mukaji udibu banange kudi bayende. ”" 
Isaiah54:2 Diundisha munda mua ntenta webe, sakidila bilamba, ubivungulule. Kutangidi bungi bua biudi utula. Lepesha mionji ya kusuika nayi ntenta. Popela milonda bikole mu buloba." 
Isaiah54:3 Bualu neuvulangane ku nseke yonsu. Bana bebe ba balume nebangatulule maloba adi mu bianza bia bena mutumba. Nebasulule kabidi mu bimenga, muvua mushale dikolu." 
Isaiah54:4 Kutshinyi to. Kuena ufua kabidi bundu to. Kabakukupetula kabidi to. Nebakunemeke. Neupue muoyi bundu buuvua nabu ku bunsongakaji buebe. Kuakuvuluka kabidi kapeja ka diba diutshivua mukamba. 
Isaiah54:5 Bualu uvua mukufuke, ke washala bu bayebe. Ke yeye udibu binyika ne: “Maweja-Nangila muena bukole buonsu.” Yeye ke wa tshijila wa Izrayele, udi ukupandisha. Yeye mene ke udibu binyika ne: “Mvidi Mukulu wa buloba bujima.”" 
Isaiah54:6 Maweja-Nangila uvua ukufuanyikija ne mukaji uvuabu bashiye kudi bayende, mushale ne kanyinganyinga kavule. Kadi Mvidi Mukulu webe udi wamba ne: “Mukaji uvuabu basungule mu bunsonga, mudibu mua kumulekela mmunyi?" 
Isaiah54:7 Mvua mukutokele bushuwa, kadi amu bua katupa kipi. Kadi bu mundi nkunanga bikole, ndi nkuangata tshiakabidi." 
Isaiah54:8 Tshivua musue kukumona kabidi to. Bualu mvua ne tshiji tshikole. Kadi bivua bua katupa kipi. Kadi mpindiewu nenkuleje kashidi, mundi nkunanga bikole. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkujadikila bualu ebu. Meme nenkusungidile." 
Isaiah54:9 Nengenze lelu, bimvua muenze mu matuku a Nowa. Mvua muditshipe ne: mayi a mvula kaena mua kubuikila kabidi buloba to. Ndi nditshipa kabidi nanku lelu ne: tshiena nkufikila munda, tshiena nkutandisha kabidi to." 
Isaiah54:10 Nansha bu mikuna minene mua kutentemuka miaba yayi, nansha bu mikuna mikese mua kunyungakana, kadi dinanga dindi nkunanga nadi, katshia kadiakuandamuka to. Dilaya dindi nkulaya dia kukuvudijila diakalenga nendikumbaje kashidi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nkuambila bualu ebu. Meme ndi nkunanga.”" 
Isaiah54:11 Wewe Yerushalayime udi mukengi, udibu banyungisha kudi tshipepele tshikole, kakuyi muntu udi ukusamba. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: “Nenkuasulule ne mabue malengeja bimpe. Nengenzulule bitaku biebe ne mabue mafikuluke." 
Isaiah54:12 Mitu ya bimana biebe nenyibake ne mabue makunze, mishiku ya mbelu ne mabue adi akenka. Nenkoleshe bimana bionsu ne mabue a mushinga mukole!" 
Isaiah54:13 Bana bebe bonsu nembalongeshe meyi anyi. Nebasombe mu bupole. 
Isaiah54:14 Kuakutenkakana kabidi to. Kuakutshina kabidi tshintu to. Kabakukukengesha kabidi. Kuakukuatshika bowa. Muntu kakukutshinyisha nansha. 
Isaiah54:15 Padi muntu musue kukuluisha, mu mvita yende ayi, meme tshiakumuambuluisha to. Kadi muntu yonsu udi ukuluisha, neumutshimune." 
Isaiah54:16 Vuluka ne: ndi mufuke nsenda wa biamu, utu usonsola kapia, wenza bia mvita mishindu mishilangane. Udi mufuke muntu udi ushipa nabi bantu, mmeme kabidi!" 
Isaiah54:17 Tshia mvita tshionsu tshidibu bafula, bua kukuenzela natshi bibi, katshiakukuenzela bualu to. Padi muntu musue kukufunda kudi bandumbulula, wewe neumupishishe. Ke tshindi ngenzela bena mudimu banyi bonsu. Ndi mbalama, mbambuluisha bua batshimune baluishi babu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Isaiah55:1 Luayi, nuenu bonsu badi ne nyota. Ndi nnupa mayi a kunua. Nansha nuenu kanuyi ne makuta. Luayi, nuangate biakudia. Kanuena ne bua kubisumba to! Angatayi mvinyo nansha mabele anu tshianana, kanuyi nufuta!" 
Isaiah55:2 Tshinudi nutudila makuta bua diampa didi kadiyi didisha mubidi ntshinyi? Tshinudi nuditatshishila kanuyi mua kuukuta ntshinyi? Panuikala banteleje, nenupete tshiakudia, tshidi tshilengelela mubidi. Nenudie biakudia bidi bimpe bitambe, nuukuta." 
Isaiah55:3 Ntelejayi meme. Luayi kundi. Umvuayi diyi dianyi, nenuikale ne muoyi. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi ntua nenu ndondu wa kashidi. Ndi musue kunuenzela bilenga bimvua mulaye Davide." 
Isaiah55:4 Meme kumuteka, bua ikale mukalenga wa bukua matunga. Ke nuwuaye ne bua kushindika bumfumu buanyi munkatshi mua bisamba." 
Isaiah55:5 Ne wewe kabidi Izrayele, neubikile bantu benyi, baudi kuyi muanji kumanya. Bantu aba, badi kabayi banji kukumanya, nebafike kuudi. Nebafike kuudi amu bualu buanyi meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, wa tshijila wa Izrayele. Bualu meme ndi nkupesha lumu elu.”" 
Isaiah55:6 Nuye bonsu kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu mpindiewu udi munuindile! Numuele lubila, bualu udi pabuipi nenu." 
Isaiah55:7 Muntu mubi alekele njila yende mibi. Udi kayi ne meji makane, alekele meji ende mabi! Bantu bapingane bonsu kudi Maweja-Nangila, bualu neabafuile luse! Bapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bualu neabalekele mibi yabu!" 
Isaiah55:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bushuwa, meji anyi kaena bu enu to. Njila yanyi mmishilangane ne yenu." 
Isaiah55:9 Mudi mutantshi munene munkatshi mua njila yanyi ne yenu, munkatshi mua meji anyi ne enu, amu mudi mutantshi munene munkatshi mua diulu ne buloba." 
Isaiah55:10 Mvula ne mabungi bidi biloka. Kadi kabiena bipingana mulu, amu bianji kubolesha buloba, kubufukisha, amu bianji kumeneshamu ntete. Ntete eyi idi ipetesha mikuabu idibu mua kumiamina, ne mikuabu idibu mua kudia." 
Isaiah55:11 Ke mudi kabidi muaku wanyi. Kawena upingana kundi patupu, kauyi upatula bipeta, kauyi ukumbaja bimvua muelele meji. Meme kutuma muaku wanyi, wowu kupeta amu tshimvua muipatshile.”" 
Isaiah55:12 Nenupatuke mu Babilone, nusanke. Nebanupingaje kuenu mu bupole. Diba adi mikuna minene ne mikese, neyele mbila ya disanka. Mitshi yonsu ya mu mpata neituute bikashi kumpa la kuenu." 
Isaiah55:13 Mitshi ya siprese neitoloke miaba ivua mitshi ya meba. Mutshi wa mirte neutoloke pavua mingonga. Bantu nebatumbishe Maweja-Nangila. Ke mudibu mua kuvuluka kashidi, bivua Maweja-Nangila munuenzele." 
Isaiah56:1 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambe ne: “Nulonde buakane. Nuenze malu mempe. Bualu lupandu lundi mufike nalu ludi pabuipi, lukadi pa kufika. Bonsu nebamone mundi nkumbaja malaya anyi." 
Isaiah56:2 Muntu udi wenza bindi ngamba, udi ulama bimpe mikenji yanyi, unemeka bimpe dituku dia Dikisha, kayi wenza bualu bubi nansha bumue, ngwa diakalenga!”" 
Isaiah56:3 Muena tshisamba tshikuabu, udi mulamate Maweja-Nangila, kena mua kuela meji a ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmunteke ku luseke. Mmungumushe munkatshi mua bantu bende.” Muntu mutungula kambi ne: “Ndi amu bu lukunyi luume. ”" 
Isaiah56:4 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Padi muntu mutungula unemeka matuku anyi a Dikisha, padiye usungula bua kuenza bidi bindengelela, padiye ulama ndondu itudi batue ne tshisamba tshianyi," 
Isaiah56:5 nebafunde dina diende ku bimana bia nzubu wanyi. Muaba awu nebamuvuluke, mudi bana ba balume ne bakaji kabayi mua kuvuluka baledi babu. Nemvuluke dina diende kashidi. Kabakudikupula kudi muntu to!”" 
Isaiah56:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bantu benyi badi bandamate, bantumbisha, bannanga, basue kuikala bena mudimu banyi, badi banemeka bimpe dituku dia Dikisha, balama ndondu ituvua batue ne tshisamba tshianyi," 
Isaiah56:7 nembabikidishe bua babande pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila. Nembasankishe ne disanka dinene, mu nzubu wanyi wa kutendelela. Nenganyishe ne muoyi muimpe milambu mishilangane ikalabu bandambula pa tshilambuilu. Bualu nzubu wanyi, nebamuinyike ne: Muaba udi bantu ba mu matunga onsu batendelela. ”" 
Isaiah56:8 Maweja-Nangila uvua mupingaje bena Izrayele bavuaye mumuangalaje kuabu, udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nkadi mumane kusangisha bantu, kadi ntshidi nsangisha ne bakuabu bua nuenze nabu tshintu tshimue.”" 
Isaiah56:9 Nuenu bantu banyi, nuenu nyama ya mu mpata, ne nuenu nyama ya muitu, luayi bonsu mu didia dia disanka!" 
Isaiah56:10 Balombodi ba bantu banyi bena Izrayele, badi bampofu bonsu. Kabena bamanye kalu. Bonsu buabu badi bu mbua idi kayiyi yenza mutoyi, kayiyi ibuluka. Badi balotakana, badiolola panshi, basue kulala amu tulu." 
Isaiah56:11 Badi kabidi bu mbua idi ne lumpukusu, idi idia kayiyi yukuta. Badi amu ne dina patupu dia balami ba mikoku! Kadi kabena bajingulula bualu nansha bumue. Badi benza amu mudibu basue. Muntu yonsu wa kudibu udi udikebela amu tshiende tshidiye ujinga." 
Isaiah56:12 Badi bamba ne: “Luayi, tuye kukeba maluvu. Netunue maluvu makole, tukuatshike. Maloba netuenze kabidi mutudi tuenza lelu emu. Bualu maluvu adi mashale adi a bungi.”" 
Isaiah57:1 Bantu bakane badi babutuka, kakuyi muntu udi usumpakana bualu buabu. Bantu bimpe badi bafua mu mvita, kakuyi muntu udi ubatangila. Kadi ndi mbapatula mu bianza bia bantu badi babakengesha." 
Isaiah57:2 Nebabuele mu bupole buanyi. Nanku bantu badi balonda njila wa buakane, nebamone mua kuikisha talalaa." 
Isaiah57:3 Semenayi apa, nuenu, bana ba mukaji muena mbuku, tshisamba tshia bena buendenda ne bena buenzayi." 
Isaiah57:4 Unudi nuseka nnganyi? Unudi nuela bibingu nnganyi? Unudi nuela kadimi nnganyi? Kanuena bana badi bantombokela anyi? Kanuena tshisamba tshia bena dishima anyi? 
Isaiah57:5 Nudi nuenda buendenda muinshi mua mitshi minene, miaba yonsu idi mitshi ya dileji. Ku muelelu wa misulu, muinshi mua mbuebue, nudi nulambula mvidie bana." 
Isaiah57:6 Mabue a busenu a mu musulu, ke tshiuma tshienu tshinudi nutendelela. Anu mabue awu ke anudi nulambula, nunuisha maluvu, ke anudi nulambula bia pa madimi. Ndi nnuebeja ne: bionsu ebi bidi mua kunsankisha anyi?" 
Isaiah57:7 Udi udilongoluela bulalu pa mikuna mitumbuke yonsu. Popu apu ke paudi ubanda bua kulambula milambu. 
Isaiah57:8 Udi mukudike lupingu lua mvidie webe kunyima kua tshiibi tshiebe tshia ku nzubu. Udi uvula bilamba biebe, meme muikale kule. Udi ubanda pa bulalu buebe, ulongoluelamu muaba munene. Udi usumba balume baudi munange, usanka bua kulala nabu pa bulalu abu, wewe kumona bualu!" 
Isaiah57:9 Udi udilaba mafuta, udiela ne manananshi a mupuya muimpe, bua kuya kutendelela mvidie Meleke. Uvua mutume bantu mutantshi mule ne mikenji. Wewe kubatuma too ne ku muaba wa bafue." 
Isaiah57:10 Wewe kupungila ne luendu luebe lua kukeba mvidie. Kadi kuena muambe ne: “Mbikumbane.” Wewe kupeta tshiakabidi dikanda, kuyi uvuluka dipungi diuvua nadi to." 
Isaiah57:11 Udi mukukuatshishe bowa, uudi utshina bikole nanku, bua wewe kunshima, bua wewe kubenga kunzuluka, bua wewe kubenga kungangata ne mushinga, nnganyi? Bu mundi mupuwe mutantshi mule, kuena ungangata kabidi ne mushinga. Udi wela meji ne: biudi wenza mbiakane anyi?" 
Isaiah57:12 Kadi meme nensokoluele bantu bubi bua bionsu biudi muenze. Mvidie yebe ayi kayakukupetesha kantu nansha kamue. 
Isaiah57:13 Paudi wela lubila, ulomba diambuluisha, mvidie yebe yonsu ayi ikupandishe, tumone! Kadi mvunde neaye nayi, lupepele neluyikombe! Amu bantu badi batekemena kundi, nebapiane ditunga, nebasombe pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila." 
Isaiah57:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Longololayi njila, koleshayi, pandayi njila, umbushayi mu njila bintu bionsu bidi ne njiwu, bantu banyi benda kamuyi lutatu.”" 
Isaiah57:15 Udi ku mutu kua bintu bionsu, udi usomba mu nzubu wa kashidi, udibu binyika ne: Wa Tshijila, ke yeye udi wamba ne: “Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, ndi nsomba mulu. Kadi ndi ngenda kabidi ne bantu badi mu makenga, badi ne muoyi wa bupuekele. Nanku nempingajile muena bupuekele muoyi, nempingajile mukengi disanka." 
Isaiah57:16 Bualu tshiena ntandisha bantu banyi, tshiena mbafikila munda kashidi. Tshianana bantu banyi bonsu bandi mufuke, nebajimine kashidi." 
Isaiah57:17 Ntupakanyi ya bena Izrayele, ivua mianji kumfikisha munda. Mvua mubanyoke ne tshiji. Tshivua musue kubatangila kabidi to. Kadi bobu bavua batungunuka amu ne dienza bibi, muvua muoyi wabu ubalongesha." 
Isaiah57:18 Ndi mumanye bimpe mudibu benza. Kadi meme nembenzele nenku: Nembalengeje, nembalombole mu njila, nembakoleshe ku muoyi! Bantu bavua bavuala bilamba bia madilu," 
Isaiah57:19 nembeleshe mbila ya disanka. Nempandishe, bushuwa nempandishe bantu bonsu, badi kule ne badi pabuipi. Ke mundi ngamba meme, Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Isaiah57:20 Kadi bantu babi, badi bu mayi manene adi ela mavuala, kaayi ne mushindu wa kubatama. Mayi a nanku adi muwule ne binyindanyinda kabidi ne bintu bibi bionsu tente." 
Isaiah57:21 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi udi wamba ne: “Lupandu kaluena bua bantu babi to.” 
Isaiah58:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ela lubilu lukole. Kulekedi to. Diyi diebe difike kule, bu mudi muadi wa mpungi. Vuluija bantu banyi mudibu bantombokela. Manyishayi ndelanganyi ya Yakobe bilema biayi." 
Isaiah58:2 Badi bankeba ku dituku ku dituku, basue kumanya tshindi meme musue bua benze. Badi bu bena ditunga dia bantu badi benza bimpe, badi bakumbaja meyi avuabu bapete kudi Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Badi bandomba bua meme kukosa nsambu amu pa yoyi. Badi bajinga kuikala pabuipi nanyi." 
Isaiah58:3 Kadi badi bankonka ne: “Mutuajila biakudia mmunyi, paudi kuyi utumona? Mutuadikengesha mmunyi, paudi ulengulula bualu ebu?” Nenku meme kuandamuna ne: Tangilayi mene tshinudi nuenza: nansha nuenu bajile biakudia, nudi nukeba kudisankisha amu nuenu nkayenu. Nudi nukengesha bena mudimu benu." 
Isaiah58:4 Nudi nutandangana, nukumangana. Panudi nujila biakudia mushindu ewu, mundi meme mua kuteleja dindomba dienu mmunyi?" 
Isaiah58:5 Dijila dia biakudia dia mushindu ewu, ke dindi musue meme anyi? Ke dituku dia kudipuekesha dindi mua kuanyisha meme anyi? Kuinyika mutu bu dilenga, kuvuala bilamba bia madilu, kulala mu lupuishi, ke dituku dinudi nuenu nuamba ne: ndia tshijila anyi? Ke dituku dinudi nuela meji ne: didi disankisha meme anyi?" 
Isaiah58:6 Nudi bamanye tshijila tshindi musue. Tshidi nunku: kulekela bantu bavuabu bakuate mu lukanu kapayi bualu, kumusha majitu adi manemenene pa makaya abu, kupikula bantu badibu bakengesha, kumusha pambidi pa bantu bionsu bidi bibabueja mu bupika," 
Isaiah58:7 kuabanyangana tshiakudia tshienu ne muntu udi ne nzala. Nubueje bapele, ne badi kabayi ne pa kulala mu nzubu muenu. Nuvuadike bantu badi kabayi bilamba. Kanubengi kuenzela muanenu bimpe." 
Isaiah58:8 Diba adi, nenusanke, nukenke, mudi diba dikenka mu dinda. Mputa yenu neyume lukasa. Nengende nenu. Nennulame kumpala ne kunyima. Nennupandishe." 
Isaiah58:9 Panuambikila, nennuitabe. Panudi nulomba diambuluisha, nennuambile ne: “Ndi mfika!” Panudi nulekela kukengesha bantu, panudi nubenga kupetula bakuabu, kubafunkuna munu, kubajana," 
Isaiah58:10 panudi nuabanyangana tshiakudia tshienu ne muntu udi ne nzala, panudi nudisha muntu udi ne dikenga, nenku butoke nebuipate miidima muaba unudi nusombela. Pa mutu pa kuikala mu miidima, nenusombe mu butoke bu munda munya." 
Isaiah58:11 Maweja-Nangila neanulombole. Nansha nuenu bende mu tshipela, neanudishe nuukute, nupete bukole. Badi banumona nebasanke. Bualu nenuikale bu lupangu, ludibu bamiamina mayi mavule, bu mpokolu wa mayi a bungi, adi kaayi akama." 
Isaiah58:12 Nenku nenuasulule miaba ivua mishale makolu. Nenuibakulule nzubu mipiamipia, pa bitaku bia nzubu binukavua bamane kulekela kale. Bantu nebanumanye bu bantu badi balongolola miaba ya mu bimana bia tshimenga idi minyanguke, bu bantu badi balandakaja misesu idi mu tshimenga." 
Isaiah58:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Panudi nulekela mudimu dituku dia Dikisha, nulekela kudienzela malu dituku dianyi dia tshijila, panudi nutangila dituku dia Dikisha bu dituku dia disanka, dia kungenzela mudimu, bu dituku dia kunnemeka, panudi nudinemekelamu bushiwa, nulekela mudimu, nubenga kudienzela malu, nubenga kuakula bia tshianana," 
Isaiah58:14 nenku meme nengikale mpokolu wa disanka dienu. Meme Maweja-Nangila nennutumbishe ku mutu kua bionsu. Nennusombeshe talalaa, mu ditunga divua nkambua wenu Yakobe mupete bu bumpianyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ndaya nanku.”" 
Isaiah59:1 Nudi nuela meji ne: maboku a Mvidi Mukulu kaena male makumbane bua kunusungidila anyi? Nudi nuela meji ne: matshi a Maweja-Nangila adi mapate, kaayi mua kunuteleja anyi?" 
Isaiah59:2 Nansha kakese! Kadi bubi buenu ke budi buasa tshimana pankatshi penu ne Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Bualu bua bilema bienu, Maweja-Nangila ukadi utangila kua tshianana, kayi musue kunuteleja." 
Isaiah59:3 Bualu bianza bienu bidi ne mashi. Minu yenu idi minyanguke ne malu mabi. Nudi nuakula amu bua kujana bantu, bua kushiminyinangana malu." 
Isaiah59:4 Nudi nufundangana ku tubadi amu ne muoyi mubi. Nudi nulumbululaku, kanuyi nukeba bulelela. Malu anudi nujadika adi amu a dishima. Bionsu binudi nuamba bidi amu bia patupu. Nudi amu nukeba kukengeshangana, nupatula munda muenu amu malu mabi." 
Isaiah59:5 Malu anudi bela meji bua kuenza, adi amu mabi bu makela a nyoka. Muntu udi walenga, udi ufuilaku diakamue. Dikela diodi ditayike, didi dipatula nyoka wa ntoka. Malu anudi nuenza adi amu bu buntande:" 
Isaiah59:6 muntu kena mua kubuvuala, muntu kena mua kudibuikilabu. Buntande budi amu bupetesha bantu dikenga. Ke mudi bianza bienu bienza mudimu, amu bua kukengesha bantu." 
Isaiah59:7 Nudi nunyema lubilu, bua kuya kuenza malu mabi. Nudi nuambuluja makasa, bua kushipa badi kabayi ne bualu. Meji anudi nuela adi amu a kuenzela bakuabu bibi. Mu njila yenu nudi numiamina tshimvundu ne kabutu." 
Isaiah59:8 Kanuena bamanye njila wa bupole. Kuonsu kunudi nupitshila, nudi nudiatakaja buakane mu makasa. Nudi nulonda amu njila mikonyangale. Kadi muntu udi unulonda mu njila yenu ayi, kakupeta bupole to." 
Isaiah59:9 Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu kayi utuambuluisha lukasa, kayi ukumbaja bivuaye mutulaye. Tuvua batekemene kumona butoke, kadi miidima idi miaba yonsu. Tuvua bindile bua diba dipatuke, kadi tudi tuenda amu mu miidima yabufuku." 
Isaiah59:10 Tudi tuenda tutetuka, bu mpofu udi wenda ulonda tshimana. Tudi tububuta bu muntu, udi kayi umona kudiye uya. Munda munya tudi tutetuka, bu badi benda mu njila munda nkulu. Tudi ne bukole bua mubidi, kadi tukadi bu bantu bafue." 
Isaiah59:11 Tudi tupuma bonsu bu nyama wa lonji, tudila muadi bu kamandankutshi. Tuvua batekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu, bua atuambuluishe, kadi kena muenze kalu to. Tuvua bindile lupandu, kadi ludi netu kule." 
Isaiah59:12 Maweja-Nangila, misangu mivule, tuvua bakutombokele. Bilema bietu bidi bibipisha. Buntomboji buetu mbutulamate. Tudi bamanye bimpe ntupakanyi yetu." 
Isaiah59:13 Tuvua bakutombokele. Tuvua bakutonuene mesu. Tuvua babenge kukulonda, wewe Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Tuvua bakule amu bua kukengeshangana, ne bua kutomboka. Tshitudi tuelangana meji munda, tshitudi natshi mu lungenyi, tshidi amu dishima." 
Isaiah59:14 Nenku bantu kabena benza bimpe to. Kabena bakumbaja bidi Mvidi Mukulu musue. Mu bisalu kamuena kabidi muntu wa muoyi muimpe, kamuena udi wamba malu patoke." 
Isaiah59:15 Eyowa, bulelela kabuena bumueneka kabidi to. Muntu udi musue kushala wa muoyi mulenga, badi bamuiba bionsu bidiye nabi. Maweja-Nangila mmumone bionsu bidi bienzeka. Kena wanyisha bua bantu badiatakaje buakane." 
Isaiah59:16 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumone muvua muntu nansha umue kayi wambuluisha bavuabu bakengesha. Uvua ukema, bua pavua bantu kabayi bambuluishangana. Ke mudiye musue kukuata mudimu yeye mene. Bu mudiye unanga bantu, udi ukeba kubasungidila." 
Isaiah59:17 Maweja-Nangila udi uvuala buakane, mudibu bavuala kazaku ka tshiamu ka mvita. Udi wasa lupandu, mudibu basa tshifulu ku mutu. Uvua uvuala dijinga dia kulongolola malu mimpe, amu mudibu bavuala bilamba. Tshinkutu tshidiye mudibuikile, ke disuminyina didiye nadi dia kuluangana mvita." 
Isaiah59:18 Neafute bantu bilondeshile malu avuabu benze. Neatekele bena lukuna bende bonsu tshiji tshikole. Neabanyoke nansha bobu base kule. 
Isaiah59:19 Nenku bantu nebatshine Maweja-Nangila. Nebanemeke butumbi buende, bituadije luseke ludi diba dipatukila, too ne luseke ludidi dibuelela. Neafike lubilu, bu musulu wa muenji mukole, udibu basakila kudi tshipepela." 
Isaiah59:20 Maweja-Nangila nealue bua kupikula Yerushalayime, ne bena Izrayele bonsu badi bakudimuna nsombelu yabu. Ke yeye mene udi ujadika bualu ebu." 
Isaiah59:21 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: “Monayi ndondu undi ntua nenu: Mueyelu wanyi neunutulukile. Ndi nnulongesha malu anyi bituadije ku mpindiewu ne kashidi. Tshiena ngumusha dilongesha edi kunudi, nansha kudi bana benu, nansha kudi biikulu benu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku awu.”" 
Isaiah60:1 Yerushalayime, juka, ukenke bu diba! Bualu meme ndi mfika, meme butoke buebe. Lumu lua Maweja-Nangila nelukutokeshe, bu diba ditshidi dipatukilaku." 
Isaiah60:2 Midima idi imbuikile buloba. Bantu badi benda mu miidima ya bufuku. Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila udi ukukenkesha, bu diba ditshidi dipatukilaku. Butumbi buende nebumuenekele pa mutu pebe." 
Isaiah60:3 Nenku bukua matunga nebuende butangila ku butoke buwakenkesha. Dinkenke dia butoke buebe nedikoke bakalenga kuudi. 
Isaiah60:4 Kenzakana ku nseke yebe yonsu, umone mudi bana bebe bonsu bafika. Badi badisangisha pabuipi nebe. Bana bebe ba balume badi bafume kule. Bantu badi bakupingajila bana bebe ba bakaji, babambula mu maboku." 
Isaiah60:5 Paudi ubamona, neukenke ne diakalenga. Neusanke, usangale. Mutshima webe neuwule ne disanka. Bualu biuma bidi bipitshila pa mayi manene, nebifike kuebe. Lupetu lua matunga a bantu neluvulangane kuebe." 
Isaiah60:6 Ditunga diebe nediuwule ne nyama ya tumelu tente. Bangenda mushinga ba mu Madiyane ne ba mu Efa nebafume ku Saba, bisumbu ne bisumbu, ne tumelu tuabu. Nebakutuadile tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne musenga wa kamonya. Nebende batumbisha Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah60:7 Nyama ya bena Kedare, neisangile kumpala kuebe. Mikoku ya bimpanga ya bena Nebayote neikale yebe. Nebaye nayi pa tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila. Neikale milambu idi ilengelela Maweja-Nangila. Mvidi Mukulu neavudije lumu lua nzubu wende bikole." 
Isaiah60:8 Aba bonsu mbanganyi? Badi baya lukasa bu mavuba, bu tshisumbu tshia nkudimba idi ipingana mu tshilamba tshiayi." 
Isaiah60:9 Ke matu adi afuma ku mielelu ya mayi a ku matunga a kule. Matu manene adi enda kumpala. Bana bebe badi pa matu aa, bafumine ku matunga a kule, bambule mpawungi yabu ne biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole. Badi balua bua kutumbisha Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu webe, wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele. Bualu Yeye ke udi ukusankisha nenku." 
Isaiah60:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila Yerushalayime ne: Benyi nebibakulule bimana biebe. Bakalenga babu nebikale bena mudimu bebe. Bualu mvua mukunyoke bushiwa, pamvua ne tshiji. Kadi ndi ne disanka mpindiewu, dia kukuleja mundi mukunange." 
Isaiah60:11 Nebunzulule biibi biebe, kabayi babinjila nansha bufuku nansha munya. Nanku bantu nebamone mua kukutuadila biuma bia mu bukua matunga. Bakalenga babu nebalondangane, ewu ubuela, mukuabu ubuela." 
Isaiah60:12 Kadi tshisamba tshionsu, nansha bukalenga buonsu, bidi bibenga kukuenzela mudimu, nebijimine. Bisamba abi nebibutuke." 
Isaiah60:13 Mitshi mimpe yonsu ya mu metu a Lebanone, mitshi ya siprese, ya pine, ne mikuabu, nebafike nayi muebe. Nebalengeje nayi nzubu wanyi wa tshijila, muaba undi nsomba, undi ndeja lumu luanyi." 
Isaiah60:14 Bantu bavua bakukengesha, nebasemene kuudi, nebiname panshi. Bantu bonsu bavua bakulembakaje, nebadiele ku makasa ebe. Nebakuinyike ne: “Ke tshimenga tshia Maweja-Nangila”, “Ke Siyone musoku wa wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele. ”" 
Isaiah60:15 Wewe uvua musoku uvua bantu kabayi banange, muntu nansha umue kavua mupitshile muebe. Kadi nenkuenze kabidi tshimenga tshidi tshisankisha bantu tshiendelele, tshidibu mua kuditemba natshi kashidi." 
Isaiah60:16 Bena matunga ne bakalenga babu, nebakukuatshile mudimu, mudi mamu wamusha muanende. Nenku neumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mukupandishi webe. Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe, ndi mudiangatshile bualu buebe ne manza abidi." 
Isaiah60:17 Nenkutuadile kuebe tshiamu tshia mpawungi pa mutu pa tshiamu tshikunze, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole pa mutu pa tshia kabanda, tshiamu tshikunze pa mutu pa mabaya, tshiamu tshia kabanda pa mutu pa mabue. Bupole ne buakane ke bamfumu ne bakalenga, bambateka mu ditunga diebe." 
Isaiah60:18 Mu ditunga diebe, kabakumvua kabidi mutoyi wa mvita to. Munda mua ditunga diebe kamuena kabidi kabutu nansha tshinyangu. Kadi newinyike bimana biebe dina ne: “Lupandu”, ne biibi biebe ne: “Lumu lua Mvidi Mukulu”." 
Isaiah60:19 Bua wewe kuikala ne butoke, kuakukengela kabidi diba mu munya, nansha ngondu butuku. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, nentekeshe muebe matuku onsu, nenkukenkeshe ne butoke buanyi buonsu." 
Isaiah60:20 Kanuakukengela kabidi diba, bua kuenda mu butoke munda munya. Kanuakukengela kabidi ngondu, bua kuenda mu butoke butuku to. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila nenkutekeshe butuku ne munya. Dikenga diebe nedijike." 
Isaiah60:21 Bantu bebe bonsu nebalame meyi anyi. Kabakubipata kabidi mu ditunga diebe. Ke bantu bamvua mufuke ne bianza bianyi, bua baleje bantu bakuabu butumbi buanyi. Badi bu mitshi indi mukune mu lupangu luanyi." 
Isaiah60:22 Mu tshiota tshikese, nemuikale bantu tshinunu. Tshiota tshishadile ku bionsu, netshidiunde, tshienze tshisamba tshinene. Ke tshindi ngenza lukasa meme Maweja-Nangila, pakumbana tshikondu." 
Isaiah61:1 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, mmunguwuje ne Mueyelu wende, bualu mmundabe manyi a tshijila, mmutume bua kumanyisha bapele lumu lua disanka, bua kukolesha ku muoyi badi benda batekete mu maboku, bua kuambila bavuabu baye nabu mu matunga a bende ne: nudi mua kuya kuonsu kunudi basue, ne bua kuambila bena lukanu ne: mbamane kunupatula mu lukanu." 
Isaiah61:2 Uvua muntume bua kumanyisha bantu ne: tshidimu etshi, Maweja-Nangila mmunufuile luse. Dituku edi Mvidi Mukulu wetu neanyoke baluishi bende. Mbantume bua kusamba bonsu badi mu madilu," 
Isaiah61:3 bua kusankisha bena mu Siyone badi badila muadi. Ndi ne bua kubasa tshifulu tshia lumu, pa mutu pa butu buvuabu babalabe ku mitu. Ndi ne bua kubalaba mafuta a mupuya muimpe, bua kumusha dibungama didi pa mpala yabu. Ndi ne bua kubavuadika tshilamba tshia tshibilu, bua kumusha kanyinganyinga kadi mu muoyi wabu. Nanku nebabafuanyikije ne mitshi idi isankisha Mvidi Mukulu, nansha ne lupangu luimpe ludi luleja butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila." 
Isaiah61:4 Nebasulule nzubu muimpe muaba udi dikolu. Nebibakulule nzubu, uvuabu babumbule kale. Nebalongolole bimenga bivua binyanguke mutantshi mule." 
Isaiah61:5 Benyi nebafike muenu, bua kudisha bimuna bienu. Bantu badi bafume kule, nebanudimine madimi, nebanukunyine mionji ya mvinyo." 
Isaiah61:6 Nuenu mene nebanuinyike ne: “Ke batuangaji ba Maweja-Nangila.” Bantu nebanutele bamba ne: “Ke bantu badi bakuatshila Mvidi Mukulu wetu mudimu.” Nenusankile ku mpetu ya bukua matunga. Nenuditembe ne bintu biabu. 
Isaiah61:7 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuvua bafue bundu. Bantu bavua banupenda, banupetula, banutuila mate mu mesu. Kadi bu muvuabu banupepeje, nenupete buloba budi bupite buenu bua kale misangu ibidi. Bituadije ku mpindiewu, nenusombemu, nusanke kashidi." 
Isaiah61:8 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi munange bantu badi benzelangana bimpe. Kadi ndi ndiwula bantu badi bangata tshintu tshia bende ku bukole. Nensankishe bantu banyi. Nentue nenu ndondu wa kashidi.” 
Isaiah61:9 Nebamanye ndelanganyi yenu miaba yonsu, mu matunga onsu. Bantu bonsu badi babamona, nebamanye ne: ke bantu badi Maweja-Nangila muele lupemba." 
Isaiah61:10 Ndi ngela Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila muanyi muonsu. Ndi ntumbisha Mvidi Mukulu wanyi ne musangelu, bualu dingambuluisha diende didi bu tshivualu tshidiye umvuadika. Lupandu ludiye untuadila, ludi bu tshinkutu tshidiye umbuikila. Ndi ne disanka bu dia musedianganyi mupiamupia, udi wasa tshifulu tshia tshibilu, nansha bu dia nsongakaji udi ubuela mu dibaka, uvuala bilengejilu biende." 
Isaiah61:11 Bushuwa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi upatula lupandu ne lumu, kumpala kua bisamba bia bantu. Amu bu mudi mu buloba mutoloka mitshi, nansha bu mudi mu budimi bumena ntete idibu bamiaminamu." 
Isaiah62:1 Bu mundi nkunanga, Yerushalayime, tshiakupuwa to. Bu mundi nkunanga Siyone, tshiakushala amu patupu, tshiyi ngenza bualu to. Nensengelele Mvidi Mukulu too ne ku diba didi lupandu luebe lumueneka, mudi butoke bukenka mu munya, ne tshimunyi tshia kapia butuku." 
Isaiah62:2 Bisamba bia bantu nebimone mudi Maweja-Nangila mukupikule. Bakalenga bonsu nebabandile lumu luebe. Bantu nebakuinyike dina dipiadipia, didi Maweja-Nangila mukubikile nadi." 
Isaiah62:3 Newikale bu tshifulu tshia bumfumu, bu nsala wa lumu, mu tshianza tshia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe." 
Isaiah62:4 Kabakukuinyika kabidi ne: “Mmukaji udibu babenge”. Ditunga diebe kabena badinyika kabidi ne: “Mbuloba bunyanguke”. Kadi nebakuinyike ne: “Munanga wa Maweja-Nangila”. Nebinyike buloba buebe ne: “Ke mukaji udi usomba mu dibaka dimpe”. Bualu neusankishe Maweja-Nangila bulelela, kabidi buloba buebe nebuikale bu mukaji musela." 
Isaiah62:5 Eyowa bu mudi nsongalume usela muana wa bakaji, ke mudi Ewu udi ukuibakulula ushala bayebe. Bu mudi mubangila usankisha mumubangidi, wewe kabidi neusankishe Mvidi Mukulu webe." 
Isaiah62:6 Ndi muteke batentekedi pa bimana biebe wewe Yerushalayime. Kabena ne bua kupuwa, nansha munya nansha butuku. “Nuenu badi bavuluija Maweja-Nangila malaya avuaye mulaye bena Yerushalayime, kanuladi nansha kakese." 
Isaiah62:7 Kanumushidi mpunga, too ne pamanaye kuibakulula tshimenga, ne penzaye tshimenga etshi muaba udibu batumbisha mu matunga onsu.”" 
Isaiah62:8 Maweja-Nangila mmuditshipe, wamba ne: “Bulelela, bu mundi ne bukole bua kuenza tshindi musue, ndi nditshipa kudi bantu banyi ne: tshiena mua kuitaba bua baluishi bebe kudiabu ntete ya bukula iudi mudime, nansha bua bantu badi bafuma ku matunga a bende kunuabu maluvu mapiamapia, audi mutatshile ne midimu." 
Isaiah62:9 Amu bantu bavua banowa ntete ya kuenza bukula, nebayidie, batumbisha Maweja-Nangila. Bavua bapole tumuma tua mvinyo, nebanue maluvu mu lubanza lua nzubu wanyi wa tshijila.”" 
Isaiah62:10 Bena Yerushalayime, patukayi, patukayi lukasa mu tshimenga. Longoluelayi bantu badi bapingana muabu njila. Jibikilayi biina bidi panshi mu misesu. Umbushayi mabue adimu. Bandishayi dibendele, bua bantu bamanye" 
Isaiah62:11 tshidi Maweja-Nangila ubamanyisha ku ntengu ne ku ntengu ya buloba ne: Ambilayi bena Siyone ne: “Mupandishi wenu udi ufika, udi ufika ne bonsu badiye mupikule, udi ufika ne tshipeta tshia ku mudimu wende.”" 
Isaiah62:12 Nebanuinyike ne: “Ke bantu ba tshijila, ke bantu bavua Maweja-Nangila mupikule.” Wewe Yerushalayime, kabena bakuinyika kabidi ne: “Tshimenga tshidi Mvidi Mukulu ubenga.” Kadi nebakuinyike ne: “Tshimenga tshidiye unanga.”" 
Isaiah63:1 Nganyi ewu udi ufuma ku Edome, mu tshimenga tshikulu tshia Bosra, ne bilamba bikunze kunzuu? Udi muvuale tshinkutu tshiende. Udi wenda mpala muele mulu, mudiumvue mudiye ne makanda! Maweja-Nangila udi wandamuna ne: — Ke meme! Ndi mufike bua kukosa nsambu, ndi mufike bua kunyoka bukua matunga, bua nsungidile bantu banyi." 
Isaiah63:2 — Kadi mudi bilamba biebe bikunze kunzuu mbishi? Makeji makunze awu mmafume penyi? Bidi bifuanangane ne bilamba bia muntu uvua ukama tumuma tua mvinyo mu tshiamu. 
Isaiah63:3 — Eyowa, ndi mukame tumuma mu tshiamu nkayanyi. Tshivua ne muena kuetu nansha umue uvua ungambuluisha. Mvua ne tshiji ne lonji. Meme kudiata bantu, kubatua miseba. Mashi abu avua mansampukile ku bilamba, ke mudi bilamba bianyi ne makeji makunze nanku." 
Isaiah63:4 Mvua ne dijinga munda muanyi dia kusombuela bantu banyi lelu. Bualu tshikondu tshia kupikula bantu banyi tshiakumbanyi. 
Isaiah63:5 Meme kukenzakana, kukeba muntu wa kungambuluisha! Kupanga! Meme kukema, kupanga muntu uvua mua kunkolesha ku muoyi. Kadi meme kushindika bua kukuata mudimu nkayanyi. Tshiji tshianyi tshivua tshimpesha dikanda." 
Isaiah63:6 Meme kuzaaza bantu, bualu mvua ne tshiji. Meme kubalembakaja ne tshiji tshianyi, kutangalaja mashi abu panshi." 
Isaiah63:7 Ndi musue kuvuluija bantu muoyi mulenga udi Maweja-Nangila nawu. Ndi musue kumutumbisha, bua bionsu bidiye mutuenzele. Uvua muenzele tshisamba tshia Izrayele bimpe bitambe, bualu udi utshinanga kashidi, utshifuila luse misangu yonsu." 
Isaiah63:8 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambe ne: “Bena Izrayele mbantu banyi, mbana banyi, badi kabayi mua kundinga to.” Nanku Mvidi Mukulu kubasungidila." 
Isaiah63:9 Mu makenga abu onsu, kena mutume muntu mukuabu bua kubambuluisha. Kadi uvua mubasungidile amu yeye mene. Yeye uvua muangate bualu buabu ne manza abidi, bualu uvua mubanange, ubumvuila luse. Yeye ke uvua mudiangatshile malu abu, mubambule mu maboku ende, ku tshikondu ne ku tshikondu." 
Isaiah63:10 Kadi bavua bamutombokela, bavua banyingalaja Mueyelu wende wa Tshijila. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kudienza muluishi wabu, kubanga kuluangana nabu mvita." 
Isaiah63:11 Amu diba adi, bantu bende kuvuluka Moshe, ne malu avua menzeke kale. “Mvidi Mukulu uvua musambuishe kale bantu bende ne balombodi babu mu mayi manene, mpindiewu udi penyi? Mvidi Mukulu uvua mutume Mueyelu wende munkatshi muabu, udi muaba kaayi?" 
Isaiah63:12 Ke yeye uvua wenda ku dia balume dia Moshe, umuambuluisha ne diboku diende dikole. Uvua mupandulule mayi, bena luendu batangile. Ke muvuaye mupete lumu kashidi." 
Isaiah63:13 Yeye ke uvua mubafile, munkatshi mua mayi manene. Batata benda amu bimpe, kabayi nansha batetuka, amu bu mudi nyama ya tubalu yenda mu mpata." 
Isaiah63:14 Bavua amu bu mudi ngombe ipueka mu tshibandabanda. Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila uvua ubafikisha ku muaba uvuabu mua kuikishila.” Nenku, Maweja-Nangila, ke muuvua muludike bantu bebe nanku. Pa bualu ebu bantu nebakutumbishe kashidi." 
Isaiah63:15 Maweja-Nangila nansha wewe musombe mu diulu, mu muaba webe muimpe wa tshijila, tangila bidi bituenzekela panu panshi. Dinanga diebe dikole, diuvua mutunange nadi didi penyi? Bukole buebe buuvua nabu mu mvita butshidiku anyi? Kuena kabidi musue kutufuila luse anyi? Maweja-Nangila kubengi kutuleja muudi utunanga." 
Isaiah63:16 Bualu amu wewe ke udi Tatu wetu. Abrahame nkambua wetu, kena mubimanye. Yakobe kena mutuvuluke. Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi Tatu wetu, wewe ke udibu binyika ku kale kuonsu aku ne: “Mutusungidi wetu.”" 
Isaiah63:17 Maweja-Nangila, uvua muanyishe bua tupambuke, tulekele njila webe, tuikale ne tshitunu, tubenge bumfumu buebe bua tshinyi? Pingana kutudi, bualu tudi bena mudimu bebe, bantu baudi mudisunguile." 
Isaiah63:18 Tuetu bantu bebe ba tshijila, tuvua ne bumfumu mu dietu ditunga amu bidimu bikese. Baluishi betu kufika, kunyanga nzubu webe wa tshijila." 
Isaiah63:19 Kukadi bidimu bivule, tudi amu bamueneke bu bantu baudi kuyi uludika, baudi kuyi muinyike dina diebe. Eyi! Bu wewe mua kupanda diulu, bu wewe mua kupueka panuapa! Mikuna ivua mua kuzakala kumpala kuebe." 
Isaiah64:1 Pueka ne bukole bu kapia kadi kuosha nkunyi, kasabisha mayi. Nanku neuleje baluishi bebe bonsu, muudi Mvidi Mukulu bulelela! Bukua matunga nebuzakale kumpala kuebe," 
Isaiah64:2 pawenza malu adi atukuatshisha bowa, atuvua katuyi batekemene. Eyowa, pawapueka, mikuna neizakale kumpala kuebe." 
Isaiah64:3 Katshia kabena banji kumvua bamba, ki mbanji kumanya, mesu katshia ki mmamone mvidie mukuabu udi wambuluisha, bantu badi batekemena kudiye, muudi wewe ubambuluisha." 
Isaiah64:4 Wewe udi wakidila bantu badi benza muudi wewe musue, badi bitaba ku diyi diebe ne disanka, badi bakeba kulonda njila iudi mubaleje. Uvua mufika munda, bualu tuvua bakutombokele. Kadi netupande, patuikala tulonda njila webe utuvua balonde kale." 
Isaiah64:5 Tudi bonsu bantu babi, katuena bakanyine kukukuatshila mudimu. Tudi bu tshintu tshipia mikiya. Nansha mianda mimpe ituvua tuenza, idi kabidi mikuatshike muendi bu tshilamba tshidi ne makeji a mashi. Bualu bua bilema bietu, tudi bu mabeji mume a mutshi, adi lupepele luambula luya nawu." 
Isaiah64:6 Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi ukeba kukulomba diambuluisha, ujinga kudilengeja, ukuitaba. Bualu wewe mene kuena musue kutumona kabidi. Ukadi mumane kutubenga bua bilema bietu." 
Isaiah64:7 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi amu tatu wetu. Tuetu tudi diima. Wewe ke udi mutufumbe, tudi bonsu bintu biuvua muenze ku bianza biebe." 
Isaiah64:8 Maweja-Nangila, kutuleji tshiji tshipite bukole. Kuvuluki kashidi ntupakanyi itudi nayi. Tudi tukusengelela ne: vuluka mutudi bonsu bantu bebe." 
Isaiah64:9 Bimenga biebe bia tshijila mbishale dikolu. Yerushalayime mmushale tshipela, ne Siyone mmubutuke." 
Isaiah64:10 Nzubu webe wa Tshijila, muvua batatuetu bakutumbishila, nzubu wetu mulengele wa kutendelela, mbamoshe mujima kudi kapia. Muaba ewu utuvua banange bikole, ukadi mpindiewu dikolu." 
Isaiah64:11 Maweja-Nangila udi mua kushala upuwa amu nanku, paudi umona dikolu edi, anyi? Udi mua kushala mupuwilamu, utushiya mu dikenga didi ditupita anyi?" 
Isaiah65:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mvua musue kuambuluisha bantu aba, kadi kabavua bandomba diambuluisha nansha. Mvua mujinge kubenzela bimpe, kadi kabavua bankeba to. Nansha bantu abu kabayi bantendelela, mvua amu mubambile ne: “Ndipu, ndi mfika ”." 
Isaiah65:2 Meme mvua muoluele bantu bavua bantombokela bianza. Bantu aba bavua balonda njila mubi, uvuabu badisunguile." 
Isaiah65:3 Ke bantu badi bamfikisha tshiji misangu yonsu ku mesu a bantu. Badi balambula milambu mu mpangu yabu, boshila mvidie yabu ya tshianana manananshi pa bilambuilu bia tushole." 
Isaiah65:4 Badi basomba mu nkita, babuela mu mbuebue. Badi badia munyinyi wa ngulube, bateka mu malongu abu biakudia bidi ne mikiya." 
Isaiah65:5 Badi bambila bantu badi basambakena nabu ne: “Semenayi kule, kanundengi to, bualu ndi muntu wa tshijila. Patupu nudi mua kufua.” Pandi mmona malu adibu benza, ndi mpeta amu tshiji." 
Isaiah65:6 Kadi, ndi mumanye bionsu bivuabu benza. Tshiakupuwa kabidi to. Tshiakuikisha, amu meme mumane kubanyoka." 
Isaiah65:7 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: ndi ntangila malu mabi avuabu benze, ne avua bankambua babu benze kabidi. Bobu aba bavua boshila mvidie yabu ya dishima manananshi pa mikuna minene. Bavua bankeba tshiji pa mikuna mikese. Nenku, nembanyoke amu kubanyoka, bilondeshile malu abu mabi onsu avuabu benze kale." 
Isaiah65:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Padibu basangana mu budimi bua mvinyo tshisangi tshia tumuma tuimpe lutambe, badi bamba ne: “Katutshilengi, bualu netshitupeshe mvinyo muimpe.” Nengenze bia momumue ne bantu badi bandamate. Tshiakubashipa to." 
Isaiah65:9 Meme nemvudije bena tshisamba tshia Yakobe, ne bena diku dia Yuda. Bonsu aba bandi musungule, nebasombe pa mikuna yanyi minene, nebapiane ditunga. Bantu badi bandamate nebasemu nzubu yabu." 
Isaiah65:10 Bantu badi bankeba, nebadishe bimuna biabu mu mpata wa Sarone. Mu tshibandabanda tshia Akore ngombe yabu neipete lupangu, ne muaba wa kulala." 
Isaiah65:11 Kadi nuenu badi bengela nyima, badi bapua njila wa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila muoyi, nennuenzele tshinyi? Nuenu nudi nufila biakudia kudi mvidie Ngade, bua kupeta dikasa dimpe. Nudi nulambula mvidie wa Meni, maluvu mashilangane bua kuepuka dikasa dibi!" 
Isaiah65:12 Nanku ndi munusunguile lufu lua tshinyangu. Nenufue bonsu binu panshi, bua banukose mitu. Bualu, mvua munubikile, kadi nuenu nansha kuitaba. Mvua munuambile malu, kadi nuenu nansha kunteleja. Nutu nuenza amu bindi mubenge. Nudi nusungula amu bidi kabiyi mua kunsankisha." 
Isaiah65:13 Telejayi, tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba: nuenu nenuikale ne nzala, kadi bantu banyi nebadie. Nuenu nenufue nyota, kadi bantu banyi nebanue. Nuenu nenufue bundu, kadi bantu banyi nebasanke." 
Isaiah65:14 Nebikale ne disanka dinene, nebele mbila bua diakalenga didibu nadi. Kadi nuenu, yenu mbila neikale ya dikenga. Nenukengakane ne muadi, muoyi neunushikile munda." 
Isaiah65:15 Bantu banyi nebangate dina dienu, bua kutshipa nadi bantu bakuabu. Nebambe ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu akushipe, bu mudiye mushipe kampande nansha kansanga.” Kadi, bantu banyi badi bandamate, nebapete dina dikuabu." 
Isaiah65:16 Bantu badi basue kujingila bakuabu diakalenga mu ditunga, nebabele lupemba, batela amu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu umue, udi ukumbaja malaya ende. Bantu badi basue kulaya malaya, nebaalaye batela amu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu umue udi ukumbaja malaya ende. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Eyowa, makenga a kale bantu kabakuavuluka kabidi to. Neajimine ku mesu anyi." 
Isaiah65:17 Bualu nemfuke diulu dipiadipia, ne buloba bupiabupia. Kabakuvuluka kabidi diulu dikulukulu ne buloba bukulukulu. Kabakubielela kabidi meji to." 
Isaiah65:18 Sankayi amu kusanka. Kanulekedi to. Nuele amu mbila ya disanka, bua bionsu bindi mfuka. Yerushalayime undi mfuka neikale amu ne disanka. Bantu badi basombamu nebuwule ne musangelu tente." 
Isaiah65:19 Meme kabidi nengikale ne musangelu bualu bua Yerushalayime ewu. Nenguwule ne disanka, pandi mvuluka bantu banyi. Kabakumvua kabidi mu Yerushalayime nansha miadi, nansha mbila ya dikenga." 
Isaiah65:20 Kabakusangana kabidi muana mutekete ufua ne bidimu bikese, nansha mukulumpe udi kayi ukulakaja uboboka. Bualu wafua mutekete amu udi ufua pa mvula lukama. Wikale kayi mupete bidimu ebi, nebamutangile bu muntu muela mulawu." 
Isaiah65:21 Muntu yeye muase nzubu, nealalemu bulelela. Yeye mukune mionji ya mvinyo, neanue maluvu ayi bulelela." 
Isaiah65:22 Kukuasa kabidi nzubu, bua muntu mukuabu kumuangata to. Kakukuna kabidi bintu, bua muntu mukuabu kusanka nabi to. Bantu banyi nebalale panu baboboke, amu mudi mitshi ilala bidimu ne bidimu. Bantu bandi nnanga nebasanke ne bintu bivuabu bapete ku midimu ivuabu bakuate." 
Isaiah65:23 Kabakukuata kabidi midimu amu patupu. Kabakulela kabidi bana, bua bana kufuabu to. Bualu bobu ne bana babu, nebikale bena tshisamba tshindi ngela lupemba." 
Isaiah65:24 Kabayi banji kumbikila, meme nembitabe. Kabayi banji kujikija dindomba, meme nkadi mumane kumvua." 
Isaiah65:25 Nyama wa mubuabua ne kana ka mukoku nebidiile pamue. Nyama wa ntambue neadie bisosa bu ngombe. Nyoka bua kudiaye, neadie amu lupuishi. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bantu kabakuenza kabidi bibi, nansha kukengesha muntu nabu pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila to." 
Isaiah66:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Diulu didi nkuasa wanyi wa bukalenga, buloba ntshitekelu tshia makasa anyi. Nzubu unudi mua kungashila meme, nnzubu kaayi? Muaba undi meme mua kusomba mmuaba kaayi?" 
Isaiah66:2 Tshionsu tshinudi numona, meme ke udi mutshienze ne bianza bianyi. Ndi nnuambila ne: bionsu ebi mbianyi. Kadi muntu undi ntangila ne disanka, ke muena muoyi wa bupuekele, udi unyingalala bua mibi yende, udi uteleja diyi dianyi ne luzakalu, ungitaba." 
Isaiah66:3 Bualu bantu aba bua kulambula milambu, badi bashipa ngombe. Kadi badi mua kushipa kabidi muntu mene. Badi bakosa mukoku muminu, kadi badi bashipa kabidi ne mbua mene. Badi balambula mulambu wa bia pa madimi. Kadi badi amu mua kulambula nansha mashi a ngulube. Badi bosha manananshi, kadi badi banemeka kabidi mvidie ya dishima. Bualu bantu aba mbadisunguile njila udibu basue kulonda. Bidi bibasankisha ke bindi mbenga meme." 
Isaiah66:4 Meme kabidi nensanke padibu bakenga. Nembatumine makenga onsu, adibu batshina. Bualu ndi muele lubila, kadi muntu nansha umue kena mungitabe. Meme kubambila malu, kadi kabavua bateleja. Bavua benza amu bindi mubenge. Bavua basungula amu bidi kabiyi binsankisha.”" 
Isaiah66:5 Nuenu badi bateleja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila ne luzakalu, bamuitaba, umvuayi tshidiye unuambila. Nudi ne bena kuenu, badi banudiwula, banuipata munkatshi muabu, bualu nudi balamate Mvidi Mukulu. Badi banuamba, baseka ne: “Maweja-Nangila aleje bukole buende tumone munudi basanka!” Kadi bobu nebafue bundu." 
Isaiah66:6 Telejayi amu mutoyi udi mu tshimenga, mutoyi udi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ke Maweja-Nangila udi unyoka baluishi bende, bua malu abu mabi." 
Isaiah66:7 Tshimenga tshianyi tshidi bu mukaji udi ukeba kulela. Makenga a pa lulelu kaayi manji kumukuata, udi ulela muana wa balume, kayi muanji kubuela mu dikenga dia pa lulelu." 
Isaiah66:8 Katshia bantu ki mbumvue bualu bua nanku to! Kabena banji kumona mudi malu a nanku enzeka to! Ditunga didi mua kumueneka dituku dimue anyi? Badi mua kulela tshisamba diba dimue anyi? Kadi ke bidi bienzekela Siyone. Utshibuelelaku mu makenga a pa lulelu, ukadi ulela bana bende!" 
Isaiah66:9 Maweja-Nangila udi unukonka ne: “Meme mumane kufikisha mukaji ku tshikondu tshidiye mua kulela, ndi mua kumukandika bua kaledi muana anyi? Meme mumane kulongolola diledibua dia tshisamba, tshiena mua kukandika bua bualu ebu kabuenzeki to!”" 
Isaiah66:10 Nuenu badi bananga Yerushalayime, sankayi nende pamue, sangulukayi bualu buende. Nuenu bonsu bavua mu madilu, bua pavuaye mu dikenga, sankayi nende mpindiewu." 
Isaiah66:11 Nenku nutshionkomoke! Nenudie nuukute, padi Yerushalayime unusamba, unudisha, mudi mukaji wamusha muana dibele, bua bana banue dibele ne disanka." 
Isaiah66:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi ntuma musulu wa diakalenga ku Yerushalayime, ne biuma bia matunga makuabu bungi bu musulu udi mupasalale mu tshisuku. Nenkukube mudi mamu wamusha muanende, umutuala ku lubese, umukongololuela pa bibelu biende." 
Isaiah66:13 Eyowa, meme kabidi nenkusambe mudi mamu usamba muanende, — nenkusambe nansha mu Yerushalayime! —" 
Isaiah66:14 Bushuwa, nenumone bionsu abi. Diba adi nenusanke. Bukole nebupingane mu mifuba yenu, mudi bisosa bipeta muoyi mu mvula mbedi.” Maweja-Nangila nealeje bantu bende mudiye ne bukole. Kadi nealeje baluishi bende tshiji tshidiye natshi." 
Isaiah66:15 Tangilayi Maweja-Nangila udi ufika mu kapia. Matempu ende a mvita adi afika bu mvula wa tshipupu. Maweja-Nangila mmuwule ne kanyinganyinga, udi ufika bua kujikija tshiji tshiende, kukumbaja mu ndimi ya kapia bivuaye muambile bantu ne mikanu." 
Isaiah66:16 Ku kapia ne ku muele wa mvita, ke kudi Maweja-Nangila ukosela nsambu mu bukua bantu. Bantu nebafue bapite bungi." 
Isaiah66:17 Ndi ngamba apa bua bantu badi bumusha mikiya, bua kubuelabu mu mpangu mikuabu bua kutendelela mvidie. Badi bimane panyima pa muntu udi munkatshi, badia munyinyi wa ngulube, nansha wa mpuku, nansha bintu bikuabu bidibu kabayi mua kudia. Bantu aba nebabutuke tshiapamue. Maweja-Nangila ke udi wakula awu." 
Isaiah66:18 Udi mumanye malu mabi adibu benza, ne meji adibu bela. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi makasa mu njila. Nkadi pa kusangisha bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu, ba miakulu yonsu, bua bamone lumu lundi nalu." 
Isaiah66:19 Nembaleje mundi ne bumfumu. Kadi bantu bakuabu bandi mumane kupandisha, nembatume mu bisamba bia bena Tarshishe, bena Pule, bena Lude, — ke bantu badi bamanye bikole mua kuela mikete, — bia bena Tubale ne bena Yavane, ne mu bidiila bidi kulekule. Miaba yonsu ayi bantu kabena banji kumvua butumbi buanyi. Kadi bantu bambatuma, nebamanyishe bena bisamba ebi butumbi buanyi." 
Isaiah66:20 Nenku bisamba ebi nebipingaje kuabu bana benu bonsu bavua muabu. Nebabande pa tubalu, mu matempu a mvita, ne pa bipoyi. Nebende panyima pa mpunde ne pa tumelu. Nebafike ku mukuna wanyi wa tshijila mu Yerushalayime. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ke mulambu udibu bandambula. Nenguanyishe amu mundi nganyishe mulambu udi bena Izrayele bantuadila mu nzubu wanyi, mu ngesu milengeja." 
Isaiah66:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nensungule kabidi munkatshi mua matunga a bende aa, batuangaji banyi ne bena Levi babambuluishi." 
Isaiah66:22 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndelanganyi yebe ne dina diebe nebishale kashidi kumpala kuanyi, amu mudi diulu dipiadipia ne buloba bupiabupia bindi mfuka bua kashidi." 
Isaiah66:23 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nenku ku ngondu ku ngondu, dituku dia Dikisha dionsu, bantu ba pa buloba bujima nebafike bua kuntendelela." 
Isaiah66:24 Nenku nebafike bua kumona bitalu bia bantu bavua bantombokele. Tshikusu tshidi tshibikunya katshiena mua kufua to. Kapia kadi kabiosha, kakena kajima lukasa to. Bidibu bamone nebikuatshishe bantu bonsu buowa." 
Jeremiah1:1 Mu mukanda emu, badi batuambila malu onsu adi Yirmeya, muana wa Ilkiya muambe, ne adiye muenze. Yirmeya uvua wa mu diku dia batuangaji. Batuangaji abu bavua basombela mu musoku wa Anatote, mu buloba bua bena Binyamine." 
Jeremiah1:2 Yoshiya, muana wa Amone, mumane kulala mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bidimu dikumi ne bisatu, Maweja-Nangila kutuadija kuambila Yirmeya malu onsu aa."
