Jeremiah1:3 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila malu tshiakabidi tshikondu tshivua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, too ne ku ndekelu wa bukalenga bua Sedekiya, muana mukuabu wa Yoshiya, mmumue ne too ne mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshia bukalenga ebu, pavuabu bakuata bena Yerushalayime mu ngondu muitanu wa tshidimu atshi, baye nabu mu bupika." 
Jeremiah1:4 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah1:5 — Nkavua mukumanye, tshiyi muanji kukufumba munda mua mamuebe. Nkavua mukusungule, kabayi banji kukulela. Nkavua mukufundile mudimu wa kuya kuambila bisamba bionsu miaku yanyi." 
Jeremiah1:6 Ke meme kuandamuna ne: — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ntshidi muana mukese. Tshiena mua kuakula munkatshi mua bantu to." 
Jeremiah1:7 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Lekela kuamba ne: ntshidi muana. Neuye kudi bantu bonsu kundi nkutuma. Neubambile miaku yonsu indi nkumanyisha. 
Jeremiah1:8 Kutshinyi bantu aba to, bualu ndi nebe bua kukusungidila. Ke bivua Maweja-Nangila mungambile." 
Jeremiah1:9 Pashishe kuololaye tshianza kundengaye mukana, ungambila ne: — Wewe, newambile bantu miaku yanyi." 
Jeremiah1:10 Tangila, lelu ndi nkupa mudimu wa kuenza munkatshi mua bisamba ne makalenga, wa kujuula ne miji, ne wa kushimbula, wa kubutula, ne wa kunyangakaja, kadi kabidi wa kuasulula ne kukuna." 
Jeremiah1:11 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kunkonka ne: — Yirmeya, udi umona tshinyi? Meme kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona ditamba dia mutshi wa amande, mutshi udi udimuja bantu." 
Jeremiah1:12 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Udi mumone bimpe. Meme ndi ndimuija, bualu nenkumbaje tshindi muambe." 
Jeremiah1:13 Maweja-Nangila kunkonka kabidi ne: — Yirmeya, mpindiewu udi umona tshinyi? Meme kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona luesu lunene, luwule tente ne mayi asaba. Ludi luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga, lutangila kundi." 
Jeremiah1:14 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kunjinguluila ne: — Udi mumone bimpe. Dikenga nedifumine ku luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga bua kukengesha bantu bonsu badi basomba mu ditunga." 
Jeremiah1:15 Teleja tshindi ngamba: Nembikile bantu bonsu ba mu makalenga a ku mutu kua ditunga. Bamfumu babu nebafike, nebateke nkuasa yabu kumpala kua biibi bia Yerushalayime. Bimana bia Yerushalayime, ne bimenga bionsu bia bena Yuda, nebabinyungulukile bua kubikuata." 
Jeremiah1:16 Nennyoke bena ditunga nanku, bilondeshile mushindu undi mukose tshilumbu tshiabu, bua malu mabi onsu adibu benze. Bantu aba bavua bambenge meme, baye kulambula milambu kudi mvidie mikuabu. Bavua batendelele mvidie, mvidie ivuabu badienzele!" 
Jeremiah1:17 Wewe Yirmeya, kolesha muoyi. Umuka! Uye kubambila bionsu bindi nkuambila bua wewe kubamanyisha. Kabatshinyi to. Wewe mubatshine, meme nenkukuatshishe bowa kumpala kuabu." 
Jeremiah1:18 Biangatshile lelu, nenkupeshe bukole. Newikale bu tshimenga tshikolesha ne bimana, bu dikunji dia tshiamu, bu tshimana tshiasa ne tshiamu tshikunze, kumpala kua bena ditunga bonsu, kua bamfumu ba bena Yuda, balombodi ba mu bukalenga, batuangaji ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, badi basomba mu bukalenga." 
Jeremiah1:19 Nebakuluishe, kadi kabena bakutshimuna to. Bualu meme ndi nebe bua kukusungidila. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah2:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah2:2 — Yirmeya, uye kumanyisha muntu yonsu udi mu Yerushalayime ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi muvuluke mushindu uuvua kale. Ndi muvuluke muuvua mundamate, pautshivua nsongakaji! Uvua munnange bikole, patutshivua babangilangane! Uvua undonda mu tshipela, muaba udi kauyi utoloka tshintu." 
Jeremiah2:3 Wewe Izrayele, uvua wanyi meme nkayanyi, bu biakudia bia tshianyi bidibu banowa. Bantu bonsu bavua bakuluisha meme kubakengesha. Diakamue kupetabu diakabi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah2:4 Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, nuenu bena mu bisamba bionsu bia Izrayele, telejayi bindi ngamba." 
Jeremiah2:5 Maweja-Nangila udi unukonka ne: Bankambua benu bavua bammone ne bualu bubi kaayi? Bakandekela bua tshinyi? Bakambenga amu bua kutendelela mvidie ya tshianana. Nanku bobu kabidi badi bantu ba tshianana! 
Jeremiah2:6 Kabavua nanyi bualu, kabavua bebejangana ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila udi penyi? Yeye ke uvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu, mutupitshishe mu tshipela, muaba muume uvua ne mbuwa, muaba kauyi mayi, udi ukuatshisha bantu bowa, muaba udi muntu kayi upitshila, kayi wasa nzubu.’" 
Jeremiah2:7 Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua munufikishe mu ditunga didi ne biakudia bia bungi, bua nuenu kupeta biakudia bisheme bia mishindu yonsu bidi muaba awu. Ditunga edi divua dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila. Nuenu kubuelamu, kadi nuenu kunyanga ditunga edi ne mikiya. Muaba awu uvua wanyi meme. Nuenu kuunyanga, kushalawu muaba mubi mutambe." 
Jeremiah2:8 Batuangaji kabena bankeba ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila udi penyi?’ Bantu bavua bamanye mikenji bikole, kumpangabu. Balombodi ba bantu kuntombokela meme Maweja-Nangila. Bambi kuambila bantu malu mu dina dia Baale. Bantu bonsu kutendelela mvidie ivua kayiyi ne bukole." 
Jeremiah2:9 Nanku, ndi nenu tshilumbu. Nendumbuluishe ndelanganyi yenu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah2:10 Nanku, nuye kukonka bantu badi mu bidiila bia bena Ngreke, banuambile. Nuye kukonka bena Arabe badi mu Kedare. Nenujadike ne: bobu kabena benza bibi, munudi nuenu nuenza to." 
Jeremiah2:11 Nenujadike ne: kakuena tshisamba tshidi tshianji kubenga mvidie yatshi. Kabidi mvidie ayi, kayena nansha mvidie ya bushuwa! Kadi, tshisamba tshianyi tshia bena Izrayele, nansha bobu bamane kumona butumbi buanyi, kumbengabu, kunshintakaja ne mvidie idi kayiyi mua kubambuluisha." 
Jeremiah2:12 Nuenu badi mu diulu, kemayi bikole. Uminyinayi ne bowa, bua bualu bua mushindu ewu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah2:13 Bantu banyi bena Izrayele mbenze malu mabi abidi: Mbambenge meme, mpokolu wa mayi mimpe. Mbadiumbuile biina bia mayi. Kadi biina bia mayi abi mbimane kuela mitanta, kabiena mua kulama mayi to!" 
Jeremiah2:14 Mpindiewu bena Izrayele mbapika bavuabu basumbe anyi? Bavua babalele bapika bua bashale nanku kashidi anyi? Nansha kakese! Kadi mudibu bashale lelu tshiakudia tshia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mbishi? 
Jeremiah2:15 Bena bisamba abi badi bakungula bu nyama ya lonji, badi baluisha bena Izrayele, badi babakanyina. mBanyangakaje ditunga dia bena Izrayele bikole, bikuate bowa. Mbuoshe bimenga bia bena Izrayele. Bantu kabena basamu kabidi to." 
Jeremiah2:16 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Memfise ne tshia Tapanese mene kubeyabu bena Izrayele nsuki. 
Jeremiah2:17 Bionsu ebi mbienzeke, bualu nuenu bena Izrayele nudi badikebele diakabi. Nudi babenge Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wenu, uvua unulombola mu njila." 
Jeremiah2:18 Mpindiewu, nudi nuya kuenza tshinyi mu Ejipitu? Nudi nuya kunua mayi a musulu wa Nile anyi? Nudi nuya kudi bena Ashure bua tshinyi? Bua kunua mayi a mu musulu wa Perate anyi?" 
Jeremiah2:19 Nuenu bena Izrayele, badi banunyoka bua bubi buenu. Badi banukengesha bualu nudi bantomboji! Nenku, mimanye ne: kulekela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, kubenga kumutshina, mbualu butambe bubi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika nanku. eku ne eku" 
Jeremiah2:20 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Wewe Izrayele, kukadi matuku a bungi audi mumbenge, muntombokele, wamba ne: “Ndi musue kudisombela.” Ke paudi ulala miaba yonsu pa mikuna, ne muinshi mua mitshi idi ne dileji dia bungi, bu mukaji muena tshiendenda." 
Jeremiah2:21 Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua munukune, mudibu bakune mionji ya mvinyo muimpe. Nuvua bu maminu mimpe amvua mukune mu buloba. Kadi nudi banyanguke bua tshinyi? Nukadi bu mionji ya mvinyo mibole, indi tshiyi mua kumanya kabidi to." 
Jeremiah2:22 Izrayele, nansha wewe muowe mayi ne nsabanga, nansha wewe mudilabe nsabanga wa bungi, bubi buebe kabuena bujimina to. Budi amu bumueneka pambidi pebe pandi nkutangila. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah2:23 Izrayele, mmunyi muudi ukimina kuamba ne: “Tshiena ne manyanu, tshiena mutendelele mvidie Baale?” Tangila biudi wenza mu tshibandabanda! Utonde bionsu biuvua muenze! Udi bu muana wa kamelu mukaji, udi unyemakana eku ne eku." 
Jeremiah2:24 Udi bu nyama wa mpunde mukaji, udi muibidile mu tshisuku, mumanye njila yonsu ya mu tshipela. Nyama awu udi ununkila lupepele ne lukuka lukole. Kakuena tshidi mua kumukandika bua kuyaye kudi nyama mikuabu. Nyama ya mpunde milume idi ikeba mukaji awu, imupeta lukasa misangu yonsu idiye mumvue muoyi wa kuya kudi mulume." 
Jeremiah2:25 “Wewe Izrayele, udimuke! Paudi unyema lubilu lukole neutapike ku makasa, muminu webe neume ne nyota!” Kadi, wewe udi wamba ne: “Lekela kulengelela, ndi munange mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Ndi musue kuyitendelela.”" 
Jeremiah2:26 Nuenu bena Izrayele: bakalenga ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga, batuangaji ne bambi, matuku makese aa nenuikale ne bundu, bu muivi udibu bajikidila." 
Jeremiah2:27 Nudi nuambila lupingu lua mutshi ne: “Wewe ke tatu wetu!” Nudi nuambila lupingu lua dibue ne: “Wewe ke mamu udi mutulele!” Pa mutu pa nuenu kupingana kundi meme Maweja-Nangila, nudi bangele nyima. Kadi panuapeta dikenga, nenumbikile nuamba ne: “Luaku, utupandishe!”" 
Jeremiah2:28 Kadi, meme Maweja-Nangila nennukonke ne: “Mvidie inuvua badienzele idi penyi? Pikalayi ne bukole, inusungidile, panudi mu dikenga! Bualu nuenu bena Yuda, bungi bua bimenga bienu, ke bungi bua mvidie yenu.”" 
Jeremiah2:29 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Nudi nundiwula bua tshinyi? Nuenu bonsu nukadi bambenge. 
Jeremiah2:30 Meme kununyoka, kadi kabiena binuenzela bualu to. Kanuena bateleja mibelu eyi. Kadi nuenu kushipa bambi benu, bu nyama ya ntambue ya lonji." 
Jeremiah2:31 (Bantu badi babala bualu ebu mpindiewu, bateleje bimpe tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba! ) Bena Izrayele, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnukuatshisha bowa mudi tshipela nansha mudi ditunga didi ne miidima bikuatshisha bantu bowa anyi? Eyi, bantu banyi bena Izrayele, mmunyi munudi nuamba ne: “Tudi tuenza mutudi basue, katuena tupingana kuudi!”" 
Jeremiah2:32 Nsongakaji udi mua kupua muoyi bilengejilu ne mabue a mushinga mukole anyi? Mukaji udi ku dibaka udi mua kupua muoyi mukaba muimpe muluka, uvuaye muvuale mu tshibilu tshia dibaka anyi? Nansha kakese. Kadi nuenu bantu banyi bena Izrayele, nudi bampue muoyi matuku a bungi kaayi mua kubala to." 
Jeremiah2:33 Bu muudi ne budimu mu nsombelu webe udi udikebela baudi musue kunanga. Bua kubapeta, ukadi muibidilangane ne buenzavi." 
Jeremiah2:34 Badi basangana mashi a bakengi, badi kabayi ne bualu too ne ku nzemba ya bilamba bienu. Nuvua babashipe bua tshinyi? Kanuvua babajikidile batula biibi bia nzubu yenu bua kuiba to. Kadi nansha nuenu benze bionsu abi," 
Jeremiah2:35 nudi amu nuamba ne: katuena ne tshilumbu to. Maweja-Nangila ke udi mupile, bualu udi utufikila munda kapayi bualu. Kadi bu munudi nuamba ne: katuena benze bualu bubi, ndi musue kunulumbuluisha." 
Jeremiah2:36 Nudi nutua eku ne eku, nukeba kutua ndondu ne matunga a bende. Kadi bena Ejipitu nebanufuishe bundu, muvua bena Ashure banufuishe bundu." 
Jeremiah2:37 Nenupingane ne bundu, babuikile bianza ku mesu. Bualu, meme Maweja-Nangila, tshiena musue bua nukebe bantu ba nanku bua banuambuluishe. Kanuena mua kupeta diakalenga kudi bantu aba to." 
Jeremiah3:1 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Pikala mulume mubenge mukajende, mumuipate, mukaji awu kumuselabu kudi mulume mukuabu, bayende wa kale udi mua kumuangata kabidi bu mukajende anyi? Nansha kakese! Ditunga didi mua kunyanguka. Kadi, wewe Izrayele, ndi njadika ne: udi mumane kuenda tshiendenda ne balume ba bungi. Muudi musue bua meme kukuangata kabidi bu mukajanyi mbishi?" 
Jeremiah3:2 Tangila ku mikuna. Udi mua kumona muaba nansha umue udibu kabayi balale nebe anyi? Udi musombe ku mpenga kua njila muindile babayebe, mudi bena Arabe bindile bantu mu tshipela, bua kuiba bintu biabu. Udi unyanga ditunga ne tshiendenda, kabidi ne buenzavi buebe." 
Jeremiah3:3 Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mubenge bua mvula kaloki nansha ku ntuadijilu nansha ku ndekelu kua tshidimu. Kadi, wewe ne tshitunu udi wenda amu tshiendenda, kuyi utonda bubi buebe." 
Jeremiah3:4 Mpindiewu udi umbikila ne dikamakama, wela mbila ne: “Tatu wanyi, mulunda wanyi wa ku buana," 
Jeremiah3:5 Mumfikile munda kashidi anyi? Neushale nanyi ne lukuna kashidi anyi?” Eyowa, ke muudi wamba nanku. Kadi, kuena ulekela kuenza malu mabi, audi mumanye mupite bakaji bakuabu!" 
Jeremiah3:6 Tshikondu tshi vua mukalenga Yoshiya mu bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Udi mumone mudi Izrayele wenda tshiendenda anyi? Udi uya miaba yonsu ku mikuna, ne muinshi mua mitshi yonsu idi ne dileji dia bungi, bua kuenda tshiendenda." 
Jeremiah3:7 Meme kuela meji ne: Izrayele neapingane kundi. Kadi kena mupingane to. Yuda ntomboji, muanabu ne Izrayele, uvua mumone bionsu ebi." 
Jeremiah3:8 Yuda mmujadike mumvua mupeshe Izrayele muena tshiendenda mukanda wa kushipa nawu dibaka, mumvua mumubenge, mumulekele bua tshiendenda tshiende. Kadi Yuda ntomboji kena utshina to. Kena umona bionsu ebi bu bualu to. Yeye mene ukadi ubanga kuenda tshiendenda." 
Jeremiah3:9 Kuendaye tshiendenda ne mvidie ya mabue ne ya mitshi. Ke muvua Yuda munyangakaje ditunga. 
Jeremiah3:10 Yuda ntomboji, muanabu ne Izrayele, yeye mumane kuenza bionsu ebi, kena mupingane kundi ne muoyi mujima to, kadi amu ne miaku patupu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah3:11 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Izrayele, muena tshiendenda, udi umueneka bu muimpe pa kumufuanyikija ne Yuda ntomboji." 
Jeremiah3:12 Nanku, ndi nkutuma bua uye kuela mbila luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga ne: Wewe Izrayele muena tshiendenda, pingana. Tshiena mukufikile kabidi munda to. Bualu ndi ne luse. Tshiena nshala ne lukuna kashidi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah3:13 Kadi utonde bubi buebe, bualu uvua muntombokele meme, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe. Uvua muye miaba yonsu kudi mvidie ya bisamba bikuabu. — Wewe kuikisha muinshi mua mitshi yonsu ivua ne dileji dia bungi. — Kuena munteleje to. Ke miaku ya Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah3:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bana bavua bambenge, pinganayi. Meme ke mfumuenu. Nensungule muntu umue mu tshimenga etshi, bantu babidi mu musoku wawa, bua kubapingaja mu Siyone." 
Jeremiah3:15 Nennupeshe balombodi bandi musue, badi mua kunuludika bimpe." 
Jeremiah3:16 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tshikondu atshi, nenuikale ba bungi. Nenuvulangane mu ditunga. Kadi kabakuakula kabidi bua mushete wa ndondu to. Kabakuela meji ku mushete awu nansha. Nebaupue muoyi. Kabakunyingalala bua mushete awu. Kabakuenza mushete mukuabu." 
Jeremiah3:17 Bualu tshikondu atshi, nebinyike Yerushalayime ne: “Nkuasa wa bukalenga bua Maweja-Nangila.” Bisamba bionsu nebisangile mu Yerushalayime bua kuntumbisha. Nebalekele tshitunu tshivuabu natshi tshia kuenza buenzayi bu bantu bapale." 
Jeremiah3:18 Diba adi, bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele nebumvuangane. Bonsu babidi nebafumine mu ditunga didi ku mutu kua dienu, bua kupingana mu ditunga dimvua mupeshe bankambua babu bua dishale diabu." 
Jeremiah3:19 Meme Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: Eyi, ndi musue, bua wikale muananyi muanabute. Ndi musue kukupa ditunga dimpe, ne bupianyi budi bupite bintu bionsu bia pa buloba! Meme kutekemena ne: Neumbikile ne: “Tatu wanyi.” Kuakumbenga kabidi to." 
Jeremiah3:20 Kadi nuenu bena Izrayele, nuvua bantombokele mudi mukaji utombokela bayende. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah3:21 Meyi adi umvuika pa mikuna. Bena Izrayele ke badi badila, batendakana. Bualu bavua bambenge, bapambuke mu njila. Bavua bampue muoyi, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Jeremiah3:22 Nuenu bana bavua bambenge, pinganayi kundi. Nennufuile luse bua buenzavi buenu! Ke tuetu aba, tudi tupingana kuudi, bualu wewe, Maweja-Nangila, ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Jeremiah3:23 Eyowa, bavua batudinga, tuetu kutendelela mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu pa mikuna. Tuetu kuenza mitoyi ya patupu pa mikuna. Kadi, anu wewe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, ke udi mua kutupandisha tuetu bena Izrayele." 
Jeremiah3:24 Biangatshile ku buana buetu, mvidie mubi Baale mmumane kubutula biakudia bionsu bivua baledi betu bapete, bimuna binene ne bikese, bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
Jeremiah3:25 Tulalayi panshi bua bundu. Bundu butubuikile! Bualu tudi benzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu bibi, ne tuetu ne baledi betu. Biangatshile ku buana buetu too ne mpindiewu, katuena bateleje bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu mutuambile." 
Jeremiah4:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Izrayele, wewe mudilengeje, udi mua kupingana kundi. Wewe mumushe mvidie mibi indi tshiyi musue kumona, kuakunyemakana kabidi to." 
Jeremiah4:2 Wewe muikale muntu wa muoyi umue, wa buakane ne wa luse, wewe muditshipe muambe ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi”, nanku bisamba bia bantu bakuabu nebindombe bua meme kubiela lupemba. Nebisanke bualu buanyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah4:3 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime ne: Nudime budimi bupiabupia, kanukunyi biakudia mu meba." 
Jeremiah4:4 Bu mudibu bamane kunuteka panshi, nuikale kabidi nanku mu mitshima yenu, bualu buanyi meme Maweja-Nangila. Nuenu bena Yuda, nuenu bena Yerushalayime, nuikale bantu ba tshijila, badi banyi meme Maweja-Nangila. Nuenu kanuyi benze nanku, tshiji tshianyi netshiteme bu kadilu bua buenzavi buenu. Nekabutule bintu bionsu. Kakuena muntu udi mua kujima kapia aku." 
Jeremiah4:5 Umanyishe bena Yuda ne: baluishi bakadi pabuipi. Udimuje bena Yerushalayime. Wele mpungi mu ditunga. Ela mbila ne diyi dikole, ubambile ne: nudisangishe mu bimenga bidibu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Jeremiah4:6 Asayi makunji adi aleja njila wa kuya ku Siyone bua kudipandisha. Kanuimanyi, kanujingakanyi to. Maweja-Nangila udi utuma dikenga dinene ne kabutu. Nebifumine luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga." 
Jeremiah4:7 Nyama wa ntambue kupatuka, ufumina mu tshipuka muvuaye. Mubutudi wa bisamba bia bantu udi mu njila. mMumbuke mu diende ditunga bua kunyangakaja ditunga dienu. Bimenga bienu nebibutuke, nebishale munda mutupu." 
Jeremiah4:8 Vualayi bilamba bikayapale, nudile miadi, nudituute bianza pa tshiadi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila utshidi ne tshiji, unulondakaja ne tshiji tshiende tshikole." 
Jeremiah4:9 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: pikala bionsu ebi bienzeka, mukalenga kakuikala ne muoyi mukole to. Balombodi ba mu bukalenga kabidi kabakuikala ne muoyi mukole to. Batuangaji nebatshine bikole. Bambi nebazakale." 
Jeremiah4:10 Nebakeme bamba ne: “Eyi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu uvua ushima bena tshisamba etshi. Uvua udinga bena Yerushalayime, ubalaya ne: nenumone diakalenga. Mpindiewu muele wa mvita ukadi pa kutukosa miminu!”" 
Jeremiah4:11 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila neambile bena Yerushalayime ne: “Lupepele ludi luosha mikuna nelufumine mu tshipela. Neluoshe bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Lupepele alu kabakuikala lutekete, ludi muntu mua kupepula nalu ntete ya kuenza bukula to." 
Jeremiah4:12 Lupepele ludi lufuma luseke alu ku diyi dianyi, nebikale lukole lupite. Mpindiewu ndi musue kunulumbuluisha.”" 
Jeremiah4:13 Monayi mubishi udi ubanda, bu mavuba a mvula wa tshipupu. Matempu ende a mvita adi anyema lubilu bu mvunde. Nyama yende ya tubalu idi inyema mipite nyunyi wa tshiminyi ku lubilu. Tuajiminyi, tuabutuku!" 
Jeremiah4:14 Yerushalayime, pawikala musue kupanda, ulekele lonji bebe. Neulekele meji mabi audi nawu diba kaayi?" 
Jeremiah4:15 Teleja bidi bantu badi bafuma ku Dane bamba. Ngumu ya dikenga idi ifuma ku mukuna wa Efrayime. 
Jeremiah4:16 Nuambile bisamba bionsu bualu ebu. Nudimuje bena Yerushalayime ne: baluishi bebe bakadi pabuipi. Badi bafuma kule, bela mbila ya mvita, bua kubisha bimenga bia bena Yuda." 
Jeremiah4:17 Kuelabu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime munkatshi anu bu mudi bansentedi balama budimi. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bionsu ebi bidi bienzeka bualu bavua bantombokele.” 
Jeremiah4:18 Yerushalayime, bionsu ebi bikuenzekela, bua buenzavi buebe, ne bua bubi buonsu buudi muenze. Udi umvua dikenga edi dikutonda, difika too ne ku muoyi webe wa munda. Didi bu muele udi mubuele mu muoyi webe." 
Jeremiah4:19 Eyi, dikenga didi dintatshisha too, dinkunya ne ku mala a munda. Muoyi udi untuuta bikole munda, ukeba kutayika. Tshiena mumvue dikisha to. Tshiena mua kupuwa to. Ndi mumvue mpungi ne mbila ya mvita." 
Jeremiah4:20 Badi bamanyisha kabutu pa kabutu. Badi banyangakaja ditunga dijima. Nzubu yetu ya ntenta badi bayishimbula, bapanda bilamba biayi diakamue." 
Jeremiah4:21 Nemmone mabendela a baluishi too ne ku diba kaayi? Nengikale anu muteleje muadi wa mpungi wa kuya ku mvita anyi? 
Jeremiah4:22 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bantu banyi bena Izrayele kabena ne lungenyi to, kabena bammanye. Mbana badi kabayi ne meji. Mbamanye amu mua kuenza malu mabi. Kadi, kabena bamanye mua kuenza malu mimpe to.”" 
Jeremiah4:23 Ndi ntangila mmona ne: buloba budi amu munda mutupu bu tshipela. Mu tshibuashibuashi kamuena mitotu kabidi to. Diulu kadiena dikenka to. 
Jeremiah4:24 Ndi mmona mikuna minene yupuka, mikuna mikese izakala." 
Jeremiah4:25 Ndi mmona ne: kakutshiena bantu to. Nyunyi yonsu kabidi mmimane kubuka. 
Jeremiah4:26 Ndi mumone ditunga divua ne mitshi ya bimuma, dishale tshipela. Bimenga bionsu bia mu ditunga mbinyanguke. Maweja-Nangila ke udi muenze bionsu abi, bua tshiji tshikole tshivuaye natshi." 
Jeremiah4:27 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ditunga dijima nedishale amu tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa. Kadi, tshiena musue kubutula bintu bionsu to." 
Jeremiah4:28 Nanku, buloba nebudile muadi. Mulu nemuenze miidima. Ndi ngamba bindi mumane kuela meji bua kuenza. Tshiena nkudimuna meyi andi mumane kuamba to. Tshiena nshintulula bualu ebu to.”" 
Jeremiah4:29 Bavua bela lubila ne: “Monayi matempu a mvita, monayi bena mata a mikete!” Bonsu bavua mu bimenga kunyema, kuya kusokoma muitu, kubanda pa mbuebue mu mikuna. Mu bimenga bionsu kushalamu mutupu, kamuyi muntu to." 
Jeremiah4:30 Kadi, wewe Yerushalayime, utshidi uvuala bilamba bikunze bimpe bua tshinyi? Utshidi uvuala bilengejilu biebe bia mpawungi, utshidi ulaba mishila pa makiki bua tshinyi? Udi mudilengeje tshianana. Bavua bakunange, mbamane kukubenga. Badi bajinga kukushipa." 
Jeremiah4:31 Ndi mumvue muadi bu wa mukaji ukeba kulela, mikemu ya nsongakaji udi ukeba kulela muanende wa kumpala. Lubila alu ndua Siyone, udi utua mikemu, utendakana, muolole bianza ne: “Eyi, nungambuluishe, bakadi banshipa!”" 
Jeremiah5:1 Endakanayi misesu yonsu mu Yerushalayime. Nutangile bimpe, nukebulule. Nutangile mu bisalu bionsu. Nuenu bapete muntu nansha umue udi wenza malu mempe, udi musue kuikala muntu muakane, nuenu basangane muntu wa nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila nemfuile Yerushalayime luse." 
Jeremiah5:2 Padi bena mu Yerushalayime baditshipa bamba ne: “Tudi tuditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi…”, mitshipu eyi nya dishima." 
Jeremiah5:3 Maweja-Nangila, tshidi tshikusankisha ki nnsombelu muimpe wa muntu anyi? Wewe kunyoka bantu bebe, kadi dinyoka adi kadiena dibelesha meji to. Uvua musue kubabutula bonsu, kadi kubengabu mibelu yebe. Bena Yerushalayime mbena tshitunu. Badi babenga kupingana kuudi." 
Jeremiah5:4 Meme kuamba ne: “Bantu badi benza nanku mbantu bapele nkayabu. Kabena ne lungenyi to. Kabena bamanye tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue. Kabena bamanye mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wabu. 
Jeremiah5:5 Ndi musue kuyukila ne bantu baneme. Bobu badi bamanye tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue. Badi bamanye mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wabu.” Kadi, bantu bonsu badi amu mushindu umue, kabena batshina kabidi Maweja-Nangila. Badi babenga mikenji ya ndondu ivuabu batue nende." 
Jeremiah5:6 Nanku, nyama wa ntambue neapatuke muitu, abaluishe. Nyama wa tshimungu neapatuke mu mpata, abasunsule. Tshisumpa ntambue netshibaalamine pabuipi ne bimenga biabu. Netshipandulule bantu bonsu badi bapatukamu. Bualu bantu badi amu ne buenzavi. Badi bela Mvidi Mukulu nyima misangu mipite bungi kayiyi kubala." 
Jeremiah5:7 Wewe Yerushalayime, ndi ne bua kukufuila luse bua tshinyi? Bana bebe mbambenge. Badi batela mvidie ya tshianana padibu baditshipa. Meme kubapesha bintu bionsu bua badie bukute. Kadi bobu kuenda anu tshiendenda. Badi basomba diba dionsu anu mu nzubu wa mukaji muena tshiendenda." 
Jeremiah5:8 Badi bu nyama midiunde ya tubalu milume, tshikondu tshidiyi ikeba nyama mikaji. Bonsu badi bakekemena, babikila mukajabende." 
Jeremiah5:9 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Tshiena mua kunyoka bantu aba anyi? Tshiena mua kudisombuela bua tshisamba tshia mushindu ewu anyi? 
Jeremiah5:10 Nentume baluishi bua kunyanga madimi abu a mvinyo adi pa mikuna. Kadi kabakunyangakaja madimi onsu to! Nebakose matamba adi kaayi anyi meme Maweja-Nangila! 
Jeremiah5:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bulelela, bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda, ne bena mu bukalenga bua Izrayele, bonsu mbantombokele!" 
Jeremiah5:12 Bena Yuda badi bayila Maweja-Nangila, bamba ne: “Kena ne tshidiye mua kutuenzela. Tuetu katuena mua kukenga. Kabena mua kutuluisha. Katuena mua kupeta tshiyole tshia nzala to." 
Jeremiah5:13 Bidi bambi benda bamba bidi bipite amu bu lupepele. Kabena bamba malu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila to. Malu adibu bamanyisha abakuate amu bobu!” 
Jeremiah5:14 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Bu mudibu bakula nanku, wewe Yirmeya, ndi nkutuma. Meyi audi wamba ikale bu kapia. Bantu aba nebikale bu nkunyi. Kapia aka nekababutule." 
Jeremiah5:15 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nuenu bena Izrayele, nennutumine tshisamba tshikuabu, tshidi tshifume kule bua tshinuluishe. Tshisamba atshi kabena mua kutshipita bukole to. Tshisamba atshi ntshia ku bisamba bia kale. Kanuena mua kumvua muakulu watshi. Bidi bantu aba bamba kanuena mua kubimanya to." 
Jeremiah5:16 Mikete ya mvita ya tshisamba atshi idi ibutula bantu. Bena mvita batshi bonsu badi bilobu. 
Jeremiah5:17 Bena tshisamba atshi nebadie bintu bienu bionsu, binudi nunowa, ne binutshidi nabi mu mayeba, bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji, bimuna bienu binene ne bikese, mionji yenu ya mvinyo ne mitshi yenu ya bimuma. Bena mvita nebanyangakaje bimenga bienu bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, muaba unudi nuela meji ne: njiwu kayena mua kutukuata munemu to.”" 
Jeremiah5:18 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tshikondu atshi, tshiena musue kunubutula bonsu to." 
Jeremiah5:19 Kadi, pakonkabu ne: “Maweja-Nangila wetu mmutukengeshe nenku bua tshinyi,” wewe Yirmeya, wandamune ne: “Bualu nudi babenge Maweja-Nangila, bua kutendelela mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu munda mua ditunga dienu. Nenku, nenuye momumue mu ditunga dia bende bua kukuatshila bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mudimu!”" 
Jeremiah5:20 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ambila ndelanganyi ya Yakobe manyisha bena Yuda ne: 
Jeremiah5:21 Telejayi, nuenu bantu tshianana, badi kabayi bumvua bualu, kabayi ne lungenyi. Nuenu nudi ne mesu, kadi kanuena numona to. Nudi ne matshi, kadi kanuena numvua." 
Jeremiah5:22 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Kanuena nuvuluka bukole buanyi anyi? Kanuena nuntshina bua tshinyi? Meme ndi muteke lusenga bua luikale mukalu wa mayi manene. Ludi bu nkila muasa bua kashidi. Mayi kaena mua kusambuka nkila awu to. Adi atuuta ku nkila, kadi nkila kena ubumbuka to. Mavuala adi atuutaku ne tshiona tshikole, kadi kaena asambuka nkila to." 
Jeremiah5:23 Kadi nuenu nudi bantu ba tshitunu. Nudi bantu batomboke. Nuenu kuntombokela meme Maweja-Nangila, nuenu kumuka kundi, muntu yonsu ulonda wende njila." 
Jeremiah5:24 Kadi nuvua mua kuamba ne: “Tudi mua kunemeka bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Bualu udi utupa mvula amu pa diba diende. Kabidi ku tshidimu tshionsu udi ukuata mudimu, bua bintu bia mu madimi bipie diba diakane.”" 
Jeremiah5:25 Buenzayi buenu mbunyangishe bionsu ebi. Bubi buenu kunupangisha masanka onsu aa. 
Jeremiah5:26 Munkatshi mua bantu banyi bena Izrayele mudi bantu badi kabayi ne ditaba, kabayi balama mikenji. Badi bu bilembi bidi bialamina nyunyi bua kuyikuata. Basokome munkatshi mua mitshi, badi bateya bantu, babakuata." 
Jeremiah5:27 Bu mudi nsanji muwule tente ne nyunyi, ke mudi nzubu ya bena Izrayele miwule tente ne bintu bivuabu bapete mu buivi. Ke padi bena Izrayele bapete bukole, bapete bubanji bua bungi." 
Jeremiah5:28 Bena Izrayele badi badiunda bikole, mubidi wabu mmusenene. Kadi badi anu benza malu mabi, kabayi bapungila. Kabena bakosa nsambu pa yoyi, kabena bakuila bana ba nshiya mu bilumbu biabu, bua bamone mua kubinga. Kabena bambuluisha bapele, bua bapete bidibu ne bua kupeta." 
Jeremiah5:29 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Tshiena mua kunyoka bantu aba anyi? Tshiena mua kudisombuela bua ditunga dia nanku anyi? 
Jeremiah5:30 Bualu budi buenzeka mu ditunga emu mbualu budi bukemesha, bukuatshisha bowa." 
Jeremiah5:31 Bambi, badi bamba malu mu dina dia mvidie ya tshianana. Batuangaji badi bakeba amu kudisankisha nkayabu. Bantu banyi bena Izrayele badi banyisha bionsu ebi. Kadi, ku nshikidilu nenuenze tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah6:1 Nuenu bena Binyamine, umbukayi mu Yerushalayime! Nunyeme bua kudipandisha. Elayi mpungi ku tshimenga tshia Tekowa. Elayi tshimunyi kulu pa mukuna wa Bete-Kereme, numanyishe bantu bualu. Bualu, dikenga dinene ne kabutu bidi binuvuila, bifumina luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga." 
Jeremiah6:2 Tshimenga tshia Siyone ntshimpe tshitambe. Kadi nebatshibutule. 
Jeremiah6:3 Bamfumu ba baluishi nebafike ne bena mvita babu, mudi balami ba mikoku bafika ne mikoku yabu bisumbu ne bisumbu. Nebabuele mu Siyone, mulami yonsu ulomba muaba wa kudisha mikoku yende." 
Jeremiah6:4 Nebele mbila ne: “Jukayi, tuluishe Yerushalayime, tumuluishe munda munya. Ndiakabi kaayi edi! Diba dikadi dibuela! Mundidimbi wa dilolu udi ulepa." 
Jeremiah6:5 Kakuena bualu! Jukayi, tuluishe Yerushalayime butuku. Tunyangakaje nzubu yende mimpe.”" 
Jeremiah6:6 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, kutumina baluishi betu diyi, wamba ne: “Tapayi mitshi. Imanyikayi mushiki wa buloba bua kuluisha Yerushalayime.” Mbimpe kunyoka tshimenga etshi, bualu benatshi badi bakengeshangana bikole." 
Jeremiah6:7 Badi baleja lonji luabu kabayi bashikila, mudi mpokolu usukumuka mayi. Mu tshimenga atshi, badi bakula anu bua kushipangana ne bua kukengeshangana. Ndi mumone amu makenga ne mputa." 
Jeremiah6:8 “Wewe Yerushalayime, udimuke. Kuyi mudimuke, meme nenkubenge. Muebe nemushale anu tshipela, muaba udi bantu kabayi basa.”" 
Jeremiah6:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, kutuma diyi, kungambila ne: “Sangishayi bena Yerushalayime bonsu badi bashale ne muoyi, too ne ku wa ndekelu, anu mudi muntu upumbulula tumuma mu budimi bua mvinyo, mudi munowi upola tumuma tua mvinyo tuonsu tudi tushala ku mitshi!”" 
Jeremiah6:10 Udi mua kunteleja nnganyi? Bena Yerushalayime badi ne matshi mapate. Kabena basue kuteleja ne ntema to. Maweja-Nangila bionsu biudi ubambila, badi babiangata mu bilele, babibenga kashidi." 
Jeremiah6:11 Maweja-Nangila, tshiji tshikole tshiudi wewe natshi, meme kabidi ndi amu natshi. Tshiena kabidi ne mushindu wa kutshituyisha to. Tangalaja tshiji tshianyi atshi ne kudi bana badi mu misesu. Utshipumuine bansonga muaba udibu basangile. Batatu ne bamamu, bakulakaje ne bikunda, nebabakuate bonsu baye nabu mu bupika." 
Jeremiah6:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bantu bakuabu nebangate nzubu yabu. Nebangate kabidi madimi abu ne bakaji babu. Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila nennyoke bena ditunga edi bonsu." 
Jeremiah6:13 Bualu bantu aba bonsu, bana ne bantu bakole, badi amu ne lukuka lua bintu, bakeba biuma ne buivi. Bambi ne batuangaji mene badi amu badinga bantu." 
Jeremiah6:14 Dikenga dia bantu banyi bena Izrayele kadiena ditanda bantu aba to. Badi bamba ne: “Kakuena bualu to, malu onsu adi amu mimpe.” Eku malu onsu mmamane kunyanguka." 
Jeremiah6:15 Bantu aba kabena banyingalala to. Kabena ne bundu nansha bukese bua buenzavi buabu, kabena nansha bamanye kutonda bubi buabu. Nebabutuke pamue ne bantu bakuabu bonsu. Nebajimine musangu umue ne bonsu bandi nnyoka." 
Jeremiah6:16 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Anji imanayi mu njila. Nuele meji a bivua binuenzekele kale. Nukonke bankambua benu. Nanku nusungule njila muimpe. Nulonde njila awu bua nupete dikisha. Kadi kubengabu bamba ne: “Katuena tulonda njila muimpe to.” 
Jeremiah6:17 Ndi mubatekele batentekedi bua kubadimuja, bua kubambila ne: Nudimuke, nuteleje mpungi! Kadi kubengabu ne: “Katuena tuteleja to.”" 
Jeremiah6:18 Nanku, bisamba bionsu, telejayi, numanye bualu buavua kuenzekela bantu banyi." 
Jeremiah6:19 Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, telejayi: Nenkengeshe bantu aba bua kubanyoka bua buenzavi buabu. Bavua bapepeja bionsu bimvua mbambila. Bavua babenga meyi anyi." 
Jeremiah6:20 Milambu yabu ya ku Saba, ne mitshi ya dipembu ya mu ditunga dia kule, bidi mua kungenzela tshinyi? Nyama idibu bangoshila pa tshilambuilu, kayena insankisha to. Tshiena musue milambu yabu." 
Jeremiah6:21 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nenteye bantu aba mu njila, bua badishinde bonsu, batatu, bana babu, bena mutumba ne balunda babu. Nebabutuke bonsu." 
Jeremiah6:22 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bantu nebafumine mu ditunga didi luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga. Tshisamba tshinene netshituadije luendu ku ndekelu kua buloba. 
Jeremiah6:23 Bena mvita ba mu tshisamba atshi badi ne buta bua mikete ne misongolu, badi ne tshikisu kabayi ne luse. Badi benza mutoyi bu tshiona tshia mayi manene. Badi babanda pa nyama ya tubalu, bamane kudilongolola bua kubanga mvita, bamane kuela mualu wa mvita, bua kukuluisha wewe, Siyone!" 
Jeremiah6:24 Patuvua bumvue lumu lua mvita ayi, tuetu kuteketa mu maboku. Tuetu kutshina bikole, anu mudi mukaji ukenga pa lulelu." 
Jeremiah6:25 Kanupatuki mu tshisuku to. Kanuyi mu njila to. Bualu, muluishi udi mu njila ushipa bantu. Bashipianganyi badi nseke yonsu." 
Jeremiah6:26 Bantu banyi bena Izrayele, nuvuale bilamba bia madilu. Nubunguluke mu butu. Nuase miadi, mudibu badila muana mulele umue. Nudile miadi bikole, bualu mushipi wa bantu, neafike kanuyi bamumone to." 
Jeremiah6:27 Yirmeya, ndi nkusengelela ne: utete bantu banyi bena Izrayele, mudibu bateta tshiamu. Umanye, ujadike nsombelu wabu." 
Jeremiah6:28 Bena Izrayele bonsu mbatomboke bikole. Bonsu mbena dishima. Badi ne muoyi mupape bu tshiamu tshikunze nansha tshifike. Bonsu mbena buenzavi. 
Jeremiah6:29 Padi nsenda wela mupuya mu kapia ne mubanza, dimoma didi mua kumuka ku tshiamu. Kadi, nsenda nansha muenza munyi, dimoma kadiena diumuka ku tshiamu tshitoke to. Bantu babi kabena bumuka munkatshi mua bantu banyi." 
Jeremiah6:30 Badi bamba bantu abu ne: “Tshiamu tshitoke tshivua ne mushinga, tshikadi katshiyi ne mushinga.” Maweja-Nangila mmumane kubabenga." 
Jeremiah7:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya 
Jeremiah7:2 bua kuimanaye mu mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bua kuamba ne: “Nuenu bena Yuda bonsu, badi babuela ku mushiku ewu bua kutendelela, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba." 
Jeremiah7:3 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: Longololayi nsombelu yenu, enzayi malu mempe. Nanku nenganyishe bua nusombe mu ditunga edi." 
Jeremiah7:4 Kanutekemenyi miaku ya dishima inudi nuamba nuambulula ya ne: ‘Tuetu tudi bimpe bitambe, bualu ewu ke nzubu udi Maweja-Nangila usomba, ke nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, eyowa, ke nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila.’" 
Jeremiah7:5 Kadi, nulongolole nsombelu yenu, enzayi malu mempe. Nukose tshilumbu tshia bantu babidi pa tshiotshi." 
Jeremiah7:6 Kanukengeshi muntu muenyi, muana nshiya nansha mukaji mukamba. Kanushipi mu ditunga emu bantu badi kabayi ne bualu. Kanutendeledi mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bua kudikebela diakabi." 
Jeremiah7:7 Nuenu badilengeje nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila nenganyishe bua nuenu kusomba mu ditunga edi, dimvua mumane kupesha bankambua benu kashidi ne kashidi." 
Jeremiah7:8 Kadi, nudi nutekemena miaku ya dishima idi kayiyi mua kunuambuluisha." 
Jeremiah7:9 Eyowa, nudi nuiba, nushipangana, nuenda tshiendenda, nuditshipa mitshipu ya dishima, nulambula milambu kudi Baale, nutendelela mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu inudi kanuyi bamanye to." 
Jeremiah7:10 Pashishe nudi nuimana kumpala kuanyi mu nzubu wanyi wa tshijila, nuamba ne: ‘Tudi bamane kupanda!’ Eku nudi nutungunuka ne dienza bindi meme mubenge." 
Jeremiah7:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndi mumone bionsu binudi nuenza. Nzubu wanyi meme, ukadi muaba udi bivi basokomena anyi?" 
Jeremiah7:12 Nuye ku Shilo, muaba wanyi wa tshijila umvua nsomba kale. Nenumone mundi munyangakaje muaba ewu bua buenzavi bua bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
Jeremiah7:13 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nudi benze bibi mushindu umue ne bena mu Shilo. Ndi munubele misangu ne misangu, kanuyi nunteleja to. Meme kunubikila, nuenu kubenga kuitaba." 
Jeremiah7:14 Nanku, nzubu wanyi ewu, nzubu unudi nutekemena, nzubu umvua mupeshe bankambua benu, munupeshe ne nuenu, ndi musue kumunyangakaja bu mumvua munyangakaje Shilo." 
Jeremiah7:15 Kabidi nennubenge bu mumvua mubenge bana benu, bena Efrayime. ”" 
Jeremiah7:16 Yirmeya kuakuidi bantu aba to. Kuena mua kubalombela, utendakana to. Kunsengeledi to. Bualu meme tshiena nkuteleja to." 
Jeremiah7:17 Udi mumone bionsu bidibu benza mu bimenga bia bena Yuda ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime anyi? 
Jeremiah7:18 Bana badi bangula nkunyi, batatu batemesha kapia, bakaji balamba mikata bua mvidie udibu binyika ne: mukalenga mukaji wa mu diulu. Padibu balambula milambu ya maluvu a mvinyo kudi mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi bampenda meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah7:19 Ndi nkukonka ne: udibu bapenda mmeme anyi? Nansha kakese! Badi badipenda bobu, badifuisha ne bundu." 
Jeremiah7:20 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Nennyoke tshimenga tshijima etshi, bantu, bimuna, mitshi ne bintu bionsu bidi mu madimi. Dinyoka dianyi nedikale dikole bu kapia kadi kakayi kajima.”" 
Jeremiah7:21 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Sangishayi munyinyi wa mulambu wa kuosha ne munyinyi wa milambu ya tshibidilu, nudie munyinyi awu." 
Jeremiah7:22 Pamvua mupatule bankambua benu mu Ejipitu, tshiena mubambile bualu, tshiena mulombe bua bandambule milambu eyi ya mishindu ibidi." 
Jeremiah7:23 Kadi, meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mubambile ne: Nuteleje tshindi nnuambila. Nanku nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nuenu nenuikale bantu banyi. Nukumbaje bionsu bindi nnuambile. Nanku nenuikale bimpe." 
Jeremiah7:24 Kadi kabena bitabe to, kabena banteleja to. Kulondabu anu meji abu, ne tshitunu, kabidi ne lonji. Pa mutu pa bena Izrayele kupinganabu kundi, mbambenge." 
Jeremiah7:25 Biangatshile difuku divua bankambua benu bapatuke mu Ejipitu too ne mpindiewu, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi amu nnutumina bambi bena mudimu banyi ku dituku ku difuku." 
Jeremiah7:26 Kadi kanuena banteleje, kanuena bangitabe. Nuvua amu bantombokele. Nuenu kuenza bibi kupita bankambua benu.”" 
Jeremiah7:27 Nenku wewe Yirmeya, neuye kubambila bionsu ebi. Kadi kabakunteleja. Neubabikile mu dina dianyi bua badilengeje, kadi kabakukuandamuna to." 
Jeremiah7:28 Pashishe mubambile ne: “Nudi tshisamba tshia bantu badi kabayi bateleja tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wabu wamba. Nudi bantu badi babenga mibelu ya Maweja-Nangila. Tshisamba tshienu katshiena tshia diyi dimue to. Katshiena tshiela meji a kukumbaja tshi-vuatshi tshilaya nansha.” 
Jeremiah7:29 Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: Nuenu bena Yuda, beyayi nsuki yenu mile, idi ileja munudi bantu ba tshijila, nuyimanshe. Asayi miadi pa mikuna idi kayiyi ne tshintu. Bualu nuenu bena tshikondu etshi, nudi bamfikishe munda. Ndi munubenge. Tshiena nenu kabidi ne bualu to." 
Jeremiah7:30 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi mubenge buenzavi bonsu bua bena Yuda. Mbateke mpingu yabu mibi indi mbenga mu nzubu wanyi wa tshijila, bua nzubu awu ikale ne mikiya." 
Jeremiah7:31 Mu tshibandabanda tshia Inome, mbalongolole muaba wa kulambuila milambu, udibu binyika ne: Tofete, bua kuoshamu bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji bu milambu. Meme Maweja-Nangila tshivua mubambile bua kuenza bualu ebu to. Tshivua nansha muele meji ku bualu bua nanku to." 
Jeremiah7:32 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Matuku adi kumpala, kabena mua kuinyika kabidi muaba ewu ne: “Tofete,” nansha ne: “tshibandabanda tshia Inome” to. Nebinyike muaba awu ne: ‘Tshibandabanda tshia dishipangana?” Nebajike bantu bafue anu muaba awu. Kabakupeta lukita muaba mukuabu to." 
Jeremiah7:33 Bitalu bia bantu aba nebabidie kudi nyunyi ya mikanku ne nyama ya mibuabua. Muntu kena uyipata to. 
Jeremiah7:34 Mu bimenga bia bena Yuda, ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime, nembenge bua bantu baje maja mu bibilu, bua bele mbila ya disanka, nansha bua bimbe misambu kudi badi babuele mu dibaka, bualu ditunga nedishale anu tshipela." 
Jeremiah8:1 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: Nebajule mifuba ya bakalenga ba bena Yuda, ya balombodi ba mu bukalenga, ya batuangaji, ya bambi, ne ya bakulu bakuabu badi basomba mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah8:2 Nebatangalaje miluba panshi kumpala kua Diba, kua Ngondu ne kumpala kua Tshiluilu tshia mitotu. Bintu ebi ke mvidie ivua bantu aba banange, ke ivuabu batendelela, ke ivuabu balamate, ke ivuabu bakonka malu, bakukuila. Kabena bangula mifuba eyi bua kuyijika to. Neyishale anu panshi bu bufuke bua kufikisha buloba." 
Jeremiah8:3 Maweja-Nangila wabukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Bena mu ditunga edi bikale bashale ne muoyi, miaba yonsu indi mbatangalaja, nebajinge kufua pa mutu pa kushala ne muoyi." 
Jeremiah8:4 Uye kubambila ne: Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Padi muntu udishinda, katu ujuka anyi? Padi muntu mupambuke mu njila, kena upingana kabidi mu njila muimpe anyi?" 
Jeremiah8:5 Kadi, bena mu Yerushalayime badi bapambuke mu njila, kabena bapingana mu njila bua tshinyi? Badi anu batungunuka ne kutendelela mvidie ya tshianana? Kabena basue kupingana kundi." 
Jeremiah8:6 Meme ndi muteleje bionsu bidibu bamba, kabena bamba malu mimpe to. Kakuena muntu udi unyingalala bua bubi buende, nansha udikonka ne: “Tshindi muenze ntshinyi?” Muntu yonsu udi wenda mu njila udiye musue, bu mudi nyama wa kabalu mumane kufika munda utomboka mu mvita." 
Jeremiah8:7 Nyunyi wa kasonga nyunyi udi mumanye tshikondu tshidiye umuangala. Nyunyi wa nkutshi, kandindi, ne nyunyi wa mudinga, idi anu mimanye diba dia kupingana. Kadi, bantu banyi bena Izrayele, kabena bamanye mikenji yanyi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah8:8 Nudi nudiamba ne: “Tudi bena meji, bualu tuetu ke badi ne mikenji ya Maweja-Nangila.” Kadi nudi nudisua nanku bua tshinyi? Kanuena bamanye ne: bantu badi batentula mikenji mbena dishima, badi bandamuna miaku idi momu anyi?" 
Jeremiah8:9 Bena meji nebafue bundu, nebapampakane padibu babakuata, baya nabu mu bupika. Bu mudibu kabayi bitabe miaku ya Maweja-Nangila. Meji abu neabambuluishe ku tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah8:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bakaji babu, nembafile kudi bakuabu. Madimi abu, nengafile kudi badimi bakuabu. Bualu bantu bonsu, bana ne bantu bakole, badi amu ne lukuka lua biuma. Muambi ne mutuangaji, bonsu badi anu badingangana." 
Jeremiah8:11 Dikenga dia bantu banyi bena Izrayele, kadiena ditonda bantu aba to. Badi bambila bena Izrayele ne: “Kakuena bualu to. Malu onsu adi mimpe”, eku malu onsu mamane kunyanguka." 
Jeremiah8:12 Bantu aba, kabena banyingalala to, kabena ne bundu nansha bukese bua buenzavi buabu. Kabena bamanye mua kutonda bubi buabu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nebabutuke pamue ne bena Izrayele bakuabu, nebadishinde panshi musangu umue, ne bonsu bandi nyoka." 
Jeremiah8:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: pandi musue kupola tumuma tua mvinyo munkatshi mua bantu banyi, tshiena mpeta kamuma nansha kamue, tshiena mpeta tshimuma nansha tshimue tshia mutshi wa mfiku. Mabeji a mutshi mene adi mafubidile. Nanku, ndi ndekela mitshi eyi, ishale ya bantu bonsu badi bapita mu njila." 
Jeremiah8:14 Tudi basombe muaba ewu bua tshinyi? Tudisangishayi lukasa, tuyayi mu bimenga bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana, tuyayi bua kuindilamu lufu. Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, mmumane kutufundila lufu, bua tuetu kunua mayi mabi adi ne lulengu, bualu tudi batombokele Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah8:15 Tuvua batekemene ne: malu onsu neajike bimpe. Kadi kakuena bualu buimpe nansha bumue to. Tuvua batekemene ne: makenga etu neajike, kadi tudi tubutuka." 
Jeremiah8:16 Muluishi wenu mmumane kufika ku Dane. Muadi wa tubalu tuende ukadi umvuika. Padi tubalu atu tukekemena, buloba bujima budi buzakala. Padi nyama ya tubalu ayi ifika, bionsu bidi bibutuka. Idi inyanga ditunga ne bintu bionsu bidimu, tshimenga ne bonsu badimu." 
Jeremiah8:17 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi musue kunutumina nyoka ya lulengu. Kakuena mushindu wa nuenu kuibidilangana nayi, kuyitekesha. Neyinusume." 
Jeremiah8:18 Ndi ne kanyinganyinga kakole. Kakuena mushindu wa kujikija kanyinganyinga kanyi to. 
Jeremiah8:19 Telejayi, bantu banyi bena Izrayele, badi badila muadi mu ditunga dionsu, bakeba udi mua kubambuluisha, bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena kabidi mu Siyone anyi? Siyone kena kabidi ne mukalenga anyi?” Kadi bena Izrayele neatendelele mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, ya mitshi misonga, idi kayiyi mua kubambuluisha bua tshinyi? Bavua bamfikisha munda bua tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah8:20 Tshikondu tshia kunowa ntshimane kupita. Tshikondu tshia munya mukole ntshijike. Tutshidi anu bindila bua kutusungidilabu. 
Jeremiah8:21 Dikenga dia bantu banyi bena Izrayele, ndintonde bikole. Ndi mu madilu. Ndi mu dikenga." 
Jeremiah8:22 Mu Ngilaade kamuena buanga, nansha munganga anyi? Mputa wa bantu banyi bena Izrayele, kena mua kuma bua tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah8:23 Eyowa, ndi njinga bua mutu wanyi wikale ne mayi tente, bua mesu anyi ikale ne binsonji bu mishimi ya mayi. Nanku matuku onsu butuku ne munya, mvua mua kudila bantu bafue ba mu tshisamba tshianyi." 
Jeremiah9:1 Eyi, bu meme mu tshipela, muaba udi bena luendu bikishila, mvua mua kubenga bantu banyi bena Izrayele, mvua mua kubashiya kashidi. Bualu mbantu batomboke. Bonsu badi amu babenga Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah9:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndimi ya bantu aba idi anu minana bu buta, miaku yabu ke mikete ya kudinga nayi bantu. Badi ne bukole mu ditunga edi, ki mbua malu malelela adibu bamba to, kadi anu bua dishima didibu bashima bantu. Badi benza malu mabi misangu ne misangu. Kadi kabena bammanye meme to." 
Jeremiah9:3 Nanku, muntu yonsu adimukile bantu bakuabu! Kanuena mua kutekemena nansha muanenu to. Bualu udi anu unudinga bu muvua Yakobe muenze. Balunda benu kabidi nebanujane." 
Jeremiah9:4 Muntu yonsu udi udinga muntu nende. Kakuena muntu udi wamba malu malelela. Bantu bonsu mbamane kuibidila mua kudingangana. Mbenze bibi bitambe. Nanku, kabena ne mushindu wa kupingana kundi meme.”" 
Jeremiah9:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bantu aba badi anu bena buenzavi. Badi anu bashimangana. Kabena basue nansha kakese kumvuangana nanyi to.” 
Jeremiah9:6 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Ndi musue kubengulula mu kapia. Nembatete mbalengeje. Ke tshindi ne bua kuenzela bantu bena Izrayele, bua tshikisu tshiabu." 
Jeremiah9:7 Ndimi ya bantu aba, idi anu bu mikete ya kushipangana nayi. Badi bamba anu malu a dishima. Badi bambila bantu nabu meyi mimpe. Kadi munda muabu badi bela meji mudibu mua kubakuata mu buteyi." 
Jeremiah9:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tshiena mua kunyoka bantu aba anyi? Tshiena mua kusombuela tshisamba tshia mushindu ewu anyi?” 
Jeremiah9:9 Ndi ngela miyenga bualu bua mikuna. Ndi ndila muadi mukole, bualu bua mpata ya mu ditunga. Bualu bintu bionsu bivuamu, mbamane kubinyanga, kubiosha. Muntu kena upitshilamu kabidi to. Nansha muadi wa bimuna kawena umvuikamu kabidi to. Nyunyi ne nyama ya muitu mene mbijiminemu, mbimane kuya bionsu." 
Jeremiah9:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nengandamune Yerushalayime ashale dikolu, muaba udi nyama ya mibuabua isomba. Bimenga bia bena Yuda nebishale tshipela, kabiyi ne bantu to.”" 
Jeremiah9:11 Muntu udi ne meji makumbane, bua kutujinguluila bualu ebu udiku anyi? Pikala Maweja-Nangila mumumanyishe bualu ebu, atuandamune ne: ditunga ndinyanguke bua tshinyi? Didi dishale anu tshipela, muntu kayi upitshilamu bua tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah9:12 Maweja-Nangila nkayende kuandamuna ne: “Bualu bantu mbabenge mikenji imvua mubapeshe. Kabena bateleja nansha bakumbaja bimvua mubambile to. 
Jeremiah9:13 Badi ne meji mabi, batendelela mvidie Baale, ivuabu batendelela kudi bankambua babu." 
Jeremiah9:14 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele ndi ngamba ne: Nendishe bantu aba biakudia bia bululu, nembanuishe mayi mabi adi ne lulengu." 
Jeremiah9:15 Nembatangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu bavuabu kabayi bamanye nansha bobu nansha bankambua babu. Nembatumine bantu bua kubalondajaka ne mvita too ne pandi mbabutula bonsu.” 
Jeremiah9:16 Ke mudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu wamba nanku. Elayi meji ku malu adi enzeka lelu. Nubikile bakaji badi badila. Nutume bantu baye kukeba bakaji badi bamanye mua kudila mu madilu. 
Jeremiah9:17 Bakaji abu bafike lukasa, bua kubielela miyenga, bua tuetu kudila muadi bikole, bua bilavinyi bietu kubolabi ne binsonji!" 
Jeremiah9:18 Badi bumvua meyi a muadi atumine ku Siyone, amba ne: “Tudi tukenga, tudi babutuke bikole be! Tudi ne bundu, bualu tudi ne bua kumuka mu ditunga dietu, kabidi bantu mbupule nzubu yetu!”" 
Jeremiah9:19 Nanku, nuenu bakaji, telejayi diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Telejayi tshidiye wamba. Longeshayi bana benu ba bakaji mua kuela muyenga. Nsongakaji yonsu alongeshe muena mutumba nende, mudi kudila mushindu ewu:" 
Jeremiah9:20 “Lufu ludi lubuelela pa madidishi etu. Ludi bibuela mu nzubu yetu mimpe, lushipa bana betu batekete mu misesu, ne bansongalume betu miaba idi bantu bunguile.”" 
Jeremiah9:21 Wewe Yirmeya, ubambile kabidi malu makuabu andi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba ne: “Bitalu bia bantu bidi bitala panshi bu bufuke bua kulukisha madimi. Bantu badi bafue anu bu miepu idi banowi bakose. Kadi kakuena muntu udi mua kuyipumbulula.”" 
Jeremiah9:22 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Muntu udi ne meji, kaditambishi bua meji ende to! Muntu udi ne bukole, kaditambishi bua bukole buende to! Muntu mubanji, kaditambishi bua bubanji buende to!" 
Jeremiah9:23 Pikala muntu musue kuditambisha, aditambishe anu pikalaye mummanye meme Maweja-Nangila, kabidi mumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ne luse, ndi nkosa nsambu pa yoyi, ndi nkumbaja malaya anyi pa buloba bujima. Bantu ba mushindu ewu, ke badi bansankisha. ” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah9:24 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Dituku nedifike dindi nnyoka bantu bonsu badibu bateka panshi, kadi kabayi badilengeja," 
Jeremiah9:25 ke bena Ejipitu, bena Yuda, bena Edome, bena Amone, bena Mowabe, ne bantu bonsu badi basombe mu tshipela badi badibeya nsuki. Bualu bantu aba bonsu, ne bena Izrayele mene, badi bu bantu badibu kabayi banji kuteka panshi, bualu kabena balama ndondu yanyi." 
Jeremiah10:1 Bena Izrayele, telejayi malu adi Maweja-Nangila unumanyisha." 
Jeremiah10:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Kanulondi bibidilu bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Kanuikadi ne bowa bua malu a dikema adi amueneka mulu mu tshibuashibuashi. Lekelayi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu batshine malu aa. 
Jeremiah10:3 Ditendelela dia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu didi anu lupepele, kadiena ne mushinga to. Badi bakosa mutshi mu ditu, muntu usonga nawu lupingu." 
Jeremiah10:4 Badi balulamika tshiamu tshia mpawungi, nansha tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Badi balupopela ne ngindu ne misumadi, bua kuimanalu bimpe lululame." 
Jeremiah10:5 Mpingu eyi kayena yakula. Idi anu bu mudi mitshi idibu basa mu madimi, bayivuadika bilamba bia bantu bua kutshinyisha nyunyi. Muntu ke udi uyambula, bualu kayena mua kuenda nkayayi. Kanuyitshinyi to, bualu kayena mua kuenza bualu bubi, bu mudiyi kayiyi mua kuenza bualu buimpe.”" 
Jeremiah10:6 Maweja-Nangila, kakuena mukuabu bu wewe, wewe udi munene. Bantu badi bamanye bunene ne bukole buebe." 
Jeremiah10:7 Nanku bantu bonsu badi ne bua kukunemeka, wewe mukalenga wa bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba. Bualu bukalenga buonsu mbuebe wewe. Munkatshi mua bena meji bonsu ba pa buloba, munkatshi mua bakalenga bonsu, kamuena mukuabu bu wewe." 
Jeremiah10:8 Bantu bonsu badi anu bidingidingi. Tshidi mvidie ya mitshi mua kubalongesha ntshinyi? 
Jeremiah10:9 Mpingu eyi, mbayilamike tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshia ku Tarshishe, nansha tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiaku Ufaze. Muntu ke udi musonge mpingu ayi. Nsenda wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi ke udi muyilengeje. Badi bayivuadika bilamba bimpe, bikunze ne bifikuluke. Mpingu yonsu eyi, idi anu mienza kudi muntu udi mumanye mudimu wende bilenga." 
Jeremiah10:10 Kadi, Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu mulelela. Udi Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi ne mukalenga wa kashidi. Padiye ne tshiji, buloba budi buzakala. Padiye mufike munda, bisamba bia bantu kabiena mua kumutuila nkanana." 
Jeremiah10:11 Nuambile bena Izrayele ne: mvidie eyi yonsu, idi kayiyi mifiike nansha diulu nansha buloba, neyijimine pa buloba. Kayena ne muaba kabidi muinshi mua diulu to." 
Jeremiah10:12 Maweja-Nangila kufuka buloba, ke mudiye uleja bukole buende. Kufukaye diulu dialabale, ke mudiye uleja meji ende." 
Jeremiah10:13 Maweja-Nangila kutuma diyi dikole, mayi kusangila pamue mu diulu, mavuba manene kubandawu, atumine ku ndekelu kua diulu ne buloba, miele kuela, mvula kuloka, bipepele kupatuka mu mayeba abi." 
Jeremiah10:14 Bantu bonsu badi bapuwa muaba awu bazakala, kabayi bumvua bualu. Bansenda bavua benza mpingu, bumvua bundu bua mpingu ivuabu bafule, bualu mpingu eyi ivua ibadinga. Kayena yeyela nansha kakese." 
Jeremiah10:15 Mpingu ayi idi bu lupepele. Bantu mbenze mudimu wa tshidimudimu patupu. Yonsu neyijimine, padi Maweja-Nangila ulumbuluisha bantu." 
Jeremiah10:16 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kena bu mudi mpingu to. Bena Izrayele ntshisamba tshiende tshia bumpianyi. Yeye ke udi mufuke bintu bionsu. Bena Izrayele mbantu bende. Dina diende Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. 
Jeremiah10:17 Wewe Yerushalayime, ambula mabuki ebe adi panshi, bualu baluishi bebe mbamane kukuela munkatshi." 
Jeremiah10:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mpindiewu mona, nengipate bantu bonsu badi mu ditunga. Nembatutshishe bikole kabakupanda to." 
Jeremiah10:19 Eyi ndi ndila, dikenga ndintonde. Kabena mua kuondapa mputa yanyi minene. Meme kuela meji ne: dikenga ki ndinene menemene to. Ndi mua kudiunwua ne lutulu." 
Jeremiah10:20 Kadi ntenta wanyi mmunyanguke, mionji yende mmikoseke yonsu. Tshiena kabidi ne bana. Bonsu mbumuke. Tshiena ne muntu udi mua kungimanyika ntenta, udi mua kungenzela muaba wa kusomba." 
Jeremiah10:21 Balombodi betu mbenze tshilema. Bavua bu bantu ba bidingidingi. Kabena bakonka Maweja-Nangila malu. Ke muvuabu bapange malu bikole. Ke muvuabu batangalaje bana betu bena tshisamba tshietu bonsu. 
Jeremiah10:22 Telejayi, umvuayi. Mutoyi munene udi wenda usemena pabuipi, ufuma ku mutu kua ditunga. Bena mvita mbanyange bimenga bia bena Yuda, bishale tshipela, bishale miaba idi nyama ya mibuabua isomba." 
Jeremiah10:23 Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye ne: muntu kena ne bukole bua kukumbaja tshidiye musue to. Kena ne mushindu wa kuenda mu njila muakane. 
Jeremiah10:24 Maweja-Nangila umbele. Kadi umbele ne lutulu, kunnyoki paudi ne tshiji. Tshianana ndi mbutuka." 
Jeremiah10:25 Tshiji tshiebe utshitekele bantu ba bisamba bikuabu abu, badi kabayi basue kukumanya, badi kabayi bakutendelela. Bualu badi biba bintu bia bantu bebe, badi bapawula bintu bietu bionsu, banyanga ditunga dietu dijima." 
Jeremiah11:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah11:2 “Nunemeke ndondu umvua mutue nenu. Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Wambile bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime," 
Jeremiah11:3 ubumvuije ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Muntu yonsu udi kayi unemeka ndondu undi mutue ne bantu banyi, muntu awu mmuena tshibawu." 
Jeremiah11:4 Mu matuku amvua mupatule bankambua benu mu dikenga dikole mu Ejipitu, meme kutua nabu ndondu. Meme kubambila ne: Nuteleje bionsu bindi nnuambila, nubikumbaje. Nanku, nenuikale bantu banyi, meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Ke mukenji undi nnuelela." 
Jeremiah11:5 Nanku, nenkumbaje dilaya dimvua mulaye bankambua benu dia kubapesha ditunga didi ne mabele ne buitshi. Ditunga edi ke dinudi basombe lelu edi.” Meme kuitaba ne: — Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah11:6 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: — Bualu ebu, ubuambe mu bimenga bia Yuda too ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime: “Nunemeke ndondu utudi batue nenu, numukumbaje." 
Jeremiah11:7 Bu mumvua nsengelela bankambua benu matuku amvua mubapatule mu Ejipitu, ke mundi nnusengelela nuenu lelu. Ndi nnuambila ne: Itabayi bindi nnuambila." 
Jeremiah11:8 Kadi bankambua benu bavua babenga kunteleja ne ntema. Bavua batungunuka ne malu abu muvuabu basue, balonda muoyi wabu mubi. Meme kubabela bua bakumbaje ndondu utuvua batue nabu. Bobu kubenga. Ke mumvua ne bua kubanyoka, bilondeshile ndondu wetu awu.”" 
Jeremiah11:9 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime mbangelele tshifufu tshibi." 
Jeremiah11:10 Badi benzamalu mabi avua bankambua babu benza, kabayi banteleja. Badi banemeka mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bayitendelela. Nenku bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele mbanyange ndondu umvua mutue ne bankambua babu." 
Jeremiah11:11 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi mbatumina dikenga bua kubabutula. Bobu bambikila musangu ewu bua kubambuluisha, tshiena mbateleja to." 
Jeremiah11:12 Diba adi, bantu badi basombe mu bimenga bia Yuda ne mu Yerushalayime, nebapingane kudi mvidie yabu ivuabu balambula milambu. Kadi mu dikenga diabu mvidie eyi kayena mua kubambuluisha nansha." 
Jeremiah11:13 Mu ditunga dia bena Yuda, tshimenga tshionsu tshidi ne watshi mvidie. Mu musesu onsu wa mu Yerushalayime mudi amu tshilambuilu tshia kulambula mvidie Baale udi utukuatshisha bundu.”" 
Jeremiah11:14 Nenku wewe Yirmeya, tshimenga etshi kuena mua kutshilombela kundi. Kuena mua kuntendelela nansha kunsengelela kabidi bualu buatshi to. Bualu padi makenga abakuata nebansengelele bua meme kubambuluisha. Kadi tshiena mua kubateleja to." 
Jeremiah11:15 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: tshisamba tshindi munange katshiena ne muoyi umue to. Tshidibu bakeba kundi mu nzubu wanyi wa tshijila ntshinyi? Badi bela meji ne: padibu bandaya malu, padibu bandambula milambu, dikenga kadiena kabidi mua kubakuata anyi? Ke tshidibu bakeba anyi?" 
Jeremiah11:16 Meme kuinyika tshisamba tshianyi dina ne: “Mutshi wa olive udi usasa, ukuama bimuma bisheme.” Kadi munkatshi mua tshipepele tshia mvunde, meme kuosha mabeji atshi, kuosha matamba onsu awu." 
Jeremiah11:17 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu uvua mukune Izrayele ne Yuda. Kadi udi ubambila lelu ne: nennubutule. Dikenga edi nedinukuate bua bubi bunuvua benze. Bualu nuvua bampende, balambule mvidie Baale milambu." 
Jeremiah11:18 Maweja-Nangila uvua mungambile malu mabi adi baluishi banyi bakeba kungenzela. Nanku, ndi mumanye malu abu." 
Jeremiah11:19 Mvua muana wa mukoku udibu baye nende ku tshishipelu, kayi ubenga. Tshivua mumanye ne: badi bangelela meji mabi. Bavua bambilangana ne: “Tujule mutshi patshidi wu ne bukole. Tuupule. Nanku muntu kamanyi ne: mutshi udi muaba ewu.”" 
Jeremiah11:20 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, udi ndumbulula udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi. Udi mumanye malu onsu adi mu muoyi wanyi wa muntu. Ndi musue kumona muudi unyoka baluishi banyi. Bualu meme ndi mufile tshilumbu tshianyi mu bianza biebe." 
Jeremiah11:21 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ne bualu budiye musue kuambila bena Anatote, badi bakeba kunshipa. Bena musoku wetu badi bankandika ne: “Kuena mua kuikala kabidi muambi udi umanyisha bantu malu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Tshianana tudi tukushipa.”" 
Jeremiah11:22 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi wandamuna ne: “Nennunyoke. Bansongalume benu nebafue mu mvita. Tshiyole tshia nzala netshishipe bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
Jeremiah11:23 Mu musoku wa Anatote kamuakushala muntu ne muoyi tshikondu tshinganunyoka, tshinganukengesha.”" 
Jeremiah12:1 Maweja-Nangila wewe udi amu mubinge, tshiena mua kukuasa tshilumbu. Kadi ndi musue anu kukuela lukonku pa malu audi wenza. Mudi bantu badi kabayi balonda mikenji yebe bapeta dikasa dimpe mmunyi? Badi bakutombokela badi basomba talalaa bua tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah12:2 Udi mubakune, bobu kuela miji, kusampila, kukuama bimuma. Matuku onsu badi bakutela mukana, kadi muoyi wabu kawena kuudi." 
Jeremiah12:3 Maweja-Nangila udi mummanye meme. Udi mummone, udi mujadike mundi mukunange, mukusungule amu wewe. Kadi bantu babi, ubateke ku luseke, anu bu mudibu bateka mbuji ya mikoku pa nkayayi bua kuyishipa. Ubateke ku luseke bua dituku dia kabutu babashipe." 
Jeremiah12:4 Ditunga nedikale mu dikenga, bia mu madimi nebiume too ne ku diba kaayi? Nyama ne nyunyi ya mu ditunga idi ifua bua tshilema tshidi bantu benza. Bualu badi bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena umona bitudi tuenza to. ”" 
Jeremiah12:5 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: paudi kuyi mua kuipatangana ne badi banyema ku makasa, nenku udi mua kupimangana ku lubilu ne nyama ya tubalu munyi? Paudi musombe mumvue bimpe anu muaba udi bantu basombe, kadi mu ditu dikutakane dia ku muelelu wa Yardene newenze tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah12:6 Bualu nansha bantu bena diku diebe, nansha bana benu mene mbakuyile tshitungu. Badi bakunguja bantu ba kukuluisha, wewe kuyi mumanye. Wadimuke padibu bakuambila miaku ya lubombu!" 
Jeremiah12:7 Ndi nshiya nzubu wa tshijila, uvua nzubu wanyi meme. Ndi mbenga bantu bavua banyi. Ndi mfila mu bianza bia baluishi babu, bantu bamvue munange ne muoyi wanyi mujima." 
Jeremiah12:8 Bavua banyi meme, kadi bavua bankanyina, banduisha bu nyama ya ntambue idi ikungula muitu. Nanku tshiena mubanange kabidi to." 
Jeremiah12:9 Bantu banyi bakadi bu nyunyi muimpe, udibu bela munkatshi nseke yonsu kudi nyunyi midianganyi anyi? “Bikila nyama yonsu ya muitu! Ifike ku didia dinene!”" 
Jeremiah12:10 Benyi, balami ba mikoku ba bungi, mbafike ne nyama yabu. Nyama kunyanga budimi buanyi bua mvinyo, kudiatakaja lupangu luanyi. Lupangu luanyi luvua luimpe lutambe, kadi nyama kulushiya tshipela tshikuatshisha bantu bowa." 
Jeremiah12:11 Lupangu luanyi lukadi bu lububa. Bavua banyanga bionsu, ki mbashiya tshintu nansha tshimue! Utshidi nalu ne bualu nnganyi?" 
Jeremiah12:12 Pa mikuna idi kayiyi ne mitshi, mu tshipela, bena mvita bavua bamueneka, bafika bua kupawula bintu bidi bantu banyi nabi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ntuma bena mvita aba bua babutule ditunga dijima. Muntu nansha umue kakusomba talalaa." 
Jeremiah12:13 Nuenu kumiamina ntete ya kuenza bukula, kadi nudi nunowa amu meba ne mingonga. Nuvua batate bikole, kadi kanuakupeta nansha kantu. Nudi nufua bundu, nuzakala! Binuvua mua kunowa bidi binyanguke, bua tshiji tshikole tshimvua natshi." 
Jeremiah12:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bavua mutumba ne bantu banyi kabavua ne bundu to. Bavua banyanga ditunga dijima dimvua mupeshe bantu banyi bena Izrayele bua kashidi. Nanku nengipate bena mutumba aba mu ditunga diabu. Kadi nansha bena Yuda nembipate kabidi! 
Jeremiah12:15 Pashishe, nemfuile tshiakabidi bantu banyi aba luse. Nempingaje muntu yonsu kuabu. Nemmupingajilamu ne bintu biende." 
Jeremiah12:16 Bena mutumba bavua balongesha bantu bua baditshipe mu dina dia mvidie Baale. Kadi pikalabu balonge mua kuenza malu mimpe, adi bantu banyi ne bua kuenza, pikalabu bamanye mua kuditshipa bamba ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi…”, nembape muaba wabu munkatshi mua bantu banyi." 
Jeremiah12:17 Kadi padi tshisamba kampanda tshia bena mutumba aba tshibenga kunteleja, nentshipate bua tshibutuke kashidi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah13:1 Maweja-Nangila uvua mungele diyi ne: “Uye kusumba mukaba wa ndanda, uusuike mu tshimonu tshiebe. Kadi kuena mua kuusukula mu mayi to.”" 
Jeremiah13:2 Meme kusumba mukaba uvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. Meme kuusuika mu tshimonu. 
Jeremiah13:3 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kungela diyi tshiakabidi ne:" 
Jeremiah13:4 “Angata mukaba uudi musumbe, uye nawu ku musulu wa muenji mukole wa Fara, uusokoke muaba awu mu mutanta wa lubuebue.”" 
Jeremiah13:5 Meme kuya ku musulu wa Fara bua kusokokamu mukaba, muvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile." 
Jeremiah13:6 Matuku a bungi mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Pingana ku musulu wa Fara, upatule mukaba muaba uuvua muusokoke.”" 
Jeremiah13:7 Meme kumona ne: mukaba ukadi munyanguke, mubole, kabatshiyi mua kuvuala nawu bilamba." 
Jeremiah13:8 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Jeremiah13:9 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Ke mundi nnyanga lumu lua bena Yuda, ne lua bena Yerushalayime ludibu baditambisha nalu." 
Jeremiah13:10 Bualu ntshisamba tshibi tshidi tshibenga kuteleja malu andi ngamba. Badi anu ne tshitunu, benza malu a bupote. Badi balamate mvidie mikuabu, bayitendelela, bayinyikila mitu panshi. Nanku bantu aba bikale bu mukaba ewu, udibu kabayi mua kukuata nawu kabidi mudimu!" 
Jeremiah13:11 Mudi muntu usuika mukaba mu tshimonu tshiende, ke mumvua meme Maweja-Nangila mudisuike ku bukalenga bua Yuda ne bua bena Izrayele. Mvua muteke lumu luanyi mu bianza biabu, bua bikale bantu banyi, bua batumbishe dina dianyi, bampeteshe lumu, bua meme kuditemba nalu. Kadi kabavua banteleja to.”" 
Jeremiah13:12 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Yirmeya uye kudi bena Izrayele, ubambile ne: “Badi bafumbe mulondu bua kuelamu maluvu.” Kadi pikalabu bandamuna ne: “Bulelela, tudi bamanye bimpe”," 
Jeremiah13:13 ubambile ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena ditunga edi bonsu, nansha bakalenga mene badi basombe mu nkuasa wa Davide, nansha batuangaji, bambi, ne bantu bakuabu ba mu Yerushalayime, nembanuishe maluvu bua bakuatshike kashidi." 
Jeremiah13:14 Nembatutakaje mitu, baledi ne bana, bu mudibu batutakaja mulondu ne mukuabu. Tshiakufuila muntu nansha umue luse to. Nembabutule bonsu tshiyi nansha ne luse kashidi kanyi!”" 
Jeremiah13:15 Nuteleje, nuteleje ne ntema yonsu. Lekelayi kuditambisha. Udi uyukila nenu ke Maweja-Nangila!" 
Jeremiah13:16 Nemekayi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Tshianana nennutumine miidima, bua nuenu kutetuka pa mikuna, kuenda mu miidima inuvua kanuyi bindile, batekemena munya. Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna butuku, kunutumina miidima, bu mavuba a mvula wa tshipupu." 
Jeremiah13:17 Panudi kanuyi nuteleja mubelu ewu, nendile muadi nkayanyi ku mpenga bua ditambisha dienu dinene. Nempuekeshe binsonji bua tshisumbu tshia mikoku ya Maweja-Nangila, tshidi tshiya mu bupika." 
Jeremiah13:18 Yirmeya, ambila mukalenga ne mamuende ne: “Tulukayi mu nkuasa wenu wa lumu, sombayi panshi, bualu tshifulu tshienu tshia bumfumu ntshimane kupona panshi." 
Jeremiah13:19 Biibi bia bimenga bia kuinshi mu ditunga, bidi binjila. Kakuena muntu udi ubikangula kabidi. Bualu bena Yuda bonsu mbamane kuya nabu mu bupika. Muntu nansha umue ki mmushale!”" 
Jeremiah13:20 Yerushalayime, tangila malu adi enzeka: Baluishi bebe badi bafuma ku mutu kua ditunga. Bantu bandi mukupeshe badi penyi? Meme kubateka mu bianza biebe bua wewe kubalama, bu mudi mulami ulama mikoku yende. Wewe kuditemba bua mikoku ayi. Kadi ikadi penyi?" 
Jeremiah13:21 Pawamona balunda bebe bakuvuila bua kudia bumfumu mu ditunga ne bua kukukengesha, newambe tshinyi? Newikale ne dikenga bu dia mukaji pa lulelu." 
Jeremiah13:22 Nanku neukonke ne: “Makenga onsu aa adi ankuata bua tshinyi?” Bu muudi wenza tshilema tshinene, nebakuvule bilamba, babibandishe too ne ku mutu, nebakuenzeje malu ku bukole." 
Jeremiah13:23 Mubidi wa muena Kushe udi mua kukudimuka anyi? Nansha matoba a tshisumpa ntambue adi mua kukudimuka anyi? To! Nanku nuenu bonsu, nudi bibidile kuenza malu mabi. Ke munudi kanuyi mua kuenza malu mimpe to." 
Jeremiah13:24 Ndi nnutangalaja mudi lupepele lutangalaja bisosa mu tshipela," 
Jeremiah13:25 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Yerushalayime, ke mudibu ne bua kukuenzela wewe kabidi. Bualu udi mundekele, mudifile kudi mvidie ya patupu. Teleja mundi musue kukunyoka." 
Jeremiah13:26 Meme nenkuvule bilamba, nembibandishe too ne ku mutu webe, bua bakumone butaka." 
Jeremiah13:27 Ndi mbenga malu ebe a bundu, ne tuseku tuebe tuakulobesha natu bantu, tshiendenda tshiebe tshia bundu. Mvua mumone pa mikuna ya mu ditunga mvidie yebe idi kufuisha bundu! Yerushalayime, udi muena diakabi! Neudilengeje diba kaayi?" 
Jeremiah14:1 Ke bivua Maweja-Nangila wambila Yirmeya bua bipupu bidi bifuma ku munanga. 
Jeremiah14:2 Bena Yuda bonsu badi babungama, bimenga biabu bidi binyanguke. Badi mu bimenga badi basomba panshi kabayi ne disanka. Yerushalayime udi udila muadi, ulomba bua bamuambuluishe." 
Jeremiah14:3 Bamfumu badi batuma bena mudimu babu bua kusuna mayi, Padibu bafika ku biina bia mayi, badi babisangana kamuyi mayi nansha makese. Badi bapingana bapungile, bapampakana, binyike mitu panshi, bipanza bia mayi munda mutupu." 
Jeremiah14:4 Babidime badi ne dibungama. Kanyinganyinga kadibu naku kadi kamueneka. Badi bamona buloba buela mitanta, bualu mvula kavua muloke to." 
Jeremiah14:5 Mu mpata nyama wa ngulungu udi ushiya muana udiye mulele, bualu kakuena bisosa kabidi to." 
Jeremiah14:6 Nyama ya mpunde idi imana pa mikuna idi kayiyi ne bisosa. Idi yeyakana bikole mudi nyama ya mibuabua yenza. Idi ikeba bisosa ipanga. Bualu kakuena kabidi kantu to. 
Jeremiah14:7 Bulelela bilema bietu bidi bibipisha. Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, utuambuluishe, anu bua dina diebe wewe. Tudi bakuenzele bibi misangu mivule. Tudi bakutombokele." 
Jeremiah14:8 Kadi bena Izrayele mbakutekemene anu wewe. Bua wewe kubasungidila matuku a dikenga. Kadi wewe kuena muenyi mu ditunga dietu! Wewe kuena muena luendu, udi ulala anu dituku dimue." 
Jeremiah14:9 Udi udileja bu muntu, udi kayi mua kutuambuluisha, bu muena bukitu udi mupange bukole bua kusungidila bakuabu, bua tshinyi? Eku wewe Maweja-Nangila udi munkatshi muetu. Tudi bantu bebe. Kutulekedi nansha." 
Jeremiah14:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Eyowa, bantu abu mbasue kuendakana miaba yonsu, banshiya meme.” Kadi ebi kabiena bisankisha Maweja-Nangila. Nenku tshiena mua kupua malu mabi abu muoyi. Nembanyoke." 
Jeremiah14:11 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Kuena mua kuakuila bantu aba nansha kakese. 
Jeremiah14:12 Nansha bobu bajila biakudia, tshiena nteleja dilomba diabu to. Nansha bobu balambula milambu ya kuosha anyi milambu mikuabu, tshiena mua kuyanyisha to. Kadi nembashipe ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ne ku disanka dia tshiambu." 
Jeremiah14:13 Ke meme kuandamuna ne: — Eyi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, bambi badi babambila ne: “Kanuakuikala ne mvita nansha tshiyole tshia nzala to. Bualu Mvidi Mukulu mmunulaye ne: nenusombe anu talalaa mu ditunga dienu.”" 
Jeremiah14:14 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Bambi abu kabena bakula mu dina dianyi to. Badi bena dishima. Meme tshiena mubatume, tshiena mubape mukenji nansha umue, tshiena mubambile bualu to. Badi banuambila anu malu a dishima, adi kaayi ne mushinga, ngenyi ya patupu!" 
Jeremiah14:15 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba bua bambi aba ne: tshiena mubatume to. Kadi bu mudibu bambila bantu mu dina dianyi meme ne: kanuakuikala ne mvita, nansha ne tshiyole tshia nzala mu ditunga edi, nanku bantu aba nebalue ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ne ku mvita too ne ku muntu wa ndekelu." 
Jeremiah14:16 Kadi bantu bavuabu bambila malu nebafuile mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime, ku mvita ne ku tshiyole tshia nzala. Kakuena muntu udi mua kujika bitalu biabu, nansha bia bakaji babu, nansha bia bana babu ba balume, nansha bia bana babu ba bakaji. Nanku nembanyoke bua malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Jeremiah14:17 Wambile bantu abu ne: Ndi ndila, mpuekesha binsonji, tshiyi ndekela butuku ne munya. Bualu bantu banyi mbabutuke bibi, mbapete mputa mupite bunene." 
Jeremiah14:18 Pandi nya ku budimi, ndi mmona amu bitalu bia bantu bavua bafue mu mvita. Pandi mpingana mu tshimenga, ndi mmona anu bitalu, bia bantu bavua bafue ku tshiyole tshia nzala. Bambi ne batuangaji badi batambakana mu ditunga, kabayi bamanye tshia kuenza." 
Jeremiah14:19 Maweja-Nangila udi mubenge bena Yuda anyi? Kuena mumanye kabidi bena Siyone anyi? Udi mututape mputa idi kayiyi yuma bua tshinyi? Tuvua batekemene ne: bionsu nebikumbane, kadi katuena bamone tshia nsongu nansha tshimue. Tuvua bindile tshikondu tshivua makenga etu ne bua kujika, kadi tudi tumona amu malu adi atukuatshisha bowa." 
Jeremiah14:20 Maweja-Nangila tudi bamanye ne: tudi benze bibi. Tudi bamanye malu mabi avua baledi betu benze. Tudi bakuenzele bibi. Tudi bena tshibawu. 
Jeremiah14:21 Kadi, vulukabiuvua mutulaye. Bua lumu lua dina diebe, kupepeji Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshidi ne nkuasa webe wa butumbi." 
Jeremiah14:22 Ku mvidie yonsu ya patupu ya pa buloba, udi mua kulokesha mvula mvidie kaayi? Tshibuashibuashi nkayatshi katshiena mua kulokesha mvula, kadi amu wewe Maweja-Nangila. Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tudi bakutekemena, bualu amu wewe ngudi wenza malu onsu." 
Jeremiah15:1 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Nansha Moshe ne Samuwele bandombe bua kufuila bantu aba luse, tshiena mua kuanyisha to. Yirmeya, ubipate, ubumushe kundi, baye!" 
Jeremiah15:2 Pikalabu bakukonka ne: “Netuye penyi” wandamune ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Muntu yonsu neaye muaba udibu bamufundile. Udibu bafundile disama dia tshiambu neadipete. Udibu bafundile kufua mu mvita, neafuilemu. Udi ne bua kufua ku tshiyole tshia nzala, neafue. Udibu ne bua kuya nende mu bupika, nebaye nende!" 
Jeremiah15:3 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nembakengeshe mishindu inayi: muele wa mvita neubashipe, mbua neyikoke bitalu iye nabi kule, nyunyi ya mikanku neizokole bitalu, nyama ya mibuabua neidie bionsu bidi bishale." 
Jeremiah15:4 Nanku makalenga onsu a panshi pa buloba neakuatshike bowa, pamonawu malu onsu aa. Ke mudibu banyoka bantu bua malu mabi avua Menashe, muana wa Izkiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, muenze mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah15:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena Yerushalayime, kakuena muntu udi mua kunufuila luse kabidi to. Kakuena muntu udi mua kunudila, kakuena muntu udi uditatshisha bua kunuebeja ne: malu kaayi?" 
Jeremiah15:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu ke badi bambenga, bangela nyima. Ke mumvua mufike bua kunubutula, bualu bidi bintonda bua kunufuila luse." 
Jeremiah15:7 Mu tshimenga tshionsu tshia ditunga, mvua muenze ne bantu banyi bu muntu udi upepula bintu, bua lupepele luya ne bisota. Mvua mutangalaje bantu banyi. Mvua mushipe bana badibu balela. Kadi kabavua bapingane kundi." 
Jeremiah15:8 Mu ditunga amu, bakaji bakamba bavua bashale bapite lusenga lua ku muelelu wa mayi manene ku bungi. Meme kunyingalala munda munya, mamuende wa nsongalume, uvua tshilobu tshia mvita. Diakamue meme kukuatshisha mamuende bowa ne kanyinganyinga." 
Jeremiah15:9 Mamu muena bana muanda mutekete, uvuabu bela ka lumbandi, udi ushala kayi ne muana. Kena ne mushindu wa kueyakana bimpe kabidi to. Diende diba divua dibuela munda munya. Bundu buamukuatshi! Lumu luende ndujimine! Pikala bakuabu bashale ne muoyi, baluishi babu nebabashipe. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah15:10 Mamu wanyi, ndi muena diakabi! Udi mundele bua tshinyi? Miaba yonsu mu ditunga badi amu bambenga, badi amu banduisha! Kadi meme tshiena musombe, tshiena musombeshe muntu tshintu. Mudi bantu bonsu bangela mulawu mmunyi?" 
Jeremiah15:11 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila, milawu yabu idi mua kunkuata, bu meme tshiyi mukuenzele mudimu muanyi muonsu, bu meme tshiyi muakuile baluishi banyi kumpala kuebe, diba divuabu mu dikenga, banyingalala!" 
Jeremiah15:12 Badi mua kutshibula tshiamu tshifike, nangananga tshidi tshifumina ku mutu kua ditunga, nansha tshiamu tshikunze anyi?" 
Jeremiah15:13 Yuda, ndi musue bua baluishi bapawule biuma biebe ne bintu biebe bionsu. Ke mudibu bakunyoka bua malu mabi auvua muenze miaba yonsu mu ditunga diebe." 
Jeremiah15:14 Nenkufile kudi baluishi bebe, bua baye nebe ku bupika, mu ditunga diudi kuyi mumanye. Bualu tshiji tshianyi ntshimane kutema bu kapia. Ndi mukufikile munda." 
Jeremiah15:15 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi mumanye bimpe malu anyi onsu. Umvuluke, ungambuluishe. Unsombuele kudi baluishi banyi, Wewe mulame lutulu kuyi ubanyoka lukasa, nebanshipe. Umanye ne: bipendu ebi ndi mbilengulula anu bualu buebe." 
Jeremiah15:16 Paudi mungambile malu, diakamue meme kuteleja bimpe, kuvuluka muaku webe onsu. Muaku webe kunguwuja ne disanka, kungenza muena diakalenga. Bualu mbanjidile mu dina diebe wewe, Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu." 
Jeremiah15:17 Tshivua muye kusomba ne bantu bakuabu, bua kuseka nabu nansha. Bualu udi munteke tshianza tshiebe pambidi, munsombeshe ku mpenga pa nkayanyi, tshiji tshiudi mutekele bantu abu ntshimbuele munda bikole." 
Jeremiah15:18 Kadi dikenga dianyi kadiena dijika bua tshinyi? Mudibu kabayi mua kuondapa mputa yanyi mmunyi? Mudi mputa wanyi kayi uma mbishi? Bushuwa, wewe kundinga mudi musulu mume udinga bantu badi bakeba mayi kabayi baasangana!" 
Jeremiah15:19 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kungandamuna ne: Wewe mupingane kundi, nenkuakidile, ushale muena mudimu wanyi. Pawikala kuyi wamba kabidi malu a tshianana, kadi umanyishe bantu malu adi ne bualu, newikale tshiakabidi muambi wanyi. Meme nengikale mukana muebe. Bena Yuda badi ne bua kukulonda, kadi wewe kuena ne bua kubalonda bobu!" 
Jeremiah15:20 Wewe muenze bindi ngamba, kabakukuenzela bibi to. Nebakuluishe, kadi kabakukutshimuna to. Bualu nenkuenze bu tshimana tshienza ne tshiamu tshitoke, tshidibu kabayi mua kunyungisha. Bualu ndi nebe, bua kukusungidila, kukupandisha. Ke mundi ngamba meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah15:21 Nenkupatule ku njiwu yonsu, tshiakukushiya mu bianza bia badi bakukengesha to." 
Jeremiah16:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah16:2 — Kusedi mukaji. Kuledi bana ba balume, nansha ba bakaji mu ditunga edi to." 
Jeremiah16:3 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnumanyisha ne: bana ba balume ne ba bakaji badibu balele mu ditunga edi, ne batatuabu ne bamamuabu," 
Jeremiah16:4 bonsu nebafue lulu lubi. Kabakumona udi mua kubadila nanshakubajika to. Bitalu biabu nebifukishe buloba. Nebafile mu mvita, nansha ku tshiyole tshia nzala. Bitalu biabi nebabizokole kudi nyunyi ya mikanku, babidie kudi nyama ya mibuabua." 
Jeremiah16:5 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: — Kufiki muaba udi tshitalu, kufiki muaba udibu bajika muntu. Kusambi muntu mu madilu, bualu tshiena kabidi bulunda ne bantu aba to! Tshiena mubamanye, tshiena mubanange kabidi to." 
Jeremiah16:6 Nanku, mu ditunga edi bantu bonsu, bena biuma ne bapele, nebafue. Bantu kabakubajika, kabakubadila. Kakuakuikala muntu udi mua kunyingalala, kuditapa mputa pambidi, nansha kudibeya nsuki." 
Jeremiah16:7 Muntu nansha umue kakufila biakudia mu nzubu wa madilu, nansha maluvu, bua kusamba badi mu madilu, nansha bobu badila tatu anyi mamu." 
Jeremiah16:8 Kuena mua kubuela kabidi mu nzubu udibu benza tshibilu. Kuena mua kusomba bua kudia nansha kunua ne bantu badibu babikila. 
Jeremiah16:9 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi ngamba ne: “Nenkandike mitoyi ne mbila ya disanka, kabidi ne misambu ne musangelu bia bantu batshidi babuela mu dibaka. Wewe neushale ne muoyi bua kumona malu onsu aa. ”" 
Jeremiah16:10 Pawambila bantu aba bualu ebu, nebakukonke ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi musue kututumina dikenga bunene nanku bua tshinyi? Tudi benze bualu bubi kaayi? Tudi benzele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu bibi mushindu kaayi?”" 
Jeremiah16:11 Wewe ubandamune ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: bualu baledi benu bavua bambenge, balamate ku mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Bavua bayitendelela, bayifuila binu panshi. Kabavua bamvuluke, kabavua balame mikenji yanyi." 
Jeremiah16:12 Nuenu kabidi nudi nuenza malu mabi mapite, avua baledi benu kabayi benza. Yonsu wa kunudi udi unanukila kuenza anu malu mabi ne muoyi mubi wa tshitunu. Muntu nansha umue kena uteleja tshindi ngamba." 
Jeremiah16:13 Nenku nennuipate mu ditunga edi, bua nuye mu dikuabu, divua baledi benu kabayi bamanye, dinuvua nuenu mene kanuyi bamanye. Kuine aku nenutendelele munya ne butuku mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Kadi meme tshiakunuenzela kabidi bualu buimpe nansha bumue.”" 
Jeremiah16:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: dituku nedikumbane, didibu kabayi baditshipa bamba ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, udi mupatule bena Izrayele mu bupika!”" 
Jeremiah16:15 Kadi nebambe ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, udi mumushe bena Izrayele mu ditunga dia ku mutu, ne mu matunga makuabu avuaye mubatume mu bupika!” Bualu nembapingaje mu buloba buabu, bumvua mupeshe bankambua babu." 
Jeremiah16:16 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndi ntuma bilembi bia bungi bua bikuate bena Yuda, mudibu bakuata minyinyi ya mu mayi. Pashishe ndi ntuma bilembi bia bungi bua bibakebe miaba yonsu, mudibu bipata nyama mu mikuna minene ne mikese, too ne mu mbuebue."
