Jeremiah16:17 Bualu ndi ntangila bimpe tshidibu benza. Kakuena tshidi mua kunjimina. Tshilumbu tshiabu ndi mutshimanye. 
Jeremiah16:18 Ndi musue kubanyoka bikole bua malu mabi avuabu benze, ne bua tshilema tshiabu. Bualu mbanyange ditunga dianyi ne mpingu yabu indi mbenga idi bu bitalu. Bavua bateka mvidie ya dishima miaba yonsu mu ditunga dianyi." 
Jeremiah16:19 — Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi umpesha bukole. Wewe udi undama. Mu tshikondu tshia dikenga, ndi mua kunyemena kuudi. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu nebafike kuudi wewe, bafuma ku nshikidilu wa buloba. Diba adi nebambe ne: “Bankambua betu bavua anu ne mvidie ya dishima. Mvidie yabu ivua anu lupepele, kayivua mua kuambuluisha muntu nansha umue." 
Jeremiah16:20 Muntu kena mua kudienzela mvidie wende. Mvidie idi bantu benza kayena mvidie nansha!” 
Jeremiah16:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Nanku mpindiewu nemmanyishe bantu mundi mfumu, mundi mukole. Nebamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila ke meme!" 
Jeremiah17:1 — Tshilema tshia bena Yuda tshidi mu muoyi wabu kashidi. Tshidi amu bu miaku idibu bafunde ne ntapu wa tshiamu, nansha ne lusongu lua dibue dia mbongu. Bavua batshifunde kabidi ne ku matumba adi ku bilambuilu biabu." 
Jeremiah17:2 Bualu bena Yuda badi batendelela mvidie, bayilambula milambu, bayashila makunji kuinshi kua mitshi, pa mikuna," 
Jeremiah17:3 ne mu mpata mitumbuke. Nuenu bena Yuda telejayi. Ndi ntuma bantu, bua kupawula biuma bienu bionsu, bua banyange miaba inudi nutendelela. Ke mundi nnunyoka bua bubi bunudi nuenza mu ditunga dijima." 
Jeremiah17:4 Nenushiye ditunga divua dienu, dimvua meme munupeshe. Ndi nnutuma mu bupika, mu ditunga dinudi kanuyi bamanye. Bualu nudi balundule tshiji tshianyi. Tshikadi bu kapia kadibu kabayi mua kujima." 
Jeremiah17:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Ndi ndiwula muntu yonsu udi umbenga meme, utekemena kudi muntu mukuabu, ukeba bukole anu kudi bantu badi kabayi nabu." 
Jeremiah17:6 Muntu awu kena mua kupeta diakalenga to. Udi anu bu mutshi udi uma mu mpata, bu mutshi udi munkatshi mua mabue adi mu tshipela, mu buloba buatuke, budi muntu nansha umue kayi wasa." 
Jeremiah17:7 Kadi muntu udi utekemena kundi, udi ukeba ditalala kundi, ndi mmuela lupemba." 
Jeremiah17:8 Muntu awu neikale bu mutshi, udibu bakuna ku muelelu wa mayi. Miji yawu idi ifika ne ku mayi. Mutshi awu kawena utshina tshintu. Nansha mu munya mukole, mabeji awu adi amu mabishi. Nansha mu tshikondu tshia munanga mukole, mutshi awu kawena ufubidila. Udi ukuama amu kukuama bimuma." 
Jeremiah17:9 — Udi mua kumanya muoyi wa muntu nnganyi? Muoyi wende udi usama, kabayi mua kuondapa. Udi udinga bantu, kabayi mua kujingulula." 
Jeremiah17:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Meme ndi mmona munda mua muoyi. Ndi mumanye malu masokome a bantu. Ke mundi mua kupesha muntu bidiye ne bua kupeta, bilondeshile malu adiye wenza." 
Jeremiah17:11 Mudi nzolu uladila mayi a dibata, ke mudi muntu udi upeta bubanji mu buivi. Patshidiye ne bukole, bintu biende bidi bimujika. Yeye mumane kukulakaja, udi bu muntu mutatakane." 
Jeremiah17:12 Nzubu wetu wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila udi ne nkuasa wa butumbi, udi ku mutu kua bionsu biangatshile ku ntuadijilu." 
Jeremiah17:13 Maweja-Nangila, bena Izrayele badi bakutekemena amu wewe. Nanku badi bakubenga, bundu buasangana kubakuata anyi? Buabakuata! Bonsu badi bakubenga wewe, mbajimine bu mena adibu bafunde mu lupuishi. Bualu mbumuke kuudi wewe, Maweja-Nangila mpokolu wa muoyi." 
Jeremiah17:14 Maweja-Nangila nempete bukole, anu paudi wewe ujikija disama dianyi. Nempande, anu paudi wewe umpandisha. Bualu undi mua kutumbisha pa bualu udi anu wewe nkayebe." 
Jeremiah17:15 Bantu bonsu badi bankonka ne: “Makenga adi Mvidi Mukulu mutulaye adi penyi? Atukuate mene tumone!” 
Jeremiah17:16 Maweja-Nangila, meme tshivua mukusake bua wewe kubatumina dikenga. Tshivua mujinge ne: babutuke. Amu wewe ke uvua mujadike malu onsu amvua muambe." 
Jeremiah17:17 Udi musue kunkuatshisha bowa anyi? Kadi kundi mua kunyemena mu tshikondu tshia dikenga, kudi anu kuudi wewe!" 
Jeremiah17:18 Bantu badi bankengesha, bundu bubakuate amu bobu! Kadi kabunkuatshi meme! Bowa kabidi bubakuate amu bobu! Kabunkuatshi meme! Ubatumine dituku dia dikenga. Ubazaze kashidi." 
Jeremiah17:19 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Nanku, wimane ku tshiibi tshia Bantu tshia ku tshimenga, tshidi bakalenga ba bena Yuda babuelela, bapatukila. Pashishe, wenze nanku kabidi ku biibi bikuabu bia mu bimenga." 
Jeremiah17:20 Wambile bantu bonsu badi bapitshile ku mishiku ayi ne: “Nuenu, bakalenga, nuenu kabidi bena Yuda ne bantu bonsu badi basombe mu Yerushalayime, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne:" 
Jeremiah17:21 Panudi basue kushala ne muoyi, dituku dia Dikisha ka-nuambudi bujitu. Kanuena mua kupitshila nabu ku biibi ebi." 
Jeremiah17:22 Dituku adi kanuena mua kupatula bintu mu nzubu yenu. Kanuena mua kuenza mudimu. Bualu dituku adi ndianyi meme, bu mumvua muambile bankambua benu." 
Jeremiah17:23 Bushuwa bankambua benu kabavua banteleje, kabavua bavuluke bimvua muambe. Bavua bantombokele. Bavua ne tshitunu, babenge mikenji yanyi." 
Jeremiah17:24 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Nuenu bonsu nunteleje bimpe. Dituku dia Dikisha kanupitshidi ne bujitu ku biibi bia bimenga. Nunemeke dituku edi, dikale dianyi meme. Midimu yonsu ipumbe." 
Jeremiah17:25 Diba adi, bakalenga badi mu nkuasa wa Davide, badi babanda pa nyama ya tubalu nansha pa matempu, balombodi babu ba mu bukalenga, bena Yuda ne bantu badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, bonsu nebapitshile amu kupitshila ku biibi bia bimenga. Tshimenga atshi netshikale kashidi ne bantu badi basombamu." 
Jeremiah17:26 Nanku, bantu nebabuele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bafume ku bimenga bia Yuda, ku buloba bua ku mpenga kua Yerushalayime, ku buloba bua bena Binyamine, ku matunga a ku muelelu wa mayi, ne a ku mutu, ne a kuinshi kua ditunga. Bantu nebafike bua kulambulamu milambu mishilangane, bintu bia mu madimi ne kamonya, ne milambu ya kuela tuasakidila." 
Jeremiah17:27 Kadi nuenu kanuyi banteleje, nuenu balengulule dituku dianyi dia Dikisha, nuenu bapitshile ku biibi bia mu Yerushalayime dituku adi ne bujitu panyima, nengoshe tshimenga. Kapia nekabutule nzubu mimpe yonsu, kabayi mua kukajima.”" 
Jeremiah18:1 Maweja-Nangila kuntumina diyi ne: 
Jeremiah18:2 — Yirmeya, juka uye kua mufumbi wa ngesu. Pawafika, nenkuambile bualu bundi musue kukumanyisha." 
Jeremiah18:3 Meme kufika kua mufumbi wa ngesu, kumusangana wenza mudimu wende." 
Jeremiah18:4 Pavua luesu luvuaye ufumba kaluyi luimpe, mufumbi uvua wangata buloba bua diima abu, wenzulula nabu luesu lukuabu, muvuaye musue." 
Jeremiah18:5 Nenku Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah18:6 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena ne bukole bua kuenza nenu mudi mufumbi wa ngesu ewu wenza anyi? Nudi mu tshianza tshianyi, bu buloba bua diima mu tshianza tshia mufumbi." 
Jeremiah18:7 Musangu mukuabu ndi musue kubutula, kunyanga, nansha kushimbula ditunga anyi tshisamba." 
Jeremiah18:8 Kadi, padi bena ditunga edi babenga malu abu mabi avua abakebela tshiji kundi, ndi nkudimuna meji amvua nawu, ngumusha makenga amvua mubalongoluele." 
Jeremiah18:9 Misangu mikuabu, ndi musue kuibakulula, kukuna tshiakabidi ditunga nansha tshisamba." 
Jeremiah18:10 Kadi padi tshisamba etshi tshienza malu andi mubenge, tshipanga kuteleja mibelu yanyi, tshiena nkumbaja malu mimpe amvua mubalaye nansha.”" 
Jeremiah18:11 — Yirmeya, mpindiewu ambila bena Yuda ne badi basombe mu Yerushalayime ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndi mupangadike bua kununyoka. Ndi nnulongoluela dikenga. Muntu yonsu alekele kuenza malu mabi. Nukudimune malu enu, enzayi amu malu mimpe.”" 
Jeremiah18:12 Kadi badi bandamuna ne: “Nansha kakese! Katuena basue kuenza malu mimpe. Netuenze anu malu mabi, netuikale bena tshitunu amu mutudi basue.”" 
Jeremiah18:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Konkayi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, bakadi bumvua bantu balonda bualu nenku anyi? Bualu buvua bena Izrayele benze budi bupite bubi." 
Jeremiah18:14 Nukadi bamona nsongu ya mikuna ya Lebanone kayiyi ne neje anyi? Musulu wa mayi a muenji mukole udi mua kukama anyi? To! 
Jeremiah18:15 Kadi bantu banyi bakadi bampue muoyi. Badi balambula milambu kudi mvidie idi kayiyi mvidie mene. Ke mudibu badishinde mu njila wabu, ke mudibu bumuke mu njila wabu wa kale, benda mu njila udi bantu kabayi banji kuenda." 
Jeremiah18:16 Bantu banyi bavua banyanga ditunga diabu bikole. Ke mudi bantu badi bapitshila mu njila bakema, bazakala, bakupa mitu, bakuatshika bowa." 
Jeremiah18:17 Padi muluishi usemena pabuipi, nentangalaje bantu banyi, mudi lupepele lua kudi diba dipatukila lujula lupuishi. Nembele nyima! Tshiakubambuluisha diba dia dikenga." 
Jeremiah18:18 Bantu bakuabu bavua bamba ne: “Tuyayi, tuelela Yirmeya tshitungu amu mpindiewu. Bualu batuangaji badi mua kutulongesha, tudi amu nabu. Tudi ne bena meji, bua bafile ngenyi. Tudi ne bambi badi mua kutumanyisha tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wamba. Tumufunde ku tshilumbu, katuteleji kabidi tshidiye wamba. ”" 
Jeremiah18:19 Maweja-Nangila, teya matshi kundi, teleja tshilumbu tshidi baluishi banyi bamfunde." 
Jeremiah18:20 Badi mua kupingaja bubi pa buimpe anyi? Apu badi bateya buteyi bua kunkuata. Kadi vuluka mumvua muimane kumpala kuebe bua kubakuila, bua kaubafikidi munda." 
Jeremiah18:21 Kadi mpindiewu wanyishe bua tshiyole tshia nzala tshishipe bana babu, bua muele wa mvita ubabutule bonsu, bua bakaji babu bashale bianza bitupu, kabayi bamona bana, bafuishe kabidi babayabu. Disama dia tshiambu dikuate bantu balume, dibabutule. Bansongalume bafuile mu mvita!" 
Jeremiah18:22 Tuma bantu bena mvita bua kubaluisha diakamue. Tumvue muadi wabu. Bualu badi badilongolole bua kunkuata, banteya mu makasa." 
Jeremiah18:23 Wewe Maweja-Nangila udi mumanye bionsu, bidibu benza bua kunshipesha. Kuena mua kubafuila luse. Kuena mua kulengulula bilema biabu. Ubele panshi, ubaleje tshiji tshiebe!" 
Jeremiah19:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne: — Uye kudi mufumbi, usumbe mulondu wa diima. Pashishe wangata batuangaji, bamue bakulu, ne bantu bakuabu, uye nabu." 
Jeremiah19:2 Upatukile nabu bua kuya mu tshibanda tshia Inome, upitshile ku tshiibi tshia Ngesu mifue. Nenkumanyishe bualu buudi ne bua kubambila muaba awu." 
Jeremiah19:3 Newambe ne: “Nuenu bakalenga ba bena Yuda, ne bena Yerushalayime, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu wa Izrayele wamba. Nentume dikenga muaba ewu. Bantu badi bumvua batela dikenga adi, matshi abu neapate bu bumvua dikubakuba." 
Jeremiah19:4 Bualu bena Yuda mbambenge. Mbandamune muaba ewu, ukadi wa tshianana. Bavua balambuilapu mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu milambu. Ke mvidie buabu kabayi bamanye, nansha bobu nansha bankambua babu, nansha bakalenga ba bena Yuda. Bavua buwuje muaba ewu ne mashi a bantu bavua kabayi ne bualu." 
Jeremiah19:5 Bavua balongoluela mvidie Baale muaba wa kumutendelela, bua kumuoshilapu bana babu milambu. Kadi meme tshivua mutume diyi, bua benze bualu bua nanku to! Tshivua nansha mubuambe. Tshivua nansha mubuelele meji." 
Jeremiah19:6 “Ke pandi ngamba ne: Dituku nedifike didibu kabayi binyika kabidi muaba ewu ne: ‘Tofete,’ nansha ne: ‘Tshibanda tshia Inome.’ Kadi nebawinyike ne: ‘Tshibanda tshia kushipela bantu.’" 
Jeremiah19:7 Muaba ewu nempangishe bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda, bua kabakumbaji tshidibu bela meji. Nemfile bantu aba kudi baluishi babu badi kabayi ne luse. Nenganyishe bua bitalu biabu babizokole kudi nyunyi ya mikanku, babidie kudi nyama ya mibuabua." 
Jeremiah19:8 Tshimenga etshi netshi kemeshe bantu bonsu. Bapitshi ba mu njila nebazakale. Nebele mbila ya bowa, patangilabu muvuabu banyange tshimenga etshi." 
Jeremiah19:9 Baluishi, bantu badi kabayi ne luse, nebakuate tshimenga. Nebakengeshe bantu bikole bipite. Nanku benatshi nebadie minyinyi ya bana bavuabu balele. Nebadiangane bobu nkayabu!”" 
Jeremiah19:10 Pashishe, neushipe mulondu, bonsu baudi nabu batangile." 
Jeremiah19:11 Neubambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: nenshipe bantu aba ne tshimenga etshi, amu mudibu bashipa mulondu wa diima, kabayi mua kuufimba kabidi.” “Nebajike bantu mu Tofete, bualu kakuena muaba mukuabu wa bafue to." 
Jeremiah19:12 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: tshimenga ne bantu badi basombamu, nebikale amu bu muaba wa Tofete." 
Jeremiah19:13 Nzubu ya mu Yerushalayime ne ya bakalenga ba mu Yuda neikale ne mikiya bu muaba ewu wa Tofete. Bualu kulu kua nzubu eyi bavua balambuilaku musenga wa kamonya, bua kutendelela tshituilu tshia mitotu, bavua balambuilamu mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu milambu ya maluvu.”" 
Jeremiah19:14 Yirmeya kumuka mu Tofete, kuvua Maweja-Nangila mumutume bua kulongesha bantu. Kufikaye mu lupangu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuambilaye bonsu bavuamu ne:" 
Jeremiah19:15 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Nentume makenga onsu amvua muambe ku tshimenga etshi ne mu misoku idi pabuipi natshi. Bualu badi basamu mbantombokele. Kabena bateleja diyi dianyi.” 
Jeremiah20:1 Pashekure, muana wa Imere, mutuangaji mulombodi wa bena mudimu ba mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, uvua mumvue Yirmeya ulongesha malu aa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah20:2 Kufutaye Yirmeya mapi, kumuelaye ku tshikunyi tshivua ku tshiibi tshia kulu tshia bena Binyamine, tshivua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Jeremiah20:3 Butshia, Pashekure kumusha Yirmeya ku tshikunyi. Yirmeya kumuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila kena ukubikila kabidi ne Pashekure, kadi neakubikile ne: “Luzakalu miaba yonsu. ”" 
Jeremiah20:4 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe ne balunda bebe bonsu nenuikale tshintu tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa. Balunda bebe nebafue ku muele wa mvita wa baluishi babu, wewe muikalepu. Bena Yuda, nembafile bonsu kudi mukalenga wa Babilone. Yeye neabakuate. Neaye nabu mu bupika mu ditunga diende, nansha neabashipe." 
Jeremiah20:5 Bubanji bonsu buvua bantu ba mu tshimenga etshi nabu, difutu dionsu dia ku mudimu wabu, bintu bia mushinga bivuabu nabi, nansha biuma mene bivua bakalenga ba bena Yuda nabi, bionsu abi, nembifile kudi baluishi babu. Bobu abu nebabipawule, nebabiangate, baye nabi mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah20:6 Ne wewe kabidi Pashekure ne bonsu baudi nabu, nenuye mu bupika. Pawafika mu Babilone neufue. Nebakujikemu wewe ne balunda bebe bonsu bauvua wambila malu a dishima.”" 
Jeremiah20:7 Maweja-Nangila wewe kuntekesha! Meme kuanyisha bua wewe kuntekesha! Wewe kunkuata, wewe kumpita bukole! Bantu badi banseka matuku onsu. Bonsu badi bampetula." 
Jeremiah20:8 Pandi musue kuakula, ndi amu ne bua kuela mbila ne: Nebanukengeshe, nebanubutule! Badi banseka, bampenda matuku onsu pandi mmanyisha bantu muaku webe." 
Jeremiah20:9 Pandi ngamba ne: “Tshiena musue kuvuluka kabidi Mvidi Mukulu to. Tshiena musue kuakula kabidi mu dina diende”, diba adi munda muanyi, muaku webe udi bu kapia kadi katema. Ndi ngenza muanyi muonsu bua kukajima munda muanyi, kadi tshiena ne mushindu to." 
Jeremiah20:10 Ndi ngunwua bantu ba bungi bangamba bibi. Badi banginyika dina: “Luzakalu miaba yonsu.” Banga badi bamba ne: “Mufundayi ku tshilumbu.” Bakuabu badi bamba ne: “Eyowa, tumufunde patoke.” Balunda banyi ba pa muoyi mene, badi bantentekela, bua kumanya ne: neatupakane anyi? Badi bamba ne: “Yeye muambe bibi, tudi mua kumukuata, kudisombuela kudiye.”" 
Jeremiah20:11 Kadi Maweja-Nangila wewe udi ne bukole! Wewe udi unduila meme mvita. Badi bankengesha, badishinde. Nebapange tshia kuenza. Bu mudibu kabayi bapeta tshintu, nebafue bundu. Kakuena muntu wapua bualu ebu muoyi." 
Jeremiah20:12 Wewe Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, udi mumanye muntu udi ukulamata. Udi ujingulula meji adi muntu nawu munda. Mvua muteke tshilumbu tshianyi mu bianza biebe. Nanku ndi musue kumona muudi unyoka bena lukuna banyi." 
Jeremiah20:13 Imbilayi Maweja-Nangila musambu, numusamune, bualu uvua mumushe muena dikenga mu bianza bia baluishi bende." 
Jeremiah20:14 Dituku divua dimona muvuabu bandele, ndia diakabi. Muntu kambi ne: dituku divua mamu mundele ndia dikasa dimpe!" 
Jeremiah20:15 Muntu uvua muambile tatu, mumusankishe ne: “Mbakulelele muana wa balume”, asangane muena diakabi kuenza anyi? Enze!" 
Jeremiah20:16 Muntu ewu ikale bu bimenga bivua Mvidi Mukulu munyange kayi ne luse. Dinda muntu ewu umvue anu miadi! Munda munya umvue anu mitoyi ya mvita! 
Jeremiah20:17 Bu Mvidi Mukulu muanyishe bua meme kufuila munda mua mamu, kayi muanji kundela, bivua bimpe bitambe! Munda mua mamu wanyi muvua kuikala luanyi lukita. Uvua mua kundama munda muende kashidi." 
Jeremiah20:18 Bavua bandele bua tshinyi? Amu bua kumvua ntatu ne makenga anyi? Amu bua banseke kashidi anyi? 
Jeremiah21:1 Mukalenga Sedekiya uvua mutume Pashekure, muana wa Malkiya, ne mutuangaji Sefanya, muana wa Masheya, bua kukonka Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah21:2 — Yirmeya, bu wewe musue, utukonkele Mvidi Mukulu, bualu Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, udi udiluisha. Ulombe Maweja-Nangila bua adienzele tshishima, bu muvuaye muenze kale, bua bena Babilone batushile muaba bumuke." 
Jeremiah21:3 Kadi Yirmeya kuandamuna bantu bavua mukalenga mutume ne: — Pinganayi kudi mukalenga Sedekiya, numuambile ne:" 
Jeremiah21:4 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Nudi nuluisha tshiluilu tshia mukalenga wa bena Babilone tshidi tshinunyunguluila. Kadi meme nengambuluishe baluishi benu, bua bena mvita benu badi baluangana kumpala kua bimana bia tshimenga banyeme, bapingane munda mua tshimenga." 
Jeremiah21:5 Meme nkayanyi nennuluishe mvita. Bu mundi ne tshiji tshikole, nennuleje mundi ne bukole, mumanye mvita." 
Jeremiah21:6 Nenshipe bantu badi basomba mu tshimenga etshi, bantu ne nyama. Nebafue ku disama dikole dia tshiambu." 
Jeremiah21:7 Pashishe, Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, balombodi ba bukalenga buende, ne bantu ba mu tshimenga etshi, badi bapanduke ku disama dia tshiambu, ku mvita, ne ku tshiyole tshia nzala, mukalenga wa bena Babilone neabakuate. Eyowa, nembafile kudi baluishi babu badi bajinga kubashipa. Mukalenga Nebukadnesare neabashipe kayi luse. Kakushiya muntu nansha umue ne muoyi.”" 
Jeremiah21:8 Maweja-Nangila kutuma bantu kudi Yirmeya bua kubambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndi munuteke mu mansanga a njila. Kumpala kuenu kudi lufu nansha muoyi. 
Jeremiah21:9 Muntu yonsu washala mu tshimenga etshi, neafue anu ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, nansha ku disama dia tshiambu. Kadi muntu wa kunudi udi umuka mu tshimenga etshi, uya kudi bena Babilone badi bamuluisha, neikale ne muoyi." 
Jeremiah21:10 Tshiena ne meji a kusungidila tshimenga etshi, kadi anu a kutshibutula. Mukalenga wa bena Babilone neatshikuate, neatshioshe ne kapia.”" 
Jeremiah21:11 Telejayi malu avua Yirmeya ne bua kumanyisha bena diku dia bukalenga bua bena Yuda. 
Jeremiah21:12 Nuenu bantu ba mu diku dia Davide, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba. Udi wamba ne: Ku dituku ku dituku panualumbulula bilumbu, nukose nsambu amu pa yoyi. Bantu badibu banyenga bintu biabu, nubapatule mu bianza bia badi babakengesha. Tshianana tshiji tshianyi netshijuke bu mudi kapia kadi kuosha bionsu, kapia kadi muntu kayi mua kujima. Bualu nuvua benze malu mabi mapite bungi." 
Jeremiah21:13 Meme ndi nnuluisha nuenu badi base kuinshi pa mukuna. Nudi nuamba ne: Muluishi nansha umue kena mua kumpeta, kena mua kubuela muaba utudi basombe!" 
Jeremiah21:14 Kadi meme nennuluishe, nennunyoke bua bubi bunuvua benze. Nengoshe mitshi ya sedre idi mu nzubu yenu. Kapia aka nekabutule bionsu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Jeremiah22:1 Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yirmeya diyi ne: — Uye ku nzubu wa bakalenga ba bena Yuda bua kubamanyisha miaku yanyi. 
Jeremiah22:2 Wele mbila ne: “Wewe mukalenga wa bena Yuda udi mu nkuasa wa Davide, nuenu balombodi ba mu bukalenga, nuenu bantu badi babuela mu nzubu wa bukalenga, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba.”" 
Jeremiah22:3 Udi wamba ne: Nukose tshilumbu tshionsu amu pa tshiotshi. Nupatule bantu badibu bakengesha mu bianza bia bantu badi biba bintu biabu. Kankengeshi muena tshimuangi, kanunyengi tshintu tshia muana nshiya, nansha tshia mukaji mukamba. Lekelayi kushipa mwaba ewu bantu kabayi ne bualu." 
Jeremiah22:4 Nuenu bitabe bua kuenza tshindi nnulomba, nanku bakalenga nebasombe amu kusomba mu nkuasa wa Davide. Nebendakane pa nyama ya tubalu, nansha pa matempu. Bantu bonsu, balombodi ba mu bukalenga, ne bantu bakuabu, nebabuele amu kubuela mu nzubu wa bukalenga." 
Jeremiah22:5 Kadi panuabenga kuteleja mundi nnuambila, ndi nditshipa ne: meme Maweja-Nangila, bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu mulelela, ndi njadika ne: nzubu ewu wa bukalenga neupuke ashale lubuwa." 
Jeremiah22:6 Bua nzubu wa bukalenga bua bena Yuda, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nansha meme musakidile nzubu wa bukalenga ewu, mumumone muakane, amu bu mundi nsankidila metu a Ngilaade, nansha nsongu ya mikuna ya Lebanone, ndi nditshipa ne: nzubu ewu neashale tshipela, muaba udi bantu kabayi basombe." 
Jeremiah22:7 Ndi kutumina bantu ne tshisuyi. Nebupule makunji ebe mimpe a mitshi ya sedre. nebaoshe mu kapia. 
Jeremiah22:8 Bantu benyi ba bungi nebapitshile pabuipi ne tshimenga etshi. Nebebejangane ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mmunyoke tshimenga tshinene etshi naku bua tshinyi?” 
Jeremiah22:9 Nebabandamune ne: “Bualu bantu bavua basombemu bavua bakukuila mvidie mikuabu, bayitendelela. Kabavua bakumbaja dilaya divuabu balaye Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu.”" 
Jeremiah22:10 Nuenu bena Yuda, kanudidi mukalenga Yoshiya uvuabu bashipe. Kanuikadi ne tshinyongopelu bualu buende. Dilayi amu mukalenga Shalume, udibu baye nende mu bupika. Bualu kakupingana kabidi to. Kakumona kabidi ditunga diende divuabu bamulele nansha." 
Jeremiah22:11 Bua Shalume, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, udi mupingane tatuende Yoshiya mu bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Kena upingana kabidi to." 
Jeremiah22:12 Neafuile muaba udibu baye nende mu bupika. Kakumona kabidi ditunga edi to.” 
Jeremiah22:13 Wewe Yoyakime udi muena dikabi, bualu udi washisha nzubu wa bukalenga, kuyi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi. Udi ulungkaja nzubu ya kulu, kuyi unemeka bantu ne bintu biabu. Udi ukuatshisha bantu midimu, kuyi ubafuta!" 
Jeremiah22:14 Udi wamba ne: “Ndi musue kuibaka nzubu munene wa bukalenga, muikale ne nzubu mialabale ya bilala kulu.” Udi uyibaka ne madidishi ku bimana. Udi ulamika mabaya a mitshi ya sedre ku bimana. Udi ulaba mukubu mukunze pa nzubu mujima." 
Jeremiah22:15 Udi wela meji ne: udi mukalenga muimpe, bua paudi usungula mabaya a sedre, adi bakalenga bakuabu kabayi nawu anyi? Tatuebe uvua udia unua, anu mudi bantu bonsu benza. Kadi uvua ukosa nsambu amu pa yoyi. Ke muvuaye mupete dikasa dimpe." 
Jeremiah22:16 Uvua wakuila bapela ne bena dikenga. Nanku bantu bonsu bavua basombe amu bimpe. Muntu udi wenza nanku, ke udi uleja mudiye mummanye meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah22:17 Kadi wewe udi musue anu tshidi tshikulengelela wewe nkayebe. Udi ukeba anu kushipesha bantu badi kabayi ne bualu, ne kukengesha bantu ne tshikisu." 
Jeremiah22:18 Bua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Yeye mufue, bantu kabakumudila to. Muntu kakuamba ne: “Tutu wanyi, diakabi kaayi edi?” “Yaya wanyi, diakabi kaayi edi?” Kabakumudila bamba ne: “Mfumuanyi, diakabi kaayi?” “Mukalenga, diakabi kaayi edi.”" 
Jeremiah22:19 Nebamujike bu nyama. Nebakoke tshitalu tshiende panshi, bua kutshimansha, kutshiela pambelu pa biibi bia Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah22:20 Bena mu Yerushalayime, bandayi ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Lebanone, elayi mbila. Pa mukuna wa Bashane, dilayi muadi. Tuayi mikemu biangatshile ku mikuna ya Abarime, bualu mbabutule balunda bebe." 
Jeremiah22:21 Mvua mukubele, pavua bualu nansha bumue kabuyi buanji kuenzeka. Kadi wewe kuandamuna ne: “Tshiena musue kuteleja nansha.” Ke muuvua wenza misangu yonsu, biangatshile ku buana buebe! Kuena muteleje musangu nansha umue, bimvua nkuambila." 
Jeremiah22:22 Balombodi bebe nebaye nabu, mudi lupepele lujula bintu. Balunda bebe nebabuele mu bupika. Malu mabi onsu auvua muenze, neakukebele anu bundu ne kapeja." 
Jeremiah22:23 Wewe uvua musombe talalaa pa mukuna wa Lebanone. Uvua muenze disua diebe mu mutshi wa sedre. Kadi neudinyenge bu mukaji udi ukeba kulela. Neutue mikemu bikole, padi makenga akukuata." 
Jeremiah22:24 — Newambile Konya, muana wa Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne: “Nansha wewe muikale bu tshitampi tshianyi tshindi natshi ku tshianza tshia balume, nenkumushe ku munu wanyi. Bu mundi ne muoyi Bulelela, ndi nditshipa ne:" 
Jeremiah22:25 Ndi nku fila kudi bantu badi bakeba kukushipa, bantu baudi utshina bikole; ke Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, ne bena mvita bende." 
Jeremiah22:26 Nenkuipate wewe ne mamuebe. Nennutume mu ditunga dishilangane ne ditunga didibu bakulele. Nenufuile muaba awu, wewe ne yeye." 
Jeremiah22:27 Nenujinge mua kupingana mu ditunga dienu. Kadi kanuakupingana mu to.” 
Jeremiah22:28 Bantu nebakonke ne: “Konya, udi muntu mufuanangane ne luesu lufue ludibu bimansha anyi? Udi bu tshintu tshia patupu anyi? Yeye ne bana bende mbabipate baye nabu mu ditunga didibu kabayi bamanye bua tshinyi?”" 
Jeremiah22:29 — Eyi, ditunga dianyi, ditunga dianyi! Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba!" 
Jeremiah22:30 Udi wamba ne: “Bafunde muntu ewu mu mukanda wa bakalenga bu muntu udi kayi ne bana! Nsongalume awu mmupange bionsu. Muntu nansha umue wa ku ndelanganyi yende kakusomba pa nkuasa wa bukalenga bua Davide, kakuikala mfumu wa Yuda to.”" 
Jeremiah23:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Balombodi ba bantu banyi mbena diakabi. Badi balami babi ba mikoku, badi banyisha bua mikoku yanyi inyane, ipambuke.”" 
Jeremiah23:2 Bua balami ba mikoku aba, Maweja-Nangila wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Nuvua banyishe bua mikoku yanyi ipambuke, itangalake. Kanuvua nayi ne bualu to. Eyowa, meme ndi musue kununyoka, bualu bulami buenu bua mikoku yanyi mbubi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku!" 
Jeremiah23:3 “Meme nkayanyi nensangishe mikoku idi mishale ne muoyi mu matunga amvua muyitangalaje. Nenyipingaje mu mpata yayi bua imone mua kudia kudiunda, kuvulangana." 
Jeremiah23:4 Nenteke balami ba bushiwa badi bamanya mua kulama mikoku bimpe. Nanku, mikoku kayena mua kutshina kabidi to, kayena mua kuzakala. Nansha umue wa ku yoyi kawena mua kujimina. Ke mundi ngamba meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah23:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Dituku nedifike dindi mbikila muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide menemene. Neikale mukalenga muakane. Neenze amu malu mimpe. Neakose amu nsambu pa yoyi mu ditunga. 
Jeremiah23:6 Pabuelaye mu bukalenga, kabakukengesha kabidi bena Yuda kudi baluishi babu. Bena Izrayele nebasombe talalaa. Nebinyike mukalenga awu ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila ke musungidi wetu! ’ ”" 
Jeremiah23:7 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Eyowa, dituku nedifike didi bantu kabayi baditshipa kabidi bamba ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi, uvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu…”" 
Jeremiah23:8 Kadi nebaditshipe bamba ne: “Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi uvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu matunga a ku mutu kua ditunga ne mu matunga onsu avuaye mubatangalaje, bua basombe tshiakabidi mu ditunga diabu! ”" 
Jeremiah23:9 Ke miaku ya Yirmeya idi itangila bambi. Ndi ne kanyinganyinga, ndi nzakala mubidi mujima, ndi bu muntu mukuatshike maluvu, bu muntu uvua munue mvinyo mupite bungi. Anu bualu bua Maweja-Nangila, bualu bua Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, ne bua malu adiye mungambile ne:" 
Jeremiah23:10 “Ditunga ndiuwule tente ne bantu bena tshiendenda. Badi benza bibi ne disanka dionsu. Badi ne muoyi mukole anu bua kuenza malu mabi. Ke padi buloba mu madilu. Ke padi bisosa bionsu bia kudisha nabi nyama biume mu ditunga. 
Jeremiah23:11 Bambi ne batuangaji bonsu badi benza buenzavi. Meme kubasangana benza bibi ne mu nzubu wanyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku. 
Jeremiah23:12 Nanku njila wabu neafinunuke. Nebadishinde mu miidima. Nebalale panshi, bualu nembatumine dikenga, nembanyoke, Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Jeremiah23:13 “Bimvua mumone kudi bambi ba mu Samariya, bivua bintonde menemene. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku. Bavua bakula mu dina dia mvidie Baale. Bavua bapambule bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
Jeremiah23:14 Kadi bindi mumone kudi bambi ba mu Yerushalayime, bidi bibi bipite. Badi benza malu a tshiendenda, badi bashimangana. Badi bakolesha bena buenzavi ku muoyi, badi bakandika muntu yonsu bua kadilengeji. Badi amu bu bena Sodome. Bena Yerushalayime badi amu bu bena Ngomore. ”" 
Jeremiah23:15 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba bua bambi ne: “Nembadishe bintu bia bululu, nembanuishe mayi a lulengu ku bukole. Bualu bambi ba mu Yerushalayime badi mpokolu wa malu mabi, adi anyanga ditunga dijima.”" 
Jeremiah23:16 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Kanuteleji tshidi bambi banuambila. Badi banuambila malu a dishima. Malu adibu banuambila adi mafuma mu ngenyi yabu nkayabu. Meme tshivua mubaleje bualu nansha bumue. 
Jeremiah23:17 Bantu badi baseka tshindi ngamba, bambi badi ne dikamakama dia kubambila ne: ‘Bionsu nebiende amu bimpe.’ Bantu batshimbakane badi batungunuka ne tshitunu tshiabu, bambi badi babambila ne: ‘Dikenga kadiakunukuata to.’" 
Jeremiah23:18 Kadi muambi kaayi uvua mubuele nanyi mu tshipangu? Nganyi uvua mumone nansha mumvue tshimvua ngamba meme Maweja-Nangila? Nganyi uvua mujingulule muvua muaku wanyi?” 
Jeremiah23:19 Mvunde mukole wafiki. Ke tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila! Mvunde munene udi unyoka bena tshibawu. 
Jeremiah23:20 Maweja-Nangila kayi muanji kuenza bualu bujima budiye mupangadike, tshiji tshiende katshiena tshijika to. Tshikondu tshikuabu nenujingulule malu awu." 
Jeremiah23:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Tshiena mutume bambi abu to. Kadi badi anu benda baya. Meme tshiena mubambile bualu to. Kadi badi amu bambila bantu malu! 
Jeremiah23:22 Bu bobu babuele mu tshipangu tshianyi, bavua mua kuambila bantu banyi malu onsu amvua muambe. Nanku bavua mua kuambuluisha bantu bua badilengeje." 
Jeremiah23:23 Maweja-Nangila udi ukonka ne: Meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu udi umona anu bidi pabuipi nende anyi? To, ndi Mvidi Mukulu udi umona bionsu, ne bidi kule kuaka!" 
Jeremiah23:24 Maweja-Nangila udi webeja ne: pikala muntu usokoma, tshiena ne mushindu wa kumumona anyi? Ndi miaba yonsu: mu diulu ne pa buloba. Kanuena bamanye bualu ebu anyi?" 
Jeremiah23:25 Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mumvue bivua bambi bamba. Badi bamba ne: tudi tuakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kadi mbia dishima. Badi bamanyisha bantu ne: “Mvua mulote! Mvua mumone malu!” 
Jeremiah23:26 Nebadinge bantu nanku, too ne ku tshikondu kaayi? Padibu balonda malu a dishima, adi afuma amu ku lungenyi luabu, tshidi bambi aba bipatshila ntshinyi?" 
Jeremiah23:27 Padibu balondelangana malu adibu bamone, badi bakeba bua bantu banyi kabavuluki kabidi ne: meme ndi nganyi, amu muvua bankambua babu bampua muoyi, batendelela mvidie Baale." 
Jeremiah23:28 Padi muambi ulota ndota, mbimpe awule anu ndota yende! Kadi padiye ne bualu bundi mumuambile bua kumanyisha bantu, abuambe anu bu mudibu. Ki mbimpe kufuanyikija mpengelane nyimu to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku!" 
Jeremiah23:29 Numanye ne: muaku wanyi udi bu kapia, bu nyindu mukole, udi uzaza lubuebue." 
Jeremiah23:30 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Nenduishe bambi badi bibangana meyi, badingangana ne: nga kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah23:31 Eyowa, nenduishe kabidi bantu aba badi badiamba ne: tudi bambi, bambila bantu meyi abu, babadinga ne: nga kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah23:32 Ndi nduisha bambi badi bamba malu avuabu bamone mu ndota, bapambuisha bantu banyi, babadinga. Meme tshiena mubapeshe mudimu nansha umue, tshiena mubelele mukenji nansha umue. Kabena bambuluisha bantu banyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Jeremiah23:33 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne: — Padi muambi, mutuangaji, nansha muntu mukuabu, ukukonka ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba bishi, bujitu budiye uteka pambidi petu mbujitu kaayi,” umuandamune ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu mene nudi bujitu bundi meme ne bua kuambula! Kadi nembuitshikije panshi.”" 
Jeremiah23:34 Pikala muambi, mutuangaji, nansha muntu mukuabu, webeja ne: “ Bujitu budi Maweja-Nangila muteke pambidi petu mbujitu kaayi ” nemmunyoke yeye ne bena diku diende." 
Jeremiah23:35 Tshinudi mua kukonkangana tshidi amu ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuandamune tshinyi” Nansha ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmuambe tshinyi” 
Jeremiah23:36 — Kadi kanuambi ne: Maweja-Nangila mmuteke bujitu pambidi petu. Muaku wa Maweja-Nangila udi wenza bujitu budi muntu ne bua kuambula anyi? Nansha kakese! Kadi padibu bamba nanku, badi banyanga muaku wa Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu udi ne muoyi, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele." 
Jeremiah23:37 Eyowa, badi mua kukonka muambi ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmukuandamune tshinyi, wakuambidi tshinyi?”" 
Jeremiah23:38 Panuikala nutungunuka ne kuamba bua bujitu budi Maweja-Nangila muteke pambidi, nansha meme mumane kukandika bua nuambe miaku eyi, nanku, ndi nnuambila ne:" 
Jeremiah23:39 nennuambule bu bujitu pa makaya anyi. Nennuimanshe nuenu, kabidi ne tshimenga etshi tshimvua munupeshe nuenu ne bankambua benu." 
Jeremiah23:40 Nennuluishe bundu. Nebanupepeje bidimu ne bidimu kabayi mua kupuwa to. 
Jeremiah24:1 Maweja-Nangila kundeja bisaka bibidi bia bimuma bia mfiku, bivua muntu muteke kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Diba adi, Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, ukavua mumane kukuata Yekonya, muana wa Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga, bansenda ne bena midimu ya bianza." 
Jeremiah24:2 Bimuma bia mu tshisaka tshia kumpala bivua bimpe bitambe, bivua bu bia ku ntuadijilu bia ku tshikondu tshia kupola bimuma. Bimuma bia mu tshisaka tshibidi bivua bibole, kabayi mua kubidia to." 
Jeremiah24:3 Maweja-Nangila kunkonka ne: — Yirmeya, tshiudi umona ntshinyi? Meme kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona bimuma bia mfiku. Bikuabu bimpe bitambe, kadi binga bibole, kabayi mua kubidia nansha." 
Jeremiah24:4 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Jeremiah24:5 — Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi bu bantu badi ne disanka dinene padibu batangila bimuma bimpe. Ke mundi ntangila ne disanka bena Yuda badi mu bupika, bamvua mumushe apa bua baye nabu mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah24:6 Eyowa, ndi mbatangila ngunwua luse lua bungi. Nanku, nembapingaje mu ditunga edi. Tshiena musue kabidi kubabutula. Kadi nembafululule. Tshiena musue kubatula ne miji yabu, kadi ndi nkeba mundi mua kubakuna tshiakabidi." 
Jeremiah24:7 Nembapeshe bukole bua kumanyabu ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. Nebapingane kundi ne muoyi wabu mujima. Nanku, nebikale bantu banyi, meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Jeremiah24:8 Kadi Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, balombodi bende ba mu bukalenga, bantu bavua bashale mu Yerushalayime, kabidi ne bonsu bavua baya kusomba mu Ejipitu, nembenzele mudibu benzele bimuma ba mfiku bimane kubola, kabayi mua kubidia." 
Jeremiah24:9 Nanku bantu ba mu matunga onsu a pa buloba, pamonabu bionsu abi nebakeme bikole, bakuatshike bowa. Miaba yonsu indi mbatangalaja, bantu nebabaseke, babapende. Nebasake misambu, batela dikenga diabu bua tshilejilu tshia dikenga dinene. Bantu nebabatshipe." 
Jeremiah24:10 Nembatumine mvita, tshiyole tshia nzala, ne disama dia tshiambu, bua bajimine pa buloba bumvua mubapeshe bobu ne bankambua babu." 
Jeremiah25:1 Umvuayi malu avua Maweja-Nangila muleje Yirmeya, adi atangila tshisamba tshijima tshia bena Yuda. Tukavua mu tshidimu tshinayi tshivua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, ne mu tshidimu tshia kumpala tshia bukalenga bua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone." 
Jeremiah25:2 Yirmeya kuambila bena Yuda ne bena mu Yerushalayime ne: 
Jeremiah25:3 — Kutuadija ku tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshinayi tshivua Yoshiya, muana wa Amone, mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda too ne lelu, kukadi bidimu makumi abidi ne bisatu bindi nnubela, tshiyi ndekela, nnuambuluila amu malu adi Maweja-Nangila ummanyisha. Kadi kanuena nuateleja to." 
Jeremiah25:4 Maweja-Nangila uvua unutumina amu kunutumina bambi bena mudimu bende, kadi kanuena babateleje nansha. Kanuvua bateya matshi bua kumvua tshivuabu bamba." 
Jeremiah25:5 Maweja-Nangila kunuambila ne: “Muntu yonsu wa kunudi adilengeje, alekele malu mabi adiye wenza! Nanku, nenusombe kashidi ne kashidi mu ditunga edi dimvua munupe nuenu ne bankambua benu." 
Jeremiah25:6 Panualekela kulonda mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, kuyikukuila, kuyitendelela, panualekela kumfikisha munda ne mvidie yenu inuvua nudienzela, nanku tshiakunuenzela bibi to.”" 
Jeremiah25:7 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: kanuvua banteleje to. Nanku bu munuvua bamfikisha munda ne mvidie inuvua benze, nenupete diakabi." 
Jeremiah25:8 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Kanuvua bateleje tshindi ngamba. 
Jeremiah25:9 Nanku nembikile bantu bonsu ba mu matunga a ku mutu kua ditunga, ne nangananga muena mudimu wanyi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, bua baluishe ditunga edi, ne bantu badi basombamu. — Nebaluishe kabidi bisamba bidi nabu mutumba. — Nennubutule bonsu, nuenu ne bena mutumba nenu. Mu ditunga emu nemushale amu tshipela ne lubuwa. Bantu nebakeme bela mbila ya bowa pa kumona muaba ewu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Jeremiah25:10 Meme nenjikije maja mu bibilu bienu, mbila ya disanka, ne misambu ya batshidi baselangana. Bantu kabakuikala kabidi ne ntete ya kutua mu tshinu, nansha ne mafuta a kuela mu muendu." 
Jeremiah25:11 Musoku wenu ewu newikale amu tshipela. Bisamba bionsu ebi nebikale mu bianza bia Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, bidimu makumi muanda mutekete." 
Jeremiah25:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: Pajika bidimu bionsu makumi muanda mutekete ebi, nentangile tshibawu tshia Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, ne tshia bantu bende. Nenyoke ditunga diabu. Nedishale kashidi tshipela tshienza bowa." 
Jeremiah25:13 Nentume mu ditunga edi makenga onsu amvua mumane kuamba. Bavua bafunde makenga aa mu mukanda ewu. Ke malu adi muambi Yirmeya mumanyishe bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu mu dina dianyi. 
Jeremiah25:14 Nanku bena Babilone kabidi nebabuele ku bumfumu bua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, ne bua bakalenga banene. Nembasombuele ku malu mabi onsu avuabu benze.”" 
Jeremiah25:15 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele uvua mungambile ne: “Ndi nkupesha dikopu edi dia mvinyo, didi tente ne tshiji tshianyi. Udiangate, udinuishe bantu ba bisamba bionsu miaba yonsu indi nkutuma." 
Jeremiah25:16 Bantu ba bisamba bionsu ebi badinue, tshinyungu tshibakuate! Bazakale pa kumona mundi nshipa bantu munkatshi muabu!”" 
Jeremiah25:17 Meme Yirmeya kuangata dikopu divua Maweja-Nangila mumpeshe. Meme kudimusha bisamba bionsu, miaba yonsu ivua Maweja-Nangila muntume." 
Jeremiah25:18 Meme kutuadija kunuisha bena mu Yerushalayime, bena mu bimenga bia Yuda, bakalenga ba balombodi ba mu bukalenga, bua kubabutula bonsu. Ditunga diabu ndishale lubuwa. Bionsu ebi, nebikemeshe bantu. Nebibeleshe bibingu. Nanku bantu nebatshipe batela tshilejilu tshiabu." 
Jeremiah25:19 Pashishe meme kunuisha bisamba bikuabu. — Ke mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, ne balombodi bende ba mvita, ne balombodi bende ba bukalenga, kabidi ne bantu bende bakuabu bonsu," 
Jeremiah25:20 ne bantu ba mu bisamba bishilangane badi basombe mu Ejipitu; — ke bakalenga ba ditunga dia Uze; — ke bakalenga ba bena Peleshete: bakalenga ba mu Askalone, ba mu Ngaza, ba mu Ekrone ne bena Ashidode bavua bashale ne muoyi;" 
Jeremiah25:21 — ke bena Edome, bena Mowabe ne bena Amone;" 
Jeremiah25:22 — ke bakalenga bonsu ba mu Tire, ba mu Sidone, ne ba ku matunga adi dishiya dia mayi manene;" 
Jeremiah25:23 — ke bantu ba mu Dedane, ba mu Tema, ba mu Buza, too ne bantu badi badibeya nsuki ku matama;" 
Jeremiah25:24 — ke bakalenga ba bena Arabe, ne bisamba bishilangane bidi bisombe mu tshipela;" 
Jeremiah25:25 — ke bakalenga bonsu ba mu Zimri, ba mu Elame, ne bena Madayi;" 
Jeremiah25:26 — ke bakalenga bonsu ba mu matunga adi ku mutu kua matunga, nansha badi basombe pabuipi, nansha badi basombe kule. Nanku makalenga onsu avua pa buloba avua ne bua kunua dikopu malondangane. Ku ndekelu, meme kunuisha kabidi mukalenga Sheshake." 
Jeremiah25:27 Maweja-Nangila kuntuma bua kubambila ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: Nunue, mikuatshike, nuluke, too ne munuadishinda panshi, kanuyi mua kujuka kabidi. Bualu nenumone mundi nshipa bantu munkatshi muenu.”" 
Jeremiah25:28 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: “Nenunue amu kunua. Ke mukenji udi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu unuelela. 
Jeremiah25:29 Tshiena mfuila tshimenga tshidi tshianyi meme luse. Ke nuenu kuela meji ne: katuena bena tshibawu. Nentume muele wa mvita, bua ushipe bantu bonsu badi mu buloba bujima. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ngamba.”" 
Jeremiah25:30 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: — Ubambile bionsu bindi nkuambila ebi, usakidila kabidi ne: Mulu muamua Maweja-Nangila udi ukungula, mudi nyama wa ntambue wenza. Mu nzubu wende wa tshijila, udi wela diyi dikole. Udi ukungula ulekela bantu bende tshiji. Mudi bantu bela mbila padibu bakama tumuma tua mvinyo, batudiata, Mvidi Mukulu kabidi udi wela mbila mikole." 
Jeremiah25:31 Mutoyi udiye wenza udi ufika kudi bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, too ne ku ndekelu kua buloba. Maweja-Nangila udi wasa bisamba bionsu tshilumbu, ubibikila ku kabadi kende. Kadi bantu bonsu bena tshibawu neabashipe. Ke tshivua Mvidi Mukulu mungambile." 
Jeremiah25:32 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Dikenga nedibuele mu ditunga ne mu ditunga. Mvunde udi ujuka, ufumine ku ndekelu kua buloba." 
Jeremiah25:33 Dituku dikale malu aa mua kuenzeka, kakuakuila muntu nansha umue pa buloba bujima udi mua kudila bantu badi Maweja-Nangila ushipa. Kakuakuila muntu udi mua kuambula bitalu biabu bua kubajika. Nebishale panshi bu bufuke budi bufukisha buloba." 
Jeremiah25:34 Asayi muadi, elayi nshiba, nuenu balombodi ba bantu. Nubunguluke panshi mu lupuishi, nuenu balami ba bantu. Bualu matuku akumbanyi a nuenu kuya ku tshishipelu. Nebanushipe mudibu bashipe bimpanga bimpe." 
Jeremiah25:35 Bualu balombodi kabakuikala ne mushindu wa kunyema. Balami ba bantu kabakuikala ne mushindu wa kuya kusokoma! 
Jeremiah25:36 Ndi ngunwua mbila yabu, miadi yabu nya bantu badi mu dikenga! Bualu Maweja-Nangila ke udi unyanga ditunga dienu didi dinudisha." 
Jeremiah25:37 Tshiji tshiende tshikole tshidi tshinyanga mpata yenu milenga, ishala tshipela, muaba wa lufu." 
Jeremiah25:38 Maweja-Nangila udi mushiye ditunga diende, mudi nyama wa ntambue ushiya muaba utuye ulala. Ditunga diabu ndiandamuke tshipela, bualu bua mvita mibi, ne bua tshiji tshikole tshivua Maweja-Nangila natshi." 
Jeremiah26:1 Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mumane kubuela mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda amu matuku makese, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah26:2 — Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkupa mukenji ewu. Uye kuimana mu lupangu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uyukile ne bantu bonsu badi bafume mu bimenga bia Yuda bua kutendelela. Wambuluile bantu bionsu bindi mukutumine diyi bua kubambila. Kushiyi kalu nansha kamue to. 
Jeremiah26:3 Ndi mutekemene se: nebateleje. Muntu yonsu adilengeje. Ndi musue kubatumina dikenga bua malu mabi adibu benza. Kadi bobu bateleje, tshiakubanyoka to." 
Jeremiah26:4 Ubambile ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ntelejayi, londayi mikenji yanyi imvua munupe." 
Jeremiah26:5 Nulame malu adibu banuambila kudi bambi bena mudimu banyi. Mvua munutumine bambi matuku onsu, kadi kanuvua babateleje to." 
Jeremiah26:6 Panudi kanuyi nuteleja, nengupule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu, bu mumvua mupule wa mu Shilo. Nenteke Yerushalayime bu tshilejilu tshidi bantu ba bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba, batela padibu baditshipa mutshipu.”" 
Jeremiah26:7 Batuangaji, bambi, ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu, kumvuabu muvua Yirmeya umanyisha bantu bualu ebu mu lupangu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Jeremiah26:8 Yirmeya mumane kumanyisha bantu bonsu aba tshivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile, kumukuatabu, bamba ne: — Bamushipe!" 
Jeremiah26:9 Mmunyi mudi mulumiana ewu mua kuambila bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila ne: nebupule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ewu, muvuabu bupule wa mu Shilo; nansha ne: tshimenga etshi netshibutuke, bantu kabayi kabidi basombamu. Nanku bantu bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu kunguilabu bua kuluisha Yirmeya." 
Jeremiah26:10 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda bamane kumvua bivua bienzeka, kumukabu mu nzubu wa bukalenga, kubandabu ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuyabu kusomba kumpala kua tshiibi tshipiatshipia tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kuteleja tshilumbu." 
Jeremiah26:11 Ke batuangaji ne bambi kuambila balombodi aba ne bantu bavua muaba awu ne: — Muntu ewu, mbimpe bamushipe, bualu uvua muambe tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime bibi. Nuenu mene nuvua badiumvuile." 
Jeremiah26:12 Kadi Yirmeya kuambila balombodi bonsu ba mu bukalenga ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu ne: — Maweja-Nangila ke uvua muntume bua kunumanyisha bionsu binuvua bumvue, bualu mmubenge nzubu ewu ne tshimenga etshi." 
Jeremiah26:13 Mpindiewu, nudilengeje, nuakaje nsombelu yenu, nuteleje tshidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu wamba. Nanku kakunutumina dikenga divuaye munuambile to." 
Jeremiah26:14 Meme ndi mu bianza bienu. Nungenzele munudi bamone ne: mbimpe. 
Jeremiah26:15 Kadi nuenu banshipe, numanye ne: nudi bashipe muntu udi kayi ne bualu. Nanku nebanunyoke bualu buanyi, nuenu ne bantu bonsu badi basomba mu tshimenga etshi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmuntume menemene bua kunuambila malu onsu aa." 
Jeremiah26:16 Nanku balombodi ba mu bukalenga ne bantu bonsu kuambila batuangaji ne bambi ne: — Kabashipi muntu ewu nansha! Bualu mmutuambile menemene malu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. 
Jeremiah26:17 Ke bakulu bakuabu ba mu tshipangu tshia Bakulu kuambila bantu ne: 
Jeremiah26:18 — Mu tshikondu tshia Izkiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, muvua muambi mukuabu, dina diende mMika, wa mu Mereshete. Uvua muambile bantu bonsu ba mu Yuda ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Siyone neikale bu budimi budibu babundulula. Yerushalayime neashale bu mu dikolu. Mukuna, muaba udi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, newikale bu ditu. ”" 
Jeremiah26:19 Kadi mukalenga Izkiya ne bantu ba mu Yuda bavua bashipeshe muambi Mika anyi? Too. Kadi bavua amu bamanye ne: Maweja-Nangila ke udi wakula. Nanku bavua bakeba kutalaja tshiji tshiende. Diba adi, Maweja-Nangila kavua mubatumine dikenga divuaye muambe. Kadi mpindiewu, tuetu bashipe muntu ewu, netudikebele makenga makole." 
Jeremiah26:20 Mu tshikondu atshi, muambi mukuabu uvua wambila bantu malu mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu. Dina diende divua Uriya, muana wa Shemaya, wa mu Kiriyate-Yeyarime. Uvua wambila bantu malu mafuanangane ne a muambi Yirmeya, ubela bikole bena mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, ne bantu bonsu bavua basomba mu ditunga dia Yuda." 
Jeremiah26:21 Mukalenga Yoyakime, bena mvita bende bonsu, ne balombodi bende ba mu bukalenga, kumvuabu malu onsu avua Uriya muambe. Nanku, mukalenga kukeba bua kumushipesha. Kadi muambi Uriya kumanya bualu. Bu muvuaye ne bowa kunyemenaye mu Ejipitu." 
Jeremiah26:22 Nanku, mukalenga Yoyakime kutuma Elnatane, muana wa Akbore, ne bantu bakuabu mu Ejipitu." 
Jeremiah26:23 Kukuatabu Uriya muaba awu. Kumupatulabu mu Ejipitu. Kumufilabu kudi mukalenga. Awu kushipesha Uriya. Kuelabu tshitalu tshiende mu tshiina tshivuabu bela bitalu bia bantu bonsu ba tshianana. 
Jeremiah26:24 Kadi Ayikame, muana wa Shafane, ke uvua mulame muambi Yirmeya bimpe. Nanku bualu bua Ayikame, bantu kabavua mua kukuata Yirmeya kumushipa to." 
Jeremiah27:1 Sedekiya, muana wa Yoshiya, kudiaye bumfumu mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda. Matuku makese mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kumanyisha Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah27:2 — Udienzele mabaya, kabidi ne mionji, mitshi ya kuambula nayi bujitu. Uyambule pa makaya." 
Jeremiah27:3 Pashishe, uyitume kudi mukalenga wa bena Edome, wa bena Mowabe, wa bena Amone, kudi mukalenga wa bena Tire, too ne kudi mukalenga wa bena Sidone. Bua bakalenga aba bayipete, ufile mitshi eyi kudi bamienampala ba bakalenga abu bavua bafika mu Yerushalayime bua kumonangana ne Sedekiya mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
Jeremiah27:4 Bamienampala abu, ubambile ne: Numanyishe bakalenga tshidi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ubambila ne:" 
Jeremiah27:5 Mvua muleje bukole buanyi ne meji anyi, pamvua mufuke buloba, bantu ne nyama bidi bisombamu. Tshindi mufuke, ndi ntshifila kudi muntu undi musue." 
Jeremiah27:6 Nanku ndi mujadike bua kufila matunga enu onsu, too ne nyama ya muitu, kudi muntu wanyi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone." 
Jeremiah27:7 Matunga onsu neikale ku bumfumu buende, ku bumfumu bua muanende, ne bua muikuluende. Kadi tshikondu netshifike tshidi baluishi bakuata ditunga diende. Nedishale ku bumfumu bua matunga adi madipite ku bukole. Mukalenga wadi neikale ku diyi dia bakalenga badi bamupita bukole." 
Jeremiah27:8 Pikala bena tshisamba kampanda, anyi bena bukalenga, babenga kuitaba ku diyi dia mukalenga Nebukadnesare, nansha babenga kuambula mutshi wa bupika udiye ubateka pa makaya, nembanyoke ne mvita, ne tshiyole tshia nzala, kabidi ne disama dia tshiambu. Nengambuluishe Nebukadnesare bua amone mua kubutula bantu aba." 
Jeremiah27:9 Nanku, nuenu kanuteleji bambi benu to. Kanuteleji batshidi banuambila malu adi kumpala, banudinga ne: ke atuvua bamone mu ndota, mu mbuku, ne mu majimbu. Bualu bonsu badi banuambila ne: Kanuitabi ku diyi dia mukalenga wa Babilone." 
Jeremiah27:10 Badi banudinga. Nuenu babateleje, nebaye nenu muaba mule. Nennuipate mu buloba buenu, nennubutule." 
Jeremiah27:11 Kadi pikala bena tshisamba kampanda mua kuambula mutshi wa bupika udi mukalenga wa mu Babilone muteke pa makaya abu, bitabe ku diyi diende, nebashale mu buloba buabu. Nebasombe, badime. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba nanku." 
Jeremiah27:12 Yirmeya uvua mumanyishe Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, malu a mushindu umue, umuambila ne: — Wewe ne bantu bebe, nudi ne bua kuanyisha mua kuambula mutshi wa bupika udi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, muteke pa makaya enu. Numuenzele mudimu, yeye ne bantu bende. Nanku kanuakufua to." 
Jeremiah27:13 Wewe ne bantu bebe, nudi basue kufua mu mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, nansha ku disama dia tshiambu, anyi? Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmuambe ne: tshisamba tshionsu tshidi tshibenga kuenzela Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone mudimu, netshibutuke." 
Jeremiah27:14 Kanuteleji bambi badi banuambila ne: kanuena mua kuenzela mukalenga wa mu Babilone mudimu to. Badi banudinga. 
Jeremiah27:15 Maweja-Nangila udi ujadika ne: “Tshiena mutume bambi abu to. Padibu bambila bantu malu mu dina dianyi, badi babadinga. Panudi nubateleja, nennuipate muaba ewu. Nenufue, nuenu ne bambi badi banumanyisha malu aa.”" 
Jeremiah27:16 Yirmeya uvua umanyisha kabidi batuangaji, ne bantu bakuabu bavua muaba awu, bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile bualu buabu ne: — Kanuteleji bambi badi banuambila ne: bintu bia tshijila bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bivuamu Babilone, nebipingane mu Yerushalayime amu mpindiewu. Badi banudinga." 
Jeremiah27:17 Kanubateleji to. Enzelayi amu mukalenga wa mu Babilone mudimu. Nanku kanuakufua to. Tshimenga etshi ki mbimpe batshibutule nansha. 
Jeremiah27:18 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Pikala bantu aba bambi balelela, pikalabu bamba malu adi Maweja-Nangila wamba, basengelele Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, bua biuma bidi bishale mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu nzubu wa mukalenga wa bena Yuda, nansha mu tshimenga, kabayi nabi mu Babilone to." 
Jeremiah27:19 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila udi ne malu a kuamba adi atangila makunji a nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, malongu manene adi pa matempu, ne bintu bikuabu bionsu bidi bishale mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah27:20 (Bualu Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, kavua mubiangate mu Yerushalayime bua kuya nabi ku Babilone, pavuaye mukuate balombodi bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime ne ba mu ditunga dia Yuda, ne Yekonya, muana wa Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda.)" 
Jeremiah27:21 Kadi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: 
Jeremiah27:22 “Biuma bionsu bidi bishale mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, nansha mu nzubu wa mukalenga wa bena Yuda, anyi mu Yerushalayime, nebaye nabi mu Babilone. Nebishale aku too ne diba dindi meme muine musue bua bapingane nabi kuneku.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah28:1 Tshidimu atshi, mu ngondu muitanu wa tshidimu tshinayi tshivua Sedekiya mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda, muambi Ananiya, muana wa Azure, wa mu tshimenga tshia Ngibone, uvua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuambilaye Yirmeya, batuangaji, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu bavua muaba awu, bamuteleja, ne:" 
Jeremiah28:2 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: “Ndi ngumusha mutshi wa bupika udi mukalenga wa Babilone muteke pa makaya enu, nengutshibule." 
Jeremiah28:3 Nkushale amu bidimu bibidi bua meme kupingaja kuneku bintu bia tshijila bionsu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bintu bionsu bivuabu bangatamu, baye nabi mu Babilone kudi mukalenga Nebukadnesare." 
Jeremiah28:4 Nempingaje kabidi mu ditunga diabu Yekonya, muana wa Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, too ne bantu bonsu bavuabu bakuate baye nabu mu Babilone. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba. Eyowa, nentshibule mutshi wa bupika udi mukalenga wa mu Babilone muteke pa makaya enu.”" 
Jeremiah28:5 Kadi muambi Yirmeya kuandamuna muambi Ananiya, batuangaji ne bantu bakuabu bonsu bavua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bamuteleja ne:" 
Jeremiah28:6 — Eyowa, ndi njinga bua Maweja-Nangila enze bu muudi wamba amu, akumbaje biuvua muambe, apingaje bintu bia tshijila bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bidi mu Babilone, ne bantu bonsu badi mu bupika." 
Jeremiah28:7 Kadi teleja bimpe tshindi nnuambila, wewe ne bantu bonsu badi muaba ewu ne:" 
Jeremiah28:8 Nansha wewe, nansha meme, katuyi banji kukuata mudimu wa buambi, kuvua bambi kale. Bambi abu bavua bambila bantu ba mu matunga manene, ne ba mu makalenga manene, malu a Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bapita kumanyisha amu bua mvita, makenga ne disama dia tshiambu." 
Jeremiah28:9 Kadi padi muambi umanyisha bantu ne: nenupete dikasa dimpe, mmunyi mutudi mua kumanya ne: muambi ewu mbamutume menemene kudi Maweja-Nangila? Netumanye amu padi malu adiye wamba akumbana, enzeka." 
Jeremiah28:10 Nanku, muambi Ananiya kuangata mutshi wa kuambula bujitu uvua muambi Yirmeya muambule pa makaya, kuutshibula." 
Jeremiah28:11 Pashishe kuambilaye bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nkushale amu bidimu bibidi bua meme kutshibula amu mushindu ewu mutshi wa bupika udi mukalenga Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone muteke pa makaya a bena bisamba bionsu.” Ke muambi Yirmeya kumuka muaba awu, kuya muaba mukuabu." 
Jeremiah28:12 Muambi Ananiya mumane kutshibula mutshi uvua muambi Yirmeya muambule pa makaya, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah28:13 — Uye kuambila Ananiya ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bu muudi utshibula mutshi wa dibaya nenku, nempingaje mulonda.”" 
Jeremiah28:14 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Ndi nteka mulonda pa makaya a bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu. Nebakuatshile Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone mudimu. Nansha nyama ya muitu mene neitabe ku diyi diende.”" 
Jeremiah28:15 Pashishe, Yirmeya kuambila muambi Ananiya ne: — Ananiya, teleja bimpe. Maweja-Nangila kena mukutume to. Wewe udi usaka bantu aba bua bitabe malu a dishima." 
Jeremiah28:16 Nenku Maweja-Nangila udi ukuambila ne: kuena kabidi ne muaba pa buloba apa to. Neufue tshidimu etshi katshiyi tshianji kujika, bualu udi usaka bantu bua batombokele Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah28:17 Nanku muambi Ananiya kufua tshidimu atshi mu ngondu wa muanda mutekete. 
Jeremiah29:1 Tshidimu atshi, muambi Yirmeya uvua mu Yerushalayime. Nanku bakulu ba mu meku, batuangaji, bambi, ne bantu bonsu bavua Nebukadnesare mukuate mu Yerushalayime bua kuya nabu mu Babilone, muambi kubatumina mukanda." 
Jeremiah29:2 (Mukanda awu Yirmeya uvua muutume pavuabu bamane kumuka mu Yerushalayime baye mu bupika kudi mukalenga Yekonya, mamuende mukalenga mukaji, balombodi ba mu bukalenga, bamfumu ba Yuda ne ba mu Yerushalayime, bansenda ne bena midimu ya biamu.)" 
Jeremiah29:3 Nanku Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, uvua mutume Elasha, muana wa Shafane, ne Ngemariya, muana wa Ilkiya, mu Babilone kudi mukalenga Nebukadnesare. Yirmeya kubapesha mukanda wende. Mu mukanda amu bavua bafundemu ne:" 
Jeremiah29:4 “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wambila bantu bonsu bavuaye mumushe mu Yerushalayime, mutume mu bupika mu Babilone ne:" 
Jeremiah29:5 Asayi nzubu. Nusombemu. Nudime, numiamine bintu mu madimi enu. Nudie binudi nunowamu." 
Jeremiah29:6 Nuselangane. Nulele balume, nulele bakaji. Nuseleshe balume, nuseleshe bakaji, balelangane pabu. Kuine aku nuvulangane! Kanukepedi to!" 
Jeremiah29:7 Nuambuluishe tshimenga tshindi munutume ku bupika, tshipete bubanji. Nutshilombele kundi. Bualu, tshiotshi tshikale ne diakalenga, nenuikale nadi ne nuenu kabidi." 
Jeremiah29:8 “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba kabidi ne: Kanuitabi malu a dishima adi bambi ba munkatshi muenu bamba, nansha malu adibu banuambila kudi bantu bua matuku atshidi kumpala. Kanuitabi badi banumvuija ndota yenu." 
Jeremiah29:9 Bualu badi banuambila ne: tudi tunumanyisha malu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kadi badi banudinga. Meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena mubatume to. 
Jeremiah29:10 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi mpindiewu ne: Bukalenga bua bena Babilone nebushale kabidi bidimu makumi muanda mutekete. Diba adi nennusungidile. Nenkumbaje malu mimpe amvua munulaye. Nennupingaje mu Yerushalayime. 
Jeremiah29:11 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mumanye meji andi nnuelela. Ndi nnujadikila ne: tshiena ne muoyi wa kunukengesha nansha, kadi amu bua kunufikisha ku diakalenga. Nennukumbajile malu anudi batekemene." 
Jeremiah29:12 Diba adi, nuenu bambikile, bantendelele, meme Maweja-Nangila nennuteleje." 
Jeremiah29:13 Nuenu bankebe ne muoyi wenu mujima, nenumpete, nennupingaje muenu." 
Jeremiah29:14 Nennumushe mu bisamba bionsu ne miaba yonsu imvua munutangalaje. Nennusangishe, nnupingaje muaba ewu umvua munukuatshishe bua kunutuma mu bupika. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah29:15 “Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila bionsu ebi, bualu nudi nuamba ne: Maweja-Nangila mmututumine tuetu bambi mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah29:16 “Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila nnumanyisha bua bidi bitangila mukalenga udi mupiane bukalenga bua Davide, ne bantu bonsu batshidi basombe mu Yerushalayime — ndi ntela bana benu bavua kabayi baye nenu mu bupika. —" 
Jeremiah29:17 Ke malu adi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu unumanyisha bualu buabu ne: Ndi mbatumina mvita, tshiyole tshia nzala, ne disama dia tshiambu. Nebikale bu bimuma bibole bia mutshi wa mfiku, bidibu kabayi mua kudia." 
Jeremiah29:18 Nembalondakaje ne mvita, ne tshiyole tshia nzala, kabidi ne disama dia tshiambu. Nanku bena mu makalenga onsu a pa buloba nebakuatshike bonsu bowa. Nebabatangile bu bantu badibu bela mulawu. Bantu nebabaseke, bikale batela dina diabu bua kuditshipa nadi." 
Jeremiah29:19 Bushuwa Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: kabavua bateleja bimvua mubambile. Meme kubatumina misangu yonsu bantu banyi bambi, bobu nansha kubateleja to." 
Jeremiah29:20 “Kadi nuenu bavua Maweja-Nangila mumushe mu Yerushalayime, mutume mu bupika mu Babilone, nuteleje tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba!" 
Jeremiah29:21 “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba malu adi atangila Akaba, muana wa Kolaya, ne Sedekiya, muana wa Masheya. Bonsu babidi badi bambi bena dishima. Nansha bobu bambila bantu ne: tudi tuakula mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, badi babadinga. Nembafile kudi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Neabashipe nuenu batangile." 
Jeremiah29:22 Bantu bonsu ba mu Yuda bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika mu Babilone, nebele bantu mulawu, batele mena abidi aa, bamba ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila akunyoke nuwuaye munyoke Sedekiya ne Akaba. Mukalenga wa Babilone, mmuboshishe mu kapia batshikale ne muoyi!’" 
Jeremiah29:23 Malu awu avua mabenzekele, bualu bavua benza malu mabi mu Izrayele andi mbenga. Bavua benza malu a bundu, bambila bantu malu mu dina dianyi, meme tshiyi mubatume. Kadi meme ndi mumanye malu onsu awu. Mvua muamone ne mesu anyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Jeremiah29:24 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, kutuma muambi Yirmeya bua kuambila bantu malu adi atangila Shemaya wa mu Nekelame. Bualu Shemaya uvua mutumine mutuangaji Sefanya, muana wa Masheya, kabidi ne batuangaji bakuabu, kabidi ne bantu bakuabu bavua mu Yerushalayime mukanda. Shemaya uvua mufundile Sefanya ne:" 
Jeremiah29:25  
Jeremiah29:26 “Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila mukuteke bua kupingana Yoyada, utangile ne disu dikole bantu badi babuele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu! Nanku bantu batshimbakane badi badiamba ne: tudi bambi, ubele mu tshikunyi, ne nkanu mu nshingu." 
Jeremiah29:27 Kadi mmunyi muudi kuyi muanji kunyoka Yirmeya muena mu Anatote, udi unuambila ne: ndi muambi." 
Jeremiah29:28 Ku tshilema tshiebe, Yirmeya uvua mua kututumina mukanda kunu, mu Babilone, bua kutuambila ne: nenushale matuku mavule mu bupika. Uvua mutufundile kabidi ne: nuase nzubu, nusombe, nudime, nudie binudi nunowa.”" 
Jeremiah29:29 Kadi mutuangaji Sefanya kubadila Yirmeya mukanda awu. 
Jeremiah29:30 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kutumina Yirmeya diyi ne:" 
Jeremiah29:31 — Utumine bantu badi mu bupika mukanda ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Shemaya udi udiamba ne: ndi muambi. Kadi tshiena mumumanyishe bualu nansha bumue bua yeye kunuambila. Bu mudiye munusake bua nuenu kuitaba malu a dishima," 
Jeremiah29:32 meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nshindika ne: nenshipe Shemaya ne ndelanganyi yende yonsu. Muntu nansha umue wa ku diku diende kena ushala ne muoyi munkatshi muenu bua kumona malu mimpe angenzela bantu banyi. Bualu Shemaya mmusake bantu banyi bua bantombokele. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.” 
Jeremiah30:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne: 
Jeremiah30:2 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, mpindiewu ndi nkuambila ne: Ufunde bimpe malu anyi onsu amvua mukumanyishe." 
Jeremiah30:3 Bualu ndi nkuambila ne: dituku nedifike, dingapikula bantu banyi bena Izrayele mu bupika, kabidi ne bena Yuda. Nembapingaje mu ditunga dimvua mupeshe bankambua babu. Nebasombemu tshiakabidi. Ke tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba." 
Jeremiah30:4 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya bua kumanyishaye bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda kabidi ne: Ndi ngunwua bantu bela mbila ne bowa. Badi bazakala, kabayi bikisha." 
Jeremiah30:5  
Jeremiah30:6 Kadi ebejanganayi ne: nukadi bamone muntu mulume muimite difu mulela muana anyi? Kadi mmunyi mundi mmona bantu balume bonsu, bianza mu tshimonu bu mukaji ukenga pa kulela. Badi batokoloka mpala bu bafue." 
Jeremiah30:7 Dituku dia dikenga didi dienda disemena pabuipi. Kakuena dikuabu bu diodi. Makenga neikale miaba yonsu munkatshi mua ndelanganyi ya Yakobe. Kadi nebashale ne muoyi! 
Jeremiah30:8 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Pafika matuku awu, nentshibule mutshi wa bupika udi pa makaya abu. Nenkose mionji yabu. Nanku kabakuikala kabidi bapika ba bantu bakuabu to." 
Jeremiah30:9 Kadi nebankuatshile mudimu meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Nenku nempingaje mu bukalenga bua Davide muana wa ku ndelanganyi yende. Nebamuenzele mudimu, bualu mmukalenga wabu." 
Jeremiah30:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bena Izrayele nudi bantu banyi, kanutshinyi to. Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, kanuzakadi to. Bualu nennusungidile, nnumushe ku matunga adi kule. Nensungidile bana banudi balele badi mu matunga a bende, muvuabu baye nenu mu bupika. Bena Izrayele, nenupingane kuenu, nenusombe talalaa. Kabakunutatshisha kabidi to." 
Jeremiah30:11 Ndi mufike bua kunusungidila. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku. Ndi musue kubutula matunga onsu, miaba yonsu imvua munutangalaje. Kadi tshiena imubutula nuenu to. Bushuwa, ndi amu ne bua kununyoka. Tshiena mua kunutangila bu bantu badi kabayi ne bualu." 
Jeremiah30:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila Yerushalayime ne: mbakutape bibi! Mputa yebe kabena mua kuyondapa nansha. 
Jeremiah30:13 Kakuena muntu udi mua kukuambuluisha. Bantu batu bondapa mputa. Kadi kakuena buanga bua kuondapa webe. 
Jeremiah30:14 Nansha bantu bavua bakunanga, kabena bakuvuluka kabidi to! Kakuena muntu udi ukufuila luse to. Bualu ndi mukunyoke, mudileje bu muluishi webe. Ndi mukutuute bibi." 
Jeremiah30:15 Udi udila bua makenga audi nawu, bua mputa ivuabu bakutapa bua tshinyi? Ndi mukunyoke nanku, bualu bubi buebe mbunene, mibi yebe nya bungi." 
Jeremiah30:16 Kadi bonsu badi bakudia, nebabadie bobu kabidi. Bonsu badi bakupetula, nebaye bobu kabidi mu bupika. Bonsu badi bakunyenga bintu, nembanyenge bobu kabidi bintu. Badi bapawula bintu biebe, nebapawule bintu biabu kabidi." 
Jeremiah30:17 Bonsu mbakutangile bu “tshintu tshia patupu.” Badi bamba ne: “Mukuna ewu wa Siyone, bonsu mbalengulule.” Kadi meme nengondape, nengumishe mputa yebe. Ke mundi ngamba meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah30:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Bena meku a Izrayele, nennupingaje mu ditunga dienu! Nemfuile meku enu onsu luse. Nenuasulule bimenga bienu, nenuibakulule nzubu yenu milenga miaba yayi ya kale." 
Jeremiah30:19 Bantu badi basombamu nebimbe misambu, nebele mbila ya disanka. Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe nemwulangane. Kanuakukepela kabidi to. Bonsu nebanunemeke." 
Jeremiah30:20 Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, nenuikale bu munuvua kale. Nennusombeshe talalaa mu ditunga dienu. Nembutule baluishi benu bonsu." 
Jeremiah30:21 Mfumu wenu neikale muntu wa mu tshisamba tshienu. Eyowa, muntu wa munkatshi muenu neanulombole. Nengitabe bua asemene pabuipi nanyi. Bualu, muntu udi mua kufika kundi, meme tshiyi mumubikile anyi? Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Jeremiah30:22 Nuenu nenuikale tshiakabidi bantu banyi. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. 
Jeremiah30:23 Tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila tshidi bu mvunde, tshidi tshituuta bena tshibawu bu tshipepele tshikole." 
Jeremiah30:24 Tshiji tshikole tshia Maweja-Nangila, katshiena tshijika, kayi muanji kuenza bionsu bivuaye muambe. Dituku dikuabu nenujingulule mudi Maweja-Nangila wenza nanku." 
Jeremiah31:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Pakumbana tshikondu, nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wa meku onsu a bena Izrayele. Bobu nebikale bantu banyi.”" 
Jeremiah31:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Meme ndi mfuila bantu banyi luse. Nensangishe mu tshipele bonsu bavua muele kauyi mushipe. Nanku bena Izrayele nebapingane kuabu, basombe mu bupole." 
Jeremiah31:3 Bantu banyi bavua bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmutumuenekele mufume kule!” Ke meme kubambila ne: “Ndi mununange tshiendelele. Ke pandi nnulamata kashidi. 
Jeremiah31:4 Izrayele wanyi munanga, ndi nkujula tshiakabidi, ndi ngasulula tshimenga tshiebe. Bantu nebimbe ngoma. Nebaje maja, basanka." 
Jeremiah31:5 Nenukune kabidi mionji ya mvinyo pa mikuna ya mu Samariya. Nuenu babidime nenupole tumuma tua mvinyo mu madimi enu. 
Jeremiah31:6 Dituku adi batentekedi nebele mbila pa mikuna ya Efrayime bamba ne: ‘Tuyayi ku mukuna wa Siyone kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu!’ ” 
Jeremiah31:7 Elayi mbila ya disanka, nusankidile Izrayele, bualu ke tshisamba tshidi tshipite bisamba bikuabu. Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu, nuambile bantu bonsu ne: “Maweja-Nangila mmusungidile bantu bende, mumpikule bena Izrayele bonsu bavua bashale ne muoyi!” Telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne:" 
Jeremiah31:8 Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mbasangisha ku matunga a ku mutu. Ndi mbakunguja ku ntengu ne ntengu ya buloba. Bantu bonsu nebikaleku: bampofu, ne badi batebuka, bakaji badi ne mafu, ne bakadi balele. Bantu banyi bonsu nebapingane tshisumbu tshinene." 
Jeremiah31:9 Badi bapingana badila muadi, kadi meme ndi ngenda nabu, mbasamba. Nembafile ku misulu idi ne mayi mavule. Ndi mbafile mu njila muimpe, udi kayi ne biniina, bua kabayi kudishinda. Bualu meme ndi tatu wa bena Izrayele. Efrayime ke muananyi muanabute." 
Jeremiah31:10 Nuenu bisamba bikuabu, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba. Numanyishe bantu too ne ba mu bidiila bidi kule ne: “Maweja-Nangila uvua mutangalaje bena Izrayele. Kadi mpindiewu udi mubakunguje. Udi ubakuba mudi mulami wa mikoku ukuba mikoku yende.”" 
Jeremiah31:11 Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmupikule bena Izrayele, mubapatule mu bianza bia muluishi wabu, uvua mubapite bukole." 
Jeremiah31:12 Nebafike pa mukuna wa Siyone, bela mbila ya disanka. Nebaleje mpala wa disanka, pamonabu bionsu bidibu bapeta kudi Maweja-Nangila: ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu mapiamapia, mafuta mimpe, mikoku, mbuji ne ngombe. Nebikale bu budimi budi ne mayi ntavule. Nebapete bionsu bidibu nabi dikenga." 
Jeremiah31:13 Nanku, bansongakaji nebaje maja a disanka. Nansha bansongalume mene, ne bakulumpe nebasanke. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nenkudimune kanyinganyinga kabu, kandamuke disanka. Nembasambe, ngumusha ntatu buabu nayi. Nembuwuje ne disanka." 
Jeremiah31:14 Nempeshe batuangaji munyinyi muimpe wa nyama ya mafuta ya milambu. Nenkumbaje majinga onsu adi bantu banyi nawu. 
Jeremiah31:15 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Umvuayi mudibu badila muadi mu Rama, bela miyenga mikole. Rakele ke udi udila bana bende. Kena musue bua bantu bamusambe, bualu mmujimije bana bende." 
Jeremiah31:16 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi umuambila ne: Lekela muadi, kupula binsonji biebe, bualu nenkufute bua bionsu biuvua wenzela bana bebe. Ke meme Maweja-Nangila udi wamba nanku! Bana bebe nebumuke kudi baluishi, kudi bena lukuna babu, bua kupingana kuabu." 
Jeremiah31:17 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Kutekeshi mu maboku to. Bana bebe nebapingane mu ditunga. 
Jeremiah31:18 Mvua mumvue bena Efrayime badila muadi, bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, udi mutunyoke bikole, mudibu banyoka muana wa nyama wa ngombe wa balume, udibu kabayi banji kutekesha bimpe. Kadi mpindiewu utupingaje kuudi, bua tupingane kuudi bulelela, bualu wewe Maweja-Nangila ke udi Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Jeremiah31:19 Eyowa, tuvua bakubenge, kadi mpindiewu tudi tunyingalala, bua bubi butuvua benza. Udi mutuleje mutuvua benza bibi. Nanku mpindiewu tudi tudituuta bianza pa tshiadi tudila. Tudi ne bundu, tudi ne kanyinganyinga, bua tshionsu tshituvua benze patutshivua bansonga.”" 
Jeremiah31:20 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Efrayime ke muananyi musuibue, ke muana undi mupite kunanga. Misangu yonsu indi ntela dina diende, ndi mmuvuluka tshiyi mua kumupua muoyi. Ndi mumunange bikole, tshiena ne mushindu wa kubenga kumufuila luse." 
Jeremiah31:21 Mu njila, wasa mitshi idi mua kukuvuluija njila, uudi ne bua kulonda. Nanku, Izrayele musuibue, neumone mua kupingana mu bimenga biebe." 
Jeremiah31:22 Nsongakaji mutomboke, newindile too ne ku tshikondu kayi, bua wewe kupingana? Bualu Maweja-Nangila mmupatule bualu bupiabupia pa buloba ne: ke mukaji udi uya kukeba mulume." 
Jeremiah31:23 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Pangapingaja bantu mu ditunga diabu ne mu bimenga bia Yuda, nebambe tshiakabidi ne: “Maweja-Nangila akuele lupemba, wewe mukuna wa tshijila wa Siyone, muaba udiye usomba!”" 
Jeremiah31:24 Nanku bantu nebasombe mu bimenga, nebasombe mu ditunga. Bakuabu nebasombe mu mpata, badima. Balami ba mikoku bobu kabidi nebendakane mu mpata ne bisumbu biabu bia mikoku." 
Jeremiah31:25 Bualu badi bapungila ne nyota, nembapeshe mayi a kunua, badi batekete ne nzala, nembadishe." 
Jeremiah31:26 (Ke mudibu bamba ne: “Ke meme kujuka ku tulu kudiunwua ne bukole bua mubidi. ”) 
Jeremiah31:27 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Dituku adi, nenguwuje Bukalenga bua Izrayele ne bua Yuda ne bantu, kabidi ne nyama, mudibu bamiamina ntete mu budimi." 
Jeremiah31:28 Bu mumvua mukuate mudimu bua kujula, kushimbula, kupula, kunyanga, kuela panshi, ke mundi nkuata mudimu mpindiewu bua kuibaka ne kukuna. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba." 
Jeremiah31:29 Nanku, muntu nansha umue kakuela lusumuinu lua ne: “Bavua badie tumuma tua mvinyo tua buanji mbaledi, kadi bana kumvua buanji ku menu. ”" 
Jeremiah31:30 Bushuwa, anu muntu udi udia tumuma tua mvinyo tubishi ke udi buanji bubuela ku menu. Nanku, muntu yonsu neafue anu bua bilema biende." 
Jeremiah31:31 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nkadi pa kutua ndondu mupiamupia ne bena mu bukalenga bua Izrayele, kabidi ne bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda." 
Jeremiah31:32 Kayakuikala bu ndondu imvua mutue ne bankambua babu, pa-mvua mubakuate ku tshianza bua kubapatula mu Ejipitu. Bualu ndondu ayi bavua bayinyanga! Eku meme mvua mfumu wabu." 
Jeremiah31:33 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndondu indi ntua ne bena Izrayele neikale nenku: Nemfunde mikenji yanyi mu muoyi wabu wa munda. Tshiena nyifunde kabidi pa mabue to. Nenyifunde munda muabu. Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bobu nebikale bantu banyi." 
Jeremiah31:34 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: muntu nansha umue kakulomba balunda bende, nansha bana babu, bua bamulongeshe bua ammanye. Bualu bonsu, bakulumpe ne bana, nebammanye. Nembafuile luse bua mibi yabu. Tshiakuvuluka kabidi bilema biabu." 
Jeremiah31:35 Udi ubandisha diba bua munya kutemawu nnganyi? Udi utumina ngondu ne mitotu diyi bua bitokeshe buloba butuku nnganyi? Udi uvuandulula mayi manene bua enze mutoyi nnganyi? Amu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ke dina diende. Yeye mene udi wamba ne:" 
Jeremiah31:36 — Bu mundi muitabe bua bintu bionsu abi biende bimpe kashidi, ke mundi muitabe kabidi bua bena Izrayele bashale bantu banyi kashidi." 
Jeremiah31:37 Pikala muntu ne bukole bua kupima butumbuke bua diulu, pikalaye ne bukole bua kubuela mu kandondu ka buloba, diba adi, nembenge bena Izrayele bonsu, bua malu mabi avuabu benze. Ke malu adi Maweja-Nangila unumanyisha." 
Jeremiah31:38 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Matuku makese aa, nebasulule bimana bia tshimenga tshianyi tshia Yerushalayime, kutuadija ku kaleya ka Ananeyele too ne ku tshiibi tshia mu Ditumba." 
Jeremiah31:39 Nebateke mikalu mipiamipia ku tshimenga. Neyituadije luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ilonda mukuna wa Ngarebe, ifika too ne Ngowa." 
Jeremiah31:40 “Tshibandabanda tshijima, muaba udibu bajika bitalu, udibu bela butu bua milambu, netshikale tshianyi meme. Mpata yonsu too ne ku Kedrone, musulu wa muenji mukole, too ne ditunga dia ku tshiibi tshia Nyama ya tubalu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, neyikale yanyi meme. Kabena mua kunyenga, kabena mua kubutula kabidi tshimenga to." 
Jeremiah32:1 Pavua Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda mukumbaje tshidimu tshiende tshia dikumi mu bukalenga, mmomumue ne: pakavua Nebukadnesare mukalenga wa mu Babilone mumane kukumbaja tshidimu tshiende tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu mu bukalenga, Maweja-Nangila kuleja Yirmeya tshivuaye ne bua kuenza." 
Jeremiah32:2 Tshikondu atshi, bena mvita ba mu bena Babilone bavua baluisha Yerushalayime. Muambi Yirmeya uvua mu nzubu wa lukanu mu lubanza lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga wa bena Yuda." 
Jeremiah32:3 Sedekiya uvua mumuelemu bualu uvua mufike munda bua muaku uvua Yirmeya muakule mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila ne: “Nemfile Yerushalayime mu bianza bia mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Yeye neakuate tshimenga. 
Jeremiah32:4 Nansha Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kakunyema bena Babilone to. Bualu ndi musue kumufila kudi mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Nebamonangane ne Nebukadnesare mpala ne mpala. Neikale ne tshilumbu tshia kuandamuna ku nkonku idibu bamuela." 
Jeremiah32:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Pashishe nebaye ne Sedekiya mu Babilone. Neashalemu too ne ku lufu luende. Nansha nuenu batungunuke ne mvita, nuluisha bena Babilone, kanuakubatshimuna to.”" 
Jeremiah32:6 Yirmeya uvua wamba ne: Meme kumvua Maweja-Nangila ungambila ne: 
Jeremiah32:7 — Anameyele, muana wa Shalume, tatuebe mukuabu, neafike kuudi bua usumbe budimi buende budi mu Anatote. Bualu wewe udi muanabu menemene. Nanku wewe ke muntu wa kumpala udi mua kubupikula." 
Jeremiah32:8 Bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile, Anameyele, muana wa tatu mukuabu, kufikaye kundi mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga. Kungambilaye ne: — Wewe udi ne bua kusumba budimi bundi nabu ku Anatote, mu buloba bua bena Binyamine. Bualu wewe udi muanetu menemene. Wewe ke wa kumpala udi mua kubuangata, kubupikula bua buikale buebe. Ke meme kujadika ne: Maweja-Nangila ke uvua mungambile malu." 
Jeremiah32:9 Nanku, meme Yirmeya kusumba budimi bua Anameyele buvua ku Anatote, kufuta nkanu dikumi ne muanda mutekete ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Jeremiah32:10 Meme kufunda mikanda ibidi ya disumba, kukanga mukanda umue, kutua tshitampi tshianyi, bantu bajadike. Meme kupima kabidi bujitu bua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole." 
Jeremiah32:11 Pashishe meme kuangata mukanda uvuabu bakanga ne tshitampi, mudi mikenji yambe, kuangata kabidi mukanda mukuabu uvuabu kabayi bakange." 
Jeremiah32:12 Meme kupesha Baruke, muana wa Neriya, ne muikulu wa Masheya, mikanda yonsu ibidi. Anameyele, muana wa tatu mukuabu, ne bantu bakuabu bavua batua tshiala ku mikanda ya disumba, bavua muaba awu, kabidi ne bena Yuda bakuabu bonsu bavua mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga." 
Jeremiah32:13 Ke meme kuambila Baruke, bantu bakuabu bonsu bateleje, ne:" 
Jeremiah32:14 — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi utuma diyi ne: angata mukanda wa disumba dia budimi uvuabu batue tshitampi, ne mukuabu uvuabu kabayi bakanga, uyiteku mu mulondu wa diima, bua tumone mua kuyilama bidimu bivule." 
Jeremiah32:15 Bualu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: “Mu ditunga edi, dituku dikuabu nebasumbe kabidi nzubu, madimi, kabidi ne madimi a mvinyo.”" 
Jeremiah32:16 Meme mumane kufila mukanda wa disumba budimi kudi Baruke, ke meme kutendelela Maweja-Nangila ngamba ne:" 
Jeremiah32:17 — Eyi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, uvua muleje bukole buebe ne meji ebe, pauvua mufuke diulu ne buloba. Wewe udi mua kuenza bionsu biudi musue." 
Jeremiah32:18 Udi unanga bantu too ne ku ndelanganyi yabu tshinunu. Kadi padi baledi benza tshilema, udi unyoka ne bana babu mene. Udi Mvidi Mukulu munene ne wa bukole. Dina diebe mMvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Jeremiah32:19 Udi wela meji ku malu manene audi musue kuenza. Kabidi udi ne bukole bua kuakumbaja. Udi utangila bimpe malu adi bantu benza. Udi ufuta muntu yonsu bilondeshile bidiye wenza. 
Jeremiah32:20 Uvua muleje bantu bukole buudi nabu pa kuenza malu a dikema. Matuku avua bankambua betu mu Ejipitu, nansha lelu kabidi, kuena wenzela bena Izrayele nkayabu malu a dikema, udi wenzela kabidi bantu ba pa buloba bujima. Ke tshitudi tumona ne lelu." 
Jeremiah32:21 Udi muleje bukole buebe ne meji ebe, paudi muenze malu a dikema adi akuatshisha bowa, paudi mupatule bantu bebe bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu." 
Jeremiah32:22 Uvua mulaye bankambua betu, muditshipe ne: nennupeshe ditunga. Ke muaba utudi tusomba lelu. Ditunga edi didi ne mabela ne buitshi, wewe kubapeshadi." 
Jeremiah32:23 Bushuwa, bavua bangata ditunga edi. Kadi kabavua bateleja tshiuvua wamba. Kabavua balonda mikenji yebe. Kabavua benza tshiuvua mubatumine diyi. Ke muuvua mutume makenga onsu aa atudi tumona lelu." 
Jeremiah32:24 Bena Babilone badi basemena pabuipi ne tshimenga bua kutshiluisha. Nebatshikuate. Tudi mua kuamba ne: tshikadi mu bianza biabu. Badi bakeba kutshikuata ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ne ku disama dia tshiambu. Bionsu biuvua muambe mbimane kuenzeka, wewe mene udi mua kubijadika." 
Jeremiah32:25 Eyowa, tshimenga tshikadi pa kuya ku bianza bia bena Babilone. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mungambe bua meme kusumba buloba ebu, kufuta mushinga wabu diakamue bua tshinyi?" 
Jeremiah32:26 Ke Maweja-Nangila kungandamuna ne: 
Jeremiah32:27 — Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bantu bonsu badi pa buloba, ndi mua kuenza bionsu bindi musue." 
Jeremiah32:28 Nanku, ndi ngamba ne: Nemfile tshimenga etshi kudi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, ne kudi bena mvita bende. Yeye neatshikuate." 
Jeremiah32:29 Bena Babilone badi batshiluisha mpindiewu, nebabuelemu. Nebatshinyenge, batshioshe. Neboshe nangananga nzubu eyi ivuabu bampendele pa kuosha musenga wa kamonya bua kutendelela Baale, ne pa kulambula milambu ya maluvu bua kutendelela mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Jeremiah32:30 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: biangatshile ku ntuadijilu, bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda bavua benze malu andi mubenge. Eyowa, bionsu bivua bena Izrayele benza bivua anu bitufikisha munda." 
Jeremiah32:31 Tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime etshi katshia batshibaka, tshivua amu tshimfikisha munda, tshingenza tshiji, too ne lelu. Nanku, tshiena musue kutshimona kabidi ne mesu to."
