Jeremiah32:32 Ndi musue kutshibutula bua malu mabi avua bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda benza, ne avuabu benza kabidi kudi bakalenga babu, kudi bamfumu babu, kudi batuangaji babu, kudi bambi babu, kudi bantu ba mu ditunga dia Yuda ne ba mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah32:33 Pa mutu pa kupingana kundi meme, badi amu bambenga. Eku meme mvua mbabela amu kubabela. Kadi muntu nansha umue kena muitabe, ki mmuteleje mene mibelu yanyi." 
Jeremiah32:34 Kabidi bavua bateke mpingu yabu indi mbenga mu nzubu udi munjidila. Ke muvuabu bamunyanga ne mikiya. 
Jeremiah32:35 Bavua bateka mu tshibanda tshia Inome miaba ya kutendelela mvidie Baale, bua kulambulamu mvidie Moleke bana ba balume ne ba bakaji. Meme tshivua mubalombe bua benza nanku to. Tshivua nansha muele meji ku bualu bua nanku to. Kadi pa kuenza malu mabi aa, bavua basaka bena Yuda bua benze pabu malu andi mubenge." 
Jeremiah32:36 Kadi nansha biobi bikale nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi ne bualu bua kuamba kabidi bua bidi bitangila tshimenga etshi. Wewe ne bantu bakuabu nudi nuamba ne: “Mvita, tshiyole tshia nzala, ne disama dia tshiambu, bivua bifila tshimenga etshi mu bianza bia mukalenga Nebukadnesare.”" 
Jeremiah32:37 Bushuwa, mvua mufike munda, munyingalale ne tshiji tshikole bua bantu ba mu tshimenga etshi. Ke mumvua mubatangalaje mu matunga mashilangane. Kadi nembakunguje, nembapingaje munemu. Nembasombeshe mu ditalala." 
Jeremiah32:38 Nebikale tshiakabidi bantu banyi. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu. 
Jeremiah32:39 Nembape muoyi umue, bua bandamate, bua bapete diakalenga, bobu ne ndelanganyi yabu." 
Jeremiah32:40 Ndi ndaya ne: tshiena musue kubabenga kabidi to. Nanku nentue nabu ndondu wa kashidi. Nenbambuluishe bua bannemeke, bua kabalamuki kabidi kundi." 
Jeremiah32:41 Nengikale ne disanka dia kubenzela malu mimpe. Nengenze muanyi muonsu bua basombe kashidi mu ditunga edi. 
Jeremiah32:42 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: Meme ke uvua mutume dikenga dinene edi divua dikuate bena Yuda. Meme kabidi ke wabatumina disanka dionsu dimvua mubalaye. 
Jeremiah32:43 Wewe ne bantu bakuabu nudi nuamba ne: ditunga edi bena Babilone nebadikuate, dishale tshipela, kamuyi bantu nansha nyama. Kadi mu ditunga edi ke muatuadijabu kabidi kusumba madimi." 
Jeremiah32:44 Eyowa, mu buloba bua Binyamine, bu buloba bua Yerushalayime, mu bimenga bia Yuda, mu bimenga bidi pa mikuna bidi mu bibandabanda, bidi mu Negebe, nebasumbe kabidi madimi, nebafunde mikanda ya disumba, nebatue tshitampi, nebabikile bantu bua bajadike bualu. Bualu nempingaje bantu mu ditunga diabu. Ke meme Maweja-Nangila udi wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah33:1 Muambi Yirmeya utshivua mu lukanu mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga. Maweja-Nangila kumumanyisha kabidi ne: 
Jeremiah33:2 — Meme Maweja-Nangila, mufuki wa buloba, udi mubufumbe, mubulame kabidi, ndi ngamba ne:" 
Jeremiah33:3 Umbikile meme, nenkuandamune. Nenkujinguluile malu manene masokoka audi kuyi mumanye to." 
Jeremiah33:4 Meme Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi ne bualu bua kuamba, budi butangila nzubu idi mu tshimenga etshi, ne nzubu ya bakalenga ba bena Yuda. Nebayibutule. Kanuena mua kuluisha bena Babilone badi bakeba mua kukuata tshimenga to. Nuenu babaluishe, ndi nguwuje tshimenga tente ne bitalu bia bantu bandi nshipa, bua tshiji tshianyi tshikole tshindi natshi. Bena mu Yerushalayime bavua benza malu mabi a bungi. Ke mundi tshiyi kabidi bualu ne tshimenga etshi." 
Jeremiah33:5  
Jeremiah33:6 Kadi, ndi ngondapa tshimenga etshi, mudibu bondapa muntu ne mputa. Nentshiondape, ntshipesha bukole bua mubidi. Nemfile bupole ne ditalala kudi bantu batshi." 
Jeremiah33:7 Nensankishe bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele. Nembapingajile diakalenga divuabu nadi kale. 
Jeremiah33:8 Netubambile bonsu ne: tshiena mvuluka bilema bionsu binuvua bangenzele. Nansha nuenu bantombokele, ndi nnufuila luse." 
Jeremiah33:9 Nanku, nengikale ne disanka pa kutela dina dia Yerushalayime. Tshimenga etshi nentshikebele lumu ne butumbi kudi bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba. Padi bantu bajingulula malu mimpe amvua muenzele Yerushalayime, nebazakale. Nebakanke pamonabu diakalenga ne disanka bimvua mupeshe bena tshimenga etshi." 
Jeremiah33:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bena Yuda, nudi nuamba misangu yonsu ne: ditunga edi didi dinyanguke. Kanuena mua kumonamu muntu nansha nyama. Bulelela, bimenga bia mu ditunga dia Yuda, ne misesu ya mu Yerushalayime, bidi lelu munda mutupu. Kanuena mua kumona muntu nansha nyama. Kadi mu ditunga edi nebumvue kabidi" 
Jeremiah33:11 misambu ne mbila ya disanka. Nebumvue kabidi meyi a bantu batshidi babuela mu dibaka. Nebumvue kabidi bantu bimbe musambu ewu ne: Tumbishayi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, bualu udi mulenga. Dinanga diende ndia kashidi. Nebumvue kabidi musambu wa bantu badi baya ne milambu yabu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bushuwa, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: nempingajile ditunga edi lumu luadi lua kale." 
Jeremiah33:12 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba kabidi ne: Mu ditunga edi didi dinyanguke, kamuyi muntu nansha nyama, mu bimenga biadi bionsu nemuikale kabidi balami ba mikoku, badi bakuba mbuji yabu ne mikoku butuku." 
Jeremiah33:13 Mu bimenga bia pa mikuna, ne bia mu bibandabanda, mu bimenga bia mu Negebe, mu buloba bua Binyamine, ne mu bimenga bia Yuda, mbuji ne mikoku neyipitemu bungi. Mulami wayi neayilombole, ayibale. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba." 
Jeremiah33:14 — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Nengenze lukasa bimvua mulaye bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda. 
Jeremiah33:15 Pakumbana tshikondu, nembikile muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide menemene. Neakose nsambu ya bantu ba mu ditunga amu pa yoyi. Neenze tshindi meme musue." 
Jeremiah33:16 Nenku bukalenga bua Yuda kabuakuikala kabidi mu bianza bia baluishi babu nansha. Bena Yerushalayime nebasombe talalaa. Nanku, nebinyike Yerushalayime ne: “Maweja-Nangila ke udi utusungidila. ”" 
Jeremiah33:17 Telejayi bualu bukuabu budi Maweja-Nangila utumanyisha: Muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya mukalenga Davide neashale kashidi mu bukalenga bua Izrayele. 
Jeremiah33:18 Kabidi bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya bena Levi nebashale kashidi batuangaji badi bangenzela mudimu, bandambula milambu yakuosha, ya bia pa madimi, ne ya ditua ndondu." 
Jeremiah33:19 Maweja-Nangila kukonka kabidi Yirmeya ne: 
Jeremiah33:20 — Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkuebejane: Wewe udi mua kushipa mikenji indi muele bua munya ne butuku, kubikandika bua kabilondianganyi mudibi ne bua kuenzeka anyi? Nansha kakese! Kuena mua kuenza nanku to." 
Jeremiah33:21 Nanku dilaya dianyi dimvua mulaye muntu wanyi Davide kadiena mua kufua to. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kukandika, bua muntu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide kikadi mukalenga wa Yerushalayime to, nansha bua bantu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Levi kabikadi bantu badi bengenzela mudimu." 
Jeremiah33:22 Nemvudije ndelanganyi ya muntu wanyi Davide ne ndelanganyi ya Levi, badi bangenzela mudimu wa butuangaji. Nebikale bavule bu mitotu ya mulu idibu kabayi mua kubala, nansha bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene ludi bantu kabayi mua kubala." 
Jeremiah33:23 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Yirmeya ne: 
Jeremiah33:24 — Kuena mumvue mudi bantu bamba anyi? Badi bamba ne: ndi mubenge bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda, meku abidi andi musungule! Badi bamba nenku badi bapepeja bantu banyi. Kabena nansha babatangila bu tshisamba to." 
Jeremiah33:25 Kadi ndi ngamba ne: “Ndi mutue ndondu ne munya, kabidi ne butuku. Ndi muele meyi ne mikandu bidi bitombola diulu ne buloba." 
Jeremiah33:26 Nanku, nudi mua kuitaba ne: ndi mubenge ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ne ya muntu wanyi Davide anyi? Nudi mua kuitaba ne: munkatshi muabu tshiakuangata kabidi bamfumu badi balombola tshisamba tshia Abrahame, tshia Izake ne tshia Yakobe anyi? “Kabiena nanku to! Kadi ndi mubanange bushuwa, nembapeshe kabidi diakalenga. ”" 
Jeremiah34:1 Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, uvua muluishe Yerushalayime ne bimenga bikuabu bia bena Yuda. Uvua ne bena mvita bende bonsu, kabidi ne bena mvita ba mu matunga ne bisamba bionsu bivua ku diyi diende. Tshikondu atshi, ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah34:2 — Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi nkutuma bua kuambila Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi mfila tshimenga etshi kudi mukalenga wa mu Babilone bua atshibutule, atshioshe." 
Jeremiah34:3 Wewe kuena mua kunyema mukalenga awu to. Nebakukuate, bakufila mu bianza biende. Nenumonangane nende mpala ne mpala. Newikale ne tshilumbu tshia kuandamuna ku nkonku yende, bangabanga ne wewe kuya mu Babilone mu bupika." 
Jeremiah34:4 “Kadi, wewe Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, bu wewe muitabe tshindi nkuambila, kabakukushipa to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkujadikila nanku." 
Jeremiah34:5 Nenku, neufue mu bupole. Mu madilu ebe nebakuenzele muvuabu benzele bankambua bebe, bakalenga bavua bakudianjidile mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Nebakoshile manananshi, bakudile bela kasala ne: Eyi! Mukalenga mmufue. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkujadikila nanku.”" 
Jeremiah34:6 Ke bualu buvua muambi Yirmeya muambile Sedekiya mukalenga wa bena Yuda mu Yerushalayime. 
Jeremiah34:7 Tshikondu etshi bena mvita ba mukalenga wa mu Babilone bavua baluisha Yerushalayime ne bimenga bibidi bia Lakishe ne Azeka, bivua mukalenga awu kayi muanji kukuata." 
Jeremiah34:8 Maweja-Nangila kuambila kabidi Yirmeya malu makuabu. Bualu mukalenga Sedekiya uvua mumvuangane ne bena mu Yerushalayime bua bapikule bapika babu. 
Jeremiah34:9 Muntu yonsu uvua ne bua kupikula bapika bende bena Ebrewu balume nansha bakaji. Muntu kavua mua kuenzeja kabidi muanabu muena Yuda mudimu wa bupika to. 
Jeremiah34:10 Balombodi bonsu ba bantu ne bena Yerushalayime bavua bitaba diumvuangana adi. Nanku bavua banyisha bua kabenzeji kabidi bantu balume nansha bakaji bavua bapika babu mudimu wa bapika to. Bavua ne bua kubapikula. Muntu yonsu uvua muitabe diumvuangana adi. Uvua mupikule bapika bende. 
Jeremiah34:11 Kadi bavua bakudimune meji aa. Bavua bangate kabidi bantu balume ne bakaji bavuabu bapikule, babenzeja ku bukole bua bapingane mu bupika." 
Jeremiah34:12 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kutuma Yirmeya bua kuambila bantu ne:" 
Jeremiah34:13 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi unuambila ne: “Meme kabidi mvua mutue ndondu ne bankambua benu pavuabu mu Ejipitu. Meme kubapatulamu. 
Jeremiah34:14 Mvua mubambile ne: Pakumbana bidimu muanda mutekete, yonsu wa kunudi apikule muanabu muena Ebrewu uvua mudipane kudiye bu mupika, ne ukavua mumane kumuenzela mudimu bidimu bisambombu. Nudi mua kumulekela aye mudiye musue. Kadi bankambua benu ki mbanteleje, ki mbitabe tshimvua mubambile to." 
Jeremiah34:15 Nuenu nuvua benza bimpe. Mvuamuanyishe munuvua bapikule bapika benu. Nuvua bumvua-ngane kabidi bua kuenza nanku kumpala kuanyi mu nzubu udi mujidila mu dina dianyi. 
Jeremiah34:16 Kadi nuenu kukudimuna meji enu. Nanku nuenu kumpepeja. Nuenu bamane kulekela bapika benu balume nansha bakaji bua baye kuonsu kuvuabu basue, ke nuenu kubakuata tshiakabidi, kubenzeja ku bukole bua bapingane ku bupika.”" 
Jeremiah34:17 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Yonsu wa kunudi uvua ne bua kuanyisha bua mupika wende, muanabu nansha muena mutumba nende, aye mudiye musue. Kadi kanuena bangitabe to. Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Nennutumine mvita, tshiyole tshia nzala, ne disama dia tshiambu. Nenku makalenga onsu a pa buloba neikale ne bowa padiwu amona bidi binuenzekela." 
Jeremiah34:18 “Bamfumu ba bena Yuda ne ba mu Yerushalayime, balombodi ba bantu, batuangaji, ne bantu bonsu bavua kabayi bapika, bavua bumvuangana nanyi. Bavua bateke mu bitupa bibidi munyinyi wa muana wa nyama wa ngombe uvuabu basaye. Kupitshilabu munkatshi mua nseke yonsu ibidi ya nyama. Kadi bantu aba mbanyange ndondu. Kabena bakumbaje bivuabu balaye." 
Jeremiah34:19  
Jeremiah34:20 Nanku nembafile kudi bantu badi bajinga kubashipa. Nyunyi ya mikanku ne nyama ya mibuabua neyidie bitalu biabu. 
Jeremiah34:21 Ke mundi mfila Sedekiya mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne balombodi bende ba mu bukalenga, kudi badi bajinga kubashipa. Nembafile kudi bena mvita ba bena Babilone. Bualu, nansha tshikulu etshi tshinushile muaba mpindiewu," 
Jeremiah34:22 nentume diyi bua tshipingane, tshiluishe tshimenga etshi, tshi tshikuate, tshitshioshe. Bimenga bia Yuda nebishale tshipela. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba nanku.”" 
Jeremiah35:1 Tshikondu tshia Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah35:2 — Uye kudi tshiota tshia bena Rekabe. Wambile bantu aba bua babuele mu tshibambalu tshia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Muaba awu neubapeshe maluvu a mvinyo a kunuabu. 
Jeremiah35:3 Yirmeya kuya kukeba Yazaniya, muana wa Irmeya, ne muikulu wa Abashinya, kabidi ne bana babu ne Yazaniya ne bana bende, mmomumue ne bantu bonsu ba mu diku dia bena Rekabe." 
Jeremiah35:4 Kubabuejaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu tshibambalu tshia balongi ba Anane, muntu wa tshijila, muana wa Igdaliya. Tshibambalu etshi tshivua pabuipi ne tshia bamfumu ba nzubu. Tshivua kabidi kulu ku mutu kua tshibambalu tshia Masheya, muana wa Shalume, mutuangaji uvua ne mudimu wa kulama tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Jeremiah35:5 Yirmeya kuteka milondu miwule tente ne maluvu, ne makopu kumpala kua bena Rekabe. Pashishe kubambilaye ne: — Nuayi maluvu makese aa." 
Jeremiah35:6 Kadi bobu kuandamuna ne: — Katuena tunua maluvu a mvinyo to, bualu nkambua wetu Yonadabe, muana wa Rekabe, uvua mutuelele mukenji ne: Kanuena mua kunua maluvu a mvinyo, nansha nuenu, nansha bana benu." 
Jeremiah35:7 Kanuena mua kuenza nzubu to. Kanuena mua kudima madimi to. Kanuena mua kukuna mionji ya mvinyo to. Kanuena mua kuikala nabi to. Kadi nusombe mu nzubu ya ntenta matuku onsu anudi ne muoyi panu. Nanku nenulale matuku mavule, mu ditunga didi kadiyi dienu." 
Jeremiah35:8 Nanku, tuvua bitabe bionsu bivua Yonadabe nkambua wetu mutuambile. Tuetu, bakaji betu, bana betu ba balume ne ba bakaji, katuena tunua mvinyo to." 
Jeremiah35:9 Katuena tuasa nzubu bua kusombamu, nansha bua kulalamu to. Katuena ne madimi a mvinyo, nansha madimi makuabu to." 
Jeremiah35:10 Kadi tudi tusomba talalaa mu ntenta. Bualu tudi tunemeka mikenji yonsu ituvua bapete ya kudi Yonadabe nkambua wetu. 
Jeremiah35:11 Kadi tshikondu tshivua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone mubuele mu ditunga, tuvua bumvuangana bua kubuela mu Yerushalayime bua kunyema bena mvita ba bena Babilone ne ba bena Ashure. Nanku lelu, tudi tusomba mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah35:12 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne: 
Jeremiah35:13 — Mpindiewu, ambila bena Yuda ne bantu badi basombe mu Yerushalayime ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: Kanuena mua kuitaba mibelu yanyi, kuteleja tshindi nnuambila anyi?" 
Jeremiah35:14 Yonadabe, muana wa Rekabe, uvua mukandike bana bende bua kabanu maluvu a mvinyo to. Bena Rekabe kuitaba miaku yende too ne lelu. Ki mbanue maluvu a mvinyo to. Bualu bavua bitabe mukenji wa kudi nkambua wabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila kunubela misangu ne misangu, kadi kanuena nunteleja to." 
Jeremiah35:15 Meme kunutumina bantu banyi bavule, bambi, bua banuambile ne: ‘Muntu yonsu wa kunudi adilengeje. Enzayi malu mimpe. Kanulamatshi mvindie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bua kuyitendelela. Nenku nenusombe mu buloba bumvua munupeshe nuenu ne bankambua benu.’ Kadi kanuvua banteleje ne ntema, kanuvua bangumvue nansha." 
Jeremiah35:16 Bena Rekabe pabu bavua balonda mukenji wa kudi Yonadabe nkambua wabu. Kadi nuenu bena Yuda kanuvua banteleje to.” 
Jeremiah35:17 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele wamba ne: “Nuenu bena Yuda ne bena Yerushalayime, nennutumine makenga onsu amvua mudianze kunumanyisha. Bualu mvua munubele, kadi kanuvua banteleje. Mvua munubikile, kadi kanuvua bitabe to.”" 
Jeremiah35:18 Pashishe Yirmeya kuambila bena Rekabe ne: — Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele unuambila ne: “Nuvua bitabe mukenji wa kudi Yonadabe nkambua wenu. Nuvua benze ne muoyi umue bionsu bivuaye munutumine diyi." 
Jeremiah35:19 Nanku, mu diku dia Yonadabe, muana wa Rekabe, nemuikale kabidi muntu udi mua kungenzela mudimu. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele ngamba.”" 
Jeremiah36:1 Mu tshidimu tshinayi tshia bukalenga bua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah36:2 — wangata muvungu wa tshiseba, ufundemu malu onsu amvua mukuambile adi atangila bukalenga bua Izrayele, bukalenga bua Yuda, ne bisamba bikuabu biangatshile tshikondu tshia Yoshiya, pamvua mutuadije kukuambila malu too ne lelu." 
Jeremiah36:3 Misangu mikuabu bena Yuda badi mua kumvua mundi musue kubatumina makenga. Nanku nebadilengeje. Nemmone mua kubafuila luse bua bilema biabu ne mibi yabu. 
Jeremiah36:4 Nanku, Yirmeya kubikila Baruke, muana wa Neriya. Kumumanyishaye malu onsu avua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile. Baruke kuafunda pa muvungu wa tshiseba." 
Jeremiah36:5 Pashishe, Yirmeya kuambila Baruke ne: — Mbakandike bua meme kubuela mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku meme tshiena mua kuyamu to." 
Jeremiah36:6 Kadi wewe neubuelemu dituku dia kujila biakudia. Neubalemu ne diyi dikole malu avua Maweja-Nangila mungambile amvua mufundishe. Mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, neumvuije bantu bende too ne bonsu badi bafume mu bimenga bia Yuda malu aa." 
Jeremiah36:7 Bumue nebasengelele Maweja-Nangila bua abafuile luse. Nanku nebadilengeje. Bualu Maweja-Nangila uvua muambe ne tshiji tshikole ne: bantu aba mbamfikishe munda bikole. 
Jeremiah36:8 Baruke uvua mulonde mikenji yonsu ivua muambi Yirmeya mumuambile. Kubuelaye mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu bua kubalamu ne diyi dikole malu a Maweja-Nangila avuaye mufunde pa tshiseba. 
Jeremiah36:9 Ebi bivua bienzeke tshidimu tshitanu tshia bukalenga bua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, mu ngondu wa tshitema wa tshidimu atshi. Bavua babikidishe bantu bonsu ba mu Yerushalayime ne bonsu ba mu bimenga bia Yuda, bua bajile biakudia mu ngondu ewu bua kutalaja tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah36:10 Baruke kuya kuimana kumpala kua bantu bonsu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kubalaye ne diyi dikole bivua Yirmeya mufundishe pa muvungu wa tshiseba. Uvua musombe mu tshibambalu tshia Ngemariya, muana wa Shafane, mufundi wa kale wa mu bukalenga. Tshibambalu etshi bavua batshiasa mu lupangu lua kulu luaku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pabuipi ne tshiibi Tshipiatshipia." 
Jeremiah36:11 Mika, muana wa Ngemariya, ne muikulu wa Shafane, kumvua malu onsu a Maweja-Nangila avua Baruke mubale." 
Jeremiah36:12 Kupuekaye mu nzubu wa bukalenga, too ne ku muaba uvua mufundi wa mikanda musombe. Balombodi bonsu ba mu bukalenga bavua mu tshisangilu. Muaba awu uvua Elishama, mufundi wa mikanda ya mu bukalenga, Delaya, muana wa Shemaya, Elnatane, muana wa Akbore, Ngemariya muana wa Shafane, Sidekiya, muana wa Ananiya, ne balombodi bakuabu bonsu ba mu bukalenga." 
Jeremiah36:13 Mika kubambila malu onsu avuaye mumvue pavua Baruke ubala ne diyi dikole malu avua pa tshiseba kumpala kua bantu bonsu. 
Jeremiah36:14 Nanku, balombodi ba mu bukalenga kutuma Yekudi, muana wa Netaniya, ne muikulu wa Shelemiya. (Shelemiya uvua muana wa Kushi), bua kuambila Baruke ne: ufike ne muvungu wa tshiseba uuvua mubadile bantu bonsu. Nanku Baruke kuangata muvungu wa tshiseba kuya kudibu." 
Jeremiah36:15 Kumuambilabu ne: — Somba panshi, utubadile malu adi mu muvungu wa tshiseba awu. Pashishe kubabadilaye mukanda." 
Jeremiah36:16 Balombodi ba mu bukalenga bamane kumvua bionsu, kutangilanganabu ne bowa. Kuambilabu Baruke ne: — Bidi bimpe, tuambile mukalenga malu aa onsu." 
Jeremiah36:17 Pashishe, kukonkabu Baruke ne: — Udi mua kutumvuija mushindu uudi mufunde bionsu ebi anyi?" 
Jeremiah36:18 Baruke kubandamuna ne: — Muambi Yirmeya ke uvua mungambile malu onsu aa, bua meme kuafunda ku bumue ku bumue ne mayi a mukanda." 
Jeremiah36:19 Ke balombodi ba mu bukalenga kuambila Baruke ne: — Nuenu bonsu babidi, Yirmeya ne wewe Baruke, nuye kusokoma. Muntu nansha umue kamanyi muaba unudi." 
Jeremiah36:20 Pashishe, kushiyabu mukanda mu nzubu wa Elishama, mufundi wa mikanda ya mu bukalenga. Bobu kuya mu nzubu wa mukalenga bua kuya kumuambila malu onsu avua menzeke." 
Jeremiah36:21 Ke mukalenga kutuma Yekudi bua aye kuangata muvungu wa tshiseba mu nzubu wa Elishama, kabidi bua aubale ne diyi dikole kumpala kua mukalenga ne kua balombodi ba mu bukalenga bavua pabuipi nende." 
Jeremiah36:22 Bu muvuabu mu ngondu wa tshitema wa mu tshidimu, mukalenga uvua musombe mu nzubu wende mu tshibambalu ota kapia tshikondu tshia mashika makole." 
Jeremiah36:23 Pavua Yekudi mumane kubala tshitupa tshia mukanda, mukalenga kutshikosa ne kele, kutshiela mu kapia. Uvua mutungunuke nanku too ne pavua muvungu mujima mubutuke." 
Jeremiah36:24 Mukalenga ne balombodi bende bonsu ba bena mvita bavua bajingulula bimpe malu avuabu bafunde pa muvungu wa tshiseba. Kadi kabavua ne bowa nansha ne dibungama. 
Jeremiah36:25 Kadi Elnatane, Delaya ne Ngemariya, bavua balomba mukalenga bua kuoshi tshiseba mu kapia. Kadi mukalenga kavua mubateleje to." 
Jeremiah36:26 Mukalenga kutuma diyi kudi Yerameyele mulombodi wa bena mvita, kudi Seraya, muana wa Azriyele, ne kudi Shelemiya, muana wa Abdeyele, bua bele muambi Yirmeya ne Baruke mufundi mu nzubu wa lukanu. Kadi Maweja-Nangila kusokoka Baruke ne Yirmeya." 
Jeremiah36:27 Mukalenga mumane kuosha muvu-ngu wa mabeji uvuabu bafunde malu avua Yirmeya muambile Baruke bua kufundaye, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah36:28 — Angata muvungu mukuabu wa tshiseba. Ufundemu kabidi malu onsu avua-bu bafunde mu muvungu wa tshiseba wa kumpala, udi Yoyakime muoshe." 
Jeremiah36:29 Pashishe, newambile Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Yirmeya uvua mufunde ne: mukalenga wa mu Babilone neafike bulelela bua kubutula ditunga edi, ne bua kushidisha bantu ne nyama. Kadi Yoyakime uvua mumutandishe, muoshe too ne muvungu wa tshiseba." 
Jeremiah36:30 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Ku ndelanganyi ya Yoyakime kakuakuikala muntu nansha umue udi mua kubuela mu bukalenga bua Davide kunyima kuende. Tshitalu tshia Yoyakime nebatshimanshe pambelu, butuku netshikanyanyanye ne mashika, mu munya netshiuminyine ne luya." 
Jeremiah36:31 Nemmunyoke yeye ne ndelanganyi yende ne balombodi bende ba bena mvita. Nembanyoke bua bilema biabu. Makenga onsu amvua muambe, nembatuminewu, bobu bantu ba mu Yerushalayime ne bantu ba mu Yuda, bualu kabavua banteleje.”" 
Jeremiah36:32 Nanku, Yirmeya kuangata muvungu mukuabu wa tshiseba, kuupesha Baruke mufundi. Awu kufunda bionsu bivua Yirmeya umuambila, ke malu onsu avuabu bafunde mu mukanda uvuabu boshe kudi mukalenga Yoyakime, ne malu makuabu a bungi a mushindu wa momumue." 
Jeremiah37:1 Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, uvua muteke Sedekiya, muana wa Yoshiya, bua kuikalaye mukalenga mu ditunga dia Yuda. Nanku Sedekiya ke uvua mupingane Koniya, muana wa Yoyakime." 
Jeremiah37:2 Kadi Sedekiya, balombodi bende ba bena mvita, ne bana babu bena Yuda kabavua bateleja mibelu ya Maweja-Nangila ivua muambi Yirmeya ubambila." 
Jeremiah37:3 Nanku, mukalenga Sedekiya kutuma Yukale, muana wa Shelemiya, ne mutuangaji Sefanya, muana wa Masheya, kudi muambi Yirmeya bua kumuambila ne: — Tudi bavua kukulomba bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu bualu buetu bonsu." 
Jeremiah37:4 Mu tshikondu atshi, kabavua banji kuela kabidi Yirmeya mu lukanu to. Utshivua wendakana muvuaye musue." 
Jeremiah37:5 Kadi, tshiluilu tshia mvita tshia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, tshivua tshimane kumuka mu Ejipitu. Bena Babilone bavua baluisha tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime bavua bumvua bualu abu. Nanku kumukabu mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, kuimanabu katantshi ne tshimenga." 
Jeremiah37:6 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya tshivuaye ne bua kuandamuna bantu bavua mukalenga Sedekiya umutumina ne. 
Jeremiah37:7 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: — Nuye kuambila Sedekiya mukalenga wa bena Yuda, udi munutume kundi bua kungebeja malu ne: tshiluilu tshia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, tshivua tshifike bua kunuambuluisha, tshikadi tshialukile kuabu ku Ejipitu." 
Jeremiah37:8 Bena Babilone nebafike kabidi bua kuluisha tshimenga etshi. Nebatshikuate, batshioshe ne kapia." 
Jeremiah37:9 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuambila ne: Kanuedi meji ne: bena Babilone mbumuke menemene to. Kabakumuka nansha! 
Jeremiah37:10 Nansha nuenu batshimune tshiluilu tshionsu tshia bena Babilone tshidi tshinuluisha, nansha bena Babilone badi bashale bikale amu bantu batapike mputa, yonsu wa kudibu neapete bukole, neimane kulu mu ntenta wende. Nebafike bua kuosha tshimenga etshi tshionsu ne kapia." 
Jeremiah37:11 Pavua tshituilu tshia bena Babilone tshianji kupengamaku luseke, bualu tshiluilu tshia mukalenga munene wa bena Ejipitu tshivua tshisemena pabuipi," 
Jeremiah37:12 Yirmeya uvua musue kupatuka mu tshimenga bua kuya mu buloba bua bena Binyamine. Uvua ne bua kuyamu kuabanyangana buloba ne bantu ba mu musoku wabu. 
Jeremiah37:13 Uvua mupitshile ku tshiibi tshia Binyamine. Kupetanganaye ne mfumu wa balami ba bena mvita, dina diende Iriya, muana wa Shelemiya, ne muikulu wa Ananiya. Iriya kuimanyika muambi Yirmeya, kumuambila ne: — Udi uya kudi bena Babilone bua kubambuluisha anyi?" 
Jeremiah37:14 Ke Yirmeya kumuandamuna ne: — Nansha kakese! Tshiena nya kudi bena Babilone to. Kadi Iriya kavua muitabe tshivua Yirmeya wamba to. Kumukuataye, kuya nende kudi bamfumu bende." 
Jeremiah37:15 Bobu abu kufikila Yirmeya munda, kumutuutabu. Pashishe kumukangilabu mu nzubu wa Yonatane, mufundi wa mikanda ya mu bukalenga. Nzubu wende bavua bamuenze nzubu wa bena lukanu." 
Jeremiah37:16 Kuelabu Yirmeya mu nzubu wa lukanu wa munda mua buloba. Kushalayemu mutantshi mule. 
Jeremiah37:17 Pashishe mukalenga Sedekiya kutuma muntu bua kukeba Yirmeya. Mukalenga uvua musue kumukonka malu mu musokoku mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Mukalenga kumukonka ne: — Udi ne malu a kungambila a kudi Maweja-Nangila anyi? Yirmeya kumuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ngwowu aa: Nebakukuate, bakufile kudi mukalenga wa mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah37:18 Pashishe, Yirmeya kukonka mukalenga Sedekiya ne: — Ntshilema kayi tshindi mukuenzele, nansha tshindi muenzele balombodi bebe ba bena mvita, nansha bantu ba mu tshimenga etshi, bua wewe kungelesha mu nzubu wa lukanu?" 
Jeremiah37:19 Bambi benu bavua banuambila ne: mukalenga wa mu Babilone kena ubuela mu ditunga edi bua kunuluisha, wewe ne bena ditunga edi, lelu badi penyi?" 
Jeremiah37:20 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Mukalenga, ndi nkulomba bua uteleje tshindi nkulomba. Kuntumi tshiakabidi kua Yonatane, mufundi wa mikanda ya mu bukalenga, bualu ndi mua kufuilamu." 
Jeremiah37:21 Nanku, mukalenga Sedekiya kuela mukenji bua balame Yirmeya mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga, kabidi bua bamupeshe ku dituku diampa dia tshijengu divuabu balamba mu musesu wa Boshi ba mampa, too ne ku diba didibu kabayi mua kupeta kabidi diampa! Ke muvua Yirmeya mushale mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga nanku." 
Jeremiah38:1 Shefatya, muana wa Matane, Ngedaliya, muana wa Pashekure, Yukale, muana wa Shelemiya, ne Pashekure, muana wa Malkiya bavua bajingulule malu avua Yirmeya wambila bantu bavua bapitshila muaba awu. Uvua ubambila ne:" 
Jeremiah38:2 — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Muntu yonsu washala mu tshimenga etshi neafue ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, nansha ku disama dia tshiambu. Kadi muntu yonsu umuka mu tshimenga etshi, bua kuya kudifila kudi bena Babilone, neashale ne muoyi. ”" 
Jeremiah38:3 Yirmeya uvua wamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: ndi mumane kushindika bua kufila tshimenga etshi kudi tshiluilu tshia mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Yeye mene ke watshikuata. 
Jeremiah38:4 Balombodi ba bena mvita aba mbamane kumvua muvua Yirmeya muambe, kuambilabu mukalenga Sedekiya ne: — Tudi tulomba bua kushipa Yirmeya ewu. Bionsu bidiye wamba, bidi bitekesha bikole bena mvita ne bantu badi bashale mu tshimenga. Muntu ewu udi utukebela amu diakabi. Kena bualu ne diakalenga dietu to." 
Jeremiah38:5 Nanku, mukalenga Sedekiya kuandamuna ne: — Ee mbimpe! Numuenzele munudi basue. Bualu nansha meme mukalenga, tshiena ne bumfumu bua kunukandika to." 
Jeremiah38:6 Balombodi banayi ba bena mvita aba kukuatshisha Yirmeya, kumuela mu tshiina tshia mayi tshia Malkiya, mulombodi wa bena mvita. Tshiina atshi tshivua tshiumbula mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami bamukalenga. Kupuekeshabu Yirmeya ku muonji mu tshiina atshi. Mu tshiina amu kamuvua mayi nansha. Kadi muvua amu bitotshi. Yirmeya kubuelamu." 
Jeremiah38:7 Muena Kushe mukuabu, dina diende Ebede-Meleke, uvua mufidi wa ngenyi mu nzubu wa bukalenga. Kumvuaye ne: mbele Yirmeya mu tshiina tshia mayi. Bu muvua mukalenga Sedekiya muimane ku tshiibi tshia Binyamine." 
Jeremiah38:8 Ebede-Meleke kupatuka mu nzubu wa bukalenga, kuya kumuambila ne:" 
Jeremiah38:9 — Mukalenga, bantu aba mbenze bualu bubi, mbele muambi Yirmeya mu tshiina tshia mayi! Neafuemu ne nzala. Kabidi mu tshimenga kamuena diampa nansha dimue." 
Jeremiah38:10 Nanku, mukalenga kuelelaye Ebede-Meleke, muena Kushe, mukenji ne: — Wangata bantu makumi asatu, uye nabu. Nupatule Yirmeya mu tshiina tshia mayi bua kafuidimu." 
Jeremiah38:11 Nanku, Ebede-Meleke kuangata bantu makumi asatu, kuya nabu ku nzubu wa bukalenga. Kubuelaye mu tshibambalu muaba udibu balama bintu. Kuangataye bilamba bia kale bipandike. Kubituminaye Yirmeya mu tshiina, bisuike ku mionji." 
Jeremiah38:12 Pashishe, Ebede-Meleke muena Kushe, kuambila Yirmeya ne: — Ubueje mikusu ya bilamba eyi mu mapa, ne mionji muinshi mua mikusu. Yirmeya mumane kuenza nanku," 
Jeremiah38:13 bantu kukoka mionji, kumupatulabu mu tshiina. Ke Yirmeya kushala mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga." 
Jeremiah38:14 Mukalenga Sedekiya uvua mutume bantu bua bafike ne muambi Yirmeya. Kumubikilaye ku mushiku muisatu wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumuambilaye ne: — Ndi musue kukukonka. Kunsokoki bualu nansha bumue. 
Jeremiah38:15 Yirmeya kuandamuna mukalenga Sedekiya ne: — Bu meme mubandamune tshindi ne bua kuandamuna, neunshipeshe. Nansha meme mukubele, bakuitaba mibelu yanyi to." 
Jeremiah38:16 Kadi mukalenga kuditshipa kudi Yirmeya, bobu bikale amu babidi, wamba ne: — Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi, mutupe kabidi muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: tshiena mua kukushipesha, nansha kukufila kudi bantu aba badi bajinga lufu luebe to." 
Jeremiah38:17 Nanku Yirmeya kuandamuna mukalenga Sedekiya ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi ukuambila ne: “Wewe mumuke bua kuya kudi mulombodi wa mvita wa bena Babilone, newikale ne muoyi, wewe ne bena diku diebe, tshimenga etshi kabakutshibutula kudi kapia to." 
Jeremiah38:18 Kadi paudi ubenga kuya kudi balombodi ba mukalenga wa bena Babilone, tshimenga etshi, nebatshikuate kudi bena Babilone, nebatshibutule batshioshe. Wewe mene kuakushala, kuakupanda to.”" 
Jeremiah38:19 Mukalenga Sedekiya kumuandamuna ne: — Bowa budi bunkuata bua bena Yuda bavua badifile kudi bena Babilone. Ndi ntshina ne nebainfile kudi bantu abu bua bampetule. 
Jeremiah38:20 Kadi Yirmeya kumuandamuna ne: — Too, kabakukufila kudibu nansha. Teleja tshindi ngamba mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nanku wewe ne bena diku diebe nenupande. Bionsu nebiende amu bimpe." 
Jeremiah38:21 Kadi wewe mubenge kudifila kudi bena Babilone, malu adi Maweja-Nangila mundeje neakuenzekele:" 
Jeremiah38:22 bakaji bonsu badi bashale mu nzubu wa bukalenga nebabakuate kudi balombodi ba bena mvita ba mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Bakaji abu, nebanusake mu musambu bimba ne: Balunda bebe baudi munange, badi bakudinga! Paudi ne ntatu, kabena nebe kabidi bualu to!" 
Jeremiah38:23 Eyowa, nebafile bakaji bebe ne bana bebe ba balume kudi bena Babilone. Nansha wewe kuakunyema to. Mukalenga wa bena Babilone neakuele mu lukanu. Neabutule tshimenga etshi ne kapia." 
Jeremiah38:24 Nanku, mukalenga Sedekiya kuambila Yirmeya ne: — Paudi musue kuikala ne muoyi, muntu nansha umue kamanyi kalu nansha kamue ka mu diyuki dietu." 
Jeremiah38:25 Kadi balombodi banene ba bena mvita nebajingulule ne: ndi muyukile nebe. Nanku nebafike bua kukukonka pa malu atudi bambilangane. Nebakulaye ne: katuakushipa paudi utuambila bualu bujima. 
Jeremiah38:26 Kadi ubandamune ne: “Mvua nsengelela mukalenga bua kampingaji kabidi mu nzubu wa Yonatane. Bualu ndi mua kufuilamu.” 
Jeremiah38:27 Bulelela, balombodi banene ba bena mvita kufika kudi Yirmeya bua kumukonka. Kadi Yirmeya kubandamuna anu muvua mukalenga Sedekiya mumuambile. Nanku nanshabu kumuenzela bibi to. Bualu muntu nansha umue kavua mumvue tshivua mukalenga Sedekiya ne muambi Yirmeya bambilangana." 
Jeremiah38:28 Yirmeya pende uvua mushale mu lupangu lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga too ne diba divuabu bakuate Yerushalayime. Malu avua menzeke pavuabu bakuate Yerushalayime adi nenku: 
Jeremiah39:1 Mu tshidimu tshia tshitema tshia bukalenga bua Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, mu ngondu wa dikumi, mukalenga Nebukadnesare wa mu Babilone uvua mufike ne tshiluilu tshiende tshionsu bua kuluisha Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah39:2 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue, dituku dia tshitema dia ngondu muinayi, bena Babilone bavua bapande disosu ku tshimana tshia tshimenga." 
Jeremiah39:3 Nanku balombodi bonsu ba bena mvita ba bena Babilone kubuela mu tshimenga, kuimanabu ku tshiibi tshia pankatshinkatshi. Muaba awu, uvua Nergale-Sareshe, mulombodi wa balombodi ba bena mvita, Samgare-Nebo, Sare-Sekime, muntu uvua mufidi wa ngenyi wa kumpala wa mukalenga, ne balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Babilone bakuabu bonsu." 
Jeremiah39:4 Mukalenga Sedekiya ne bena mvita bende, kunyemabu pavuabu bamone bena Babilone. Butuku buila, kumukabu mu tshimenga. Kupitshilabu ku lupangu lua bukalenga ne ku tshiibi tshivua pankatshi pa bimana bibidi. Pashishe kupitshilabu mu njila uvua mutangile mu tshibanda tshia Yardene." 
Jeremiah39:5 Kadi bena mvita ba bena Babilone kubalondakaja, kuluisha kabidi mukalenga Sedekiya mu mpata wa Yeriko, kumukuatabu. Pashishe, kumufilabu kudi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone uvua ku Ribla mu ditunga dia Amate. Aku ke kuvua mukalenga Nebukadnesare mulumbuluishe mukalenga Sedekiya." 
Jeremiah39:6 Ke kuvuaye mushipeshe kabidi bana ba balume ba mukalenga Sedekiya, tatuabu mutangile. Yeye kushipeshamu kabidi bakulu bonsu ba bena Yuda." 
Jeremiah39:7 Kutumabu Sedekiya ku Babilone, musuike ne nkanu bikole, mutonkone mesu." 
Jeremiah39:8 Bena Babilone kuosha nzubu wa bukalenga mu Yerushalayime, ne nzubu mikuabu. Kushimbulabu kabidi tshimana tshia tshimenga." 
Jeremiah39:9 Pashishe, Nebuzaradane, mfumu wa bena mvita balami ba mukalenga, kukuata bantu bavua bashale mu tshimenga ne bavua badifile kudiye, too ne bena midimu ya bianza bavua bashale." 
Jeremiah39:10 Mu ditunga dia bena Yuda kushiyaye amu bantu bapele bavua kabayi ne kantu. Kubabanyinaye mionji ya mvinyo, kubapeshaye ne madimi." 
Jeremiah39:11 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare uvua muelele Nebuzaradane, mfumu wa bena mvita balami ba mukalenga mikenji ivua itangila Yirmeya. Uvua mumuambile ne:" 
Jeremiah39:12 “Uye kukeba Yirmeya, kadi kumuenzedi bibi to. Umuenzele muonsu muakuambilaye!”" 
Jeremiah39:13 Ke Nebuzaradane, mfumu wa bena mvita balami, kumyuangana ne Nebushazbane, mufidi wa ngenyi wa kumpala wa mukalenga, kabidi ne Nergale-Sareshe, mfumu wa balombodi be bena mvita, ne balombodi banene bakuabu babena mvita ba mukalenga wa Babilone." 
Jeremiah39:14 Kutumaye diyi bua baye kuangata Yirmeya mu lubanza lua bena mvita balami ba mukalenga. Ke kumupatuishamu, bamufite kabidi kudi Ngedaliya, muana wa Akikame, ne muikulu wa Shafane. Ngedaliya uvua muanyishe bua bafile Yirmeya kuende. Ke Yirmeya kusomba mpindiewu munkatshi mua bantu bakuabu." 
Jeremiah39:15 Tshikondu tshivuabu balame muambi Yirmeya mu nzubu wa lukanu, Maweja-Nangila uvua mumuambile ne:" 
Jeremiah39:16 — Uye kuambila Ebede-Meleke, muena Kushe ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: Mvua muambile bantu ba mu tshimenga etshi ne: nenupete dikenga, kanuakupeta disanka to. Nanku nengenze bionsu bimvua muambe. Nenujadike bionsu abi amu mpindiewu." 
Jeremiah39:17 Kadi pafika dituku dia dikenga, tshiakuanyisha bua uye mu bianza bia bantu baudi utshina." 
Jeremiah39:18 Eyowa, nenkuepule ku lufu. Neushale ne muoyi, bualu uvua muntekemene meme. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba nanku.”" 
Jeremiah40:1 Nebuzaradane, mfumu wa bena mvita balami ba mukalenga, mumane kuanyisha bua Yirmeya umuka ku Rama, Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne Yirmeya. Yirmeya musuike ne nkanu, uvua usomba munkatshi muabena Yerushalayime ne bena Yuda bavuabu bakuate bua kuya nabu mu Babilone. Muine muaba awu ke kuvua mfumu wa bena mvita balami mumushe Yirmeya ku tshisumbu tshia bantu bavuabu ne bua kuya nabu." 
Jeremiah40:2 Kuyaye ne Yirmeya pa nkayende, umuambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe uvua mumanyishe bena tshimenga etshi dikenga didi dibakuata." 
Jeremiah40:3 Mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila mmuenze tshionsu tshivuaye mumanyishe, bualu nuvua bena tshibawu. Kanuvua bitabe tshivuaye munuambile. Ke padi malu awu onsu manuenzekele." 
Jeremiah40:4 Nanku, lelu ndi nkusulula nkanu ivuabu bakusuike ku bianza. Paudi musue kuya nanyi ku Babilone mbimpe tuye. Nenkulame. Kadi paudi kuyi musue, bidi anu bimpe. Udi mua kuya kusomba mu ditunga, muaba onsu uudi musue." 
Jeremiah40:5 Kadi muambi Yirmeya kavua muye to. Ke Nebuzaradane kuamba kabidi ne: — Udi mua kupingana kudi Ngedaliya, muana wa Akikame, muikulu wa Shafane. Mukalenga wa mu Babilone mmumuteke bua kuludika bimenga bia bena Yuda. Uye kusomba kudiye munkatshi mua bantu. Nansha uye miaba mikuabu kuonsu kuudi mumone ne nkuimpe. Mfumu wa bena mvita balami, kupesha Yirmeya biakudia bua luendu luende, kumusankishaye kabidi ne bintu bikuabu. Bobu kulayangana bimpe." 
Jeremiah40:6 Nanku Yirmeya kuya ku Mispa, muaba uvua Ngedaliya. Kusombaye munkatshi mua bantu bavua bashale mu ditunga." 
Jeremiah40:7 Mu misoku ya ku mpenga mutshivua bisumbu bia bena mvita ba bena Yuda. Balombodi ba bisumbu bia bena mvita abi, ne bantu babu, bavua bumvua muvua mukalenga wa Babilone musungule Ngedaliya, muana wa Akikame, bua ikale mulombodi wa ditunga, muvuaye kabidi mumupeshe bapele, balume, bakaji, ne bana bavuabu kabayi mua kuya nabu mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah40:8 Ke balombodi abu ba bena mvita ne bantu babu, kuya ku Mispa kuvua Ngedaliya. Bavua baye ke: Ishemayele, muana wa Netanya, Yowanane ne Yonatane bonsu babidi bana ba balume ba Kareya, Seraya, muana wa Tanekumete, ne bana balume ba Afayi wa mu Netofa, ne Yazanya wa mu Maaka." 
Jeremiah40:9 Ngedaliya kubambila ne: — Kanutshinyi to. Anyishayi bukalenga bua bena Babilone. Sombayi mu ditunga. Nuitabe bumfumu bua mukalenga wa Babilone. Ndi nnulaya ne: nenuikale ne diakalenga. 
Jeremiah40:10 Meme mene ndi ngasa mu Mispa emu, bua ngikale muena mpala wenu kudi bena Babilone badi bafika kunudi. Kadi nuenu nupole tumuma tua mvinyo, ne bimuma bikuabu, nuenze ne mafuta. Nubilame mu diyeba. Nuase kabidi mu bimenga munuvua basombe kumpala." 
Jeremiah40:11 Bena Yuda bavua ku bena Mowabe, ku bena Amone, ku bena Edome, nansha bavua mu ditunga dikuabu, bavua bumvua pabu bonsu ne: mukalenga wabena Babilone mmushiye bantu mu bukalenga bua Yuda, mmubateke mu bianza bia Ngedaliya." 
Jeremiah40:12 Nanku ke bena Yuda bonsu aba, kumuka miaba mishilangane ivuabu babipate, kuyabu kudi Ngedaliya ku Mispa mu ditunga dia Yuda. Kupolabu bimuma bivule, ne tumuma tua mvinyo tuvule." 
Jeremiah40:13 Dituku dikuabu, Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, ne balombodi bakuabu batshi vua mu mpata, kuyabu kudi Ngedaliya mu Mispa." 
Jeremiah40:14 Kumukonkabu ne: — Udi mumanye ne: Balise, mukalenga wa bena Amone, udi mutume Ishemayele, muana wa Netaniya, bua kukushipa anyi? Kadi Ngedaliya kavua mubitabe to." 
Jeremiah40:15 Ke Yowanane kuya ku Mispa mu musokoku kudi Ngedaliya umukonka ne: — Udi musue bua nye kushipa Ishemayele anyi? Muntu kakumanya bualu to. Katuena mua kuanyisha bua akushipe to. Yeye mukushipe, bena Yuda baudi wewe musangishe nebatangalake tshiakabidi. Bantu bonsu batshidi basomba mu bukalenga bua Yuda nebabutuke!" 
Jeremiah40:16 Kadi Ngedaliya kuandamuna Yowanane ne: — Kuenji bualu bua nanku to. Biudi wamba pambidi pa Ishemayele mbia dishima! 
Jeremiah41:1 Kadi mu ngondu wa muanda mutekete, Ishemayele, muana wa Netaniya, muikulu wa Elishama, kufika kudi Ngedaliya mu Mispa. Ishemayele uvua wa mu diku dia bukalenga. Ku kale uvua wenza mudimu mu lubanza lua bukalenga. Uvua mufike ne bantu dikumi. Pavuabu ne Ngedaliya ku mesa badia," 
Jeremiah41:2 Ishemayele kujuka musangu umue, ne bantu bavua bamufila, kutapabu Ngedaliya ne muele, kumushipa. Yeye ke uvua mukalenga wa Babilone muteke bua kulombola ditunga dia Yuda." 
Jeremiah41:3 Pashishe Ishemayele kushipa bena Yuda bonsu bavua pamue ne Ngedaliya mu Mispa. Kushipaye too ne bena mvita ba bena Babilone bavua muaba awu. 
Jeremiah41:4 Bobu bamane kushipa Ngedaliya, kupita matuku abidi, bantu kabavua banji kumanya bua lufu luende alu to." 
Jeremiah41:5 Nanku bantu balume makumi muanda mukulu ba ku Shekeme, ba ku Shilo, ne ba ku Samariya, kufika. Bavua babeya miedi, bavuale bilamba bipandike, baditape mputa pambidi. Bavua bambule milambu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, ne ya musenga wa kamonya, bua kuya kulambula Maweja-Nangila mu nzubu wende wa mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah41:6 Ishemayele kupatuka mu Mispa bua kusambakena nabu wenda udila. Yeye mumane kufika kudibu, kubambilaye ne: — Tuye kudi Ngedaliya." 
Jeremiah41:7 Kadi bobu bamane kubuela mu tshimenga, ke Ishemayele ne bantu bende kubashipa, kuimansha bitalu biabu mu tshiina tshia mayi." 
Jeremiah41:8 Kadi bantu bu dikumi kusengelela Ishemayele ne: — Kutushipi nansha, bualu tudi ne ntete ya kuenza bukula, tudi ne mafuta ne buitshi, bituvua basokoke mu tshisuku. Nanku, Ishemayele kavua mubashipe, muvuaye mushipe bana babu." 
Jeremiah41:9 Tshiina tshia mayi tshivua Ishemayele muele bitalu bia bantu aba bavuaye mushipe, tshivua tshiina tshinene tshivua mukalenga Asa mutume diyi bua kumbula, pavuaye uluangana mvita ne Basha, mukalenga wa Izrayele. Ishemayele uvua mutshiuwuje ne bitalu." 
Jeremiah41:10 Ishemayele kuela bantu bonsu bavua bashala mu Mispa, mu lukanu, kabidi ne bana ba bakaji ba mukalenga, ne bonsu ba-vua Nebuzaradane, mfumu wa bena mvita mupeshe Ngedaliya. Pashishe, Ishemayele kuya ne bena lukanu bonsu aba bua kusomba kudi bena Amone." 
Jeremiah41:11 Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, ne balombodi ba bena mvita bavua nende, kumvuabu bualu bubi buvua Ishemayele muenze." 
Jeremiah41:12 Kuyabu ne bantu babu bua kuluisha Ishemayele. Kumukuatabu ku dijiba dinene dia mu Ngibone. 
Jeremiah41:13 Pavua bena lukanu bavua mu bianza bia Ishemayele bamone Yowanane ne balombodi ba bena mvita bende, kusankabu." 
Jeremiah41:14 Nanku bantu bonsu bavua Ishemayele mukuate ku Mispa, kubengabu Ishemayele bua kulonda Yowanane." 
Jeremiah41:15 Kadi Ishemayele kunyema ne bantu muanda mukulu, kuyaye kudi bena Amone." 
Jeremiah41:16 Pashishe, Yowanane ne balombodi ba bena mvita bavuaye nabu, kuangatabu bantu bavua Ishemayele mukuate ku Mispa, yeye mumane kushipa Ngedaliya. Munkatshi muabu muvua balume bena mvita, bakaji, bana, ne bantu batungu. Mu tshikosu ke bantu bonsu bavuabu basangana mu Ngibone." 
Jeremiah41:17 Kuyabu kuikisha ku tshilala benyi tshia ku Kimekame pabuipi ne Betleyeme. Bavua ne meji a kuya too ne ku Ejipitu. 
Jeremiah41:18 Bualu bavua batshina bena Babilone, muvua Ishemayele mushipe Ngedaliya, muntu uvua mukalenga wa bena Babilone muteke bua kulombola ditunga." 
Jeremiah42:1 Pashishe balombodi ba bena mvita, nangananga Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, Azarya, muana wa Oshaya, ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu kuyabu bonsu," 
Jeremiah42:2 kudi muambi Yirmeya, bamuambila ne: — Wanyishe tshitudi tukulomba. Utendelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe bua tuetu bonsu badi bashale ne muoyi. Tudi bakese be. Udi mudimuene nkayebe." 
Jeremiah42:3 Ulombe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe, atumanyishe muaba utudi mua kuya, ne tshitudi mua kuenza." 
Jeremiah42:4 Muambi Yirmeya kubandamuna ne: — Mbimpe munudi nundomba! Nentendelele Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Pashishe tshiakunusokoka bualu nansha bumue. Nennumanyishe muikale Maweja-Nangila muambe. 
Jeremiah42:5 Kuandamunabu Yirmeya ne: — Kayanda ketu, netuenze menemene tshionsu tshikale Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe mukumanyishe bua wewe kutuambila. Maweja-Nangila ikale mujadiki wa mutshipu wetu." 
Jeremiah42:6 Tudi bakulombe bua umonangane ne Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Nanku netuitabe tshionsu tshiatuenzelaye, nansha tshiotshi tshitusankisha, nansha katshiyi tshitusankisha. Nanku netupete anu dikasa dimpe, bualu netutumikile Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Jeremiah42:7 Kunyima kua matuku dikumi, Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna muambi Yirmeya." 
Jeremiah42:8 Yirmeya kubikidisha Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, ne balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita bavuaye nabu, too ne bantu bonsu bavua muaba awu." 
Jeremiah42:9 Pashishe, kubambilaye ne: — Nuvua bandombe bua meme kuebeja Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele. Diandamuna diende didi nenku:" 
Jeremiah42:10 “Panuikala bapingana mu ditunga, nengasulule tshisamba tshienu. Tshiakutshibutula to. Nentshishindike tshiasa miji. Tshiakutshitula to. Nanku, nennyingalale bua dikenga dimvua munutumine." 
Jeremiah42:11 Kanutshinyi mpindiewu mukalenga wa bena Babilone. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuambila ne: kanutshinyi, bualu ndi nenu, bua kunusungidila, bua kumukandika, bua kankengeshi." 
Jeremiah42:12 Nennuambuluishe, mukalenga awu neanufuile luse, bua nupingane mu buloba buenu.”" 
Jeremiah42:13 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Bumue nuenu nudi mua kubenga kuitaba meyi a Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nudi mua kuamba ne: Katuena mua kuya kusomba mu ditunga dietu edi to. 
Jeremiah42:14 Tudi mua kuya kuasa mu Ejipitu mutudi katuyi mua kumona mvita, katuyi mua kumvua miyenga ya miadi, katuyi mua kufua nzala. Ke kutuaya kusomba." 
Jeremiah42:15 Nanku nuenu bantu ba ndekelu badi mu bukalenga bua Yuda, nuteleje bimpe tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba. Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi unuambila ne: “Nuenu bajadike bua kuya mu Ejipitu, nuenu baye kusombamu," 
Jeremiah42:16 nenku mvita inudi nutshina bikole neyinulonde mu Ejipitu amu. Nzala inudi nuzakela, neyilonde too ne muaba awu. Nenufuileku." 
Jeremiah42:17 Bonsu badi bajadike bua kuya kusomba mu Ejipitu, nebafue ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, nansha ku disama dia tshiambu. Muntu wa kudibu nansha umue. kakupanduka ku dikenga dingabatumina.”" 
Jeremiah42:18 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: “Mvua mufikile bena Izrayele munda bikole. Nuenu kabidi nennufikile munda panudi nuya mu Ejipitu. Diba edi nebanuteke tshilejilu tshia tshintu tshibi tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa, tshienza bundu. Nuenu mene kanuakumona kabidi ditunga edi to.”" 
Jeremiah42:19 Yirmeya kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi unukandika bua kanuyi mu Ejipitu, bualu nuenu nudi bantu ba ndekelu ba bena Yuda. Umvuayi bimpe bindi ngamba, nnujadikila lelu." 
Jeremiah42:20 Panuvua bangambile bua kukonka Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, panuvua bandombe bua kumutendelela bualu buenu, nuvua nuamba ne: “Utumanyishe bimpe tshionsu tshidi Maweja-Nangila wetu mua kuamba, nentshienze.” Kadi tshikondu atshi nuvua balaye bualu ebu amu ku mishiku patupu." 
Jeremiah42:21 Bualu lelu ndi munutuadile diandamuna dia kudi Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Kadi kanuena bateleje bualu nansha bumue budiye mungambile bua kunumanyisha. 
Jeremiah42:22 Nanku numanye ne: nenufue mu mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, nansha ku disama dia tshiambu, muaba mene unudi nujinga mua kusokomena awu!" 
Jeremiah43:1 Yirmeya uvua muambile bantu bonsu malu aa avua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu mumanyishe. 
Jeremiah43:2 Ke Azarya, muana wa Oshaya, Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, ne bakuabu bonsu, kuandamuna Yirmeya ne dikamakama ne: — Udi ushima. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu kena mukuambile bua kutubela bua katuyi kusokoma mu Ejipitu to." 
Jeremiah43:3 Barake, muana wa Neriya, ke udi ukusonsola bua wewe kutuambila nanku. Barake mmusue bua batukuate kudi bena Babilone, batushipe, nansha baye netu kuabu mu bupika." 
Jeremiah43:4 Nanku, Yowanane, muana wa Kareya, balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita ne bonsu bavuabu nabu, kubengabu kuteleja tshivua Maweja-Nangila mubambile, bua basombe mu ditunga dia Yuda." 
Jeremiah43:5 Pashishe, Yowanane, ne balombodi bakuabu ba bena mvita, kuangata bena Yuda bavua bashala mu ditunga diabu, ne bonsu bavuabu bapeta mu matunga avua nabu mutumba, bakavua bamane kupingana mu ditunga dia Yuda:" 
Jeremiah43:6 ke balume, bakaji, bana, bana ba bakaji ba mukalenga, ne bantu bonsu bavua Nebuzaradane, mulombodi wa bena mvita balami mushile Ngedaliya, muana wa Akikame, muikulu wa Shafane. Bavua baye kabidi ne muambi Yirmeya ne Barake, muana wa Neriya." 
Jeremiah43:7 Bavua babenga kukumbaja bivua Maweja-Nangila muambe. Kuyabu mu Ejipitu, too ne mu Tapanese." 
Jeremiah43:8 Mu Tapanese, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah43:9 — Angata mabue manene, wajike mu lutanda ludi ku mushiku wa mbelu wa nzubu wa bukalenga udi mu Tapanese. Wenzananku bena Yuda batangile." 
Jeremiah43:10 Pashishe ubambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Nentume bantu bua kunkebelabu muntu wanyi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Nenjadike nkuasa wende pa mutu pa mabue adibu bajike muaba ewu. Nease nzubu wende wa bukalenga anu muaba ewu." 
Jeremiah43:11 Kadi pafikaye, neatshimune bena Ejipitu. Bantu bavule ne bafue. Banga nebaye mu bupika, bakuabu kabidi nebabashipe mu mvita." 
Jeremiah43:12 Neoshe nzubu ya mvidie ya bena Ejipitu. Neoshe ne mpingu mene ya mvidie, nansha neaye nayi kuende. Neapawule ditunga dia Ejipitu, anu bu mudi mulami wa mikoku umusha nkusu yonsu mu tshilamba tshiende. Pashishe, neapingane kuende kakuyi udi mua kumuela diyi." 
Jeremiah43:13 Mu tshimenga tshia Eliyopolise neupule makunji a mabue, neoshe nzubu ya mvidie ya bena Ejipitu.”" 
Jeremiah44:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yirmeya malu avuaye ne bua kumanyisha bena Yuda bonsu bavua baye kusokoma mu Ejipitu mu tshimenga tshia Migdole, tshia Tapanese, tshia Memfise, ne mu buloba bua Patrose. Ke Yirmeya kubambila ne:" 
Jeremiah44:2 — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: “Nuvua bamone makenga onsu amvua mutumine bena Yerushalayime ne bimenga bikuabu bia Yuda. Bimenga ebi lelu mbimane kubutuka bishale makolu." 
Jeremiah44:3 Bualu bantu badi basombamu bavua bangenzele bibi, bamfikishe munda. Bavua baye kulambula ne kutendelela mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Kadi mvidie ayi, nansha nuenu, nansha bankambua benu, kanuvua bayimanye to." 
Jeremiah44:4 Meme kunutumina bambi misangu ne misangu, bena mudimu banyi, bua nulekele kuenza malu mabi andi mubenge." 
Jeremiah44:5 Kadi kanuena banteleje, kanuena bangata mibelu yabu ne mushinga, kanuena balekele kuenza malu mabi, nansha kulambula milambu kudi mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu." 
Jeremiah44:6 Nanku mvua mufike munda bikole, mvua ne kanyinganyinga. Ke mumvua mubutule bimenga bia Yuda ne misesu ya mu Yerushalayime. Ke mudi bimenga biandamuke makolu, bishale miaba idi ikuatshisha bantu bowa, bu munudi numona lelu.”" 
Jeremiah44:7 Yirmeya kuamba ne: — Mpindiewu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi unukonka ne: “Nuenu nudi basue kudienzela anu bibi bua tshinyi? Nudi basue kujimija tshisamba tshijima tshia bena Yuda, balume, bakaji, bansonga ne bana batekete mene, anyi? Nudi basue bua bena Yuda bonsu bafue anyi?" 
Jeremiah44:8 Nudi nukeba kumfikisha munda ne malu enu mabi, ne milambu inudi nulambula mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, munuvua baye kusokoma. Nudi basue bua banubutule, banuteke tshilejilu tshibi tshia kutshipa natshi bantu, tshia kufuisha natshi bantu bundu ku mesu a bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba anyi?" 
Jeremiah44:9 Nukadi bapue muoyi malu mabi onsu avua bankambua benu, bakalenga ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga mu Yuda, nuenu mene, ne bakaji benu, benza mu ditunga dia Yuda ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime anyi?" 
Jeremiah44:10 Too ne mpindiewu, muntu nansha umue kena unyingalala bua bionsu abi. Muntu nansha umue kena muangate bumfumu buanyi ne mushinga. Kena muenze bimvua mulongeshe. Kena mulame mikenji imvua munupeshe nuenu ne bankambua benu.”" 
Jeremiah44:11 Yirmeya kujikija meyi ende, wamba ne: — Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, wamba ne: “Ndi musue kunutumina makenga. Ndi musue kubutula tshisamba tshia Yuda tshionsu." 
Jeremiah44:12 ‘Nengangate bena Yuda bavua bashale, baye kusokoma mu Ejipitu. Bonsu nebafue. Mu ditunga edi ke muafuilabu bonsu nansha ku mvita, nansha ku tshiyole tshia nzala. Muntu kakushala ne muoyi to. Eyowa, nebafue nanku. Bantu nebabateke tshilejilu tshia kutshipa natshi, tshia kukuatshisha natshi bowa, tshia kufuisha natshi bundu." 
Jeremiah44:13 Nennyoke bonsu badi basombe mu Ejipitu ne mvita, ne tshiyole tshia nzala, ne disama dia tshiambu, bu mumvua munyoke bena Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah44:14 Munkatshi mua bena Yuda bavua bashale, baye kusokoma mu Ejipitu, muntu nansha umue kakunyema, kupingana mu ditunga dia Yuda to. Nansha bobu bikale ne dijinga dia kupingana kuabu, anu bena Yuda bakese nebapanduke, bua bapingane mu ditunga diabu, basombemu.”" 
Jeremiah44:15 Bantu balume bonsu, bavua bamanye muvua bakaji babu balambula mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu milambu. Bakaji bonsu aba bavua tshisumbu tshinene bunguile muaba awu. Mu tshikosu ke bantu bavua base mu Ejipitu, ne mu Patrose. Kuambilabu muambi Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah44:16 — Udi wamba ne: ndi nnuambila malu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kadi tudi tubenga kukuteleja. 
Jeremiah44:17 Netuenze anu tshitu-vua balaye. Netuambule Astarte, mvidie wetu, Mukalenga mukaji wa diulu, milambu ya manananshi ne ya maluvu a mvinyo. Ke mutuvua benza tuetu, ke muvua kabidi bankambua betu, bakalenga betu ne balombodi betu ba bukalenga benza mu bimenga bia Yuda ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime. Nanku tuvua ne biakudia bungi bukumbane. Bionsu bivua bienda amu bimpe. Katuvua tukenga nansha." 
Jeremiah44:18 Kadi katshia tulekela kufila milambu eyi ya manananshi ne ya maluvu kudi mvidie Astarte, Mukalenga mukaji wa mu diulu, tukadi bapange bintu bionsu. Tudi bapungile ne mvita kabidi ne tshiyole tshia nzala." 
Jeremiah44:19 Ke bakaji kuamba ne: — Patudi tulambula Mukalenga mukaji wa mu diulu milambu, katuvua bumvuangana ne babayetu anyi? Badi bamanye bimpe ne: tudi bimuenzela mikata idi ileja mpala wende, tudi tumutuadila kabidi milambu ya maluvu." 
Jeremiah44:20 Nanku, Yirmeya kuambila bantu bonsu, balume ne bakaji, bavua bamuandamuna nanku ne:" 
Jeremiah44:21 — Mu bimenga bia Yuda ne mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime nukavua balambule milambu eyi, nuenu, bankambua benu, bakalenga benu, balombodi benu ba mu bukalenga ne bana benu. Kadi binuvua benza ebi Mvidi Mukulu kavua mubimanye anyi? Nudi nuela meji ne: mmubipue muoyi anyi?" 
Jeremiah44:22 Nansha kakese! Maweja-Nangila kavua mua kuanyisha kabidi malu mabi enu. Ke pavuaye mubutule ditunga dienu, mudinyangakaje, bantu kabayi base kabidi mu ditunga edi. Dikadi dikuatshisha bowa. Dikadi bu tshilejilu tshia kutshipa natshi bantu. Nuenu bonsu nudi mua kujadika tshidiye wamba." 
Jeremiah44:23 ‘Lelu dikenga didi dinukuata edi, ndifike bualu nudi nulambula mvidie ya bantu ba bisamba bikuabu milambu. Nudi bena tshibawu. Kanuena bateleje tshivua Maweja-Nangila munuambile. Kanuena balonde tshivuaye munulongeshe. Kanuvua bangate mikenji ne mibelu yende ne mushinga." 
Jeremiah44:24 Yirmeya kuambila kabidi bantu bonsu abu balume ne bakaji ne: — Nuenu bonsu bena Yuda badi basomba mu Ejipitu, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila unuambila." 
Jeremiah44:25 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi unuambila ne: “Nuenu mene, ne bakaji benu, nuvua nuamba ne: netukumbaje malaya atuvua balaye Mukalenga mukaji wamu diulu. Nuvua bambe ne: netulambule milambu ya manananshi ne ya maluvu. Nuenu benza nanku, mbimpe! Nukumbaje tshinuvua bambe. Enzayi tshinuvua balaye!" 
Jeremiah44:26 Kadi diba adi, nuteleje bimpe tshindi nnuambila. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuambila bualu. Ndi nditshipa mu dina dianyi dialumu ne: Muena Yuda nansha umue kena mua kuditshipa, utela dina dianyi mu ditunga dia Ejipitu nansha. Kena mua kuamba kabidi ne: ‘Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi…’" 
Jeremiah44:27 Nennutumine dikenga. Tshiena nnutumina kabidi disanka to. Bena Yuda badi basombe kabidi mu Ejipitu nebafue bonsu, too ne wa ndekelu, ku mvita nansha ku tshiyole tshia nzala." 
Jeremiah44:28 Anu bantu bakese nebashale ne muoyi, nebanyeme ku mvita ya mu Ejipitu, nebapingane mu ditunga dia Yuda. Nanku bena Yuda bikale bashale ne muoyi nebajingulule ne: muaku udi ukumbana nnguanyi meme anyi, peshi nguenu nuenu?" 
Jeremiah44:29 Nennunyoke anu muaba ewu. Ndi nnuleja tshimanyinu. Nenku nenumanye mundi nkumbaja bimvua munumanyishe. Tshimanyinu mene ngetshi: 
Jeremiah44:30 Nemfile Ofra, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu mu bianza bia baluishi bende, badi bakeba kumushipa, anu mumvua mufile Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, kudi muluishi wende Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Jeremiah45:1 Pavua Baruke, muana wa Neriya, mufunde malu a Mvidi Mukulu avua Yirmeya mumuambile, Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, ukavua mukalenga wa bena Yuda bidimu binayi. Ke Yirmeya kuambila Baruke ne:" 
Jeremiah45:2 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi ukuambila wewe Baruke ne: 
Jeremiah45:3 Udi udila muadi ne: “Akia! Malu anyi onsu adi amu mabi! Meme mudianjile kuikala ne ntatu ya bungi, Maweja-Nangila, untumina kabidi mikuabu. Ndi mupungile ntua mikemu, tshiena ne dikisha nansha dikese!”" 
Jeremiah45:4 Nanku Maweja-Nangila mmungambile bua kukumanyisha ne: “Ndi nshimbula tshimvua muibake, ndi njuula tshimvua mukune. Ndi mbondakaja ditunga dijima." 
Jeremiah45:5 Kadi wewe udi ne dikamakama dia kukeba bidi bikusankisha amu wewe! Kukebi kantu nansha kamue to! Bualu dikenga dingatuma nedikuate bantu bonsu. Ke tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba. Kadi ndi nkulaya amu bualu bumue: Konsu kuudi musue kuya, kabakukushipa nansha!”" 
Jeremiah46:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila muambi Yirmeya malu adi atangila bisamba bikuabu. 
Jeremiah46:2 Umvuayi malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumanyishe bua Ejipitu, ne tshiluilu tshia Neko, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Neko uvua mu Karkemishe, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Perate, pavua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone mumutshimune. Bivua bienzeka tshidimu tshinayi tshivua Yoyakime, muana wa Yoshiya, mu bukalenga bua Yuda." 
Jeremiah46:3 Balombodi ba bena mvita ba bena Ejipitu badi bela mbila ne: “Longololayi ngabu, minene ne mikese. Tuyayi ku mvita." 
Jeremiah46:4 Suikayi nyama ya tubalu ku matempu. Bandayi pa nyama ya tubalu! Asayi tshifulu tshia mvita. Buelayi mu milongu! Nonayi mafuma enu, vualayi kazaku ka tshiamu.”" 
Jeremiah46:5 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi webeja ne: Bidi bienzeka mbinganyi? Tshindi mmona ntshinyi? Badi bumuka muaba udibu bimane, basemena panyima. Nansha bobu bilobu, badi babatshimuna! Bonsu badi banyema lubilu eku ne eku. Kabena batangila kunyima. Bowa budi butampakana miaba yonsu!" 
Jeremiah46:6 Nansha bena lubilu kabena mua kupanda. Nansha bilobu kabiena mua kupanduka. Kuaka ku mutu kua ditunga, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Perate, badi batetuka, badishinda panshi." 
Jeremiah46:7 Udi wenda uya kumpala bu musulu wa Nile udi uwula, upasalala ne muenji mukole, nganyi mene awu?" 
Jeremiah46:8 Ke Ejipitu! Uvua wamba ne: “Bu mudi musulu wa Nile upasalala ne muenji mukole, meme kabidi nempasalale nguwuje buloba bujima. Ndi nnyanga bimenga, ne bantu bavua basombemu." 
Jeremiah46:9 Nyama ya tubalu, tuyayi. Matempu a mvita, nyemayi lubilu! Nuenu bena Kushe, bilobu bia mvita. Nuenu bena Pute, bambudi ba ngabu mikese. Nuenu bena Lude, bedi ba mikete, nyemayi tumone! Pitayi kumpala tumone!”" 
Jeremiah46:10 Edi ke dituku didi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, utekemena. Ke dituku didiye usombuela bena lukuna bende! Muele wende udi bu nyama wa tshidika, udi ukuata bantu, udia uukuta! Udi unua mashi abu ukuatshika! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu udi ubutula bantu badi mu ditunga dia ku mutu, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Perate!" 
Jeremiah46:11 Wewe Ejipitu muena dikenga, banda too ne ku Ngilaade, ukeba buanga bua kudiondapa. Kadi udi ukeba manga, uditatshisha amu tshianana. Mputa yebe kayena mua kuuma nansha kakese." 
Jeremiah46:12 Bantu ba mu matunga makuabu mbumvue lumu lua makenga avuabu bakukengesha nawu. Miaba yonsu bavua bumvua miadi yebe! Tshilobu tshidi tshituuta kudi tshikuabu. Bonsu babidi badi batetuka, badishinda panshi." 
Jeremiah46:13 Musangu uvua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, mufike bua kuluisha bena Ejipitu, Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile muambi Yirmeya ne:" 
Jeremiah46:14 Manyisha bena Ejipitu, benamu Migdole, bena mu Memfise, ne bena mu Tapanese ne: “Elayi mualu wa mvita! Angatayi bia mvita mu bianza!” Bualu mvita ikadi yenda ibutula bena mutumba nenu!" 
Jeremiah46:15 Kadi bidi bienzeka mbinganyi? Bilobu biebe bidi panshi, Maweja-Nangila mmubole panshi kabayi batua nkanana!" 
Jeremiah46:16 Maweja-Nangila udi ushinda bena mvitaba bungi. Bakadi bambilangane ne: “Tupinganayi mu buetu buloba. Tunyemayi mvita, mmikole.”" 
Jeremiah46:17 Kadi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, bamubikile ne: “Muena kabuabua! ”" 
Jeremiah46:18 — Mukalenga udibu babikila ne: “Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu”, udi wamba uditshipa ne: Bu mundi ne muoyi bulelela, bu mudi mukuna wa Tabore munkatshi mua mikuna mikuabu, bu mudi mukuna wa Karmele mupite mayi manene bule. muluishi neafike munkatshi muenu ne bukole bupite." 
Jeremiah46:19 Bena Ejipitu, suikayi bintu bienu. Nukadi pa kuya mu ditunga dia bende mu bupika! Bualu tshimenga tshia Memfise netshikale tshipela tshidi tshienza bowa, muaba udi bantu kabayi mua kuasa." 
Jeremiah46:20 Ejipitu udi bu ngombe mulengele. Kadi dingulungu didi difuma ku mutu wa ditunga didi difika bua kumusuma. 
Jeremiah46:21 Nansha bena mvita bavua bena Ejipitu basumbe, badisha bimpe bu tuana tua ngombe, bonsu kuela nyima, kunyema lubilu. Muntu nansha umue kena utua nkanana, pandi mfika bua kubabutula, pandi musue kubanyoka." 
Jeremiah46:22 Bena mvita ba bena Ejipitu badi banyema, bela tshiona tshikese bu tshia nyoka, padi baluishi bafika basempela, mudi bakoshi ba mitshi benza mudimu ne bisuyi." 
Jeremiah46:23 Baluishi badi babakosa bu mitshi ya mu ditu dikole. Badi bafika bapite bungi bu mikongolu ya mpasu ya mukumbi. 
Jeremiah46:24 Ejipitu udi ne bundu, bualu udi mushale mu bianza bia bantu, badi bafume mu ditunga dia ku mutu." 
Jeremiah46:25 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: “Nennyoke Amone, mvidie wa mu Tebe, nennyoke Ejipitu ne mvidie yende ne bakalenga bende. Nennyoke mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bena diende." 
Jeremiah46:26 Nembafile kudi bantu badi bajinga kubashipa, mmomumue ne kudi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, ne bena mvita bende. “Kadi kunyima kua bidimu, bantu nebasombe tshiakabidi mu Ejipitu, bu muvuabu basombe kale.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba." 
Jeremiah46:27 Wewe Izrayele, muena mudimu wanyi, kutshinyi nansha. Kutekeshi mu maboku to. Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, ndi mvua kunusungidila mu matunga a kule. Ndi mvua kupikula bana benu mu ditunga didibu baya nabu mu bupika. wewe Izrayele neupete kabidi ditalala ne bupole. Muntu nansha umue kakukuenzela kabidi bibi to." 
Jeremiah46:28 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Wewe Izrayele muena mudimu wanyi, kuikadi ne bowa to. Bualu ndi nebe. Nembutule bisamba bionsu, miaba yonsu imvua munutangalaje. Kadi tshiakukubutula wewe to. Bushuwa mvua anu ne bua kukunyoka, bualu tshiena mua kukutangila bu muntu udi kayi muena tshibawu!" 
Jeremiah47:1 Umvuayi malu avua Maweja-Nangila muambile Yirmeya bua bena Peleshete. Uvua mumuambilewu pavua mukalenga wa Ejipitu kayi muanji kufika bua kuluisha tshimenga tshia Ngaza. 
Jeremiah47:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mayi manene adi afuma ku mutu kua ditunga adi ne muenji mukole, apasalala mu ditunga, mu madimi, mu bimenga ne mu nzubu ya bantu. Bantu bonsu badi bela miyenga. Bena ditunga badi badila miadi." 
Jeremiah47:3 Badi bumvua mikuma ya bikonu bia nyama ya tubalu, mutoyi wa matempu a mvita, ne wa nkata yawu itutakana. Baledi badi bapua bana babu muoyi, babashiya. Badi bimana maboku teketee." 
Jeremiah47:4 Ke dituku didibu ne bua kubutula bena Peleshete bonsu, nanku muntu nansha umue kakushala bua kuambuluisha bena Tire ne bena Sidone. Maweja-Nangila udi ubutula ditunga dijima dia bena Peleshete, ndelanganyi ya bantu aba bavua bafume ku tshidila tshia Kaftore." 
Jeremiah47:5 Bena Ngaza mbakungule mu mitu, badi mu madilu. Bena mu Askalone mbashale bapuwa ne kanyinganyinga. Nuenu ndelanganyi ya bantu ba mpolondu. Nenuditape mputa pambidi too ne ku diba kaayi?" 
Jeremiah47:6 Nudi nuamba ne: “Eyi, muele wa mvita wa Maweja-Nangila, kuena wikisha anyi? Pingana mu tshibubu tshiebe. Usombe talalaa, wikishe.”" 
Jeremiah47:7 — Kadi muele ewu newikishe munyi? Maweja-Nangila mumutumine diyi, muwambile bua kukengesha bena Askalone ne bantu badi basomba ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Jeremiah48:1 Maweja-Nangila wabukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi umanyisha mukenji udi utangila bena Mowabe, wamba ne: Bena Nebo nebakenge! Tshimenga tshiabu netshinyanguke! Bena Kiriyatayime nebafue bundu. Nebakuate tshimenga tshiabu. Bena Mowabe nebafue bundu, kabakuikala ne bukole kabidi!" 
Jeremiah48:2 Butumbi bua Mowabe buajiki. Mbelele tshimenga tshia Eshebone tshifufu tshibi bamba ne: “Tuyayi kubutula tshimenga etshi. Katshikadi kabidi ne muaba munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu!” Wewe kabidi tshimenga tshia Madmene neubutuke. Bena mvita nebafike bua kukuluisha. 
Jeremiah48:3 Bena mu tshimenga tshia Oronayime nebalombe diambuluisha, bela miyenga ne: “Badi batubutula! Badi banyanga bantu!”" 
Jeremiah48:4 Mowabe mmubutuke! Muadi wende udi umvuika too ne ku Soware. 
Jeremiah48:5 Bantu badi bashale ne muoyi nebabande ku mukuna wa Lukite, badila. Badi bapueka ku tshimenga tshia Oronayime, nebele mbila ya dikenga ne:" 
Jeremiah48:6 “Nyemayi muaba ewu bua kanufu to! Nushale mu tshipela bu nyama wa mpunde wa mu tshipela. ” 
Jeremiah48:7 Mowabe, wewe udi udimona ne bukole, ne bintu bia bungi. Kadi nebakukuate wewe kabidi! Kemoshe, mvidie webe, neaye mu ditunga dia bende mu bupika, kabidi ne batuangaji bebe, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buebe." 
Jeremiah48:8 Muena tshinyangu neapitshile ku tshimenga ne ku tshimenga, bua kubinyangakaja bionsu. Nansha bidi mu tshibandabanda, nansha bidi mu mpata nebinyanguke. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila muambe nanku." 
Jeremiah48:9 Longololayi lukita lua Mowabe. Bualu neabutuke kamuyi mpata. Bimenga biende nebinyanguke. Nebishale kabiyi ne bantu. 
Jeremiah48:10 Maweja-Nangila atshipe bantu, badi benza mudimu wende ne lulengu, babenga bua muele wende kaushipi bantu." 
Jeremiah48:11 Bituadije ku buana buende, Mowabe kavua ne dikenga nansha. Kabavua banji kuya nende mu bupika. Uvua musombe ku matshi talalaa, mudi maluvu a mvinyo mashale mu mulondu, bisekaseka bimane kupueka panshi. Kabavua banji kupongolola mu mulondu mukuabu. Maluvu awu avua amu ne muenyi wawu." 
Jeremiah48:12 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: dituku dikuabu nentumine Mowabe bantu bua bamupongolole. Nebapumune maluvu onsu adi mu milondu. Nebashipe milondu. 
Jeremiah48:13 Nebafuishe Mowabe bundu kudi mvidie wende Kemoshe, muvuabu bafuishe bena bukalenga bua bena Izrayele bundu kudi mvidie wabu wa ku Betele uvuabu batekemena bikole." 
Jeremiah48:14 Nuenu bena Mowabe, mmunyi munudi mua kuamba ne: “Tudi bilobu, tudi bantu badi bamanye mvita?”" 
Jeremiah48:15 Bantu badi ne bua kubutula ditunga dienu dia Mowabe bakadi bafike bua kuluisha bimenga bionsu. Bansongalume benu balenga nebaye kupetangana nabu bua kubashipa. Ke tshidi mukalenga munene, udi dina ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu wamba." 
Jeremiah48:16 Nuenu bena Mowabe kabutu kadi pabuipi, dikenga nedinukuate lukasa." 
Jeremiah48:17 Nuenu bonsu bena mutumba ne Mowabe badi bamumanye bimpe, muelayi muoyi wenu wa dibungama. Nudile ne: “Eyi mbabutule bukalenga buenu ne bukole buabu! Lumu luabu ndujimine!”" 
Jeremiah48:18 Bena Dibone, nutuluke mu nkuasa wenu wa lumu, nusombe mu lupuishi. Bualu baluishi bavua babutula Mowabe badi bafika bua kunuluisha nuenu. Badi bashimbula nzubu yenu inuvua bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Jeremiah48:19 Nuenu badi basombe mu Aroyere, nuimane ku muelelu wa njila nutentekele. Nukonke bantu badi banyema, badi bapanduka mu mvita ne: mvita mmipite munyi?" 
Jeremiah48:20 Nebanuandamune ne: — Bena Mowabe mbafue bundu! Mbabutuke! Elayi mbila, elayi mikunda, ambilayi badi basombe ku mielelu ya musulu wa Amone ne: Mbabutule Mowabe." 
Jeremiah48:21 Maweja-Nangila udi ukosa nsambu, unyoka ditunga didi mu mpata, ne tshimenga tshia Olone, tshia Yakase, tshia Mefaate," 
Jeremiah48:22 tshia Dibone, tshia Nebo, tshia Bete-Diblatayime," 
Jeremiah48:23 tshia Kiriyatayime, tshia Bete-Ngamule, tshia Bete-Meyone," 
Jeremiah48:24 tshia Keriyote ne tshia Bosra. Dinyoka didi dikuata bimenga bikuabu bionsu bia mu ditunga dia bena Mowabe, bidi kule ne bidi pabuipi." 
Jeremiah48:25 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: bukole bua bena Mowabe mbujike, bumfumu buabu mbumane kunyanguka." 
Jeremiah48:26 Bena Mowabe mbatombokele Maweja-Nangila. Nembanuishe maluvu bua bakuatshike, baluke, badishinde mu bilushi, bantu bonsu kubaseka." 
Jeremiah48:27 Bena Mowabe, mwuluke munuvua nuseka bena Izrayele, munuvua nukupa mutu, nubaseka bu bantu badibu bajikila biba bintu." 
Jeremiah48:28 Umukayi mu bimenga bienu, nuenu bena Mowabe. Nuase mu mbuebue nuidikije nyunyi ya nkutshi, idi yenza masua ayi ku mushiku wa lubuebue." 
Jeremiah48:29 Tuvua bumvue muvua bena Mowabe baditambisha, badisua bikole, bapepeja bantu bakuabu, baleja dikamakama, baditemba, baditeka ku mutu kua bantu bakuabu." 
Jeremiah48:30 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Meme kabidi ndi mubamanye. Badi bela nseke, baditambisha, kadi malu adibu benza kaena ne mushinga.”" 
Jeremiah48:31 Nanku pandi mvuluka bena Mowabe, ndi ndila muadi, nsengelela bantu bua bambuluishe bena Mowabe bonsu aba. Ndi ngela mbila, ndila bantu ba mu Kire-Erese." 
Jeremiah48:32 Ndi nkudila, wewe udi bu budimi bua mvinyo bua mu Sibma, bipite mundi ndila bantu ba mu Yazere. Wewe Sibma uvua molole mionji yebe, ivua mifike too ne ku Yazere, dishiya dia Mayi manene a luepu. Kadi baluishi bavua bakubutula, mu tshikondu tshivuabu bapole, bakama tumuma tua mvinyo." 
Jeremiah48:33 Mu madimi a mvinyo a bena Mowabe, kamuena kabidi disanka, kamuena kabidi musangelu. Kamuena maluvu a mvinyo adi mashale mu milondu. Kamuena kabidi bantu badi mua kukama tumuma tua mvinyo. Bantu kabena bumvua kabidi mbila yabu ya disanka, kadi amu dikenga." 
Jeremiah48:34 Bena Eshebone badi balomba diambuluisha. Bantu badi bumvua mbila yabu too ne ku Elale. Badi bumvua diyi diabu too ne ku Yakase, kabidi biangatshile ku Soware too ne ku Oronayime ne ku Eglate-Selishiya. Bualu nansha mpokolu wa ku Nimrime ukadi muume." 
Jeremiah48:35 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nembutule bena Mowabe badi baye muaba wa kutendelela, bua kulambula mvidie yabu milambu.”" 
Jeremiah48:36 Ke pandi ndila bena Mowabe ne bena Kire-Erese, mudi muntu wimba kasala ka madilu ne lushiba, bualu bionsu bivuabu nabi mbijimine." 
Jeremiah48:37 Bantu balume bonsu neakungule nsuki, babeya miedi yabu. Bavua batapa nsalu ku bianza biabu bienza mputa, bavuale bilamba bia lufuila." 
Jeremiah48:38 Kulu kua nzubu ne miaba yonsu idi bantu basangila, mu Mowabe, badi bumvua amu miyenga. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: — Ndi mubutule ditunga dia Mowabe, mudibu bashipa luesu ludi kaluyi ne mudimu. —" 
Jeremiah48:39 Nudile muadi ne: “Mowabe mmubutuke! Mmumvue bundu, bualu mmunyeme mvita!” Bena mutumba ba bena Mowabe, badi babaseka, babatshina." 
Jeremiah48:40 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Baluishi badi bajemba padi bena Mowabe, mudi nyunyi ya mikanku ijemba mulu.”" 
Jeremiah48:41 Nebakuate bimenga, nebabuele mu nzubu mikolesha ne bimana. Bilobu bia mvita bia bena Mowabe, bidi ne dikenga bu dia mukaji pa lulelu." 
Jeremiah48:42 Ditunga dia Mowabe ndibutuke. Tshisamba tshia bena Mowabe katshienaku kabidi to. Bualu tshivua tshitombokela Maweja-Nangila. 
Jeremiah48:43 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bowa, dijimba ne bukondu bidi bimuindile!" 
Jeremiah48:44 Muntu udi unyema mvita, bua bowa, neadishinde mu dijimba. Udi upatuka mu dijimba, nebamukuate mu bukondu. Ke dikenga dindi mulongoluele ditunga dia Mowabe, pangafika bua kudinyoka." 
Jeremiah48:45 Badi banyema mvita mbapungile. Badi bakeba muaba wa kuikisha mu tshimenga tshia Eshebone, tshivuabu balombole kale kudi mukalenga wa Sikone. Kadi kapia kavua kuosha ditunga dijima dia bilobu ebi, ku mikalu too ne munda mua ditunga." 
Jeremiah48:46 Nuenu bena Mowabe, nudi bena diakabi. Nuenu bavua batendelela mvidie wa Kemoshe, nudi nufua. Bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji badi babakuata mu lukanu, baye nabu." 
Jeremiah48:47 “Kadi dituku dikuabu, ditunga dia Mowabe nedipete kabidi diakalenga kundi. “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika bualu ebu.” Ke muvua Maweja-Nangila mukose tshilumbu tshia bena Mowabe nanku." 
Jeremiah49:1 Bua bidi bitangila bena Amone, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mvidie Milkome uvua mukuate, buloba bua Ngade bua tshinyi? Bena Amone badi basomba mu bimenga bia bena Izrayele bua tshinyi? Bena Izrayele kabena ne bana badi mua kupiana buloba buabu anyi?”" 
Jeremiah49:2 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Dituku diadia bantu badi basomba mu Raba, tshimenga tshinene tshia bena Amone, nebumvue mutoyi wa mvita. Tshimenga etshi netshishale tshipela. Misoku idi natshi mutumba nebayibutule ne kapia. Diba adi, Izrayele neangate tshiakabidi buloba buvua buende.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah49:3 Nuenu bena Eshebone dilayi muadi. Nuambe ne: “Tshimenga tshia Ayi ntshibutuke.” Nuenu misoku idi mutumba ne Raba, lombayi bua banuambuluishe. Luatayi bilamba bia lufuila. Dilayi muadi. Lambakanayi mu lupangu eku ne kuaka: mvidie Milkome udi uya mu ditunga dia bende mu bupika, pamue ne batuangaji bende ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga." 
Jeremiah49:4 Eyi, wewe Raba mushikankunde mutomboke, uvua uditambisha bua bintu bivule bidi mu tshibandabanda tshia mushinga mukole. Uvua ukonka ne: “Udi mua kunduisha nnganyi?”" 
Jeremiah49:5 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi. Mukulu wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Ndi nkutumina mvita ifuma nseke yonsu. Nennukuatshishe bowa bukole. Nebanuipate bonsu, nunyeme, kanuyi nutangila panyima. Kakuakushala muntu udi mua kusangisha kabidi bantu badi banyema." 
Jeremiah49:6 Kadi dituku dikuabu, ditunga dia Mowabe nedipete kabidi diakalenga kundi.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah49:7 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi umanyisha malu adi atangila bena Edome, wamba ne: Bena meji kabena kabidi mu Temane anyi? Bena lungenyi lutue kabena mua kufila kabidi ngenyi anyi? Lungenyi luabu ndunyanguke anyi?" 
Jeremiah49:8 Bena Dedane, kudimukayi, nunyeme! Nusombe ku mbuebue, bualu ndi imubutula anu mpindiewu, nuenu ndelanganyi ya Esawu. Ke tshikondu tshindi ne bua kununyoka!" 
Jeremiah49:9 Padi banowi bafika muenu, kabakushiya tshisangi nansha tshimue tshia tumuma tua mvinyo to. Pabuela bivi butuku, nebanyange bintu bionsu, kabayi bashiya tshintu." 
Jeremiah49:10 Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Esawu, meme Maweja-Nangila nennufile mu bianza bia baluishi benu. Nembaleje muaba unudi kanuyi mua kusokoma kabidi to. Tshisamba tshienu ntshibutuke. Muena mutumba nansha umue kena mua kuamba ne:" 
Jeremiah49:11 “Panuafua, meme nendishe bana benu ba nshiya, nendame bakaji benu bakamba bimpe.”" 
Jeremiah49:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuteleje bimpe, bantu bamvua tshiyi musue kunuishila mu dikopu, bavua bumvue makenga makole amvua mubatumine bua tshiji. Kadi wewe Edome udi wela meji ne: kuena muena tshibawu anyi? Udi amu muena tshibawu. Nanku makenga andi ntuma bua tshiji neakukuate!" 
Jeremiah49:13 Ndinditshipane: Bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu, tshimenga tshiebe tshikulu tshia Bosra netshikale tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa. Netshikale dikolu, muaba udibu batela bu tshilejilu padibu bela mulawu. Bimenga bidi mutumba ne Bosra nebibutuke tshiendelele.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila muambe nanku." 
Jeremiah49:14 Maweja-Nangila uvua mutume mukenji kudi muntu umanyisha bukua bisamba ne: “Nsangishilayi bena mvita benu, nuye kuluisha bena Edome. Jukayi nuye kubanga mvita." 
Jeremiah49:15 Wewe Edome, nenkuenze tshisamba tshishadile ku bisamba bikuabu bionsu. Tshisamba tshidi bantu bonsu bapetula," 
Jeremiah49:16 Uvua ukuatshisha bantu bonsu bowa. Uvua udimona bu udi mupile bisamba bionsu. Kadi uvua udidinga. Nansha wewe musombe mu mbuebue, nansha wewe muase pa mikuna mitumbuke, nansha wewe muenzele disua diebe kulu kupita, mudi nyunyi wa tshiminyi wenza, kadi nenkukulule panshi.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah49:17 “Edome neabutuke. Bantu bonsu badi bapitshila mu njila nebakuatshike bowa, bazakala, pamonabu kabutu ka Edome." 
Jeremiah49:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Kabutu kabu nebafuanangane ne ka tshimenga tshia Sodome, tshia Ngomore, ne tshia bimenga bidibu nabi mutumba. Muntu nansha umue kakusomba kabidi mu Edome.”" 
Jeremiah49:19 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nengikale bu nyama wa ntambue, udi upatuka mu metu adi ku muelelu wa Yardene, uya muaba muimpe wa kuikishila mu tshipela, muaba utshidi ne biakudia. Nennyemeshe bantu bonsu badi muaba awu musangu umue. Mu ditunga dia Edome nenteke mukalenga undi musungule. Bualu, udi mutufuane meme nnganyi? Udi mua kungasa tshilumbu nnganyi? Mulombodi udi mua kuntuila nkanana udiku anyi?”" 
Jeremiah49:20 Nanku, teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue kuenzela bena Edome, tshidiye mulongoluele bena Temane. Kanuedi mpata: bana ne bena butekete mene, nebaye nabu bonsu, bu mudibu basaka bimuna." 
Jeremiah49:21 Padi Edome udishinda panshi, bantu bonsu nebakuatshike bowa, bazakala, buloba bujima nebuzakale. Mbila ya bantu badi balomba diambuluisha neyumvuike too ne ku Mayi manene makunze." 
Jeremiah49:22 Baluishi nebatantshile pabuipi ne Bosra mudi nyunyi wa mukanku ujinguluka mulu. Dituku adi, bilobu bia mvita bia bena Edome nebikenge bu mukaji udi pa lulelu." 
Jeremiah49:23 Bua bena Damase Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena mu tshimenga tshia Amate ne tshia Arpade, nebakuatshike bowa bunene pumvuabu lumu lubi. Nebazakale kabayi bapeta dikisha." 
Jeremiah49:24 Bena Damase nebatekete mu mikolu. Nebapingane tshianyima, banyema. Nebumvue bowa, bakenga bu mukaji udi ukeba kulela." 
Jeremiah49:25 Tshimenga etshi tshivua ne lumu, tshivua tshisankisha, mudibu batshishiya bonsu mbishi?" 
Jeremiah49:26 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Bansongalume ba mu tshimenga nebafuile mu tshimenga. Bena mvita bonsu nebafue dituku adi. 
Jeremiah49:27 Nengoshe tshimenga tshia Damase. Kapia nekoshe nzubu wa bukalenga wa Benadade. 
Jeremiah49:28 Bua bena Arabe ba mu Kedare ne bua makalenga a Ashore bivua Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone mutshimune, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Jukayi, nuye kuluisha bena Kedare. Nubutule bisamba bidi mu tshipela luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Jeremiah49:29 Nuangate ntenta yabu ne bimuna biabu, ngabu yabu ne mabuki abu onsu! Nukuate nyama yabu ya tumelu. Nuele mbila nuambila bena Kedare ne: “Bowa mbunukuate miaba yonsu. ”" 
Jeremiah49:30 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena Arabe, nyemayi lubilu, nubuele mu mbuebue, nusokomemu. Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, mmumane kujadika bua kunuenzela bibi, mmumane kunulongoluela mvita." 
Jeremiah49:31 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Jukayi nuye kuluisha bantu aba, badi kabayi bumvua lutatu, basombe amu talalaa. Bimenga biabu kabiena ne tshiibi nansha bikuvu. Badi basombe amu pa nkayabu, ku mpenga." 
Jeremiah49:32 Muluishi neangate nyama yabu ya tumelu. Neabanyenge bimuna biabu bivule mu mvita. Nentangalaje bantu bonsu aba, badi bakungula nsuki pa mpipu. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Jeremiah49:33 Tshimenga tshia Ashore netshikale muaba udi nyama ya mibuabua ilala, tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bowa kashidi. Muntu nansha umue kakuasamu nansha kusokomamu to." 
Jeremiah49:34 Maweja-Nangila uvua muambile muambi Yirmeya mukenji udi utangila bena Elame. Mukenji ewu uvua mumuambilewu ku ntuadijilu kua bukalenga bua Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda."
