Jeremiah49:35 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu uvua muambe ne: “Nentshibule buta bua bena Elame, bualu ke muaba udi bukole buabu." 
Jeremiah49:36 Ndi ntumina bena Elame mpepele musangu umue, ifuma ku ntengu yonsu inayi ya buloba. Nanku nembatangalaje nseke yonsu. Bena tshimuangi ba bena Elame nenubasangane mu matunga onsu." 
Jeremiah49:37 Nenkuate mudimu bua bena Elame batshine baluishi babu, badi basue kubashipa. Bu mundi ne tshiji tshikole, nembakengeshe, nembalondakaje ne mvita too ne mungababutula bonsu." 
Jeremiah49:38 Nenshipeshe mukalenga wa bena Elame, ne balombodi ba ditunga. Meme, nenteke nkuasa wanyi wa bumfumu muaba awu.” Ke Maweja-Nangila udi wamba awu." 
Jeremiah49:39 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: Kadi dikuabu dituku, bena Elame nebapete kabidi diakalenga kundi.”" 
Jeremiah50:1 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumanyishe Yirmeya mukenji udi utangila bena Babilone ne tshimenga tshiabu tshinene tshia Babilone wamba ne: 
Jeremiah50:2 Numanyishe bantu bonsu lumu elu: Nuambile bantu bonsu bidi bienzeka. Kanusokoki bualu nansha bumue! Eyowa, baluishi nebakuate Babilone. Mpingu yende neifue bundu! Mvidie yende ya dishima neyizakale! Eyowa Bele neafue bundu! Marduke neazakale." 
Jeremiah50:3 Tshisamba tshidi tshiluisha Babilone, netshifumine ku mutu wa ditunga. Netshinyange ditunga, dishale tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa. Muntu nansha umue kakusombamu. Bantu ne nyama bionsu nebinyeme." 
Jeremiah50:4 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: diba adi nuenu bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda, nenupingane musangu umue, nuenda nudila muadi, nunkeba meme Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Jeremiah50:5 Nenukebe njila udi muye ku Siyone. Bualu ke muaba unudi nuenda nukeba. Nenufike kundi bua meme kutua nenu ndondu wa kashidi, unudi kanuyi mua kupua muoyi tshiendelele." 
Jeremiah50:6 Bantu banyi bavua bu tshisumbu tshia mikoku mipambuke. Balami bayi ke bavua bayipambuishe. Ke bavua bayilekelela, itambakana eku ne eku pa mikuna, kayiyi ivuluka kabidi lupangu luayi." 
Jeremiah50:7 Muntu yonsu uvua ubapeta, uvua anu ubaluisha. Baluishi babu bavua bamba ne: “Tuetu katuena tuenza bualu bubi nansha. Bantu aba badi bena tshibawu, batombokela Maweja-Nangila uvua ubapesha bionsu bivuabu nabi dikenga. Bankambua babu bavua bamutekemena amu yeye.”" 
Jeremiah50:8 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila utuma diyi ne: “Patukayi lubilu mu Babilone, umukayi mu ditunga edi. Fuilakanayi mushiku wa mbelu mudi mbuji ya mpumbu ifuilakana kumpala kua mikoku." 
Jeremiah50:9 Bualu nentume tshisumbu tshia bantu ba bisamba, bidi ne bukole, bua baluishi bena Babilone. Bantu abu nebafume ku mutu kua ditunga. Nebele mualu wa mvita, bakuate Babilone. Badi bela miketa ifika anu muaba udibu bakidila, amu mudi tshilobu tshia mvita katshiyi tshipingana bianza bitupu." 
Jeremiah50:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nebapawule ditunga dia bena Babilone. Bonsu badi badikuate nebikale ne disanka. 
Jeremiah50:11 Eyowa, sankayi anu kusanka, nudiele kalumbandi! Nuenu bavua bakuate ditunga divua dianyi meme, nutupike mudi bana ba ngombe batupika mu bisosa. Nuele mikunda mudi nyama milume ya tubalu yela." 
Jeremiah50:12 Tshimenga tshienu tshinene nebatshikengeshe, batshipeshe. Tshisamba tshienu netshikale tshia ndekelu ku bisamba bionsu. Netshishale tshipela, buloba buume, buatuke.”" 
Jeremiah50:13 Bua tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila, ditunga dia Babilone nedishale munda mutupu, nedishale anu tshipela. Bantu badi bapitshila mu njila, basemena pabuipi ne Babilone, nebakeme, nebazakale, nebele bibingu, pamonabu mudi bionsu binyanguke." 
Jeremiah50:14 Nuenu bonsu bedi ba mikete, nufike, nuele mualu wa mvita. Nunyungulule tshimenga tshia Babilone, nutshiase mikete yenu, nutshiase anu kutshiasa, kanuyi nubala bungi bua mikete yenu. Bualu ke tshimenga tshivua tshitombokela Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah50:15 Elayi bibingu bia mvita nseke yonsu ya tshimenga! Monayi bena Babilone badi badifila, bela maboku mulu, mu bianza bia baluishi babu. Baluishi badi bashimbula tuleya tuatshi, bambula bimana biatshi. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila udisombuela. Nuenzele bena Babilone bivuabu benzele bantu bakuabu." 
Jeremiah50:16 Mu ditunga dia Babilone, nushipe bantu bonsu ne badi bamiamina ne badi banowa. Kadi bantu benyi badi mu ditunga, banyeme mvita, bualu idi mikole, bapingane muntu kuabu, muntu kuabu." 
Jeremiah50:17 Bena Izrayele bavua bu mikoku mipambuke, ivua nyama ya ntambue ipatshila. Mukalenga wa bena Ashure uvua wa kumpala, uvua muyidie. Pashishe, Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa bena Babilone, uvua muyitshibule mifuba." 
Jeremiah50:18 Nanku Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Nennyoke mukalenga wa bena Babilone ne ditunga diende, bu mumvua munyoke kale mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Jeremiah50:19 Kadi nempingaje bena Izrayele mu lupangu luabu. Nebapete biakudia bivule mu mpata mimpe, pa mukuna wa Karmele ne mu mpata ya Bashane, pa mukuna wa Efrayime ne mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Kabakupanga tshintu to." 
Jeremiah50:20 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Tshikondu atshi, bantu nebakebe bilema bidi bena Izrayele nabi. Kadi kabakubisangana to. Nebakebe tshilema tshia bena Yuda, kadi kabakumona nansha tshimue to. Bualu bantu bandi mushiye ne muoyi, nembafuile luse." 
Jeremiah50:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuye kuluisha ditunga dia Maratime, nuluangane ne bena mu Pekode, nubashipe, nubabutule bonsu. Nukumbaje bionsu bimvua munutumine diyi." 
Jeremiah50:22 Bantu bakadi bumvua mutoyi wa mvita mu ditunga. Kabutu kakadi pabuipi! 
Jeremiah50:23 Mudi bualu bua nanku buenzeka mbishi? Ditunga dia Babilone divua dia ngindu wa bujitu, uvua uzaza buloba bonsu. Kadi ngindu awu, mbamane kumutshibula, mbamane kumuzaza. Ditunga edi dikadi bu tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bowa. munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu. Mudi bualu bua nanku buenzeka mmunyi?" 
Jeremiah50:24 Wewe ditunga dia Babilone, mvua mukulongoluele buteyi! Buteyi kukukuata, kuyi nansha mua kudimuka! Bavua bakasangana mukuata mu buteyi! Bualu uvua unduisha meme Maweja-Nangila,”" 
Jeremiah50:25 Maweja-Nangila udi unzulula diyeba diende. Udi upatulamu bia mvita bua kuleja nabi tshiji tshiende. Mu ditunga dia bena Babilone, bantu nebamone mudimu udi Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ukuata." 
Jeremiah50:26 Nuenu bantu badi bafume ku nseke yonsu, buelayi mu Babilone. Unzululayi mayeba ende. Nukunguje mishiki ya bintu binudi nupawula. Nubutule tshimenga! Kamushadi nansha kantu!" 
Jeremiah50:27 Nushipe bilobu biende bionsu! Nuye nabi ku tshishipelu, mudibu benza ne ngombe milume. Bena Babilone nudi bena diakabi. Dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ne bua kununyoka, ndimane kufika!" 
Jeremiah50:28 Bantu bavua bapanduke mu mvita, bavua banyema mu ditunga dia Babilone, ke badi bafika mu Siyone, bela mbila ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu mmudisombuele. Mmunyoke bena Babilone bua nzubu wende wa tshijila uvuabu banyange." 
Jeremiah50:29 Nubikidishe bedi ba mikete bonsu. Nubatume baye kuluisha bena Babilone. Base mitanda yabu banyungulukile tshimenga. Muntu nansha umue kamonyi mua kunyema! Nupingajile bena Babilone bibi bivuabu benzelangana. Nubakengeshe muvuabu bakengeshangana. Bualu bavua badileja ne dikamakama kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele." 
Jeremiah50:30 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bansongalume ba mu Babilone nebafue mu misesu, bena mvita bende bonsu nebabashipe anu dituku adi.”" 
Jeremiah50:31 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Ndi nkuluisha wewe ditunga dia Babilone, bualu udi uditambisha. Dituku dia kukunyoka ndimane kufika!" 
Jeremiah50:32 Muena ditambisha neatetuke, adishinde. Kakuena muntu udi umujula. Nengoshe bimenga biende ne kapia. Nebanyange bionsu bidibu nabi pabuipi." 
Jeremiah50:33 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele udi wamba ne: Bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda badi babakengesha kudi bantu badi babakuate mu bupika. Badi babalame ku bukole, babenga bua bapingane kuabu." 
Jeremiah50:34 Kadi udi mua kupikula bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda udi ne bukole! Ke meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu! Ndi ngangata tshilumbu tshiabu ne manza abidi! Nembueje bupole pa buloba. Nenzakeje bena Babilone. 
Jeremiah50:35 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bashipe bena Babilone, bashipe bantu ba mu tshimenga tshinene, bashipe balombodi ba mu bukalenga ne bena meji." 
Jeremiah50:36 Bashipe bambi babu ba dishima, mbantu bapale! Bashipe bena mvita babu, bowa bubakuate!" 
Jeremiah50:37 Bashipe nyama yabu ya tubalu, ne matempu abu a mvita. Bashipe bena mvita ba mu bisamba bikuabu bavua baluila bena Babilone mvita. Luzakalu ndubakuate! Bakaji nyangayi biuma biabu! Bipawulayi!" 
Jeremiah50:38 Umishayi mayi mu ditunga, misulu yonsu yume. Bualu ditunga edi nediuwule ne mpingu tente! Bonsu badi bayinemeka, bakadi bajimija lungenyi." 
Jeremiah50:39 Nanku nyama ya tuanda ne ya bimungu neyibuele mu tshimenga. Nyunyi idi ne mikiya neisombemu. Kadi, bantu kabakuasa, kabakusomba kabidi mu ditunga dia Babilone kashidi kashidi." 
Jeremiah50:40 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nenyangakaje ditunga dia Babilone, mumvua munyange Sodome, Ngomore ne bimenga bivua nabi mutumba. Muntu kakuasa, kakusombamu kabidi to." 
Jeremiah50:41 Tshisamba tshidi tshifuma ku mutu kua ditunga, tshia bantu ba bungi, tshia bakalenga banene, badi bafuma ku ndekelu kua buloba." 
Jeremiah50:42 Bena mvita batshi badi basempela ne mafuma ne miele, bantu ba tshikisu, kabayi ne luse. Badi benza mutoyi, mudi mayi ela mavuala. Badi babanda pa nyama ya tubalu, bela mualu wa mvita, benda mu milongu, bua kukuluisha wewe Babilone!" 
Jeremiah50:43 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia Babilone, upeta lumu lua mvita, mu mikolu kumuteketa. Bowa kumukuata bu mukaji pa lulelu." 
Jeremiah50:44 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nengikale bu nyama wa ntambue, udi upatuka mu metu a ku muelelu wa Yardene, ubuela mu madimi a biakudia. Nennyemeshe bantu bonsu musangu umue. Mu ditunga dia Edome, nenteke mukalenga undi musungule. Bualu udi m umfuane meme, nnganyi? Udi mua kungasa tshilumbu, nnganyi? Mulombodi udi mua kuntuila nkanana, udiku anyi?”" 
Jeremiah50:45 Nanku, telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue kuenzela bena Babilone, tshidiye mulongoluela bantu bende. Kanuedi mpata: bana ne bena butekete mene, nebaye nabu bonsu, bu mudibu basaka bimuna." 
Jeremiah50:46 Padibu bela mbila ne: “Baluishi mbakuate Babilone,” buloba nebuzakale, miadi ya bena Babilone neyumvuike mu bisamba bionsu." 
Jeremiah51:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nentume tshipepela tshikole tshidi mua kubutula ditunga dia Babilone, ne bantu bende." 
Jeremiah51:2 Nentumine bena Babilone bantu benyi bua babipate mu ditunga diabu, mudi lupepela lupepula bisota. Dituku dindi ne bua kunyoka bena Babilone, baluishi babu nebafume nseke yonsu. Nebanyange ditunga kabayi bashiya kantu nansha kamue.”" 
Jeremiah51:3 Nuenu badi ne buta, elayi mikete yenu mu tshimenga! Nuluishe badi baditambisha bua kazaku ka tshiamu, kadibu bavuala. Kanufuidi bena mvita bansonga luse. Nubutule tshiluilu tshiabu tshijima!" 
Jeremiah51:4 Bantu bavuabu batape mputa nebalale panshi, mu buloba bua Babilone. Bitalu bia bantu bafuile mu mvita nebiuwule mu misesu ya tshimenga tente." 
Jeremiah51:5 Bualu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu wa bukole buonsu, ki mmubenge bena Izrayele ne bena Yuda. Kadi bena Babilone mbenzele Maweja-Nangila wa tshijila wa Izrayele bibi bitambe." 
Jeremiah51:6 Umukayi mu Babilone nunyeme lubilu bua nupande. Kabanushipi nuenu, bua bilema bia bena Babilone. Maweja-Nangila udi udisombuela. Ke tshikondu tshidiye upingajila bena Babilone, bibi bionsu bivuabu benza." 
Jeremiah51:7 Ditunga dia Babilone divua mu tshianza tshia Maweja-Nangila bu dikopu dia tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Bantu ba buloba bujima bavua banuinamu maluvu, bakuatshika. Bisamba bionsu bivua bijimija lungenyi, pavuabi binua maluvu avuamu." 
Jeremiah51:8 Kadi dikopu edi kubafuka ku bianza, kudituuta panshi, kupandika tupese tupese. — Eyi, ashilayi Babilone muadi, numukebele buanga bua kumuondapa, ne udi mua kusanguluka!" 
Jeremiah51:9 Kadi benyi bonsu badi basomba mu Babilone, badi bamba ne: — Tuvua bondapa Babilone, kadi kena musanguluke to. Nanku tumuke tumushiye. Tupingane muntu kuende, muntu kuende. Bualu tshibawu tshiende ntshinene tshipite. Udi umunyoka ke Muena Kulu!" 
Jeremiah51:10 Maweja-Nangila mmutubingishe. Tuyayi ku Siyone, tumanyishe badimu malu onsu avua Maweja-Nangila mutuenzele." 
Jeremiah51:11 Maweja-Nangila udi musue kubutula ditunga dia Babilone. Udi ukolesha bakalenga ba bena Madayi ku muoyi, bua bakumbaje tshidiye musue. Udi udisombuela, bua nzubu wende wa tshijila uvuabu banyange. Nonayi mikete yenu, nuyele tente mu nsapu." 
Jeremiah51:12 Nuele diyi dia nuenu kubanga kuluisha bimenga bia Babilone. Nuteke bena mvita ku nseke yonsu ya tshimenga. Nuteke batentekedi. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila ukumbaja tshivuaye mujadike bua kuenzela bena Babilone. 
Jeremiah51:13 Wewe Babilone, udi muase ku muelelu wa musulu munene. Wewe udi ne biuma bivule, kuebe nkujika, wabutuku." 
Jeremiah51:14 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu mmuditshipe wamba ne: “Bu mundi Mvidi Mukulu mulelela, nentume bantu bapite bungi, bu mukongolu wa mpasu. Nebabuele mu ditunga diebe, nebele bibingu bia mvita.”" 
Jeremiah51:15 Maweja-Nangila mmuleje bukole buende pa kufuka buloba. Mmuleje lungenyi luende, bualu mmushidike buloba ne bionsu bidimu. Diulu dialabale didi dileja meji adiye nawu." 
Jeremiah51:16 Yeye mutume amu diyi mayi adi unguila mu diulu, mavuba manene adi abanda afuma ku muelelu kua buloba. Mikenya idi ipenya, ileja mvula njila. Mpepele idi ipatuka mu mayeba a Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah51:17 Padi bantu bamona bionsu ebi, badi bu bantu bapale, kabayi bajingulula bidi bienzeka. Bonsu bavua basonga mpingu, badi bafue bundu, bualu mpingu yabu ayi idi anu idinga bantu. Kayena yeyela, kayena ne mushinga." 
Jeremiah51:18 Bintu abi bidi bisekesha bantu. Maweja-Nangila neabimanshe bionsu. Pafikaye bua kukosa nsambu. 
Jeremiah51:19 Maweja-Nangila wa Izrayele kena bu mpingu ayi to, bualu Yeye ke udi mufuke bintu bionsu. Mmusungule tshisamba tshia Izrayele, bua tshikale tshiende yeye. Dina diende: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu." 
Jeremiah51:20 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Wewe Babilone, uvua bu ngindu wanyi, uvua bu tshiamu tshianyi tshia mvita, bua meme kushipa natshi bisamba, kubutula natshi makalenga." 
Jeremiah51:21 Meme kuzaza nebe nyama ya tubalu, ne bantu badi babandapu. Meme kuboza nebe matempu ne bantu bavua baendesha." 
Jeremiah51:22 Meme kushipa nebe balume ne bakaji, bana ne bantu bakole, bansongalume ne bansongakaji." 
Jeremiah51:23 Meme kushipa nebe balami ba mikoku ne mikoku yabu, babidime ne nyama ivuabu badima nayi, balombodi ba ditunga ne bamfumu bakuabu." 
Jeremiah51:24 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Mpindiewu nenumone mundi mpingajila bena Babilone malu mabi onsu avuabu benzela Siyone. 
Jeremiah51:25 Eyowa, wewe Babilone, ndi nebe ne tshilumbu. Udi bu nyama mubi udi ukeba kubutula bionsu bidi pa buloba. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila ndi muluishi webe! Nenkukuate mu bianza, nenkuele mu kandondu, nenkoshe ne kapia." 
Jeremiah51:26 Kabakusangana kabidi muebe nansha dibue didibu mua kuasa ku ditumba dia nzubu, nansha ku bitaku biende. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Neushale kashidi tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa." 
Jeremiah51:27 Nuele diyi bua babange kuluisha Babilone. Nuele mpungi bua bantu ba bisamba bionsu bumvue. Nutuadije mvita. Nubikidishe bantu ba mu bukalenga bua Ararate, bua Mini ne bua Ashekenaze, Nusungule bantu badi mua kulombola bena mvita. Nutume ku mvita nyama ya tubalu bungi bu mukongolu wa mpasu ya mukumbi." 
Jeremiah51:28 Nusangishe bena mvita bonsu, nangananga bakalenga ne bena Madayi, ne balombodi ne bamfumu babu, ne bantu ba matunga onsu adi ku diyi diabu." 
Jeremiah51:29 Buloba budi buzakala! Tshikumina tshidi tshienzeka! Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ukumbaja tshivuaye muambe. Udi unyoka ditunga dia Babilone. Udi udienza tshipela, muaba udi bantu kabayi mua kusomba." 
Jeremiah51:30 Bilobu bia mvita bia mu Babilone bikadi bilekela kuluangana mvita. Bikadi bisokoma mu nzubu yabi. Kabitshiena ne bukitu, bikadi bu bakaji. Baluishi mbamane kuupula biibi bia tshimenga, mbamane kuela kapia ku nzubu yatshi." 
Jeremiah51:31 Badi batuma bantu bua banyeme lubilu, bafike kua mukalenga wa Babilone, bamuambile ne: baluishi mbakuate tshimenga tshiebe tshijima tshia Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:32 Badi balama malobu, bosha nzubu yetu ituvua bakolesha ne bimana. Bena mvita betu badi bazakala bikole." 
Jeremiah51:33 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, udi wamba ne: Ditunga dia Babilone dikadi bu buloba bua tshituilu budibu badiata, bua bamone mua kushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula. Nenku tshikondu tshia kunowa tshikadi pabuipi." 
Jeremiah51:34 “Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, mmundie, mmunsunsule, mmushiye bu dilongu didi munda mutupu. Mmumine bu mudi nyama wa tshidika wenza. Udi muwuje difu tente ne bintu bilenga bionsu bimvua nabi. Pashishe yeye kungimansha." 
Jeremiah51:35 Bantu ba mu Siyone badi bajinga ne: Bapingajile Babilone bibi bionsu bivuaye mutuenzele. Meme Yerushalayime ndi ngamba ne: Banyoke bena Babilone bua mashi etu avuabu bapumune!” 
Jeremiah51:36 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila bena Yerushalayime ne: “Tshilumbu tshiebe ndi ntshiangata ne manza abidi. Ndi nkunsombuela, ngumishe musulu wa Perate, nenkamishe mpokolu ya Babilone." 
Jeremiah51:37 Nembutule tshimenga tshia Babilone, netshishale muaba udi nyama ya mibuabua ilala, tshimenga tshidi bantu kabayi mua kuasa, tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa, tshidi bantu batele bazakala." 
Jeremiah51:38 Eyowa, bena Babilone batshidi bonsu bu nyama ya ntambue idi idila pamue, bu nyama ya lonji idi ikungula, nzala mikole mimane kuyisuma." 
Jeremiah51:39 Ndi nyilongoluela didia dinene, nenyinuishe maluvu ikuatshike. Neilale bua kashidi, kayena mua kujuka kabidi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Jeremiah51:40 Ndi mfila bena Babilone ku tshishipelu mudibu bafila mikoku, bimpanga nansha mbuji ya mpumbu.”" 
Jeremiah51:41 Akia! Ebi mbienzeke munyi? Mudibu bakuata tshimenga tshia Sheshake, tshivua ne butumbi mu buloba bujima mbishi? Ebi mbienzeke munyi? Munkatshi mua bisamba bionsu, Babilone ukadi tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa!" 
Jeremiah51:42 Mayi manene kufika too ne ku Babilone, kumubikila ne muenji mukole." 
Jeremiah51:43 Bimenga biende mbinyanguke! Ditunga diende dikadi tshipela, muaba udi bantu kabayi mua kusomba, muaba udi bantu kabayi nansha mua kupitshila." 
Jeremiah51:44 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nennyoke Baale, mvidie wa bena Babilone. Nemmulukishe bintu bionsu bivuaye mumine. Bisamba bia bantu kabiena bifika kabidi kudiye bua kumulambula. Bimana bia tshimenga tshia Babilone nebiupuke panshi." 
Jeremiah51:45 Nuenu bantu banyi, umukayi mu tshimenga tshia Babilone. Muntu yonsu anyeme lubilu bua ashale ne muoyi. Anyeme tshiji tshianyi bualu tshidi tshikole!" 
Jeremiah51:46 Kanutekeshi mu maboku, kanutshinyi. Lelu badi bamba nenku, maloba bamba munga! Bilondeshile mushindu udi bidimu, badi batela mudi bantu bakengeshangana pa buloba, mudi mukalenga wa tshikisu wipata mukuabu mu nkuasa wa bumfumu." 
Jeremiah51:47 Kadi tshikondu tshikuabu nennyoke mvidie ya Babilone. Mu ditunga dijima nemuikale amu bowa! Bitalu bia bantu badibu bashipa mu tshimenga nebishale panshi kabayi babijika. 
Jeremiah51:48 Mu diulu ne pa buloba nebele amu mbila ya disanka, padi baluishi bafuma ku mutu kua ditunga bua kuya kubutula Babilone.” Ke Maweja-Nangila udi wamba awu." 
Jeremiah51:49 Babilone mmushipe bantu bapite bungi mu buloba bujima. Kadi bu mudiye mushiye bena Izrayele ba bungi, nebamubutule ne yeye kabidi." 
Jeremiah51:50 Nuenu bavua bapambuke mu mvita, umukayi nuye, kanushadi apa nansha. Muaba unuikala awu, nuele meji kudi Maweja-Nangila, mwuluke Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah51:51 Tuvua ne bundu bua bungi patuvua tunwua bipendu! Tuvua ne bundu patuvua bamone bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, babuele mu muaba wa tshijila mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Jeremiah51:52 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Tshikondu tshikuabu nennyoke mvidie ya mu babilone. Mu ditunga dijima nebumvue mikemu ya bantu bavuabu batapa mputa. 
Jeremiah51:53 Nansha bu Babilone mua kubanda mu diulu, kuya kusokoma muaba mukole, nentume baluishi bua bamupete, bamubutule muaba awu. Ke mundi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba." 
Jeremiah51:54 Telejayi: Bantu badi bumvua mbila, ifuma mu Babilone. Mutoyi munene wa muadi udi mu ditunga dijima." 
Jeremiah51:55 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi utuadija kubutula Babilone. Neapuwishe mutoyi udi mu ditunga. Baluishi badi bela mbila, babuela mu ditunga, bungi bu bua mavuala a mayi manene, ne tshiona tshikole bu tshia mavuala a muenji mukole." 
Jeremiah51:56 Badi basemena pabuipi ne Babilone bua kumukuata. Badi bakuata bilobu, batshibula mata abu. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi Mvidi Mukulu udi mumanye mua kusombola. Udi upingajila muntu yonsu bivuaye muenze." 
Jeremiah51:57 “Nennuishe balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, bena meji, bilobu, ne bamfumu bende, maluvu. Nebakuatshike. Nebalale bua kashidi, kabayi mua kujuka kabidi nansha.” Ke mudi mukalenga munene muambe! Dina diende mMaweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu." 
Jeremiah51:58 Udi wamba kabidi ne: “Bimana bialabale bia mu tshimenga tshia Babilone nebabitonkole panshi. Biibi biende bile nebabioshe! Bantu badi bakuata mudimu patupu, bualu bidi bisamba bienza nebibutuke mu kapia!”" 
Jeremiah51:59 Seraya, muana wa Neriya, ne muikulu wa Masheya, uvua mulombodi wa bena mvita, muambuluishi wa Sedekiya, mukalenga wa bena Yuda. Tshidimu tshinayi tshivua Sedekiya mu bukalenga, Seraya uvua muye pamue ne mukalenga ku Babilone. Yirmeya uvua mufunde mu mukanda, makenga onsu avua ne bua kukuata bena Babilone, ne mikenji yonsu ivua ibatangila, ituvua bafunde kumpala eku. Yirmeya kuambila Seraya ne:" 
Jeremiah51:60  
Jeremiah51:61 — Paudi ufika mu Babilone, neubale miaku yonsu eyi ne diyi dikole." 
Jeremiah51:62 Pashishe wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke udi mumanyishe bantu ne: tshimenga etshi netshibutuke. Nansha muntu nansha nyama, kakusombamu kabidi to. Tshimenga etshi netshishale tshipela tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa kashidi.”" 
Jeremiah51:63 Kadi pawajikija kubala mukanda ewu, uusuike ku dibue, uwimanshe mu musulu wa Perate," 
Jeremiah51:64 wamba ne: “Ke mudi Babilone ne bua kudina mu mayi, kayi mua kupanda ku makenga adi Maweja-Nangila umutumina.” Ke miaku ya ndekelu ya muambi Yirmeya." 
Jeremiah52:1 Sedekiya uvua ne bidimu makumi abidi ne tshimue, pavuaye mudie bumfumu mu ditunga dia bena Yuda. Uvua mushale mu bukalenga bidimu dikumi ne tshimue mu Yerushalayime. Dina dia mamuende divua Amutale. Uvua muana wa Irmeya, uvua musombe mu tshimenga tshia Libna." 
Jeremiah52:2 Kadi Sedekiya uvua muenze malu mabi adi Maweja-Nangila mubenge, anu muvua Yoyakime muenze." 
Jeremiah52:3 Malu avua menzeke mu Yerushalayime ne mu bukalenga bua Yuda tshikondu atshi, avua ajula tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kavua muanyishe bantu bende kabidi to. Ke Sedekiya kutombokela Nebukadnesare mukalenga wa mu Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:4 Nanku Nebukadnesare kufika mu Yerushalayime ne tshiluilu tshiende. Bena mvita bende kuasa mitanda yabu mitangilangane ne tshimenga. Kuelabu tshimenga munkatshi basokome mu biina. Bivua bienzeke tshidimu tshia tshitema tshia bukalenga bua Sedekiya, dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu wa dikumi." 
Jeremiah52:5 Bavua baluisha tshimenga too ne ku tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshia bukalenga buende. 
Jeremiah52:6 Tshiyole tshia nzala tshivua tshikole mu tshimenga. Bantu kabavua kabidi ne biakudia to. Ku matuku tshitema a ngondu muinayi," 
Jeremiah52:7 bena Babilone kunyanga tshitupa tshia tshimana tshia tshimenga. Butuku, bena mvita ba bena Yuda kunyema. Nansha muvua bena Babilone banyungulukile tshimenga, bena Yuda kupatukila ku tshiibi tshia pankatshi pa bimana bibidi, pabuipi ne lupangu lua mukalenga. Pashishe kuyilabu ku njila wa ku tshibanda tshia Yardene." 
Jeremiah52:8 Kadi bena mvita ba bena Babilone bavuabalondakaja mukalenga Sedekiya. Kumupetabu mu mpata wa Yeriko. Bena mvita bende bonsu bakavua bamane kumushiya nkayende. 
Jeremiah52:9 Bena Babilone kumukuata, kumuela mu lukanu, kuya nende ku Ribla, kuvua mukalenga wa Babilone musombe mu ditunga dia Amate. Ke kuvua Nebukadnesare mukosela tshilumbu tshia Sedekiya." 
Jeremiah52:10 Ke kuvuabu kabidi bashipela banaba balume ba Sedekiya, tatuabu mutangile. Ke kuvuabu bashipela kabidi balombodi bonsu ba mu bukalenga bua bena Yuda." 
Jeremiah52:11 Pashishe mukalenga wa bena Babilone kutuma diyi bua batonkone Sedekiya mesu, bamusuike bikole ne nkanu, bamutume mu Babilone, bamuelemu mu lukanu. Sedekiya uvua mushalemu too ne ku lulu luende." 
Jeremiah52:12 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshitema tshia bukalenga bua Nebukadnesare, dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu muitanu, Nebuzaradane kubuela mu Yerushalayime. Uvua mulombodi wa bena mvita balami ba mukalenga, mufidi wa ngenyi wa mu nzubu wa mukalenga wa bena Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:13 Uvua muoshe nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, nzubu wa mukalenga, ne nzubu ya mu tshimenga, nangananga nzubu yonsu ya bantu banene ba mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah52:14 Bena mvita ba bena Babilone bavuaye nabu kushimbula bimana bivua binyungulule Yerushalayime. 
Jeremiah52:15 Pashishe Nebuzaradane kutuma ku Babilone bantu bavua bashale mu tshimenga, bakuabu ba mu meku a bapele, banga bavua badifile kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone, too ne batshivua mu tshimenga bavua bamanye bimpe midimu ya bianza." 
Jeremiah52:16 Kadi uvua mushiye bena ditunga bianza bitupu bua badime madimi a mvinyo ne madimi makuabu. 
Jeremiah52:17 Bena Babilone kunyangakaja makunji a tshiamu tshikunze avua ku mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne matempu, ne dilongu dinene dia tshijengu dia tshiamu tshikunze divua mu lupangu. Kuangatabu biamu bikunze bionsu abi, kuya nabi ku Babilone." 
Jeremiah52:18 Kuangatabu kabidi bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshikunze bivuabu batendelela nabi. Ke ngesu ya kuboyela butu, bikasu, nkala, malongu a mayi a nsompu ne makopu." 
Jeremiah52:19 Mulombodi wa bena mvita balami, uvua muangate kabidi bintu bionsu bivuabu benza ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole: ke malongu makese, mbabula, makopu a kumiamina nawu, ngesu ya kuboya nayi butu, bitekelu bia miendu, makopu ne ngesu mikuabu." 
Jeremiah52:20 Bintu bionsu bia tshiamu tshikunze bivua mukalenga Shelomu muenze bua kukuata nabi mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabavua ne mushindu wa kubipima bujitu to: ke makunji abidi, dilongu dinene dia tshijengu, ne nyama ya ngombe milume dikumi ne ibidi ivua midiambule, kabidi ne matempu." 
Jeremiah52:21 Tshilejilu: dikunji dionsu divua bule bua metre tshitema ne nyunguluilu wa metre asambombu: divua munda muondoke, divua ne mupimbu wa tshiamu wa santimetre muanda mukulu." 
Jeremiah52:22 Ku dikunji dionsu bavua bela mutu wa tshiamu tshikunze. Mutu ewu uvua bule bua metre abidi ne tshitupa. Bavua baulengeje nseke yonsu ne tshilengejilu tshifuane bukondu, tshia tshiamu tshikunze, kabidi ne bimuma bia grenade bia tshiamu tshikunze. Makunji abidi ne bilengejilu biawu bivua amu mushindu umue." 
Jeremiah52:23 Bimuma bivua makumi tshitema ne bisambombu bifuanangane ne bimuma bia mutshi wa grenade. Kadi bimuma bionsu bivua lukama, bivua binyungulule bukondu." 
Jeremiah52:24 Mfumu wa bena mvita balami ba mukalenga, uvua mukuatshishe mutuangaji munene Seraya, Sefanya tshindonde tshiende ne batuangaji basatu balami ba tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Jeremiah52:25 Uvua mukuatshishe kabidi mulombodi wa bena mvita, ne bantu muanda mutekete ba mu lubanza lua bukalenga, mufundi wa mikanda wa mulombodi wa tshiluilu uvua ufunda mena a bantu bavua babuele mu tshiluilu, ne bena Yuda bakuabu makumi asambombu. Bantu bonsu aba bavua diba adi mu Yerushalayime." 
Jeremiah52:26 Nebuzaradane uvua mubafile kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone uvua mu Ribla. 
Jeremiah52:27 Ke mukalenga awu kubashipesha anu muaba awu mu ditunga dia Amate. Ke muvuabu bakuate bena Yuda baye nabu kule mu ditunga dia bende. 
Jeremiah52:28 Mu tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, Nebukadnesare uvua mukuate, muye ne bena Yuda binunu bisatu makumi abidi ne basatu." 
Jeremiah52:29 Mu tshidimu tshia dikumi ne muanda mukulu tshia bukalenga buende, uvua mukuate, muye ne bena Yerushalayime nkama muanda mukulu ne makumi asatu ne babidi." 
Jeremiah52:30 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne tshisatu, Nebuzaradane, mulombodi wa bena mvita balami, uvua mukuate kabidi bena Yuda nkama muanda mutekete makumi anayi ne batanu. Bantu bonsu basanga bavua binunu binayi ne nkama isambombu." 
Jeremiah52:31 Yoyakine, mukalenga wa bena Yuda, mumane kushala mu bupika bidimu makumi asatu ne muanda mutekete, ke Evile Merodake kushala mukalenga wa bena Babilone. Mu matuku makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete a ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi wa tshidimu atshi, mukalenga Evile Merodake kufuila Yoyakine luse, kumupatula mu lukanu." 
Jeremiah52:32 Uvua uyukila nende ne muoyi muimpe. Kumupaye muanzu mubandile ku wa bakalenga bakuabu bavuaye nabu mu Babilone. 
Jeremiah52:33 Uvua mukandike bua Yoyakine kavuadi bilamba bia bena lukanu. Yoyakine uvua udiila mpindiewu anu ku mesa a mukalenga wa bena Babilone. 
Jeremiah52:34 Ke muvua Yoyakine upeta ku dituku dionsu bintu bionsu bivuaye nabi dikenga kudi mukalenga wa bena Babilone too ne ku lufu luende. 
Lamentations1:1 Eyi, monayi tshimenga etshi, tshivua kale ne bantu ba bungi, kabidi ne lumu lunene munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, tshidi mpindiewu bu mukaji mukamba! Kale, Yerushalayime uvua mukalenga mukaji, utumina bisamba bikuabu diyi. Lelu bisamba abi mbimukuate ku bupika." 
Lamentations1:2 Yerushalayime udi udila utshisha butuku bujima, upuekesha binsonji pa matama. Ku bonsu bavua bamunanga, kamuena nansha umue utshidi umusamba. Balunda bende bonsu mbamubenge, bashale baluishi bende." 
Lamentations1:3 Tshisamba tshia Yuda tshidi mu dikenga. Mbaye natshi mu ditunga dia bende. Tshidi tshikuata mpindiewu midimu ya bupika. Tshidi munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, tshipanga muaba wa kusomba. Bantu bavua batshipata, batshifimpakaja, mbatshikuate." 
Lamentations1:4 Njila idi ifumina ku Siyone idi ne madilu, bualu bantu kabena bafika kabidi ku bibilu bia disanka. Biibi bia Siyone bidi buashi. Batuangaji bende badi batua mikemu. Nsongakaji yende mmibungame. Malu onsu adi mamubipile!" 
Lamentations1:5 Baluishi bende mbamupite bukole. Badi bamutshimuna mbasombe talalaa. Maweja-Nangila ke udi ukengesha Siyone, bualu malu ende mabi adi a bungi. Badi bamutshimune badi basaka bana bende, baya nabu mu bupika." 
Lamentations1:6 Siyone mmumane kujimija lumu luende luonsu. Balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende badi bu nyama ya ngulungu, idi kayiyi mipete mashinde a kudia, inyema tshilembi, kayiyi ne bukole." 
Lamentations1:7 Yerushalayime matuku aa udi mu dikenga, uvuluka bintu bia mushinga mukole bivuaye nabi ku kale. Tshikondu tshivua baluishi bakuate bantu bende, kakuyi muntu nansha umue umuambuluisha, bavua bamutshimune kusankabu, bualu uvua mushale tshintu tshia tshianana." 
Lamentations1:8 Yerushalayime uvua muenze malu mapite bubi. Ke pavuabu bamubipisha. Bonsu bavua bamunemeka, badi bamupetula mpindiewu. Bonsu mbamumone butaka. Ke mudiye umuka, mu maboku teketee, wenda utua mikemu." 
Lamentations1:9 Bubi buende mbumuenekele too ne ku muntumpu wende. Yerushalayime kavua muele meji ku bivua mua kumuenzekela. Eyi! Kabutu nkamukuate. Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi umusamba. Udi wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, tangila dikenga dianyi. Mona mudi muluishi wanyi untshimuna.”" 
Lamentations1:10 Baluishi mbapawule bubanji buende buonsu. Yerushalayime mmudimuene muvua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu babuele mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wende. Ke bantu bauvua wewe Maweja-Nangila mukandike bua kababuedi muaba webe wa kutendelela. 
Lamentations1:11 Bantu bende badi batua mikemu, bateketa mu maboku, bakeba tshiakudia. Bavua bashintakaja bintu bia mushinga mukole ku biakudia, bua kupetabu bukole. Yerushalayime udi utendelela, wamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila, tangila, umone mudibu bampetula bikole.”" 
Lamentations1:12 Nuenu bonsu badi bapitshila mu njila, luayi nutangile, nujadike ne: kakuena dikenga dikuabu bu dindi nadi edi, didi Mvidi Mukulu muntumine dituku divuaye mufike munda bikole!" 
Lamentations1:13 Uvua mutume kapia ka mu diulu. Kukabuejaye munda muanyi. Kungelaye buteyi ku makasa, kunshindishaye tshianyima. Kunnyingalajaye bikole. Ndi amu nsama matuku onsu." 
Lamentations1:14 Udi mumone bubi bumvua muenze. Budi bu dijita mu tshianza tshiende. Budi bufika too ne mu nshingu muanyi. Maweja-Nangila mmuntekeshe, mmumfile kudi baluishi bandi tshiyi mua kutshimuna." 
Lamentations1:15 Maweja-Nangila uvua mupepeje bena mvita ba bukitu bonsu bamvua nabu. Uvua mundongoluele tshiluilu bua kunduisha, bua kuzaza nsongalume yanyi. Uvua munzaze, meme Siyone wa Yuda, bu mudibu bakama tumuma tua mvinyo mu tshikaminu." 
Lamentations1:16 Ndi ndila bua makenga aa, mpuekesha binsonji bianyi tshiyi ndekela. Udi mua kunsamba, kunkankamika udi kule. Bana banyi badi mu dikenga, bualu muluishi mmumpite bukole." 
Lamentations1:17 Nansha Siyone muolole bianza, utendakena, kakuena muntu nansha umue udi mua kumusamba. Maweja-Nangila mmumane kutumina bena mutumba ne bena Izrayele diyi, bua bashale baluishi babu. Yerushalayime mmumane kubipa munkatshi muabu." 
Lamentations1:18 Maweja-Nangila mmuenze amu bimpe, bualu mvua mubenge kuitaba ku meyi ende. Nuenu bonsu badi apa, telejayi bimpe, tangilayi dikenga dianyi: nsongakaji yanyi ne nsongalume yanyi idi iya mu bupika." 
Lamentations1:19 Mvua mubikile bavua bannange, bobu kunshiya nkayanyi. Batuangaji ne bafidi ba ngenyi banyi mbafue bonsu mu tshimenga, pavuabu bakeba biakudia bua kupeta bukole." 
Lamentations1:20 Maweja-Nangila, tangila bukole bua dikenga dindi nadi, ne bunene bua kanyinganyinga kadi kantonda. Ndi ne dipampakana dikole munda muanyi, bualu mvua mukutombokele bibi. Mu njila, bana banyi kufua ku muele wa mvita. Nansha mu nzubu mudi amu lufu." 
Lamentations1:21 Bantu kumvua mikemu yanyi. Kakuena nansha umue udi unsamba. Baluishi banyi bonsu mbamane kumvua lumu lua dikenga dianyi. Badi ne disanka bua paudi unkengesha. Dituku diuvua muambe difike, bua bapete pabu dikenga bu dianyi!" 
Lamentations1:22 Tangila bimpe tshikisu tshiabu. Ubenzele muuvua mungenzele meme, bua malu mabi anyi onsu. Mona mundi ntua mikemu. Ndi ne kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Lamentations2:1 Eyi! Bua tshiji tshiende, Maweja-Nangila udi ubuikila Yerushalayime ne mavuba! Butumbi buvua Izrayele nabu mu diulu, kubuimanshaye panshi pa buloba. Pavuaye mufikile Siyone munda, kavua muvuluke muvua Siyone muikale tshidiatshilu tshia makasa ende nansha." 
Lamentations2:2 Maweja-Nangila kubutula buloba bua bantu bende, kayi luse. Bua tshiji tshiende, kushimbulaye bimenga bia Yuda, bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Kunyangaye bukalenga, kufuishaye balombodi babu bundu." 
Lamentations2:3 Bua tshiji tshiende tshikole, kutekeshaye bukole buvua Izrayele nabu. Kubengaye kumuambuluisha, pavua muluishi wende mumuvuile. Kuelaye kapia munkatshi mua bantu bende. Kavua kuosha bionsu." 
Lamentations2:4 Bu muluishi, kunanaye buta buende. Kushalaye mubunane ne diboku diende dia balume. Kudilejaye mudiye muluishi wetu. Kunyangaye bionsu bivua bitulengelela ku mesu. Kuitshikijaye tshiji tshiende bu kapia pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime." 
Lamentations2:5 Maweja-Nangila mmudienze muluishi wetu. Kupulaye nzubu mimpe yonsu ya mu Izrayele. Kushimbulaye bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Kutampakajaye dibungama ne mikemu miaba yonsu mu tshisamba tshia bena Yuda. 
Lamentations2:6 Kutulaye lupangu lua nzubu wende, kunyangaye muaba uvuaye usambakena netu. Maweja-Nangila kupesha bena Siyone tshipua muoyi tshia matuku a disanka ne tshia dituku dia Dikisha. Kulejaye tshiji tshiende: kupetulaye bakalenga, ne batuangaji kabidi." 
Lamentations2:7 Maweja-Nangila mmubenge tshilambuilu tshiende; mmulekele muaba wende wa tshijila; mmufile nzubu mimpe ya Siyone mu bianza bia baluishi. Bobu kuenza mutoyi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mutoyi mukole bu dituku dia bisangilu binene." 
Lamentations2:8 Maweja-Nangila uvua mushindike bua kubutula bimana bia Yerushalayime. Kubiupulaye bionsu, kulandakaja. Tshibumba ne bimana kuela muadi, bionsu kupuka musangu umue." 
Lamentations2:9 Biibi bia tshimenga kupuka. Mvidi Mukulu kutshibula milonda ya kukanga nayi biibi abi. Mukalenga ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende, badi mu bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Kakuena muntu udi mua kuamba tshidi Mvidi Mukulu musue; nansha bambi mene kabatshiena bapeta mukenji wa kudi Mvidi Mukulu." 
Lamentations2:10 Bafidi ba ngenyi ba mu Siyone badi basomba panshi, bapuwa. Badi badiela buloba mu mitu, baluate bilamba bia madilu. Nsongakaji ya mu Yerushalayime idi yenda miname panshi." 
Lamentations2:11 Mesu anyi mmakunze ne muadi. Kanyinganyinga kadi kantonda. Tshiena ne ditekemena kabidi, bualu tshisamba tshianyi ntshibutuke. Bana ba mu maboku badi bafua ne nyota mu misesu ya mu tshimenga." 
Lamentations2:12 Bana badi bakonka mamuabu ne: “Biakudia biepi?” Badi balewuka mu misesu ya mu tshimenga, bu bantu badibu batapa mputa. Badi bakula muoyi mu maboku a mamuabu." 
Lamentations2:13 Yerushalayime, tshiena ne tshia kukuambila. Kakuena dikenga ditudi mua kufuanyikija ne diebe! Tshifuanyikiji tshikuabu kayi, tshindi mua kutela bua kukusamba, Siyone, nsongakaji musuibue? Dibutuka diebe ndinene bu mayi manene. Kakuena muntu udi mua kudijikija." 
Lamentations2:14 Bambi bebe mbakuambile anu meyi a dishima ne a tshianana. Kabavua bakusokoluela bubi buebe. Bualu ebu ke buvua mua kukudimuna dikenga diebe. Meyi avuabu bakuambile avua anu a dishima a kukudinga nawu. 
Lamentations2:15 Bantu bonsu badi bapitshila muaba ewu, badi bakuma bikashi bua dibutuka diebe. Badi bela bibingu, bakupa mitu, bakuseka wewe, Yerushalayime, bebejangana ne: “Etshi ke tshimenga tshivuabu babikila ne: Mulengele be, kabidi ne: Disanka dia buloba bujima, anyi?”" 
Lamentations2:16 Bonsu badi bakukina, badi babulula mukana bua kukukeba matandu. Badi bakuela bibingu, badia dinu, bamba ne: “Tudi bamumine. Dituku dituvua bindile, ndiodi edi! Tudi bafikemu, tudi badimone!”" 
Lamentations2:17 Maweja-Nangila mmuenze tshivuaye muele meji, mmukumbaje tshivuaye muambe, tshivuaye mushindike ku kale. Mmubutule kayi ne luse. Uvua musankishe muluishi ne dikenga diebe, uvua mukoleshe ditambisha dia muena lukuna webe." 
Lamentations2:18 Yerushalayime, ela mbila yebe kudi Maweja-Nangila, tuaku mikemu bikole. Puekesha binsonji munya ne butuku, bungi bu mayi a musulu. Kulekedi, kukoshi muadi nansha!" 
Lamentations2:19 Kupuwi to! Asa amu muadi ku diba ne ku diba, dila butuku bujima. Ambila Maweja-Nangila bionsu bidi munda muebe. Umuoluele bianza, umutendekene, bua bana bebe, badi benda bafua ne nzala ku mielelu yonsu ya njila, bapete muoyi." 
Lamentations2:20 Maweja-Nangila, tangila umone bantu baudi ukengesha. Bakaji badi mua kufika ku didia dia bana bavuabu balele, bavuabu bakongoluele mu maboku ne dinanga, anyi? Bantu badi mua kushipa batuangaji ne bambi, too ne mu muaba webe wa tshijila anyi?" 
Lamentations2:21 Bana ne bakulumpe mbafue panshi miandanda, ku mielelu ya njila. Nsongakaji ne nsongalume yanyi idi mifue ku muele wa mvita. Wewe kubashipa dituku diuvua mufike munda, kubabutula bonsu, kuyi ubafuila luse." 
Lamentations2:22 Wewe kubikila bena mutumba bamvua ntshina bikole, mudibu babikila bantu dituku dia disanka. Maweja-Nangila, dituku diuvua mufike munda, kakuvua muntu nansha umue uvua munyeme, nansha uvua mushale ne muoyi. Bana bamvua mukoleshe, bamvua mukongoluele mu maboku ne dinanga, muluishi kubashipa bonsu." 
Lamentations3:1 Maweja-Nangila mmunkengeshe; mmunkume bisusu ne tshiji. 
Lamentations3:2 Kungipataye kumpala kuende. Kungendeshaye mu miidima pa mutu pa kungendesha mu butoke. 
Lamentations3:3 Amu meme nkayanyi, ke udiye ukengesha matuku onsu kayi upungila." 
Lamentations3:4 Kumfubishaye mubidi mujima ku mutu too ne ku makasa. Kuntshibulaye mifuba. 
Lamentations3:5 Kuntuminaye makenga ne ntatu. Kunnyungulukilabi bu bimana bia nzubu wa lukanu. 
Lamentations3:6 Uvua mungele mu miidima, mudi bantu bamane kufua kale." 
Lamentations3:7 Uvua munnyungulule ne bimana bua tshimonyi mua kupatukamu, munsuike ne nkanu." 
Lamentations3:8 Meme kuela mbila, ndomba diambuluisha. Mvidi Mukulu kubenga bimvua mulombe." 
Lamentations3:9 Uvua munjikile njila ne mishiki ya mabue. Meme kuya mu njila wa tshianana. 
Lamentations3:10 Uvua mungalamine bu nyama wa lonji, mudi nyama wa ntambue mubutame mu tshisuku." 
Lamentations3:11 Kumpangishaye tshimvua mua kuenza bua kuikala ne muoyi. Kuntekeshaye, kumpuwisha kashidi." 
Lamentations3:12 Kunanaye buta buende, kunteka bu tshintu tshia kulongela ndudi." 
Lamentations3:13 Mikete yende yonsu kutubula mutshima wanyi. 
Lamentations3:14 Bantu bonsu badi banseka, bandembakaja matuku onsu." 
Lamentations3:15 Kunnuishaye bintu bia bululu. Dikenga kunkuata bu maluvu. 
Lamentations3:16 Kundishaye nsoka ku bukole, kundiatakajaye mu buloba." 
Lamentations3:17 Kumbushaye ditalala mu mutshima wanyi, meme kupua muoyi mudi diakalenga." 
Lamentations3:18 Meme kuamba ne: tshiena ne ditekemena dikuabu, matuku atshidi kumpala, tshiena mua kuindila tshintu nansha tshimue kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Lamentations3:19 Kuvuluka bundu ne dilalakana bianyi kudi kungenza bululu bu lulengu. 
Lamentations3:20 Muoyi wanyi udi uvuluka bionsu bidi binnemenena bujitu. 
Lamentations3:21 Kadi teleja malu andi musue kuvuluka, adi mua kumpesha ditekemena:" 
Lamentations3:22 Ke buimpe bua Maweja-Nangila budi kabuyi bujika, dinanga diende didi kadiyi ndekelu." 
Lamentations3:23 Buimpe buende budi bumueneka dinda dionsu. Maweja-Nangila, wewe udi ukumbaja malaya ebe!" 
Lamentations3:24 Ndi ngamba ne: Maweja-Nangila udi bumpianyi buanyi. Ke pandi ntekemena kudiye. 
Lamentations3:25 Maweja-Nangila udi muimpe, usankisha muntu yonsu udi umueyemina, uvuluka yonsu udi umukeba." 
Lamentations3:26 Bidi bimpe kuindila ne lutulu lupandu ludi Maweja-Nangila ukutumina. 
Lamentations3:27 Bidi bimpe bua muntu anyishe majitu makole, avuabu bamubambidike mu buana buende." 
Lamentations3:28 Padi Maweja-Nangila umutumina dikenga, asombe pa nkayende mupuwe talalaa." 
Lamentations3:29 Atue mishiku panshi, mutekemene ne: Maweja-Nangila neangambuluishe." 
Lamentations3:30 Afile ditama kudi udi umukuma, nansha mudie bipendu muukute." 
Lamentations3:31 Bualu Maweja-Nangila katu ubenga muntu tshiendelele. 
Lamentations3:32 Nansha yeye ukengesha muntu, udi umufuila luse, bualu buimpe buende mbupite bunene." 
Lamentations3:33 Kena usanka padiye unyingalaja bantu, nansha padiye ubatatshisha." 
Lamentations3:34 Padibu badiatakaja bena lukuna bonsu ba mu ditunga ku makasa," 
Lamentations3:35 padibu banyanga buneme bua muntu kumpala kua Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu," 
Lamentations3:36 padibu bakosa tshilumbu tshia muntu bibi, Maweja-Nangila kena umona anyi?" 
Lamentations3:37 Nganyi udi mua kutuma diyi musangu amu umue, bualu kuenzekabu? Amu Maweja-Nangila ke udi wenza nanku." 
Lamentations3:38 Ku bidi Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu wamba, ke kudi kufumina bionsu, diakabi nansha diakalenga." 
Lamentations3:39 Kadi muntu udi wabakana bua tshinyi? Nansha yeye ne mibi, ki mbamushipe to!" 
Lamentations3:40 Tudikonkayi menemene bua nsombelu wetu, tupinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila." 
Lamentations3:41 Tutendelelayi ne muoyi wetu mujima, tuoluele Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu bianza." 
Lamentations3:42 Tuvua bakutombokele. Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila kuena mutufuile luse to. 
Lamentations3:43 Bu muuvua muwule ne tshiji, wewe kutuipata, kutushipa kuyi ne luse." 
Lamentations3:44 Wewe kuya kule, kusokoma kunyima kua divuba. Nanku kutendelela kuetu kakuvua mua kufika kuudi." 
Lamentations3:45 Wewe kutuenza bintu bia bukoya, bu bunyawu, munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu." 
Lamentations3:46 Baluishi betu bonsu badi babulula mbanga, bua kutukeba matandu." 
Lamentations3:47 Tshidi tshituindila tuetu: ke bowa ne dijimba, tshinyangu ne dibutuka." 
Lamentations3:48 Mesu anyi adi apuekesha binsonji bu mayi a musulu, bua dibutuka dia bena tshisamba tshianyi." 
Lamentations3:49 Mesu anyi adi mpokolu wa mayi adi kaayi akama. Bualu katuena ne dikisha nansha dikese. 
Lamentations3:50 Ndi ngindila too ne padi Maweja-Nangila winama panshi, bua kutangila ne kumona malu aa." 
Lamentations3:51 Bualu budi buenzekela nsongakaji ya mu tshimenga tshianyi, budi bunnyingalaja bikole." 
Lamentations3:52 Bantu badi bankina tshianana bavua bangipate bu nyunyi. 
Lamentations3:53 Bavua bangele mu tshiina, meme ne muoyi, banteke mabue pambidi." 
Lamentations3:54 Mayi kubanda, kumpita bule. Meme kudiambila ne: ndi pamue ne kufua." 
Lamentations3:55 Pamvua panshi mu dijimba, meme kukubikila wewe, Maweja-Nangila." 
Lamentations3:56 Uvua mungumvue pamvua nkuela lubila: “Kujibiki matshi ebe ku mikemu yanyi ne ku muadi wanyi nansha.” 
Lamentations3:57 Pamvua mukubikile uvua musemene pabuipi nanyi. Wewe kungambila ne: “Kutshinyi nansha.” 
Lamentations3:58 Maweja-Nangila, wewe kungakuila, wewe kumpandisha." 
Lamentations3:59 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumone malu mabi avuabu bangenzele, uvua mukose nsambu yanyi pa yoyi." 
Lamentations3:60 Uvua mumone muvuabu badisombuele. Uvua mumone bifufu bibi bivuabu bangelele. 
Lamentations3:61 Maweja-Nangila uvua mumvue bipendu ebi, ne meji mabi avuabu bangelele." 
Lamentations3:62 Matuku onsu baluishi banyi badi banjana, bangelela meji mabi." 
Lamentations3:63 Tangila bionsu bidibu benza: badi anu bangela nsenda mu misambu yabu. 
Lamentations3:64 Maweja-Nangila, wewe neubenzele mudibu bangenzele meme." 
Lamentations3:65 Neubuikile lungenyi luabu. Mitshipu yebe neibenzele bibi. 
Lamentations3:66 Neubipate ne tshiji; neubabutule pa buloba. 
Lamentations4:1 Tshiamu tshia mpawungi etshi tshivua tshimpe, tshiengelela bikole, muditshi tshibuitshidile nunku mmunyi? Mmunyi mudi mabue a tshijila matangalake ku mielelu yonsu ya njila?" 
Lamentations4:2 Bana ba Siyone bavua ne mushinga mukole, bu wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi, mmunyi mudibu babatuila amu mushinga bu wa luesu lua dibumba?" 
Lamentations4:3 Nansha nyama ya mibuabua mene idi ne muoyi wa buledi, yamusha bana bayi mabele. Kadi tshisamba tshianyi tshidi bu mamu wa tshikisu, udi kayi utangila bana bende: bu mudi nyunyi munene wa mikolu mile wa mu tshipela." 
Lamentations4:4 Ludimi lua bana ba mu diboku, ludi lulamata mu tshilakalaka, bualu badi bafue ne nyota. Bana batekete badi balomba biakudia. Kakuena muntu udi ubapeshabi nansha." 
Lamentations4:5 Bavua badia bimpe, bakadi bafua ne nzala mu misesu. Bavua badia bimpe, buukuta misangu yonsu, bakadi bangula bintu bia ku dyala." 
Lamentations4:6 Bubi bua tshisamba tshianyi mbupite bua bena tshimenga tshia Sodome, tshivuabu babutule diakamue, kakuyi bantu basumpakane bua kutshisungidila." 
Lamentations4:7 Bana ba bamfumu bavua bakenka, bapite neje, bavua bapite mabele ku butoke. Mibidi yabu ivua mimpe, mikunzubile mipite mabue a koraye. Mijilu ya mu mibidi yabu ivua mifikuluke, bu dibue dia safire dia mushinga mukole." 
Lamentations4:8 Mpindiewu bakadi bafuke fitutuu bu makala. Kabatshiena mua kubamanya padibu bapita mu njila. Badi banyane bikole, buume bu mitshi." 
Lamentations4:9 Bivua bipite buimpe kufua ku muele wa mvita, pa mutu pa kufua ku nzala, pa mutu pa kulewuka ku tshiyole." 
Lamentations4:10 Bua tshipupu tshivua tshikuate bena tshisamba tshianyi, bamamu bavua bananga bana babu, bakadi badilambilabu bua kubadia." 
Lamentations4:11 Tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila ntshijike. Mvidi Mukulu mmutshileje tshionsu. mMuele kapia mu Siyone, kadi kuosha bitaku biende." 
Lamentations4:12 Nansha bakalenga ba pa buloba, nansha muntu mukuabu nganyi ne nganyi, kavua mua kuitaba ne: dituku dikuabu muluishi udi mua kubuelela ku biibi bia Yerushalayime nansha." 
Lamentations4:13 Tshipupu etshi ntshienzeke bua bilema bia bambi, ne bua mibi ya batuangaji. Bavua bashipe bantu bakane munkatshi mua tshimenga." 
Lamentations4:14 Badi benda babubuta mu njila bu mpofu, mibidi minyanguke ne mashi. Mbakandike bantu bua kulenga nansha ku bilamba biabu." 
Lamentations4:15 Muaba onsu udibu bafika badi babela bibingu ne: “Umukayi, nuenu nudi bapie mikiya! Kanusemenyi pabuipi netu to. ” Padibu banyema kabena bamanye kudibu baya nansha. Bena bisamba bikuabu badi bababenga, bamba ne: “To, kabasombi muetu munu kabidi nansha!”" 
Lamentations4:16 Maweja-Nangila nkayende ke uvua mubamuangalaje. Kena musue kubamona kabidi. Kabavua banemeka batuangaji, nansha bantu bakulakaje." 
Lamentations4:17 Tuvua tukengakana ne mesu, tukeba diambuluisha. Kadi, tuetu nansha kudipeta. Tuetu kuindila ne muoyi mujima tshisamba tshivua mua kutusungidila. Kadi nanshatshi kufika." 
Lamentations4:18 Badi amu batutentekela, katuyi ne mushindu wa kuya ku yetu miaba. Diba dietu ndikumbane. Nshikidilu wetu udi pabuipi. Tukadi tufua!" 
Lamentations4:19 Batukengeshi betu badi ne lubilu lupite lua nyunyi wa tshiminyi udi ubuka mulu. Badi batuipata pa mikuna, batualamina miaba idi kayiyi bantu." 
Lamentations4:20 Muntu utuvua batekemene, mukalenga uvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kujidila, nyeye utuvua tuamba ne: “Mu bukalenga buende netuikale ne muaba munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu”, monayi, nyeye ewu bamukuate mu dijimba dia muluishi!" 
Lamentations4:21 Nusanke, nutshionkomoke nuenu bena Edome, nuenu badi basomba mu ditunga dia Use! Kadi dikopu dia tshiji nedifike kunudi nuenu kabidi! Nenudinue! Nedinukuate! Nenusombe butaka!" 
Lamentations4:22 Nuenu bena Siyone, tshibawu tshienu tshionsu ntshijike. Kabena baya nenu kabidi mu ditunga dia bende nansha. Kadi nuenu, bena Edome, Maweja-Nangila neanunyoke bua bilema bienu, neasokolole malu enu mabi." 
Lamentations5:1 Maweja-Nangila, kupu muoyi malu adi matuenzekele. Tangila, umone mudibu batupenda." 
Lamentations5:2 Bintu bietu bia bumpianyi mbabinyenge kudi bantu bakuabu. Nzubu yetu mbayangate kudi bantu benyi. 
Lamentations5:3 Batatu mbafue. Mpindiewu tudi bashale bana ba nshiya. Bamamuetu mbashale bakaji bakamba. 
Lamentations5:4 Tukadi tusumba mayi a kunua mu biina bietu, tufuta bua kuangula nkunyi yetu." 
Lamentations5:5 Badi batukengesha badi batulonda. Tudi bapungile, kadi katuena ne dikisha to." 
Lamentations5:6 Bua kudia kuukuta, tudi tuoluela bena Ejipitu ne bena Ashure tshianza." 
Lamentations5:7 Bankambua betu bavua benza bibi, mbamane kufua. Kadi tuetu ke badi bambule bujitu bua malu abu mabi." 
Lamentations5:8 Bapika ke badi bamfumu betu. Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi mua kutupikula ku bianza biabu. 
Lamentations5:9 Bua kupeta tshiakudia, tudi tudiela mu njiwu ya lufu mu bipela mudi bantu basombela ne bia lufu ku bianza." 
Lamentations5:10 Bua nzala mikole idi itusuma, dikoba dietu didi dituosha bu dia bantu badi mu tshikutu tshia kapia." 
Lamentations5:11 Badi babuelela bakaji ba mu Siyone mu nzubu ku bukole, banyanga nsongakaji ya mu bimenga bia Yuda itshidi tumama." 
Lamentations5:12 Bavua bakuate balombodi ba mu bukalenga babowe. Badi babenga kunemeka bakulu ba ditunga. 
Lamentations5:13 Bansongalume badi bambula dibue dia tshipelelu, bana ba balume badi batetuka, bua bujitu bua nkunyi." 
Lamentations5:14 Bakulu ba ditunga kabatshiena basomba mu tshipangu bua kufila lungenyi. Bansongalume mbalekele kuimba nzenze yabu. 
Lamentations5:15 Muoyi wetu kawena ne disanka. Tshianga tshituvua tutua ntshiandamuke madilu. 
Lamentations5:16 Buneme buetu mbujike! Tudi ne diakabi, bualu tuvua benzele Maweja-Nangila bibi." 
Lamentations5:17 Muoyi wetu udi usama munda, mesu etu adi muwule ne binsonji," 
Lamentations5:18 bualu mukuna wa Siyone mmukudimuke tshipela, mmuandamuke tshisombelu tshia nyama ya mibuabua." 
Lamentations5:19 Kadi wewe, Maweja-Nangila, udi mukalenga bua kashidi, udi mfumu kashidi ne kashidi tshiendelele." 
Lamentations5:20 Neutupue muoyi, neutubenge matuku onsu atutshidi ne muoyi panu anyi?" 
Lamentations5:21 Utupingaje kuudi, Maweja-Nangila, bua tupingane kuudi bulelela. Utuakajile nsombelu wetu, bu muvuaye bangabanga." 
Lamentations5:22 Neutubengelemu kashidi anyi? 
Ezekiel1:1 Mu matuku atanu a ngondu muinayi wa tshidimu tshianyi tshia makumi asatu, meme Yezekiyele, muana wa mutuangaji Buzi, mvua musombe munkatshi mua bena tshimuangi ba bena Yuda, batata ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. Meme kumona diulu diunzuluka, Maweja-Nangila undeja malu." 
Ezekiel1:2 Tshidimu atshi, tshivua tshitanu katshia mukalenga Yowakine wabuela mu bupika." 
Ezekiel1:3 Nanku matuku atanu a ngondu, kuine aku, mu ditunga dia Babilone, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare, Maweja-Nangila kungambila malu. Meme kumtua bukole buende pambidi panyi." 
Ezekiel1:4 Bimvua mumone mbiebi: lupepele lukole lua mvunde, luvua lufumina ku mutu wa ditunga, lusaka dituba dinene dinyungulukila kudi bukenke. Mu divuba amu mutua mupatuka miele ya mvula. Munkatshi mua divuba edi, muvua kapia katema bu tshiamu tshiengelela." 
Ezekiel1:5 Munkatshi mua kapia aka, meme kumona bu nyama inayi, kadi mifuanangane ne bantu." 
Ezekiel1:6 Nyama yonsu itua ne mpala inayi, kabidi ne mapuapua anayi." 
Ezekiel1:7 Mikolu yayi itua milulame. Makasa ayi avua mafuanangane ne bikonu bia muana wa nyama wa ngombe, bikenke bu tshiamu tshikunze tshiengulula." 
Ezekiel1:8 Muinshi mua mapuapua ayi, meme kumona bianza binayi bia bantu, muinshi mua dipuapua dionsu muikale tshianza. Bianza, mpala ne mapuapua bia nyama ayi bivua bitangila ku nseke inayi ya buloba." 
Ezekiel1:9 Nsongu ya mapuapua itua milengangane. Nyama eyi ivua yenda kumpala yonsu pamue buludi, mubidi wayi kauyi ukudimuka." 
Ezekiel1:10 Nyama yonsu ivua ne mpala ya mushindu ewu: mpala wa muntu, wa nyama wa ntambue ku dia balume, wa nyama wa ngombe ku dia bakaji, ne mpala wa nyunyi wa tshiminyi." 
Ezekiel1:11 Mapuapua ayi abidi avua muolole mulu matuangane, mapuapua makuabu abidi avua mabuikile mibidi yayi." 
Ezekiel1:12 Nyama yonsu uvua wenda kumpala amu buludi. Bu muvua mpala inayi itangila ku nseke inayi ya buloba, nyama ivua mua kuya kumpala kudiyi misue ku luseke luonsu, kayiyi ikudimuna mubidi." 
Ezekiel1:13 Munkatshi mua nyama inayi, muvua mumueneka bu makala a kapia akenka, bu bimunyi. Kapia kavua kakole, kavua kapenya." 
Ezekiel1:14 Nyama ayi ivua inyema lubilu lukole, itua ipingana ne lubilu bu lua kapia ka nkuba." 
Ezekiel1:15 Pamvua nkenketa nyama ayi, meme kumona ku luseke lua yonsu, nkata wa ndundu mutue ne panshi." 
Ezekiel1:16 Mubidi wa nkata uvua wengelela bu dibue dia mushinga mukole. Nkata yonsu ivua mushindu umue, imueneka bu mudi nkata mitshiamakane." 
Ezekiel1:17 Nkata ivua mua kuya ku nseke yonsu inayi, kayiyi inyunguluka." 
Ezekiel1:18 Butumbuke buayi buvua bukuatshisha bowa, mesu avua ku nseke yonsu ya nkata." 
Ezekiel1:19 Pavua nyama isemena, nkata ivua yenda isemena ku luseke luayi. Pavuayi ibuka mulu, nkata ivua kabidi ibuka mulu." 
Ezekiel1:20 Nyama ivua iya muaba onsu mmayi misue; nkata ivua ilonda musangu umue, bualu nyama ivua iludika nkata ya ndundu." 
Ezekiel1:21 Nanku, pavua nyama isemena kumpala, imana kaba kamue, nansha ibuka mulu, nkata ivua yenza nanku pamue, bualu nyama ivua iludika nkata." 
Ezekiel1:22 Pa mitu ya nyama inayi ayi, pavua tshintu bu tshisasa tshia tshijengu, tshikenka bu mudi mabue a mushinga mukole." 
Ezekiel1:23 Muinshi mua tshisasa atshi, nyama yonsu uvua muolole mapuapua abidi matuangane ne a nyama mukuabu. Mapuapua makuabu abidi avua mabuikile mubidi." 
Ezekiel1:24 Pavua nyama yenda, meme kumvua mutoyi wa mapuapua anu bu mutoyi wa mayi manene akungula, nansha bu mudi dikubakuba dikole dia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, nansha bu mudi mutoyi wa bena mvita bapite bungi. Pavua nyama imana, ivua ipuekesha mapuapua ayi." 
Ezekiel1:25 Pa mutu pa tshisasa tshinene atshi tshivua tshibuikila mitu ya nyama ayi, pavua kabidi mutoyi." 
Ezekiel1:26 Pavua kabidi dibue dia mushinga mukole dia Safire, divuabu basonge bu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Pa mutu pa nkuasa wa bukalenga apu, pavua pamueneka bu muntu." 
Ezekiel1:27 Meme kumona mubidi wende ukenka bu tshiamu tshiengelela, munyungulula kudi kapia. Kulu ne kuinshi kua tshimonu tshiende, kuvua kapia kavua katema bikole." 
Ezekiel1:28 Bukenke buvua bunyungulule kapia buvua bu muanzankongolu udi ukenka dituku dia mvula. Ke muvua butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila bumueneke. Musangu umvua mubumone, meme kudiela mpala panshi. Pashishe meme kumvua diyi dingambila malu." 
Ezekiel2:1 Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Muntu, juka, ndi musue kukuambila bualu." 
Ezekiel2:2 Pawaye wamba bualu abu, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kuntulukila, kungimanyika kulu. Meme kumvua uvua ungakuisha, ungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel2:3 — Muntu, ndi nkutuma kudi bena Izrayele. Bantu abu mbantombokele. Badi anu bambenga bu muvua bankambua babu bambenga." 
Ezekiel2:4 Nanku, ndi nkutuma kudi bantu aba ba tshitunu ne muoyi mupape. Neubambile ne: “Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu unumanyisha.”" 
Ezekiel2:5 Diba adi, nansha bobu bakuteleje, nansha kabayi bakuteleje, bualu mbantu ba tshitunu, kadi nebamanye ne: muambi udi munkatshi muabu." 
Ezekiel2:6 Wewe Yezekiyele, kubatshinyi, kutshinyi nansha bidibu bamba to. Nebakukandike bua kuakula. Neusombe munkatshi mua meba a mingonga, ne mua tuminyiminyi. Kadi, kutshinyi miaku ya bantu aba, nansha bidibu benza, bualu mbantu ba tshitunu." 
Ezekiel2:7 Neubambuluile bionsu bindi nkuambila ebi, nansha bobu bakuteleje, nansha kabayi bakuteleje, bualu mbantu ba tshitunu." 
Ezekiel2:8 Kadi wewe Yezekiyele, kulondi tshitunu tshiabu to. Uteleje anu tshindi nkuambila. Ubulule mukana, udie tshionsu tshindi nkupesha bua kudia." 
Ezekiel2:9 Nanku, meme kumona tshianza tshingoluela, tshitua ne mukanda mutunga." 
Ezekiel2:10 Tshianza tshitua tshivungulula mukanda kumpala kuanyi. Bavua bafunde miaku mu nseke yonsu ibidi ya mukanda. Batua bafundemu miadi ya madilu, miyenga ne mikemu." 
Ezekiel3:1 Utua ungakuisha kungambila ne: — Wewe, muntu, diaku mukanda undi mukutuadile ewu. Pashishe, uye kuambila bena Izrayele malu." 
Ezekiel3:2 Meme kubulula mukana. Kundishaye mukanda awu. 
Ezekiel3:3 Kungambilaye kabidi ne: — Muntu, diaku mukanda undi nkupa ewu ukute difu tente. Meme kuudia. Utua musheme mukana muanyi bu buitshi." 
Ezekiel3:4 Pashishe kuambaye tshiakabidi ne: — Yezekiyele, juka, uye kudi bena Izrayele, ubambile miaku yanyi." 
Ezekiel3:5 Tshiena nkutuma kudi bantu badi bakula muakulu wa benyi uudi kuyi umvua. Kadi ndi nkutuma kudi bana benu bena Izrayele. 
Ezekiel3:6 Bu meme mukutume kudi bisamba bivule bia bantu benyi badi bakula muakulu mukole, uudi kuyi nansha mua kumvua, bantu abu batua mua kukuteleja." 
Ezekiel3:7 Kadi bena Izrayele kabena mua kukuteleja to. Bualu kabena basue kunteleja meme. Badi bantu ba tshitunu, badi ne muoyi mupape." 
Ezekiel3:8 Kadi nenkupeshe tshitunu tshikole bu tshiabu, ne muoyi mupape bu wabu." 
Ezekiel3:9 Newikale ne bukole bu bua dibue dia mbongo, didi dikole dipite lubuebue. Kadi kuikadi ne bowa, kubatshinyi. Vuluka mudibu bantu ba tshitunu." 
Ezekiel3:10 Pashishe kungambilaye ne: — Yezekiyele, ungunzuluile muoyi webe, ne matshi ebe. Uteleje bionsu bindi nkuambila, ubivuluke bimpe." 
Ezekiel3:11 Pashishe, uye kudi bantu ba mu tshisamba tshienu, badibu bakuate munemu mu bupika. Ubambile ne: “Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wamba.” Ubambile nanku, nansha bakuteleje, nansha babenge kukuteleja." 
Ezekiel3:12 Nanku, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambula pa buloba. Meme kumvua panyima panyi tshiona tshikole tshia diyi, diamba ne: “Tutumbishe Maweja-Nangila, muaba udiye uleja butumbi buende!”" 
Ezekiel3:13 Meme kumvua kabidi mutoyi wa mapuapua a nyama avua atutakana, ne mutoyi wa nkata ivua ku luseke luayi. Bivua bienza mutoyi munene bu wa tshikumina." 
Ezekiel3:14 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua mungambule pa buloba, muye nanyi. Bukole bua Maweja-Nangila buonsu buvua bumbuele munda, tshiyi mua kubenga. Ke meme kudiunwua mubungame, mudiumvue bibi." 
Ezekiel3:15 Meme kufika ku Tele-Abibe, pabuipi ne bantu bavua basombe mu bupika, ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. Meme kushala nabu matuku muanda mutekete, muikale nzakala, tshiyi mumanye tshia kuenza." 
Ezekiel3:16 Matuku muanda mutekete mamane kupita, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel3:17 — Muntu, ndi nkuteka mutentekedi bua kudimuja bena Izrayele. Neuteleje miaku yanyi. Neuyimanyishe bena Izrayele bua badimuke." 
Ezekiel3:18 Meme mukuambile ne: muenji wa bibi ukadi pa kufua, wewe kuyi mudimuje muntu awu bua alekele ngenzelu yende mibi, ashale ne muoyi, nanku muntu awu neafue bua bubi buende, kadi nenkuase wewe tshilumbu tshia lufu lua muntu awu." 
Ezekiel3:19 Kadi wewe mumudimuje, yeye mubenge kulekela bilema biende ne ngenzelu yende mibi, neafue bua mibi yende. Kadi wewe neushale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel3:20 Muntu muakane meme mumutete, kadi yeye kulekela buakane, kuenza bibi, nealue bua bubi buende. Wewe kuyi mumuleje njiwu, nealue bua bubi buende. Tshiena mvuluka kabidi malu mempe avuaye wenza ku kale. Kadi wewe nenkuase tshilumbu tshia lufu luende." 
Ezekiel3:21 Kadi wewe mudimuje muntu muakane bua alekele bibi, yeye muitabe bua kubilekela, neashale ne muoyi bualu bua mibelu yebe. Nanku wewe pebe kuakufua to." 
Ezekiel3:22 Bukole bua Maweja-Nangila kuntulukila kabidi. Kungambilaye ne: — Juka, uye mu tshibandabanda, nenkuambilemu bualu." 
Ezekiel3:23 Meme kupueka mu tshibandabanda. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kumuenekamu, bu mumvua mumane kubumona ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. Meme kutua mpala panshi." 
Ezekiel3:24 Nanku, Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kumbuela munda, kungimanyika. Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Ndaku, udinjidile mu nzubu muebe." 
Ezekiel3:25 Muaba awu, Yezekiyele, nebakusuike mionji bikole, kuyi mua kupatuka pambelu to." 
Ezekiel3:26 Nendamakaje ludimi luebe mu tshilakalaka, ushale kamama, upange bukole bua kubela bantu bena tshitunu aba." 
Ezekiel3:27 Kadi, pandi musue kukuambila bualu bua kumanyisha bantu, nenganyishe bua wewe kuakula tshiakabidi. Nanku neubamanyishe ne: “Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wamba.” Bamue bantu nebateleje, banga nebabenge mua kuteleja, bualu mbantu ba tshitunu." 
Ezekiel4:1 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Muntu, ambula didiotu dia buloba, uditeke kumpala kuebe. Uzole pa didiotu apu tshimenga bu tshia Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel4:2 Pashishe, uleje mudibu batshiluisha. Wimbe mukidi, wele mushiki wa buloba, wele mualu wa mvita, unyungulule tshimenga ne matempu a mvita." 
Ezekiel4:3 Pashishe wangate tshitata tshia tshiamu, utshiteke bu tshimana pankatshi pebe ne pa tshimenga. Utangile tshimenga: utshiluishe wewe mene. Ke muudi mua kuleja bena Izrayele malu bua kubadimuja." 
Ezekiel4:4 Diba adi, uladile ku lubadi lua dia bakaji. Paudi ulala nanku, neutuale bubi buonsu bua bena mu bukalenga bua Izrayele. Newambule bujitu ebu pambidi pebe." 
Ezekiel4:5 Ndi nteka bujitu ebu pambidi pebe matuku bungi bumue ne bidimu bivua bena Izrayele benza bibi. Nanku neushale mu dikenga matuku 390. 
Ezekiel4:6 Ku ndekelu kua tshikondu atshi, ukudimuke ku lubadi lua dia balume. Bubi buonsu bua bukalenga bua bena Yuda, ubutuale pambidi pebe matuku makumi anayi. Ndi nteka bujitu ebu pambidi pebe, matuku bungi bumue ne bidimu bivua bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda benze bibi." 
Ezekiel4:7 Pashishe, utangile ku Yerushalayime udibu baluisha. Ukanyine tshimenga atshi, utshimanyishe mundi ne bua kutshibutula." 
Ezekiel4:8 Meme nenkusuike ne mionji, kuyi mua kukudimuka ku lubadi lukuabu, too ne ku diba diudi ukumbaja matuku a kuluisha tshimenga." 
Ezekiel4:9 Wangate ntete ya kuenza bukula ya mishindu mishilangane, nkunda, ne mponda. Ubondakaje bionsu abi mu luesu, wenza diampa. Diampa adi nedikale tshiakudia tshiebe mu matuku 390 audi muladile ku lubadi lumue." 
Ezekiel4:10 Neudie ku dituku ku dituku biakudia bia grame 250, kuyi upeta tshintu tshikuabu dituku adi." 
Ezekiel4:11 Neunue ku dituku anu litre umue wa mayi. (Biakudia biebe nebikale bungi bua momumue dituku dionsu.) 
Ezekiel4:12 Biakudia abi nebikale mushindu wa tukata tua bukula bua orje. Utemeshe kapia ne bunyawu bua muntu. Ulambe biakudia abi bantu batangile. 
Ezekiel4:13 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Ke muikale bena Izrayele badia biakudia bidi bipie mikiya mu matunga andi mbipata. 
Ezekiel4:14 Meme kuela diyi ne: — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, meme katshia tshiena muanji kupia mikiya musangu nansha umue to. Bituadije ku buana buanyi, tshiena muanji kudia munyinyi wa nyama mudifuile, nansha mushipa kudi nyama mukuabu wa tshisuku to. Munyinyi udi mupie mikiya ki mmuanji kubuela mukana muanyi to." 
Ezekiel4:15 Maweja-Nangila kungandamuna ne: — Nanku ndi nkuambila ne: kuangatshi kabidi bunyawu bua muntu to. Wangate bunyawu bua nyama wa ngombe, ulambilepu biakudia biebe." 
Ezekiel4:16 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mumone ne: ndi musue kunyanga mampa onsu adi bena Yerushalayime balame. Bantu nebapime biakudia biabu, nebapime ne mayi a kunua. Nebazakale, bualu nebikale ne lutatu lukole bua kupeta biakudia." 
Ezekiel4:17 Kabakuikala ne mampa ne mayi a kunua bikumbane to. Muntu yonsu neunwue amu dikenga. Bantu nebabutuke bua bubi buabu. 
Ezekiel5:1 Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Muntu, angata muele mutue, udibeye nawu nsuki ne miedi. Pashishe upime bujitu bua biwikala mudibeye abi. Ubitapulule mu bisumbu bisatu." 
Ezekiel5:2 Padi matuku a kuluisha tshimenga ajika, oshile nsuki ya mu tshisumbu tshimue mu kapia, munkatshi mua tshimenga. Wangate ya mu tshisumbu tshibidi, uyikose ne muele webe awu, uyimiamine miaba yonsu ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Tshisumbu tshia ndekelu, umuangalaje nsuki yatshi mulu mu lupepele. Meme Maweja-Nangila nenyipate ne muele wanyi." 
Ezekiel5:3 Pashishe wangata nsuki mikese, uyiteke mu tshibombi tshia bilamba biebe." 
Ezekiel5:4 Ku nsuki ayi kabidi, wangate nsuki mikese uyele mu kapia, uyoshe. Neyilunduke kapia kakole; nekatampakene bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Ezekiel5:5 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: “Ke muenzelabu Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshindi muteke munkatshi mua bisamba, tshinyungulula kudi matunga a bantu benyi." 
Ezekiel5:6 Bena tshimenga etshi mbabenge meyi ne mikandu bimvua mubambile. Bavua benza kabidi bibi bivua bena mutumba nabu kabayi mua kuenza. Badi bantu ba muoyi mubi, bapite matunga avua mabanyungulukile ku bubi. Bualu kabena bitabe ku mikenji yanyi, mbabenge kulonda meyi anyi." 
Ezekiel5:7 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi mbambila ne: nudi benze bibi bipite bidi bantu badi banunyungulukile kabayi benza. Kanuena balonde mikenji yanyi, kanuena bakumbaje meyi anyi. Kadi nudi balonde amu meyi a bisamba bidi nenu mutumba." 
Ezekiel5:8 Nanku, ndi nnujadikila ne: nuenu bena Yerushalayime, nennuluishe panyi; nennunyoke munkatshi mua tshimenga, bantu ba bisamba bikuabu batangile." 
Ezekiel5:9 Nennunyoke mushindu undi tshiyi muanji kunyoka bantu, tshiyi mua kubanyoka kabidi musangu mukuabu. Bualu binuvua benze bivua bibi bipite." 
Ezekiel5:10 Mu tshimenga, baledi nebadie bana babu, bana nebadie baledi babu. Nennunyoke. Badi bashale ne muoyi nembatangalaje bonsu ku nseke yonsu inayi." 
Ezekiel5:11 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, ndi nnumanyisha ne: nudi banyange nzubu wanyi ne ditendelela dienu dibi, kabidi ne mpingu yenu indi mubenge. Nanku meme nennubutule, tshiyi nnufuila luse. Tshiena mua kunushiya ne muoyi to." 
Ezekiel5:12 Tshia bisatu tshia bantu ba kunudi netshifue ku disama dia tshiambu, nansha ku tshiyole tshia nzala, munda mua tshimenga. Tshia bisatu tshikuabu netshifue ku muele wa mvita, ku mpenga kua tshimenga. Tshia bisatu tshia ndekelu nentshitangalaje ku nseke inayi ya buloba, ntshilondakaja ne muele wa mvita." 
Ezekiel5:13 Nennuenzele mudi tshiji tshianyi tshingambila. Nennusombuele too ne pajika tshiji tshianyi tshionsu. Nanku nenujadike ne: Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua munuambile malu, bualu butomboji buenu kabuena bundengelela to." 
Ezekiel5:14 Bantu ba matunga adi manunyungulule, ne bonsu badi bapitshila muaba awu, nebamone mundi munyange tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime tshishale tshintu tshianana." 
Ezekiel5:15 Nennyoke tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ne tshiji tshikole. Nentshikengeshe, ntshitandishe bikole! Nanku bantu badi ku nseke, nebaseke tshimenga etshi, batshipenda. Padibu batshivuluka, nebakuatshike bowa. Nenuikale tshilejilu tshia kubabela natshi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nnujadikila bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel5:16 “Nennutumine tshiyole tshia nzala bua kunubutula. Nzala yenu neyinukengeshe, bu mudi mikete mitue ikengesha bantu, ibashipa. Nennyange mampa anudi balame, bua nufile ne nzala." 
Ezekiel5:17 Nennutumine tshiyole tshia nzala ne nyama ya lonji, bua bibutule bana benu. Disama dia tshiambu, tshinyangu, ne mvita, neanubutule. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnujadikila bualu ebu.”" 
Ezekiel6:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel6:2 — Muntu, tangila ku mikuna ya mu Izrayele, umanyishe bantu badiku tshindi nkuambila!" 
Ezekiel6:3 Bantu badi basomba ku mikuna minene ne mikese, mu bibandabanda ne mu mpongu, bakuteleje. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi mbambila ne: “Nennutumine mvita bua kunyanga miaba yenu inudi nutendelela mvidie." 
Ezekiel6:4 Nebanyange bilambuilu bienu. Nebazaze mbabula yenu inudi nuoshila manananshi. Bantu ba bungi ba munkatshi muenu nebafuile kumpala kua mvidie yenu mibi. 
Ezekiel6:5 Nengimanshe bitalu bia bena Izrayele panshi kumpala kua mvidie yabu. Nengele mifuba yabu ku nseke yonsu ya bilambuilu biabu. 
Ezekiel6:6 Miaba yonsu inudi nusomba, nebabutule bimenga bienu. Miaba yenu ya kutendelela neyishale munda mutupu. Bilambuilu bienu nebinyanguke, bishale bintu bia tshianana. Nebazaze mpingu yenu, bayumbushe. Nebanyange mbabula yenu ya kuoshila manananshi. Bintu bionsu binudi benze nebijimine." 
Ezekiel6:7 Bantu ba bungi ba kunudi nebafue. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel6:8 Kadi bantu bakese ba kunudi nembasungidile, nembapandishe ku mvita. Nembatume mu matunga a bantu benyi." 
Ezekiel6:9 Nebanwuluke munkatshi mua bisamba mudibu basombela mu bupika. Nebakuluke mumvua mubanyoke, bualu muoyi wabu uvua mumbenge. Bavua banange, batangile anu mvidie ya tshianana. Diba adi nebanyingalale bikole, nebadiwule bua malu mabi avuabu benza." 
Ezekiel6:10 Nebajadike ne: meme Maweja-Nangila pamvua mubambile bua kubatumina makenga, tshivua mbashima to. Bualu makenga ke adibu nawu lelu!”" 
Ezekiel6:11 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Kanutekemenyi kabidi to. Nutue mikuma panshi, nuele mbila bua kudiwula malu mabi onsu adi bena Izrayele benze. Nebafuile mu mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ne ku disama dia tshiambu." 
Ezekiel6:12 Bantu badi mitantshi mile, nebafue ku disama dia tshiambu. Badi pabuipi, nebafue ku mvita. Badi bashale ne muoyi mu tshimenga tshidibu baluisha, nebafue ku nzala. Nembenzele mudi tshiji tshianyi tshingambila." 
Ezekiel6:13 Bitalu biabu nebishale panshi munkatshi mua mpingu yabu, ne ku nseke yonsu ya bilambuilu biabu, ku nsongu ya mikuna minene ne mikese, muinshi mua mitshi idi ne mabeji mabishi mapite bungi, ne ku miaba mikuabu yonsu idibu balambuila mvidie yabu milambu. Nanku muntu yonsu neashindike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel6:14 Nembaleje bukole buanyi. Nennyange ditunga diabu, nembutule bantu badi basombamu, biangatshile ku luseke lua ku tshipela tshidi kuinshi mu ditunga, too ne ku tshimenga tshia Ribla tshidi ku mutu wa ditunga. Bantu bonsu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel7:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel7:2 — Muntu, teleja bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngambila bena Izrayele: “Nshikidilu wafiki, ku nseke yonsu inayi ditunga dijima nedibutuke." 
Ezekiel7:3 Mpindiewu nenufue. Nennunyoke mudi tshiji tshianyi tshingambila. Ndi musue kunulumbuluisha, ne kunufuta bua malu mabi mapite anudi benze." 
Ezekiel7:4 Tshiena mua kunufuila luse, nansha kulengulula bilema bienu to. Nennunyoke bua bibi bionsu binudi nuenza kanuyi nupungila! Nenku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel7:5 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: dikenga nedifike, dikenga dinudi kanuyi banji kumona!" 
Ezekiel7:6 Kuajiki! Nshikidilu wenu udi wenda usemena pabuipi. Wafiki. Mpindiewu udi pambidi penu. 
Ezekiel7:7 Nuenu bena ditunga, mbamane kulongolola kabutu kenu. Tshikondu tshia ndekelu tshikadiku! Dituku dia tshilumbuluilu dikadi pabuipi. Pa mikuna mbila ya disanka neyijike. Bowa nebubuele miaba yonsu." 
Ezekiel7:8 Mpindiewu, tshiena mua kunengakana kabidi to. Nennunyoke mudi tshiji tshianyi tshingambila. Nennulumbuluishe, nnunyoke bilondeshile malu enu mabi anudi benze." 
Ezekiel7:9 Tshiena mua kunufuila luse, tshiena mua kulengulula bilema bienu. Nennunyoke bua bibi bienu bionsu binudi nuenza kanuyi nupungila. Nanku, nenujadike ne: ke meme Maweja-Nangila udi ununyoka." 
Ezekiel7:10 “Monayi mudi dituku dia tshilumbuluilu difika. Kabutu nekafike. Nudi anu nukengeshangana, nudi anu nuditambisha." 
Ezekiel7:11 Tshinyangu tshidi bu mukombu wa kutuuta nawu. Kakuakushala muntu nansha umue, nansha nuenu bungi kayi. Bukole buenu ne lumu luenu, nebijimine." 
Ezekiel7:12 Nshikidilu wafiki. Dituku dia tshilumbuluilu didi pabuipi. Basumbi ba bintu kabena mua kusanka, nansha basumbishi ba bintu kabena mua kunyingalala, bualu ndi mufikile bantu bonsu munda." 
Ezekiel7:13 Musumbishi wa bintu, nansha yeye mushale ne muoyi, kakupeta tshiakabidi bintu bivuaye musumbishe to. Bualu malu avuabu baleje, bamanyishe bantu neenzeke. Bantu bonsu nebabutuke. Bu mudi bonsu benze bibi, bonsu nebafue." 
Ezekiel7:14 Nansha bobu bela mpungi, balongolole mvita, muntu nansha umue kena uya ku mvita, bualu ndi mufikile bantu bonsu munda.”" 
Ezekiel7:15 “Mvita neikale mu misesu. Disama dia tshiambu ne tshiyole tshia nzala nebikale mu nzubu ya bantu. Bantu nebafue ku mvita mu mpata. Mu tshimenga nebafue ku nzala ne ku masama. 
Ezekiel7:16 Bantu bikale bapanduke nebanyemene mu mikuna. Bu nyunyu ya nkudimba idi idila, nebatue mikemu bua bilema biabu." 
Ezekiel7:17 Bianza biabu nebilembelele, kabiyi ne bukole. Binu biabu nebitutakanangane. Nebasukuile mu bilamba bua bowa." 
Ezekiel7:18 Nebavuale bilamba bikayapale. Luzakalu nelubakuate. Bundu budi bumuenekela pa mpala yabu. Nebakungule bonsu mu mitu yabu. 
Ezekiel7:19 Nebimanshe tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole mu misesu. Biamu biabu bia mpawungi nebabiele mu dyala, bishale bintu tshianana. Bualu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha tshiamu tshia mpawungi, kabiena mua kubasungidila, dituku didi Maweja-Nangila uleja tshiji tshiende. Kabiena bibapetesha tshiakudia, nansha tshintu tshikuabu tshidibu bajinga. Bualu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ke bivua bibafikisha ku bubi." 
Ezekiel7:20 Bavua baditambisha bua bintu bia mushinga bivuabu nabi. Bavua benza nabi mpingu ya kutendelela nayi mvidie mibi ya patupu. Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Biamu biabu ebi nebaatangile bu bintu bidi bikuatshisha muenge. 
Ezekiel7:21 Nenganyishe bua bantu benyi bapawule bubanji buabu. Bantu babi nebanyange bionsu, nebapawule biuma biabu, baye nabi." 
Ezekiel7:22 Nansha bantu banyanga biuma bidi mu nzubu wanyi, nansha bivi babuela mu nzubu, bamunyanga, tshiakuenza bualu nansha bumue." 
Ezekiel7:23 Longolola lukanu. Bualu bashipianganyi badi mu ditunga tente. Mu tshimenga mmuwule tente ne bena tshinyangu. 
Ezekiel7:24 Nembikidishe bantu ba tshikisu, bua babuele mu nzubu yabu mimpe, basombemu. Nansha bilobu mene nebitekete mu maboku, padi baluishi banyanga miaba yabu idibu batendelela." 
Ezekiel7:25 Bowa bunene nebubakuate. Nebakebe muaba wa ditalala, bapange." 
Ezekiel7:26 Nenukenge anu kukenga. Nebanumanyishe anu ngumu mibi. Nebasengelele muambi bua abaleje malu atshidi kumpala, kadi kakubalejawu to. Mutuangaji kakuikala ne bualu budiye mua kulongesha. Bakulu kabakusa kabidi ngenyi." 
Ezekiel7:27 Mukalenga wa ditunga neabuele mu madilu. Muana wa mukalenga kakutekemena tshintu. Bantu ba mu ditunga nebazakale. Nembanyoke bilondeshile mudi nsombelu wabu mubi. Nembalumbuluishe tshiyi ne luse, amu muvuabu balumbuluishe bantu. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel8:1 Mu tshidimu tshisambombu tshitua bena Izrayele mu bupika, mu matuku atanu a ngondu muisambombu, bakulu ba bena Yuda batua bafike kuanyi bua kunsombesha. Diakamue bukole bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kuntulukila muaba awu." 
Ezekiel8:2 Meme kumona tshintu tshifuanangane ne muntu. Muinshi mua tshimonu tshia tshintu atshi, meme kumona mubidi watshi umueneka bu kapia, ku mutu kua tshimonu tshia tshintu atshi, kuvua bu butoke bufuanangane ne tshiamu tshikunze tshibalakana bikole." 
Ezekiel8:3 Tshintu atshi kuolola tshintu bu tshianza, kunkuata ku nsuki. Nanku, pavua Mvidi Mukulu undeja bionsu ebi, meme kumvua Mueyelu wende ungambula mulu mu kapepe, kuya kuntuluila mu Yerushalayime. Uvua muntuluile munda mua tshimenga, pabuipi ne tshiibi tshia tshimenga tshidi luseke lua ku mutu, muaba uvuabu bateke kabidi lupingu ludi lufikisha Mvidi Mukulu munda." 
Ezekiel8:4 Butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele kumuenekela muaba awu, anu bu mumvua mubumone mu tshibandabanda." 
Ezekiel8:5 Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, tangila ku luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga. Meme kutangila ku luseke alu. Ku mutu kua tshiibi, kuvua tshilambuilu. Meme kumona lupingu ludi lufikisha Maweja-Nangila munda ku mushiku udi mutangilangane ne tshilambuilu." 
Ezekiel8:6 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mumone bimpe bidi bienzeka ebi anyi? Bena Izrayele badi benza malu mabi mapite adi mua kungumushisha mu muaba wanyi wa tshijila. Kadi, neumone malu mabi makuabu mapite." 
Ezekiel8:7 Kungambulaye bua kuya nanyi ku tshiibi tshidi mu lubanza lua pambelu pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Muaba awu meme kumona disosu mu tshimana. 
Ezekiel8:8 Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, diundisha disosu didi ku tshimana. Meme kudidiundisha, kuenza disosu dinene." 
Ezekiel8:9 Mvidi Mukulu kuamba ne: — Buelela mu tshimana, umone malu mabi mapite andi meme mubenge, kadi adi bantu aba benza muaba ewu." 
Ezekiel8:10 Meme kubuelela mu tshimana, kumona nseke yonsu muvua bantu bazole bimfuanyi bia bilandadi ne bia nyama mibi mikuabu ku bimana. Bavua bazolepu mpala ya mvidie yonsu idi bena Izrayele batendelela." 
Ezekiel8:11 Bakulu makumi muanda mutekete ba bena Izrayele bavua bimane kumpala kua bimfuanyi abi. Ku bakulu aba, kuvua Yazaniya, muana wa Shafane. Mukulu yonsu uvua mukuate ku tshianza mbabula wa kuoshila manananshi. Muinshi wa musenga wa kamonya uvua ubanda mulu." 
Ezekiel8:12 Mvidi Mukulu kunkonka ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mumone bimpe bidi bakulu ba bena Izrayele benza mu musokoku, muntu yonsu udi ku muaba udi bimfuanyi bia mvidie wende. Badi basue kudibingisha, bamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila kena mutumone to. Mmumane kumuangala mu ditunga.”" 
Ezekiel8:13 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Neumone mudibu benza kabidi malu mabi makuabu, mapite wowu aa ku bubi." 
Ezekiel8:14 Maweja-Nangila kuya nanyi too ne ku tshiibi tshidi ku nzubu wende luseke lua ku mutu. Bakaji bavua muaba awu, badila mvidie uvua mufue, dina diende Tamuze." 
Ezekiel8:15 Mvidi Mukulu kunkonka ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mumone bimpe bionsu ebi anyi? Neumone kabidi malu mabi makuabu." 
Ezekiel8:16 Mvidi Mukulu kungambula, kuya nanyi too ne mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wende. Ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu pankatshi pa lutanda ne tshilambuilu, pavua bantu balume bu makumi abidi ne batanu. Bavua bela nyima ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, batangile luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Bavua batua binu bua kukukuila diba." 
Ezekiel8:17 Mvidi Mukulu kunkonka ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mumone bionsu ebi anyi? Kadi bena Yuda kabena benza bibi bindi mubenge amu muaba ewu to. Badi bakengesha bantu nabu mu ditunga dijima. Tangila mudibu bampenda muabu muonsu. Badi badiela tshisosa nkayabu mu diulu." 
Ezekiel8:18 Nanku, nemfike munda, nembanyoke ne tshiji tshikole. Tshiena mua kubafuila luse, tshiena mua kulekela bilema biabu to. Nansha bobu bela mbila, balomba bua meme kubambuluisha, tshiakubateleja nansha." 
Ezekiel9:1 Pashishe, meme kumvua Maweja-Nangila wela diyi dikole, umanyisha bantu ne: — Luakunuayi, nuenu bonsu badibu batume bua kuya kunyoka tshimenga! Muntu yonsu afike ne tshiende tshia mvita mu bianza." 
Ezekiel9:2 Nanku meme kumona bantu balume basambombu bapatukila mu tshiibi tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshidi luseke lua ku mutu menemene. Muntu yonsu uvua ne tshiende tshia mvita mu bianza. Munkatshi muabu muvua muntu umue muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda. Muntu awu uvua mupayika ku mikaba kabuta kavua ne bintu bia kufunda nabi. Bonsu kusemena, kuimana pabuipi ne tshilambuilu tshienza ne tshiamu tshikunze."
