Ezekiel9:3 Butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, buvua budileja pa tshibidilu ku mutu kua bakerubine, kubuka muaba awu, kuya kuikila panshi pa tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Maweja-Nangila kubikila muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda, mupayika ne kabuta ka bintu bia kufunda nabi." 
Ezekiel9:4 Maweja-Nangila kumuambila ne: — Endakana mu tshimenga tshijima tshia Yerushalayime. Ufunde tshimanyinu pa mpala ya bantu bonsu badi badila, banyingalala bua malu mabi onsu adi bantu benza mu tshimenga etshi." 
Ezekiel9:5 Pashishe, meme kumvua Maweja-Nangila wambila bantu bakuabu batanu aba ne: — Londayi muntu ewu mu tshimenga, nushipe bantu bonsu badi basombamu. Kanubafuidi luse, kanushiyi muntu ne muoyi nansha." 
Ezekiel9:6 Nushipe bakulakaje, bansongalume ne bansongakaji, bana ne bakaji. Kadi kanulengi bantu badi ne tshimanyinu pa mpala. Nutuadije kushipa bantu badi mu nzubu wanyi wa tshijila ewu. Kutuadijabu kushipa bakulu bavua bimane kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel9:7 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kubambila ne: — Nunyange nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne mikiya. Nuwuje lubanza lua nzubu awu ne bitalu tente. Pashishe, nutungunuke nuye muaba mukuabu. Nanku, kuyabu benda bashipa bantu mu tshimenga." 
Ezekiel9:8 Diba divuabu benda bashipa bantu, meme kushala nkayanyi mutue mpala panshi, ngamba ne: — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, paudi mufikile bena Yerushalayime munda, ubashipa nanku, udi musue kubutula bena Izrayele bonsu batshidi bashale ne muoyi anyi?" 
Ezekiel9:9 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Malu mabi adi bantu benza mu bukalenga bua Izrayele nansha bua Yuda mmapite bunene. Bantu aba badi bashipangana mu ditunga dijima. Badi bakengeshangana mu tshimenga tshionsu. Badi bambilangana ne: “Maweja-Nangila ukadi mumuangale mu ditunga, kena mutumone to.”" 
Ezekiel9:10 Kadi meme tshiena mua kubafuila luse. Tshiena mua kubashiya ne muoyi to. Nembanyoke bua bubi budibu benza. 
Ezekiel9:11 Diba adi, muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda, mupayike kabuta ku mikaba, kufika bua kuambila Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Ndi mumane kukumbaja bionsu biuvua mungambile." 
Ezekiel10:1 Diba adi, mvua mumone tshisasa tshivua pa mitu ya bakerubine. Tshivua ne tshintu tshifuanangane ne nkuasa wa bukalenga, muenza ne dibue dia mushinga mukole dia Safire." 
Ezekiel10:2 Mvidi Mukulu kuambila muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda ne: — Upitshile pankatshi pa nkata idi muinshi mua bakerubine. Ambula mu bianza makala a kapia adi pankatshi pa bakerubine, uye kuatangalaja mu tshimenga. Meme kumona muntu uya kuambula makala." 
Ezekiel10:3 Diba divuaye uya, bakerubine bavua ku luseke lua balume lua lupangu luvua lunyungulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi divuba dia muinshi divua diuwula mu lupangu lua mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tente." 
Ezekiel10:4 Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kumuka pa bakerubine, kubuka, kuya kuikila ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Divuba kuwula mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tente. Butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu buvua bumueneka mu lupangu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bukenka bikole." 
Ezekiel10:5 Mutoyi wa mapuapua a bakerubine uvua umvuika too ne mu lupangu lua pambelu pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mutoyi uvua mukole mufuanangane ne diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, padiye wakula." 
Ezekiel10:6 Muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda uvua muimane pabuipi ne nkata. Uvua muye kuimana muaba awu diba divua Mvidi Mukulu mumutume bua kuangata kapia pankatshi pa nkata, munkatshi mua bakerubine." 
Ezekiel10:7 Umue wa ku bakerubine kuolola tshianza ku kapia kavua pabuipi nende. Kuangataye makala a kapia, kuapesha muntu mu bianza bua aye nawu." 
Ezekiel10:8 Bintu bu bianza bia bantu bivua bimueneka muinshi mua mapuapua a bakerubine. 
Ezekiel10:9 Meme kumona kabidi nkata inayi. Ku luseke lua kerubine onsu, kuvua nkata umue. Nkata ayi ivua ikenka bu mabue a mushinga mukole." 
Ezekiel10:10 Nkata yonsu ayi ivua mushindu umue mifuanangane; ivua imueneka mitshiamakane. 
Ezekiel10:11 Nkata ivua mua kuya nseke inayi kayiyi ibenda. Ivua iya ku luseke kuvua mitu ya bakerubine nutangile, yenda isemena kayiyi ibenda." 
Ezekiel10:12 Mubidi, nyima, bianza ne mapuapua bia bakerubine bivua biuwule ne mesu engelela, nansha nkata inayi mene ivua nawu." 
Ezekiel10:13 Meme kumvua binyika nkata ayi ne: “tshimvundu. ” 
Ezekiel10:14 Kerubine yonsu uvua ne mpala inayi: mpala wa kumpala uvua bu wa kerubine, mpala muibidi uvua bu wa muntu, mpala muisatu uvua bu wa nyama wa ntambue, mpala muinayi uvua bu wa nyunyi wa tshiminyi." 
Ezekiel10:15 Bakerubine kubuka mulu. Bavua amu bamvua mumone ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. 
Ezekiel10:16 Pasuabu batungunuka, nkata ivua yenda nabu. Pavuabu banyungisha mapuapua bua kubuka pa buloba, nkata ivua anu mibalamate." 
Ezekiel10:17 Pavuabu bikila, nkata ivua imana. Pavuabu baya mu tshibuashibuashi, nkata ivua ibuka kabidi. Bualu bakerubine bavua badiludika nkata muvuabu basue." 
Ezekiel10:18 Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kumuka mu tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kubuka, kuya kuikila pa bakerubine." 
Ezekiel10:19 Bakerubine kunyungisha mapuapua abu bua kubuka mulu. Meme kumona bakerubine babuka pa buloba ne nkata musangu umue pamue nabu. Kuyabu kuimana ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu buvua bukenka pa mutu pabu. 
Ezekiel10:20 Ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare, nkavua mumone nyama minene ayi muinshi mua Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele. Nanku meme kujingulula ne: mbakerubine." 
Ezekiel10:21 Nyama yonsu uvua ne mpala inayi, mapuapua anayi, ne bintu bu bianza bia bantu muinshi mua mapuapua." 
Ezekiel10:22 Mpala yabu ivua anu bu ya nyama imvua mumone ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. Bakerubine bonsu bavua baye anu kumpala buludi. 
Ezekiel11:1 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kungambula pa buloba, kuya kunteka ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Pabuipi ne tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, meme kumona bantu balume makumi abidi ne batanu. Ku bantu abu mvua mumanye balombodi babidi ba bantu: ke Yazaniya, muana wa Azure, ne Pelatiya, muana wa Benaya." 
Ezekiel11:2 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, mona bantu badi bela meji a kuenza malu mabi, bapesha kabidi bantu lungenyi lubi mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel11:3 Bantu aba badi bamba ne: “Matuku makuabu kabakuasa kabidi nzubu munemu to! Tshimenga tshidi bu mudi luesu. Tuetu tudi munyinyi muteka munda mua luesu. ” 
Ezekiel11:4 Nanku, wewe muntu, ufunde bantu aba ku tshilumbu, wenza mudimu webe wa buambi." 
Ezekiel11:5 Mueyelu wa Maweja-Nangila kuntulukila, ungambila mua kumanyisha bantu ne: — Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Nuenu bena Izrayele, ndi mumanye tshinudi nuamba. Ndi mumanye meji adi anuvuila mu lungenyi." 
Ezekiel11:6 Nudi bashipe bantu ba bungi mu tshimenga emu. Mu njila yonsu mudi anu bitalu tente. 
Ezekiel11:7 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nnujadikila ne: tshimenga tshidi bu mudi luesu bushuwa. Kadi munyinyi udi munda mualu, ke bantu banudi bashipe mu tshimenga abu. Nanku nuenu, nennuipate mu tshimenga amu." 
Ezekiel11:8 Nudi nutshina mvita! Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi nnujadikila ne: nennutumine mvita! 
Ezekiel11:9 Nennuipate mu tshimenga, nuuteke ku bumfumu bua bisamba bia bantu bakuabu. Ke mumvuavua kununyoka." 
Ezekiel11:10 Nansha munda mua ditunga dia bena Izrayele nennunyoke, nennushipe mu mvita, bua mimanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel11:11 Tshimenga etshi katshiakunulama munda muatshi bu mudi luesu lulama munyinyi to. Kadi nennunyokele nansha munda mua ditunga dia bena Izrayele. 
Ezekiel11:12 Diba adi, nenujadike ne: ndi Maweja-Nangila. Kanuvua balame meyi anyi, kanuvua bakumbaje mikenji yanyi, bualu nuvua balonde bibidilu bia bantu benyi badi banunyungulula." 
Ezekiel11:13 Pamvua ngambila bantu miaku ya Maweja-Nangila ayi, Pelatiya, muana wa Benaya, kufua. Meme kutua mpala panshi, kuela mbila ne: — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, neushipe bena Izrayele bonsu badi bashale anyi?" 
Ezekiel11:14 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel11:15 — Yezekiyele, bantu bavua bashale mu Yerushalayime badi bambila bana benu bonsu, bena Izrayele nebe, bavuabu baye nabu mu bupika ne: “Nushale mu ditunga dia kule, mutantshi mule ne Maweja-Nangila. Bualu tuetu ke badiye mupeshe ditunga adi.”" 
Ezekiel11:16 Nanku, ambile bana benu banudi nabu mu bupika malu andi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mbambila ne: “Mvua munutume ku matunga a kule, munkatshi mua bantu benyi. Kadi kuine aku, ndi amu munkatshi muenu, ndi bu muaba wa tshijila. ”" 
Ezekiel11:17 Ubambile ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi mbalaya ne: “Nennusangishile ku bisamba ne ku matunga kumvua munutume. Nennupingajile ditunga dia Izrayele." 
Ezekiel11:18 Panudi nufika mu ditunga amu, nennukandike bibidilu bibi bindi mbenga bia kutendelela mvidie." 
Ezekiel11:19 Nennupeshe bonsu muoyi wa mushindu umue. Nembueje munda muenu lungenyi lupialupia. Nengumushe muoyi unudi nawu mupape bu dibue. Nennupingajile muoyi wa kalolu. 
Ezekiel11:20 Nanku nenukumbaje mikenji imvua munupeshe. Nenulonge meyi anyi, nuakumbaje. Nenuikale bantu banyi. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Ezekiel11:21 Kadi badi batendelela mvidie, benza malu mabi andi mbenga, balonda mudi muoyi wabu mubi ubambila, nembanyoke bua bubi buabu. Ke mundi nnuambila nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Ezekiel11:22 Bakerubine kunyungisha mapuapua abu. Nkata kutuadija kunyunga musangu umue ne mapuapua. Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila wa Izrayele buvua bubalakana pa bakerubine. 
Ezekiel11:23 Pashishe butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kubuka munkatshi mua tshimenga, kuya kuikila pa mukuna udi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel11:24 Meme kumvua Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu ungambula pa buloba, uya kumpingaja ku Babilone mu bantu bavua mu bupika. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kena mundeje kabidi malu makuabu to." 
Ezekiel11:25 Meme kulondela bantu bavua mu bupika bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mundeje. 
Ezekiel12:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel12:2 — Yezekiyele, udi musombe munkatshi mua bantomboji! Badi ne mesu, kadi kabena basue kumona. Badi ne matshi, kadi kabena basue kumvua, bualu badi bantu ba tshitunu." 
Ezekiel12:3 Nanku, longolola bintu bua kuya nabi mu bupika. Ulongolole luendu luebe munda munya, bantu bonsu batangile. Umuke muaba uudi musombele, uye muaba mukuabu mu bupika. Umuke bantu bonsu batangile. Misangu mikuabu badi mua kudikonka, kuvuluka mudibu bena tshitunu." 
Ezekiel12:4 Munda munya, upatule bintu biebe kuebe, bobu batangile. Pashishe, dilolu uye bu mudi mupika umuka, bobu amu batangile." 
Ezekiel12:5 Utubule disosu ku tshimana tshia tshimenga, bobu amu batangile. Upatule bintu biebe mu disosu adi." 
Ezekiel12:6 Bantu bamone muudi ubiambula pa makaya, umuka nabi, ubuela mu midima. Udibuikile ku mesu bua kumonyi kuudi uya. Ndi nkutuma nanku bua umanyishe bena Izrayele malu onsu andi ne bua kubenzela." 
Ezekiel12:7 Meme kuenza bionsu bivua Maweja-Nangila mungambile. Munda munya, meme kupatuka ku nzubu kuanyi ne dibuki bu muntu udi uya mu bupika. Dilolu meme nkayanyi kutubula disosu ku tshimana tshia tshimenga. Bantu bavua bamone mumvua nya ne dibuki dianyi pa makaya, mbuela mu midima." 
Ezekiel12:8 Butshia dinda, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel12:9 — Yezekiyele, bantomboji ba bena Izrayele aba bavua mua kukukonka ne: tshiudi wenza ntshinyi?" 
Ezekiel12:10 Ubandamune ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unumanyisha ne: ndi nnuleja ebi, bua kubela mukalenga udi mu Yerushalayime, ne bena Izrayele bonsu badi basombamu.”" 
Ezekiel12:11 Ubambile ne: ndi muenze nenku bua kunuleja makenga anudi ne bua kupeta. Nebaye nenu mu bupika ku matunga a bende. 
Ezekiel12:12 Mukalenga udi unulombola neambuile bintu biende pa makaya, neumbuke mu tshimenga mu midima. Nebatubule tshimana bua kumonaye mua kupatuka. Neadibuikile mpala bua kamonyi mudiye uya." 
Ezekiel12:13 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mmuteya bua bamukuate. Nemmutume mu ditunga dia bena Babilone, didiye kayi mua kumona. Kadi neafuilemu." 
Ezekiel12:14 Bantu badiye nabu, bena mvita badi bamulame, ne bena tshiluilu tshiende bonsu, nembamuangalaje ku nseke yonsu inayi. Pashishe nembalondakaje ne muele wanyi." 
Ezekiel12:15 Pandi mumane kubamuangalaja mu bisamba ne mu matunga bia bende, nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel12:16 Kadi nempandishe bantu bakuabu ku mvita, ku tshiyole tshia nzala, ne ku disama dia tshiambu. Bobu nebalondele bena matunga adibu basombe mu bupika muvuabu benza malu mabi. Nanku bantu ba bisamba bia bende abu nebamanye kabidi ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel12:17 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel12:18 — Yezekiyele, udie diampa diebe, uzakale; unue mayi, utshine, uzakale." 
Ezekiel12:19 Pashishe wambile bantu bonsu ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unuambila ne: Bena mu Yerushalayime batua bashale mu buloba bua bena Izrayele nebadie, nebanue ne bowa, bazakala. Bushuwa ditunga diabu nedinyanguke, bualu bantu batua basombamu mbamane kudinyanga ne buenzavi buabu." 
Ezekiel12:20 Mu bimenga nemushale mutupu, kamuyi muntu. Mpata neyishale tshipela. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi-Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel12:21 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel12:22 — Yezekiyele, mmunyi mudi bantu ba mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele bamba bambulula kasumuinu ka ne: “Matuku adi enda apita. Bidi Mvidi Mukulu mutulaye kabiena bienzeka!”" 
Ezekiel12:23 Wambile bena Izrayele ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, tshiena mua kuanyisha bua bele kabidi kasumuinu aku to. Kabena mua kukela kabidi mu ditunga dia Izrayele to. Kadi ubambile ne: “Matuku akadi pabuipi. Malu adi Mvidi Mukulu uleja adi akumbana.”" 
Ezekiel12:24 Kabena baleja kabidi bena Izrayele malu adi kaayi akumbana. Kabena mua kubambila kabidi malu a dishima. 
Ezekiel12:25 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngakula. Kadi bindi ngamba bidi bienzeka lukasa, kabiyi binengakana to. Eyowa, nennunyoke, nuenu bantu banyi bantomboji, nuenu batshikale ne muoyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel12:26 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne:" 
Ezekiel12:27 — Yezekiyele, bena Izrayele badi bamba ne: “Malu adi Mvidi Mukulu uleja kaena akumbana mpindiewu to.” Badi bamba kabidi ne: “Biudi wakula mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila nebikumbane amu mu tshikondu tshikuabu tshitshidi kule.”" 
Ezekiel12:28 Nanku, ubambile ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika ne: nenkumbaje lukasa dilaya dijima dimvua mubalaye bua kubanyoka." 
Ezekiel13:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel13:2 — Muntu, funda ku tshilumbu bantu bonsu badi badiamba ne: tudi bambi mu Izrayele, kadi badi balongesha amu mu dina diabu bobu nkayabu. Ubambile bua bateleje bidi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wamba." 
Ezekiel13:3 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Dikenga nedikuate bambi batshimbakane aba! Badi balonda amu lungenyi luabu bobu, baleja bantu malu a dishima." 
Ezekiel13:4 Nuenu bena Izrayele, bambi benu kabena benza bualu bua nsongu. Badi anu bu nyama ya mibuabua idi yendakana patupu mu makolu." 
Ezekiel13:5 Kabena baye kulongolola miaba ya ku bimana bia tshimenga ivua minyanguke. Kabena bibake tshimana bua kupeta muaba wa kunyemena mvita dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda. 
Ezekiel13:6 Bambi aba badi bambila bantu malu a dishima, babadinga. Badi bamba ne: “Telejayi malu adi Maweja-Nangila unumanyisha.” Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila tshivua mubatume to. Kadi badi amu batekemena bua nkumbaje miaku yabu." 
Ezekiel13:7 Kadi ndi mbambila ne: “Malu anudi nuleja bantu, ne anudi nubalongesha, ki mmalu a dishima anyi? Nudi nuambila bantu ne: tudi tunumanyisha malu a Mvidi Mukulu, kadi meme tshiena munuambile bualu nansha bumue!" 
Ezekiel13:8 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nnujadikila ne: nennunyoke, bualu nudi bambile bantu malu a dishima a kubadinga nawu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel13:9 “Bambi badi bambila bantu malu a dishima adi afuma amu ku lungenyi luabu nkayabu, nembaleje bukole buanyi. Kabakuikala ne muaba mu tshipangu tshia bantu banyi. Kabena babafunda mu mukanda udi ne mena a bena Izrayele. Kabakupingana mu ditunga diabu. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel13:10 “Bambi badi bashima bantu banyi, padibu babambila ne: malu onsu adi anu mempe, eku malu kaayi mempe to. Bantu badi bibaka bimana ne mabue adi kaayi malamakane, kadi bobu badi anu baalaba lupemba." 
Ezekiel13:11 Nanku, wambile balabi ba lupemba abu ne: Tshimana netshiupuke. Mvula mukole nealoke. Mabue a mvula neapone. Tshipepele tshia mvula wa tshipupu netshijuke." 
Ezekiel13:12 Padi bimana biupuke, bantu nebanukonke ne: lupemba lunuvua balabe luvua Imulengelela ku tshinyi?" 
Ezekiel13:13 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nnuambila ne: Tshiji tshianyi netshijule mvula wa tshipupu, difika dianyi dia munda nedijule mvula wa tshipepele tshikole. Pandi mfika munda, nendokeshe mvula wa mabue bua kunubutula." 
Ezekiel13:14 Nenshimbule tshimana tshinudi balabe lupemba. Nentshiupule tshionsu panshi. Tshitaku tshiatshi netshimueneke. Tshimana netshiupuke tshinuboza. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel13:15 Tshiji tshianyi netshinyange tshimana, tshikengeshe ne bantu bavua balabe lupemba ku tshimana. Bantu nebanuambile ne: ‘Tshimana ntshiupuke! Bavua balabe lupemba abu, kuabu kuajiki!" 
Ezekiel13:16 Bambi ba bena Izrayele bavua bamanyishe malu avua atangila Yerushalayime, bamba ne: malu onsu adi bimpe, kadi kaayi mimpe nansha kakese, kuabu kuajiki! ’ Ke mundi ngamba nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel13:17 — Yezekiyele, mpindiewu ubele bakaji ba mu Yerushalayime, badi bambila bantu malu mu dina diabu bobu nkayabu, babamanyisha malu a dishima." 
Ezekiel13:18 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: “Ubambile ne: diakabi nedinukuate! Bualu nudi nutela mikaba bua kusuika ku maboku onsu. Nudi nutela bitambala bidi bantu bonsu, bana ne bakulumpe, mua kusuika ku mitu bua nuikale bamfumu ba mioyi yabu. Kadi nudi mua kudia bantu banyi, nuenu kushala ne muoyi anyi?" 
Ezekiel13:19 Nudi numpepeja ku mesu a bantu banyi, anu bua kupeta dianza dia bukula ne bipesa bia mampa. Panudi nutshimbisha bantu banyi, bena bitabataba, nudi nukebela badi kabayi ne bualu lufu, kadi nudi nulama ne muoyi badi bakanyina lufu." 
Ezekiel13:20 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nnuambila ne: ndi munyenga mikaba yenu inudi nukuata nayi mioyi ya bantu. Nenyikutulule ku maboku enu, nyipande. Nempikule bantu banudi bakuate ku bupika." 
Ezekiel13:21 Nempande bitambala bienu bia ku mitu. Nengumushe bantu banyi ku bumfumu buenu. Kabena mua kuikala kabidi tshiakudia tshienu to. Nanku nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel13:22 Panudi nushima bantu, nudi nutekesha bantu ba nsongu ku muoyi, bantu bamvua tshiyi musue kukengesha. Kadi, nudi nuambuluisha bantu babi bua batungunuke ne malu abu mabi, bafuane kujimija muoyi wabu." 
Ezekiel13:23 Nanku, kuenu kuajiki. Malu enu anudi nudinga nawu bantu, ne malongesha enu a dishima ajiki. Ndi ngumusha bantu banyi ku bumfumu buenu. Nanku nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel14:1 Dituku dikuabu, bakulu ba bena Izrayele kufika bua kungebeja malu." 
Ezekiel14:2 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel14:3 — Yezekiyele, muoyi wa bantu abu udi amu ku mvidie yabu mibi indi mbenga, idi ibafikisha ku bubi. Nanku, badi bela meji ne: ndi mua kuandamuna ku nkonku yabu anyi?" 
Ezekiel14:4 Ubambile bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mbamanyisha ne: “Padi muena Izrayele udi mutekemene amu kudi mvidie yende idi imufikisha ku bubi, ufika bua kumonangana ne muambi, kumukonka malu, meme Maweja-Nangila nemmuandamune, bilondeshile bungi bua mvidie idi muena Izrayele awu utendelela." 
Ezekiel14:5 Diandamuna dianyi, nedinyingalaje bena Izrayele bavua bambenga, banange amu mvidie yabu ya bukoya.”" 
Ezekiel14:6 Ke paudi ne bua kumanyisha bena Izrayele ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, udi unulomba ne: nudilengeje, nubenge mvidie yenu, nulekele malu enu onsu mabi.”" 
Ezekiel14:7 “Padi muena Izrayele nansha muenyi udi usomba mu bena Izrayele, umbenga, witaba mvidie udi umufikisha ku bubi, kadi pashishe udi uvua kukonka malu kudi muambi, bua kumanya mudi dijinga dianyi, meme Maweja-Nangila, meme nkayanyi nemmuandamune." 
Ezekiel14:8 Nennyoke muntu awu, mmuteke tshilejilu, bua bantu bikale belelepu kasumuinu bualu buende. Nemmumushe munkatshi mua bantu banyi. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel14:9 “Padi muambi utupakana, wandamuna nkayende, ke meme Maweja-Nangila udi muanyishe bua kuakulaye nanku. Kadi nemmuleje bukole buanyi, nemmumushe munkatshi mua bantu banyi bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel14:10 Muambi wa nanku, ne muntu udi uya kumukonka malu, bonsu babidi mbena tshibawu tshia momumue. Nembanyoke." 
Ezekiel14:11 Nanku bena Izrayele kabakumuka kabidi kundi muaba mule bua kuya kujimina. Kabakupeta kabidi mikiya bua buenzavi buabu bupite bunene. Kadi nebikale bantu banyi, meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba malu onsu aa.”" 
Ezekiel14:12 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel14:13 — Yezekiyele, padi bena ditunga kampanda bapia tshibawu, bantombokele, nembaleje bukole buanyi. Nennyange biakudia bidibu balame mu mayeba, nembatumine tshiyole tshia nzala. Nembutule nanku bantu ne nyama bia mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel14:14 Nansha bantu basatu aba, Nowa, Danele ne Yobe bikale munkatshi mua bantomboji aba, kadi amu basatu abu nkayabu nebasungidile mioyi yabu, bualu badi bangitaba. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel14:15 Misangu mikuabu, ndi mua kutumina bantomboji abu nyama ya lonji. Nanku ditunga diabu nedishale tshipela, bualu nyama ayi neyishipe bena ditunga bonsu. Bantu bakuabu kabakuendamu to, bualu nebatshine nyama." 
Ezekiel14:16 Bantu basatu, batuvua bateela abu, bikale muaba awu, anu bobu nkayabu nebashale ne muoyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi njadika ne: kabena mua kusungidila nansha bana babu ba munda. Nanku ditunga nedishale tshipela." 
Ezekiel14:17 Misangu mikuabu, ndi mua kutumina bantu aba mvita. Ndi mua kutuma bena mvita bua kunyanga ditunga, kushipa bantu ne nyama." 
Ezekiel14:18 Nansha bantu basatu, batuvua bateela aba, basombamu, anu bobu nkayabu nebashale ne muoyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, udi ne muoyi, ndi njadika ne: kabena mua kusungidila nansha bana babu ba munda." 
Ezekiel14:19 Misangu mikuabu, ndi mua kutumina bantu aba disama dia tshiambu tshikole. Ndi mua kubaleja tshiji tshianyi, kubatumina tshipupu etshi tshia disama dia tshiambu, tshidi mua kushipa bantu ne nyama mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel14:20 Nansha Nowa, Danele ne Yobe basombe munkatshi mua bena ditunga, anu bobu nkayabu nebashale ne muoyi, bualu badi bangitaba. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi njadika ne: kabena mua kusungidila nansha bana babu ba munda to." 
Ezekiel14:21 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Ndi mutumine Yerushalayime bipupu binene binayi! Ke mvita, tshiyole tshia nzala, nyama ya lonji, ne disama dia tshiambu tshikole, bua kubutula bantu ne nyama." 
Ezekiel14:22 Bushuwa, bamue bantu balume ne bakaji, mbashale ne muoyi. Kadi mbamane kubapatula mu tshimenga. Nebafike nabu kunudi mu bupika. Nuenu bamone malu mabi adibu benza, nenumvue bimpe mundi mukengeshe Yerushalayime anu pa bualu." 
Ezekiel14:23 Kanuakubungama kabidi bikole to. Bualu nuenu bamane kubamona, nenumvue mundi munyoke bena tshimenga etshi anu pa bualu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel15:1 Maweja-Nangila kunkonka ne: 
Ezekiel15:2 — Yezekiyele, mionji ya mvinyo idi ne mushinga mupite wa mabaya a mitshi ya ditu anyi?" 
Ezekiel15:3 Badi mua kuyikosa, kusonga nayi bintu bia nsongu anyi? Badi mua kusonga nayi tubaya tua kuasa ku tshimana bua kukudika bintu anyi?" 
Ezekiel15:4 Mionji ya mvinyo idi mimpe anu bua bayele muiku. Padi kapia kuosha nsongu yonsu ibidi ya mionji ayi, kuosha kabidi mionji ne pankatshi payi, batshidi mua kukuata nayi mudimu mukuabu anyi?" 
Ezekiel15:5 Pavuayi mijima kabatua bakuata nayi mudimu to. Kadi kapia kamane kuyikuata, kayosha, idi ishala kashidi tshintu tshidi katshiyi ne mudimu." 
Ezekiel15:6 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: badi bela mionji ya mvinyo muiku, kadi kabena belamu mabaya a mutshi nansha. Ke mundi musue kunyoka amu bena mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel15:7 Nembakengeshe. Bavua bela meji ne: tukadi bamane kupanduka ku kamue kapia. Kadi kapia kakuabu nekababutule. Nanku nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila, bualu nembanyoke." 
Ezekiel15:8 Ditunga diabu nedishale tshipela, bualu kabavua bangitabe. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel16:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel16:2 — Muntu, uleje bena mu Yerushalayime muvuabu benza bibi bitambe." 
Ezekiel16:3 Ubamanyishe miaku indi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nkuambila ya ne: “Kenaane nditunga dia bankambua bebe, muaba uvuabu bakulelele. Tatuebe uvua muena Amore, mamuebe muena Iti." 
Ezekiel16:4 Pavuabu bakulela muntu nansha umue kavua mukose mumfu webe to. Kabavua bakoweshe mayi, kabavua bakufite luepu, kabavua ba-kuvuadike mikaya." 
Ezekiel16:5 Muntu nansha umue kavua mukumvuile luse. Muntu nansha umue kavua mukutangile ne mesu a luse bua kukukuatshila midimu eyi. Kabavua bakunange to. Bavua bakuimanshe panshi butaka, katshia bakulela." 
Ezekiel16:6 Meme kupitshila pabuipi nebe, kusangana mulale amu mu mashi ebe. Nansha muuvua mudibonde mu mashi ebe pambidi ponsu, meme kukuambila ne: shala ne muoyi. Meme kuenza muanyi muonsu bua wikale anu ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel16:7 Meme kukukolesha, wewe kuenza bu tshilongu tshidi tshitayika, tshilengela. Wewe kutantamana, kushala nsongakaji mulengele, wewe kuasa mabela, miosa yebe kupatuka pambidi. Kadi uvua anu butaka menemene." 
Ezekiel16:8 Meme kupitshila pabuipi nebe tshiakabidi. Mvua mumone ne: ukavua mukumbaje bidimu bia kukubangila. Nanku, meme kukubikila ne tshinkutu tshianyi bua kujika butaka buebe. Meme kukulaya ne: nenshale webe ne muoyi umue. Meme kutua nebe ndondu. Ke mumua mushale wanyi meme. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel16:9 “Meme kuangata mayi, kukowesha bua kumusha mashi auvua nawu pambidi. Pashishe, meme kukufita mafuta masambakaja ne manananshi." 
Ezekiel16:10 Meme kukupesha bilamba bizola bimpe, ne bisabata bia tshiseba tshimpe, ne mukaba wa buanda bua ndanda, ne tshinkutu tshienza ne buanda bua miosa ya nyama." 
Ezekiel16:11 Meme kukuvuadika bilengejilu. Meme kukuela bikanu ku maboku, ne mabue mu nshingu." 
Ezekiel16:12 Meme kukuela kakanu ku diulu, ne tukanu tukuabu ku matshi ebe, kukuasa tshifulu tshia lumu ku mutu." 
Ezekiel16:13 Bilengejilu biebe bivua bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Bilamba biebe bisua bia buanda bua ndanda, ne bikuabu bia miosa ya nyama, bizola bimpe. Meme kukudisha ne bukula buimpe, buitshi ne mafuta a olive. Wewe kuakana, kulengela be. Kukusungulabu bua wewe kuikala mukalenga mukaji." 
Ezekiel16:14 Lumu luebe kumuangalaka mu buloba bujima, bualu uvua mulengele, kuyi kalema. Kadi uvua mukulengeje bimpe nanku, mmeme. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu.”" 
Ezekiel16:15 “Kadi uvua udikukula bua bulenga buebe, ne bua lumu luuvua nalu. Ke wewe kubanga kudifila kudi muntu yonsu udi upitshila mu njila." 
Ezekiel16:16 Wewe kusungula bimue bia ku bilamba biebe bia mekala, bua kulengeja nabi miaba ya kutendelela mvidie. Wewe kudiolola pa bilamba ebi, kuditua mu buendenda. Bualu ebu ki mbuanji kuenzeka, ne kabuakuenzeka kabidi to." 
Ezekiel16:17 Bilengejilu bia tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bimvua mukupeshe, uvua mufule nabi mpingu ileja mubidi wa bantu balume. Wewe kuenda nayi buendenda." 
Ezekiel16:18 Uvua muvuadike mpingu eyi bilamba bizola bimpe, bimvua mukupeshe. Wewe kulambula mvidie eyi mafuta ne manananshi bimvua mukupeshe." 
Ezekiel16:19 Bua kuyisankisha, wewe kuyilambula biakudia bionsu bimvua mukupeshe bua wewe kudia: ke bukula buimpe butambe, mafuta ne buitshi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel16:20 Uvua muyilambule kabidi bana ba balume ne ba bakaji bautua mundelele. Wewe kubafila bua mvidie ibadie yukute. Kabitua bikumbane bua wewe kuenda tshiendenda tshiebe patupu anyi? 
Ezekiel16:21 Muuvua ukimina kukosa bana banyi mitu, bua kubalambula mvidie yebe mbishi?" 
Ezekiel16:22 Matuku audi wenda tshiendenda tshiebe tshibi atshi, kuena mutuluke musangu nansha umue buana buebe, tshikondu tshiutua butaka, tshiutua mudibonde mu mashi." 
Ezekiel16:23 “Udi muena diakabi. Diakabi adi neudipete bua malu mapite bubi audi muenze. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel16:24 Kadi wewe utua anu mutungunuke ne malu ebe mabi. Wewe kudiashila bibumba miaba yonsu, miaba mitumbuke idi bantu mua kumona bimpe." 
Ezekiel16:25 Ku tshibuelelu tshia musesu onsu, wewe kuasa tshibumba. Wewe kuela bulenga buebe mu bitotshi, kuleja muntu yonsu utua upita mu njila butaka buebe. Wewe kuenda tshiendenda, kuyi ulekela." 
Ezekiel16:26 Wewe kuenda tshiendenda ne bena Ejipitu, bena mutumba bebe badi ne bukole. Wewe kumfikisha munda ne buendenda buebe buvule." 
Ezekiel16:27 Ke meme kukuleja panyi bukole buanyi, kukupala biakudia, kukufila mu bianza bia baluishi bebe, bua baye nebe mu bimenga bia bena Peleshete, batua bumvua bundu bua malu mabi auvua muenze." 
Ezekiel16:28 Kadi lukuka luebe kalutua lujika to. Wewe kuenda tshiendenda ne bena Ashure. Kadi nansha bobu kabavua mua kukusankisha to. 
Ezekiel16:29 Ke wewe kuenda tshiendenda tshia mishindu yonsu mu ditunga dia bena Babilone, bangenda mushinga. Kadi bionsu ebi kabivua bijikije lukuka luebe to." 
Ezekiel16:30 Eyi, lukuka lua bisankasanka udi nalu bushuwa. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu. Ke paudi wenza malu a bundu onsu, adi muena tshiendenda mukuabu kayi nansha mua kuenza!" 
Ezekiel16:31 Wewe kuasa tshibumba ku tshibuelelu tshia musesu onsu. Uvua muakaje, mu bisalu bionsu, muaba mutumbuke bua umueneke bimpe. Kuuvua nansha mulombe bua bakufile, bu mudibu bonda muena tshiendenda yonsu!" 
Ezekiel16:32 Uvua mufuanangane ne mukaji wa bende udi unanga balume bakuabu pa mutu pa kunanga bayende. 
Ezekiel16:33 Bakaji bonsu bena tshiendenda, badi babafuta, kadi wewe mene utua onda bananga bebe. Wewe kubafuta, bua balume ba miaba yonsu baku-vuile bua balale nebe." 
Ezekiel16:34 Biuvua muenze mbishilangane ne bidi bakaji bakuabu bena tshiendenda benza. Balume kabatua bakukeba, kabavua bakonda. Kadi wewe ke uvua onda balume. Nenku, wewe utua mukudimune malu." 
Ezekiel16:35 “Wewe Yerushalayime, muena tshiendenda, teleja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel16:36 Teleja tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nkuambila ne: Utua muvule bilamba biebe bionsu, muleje bitupa bionsu bia mubidi webe kudi bananga bebe, mvidie yebe indi mbenga. Wewe kupumuna mashi a bana bebe bauvua mulambule mvidie yebe." 
Ezekiel16:37 Ke pandi nsangisha balume bonsu bauvua udisankisha nabu, ne bauvua munange, ne bauvua mubenge. Meme mumane kubasangisha bafume nseke yonsu, nenkuteke kumpala kuabu, nenkuvule bilamba biebe bionsu, bobu batangile." 
Ezekiel16:38 Nenkunyoke mudibu banyoka bakaji bena buendenda ne bashipianganyi. Nenkufundile tshibawu tshia lufu, bualu udi mujule tshiji tshianyi ne mukawu wanyi." 
Ezekiel16:39 Nenkufile mu bianza bia bananga bebe. Nebupule bibumba bionsu ne bilambuilu biuvua muenze. Nebakuvule bilamba, bakukopola bilengejilu biebe bionsu, bakushiya butaka menemene." 
Ezekiel16:40 Pashishe nebasonsole musumba wa bantu bua bakuase mabue. Nebakusaye ne miele yabu ya mvita. 
Ezekiel16:41 Neboshe nzubu yebe. Nanku nebakumbaje tshibawu tshivuabu bakufundile, bakaji ba bungi batangile. Nenjikije buendenda buebe. Kuakonda kabidi balume to." 
Ezekiel16:42 Ke mundi mua kutalaja tshiji tshianyi, tshiyi nkumvuila kabidi mukawu. Nensombe talala. Tshiakufika munda kabidi to." 
Ezekiel16:43 Kuena muvuluke tshimvua mukuenzele ku buana buebe to. Udi mumfikishe munda ku bionsu biuvua muenze. Ke mundi ne bua kukunyoka bua buenzavi buebe! Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika bualu ebu. Kuvua musakidile buenzavi bua bundu ebu ku malu ebe mabi makuabu a kutendelela mvidie anyi?”" 
Ezekiel16:44 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — “Yerushalayime, bedi ba nsumuinu nebakuambe ne: ‘Tshiowa katshitu tshilela munga nyunyi’." 
Ezekiel16:45 Bushuwa, udi muana wa bakaji udi mufuane mamuebe. Mamuebe uvua mubenge bayende ne bana bende. Wewe udi mufuanangane kabidi ne bana benu ba bakaji, bavua babenga babayabu, ne bana bavuabu balele. Mamuebe mmuena Iti. Tatuebe mmuena Amore." 
Ezekiel16:46 Yayebe, ku mutu wa ditunga, ke tshimenga tshia Samariya, ne misoku idi natshi mutumba. Muakunyebe wa bakaji, kuinshi kua ditunga, ke Sodome, ne misoku idi nayi mutumba." 
Ezekiel16:47 Kuena muidikije amu bibi bivuabu benze bobu nansha. Kuvua mulonde anu dikasa diabu dibi. Kadi uvua muenze wewe bibi bipite biabu kashidi. 
Ezekiel16:48 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi njadika ne: Sodome, muanenu wa bakaji, ne misoku idi nayi mutumba, katshia kabena banji kuenza bubi buuvua muenze wewe, ne misoku idi nebe mutumba." 
Ezekiel16:49 Teleja, bilema bivuabu benze bobu mbiebi: bavua baditambisha, badia buukuta, kabayi ne lutatu. Kadi kabavua bambuluishe bapele ne bena dikenga." 
Ezekiel16:50 Bavua ne kapeja, benza malu mabi andi tshiyi mua kuitaba. Nanku meme kubabutula pa buloba, bu muudi mumanye amu." 
Ezekiel16:51 Kadi bubi buvua Samariya muenze mbukese. Kabuena nansha tshia bibidi tshia buuvua wewe muenze. Malu mabi auvua muenze mmapite abu bobu. Padibu babafuanyikija nebe, bobu bana benu bena Samariya ne Sodome, mbamueneke bu badi kabayi ne bualu." 
Ezekiel16:52 Nebakutuishe wewe bundu! Wewe udi mubingishe bana benu ba bakaji! Bualu uvua muenze bubi mubapite bobu. Nanku, bobu mbamueneke bu bakane, patudi tubafuanyikija nebe. Wewe neufue bundu. Nebakupuekeshe, bualu bubi buebe mbupite. Ke muudi mubingishe bana benu ba bakaji!" 
Ezekiel16:53 Nendongolole bimenga ebi. Nengakaje tshimenga tshia Sodome, ne misoku idi natshi mutumba. Nengakaje tshimenga tshia Samariya, ne misoku idi natshi mutumba. Nengakaje nansha malu ebe wewe udi musombe munkatshi muabu." 
Ezekiel16:54 Ndi ngenza nanku bua umone muuvua muenze bibi bipite, bua utue bundu bua paudi mupite bana benu ba bakaji ku bubi." 
Ezekiel16:55 Sodome, Samariya, ne misoku idi mutumba, nebapete lumu luabu lua kale. Kabidi wewe mene ne misoku iudi nayi mutumba nenulupete!" 
Ezekiel16:56 Pautua uditambisha, uvua utela Sodome ne kapeja." 
Ezekiel16:57 Bubi buebe wewe kabuvua buanji kumueneka. Mpindiewu, nebakuseke kudi bimenga bia bena Edome, ne kudi bimenga bidibu nabi mutumba. Nebakupende ne kudi bimenga bia bena Peleshete, nebakupepeje nseke yonsu." 
Ezekiel16:58 Ke muudi ufuta tshibawu tshia malu ebe a bundu andi mbenga. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel16:59 “Teleja tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: kuena munemeke malaya auvua mulaye. Kadi udi munyange ndondu wetu. Nanku nenkunyoke bilondeshile biuvua muenze. 
Ezekiel16:60 Kadi, meme nennemeke ndondu umvua mutue nebe ku buana buebe. Nengenze bua ndondu wetu nebe ashale kashidi." 
Ezekiel16:61 Neuvuluke biuvua muenze. Bundu nebukukuate paudi upetangana ne bayayebe ne bakunyi bebe ba bakaji. Nenkupeshabu bua bakuitabe bu bana bebe ba bakaji, nansha biobi kabiyi bitangila malu amvua mukulaye." 
Ezekiel16:62 Nentue tshiakabidi nebe ndondu. Neujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel16:63 Nanku, neuvuluke malu a kale. Bundu nebukukuate. Kuakuakula kabidi to. Kadi meme, nenkufuile luse ku bubi buonsu buuvua muenze. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika bualu ebu.”" 
Ezekiel17:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel17:2 — Muntu, wikala welele bena Izrayele mianu pa kubalondela bualu." 
Ezekiel17:3 Ubambile ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ke udi unuelela lusumuinu elu. Lusumuinu elu ludi nenku: “Kuvua nyunyi wa tshiminyi munene mupite. Uvua ne mapuapua manene, masala male a bungi, mikale makalu makalu. Uvua ubuka uya kuikila ku mikuna ya Lebanone. Kukosayemu lutonga lua mutshi wa Sedre," 
Ezekiel17:4 luvua mu katongobela. Kuyaye nalu mu ditunga dia bangenda mushinga, kulutekaye mu tshimenga tshia bantu babanji." 
Ezekiel17:5 Kuangataye kabidi lutonga lukuabu mu ditunga dia bena Izrayele, kuya nalu mu budimi busekuna. Kulukunaye ku muelelu wa mayi a bungi bua lukole bimpe." 
Ezekiel17:6 Lutonga alu kutoloka kuenza muonji wa mvinyo munene, ulamba panshi. Matamba a muonji awu kubaluluka, kukola, kutangila too ne ku muaba uvua nyunyi wa tshiminyi. Miji ya muonji kubuela mu buloba. Muonji awu kusampila bikole, kuela ntonga mipiamipia." 
Ezekiel17:7 Kadi nyunyi wa tshiminyi mukuabu, muikale kabidi munene, kufika. Uvua kabidi ne mapuapua manene, ne masala a bungi. Nanku muonji wa mvinyo kutangija miji yawu ne matamba kabidi kuvua nyunyi muibidi awu. Muonji uvua mutekemene mua kupeta mayi a bungi, mapite avuawu upeta mu buloba muvuawu." 
Ezekiel17:8 Kadi bavua baukune kumpala mu buloba bufukisha ku muelelu wa mayi a bungi, bua wele matamba adi mua kukuama bimuma bia bungi, bua wikale wa mvinyo muimpe mutambe.”" 
Ezekiel17:9 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkonka ne: “Muonji wa mvinyo ewu udi mua kukola anyi? Nyunyi wa tshiminyi wa kumpala kena mua kujula miji yawu, kunyanga bimuma biawu, bua ntonga yawu mipiamipia ifube anyi? Tshiminyi katshiakukengela bukole bua bungi, nansha bena mudimu basule, bua kujula muonji ewu to." 
Ezekiel17:10 Bushuwa, bavua bakuna muonji wa mvinyo awu bimpe. Kadi kawena mua kukola to. Bualu padi lupepele lua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lututa, neume onsu. Neumine anu muaba uvuawu mutolokele awu.”" 
Ezekiel17:11 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel17:12 — Ebeja bantomboji aba ne: “Nudi bu-mvue tshidi lusumuinu alu luamba anyi?” Ubavuluije mushindu uvua mukalenga wa bena Babilone mubuele mu Yerushalayime, mukuate mukalenga wa ditunga ne balombodi bende, muye nabu mu ditunga diende." 
Ezekiel17:13 Uvua mukuate kabidi muntu wa mu diku dia bukalenga, mutue nende ndondu, umulombe kabidi bua aditshipe bua amuitabe. Uvua mumushe kabidi balombodi bonsu mu ditunga," 
Ezekiel17:14 bua bukalenga kabuikadi ne bukole, kabaditambishi kabidi, bunemeke bimpe ndondu uvuabu bamane kutua ne mukalenga." 
Ezekiel17:15 Kadi mukalenga mupiamupia uvua mutombokele usua mumutshimune. Uvua mutume bantu ne mukenji ku Ejipitu, ulomba bena mvita ba bungi ne nyama ya tubalu. Kadi muntu uvua muenze bionsu ebi neapete diakalenga anyi? Neasungidile ditunga anyi? Nansha kakese! Bualu muntu uvua munyange ndondu uvuabu batue, kabakupanga kumunyoka." 
Ezekiel17:16 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: “Mukalenga ewu neafuile mu ditunga dia mukalenga uvua mumuteke mu nkuasa wa bukalenga. Bualu kavua munemeke mitshipu iwaye muditshipe, kabidi uvua munyange ndondu uvuabu batue nende. Nanku neafuile anu mu Babilone." 
Ezekiel17:17 Nansha yeye muikale ne bena mvita ba bungi ba bukitu, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu kena mua kumuambuluisha bua kuluisha bena Babilone badi bela mishiki ya buloba, bumbula mikidi bua bamone mua kukuata tshimenga, kushipa bantu ba bungi." 
Ezekiel17:18 Bu mudi mukalenga ewu munyange ndondu uvuabu batue, uvua ubenga kunemeka bivuaye mulaye. Bu mudiye muenze nanku, yeye mumane kuditshipa, kena mua kupanda to!”" 
Ezekiel17:19 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi ngamba ne: “Mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mmunyange ndondu uvuaye mutue, uditshipa kumpala kuanyi. Nanku, pa bualu ebu nemmunyoke." 
Ezekiel17:20 Nemmuteye buteyi, mmukuate. Nemmufile mu Babilone bua mmunyokelemu, bualu uvua muntombokele, meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel17:21 Nebashipe bena mvita bende ba bukitu mu mvita. Badi bashale ne muoyi nebabatangalaje nseke inayi ya buloba. Nanku nenumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nnumanyisha bionsu ebi.”" 
Ezekiel17:22 — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Nendiangatshile meme nkayanyi lutonga lutekete lua mutshi wa Sedre. Nendukose ku lusongu lua mutshi. Nendukune pa mukuna udi mupite kutumbuka. 
Ezekiel17:23 Nendukunyine pa mukuna wa mu Izrayele udi mupite kutumbuka. Neluele matamba, lukuama ntete. Neluenze mutshi wa Sedre muimpe mutambe. Nyunyi ya mishindu yonsu neyibakile masua ayi mu matamba alu. Neyipete dileji dia kuikishila." 
Ezekiel17:24 Diba adi, mitshi yonsu ya mu mpata neyimanye ne: ndi Maweja-Nangila. Ndi ngipidija mitshi idi mitumbuke, ndi ndepesha idi mipi. Ndi ngumisha mitshi mibishi. Ndi ngelesha mitshi miume ntonga. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku awu. Nenkumbaje anu mundi muambe amu.”" 
Ezekiel18:1 Maweja-Nangila uvua unkonka ne: 
Ezekiel18:2 — Mmunyi munudi nuela kasumuinu mu ditunga dia Izrayele, nuamba nuambulula ne: Baledi bakadia tumuma tubishi, bana kumvua buanji ku menu." 
Ezekiel18:3 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, ndi njadika ne: kanuakuambulula kabidi kasumuinu aka mu Izrayele to." 
Ezekiel18:4 Bualu muoyi wa bantu bonsu ngwanyi meme. Muoyi wa baledi ngwanyi meme, anu bu mudi muoyi wa bana. Anu muena tshibawu wasangana kufua anyi? Wafua!" 
Ezekiel18:5 “Tuangate tshilejilu tshia muntu udi wenza malu onsu anu mimpe, ulonda anu njila mululame wa buakane." 
Ezekiel18:6 Muntu awu kena udia bidibu balambule mvidie pa mikuna. Kena utendelela mvidie mibi ya bena Izrayele. Katshia kena ubuelakana ne mukaji wa bende. Kena ubuelela mukaji mu nzubu, padiye ku tshijila tshia bakaji." 
Ezekiel18:7 Kena ukengesha muntu, nansha wiba muntu awu. Udi upingaja tshieya tshivua muena dibanza mumueyeke. Udi upesha muntu udi ne nzala biakudia, upesha muntu uvua butaka tshilamba." 
Ezekiel18:8 Kena usombeshangana makuta bua kuvudija biuma biende, nansha bua kupeta makasa, Kena wambuluisha benji ba bibi. Kadi udi ukosa bilumbu anu pa biobi." 
Ezekiel18:9 Mu tshikosu, udi witaba meyi ne mikandu bimvua muele, wenza anu bimpe. Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika ne: muntu awu mmuntu wa nsongu, neikale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel18:10 “Kadi muntu awu udi mua kuikala ne muanende wa balume wiba, ushipa bantu, nansha wenza malu mabi a mishindu yonsu." 
Ezekiel18:11 Kena wenza malu mimpe bu muvua tatuende wenza nansha. Udi udia biakudia bivuabu balambule mvidie pa mikuna. Udi ubuelakana ne mukaji wa bende. 
Ezekiel18:12 Udi ukengesha bapela ne bena dikenga. Udi wiba bintu bia bantu. Kena upingaja tshieya tshivua muena dibanza mumueyeke. Udi utendelela mvidie, wenza malu mabi, andi mbenga." 
Ezekiel18:13 Udi usombeshangana makuta bua kuvudija biuma biende ne kupeta makasa. Muntu wa nanku udi mua kushala ne muoyi anyi? Nansha kakese! Udi muenze malu mabi onsu aa andi mbenga. Nanku neafue. Yeye nkayende mmudikebele lufu luende. 
Ezekiel18:14 “Kadi muntu awu udi mua kuikala ne muanende wa balume. Muana awu, nansha yeye mumone bilema bionsu bivua tatuende muenze, kena ubilonda." 
Ezekiel18:15 Kena udia biakudia bidibu balambule mvidie pa mikuna. Kena utendelela mvidie mibi ya bena Izrayele. Kena ubuelakana ne mukaji wa bende. 
Ezekiel18:16 Kena ukengesha muntu, kena wiba, kena wangata tshieya kudi bena mabanza ende. Udi upesha muntu udi ne nzala biakudia, upesha muntu udi butaka tshilamba." 
Ezekiel18:17 Kena wambuluisha benji ba bibi. Kena usombeshangana makuta bua kuvudija biuma biende ne dipeta dia makasa. Mu tshikosu, udi witaba meyi ne mikandu bimvua muele. Nanku muntu awu kakufua bua bilema bia tatuende to. Bulelela neikale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel18:18 Amu tatuende ke uvua muenze bibi, muibe, mukengeshe bantu bavuaye nabu. Nanku tatuende neafue bua bilema biende." 
Ezekiel18:19 “Nudi nukonka ne: kabena banyoka muana bua bilema bia tatuende bua tshinyi? Bualu, muana uvua muenze amu malu mimpe, muitabe ku mikenji yanyi yonsu. Nanku neikale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel18:20 Anu muena tshibawu, wasangana kufua anyi? Wafua! Kabena mua kunyoka bana bua bubi bua baledi babu, nansha kunyoka baledi bua bubi bua bana babu. Muntu muimpe nebamufute bilondeshile buimpe buende. Muntu mubi nebamunyoke bilondeshile bubi buende." 
Ezekiel18:21 “Padi muntu mubi ulekela bubi buende, utuadija kulama meyi, ulonda anu njila mululame wa buakane, muntu awu neapete muoyi bulelela, kakufua to." 
Ezekiel18:22 Kabena mua kuvuluka kabidi bubi buende to. Neapete muoyi bua malu mempe adiye wenza. 
Ezekiel18:23 Nudi nuela meji ne: ndi nsanka pandi mmona muntu ufua bua malu mabi anyi? Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika ne: ndi njinga amu bua bena malu mabi badilengeje, bapete muoyi." 
Ezekiel18:24 Kadi padi muntu muimpe ubanga kuenza malu mabi, ulonda dikasa dia bantu babi, muntu awu udi mua kushala ne muoyi anyi? Nansha kakese! Kabena mua kuvuluka kabidi malu mempe avuaye wenza. Neafue bua malu mabi adiye wenza, bualu kena mungitabe to." 
Ezekiel18:25 Nudi nuamba ne: ‘Bidi Maweja-Nangila wenza kabiena bimpe to. Udi ukolesha malu!’ Nuenu bena Izrayele, telejayi bimpe, udi ukolesha malu mmeme anyi? Nansha kakese! Badi bakolesha malu bapitshisha, ke nuenu!" 
Ezekiel18:26 Padi muntu muimpe ulekela kuenza bimpe, ubanga kuenza bibi, utulama, udi ufua bua bubi budiye wenza." 
Ezekiel18:27 Kadi muntu mubi udi ulekela kuenza malu mabi, ubanga kulonda njila wa buakane, neadisungidile." 
Ezekiel18:28 Neashale ne muoyi, bualu mmumone nuwuaye wenza bibi, mudilengeje. Nanku kakufua to." 
Ezekiel18:29 Kadi, nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi nuamba ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila udi ukolesha malu!’ Kadi udi wenza bibi, ukolesha malu ki mmeme nansha! Amu nuenu ke badi benza bibi bapitshisha." 
Ezekiel18:30 Meme nendumbuluishe yonsu wa kunudi bilondeshile malu adiye wenza. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. Enzayi malu mimpe. Lekelayi bibi bionsu binudi nuenza. Kanuenji bubi nansha bumue budi mua kunujimija. 
Ezekiel18:31 Lekelayi kuenza malu mabi. Akajayi mioyi yenu, ne lungenyi luenu. Nuenu bena Izrayele nudi basue kufua bua tshinyi?" 
Ezekiel18:32 Bulelela, meme Maweja-Nangila, tshiena musue lufu lua muntu nansha umue. Lekelayi bubi buenu buonsu, nanku nenushale ne muoyi!”" 
Ezekiel19:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila bua kuela kasala ka madilu, bua kudila bakalenga babidi ba mu Izrayele. Meme kudila ne:" 
Ezekiel19:2 Mamuebe uvua nyama wa ntambue wa dikima, uvuabu banemeka kudi ntambue mikuabu milume. Uvua mulale munkatshi mua bana bende, wamusha tuana tuende dibela." 
Ezekiel19:3 Kukoleshaye nangananga umue wa ku bana bende. Yeye kuenza muana wa ntambue muimpe mutambe. Kumanyaye mua kukuata nyama, kudia kusukumina. Kushipaye bantu ba bungi." 
Ezekiel19:4 Bantu benyi kumvua bakula bualu abu. Kukuatabu ntambue awu mu buteyi. Kuyabu nende mu ditunga dia Ejipitu, muela lukanu ku diulu." 
Ezekiel19:5 Mamuende kuindila bikole. Kumonaye ne: tshiena mua kutekemena muananyi kabidi to. Nanku kuangataye muanende mukuabu. Kumukoleshaye bua ikale muana wa ntambue wa bukole. 
Ezekiel19:6 Muana awu kulala munkatshi mua ntambue mikuabu. Kuenzaye nyama wa ntambue muimpe mutambe. Kumanyaye kabidi mua kukuata nyama, kudia kusukumina. Kushipaye bantu ba bungi." 
Ezekiel19:7 Kushipaye bantu mu bimenga biabu, kunyangaye ne bimenga abi. Bantu ba mu ditunga bavua ne bowa, pavuabu bumvue ntambue ukungula." 
Ezekiel19:8 Bantu benyi bavua bafume miaba yonsu, kudisangishabu bua kumuluisha. Kumunyungulukilabu, bamuadila bua kumukuata. Kumukuatabu mu buteyi." 
Ezekiel19:9 Kumusuikabu lukanu ku diulu, kumubuejabu mu nsanji wa tshiamu, kuyabu nende kudi mukalenga wa Babilone. Kumuelabu mu nzubu wa lukanu bua kabunwu kabidi mudiye ukungula pa mikuna ya Izrayele." 
Ezekiel19:10 Mamuebe uvua mufuanangane ne muonji wa mvinyo, mukuna ku muelelu wa mayi. Uvua mutoloke mabeji, mukuame bimuma, bualu uvua upeta mayi mavule." 
Ezekiel19:11 Uvua ne matamba mimpe makole. Bavua benza nawu makombu a bukalenga. Uvua mutumbuke ku mitshi yonsu. Bavua bakema bua bule buawu, ne bua bungi bua mabeji awu." 
Ezekiel19:12 Kadi bavua bajula muonji awu ne tshiji, bawimansha panshi. Lupepepe lua kudi diba dipatukila, kumisha bimuma biawu, kumatabi panshi. Matamba mimpe awu kuuma. Bantu kuwosha muiku." 
Ezekiel19:13 Mpindiewu muonji wa mvinyo, mbaukune mu tshipela, mu ditunga diume kadiyi ne mayi." 
Ezekiel19:14 Kapia kupatukila mu muonji ewu, kabutula matamba awu ne bimuma biawu. Kawena kabidi ne ditamba dimpe, didibu mua kuenza dikombu dia bukalenga. Kasala aka nka kuela, badila muadi." 
Ezekiel20:1 Tshidimu tshia muanda mutekete, tshivuabu bamane kuya ne bena Izrayele mu bupika, dituku dia dikumi dia ngondu muitanu, bakulu bakuabu ba bena Izrayele kufika bua kunkonka ne: tshidi Maweja-Nangila musue menemene ntshinyi? Bobu kusomba panshi kuntangila." 
Ezekiel20:2 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel20:3 — Yezekiyele, wambile bakulu ba bena Izrayele bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu njadika ne: “Nudi bafike muaba ewu bua kumanya tshindi musue, ki mmomu anyi? Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, ndi nditshipa ne: tshiena mua kuitaba bua nuenu kunkonka bualu to!”" 
Ezekiel20:4 Nansha wewe anu muntu, udilongolole bua kukosa tshilumbu tshiabu. Kutshinyi to. Ubavuluije malu mabi avua bankambua babu benze." 
Ezekiel20:5 Ubavuluije miaku indi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mbambila ne: “Tshikondu tshimvua musungule bena Izrayele, mvua mutue nabu bonsu ndondu, muditshipe. Mvua mudileje kudibu mu Ejipitu. Mvua mubalaye bua kuikala Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Ezekiel20:6 Musangu awu, mvua mubalaye bua kubapatula mu Ejipitu, kubafikisha mu ditunga didi dipite matunga onsu ku buimpe. Ditunga dimvua musungule bua kubapesha anu bobu, divua ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Ezekiel20:7 Meme kubela mikenji ne: muntu yonsu wa kunudi abenge mvidie ya dishima inudi nutendelela, bua kanupi mikiya pa kukukuila mvidie ya bena Ejipitu. Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Ezekiel20:8 “Kadi bena Izrayele kuntombokela, kubenga kungitaba. Muntu nansha umue kavua mubenge mvidie ya dishima ivuaye utendelela. Kavua muimanshe mpingu ya bena Ejipitu. Diba adi meme kushindika ne: nembanyoke ne tshiji. Nkavua musue kubabutuila mu Ejipitu mene." 
Ezekiel20:9 Kadi, tshivua muenze nanku to, bua bena ditunga divua bena Izrayele basombe kabavu kumpepeja. Bualu bantu aba bavua bateleja mumvua mulaye bena Izrayele bua kubapatula mu Ejipitu." 
Ezekiel20:10 Nanku, meme kubapatula mu Ejipitu, kubafikisha mu tshipela." 
Ezekiel20:11 Mvua mubalongeshe meyi ne mikenji bi-mvua muele bua bantu bonsu badi babilonda bikale ne muoyi. 
Ezekiel20:12 Mvua muele diyi kabidi bua banemeke dituku dia Dikisha, bua kuleja diumvuangana didi pankatshi panyi nabu, bua kubavuluija kabidi ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mubajidile bua bangenzele mudimu." 
Ezekiel20:13 Kadi bena Izrayele bavua bantombokela mu tshipela. Bavua balengulula mikenji yanyi. Bavua bapepeja meyi anyi adi afikisha muntu udi walama ku muoyi. Bavua banyange bikole dituku dia Dikisha. Nanku meme kuela meji tshiakabidi a kubajikijila tshiji tshianyi mu tshipela bua kubabutula. 
Ezekiel20:14 Kadi tshiena muenze nanku to, bualu bantu bavua bammone mpatula bena Izrayele mu tshipela, bavua mua kumpepeja." 
Ezekiel20:15 Kadi mu tshipela mvua muditshipe ne: tshiena mua kubafikisha mu ditunga dimpe dimvua mubatekele, didi ne mabele ne buitshi." 
Ezekiel20:16 Mvua muditshipe nanku, bualu bavua babenge kulama meyi ne mikenji bianyi, kabidi bavua banyange dituku dianyi dia Dikisha. Bavua bitaba anu mvidie yabu." 
Ezekiel20:17 Kadi meme kumvua luse lua bungi. Nanku, tshivua mubashipe, mubabutule mu tshipela to. ”" 
Ezekiel20:18 “Mvua mukandike bana babu mu tshipela ne: Kanulondi meyi ne mikenji bivua bankambua benu badielela. Kunukukuidi mvidie yabu mibi imvua mubenge. Tshianana nudi nupia mikiya. 
Ezekiel20:19 Meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nulonde mikenji yanyi. Nukumbaje meyi anyi. 
Ezekiel20:20 Nujidile dituku dianyi dia Dikisha bua kuleja mutudi batue nenu ndondu, ne bua nuenu kuvuluka ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Ezekiel20:21 Kadi bana babu kabidi bavua bantombokela. Kabavua bakumbaje mikenji yanyi. Kabavua balame meyi anyi adi afikisha muntu udi walama ku muoyi. Bavua banyanga dituku dia Dikisha. Diba adi, mvua mujadike ne: nembanyoke ne tshiji. Ndi musue kubajikijilatshi mu tshipela." 
Ezekiel20:22 Kadi tshiena muenze nanku, bua bantu bavua bammone mpatula bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, kabavu kumpepeja." 
Ezekiel20:23 Kadi mu tshipela mvua muditshipe ne: nennumuangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu mu matunga a bende. 
Ezekiel20:24 Mvua muditshipe nanku, bualu kabavua balame meyi ne mikenji bianyi, kabavua banemeka dituku dia Dikisha. Kadi bavua batendelela mvidie mibi ya batatuabu." 
Ezekiel20:25 Meme kubapesha kabidi mikenji, kadi kayivua mibenzele bimpe to. Mvua mubapeshe meyi avua kaayi abapesha muoyi." 
Ezekiel20:26 Mvua muanyishe bua bapie mikiya, padibu balambule ba muanabute, babashipa. Bionsu abi bivua bibakuatshisha bowa, bua bavuluke ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel20:27 — Wewe Yezekiyele, ambile bena Izrayele bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mbamanyisha ne: “Bankambua benu bavua bantombokela, babenge kungitaba." 
Ezekiel20:28 Meme kubafikisha mu ditunga dimvua muditshipe bua kubapesha. Kadi, kuaka kuayibu, mbamone nsongu ya mikuna ivua ne mitshi ya bifufu. Kubandabu kuine aku bua kulambula milambu. Bavua bamfikisha munda ne bintu bivuabu balambula, manananshi avuabu bosha, ne maluvu avuabu balambula muaba awu." 
Ezekiel20:29 Ke meme kubakonka ne: ‘Tshinudi nuya kukeba pa mikuna mitumbuke ntshinyi?’ Biangatshile musangu awu, badi binyika miaba ayi ne: mmiaba ya kutendelela mvidie." 
Ezekiel20:30 Wambile bena Izrayele ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unukonka ne: Nudi nulonda tshibidilu tshia bankambua benu, nupia mikiya, nuntombokela, nunemeka mvidie yabu indi mubenge bua tshinyi?" 
Ezekiel20:31 Nansha mpindiewu nudi nupia mikiya, panudi nuyilambula bintu, nuyishipela bana benu. Nuenu bena Izrayele, nudi nuela meji ne: panudi nuenza nanku, ndi mua kuitaba bua nuenu kunkonka bualu anyi? Kabiena mua kuenzeka to! Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, tshiena mua kuitaba bua nunkonke bualu to." 
Ezekiel20:32 Nudi nuela meji ne: nudi mua kuikala bu bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi batendelela mitshi ne mabue anyi? Nansha kakese! Kabiakuenzeka to." 
Ezekiel20:33 Ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi. Nennukengeshe ne bukole buonsu. Tshiji tshianyi netshinunyoke bikole. Ke mundi nnuleja ne: ndi mfumuenu. 
Ezekiel20:34 Nennumushe munkatshsi mua bisamba ne mua matunga munuvua batangadika. Nennusangishe kaba kamue bua numanye bukole buanyi, mimanye tshindi ngenza pandi mufike munda." 
Ezekiel20:35 Netuye nenu mu tshipela, muaba udi kauyi bantu bakuabu. Nennuimanyike kumpala kuanyi bua kunulumbuluisha." 
Ezekiel20:36 Nennunyoke bu mumvua munyoke bankambua benu mu tshipela tshidi pabuipi ne Ejipitu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba nanku awu." 
Ezekiel20:37 Nenkuate mudimu bua nuikale tshiakabidi tshisumbu tshianyi tshia mikoku, ne bua nunemeke malu onsu anuvua balaye pa kutua nanyi ndondu." 
Ezekiel20:38 Nengumushe munkatshi muenu bantu bavua bantombokela kabayi bangitaba. Nembumushe mu matunga adibu basombe. Kadi kabena bapingana mu buloba bua Izrayele bua kusombamu to. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel20:39 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nnuambila ne: Nuenu bena Izrayele, muntu yonsu wa kunudi, nansha yeye mukukuile mvidie yende mibi indi mubenge, kadi dikuabu dituku nenuikale anu ne tshilumbu tshia kungitaba. Nenulekele kupepeja dina dianyi dia tshijila, nulekele kulambula mvidie milambu." 
Ezekiel20:40 Nanku, bena Izrayele bonsu badi mu ditunga nebantendelele pa mukuna munene wa Izrayele, udibu bajidile mu dina dianyi. Muaba awu, nennuakidile bimpe; nennulombe bua nuntuadile bionsu binudi basue kundambula, nyama ne bintu bimpe bia pa madimi enu." 
Ezekiel20:41 Meme mumane kunumusha munkatshi mua bisamba ne matunga anuvua bamuangalake, nennusangishe kaba kamue. Nengitabe milambu yenu ya dipembu dimpe. Nanku, malu onsu andi nnuenzela, nealeje bantu bakuabu ne: meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Ezekiel20:42 Nuenu kabidi, nenujadike ne: ndi Maweja-Nangila, bualu nennufikishe mu ditunga dia Izrayele dimvua muditshipe, mulaye bua kupesha bankambua benu." 
Ezekiel20:43 Muaba awu nenuvuluke malu enu a kale avua manupishe mikiya. Bundu nebunukuate bua malu mabi onsu anuvua benze. 
Ezekiel20:44 Nuenu bena Izrayele, tshiena nnunyoka bilondeshile malu mabi anuvua benze nansha. Kadi nengenze bionsu bua nunemeke dina dianyi. Nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. Nuamanyi kumvua malu amvua musue kunuambila meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Ezekiel21:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel21:2 — Muntu, tangila luseke lua kuinshi mu ditunga. Utandishe mu dina dianyi bantu badi basombe mu ditu didi kuinshi mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel21:3 Ubambile bua bateleje miaku yanyi indi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ntandisha nayi ditu didi kuinshi mu ditunga: “Nentemeshe kadilu bua kuosha mitshi yebe yonsu, mibishi nansha miume. Kakuena tshidi mua kujima ndimi ya kadilu aku to. Nekalambuke biangatshile kuinshi too ne ku mutu mu ditunga. Nekoshe bantu bonsu." 
Ezekiel21:4 Muntu yonsu neamone ne: meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mutemeshe kadilu aku. Neamone kabidi ne: kakuena tshidi mua kukajima to.” 
Ezekiel21:5 Meme kuandamuna ne: — Eyi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, bakadi badila muadi, banjana ne: “Udi wakula anu mu mianu itudi katuyi mua kumvua.”" 
Ezekiel21:6 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel21:7 — Yezekiyele, kudimuka utangile ku Yerushalayime. Ukanyine miaba ya kutendelela mvidie, utandishe ditunga dia Izrayele." 
Ezekiel21:8 Umanyishe bena Izrayele ne: Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Nennuluishe, nempatule muele wanyi wa mvita mu tshibubu bua kunushipa bonsu pamue, bimpe ne babi." 
Ezekiel21:9 Ndi musue kunubutula bonsu. Ke pandi mupatule muele bua kushipa yonsu wa kunudi biangatshile kuinshi mu ditunga too ne ku mutu. 
Ezekiel21:10 Bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mupatule muele mu tshibubu tshiawu. Tshiena mua kuupingajamu kabidi to.” 
Ezekiel21:11 Kadi wewe Yezekiyele, winame panshi, bu muntu udi kayi kabidi mua kutekemena tshintu tshia nsongu, utua mikemu, bobu batangile." 
Ezekiel21:12 Nebakuebeje ne: udi utua mikemu bua tshinyi? Newandamune ne: “Ndi mupete lumu lubi, lukadi pa kukumbana. Bianza biabu nebilengelele kabiyi ne bukole. Binu biabu nebitutakanangane. Nebasukuile mu bilamba bua bowa. Mioyi neyitekete. Tshikondu tshia kubanyoka tshikadi pabuipi. Telejayi! Bionsu abi nebikumbane mpindiewu. Maweja-Nangila ke udi umanyisha malu awu.”" 
Ezekiel21:13 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel21:14 — Muntu, akula mu dina dianyi. Wambile bantu malu andi meme Maweja-Nangila mbamanyisha ne: “Tangilayi muele, muele mutue udi wengelela." 
Ezekiel21:15 Mbausakishe bua kushipa bantu. Mbaupele, mbausukule bua wengelele, wele nsese." 
Ezekiel21:16 Mvua muufile bua baupele, bua bamone mua kufuuna nawu. Bavua bausakishe, bausukule bua kuupesha mushipianganyi." 
Ezekiel21:17 Wewe Yezekiyele, ela mbila ya dikenga. Mbatume muele bua kushipa bantu banyi, ne bamfumu bonsu ba bena Izrayele. Nebabashipe bonsu musangu umue. Uditute bianza pa tshiadi ne kanyinganyinga." 
Ezekiel21:18 Dikenga nedikale dinene dipite. Ke tshindi ngamba meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. 
Ezekiel21:19 Mpindiewu, Yezekiyele, akula mu dina dianyi. Ukume bikashi. Ukume musangu umue, misangu ibidi, misangu isatu. Bualu muele ewu ke muele udi ushipangana. Neushipe bantu ba bungi, miaba yonsu." 
Ezekiel21:20 Muele udi utekesha mu maboku, uzakaja bantu bonsu. Kumpala kua tshiibi tshionsu, ndi muteke muele wa kushipa nawu bantu. Udi ukenka bu ndimi ya kapia, ukeba anu kushipa bantu." 
Ezekiel21:21 Wewe muele mutue, ushipe bantu ku dia balume, ubashipe ku dia bakaji, ubashipe nseke yonsu!" 
Ezekiel21:22 Meme kabidi nenkume bikashi, nentalaje tshiji tshianyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Ezekiel21:23 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel21:24 — Muntu, leja njila ibidi idi mukalenga wa Babilone mua kupitshila ne muele wende wa mvita. Njila yonsu ibidi ipatukile anu mu ditunga dimue. Muaba udi njila yonsu utuadija, uteke tshimanyinu tshidi tshileja ditunga didi muntu mua kufika padiye ulonda njila eyi." 
Ezekiel21:25 Njila umue neafikishe bena mvita ba bena Babilone mu tshimenga tshia Raba, tshia bena Amone. Njila mukuabu neabafile mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime tshidi mu Yuda, tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Ezekiel21:26 Mukalenga wa mu Babilone udi wimana mu masangu a njila, muaba udi njila ibidi ituadija bua amone mua kutempa lubuku. Udi unyungisha mikete, webeja mvidie malu, ukenketa mitshima ya nyama." 
Ezekiel21:27 Mukete udi uleja Yerushalayime, udi mu tshianza tshiende tshia balume. Nanku mukalenga neatume diyi bua bena mvita baye ku Yerushalayime, benda bela bibingu bia mvita. Neateke biamu binene bia mvita, bua binyange biibi bia tshimenga. Neele mishiki ya buloba, neumbule mikidi." 
Ezekiel21:28 Bena mu Yerushalayime badi bela meji ne: “Bivua muena lubuku mumanyishe mukalenga wa bena Babilone kabiena mua kuenzeka to, bualu dilaya divuabu batulaye didi ditalama bimpe.” Kadi mukalenga wa bena Babilone udi ubavuluija mudibu batombokela Maweja-Nangila, kabidi mudibu ne bua kuya nabu mu bupika." 
Ezekiel21:29 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila mbambila ne: “Nudi numvuluija bubi buenu matuku onsu, ku malu mabi anudi nuenza patoke. Malu onsu anudi nuenza, adi amvuluija munudi bena tshibawu. Nanku, bu munudi kanuyi basue kudilengeja, nenubuele mu bianza bia baluishi!" 
Ezekiel21:30 “Wewe mukalenga wa bena Izrayele, udi muntu mubi, udi kayi ukumbaja bivuaye mulaye. Kadi tshikondu tshikadi tshifika, tshidi buenzavi buebe ne bua kujika." 
Ezekiel21:31 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: kuakuikala kabidi ne bimanyinu bia bukalenga to. Nebakutale tshifulu tshia bumfumu. Malu onsu mmandamuke. Bantu bapuekele nebasombe miaba ya lumu. Bantu ba bukole nebabapuekeshe. 
Ezekiel21:32 Nemuikale amu mbuwa pa mbuwa! Nenshiye mu Yerushalayime anu mbuwa. Tshimenga tshijima netshibutuke. Kadi nengenze bualu ebu, amu muntu undi mupeshe bumfumu bua kubutula tshimenga mumane kufika. ”" 
Ezekiel21:33 Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: — Wewe Yezekiyele, ambile bena Amone ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unukanyina, bua bipendu binuvua bapende bena Izrayele. Muele udiku, munuindile bua kunushipa. Mbausakishe bua kushipa nawu bantu. Mbaupele anu bua wikale wele nsese." 
Ezekiel21:34 Panutshidi nuitaba malu a dishima avua bantu abu bamone mu ndota, nansha avuabu banuambile, mbamane kulongolola muele bua kukosa mitu yenu, nuenu benji ba bibi, badi kabayi bakumbaja tshi-vuabu balaye. Bualu tshikondu tshiakumbanyi tshidi malu enu mabi ne bua kujika." 
Ezekiel21:35 Mpindiewu, bakalenga ba bena Babilone, pingajayi miele yenu mu bibubu. Bualu nennubutuile anu muaba uvuabu banufukile, mu ditunga divuabu banulelele." 
Ezekiel21:36 Nennupumuine tshiji tshianyi. Netshinuoshe bu mudi kadilu. Nennufile mu bianza bia bantu ba lonji badi bamanye mua kukengeshangana. 
Ezekiel21:37 Nebanuoshe mu kadilu. Mashi enu neapuekele mu ditunga dienu. Pashishe muntu nansha umue kakunuvuluka kabidi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku. ” 
Ezekiel22:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel22:2 — Muntu, udilongolole bua kulumbuluisha tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, tshia bashipianganyi. Kutshinyi to! Ubavuluije malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Ezekiel22:3 Ubamanyishe tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: “Udi mulekele bantu bebe bua bashipangane. Ke mudibu bakukebela kabuta. Badi benza mpingu indi mubenge bua kutendelela mvidie. Badi bapisha buloba buebe mikiya. 
Ezekiel22:4 Nanku, wewe Yerushalayime udi muena tshibawu tshia bantu bonsu bavuabu bashipe muebe. Udi mupie mikiya bua mpingu eyi idi bantu bebe benze. Wewe nkayebe ke udi udisemejila pabuipi tshikondu tshia kabuta kebe. Mataku ebe mmabadika! Ke pandi muanyishe bua bakuseke kudi bantu benyi. Bantu ba mu matunga onsu nebakutuishe bundu." 
Ezekiel22:5 Ukadi ne lumu lubi. Ditunga diebe ndia tshimvundu. Matunga adi kule ne matunga adi pabuipi neakuseke. 
Ezekiel22:6 “Muebe, mulombodi yonsu wa bena Izrayele mmushipe bantu kabayi bualu, anu bua muanzu udiye nawu." 
Ezekiel22:7 Muebe, muntu kena unemeka tatuende nansha mamuende. Badi bakengesha benyi, batatshisha bana ba nshiya ne bakaji bakamba." 
Ezekiel22:8 Bantu kabena banemeka nansha kakese miaba yanyi ya tshijila. Badi banyanga dituku dia Dikisha. 
Ezekiel22:9 Muebe, bantu badi bashiminyina bakuabu malu bua babashipe. Pa mikuna bantu bebe badi badia bintu bia ku milambu idibu balambule mvidie. Badi benza malu a bundu bupite." 
Ezekiel22:10 Bamue mbabuelele mukaji wa tatuabu mu nzubu. Bakuabu mbasombe ne bakaji ku bukole padibu ku tshijila tshia bakaji. 
Ezekiel22:11 Banga badi banyanga nzubu wa bende pa kuangata mukaji wa bende. Bakuabu badi bangata ku bukole mukaji uvua muana musele; nansha bana babu ba bakaji ba tatuabu, nansha ba mamuabu, benda nabu tshiendenda." 
Ezekiel22:12 Muebe, badi bangata bantu ku mudimu, babafuta bua bashipe bantu bakuabu. Badi basombeshangana makuta bua kupeta kasombele ka bungi. Badi banyenga bintu bia muena mutumba bua kunema nabi. Kadi badi bampua muoyi kashidi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Ke malu andi mujadike awu." 
Ezekiel22:13 “Kadi nuenu bena Yerushalayime, nennunyoke bikole ne tshiji, bua bintu binuvua bapete pa kudinga bantu ne bua bantu banuvua bashipe." 
Ezekiel22:14 Nenuikale ne bukitu bukumbane, kabidi ne bukole bua kuluangana nanyi, pandi mfika bua kununyoka anyi? Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila nengenze amu tshindi ngamba." 
Ezekiel22:15 Nennutangalaje munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, mu matunga a bende. Nenjikije malu mabi onsu anudi nuenza." 
Ezekiel22:16 Nebanufuishe bundu ku mesu a bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Nanku diba adi, nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel22:17 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne:" 
Ezekiel22:18 — Yezekiyele, ndi mumone ne: bena Izrayele mbafuanangane ne bikanganya. Badi bu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha bu tshiamu tshia kabanda, nansha bu tshiamu tshikunze, nansha bu tshiamu tshia ntenda, bidibu bela mu kapia bua kubiengulula, kumusha bikanganya." 
Ezekiel22:19 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mbambila ne: “Nudi bu biamu bibi bidibu kabayi banji kuengulula. Nanku ndi nnusangisha popamue mu tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. 
Ezekiel22:20 Badi basangisha biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, biamu bia kabanda, bia ntenda, nansha biamu bikuabu mu ditanda, babiela mu kapia bua kubiengulula! Ke munganuenzela, bua tshiji tshikole tshindi natshi. Nennusangishe kaba kamue, bua meme kunuengulula mu kapia." 
Ezekiel22:21 Mu Yerushalayime, nennuele mu kapia ka tshiji tshianyi, bua kunuengulula bu mudibu benza ne biamu." 
Ezekiel22:22 Nenuikale bafuanangane ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole tshidibu bengulula mu kapia. Nenku nenujadike ne: udi mutupumuine tshiji ke Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel22:23 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel22:24 — Yezekiyele, ambila bena Izrayele ne: ditunga dienu ndifuanangane ne buloba budi kabuyi bulokela mvula. Nebubutuke bua tshiji tshianyi, bu mudi buloba budi kabuyi bupeta mayi." 
Ezekiel22:25 Bu mudi nyama ya ntambue mikuate nyama ikungula, ke mudi balombodi benu bashipe bantu, bangata ne bintu bia bantu ba bende, bashipesha balume ba bungi, bua bakaji babu bashale bakamba." 
Ezekiel22:26 Batuangaji benu kabena balonda mikenji yanyi, kabena banemeka miaba idibu bajidila mu dina dianyi. Kabena basunguluja bintu bidi bia tshijila, ne bintu bikuabu bidi bia tshianana. Kabena balongesha bantu mudi bintu bikuabu kabiyi ne mikiya, bikuabu ne mikiya. Kabena banemeka kabidi dituku dia Dikisha; badi badilengulula ku bukole. Nanku, kamuena muntu nansha umue udi unnemeka, mudibu ne bua kunnemeka." 
Ezekiel22:27 Balombodi benu badi bashipangana anu bua kunema, bu mudi nyama ya lonji ishipa nyama, iyipandabipese bipese." 
Ezekiel22:28 Bambi benu badi babuikila bilema bienu abi, bu mudibu bela lupemba ku tshimana tshia nzubu. Badi bashima bantu, babambila malu amvua tshiyi mubaleje. Badi bambila bantu malu, babadinga ne: mmafume kudi Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila tshivua mubambile bualu to." 
Ezekiel22:29 Miaba yonsu mu ditunga badi bakengesha bantu, biba bintu biabu. Badi bakengesha bapele ne bakengi. Badi batatshisha benyi, kabayi babanemeka." 
Ezekiel22:30 Mvua mukebe muntu uvua mua kuibaka tshimana, nansha uvua mua kuimana muaba uvuabu bakeba kushimbula, bua kunkandika bua tshibutudi tshimenga. Kadi tshiena mupete muntu nansha umue." 
Ezekiel22:31 Nanku meme kubapumuina tshiji tshianyi. Meme kubabutula mu kapia, bualu mvua mufike munda. Meme kubanyoka bua malu abu mabi. Ke mundi ngamba nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel23:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel23:2 — Yezekiyele, teleja tshilumbu tshia bana babidi ba bakaji, batuabu balela kudi mamu umue." 
Ezekiel23:3 Pavuabu bansongakaji bavua benda tshiendenda mu Ejipitu, muvuabu basombe. Muaba awu, ke uvuabu bababonda ku mabele musangu wa kumpala. Ke muaba muabu batuadija kunaya nabu, babakuata ku mabele abu a bunsongakaji." 
Ezekiel23:4 Muanabute uvua Okola, muanamukala Okoliba. Muanabute udi tshimfuanyi tshia Samariya, muibidi tshimfuanyi tshia Yerushalayime. Mvua mubasele bonsu babidi. Bobu kundelela bana ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
Ezekiel23:5 Kadi Okola, nansha meme mumusele, uvua wenda amu buendenda. Uvua walakana bena mutumba nende bena Ashure. Kupetaye bananga bende momu amu." 
Ezekiel23:6 Bantu abu bavua bavuale bilamba bikunze, bu mutotabu balombodi ba maloba ne balumbuluishi. Bavua bansongalume balengele, bamanye bimpe mua kubanda pa nyama ya tubalu." 
Ezekiel23:7 Okola uvua mudifile kudi balombodi aba ba bena Ashure. Kadi misangu yonsu ivuaye upetangana ne umue wa kudibu, uvua utendelela mvidie yabu mibi indi mbenga." 
Ezekiel23:8 Uvua mutungunuke ne tshiendenda, mutuaye wenza mu Ejipitu. Kuine aku patshituaye nsongakaji, balume bakavua benda nende tshiendenda, bamubonda ku mabele ende a bushika nkunde, bamusaka ku malu mabi." 
Ezekiel23:9 Diba adi, meme kumulekela mu bianza bia bananga bende bena Ashure, bavuaye mupite kunanga." 
Ezekiel23:10 Kumuvulabu bilamba bionsu, kumushiya butaka, kumutapabu muele, kumushipa. Bakatua bamane kukuata bana bende ba balume ne ba bakaji bua kuya nabu. Ke mmuabu bamunyoke nanku bua bakaji bakuabu bamone bionsu abi, badimuke." 
Ezekiel23:11 — Okoliba utua mumone mmuabu banyoke muanabu, kadi mua muenze bibi mupite Okola. Utua wenda tshiendenda mupitshishe." 
Ezekiel23:12 Uvua walakana kabidi balombodi ba maloba ne balumbuluishi ba bena Ashure. Ke bena mutumba nende batua batuale bimpe, batshitua bansongalume balengele, bamanye mua kubanda pa nyama ya tubalu." 
Ezekiel23:13 Yeye mene utua anu mubuele mu njila wa buendenda. Mvua mumone ne: bana ba bakaji babidi aba badi bena buenzavi bua mushindu umue! 
Ezekiel23:14 Kadi Okoliba utua muenze bibi bipite. Dituku dikuabu, kumonaye bantu batuabu bazola ku tshimana, balaba mukubu mukunze. Bimfuanyi abi bitua bileja bena Babilone." 
Ezekiel23:15 Batua babavuadike mikaba mu tshimonu ne bitambala bile ku mitu yabu. Bavua bamueneke bu bilobu bia mvita. Bimfuanyi abi bitua bileja bimpe bena Babilone, mushindu udibu basombe mu ditunga diabu." 
Ezekiel23:16 Okoliba utua mualakane bantu abu bikole diakamue patuaye mubamone. Kubatuminaye mikenji mu ditunga diabu, ubabikila." 
Ezekiel23:17 Nanku bena Babilone kufika bua kuenda nende tshiendenda. Kumunyangabu ne malu abu mabi a bundu. Yeye mumane kuenda nabu tshiendenda tshibi, kubabengaye." 
Ezekiel23:18 Utua udileja patoke nuwuaye mukaji mudisombele, uleja bantu butaka buende. Nanku, kumbipilaye; meme kumubenga bu mumvua mubenge yayende." 
Ezekiel23:19 Kadi kuvuaye kuenda tshiendenda kupitshisha. Kuenzaye bibi anu muvuaye muenze ku bunsongakaji buende mu Ejipitu. 
Ezekiel23:20 Muaba awu, uvua amu mualakane bananga bende bavua ne lukuka lua kuenda nende tshiendenda, bikale ne mibidi ya bulume bu ya nyama ya mpunde, nansha ya tubalu." 
Ezekiel23:21 “Okoliba, wewe kutuadija kuenza tshiakabidi malu mabi muuvua wenza ku bunsongakaji buebe, pauvua muanyishe bua bena Ejipitu bakunayile mu tshiadi, babonde mabele ebe a bunsongakaji." 
Ezekiel23:22 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba ne: Ndi ntuma bananga bebe baudi mubenge mpindiewu bua bakuluishe. Ndi mbabikila batuma miaba yonsu bua bakukengeshe. 
Ezekiel23:23 Ndi nsangisha bena Babilone, bena Kesede bonsu, bena Pekode, bena Showa, bena Kowa. Bena Ashure kabidi nebadisangishe nabu. Nanku nensangishe bansongalume bonsu aba ba malengele, balombodi ba ditunga ne balumbuluishi, bena mvita ne bantu banene, bonsu bikale bamanye mua kubanda bimpe pa tubalu." 
Ezekiel23:24 Nebafumine ku mutu wa ditunga ne matempu a mvita, matempu makuabu a mishindu yonsu, ne tshiluilu tshinene tshia bena mvita. Nebikale ne ngabu, bamane kuvuala kabidi bifulu bia tshiamu. Nebakuele munkatshi. Nembumvuije tshilumbu tshiebe. Nebakulumbuluishe bilondeshile mikenji yabu." 
Ezekiel23:25 Bu mundi mukufikile munda, nenganyishe bua bakunyange ne tshikisu. Nebakukose diulu ne matshi, bakutapa ne miele yabu, bakushipe. Nebangate bana bebe ba balume ne ba bakaji; badi bashale, nebaboshe batshikale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel23:26 Nebakuele bilamba biebe, bumushe ne bilengejilu biebe." 
Ezekiel23:27 Nenkutekeshe malu a bundu ne a buendenda auvua mutuadije kuenza mu Ejipitu. Kuakualakana kabidi muntu, kuakujinga kabidi bena Ejipitu to." 
Ezekiel23:28 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: nenkufile mu bianza bia bantu baudi udiombola, baudi ubenga." 
Ezekiel23:29 Nebakukengeshe ne lukinu. Nebakunyenge bintu biudi mupete ku mudimu webe. Nebakushiye butaka, kuyi bilamba bu mukaji mudisombele, bua bonsu bakumone. Lukuka luebe ne buendenda buebe" 
Ezekiel23:30 ke bivua bikukebela bionsu abi. Uvua muende tshiendenda ne bantu ba matunga a benyi. Wewe kudinyanga, kutendelela mvidie yabu mibi indi mubenge." 
Ezekiel23:31 Uvua mulonde tshilejilu tshia yayebe. Nanku nenkunuishe dikopu dia tshiji tshianyi, bu mumvua mudinuishe yayebe." 
Ezekiel23:32 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi nkuambila ne: Neunue dikopu dia tshiji divua yayebe munue, dikopu dinene, diondoke. Nebakuseke bakulembakaje, bualu dikopu edi didi diuwule tente!" 
Ezekiel23:33 Neukuatshike, upete makenga. Dikopu edi ndia bowa ne luzakalu. Yayebe Samariya, mmumane kudinua, mujikije." 
Ezekiel23:34 Neudinue too, umana ne ku ndekelu. Neudiboze ku menu ebe. Neuditape mputa pa tshiadi ne bitata biadi. Ke mundi njadika meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu!" 
Ezekiel23:35 Ndi ngamba ne: bu muudi mumpue muoyi, mumbenge, nenkunyoke bua tshiendenda ne bua buenzavi buebe.”" 
Ezekiel23:36 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, udilongolole bua kulumbuluisha Okola ne Okoliba. Ubafunde patoke ku tshilumbu bua malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Ezekiel23:37 Badi bakaji bena tshiendenda, bena tshinyangu. Badi benda tshiendenda, batendelela mvidie mibi indi mubenge. Badi bashipa bana babu ba balume bavuabu bandelela, babalambule mvidie." 
Ezekiel23:38 Kadi mbenze kabidi malu mabi makuabu! Dituku mene adi bavua bapishe kabidi muaba wanyi wa tshijila mikiya, bapepeje dituku dia Dikisha dinjidila meme." 
Ezekiel23:39 Bualu dituku mene divuabu balambule mvidie yabu bana babu ba balume, bavua babuela muaba wanyi wa tshjila, mu nzubu wanyi meme, bamupisha mikiya." 
Ezekiel23:40 Bavua batume kabidi mikenji bua kubikila bantu ba matunga a kule. Bantu abu bamane kupeta mukenji awu, kufikabu lukasa kudibu. Samariya ne Yerushalayime kuowa mayi, kudilengeja bualu buabu, kudilaba bilabu ku mesu, kuvuala bilengejilu." 
Ezekiel23:41 Pashishe kusombabu mu nkuasa ya tshisaka mimpe minene, bateka mesa kumpala kuabu. Pa mesa apu pavua musenga wa kamonya, ne mafuta masambakaja ne manananshi, bivuabu bapete kundi." 
Ezekiel23:42 Musumba munene wa bantu kufika kudibu, bakula, basanka talala bu mu tshibilu. Kuvua nangananga bantu bafume ku nseke yonsu ya mu tshipela. Kuelabu nsongakaji ibidi ayi lukanu ku maboku, kubasabu bifulu bimpe bia lumu ku mitu." 
Ezekiel23:43 Nanku meme kuamba ne: “Nansha udi ne mubidi wende munyanguke menemene ne tshiendenda, udi anu musue kuenza kabidi malu a buendenda." 
Ezekiel23:44 Balume badi bamutantshila! Badi bangata Okola ne Okoliba, benza nabu malu mabi babasunsula, amu bu mudibu benza ne bakaji badisombele." 
Ezekiel23:45 Kadi bantu ba nsongu nubafundile bakaji aba tshibawu, bua tshiendenda tshiabu, ne bua bantu bavuabu bashipe. Bualu mbende tshiendenda, badi kabidi ne mashi ku bianza!”" 
Ezekiel23:46 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: “Sangisha bantu bua kubaluisha. Babazakeje, babanyenge bintu biabu!" 
Ezekiel23:47 Nubase mabue, nubasaye ne miele yenu. Nushipe bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji, nuoshe nzubu yabu." 
Ezekiel23:48 Nenjikije malu mabi adi matampakane mu ditunga edi. Bakaji bonsu nebadimuke. Kabakuidikija kabidi malu mabi avua nsongakaji ibidi eyi yenza to. 
Ezekiel23:49 Bakaji babidi aba mbabanyoke bua malu abu mabi a bundu, ne bua mvidie ivuabu batendelela. Nenku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel24:1 Matuku dikumi a ngondu wa dikumi tshidimu tshia tshitema tshi vua bena Izrayele bamane kuya mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel24:2 — Muntu, funda dituku dia lelu pa mukanda, bualu lelu ke udi mukalenga wa Babilone ubanga kuluisha Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel24:3 Londela bantu banyi badi bantombokela lusumuinu elu. Ubambile ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke udi mutume diyi bua kunulongeshalu. Uteke luesu peku. Welamu mayi. 
Ezekiel24:4 Utekemu mabulu a munyinyi, onsu a munyinyi muimpe wa ku tshibelu ne wa ku diboku. Uluwuje ne mifuba mimpe." 
Ezekiel24:5 Wangata munyinyi amu wa mikoku mimpe. Ela nkunyi kuinshi kua luesu. Wipike bionsu, bipie bisaba. Nansha mifuba idi ne bua kupia." 
Ezekiel24:6 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Tshimenga tshia bashipianganyi netshipete diakabi, tshidi bu luesu lukuate dimoma, ludibu kabayi mua kusukula kabidi to. Sabula munyinyi udi mu luesu, ku dibulu ku dibulu, lushale munda mutupu. Kuena mua kusunguluja diudi usabula." 
Ezekiel24:7 Mashi avuabu bela panshi atshidi mu tshimenga. Bavua baela pa mabue, kabayi nansha baajibikila ne buloba. Buloba ki mbuanji kunua mashi aa to." 
Ezekiel24:8 Meme ndi nshiya mashi pa dibue edi, muaba udiwu amueneka bimpe, bua ajule tshiji tshianyi, ambikile bua nsombuele." 
Ezekiel24:9 Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Diakabi ndia tshimenga tshia bashipianganyi! Bualu ndi ngasa tshioshelu tshinene!" 
Ezekiel24:10 Ela nkunyi minene, sonsola kapia, ulambe munyinyi, upie umana, welamu ndungu, mifuba ipie ibobe." 
Ezekiel24:11 Pashishe uteke luesu lua munda mutupu pa mbabula, bua lupie, lukunze, bua mikiya idi munda mualu ijike, bua dimoma diumbuke." 
Ezekiel24:12 Kadi bionsu bindi ngenza kabiena biambuluisha. Dimoma ndikuate ku luesu bikole, kadiena mua kumuka nansha ku kapia." 
Ezekiel24:13 Yerushalayime we, udi munyanguke bua malu mabi auvua muenze. Mvua musue kukulengeja, kadi kuvua muanyishe to. Nanku, bua wewe kulengela, anu meme muanji kukunyoka ne tshiji tshianyi tshionsu." 
Ezekiel24:14 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika ne: bionsu ebi nebikumbane. Nenkunyoke tshiyi mpingana panyima, tshiyi ngunwua kanyinganyinga, nansha luse. Nebakunyoke bua malu ebe mabi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel24:15 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel24:16 — Yezekiyele, ndi nkunyenga mukajebe uudi utangila, usankidila. Neafue lufu lua tshikosu. Kadi kuena mua kudila muadi, kuena mua kutua mikemu, kuena mua kupuekesha binsonji to." 
Ezekiel24:17 Udidile anu munda munda. Kadi kutekeshi madilu to. Vuala tshitambala tshiebe ku mutu, ne bisabata biebe bu matuku makuabu. Kusokoki mpala, kudi biakudia bidi bena mutumba bakutuadila bua madilu." 
Ezekiel24:18 Mvua muyukile ne bantu dinda, dilolu mene mukajanyi kufua. Butshia dinda meme kuenza muvua Maweja-Nangila mungambile." 
Ezekiel24:19 Bantu bavua bangebeja bua kubumvuija mumvua muenze amu. 
Ezekiel24:20 Meme kubandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila udi mungambile bua meme kunumanyisha," 
Ezekiel24:21 nuenu bena Izrayele, ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nennyange nzubu wanyi wa tshijila. Nudi nudisua nende, numutangila nusanka. Ke muaba unudi nutekemena bua kupetela muoyi. Nebashipe bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji banuvua bashiye mu Yerushalayime."
