Ezekiel24:22 Diba adi nenuenze bu muvua Yezekiyele muenze. Kanuakusokoka mpala, kanuakudia biakudia bidi bena mutumba bafike nabi mu madilu." 
Ezekiel24:23 Nenuikale basuike bitambala bienu ku mitu, bavuale bisabata ku makasa enu. Kanuabakanyi, kanudidi muadi. Kadi nenufubidile bua bilema bienu. Muntu yonsu neatue mikemu bualu bua dikenga didi muena mutumba nende nadi." 
Ezekiel24:24 Nenulonde tshilejilu tshia Yezekiyele. Nenuenze bionsu amu mutuaye muenze. Nanku, pakumbana malu andi ngamba aa, nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel24:25 Pashishe, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, nembanyenge nzubu wanyi wa tshijila, muaba udibu basokomena, udibu batangila basanka, udibu badisua nawu, udibu batekemena bikole. Nembanyenge kabidi bana babu ba balume ne ba bakaji." 
Ezekiel24:26 Diba didi bionsu ebi bikumbana, muntu udi mupanduke ku tshipupu etshi, neafike bua kukuambila bivua bienzeka." 
Ezekiel24:27 Dituku adi, kuakuikala kabidi kamama to. Newakule tshiakabidi bua umone mua kuyukila ne muntu uvua mupanduke ku tshipupu atshi. Ke muudi uleja bantu tshilejilu bua bamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel25:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel25:2 — Mpindiewu, Yezekiyele, wambile bena Amone tshibawu tshindi mubafundile." 
Ezekiel25:3 Ubambile bua bateleje tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila mbambila ne: “Nuvua nuseka pavuabu banyanga muaba wanyi wa tshijila, pavuabu babutula ditunga dia bena Izrayele, pavuabu baya ne bena Yuda mu bupika." 
Ezekiel25:4 Nanku, ndi ntuma bendakanyi ba bisamba bia bende, ba kudi diba dipatukila, bua bakuate ditunga dienu. Nebase mpangu yabu mu buloba buenu, nebasemu mitanda yabu. Nebadie bimuma bienu, nebanue mabele anudi nawu." 
Ezekiel25:5 Nennyangakaje tshimenga tshienu tshinene tshia Raba, tshishale muaba wa kudishila nyama ya tumelu. Ditunga dijima dia bena Amone nedishale muaba wa kudishila mikoku. Diba adi, nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel25:6 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: nuvua batuta bikashi, batupika basanka, pavua dikenga dikuata bena Izrayele. Nuenu kuleja munuvua bapeje, balekele bantu banyi lukinu." 
Ezekiel25:7 Nanku, nennuleje bukole buanyi. Nennufile kudi bantu benyi. Nebanunyenge bionsu binudi nabi. Kanuakuikala kabidi tshisamba tshia bantu to. Kanuakuikala ne ditunga to. Nennubutule bonsu kashidi. Diba adi, nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel25:8 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Bena Mowabe bavua bamba ne: bena Yuda badi anu tshisamba bu mudi bisamba bikuabu bionsu. 
Ezekiel25:9 Nanku nentume bantu bua baluishe badi basombela mu bimenga bidi ku mikalu ya ditunga dia Mowabe. Nebabinyange bionsu bilondangane, nansha bidi bipite buimpe bu mudi Bete-Yeshimote, Baale-Meyone ne Kiriyatayime." 
Ezekiel25:10 Nentume bantu bendakanyi badi bafume ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bua bakuate ditunga dia bena Mowabe, bu muvuabu bakuate dia bena Amone. Nanku matuku adi kumpala, bantu kabakuvuluka kabidi bena Mowabe to. Dina diabu nedijimine kashidi." 
Ezekiel25:11 Nennyoke bena Mowabe. Diba adi nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel25:12 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Bena Edome bavua basombuela bikole bena Yuda. Nanku bena Edome mbena tshibawu tshikole. 
Ezekiel25:13 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika ne: Nennyoke bena Edome bikole. Nembutule bantu ne nyama bidi mu ditunga diabu. Ditunga nedishale tshipela, biangatshile ku tshimenga tshia Temane too ne ku tshia Dedane. Bantu ba mu ditunga dia Edome nebafue mu mvita." 
Ezekiel25:14 Bantu banyi bena Izrayele nebasombuele bena Edome mu dina dianyi. Bena Izrayele nebabanyoke bikole, mushindu udi tshiji tshianyi tshilomba. Bena Edome nebalonge mudibu ne bua kuntshina. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu abu.”" 
Ezekiel25:15 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Bena Peleshete bavua benze bibi. Bualu bua lukuna lua kale luvuabu nalu, bavua basombuele baluishi babu ba kuonsu eku ne muoyi wa tshinyangu, babashipa." 
Ezekiel25:16 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi mbamanyisha ne: Nembanyoke. Nembutule bantu bonsu aba badi bafume ku Kaftore, baye kusomba ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Ezekiel25:17 Nembasombuele, nembanyoke bibi. Diba adi, nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel26:1 Tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshivuabu bamane kuya netu mu bupika, dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel26:2 — Yezekiyele, bena Tire badi baseka Yerushalayime, bamba ne: “Ekelekele! Ekelekele! Tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, muaba uvua bantu ba matunga onsu bapitshila, ntshibutuke. Mpindiewu bantu nebafike kuetu bua kusakula. Netuneme bikole bipite, bualu mpindiewu Yerushalayime mmunyanguke! ”" 
Ezekiel26:3 Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika ne: “Wewe tshimenga tshia Tire, nenkunyoke bikole. Nentume bantu ba mu bisamba bivule bua bakuluishe. Nebabuele muebe ne bukole bu bua mavuala a mayi manene." 
Ezekiel26:4 Nebashimbule bimana biebe, babumbule tuleya tuebe. Nenkombe bintu bionsu bidi bishale. Nenshiye anu lubuebue patupu." 
Ezekiel26:5 Nemushale amu tshidila, muaba udi balobi binyina tupamba tuabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku. Bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu ne balue kupawula tshimenga." 
Ezekiel26:6 Nebanyange misoku iudi mutuangane nayi, idi ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Nanku bantu nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel26:7 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba kabidi ne: Wewe tshimenga tshia Tire, ndi nkutumina mukalenga Nebukadnesare wa bena Babilone udi mupite bakalenga bonsu ku bukole. Neafume ku mutu kua ditunga. Nealue kukuluisha ne nyama ya tubalu, matempu, babandi ba pa tubalu, kabidi ne bena mvita bakuabu ba bungi." 
Ezekiel26:8 Neanyange misoku iudi mutuangane nayi ku muelelu wa mayi manene. Pashishe baluishi bebe nebumbule mikidi, nebele mishiki ya buloba bua kubandabu, kukuluisha. Nebakunyunguluile ne ngabu mipite bungi." 
Ezekiel26:9 Nebashimbule bimana bia muebe ne biamu biabu bia mvita. Nebabumbule tuleya tuebe ne bikasu. 
Ezekiel26:10 Lupuishi ludi tubalu tuabu tua bungi tujule panshi nelukubuikile. Bimana biebe nebizakale ne mikuma ya nyama ya tubalu, kabidi ne mutoyi wa matempu abu a mvita. Nanku, nebabuele ku biibi biebe, anu bu mudibu babuela mu tshimenga padibu bamane kushimbula tshitupa tshia tshimana tshia tshimenga." 
Ezekiel26:11 Baluishi bebe nebendeshe nyama yabu ya tubalu mu misesu ya muebe. Nebashipe bantu bebe ku muele. Nebupule makunji manene a muebe. 
Ezekiel26:12 Nebibe bubanji buebe. Nebakunyenge bintu bionsu bidi bishale muebe bia kuenda nabi mushinga. Nebanyange bimana biebe, nebupule nzubu mimpe idi muebe. Nebangate mabue, mabaya, ne bintu bikuabu bionsu bia ku nzubu ayi, babiela mu mayi manene." 
Ezekiel26:13 Nenkandike bantu bua kabimbi kabidi misambu muebe. Kabakumvua kabidi muebe lunzenze ludila to. 
Ezekiel26:14 Nenkushiye anu lubuebue lutupu, muaba udi balobi ba minyinyi ya mu mayi banyikila makondu abu. Kabakuibaka kabidi tshimenga to. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel26:15 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngambila bena mu tshimenga tshia Tire ne: Bantu badi basombe kule ku mielelu ya mayi manene, ne mu bidila, nebazakale pandi mbutula tshimenga tshienu. Nebakuatshike bowa padibu bumvua mudi bantu badibu batapa mputa, bakeba kushipa muebe, batua mikemu." 
Ezekiel26:16 Bakalenga badi balombola bantu badi ku muelelu wa mayi manene, nebatuluke mu nkuasa yabu. Nebavule binkutu biabu, ne bilamba biabu bivuabu balengeje ne buanda. Nebasombe panshi, bazakala amu kuzakala, bakuatshika bowa pa kumona bidi binuenzekela." 
Ezekiel26:17 Nebadile miadi bimba bualu buebe ne: Eyi, mbabutule tshimenga tshivua ne lumu lunene. Majuwa atshi kaena enda kabidi pa mayi manene. Bena tshimenga etshi bavua bamfumu ba mayi manene, bavua batshinyisha bonsu bavua basombe ku muelelu wa mayi manene." 
Ezekiel26:18 Mpindiewu bantu bonsu aba badi bazakala, padibu bamona tshimenga etshi tshidibu babutule. Bantu badi basomba mu bidila, nansha ku muelelu wa mayi manene, badi bazakala bua padi tshimenga etshi tshijimine." 
Ezekiel26:19 “Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Tire, nenkubutule bu mumvua muenze ne bimenga bikuabu, bua muntu nansha umue kasombi kabidi muebe. Nenjule mavuala a mu mayi manene bua akubuikile." 
Ezekiel26:20 Nenkutume mu dijimba dia bafue, bua usombemu ne bantu bafuile kale. Neushale muinshi mua buloba mu kandondu kafuanangane ne makolu, bua usombe ne bafue bavua badianza kufika muaba awu. Kuena upatukamu kabidi to. Pa buloba muaba udi bantu ne muoyi, kuakupeta muaba kabidi to." 
Ezekiel26:21 Bantu bonsu nebakeme batshina, pa kumona muudi ubutuka kashidi. Nebakukebe, kadi muntu nansha umue kakukumona kabidi to. Udi wamba nanku ke meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu.”" 
Ezekiel27:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel27:2 — Muntu, dila muadi bualu bua tshimenga tshia Tire," 
Ezekiel27:3 tshidi ku tshibuelelu tshia mayi manene, tshienda mushinga pamue ne bantu ba bungi badi basombela miaba mikuabu ku muelelu wa mayi. Umanyishe Tire ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi nkuambila ne: “Wewe Tire, udi uditemba ne: ndi muimpe be!" 
Ezekiel27:4 Pa mayi manene, mfumu uvua amu wewe! Mbakuibake bu mudibu base majuwa mimpe, mayi mikale nseke yonsu." 
Ezekiel27:5 Bavua bakuibake ne mabaya a mitshi ya siprese, ivuabu bakebe ku mikuna ya Senire. Bavua bangate mutshi wa sedre wa mu Lebanone, bawimanyike munkatshi mua majuwa bua kusuikaku bilamba bia buatu." 
Ezekiel27:6 Bavua benza mibambu ne mabaya a lusanga lua mu Bashane. Bavua bibake majuwa, benza ne bisasa, ne mitshi ya Sedre ya mu bidila bia bena Ngreke, balamikaku mibanga." 
Ezekiel27:7 Bavua batela bilamba bia buatu, ne buanda buimpe bua mitshi ya mu Ejipitu. Patshidi bantu kule, badi bamona mekala abi, bakumanya! Bilamba bifikuluke ne bikunze, bidi bifuma ku tshidiila tshia Shipre, bavua benza nabi nzubu ya wewe kuteka bintu biebe bia kupana." 
Ezekiel27:8 Uvua muangate bantu ba mu Sidone, ne ba mu Arvade ku mudimu wa kuita matu. Bantu ba muebe mu Tire bavua bamanye bimpe mudimu wabu, bavua bendesha majuwa." 
Ezekiel27:9 Bena midimu ya bianza ba mu Babilone, bena lungenyi lutue, bavua bamanye mudimu wabu bimpe. Bavua bakuate mudimu wa kulongolola mitanta ya ku majuwa. Majuwa onsu avua enda pa mayi avua imana muebe, bendeshi bavua basumba bintu muebe." 
Ezekiel27:10 Bena mvita ba bena Persa, ba mu Lude ne ba mu Pute, bavua benza mudimu mu tshiluilu tshiebe, bavua bakudika ngabu ne bifulu biabu bia biamu ku bimana bia muebe. Bavua baluangana bua kukukebela lumu." 
Ezekiel27:11 “Bena Arvade pamue ne bena mvita bebe, bavua benda pa bimana bia tshimenga tshiebe bua kutentekela baluishi. Bena Ngamade bavua balama tuleya tuebe. Bavua bakudika ngabu yabu ku bimana bia tshimenga. Ke muvuabu bakulengeje bimpe be!”" 
Ezekiel27:12 “Bena Tarshishe batuta basumbishangana nebe bintu bitule. Batua basumba bintu biebe, bakufuta ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshia ntenda ne biamu bikuabu." 
Ezekiel27:13 Bena Ngreke, bena Tubale ne bena Mesheke, bavua basumbishangana nebe bintu, bakupesha bapika ne bintu bia tshiamu tshikunze, bua kubishintakajangana ne bintu biuvua wewe nabi." 
Ezekiel27:14 Mu Bete-Togarma batua bakupesha nyama ya tubalu idi ikoka matempu, nyama mikuabu ya mvita, ne ya mpunde." 
Ezekiel27:15 Bena Dedane bavua kabidi basumbishangana nebe bintu. Uvua mufike mu bidila bia bungi bua kuenda mushinga. Batua bakufute ne mibanga ne mabaya mafike fitutuu. 
Ezekiel27:16 Bena Edome batua basumba bintu bia bungi kuudi, bakufuta mabue a mushinga mukole a mishindu mishilangane; batua bakufute bilamba bifikuluke, bilamba bitela biela malenda, ne bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda." 
Ezekiel27:17 Bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele bavua basumbishangana nebe bintu, bakupesha ntete ya kuenza bukula ya mu tshimenga tshia Minite; batua bakupesha mponda, buitshi, mafuta ne kamonya ka mupuya muimpe." 
Ezekiel27:18 Bena Damase batua basumba bintu biebe bia bungi bia mishindu ne mishindu. Bavua bakufuta malutu a mvinyo a mu ditunga dia Elbone, ne bilamba bia buoya bua nyama ya mu tshimenga tshia Sakare." 
Ezekiel27:19 Biangatshile ku tshimenga tshia Uzale, bena Dane ne bena Yavane, batua bakufuta tshiamu tshifula mu ditanda, ne bintu bia muenyi muimpe." 
Ezekiel27:20 Bantu ba mu Dedane batua bakufuta bilamba bia kuteka pa nyama ya tubalu. 
Ezekiel27:21 Bena Arabe ne balombodi ba ditunga dia Kedare bavua basumbishangana nebe bintu. Batua bakufuta bana ba mikoku, mikoku ne mbuji." 
Ezekiel27:22 Bangenda mushinga ba mu Saba ne ba mu Ragma, nuvua nusumbishangana nabu bintu. Bavua bakufuta ne manananshi mimpe, mabue a mushinga mukole a mishindu yonsu, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Ezekiel27:23 Bimenga ebi, Arane, Kane, ne Edene, bivua bisumbishangana nebe bintu, kabidi ne bangenda mushinga ba mu Saba, bimenga bia mu Ashure, ne bia mu Babilone." 
Ezekiel27:24 Bavua benduluka ne bilamba bia mushinga, bafika mu bisalu biebe ne bilamba bifikuluke, bilamba biela malenda, biata bia panshi bia mibidi mishilangane, ne mionji ya bipia miluka bikole.”" 
Ezekiel27:25 “Majuwa manene a bungi atua mambule bintu biebe bia kusumbisha, aya nabi miaba yonsu. Muebe muvua bintu bia bungi bia kusumbisha. Uvua mufuane majuwa avua enda pa mayi manene, muwule ne bintu tente." 
Ezekiel27:26 Bitshi bebe ba matu bavua baye nebe pa mayi manene mutantshi mule. Lupepele lufume ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila kukutshibula. 
Ezekiel27:27 Bubanji buebe, bintu biebe bia kupana, biebe bionsu, balombodi ba majuwa, bena mudimu wa bianza bavua balongolola majuwa, bangenda mushinga, bena mvita bauvua muangate ku mudimu, bonsu bauvua nabu mu majuwa, bionsu bivua bidina mu mayi, diba diuvua mutshibuke." 
Ezekiel27:28 Muadi wa bendeshi ba majuwa uvua uzakeja bantu bavua basombe ku muelelu wa mayi manene. 
Ezekiel27:29 Nanku, bantu bonsu bavua bita ne mibambu, bavua batuluka ku majuwa abu. Bavua benda pa mayi manene mu majuwa, bavua batuluka panshi." 
Ezekiel27:30 Bavua bakudila, badila muadi wa kanyinganyinga. Bavua badiela lupuishi mu mutu, babunguluka mu butu." 
Ezekiel27:31 Bavua babeya nsuki bualu buebe, bavuala bilamba bikayabale. Bavua babungama, bakudila, batua mikemu bikole." 
Ezekiel27:32 Bu muvuabu ne dibungama, bavua bakuimbila misambu ya muadi, bakuelela kasala ka madilu. Tire, kakuvua tshimenga tshikuabu bu wewe to. Mpindiewu udi mushale tshianana, munkatshi mua mayi manene." 
Ezekiel27:33 Pavuabu bapatule mu majuwa ebe bintu biuvua musumbishe, bantu ba bungi bavua babipeta. Bakalenga ba pa buloba kupeta bubanji, ku biuma biebe ne ku bintu biuvua wenda usumbisha." 
Ezekiel27:34 Kadi mpindiewu mavuala mmakutshibule, makuine ne mu mayi mondoke! Bintu biebe ne bonsu bavua bakuendesha, mbidine nebe mu mayi manene." 
Ezekiel27:35 Bantu bonsu badi basomba kule ku mielelu ya mayi manene, badi bakema, bakuatshika bowa. Bakalenga babu badi bazakala. Bowa ne luzakalu bidi bimueneka pa mpala yabu." 
Ezekiel27:36 Bangenda mushinga ba bisamba bia benyi, badi batshina, bakuzakela, batua mikemu, bualu wewe udi ubakuatshisha bowa, bu muudi munyanguke kashidi!”" 
Ezekiel28:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel28:2 — Muntu, umanyishe mukalenga wa bena Tire bindi meme Maweja-Nangila mmuambila ne: “Muoyi webe uvua ulunduka ne ditambisha. Uvua wamba ne:" 
Ezekiel28:3 Ndi mvidie. Bu mudi mvidie yonsu, ndi nsomba mu nkuasa wa bukalenga munkatshi mua mayi manene’. Udi uditeka mulongu umue ne mvidie. Kadi udi amu muntu. Kuena mvidie nansha kakese to. Adi wela meji ne: ndi mupite Danele ku meji; ndi mua kumvua malu masokome onsu." 
Ezekiel28:4 Udi mupete biuma, bualu udi ne lungenyi, mumanye malu. Udi ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi tshipite bungi." 
Ezekiel28:5 Udi muvudije biuma biebe, bualu udi mumanye mua kuenda mushinga. Kadi biuma bionsu ebi udi anu uditambisha nabi." 
Ezekiel28:6 “Nanku, teleja tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nkuambila ne: uvua wela meji ne: ndi mulongu umue ne mvidie." 
Ezekiel28:7 Nanku nenkutumine bantu ba tshikisu ba mu bisamba bikuabu bua bakuluishe. Nebabutule bintu bilenga bionsu ebi, biuvua musangishe ne meji ebe. Nebanyange lumu luebe." 
Ezekiel28:8 Nebakutume ku dijimba dia bafue. Nebakutshimune, bakushipa munkatshi mua mayi manene." 
Ezekiel28:9 Padibu bafika bua kukushipa, newambe kabidi ne: ndi mvidie anyi? Udi muntu patupu! Bumvidie buebe kabuakumueneka diba didi bashipianganyi bakakuata." 
Ezekiel28:10 Neufue lufu lubi, bualu nebakushipe kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, badi kabayi bamanye Mvidi Mukulu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika bualu abu.”" 
Ezekiel28:11 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel28:12 — Yezekiyele, ela kasala ka muadi, udile mukalenga wa mu Tire. Umuambile ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ke uvua mummanyishe miaku ya kasala aka ne: “Wewe mukalenga wa Tire, uvua muntu wa tshitembu, wa meji matue, kabidi mulengele be." 
Ezekiel28:13 Uvua musombe mu Edene, mu lupangu lua Mvidi Mukulu. Bavua bakubuikile ne mabue a mushinga mukole a mishindu yonsu, makunze, matoke, a mayi a matamba, a mbongu, a mayi a nkunde, a komaline, a jaspe, a safire, a ngrenate ne a emerode. Uvua mutuale bilengejilu tatuabu benze ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi dituku divuabu bakufuka" 
Ezekiel28:14 Pabuipi nebe mvua muteke mukerubine munene bua akulame. Utua musombe pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila, wenda munkatshi mua mabue atua akenka." 
Ezekiel28:15 Utua wenza anu malu mimpe, katshia bakuluka too ne ku diba ditua malu mabi abanga kumueneka muebe." 
Ezekiel28:16 Utua musumbe bintu bitule, ubisumbisha. Ke tshitua tshikufikisha ku tshinyangu ne ku buenzavi. Ke pandi nkuipata pa mukuna wanyi, nkupingaja muaba wa bantu bakuabu bonsu. Mukerubine utua mukulame, wakuipatshi mutantshi mule ne mabue atua akenka." 
Ezekiel28:17 Wewe kuditambisha bua lumu luutua nalu. Wewe kuenza bu muntu mupale bua bungi bua bintu biuvua mupete. Ke pandi nkuela panshi bua bakalenga bakuabu bakuseke. 
Ezekiel28:18 Utua wenda mushinga ne buivi. Uvua upisha miaba ya wewe kutendelela mikiya. Nanku ndi ntemesha kapia mu tshimenga tshiebe bua kukubutula. Bonsu badi bakutangila nebamone mundi nkuenza, nkushiya anu butu." 
Ezekiel28:19 Wewe newikale tshilejilu tshidi tshikuatshisha bonsu badi bakumanye bowa. Neushale tshintu tshia kutshinyishangana natshi, bualu neubutuke kashidi.”" 
Ezekiel28:20 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel28:21 — Yezekiyele, tangila ku tshimenga tshia Sidone. Wambila bena tshimenga mundi mbakanyina." 
Ezekiel28:22 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi mbambila ne: “Nuenu bena Sidone nennunyoke. Nendeje butumbi buanyi ku malu andi nnuenzela. Pandi nnunyoka bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. Ke mundi mbaleja mundi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. 
Ezekiel28:23 Nenkutumine disama dia tshiambu. Mashi neapueke mu misesu yenu. Nebanuluishe nseke yonsu. Nebashipe bantu bavule munkatshi mua tshimenga. Diba adi bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel28:24 “Maweja-Nangila udi ujadika ne: Tshisamba nansha tshimue tshidi mutumba ne Izrayele, katshiena mua kupotela kabidi bena Izrayele to. Kabakubatatshisha kabidi bu mudi meba atua, enza mibundabunda. Nanku bantu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel28:25 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Nengumushe bena Izrayele bonsu miaba imvua mubatangalaje; nembasangishe muaba umue. Nanku nendeje bisamba bikuabu ne: meme ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. Bena Izrayele nebasombe mu ditunga diabu dimvua mupeshe muntu wanyi Yakobe. 
Ezekiel28:26 Nebasombemu talala. Nebasemu nzubu, bakuna mionji ya mvinyo. Nebasombe mu ditalala, bualu nennyoke bena mutumba nabu bavua babapetula. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel29:1 Dituku dia dikumi ne dimue dia ngondu wa dikumi, tshidimu tshia dikumi, tshitua bena Izrayele bamane kuya mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel29:2 — Muntu, tangila kudi mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, umumanyisha mundi mmukanyina yeye ne ditunga dijima dia bena Ejipitu." 
Ezekiel29:3 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi mmumanyisha ne: “Nenkunyoke wewe mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Udi bu ngandu munene wa tshidika, udi musombe munkatshi mua misapa ya Nile. Udi ujadika ne: musulu wa Nile nguanyi, bualu meme ngudi mudienzele wu." 
Ezekiel29:4 Nanku nenkuele nkanu ku mbanga, ndamatshisha mishipa ya mu musulu webe ku mamba ebe. Nenkupatule mu musulu wa Nile ne mishipa yonsu eyi milamate ku mamba ebe." 
Ezekiel29:5 Nenkuimanshe mu tshipela, wewe ne mishipa yonsu ayi. Neufuilemu, kabayi bambule tshitalu tshiebe, kabayi batshijika. Tshitalu tshiebe atshi nentshifile bua batshidie kudi nyunyi ne nyama ya tshisuku." 
Ezekiel29:6 Nanku, bena Ejipitu bonsu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. “Bena Izrayele bavua batekemena kudi bena Ejipitu, kadi bena Ejipitu bavua anu bu dilenga ditekete didi muntu kayi mua kueyemina." 
Ezekiel29:7 Bavua bakukuata wewe Ejipitu mu tshianza. Kadi wewe kutshibukila mu bianza biabu. Wewe kubatapa mputa ku dikaya, kubatekesha ku muoyi." 
Ezekiel29:8 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkujadikila ne: Nenkutumine bena mvita. Nembutule bantu ne nyama bia mu ditunga diebe." 
Ezekiel29:9 Mu Ejipitu nemushale bu mu tshipela, kamuyi bantu. Nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. “Wewe uvua muambe ne: musulu wa Nile nguanyi, meme ke udi muwenze." 
Ezekiel29:10 Bu muudi wakula nanku, nenkunyoke wewe ne musulu webe. Nennyangakaje Ejipitu, nemmushiye tshipela, biangatshile ku tshimenga tshia Migdole ku mutu wa ditunga, too ne ku tshimenga tshia Ashuwane, ne ku mikalu ya ditunga dia bena Kushe, kuinshi mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel29:11 Muntu nansha nyama kabiena mua kupitshilamu. Bidimu makumi anayi kabakusanganamu muntu nansha nyama ne muoyi to. 
Ezekiel29:12 Nengenze Ejipitu tshipela munkatshi mua bipela bionsu. Bimenga biende nebishale bu mudi bimenga bikuabu bivuabu banyoke bishale makolu. Munkatshi mua bidimu makumi anayi abi, nentangalaje bena Izrayele mu bisamba bikuabu. Nembatume mu matunga a bende." 
Ezekiel29:13 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Papita bidimu makumi anayi, nenngumushe bena Ejipitu mu bisamba bia bantu muvuabu bamuangalake; nembasangishe." 
Ezekiel29:14 Nengandamune malu abu bua bapingane ku Patrose mu ditunga diabu dia kale. Nengenzemu bukalenga budi kabuyi ne bukole," 
Ezekiel29:15 budi bushadile ku makalenga onsu. Kabakuikala kabidi bamfumu ba bisamba bikuabu to. Nenkepeshe bungi buabu, bua kabikadi kabidi bamfumu mu matunga a bende to." 
Ezekiel29:16 Bena Izrayele kabakutekemena kabidi kudi bena Ejipitu to. Nanku kabakuenza kabidi bubi. Kabakubikila kabidi bena Ejipitu bua kubambuluisha. Nanku, nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel29:17 Dituku dimue dia ngondu wa kumpala, tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne muanda mutekete tshivua bena Izrayele bamane kuya mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel29:18 — Yezekiyele, Nebukadnesare mukalenga wa Babilone uvua muenzeje bena mvita bende mudimu mukole bua kuluisha Tire. Nanku bena mvita bende badi mpindiewu ne mabala pa mitu, bapuluka pa makaya. Kadi, nansha mukalenga nansha bena mvita bende, kabena bapeta kantu mu mvita ya Tire to." 
Ezekiel29:19 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: “Ndi mfila ditunga dia Ejipitu kudi Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Neapawule bidi mu ditunga, abinyangakaje. Neangate bubanji buonsu, aye kufuta nabu bena mvita bende." 
Ezekiel29:20 Ndi mmupesha ditunga dia Ejipitu, bua kumufuta bua midimu idiye mungenzele. Bualu bena mvita bende mbankuatshile mudimu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu abu." 
Ezekiel29:21 “Diba dienzeka bionsu abi, nempeshe kabidi bena Izrayele bukole bupiabupia. Nenkupeshe wewe Yezekiyele bumfumu bua kuakula nabu, bua bajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel30:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: 
Ezekiel30:2 — Muntu, akula, umanyishe bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: “Nuenu bena Ejipitu, asayi miadi ya madilu, bualu dituku dikadi pabuipi, didi Maweja-Nangila uleja tshiji tshiende." 
Ezekiel30:3 Nedikale dituku didi ne mavuba adi akuatshisha bowa. Nedikale dituku dia kulumbuluisha bisamba. 
Ezekiel30:4 Mvita neyenzeke mu Ej ipita. Bantu nebazakale too ne mu ditunga dia bena Kushe. Nebashipe bena Ejipitu; nebabanyenge bubanji buabu. Ditunga diabu nedishale makolu. 
Ezekiel30:5 Bena mvita ba bena Kushe, ba bena Pute, bena Lude, bena Arabe, bena Libiya too ne ba mu bantu banyi nebafue mu mvita." 
Ezekiel30:6 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika ne: biangatshile ku Migdole, tshimenga tshidi ku mutu too ne ku Ashuwane, kuinshi mu ditunga, bena mvita badi bambuluisha bena Ejipitu, nebafuile mu mvita. Tshiluilu tshivua bena Ejipitu baditambisha natshi netshibutuke. Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika bualu ebu." 
Ezekiel30:7 Ku matunga onsu a pa buloba, ditunga diabu nedishale tshipela. Bimenga biabu nebishale anu makolu." 
Ezekiel30:8 Pandi ngosha ditunga dia bena Ejipitu, nshipa bena mvita bonsu badi babambuluisha, bantu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel30:9 Dituku dindi mbutula Ejipitu, nentume bantu mu buatu, baya kuambila bena Kushe bivua bienzeka. Nanku, bena Kushe nebakuatshike bowa, nebazakale. Dituku adi dikadi pabuipi." 
Ezekiel30:10 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika ne: Nentume Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa mu Babilone, bua kubutula bena mvita ba bungi badi mu Ejipitu." 
Ezekiel30:11 Nebukadnesare neavue kunyanga ditunga edi ne bantu ba tshikisu ba mu ditunga diende. Nebatape bena Ejipitu, babashipe ku muele. Mu ditunga nemuikale anu bitalu." 
Ezekiel30:12 Nengumishe misapa ya musulu wa Nile. Nemfile bena Ejipitu kudi bantu ba tshinyangu. Nentume bantu benyi abu bua kudinyanga, kudishiya munda mutupu, kuangata bionsu bidimu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngenzeja bionsu ebi." 
Ezekiel30:13 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika ne: Nembutule mpingu ne mvidie ya dishima ya mu tshimenga tshia Memfise. Kamuakuikala kabidi muntu udi ulombola Ejipitu. Nenkuatshishe bena ditunga bonsu bowa. 
Ezekiel30:14 Nennyange Patrase. Nengoshe tshimenga tshia Sowane. Nennyoke ne tshimenga tshia No. 
Ezekiel30:15 Nembutule ne tshiji tshimenga tshia Sine, tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, tshidi tshilama mikalu ya ditunga dia Ejipitu. Nenshipeshe bantu ba bungi ba mu No." 
Ezekiel30:16 Nengoshe ditunga dia Ejipitu, bantu nebafue. Bena mu Sine nebapapuke, bazakala. Nebanyange bimana bia mu No; tshimenga tshijima netshiyanguke." 
Ezekiel30:17 Bansongalume ba mu tshimenga tshia One ne tshia Pi-Beshete nebafue mu mvita. Nebakuate bantu bakuabu, baye nabu mu bupika." 
Ezekiel30:18 Butuku kabuakutshia ku Tapanese, tshiyi muanji kubutula bukole bua bena Ejipitu. Nenjikije ditambisha divuabu nadi. Divuba nedifike dibuikile tshimenga. Bantu ba mu ditunga nebaye mu bupika." 
Ezekiel30:19 Nennyoke bena Ejipitu. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel30:20 Mataku muanda mutekete a ngondu wa kumpala, tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshitua bena Izrayele bamane kuya mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel30:21 — Yezekiyele, ndi mutshibule diboku dia mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Muntu kena mumusuike mukaba pa mputa, nansha mumupeshe buanga. Muntu kena mumusuike mukaba ku diboku, bua apete bukole bua kuluangana ne muele wa mvita." 
Ezekiel30:22 Mpindiewu, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: “Nennyoke mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu. Nemmutshibule maboku onsu abidi, ne dikadi ditshibuke, ne ditshidi ne bukole. Muele wende wa mvita neufinuke ku tshianza umata panshi!" 
Ezekiel30:23 Nanku, nentangalaje bena Ejipitu mu matunga a bende." 
Ezekiel30:24 Nemvudije Bukole bua mukalenga wa mu Babilone. Nemmupeshe muele wanyi mu bianza. Mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu undi mutshibule diboku, neatue mikemu, padiye ufua muluishi wende mutangile." 
Ezekiel30:25 Eyowa, maboku a mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu nealembelele kaayi ne bukole. Kadi nempeshe maboku a mukalenga wa bena Babilone bukole bua bungi. Nemmupeshe muele wanyi mu bianza. Neafune bua kuluisha bena Ejipitu. Bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel30:26 Nentangalaje bena Ejipitu mu matunga a bende. Nebashindike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel31:1 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu muisatu wa tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshivua bena Izrayele bamane kuya mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel31:2 — Yezekiyele, uye kuambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, kabidi ne bantu bonsu badiye ulombola, ne: “Wewe udi ne bukole bua bungi. Ndi mua kukufuanyikija ne tshinyi?" 
Ezekiel31:3 Udi mufuanangane ne mutshi wa sedre wa mu Lebanone, udi matamba manene mimpe, adi afila dileji dia bungi. Udi mutshi wa sedre mupite kutumbuka, lusongu luawu lufika ne mu mavuba." 
Ezekiel31:4 Mvula uvua mukoleshe mutshi awu. Mayi a muinshi mua buloba kuumenesha. Mayi avua matengebela ku miji yawu. Pashishe avua atangalaka, aya too ne ku mitshi yonsu ivua mu mpata." 
Ezekiel31:5 Mayi onsu avua mutshi upeta avua audisha. Nanku uvua mutumbuke, mule mupite mitshi mikuabu. Matamba awu avua a bungi, malabale:" 
Ezekiel31:6 Nyunyi ya mishindu yonsu ivua ibakilamu masua ayi. Nyama ya ditu ivua ilelela bana muinshi mua matamba awu. Bantu ba bisamba bionsu bavua bikishila muinshi muawu. 
Ezekiel31:7 Uvua mutshi muimpe mutambe, uvua mule, muikale ne matamba malabale. Bualu miji yawu ivua mibuele mu buloba muvua mayi a bungi." 
Ezekiel31:8 Mu lupangu lua Mvidi Mukulu, kamuvua mutshi wa sedre mufuanangane nawu. Mutshi wa siprese nansha umue kauvua ne matamba mimpe bu awu. Mutshi wa platane kamata ne mabeji a bungi bu awu. Mutshi nansha umue kamata mufuanangane nawu ku bulenga." 
Ezekiel31:9 Mvua muulengeje ne matamba mimpe. Nanku mu Edene, lupangu lua Mvidi Mukulu, mitshi yonsu ivua ibaba mutshi awu.”" 
Ezekiel31:10 “Mpindiewu, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Mutshi wa sedre kukola, kulepa, kuya too ne mu mavuba. Kadi mua kabidi uditambisha amu kuditambisha." 
Ezekiel31:11 Ke pandi muubenge, muufile kudi mukalenga wa pa buloba udi ne bukole bupite. Mukalenga awu neaunyoke bua bubi buawu." 
Ezekiel31:12 Bavua baukose kudi bantu benyi kamuyi luse. Kuushiyabu panshi muaba awu. Matamba awu avuabu batshibule mmapone panshi. Adi matangalake pa mikuna ne mu bibandabanda bia mu ditunga. Bantu ba mu bisamba bionsu bavua bikishe mu dileji diawu, mbaushiye, banyema." 
Ezekiel31:13 Nyunyi ya mishindu yonsu neyikile pa tshikuku tshia mutshi udi mukoseke awu. Nyama yonsu ya muitu idiate matamba awu. 
Ezekiel31:14 Mbienzeke nenku bua mutshi mukuabu nansha umue udi upeta mayi a bungi kaulepi too ne mu mavuba, kauditambishi bua bule buawu. Bualu mitshi ne bantu bidi ne bua kufua, kujimina muinshi mua buloba, kupetangana ne bikadi bimane kufua." 
Ezekiel31:15 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Dituku divua mutshi wa sedre muye mu dijimba dia bafue, meme kuenzeja madilu bua mutshi awu. Bualu bua mutshi awu, meme kuimanyika mayi a musulu wa muinshi mua buloba, ne a tusulu tuonsu. Bualu bua mutshi awu, ndi mutume midima pa mikuna ya Lebanone, mumishe mitshi yonsu ya mu mpata." 
Ezekiel31:16 Pamvua ngupula mutshi ewu bua uye kumonangana ne bakadi bafue, bantu bonsu bavua bumvue pavuawu mupuke, kuzakalabu ne bowa. Mu dijimba dia bafue, mitshi yonsu ya mu Edene, mitshi mipite buimpe ya mu Lebanone ivua mipete mayi a bungi, kusanka." 
Ezekiel31:17 Yonsu ayi ivua mibuele muinshi mua buloba, muaba udi bantu bavuabu bashipe ku mvita. Bobu ke bavua bambuluisha mutshi awu, basombe munkatshi mua bisamba, mu dileji dinene diawu." 
Ezekiel31:18 “Kakuena mutshi nansha umue wa mu Edene mufuanangane nebe ku lumu ne ku bunene. Kadi nebakujike ne mitshi mikuabu muinshi mua buloba. Newikale munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu, ne munkatshi mua bantu bavuabu bashipe ku mvita. Nenku ke muenzelabu mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne bantu ba mu Ejipitu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Ezekiel32:1 Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshibidi tshivuabu bamane kuya ne bena Izrayele mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel32:2 — Muntu, ela kasala ka muadi, ubele mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu, umuambila ne: “Munkatshi mua bantu udi bu muana wa nyama wa ntambue. Kadi udi wenza malu bu nyama wa ngandu: udi wendakana, unaya mu misapa ya mu musulu webe, uvuandulula mayi ne makama ebe, enza bu muenji. ”" 
Ezekiel32:3 “Nanku wambila mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu ne: Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Bantu ba bungi nebasangile muaba umue. Diba adi nenkukuate mu bukondu buanyi. Bantu nebakoke bukondu abu ku tshibungubungu, bakupatula ku mukuna." 
Ezekiel32:4 Nenkuele ku mukuna, nenkushiye mu mpata, bua nyunyi yonsu ya mulu ikile pambidi pebe, bua nyama yonsu ya muitu isunsule mubidi webe." 
Ezekiel32:5 Bisunsukile bia munyinyi webe bidi bibole nembitangalaje pa mukuna ne mu tshibandabanda. 
Ezekiel32:6 Nenguwuje buloba ne mashi ebe. Neapueke pa mikuna, uwuje mbuwa." 
Ezekiel32:7 Paudi ukula muoyi, nemfikishe kulu, mbuikile mitotu, mbuikile diba ne divuba. Ngondu kakukenka kabidi." 
Ezekiel32:8 Bualu buebe nemfikishe mulu muonsu. Nentume midima mu ditunga dienu dijima. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika ne: nengenze nanku. 
Ezekiel32:9 Bantu ba bungi nebakeme, too ne ba matunga audi kuyi mumanye, pandi mbamanyisha malu a lufu luebe." 
Ezekiel32:10 Nebakeme bua mushindu undi nkunyoka. Bakalenga babu nebazakale ne bowa, pandi nsempela ne muele wanyi wa mvita pa mitu yabu. Dituku diudi ukula muoyi, nebazakale kabayi ne dikisha, batshina lufu." 
Ezekiel32:11 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Tshiluilu tshia mukalenga wa mu Babilone netshikuluishe. 
Ezekiel32:12 Nentume bena mvita ba bukitu, badi kabayi ne luse, ba mu bisamba bionsu bua bashipe bantu bebe bavule. Nebabutule bionsu biudi uditambisha nabi, bashipe bantu bebe bonsu." 
Ezekiel32:13 Nenshipeshe bimuna biebe bionsu bidi ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile. Makasa a bantu ne mikonu ya nyama, kabiakuvuandulula kabidi mayi, kuanyanga." 
Ezekiel32:14 Nendekele mayi abutama, apueka bitekete bu mafuta. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel32:15 Nenshiye ditunga dia Ejipitu tshipela. Nengumushe bubanji buadi buonsu. Nembutule bantu badimu. Nanku nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.” 
Ezekiel32:16 Bakaji ba mu bisamba bionsu nebele kasala ka madilu, badila Ejipitu ne bantu bende bafuile. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel32:17 Matuku dikumi ne atanu a ngondu wa dikumi ne muibidi, tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshibidi tshivuabu baye ne bena Izrayele mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne:" 
Ezekiel32:18 — Yezekiyele, dila muadi bua bena Ejipitu. Muadi webe ubalunguluje mu kandondu ka bafue pamue ne bisamba binene bikuabu." 
Ezekiel32:19 Ubambile ne: “Nudi nudimona ne: nudi bapite bantu bakuabu ku mushinga anyi? Puekayi nuye kulala munkatshi mua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bavua bafue mu mvita. 
Ezekiel32:20 Eyowa, bena Ejipitu nebafue mu mvita. Miele ya mvita idibu bapatule mu bibubu neyishipe bena tshiluilu bonsu ba bena Ejipitu!" 
Ezekiel32:21 Mu kandondu ka bafue, bena mvita ba bukitu ne bantu bavue batue ndondu ne bena Ejipitu kale, nebele mbila ne: ‘Bantu ba bisamba bia benyi badi bafue mu mvita aba, bakadi bapueka bua kulala munkatshi muetu.’" 
Ezekiel32:22 “Mukalenga wa bena Ashure udi muaba awu ne bena tshiluilu tshiende. Udi munkatshi mua nkita ya bantu bende bonsu badi bafue mu mvita. 
Ezekiel32:23 Nkita yabu idi mu kandondu ka bafue, luseke lua lukita lua mukalenga wabu. Bantu bonsu aba mbafue mu mvita. Bobu aba bangabanga ke bavua bakuatshisha bantu bowa pa buloba." 
Ezekiel32:24 “Mukalenga wa bena Elame udi muaba awu ne tshiluilu tshiende. Lukita luende ludi munkatshi mua nkita ya bena mvita bende bonsu bafuile mu mvita. Bantu aba, bavua bakuatshisha bantu bowa pa buloba, badi lelu mu kandondu ka bafue. Badi bumvua bundu, bualu badi balala pamue ne bantu bafue bakuabu ba patupu." 
Ezekiel32:25 Eyowa, mukalenga wa bena Elame udi ulala munkathi mua bena tshiluilu tshiende badi bafue mu mvita. Lukita luende ludi munkatshi mua nkita mivule ya bena mvita bende. Bantu bonsu aba mbafue mu mvita. Bavua bakuatshisha bantu bowa pa buloba. Mpindiewu badi balala kabayi ne lumu, pamue ne bantu bakuabu badi bafue mu mvita." 
Ezekiel32:26 “Bakalenga ba mu Mesheke ne ba mu Tubale badi muaba awu ne tshiluilu tshiabu. Badi balala munkatshi mua nkita ya bena mvita babu. Bantu aba, mbavuabu kabayi bateka panshi, mbafuile mu mvita. Bobu ke bavua bakuatshisha bantu bowa pa buloba!" 
Ezekiel32:27 Kabena babajike ne lumu muvuabu bajika bena mvita ba bukitu kale, bavua bakuatshisha bantu bowa pa buloba. Bena mvita ba bukitu aba, mbabatume mu kandondu ka bafue, ba-vuala bintu biabu bionsu bia mvita: bavua bateka mutu pa muele, ngabu pa tshiadi." 
Ezekiel32:28 Nuenu bena Ejipitu, nenufue kabidi. Nebanujike munkatshi mua bantu badibu kabayi bateke panshi, bafue mu mvita." 
Ezekiel32:29 “Muaba awu, bena Edome, bakalenga babu ne bamfumu badimu. Bavua bantu ba bukitu. Kadi mpindiewu badi anu balala bu bantu bakuabu bafue mu mvita. Mbabajike mu kandondu pamue ne bantu badibu kabayi bateke panshi." 
Ezekiel32:30 “Balombodi ba bantu badi basomba mu matunga a ku mutu, ne bena Sidone, badi muaba awu, mbaye kupetangana ne bafue bakuabu. Bavua bantu ba bukitu, bakuatshisha bowa. Kadi mpindiewu bantu badibu kabayi bateke panshi abu mbafue. Badi balala ne bundu muaba udi bantu bakuabu ba bungi bafue mu mvita. Badi ne bundu budi bonso badi bamane kubuela mu kandondu ka bafue nabu." 
Ezekiel32:31 “Bena mvita bonsu aba, mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu neabasangane mu kandondu ka bafue. Nansha bamushipa mu mvita ne bena mvita bende, neakoleshe muoyi padiye umona bena mvita bakuabu bonsu abu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel32:32 Tshimvua mubenge bua mukalenga wa bena Ejipitu akuatshishe bantu bowa pa buloba. Kadi mpindiewu, yeye ne bantu bende, nebabajike munkatshi mua bantu badi bafue mu mvita. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku awu!”" 
Ezekiel33:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel33:2 — Yezekiyele, vuluija bena Izrayele malu adi enzeka misangu yonsu indi nduisha ditunga. Bantu ba mu ditunga badi basungula muntu munkatshi muabu bua ikale mutentekedi." 
Ezekiel33:3 Padi mutentekedi umona tshiluilu tshia baluishi, diakamue udi wela mpungi bua kudimuja bana babu." 
Ezekiel33:4 Padi muntu mumvue mpungi, ulengulula, baluishi bamukuate, bamushipe, yeye nkayende mmudikebele lufu." 
Ezekiel33:5 Muntu awu mmufue bua tshilema tshiende, bualu uvua mumvue bamudimuja, yeye kulengulula. Bu yeye mudimuke, uvua mua kushala ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel33:6 Kadi padi mutentekedi umona tshiluilu tshia baluishi kayi wela mpungi, kayi udimuja bana babu, baluishi bakuate muntu, bamushipe, tshilema ntshia mutentekedi. Meme nengase mutentekedi tshilumbu tshia pa lufu lua muntu awu." 
Ezekiel33:7 Yezekiyele, wewe ke undi muteke mutentekedi bua kudimuja bena Izrayele. Uteleje mundi nkuambila, ubele bena Izrayele mu dina dianyi." 
Ezekiel33:8 Meme mudimuje muntu ne: udi ufua bua bubi buebe, wewe kuyi mumubele bua akaje nsombelu wende, muntu ewu neafue bua bilema biende. Kadi wewe, nenkuase tshilumbu bua lufu lua muntu awu." 
Ezekiel33:9 Kadi wewe mubele muena malu mabi bua akaje nsombelu wende, yeye kayi muakaje, neafue bua bilema biende. Kadi wewe neushale ne muoyi." 
Ezekiel33:10 — Yezekiyele, mpindiewu wambila bena Izrayele ne: “Nudi nudila, nuamba ne: bubi buetu ne ngenzelu yetu mibi mbipite bungi, mbifuane kutubutuisha. Nudi nudikonka ne: mutudi mua kushala ne muoyi mbishi?" 
Ezekiel33:11 Nanku, telejayi mudibu banuambila kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi. Tshiena musue bua bantu babi bafue nansha. Ndi njinga amu ne: balengeje nsombelu yabu, bikale ne muoyi. Nanku ndi nnulomba nuenu bena Izrayele ne: kanuenji kabidi bibi to! Nudi basue kufua bua tshinyi?”" 
Ezekiel33:12 Yezekiyele, wambila bana benu kabidi ne: “Padi muntu wa nsongu ubanga kuenza malu mabi, bilenga bivuaye wenza kumpala, kabiena mua kumuepula ku lufu to. Kadi padi muntu mubi ulekela kuenza malu mabi, bubi buvuaye wenza bangabanga, kabuena mua kumujimija to. Padi muntu wa nsongu wenza malu mabi, kena upanda bua ditaba divuaye nadi bangabanga to." 
Ezekiel33:13 Meme mulaye muntu wa nsongu ne: newikale ne muoyi, kadi muntu awu wela meji ne: ditaba divuaye nadi kale ndikumbane, utuadija kuenza malu mabi, kabena bavuluka kabidi malu ende mempe avuaye wenza kale to. Neafue bua bubi budiye wenza mpindiewu." 
Ezekiel33:14 Kadi meme mubele muntu mubi ne: udi ufua, padi muntu awu udilengeja, utuadija kuenza malu mimpe, kena ufua to." 
Ezekiel33:15 Padi muntu awu upingaja nansha bintu bivuaye muibe, kayi wenza kabidi bibi, kadi witaba ku mikenji idi mua kumusungidila, kakufua to. Neashale ne muoyi bulelela." 
Ezekiel33:16 Nebapue bilema biende muoyi. Neapete muoyi bualu udi ulonda njila wa malu mimpe. 
Ezekiel33:17 “Bana benu badi bangamba ne: Maweja-Nangila kena wenza bimpe to. Kadi badi benza bibi ki mbobu anyi? 
Ezekiel33:18 Padi muntu muakane ulekela kuenza bimpe, utuadija kuenza bibi, neafue bua bubi buende." 
Ezekiel33:19 Kadi padi muntu mubi ulekela kuenza bibi, utuadija kuenza malu mimpe, neapete muoyi, bualu udi wenza bimpe." 
Ezekiel33:20 “Nuenu bena Izrayele nudi nuamba ne: Maweja-Nangila udi ukolesha malu. Kadi numanye bimpe ne: Nendumbuluishe muntu yonsu bilondeshile malu adiye muenze!” 
Ezekiel33:21 Dituku ditanu dia ngondu wa dikumi, tshidimu tshia dikumi ne tshimue tshivuabu bamane kuya netu mu bupika, muntu uvua mupanduke, pakuatshibu Yerushalayime, kutota kungambila ne: — Mbakuate tshimenga!" 
Ezekiel33:22 Dilolu muntu awu kayi muanji kufika, Maweja-Nangila uvua mundeje bukole buende, tshiyi mua kuakula kabidi to. Kadi pavua muntu, uvua munyeme, mufike kundi mu dinda, tshivua kabidi kamama to. Nkavua ngakula." 
Ezekiel33:23 Ke Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel33:24 — Yezekiyele, bantu badi bashale mu bimenga bia mu ditunga dia Izrayele bivuabu babutula, badi bamba ne: “Abrahame uvua nkayende, kadi uvua mupete ditunga edi dijima. Nanku metu nangananga, nempete ditunga edi, bualu tudi ba bungi.”" 
Ezekiel33:25 Ubambile tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mujadike ne: “Nudi nudia munyinyi, nudia ne mashi. Nudi nukukuila mvidie mikuabu. Nudi nushipangana. Kadi munudi mua kuamba ne: nempete ditunga mbishi?" 
Ezekiel33:26 Nudi batekemene anu ku bia mvita bienu. Nudi nuenza malu mabi, nubuelela bakaji ba bende mu nzubu. Kadi munudi mua kuamba ne: netupete ditunga mbishi?”" 
Ezekiel33:27 Ubambile miaku eyi mu dina dianyi: “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi ndi nnumanyisha ne: Nebashipe bonsu badi bashala mu bimenga bivuabu babutula. Badi mu mpata nebabadie kudi nyama ya ditu. Badi basokome mu mikuna ne mu mbuebue, nebafue ku disama dia tshiambu." 
Ezekiel33:28 Nembutule ditunga, ndishiye tshipela. Bukole buvua bantu baditambisha nabu nebujimine. Mikuna ya mu Izrayele neyishale tshipela. Muntu kakupitshilamu kabidi to.”" 
Ezekiel33:29 Pandi ngandamuna ditunga dijima tshipela bua kunyoka bena Izrayele, nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel33:30 Yezekiyele, banudi nabu mu bupika badi bayukidilangana, bakutela, ku bimana bia mu tshimenga nansha ku biibi bia ku nzubu yabu, bambilangana ne: “Tuyayi kuteleja bidi Maweja-Nangila utumanyisha.”" 
Ezekiel33:31 Nanku bantu ba mu tshisamba tshianyi badi basangila bua kukuteleja. Badi bakuteleja, kadi kabena benza biudi ubambila to. Badi benza anu bidibu basue, balonda majinga abu." 
Ezekiel33:32 Wewe udi muimbi wa misambu ya diyi dimpe, muikale ne tshisanji tshimpe. Badi bateleja biudi ubambila, kadi kabena babikumbaja to." 
Ezekiel33:33 Kadi padi malu audi ubambila akumbana — akadi pa kukumbana mene — nebajadike ne: muambi uvua munkatshi muetu. 
Ezekiel34:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel34:2 — Muntu, kanyina bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, ubamanyishe mikanu indi mbakanyina nayi meme Maweja-Nangila. Ndi mbambila ne: “Nuenu balami ba mikoku ba bena Izrayele, nudi bena diakabi. Nudi badivuluke amu nuenu nkayenu! Balami kabena ne bua kudisha mikoku anyi?" 
Ezekiel34:3 Kadi nuenu nudi nulengulula mikoku. Nudi nunua mabele ayi, nuvuala bilamba bienza ne miosa yayi, nushipa mikoku ya manyi." 
Ezekiel34:4 Kadi kanuena bakankamike mikoku idi kayiyi ne bukole, kanuena bondape idi isama, kanuena bele buanga pa mputa ya mikoku idi mitapike. Kanuena bapingaje idi mipambuke munkatshi mua mikuabu, kanuena bakebe idi mijimine, kadi nudi bayikengeshe bikole ne tshikisu." 
Ezekiel34:5 Nanku mikoku kupanga mulami, kutangalaka. Kuyikuatabu, kuyidiabu kudi nyama ya muitu." 
Ezekiel34:6 Eyowa, mikoku yanyi mmilalakane mu mikuna minene ne mikese, pashishe mmitangalake miaba yonsu pa buloba bujima, kakuyi muntu udi nayi bualu, uya kuyikeba." 
Ezekiel34:7 Nuenu balami ba mikoku ya bena Izrayele, telejayi:" 
Ezekiel34:8 meme Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi ndi nnuambila ne: bidi bintonda pandi mmona mikoku yanyi mu bianza bia bivi. Bu mudiyi kayiyi ne bayilami, ikadi tshiakudia tshia nyama ya ditu. Bualu balami kabena baditatshisha bua mikoku yanyi to. Pa mutu pa kuyikeba bimpe, badi badivuluka amu bobu nkayabu." 
Ezekiel34:9 Nanku telejayi nuenu balami ba mikoku ya bena Izrayele. 
Ezekiel34:10 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnukanyina ne: nennuluishe, nnunyenga bulami bua mikoku yanyi. Kanuakuyikuba kabidi to. Kanuakupetaku tshintu to. Nennunyenge mikoku yanyi mukana muenu. Kayakuikala kabidi tshiakudia tshienu." 
Ezekiel34:11 “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: biangatshile mpindiewu, meme nkayanyi nendiangatshile bulami bua mikoku yanyi." 
Ezekiel34:12 Nenyisangishe muaba umue amu bu mudi mulami wenza padi mikoku yende mitangalake. Nennye kukeba mikoku yanyi miaba yonsu ivuayi numuangalake dituku dia tshipepele tshikole. 
Ezekiel34:13 Ndi nya kuyikeba mu matunga a bantu benyi mudiyi misombe. Nenyisangishe, nyipingaje mu ditunga diayi. Nennye nayi pa mikuna ya mu Izrayele, mu bibandabanda, miaba yonsu ya mu ditunga idi bantu basombe." 
Ezekiel34:14 Nennyifikishe mu mpata mimpe. Neyikale ne biakudia biayi bivule pa mikuna ya mu ditunga dia Izrayele. Eyowa, neyikale ne biakudia bimpe, kabidi miaba idiyi mua kuikishila mu mpata minene idi ne bisosa bitekete." 
Ezekiel34:15 Nengikale mulami wa mikoku yanyi, nenyipeshe muaba wa dikisha. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel34:16 Nenkebe mukoku uvua mujimine, nempingaje mu tshikumbi uvua mupambuke, nensuike buanga pa mputa wa uvua mutapike, nemfululule uvua usama. Kadi nembambishe udi ne mafuta mapite bungi, nansha udi ne bukole bua bungi, bua kauyi kutatshisha mikoku mikuabu. Nendame mikoku yanyi anu bimpe.”" 
Ezekiel34:17 “Nuenu mikoku yanyi, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuambila ne: ndi ndumbuluisha mikoku yanyi, bimpanga ne mbuji ya mpumbu." 
Ezekiel34:18 Bavule ba kunudi badi badia bimpe mu mpata milenga. Kadi badi badiata bisosa bidi bishale bua tshinyi? Nudi nupeta mayi mimpe a kunua. Kadi mayi anudi nunua, nudi nuavuandulula ne makasa enu bua tshinyi?" 
Ezekiel34:19 Mikoku yanyi idi mishale idi ne bua kudia bisosa binuvua badiate, idi ne bua kunua mayi anuvua bavuandulule." 
Ezekiel34:20 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila nnuambila ne: ndi ndumbuluisha mikoku yanyi, nkosa tshilumbu tshia idi minyane ne idi ne manyi." 
Ezekiel34:21 Mikoku idi kayiyi ne bukole, nudi nuyisakila ne dikaya nansha ne tshikundukundu. Nudi nuyituta ku nsengu, nuyitangalaja, nuyipata mu tshisumbu." 
Ezekiel34:22 Ndi musue kuambuluisha mikoku yanyi ayi bua kabayikengeshi kabidi to. Ndi ndumbuluisha mikoku, nteleja idi mitekete ne idi ne bukole." 
Ezekiel34:23 Nenteke muntu anu umue bua kuikalaye mulami wa mikoku yanyi. Yeye neayilame bimpe bu muvua Davide wanyi wenza. 
Ezekiel34:24 Meme Maweja-Nangila nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wayi. Muntu wanyi neikale mulami wa bushuwa bu muvua Davide. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. 
Ezekiel34:25 “Nemfile bupole munkatshi mua mikoku yanyi. Nengipate nyama yonsu ya lonji idi mu ditunga. Nanku mikoku yanyi neyisombe talala mu mpata, ilala nansha muitu." 
Ezekiel34:26 Nenganyishe bua mikoku isombe pabuipi ne mukuna wanyi wa tshijila. Nendokeshe mvula mukumbane pa tshikondu tshiende. 
Ezekiel34:27 Mitshi neyikuame bimuma. Buloba nebumeneshe biakudia. Muntu yonsu neasombe talala mu ditunga. Nensulule nkanu idibu basuika bantu banyi. Nembapikule kudi bavua babakuate ku bupika. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel34:28 Bivi ba mu matunga makuabu kabakubakuata kabidi to. Nyama ya tshisuku kayakubadia nansha. Nebasombe talala. Muntu nansha umue kakubakuatshisha kabidi bowa to. 
Ezekiel34:29 Nembapeshe madimi adi ne bufuke bua bungi. Kabakuikala kabidi ne nzala mu ditunga diabu to. Bantu ba bisamba bikuabu kabakubapepeja kabidi to. 
Ezekiel34:30 Bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, ndi mubalame bimpe. Bena Izrayele mbantu banyi menemene. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel34:31 “Eyowa, nuenu bantu ba mu tshisamba tshianyi, ndi munulame, bualu ndi Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Ezekiel35:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel35:2 — Muntu, tangila ku buloba bua Edome budi ne mikuna, utandishe bantu badi basombamu." 
Ezekiel35:3 Ubambile ne: telejayi! Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unumanyisha ne: “Nennunyoke nuenu bena Edome, nnuleja bukole buanyi. Nennyange ditunga dienu dishale tshipela." 
Ezekiel35:4 Bimenga bienu nebishale makolu. Ditunga dienu nedinyanguke kashidi. Nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel35:5 Kuonsu eku nuvua anu bakine bena Izrayele. Pavua baluishi babu babatshimune, bua kubanyoka bua bubi buabu, nuenu nuvua amu nubakengesha ne mvita." 
Ezekiel35:6 Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi nennunyoke. Bualu mashi a bantu banudi bashipe adi akeba badi mua kuasombola. Bualu nuvua bashipe kanuyi nupingana panyima. Nanku nebanushipe penu. 
Ezekiel35:7 Nennyange ditunga dienu dia Edome, nendishiye tshipela, nshipe muntu yonsu udi upitshilamu." 
Ezekiel35:8 Nenguwuje mikuna yenu ne bitalu bia bantu badi bafuila mu mvita pa mikuna, mu bibandabanda ne mu mpongu." 
Ezekiel35:9 Nenshiye ditunga dienu tshipela kashidi. Muntu kakusomba kabidi mu bimenga bienu to. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila. 
Ezekiel35:10 “Nuenu bena Edome nuvua nufuuna ne: ‘Netudie bukalenga mu Izrayele ne mu Yuda. Nebikuate matunga abidi aa, nansha Maweja-Nangila usombamu.’" 
Ezekiel35:11 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, nennunyoke, bilondeshile tshinyangu, lubabu ne lukinu, binuvua nukengesha nabi bena Izrayele. Padi bantu banyi bamona mundi nnunyoka, nebamanye ne: meme ndi nganyi." 
Ezekiel35:12 Nanku nenumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mumvue bipendu bienu panuvua nuamba ne: ‘Mikuna ya Izrayele nyetu! Ikadi minyanguke, nanku netuyikuate!’ ”" 
Ezekiel35:13 Nudi bambunde, kadi meme tshiena mupue bipendu bienu muoyi to." 
Ezekiel35:14 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Nennuvingutule bua kusankisha bena matunga onsu adi pamue nenu. 
Ezekiel35:15 Nuvua nusanka panuvua numona muvuabu bakengesha bena Izrayele bantu banyi. Nanku nennuenzele penu mushindu awu. Nebanyange mikuna yenu ne ditunga dienu dijima. Nanku, bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel36:1 — Wewe Yezekiyele, umanyishe mikuna ya mu Izrayele, iteleje bindi meme muyambile ne:" 
Ezekiel36:2 meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi nnuambila ne: “Baluishi benu bavua banuseka, bamba ne: ‘Mpindiewu mikuna ya kale ya mu Izrayele ikadi yetu!’ ”" 
Ezekiel36:3 Ke pandi nkulomba, wewe Yezekiyele, bua umanyishe bena Izrayele bindi nkuambila. Ndi musue kubambila ne: “Ndi mumone ne: nseke yonsu badi baluisha mikuna ya Izrayele, bakeba kuyikuata. Ikadi mu bianza bia bantu ba bisamba bia bantu benyi, badi bayipenda, bayiseka.”" 
Ezekiel36:4 Nanku, wambila mikuna ne: “Nuenu mikuna ya mu Izrayele, telejayi bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mulaya bua mikuna minene ne mikese, bua misulu ne bibandabanda, bua miaba idi minyanguke mishale makolu, bua bimenga bienu bidi munda mutupu, bivua bantu bavua nenu mutumba banyenga, bapetula." 
Ezekiel36:5 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Tshiji tshidi tshingenza. Nanku ndi ntandisha bisamba bidi ku mutumba, nangananga bena Edome. Bantu aba bavua bakuata ditunga dianyi, biba biakudia bivua mu mpata. Bavua basanka kabayi ne luse.”" 
Ezekiel36:6 Nanku wewe Yezekiyele, umanyishe ditunga dia bena Izrayele, umanyishe mikuna minene ne mikese, misulu ne bibandabanda ne: “Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ne tshiji tshikole. Bavua banupenda, banupepeja kudi bisamba bikuabu." 
Ezekiel36:7 Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi nnulaya ne: bisamba bidi nenu mutumba ebi nebabikengeshe pabi. 
Ezekiel36:8 Tshikondu atshi, pa mikuna ya Izrayele, mitshi neyipatule mabeji, ikuama bimuma, bua kunudisha nuenu bena Izrayele bantu banyi. Bualu nukadi pa kupingana mu ditunga dienu." 
Ezekiel36:9 Eyowa, nennuambuluishe, nengenze bua buloba buenu babusekunune, bamiaminamu ntete." 
Ezekiel36:10 Nemvudije bungi bua bantu bebe mu ditunga dijima dia Izrayele. Bantu nebase kabidi mu bimenga, bualu bionsu bivua binyanguke, nebabiakaje." 
Ezekiel36:11 Bantu ne nyama nebivulangane miaba yonsu. Nenuikale bantu ba bungi, nupete ndelanganyi mivule. Ditunga nedikale ne bantu ba bungi bu bangabanga. Nennuendeshe diakalenga dipite dia bangabanga. Nanku nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel36:12 Nuenu bantu banyi, nennusombeshe miaba yonsu mu ditunga dienu. Ditunga dijima nedikale dienu, kabakununyenga kabidi bana benu to." 
Ezekiel36:13 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Bantu badi bamba ne: ditunga dia Izrayele didi bu nyama wa tshidika, udi udia bana badiye mulele." 
Ezekiel36:14 Nanku, bituadije ku mpindiewu, ditunga kadiena didia kabidi bantu badi to, kadiena dinyenga kabidi bantu bana babu to. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel36:15 Kanuakumvua kabidi mudi bisamba bikuabu binuseka, binupetula. Nanku ditunga dienu kadiena dishipesha kabidi bana benu to. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Ezekiel36:16 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel36:17 — Yezekiyele, teleja. Patshivua bena Izrayele mu ditunga diabu, bavua ne nsombelu mubi. Ke muvuabu banyanga ditunga diabu. Bua bubi buabu bavua bapie mikiya, amu bu mudi bakaji badi bajimija mashi padibu ku tshijila." 
Ezekiel36:18 Batata banyanga ditunga bualu bavua bashipa bantu, batendelela mvidie mikuabu. Ke pandi mubanyoke ne tshiji." 
Ezekiel36:19 Mvua mubatangalaje munkatshi mua bantu bakuabu, mu matunga a bende. Ke mumvua mubanyoke bua bubi buabu, bua nsombelu wabu ne bua ngenzelu yabu." 
Ezekiel36:20 Nanku, mu bisamba bionsu muvuabu baye, bantu bavua bapepeja dina dianyi dia tshijila, bua tshilema tshivuabu benza. Bualu bantu bavua bamba ne: “Bantu aba mbantu ba Maweja-Nangila, kadi bavua ne bua kumuka mu ditunga diende.”" 
Ezekiel36:21 Nanku, mvua mumvue dikenga, pa kumona muvua bantu bakuabu bapetula dina dianyi dia tshijila, bua tshilema tshivua bena Izrayele benza bavua bafika mu matunga abu." 
Ezekiel36:22 Nanku ubamanyishe tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: “Malu andi musue kuenza, tshiena ngenza buenu nuenu bena Izrayele to. Kadi ndi ngenza bua bantu banemeke dina dianyi dia tshijila, dinuvua bapepeja mu bisamba munuvua baye." 
Ezekiel36:23 Nansha nuenu bamane kumpepeja kumpala kuabu, nembaleje mundi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu munene ne wa tshijila. Nebamanye ne: ndi wa tshijila padibu bamona bindi nnuenzela. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel36:24 “Pandi mumane kunumusha munkatshi mua matunga a bantu munuvua, nennusangishe, nnupingaja mu ditunga dienu." 
Ezekiel36:25 Nennupumuine mayi matoke pambidi penu bua kunumusha mikiya. Eyowa, nennumushe bubi buenu buonsu, ne bukoya bunuvua bapete pa kutendelela mvidie mikuabu." 
Ezekiel36:26 Nennupe muoyi mupiamupia. Nembueje mueyelu mupiamupia munda muenu. Nengumushe muoyi wenu mupape bu dibue, mpingaja muoyi wa muntu." 
Ezekiel36:27 Nenteke Mueyelu wanyi munda muenu. Nenku nennuambuluishe bua nuitabe meyi anyi, nulame mikenji imvua munupe, nuyikumbaja." 
Ezekiel36:28 Nanku, nenusombe mu ditunga dimvua mupeshe bankambua benu. Nenuikale bantu banyi. Meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Ezekiel36:29 Nengumushe bubi buonsu pambidi penu. Tshiena nnutumina kabidi tshiyole tshia nzala to. Kadi nemmeneshe ntete mimpe ya kuenza bukula. Nennupeshe bintu bia bungi mu madimi enu. 
Ezekiel36:30 Nemmeneshe mitshi, ikuama bimuma bia bungi. Nenupete biakudia bia bungi mu madimi. Nanku kanuakufua kabidi bundu ku mesu a bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bua nzala inudi nayi." 
Ezekiel36:31 Nanku nenuvuluke munuvua basombe bibi, benza malu mabi. Nenunyingalale bua bilema bienu, ne bua malu enu mabi anuvua benza." 
Ezekiel36:32 Numanye bimpe ne: tshiena ngenza bionsu ebi, bualu nuenu nudi bantu bimpe to. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku. Nuenu bena Izrayele, tshienu nkumvua bundu bua malu mabi anuvua benza." 
Ezekiel36:33 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Pandi mumane kumusha mikiya yonsu inudi nayi bua malu enu mabi, nenteke bantu mu bimenga, nebibakulule miaba yonsu ivua minyanguke." 
Ezekiel36:34 Madimi avua bantu balekela, nebaadime tshiakabidi. Bapitshi ba mu njila kabakumona lububa ku muelelu wa njila to." 
Ezekiel36:35 Bantu nebambe ne: ‘Batua banyange ditunga edi, kadi mpindiewu dikadi bu lupangu lua Edene. Bimenga bivuabu babutula, bashiya makolu, mbamane kubiasulula. Bantu badi basombamu.’" 
Ezekiel36:36 Nanku, bantu ba bisamba bidi bishale nenu mutumba, nebamanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngasulula bimenga bivua bishale makolu. Ndi nkuna tshiakabidi biakudia mu mbuba. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. Nenkumbaje bimvua mulaye." 
Ezekiel36:37 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Nengitabe bua bena Izrayele basengelele bua meme kubambuluisha. Nembavudije, bikale bungi bu tshisumbu tshia mikoku." 
Ezekiel36:38 Mu matuku a bibilu, mu Yerushalayime muvua nyama ya bungi ivuabu balambule. Bavua bafike nayi bisumbu ne bisumbu. Nanku bantu badi ne bua kuasa tshiakabidi mu bimenga bienu bidi bishala makolu mpindiewu, nebikale bungi bua nyama ayi. Nanku, bantu bonsu nebamanye ne: ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel37:1 Bukole bua Maweja-Nangila kuntulukila. Mueyelu wende kungambula, kuya kunteka mu tshibandabanda tshialabale, tshivua tshiuwule ne mifuba ya bantu tente." 
Ezekiel37:2 Maweja-Nangila kungendesha miaba yonsu ivua mifuba mu tshibandabanda atshi. Nanku meme kumona ne: mifuba ayi ivua ya bungi be, ikavua miume nyonyonyo." 
Ezekiel37:3 Ke Maweja-Nangila kunkonka ne: — Yezekiyele, ngambila tumone, mifuba eyi idi mua kupeta kabidi muoyi anyi? Meme kuandamuna ne: — Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, wewe nkayebe ke udi mua kumanya." 
Ezekiel37:4 Kuambaye kabidi ne: — Ambila mifuba eyi mu dina dianyi ne: “Nuenu mifuba miume nyonyonyo, telejayi!" 
Ezekiel37:5 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi unuambila ne: Ndi musue kunufulula, nupeta muoyi." 
Ezekiel37:6 Ndi nnuasa mijilu, nnupingajila munyinyi, nnubuikila dikoba. Pashishe nennupingajile mueyelu wenu, bua nupete muoyi. Nanku nenumanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel37:7 Meme kuambila mifuba malu anu bu muvua Maweja-Nangila muntumine diyi. Pantshivua ngakula, meme kumvua mutoyi. Mifuba ivua ituadija kutuangana, mufuba onsu uvua uya muaba uvua muukumbanyine." 
Ezekiel37:8 Meme kumona mifuba kupeta mijilu ne minyinyi, dikoba dibibuikila. Kadi mueyelu kauvuaku to." 
Ezekiel37:9 Nanku Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Muntu, bikila mueyelu wa muoyi, uwambile ne: “Mueyelu wa muoyi, Maweja-Nangila udi ukutumina diyi ne: Ufumine ku nseke yonsu, ubuele munda mua bitalu ebi bua bipete muoyi. ”" 
Ezekiel37:10 Meme kuakula miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila musue. Mueyelu wa muoyi kubuela mu bitalu, kupetabi muoyi, kuimanabi kulu. Kuenzabi tshiluilu tshia bantu ba bungi bapite." 
Ezekiel37:11 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Yezekiyele, mifuba eyi idi ituleja mudi bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele badi bamba ne: “Tudi bu mifuba miume nyonyonyo. Tshitudi mua kutekemena kabidi ntshinyi? Tshitudi mua kuenza kabidi ntshinyi?”" 
Ezekiel37:12 Nanku ubambile ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mbalaya ne: “Nembulule nkita yenu. Nennujule nuenu bantu banyi. Nennupingaje mu Izrayele mu ditunga dienu. 
Ezekiel37:13 Nenujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila pandi mbulula nkita yenu bua kunujulamu," 
Ezekiel37:14 pandi nnupingajila Mueyelu wanyi wa muoyi, pandi nnusombesha mu ditunga dienu. Eyowa, nenumanye ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nkumbaja tshimvua mulaye. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Ezekiel37:15 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel37:16 — Yezekiyele, angata tshitupa tshia dibaya, ufundepu miaku eyi: “Yuda ne bena Izrayele badi mu bukalenga ebu.” Pashishe wangata tshitupa tshia dibaya tshikuabu, ufundepu ne: “Yozefe (nansha Efrayime) ne bena Izrayele ba mu bukalenga ebu. ”" 
Ezekiel37:17 Uteke bitupa bia mabaya ebi bituangane mu tshianza tshiebe bua bimueneke tshintu tshimue. 
Ezekiel37:18 Nanku bana benu nebakuebeje ne: utunwuije tshiudi muenze atshi. 
Ezekiel37:19 Ubandamune ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi unumanyisha ne: Ndi ngangata tshitupa tshia dibaya tshidi tshileja Yozefe ne bena Izrayele badi mu bukalenga buende, bua kutshituangaja ne tshidi tshileja Yuda ne bena Izrayele badi mu bukalenga buende. Nebituangane mu tshianza tshianyi, bishale tshintu tshimue.”" 
Ezekiel37:20 Wewe Yezekiyele, ulame mu tshianza tshiebe bitupa bia mabaya bidi ne miaku iudi mufunde, bua bantu bonsu babimone." 
Ezekiel37:21 Pashishe newambile bantu tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mubamanyishe ne: “Nuenu bena Izrayele, nennupatule munkatshi mua bisamba bia bantu munuvua baye. Nennusangishe, nnupingaje mu ditunga dienu." 
Ezekiel37:22 Koku aku, nennukunguje nushale tshisamba tshimue, pa mikuna ya Izrayele. Mukalenga umue neikale mfumuenu bonsu. Kanuena nukosoloka kabidi mu bisamba bibidi, nansha makalenga abidi to." 
Ezekiel37:23 Kanuena nudinyanga kabidi pa kutendelela mvidie mikuabu ya manyanu, pa kuenza malu mabi a mishindu yonsu. Nennusungidile bua nulekele mibi yonsu ivua inupetesha tshibawu kundi. Nennumushe mikiya. Nenuikale bantu banyi, meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Ezekiel37:24 Muntu mufuanangane ne muntu wanyi Davide neikale mukalenga wenu, mulami wenu umuepele. Nenuitabe meyi anyi. Nenukumbaje mikenji yanyi yonsu imvua munupe." 
Ezekiel37:25 Nenusombe mu ditunga dimvua mupe muntu wanyi Yakobe, mutua bankambua benu basombe. Nenushalemu kashidi, nuenu, bana benu, ne ndelanganyi yenu yonsu. Muntu mufuanangane ne muntu wanyi Davide, neashale mukalenga wenu kashidi." 
Ezekiel37:26 Nentue nenu ndondu bua kunupesha bupole bua kashidi. Nemvudije bantu benu. Nenteke nzubu wanyi munkatshi muenu kashidi. 
Ezekiel37:27 Nensombe munkatshi muenu. Nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Nuenu nenuikale bantu banyi. 
Ezekiel37:28 Bisamba bikuabu nebimanye ne: ndi Maweja-Nangila, ndi mujidile bena Izrayele bua bangenzele mudimu. Bualu nzubu wanyi neikale munkatshi muenu kashidi.”" 
Ezekiel38:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Ezekiel38:2 — Muntu, tangila kudi Ngoge, mukalenga munene wa bantu badi basombe mu Tubale ne mu Mesheke mu ditunga dia Magoge. Umutandishe mu dina dianyi." 
Ezekiel38:3 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mmuambila ne: “Nenkuluishe wewe Ngoge, mukalenga munene wa bantu badi basomba mu Tubale ne mu Mesheke." 
Ezekiel38:4 Nenkuele nkanu ku binyanganyanga bua mmone mua kuya nebe kundi musue. Nenkupatule mu ditunga diebe, wewe ne tshiluilu tshiebe tshijima, ne nyama yebe ya tubalu, ne babandi ba pa nyama yebe ya tubalu, badi batuala bimpe, ne bisumbu bia bungi bia bena mvita bebe badi bambula ngabu ne miele ya mvita." 
Ezekiel38:5 Bena mvita ba bena Persa, ba bena Kushe, ne ba bena Pute nebikale muntu yonsu ne ngabu wende, kabidi ne tshifulu tshiende tshia bena mvita. Bonsu aba nebaye nebe." 
Ezekiel38:6 Bena mvita ba mu ditunga dia Ngomere, ne ba mu Bete-Togarma badi basomba ku mutu wa ditunga, nebaye nebe bisumbu ne bisumbu. Nansha bantu ba bungi kabidi ba bisamba bikuabu nebaye anu nebe." 
Ezekiel38:7 Longolola bintu bia kuya nabi. Udilongolole wewe kabidi ne bantu bonsu badi ne bua kuitaba ku diyi diebe. 
Ezekiel38:8 Padi bidimu bia bungi bipita, nenkutume bua kuluisha bena Izrayele. Bena Izrayele batua bapanduke ku mvita, nebumuke mu matunga mashilangane atuabu basombe. Nebaye kusomba pa mikuna ya Izrayele itua mishale munda mutupu bidimu bia bungi. Katshia bena Izrayele bumuke munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, batua basomba amu talala." 
Ezekiel38:9 Kadi wewe Ngoge Mubaluishe ne tshiluilu tshiebe, kabidi ne bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu baudi nabu. Neubuele ne mvita mu ditunga diabu ne lubilu bu lua mvula wa tshipupu. Newikale bu matuba adi abuikila ditunga diabu." 
Ezekiel38:10 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Padi tshikondu atshi tshikumbana, neutuadije kuela meji mabi." 
Ezekiel38:11 Newele meji a kuluisha bantu aba badi kabayi ne bualu, basomba mu bimenga tatuabu kabayi bakolesha ne bimana, kabiyi ne biibi bidibu bakanga ne bikuvu." 
Ezekiel38:12 Neufike bua kupawula ne kunyenga. Neuluishe bantu bavua bapingana mu bimenga bivua bangabanga mu makolu. Batua bumuke mu bisamba bikuabu basangile muaba umue. Batua bapeta bimuna ne bubanji. Mbasombe munkatshi mua bisamba mu masangu a njila. 
Ezekiel38:13 Bena mu Saba, bena mu Dedane, ne bena misoku idi pamue nabu, bangenda mushinga ba mu Tarshishe, nebakuebeje ne: ‘Udi musangishe bena tshiluilu tshiebe bua kupawula bintu bia bantu ne kubakengesha anyi? Udi mufike bua kuangata tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bimuna ne bubanji, bua wikale ne bintu bipeta mu mvita bia bungi anyi?’ ”" 
Ezekiel38:14 Yezekiyele, ke pandi nkutumina diyi ne: akula, umanyishe Ngoge tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: “Tshikondu tshikuabu tshidi bantu banyi bena Izrayele basomba talala, neubange luendu." 
Ezekiel38:15 Neutume mu ditunga diebe dia ku mutu wa ditunga. Neulombole biluilu bia bantu ba bisamba bionsu. Bonsu nebabande pa nyama ya tubalu. Nenuenze tshiluilu tshinene tshia bantu ba bungi. 
Ezekiel38:16 Neufike bua kuluisha bantu banyi bena Izrayele. Neubuikile ditunga diabu bu mudi divuba dibuikila buloba. Nebienzeke kunyima kua matuku a bungi. Nenkutume wewe Ngoge bua kuluisha bena mu ditunga dianyi, bua bantu ba mu matunga a bende bamanye ne: ndi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila. Nembaleje malu onsu aa bualu wewe newikale muntu wanyi." 
Ezekiel38:17 “Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkuambila ne: Wewe ke umvua ntela kukadi bidimu bivule, diba dimvua muambile bambi ba bena Izrayele, bantu banyi, ne: numanyishe bena Izrayele misangu ne misangu ne: nentume muntu udi ne bua kuluisha bena ditunga dienu." 
Ezekiel38:18 Kadi wewe Ngoge, dituku diudi ufika bua kuluisha bena Izrayele, tshiji tshianyi netshimueneke. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel38:19 Ndi nditshipa ne: dituku dindi mfika munda, buloba nebuzakale bikole. Nennyungishe ditunga dijima dia bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel38:20 Minyinyi ya mu mayi manene, nyunyi ya mulu, nyama ya muitu, nyoka idi ilandala panshi, ne bantu bonsu badi pa buloba, nebizakale bionsu ne bowa kumpala kuanyi. Mikuna neyupuke, mbuebue neyivingutuke, bimana nebiupuke." 
Ezekiel38:21 Nenkukuatshishe bowa mishindu yonsu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku. Bena mvita bebe nebashipangane munkatshi muabu." 
Ezekiel38:22 Nembatumine bipupu bia masama a tshiambu. Nembashipe. Neanulokeshile mvula wa tshipupu, wa mabue, ne wa kapia, pambidi pebe wewe, pa tshiluilu tshiebe, ne pa bantu ba mu bisamba bivule biudi nabi." 
Ezekiel38:23 Nanku, nendeje bisamba bionsu ne: ndi Mvidi Mukulu munene wa tshijila. Bisamba nebimanye ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila.”" 
Ezekiel39:1 Maweja-Nangila udi ungambila ne: — Muntu, ukanyine Ngoge mu dina dianyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi mmuambila ne: “Nenkuluishe wewe Ngoge, mukalenga munene wa mu Mesheke ne mu Tubale." 
Ezekiel39:2 Nenkupatule mu ditunga diebe. Nkuenzeje bua upatukile luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga, bua kuya kuluisha mikuna ya bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel39:3 Pashishe, nenkunyoke. Buta buebe bua mikete nebutshibuke mu tshianza tshiebe tshia bakaji. Mikete yebe neyiponene panshi ku tshianza tshiebe tshia balume." 
Ezekiel39:4 Nanku wewe, tshiluilu tshiebe tshionsu, ne bantu ba mu bisamba bivule biudi nabi, nenufuile pa mikuna ya mu Izrayele. Nentume nyunyi midianganyi ne nyama ya muitu, bua idie bitalu bienu." 
Ezekiel39:5 Nenufue kabayi banujika mu buloba, bu mumvua meme Maweja-Nangila mumane kunumanyisha." 
Ezekiel39:6 Nentemeshe kapia mu ditunga dia Magoge, ne ku muelelu wa mayi manene, muaba udi bantu bela meji ne: tudi tusomba talala. Nanku, bantu bonsu nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel39:7 Nenkuate mudimu bua bantu banyi bena Izrayele bamanye mundi wa tshijila. Tshiena musue buabampeje kabidi to. Bisamba bikuabu nebimanye kabidi ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila wa bena Izrayele. 
Ezekiel39:8 Eyowa, malu aa neenzeke. Akadi enzeka mene. Dituku dia kulumbuluisha bantu dimvua muambe dikadi dikumbane! Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel39:9 Bena Izrayele nebapatuke mu bimenga biabu. Nebatemeshe kapia. Neboshemu bia mvita bia baluishi babu. Ngabu minene ne mikese, mata ne mikete, mafuma ne misongolu, nebabioshe mu kapia kadi ne bua kutema bidimu muanda mutekete." 
Ezekiel39:10 Bantu kabakuya kukeba nkunyi mu mpata, nansha kabakukosa mitshi muitu to. Nebatemeshe kapia ne nkunyi ya mu bia mvita ebi. Nebibe pabu, nebanyangakaje bintu bia bantu bavua bibe biabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel39:11 “Malu onsu mamane kuenzeka, nempeshe Ngoge muaba mu Izrayele wa kujika bafue. Muaba awu newikale mu tshibandabanda tshia muaba wa Bapitshi ba mu njila, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua Mayi manene a Luepu. Mu tshibandabanda amu, nebajikemu Ngoge ne bena mvita bende. Nkita eyi neyijikile bantu njila. Nebinyike muaba awu ne: ‘Tshibandabanda tshia bena mvita ba bungi ba Ngoge.’" 
Ezekiel39:12 Bena Izrayele nebikale ne mudimu ngondu muanda mutekete wa kujika bitalu bia bantu aba, ne wa kumusha mikiya mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel39:13 Bantu bonsu ba mu buloba abu nebenze mudimu awu. Ke mudibu mua kupeta pabu lumu dituku dindi ndeja butumbi buanyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi njadika nanku. 
Ezekiel39:14 Padi ngondu muanda mutekete ayi ijika, nebafume bantu mu ditunga dijima. Nebendakane miaba yonsu kabayi bikisha. Bantu abu nebakebe bitalu bionsu bidi bishale panshi. Nebabijike. Ke mudibu mua kumusha mikiya mu ditunga dijima nanku." 
Ezekiel39:15 Nebendakane mu ditunga nseke yonsu. Padi umue wa kudibu usangana mifuba ya bantu, udi wela mishiki ya mabue pabuipi nayi, bua bumbudi ba mikidi bamone muaba awu, bambula mifuba ayi, baya kuyijika mu Tshibandabanda tshia bena mvita ba bungi ba Ngoge." 
Ezekiel39:16 Nekuikale kabidi tshimenga tshinyika dina ne: Amona, Babungi. Ke mudibu mua kumusha mikiya mu ditunga dijima nanku.”" 
Ezekiel39:17 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kungambila kabidi ne: — Yezekiyele, bikila nyunyi ne nyama ya muitu, uyambile ne: “Umbukayi miaba yonsu inudi. Nudisangishe pamue bua kudia mulambu undi munulongoluele. Mulambu ewu newikale tshibilu tshinene pa mikuna ya Izrayele. Nenudiepu munyinyi, nunuapu ne mashi." 
Ezekiel39:18 Nenudie munyinyi wa bena mvita ba bukitu, nunue mashi a balombodi ba buloba, badibu bafile bu mulambu, pa mutu pa kufila bimpanga, bana ba mikoku, mpumbu, ne ngombe ya mafuta ya mu Bashane." 
Ezekiel39:19 Ku mulambu ewu ke kundi munubikidile. Nenudie mafuta nukute. Nenunue mashi mikuatshike. 
Ezekiel39:20 Ku tshibilu tshianyi nenudie minyinyi ya nyama ya tubalu ne ya bantu badi babandapu, ya bena mvita ba bisumbu bishilangane. Nenukute. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Ezekiel39:21 “Nendeje bisamba bikuabu butumbi buanyi. Nebimone mundi ne bukole bua kukumbaja tshindi mujadike bualu buabu. 
Ezekiel39:22 Biangatshile dituku adi, bena Izrayele nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu.”" 
Ezekiel39:23 “Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bisamba bikuabu nebiumvue ne: bena Izrayele bavua baye mu bupika bua bubi buvuabu bangenzela. Ke mumvua tshiyi kabidi nabu ne bualu to. Meme kubalekela mu bianza bia baluishi babu, bua babashipe bonsu mu mvita." 
Ezekiel39:24 Pandi mubalekele nanku, ndi mubanyoke bilondeshile malu abu mabi, ne mikiya isuabu bapie." 
Ezekiel39:25 “Kadi, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ngamba ne: Biangatshile mpindiewu, nengumvuile bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, luse. Nembapatule mu dikenga diabu. Bantu bonsu nebanemeke dina dianyi dia tshijila." 
Ezekiel39:26 Nanku, nebapue muoyi bundu buvuabu nabu, bualu bavua bantombokela. Nebasombe tshiakabidi mu ditunga diabu, kabayi batshina tshintu. Muntu nansha umue kakubakuatshisha bowa to." 
Ezekiel39:27 Nembapatule mu ditunga dia baluishi babu, mbapingaja kuabu. Ke mundi ndeja bisamba bidibu nabi mutumba mundi Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Ezekiel39:28 Nembumushe mu bisamba bikuabu mumvua mubatume mu bupika, mbasangishe mu buloba buabu, tshiyi nshiya muntu wabu nansha umue panyima. Nanku nebajadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Ezekiel39:29 Nenguwuje bena Izrayele ne Mueyelu wanyi. Tshiena mua kubalekela kabidi to. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Ezekiel40:1 Mu tshidimu tshia makumi abidi ne tshitanu, tshivuabu bamane kuya netu mu bupika bidimu dikumi ne binayi, kunyima kua dikuata dia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, amu dituku divuabu batshikuata, mu matuku dikumi a ngondu, bukole bua Mvidi Mukulu kuntulukila, kumfila mu Yerushalayime." 
Ezekiel40:2 Meme kumvua muvua Mvidi Mukulu ungambula, uya nanyi mu ditunga dia Izrayele. Uvua munteke mu katongobela ku mukuna mupite bule. Mu tshibandabanda tshia mukuna, luseke lua kuinshi kuatshi, muvua nzubu miasa mifuanangane ne tshimenga." 
Ezekiel40:3 Mvidi Mukulu kumfikisha mu tshimenga atshi. Meme kumona muntu ubalakana bu tshiamu tshikunze. Muntu awu uvua ne muonji mu tshianza, ne mutshi wa kupima nawu bule bua bintu. Uvua muimane kulu pabuipi ne tshiibi." 
Ezekiel40:4 Kungambilaye ne: — Yezekiyele, tabala, uditelejile ne matshi ebe. Wikale ne ntema ku bionsu bindi nkuleja. Bualu bavua bakufila kuneku bua wewe kumona bionsu bindi nkuleja. Pashishe newambile bena Izrayele malu onsu audi mumone." 
Ezekiel40:5 Mvua mumone tshimana tshivua tshinyungulule lubanza lua pambelu lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu nseke yonsu. Muntu uvua ne mutshi wende mu bianza wa bule bua metre asatu. Uvua upima mupimbu ne butumbuke bia tshimana atshi. Uvua musangane tshimana ne bule bua metre asatu mu mupimbu ne mu butumbuke. 
Ezekiel40:6 Kuyaye ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kubandaye pa tshibandilu, kupimaye butshiama bua tshibuelelu. Buvua bua metre asatu." 
Ezekiel40:7 Kunyima kua tshibuelelu, kuvua muaba wa kupitshila, ne bibambalu bisatu ku luseke ne ku luseke. Tshibambalu tshionsu tshivua ne metre asatu mu bule ne mu butshiama. Bimana bivua bikosolola bibambalu abi bivua ne butumbuke bua metre abidi ne tshitupa. Kunyima kua bibambalu abi kuvua tshibuelelu tshia tshibambalu tshinene, tshivua tshitangilangane ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshibuelelu atshi tshivua ne butshiama bua metre asatu." 
Ezekiel40:8 Muntu awu kupima kabidi tshibambalu tshinene atshi. Tshivua ne butshiama bua metre anayi. Bimana biatshi bia pambelu bivua ne mupimbu wa metre umue. Tshibambalu atshi tshivua ku ndekelu kua muaba wa kupitshila, tshitangilangane ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel40:9  
Ezekiel40:10 Bibambalu bisambombu bia balami ba nzubu abi bivua ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila, bivua ne bule ne butshiama bua momumue. Bivua bisatu nseke yonsu ibidi. Bimana bivua bibikosolola bivua bionsu ne mupimbu wa momumue." 
Ezekiel40:11 Muntu uvua upima kabidi butshiama bua tshibuelelu tshia tshiibi. Buvua bua metre atanu. Butshiama bua muaba wa kupitshila buvua bua metre asambombu ne tshitupa. 
Ezekiel40:12 Kumpala kua bibambalu bia balami ba nzubu, bivua metre asatu mu bule ne mu butshiama, kuvua tshimana tshikese tshia santimetre makumi atanu mu butumbuke." 
Ezekiel40:13 Muntu kupima mutantshi uvua pankatshi pa tshimana tshia munda mua tshibambalu ne tshimana tshivua munda mua tshibambalu tshia luseke lukuabu. Kupetaye butshiama bua metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa. 
Ezekiel40:14 Kupimaye kabidi tshibambalu tshinene tshivua ku ndekelu kua muaba wa kupitshila. Tshivua butshiama bua metre dikumi. Lubanza lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu luvua lunyungulule tshibambalu atshi nseke yonsu. 
Ezekiel40:15 Biangatshile ku mushiku wa kumpala wa ku tshiibi tshia pa mbelu pa lubanza, too ne ku tshimana tshia tshibambalu tshinene tshivua ku ndekelu, kuvua metre makumi abidi ne atanu." 
Ezekiel40:16 Madidishi avuabu bakoleshe ne tukanu avua ku bimana bia pa mbelu bia bibambalu, ku bimana bivua bikosolola bibambalu, too ne ku bimana bia tshibambalu tshinene tshia ndekelu. Madidishi onsu aa avua amueneka pambelu makese, kadi munda mikale manene. Bavua bazola malala a mabue ku bimana bia munda mua bibambalu." 
Ezekiel40:17 Muntu awu kumfikisha mu lubanza lua pambelu pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mu lubanza elu bavua balamika mabue manene panshi. Bavua basa bibambalu makumi asatu, bivua bilamakane ne tshimana tshivua tshinyungulula lubanza." 
Ezekiel40:18 Mabue aa avua mabuikile buloba miaba yonsu ivua biibi, ne miaba mikuabu ivua mishale mitupu. Tshibumba tshia lubanza lua pambelu tshivua tshipi ku tshibumba tshia lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel40:19 Muntu kupima kabidi mutantshi uvua pankatshi pa tshibuelelu tshia mu lubanza lua pa mbelu, ne tshibuelelu tshia lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Uvua mupete bule bua metre makumi atanu. Uvua mupime mutantshi awu luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu, ne luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu." 
Ezekiel40:20 Kupimaye kabidi bule ne butshiama bua tshiibi tshia kubuela mu lubanza lua pa mbelu tshia ku luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu. 
Ezekiel40:21 Tshibuelelu atshi tshivua kabidi ne bibambalu bisambombu bia balami ba nzubu. Bibambalu bisatu luseke lumue, bisatu luseke lukuabu lua muaba wa kupitshila. Bimana ne bibambalu bivua bule ne butshiama bumue ne bia tshibuelelu tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Bule bujima bua tshibuelelu buvua bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu, butshiama buatshi buvua bua metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel40:22 Tshibambalu tshinene, madidishi, ne malala a mabue bivuabu bazole, bivua mushindu umue ne bia tshiibi tshikuabu. Bua kufika ku tshiibi tshia ku mutu, bavua ne bua kubanda bibandilu muanda mutekete. Ku ndekelu kua tshibuelelu kuvua kabidi tshibambalu tshinene bua kufika mu lubanza lua pa mbelu." 
Ezekiel40:23 Bitangilangane ne tshibuelelu tshia ku mutu kua nzubu, kuvua tshiibi tshia kubuela mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu, bu muvuabi kabidi ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Muntu kupima mutantshi uvua pankatshi pa biibi bibidi, uvua ne bule bua metre makumi atanu." 
Ezekiel40:24 Pashishe kuyaye nanyi luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu. Meme kumona tshiibi tshikuabu. Kupimaye bibambalu bia balami ba nzubu, bimana, ne tshibambalu tshinene. Bule ne butshiama bua bionsu bivua mushindu umue ne bia biibi bikuabu." 
Ezekiel40:25 Muaba awu kabidi kuvua madidishi ku nseke yonsu ya tshiibi, ne ku tshibambalu tshinene. Avua a mushindu umue ne avua ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu, ne avua ku luseke lua ku mutu wa nzubu. Bule bua tshibuelelu tshijima buvua bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu, butshiama bua metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel40:26 Bavua ne bua kubanda bibandilu muanda mutekete bua kufika ku tshiibi. Ku ndekelu kua tshibuelelu kuvua tshibambalu tshinene. Ku bimana bia munda mua bibambalu ku luseke ne ku luseke lua muaba uvua bantu bapitshila, bavua bazolaku malala a mabue." 
Ezekiel40:27 Bitangilangane ne tshibuelelu etshi, muvua tshiibi tshikuabu bua kubuela mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu. Muntu kupima mutantshi uvua pankatshi pa biibi bibidi bivua kuinshi kua nzubu. Kusanganaye bule bua metre makumi atanu."
