Ezekiel40:28 Nanku, muntu awu kumfikisha mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu ku tshiibi tshia kuinshi kua nzubu. Kupimaye bule bua tshiibi atshi. Bule buvua bua momumue ne bua biibi bivua mu tshimana tshia lubanza lua pa mbelu." 
Ezekiel40:29 Bibambalu bia balami, bimana bivua bikosolola bibambalu, tshibambalu tshinene, bionsu abi bivua mushindu umue mu bule ne mu butshiama ne bivua ku biibi bikuabu. Madidishi avua ku nseke yonsu ya tshibambalu tshinene. Tshibuelelu tshijima tshivua ne bule bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu. Butshiama buatshi buvua ne metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel40:30  
Ezekiel40:31 Tshibambalu tshinene tshitua tshitangilangane ne lubanza lua pa mbelu. Ku bimana bia munda mua bibambalu batua bazola malala a mabue. Bavua babanda bibandilu muanda mukulu bua kufika ku tshiibi. 
Ezekiel40:32 Pashishe muntu kupitshila nanyi ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu, bua kubuela mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu. Muntu kupima tshiibi, kusanganaye bule buatshi anu bua momumue ne bua biibi bikuabu." 
Ezekiel40:33 Bibambalu bia balami, bimana bitata bikosolola bibambalu, ne tshibambalu tshinene, bionsu bivua anu bule ne butshiama bumue ne bia ku biibi bikuabu. Madidishi avua ku nseke yonsu ya tshiibi, ne ya tshibambalu tshinene. Tshibuelelu tshijima tshivua ne bule bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu. Butshiama buatshi buvua bua metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel40:34 Tshibambalu tshinene tshivua tshitangilangane ne lubanza lua pa mbelu. Ku bimana bia munda mua bibambalu bivua nseke yonsu ibidi ya muaba wa kupitshila, bavua bazolaku malala a mabue. Bavua ne bua kubanda bibandilu muanda mukulu bua kufika ku tshiibi." 
Ezekiel40:35 Muntu awu kumfikisha kabidi ku tshiibi tshia ku mutu wa nzubu. Kutshipimaye. Tshivua mushindu umue ne biibi bikuabu. 
Ezekiel40:36 Ku tshiibi atshi kuvua kabidi bibambalu bia balami, bimana bivua bikosolola bibambalu, tshibambalu tshinene, ne madidishi nseke yonsu. Bule bujima bua tshibuelelu buvua metre makumi abidi ne atanu, butshiama buatshi metre dikumi ne abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel40:37 Tshibambalu tshinene tshivua tshitangilangane ne lubanza lua pa mbelu. Ku bimana bia munda mua bibambalu bivua nseke yonsu ibidi ya muaba wa kupitshila, bavua bazolaku malala a mabue. Bavua ne bua kubanda bibandilu muanda mukulu bua kufika ku tshiibi." 
Ezekiel40:38 Ku tshiibi tshia ku mutu wa nzubu kuvua tshibambalu tshikuabu tshivua tshilamatangane ne tshibambalu tshinene. Ke muaba uvuabu basukuila minyinyi ya nyama ivuabu bashipa bua kuyilambula Mvidi Mukulu bu milambu ya kuosha. 
Ezekiel40:39 Ku tshimana tshia ku ndekelu kua tshibambalu tshinene, nseke yonsu ibidi, kuvua mesa abidi. Pa mesa apa bavua bakoselapu mitu ya nyama ivuabu balambula Maweja-Nangila bu milambu ya kuosha, nansha bu milambu mikuabu ya kudikobolola." 
Ezekiel40:40 Pa mbelu pa tshibambalu tshinene, pavua kabidi mesa anayi. Pavua bantu babuela ku mushiku wa tshiibi tshivua ku mutu wa nzubu, bavua mua kumona mesa abidi ku nseke yonsu." 
Ezekiel40:41 Nanku bavua bateke mesa muanda mukulu bua kushipelapu nyama ya milambu, mesa anayi ku luseke lua tshiibi, manga anayi ku luseke lukuabu." 
Ezekiel40:42 Mesa anayi avuabu bateke bua kulongolola nyama ya milambu ya kuosha avua a mabue masonga. Avua ne butshiama bua santimetre makumi muanda mutekete ne itanu nseke yonsu, ne santimetre makumi atanu mu bule. Bavua batekapu biamu bia kusaya nabi nyama ivuabu bafila bua milambu ya kuosha." 
Ezekiel40:43 Bavua benza minkoloji ya santimetre makumi muanda mukulu ku nseke yonsu inayi ya mesa aa. Bavua bateka pa mesa apu minyinyi ya nyama ya milambu. 
Ezekiel40:44 Muntu kumfikisha mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu. Muvua bibambalu bibidi, tshimue tshivua ku luseke lua tshiibi tshia ku mutu wa nzubu, kadi tshibuelelu tshiatshi tshivua tshitangila luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu; tshikuabu tshivua ku luseke lua tshiibi tshia kuinshi kua nzubu, kadi tshibuelelu tshiatshi tshivua tshitangila ku mutu kua nzubu." 
Ezekiel40:45 Muntu kungambila ne: “Tshibambalu tshidi tshitangila luseke lua kuinshi, ke nzubu wa batuangaji badi benza midimu mishilangane mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel40:46 Kadi tshibambalu tshidi tshitangila luseke lua ku mutu, ke nzubu wa batuangaji badi benza mudimu wa kulambula milambu.” Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Munkatshi mua bena Levi, anu ndelanganyi ya Sadoke ke idi mua kubuela muaba wa tshijila bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu.”" 
Ezekiel40:47 Muntu kupima lubanza lua munda mua nzubu, luvua butshiama bua metre makumi atanu nseke yonsu. Tshilambuilu tshivua kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel40:48 Kuyaye nanyi mu tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mupimbu wa makunji abidi a tshiibi uvua wa metre abidi ne tshitupa ku dikunji dionsu. Tshibuelelu tshivua ne metre muanda mutekete mu butshiama. Bimana bia ku luseke lua tshibuelelu bivua ne mupimbu wa metre umue ne tshitupa. 
Ezekiel40:49 Tshibuelelu tshivua metre dikumi mu bule, metre isambombu mu butshiama. Bavua ne bua kubanda ku bibandilu dikumi bua kubuela mu tshibambalu. Ku mushiku wa mbelu kuvua makunji abidi, dimue ku luseke lumue, dikuabu ku luseke lukuabu." 
Ezekiel41:1 Muntu kubuela nanyi muaba wa tshijila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kuupimaye. Bimana bia muaba uvuabu bapitshila bua kubuela muaba wa tshijila bivua ne mupimbu wa metre asatu. 
Ezekiel41:2 Tshibuelelu tshivua ne metre atanu mu butshiama. Bimana bia ku nseke bivua ne mupimbu wa metre abidi ne tshitupa. Muaba wa tshijila mene uvua ne metre makumi abidi mu bule, metre dikumi mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel41:3 Pashishe kubuelaye mu muaba wa tshijila menemene. Kupimaye tshibuelelu. Tshivua ne bondoke bua metre mujima, butshiama bua metre asatu. Bimana bia ku nseke bivua ne mupimbu wa metre asatu ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel41:4 Uvua mupime kabidi muaba wa tshijila menemene. Uvua ne bule bua metre dikumi ku nseke yonsu. Pashishe, kungambilaye ne: ke muaba wa tshijila menemene." 
Ezekiel41:5 Muntu kupima tshimana tshia munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Tshivua mupimbu wa metre asatu. Bavua basa tuzubu tuikale ne butshiama bua metre abidi, tuvua lunyungulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu nseke yonsu." 
Ezekiel41:6 Bavua batutentakaja mu milongu isatu. Mu mulongu onsu muvua tuzubu makumi asatu. Kazubu konsu kavua kalamakana ne tshimana tshia pa mbelu, kadi kakavua kalamakana ne tshimana tshia munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu to." 
Ezekiel41:7 Pa kubanda ku mulongu ne ku mulongu, bunene bua tuzubu atu buvua buenda bubaluluka, bualu mupimbu wa tshimana tshivua tshinyungulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua ukepela ku mulongu ne ku mulongu. Nanku bunene bua tuzubu atu buvua bukese panshi, buvua buenda budiunda mu mulongu muibidi, buenda bukumbana mu mulongu muisatu. Biangatshile ku tuzubu tua panshi, muntu uvua mua kubanda diakamue mu tuzubu tua mulongu muibidi, nansha tua mulongu muisatu." 
Ezekiel41:8 Meme kumona muvuabu basa tshitaku tshia tuzubu atu pa tshibumba tshia bule bua metre asatu, tshivua tshinyungulula nzubu mujima wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel41:9 Tshimana tshia pa mbelu tshia tuzubu atu tshivua ne mupimbu wa metre abidi ne tshitupa. Bavua bashiya muaba pankatshi pa tuzubu tuvua tulamakana ku bimana bia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu," 
Ezekiel41:10 ne bibambalu bikuabu. Muaba awu uvua mushale patupu ku nseke isatu ya nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ivua ya metre dikumi." 
Ezekiel41:11 Bua kumuka ku tuzubu, kubuela ku muaba uvua mushale patupu, bantu bavua ne bua kupitshila ku biibi bibidi, tshimue tshivua luseke lua ku mutu, tshikuabu luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu. Mupimbu wa tshimana tshivua muaba awu uvua wa metre abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel41:12 Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kuvua tshibambalu tshikuabu, tshitangilangane ne muaba uvua mushale patupu. Tshibambalu atshi tshivua ne metre makumi anayi ne atanu mu bule, metre makumi asatu mu butshiama. Bimana bia tshibambalu atshi bivua ne mupimbu wa metre abidi ne tshitupa." 
Ezekiel41:13 Muntu kupima nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kumusanganaye ne metre makumi atanu mu bule. Bule bua muaba uvua mushale patupu, tshibambalu tshivua ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne bimana biatshi, buvua kabidi bua metre makumi atanu." 
Ezekiel41:14 Bule bua tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, pamue ne bule bua miaba ivua mishale patupu ku nseke yonsu ibidi ya tshibuelelu, buvua kabidi bua metre makumi atanu." 
Ezekiel41:15 Muntu kupima kabidi bule bua tshibambalu tshilabu basa ku mfundu kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kupima kabidi miaba ya kupitshila ivua ku nseke yonsu ibidi ya tshibambalu atshi. Bionsu pamue bivua ne bule bua metre makumi atanu. Ku bimana bia tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bia muaba wa tshijila menemene," 
Ezekiel41:16 bavua balamika mabaya, biangatshile kuinshi too ne ku madidishi. Nansha ku madidishi ne ku milongu yonsu isatu ya tuzubu, bavua balamika mabaya. Nansha madidishi mene bavua mua kuabuikila ne mabaya." 
Ezekiel41:17 Pa mbelu pa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ne munda muende, biangatshile ku tshiibi tshia tshibueledi ne ku muaba wa tshijila menemene, bavua bazola ku bimana bionsu," 
Ezekiel41:18 bimfuanyi bia bakerubine ne bia malala a mabue. Tshimfuanyi tshionsu tshia malala a mabue tshivua tshilonda tshia bakerubine. Mukerubine yonsu uvua ne mpala ibidi. 
Ezekiel41:19 Uvua ne mpala wa muntu mutangile ku dilala dia dibue luseke lumue. Uvua kabidi ne mpala wa nyama wa ntambue uvua mutangile dilala dia luseke lukuabu. Bimfuanyi abi bavua babizola ku bimana bionsu bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mujima. 
Ezekiel41:20 Bavua bazola bakerubine ne malala a mabue ku bimana, biangatshile panshi too ne kulu kua biibi." 
Ezekiel41:21 Tshiibi tshia muaba wa tshijila tshivua ne bule ne butshiama bua mushindu umue. Kumpala kua muaba wa tshijila menemene, kuvua tshintu tshifuanangane" 
Ezekiel41:22 ne tshilambuilu tshienza ne mabaya. Tshi vua ne bule bua metre umue ne tshitupa, butshiama bua metre umue. Tshivua ne matumba, kabidi ne tshitaku tshia mabaya. Ku nseke yonsu inayi, kuvua anu mabaya. Muntu kungambila ne: — Ke mesa adibu bateke kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel41:23 Bua kubuela muaba wa tshijila, nansha muaba wa tshijila menemene, kuvua tshiibi tshikale ne bitupa bibidi." 
Ezekiel41:24 Tshiibi tshionsu tshivua ne bitupa bibidi bituangane. 
Ezekiel41:25 Pa biibi bia muaba wa tshijila, bavua bazolapu bakerubine ne malala a mabue bia mushindu umue bu muvuabu babizola ku bimana. Kuvua kabidi lutanda luenza ne mabaya ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu." 
Ezekiel41:26 Ku bimana bia tshibuelelu kuvua madidishi, avuabu bakoleshe ne tukanu. Bavua bazolaku kabidi bimfuanyi bia malala a mabue." 
Ezekiel42:1 Pashishe muntu kuya nanyi mu lubanza lua pa mbelu, kumfikisha ku bibambalu bivua ku mutu kua nzubu, bilulamangane ne muaba uvua mushale mutupu, kabidi ne ku tshibambalu tshivuabu bibake mu mfundu mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel42:2 Bibambalu abi bavua babiasa luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu. Bivua ne metre makumi atanu mu bule, ne metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel42:3 Luseke lumue, bibambalu ebi bivua bitangilangane ne muaba uvua mushale, wa butshiama bua metre dikumi. Muaba awu, uvua munyungulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Lunga luseke bivua bitangilangane ne lubanza lua pa mbelu. Bivua ne milongu isatu ya tuzubu tuvuabu batentakaja." 
Ezekiel42:4 Kumpala kua bibambalu luseke lua lubanza lua munda mua nzubu, kuvua njila muikale ne metre atanu mu butshiama, ne metre makumi atanu mu bule. Bua kubuela mu nzubu emu, bavua bapitshila ku luseke lua ku mutu wa nzubu." 
Ezekiel42:5 Tuzubu tua mulu tuvua tubulakana ku tua muinshi, ne tua munkathi mua bibambalu, bualu mu tuzubu tua kulu muaba wa kupitshila uvua munene." 
Ezekiel42:6 Milongu isatu ya tuzubu atu kayivua ne makunji bu mudi bibambalu bikuabu bia mu lubanza. Tuzubu tua mulongu muibidi tuvua tubulakana ku tua mulongu wa kumpala, tua mulongu muisatu ku tua mulongu muibidi." 
Ezekiel42:7 Luseke lua lubanza lua pa mbelu, tshimana tshia bibambalu abi tshivua ne metre makumi abidi ne atanu mu bule," 
Ezekiel42:8 bualu tshibambalu tshivua kabidi ne bule bua metre makumi abidi ne atanu. Kabidi bibambalu bivua bitangilangane ne nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bivua ne metre makumi atanu mu bule." 
Ezekiel42:9 Muinshi mua bibambalu ebi, ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila luabi, kuvua mushiku, bua bantu bavua bafuma mu lubanza lua pa mbelu." 
Ezekiel42:10 Mushiku wa tshibuelelu ewu, uvua muaba uvua tshimana tshia lubanza tshituadijila. Ku luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu, kuvua kabidi bibambalu bitangilangane ne muaba uvua mushale mutupu, kabidi ne tshibambalu tshivuabu basa mu mfundu mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel42:11 Njila uvua upitshila kumpala kua bibambalu abi. Bibambalu abi bitata mushindu umue ne bibambalu bivua luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu ku bule, butshiama, bibuelelu ne milongu ya tuzubu." 
Ezekiel42:12 Ke mutata kabidi biibi bia bibambalu abi bia luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu mushindu umue. Ku ntuadijilu wa njila, kuvua mushiku wa mbelu mutangilangane ne tshimana tshitata tshilama muaba wa tshijila. Bavua babuelelamu ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu." 
Ezekiel42:13 Muntu kungambila ne: — Bibambalu bia luseke lua ku mutu kua nzubu ne bia luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu, bidi bia tshijila. Batuangaji badi mua kubuela muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, badi badila milambu ya tshijila anu mu bibambalu ebi. Nanku bibambalu ebi bidi bijidila. Badi batekamu milambu ya tshijila menemene: ya biakudia, ne ya nyama ya milambu ya mishindu yonsu idibu bashipa, bua kudikobolola." 
Ezekiel42:14 Batuangaji badi bamane kubuela muaba wa tshijila, padibu bapatuka, kabena mua kuya diakamue mu lubanza lua pa mbelu to. Badi ne bua kukopola bilamba bia tshijila bivuabu bavuala bua kuenzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, kubishiya mu bibambalu ebi. Muaba ewu badi ne bua kuvuala bilamba bikuabu, bua bamone mua kuya muaba udi bantu basangile." 
Ezekiel42:15 Muntu mumane kupima bibambalu bionsu bitua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kupatukilaye nanyi ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kutuadijaye kupima muaba uvua munyungulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel42:16 Uvua upima ne mutshi wende. Kusanganaye luseke lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ludi diba dipatukila luikale ne metre nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu mu bule. 
Ezekiel42:17 Kupimaye tshiakabidi luseke lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu lua ku mutu, lua kuinshi, ne lua kudi diba dibuelela, kusanganaye miaba yonsu mikale anu bule bumue bua metre nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu." 
Ezekiel42:18  
Ezekiel42:19  
Ezekiel42:20 Ke mutotabu bapima tshimana tshidi tshinyungulule nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ku nseke yatshi yonsu inayi. Tshimana tshitata ne nseke inayi, bule bua metre nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ku luseke. Tshitata tshiabuluja miaba ya patupu, ne muaba mujidila Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel43:1 Muntu kuya nanyi ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu. 
Ezekiel43:2 Diba adi meme kumona butumbi bua Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele bufume ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Diyi dia Mvidi Mukulu dikole, bu mutoyi wa mayi manene, divua dienda kumpala kuabu. Butumbi abu buvua butokesha kabidi buloba ne nkenka yabu." 
Ezekiel43:3 Malu avua Mvidi Mukulu undeja avua mafuanangane ne amvua mumone pavuaye mufike bua kubutula Yerushalayime, ne amvua mumone pamvua ku muelelu wa musulu wa Kebare. Nanku meme kutua mpala panshi." 
Ezekiel43:4 Butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila kubuela mu nzubu wende, bupitshila ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu." 
Ezekiel43:5 Mueyelu wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambula pa buloba, kunteka mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Meme kumona butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila buvua tente mu nzubu amu." 
Ezekiel43:6 Meme kumvua muntu ungakuisha. Diyi diende difumine munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi muntu uvua mumfikishe muaba awu utshivua anu ku luseke luanyi. 
Ezekiel43:7 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Muntu, tangila muaba ewu. Ke muaba udi nkuasa wanyi wa bumfumu. Ke muaba undi ndiata makasa anyi. Nenshale muaba ewu munkatshi mua bena Izrayele kashidi. Bena Izrayele, nansha bakalenga babu, kabena mua kupepeja kabidi dina dianyi dia tshijila, ne buenzavi buabu, padibu bajika munemu bitalu bia bakalenga babu." 
Ezekiel43:8 Bakalenga mbateke mushiku wa mbelu ne makunji bia ku nzubu wabu wa bukalenga, anu luseke lua mushiku wa mbelu ne makunji bia ku nzubu wanyi, bitangilangane. Mudi amu tshimana tshimue pankatshi pa nzubu wanyi ne wabu. Nanku bavua banyanga dina dianyi dia tshijila pavuabu benza malu mabi. Ke pamvua mubabutule ne tshiji." 
Ezekiel43:9 Mpindiewu bena Izrayele mbalekele kuenza malu mabi ku mesu anyi. Nebumushe bitalu bia bakalenga babu muaba undi. Nanku nensombe munkatshi muabu kashidi. 
Ezekiel43:10 Wewe, Yezekiyele, umanyishe bena Izrayele mushindu udi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Ubabele bua bumvue bundu bua malu mabi abu, batangile bimpe mushindu udibu ne bua kuasa nzubu ewu." 
Ezekiel43:11 Padibu bumvua bundu menemene bua malu mabi avuabu benza, ubaleje dibeji didi dibumvuija mudibu ne bua kuibaka nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, kabidi mudibu ne bua kukosolola nzubu: kushiya miaba ya kubuelela ne kupitshila, kulongolola nzubu mujima. Ubafundile, ubaleje bua badimuene meyi ne mikenji bidibu ne bua kukumbajamu, bua babilonde." 
Ezekiel43:12 Ke mukenji munene udi utangila nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu: miaba yonsu idi inyungulula nzubu pa katongabela ka mukuna, ke miaba ya tshijila menemene." 
Ezekiel43:13 Bunene butudi tunwuija ebu ke bua tshilambuilu. Badi bapima ne tshipimu tshia santimetre makumi atanu, tshivuabu bapima natshi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Mukidi uvua mutshinyungulukile uvua ne bondoke bua santimetre makumi atanu, ne santimetre makumi atanu mu butshiama. Ku luseke lua lubanza kuvua mubangu wa santimetre makumi abidi ne itanu mu butumbuke. Butumbuke bua tshilambuilu," 
Ezekiel43:14 bavua babupima metre umue biangatshile panshi, bua tshibumba tshia kumpala, tshivua mutantshi wa santimetre makumi atanu ne ku mukidi. Tshibumba tshibidi tshivua kabidi mutantshi wa santimetre makumi atanu ne ku mubangu wa tshibumba tshia kumpala. Tshibumba atshi tshivua ne butumbuke bua metre ibidi." 
Ezekiel43:15 Tshibumba tshia kulu tshia tshilambuilu, muaba uvua mbabula, uvua metre ibidi mu butumbuke. Matumba anayi avua malepesha matangile kulu." 
Ezekiel43:16 Mbabula uvua ne metre asambombu ku nseke yonsu. 
Ezekiel43:17 Tshibumba tshibidi tshia tshilambuilu tshivua kabidi ne butshiama bua momumue ku nseke yonsu inayi, metre muanda mutekete. Tshivua ne mubangu luseke lua lubanza, uvua ne centimetre makumi abidi ne itanu mu butumbuke. Mukidi uvua unyungulule tshibumba atshi, uvua ne santimetre makumi atanu mu butumbuke. Bavua babanda ku tshilambuilu pa tshibandilu tshivua luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu." 
Ezekiel43:18 Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, teleja tshindi meme Maweja-Nangila nkutumina diyi. Ke mikenji eyi inudi ne bua kulonda diba dinudi basa tshilambuilu, bua boshilepu milambu, numiamineku mashi a nyama." 
Ezekiel43:19 Neufile kudi batuangaji ba bena Levi ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sadoke ngombe mulume. Anu bobu, ke bamvua muitabe bua bangenzele mudimu, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Neboshe mulume a ngombe awu bua meme kubajimijila mibi yabu." 
Ezekiel43:20 Wangate mashi a ngombe awu, ualabe ku matumba anayi a tshilambuilu avuabu balepesha maye mulu, kabidi ku matumba a tshibumba tshibidi, ne panshi ku nseke yonsu inayi ya tshilambuilu. Ke muudi mua kumusha mikiya idi ku tshilambuilu, kutshijidila." 
Ezekiel43:21 Pashishe, wangate mulume wa ngombe uvuabu balambula awu, bamoshile ku mpenga kua muaba wa tshijila wa Maweja-Nangila, muaba udibu balongolola bua mudimu awu." 
Ezekiel43:22 Dinda, wangate mbuji wa mpumbu udi kayi ne bulema pambidi. Umulambule kabidi bu mulambu wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Neumushe mikiya idi ku tshilambuilu, bu muuvua muenze ne mulume a ngombe." 
Ezekiel43:23 Paudi ujikija kulambula, wangate mulume a ngombe ne mukoku wa tshimpanga, bidi kabiyi ne bulema pambidi." 
Ezekiel43:24 Ubintuadile meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Batuangaji bele luepu pambidi pabi, bandambule nyama eyi bu milambu ya kuosha." 
Ezekiel43:25 Dituku dionsu lumingu lujima, ufile mulambu wa mbuji wa mpumbu, wa kukobolola nawu bantu. Pashishe, ulambule kabidi mulume wa ngombe ne mukoku wa tshimpanga bidi kabiyi ne bulema pambidi." 
Ezekiel43:26 Nanku, matuku malondangane muanda mutekete, neumushe mikiya ku tshilambuilu, batshijidile bua kutshibanjija." 
Ezekiel43:27 Papita lumingu alu, dituku dia muanda mukulu, batuangaji nebamone mua kulambula pa tshilambuilu milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue inudi nufila. Nuenu benza nanku, nenganyishe milambu yenu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel44:1 Muntu kumfikisha ku tshiibi tshia pa mbelu tshivua luseke luvua diba dipatukila lua muaba wa tshijila. 
Ezekiel44:2 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Tshiibi etshi ne tshikale tshinjila kashidi, kabena ne bua kutshiunzulula to. Muntu kena mua kupitshilaku to, bualu meme Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ndi mubuelele ku mushiku awu. Tshiibi etshi tshishale anu tshinjila." 
Ezekiel44:3 Nanku anu mukalenga udi mu nkuasa wa bumfumu, ke udi mua kudilamu biakudia bia tshijila muaba undi. Neabuele, upatuka pa kupitshila mu tshibambalu tshinene tshidi ku ndekelu kua tshibuelelu." 
Ezekiel44:4 Pashishe muntu kupitshila nanyi ku tshiibi tshia ku mutu wa nzubu, bua kufika kumpala kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Meme kumona mutata butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila buwule nzubu wende tente. Meme kutua mpala panshi." 
Ezekiel44:5 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Yezekiyele, tabuluka, tangila bimpe biudi umona. Teleja ne ntema biudi umvua. Teleja meyi ne mikenji bindi ngela, bua malu adi atangila nzubu wanyi. Uteleje nangananga mikenji idi ilongesha mudibu mua kubuela muaba wanyi wa tshijila, nansha kupatukamu." 
Ezekiel44:6 Umanyishe bena Izrayele, bantomboji aba, bena buenzavi, bindi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ngamba ne: “Malu mabi anuvua nuenu bena Izrayele benze mmantonde." 
Ezekiel44:7 Panudi nundambula bia pa madimi, mafuta ne mashi a nyama, nudi nubueja mu nzubu wanyi bantu benyi, batuabu kabayi bateka panshi, badi kabayi bangitaba to. Ke munudi nupisha nzubu wanyi mikiya. Ke munudi banyanga ndondu udi mututuangaje nenu, ne malu enu mabi onsu andi mbenga." 
Ezekiel44:8 Nuenu kanuena nungenzela nansha mudimu muaba wanyi wa tshijila to. Kadi nudi batume bantu benyi bua kuenzabu mudimu awu pa muaba wenu. 
Ezekiel44:9 Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: Muntu muenyi nansha umue, udibu kabayi bateka panshi, kabidi udi kayi ungitaba, nansha yeye musombe munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, kena mua kubuela muaba wanyi wa tshijila to.”" 
Ezekiel44:10 “Bua bena Levi batua bumuka kundi, bambenga, diba ditua bena Izrayele bakuabu bambenge, bua kuya kukukuila mvidie mikuabu, nembanyoke bua bubi buabu." 
Ezekiel44:11 Badi mua kungenzela mudimu amu wa kulama biibi bia muaba wa tshijila, ne midimu mikuabu mishilangane ya mu nzubu wanyi. Badi mua kukosa mitu ya nyama ya milambu ya kuosha, ne ya nyama ya milambu mikuabu. Nebambuluishe bantu." 
Ezekiel44:12 Kadi bu mutotabu bambuluishe bantu bua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu, bafikishe bena Izrayele ku bue-nzavi, meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba ne: nembanyoke. Nebadiambuile bujitu bua bubi buabu." 
Ezekiel44:13 Kabena mua kufika kundi bua kungenzela mudimu wa butuangaji nansha. Kabena mua kusemena pabuipi ne bintu tatuabu banjidila, nansha kufika muaba wa tshijila menemene to. Nebadiambuile nanku bujitu bua malu a bundu, ne bua malu mabi makuabu avuabu benze." 
Ezekiel44:14 Nanku nembapeshe anu midimu mikese mikuabu, idi itangila bulongolodi bua mu nzubu wanyi.”" 
Ezekiel44:15 “Batuangaji ba bena Levi ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sadoke, batua balame bimpe mikenji ya muaba wanyi wa tshijila, diba mene ditua bena Izrayele bakuabu bambenge meme Maweja-Nangila. Nanku amu bobu badi mua kungenzela mudimu, kundambula mafuta ne mashi a nyama ya milambu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ngamba nanku." 
Ezekiel44:16 Bobu nkayabu nebabuele muaba wanyi wa tshijila, basemena ku tshilambuilu, ne ku mesa a tshijila. Nebalame bimpe mikenji indi mufile bua midimu ya mu nzubu wanyi." 
Ezekiel44:17 Padibu bapitshila ku biibi bia lubanza lua munda mua nzubu, badi ne bua kuvuala bilamba bienza ne ndanda. Kabena ne bua kuvuala bilamba bienza ne miosa ya nyama, padibu benza mudimu wabu mu lubanza, nansha munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel44:18 Nebavuale bifulu ne mikaba ya mu tshimonu, bienza amu ne ndanda. Kabena ne bua kuvuala bilamba bidi bibakopakaja." 
Ezekiel44:19 Padibu basue kupingana mu lubanza lua pa mbelu, muaba udi bantu bakuabu, badi ne bua kuvula bilamba bivuabu nabi, pavuabu benza midimu yabu, kubiteka mu bibambalu bia tshijila. Nanku nebavuale bikuabu bilamba bia patupu. Nanku padibu bavula bilamba abi, bantu bakuabu kabena ne mushindu wa kulenga bilamba bia batuangaji bia tshijila to." 
Ezekiel44:20 “Batuangaji kabena mua kukungula mu mutu mujima to, kadi badi mua kukosa nsuki bua kayipitshi kulepa." 
Ezekiel44:21 Muntu wa kudibu nansha umue kena mua kunua maluvu a mvinyo, bangabanga ne kubuela mu lubanza lua munda mua nzubu." 
Ezekiel44:22 Mutuangaji kena mua kusela mukaji mukamba, nansha uvua ku dibaka dikuabu. Udi mua kusela anu nsongakaji muena Izrayele, nansha kupiana mukaji mukamba uvua wa mutuangaji mukuabu." 
Ezekiel44:23 “Batuangaji nebalongeshe bantu banyi mudibu mua kusunguluja tshintu tshia tshijila, ne tshintu tshia patupu, tshintu tshidi ne mikiya ne tshidi katshiyi ne mikiya." 
Ezekiel44:24 Mu bilumbu nebakose nsambu amu pa yoyi, bilondeshile mikenji yanyi. Nebenzeje bibilu amu bilondeshile meyi ne mikenji bimvua mufile. Nebambuluishe bantu bua banemeke bimpe dituku dia Dikisha, dikale dia tshijila." 
Ezekiel44:25 “Mutuangaji udi upia mikiya, padiye usemena pabuipi ne tshitalu, pa kumusha tshitalu tshia tatuende, tshia mamuende, tshia umue wa ku bana bende, tshia muanabu wa balume, nansha tshia muanabu wa bakaji udi kayi muanji kuya ku dibaka." 
Ezekiel44:26 Padibu bamane kumusha mikiya pambidi pa mutuangaji awu, udi ne bua kuindila kabidi matuku muanda mutekete, bangabanga ne kutuadija mudimu wende." 
Ezekiel44:27 Dituku didiye upingana mu lubanza lua munda mu nzubu wanyi, udi ulambula mulambu wa kudikobolola nawu. Ke meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi utuma diyi edi." 
Ezekiel44:28 Disanka dia batuangaji dikale anu dia kungenzela mudimu. Kabena mua kubapesha tshitupa tshia buloba bua Izrayele. Bualu meme nkayanyi ke udibu nende dikenga. 
Ezekiel44:29 Nebadie milambu ne minyinyi ya nyama idibu bafila bua milambu ya kudikobolola. Bintu bionsu bidi bena Izrayele bantekela, mbia batuangaji." 
Ezekiel44:30 Batuangaji nebapete biakudia bia tshianyi bia mu madimi, ne bintu bionsu bidi bena Izrayele bantuadila mu nzubu wanyi. Bantu nebapeshe batuangaji bukula buimpe budibu nabu. Nanku, nembele lupemba." 
Ezekiel44:31 Kadi, batuangaji kabena mua kudia munyinyi wa nyunyi nansha wa nyama bidifuile, nansha ivuabu bashipa kudi nyama wa muitu. ”" 
Ezekiel45:1 “Padibu bamane kuabanyina bisamba bia bena Izrayele ditunga, nebalame tshitupa tshia buloba tshidibu bajidila Maweja-Nangila. Tshitupa tshia buloba atshi netshikale ne kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, kilometre dikumi mu butshiama. Tshitupa tshia buloba tshionsu atshi netshikale tshia tshijila." 
Ezekiel45:2 Mu tshitupa tshia buloba atshi, nulame muaba wa metre nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu ku nseke yonsu bua kuasa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Badi ne bua kunyungulula nzubu awu ne muaba udi mushale mutupu wa metre makumi abidi ne itanu mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel45:3 Mu tshitupa tshia buloba atshi, badi ne bua kupima muaba wa kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, kilometre itanu mu butshiama. Mu tshitupa atshi nebase nzubu wanyi, muaba menemene wa tshijila." 
Ezekiel45:4 Tshitupa tshia ditunga etshi ntshia tshijila, ntshia batuangaji badi bangenzela mudimu muaba wa tshijila. Mu tshitupa atshi nebapete miaba ya kuasa, nebashiye kabidi muaba wa tshijila bua kuasa nzubu wanyi." 
Ezekiel45:5 Muaba mukuabu wa kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, ne kilometre itanu mu butshiama, nebaupeshe bena Levi, badi benza midimu mimpe mu nzubu wanyi. Nebapetemu bimenga bidibu ne bua kusomba." 
Ezekiel45:6 Bilamatangane ne tshitupa tshia buloba etshi tshinudi nunjidila meme Maweja-Nangila, nupime kabidi muaba wa kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, kilometre ibidi ne tshitupa mu butshiama, bua nuasemu tshimenga, muaba udi muena Izrayele yonsu mua kusomba." 
Ezekiel45:7 Mukalenga wa ditunga neapete pende muaba ku nseke yonsu ibidi ya tshitupa tshia buloba tshivuabu bajidila Maweja-Nangila, ne tshivuabu balama bua kuasa tshimenga. Tshitupa tshia mukalenga etshi netshiye too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi luseke ludi diba dibuelela, kabidi netshifike too ne ku mukalu wa ditunga dia bena Izrayele wa luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Muaba awu wikale bule bua momumue ne bua tshitupa tshia buloba tshivua tshisamba tshionsu tshipete." 
Ezekiel45:8 Nanku, bakalenga nebapete muaba wabu mu Izrayele. Kabakukengesha kabidi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila to. Nebashile bisamba bia bena Izrayele bitupa bikuabu bia mu ditunga.”" 
Ezekiel45:9 Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Bakalenga bena Izrayele, nuvua bakoleshe malu bushiwa! Lekelayi malu a tshinyangu a kukengesha bantu, kanubanyengi bintu biabu, nuenze anu bimpe, nulonde anu njila wa malu mimpe. Kanuipatshi kabidi bantu banyi mu buloba buabu to. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnutumina diyi edi." 
Ezekiel45:10 “Muntu yonsu apime bintu ne tshipimu tshimpe.” 
Ezekiel45:11 Nuangate “efa” bua kupima ntete ya kuenza bukula, “bate” bua kupima bintu bia muendundu, kadi bidi ne bua kuikala bunene bumue bua tshia dikumi tshimue tshia “omere.” Omere ke tshipimu tshiudi ne bua kukuata natshi mudimu bua kujadika bunene bua bipimu bikuabu." 
Ezekiel45:12 Lukanu lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole lua “sikle” ludi ne bujitu bua ngrame dikumi ne umue ne tshitupa, mmomumue ne “ngera” makumi abidi. Bidi bikengela nkanu eyi makumi asambombu bua kupeta bujitu bua ngrame nkama isambombu ne makumi muanda mukulu, mmomumue ne bua “mine” umue." 
Ezekiel45:13 “Nufile milambu yenu mushindu ewu: nufile tshia makumi asambombu tshimue tshia ntete ya bukula ya mishindu yonsu inudi nunowa. 
Ezekiel45:14 Nufile kabidi tshia lukama tshia mafuta anudi nuenza. Nupime mafuta ne bate, tshipimu tshia bintu bia muendundu. Bate udi tshia dikumi tshimue tshia omere, nansha tshia “kor.”" 
Ezekiel45:15 Pashishe, mu mpata ya bena Izrayele, pa mikoku nansha pa mbuji nkama ibidi, numushe tshimuna tshimue. Tshimuna atshi, nutshilambule bu mulambu wa bintu bia mu madimi, nansha bu mulambu wa kuosha, nansha bu mulambu wa bobumue, bua kupeta dijimija dia mibi yenu. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi ntuma diyi edi." 
Ezekiel45:16 “Milambu eyi, bantu bonsu ba mu ditunga badi ne bua kuyifila. Nebaye kuyipesha mukalenga wa ditunga dia bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel45:17 Nanku, yeye ke udi ne mudimu wa kufila milambu ya kuosha, milambu ya bukula, ne milambu ya maluvu a mvinyo, bidibu bafila mu bibilu. Udi wenza nanku nangananga bua tshibilu tshia ngondu mupiamupia, bua matuku a Dikisha, ne bua matuku makuabu adi bena Izrayele basangile. Mukalenga udi ne bua kufila milambu bua kudikobolola, milambu ya bintu bia pa madimi, milambu ya kuosha, ne ya bobumue, bua bakobolole bena Izrayele.”" 
Ezekiel45:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Dituku dia kumpala dia ngondu wa kumpala, nebalambule mulume wa ngombe udi kayi ne bulema pambidi, bua kumusha mikiya idi ku muaba wa tshijila." 
Ezekiel45:19 Mutuangaji neangate mashi a ngombe udibu balambula awu, aalabe ku mabaya a ku tshiibi tshia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mu matumba anayi a ku tshibumba tshia tshilambuilu, ne ku mabaya a ku biibi bia lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel45:20 Dituku dia muanda mutekete dia ngondu, nebalambule kabidi ngombe mushindu awu, bua bantu bavua benza bibi mu mpukapuka, kabayi basue, kabayi nansha bamanye. Ke mudibu mua kumusha mikiya ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Ezekiel45:21 “Matuku dikumi ne anayi a ngondu, nenutuadije kuenza tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Netshinenge matuku muanda mutekete. Matuku onsu aa nenudie anu mampa kaayi mela buanga." 
Ezekiel45:22 Dituku dia kumpala dia tshibilu, mukalenga nealambule ngombe mulume, bua kudikobolola yeye, ne kukobolola bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel45:23 Kabidi, dituku dionsu dia mu matuku muanda mutekete a tshibilu, neandambule ngombe milume muanda mutekete, ne mikoku ya bimpanga muanda mutekete idi kayiyi ne bulema, bua mulambu wa kuosha. Dituku dionsu nealambule kabidi mbuji ya mpumbu bua kukobolola bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel45:24 Pashishe neafile mulambu wa kilo makumi asatu a ntete ya kuenza bukula. Neasakidile litre isambombu ya mafuta ku ngombe yonsu ne tshimpanga bidibu balambula. 
Ezekiel45:25 “Bua tshibilu tshidi tshituadija dituku dia dikumi ne ditanu dia ngondu wa muanda mutekete, mukalenga neenze anu bu muvuaye muenze mu tshibilu tshia Dipita dia Maweja-Nangila. Dituku dionsu dia mu matuku muanda mutekete, nealambule milambu ya mushindu umue bua kukobolola bena Izrayele: ke milambu ya kuosha, ya ntete ne ya mafuta.”" 
Ezekiel46:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Tshiibi tshia lubanza lua munda mua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshidi luseke ludi diba dipatukila, tshidi ne bua kushala tshinjila matuku asambombu adibu benza mudimu. Kadi badi mua kutshiunzulula dituku dia Dikisha, ne dia Tshibilu tshia ngondu mupiamupia." 
Ezekiel46:2 Mukalenga neatumine mu lubanza lua pa mbelu, ukosolola mu tshibambalu tshinene tshidi pabuipi ne mushiku wa mbelu. Diba didi batuangaji balambula milambu ya kuosha ne ya bobumue, neimane pabuipi ne tshiibi. Neiname menemene muaba awu. Pashishe neapatuke mu nzubu. Tshiibi etshi tshidi ne bua kushala buashi too ne ku dilolu." 
Ezekiel46:3 Nanku matuku a Dikisha ne a ngondu mupiamupia, bantu nebafike ku tshiibi etshi bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel46:4 “Dituku dia Dikisha, mukalenga neantuadile bana ba mikoku basambombu ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, bidi kabiyi ne bulema pambidi, bua babilambule bu mulambu wa kuosha." 
Ezekiel46:5 Udi ne bua kufila kabidi ne kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula pa mukoku wa tshimpanga umue. Kadi bua bana ba mikoku, neafile ntete ya kuenza bukula, bungi budiye mumone bukumbane. Neasakidile litre isambombu ya mafuta ku kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
Ezekiel46:6 Matuku a ngondu mupiamupia, udi ne bua kulambula mulume a ngombe, bana ba mikoku basambombu ne mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, bionsu kabiyi ne bulema pambidi." 
Ezekiel46:7 Asakidile mulambu wa kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula pa mulume wa ngombe umue, ne pa mukoku wa tshimpanga umue. Kadi bua bana ba mikoku, neafile ntete ya kuenza bukula, bungi budiye mumone bukumbane. Neasakidile litre isambombu ya mafuta ku kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
Ezekiel46:8 Mukalenga neabuele, kabidi apatukile anu mu njila umue, upitshila mu tshibambalu tshinene tshidi pabuipi ne mushiku wa mbelu." 
Ezekiel46:9 Kadi, pikala bantu bafike bua kuntendelela meme Maweja-Nangila mu bikondu bisunguluke, badi babuela ku tshiibi tshia luseke lua ku mutu wa nzubu, nebapatukile ku tshiibi tshia luseke lua kuinshi. Badi babuela ku tshiibi tshia luseke lua kuinshi, nebapatukile ku tshiibi tshia luseke lua ku mutu wa nzubu. Muntu nansha umue kena mua kupatukila muaba udiye mubuelele to. Kadi muntu yonsu neapatukile ku tshiibi tshikuabu, tshidi tshitangilangane ne tshivuaye mubuelele." 
Ezekiel46:10 Mukalenga udi mua kubuela ne bantu, kupatuka kabidi nabu musangu umue.”" 
Ezekiel46:11 “Matuku a bibilu ne bikondu bisunguluke, nebafile mulambu wa kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula pa mulume wa ngombe umue, nansha pa mukoku wa tshimpanga umue, udibu balambula. Bua bana ba mikoku, muntu yonsu neajadike bunene bua mulambu wende. Nebasakidile litre isambombu ya mafuta ku kilo makumi asatu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula." 
Ezekiel46:12 “Padi mukalenga musue kufila mulambu wa budisuile kudi Maweja-Nangila, wa kuosha nansha wa bobumue, badi mua kumunzuluila tshiibi luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Udi ulambula milambu yende mushindu uvuaye muyilambule dituku dia Dikisha. Padiye upatuka, binjile tshiibi diakamue." 
Ezekiel46:13 “Dituku dionsu, balambule Maweja-Nangila mulambu wa kuosha wa muana mukoku wa tshidimu tshimue, udi kayi ne bulema pambidi. Mulambu awu baulambule anu dinda." 
Ezekiel46:14 Dinda dionsu, balambule kabidi Maweja-Nangila kilo itanu ya bukula misambakaja ne litre ibidi ya mafuta. Mikenji ya milambu ya ku dituku dionsu badi ne bua kuyikumbaja kashidi." 
Ezekiel46:15 Muana a mukoku, bukula ne mafuta badi ne bua kubilambula Maweja-Nangila dinda dionsu, kabayi bapitshisha dituku nansha dimue. Benze nanku kashidi.”" 
Ezekiel46:16 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Padi mukalenga mupeshe muanende wa balume mukuabu tshitupa tshia buloba buende, tshitupa atshi tshishale bumpianyi bua bana ba muntu awu." 
Ezekiel46:17 Kadi padi mukalenga mupeshe muena mudimu wende mukuabu tshitupa tshia buloba buende, tshitupa etshi netshishale kudi muena mudimu ewu too ne ku tshidimu tshidibu bapikula bintu. Pashishe batshipingajile mukalenga. Bualu anu bana ba balume ba mukalenga ke badi mua kupiana buloba buende." 
Ezekiel46:18 Kadi mukalenga kena mua kunyenga buloba bua muena ditunga. Mukalenga udi mua kuangata amu bitupa bia buloba buende yeye, kubipesha bana bende ba balume bua babipiane. Kena mua kuipata muntu nansha umue, wa ku bantu banyi meme Maweja-Nangila, mu buloba buende.”" 
Ezekiel46:19 Ke muntu awu kupitshila nanyi ku mushiku wa tshibuelelu wa ku luseke lua tshiibi, bua kumfikisha mu bibambalu bia tshijila bidi bitangila luseke lua ku mutu wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, muaba udi amu batuangaji mua kubuela. Kundejayemu muaba, kumfundu kua nzubu, ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Ezekiel46:20 Kungambilaye ne: — Muaba ewu, ke udi batuangaji mua kuipikila munyinyi wa nyama idibu balambula, bua kukobolola bantu. Badi mua kuipikilamu kabidi milambu ya bintu bia pa madimi. Nanku, kabena mua kupatuka ne bintu ebi mu lubanza pa mbelu, bua bantu kabalengi bintu bia tshijila to." 
Ezekiel46:21 Pashishe muntu kuya nanyi mu lubanza lua pa mbelu, kupitaye nanyi ku matumba onsu anayi, avua mu lubanza elu. Ku ditumba dionsu kuvua lubanza lukese." 
Ezekiel46:22 Mbanza yonsu inayi ayi ivua mikese, mikale ne bunene bumue bua metre makumi abidi mu bule, ne metre dikumi ne atanu mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel46:23 Tshimana tshia mabue tshivua tshinyungulula lubanza luonsu. Ku tshimana atshi bavua basa mbabula, muaba wa kulambila." 
Ezekiel46:24 Muntu kungambila ne: — Ke bikuku, miaba idi bantu badi ne mudimu mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu mua kuipikila munyinyi wa nyama idi bantu bafila bua kuyilambula." 
Ezekiel47:1 Muntu kupingana nanyi ku tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku meme kumona mayi apatukila muinshi mua mushiku wa mbelu, wa ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Bualu tshibuelelu tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshivua tshitangila ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu. Nanku mayi avua apuekela ku luseke lua kuinshi kua nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pashishe avua apitshila luseke lua kuinshi kua tshilambuilu." 
Ezekiel47:2 Muntu kumpatuila mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ku luseke lua tshiibi tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu tshivua ku mutu. Kunyungulukaye nanyi pambelu too ne ku tshiibi tshia luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua nzubu. Mayi avua apueka ku luseke lua kuinshi kua tshiibi etshi. 
Ezekiel47:3 Muntu kuyaye ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Uvua ne muonji wa kupima nawu. Kupimaye metre nkama itanu ku luseke alu. Pashishe kunsambuishaye mayi, avua mankuate mu tupombu." 
Ezekiel47:4 Kupimaye kabidi metre nkama itanu, kunsambuishaye mayi, avua mankuate mu binu. Ku ndekelu kua metre nkama itanu mikuabu, kunsambuishaye kabidi mayi. Musangu ewu mayi avua mankuate mu tshimonu." 
Ezekiel47:5 Musangu wa ndekelu kupimaye kabidi metre nkama itanu. Kadi tshivua mua kusabuka kabidi mayi to, bualu avua mapite kuwula. Avua mpindiewu ne muenji mukole, akengela kuowela bua kusabuka." 
Ezekiel47:6 Kunkonkaye ne: — Yezekiyele, udi mutangile bimpe anyi? Kuyaye nanyi ku luseke katupa. Pashishe kumpingajaye ku muelelu wa muenji wa mayi." 
Ezekiel47:7 Nanku meme kumona ne mitshi ya bungi ivua mpindiewu ku mielelu yonsu ya muenji wa mayi. 
Ezekiel47:8 Muntu kungambila ne: — Muenji wa mayi ewu udi uya ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua ditunga, upueka mu tshibandabanda tshia musulu wa Yardene, udiela mu Mayi manene a luepu. Padi mayi awu abuela mu Mayi manene aa, adi aalengeja, ashale mimpe." 
Ezekiel47:9 Muaba onsu udi mayi awu afika, nyama ya mishindu yonsu, kabidi ne mishipa, neyivulangane. Mayi awu nealengeje mayi manene. Muaba onsu udiwu abuela neafile muoyi." 
Ezekiel47:10 Matuku adi kumpala, biangatshile ku Ene-Ngedi too ne ku Ene-Eglayime, balobi ne banyikile makondu abu ku muelelu wa mayi manene, bua kuumisha. Nebasanganemu mishipa ya mishindu ne mishindu, anu bu mudibu bayipeta ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Ezekiel47:11 Kadi mayi aa kaena alengeja bisense ne majiba bidi ku muelelu wa Mayi manene aa, bua bantu bamone mua kupetamu luepu." 
Ezekiel47:12 Mitshi ya bimuma ya mishindu yonsu neyitoloke ku mielelu yonsu ya musulu wa muenji. Mabeji ayi kaakuuma to. Mitshi neyikuame bimuma diba dionsu. Neyikuame bimuma ku ngondu ku ngondu; bualu mayi adi ayidisha, adi afumina ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bimuma biayi nebikale tshiakudia. Mabeji ayi neikale buanga bua kuondapa nabu." 
Ezekiel47:13 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: “Ndi nnuleja mikalu ya ditunga, didi bisamba dikumi ne bibidi bia bena Izrayele mua kuabanyangana. Tshisamba tshia Yozefe netshipete bitupa bibidi bia ditunga." 
Ezekiel47:14 Nudi mua kuabanyangana buloba ne muoyi wa kalolu. Bualu mvua muditshipe bua kufila ditunga dia bena Izrayele kudi bankambua benu. Nanku nudi mua kudipeta bu bumpianyi buenu. 
Ezekiel47:15 Mukalu wa luseke lua ku mutu wa ditunga udi utuadija ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, upitshila ku tshimenga tshia Etlone, tshia Lebo-Amate, ne tshia Sedade." 
Ezekiel47:16 Pashishe mukalu udi upitshila ku bimenga bia Bereta ne Sibrayime, bidi pankatshi pa bukalenga bua Damase ne bua Amate, ne ku tshimenga tshia Ashere-Tikone pabuipi ne mukalu wa buloba bua Awurane." 
Ezekiel47:17 Nanku, mukalu ewu udi utuadija ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga too ne ku tshimenga tshia Ashare-Enane ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Ku mutu kua mukalu awu, kudi bukalenga bua Damase ne bua Amate. Ke mukalu wa ku mutu wa ditunga." 
Ezekiel47:18 Mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dipatukila udi utuadija ku muaba udi pankatshi pa buloba bua Damase ne bua Awurane, ulonda tshibandabanda tshia Yardene pankatshi pa buloba bua Ngilaade ne ditunga dia Izrayele, uya too ne ku tshimenga tshia Tamare ku Mayi manene a luepu. Ke mukalu wa ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila." 
Ezekiel47:19 Kuinshi mu ditunga, mukalu udi utuadija ku Tamare, too ne ku mpokolu wa Meriba-Kadeshe. Udi ulonda musulu wa Ejipitu too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga. Ke mukalu wa kuinshi mu ditunga." 
Ezekiel47:20 Ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, mukalu udi amu Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, biangatshile kuinshi kua ditunga too ne ku Lebo-Amate, ku mutu mu ditunga. Ke mukalu wa ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Ezekiel47:21 “Nuabanyangane ditunga munkatshi mua bisamba bienu. 
Ezekiel47:22 Nutshinke tshitupa tshionsu, nutshiabanyangane munkatshi muenu. Nuvuluke benyi badi munkatshi muenu, bakadi bamane kulelela bana mu ditunga. Bantu aba badi amu bu bena Izrayele. Mubenzele bionsu bidibu ne bua kuenzela bena Izrayele. Nanku, nebapete yabu miaba, munkatshi mua bisamba bia bena Izrayele." 
Ezekiel47:23 Yonsu wa kudibu neapete muaba wa kuasa mu tshisamba tshidiye musombe. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ntuma diyi edi.” 
Ezekiel48:1 Ke mena a bisamba ne maloba abi: Bena Dane, nebapete muaba ku mutu wa ditunga, ku muelelu wa njila udi upitshila ku Etlone, Lebo-Amate ne ku Ashare-Enane, pabuipi ne bukalenga bua Damase ne bua Amate. Mukalu wa buloba buabu udi umuka ku mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ushikidila ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Ezekiel48:2 Buloba bua bena Ashere nebutuangane ne bua bena Dane, biangatshile ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila too ne ku ludidi dibuelela." 
Ezekiel48:3 Buloba bua bena Naftali nebutuangane ne buloba bua bena Ashere. 
Ezekiel48:4 Bua bena Menashe nebutuangane ne bua bena Naftali. 
Ezekiel48:5 Bua bena Efrayime nebutuangane ne bua bena Menashe. 
Ezekiel48:6 Bua bena Rubene nebutuangane ne bua bena Efrayime. 
Ezekiel48:7 Bua bena Yuda nebutuangane ne bua bena Rubene. 
Ezekiel48:8 Biangatshile ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi, luseke ludidi dibuelela, nebashiye buloba butuangane ne bua Yuda, buikale bule bumue ne bua tshisamba tshionsu. Mu bule nebuikale ne kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa. Nebase nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu munkatshi mua buloba abu." 
Ezekiel48:9 Buloba bua Maweja-Nangila nebuikale ne kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, kilometre dikumi mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel48:10 Buloba bunudi bapeshe batuangaji nebuikale bule bua kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa, biangatshile ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila too ne ku ludidi dibuelela. Nebuikale butshiama bua kilometre itanu, biangatshile ku mutu wa ditunga too ne kuinshi. Munkatshi muabu nebase nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel48:11 Buloba ebu nebuikale bua batuangaji bavuabu bajidila, ba ku ndelanganyi ya Sadoke. Bualu bobu bavua benzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu bimpe. Kabatua babenga Mvidi Mukulu, bu mutua bena Levi benza, patuabu bamone bena Izrayele bamubenga." 
Ezekiel48:12 Nanku nebapete buloba bua tshijila menemene mu buloba bua Maweja-Nangila, pabuipi ne buloba bua bena Levi." 
Ezekiel48:13 Buloba bua bena Levi nebuikale bufuanangane ne bua batuangaji. Maloba onsu abidi neikale ne kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu bule, kilometre itanu mu butshiama." 
Ezekiel48:14 Kabena mua kushintakaja nansha kusumbisha, anyi kupesha muntu muaba mu buloba ebu budi bupite makuabu onsu ku buneme, bualu bavua babujidila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila." 
Ezekiel48:15 Mu buloba bua pa buabu ebu, nebishale muaba wa kilometre ibidi ne tshitupa mu butshiama, ne kilometre dikumi ne ibidi mu bule. Buloba abu kabuakuikala bujidila, bua bamone mua kuasamu tshimenga, ne nzubu mishilangane ya bantu. Munkatshi nemuikale tshimenga." 
Ezekiel48:16 Tshimenga etshi netshikale bule bumue bua metre binunu bibidi nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu mu nseke yonsu inayi. 
Ezekiel48:17 Ku nseke inayi ya tshimenga nekuikale muaba mushale mutupu wa metre lukama ne makumi abidi ne itanu mu butshiama. 
Ezekiel48:18 Mu tshitupa tshidibu bajidila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nekushale kabidi muaba wa kilometre itanu mu bule, ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga, ne muaba mukuabu wa kilometre itanu ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela lua tshimenga. Nebapetemu biakudia bikumbane bua bena mu tshimenga." 
Ezekiel48:19 Bantu bonsu badi benza mudimu mu tshimenga, ne mba tshisamba kampanda nansha tshisamba kansanga, badi mua kudima mu buloba ebu." 
Ezekiel48:20 Buloba bua Maweja-Nangila ne buloba bua tshimenga, onsu abidi masanga neikale bunene bumue bua kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa ku nseke yonsu inayi." 
Ezekiel48:21 Muaba udi ushala newikale wa mukalenga. Buloba buende nebuikale ku nseke yonsu ibidi ya buloba bua Maweja-Nangila ne bua tshimenga. Nebutuangane nabu, kilometre dikumi ne ibidi ne tshitupa mu butshiama, too ne ku mukalu wa luseke ludi diba dipatukila, kabidi too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga luseke ludi diba dibuelela. Nanku, buloba budibu bajidila mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila, ne muaba wa tshijila, nebikale munkatshi mua buloba busunguluke." 
Ezekiel48:22 Buloba bua tshisamba tshia bena Levi ne tshimenga, nebikosolole buloba bua mukalenga mu bitupa bibidi, budi pankatshi pa buloba bua Yuda ku mutu, ne buloba bua Binyamine kuinshi." 
Ezekiel48:23 Bisamba bikuabu ne miaba yabi, bidi mushindu ewu: Buloba bua bena Binyamine budi butuadija ku mukalu udi luseke ludi diba dipatukila, too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga, luseke ludi diba dibuelela." 
Ezekiel48:24 Buloba bua bena Binyamine biangatshile ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, too ne ku luseke ludidi dibuelela, nebutuangane ne buloba bua bena Shimeyone." 
Ezekiel48:25 Bua bena Shimeyone nebutuangane ne bua bena Isakare. 
Ezekiel48:26 Bua bena Isakare nebutuangane ne bua bena Zebulone. 
Ezekiel48:27 Bua bena Zebulone nebutuangane ne bua bena Ngade. 
Ezekiel48:28 Mukalu wa bena Ngade luseke lua kuinshi mu ditunga newikale kabidi mukalu wa ditunga. Neutuadije ku tshimenga tshia Tamare luseke ludi diba dipatukila too ne ku mpokolu wa Meriba-Kadeshe. Pashishe neutungunuke ku musulu wa mu Ejipitu, too ne ku Mayi manene a pankatshi pa matunga." 
Ezekiel48:29 “Nanku, ke munudi mua kukosolola buloba budi tshisamba tshionsu tshia bena Izrayele tshipeta mu ditunga. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi ntuma diyi adi.”" 
Ezekiel48:30 Bibueledi bia tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime bidi dikumi ne bibidi. Tshibueledi tshionsu netshikale ne dina dia tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Ku luseke lua ku mutu, tshimana netshikale ne biibi bisatu: tshiibi tshia Rubene, tshia Yuda, ne tshia Levi. Tshimana tshidi ne bule bua metre binunu bibidi, nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu." 
Ezekiel48:31  
Ezekiel48:32 Ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, nekuikale kabidi tshimana tshia bule bua metre binunu bibidi, nkama ibidi ne makumi atanu. Mu tshimana nemuikale biibi bisatu: tshiibi tshia Yozefe, tshia Binyamine ne tshia Dane." 
Ezekiel48:33 Kuinshi nekuikale tshimana tshia bule bumue ne bikuabu. Mu tshimana nemuikale biibi bisatu: tshia Shimeyone, tshia Isakare ne tshia Zebulone." 
Ezekiel48:34 Pashishe, ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela nekuikale tshimana tshia bule bua momumue, tshikale kabidi ne biibi bisatu: tshia Ngade, tshia Ashere ne tshia Naftali." 
Ezekiel48:35 Bimana bionsu bidi binyungulula tshimenga pamue, bidi ne bule bua metre binunu tshitema. Nanku, tshimenga etshi nebatshinyike ne: “Maweja-Nangila udiku. ”" 
Daniel1:1 Yoyakime, mukalenga wa bena Yuda mumane kushala bidimu bisatu mu bukalenga, Nebukadnesare, mukalenga wa Babilone, kukuataye tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime." 
Daniel1:2 Maweja-Nangila kufila Yoyakime mu bianza bia Nebukadnesare, kabidi ne bintu bikuabu bia tshijila bia mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nebukadnesare kuya ne bena lukanu mu Babilone, kuteka bintu bia tshijila abi mu nzubu wa mvidie yende, mu tshibambalu tshia kulamina bintu." 
Daniel1:3 Nebukadnesare kuambila Ashepenaze, mulombodi wa bena mudimu bende, bua asungule munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, nsongalume mikuabu ya mu diku dia bukalenga, nansha ya mu meku a babanji." 
Daniel1:4 Nsongalume ayi ikale ne bukole bua mubidi, kayiyi ne bulema pambidi, ya mubidi mulenga, ya bukole, ya meji, ya dimanya dikumbane, ne ya lungenyi lutue lua kujingulula nalu malu, bua benzele mukalenga mudimu mu nzubu wende wa bukalenga. Nebabalongeshe mua kuakula ne kufunda muakulu wa bena Babilone." 
Daniel1:5 Mukalenga kutuma diyi bua babapeshe dituku dionsu, biakudia ne maluvu bia momumue ne biende bivuaye udia, unua, ne bua babalongeshe bidimu bisatu. Pakumbana matuku awu nebatuadije kumuenzela mudimu." 
Daniel1:6 Nsongalume inayi ya mu tshisamba tshia Yuda ivua mu tshisumbu tshia ivuabu basungula ayi; mena abu: Daniyele, Ananiya, Mikayele ne Azariya." 
Daniel1:7 Mulombodi wa bena mudimu ba mukalenga kubinyika mena mapiamapia. Kuinyikaye Daniyele Beltashare; kupeshaye Ananiya dina dia Shadrake, Mikayele dia Meshake, ne Azariya dia Abede-Nego." 
Daniel1:8 Bu muvua Daniyele ubenga kupia mikiya, kudikandikaye bua kudia ne bua kunua bivua mukalenga udia ne unua. Nanku Daniyele kuambila mulombodi wa bena mudimu bua kamupeshi biakudia bidi ne mikiya nansha." 
Daniel1:9 Mvidi Mukulu kupesha mulombodi wa bena mudimu muoyi muimpe bua kuitabaye bivua Daniyele ulomba. 
Daniel1:10 Mulombodi wa bena mudimu kuambila Daniyele ne: — Mukalenga wa bakalenga mene udi mufunde binudi mua kudia ne kunua. Kadi biamonaye mpala yenu neandamuke, mishilangane ne ya bansongalume ba mulongu wenu, nudi numbueja mu tshilumbu. Mukalenga udi mua kungenzela bibi." 
Daniel1:11 Ke Daniyele kuambila muntu uvua mulombodi wa bena mudimu mupeshe bujitu bua kubatangila, yeye Daniyele, kabidi ne Ananiya, Mikayele ne Azariya, ne:" 
Daniel1:12 — Ndi nkusengelela ne: bena mudimu bebe bidikije mua kutupesha amu bisakisaki ne mayi a kunua matuku dikumi. 
Daniel1:13 Pashishe ufuanyikije mpala yetu, ne ya bansongalume batu badia biakudia bia momumue ne bidi mukalenga udia. Nanku diba adi newenze netu muudi musue." 
Daniel1:14 Muntu awu kuanyisha, kupima bualu abu kudi Daniyele ne balunda bende mu matuku dikumi." 
Daniel1:15 Matuku dikumi akumbana, kumonabu mpala yabu mimpe, mibidi misenene bikole ne bujitu bupite bua nsongalume ivua idia biakudia bia mumue ne bia mukalenga." 
Daniel1:16 Kubangila ku dituku adi, mulami wabu uvua umbusha biakudia ne maluvu bivuabu mua kudia, ubapesha amu bisakisaki." 
Daniel1:17 Mvidi Mukulu kupesha bansongalume banayi aba disunguluja dia malu ne dimanya diwle mu miakulu ne mu meji a bantu. Daniyele uvua ne lungenyi lua kujingulula malu adi Mvidi Mukulu uleja, kabidi ne bilota." 
Daniel1:18 Matuku avua mukalenga Nebukadnesare muambe, bua kufikabu ne bansongalume bonsu kudiye, kukumbanawu. Mulombodi wa bena mudimu kufika nabu ku mpala kua Mukalenga." 
Daniel1:19 Mukalenga kuyukila nabu bonsu. Munkatshi muabu kavua musangane muntu ne lungenyi bu muvua Daniyele, Ananiya, Mikayele ne Azariya nalu. Ke kubuelabu ku mudimu kua mukalenga." 
Daniel1:20 Pa malu onsu avua mukalenga ubakonka, avua atangila meji ne lungenyi, uvua ubasangana bapite misangu dikumi bena majimbu ne bena mbuku ba mu bukalenga buende." 
Daniel1:21 Daniyele kushala ku mudimu wa mukalenga too ne ku tshikondu tshiwa Koreshe mushale mukalenga wa bakalenga. 
Daniel2:1 Nebukadnesare mumane kukumbaja bidimu bibidi mu bukalenga, kulotaye tshilota. Bowa kumukuata, kupangaye mua kulala tulu." 
Daniel2:2 Mukalenga kubikidisha babuki ba mbuku, benji ba majimbu, bapaki ba manga ne bena bilengulengu, bua kumujinguluilabu tshilota tshiende. Kufikabu, kuimanabu kumpala kua mukalenga." 
Daniel2:3 Mukalenga kubambila ne: — Ndi mulote tshilota, tshinkuatshisha bowa. Ndi musue nungambile tshidi tshilota etshi tshiumvuija." 
Daniel2:4 Bena bilengulengu kuandamuna mukalenga mu muakulu wa bena Arame ne: — Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu! Tuawilaku tshilota, netukujinguluiletshi!" 
Daniel2:5 Mukalenga kubambila ne: — Ndi mumane kupangadika ne: panudi nupanga kungambila tshindi mulote, kanuyi mua kutshinjinguluila, nebanukose bitupa bitupa. Nzubu yenu neyikudimuke dikolu." 
Daniel2:6 Kadi nuenu bangambila tshilota tshianyi, nennupeshe bintu bivule. Nenuikale kabidi ne lumu lunene. Nenku nungambile tshindi mulote, nutshingumvuije." 
Daniel2:7 Bena bilengulengu kuandamuna mukalenga tshiakabidi ne: — Mukalenga, tuambilaku tshiudi mulote, netumone mua kukujinguluila." 
Daniel2:8 Mukalenga kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mumone ne: nudi basue kulepesha diba, bualu nudi bamone mundi mumane kupangadika mua kuenza." 
Daniel2:9 Panudi kanuyi nungawila tshindi mulote, tshibawu netshikale tshia mumue bua bantu bonsu. Bualu nudi bumvuangane bua kungambila miaku ya dishima ne ya tshianana, too ne pandi ngandamuna bimvua mupangadike. Kadi ndi musue nungawile tshilota. Nenku nemmanye ne: nudi mua kutshinjinguluila." 
Daniel2:10 Bena bilengulengu kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Kakuena muntu pa buloba apa udi mua kuenza tshiudi ujinga to. Kabidi kakuena mukalenga, nansha munene, nansha wa bukole bua bungi, ukadiku muebeje mubuki wa mbuku, nansha muena majimbu, anyi muena bilengulengu, bualu bua mushindu ewu." 
Daniel2:11 Bualu buudi ujinga mbukole. Kakuena muntu udi mua kukuambilabu, anu mvidie, kadi kayena isomba mu bantu ba pa buloba." 
Daniel2:12 Nanku mukalenga kufika munda bikole, kutuma diyi bua bashipe bena meji bonsu ba mu Babilone." 
Daniel2:13 Kukosabu tshilumbu. Bawa bamanyisha bantu ne: nebashipe bena meji. Kukebabu kabidi Daniyele ne balunda bende bua kubashipa. 
Daniel2:14 Pashishe Ariyoke, mulombodi wa bena mvita ba mukalenga, kupatuka bua kuya kushipa bena meji ba mu Babilone. Daniyele kuyukila nende, ne meji ne budimu bua bungi. Kumukonkaye ne: mukalenga mmukoleshe tshilumbu nanku bua tshinyi? Ke Ariyoke kulondela Daniyele bualu bujima." 
Daniel2:15  
Daniel2:16 Daniyele kuya diakamue ku nzubu kua mukalenga, kumusengelela bua amuambile tshikondu tshidiye mua kumujinguluila tshilota tshiende." 
Daniel2:17 Daniyele upingana ku nzubu kuende, kulondela balunda bende Ananiya, Mikayele ne Azariya bualu bujima abu." 
Daniel2:18 Kubambilaye bua balombe luse kudi Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, abamanyishe tshilota tshisokome atshi, bua kabavu kubashipa pamue ne bena meji bakuabu ba mu Babilone." 
Daniel2:19 Nenku butuku, Mvidi Mukulu kulotesha Daniyele tshilota, kumujinguluila tshia mukalenga. Ke Daniyele kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu," 
Daniel2:20 wamba ne: “Tuelayi Mvidi Mukulu tuasakidila diba dionsu! Yeye udi ne meji ne bukole. 
Daniel2:21 Udi ukudimuna bikondu ne malu mudiye musue. Udi umusha bakalenga mu nkuasa, nansha ubatekamu. Yeye ke udi ufila meji kudi bena meji, upesha bajinguludi ba malu lungenyi." 
Daniel2:22 Yeye udi utanduila bantu malu makole adi masokome. Udi mumanye malu adibu basokoke mu midima, bualu muaba udiye udi butoke." 
Daniel2:23 Mvidi Mukulu wa bankambua banyi, ndi nkuanyisha, nkutumbisha. Udi mumpeshe meji ne bukole. Udi mummanyishe bualu butuvua bakulombe, mututanduile bualu buvua butatshisha mukalenga.”" 
Daniel2:24 Pashishe Daniyele kuya kua Ariyoke, uvua mukalenga mupeshe bukenji bua kushipa bena meji ba mu Babilone. Ufika, kumuambilaye diakamue ne: — Kushipeshi bena meji ba mu Babilone nansha! Umfile kudi mukalenga. Meme nemmujinguluile tshilota tshiende." 
Daniel2:25 Ariyoke kufila Daniyele pa lukasa kuvua mukalenga, umuambila ne: — Mukalenga, ndi mupete muntu udi mua kukujinguluila tshilota tshiebe. Udi wa ku tshisumbu tshia bena Yuda badibu bakuate, bafike nabu kuneku ku bupika." 
Daniel2:26 Mukalenga kuebeja Daniyele, muabu binyika kabidi ne: Beltashare, ne: — Bulelela, wewe udi mua kungambila tshindi mulote, ne kutshinjinguluila kabidi anyi?" 
Daniel2:27 Daniyele kumuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, bualu busokome buudi webeja, mbualu budi bena meji, bena bilengulengu, bamanyi ba malu a mitotu, bena majimbu, ne babuki ba mbuku, kabayi mua kujingulula." 
Daniel2:28 Kadi mu diulu mudi Mvidi Mukulu, udi umanyisha bantu malu masokome. Yeye ke udi mukumanyishe wewe mukalenga Nebukadnesare malu adi ne bua kuenzeka matuku atshidi kumpala. Kadi tshiuvua mulote ntshietshi." 
Daniel2:29 Mukalenga, pauvua mulale uvua welangana meji bua malu atshidi kumpala. Ke padi Mvidi Mukulu, udi umanyisha bantu malu masokome, mukumanyishe malu adi ne bua kuenzeka matuku adi kumpala." 
Daniel2:30 Kadi Mvidi Mukulu mmummanyishe ndota eyi, ki mbua ne: ndi ne meji mapite a bantu bonsu, kadi amu mbua ne: muntu akujinguluile tshilota tshiebe, akutanduile tshidi tshipampakaja lungenyi luebe." 
Daniel2:31 “Mukalenga, tshiuvua mumone ntshietshi: Kumpala kuebe kuvua lupingu lunene, lupite bunene, bikenka bikole, lukuatshisha bowa." 
Daniel2:32 Mutu wa lupingu alu uvua wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi menemene, tshiadi tshialu ne maboku alu bivua bia tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, difu dialu ne bibelu bivua bia tshiamu tshikunze," 
Daniel2:33 mikolu yalu ivua ya tshiamu tshifiike, makasa alu avua tshitupa tshiamu tshifiike ne tshitupa tshikuabu buloba bosha." 
Daniel2:34 Wewe utua ubandila lupingu elu, too ne diba diwamonu dibue dilamuka ku mukuna, kadiyi dinyungisha kudi muntu. Dibue kudikuma ku makasa a lupingu avua tshitupa tshiamu tshifiike, tshitupa tshikuabu buloba bosha. Kubitshibuladi bitupa bitupa." 
Daniel2:35 Nenku diakamue tshiamu tshifiike, dima, tshiamu tshikunze, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, kusunsukabi, kuenza lupuishi ludi lupepele lupepula, mudi bisote bipepuka mu tshikondu tshidibu bapepula ntete. Lupepele kupepula bionsu, kaluyi lushiya kantu ka lupingu nansha kamue. Kadi dibue divua didikume ku lupingu adi kuenzadi mukuna munene, uvua muwuje buloba bujima." 
Daniel2:36 “Ke muvua thilota tshiebe nanku. Mukalenga, mpindiewu teleja tshidi tshilota tshileja:" 
Daniel2:37 Wewe udi mukalenga mupite bakalenga bonsu. Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu udi mukupeshe bukalenga, dikanda, bukole ne lumu." 
Daniel2:38 Mmukuteke ku mutu kua bukua bantu, kua nyama ya mu mpata, ne kua nyunyi ya mulu. Udi mfumu wabi miaba yonsu idibi. Mukalenga, mutu wa tshiamu tshia mpawungi ke wewe!" 
Daniel2:39 Kunyima kua bukalenga buebe, nekupatuke bukalenga bukuabu bushadile ku buebe. Pashishe bukalenga buisatu, budibu baleja kudi tshiamu tshikunze, nebumueneke, butangalaka buloba bujima." 
Daniel2:40 Bukalenga buinayi, budi ne bukole bu bua tshiamu tshifiike, nebulonde. Bu mudi tshiamu tshifiike tshizaza bintu bia mishindu yonsu tshibisunsula, bukalenga ebu nebuzaze, busunsula makalenga onsu avua mabudianjidile." 
Daniel2:41 Bu muuvua mumone makasa ne minu ya makasa bia lupingu bikale tshitupa tshia buloba bosha ne tshitupa tshikuabu tshia tshiamu tshifiike, bidi bileja ne: bukalenga abu nebuikale bukosoloke. Kadi munda mua bukalenga abu nemuikale tshintu tshikole bu tshiamu, bualu uvua mumone tshiamu tshifiike tshisangisha ne buloba bosha." 
Daniel2:42 Kadi bu mutua minu ya makasa mikale ya tshiamu tshifiike tshisangisha ne buloba bosha, mmumue ne: bukalenga ebu nebuikale tshitupa tshikole, tshitupa tshitekete." 
Daniel2:43 Mukalenga, uvua mumone tshiamu tshifiike tshisangisha ne buloba bosha. Mbuena kuamba ne: bena bukalenga ebu nebatue ndondu, babuelakana ne bakuabu, baseleshangana bana. Kadi kabena balamatangana kashidi, bualu tshiamu tshifiike katshitu tshilamatangana ne buloba bosha nansha." 
Daniel2:44 “Mu matuku adi bakalenga aba mu bumfumu, Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu neajule bukalenga bukuabu budibu kabayi mua kubutula nansha musangu umue. Tshisamba tshikuabu katshiena mua kuangata bukalenga abu nansha. Bukalenga abu nebubutule makalenga onsu adi mabudianjidile. Nebuashidishe, kadi bobu nebujalame kashidi." 
Daniel2:45 Uvua mumone dibue dilamuka ku mukuna, kadiyi dinyungisha kudi muntu, bua divue kusunsula tshiamu tshifiike, tshikunze, buloba bosha, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi bivua ku lupingu. Mvidi Mukulu udi nkumanyisha wewe, Mukalenga, malu adi ne bua kuenzeka matuku adi kumpala. Tshilota tshiebe mbualu budi Mvidi Mukulu mukuleje bulelela. Dijingulula dindi mukuambile didi pa diodi.”" 
Daniel2:46 Nanku, mukalenga Nebukadnesare kutua mpala panshi, kudiela ku makasa a Daniyele, kutuma diyi bua bamulambule nyama ne manananshi." 
Daniel2:47 Pashishe mukalenga kuambila Daniyele ne: — Bulelela, Mvidi Mukulu webe udi munene mupite mvidie yonsu, udi mfumu wa bakalenga. Yeye nkayende udi umanyisha malu masokome, bualu wewe nkayebe uvua mua kuntanduila bualu ebu busokome." 
Daniel2:48 Pashishe mukalenga kupesha Daniyele mianzu minene, ne bintu bia disanka bia bungi, bia mushinga mukole. Kumutekaye mulombodi wa buloba bua Babilone, kabidi mfumu munene wa bena meji bonsu ba mu Babilone." 
Daniel2:49 Mukalenga kuteka Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego ku mutu kua midimu minene ya mu buloba bua bena Babilone, muvua Daniyele mumulombe. Kadi Daniyele kushala mufidi wa ngenyi mu lubanza lua bukalenga." 
Daniel3:1 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare kuenzeja lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi, lua metre makumi asatu mu bule, ne metre asatu mu butshiama. Kuluimanyikaye mu mpata wa Dura, mu buloba bua Babilone." 
Daniel3:2 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare kutuma diyi bua basangishe balombodi ba maloba, balombodi ba midimu, balombodi ba bimenga, bafidi ba ngenyi, balami ba bibutshilu, bandumbulula ne balombodi bakuabu ba mu bukalenga. Bavua ne bua kufika bonsu ku tshibilu tshia dibanjija dia lupingu luvua mukalenga Nebukadnesare muenzeje." 
Daniel3:3 Balombodi bonsu ba mu bukalenga abu kutuilangana ku tshibilu, kuimana kumpala kua lupingu bua kulubanjija." 
Daniel3:4 Mulombodi wa tshibilu kuela diyi dikole, wamba ne: — Nuenu bantu ba mu matunga onsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ba miakulu yonsu, telejayi tshindi ngamba:" 
Daniel3:5 “Diba dinudi numvua muadi wa mpungi, nshiba, nzenze, lunkombe, nansha wa biombelu bikuabu bionsu, nuiname panshi, nukukuile lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi ludi mukalenga Nebukadnesare muenzeje." 
Daniel3:6 Muntu yonsu udi ubenga kuinama panshi, kabidi ubenga kukukuila lupingu alu, badi bamuela diakamue mu tshikutu tshidi ne kapia kakole.”" 
Daniel3:7 Nanku bantu ba matunga onsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ne ba miakulu yonsu, pasuabu bumvua muadi wa mpungi, nshiba, lunzenze, lunkombe, ne wa biombelu bikuabu bionsu, bavua binama panshi, bakukuila lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi luvua mukalenga Nebukadnesare muenzeje." 
Daniel3:8 Tshitupa tshipi, bena Babilone bakuabu kufika, bua kusonguela bena Yuda." 
Daniel3:9 Kuambilabu mukalenga Nebukadnesare ne: — Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu!" 
Daniel3:10 Mukalenga, wewe nkayebe, ke uvua mutume diyi ne: “Muntu yonsu udi umvua muadi wa mpungi, nshiba, lunzenze, lunkombe, ne wa biombelu bikuabu bionsu, iname panshi bua kukukuila lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi." 
Daniel3:11 Muntu yonsu udi ubenga kuinama panshi, ubenga kukukuila lupingu, nebamuele diakamue mu tshikutu tshidi ne kapia kakole.”" 
Daniel3:12 Kadi kudi bena Yuda bakuabu, baudi muteke ku mutu kua malu a bulongolodi bua ditunga dia Babilone, mena abu adi: Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego. Mukalenga, bantu aba kabena banemeka diyi diebe diudi muele, kabena benzela mvidie yebe mudimu, kabena bakukuila lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi luudi muenzeje." 
Daniel3:13 Nebukadnesare kufika munda bikole, kutumaye diyi bua bafike ne Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego. Kufikabu nabu kudi mukalenga." 
Daniel3:14 Mukalenga kubakonka ne: — Nuenu Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego, kanuena nuenzela mvidie yanyi mudimu, kanuena nukukuila lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi lundi muenzeje, bua tshinyi?" 
Daniel3:15 Nenumvue kabidi mpindiewu bela mpungi, nshiba, nzenze, lunkombe, ne biombelu bikuabu bionsu. Nanku mpindiewu nenuiname panshi, nukukuile lupingu lundi muenzeje anyi? Kadi binuabenga kulukukuila, diakamue badi banuela mu tshikutu tshidi ne kapia kakole. Diba adi, mvidie kaayi udi mua kunusungidila kundi?" 
Daniel3:16 Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego kuandamuna mukalenga Nebukadnesare ne: — Mukalenga, katuena basue kudibingisha kumpala kuebe to." 
Daniel3:17 Kadi umanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu wetu, Mvidi Mukulu utudi tukuatshila mudimu, udi mua kutusungidila. Eyowa, udi ne bukole bua kumpatula mu tshikutu tshia kapia, kutunyenga mu bianza biebe." 
Daniel3:18 Nansha yeye kayi musue kutusungidila, Mukalenga, umanye ne: katuena mua kukuatshila mvidie yebe mudimu, nansha kutendelela lupingu lua tshiamu tshia mpawungi luudi muenzeje to." 
Daniel3:19 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare kumvua tshiji tshikole, kufikilaye Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego munda. Ke kutumaye diyi bua batemeshe kapia mu tshikutu kapite ka tshibidilu misangu muanda mutekete." 
Daniel3:20 Kutumaye diyi bua bamue bena bukitu ba mu bena mvita bende basuike Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego, bahele mu tshikutu atshi tshivua ne kapia kakole." 
Daniel3:21 Diakamue kusuikabu bantu abu, bavuale bilamba biabu bimpe, mipanu, mintumpu, tuzaku tuabu, bifulu biabu ne bilamba bikuabu. Kubelabu mu tshikutu tshia kapia." 
Daniel3:22 Bilondeshile diyi dikole divua mukalenga mutume, bavua batemeshe kapia kapite bukole mu tshikutu. Nenku ndimi ya kapia aka kushipa bantu bavua baye kuela Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego mu tshikutu." 
Daniel3:23 Bantu aba basatu, Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego, kuya kupona mu tshikutu tshia kapia basuika." 
Daniel3:24 Diakamue mukalenga Nebukadnesare kumvua bowa, kujuka kulu lukasa, kukonka balombodi ba mu bukalenga buende ne: — Katuvua beela bantu balume basatu basuika mu kapia emu anyi? Kuandamunabu ne: — Eyowa, mukalenga, tuvua babeela." 
Daniel3:25 Ke mukalenga kuamba ne: — Kadi ndi mmona bantu banayi kabayi basuike, bendakana mu kapia, kabayi ne bualu, muntu nansha umue kayi ne mputa. Mpala wa muntu muinayi udi mufuanangane ne mpala wa mvidie." 
Daniel3:26 Nebukadnesare kusemena pabuipi ne mushiku wa tshikutu tshia kapia kuela lubila lukole ne: — Shadrake, Meshake, Abede-Nego, batendeledi ba Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, patukayi, luayi! Diakamue kupatukabu bonsu basatu mu kapia." 
Daniel3:27 Balombodi ba maloba, ba matunga, ba bimenga, ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga kukungila bua kukenketa bantu abu. Kumonabu ne: kapia kakavua kabenzela bualu nansha bumue. Nsuki yabu kayivua mipie to. Bilamba biabu kabivua bipia. Nansha mupuya wa kapia kauvua ubanunka pambidi to." 
Daniel3:28 Ke Nebukadnesare kuela lubila ne: — Mvidi Mukulu wa Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego atumbe! Udi mutume mutumibue wende bua asungidile bantu bende bavua bamueyemena, babenga kutumikila diyi dianyi dia bukalenga. Bavua basue bua babakengeshe pa mutu pa kutendelela ne kukukuila mvidie mikuabu pa muaba wa Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Daniel3:29 Nenku ndi ntuma diyi ne: “Muntu ne wa mu tshisamba kaayi, wa ditunga kaayi, nansha wa muakulu kaayi, udi udiwula Mvidi Mukulu wa Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego, nebamukose bitupa bitupa, nebupule nzubu wende, neashale dikolu. Bualu kakuena mvidie mukuabu udi mua kusungidila bantu bu mudi ewu muenze.”" 
Daniel3:30 Pashishe mukalenga kupesha Shadrake, Meshake ne Abede-Nego mianzu minene mipite ya kumpala mu buloba bua Babilone." 
Daniel3:31 Mukalenga Nebukadnesare kutumina bantu ba bisamba bionsu diyi, ba matunga onsu, ne ba miakulu yonsu, bavua basombe pa buloba buonsu, wamba ne: “Ndi nnujingila bupole buvule!" 
Daniel3:32 “Ndi ne disanka bua kunumanyisha bishima ne malu a kukema bisua Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, mungenzele." 
Daniel3:33 Bishima biende bidi bipite bunene! Malu ende a kukema adi mapite bukole! Mvidi Mukulu ewu neadie bukalenga kashidi, bumfumu buende kabuena bujika!" 
Daniel4:1 “Meme Nebukadnesare, mvua musombe bimpe ne ditalala divule mu nzubu wanyi wa bukalenga." 
Daniel4:2 Dituku dikuabu, pa bulalu buanyi, meme kulota tshilota tshivua tshinkuatshisha bowa. Meji amvua ngela pamvua mulale, ne malu avua Mvidi Mukulu undeja, kunkuatshishabi bowa bukole." 
Daniel4:3 Meme kutuma diyi bua bena meji bonsu ba mu Babilone bafike kundi bua kunjanduila tshilota. 
Daniel4:4 Babuki ba mbuku, bena majimbu ne bena bilengulengu, bamanyi ba malu a mitotu, bonsu kufika. Meme kubawila tshilota. Muntu nansha umue wa kudibu kavua ne lungenyi lua kutshinjinguluila." 
Daniel4:5 Katupa kipi kapita, Daniyele kabidi kufika kuanyi. Ke muntu udibu binyika kabidi ne Beltashare, dina difuma ku dina dia mvidie wanyi. Daniyele udi ne mueyelu wa mvidie ya tshijila. Meme kumuambila ne:" 
Daniel4:6 Beltashare, mfumu wa babuki ba mbuku, ndi mumanye ne: udi ne mueyelu wa mvidie ya tshijila. Nanku kakuena bualu busokome budi mua kukukolela. Unjinguluile tshilota." 
Daniel4:7 Pamvua mulale mu bulalu buanyi, mvua mulote nenku: Mutshi mule uvua muimane kulu munkatshi mua buloba." 
Daniel4:8 Mutshi awu kuenza munene mupite, wa bukole kabidi. Matamba awu male avua mafike ne mu diulu. Bavua baumone pa buloba bujima." 
Daniel4:9 Uvua ne mabeji mimpe matambe, ukuama bimuma bipite bungi, bua bonsu bamone mua kubidia, kuukuta. Nyama ya mu mpata ivua ikisha mu dileji dia mutshi awu. Nyunyi ivua ibaka masua ayi mu matamba awu. Tshifukibua tshionsu tshidi ne muoyi tshiwa tshipetelaku tshiakudia tshiatshi." 
Daniel4:10 “Amu pantshivua mulale, meme kumona kabidi mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu upueka, ufuma mu diulu." 
Daniel4:11 Kuelaye diyi dikole ne: Upulayi mutshi ewu, kosayi matamba awu, popolayi mabeji awu, tangalajayi bimuma biawu. Nyama idi muinshi muawu inyeme, nyunyi idi pa matamba ibuke!" 
Daniel4:12 Kadi nushiye amu tshikuku mu buloba ne miji yatshi, tshishale munkatshi mua bisosa bia mu mpata. Nutshisuike ne lukanu lua tshiamu tshifiike, ne lua tshiamu tshikunze, bua tshishale panshi. Lumuma lutshiboleshe, tshidie bisosa bia mu mpata, mudi nyama yenza." 
Daniel4:13 Bumbushe lungenyi luatshi lua muntu, batshipingajile lungenyi lua nyama. Tshishale nanku bidimu muanda mutekete!" 
Daniel4:14 Batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu kufikisha dipangadika edi, bua bantu bonsu badi ne muoyi bamanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, udi mfumu wa makalenga a bantu. Udi upesha muntu udiye musue bukalenga. Udi mua kubupesha nansha muntu udi mushadile ku bonsu." 
Daniel4:15 Etshi ke tshilota tshimvua mulote, meme mukalenga Nebukadnesare. Nanku wewe Beltashare utshinjinguluile. Bualu kakuena muena meji nansha umue mu bukalenga buanyi udi mutshinjinguluile. Kadi wewe udi mua kutshinjinguluila, bualu udi ne mueyelu wa mvidie ya tshijila. ”" 
Daniel4:16 Daniyele udibu binyika kabidi ne: Beltashare, kumvua bowa katupa, meji ende kulubakana. Mukalenga kumuambila ne: — Beltashare, tshilota etshi ne diumvuija diatshi, kabikuenji bowa nansha! Beltashare kumukudimuna ne: — Mukalenga, tshilota etshi ne diumvuija diatshi, bu biobi mua kutangila amu baluishi bebe!" 
Daniel4:17 Uvua mumone mutshi munene, mukole, matamba a kulu matue mu diulu. Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba bawa baumona!" 
Daniel4:18 Mutshi awu wa mabeji mimpe uvua mukuame bimuma bia bungi, bivua bantu bonsu mua kudia kuukuta. Nyama ya mu mpata ivua ilala mu dileji diawu, nyunyi ivua mibake masua ayi mu matamba awu." 
Daniel4:19 Mukalenga, mutshi awu ngwewe! Wewe kudiunda, kukola. Bunene buebe kupita, kutua mu diulu. Bukalenga buebe kutanta, kufika ne ku ntengu ya buloba." 
Daniel4:20 Pashishe wewe kumona mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu upueka panshi, utumina mu diulu, wamba ne: “Shimbulayi mutshi ewu, nuukosolole! Kadi nushiye tshikuku ne miji yatshi mu buloba munkatshi mua bisosa bia mu mpata. Nutshisuike ne lukanu lua tshiamu tshifiike ne lua tshiamu tshikunze. Lumuma lutshiboleshe, tshidie bisosa bia mu mpata, mudi nyama yenza; bienzeke nanku bidimu muanda mutekete.”" 
Daniel4:21 Mukalenga, tshilota tshiebe tshidi tshiumvuika nenku: bilondeshile dipangadika dia Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu," 
Daniel4:22 nebakuipate munkatshi mua bantu! Neusombe ne nyama ya mu tshisuku. Neudie bisosa mudi ngombe idia. Lumuma lukuboleshe! Neushale mushindu ewu bidimu muanda mutekete, too ne pawamanya ne: Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, ke udi mfumu wa makalenga a bantu, kabidi udi upesha muntu udiye musue bukalenga." 
Daniel4:23 Pashishe mukenji wa kushiya tshikuku tshia mutshi ne miji yatshi, udi utumanyisha ne: Nebakupingajile bukalenga buebe, pawamanya ne: Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu ke udi Mfumu." 
Daniel4:24 Nanku, Mukalenga, anyisha mubelu undi nkupesha: lekela mibi yebe, ne bilema biebe. Wenze malu mimpe, ufuile bapele luse. Nanku misangu mikuabu nebalepeshe tshikondu tshia diakalenga diebe." 
Daniel4:25 Malu onsu, avuabu bamane kuambila mukalenga Nebukadnesare, kukumbanawu." 
Daniel4:26 Tshidimu tshijima tshimane kupita, mukalenga uvua wendakana pa musaka wa nzubu wa bukalenga wa mu Babilone." 
Daniel4:27 Mukalenga kuela lubila ne: — Ewu mBabilone, tshimenga tshinene tshimvua muibake, bua tshikale muaba wa mukalenga kusomba. Tshimenga etshi tshidi tshileja mudi bukole buanyi, ne mudi lumu lua bukalenga buanyi!" 
Daniel4:28 Amu patshivua mukalenga ne miaku eyi mukana, diyi kufuma mu diulu diamba ne: — Mukalenga Nebukadnesare, teleja: Bakunyengi bukalenga!" 
Daniel4:29 Nebakuipate munkatshi mua bantu! Neusombe ne nyama ya mu tshisuku. Neudie bisosa, mudi ngombe idia! Neushale mushindu awu bidimu muanda mutekete, too ne pawamanya ne: Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, ke udi mfumu wa makalenga a bantu, ke udi upesha muntu udiye musue bukalenga." 
Daniel4:30 Diakamue bualu ebu kuenzekabu. Kuipatabu Nebukadnesare munkatshi mua bantu. Kubangaye kudia bisosa, mudi ngombe idia. Mubidi wende kubola ne lumuma. Nsuki yende kulepa, bu masala a nyunyi ya tshiminyi. Nzadi yende kudiunda bu ya nyunyi." 
Daniel4:31 Nebukadnesare kuamba ne: — Bidimu muanda mutekete kupita, meme kutangila mu diulu. Meji anyi a bumuntu kumpingana. Meme kuela Mvidi Mukulu Muena kulu, udi ne muoyi tshiendelele tuasakidila. Meme kumutumbisha, ngimba butumbi buende. Bumfumu buende mbua kashidi. Bukalenga buende kabuena bujika." 
Daniel4:32 Bantu bonsu ba pa buloba, nansha bobu bungi munyi, kabena ne mushinga ku mesu kuende. Udi wenza mudiye musue ne ba mu diulu, mudiye wenza ne ba pa buloba. Kakuena udi mua kumutuila nkanana, nansha kumutandisha." 
Daniel4:33 “Diba adi, kumpingajilabu meji anyi a buntu. Lumu lua bukalenga buanyi, bunene buanyi, ne bubanji kupinganabi kundi. Meme kubanza tshiakabidi mu bukalenga, kupeta lumu lupite lumvua nalu diambedi." 
Daniel4:34 Ke pandi meme Nebukadnesare mpindiewu ntumbisha, nganyisha, nnemeka Mukalenga wa diulu! Tshionsu tshidiye wenza tshidi tshiakane. Malu ende onsu adi pa wowu. Yeye udi ne bukole bua kupuekesha nansha bantu bena diditambisha.”" 
Daniel5:1 Dituku dikuabu, mukalenga Baltazare kulongoluela bantu banene tshinunu ba mu bukalenga buende didia dinene. Kunuaye nabumaluvu." 
Daniel5:2 Pakavuamaluvu mamukuate, kutumaye diyi, bua bafike ne makopu a tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, avua tatuende Nebukadnesare mupawule mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa mu Yerushalayime. Uvua musue kunuinamu maluvu, yeye, ne bantu banene ba mu bukalenga buende, ne bakaji bende ba biuma, ne bakaji bavuaye mubanjije." 
Daniel5:3 Kufikabu ne makopu a tshiamu tshia mpawungi avua muaba wa tshijila mu Yerushalayime. Mukalenga kunuinamu maluvu, ne bonsu bavuaye mubikile." 
Daniel5:4 Bonsu bamane kunua maluvu a bungi, kutumbishabu mvidie idibu batula ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshikunze, tshifiike, ne mvidie idibu basonge ne mabaya, kabidi ne mabue." 
Daniel5:5 Diba adi, tshianza tshia muntu kumuenekela pabuipi ne tshitekelu tshia miendu. Tshianza kufunda bualu ku tshimana tshia nzubu wa bukalenga tshivuabu balaba lupemba. Mukalenga pakumonaye tshianza etshi tshifunda," 
Daniel5:6 mpala wende kutokoloka, meji kulubakana, bowa kumukuata, luzakalu kumupangisha luendu." 
Daniel5:7 Mukalenga kuela diyi dikole ne: bafike ne bena meji ba mu Babilone, benji ba majimbu, bena bilengulengu ne bamanyi ba malu a mitotu. Kubambilaye ne: — Muntu yonsu wabala tshidibu bafunda etshi, watshinjinguluila, nebamuvuadike bilamba bia lumu. Nebamuele mabue a tshiamu tshia mpawungi mu nshingu. Neikale umue wa ku balombodi banene ba mu ditunga." 
Daniel5:8 Bena meji bonsu ba mukalenga kusemena pabuipi. Kadi kakuvua nansha umue wa kudibu uvua mua kubala, nansha kumvuija tshidibu bafunde." 
Daniel5:9 Baltazare kukuatshika bowa, mpala kutokoloka bipite. Bantu banene ba mu bukalenga buende kupampakana." 
Daniel5:10 Mukalenga mukaji, mamuende wa mukalenga, kumvua mbila ivua mukalenga ne bantu banene ba mu bukalenga buende bela. Yeye kubuela mu nzubu muvuabu badie, kuambaye ne: — Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu! Kupampakanyi nansha! Mpala webe katokoloki to!" 
Daniel5:11 Kudi muntu mu bukalenga buebe udi ne mueyelu wa mvidie ya tshijila. Mu tshikondu tshia tatuebe, bakasangana muntu awu muikale udianza kumona malu, muikale ne lungenyi ne meji bu bidi mvidie nabi. Ke pavua tatuebe, mukalenga Nebukadnesare, mumuteke mfumu wa babuki ba mbuku, wa benji ba majimbu, wa bena bilengulengu ne bajinguludi ba malu a mitotu." 
Daniel5:12 Muntu awu udi ne lungenyi, ne meji a pa buawu a kujingulula nawu bilota, kujandula nshinga, ne kumvuija malu masokome. Babikile muntu awu. Ke Daniyele uvua mukalenga muinyike dina ne Beltashare. Yeye neajingulule mukalenga tshidibu bafunde etshi." 
Daniel5:13 Kufikabu ne Daniyele kua mukalenga. Awu kumukonka ne: — Wewe ke Daniyele, muena Yuda, wa mu bapika bavua mukalenga, tatu wanyi, mukuate mu Yuda, anyi?" 
Daniel5:14 Mvua mumvue lumu luebe, bamba ne: Wewe udi ne mueyelu wa mvidie, udi udianza kumona malu ne lungenyi ne meji a pa buawu." 
Daniel5:15 Bavua bantuadile bena meji ne benji ba majimbu, bua babale bualu budibu bafunde ebu, babumvuija. Kadi mbapange bualu."
