Daniel5:16 Kadi mvua mumvue lumu luebe ne: wewe udi ne lungenyi lua kujingulula nshinga ne kumvuija malu masokome. Wewe mubale bualu budibu bafunde ebu, mubumvuije kabidi, nebakuvuadike bilamba bia lumu, bakuele mabue a tshiamu tshia mpawungi mu nshingu. Newikale umue wa ku balombodi banene ba mu ditunga." 
Daniel5:17 Daniyele kuandamuna mukalenga ne: — Mukalenga, lama bintu biebe bia masanka, ne bia kalumbandi, nansha ubipeshe bantu bakuabu. Kadi nenkubadile bualu budibu bafunde, kabidi nenkumvuijebu." 
Daniel5:18 Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, uvua muenze tatuebe Nebukadnesare mukalenga munene, wa lumu ne bubanji." 
Daniel5:19 Bantu ba matunga onsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ne ba miakulu yonsu, bavua bazakala kumpala kuende, bamutshina bua bunene buvua Mvidi Mukulu mumupeshe. Uvua ushipa bavuaye musue kushipa. Uvua ushiya ne muoyi bavuaye musue kushiya nawu. Uvua ubandisha anyi ufuisha bundu, bavuaye musue kubandisha anyi kufuisha bundu." 
Daniel5:20 Kadi tatuebe kuditambisha, kuwula tente ne kapetu. Nanku bakamumbusha mu nkuasa wende wa bukalenga, kumunyenga ne lumu luvuaye nalu." 
Daniel5:21 Bakamuipata munkatshi mua bantu, bamupuekesha milongu ya nyama. Kusombaye ne nyama ya mpunde ya mu tshisuku. Kudiaye bisosa bu ngombe. Mubidi wende kubola ne lumuma, too ne pakamanyaye ne: Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, ke udi mfumu wa makalenga a bantu, ke udi upesha muntu udiye musue bukalenga." 
Daniel5:22 Wewe muanende, Baltazare, uvua mumanye malu onsu aa bimpe. Kadi kuvua mudipuekeshe nansha." 
Daniel5:23 Wakupetula Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, pauvua muele diyi bua bakutuadile makopu a tshijila a mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nuakunuinamu maluvu, wewe, bantu banene ba mu bukalenga buebe, bakaji bebe ba biuma, ne baudi mubanjije. Kabidi udi mutumbishe mvidie idibu bafula ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshikunze ne tshifiike, ne mvidie idibu basonga ne mabaya, kabidi ne mabue. Ke mvidie idi kayiyi imona, kayiyi yumvua, kayiyi mimanye tshintu. Uvua mubenge kutumbisha Mvidi Mukulu, udi mukulame, mumanye malu ebe onsu." 
Daniel5:24 Nanku Mvidi Mukulu wakutuma tshianza bua kufundatshi bualu ebu. 
Daniel5:25 Bualu budibu bafunde budi ne: MENE, MENE, TEKELE ne PARSINE." 
Daniel5:26 Diumvuija didi nenku: MENE, mmomumue ne: bakubala! Mbuena kuamba ne: Mvidi Mukulu mmubale matuku a bukalenga buebe, mmusue kuajikija." 
Daniel5:27 TEKELE, mmomumue ne: bakupima. Mbuena kuamba ne: bakupimi ne tshipimu. Bakusanganyi kuyi ne bujitu;" 
Daniel5:28 PERESE, mmomumue ne: bakuabanyi. Mbuena kuamba ne: mbatapulule bukalenga buebe, bua kubupesha bena Madayi ne bena Persa." 
Daniel5:29 Diakamue Baltazare kutuma diyi bua bavuadike Daniyele bilamba bia lumu, bamuele mabue a tshiamu tshia mpawungi mu nshingu. Kumuvuijabu umue wa ku balombodi banene ba mu ditunga." 
Daniel5:30 Butuku buvua bulonda, kushipabu Baltazare, mukalenga wa ditunga dia Babilone." 
Daniel6:1 Ke Daryaveshe, mukalenga wa ditunga dia Madayi, kumupingana mu bukalenga. Uwa ne bidimu makumi asatu ne bibidi." 
Daniel6:2 Daryaveshe kupangadika bua kuteka bantu lukama ne makumi abidi mu bukalenga buende, badi mua kuleja mpala wende mu tshitupa tshionsu tshia buloba buende." 
Daniel6:3 Ku mutu kua balombodi aba lukama ne makumi abidi ba bitupa bia buloba, Daryaveshe kuteka bamfumu basatu, bua kubatangila, bua muntu nansha umue kanyangi bumfumu bua mukalenga wa bakalenga. Daniyele uvua umue wa ku bamfumu aba." 
Daniel6:4 Uwa mupite bamfumu babidi bakuabu, ne balombodi bonsu ba bitupa bia buloba, ku lungenyi lua pa bualu luvuaye nalu. Mukalenga wa bakalenga uvua musue kumupesha muanzu wa kutangila malu a mu bukalenga buende bonsu." 
Daniel6:5 Nanku bamfumu bakuabu, ne balombodi ba ditunga, kubanga kukeba tshilema tshiwa Daniyele mua kuikala muenze mu bulombodi buende bua ditunga. Kadi kabawa bamupete ne tshilema nansha tshimue, dipanga nansha dimue, bualu uvua muntu muakane tshishiki. Kabakumusangana ne bualu bua kumupishila." 
Daniel6:6 Nanku bantu aba kuamba ne: “Katuena mua kupeta bualu bua kufunda nabu Daniyele, anu tuetu bakeba mu mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu wende.”" 
Daniel6:7 Nanshabu kujingakana. Bamfumu babidi ne balombodi ba ditunga kuya kudi mukalenga wa bakalenga, kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga wa bakalenga Daryaveshe, kuata ku mundundu!" 
Daniel6:8 Bamfumu ba mu bukalenga buebe, balumbuluishi, balombodi ba bitupa bia buloba, ne balombodi ba ditunga, bavua babuele mu tshipangu, bafile meji a ne: utume diyi, wele mukenji mukole, wambe ne: Matuku makumi asatu, muntu udi kayi untendelela meme mukalenga wa bakalenga, kadi utendelela mvidie mikuabu, nansha munga muntu, bamuele mu buina bua nyama ya ntambue." 
Daniel6:9 Mukalenga, ela mukenji awu. Funda ne dina diebe pa mukanda udibu bafunda mukenji, bua muntu kayi mua kushintulula, bualu mmikenji ya bena Madayi ne bena Persa idibu kabayi mua kushintulula." 
Daniel6:10 Ke mukalenga wa bakalenga Daryaveshe kufunda dina diende pa mukanda, uvua ne mukenji awu." 
Daniel6:11 Pakamanya Daniyele ne: Mukalenga wa bakalenga mmufunde dina diende pa mukanda uvua ne mukenji awu, kubuelaye mu nzubu muende. Kubandaye ku nzubu wa kulu, kunzulula madidishi awa matangile ku Yerushalayime. Uvua utua binu panshi, utendelela, utumbisha Mvidi Mukulu wende misangu isatu ku dituku, muvuaye wenza pa tshibidilu." 
Daniel6:12 Baluishi bende kufika lukasa, kumusangana utendelela, sengelela Mvidi Mukulu wende." 
Daniel6:13 Kuyabu kudi mukalenga wa bakalenga, bamuambila ne: — Mukalenga wa bakalenga, wewe kuela mukenji wa ne: matuku makumi asatu, muntu yonsu watendelela mvidi mukuabu, anyi muntu mukuabu, kayi untendelela meme nkayanyi, nebamuele mu buina bua nyama ya ntambue. Ki mmomu anyi? — Bulelela, ke dipangadika dituvua bangate, bilondeshile meyi a bena Madayi ne a bena Persa, adi muntu kayi mua kushintulula." 
Daniel6:14 Pashishe bantu abu kuambila mukalenga munene ne: — Mukalenga, Daniyele, umue wa mu bapika ba mu ditunga dia Yuda, kena ukunemeka nansha wewe, nansha mukenji uudi muele. Udi utendelela Mvidi Mukulu wende misangu isatu ku dituku." 
Daniel6:15 Mukalenga wa bakalenga umvua miaku ayi, kubungamaye bikole. Kuelaye meji, ukeba muvuaye mua kupandisha Daniyele. Too ne pakabuela diba uvua anu ukeba mushindu wa kumusungidila." 
Daniel6:16 Kadi baluishi ba Daniyele kupingana lukasa kudi mukalenga wa bakalenga, kumuambila ne: — Mukalenga wa bakalenga, udi mumanye bimpe ne: bilondeshile meyi a bena Madayi ne a bena Persa, mukenji muela kudi mukalenga munene kabena mua kushintulula to." 
Daniel6:17 Nanku mukalenga wa bakalenga kutuma diyi, bua bafike ne Daniyele. Kumuelabu mu buina bua nyama ya ntambue. Mukalenga wa bakalenga kuambila Daniyele ne: — Amu Mvidi Mukulu webe uudi utendelela ku dituku ku dituku, ke udi mua kukusungidila." 
Daniel6:18 Kutualabu dibue bua kudijibika ku mushiku wa buina. Mukalenga wa bakalenga kutua tshitampi tshiende pa dibue, ne tshia bantu banene ba mu bukalenga buende, bua muntu nansha umue kashintuludi bualu bua Daniyele." 
Daniel6:19 Pashishe mukalenga wa bakalenga kupingana ku nzubu wende wa bukalenga bua kulala. Kubengaye biakudia. Nansha yeye ne tshitabela, kubengaye ne manaya onsu avua mua kumumbusha lutetuku." 
Daniel6:20 Patshiatshia, pakavua panshi patoke, mukalenga wa bakalenga kujuka, kuya lukasa ku buina bua nyama ya ntambue." 
Daniel6:21 Pakafikaye pabuipi ne buina, kubikilaye Daniyele ne diyi dia dibungama, umukonka ne: — Daniyele, muntu wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi, Mvidi Mukulu webe uudi utendelela ku dituku ku dituku, wakusungididi ku nzadi ya nyama ya ntambue anyi?" 
Daniel6:22 Daniyele kumuandamuna ne: — Mukalenga, kuata ku mundundu!" 
Daniel6:23 Eyowa, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi uvua mutume mutumibue wende bua kukanga mbanga ya nyama ya ntambue. Kayena mingenzele bibi. Bualu tshiena muenze tshibawu ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu. Kabidi tshiena mukuenzele tshilema nansha tshimue, mukalenga!" 
Daniel6:24 Mukalenga wa bakalenga muwule tente ne disanka, kutuma diyi bua bapatule Daniyele mu buina. Pakamupatulabu, bakamusangana kayi ne mputa nansha umue pambidi, bualu uvua mutekemene kudi Mvidi Mukulu wende." 
Daniel6:25 Pashishe mukalenga wa bakalenga kutuma diyi bua bakuate bantu bonsu bavua basonguela Daniyele. Bavua babela mu buina bua nyama ya ntambue, ne bakaji babu ne bana. Kabayi banji kufika panshi pa tshiina, nyama ya ntambue kubakuata, kubatshibula mifuba." 
Daniel6:26 Matuku apita, mukalenga wa bakalenga kutumina bantu ba matunga onsu, ba bisamba bionsu, ba miakulu yonsu, badi basomba pa buloba bujima, mukanda ubambila ne: “Ndi nnujingila ditalala dijima!" 
Daniel6:27 “Ndi ngela mukenji ewu ne: Mu buloba buonsu budi ku bumfumu buanyi, muntu yonsu udi ne bua kuleja mudiye unemeka muende muonsu Mvidi Mukulu wa Daniyele. Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi, udi ushala tshiendelele. Bukalenga buende budi bushala kashidi. Bumfumu buende kabuena bujika." 
Daniel6:28 Udi upandisha, usungidila. Udi wenza bishima ne malu a kukema mu diulu ne pa buloba. Yeye ke uvua musungidile Daniyele, ku nzadi ya nyama ya ntambue.”" 
Daniel6:29 Ke Daniyele kupeta muanzu munene mu bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, pashishe ne bua Koreshe, mukalenga wa bakalenga wa bena Persa." 
Daniel7:1 Tshidimu tshia kumpala tshia bukalenga bua Baltazare mu ditunga dia Babilone, Daniyele kulota. Pawaye mu bulalu, muoyi kumupampakana bikole, bua malu awa Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje. Pashishe Daniyele kufunda tshilota tshiende muvuaye mutshimone nunku:" 
Daniel7:2 “Butuku mvua mumone Mvidi Mukulu undeja lupepele lufumina ku ntengu inayi ya buloba, lupepa pa mayi manene." 
Daniel7:3 Nyama inayi minene mipite, kupatuka mu mayi manene. Nyama yonsu uvua mushilangane ne mukuabu." 
Daniel7:4 Nyama wa kumpala uvua mufuanangane ne ntambue, kadi uvua ne mapuapua bu nyunyi wa tshiminyi. Pantshivua mutangile, kutulabu mapuapua ende. Kumuelabu panshi, kumuimanyika pa mikonu ibidi ya nyima bu muntu. Kupetaye lungenyi lua muntu." 
Daniel7:5 Nyama muibidi uvua mufuanangane ne nyama wa urse, uvua mulale mu kaseka, musume mbadi isatu ku menu. Kumutuminabu diyi bua ajuke bimpe, adie munyinyi wa bungi." 
Daniel7:6 Pashishe meme kumona nyama mukuabu, uvua mufuanangane ne nkashama. Uwa ne mapuapua anayi bu a nyunyi panyima pende, kabidi ne mitu inayi. Kupetaye bumfumu." 
Daniel7:7 Pashishe meme kujoja bimpe malu avua Mvidi Mukulu undeja butuku: nyama muinayi umvua mumone, uvua ukuatshisha bowa, uvua ne lonji, kabidi ne bukole bua pa buabu. Uvua ne menu manene a tshiamu, bua kudia ne kusunsula bintu bivuaye ukuata. Uvua udiatakaja bintu bi-vuaye kayi udia. Uvua mushilangane menemene ne nyama isatu ya kumpala eyi. Uvua kabidi ne nsengu dikumi." 
Daniel7:8 Pamvua nkenketa nsengu eyi bimpe, lusengu lupialupia lupite bukese, kumenalu munkatshi mua mikuabu. Kutulalu nsengu isatu mikuabu. Lusengu lupialupia luvua ne mesu bu a muntu, luvua ne mukana, luakula malu a ditambisha." 
Daniel7:9 “Pamvua ntangila amu kutangila, kutekabu nkuasa ya bukalenga. Mununu kufika, kusombapu. Uvua ne bilamba bitoke bu ndanda. Nsuki yende ivua bu miosa ya mikoku. Nkuasa wende wa bukalenga uvua utema kapia. Uvua ne nkata ikenka bu kapia kakole." 
Daniel7:10 Musulu wa kapia kupatuka, kupueka kumpala kuende. Bantu bitotu, makumi a bitotu, kuimana kumpala kuende, bua kumuenzela mudimu. Pashishe bena tshilumbuluilu kusomba bua kulumbuluisha. Kubululabu mikanda." 
Daniel7:11 “Mvua ndengamena, nteleja meyi makole a ditambisha avua lusengu lukese luambe. Pantshivua ntangila, kushipabu nyama muinayi. Kuelabu mubidi wende mu kapia bua Imubutula." 
Daniel7:12 Kunyengabu nyama mikuabu bukalenga buayi. Kadi kuyishiyabu ne muoyi matuku mavule. 
Daniel7:13 “Mvua ntangila amu kutangila malu avua Mvidi Mukulu undeja butuku: Meme kumona tshintu tshifuanangane ne muntu, ufumina mu mavuba a mu diulu. Kusemenaye mutangile kuvua mununu, kuvuabu bamufila." 
Daniel7:14 Kumupeshabu bukokeshi, butumbi ne bukalenga bua bantu ba matunga onsu, ba bisamba bionsu ne ba miakulu yonsu. Bukokeshi buende nebushale kashidi, kabuena bujika. Bukalenga buende kabuena bufue." 
Daniel7:15 “Meme Daniyele, bowa kunkuata. Muoyi wanyi kulubakana munda, bualu malu avua Mvidi Mukulu undeja avua ankuatshisha bowa." 
Daniel7:16 Meme kusemena pabuipi ne umue wa ku bantu bavuapu. Meme kumukonka dijingulula dia malu amvua mumone. Yeye kungumvuija ne: 
Daniel7:17 ‘Nyama minene inayi eyi idi makalenga anayi a pa buloba. 
Daniel7:18 Kunyima kuabu tshisamba tshia tshijila tshia Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, netshiangate bukalenga. Netshibulame kashidi. ’" 
Daniel7:19 Pashishe mvua musue kumanya bualu bua nyama muinayi, uvua mushilangane menemene ne nyama isatu. Ke uvua upita kukuatshisha bantu bowa, muikale ne menu a tshiamu, nzadi ya tshiamu tshikunze. Uvua udia, usunsula bintu bivuaye mukuate, udiatakaja bivuaye kayi udia." 
Daniel7:20 Mvua musue kumanya bualu bua nsengu dikumi ivua nayi nyama ku mutu; lusengu lukuabu luvua lumena, lutula nsengu mikuabu isatu. Lusengu alu luvua ne mesu, kabidi ne mukana muvua muakule miaku ya ditambisha. Luvua lumueneka bu lupite nsengu mikuabu bunene." 
Daniel7:21 Pamvua ntangila, lusengu alu luvua luluangane ne tshisamba tshia tshijila, lutshitshimuna." 
Daniel7:22 Kadi muntu kufika, kuhingisha tshisamba tshia tshijila tshia Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu. Pakakumbana diba, tshisamba tshia tshijila kudiatshi bukalenga." 
Daniel7:23 “Yeye kungumvuija kabidi nenku: ‘Nyama muinayi udi bukalenga buinayi bua pa buloba, bushilangane ne makalenga makuabu onsu. Bukalenga ebu nebubutule buloba bujima. Nebubudiatakaje mu makasa, bubusunsula." 
Daniel7:24 Nsengu dikumi, idi bakalenga dikumi balondangane mu bukalenga abu. Mukalenga wa dikumi ne umue, mushilangane ne bakuabu bavua bamudianjidile, neumbushe bakalenga bakuabu basatu, bua kudiaye bukalenga." 
Daniel7:25 Neadiwule Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, ne meyi a kapeja. Neakengeshe tshisamba tshia tshijila. Neapangidije bua kushintulula bikondu ne mikenji bia tshisamba tshia tshijila. Nebafile tshisamba tshia tshijila mu bianza biende, bua atshikokeshe bidimu bisatu ne tshitupa." 
Daniel7:26 Pashishe bena tshilumbuluilu ba mu diulu nebalumbuluishe. Nebamunyenge bukalenga buende. Nebabushipe, babubutule kashidi." 
Daniel7:27 Nebapeshe tshisamba tshia tshijila tshia Mvidi Mukulu, Muena kulu, bukalenga, bukokeshi, ne lumu, bia makalenga onsu a pa buloba. Bukalenga bua tshisamba etshi nebushale kashidi. Makokeshi onsu a pa buloba neatshitumikile, atshienzela mudimu. ’" 
Daniel7:28 “Apa ke ndekelu wa bualu ebu. “Meme Daniyele, mvua mukuatshike bowa bua bungi. Mpala wanyi kutokoloka. Meme kutuluka bualu ebu diba dionsu mu muoyi wanyi.”" 
Daniel8:1 “Mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukalenga bua Baltazare, meme Daniyele, mvua mumone bualu bupiabupia budi Mvidi Mukulu mundeje kunyima kua bumvua mumone kumpala." 
Daniel8:2 Ke tshimvua mumone etshi: Mvua mu Shushane, tshimenga tshikulu tshia ditunga dia Elame, ku muelelu wa mukidi udi dina dia Ulayi." 
Daniel8:3 Ntangila, meme kumona tshimpanga tshimane, tshitangilangane ne mukidi awu. Tshivua ne nsengu ibidi mile. Lusengu luvua lumene kunyima lututa lupite lukuabu bule." 
Daniel8:4 Meme kumona tshimpanga tshikuma nsengu ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ku luseke ludi ku mutu ne lua kuinshi kua ditunga. Kakutua nyama mukuabu utua mua kutshituila nkanana. Kakuvua muntu utua mua kudipandisha ku bumfumu buatshi. Tshimpanga atshi tshitua tshienza muatshi mutuatshi tshisue. Bukole buatshi buvua buenda budiunda." 
Daniel8:5 “Pamvua ngela meji ku bimvua mumone, mbuji wa mpumbu kufika, utumina kudi diba dibuelela. Uvua upita pa buloba ne lubilu lukole, kayi ubulenga ne mikonu. Mbuji awu uvua ne lusengu lua dikema lumuenekela pankatshi pa mesu." 
Daniel8:6 Mbuji wa mpumbu ewu kufika pabuipi ne tshimpanga tshivua ne nsengu ibidi, tshimvua mumone tshimane pabuipi ne mukidi. Mpumbu kuya ne bukole buonsu kudi tshimpanga bua kutshiluisha mvita." 
Daniel8:7 Meme kumumona ufika kudi tshimpanga, utshikuma ne tshiji tshikole, utshibula nsengu yatshi ibidi. Kubungulujaye tshimpanga panshi, katshiyi ne bukole bua kumutuila nkanana. Kutshidiatakajaye ku mikonu, kakuyi muntu uvua mua kutshipandisha." 
Daniel8:8 Bukole bua mbuji wa mpumbu kudiunda. Kadi papitshi bukole buende, lusengu lunene elu kutshibuka diakamue. Pa muaba uvualu, kumenapu nsengu mikuabu minene inayi, mitangilangane ku nseke inayi ya buloba." 
Daniel8:9 “Ku lumue lupite bukese lua ku nsengu ayi, kupatukaku lusengu lupialupia. Kudiundalu ne bukole bupite, lutangila kuinshi, luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne luseke lua ditunga dipite buimpe." 
Daniel8:10 Kuluishalu kabidi bia mu diulu. Kuelalu bivule bia kudibi panshi, kabidi ne mitotu ya bungi. Kubidiatakajabu ku makasa." 
Daniel8:11 Kuluishalu mene mfumu wa bia mu diulu. Kukandikalu mulambu wa kuosha, uvuabu bamulambula ku dituku ku dituku. Kunyangalu muaba wa tshitendelelu, kuupishalu mikiya." 
Daniel8:12 Bakalupesha bia mu diulu, bishale ku bumfumu bualu. Kubengalu mulambu wa kuosha ne wa buatshia buatshia, bua muoyi mubi mmalu nawu. Lusengu kubenga ditendelela diakane dia Mvidi Mukulu. Malu onsu avualu luenza avua akumbana." 
Daniel8:13 “Pashishe meme kumona mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu wakula. Mutumibue mukuabu kumukonka ne: ‘Malu adibu baleja aa neanenge matuku bungi munyi? Mulambu wa kuosha wa buatshia buatshia nebaubenge matuku bungi munyi? Bubi budi bubutula bintu bionsu nebushale kashidi anyi? Muaba wa tshijila ne bia mu diulu, nebabidiatakaje ku makasa too ne ku diba kaayi?’" 
Daniel8:14 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kumpala kuandamuna muibidi ne: ‘Matuku 1.150, mu dinda ne mu dilolu, kamuakuikala milambu. Pashishe nebajidile tshiakabidi muaba wa tshijila. ’" 
Daniel8:15 “Meme Daniyele, pamvua ntangila bualu ebu buvua Mvidi Mukulu undeja, pamvua nkeba mua kubujingulula, meme kumona tshintu tshifuane muntu, tshimane kumpala kuanyi." 
Daniel8:16 Meme kumvua diyi dia muntu difumina ku mukidi wa Ulayi, dimuambila ne: ‘Ngabriyele, umvuija muntu ewu bualu buvua Mvidi Mukulu mumuleje.’" 
Daniel8:17 Ngabriyele kusemena pabuipi nanyi. Pakafikaye, bowa bukole kunkuata. Meme kutua mpala panshi. Kadi kungambilaye ne: ‘Daniyele, udi anu muntu, umanye ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi mukuleje malu a ku nshikidilu wa bidimu.’" 
Daniel8:18 Patshivuaye wakula nanyi, mvua amu mpala panshi, mufue tshipuka. Yeye kundenga, kungimanyika kulu." 
Daniel8:19 Pashishe kungambilaye ne: ‘Neukumanyishe malu adi ne bua kuenzeka tshikondu tshishindika, tshidi tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu tshijika." 
Daniel8:20 Uvua mumone tshimpanga tshia nsengu ibidi. Tshidi tshileja makalenga abidi: bua bena Madayi, ne bua bena Persa." 
Daniel8:21 Mbuji wa mpumbu ke bukalenga bua bena Ngreke. Lusengu lunene luvua pankatshi pa mesu ende, ke mukalenga wa kumpala." 
Daniel8:22 Pakatshibuka lusengu, nsengu mikuabu inayi kumena pa muaba walu. Nsengu ayi ke makalenga makuabu anayi avua apingana pa muaba wa bukalenga bua kumpala. Kadi kabuakuikala ne bukole buvua nabu bukalenga bua kumpala nansha." 
Daniel8:23 Padi makalenga aa ashikila, benji ba malu mabi bamane kuvudija malu abu mabi, mukalenga wa budisu ne dishima neamueneke." 
Daniel8:24 Bukole buende nebudiunde, kadi ki nku bukole buende yeye nansha. Neabutule matunga mushindu wa dikema. Malu onsu adiye wenza nealubuluke. Neabutule too ne bantu badi ne bukole, kabidi ne tshisamba tshia tshijila." 
Daniel8:25 Udi ne budimu bua bungi. Neashime ne bantu bakuabu. Bua diditambisha diende, neabutule bantu ba bungi badi bela meji ne: tudi tusomba talalaa. Neatombokele mukalenga wa bakalenga. Ke diba didibu bamutshibula, kakuyi muntu udi wenza bualu." 
Daniel8:26 Edi ke diumvuija dilelela dia tshiuvua mumone bua milambu ya kuosha dilolu ne dinda. Kadi ulame munda muebe bualu budi Mvidi Mukulu mukuleje ebu, bualu budi buleja malu a matuku atshidi kule.’" 
Daniel8:27 Diba adi, meme Daniyele, kupungila, kuteketa, disama kunkuata manga matuku. Meme mumane kusanguluka, ke meme kubanga tshiakabidi kukuatshila mukalenga mudimu. Ntshivua amu mpampakana bua bivua Mvidi Mukulu mundeje, bualu tshiwa mubijingulule to.”" 
Daniel9:1 “Mu tshidimu tshia kumpala tshivua Daryaveshe, muana wa Ahashaveroshe, wa mu diku dia bukalenga bua bena Madayi, mudie bukalenga mu ditunga dia Babilone, meme, Daniyele, mvua mutangile mu mikanda ya tshijila. Meme kujingulula bualu buvua Maweja-Nangila muambile muambi Yirmeya ne: bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, Yerushalayime neashale dikolu." 
Daniel9:2  
Daniel9:3 Meme kujila biakudia, kuvuala bilamba bikayapale, kudilaba butu. Meme kutangila kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, bua kumutendelela ne kumusengelela." 
Daniel9:4 Meme kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, mmutondela mibi yanyi: “Eyi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu munene, udi ukuatshisha bantu bowa, udi ulama ndondu yebe ne bonsu badi batumikila mikenji yebe, udi ne diyi dimue kudi bonsu badi bakunanga." 
Daniel9:5 Tuvua babenge kuitaba diyi diebe. Tuvua benze malu mabi. Tudi bena tshibawu. Tuvua bakutombokele. Tuvua babenge mikenji yebe. 
Daniel9:6 Katuvua bateleje bivua bambi bena mudimu bebe, bambile bakalenga betu, bamfumu betu, batatuetu, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu, pavuabu babamanyishe malu mu dina diebe." 
Daniel9:7 Wewe Maweja-Nangila, kuena ne tshilema! Tuetu tudi ne bua kudipuekesha, bu mutudi tuenza lelu. Tuetu bonsu tudi ne bua kuenza nanku, ne badi mu Yerushalayime ne mu Yuda, ne bena Izrayele bakuabu bonsu badi pabuipi ne badi kule, ne badi batangalake mu matunga auvua mubatume bua dikutombokela diabu." 
Daniel9:8 Eyo, Maweja-Nangila wetu, tuetu, bakalenga betu, bamfumu betu, ne batatuetu, tudi tufua bundu, bualu tuvua babenge diyi diebe!" 
Daniel9:9 Kadi wewe Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bu muudi utunanga, udi utufuila luse, nansha tuetu bakutombokele." 
Daniel9:10 Katuvua bakuteleje, pauvua ututumina diyi kudi bambi, bena mudimu bebe, ulomba bua tutumikile mikenji yebe." 
Daniel9:11 Tshisamba tshijima tshia bena Izrayele tshiwa tshishipe mikenji yebe, tshisesuke ku malongesha ebe. Nanku milawu idi mifunda mu mikenji ya muena mudimu webe Moshe, yatukuatshi bua buntomboji buetu ebu." 
Daniel9:12 Wewe udi muenze tshiuvua muambe bualu buetu ne bua bamfumu badi batuludika: udi mututumine mu Yerushalayime makenga makole adi kaayi manji kukuata bantu bakuabu pa buloba. 
Daniel9:13 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, makenga aa mmatukuate, bilondeshile mudibu bafunde mu mikenji ya Moshe. Kadi tuetu katuvua bakusengelele, bua utufuile luse. Katuena balekele mibi yetu. Katuena bangate meyi ebe ne mushinga." 
Daniel9:14 Ke paudi mututumine amu makenga aa. Bualu wewe Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, udi ne diyi dimue mu malu onsu audi wenza. Kadi tuetu katuvua batumikile meyi ebe!" 
Daniel9:15 “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu, pauvua mupatule bantu bebe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ku bukole buebe, uvua mupete lumu lunene, luutshidi nalu too ne lelu. Kadi tuetu tuvua babenge diyi diebe. Nanku tudi bena tshibawu." 
Daniel9:16 Maweja-Nangila, utuenzele tshiakabidi malu mempe. Lekela tshiji tshiudi mukuatshile Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshiebe, mukuna webe wa tshijila. Bua bilema bietu ne bua mibi ya batatuetu, matunga onsu adi netu mutumba adi amu apenda Yerushalayime ne tshisamba tshiebe." 
Daniel9:17 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu, teleja ditendelela ne dikusengelela dianyi. Bua banemeke dina diebe, utangile ne kalolu muaba webe wa tshijila udibu banyanga." 
Daniel9:18 Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, teleja, tangila ne ntema. Umone mudi tshimenga tshietu tshibutuke, tshimenga tshidi tshikujidila. Katuena tukusengelela bualu tudi bantu bimpe to, kadi bualu wewe udi ne dinanga dia kashidi." 
Daniel9:19 Maweja-Nangila, diteleja! Maweja-Nangila, utufuile luse! Maweja-Nangila, teya matshi! Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, bua dina diebe, kujangaluki bua kusungidila tshimenga etshi ne tshisamba etshi bidi bikujidila." 
Daniel9:20 “Mwa ntendelela amu kutendelela, ntonda mibi yanyi, ne ya bena Izrayele, tshisamba tshianyi. Mwa nsengelela Mvidi Mukulu wanyi bua mukuna wende wa tshijila." 
Daniel9:21 Pantshiwa ntendelela nanku, Ngabriyele, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, umvua mumone kumpala, diba diwa Mvidi Mukulu mundeje malu, kusemena pabuipi nanyi ne lukasa luonsu, diba didibu balambula mulambu wa dilolu." 
Daniel9:22 Kungambilaye ne: ‘Daniyele, ndi mufike mpindiewu bua kutokesha lungenyi luebe." 
Daniel9:23 Pauvua mutuadije kutendelela Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu mmuambe bualu. Ndi mufike bua kukuambilabu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu udi mukunange. Udibambe bua kumvua ne kujingulula bualu budi Mvidi Mukulu ukuleja." 
Daniel9:24 Mbapeshe tshisamba tshiebe ne tshimenga tshia tshijila tshiudi musombe bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, bua bajikije ditomboka diabu, balekele malu mabi, bafuilangane luse, bakose nsambu pa yoyi kashidi. Nanku malu adi Mvidi Mukulu uleja, adi bambi bambe, neakumbane. Nebajidile tshiakabidi nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila." 
Daniel9:25 Umanye bimpe, ujingulule ne: kudi bidimu muanda mutekete misangu muanda mutekete, kubangila ku diba divuabu bamanyishe mukenji wa dipingana dia bena tshimuangi, ne wa dibakulula dia Yerushalayime, too ne ku diba didi mfumu wa tshijila upatuka kuudi. Pashishe bidimu muanda mutekete misangu makumi asambombu ne ibidi nebibakulule tshimenga ne bimana biatshi. Kadi matuku awu neikale a ntatu." 
Daniel9:26 Ku nshikidilu kua bidimu muanda mutekete bivudija misangu makumi asambombu ne ibidi ebi, nebashipe muntu wa tshijila, kakuyi udi umusungidila. Pashishe mfumu mukuabu neafike ne tshiluilu tshiende. Neabutule tshimenga ne muaba wa tshijila. Kadi mfumu ewu neajimine ku tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Kadi too ne ku lufu luende, nealuangane mvita ya tshinyangu bu muvuabu babijadike." 
Daniel9:27 Mu bidimu muanda mutekete bia ku nshikidilu, mfumu ewu neakengeshe tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu bikole. Kunyima kua bidimu bisatu ne tshitupa, nealekeshe difila dia milambu ya kuosha, ne dia bintu bia pa madimi. Muena tshinyangu ewu neenze malu mabi ne lukasa luonsu, too ne diba didiye ufua lufu luvua Mvidi Mukulu mujadike. ’ ”" 
Daniel10:1 Mu tshidimu tshisatu tshia bukalenga bua Koreshe, mukalenga wa bakalenga wa bena Persa, Mvidi Mukulu kumanyisha Daniyele, muabu binyika kabidi ne Beltashare, bualu. Bualu ebu buvuabu kabayi mua kuela mpata, buvua bumanyisha Daniyele makenga a bungi. Daniyele kuelangana meji bikole ku bualu ebu. Kujingululaye bualu buvua Mvidi Mukulu musue kumuleja." 
Daniel10:2 “Diba adi, meme Daniyele, mvua mu madilu mbingu isatu mijima." 
Daniel10:3 Tshivua ndia biakudia bisheme, tshivua ndia munyinyi, tshivua nnua maluvu, tshivua ndibeyesha nsuki, too ne pakajika mbingu isatu ayi." 
Daniel10:4 Dituku dia makumi abidi ne dinayi dia ngondu wa kumpala, mvua ku muelelu wa musulu munene wa Tigre." 
Daniel10:5 Pamvua ntangila, meme kumona muntu muvuale bilamba bia ndanda, musuike mukaba wa tshiamu tshimpe tshia mpawungi mu tshimonu." 
Daniel10:6 Mubidi wende uvua mufuanangane ne dibue dia mushinga mukole. Mpala wende uvua ukenka bu mupenya wa mvula. Mesu ende awa mafuanangane ne bimunyi bia kapia. Maboku ende ne mikolu yende bivua bibalakana bu tshiamu tshikunze tshinoona. Pavuaye wakula, diyi divua ne tshiona bu tshia mutoyi wa bantu bavule." 
Daniel10:7 Amu meme Daniyele nkayanyi ke uvua mumone muntu awu. Bantu bavua bannyungulukila kabawa bamone tshintu to. Kadi bowa kubakuata, kunyemabu kuya kusokoma." 
Daniel10:8 Meme kushala nkayanyi, ntangila bualu abu bua dikema, buvua Mvidi Mukulu undeja. Kadi meme kupanga bukole diba adi. Mpala wanyi kukudimuka, kutokoloka. Meme kujimija bukole buanyi buonsu." 
Daniel10:9 Meme kumvua muntu awu wakula. Amu ngumvua diyi diende adi, meme kufua tshipuka, kudishinda mutue mpala panshi." 
Daniel10:10 Pashishe tshianza kundenga, kunjula. Ke luzakalu kungenza ku binu ne ku bianza." 
Daniel10:11 Muntu awu kungambila ne: ‘Daniyele, wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu unanga, udibambe bua kujingulula miaku indi nkuambila. Imana kulu, bualu mbantume kuudi mpindiewu.’ Ngumvua nanku, meme kuimana kulu, nzakala." 
Daniel10:12 Kuambaye kabidi ne: ‘Daniyele, kutshinyi nansha! Kubangila ku dituku diuvua mudipuekeshe ku mesu a Mvidi Mukulu, muikale ne muoyi wa kujingulula malu avua enzeka aa, Mvidi Mukulu mmumvue ditendelela diebe. Ke pandi mufike bua kukutuadila diandamuna." 
Daniel10:13 Kadi mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, mulami wa bukalenga bua bena Persa, uvua muanji kuntuila nkanana matuku makumi abidi ne dimue, too ne diba diakafika Mikayele, umue wa ku bamfumu ba batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, bua kungambuluishaye. Nenku bavua banji kundama kudi bakalenga banene ba bena Persa." 
Daniel10:14 Mpindiewu ndi mufike bua kukujinguluila malu adi ne bua kukuata bena tshisamba tshiebe mu matuku adi kumpala. Ke bualu bukuabu butshidi Mvidi Mukulu ukuleja bua matuku adi kumpala.’ 
Daniel10:15 “Pawaye ungambila miaku eyi, mvua muiname mutangila panshi. Tshivua ne bukole bua kuakula diyi nansha dimue to." 
Daniel10:16 Kadi tshia muoyi tshikuabu, tshifuanangane ne muntu, kundenga ku mishiku. Ke meme kubulula mukana, kuakula tshiakabidi. Meme kuambila muntu uvua muimane kumpala kuanyi ne: ‘Mfumu wanyi, bua bualu ebu budi Mvidi Mukulu mundeje, dibungama ndinkuate. Tshiena ne bukole nansha." 
Daniel10:17 Meme muntu wa tshianana, ndi mua kuyukila ne mfumu wanyi bishi, pandi tshiyi nansha ne bukole, tshiyi ne mueyelu mene.’" 
Daniel10:18 Diakamue, uvua mufuanangane ne muntu awu kundenga tshiakabidi, bua kumpingajila bukole." 
Daniel10:19 Muntu mukuabu kungamba ne: ‘Muntu udi Mvidi Mukulu munange, kutshinyi nansha! Malu onsu adi enda bimpe bualu buebe! Kolesha muoyi, kankamana!’ Patshivuaye wenda ungakuisha, bukole buanyi buvua buenda bupingana. Meme kumuambila ne: ‘Mfumu wanyi, udi mua kungakuisha, bualu udi mumpingajile bukole.’" 
Daniel10:20 Yeye kuamba ne: ‘Udi mumanye ne: ndi mufike kuudi bua tshinyi? Ndi mufike bua kukumanyisha malu adibu bafunde mu mukanda wa bulelela. Kadi ntshidi ne bua kuluisha mutumibue mulami wa ditunga dia Persa. Pa diba menemene dindi nya kumuluisha, mutumibue mulami wa ditunga dia bena Ngreke kufika. Kakuena muntu nansha umue udi ungambuluisha bua kuluisha baluishi aba, anu Mikayele mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu udi ulama Izrayele." 
Daniel10:21  
Daniel11:1 Mikayele ke umvua meme muambuluishe, mutue nyama ku mikolu mu tshidimu tshia bukalenga bua Darya-veshe, muena Madayi." 
Daniel11:2 Mpindiewu ndi nkumanyisha mukenji wa bushiwa. “Bakalenga banene basatu nebalondangane mu bukalenga bua bena Persa. Pashishe mukalenga muinayi neakungije bubanji bupite bua bantu basatu ba kumpala. Nenku bubanji buende nebumupeteshe bukole bua bungi. Diba adi, nealuishe bukalenga bua bena Ngreke." 
Daniel11:3 Kadi muena mvita mukuabu neadie bukalenga bua bena Ngreke. Neikale ku mutu kua ditunga dialabale. Neenze mudiye musue. 
Daniel11:4 Kadi pajadikaye bukokeshi buende, nebatshibule bukalenga buende. Nebabuabanye mu ntengu inayi ya buloba. Ndelanganyi yende kayena imupingana mu bukalenga to. Bukalenga buende nebabuabanyine bantu bakuabu. Kadi bantu aba kabena bapeta bukole buvuaye nabu nansha." 
Daniel11:5 “Muntu udi udia bukalenga mu ditunga dia kuinshi neikale ne bukole. Kadi umue wa ku balombodi bende ba bena mvita neamupite bukole. Neikale mukalenga wa buloba budi bupite buende ku bunene. 
Daniel11:6 Papita bidimu bikese, bakalenga babidi aba nebatue ndondu. Mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neasele muana wa bakaji wa mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi, bua kupingaja diumvuangana munkatshi muabu. Kadi muana wa bakaji ewu kakulama bukalenga buende nansha. Bayende kakushala ne muoyi. Nansha muana udibu balela neafue. Muana wa bakaji mene neafue diakamue, ne bende bonsu, kabidi ne tatuende ne bayende." 
Daniel11:7 Muntu umue wa mu diku diende neapingane mu bukalenga bua tatuende. Neaye kuluisha bena mvita ba mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu mu tshimenga tshiende tshikolesha ne bimana. Neabatshimune. 
Daniel11:8 Neapingane mu Ejipitu ne bintu biapawulaye: mpingu ya mvidie ya bena ditunga, kabidi ne malonga a mushinga mukole a tshiamu tshia mpawungi ne a tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, avuabu bajidile mvidie ayi. Papita bidimu bia bungi kabayi baluangana mvita," 
Daniel11:9 mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neaye mu bukalenga bua kuinshi. Pashishe neapingane kuende. 
Daniel11:10 “Bana ba balume ba mukalenga wa mu ditunga dia ku mutu Mbadilongolole ku mvita. Nebasangishe bena mvita bapite bungi. Umue wa kudibu neaye ne bena mvita bende. Neasambuke mikalu ne lubilu bu lua musulu wa mayi udi upasalala. Pashishe papinganaye mu ditunga diende, nealuishe tshimenga tshia baluishi tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana." 
Daniel11:11 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi, neafike munda. Nealuishe mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu. Awu nealongolole bena mvita tshisumbu tshinene. Kadi Mbamutshimune kudi mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi." 
Daniel11:12 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi, neaditambishe bua ditshimuna diende adi. Kadi nansha muyilaye mushipeshe binunu ne binunu bia bena mvita, kakubatshimuna kashidi nansha." 
Daniel11:13 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neakunguje tshisumbu tshia bena mvita tshitambe tshia kumpala ku bunene. Papita bidimu bikese, neapingane ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bena mvita, tshikale ne bintu bia bungi bia kuluangana nabi." 
Daniel11:14 Mu tshikondu atshi, bantu ba bungi nebajuke bua kuluangana ne mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi. Nanku bena tshinyangu ba mu tshisamba tshiebe wewe Daniyele, nebajuke. Nebatombokele mukalenga ewu, bua kukumbaja bivua Mvidi Mukulu muleje. Kadi kabakumutshimuna to." 
Daniel11:15 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neafike. Neimanyike mishiki ya buloba ku tshimana tshia tshimenga. Neakuate tshimenga tshivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi, nansha mudiye ne bena mvita ba kalanda musenga, kakunutuila nkanana nansha." 
Daniel11:16 Kadi udi ufika, ubuela mu ditunga, neenze mudiye musue. Bualu kakuakuikala muntu udi mua kumutuila nkanana. Pajikijaye kubutula miaba yonsu idiye upitshila, neabanze mu ditunga didi dipite buimpe." 
Daniel11:17 Pashishe neapangadike bua kuleja bukole buonsu bua bukalenga buende. Neadileje ne budimu bu muntu udi musue kuenza bimpe. Neaseleshe muanende kudi mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi, kadi muikale ne meji a kubutula ditunga dia muluishi wende. Kadi kakukumbaja bualu ebu to." 
Daniel11:18 Kunyima neaye ne mvita yende ku muelelu wa ditunga. Neakuate maloba a bungi, too ne padi mukalenga muenyi umutshimuna, umupingajila malu mabi onsu avuaye muenzele bakuabu." 
Daniel11:19 Pashishe neaye mu bimenga bia mu ditunga diende bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Kadi kakupeta tshipeta tshimpe to. Neafue, kabayi mua kuvuluka kabidi bualu buende." 
Daniel11:20 Mupinganyi wende neatume muntu bua kupawula nzubu wa lumu lunene wa mu bukalenga. Kunyima kua matuku makese nebumushe mukalenga ewu ku bumfumu, bantu kabayi bamanye, kakuyi nansha mvita." 
Daniel11:21 “Muntu udi bantu bapetula neamupingane mu nkuasa, kadi kabena bamupesha muanzu wa bukalenga. Muntu ewu neafike tshikondu tshidi bantu basomba talalaa, bua kunyenga bukalenga mu musokoku." 
Daniel11:22 Kakuena tshiluilu tshidi mua kumutshimuna. Neabutule biluilu bionsu. Neashipe kabidi mukalenga wa bena tshisamba tshia ndondu. 
Daniel11:23 Neangate ndondu idibu batue nende bua kudinga nayi bantu. Neikale ne bukole bua bungi, nansha bantu bakese bamulonda munyima." 
Daniel11:24 Nansha bantu basomba talalaa, neaye miaba ya mu ditunga idi mipite buimpe, bua kuenza malu avua bankambua bende kabayi benza: neapawule ditunga, abanyine bantu badi bamulonda bintu ne biuma, bivuaye mupawule. Neakebe mua kuluisha bimenga biwabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Kadi malu onsu awu kaena atungunuka kashidi to." 
Daniel11:25 “Mudimanye mudiye ne bukole kabidi ne bukitu, neaye ne tshisumbu tshinene tshia bena mvita bua kuluisha mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi. Mukalenga ewu neasangane nende, ne bena mvita ba bungi, ne ba bukole bupite. Kadi kakunutuila nkanana. Bualu nebamuluishe ne budimu." 
Daniel11:26 Bualu, bantu badiye usomba nabu, nebamutungile bitungu. Nebatshimune bena mvita bende, babashipe tshisumbu tshipite bunene." 
Daniel11:27 Bakalenga babidi nebasombe muaba umue, kadi mitshima yabu neikale miuwule tente ne malu mabi. Nanku nebambilangane meyi a dishima. Disomba diabu dia pamue kadiena dilubuluka. Bualu tshikondu tshia nshikidilu katshiena tshianji kukumbana." 
Daniel11:28 Mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neaye mu ditunga diende ne bubanji bua bungi. Mu luendu alu neenzele tshisamba tshidi tshitue ndondu wa tshijila mudiye musue. Pashishe neapingane mu ditunga diende. 
Daniel11:29 “Pakumbana tshikondu tshivuabu bajadike, mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neaye tshiakabidi mu bukalenga bua kuinshi. Kadi malu a mu tshikondu etshi kaakuenzeka muvua malu a mu tshikondu tshia kumpala nansha." 
Daniel11:30 Bantu ba ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela nebafike ne majuwa a mayi. Nebamuluishe mvita. Neatekete mu maboku. Neapingane tshianyima. Nealuishe tshiakabidi tshisamba tshidi tshitue ndondu wa tshijila, bualu neumvuangane ne bantu badi babenga ndondu awu." 
Daniel11:31 Bena mvita bavuaye mutume nebanyange muaba wa tshijila. Nebakandike bantu, bua kabalambudi Mvidi Mukulu mulambu wa ku dituku ne ku dituku. Nebateke ‘Bualu bubi butambe’ ” pa tshilambuilu." 
Daniel11:32 Mukalenga ewu nkayende, ne miaku yende ya lubombu, neafikishe bantu ku dishipa dia ndondu. Kadi bantu bonsu badi bitaba Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, nebashindame mu malu adibu benza." 
Daniel11:33 Munkatshi mua bantu aba badi ne meji mapite, nebalongeshe bantu bakuabu ba bungi. Kadi matuku makese nebashipe bamue ba munkatshi muabu, neboshe bakuabu, nebeele bakuabu mu lukanu, bamane kubanyenga bintu biabu." 
Daniel11:34 Matuku a tshinyangu aa, bantu bakese nebabambuluishe, bualu bantu ba bungi nebabalamate, bikale ne mpala ibidi." 
Daniel11:35 Bantu ba bungi nebafue munkatshi mua bantu ba meji. Lufu luabu nelumbushe mikiya ya bantu. Nelubalengeje, lubatokeshe too ne pafika tshikondu tshia ku nshikidilu wa malu. (Bualu tshikondu tshia ku nshikidilu ki ntshianji kufika.)" 
Daniel11:36 “Mukalenga neenze mudiye musue. Neaditambishe. Neadimone bu udi ku mutu kua mvidie. Neadiwule Mvidi Mukulu wa mvidie yonsu ne meji mapite bubi. Neakume dikasa dimpe, too ne pamueneka tshiji tshia Mvidi Mukulu. Diba adi, Mvidi Mukulu neakumbaje tshivuaye mupangidi ke." 
Daniel11:37 Mukalenga kakunemeka mvidie ivua bankambua bende batendelela, nansha mvidie udi bakaji banange bikole. Nanku nuditangile bu udi ku mutu kua mvidie yonsu. Kukunemeka mvidie nansha umue." 
Daniel11:38 Pa muaba wayi neatendelele mvidie wa bimenga bikolesha, mvidie udi bankambua bende kabayi bamanye. Nealambule mvidie ewu tshiamu tshia mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mabue a mushinga mukole, ne bintu bikuabu bia mushinga." 
Daniel11:39 Nealuangane ne bimenga bionsu ne diambuluisha dia mvidie muenyi awu. Neatumbishe bantu bonsu badi bitaba mvidie ewu. Neabapeshe bumfumu ku mutu kua bantu ba bungi. Neabapeshe kabidi maloba bu kalumbandi. 
Daniel11:40 “Mu tshikondu tshia ku nshikidilu, mukalenga wa ditunga dia kuinshi neabangulule mvita. Kadi mukalenga wa ditunga dia ku mutu neamupishe ne matempu a mvita, ne badi babanda pa nyama ya tubalu, kabidi ne matu mavule a mvita. Neabuele mu matunga mashilangane ne bena mvita bende. Neasambuke mikalu, bu mudi mayi a musulu apasalala." 
Daniel11:41 Neakuate ditunga didi dipite buimpe. Neashipemu bantu ba bungi. Kadi bena Edome, bena Mowabe, ne bantu basungula ba bena Amone nebapanduke mu bianza biende." 
Daniel11:42 Neakokeshe matunga makuabu. Nansha ditunga dia Ejipitu kadiena diumuka ku bumfumu buende nansha. 
Daniel11:43 Neanyenge bintu bia mushinga mukole bia mu Ejipitu: mpawungi, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne bintu bia mushinga mukole. Bena Libiya ne bena Etiyopiya nebamuitabe." 
Daniel11:44 Kadi ngumu ya ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila, ne ya ku mutu kua ditunga neyimukuatshishe bowa. Neapete tshiji tshikole bua kubutula tshisumbu tshinene tshia bantu." 
Daniel11:45 Nease mitanda yende ya bukalenga pankatshi pa mayi manene ne mukuna wa tshijila wa mu ditunga dipite buimpe. Koku aku nkuafuilaye, kakuyi muntu udi mua kumuambuluisha.”" 
Daniel12:1 “Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambila kabidi ne: ‘Tshikondu atshi nebafike kudi Mikayele, mfumu wa batumibue ba Mvidi Mukulu, mulami wa bantu bebe. Dituku adi nedikale dia dikenga, didi kadiyi dianji kumueka katshia bafuka bantu, too ne ku diba adi. Pashishe bana benu badi ne mena abu mafunda mu mukanda wa muoyi nebapande." 
Daniel12:2 Bantu ba bungi badi mu kandondu nebabike ku lufu, bamue bua kuikalabu ne muoyi wa tshiendelele, bakuabu bua kuikala ne bundu, bashala ne bowa tshiendelele." 
Daniel12:3 Bantu ba lungenyi nebakenke bu bintu bia mu diulu. Bantu bavua bambuluisha bakuabu bua batendelele Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi umue, nebakenke bu mitotu tshiendelele." 
Daniel12:4 “ ‘Wewe Daniyele, ulame malu aa munda. Kuambidi muntu malu a mu mukanda ewu padi diba dia ku nshikidilu kadiyi dianji kufika. Pashishe bantu ba bungi nebaubale. Lungenyi luabu ne luvulangane. ’" 
Daniel12:5 “Diba dimvua meme Daniyele ntangila bualu buvua Mvidi Mukulu undeja, bantu bakuabu babidi kumueneka bimane ku musulu, ewu dia muamua, mukuabu dia munemu." 
Daniel12:6 Umue wabu kukonka muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda, muimane pa mutu pa mayi a musulu ne: ‘Malu aa a kukema neajike diba kaayi?’" 
Daniel12:7 Muntu uvua muvuale bilamba bia buanda bua ndanda kuela bianza bibidi mulu. Meme kumvua wamba ne: ‘Ndi nditshipa mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu udi ne muoyi wa tshiendelele ne: malu aa neajike papita bidimu bisatu ne tshitupa. Neajike patekeshabu bukole buonsu bua tshisamba tshia Mvidi Mukulu.’ 
Daniel12:8 “Meme Daniyele, kumvua miaku ayi, kadi tshiyi nyijingulula. Ke pamvua nkonka ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila wanyi, malu aa neajike munyi?’" 
Daniel12:9 Kungandamunaye ne: ‘Daniyele, kupampakanyi nansha. Ulame miaku eyi bimpe too ne diba dia nshikidilu." 
Daniel12:10 Nebumbushe bantu ba bungi mikiya. Nebabatokeshe. Makenga neabalengeje. Bantu babi, badi kabayi mua kujingulula malu, nebatungunuke ne dienza dia malu abu mabi. Kadi bantu ba lungenyi nebajingulule malu adi enzeka." 
Daniel12:11 Kubangila ku diba didibu bumbusha mulambu wa buatshia buatshia wa kuoshela Mvidi Mukulu, ne ku diba didibu bateka “Bualu bubi butambe” pa tshioshelu, matuku neapite tshinunu ne nkama ibidi ne makumi tshitema." 
Daniel12:12 Bantu badi bindila, bashindame mu ditaba, matuku tshinunu nkama isatu ne makumi atanu, badi bena diakalenga." 
Daniel12:13 Kadi wewe Daniyele, unanukile too ne ku nshikidilu. Nenku newikishe pashishe. Neujuke bua kuangata difutu diebe ku nshikidilu kua bidimu.’ ”" 
Hosea1:1 Mu mukanda ewu, mudi malu avua Maweja-Nangila muambile Osheya, muana wa Beyeri. Tshikondu atshi, Yerobowame, muana wa Yowashe, ke uvua mukalenga mu buloba bua Izrayele. Uziya, Yotame, Akaze ne Izkiya, ke bawa bakalenga mu buloba bua Yuda." 
Hosea1:2 Teleja malu avua Maweja-Nangila mutuadije kumanyisha Osheya, bua ambile bena Izrayele. Uvua mumuambile ne: “Uye kusela mukaji muena tshiendenda. Bana bawalela ne mukaji awu, nebalonde bibidilu bibi bia mamuabu. Bualu bena Izrayele bonsu mbambenge meme Maweja-Nangila, basue kuikala bena tshiendenda.”" 
Hosea1:3 Osheya kusela Ngomere, muana wa Diblayime. Kulelaye nende muana wa balume." 
Hosea1:4 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Osheya ne: “Muana awu, umuinyike ne: Yizreyele. Matuku makese aa, nennyoke ndelanganyi ya Yeku, bualu nkambua wabu Yeku, uvua mushipe bantu mu tshimenga tshia Yizreyele. Nenshipe bukalenga bua Izrayele." 
Hosea1:5 Dituku adi, meme Maweja-Nangila, nembutule tshiluilu tshia bena Izrayele, mu tshibandabanda tshia Yizreyele.”" 
Hosea1:6 Ngomere kuimita kabidi difu, kulela muana wa bakaji. Maweja-Nangila kuambila Osheya ne: “Muana awu, umuinyike ne: Lorushama, mmumue ne: Tshibengabu. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena munange kabidi bena Izrayele to. Tshiena musue kubafuila kabidi luse to." 
Hosea1:7 Kadi, ntshidi amu munange bena Yuda. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu nembasungidile: tshiyi ne buta bua mbale, tshiyi ne muele, tshiyi nduangana myita, tshiyi ne nyama ya tubalu, tshiyi ne bantu badi babanda pa nyama ya tubalu.”" 
Hosea1:8 Tshibengabu mumane kulekela dibele, Ngomere kuimita difu dikuabu, kulela muana wa balume." 
Hosea1:9 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Osheya ne: “Muana awu, umuinyike ne: Lowami, mmumue ne: Muenyi. Bualu nuenu bena Izrayele, kanuena kabidi bantu banyi. Meme tshiena kabidi wenu to.”" 
Hosea2:1 Dituku dikuabu bena Izrayele nebavulangane bipite, bu lusenga ludi ku muelelu wa mayi manene, ludi muntu kayi mua kubala nansha kupima. Mvidi Mukulu kena ubinyika kabidi ne: “Biabende.” Neabinyike ne: “Bana ba Mvidi Mukulu wa muoyi. ”" 
Hosea2:2 Diba adi, bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele nebumvuangane. Nebasungule mukalenga wabu umuepele. Nebavulangane, basombe mu ditunga dijima. Eyowa, dituku adi nedikale dituku dinene dia Yizreyele" 
Hosea2:3 Ambilayi bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji ne: Maweja-Nangila udi unuinyika ne: “Bantu banyi,” kabidi ne: “Bananga banyi,”" 
Hosea2:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bana banyi, fundayi mamuenu Izrayele ku tshilumbu. Numudiwule! Kanutshinyi to! Bualu katshiena kabidi muena kuanyi, meme tshiena kabidi bayende. Umushe bimanyinu bia buendenda, bidi bimueneka mu mpala muende. Umushe bimanyinu bia kutombokela bayende, bidi bimueneka pa tshiadi tshiende." 
Hosea2:5 Yeye kayi muenze nanku, nemmuvule bilamba, mmushiye butaka, muvuaye dituku divuabu bamulele! Ditunga diende, nediandamuke tshipela, nendienze buloba buume. Nemmufuishe ne nyota." 
Hosea2:6 Tshiena nnanga bana bende to, bualu mbana ba muena tshiendenda, bafuane mamuabu." 
Hosea2:7 Mamuabu udi mubalele, mmuena tshiendenda, kena udinemeka to. Udi wamba ne: “Meme ndi musue kukeba, balume ba mu tshiendenda, badi bangonda biakudia, mampa, mayi a kunua, bilamba bienza ne ndanda, nansha ne boya bua nyama, mafuta ne maluvu a nwinyo.”" 
Hosea2:8 Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila nenjikile mukaji awu njila ne lupangu lua meba. Nemmuele mu tshimana bua kamonyi njila wa kupitshila. 
Hosea2:9 Neenze muende muonsu bua kupeta babayende abu, kadi kakubasangana kabidi to. Pashishe neambe ne: “Mbimpe mpingane kudi bayanyi wa kumpala, bualu kudiye mvua ne disanka, dipite dindi nadi mpindiewu!”" 
Hosea2:10 Mukaji awu kavua muitabe ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ke uvua umupesha ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu a mvinyo, ne mafuta mapiamapia. Meme ke uvua mumunemeshe ne nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne ya mpawungi, bivuaye utendelela nabi mvidie Baale." 
Hosea2:11 Nanku, tshikondu tshia dinowa, nemmunyenge ntete yanyi ya kuenza bukula imvua mumupeshe. Tshikondu tshia kupola tumuma tua mvinyo, nemmunyenge maluvu anyi a mvinyo, amvua mumupeshe. Nemmunyenge kabidi bilamba bia ndanda, ne bia boya bua nyama, bimvua meme mumupeshe bua kuvualaye." 
Hosea2:12 Eyowa, neuwule mukaji awu bilamba, babayende batangile. Muntu kena mua kunkandika to." 
Hosea2:13 Nemmukandike masanka ende onsu: a ngendu ya kuya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu ku tshidimu tshionsu, a bibilu bia ngondu mupiamupia, a matuku ende a Dikisha, ne a matuku a bibilu bikuabu bia kutendelela." 
Hosea2:14 Nengupule mionji yende ya mvinyo, ne mitshi yende ya mfiku, ivuaye wamba ne: “Ke difutu didibu bangonda kudi babayanyi.” Nenshiye miaba yonsu ayi anu tshisuku. Nyama ya mu tshisuku neyipetele biakudia muaba awu." 
Hosea2:15 Nemmunyoke nanku, bua matuku avuaye ulambula mvidie Baale ne mvidie mikuabu. Uvua udilengeja ne tukanu, kabidi ne mabue a mu nshingu, ukeba balume ba kuenda nabu tshiendenda. Kadi uvua umpua muoyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Hosea2:16 Nanku nentekeshe mukaji awu, nemmupingaje kabidi mu tshipela, nemmuambile mundi mumunange bikole be." 
Hosea2:17 Neandonde mu tshipela ne disanka, bu tshikondu tshivuaye nsongakaji, tshivuaye mupatuke mu Ejipitu. Netupingane nende mu Izrayele. Nemmupingajile mionji yende ya mvinyo. Tshibandabanda tshibi tshia Akore, netshiandamuke tshiibi tshidi tshimuleja ditekemena." 
Hosea2:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Dituku adi neambikile ne: “Bayanyi.” Kakumbikila kabidi ne: “Baale wanyi”, mmumue ne: “Mfumuanyi”." 
Hosea2:19 Nemmukandike bua katedi nansha dina mene dia Baale. 
Hosea2:20 Dituku adi mu dina dia bena Izrayele, nentue ndondu ne nyama, nyunyi ne bilandadi. Mu ditunga adi, nengumushe bia mvita bionsu: buta bua mbale, miele, ne bia mvita bikuabu. Nengambuluishe bantu banyi, bua bapete dikisha, balale tulu bimpe mu nzubu." 
Hosea2:21 Izrayele, nenkusele, ushale muena kuanyi kashidi. Biuma bindi nkusela nabi, ke dikulamata dianyi, ke bilenga bindi nkuenzela, ke dinanga dindi nkunanga nadi, ke luse lundi nkufuila." 
Hosea2:22 Eyowa, nenkumbaje bionsu bindi mukulaye. Nanku neundamate, neujadike ne: meme ndi Maweja-Nangila." 
Hosea2:23 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: dituku adi nenkumbaje bionsu bidi bantu banyi balomba. Nenkumbaje tshidi diulu dikengela: mvula nealoke pa buloba. 
Hosea2:24 Pa buloba nepatoloke ntete, mitshi ya kuenza maluvu, ne mafuta mapiamapia. Bionsu ebi, nebikumbaje tshidi Yizreyele ukengela." 
Hosea2:25 Nanku, nenjadike Yizreyele mu ditunga adi. Nennange Tshibengabu. Nengambile “Biabende ” ne: “Nuenu ke Bantu banyi”. Bobu nebitabe ne: “Wewe ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu”." 
Hosea3:1 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: “Mpindiewu, uye kunanga kabidi mukaji awu muena tshiendenda, udi mukutombokele, wenda ne balume bakuabu. Unange mukaji awu, anu bu mundi meme Maweja-Nangila munange bena Izrayele, nansha bobu batendelela mvidie mikuabu, bananga mikata mienza ne tumuma tua mvinyo. ”" 
Hosea3:2 Nanku, meme kuangata mukajanyi tshiakabidi, ku nkanu dikumi ne itanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne ku litre 600 ya ntete ya orje." 
Hosea3:3 Meme kuambila mukajanyi ne: “Ushale nanyi muaba ewu, kuyi wenda tshiendenda, kuyi unanga mulume mukuabu. Meme kabidi tshiakukubuelela mu nzubu to.”" 
Hosea3:4 Nanku, bena Izrayele nebashale matuku a bungi kabayi ne mukalenga, kabayi ne bamfumu, kabayi ne milambu, nansha makunji a tshijila, kabayi kabidi ne binta bionsu bidi biambuluisha bua kumanya disua dia Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hosea3:5 Pashishe, bena Izrayele nebapingane kudi Maweja-Nangila. Nebapingane kudi Mvidi Mukulu wabu, ne kudi mukalenga wabu wa ku ndelanganyi ya Davide. Matuku atshidi kumpala, bena Izrayele nebakebe Maweja-Nangila, nebamunemeke, nebatekemene bintu amu kudiye." 
Hosea4:1 Maweja-Nangila udi umanyisha bena ditunga tshilumbu tshidibu natshi kudiye. Nuenu bena Izrayele, telejayi: Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Nuenu bena ditunga edi, kanuena nulamatangana kabidi ne muoyi umue, kanuena nuenzelangana kabidi bimpe to. Kanuena bamanye Mvidi Mukulu. Kanuena nuenza tshidiye musue." 
Hosea4:2 Kadi, nudi nutshipa mukuenu, numudinga, numushipa, numuiba, nuenda tshiendenda. Ditunga dionsu ndinyanguke ne dishipangana." 
Hosea4:3 Nanku, mu ditunga nemuikale munanga mukole, udi ubutula bantu bonsu, too ne nyama ne nyunyi. Nansha minyinyi ya mu mayi manene neijimine.”" 
Hosea4:4 Dimukayi! Kabena ne bua kufunda amu bantu bakuabu ku tshilumbu, nansha kubatandisha. Kadi, nangananga wewe mutuangaji munene, ndi nebe tshilumbu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Hosea4:5 Udi ulenduka mu munya. Nansha muambi udi utetuka nebe butuku. Nembutule ne mamuebe Izrayele mene. 
Hosea4:6 Bantu banyi nebafue, bualu kabena bammanye meme to. Wewe kabidi uvua mundengulule. Nanku, nenkubenge, nkumushe ku mudimu wanyi wa butuangaji! Bualu mikenji yanyi meme Mvidi Mukulu webe, udi muyipue muoyi. Nanku meme tshiakuvuluka kabidi bana bebe to." 
Hosea4:7 Batuangaji bonsu mbangenzele bibi, kabena batumikila mikenji imvua mubambile. Mbambenge meme Maweja-Nangila, uvua butumbi buabu, bua kutendelela mvidie ya patupu." 
Hosea4:8 Badi bapeta bubanji ku milambu idi bantu banyi bena buenzayi bandambula. Ke mudibu basue bua bena Izrayele benze buenzayi. 
Hosea4:9 Batuangaji ne bena Izrayele, nembanyoke mushindu umue. Nembanyoke bua buenzayi buabu, nembakengeshe bua bubi buabu." 
Hosea4:10 Nansha bobu badia, kadi kabakuukuta to. Nansha benda tshiendenda, kadi kabakulela to. Bualu mbambenge meme Maweja-Nangila, bua kutendelela mvidie mikuabu." 
Hosea4:11 Bundumba ne dikuatshika dia maluvu bidi binyanga lungenyi lua muntu. 
Hosea4:12 Bena Izrayele badi bakonka mpingu ya mitshi malu. Katupa ka mutshi ke kadi kabambila malu. Bena Izrayele mbapambuke mu njila, mbambenge, anu bu mudi mukaji wenda tshiendenda. mBatendelele mvidie mikuabu, bashiye Mvidi Mukulu wabu." 
Hosea4:13 Badi balambula milambu ku nsongu ya mikuna. Badi bosha musenga wa manananshi pa mikuna, bua muinshi ubande mulu. Badi bimane muinshi mua mitshi: ya nsanga, ne mikuabu. Bualu dileji dia mitshi ayi, didi dibalengelela. Ke padi bana benu ba bakaji benda tshiendenda, bakaji ba bana benu ba balume, batomboka ku mabaka." 
Hosea4:14 Kadi, tshiena nnyoka bana benu ba bakaji, badi benda tshiendenda, nansha bakaji ba bana benu ba balume, badi batomboka ku mabaka. Nennunyoke anu nuenu batuangaji, bualu nuenu mene nudi nuenda tshiendenda ne bana ba bakaji ku luseke. Nudi nuabanyangana bintu bia milambu, ne bakaji bena tshiendenda mu nzubu ya mvidie. Bu mudibu bela lusumuinu ne: “Bantu badi kabayi ne lungenyi, nebabutuke.”" 
Hosea4:15 Nansha bena Izrayele bena tshiendenda, kadi nuenu bena Yuda, kanuikadi bena tshiendenda to! Kanuyi muaba wa tshijila udi mu Ngilgale. Kanuyi ku Betele-Awene, bua kuditshipa ne: “Bu mudi Maweja-Nangila ne muoyi. ”" 
Hosea4:16 Bena Izrayele mbatomboke bu ngombe ubenga kukoka ditempu. Nanku Maweja-Nangila udi mua kunudisha mu mpata munene, bu mudiye udisha bana ba mikoku anyi?" 
Hosea4:17 Bena Efrayime mbanange mvidie. Nubalekele, mbapambuke kashidi." 
Hosea4:18 Padibu bajikija kunua kua maluvu, badi batuadija kuenda tshiendenda. Bamfumu babu badi babafikisha ku malu mabi mapite." 
Hosea4:19 Lupepele lua mvunde nelubambule. Nebikale ne bundu bua milambu yabu mibi. 
Hosea5:1 Telejayi bimpe, nuenu batuangaji, nuenu kabidi bamfumu ba bena Izrayele, ne nuenu bonsu badi basombe mu lubanza lua mukalenga, nuenu ke bavua mua kulumbuluisha bantu bimpe. Kadi, ku Mispa nuvua bateye bantu banyi. Ku mukuna wa Tabore, nuvua nubamuenekela bu bukondu bumana kuela." 
Hosea5:2 Kadi ku Shitime, nuvua nubamuenekela bu dijimba dile. Nanku, Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Nennunyoke bonsu." 
Hosea5:3 Ndi mumanye bena Efrayime. Ndi mumanye bionsu bidi bena Izrayele benza. Nuenu bena Izrayele ke badi baleja bena Efrayime mua kuenda tshiendenda. Mpindiewu, bena Izrayele bonsu badi anu bena tshiendenda.”" 
Hosea5:4 Buenzayi bua bena Izrayele mbupite. Nanku kabena mua kupingana kabidi kudi Mvidi Mukulu wabu to. Meji a bena Izrayele, adi anu ku tshiendenda. Kabena bamanye Maweja-Nangila." 
Hosea5:5 Ditambisha dia bena Izrayele ke didi dibapisha. Bubi bua bena Efrayime ne bena Izrayele budi bubabutula. Bena Yuda badi balonda bibidilu biabu bibi. 
Hosea5:6 Badi baya ne ngombe ne mikoku, bua kuyilambula Maweja-Nangila. Badi bakeba Maweja-Nangila, kadi kabakumusangana to. Bualu mmumane kubabenga." 
Hosea5:7 mBabenge Maweja-Nangila, mbalele bana ba mu tshiendenda. Mpindiewu, kakuakukumbana nansha ngondu umue to: nembabutule, ne bionsu bidibu nabi." 
Hosea5:8 Mu Ngibeya, elayi mpungi ya mvita. Mu Rama, elayi mpungi kabidi. Mu Betele-Awene, elayi lubila: bantu bambule bia mvita. Nuenu bena tshisamba tshia Binyamine, dimukayi, nudi mu njiwu!" 
Hosea5:9 Dituku dia kunyoka bantu, bena Efrayime nebabutuke bonsu, ditunga diabu nedishale anu tshipela. Bionsu bindi mmanyisha bena Izrayele, nebienzeke, kamuyi mpata." 
Hosea5:10 Bamfumu ba bena Yuda, mbafuanangane ne bantu badi bashintulula mikalu ya madimi abu. Nanku tshiji tshianyi netshibapuekele bu mvula wa tshipupu." 
Hosea5:11 Nebakengeshe bena Efrayime bikole, nebajimije ne buloba buvua buabu, bualu mbaye kukeba diambuluisha, kudi bantu badi kabayi ne tshia kuenza." 
Hosea5:12 Mpindiewu, meme Maweja-Nangila ndi bu tshiuja ne tufina kudi bena Efrayime. Ndi bu mputa mubole wa lubangu kudi bena Yuda." 
Hosea5:13 Bena Efrayime mbamane kumanya disama divuabu nadi. Bena Yuda mbamane kumanya dikenga diabu dipite bunene. Ke bena Efrayime kuya ku Ashure. Kutuminabu mukalenga munene mikenji. Kadi mukalenga ewu kena ne mushindu wa kujikija dikenga diabu, kena mua kuondapa mputa yabu." 
Hosea5:14 Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nduisha bena Efrayime, bu mudi nyama wa ntambue. Ndi nduisha bena Yuda, bu mudi nyama wa tshikisu. Anu meme, meme nkayanyi, ke udi ubasunsula. Ndi ngambula minyinyi yabu. Kakuena udi mua kunnyenga minyinyi ayi to." 
Hosea5:15 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Eyowa, nempingane kuanyi, too ne ku diba didi bena Efrayime ne bena Yuda, batonda bubi buabu, bapingana kundi. Amu dikenga nedibalongeshe mua kunkeba, kupingana kundi." 
Hosea6:1 Nudi nuamba ne: “Tuyayi, tupinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila. Yeye udi mututape mputa, neatuondape kabidi. Yeye udi mutukume, neatusuike tshilamba pa mputa." 
Hosea6:2 Papita matuku abidi nansha asatu, neatufululule. Netuende ne muoyi kumpala kuende." 
Hosea6:3 Tuenzayi muetu muonsu bua kumanya Maweja-Nangila, tukumbaje bidiye musue. Difika diende ndimane kujadika, anu bu mudi butuku butshia misangu yonsu. Neafike bua kutuambuluisha, bu mudi mvula mbedi uloka, bua kutalaja buloba.”" 
Hosea6:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi unukonka ne: “Bena Efrayime, nennuenzele tshinyi? Bena Yuda, nennuenzele tshinyi? Dinnanga dienu didi dijika lukasa, bu mudi dibungi dia mu dinda, nansha bu mudi lumuma, ludi luuma amu mpindiewu." 
Hosea6:5 Ke pandi nnuluisha, nnutumina bambi bua banubele. Ndi nnumanyisha ne: nenubutuke. Tshindi njinga bualu buenu, tshidi patoke too bu munya." 
Hosea6:6 Tshindi nkeba ndinanga, ki mmilambu to. Ndi musue bua bantu benze tshindi njinga. Kadi, tshiena musue bua bandambule anu milambu ya nyama nansha.”" 
Hosea6:7 Kadi, nuenu bena Izrayele, panuvua mu tshimenga tshia Adame, nuvua bambenge, banyangakaje ndondu utuvua batue nenu." 
Hosea6:8 Ngilaade ntshimenga tshia benzedianganyi ba bibi, badi bela mashi a bantu panshi." 
Hosea6:9 Bu mudi benzedianganyi ba bibi balamina bantu mu njila, batuangaji mbashipe bantu mu njila wa ku Shekeme. Ebu bualu mbubi butambe!" 
Hosea6:10 Ndi mumone malu mabi matambe mu tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Ditendelela dia mvidie dia bena Efrayime, ndinyange bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Hosea6:11 Nuenu kabidi bena Yuda, ndi nnulongoluela tshikondu tshia kunowa." 
Hosea7:1 dituku dindi nkeba kuondapa bena Izrayele, bubi bua bena Efrayime ne tshikisu tshia bena Samariya, bidi bimueneka tshiakabidi. Bualu badi badinga bantu, biba bintu biabu mu nzubu. Badi bakengeshangana mu njila." 
Hosea7:2 Kabena bela meji ne: meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mumanye bionsu bidibu benza. Mpindiewu, bubi buabu mbubajingile bu mionji. Ndi mmona bionsu abi." 
Hosea7:3 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Badi basankisha mukalenga wabu, eku bamusokoka meji mabi adibu nawu. Badi baseka ne balombodi ba mu bukalenga, eku babasokoka bidibu basue kuenza." 
Hosea7:4 Bonsu badi bena tshiendenda. mBafuanangane ne tshioshilu tshia mampa, tshidi tshitema kapia kakole. Muoshi wa mampa kena mua kukasonsola, katshia usopa mampa too ne muabandawu." 
Hosea7:5 Dituku dia tshibilu tshia mukalenga wabu, balombodi badi banua maluvu. Padi maluvu abakuata, badi bakula tshiakulakula." 
Hosea7:6 Bantu badi bela tshifufu, mioyi yabu idi bu kapia ka mu tshioshilu. Butuku bujima tshiji tshiabu tshidi tshituya. Kadi, dinda tshidi tshijuka bu ndimi ya kapia kakole." 
Hosea7:7 Bonsu ne tshiji tshikole, bu kapia ka mu tshioshilu, badi bashipa balombodi babu. Bakalenga babu badi babutuka ku umue ku umue. Kadi muntu nansha umue kena mumbikile to." 
Hosea7:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena Efrayime badi babuelakana mu malu a bisamba bikuabu. mBafuanangane ne tukata tukese mpepele, tudibu boshila anu luseke lumue." 
Hosea7:9 Bantu benyi mbamane kubanyenga bukole. Kadi bena Efrayime kabena bamanya nanku to. Bena Efrayime bakadi ne nsuki mitoke, kabayi bamona bu bualu." 
Hosea7:10 Ditambisha dia bena Izrayele, ke didi dibasonguela. Kadi, nansha bobu bamona makenga onsu aa, kabena bapingana kundi meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu to." 
Hosea7:11 Bena Efrayime mbafuanangane ne nyunyi wa nkudimba mupale udi kayi ne lungenyi. Badi babikila bena Ejipitu bua babambuluishe. Pashishe badi banyema baye ku bena Ashure. 
Hosea7:12 Kadi, patshidibu baya ku bena Ashure, ndi mbateya mu bukondu buanyi. Ndi mbamatshisha panshi bu nyunyi. Ndi mbanyoka bilondeshile bubi buabu, budi bantu bambilangana." 
Hosea7:13 Bena Efrayime mbena diakabi, bualu badi bannyema. mBena dikenga dipite, bualu badi bantombokela. Meme mvua musue kubasungidila, kadi padibu bayukila nanyi, badi bangambila malu a dishima." 
Hosea7:14 Bena Efrayime kabena bankeba ne muoyi mujima to. Padibu balala, badi badila muadi. Badi baditapa mputa pambidi bua kupeta ntete ya kuenza bukula mu madimi abu, nansha bua kupola tumuma tuvule tua mvinyo. Kadi badi amu bantombokela." 
Hosea7:15 Meme Maweja-Nangila mvua mubafikishe ku bantu, mubape bukole. Kadi bobu badi bangelela anu meji mabi." 
Hosea7:16 Pikala bena Efrayime bapingana kudi muntu, kabena bapingana kundi meme Maweja-Nangila to. mBafuanangane ne buta bua mbale, budi kabuyi bukumbane bua kuela nabu mikete. Bamfumu babu nebafue mu myita, bualu bavua bampende! Nebabaseke kudi bena Ejipitu!" 
Hosea8:1 Maweja-Nangila udi ungambila ne: Ela mpungi ya myita! Ela bibingu! Baluishi badi babuela mu ditunga dia Maweja-Nangila, bu nyunyi ya tshiminyi. Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena Izrayele mbanyange ndondu umvua mutue nabu. Kabena balonda mikenji yanyi." 
Hosea8:2 Nansha bobu balengelela, bangela mbila ne: ‘Mvidi Mukulu wetu, tuetu bena Izrayele tudi bakumanye!’" 
Hosea8:3 Kadi kabena benza malu mimpe. Ke padi baluishi babipata. 
Hosea8:4 Bena Izrayele badi badilekela bamfumu, meme tshiyi muanyishe. Badi badisunguila babalombodi, meme tshiyi mumanye. Badi bangata tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ne tshia mpawungi, bua kudienzela mpingu. Badi benza nanku, badi bajimija bintu biabu." 
Hosea8:5 Nuenu bena Samariya, mbimpe numushe mvidie wenu wa kana ka ngombe ka tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Nuenu nudi banjule tshiji. nTshikondu kaayi tshinualekela buenzayi?" 
Hosea8:6 Mvidie ewu mmukebe tshinyi mu bena Izrayele. Nsenda wenu ke udi mumufule. Eyowa, mvidie wa kana ka ngombe wa bena Samariya neatayike, bualu kena Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hosea8:7 Nanku, tshiudi ukuna, ke tshiudi upola. Udi ubuelakana ne mvidie ya patupu, udi udienza kabidi wa patupu. Tshikolakola katshiyi ne miepu, katshiena mua kupetesha ntete ya kuenza bukula to. Nansha yoyi mitupeshe bukula, nebabudie anu kudi bantu benyi." 
Hosea8:8 Bena Izrayele mbafuanangane anu ne bena bisamba bikuabu bia patupu. Munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu badi bu luesu lubi ludi bonsu babenga. 
Hosea8:9 Bakuya ku bena Ashure. Nyama wa mpunde wa mu tshisuku, udi udienzela malu nkayende. Kadi bena Efrayime badi badikebela balunda, badi mua kubafikisha ku buenzayi." 
Hosea8:10 Nansha bena Efrayime bapeshe bisamba bikuabu mabuejila a bungi, tshikondu tshiakumbanyi, tshia meme kubakunguja muaba umue. Nanku, matuku makese aa, nebapete dinyoka kudi mukalenga wa bena Ashure." 
Hosea8:11 Bena Efrayime bavua bavudije bilambuilu, kadi biobi abi bidi bibafikisha ku buenzayi bupite bungi. — Kia! Bilambuilu bidi bifikisha ku bubi! Ke bualu budi muntu mua kumvua anyi? —" 
Hosea8:12 Nansha meme mubafundile mikenji binunu ne binunu, kabena bayangata ne mushinga to." 
Hosea8:13 mBasue kundambula milambu, kadi anu bua kudia minyinyi. Kadi milambu ya mushindu ewu, kayena insankisha meme Maweja-Nangila to. Tshiena mpua buenzayi buabu muoyi. Nembalulule bilema biabu, nembanyoke, mbapingaje mu Ejipitu." 
Hosea8:14 Bena Efrayime mbase nzubu minene, bapue Mufuki wabu muoyi. Bena Yuda mbase bimenga bia bungi babikolesha ne bimana. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila nengoshe bimenga abi. Kapia nekabutule nzubu yonsu mimpe ya mu bimenga abi.”" 
Hosea9:1 Nuenu bena Izrayele, kanuena mua kuenza tshibilu, nansha kusanka, mudi bisamba bikuabu bienza. Bualu nudi balekela Mvidi Mukulu wenu, nutendelela mvidie ya patupu. Miaba yonsu idibu bashipule ntete ya bukula, nudi nukeba difutu dia ku buenzavi buenu." 
Hosea9:2 Kadi ntete ya bukula idibu bashipula, ne mafuta adibu bakama, kanuakubiangata to. Maluvu a mvinyo mapiamapia anudi batekemene, nenumvue anu mupuya wawu." 
Hosea9:3 Bena Efrayime kabena mua kushala mu ditunga dia Maweja-Nangila. Nebapingane mu Ejipitu, nansha mu bena Ashure, bua kudia biakudia bidi ne mikiya." 
Hosea9:4 Bena Efrayime kabena mua kulambula kabidi mulambu wa maluvu, mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Kabena mua kumulambula milambu bua kumusankisha. Biakudia bia bena Efrayime, nebikale anu bu mampa adibu badia mu madilu. Muntu yonsu udi ubidia udi upia mikiya. Mampa a bena Efrayime, neajikije anu nzala yabu. Kadi, kabena mua kubuela nawu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila to." 
Hosea9:5 Nenuenze tshinyi bua kulongolola tshibilu tshia dituku dia Maweja-Nangila? 
Hosea9:6 Panuanyema mu ditunga dienu, didibu bamane kunyangakaja, bena Ejipitu nebanuakidile. Kadi, amu bua kunuteka mu nkita ya mu tshimenga tshia Memfise. Mionji ya mpese neibuikile tshiamu tshienu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Meba ne mingonga nebitoloke mu nzubu yenu." 
Hosea9:7 Tshikondu tshiakumbanyi, tshidi Maweja-Nangila ubutula bena Izrayele. Eyowa, tshikondu tshiakumbanyi, tshia kunyoka bena buenzayi. Bena Izrayele bavuluke bualu ebu. Nudi nuamba ne: “Muambi mmupale”, kabidi ne: “Muntu wa tshijila mmupote.” — Bidi nanku, kadi anu bua buenzayi buenu bupite bungi, ne bua lukinu lunudi numutekela." 
Hosea9:8 Muambi, nsentedi wa bena Efrayime, Mvidi Mukulu udi nende. Kadi, badi bamuteya, miaba yonsu idiye upitshila. Mu ditunga dia Mvidi Mukulu wende, muambi udi amu umona bena lukuna." 
Hosea9:9 Nudi benza buenzayi bapitshishe, anu bu munuvua benze ku Ngibeya. Kadi, Maweja-Nangila kena mupue buenzayi buenu muoyi, neanunyoke bua malu mabi anuvua benze." 
Hosea9:10 Maweja-Nangila kuamba ne: Kale pamvua musangane bena Izrayele, bivua bu tumuma tua mvinyo, tudi muntu upeta mu tshipela. Mvua mumone bankambua benu, bu tshimuma tshia tshianyi, tshidibu bapeta ku mutshi wa mfiku. Kadi batshifikilaku ku Bete-Peyore kudifilabu kudi Baale-wa-bundu. Kushalabu bantu babi, bafuanangane ne Baale, munanga wabu mupiamupia." 
Hosea9:11 Lumu lua bena Efrayime nelujimine, bu mudi nyunyi ya mishamisha ibuka, ijimina. Kabena mua kulela bana, kabena mua kuenda ne difu munda, kabena nansha mua kuimita." 
Hosea9:12 Nansha bobu bakolesha bana, nembumushe panu, kabayi banji kufika ku bantu. Pangikala mumane kubenga bena Efrayime, nebashale bena diakabi!" 
Hosea9:13 Bena Efrayime bavua bu mitshi ya mabue, mikuna mu buloba buimpe. Kadi lelu bakadi bafila bana bavuabu balela, kudi bashipianganyi." 
Hosea9:14 — Maweja-Nangila paudi musue kunyoka bena Efrayime, neubanyoke mushindu kaayi? Bakaji babu bikale ba nkumba, kabayi mua kuamusha bana." 
Hosea9:15 — Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: Tshikisu tshia bena Efrayime, tshivua tshimane kumueneka ku Ngilgale. Ke mumvua mutuadijile kubabenga. Nembipate ku nzubu kuanyi, bua buenzayi buabu. Tshiena mbananga kabidi to. Bualu bamfumu babu bonsu badi anu bantombokela." 
Hosea9:16 Bena Efrayime mbamane kupeta dikenga. Badi bu miji idi yuma, bu mutshi udi kauyi ukuama bimuma. Nansha bakaji babu balela bana, nengumushe bana abu, badibu bananga, mu buloba." 
Hosea9:17 — Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, kena munange kabidi bena Efrayime to, bualu kabena bamuteleja. Nebikale balalakanyi munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu." 
Hosea10:1 Bena Izrayele mbafuanangane ne mionji ya mvinyo idi isampila, ikuama tumuma tua bungi. Kadi, pavuabu bavulangana, bavua bavudija kabidi bilambuilu. Pavua ditunga dipeta bubanji, ke pavuabu bavudija mabue a tshijila." 
Hosea10:2 Bena Izrayele mbanyanguke too ne mu muoyi wa munda. Mpindiewu nebakenge bua buenzayi buabu. Maweja-Nangila neanyangakaje bilambuilu biabu, neashimbule mabue a tshijila." 
Hosea10:3 Eyowa, mpindiewu bena Izrayele nebambe ne: “Katutshiena ne mukalenga, bualu katuvua banemeke bumfumu bua Maweja-Nangila. Kadi, mushindu utudi mpindiewu, mukalenga neatuenzele tshinyi?”" 
Hosea10:4 Bena Izrayele badi bakula amu kuakula; badi baditshipa mitshipu ya mashimi, batua ndondu. Kadi dikosa diabu dia nsambu, didi bu bisosa bibi bia lulengu, bitoloka mu budimi budibu bamane kusekuna." 
Hosea10:5 Bena Samariya badi batendelela mvidie wa kana ka ngombe ka mpawungi kadi ku Betele-Awene. Batendeledi ba mvidie awu, ne bantu badi badiamba ne: tudi batuangaji, badi benza madilu manene kumpala kuende. Bantu abu badi batumbisha mvidie awu, kadi butumbi buende bumane kujimina." 
Hosea10:6 Bualu mvidie awu, nebaye nende ku Ashure, bu mulambu wa kulambula mukalenga munene. Bena Efrayime nebikale ne bundu. Bena Izrayele nebanyingalale, bua pavuabu basungule bua kuya mu Ashure." 
Hosea10:7 Malu onsu a bena Samariya neajike. Mukalenga wabu neapueke, bu katupa ka mutshi kalelama pa mayi." 
Hosea10:8 Miaba yonsu ya tshijila, ivua bena Izrayele benza malu mabi, mminyanguke. Tshisuku ne meba a mingonga mbibuikile bilambuilu biabu. Musangu awu, nebambile mikuna minene ne mikese ne: “Nutubuikile! Nutupukile. ”" 
Hosea10:9 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bena Izrayele, bituadije ku Ngibeya, kunuvua benze amu malu mabi, buenzayi buenu kabuena bujika to. Nanku, ki mbimpe kuluisha bantu babi abu, too ne ku Ngibeya anyi?" 
Hosea10:10 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi mufike bua kubanyoka. Bisamba bikuabu nebisangidile bena Izrayele, bua kubaluisha bua malu mabi, adibu benza misangu ne misangu." 
Hosea10:11 Bena Efrayime, mbafuanangane ne kana ka ngombe, kavuabu balongeshe bimpe, kasua kuenza mudimu wa kushipula ntete ya kuenza bukula. Kadi, bu mumvua mumone ne: nshingu ya bena Efrayime idi ne bukole bua bungi, mvua musue bua bikale bakoka ditempu dia kudima nadi, bena Yuda benda basekuna, bena Izrayele benda balandakaja." 
Hosea10:12 Nuenu benza malu mimpe, nebanuenzelewu. Nudime budimi bupiabupia. Tshikondu tshiakumbanyi tshia nuenu kupingana kundi meme Maweja-Nangila, too nepangafika bua kunusungidila." 
Hosea10:13 Kadi, nuenu bena Izrayele, nuvua benze malu mabi. Ke munuvua bapete malu mabi. Nuvua nukinangana, ke munuvua bapete lukinu. Nuenu bena Izrayele, nuvua batekemene matempu enu a mvita, ne bena myita ba bungi banudi nabu." 
Hosea10:14 Nanku, diyoyi dia mvita, nediumvuike munkatshi muenu. Bimenga bienu bionsu, bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, nebabiupule, anu muvua mukalenga Shalmane mupule Bete-Arbele, muzaze bamamu musangu umue ne bana bavuabu balele." 
Hosea10:15 Nuenu bena Izrayele, ke muanukengesha Maweja-Nangila nanku, bua tshikisu tshinuvua natshi. Dinda dionsu, anu myita ituadija, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele neafue." 
Hosea11:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Patshivua bena Izrayele bana batekete, meme mvua mubanange. Mvua mbabikila ne: mbana banyi. Meme kubapatula mu Ejipitu." 
Hosea11:2 Kadi pamvua mbikila bena Izrayele nanku, munanukile, bavua bambenga anu kubenga. Bantu banyi badi balambula mvidie Baale milambu. Mvidie yonsu ya mushindu ewu, badi bayoshila milambu." 
Hosea11:3 Kadi meme ke uvua mulongeshe bena Efrayime mua kuambula dikasa. Meme ke uvua mubambule mu maboku anyi. Kadi, kabena bavuluka ne: meme ke uvua ndeji wabu to." 
Hosea11:4 Mvua mubaludike ne luse ne dinanga. Mvua mubambule, mudi tatu ukongoloja muanende mutekete ku ditama. Mvua muiname bua kudisha bena Izrayele." 
Hosea11:5 Bena Izrayele, kabakupingana kabidi mu Ejipitu to. Kadi, bena Ashure nebikale bamfumu babu. Bualu, bena Izrayele bavua babenga kupingana kundi meme Maweja-Nangila." 
Hosea11:6 Ke mudi bena myita babuela mu bimenga bia bena Izrayele, babinyangakaja, banyangakaja kabidi bintu bionsu. Ke difutu didi bena Izrayele bapete, bua meji abu mabi." 
Hosea11:7 Bantu banyi bena Izrayele mbantombokele. Badi babikila mvidie Baale. Kadi mvidie ewu kena mua kubambuluisha to. 
Hosea11:8 Nuenu bena Efrayime, tshiena mua kunutekela to. Nuenu bena Izrayele, tshiena mua kunuelela meji mabi to. Tshiena mua kunubutula, mumvua mubutule bimenga bia Adma ne Seboyime to. Bualu meme muenze nanku, ndi mua kumvua bibi; nengikale ne kanyinganyinga kakole." 
Hosea11:9 Tshiena nnunyoka, bilondeshile tshiji tshianyi to. Tshiena mbutula bena Efrayime musangu muibidi to, bualu meme tshiena muntu, ndi Mvidi Mukulu. Nuenu bena Efrayime, numanye ne: meme Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila ndi nenu. Tshiena musue kufika kunudi mufike munda.”" 
Hosea11:10 Bena tshimuangi nebalonde Maweja-Nangila. Yeye udi udila bu nyama wa ntambue. Padiye udila, bana bende badi bafika, benda bazakala, batumina dishiya dia mayi manene." 
Hosea11:11 Nebafumine kabidi ku Ejipitu bu mudi nyunyi ya mishamisha, ne ku bena Ashure, bu mudi tshisaku tshia nyunyi ya nkudimba. “Nembapingaje mu ditunga diabu.” Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila wamba nanku." 
Hosea12:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Bena Efrayime badi bandinga, banshima nseke yonsu. Bena Yuda kabidi batshidi amu bantombokela, meme Mvidi Mukulu wabu wa tshijila." 
Hosea12:2 Bena Efrayime badi benza malu a tshianana, bu bantu badi bipata lupepele, bakeba kulukuata. Matuku onsu badi bipata lupepele lua luya, bashimangana, bakengeshangana. Badi batua ndondu ne bena Ashure, bafila mafuta abu mimpe kudi bena Ejipitu." 
Hosea12:3 Maweja-Nangila udi tshilumbu ne bena Yuda. Neanyoke bena Yakobe, bua buenzayi buabu. Neabafute bua malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Hosea12:4 Patshivua Yakobe mu difu dia mamuende, ukavua udinga muanabu. Yakobe mumane kukola, kuluishaye Mvidi Mukulu." 
Hosea12:5 Kuluishaye mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, kumutshimunaye. Yakobe kudila, kumulomba bua amuele lupemba. Ku Betele, Yakobe kusambakena ne Mvidi Mukulu, Mvidi Mukulu kuyukila nende." 
Hosea12:6 Yeye ke Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udibu binyika ne: “Maweja-Nangila”." 
Hosea12:7 Kuambilaye Yakobe ne: “Udi ne bua kupingana kuenu. Meme Mvidi Mukulu webe nenkuambuluishe. Enza malu mimpe, ukumbaje bindi musue. Wikale mutekemene anu kundi meme Mvidi Mukulu webe.”" 
Hosea12:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bena Efrayime, nudi bafuanangane ne bena Kenaane. Bualu nudi ne tshipimu tshia dishima ku bianza. Bua kupeta bintu, nudi nudinga bantu." 
Hosea12:9 Nudi nuamba ne: “Bulelela, tudi babanji. Tudi bamane kupeta biuma bia bungi. Patudi tupeta makasa a ku mushinga, katuena benza bibi!”" 
Hosea12:10 Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi Mvidi Mukulu wenu, biangatshile mu Ejipitu. Ndi musue nusombe tshiakabidi mu ntenta, bu tshikondu tshimvua basambakene nenu mu tshipela." 
Hosea12:11 Tshikondu atshi, mvua mumanyishe bambi meji anyi. Mvua mubaleje malu mishindu mishilangane. Kudi bambi ke kundi nnumanyishila, nansha lelu mene, bindi musue kuenza." 
Hosea12:12 Bena Ngilaade, mbena buenzayi ba kalanda-musenga. Nebabutuke bonsu. Muaba wa tshijila wa ku Ngilgale, bavua balambula ngombe milume. Kadi, bilambuilu biabu, nebishale amu mishiki ya mabue mu madimi." 
Hosea12:13 Yakobe kunyema, kuyaye ku Mezopotamiya. Kutuadijaye kuenzela muntu mukuabu mudimu, anu bua kupeta mukaji. Eyowa, Yakobe kudienza mulami wa bimuna, anu bua kupeta mukaji." 
Hosea12:14 Kadi Maweja-Nangila uvua mupatule bena Izrayele mu Ejipitu, ku mudimu wa muambi. Muambi awu, ke uvuaye mutume, bua ikale mulami wa tshisamba tshiende tshia bena Izrayele." 
Hosea12:15 Bena Efrayime, mbafikishe Maweja-Nangila munda bikole. Kadi neabapingajile malu mabi, avuabu benzele bakuabu. Neabanyoke bikole, bua bundu buvuabu bamufuishe." 
Hosea13:1 Pavua bena Efrayime bakula, bantu bonsu bavua batshina. Bobu ke bavua bamfumu, mu bukalenga bua bena Izrayele. Kadi, bavua benza bibi, batendelela mvidie Baale. Ke tshivua tshibafikisha ku lufu." 
Hosea13:2 Mpindiewu, monayi bena Efrayime abu, batshidi anu batungunuka ne buenzayi. mBadienzele mvidie, ne lupingu lua tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Nansha mudimu ewu muenza kudi basongi ba mpingu, badi anu bamba ne: “Lambulayi mvidie ewu milambu!” Padi bantu bupukilangana ne mpingu ya tuana tua ngombe, nudi mua kumvua bualu ebu anyi?" 
Hosea13:3 Nanku, bena Efrayime nebajimine, bu dibungi dia mu dinda, bu lumuma ludi lujika ku bisosa, bu bisote bipepula kudi mvunda, bibuka muaba udibu bashipuila ntete, nansha bu muinshi, upatukila mu musonga wa nzubu." 
Hosea13:4 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Nuenu bena Izrayele, katshia nupatuka mu Ejipitu, meme ndi anu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Kanuena bamanye Mvidi Mukulu mukuabu, anu meme. Kakuena mupandishi mukuabu, anu meme." 
Hosea13:5 Meme ke uvua munulame, panuvua mu tshipela, mu ditunga divua ne munanga." 
Hosea13:6 Panuvua bafike muaba uvua ne bisosa, nzala yenu kujika diakamue. Kadi bamane kudia buukute, ke nuenu kuditambisha. Ke munuvua bampue muoyi." 
Hosea13:7 Nanku, meme kudienza bu nyama wa ntambue munkatshi muenu, bu nyama wa tshisumpa ntambue, tshialamine ku muelelu wa njila." 
Hosea13:8 Ndi nnubunda, mudi nyama wa nkashama wenza, padibu bamunyenga muana. Nennusunsule tshiadi tshienu. Nebanudie kudi mbua. Nyama ya tshisuku neyisunsule bitalu bienu." 
Hosea13:9 Nuenu bena Izrayele, ndi mumane kunubutula. Kakutshiena udi mua kunuambuluisha." 
Hosea13:10 Mukalenga wenu udi penyi? Ke yeye uvua ne bua kunusungidila! Bamfumu benu bonsu badi penyi? Ke bavua ne bua kunulombola! Nuenu ke bavua bandomba mukalenga, bandomba kabidi ne bamfumu." 
Hosea13:11 Meme kunupesha bakalenga, kadi ne tshiji! Bu mumvua munufikile munda, meme kununyengabu." 
Hosea13:12 Buenzayi bua bena Efrayime, mbamane kubufunda. Bimanyinu bia bubi buabu, mbiteka muaba musunguluke." 
Hosea13:13 Nanku, bena Efrayime nebakenge, mudi mukaji ukenga pa kulela. Kadi, muana awu kakuledibua bimpe to. Pakumbana diba dia kumulela, neabenge kupatuka mu difu dia mamuende." 
Hosea13:14 Nanku, meme Maweja-Nangila, nempandishe bena Izrayele ku lufu anyi? Nembumushe muaba wa bafue anyi? Lufu, bukole buebe budi penyi? Lufu, leja bukole buudi ushipangana nabu. Meme tshiakubafuila luse to." 
Hosea13:15 Bena Efrayime nebavulangane munkatshi mua bana babu. Kadi, lupepele ludi lumisha bintu nelujuke, lufumina mu tshipela. Maweja-Nangila ke udi mutume lupepele alu. Nanku mayi a mu mpokolu neakame, mayi a mu mishimi neume, Lupepele neluambule bintu bionsu bia mushinga mukole bidi mu tshibutshilu." 
Hosea14:1 Nebanyoke bena Samariya bua buenzayi buabu, bualu mbatombokele Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Nebafue mu myita ne bana babu, nebatundule bakaji babu badi ne mafu." 
Hosea14:2 Nuenu bena Izrayele, pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Panudi nudishinda, ke tshipeta tshia bubi buenu." 
Hosea14:3 Pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila, numulomba ne: “Utufuileku luse. Wanyishe bua tukutumbishe." 
Hosea14:4 Bena Ashure kabena mua kutupandisha to. Katuena mua kubanda kabidi, pa nyama ya tubalu tua myita to. Mpingu yetu, mbintu bivuabu basonge. Katuena mua kuyinemeka kabidi bu Mvidi Mukulu wetu to. Bualu anu wewe nkayebe, ke udi ufuila bana ba nshiya luse.”" 
Hosea14:5 — Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Meme nendongolole bena Izrayele, bua bangitabe tshiakabidi. Ki mbikole bua meme kubaleja dinanga dianyi to. Nkadi mumane kubafuila luse, tshiena nabu kabidi ne tshiji." 
Hosea14:6 Nengikale munkatshi mua bena Izrayele, bu lumume ludi bambuluisha buloba. Nanku, bena Izrayele nebalengele, bu tshilongu tshia nsungubidi. Nebele miji bu mitshi ya mu Lebanone." 
Hosea14:7 Bena Izrayele nebavulangane. Nebikale balengele bu mutshi wa olive. Nebanunke mupuya muimpe bu wa manananshi a mitshi ya mu ditu dia mu Lebanone. 
Hosea14:8 Bantu banyi nebapingane kundi, bua meme kubalama. Nebadime, banowe ntete ya kuenza bukula. Nebalambe bu mionji ya mvinyo. Nebikale ne lumu, bu mudi maluvu mimpe a mu Lebanone." 
Hosea14:9 Bena Efrayime, mpingu idi inuenzela tshinyi? Meme ke udi upesha bena Efrayime bionsu bidibu balomba. Meme ke udi ubalama. Meme ndi mutshi wa siprese udi usasa matuku onsu kauyi uuma to. Meme ke udi ubapesha maminu." 
Hosea14:10 Pikala muntu ne lungenyi, neumvue tshidi Osheya wamba. Muntu udi ne meji, neajingulule tshidiye ulongesha. Bualu njila idi Maweja-Nangila musebele, idi anu milulame. Bantu badi bamuitaba, badi mua kuendelamu. Kadi, bantu badi bamutombokela, badi badishinda mu njila amu." 
Joel1:1 Telejayi miaku ivua Maweja-Nangila mumanyishe Yowele, muana wa Petuwele." 
Joel1:2 Nuenu bakulu, umvuayi! Nuenu bonsu badi basombe mu ditunga dia Yuda, telejayi! Bualu bua mushindu ewu mbumane kuenzeka mu tshikondu tshienu, nansha tshia bankambua benu anyi?"
