Joel1:3 Nubuambile bana benu: bana benu babuambile babu bana, bua bambile ndelanganyi idi ilonda." 
Joel1:4 Tshintu tshiyuabu bashiye mu madimi kudi meshi, nebatshidie kudi mpasu; tshiwa mpasu mishiye, nebatshidie kudi mintuntu; tshivua mintuntu mishiye, nebatshidie kudi mpasu ya mikumbi." 
Joel1:5 Nuenu bakuatshiki ba maluvu, jukayi, dilaayi! Nuenu bonsu banu ba nwinyo, asayi miadi! Bualu bishi mbimane kudia tumuma tuonsu; nanku kanuakunua kabidi nwinyo mupiamupia!" 
Joel1:6 Bualu tshisumbu tshia mpasu ntshibuele mu ditunga dietu. Mpasu mmipite bungi, kabayi mua kuyibala. Idi ne lukuka, ne menu bu a nyama wa ntambue, ne mbanga bu ya ntambue mukaji. Idi inyanga madimi etu a mionji ya nwinyo," 
Joel1:7 ibutula mitshi yetu ya mfiku butubutuu, iyikunya, iyivula bizubu, ishiya amu ku matamba kutooka too." 
Joel1:8 Asayi muadi, mudi mukaji utshidi nsongakaji wenza mu madilu, udila bayende utshivua umuselelaku!" 
Joel1:9 Batuangaji badi benzela Maweja-Nangila mudimu, badi badila, bualu bantu kabatshiena bafika mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, ne milambu ya ntete, nansha ya maluvu." 
Joel1:10 Madimi mmanyangakaja, buloba mbuume. Kamutshiena ntete ya kuenza bukula, kanutshiena maluvu. Kamutshiena mafuta, nansha dimata!" 
Joel1:11 Babidime badi bapampakana, bena madimi a mionji ya nwinyo badi bateketa mu maboku, bualu ntete yonsu mmijimine, bia pa madimi bionsu mbifue." 
Joel1:12 Mionji ya nwinyo mmiume, mitshi ya mfiku mmifube. Mitshi yonsu ya bimuma mmishawuke. Disanka dionsu ndijike munkatshi mua bantu." 
Joel1:13 Nuenu batuangaji, vualayi bilamba bia mu madilu! Nuenu badi benza mudimu ku tshilambuilu, dilayi! Nuenu bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu wetu, luayi, bungamayi butuku bujima! Bualu milambu ya ntete, nansha ya maluvu, kabatshiena bafika nayi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Joel1:14 Nuele diyi bua bantu bajile biakudia, nubueje tshisangilu tshinene, nusangishe bakulu, ne bantu bakuabu bonsu ba mu ditunga, bafike mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu, bamusengelele bua atuambuluishe." 
Joel1:15 Eyi, dituku didi dikuatshisha bowa, dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda, dikadi pabuipi. Didi difika pamue ne kabutu kavua Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mumane kujadika." 
Joel1:16 Bu mudi biakudia bietu bijimine, katuyi mua kuenza bualu, ke mudi disanka ne musangelu biumuke mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wetu." 
Joel1:17 Maminu mmumine mu mabuwa a buloba. Mu mayeba mudi mushale mutupu, nzubu ya kulamina biakudia mmiupuke, ntete yonsu mmijike." 
Joel1:18 Telejayi mudi nyama itua mikemu! Bisumbu bia ngombe bidi bitambakana nseke yonsu, bualu kayena kabidi ne bisosa bia kudia. Mikoku mene idi ifua." 
Joel1:19 Maweja-Nangila, wewe ke undi mbikila! Kapia nkoshe bisosa bia mu mpata, ndimi ya kapia mmidie mitshi yonsu ya mu madimi." 
Joel1:20 Nyama ya tshisuku idi ikudidila, bualu misulu ya mayi mmikame. Kapia nkashidishe bisosa bia mu mpata." 
Joel2:1 Elayi mpungi mu Siyone, elayi mbila pa mukuna wa tshijila wa Mvidi Mukulu! Nuenu bonsu bena ditunga, nuzakale, bualu dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda dikadi pabuipi." 
Joel2:2 Dituku adi ndia miidima mikole, ndia mavuba ne mabungi. Tshisumbu tshia mpasu tshidi tshifika, tshinene, tshikuatshisha bowa! Tshidi tshifikisha panshi, bu mudi butuku bufikisha pa mikuna. Katshia kabena banji kumona bualu bua mushindu ewu, kabena mua kubumona kabidi to." 
Joel2:3 Mpasu eyi idi ibutula bionsu, bidi kumpala ne bidi kunyima kuayi, bu mudi kapia kabutula, kashidisha. Pavua mpasu eyi kayiyi mianji kufika, buloba buvua bu lupangu lua Edene. Kadi mpindiewu budi tshipela. Kayena mishiye tshintu nansha tshimue." 
Joel2:4 Idi imueneka bu nyama ya tubalu, inyema lubilu bu mudi babandi ba pa tubalu baya mu mvita." 
Joel2:5 Idi itupika ku mukuna, iya ku munga, yela tshiona bu tshia matempu a mvita, bu tshia kapia kadi kosha bisosa biume. Idi bu tshiluilu tshikole, tshidi tshiela mualu wa mvita." 
Joel2:6 Padiyi isemena pabuipi, bantu bonsu badi bazakala, mpala yabu idi itokoloka." 
Joel2:7 Idi inyema bu bilobu, ibanda pa tshimana mudi bena mvita benza. Mpasu yonsu udi uya buludi mu wende njila, kakuena udi usesuka." 
Joel2:8 Kakuena nansha umue udi usakila mukuabu. Yonsu udi ulonda wende njila. Idi ipita bionsu bidibu bayijikila mu njila. Kakuena tshintu tshidi mua kuyimanyika. 
Joel2:9 Idi itangalaka mu tshimenga, ibanda pa bimana, ibuelela mu nzubu ku madidishi bu bivi." 
Joel2:10 Padi mpasu eyi isemena pabuipi, buloba budi buzakala, diulu didi dinyungakana, ngondu ne diba bidi bibuitshidila, mitotu kayena ikenka kabidi." 
Joel2:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wakula utantamana, ulombola bena mvita bende. Badi tshisumbu tshinene, batumikila diyi diende, kabayi ne udi mua kuambangana nabu. Dituku dia Maweja-Nangila, ndikuatshishe bantu bowa. Washala ne muoyi nnganyi?" 
Joel2:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Patshidiku diba, pinganayi mpindiewu kundi, ne muoyi wenu mujima. Nujile biakudia, nudile muadi, nuntendelele!" 
Joel2:13 Pandayi mioyi yenu, kanupandi bilamba.” Eyowa, nupingane kudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. Udi ununanga, unufuila luse, udi ne lutulu lua bungi, udi wenzela bantu bimpe kayi upungila, ujinga amu kulengulula bivuaye ukanyina nabi bantu." 
Joel2:14 Misangu mikuabu udi mua kushintulula meji adiye nawu, kunusankisha pa mutu pa kunukengesha. Diba adi, nudi mua kumutuadila milambu, ya ntete, ne ya maluvu." 
Joel2:15 Elayi mpungi mu Siyone, nuele diyi bua bantu bajile biakudia, nubueje tshisangilu tshinene." 
Joel2:16 Nusangishe bantu, babuele bonsu muaba wa tshijila! Nusangishe bakulumpe ne bana, too ne batshidi bamua dibela. Nanku batshidi babueleleku mu dibaka, bapatuke mu nzubu yabu, basangile pamue ne bakuabu." 
Joel2:17 Batuangaji, badi bakuatshila Maweja-Nangila mudimu, badidile muadi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, pankatshi pa tshibuelelu ne tshilambuilu, basengelele Mvidi Mukulu, bamuambile ne: “Maweja-Nangila, utufuile luse, tudi bantu bebe, kutufuishishi bundu, kuanyishi bua bantu batuseke, batukonke ne: ‘Tshidi Mvidi Mukulu wabu ubenzela ntshinyi?’ ”" 
Joel2:18 Maweja-Nangila mmunange ditunga diende, mmufuile bantu bende luse." 
Joel2:19 Udi ubenzela bidibu bamulomba, ubalaya ne: “Nennutumine tshiakabidi ntete ya kuenza bukula, maluvu ne mafuta. Nenuhidie nukute! Tshiena nnufuisha kabidi bundu, munkatshi mua bisamba bia bende." 
Joel2:20 Baluishi benu badi batumina ku mutu kua ditunga, nembipate mutantshi mule, ku maloba a bipela ne minanga. Nengimanshe bena mvita babu badi benda kumpala mu Mayi manene a luepu; badi kunyima nembimanshe mu Mayi manene a pankatshi. Bitalu biabu nebinunke bibi, bantu kabayi mua kueyela bimpe. Nanku bantu bonsu bawa bakuenzela malu mabi mapite, nebajimine." 
Joel2:21 Wewe buloba, kutshinyi kabidi, usanke, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wenza malu manene." 
Joel2:22 Nuenu, nyama ya mu tshisuku, kanutshinyi kabidi, bualu bisosa bia mu mpata mbisampile, mitshi mmikuame bimuma, mitshi ya mfiku ne mionji ya mvinyo mmikuame bipite bungi." 
Joel2:23 Nuenu badi basomba mu Siyone, sankayi bualu bua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi unulokeshila mvula mbedi unuvua nukengela, unulokeshila mvula ya bungi pa bikondu biayi, muvuaye munuenzele kale." 
Joel2:24 Mayeba neuwule tente ne ntete; mvinyo ne mafuta nebiuwule mu bipanza.” 
Joel2:25 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nennupingajile bintu bienu, biwabu badie kudi meshi, mintuntu, ne mpasu ya mikumbi, bimvua munutumine bisumbu ne bisumbu bua kunukengesha." 
Joel2:26 Nenudie, nenukute. Nenuntumbishe meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, udi unuenzela malu a kukema. Tshiena mua kufuisha bantu banyi bundu kabidi musangu nansha umue." 
Joel2:27 Nanku, nuenu bena Izrayele, nenumanye ne: ndi munkatshi muenu. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu mmeme, kakuena mukuabu. Tshiena mua kufuisha bantu banyi bundu kabidi musangu nansha umue.”" 
Joel3:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Tshikondu netshifike tshindi mpesha muntu yonsu Mueyelu wanyi. Bana benu ba balume ne ba bakaji nebamanyishe bantu malu mu dina dianyi; bakulumpe benu nebalote bilota; bansonga benu nebamone malu adi Mvidi Mukulu uleja. 
Joel3:2 Nansha bena mudimu balume ne bakaji, nembapeshe Mueyelu wanyi." 
Joel3:3 Nengenze malu a kukema mu diulu ne pa buloba. Nekuikale mashi, kapia, ne mavuba a muinshi." 
Joel3:4 Dituku dia Maweja-Nangila kadiyi dianji kufika, dituku dinene didi dikuatshisha bantu bowa, diba nedibuitshidile, ngondu neakunzubile bu mashi.”" 
Joel3:5 Nanku muntu yonsu udi utela dina dia Maweja-Nangila, nebamusungidile. Bualu bamue nebapanduke ku dikenga mu Yerushalayime ne pa mukuna wa Siyone, bu muvua Maweja-Nangila mumane kulaya. Ke bantu badiye usungidila, bua bapete muoyi." 
Amos1:1 Mu mukanda ewu mbafunde miaku ya Amosa, mumunyi wa nyama, wa mu musoku wa Tekowa. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumumanyishe malu avua atangila bukalenga bua bena Izrayele, bidimu bibidi kumpala kua tshikumina tshinene. Mu tshikondu tshiwa Uziya mukalenga wa bena Yuda, ne Yerobowame, muana wa Yowashe, mukalenga wa bena Izrayele," 
Amos1:2 Amosa kuamba ne: Maweja-Nangila udi wakula ne tshiji, ukungula bu ntambue. Diyi diende ndifumine ku mukuna wa Siyone, ku Yerushalayime, muaba udiye usomba. Mpata ya bisosa bivule idi ifuba yonsu. Ku lusongu lua mukuna wa Karmele, nansha metu mene adi uma." 
Amos1:3 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Arame ba mu Damase, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu mbakengeshe ne lonji lukole, bantu badi basomba mu ditunga dia Ngilaade. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse. Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos1:4 Nengoshe nzubu wa mukalenga Azayele, kabidi ne nzubu munene wa mukalenga Benadade." 
Amos1:5 Nentshibule mabaya adibu bapayika nawu biibi bia mu tshimenga tshia Damase. Nenshipeshe bantu badi basombamu, kabidi ne mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia buenzayi atshi, mulombodi wa musoku wa masanka mabi awu. Bena Arame badi basomba mu ditunga, nebaye nabu mu bupika ku Kire. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Amos1:6 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Peleshete ba mu Ngaza, mbapishe bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu mbakuate bantu bonsu mu misoku mivule, baye nabu, babasumbishe mu bupika kudi bena Edome. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos1:7 Nengoshe tshimenga tshia Ngaza, kapia nekashidishe nzubu yatshi mimpe." 
Amos1:8 Nenshipeshe mukalenga wa mu Asdode. Nenduishe mukalenga wa mu Askalone. Nenduishe bikole badi basomba mu Ekrone. Bena Peleshete bonsu nebafue. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.” 
Amos1:9 Telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Fenisiya ba mu Tire, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu kabavua bavuluka ndondu uvuabu batue ne bena Izrayele. Mu misoku mivule mbakuate bantu bonsu, baye nabu, babasumbishe kudi bena Edome. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos1:10 Nengoshe tshimenga tshia Tire, kapia nekashidishe nzubu yatshi mimpe.”" 
Amos1:11 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Edome, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu bavua balondakaja, ne muele wa mvita mu bianza, bana babu bena Izrayele. Kabavua ne luse nansha lua kana. Bavua balamina bana babu lukuna kashidi, babafikila munda, bakeba kubabutula. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos1:12 Nengoshe tshimenga tshia Temane. Kapia nekashidishe nzubu mimpe idi mu Bosra. ” 
Amos1:13 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Amone, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu mu mvita ivuabu baluangana mu ditunga dia Ngilaade, bua kutentamuna mikalu ya buloba buabu, bakapanda mafu a bakaji bavua nawu. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse nansha! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos1:14 Nengoshe tshimenga tshiabu tshia Raba. Kapia nekashidishe nzubu yatshi mimpe. Dituku adi, nebele mbila ya mvita, mikole bu tshiona tshia lupepele lua mvunde." 
Amos1:15 Mukalenga ne bamfumu bende bonsu, nebabakuate, baye nabu mu bupika. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Amos2:1 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Mowabe, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu bakosha mifuba ya mukalenga wa bena Edome, bua kuenza nayi lupemba. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos2:2 Nengoshe ditunga dia Mowabe. Kapia nekashidishe nzubu mimpe, idi mu tshimenga tshia Keriyote. Bena Mowabe nebabutuke mu tshimvundu tshia mvita. Baluishi babu nebele mbila, nebadidishe mpungi." 
Amos2:3 Nenshipeshe mukalenga wabu, nemfuishe bamfumu bende bonsu musangu umue. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Amos2:4 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Yuda, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule, kadi nangananga, bualu mbalengulule malu onsu amvua mubamanyishe. Mbadiate mikenji yanyi ku makasa. Bavua bapambuka mu njila, batendelela mvidie, ivua bankambua babu mene bakukuila. Nanku tshiena mua kubafuila luse! Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike ne:" 
Amos2:5 Nengoshe ditunga dia bena Yuda. Kapia nekashidishe nzubu milenga idi mu Yerushalayime.” 
Amos2:6 Teleja tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi ndumbuluisha bena Izrayele, mbapisha bua malu mabi mavule. Nanku tshiena mbafuila luse. Nenkumbaje bindi mujadike. Ndi mbapisha, nangananga bualu mbasumbishe mu bupika muntu uvua kayi ne bualu, bua bamone mua kufuta mabanza. Mbapane mupele, uvua kayi mua kufuta dibanza diende, amu dia mukolu wa bisabata." 
Amos2:7 Badi badiata ku makasa badi kabayi ne bukole. Ku kabadi badi banyanga tshilumbu tshia mupele udi kayi ne kantu ku bianza. Tatu ne muanende wa balume, badi benza malu a buendenda mu bulalu bumue ne nsongakaji mupika wa momumue. Ke mudibu banyanga dina dianyi dia tshijila." 
Amos2:8 Bilamba bivua bapele bafila bu tshieya, badi babiadija panshi, balalapu miaba yonsu idibu batendelela mvidie. Mu nzubu ya mvidie yabu ayi, badi banuinamu maluvu, avuabu banyenge bantu ku bukole." 
Amos2:9 Kadi meme mvua munubutuile bena Amore. Bavua bantu bale, bu mitshi ya sedre, bakole bu mitshi ya nsanga. Ke meme kukosa nsongu yayi, kuyijula ne miji yayi." 
Amos2:10 Nkavua mudianjile kunupatula mu Ejipitu, meme kuenda nenu mu tshipela bidimu makumi anayi, meme kunuludika bimpe, kunufikisha mu ditunga dia bena Amore bua nudikuate." 
Amos2:11 Pashishe meme kusungula bana benu ba balume, bua bangenzele mudimu wa buambi. Meme kubikila bansongalume benu, bua benze dilaya, badijidile kundi. Bena Izrayele, mmomu anyi ki mmomu?" 
Amos2:12 Kadi bantu banyi ba tshijila, nuenu kubanuisha maluvu. Nuenu kukandika bambi bua kabambidi bantu malu mu dina dianyi." 
Amos2:13 Nennutekakaje mudi ditempu ditenkakana, divuabu buwuje ne miepu, bapitshisha." 
Amos2:14 Nansha muntu ne lubilu lukole, muaba wa kunyemena, kakuufika. Nansha tshilobu mene katshiakupeta bukole. Bena mvita ba bukitu kabakudisungidila ku lufu." 
Amos2:15 Muena buta bua mikete, kakutua mukolu panshi. Udi ne lubilu lupite, kakupanda to. Nansha udi ubanda pa nyama wa kabalu, kakunyema nansha." 
Amos2:16 Nansha bena bukitu ba muoyi mukole, nebanyeme bamane kuimansha bia mvita. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Amos3:1 Bena Izrayele, telejayi. Nudi bantu bayua Maweja-Nangila mupatule mu Ejipitu. Udi unujadikila ne:" 
Amos3:2 “Ku bisamba bionsu bidi pa buloba, ndi munusungule amu nuenu. Ke mundi nnulumbuluisha, nnunyoka, bua malu mabi onsu anuvua benze.”" 
Amos3:3 Bantu babidi badi mua kuenda pamue mu njila umue, kabayi badianza kumvuangana bua luendu anyi?" 
Amos3:4 Nyama wa ntambue udi mua kukungula muitu, kayi musangane nyama wa kudiaye anyi? Udi mua kudidila ku buina, kayi muanji kukuata nyama anyi?" 
Amos3:5 Nyunyi udi mua kubuela mu buteyi, kakuyi tshidi tshimulobesha momu anyi? Buteyi budi mua kudiupila, kakuyi tshidi tshibupisha anyi?" 
Amos3:6 Badi mua kuela mpungi wa mvita mu tshimenga, bantu kabayi bakuatshika bowa anyi? Tshipupu tshidi mua kukuata tshimenga, Maweja-Nangila kayi mutshitume anyi?" 
Amos3:7 Eyowa, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kena wenza bualu, kayi muanji kubumanyisha bambi, bantu bende." 
Amos3:8 Padi nyama wa ntambue ukungula, udi kayi ne bowa nnganyi? Padi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu umanyisha bantu bualu, udi mua kubenga kubuambila bantu nnganyi?" 
Amos3:9 Bandayi pa misaka ya nzubu ya bukalenga ya mu Asdode, tshimenga tshia bena Peleshete, ne ya mu Ejipitu, nuele mbila ne: “Disangishayi pa mikuna, pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Samariya, bua nujadike mudi bena tshinyangu, bakengeshanganamu, bajula tshimvundu.”" 
Amos3:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena Samariya kabena bamanye kuenza bualu buimpe nansha bumue. Badi bunguija mu nzubu yabu ya bukalenga, biuma bipeta mu buivi ne dishipangana.”" 
Amos3:11 Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu nkujadikila wewe Samariya ne: “Baluishi nebanyungulukile ditunga diebe, nebashimbule bimana biuvua mukoleshe nabi bimenga, nebibe bidi mu nzubu yebe ya bukalenga.”" 
Amos3:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Padi nyama wa ntambue mukuate mukoku, mulami wawu udi mua kudipula amu mifuba ibidi, nansha katupa ka ditshi. Ke bidi ne bua kuenzekela bena Izrayele badi basomba mu Samariya, banangidila mu nkuasa milengeja bimpe, ne mu misamu ya bulalu: nebasungile amu “katupa” ka kudibu." 
Amos3:13 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi wamba ne: telejayi, manyishayi ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ne:" 
Amos3:14 Dituku dindi nnyoka bena Izrayele, bua malu mabi avuabu benza, nennyangakaje bilambuilu bidi mu Betele. Nenkose nsengu idi ku matumba abi, imate panshi." 
Amos3:15 Nengupule nzubu yonsu, nansha udibu base bua tshikondu tshia mashika, nansha bua tshikondu tshia luya. Nennyangakaje nzubu mialabale ayi, isuabu balengeja ne mibanga. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:1 Nuenu bakaji ba mu Samariya, telejayi: nudi badiunde bibi, bafuanangane ne ngombe ya mu Bashane. Telejayi tshindi nnuambila ne: badi kabayi ne bukole, nudi nubanyenga bintu biabu, nukengesha bapele, nuambila babayenu ne: “Koleshayi! Nututuadile maluvu!”" 
Amos4:2 Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi uditshipa ne: “Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila, ndi nnujadikila bulelela ne: matuku adi kumpala, nebanukoke bonsu, mudibu bakoka mishipa mikuata ku ndobu." 
Amos4:3 Nebanupatule ku muntu ku muntu, mu masosu adi mu tshimana tshia tshimenga. Nebanunyemeshe luseke lua mukuna wa Ermone. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku.”" 
Amos4:4 Bena Izrayele, nudi nubuela mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa Betele, kadi nudi amu nuntombokela. Nudi nuya kutendelela ku Ngilgale, nuenza anu kuenza malu mabi. Nudi nufika, patshiatshia dinda, nulambula milambu yenu, dituku dibidi nufila tshia dikumi tshia bia pa madimi enu." 
Amos4:5 Nudi nuoshila pa tshilambuilu mampa mela buanga, bua mulambu wa kuela tuasakidila. Nudi nubikila bantu ku milambu ya budisuile inudi nulambula. Ke binudi nunanga bikole, kadi nudi amu nuntombokela. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:6 Mu bimenga bienu bionsu nuvua balale ne nzala, mu misoku yenu yonsu kamuvua tshiakudia! Uvua munutumine tshiyole atshi, ke meme! Kadi nansha nanku, kanuena bapingane kundi! Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:7 Mvua mukandike mvula bua kaloki, tshikondu tshivua bia pa madimi bikengela mayi. Mvua mulokeshe mvula mu tshimenga kampande, mu tshimenga tshikuabu, mvua mumukandike. Budimi bumue buvua bupete mayi mavule, bukuabu buvua bufuba ne munanga." 
Amos4:8 Bantu ba mu bimenga bibidi, bisatu, bavua benda, bakoka makasa panshi, bakeba mayi a kunua mu tshimenga tshikuabu, kabayi baapeta makumbane. Kadi nansha biobi nanku, kanuena bapingane kundi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:9 Mvua mutumine bia pa madimi emu mabeedi, bua bifube, bibolele mu madimi. Ndi munyange mitshi yenu, ne mionji ya mvinyo; mpasu kudia mitshi ya mfiku, ne ya olive. Kadi kanuena bapingane kundi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:10 Ndi mutumine bimuna bienu masama, mumvua muenze kale mu Ejipitu. Ndi muanyishe bua baluishi benu, bashipe bansongalume benu mu mvita, banunyenge nyama ya tubalu. Mu mitanda yenu, mupuya wa bitalu mmunubuele mu mimpempe. Kadi kanuena bapingane kundi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku." 
Amos4:11 Meme mvua munyangakaje misoku mijima, mumvua muenze kale mu Sodome ne Ngomore. Nuenu kupatukamu amu bakese, bu tshishelele tshia lukunyi, tshidibu bapatule lukasa muiku. Kadi kanuena bapingane kundi. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku." 
Amos4:12 Kadi mpindiewu nemfike menemene! Bena Izrayele, nenumone mundi nnunyoka. Nudilongolole bua kupetangana nanyi, bua kudileja kumpala kuanyi meme, Mvidi Mukulu wenu." 
Amos4:13 Vulukayi, uvua muenze mikuna, uvua mufuke lupepele, udi umanyisha bantu meji ende, udi wandamuna butuku buenza munya, udi wendakana ku nsongu ya mikuna, ke Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Amos5:1 Bena Izrayele, telejayi kasala ka madilu kandi nnuela:" 
Amos5:2 Izrayele nnsongakaji udi mufue, tshitalu tshiende tshitshidi panshi. Kakujuka kabidi to. Mbamulekele pa buloba buende: muntu nansha umue kena umujula!" 
Amos5:3 Bualu Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ku bantu tshinunu ba mu tshimenga bavua baye mu mvita, nebapingane amu lukama. Ku bantu lukama ba mu musoku, nebapingane amu dikumi. Nebienzeke nanku mu Izrayele mujima.”" 
Amos5:4 Telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wambila bena Izrayele ne: “Panudi basue kushala ne muoyi, nupingane amu kundi, nungebeje malu." 
Amos5:5 Kadi kanunkonki malu mu nzubu wa kutendelela wa Betele. Kanubuedi muaba wa kutendelela wa mu Ngilgale, kanuendi luendu lua tshijila, batangile ku Bersheba nansha. Bualu bena Ngilgale, nebaye nabu mu bupika; Betele, nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila, neashale nzubu wa makenga. ”" 
Amos5:6 Pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila, nenupete muoyi. Kanuyi benza nanku, neikale bu kapia kadi kakuata ndelanganyi ya Yozefe. Nekashidishe bidi mu Betele, kakuyi udi mua kujima kapia aku." 
Amos5:7 Nudi bena diakabi, nuenu badi banyanga bilumbu, bapisha badi babinga, babingisha badi bapila." 
Amos5:8 Uvua muenze mitotu, tshidimina nzaji, mbua-nyama-ne-muntu. Udi ukudimuna midima, uyenza butoke bua mu dinda. Udi wandamuna munya, uwenza butuku. Udi ubikila mayi a mu mayi manene, wapuekesha pa buloba, ulokesha mvula. Dina diende Maweja-Nangila." 
Amos5:9 Udi ubutula badi ne bukole, ushimbula bimenga, bivuabu bakolesha ne bimana." 
Amos5:10 Ku tshilumbuluilu nudi nukina muntu udi unuvuluija munudi mua kukosa nsambu pa yoyi; nudi nutshina bikole udi ujadika malu amu muvuawu menzeke. 
Amos5:11 Nudi nukengesha udi kayi bukole, numunyenga ntete ivuaye munowe. Nanku kanuakulala mu nzubu mipiamipia, inuvua base ne mabue. Kanuakunua maluvu a mvinyo anuvua bapete, ku mionji misunguluke inuvua bakune." 
Amos5:12 “Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi mumanye malu mabi onsu anuvua benze. Ndi muvuluke buenzayi buenu bua dikema. Nudi nuluisha udi kayi ne bualu, nuanyisha mabuejila. Ku kabadi, nudi nubenga bua bandumbulula bakose nsambu ya bapele pa yoyi.”" 
Amos5:13 Tshikondu etshi ntshibi. Ke padi muntu mudimuke upuwa vii. 
Amos5:14 Enzayi malu mimpe, nubenge bidi bibi. Nanku nenushale ne muoyi. Diba adi Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, neikale nenu menemene, munudi nuamba amu kuamba." 
Amos5:15 Nulekele malu mabi, nunange bidi bimpe. Nukose nsambu pa yoyi. Bumue Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, neamone mua kufuila bantu ba ndekelu ba ku ndelanganyi ya Yozefe luse." 
Amos5:16 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi wamba ne: “Miaba yonsu idi bantu batuilangana, nebadile muadi. Mu misesu yonsu nebele mbila ne: ‘Akia! Dikenga bunenedi! Dikenga kaayi edi!’ Nebabikile babidime badi mu misoku, bua bafike mu tshimenga bua kudila mu madilu, bualu bakaji badi ne bua kutendamu muadi, kabena bungi bukumbane." 
Amos5:17 Nansha mu madimi a mvinyo, nebadile amu kudila, pandi mpitshila munkatshi muenu bua kununyoka. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Amos5:18 Bantu badi batekemena dituku dia Maweja-Nangila, didiye ne bua kudileja patoke, mbena diakabi. Dituku adi nedinulengelele ku tshinyi? — Nekuikale amu midima, butoke kabuyi bumueneka!" 
Amos5:19 Nebikale bu muntu udi unyema nyama wa ntambue, usangila ne nyama mukuabu wa lonji lukole. Udi ubuela mu nzubu, weyamina ku tshimana ne tshianza, ke nyoka kumusuma!" 
Amos5:20 Dituku dia Maweja-Nangila nedifike. — Nedikale dia midima, butoke kabuyi bumueneka, nedikale difike fitutuu, kanuyi mua kutekemena bukenke nansha bukese." 
Amos5:21 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Ndi mbenga bibilu bienu, tshiena musue kubimona kabidi to. Ndi ngumvua muenge, panudi nusangila bua kuntendelela," 
Amos5:22 nansha nundambula milambu ya kuosha. Milambu ya bia pa madimi enu idi imfikila ku muoyi. Tshiena nansha ntangila nyama, inudi nundambula bu milambu ya bobumue." 
Amos5:23 Umbukayi ku matshi anyi, ne mutoyi wa misambu yenu. Tshiena musue kumvua kabidi muadi wa bisanji bienu." 
Amos5:24 Nukuate mudimu bua bakose nsambu pa yoyi; bua malu mempe adi bantu benzelangana, ikale bu misulu idi yuwula mayi tente, ipasalala, kayiyi ikama dituku nansha dimue." 
Amos5:25 Bena Izrayele bidimu makumi anayi binuvua bendakana mu tshipela, nuvua bandambule nyama ne bia pa madimi enu anyi?" 
Amos5:26 Tshikondu atshi, kamuma bambule mpingu ya mvidie yenu, inudi badienzele, inudi nuambula lelu miaba yonsu nansha. Ke lupingu lua mvidie-mukalenga Sakute, ne lua mvidie wa mitotu Kewane!" 
Amos5:27 Ke mundi musue kunutuma mu bupika, mutantshi mule ne tshimenga tshia Damase. Meme ndi njadika nanku, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu." 
Amos6:1 Diakabi ndienu, nuenu bonsu, badi basomba talala pa mukuna wa Siyone, nuenu bonsu badi pa mukuna wa Samariya, bela meji ne: ke patuasomba ku matshi talalaa. Badi banuamba ne: nudi bamfumu ba tshisamba tshidi tshipite bikuabu bionsu bia pa buloba. Bena Izrayele badi banuvuila bua kulomba meji ne lungenyi. Kadi kanudidingi nansha." 
Amos6:2 Nuanji kuya ku Kalne, numone bivua bienzekaku. Pashishe nupitshile ku tshimenga tshinene tshia Amate. Nutungunuke too ne ku Ngate, tshimenga tshia bena Peleshete. Nenujadike ne: kanuena nupita makalenga aa nansha, nansha buloba buawu buikale bushadile ku buenu." 
Amos6:3 Nudi nuela meji ne: dituku dia dikenga ditshidi kule. Kadi ku buenzayi buenu, nudi nudisemeja pabuipi." 
Amos6:4 Nudi nulala pa malalu malengeja ne mibanga. Nudi nunangila nkuasa minene milenga, nudia munyinyi wa mukoku, nusanka bua munyinyi wa kana ka ngombe ka mafuta." 
Amos6:5 Nudi nusaka misambu ne diyi dikole, nuyimba ne lunzenze. Nudi nuidikija Davide, nudienzela biombelu bipiabipia." 
Amos6:6 Nudi nunuina maluvu mu makopu manene. Nudi nudilaba pambidi mafuta a dipembu dimpe. Kadi kanuena nunyingalala bua bisamba bia Yozefe, bidi biamba kubutuka." 
Amos6:7 Ke pandi nnuambila lelu ne: nenuikale bantu ba kumpala, badibu baye nabu mu bupika. Nanku tshibilu tshienu tshia bena lulengu, tshiasangana kashidi kunyanguka anyi?" 
Amos6:8 Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu mmuditshipe ne: “Meme Mvidi Mukulu mulelela, ndi njadika ne: lutambishi lua badi basomba mu bukalenga bua Izrayele ludi lunkuatshisha munyanji. Tshiena musue nzubu yabu milenga. Samariya ne bonsu badi basombamu, ndi mbifila kudi baluishi babu.”" 
Amos6:9 Mu diku mudi bantu bashale amu dikumi, nebafue." 
Amos6:10 Muanabu ne bantu bafuila mu nzubu amu neafike bua kupatula bitalu pambelu. Bu muntu mua kuebeja muntu, udi mushale mu tshibambalu tshia munda menemene mua nzubu, ne: “Nutshidi ne muntu mukuabu mu nzubu anyi,” nebamuandamune ne: “To, muntu nansha umue!” Neasakidile ne: “Puwa! Ki ndiba dia kutela Maweja-Nangila. ”" 
Amos6:11 Dimukayi, bualu: Maweja-Nangila mmuele diyi, nzubu yonsu neyele mitanta, yupuka, minene, nansha mikese." 
Amos6:12 Nyama ya tubalu idi mua kunyema lubilu pa mabue anyi? Badi badima mu mbuebue ne bikasu bidi ngombe ikoka anyi? Nudi nuandamuna malu: kulumbuluisha bantu kukadi kubalunga anyi? Kulongolola malu bimpe, kukadi kukengesha bantu bibi!" 
Amos6:13 Nudi nusanka bua tshimenga tshia tshianana, Lodabare, tshinuvua bakuate. Nudi nuditemba ne: “Ku makanda etu nkayetu ke kutudi bakuatshile Karnayime, tshimenga tshikole tshipite. ”" 
Amos6:14 Kadi meme, Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, nennutumine, nuenu bena bukalenga bua Izrayele, tshisamba tshikuabu, bua tshinuluishe biangatshile ku Lebo-Amate ku mutu mu ditunga, too ne ku musulu wa Araba, kuinshi." 
Amos7:1 Teleja bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mundeje: meme kumona muvuaye mufuke mpasu mipite bungi. Bantu bakavua bamane kunowa bidibu ne bua kulambula mukalenga wa ditunga. Bisosa bi-kavua bituadija kutoloka tshiakabidi. 
Amos7:2 Ke mpasu kudia bisosa ne bisaala bionsu bivua mu ditunga. Nanku meme kuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkusengelela: fuila bantu bebe luse. Tshianana, nebashale ne muoyi bishi? Bualu badi amu bakese, batekete kabidi.”" 
Amos7:3 Ke Maweja-Nangila kubafuila luse, wamba ne: “Mbimpe, biudi mumone kabiakuenzeka nansha!”" 
Amos7:4 Ke Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kundeja bualu bukuabu: kubikilaye kapia kakole bua kanyoke bantu. Kapia kukamisha mayi onsu, nansha a muinshi mua buloba. Kakavua kashidisha ditunga dia bena Izrayele." 
Amos7:5 Ke meme kuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, ndi nkutendakena ne: lekela kuenza nanku. Tshianana, bantu bebe nebashale ne muoyi bishi? Badi anu bakese, batekete kabidi!”" 
Amos7:6 Ke Maweja-Nangila kubafuila luse, wamba ne: “Mbimpe, biudi mumone kabiakuenzeka nansha!”" 
Amos7:7 Maweja-Nangila kundeja kabidi bualu ebu: Yeye mene uvua muimane pa tshimana, ne nshinga wa kuludika nende mu bianza." 
Amos7:8 Kunkonkaye ne: — Amosa tshiudi umona ntshinyi? Ke meme kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona nshinga wa kuludika nende. Ke Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Eyowa, ndi ndembeleja nshinga ewu munkathi mua bantu banyi, bua mmone ne: badi bantu balulame anyi? Tshiena musue bua basendame nansha kakese." 
Amos7:9 Nennyangakaje miaba yonsu ivua ndelanganyi ya Izrayele itendelela. Miaba ya tshijila ya Izrayele neishale makolu. Nenduishe ne mvita bena diku dia Yerobowame. 
Amos7:10 Amashiya, mutuangaji wa mu Betele, kumanyisha Yerobowame, mukalenga wa Izrayele, ne: “Amosa mmukuelele tshifufu tshibi munkatshi mua bena Izrayele. Bidiye wamba, bidi mua kunyanga ditunga." 
Amos7:11 Umvua miaku yende: Yerobowame, nebamushipe ku muele! Bena Izrayele, nebaye nabu ku bupika, mutantshi mule ne ditunga diabu.”" 
Amos7:12 Ke Amashiya kuambila Amosa ne: — Mumonyi wa malu, umuangale muaba ewu, upingane kuenu mu bukalenga bua Yuda. Ulongeshe bana benu! Nebakudishe ne disanka!" 
Amos7:13 Kadi kumueneki kabidi muetu munu mu Betele, bualu ke muaba udi mukalenga wa ditunga utendelela, ke nzubu wa tshijila wa bukalenga." 
Amos7:14 Ke Amosa kuandamuna Amashiya ne: — Tshiena muambi udibu bafuta nansha. Tshiena muntu uvua mu tshisumbu tshia bambi. Nyama indi mumune, ne bimuma bia mfiku bindi mpeta ku mitshi yanyi, ke bivua bindisha!" 
Amos7:15 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kungumusha ku mudimu wa kumuna nyama yanyi, kuntuma bua kuambila bantu bende, bena Izrayele, malu mu dina diende." 
Amos7:16 Kadi wewe, Amashiya, udi musue kunkandika mudimu wa muambi undi ngenzela bena Izrayele. Udi musue bua ndekele biakulakula, muudi ubiamba, bindi mbela nabi ndelanganyi ya Izake. Nanku, teleja bidi Maweja-Nangila ukuambila ne:" 
Amos7:17 “Mukajebe neenze mudimu wa ndumba mu tshimenga tshienu etshi. Bana bebe ba balume ne ba bakaji, nebabashipe mu mvita. Bantu bakuabu nebabanyangane mpangu ne madimi biudi nabi. Wewe mene neufuile kua bende, mu buloba budi ne mikiya. Bena Izrayele, nebaye nabu ku bupika, mutantshi mule ne diabu ditunga.”" 
Amos8:1 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu kundeja kabidi tshibondu tshia bimuma bimane kuboba. 
Amos8:2 Kungebejaye ne: — Amosa, tshiudi umona ntshinyi? Meme kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona tshibondu tshia bimuma bimane kuboba. Ke Maweja-Nangila kunjadikila ne: — Eyowa, bantu banyi bena Izrayele mbamane kuboba! Nshikidilu wabu mmufike! Mbimpe babalumbuluishe! Nembanyoke, tshiyi luse!" 
Amos8:3 Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi njadika ne: dituku dindi mbanyoka, bakaji bimbi ba mu nzubu wa bukalenga, nebadile, bela tusala tua madilu. Bitalu nebikale miaba yonsu, kakuyi udi ubijika. Mu ditunga dijima mudi amu vii vii vii!" 
Amos8:4 Nuenu badi badiatakaja bakengi, nuenu badi bakeba kushipesha bapele mu ditunga, telejayi tshindi ngamba ne:" 
Amos8:5 Nudi nuebejangana ne: “Bibilu bia ngondu mupiamupia nebijike diba kaayi, bua tumone mua kupana tshiakabidi ntete yetu ya kuenza bukula! Dituku dia Dikisha ki ndijike anyi, bua tumone mua kukangula, biibi bia mayeba etu! Netukepeshe bipimu bia ntete, netubandishe mushinga. Netunyangakaje tshiamu tshia kupima natshi bua tumone mua kudinga bantu.”" 
Amos8:6 Nudi nusumbisha bantu too ne bisote bia ntete ya kuenza bukula. Bapele ne bakengi nudi nubenza bapika benu, bualu mbapange kufuta dibanza diabu dia mukolu wa bisabata." 
Amos8:7 Maweja-Nangila mmuditshipe ne: “Bena Izrayele badi baditambisha bua ditunga diabu, kadi kashidi tshiena mua kupua malu abu mabi muoyi.”" 
Amos8:8 Ke padi buloba buzakala, bonsu badi basombapu basa muadi. Buloba bujima nebubande, nebupueke, bu mudi musulu wa Nile mu Ejipitu." 
Amos8:9 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi wamba ne: Dituku adi, nembueje diba munda munya, mu munya, buloba nebubuele mu midima." 
Amos8:10 Nengandamune bibilu bienu bia masanka, bienza matuku a madilu a nuenu kudila. mMisambu inudi nuimba nutshionkomoka, neyandamuke yonsu misambu ya miadi ne mikemu. Nenuvuale bonsu bilamba bikayapale, nenukungule mitu yenu yonsu bu baledi badi mu madilu, badila nsongalume mulela anu umue. Dituku adi nedijike mu tshinyongopelu, mu kanyinganyinga kakole, kakuyi udi unusamba." 
Amos8:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: mu matuku adi kumpala, nentume nzala mu ditunga. Bantu nebafue nzala, kabayi bajinga mampa. Nebafue nyota, kabayi bakeba mayi a kunua. Nebafue nzala ne nyota, bualu nebakebe kumvua tshindi ngamba, bapanga." 
Amos8:12 Nebalalakane eku ne eku, nebumuke kuinshi mu ditunga, nebaye luseke ludi diba dibuelela, nebende luseke lua ku mutu, bua kupingana luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Nebakebe amu kukeba mua kumvua, muaku wa Maweja-Nangila, kabayi baupeta." 
Amos8:13 Dituku adi nansha bansongalume ne bansongakaji, ba mubidi mukole, ne muimpe kabidi, nebafubidile, bafue nyota." 
Amos8:14 Bonsu badi baditshipa, mu dina dia mvidie ya dishima, ya bena Samariya, bamba ne: “Mu dina dia mvidie Dane udi ne muoyi…” nansha ne: “Mu dina dia njila udi utufikisha ku Bersheba… ”, bonsu abu nebadishinde panshi, kabayi mua kujuka kabidi to." 
Amos9:1 Meme kumona Maweja-Nangila muimane pa tshilambuilu. Uvua wela mbila ne: “Tuuta ku mitu ya makunji, bua nzubu mujima anyungakane ne ku tshitaku. Tshibula makunji, azaze mitu ya bonsu. Badi bashala ne muoyi, nembashipeshe ku muele wa mvita. Muntu nansha umue kakunyema, kakupanduka ku lufu." 
Amos9:2 Nansha bimba tshina, babuela mu kandondu ka bafue, nembakuatemu, mbapatulamu. Nansha babanda mu diulu, nembakulule, mbapuekeshe panshi." 
Amos9:3 Nansha baye kusokoma pa mukuna wa Karmele, nembasanganemu, mbakuata. Nansha baye kubutama muinshi mua mayi manene bua tshiyi mbamona kabidi, nembatumine nyoka munene wa mu mayi, aye kubasuma muine amu." 
Amos9:4 Padi baluishi babu babakuata, baya nabu kuabu kule, mu bupika, nentume diyi bua babashipe kuine aku. Nembabambishe miaba yonsu, ki mbua kubambuluisha nansha, kadi bua kubabutula.”" 
Amos9:5 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, udi ulenga buloba amu ne munu, bukadi buzakala, bukadi bubanda, bupueka, bu mayi mu musulu wa Nile, bonsu badi basombamu badila muadi." 
Amos9:6 Mvidi Mukulu mmuibake nzubu yende mu diulu, mmubuikile buloba ne tshibuashibuashi. Mmubikile mayi, apatuke mu mayi manene, bua aatangalaje pa buloba. Dina diende ke Maweja-Nangila." 
Amos9:7 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bena Izrayele, nudi nuela meji ne: mushinga wenu ku mesu anyi, udi upita wa bena Kushe anyi? Nudi nuamba bimpe ne: ndi munupatule mu Ejipitu! Kadi bena Peleshete tshiena mubapatule mu Kaftore, ne bena Arame mu Kire anyi?”" 
Amos9:8 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi utentekela ditunga dia Izrayele, didibu baludika kudi bakalenga bena tshibawu. Udi wamba ne: “Nengumushe bukalenga ebu pa buloba. Kadi tshiena musue kubutula ndelanganyi yonsu ya Yakobe nansha." 
Amos9:9 Mpindiewu ndi ntuma diyi: batangalaje bena Izrayele munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu, bua kubasenga, mudibu basenga ntete, nsoka yonsu mishale mu munyingu." 
Amos9:10 Munkatshi mua bantu banyi, mvita neishipe bonsu badi bena tshibawu, badi baditemba, bambila muambi ne: Mvidi Mukulu kakututumina makenga audi utukanyina nawu nansha!”" 
Amos9:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Tshimenga tshia Davide, tshidi bu nzubu mumane kupuka. Kadi dituku dikuabu, nengasulule tshimenga. Nengibakulule bitupa bia tshimana tshiatshi, bivuabu bashimbule mu mvita. Nendongolole nzubu yonsu bimpe, tshimenga tshipete lumu luatshi lua kale." 
Amos9:12 Diba adi, bena Izrayele nebakuate tshiakabidi matunga, avua anyi ku kale, a bena Edome, ne a bena bisamba bikuabu. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi njadika nanku. Nenkumbaje kabidi bindi ngamba.”" 
Amos9:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Matuku adi kumpala, ntete neimene, ibobe lukasa, babidime ne banowi balondangane lukasa. Amu bamane kumiamina ntete, nebapole tumuma tua mvinyo, bua kukama maluvu, Diba adi maluvu neavulangane, apueka mu bibandabanda, abolesha mikuna yonsu." 
Amos9:14 Nempingaje bantu banyi kuabu. Nebasulule bimenga bivuabu banyange. Nebasombemu, bavulangana. Nebakune mionji ya mvinyo, banua maluvu a ku madimi abu. Nebakune mitshi ya bimuma, badia bimuma biayi." 
Amos9:15 Nenjamije bantu banyi, mu buloba budi buabu. Kabena mua kubipata kabidi, mu buloba bundi mbapingajila. Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu ndi nnumanyisha nanku.”" 
Obadiah1:1 Telejayi bivua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu mumanyishe Obadya, bua kukanyina bena Edome. Maweja-Nangila kutuma muntu ne mukenji, kudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Tuetu kumvua muntu awu wamba ne: “Jukayi, tuye kuluisha bena Edome.”" 
Obadiah1:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila bena Edome ne: “Ku bisamba bionsu nuenu nenuikale tshisamba tshidi katshiyi ne bukole. Bantu bonsu nebanupetule. 
Obadiah1:3 Nudi nuditambisha, kadi nudi nudidinga. Nudi basombe pa mikuna mu mabue, miaba idi bantu kabayi mua kufika. Nudi nudiamba ne: ‘Nganyi watupatula? Nganyi watusakila panshi?’" 
Obadiah1:4 Nansha nuenu banangapale mulu bu nyunyi ya tshiminyi, nansha nuenu bibakile disua dienu munkatshi mua mitotu, nennukulule. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Obadiah1:5 Pikala bivi anyi bapawudi ba bintu bafike ku nzubu kuebe butuku, nebangate bionsu bidibu mua kuya nabi. Kuakushala ne tshintu to! Pikala banowi bafike mu budimi buebe bua nwinyo, kabakushiya bintu bia kupumbulula to." 
Obadiah1:6 Eyi, nuenu ndelanganyi ya Esawu, bintu bienu bionsu nebabipawule, nansha biuma bienu binuvua basokoke, nebabipete baye nabi." 
Obadiah1:7 Bonsu banuvua batue nabu ndondu, mbanubenge. Badi banuipata mu ditunga dienu. Bavua balunda benu, badi banukuate ku bupika. Banuvua nudia nabu ku mesa, badi banuteya. Badi banuamba ne: ‘mBantu batatakane!’" 
Obadiah1:8 Nanku meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba ne: Dituku dingafika munda, nembutule bena meji badi mu Edome. Tshiena nshiya muena lungenyi nansha umue, pa mikuna ya Esawu." 
Obadiah1:9 Wewe tshimenga tshia Temane, bilobu biebe bia myita nebikuatshike bowa. Bena myita ba mu ditunga diebe, nebabashipe bonsu." 
Obadiah1:10 “Nuvua baluishe bana benu, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe babashipe, bapawule bintu biabu. Nanku bundu nebunukuate. Nebanubutule kashidi." 
Obadiah1:11 Nuvua bamone, muvua baluishi batshimuna bana benu, babuela mu tshimenga tshiabu. Pavua baluishi batshinka, babanyangana bubanji bua mu Yerushalayime, nuenu kabidi nuvua benza momumue." 
Obadiah1:12 Nuenu bena Edome, kanuvua mua kusanka, pavua bana benu bena Yuda mu dikenga. Kanuvua mua kuseka, pavuabu bababutula. Kanutua mua kubapenda, pavuabu bapampakana." 
Obadiah1:13 Kanuvua mua kubuela mu tshimenga tshia bantu banyi, pavuabu batshibutula. Kanuvua mua kutangila, kusanka, pavua makenga mabakuate. Kanuvua mua kunyenga bubanji buabu, pavua baluishi babapawula." 
Obadiah1:14 Dituku edi dia dikenga, kanuvua mua kujika masangu a njila, kualamina bavua banyema, kubashipa, kukuata bakuabu, kubafila kudi baluishi." 
Obadiah1:15 Bualu dituku, dindi meme Maweja-Nangila ndumbuluisha bantu bonsu, dikadi pa buipi. Nanku nebanuenzele bionsu binuvua benzele bantu bakuabu. Bubi buenu nebunupinganyine." 
Obadiah1:16 “Nuenu bena Izrayele, mvua mununyoke, pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila, mununuishe dikopu dia tshiji tshianyi. Nanku bisamba bikuabu, nembinuishe kabidi dikopu adi. Nebikenge anu kukenga, too ne muabutukabi butubutuu." 
Obadiah1:17 Nanku bantu badi bashala ne muoyi, nebasombe mu Siyone. Mukuna wanyi awu newikale tshiakabidi wa tshijila. Ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, neyipingane mu ditunga diayi, divuabu babanyenge." 
Obadiah1:18 Ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ne ya Yozefe neyikale bu kapia. Neyoshe ndelanganyi ya Esawu, bu mudibu bosha bisosa. Nebababutule bonsu, kakuyi muntu ushala ne muoyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Obadiah1:19 Bena Yuda badi basombele kuinshi mu ditunga, nebakuate ditunga dia mikuna dia bena Edome. Badi luseke ludi diba dibuelela, nebakuate ditunga dia bena Peleshete. Bena Izrayele nebakuate ditunga dia bena Efrayime, ne tshimenga tshia Samariya. Bena Binyamine nebakuate ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
Obadiah1:20 Bena Izrayele ba ku mutu wa ditunga bayua bumuke mu bupika, bungi bu tshiluilu tshia bushiwa, nebakuate ditunga dia Fenisiya too ne tshimenga tshia Sarepta. Bena Yerushalayime bavua mu bupika mu Sefarade, nebakuate bimenga bia kuinshi mu ditunga." 
Obadiah1:21 Bobu bamane kutshimuna, nebabande pa mukuna wa Siyone, bua kuikalabu bamfumu ba bena Edome. Ke mudi Maweja-Nangila ujadika bumfumu buende nanku." 
Jonah1:1 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yona, muana wa Amitayi, ne:" 
Jonah1:2 — Juka, uye mu tshimenga tshinene tshia Ninive. Ukanyine bena tshimenga atshi mu dina dianyi, bualu tshiena musue kumona kabidi buenzayi bua bantu abu." 
Jonah1:3 Kadi Yona kujuka bua kuya ku Tarshishe, unyema Maweja-Nangila. Ufika ku Yafa, kusanganaye buatu buvua pamue ne kuya ku Tarshishe. Nanku, kufutaye, kubuela mu buatu bua kuya ku ditunga adi, unyema Maweja-Nangila." 
Jonah1:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila kutuma tshipepele tshikole pa mayi manene. Mavuala makole kujuka. Buatu buvua pamue ne kupandika. 
Jonah1:5 Nanku, bitshi ba buatu kukuatshika bowa bukole. Muntu yonsu uvua ulomba wende nwidie, wela mbila, bua tshipepele tshibutame. Pashishe kuimanshabu bintu bionsu bivua mu buatu mu mayi manene, bua buatu bupepele. Kadi Yona uvua anu mulale tulu tukole mu bibeya bia muinshi mua buatu." 
Jonah1:6 Nanku, mulombodi wa bitshi ba buatu kusangana Yona mulale tulu, kumukonkaye ne: — Udi wenza tshinyi? Udi amu mulale tulu? Juka, ulombe webe nwidie, bumue udi mua kutuambuluisha, tupanduke ku tshipepele etshi!" 
Jonah1:7 Pashishe, bitshi ba buatu kuambilangana ne: — Tutshinkayi, bua kujadika muntu udi mudikebele dikenga edi. Bobu kutshinka, kupeta Yona." 
Jonah1:8 Kumuambilabu ne: — Udi mudikebele diakabi! Utumvuije mudi luendu luebe! Udi ufuma penyi? Udi wa mu ditunga kaayi? Udi muena tshisamba kaayi? 
Jonah1:9 Yona kubandamuna ne: — Ndi muena Ebrewu, ndi nnemeka Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wa mu diulu, uvua mufuke mayi manene, ne buloba." 
Jonah1:10 Yona kubajadikila kabidi ne: ndi nnyema Maweja-Nangila. Biitshi ba buatu bumvua nanku, kukuatshikabu bowa. Ke kukonkabu Yona ne: — Udi unyema Maweja-Nangila bua tshinyi?" 
Jonah1:11 Tuenze nebe tshinyi, bua mavuala abatame, tupete dikisha! Bualu mayi atshivua ela amu kuela mavuala." 
Jonah1:12 Yona kubambila ne: — Nsakilayi mu mayi, bua mavuala abatame. Ndi mumanye ne: bua bubi buanyi ke budi tshipepele etshi tshikole tshinukuata." 
Jonah1:13 Kadi, bitshi ba buatu bavua anu bita muabu muonsu, bakeba kufika ku dilobu. Kadi kabavua bakumbaja bualu to. Bualu mavuala avua enda apita bukole." 
Jonah1:14 Pashishe, bitshi ba buatu kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, bela mbila ne: — Eyi, Maweja-Nangila kutushipeshi bualu bua muntu ewu to. Kavua mutuenzele bibi. Kadi kuteki lufu luende pambidi petu. Wewe udi Maweja-Nangila. Tshiudi musue ke tshiudi ukumbaja." 
Jonah1:15 Pashishe bobu kusakila Yona mu mayi. Diakamue mayi kubutama. 
Jonah1:16 Biitshi ba buatu bamone nanku, kutshinabu Maweja-Nangila bikole. Kumulambulabu nyama. Kumulayabu mua kumuenzela mudimu." 
Jonah2:1 Maweja-Nangila kutuma mushipa munene. Kuminawu Yona. Kushalaye munda mua mushipa matuku asatu munya ne butuku. 
Jonah2:2 Pavua Yona munda mua mushipa, uvua utendelela Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wende, wamba ne:" 
Jonah2:3 Mu dikenga didi dinkuate edi, ndi nkubikila wewe Maweja-Nangila wanyi; ke wewe kunteleja. Nkavua nkeba kubuela muaba wa bafue. Mvua mulombe bua ungambuluishe; wewe kumvua diyi dianyi." 
Jonah2:4 Uvua mungele mu mayi, muinshi mua mayi mondoke. Mayi avua mannyungulule, mavuala ampitshila pa mutu misangu ne misangu." 
Jonah2:5 Meme kuela meji ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi mungipate ku mesu kuende. Mesu anyi neamone kabidi nzubu webe wa tshijila anyi?” 
Jonah2:6 Mayi avua mankuate mu nshingu. Mavuala a muinshi mua mayi avua mangele munkatshi. Milembuelembue ivua munjingile ku mutu. 
Jonah2:7 Mvua mudine mu mayi too ne kasuki, kufika ne ku tshitaku tshia mikuna. Bakavua banginjidila biibi bia nzubu wa lufu. Kadi anu wewe Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi, ke uvua mumpatule mu dijimba edi ne muoyi." 
Jonah2:8 Nansha pamvua nkeba kufua, mvua amu nkuvuluka, Maweja-Nangila wanyi. Mitendelelu yanyi mmifike kuudi, ku nzubu webe wa tshijila." 
Jonah2:9 Badi batendelela nwidie ya dishima, kabena mua kupanda to." 
Jonah2:10 Kadi meme ndi nkuimbila misambu, nkulambula milambu, nkuela tuasakidila. Nenkumbaje bionsu bindi mukulaye. Eyowa, wewe Maweja-Nangila, ke Mumpandishi wanyi!" 
Jonah2:11 Nanku, Maweja-Nangila kutumina mushipa diyi, kulukilawu Yona ku muelelu wa mayi." 
Jonah3:1 Maweja-Nangila kuambila Yona tshiakabidi ne: 
Jonah3:2 — Juka, uye mu tshimenga tshinene tshia Ninive, umanyishe benatshi malu onsu andi mukuambile." 
Jonah3:3 Musangu ewu, Yona kuitaba bivua Maweja-Nangila mumuambile, kuya ku Ninive. Ninive uvua tshimenga tshipite bunene. Bua kutshikosolola, bivua bikengela luendu lua matuku asatu." 
Jonah3:4 Yona mumane kuenda dituku dimue mu tshimenga tshia Ninive, uvua ukobola muaku, wamba ne: “Matuku makumi anayi mamane kupita, Ninive neabutuke.”" 
Jonah3:5 Nanku, bantu ba mu tshimenga atshi, kuitababu dilongesha dia Mvidi Mukulu, kujilabu biakudia, kuluatabu bonsu, bapele ne babanji, bilamba bikayapale." 
Jonah3:6 Lumu alu kufika kudi mukalenga wa tshimenga tshia Ninive. Yeye kujuka mu nkuasa wende wa bumfumu, kuvula bilamba bia bukalenga, kuluata bilamba bikayapale, kusomba panshi mu butu." 
Jonah3:7 Pashishe mukalenga kuela mukenji mu tshimenga tshijima tshia Ninive ne: “Mu dina dianyi meme, ne dia balombodi banyi ba mu bukalenga, muntu nansha umue, nansha bimuna mene, kanuena mua kudia kantu nansha kamue, nansha kunua mayi to." 
Jonah3:8 Bantu ne bimuna, nudi ne bua kuvuala bilamba bikayapale. Bonsu nutendelele Mvidi Mukulu ne muoyi mujima. Muntu yonsu umuke mu njila wa malu mabi, alekele buenzayi buvuaye nabu." 
Jonah3:9 Bumue Mvidi Mukulu udi mua kushintulula meji ende, kutuyisha tshiji tshiende tshinene, tushale ne muoyi.”" 
Jonah3:10 Maweja-Nangila kumona muvua bena Ninive balekela buenzayi buabu. Nanku, kutuyishaye tshiji tshivuaye natshi. Kulekelaye mua kubanyoka nuwuaye mubakanyine." 
Jonah4:1 Yona umona nanku, kufikaye munda bikole menemene." 
Jonah4:2 Kuambilaye Maweja-Nangila ne: — Kia! Maweja-Nangila, ke tshimvua ntshina etshi, pamvua kuetu. Ke mumvua munyeme bua kuya ku Tarshishe. Mvua mumane kumanya bimpe ne: wewe udi Mvidi Mukulu wa luse ne dinanga. Udi muena lutulu. Dinanga diebe kadiena ne ndekelu. Udi amu musue kulekela kukumbaja biuvua mukanyine nabi bantu." 
Jonah4:3 Maweja-Nangila, mpindiewu ndi nkusengelela ne: ungumushe panu. Bualu mbimpe meme kufua pamutu pa kushala ne muoyi." 
Jonah4:4 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Yona ne: — Udi ufika munda pa bualu anyi? 
Jonah4:5 Yona kusunuka mu tshimenga, kuya kusomba luseke ludi diba dipatukila luatshi. Kuasaye kazubu kakese ka kuikishila, bua kubandila bionsu bivua mua kuenzeka mu tshimenga." 
Jonah4:6 Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila kumenesha mutshi uvua ubanda bikole, bua Yona amone mua kusomba mu dileji diawu, kupua muoyi ku kanyinganyinga kavuaye naku. Yona kusanka bikole bua mutshi awu." 
Jonah4:7 Butshia dinda, pa kabundubundu, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma tshishi. Kudiatshi mutshi awu, mutshi kufuba." 
Jonah4:8 Diba dimane kubanda, Mvidi Mukulu kutuma lupepele lua luya, lufumine ku luseke ludi diba dipatukila. Kupulalu mutshi awu. Munya mukole kuosha Yona mu mutu. Kusuaye kufua tshipuka. Nanku Yona kujinga lufu, wamba ne: “Mbimpe meme kufua pa mutu pa kushala ne muoyi.”" 
Jonah4:9 Mvidi Mukulu kukonka kabidi Yona ne: — Udi ufika munda bua mutshi ewu, pa bualu anyi? Yona kuandamuna ne: — Eyowa, ndi mufike munda pa bualu, ndi mua kufua mene." 
Jonah4:10 Maweja-Nangila kukonka Yona ne: — Telejaku. Wewe kuena mukune mutshi awu, kuena muubandishe, kuena munkuatshile mudimu. Mutshi ewu mmutoloke butuku, butshia dinda kupukawu. Kadi udi amu unyingalala bualu buawu." 
Jonah4:11 Nanku, meme tshiena mua kufuila tshimenga tshinene tshia Ninive luse anyi? Mu tshimenga emu mudi bantu bapite pa binunu lukama ne makumi abidi, badi kabayi bamanye mua kudisunguluila bidi bibalengelela, mudi kabidi bimuna bipite bungi." 
Micah1:1 Telejayi bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Mika, muena mu musoku wa Moreshete, mu tshikondu tshiwa Yotame, Akaze, ne Izkiya, bakalenga ba mu Yuda. Maweja-Nangila uvua mumuleje malu adi atangila bimenga bibidi: tshia Samariya ne tshia Yerushalayime." 
Micah1:2 Nuenu bisamba bionsu, telejayi. Buloba ne bionsu bidipu, teyayi matshi. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi ulua kunufunda, utumina mu nzubu wende wa tshijila." 
Micah1:3 Maweja-Nangila udi upatuka muaba udiye musombe. Udi utuluka, wendela pa mikuna ya buloba." 
Micah1:4 Padiye upita, mikuna idi ilandakana, bibandabanda bidi bipanduluka, mudi mafuta enguluka ku kapia, mudi mayi apulumuka pa kakuna." 
Micah1:5 Maweja-Nangila udi ufika bua kulumbuluisha bantu, bualu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe ivua imutombokela, bena Izrayele benza malu mabi. Udi utombuesha bena Izrayele nnganyi? Ke Samariya, tshimenga tshiabu tshikulu! Udi usaka bena Yuda bua batendelele mvidie pa mikuna nnganyi? Ke bena Yerushalayime mene!" 
Micah1:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bua malu aa, nengandamune Samariya, ashale dikolu, muaba udibu bakuna mionji ya mvinyo. Nembunguluje mabue ende, aye muinshi mua lupongu. Nemmueneshe bitaku biende patoke." 
Micah1:7 Mpingu yende yonsu nebayishimbule. Neboshe bintu bia disanka bivuaye mupete. Nentshibule mpingu ya mvidie yende yonsu bitupa, bualu uvua musumbe bintu ebi bionsu, ne makuta avuabu bamufuta mu buendenda. Bionsu abi nebabiangate, bua kufuta bena buendenda bakuabu. ”" 
Micah1:8 Pandi ngela meji ku bionsu abi, meme Mika, ndi ngasa muadi, ndi ndila, ntua mikemu. Ndi ngenda butaka, ku makasa kutupu. Ndi ngela mikunda, bu nyama ya mibuabua, ntua mikemu ngabakana bu nyunyi ya mikolu mile." 
Micah1:9 Mituutu idibu batuuta Samariya, idi imubutula kashidi. Baluishi mbabuele ne mu ditunga dia Yuda, mbafike ku biibi bia Yerushalayime, kudi bantu banyi basombe." 
Micah1:10 Kanuambi bualu ebu mu tshimenga tshia Ngate, kanudidimu muadi ne diyi dikole. Mu Bete-Leyafra, nudibonde mu lupuishi, bu bantu badi mu madilu." 
Micah1:11 Nuenu badi basombe mu Shafire, muangalayi, nunyeme ne bundu, kanuyi bia kuvuala! Badi basomba mu Saanane, kabena bakimina kupatuka mu tshimenga. Badi badila mu tshimenga tshia Bete-Eshele, bualu nansha munda mua tshimenga mudi amu njiwu." 
Micah1:12 Badi basomba mu Marote, badi bazakala bua bintu biabu bidibu mua kujimija. Dikenga didi Maweja-Nangila utuma, ndifike ne ku biibi bia Yerushalayime. Nedibuele ne mu ditunga dijima dia Yuda." 
Micah1:13 Nuenu badi basomba mu Lakishe, suikayi tubalu tuenu ku matempu, nunyeme. Nudi bidikije malu mabi, avua Izrayele muenze. Ke munuvua batombuesha Yerushalayime." 
Micah1:14 Nanku, nudi ne bua kutapulukangana ne badi basomba mu Moreshe-Ngate. Tshimenga tshia Akzibe katshiena mua kuambuluisha kabidi bakalenga ba bena Izrayele nansha kakese." 
Micah1:15 Nuenu badi basomba mu Maresha, Maweja-Nangila neanufile kudi muntu mupiamupia udi unutshimuna. Bamfumu ba lumu ba mu Izrayele, nebaye kusokoma mu nyongolu wa Adulame." 
Micah1:16 Nuenu badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, nubeye nsuki, nukungule mu mutu, mushale dibala, bu dia mukanku. Nudile bana benu banudi bananga: bualu nebaye nabu kule mu bupika." 
Micah2:1 Bantu badi bela meji butuku, badilongolola bua kuenza malu mabi, butshia baakumbaja, bualu badi ne bukole bua kuenza, mbena diakabi." 
Micah2:2 Padibu bajinga madimi a bende, badi baangata ku bukole. Padibu balakana nzubu ya bakuabu, badi bayinyenga bantu ku bukole. Badi biba bintu bia muntu, ne bia bena diku diabu, banyenga bantu maloba abu." 
Micah2:3 Ke padi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: “Ndi nnulongoluela dikenga dinene. Kanuena mua kudipanduka, kanuena mua kuditambisha kabidi, bualu diba dia dikenga dikadi difika.”" 
Micah2:4 Tshikondu atshi, nebimbe musambu, nebanuelele kasala ka muadi ne; “Eyi! Mbatubutule bonsu. Mbanyenge tshisamba tshietu maloba atshi. Badi batuipata mu madimi etu, badi baabanyangana. Mbatunyenge bintu bietu bua tshinyi? ”" 
Micah2:5 Nanku muntu wa kunudi nansha umue, kakupeta buloba budi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila babanyangana. Kanuakupeta muaba munkatshi muabu." 
Micah2:6 Bamue badi bangamba ne: “Lekela kuakula nanku! Udi ukolesha malu! Bilumbu biudi utuasa mbia patupu! 
Micah2:7 Bena Izrayele, mbabatshipe anyi? Maweja-Nangila kena ne lutulu anyi? Utu ne tshibidilu tshia kulujimija anyi?” Kadi meyi anyi adi alengelela amu bantu badi benda mu njila udi Mvidi Mukulu muanyishe." 
Micah2:8 Kadi nuenu, Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Nudi badienza baluishi ba bambi banyi. Bantu badi benda talala mu njila, kabayi benzela bakuabu bibi, nudi nubanyenga tshinkutu tshiabu." 
Micah2:9 Nudi nuipata bakaji ba bantu banyi, mu nzubu idibu banange. Nudi nunyenga bana babu kashidi diakalenga ne lumu bimvua mubapeshe." 
Micah2:10 Jukayi! Umukayi! Dikisha dienu diajiki! Malu mabi anuvua benze, neanukebele makenga makole mapite!”" 
Micah2:11 Muntu kampanda neamueneke, wamba biambamba, unudinga ne: “Ndi nnumanyisha ne: nenupete mvinyo, ne maluvu makole.” Ke muambi mubule meji, udi mukumbanyine bantu aba!" 
Micah2:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuenu ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, nennusangishe bonsu. Nuenu badi bashale ne muoyi mu Izrayele, nennukunguje. Nennusangishe muaba umue, bu mikoku mu lupangu luayi, bu tshisumbu tshia nyama mu mpata. Nennuenze tshisumbu tshimue tshia bantu bavule." 
Micah2:13 Mvidi Mukulu udi upanda njila. Neende kumpala kuenu. Mbamane kunupikula. Nudi nudipandila njila, nupatuka, nuya! Maweja-Nangila mukalenga wenu, ke udi unulombola.”" 
Micah3:1 Nuenu bamfumu ba ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, nuenu bakoshi ba nsambu ba bena Izrayele, ndi nnukonka ne: “Mudimu wenu kawena wa kukosa nsambu pa yoyi anyi?" 
Micah3:2 Kadi, nudi nukina malu mimpe, nunanga malu mabi! Nudi nuvula bantu too ne ku dikoba dia pambidi! Nudi nutula too ne minyinyi idi ku mifuba yabu.”" 
Micah3:3 Nudi nudia munyinyi wa bantu banyi. Nudi nuvula dikoba diabu, nuzaza mifuba yabu, nukosa munyinyi wabu mabulu mabulu, bu mudibu bakosa munyinyi udibu bela mu luesu." 
Micah3:4 Nanku bobu badidila Maweja-Nangila bua abambuluishe, Maweja-Nangila kena ubumvuila. Kadi neabakome nyima, bua malu mabi avuabu benze." 
Micah3:5 Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba, bua bambi badi badinga bantu banyi. Udi wamba ne: “Bambi badi bambila bantu ne: ditalala didiku, amu padibu babafuta difutu dia bungi. Kadi muntu udi kayi ubapesha biakudia, badi bamuluisha mvita." 
Micah3:6 Nenku, nuenu bambi, tshiakunuleja kabidi malu adi kumpala, tshiakunumanyisha kabidi tshindi musue. Miidima neyinunyunguluke. Butuku nebunuvuile. Kanuakumona kabidi tshintu, bu dituku didi diba dimane kubuela.”" 
Micah3:7 Bantu bonsu badi bamba malu adi kaayi manji kuenzeka, nebadibuikile bilamba ku mesu, bua kusokoka bundu buabu, bualu Mvidi Mukulu kena ukumbaja bidibu bamba." 
Micah3:8 Kadi meme ndi ne bukole bua bungi. Maweja-Nangila mmunguwuje ne Mueyelu wende. Ndi ndongesha bantu ne muoyi mukole, mbambila bidibu ne bua kuenza. Ndi mbela bena Izrayele, ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, bua balekele kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, bakumbaje tshidiye musue." 
Micah3:9 Ndi nnubela nuenu, bamfumu ba ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, ne bakoshi ba nsambu ba bena Izrayele. Nudi nubenga kuenza malu mimpe, nukosa bilumbu bibi." 
Micah3:10 Nudi nuibaka Yerushalayime, tshimenga tshia Mvidi Mukulu, ne mashi a bantu banudi nushipa, ne bintu bia banudi nukengesha." 
Micah3:11 Bakoshi ba nsambu badi balumbuluisha bantu, amu padibu bamane kudia mabuejila. Batuangaji badi balongesha mikenji, amu bua kupeta difutu. Bambi badi bambila bantu malu, amu bamane kupeta makuta. Kadi badi badiamba ne: “Tudi bantu ba Maweja-Nangila! Maweja-Nangila udi netu! Bualu bubi nansha bumue kabuena mua kutukuata.”" 
Micah3:12 Nanku bualu buenu, Siyone neikale bu budimi, budibu babundulula ne lukasu. Yerushalayime neashale makolu. Mukuna wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu nebaubuikile kudi tshipuka." 
Micah4:1 Dituku nedifike, didi mukuna, muaba udibu base nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, upita mikuna mikuabu yonsu. Nebaushindike bikole. Bisamba bia bantu nebipuilemu bia bungi." 
Micah4:2 Bisamba bia bungi bia bantu nebiyemu. Nebambilangane ne: “Tuyayi ku mukuna wa Maweja-Nangila, tubuelayi mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa Yakobe. Yeye neatulongeshe tshitudi ne bua kuenza, tuetu netulonde njila udiye utuleja. Bualu dilongesha dia Maweja-Nangila didi difuma mu Siyone, bidiye wamba bidi bipatuka mu Yerushalayime." 
Micah4:3 Yeye nealumbuluishe bisamba bia bantu ba bungi. Neakose bilumbu bia bisamba binene, nansha bidi kule mene. Miele yabu ya mvita, nebayifule nkasu ya kudima nayi. Mafuma abu, nebaafule miele ya kusolela nayi matamba a mionji ya mvinyo. Tshisamba katshiena tshiluisha kabidi tshikuabu. Bantu kabena balonga kabidi mua kuluangana mvita." 
Micah4:4 Kadi yonsu neadime talala budimi buende bua mvinyo ne bua mitshi ya olive. Kakuena muntu nansha umue, udi ukuatshisha mukuabu bowa.” Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba nanku." 
Micah4:5 Muntu yonsu mu tshisamba tshiende, udi ukeba kusankisha mvidie yende. Kadi tuetu tudi tukeba kusankisha Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wetu tshiendelele." 
Micah4:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Dituku nedifike, dindi nsangisha badi batapika mputa, dindi mpingaja mu matunga abu, bamvua mukengeshe, mutume mu bupika." 
Micah4:7 Nensangishe badi batapike, tshisamba tshifululuke. Nengangate badi mu bupika, bashale tshisamba tshinene. Meme Maweja-Nangila, nengikale ku mutu kuabu, biangatshile ku Siyone, ku dituku adi too ne tshiendelele." 
Micah4:8 Wewe, mukuna wa Yerushalayime, udi ulama bantu bimpe, bu mudi kaleya ka kutentekela baluishi, neupete tshiakabidi bumfumu buebe, buuvua nabu kale. Yerushalayime neikale tshiakabidi, tshimenga tshikulu tshia bukalenga.”" 
Micah4:9 — Nuenu bena mu Yerushalayime, nudi nudila nanku mpindiewu bua tshinyi? Nudi nudinyenga bu mukaji ukeba kulela bua tshinyi? Kanuena kabidi ne mukalenga anyi? Bafidi benu ba ngenyi mbamane kulua anyi?" 
Micah4:10 — Eyowa! Nudinyenge, bu mudi mukaji udi ukeba kulela. Nenupatuke mu tshimenga, nenusombe mu madimi, nenuye too ne mu Babilone. Amu muaba awu ke udibu banusungidila. Maweja-Nangila neanupandishemu kudi baluishi benu." 
Micah4:11 Mpindiewu bisamba bia bungi, mbimane kudisangisha bua kunuluisha. Bidi biamba ne: “Tshimenga tshiabu tshinyanguke, tshifue bundu. Tubandilayi kabutu ka Yerushalayime!”" 
Micah4:12 Bantu aba kabena bamanye tshidi Maweja-Nangila mujadike. Kabena bajingulula meji ende: udi musue kubakunguja, mudibu basangisha bisumbu bia miepu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula, muaba udibu ne bua kuyishipuila." 
Micah4:13 “Nuenu bena mu Yerushalayime, jukayi, shipulayi ntete. Nennukankamike, nushale mudi ngombe udi ne nsengu mikole bu tshiamu, ne bikonu bu tshiamu tshikunze. Nenuboze bantu ba bungi. Nenupawule bintu biabu, nenubijidile mu dina dianyi meme Maweja-Nangila, mfumu wa buloba bujima.”" 
Micah4:14 Kadi mpindiewu, nuenu bena mu Yerushalayime, nuditape nsalu bu badi mu madilu, nudisangishe pamue ne bena mvita benu. Baluishi benu mbanuele munkatshi, badi bakuma mukalenga wa bena Izrayele mutshi mu mpala." 
Micah5:1 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe Betleyeme wa mu Efrata, ku misoku yonsu ya bena meku a Yuda, udi musoku udi ne bantu bakese. Kadi nempatule muntu wa munda muebe, bua alombole mu dina dianyi, tshisamba tshia bena Izrayele. Muntu awu uvuaku ku kale ne kalele.”" 
Micah5:2 Maweja-Nangila nealekele bantu bende mu bianza bia baluishi babu, too ne ku tshikondu tshidi mukaji udi kulu ulela muana wa balume. Diba adi bantu badi bashala ne muoyi mu bupika, nebapingane mu ditunga diabu, bua kudisangisha ne bena Izrayele bakuabu." 
Micah5:3 Yeye ke mfumu uvuabu babalaye. Nealombole bantu bende ne muoyi mukole. Nealeje bukole buende, ne butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wende. Bantu ba tshisamba tshiende nebasombe mu ditalala, bualu nebitabe bumfumu buende too ne ku nshikidilu kua buloba." 
Micah5:4 Yeye neafile ditalala. — Pikala bena Ashure bafika bua kukuata ditunga dietu, babuela mu nzubu ya bakalenga betu, netubatumine bamfumu tshisumbu tshinene bua kubaluisha." 
Micah5:5 Nebadie bumfumu mu buloba bua bena Ashure. Nebakuate ditunga dia Nemrode, ne bia mvita ku bianza. Mukalenga wetu neatusungidile kudi bena Ashure, padibu basambuka mikalu, babuela mu ditunga dietu." 
Micah5:6 — Bena Izrayele badi bashala ne muoyi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bungi, nebikale bu lumuma ludi Maweja-Nangila ulokesha, bu mvula ulokela pa bisosa. Kabena balomba bantu tshintu, badi batekemena amu Maweja-Nangila." 
Micah5:7 — Bena Izrayele badi bashala ne muoyi munkatshi mua bisamba bia bungi, nebikale ne bukole bu bua nyama wa ntambue munkatshi mua nyama ya muitu, nansha munkatshi mua tshisumbu tshia mikoku. Muaba onsu udiye upita, udi uyikuata, uyisunsula, kakuyi muntu umunyengayi." 
Micah5:8 “Eyowa, luisha baluishi bebe, ubashipe, ubasunsule!" 
Micah5:9 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Dituku didi kumpala, nembutule tubalu tuenu, nenjimije matempu enu a mvita." 
Micah5:10 Nennyange bimenga bia mu ditunga dienu, nengupule nzubu yenu yonsu idibu bakolesha ne bimana." 
Micah5:11 Nengumbushe malu anudi nuenza a majimbu, kanuakuikala kabidi ne muntu udi ukeba kunujinguluila malu adi kumpala, pa ngendu ya mitotu ne bia mulu muamua." 
Micah5:12 Nengupule mvidie yenu panshi, ne bibumba bia mabue binudi bibake. Kanuakutendelela kabidi bintu binudi badienzela nkayenu." 
Micah5:13 Nentule makunji enu a kutendelela nawu mvidie. Nembutule bimenga bienu. 
Micah5:14 Nemfike munda, nensombuele bisamba bia bantu, bivua kabiyi bintumikila.”" 
Micah6:1 Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wamba ne: Uye kuela lubila lukole, mikuna minene ne mikese miumvue, bua kuleja mundi mbinga, bantu banyi bapila." 
Micah6:2 Nuenu mikuna minene, telejayi, nuenu bitaku bidi kabiyi binyunga, bidi buloba bueyemena. Maweja-Nangila udi ufunda bantu bende ku tshilumbu. Udi musue bua baleje patoke bivuabu benza." 
Micah6:3 Udi wamba ne: “Nuenu bantu banyi, mbubi kaayi bundi munuenzele? Ndi munutonde ku thinyi? Nungambile!" 
Micah6:4 Nudi nuntompuela, bualu mvua munupatule mu Ejipitu, munupikule mu bupika, munutumine Moshe, Arone ne Miriyame bua kunulombola anyi?" 
Micah6:5 Bantu banyi, nuvuluke mianda ya kale! Balake, mukalenga wa bena Mowabe, uvua muele meji a kunuenzela bibi. Nuvuluke bivuabu bamuandamune kudi Balaame, muana wa Beyore. Pashishe mvua muende nenu, biangatshile ku Shitime too ne ku Ngilgale. Nanku nuvua bamone malu mimpe, andi meme Maweja-Nangila munuenzele.”" 
Micah6:6 “Tufike ne mulambu kaayi, patudi tuya kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu Muena Kulu? Tufike ne milambu ya kuosha, ya bana ba ngombe ba tshidimu tshimue anyi?" 
Micah6:7 Maweja-Nangila udi ujinga bimpanga bungi kabuyi kubala, nansha mafuta adi apueka, bungi bu misulu idi kayiyi ikama anyi? Tumulambule bana bute betu, bua atujimijile mibi yetu, ne malu mabi atuvua bamuenzele anyi?”" 
Micah6:8 Mbanulongeshe binudi ne bua kuenza, bidi Maweja-Nangila ujinga kudi bantu: udi unulomba bua nunemeke bantu ne bintu biabu, nuenzele bakuabu bimpe, nubanange, nuende bimpe mu njila udi Mvidi Mukulu wenu unuleja." 
Micah6:9 Telejayi bidi Maweja-Nangila wambila badi basomba mu tshimenga: Badi bangata mibelu yende ne mushinga, neabasungidile. “Nuenu bena tshisamba tshia Yuda, nuenu bonsu badi badisangisha mu tshimenga, telejayi!" 
Micah6:10 Ndi mua kutangila ne mesu patupu bantu babi, badi buwuja nzubu yabu, ne bintu bivuabu bapete ku dishima, ne ku bipimu bia buivi, bisendame, — ke bindi mbenga — anyi?" 
Micah6:11 Ndi mua kuhingisha, bantu badi ne bipimu bisendame, ne badi bela bujitu bua dishima, mu bibombu biabu anyi?" 
Micah6:12 Babanji badi mu tshimenga etshi, badi bakengesha bantu bakuabu. Bonsu badi basomba mu tshimenga etshi, badi bashima, badingangana." 
Micah6:13 Nenku, ndi mubange kununyoka, nennubutule, bua malu mabi enu." 
Micah6:14 Nenudie, kanuyi nuukuta. Tshiyole netshikale munkatshi muenu! Tshintu tshinuateka mu diyeba, netshinyanguke. Tshintu tshionsu tshinudi nukeba kubumba, nentshibutule mu mvita." 
Micah6:15 Nenukune maminu, kanuyi nunowa. Nenukame bimuma bia olive, kanuyi mua kudilaba mafuta pambidi. Nenukame bimuma bia mvinyo, kadi kanuakunua maluvu." 
Micah6:16 Nenuidikije malu mabi onsu, avua mukalenga Omri wenza ne bena diku dia Akabe, muanende wa balume. Nudi nulonda bilele biabu! Ke pandi mbutula tshimenga tshienu. Nuenu badi basombamu, bantu nebanuseke. Bundu budi bukuata bantu banyi bonsu, nebunukuate kabidi.”" 
Micah7:1 Eyi! Ndi muena diakabi! Ndi bu muntu udi uya kupola bimuma, ku mitshi idibu bamane kupola, bajikija, bu muntu udi uya kukeba tumuma tua mvinyo, bena mudimu bamane kutupola tuonsu. Tshiena musangane nansha kamuma, ku mionji ya mvinyo, nansha ku mutshi wa mfiku. Eku nzala ya kudia tumuma, mvua nayi mipite!" 
Micah7:2 Mu ditunga kamutshiena muntu, udi witaba Mvidi Mukulu, kamutshiena muntu wa nsongu. Bonsu badi bakeba amu kushipangana, baalaminangana mu njila." 
Micah7:3 Badi bamanye bimpe, mudibu mua kuenza malu mabi. Bamfumu ne bakoshi ba nsambu, badi balomba mabuejila. Bantu banene badi bamba majinga abu patoke, bashima bantu bua kuakumbaja." 
Micah7:4 Bu mu mionji ya mpesa tshisumbu, kamuena bualu buimpe nansha bumue munkatshi muabu. Nansha muntu wa kudibu udi ubenga malu mabi, udi mubi mupite lupangu lua mingonga. Kadi dituku dia kununyoka, divua bambi benu banubela nadi, dikadi disemena pabuipi. Bowa mbumane kunukuata." 
Micah7:5 Kanuitabi bena mutumba benu, kanutekemenyi balunda benu. Nudimuke panudi nuakula, nansha ku mesu kua mukajenu, udi ununanga." 
Micah7:6 Bualu muana wa balume udi upenda tatuende. Nsongakaji udi uluisha mamuende. Mukaji wa muana udi utombokela mamuenende. Bena diku dia muntu ke baluishi bende. 
Micah7:7 Kadi meme ndi ntangila kudi Maweja-Nangila. Bu mundi ntekemena Mvidi Mukulu, neansungidile. Mvidi Mukulu wanyi neumvue dilomba dianyi." 
Micah7:8 Nuenu baluishi betu, kanutuseki mu dikenga dietu. Nansha tuetu badishinde panshi, netujuke kulu! Nansha tuetu mu midima, Maweja-Nangila udi butoke buetu." 
Micah7:9 Maweja-Nangila mmutunyoke ne tshiiji, bualu tuvua bamuenzele bibi. Kadi diba nedifike didiye utulumbuluisha, utubingisha. Yeye neatupingaje mu butoke, neatuenzele malu mimpe mavule." 
Micah7:10 Pamona baluishi betu malu aa, bundu nebubakuate. Bualu bavua batukonka ne: “Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu, tshidiye wenza ntshinyi?” Nebabadiate mu makasa, bu bitotshi bia mu njila, tuetu netubandile malu aa!" 
Micah7:11 Dituku didibu bibakulula bimana bia tshimenga tshienu tshikulu nedifike. Dituku adi nebasemeje kule mikalu ya buloba buenu. 
Micah7:12 Pashishe, bana benu, nebapingane mu ditunga dienu, bafumina ku bena Ashure ne ku Ejipitu, ku mielelu ya Nile ne Perate, ku mielelu ya mayi manene, ne ku matunga a mikuna." 
Micah7:13 Kadi buloba bukuabu nebushale tshipela, bua malu mabi a badi basombapu." 
Micah7:14 Maweja-Nangila, lombola bantu bebe ne dikombu diebe dia bulami. Badi basomba pa nkayabu, mu buloba budibu kabayi mua kudima, munkatshi mua madimi mimpe adi ku mpenga. Bu muuvua muenze kale, utufikishe mu mpata mimpe ya Bashane, ne mu ditunga dia Ngilaade." 
Micah7:15 Utuenzele malu a kukema, bu tshikondu tshiuvua mutupatule mu Ejipitu." 
Micah7:16 Bisamba bia bantu nebimone bishima ebi. Bundu nebubakuate, nansha bobu bikale ne bukole. Nebakeme, nebapuwe, kabayi bumvue." 
Micah7:17 Nebadie lupuishi, bu mudi nyoka ne bilandadi bionsu. Nebipatuke mu mena abi, nebiye ne luzakalu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, Mvidi Mukulu wetu. Nebatshine bukole buende." 
Micah7:18 Kakuena mvidie nansha umue, udi mukufuane wewe Maweja-Nangila. Udi ufuila bantu bebe badi bashala ne muoyi luse, kuyi musue kuvuluka kashidi bilema biabu. Kuena ulama tshiji matuku onsu. Disanka diebe didi amu dia kutunanga, kutuenzela bimpe." 
Micah7:19 Neutufuile kabidi luse, kuyi uvuluka malu etu mabi. Bubi buetu neubuimanshe muinshi mua mayi manene." 
Micah7:20 Neuleje ndelanganyi ya Abrahame ne ya Yakobe, dinanga diebe didi kadiyi dijika, bu muuvua mulaye bankambua betu ku kale." 
Nahum1:1 Mu mukanda ewu mudi malu avua Mvidi Mukulu mumanyishe muambi Nahume, wa mu musoku wa Elkoshe, bua kukanyina bena tshimenga tshia Ninive." 
Nahum1:2 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa mukawu, udi unyoka bantu badi bamubenga. Udi ne tshiji tshikole, udisombuela kudi baluishi bende, kayi ubafuila luse." 
Nahum1:3 Maweja-Nangila kena ufika munda lukasa, udi ne bukole bupite. Kadi kena ubingisha muntu udi mupile. Padi Maweja-Nangila wenda, tshipepele tshikole tshidi tshijuka. Mavuba ke lupuishi ludiye ujula padiye wenda." 
Nahum1:4 Udi ukanyina mayi manene, uuma. Udi ukamisha misulu yonsu. Mpata mimpe ya mu Bashane ne mitshi ya mu mukuna wa Karmele bidi bifuba. Bilongu bidi pa mukuna wa Lebanone bidi bipopoka." 
Nahum1:5 Mikuna minene idi ikanka kumpala kuende, mikuna mikese idi itenkakana. Padi Mvidi Mukulu umueneka, buloba ne bonsu badi basombapu bidi bizakala." 
Nahum1:6 Padiye mufike munda, udi mua kukandamana nnganyi? Padiye ne tshiji, udi mua kushala ne muoyi udiku anyi? Tshiji tshiende tshidi tshilambuluka bu kapia, mbuebue mene idi ipandika kumpala kuende." 
Nahum1:7 Maweja-Nangila udi ne muoyi muimpe. Badi mu dikenga, badi mua kusokomena kudiye. Badi banyemena kudiye, udi ubalama bimpe," 
Nahum1:8 nansha mu dikenga dikole dipite. Kadi udi ubutula baluishi bende, ubatuma mu kandondu ka bafue." 
Nahum1:9 Nudi nutombokela Maweja-Nangila bua tshinyi? Yeye ke udi ubutula baluishi benu kashidi, kabayi mua kunukengesha tshiakabidi." 
Nahum1:10 Nansha bobu banua maluvu bakuatshika basuikakana pamue bu tshipuka tshia meba a mingonga, nebapie babutuke bu bisosa biume." 
Nahum1:11 Bena Ninive, muntu mmufume mu tshimenga tshienu, udi musue kutombokela Maweja-Nangila, muntu udi ukeba kuenza bibi." 
Nahum1:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila bena Yuda ne: “Baluishi benu, nansha bikale ba bungi, bikale bilobu, nebabutuke, kakuyi kushala muntu. Mvua munukengeshe bikole, kadi tshiakunukengesha kabidi." 
Nahum1:13 Ndi nnupikula mpindiewu, ku bupika bua baluishi benu, nkosa nkanu idibu banusuika.”" 
Nahum1:14 Nuenu bena mu tshimenga tshia Ninive, Maweja-Nangila udi ujadika ne: “Kanuakuikala ne ndelanganyi idi mua kunuinyika mena. Nembutule mpingu ya mitshi nansha ya biamu, idi mu nzubu ya nwidie yenu. Nennumbuile nkita, bualu kanuena ne mushinga ku mesu anyi.”" 
Nahum2:1 Nuenu bena ditunga dia Yuda, tangila muntu udi unuluila pa mikuna, bua kunumanyisha lumu lua disanka lua ne: tudi batshimune baluishi betu, tuapetshi bupole. Enzayi bibilu bienu bia kutendelela, tuadilayi Mvidi Mukulu binuvua bamulaye. Bualu muntu mubi uvua unukengesha awu, kena mua kubuela kabidi ne nwita mu ditunga dienu. Bukole buende bonsu mbujike." 
Nahum2:2 Nuenu bena mu tshimenga tshia Ninive, baluishi benu badi balua bua kunubutula. Bena nwita, lamayi tshimenga tshienu tshinuvua bakoleshe ne bimana, nutentekele ku njila, nudilongolole ku nwita, nusangishe bonsu badi bamanye mua kuluangana." 
Nahum2:3 Bualu Maweja-Nangila ukadi upingajila ndelanganyi ya Yakobe diakalenga diabu. Udi upingajila bena Izrayele lumu luabu. Bualu Izrayele uvua bu budimi bua mvinyo, buvua bapawudi babutule, banyangakaje." 
Nahum2:4 Baluishi mbamane kufika, bikale ne ngabu mikunze kunzuu. Mbavuale bilamba bikunze. Padibu bela mualu wa mvita, badi bafuna ne mafuma. Matempu abu adi akenka bu kapia." 
Nahum2:5 Matempu adi aya ku nwita lubilu, apitshila mu misesu ne mu bisalu, bu nyama mitomboke. Adi akenka bu bimunyi bia kapia, apita lubilu lukole bu mipenya ya mvula." 
Nahum2:6 Mukalenga wa Ninive, udi ubikila balombodi bende ba bena mvita. Kadi badi benda batetuka. Baluishi badi basemena ku tshimana tshia tshimenga, bakuate ngabu wabu bua kudisungidila." 
Nahum2:7 Baluishi badi basakila biibi bia tshimenga, bidi bitangila ku misulu ya mayi. Padibi biunzuluka, diakamue badi babuela, bakuata nzubu wa mukalenga." 
Nahum2:8 Badi bakuata lupingu lua nwidie mukaji, baya nalu. Bena mudimu bakaji bavua balulame, badi batua mikemu bu nyunyi ya nkutshi, badila, badikuma bianza pa tshiadi ne dibungama." 
Nahum2:9 Kale bantu bavua ba bungi mu Ninive, mpindiewu badi banyemamu, bu mudi mayi apueka lubilu, padi nkila ubumbuka. Padibu bamba ne: “Pinganayi, pinganayi!” muntu nansha umue kena ukudimuka." 
Nahum2:10 Pawulayi biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, pawulayi mpawungi! Mu tshimenga mudi bintu bia bungi, bia mushinga mukole, bia mishindu yonsu." 
Nahum2:11 Badi bapawula bintu, banyangakaja tshimenga, batshibutula! Bonsu kuteketa mu maboku, mikolu kukanka, mibidi kuzakala, mpala kutokoloka ne bowa." 
Nahum2:12 Tshimenga tshia Ninive tshivua bu muaba, uvua nyama ya ntambue ilala, muaba uvuayi idisha bana bayi, kayiyi itshina tshintu." 
Nahum2:13 Ntambue mulume uvua uya kukeba nyama, uyishipa, uyisunsula, uyituadila ntambue mukaji ne bana. Uvua uwuja tshidilu tshiende, ne minyinyi ya nyama ivuaye ukuata." 
Nahum2:14 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Nuenu bena Ninive, nennunyoke, nengoshe matempu enu a mvita, ashale butu. Bansongalume benu nebafue mu mvita. Kanuakupawula bintu pa buloba kabidi. Bantu kabakuteleja diyi dia banudi nutuma.”" 
Nahum3:1 Diakabi ndiebe, tshimenga tshia bashipianganyi, tshimamuende wa bivi ne bena dishima, tshidi tshinema ne biuma bia bende, tshipawula katshiyi tshilekela!" 
Nahum3:2 Teleja: mfimbu idi idila, nkata ya matempu yenza mutoyi, nyama ya tubalu inyema, matempu a mvita ashiya tshiona." 
Nahum3:3 Babandi ba pa tubalu badi baya lubilu lukole, miele ya mvita idi ikenka, mafuma adi abalakana. Miaba yonsu tudi tumona bitalu mishiki ne mishiki, bungi kabuyi kubala, bantu badishindilapu!" 
Nahum3:4 Wewe Ninive uvua bu mukaji muena tshiendenda, ulobesha bantu ne buimpe buebe, kabidi ne majimbu ebe. Uvua mukuate bisamba ne matunga ku bupika, mubitekeshe ku buendenda ne majimbu biebe." 
Nahum3:5 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, udi wamba ne: Ninive, nenkunyoke, nenkukopuele bilamba ku mutu, mubandishe too ne ku mpala. Nenkushiye butaka ku mesu a bukua bisamba, bonsu nebakumone muudi." 
Nahum3:6 Nenkubondakaje ne bitotshi, utue bundu. Nebishale tshilejilu tshidi tshikuatshisha bantu bowa!" 
Nahum3:7 Bantu bonsu badi bakumona, nebakunyeme. Nebele mbila ne: “Ninive mmubutuke, wabungama bualu buende nnganyi? Udi mua kumusamba, netumupete penyi?”" 
Nahum3:8 Ninive udi mupite tshimenga tshia Tebe ku mushinga anyi? Bavua batshiase ku muelelu wa musulu wa Nile, mayi matshiele munkatshi, atshilama bimpe, bu mudi tshimana tshilama tshimenga." 
Nahum3:9 Bena Kushe ne bena Ejipitu, bavua balambula tshimenga tshia Tebe bintu bia bungi. Bena ditunga dia Pute ne dia Libiya, bavua batua natshi ndondu." 
Nahum3:10 Nansha bikale nanku, baluishi kukuata tshimenga, kuya ne benatshi mu bupika. Kushipelabu ne bana mene, ku mielelu ya misesu yonsu. Kusuikabu bamfumu bonsu nkanu. Bavua batshimuna, kuabanyanganabu bakulu ba tshimenga, bangata ewu bende ewu bende." 
Nahum3:11 Ne wewe kabidi Ninive, dikenga dinene nedikukuate, bu muntu mukuatshike maluvu. Neukebe muaba wa kusokoma, bua baluishi bebe kabakupetshi." 
Nahum3:12 Ninive, bimana biwabu bakukoleshe nabi, bidi bu bimuma bia mfiku, bimane kupia. Nyukisha amu mutshi, bimuma bidi bimata mukana mua udi ne nzala." 
Nahum3:13 Bena mvita bebe badi amu bu bakaji. Biibi bikole bia bimenga bia mu ditunga diebe, bidi bidiunzulukila, baluishi babuela. Kapia kadi kosha mabaya adibu bapayike ku biibi." 
Nahum3:14 Bena Ninive, sunayi mayi, bualu mvita neyinukuate. Koleshayi bimana bia tshimenga tshienu, longololayi biamu bia kuenza tushole." 
Nahum3:15 Kadi nenufue, nebanuoshile mu tshimenga tshienu, nebanushipe mu mvita, nenubutuke bu mabeji, adi mpasu ya mikumbi idia, imana. Nuenu bena Ninive, nuvua bavulangane bu mpasu, idi ibuka bisumbu ne bisumbu." 
Nahum3:16 Bangenda mushinga ba muebe bavua ba bungi, bapite mitotu ya mulu. Kadi mpindiewu mbakujimine, bu mudi mpasu ibuka, iya." 
Nahum3:17 Batangidi ba bena mudimu bebe bavua batape bu mpasu, bena mudimu bebe bavua benda mabumbu, bu mpasu ya mikumbi diba dia mashika, idi ikila mu mitshi. Kadi padi munya ukola, idi ibuka. Kabena bamanye kudiyi iya. Eyowa, mmiye penyi?" 
Nahum3:18 Mukalenga wa bena Ashure, balombodi ba ditunga diebe mbafue kashidi. Balombodi ba bena mvita bebe, kabena banyunga kabidi. Bantu bebe mbatangalake pa mikuna. Kakuena muntu udi mua kubasangisha." 
Nahum3:19 Mbakubutule kashidi, mbakutape mputa wa lubangu. Bantu bonsu badi bumvue muudi mubutuke, badi basanka, bakuma bikashi. Bualu uuvua kuyi mukengeshe, ne tshikisu tshiebe katshiyi tshipungila nnganyi?" 
Habakkuk1:1 Telejayi bidi Mvidi Mukulu mumanyishe muambi Abakuke. 
Habakkuk1:2 Maweja-Nangila, matuku bungiwu andi nkubikila, Wewe nansha kunteleja! Ndi nkumanyisha tshinyangu tshitudi natshi, kadi Wewe nansha kutusungidila!" 
Habakkuk1:3 Udi ummuenesha mabika ne mala nanku bua tshinyi? Bantu badi bakengeshangana bibi. Muudi ubatangila, kuyi wenza bualu mbishi? Ndi munkatshi mua tshinyangu ne tshimbambila, miaba yonsu ngumvua amu bilumbu ne matandu." 
Habakkuk1:4 Bu muudi kuyi wenza bualu, mikenji yebe mmifue, bena buenzayi badi babinga, bantu babi badi bapisha badi kabayi ne bualu, nsambu yonsu badi bayikosa amu bibi." 
Habakkuk1:5 Maweja-Nangila udi wandamuna ne: Tangilayi malu adi enzekela mu matunga adi nenu mutumba. Nenukeme bikole, nukatshila! Bualu bunene nebuenzeke; nenubumone. Muntu munuambilebu amu mukana, kanuvua mua kumuitaba to." 
Habakkuk1:6 Ndi mbikila bena Babilone, tshisamba tshia bantu ba lonji, kabayi luse. Badi bendakana pa buloba bujima, bakeba kudia bumfumu mu matunga a bende." 
Habakkuk1:7 Badi batshinyisha bantu, babakuatshisha bowa. Badi badienzela mudibu basue, bajadika nkayabu bidi bimpe kuenza." 
Habakkuk1:8 Nyama yabu ya tubalu mmipite ya nkashama ku lubilu. Idi ne lonji lupite lua nyama ya bimungu idi yenda ne nzala. Babandi babu ba pa tubalu, badi bafumina kule, benda batupika. Badi ne lubilu bu lua nyunyu ya mikanku, idi imona nyama wa kudia, yikila ne lukuka pambidi pende." 
Habakkuk1:9 Badi bafika ne tshinyangu bu mvunde, batangila kumpala ne lukuka, baboya bena lukanu bungi bu lusenga." 
Habakkuk1:10 Badi baseka bakalenga ba matunga, banaya nabu, batshimbakaja bakulu ba mu bukalenga buabu. Bimana bivua bantu bakoleshe nabi bimenga, badi babimona bu bintu bia tshianana, benza anu kabumba ka buloba, babandapu, bakuata tshimenga." 
Habakkuk1:11 Badi bafika lubilu bu mvunde, bakudimuka, baya. Bukole buabu ke nwidie wabu!" 
Habakkuk1:12 Wewe udi Maweja-Nangila wa kale ne kale. Udi Mvidi Mukulu wanyi wa tshijila, wa kashidi ne kashidi. Maweja-Nangila, muena bukole utudi tutekemena, Wewe kusungula bena Babilone, kukolesha baluishi betu, bua bamfuishe, batunyoke." 
Habakkuk1:13 Kadi mesu ebe adi mimpe be. Kuena mua kuanyisha bua amone malu mabi. Bantu badi bakengesha bakuabu, kuena mua kubatangila, kuyi wenza bualu.
