Kadi muudi umona bidi bena tshinyangu abu benza, kuyi wamba bualu, mbishi? Bantu babi aba badi babutula matunga a bantu ba nsongu badi babapita bobu. Kadi udi umona nanku, upuwa bua tshinyi?" 
Habakkuk1:14 Paudi kuyi uludika bantu, badi bu mishipa, nansha bu bishishi, bidi kabiyi ne mulombodi wabi." 
Habakkuk1:15 Ke mudi bena Babilone bakuata bantu, mudibu baloba mishipa ne ndobu. Badi bu balobi badi bakuata mishipa mu makondu abu, bayipatula mu mayi, basanka, batshionkomoka." 
Habakkuk1:16 Badi balambula makondu abu milambu, bawoshila musenga wa kamonya, mudibu benzela mvidie. Bualu ke adi abadisha, abanemesha." 
Habakkuk1:17 Bena Babilone nebatule amu kutula miele yabu ya nwita anyi? Nebabutule amu kubutula bantu ba matunga makuabu, kabayi bumvue luse anyi?" 
Habakkuk2:1 Meme ndi mutentekedi wa mu tshimenga, ndi mubande kulu pa tshimana tshia tshimenga, ngindila. Ndi musue kumvua tshidi Mvidi Mukulu mua kungambila, mudiye mua kuandamuna ku dimudiwula dianyi." 
Habakkuk2:2 Maweja-Nangila kungandamuna nanku: Funda bindi nkumanyisha, ubifunde bimpe pa mabaya, bua bonsu babibale, kakuyi lutatu." 
Habakkuk2:3 Bindi nkuleja, kabiena bienzeka mpindiewu. Kadi nebikumbane pa tshikondu tshiabi. Nansha kabiyi bienzeka lukasa, indila ne lutulu, mutekemene. Bindi nkumanyisha nebienzeke, kamuyi mpata, kabiyi nansha binenga." 
Habakkuk2:4 Funda nanku: bena buenzayi nebafue. Kadi bantu badi benzela bakuabu bimpe, nebapete muoyi, bualu badi bitaba Maweja-Nangila." 
Habakkuk2:5 Bushuwa, bubanji budi bufikisha bantu ku diakabi. Badi baditambisha kabena ne dikisha. Badi mukana buashi, bu dijimba dia bafue kadiyi diwula. Badi bu mudi lufu, ludi lubutula amu kubutula bantu. Ke mudi bena Babilone bakuata amu kukuata matunga, bua bantu bashale bapika babu kashidi." 
Habakkuk2:6 Kadi bantu badibu batshimune, nebabele nsenda, babatshipa, bamba ne: Nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nudiangatshila bintu bia bende, nutangila bantu bu badi ne bua kunufuta mabanza. Kadi nenuenze nanku too ne ku diba kaayi?" 
Habakkuk2:7 Bena mabanza nebanujikidile, kanuyi bamanye. Banuvua banyenge bintu, nebanunyenge bienu. Nenupampakane, nuzakala ne bowa." 
Habakkuk2:8 Nuvua bibe bintu mu matunga mavule. Nanku bisamba bikuabu bionsu bia pa buloba nebibe bienu. Nebanunyoke, bualu nuvua bele mashi a bantu panshi, nuvua banyangakaje bimenga ne matunga." 
Habakkuk2:9 Nudi bena diakabi! Nudi banemeshe bena meku enu ne bintu bipeta ku buivi. Nansha nuenu base nzubu yenu kulu ku katongobela, dikenga nedinukuate." 
Habakkuk2:10 Tshinyangu tshienu katshiena ne tshipeta; netshifuishe bena meku enu amu bundu. Panudi babutule bisamba bivule bia bantu, nudi badibutule anu nuenu nkayenu." 
Habakkuk2:11 Nansha mabue ne mabaya bidibu bibake nabi nzubu yenu, nebiele mbila, binutuisha." 
Habakkuk2:12 Nudi bena diakabi! Bua kuasa bimenga, nuvua bele mashi a bantu panshi. Tshitaku tshiabi, ke makenga anuvua bakengeshe nawu bantu." 
Habakkuk2:13 Bantu banuvua bakuate mu bupika, bavua baditatshisha patupu. Bipeta bionsu nebibutuke mu kapia. Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ke udi ukumbaja bionsu abi." 
Habakkuk2:14 Tshikondu netshifike tshidi bantu mu buloba bujima, bamanye amu kumanya munda muabu muonsu, butumbi bua Maweja-Nangila, amu mudi mayi muwule mu mayi manene tente." 
Habakkuk2:15 Nudi bena diakabi! Nudi belele bena mutumba, maluvu mela lulengu, bua bakuatshike, bavule bilamba. Ke nuenu kutangila mubidi wabu, kubafuisha bundu." 
Habakkuk2:16 Kadi kanuakupeta lumu ku malu a mushindu ewu. Nenuikale penu ne bundu: Nenunue, nukuatshika, nuleja butaka. Maweja-Nangila neanunuishe maluvu, mu dikopu dia tshiji tshiende: lumu luenu neluandamuke bundu bupite." 
Habakkuk2:17 Nebanutape, munuvua penu batape mitshi ya mu metu a mu Lebanone. Nuvua bashipe nyama ya mu metu awu. Nanku nyama neyinukuatshishe bowa. Bionsu abi nebinuenzekele, bua mashi a bantu anuvua bele panshi, bua tshinyangu tshinuvua banyange bimenga ne matunga abu natshi." 
Habakkuk2:18 Mpingu inudi badienzele bua kutendelela nwidie, neyinuambuluishe ku tshinyi? Idi amu bintu binudi nusonga, nansha nufula, kabiyi biakula, bidinga bantu. Mudibi mua kunuambuluisha mbishi?" 
Habakkuk2:19 Nudi bena diakabi! Nudi nuambila mutshi ne: “Juka” nansha dibue ne: “Tabala!” Kadi, nansha biobi bilamika biamu bia mushinga mukole pambidi, kabiena biakula, kabiena ne muoyi!" 
Habakkuk2:20 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi mu nzubu wende wa tshijila. Pa buloba bujima, bantu bapuwe kumpala kuende." 
Habakkuk3:1 Ke ditendelela dia Abakuke, didibu bimba bu musambu wa miadi:" 
Habakkuk3:2 Eyi, Maweja-Nangila wanyi, ndi mumvue biuvua mungambile, kadi bidi binkuatshisha bowa. Patutshidi ne muoyi apa, utuenzele kabidi malu a dikema auvua muenzenze kale. Nansha wewe mutufikile munda pa bualu, utufuile kabidi amu luse." 
Habakkuk3:3 Mvidi Mukulu udi utumina ku Temane, Mvidi Mukulu wa tshijila udi upueka ku mikuna ya Parane. Diulu ndiwule tente ne buneme buende, buloba tente ne lumu luende." 
Habakkuk3:4 Udi upatuka, ukenka, ubalakana bu diba, tshianza tshiende tshidi tshiela nsese, ke muaba udi bukole buende." 
Habakkuk3:5 Udi utuma bipupu kumpala kuende, lufu lulonda panyima." 
Habakkuk3:6 Padiye utuluka panshi, buloba budi bunyungakana. Padiye ukenzakana, bisamba bia bantu bidi bizakala. Mikuna minene ne mikese, ya kale ne kale, idi yupuka, isenguluka. Kuonsu kuvuaye upitshila kuvua anu nanku." 
Habakkuk3:7 Ndi mmona mudi bena Kushane ne bowa, mudi bena Madiyane bazakala, batshina." 
Habakkuk3:8 Maweja-Nangila, uudi mufikile munda nnganyi? Ke misulu iudi mutekele tshiji anyi? Ke mayi manene audi mufikile munda anyi? Udi ubanda pa mavuba, bu pa ditempu, didi nyama ya tubalu ikoka, bua uye kutshimuna baluishi." 
Habakkuk3:9 Udi mumane kupatula buta buebe, mupayikaku mukete. Ke buloba kupandika, mayi a muinshi mua buloba kupatuka, kuenza misulu." 
Habakkuk3:10 Padi mikuna ikumona, idi izakala. Mvula udi uloka bikole, wenza nkoka pa buloba. Mayi manene adi ela tshiona bikole, mavuala abanda mulu bu mikuna." 
Habakkuk3:11 Padi mikete yebe ipitakana lubilu, difuma diebe dikenka, dibalakana, diba ne ngondu bidi bimana, bibuela mu nzubu." 
Habakkuk3:12 Udi wendakana pa buloba, musunsuke ne tshiji, udiatakaja bisamba bia bantu ne kanyinganyinga." 
Habakkuk3:13 Kadi udi ufika bua kusungila bantu bebe, ne mukalenga uudi musungule, mujidile. Udi ushipa mukalenga wa tshisamba tshia bena buenzayi, ubutula kashidi bonsu badi bamulonda." 
Habakkuk3:14 Udi utubula mitu ya bamfumu ba baluishi betu, ubapingajila mikete ivuabu bakebe kutuasa. Bavua bafika ne lubilu bu mvunde, benda bela mbila ya disanka, bajinga kututangalaja, nansha kutuzaza miaba ituvua basokomene." 
Habakkuk3:15 Udi upitshila pa mayi manene ne tubalu tuebe, ntutu ya mayi ibanda mulu mule!" 
Habakkuk3:16 Pandi ngumvua tshiona atshi, bowa kunkuata bikole bipite, mishiku kungomba, mifuba kunwingutuka, mikolu kunzakala. Kadi ndi anu mutukije muoyi, muindile dituku diudi mua kunyoka bonsu bayua batukengesha, baunyanga." 
Habakkuk3:17 Mitshi ya mfiku kayena ikuama bimuma, mu mionji ya nwinyo kamuena tumuma, ku mitshi ya olive kudi kutupu, biakudia kabiena bitoloka mu madimi, mu mpangu kamuena mikoku, ngombe kayena ilala mu bikumbi." 
Habakkuk3:18 Kadi nansha nanku, ndi nsanka, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi ungambuluisha, ndi nsanguluka, bualu udi unsungidila." 
Habakkuk3:19 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu udi bukole buanyi: udi upepeja makasa anyi bu mikonu ya ngulungu, ungendesha pa mikuna mile. Wa mu mukanda wa mulombodi wa bena misambu. Wa kuimba ne nzenze." 
Zephaniah1:1 Telejayi bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Sefanya mu tshikondu tshiwa Yoshiya, muana wa Amone, mukalenga wa Yuda. Sefanya uvua muana wa Kushi. Kushi uvua muana wa Ngedaliya. Ngedaliya uvua muana wa Amanya. Amanya uvua muana wa Izkiya." 
Zephaniah1:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nembutule tshintu tshionsu tshidi ne muoyi pa buloba. 
Zephaniah1:3 Nenshipe bantu, nyama, nyunyi ne mishipa. Nembutule bantu babi, ne bionsu bidi bibalenduisha. Tshiena nshiya muntu nansha umue ne muoyi pa buloba.”" 
Zephaniah1:4 “Nennyoke badi basomba mu Yerushalayime, ne bantu bonsu badi mu Yuda. Nengumushe muaba ewu, bionsu biwabu batendelela nabi Baale. Nansha batuangaji ba nwidie ewu, kabena mua kubavuluka kabidi to." 
Zephaniah1:5 Nembutule bonsu badi babanda ku misonga ya nzubu, bua kutendelela mitotu, ne bonsu badi bantendelela, baditshipa mu dina dianyi, kadi baditshipa musangu umue mu dina dia mvidie Milkome." 
Zephaniah1:6 Nembutule bonsu badi bambenga meme Maweja-Nangila, badi kabayi bakeba diambuluisha kundi, kabayi bankonka meji.”" 
Zephaniah1:7 Puwayi, Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila udi ufika. Dituku dia tshiji tshiende dikadi pabuipi! Maweja-Nangila mmulongolole mulambu. mMumane kumusha mikiya ya badiye mubikile bua kudia nabu didia dia mulambu." 
Zephaniah1:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Dituku didibu balambula mulambu, nennyoke bakalenga ba matunga, bamfumu, ne bonsu badi bavuala mvuadilu wa bantu benyi." 
Zephaniah1:9 Dituku adi, nennyoke bonsu badi batupikila pa mutu pa mushiku wa nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, mudi bantu ba bisamba bikuabu benza. Nennyoke bonsu badi buwuja nzubu wa mfumuabu ne biuma bipeta ku buenzayi ne tshinyangu.”" 
Zephaniah1:10 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mu Yerushalayime dituku adi, nebumvue mbila mikole ku tshiibi tshia Mishipa, miadi mu Tshimenga Tshipiatshipia, mutoyi wa bungi pa mikuna." 
Zephaniah1:11 Dilayi bikole, tuayi mikemu, nuenu badi basomba mu tshimenga tshia kuinshi, bualu basumbishanganyi ba bintu bonsu nebafue, bangenda mushinga bonsu nebabutuke." 
Zephaniah1:12 Diba adi nentemeshe muendu, bua kukalula tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime. Nennyoke bantu badi basomba talala, bu mudi maluvu abutama, ashiya binyindanyinda panshi. Badi bamba ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila kena wenza bualu, nansha buimpe nansha bubi!’" 
Zephaniah1:13 Kadi nebapawule bubanji buabu, nebupule nzubu yabu. Nebibake nzubu, kadi kabena balalamu. Nebakune mionji ya nwinyo, kadi kabena banua maluvu ayi.”" 
Zephaniah1:14 Dituku dinene didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda dikadi pabuipi. Didi difika ne lubilu luonsu. Pafika dituku adi bantu nebele mbila, kabayi ne ditekemena nansha, nansha bantu badi ne dikima dipite nebadile muadi!" 
Zephaniah1:15 Dituku adi nedikale dia tshiji, dia dikenga ne kanyinganyinga, dia kubutula ne kushidisha. Dituku adi nedikale dia midima mikole, dia mavuba ne mabungi." 
Zephaniah1:16 Dituku adi nebumvue bena mvita bela mpungi, bela mbila ya mvita, bua kuluisha bimenga bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana, bua kushimbula tuleya tuabi tunene." 
Zephaniah1:17 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nembueje bantu mu dikenga, nebababate mudi bampofu benza, bualu bavua bangenzela malu mabi. Mashi abu neatangalake miaba yonsu, bu mudi lupuishi. Bitalu biabu nebibole, mudi bintu bidibu bela ku dyala.”" 
Zephaniah1:18 Dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda, tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, nansha mpawungi, kabiena mua kubasungidila. Buloba bujima nebubutuke, ku kapia ka tshiji tshiende. Neabutule bantu bonsu ba pa buloba. Eyowa, bionsu ebi nebikuatshishe bantu bowa." 
Zephaniah2:1 Nuenu badi kabayi ne bundu, elayi meji bimpe, nudikonke, nudilengeje," 
Zephaniah2:2 kanuyi banji kutangalaka, mudi bisote bitangalaka dituku dimue. Nukudimune mioyi yenu, tshiji tshia Maweja-Nangila tshikuata kapia katshiyi tshianji kufika kunudi, dituku didiye ulumbuluisha bantu kadiyi dianji kusemena pabuipi." 
Zephaniah2:3 Nuenu bantu bapuekele bonsu ba mu ditunga, badi batumikila mikenji yende, pinganayi kudi Maweja-Nangila. Kumbajayi tshidiye musue, inyikayi mitu yenu kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu. Nanku dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda, bumue kena ununyoka nansha." 
Zephaniah2:4 Ngaza neashale dikolu. Askalone neabutuke. Badi basomba mu Asdode, nebabipate munda munya. Nebumushe bena Ekrone mu tshimenga tshiabu." 
Zephaniah2:5 Nuenu badi bafumine ku Kaftore, basombe ku muelelu wa mayi manene, nudi bena diakabi! Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Wewe Kenaane, ditunga dia bena Peleshete nenkunyangakaje. Neushale munda mutupu." 
Zephaniah2:6 Buloba buebe ku muelelu wa mayi manene, nebuandamuke mpata wa bisosa, nebushale muaba udi balami ba mikoku bendakana, ne udibu bateka bikumbi biayi.”" 
Zephaniah2:7 Bena Yuda badi bashale ne muoyi, nebakuate ditunga dienu. Nebadishilemu bisumbu bia nyama yabu. Butuku nebaye kulala mu nzubu ya mu Askalone. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu neabenzele bimpe, neakudimune dikenga diabu, dienza disanka." 
Zephaniah2:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Mvua mumvue bena Mowabe ne bena Amone, baseka bantu banyi, babapetula. Bayua babapenda, bamba ne: netununyenge buloba buenu, bua kudiundisha buetu." 
Zephaniah2:9 Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wa bena Izrayele, ndi nditshipa ne: bu mundi ne muoyi, ndi njadika bulelela ne: nebabutule ditunga dia bena Mowabe ne dia bena Amone, bu muvuabu babutule tshimenga tshia Sodome ne tshia Ngomore. Buloba buabu nebushale tshipela tshiendelele. Nemuikale amu meba ne bina bia luepu. Bantu banyi badi bashale ne muoyi, nebafike bua kubapawula, ne bua kukuata ditunga diabu.”" 
Zephaniah2:10 Ke muakabanyokabu, bualu bavua baditambisha, bapenda bantu ba Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, bamba ne: netununyenge buloba bua kudiundisha buetu." 
Zephaniah2:11 Maweja-Nangila neabakuatshishe bowa. Neabutule nwidie yonsu ya pa buloba. Diba adi, bantu bonsu, nansha badi basomba kule kupite, nebamutendelele, muntu yonsu muaba udiye usomba." 
Zephaniah2:12 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuenu kabidi bena Kushe, nennushipeshe mu nwita.”" 
Zephaniah2:13 Maweja-Nangila neanyoke kabidi badi ku mutu kua ditunga. Neabutule bena Ashure, neashidishe bena Ninive. Tshimenga atshi netshishale tshipela, kamuyi muntu." 
Zephaniah2:14 Muaba uvua tshimenga, bisumbu bia nyama nebilalemu, kabidi ne nyama mikuabu ya mishindu yonsu: tshipungulu ne kakutukutu nebisombe mu mitu ya makunji a nzubu. Nebumvuile miadi ya nyunyi ku madidishi a nzubu. Tshikolokolu netshimueneke ku tshibuelelu. Mabaya a sedre avuabu balamike ku bimana, nebaalamune ku bukole." 
Zephaniah2:15 Ke muikala tshimenga etshi tshivua tshiditambisha. Badi basombamu bavua bela meji ne: dikenga kadiena mua kutukuata. Badi mua kuambangana netu mbanganyi? Lelu tshimenga tshidi tshienda tshibutuka. Tshikadi muaba udi nyama ya lonji ilala! Bonsu badi basemena pabuipi natshi, badi batshiela bibingu, batshiseka." 
Zephaniah3:1 Yerushalayime udi muena diakabi. Udi tshimenga tshia bantomboji, tshia bena tshikisu, ne bena tshinyangu." 
Zephaniah3:2 Kavua uteleja diyi dia Maweja-Nangila. Kavua witaba mibelu yende. Kavua utekemena Maweja-Nangila. Kavua ukeba diambuluisha kudi Mvidi Mukulu. 
Zephaniah3:3 Bamfumu ba tshimenga etshi badi bu nyama ya ntambue idi ikungula. Balumbuluishi babu badi bu bimungu, bidi bikeba biakudia dilolu. Kadi kabiena bishiya tshintu tshia kudia mu dinda." 
Zephaniah3:4 Bambi babu badi baditemba, banyanga mudimu wabu. Batuangaji babu kabena banemeka bintu bia tshijila; badi banaya ne mikenji ya Mvidi Mukulu." 
Zephaniah3:5 Kadi Maweja-Nangila udi amu mu tshimenga etshi, bua kukosa nsambu pa yoyi, kumushamu malu mabi. Dinda dionsu udi ulumbuluisha bantu. Kadi nansha nanku, bantu babi badi amu benza malu mabi, kabayi ne bundu!" 
Zephaniah3:6 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ndi mubutule bisamba bia bantu bia bungi. Ndi mushimbule tuleya tua bimenga biabu bivuabu bakoleshe ne bimana. Misesu ya mu bimenga biabu mmishale munda mutupu. Bimenga biabu mbishale makolu, muntu nansha umue kena upitshilamu, kena usombamu." 
Zephaniah3:7 Pashishe meme kuela meji ne: Yerushalayime neannemeke, neavuluke mibelu yanyi, neayitabe! Nanku, tshiakumubutula to, tshiakukumbaja bimvua mumukanyine nabi. Kadi bantu badi basombamu; badi lukasa lukasa amu bua kuenza malu mabi.”" 
Zephaniah3:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nuindile dituku dindi mfika bua kunupisha, kununyoka. Ndi mujadike ne: nensangishe bisamba ne makalenga, bua kubiosha ne kapia ka tshiji tshianyi. Buloba bujima nebupie, ku kapia ka tshiji tshianyi.”" 
Zephaniah3:9 “Pashishe nenkudimune bantu; nengumushe mikiya idi ku mishiku yabu. Nebantendelele meme Maweja-Nangila, nebankukuile ne muoyi umue." 
Zephaniah3:10 Bantu banyi bamvua mutangalaje, nebafume muaba mule, nansha dishiya dia misulu ya bena Kushe. Nebantuadile milambu yabu.”" 
Zephaniah3:11 “Dituku adi, nuenu bantu banyi, kanuena ne bua kufua kabidi bundu, bua buenzayi buenu, nansha bua malu mabi anudi bangenzele. Bualu nengumushe munkatshi muenu bantu badi baditambisha. Kanuena mua kuditumbisha kabidi pa mukuna wanyi wa tshijila." 
Zephaniah3:12 Nenshiye amu bantu bapuekele ne bapele munkatshi muenu, badi bandomba bua meme kubakuba." 
Zephaniah3:13 Bena Izrayele badi bashale ne muoyi, kabatshiena benza malu mabi, kabena bashima kabidi, kabena badinga kabidi bantu ne mishiku yabu. Nebadie, balale, muntu kayi ubakuatshisha bowa.”" 
Zephaniah3:14 Tshimenga tshia Siyone, sankaku! Bena Izrayele, elayi tunkunduluila. Yerushalayime, sanguluka ne muoyi webe mujima." 
Zephaniah3:15 Maweja-Nangila mmukujimijile bubi buebe. Maweja-Nangila, mukalenga wa Izrayele, udi munkatshi muenu, mmunuipatshile baluishi benu. Nanku kanuena ne bua kutshina tshintu nansha tshimue." 
Zephaniah3:16 Dituku nedifike, diambilabu Yerushalayime ne: “Tshimenga tshia Siyone, kutshinyi, kutekeshi muoyi nansha!" 
Zephaniah3:17 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu webe udi nebe, udi tshilobu, mukuluidi wa mvita. Udi usanka bualu buebe. Udi ukunanga; nanku neakuenze muntu mupiamupia. Udi uja maja bu dituku dia tshibilu, wimba misambu ne disanka bualu buebe.”" 
Zephaniah3:18 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nenjikije dikenga dienu, nennumushe bundu." 
Zephaniah3:19 Diba adi, nennyoke bonsu bavua banukengeshe. Nengondape badibu batape mputa. Bantu bavua baye mu bupika, nembapingaje mu ditunga diabu. Nenkudimune kapeja kavuabu banupeja miaba yonsu, nkenza butumbi ne lumu bienu." 
Zephaniah3:20 Diba adi, nennupingaje mu ditunga dienu, nennusangishe muaba umue. Nenudimuene mundi nkudimuna dikenga dienu. Nennupeshe butumbi ne lumu, munkatshi mua bantu bonsu ba pa buloba. Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Haggai1:1 Dituku dimue dia ngondu muisambombu wa tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne muambi Agayi. Kumutumaye kudi mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda, diende Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, ne kudi mutuangaji munene Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake," 
Haggai1:2 bua kubamanyisha mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila ne: — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Bantu ba mu tshisamba etshi badi bamba ne: tshikondu tshia kuibakulula nzubu wanyi, ki ntshianji kukumbana!" 
Haggai1:3  
Haggai1:4 Panudi nuenu basombe mu nzubu yenu milengeja bimpe, wanyi meme munyanguke, nudi nuenza bimpe anyi?" 
Haggai1:5 Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi nnuambila ne: Dikonkayi pa malu adi anuenzekela." 
Haggai1:6 Nuenu kukuna bintu bia bungi, kunowa bikese. Nudi nudia, kadi kanuena mua kuukuta. Nudi nunua maluvu, kadi nyota yenu kayena ijika. Nudi nuvuala bilamba, kadi numvua anu mashika. Muena mudimu udi upeta difutu, kadi didi dijika lukasa, bu mudi bintu bimata mu tshibombi tshitubuke!" 
Haggai1:7 Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi nnuambila tshiakabidi ne: Dikonkayi pa malu adi manuenzekele." 
Haggai1:8 Pashishe, nuye ku mikuna, nutape mitshi, nuibakulule nzubu wanyi. Nanku, nengikale ne disanka, bualu bantu nebantumbishemu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Haggai1:9 Nuvua batekemene biakudia bia bungi, nuenu kunowa bikese. Binuvua baye nabi mu nzubu yenu, meme kubiela mupuya, kutangalakabu Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi nnukonka ne: Ndi muenze nanku bua tshinyi? Ndi nnuamba ne: Ndi muenze nanku, bualu nudi balekele nzubu wanyi ashale munyanguke, nukuate mudimu bikole amu bua kulengeja yenu nuenu." 
Haggai1:10 Ke padi mvula kayi uloka, bintu kabiyi bitoloka." 
Haggai1:11 Meme kunutumina minanga mu ditunga: pa mikuna, mu madimi a ntete ya kuenza bukula, a mionji ya nwinyo, a mitshi ya olive, ne mu madimi a bikunyibua bikuabu bionsu. Bantu ne nyama kukenga ku minanga ayi. Nanku, nuvua bakuate mudimu amu tshianana.”" 
Haggai1:12 Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, ne mutuangaji munene Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, ne bantu bonsu bavua bumuke mu bupika, kuitababu bionsu bivua muambi Agayi mubambile mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Ke muvua muambi Agayi mukumbaje mudimu uvua Maweja-Nangila mumupeshe. Nanku bantu bonsu kunemeka Maweja-Nangila." 
Haggai1:13 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kutuma muambi Agayi bua kuambila bantu ne: — Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnulaya ne: Nengikale nenu. 
Haggai1:14 Zerubabele, mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda, ne Yeshuwa, mutuangaji munene, ne bantu bonsu bavua bumuke mu bupika, Maweja-Nangila kubapa muoyi wa kuenza mudimu ne disuminyina. Nanku, kutuadijabu kuibakulula nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, Mvidi Mukulu wabu," 
Haggai1:15 dituku dia makumi abidi ne dinayi dia ngondu muisambombu, wa tshidimu atshi." 
Haggai2:1 Mu matuku makumi abidi ne dimue a ngondu wa muanda mutekete, wa tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, Maweja-Nangila kutuma muambi Agayi tshiakabidi." 
Haggai2:2 Uvua mumutume kudi mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda, Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, kudi mutuangaji munene Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, ne kudi bantu bonsu bavua bumuke mu bupika, bua kubakonka ne:" 
Haggai2:3 — Nganyi wa munkatshi muenu uvua mumone buimpe buvua nabu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu wa kale, pavuabu kabayi banji kumunyanga? Kadi tshinudi bamone lelu ntshinyi? Nzubu kena kabidi ne lumu nansha kakese." 
Haggai2:4 Meme Maweja-Nangila ndi nnuambila ne: Wewe Zerubabele, wewe Yeshuwa mutuangaji munene, muana wa Yoshadake, ne nuenu bena ditunga bonsu, koleshayi muoyi, tuadijayi mudimu. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi nnulaya ne: nengikale nenu." 
Haggai2:5 Panuvua bapatuke mu Ejipitu, mvua munulaye bua kuikala munkatshi muenu. Kanutshinyi to." 
Haggai2:6 Eyowa, meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi ngamba ne: matuku makese aa, nenzakeje bia mulu ne bia panshi, mayi manene ne buloba." 
Haggai2:7 Nenkuatshishe bantu ba bisamba bikuabu bowa. Nanku, nebafike ne bubanji buabu buonsu munemu. Nendengeje nzubu ewu muende mua kale ne bubanji abu. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Haggai2:8 Bualu tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bia pa buloba bujima mbianyi meme." 
Haggai2:9 Nanku nzubu mupiamupia wanyi ewu, neikale muimpe mupite wa kale. Kabidi nempeshe bantu banyi ditalala mu nzubu ewu. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Haggai2:10 Mu matuku makumi abidi ne anayi a ngondu wa tshitema, wa tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kuambila muambi Agayi tshiakabidi ne:" 
Haggai2:11 — Konka batuangaji bualu ebu: 
Haggai2:12 Tuteke tshilejilu: muntu muambuile munyinyi wa ku mulambu mu tshilamba tshiende, tshilamba atshi kulenga ku diampa, ku biseki, ku maluvu, ku mafuta, nansha ku tshiakudia tshikuabu, biakudia bionsu abi bidi bienza bia tshijila anyi? Batuangaji kuandamuna Agayi ne: — Nansha kakese." 
Haggai2:13 Agayi kubakonka kabidi ne: — Tutoke tshilejilu tshikuabu: muntu mulenge tshitalu, udi upia mikiya. Kadi palengaye pashishe tshiakudia, tshiakudia atshi netshikale kabidi ne mikiya anyi? Batuangaji kuitaba ne: — Eyowa." 
Haggai2:14 Agayi kubambila ne: — Telejayi tshidi Maweja-Nangila wamba: ke mudi bantu ba mu ditunga emu bapia mikiya. Nanku bionsu bidibu bapeta ku mudimu wa bianza biabu, ne bionsu bidibu bandambuila pa tshilambuilu, mbipie amu mikiya." 
Haggai2:15 Maweja-Nangila kuamba kabidi ne: — Vulukayi bivua bienzeke ku kale. Kanuyi banji kukunguja mabue bua kuibakulula nzubu wanyi," 
Haggai2:16 makenga avua manukuate. Pavua muntu uya ku diyeba, bua kuangata bibombi makumi abidi bia ntete ya kuenza bukula, uvua upeta amu bibombi dikumi. Pavua muntu uya ku tshipanza tshia maluvu a nwinyo, bua kupongolola milangi makumi atanu, uvua amu upongolola milangi mukumi abidi." 
Haggai2:17 Meme kunyanga biakudia bionsu bia mu madimi enu: meme kukumisha, kubibolesha, kubinyangakaja ne mabue a mvula. Kadi kanuena bapingane kundi meme Maweja-Nangila to." 
Haggai2:18 Tangilayi bimpe tshidi tshienzeka mpindiewu. Lelu matuku makumi abidi ne anayi a ngondu wa tshitema, bavua bibake tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu. Nuvuluke dituku edi bimpe." 
Haggai2:19 Mu mayeba enu kanutshiena ntete ya kuenza bukula to. Mionji yenu ya nwinyo, mitshi ya mfiku, mitshi ya ngrenade, mitshi ya olive, kabivua bikuama to. Kadi biangatshile dituku dia lelu, nennusankishe. Mitshi yenu neakuame." 
Haggai2:20 Amu dituku adi dia makumi abidi ne anayi a ngondu wa tshitema, Maweja-Nangila kuyukila ne Agayi tshiakabidi." 
Haggai2:21 Kumutumaye kudi mulombodi wa buloba bua bena Yuda, diende Zerubabele, muana wa Sheyaltiyele, bua kumuambila ne: — Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, nenzakeje diulu ne buloba." 
Haggai2:22 Nengumushe bakalenga mu nkuasa yabu. Nenshipe makalenga pa buloba. Nentonkole matempu a nwita, ne badi baendesha. Nyama ya tubalu neyifue. Badi babandapu nebakuluke, bafue ku miele yabu." 
Haggai2:23 Dituku adi, wewe Zerubabele, muntu wanyi, newikale ne mushinga, bu mudi tshitampi tshianyi nawu. Bualu ndi mukusungule, bua wikale muenampala wanyi. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku." 
Zechariah1:1 Mu ngondu wa muanda mukulu wa tshidimu tshibidi tshia bukalenga bua Daryaveshe, Maweja-Nangila kuambila muambi Zekarya, muana wa Berekiya, ne muikulu wa Ido, ne:" 
Zechariah1:2 — Ambila bena Izrayele ne: Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, mvua mufikile bankambua benu munda bikole." 
Zechariah1:3 Kadi nupingane kundi, meme Maweja-Nangila; nenku nempingane kunudi. Meme ndi nnulaya nanku." 
Zechariah1:4 Kanulondi malu avua bankambua benu benza. Bambi bavua bababela ku kale mu dina dianyi, bua balekele malu abu mabi ne ngenzelu yabu mibi. Kadi kabavua basue kubateleja. Kabavua bitabe." 
Zechariah1:5 Bankambua benu mbamane kufua. Bambi kabidi kabena bashala panu ne muoyi tshiendelele. 
Zechariah1:6 Kadi meyi anyi ne mikenji yanyi bimvua mumanyishe bambi, bena mudimu banyi, bivua bituishe bankambua benu kunyima kua matuku. Bobu kukudimuna nsombelu wabu, kuitaba ne: Maweja-Nangila mmutunyoke, muvuaye muambe. Mmutunyoke kabidi pa bualu, bua malu etu mabi." 
Zechariah1:7 Daryaveshe uvua mumane kushala mu bukalenga bidimu bibidi. Mu matuku makumi abidi ne anayi a ngondu wa dikumi ne umue, udibu binyika ne: ngondu wa Shebate, Maweja-Nangila uvua muleje muambi Zekarya, muana wa Berekiya, ne muikulu wa Ido, malu. Zekarya uvua wamba ne:" 
Zechariah1:8 Butuku ebu Maweja-Nangila kundeja muntu mubande pa kabalu kakunze. Muntu awu uvua munkatshi mua mitshi ya mirte, ivua muinshi mu tshibandabanda. Tubalu tukuabu tukunze, tua mubidi wa lubundubundu, ne tutoke, tuvua mu nyima muende." 
Zechariah1:9 Meme kukonka muntu awu ne: — Mukalenga, tubalu etu tudi tuleja tshinyi? Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi, kungandamuna ne: — Nenkumvuije" 
Zechariah1:10 Ke muntu uvua mu mitshi ya mine, kungambila ne: — Maweja-Nangila mmutume bantu aba bua baye kutentekela buloba bujima." 
Zechariah1:11 Ke bantu bawa babande pa tubalu kuambila mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila ne: — Tudi bendakane buloba bujima. Katuena basangana bantu balubakana to; bonsu badi basomba talalaa. 
Zechariah1:12 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuamba kabidi ne: — Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, kukadi mpindiewu bidimu makumi muanda mutekete biudi mufikile Yerushalayime ne bimenga bikuabu bia Yuda munda. Neulame tshiji, kuyi ubafuila luse matuku makuabu bungi munyi?" 
Zechariah1:13 Ke Maweja-Nangila kuandamuna mutumibue wende miaku mimpe ya kumukolesha ku muoyi, ne kumusamba nayi." 
Zechariah1:14 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uwa uyukila nanyi, kungambila ne: Ambila bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ne: “Ndi munange bikole Yerushalayime, ne mukuna wa Siyone," 
Zechariah1:15 Kadi bisamba bidi bisomba talalaa, biditemba, ndi mbifikile munda bikole. Bualu pamvua tshiyi muanji kufikila bena Izrayele munda bikole, biobi bivua bibabutula bibi." 
Zechariah1:16 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ngamba ne: nempingane mu Yerushalayime, bua kumufuila luse, kumunanga. Nebasemu nzubu wanyi tshiakabidi, nebibakulule tshimenga.”" 
Zechariah1:17 Pashishe mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: Ambila kabidi bantu mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ne: “Bimenga bianyi nebipete bubanji tshiakabidi. Nensungule Yerushalayime kabidi, nengambuluishe Siyone.”" 
Zechariah2:1 Maweja-Nangila kundeja kabidi malu makuabu. Meme kumona nsengu inayi. 
Zechariah2:2 Meme kukonka mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uwa uyukila nanyi ne: — Nsengu eyi idi ileja tshinyi? Kungandamunaye ne: — Nsengu eyi idi ileja bisamba bidi ne bukole, bivua bitangalaje bena Yuda, bena Izrayele, ne bena Yerushalayime." 
Zechariah2:3 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila kundeja bansenda ba biamu banayi. 
Zechariah2:4 Meme kumukonka ne: — Bantu aba mbalue kuenza tshinyi? Kungandamunaye ne: — Mbafike bua kutshibula nsengu ayi; bua kukuatshisha bowa ne kubutula bisamba bia bukole bivua biluisha ditunga dia Yuda, bitangalaja benadi, muntu nansha umue kayi mua kubafuila nkanana." 
Zechariah2:5 Maweja-Nangila kundeja bualu bukuabu. Meme kumona muntu muikale ne nshinga wa kupima nende bimana mu bianza. 
Zechariah2:6 Meme kumukonka ne: — Udi uya penyi? Kungandamunaye ne: — Ndi nya kupima bule ne butshiama bua Yerushalayime. 
Zechariah2:7 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi, kuya kudi mutumibue mukuabu uwa ulua kudiye." 
Zechariah2:8 Kuambilaye mutumibue muibidi awu ne: — Uye lubilu kudi nsongalume udi ne nshinga, umuambile ne: kabena mua kunyungulula tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime ne bimana, bualu bantu ne nyama nebikalemu bipite bungi." 
Zechariah2:9 Nenku, Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Meme mene nengikale mu tshimenga etshi, bu tshimana tshia kapia tshidi tshitshinyungulukila. Nensombemu ne butumbi buanyi buonsu.”" 
Zechariah2:10 Maweja-Nangila udi unuambila ne: “Nuenu bonsu bamvua mutangalaje nseke yonsu ya buloba, nyemayi mpindiewu, numuke ku matunga a ku mutu kua ditunga!" 
Zechariah2:11 Nuenu bena Yerushalayime badi mu bupika ku Babilone, koleshayi, nunyeme.”" 
Zechariah2:12 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, udi muntume bua kunuambila malu, udi wamba bua bisamba bivua binupawule ne: “Muntu udi unuluisha, udi untua munu mu disu." 
Zechariah2:13 Eyo, nenduishe bisamba ebi: nebabipawule kudi bantu bavuabi bikuate ku bupika.” Padi malu aa enzeka, nenumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ke uvua muntume." 
Zechariah2:14 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Nuenu bena Yerushalayime nusanke bikole, nutue tshianga, nemfike, nensombe munkatshi muenu." 
Zechariah2:15 Biangatshile diba adi, bisamba bia bungi nebingitabe meme Maweja-Nangila, nebikale bantu banyi. Kadi muaba ungasomba, ke munkatshi muenu.” Padi malu aa enzeka, nenumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ke uvua muntume kunudi." 
Zechariah2:16 Bena Yuda nebikale tshiakabidi tshisamba menemene tshia Maweja-Nangila mu ditunga didiye mujidile. Yerushalayime neikale tshiakabidi tshimenga tshiende tshidiye musungule. 
Zechariah2:17 Bantu bonsu bapuwe kumpala kua Maweja-Nangila, bualu diakamue neapatuke mu nzubu wende wa tshijila!" 
Zechariah3:1 Maweja-Nangila kundeja Yeshuwa, mutuangaji munene, muimane kumpala kua mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila. Satane uvua muimane ku dia balume dia Yeshuwa bua kumufunda ku tshilumbu." 
Zechariah3:2 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuambila Satane, mufundianganyi, ne: — Satane, Maweja-Nangila neakunyoke. Eyo, Maweja-Nangila uvua musungule tshimenga tshia Yerushalayime, neakunyoke. Yeshuwa kena bu tshishelele tshiyuabu bapatule kuiku anyi?" 
Zechariah3:3 Yeshuwa uvua muimane kumpala kua mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu, muvuale bilamba bia manyanu." 
Zechariah3:4 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuambila batumibue bavuaye nabu ne: numuvule bilamba abi. Pashishe kuambilaye Yeshuwa ne: — Ndi mukumushe bubi buebe. Nenkuvuadike bilamba bia tshibilu. 
Zechariah3:5 Kubambilaye kabidi bua bajingile Yeshuwa tshitambala tshimpe ku mutu. Nanku kumujingilabu tshitambala ku mutu, kumuvuadika ne bilamba bimpe, mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu mutangile." 
Zechariah3:6 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kuambila kabidi Yeshuwa ne: 
Zechariah3:7 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi ukulaya ne: “Wewe muitabe mikenji yanyi, mukumbaje bimvua mukufundile, nenkomekele bujitu bua kulama nzubu wanyi wa tshijila ne mbanza yende. Nanku nenkuteleje amu mundi nteleja batumibue badi bankuatshila mudimu muaba ewu.”" 
Zechariah3:8 “Wewe Yeshuwa, mutuangaji munene, teleja. Nuenu batuangaji badi bakuata nende mudimu, telejayi. Nuenu bonsu nudi tshimanyinu tshidi tshijadika ne: matuku adi kumpala nenupete lupandu. Nentume muntu wanyi, dina diende Lutonga." 
Zechariah3:9 Nenteke dibue kumpala kua Yeshuwa. Dibue adi nedikale dimue, kadi nedikale ne nseke muanda mutekete ikenka. Nentape meme nkayanyi miaku pa dibue edi. Nanku, munkatshi mua dituku dimue nengumushe bubi bua bantu, budi bunyanga buloba. Eyo, meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Zechariah3:10 Pafika dituku adi, nenubikilangane bua nusombe talalaa, nusanke ne bintu bia mu madimi enu a mionji ya mvinyo, ne bia mu mitshi ya mfiku.”" 
Zechariah4:1 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi kuluaye kuntabuluja, bu mudibu batabuluja muntu ku tulu." 
Zechariah4:2 Kunkonkaye ne: — Tshiudi umona ntshinyi? Meme kuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona tshitekelu tshia miendu tshia mpawungi menemene. Tshidi ne muaba wa kulamina manyi ku mutu kuatshi. Tshidi ne miendu muanda mutekete, kabidi ne mikaba muanda mutekete idi ifikisha manyi mu miendu yonsu." 
Zechariah4:3 Mitshi ibidi ya olive idi pamue ne muaba wa kulamina mafuta, umue ku dia balume, mukuabu ku dia bakaji." 
Zechariah4:4 Nanku meme kukonka mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi ne: — Mukalenga, bintu ebi bionsu bidi biumvuija tshinyi?" 
Zechariah4:5 Kunkonkaye ne: — Kuena mumanye anyi? Meme kumukudimuna ne: — Tshiena mumanye to. 
Zechariah4:6 Ke yeye kungumvuija ne: Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambila bua kumanyisha Zerubabele, bivua Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu umuambila ne: “Nenkumbaje mudimu webe, ki nku bukole bua bia mvita, ki nku makanda audi nawu, kadi amu ku bukole bua Mueyelu wanyi.”" 
Zechariah4:7 Kuambaye kabidi ne: “Mukuna munene ewu udi mua kukupangisha mua kukumbaja mudimu webe anyi? Zerubabele neaulandakaje. Neangate ku mukuna ewu dibue dia ndekelu dia kuteka ku musonga wa nzubu mupiamupia wa Mvidi Mukulu. Bantu nebele mbila ne: Kia! Nzubu bulenga nenku! Nzubu mulenga!” 
Zechariah4:8 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: 
Zechariah4:9 “Zerubabele mmubange kuasa tshitaku tshia nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu; neajikije mudimu wa kuasa nzubu ewu.” Padi malu aa enzeka, nenumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ke uvua muntume kunudi." 
Zechariah4:10 — Miendu muanda mutekete ke mesu a Maweja-Nangila adi akenketa malu onsu adi enzeka pa buloba. Lekelayi kupepeja midimu mikese, idibu bamane kubanga. Kadi nusanke panudi numona Zerubabele wibakulula nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu." 
Zechariah4:11 Meme kumukonka kabidi ne: — Mitshi ya olive ibidi idi ku dia balume ne ku dia bakaji dia tshitekelu tshia miendu, idi yumvuija tshinyi?" 
Zechariah4:12 Meme kumukonka kabidi ne: — Matamba a mitshi ya olive abidi adibu bateke pabuipi ne milonda ibidi ya tshiamu tshia mpawungi, muaba udi manyi makunze apatukila, adi umvuija tshinyi?" 
Zechariah4:13 Kungebejaye ne: — Kuena mumanye anyi? Meme kumuandamuna ne: — Tshiena mumanye to. 
Zechariah4:14 Ke yeye kungumvuija ne: — Mitshi eyi ke bantu babidi bavuabu balabe manyi a tshijila, bua kuenzelabu Maweja-Nangila wa buloba bujima mudimu." 
Zechariah5:1 Maweja-Nangila kundeja kabidi bualu bukuabu. Meme kumona muvungu wa mukanda, ubuka mulu." 
Zechariah5:2 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kunkonka ne: — Tshiudi umona ntshinyi? Meme kumuandamuna ne: — Ndi mmona muvungu wa mukanda ubuka mulu: udi ne metre dikumi mu bule, ne metre atanu mu butshiama." 
Zechariah5:3 Ke yeye kungambila ne: — Mu mukanda ewu mudi miaku ya mulawu wa kuela ditunga dijima: luseke lumue lua muvungu wa mukanda mbafunde ne: nebipate bivi bonsu mu ditunga, luseke lukuabu mbafunde ne: nebipate kabidi bonsu badi baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima." 
Zechariah5:4 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Yeye nkayende neele mulawu ewu; neufike mu nzubu mua muivi yonsu, ne mua muntu yonsu udi uditshipa mitshipu ya dishima mu dina dianyi. Mulawu neushale mu nzubu ewu. Neubutule bionsu bidimu, nansha mikamba ne mabue mene." 
Zechariah5:5 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi, kungambila ne: — Tangila! Tshiudi umona tshifumina kuaka ntshinyi?" 
Zechariah5:6 Meme kumukonka ne: — Ntshinyi etshi? Kungandamunaye ne: — Munda mua tshibondu etshi mudi malu mabi a mu ditunga dijima. 
Zechariah5:7 Diba adi, tshibuikidiji tshia tshiamu tshifike tshia bujitu tshivua ku mushiku wa tshibondu kubulukatshi. Meme kumona mukaji musombe munda mua tshibondu." 
Zechariah5:8 Mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kungambila ne: — Mukaji ewu udi tshimfuanyi tshia Bubi. Pashishe mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu kusakila mukaji munda mua tshibondu. Kumubuikilaye tshiakabidi. 
Zechariah5:9 Mbanduluka, meme kumona bakaji babidi babuka mulu, basakila kudi lupepele: bavua ne mapuapua bu a kasonganyunyi. Bobu kuangata tshibondu, kubuka natshi mulu." 
Zechariah5:10 Meme kukonka mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu ne: — Badi baya ne tshibondu etshi penyi? 
Zechariah5:11 Kungandamunaye ne: — Badi baya natshi ku Mezopotamiya. Nebatshiashile nzubu, pashishe nebatshienzele tshibumba, bua kutshitekapu." 
Zechariah6:1 Maweja-Nangila kundeja kabidi bualu bukuabu. Meme kumona matempu a mvita anayi apatukila pankatshi pa mikuna ibidi ya tshiamu tshikunze. 
Zechariah6:2 Ku ditempu dia kumpala bavua basuike tubalu tukunze, ku ditempu dibidi tubalu tufike," 
Zechariah6:3 ku ditempu disatu, tubalu tutoke, ku ditempu dinayi, tubalu tukunzubile tua matobamatoba." 
Zechariah6:4 Meme kukonka mutumibue wa Mvidi Mukulu uvua uyukila nanyi ne: — Mukalenga, tubalu tudibu basuike ku matempu etu tudi tumvuija tshinyi?" 
Zechariah6:5 Kungandamunaye ne: — Matempu aa adi mpepele inayi: ivua mimane muaba udi Maweja-Nangila wa buloba bujima; mmiumuke muaba awu amu mpindiewu. 
Zechariah6:6 Ditempu divuabu bakoka kudi tubalu tufike kuyadi ku luseke lua buloba bua ku mutu. Tubalu tutoke kuyatu ku luseke ludi diba dibuelela. Tubalu tua matobamatoba kuyatu ku buloba bua kuinshi. 
Zechariah6:7 Tubalu bikunzubile tusemena, kulombatu bua kuya kutentekela buloba. Maweja-Nangila kutuambila ne: — Yayi, nutentekele buloba. Kuenzatu nanku." 
Zechariah6:8 Ke Maweja-Nangila kumbikila, ungambila ne: — Tangila! Tubalu tudi tuya ku mutu, netupuekeshishe Mueyelu wanyi mu ditunga edi." 
Zechariah6:9 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: 
Zechariah6:10 — Angata bintu bia bavua mu bupika, bidibu batuale kudi Eldayi, Tobiya ne Yedaya. Uye lelu ewu kudi Yoziya, muana wa Sefanya. Kuende ke kuvua bantu abu batule, pavuabu bafume ku Babilone." 
Zechariah6:11 Newangate tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, ne tshiamu tshia mpawungi. Wenze nabi tshifulu tshia lumu, neutshiase mutuangaji munene Yeshuwa, muana wa Yoshadake, ku mutu." 
Zechariah6:12 Umuambile ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Kudi muntu munemu dina diende Lutonga. Nsombelu wa bantu neashintuluke bualu buende. Neibakulule nzubu wanyi wa tshijila. 
Zechariah6:13 Eyo, yeye ke wamuasa tshiakabidi. Neavuale bimanyinu bia bukalenga, neasombe mu nkuasa wa bumfumu bua kulombola bantu. Mutuangaji neikale pabuipi nende. Bantu aba babidi nebumvuangane bikole." 
Zechariah6:14 “Tshifulu tshia lumu netshikale mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua bantu bavuluke Eldayi Tobiya ne Yedaya, ne malu mimpe avua muana wa Sefanya muenze.”" 
Zechariah6:15 Bantu badi kule nebafike bua kuambuluisha badi basa nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila. Nanku nenumanye ne: Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ke uvua muntume kunudi. Malu onsu aa neenzeke panuikala bitabe muenu muonsu Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wenu. 
Zechariah7:1 Daryaveshe uvua mumane kulala mu bukalenga bidimu binayi. Matuku anayi a ngondu wa tshitema, udibu binyika ne: ngondu wa Kislewu, Maweja-Nangila kummanyisha bualu." 
Zechariah7:2 Bena Betele bavua batume Sharesere, Regeme-Meleke, ne bantu bakuabu, mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. Bayua babatume bua kulomba luse kudi Maweja-Nangila," 
Zechariah7:3 ne bua kukonka batuangaji ne bambi ne: — Tudi ne bua kutungunuka amu ne miadi, tujila kabidi biakudia mu ngondu muitanu wa tshidimu tshionsu, bu mutudi tuenza kukadi bidimu bia bungi anyi?" 
Zechariah7:4 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kungambila ne: 
Zechariah7:5 Andamuna batuangaji ne bena ditunga bonsu ne: “Kukadi bidimu makumi muanda mutekete, binudi nujila biakudia, nuasa miadi mu ngondu muitanu ne wa muanda mutekete, Panudi nulama bijila ebi, nudi nuela meji ne: nudi nunsankisha anyi?" 
Zechariah7:6 Nansha panudi nudia, nunua, nudi nuenza amu bua kudisankisha nkayenu!”" 
Zechariah7:7 Ku kale, bambi bavua bamane kunubela mushindu umue mu dina dia Maweja-Nangila. Tshikondu atshi, bena Yerushalayime, ne bena bimenga bivua bibanyungulule, bavua basomba talalaa. Ke tshikondu kabidi tshiwa buloba bua kuinshi mu ditunga, ne bua luseke ludi diba dibuelela, ne bantu ba bungi." 
Zechariah7:8 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kundombaye bua kuvuluija tshivuaye muambe ne: 
Zechariah7:9 “Kosayi nsambu pa yoyi, nuenzelangane malu mimpe, ne muoyi muimpe wa dinanga." 
Zechariah7:10 Kanukengeshi bakaji bakamba, bana ba nshiye, benyi nansha bapele. Kanuedi meji nansha makese, a kuenzelangana bibi.”" 
Zechariah7:11 Kadi bantu bavua babenga kuteleja. Bawa bangela nyima, bajibika ne matshi, bua kabumvu." 
Zechariah7:12 Kupapishabu muoyi wabu bu dibue dia mbonge. Kabavua basue kumvua malongesha a Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, avua Mueyelu wende muakuile kale mukana mua bambi. Nanku Maweja-Nangila kufika munda bikole," 
Zechariah7:13 wamba ne: “Pamvua mubabikile bua benze mundi musue, kabavua basue kunteleja. Nanku pavuabu bambikila bua meme kubambuluisha, meme kubenga kabidi." 
Zechariah7:14 Meme kubatangalaja mu bisamba bia mishindu yonsu, biwabu kabayi bamanye. Ditunga divuabu bumuke, divua dishale munda mutupu. Muntu nansha umue kawa utambakenamu kabidi to. Ditunga diabu divua dimpe bua kusomba, bobu kudiandamuna tshipela.”" 
Zechariah8:1 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kungambila ne: 
Zechariah8:2 “Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi nnanga Yerushalayime bikole. Ke pandi mfikila baluishi bende munda." 
Zechariah8:3 Ke pandi ngamba ne: Nempingane mu Yerushalayime. Nensombe mu Siyone tshiakabidi. Bantu nebinyike Yerushalayime ne: ‘Tshimenga tshidi tshilamata Mvidi Mukulu.’ Mukuna wanyi wa Siyone, nebawinyike ne: ‘Mukuna wa tshijila.’" 
Zechariah8:4 Eyo, bakulakaja, balume ne bakaji, badi benda bashindamena ku dikombu, nebasombe tshiakabidi mu misesu ya mu Yerushalayime." 
Zechariah8:5 Bana ba balume ne ba bakaji ba bungi, nebanayile tshiakabidi mu misesu ya mu tshimenga." 
Zechariah8:6 Pikala bena Izrayele badi bashale ne muoyi, bamona ne: ebi kabiena mua kuenzeka. Kadi meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi mua kubikumbaja." 
Zechariah8:7 Ndi nnulaya ne: neusungidile bantu banyi, badi mu bupika mu matunga a kudi diba dipatukila ne kudidi dibuelela." 
Zechariah8:8 Nembumushe ku matunga awu, bua kusombabu mu Yerushalayime. Nebikale bantu banyi, meme nengikale Mvidi Mukulu wabu. Nengikale mukalenga wabu, wa muoyi umue, udi ukosa nsambu pa yoyi.”" 
Zechariah8:9 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, udi wamba ne: “Koleshayi muoyi! Mpindiewu nudi bumvue malaya, avua bambi bamane kunuambila mu dina dianyi, tshikondu tshiyuabu babange kuasulula tshitaku tshia nzubu wanyi." 
Zechariah8:10 Ku kale kabavua bafuta muntu, bua mudimu uvuaye wenza, nansha bua mudimu uwa nyama ikuata. Bantu kabavua mua kutambakana mu ditunga, bualu baluishi bavua miaba yonsu, kabidi meme mvua musongakaje bantu." 
Zechariah8:11 Kadi ndi nnuambila ne: mpindiewu tshiena nkengesha kabidi bena Izrayele badi bashale ne muoyi, mumvua muenze ku kale." 
Zechariah8:12 Nentume ditalala mu buloba: mionji ya nwinyo neikuame tumuma, buloba nebumene biakudia, mvula neyiloke ya bungi. Bantu banyi badi bashale ne muoyi, nembapeteshe bintu ebi bionsu." 
Zechariah8:13 Nuenu bena mu bukalenga bua Yuda ne bua Izrayele, nuvua tshilejilu tshia bantu batshipa munkatshi mua bisamba bikuabu. Mpindiewu ndi nnusungidila, nenuikale tshilejilu tshia badibu bela lupemba. Kanutshinyi kabidi! Kolayi muoyi!”" 
Zechariah8:14 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Pamvua mujadike bua kunukengesha, bualu bankambua benu mbamfikishe munda, tshivua mushintulule diyi dianyi." 
Zechariah8:15 Kadi mpindiewu ndi mujadike bua kunuela lupemba, nuenu bena Yerushalayime, ne bena ditunga dia Yuda dijima. Nanku kanutshinyi kabidi." 
Zechariah8:16 Telejayi munudi mua kuenza: Muntu yonsu ambile muanabu malu malelela. Mu tubadi tuenu nukose nsambu pa yoyi, nupingaje ditalala mu ditunga." 
Zechariah8:17 Kanuedi meji a kuenzelangana bibi. Nulekele kutshipa mitshipu ya dishima, bualu meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena muanyishe malu a nanku.”" 
Zechariah8:18 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kungambila ne: 
Zechariah8:19 — Matuku anudi nujila biakudia, mu ngondu muinayi, muitanu, wa muanda mutekete, nansha wa dikumi, ku tshidimu tshionsu, neikale a tshibilu tshinene adi bena Yuda basanka, batshionkomoka. Kadi nuambilangane amu malu malelela, nukebe kabidi diakalenga dia bonsu!" 
Zechariah8:20 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Bantu ba mu bisamba bikuabu, ne ba mu bimenga bivule, nebafike mu Yerushalayime tshiakabidi." 
Zechariah8:21 Bena mu tshimenga kampanda, nebambile bena mu tshimenga tshikuabu ne: — Tuyayi kutendelela Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. Tumusengelele bua atuele lupemba. Bobu nebandamune ne: — Eyo, tudi tuya nenu." 
Zechariah8:22 Bushuwa, bantu ba bungi, ne ba mu bisamba bidi ne bukole, nebalue mu Yerushalayime, nebantendelele, nebansengelele bua mbele lupemba." 
Zechariah8:23 Diba adi, bantu dikumi ba mu bisamba bishilangane, nebakuate muena Yuda umue, ku luzemba lua tshilamba, bamuambila ne: ‘Tudi basue kuya nebe, bualu tudi bajingulule ne: Mvidi Mukulu udi kuenu.’ ”" 
Zechariah9:1 Maweja-Nangila mmutume mukenji. Diyi diende ndifike mu ditunga dia Adrake, ndishikidile mu tshimenga tshia Damase. Bualu Maweja-Nangila kena umona amu meku a bena Izrayele, kadi udi utangila bantu bonsu." 
Zechariah9:2 Diyi diende ndifike mu tshimenga tshia Amate, tshidi pabuipi ne tshimenga tshia Damase, ne mu tshimenga tshia Tire ne tshia Sidone, bimenga bidi ne bantu ba meji." 
Zechariah9:3 Bena Tire mbakoleshe tshimenga tshiabu ne bimana; mbakunguje tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, bungi bu buloba bua mu njila; mbakunguje tshiamu tshia mpawungi, bungi bu lusenga lua mu misesu." 
Zechariah9:4 Kadi Maweja-Nangila neapawule bionsu bidi mu tshimenga etshi, neele bimana biatshi mu mayi manene, neatshioshe, tshibutuke." 
Zechariah9:5 Pamona tshimenga tshia Askalone bidi bienzeka ebi, netshikuatshike bowa; tshimenga tshia Ngaza netshizakale; tshimenga tshia Ekrone netshipampakane, bualu katshiena mua kutekemena kabidi badi mua kutshiambuluisha. Mu tshimenga tshia Ngaza, kamuakuikala mukalenga kabidi. Bena mu tshimenga tshia Askalone nebaye nabu mu bupika." 
Zechariah9:6 Bantu ba bisamba bishilangane, nebasombe mu tshimenga tshia Asdode. Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Ke mundi mbutula bena Peleshete badi baditambisha nanku." 
Zechariah9:7 Nempatule mukana muabu, minyinyi kayiyi mipatule mashi, nansha minyinyi buabu balambule mvidie. Bena Peleshete badi bashale ne muoyi, nebikale bantu banyi, anu bu bena diku kampanda mu tshisamba tshia Yuda. Bena Ekrone nebadisangishe ne bantu banyi, muvua bena Yebusa benza kale." 
Zechariah9:8 Nendame ditunga dianyi, bua baluishi kabafikimu, muntu nansha umue kakengeshi bantu banyi, bualu mpindiewu ndi mubatabalele.”" 
Zechariah9:9 Yerushalayime, sanka bikole! Wewe tshimenga tshia Siyone, ela tunkunduluila! Tangila mudi mukalenga webe ukuvuila. Udi uvua kukusungidila, kukosa nsambu pa yoyi. Kadi kena uditambisha to! Udi mubande pa nyama wa mpunde, pa muana wa mpunde mukaji." 
Zechariah9:10 Neumushe matempu a mvita mu Efrayime. Neapatule tubalu mu Yerushalayime. Neatshibule mata a mvita. Neafile ditalala mu bisamba bia bantu, neashale mfumu ku mayi manene ne ku makuabu, biangatshile ku musulu wa Perate, too ne ku ndekelu wa buloba." 
Zechariah9:11 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Bualu bua ndondu undi mutue nenu, udi mashi a nyama ya milambu mashindike, nempikule bana benu badi mu lukanu, badi basomba mu bupika bu mu tshina katshiyi ne mayi." 
Zechariah9:12 Nuenu bena lukanu badi mua kutekemena lupandu mpindiewu, pinganayi mu tshimenga tshienu. Mbamane kuibakulula bimana biatshi. Mpindiewu ndi nnuambila ne: nennuvudijile disanka dipite misangu ibidi dikenga dinuvua nadi." 
Zechariah9:13 Yuda neangambuluishe bu buta bua mvita, Efrayime neikale bu mukete. Siyone, nentume bantu bebe, bua kuluishabu bena Ngreke. Nebangambuluishe bua kuluangana mvita, bu mudi muele wa myita wambuluisha muluanganyi wa bukitu.”" 
Zechariah9:14 Maweja-Nangila neamueneke, ku mutu kua bantu bende. Mukete wende neuye bu muele wa mvula. Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu, neele mpungi, neafike munkatshi mua mvunde, udi ufuma kuinshi kua ditunga." 
Zechariah9:15 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, nealame bantu bende, nealokeshe mvula ya mabue, bua kubutula ne kuzaza baluishi babu. Nebitshikije mashi a baluishi babu panshi, bu mudibu bitshikija pa matumba a tshilambuilu maluvu, nansha mashi a nyama ya milambu, adi tente mu makopu a kumiamina nawu." 
Zechariah9:16 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu neasungidile bantu bende, mudi mulami wa mikoku usungidila mikoku yende. Nebakenke bu mabue a mushinga mukole, adi ku tshifulu tshia lumu. Nebele nsese mu ditunga." 
Zechariah9:17 Mu ditunga diabu dimpe ditambe, nemuikale diakalenga dinene. Ntete ya bukula, ne maluvu mapiamapia, nebipeshe bansongalume ne bansongakaji mubidi muimpe mupite." 
Zechariah10:1 Tendelelayi Maweja-Nangila, anulokeshile mvula a mbedi. Yeye ke udi utuma mavuba a mvula. Neanulokeshile mvula wa bungi, neameneshe ntete bua muntu yonsu apete biakudia mu madimi." 
Zechariah10:2 Mvidie inudi nukonka malu, idi inuambila malu a dishima. Batempi ba mbuku badi banudinga, bilota bidibu bawilangana bidi bia patupu. Badi basamba bantu ne miaku ya patupu. Ke pavua bantu balalakana, bu mikoku idi ikenga, kayiyi ne mulami." 
Zechariah10:3 “Balami ba bisamba bikuabu, badi balombola bantu banyi, babakengesha, ndi mubafikile munda; nembanyoke. Eyo, meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi ngamba nanku. Meme nkayanyi nendame mikoku yanyi, tshisamba tshia bena Yuda. Nenye natshi mu mvita, bu kabalu kanyi kadi katshimuna." 
Zechariah10:4 Bamfumu ba mishindu yonsu, nebafume mu tshisamba etshi, nebikale ne bukole, bu dibue dia mu ditumba, bashindame bu milonda idibu bashindika nayi ntenta mu buloba, bakole bu buta bua mvita." 
Zechariah10:5 Nebikale bilobu. Nebadiate badi babaluisha, bu mudibu badiata bitotshi mu njila. Nebaluangane nanku, bualu Maweja-Nangila udi nabu. Baluishi badi babanda pa tubalu, nebafue bundu." 
Zechariah10:6 Nenkankamike tshisamba tshia Yuda, nensungidile bena Izrayele. Nembapingaje mu ditunga diabu tshiakabidi, nembaleje mundi mubanange. Nebikale tshiakabidi bu tshikondu tshimvua tshiyi muanji kubabenga. Ndi Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wabu, nembapeshe bidibu bandomba." 
Zechariah10:7 Bena Efrayime nebikale bakole, bu bena mvita ba bukitu. Nebasanke bu bantu bamane kunua maluvu. Pamona bana babu bidi bienzeke ebi, nebasanke. Nebumvue musangelu munda muabu, bua bidi Maweja-Nangila muenze." 
Zechariah10:8 Nembikile bantu banyi, nembasangishe pamue, bualu ndi mujadike bua kubapikula. Nebavulangane bungi buvuabu kale." 
Zechariah10:9 Mvua mubatangalaje mu bisamba bikuabu, bu mudibu bamiamina maminu. Kadi nebamvulukile mu matunga a kule. Nanku nebakoleshe bana mu matunga awu, pashishe nebapingane nabu mu ditunga diabu." 
Zechariah10:10 Nembumushe mu ditunga dia Ejipitu ne dia bena Ashure, nembapingaje kuabu, nenye nabu mu ditunga dia Ngilaade ne dia Lebanone. Kadi nansha mu matunga awu, kabakupeta muaba mukumbane." 
Zechariah10:11 Nebasabuke mayi manene adi ne njiwu. Meme Maweja-Nangila nentekeshe mavuala, nenkamishe musulu wa Nile. Ditunga dia bena Ashure didi diditambisha, nedifue bundu, ditunga dia Ejipitu kadiakuikala ne bukole." 
Zechariah10:12 Nenkankamike bantu banyi, nebenze amu malu adi andengelela. Meme Maweja-Nangila, ndi ngamba nanku.”" 
Zechariah11:1 Lebanone, unzulula biibi biebe, kapia kabutule mitshi yebe ya sedre." 
Zechariah11:2 Mitshi ya siprese, asayi miadi. Mbakose mitshi ya sedre, mbabutule mitshi mimpe. Mitshi ya nsanga ya mu Bashane, tuayi mikemu, mbasole difu dienu, divua muntu kayi mua kubuela." 
Zechariah11:3 Bakalenga ba matunga mbase miadi, tshikondu tshiabu tshia kuditambisha ntshijike. Nyama ya ntambue idi ikungula, bualu mbabutule metu ayi mimpe, ku muelelu wa Yardene." 
Zechariah11:4 Dituku dikuabu, Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi kungambila ne: — Ikala mulami wa mikoku idibu bakeba kushipa." 
Zechariah11:5 Bantu badi bayisumba badi bayishipa, kabayi bitaba ne: tudi ne tshilumbu. Bantu badi bayisumbisha badi bela mbila ne: “Tuele Maweja-Nangila tuasakidila, bualu tudi ne bintu bivule!” Balami bayi mene kabena bayifuila luse." 
Zechariah11:6 Ke pandi meme Maweja-Nangila ngamba ne: Tshiena mfuila bantu ba mu buloba ebu luse kabidi to. Nemfile muntu yonsu mu bianza bia muena mutumba nende, ne mu bianza bia mukalenga wende. Bakalenga nebanyangakaje buloba. Tshiena usungidila muntu ku bianza biabu." 
Zechariah11:7 Ke meme kushala mulami wa mikoku, ivua bangenda mushinga bakeba kushipa. Nanku meme kuangata makombu abidi. Meme kuinyika dikombu dia kumpala ne: “Bulunda,” dibidi ne: “Bobumue.” Ke meme kulama nawu mikoku bimpe!" 
Zechariah11:8 Meme kuipata ku mudimu balami basatu ba mikoku, munkatshi mua ngondu umue. Kadi tshivua mulame mikoku ne lutulu, bualu ivua imbenga." 
Zechariah11:9 Ke meme kuyambila ne: — Tshiena musue kunulama kabidi to. Idi ne bua kufua, ifue! Idibu bakeba kushipa, bayishipe! Idi ishala ne muoyi, idiangane nkayayi." 
Zechariah11:10 Meme kuangata dikombu dimvua muinyike dina ne: bulunda, kuditshibula, bua kuupula ndondu uvua Maweja-Nangila mutue ne bisamba bionsu." 
Zechariah11:11 Ndondu kunyanguka dituku adi. Bangenda mushinga ba mikoku eyi bavua bantangile. Kujingululabu ne: Maweja-Nangila ke udi utuambila malu ku bidi muambi wenza. 
Zechariah11:12 Meme kubambila ne: — Panudi bamona ne: mbimpe kumfuta, numfute; tshianana nulekele. Ke bobu kubala nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole makumi asatu, kumfuta." 
Zechariah11:13 Maweja-Nangila kungambila ne: — Badi bela meji ne: ke mushinga wanyi mujima! Upeshe muntu udi wengulula biamu nkanu eyi ya tshishingashinga! Meme kuangata nkanu ya tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole ayi makumi asatu, kuyipesha muntu udi wengulula biamu mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila." 
Zechariah11:14 Pashishe meme kutshibula dikombu dibidi dimvua muinyike dina dia ne: bobumue, bua kushipa buena muntu pankatshi pa bena Yuda ne bena Izrayele." 
Zechariah11:15 Maweja-Nangila kungambila kabidi ne: — Mpindiewu udileje bu mulami wa mikoku mutshimbakane. 
Zechariah11:16 Bualu ndi musue kutuma mulami mukuabu wa mikoku mu ditunga: kakutangila mikoku idibu bakeba kushipa, kakukeba idi mijimine, kakuondapa idibu batape, kakudisha itshidi mishale ne bukole. Kadi neadie munyinyi wa idi ne manyi; neayiboze bikonu, bua kayinyemi." 
Zechariah11:17 Mulami mutshimbakane udi ushiya mikoku yende, mmuena diakabi. Mvita ibutule bukole budi mu maboku ende, ishipe mesu ende, diboku diende ndiedi diuminyine, disu diende dia balume kadiakumona to!" 
Zechariah12:1 Maweja-Nangila mmutume mukenji udi utangila bena Izrayele. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubalule diulu, muteke buloba pa bitaku biabu, mupeshe muntu mueyelu ne muoyi, udi wamba ne:" 
Zechariah12:2 — Nengenze Yerushalayime bu dikopu dia nwinyo, diwule ne tshiji tshianyi. Bantu bonsu badi bamunyunguluke, nebanue, balembakane. Kanyungunyungu nekakuate bena Yuda bonsu, panyungulukilabu Yerushalayime kudi bena myita." 
Zechariah12:3 Dituku adi, nengenze Yerushalayime dibue dinene dia bujitu, didi bantu bakeba kuambula. Kadi bonsu badi badiambula nebatapike. Nenku bisamba bionsu bia pa buloba nebidisangishe bua kuluisha Yerushalayime." 
Zechariah12:4 Dituku adi, nenkuatshishe tubalu tuabu bowa bukole, nempadishe babandi ba pa tubalu ne bowa. Nentabalele bena Yuda, kadi nemfofamije tubalu tua bantu ba bisamba bikuabu. Meme ndi ngamba nanku." 
Zechariah12:5 Bamfumu ba bena Yuda nebambilangane ne: “Bena mu Yerushalayime mbapetele bukole kudi Mvidi Mukulu Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu.” 
Zechariah12:6 Dituku adi, nengenze bamfumu ba bena Yuda, bu tshikutu tshia kapia mu ditu, nansha bu tshikunyi tshia kapia muinshi mua bisumbu bia miepu ya ntete ya kuenza bukula. Nebabutule nseke yonsu bisamba bidi bibanyunguluke. Kadi bena mu Yerushalayime nebasombe amu mu tshimenga tshiabu." 
Zechariah12:7 Maweja-Nangila neadianze kuambuluisha meku a Yuda, bua ndelanganyi ya Davide, ne bena Yerushalayime, kabadimonyi ne: tudi ku mutu kua bena Yuda bakuabu." 
Zechariah12:8 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila neambuluishe bena Yerushalayime: badi kabayi ne bukole munkatshi muabu, nebapete bukole bu bua Davide. Ndelanganyi ya Davide neikale bu Mvidi Mukulu wabu, bu mudi mutumibue wa Maweja-Nangila udi wenda kumpala kuabu." 
Zechariah12:9 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: Dituku adi, nembuele mu myita, bua kubutula bisamba bionsu bidi biluisha bena mu Yerushalayime." 
Zechariah12:10 Nempeshe ndelanganyi ya Davide, ne bena mu Yerushalayime, muoyi wa luse. Nebantendelele. Nebatangile kundi, bavuluka muntu uvuabu basompole. Nebamudile, bu mudibu badila muana wa balume umue mumane kufua. Nebase miadi mikole, bu mudibu basa miadi padi muanabute mufue." 
Zechariah12:11 Dituku adi, madilu manene neikale mu Yerushalayime, amu bu muvuabu benzela madilu a Adade-Rimone mu tshibandabanda tshia Megido." 
Zechariah12:12 Tshiota tshionsu tshia mu ditunga netshiteke atshi madilu: tshiota tshia ndelanganyi ya Davide, balume pa nkayabu, bakaji pa nkayabu; tshiota tshia Natane, balume pa nkayabu, bakaji pa nkayabu;" 
Zechariah12:13 tshiota tshia Levi, balume pa nkayabu, bakaji pa nkayabu; tshiota tshia Shimeyi, balume pa nkayabu, bakaji pa nkayabu." 
Zechariah12:14 Nansha biota bikuabu bionsu kabidi nebiteke abi madilu, bantu balume pa nkayabu, bakaji pa nkayabu." 
Zechariah13:1 Dituku adi, mpokolu wa mayi neabudike bua kusukula bubi ne malu mabi a ndelanganyi ya Davide ne a bena Yerushalayime." 
Zechariah13:2 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: Dituku adi, nengumushe mu ditunga mpingu ya kutendelela nayi nwidie. Muntu nansha umue kakuvuluka kabidi nansha mena ayi. Nengumushe kabidi mu ditunga bantu bonsu badi badiamba ne: tudi bambi. Nentuyishe dijinga dienu dia kutendelela nwidie." 
Zechariah13:3 Pikala muntu umanyisha bantu malu mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, tatuende ne mamuende menemene neba-muambile ne: “Ufue, bualu udi wamba malu a dishima, utela dina dia Mvidi Mukulu.” Baledi bende menemene nebamutape ne muele, patshidiye umanyisha bantu malu." 
Zechariah13:4 Dituku adi, bambi nebumvue bundu, batshina kuamba malu mu dina dia Mvidi Mukulu, nansha kulonda malu adi Mvidi Mukulu ubaleja. Kabakudinga kabidi bantu, bavuala tshinkutu tshia bambi tshienza ne buoya." 
Zechariah13:5 Muntu yonsu wa kudibu neambe ne: “Meme tshiena muambi to, ndi tshidime; ke mudimu undi nkuata biangatshile ku buana buanyi too ne mpindiewu. ”" 
Zechariah13:6 Kadi muntu yeye mumukonke ne: “Mputa idi pa tshiadi tshiebe eyi nya ku tshinyi,” neandamune ne: “Bavua bayintape mu nzubu mua balunda banyi! ”" 
Zechariah13:7 Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi wamba ne: “Muele wa myita, utape mulami wa mikoku, utuvua tukuata nende mudimu; ushipe mulami wa mikoku, mikoku neitangalake, meme mene nenduishe bana bayi.”" 
Zechariah13:8 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba kabidi ne: “Bia bisatu bibidi bia bena ditunga edi nebifue, amu tshia bisatu tshiabu tshimue ke tshiashala ne muoyi." 
Zechariah13:9 Nengumushe mikiya ya badi bashala ne muoyi. Nembatete, mudibu bateta tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole, mu kapia. Nanku nebantendelele; nenkumbaje bidibu balomba. Nembabikile ne: ‘Bantu banyi,’ bobu nebangambe ne: ‘Maweja-Nangila ke Mvidi Mukulu wetu. ’ ”" 
Zechariah14:1 Dituku didi Maweja-Nangila ufika munda, dikadi pabuipi. Bena mu Yerushalayime, bantu nebabanyangane, bintu bienu, nuenu batangile." 
Zechariah14:2 Bualu Maweja-Nangila neasangishe bisamba bionsu bua kuluisha Yerushalayime: nebakuate tshimenga, nebapawule bia mu nzubu yonsu, nebakuate bakaji, bababuelele mu nzubu ku bukole. Tshia bibidi tshia bantu netshiye mu bupika, kadi bakuabu nebashale mu tshimenga." 
Zechariah14:3 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila nealuishe bisamba ebi, bu mudiye muluishe baluishi ba bantu bende mu bikondu bionsu." 
Zechariah14:4 Dituku adi, neimane pa mukuna wa mitshi ya olive, udi pabuipi ne Yerushalayime, luseke ludi diba dipatukila lua tshimenga. Mukuna wa mitshi ya olive neupandike pankatshinkatshi, tshibandabanda tshinene netshimueneke, tshibanga luseke ludi diba dipatukila, tshifika too ne ku ludidi dibuelela. Tshia bibidi tshimue tshia mukuna netshisemenene luseke lua ku mutu kua ditunga, tshitupa tshikuabu netshisemenene luseke lua kuinshi kua ditunga." 
Zechariah14:5 Nenunyemene mu tshibandabanda etshi, tshidi tshienzeka pankatshi pa mikuna, bualu netshialabale too ne ku Ashale. Nenunyeme muvua bankambua benu banyeme, pavua tshikumina tshienzeka, tshikondu tshivua Uziya mukalenga wa ditunga dia Yuda. Nanku Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wanyi neafike, ne batumibue bende badi bamukuatshila mudimu." 
Zechariah14:6 Dituku adi, kabakukengela kabidi butoke. Mashika, nansha mabue a mvula kabiakuikalaku." 
Zechariah14:7 Dituku dia pabuadi adi, didi Maweja-Nangila nkayende mumanye, amu munya newikaleku. Bantu kabakusunguluja kabidi munya ne butuku. Nansha dilolu, munya neuteme." 
Zechariah14:8 Dituku adi, mpokolu neabudike mu Yerushalayime, tshia bibidi tshimue tshia mayi awu, netshipuekele ku Mayi manene a luepu, tshia bibidi tshikuabu netshipuekele ku Mayi manene a pankatshi. Nebienzeke nanku tshidimu tshijima, mu mushipu, nansha mu mvula." 
Zechariah14:9 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila neikale mukalenga wa buloba bujima. Bantu kabakukukuila kabidi mukuabu to, kadi amu Yeye nkayende Mvidi Mukulu. Bonsu nebatumbishe amu dina diende." 
Zechariah14:10 Ditunga dijima didi dinyunguluka Yerushalayime, nedishale mpata, biangatshile ku Ngeba ku mutu wa ditunga, too ne ku Rimone, kuinshi mu ditunga. Yerushalayime neikale ku mutu kua misoku idi mimunyunguluke. Tshimenga etshi netshituadije ku tshiibi tshia Binyamine, too ne ku tshiibi tshia ku Ditumba, ku muaba uvua tshiibi tshia kale, ne ku kaleya ka Ananeyele, too ne ku bikaminu bia nwinyo bia Mukalenga." 
Zechariah14:11 Bantu nebasombe mu tshimenga, kabakukeba kabidi mua kutshibutula. Bantu nebasombemu talalaa." 
Zechariah14:12 Kadi bantu bonsu bavua baye kuluisha Yerushalayime, bipupu biabatumina Maweja-Nangila bidi nenku: minyinyi yabu yapambidi neyibole, bobu batshikale ne muoyi; mesu abu neabolele mu bindokundoku biawu, ludimi luabu nelubolele mukana muabu." 
Zechariah14:13 Dituku adi, Maweja-Nangila neabakuatshishe bowa bikole. Nebatandangane ya bungi, muntu yonsu nealuishe muena mutumba nende." 
Zechariah14:14 Bena mu ditunga dia Yuda nebaluangane, bua kusungidila Yerushalayime. Nebanyenge bubanji buonsu bua bisamba, bidi pamue nabu; nebunguje mpawungi, biamu bitoke bia mushinga mukole, ne bilamba bia bungi." 
Zechariah14:15 Nyama yonsu idi mu mitanda ya baluishi, tubalu, mpunde, tumelu ne mpunde mikaji, neyipete bipupu bia momumue nebivuabu bakengesha nabi bantu." 
Zechariah14:16 Dituku adi, bantu bawa bashale ne muoyi, munkatshi mua bisamba bivua biluisha Yerushalayime, nebaye mu tshimenga etshi ku tshidimu ku tshidimu, bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, Mukalenga wa bukole buonsu, ne bua kuenza tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa." 
Zechariah14:17 Pikala bena tshisamba tshia pa buloba, babenga kuya ku Yerushalayime, bua kutendelela Maweja-Nangila, Mukalenga wa bukole buonsu, mvula kakuloka mu ditunga diabu to." 
Zechariah14:18 Pikala bena Ejipitu babenga kuya ku Yerushalayime, bua kuenzaku tshibilu tshia tuzubu tua Bisasa, tshipupu netshibakuate, muvuatshi tshikuate bisamba bikuabu, bivua bibenga kuya kuenza tshibilu etshi." 
Zechariah14:19 Ke dinyoka dikale nadi bena Ejipitu ne bisamba bionsu, bidi bibenga kuenza tshibilu etshi." 
Zechariah14:20 Dituku adi, nebafunde too ne pa ndibu ya tubalu ne: “Tshintu tshia tshijila tshia Maweja-Nangila”. Ngesu ya mu nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, neikale kabidi ya tshijila, anu mudi makopu a kumiamina nawu, adibu bateka kumpala kua tshilambuilu." 
Zechariah14:21 Ngesu yonsu idi mu Yerushalayime, ne mu ditunga dia Yuda, neyikale bintu bia tshijila bia Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu. Bantu bonsu badi bavua kufila milambu yabu, nebangate ngesu ayi, bua kuipikilamu minyinyi ya milambu. Pafika dituku adi, kakuakuikala ngenda mushinga kabidi mu nzubu wa Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu." 
Malachi1:1 Telejayi bivua Maweja-Nangila muambile Malaki, bua kumanyishaye bena Izrayele." 
Malachi1:2 Maweja-Nangila udi wambila bantu bende ne: — Ndi mununange. Kadi bobu badi bamukonka ne: — Tshidi tshijadika ne: udi mutunange ntshinyi? Maweja-Nangila udi wandamuna ne: — Esawu kavua muanabu ne Yakobe anyi? Kadi mvua munange Yakobe," 
Malachi1:3 mudiwule Esawu. Mvua munyange buloba bua mikuna budibu basombe kudi bena Edome, ndelanganyi ya Esawu. Mvua mufile ditunga diabu kudi mibuabua ya mu tshipela." 
Malachi1:4 Pikala bena Edome bamba ne: “Mbatubunde, kadi netuibake tshiakabidi bimenga bietu bidibu banyangakaje.” Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi ngamba ne: “Nansha bibake tshiakabidi bimenga abi, kadi meme ne-mbiupule.” Nebinyike ditunga diabu ne: “Ditunga dia malu mabi.” Badi basombamu nebabinyike ne: “Bantu badi Maweja-Nangila ulekela tshiji.”" 
Malachi1:5 Nuenu bena Izrayele nenumone malu aa. Nenukeme, nuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi uleja bukole buende too ne ku ba bende, miaba idi kayiyi bena Izrayele!” Maweja-Nangila udi ubela batuangaji" 
Malachi1:6 — Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi ngambila batuangaji ne: Muana wa balume udi unemeka tatuende, muena mudimu udi unemeka mfumuende. Kadi meme tshiena tatuenu anyi? Tshiena mfumuenu anyi? Nanku kanuena nunnemeka, kanuena nuntshina bua tshinyi? Nudi numpetula, nunkonka ne: “Tudi bakupetule munyi?”" 
Malachi1:7 Nudi nulambula biakudia bindi tshiyi mua kuanyisha pa tshilambuilu tshia nyi, nunkonka ne: “Tudi bakupende munyi?” Nanku nudi numpetula panudi nutangila tshilambuilu tshianyi bu tshintu tshidi katshiyi ne mushinga." 
Malachi1:8 Panudi nundambula nyama mufofame mesu, utebuka, nansha usama, nudi nuenza bimpe anyi? Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi nnukonka ne: Nuenu balambule mulombodi wa buloba nyama wa mushindu ewu, udi mua kusanka anyi? Neanusankishe pende anyi?" 
Malachi1:9 Ndi nnuambila mpindiewu ne: nuidikije mua kuntendelela meme Mvidi Mukulu wenu, bua mfuile bantu banyi luse. Kadi panudi nundambula bia nanku, nudi nuela meji ne: ndi mua kunuteleja anyi? Nansha kakese!" 
Malachi1:10 Bivua mua kuikala bimpe, bua muntu wa munkatshi muenu, akange biibi bia ku nzubu wa Mvidi Mukulu, bua kanutemeshi kabidi kapia pa tshilambuilu tshianyi. Bualu kanuena ne tshia nsongu tshinudi nuenzamu. Bualu meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi njadika ne: tshiena nsanka bua kunumona. Milambu inudi nundambula kayena indengelela nansha." 
Malachi1:11 Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika ne: kudi diba dipatukila too ne kudidi dibuelela bantu ba bisamba bionsu badi bannemeka. Miaba yonsu badi bangoshila musenga wa kamonya, badi bandambula milambu minkumbanyine. Bulelela, bisamba bia bende bidi binnemeka." 
Malachi1:12 Kadi nuenu nudi numpetula. Kanuena nuangata tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila ne mushinga. Nudi nulambuilapu biakudia bidi kabiyi bimpe. 
Malachi1:13 Nudi nuamba kabidi ne: “Udi utupungija ne mudimu mukole be.” Nudi amu numpetula meme Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu. Nudi nundambula nyama miiba, mikale itebuka, nansha isama. Ndi nnukonka ne: mundi mua kuanyisha milambu ya mushindu ewu mmunyi?" 
Malachi1:14 Muntu udi ne nyama mimpe mu bimuna biende, undaya nyama muimpe, kadi undinga, undambula nyama udi ne tshilema, mmuena diakabi. Bualu meme ndi mukalenga munene udi bisamba bionsu bitshina. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu udi njadika nanku." 
Malachi2:1 “Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi nnubela nuenu batuangaji, ne:" 
Malachi2:2 — Nunteleje, nunnemeke, tshianana nennukengeshe. Diakalenga dimvua munulaye nediandamuke diakabi. Bulelela nengenze nanku, bualu kanuena nuangata mikenji yanyi ne mushinga." 
Malachi2:3 Nennyoke kabidi ndelanganyi yenu. Nennuele tumvi mu mesu, tumvi tua nyama inudi nuosha mu bibilu bienu. Nebanuimanshe nuenu pamue ne tumvi atu." 
Malachi2:4 Diba adi, nenujingulule ne: Meme Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu ndi munubele, bua kukumbaja ndondu umvua mutue ne Levi, kabidi ne ndelanganyi yende." 
Malachi2:5 Bualu bua ndondu ewu, mvua mubapeshe muoyi, mubatutshishe dikasa dimpe. Bobu bawa balaya bua kunnemeka, kuntumikila, kuntshina. Ke tshivuabu benza." 
Malachi2:6 Bavua balongesha amu malu mimpe. Kabavua bashima. Bawa bumvuangana nanyi bimpe, benza bimvua musue. Bawa basaka bantu ba bungi bua balekele kuenza malu mabi." 
Malachi2:7 Eyowa, mudimu wa mutuangaji udi wa kulongesha bantu, bua bamanye Mvidi Mukulu. Yeye ke udi bantu bakonka bua kumanya tshidibu ne bua kuenza. Bualu yeye ke udi ufikisha malu a Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kudi bantu." 
Malachi2:8 Kadi nuenu batuangaji, nudi banyange mudimu wenu. Nudi balenduishe bantu ba bungi ku dilongesha dienu. Nudi bupule ndondu umvua mutue nenu. Meme Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu ndi njadika nanku." 
Malachi2:9 Nanku, meme nensake bena Izrayele bonsu bua banupepeje, banufuishe bundu, bualu kanuena nuenza mundi musue. Nudi nuenzela bantu malu ne kansungansunga.”" 
Malachi2:10 Tuetu bonsu katuena bena tatu umue anyi? Mvidi Mukulu wa mumue ke udi mutufuke! Kadi tudi tuenzelangana malu mabi, tupula ndondu uwa Mvidi Mukulu mutue ne bankambua betu bua tshinyi?" 
Malachi2:11 Bena Yuda mbupule ndondu uvuabu batue. Mbenzele malu mabi mu Yerushalayime, ne mu ditunga dijima dia Izrayele. Bualu mbapetule muaba wa tshijila, udi Maweja-Nangila munange. Mbasele bakaji badi batendelela nwidie ya bisamba bikuabu." 
Malachi2:12 Maweja-Nangila umushe muntu yonsu udi wenza malu mabi a nanku munkatshi mua ndelanganyi ya Yakobe, nansha yeye ulambula Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu milambu!" 
Malachi2:13 Bualu buibidi bunudi nuenza mbobu ebu: nudi nubolesha tshilambuilu tshia Maweja-Nangila ne binsonji; nudi nudila, nutua mikemu, bualu Maweja-Nangila katshiena utangila milambu yenu, katshiena wanyisha binudi numulambula." 
Malachi2:14 Nudi nukonka ne: katshiena ubianyisha bua tshinyi? Bualu nuvua balaye ku mesu kua Maweja-Nangila ne: nendamate mukaji undi musele ku buana buanyi. Yeye ke muena kuanyi undi musungule. Kadi nuenu kumubenga. 
Malachi2:15 Maweja-Nangila ki ngudi munuenze nende muntu umue ku mubidi ne ku lungenyi anyi? Tshidi muntu umue awu wipatshila ntshinyi? Nkupeta bana badi bantu ba Mvidi Mukulu! Nenku nudilame bimpe, kanulekedi mukaji unuvua basele ku buana buenu." 
Malachi2:16 Maweja-Nangila Mvidi Mukulu wa Izrayele, ne wa bukole buonsu, udi wamba ne: “Ndi ndiwula dishipa dia dibaka. Muntu udi wenza nanku udi amu bu muntu mushipianganyi. Nudimuke bua kanushipi ndondu wenu.”" 
Malachi2:17 Nudi nutondesha Maweja-Nangila ne mayuki enu. Nudi nukonka ne: “Tudi tumutondesha munyi?” Bidi bimutonda ke miaku inudi nuamba ne: “Maweja-Nangila udi wanyisha muntu udi wenza malu mabi. Tshianana uvua mua kunyoka bantu ba mushindu ewu. Ke kabidi miaku yenu ya ne: “Mvidi Mukulu utu ukosa nsambu pa yoyi, udi penyi?”" 
Malachi3:1 Telejayi mudi Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu unuandamuna ne: “Ndi ntuma muntu wanyi ne mukenji bua kundongoluelaye njila. Maweja-Nangila unudi nujinga neafike lukasa mu nzubu wende. Muntu udi ne mukenji unudi bindile awu, neanumanyishe ndondu undi mutue nenu. Nyeye awu ukadi ulua!”" 
Malachi3:2 Kudi muntu washala ne muoyi pafikaye anyi? Kudi muntu washala muimane kulu pamuenekaye anyi? Yeye neikale bu kapia kadi kengulula tshiamu, bu nsabanga wa kusukula nende bilamba." 
Malachi3:3 Neasombe panshi, bu mudi muntu udi wengulula, ulengeja tshiamu. Neumbushe mikiya yonsu ya batuangaji ba mu ndelanganyi ya Levi, pashishe bobu nebalambule milambu yabu kudi Maweja-Nangila. Neabatokeshe bu mudibu batokesha tshiamu tshia mpawungi, ne tshiamu tshitoke tshia mushinga mukole. Diba adi, batuangaji nebafile milambu yabu kudi Maweja-Nangila, mushindu udi mikenji yamba." 
Malachi3:4 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila neanyishe milambu ya bantu ba mu Yuda ne ba mu Yerushalayime, bu muvuaye muyanyishe kale, mu bidimu bishale panyima." 
Malachi3:5 Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu udi ujadika ne: “Nemfike munkatshi muenu bua kunulumbuluisha. Nempishe lukasa bantu badi benza malu a majimbu, badi benda tshiendenda, badi baditshipa mitshipu ya dishima, badi babenga kufuta muena mudimu, badi bakengesha bakaji bakamba, bana ba nshiya ne benyi, nansha bonsu badi kabayi bantshina meme.”" 
Malachi3:6 “Meme Maweja-Nangila tshiena nkudimuka. Kadi nuenu kabidi nudi basue kushala kashidi ndelanganyi menemene ya Yakobe. 
Malachi3:7 Nudi babenge malongesha anyi bu muvua bankambua benu benze, kanuena baakumbaje. Pinganayi kundi, nanku meme nempingane kunudi. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika nanku. Kadi nudi nuamba ne: ‘Nempingane kuudi munyi?’" 
Malachi3:8 Ndi nnuandamuna ne: ‘Panudi nudinga Mvidi Mukulu, nudi nuenza bimpe anyi? Kadi nuenu nudi amu nundinga!’ Nudi nunkonka ne: ‘Tudi tukudinga munyi?’ ‘Nudi nundinga mu tshia dikumi tshia binudi nupeta, ne mu milambu." 
Malachi3:9 Nuenu tshisamba tshijima, nudi bena diakabi, bualu nudi nunshima." 
Malachi3:10 Nanku nundambule mu nzubu wanyi tshia dikumi menemene tshia ku midimu inudi nukuata, bua biakudia bikale kashidi mu nzubu muanyi. Pa bualu ebu, nudi mua kunteta meme Mvidi Mukulu wa bukole buonsu, nenumone mundi nnunzuluila mayeba a mu diulu, nnuela lupemba, ndokesha mvula." 
Malachi3:11 Nenkandike bishi bua kabinyangi bia pa madimi, kabipangishi mionji yenu ya nwinyo bua kukuamayi. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi nnulaya nanku." 
Malachi3:12 Bisamba bikuabu bionsu nebinuambe ne: nudi bena diakalenga, bualu nudi nusomba mu ditunga dimpe ditambe. Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika nanku.’ ”" 
Malachi3:13 Maweja-Nangila udi wamba ne: “Nudi nunjana, pashishe nudi nukonka ne: ‘Tudi tukujana, tukuamba bishi?’" 
Malachi3:14 Nuvua nuamba ne: ‘Kukuatshila Mvidi Mukulu mudimu kakuena ne difutu to. Tuvua bitabe mikenji yende, banyingalale, bua Maweja-Nangila kutufuilaye luse, kadi katuvua bapete bualu bua nsongu nansha bumue." 
Malachi3:15 Mpindiewu tudi tujadika ne: bena dikamakama ke bena diakalenga; bena buenzavi ke badi balubuluka. Nansha bobu bakeba Mvidi Mukulu lonji, badi amu bapanduka!’ ”" 
Malachi3:16 Pashishe bantu bonsu bavua banemeka Maweja-Nangila, kuelanganabu pabu meji. Maweja-Nangila uvua mubateleje, mumvue bivuabu bamba. Kufundabu mena a bonsu bavua bamutshina, bamunemeka mu mukanda, yeye mutangile." 
Malachi3:17 Pashishe Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu kuamba ne: — Dituku dindi ndeja bukole buanyi, bantu aba nebikale bantu banyi. Nembafuile luse, bu mudi tatu ufuila muanende udi umuenzela mudimu luse." 
Malachi3:18 Pashishe nenumone dishilangana didi pankatshi pa bantu bimpe ne bantu babi, pankatshi pa badi benzela Mvidi Mukulu mudimu ne badi kabayi bamuenzela mudimu." 
Malachi3:19 Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu ndi njadika ne: dituku dindi mfika munda, didi difika, didi bu tshikutu tshia kapia. Dituku adi neboshe bena dikamakama ne benji ba malu mabi, bu mudibu bosha bisosa. Nebabutule bonsu butubutuu." 
Malachi3:20 Kadi nuenu badi bannemeka, ndi nnulaya ne: lupandu luanyi nelumueneke, bu mudi diba dibanda nkenke yadi ijikija masama. Nenudienzele malu munudi basue, nenutupike ne disanka bu bana ba ngombe batupika padibu bapatuka mu tshikumbi." 
Malachi3:21 Dituku dindi ndeja bukole buanyi, nenuboze bantu babi, nebikale bu lupuishi muinshi mua makasa enu. Meme Maweja-Nangila wa bukole buonsu, ndi njadika nanku." 
Malachi3:22 — Nuvuluke bivua Moshe, muntu wanyi, mulongeshe. Nukumbaje mikenji imvua mumupeshile pa mukuna wa Orebe bua ayimanyishe bena Izrayele bonsu." 
Malachi3:23 Dituku dia Maweja-Nangila, dituku dinene, dikuatshisha bowa, kadiyi dianji kufika, nennutumine muambi Eliya." 
Malachi3:24 Yeye neatuangaje batatu ne bana, bana ne batatuabu. Nenku tshiakubutula buloba buenu diba dindi mfika nansha." 
Luke3:25 Matitya, Amosa, Nakume, Esli, Nagayi,"
